Genesis1:1 A tirin Pathianin lei leh van a siam a. 
Genesis1:2 Tin, lei hi a chhiaa a ruak ngawt a ni a; tui thuk tak chung chu a thim mup a. Pathian Thlarau chuan tui chungte chu a awp reng a." 
Genesis1:3 Tin, Pathianin, Eng lo awm rawh se, a ti a: tichuan eng a lo awm ta mai a." 
Genesis1:4 Tin, Pathianin eng chu a en a, tha a ti hle a: tichuan Pathianin eng leh thim chu a then ta a." 
Genesis1:5 Tin, Pathianin eng chu Chhun a vuah a, thim chu Zan a vuah a. Tichuan tlai lam a awm a, zing lam a awm bawk a, a ni khatna chu." 
Genesis1:6 Tin, Pathianin, Tui leh tui karah chuan boruak zau tak awm se la, chu chuan tui leh tuite chu then rawh se, a ti a." 
Genesis1:7 Tichuan Pathianin, boruak zau tak chu a siam a, boruak zau tak hnuaia tui awmte leh boruak zau tak chunga tui awmte chu a then ta a: chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:8 Tin, Pathianin boruak zau tak chu Van a vuah a. Tichuan, tlai lam a awm a, zing lam a awm bawka, a ni hnihna chu." 
Genesis1:9 Tin, Pathianin, Van hnuaia tuite chu hmun khatah awm khawm se la, khawmual chu lang rawh se, a ti a: tichuan chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:10 Tin, Pathianin khawmual chu Lei a vuah a; tui awm khawmte chu Tuifinriatte a vuah a: tin, Pathianin chu chu a en a, tha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:11 Tin, Pathianin, Leiin hnim te, thlai chi nei te, thei kung, leia anmahni chi awm dan tur anga rah, a rah chhunga a chi awmte chu chhuah rawh se, a ti a: tichuan chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:12 Tichuan lei chuan hnim te, thlai anmahni chi awm dan tur anga chi nei te, thing anmahni chi awm dan tur anga rah, a rah chhunga a chi awmte chu a chhuah ta a: tin, Pathianin a en a, tha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:13 Tichuan tlai lam a awm a, zing lam a awm bawk a, a ni thumna chu." 
Genesis1:14 Tin, Pathianin, ""Chhun leh zan thenna tirin van boruak zau takah chuan entute awm se la, chungte chu chhinchhiahna te, hun bi te, ni te, kum te hriatna tur ni rawh se." 
Genesis1:15 Lei chung en turin van boruak zau takah chuan entuahte awm bawk rawh se,"" a ti a: tichuan chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:16 Tichuan Pathianin entu ropui tak pahnihte khi a siam ta a; entu ropui zawk chu chhun rorel lurin entu ropui lo zawk chu zan rorel turin a siam a: arsite pawh khi a siam bawk a. 
Genesis1:17 Tin, Pathianin chungte chu, lei chung en tur leh," 
Genesis1:18 chhun chungah leh zan chunga rorel tur leh, eng leh thim then turin van boruak zau takah khian a dah ta a: tichuan Pathianin chu chu a en a, tha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:19 Tichuan tlai lam a awm a, zing lam a awm bawk a, a ni lina chu." 
Genesis1:20 Tin, Pathianin, tuite chuan thil siam che thei nunna neite tam tak chhuah teuh se la, savate pawh van boruak zau tak zawl duaiah, lei chungah chuan thlawk rawh se, a ti a." 
Genesis1:21 Tichuan Pathianin tuifinriat thil nasa tak lian pui puite chu a siam a, thil nung che thei tinreng, tuiin a chhuah teuhte chu, anmahni chi awm dan tur ang theuhin a siam bawk a, sava thla nei tinreng pawh anmahni chi awm dan tur ang theuhin a siam bawk a: tin, Pathianin chu chu a en a, tha a ti hIe a" 
Genesis1:22 Tin, Pathianin, ""Chi tam tak thlahin lo pung u la, tuifinriat tuite tikhat rawh u, savate pawh leiah pung rawh se,"" tiin, mal a sawm a." 
Genesis1:23 Tichuan tlai lam a awma, zing lam a awm bawk a, a ni ngana chu." 
Genesis1:24 Tin, Pathianin, ""Lei chuan thil Nung anmahni chi awm dan tur ang theuhin, ran te, rannung te, ram sa te anmahni chi awm dan tur ang theuhin chhuah rawh se,"" a ti a: tichuan chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:25 Tichuan Pathianin ram sa anmahni chi awm dan tur ang theuhin, rante anmahni chi awm dan tur ang theuhin, leia thil bawkvaka kal zawng zawngte anmahni chi awm dan tur ang theuhin a siam a: tin, Pathianin chu chu a en a, tha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:26 Tin, Pathianin, ""Kan anpuiin, keimahni ang takin, mihring siam i la, anni chu tuifinriata sangha chungah te, chungleng sava chungah te, ran chungah te, lei chung zawng zawngah te, rannung leia bawkvaka kal zawng zawng chungah te thu i neihtir ang u,"" a ti a." 
Genesis1:27 Tichuan Pathianin ama anpuiin mihring a siam a, Pathian anpui ngeiin a ni a siam ni; mipaah leh hmeichhiaah a siam a ni." 
Genesis1:28 Tin, Pathianin anmahni mal a sawm a: Pathian vekin an hnenah, ""Chi tam tak thlaha, lo pungin, leilung hi luah khat u la, in thu thuin awmtir rawh u; tuifinriata sangha chungah te, chungleng sava chungah te, thil Nung leia bawkvaka kal zawng zawng chungah te thu Nei bawk rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Genesis1:29 Tin, Pathian vekin, ""Ngai teh u, lei chung zawng zawnga thlai chi Nei awm tinreng leh thing tinreng, thing chi nei rah awmnate chu, ka pe che u a ni; in chaw atan a ni ang." 
Genesis1:30 tin, leia sa tinreng hnenah te, chung�leng sava tinreng hnenah te, thil, leia bawkvaka kal, nunna Nei tinreng hnenah te an chaw atan hnim hring tinreng ka pe a ni,"" a ti a: tichuan chutiang chu a lo ni ta a.Tin, Pathianin a thil siam tinreng chu a en a, ngai teh, tha a ti em em a. Tichuan tlai lam a awm a, zing lam a awm bawk, a, a ni rukna chu." 
Genesis1:31 Tin, Pathianin a thil siam tinreng chu a en a, ngai teh, tha a ti em em a. Tichuan tlai lam a awm a, zing lam a awm bawk, a, a ni rukna chu." 
Genesis2:1 Tichuan lei leh van chu an chunga awmho zawng zawngte nen chuan siam zawh a ni ta a. 
Genesis2:2 Tin, Pathianin ni sarih niah chuan a thil siam chu a ti zo a: ni sarih niah chuan a thil siam zawng zawng chu a chawlhsan ta a." 
Genesis2:3 Tichuan Pathianin ni sarih ni chu mal a sawm a, a serh ta a: chu mi niah chuan Pathianin a thil siam zawng zawng, thu ngawta a siam leh kuta a siamte chu a chawlhsan tak avangin." 
Genesis2:4 Lei leh van siam lai khan an thlahte chu he'ng hi an ni, LALPA Pathianin lei leh van a siam ni khan." 
Genesis2:5 Tin, leia hnim reng reng hi leiah a la awm lo a, leia thlai reng reng pawh hi a Ia to hek lo: LALPA Pathianin lei chungah ruah a la surtir si lo a, lei lettu turin mihring lah an la awm hek lo;" 
Genesis2:6 amaherawhchu lei atangin chhum a lo chhuak a, lei chung zawng zawng chu a tihnawng thin a ni." 
Genesis2:7 Tin, LALPA Pathianin Ieia vaivutin mihring a siam a, a hnarah chuan nunna thaw chu a thaw liut a; tichuan mihring chu mi nung a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis2:8 Tin, LALPA Pathianin chhak lamah, Eden-ah chuan huan a siam a; a mihring siam chu chutah chuan a awm tir ta a." 
Genesis2:9 Tin, lei atangin LALPA Pathianin thing mit la tak leh ei mi tinreng a totir a; nunna thing pawh huan lai takah chuan a totir bawk a, a chhia leh tha hriatna thing pawh." 
Genesis2:10 Tin, Eden atangin huan tihnawng turin lui a luang chhuak a; chuta tang chuan a peng darh a, peng li a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis2:11 A pakhatna hming chu Pison a ni a: chu chu Havila ram zawng zawng hualtu chu a ni a, chutah chuan rangkachak a awm a;" 
Genesis2:12 chu mi rama rangkachak chu tha tak a ni: chutah chuan bedolak leh berul lung pawh a awm. 
Genesis2:13 Tin, lui pahnihna hming chu Gihon a ni a: chu mi ngei chu Kus ram zawng zawng hualtu chu a ni." 
Genesis2:14 Tin, lui pathumna hming chu Hiddekel a ni a: chu chu Assuria ram chhak lama luang chu a ni. Tin, lui palina chu Euphrates a ni." 
Genesis2:15 Tin, LALPA Pathian chuan mihring chu a hruaia, Eden huanah chuan a enkawl leh a veng turin a dah ta a." 
Genesis2:16 Tin, LALPA Pathian chuan mihring hnenah chuan, ""Huana thing tinreng rahte hi i duh duhin i ei thei e;" 
Genesis2:17 a chhia leh a tha hriatna thing rah erawh hi chu i ei tur a ni lo: i ei chuan i ei ni la lain i thi ngei tur a ni,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Genesis2:18 Tin, LALPA Pathian chuan, ""Mihring amah chauha awm hi a tha lo e: a mah tanpuitu tur a kawppui awm mi ka siamsak teh ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis2:19 Tin, LALPA Pathian chuan, leiin ram sa tinreng leh chungleng sava tinreng chu a siam a; tin, an hmingah eng nge a vuah dawn tih hriatna'n Adama hnenah a hruai hlawm a; tin, thil nung tinrengte chu Adama'n an hminga a lo vuah apiang chu an hming a lo ni hlen ta a." 
Genesis2:20 Tichuan Adama chuan ran zawng zawng te, chungleng sava te, ram sa tinrengte chu hming a vuahsak theuh a; nimahsela Adama tan chuan tanpuitu tur a kawppui awm mi a awm lo a." 
Genesis2:21 Tichuan LALPA Pathian chuan Adama chu tui takin a muthilhtir a, tichuan a muhil ta a; tin, a nakruh pakhat a la a, chu mi ai chu tisain a awh phuitir ta a;" 
Genesis2:22 tin, LALPA Pathian chuan Adama laka a lak nakruh chu hmeichhiaah a siam a, Adama hnenah a hruai ta a." 
Genesis2:23 Tin, Adama chuan, ""Hei zet chu ka ruh ang ruh neia, ka tisa ang tisa nei ngei chu a ni: Mipa laka lak chhuah a nih avangin 'Hmeichhia' tih tur a ni ang"", a ti a." 
Genesis2:24 Chuvangin mipain a nu leh pa a kalsan ang a, a nupui a vuan ang: tichuan tisa pum khat an lo ni tawh ang,Tin, Adama leh a nupui chu an pahnihin saruakin an awm a, an zak lem lo a." 
Genesis2:25 Tin, Adama leh a nupui chu an pahnihin saruakin an awm a, an zak lem lo a." 
Genesis3:1 Tin, LALPA Pathianin ram sa a siam zawng zawngah chuan rul a fing ver vek ber a. Tichuan ani chuan hmeichhe hnenah chuan,""Pathianin, Huana thing rah reng reng hi in ei tur a ni lo, a ti elo maw?"" a ti a." 
Genesis3:2 Tin, hmeichhia chuan rul hnenah chuan, ""Ti lo e, huana thing rahte hi kan ei thei a sin:" 
Genesis3:3 huan lai taka thing awm rah erawh chu Pathianin, In ei tur a ni lo, tawh pawh in tawk tur a ni lo, chutilochuan in thi ang, a ti a ni"", a ti a." 
Genesis3:4 in, rul chuan hmeichhe hnenah chuan, ""Thi teh suh e:" 
Genesis3:5 in ei ni apang chuan in mit a lo var ang a, a chhia leh tha hriain Pathian ang in lo ni dawn tih Pathianin a hre reng a nih chu,"" a ti a." 
Genesis3:6 Tichuan hmeichhia chuan thing rah chu ei mi a ni tih leh, mit la tak a ni tih leh, mi tifing turin thing rah itawm tak a ni tih a hriat chuan thing a rah thenkhat chu a lo a, a ei ta a; tin, a pasal a pe ve a, a ni pawhin a ei ve ta a." 
Genesis3:7 Tichuan an pahnih chuan an mit a lo var a, saruak an nih an lo inhre ta a; tichuan theipui hnah an thui khawm a, pawnfen an insiam chawp a." 
Genesis3:8 Tin, LALPA Pathian chu huana tlai ni nema a leng thawm chu an lo hria a: tichuan Adama leh a nupui chuan huana thing zingah chuan LALPA Pathian chu an lo bihruksan ta a." 
Genesis3:9 Tin, LALPA Pathian chuan Adama chu a ko a, a hnenah, ""Khawiah nge i awm?"" a ti a." 
Genesis3:10 Tin, ani chuan, ""Huana i thawm ka hria a, saruaka awm ka nih avangin ka hlau ta a; tichuan ka biru ta a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis3:11 Tin, a ni chuan, ""Saruak i nih tuin nge hrilh che? Thing rah ei loh tur ka tih tlat che kha i ei ta a ni maw?"" a ti a." 
Genesis3:12 Tin, Adama chuan, ""Mi awmpui tura i hmeichhe mi pek ngei khan thing rah chu mi pe a, ka ei ta a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis3:13 Tin, LALPA Pathian chuan hmeichhe hnenah, ""I thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni le?"" a ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan, ""Rulin mi tihder a, ka ei ta a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis3:14 Tin, LALPA Pathian chuan rul hnenah chuan, ""Hetiang hi i tih avangin ran zawng zawng leh ram sa tinreng zingah chuan anchhe dawngin i awm bik ang a, bawkkhupin i Kal fo tawh ang a, i dam chhung zawngin vaivut i ei bawk tur a ni:" 
Genesis3:15 tin, nang leh hmeichhia hi ka indotir ang che u a, i thlahte leh a thlahte pawh ka la indotir bawk ang: chu mi chuan i lu a la tithitling ang a, nangin a ke artui i la tithitling ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis3:16 Hmeichhe hnenah chuan, ""I hreawmna leh i nau paina chu nasa takin ka tipung ang a; hreawm takin fa i hring thin ang a; nimahsela i duhzawng chu i pasal lam a ni ang a, ani chuan i chungah thu a nei fo ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis3:17 Tin, Adama hnenah chuan, ""I nupui thu i zawm a, thing pakhat, A rah i ei tur a ni lo tia thu ka pek che kha, a rah i ei avangin lei hi nangmah avangin anchhe dawngin a awm ta a ni; i dam chhung zawngin rim taka thawkin a rah chu i ei tawh ang;" 
Genesis3:18 hling leh buarte pawh a chhuaksak ang che; tin, leia thlai chu i ei tawh ang;" 
Genesis3:19 tin, leia i kir leh hma loh chuan i hmaia thlantui luang zawih zawihin chaw i ei tawh ang; lei atanga lak chhuah i ni si a: vaivut i ni a, vaivutah i kir leh tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis3:20 Tin, Adama chuan a nupui chu mi nung zawng zawng nu a nih avangin a hmingah Evi a vuah a." 
Genesis3:21 Tin, LALPA Pathian chuan Adama tan leh a nupui tan chuan savun kawrfualte a siamsak a, a haktir ta a." 
Genesis3:22 Tin, LALPA Pathian chuan, ""Ngai teh u, mihring chu a chhia leh a tha hriain keimahni ang a lo ni ta; tunah chuan a kuta banin nunna thing rah chu loa eiin, kumkhuain a nung dah ang e,"" a ti a:" 
Genesis3:23 chuvangin LALPA Pathian chuan amah a lak chhuahna lei chu let turin Eden huan ata chu a tir chhuak ta a.Chutichuan mihring chu a hnawt chhuak ta a; tin, nunna thing kawng chu veng turin Eden huan chhak lampangah chuan Cherub-te leh mei khandaih vir tawn zawk zawk chu a awmtir ta bawk a." 
Genesis3:24 Chutichuan mihring chu a hnawt chhuak ta a; tin, nunna thing kawng chu veng turin Eden huan chhak lampangah chuan Cherub-te leh mei khandaih vir tawn zawk zawk chu a awmtir ta bawk a." 
Genesis4:1 Tin, Adama chuan a nupui Evi chu a pawl a; tichuan a rai a, Kaina a hring a, ""LALPA tanpuiin mipa ka lo nei ta"", a ti a." 
Genesis4:2 Tin, a nau Abela a rawn hring leh a. Tin, Abela chu beram vengtuah a awm a, Kaina erawh chu lei leituah a awm." 
Genesis4:3 Tin, nakinah chuan heti hi a ni a, Kaina chuan LALPA hnena hlan atan loa mi a rawn la a." 
Genesis4:4 Tin, Abela pawh chuan a beram rual zinga piang hmasa berte leh a thau chu a rawn la bawk a. Tin, LALPA chuan Abela leh a thil hlan chu a lawm a:" 
Genesis4:5 Kaina leh a thil hlan erawh chu a lawm ve lo a. Tichuan Kaina chu a thinur em em a, a hmel chu a lo dur ta khup a." 
Genesis4:6 Tichuan LALPA chuan Kaina hnenah chuan, ""Engati nge i thin a ur? Engati nge i hmel a lo dur tak?" 
Genesis4:7 Thil i tih that chuan lawm i hlawh dawn lo em ni? i tih that loh erawh chuan sual chu kawngka bulah a bawk reng a ni: a duhzawng chu nangma hnen lam a ni ang a, a chungah thu i nei tur a ni"", a ti a." 
Genesis4:8 Kaina chuan a nau Abela hnenah, ""Lovah i feh ang,"" a ti a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, loa an awm laiin Kaina chuan a nau Abela chu a bei a, a that ta mai a." 
Genesis4:9 Tichuan LALPA chuan Kaina hnenah chuan, ""I nau Abela kha khawiah nge a awm tak?"" a ti a. Tin, a ni chuan, ""Ka hre lo. Ka nau vengtu ka ni em ni?"" a ti a." 
Genesis4:10 Tin, ani chuan, ""Engnge i tih tak ni? I nau thisen aw chuan lei atangin mi au a sin." 
Genesis4:11 Chuvangin, lei, i kut ata i nau thisen dawng tura a ka lo angtu ata hi anchhe dawng i ni ta;" 
Genesis4:12 lei i leh pawhin a thatna chu a pe phal tawh lo ang che; leiah hian tlan bo leh vakvai i lo ni tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis4:13 Tin, Kaina chuan LALPA hnenah, ""I mi hremna hi a nasa em a, ka tuar zo lo ang." 
Genesis4:14 Ngai teh, nangin vawiinah hian lei chung ata mi hnawt chhuak ta si a; i mithmuh phak loha thurukin ka awm dawn ta a; leiah hian tlan bo leh vakvai ka lo ni dawn ta si a; tichuan heti hi a ni ang a, tupawh mi hmu apiangin mi that mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis4:15 Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, ""Chuti a nih chuan tupawh Kaina that apiang chu a leh sarihin a chungah phuba an la ang,"" a ti a. Tichuan miin amah an hmuha an thah lohna'n Lalpa'n Kaina chu a chhinchhiah ta a." 
Genesis4:16 Tichuan Kaina chu LALPA hnen ata chu a chhuak a, Eden chhak lama Nod ramah chuan a awm ta a." 
Genesis4:17 Tin, Kaina chuan a nupui a pawl a; tichuan a rai a, Enoka a hring a: tin, khua a siam a, a khaw hmingah chuan a fapa hming chawiin Enok a ti a." 
Genesis4:18 Tin, Enok chuan fapa Irada a nei a: Irada chuan fapa Mehujaela a nei a: Mehujaela chuan fapa Methusaela a nei a: Methusaela chuan fapa Lameka a nei a." 
Genesis4:19 Tin, Lameka chuan nupui pahnih a nei a: pakhat hming chu Adaii a ni a, pakhat hming chu Zillaii a ni." 
Genesis4:20 Tin, Adaii chuan Jabal a hring a: ani chu puan ina awm ran vulhtuho thlahtu a ni." 
Genesis4:21 A nau hming chu Jubala a ni a: ani chu tingtang leh phenglawng tumtuho zawng zawng thlahtu a ni. 
Genesis4:22 Tin, Zillaii pawh chuan Tubal-Kaina dar leh thir hriamhrei tinreng chhertu a hring a: tin, Tubal-Kaina farnu chu Naamaii a ni a" 
Genesis4:23 Tin, Lameka chuan a nupuite hnenah chuan Adaii leh Zillaii te u, ka aw hria u la; Lameka nupui te u, ka thusawi hi ngaithla rawh u: Mi tihhliam avangin mi ka that a, Mi vuak thitlin avangin tlangval ka that a ni:" 
Genesis4:24 Kaina phuba mah aleh sariha an lak dawn chuan Lameka phuba chu aleh sawmsarih leh pasarihin an la ngei ngei ang, a ti a." 
Genesis4:25 Tin, Adama chuan a nupui chu a pawl leh a: tichuan ani chuan fapa a hring leh a, a hmingah chuan Setha a sa a: Pathianin Abela aiah chi thlah dang mi ruatsak ta; Kaina chuan amah a that ta si a, a ti a.Tin, Setha chuan amah ngei pawh chuan fapa a nei ta a; a hmingah chuan Enosa a sa a; chu mi lai chuan miten LALPA hming an lo lam tan ta a." 
Genesis4:26 Tin, Setha chuan amah ngei pawh chuan fapa a nei ta a; a hmingah chuan Enosa a sa a; chu mi lai chuan miten LALPA hming an lo lam tan ta a." 
Genesis5:1 Hei hi Adama thlahte chuanna lehkha bu chu a ni. Pathianin thu ngawta mihring a siam ni khan Pathian anpuiin amah chu a siam a; 
Genesis5:2 thu ngawtin mipa leh hmeichhiaah anmahni chu a siam a ni; thu ngawta siama an awm ni khan mal a sawmsak a, an hmingah chuan ""Mihring"" a vuah a." 
Genesis5:3 Tin, Adama chuan kum 130 a nihin amah ang tak, ama anpui ngei fapa a nei a; a hmingah Setha a sa a:" 
Genesis5:4 Tin, Setha a neih hnu chuan Adama chu kum 800 a la dam a: fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis5:5 Tichuan Adama dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 930 a ni a: tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:6 Tin, Setha chuan kum 105 a nihin fapa Enosa a nei a:" 
Genesis5:7 tin, Enosa a neih hnu chuan Setha chu kum 807 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a:" 
Genesis5:8 tichuan Setha dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 912 a ni a: tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:9 Tin, Enosa chuan kum 90 a nihin fapa Kenana a nei a:" 
Genesis5:10 tin, Kenana a neih hnu chuan Enosa chu kum 815 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlam a:" 
Genesis5:11 tichuan Enosa dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 905 a ni a: tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:12 Tin, Kenana chuan kum 70 a nihin fapa Mahalalela a nei a:" 
Genesis5:13 tin, Mahalalela a neih hnu chuan Kenana chu kum 840 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a:" 
Genesis5:14 tichuan Kenana dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 910 a ni a: tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:15 Tin, Mahalalela chuan kum 65 a nihin fapa Jareda a nei a:" 
Genesis5:16 tin, Jareda a neih hnu chuan Mahalalela kum 830 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a:" 
Genesis5:17 tichuan Mahalalela dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 895 a ni a, tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:18 Tin, Jareda chuan kum 162 a nihin fapa Enoka a nei a:" 
Genesis5:19 tin, Enoka a neih hnu chuan Jareda chu kum 800 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a:" 
Genesis5:20 tichuan Jareda dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 962 a ni a: tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:21 Tin, Enoka chuan kum 65 a nihin fapa Methusela a nei a:" 
Genesis5:22 tin, Methusela a neih hnu chuan Enoka chu kum 300 chhung zawng Pathian nen an leng dun thin a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a:" 
Genesis5:23 tichuan Enoka dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 365 a ni a: 
Genesis5:24 tin, Enoka chu Pathian nen an leng dun thin a: tin, a awm ta loa; Pathianin a la bo ta a ni." 
Genesis5:25 Tin, Methusela chuan kum 187 a nihin fapa Lameka a nei a:" 
Genesis5:26 tin, Lameka a neih hnu chuan Methusela chu kum 782 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a:" 
Genesis5:27 tichuan Methusela dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 969 a ni a: tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:28 Tin, Lameka chuan kum 182 a nihin fapa a nei a:" 
Genesis5:29 tin, ""He mi ngei hian Lalpa anchhe lawh lei avanga kan hnathawhna leh kuta kan thawh rimnaah hian min thlamuan tawh ang,"" tiin. a hmingah Nova a sa a." 
Genesis5:30 tin, Nova a neih hnu chuan Lameka chu kum 595 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a:" 
Genesis5:31 tin, Lameka dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 777 a ni a: tin, a thi ta a.Tin, Nova chu kum 500 mi a ni a: Nova chuan fapa Sema te, Hama te, Japhetha te a nei a." 
Genesis5:32 Tin, Nova chu kum 500 mi a ni a: Nova chuan fapa Sema te, Hama te, Japhetha te a nei a." 
Genesis6:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lei chungah mihring an lo puna fanute an lo neih hlawm chuan," 
Genesis6:2 Pathian fapate chuan mihring fanute chu hmel tha takin an hmu a; tichuan an duhzawng apiangte chu nupuiahte an lo nei ta thin a. 
Genesis6:3 Tichuan LALPA chuan, ""Ka Thlarau chuan mihring chu kumkhuain a bei fo lo ang, anni pawh chu tisa an ni si a: nimahsela kum za leh kum sawmhnih chu an la dam ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis6:4 Chung lai chuan Milianho chu leiah hian an awm a; chu mi hnuah pawh Pathian fapaten mihring fanute chu an pawl a, an laka fate an neih thin lai khan an awm bawk a: chungte chu hmasanga mi chak, mi hmingthangte kha an ni." 
Genesis6:5 Tin, LALPA chuan leiah hian mihring sualzia chu nasa tak a ni tih leh, an rilru suangtuahzia reng reng chu sual hlir a ni fo mai tih a lo hria a." 
Genesis6:6 Tichuan leiah hian mihring a lo siam tak avangin LALPA chu a inchhir a, rilru natna'n a hman phah ta a." 
Genesis6:7 Tichuan LALPA chuan, ""Ka mihring siam hi lei chung ata ka tiboral teh mai ang; mihring te, sa te, rannung te, chungleng sava te nen lam hian; ka siam tak avangin ka inchhir a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis6:8 Nova erawh chuan LALPA mit a tlung a. 
Genesis6:9 Heng hi Nova thlahte chu an ni. Nova chu mi fel tak a ni a, a dam rualpuite zingah chuan sawiselbo a ni: Nova chu Pathian nen an leng dun thin a." 
Genesis6:10 Tin, Nova chuan fapa pathum Sema te, Hama te, Japhetha te a nei a." 
Genesis6:11 Tin, lei hi Pathian mithmuhin a chhe zo tawh a, lei hi inpawngneknain a khat zo ta bawk a." 
Genesis6:12 Tin, Pathianin lei hi a en a, tin ngai teh, a chhe zo tawh a, tisa zawng zawngin leiah hian an awm dan an tichhe zo tawh si a." 
Genesis6:13 Tin, Pathianin Nova hnenah, ""Tisa zawng zawng tawpna chu ka hmaah a lo thleng ta a ni; anmahni avangin lei hi inpawngneknain a khat zo ta si a; tichuan ngai teh, a lei chawpin ka tiboral dawn e." 
Genesis6:14 I tan far thingin lawng siam rawh; lawngah chuan pindante i siam tur a ni a, a chhung lam leh a pawn lam tur chu far hnai i hnawih vek bawk tur a ni." 
Genesis6:15 Tin, hei hi i siam dan tur chu a ni: lawng dung lam chu tawng zathum ni se la, a vang lam chu tawng sawmnga ni se la, a san lam chu tawng sawmthum ni rawh se." 
Genesis6:16 Lawngah chuan tukverh i siam tur a ni a, a chung lam tawng khat chinah chuan i zo tur a ni; tin, lawng kawngka chu a pangah i siam tur a ni a: chhawng hnuaihnung leh chhawng hnihna leh chhawng thumna neiin i siam tur a ni." 
Genesis6:17 Tin, ngai teh, keimah ngeiin tisa zawng zawng, nunna thaw pai reng reng chu van hnuai ata tiboral turin leiah hian tui ka tilet dawn a ni; leia thil tinreng awm hi an thi vek ang." 
Genesis6:18 Amaherawhchu ka thuthlun chu i chungah ka tinghet zawk ang a; lawngah chuan i lut tur a ni; nang i lut tur a ni a, i fapate leh i nupui leh i fapate nupuite pawh i hnenah an lut ve tur a ni." 
Genesis6:19 Tin, tisa zawng zawnga thil nung tinreng zinga mi, chi tin pahnih zelin i hnenah tihnun ve turin lawngah chuan i hruai lut tur a ni; a nu leh a pa zel an ni tur a ni." 
Genesis6:20 Savate anmahni chi awm dan ang theuhin, rante anmahni chi awm dan ang theuhin, lei a rannung tinreng anmahni chi awm dan ang theuhin, chi tin pahnih zelin, i tihnun turin i hnenah an lo kal tur a ni." 
Genesis6:21 Tin, chaw, in ei mi zawng zawng la la, i hnenah dah khawm rawh; tichuan nang leh anni tan chaw a ni ang,"" a ti a.Chutiang chuan Novan a ti a; Pathiangin a hnena thu a pek zawng zawng ang ngei chuan a ti ta a." 
Genesis6:22 Chutiang chuan Novan a ti a; Pathiangin a hnena thu a pek zawng zawng ang ngei chuan a ti ta a. 
Genesis7:1 Tin, LALPA'n Nova hnenah chuan, ""Nang leh i chhungte zawng zawng chu lawngah lut rawh u; nang zawng tun lai thangthar zingah hian ka mithmuhin mi fel tak i nih hi ka hria che a ni," 
Genesis7:2 Sa thiang tinreng zinga mi, a pa leh a kawppui nu nen theuh tuak sarih zelin, sa thiang lo zinga mi, a pa leh a kawppui a nu nen theuh tuak khat zelin, chungleng sava zinga mi pawh, a nu leh a pa theuh tuak sarih zelin, lei chung zawng zawngah chi thlah tura tihnun turin i hnenah i hruai tur a ni." 
Genesis7:3 Sa thiang tinreng zinga mi, a pa leh a kawppui nu nen theuh tuak sarih zelin, sa thiang lo zinga mi, a pa leh a kawppui a nu nen theuh tuak khat zelin, chungleng sava zinga mi pawh, a nu leh a pa theuh tuak sarih zelin, lei chung zawng zawngah chi thlah tura tihnun turin i hnenah i hruai tur a ni." 
Genesis7:4 Ni sarih a la bak a, chu mi hnuah chuan lei chhung zawng ruah ka surtir ang a; ka thilnung siam tinreng hi lei chung ata ka tiboral ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis7:5 Tichuan Nova chuan LALPA'n a hnena thu a pek zawng zawng ang zel chuan a ti ta a. 
Genesis7:6 Tin, leia tui a let lai chuan Nova chu kum 600 mi a ni a." 
Genesis7:7 Tin, tui a let dawn avangin Nova chu lawngah chuan a lut a, a fapate leh a nupui leh a fapate nupuite pawh a hnenah an lut ve a." 
Genesis7:8 Pathianin Nova thu a pek ang khan sa thiang zinga mi pawh, sa thiang lo zinga mi pawh, sava zinga mi pawh, leia bawkvaka kal tinreng zinga mi pawh, a nu leh a pa theuh, a tuak zelin Nova hnenah lawngah chuan an lut ta a." 
Genesis7:9 Pathianin Nova thu a pek ang khan sa thiang zinga mi pawh, sa thiang lo zinga mi pawh, sava zinga mi pawh, leia bawkvaka kal tinreng zinga mi pawh, a nu leh a pa theuh, a tuak zelin Nova hnenah lawngah chuan an lut ta a." 
Genesis7:10 Tin, ni sarih hnuah chuan leiah hian tui chu a lo let ta a." 
Genesis7:11 Nova chu kum 600 a nih kum, a thla hnihna ni sawm leh ni sarih niah, chu mi ni ngei chuan tui thuk zau tak hna zawng zawngte chu a lo sah ta vek a, van tukverhte pawh a lo inhawng ta bawk a." 
Genesis7:12 Tin, ni sawmli leh zan sawmli chhung zawng leiah hian ruahpui vanawn a sur ta a." 
Genesis7:13 Chu mi ni ngei chuan Nova te, Nova fapa Sema te, Hama te, Jephetha te, Nova nupui te chu lawngah chuan an lut ta a, a fapate nupui pathumte pawh an hnenah an lut ve a;" 
Genesis7:14 anniho chu an lut a, sa tinreng anmahni chi awm dan ang theuhin, ran zawng zawng anmahni chi awm dan ang theuhin, rannung leia bawkvaka kal tinreng anmahni chi awm dan ang theuhin, sava tinreng anmahni chi awm dan ang theuhin, sava tinreng, thla nei tinreng chu an lut bawk a." 
Genesis7:15 Tichuan tisa zawng zawng nunna thaw pai reng rengte chu a tuak zelin Nova hnenah chuan lawngah an lut ta a. 
Genesis7:16 Tin, a lutte chu Pathianin a hnena thu a pek angin tisa zawng zawng zinga mi a nu leh a pa zelin an lut a: tin, LALPA'n ani chu a khar khum ta a." 
Genesis7:17 Tin, tui chu leiah hian ni sawmli chhung zawng a let a; tui chu a lo awm ta pung a, lawng chu a chim lang a, lei chung lamah a sep kang ta a." 
Genesis7:18 Tin, tui chu a lo awm ta pung pung a, lei chungah hian a lo pung ta chiam a, lawng chu tui chungah chuan a lang zel a." 
Genesis7:19 Tin, lei chungah hian tui chu nasa takin a lo pung a; van hnuaia tlang sang zawng zawngte a pil zo ta vek a." 
Genesis7:20 Tawng sawm leh tawng nga zeta sangin a lo awm ta pung a; tlangte chu a pil ta daih a. 
Genesis7:21 Tichuan tisa lei chunga che thei zawng zawng, sava te, ran te, sa te, rannung lei chunga bawkvaka kal tinreng te, mihring tinreng te nen an thi zo ta vek a:" 
Genesis7:22 an hnara nunna thlarau thaw awmna zawng zawng, khawmuala awm apiangte chu an thi zo ta vek a." 
Genesis7:23 Tichuan lei chunga thil nung tinreng awmte chu mihring te, ran te, rannung te, chungleng savate nen tihboralin an awm a; lei ata tihboralin an awm ta: Nova leh lawnga a hnena awmte chauh chu zuahin an awm ta a.Tin, tui chu ni za leh ni sawmnga chhung zawng chuan leiah hian a awm ta pung mai a." 
Genesis7:24 Tin, tui chu ni za leh ni sawmnga chhung zawng chuan leiah hian a awm ta pung mai a." 
Genesis8:1 Tin, Pathianin Nova leh lawnga a hnena thil nung tinreng leh ran zawng zawng awmte chu a hre reng a: tin,Pathianin lei chung lamah hian thli a tlehtir a, tichuan tui chu a lo kam tan ta a;" 
Genesis8:2 tui thuk tak hnate leh van tukverhte pawh chu a lo inkhar a, van atanga ruah lo sur chu tihbanin a awm ta bawk a;" 
Genesis8:3 tichuan tui chu lei chung ata a kam ta deuh deuh va: tichuan ni za leh ni sawmnga chu a ral hnu chuan tui chu a lo tlem ta deuh a," 
Genesis8:4 Tichuan lawng chu thla sarihna ni sawm leh ni sarih niah chuan Ararat tlangah chuan a lo innghat ta a. 
Genesis8:5 Tin, tui chu thla sawmna thlengin a tlem ta deuh deuh zel a: tin, thla sawmna ni khat niah chuan tlang chhipte chu a lo lang ta a." 
Genesis8:6 Tin, ni sawmli hnuah chuan hei hi a ni a, Nova chuan lawng tukverh a siam kha a hawng ta a:" 
Genesis8:7 tin, choak pakhat a thlawh chhuahtir a; chu chu a chhuak a, lei ata tui chu a kang zawh hma loh chuan a thlawk vel a thlawk vel a." 
Genesis8:8 Tin, lei chungah tui a tlem tawh nge tawh lo tih hriatna'n thuro a thlawh chhuahtir leh a;" 
Genesis8:9 nimahsela thuro chuan fukna reng reng a hmu lo a, a hnenah lawngah a kir leh ta a, tui chu lei chung zawng zawngah chuan a la awm si a: tichuan a kut a han zen chhuak a, a man a, lawng chhungah a hnenah a la lut leh ta a." 
Genesis8:10 Tin, ni sarih dang a nghak leh rih a; tin thuro chu lawng atangin a thlawh chhuahtir leh a;" 
Genesis8:11 thuro chu tlai lamah chuan a hnenah a lo lut leh a; tin, ngai teh, a hmuiah chuan oliv hnah tihthlawn hlim a rawn pu a: chutichuan Nova chuan leiah tui a tlem ta tih a hre ta a." 
Genesis8:12 Tin, ni sarih dang a nghak leh pek a; tin, thuro chu a thlawh chhuahtir leh a; tin, a hnenah a lo kir leh ta lo a." 
Genesis8:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a kum 601-na ah, a thla khatna ni khat niah chuan tui chu lei ata a kang zo ta a: tichuan Nova chuan lawng khuhna chu a sawn a, a en a, tin, ngai teh, lei chung chu a lo hil ta tlung a." 
Genesis8:14 Tin, a thla hnihna ni sawmhnih leh ni sarih niah chuan lei chu a ro zo ta a." 
Genesis8:15 Tin, Pathianin Nova hnenah chuan," 
Genesis8:16 Lawng ata chhuak rawh, nang leh i nupui leh i fapa leh i fapate nupuite pawh i hnenah chhuak ve rawh se." 
Genesis8:17 Tisa zawng zawng zinga mi thil nung tinreng i awmpuite kha, sava te, ran te, rannung lei chunga bawkvaka kal tinreng te nen khan i hnenah hruai chhuak rawh, leiah hian no nei theuhin, chi tam tak thlaha an lo punna turin,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis8:18 Tichuan Nova chu a chhuak a, a fapate leh a nupui leh a fapate nupuite pawh a hnenah an chhuak ve a:" 
Genesis8:19 sa tinreng te, rannung tinreng te, sava tinreng te, lei chunga che thei apiang te chu anmahni chi awm dan ang theuhin lawng ata chu an chhuak a." 
Genesis8:20 Tin, Nova chuan Lalpa tan maicham a siam a; tin, sa thiang tinreng zinga mi leh sava thiang tinreng zinga mi a la a, maichamah chuan halral thilhlante a hlan ta a." 
Genesis8:21 Tin, LALPA'n rimtui chu a hria a; tin, LALPA chuan a rilruin, ""Lei chu mihring avangin anchhia ka lawh leh tawh lo ang, mihring rilru ngaihtuahnate chu an naupan tet ata a sual si a; tuna ka hrem ang hian thil nung tinreng ka hrem leh tawh hek lo ang.Lei awm chhung zawng buh tuh leh buh lak te, khaw vawt leh khaw lum te, nipui leh thlasik te, chhun leh zan te chu a bo lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis8:22 Lei awm chhung zawng buh tuh leh buh lak te, khaw vawt leh khaw lum te, nipui leh thlasik te, chhun leh zan te chu a bo lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis9:1 Tin, Pathianin Nova leh a fapate chu mal a sawmsak a, an hnenah, ""Chi tam tak thlaha lo pungin, lei hi luah khat rawh u." 
Genesis9:2 Nangmahni tihna leh hlauhna leia sa tinreng leh chungleng sava tinrengin an nei ang; chungte leh leia bawkvaka kal zawng zawng leh tuifinriat sangha zawng zawngte chu, in kuta pek an ni vek tawh." 
Genesis9:3 Thil nung che thei tinrengte chu in tan ei tur an ni ang a; thlai hring ka pek che u ang khan engkim ka pe vek a che u. 
Genesis9:4 Amaherawhchu sa a nunna (a thisen) chawpin in ei tur a ni lo. 
Genesis9:5 Tin, in thisen, in nunnate thisen phuba chu ka la ngei ngei ang: sa tinreng lakah ka la ang: mihring lakah pawh, mi tin an unaute lakah chuan, mihring nunna phuba chu ka la theuh ang." 
Genesis9:6 Tupawh mihring thisen chhuahtu chu mihring vekin ama thisen chu an chhuah ve tur a ni: Pathian anpuiin mihring a siam si a. 
Genesis9:7 Tin, nangni chu chi tam tak thlahin lo pung rawh u; leiah hian fa tam tak hring ula, a chungah hian lo pung rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Genesis9:8 Tin, Pathianin Nova hnenah leh a hnena awm a fapate hnenah chuan," 
Genesis9:9 Tin, ngai teh u, keimah ngeiin in hnenah leh in hnua in thlahte hnenah pawh ka thuthlung chu ka tinghet a ni;" 
Genesis9:10 in hnena thil nung tinreng awm, in awmpui sava te, ran te, ram sa tinreng hnenah lam chuan." 
Genesis9:11 Tin, in hnenah ka thuthlung chu ka tinghet ang; tisa zawng zawng tuileta tihboralin an awm tawh hek lo ang a; lei tichhe turin a let tawh hek lo ang,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis9:12 tin, Pathian vekin, ""Hei hi kei leh nangni leh in hnena thil nung tinreng awmte kara chhuan tawp nei loa awm zelte tan, ka thuthlung chhinchhiahna chu a ni ang." 
Genesis9:13 Chhumah ka chhimbal ka zamtir a, chu chu kei leh lei kara thuthlung chhinchhiahna tur a ni ang." 
Genesis9:14 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, lei chunga chhum ka zamtirin chhimbal chu chhumah chuan a lang ang a," 
Genesis9:15 kei leh nangni leh tisa zawng zawng zinga mi thil nung tinrengte kara ka thuthlung awm hi ka hre reng ang; tichuan tui chu tisa zawng zawng tiboral turin a lo let leh tawh lo ang. 
Genesis9:16 Tin, chhimbal chu chhumah a zam thin ang; tichuan Pathian leh lei chunga tisa awm zawng zawng zinga mi thil nung tinrengte kara kumkhaw thuthlung awm chu ka hriat reng theihna turin ka en thin ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis9:17 Tin, Pathian vekin Nova hnenah chuan, ""Chu chu kei leh lei chunga tisa awm zawng zawng kara ka thuthlung tihngheh chhinhhiahna a ni,"" a ti leh a." 
Genesis9:18 Tin, Nova fapa lawng atanga chhuakte chu Sema te, Hama te, Japhetha te an ni: Hama chu kanaana pa a ni." 
Genesis9:19 Chu mite laka chhuakte chuan lei zawng zawng hi an dap zo ta a ni. 
Genesis9:20 Tin, Nova chu lo neituah a awm tan a, grep hrui huan a siam a:" 
Genesis9:21 uain chu a in a, a rui a; tichuan a puan inah chuan a mu sual ta a." 
Genesis9:22 Tin, Hama, Kanaana pa chuan a pa mu sual chu a hmu a, pawna a unaute pahnih chu a hrilh a." 
Genesis9:23 Tichuan Sema leh Japhetha chuan puan an la a, kokia inzawnin hnung tawlhin an kal a, an pa mu sual chu an khuh ta a; an hmai chu lehlam hawiin a awm a, an pa mu sual chu an hmu lo a." 
Genesis9:24 Tin, Nova chu a uain rui chu a lo harh a, a fapa naupang berin a chunga a tihzia chu a lo hre ta a." 
Genesis9:25 Tichuan, ""Kanaana chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se; A unaute chhiahhlawhte chhiahhlawh a ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis9:26 LALPA, Sema Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se; Kanaana chu a chhiahhlawhah awm rawh se." 
Genesis9:27 Pathianin Japhetha chu tilian se la, Sema puan inahte awm rawh se; Tin, Kanaana chu a chhiahhlawhah awm rawh se,"" a ti bawk a." 
Genesis9:28 Tin, Nova chu tui let hnu chuan kum 350 a dam a.Tichuan Nova dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 950 a ni a, tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis9:29 Tichuan Nova dam chhung zawng zawng chu kum 950 a ni a, tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis10:1 Tin, he'ng hi Nova fapa Sema te, Hama te, Japhetha teho thlahte an ni: tui let hnuah chuan fapate an nei hlawm a." 
Genesis10:2 Japhetha fapate chu Gomera te, Magoga te, Madaia te, Javan te, Tubala te, Maseka te, Tirasa te an ni a." 
Genesis10:3 Tin, Gomera fapate chu Askenaza te, Riphatha te, Togarma te an ni a." 
Genesis10:4 Tin, Javana fapate chu Elisa te, Tarsisa te leh Kittama te, Dodanima te an ni a." 
Genesis10:5 Chungho atang chuan a ni, Jentailte thliarkarahte chuan anmahni ram rama an darh tak ni; anmahni tawng ang zel leh anmahni hnam ang zelin, anmahni chi zingahte chuan." 
Genesis10:6 Tin, Hama fapate chu Kusa te, Mizraima te, Puta te, Kanaana te an ni a. Tin, Kusa fapate chu Seba te, Havila te, Sabta te, Raama te, Sabteka te an ni a: tin, Raama fapate chu Seba leh Dedana an ni a." 
Genesis10:7 Tin, Hama fapate chu Kusa te, Mizraima te, Puta te, Kanaana te an ni a. Tin, Kusa fapate chu Seba te, Havila te, Sabta te, Raama te, Sabteka te an ni a: tin, Raama fapate chu Seba leh Dedana an ni a." 
Genesis10:8 Tin, Kusa chuan fapa Nimroda chu a nei a: ani chu leia mi chak tak a lo ni tan ta a." 
Genesis10:9 LALPA hmaah chuan sa pel mi chak tak a ni a: chuvangin a ni, ""Lalpa hmaa sa pel chak tak Nimroda ang a ni,"" an tih thin ni." 
Genesis10:10 Tin, a lal tanna chu Sinar rama Babel khua te, Erek khua te, Akkad khua te, Kalne khua te a ni a." 
Genesis10:11 Chu mi ram atang chuan a chhuak a, Assuria ramah a lut a, Ninevi khua te, Rehoboth-Ir khua te, Kalah khua te," 
Genesis10:12 Ninevi leh Kalah inkarah Resen khua te a siam a (chu mi Resen khua chu khaw ropui tak a ni). 
Genesis10:13 Tin, Mizraima chuan Lud-ho te, Anam-ho te, Lehad-ho te, Naphtu-ho te," 
Genesis10:14 Pathrus-ho te, kasluh-ho (Philistin-ho chhuahna) te, Kaphtor-ho te chu a thlah a." 
Genesis10:15 Tin, Kanaana chuan a fa tirah Zidona a nei a, Hetha pawh a nei bawk a;" 
Genesis10:16 Jebus-ho te, Amor-ho te, Girgas-ho te leh," 
Genesis10:17 Hiv-ho te, Arka-ho te, Sin-ho te leh," 
Genesis10:18 Arvat-ho te, Zemar-ho te, Hamath-ho te a thlah a: chu mi hnuah chuan Kanaan-ho hnamte chu an darh zau ta a." 
Genesis10:19 Tin, Kanaan-ho ramri chu Zidon khua atangin Gerar panzawngin, Gaza khaw thlengin; Sodom leh Gomorra leh Adma leh Zeboiim panzawngin, Lasa khaw thlengin a ni." 
Genesis10:20 Chunghote chu Hama thlahte chu an ni, anmahni hnamte ang zel leh anmahni tawngte ang zelin, anmahni ram ramahte leh anmahni chi zingahte chuan." 
Genesis10:21 Tin, Sema, Ebera fa zawng zawngte thlahtu Japhetha u pawh chuan fate a nei a." 
Genesis10:22 Sema fapate chu Elama te, Assura te, Arpaksada te, Luda te, Arama te an ni a." 
Genesis10:23 Tin, Arama fapate chu Uza te, Hula te, Getherra te, Masa te an ni a." 
Genesis10:24 Tin, Arpaksada chuan fapa Sela a nei a; tin, Sela chuan fapa Ebera a nei a." 
Genesis10:25 Tin, Ebera chuan fapa pahnih a nei a: pakhat hming chu Pelaga a ni a, a dam lai chuan lei hi thenin a awm ta si a; a nau hming chu Joktana a ni a." 
Genesis10:26 Tin, Joktana chuan fapa Almodadate, Selepha te, Hazarmavetha te, Jera te leh," 
Genesis10:27 Hadorama te, Uzala te, Dikla te leh," 
Genesis10:28 Obala te, Abimaela te, Seba te leh," 
Genesis10:29 Ophira te, Havila te, Jobaba te a nei a: chung zawng zawng chu Joktana fapate an ni." 
Genesis10:29 Ophira te, Havila te, Jobaba te a nei a: chung zawng zawng chu Joktana fapate an ni." 
Genesis10:30 Tin, an awmna chu Mesa atangin khaw chhak tlang Sephar lam panzawngin a ni." 
Genesis10:31 Chunghote chu Sema thlahte chu an ni, anmahni hnamte ang zel leh anmahni tawngte ang zelin, anmahni ram ramahte, anmahni chite ang zel chuan.Chunghote chu Nova thlahho hnamte an ni a, an thlahte ang zelin, an chite zingah chuan: tui let hnuah chungho atang chuan a ni leiah hian chi tin an darh tak a ni." 
Genesis10:32 Chunghote chu Nova thlahho hnamte an ni a, an thlahte ang zelin, an chite zingah chuan: tui let hnuah chungho atang chuan a ni leiah hian chi tin an darh tak a ni." 
Genesis11:1 Tin, leia mi zawng zawng chu tawng hmun khat leh thu sawi dan hmun khat an ni vek a." 
Genesis11:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, khaw chhak lama an insawn zel lai chuan Sinar ramah phaizawl an hmu a; chutah chuan awm hmun an khuar ta a." 
Genesis11:3 Tin, ""Hawh u, leirawhchan siam i la, tha takin i rawh ang u,"" an inti hlawm a. Tichuan lung aiah leirawhchan an hmang a, a charna'n alkatra." 
Genesis11:4 Tin, ""Hawh u, khawpui siam i la, in sang a chhipina van tawng turin sa bawk i la, kan hming i tithang ang u; chutilochuan lei chung zawng zawngah hian tihdarhin kan awm dah ang e,"" an ti a." 
Genesis11:5 Tin, LALPA chu mihring faten khawpui leh in sang an siam vel chu en turin a zuk chhuk a." 
Genesis11:6 Tin, LALPA chuan, ""Ngai teh u, mite hi pum khat an ni a, an zain tawng hmun khat an nei si a; hei thil an ti tan a nih hi; tunah zawng an thiltih tum reng rengte pawh khapsak rual a ni tawh lo ang." 
Genesis11:7 Hawh u, i zuk kal ang u khai, tawng an inhriat tawn theih lohna'n khutah khuan an tawng i zuk tihhransak ang u,"" a ti a." 
Genesis11:8 Chutichuan LALPA'n anniho chu chuta tang chuan lei zawng zawngah chuan a tidarh a: tichuan an khawsiam chu an bansan ta a. 
Genesis11:9 Chuvangin a hming chu Babel an ti a: LALPA'n chutah chuan leia mi zawng zawng tawng chu a a tihhransak tak avangin: chuta tang chuan LALPA'n anniho chu lei chung zawng zawngah chuan a tidarh ta bawk a. 
Genesis11:10 Heng hi Sema thlahte chu an ni. Sema chu kum 100 mi a ni a, tui let hnu kum hnih chinah chuan fapa Arpaksada a nei a:" 
Genesis11:11 tin, Arpaksada a neih hnu chuan Sema chu kum 500 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:12 Tin, Arpaksada chuan kum 35 a nihin fapa Sela a nei a:" 
Genesis11:13 tin, Sela a neih hnu chuan Arpaksada chu kum 403 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:14 Tin, Sela chuan kum 30 a nihin fapa Ebera a nei a:" 
Genesis11:15 tin, Ebera a neih hnu chuan Sela chu kum 403 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:16 Tin, Ebera chuan kum 34 a nihin fapa Pelaga a nei a:" 
Genesis11:17 tin, Pelega a neih hnu chuan Eberra chu kum 430 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:18 Tin, Pelega chuan kum 30 a nihin fapa Reuva a nei a:" 
Genesis11:19 tin, Reuva a neih hnu chuan Pelega chu kum 209 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:20 Tin, Reuva chuan kum 32 a nihin fapa Seruga a nei a:" 
Genesis11:21 tin, Seruga a neih hnu chuan Reuva chu kum 207 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:22 Tin, Seruga chuan kum 30 a nihin fapa Nahora a nei a:" 
Genesis11:23 tin, Nahora a neih hnu chuan Seruga chu kum 200 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:24 Tin, Nahora chuan kum 29 a nihin fapa Tera a nei a:" 
Genesis11:25 Tin, Tera a neih hnu chuan Nahora chu kum 119 a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:26 Tin, Tera chuan kum 70 a nihin fapa Abrama te, Nahora te, Harana te a nei a." 
Genesis11:27 Tin, he'ng Tera thlahte chu an ni. Tera chuan fapa Adrama te, Nahora te, Harana te a nei a; tin, Harana chuan fapa Lota a nei a." 
Genesis11:28 Tin, Harana chu a pianna rama, Kaldai-ho khua Ur-ah, a pa Tera hmaah chuan a thi a." 
Genesis11:29 Tin, Abrama leh Nahora chuan nupui an nei a: Abrama nupui hming chu Saraii a ni a; Nahora nupui hming chu Harana fanu Milkaii a ni a, Harana chu Milkaii pa leh Iskaii pa chu a ni." 
Genesis11:30 Tin, Saraii chu a ching a; fa reng a nei lo a." 
Genesis11:31 Tin, Tera chuan a fapa Abrama te, a fapaa fapa (Harana fapa) Lota te, a mo, a fapa Abrama nupui Saraii te a hruai a; tin, Kanaan-a kal turin Kaldai-ho khua Ur atang chuan an chhuak ho ta a; tin Haran khua an lo thleng a, chutah chuan awm hmun an khuar ta a.Tin, Tera dam chhung chu kum 205 a ni a: tin, Tera chu Haran khuaah chuan a thi ta a." 
Genesis11:32 Tin, Tera dam chhung chu kum 205 a ni a: tin, Tera chu Haran khuaah chuan a thi ta a." 
Genesis12:1 Tin, LALPA'n Abrama hnenah chuan, ""I khaw lam ata leh i laichinteho zing ata leh i pa in ata chhuak la, ram ka la entir tur che lamah kal rawh:" 
Genesis12:2 tichuan chi ropui takah ka siam ang chia, mal pawh ka sawm ang chia, i hming ka tiropui bawk ang; tin, nang malsawmna ni ang che:" 
Genesis12:3 tin, malsawmsaktu apiang che chu mal ka sawm ang a, anchhe lawhtu che chu anchhia ka lawh ang: nangmahah chuan leia hnam tin an la thawveng ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis12:4 Chutichuan Abrama chu LALPA'n a hnena a sawi angin a kal ta a; Lota chu a hnenah a kal ve a: tin, Abrama chu Haran khua ata a chhuah lai chuan kum 75 mi a ni a." 
Genesis12:5 Tin, Abraman a nupui Saraii leh, a nau fapa Lota leh an sum deh chhuah zawng zawng leh Haran khuaa an mi neih takte chu a hruai a; Kanaan rama kal turin an chhuak a; tin, Kanaan ram chu an thleng ta a." 
Genesis12:6 Tin, Abrama chu, chu mi ramah chuan Sekem hmun thlengin, More sasua thleng chuan a kal zel a. Chung lai chuan Kanaanhote chu chu mi ramah chuan an awm a." 
Genesis12:7 Tin, LALPA chu Abrama hnenah a inlar a, ""He ram hi i thlahte hnenah ka la pe ang,"" a ti a: tichuan chutah chuan a hnena inlar LALPA tan chuan maicham a siam a." 
Genesis12:8 Tin, chuta tang chuan Bethel chhak lama tlangah chuan a insawn a, a chutah chuan a puan in a zar a, a thlang lamah chuan Bethel chu a awm a, a chhak lamah Ai khua a awm a: chutah chuan LALPA tan maicham a siam leh a, LALPA hming chu a lam a." 
Genesis12:9 Tin, Abrama chu chhim ram lam pan cheuin a insawn ta zel a." 
Genesis12:10 Tin, chu mi ramah chuan tam a lo tla a: tin, chu mi ramah chuan tam chu a nasat em avangin Abrama chu Aigupta rama awm rih turin a chhuk ta a." 
Genesis12:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Aigupta rama an luh dawn lai chuan a nupui Saraii hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh, hmeichhe hmel tha tak i ni tih ka hria:" 
Genesis12:12 tichuan hetiang hi a ni ang, Aigupta-hoin an hmuh hunah che chuan, 'Hei hi a nupui a nih hi,' an ti ang a: tin, kei chu mi that mai ang, nang erawh chu an zuah ang che." 
Genesis12:13 I zara tha taka ka awm theihna'n leh nangmah avanga ka nun theih nan, 'A farnu ka ni,' khawngaih takin ti zel ang che,"" a ti a." 
Genesis12:14 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Abrama chu Aigupta rama a luh chuan, Aiguptaho chuan hmeichhia chu an hmu a, a hmel chu tha an ti em em a." 
Genesis12:15 Pharaoa mi liante pawhin an hmu a. Pharaoa inah an hruai lut ta a. 
Genesis12:16 Tin, ani chuan Saraii avangin Abrama chu tha takin a ti a: tichuan beram te, bawng te, sabengtungpa te, bawihpa te, bawihnu te, sabengtungnu te, sanghawngsei te a neih phah ta a." 
Genesis12:17 Tin, LALPA chuan Abrama nupui Saraii avangin Pharaoa leh a chhungte chu sawisak namen lohin a sawisa ta a." 
Genesis12:18 Tichuan Pharaoa chuan Abrama chu a ko a, ""Ka chunga i thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni le? I nupui a ni tih engati nge mi hrilh loh?" 
Genesis12:19 Ka farnu a ni,' engati nge i tih? Chu mi avang chuan alawm ka nupuia ka lo neih tak hial ni: aw le, tunah en rawh i nupui hi, hruai la, kal daih rawh,"" a ti a.Tin, Pharaoa chuan a chungchang thuah chuan mi hnenah thu a pe a, tichuan amah an han thlah ta a, a nupui nen a neih zawng nen." 
Genesis12:20 Tin, Pharaoa chuan a chungchang thuah chuan mi hnenah thu a pe a, tichuan amah an han thlah ta a, a nupui nen a neih zawng nen." 
Genesis13:1 Tin, Abrama chu Aigupta ram atang chuan a chhuak a, chhim ramah chuan a chho ta a, a hnenah chuan a nupui te, a neih zawng zawng te, Lota te an chho ve a." 
Genesis13:2 Tin, Abrama chu ran te, tangka te, rangkachak tein a hausa em em a." 
Genesis13:3 Tin, chhim ram atang chuan Bethel thleng zakin a kal zel a, Bethel leh Ai khaw inkara atira a puan in awmnaah khan:" 
Genesis13:4 atira a maicham siamna ngeiah khan; tin, chutah chuan Abrama chuan LALPA hming a lam a." 
Genesis13:5 Tin, Lota, Abrama hnena kal vea pawh khan beram rual te, bawng rual te, puan in te a nei ve a." 
Genesis13:6 Tin, an awm dunna turin ramin a daih ta lo a: an thil neih chu a nasa em si a. Chutichuan, an awm dun thei ta hlawl lo a." 
Genesis13:7 Tichuan Abrama ran pute leh Lota ranpute karah chuan inhnialna a lo chhuak ta a: chu mi lai chuan Kanaan-hote leh Periz-hote chu, chu mi ramah chuan an awm a." 
Genesis13:8 Tichuan Abraman Lota hnenah, ""Khawngaih takin, nang leh keia karah, i ran pute leh ka ran pute karah pawh inhnialna awm suh se; unau kan ni si a," 
Genesis13:9 Ram chu a pum puiin a awm duai lo em ni? Khawngaih takin ka hnen ata hi intihrang mai rawh: nang vei lama i kal chuan kei ding lamah ka kal ang a; a nih loh leh, nang ding lama i kal chuan kei vei lamah ka kal ang e,"" a ti a." 
Genesis13:10 Tichuan Lota chu a dak a, Zoar khaw lam pan zawng chuan Jordan Phaizawl zawng zawng chu LALPA huan ang, Aigupta ram ang khan ram tina tui tam tak awm chukna a ni tih a hria a, LALPA'n Sodom leh Gomorra khua a tihchhiat hma kha a ni si a." 
Genesis13:11 Chutichuan Lota chuan Jordan Phaizawl zawng zawng chu a thlang ta a; tin, Lota chu chhak lamah chuan a insawn a: tichuan an inthen ta a." 
Genesis13:12 Abrama chu Kanaan ramah chuan a awm a, Lota chu Phaizawl khuaahte chuan a awm a, a puan in chu Sodom khaw thlengin a sawn zel a." 
Genesis13:13 Tin, Sodom mite chu LALPA mithmuhin nasa taka suaksual leh mi sual an ni a." 
Genesis13:14 Tin, a hnan ata Lota a awm hran hnu chuan LALPA'n Abrama hnenah, ""Dak la, i awmna atang khan hmar lam te, chhim lam te, chhak lam te, thlang lam te en rawh:" 
Genesis13:15 I ram hmuh zawng zawng hi nang leh i thlahte kumkhua atan ka pe dawn che u a ni. 
Genesis13:16 Tin, i thlahte chu leia vaivut ang maiin ka la siam ang: chutichuan miin leia vaivut hi an chhiar sen chuan i thlahte pawh chhiar sen an ni bawk ang." 
Genesis13:17 Tho la, ram hi a dung a vang fang chhuak rawh; ka pe dawn che a ni,"" a ti a.Tichuan Abrama chuan a puan in chu a sawn a, Hebrona awm Mamre sasaw kiangahte chuan awm hmun a va khuar a, chutah chuan LALPA tan maicham a siam a." 
Genesis13:18 Tichuan Abrama chuan a puan in chu a sawn a, Hebrona awm Mamre sasaw kiangahte chuan awm hmun a va khuar a, chutah chuan LALPA tan maicham a siam a." 
Genesis14:1 Tin, Sinar khaw lal Amraphela te, Ellasar khaw lal Arioka te, Elam khaw lal Kedorlaomera te, Goiim khaw lal Tidala te dam lai chuan heti hi a ni a," 
Genesis14:2 anni chuan Sodom khaw lal Bera chu an run a, Gomorra khaw lal Birsa te, Adma khaw lal Sinaba te, Zeboiim khaw lal Semebera te, Bela khaw lal te chu an run bawk a, (Bela khua chu Zoar khua a ni ta.)" 
Genesis14:3 Chungho zawng zawng chu Siddim ruamah chuan an tang tlang a (chu mi ruam chu Tuifinriat Al a ni ta) 
Genesis14:4 kum sawm leh kum hnih chhungin Kedorlaomera hnuaiah an awm a, a kum sawm leh kum thumnaah erawh chuan an hel ta a." 
Genesis14:5 Tichuan a kum sawm leh kum linaah chuan Kedorlaomera leh a hnena lal awmte chu an lo kal a, Asteroth-karnaim khuaah Rewphaim-hote an that a, Ham khuah Zuzim-hote an that a, Kiriathaim khuah Emim-hote an that a." 
Genesis14:6 an awmna Seir tlangah, El-paran thlengin Hor-hote an that a, (El-paran chu thlaler depa awm a ni.)" 
Genesis14:7 Tin, an kir leh a, En-mispat an thleng a, (chu chu Kades a ni ta) Amalek-ho rama mi zawng zawng leh Amor-ho, Hazazontamar khuaa awmte pawh chu an that leh a." 
Genesis14:8 Tichuan Sodom khaw lal te, Gomorra khaw lal te, Adma khaw lal te, Zeboiim khaw lal te, Bela khaw lal te an chhuak a (bela khua chu Zoar khua a ni ta;) tin, Siddim ruamah chuan anniho chu bei turin an tang tlat a;" 
Genesis14:9 Elam khaw lal Kedorlaomera te, Goiim khaw lal Tidala te, Sinar khaw lal Amraphela te, Ellasar khaw lal Arioka te chu bei turin; lal paliin lal panga an bei a." 
Genesis14:10 Tin, Siddim ruam chu alkatra khurin a khat a; tin Sodom leh Gomorra khaw lalte chu an tlanchhia a, chutah chuan an tla a, a tla bangte chu tlangah chuan an tlan bo ta a." 
Genesis14:11 Tichuan Sodom leh Gomorra mite sum zawng zawng leh an ei tur zawng zawng an la a, an haw ta a." 
Genesis14:12 Lota, Adrama unaua fapa, Sodom khuaa awm chu, a sumte nen an la bawk a, an kal ta a." 
Genesis14:13 Tin, mi pakhat tlan chhuak chu a lo kal a, Hebrai mi Abrama chu a hrilh a: ani chu Amor mi Mamrea sasaw kiangahte chuan a awm a. Mamrea chu Eskola unau leh Anera unau a ni a; chung mite chu Abrama te nena tang za an ni a." 
Genesis14:14 Tin, Abraman a fa chu salah an hruai tih a hriat veleh, a ina piang, ama mi, zir thiam sa tawh, 318 a hruai chhuak a, Dan khaw thlengin a um ta a." 
Genesis14:15 Tin, zanah chuan anmahni bei turin amah leh a bawihte chu an insem darh a, anniho chu an that a, Hoba khaw thlengin an um a, (Hoba chu Damaska khaw hmar lamah a awm a.)" 
Genesis14:16 Tin, sum zawng zawng chu a rawn la kir leh vek a, a fa Lota leh a sumte chu a rawn la leh vek bawk a, hmeichhiate pawh a rawn hruai leh a, mi dang zawng zawngte nen." 
Genesis14:17 Tin, Kedorlaomera leh a hnena lal awmte thata a hawn hnuah chuan Sodom lal chu Save ruamah chuan Abrama hmuakin a chhuak a, (Save ruam chu Lal ruam a ni ta.)" 
Genesis14:18 Tin, Salem khaw lal Melkisedeka chuan chhang leh uain a rawn la a: ani chu Pathian Chungnungbera puithiam a ni a." 
Genesis14:19 Tin, ani chuan Abrama chu mal a sawm a, ""Lei leh van neitu Pathian Chungnungbera chuan Abrama malsawm rawh se." 
Genesis14:20 I hmelmate i kuta petu, Pathian Chungnungbera chu fakin awm bawk rawh se,"" a ti a. Tin, Abrama chuan ani chu engkim chu sawma pakhat a pe a." 
Genesis14:21 Tin, Sodom khaw lal chuan Abrama hnenah, ""Mihringte hi mi pe la, sumte hi chu nangma'n nei rawh"" a ti a." 
Genesis14:22 Tin, Abrama chuan Sodom khaw lal hnenah chuan, ""La zai khat te pawh, pheikhawk chilhna pakhat te pawh, i neih reng reng chu ka la lo ang," 
Genesis14:23 tiin lei leh van neitu, LALPA, Pathian Chungnungbera lamah chuan ka kut ka phar tawh a ni, chutichuan 'Abrama chu keima tihhausak alawm,' i ti dah ang e:tlangvalho ei ral leh ka mi kalpuite chanvo chauh lo chu ka la lo ang; Anera te, Eskola te, Mamrea te chuan an chanvo chu la rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Genesis14:24 tlangvalho ei ral leh ka mi kalpuite chanvo chauh lo chu ka la lo ang; Anera te, Eskola te, Mamrea te chuan an chanvo chu la rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Genesis15:1 Chung thil hnuah chuan, ""Abram, hlau suh, kei hi i phaw leh i lawmman nasa tak mai ka ni a sin,"" tiin LALPA thu chu Abrama hnenah mumang angin a lo thleng a." 
Genesis15:2 Tin, Abrama chuan, ""Aw Lalpa PATHIAN, eng nge mi pek ang, fa nei loin ka awm hlen dawn a, ka ro khawmtu tur chu Damaska khuaa mi Eliezera hi a ni si a?"" a ti a." 
Genesis15:3 Tin, Abrama vekin, ""Ngai teh, chi reng reng mi thlahtir si loa: en teh, ka ina piang hi ka ro luahtu tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis15:4 Tin, ngai teh, ""Kha mi kha i ro luahtu tur a ni lo ang; nangma rila lo la rah tur ngei chu i ro luahtu tur a ni zawk ang,"" tiin LALPA thu chu a hnenah a lo thleng a." 
Genesis15:5 Tin, ani chu pawnah a hruai chhuak a, ""Van lam khi en la, arsite khi i chhiar theih chuan chhiar teh khai."" a ti a. Tin, amah vekin a hnenah, ""I thlahte chu khiti zat khi an la ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis15:6 Tin, ani chuan LALPA chu a ring a; tichuan ani chuan chu chu a felnaah a ruatsak ta a." 
Genesis15:7 Tin, a hnenah, ""He ram hi luah tura pe tur chea Kaldai-ho khua Ur ata hruai chhuaktu che LALPA kha ka ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis15:8 Tin, ani chuan, ""Aw Lalpa PATHIAN, ka luah ang tih engtin nge ka hriat ang?"" a ti a." 
Genesis15:9 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Bawngla kum thum mi leh kelpui kum thum mi leh berampa kum thum mi leh thuro leh parva no mi rawn lak rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis15:10 Tichuan chung zawng zawng chu a rawn laksak a, a lai takah a phel theuh a, a phel pakhat chu a phel leh lam zawnah chuan a dah theuh zel a: savate erawh chu a phel ve lo a." 
Genesis15:11 Tin, sava sa hel ei mite chu saruangahte chuan an zuk fu thin a, Abrama chuan a lo hnawt kiang zel a." 
Genesis15:12 Tin, ni a tlak dawn sur sur lai chuan Abrama chu a lo muhil ta der mai a; tin, ngai teh, thim nasa tak, thil rapthlak zet hian amah a rawn khuh a." 
Genesis15:13 Tin, Pathian chuan Abrama hnenah, ""I thlahte chu anmahni ram loah chuan mikhualin an la awm ang a, an rawng an la bawlsak ang tih chiang takin hre rawh khai; tin, kum 400 an tirethei ang a;" 
Genesis15:14 tin, an rawng an bawlsakate chi pawh chu ka la ngaihtuah ang: tin, chu mi hnuah chuan sum tam tak neiin an lo la chhuak ang." 
Genesis15:15 Nang erawh chu i thlahtute hnenah thlamuang takin i kal ang a; i lua kelsam to vekin an phum ang che. 
Genesis15:16 Tin, chhuan linaah chuan hetah hian an lo kal leh ang; Amor-ho sualnate hi a la kim rih si lo,"" a ti a." 
Genesis15:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni a tlaka khua a lo thim chuan, ngai teh, rawhtuina mei khu mup mup leh chung sa phel karah chuan meichher alh hluah hluah kal kal a lo awm a." 
Genesis15:18 Chu mi ni chuan LALPA chuan, ""He ram hi, Aigupta lui atanga lui lian pui (Euphrates lui) thlengin i thlahte ka pe tawh;" 
Genesis15:19 Ken-ho te, Keniz-ho te, Kadmon-ho te," 
Genesis15:20 Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Rephaim-ho te,Amor-ho te, Kanaan-ho te, Girgas-ho te nen hian ka pe bawk a,"" tiin Abrama hnenah chuan thu a thlung ta a." 
Genesis15:21 Amor-ho te, Kanaan-ho te, Girgas-ho te nen hian ka pe bawk a,"" tiin Abrama hnenah chuan thu a thlung ta a." 
Genesis16:1 Tin, Abrama nupui Saraii chuan fa reng reng a hrinsak loa: tin, Saraii chuan Aigupta mi bawihnu pakhat a nei a, chu mi hming chu Hagari a ni a." 
Genesis16:2 Tin, Saraii chuan Abrama hnenah, ""Ngai teh khai, LALPA'n fa mi neihtir phal loh hi; khawngaih takin ka bawihnu pawl rawh; ama lakah chuan fate ka nei mahna,"" a ti a. Tichuan Abrama chuan Saraii thu chu a zawm ta a." 
Genesis16:3 Tichuan Abrama nupui Saraii chuan Abrama chu Kanaan rama kum 10 a awm hnu chuan a bawihnu Aigupta mi Hagari chu a hruai a, a pasal Abrama hnenah chuan a nupuia awm turin a pe a." 
Genesis16:4 Tin, Hagari chu a lo pawl a; tin, ani chu a rai ta a: tin, a rai tih a inhriat veleh a pi chu a lo hmusit ta mai a." 
Genesis16:5 Tichuan Saraii chuan Abrama hnenah, ""Ka thil tuar hi nangin a mawh phur rawh: ka bawihnu chu i pawm atan ka pe chia; tin, a rai tih a inhriat veleh mi hmusit ta mai a; LALPA chuan nang leh keia thu hi ngaihtuah rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Genesis16:6 Abrama erawh chuan Saraii hnenah, ""Ngai teh, i bawihnu chu i kuta awm alawm; i remtih ang apiang chu a chungah ti ta che,"" a ti a. Tichuan Saraii chuan a tirethei ta hle a, chuvangin a tlan bosan ta a." 
Genesis16:7 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chuan thlalerah tuikhur kiangah, Sur panna kawnga tuikhurah chuan a lo hmu a." 
Genesis16:8 Tin, a hnenah, ""Hagar, Saraii bawihnu, khawi atangin nge i lo kal a, khawiah nge i kal dawn?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka pi Saraii hnen ata ka tlan bo a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis16:9 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chuan a hnenah, ""I pi hnenah kir leh la, a thu thuin awm rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis16:10 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh vek chuan a hnenah, ""I thlahte chu chhiarsen loh khawp hiala tamin ka la tipung ang,"" a ti leh a." 
Genesis16:11 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh vek chuan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, nau i pai ta a, fapa i hring ang a; LALPA chuan i hreawmzia hi a hriat tak avang hian a hmingah chuan Ismaela i sa tur a ni." 
Genesis16:12 Ani chu mihring zinga ram sabengtung ang a ni ang; ani chuan mi tin a do ang a, mi tinin a ni pawh an do bawk ang; a unau zawng zawng depah a awm bawk ang,"" a ti leh pek a." 
Genesis16:13 Tin, Hagari chuan amah betu LALPA hming chu ""Nang hi hmu theitu Pathian i ni,"" tiin a vuah a, ""Hetah ngei hian mi hmutu chu ka en zui zel em ni aw?"" a ti a ni." 
Genesis16:14 Chu mi avangin tuichhunchhuah chu Beer-lahai-roi vuah a ni ta a; Ngai teh, Kades leh Bered khaw inkarah a awm." 
Genesis16:15 Tin, Hagari chuan Abrama chu fapa a hrinsak a: tin, Abrama chuan a fapa Hagari hrin chu a hmingah Ismaela a sa ta a.Tin, Hagarin Abrama tan Ismaela chu a hrin lai chuan Abrama chu kum 86 mi a ni a." 
Genesis16:16 Tin, Hagarin Abrama tan Ismaela chu a hrin lai chuan Abrama chu kum 86 mi a ni a." 
Genesis17:1 Tin, Abrama chu kum 99 mi a nihin, LALPA chu Abrama hnenah chuan a rawn inlar a, a hnenah, ""Kei, Pathian Engkimtitheia ka ni; ka hmaah awm la, thafamkimin awm rawh." 
Genesis17:2 Tichuan nangmah nena kan inkarah thu ka thlung ang a, nasa takin ka tipung ang che,"" a ti a." 
Genesis17:3 Tin, Abrama chu a bawkkhup ta a: tin, Pathianin ani chu a bia a," 
Genesis17:4 Ngai teh, kei zawngin, ka thuthlung chu i hnenah a ni ka thlun ni, tichuan chi hrang hrang tam tak thlahtu i ni tawh ang." 
Genesis17:5 I hming pawh Abrama a ni tawh lo ang a, i hming hi Abrahama a ni tawh zawk ang; chi hrang hrang tam tak thlahtu tura ka siam tak che hi." 
Genesis17:6 Tin, nasa takin chi ka thlahtir ang chia, nangmahah chuan chi tih tham zet zette ka siam ang a, nangmah atang chuan lalte an lo chhuak bawk ang." 
Genesis17:7 Tin, kei leh nang leh i hnua i thlahte, an thlah chhawng zelte thleng pawhin ka thuthlung hi, i tan leh i hnua i thlahte, tana an Pathian ni turin, kumkhaw thuthlung atan ka tinghet ang." 
Genesis17:8 Tin, i hnenah leh i hnua i thlahte hnenah chuan i mikhualna ram, Kanaan ram zawng zawng hi kumkhaw ro atan ka pe dawn che u a ni; tin, kei hi an Pathian ka ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis17:9 Tin, Pathian vekin Abrahama hnenah chuan, ""Tin, nang zawngin ka thuthlung hi i zawm tur a ni; nangin i zawm tur a ni a, i hnua i thlahte, an thlah chhawng zelte thleng pawhin an zawm ve tur a ni." 
Genesis17:10 Hei hi kei leh nang leh i hnua i thlahte kara ka thuthlung i zawm tur chu a ni; in zinga mipa tawh phawt chu serh tan tur a ni. 
Genesis17:11 Tichuan in serhvun tisaah chuan serhtanin in awm tur a ni; chu chu nangmah nena kan inkara thuthlung chhinchhiahna a ni ang. 
Genesis17:12 Tichuan in zinga ni riat mi chu, in thlah chhawng zelte thleng pawhin, i thlah ni kher lo pawh i ina piang emaw mikhual tu lak pawha tangka suma i lei emaw pawh, mipa tawh phawt chu serh tan tur a ni." 
Genesis17:13 I ina piang leh i tangka suma i lei pawh serh tan ngei tur a ni: tichuan ka thuthlung chu kumkhaw thuthlung atan in tisaah a awm tawh ang. 
Genesis17:14 Tin, mipa serh tan loh, a serh vun tisa serh tana awm lo chu, chu mi ngei chu a chipui zing ata tihboral a ni ang; ani chuan ka thuthlung chu a bawhchhia a ni,"" a ti leh a." 
Genesis17:15 Tin, Pathian vekin Abrahama hnenah, ""I nupui Saraii zawng, a hmingah chuan Saraii i ti tawh lo ang a, a hming chu Sari a ni tawh zawk ang." 
Genesis17:16 Tin, ani chu mal ka sawm ang a, chu lo pawh chu ama lakah chuan fapa ka pe ang che:a ni, amah chu mal ka sawm ang a, chi hrang hrang thlahtunu a ni tawh ang; hnam hrang hrang lalte ama lakah chuan an lo la chhuak ang,"" a ti leh pek a." 
Genesis17:17 Chutichuan Abrahama chu a bawkkhup a, a nui a, a rilruin, ""Kum za mi hian fa a nei dawn em ni ang? Sari, kum sawmkaw mi chuan fa a hring dawn em ni ang?"" a ti a." 
Genesis17:18 Tin, Abrahama vek chuan Pathian hnenah, ""Ismaela hi i hmaah awm thei se la aw!"" a ti a." 
Genesis17:19 Tin, Pathianin, ""Nilo ve, i nupui Sari'n fapa a hrinsak zawk ang che; a hmingah chuan Isaaka i sa tur a ni: tin, ka thuthlug chu ama hnua a thlahte tan kumkhaw thuthlung atan a hnenah chuan ka tinghet ang." 
Genesis17:20 Ismaela chung thu pawh hi ka ngaihthlaksak che a ni: Ngai teh, amah chu mal ka sawm tawh a, chi tam tak ka thlahtir ang a, nasa takin ka tipung bawk ang; ani chuan lal sawm leh pahnih a hring ang a, amah chu chi ropui takah ka la siam ang" 
Genesis17:21 Ka thuthlung erawh chu Isaaka, Sari'n nakkum hetih hun taka a hrinsak tur che hnenah chuan a ni ka tihngheh zawk dawn ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis17:22 Tichuan a hnena a thusawi chu a bang a, tin, Pathian chuan Abrahama chu a chhohsan ta a." 
Genesis17:23 Tin, Abrahama chuan a fapa Ismaela leh, a ina piang zawng zawngte leh a tangka suma a lei zawng zawng, Abrahama chhungte zinga mi mipa tawh phawt chu a hruai a, Pathianin a hnena a sawi tawh angin, chu mi ni ngei chuan an serh vun tisa chu a tansak ta a." 
Genesis17:24 Tin, Abrahama chu a serh vun tisaa a serh an tan lai chuan kum 99 mi a ni a." 
Genesis17:25 Tin, a fapa Ismaela chu a serhvun tisaa a serh an tan lai chuan kum 13 mi a ni a." 
Genesis17:26 Chu mi ni ngei chuan Abrahama leh a fapa Ismaela chu serhtan an lo ni ta a.A chhungte zinga mipa zawng zawng, a ina piangte leh mikhual laka tangka suma a leite pawh ama rual chuan serhtan an lo ni ta vek a." 
Genesis17:27 A chhungte zinga mipa zawng zawng, a ina piangte leh mikhual laka tangka suma a leite pawh ama rual chuan serhtan an lo ni ta vek a." 
Genesis18:1 Abrahama chu chhun ni lum lai taka puan in kawngka bula a thut laiin, Lalpa chu Mamre sasaw kiangahte chuan a hnenah a rawn inlar a;" 
Genesis18:2 tin, a han dak a, a en a, tin, ngai teh, a zawn lawkah chuan mi pathum an lo ding reng a; tin, a hmuh veleh puan in kawngka ata chu anmahni lawm turin a va tlan a, lei siin chibai a buk a," 
Genesis18:3 Ka pu, mi khawngaih theih chuan, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh hi mi kalpel lul suh ang che u:" 
Genesis18:4 tui tlem tal rawn la se la, in kete sil u la, thing hnuaiah hian chawl teh rih u:" 
Genesis18:5 chhang tlem tal ka va la ang a, in thinlung tiharh ang che u; chu mi hnuah chuan in kal zel dawn nia: chu mi avanga in chhiahhlawh hnena lo kal hi in ni chawk ang a;"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""I sawi ang chuan va ti rawh,"" an ti a." 
Genesis18:6 Tichuan Abrahama chu puan in chhungah Sari hnenah chuan a lut ta thuai a, ""Chhangphut dip tak tehkhawng thum siam la, hmet la, chhangperahte siam rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:7 Tin, Abrahama chu bawng rual lamah a va tlan a, bawng no nalh tha zet hi a rawn la a, chhiahhlawh hnenah a pe a; tin, a ni chuan a lo siam thuai thuai a." 
Genesis18:8 Tin, hnutetui khal te, hnutetui te, bawng no sa siamte chu a la a, an hmaah a va hlui ta a; tin, thing hnuaiah chuan an kiangah a ding reng a, anni chuan an ei ta a." 
Genesis18:9 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""I nupui Sari khawiah nge a awm?"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Saw puan inah sawn,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:10 Tin, ani chuan, ""Hun hi a lo thlen leh tikah chuan i hnenah ka lo kal leh ngei ngei ang a, tin, ngai teh, i nupui Sari chuan fapa a nei ang,"" a ti a. Tin, a hnunga puan in kawngka bul atang chuan Sari'n a lo hria a." 
Genesis18:11 Abrahama leh Sari chu upa tak, tar tawh tak an ni a; hmeichhe dan pangngai chu Sari chungah chuan a reh daih tawh a." 
Genesis18:12 Tichuan Sari'n, ""Tar ka nih tawh hnu hian lawmna ka nei ang maw, ka Lalpa lah a upa tawh bawk si?"" tiin a rilruin a nui a." 
Genesis18:13 Tin, Lalpa chuan Abrahama hnenah, ""Engati nge Sari'n, 'Kei tar hian fa ka hring em ang maw?' tiin a nuih?" 
Genesis18:14 Lalpa tan thil reng reng a harsa lutuk em ni? Hun ruatah, hun a lo thlen tikah chuan i hnenah ka lo kal leh ang a, tin Sari chuan fapa a nei ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:15 Chutichuan Sari chuan, ""Ka nui lo"" tiin a pha a; a hlau si a. Tin ani chuan, ""Awih loh loh tur; i nuih ngei kha le,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:16 Tin, mite chu chuta ta chu an tho a Sodom khaw lam chu an en a: tin, Abrahama chu anmahni thlah turin an hnenah a kal ve a." 
Genesis18:17 Tin, Lalpa chuan, ""Ka thil tih tur hi Abrahama lakah hian ka zep ang em aw?" 
Genesis18:18 Abrahama hi chi ropui leh thiltithei tak a lo la ni ngei dawn a, amahah chuan khawvela chi tin an la thawveng dawn si a." 
Genesis18:19 Lalpa kawng an zawh theihna'n a hnua a fate leh a chhungte, thil fel taka ti tur leh rorel anga ti tura thu a pek theihna turin ani chu ka ruat tawh si a; chutichuan a chungchang thu a sawia chu Lalpa'n Abrahama chunga a thlentir theihna turin,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:20 Tichuan Lalpa chuan, ""Sodom leh Gomorra khaw au thawm a nasa ngeiin, an sual nasa em em a ni ngei mai;" 
Genesis18:21 tunah ka zuk kal ang a, an au thawm ka hnena lo thleng ang ngei hian an ti nge ti lo ka en ang a; an tih loh chuan ka hre mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:22 Tin, mite chu chuta ta chu an hawi a, Sodom khaw lam chu an pan ta a; Abrahama erawh chu Lalpa hmaah chuan a la ding reng a." 
Genesis18:23 Tin, Abrahama chuan a va hnaih a, ""Mi felte chu mi sualte zingah i tiboral ve dawn em ni?" 
Genesis18:24 Khaw chhungah chuan mi fel sawmnga tal an awm mahna: a chhunga mi fel sawmnga awmte avang chuan khua chu zuah phah loin i tiboral dawn em ni? 
Genesis18:25 Nang em chuan chutiang chuan mi felte chu mi sualte anga an awm vena tura mi felte chu mi sualte zinga tihhlum ve mai te chu i ti awm em si loa; nang em chuan i ti awm em si lo: lei chung zawng zawng Roreltu chuan fel takin a ti dawn lo'm ni? a ti a. 
Genesis18:26 Tin, Lalpa chuan, ""Sodom khaw chhungah chuan mi fel sawmnga pawh ka hmuh chuan anmahni avang chuan khaw pum pui chu ka zuah mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:27 Tin, Abrahama chuan, ""Ngai teh, kei vaivut leh meivap mai hian Lalpa chu ka be pawp ta sa che:" 
Genesis18:28 mi fel chu pangain sawmnga an tling lo a ni mahna: panga an tlin loh avangin khaw pum pui chu i tiboral dawn em ni? a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Chutah chuan sawmli leh panga pawh ka hmuh chuan ka tiboral lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:29 Tin, ani chuan amah chu a be leh zel a, ""Chutah chuan sawmli chauh i hmu a ni mahna,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""sawmli avang pawh chuan ka tiboral lo mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:30 Tin, ani chuan ""Aw Lalpa chu thinur suh ang che, ka han sawi leh teh ang: chutah chuan sawmthum chauh i hmu a ni mahna,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Chutah chuan sawmthum pawh ka hmuh chuan ka tiboral lo mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:31 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ngai teh, Lalpa chu ka be pawp ta sa che: chutah chuan sawmhnih chauh i hmu a ni mahna,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, sawmhnih avang pawh chuan ka tiboral lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis18:32 Tin, ani chuan, ""Aw Lalpa chu thinur suh ang che, vawi khat chauh chuan ka han sawi leh teh ang: chutah chuan sawm chauh i hmu a ni mahna,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Sawm avang pawh chuan ka tiboral lo ang,"" a ti a.Tichuan Lalpa chu Abrahama nena an inbiak zawh veleh chuan a kal ta a: tin, Abrahama chu ama awmna lamah a kir leh ta a." 
Genesis18:33 Tichuan Lalpa chu Abrahama nena an inbiak zawh veleh chuan a kal ta a: tin, Abrahama chu ama awmna lamah a kir leh ta a." 
Genesis19:1 Tin, vantirhkoh pahnih chu tlai lamah Sodom khua an zuk thleng a; Lota chu Sodom khaw kulh kawngkharah chuan a lo thu a: tin, Lotan anmahni a lo hmu a, lawm turin a ding ta a; tin, a hmaia lei siin chibai a buk a;" 
Genesis19:2 tin, ""Ngai teh u, ka pute u, khawngaih takin in chhiahhlawh inah hian lut rih ula, riak u la, in kete sil rawh u, tichuan zing takah in tho ang a, in kal leh dawn nia,"" a ti a. Nimahsela anni chuan, ""Ni lo e, khawlaiah kan riak zawk ang,"" an ti a." 
Genesis19:3 Nimahsela ani chuan a thlem chiam a; tichuan a hnenah an kal a, a inah chuan an lut ta a, tin, ani chuan chawhmeh a siam a, chhang dawidim telh loh a kang a, tin, an ei ta a." 
Genesis19:4 Nimahsela an mut hmain khuaa mi, Sodom khuaa mite ngei chuan, veng tina mi zawng zawngin, apui apangin, in chu an hual vel hlawm a;" 
Genesis19:5 tin, Lota chu an ko a, a hnenah, ""Zanina i hnena mi lo lutte kha khawnge an awm? Anmahni kan pawl theihna'n kan hnenah rawn hruai chhuak rawh,"" an ti a." 
Genesis19:6 Tin, Lota chu kawngka bulah chuan an hnenah a va chhuak a, kawng a khar leh a." 
Genesis19:7 Tin, ""Ka unaute u, khawngaih takin chuti em chuan sual ma ta che u." 
Genesis19:8 Ngai teh u, mipa la pawl ngai loh fanu pahnih ka nei a ni; mi khawngaih u la, anni chu in hnenah ka rawn hruai chhuak ang e, tha in tih ang apiangin an chungah ti nang che u: he mite chungah erawh hi chuan engmah ti lul suh ang che u; chu mi avang chuan a sin ka in chhungah hian an lo luh ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis19:9 Tin, anni chuan, ""Kiang mai rawh,"" an ti a. Tin, anmahni vek chuan, ""He mi hrep hi heta awm tur hian a lo pem lut a, roreltuah awm a tum vei a: tunah zawng anni chunga tih ai mahin i chungah kan titha lo lehzual ang,"" an ti a. Tin, mi (Lota) chu an bawh chiam a, kawngkhar chu tichhe turin an rawn hnaih a." 
Genesis19:10 Nimahsela mite chuan an kut an zen chhuak a, Lota chu an hnenah in chhungah chuan an hnuk lut a, kawng an khar ta tlat a." 
Genesis19:11 Tin, kawngka bula mite chu alian atein, an mit an tihdelsak a: chutichuan kawngkhar chu an zawng hmu zo ta lo a." 
Genesis19:12 Tin, mite chuan Lota hnenah, ""Heng mite lo hi hetah hian chhungte dang i nei em? I makpa leh i fapate leh i fanute leh khaw chhunga i neih apiangte chu khua ata hi hruai chhuak rawh:" 
Genesis19:13 LALPA hmaah chuan an au thawm chu a lo nasat tak avangin he khua hi kan tiboral dawn a ni: tiboral turin LALPA chuan min tir bawk si a,"" an ti a." 
Genesis19:14 Tichuan Lota chu a kal chhuak a, a fanute neitu, a makpate hnenah chuan a va sawi a, ""Tho u la, he mi khua ata hi chhuak rawh u; LALPA'n khua hi a tiboral dawn a ni,"" a ti a. Nimahsela a makpate ngaih chuan fiamthu sawi ang lek a ni a." 
Genesis19:15 Tin, khawfing a chah veleh chuan vantirhkohte chuan, ""Tho la, i nupui leh heta i fanu pahnih awmte hi hruai rawh; chutilochuan he khaw hremnaah hian in boral ve dah ang e,"" tiin Lota chu an tur ta sek a." 
Genesis19:16 Nimahsela a la muang hle si a; tichuan LALPA'n amah a khawngaih avangin mite chuan a kutah leh a nupui kutah leh a fanute pahnih kutah chuan an chelh a, tichuan an hruai chhuak a, khaw pawnah chuan an dah ta a." 
Genesis19:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, pawna an hruai chhuah hnu chuan, ""I nunna turin tlan chhuak rawh; i hnung lam hawi suh la, Phaizawl reng rengah hian ding hek suh; tlangah sawn tlan rawh, chutilochuan i boral dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
Genesis19:18 Nimahsela Lota chuan a hnenah, ""Ka pu, chung ang chu ni suh se:" 
Genesis19:19 ngai teh, i chhiahhlawh hian i mit a tlung a, nangin i zahngaihna chu i tilian a, chu zahngaihna chu ka nun humhimin ka chungah i lantir a ni; tlangah saw zawng ka tlan thei lo ang, thil tha lo tak hian mi rawn nangin ka thi dah ang e:" 
Genesis19:20 ngai teh, saw khua saw tlanna'n a hnai ber a, khaw te tak te a ni bawk si a: aw, chutah chuan (khaw te tak te a ni lo'm ni?) mi tlantir zawk rawh, tichuan ka nung dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Genesis19:21 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, """"Ngai teh, chu thil kawngah pawh chuan ka zawm che a ni, khua i sawi chu ka tiboral lo mai ang e." 
Genesis19:22 Hmanhmawh la, chutah chuan tlan rawh; chu mi i thlen hma loh chuan engmah ka ti thei dawn si lo a,"" a ti a. Chuvangin chu khaw hmingah chuan Zoar an vuah ta a." 
Genesis19:23 Lota chuan Zoar khua chu a thlen chuan lei chungah chuan ni a lo chhuak tawh a. 
Genesis19:24 Tin, LALPA chuan Sodom leh Gomorra khaw chungah chuan vana LALPA hnen atang chuan kat leh mei a surtira;" 
Genesis19:25 tichuan chung khuate leh Phaizawl zawng zawng leh khuaa mi zawng zawngte leh leia thil tote chu a tiboral ta vek a. 
Genesis19:26 A nupui erawh chuan Lota hnung atang chuan a lehhawi a, chi khawn dingah a lo chang ta a." 
Genesis19:27 Tin, Abrahama chu zing takah LALPA hmaa a dinna hmunah khan a han chho a;" 
Genesis19:28 tin, Sodom leh Gomorra khaw lam leh Phaizawl ram zawng zawng lam chu a thlir a, a en reng a; tin, Ngai teh, chu mi rama meikhu chu rawhtuina meikhu ang maiin a khu chho ngut ngut a." 
Genesis19:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pathianin Phaizawl khuate chu a tihboral laia Lota awmna khuate chu a tihboral lai chuan, Pathianin Abrahama chu a hre reng a, Lota chu boralna zing ata chu a tir chhuak a." 
Genesis19:30 Tin, Lota chu Zoar khua ata chu a chho a, tlangah chuan a awm a, a fanute pahnih chu a hnenah an awm bawk a; Zoar khuaah a awm ngam si loa: tin, amah leh a fanute pahnih chu pukah an awm ta a." 
Genesis19:31 Tin, a upa zawk chuan a naupang zawk hnenah chuan, ""Kan pa hi a upa tawh a, khawvel zawng zawng dan anga min pawl turin lei chungah hian mipa pakhat mah an awm tawh si loa:" 
Genesis19:32 hawh, kan pa hi uain i intir ang khai, tichuan kan pa chithlah mang loa kan siam theihna'n a hnenah kan mu dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Genesis19:33 Tichuan chu mi zan chuan an pa chu uain an intir ta a: tin, a upa zawk chu a lut a, a pa hnenah chuan a va mu a; tin, ani chuan a lo mut lai chu a hre lo a, a thawh leh lai pawh chu a hre hek lo." 
Genesis19:34 Tin, heti hi a ni a, atukah chuan a upa zawk chuan a naupang zawk hnenah chuan ""Ngai teh, nizanah khan ka pa hnenah ka mu a: zaninah pawh hian uain i intir leh ang khai; tin, nang lut la, kan pa chithlah mang loa kan siam theihna'n a hnenah va mu ve rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis19:35 Tichuan chu mi zan pawh chuan an pa chu uain an intir leh a: tin, a naupang zawk chu a tho a, a hnenah a va mu ta a; tin, ani chuan a lo mut lai chu a hre lo a, a thawh leh lai pawh chu a hre hek lo." 
Genesis19:36 Chutiang chuan Lota fanute pahnih chuan an pa lakah chuan nau an lo pai ta ve ve a. 
Genesis19:37 Tin, a upa zawk chuan fapa a hringa, a hmingah chuan Moaba a sa a: chu mi chu tun laia Moab-ho thlahtu hi a ni a.Tin, a naupang zawk pawh chuan fapa a hring ve a, a hmingah chuan Ben-ammia a sa a: chu mi chu tun laia Ammona thlahte thlahtu hi a ni a." 
Genesis19:38 Tin, a naupang zawk pawh chuan fapa a hring ve a, a hmingah chuan Ben-ammia a sa a: chu mi chu tun laia Ammona thlahte thlahtu hi a ni a." 
Genesis20:1 Tin, Abrahama chu chuta tang chuan chhim ram lam panin a insawn a, Kades khua leh Sur karah chuan awm hmun a khuar a; Gerar khuaah chuan a awm ta rih bawk a." 
Genesis20:2 Tin, Abrahama'n a nupui Sari chu ""Ka farnu a ni,"" a ti a: tichuan Gerar Lal Abimeleka chuan mi a tir a, Sari chu a va hruaitir ta a." 
Genesis20:3 Nimahsela Pathian chu zanah a mumangah Abimeleka hnenah a lo kal a, a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, i hmeichhe hruai avang hian mitthi mai i ni ta; mi nupui a ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Genesis20:4 Abimeleka erawh chuan a la pawl rih loa: tichuan Lalpa, mi fel takte pawh i tihlum dawn em ni?" 
Genesis20:5 Amah ngei pawhin ka hnenah, 'Ka farnu a ni,' a ti lo'm ni? Tin, ani ngei pawhin, 'Ka nuta a ni,' a ti bawk si a: thinlung tha tak pu leh kut thianghlim tak nei chungin hei hi ka ti a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis20:6 Tin, Pathianin a mumangah chuan, ""Ni, hei hi thinlung tha tak pu chungin i ti a ni tih ka hria e, tichuan kei pawhin ka chunga i thil tihsual tur chu ka khap che a ni: chuvangin a ni, amah i khawih ka phal loh ni." 
Genesis20:7 Chutichuan tunah mi nupui kha pe kir leh rawh; ani chu zawlnei a ni si a, a tawngtaisak ang chia, tin i dam dawn nia: i pek kir loh zawngin i thi ngei dawn tih hre rawh, nang leh i neih zawng zawngte nen,"" a ti a." 
Genesis20:8 Tichuan Abimeleka chu zing takah a tho a, a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng a ko a, an beng hriatah chung thu zawng zawng chu a hrilh a: tin, mite chuan an hlau ta em em a." 
Genesis20:9 Chutichuan Abimeleka chuan Abrahama a ko a, a hnenah, ""Kan chunga i thiltih hi engtizia nge ni le? Eng kawngah nge i chungah thil ka tihsual a, kei leh ka khua leh tuite chungah thil sual nasa tak i rawn thlen hi le? Thil tih awm loh tak hi ka chungah i tih tak hi,"" a ti a." 
Genesis20:10 Tin, Abimeleka vek chuan Abrahama hnenah, ""Engnge i hmuh a, hetiang thil i tih le?"" a ti leh a." 
Genesis20:11 Tin, Abrahama chuan, ""He mi khuaah hian Pathian tihna a awm hauh lo ngei ang a, ka nupui avang hian mi tihlum mai ang tih ka rin avang a ni." 
Genesis20:12 Chuachhapah ka farnu a ni reng bawk si a, ka pa fanu a ni a, ka nu fanu erawh chu a ni lo; tin, ka nupuiah a lo awm ta a ni:" 
Genesis20:13 tin, heti hi a ni a, Pathianin ka pa in ata mi vahvaihtir lai khan, a hnenah, 'Hei hi i khawngaihna ka chunga i lantir tur chu a ni; kan thlenna hmun apiangah, Ka nuta a ni, ti zel ang che ka ti reng a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis20:14 Tin, Abimeleka chuan beramte leh bawngpate leh bawihpate leh bawihnute a hruai a, Abrahama chu a pe a, a nupui Sari pawh chu a pe kir leh ta a." 
Genesis20:15 Tin, Abimeleka chuan, ""En teh, ka ram chu a awm duai a lawm i duhna apiangah hian awm rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis20:16 Tin, Abimeleka chuan, ""En teh, i nuta hi tangka sangkhat ka pe ta a: ngai teh, i hnena awm zawng zawngte lakah chuan i tan mit khuhna tur a nih hi; i chung thu reng rengah hian i fel leh tawh vek a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis20:17 Tichuan Abrahama chuan Pathian hnenah a tawngtai a: tin, Pathianin Abimeleka leh a nupui leh a bawihnute chu a tidam leh a; tichuan fate an hring leh ta a.Abrahama nupui Sari avang chuan LALPA chuan Abimeleka chhungte zawng zawng chu a tiching ta tlat hlawm si a." 
Genesis20:18 Abrahama nupui Sari avang chuan LALPA chuan Abimeleka chhungte zawng zawng chu a tiching ta tlat hlawm si a. 
Genesis21:1 Tin, LALPA chuan a sawi tawh angin Sari chu a zuk kan a, LALPA chuan a sawi tawh angin Sari chungah a tihsak ta bawk a." 
Genesis21:2 Tichuan Sari chu a rai a, Pathianin a hnena a sawi hun ruat takah chuan Abrahama chu a tar hnuin fapa a hrinsak ta a." 
Genesis21:3 Tin, Abrahama'n a fapa neih, Sari'n a hrinsaka chu a hmingah Isaaka a sa a." 
Genesis21:4 Tin, Abrahama'n Pathianin thu a pek ang khan, a fapa Isaaka chu ni riat a tlinin a serh a tansak a." 
Genesis21:5 Tin, Abrahama chu a fapa Isaaka a neih lai chuan kum 100 mi a ni a." 
Genesis21:6 Tin, Sari chuan, ""Pathianin mi tinui ta; mi tin a hria apiangin mi nuihpui ang,"" a ti a."
