Genesis21:7 Tin, amah vekin, ""Sari'n nautete a la pawm ang,' tih, tuin nge Abrahama hnenah sawi ngaihna hria ang? A tar hnu hian fapa ka hrinsak tak hi,"" a ti a," 
Genesis21:8 Tin, naute chu a lo thang lian a, a hnute hnek an bantir ta a: tin, Isaaka chu a hnute hnek an bantir ni chuan Abrahama'n ruai ropui tak a theh a." 
Genesis21:9 Tin, Aigupta mi Hagari fapa, Abrahama tana a hrina chuan, a nuihsan lai Sari'n a hmu a." 
Genesis21:10 Chu mi avangin Abrahama hnenah chuan He bawihnu leh a fapa hi hnawt chhuak rawh: he bawihnu fapa hi ka fapa Isaaka ro luahpuitu tur a ni thei lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis21:11 Tin, chu thu chu a fapa avangin Abrahama ngaih chuan thil tha lo tak a ni." 
Genesis21:12 Nimahsela Pathianin Abrahama hnenah chuan, ""Naupang chungchang thu leh i bawihnu chungchang thu hi i ngaihin thil tha lo tak ni suh se; Sari'n i hnena thu a sawi zawng zawng chu zawm rawh; Isaakaah hian i thlahte an la ti dawn si a" 
Genesis21:13 Tin, bawihnu fapaah pawh hian i thlah a nih avangin chi tihtham zet ka la siam ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis21:14 Tichuan Abrahama chu zing takah a tho a, chhang leh tuithawl tuia khatin a la a, Hagari a pe a, a kokiah a chhuansak a, naupang pawh chu a kaltir ta a; tichuan a kal a, Beer-seba thlalerah chuan a vak a vak ta a." 
Genesis21:15 Tin, tuithawla tui chu a lo awm ta lo a, tichuan naupang chu hnimbuk pakhat hnuaiah a dah ta mai a." 
Genesis21:16 Tin, ""Naupang thi tur chu ka en ngam lo e,"" a tih avangin a kal a, hla fe, thal kah phak tawk angah hian a hma zawnah chuan a va thu ta chawt a. Tichuan a hma zawnah chuan a thu a, ring takin a tap ta a." 
Genesis21:17 Tin, Pathianin naupang aw chu a hria a; tin, Pathian vantirhkohin van atangin Hagari chu a zuk au a, a hnenah, ""Hagar, eng i ti nge ni le? Hlau suh; a awmnaa naupang aw kha Pathianin a hria a sin." 
Genesis21:18 Tho la, naupang kha kai tho la, i kutin chelh rawh, amah chu chi ropui takah ka siam dawn a sin,"" a ti a." 
Genesis21:19 Tin, Pathianin a mit a tihvarsak a, tuichhunchhuah a hmu ta a; tichuan a va kal a, tuithawlah chuan tui chu a thun khat a, naupang chu a intir ta a." 
Genesis21:20 Tin, Pathian chu naupang hnenah chuan a awm thin a, a lo thang lian zel a, thlalerah a awm thin a, thal kah thiam mi a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis21:21 Paran thlalerah chuan a awm a; tin, a nu chuan Aigupta ram ata nupui a neihsak a." 
Genesis21:22 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu mi lai vel chuan Abimeleka leh a sipai pawl hotu Phikola chuan Abrahama hnenah, ""I thil tih apiangah chuan Pathian i hnenah a awm zel thin a:" 
Genesis21:23 chutichuan tunah hetah hian Pathian hming chhalin, kei leh ka fapa leh ka fapaa fapa pawh tihder loin, ka lo khawngaih tak che ang khan kei leh i awmna ram hi khawngaih ve thung zawk turin ka hnenah chhia chham rawh khai!"" tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis21:24 Tin, Abrahama chuan, ""Ka chham ang chu,"" a ti a." 
Genesis21:25 Tin, Abimeleka chhiahhlawhten tuichhunchhuah an chhuhsak avang chuan Abrahama'n Abimeleka chu a zilh a." 
Genesis21:26 Tin, Abimeleka chuan ""Chu mi thil titu chu tu nge ni, ka hre hauh lo mai: nang lahin mi hrilh si lo a, vawiinah chauh lo chuan ka la hre ve hauh lo mai,"" a ti a." 
Genesis21:27 Tichuan Abrahama chuan beramte leh bawngpate a hruai a, Abimeleka hnenah a pe a; tin, an pahnih chuan thu an thlung ta a." 
Genesis21:28 Tin, Abrahama'n a beram rual zinga mi beram no a nu pasarih a dah hrang a." 
Genesis21:29 Tin, Abimaleka chuan Abrahama hnenah,""Beram rual zinga mi beram no a nu pasarih a hranga i dah hi eng tizia nge ni?"" a ti a." 
Genesis21:30 Tin, ani chuan, ""He tuichhunchhuah hi keimahin ka laih a ni tih mi hriatpuina turin he'ng beram no a nu pasarih hi ka kut ata i la tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis21:31 Chu mi avang chuan chu mi hmun chu Beer-seba a vuah a; chutah chuan an pahniha chhia an chham dun avangin. 
Genesis21:32 Chutichuan Beer-seba-ah chuan thu an thlung ta a: tin, Abimeleka chu a tho a, a sipai pawl hotu Phikola nen Philistin-ho ramah chuan an hawng leh ta a." 
Genesis21:33 Tin, Abrahama chuan Beer-seba-ah chuan far thing a phun a, chutah chuan LALPA, Chatuan Pathian hming chu a lam a.Tichuan Abrahama chu Philistin-ho ramah chuan rei tak a awm a." 
Genesis21:34 Tichuan Abrahama chu Philistin-ho ramah chuan rei tak a awm a. 
Genesis22:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung thil hnuah chuan Pathianin Abrahama chu a fiah a, a hnenah, ""Abraham,"" a ti a; tin, ani chuan, ""Heta hi ka awm,"" a ti a." 
Genesis22:2 Tin, ani chuan ""I fapa, i fapa neih chhun, i hmangaih tak, Isaaka ngei kha hruai la, Moria ramah chuan kal la, chutah chuan ka hrilh tur che tlang pakhatah chuan halral thilhlanah hlan rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis22:3 Tin, Abrahama chu zing takah a tho a, a sabengtung a siam a, a hnenah a chhiahhlawh tlangval pahnih a hruai a, a fapa Isaaka nen, tin, halral thilhlan atan thing a ek a, a tho a, Pathianin a hrilhna hmun lamah chuan a kal ta a." 
Genesis22:4 Tin, ni thum niah chuan Abrahama chu a han dak a, a hmun chu hla takah a han hmu a." 
Genesis22:5 Tichuan Abrahama'n a chhiahhlawh tlangvalte hnenah chuan, ""Hetah sabengtung nen hian lo awm rawh u, kei leh naupang hi sawtah sawn kan va kal ang a; tin, Pathian kan va bia ang a, in hnenah kan lo kir leh ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis22:6 Tin, Abrahama chuan halral thilhlanna thing chu a la a, a fapa Isaaka chu a puttir a; ani chuan mei leh chemte a keng a; tichuan an pahnihin an kal dun ta a." 
Genesis22:7 Tin, Isaaka chuan a pa Abrahama chu a bia a, ""Ka pa,"" a ti a: tin, ani chuan, ""Ka fapa, heta hi ka awm,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""En teh, mei leh thing chu a awm a; nimahsela halral thilhlan tur beram no chu khawiah nge a awm?"" a ti a." 
Genesis22:8 Tin, Abrahama chuan, ""Ka fapa, Pathianin ama tana halral thilhlan tur beram no chu a ngaihtuah chawp mai ang chu,"" a ti a: chutichuan an pahnih chuan an kal dun ta zel a." 
Genesis22:9 Tin, Pathianin a hrilh hmun chu an va thleng ta a; tin, Abrahama chuan chutah chuan maicham a siam a, thing chu a chhep khawm a, a fapa Isaaka chu a phuar a, maichama thing chungah chuan a muttir a." 
Genesis22:10 Tin, Abrahama'n a kutin a ban a, a fapa tihhlumna'n chemte chu a la a." 
Genesis22:11 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chuan van atangin amah chu a zuk au a, ""Abrahama, Abrahama,"" a zuk ti a: tin, ani chuan, ""Heta hi ka awm,"" a ti a." 
Genesis22:12 Tin, ani chuan, ""Naupang chungah khan i kut thlak suh la, amah kha engmah tih hek suh: i fapa, i neih chhun tak pawh mi pek i ui loh avangin Pathian i tih tih tunah ka hre ta a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis22:13 Tin, Abrahama chu a han dak a, a en a, tin, ngai teh, a hnung lamah chuan berampa a ki thing hnawka lo tang tlat a awm a: tichuan Abrahama chuan berampa chu a va man a, chu mi chu a fapa aiah halral thilhlanah chuan a hlan ta zawk a." 
Genesis22:14 Tichuan Abrahama'n chu mi hmun hmingah chuan Jehoa-jire a vuah a: vawiin thlenga, ""LALPA tlangah ngaihtuah a ni ang chu,"" an ti thin ang hian." 
Genesis22:15 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chuan a vawi hnihnaah van atangin Abrahama chu a zuk au leh a," 
Genesis22:16  'He thil hi i tih tak avang leh i fapa, i neih chhun tak pawh i ui loh avangin, mal ka sawmsak ngei ngei ang chia,'" 
Genesis22:17 Vana arsi zat leh tuifinriat kama tiau vaivut zatin i thlahte chu ka la tipung ngei ngei ang tih leh i thlahte chuan an dote kulh kawngkhar chu an la neihsak ang tih leh," 
Genesis22:18 ka thu i awih tak avangin i thlahah chuan khawvela chitin an la thawveng ang tih, mahni leh mahni inchhalin chhia ka chham ta, LALPA'n a ti,"" a zuk ti a." 
Genesis22:19 Chutichuan Abrahama chu a chhiahhlawh tlangvalte hnenah chuan a kir leh a, tin an tho a, Beer-seba-ah chuan an kal za ta hlawm a; tin, Abrahama chu Beer-seba-ah a awm ta reng a." 
Genesis22:20 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung thil hnuah chuan miin Abrahama hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh, Milkaii pawh khan i nau Nahora chu fate a hrinsak ta a sin,"" tiin an hrilh a." 
Genesis22:21 A fa tir chu Uza a ni a; a nau chu Buza a ni a, Kemuela, Arama pa nen;" 
Genesis22:22 Cheseda te, Hazova te, Pildasa te, Jidlapha te, Bethuela te pawh an ni a." 
Genesis22:23 Tin, Bethuela chuan fanu Rebeki a nei a: chung pariatte chu Milkaii chuan Abrahama nau Nahora chu a hrinsak a ni.A hmei, a hming Reumaii pawhin Teba te, Gahama te, Tahasa te, Maaka te a hring bawk a." 
Genesis22:24 A hmei, a hming Reumaii pawhin Teba te, Gahama te, Tahasa te, Maaka te a hring bawk a." 
Genesis23:1 Tin, Sari dam chhung chu kum 127 a ni a: chung chu Sari dam chhung kum chu a ni." 
Genesis23:2 Tin, Sari chu Kanaan rama Kiriath-arba khuaah chuan a thi a (chu chu Hebron khua a ni): tin, Abrahama chu Sari sun tur leh tah turin a lo kal a." 
Genesis23:3 Tin, mitthi ruang hma ata chu a tho a, Hetha thlahte hnenah chuan," 
Genesis23:4 In zingah mikhual leh pem mai ka ni a: ka mitthi ruang hi ka hmuh loha ka phum theihna turin in zingah hian phumna hmun ro mi pe rawh u,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis23:5 Tin, Hetha thlahte chuan Abrahama chu an chhang a, a hnenah," 
Genesis23:6 Ka pu, min ngaithla teh, nang chu kan zingah hian lal ropui tak i ni a: kan thlanahte hian i duhna berah chuan i mitthi chu phum ta che: i mitthi i phumna turin kan zinga tumahin kan thlan pek che kan ui lo ang,"" an ti a." 
Genesis23:7 Tichuan Abrahama chu a tho a, chu mi rama mi, Hetha thlahte chu chibai a buk a." 
Genesis23:8 Tin, ka mitthi chu ka hmuh loha ka phum rem in tih chuan mi ngaithla u la, Makpela puk, a lo mawnga awm, a neih kha mi pe turin Zohara fapa Ephrona hnenah mi ngensak teh u." 
Genesis23:9 In zingah phumna hmun ro atana a man tawk ang ang zelin mi pe rawh se, tiin a bia a." 
Genesis23:10 Tin, Ephrona chu Hetha thlahte zingah chuan a thu ve reng a: tichuan Hit mi Ephrona chu Hetha thlahte hriatah, a khaw kulh kawngkaa lut apiang hriat ngeiah chuan," 
Genesis23:11 Ni lo e, ka pu, mi ngaithla teh: lo chu ka pe chia, a chhunga puk awm pawh chu ka pe bawk a che; ka chipuiho fate mit hmuhah hian ka pe a che: i mitthi chu phum mai rawh,"" tiin Abrahama chu a chhang a." 
Genesis23:12 Tin, Abrahama chu chu mi rama mite hmaah chuan a kun a, chibai a buk a." 
Genesis23:13 Tin, chu mi rama mite hriatah chuan Ephrona hnenah, ""Rem i tih phawt chuan khawngaih takin mi ngaithla teh; lo man chu ka pe zawk ang che; ka hnen ata hi la la, chutah chuan ka mitthi chu ka phum dawn nia,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis23:14 Tin, Ephrona chuan Abrahama chu a chhang a, a hnenah," 
Genesis23:15 Ka pu, mi ngaithla teh: lei hmun, tangka sekel zali hu maite chu, nang leh kei atan sawi tham em ni ang? I mitthi chu phum mai rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis23:16 Tichuan Abrahama chuan Ephrona thu chu a zawm ta a; tin, Abrahama'n Hetha thlahte hriatah Ephronan tangka a sawi zat, tangka sekel zali, sumdawnghoin an hman thina chu a buk a, Ephrona a pe ta a." 
Genesis23:17 Chutichuan Ephrona lo, Mamre zawna Makpela rama awm chu, a lo nen a chhunga puk awm nen, loa thing awm zawng zawngte nen, a lo ri vel zawng zawnga thing awmte nen chuan," 
Genesis23:18 Hetha thlahte mithmuhah, a khaw kulh kawngkaa lut apiangte mithmuhah chuan, ro atan Abrahama hnenah pek nghehin a awm ta a." 
Genesis23:19 Chu mi hnuah chuan Abrahama'n a nupui Sari chu Kanaan rama Mamre zawna (chu chu Hebron khua a ni a) Makpela loa pukah chuan a phum ta a.Tichuan lo leh a chhunga puk awm chu, phumna hmun ro atan Abrahama chu Hetha thlahten an pe nghet ta a." 
Genesis23:20 Tichuan lo leh a chhunga puk awm chu, phumna hmun ro atan Abrahama chu Hetha thlahten an pe nghet ta a." 
Genesis24:1 Tin, Abrahama chu a lo upa a, a lo tar ta hle a: tin, LALPA chuan Abrahama chu thil engkimah mal a sawmsak tawh a." 
Genesis24:2 Tin, Abrahama chuan a chhiahhlawh, a chhungte zinga upa ber, a neih zawng zawng chunga thuneitu hnenah chuan, ""Khawngaih takin i kut kha ka malpui hnuaiah rawlh rawh:" 
Genesis24:3 tichuan LALPA van Pathian leh lei Pathian chu chhalin, ka awmna Kanaan-ho nula zinga mi hi ka fapa nupuia neihsak lo turin chhia ka chhamtir dawn che a ni:" 
Genesis24:4 kan ram lamah, ka laichinte hnena kalin ka fapa Isaaka hi nupui i neihsak zawk tur ani,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:5 Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan a hnenah, ""Hmeichhia chuan he mi ram lamah hian mi zui duh kher lo mahna: i fapa hi i lo chhuahna ram lamah chuan ka hruai kir leh tur em ni ang?"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:6 Tin, Abrahama chuan a hnenah, ""Ka fapa hi chutah chuan hruai kir leh lo turin fimkhur rawh." 
Genesis24:7 LALPA, van Pathian, ka pa in ata leh ka pianna ram ata mi hruai chhuaktu leh mi betu leh, 'He ram hi i thlahte ka la pe ang,' tia, ka hnena chhechhamtu chuan, amah ngeiin a vantirhkoh chu i hmaah a kaltir ang a, chuta tang chuan ka fapa hi nupui i rawn neihsak dawn nia." 
Genesis24:8 Tin, hmeichhia chuan a zui duh loh che chuan ka hnena i chhechham kawngah hian i thiang mai ang; engpawh ni rawh se, ka fapa hi chutah chuan i hruai kir leh tur ani lo,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:9 Tichuan chhiahhlawh chuan a kut chu a pu Abrahama malpui hnuaiah chuan a rawlh a, chu mi thu-ah chuan a hnenah chhia a chham ta a." 
Genesis24:10 Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan a pu sanghawngsei zinga mi sanghawngsei sawm a hruai a, a pu thil tha tinreng kengin a chhuak ta a: tichuan a tho a, Mesopotamia rama Nahora te khuaah chuan a kal a." 
Genesis24:11 Tin, tlai lama hmeichheho tui chawi tura an chhuah hun lai tak chuan, daikianga tuichhunchhuah kiangah chuan a sanghawngseite chu a thingthittir a." 
Genesis24:12 Tin, ""Aw LALPA, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, khawngaih takin vawiinah hian mi hlawhtlintir la, ka pu Abrahama chungah chuan khawngaihna lantir ang che." 
Genesis24:13 En teh, tuikhur kiangah ka ding a, khuaa mite fanuho pawh tui chawi tura an lo kal hi:" 
Genesis24:14 tichuan heti hian ni rawh se, nula tu hnenah pawh, 'Khawngaih takin ka in turin i tui bel kha tihniam teh khai,' ka tiha, tin aniina, 'In rawh, i sanghawngseite pawh hi in tur ka pe ang e,' titu apiang; chu mi ngei chu i chhiahhlawh Isaaka tana i mi ruat chu ni rawh se; tin, chu miah chuan ka pu chungah khawngaihna i lantir tih ka hre dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a sawi zawh hma chuan, ngai teh, Abrahama nau Nahora nupui Milkaii fapa Bethuela fanu Rebeki chu a kokia tui bel puin a lo chhuak a." 
Genesis24:16 Chu nula chu a hmel a tha em em a, nula thianghlim a ni a, mipa reng rengin an la pawl ngai hauh lo. Tin, tuikhurah chuan a chhuk a, a tui bel chu a tikhat a, a chho leh a." 
Genesis24:17 Tin, chhiahhlawh chu a tawk turin a tlan a, ""Khawngaih takin i tui bela tui kha tlem te mi intir teh khai,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:18 Tin, ani chuan, ""In ta che, ka pu,"" a ti a: tin, rang takin a tui bel chu a kutah a chawi thla a, a intir ta a." 
Genesis24:19 Tin, a intir hnuin, ""I sanghawngseite tan pawh an in kham hma loh chun ka chawi zel ang e,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:20 Tin, rang takin a tui bel chu a ran thlengah chuan a ruak a, tui chawi turin tuichhunchhuah lamah chuan a tlan leh a, a sanghawngseite zawng zawng tan chuan a chawi ta zel a." 
Genesis24:21 Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan ani chu a en reng a; LALPA'n a va zinna chu a hlawhtlintir leh tir loh hriatna'n a ngawi reng mai a." 
Genesis24:22 Tin, heti hi a ni a, sanghawngseite chuan an in kham veleh, chhiahhlawh chuan rangkachak hnarvuah duli buk leh a kut atan banbun pahnih rangkachak tangka sawm buk a phawrh a;" 
Genesis24:23 tin, a hnenah, ""Tu fanu nge i nih? Khawngaih takin mi hrilh teh. i pa inah kan riahna tur hmun a awm ang em?"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:24 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Bethuela, Milkaii fapa, Nahora tan a hrinsaka fanu ka ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:25 Tin, amah vekin a hnenah, ""Buhpawl leh ran chaw kan ngah ve ve a, riahna hmun pawh kan nei,"" a ti bawk a." 
Genesis24:26 Tichuan chhiahhlawh chuan a lu a kun a, LALPA chu chibai a buk a." 
Genesis24:27 Tin, ""Ka pu chunga a khawngaihna leh a takna bang chuang lo, LALPA, ka pu Abrahama Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se: kei pawh hi LALPA chuan ka pu unaute in lamah mi hruai a lo nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:28 Tin, nula chu a tlan a, chung thu chu a nu chhungte a va hrilh a." 
Genesis24:29 Rebeki chuan nuta a nei a, a hming chu Labana a ni a: tichuan Labana chu a chhuak a, tuikhur lamah mi hnenah chuan a tlan ta a." 
Genesis24:30 Heti hi a ni a, hnarvuah leh a farnu kuta banbunte chu a hmu a, ""Mi chuan chutin khatin mi ti a,"" tia, a farnu Rebeki thu sawite chu a hriat veleh chuan, mi hnenah chuan a kal ta a; tin, ngai teh, ani chu tuikhura sanghawngseite kiangah chuan a lo ding reng a." 
Genesis24:31 Tin, Labana chuan, ""Nang LALPA malsawm dawngtu lo kal la, ka inah lut rawh; engah nge pawna i din reng? In leh sanghawngseite tan hmun ka buatsaih tawh a sin,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:32 Tin, mi chu inah chuan a lut a, tin, Labana chuan sanghawngsei thuamhnaw chu a phelh a; tin, sanghawngseite tan Buhpawl leh ran chaw a pe a, a ke leh a thiante ke silna'n tui a pe bawk a." 
Genesis24:33 Tin, Abrahama chhiahhlawh hmaah chuan ei tur an hlui a: nimahsela abu chuan, ""Ka rawn kal chhan thu ka sawi hma loh chuan ka ei lo ang,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, sawi ta che,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:34 Tin, ani chuan, ""Abrahama chhiahhlawh ka ni." 
Genesis24:35 Tin, LALPA chuan ka pu chu nasa takin mal a sawm a, mi lian tak a lo ni a: LALPA chuan a hnenah beram rual te, bawng rual te, tangka te, rangkachak te, bawihpa te, bawihnu te, sanghawngsei te a pe bawk a." 
Genesis24:36 Ka pu nupui Sari'n a tar hnuin ka pu tan fapa a hring a: ama hnenah chuan a neih zawng zawng a pe vek a. 
Genesis24:37 Tin, ka pu chuan, ""Ka awmna rama Kanaan-ho nula zinga mi hi ka fapa nupuiah i neihsak tur a ni lo:" 
Genesis24:38 ka pa in lamah, ka laichinte hnena kalin ka fapa tan nupui i neihsak zawk tur a ni,' tiin chhia mi chhamtir a." 
Genesis24:39 Tin, keiin ka pu hnenah chuan 'Hmeichhia chuan mi zui duh kher lo mahna' ka ti a." 
Genesis24:40 Tin, ani chuan ka hnenah, 'LALPA, a hmaa ka awm thinna chuan a vantirhkoh chu i hnenah a tir ang a, i kalna turah chuan a hlawhtlintir ang che; tichuan ka fapa tan ka laichinte leh ka pa chhungte zinga mi nupuiah i neihsak dawn nia:" 
Genesis24:41 ka laichinte hnen ngei i thlen hunah chuan ka hnena i chhechham lakah hian i thiang ang; nula chu an pek loh che chuan ka hnena i chhechham lakah hian i thiang ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:42 Tichuan vawiinah hian tuikhur chu ka lo thleng a, 'Aw LALPA, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, ka kalnaah hian mi hlawhtlintir dawn chuan," 
Genesis24:43 en teh, tuikhur kiangah ka din hi; tin, heti ni rawh se, nula tui chawi tura lo chhuak tu hnenah pawh, khawngaih takin in atan i tui bela tui kha tlemte mi pe teh, ka tiha," 
Genesis24:44 tin, aniin ka hnenah, In rawh, i sanghawngseite tan pawh hian ka chawi ang e, titu apiang, chu mi ngei chu ka pu fapa atana LALPA hmeichhe ruat chu ni rawh se,' ka ti a." 
Genesis24:45 Tin, ka rilrua ka sawi zawh hma chuan ngei teh, Rebeki hi tui bel puin a lo chhuak a, tin, tuikhurah chuan a chhuk a, tui a zuk chawi a: tin, a hnenah, 'Khawngaih takin tui mi intir teh khai,' ka ti a." 
Genesis24:46 Tin, ani hian rang takin a koki ata chu a tui bel a chawi thla a, 'In rawh, i sanghawngseite pawh hi in tur ka pe ang e,' a ti a: chutichuan ka in a, sanghawngseite pawh a intir bawk a," 
Genesis24:47 Tin, keiin, 'Tu fanu nge i nih?' tiin ka zawt a. Tin, ani hian, 'Bethuela, Nahora fapa, Milkaiin a hrinsaka fanu,' a ti a: tin, hnarvuah chu a hnarah ka vuah a, banbunte chu a kutah ka buntir bawk a." 
Genesis24:48 Tin, ka lu ka kun a, LALPA chu chibai ka buk a, LALPA, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, ka pu naua fanu hi a fapa atan nupuia neihsak turin kawng dik taka mi hruaitu chu ka fak bawk a." 
Genesis24:49 Tichuan tunah ka pu in khawngaih a, a chunga tih tak zeta in tih dawn chuan mi hrilh rawh u: in tih dawn loh pawhin mi hrilh rawh u; chutichuan ding lam emaw vei lam emaw ka hawi thei ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:50 Tin, Labana leh Bethuela chuan an chhang a, ""He thil hi LALPA hnen atanga chhuak a nih hi: a chhia a tha pawh i hnenah kan sawi thei lo e." 
Genesis24:51 En teh, Rebeki chu i hmaa hi a awm alawm, hruai la, kal ta che, LALPA'n a sawi tawh angin i pu fapaa nupuiah awm rawh se,"" an ti a." 
Genesis24:52 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Abrahama chhiahhlawh chuan an thu chu a hriat veleh lei siin LALPA chibai a buk ta a." 
Genesis24:53 Tin, Abrahama chhiahhlawh chuan tangkarua incheinate leh rangkachak incheinate leh silhfente a la chhuak a, Rebeki chu a pe a: a nuta leh a nu pawh chu thil hlu takte a pe bawk a." 
Genesis24:54 in, amah leh a thiante chuan an eiin an in a, an riak ta a; tin, zingah an tho a, ""Ka pu hnenah mi kaltir tawh rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:55 Tin, a nuta leh a nu chuan ""Chemtei hi ni rei lo te, ni sawm lek tal kan hnenah awm rih rawh se; chu mi hnuah chuan a kal dawn nia,"" an ti a." 
Genesis24:56 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Mi tikhawtlai suh u khai, LALPA chuan ka kalnaah hian mi hlawhtlintir ta si a; ka pu hnena ka hawn theihna turin mi kaltir zawk teh u khai,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:57 Tin, anni chuan, ""Chemtei chu kan ko ang a, ama ka ngei kan bia ang,"" an ti a." 
Genesis24:58 Tichuan Rebeki chu an ko a, a hnenah, ""He mi hnenah hian i kal duh ang em?"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Duh ang chu,"" a ti a." 
Genesis24:59 Tichuan an farnu Rebeki leh a awmtu leh Abrahama chhiahhlawh leh a hote chu an kaltir a. 
Genesis24:60 Tin, Rebeki chu mal an sawmsak a, a hnenah, ""Kan farnu, nang chu sing hlira sang tam tak nu lo ni la, i thlahte chuan anmahni hawtute kulh kawngkhar chu neihsak rawh se,"" an ti a." 
Genesis24:61 Tichuan Rebeki chu a tho a, a bawihnute nen, sanghawngsei chungahte chuan an chuang a, mi chu an zui ta a: tichuan Abrahama chhiahhlawh chuan Rebeki chu a hruai a, a kal ta a." 
Genesis24:62 Tin, Isaaka chu Beer-lahai-roi lam atang chuan a lo kal a, chhim rama awm a ni si a." 
Genesis24:63 Tin, Isaaka chu tlai lamah phulah inngaihtuah turin a va leng chhuak a: tin, a han dak a, a en a, tin, ngai teh, sanghawngseite an lo kal a." 
Genesis24:64 Tin, Rebeki chu a han dak a, Isaaka a hmuh veleh chuan sanghawngsei ata a chhuk ta a." 
Genesis24:65 Tin, Abrahama chhiahhlawh hnenah chuan, ""Phula min hmuak tura lo kal saw tu nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, chhiahhawh chuan, ""Ka pu a nih saw,"" a ti a: tichuan a inkhuhna puan a la a, a inkhuh ta a." 
Genesis24:66 Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan a thiltih zawng zawng chu Isaaka a hrilh a.Tin, Isaaka chuan Rebeki chu a nu Sari puan inah chuan a hruai lut a, tin, Rebeki chu a nei a, a nupui a lo ni ta a; tin, amah chu a hmangaih hle a: tichuan Isaaka chu a nu thih thuah pawh chuan a lo thlamuang thei ta a." 
Genesis24:67 Tin, Isaaka chuan Rebeki chu a nu Sari puan inah chuan a hruai lut a, tin, Rebeki chu a nei a, a nupui a lo ni ta a; tin, amah chu a hmangaih hle a: tichuan Isaaka chu a nu thih thuah pawh chuan a lo thlamuang thei ta a." 
Genesis25:1 Tin, Abrahama chuan nupui dang a nei a, a hming chu Keturi a ni a." 
Genesis25:2 Tin, ani chuan Zimrana tem Jakssana te, Medana te, Midiana te, Isbaka te, Suaha te a hrinsak a." 
Genesis25:3 Tin, Joksana chuan fapa Sheba leh Dedana a nei a. Tin, Dedana fapate chu Assurima te, Letusima te, Leumima te an ni a." 
Genesis25:4 Tin, Midiana fapate chu Epha te, Ephera te, Hanoka te, Abida te, Elda te an ni. Chung zawng zawng chu Keturi fate an ni a." 
Genesis25:5 Tin, Abrahama chuan a neih zawng zawng Isaaka a pe a." 
Genesis25:6 A hmeiho fapate erawh chu Abrahama chuan lawmmante a pe a; tin, amah a la dam lai ngei chuan afapa Isaaka hnen ata chu khaw chhak lamah, khaw chhak ramah c huan a kal botir ta*hlawm a." 
Genesis25:7 Tin, Abrahama dam chhung chu kum 175 a ni a." 
Genesis25:8 Tin, Abrahama chuan a thlarau a thlah a, lua kelsam to vek, putar tak, tar kuna damin a thi a, chipuite hnenah chuan hruaiin a awm ve ta a." 
Genesis25:9 Tin, a fapa Isaaka leh Ismaela chuan Hit mi Zohara fapa Ephona loa Mamre zawna Makpela pukah chuan an phum ta a;" 
Genesis25:10 chu mi lo chu Abrahama'n Hetha thlahte laka a lei a ni: chutah chuan Abrahama chu an phum a, a nupui Sari nen khan." 
Genesis25:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Abrahama thih hnuah chuan Pathianin a fapa Isaaka chu mal a sawm a; tin, Isaaka chu Beer-la-hai-roi kiangah chuan a awm a." 
Genesis25:12 Tin, he'ng hi Abrahama fapa Ismaela, Sari bawihnu, Aigupta mi Hagarin Abrahama a hrinsaka thlahte chu an ni:" 
Genesis25:13 he'ng hi an hming theuh leh an thlahte ang zelin Ismaela fapate hming chu a ni: Ismaela fa upa ber chu Nebaiotha a ni a; a naute chu Kedara leh Adbeela leh Mibsama leh," 
Genesis25:14 Misma leh Duma leh Massa an ni a; 
Genesis25:15 Hadada leh Tema, Jeturaaa, Naphisa leh Kedema an ni bawk a:" 
Genesis25:16 chung chu Ismaela fapate an ni a; chung chu an khua ang zel leh an riahbuk ang zelin an hming ziak a ni a; an chi ang zel chuan lal sawm leh pahnih an ni a. 
Genesis25:17 Tin, Ismaela dam chhung kum chu hei hi a ni, kum 137 hi: tin, a thlarau a thlah a, a thi a, a chipuite hnenah chuan hruaiin a awm ve ta a." 
Genesis25:18 Tin, a fapate chu Havila ram atangin Assuria ram panzawngin Aigupta ram zawn Sur thlengin an awm a: a unau zawng zawng depah chuan a awm a." 
Genesis25:19 Tin, he'ng hi Abrahama fapa Isaaka thlahte chu an n: Abrahama chuan fapa Isaaka a nei a:" 
Genesis25:20 Isaakan Paddanaram rama Suri mi Bethuela fanu, Suri mi, Labana farnu Rebeki chu a nupuia a neih lai chuan kum 40 mi a ni a." 
Genesis25:21 Tin, a nupui chu a chin avangin Isaaka chuan LALPA hnenah a ngensak chiam a: tin, LALPA'n a dilna chu a ngaihthlaksak a, tichuan a nupui Rebeki chu a rai ta a." 
Genesis25:22 Tin, a nau paite chu a kawchhungah chuan an insual a; tin, ani chuan, ""hetiang a nih si chuan eng vangin nge ka dam reng le?"" a ti a. Tichuan LALPA zawt turin a kal ta a." 
Genesis25:23 Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, ""I chhulah chuan chi hnih an awm a, i pum chhung atang ngei chuan hnam hnih an inthen ang a: Hnam pakhat chu hnam pakhat ai chuan a chak zawk ang a: Tin, a upa zawk chuan a naupang zawk rawng chu a bawl ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis25:24 Tin, a nau hrin a hun chuan ngai teh, a chhulah chuan phir an lo awm a." 
Genesis25:25 Tin, a hmasa zawk chu a sena sen tur, puan hmul anga hmul thupin a lo chhuak a; tichuan a hmingah chuan Esauva an sa a." 
Genesis25:26 Chu mi zawhah chuan a nau chu a chhuak leh a, a kutin Esauva ke artui chu a chelh reng a; tichuan ani hmingah chuan Jakoba an sa a: tin, Rebekin anmahni chu a hrin lai chuan Isaaka chu kum 60 mi a ni a." 
Genesis25:27 Tin, naupangte chu an lo thang lian a: tin, Esauva chu sa pel thiam tak, mi ramvachal a ni a; Jakoba erawh chu mi ni chauh, puan in lamtea awm mi a ni." 
Genesis25:28 Tin, Isaaka chuan a sakhi sa a ei thin avangin Esauva chu a ngaina a; Rebeki erawh chuan Jakoba chu a ngaina zawk a." 
Genesis25:29 Tin, Jakoba chuan englo a chhum kawi a; tin, Esauva chu ram lam atangin a lo hawng a, a chau hle a:" 
Genesis25:30 tin, Esauvan Jakoba hnenah chuan,: Khawngaih takin i englo sen chhum kawi ngei kha mi eitir teh khai; ka chau em mai,"" a ti a. Chuvangin a ni, a hming chu Edoma an tih ni." 
Genesis25:31 Tin, Jakoba chuan, ""I fa tir nihna mi leitir zet la le,"" a ti a." 
Genesis25:32 Tin, Esauva chuan, ""Ngai teh, ka thi lek lek a ni si a: fa tir nihna mai hi ka tan eng nge sawt ang?"" a ti a." 
Genesis25:33 Tin, Jakoba chuan, ""Ka hnenah chhia chham zet rawh le,"" a ti a; tin, a hnenah chhia a chham a: tichuan a fa tir nihna chu Jakoba hnenah a hralh ta mai a.Tin, Jakoba chuan Esauva chu chhang leh dailuah chhum kawi a pe a; tichuan a eiin a in a, a tho a, a kal ta a: chutiang chuan Esauva chuan a fa tir nihna chu a ngainep a ni." 
Genesis25:34 Tin, Jakoba chuan Esauva chu chhang leh dailuah chhum kawi a pe a; tichuan a eiin a in a, a tho a, a kal ta a: chutiang chuan Esauva chuan a fa tir nihna chu a ngainep a ni." 
Genesis26:1 Tin, chu mi ramah chuan Abrahama dam laia tam lo tla hmasa zawk tih loh kha, tam a lo tla leh a. Tichuan Isaaka chu Philistin-ho lal Abimeleka hnenah Gerar khuaah aaa zuk kal a." 
Genesis26:2 Tin, LALPA chu a hnenah a rawn inlar a, ""Aigupta ramah chuan zuk kal suh; ram ka hrilh turah che chuan awm rawh:" 
Genesis26:3 he ramah hian awm rih la, tichuan i hnenah ka awm ang a, mal ka sawm dawn che nia; he'ng ram zawng zawng hi nangmah leh i thlahte pein, i pa Abrahama hnena chhia ka chham kha ka tinghet dawn a ni;" 
Genesis26:4 tin, vana arsi zatin i thlahte chu ka la tipung ang a, he'ng ram zawng zawng hi i thlahte ka la pe bawk ang; tin, i thlahah chuan khawvela chi tin an la thawveng ang;" 
Genesis26:5 Abrahama chuan ka thu a awih a, ka thuhrilhte, ka thupekte, ka thuruatte, ka dante pawh a zawm avang khan,"" a ti a." 
Genesis26:6 Tichuan Isaaka chuan Gerar khuaah chuan awm hmun a khuar ta a: 
Genesis26:7 tin, chu mi khuaa mite chuan a nupui chanhin an zawt a; tin, ani chuan, ""Ka farnu a ni,"" a ti a: a hmel that avangin ""He khuaa mite hian Rebeki avangin mi that dah ang e,"" tiin, ""Ka nupui a ni,"" a ti ngam lo a ni." 
Genesis26:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chutah chuan rei tak a awm hnuin, Philistin-ho lal Abimeleka chuan tukverh atangin a han thlir a, tin, ngai teh, Isaaka chuan a nupui Rebeki a chhaih lai a han hmu a." 
Genesis26:9 Tichuan Abimelekan Isaaka chu a ko a, ""Ngai teh, i nupui a nih ngei hi le: engati nge 'Ka farnu a ni' i tih mai le?"" a ti a. Tin, Isaaka chuan a hnenah, ""Amah avangin ka thi dah ang e,' ka tih avang a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis26:10 Tin, Abimeleka chuan, ""Kan chunga i thiltih hi engtizia nge ni le? Mite zinga mi tupawh hian i nupui hi an lo mutpui mai thei a sin, tichuan kan chungah hian thiam lohna i rawn thlentir a ni dawn a,"" a ti a." 
Genesis26:11 Tin, Abimeleka vek chuan, ""Tupawh he mi hi emaw a nupui hi emaw khawih apiang chu tihhlum ngei ngei tur a ni,"" tiin mi zawng zawng chu thu a pe a." 
Genesis26:12 Tin, Isaaka chuan chu mi ramah chuan buh a ching ve a, chu mi ramah chuan buh za a hmu a: LALPA'n mal a sawm bawk a." 
Genesis26:13 Tichuan ani chu a lo ropui ta hle a, nasa taka mi ropui lo ni khawpin a lo lian ta tulh tulh a:" 
Genesis26:14 beram rualte leh bawng rualte a nei a, chhungte tam tak a nei bawk a: tichuan Philistin-ho chuan an itsik ta a." 
Genesis26:15 Tin, a pa Abrahama dam laia a pa chhiahhlawhten tuichhunchhuah an laih zawng zawngte chu Philistin-hoten an hnawh a, leiin an lo tikhat ta vek mai a." 
Genesis26:16 Tin, Abimeleka chuan Isaaka hnenah, ""Kan hnena ata kal bo daih rawh, kan aiin i chak zawk si a,"" a ti a." 
Genesis26:17 Tichuan Isaaka chu chuta ta chu a chhuak a, Gerar ruamah chuan a puan in a zar a, chutah chuan awm hmun a khuar ta a." 
Genesis26:18 Tin, Isaaka chuan a pa Abrahama dam laia an tuichhunchhuah laihte chu a lai leh a; Abrahama thih hnu khan Philistin-ho chuan an lo hnawh khat vek tawh si a: tin, a pain a hming a lo vuah ang zel khan a hming a vuah hlawm a." 
Genesis26:19 Tin, Isaaka chhiahhlawhten ruamah chuan an lai a, chutah chuan tuichhunchhuah hna nei an hmu ta hlauh a." 
Genesis26:20 Tichuan Gerar khuaa ranpute chuan, ""Tui hi kan ta a ni,"" tiin Isaaka ranpute nen chuan an inhnial a: tichuan amah nen an inhnial avangin tuichhunchhuah hmingah chuan ""Esek"" a vuah ta a." 
Genesis26:21 Tin, tuichhunchhuah dang an lai leh a, chu mi pawh chu chuh tumin an inhnial leh a: tichuan a hmingah chuan ""Sina"" a vuah leh a." 
Genesis26:22 Tin, chuta ta chu a insawn a, tuichhunchhuah dang a lai leh a; chu chu chuh tumin an inhnial ta loa: tichuan ""Tunah zawng LALPA'n hmun zau tak mi siamsak ta a, he ramah hian chi tam tak kan thlah tawh ang,"" tiin a hmingah chuan ""Rehoboth"" a vuah ta a." 
Genesis26:23 Tin, chuta tang chuan Beer-seba-ah a han chho a." 
Genesis26:24 Chu mi zan ngei chuan LALPA chu a hnenah a rawn inlar a, ""Kei hi i pa Abrahama Pathian chu ka ni: hlau suh, i hnenah ka awm alawm, mal ka sawm ang chia, ka chhiahhlawh Abrahama avangin i thlahte chu ka la ti pung dawn a sin,"" a ti a." 
Genesis26:25 Tichuan chutah chuan maicham a siam a, LALPA hming chu a lam a, chutah chuan a puan in a zar bawk a: tin, Isaaka chhiahhlawhte chuan chutah chuan tuichhunchhuah an lai leh a." 
Genesis26:26 Tin, Gerar khua atangin Abimeleka chu a thian Ahuzzatha nen, a sipai pawl hotu Phikola nen, a hnenah an kal a." 
Genesis26:27 Tin, Isaaka chuan an hnenah, ""Mi hua a, in hnena ata mi kal botir si a, eng vangin nge ka hnenah in lo kal le?"" a ti a." 
Genesis26:28 Tin, anni chuan, LALPA chu i hnenah a awm tih chiang takin kan hria a, tichuan, 'I pawi kan khawih ngai loh ang leh thil tha chauh lo chu i chungah engmah reng reng kan tih loh va tlang taka kan kal botir ta che ang khan," 
Genesis26:29 keini pawh kan chhiatna tur reng reng i tih lohna turin kan karah, keini leh nangma kar ngeiah hian chhechhamna lo awm tawh se la, i hnenah thu min thluntir rawh,' kan ti: tunah chuan nang zawnh LALPA malsawm dawngtu i nih tawh hi,"" an ti a." 
Genesis26:30 Tin, ani chuan an tan ruai a theh sak a, tichuan an eiin an in ta a." 
Genesis26:31 Tin, zing lamah chuan zing takah an tho a, chhia an chham tawn a: tin, Isaakan anni chu a kaltir a, tichuan a hnen atang chuan tlang takin an chhuak ta a." 
Genesis26:32 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu mi ni vek chuan Isaaka chhiahhlawhte chu an lo kal a, an tuichhunchhuah laih chanchin an rawn hrilh a, a hnenah, ""Tui kan hmu ta,"" an ti a." 
Genesis26:33 Tichuan chu tuichhunchhuah chu Siba a vuah a; chuvangin chu mi khaw hming chu tun thlengin Beer-seba a la ni a. 
Genesis26:34 Tin, Esauva chu kum 40 mi a nihin, Hit mi Beeria fanu Judithi leh, Hit mi Elona fanu Basemathi nupuiah a nei a:chungte chu Isaaka leh Rebeki thinlung tiretheitute an ni a." 
Genesis26:35 chungte chu Isaaka leh Rebeki thinlung tiretheitute an ni a. 
Genesis27:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isaaka chu a lo tar a, khaw hmu thei lo khawpa a mit a lo thim hnu chuan a fapa upa zawk Esauva chu a ko a, a hnenah, ""Ka fapa,"" a ti a: tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Heta hi ka awm,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:2 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ngai teh, ka tar tawh em a, ka thih ni tur ka hre si lo a." 
Genesis27:3 Chutichuan tunah hian khawngaih takin i hriamhrei, i thal bawm leh i thal ngul kha keng la, va ramchhuak la, sakhi mi va kahsak rawh:" 
Genesis27:4 tin, ka thih hmaa mal ka sawmsakna tur chein ka duhzawng takin chawhmeh tui takah mi siamsak la, ka ei turin ka hnenah rawn la rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:5 Tin, Isaakan a fapa Esauva a biak lai chu Rebeki chuan a lo hria a. Tin, Esauva chu sakhi kapa rawn hawn turin ramah chuan a kal ta a." 
Genesis27:6 Tin, Rebeki chuan a fapa Jakoba hnenah, ""Ngai teh, i pa chuan i u Esauva hnenah," 
Genesis27:7 'Sakhi mi rawn lak la, ka eia, ka thih hmain LALPA hmaah mal ka sawmsakna tur chein chawhmeh tui takah mi siam rawh,' tia a sawi ka hria." 
Genesis27:8 Chutichuan ka fapa, tunah hian thu ka pek che ang zelin ka thu zawm ang che." 
Genesis27:9 Ran rual zingah va kal la, chuta ta chu kel no pahnih tha tak mi va lak rawh; tichuan chu mi chu a duhzawng takin i pa tan chawhmeh tui takah ka lo siam ang e:" 
Genesis27:10 tin, a thih hmaa mal a sawmsakna tur chein, a ei turin i pa hnenah i va kalpui tur a ni,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis27:11 Tin, Jakoba chuan a nu Rebeki hnenah, ""Ngai teh, ka u Esauva chu mi hmul tak a ni a, kei zawng mi mam tak ka ni si a." 
Genesis27:12 Ka pa chuan mi lo dap vel mahna, tichuan ama ngaihin bumtu ang ka lo ni ang a, malsawm ahnekin anchhia indawntir mai ka ni ang a sin,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:13 Tin, a nu chuan a hnenah, ""Ka fapa, i anchhe dawn tur chu ka chungah awm rawh se: ka thu zawm la, mi va lak mai rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:14 Tin, a kal a, a va la a, a nu hnenah a rawn kalpui a: tichuan a nu chuan a pa duhzawng takin chawhmeh tui takah a siam a." 
Genesis27:15 Tin, Rebeki chuan a fapa upa zawk Esauva silhfen tha tak, ina a hnena awm chu a la a, a fapa naupang zawk Jakoba chu a thuam a;" 
Genesis27:16 tin, kel no vunte pawh chu a kutah leh a nghawng mam laiah chuan a bel bawk a:" 
Genesis27:17 tin, chawhmeh tui tak leh chhang a siamte chu a fapa Jakoba kutah a pe a." 
Genesis27:18 Tin, ani chu a pa hnenah a kal a, ""Ka pa,"" a ti a: tin, ani chuan, ""Heta hi ka awm; ka fapa, tu zawk nge i nih?"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:19 Tin, Jakoba chuan a pa hnenah, ""I fapa upa zawk Esauva ka ni; mi tirh ang khan, ka ti zo ta a: khawngaih takin tho la, mal mi sawmsakna turin thu la, ka sakhi sa hi ei rawh le,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:20 Tin, Isaaka chuan a fapa hnenahh, ""Ka fapa, eng tizia nge i va rawn hmu hma teh thut ve le?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA i Pathian chuan mi hlawhtlintir avang a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:21 Tin, Isaaka chuan Jakoba hnenah, ""Ka fapa, khawngaih takin lo hnai teh khai, ka lo dap vel teh ang che, ka fapa Esauva i ni meuh na emaw,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:22 Tin, Jakoba chuan a pa Isaaka chu a va hnaih a; tin, ani chuan a lo dap vel a, ""A aw chu Jakoba aw a ni si a, a kutte erawh chu Esauva kut a ni si,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:23 Tichuan a u Esauva kut angin a kut a hmul avangin amah chu a hre loa: chutichuan mal a sawm ta a. 
Genesis27:24 Tin, ""Ka fapa Esauva ngei i ni maw? A ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ni e,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:25 Tin, ani chuan, ""Mi han lak hnaih rawh, tichuan mal ka sawmsakna tur chein ka fapa sakhi sa chu ka lo ei ang e,"" a ti a. Tin, a rawn la hnai a, a ei ta a: uain pawh a laksak a, a in bawk a." 
Genesis27:26 Tin, a pa Isaaka chuan a hnenah, ""Ka fapa, lo hnai la, mi fawp rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:27 Tin, a va hnaih a, a fawp a: tin, ani chuan a silhfen rim chu a hria a, mal a sawmsak a, ""Ngai teh, ka fapa rim hi LALPA malsawm ram rim ang a ni:" 
Genesis27:28 Tichuan Pathianin van daifim leh Lei thatna leh, Buh tam tak leh uain tam tak pe che rawh se:" 
Genesis27:29 Hnam hrang hrangten i rawng bawl se la, Chi hrang hrangten chibai buk che rawh se: i unaute chungah lalah awm langin; i nu faten chibai buk che rawh se: Anchhe lawhtu apiang che chu anchhe lawhin awm se la, Malsawmtu apiang che chu malsawmin awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:30 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isaakan Jakoba mal a sawm zawh veleh Jakoba chu a pa Isaaka hnen ata a chhuak hman chauh a, a u Esauva chu a sa pel a lo hawng a." 
Genesis27:31 Tin, ani pawh chuan chawhmeh tui takah a siam a, a pa hnenah a rawn la ve a; tin, a pa hnenah chuan, ""Ka pa, tho la, mal mi sawmsakna turin i fapaa sakhi sa hi ei rawh le,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:32 Tin, a pa Isaaka chuan a hnenah, ""Tunge i nih?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""I fapa, i fapa upa zawk, Esauva ka ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:33 Tichuan Isaaka chu nasa takin a khur chiam a, ""Sakhi kapa ka hnena a sa rawn laa, i lo thlen hmaa ka ei zawh veka, mal ka sawm taka kha tu nge ni le? A ni, amah chu malsawmin a awm tawh tho tho ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:34 Esauva chuan a pa thusawi chu a hriatin nasa tak leh lungchhe takin a tap ta rawih a, a pa hnenah chuan ""Aw ka pa, kei hi, kei pawh hi mal mi sawm ve lul rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:35 Tin, ani chuan, ""I nau chuan mi rawn bum a, i malsawmna chu a laksak ta che a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:36 Tin, ani chuan, ""A hmingah Jakoba an vuah dik hle lo em ni? Hei vawi hnih mi lan tak hi: ka fa tir nihna chu mi laksak a; tin, ngai teh, tunah hian ka malsawmna mi laksak leh tak hi,"" a ti a. Tin, amah vekin, ""Malsawmna mi la zuahsak lo'm ni? a ti a." 
Genesis27:37 Tin, Isaaka chuan a chhang a, Esauva hnenah, ""Ngai teh, amah chu i lalah ka siam a, a unau zawng zawngte pawh a chhiahhlawh atan ka pe vek a; buh leh uainin ka chawm ta bawk a: ka fapa, nang atan eng nge ka tihsak ang che le?"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:38 Tin, Esauva chuan a pa hnenah, ""Ka pa, malsawmna pakhat chauh em ni i neih? Aw ka pa, kei hi, kei pawh hi mal mi sawm ve lul rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, Esauva chu ring takin a tap ta a." 
Genesis27:39 Tin, a pa Isaaka chuan a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, i awmna tur chu lei thatna hlatah leh, Chung lam ata van daifim hlatah a ni, a awm dawn ni;" 
Genesis27:40 I khandaihin a ni, i nun dawn ni, i nau rawng pawh i bawl dawn a ni; Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, i tal chhuah hunah chuan, A nghawngkawl chu i nghawng ata i thing thla tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:41 Tin, a pain mal a sawmsakna avang chuan Esauva chuan Jakoba a haw ta a: tin, Esauva chuan a rilruin, ""Ka pa sun ni tur chu a hnai tawh a, chu mi hunah chuan ka nau Jakoba chu ka that mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:42 Tin, a fapa upa zawk Esauva thu sawi chu Rebeki an hrilh a; tichuan mi a tir a, a fapa naupang zawk Jakoba chu a ko a, a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, i u Esauva chuan i chungchang thuah, nangmah tihhlum tumin a inhnem a ni." 
Genesis27:43 Chutichuan ka fapa tunah ka thu hi awih rawh, tho la, Haran khuaa ka nuta Labana hnenah tlan bo rawh;" 
Genesis27:44 i u thinrimna hi a reh hma loh chuan a hnenah ni engemaw zat lai va awm rih rawh; 
Genesis27:45 i u thinurna hi i chunga a reh a, a chunga i thiltih hi a theihnghilh hunah chuan mi ka tir ang a, chuta ta chu ka rawn hruai chhuahtir ang che: eng atan nge ni khatah in pahnihin ka chan ang che u?"" a ti a.Tin, Rebeki chuan Isaaka hnenah, ""Hetha fanute avang hian nun hi ka ning em mai: Jakoba hian he mi ram nula, he'ng ang Hetha fanuteho zinga mi hi nupui a neih leh ve lek phei chuan ka tan nun hi eng nge sawt ang?"" a ti a." 
Genesis27:46 Tin, Rebeki chuan Isaaka hnenah, ""Hetha fanute avang hian nun hi ka ning em mai: Jakoba hian he mi ram nula, he'ng ang Hetha fanuteho zinga mi hi nupui a neih leh ve lek phei chuan ka tan nun hi eng nge sawt ang?"" a ti a." 
Genesis28:1 Tichuan Isaaka chuan Jakoba chu a ko a, mal a sawm a, thu a pe bawk a, a hnenah, ""Kanaan ram nulaho zinga mi hi nupuiah i nei tur a ni lo." 
Genesis28:2 Tho la, Paddan-aram rama i nu leh pa Bethuela inah kal la, chuta mi chu i nu nuta Labana fanute zinga mi nupuiah va nei rawh." 
Genesis28:3 Tin, Pathian Engkimtitheia chuan mal sawm chein, hnam hrang hrang tam tak i lo nih theihna'n chi tam tak thlahtir chein, tipung che rawh se;" 
Genesis28:4 i mikhualna ram, Pathianin Abrahama a pek hi, i luahna'n Abrahama malsawmna chu dawntir bawk che rawh se, nang leh i thlahte pawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis28:5 Tichuan Isaaka chuan Jakoba chu a kal botir a: tin, Paddan-aram rama Jakoba leh Esauva nu Rebeki nuta Suri mi Bethuela fapa, Labana hnenah chuan a kal ta a." 
Genesis28:6 Tin, Esauva chuan Isaakan Jakoba chu mal a sawm a, nupui nei turin Paddan- aram ramah a kal botir tih leh, mal a sawm laia, ""Kanaan ram nulaho zinga mi hi nupuiah i nei tur a ni lo,"" tiin thu a pe tih leh" 
Genesis28:7 Jakoba'n a nu leh a pa thu awihin Paddan-aram ramah a kal ta tih a hria a: 
Genesis28:8 tichuan Esauva chuan Kanaan ram nulate chuan a pa Isaaka lung an tiawi lo tih a hre ta a; 
Genesis28:9 tichuan Esauva chu Ismaela hnenah a va kal a, Abrahama fapa Ismaela fanu Mahalathi Nebaiotha farnu chu a nupui atan a nupui neihsate bakah a va neih belhchhah leh a." 
Genesis28:10 Tin, Jakoba chu Beer-seba atangin a chhuak a, Haran khaw lam a pan ta a." 
Genesis28:11 Tin, khawi lai hmun emaw a han thleng hlauh a, ni a tlak tawh avangin chutah chuan a riak ta a; tin, chu mi hmuna lung pakhat chu a la a, a lukhamah a dah a, chu mi hmunah chuan muhil turin a mu ta a." 
Genesis28:12 Tin, mumang a nei a, ngai teh, lei chungah hian leilawn a lo indawh a, a chhip chuan van a thleng a: tin, ngai teh, a chungah chuan Pathian vantirhkohte an chhoin an chhuk a." 
Genesis28:13 Tin, ngai teh, a chhipah chuan LALPA a ding a, ""Kei hi LALPA, i pu Abrahama Pathian leh Isaaka Pathian chu ka ni: i mutna lei kha nang leh i thlahte ka la pe ang che u;" 
Genesis28:14 tin, i thlahte chu leia vaivut zatin an awm ang a, thlang lamah te, chhak lamah te, hmar lamah te, chhim lamah te i darh zau vang a: tin, nangmahah leh i thlahah chuan khawvela hnam tin an la thawveng ang." 
Genesis28:15 Tin, ngai teh, i hnenah ka awm a, i kalna apiangah ka veng zel ang chia, he ramah hian ka hruai kir leh ang che; i hnena ka sawi hi ka tih hma loh chuan ka thlahthlam dawn lo che a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis28:16 Tin, Jakoba hu a muhil a han harh a, ""He hmunah hian LALPA chu a awm ngei mai; ka lo hre si lo a,"" a ti a." 
Genesis28:17 Tichuan a hlau a, ""He hmun hi a va hlauhawm em! Hei hi hmun dang a nih loh hi, Pathian in a lo nih hi le, hei hi van kawngka a lo nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Genesis28:18 Tin, Jakoba chu zing takah a tho a, lung a lukhama a dah chu a la a, lungphun atan a phun a, a chhipah chuan sahriak a leih a." 
Genesis28:19 Tin, chu mi hmun hmingah chuan Bethel a vuah a: a khaw hming erawh chu a tirah chuan Luz a ni." 
Genesis28:20 ,21 Tin, Jakoba chua, ""Ka pa ina thlamuang taka ka hawn lehna turin Pathian ka hnena a awm a, he ka kalna kawngah hian mi ven a, ei tur chhang leh sin tur silhfen mi pek dawn chuan, LALPA chu ka Pathian a ni ang a," 
Genesis28:21 ,20 Tin, Jakoba chua, ""Ka pa ina thlamuang taka ka hawn lehna turin Pathian ka hnena a awm a, he ka kalna kawngah hian mi ven a, ei tur chhang leh sin tur silhfen mi pek dawn chuan, LALPA chu ka Pathian a ni ang a,he lung, lungphun atana ka phun pawh hi, Pathian in a ni ang: tin, i mi pek tur zawng zawngah chuan sawma pakhat chu ka pe ngei ngei ang che,"" tiin thu a tiam ta a." 
Genesis28:22 he lung, lungphun atana ka phun pawh hi, Pathian in a ni ang: tin, i mi pek tur zawng zawngah chuan sawma pakhat chu ka pe ngei ngei ang che,"" tiin thu a tiam ta a." 
Genesis29:1 Chu mi hnuah chuan Jakoba chu a kal ta zel a, khaw chhak fate ram chu a thleng ta a." 
Genesis29:2 Tin, a han en a, ngai teh, phulah hian tuichhunchhuah a lo awm a, a kiangah chuan beram rual thum hi an bawk reng a; chu mi tuichhunchhuah ata chu beram rualte chu tui an intir thin a ni: tuichhunchhuah kawngkaa lung awm chu a lian hle a." 
Genesis29:3 Tin, chutah chuan beram rual zawng zawng an kal khawm thin a: tin, tuichhunchhuah kawngka ata lung chu an lum sawn a, beramte chu tui an intir a, lung chu tuichhunchhuah kawngkaa a awmna pangngaiah chuan an dah leh thin a." 
Genesis29:4 Tin, Jakoba chuan an hnenah, ""Ka unaute u, khawi lama mi nge in nih?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Haran khuaa mi kan ni,"" an ti a." 
Genesis29:5 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Nahora fapa Labana in hria em?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Hria e,"" an ti a." 
Genesis29:6 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""A dam lai em ni? a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Dam lai rih e: en teh, a fanu Rakili pawh beram hruaia a lo kal saw,"" an ti a." 
Genesis29:7 Tichuan ani chuan, ""Ngai teh u, ni a la sang hle a, ran hruai khawm pawh a la hun hek lo. Beramte hi tui intir u la, va thlah rawh u khai,"" a ti a." 
Genesis29:8 Tin, anni chuan, ""Kan tehi lo ang, beram rual zawng zawng an kal khawm a, tuichhunchhuahah kawngka ata lung hi an lum sawn hma loh chuan: chu mi hnuah chuan beramte chu tui kan intir thin a ni,"" an ti a." 
Genesis29:9 Tin, anmahni a la biak lai chuan, Rakili chu a pa beramte hruaiin a lo thleng ta a; ani chuan a veng thin a ni." 
Genesis29:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jakoba chuan a nu nuta Labana fanu Rakili leh, a nu nuta Labana beram rual chu a hmuh chuan Jakoba chuan a va hnaih a, tuichhunchhuah kawngka ata lung chu a lum sawn a, a nu nuta beramte chu tui a intir ta a." 
Genesis29:11 Tin, Jakoba chuan Rakili chu a fawp a, ring takin a tap ta a." 
Genesis29:12 Tin, Jakoba chuan a pa tupa a nih leh Rebeki fapa a ni tih Rakili chu a hrilh a: tichuan Rakili chu a tlan a, a pa a va hrilh ta a." 
Genesis29:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Labana chuan a farnua fapa Jakoba chanchin chu a hriat veleh, a hmuak turin a tlan a, a pawm a, a fawp a, a inah a hruai ta a. tin, Jakoba chuan chung thu zawng zawng chu Labana chu a hrilh a." 
Genesis29:14 Labana chuan a hnenah, ""Ka thisenpui i nih chu le,"" a ti a. Tin, thla khat a hnenah a awm ta a." 
Genesis29:15 Tin, Labana chuan Jakoba hnenah, ""Ka tupa i nih avangin a thlawnin ka rawng i bawl tur em ni? Engnge i hlawh ang? Mi hrilh teh khai,"" a ti a." 
Genesis29:16 Tin, Labana chuan fanu pahnih a nei a: a upa zawk hming chu Leaii a ni a, a naupang zawk hming chu Rakili a ni." 
Genesis29:17 Tin, Leaii mit chu a pawl a, Rakili erawh chu mi tituai tha tak a ni a, a hmel pawh a tha hle a." 
Genesis29:18 Tin, Jakoba chuan Rakili chu a hmangaih a, tichuan, ""I fanu naupang zawk Rakili nei turin kum sarih i rawng ka bawlsak ang che,"" a ti a." 
Genesis29:19 Tin, Labana chuan, ""Ani chu mi dang ka pek ai chuan ka pek che a tha zawk ang chu: ka hnenah awm reng mai rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis29:20 Tichuan Jakoba chuan Rakili nei tur chuan kum sarih chu a rawng a bawl ta a: nimahsela a hmangaih hle avangin ni rei lo te ang chauhin a hria a. 
Genesis29:21 Tin, Jakoba chuan Labana hnenah, ""Ka pawl tehihna turin ka nupui chu mi pe rawh le, ka hun a kim tawh si a,"" a ti a." 
Genesis29:22 Tichuan Labana chuan chu mi khuaa mi zawng zawng chu a khawm vek a, ruai a theh a." 
Genesis29:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, thim hlimah chuan a fanu Leaii chu a hruai a, Jakoba hnenah a hruai lut a; tin, ani chu a lo pawl a." 
Genesis29:24 Tin, Labana chuan a bawihnu Zilpaii chu a fanu Leaii hnenah a bawihnu atan a pe a." 
Genesis29:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, zing a lo nih chuan, ngai teh, Leaii a lo ni ta a: tichuan Jakoba'n, Labana hnenah, ""Ka chunga i thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni le? Rakili nei turin*i rawng ka bawl lo em ni? Eng vangin nge mi bum mai hi le? A ti a." 
Genesis29:26 Tin, Labana chuan, ""Kan ramah hian chutianga fa u hmaa a naupang zawk kaltir chu dan a ni lo a sin." 
Genesis29:27 He mia ni sarih hi thlingtla rih la, tichuan kum sarih dang ka rawng i bawl leh tur aiah chuan mi dang pawh chu kan pe ang che,"" a ti a." 
Genesis29:28 Tichuan Jakoba chuan chutiangin a ti a, a ni sarih chu a tlingtla a: tichuan a fanu Rakili chu a nupuiah a pe ta a." 
Genesis29:29 Tin, Labana chuan a bawihnu Bilhaii chu a fanu Rakili hnenah a bawihnu atan a pe a." 
Genesis29:30 Tin, Rakili chu a pawl bawk a, Leaii ai chuan Rakili chu a hmangaih zawk bawk a, Labana rawng chu kum sarih dang a bawl leh ta a." 
Genesis29:31 Tin, LALPA chuan Leaii chu huatin a awm tih a hria a, tichuan a chhul a hawnsak a: Rakili erawh chu a ching a." 
Genesis29:32 Tin, Leaii chu a rai a, fapa a hring a, a*hmingah chuan Reubena a sa a: ""LALPA chuan ka hreawmzia a hmuh avang a nih hi: tunah zawng ka pasalin mi hmangaih tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis29:33 Tin, a rai leh a, fapa a hring leh a; ""LALPA chuan huatin ka awm tih a hriat avangin hei pawh hi mi pe a nih hi,"" a ti a, tichuan a hmingah chuan Simeona a sa a." 
Genesis29:34 Tin, a rai leh a, fapa a hring leh a; ""Tunah zet chuan fapa pathum ka hrinsak tak avangin ka pasalin mi zawm tawh ang,"" a ti a: chuvangin a hmingah chuan Levia an sa a.Tin, a rai leh a, fapa a hring leh a: ""Tun tumah hi chuan LALPA ka fak ang,"" a ti a: chuvangin a hmingah chuan Juda a sa a; tin, fa a hring leh ta rih lo a." 
Genesis29:35 Tin, a rai leh a, fapa a hring leh a: ""Tun tumah hi chuan LALPA ka fak ang,"" a ti a: chuvangin a hmingah chuan Juda a sa a; tin, fa a hring leh ta rih lo a." 
Genesis30:1 Tin, Rakili chuan Jakoba chu fa reng reng a hrinsak lo tih a inhriat chuan a laizawnnu chu a itsik ta a; tin, Jakoba hnenah chuan, ""Fate mi pe rawh, chutilochuan ka thi ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis30:2 Tin, Rakili chungah chuan Jakoba thin chu a lo ur ta thut a: tichuan, ""I rila rah phal lotu Pathian aiawhtu em ka nih ni?"" a ti a." 
Genesis30:3 Tin, anni chuan, ""En teh, ka bawihnu Bilhaii saw, amah saw pawl rawh; chutichuan kei pawhin ama lakah fate ka neih ve tehihna'n ka mal chungah hian fa a hring dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Genesis30:4 Tichuan a bawihnu Bilhaii chu a nupui atan a pe a: tin, Jakoba chuan ani chu a lo pawl a." 
Genesis30:5 Tin, Bilhaii chu a rai a, Jakoba chu fapa a hrinsak ta a." 
Genesis30:6 Tin, Rakili chuan, ""Pathianin mi ngaihtuah a, ka aw a hre bawk a, fapa mi pe a nih hi,"" a ti a: chuvangin a hmingah chuan Dana a sa a." 
Genesis30:7 Tin, Rakili bawihnu Bilhaii chu a rai leh a, Jakoba chu fapa dang a hrinsak leh a." 
Genesis30:8 Tin, Rakili chuan, ""Pathian buanin ka laizawnnu ka buan a, ka hneh ta,"" a ti a: tichuan a hmingah chuan Naphtalia a sa a." 
Genesis30:9 Tin, Leaii chuan fa dang a hring leh ta lo fo tih a inhriatin, a bawihnu Zilpaii chu a hruai a, a nupui atan Jakoba a pe a." 
Genesis30:10 Tichuan Leaii bawihnu Zilpaii chuan Jakoba chu fapa a hrinsak a. 
Genesis30:11 Tin, Leaii chuan, ""Ava vanneihthlak em!"" a ti a: tichuan a hmingah chuan Gada a sa a." 
Genesis30:12 Tin, Leaii bawihnu Zilpaii chuan Jakoba chu fapa dang a hrinsak leh a." 
Genesis30:13 Tin, Leaii chuan, ""Ka va nihlawh em! Hmeichheho chuan nihlawh mi ti ngawt dawn a nih hi,"" a ti a: tichuan a hmingah chuan Asera a sa a." 
Genesis30:14 Tin, buh lak laiin Reubena chuan phulah chuan zawlaidi a va hmu a, a nu Leaii hnenah a rawn la a. Chutichuan Rakilin Leaii hnenah, ""Khawngaih takin i fapa zawlaidi thenkhat mi pe teh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis30:15 Tin, ani chuan, a hnenah, ""Ka pasal mi chhuhsak hi thil duai em ni? Ka fapaa zawlaidi pawh hi mi chhuhsak i tum leh zel maw?"" a ti a. Tin, Rakili chuan, ""A nih loh leh, i fapaa zawlaidi aiah hian zaninah a mutpui ang che,"" a ti a." 
Genesis30:16 Tin, tlai lamah chuan Jakoba chu phul atang chuan a lo hawng a, tin, Leaii chu a hmuak turin a chhuak a, ""Mi pawl tur a ni; ka fapaa zawlaidiin ka hawh tawh tlat si chia,"" a ti a. Tichuan chu mi zan chuan a mutpui ta a." 
Genesis30:17 Tin, Pathianin Leaii tawngtaina a ngaithla a, tichuan a rai a, Jakoba chu fapa pangana a hrinsak leh ta a." 
Genesis30:18 Tin, Leaii chuan, ""Ka bawihnu chu ka pasal hnena ka pek avangin Pathianin ka hlawh mi pe ta a nih hi,"" a ti a: tichuan a hmingah chuan Isakara a sa a." 
Genesis30:19 Tin, Leaii chu a rai leh a, Jakoba chu fapa parukna a hrinsak leh a." 
Genesis30:20 Tin, Leaii chuan, ""Pathianin thuam tha tak mi neihtir a; tunah zawng ka pasal chu, fapa paruk ka hrinsak tak avangin ka hnenah a cheng tawh ang,"" a ti a: tichuan a hmingah chuan Zebuluna a sa a." 
Genesis30:21 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan fanu a hring leh a, a hmingah chuan Dinaii a sa a." 
Genesis30:22 Tin, Pathianin Rakili chu a hre reng a, tichuan Pathianin a tawngtaina a ngaithla a, a chhul a hawnsak ta a." 
Genesis30:23 Tichuan a rai a, fapa a hring ta a: tin, ""Pathianin ka hming chhia a chhilh ta,"" a ti a:" 
Genesis30:24 tin, ""Lalpa chuan fapa dang mi pek belhchhah leh rawh se,"" tiin a hmingah chuan Josefa a sa a." 
Genesis30:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Rakili chuan Josefa chu a hrin hnuin, Jakoba'n Labana hnenah, ""Keima awmna pangngaiah, kan ram lama ka hawna turin mi kaltir tawh rawh khai." 
Genesis30:26 I rawng ka bawl chhan ka nupuite leh ka fate hi mi pe la, mi kaltir rawh; i rawng ka bawlsakzia che chu i hre si a,"" a ti a." 
Genesis30:27 Tin, Labana chuan a hnenah, ""Mi khawngaih theih chuan la awm ta rih che: LALPA chuan nangma zaran mal mi sawm tih aienin ka hria a sin,"" a ti a." 
Genesis30:28 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, Engtin nge i rawng ka bawl a, engtin nge i ran chu ka hnenah an awm i hria alawm." 
Genesis30:29 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Engtin nge i rawng ka bawl a, engtin nge i ran chu ka hnenah an awm i hria alawm." 
Genesis30:30 Ka lo kal hma zawngin tlemte chauh i nei a, tunah zawng tam taka an lo chan tak hi; ka penna lam apiangah LALPA chuan mal a sawm zel che a ni: amaherawhchu engtikah nge keima chhungkua atan ka thawh chhuah ve ang?"" a ti a." 
Genesis30:31 Tin, ani chuan, ""Engnge ka pek ang che?"" a ti a. Tin, Jakoba'n, ""Engmah mi pek tur a ni lo: he thil hi mi tihsak chuan i ran rual chu ka thlahin ka veng leh ang e." 
Genesis30:32 Vawiinah hian i ran rual chu ka va en chhuak vek ang a, beram zinga a hangin a kah chik nuk leh a hangin a kah phoh phoh leh a varin a kah chik nuk leh a varin a kah phoh phohte chu chuta ta chu ka hruai hrang zel ang: tin, tun achina chutiang a lo piang apiangte chu ka hlawh tur ni ang hmiang." 
Genesis30:33 Chutichuan tun achinah, i mithmuha awm ka hlawh kawng thuah i lo kal hun chuan, ka felna hian mi chhansak mai ang: kel zinga a varin a kah phoh phoh loh leh, beram zinga a hang lo ka hnena i hmuh apiang chu ka rukah i ruat mai tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis30:34 Tin, Labana chuan, ""Ngai teh, i sawi ang tak chu ni ang hmiang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis30:35 Tichuan chu mi ni tak chuan kelpa, a vara ze tan leh a varin a kah phoh phoh zawng zawng leh, kelnu, a varin a kah chik nuk leh a varin a kah phoh phoh zawng zawng, a var tel apiang chu, beram zinga a hang zawng zawngte nen chuan a hruai hrang a, a fapate kutah a pe a;" 
Genesis30:36 tin, amah leh Jakoba karah chuan ni thum kalah a awmtir a; tin, Jakoba chuan Labana ran rual dang zawng zawng chu a thlah leh ta a." 
Genesis30:37 Tin, Jakoba'n hriang leh vai umkhal leh thingse tiang a la a, a pil a khawk var thliah a, tiangahte chuan a var chi a tilang a." 
Genesis30:38 Tin, a tiang pil khawhte chu ran rualten an rawn in thinna tui inna thlengahte, tui luannaahte chuan, ran rualte hma zawn zelah a dah ta a; tin, tui in tura an lo kal lai chuan an lo rai tan thin a." 
Genesis30:39 Tichuan ran rualte chu tiang zawnahte chuan an rai tan a, a ze tan te, a ze chik nuk te, a ze phoh phoh te an rawn hring thin a." 
Genesis30:40 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ran chak deuhte chu a rai tan apiangin tiang zinga an rai tan tehihna turin, Jakoba chuan tui luannaah, ran mithmuhah chuan tiangte chu a dah thin a;" 
Genesis30:41 amaherawhchu ran chu an tan a that loh chuan a dah thin lo: chutichuan a no tantha lo deuhte chu Labana ta a ni zel a, a chak deuhte chu Jakoba ta a ni zel a.Tichuan Jakoba chu nasa takin a lo pung a, ran rual, rual lian tak tak te, bawihnu te, bawihpa te, sanghawngsei te, sabengtung te a lo nei ta a." 
Genesis30:42 Tichuan Jakoba chu nasa takin a lo pung a, ran rual, rual lian tak tak te, bawihnu te, bawihpa te, sanghawngsei te, sabengtung te a lo nei ta a." 
Genesis31:1 Tin, ani chuan Labana fapaten, ""Jakoba'n kan pa ta zawng zawng chu a laksak vek a, kan pa taa mi a ni, he'ng ropuina zawng zawng hi a hmuh a ni,"" an tih thute a lo hre ta a." 
Genesis31:2 Tichuan Jakoba'n Labana hmel a en a, tin, ngai teh, tun hma lam angin a chungah a tha ta lo tih a hria a." 
Genesis31:3 Tin, LALPA chuan Jakoba hnenah, ""I thlahtute ramah leh i laichinte hnenah haw leh tawh rawh; i hnenah ka awm zel dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Genesis31:4 Tichuan Jakoba chuan mi a tir a, Phula a ran rual awmna lamah chuan Rakili leh Leaii chu a ko a," 
Genesis31:5 tin, an hnenah, ""In pa hmel ka hmuhin, tun hma lam angin ka chungah a tha ta lo tih ka hria a; nimahsela ka pa Pathian chu ka hnenah a awm reng a ni." 
Genesis31:6 Nangni pawhin in pa rawng hi ka tehihtawpin ka bawl tih in hria a. 
Genesis31:7 Nimahsela in pa chuan mi bum a, ka hlawh hi vawi sawm lai mi tihdanglamsak tawh a; nimahsela Pathianin ka pawi a khawih a phal lo a ni." 
Genesis31:8 A ze chik nukte chu i hlawh a ni ang,' a tih leh, ran zawng zawng chuan a ze chik nukte an hring thin a; tin, ' A ze tante chu i hlawh a ni ang,' a tih leh, ran zawng zawng chuan a ze tante an hring thin." 
Genesis31:9 Chutiangin Pathianin in pa rante chu a laksak a, keimah mi pe ta a nih hi." 
Genesis31:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, rante chu an rai tan lai chuan, ka mumangah chuan ka han dak a, tin, ngai teh, a pa, ran bawhtute chu, a ze tan te, a ze chik nuk te, a ze zeng zung te an ni tih ka hmu a ni." 
Genesis31:11 Tin, ka mumangah chuan Pathian vantirhkohin, 'Jakob' mi lo ti a: tin, keiin ""Heta hi ka awm,"" ka ti a." 
Genesis31:12 Tin, ani chuan, 'Han dak la, en rawh, a pa, ran bawhtu zawng zawng saw, a ze tan te, a ze chik nuk te, a ze zeng zung te an nih saw: Labanan i chunga a thiltih zawng zawng hi ka hmu a sin." 
Genesis31:13 Kei hi, lungphuna sahriak i hnawihna, ka hnena thu i tiamna Bethel, kha Bethel Pathian kha ka ni: tunah tho la, he ram ata hi chhuak la, i pianna ramah chuan haw leh tawh rawh, a ti a"" a ti a." 
Genesis31:14 Tin, Rakili leh Leaii chuan an chhang a, a hnenah, ""Kan pa inah chuan kan tan chanvo leh ro khawm tur reng a la awm cheu em ni?" 
Genesis31:15 Ani chuan mikhual ang lekin min ngai tawh a ni lo'm ni? Min hralh a, kan man pawh a ei zo vek tawh si a." 
Genesis31:16 Pathianin kan pa laka sum a laksak zawng zawngte chu keimahni leh kan fate ta a nih hi: chutichuan Pathianin i hnena a sawi apiang chu ti rawh khai,"" an ti a." 
Genesis31:17 Tichuan Jakoba chu a tho a, a fapate leh a nupuite chu sanghawngsei chungahte a chuantir a;" 
Genesis31:18 tin, Kanaan rama a pa Isaaka hnena kal turin a ran zawng zawng leh a sum khawl khawm zawng zawng, a ran hmuhte, Paddan-aram rama a khawl khawmte chu a kalpui ta vek a." 
Genesis31:19 Tin, Labana chu a beram hmul met turin a kal daih a: tin, Rakili chuan a pa milemte a ruksak a." 
Genesis31:20 Tin, Jakoba chu Suri mi Labana hriat loh hlanin a kal ru ta daih a, a tlan bo tur chu a hrilh lo a." 
Genesis31:21 Chutichuan a neih zawng zawng nen chuan a tlanbo ta a: tin, a tho a, Luipui chu a kan a, Gilead tlang lam chu hmachhawnin a pan zel a." 
Genesis31:22 Tin, a ni thum niah chuan Jakoba a tlan bo tih Labana chu an hrilh a." 
Genesis31:23 Tichuan a unaute a hruai a, ni sarih kal a um a; Gilead tlangah chuan a umpha ta a." 
Genesis31:24 Tin, Suri mi Labana hnenah chuan zan a mumangah Pathian a lo kal a, a hnenah, ""Jakoba hnenah a chhia a tha engamah sawi lo turin fimkhur rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis31:25 Tin, Labana chuan Jakoba chu a umpha ta a. Tin, Jakoba c huan a puan in chu tlangah a lo zar tawh a: tin, Labana pawhin a unaute nen chuan Gilead tlangah an zar ve ta a." 
Genesis31:26 Tin, Labana chuan Jakoba hnenah, ""I thiltih hi engti zia nge ni le, ka hriat loh hlana i kal ruk daih a, chemsen bawihte ang maia ka fanute i hruai bo hi?" 
Genesis31:27 Eng vangin nge aruka i tlan bo a, mi kal ruksan a, hlimna te nen, hla te nen, khuangte te nen, tingtang te nen ka thlahna tur chein mi hrilh loh a," 
Genesis31:28 ka tute leh ka fanute ka fawh i phal loh ni? Atthlak takin a ni, thil i tih ni." 
Genesis31:29 Tichhe tehi che ka ni a sin: nimahsela i pa Pathian chuan nizanah khan, 'Jakoba hnenah a chhia a tha a engamah sawi lo turin fimkhur rawh,' tiin mi bia a ni." 
Genesis31:30 Tin, i pa in i ngaih em em avangin kal chak hle mah la, eng vangin nge ka Pathiante mi ruksak ni?"" a ti a." 
Genesis31:31 Tin, Jakoba chuan a chhang a, Labana hnenah, ""Ka hlauh avang a ni: i fanute hi mi lak luihsak dah ang e, ka ti a ni." 
Genesis31:32 Tupawh i pathiante i hmuhna apiang chu an nung lo ang: kan unaute mithmuhah hian i ta ka hnena awm chu en chiang la, la ta che,"" a ti a. Rakilin a lo ru tih Jakoba'n a hre si lo a." 
Genesis31:33 Tin, Labana chu Jakoba puan inah te, Leaii puan inah te, bawihnu pahnih puan inah te a lut zel a; nimahsela a hmu lo a. Tin, Leaii puan in ata chu a chhuak a, Rakili puan inah chuan a lut leh a." 
Genesis31:34 Tin, Rakili chuan milemte chu a lo la a, sanghawngsei thuamhnaw zingah a lo dah a, a lo thut hnan diam a. Tin, Labana chuan a puan in chhung zawng zawng chu a dap vel vek a, nimahsela a hmu lo a." 
Genesis31:35 Tin, ani chuan a pa hnenah, ""I hmaa ka thawh peih loh avang hian, ka lalpa, thinur suh ang che; hmeichhe awm dan pangngai chu ka chunga a awm lai tak a ni si a,"" a ti a. Tichuan a zawng a zawng a, nimahsela milemte chu a hmu zo ta lo a." 
Genesis31:36 Tin, Jakoba chu a thinur ta a, Labana chu a hau va: Jakoba chuan Labana hnenah, ""Engnge ka bawhchhiata, eng nge ka sualna, mi rawn um vak mai ni?" 
Genesis31:37 Ka bungrua zawng zawng i dap vel pawhin, i in chhung bungrua reng reng eng nge i hmuh ni? Keini pahnih hi min ngaihtuah tehihna turin ka unaute leh i unaute hmaah hian dah rawh." 
Genesis31:38 Hei kum sawmhnih zet i hnenah ka awm ta a; i beramtepuite leh i kelpuite chuan an note an hring sual ngai lo a, i beram rual zinga a pate pawh ka ei ngai si lo a." 
Genesis31:39 Ram sa sehte pawh i hnenah ka rawn thlen ngai loa; keiin a bo ai chu ka tuar zawk thin a: chhuna ni sa leh zana ruk emaw ka rulh i phut thin. 
Genesis31:40 Hetiangin ka awm thin; chhuna ni sa leh zana khaw vawtin mi tihreawm em em thin a; mut pawh ka hmu ngai thin lo a. 
Genesis31:41 Chung kum sawmhnih chhung zawng chu i inah ka awm a: i fanute pahnih hlawh turin kum sawm leh kum li i rawng ka bawl a, i rante hlawh turin kum ruk ka bawl leh a: ka hlawh lah chu vawi sawm lai i tidanglam si a." 
Genesis31:42 Ka pa Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Tiha chu ka hnenah awm lo phei se la chu, tunah pawh hian ruak ngawta mi hawntir ngei ngei tur i nih hi. Pathianin ka hreawmzia leh ka thawh rimzia chu a hmu a, nizanah chuan a zilh che a nih chu,"" a ti a." 
Genesis31:43 Tin, Labana chuan a chhang a, Jakoba hnenah,: Fanute hi keima fanu an ni a, naupangte hi keima naupang an ni a, rante hi keima ran an ni a, i hmuh zawng zawng hi keima ta vek an ni: vawiinah hian he'ng ka fanute chungah leh an fa hrinte chungah hian eng nge ka tih tehih ang?" 
Genesis31:44 Hawh teh, kei leh nang hian thu i thlung teh ang; chu chu kei leh nanga karah hriatna ni rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Genesis31:45 Tichuan Jakoba chuan lung a la a, lungphun atan a phun a.Tichuan Jakoba chuan lung a la a, lungphun atan a phun a." 
Genesis31:46 Tin, Jakoba'n a unaute hnenah, lung la khawm rawh u,"" a ti a; lung an la a, an tiang khawm a: tin, lung tian khawm kiangah chuan chaw an ei a." 
Genesis31:47 Tin, Labana chuan chu lung tian khawm chu Jegar-sahadutha a vuah a; Jakoba erawh chuan Galeed a vuah a." 
Genesis31:48 Tin, Labana chuan, ""He lung tian khawm hi vawiinah hian kei leh nanga karah hriatna a nih hi,"" a ti a. Chuvangin a hmingah chuan Galeed vuah a ni ta a." 
Genesis31:49 Mizpa vuah a ni bawk a, Labanan, ""Inthena kan awm hunin LALPA chuan min veng tawn rawh se." 
Genesis31:50 Ka fanute hi i tihretehih a, ka fanute lo hi nupui dangte i neih chuan, tumah kan hnenah an awm lo na a, en teh, Pathian chu kei leh nanga karah hretu a ni,"" a ti si a." 
Genesis31:51 Tin, Labana vekin Jakoba hnenah, ""He lung tin khawm hi en la, keimah leh nangma inkara he lung ka phun pawh hi en teh." 
Genesis31:52 Pawi inkhawihsak turin keiin he lung tian khawm hi pelin i hnen lamah ka lo kal lo ang tih leh, nang pawhin he lung tian khawm leh he pungphun hi pelin ka hnen lamah i lo kal lo ang tih, he lung tian khawm hi hriatna ni se la, he lungphun pawh hi hriatna ni bawk rawh se." 
Genesis31:53 Abrahama Pathian, Nahora Pathian, an pa Pathian chuan kan kara thu ngaihtuah rawh se,"" a ti leh a. Tin, Jakoba chuan a pa Isaaka Tiha chu chhalin chhia a chham ta a." 
Genesis31:54 Tin, Jakoba'n tlangah chuan inthawina a hlan a, a unaute chu chhang ei turin a ko va: tichuan chhang an ei a, tlangah chuan an riak ta hlawm a.Tin, zing takah Labana chu a tho a, a tute leh a fanute chu a fawp a, mal a sawm a: tin, Labana chu a kal a, ama awmna lamah a haw leh ta a." 
Genesis31:55 Tin, zing takah Labana chu a tho a, a tute leh a fanute chu a fawp a, mal a sawm a: tin, Labana chu a kal a, ama awmna lamah a haw leh ta a." 
Genesis32:1 Tin, Jakoba chu a kal ta zel a, tin, Pathian vantirhkohten an lo tawk a." 
Genesis32:2 Tin, Jakoba'n anni chu a hmuh chuan, ""Heng hi Pathian pawlho an ni,"" a ti a: tichuan chu mi hmun hmingah chuan Mahanaim a vuah a." 
Genesis32:3 Tin, Jakoba chuan, Seir rama, Edom phul lamah, a u Esuava hnenah chuan a hmaah zualkote a kaltir a." 
Genesis32:4 An hnenah, ""Ka lalpa Esauva hnenah chuan heti hian in sawi tur a ni, 'I chhiahhlawh Jakoba'n heti hian a ti a ni: Labana hnenah chuan ka mikhual a, tun thlengin ka awm ta reng a;" 
Genesis32:5 bawngpa te, sabengtung leh beram te, bawihpa leh bawihnu te ka nei hlawm a; tichuan i mit ka tlun tehihna'n ka lalpa hrilh turin mi ka rawn tir a ni,' a ti,"" tiin anni chu thu a pe a." 
Genesis32:6 Tin, zualkote chu Jakoba hnenah an lo kir leh a, ""I u Esauva hnen kan va thleng a, tin, mi zali rawn hruaiin hmuak tur chein a lo kal nghe nghe a sin,"" tiin an sawi a." 
Genesis32:7 Chutichuan Jakoba chuan a hlau em em a, a mangang ta a: tichuan a hnena mi awm te, beram rual te, bawng rual te, sanghawngsei te chu pawl hnihah a sem a;" 
Genesis32:8 Esauva chu pawl pakhat hnena a lo kala a thah chuan, pawl pakhat la awm chu an tlan bo tehi ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis32:9 Tin, Jakoba vek chuan, ""Aw, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, ka pa Isaaka Pathian, aw LALPA, 'I ram lamah leh i laichinte hnenah haw leh tawh rawh, tichuan ka titha ang che,' mi titu," 
Genesis32:10 i chhiahhlawh chunga khawngaihna zawng zawng i lantir leh thutak zawng zawng i lantir zingahte hian, a tenau ber pawh hmu tlak ka ni lo e; he Jordan lui hi ka tiang nen chauh ka kan a; tunah zawng pawl hnih zet ka lo nih tak hi." 
Genesis32:11 Khawngih takin ka u kut ata, Esauva kut ata ngei chu, mi chhanhim ang che: nunau chawpa mi rawn thah ka hlau si a." 
Genesis32:12 Nangin, 'Ka ti tha ngei ngei ang chia, i thlahte chu tuifinriata tiau vaivut chhiar sen loh khawp hiala a tam angin ka siam ang e,' i ti a,"" a ti a." 
Genesis32:13 Tin, chu mi zan chuan chutah chuan a riak ta a; tin, a neih zinga mi, kelpui zahnih leh kelpa sawmhnih, berampui zahnih leh berampa sawmhnih, sanghawngsei sawr lai sawmthum an note nen, bawngpui sawmli leh bawngpa sawm, sabengtungpui sawmhnih leh sabengtung no sawm, a u Esauva tan lawmmanah a la hrang a." 
Genesis32:14 Tin, chu mi zan chuan chutah chuan a riak ta a; tin, a neih zinga mi, kelpui zahnih leh kelpa sawmhnih, berampui zahnih leh berampa sawmhnih, sanghawngsei sawr lai sawmthum an note nen, bawngpui sawmli leh bawngpa sawm, sabengtungpui sawmhnih leh sabengtung no sawm, a u Esauva tan lawmmanah a la hrang a." 
Genesis32:15 Tin, chu mi zan chuan chutah chuan a riak ta a; tin, a neih zinga mi, kelpui zahnih leh kelpa sawmhnih, berampui zahnih leh berampa sawmhnih, sanghawngsei sawr lai sawmthum an note nen, bawngpui sawmli leh bawngpa sawm, sabengtungpui sawmhnih leh sabengtung no sawm, a u Esauva tan lawmmanah a la hrang a." 
Genesis32:16 Tin, chungte chu pawl tin ahrang theuhin, a chhiahhlawhte kutah a kawltir a; tin, a chhiahhlawhte hnenah chuan, ""Ka hmaah kal kai u la, pawl tin hi kar neihtir zel rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Genesis32:17 Tin, a hma hruaitu hnenah chuan, ""Ka u Esauva chuan a tawh chia, 'Tu mi nge i nih? Khawiah nge i kal dawn? i hmaa awmte hi tu ta nge? Tia a zawh hun che chuan," 
Genesis32:18 I chhiahhlawh Jakoba ta an ni; ka pu Esau, i tan lawmmanah a thawn che a nih hi; ngai teh, amah pawh kan hnungah sawn a awm,' ti ang che,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Genesis32:19 Tin, a dawttu leh, a dawt lehtu leh, ran rual khalhtu dang zawng zawng hnenah pawh, ""Esauva in hmuh hun chuan chutiang bawkin in sawi tur a ni;" 
Genesis32:20 tin, 'Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawh Jakoba chu kan hnungah sawn a awm, ti bawk ang che u,"" tiin thu a pe theuh a. ""Lawmman ka hmaa kal hianin a thin ka tidam ang a, chu mi hnuah chuan a hmel ka hmu ang; tichuan mi lo lawm mahna,"" a ti a ni." 
Genesis32:21 Chutichuan lawmman chu a hmaah chuan a kal kai ta a; ani erawh chu, chu mi zan chuan a pawl zingah chuan a riak ta a." 
Genesis32:22 Tin, zanah chuan a tho a, a nupuite pahnih leh, a bawihnute pahnih leh, a fa sawm leh pakhatte chu a hruai a, Jabbok lui kaiah chua a kai ta a." 
Genesis32:23 Tichuan anni chu a hruai a, lui chu a kaitir a, a neih zawng zawng pawh a kaitir bawk a." 
Genesis32:24 Tin, Jakoba chu amah chauhin a awm ta a; tin, mi pakhatin ani chu khawfing chah thlengin a buan a buan a." 
Genesis32:25 Tin, a hneh lo tih a inhriatin a malpui ruh chuktuahah chuan a khawihsak a, tichuan a buan lai chuan Jakoba malpui ruh chuktuah chu a lo pelhsawlh ta a." 
Genesis32:26 Tin, ani chuan, ""Mi thlah rawh, khawfing pawh a chah dawn tawh hi,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Mal mi sawm loh chuan ka thlah lo ang che,"" a ti a." 
Genesis32:27 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""I hming eng nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Jakoba,"" a ti a." 
Genesis32:28 Tin, ani chuan, ""I hming chu Jakoba an ti tawh lo ang a, Israela an ti zawk tawh ang; Pathian leh mihring i bei a, i hneh tawh si a,"" a ti a." 
Genesis32:29 Tin, Jakoba chuan ani chu a zawt a, ""Khawngaih takin i hming mi hrilh rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Eng vangin nge ni ka hming mi zawh ni?"", a ti a. Tin, chutah chuan mal a sawmsak ta a." 
Genesis32:30 Tin, Jakoba chuan chu mi hmun hmingah chuan Peniel a vuah ta a: ""Pathian chu a hmai hma ngeiah ka hmu a, ka nunna hi zuah a ni si,"" a ti a ni." 
Genesis32:31 Tin, Penuel a pelh lai chuan ni a lo chhuak a, amah chu a rawn chhun a, a malpui avang chuan a lo bai ta a.Chuvangin tun thlengin Israela thlahte chuan malpui ruh chuktuaha khel tha awm hi an ei ngai lo: Jakoba malpui ruh chuktuah chu a khel tha lai taka a khawih avangin." 
Genesis32:32 Chuvangin tun thlengin Israela thlahte chuan malpui ruh chuktuaha khel tha awm hi an ei ngai lo: Jakoba malpui ruh chuktuah chu a khel tha lai taka a khawih avangin. 
Genesis33:1 Tin, Jakoba chu a han dak a, tin, ngai teh, Esauva chu a hnena mi zalite nen an lo kal a. Tichuan a fate chu Leaii hnenah te, Rakili hnenah te, Bawihnu pahnih hnenah te a sem thliah a." 
Genesis33:2 Tin, bawihnute leh an fate chu a hmatawng berah a dah a, Leaii leh a fate chu a dawtah a dah a, Rakili leh Josefa chu a hnung berah a dah a." 
Genesis33:3 Tin, amah chu an hmaah chuan a kal a, a u bul a thlen hma chuan vawi sarih lei siin chibai a buk a." 
Genesis33:4 Tin, Esauva chu amah lawm turin a tlan a, a pawm a, a ir a chuktuah a, a fawp a: tin, an tap dun ta a." 
Genesis33:5 Tin, Esauva chu a han dak a, hmeichhiate leh naupangte chu a hmu a; tichuan ""I hruaite saw tute nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Pathianin khawngaih taka i chhiahhlawh a pek a naupangte an nih saw,"" a ti a." 
Genesis33:6 Chutichuan bawihnute chu, anmahni leh an fate nen chuan an lo kal hnai a, an kun a, chibai an buk a." 
Genesis33:7 Tin, Leaii pawh a fate nen chuan an lo kal hnai a, an kun a, chibai an buk ve a; tin, chu mi hnuah chuan Josefa leh Rakili chu an lo kal hnai a, an kun a, chibai an rawn buk bawk a." 
Genesis33:8 Tin, Esauva chuan, ""Ran rual ka tawh zozaite kha eng tizia nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka lalpa, i mit ka tlun theihna'n ka ti a ni,"" a ti a." 
Genesis33:9 Tin, Esauva chuan, ""Kei pawhin ka ngah e; ka nau, i neih zawng zawng chu i ta ni rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Genesis33:10 Tin, Jakoba chuan, ""Ni lo e, i mit ka thlun chuan, khawngaih takin ka l awmman pek che kha mi pawmsak rawh: Pathian hmel hmu angin i hmel ka hmu a, ka chungah i lawm si a," 
Genesis33:11 Pathianin min khawngaih avang leh, ka ngah avang hian khawngaih takin ka thil rawn pek che kha pawm rawh,"" a a ti a. Tichuan a thlem a thlem a, a pawm ta a." 
Genesis33:12 Tin, Esauva chuan, ""Hawh, i kal ang, hma ka hruaisak ang che,"" a ti a." 
Genesis33:13 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Naupangte hi an la tet leh, beram rual leh bawng rual ka hnena awmte hi no hruai an nih, ka lalpa, i hria e; ni khat chauh pawh an khalh chak lutuk chuan ran rual zawng zawng hi an thi mai ang." 
Genesis33:14 Ka lalpa, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh hmaah hian kal la: kei chuan Seir tlangah, ka lalpa, i hnen ka thlen hma loh chuan, ka hmaa ran kal hi an kal theih tawk ang zel leh, naupangte kal theih tawk ang zelin, zawi muangin ka rawn chhawm zel ang e,"" a ti a." 
Genesis33:15 Tin, Esauva chuan, ""Ka hnena awm mi thenkhatte hi ka hnutchhiah tal ang che chu,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Engah kher maw? Ka lalpa mit mi thluntir mai rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis33:16 Chutichuan Esauva chu chu mi ni vek chuan Seir tlang lam panin a kir leh ta a. 
Genesis33:17 Tin, Jakoba chu Sukloth hmunah chuan a kal a, ama tan in a sa a, a rante tan bukte a sa bawk a: chuvangin chu mi hmun hming chu Sukoth an ti ta a." 
Genesis33:18 Tin, Jakoba chu Paddan-aram ram ata a lo kal chu thlamuang takin Sekem khua, Kanaan rama awm chu a thleng a, daikiangah chuan a puan in chu a zar ta a." 
Genesis33:19 Tin, a puan in zarna hmun chu, Sekema pa Hamora fate lakah, tangka zain a lei a.Chutah chuan maicham a siam a, a hmingah chuan El-elohe-Israela a vuah a." 
Genesis33:20 Chutah chuan maicham a siam a, a hmingah chuan El-elohe-Israela a vuah a." 
Genesis34:1 Tin, Leaii fanu Dinaii, Jakoba a hrinsak chu, chu mi ram nulate hmu turin a va leng chhuak a." 
Genesis34:2 Tin, Hiv mi Hamora, chu mi ram lal fapa Sekema chuan ani chu a lo hmu a; tin, a man a, a mutpui a, a tlawm ta a." 
Genesis34:3 Tin, a rilru chu Jakoba fanu Dinaii chungah chuan a awm tlat a, chu nula chu a hmangaih a, ani chu tawngkam tha takin a bia a." 
Genesis34:4 Tin, Sekema chuan a pa Hamora chu a bia a, ""Chu nula chu nupuiah mi neihsak rawh,"" a ti a." 
Genesis34:5 Tin, Jakoba chuan a fanu Dinaii chu Sekeman a tibawrhbang tih a lo hria a; a fapate chu phulah a ran zingah an awm a: tichuan an lo hawn hma loh chuan Jakoba chu a ngawi reng a." 
Genesis34:6 Tin, Sekema pa Hamora chu Jakoba be turin a hnenah a kal a." 
Genesis34:7 Tin, Jakoba fapate chuan an hriat veleh phul atang chuan an lo hawng ta a: tin, Jakoba fanu mutpuiin Israel-ho zinga thil sual atthlak tak, thil tih hauh loh tur chu a tih tak avangin an lungngai a, an thinur ta em em a." 
Genesis34:8 Tin, Hamora chuan anmahni a bia a, ""Ka fapa Sekema rilru chu in fanu chungah a awm tlat a: khawngaih takin nupuiah neihtir ta che u." 
Genesis34:9 Tichuan i innei tawn ang u; in fanute min neihtir u la, kan fanute pawh nei bawk rawh u." 
Genesis34:10 Tichuan kan hnenah in awm ang a; ram pawh hi a awm duai fo ang: hengah hian awmin sumdawng u la; hengah hian lo intimuk rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Genesis34:11 Tin, Sekema chuan nula pa leh a nutate hnenah, ""Mi khawngaih rawh u, ka hnena in sawi apiang ka pe zel ang che u." 
Genesis34:12 Man leh thilpek chu engzat pawh ngen u la, in tih ang zelin ka pe ang che u: engpawh ni se la, nula chu nupuiah mi neihtir phawt mai rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Genesis34:13 Tin, Jakoba fapate chuan an farnu Dinaii chu a tihbawrhbansak avangin, Sekema leh a pa Hamora chu ngamthlemnain an chhang a, an sawi ve a," 
Genesis34:14 an hnenah, ""He thilserh tan lo mi, kan farnu pek hi-kan ti thei lo ang; chu chu kan tan hmingchhiatna tur a ni si a:" 
Genesis34:15 hetianga in tiam chauh hian in thu ang chu kan remti ang: in zinga mipa tawh phawt chuan serh tanin keimahni angin awm u la; 
Genesis34:16 chutichuan kan farnute kan neihtir ang che u a, keini pawhin in fanute kan nei bawk ang a, tin, in hnenah kan awm ang a, chi khat kan lo ni dawn nia." 
Genesis34:17 Nimahsela serh tan kawnga kan thu in zawm dawn loh chuan kan fanu chu kan hruai ang a, kan kal mai ang,"" an ti a." 
Genesis34:18 Tin, an thu chuan Hamora leh Hamora fapa Sekema chu a tilawm a." 
Genesis34:19 Tichuan tlangval chuan Jakoba fanu chu a duh hle avangin, chu thil chu rei rial loin a ti ta mai a: ani chu a pa chhungte zawng zawng zinga mite zah ber a ni a." 
Genesis34:20 Tin, Hamora leh a fapa Sekema chuan an khaw kulh kawngkhar chu an thleng a, an khuate chu an bia a," 
Genesis34:21 Saw mite saw min rem takin an awm a, chuvangin he ramah hian awmin, hengah hian sumdawng rawh se; ngai teh u, an tan pawh ram hi a zau tawk si a; an fanute saw nupuiahte nei i la, kan fanute pawh i neihtir bawk ang u." 
Genesis34:22 Nimahsela chi khat kan lo nihna tura kan hnena awm chu hetianga kan tiam chauh hian saw mite sawn min remtihpui dawn a ni, serh tan an ni angin kan zinga mipa tawh phawt chu serh tan lo ni ve i la." 
Genesis34:23 An ran te, an sum te, an sa zawng zawng te kan ta a ni vek dawn lo'm ni? An thu hi i remtihpui mai ang u, tichuan kan hnenah an awm dawn nia,"" an ti a." 
Genesis34:24 Tin, Hamora leh a fapa Sekema thu chu a khaw kulh kawngkhara chhuak zawng zawngte chuan an zawm a; a khaw kulh kawngkhara chhuak zawng zawng, mipa tawh phawt chuan serh an tantir ta vek a." 
Genesis34:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni thum niah, an nat lai tak chuan Jakoba fapate zinga mi pahnih, Dinaii nuta Simeona leh Levia chuan, an khandaih keng ve vein, a rukin khua chu an bei a, mipa zawng zawng chu an that zo piar a." 
Genesis34:26 Tichuan Hamora leh a fapa Sekema chu khandaih hriamin an that a, Sekema in ata Dinaii chu an hruai chhuak ta a." 
Genesis34:27 Jakoba fapateho chuan an mi thahte chu an va nangching a, an farnu chu an tihbawrhbansak avangin khua chu an rawk ta a." 
Genesis34:28 An beram rualte, an bawng rualte, an sabengtungte, an khuaa thil awm te, an loa thil awmte chu an laksak a;" 
Genesis34:29 an sum zawng zawng leh an fanau te tete leh an nupuite zawng zawng in chhunga awm apiangte chu an man a, an rawk bawk a."
