Genesis49:25 I pa Pathian, nangmah tanpuitu tura- Engkimtitheia. Chung lam van malsawmnate, Hnuai lama bawk reng tui thuk tak malsawmnate, Hnute leh chhul malsawmnatea Nangmah malsawmtu tur ngeia Tihchakin a awm a." 
Genesis49:26 I pa malsawmsaknate hian, Mi thlahtute malsawmsakna te chu Chatuan tlang tawp ret thlengin a khum ta zawk a ni: Chungte chu Josefa lu-ah a awm ang a, A unaute hnen ata tihhrana awma chhipah chuan a awm ang." 
Genesis49:27 Benjamina hi chinghne koham a ni: zingah chuan a sa she chu a ei a ng a, Tlai lamah chuan a rallak chu a sem ang,"" a ti a." 
Genesis49:28 Chung zawng zawngte chu Israel hnam sawm leh hnam hnihte chu an ni a: chu thu pawh chu anmahni malsawma an hnena an pa thusawi chu a ni; an malsawm dawn tur tawk ang zelin mal a sawmsak theuh a. 
Genesis49:29 Tin, anni chu thuro a chhiah a, an hnenah, ""Ka chipuite hnenah hruaiin ka awm ve dawn ta a: Hit mi Ephrona loah puk, Kanaan rama Mamre zawna Makpela loa puk, Abrahama'n phumna hmun ro atan, Hit mi Ephrona laka a lo chawpa a leiah khan mi thlahtute hnenah mi phum ve ang che u:" 
Genesis49:30 Tin, anni chu thuro a chhiah a, an hnenah, ""Ka chipuite hnenah hruaiin ka awm ve dawn ta a: Hit mi Ephrona loah puk, Kanaan rama Mamre zawna Makpela loa puk, Abrahama'n phumna hmun ro atan, Hit mi Ephrona laka a lo chawpa a leiah khan mi thlahtute hnenah mi phum ve ang che u:" 
Genesis49:31 chutah chuan Abrahama leh a nupui Sari chu an phum a; chutah chuan Isaaka leh a nupui Rebeki chu an phum a; chutah bawk chuan Leaii ka phum a: 
Genesis49:32 lo leh a chhunga puk awm chu Hetha thlahte laka lei a ni,"" a ti a.Tin, Jakoba chuan a fapate hnena thuro a chhiah zawh chuan a kete chu khumah a hlang kai a, a thlarau a thlah a, a chipuite hnenah chuan hruaiin a awm ve ta a." 
Genesis49:33 Tin, Jakoba chuan a fapate hnena thuro a chhiah zawh chuan a kete chu khumah a hlang kai a, a thlarau a thlah a, a chipuite hnenah chuan hruaiin a awm ve ta a." 
Genesis50:1 Tin, Josefa chuan a pa hmai a si a, a tah a, a fawp a fawp a." 
Genesis50:2 Tin, Josefan a chhiahhlawh damdawi thiamhote chu a pa ruang tawih thei loa siam turin thu a pe a: tichuan damdawi thiamhote chuan Israela ruang chu tawih thei loin an siam ta a." 
Genesis50:3 A ruang siamna'n ni sawmli an awh a, tawih thei loa siamna chuan ni chuti zat chu an awh thin reng a ni: tin, ni sawmsarih chhung zawng Aiguptaho chuan amah chu an tah a." 
Genesis50:4 Tin, amah an tah nite chu a ral hnu chuan Josefan Pharaoa chhungte chu a bia a, ""I mit ka tlun chuan, khawngaih takin Pharaoa beng hriatah chuan," 
Genesis50:5 Ka pan, ngai teh, ka thi dawn ta e: Kanaan rama ka thlan ka laih saah, chutah ngei chuan mi rawn phum ang che tiin chhia mi chhamtir a. Chutichuan khawngaih takin ka pa hi mi han phumtir ang che, tin, ka lo kal leh mai ang, a ti e,' tiin, sawi rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Genesis50:6 Tichuan Pharaoa chuan, ""Chhia a chhamtir che ang chuan i pa chu han phum ta che,"" a ti a." 
Genesis50:7 Tichuan Josefa chu a pa phum turin a han kal ta a: tin, Pharaoa chhiahhlawh zawng zawng, a chhungte zinga upate leh Aigupta ram upa zawng zawng leh," 
Genesis50:8 Josefa chhungte zawng zawng leh a unaute leh a pa chhungte chu, a hnenah an han kal ve a: an fanau te tete leh, an Beram rualte leh an Bawng rualte chauh chu Gosen ramah chuan an hnutchhiah a." 
Genesis50:9 Tin, an hnenah tawlailirte, sakawr chung chuang mite nen an han kal ve a: tichuan pawl lian tak mai an ni." 
Genesis50:10 Tin, Jordan lui rala Atada hruizawl chu an thleng a, chutah chuan nasa takin an tah chiam a: ni sarih a pa sunna a siam a." 
Genesis50:11 Tin, chu mi rama mi Kanaan-hote chuan Atada hruizawla an mitthi sun chu an hmuh chuan, ""Hei, Aigupta-ho mitthi sunna nasa tak a nih hi,"" an ti a: chuvangin chu mi hmun hmingah chuan Abel-mizraim an vuah ta a, chu chu Jordan lui rala awm a ni." 
Genesis50:12 Tin, a fapate chuan a thupek ang zelin an tihsak a:" 
Genesis50:13 a fapate chuan Kanaan ramah an zawn lut a, Abrahama'n phumna hmun ro atan, Hit mi Ephrona laka lo chawpa a lei, Mamre zawna Makpela loa pukah khan an phum ta a ni." 
Genesis50:14 Tin, Josefa chu a pa a phum zawh chuan, amah leh a unaute leh a pa phum tura a hnena han kal vete zawng zawng nen chuan Aigupta ramah an haw leh ta a." 
Genesis50:15 Tin, Josefa unaute chuan an pa thi chu an ngaihtuahin, ""Josefan min hua ang a, a chungathil kan tihsual zawng zawng phuba kha kan chungah hian a la la kim seuh mai ang e aw,"" an ti a." 
Genesis50:16 Tichuan Josefa hrilh turin thu an chah a, ""I pa chuan a thih hma khan," 
Genesis50:17 Heti hian Josefa hnenah, Khawngaih takin i unaute bawhchhiatna leh an sualna chu ngaidam ang che, i chungah thil zawng an tisual na a, tiin in sawi tur a ni' a ti a, thu min pe a: tichuan khawngaih takin i pa Pathian chhiahhlawhte bawhchhiatna chu ngaidam ang che,"" an ti a. Tin, a hnena an han sawi chuan Josefa chu a tap ta a." 
Genesis50:18 Tin, a unaute pawh chu an va kal ve a, a hmaah chuan an bawkkhup ta hlawm a; tin, ""Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhte kan nih hi,"" an ti a." 
Genesis50:19 Tin, Josefa chuan an hnenah, ""Hlau suh u: Pathian aiawh em ka nih?" 
Genesis50:20 Nangni zawngin ka chungah thil sual tih in rilruk a; nimahsela Pathian chuan vawiin ang hian mi tam tak nungdama chhanhimna tura thil thaa chantir a rilruk zawka a lo ni si a. 
Genesis50:21 Chutichuan hlau suh u: nangmahni leh in fanau te tete nen ka chawm zel ang che u,"" a ti a. Chutichuan a thlamuan a, tawngkam tha takin a be hlawm a." 
Genesis50:22 Tin, Josefa chu amah leh a pa chhungte nen, Aigupta ramah chuan an awm a: Josefa chu kum 110 a dam a." 
Genesis50:23 Josefa chuan Ephraima fa, a tute khup thum a hmu a: Manasea fapa Makira fate pawh Josefa mal chungah an piang a." 
Genesis50:24 Tin, Josefan a unaute hnenah, ""Ka thi dawn ta e: nimahsela Pathianin a rawn kan ngei ngei ang che u a, he ram ata hi a rawn hruai chhuakin Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnenah chhechhama pek a tiam ramah a hruai chho ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Genesis50:25 Tin, Josefa chuan Israela thlahte chu chhia a chhamtir a, ""Pathianin a rawn kan ngei ngei ang che u a, ka ruhte hi heta ta in zawn chho tur a ni,"" a ti a.Chutichuan Josefa chu kum 110 mi a nihin a thi a: tin, a ruang chu tawih thei loin an siam a, Aigupta ramah kuangah an dah ta a." 
Genesis50:26 Chutichuan Josefa chu kum 110 mi a nihin a thi a: tin, a ruang chu tawih thei loin an siam a, Aigupta ramah kuangah an dah ta a." 
Exodus1:1 Heng hi Israela fapa Aigupta rama lutte hming chu a ni; mi tin mahni chhungte theuh nen Jakoba hnenah chuan an kal a; 
Exodus1:2 Reubena te, Simeona te, Levia leh Juda te;" 
Exodus1:3 Isakara te, Jebuluna leh Benjamina te;" 
Exodus1:4 Dana leh Napthalia te, Gada leh Asera te." 
Exodus1:5 Tin, Jakoba thalbea chhuak zawng zawngte chu mi sawmsarih an ni: Josefa zawng Aigupta ramah chuan lo awm tawh sa reng a ni a." 
Exodus1:6 Tin, Josefa leh a unaute zawng zawng leh chung chhuanho zawng zawngte chu an thi ta vek a." 
Exodus1:7 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan chi tam tak an thlah a, nasa takin an lo pung a, an lo tam ta em em mai a, an lo chak ta telh telh a; tin, chu ramah chuan an lo khat ta mup mai a." 
Exodus1:8 Tin, Aigupta ramah chuan Josefa hre lo, lal thar a lo awm ta a." 
Exodus1:9 Tichuan a mite hnenah, ""Ngai teh u, Israela thlahte hi kan aiin an tamin an chak tak zawk hi le:" 
Exodus1:10 hawh u, anmahni hi tihhnathiamin i ti ang u; chutilochuan an lo pung zel ang a, nakinah indonate a lo awm hian, kan hmelmate lamah an pakai ve hlauh ang a, min bei ang a, he ram atang hian an tlan chhuak hlauh dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus1:11 Chutichuan an phurrita tiretehi turin an chungah hnathawk vengtute an ruat ta a. Tichuan Pharaoa tan bungraw dah khawmna tur Pithom leh Rameses khuate an siam a. 
Exodus1:12 Nimahsela anmahni chu an tihretheih nasat veleh an pung nasa deuh deuh a, an darh zau ta deuh deuh a. Tin, Israela thlahte avang chuan an lungngai ta a." 
Exodus1:13 Tin, Aigupta mite chuan Israela thlahte chu rim takin an thawhtir a:" 
Exodus1:14 hnathawh hautak tak, lung charna leh leirawhchante siamtir leh lohvah hna tinrengte, hreawm taka thawhtirin an chhawr vak vak a, an thawhna zawng zawngah chuan rim takin an chhawr zel a." 
Exodus1:15 Tin, Aigupta lal chuan Hebrai nau chhar mite chu a bia a, chu mite chu pakhata hming Siphraii a ni a, tin, pakhata hming chu Puaii a ni a:" 
Exodus1:16 an hnenah chuan, ""Hebrai hmeichhiate nau hrinna hmuna nau in chhar hunin, mipa fa a nih chuan tihlum zel ang che u; hmeichhia a nih erawh chuan zuah tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus1:17 Nimahsela nau chhar mite chuan Pathian an tih a, tichuan Aigupta lal thupek ang chuan an ti duh lo a, mipa fate chu an humhim ta zel zawk a." 
Exodus1:18 Tin, Aigupta lal chuan nau chhar mite chu a kohtir a, an hnenah chuan, ""Engati nge hetianga thil in tih a, mipa fate chu in humhim zel le?"" a ti a." 
Exodus1:19 Tin, nau chhar mite chuan Pharaoa hnenah, ""Hebrai hmeichhiate hi Aigupta hmeichhiate ang an nih ve loh vang a ni; anniho hi zawngin an sam em bik a, tichuan nau chhartu lo thlen hma hian an lo hring tawh thin a ni,"" an ti a." 
Exodus1:20 Chutichuan Pathianin nau chhar mite chu a titha ta hle a: tichuan mite chu an lo tam ta hle a, an lo chak ta telh telh a." 
Exodus1:21 Tin, heti hi a ni a, nau chhar miten Pathian an tih avangin chhungkua neiin a siam ta a.Tin, Pharaoan, ""Mipa a lo piang apiang chu luiah in paih ang a, tin, hmeichhia apiang chu in humhim zel tur a ni,"" tiin a mite zawng zawng chu thu a pe a." 
Exodus1:22 Tin, Pharaoan, ""Mipa a lo piang apiang chu luiah in paih ang a, tin, hmeichhia apiang chu in humhim zel tur a ni,"" tiin a mite zawng zawng chu thu a pe a." 
Exodus2:1 Tin, mi pakhat, Levia chhungte zinga mi a va chhuak a, Levia fanu nupuiah a va nei a." 
Exodus2:2 Tin, hmeichhia chu a rai a, tin, fapa a hring a: tin ani chuan naute chu hmel tha a ti em a, thla thum a thukru a." 
Exodus2:3 Tin, a lo thukru reng thei ta lo a, a tan luang lawng a la a, chu chu chirh leh alkatra-in a char a, tin, naute chu chutah chuan a muttir a, tichuan lui kama phairuang zingah chuan a dah ta a." 
Exodus2:4 Tin, a chungah eng tak la thleng ang maw tia hriat tumin a farnu chu hla feah a ding a." 
Exodus2:5 Tin, Pharaoa fanu chu luia inbual turin a zu kal a; tin, a bawihnute chu lui kamah chuan an kal ve a; tin, phairuang zinga bawm a han hmuh chuan a bawihnu a va laktir a." 
Exodus2:6 Tin, a han hawn chuan naute chu a hmu ta a: tin, ngai teh, nausen chu a tap ta a. Tin, a khawngaih ta em em a, ""Hei Hebrai fa a nih hi le,"" a ti a." 
Exodus2:7 Tichuan a farnu chuan Pharaoa fanu hnenah chuan, ""He naute awmsaktu tur che Hebrai hmeichhia nau awmtu ka kohsak ang che chu?"" a ti a." 
Exodus2:8 Tin, Pharaoa fanu chuan a hnenah, ""Kal rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, nula chu a kal a, chu nausen nu chu a ko ta a." 
Exodus2:9 Tin, Pharaoa fanu chuan a hnenah, ""He naute hi kalpui ta la, mi awmsak ang che, tichuan i hlawh ka pe ang che,"" a ti a. Chutichuan hmeichhia chuan naute chu a la a, a pawm ta a." 
Exodus2:10 Tin, naute chu a lo thang lian a, Pharaoa fanu hnenah a hruai a, tichuan a fapaah a awm ta a. Tin, ""Tui ata ka lak chhuah avangin,"" a ti a, a hmingah chuan Mosia a sa a." 
Exodus2:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung laia Mosia a lo puitlin chuan, a unaute a va kan a, an phurritte chu a va hmu a: tin, Aigupta mi pakhat hian a unau pakhat Hebrai mi hi a vaw lai a han hmu a." 
Exodus2:12 Tin, Mosia chu a hawi vel ruai a, tin, tumah an awm lo tih a hriat veleh, Aigupta mi chu a vawhlum a, leiah a phum ta a." 
Exodus2:13 Tin, atukah a va chhuak leh a, tin, ngai teh, Hebrai mi pahnih an lo insual a: tin, a thiam lo zawka hnenah chuan, ""Engati nge i thian i vuak le?"" a ti a." 
Exodus2:14 Tin, ani chuan, ""Kan chungah hotuah leh roreltuah tuin nge siam che? Aigupta mi i tihhlum ang khan mi tihhlum i tum elo?"" a ti a. Tin, Mosia chuan a hlau ta a, ""An hre ta ngei zuk nia le"" a ti a." 
Exodus2:15 Tichuan Pharaoan chu chu a lo hriat veleh, Mosia chu thah a tum ta a. Nimahsela Mosia chu Pharaoa hnen ata a tlan bo a, Midian ramah a awm ta a: tin, tuichhunchhuah sirah hian a thu a." 
Exodus2:16 Tin, Midian rama puithiam chuan fanu pasarih a nei a: tin, anni chuan tui an rawn chawi a, an pa beram rual in turin tui inna thlengte chu an tikhat a." 
Exodus2:17 Tin, beram vengtute an lo kal a, an rawn hnawt darh a: nimahsela Mosia chu a tho a, anmahni chu a rawn tanpui a, an beram rual chu tui a intir ta a." 
Exodus2:18 Tin, an pa Reuela hnen an va thlenin ani chuan, ""Engtizia nge vawiin chu in va lo haw hma ve le?"" a ti a." 
Exodus2:19 Tin, anni chuan, ""Aigupta mi pakhatin beram vengtute lak ata min chhanhim a ni, tin, chu chang ni loin, tui te min thalsak a, beram rual tui a intir a ni,"" an ti a." 
Exodus2:20 Tin, ani chuan a fanute hnenah chuan, ""Chu, khawiah nge a awm le? Eng tizia nge in rawn hawnsan mai ni le? Va ko ta che u, chaw te rawn ei ang hmiang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus2:21 Tin, Mosia chuan chu mi hnena awm chu rem a ti a: tin, a fanu Zipori chu Mosia a pe a." 
Exodus2:22 Tin, fapa a hring a, tin, Mosia'n a hmingah Gersoma a sa a; ""Mi rama pem ka nih avangin,"" a ti a ni." 
Exodus2:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni rei fe chinah chuan Aigupta lal chu a thi ta a: tin, Israela thlahte chu an hnathawh hautak avang chuan an rum a, tin, an au a, tichuan an hnathawh hautak avanga an au thawm chu Pathian hnena a han thleng ta a." 
Exodus2:24 Tin, Pathianin an rum chu a hria a, tin, Pathianin Abrahama te, Isaaka te leh Jakoba te hnena a thuthlun kha a hre reng a.Tin, Pathian chuan Israela thlahte chu a thlir reng a, tichuan Pathian chuan anmahni chu a zuk ngaihsak reng bawk a." 
Exodus2:25 Tin, Pathian chuan Israela thlahte chu a thlir reng a, tichuan Pathian chuan anmahni chu a zuk ngaihsak reng bawk a." 
Exodus3:1 Tin, Mosia chuan a pu Jethroa, Midian ram puithiam beram rual a veng a: tin, beram rual chu thlaler thlang lampangah chuan a khalh a, tin, Pathian tlang, Horeb chu a va thleng a." 
Exodus3:2 Tin, hnim bukah LALPA vantirhkoh, meialhin a hnenah a rawn inlar a: tin, a han en a, tin, ngai teh, hnim buk chu meiin a kang a, a hnim buka erawh chu a kang ral si lo." 
Exodus3:3 Tin, Mosia chuan, ""Ka va peng teh reng ang, eng tizia nge ni hnim buk saw a kan ral loh, he thil mak tak hi ka va en teh ang e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus3:4 Tin, LALPA chuan en tura a va peng chu a hmuhin, Pathianin hnim buk zing atang chuan a han ko a, ""Mosi, Mosi,"" a han ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Heta hi ka awm,"" a ti a." 
Exodus3:5 Tin, ani chuan, ""Rawn hnaih suh khai: i kephah ata i pheikhawkte kha phelh rawh, i dinna hmun kha lei thianghlim a ni e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus3:6 Tin, ""Kei hi i pa Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian, Jakoba Pathian chu ka nih hi,"" a ti leh a. Tin, Mosia chuan a hmai a khuh ta a; Pathian a en ngam si lo a." 
Exodus3:7 Tin, LALPA chuan, ""Aigupta rama ka mi awmte chu an hreawmzia ka hmu reg a sin, anmahni vengtute avanga an au thawmte chu ka lo hria a; an lungngaihnate chu ka hre reng si a;" 
Exodus3:8 tichuan Aigupta-ho lak ata chhanhim tur leh chu mi ram ata chu hruai chhuaka Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Amor-hote Periz-hote, Hiv-hote, Jebus-hote awmna ram tha tak leh zau tak, hnutetui leh khawizu luanna rama hruai lut turin ka lo chhuak ta a ni." 
Exodus3:9 Tin, ngai teh, Israela thlahte au thawm chu ka hnen a lo thleng e: chu chang a ni lo a, Aigupta-hoin anmahni an hnehchhiahziate chu ka hmu reng a ni." 
Exodus3:10 Chuvangin hawh teh, ka mi Israela thlahte chu Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuak turin Pharaoa hnenah ka tir ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus3:11 Tin, Mosia chuan Pathian hnenah, ""Kei Pharaoa hnena kala, Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata zuk hruai chhuaktu atan chuan tu nge maw ka nih le?"" a ti a." 
Exodus3:12 Tin, ani chuan, ""I hnenah ka awm dawn alawm; tichuan keima tirh ngei i ni tih hei hi i tan chhinchhiahna a ni ang: Aigupta ram ata mite chu i rawn hruai chhuah hunah chuan, he tlang ngeiah hian Pathian rawng in la bawl ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus3:13 Tin, Mosia'n Pathian hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Israela thlahte hnenah chuan zuk kalin an hnenah, 'In thlahtute Pathianin in hnenah hian mi rawn tir a ni e,' zuk ti i la; tin, anni chuan ka hnenah, 'Tunge ni a hming chu?' lo ti ang se la, an hnenah chuan engtin nge ka sawi ang?"" a ti a." 
Exodus3:14 Tin, Pathianin Mosia hnenah, ""AWMA KA NI,"" a ti a; tin, a hnenah chuan, ""Nangin Israela thlahte hnenah chuan, 'AWMA chuan in hnenah mi rawn tir a ni e,' i ti tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus3:15 Tin, Pathian vekin Mosia hnenah chuan, ""Nangin Israela thlahte hnenah chuan, 'LALPA in thlahtute Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian leh Jakoba Pathian chuan in hnenah hian mi rawn tir a ni e: hei hi kumkhuaa ka hming chu a ni a, tin, hei hi chhuan zawng zawng thlenga mi hriat rengna chu a ni,' ti ang che." 
Exodus3:16 Kal langin Israela upaho ko khawm ang che, tichuan an hnenah, 'LALPA in thlahtute Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian leh Jakoba Pathian chuan ka rawn kan ta ngei che u a, Aigupta rama in chunga an tihzia te hi ka hmu ta ngei mai;" 
Exodus3:17 Aigupta rama tihhreawmna lak ata chu ka hruai chhuak ang che u a, Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Amor-hote, Periz-hote, Hiv-hote, Hit-hote ram, hnutetui leh khawizu luanna ramah chuan ka hruai lut ang che u ka tih tawh kha tiin ka hnenah a rawn inlar ta a ni,' ti ang che." 
Exodus3:18 Chutichuan i thu an lo ngaithla ang: tin, nang leh Israel upaho chu Aigupta lal hnenah in kal ang a, tin, a hnenah, 'LALPA, Hebraite Pathianin min rawn tlawh ta mai a; chuvangin thlaler ni thum kalah LALPA kan Pathian hnena kan va inthawi theihna turin khawngaih takin min kaltir ang che,' ti ang che u." 
Exodus3:19 Tin, Aigupta lal zawngin kut chak tak ngawt lo chuan a chhuahtir hlei lo ang che u tih ka hria e." 
Exodus3:20 tin, ka kut ka phar ang a, tin, Aigupta-ho chu an zinga thil mak tak ka la tih tur zawng zawngte chuan ka la hrem ang: tin, chu mi hnuah zawng a chhuahtir tawh ang che u." 
Exodus3:21 Tin, he mite hi Aigupta-ho ka khawngaihtir ang a: tin, heti hi a ni ang a, in kal hunah chuan ruakin in kal lo ang a,hmeichhe tinin an vengte leh an ina chengte chu tangkaraw incheinate leh rangkachak incheinate leh silhfente an la dil zawk ang a; tichuan in fapate leh in fanute chu in la bei ang; tin, Aigupta mite chu in rawk a ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus3:22 hmeichhe tinin an vengte leh an ina chengte chu tangkaraw incheinate leh rangkachak incheinate leh silhfente an la dil zawk ang a; tichuan in fapate leh in fanute chu in la bei ang; tin, Aigupta mite chu in rawk a ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:1 Tin, Mosia chuan, ""Ngai teh, mi ring duhin ka thu an pawm lo ang: 'LALPA chu i hnenah a inlar ngut lo ang e,' an ti mai awm si a,"" tiin a chhang a." 
Exodus4:2 Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, ""I kuta mi kha eng nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Tiang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:3 Tin, ani chuan, ""Leiah khan han paih teh,"" a ti a. Tin, leiah chuan a han paih a, tin, rulah a lo chang ta a; tin, Mosia chuan a tlansan ta a." 
Exodus4:4 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia hnenah, ""I kut khan han ban la, a meiah han la teh, (tin, a kut chuan a han ban a, a han la a, tin, a kutah chuan tiangah a lo chang leh ta a):" 
Exodus4:5 LALPA, an thlahtute Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian leh Jakoba Pathian chu i hnenah a rawn inlar ngei a ni tih an rin theihna turin,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:6 Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, ""I kut khan i awm zuk zen teh,"" a ti leh a. Tin, a awm chu a zuk zen a: tin, a han pawrh chhuah leh chuan, ngai teh, a kut chu vur anga varin a lo phar ta a." 
Exodus4:7 Tin, ani chuan, ""I kut khan i awm zuk zen leh teh. (Tin, a awm chu a zuk zen leh a; a awm ata a han pawrh chhuah chuan, ngai teh, a tisa dang ang bawk chuan a lo awm leh ta a.)" 
Exodus4:8 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an rin duh loh che a, chhinchiahna hmasa zawk chu an pawm duh loh chuan, chhinchhiahna hnuhnung zawk tal chu an ring ang." 
Exodus4:9 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, chung chhinchhiahna pahnih ngei pawh an rin loh a, i thusawi pawh chu an pawm loh chuan, lui tui i zuk thal ang a, lei charah i bun ang a; tin, lui ata tui i zuk thal chu lei charah chuan thisenah a lo chang dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:10 Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA hnenah, ""Aw LALPA, kei zawng tun hma lamahte leh i chhiahhlawh hnena thu i rawn sawi hnuah pawh hian mi tawnghmang thiam ka ni ve ngai lo a ni: mi tawng ban leh mi tawng mawh ka ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:11 Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, ""Mihring ka hi tu siam nge ni a, mitvar te, mitdel te pawh hi tu tih nge ni? Kei LALPA hian a ni lo em ni?" 
Exodus4:12 chuvangin kal mai rawh, i ka chu keima'n ka awmpui zel ang a, i sawi tur chu ka hrilh zel ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:13 Ni lo e, LALPA, mi dang tir zawk ta mai che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:14 Tichuan LALPA chu Mosia chungah a thinur ta a, a hnenah, ""I unaupa Arona, Levia chi chu a awm lo'm ni? Ani zawngin tawnghmang a thiam tih ka hria a ni. Ngai teh, nangmah hmuak turin a lo kal nghe nghe a sin: tin, a hmuh che zawngin a thinlung chu a lawm hle mai ang." 
Exodus4:15 Chutichuan nangin amah chu bia langin, thute chu fah vek ang che: tichuan i ka leh a ka chu keima'n ka amwpui zel ang a, in tih tur chu ka hrilh zel ang che u." 
Exodus4:16 Tin, ani chu mipui hnena i thu sawi chhawngtu a ni ang: tin, heti hi a ni ang a, i tan ka a ni ang a, tin, nang chu a tan Pathian ang i ni ang." 
Exodus4:17 Tin, nangin he tiang hi i keng ang a, chu chuan thilmakte chu i ti ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:18 Tin, Mosia chu a kal a, a pu Jethro hnenah a kir leh ta a, tin, a hnenah, ""Aigupta rama ka uanu awmte chu an la dam emaw an hnenah khawngaih takin ka va hawng rih ang e,"" a ti a. Tin, Jethroa chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Thlamuang takin kal ta che le,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:19 Tin, LALPA chuan Midian ramah Mosia hnenah chuan, ""Kal la, Aigupta ramah chuan va kir leh tawh rawh le: nangmah tihhlum tumtute kha an thi vek tawh e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:20 Tin, Mosia chuan a nupui leh a fapate chu a hruai a, sabengtung chungah a chuantir a, tin, Aigupta ramah chuan a kir leh ta a: tin, Mosia'n Pathian tiang chu a keng a." 
Exodus4:21 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Aigupta ram i thlen hun chuan i kuta thilmak zawng zawng ka kentir che hi Pharaoa hmaah chuan ti ngei ngei ang che: nimahsela a thinlung ka tihkhauhsak ang a, tichuan mite chu a chhuahtir phal lo ang." 
Exodus4:22 Tin, nangin Pharaoa hnenah chuan, 'LALPA'n, Israela hi ka fapa, ka fa tir a ni e:" 
Exodus4:23 tichuan i hnenah, ka fapa chuan ka rawng a bawl theihna'n chhuahtir rawh khai ka ti a; tin, i chhuahtir phal lo vei a i fapa, i fa tir chu ka tihlum ang, a ti e,' ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:24 Tin, heti hi ani a, kalkawnga riah hmunah chuan LALPA'n Mosia chu a zuk tlawh a, tihhlum a tum ta a." 
Exodus4:25 Tin, Zipori chuan meilung a la a, Tin, a fapaa serhvun chu a tan a, Mosia ke a tawhtir a; tichuan, ""Ka tan pasal thisen chhuah hmang i lo nih hi le,"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:26 Chutichuan, ""Serh tan avangin pasal thisen chhuah hmang i lo nih hi"" a ti a." 
Exodus4:27 Tin, LALPA'n Aron hnenah, ""Mosia hmuak turin thlalerah va kal rawh,"" a ti a. tin, a kal ta a, Pathian tlangah chuan a va hmu a, a fawp a." 
Exodus4:28 Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA'n a tirh thu zawng zawngte leh thilmak a tihtir tur zawng zawngte chu Arona a hrilh vek a." 
Exodus4:29 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chuan Israela thlahte upaho zawng zawng chu an ko khawm vek a:" 
Exodus4:30 tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnena a sawi zawng zawngte kha Arona chuan a sawi chhawng leh vek a, tin, mipuite hmuhah chuan thilmakte chu a ti a.Tin, mite chuan an awih ta a: tin, LALPA'n Israela thlahte chu a zuk kan a, an hreawmziate a zuk hmu ta a ni tih an hriatin an lu an kun a, chibai an buk ta a." 
Exodus4:31 Tin, mite chuan an awih ta a: tin, LALPA'n Israela thlahte chu a zuk kan a, an hreawmziate a zuk hmu ta a ni tih an hriatin an lu an kun a, chibai an buk ta a." 
Exodus5:1 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan Mosia leh Arona chu an va kal a, Pharaoa hnenah, ""LALPA, Israela-hote Pathianin heti hian a ti, 'Ka mite hi thlalerah ka hnenah lo kut turin rawn kaltir rawh,' tiin,"" an ti a." 
Exodus5:2 Tin, Pharaoa chuan, ""Tunge maw ni LALPA, a thu ka han zawm a, Israel-hote ka han chhuahtirna tur chu ni le? LALPA chu ka hre lo e, tin, Israela-hote lah ka chhuahtir hek lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus5:3 Tin, anni chuan, ""Hebraite Pathianin mi rawn tlawh ta mai a: thlaler ni thum kalah LALPA kan Pathian hnena kan va inthawi theihna turin khawngaih takin kan va kal ang e; chutilochuan kan chungah hian hri emaw khandaih emaw a rawn lentir mai dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus5:4 Tin, Aigupta lal chuan an hnenah, ""Engtizia nge nangni Mosia leh Arona hi, mipuite hnathawk lai in dawngdahtir ni? In hna chu va thawk reng reng tawh u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus5:5 Tin, Pharaoa chuan, ""Ngai teh u, he mi rama mite hi in lo tam ta hle mai a, tin, nangnin an phurrit phur chu in chawlhtir mai a,"" a ti a." 
Exodus5:6 Tin, chu ni ngei chuan Pharaoan hnathawk vengtute leh an hotute hnenah chuan," 
Exodus5:7 Tun achinah zawng tun hma ang khan mite hi leirawhchana siam tur buhpawl in pe tur a ni tawh lo e, anmahni ngeiin buhpawl chu thiar khawm rawh se." 
Exodus5:8 Tin, leirawhchan tun hmaa an siam zat bawk kha anmahni lakah chuan in phut tur a ni a; in tihtlemsak hlek tur a ni lo e; an thatchhia a nih hi; chuvangin alawm, 'Kan Pathian hnenah kan va inthawi ang e,' an tih ni." 
Exodus5:9 Mite hi hnathawh hautak lehzual tuk rawh u khai, chung chu thawk se la; dawt thu mai maite hi ngaisang suh se,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Exodus5:10 Tin, hnathawk vengtute leh an hotute chu an kal chhuak a, mite hnenah chuan, ""Pharaoan, 'Buhpawl zawng ka pe dawn tawh lo a che u,' a ti a ni." 
Exodus5:11 Nangmahniin buhpawl chu in hmuh theih ang ang va thiar khawm rawh u: in hnathawh hi an tihtlemsak chuang dawn hlek lo che u a nia,"" an ti a." 
Exodus5:12 Chutichuan mite chu Aigupta ram chhung zawng zawngah chuan buhpawl aiah buh bul zawng khawmin an vak darh chum chum a. 
Exodus5:13 Tin, hnathawk vengtute chuan, ""Tun hmaa buhpawl awm lai ang bawk khan, in hnathawh, in ni tin hnathawhte hi thawk zo thuai thuai rawh u,"" tiin an tur hmanhmawh chhen thin a." 
Exodus5:14 Tin, Pharaoa hnathawk vengtuten Israela thlahte zinga hotu atana an ruatte chu an vuaa, ""Engati nge niminah te leh vawiinah te pawh tun hma ang bawka leirawhchan siam hi in zawh loh ni?"" tiin a chhang a." 
Exodus5:15 Tichuan Israela thlahte hotute chu Pharaoa hnenah an va kal a, ""I chhiahhlawhte hi engati nge heti taka min tih le?" 
Exodus5:16 I chhiahhlawhte buhpawl reng reng min pe ta lo a, anni chuan, 'Leirawhchan siam rawh u, min ti si a: tin, ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhte hi min vua a; nimahsela nangma mite ngei thiam loh a ni zawk a ni,"" tiin an mangan thu an va sawi a." 
Exodus5:17 Nimahsela ani chuan, ""In thatchhia a ni, in thatchhia a ni: chuvangin a ni, 'LALPA hnenah kan va inthawi ang e,' in tih ni." 
Exodus5:18 Chuvangin kal u la, va thawk rawh u; buhpawl zawng kan pek dawn loh che u hi, amaherawhchu leirawhchan an tuk zat che u kha chu in siam reng reng tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus5:19 Tin, ""In ni tin hnathawh, in lei rawh chan siam hi in titlem chuang hlei lo ang e,"" an tih veleh chuan Israela thlahte hotute chuan, an chan a chhe em em a ni tih an lo inhre ta a." 
Exodus5:20 Tin, Pharaoa hnen atanga an lo chhuak chuan, Mosia leh Arona kawnga lo ding an rawn hmu a:" 
Exodus5:21 tin, an hnenah, ""LALPA'n en che u se la, rorelsak che u rawh se; keimahni min thahna tura an kuta khandaih kentirin Pharaoa mithmuhah leh a chhiahhlawhteho lakah hian huat min phuttir tak avang hian,"" an ti a." 
Exodus5:22 Tichuan Mosia chuan LALPA lam a hawi a, ""Lalpa, eng tizia nge he mite hi tha lo taka i tih le? Eng vangin nge mi tirh ni?Pharaoa hnena i hminga thu sawi tura ka lo kal achin he mite hi tha lo takin a ti a; nang lah chuan i mite hi i la chhan chhuak hauh si lo a,"" a ti a." 
Exodus5:23 Pharaoa hnena i hminga thu sawi tura ka lo kal achin he mite hi tha lo takin a ti a; nang lah chuan i mite hi i la chhan chhuak hauh si lo a,"" a ti a." 
Exodus6:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Tunah zawng Pharaoa chunga ka tih dan tur chu i hmu tawh ang: kut chak tak avang chuan anmahni a chhuahtir ang a, tin, kut chak tak avang chuan a ram ata chu anmahni a hnawt chhuak ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus6:2 Tichuan Pathianin Mosia a bia a, a hnenah, ""Kei JEHOVA ka ni:" 
Exodus6:3 Abrahama hnenah te, Isaaka hnenah te leh Jakoba hnenah te khan Pathian Engkimtitheiain ka lo inlar ta a, ka hming JEHOVA-in erawh chuan an hnenah ka la inhriattir lo a." 
Exodus6:4 Tin, anmahni hnenah chuan, Kanaan ram, an mikhualna ram, rei lo te an lo awm tawhna kha pek tumin ka thinlung chu ka lo tinghet ta bawk a." 
Exodus6:5 Tin, Israela thlahte Aigupta-hoten an bawiha te rum kha ka lo hre bawk a; tichuan ka thuthlung chu ka hre reng a ni." 
Exodus6:6 chuvangin Israla thlahte hnenah chuan, 'Kei Jehoa ka ni a, Aigupta-hote phurrit lak ata hi ka hruai chhuak ang che u a, an bawiha in awm hi ka chhuahtir ang che u; tin, nasa taka ngaihtuah che uin ban phar meuhin ka tlan ang che u:" 
Exodus6:7 tin, ka mi atan ka nei ang che u a, tin, kei in tan Pathian ka ni ang a; tichuan kei hi Jehoa, in Pathian, Aigupta-ho phurrit lak ata hruaichhuaktu che u ka ni tih in hria ang a." 
Exodus6:8 Abrahama te, Isaaka te leh Jakoba te hnena ka ban meuha pek ka tumna ramah khan ka hruai lut ang che u a; tichuan in rochanah ka pe ang che u: kei Jehoa ka nih hi,' tiin hrilh ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus6:9 Tin, Mosia'n Israela thlahte hnenah chuan chung thu chu a va sawi a: nimahsela rilru nguina avang leh nasa taka tihretheihna avang chuan Mosia thu chu an ngaithla duh lo a." 
Exodus6:10 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia hnenah," 
Exodus6:11 Va kal la, Aigupta lal Pharaoa hnenah Israela thlahte hi a ram ata chhuahtir turin va sawi rawh,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus6:12 Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA hmaah, ""Ngai teh, Israela thlahten ka thusawi an ngaithla duh si lo a; kei mi tawng mawh thusawi tehlul hi Pharaoan engtin nge a ngaihthlak ang ni?"" tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus6:13 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia leh Arona chu a bia a, ""Aigupta ram ata Israelte hruai chhuak turin thu ka pe tawh che u a ni tih Israelte leh Aigupta lal chu hrilh rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus6:14 Tin, he'ng hi an pate hnam bulpui berte chu an ni: Israela fa tir Reubena fapa te chu; Hanoka te, Pallua te, Hezrona te, Karmia te an ni a: hengte hi Reubena hnamte chu an ni." 
Exodus6:15 Tin, Simeona fapate chu Jemuela te, Jamina te, Obada te, Jakina te, Zohara te, Kanaan hmeichhe laka a fapa Saula te an ni: hengte hi Simeona hnamte chu an ni." 
Exodus6:16 Tin, hengte hi an thlahte ang zelin Levia fapate hming chu a ni: Gersona te, Kohatha te, Meraria te an ni a; tin, Levia dam chhung kum chu kum 137 a ni." 
Exodus6:17 Tin, an hnam ang zelin Gersona fapate chu Libnia leh Simeia te hi an ni." 
Exodus6:18 Tin, Kohatha fapate chu Amrama te, Izhara te, Hebrona te, Uziela te an ni a; tin Kohatha dam chhung chu kum 133 a ni." 
Exodus6:19 Tin, Meraria fapate chu Mahalia leh Musia an ni. hengte hi an thlahte ang zela Levia hnamte chu an ni." 
Exodus6:20 Tin, Amrama chuan a pa farnu Jokebedi nupuiah a nei a; tin, Arona leh Mosia a hrinsak a: tin, Amrama dam chhung kum chu kum 137 a ni." 
Exodus6:21 Tin, Izhara fapate chu Kora te, Nephega te, Zikria te an ni." 
Exodus6:22 Tin, Uziela fapate chu Misaela te, Elzaphana te, Sithria te an ni." 
Exodus6:23 Tin, Arona chuan Aminadaba fanu, Nasona, farnu Elisebi chu nupuiah a nei a; tin, Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te a hrinsak a." 
Exodus6:24 Tin, Kora fapate chu Asira te, Elkana te, Abiasapha te an ni; hengte hi Kora ho hnamte chu an ni." 
Exodus6:25 Tin, Arona fapa Eleazara chuan Putiela fanute zinga mi pakhat chu nupuiah a nei a; tin, Phinehasa a hrinsak a. Tin, hengte hi an hnam ang zela Levia thlah bulpui berte chu an ni." 
Exodus6:26 Chu mi Arona leh Mosia te chu an ni LALPA'n, ""Aigupta ram ata Israela thlahte hi an pawlho ang zelin hruai chhuak rawh u,"" tia a hrilh ni." 
Exodus6:27 Chu mite chu an ni Aigupta lal Pharaoa va biaa, Israela thlahte chu Aigupta ram ata chhuahtir tura va betute chu: chu mite chu Mosia leh Arona chu an ni." 
Exodus6:28 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Aigupta rama LALPA'n Mosia a biak ni chuan," 
Exodus6:29 LALPA chuan, ""Kei LALPA chu ka ni: Aigupta ram lal Pharaoa hnenah chuan i hnena ka sawi zawng zawng hi sawi rawh,"" tiin Mosia chu a bia a.Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA hmaah, ""Ngai teh, kei mi tawng mawh ka ni si a, tichuan keia thusawi tehlul hi Pharaoan engtin nge a ngaihthlak ang ni?"" a ti a." 
Exodus6:30 Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA hmaah, ""Ngai teh, kei mi tawng mawh ka ni si a, tichuan keia thusawi tehlul hi Pharaoan engtin nge a ngaihthlak ang ni?"" a ti a." 
Exodus7:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Pharaoa tan pathianah ka siam tawh che alawm: tin, i unau Arona chu i zawlnei a ni ang." 
Exodus7:2 Thu ka pek apiang che chu i sawi chhuak zel ang a; tin, i unau Aronan Pharaoa a ram ata Israela thlahte chhuahtir turin a hrilh ang." 
Exodus7:3 Tin, Pharaoa thinlung chu ka tikhauh ang a, tin, ka chhinchhiahna leh ka thilmakte chu Aigupta ramah hian ka tipung ang." 
Exodus7:4 Nimahsela Pharaoan in thu a pawm duh lo ang, tin, Aigupta ram chhungah hian ka kut ka nghat ang a, anmahni chu nasa taka ngaihtuahin ka mi Israela thlahte, ka pawlhote hi Aigupta ram ata chu ka hruai chhuak ang." 
Exodus7:5 Tin, Aigupta mite chuan, Aigupta ram chhungah hian ka kut ka nghat ang a, anmahni chu nasa taka ngaihtuahin ka mi Israela thlahte, ka pawlhote hi Aigupta ram chunga ka kut ka han phar a, an zing ata Israela thlahte ka hruai chhuah hunah zet chuan kei hi LALPA chu ka ni tih an la hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus7:6 Tin, Mosia leh Aronan chutiang chuan an ti a; LALPA'n anmahni thu a pek ang ngei chuan an ti ta a." 
Exodus7:7 Tin, Pharaoa an va biak lai khan Mosia chu kum 80 mi a ni a, tin, Arona chu kum 83 mi a ni." 
Exodus7:8 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona hnenah, ""Pharaoan, 'Thil mak han ti teh u,' a lo tih che u chuan nangin Arona hnenah, 'I tiang kha la la, Pharaoa hmaah paih ang che, tichuan rulah a lo chang dawn nia,' ti ang che,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus7:9 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona hnenah, ""Pharaoan, 'Thil mak han ti teh u,' a lo tih che u chuan nangin Arona hnenah, 'I tiang kha la la, Pharaoa hmaah paih ang che, tichuan rulah a lo chang dawn nia,' ti ang che,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus7:10 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu Pharaoa hnenah an va lut a, tin, LALPA thupek ang chuan an han ti a: tin, Arona chuan a tiang chu Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawhte hmaah chuan a han paih a, tin, rulah a chang ta a." 
Exodus7:11 Chutichuan Pharaoa pawh chuan mi fingte leh dawithiamte chu a ko ve a: tin, anni, Aigupta rama mitlak dawithiamte pawh chuan chutiang bawkin an dawina chuan an han ti ve a." 
Exodus7:12 An tiang chu an han paih theuh a, rulah a chang theuh a ni: amaherawhchu Arona tiang chuan an tiangte chu a lem zo ta vek a." 
Exodus7:13 Tin, Pharaoa thinlung chu tihkhauhin a awm a, tichuan an thu chu a ngaithla duh ta lo a; LALPA'n a lo sawi tawh ang khan." 
Exodus7:14 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Pharaoa thinlung hi tihluhlulin a lo awm ta a, mite chu a chhuahtir phal lo a." 
Exodus7:15 Pharaoa hnenah chuan zingah va kal ang che; ngai teh, tuiah a kal thin a, tin, amah hmuh tumin lui kamah ding ang che; tin, i tiang rula chang kha keng ang che." 
Exodus7:16 Tin, a hnenah, 'LALPA, Hebraite Pathianin, ka mite hian thlalerah ka rawng an bawl theihna turin rawn kaltir rawh, tiin i hnenah mi a tir a ni e: tin, ngai teh, tun thlengin i la ngaithla duh lo a." 
Exodus7:17 chuvangin LALPA'n, he miah hian kei LALPA chu ka ni tih i hria ang: ngai teh, he mi ka tiang ken hian luia tuite hi ka han vua ang a, tichuan thisenah a lo chang mai ang." 
Exodus7:18 Tin, luia sanghate chu an thi ang a, tin, lui chu a uih hluah hluah ang; tichuan Aigupta miten luia tui chu an in lo ang, a ti e,' ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus7:19 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Arona hnenah, 'I tiang keng la, Aigupta ram tui chungah te, an dil chungah te chuan thisena a lo chan vekna turin phar rawh, tichuan Aigupta ram chhung zawng zawngah, thing kuangahte leh lung kuangahte chuan thisen a awm vek mai ang,' ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus7:20 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chuan LALPA thupek ang chuan an han ti a; tin, tiang chu a han lek a, Pharaoa mithmuhah leh a chhiahhlawhte mithmuhah chuan luia tui chu a han vua a; tichuan luia tui zawng zawngte chu thisenah a chang ta vek a." 
Exodus7:21 Tin, luia sanghate chu an thi ta vek a; tin, lui chu a uih ta hluah hluah a, tichuan Aigupta mite chuan luia tui chu an in thei ta lo a; tin, thisen chu Aigupta ram chhung zawng zawngah chuan a awm zo ta vek a." 
Exodus7:22 Tin, Aigupta rama mitlak dawithiamte pawh chuan an dawi hmangin chutiang bawk chuan an han ti ve a: tin, Pharaoa thinlung chu tihkhauhin a awm a, tichuan an thu chu a ngaithla duh ta lo a; LALPA'n a sawi tawh ang khan." 
Exodus7:23 Tin, Pharaoa chu a in lamah chuan a hawng ta a, chung pawh chu a thinlungah a lungkham chuang hauh lo mai a." 
Exodus7:24 Tin, Aigupta mi zawng zawngte chuan tui in atan lui kam velte chu an lai chiam a; lui tui chu an in thei si lo a.Tin, LALPA'n lui a vuak achin chu ni sarih zet a tling a ni." 
Exodus7:25 Tin, LALPA'n lui a vuak achin chu ni sarih zet a tling a ni." 
Exodus8:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia chu a bia a, a hnenah, ""Pharaoa hnenah va lut la, a hnenah, 'LALPA'n, ka mite hian ka rawng an bawl theihna'n chhuahtir rawh." 
Exodus8:2 Tin, i chhuahtir phal loh zawngin, ngai teh, i ram chin zawng zawng hi chunguin ka hrem ang:" 
Exodus8:3 tin, lui chu chunguin a khat mur mur ang a, chungute chu i inah hian an lo lut chho ang a, i mutna pindanah te, i khumah te, i chhiahhlawhte in chhungah te, i mite zingah te, i thukah te, i chhang hmehna thleng chhungah te an awm noh noh vang:" 
Exodus8:4 tichuan chungute chu nangmah leh i mite leh i chhiahhlawhtechungah chuan an vak noh noh mai ang, a ti e,' ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:5 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah; ""Arona hnenah, 'I tiang kha i kutin luichungah te, luitechungah te leh tui tlinnachungah te lek langin, Aigupta ramah hian Chungu rawn lentir chiam ang che,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:6 Tin, Arona chuan Aigupta ram luichungahte chuan a kut a han phar a; tichuan chunguchu an lo chhuak a, Aigupta ram khahin a khat zo ta a." 
Exodus8:7 Tin, mitlak dawithiamte pawh chuan an dawi hmangin chutiang bawk chuan an han ti ve a, Aigupta ramah chuan chungute chu an han tichhuak ve a." 
Exodus8:8 Chutichuan Pharaoa chuan Mosia leh Arona chu a kohtir a, an hnenah, ""Ka hnen atang leh ka mite hnen atanga Chungu hi la bo turin LALPA hnenah ngen teh u; tichuan LALPA hnena an inthawi theihna turin mite hi ka chhuahtir ang e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:9 Tin, Mosia chuan Pharaoa hnenah, ""nangin he chawimawina hi hlawh zawk ang che hmiang: i hnen atang leh i in atangtea chungute chu tihborala a awm a, lui chauha a awmna turin, nangmah leh i chhiahhlawhte leh i mite tan chuan engtik atan nge ka ngen ang?"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:10 Tin, ani chuan, ""Naktuk atan le,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""I thu ang chuan ni ang hmiang: tichuan LALPA, kan Pathian ang reng reng hi tumah an awm lo tih i hria ang." 
Exodus8:11 Tin, chungute chuan nangmah leh i inte leh i chhiahhlawhte leh i mite chu an chhuahsan vek ang che u a; luiah chauh an awm tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:12 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu Pharaoa chunga chungu a rawn lentir chungchang thu-ah chuan LALPA hnenah a ngen a." 
Exodus8:13 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia thu ang chuan a ti a; tin, in chhunga mi te, in hung chhung kawtlaia mi te leh loa mi chungute chu an thi fai ta vek a." 
Exodus8:14 Tin, an chhar khawm a, an dah vum thur mai a: tichuan a ram uihin a lo uih ta a." 
Exodus8:15 Nimahsela Pharaoa chuan engthawlna a lo awm ta tih a hriat veleh, a thinlung a tikhauh a, tichuan an thu chu a ngaithla duh ta lo a; LALPA'n a lo sawi tawh ang khan." 
Exodus8:16 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Arona hnenah, 'I tiang kha lek la, leia vaivut hi vaw rawh, Aigupta ram zawng zawnga vaivut hi thosia a lo chan theih nan,' ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:17 Tin, chutiang chuan an han ti a; Arona chuan a tiang chu a kutin a han lek a, tin, leia vaivut chu a han vua a, tin, mihring chungah leh sa chungah chuan thosi chu a awm ta mur mur a; Aigupta ram chhung zawng zawnga leia vaivut zawng zawng chu thosiah a chang zo ta vek a." 
Exodus8:18 Tin, mitlak dawithiamte pawhin an dawi hmangin thosi tihchhuah an han tum a, nimahsela an thei lo: tin, mihring chungah leh sa chungah chuan thosi chu a awm ta mur mur a." 
Exodus8:19 Chutichuan mitlak dawithiamte chuan Pharaoa hnenah, ""Hei hi Pathian kut zungtang a nih hi,"" an ti a: tichuan Pharaoa thinlung chu tihkhauhin a awm a, an thu chu a ngaithla duh lo a; LALPA'n a lo sawi ang khan." 
Exodus8:20 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""zing takah tho la, Pharaoa hmaah va ding ang che; ngai teh, tuiah a lo kal thin a, tin, a hnenah, 'LALPA'n, ka mite hian ka rawng an bawl theihna'n chhuahtir rawh." 
Exodus8:21 Chutilozawng, ka mite i chhuahtir phal loh zawngin, ngai teh, ichungah leh i chhiahhlawhte chungah leh i mite chungah leh, i in chhungahte chuan tho tam tak ka rawn tir chiam ang a: tichuan Aigupta mite inte leh an chenna lei zawng zawngte pawh chu tho hlirin a khat ang." 
Exodus8:22 Tin, chu mi ni chuan ka mite awmna Gosen ram chu ka tihrang ang, chutah chuan tho reng reng a awm ve loh nan; tichuan leichungah hian kei hi LALPA chu ka ni tih in lo hre thei ang." 
Exodus8:23 Tin, ka mite leh i mite chu ka thliar ang a: naktukah he chhinchhiahna hi a lo awm ang, a ti e,' ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:24 Tin, LALPA'n chutiang chuan a ti a; tichuan Pharaoa inah leh a chhiahhlawhte inah te leh Aigupta ram zawng zawngah te chuan tho tam pui mai chu an lut ta chiam a: tho tam tak chuan ram chu a tichhe chiam a." 
Exodus8:25 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Mosia leh Arona a kohtir a, an hnenah, ""Kal ta u la, he ramah hian in Pathian hnenah chuan va inthawi mai tawh u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:26 Tin, Mosia chuan, ""Chutiang tih chu a fel hlei nem! Aigupta miten thiang lo an tihte chuan LALPA kan Pathian hnenah kan inthawi dawn zuk nia: ngai teh, Aigupta mite mithmuhah hian thiang lo an tihte chuan kan inthawi dawn em ni ang? Lungin min deng mai dawn lo'm ni?" 
Exodus8:27 thlaler ni thum kalah chuan kan va kal ang a, LALPA kan Pathianin tih tura min pek ang angin a hnenah kan va inthawi ang e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:28 Tin, Pharaoa chuan, ""thlalera LALPA in Pathian hnena in inthawi theihna turin ka kaltir ang che u chu; amaherawhchu in kal hla vak tur a ni lo e: mi ngensak ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:29 Tin, Mosia chuan, ""Ngai teh, i hnen atang chuan ka chhuak dawn a ni a, naktukah hian Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawhte leh amite chu tho tam pui hian a chhuahsan theihna turin LALPA hnenah ka ngen ang e: amaherawhchu mite LALPA hnena an inthawi chu Pharaoa hian phal loin, tihder leh tawh lul suh se,"" a ti a." 
Exodus8:30 Tin, Mosia chu Pharaoa hnen ata a chhuak a, tichuan LALPA hnenah a ngen ta a." 
Exodus8:31 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia thu ang chuan a ti a; tichuan Pharaoa hnen ata leh a chhiahhlawhte hnen ata leh a mite hnen ata tho tam pui chu a tikiang ta a; pakhat mah a awm ta lo a.Tin, Pharaoa chuan chu mi tum pawh chuan a thinlung a tikhauh leh a, tichuan mite chu a chhuahtir phal ta lo a." 
Exodus8:32 Tin, Pharaoa chuan chu mi tum pawh chuan a thinlung a tikhauh leh a, tichuan mite chu a chhuahtir phal ta lo a." 
Exodus9:1 Chutichuan LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Pharaoa hnenah va lut la, 'LALPA, Hebraite Pathianin, ka mite hian ka rawng an bawl theihna'n chhuahtir rawh." 
Exodus9:2 I chhuahtir phal loh a, i la hren reng zawngin," 
Exodus9:3 ngai teh, phula i rante chungah chuan LALPA kut a awm dawn a ni, sakawr chungah te, sabengtung chungah te, sanghawngsei chungah te, bawng rualchungah te, beram tualchungah te chuan: hri nasa tak mai a lo leng ang." 
Exodus9:4 Tin, LALPA'n Israel-ho ran leh Aigupta mite ran chu a tihrang ang a; tichuan Israela thlahte ta chu pakhat mah a thi lo ang, a ti e,' tiin hrilh rawh,"" a ti a." 
Exodus9:5 Tin, LALPA chuan ""Naktukah LALPA'n he ramah hian chutiang chu a ti dawn e,"" tiin hun a ruat ta a." 
Exodus9:6 Tin, LALPA chuan atukah chutiangin a ti ta a, tichuan Aigupta mite ran zawng zawng chu a thi ta vek a; nimahsela Israela thlahte ran chu pakhat mah a thi ve lo a." 
Exodus9:7 Tin, Pharaoa chuan mi a tir a, tin, ngai teh, Israel mite ran chu pakhat mah a lo thi ve ta lo a. Nimahsela Pharaoa thinlung chu tiluhlulin a awm a, mite chu a chhuahtir phal ta lo a." 
Exodus9:8 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona hnenah, ""Rawhtuina meia mi vut va thum u la Pharaoa mithmuhah Mosia'n van lamah teh chiam rawh se." 
Exodus9:9 Tin, Aigupta ram zawng zawng chungah hian vut dip takah a lo chang ang a, tin, chu chuan Aigupta ram chhung zawng zawnga mi leh sa chu khawihli a veitir theuh ang a, a durh leu chiam ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus9:10 Tin, rawhtuina meia vut chu an la a, Pharaoa hmaah chuan an va ding a; tin, Mosia chuan van lamah a han teh chiam a; tichuan mi tin leh sa tinin khawihli durh leu an lo vei ta vek a." 
Exodus9:11 Tin, khawihli avang chuan mitlak dawithiamte chuan Mosia chu an chelh ta lo a; mitlak dawithiamte leh Aigupta mi zawng zawngte chuan khawihli chu an vei vek si a." 
Exodus9:12 Tin, LALPA'n Pharaoa thinlulng chu a tihkhauhsak a; tichuan an thu chu a ngaithla duh ta lo a; LALPA'n Mosia hnena a sawi tawh ang khan." 
Exodus9:13 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""zing takah tho la, Pharaoa hmaah va ding la, tin, a hnenah, 'LALPA, Hebraite Pathianin, ka miten ka rawng an bawl theihna'n chhuahtir rawh." 
Exodus9:14 Tun tumah zawng i chungah leh i chhiahhlawhte chungah leh, i mite chungah hian ka hril zawng zawngte hi ka lentir dawn e; tichuan khawvel zawng zawngah hian keimah ang reng reng hi tumah an awm lo tih i hria ang." 
Exodus9:15 Chuti ni suh se la, ka kut ka thawh ang a, nang leh i mite hi hriin ka hrem ang a, khawvel ata hi ka tiboral daih tawh tur che a ni:" 
Exodus9:16 nimahsela he mi avang ngawt hian ka tungding chia, ka thiltihtheihna entir tur che leh khawvel zawng zawnga ka hming a lo than theih nan." 
Exodus9:17 Ka mite lakah hian i la induh cheuin, i la chhuahtir lo ang maw?" 
Exodus9:18 ngai teh, naktuk hetih hunah hian rial tam pui, Aigupta ram a lo awm tirh ata, tun thleng pawha la tla ngai lo chu ka tlaktir ang." 
Exodus9:19 Chutichuan phula i rante leh i neih apiangte chu khungtir thuai rawh khai; mi tin leh sa tin phula awm, ina khung loh tawh phawt chu, rialin a deng ang a, an thi ang, a ti e,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Exodus9:20 Pharaoa chhiahhlawhte zinga LALPA thu pawisa apiang chuan an chhiahhlawhte leh an rante chu in chhungah an tlan luhtir a: 
Exodus9:21 tin, LALPA thu ngaisang lo apiang chuan an chhiahhlawhte leh an rante chu phulah chuan an awmtir mai a." 
Exodus9:22 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia hnenah, ""van lamah i kut han lek rawh, Aigupta ram zawng zawngah hian mihring chungah te, sa chungah te, Aigupta ram chhunga loa thlai tinreng chungah te chuan rial a lo tlak nan,"" a ti a." 
Exodus9:23 Tin, Mosia chuan a tiang chu van lamah a han lek a: tin, LALPA chuan khawpui ri leh rial a zuk tir a, tin, leiah chuan mei te a lo tla a; tichuan LALPA'n Aigupta ramchungah chuan rial a tlaktir chiam a." 
Exodus9:24 Chutichuan rial, mei leh riala inpawlh, nasa em em mai, Aigupta ram zawng zawngah chuan, Aigupta hnam lo awm a chin, chutiang reng reng la awm ngai lo chu a lo awm ta a." 
Exodus9:25 Tin, rial chuan Aigupta ram zawng zawnga phula awm zawng zawng, mihringte leh sate chu a deng a; tin, rial chuan loa thlai tinrengte chu a deng a, phula thing tinrengte chu a titliak vek a." 
Exodus9:26 Gosen ram, Israela thlahte awmnaah chauh chuan rial a tla ve lo a." 
Exodus9:27 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Mosia leh Arona chu a kohtir a, an hnenah, ""Tun tum zawng thil ka tisual ta a ni e: LALPA chu mi fel a ni a, kei leh ka mite hi kan sual a ni e." 
Exodus9:28 LALPA hnenah ngen rawh u; he'ng khawpui ri dur durte leh rialte hi a tawk tawh e; tichuan ka chhuahtir ang che u a, in awm tawh lo ang e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus9:29 Tin, Mosia'n a hnenah, ""Khua ata hi ka chhuah veleh, LALPA lamah ka kut ka phar ang a, khawpui rite chu a reh ang a, rial pawh a awm tawh hek lo ang; tichuan lei hi LALPA ta a ni tih i hria ang." 
Exodus9:30 Nimahsela nang leh i chhiahhlawhteho hi zawngin LALPA Pathian hi in la tih chuang lo tih ka hria a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus9:31 Nimahsela buh leh vai buhtun chu a deng chhe lo, a la to rih loh avangin." 
Exodus9:32 Tin, Mosia chu Pharaoa hnen atangin khua ata chu a chhuak a, tin, LALPA lamah a kut a phar a: tichuan khawpui rite leh rial tla chu a lo bang ta a, tin, leichungah ruah pawh chu a baw tlawrh tlawrh ta lo a." 
Exodus9:33 Tin, Pharaoan ruah leh rial leh khawpui rite chu a bang ta tih a hriat veleh, a sual leh ta sauh a, amah leh a chhiahhlawhte nen an thinlung an tikhauh ta a.Tin, Pharaoa thinlung chu tihkhauhin a awm a, tichuan Israela thlahte chu a chhuahtir phal ta lo a; LALPA'n Mosia hmanga a lo sawi tawh ang khan." 
Exodus9:34 Tin, Pharaoa thinlung chu tihkhauhin a awm a, tichuan Israela thlahte chu a chhuahtir phal ta lo a; LALPA'n Mosia hmanga a lo sawi tawh ang khan." 
Exodus10:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Pharaoa hnenah va lut rawh: a thinlung leh a chhiahhlawh thinlung chu ka tihkhauhsak tawh e, he'ng ka chhinchhiahnate hi an zingah ka entir theihna turin;" 
Exodus10:2 tin, nang pawhin i fa leh i fa fate benga Aigupta ram chunga thil ka tihzia leh, an zinga ka chhinchhiahnate ka tihzia hi i hrilh theihna turin; kei LALPA chu ka tih in hriat theih nan,"" a ti a." 
Exodus10:3 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu Pharaoa hnenah an va lut a, a hnenah, ""LALPA, Hebraite Pathianin, 'Ka hmaah eng chen nge inngaithlawm duh loa awm i tum ni? Ka mite hian ka rawng an bawl theihna'n chhuahtir rawh." 
Exodus10:4 Chutia ka mite i chhuahtir phal loh zawngin, ngai teh, nak tukah i ram chhungah hian khaukhuapte ka rawn lentir ang a:" 
Exodus10:5 tin, lei chung hi an dap vek ang a, tumahin lei reng reng hi an hmu thei lo vang: tin, rialin a tihchhiat bak, in hnena la awmate hi an ei ang a, phula in thing to apiangte chu an ei vek ang:" 
Exodus10:6 tin, i inte leh I chhiahhlawh zawng zawng inte leh Aigupta mi zawng zawng inte chu a khat vek ang; i thlahtute leh i thlahtute thlahtute pawhin khawvela an lo awm achin tun thleng pawhin chutiang chu an la hmu ngai lo a ni,' a ti e,"" an ti a. Tin, a lehhawi a, Pharaoa hnen ata chu a chhuak ta a." 
Exodus10:7 Tin, Pharaoa chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnenah, ""Hei hi kan tan eng chen nge maw thanga a awm dawn le? Hengho hian LALPA an Pathian rawng an bawl theihna'n kaltir ta mai che maw le: Aigupta ram hi tihchhiat a nih tawh hi i la hre lo em ni?"" an ti a." 
Exodus10:8 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu Pharaoa hnenah an hruai leh a; tin, an hnenah, ""Kal ula, LALPA in Pathian rawng chu va bawl tawh u: amaherawhchu tute nge ni kal tur chu?"" a ti a." 
Exodus10:9 Tin, Mosia'n, ""Apui apangin kan kal ang, kan fapate leh kan fanute nen, kan beram rualte leh kan bawng rualte nen kan kal ang: LALPA hnenah kan kut ngei tur a ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Exodus10:10 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""LALPA chu in hnenah awm ang hmiang! In fanu te tete nen chuan ka kaltir mawlh ang che u le; inngaihtuah rawh u khai, thil sual tih in tum a nih hi le." 
Exodus10:11 Hnai lo e! nangi mipaho erawh chu kal u la, LALPA rawng chu bawl rawh u' chu chu alawm in duh,"" a ti a. Tin, Pharaoa hnen ata chu an hnawt chhuak ta a." 
Exodus10:12 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Aigupta ramchungah hian khaukhuapte rawn lentir turin i kut phar rawh, Aigupta ramah hian an lo chhoh a, he rama thlai tinreng, rial den chhiat bak zawng zawngte nen lam pawha an ei theihna turin,"" a ti a." 
Exodus10:13 Tin, Mosia'n Aigupta ramchungah chuan a tiang chu a han lek a, tin, LALPA'n chu mi ni, nileng leh zankhuain chu mi ramah chuankhawchhak thli a rawn tlehtir a; tin, atukah chuan khawchhak thli chuan khaukhuap a rawn len a." 
Exodus10:14 Tin, khaukhuapte chu Aigupta ram zawng zawng chungah chuan an leng a, tin, Aigupta ram chhung zawng zawngah chuan an fu a; an tam em em mai a; tun hmain khaukhuap chutiang reng reng a la awm ngai lo a, tun hnuah pawh chutiang reng reng chu a awm leh tawh lo ang." 
Exodus10:15 Lei chung zawng zawng hi an dap vek mai si a, tichuan ram chu a thimin a thim mup mai a ni; tin, rial den chhiat bak, chu mi rama thlai tinreng leh theirah zawng zawngte chu an ei vek a: tichuan Aigupta ram chhung zawng zawngah chuan lovah thil hring reng reng, thing pawh thlai pawh a awm ta hauh lo mai a." 
Exodus10:16 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Mosia leh Arona chu hmanhmawh takin a kohtir a, an hnenah. ""LALPA in Pathian chungah leh nangmahni chungah thil ka lo tisual ta e." 
Exodus10:17 Chutichuan ka sual hi tun tumah chauh hian ngaidam ang che, ka ngen a che, he thihna hi mi lak bosak phawt mai turin, LALPA in Pathian hnenah ngen ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus10:18 Tin, Pharaoa hnen ata chu a kal chhuak a, LALPA hnenah chuan a ngen ta a." 
Exodus10:19 Tin, LALPA chuan khawthlang thli na tak mai a rawn tlehtir a, chu chuan khaukhuapte chu a len a, Tuifinriat Senah a len thla ta vek a; Aigupta ramri chhung zawng zawngah chuan khuakhuap pakhat mah a awm ta lo a." 
Exodus10:20 Nimahsela LALPA'n Pharaoa thinlung chu a tihkhauhsak a, tichuan Israela thlahte chu a chhuahtir phal ta lo a." 
Exodus10:21 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Van lamah i kut han lek rawh, Aiguptachungah hian a lo thim khup a, ai mit thlawn ang maia a lo thimna turin,"" a ti a." 
Exodus10:22 Tin, Mosia chuan a kut chu van lamah an han lek a; tin, Aigupta ram chhung zawng zawng chu ni thum chhung zet a thim mup a;" 
Exodus10:23 tumah reng reng an inhmu thei ta lo a, tumah mahni hmun ata ni thum chhung zet chu an tawlhsawn thei lo bawk a: Israela thlahte zawng zawng awmna erawh chu a eng vek a." 
Exodus10:24 Tin, Pharaoan Mosia a kohtir a, a hnenah, ""Kal ta u la, LALPA rawng chu va bawl tawh u; in beram rualte leh in bawng rualte erawh chu awm se la: in fanau te tete pawh in hnenah kal ve rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Exodus10:25 Tin, Mosia'n, ""LALPA kan Pathian hnena kan inthawi theihna turin inthawina turte leh halral thilhlan turte chu nangin kan kutah min pe tel ve bawk tur a ni." 
Exodus10:26 Kan rante chu kan hnenah an kal ve bawk tur a ni; ran reng reng chu pakhat mah kan hnutchhiah lo ang; chung zinga mi chu LALPA kan Pathian rawng kan bawlna'n kan hman ngei ngei tur a ni si a; chu mi hmun kan va thlen hma loh chuan engin nge LALPA rawng kan bawl ang tih kan la inhre lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus10:27 Nimahsela LALPA'n Pharaoa thinlung chu a tihkhauhsak a, tichuan a chhuahtir phal ta lo a." 
Exodus10:28 Tin, Pharaoan a hnenah, ""Ka hnen ata hi chhuak daih la, fimkhur rawh khai, ka hmel reng reng rawn hmu tawh hlek suh; ka hmel i hmuh ni la la chuan i thi ngei tur a ni,"" a ti a.Tin, Mosia chuan, ""I sawi dik zet mai; i hmel zawng hmuh ni ka nei leh tawh lo vang e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus10:29 Tin, Mosia chuan, ""I sawi dik zet mai; i hmel zawng hmuh ni ka nei leh tawh lo vang e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus11:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah chuan, ""Pharaoa chungah leh Aigupta ram chungah hian vawi khat chu hri ka han lentir leh ang e; chu mi hnuah zawng a chhuahtir tawh ang che u: a chhuahtir vek vek che u zawngin heta ta hi a hnawt chhuak daih mai ang che u." 
Exodus11:2 Chutichuan mipuite bengah hian thu va sawi rawh, mipa leh hmeichhe tinin an vengte chu tangkaraw incheina leh rangkachak incheinate chu dil rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Exodus11:3 Tin, LALPA'n mite chu Aigupta mite a khawngaihtir ta a. Chu chang a ni lo a, Mosia chu Aigupta ramah chuan Pharaoa chhiahhlawhteho ngaihah leh mipuite ngaihah chuan mi ropui tak a ni a." 
Exodus11:4 Tin, Mosia chuan, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti, 'Zan lai velah chuan Aigupta ram chhungah hian ka lo kal tlang ang a:" 
Exodus11:5 tichuan Aigupta rama fa tir zawng zawng lalthutphaha thu Pharaoa fa tir atanga buh rawt sawmna bula awm bawihnu fa tir lam pawhin an thi ang, ran piang hmasa ber zawng zawngte nen." 
Exodus11:6 Tin, Aigupta ram chhung zawng zawngah chuan tahna nasa tak a awm ang a, chutianga nasa reng reng a la awm ngai lo a, chutiang reng reng chu a awm leh tawh hek lo ang." 
Exodus11:7 Nimahsela Israela thlahteho zawng mihring leh sa lamah reng reng ui pawhin a lei a phut lo ang: LALPA chuan Aigupta mite leh Israela mite hi a thliar ngei a ni tih in hria ang. 
Exodus11:8 Tin, he'ng i chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte hi ka hnenah an lo chhuak ang a. Chhuak rawh, i hnung zuitute zawng zawng nen hian, tiin ka hmaah an kun ang: tin, chu mi hnuah chuan ka chhuak ang,' tiin,"" a ti a. Pharaoa hnen ata chu thinrim zet maiin a chhuak ta a." 
Exodus11:9 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah chuan, ""Pharaoan in thu a pawm lo ang: ka thil makte Aigupta ramah hian tihpuna a awm theih nan,"" a ti a.Tin, Mosia leh Arona chuan Pharaoa hmaah chuan chung thilmak zawng zawngte chu an ti a: tin, LALPA'n Pharaoa thinlung chu a tihkhauhsak a, tichuan Israela thlahte chu a ram ata a chhuahtir phal lo a." 
Exodus11:10 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chuan Pharaoa hmaah chuan chung thilmak zawng zawngte chu an ti a: tin, LALPA'n Pharaoa thinlung chu a tihkhauhsak a, tichuan Israela thlahte chu a ram ata a chhuahtir phal lo a." 
Exodus12:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona chu Aigupta ramah chuan a bia a:" 
Exodus12:2 Tun thla hi in tan thla chhiar tanna a ni ang a: in tan kum khat chhunga thla chhiar tanna a ni ang. 
Exodus12:3 Israel-ho pung khawm zawng zawngte hnenah hian, 'Tun thla ni sawm ni takah hian mi tinin an chhungkaw khawsa ang zelin an chhungkua atan beram no pakhat la theuh se la:" 
Exodus12:4 tin, an chhungkua chu beram no talhna tham ni lo khawpa tlem lutuk an nih chuan, a thenawm nen an chhungkaw mihring zir zelin beram no pakhat intawm se la; mi tin ei tawk tur ang zel ngaihruatin beram no chu in ruat tur a ni." 
Exodus12:5 In beram no chu a pa, kum khat hnuai lam, hmelhem lo a ni tur a ni: beram zinga mi emaw kel zinga mi emaw a ni tur a ni a:" 
Exodus12:6 tin, chu mi thla ni sawm leh ni li ni thlengin in dah tur a ni a: tichuan Israel-ho pung khawm zawng zawng chuan tlai lamah an talh tur a ni." 
Exodus12:7 Tin, a thisen chu an la ang a, an eina tur in kawngka biang pahnihah leh kawngka lu chungah an tat tur a ni." 
Exodus12:8 Tin, chu mi zan chuan a sa chu rawh se la, chhang dawidim telh loh nen ei rawh se; hnim kha nen an ei tur a a ni." 
Exodus12:9 Tin, a helin ei suh se la, tui pawhin chhum hauh suh se la, a rawhin rawh zawk rawh se, a lu leh a ke chawpin, a kawchhung nen." 
Exodus12:10 Tin, atuk atan chuan engmah in dah tur a ni lo a; atuk thlenga a bang la awm chu meiah in rawh ral tur a ni." 
Exodus12:11 Tin, hetiangin in ei tur a ni; in puan vengin, pheikhawk bunin, tiang kengin; tin, hmanhmawh takin in ei tur a ni; LALPA kalhlen a ni dawn si a." 
Exodus12:12 Chu mi zan chuan Aigupta ram chhung chu ka fang dawn si a, Aigupta rama fa tir zawng zawng, mi leh sa chu ka tihlum ang a; Aigupta rama pathian zawng zawngte chu an ro ka relsak ang: LALPA ka nih hi." 
Exodus12:13 Tin, thisen chu un tan in awmna inchhinchhiahna a ni anfg a; tin, thisen chu ka hmuh chuan ka kal hlen ang che u a, tichuan Aigupta ram ka hrem hunah chuan nangmahni tiboraltu tur inchungah hri reng reng a lo leng lo ang." 
Exodus12:14 Tin, he mi ni hi in tan hriat rengna ni a ni ang a, LALPA tan kut niah in ruat tur a ni: in thlahte thlengin kumkhaw thuruat atana awm reng turin kut niah in hmang tur a ni." 
Exodus12:15 Ni sarih chhung chu chhang dawidim telh loh in ei tur a ni a: ni khat ni atang reng chuan in in chhung ata dawidim chu in thian fai vek tur a ni: tupawh ni khat ni thlenga chhang dawidim telh ei apiang chu, chu mi chu Israel-ho zing ata tihboral a ni ang." 
Exodus12:16 Tin, ni khat niah chuan inkohkhawmna thianghlim in nei ang a, tin, a ni sarih niin inkohkhawmna thianghlim a awm leh ang; mi tinin an mamawh ei tur buatsaih tih loh chu chu mi chhung chuan hna reng reng thawh hlek tur a ni lo, ei tur buatsaih chauh tihthian a ni ang." 
Exodus12:17 Tin, chhang dawidim telh loh kut ni chu in serh tur a ni, chu mi ni ngei chuan Aigupta ram ata in mipuihote chu ka hruai chhuak si che u a: chuvangin in thlahte thlengin kumkhaw thuruat atana awm reng turin chu mi ni chu in serh tur a ni." 
Exodus12:18 Thla khatna, chu mi thla ni sawm leh ni li ni, tlai lamah chuan chhang dawidim telh loh chu in ei ang a, chu mi thla ni sawmhnih leh ni khat ni tlai tlengin." 
Exodus12:19 Ni sarih chhung chu in in chhungah reng reng dawidim a awm tur a ni lo a; tupawh dawidim telh ei apiang chu, chu mi chu hnam dang pawh, in rama piang pawh ni se la, Israel-ho pung khawm zing ata hi tihboral tur a ni ang." 
Exodus12:20 Dawidim telh reng reng chu in ei tur a ni lo a: in chenna hmun apiangah chuan chhang dawidim telh loh in ei tur a ni,' tiin sawi ang che,"" tiin." 
Exodus12:21 Tin, Mosia'n Israel upaho zawng zawng chu a koh khawmtir a, tin, an hnenah, ""chhungkaw tinin beram notete chu va la chhuak ta u la, kalhlunna tur talh rawh u." 
Exodus12:22 Tin, husop kau in la ang a, tin, maihuna thisenah chuan in zu hnim ang a, tin, kawngka luchungah leh kawngka biang pahnihah chuan maihuna thisen chu tat ang che u; tin, khawvar hma loh chuan tumah mahni in ata in chhuak tur a ni lo a." 
Exodus12:23 LALPA chu Aigupta mite tihlum turin a lo kal tlang dawn si a; tichuan kawngka lu Chung leh kawngka biang pahniha thisen kai a hmuh chuan LALPA chuan kawngka chu a kal hlen ang a, in in chhungah chuan nangmahni tihlum turin tiboraltu chu a rawn luhtir lo ang." 
Exodus12:24 Tin, hetiang hian nangmah leh i fate tana kumkhuaa thuruat awm reng turin in rawn ti thin tur a ni." 
Exodus12:25 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA'n pek a lo tiam tawh anga a pek che u ram chu in thlen hunin he rawngbawlna hi in zawm tur a ni." 
Exodus12:26 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, in faten in hnena, 'He rawngbawlna awmzia hi eng tihna nge ni ngai le?' an rawn tih chuan," 
Exodus12:27 nangnin, 'Hei hi LALPA kalhlen inthawina a nih, ani chuna Aigupta mite a tihhlum lai khan kan inte chu a rawn zuah a, Aigupta rama Israela thlahte in chu a rawn kal hlen a ni,' in la ti dawn nia,"" a ti a. Tin, mipuite chu an lu an kun a, chibai an buk ta a." 
Exodus12:28 Tin, Israela thlahte chu an kal a, chutiang chuan an ti a; LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona thu a pek ang chuan an ti ta a." 
Exodus12:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, zan laiah chuan LALPA chuan Aigupta rama fa tir zawng zawng lalthutphaha thu Pharaoa fa tir atanga rip chhunga tang fa tir lamin a zuk tihlum ta vek a, ran piang hmasa ber zawng zawngte nen." 
Exodus12:30 Tin, Pharaoa chu amah leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte leh Aigupta mi zawng zawngte nen zanah chuan an tho ta a; tin, Aigupta ramah chuan tahna nasa tak a awm a; mitthi awm lohna in reng reng pakhat mah a awm si lo a." 
Exodus12:31 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu a zan a zanin a kohtir a, ""Tho u la, ka miteho zing ata hi chhuak rawh u, nangmahni leh Israela thlahteho nen hian; tin, kal u la, in sawi ang khan LALPA rawng chu va bawl tawh u." 
Exodus12:32 In sawi ang khan in beram rualte leh in sebawng rualte pawh chu kalpui rawh u; kal tawh u; tin, kei pawh mal mi sawm ve bawk rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus12:33 Tin, Aigupta mite chuan zan chu mi ram ata chu hmanhmawh taka tir chhuak turin mite chu an tur ta chhen a; ""Kan thi vek a ni ta mai,"" an ti a." 
Exodus12:34 Tin, mite chuan an chhang hmehte chu dawidim an telh hmain an la a, an chhang hmehna thlengte chu an puanin an tuam a, an kokiah an bat ta mai a." 
Exodus12:35 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Mosia thu ang chuan an ti a; tin, Aigupta mite chu tangkaraw incheinate leh rangkachak incheinate leh, puante an dil a:" 
Exodus12:36 tin, LALPA chuan mite chu Aigupta mite a khawngaihtir a, chutichuan an dil apiang an neihtir zel a. Tin, Aigupta mite thil chu an rawksak ta a." 
Exodus12:37 Tin, Israela thlahte chu Rameses khua ata an chhuak a, Sukoth hmun thlengin an kal ta a, naupangte tiam lohin, mipa puitling hlir nuairuk lai kein an kal a." 
Exodus12:38 Tin, an hnenah chuan mipui inpawlhsawp tam tak an kal ve bawk a; tin, ran rual tam tak, beram leh bawngte an chhawm bawk a." 
Exodus12:39 Tin, Aigupta ram ata an ken chhuah chhang hmeh hmangin chhang, dawidim telh lohte chu an ur a, dawidim telh loh a ni si a; Aigupta ram chu hnawh chhuaha an awm avang leh, an awm rei theih tak loh a, ei tur takngial pawh an inbuatsaih hman tak loh avangin." 
Exodus12:40 Tichuan Israela thlahte Aigupta rama an awm chhung chu, kum 430 a ni." 
Exodus12:41 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum 430 a lo ral chuan, chu mi ni ngei chuan heti hi a ni a, LALPA mipuiho zawng zawngte chu Aigupta ram ata an chhuak ta a." 
Exodus12:42 Chu mi zan chuan Aigupta ram ata anmahni a hruai chhuah avangin LALPA tana zan serh tak ni tur a ni a: Israela thlahte zawng zawngin chhuan zawng zawng thlengin chu zan chu LALPA zan atan serh hle tur a ni. 
Exodus12:43 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona hnenah, ""Hei hi kalhlen thuruat dan tur a ni ang: hnam dang chuan an ei ve tur a ni lo a:" 
Exodus12:44 amaherawhchu miin a chhiahhlawh, tangkaa a lei tawhate chu a serh i tansak tawh phawt chuan a ei ve thei ang." 
Exodus12:45 Hnam dang leh chhiahhlawh rawihte erawh chuan an ei tur a ni lo a. 
Exodus12:46 In khatah ei tur a ni; pawn lamah a sa reng reng ken chhuah tur a ni lo; a ruh reng reng pawh in titliak tur a ni lo e. 
Exodus12:47 Israel-ho zawng zawngin an zawm tur a ni. 
Exodus12:48 Tin, hnam dang in hnena awm hian LALPA kalhlen hi tih ve a duh chuan, a mipa zawng zawngte serh tan ni se la, tichuan rawn ti ve rawh se; ani chu chu mi rama piang anga ngaih a ni ang: amaherawhchu serhtan loh mi chuan a ei hauh tur a ni lo." 
Exodus12:49 Chu mi rama piang leh, hnam dang in zinga awmte tan hian dan angkhat a awm tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus12:50 Israela thlahte zawng zawng chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona thu a pek ang ngei chuan an ti ta a.Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu mi ni ngei chuan LALPA'n Israela thlahte chu Aigupta ram ata mipuiho chu a hruai chhuak ta a ni." 
Exodus12:51 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu mi ni ngei chuan LALPA'n Israela thlahte chu Aigupta ram ata mipuiho chu a hruai chhuak ta a ni." 
Exodus13:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Exodus13:2 Israela thlahte zinga fa tir zawng chhul keu hmasa ber apiang, mihring pawh sa pawh ka tan serhah in ruat tur a ni; ka ta a ni e,"" tiin." 
Exodus13:3 Tin, Mosia'n mipuite hnenah chuan, ""Vawiin ni, Aigupta ram ata, bawih ata in chhuah ni hi hre reng ang che u; kut chak takin LALPA'n he mi hmun ata hi a hruai chhuah che u hi: chhang dawidim telh reng reng chu ei tur a ni lo e." 
Exodus13:4 Abib thla, vawiin ni hian in chhuak a ni." 
Exodus13:5 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA'n Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Amor-hote, Hiv-hote,Jebus-hote ram, khawizu leh hnutetuia luanna ram, in thlahtute chhechhama pek a tiamah khan a hruai thlen hunah che u chuan, he mi thla hian he rawngbawlna hi in zawm tur a ni." 
Exodus13:6 Ni sarih chhung chu chhang dawidim telh loh in ei tur a ni a, tin, a ni sarih ni chu LALPA tan kut ni a ni ang." 
Exodus13:7 Ni sarih chhung chuan chhang dawidim telh reng reng chu a awmin awm hlek suh se, in awmna hmunah reng reng dawidim pawh a awmin awm hlek suh se." 
Exodus13:8 Chu mi niah chuan in fate hnenah, 'Aigupta ram ata kan lo chhuah lai khan LALPA'n thil min lo tihsak vang a ni e,' tiin in hrilh tur a ni e." 
Exodus13:9 LALPA dan chu in kaa a awm reng theih nan, in kutah in tan chhinchhiahna leh in mit inkarah hian hriat rengna tur a ni ang: Kut chak takin LALPA'n Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuah che u hi." 
Exodus13:10 Chutichuan he thuruat hi kum tin a hun takah chuan in rawn zawm thin tur a ni. 
Exodus13:11 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA'n in hnenah leh in thlahtute hnena chhechhama pek a tiam tawh che u anga, Kanaan-hote rama a hruai thlen che u a, a pek hun che u chuan," 
Exodus13:12 chhul keu hmasa ber apiang leh in ran piang thla hmasa ber apiang chu LALPA tan in dah hrang zel tur a ni; a pate chu LALPA ta tur a ni ang. 
Exodus13:13 Sabengtung piang hmasa ber apiang chu beram noin in tlan tur a ni ang. In tlan duh loh erawh chuan a nghawng chu in titliak tur a ni: tin, in fate zinga mipa piang hmasa ber apiang chu in tlan tur a ni." 
Exodus13:14 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, nakin lamah te in faten, ""Hei engtizia nge ni le?' tia an la rawn zawh hun che u chuan nangnin an hnenah, 'Kut chak takin LALPA'n Aigupta ram ata bawiha kan awm kha min hruai chhuak a ni:" 
Exodus13:15 tin, heti hi a ni a, Pharaoan kan chhuah thu a tihkhirh em avangin, LALPA'n Aigupta rama fa tir zawng zawng, mihring fa tir apiang leh ran piang hmasa ber apiang chu, a tihlum vek a: chuvangin a pa, chhul keu hmasa ber apiang hian LALPA hnenah kan inthawi a nih hi: amaherawhchu kan fapate zinga fa tir zawng zawngte chu kan tlan a ni,'ti ang che u." 
Exodus13:16 Tin, in kutah in tan chhinchhiahna a ni ang: in mit leh mit inkara chalhrennate nen: kut chak takin LALPA'n Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuak ta si a,"" a ti a." 
Exodus13:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pharaoa mite chu a chhuahtir phal veleh chuan, Pathianin Philistia-ho ram lamah chuan a hnai zawk nain a hruai lo a; Pathianin, ""Indonate an hmuhin an inchhir ang a, Aigupta ramah an kir leh hlauh dah ang e,"" a ti si a:" 
Exodus13:18 amaherawhchu Pathianin mite chu Tuifinriat Sen lam panin thlaler lamah a hruai kikawi ta zawk a: tin, Israela thlahte chu Aigupta ram ata chu inralring rengin an chhuak ta a." 
Exodus13:19 Tin, Mosia'n Josefa ruhte chu a chhawm a: Israelaa thlahte khka, ""Pathianin a la rawn kan ngei ngei ang che u a; tin, ka ruhte hi heta ta in zawn chho tur a ni,"" tiin chhia a lo chhamtir tlat si a." 
Exodus13:20 Tin, Sukoth hmun ata chu an chhuak a, thlaler tawntirh Etham hmunah an riak a;" 
Exodus13:21 Tin, LALPA'n chhun laiah chuan chhum dingin an hma a hruai a; tin, zanah chuan anmahni en turin meialh dingin an hma a hruai a; chhun leh zan an kal theih zelna turin:chhuna chhum ding leh zana meialh ding chuan mipui chu a kalsan ngai hauh lo a ni." 
Exodus13:22 chhuna chhum ding leh zana meialh ding chuan mipui chu a kalsan ngai hauh lo a ni. 
Exodus14:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Exodus14:2 Israela thlahte hnenah hian thu sawi rawh khai, kir leh se la, Migdol hmun leh tuipui inkar Pi-hahiroth hmun bul, Baal-Zephon hmun bulah chuan riak rawh se: chu mi dep tuipui kamah chuan riak rawh u." 
Exodus14:3 Tichuan Pharaoan Israela thlahte chungchang thu-ah, 'Ram lakah an mangang ta zet le, thlalerah an tang ta,' a ti ang a." 
Exodus14:4 Tin, keiin Pharaoa thinlung chu ka tihkhauhsak ang a, tichuan anmahni chu a um ang a; tin, keiin Pharaoa lakah leh a sipaiho zawng zawng lakah chuan chawimawina chu ka hlawh ang; tichuan Aigupta miten kei hi LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang,"" tiin. Tin, chutiang chuang an ti a." 
Exodus14:5 Tin, mite chu an tlan bo zo ta tih Aigupta lal chu an hrilh a: tin, Pharaoa thinlung leh a chhiahhlawhte thinlung chu a lamlet leh ta a, tichuan, ""Israel mite kan rawngbawl lai kan chhuahtir ta ngawt mai hi engtiziaa hetianga ti ta nge maw kan nih chu le?"" an ti ta a." 
Exodus14:6 Tin, an tawlailir an buatsaih a, tin, mite chu a hnenah a hruai a:" 
Exodus14:7 tin, tawlailir zaruk tha thiau leh Aigupta rama tawlailir zawng zawng, an zaa chunga hotute nen a hruai ta a." 
Exodus14:8 Tin, LALPA'n Aigupta ram lal Pharaoa thinlung chu a tihkhauhsak a, tin, Israela thlahte chu a um ta a: Israel thlahte lah chu induh takin an chhuak a ni si a." 
Exodus14:9 Tin, Aigupta mite chuan sakawr zawng zawng leh Pharaoa tawlailir leh a sakawr chung chuang mite leh a sipaihote nen chuan an um a, tin, Pi-hahiroth hmun bul, Baal-Zephon hmun depa tuipui kama an riak chu an va umpha ta a." 
Exodus14:10 Tin, Pharaoan a va pan hnaih chuan Israela thlahte chu an han dak a, tin, ngai teh, Aigupta mite chuan an lam chu an pan phei ta a: tichuan an lo hlau ta em em mai a: tin, Israela thlahte chuan LALPA chu an au ta a." 
Exodus14:11 Tin, Mosia hnenah, ""Aigupta ramah khan thlan a awm loh avangin em ni thlalerah hian thi tura min hruai chhuah ni? eng vangin nge ni hetianga min ti tura Aigupta tam ata min hruai chhuah ni?" 
Exodus14:12 Aigupta ramah pawh khan, 'Aigupta mite rawngbawl hian kan awm mai ang,' tiin i hnenah khan kan sawi reng lo em ni? thlalera thih tlaw ngawt mai te ai chuan Aigupta mite rawng kha lo bawl ta i la a that zawk dawn hi,"" an ti a." 
Exodus14:13 Tin, Mosia'n mipuite hnenah chuan, ""Hlau suh u, awm hle hle mai u la, LALPA chhandamna, vawiina a thawhsak tur che u hi en ngawt mai rawh u, vawiina Aigupta mi in hmuhate hi kumkhuain in hmu leh dawn tawh lo e." 
Exodus14:14 LALPA'n a dosak ang che u a, nangni chu in awm hle hle mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus14:15 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah chuan, ""eng vangin nge maw mi auh le? Israela thlahte hi kal zel turin hrilh ta che." 
Exodus14:16 Tin, nang pawhin i tiang kha han la la, tin, tuipui chungah khan lek la, tui chu lo inthen rawh se: tichuan tuipui chhung lei charah Israela thlahte chu an kal ang." 
Exodus14:17 Tin, keiin, ngai teh, Aigupta mite thinlung chu ka tihkhauhsak ang a, tichuan an um zel ang: tin, Pharaoa lakah leh a sipaiteho zawng zawng lakah leh a tawlailirte lakah a sakawr chung chuang mite lakah chuan chawimawina chu ka hlawh ang." 
Exodus14:18 Tin, Pharaoa lakah leh, a tawlailirte lakah leh a sakawr chung chuang mite laka chawimawina ka hlawh hunah chuan Aigupta miten kei hi LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus14:19 Tin, Pathian vantirhkoh, Israela mite hma hruai thin kha an hnung lamah a insawn ta a; tin, chhum ding kha an hma lam ata a insawn a, an hnung lamah a ding ta a:" 
Exodus14:20 tin, Aigupta mite leh Israel mite inkarah a lo tla ta a, tichuan chhum chu a lo awm a, a thim bawk a, amaherawhchu chhum chuan zan chu a tieng a: tin, zankhuain a tu lam mah mah an inpan lo a." 
Exodus14:21 Tin, Mosia'n tuipui chungah a kut a han phar a: tin, LALPA'n zankhuain khawchhak thli na takin a rawn thlehtir a, tuipui chu a nem kirtir a, tin, tuipui chu lei charah a chantir a, tin, tuite chu a lo inthen ta a." 
Exodus14:22 Tin, Israela thlahte chu tuipui chhung lei charah chuan an kal ta a: tin, tuite chu an ding lampangah leh an vei lampangah chuan an tan bang a lo ni ta mai a." 
Exodus14:23 Tin, Aigupta mite chuan an um a, Pharaoa sakawr zawng zawngte leh a tawlailirte leh a sakawr chung chuang mite chuan tuipui chhungah chuan an um lut ta a." 
Exodus14:24 Tin, heti hi a ni a, khawfing chah veleh, LALPA'n Aigupta mite chu meialh ding leh chhum dingah chuan a zuk timangang ta a." 
Exodus14:25 An tawlailir kete chu a thlawnsak a, an khalh chak thei ta l o a; chutichuan Aigupta mite chuan, ""Israel-hote hi i tlansan ang u; LALPA'n an lama tangin he mite hi Aigupta mite a dopui a nih hi,"" an ti ta a." 
Exodus14:26 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Aigupta mite, an tawlailirte, an sakawr chung chuang mite chu tuiin a rawn chim leh theihna turin i kut kha tuipui chungah han phar rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
Exodus14:27 Tin, Mosia'n tuipui chungah chuan a kut chu a han phar a, tin, khua a var veleh chuan tuipui chu a luan pangngaiin a luang leh ta a; tin, Aigupta mite chu an tlan kir leh a; tin, LALPA'n Aigupta mite chu tuipui chhungah chuan a paih thla ta a." 
Exodus14:28 Tin, tuite chu a luang leh ta a, tichuan tawlailirte leh sakawr chung chuang mite, tuipuia um luttu, Pharaoa sipaiho zawng zawngte lam chuan tuiin a chim pil ta vek a; pakhat mah chhuak reng reng an awm hauh lo mai a." 
Exodus14:29 Israela thlahte erawh chu tuipui chhung lei charah chuan an kal vek a; tin, tuite chu an ding lampangah leh an vei lampangah chuan an tan bang a lo ni ta mai a." 
Exodus14:30 Chutiang chuan a ni, LALPA'n Israel-hote chu, chu mi ni chuan Aigupta mite kut ata a chhanchhuah ni; tin, Israel-hote chuan Aigupta mi thite chu tuipui kamah chuan an hmu a.Tin, Israel-hote chuan LALPA'n Aigupta mite chunga thil ropui tak a tih chu an hmu a, tin, mipuite chuan LALPA chu an tih a: tichuan LALPA leh a chhiahhlawh Mosia chu an ring ta a." 
Exodus14:31 Tin, Israel-hote chuan LALPA'n Aigupta mite chunga thil ropui tak a tih chu an hmu a, tin, mipuite chuan LALPA chu an tih a: tichuan LALPA leh a chhiahhlawh Mosia chu an ring ta a." 
Exodus15:1 Chutichuan Mosia leh Israela thlahte chuan LALPA chawimawiin he hla hi an sa a, an sawi dual dual a, ""LALPA chawimawiin hla ka sa ang, ropui takin a hneh tak hi: Sakawr leh a chunga chuang chu tuipuiah a paih thla ta a." 
Exodus15:2 LALPA chu ka chakna leh ka hla a ni, Ani chu ka chhandamna a lo ni ta bawk a: Ka Pathian a ni a, amah chu ka fak ang; Ka pa Pathian a ni a, amah chu ka chawimawiang." 
Exodus15:3 LALPA chu indo mi a ni: A hming pawh LALPA a ni. 
Exodus15:4 Pharaoa tawlailirte leh a sipaihote chu tuipuiah a paih thla ta a: Tin, a sipai hotu thlante pawh Tuifinriat Senah an tlahlum zo ta." 
Exodus15:5 Tui thuk takin a chim zo ta: Lung angin tui thuk takah an pil ta. 
Exodus15:6 I kut ding lam chu, aw LALPA, thiltihtheihnain a ropui a, i kut ding lam chuan, aw LALPA, hmelma chu a tisawm ta dep a." 
Exodus15:7 I ropuina nasa tak chuan nangmah dotute chu i tiboral vek a: i thinrim i rawn hrithla a, buhpawl ang maiin an kangral zo ta a." 
Exodus15:8 I hnara thawin tuite chu a lo in tiang a, Tuite chu englo dah khawm thur angin a ding luah a: Tuifinriat chhung daiha tui thuk takte chu a lo khal zo ta a," 
Exodus15:9 Hmelma chuan, 'Ka um ang a, ka umphak ngei ang, rallak sum chu ka sem ang: Anmahniah chuan ka chak daih ka hmu tawh ang: Ka khandaih ka phawi ang a, ka kutin anmahni chu ka tiboral ang,' a ti a." 
Exodus15:10 I thli chu i han tlehtir ta mai a, tuifinriatin a chim pil ta vek a: Tui thuk takahte chuan suan angin an pil ta vang vang a." 
Exodus15:11 Aw LALPA, pathiante zingah hian nang ang hi tu nge awm le? Thianghlimna lama ropui leh, Fak tlak nihna lama zahawm leh, thilmakte ti thin hi nang ang tu nge awm le?" 
Exodus15:12 Nangin i kut ding lam i han phar a, Leiin anmahni chu a lem zo ta a." 
Exodus15:13 Nangin i khawngaihnain mipui i tlante kha i hruai a: I chenna thianghlimah chuan i chaknain i hruai ta a. 
Exodus15:14 Mi tinrengin an hria a, an khur thlu zo a, Philistia rama chengte chu thlaphannain a man ta." 
Exodus15:15 Tichuan Edom rama hotute chuan mak an ti hle a; Moab mi chakte chu khurhnain a rawn man a: Kanaan rama awm zawng zawngte chu an tui zo ta a. 
Exodus15:16 Tihna leh hlauhnain a tlakbuak a; I ban chaknain lung ang maiin a tingawi hle hle a; Aw LALPA, i mite an kai vek hma loh chuan, Mi i leite an kai vek hma loh chuan." 
Exodus15:17 Nangin anmahni chu i hruai lut ang a, i roluahtu tlangah chuan i phun ang, Aw LALPA, nangin i awmna tura hmun i buatsaihah chuan, Aw LALPA, hmun thianghlim i kut ngeiin a lo dinnaah chuan," 
Exodus15:18 LALPA chuan chatuanin ro a rel tawh ang,"" tiin." 
Exodus15:19 Pharaoa sakawrte chu a tawlailirte chawpin a sakawr chung chuang mite nen chuan tuipuiah an lut thla a, tin, LALPA'n tuifinriat tuite chuang a rawn vur leh ta a; Israela thlahte erawh chu tuipui chhung leicharah chuan an kal vek a." 
Exodus15:20 Tin, zawlnei Miriami, Arona farnuin khuangte a keng a; tin, hmeichhia zawng zawngin khuangte kenga lamin an zui chhuak ve ta hlawm a." 
Exodus15:21 Tin, Miriami chuan ""LALPA chawimawiin hla sa rawh u, ropui takin a hneh tak hi; Sakawr leh a chunga chuang chawpin tuipuiah a paih thla ta a,"" tiin hlain a hruai a." 
Exodus15:22 Tichuan Mosia'n Israel-hote chu Tuifinriat Sen ata a hruai chhuak a, Sur thlaler lam panin an chhuak ta a; tin, thlalerah chuan ni thum zet an kal a, tui an hmu zo ta lo a." 
Exodus15:23 Tin, Mara hmun an va thleng a, Mara hmuna tuite chu a lo khak avang chuan an in thei lo a: chuvang chuan a hmingah Mara vuah a ni." 
Exodus15:24 Tichuan, mipuite chuan, ""Engnge ni kan in dawn le?"" tiin Mosia chungah an phunnawi ta a." 
Exodus15:25 Tin, ani chuan LALPA chu a au a; tin, LALPA chuan thing pakhat hi a han kawhhmuh a, chu chu tuiah chuan a zuk paih lut a, tichuan tui chu a lo tui ta a. Chutah chuan chuan thuruat leh rorelna a siamsak a; chutah chuan anmahni fiahna a siam a;"
