Exodus15:26 LALPA i Pathian aw hi ngun taka i ngaihthlak a, a mithmuha tha a tih zawngte i tih a, a thupekte i ngaihsan a, a thuruat zawng zawngte i pawm chuan Aigupta mite chunga hri ka lentir tak angte kha i chungah reng reng ka lentir ve lo vang: LALPA a tidamtu che ka nih hi,"" a ti a.Tin, Elim hmun an va thleng a, chutah chuan tuihna nei sawm leh pahnih leh tum thing sawmsarih a awm a; tin, chuta tui kamahte chuan an riak ta a." 
Exodus15:27 Tin, Elim hmun an va thleng a, chutah chuan tuihna nei sawm leh pahnih leh tum thing sawmsarih a awm a; tin, chuta tui kamahte chuan an riak ta a." 
Exodus16:1 Tin, Elim hmun ata chu an chhuak a, tin, Israela thlahte pung khawmho zawng zawng chuan Aigupta ram ata an chhuah achin thla hnihna, ni sawm leh ni nga niin Elim hmun leh Sinai tlang inkara Sin thlaler an va thleng a." 
Exodus16:2 Tin, thlalerah chuan Israela thlahte pung khawmho zawng zawng chu Mosia chungah leh Arona chungah an lo phunnawi ta a:" 
Exodus16:3 tin, Israela thlahte chuan an hnenah, ""Aigupta rama sa bel bula kan thut lai te khan LALPA kutah lo thi ta zawk mai i la aw! Mipui pungkhawmho zawng zawngte hi thlalerah hian riltama tihhlum turin min hruai chhuak a nih hi le,"" an ti a." 
Exodus16:4 Chutichuan LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Ngai rawh, van atangin in tan chhang ka rawn surtir ang e; tichuan mipuiten ni tin ni khat atana chanvo tawk chauh zel chu va chhar thin rawh se, ka dan an zawm nge zawm lo ka fiah theih nan." 
Exodus16:5 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, a ni ruk ni chuan an va chhara chu an buatsaih ang a; tin, ni tina an chhar lehhnih zel a ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus16:6 Tin, Mosia leh Aronan Israela thlahte zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Tlai lamah chuan LALPA chu Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu ngei che u a ni tih in hre dawn e:" 
Exodus16:7 tin, zingah pawh LALPA ropuina chu in hmu dawn e; LALPA chunga in phunnawina kha a lo hriat tak hi: keinite chu eng nge kan nih a, kan chunga in phunnawi mai ni;"" an ti a." 
Exodus16:8 Tin, Mosia'n, ""Chung chu in la hria ang, LALPA'n tlai lama sa ei tur a pek che u a, zing lama chhang kham khawp a pek hunah che u chuan, LALPA chuan a Chunga in phunnawina kha a hre reng si a: keinite chu eng nge kan nih ni? Kan chunga phunnawi in ni hlei nem, LALPA chunga phunnawi a sin in nih ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus16:9 Tin, Mosia'n Arona hnenah, ""Israela thlahte pung khawmho zawng zawngte hnenah hian, 'LALPA kiang hnaiah lo kal rawh u: in phunnawinate kha a lo hriat tak hi,' ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus16:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israela thlahte pung khawmho zawng zawngte hnena Aronan thu a sawi lai tak chuan thlaler lam chu an han thlir a; tin, ngai teh, LALPA ropuina chu chhumah a lang ta a." 
Exodus16:11 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Exodus16:12 Israela thlahte phunnawinate kha ka lo hria a; an hnenah, 'Tlai lamah chuan sa in ei ang a, tin, atukah chuan chhang kham khawp zetin in ei tawh ang; tichuan kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni tih in hria ang, a ti e,' ti ang che,"" tiin." 
Exodus16:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, tlai lamah chuan vahmim an lo thlawk chho chiam a, an riahhmun chu a dap ta dul a: tin, atukah chuan an riahhmun velah chuan dai a lo tla dup a." 
Exodus16:14 Tin, dai tla chu a han hul veleh chuan, ngai teh, thlaler lei chungah chuan thil per te te, vur thal tiat lek lek te hi a lo awm tuar mai a." 
Exodus16:15 Chu chu Israela thlahten an han hmuh chuan, ""Engnge maw ni chu le?"" an inti hlawm a; eng nge ni tih an hre si lo a. Tin, Mosia'n an hnenah, ""LALPA'n chhang in ei atana a pek che u a nih hi." 
Exodus16:16 Hei hi a ni LALPA'n, 'Mi tinin mahni kham khawp theuh chhar u langin; mi pakhat tan omer khat zel, in chhungkaw mihring awm zat ang zelin in chhar tur a ni, mi tinin in puan in chhunga awmte tan chuan in chhar tur a ni,' tia thu a pek chu ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus16:17 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, thenkhatin an chhar tam a, thenkhatin an chhar tlem a." 
Exodus16:18 Tin, omerin an han teh a, a chhar tam chuan a chuangin a nei lo a, a chhar tlem chuan a tlachham hek lo; mi tinin mahni kham tawk theuh chu an chhar theuh a." 
Exodus16:19 Tin, Mosia'n an hnenah, ""Tumahin atuk lam atan chuan khek suh ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus16:20 Nimahsela Mosia thu chu an pawm duh lo a; thenkhat chuan atuk lam atan an khek a; tichuan a lo lung a, a lo rimchhe ta a; chuvangin Mosia chu anchungah a thinrim ta hle a." 
Exodus16:21 Chutichuan tuk tin mi tinin mahni kham khawp lek zelin an chhar thin a: ni a lo tlangsan veleh a tuiral vek thin a. 
Exodus16:22 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni ruk ni chuan chhang chu a leh hnih - mi pakhat tan omer hnih zel an chhar a: tin, chung pung khawmho roreltu zawng zawngte chuan Mosia an va hrilh a." 
Exodus16:23 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Chu chu alawm LALPA'n, 'Naktuk hi chawlh der ni, LALPA tana chawlhni thianghlim a ni e,' a tih chu: chuvangin a awma awm in duh leh awm ulangin, a chhuma chhum in duh leh chhum rawh u; chu mi bang chu atuk lam atan in dah dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Exodus16:24 Tin, Mosia hrilh ang chuan atuk lam atan an dah hrang ta a: chu chu a rimchhe lo a, a lung hek lo." 
Exodus16:25 Tichuan Mosia'n, ""Vawiin chuan hei hi ei rawh u; vawiin hi LALPA tan chawlhni a nih hi: vawiinah zawng leia tla in hmu lo ang." 
Exodus16:26 Ni ruk chhung chuan in va chhar thin ang a; a ni sarih ni erawh chu chawlhni a ni a, chhar tur reng reng a awm lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus16:27 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan mi thenkhat chu chhar turin an va chhuak a, chhar tur reng reng an hmu zo ta lo a." 
Exodus16:28 Tichuan LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Ka thupekte leh ka dante hi eng chen nge maw pawm duh loh in tum ni aw!" 
Exodus16:29 LALPA'n chawlhni a pek che u hi hre ta che u maw le, chuvangin ni ruk niin ni hnih tla tawk tur chhang a pe che u a nih hi; mi tin mahni hmun theuhvah awm hle hle mai rawh u, ni sarih ni chuan tumah a awmna hmun ata chhuak hauh suh se,"" a ti a." 
Exodus16:30 Chutichuan mite chu ni sarih ni chuan an chawl ta a. 
Exodus16:31 Tin, Israela chhungte chuan chu mi hmingah chuan Manna an vuah a: koriender mu ang maia var ser a ni a; han ei chuan chhangper khawizu nena siam ang a ni." 
Exodus16:32 Tin, Mosia'n, ""Hei hi alawm LALPA'n, 'Hei hi in thlahte thlengin omer khat vawng tha rawh u: Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah lai che u a, thlalera ka chawm thinna che u chhang chu an rawn hmuh theih nan,' tia thu a pek chu,"" a ti a." 
Exodus16:33 Chutichuan Mosia'n Arona hnenah, ""Bel va la langin, omer khat manna hi khung rawh, in thlahte thlenga vawn reng turin LALPA hmaah dah ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus16:34 LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang chuan Arona chuan vawn reng turin Thuhriattirna hmaah chuan a dah a. 
Exodus16:35 Israela thlahte chuan mihring chenna ram an thlen hma loh chuan kum sawmli chhung chu manna an ei thin a; Kanaan ramri dep an thlen hma loh chuan manna an ei thin.Omer khat hi epha hmun sawma thena hmun khat hu a ni. 
Exodus16:36 Omer khat hi epha hmun sawma thena hmun khat hu a ni. 
Exodus17:1 Tin, Isaela thlahte pung khawmho zawng zawng chu Sin thlaler ata an chhuak leh a, LALPA thupek angin riah bi nei thliah thliaha riakin, Rephidim-ah an inkhuar a: tin, chutah chuan mipuite in tur tui a awm ta lo a." 
Exodus17:2 Chuvangin mipuite chuan Mosia chu an bei ta a, ""Tui in tur min pe rawh,"" an ti a. Tin, Mosia'n an hnenah, ""Engati nge mi bei mai? Eng vangin nge LALPA in fiah ni?"" a ti a." 
Exodus17:3 Chutah chuan m ipuite chu tuihalin an awm a ni a; tichuan mipuite chu Mosia chungah an phunnawi a, ""Eng vangin nge kan fanaute leh kan rante nen hian tuihala min tihhlum turin Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuah ni?"" an ti a." 
Exodus17:4 Tin, Mosia'n, ""Heng mipuihote hi engtin nge ka tih ang? Lunga min denhlum hial pawh an duh awm hi,"" tiin LALPA a au a." 
Exodus17:5 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Mipuiho hma lamah kal langin, Israela thlahte upaho thenkhat hruai ve ang che; tin, i tiang, hmana lui i vuakna kha keng langin kal rawh." 
Exodus17:6 Ngai teh, Horeb-a lungpui chungah sawn i hmaah ka lo ding ang a; tin, lungpui chu i han vua ang a, tichuan mipuite in tur tui chu a lo luang chhuak mai ang,"" a ti a. Tin, Mosia'n Israela thlahte upaho mithmuhah chuan chutiang chuan a han ti a." 
Exodus17:7 Chu mi hmun hmingah chuan Massa leh Meriba a vuah a, Israela thlahten an bei avang leh, ""Kan zingah hian LALPA chu a awm nge maw awm lo le?"" tia LALPA chu an fiah avangin." 
Exodus17:8 Tin, Rephidim hmunah chuan Amalek-hoin Israel-ho chu an rawn bei ta a." 
Exodus17:9 Tichuan Mosia'n a hnena a sawi ang chuan Josua chuan a ti a, Amalek-ho chu a va bei ta a: tin, Mosia leh Arona leh Hura chu tlang chhipah an han lawn a." 
Exodus17:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Mosia'n a kut a phar veleh Israel-hote chuan an hneh thin a." 
Exodus17:11 Nimahsela Mosia bante chu a lo kham ta a; tichuan lung an han la a, a bulah chuan an dah a, chutah chuan a thu ta a; tin, Arona leh Hura chuan a kut chu an dawmsak ta a, pakhatin lehlam a dawm a, pakhatin a lehlam a dawm a, chutichuan ni tlak thlengin a kutte chu a awm ngaiin a awm ta tlat a." 
Exodus17:12 Tin, Josua chuan Amaleka leh a hote chu khandaih hriamin a tudawl ta a." 
Exodus17:13 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""He mi thu hi hriat reng atan lehkhabuah ziak la, Josua hriatah sawi chhuak thin ang che: van hnuaiah hian Amalekho hi an awm tih pawh hriat loh khawpin ka tichimit hlauh dawn e,"" a ti a.""LALPA'n chhia a chham ta; LALPA'n chhuan awm chhung zawng zawng chuan Amalek-ho chu a do ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus17:14 LALPA'n chhia a chham ta; LALPA'n chhuan awm chhung zawng zawng chuan Amalek-ho chu a do ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus18:1 Tin, Jetroa, Midian rama puithiam, Mosia puzawn chuan Pathianin Mosia leh a mi Israel-hote thil a tihsakzia zawng zawngte leh, LALPA'n Israel-hote chu Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuahzia te chu chu a lo hria a:" 
Exodus18:2 ,3 tin, Mosia puzawn Jetroa chuan Mosia nupui Zipori, Mosia'n a hawntir kha, a fapate pahnih nen a hruai a; chu mi pakhat hming chu Gersoma a ni a; ""mi rama awm ka nih avangin,"" a ti a;" 
Exodus18:3 ,2 tin, Mosia puzawn Jetroa chuan Mosia nupui Zipori, Mosia'n a hawntir kha, a fapate pahnih nen a hruai a; chu mi pakhat hming chu Gersoma a ni a; ""mi rama awm ka nih avangin,"" a ti a;" 
Exodus18:4 tin, pakhata hming chu Eliazara a ni; ""Ka pa Pathian chu mi tanpuitu a ni a, Pharaoa khandaih lak ata chu mi chhanhim tak avangin,"" a ti a:" 
Exodus18:5 tin, Mosia puzawn Jethroa chu Mosia fapate leh a nupui nen Mosia hnenah thlalera a riahna Pathian tlangah chuan an va kal a:" 
Exodus18:6 tin, ani chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Kei i puzawn Jethroa, i nupui nen i fa pahnih nen kan lo kal e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus18:7 Tin, Mosia chu a puzawn hmuak turin a va chhuak a, chibai a va buk a; chanchinte an inzawt a; tichuan puan inah an lut ta a." 
Exodus18:8 Tin, LALPA'n Israel-ho avanga Pharaoa leh Aiguptate chunga a tihzia zawng zawngte leh kawng laka hrehawm an tuarzia zawng zawngte leh LALPA'n anmahni a chhanhimzia te chu Mosia chuan a puzawn a hrilh a." 
Exodus18:9 Tin, LALPA'n Israel-hote chu Aigupta-ho lak ata a chhanhim a, anmahni thil a lo tihsak takzia leh an chunga a thatna zawng zawng avangte chuan Jethroa chu a lawm em em mai a." 
Exodus18:10 Tin, Jethroa chuan, ""LALPA, Aigupta-ho lak ata leh Pharaoa lak ata chhanhimtu che u chu fakin awm rawh se; ani chuan Aigupat-ho thu hnuaia awm mipuite chu a chhanhim tak hi." 
Exodus18:11 Tunah chuan LALPA chu pathian zawng zawngte ai chuan a ropui zawk tih ka hre ta: a ni, chapo taka an beihnaah tak chuan a lo lang a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus18:12 Tin, Mosia puzawn Jethroa chuan halral thilhlan leh Pathian tana inthawina turte a va la a: tin, Arona leh Israel upaho zawng zawngte chu Mosia puzawn hnenah chuan Pathian hmaah chhang ei turin an kal a." 
Exodus18:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, atukah chuan Mosia chu mipuite ro rel turin a thu a: tin, mipuite chu zing ata tlai thlengin Mosia kiang velah chuan an ding reng a." 
Exodus18:14 Tin, Mosia puzawnin chutia mipuite tana thil a tih zawng zawng chu a han hmuh chuan, ""Mipuite hi thil eng nge maw i tihsak chu le? Engtizia nge nangmah chauh hi i thut rang a, zing ata tawh tlai thlenga mipui zawng zawngte hi i kiang vela an din rang?"" a ti a." 
Exodus18:15 Tin, Mosia'n a puzawn hnenah, ""Mipuite hi Pathian rawn turin ka hnenah an lo kal a ni ber e:" 
Exodus18:16 thu eng emaw an neih chuan ka hnenah hian an lo kal thin a: tichuan keiin a thenawmpa nena an thu chu ka lo relsak a, tin, Pathian remruat leh a dante chu ka lo hriattir thin a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus18:17 Tin, Mosia puzawn chuan a hnenah, ""I thiltih dan chu a tha lo e a." 
Exodus18:18 Nang leh he'ng i hnena mipui awmte hi in intichau zo ngei ang maw le: he hna hi i tan a hautak lutuk a ni: nangmah chauha han tlin mi a ni hlei nem 
Exodus18:19 Ka thu hi ngaithla teh khai, rem ka han ruatpui ang chia, i hnenah Pathian awm rawh se: nang hi Pathian lama mipui aiawhin awm langin, an thubuaite chu Pathian hnenah thlen ang che:" 
Exodus18:20 tin, thu ruatte leh dan chu i zirtir ang a, an awmdan tur leh an tih dan turte chu i kawhhmuh zel tur a ni." 
Exodus18:21 Chu chang ni loin, mipui zing ata mi hmantlak deuh deuh Pathian tih mite, mi dik takte, hlawkna dik lo tak haw mite-thlang chhuak langin: chutiang mite chu sang pawl chunga hotuah te, za pawl chunga hotuah te, sawmnga pawl chunga hotuah te, sawm pawl chunga otuah te ruat langin:" 
Exodus18:22 chungte chuan eng lai pawhin mite ro relsak rawh se: tin heti hi a ni ang a, thu lian deuh apiangte chu i hnenah an rawn thlen thin ang a, thu te tham erawh chu anmahniin rel rawh se: chutichuan i tan a lo awlsam zawk ang a, tin, anni chuan an chhawk zang hle dawn che nia." 
Exodus18:23 Chutianga i tih a, Pathian pawhin thu a pek che chuan i tlin thei ang a, tichuan he'ng mipuiho zawng zawngte pawh hi lungawi takin mahni awmna lamah chuan an tin thei dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Exodus18:24 Chutichuan Mosia chuan a puzawn thu sawi chu a pawm a, a sawi ang zawng zawng chuan a ti ta a." 
Exodus18:25 Tin, Mosia chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng zing ata chu mi hmantlak deuh deuh a thlang chhuak a, mipui chunga hotuah a siam a, sang pawl chunga hotuah te, za pawl chunga hotuah te, sawmnga pawl chunga hotuah te, sawm pawl chunga hotuah te a ruat ta a." 
Exodus18:26 Chungte chuan eng lai pawhin mite ro an relsak thin a: thu lian deuh apiangte chu Mosia hnenah an thlen thin a, thu te tham erawh chu anmahnihoin an rel thin.Tichuan Mosia chuan a puzawn chu a kaltir ta a; tin, a awmna ram lamah chuan a haw leh ta a." 
Exodus18:27 Tichuan Mosia chuan a puzawn chu a kaltir ta a; tin, a awmna ram lamah chuan a haw leh ta a." 
Exodus19:1 Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata an chhuah achin a thla thumna, chu mi ni tak chuan Sinai thlaler an thleng a." 
Exodus19:2 Rephidim hmun ata an chhuah a, Sinai thlaler an va thlen chuan thlalerah chuan an riak a; chutah chuan Israel-hote chu tlang bulah chuan an riak a." 
Exodus19:3 Tin, Mosia chu Pathian hnenah a han chho a, tichuan LALPA chuan tlang atangin a bia a, a hnenah, ""Jakoba chhungte hnenah hetiang hian ti la; tin, Israela thlahte hnenah pawh," 
Exodus19:4 'Aigupta-hote chunga ka tiziate leh, mupui thlaa ka put che u a, ka hnena ka hruai thlenzia che u hi in hmu a." 
Exodus19:5 Chuvangin ka thu in ngaihthlak tak zet a, ka thuthlung hi in pawm chuan khawvel hnam zawng zawng zingah hian ka tan ro thlan bik in ni ang: khawvel pum pui hi ka ta a ni si a:" 
Exodus19:6 tichuan ka tan puithiam chi, hnam thianghlim in ni ang,' tiin hrilh ang che. Heng thu hi Israela thlahte hnena i sawi tur chu a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus19:7 Tin, Mosia'n mipui zinga upahote chu a rawn ko khawm a, LALPA thupek zawng zawngte chu a hrilh vek a." 
Exodus19:8 Tin, mipuiteho zawng zawng chuan, ""LALPA sawi ang zawng zawngte chu kan ti zel ang e,"" tiin, arualin an chhang dual dual a. Tichuan Mosia'n mipuite thusawi chu LALPA a hrilh leh chhawng a." 
Exodus19:9 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Ngai teh, ka biak lai tak che mipuiin an hriat ve theih a, kumkhuaa i thu chu an awih fona turin chhum chhah mupah i hnenah ka lo kal dawn e,"" a ti a. Tichuan Mosia'n mipuite thusawi chu LALPA a hrilh leh chhawng a." 
Exodus19:10 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Mipuiho hnenah va kal la, vawiin leh naktuk hian anmahni chu tithianghlim ang che, an puante sufai se la," 
Exodus19:11 a ni thum ni atan inpuahchah rawh se: a ni thum ni chuan mipuiho zawng zawng mithmuhah Sinai tlangan chuan LALPA a lo chhuk dawn e. 
Exodus19:12 An hnenah, 'Fimkhur u la, tlangah khian han lawn hauh suh u la, tlang hmawr pawh han dek hlek suh ang che u: tupawh tlang han dek apiang chu tihhlum ngei ngei tur a ni ang:" 
Exodus19:13 kut reng rengin deh tur a ni lo a, lunga denhlum ngei ngei tur a ni, a nih loh leh, kah tlang tur a ni ang; sa pawh mihring pawh a nung lo ang: tawtawrawt a rik ruai ruai hunah chuan tlangah khian an lawn chho tur a ni, a ti,' tiin mipuiho tan ri khamsak ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus19:14 Chutichuan Mosia chu tlang ata mipuiho zingah chuan a lo chhuk a, mipuite chu a tithianghlim a; tin, an puante an su fai a." 
Exodus19:15 Tin, mipuihote hnenah chuan, ""A ni thum ni atan chuan inpuahchah rawh u: hmeichhe kiangah reng reng kal suh u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus19:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni thum ni zingah chuan khawpuite a lo ri a, kawlte a lo phe a, tlang chhipah chuan chhum a lo zing chhah mup a, tawtawrawt ring em em maiin a lo ri a; tichuan mipui riahhmuna awmho zawng zawng chu an khur a." 
Exodus19:17 Tichuan Mosia'n mipuiho chu Pathian han be turin riahhmun ata chu a hruai chhuak hlawm a; tlang bulah chuan an ding a. 
Exodus19:18 Tin, Sinai tlangah chuan LALPA chu meia a lo chhuk avangin a khu phui ta mup a: tin, chu mi meikhu chu rawhtuina meikhu ang maiin a khu chho ngut ngut a, tichuan tlang pum pui chu a nghing dur dur a." 
Exodus19:19 Tin, tawtawrawt ri chu a ring telh telh a, Mosia chuan thu a han sawi a, Pathian awin a lo chhang a." 
Exodus19:20 Tichuan LALPA chu Sinai tlang, tlang chhipah chuan a lo chhuk a: tin, LALPA chuan Mosia chu tlang chhipah a ko chho a; tichuan Mosia chu a han chho a." 
Exodus19:21 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Zuk chhuk langin, mipuite khu zuk zilh rawh, chutilozawng LALPA hmel hmuh tumin an lo lut tlang mai ang e, mi tam tak an boral mai tur a nia." 
Exodus19:22 Tin, Puithiamho, LALPA kianga lo kal vete pawh chu intithianghlim ve rawh se, chutilozawng anchungah LALPA chu a tuan mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus19:23 Tin, Mosia'n LALPA hnenah, ""Mipuiho hi Sinai tlangah hian an lo chho thei hlei nem: nangin, 'Tlang velah hian ri khamsak u la, tithianghlim ang che u,' tiin, nangmah ngeiin thu min tiam alawm,"" a ti a." 
Exodus19:24 Tin, LALPA'n a hnenah, ""Kal la, zuk chhuk tawh; tin, Arona nen lo chho leh ang che u: amaherawhchu puithiamho leh mipuiho chu LALPA hnena lo kal tumin lo lut tlang mai suh se chutilozawng an chungah a tuan mai tur a nia,"" a ti a.Chutichuan Mosia chu mipuite hnenah chuan a zuk kal a, chung thu chu a zuk hrilh a." 
Exodus19:25 Chutichuan Mosia chu mipuite hnenah chuan a zuk kal a, chung thu chu a zuk hrilh a." 
Exodus20:1 Pathianin he'ng thu zawng zawng hi a hrilh a," 
Exodus20:2 Kei, LALPA i Pathian, Aigupta ram ata, bawih ata hruai chhuak tu che u ka ni." 
Exodus20:3 Keimah lo chu Pathian dang reng reng i nei tur a ni lo. 
Exodus20:4 Milem siam chawp leh thil, a anpui reng reng - chung lam vana mi emaw, hnuai lam leia mi emaw, lei hnuai lama tuia mi emaw - i tan i siam tur a ni lo:" 
Exodus20:5 chung chu chibai i buk tur a ni lo a, an rawng i bawl tur a ni hek lo; kei, LALPA i Pathian hi, Pathian thikthuchhia, pate khawlohna avanga fate hrem thin, mi hawtute chu chhuan thumna leh chhuan lina thlenga hrem thin leh," 
Exodus20:6 mi hmangaia ka thupekte pawmtu sang tam takte chunga khawngaihna lantir thin ka nih hi. 
Exodus20:7 LALPA i Pathian hming chu i lam mai mai tur a ni lo; LALPA chuan a hming lam mai mai chu thiam loh chantir lohin a chhuah dawn si lo a. 
Exodus20:8 Chawlhni hi thianghlim taka serh tur a ni tih hre reng rawh. 
Exodus20:9 Ni ruk chhungin i thawk tur a ni a, i hna zawng zawng chu i thawk tur a ni:" 
Exodus20:10 a ni sarih ni erawh chu LALPA i Pathian tan chawlhni a ni e: chu mi ni chuan hna reng reng i thawk tur a ni lo, nang pawhin, i fapa pawhin, i fanu pawhin, i bawihpa pawhin, i bawihnu pawhin, i ran pawhin, i ina hnam dang pawhin:" 
Exodus20:11 ni ruk chhungin LALPA'n lei leh van te, tuifinriat leh a chhunga awm zawng zawngte chu a siam a, tin, a ni sarih ni chuan a lo chawl ta si a: chuvangin LALPA'n chawlhni chu mal a sawm a, a tithianghlim ta a ni." 
Exodus20:12 I nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh; tichuan LALPA i Pathianin ram a pekah che hian i dam rei dawn nia. 
Exodus20:13 Tual i that tur a ni lo 
Exodus20:14 I uire tur a ni lo. 
Exodus20:15 I ru tur a ni lo. 
Exodus20:16 I vengte chungah hretu derah i insiam tur a ni lo. 
Exodus20:17 I vengte chhungte chu i awt tur a ni lo a, i vengte nupui chu i awt tur a ni lo, a bawihpa emaw, a bawihnu emaw, a bawngpa emaw, a sabengtung emaw, i vengte ta reng reng chu engmah i awt tur a ni lo,"" tiin." 
Exodus20:18 Tin, mipui zawng zawngte chuan khawpuirite, kawlphe te, tawtawrawt rite, tlang khute chu an hmu a: tin, mipuiin an han hmuh chuan an khur a, hla takah an ding ta a." 
Exodus20:19 Tichuan Mosia hnenah, ""Nangma'n kan hnenah hian thu sawi teh zawk khai, kan lo la ang e: amaherawhchu Pathian zawngin kan hnenah thu sawi teh tawh suh se, chutilozawng kan thi mai dah ang e,"" an ti a." 
Exodus20:20 Tin, Mosia chuan mipuite hnenah chuan, ""Hlau suh u: Pathianin a rawn fiah che u a nih hi, in mithmuhah tihbaia a awmna hi, in sual lohna turin a ni e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus20:21 Tin, mipuite chu hla takah an la ding reng a, Mosia chuan Pathian awmna thim chhah mup kiang chu a va pan a." 
Exodus20:22 Chutichuan LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Israela thlahte hnenah hian hetiangin va sawi rawh; 'Nangmahni ngeiin hei van atanga ka rawn biakzia che u in hre tawh a." 
Exodus20:23 Pathian dang reng reng chu ka kiangah chuan in rawn nei tur a ni lo; tangkaraw pathiante emaw, rangrachak pathiante emaw in tan in siam tur a ni lo." 
Exodus20:24 ka tan lei maicham i siam tur a ni, chutah chuan i beramte leh i sebawngte chu i halral thilhlanahte leh i remna inthawi nante i hlan thin tur a ni: hmun tinah ka hming ka hriattirna apiangah chuan i hnenah ka lo kal thin ang a, mal ka rawn sawm thin ang che." 
Exodus20:25 Tin, lung maicham mi siamsak dawn chuan lung chherin i siam tur a ni lo e: i hriamhrei chu chu i hman hlauh zawngin i tibawlhhlawh a ni dawn si a.Ka maicham lawn chhohna rahkaahte chuan lawn pawh i lawn chho tur a ni lo e saruak a i awm a lan lohna turin." 
Exodus20:26 Ka maicham lawn chhohna rahkaahte chuan lawn pawh i lawn chho tur a ni lo e saruak a i awm a lan lohna turin. 
Exodus21:1 Tichuan hengte hi a ni an hnena rorel dan tur i hriattir turte chu. 
Exodus21:2 Hebrai mi, chhiahhlawhah lo lei ang la, kum ruk rawng a bawl ang a: tin, a kum sarih kum chuan intlan lo pawhin a chhuak mai thei ang." 
Exodus21:3 Amah ngawta lo lut a nih chuan, amah ngawtin a chhuak leh mai ang: nupui nei a nih chuan a nupui pawh chu a chhuak tel ve bawk ang." 
Exodus21:4 A puin a nupui lo neihsak se la, tin, fanu emaw fapa emaw lo hrinsak se la; a nupui leh a fate chu a pu ta an ni ang a, anu erawh chu amah ngawtin a chhuak tur a ni." 
Exodus21:5 Amaherawhchu bawih chuan, ka pu te, ka nupui te, ka fate hi ka hmangaih em mai a; ka chhuak duh lo e, a tih tlat chuan," 
Exodus21:6 a puin Pathian hnenah hruai se la, kawngkaah emaw kawngka biangah emaw hruai sela; tin, a puin a beng chu thir zumin vit se la; tichuan kumkhuain a rawng a bawl tawh ang." 
Exodus21:7 Miin a fanu chu bawihnu atan hralh se la, chhiahhlawh mipate ang chuan a chhuak ve lo ang." 
Exodus21:8 A pu chuan a nupui atan lo hual se la, ani chuan a pu chu lo tilawm leh thei ta si lo se la, a intlantir leh tur a ni, a lo bum avang chuan hnam dangte hnena zawrh leh theihna a nei hlek lo ang." 
Exodus21:9 Tin, a fapa tana nupuia hualsak duh a nih chuan, fanute en ang bawkin a en tur a ni." 
Exodus21:10 Nupui dang lo nei leh mah se la, a ei tur sa te, a silhfen te, a nupui a nihna te kha a tihtlemchuansak tur a ni lo e." 
Exodus21:11 Chu thil kawng thum chu a tih loh chuan tangka pe loin a chhuak mai thei ang. 
Exodus21:12 Tupawhin mi lo vua se la, chu mi chu thi ta se la, tihhlum ve ngei ngei tur a ni." 
Exodus21:13 Tin, miin tum reng vang ni lo a, Pathian chaltawhtir a nih erawh chuan, a tlan luhna tur hmun ka ruatsak ang che." 
Exodus21:14 Amaherawhchu miin tum lui rengin a thenawm chu fin vervekin thah tum se la, thi turin ka maicham ata chu hruai ang che." 
Exodus21:15 Tupawh a nu emaw a pa emaw vua apiang chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni. 
Exodus21:16 Tupawh mihring ru-a zuar emaw, a la kawl lai ngei emaw an hmuh chuan, chu mi chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni." 
Exodus21:17 Tupawh a nu emaw, a pa emaw anchhia lawh apiang chu, tihhlum ngei tur a ni." 
Exodus21:18 Tin, mi lo inhnial se la, pakhat chuan lungtumin chhu se la emaw, a kuttumin chum sela emaw, thih chu thi lo se la, amaherawhchu khumbetin tluk phah se la,:" 
Exodus21:19 lo tho leh theiin tiang hawlin lo kal leh thei se la, a kut thlaktua chu chhuah tur a ni: a hun sen hu kha erawh chu a rul ang a, a dam feltir viah tur a ni." 
Exodus21:20 Tin, miin a chhiahhlawh emaw, a bawihnu emaw tiangin vua se la, a kutah chuan lo thi ta se la, amah chu hrem ngei tur a ni." 
Exodus21:21 Amaherawhchu ni khat emaw, ni hnih emaw dam se la, hrem tur a ni lo ang: a chhiahhlawh chu a sum leh pai a ni si a." 
Exodus21:22 Tin, mi lo insual ta se la, hmeichhe nau pai vaw palh ang se la, a nau pai chu lo tla se la, chhiatna dang erawh chu awm lo se la: chu hmeichhe pasal chuan a ngen zat chu chawitir ngei tur a ni; tichuan roreltute ruat ang zat chu a pe tur a ni." 
Exodus21:23 Amaherawhchu chhiatna dang lo awm se la chuan nun aia nun," 
Exodus21:24 mit aia mit, ha aia ha, kut aia kut, ke aia ke," 
Exodus21:25 tihkan aia tihkan, hliam aia hliam, vuak aia vuak i tuattir tur a ni." 
Exodus21:26 Tin, miin a chhiahhlawh mit emaw a bawihnu mit emaw vuain, lo tichhe ta se la, a mit avang chuan a chhuahtir tur a ni." 
Exodus21:27 Tin, a bawihpa ha emaw, a bawihnu ha emaw lo vuak balsak se la, a ha avang chuan a chhuahtir tur a ni." 
Exodus21:28 Tin, sebawngpain mipa emaw hmeichhia emaw lo sihlum ta se la, chu sebawngpa chu lunga denhlum ngei tur a ni a, tin, a sa chu ei tur a ni lo a; sebawngpa neitua erawh chu hrem loh tur a ni." 
Exodus21:29 Amaherawhchu sebawngpa chuan tun hma pawhin mi sik lo hmang thin se la, tin, a neitu chu lo hriattir tawh bawk se la, nimahsela khung duh chuang loin, mipa emaw hmeichhia emaw lo sihlum ta se la, chu sebawngpa chu lunga denhlum tur a ni a, a neitu pawh chu tihhlum bawk tur a ni." 
Exodus21:30 A tlana tlan turin lo tuk zawk se la erawh chuan a nunna aiah chuan an tuk zat apiang chu tlanna'n pek tur a ni. 
Exodus21:31 Mi fapa emaw, mi fanu emaw pawh lo sihlum ni se la, hetiang dan bawk hian rel tr a ni." 
Exodus21:32 Sebawngpain bawihpa emaw, bawihnu emaw lo sihlum ta se la, an pu chu tangka sekel sawmthum a pe ang a, tin, sebawngpa chu lunga denhlum tur a ni ang." 
Exodus21:33 Tin, miin khuarkhurum chhin lo hawng se la emaw, miin khuarkhurum lo siam se la emaw, lo chhin lo se la, sebawngpa emaw sabengtung emaw lo tla ta se la," 
Exodus21:34 chu khuakhurum neitu chuan a rul tur a ni: ani chuan chung ran neitu chu tangka a pe ang a, tichuan anin ran thi chu a ruang a hlawm ang." 
Exodus21:35 Tin, mi pakhat sebawngpain mi sebawngpa lo sihlum se la, sebawngpa dam zawka chu an zuar ang a, a man chu an insem ang: tin, a thia pawh chu an insem ang.Sebawngpa chuan tun hma pawhin mi sik lo hmang thin se la, tin, a neitu chuan khung duh si lo se la, sebawngpa aiah chuan sebawngpa vek chu a pe ngei ngei tur a ni a, tin, ran thi ruang chu a hlawm ang." 
Exodus21:36 Sebawngpa chuan tun hma pawhin mi sik lo hmang thin se la, tin, a neitu chuan khung duh si lo se la, sebawngpa aiah chuan sebawngpa vek chu a pe ngei ngei tur a ni a, tin, ran thi ruang chu a hlawm ang." 
Exodus22:1 Tin, miin sebawngpa emaw beram emaw ru se la, tin, talhin emaw lo zuar ta se la, sebawngpa pakhat aiah chuan sebawngpa panga a chawi ang a, beram pakhat aiah chuan beram pali a chawi ang." 
Exodus22:2 Rukru, mi ina lut chu lo manin lo vawhlum ta se la,a thisen chhuah ve tur a ni lo ve." 
Exodus22:3 Niin a rawn chhuah hnan hman erawh chuan a thisen chhuah ve tur a ni ang: (kimchang takin a pe kir leh tur a ni; pek tur a neih loh erawh chuan ruk a ruk avangin amah chu an zuar tur a ni.) 
Exodus22:4 Rukruin a thil ruk - sebawngpa emaw, sabengtung emaw, beram emaw - a nungin lo la nei reng se la, a leh hnih a chawi tur a ni." 
Exodus22:5 Miin lo emaw grep huan emaw lo ei zawhtir ta se la, a ran chu lo thlah se la, mi lo chu lo pehtir se la, ama lo tha ber leh, ama grep huan tha ber chuan a rul leh tur a ni." 
Exodus22:6 Mei chhuahin hling tawmte emaw lo manin, buhphalte emaw, buh ding lai emaw, lo emaw lo kang ta vek se la, mei chhuahtu ngeia chuan a rul ngei tur a ni." 
Exodus22:7 Miin a tangka emaw a bungrua emaw a thenawm vawntir se la, tin, chu mi in ata chu miin lo ru ta se la, rukru chu an man chuan a leh hnih a chawi tur a ni." 
Exodus22:8 Rukru chu an man si loh chuan, chu mi in neitupa chu Pathian kiangah va kal sela, a thenawmpa bungrua chu aman a lo lak a nih leh nih loh va fiah rawh se." 
Exodus22:9 Bawhchhiatna tawh phawt chu - sebawngpa thu-ah emaw, beram thu-ah emaw, silhfen thu-ah emaw, thil engpawh bo chungchang thu-ah reng reng - miin, hei chu ka ta a ni, lo ti ta se la, an pahniha thubuai chu Pathian hnenah thlen tur a ni; Pathianin thiam loh a chantir zawk apiang chuan a thenawmpa lakah chuan a leh hnih a chawi ang." 
Exodus22:10 Miin sabengtung emaw, sebawngpa emaw, beram emaw, ran engpawh a thenawmpa lo enkawltir se la; tin, lo thiin emaw, lo silin emaw, suamin emaw lo awm se la, tuma'n hmu si suh se la," 
Exodus22:11 ani chuan a thenawmpa ran chu a khawih leh khawih loh thu-ah, an pahnih karah chuan LALPA hming chhalin chhia a chham tur a ni; tichuan a neitu chuan chu chu a lo pawm ang a, ani chuan a rul lo ang." 
Exodus22:12 Amaherawhchu ruksak ngei a nih chuan a neitu chu a rul tur a ni. 
Exodus22:13 Sain seh se la, a them chu hriattirna'n rawn keng rawh se; chu mi sa seh ai chu a rul tur a ni lo." 
Exodus22:14 Miin a thenawmpa ran lo hawhsak se la, lo silin emaw lo thi emaw ta se la, tin, a neitupa chu awm lo se la, a rul ngei tur a ni." 
Exodus22:15 A neitupa chu a awm ve reng erawh chuan a rul tur a ni lo: man neia hawh a nih erawh chuan an inhawh dan dana thu a ni ang. 
Exodus22:16 Miin nula, nupuia la hual loh chu lo thlemin lo mutpui se la, a man pein a nupui atan a nei ngei tur a ni." 
Exodus22:17 A pain a neihtir phal lul loh chuan nula man zah sum chu a pe reng reng tur a ni. 
Exodus22:18 Dawithiamnu reng reng i zuah tur a ni lo. 
Exodus22:19 Tupawh ran mutpui apiang chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni. 
Exodus22:20 Tupawh LALPA hnenah chauh tih loh, pathian dang reng reng hnena inthawi chu tihboral hlauh tur a ni." 
Exodus22:21 Hnam dang i sawisa tur a ni lo a, i hnehchhiah tur a ni hek lo: nangni pawh Aigupta ramah khan hnam dang in nih kha." 
Exodus22:22 Hmeithai emaw fahrah emaw in tirethei tur a ni lo. 
Exodus22:23 Anmahni chu in tiretheih vaih a, mi rawn auh phawt chuan, an mi auhna aw chu ka lo ngaithla ngei ang a;" 
Exodus22:24 tichuan ka thinur chu a ling phut mai ang a, khandaihin ka rawn tihlum ang che u a; tin, in nupuite chu hmeithai an ni ang a, in fate pawh fahrahin an awm mai ang." 
Exodus22:25 Ka miteho zinga mi in hnena awm retheite tangka i puktir chuan i leibatu angah i ngai tur a ni lo a; a lakah a pung i phut tur a ni hek lo. 
Exodus22:26 I thenawm silhfen chu lo hrensak ta ang la, ni tlak hmain i pe leh tur a ni:" 
Exodus22:27 inthuam nana a neih chhun a ni a, a taksa tihlum nana a puan a ni si a: eng sinin nge a mut ang? Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, mi rawn auh chuan ka lo ngaithla ngei ang a; kei zawng mi khawngaih thei tak ka ni si a." 
Exodus22:28 Pathian chu i hau tur a ni lo a, i mite zinga roreltute chu anchhia i lawh tur a ni hek lo." 
Exodus22:29 I thlai thar hmasa ber leh i uain tui tla hmasa ber chu i hlan var tur a ni. I fapa upa ber chu mi pe tur a ni. 
Exodus22:30 Chutiang bawkin i sebawngpate leh i beramte pawh chu i ti tur a ni: ni sarih chu a pui hnenah a awm ang a, a ni riat ni chuan mi pe tur a ni.Tin, ka tan mi thianghlim in ni tur a ni: chuvangin rama sa seh reng rengte chu in ei tur a ni lo a; ui hnenah in teh mai tur a ni." 
Exodus22:31 Tin, ka tan mi thianghlim in ni tur a ni: chuvangin rama sa seh reng rengte chu in ei tur a ni lo a; ui hnenah in teh mai tur a ni." 
Exodus23:1 Thuthang dik lo chu I sawi chhawng mai mai tur a ni lo e: hretu fel lo tak nihna turin mi suaksual zingah chuan I kut chu telh ve suh. 
Exodus23:2 Thil sual tih tumin mipui chu I zui tur a ni lo a; thubuaiah pawh a tam lam, a dik lo zawk lamah chuan I tang ve mai tur a ni hek lo:" 
Exodus23:3 mi rethei pawh a thubuaiah I tan bik tur a ni hek lo. 
Exodus23:4 I hmelma sebawngpa emaw a sabengtung emaw bo I hmuh chuan, a hnenah I khalh hawnsak leh ngei tur a ni." 
Exodus23:5 Nangmah hawtu che sabengtung a phurin a delh beh reng I hmuhin, puih duhna reng nei lo mah la, I pui ngei tur a ni." 
Exodus23:6 I mi rethei chu a thubuaiah dik lo takin I relsak tur a ni lo. 
Exodus23:7 Thu dik loah zawng inthiarfihlim daih rawh; tin, mi thiam leh mi felte chu tihlum suh; mi suaksualte chu thiam ka chantir dawn si lo a." 
Exodus23:8 Tin, thamna reng reng I la tur a ni lo: thamna chuan khaw hmu lai mitte hi a tihdelsak thin a, mi fel thu chu a tihkhawlohsak thin." 
Exodus23:9 Hnam dang I hnehchhiah tur a ni lo: nangni pawh Aigupta ramah khan hnam dang in lo nih tawh avangin hnam dang rilru put dan chu in hre si a. 
Exodus23:10 Kum ruk chhung chu I loah buh tuh tur a ni a, chuta a hawng apiang chu khung zel tur a ni:" 
Exodus23:11 a kum sarih kum erawh chuan awmtir la, dah tui rawh; tichuan I mi retheiten an ei ve thei ang a; tin, an lak bang awm apiang chu ram saten an ei ve dawn nia. Chuvtiang bawkin I grep huan leh I oliv huan pawh I ti ve bawk tur a ni." 
Exodus23:12 Ni ruk chhungin I hna I thawk tur a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan I chawl rih tur a ni: tichuan I sebawngpa emaw I sabengtung emaw an lo chawl thei ang a, I bawihnu fapate leh I hnam dangte pawh an lo hahdam ve thei dawn nia." 
Exodus23:13 Tichuan in hnena ka sawi zawng zawng hi ngaihven u la: pathian dangte hming reng reng chu lam suh u, in ka atangin chhuah pawh chhuak suh se." 
Exodus23:14 Kum khatah vawi thum ka tan kut I nei tur a ni. 
Exodus23:15 Chhang dawidim telh loh kut I nei tur a ni. Thu ka lo pek tak che ang khan, ni sarih chhung chu chhang dawidim telh loh Abib thlaa hun ruatah khan I ei tur a ni, (kha mi thlain a nih kha Aigupta ram ata I lo chhuah:) tichuan ka hmaah tumah hi kut ruakin in lo kal tur a ni lo:" 
Exodus23:16 tin, loa I tuh, I thawhrim rah hmasa ber, buhseng k_t chu I nei tur a ni: tin, kum ral veleh loah I thawhrim rahte I khung vek hnuin pawl kut I nei tur a ni." 
Exodus23:17 Kum khatah vawi thum I mipate zawng zawng chu LALPA Pathian hmaah an rawn inlan thin tur a ni. 
Exodus23:18 Ka tan inthawina sa thisen chu chhang dawidim telh nen chuan I rawn hlan tur ani lo; ka tan kutna sathau chu zankhuain atuk thlengin awmtir reng tur a ni hek lo. 
Exodus23:19 I loah thlai thar hmasa ber chu LALPA I Pathian inah I rawn dah tur a ni. Kel no sa a pui hnutetuiin I chhum tur a ni lo. 
Exodus23:20 Ngai the, kawnga veng zel tur che leh hmun ka buatsaihah chuan hruai lut tur chein I hmaah vantirhkoh ka rawn tir dawn e." 
Exodus23:21 Ama zai ngai zel u langin, a thusawi pawm thin ang che u; a chungah hel suh u: inbawhchhiatnate chu a ngaidam duh dawn si lo a; amahah chuan ka hming a awm a nia." 
Exodus23:22 Amaherawhchu a thusawi I pawmsak tak meuh a, ka sawi apiang I tih zel chuan I hmelmate hmelma chu ka ni ve, ang a, I dote dova chu ka ni ve ang." 
Exodus23:23 Ka vantirhkoh chuan I hma a hruai zel ang a, Amor-hote, Hit-hote, Periz-hote, Kanaan-hote, Hiv-hote, Jebus-hote awmnaah chuan a hruai ang che: anni chu ka tiboral daih dawn e." 
Exodus23:24 An pathiante chu chibai I buk tur a ni hek lo a, an rawng I bawl tur a ni hek lo, an thiltih angte chu I ti ve tur a ni hek lo, I tichimit vek tur a ni a, an lungphunte chu I tikeh sawm vek zawk tur a ni." 
Exodus23:25 Tin, LALPA in Pathian rawng chu in bawl tur a ni, tichuan I chhang leh I tui chu mal a sawm ang a; tin, in zing ata hri ka tikiang daih dawn nia." 
Exodus23:26 I ram chhungah hian nau chhiat leh ching reng an awm lo ang a: I dam chhung nite chu ka tihtlingtlaksak ang che. 
Exodus23:27 I hmaah chuan ka tihbaihna ka tir ang a, I kalna tur rama mite zawng zawng chu ka 0timangang ang a, tichuan I hmelmate zawng zawng chu I hmaah ka tlanchhiattir ang." 
Exodus23:28 Tin, I hmaah khawinghal ka tir ang a, chu chuan Hiv-hote, Kanaan-hote, Hit-ho te I hmaah chuan a um zel ang." 
Exodus23:29 Kum khata chhung mai chuan ka hnawhchhuahsak lo ang che; chutilozawng ram chu a lo tiau mai ang a, ram sate chu I tan a lo tam lutuk dah ang e." 
Exodus23:30 I lo puna ram chu I luah khah hma chuan zawi zawiin ka hnawhchhuahsak hret hret zawk ang che. 
Exodus23:31 I ramri chu Tuifinriat Sen atanga Philistia-ho tuipui thlengin, tin, thlaler atanga Lui thlengin ka khamsan ang che: chu mi rama awmte chu in kutah ka pe dawn si a; tihchuan anmahni chu I hnawtchhuak tur a ni." 
Exodus23:32 An hnenah thu I thlung tur a ni lo e, an pathiante hnenah pawh I thlung tur a ni hek lo.I ram chhungah an awm tur a ni lo, chutilozawng ka chungah hian an sualtir dah ang che: an pathiante rawng I bawl vaih zawngin I tan thang a ni ngei dawn a ni,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
Exodus23:33 I ram chhungah an awm tur a ni lo, chutilozawng ka chungah hian an sualtir dah ang che: an pathiante rawng I bawl vaih zawngin I tan thang a ni ngei dawn a ni,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
Exodus24:1 Tin, ani chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Nang nen, Arona nen, Abihua nen, Israel upa sawmsarih nen LALPA hnenah lo chho u la, ralkhat atangin chibai rawn buk ang che u:" 
Exodus24:2 tin, Mosia chu amah chauhin LALPA hnenah lo kal se la; anniho erawh chu lo kal hnai suh se, mipuite pawh a hnenah chuan lo chho suh se,"" a ti a." 
Exodus24:3 Tichuan Mosia chu a zuk kal a, LALPA thu zawng zawng leh rorel dan tur zawng zawngte chu mipui hnenah a zuk sawi a: tin, mi zawng zawng chuan, ""LALPA sawi zawng zawngte chu kan ti ang e,"" tiin arualin an chhang dual dual a." 
Exodus24:4 Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA thu zawng zawng chu a ziak vek a, tin, atuk zing takah a tho a, tlang bulah chuan maicham a siam a, tin, lungphun sawm leh hnam hnih zatin a phun bawk a." 
Exodus24:5 Tin, Isreal thlahte zinga tlangvalte chu a tir a, chu mite chuan LALPA tan halralathilhlante an hlan a, tin, remna inthawiin sebawngpatein an inthawi bawk a." 
Exodus24:6 Tin, Mosia chuan chung thisen zatve chu a la a, maihunahte a dah a; tin, thisen zatve dang chu maichamah a theh a." 
Exodus24:7 Tin, thuthlunna bu chu a la a, mipuite hriatah chuan a chhiar a: anni chuan, ""LALPA'n a sawi zawng zawngte chu kan ti zel ang a, mi tihawih tak kan ni zel ang,"" an ti a." 
Exodus24:8 Chutichuan Mosia'n thisen chu a la a, mipuite chu a theh a, ""Ngai the u, LALPA'n he'ng thu zawng zawng chungchang thua in hnena thu a lo thlun tawh, thuthlunna thisen a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Exodus24:9 Chutichuan Mosia leh Arona leh Nadaba leh Abihua leh Israel upa sawmsarihte chu an han chho va: 
Exodus24:10 Israela Pathian chu an han hmu a; tin, a kephah hnuai chu sapphir lungrem ang mai, a thianzia chu van thiang vek ang mai hi a ni a." 
Exodus24:11 Tin, Israela thlahte zinga mi lianhote chungah chuan a kut a thlak lo: tichuan Pathian chu an hmu a, an eiin an in hlawm a." 
Exodus24:12 Chutichuan LALPA chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Tlangah hian ka hnenah lo chho la, lo awm rawh; tichuan mipuite I zirtir atana lungpheka dan leh thupek ka ziak chu ka lo pe ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus24:13 Tin, Mosia leh a rawngbawltu Josua chu an tho va: tin, Mosia chu Pathian tlangah chuan a han kal a." 
Exodus24:14 Tin, ani chuan upate hnenah huan, ""In hnena kan lo kal hma chuan hetah hian min lo nghak reng ang che u: ngai the u, Arona leh Hura in hnena an awm hi: tupawhin thubuai eng emaw in neih chuan an hnenah hian in lo kal thin dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Exodus24:15 Chutichuan Mosia chu tlangah chuan a han chho a, tin, chhumin tlang chu a chim ta hmur a." 
Exodus24:16 Tin, LALPA ropuina chu Sinai tlangah chuan a awm reng ta reng a, chhum huan ni ruk chhung chu a chim a: tin, a ni sarih ni chuan chhum atangin Mosia chu a han ko a." 
Exodus24:17 Tin, Israela thlahte mithmuhah chuan LALPA ropuina lan dan chu tlang chhipa thil kanralhmang mei ang mai a ni a.Tin, Mosia chu chhum zingah chuan a va lut a, tlangah chuan a han lawn a, tin, Mosia chu tlangah chuan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli a han awm a." 
Exodus24:18 Tin, Mosia chu chhum zingah chuan a va lut a, tlangah chuan a han lawn a, tin, Mosia chu tlangah chuan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli a han awm a." 
Exodus25:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia chu a bia a," 
Exodus25:2 Israela thlahte hnenah thu va sawi la, ka hnenah thil rawn hlan rawh se: an thinlunga chak taka pe apiangte pek chu ka tana thilhlanah in la tur a ni." 
Exodus25:3 Hengte hi a ni an hnen atanga hlan tura in lak turte chu: rangkachak te, tangka te, dar te," 
Exodus25:4 la dum pawl te, sen duk te, sen lar te, la zai sin te, kel hmul te," 
Exodus25:5 tin, berampa vun chhum sen te, savun tha chi vun te, thingri thing te;" 
Exodus25:6 khawnvar atan hriak te, hriak thih mi atn leh hal tur rimtui tak atan englo rimtui te," 
Exodus25:7 puithiam kawr leh kawr awma zeh turin onukion-te leh lunghlute nen. 
Exodus25:8 Tin, hmun thianghlim mi siamsak rawh se, an zinga ka chen ve theih nan." 
Exodus25:9 Biak buk lem leh a chhunga bungrua tur zawng zawng lem ka entir ang chiah che hian in siam tur a ni. 
Exodus25:10 Tin, thingri thingin bawm siam se la: a dung lam chu tawng hnih leh a chanve ni sela, a vang lam chu tawng khat leh a chenve ni se la, a san lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve ni rawh se." 
Exodus25:11 Tin, rangkachak hlir hlak tiin I luan tur a ni a, a chhung leh a pawn I luan tur a ni a, tin, rangkachakin a tlang I kawm tur a ni." 
Exodus25:12 Chu mi atan chuan rangkachak khang pali I chhung t1r a ni a, a ke paliah chuan vuah vek tur a ni; chu mi khang pahnih chu a lehlamah vuah tur a ni a, tin, khang pahnih chu a lehlamah vuah tur a ni." 
Exodus25:13 Tin, thingri thing zawnfungahte I siam tur a ni a, rangkachak tiin luan tur a ni." 
Exodus25:14 Tin, bawm chu zawn theih turin a panga khangah chuan zawnfungte chu I rawlh tur a ni." 
Exodus25:15 Chu bawma khangah chuan zawnfungte chu a invuah reng tur a ni: phawi chhuah hlek tur a ni lo e. 
Exodus25:16 Tin, bawm chhungah chuan thuhriattirna ka la pek tur che chu I dah tur a ni." 
Exodus25:17 Tin, rangkachak hlir hlakin zahngaihna thutphah I siam tur a ni: a dung lam chu tawng hnih leh a chanve ni se la, a vang lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve ni rawh se." 
Exodus25:18 Tin, cherub pahnih rangkachakin I siam tur a ni; zahngaihna thutphah hmawr ve vea mi chu a chherin I chher tur a ni." 
Exodus25:19 A hmawr lehlamah cherub pakhat siam la, a hmawr lehlamah cherub pakhat siam bawk ang che: zahngaihna thutphah nena inbelhbawm khawm vekin a hmawr ve ve a cherub pahnih chu in siam tur a ni." 
Exodus25:20 Tin, cherub-te chu inhmatawna zangaihna thutphah chu an thlaa hliapin, an thlate chu zar duai tur a ni; zangaihna thutphah lam chu cherub-te chuan an hawi ve ve tur a ni." 
Exodus25:21 Tin, bawm chungah zahngaihna thutphah chu I dah tur ani a, tin, bawm chhungah chuan thuhriattirna ka la pek tur che chu I dah tur a ni." 
Exodus25:22 Chutah chuan I hnenah ka lo kal ang a, tin, thuhriattirna bawm chunga cherub pahnih inkar, zangaihna thutphah chung lam atangin Israel mite thu ka pek tur apiang chungchung thuah chuan ka rawn be thin ang che." 
Exodus25:23 Tin, thingri thingin dawhkan I siam tur a ni: a dung lam chu tawng hnih ni se la, a vang lam chu tawng khat ni se la, a san lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve ni rawh se." 
Exodus25:24 Tin, chu chu rangkachak hlir hlak tiin luan tur a ni a, tin, rangkachakin a tlang I kawm tur a ni." 
Exodus25:25 Tin, kutphah bawka hlaiin a kawm I siam tur a ni a, tin, a kawm chu rangkachakin a tlang I kawm leh tur a ni." 
Exodus25:26 Tin, chu mi atan chuan rangkachak khang chu dawhkan pali I siam tur ani a, tin, chu mi khang chu dawhkan ke pali kil theuhvah chuan vuah tur a ni." 
Exodus25:27 Dawhkan chu zawna, a zawnfung chu rawlh theih turin khangte chu dawhkan a kawm sia vuah tur a ni." 
Exodus25:28 Tin, dawhkan chu zawn theihna'n zawnfungte chu thingri thingin I siam tur a ni." 
Exodus25:29 Tin, chu mi atan chuan thlengte, note, a uain th6wlte, a bun chhuahna tur berhbute I siam tur a ni: chung chu rangkachak hlir hlakin I siam tur a ni." 
Exodus25:30 Tin, dawhkanah chuan ka hmaah chhangdah I hlui fo tur a ni." 
Exodus25:31 Tin, khawnvar dahna rangkachak hlir hlakin I siam tur a ni: chu mi khawnvar dahna chu a ngul bul leh angul chu chher tur ani; a note, a parfungte, a parte nen chuan inzawm vek tur a ni:" 
Exodus25:32 tin, a sirahte chuan peng paruk lo peng chhuak se la; khawnvar dahna ngul sir lehlamah chuan peng pathum awm se la, tin, khawnvar dahna ngul sir lehlamah chuan peng pathum awm bawk rawh se:" 
Exodus25:33 a leh lampang pengah chuan vai umkhal kuhmum ang no pathum, a parfung leh a par I siam tur a ni; tin, a leh lampang pengah pawh vai umkhal kuhmum ang no pathum, a parfung leh a par I siam tur a ni: chutiang chuan khawnvar dahna peng paruk atan I siam tur a ni;" 
Exodus25:34 tin, khawnvar dahna ngulah chuan no pali, vai umkhal kuhmum anga siam, a parfung leh a parte a awm tur a ni;" 
Exodus25:35 tin, chu mi inzawm vek peng pahnih hnuaiah chuan parfung awm se la, tin, chu mi inzawn vek peng pahnih hnuaiah chuan parfung awm se la, khawnvar dahna ngula peng parukah chuan awm vek tur a ni." 
Exodus25:36 Chung a parfungte leh a pengte chuan a zawm vek tur a ni a: apum chuan rangkachak hlir hlaka chher tur a ni. 
Exodus25:37 Tin, chu mi atan khanvar pasarih I siam tur a ni: tichuan khawnvarte chu an dah ang a, a hma zawnte chu a en theih nan." 
Exodus25:38 Tin, chu mi atana hman tur chaichehte leh meivap dahnate chu rangkachak hlir hlak a ni tur a ni." 
Exodus25:39 Chu mi khawnvar dahna leh a hmanrua tur zawng zawng siamna'n chuan rangkachak hlir hlak talent khat I hmang tur a ni.Tichuan tlanga a lem ka entir ang chiah che khan engkim I siam tur a ni tih hre reng rawh khai. 
Exodus25:40 Tichuan tlanga a lem ka entir ang chiah che khan engkim I siam tur a ni tih hre reng rawh khai. 
Exodus26:1 Tin, biak buk, puanzar sawm neiin i siam bawk tur a ni; la zai sin tak kawp, dum pawl te, sen duk te, sen lar te hmangin cherub lemte thiam taka siam chuantirin i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus26:2 Puanzar chu a sei lam tawng sawm hnih leh tawng riat theuh a ni ang a, puanzar chu a hlai lam tawng li theuh a ni ang: puanzar zawng zawng chu inchen vek tur a ni." 
Exodus26:3 Puanzar pangate chu inzawm tur a ni a; tin, puanzar panga vekte pawh chu inzawm bawk tur a ni." 
Exodus26:4 Tin, puanzar zawm khat hmawrtawng ber tlangah chuan a beng a dum pawlin i siam tur a ni a, chutiang bawkin puanzar zawm lehlam hmawrtawng ber tlangah chuan i siam bawk tur a ni." 
Exodus26:5 Puanzar pakhatah chuan beng sawmnga i siam tur a ni a, tin, zawm khat puanzar tlangah pawh chuan beng sawmnga i siam bawk tur a ni a; chung bengte chu a inep thiah tur a ni." 
Exodus26:6 Tin, rangkachak chilhbehnate sawmnga i siam tur a ni a, a chilhbehnate chuan puanzarte chu i chilh bet tur a ni a: tichuan biak buk chu pindan pakhat a lo ni tur a ni." 
Exodus26:7 Tin, biak buk chung khuhna'n kel hmul puanzarte i siam tur a ni: puanzar sawm leh pakhat i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus26:8 Puanzar chu a sei lam tawng sawmthum theuh a ni tur a ni a, tin, puanzar chu a hlai lam tawng li theuh a ni tur a ni: puanzar sawm leh pakhatte chu inchen vek tur a ni." 
Exodus26:9 Tin, puanzar pangate chu i thui zawm vek tur a ni a, tin, puanzar paruk pawh chu thui zawm bawk tur a ni a, puan in hma lama puanzar a parukna chuan a khuh tur a ni." 
Exodus26:10 Tin, puanzar zawm khat tlangah chuan beng sawmnga i siam tur a ni a, tin, puanzar zawm lehlam tlangah pawh chuan beng sawmnga siam bawk tur a ni" 
Exodus26:11 Tin, dar chilhbehna sawmnga i siam tur a ni a, tin, chu mi chilhbehna chu puan tlanga a bengah chuan vuah tur a ni a, puan in chu chilh zawm vek tur a ni; pindan pakhat a lo nih theih nan." 
Exodus26:12 Puan in puanzar uai thla la chuang, a zatve la chuang chu biak buk kawmcharah a uai thla tur a ni." 
Exodus26:13 Tin, puan in puanzar a dung lam hmawr tuak ve vea tawng khat ve ve la chuanga chu biak buk bang lehlam lehlam khuhna'n a uai thla tur a ni." 
Exodus26:14 Tin, berampa vun chhum senin puan in chung khuhna te, savun tha chi vunin a chunga khuh lehnate i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus26:15 Tin, biak buk ban rem khawm turte chu ngil taka dingin thingri thingin i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus26:16 Tin, ban rem khawm sei lam chu tawng sawm ni se la, tin, a vang lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve ni theuh rawh se." 
Exodus26:17 Ban rem khawm tinah chuan ke pahnih inzawmin a awm tur a ni: chutiang chuan biak buk ban rem khawm zawng zawng chu i siam tur a ni. 
Exodus26:18 Tin, biak buk atan ban rem khawm chhim chhawng chhim lampang atan chuan ban rem khawm sawmhnih i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus26:19 Tin, chu mi ban rem khawm sawmhnih nghahchhan atan chuan tangkaraw tlang kerkuak sawmli i siam tur a ni; a ke pahnih atan ban rem khawm pakhat nghahchhan kerkuak pahnih i siam tur a ni:" 
Exodus26:20 tin, biak buk sir lehlam hmar chhawng lam atan ban rem khawm sawmhnih i siam tur a ni:" 
Exodus26:21 Chung atan chuan tangkaraw tlang sawmli kerkuak nen, ban rem khawm pakhat atan nghahchhan kerkuak pahnih keh, ban rem khawm dang pakhat atan nghahchhan kerkuak pahnih i siam bawk tur a ni." 
Exodus26:22 Tin, biak buk kawmchar khawtlang chhawng lam atan chuan ban rem khawm paruk i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus26:23 Tin, biak buk kawmchar kil ve ve atan chuan ban rem khawm pahnih i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus26:24 Tin, a hnuai lamah chuan thlawp tur a ni, chutiang bawkin a chhip lam khang hmasa ber thlengin tih vek tur a ni: chutiang chuan a pahnih chuan tih ve ve tur a ni; chung chu a kil pahnih atan a ni tur a ni." 
Exodus26:25 Tin, ban rem khawm pariat, a nghahchhan tur tangkaraw tlang kerkuak sawm leh paruk nen a awm tur a ni; ban rem khawm pakhat atan nghahchhan kerkuak pahnih zel." 
Exodus26:26 Tin, thingri thingin bangrel, biak buk bang lehlam ban remkhawm atan panga, biak buk bang lehlam ban rem khawm atan panga," 
Exodus26:27 tin, biak buk kawmchar khawthlang chhawng lam ban rem khawm atan pawh panga i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus26:28 Tin, bangrel laita, ban rem khawm lai taka mi chuan ban rem khawm hmawrtawng ber atangin a lehlam hmawrtawng ber thlengin a thil tlang tur a ni." 
Exodus26:29 Tin, ban rem khawmte chu rangkachak tiin i luan tur a ni a, tin, bangrelte thil nan rangkachak khangte i siam tur a ni: tin, chung bangrelte chu rangkachak tiin i luan bawk tur a ni." 
Exodus26:30 Chutichuan tlanga ka entir dan ang chiah che khan biak buk chu i sa tur a ni. 
Exodus26:31 Tin, puanzar tur la zai sin tak kawp te, a dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen larte hmangin cherub lemte mi thiam tak siam chuantirin i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus26:32 Chu chu thingri ban pali rangkachak tia luanah chuan i zar tur a ni, a banna chu rangkachaka siam tur a ni, tin, tangkaraw tlang kerkuak palia inphun tur a ni." 
Exodus26:33 Tin, chu mi puanzar chu puanzar chilhbehnate hnuai lamah chuan i zar a ni a, tin, chu mi puanzar chhung lamah chuan thuthlunna bawm chu i dah lut tur a ni: tichuan puanzar chuan hmun thianghlim leh hmun thianghlim ber chu a daidansak dawn che u nia." 
Exodus26:34 Tin, zahngaihna thutphah chu hmun thianghlim berah thuthlunna bawm chhungah chuan i dah tur a ni." 
Exodus26:35 Tin, puanzar pawn lamah chuan dawhkan i hung tur a ni a, tin, biak buk chhim chhawng lam dawhkan epah chuan khawnvar dahna i hung tur a ni: tichuan dawhkan chu hmar lampangah chuan i dah tur a ni." 
Exodus26:36 Tin, Puan in kawngkaa zar tur la zai sin tak kawp te, a dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen lar te hmangin, puan zeh mawi thiam taka zeh nen i siam tur a ni.Tin, puanzar zarna tur chuan thingri ban panga i siam tur a ni a, chung chu rangkachak tiin i luan tur a ni; a bannate chu rangkachaka siam tur a ni: chung hunna atan chuan dar tlang kerkuak panga i chhung tur a ni." 
Exodus26:37 Tin, puanzar zarna tur chuan thingri ban panga i siam tur a ni a, chung chu rangkachak tiin i luan tur a ni; a bannate chu rangkachaka siam tur a ni: chung hunna atan chuan dar tlang kerkuak panga i chhung tur a ni." 
Exodus27:1 Tin, thingri thing maicham, a dung lam tawngnga in i siam tur a ni; chu maicham chu kil li tur a ni: tin, a sanlam chu tawng thum tur a ni." 
Exodus27:2 Tin, a kil li chhipahte chuan a kite i siam tur a ni: maicham nen chung a kite chu a inzawm vektu a ni." 
Exodus27:3 Tin, meivap ruh chhuahna bel te, vutlawhna te, maihun te, sa thurna tur thirkawm te, mei lakna te i siam tur a ni: chung hmanrua zawng zawng chu darin i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus27:4 Tin maicham a tan chuan dar len i siam tur a ni; tin, chu mi len chung, a kil liah te chuan dar khang pali i siamtur a ni." 
Exodus27:5 Tin, chu chu maicham dawhzawl hnuai lam vel chuan i dah tur a ni, chu len chuan maicham chane chu a han thlen theih nan." 
Exodus27:6 Tin, maicham atan zawnfung, thingri thing zawnfung te i siam tur a ni a, chung chu dar tuiin iluan tur a ni." 
Exodus27:7 Tin, chung zawnfungte chu chu khangah te chuan thawn luh tur a ni a, tichuan zawnfungte chu a zawnna turin maicham sir pahnihah chuan a awm ve ve tur a ni." 
Exodus27:8 Maicham chu thingphela chhungin a kawrawngin i siam tur a ni: tlanga ka entir ang chiah che khan an siam tur a ni. 
Exodus27:9 Tin, biakbuk hung chhung kawtlai i siam tur a ni: chhim chhawng chhim lampangah chuan, a sir lehlam a tan a hung chhung kawtlaia puanzar tur te, la zai sin tak kawpa siam tawng zaa sei awm tur a ni:" 
Exodus27:10 chumi a tan chuan ban sawmhnih leh, dar tlang kerkuak sawmhnih a awm tur a ni; bana a bannate leh a zarfungte chu tangkarua a ni tur a ni." 
Exodus27:11 Tin, chutiang bawkin, hmarchhawng lampang dung lam puanzar zar turte chu tawng zaa sei awm tur a ni a, tin, chu mi atan chuan ban sawmhnih leh, dar tlang kerkuak sawmhnih a awm tur a ni." 
Exodus27:12 Tin, a khawthlang lampang hung chhung kawtlai vang lam puanzar tur te chu tawng sawmnga a sei awm tur a ni: a ban sawm leh a nghahchhan keruak sawm nen." 
Exodus27:13 Tin, khawchhak lam chhawng, chhak lampang hung chhung kawtlai vanglam chu tawng sawmngaa sei tur a ni." 
Exodus27:14 Kawngka sir eh lama puanzar zar turte chu tawng sawm leh sawmngaa sei a ni tur a ni: a ban pathum leh a nghahchhan kerkuak pathum a awm tur a ni. 
Exodus27:15 Tin, kawngka sir leh lama puan zar zarturte chu tawng sawm leh tawng ngaa sei a ni tur a ni: a ban pathum leh a nghahchhan kerkuak pahtum a awm tur a ni." 
Exodus27:16 Tin, a hung chhung kawtlai kawngkaa zar tur tawng sawmhnih a sei, la zai sin tak kawp te, a dumpawl te, a senduk te, a sen larte hmangin, puan zehmawi thiam tak zeh nen a awm tur a ni: a ban pali leh a nghahchhan kerkuak pali a awm tur a ni." 
Exodus27:17 A hung chhung kawtlai ban zawng zawng te chu tangkarua zemchhuah vek tur a ni a; a banna te chu tangkarua a ni tur a ni a, a nghahchhan kerkuak te chu dar a i tur a ni." 
Exodus27:18 A hung chhung kawtlai ding lam chu tawngza ni se la, tin, a vanglam chu tang sawmnga ni se la, tin, a sanlam chu tawng nga ni se la, la zai sin tak kawp a chhung i se la, tin, a nghahchhan kerkuak te chu dar tlang ni rawh se." 
Exodus27:19 Biak buk sak na zawng zawnga a hmanraw thil zawng zawng te leh, a hung chhung kawtlai kilhbehna zawng zawng te chu dar ek a i tur a ni." 
Exodus27:20 Tin, khwnvar chu eng lai pawh a dah fo thin a nih theihna'n olive hriak fim taka sawr, chhit a tan i hnenah rawn la thin turin Israela thlah te chu thu i pe tur a ni.in biakna puan in chhungah, thuhriattir dahna bula puanzar pawn lamah chuan Arona leh a fapaten LALPA hmaah chuan tlai atangin a tuk thlengin an buatsaih thin tur a ni:hei hi Israel a thlahte tan kumkhuain an thlah te thleng pawhin thuruat ngheh tlat a ni tur a ni." 
Exodus27:21 in biakna puan in chhungah, thuhriattir dahna bula puanzar pawn lamah chuan Arona leh a fapaten LALPA hmaah chuan tlai atangin a tuk thlengin an buatsaih thin tur a ni:hei hi Israel a thlahte tan kumkhuain an thlah te thleng pawhin thuruat ngheh tlat a ni tur a ni." 
Exodus28:1 Tin, nangin i u Arona leh a fapa te chu Israel a thlahte zing ata i hnenah hruai ang che, ani chuan puithiam rawngbawl hna chu ka tan a thawh theih nan, Arona te, Arona fapa Nadaba ten Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te nen chuan." 
Exodus28:2 Tin, i u Arona tan silhfen thianghlim, tiropuitu a tan leh timawitu a tan i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus28:3 Tin, mi themthiamho, finna thlarauva ka tihkhah zawng zawng te chu nangin bia la, Arona chuan puithiam rawngbawlhna chu ka tan a thawh theihna tura tihthianghlima a lo awm theihna'n a silhfente chu siamsak rawh se." 
Exodus28:4 Tin, hengte hi a ni silhfen atana an siam turte chu; awmbel nen, puithiam kawr nen, kawrfual nen, kawrzeh mawi nen,puithiam lukhum leh kawnghren nen: tin, i u Arona leh a fapa te chuan puithiam rwngbawl hna chu ka tan an thawh theihna'n silhfen thianghlim an siamsak tur a ni." 
Exodus28:5 Tin, rangkachak zai te, la dum pawl te, sen duk te, sen lar te, la zai sin tak kawp te nen an la tur a ni." 
Exodus28:6 Tin, puithiam kawr chu rangkachak zai te, la dum pawl te, sen duk te, sen lar te, la zai s�n tak kawpte hmangin, mi themthiam takin a buatsaih angin an siam tur a ni." 
Exodus28:7 Tin, chu mi kawr hmawr hmalam leh hnung lama thui belhbawm, darbak pahnih neiht�r tur a ni; a in zawm tlat theih na turin." 
Exodus28:8 Tin, kawr chunga kawnghren tur themthiam taka tah, chumi kawr chi bawk tluan khat vek hman tur a ni; chu chu rangkachak zai nen, la dum pawl nen, sen duk nen, sen lar nen, la zai s�n tak kawp nena tah tur a ni." 
Exodus28:9 Tin, onukion lung pahnih i la tur a ni a, chutah chuan Israela thlah te hming i chuant�r tur a ni:" 
Exodus28:10 lung pakhat ah chuan an hming paruk, tin, lungdang pakhat ah chuan a la awma te paruk hming chu an piandan ang zelin i chuan t�r tur a ni." 
Exodus28:11 Hming nemnaa chuang, lunga ziak thiam miin a ziak thin ang hian Israela thlahte hming ang zelin lung pahnih ah chuan i ziak tur a ni." 
Exodus28:12 Tin, chu mi lung pahnih chu Israela thlah te hriatrengna lung atan puithiam kawr darbakah chuan i bel tur a ni: ti chuan Arona chuan hriatrengna turin LALPA hmaah an hmingte chu a koki khing hnihah chuan a bat ang." 
Exodus28:13 Tin, rangkachak zaite i phiar tur a ni a:" 
Exodus28:14 rangkachak hlir hlak khaidiat pahnih nen; hruihrual anga herhin i siam tur a ni: tin, chu mi khaidiat herhte chu phiarah chuan i zawm tur ni." 
Exodus28:15 Tin, rorelna awmbel, mithiam tak siam ang i siam tur a ni; puithiam kawr siam ang khan i siam tur a ni; rangkachak zai te, a dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen lar te, la zai sin tak kawpte hmangin i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus28:16 Kil li neia siama thuah tur a ni; a dunglam khapkhat, a vanglam pawh khapkhat bawk tur a ni." 
Exodus28:17 Tin, chutah chuan lunghlu, lunghlu tar li i zep tur a ni: tlar khat na chu sardion te, topazion te,smarangdos te;" 
Exodus28:18 tin, tlar hnih na chu anthraks te, sappheiros te, sordonuks te," 
Exodus28:19 tin, tlar thumna chu huakintos te, akates te,amethustos te," 
Exodus28:20 tin, tlar lina chu berullos te, onukion te, laspis te a ni tur a ni: rangkachak ah chuan phum thet tur a ni." 
Exodus28:21 Tin, lung te chu Israela thlah te hming ang zelin, hnam sawm leh hnam hnihte tan chuan a ni tur a ni:" 
Exodus28:22 Tin, awmbel chauh chuan hruihrual ang khaidiat te, rangkachak hlirhlak herh i siam tur a ni a." 
Exodus28:23 Tin, awmbel chhungah chuan rangkachak khang pahnih i siam tur a ni a, tin, chu mi khang pahnih chu awmbel tlang hmawr ve ve ah chuan i vuah tur a ni." 
Exodus28:24 Tin, rangkachak khaidiat herh pahnih chu awmbel tlang hmawr ve vea khang pahnihah chuan i thlung tur a ni." 
Exodus28:25 Tin, khaidiat herh hmawr lehlam pahnihte chu rangkachak zai phiar pahnih ah chuan i zawm tur a ni a, chu chu puithiam kawr hmalama darbakah chuan i thlung tur a ni." 
Exodus28:26 Tin, rangkachak khang pahnih i siam tur a ni a, chung chu awmbel kil pahnih, puithiam kawrdep chhung lampangah chuan i vuah tur a ni." 
Exodus28:27 Tin, rangkachak khang pahnih i siam tur a ni a, chung chu a hmalama puithiam kawr darbakna pahnih hnuai lampang, a inzawm na lai vel, puithiam kawr hrenna themthiam taka tah chhung lamah chuan i vuah tur a ni." 
Exodus28:28 Tin, puithiam kawra khangah te chuan awmbela khangte chu hrui dum pawlin an chilh zawm tur a ni, themthiam taka tah puithiam kawr hrenna chu lama awm theih nan leh, awmbel chu puithiam kawr nen a inhran loh nan." 
Exodus28:29 Tin, Arona chuan hmun thianghlima a kal hunah LALPA hmaah a hriatreng theih na turin a thinlung zawn taka rorelna awmbel ah chuan Israela thlahte hming chu a pu zel tur a ni." 
Exodus28:30 Tin, rorelna awmbelah chuan Urim leh Thumim i dah tur a ni a; chu chu Arona chuan LALPA hmaa a kal hunah chuan a thinlung zawnah chuan a dah zela tur a ni: tin, Rona chuan Israela thlah te rorelna chu LALPA hmaa akal hunah a thinlung zawnah chuan a pu zel tur a ni." 
Exodus28:31 Tin, puithiam kawr kawrfual a dum pawl hlir hlak i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus28:32 Tin, lai takah lu thawnna'n tih-awng tur a ni a; chu mi awng chu a thlerchhiat theih mai loh na turin, kawrbanbul angin a tlangvel chu cheh tur a ni." 
Exodus28:33 Tin, a femah te chuan pawmgranet lem - a dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a senlartein-a fem velin i siam tur a ni:" 
Exodus28:34 kawrfual fem velah te chuan rangkachak tengeng pakhat leh pawmgranet pakhat, rangkachak tengeng pakhat leh pawmgranet pakhat zel i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus28:35 Tin, Arona chuan rawnga bawlna turin chutiang chuan ain thuam tur a ni: tichuan hmunthianghlima LALPA hmaa a lo luh leh a chhuah hunah a ri chu hriat theih a ni tur a ni, chutilo chuan thi mai ang." 
Exodus28:36 Tin, rangkachak hlir hlak phek i siam tur a ni a, a pangah chuan hming nemna a chuang ang, 'LALPA PUAL' ti i chuantir tur a ni." 
Exodus28:37 chu chu hrui dum pawlah chuan i bel tur a ni a, puithiam lukhumah chuan bel tur a ni; puithiam lukhum hma lamah a awm tur a ni." 
Exodus28:38 Chu chu Arona chalah a awm tur a ni a, Israela thlahten an thilpek thianghlim atana an hlan tur thil serha sualna awmte chu Arona chuan a phur zel tur a ni; chu chu LALPA hmaa chhan tlaka a awm theihna'n a chalah a awm chawt tawt tur a ni." 
Exodus28:39 Tin, kawr chu puan zai sin tak, zeh mawi i tah tur a ni, tin, puanzai sin takin puithiam lukhum i siam tur a i." 
Exodus28:40 Tin, Arona fapa te chu kawr i siamsak tur a ni a, tin, kawnghren te, diarte i siamsak bawk tur a ni, tiropuitu leh timawitu a tan." 
Exodus28:41 chungchuan i u Arona leh a fapate chu i thuam tur a ni; tin, ka tan puithiam hna thawk a rawng an bawl theihna turin, an mahni chu hriak thihin, tihrangin, i tithianghlim tur a ni." 
Exodus28:42 Tin, an taksa saruak khuhna'n puan zai sin kekawr i siamsak tur a ni; kawng atanga malpui thleng ni se la:chu chu Aronas leh a fapate inbiakna puan ina an luh hun leh, hmun thianghlima rawngbawl tura maicham bula an kal hunin an ha zel tur a ni; chutilochuan suala ngaihin an thi dah ang e: chu chu amah leh a hnu athlahte thleng pawha kumkhuaa thuruat ngheh a ni ang." 
Exodus28:43 chu chu Aronas leh a fapate inbiakna puan ina an luh hun leh, hmun thianghlima rawngbawl tura maicham bula an kal hunin an ha zel tur a ni; chutilochuan suala ngaihin an thi dah ang e: chu chu amah leh a hnu athlahte thleng pawha kumkhuaa thuruat ngheh a ni ang." 
Exodus29:1 Tin, puithiam hnathawka ka rawng an bawl theihna tura an mahni tihthianghlimna'n an chauh hetiang hian i ti tur a ni: bawngpa tuai pakhat leh berampa sawiselbo pahnih nen," 
Exodus29:2 chhang dawidim telh loh nen, chhangper dawidim telh loh hriaka chawhpawih nen i ranla tur a ni: chhangphut dip tak chiin i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus29:3 chung chu fawng pakhata dahin, a fawng chawpin bawngpa le berampa pahnih nen chuan i rawn keng tur a ni." 
Exodus29:4 Tin, Arona leh a fapate chu inbiakna puanin kawngka bulah chuan rawn hruaiin, tiin i lo sil tur a ni." 
Exodus29:5 Tin, silhfente chu rawn lain, Arona chu kawr nen, puithiam kawr kawrfual nen, pithiam kawr nen awmbel nen haktirin, puithiam kawr hrenna themthiam taka tah chuan i hreng tur a ni:" 
Exodus29:6 tin, puithiam lukhum chu khumtirin, lallukhum chauh chuan lukhum thianghlim chu i khumtir tur a ni." 
Exodus29:7 Tichuan hriak thih mi rawn lain, a lu-ah leihin i thih tur a ni." 
Exodus29:8 Tin, a fapate chu rawn hruaiin kawr i haktir tur a ni." 
Exodus29:9 Tin, Arona leh a fapate chu kawnghrena hrengin, dar i khim tir tur a ni: tin, puithiam nihna chu kumkhua a tana ruat ngheh tlatin an chang tawh ang: tin, Arona leh a fapate chu i tithianghlim tur a ni." 
Exodus29:10 Tin, in biakna puanin bulah bawngpa i rawn la tur a ni: Arona leh a fapate chuan bawngpa luchauh chuan an kut lo nghat rawh se." 
Exodus29:11 Tichuan in biakna puanin kawngka bulah, LALPA hmaah chuan bawngpa chu i lo talh tur a ni." 
Exodus29:12 Tin, bawngpa thisen chu lo lain, maicham kite chu i kut zungtangin i hnawih tur a ni; tin, maicham bulah chuan thisen chu i leihbaw vek tur a ni." 
Exodus29:13 Tin, a kawchu thau zawng zawng nen, a tin tuam tu rang nen, a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau te nen lain maicham ah chuan i hal tur a ni." 
Exodus29:14 Bawngpa sa leh a vun leh a ek erawh chu daipawn lamah i hal tur a ni: chu chu sual tana hlan a ni. 
Exodus29:15 Berampa pakhat i rawn la bawk tur a ni; tin, Arona leh a fapaten chu berampa luchauh chuan an kut lo nghat rawh se." 
Exodus29:16 Tin, berampa chu lo talhin, a thisen chu lain, maicham chu chu a velin i theh tur a ni." 
Exodus29:17 Tin, berampa chu i chan tur a ni a, tin, a kawchu leh a kete chu silin, a sahrangte nen, a lu nen i dah tur a ni." 
Exodus29:18 Tin, berampa chu a pumin maichamah chuan i hal tur a ni: chu chu LALPA tana halral thilhlan a ni a: LALPA tana meihlan rimtui chu a ni e." 
Exodus29:19 Tin, berampa pakhat i rawn kai leh tur a ni; Arona leh a fapaten chu berampa luchauh chuan an kut lo nghat rawh se." 
Exodus29:20 Tichuan berampa chu lo talhin, a thisen chu lain, Arona beng dinglam tlangah te, a fapate beng dinglam tlangah te, an kut dinglam zungpuiah te, an ke dinglam zungpuiah te i tat tur a ni a, tin, maicham chu velah chuan thisen cu i theh tur a ni." 
Exodus29:21 Tin, maicham chua thisen leh, hriak thih mi chu rawn lain, Arona leh a silhfenahte leh, a fapate leh a hnena tel ve a fapate silhfente chu tihthianghlim an lo ni tawh ang." 
Exodus29:22 Berampa thau nen a mei thau tak nen, a kawchhung thau nen, a thin tuamtu rang nan, a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau te nen, a bawp dinglam nen i la bawk tur a ni; chu chu tihhranna berampa chu aw ni si a:" 
Exodus29:23 tin, fawnga chhang dawidim telh loh LALPA tana chhiaha mi chu chhangper pakhat nen, chhangper pan pakhat nen i telh tur a ni:" 
Exodus29:24 tin, chung chu Arona kut le a fapate kut ah chuan i dah vek tur a ni a, LALPA hmaa then thil hlan a tan i then tur a ni." 
Exodus29:25 Tin, an kut ata chu laksakin, LALPA tana rimtui a tan maichamah halral thilhlan chauh chuan i hal tur a ni: chu chu LALPA tana meia thil hlan a ni." 
Exodus29:26 Tin, Arona tihhranna berampa irawm chu lain, LALPA hmaa then thilhlan a tan i then tur a ni: chu chu i chanvo tur ni rawh se." 
Exodus29:27 Tin, Arona leh a fapate puala tihranna berampa irawm, then thil hlan leh chawikan thi hlan a bawp then tawh leh chawikan tawh chu i tithianglim tur a ni:" 
Exodus29:28 chu chu Israela thlahte laka kumkhuaa Arona leh a fapate chanvo tura ruat a ni ang: chu chu chawkan thil hlan a ni si a: remna thil hlana an inthawinate zinga Israela thlahten an chaikan thilhlan tur chu a ni ang, LALPA tana an chawikan thil hlan ngei chu." 
Exodus29:29 Tin, Arona silhfen thianghlim te chu a hnua a fapaten an la rochun zel ang, chungte chuan an in thuama hriak thih leh tihthianghlim an nih theih nan." 
Exodus29:30 A fapa a aiawh a puithiam hna thawk tura ruata chuan hmunthianghlima rawngbawl tura inbiakna puan ina a luh hunah ni sarih chhung chu inthuamin a awm tur a ni. 
Exodus29:31 Tin, tihhranna berampa chu rawn lain, a sa chu hmunthianghlimah i chhum tur a ni." 
Exodus29:32 Tichuan Arona leh a fapate mchuan berampa sa leh fawnga chhangper te chu in biakna puanin kawngka bulah ei rawh se. 
Exodus29:33 Tin, chung in remna thil, namahni tihhranna'n leh tihthianghlim nana hlante chu an ei tur a ni: amaherawhchu thil thianghlim a nih avangin midang zawngin man ei ve tur a ni lo." 
Exodus29:34 Tin, chu mi tihhranna sa emaw atuk thlenga a bang a la awm chuan, a bang chu meiin i hal tur a ni: chu chu thil thianghlim a nih avangin i ei tur a ni lo e." 
Exodus29:35 Tichuan thu ka pek zawng zawng che ang hian Arona leh a fapate chauh chuan i ti tur a ni: ni sarih an mahni i tihrang tur a ni. 
Exodus29:36 Tin, nitin sualhlan in thawina sebawngpa in remna turin i hlan tur a ni: tichuan inremna i siam hunin maicham chu i tifai dawn nia; tin, a tihtianghlim turin hriak i hnawih tur a ni." 
Exodus29:37 Ni sarih maicham atan inremna siamin, i tithianghlim tur a ni a: tichuan maicham chu thil thianghlim tak a lo ni ang; maicham dek a piang chu a lo thianghlim zel ang." 
Exodus29:38 Chutichuan maicham chua i hlan tur chu hei hi a ni; nitin kumkhat tling beram no pahnih zel. 
Exodus29:39 beram no pakhat chu zing lamah i hlan tur a ni a; tin, beram no pakhat chu tlai lamah i hlan tur a ni:" 
Exodus29:40 beram no pakhat hlannaah chuan chhangphut dip tak, epha hmun sawma thena hmun khat nena chawhpawlh i telh tur a ni a; in tur thil hlan atan uain hin hmun lia thena hmun khat nen." 
Exodus29:41 Tin, beram no pakngat chu tlai lamah i hlan tur a ni a, chu chu zing lama ei tur thilhlan dan nang leh in tur thilhlan dan ang in rimtui, LALPA tana meia thilhlan atan i hlan tur a ni." 
Exodus29:42 Chu chu i thlahte thlenga inbiakna puanin kawngka bula LALPA hmaa halral thilhlan fo tur a ni ang: chutah chuan a be tur che in ka lo kal thin ang. 
Exodus29:43 Israela thlahte pawh chutah chuan ka rawn be thin ang; tichuan puanin chu ka ropui naa tihthianghlim a ni ang. 
Exodus29:44 Tin, in biakna puan in leh maicham chu ka tithianghlim ang: Arona pawh a fapate nen ka tana puithiam hna thawka ka rawng an bawl theih na turin ka tithianghlim bawk ang." 
Exodus29:45 Tichuan Israela thlahte zingah chuan ka cheng ang a, tin, an PATHIAN ka ni ang.Chutichan an mahni ho zinga ka chen theihna tura Aigupta rama ta hruai chhuaktu LALPA an PATHIAN chu ka ni tih an hria ang: kei LALPA an Pahtian ka nih hi." 
Exodus29:46 Chutichan an mahni ho zinga ka chen theihna tura Aigupta rama ta hruai chhuaktu LALPA an PATHIAN chu ka ni tih an hria ang: kei LALPA an Pahtian ka nih hi. 
Exodus30:1 Tin, rimtui halna tur maicham i siam tur a ni: thingri thingin i siam tur a ni." 
Exodus30:2 A dunglam tawngkhat a vanglam tawng khat a ni tur a ni; kil li neia siam tur a ni: tin, a sanlam chu tawng hnih nisela: a kite chu maicham nan chuan in zawm vek tur a ni." 
Exodus30:3 Tin, a chute, a pang velte leh a kite chu rangkachak hlir hlak tiin i luantur a ni; tin, a kotlang velah chuan rangkachak i dah tur a ni." 
Exodus30:4 Tin, a kotlang hnuailamah, a sir tuakah chuan rangkachak khang pahnih i siam tur a ni; a sir pahnihah chuan i siam tur a ni, chung chu a zawn fung rawlhna tur a ni ang." 
Exodus30:5 Tin, thingri thinga zawnfungte siamin rangkachak tiin i luantur a ni." 
Exodus30:6 Tin, chu chu thuhriattirnachua ka rawn biak thinna tur che zahngaihna thutphah hmaah, thuhriattirna bawm kianga puanzar bulah i dah tur a ni." 
Exodus30:7 Tin, Aronan chutah chuan englo rimtui tak hal tur rimtui a hal tur a ni: tuktin khawnvarte a chei hun apiangin a hal thin tur a ni." 
Exodus30:8 Tin, Aronan tlai lamah khawnvarte a dah hun chuan rimtui chu a hal thin tur a ni: chu chu in thlahte thlenga LALPA hmaa rimtui a ni reng ang." 
Exodus30:9 Chutah chuan rimtui dang emaw, halral thilhlan emaw, ei tur thilhlan emaw in hlan tur a ni loa; tin, chutah chuan in tur thilhlan pawh in leih tur a ni lo." 
Exodus30:10 Tin, Aronan kumkhat ah vawikhat ki chauh te chuan inremna a siamtur a ni: inremna tura sual tawina thisen chuan kumtin vawikhat in thlahte thlengin inremna chu a siam thin tur a ni: chu chu LALPA tan thianghlim tak a ni,'' tiin." 
Exodus30:11 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia'n hnenah, Israela thlahte awm zat i chhiar ang zel chuan mitinin an nunna tlanna chu LALPA an pe zel tur a ni, i chhiar hun chuan an mahni i chhiar huna an zinga hri a lo len loh nan." 
Exodus30:12 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia'n hnenah, Israela thlahte awm zat i chhiar ang zel chuan mitinin an nunna tlanna chu LALPA an pe zel tur a ni, i chhiar hun chuan an mahni i chhiar huna an zinga hri a lo len loh nan." 
Exodus30:13 Heihi an pek tur chu a ni: chhiar tawhte zinga tel tura kal apiangte chuan hmunhtianghlim sekel chanve an pe tur a ni (sekel chu gera sawmhnih a ni): LALPA puala atan sekel chanve. 
Exodus30:14 Chhiar tawhte zinga tel tura kal apiang, kum sawmhnih a chin chulam zawng chuan LALPA puala thilhlan chu an pe tur a ni." 
Exodus30:15 in nunna tlanna tura LALPA puala thil an hlan chuan sekel chanve aia tam chu mi hausa na pe tur a ni lo a, mi rethei pawhin chu mi aia tlem chu a pe tur a ni lo." 
Exodus30:16 Tin, Israela thlahte tlanna man tangka chu lo lain, in biakna puan ina rawngbawl nan i lo ruat tur a ni; in nunna tlan nana LALPA hmaa Israela thlahte tana i hriat rengna a lo nih theina turin,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus30:17 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, insilna tur dar maihun, a hun chhan dar nen i siam bawk tur a ni: chu chu inbiakna puanin leh maicham inkarah i hung tur a ni; tin, chutah chuan tui i dah tur a ni." 
Exodus30:18 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, insilna tur dar maihun, a hun chhan dar nen i siam bawk tur a ni: chu chu inbiakna puanin leh maicham inkarah i hung tur a ni; tin, chutah chuan tui i dah tur a ni." 
Exodus30:19 Tin, Arona leh a fapaten chutah chuan an kete an sil thin tur a ni:" 
Exodus30:20 inbiakna puanin chhunga an luh hun in emaw, LALPA tana meia thilhlan hal tura maicham bula rawngbawl tura an lo kal hun in emaw tui chuan an in sil tur a ni; chutilochuan an thi mai ang:" 
Exodus30:21 Chutichuan an thihlonna'n an kut leh an kete chu an sil thin tur a ni: chu chu an tan kumkhua a tana thuruat ani ang, a mah leh a thlahte leh an thlahte thleng atan pawh,'' tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus30:22 LALPA vekin Mosia hnenah, Rimtui tuiber zinga mi-murra tui sekel zanga leh, thakthing rimtui, chumi zatve sekel zahnih leh sawmnga zet- leh fu rimtui sekel zahnih leh sawmnga leh," 
Exodus30:23 LALPA vekin Mosia hnenah, Rimtui tuiber zinga mi-murra tui sekel zanga leh, thakthing rimtui, chumi zatve sekel zahnih leh sawmnga zet- leh fu rimtui sekel zahnih leh sawmnga leh," 
Exodus30:24 thakthing chi dang sekel zanga, hmunthianghlima sekel an pek thin ang, olive hriak tin khat nen rawn lain," 
Exodus30:25 rimtui siamtu angin hriakthih chu hriak thianghlim a ni ang. 
Exodus30:26 Tin, inbiakna puan in te, thuhriattirna bawm te," 
Exodus30:27 dawhkan lehng a bungbel zawng zawng te, khawnvar dahna leh a hmanrua te, rimtui halna maicham te," 
Exodus30:28 halral thilhlan maicham leh a hmanrua zawng zawng te, maihun leh a hun chhan te nen, chu chuan i hnawih vek tur a ni." 
Exodus30:29 Tin, thianghlim tak an lo nih theihna'n i tithianghlim tur a ni: chung dek a piangte chu an lo thianghlim zel ang." 
Exodus30:30 Tin, ka tan puithiam hnathawh thawka ka rawng an bawl theihna'n Arona leh a fapate chu hriak thihin i tithianghlim tur a ni." 
Exodus30:31 Tin, Israela thlahte hnenah, 'He hriak hi i thlahte thlenga ka hriak thianghlim thih mi chu a ni ang." 
Exodus30:32 Mihring taksa ah chuan leih tur a ni lo a, he mi siam dan anga siam, a ang tak hian in siam tur a ni hek lo: hei hi zawng a thianghlima, tichuan in tan thil thianghlim a ni tur a ni." 
Exodus30:33 Tupawhin a anpui siam se la emaw, chu mi chu a chipuite zinga ata tihboral a ni ang,""tiin sawi ang che,'' tiin a sawi leh a." 
Exodus30:34 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, Rimtui tui tak takte te, onuka te, ngalbanum te - la ang che; rimtui ti tak beraw fim tak nen buk in zat vekin;" 
Exodus30:35 chu chu rimtui siamtu siam angin chi-a al, fim leh thianghlim takin rimtui i siam tur a ni:" 
Exodus30:36 a thente chu rawt dip dep tur a ni a, ka rawn biak thinna tur che inbiakna puan in chua thuhriattirna bulah chuan i dah tur a ni: chu chu in tan thianghlim tak a ni ang." 
Exodus30:37 Tin, chu mi rimtui i siamtur, a siam dan tur anga siam chu zawng nangmahni tan in siamtur a ni lo e: LALPA tana thil thianghlimah i ngai tur a ni.Tupawhin hnim atan ngawta chutiang a siam chuan chu mi chu a chipuite zing ata tihboral a ni ang.'' a ti a." 
Exodus30:38 Tupawhin hnim atan ngawta chutiang a siam chuan chu mi chu a chipuite zing ata tihboral a ni ang.'' a ti a. 
Exodus31:1 LALPA'n Mosia a bia a. 
Exodus31:2 Ngaiteh, Juda hnama mi Hura fapa Uria, chu mi fapa Bezalela chu ka thlang tawh a." 
Exodus31:3 Tin, ani chu finna te, hriat thiamna te hriatna te, kawng tinrenga themthiamna te," 
Exodus31:4 thiltih tur fing taka suangtuah thiamna te, lunghlute zeh tura phel thiamna te," 
Exodus31:5 thing zai mawi dan thiamna te, kawng tinrenga themthiamna te nei turin PATHIAN thlarauin ka tikhat tawh e." 
Exodus31:6 Tin, ngai teh, a hnena thawk ve turin Dana hnama mi Ahisamaka fapa Oholiaba keimahin ka ruat leh e: thil siam tura thu ka pek zawng zawng che" 
Exodus31:7 inbiakna puan in te, thuhriattirna bawm te, chu mi chhunga zahngaihna thutphah te, Puan in chhunga bungrua zawng zawng te," 
Exodus31:8 tin, dawhkan leh a hmanrua te, rangkachak hlir hlaka siam khawnvar dahna a hmanrua zawng zawng te nen, rimtui halna maicham te;" 
Exodus31:9 tin, halrala thil hlanna maicham, a bungbel zawng zawng te nen, maihun leh a hun chhan te;" 
Exodus31:10 tin, silhfen mawi taka tah te, puithiam rawng an bawl huna hak tur puithiam Arona silhfen thianghlim leh a fapate silhfen te;" 
Exodus31:11 tin, hriak thih mi te, hmun thianghlim atana rimtui tui takte hi an siam theina turin mi themthiamho zawng zawng te finna ka pe e: tih tura thu ka pek zawng zawng che ang kha an ti tur a ni.'' tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus31:12 ,13 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia'n hnenah, Israela thlahte hnenah chuan, 'Ka chawlhnite hi in serh ngei ngei tur a ni; in thlahte thlenga keimah leh nangmahni inkara chhinchhiahna a ni si a; kei hi LALPA nangmahni tithianghlimtu che u ka ni tih in hriat theih nan." 
Exodus31:13 ,12 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia'n hnenah, Israela thlahte hnenah chuan, 'Ka chawlhnite hi in serh ngei ngei tur a ni; in thlahte thlenga keimah leh nangmahni inkara chhinchhiahna a ni si a; kei hi LALPA nangmahni tithianghlimtu che u ka ni tih in hriat theih nan." 
Exodus31:14 Chuvangin chawlhni hi in serh tur a ni; chu chu in tan ni thianghlim a ni si a; tupawh tibawlhlawh apiang chu tihhlum ngei ngei tur a ni: tupawh chu mi nia hna engpawh thawk chu, chu mi chu a chipuite zing ata tihboral tur a ni." 
Exodus31:15 Niruk chhung hnathawhna'n hman tur a ni a; a nisarih ni erawh chu chawlh derna chawlhni, LALPA tana ni thianghlim a ni: tupawh chawlni a hnathawk apiang chu tihhlum ngei ngei tur a ni." 
Exodus31:16 Chutichuan Israela thlahte hian chawlhni chu an thlahte thlenga kumkhuaa thu thlunna'n chu chawlhni chu a na serh tur a ni. 
Exodus31:17 Keimah leh Israela thlah te inkarah hian kumkhuaa thuthlun chhinchhiahna a ni: niruk chhungin LALPA'n lei len vam a siama, tin, a nisarih ni chuan a chawl a; tin, a intihahdam ta a ni si a.' ti bawk ang che,' tiin a sawi a.Tichuan sinai tlanga a mah a biak zawh chuan thuhriattirna lungphek pahnih, lung phek, PATHIAN kutzunga ziak chu Mosia a pe ta a." 
Exodus31:18 Tichuan sinai tlanga a mah a biak zawh chuan thuhriattirna lungphek pahnih, lung phek, PATHIAN kutzunga ziak chu Mosia a pe ta a."
