Exodus32:1 Tin, mipuite chuan Mosia chu tlang ata lo chhuk thla har ta emin an hria a, mipuite chu Arona hnenah an kal khawm a, a hnenah chuan, ""Khai, kan hma hruai turin pathiante min siamsak rawh; he Mosia, Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuaktu lah hi a chanchin kan hre ta si lo a,"" an ti a." 
Exodus32:2 Tichuan Aronan an hnenah, ""In nupui te, in fapate leh in fanute beh lai, rangkachak bengbehte kha han thlawn u la, ka hnenah han la rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:3 Chutichuan mipuiho zawng zawngte chuan rangkachak bengbeh an beh laite chu an thlawn vek a, Arona hnenah chuan an rawn la a." 
Exodus32:4 Chutichuan mipuiho zawng zawngte chuan rangkachak bengbeh an beh laite chu an thlawn vek a, Arona hnenah chuan an rawn la a." 
Exodus32:5 Tin, chu chu Aronan a han hmuhin, a hmaah chuan maicham a siam ta a; tin, Arona chu a tlangau a, ""Naktuk hian LALPA tan kut awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:6 Tichuan a tuk zing takah an tho a, halral thilhlante an hlan a; remna thilhlante an rawn la a; tichuan mipui chu ei leh in turin an thu khawm a, infiam turin an tho leh a." 
Exodus32:7 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia chu a bia a, ""Zu chhuk tawh khai, i mite Aigupta ram ata i rawn hruai chhuahte khu an intichhe zo ta vek mai:" 
Exodus32:8 ka thupekte chu an hawisan hma zet mai, bawng no lem an insiam a, an bia a, a hnenah chuan an inthawi a, 'Aw Israelte u, hengte hi Aigupta ram ata rawn hruai chhuaktu che u in pathiante an nih hi,' an ti e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:9 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""He miteho hi ka enthla reng a, ngai teh, hnam luhlul tak an lo nih hi:" 
Exodus32:10 tichuan lo ngawi rawh, anmahni kangral zo vek khawpin an chungah ka thinur chu ling teh se: tin, nang hi chi ropui takah ka siam ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:11 Tin, Mosia'n LALPA a PATHIAN hnenah, ""LALPA, thiltihtheihna nasa tak leh, kut chak taka i mi, Aigupta ram ata i rawn hruai chhuahte chauh hian engah nge i thinurna chu a lin hle le?" 
Exodus32:12 Aigupta miten engah tehlul nge, 'An tana tha lo tur tlangahte thah tur leh lei chung ata kangral vek turin a hruai chhuak alo nih hi,' an la rawn tih ang le? I thinur nasa tak hi han tireh la, i mite chunga he thil tha lo tih i tum hi han lamlet leh ang che." 
Exodus32:13 i chhiahhlawh Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Israela te hnena, 'Vana arsi zatin i thlahte chu ka la tipung ang a, he ram ka lo sawi tawh zawng zawng hi i thlahte ka la pe bawk ang a, tichuan kumkhuain an luah hlen tawh ang,' tia nangmah ngei inchhala chhia i lo chham tawhnate kha hre reng ang che,"" tiin a ngen chiam a." 
Exodus32:14 Tichuan LALPA'n, ""Ka mite chauh thil tha lo ka ti ang,"" a tih chu a lamlet ta a." 
Exodus32:15 Tin, Mosia chu tlang ata thuhriattirna lung phek pahnih kengin a let thla leh ta a; lung phek a lehlam lehlam panga ziak chuan ve venate chu; a lehlam ve veahte chuan ziak a ni." 
Exodus32:16 Tin, Lung phekte chu PATHIAN kutchhuak a ni a, tin, a ziakte pawh chu PATHIAN ziak ngei, lung phekte chua ziak a ni." 
Exodus32:17 Tin, Josua'n mipui au thawm a han hriat chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Riah hmun lamah indo thawm ri a awm ka ti!"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:18 Tin, ani chuan, ""Hnehtu au thawm a nih loh chu, hnehate au thawm pawh a ni hek lo; hla sa thawm a ni ka hriat zawk ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:19 Tin, heti hi a ni a, riahhmun kiang a va thlen chuan, sebawng no lem leh lam chu a han hmu ta a: tichuan Mosia thinrim chu a ling ta phut mai a, a lung phek kente chu a paih ta thuai a, tlang hnuaiah chuan a paih keh ta a." 
Exodus32:20 Tin, sebawng no lem an siam chu a la a, meiah a rawh a, a rawt dip derh a, tuiah a phul chiam a, Israela thlahte chu a intir ta a." 
Exodus32:21 Tin, Mosia'n Arona hnenah huan, ""Henghote hian i chungah eng nge maw an tih a, hetiang thil sual nasa tak mai an chunga i thlentir le?"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:22 tin, Arona chuan, ""Ka pu thinrim hi ling teh thut mai suh se a: he'ng mipuiho hi sual lam awn tlat mi an ni tih i hria alawm." 
Exodus32:23 Ka hnenah, 'Kan hma hruai turin pathiante min siamsak rawh: he Mosia Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuaktu lah hi a chanchin kan hre ta si lo a,' an rawn ti a." 
Exodus32:24 Tin, keiin an hnenah, 'Tupawh rangkachak nei apiangin rawn thlawn rawh se,' ka ti a; chutichuan mi rawn pe a: tin, keiin meiah ka lo paih lut a, tichuan he sebawng no lem hi a lo chhuak ta mai alawm maw le,"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:25 Tin, mipuite chu an duh duhin an tal tih Mosia'n a hria a; (Arona chuan an hmelmate laka hmuhsitawma awm khawpin an duh duhin a lo taltir ta si a);" 
Exodus32:26 tichuan Mosia chu riahhmun luhna kawngkaah a sing a, ""Tupawh LALPA lama tang apiang chuka hnenah lo kal rawh se,"" a ti a. Tichuan Levia fate zawng zawng chu a hnenah an va kal khawm a." 
Exodus32:27 Tin, an hnenah, ""LALPA, Israelte Pathianin, 'Mi tinin in khandaih pai u la, riahhmun chhungah hian a luhna kawngka atanga kawngka lehlam thlengin vak vel ula, mi tinin in unaupa pawh, mi tinin in thianpa pawh, mi tinin in thenawmpa pawh that zel rawh u,' a ti a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:28 Tin, Levia fate chuan Mosia thu ang chuan an ti a: tin, chu mi ni chuan mi sangthum an thi a." 
Exodus32:29 Tin, Mosia'n, ""Vawiinah hian LALPA hnenah intihrang rawh u, a ni, mi tinin mahni fapa te, mahni unaupa te an lo do ta si a; tichuan vawiinah hian malsawmnain a rawn vur thei dawn che u nia,"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:30 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tukah chuan Mosia'n mipuite hnenah chuan, ""Thil sual nasa tak mai in lo ti ta a, chutichuan LALPA hnenah ka han chho ang e; in sualnaah hian inremna ka siam thei mahna,"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:31 Tichuan Mosia chu LALPA hnenah a han kal leh a, ""Aw, henghote hian thil sual nasa tak mai an lo ti ta a, rangkachak pathiante chu an lo insiam ta." 
Exodus32:32 Amaherawhchu an sual i ngaidam thei ang emaw chu? i theih loh zawngin, i lehkhabua i lo ziak tawh ata kha mi thai bo turin ka ngen a che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus32:33 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Tupawh ka chua thil tisual apiang chu ka lehkhabu ata ka thai bo ang.Tichuan kal la, kalna tur ka hrilh tawh che hmunah khan mipuihote hi va hruai phawt rawh: ngai teh, ka vantirhkohin i hma a hruai zel ang: amaherawhchu ka rawn hrem hunah chuan an sualna ngeiah chuan ka rawn hrem dawn a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, Arona din sebawng no lem chu an siam avangin LALPA'n mipuite chu a hrem ta a." 
Exodus32:34 Tichuan kal la, kalna tur ka hrilh tawh che hmunah khan mipuihote hi va hruai phawt rawh: ngai teh, ka vantirhkohin i hma a hruai zel ang: amaherawhchu ka rawn hrem hunah chuan an sualna ngeiah chuan ka rawn hrem dawn a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, Arona din sebawng no lem chu an siam avangin LALPA'n mipuite chu a hrem ta a." 
Exodus33:1 'Tichuan LALPA'n Mosia chu a bia a, ""Chhuak u la, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnena, 'I thlahte tan ka la pe ang che,' tia chhia ka lo chham tak ramah chuan nang leh Aigupta ram atanga i rawn hruai chhuahte nen hian heta ta hi han chho tawh u," 
Exodus33:2 ,3 hnutetui leh khawizu luanna ramah chuan: tin, in hmaah vantirhkoh ka rawn tir ang a; tichuan Kanaan-ho te, Amor-ho te, Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Hiv-ho te, Jebus-ho te chu ka hnawt chhuak ang a: kei zawng in zingah ka han chho ve dawn lo e: hnam luhlul tak in lo ni si a: kawng lakah ka tiboral nghe nghe dah ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus33:3 ,2 hnutetui leh khawizu luanna ramah chuan: tin, in hmaah vantirhkoh ka rawn tir ang a; tichuan Kanaan-ho te, Amor-ho te, Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Hiv-ho te, Jebus-ho te chu ka hnawt chhuak ang a: kei zawng in zingah ka han chho ve dawn lo e: hnam luhlul tak in lo ni si a: kawng lakah ka tiboral nghe nghe dah ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus33:4 Tin, mipuiten chu thu lawmawm lo tak chu an hriat chuan an tap hlawm a: tumah reng reng an inchei duh ta lo a." 
Exodus33:5 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Israela thlahte hnenah, 'Hnam luhlul tak in ni e: in zingah rei lo te pawh ka han tel ve zawngin ka tiboral ngei ang che u: chuvangin in incheinate kha hlip vek rawh u, tichuan ka tih dan tur che u ka hre thei ang, a ti,' ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus33:6 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan an incheinate chu Horeb tlang atang chuan an hlip thla hlen ta a." 
Exodus33:7 Tin, Mosia'n puan in kha a chhawm zel a, riah hmun pawn lam hla deuh takah a zar thin a; chu chu inbiakna puan in a ti a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, tupawh LALPA zawng duh apiang chu riahhmun pawn lama inbiakna puan inah chuan an va kal thin a." 
Exodus33:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Mosia chu Puan in pana a chhuah hunin mipui zawng zawng hu an tho vek a, mi tin, mahni puan in kawngkaah an ding theuh a. Mosia, Puan ina a luh thlengin an thlir reng thin." 
Exodus33:9 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Mosia chu Puan ina a luh veleh, chhum ding chu a lo chhuk a, Puan in kawngkaah chuan a lo ding thin a: tin, LALPA'n Mosia chu a rawn be thin." 
Exodus33:10 Tin, mipui zawng zawngin chhum ding hcu puan in kawngkaa ding an hmu a: tichuan mipui zawng zawng chu an tho a, mahni puan in kawngka theuhvah chuan chibai an lo buk thin a." 
Exodus33:11 Tin, miin a thian a bia ang mai hian LALPA'n Mosia chu inhmatawnin a be thin a, Tin,riahhmun lamah chuan a lo kir leh thin a: a rawngbawltu Nuna fapa Josua tlangval erawh chu puan in chhung ata chu a lo chhuak leh ve thin lo." 
Exodus33:12 'Tin, Mosia'n LALPA hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh, nangin ka hnenah, 'He mite hi han hruai chho rawh,' i ti a ni a: tu nge ni ka hnena i rawn tirh ve dawn mi la hrilh si lo. Nang lah chua, 'I hmingah ka hre chiang che alawm, tin, ka mittlungin i awm tih ka hre bawk che a lawm,' i ti a." 
Exodus33:13 Chuvangin i mit ka tlun si chuan, nangma ka hriat chian theihna'n che leh i mittlunga ka awm theihna'n tunah hian i kawngte hi khawngaih takin mi hriattir ang che: tin, he hnam hi i mite ngei an ni tih ngaihtuah ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus33:14 Tin, ani chuan, ""In zingah ka tel ve zel ang a, tichuan ka chawlhtir ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Exodus33:15 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, kan zinga i tel ve zel si loh chuan heta ta hi min hruai chhuak ma ta che." 
Exodus33:16 Kei leh i mite hi i mittlungin kan awm a ni tih hi engtin nge hriatna a awm theih tak ang: Lei chua mihring zawng zawngte hi kei leh i mite nen kan inthliar hranna tur chuan nang kan hnena i kal thin hi a ni lo em ni? a ti a. 
Exodus33:17 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Chu pawh chu i sawi ang chuan ka ti ang e: ka mit i tlung si a, i hmingah ka hre chiang bawk si chia,' a ti a." 
Exodus33:18 Tin, ani chuan, ""I ropuina chu khawngaih takin mi han entir teh,"" a ti a." 
Exodus33:19 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka thatna zawng zawng chu i hmaah ka lantir ang a, LALPA hming chu i hmaah ka puang zel ang; tichuan ka khawngaih apiang chu ka khawngaih ang a, zah ka ngaihna chu apiangah chuan zah ka ngai ang,"" a ti a." 
Exodus33:20 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka hmel zawng i hmu thei lo ang: mi hmua nung reng thei tumah reng reng an awm si lo a,"" a ti a." 
Exodus33:21 Tin, LALPA'n, ""En teh, ka kianga hi hmun pakhat a awm hi, lungpui chhungah hian i ding ang a:" 
Exodus33:22 tin, heti hi a ni ang a, ka ropuinain a rawn kal pelh chu che chuan, lungpui khi chauh hian ka dah ang chia, ka kal pelh hma loh che chuan ka kutin ka han khuh ang chia:tin, ka kut chu ka han la leh ang a, tichuan ka hnung lam chu i hmu ang: ka hmel erawh chu hmuh tur a ni lo e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus33:23 tin, ka kut chu ka han la leh ang a, tichuan ka hnung lam chu i hmu ang: ka hmel erawh chu hmuh tur a ni lo e,"" a ti a." 
Exodus34:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Lung phek pahnih hmana mi ang kha chher leh rawh: tin, lung phekah chuan hmana i tihkeh tak lung pheka thu chuang ang kha ka ziak leh ang e." 
Exodus34:2 Naktuk zingah inpeih chhuah tum ang che, tin, zingah chuan Sinai tlangah lo chho la, tlang chhipah ka hmaan lo ding ang che." 
Exodus34:3 i hnenah tumah lo kal ve suh se, tlangah reng reng chuan tumah a lanin lo lang hauh su se; beram rualte leh bawng rualte pawh tlang pangah chuan tla hlek bawk suh se,"" a ti a." 
Exodus34:4 Chutichuan lung phek pahnih hmana mi ang kha a chher a, tin, Mosia chu zing takah a tho a, LALPA'n thu a pek angin Sinai tlangah chuan a han lawn a, tin, lung phek pahnih a a keng a." 
Exodus34:5 Tin, LALPA chu chhumah chuan a lo chhuk a, tin, a kiangah a va ding a, LALPA hming chu a lam ta a." 
Exodus34:6 Tin, LALPA chuan a hma lamah chuan a kal pel a, ""LALPA chu, LALPA chu, PATHIAN lainatnaa khat, mi khawngaih thei tak, thin nel tak, ngilneihna leh thu tak ngah," 
Exodus34:7 mi sang tam tak chua khawngaihna lantir thin, khawlohna te, bawhchhiatna te, suahsualna te ngaidam thin; thiam loa ruatte chhuah mai ngai lo; pate khawlohna avanga fa te, fate fa leh te, chchuan thumna leh chuan lina thleng pawha hrem thin chu,"" tiin a puang ta a." 
Exodus34:8 Tichuan Mosia chu a kaikun ta thuai a, chibai a buk ta a." 
Exodus34:9 Tin, ani chuan, ""Tunah hian i mittlung ka nih chuan, aw Lalpa, Lalpa chu ka hnenah khawngaih takin kal ve ang hmiang; hnam luhlul tak an ni si a; tichuan kan khawlohna leh kan sualna ngaidam la, i rochan atan min nei ang che,"" a ti a." 
Exodus34:10 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ngai teh, thu ka thlung e: khawvel zawng zawng leh tu hnam zing maha la tih ngai loh, i mite zawng zawng mithmuhah hian thil mak ka ti dawn e: tichuan i vela awmho zawng zawngte hian LALPA thilti chu an hmu ang, i tana ka thiltih tur hi rapthlak tak a ni dawn si a." 
Exodus34:11 vawiina ka thupek tur che hi pawm rawh: ngai teh, i hmaah chuan Amor-ho te, Kanaan-ho te, Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Hiv-ho te, Jebus-ho te ka hnawt chhuak dawn e." 
Exodus34:12 Fimkhur rawh, chutichuan i kalna tur rama chengte hnenah thu i thlung ang a, in zingah hian thang a lo ni dah ang e:" 
Exodus34:13 amaherawhchu an maichamte chu in tichim vek tur a ni a, an lungphunte chu tikeh sawm vekin, an Asera-te chu in kit vek tur a ni:" 
Exodus34:14 Pathian dang reng reng chu i be tur a ni si lo va: LALPA chu a hming reng pawh thikthuchhiaa a ni a, Pathian thikthuchhia a ni si a:" 
Exodus34:15 chutilochuan chu mi rama mite hnenah chuan thu i thlung ang a, an pathiante lakah an uire ang a, an pathiante hnenah an inthawi ang a, an rawn sawm chein an inthawina chu i ei dah ang e;" 
Exodus34:16 tin, i fapate tan an fanute i nei ang a, an fanute chu an pathiante lakah an uire ang a, i fapate pawh an pathiante lakah an uiretir dah ang a." 
Exodus34:17 Milem chhun pathiante chu i siam tur a ni lo. 
Exodus34:18 Chhang dawidim telh loh Kut i nei tur a ni. Thu ka lo pek tak che ang khan, ni sarih chhung chu chhang dawidim telh loh Abib thlaa hun ruatah khan i ei tur a ni. Abib thla khan Aigupta ram ata chu i lo chhuak a ni si a." 
Exodus34:19 Chhul keu hmasa ber apiang chu ka ta a ni; tin, i ran pa zawng zawng sebawngpa leh berampa piang thla hmasa berte pawh." 
Exodus34:20 Tin, sabengtung piang thla hmasa ber chu beram noin i tlan tur a ni: tin, i tlan duh loh leh a ring chu i ulh tliak tur a ni. I fapa piang hmasa zawng zawng chu i tlan tur a ni. Tichuan ka hmaah tumah hi kut ruakin in lo lang tur ani lo." 
Exodus34:21 Ni ruk chhungin hna i thawk tur a ni a, a ni sarih ni erawh chuan i chawl tur a ni: lei leh lai leh bu seng lai pawhin i chawl tur a ni." 
Exodus34:22 Chawlhkar Kut, buh thar tirh Kut chu, kum a lo ral a, buh kchhung vek hnua pawl Kut nen i nei tur a ni." 
Exodus34:23 i mipa zawng zawngte chu kum khatah vawi thum, Lalpa Pathian, Israelte Pathian hmaah chuan an rawn inlan thin tur a ni." 
Exodus34:24 i hmaah hnam tin, ka hnawt chhuakin, i ramrite chu ka zauh dawn si a: kum khatah vawi thum LALPA i Pathian hmaa inlan tura i han kal huna chuan tumah in i ram hi an rawn ti hek lo ang." 
Exodus34:25 Ka tan inthawina sa thisen chu chhang dawidim telh nen chuan i rawn hlan tur a ni lo; Kalhlen Kut inthawina pawh chu a tuk thlengin awmtir tur a ni hek lo. 
Exodus34:26 i loa thlai thar hmasa ber chu LALPA i Pathian inah i rawn dah tur a ni. Kel no sa, a pui hnutetuiin i chhum tur a ni lo,"" a ti a." 
Exodus34:27 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Heng thute hi ziak rawh khai: he'ng ang thute hian ania, i hnenah leh Israelte hnena thu ka thlun ni,""" 
Exodus34:28 Tin, chutah chuan LALPA hneah ni sawmli leh zan sawmli a awm a; chaw reng reng a ei lo a, tui pah a in hek lo. Tin, lungphekahte chuan thuthlunna thu, thu sawm pekte chu a ziak ta a." 
Exodus34:29 Tin, heti hia ni a, Mosia chu thu hriattirna lung phek pahnih chu a kuta kengin Sinai tlang ata chu a chhuk a, tlang ata a chhuk chuan, Mosia chuan chutia an inbiakna avang chuan a hmai vun chu a lo eng ta tih a hre hauh lo a." 
Exodus34:30 Tin, Arona leh Israela thlah zawng zawngten Mosia an han hmun chuan, ngai teh, a hmai vun chu a lo eng a; an rawn hnaih ngam lo a." 
Exodus34:31 Tin, Mosia'n anmahniho chu a han au a; tin, Arona leh pungkhawmho roreltu zawng zawngte chu a hnenah an lo kir leh a: tin, Mosia'n anniho hu a lo bia a." 
Exodus34:32 Chumi hnuah chuan Israela thlahte zawng zawng chuan an rawn hnaih a: tichuan Sinai tlanga LALPA nena an inbiakna zawng zawngte chu thu pein a lo hrilh chhawng a. 
Exodus34:33 Tin, Mosia'n anmahni chu a biak zawh chuan a hmai chu hmai khuhnain a khu ta a." 
Exodus34:34 Amaherawhchu Mosia LALPA be tura a hmaa a luh hun apiang chuan, a lo chhuah leh hma loh chuan hmaikhuhna chu a hlip thin a; tin, a lo chhuak leh thin a, a thupekte chu Israela thlahte a hrilh chhawng thin a;Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Mosia hmai chu an han en a, Mosia hmai vun chu a lo eng thin a: tin, Mosia chu Pathian be tura a luh leh hma chuan hmaikhuhna chuan a hmai a khuh leh thin a." 
Exodus34:35 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Mosia hmai chu an han en a, Mosia hmai vun chu a lo eng thin a: tin, Mosia chu Pathian be tura a luh leh hma chuan hmaikhuhna chuan a hmai a khuh leh thin a." 
Exodus35:1 Tin, Mosia'n Israela thlah pung khawmho zawng zawngte chu a ko khawm a, an hnenah, ""Heng hi a ni hi LALPA'n in tih tura thu a pek che u chu." 
Exodus35:2 Ni ruk chhung hna thawhna'n hman tur a ni a, a ni sarih ni erawh chu in tan ni thianghlim, LALPA tana chawlh derna chawlhni a ni tur a ni: tupawh chu mi nia hna thawk apiang chu tihhlum tur ani ang." 
Exodus35:3 Chawlhni chuan in chenna hmun reng rengahte chuan mei in chhem tur a ni lo,"" a ti a." 
Exodus35:4 Tin, Mosia'n Israela thlahte pung khawmho zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Hei hi a ni hi LALPA'n thu apek che u chu," 
Exodus35:5 in zing ata LALPA tna thilhlan tur rawn la rawh u: tupawhin a thinlunga pek chak apiang chuan LALPA tana hlan tur chu rawn la rawh se; rangkachak te, tangka te, dar te," 
Exodus35:6 la dum pawl te, sen duk te, sen lar te, la zai sin te, kel hmul te nen;" 
Exodus35:7 tin, berampa vun chhum sen te, savun tha mi te, thingri thingte nen;" 
Exodus35:8 tin, khawnvar atan hriak te, hriak thih mi atan leh hal tur rimtui tak atan englo rimtui nen;" 
Exodus35:9 tin, puithiam kawr leh kawr awma zeh turin onukion lungte leh lunghlute nen." 
Exodus35:10 Tin, in zinga mi themthiam apiang chu lo kal se la, LALPA'n siam tura thu a pek apiang chu siam rawh se;" 
Exodus35:11 biak buk te, a puan in te, a khuhna te, a chilhbehna te, a ban rem khawm te, a bangrel te, a ban te, a nghahchhan kerkuak te nen;" 
Exodus35:12 bawm leh a zawnfung te, zahngaihna thutphah te, a daidanna tur puanzar nen;" 
Exodus35:13 dawhkan leh a zawnfungte leh a hmanrua zawng zawng te, chhang dah te nen;" 
Exodus35:14 tin, eng atan khawnvar dahna te leh a hmanrua zawng zawng te, a khawnvar te, chhit en atan hriak te nen;" 
Exodus35:15 tin, rimtui halna maicham leh a zawnfung te, hriak thih mi te, hal tur rimtui tak te, tin, biak buk kawngkaa zar tur kawngka puanzar te nen;" 
Exodus35:16 halrala thilhlanna maicham, a dar len leh a zawnfungte leh a hmanrua zawng zawng te, maihun leh a hun chhante nen;" 
Exodus35:17 biak buk hung chhung kawtlaia puan zar te, a ban te, a ban nghahchhan kekuar te leh a hung chhung kawngkaa puanzar te nen;" 
Exodus35:18 biak buk kil behna te, a hung chhung kawtlai kilh behna te, a hrui te nen:" 
Exodus35:19 hmun thianghlima rawngbawlna tura silhfen mawi taka tah te, puithiam rawng a bawl huna hak tur puithiam Arona silhfen thianghlim leh a fapate silhfen te,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
Exodus35:20 Tichuan Israela thlah pung khawmho zawng zawngte chu Mosia hnen ata an tin ta vek a. 
Exodus35:21 Tin, mi tin, thinlung taka phur sarh apiang leh rilru taka phal apiang chu an lo kal a, inbiakna puan ina hman tur leh rawngbawlna lam atana thil hman tul apiang leh silhfen thianghlim tur chu LALPA tan an rawn thawh hlawm a." 
Exodus35:22 Tin, a hmei apain pek chak apiangte chu an lo kal a, banbun te, bengbeh te, hming nemna zungbun te, thi te, rangkachak incheina tinrengte an rawn la a; tin, mi tin rangkachak hlan tur nei apiangin LALPA tan an hlan theuh a." 
Exodus35:23 Tin, mi tin la dum pawl te, sen duk te, sen lar te, la zai sin te, kel hmun te, berampa vun chhum sen te, savun tha mi te nei apiangin an rawn keng hlawm a." 
Exodus35:24 Mi tin, tangka leh dar te thawh apiangin LALPA tana thilhlan tur an rawn keng a: tin, mi tin, thingri thing, hmanraw tinreng atana hman tlak nei apiangin an rawn la a." 
Exodus35:25 Tin, hmeichhe themthiamho zawng zawngte chuan la an kai a, tin, chu an la kaih dum pawl te, sen duk te, sen lar te, la zai sinte chu an rawn keng hlawm a." 
Exodus35:26 Tin, hmeiche themthiam phur sarhho zawng zawngte pawhin kel hmun an kai a." 
Exodus35:27 Tin, puithiam kawr leh kawr awma zel turin roreltuten onukion lungte leh lunghlute an rawn keng a;" 
Exodus35:28 tin, rimtui te, hriak te nen; chhit en atan te, hriak thih mi atan te, hal tur rimtui tak atan te pawh." 
Exodus35:29 Israela thlahte chuan LALPA hnenah duh thua thilhlan an rawn hlan a: mi tin, a hmei apa, LALPA'n Mosia kuta thil siam tura thu apek zawng zawngte siamna tura thinlunga chak taka kengtue chuan." 
Exodus35:30 Tin, Mosia'n Israela thlahte hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh u, LALPA'n Juda hnama mi Hura fapa Uria, chu mi fapa Bezalela chu a thlang tawh e." 
Exodus35:31 Chu mi chu finna te, hriatthiamna te, hriatna te, kawng tinrenga themthiamna te nei turin PATHIAN thlarauin a tikhat tawh a," 
Exodus35:32 thiltih tur fing taka suangtuah thiamna te, rangkachak leh tangkarua leh dar chher thiamna te," 
Exodus35:33 lunghlute zeh tura phel thiamna te, thing zai mawi dan thiamna te, kawng tinrenga themthiamna te nei turin." 
Exodus35:34 Tin, amah nen, Dana hnama mi Ahisamaka fapa Oholiaba nen mite zirtir theihna finna a pe ve ve a.Anni chu kawng tinrenga themthiamna te, englo ziak thiamna te, themthiamna te, la dum pawl te, sen duk te, sen lar te, la zai sin te zehmawi thiamna te, puan tah thiamna te, hnathawh tinreng thiamna te, thiltih tur fing taka suangtuah thiamna te nei turin thinlung finnain a tikhat tawh e." 
Exodus35:35 Anni chu kawng tinrenga themthiamna te, englo ziak thiamna te, themthiamna te, la dum pawl te, sen duk te, sen lar te, la zai sin te zehmawi thiamna te, puan tah thiamna te, hnathawh tinreng thiamna te, thiltih tur fing taka suangtuah thiamna te nei turin thinlung finnain a tikhat tawh e." 
Exodus36:1 Tin, Bezalela leh Oholiaba mi leh themthiam tupawh LALPA'n thu a pek ang zela hmun thianghlima rawngbawlna hna tinreng thawk thei tura finna leh hriatthiamna a pek apiangte chuan an bei tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Exodus36:2 Tin, Mosia'n Bezalela leh Oliaba leh mi themthiamho, LALPA'n an thinlunga finna a pek a, chu mi hna bei peih tura thinlung taka phur sarh apiang chu a ko va:" 
Exodus36:3 tin, Israela thlahten hmun thianghlima rawngbawl nana thil siam tura an rawn thawh zawng zawng chu Mosia hnen atangin an la zel a. Tin, tuk tin, duh thua thilhlante chu a hnenah an rawn hlen zel bawk a." 
Exodus36:4 Tin, mi themthiamho zawng zawng, hmun thianghlim atana hna tinreng thawkte chuan an hnathawh lai chu antlansan theuh a," 
Exodus36:5 Mosia hnenah, ""LALPA'n siam tura thu a pek siamna'n mite chuan a chuang aliamin thil an rawn la e,"" tiin an thlen a." 
Exodus36:6 Tin, Mosia chuan thu a lo pe a, tichuan, ""Hmun thianghlim atana thil pek tur chu a hmei apa, tumahin rawn buatsaih tawh suh se,"" tiin an riahhmunah c chuan an tlangautir ta a. Chuti chuan mite chuan an rawn lak phal a ni ta lo a." 
Exodus36:7 An neih sa chu siam tul apiang siamna tur chuan a tawk hle mai a, a tam lutuk mah a ni." 
Exodus36:8 Tin, an zinga mi themthiam hna thawkho zawng zawngte chuan biak buk chu puanzar sawm neiin an siam a; chu puanzarte chu la zai sin tak kawp te, dum pawl te, sen duk te, sen lar te hmangin cherub lemte mi thiam tak siam chuantirin a siam a." 
Exodus36:9 Puanzar hu a sei lam tawng sawmhnih leh tawng riat theuh a ni a, puanzar chu a hlai lam tawng li theuh a ni: puanzar zawng zawng chu a inchen vek a." 
Exodus36:10 Tin, puanzar pangate chu a zawm vek a; tin, puanzar panga dangte pawh chu a zawm bawk a." 
Exodus36:11 Tin, puanzar zawm khat hmawrtwng ber tlangah chuan a beng a dum pawlin a siam a: chutiang bawkin puanzar zawm lehlam hmawrtawng ber tlangah chuan a siam bawk a." 
Exodus36:12 Puanzar pakhatah chuan beng sawmnga a siam a, tin, zawm khat puan zar tlangah pawh chuan beng sawmnga a siam bawk a: chung bengte chu a inep thliah a." 
Exodus36:13 Tin, rangkachak chilhbehna sawmnga a siam a, a chilhbehnate chuan puanzarte chu a chilh bet a: tichuan biak buk chu pindan pakhat a lo ni t a." 
Exodus36:14 Tin, biak buk chu khuhna'n kel hmun puanzarte a siam a: puanzar sawm leh pakhat a siam a." 
Exodus36:15 Puanzar chu a sei lam tawng sawmthum theuh a ni a, tin, puanzar chu a hlai lam tawng li theuh a ni: puanzar sawm leh pakhatte chu a inchen vek a." 
Exodus36:16 Tin, puanzar pangate chu athui zawm vek a, tin, puanzar paruk pawh chu a thui zawm vek a." 
Exodus36:17 Tin, puanzar zawm khat hmawrtawng ber tlangah chuan beng sawmnga a siam a, tin, puanzar zawm lehlam tlangah chuan beng sawmnga a siam bawk a." 
Exodus36:18 Tin, puan in chu pindan pakhat a lo ni theihna'n a chilh zawna turin dar chilhbehna sawmnga a siam a." 
Exodus36:19 Tin, berampa vun chhum senin puan in chu khuhna te, savun tha miin a chua khu lehnate a siam a." 
Exodus36:20 Tin, biak buk ban rem khawm turte chu ngil taka dingin thingri thingin a siam a." 
Exodus36:21 ban rem khawm sei lam chu tawng sawm a ni a, tin, a vang lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve theuh a ni a." 
Exodus36:22 Ban rem khawm tinah chuan ke pahnih inzawmin a zawm a: chutiang chuan biak buk ban rem khawm zawng zawng chu a siam a. 
Exodus36:23 Tin, biak buk atan chuan ban rem khawmte a siam a; chhim chhawng chhim lampang atan chuan ban rem khawm sawmhnih a siam a:" 
Exodus36:24 tin, chu mi ban rem khawm sawmhnih nghah chhan atan chuan tangkaraw tlang kerkuak sawmli a siam a; a ke pahnih atan ban rem khawm pakhat nghah chhan kerkuak pahnih leh a ke pahnih atan ban rem khawm dang pakhat nghah chhan kerkuak pahnih a siam a." 
Exodus36:25 Tin, biak buk sir lehlam hmar chhawng lam atan chuan ban rem khawm sawmhnih a siam a, tin, chhung atan chuan ban rem khawmsawmhnih a siam a." 
Exodus36:26 tin, chu atan chuan tangkaraw tlang kekuak sawmli nen, ban rem khawm pakhat atan nghahchhan kerkuak pahnih nen, ban rem khawm dang pakhat atan nghah chhan kerkuak pahnih a siam a." 
Exodus36:27 Tin, biak buk kawmchar khawthlang chhawng lam atan chuan ban rem khawm paruk a siam a," 
Exodus36:28 Tin, biak buk kawmchar kil ve ve atan chuan chuan ban remkhawm pahnih a siam a." 
Exodus36:29 Tin, a hnuai lamah chuan thlawp a ni a, chutiang bawkin a chhip lam kang hmasa ber thlengin thlawp a ni a, a kil pahnihah chuan chutiangin a ti ve ve a." 
Exodus36:30 Tin, ban rem khawm pariat, a nghah chhan tur tangkaraw tlang kerkuak sawm leh paruk nen a awm a, ban remkhawm tin, innghahna'n kerkuak pahnih zel a awm a ni." 
Exodus36:31 Tin, thingri thingin bangrel, biak bung ban nglehlam ban rem khawm atan panga," 
Exodus36:32 biak buk bang leh lam ban rem khawm atan panga, tin, biak buk kawmchar khawthlang chhawng lam ban rem khawm atan pawh panga a siam a," 
Exodus36:33 Tin, bangrel laita, ban rem khawm lai taka mi chu ban rem khawm h mawrtawng ber atangin a lehlam hmawrtawng ber atangin a lehlam hmawrtawng ber thlenga thil tlang turin a siam a." 
Exodus36:34 Tin, ban rem khawmte chu rangkachak tiin a luan a, tin, bangrelte thilna'n rang kachak khangte a siam a, tin, chung bangrelte chu rangkachak tiin a luan a." 
Exodus36:35 Tin, puanzar tur chu la zai sin tak kawp te, a dum pawl te, a sen duk te, sen lar te hmangin cherub lemte mi thiam tak siam chuantirin a siam a." 
Exodus36:36 Tin, chu mi atan chuan thingri ban pali a siam a, chu chu rangkachak tiin a luan a: a bannate chu rangkachak a ni: tin, chu nghah chhan atan chuan tangkaraw tlang kerkuak pali a chu a." 
Exodus36:37 Tin, Puan in kawngkaa zar tur la zai sin tak kawp te, a dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen larte hmangin, puan zeh mawi thiam tak zeh nen a siam a:tin, chu mi zarna tur ban panga a bannate nen a siam a: tin, ban lubawkte leh a zarfungte chu rangkachak tiin a luan a: tin, chu nghahchhan kerkuak pangate chu dar a ni a." 
Exodus36:38 tin, chu mi zarna tur ban panga a bannate nen a siam a: tin, ban lubawkte leh a zarfungte chu rangkachak tiin a luan a: tin, chu nghahchhan kerkuak pangate chu dar a ni a." 
Exodus37:1 Tin, Bezalela chuan thingri thingin bawm chu a siam a: a dung lam chu tawng hnih leh a chanve a ni a, a vang lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni a, a san lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni;" 
Exodus37:2 tin, a chu leh a pawn chu rangkachak hlir hlak tiin a luan a, tin, rangkachakin a tlang a kawm a." 
Exodus37:3 Tin, chu mi a ke palia vuah atan chuan rangkachak khang pali a chhung a; khang pahnih chu a lehlam atan a ni a, khang pahnih chu a lehlam atan a ni." 
Exodus37:4 Tin, thingri thingin zawnfungte a siam a, chu chu rangkachak tiin a luan a." 
Exodus37:5 Tin, bawm chu zawn teih turin a panga khangah chuan zawnfungte chu a rawlh a." 
Exodus37:6 Tin, rangkachak hlir hlakin zahngaihna thutphah a siam a: a dung lam chu tawng hnih leh a chanve a ni a, a vang lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni." 
Exodus37:7 Tin, cherub pahni rangkachakin a siam a, zahngaihna thutphah hmawr ve vea mi chu a chherin a chher a;" 
Exodus37:8 a hmawr leh lamah cherub pakhat, a hmawr lehlamah cherub pakhat: zahngaihna thutphah nena inbelhbawm hlawm vekina hmawr ve vea cherub-te chu a siam a." 
Exodus37:9 Tin, cherub te chu inhmatawna, zahngaihna thutphah chu an thlaa hliapin, an thlate chu an zar duai a; zahngaihna thutphah lam chu cherub-te chuan an hawi ve ve a." 
Exodus37:10 Tin, thingri thingin dawhkan chu a siam a: a dung lam chu tawng hnih a ni a, a vang lam chu tawng khat a ni a, a san lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni:" 
Exodus37:11 tin, chu chu rangkachak hlirhlak tiin a luan a, tin, rangkachakin a tlang a kawm a." 
Exodus37:12 Tin, kutphah bawka hlaiin a kawm a siam a, tin, kawm chu rangkachakin a tlang a kawm leh a." 
Exodus37:13 tin, chu mi atan chuan rangkachak khang pali a chhung a, tin, chu mi khang chu dawhkan ke pali kil theuhvah chuan a vuah a." 
Exodus37:14 Dawhkan chu zawn a, a zawnfung chu rawlh theih turin khangte chu a kawm siin a vuah a." 
Exodus37:15 Tin, dawhkan chu zawnna'n zawnfungte chu thingri thingin a siam a, tin, rangkachak tiin a luan a." 
Exodus37:16 Tin, dawhkana bungbel - thleng te, no te, a bun chhuahna tur berhbu te, uain thawlte chu - rangkachak hlir hlakin a siam a." 
Exodus37:17 Tin, khawnvar dahna chu rangkachak hlir hlakin a siam a: chu mi khawnvar dahna chu angul bul leh, a ngul chu a chherin a chher a; a no te, a parfung te, a parte chu a inzawm vek a:" 
Exodus37:18 tin, a sirahte chuan peng paruk a lo peng chhuak a: khawnvar dahna ngul sir lehlamah chuan peng pathum a awm a, tin, khawnvar dahna ngul sir lehlama chuan peng pathum a awm bawk a:" 
Exodus37:19 a lehlam pang pengah chuan vai umkhal kuhmum ang no pathum, a parfung le a par a siam a: chutiang chuan khawnvar dahna peng paruk atan a siam a." 
Exodus37:20 Tin, khawnvar dahna ngulah chuan no pali, vai umkhal kuhmum anga siam a parfung leh a parte a awm a," 
Exodus37:21 tin, chu mi inzawm vek peng pahnih hnuaiah chuan parfung a awm a; tin, cu mi inzawm vek peng pahnih hnuaiah chuan parfung a awm a, tin, chu mi inzawm vek peng pahnih hnuaiah chuan parfung a awm a, khawnvar dahna ngula peng parukah chuan a awm vek a ni." 
Exodus37:22 chung a parfungte leh apengte chuan a zawm vek a: a pum chuan rangkachak hlir hlaka chher a ni. 
Exodus37:23 Tin, chu mi atan chuan khawnvar pasarih nen, chaichehte nen, meivap dahnate nen rangkachak hlir hlakin a siam a." 
Exodus37:24 Chu mi khawnvar dahna leh a hmanrua tur zawng zawng siamna'n chuan rangkachak hlir hlak talent khat a hmang a. 
Exodus37:25 Tin, rimtui halna'n thingri thingin maicham a siam a, a dung lam chu tawng khat a ni a, a vang lam chu tawng khat a ni a, kil li a ni; tin, a san lam chu tawng hnih a ni; a kite nen chuan a inzawm vek a ni." 
Exodus37:26 Tin, a chung te, a pang velte le a kite chu rangkachak hli hlak tiin a luan a; tin, rangkachakin a tlang a kawm a." 
Exodus37:27 Tina kotlang hnuai lamah, a sir tuakah chuan rangkachak khang pahnih a siama; a sir pahnihah chuan a siam a, chu chu a zawnfung rawlhna tur a ni.Tin, thingri thing zawnfungte a siam a, rangkachak tiin a luan a." 
Exodus37:28 Tin, thingri thing zawnfungte a siam a, rangkachak tiin a luan a." 
Exodus38:1 Tin, thingri thingin halral thilhlan maicham chu a siam a: a dung lam chu tanwng nga a ni a, a vang lam chu tawng nga a ni a, kil li a ni; tin, a sang lam chu tawng thum a ni." 
Exodus38:2 Tin, a kil li chhipahte chuan a kite a siam a; chu kite chu maicham nen a inzawm vek a; dar tiina luan vek a." 
Exodus38:3 Tin, maicham atana hmanrua zawng zawng - bel te, vutlawhna te, maihun te, sa thuna thir kawm te, mei laknate - a siam a: chung hmanrua zawng zawngte chu darin a siam a." 
Exodus38:4 Tin, maicham atan chuan dar len, meicham dawhzawl hnuai lam vel chuan a chanve thlengin a siam a." 
Exodus38:5 Tin, zawnfungte rawlhna'n dar len hungna kil lia vuah tur khang pali a chhung a." 
Exodus38:6 Tin, zawnfungte chu thingri thingin a siam a, dar tiin a luan a." 
Exodus38:7 Tin, a zawnna turin maicham sira khangahte chuan zawngfungte chu a rawlh lut a; maicham chu thingphela chhungin a kawrawngin a siam a." 
Exodus38:8 Tin, dar maihun, a hun chhan dar nen inbiakna puan in kawngka bula hmeiche rawngbawl thinte darthlalangin a siam a." 
Exodus38:9 Tinbiak buk hung chhung kawtlai a siam a; chim chhawng chhim lam panga a hung chhung kawtlaia puanzar zar tur chu la zai sin tak kawpa siam tawng zaa sei a ni: 
Exodus38:10 chu mi atan chuan ban sawmhnih leh dar tlang kerkuak sawmhnih a awm a: bana a bannate leh a zarfungte chu tangkarua a ni. 
Exodus38:11 Tin, hmar lampanga puanzar zar tur chu tawng za a ni a, a bante chu sawmhnih leh dar tlang kerkuak sawmhnih a ni a: bana a bannate leh a zarfungte chu tangkarua a ni." 
Exodus38:12 Tin, thlang lampanga puanzar bante chu sawm a ni a, a nghahchhan kerkuak chu sawm a ni." 
Exodus38:13 Tin, chhak chhawng chhak lampanga puanzar zar turte chu tawng sawmnga a ni." 
Exodus38:14 Kawng ka sir lelama puanzar zar turte chu tawng sawm leh tawng ngaa sei a ni a, a ban pathum leh a nghahchhan kerkuak pathum a ni;" 
Exodus38:15 a sir lehlam panga mi pawh chutiang bawk a ni: biak buk hung chhung kawtlai kawngka sir lehlam lehlama puanzar zar turte chu tawng sawm leh tawng nga a ni; a bante chu pathum a ni a, a nghahchhan kerkuakte pawh pathum a ni." 
Exodus38:16 Biak buk hung chhung kawtlai vela puanzar zar tur zawng zawngte chu la zai sin tak kawp vek a ni. 
Exodus38:17 Tin, a ban nghahchhan kerkuakte chu dar a ni a; bana a bannate leh a zarfungte chu tangkarua a ni a; tin, a lubawkte chu tangkaraw tia luan a ni a, tin, biak buk hung chhung kawtlai ban zawng zawng zarfungte chu tangkarua vek a ni." 
Exodus38:18 Tin, biak buk hung chhung kawtlai kawngkaa puanzar zar tur chu puan zehmawi thiam taka zeh a ni, la zai sin tak kawp te, a dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen lar tea siam a ni:tin, a sei lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a san lam chu biakbuk hung chhung kawtlai puanzar zar turte nena induh chiah, tawng nga bawk a ni." 
Exodus38:19 Tin, a bante chu pali a ni a, a nghahchhan kerkuakte chu pali a ni a, dar vek a ni; abannate chu tangkarua a ni a, a lu bawkte leh a zarfungte chu tangkaraw tia luan a ni." 
Exodus38:20 Tin, biak buk leh a kawtlai chhung chung kilhbehna zawng zawngte chu dar vek a ni." 
Exodus38:21 Biak buk, thuhriattirna biak buk atana hmanrua, Mosia thupek anga puithiam Arona fapa Ithamara hova Levia chiten an chhiarte chu hengte hi a ni." 
Exodus38:22 Tin, Juda hnama mi Hura fapa Uria, chu mi fapa Bezalela chuan LALPA'n Mosia hnena siam tura thu a pek zawng zawng kha a siam vek a." 
Exodus38:23 A hnenah chuan Dana hnama mi Ahisamaka fapa Oholiaba, englo ziak thiam, kut themthiam, la dum pawl te, sen duk te, senlar te, la zai sin takte zehmawi thiamin a thawk ve a." 
Exodus38:24 Hmun thianghlim atana hman tul apianga rangkachak hman zawng zawng, rangkachak hlana chu talent sawmhnih leh pakua leh, hmun thianghlima sekel an pek thin anga chhiar chuan sekel zasarih leh sawmthum a ni." 
Exodus38:25 Tin, mipui chhiar tawhte zinga tel apiangte tangka pek chu talent za leh, hmun thianghlima sekel an pek thin anga chhiar chuan sekel sangkhat leh zasarih leh sawmsarih leh panga a ni:" 
Exodus38:26 kum sawmhnih achin chulam chhiar tawhte zinga tel tura kal nuairuk leh sangthum leh zanga leh sawmngate chu hmun thianghlima sekel pek thin anga chhiar chuan beka khat theuh (chu chu sekel chanve a ni) pe ang an ni. 
Exodus38:27 Tin, tangka talent za chu hmun thianghlim ban nghah chhan kerkuak leh puan zarna ban nghah chhan kerkuak chhunna'n an hmang a; ban nghah chhan kerkuak za chhun nan talent za an hmang a, ban nghah chan pakhat chhunna'n talent khat zel an hmang a ni." 
Exodus38:28 Tin, sekel sangkhat leh zasarih leh sawmsarih leh pangate chu hmangin bana bannate leh pangate chu hmangin bana bannate leh pangate chu hmangin bana bannate a siam a,a lubawkte chu tangkaraw tiin a luan a, a zarfungte a siam bawk a." 
Exodus38:29 Tin, an dar hlante chu talent sawmsarih leh sekel sanghnih leh zali a ni." 
Exodus38:30 Tin, chu chu inbiakna puan in kawngka ban nghahchhan kerkuakah te, dar maichamah te, a dar len leh maichama hmanraw thil zawng zawngah te,biak buk hung chhung kawtlai vel ban nghah chhan kerkuakah te, biak buk hung chhung kawngka ban nghah chhan kerkuakah te, biak buk chilhbelhna zawng zawngah te a siam vek a." 
Exodus38:31 biak buk hung chhung kawtlai vel ban nghah chhan kerkuakah te, biak buk hung chhung kawngka ban nghah chhan kerkuakah te, biak buk chilhbelhna zawng zawngah te a siam vek a." 
Exodus39:1 Tin, la dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen lar te hmangin hmun thianghlima rawngbawlna tura silhfen mawi takte an siam a, Arona tan silhfen thianghlimte an siam bawk a; LALPA'n Mosia'n thu a pek ang khan." 
Exodus39:2 Tin, rangkachak zai te, la dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen lar te, la zai sin tak kawpte hmangin puithiam kawr chu a siam a." 
Exodus39:3 Rangkachak chu pan takin an chhu per a, la dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen lar te, la zai sin tak tea mi themthiam takin a zeh turin an zai thlur seng a." 
Exodus39:4 A dar bak thui belhbawmin an siam a: a hmawr ve vea thui belhbawm a ni. 
Exodus39:5 Tin, chumi kawr chunga kawnghren tur themthiam taka tah chu, chu mi kawr chi bawk tluan khat vek a ni a: rangkachak zai te, la dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen lar te, la zai sin tak kawp tea tah a ni; LALPA'n Mosia thu a lo pek ang khan." 
Exodus39:6 Tin, Israela thlahte hming ang zelin nemnaa ziak ang chuanna rangkachak zai phiara phum onukion lungahte chuan an ziak a." 
Exodus39:7 Tin, Israela thlahte hriat rengna lung atan puithiam kawr darbakah chuan a bel a; LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Exodus39:8 Tin, awmbel chu puithiam kawr siam ang bawk mi thiam tak siam angin rangkachak zai te, la dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen lar te, la zai sin tak kawpte hmangin a siam a." 
Exodus39:9 Chu chu kil li nei ani a; awmbel chu an thuah a: a dung lam chu khap ani a, a vang lam chu khap bawk ani a, thuah a ni." 
Exodus39:10 Tin, chutah chuan lunghlute tlar liin an zep a: tlar khatna chu saridon te, topazion te, smarangdon te a ni a." 
Exodus39:11 Tin, tlar hnihna chu anthrax te, sappheiros te, sardonukion te a ni a." 
Exodus39:12 Tin, tlar thumna chu huakinthos te, akates te, amethutos te a ni a." 
Exodus39:13 Tin, tlar lina chu krusolithos te, berullion te, onukion te ani a: rangkachak zai phiara phum fel thet a ni." 
Exodus39:14 Tin, lungte chu Israela thlahte hming ang zelin, sawm leh pahnih chu an hming an zelin a ni a; hming nemnaa chuang ang, hnam tin, an hming ang zelin, hnam sawm leh hnam hnihte tan chuan a ni." 
Exodus39:15 Tin, awmbel chauh chuan hruihrual ang khaidiat te, rangkachak hlir hlakherh an siam a." 
Exodus39:16 Tin, rangkachak zai phiar pahnih leh rangkachak khang pahnih an siam a; tichuan awmbel tlang hmawr ve veah chuan khangte chu an vuah a." 
Exodus39:17 Tin, rangkachak khaidiat herh pahnih chu awmbel tlang hmawr ve vea khang pahnihah chuan an thlung a." 
Exodus39:18 Tin, khaidiat herh hmawr leh lam pahnihte chu rangkachak zai phiar pahnihah chuan an zawm a, chu chu puithiam kawr hma lama darbakah chuan an thlung a." 
Exodus39:19 Tin, rangkachak khang pahnih an siam a, chung chu awmbel kil pahnih, puithiam kawr dep chu lampangah chuan an vuah a." 
Exodus39:20 Tin, rangkachak khang pahnih an siam a, chu chu a hma lama puithiam kawr darbakna pahnih hnuai lam pang, a inzawmna lai vel, pithiam kawr hrenna themthiam taka tah chu lamah chuan an vuah a." 
Exodus39:21 Tin, puithiam kawra khangahte chuan awmbela khangte chu hrui dum pawlin an chilh zawm a, themthiam taka tah puithiam kawr hrenna chung lama a awm theihna'n leh awmbel chu puithiam kawr nen a inhran loh nan; LALPA'n Mosia thu apek ang khan." 
Exodus39:22 Tin, puithiam kawr kawrfual, a dum pawl hlir hlaka tah a siam a," 
Exodus39:23 tin, kawrfual lai tak chu kawr ban bul angin a tiawng a, a awng chu a thler chhiat thei mai lohna turin a tlang vel chu a chep a." 
Exodus39:24 Tin, kawrfual femahte chuan pawmgranet lem- a dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen lar te, la zai kawptein an siam a." 
Exodus39:25 Tin, rangkachak hlir hlak tengengte an siam a, chung tengeng chu kawrfual femah a velin pawmgranet inkarahte chuan an dah a, pawmgranet inkar zelah an dah a ni;" 
Exodus39:26 tengeng pakhat leh pawmgranet pakhat zel kawrfual femah a velin rawngbawlna tura inthuamna'n an dah a; LALPA'n Mosia thu apek ang khan. 
Exodus39:27 Tin, Arona leh a fapate tan chuan la zai sin taka tah kawrte an siama. La zai sin taka siam puithiam lukhum te, la zai sin taka siam diar tha tak te, la zai sin tak kawpa siam la zai sin kekawr te," 
Exodus39:28 la zai sin taka siam puithiam lukum te, la zai sin taka siam diar tha tak te, la zai sin tak kawpa siam la zai sin kekawr te," 
Exodus39:29 la zai sin tak kawp te, a dum pawl te, a sen duk te, a sen lar te hmanga puan zehmawi thiam taka zeh kawnghren te nen; LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Exodus39:30 Tin, lukhum thianghlim atana rangkachak phek chu rangkachak hlir hlakin an siam a, a pangah chuan hming nemnaa chuang ang, ""LALPA PUAL"" tih an chuantir a," 
Exodus39:31 Tin, puithiam lukhum chu lama bel turin hrui dum pawlin an thlung a; LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Exodus39:32 Chutichuan ibiakna puan in biak buk hna zawng zawng chu an zo ta a: tichuan LALPA'n Mosia tih tura thu a pek ang chiah zelin Israela thlahte chuan an ti a. 
Exodus39:33 Tin, Mosia hnenah biak buk an rawn kalpui a, Puan in te, a hmanrua zawng zawng te, a chilhbehna te a ban rem khawm te, a bangrel te, a ban te, a nghahchhan kerkuak te nen;" 
Exodus39:34 Berampa vun chhum sena siam a khuhna te, savun tha mia siam a khuhna te, a daidanna tur puanzar te nen," 
Exodus39:35 thuhriattirn bawm le a zawnfung te, zahngaihna bawm le a zawnfung te, zahngaihna thutphah nen," 
Exodus39:36 Dawhkan te, a hmanrua zawng zawng te, chhang dah te nen," 
Exodus39:37 rangkachak hlir hlaka siam khawnvar dahna te, a khawnvar, khawnvar dah tur te, a hmanrua zawng zawng le chhit en atan a hriak nen;" 
Exodus39:38 rangkachak maicham te, hriak thih mi te, hal tur rimtui tak te, Puan in kawngkaa zar tur puan zar te nen," 
Exodus39:39 dar maicham te, a dar len te, a zawnfung te, a hmanrua zawng zawng te, maihun leh a hun chan te nen;" 
Exodus39:40 biak buk hun ngchhung kawtlai puanzar te, a ban e, a ban nghahchhan kerkuak te, a hung chhung kawngkaa puanzar te, a rui te, a kilhbehna te, inbiakna puan in biak bung chhung a hmanraw thil zawng zawngte nen;" 
Exodus39:41 mun thianghlima rawngbawlna tura silhfen mawi taka tah te, puithiam Arona leh a fapaten puithiam rawng an bawl huna an hak tur silhfen thianghlimte nen." 
Exodus39:42 LALPA'n Mosia tih tura thu a pek ang zawng zawng chu Israela thlahte chuan an ti vek a.tin, Mosia'n chu hnathawh zawng zawng chu a han en a, ngai teh, an lo zo vek tawh a; LALPA thupek ang takin an zo vek a ni: tichuan Mosia'n anni chu mal a sawm a." 
Exodus39:43 tin, Mosia'n chu hnathawh zawng zawng chu a han en a, ngai teh, an lo zo vek tawh a; LALPA thupek ang takin an zo vek a ni: tichuan Mosia'n anni chu mal a sawm a." 
Exodus40:1 ,2 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""a thla khatna ni khat niah chuan inbiakna puan in biak buk chu i din tur a ni." 
Exodus40:2 ,1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""a thla khatna ni khat niah chuan inbiakna puan in biak buk chu i din tur a ni." 
Exodus40:3 Tin, a chauh chuan thuhriattirna bawm i dah tur a ni a, tin, bawm chu puanzarin i daidan tur a ni." 
Exodus40:4 Tin, dawhkan kha la lutin, a chua thil awmte chu i dah fel tur a ni; khawnvar dahna kha la lutin, a khawnvarte chu i dah tur a ni." 
Exodus40:5 Tin, hal tur rimtui halna rangkachak maicham kha thuhriattirna bawm hmaa dahin, bia buk kawngka puanzar kha i zar tur a ni." 
Exodus40:6 Tin, halrala thilhlanna maicham kha inbiakna puan in biak buk kawngka bulah i chhung tur a ni." 
Exodus40:7 Tin, inbiakna puan in leh maicham inkarah chuan maihun chhungin, chutah chuan tui i dah tur a ni." 
Exodus40:8 Tin, biak buk vel chuan a hung chhung kawtlai puanzar chu i zar tur a ni." 
Exodus40:9 Tin, hriak thih mi lain, biak buk leh a chhunga awm zawng zawngte chu hnawihin, i tithianghlim tur a ni, a bungbel zawng zawngte nen: tichuan a lo thianghlim ang." 
Exodus40:10 Tin, halrala thilhlanna maicham leh a hmanrua zawng zawngte chu hriak hnawihin, maicham chu i tithianghlim tur a ni: tichuan maicham chu thianghlim tak a lo ni ang." 
Exodus40:11 Tin, maihun leh a hun chhan chu hriak hnawihin i tithianghlim tur a ni." 
Exodus40:12 Tin, Arona leh a fapate chu inbiakna puan in kawngka bula rawn hruaiin tuiin i sil tur a ni." 
Exodus40:13 Arona chu silhfen thianghlimte chu i sintir tur a ni. Tichuan puithiam hna thawka ka tan rawng a bawl theina tura hriak thihin i tithianghlim tur a ni. 
Exodus40:14 Tin, a fapate pawh rawn hruaiin kawr i haktir tur a ni:" 
Exodus40:15 tichuan puithiam hna thawka ka tan rawng an bawl theihna turin an pa hriak i thih ang khan anmahni chu hriak i thih tur a ni: hriak thiha an awm hi an thlahte thleng pawha kumkhuaa puithiam tura ruat an ni reng tawh ang tih an tan chhinchhiahna ani ang,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus40:16 Chutiang chan Mosia'n a ti a: LALPA'n tih tura thu a pek ang zawng zawng chuan a ti vek a. 
Exodus40:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a kum hnihna thla tir ber, chu mi thla ni khat ni tak chuan biak buk chu an lo din ta a." 
Exodus40:18 Tin, Mosia chuan biak buk chu a han din a, a nghah chhan kerkuakte a han rem a, a ban remkhawmte chu a han din a, a nghahchhan kerkuakte a han rem a, a ban remkhawmte chu a han din a, a bangrelte chu a han rawlh a, a bante chu a han tung a." 
Exodus40:19 Tin, biak buk chauh chuan puan in a zar a, chu mi puan in chu chu a khuhnain a khu leh a; LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Exodus40:20 Tin, thuhriattirna chu alaa, bawm chhungah a dah a, bawmah chuan a zawnfungte a rawlh a, bawm chhunga chuan zahngaihna thuphah a dah a:" 
Exodus40:21 tin, bawm chu biak buk chhungah chuan a dah a, a daidanna puanzar chu a zar a, thuhriattirna bawm chu a daidang ta a; LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Exodus40:22 Tin, dawhkan chu inbiakna puan in chu, biak buk hmar lampang, puan zar pawn lamah chuan a chhung a," 
Exodus40:23 Tin, dawhkanah chuan LALPA hmaah chhang chu a dah fel diam a; LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Exodus40:24 Tin, khawnvar dahna chu inbiakna puan in chu biak buk chim lampang dawhkan epah chuan a dah a." 
Exodus40:25 Tin, khawnvarte chu LALPA hmaah chuan a dah a; LALPA'n Mosia thu apek ang khan." 
Exodus40:26 Tin, rangkachak maicham chu inbiakna puan in chu puanzar hmaa chuan a dah a:" 
Exodus40:27 tin, a chhungah chuan englo rimtui tak hal tur rimtui a hal a; LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Exodus40:28 Tin, biak buk kawngka puanzar a zar a." 
Exodus40:29 Tin, inbiakna puan in biak buk kawngka bulah chuan halrala thilhlanna maicham a chhung a, a chhungah chuan halral thilhlan leh ei tur thilhlan a hlan a; LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Exodus40:30 Tin, maihun chu inbiakna puan in leh maicham inkarah chuan a chhung a, insilna turin tui a chhung a." 
Exodus40:31 Tin, Mosia leh Arona leha fapate chuan chutah chuan an kut leh an kete an sil a," 
Exodus40:32 inbiakna puan ina an luh dawn leh, maicham bula an kal dawnin an insil a ni: LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan" 
Exodus40:33 Tin, biak buk leh maicham vel chuan hung chhung kawtlai chu a siam a, a hung chhung kawtlai kawngka puanzar chu a zar a. Chutichuan Mosia'n hna chu a zo ta a." 
Exodus40:34 Tichuan inbiakna puan in chu chhumin a rawn tuam ta mup a, biak buk chu LALPA ropuinain a lo khat ta a." 
Exodus40:35 Tin, chutia chhum a lo zin tak mup a, LALPA ropuinaa biak buk chu a lo khah tak avangin Mosia chu inbiakna puan in chhungah chuan a lut thei ta lo a." 
Exodus40:36 Tin, chhum chuan biak buk chu a kian chhohsan veleh Israela thlahte chu an insawn zel a, an kalna tur lama an kal chhung zawng chuan" 
Exodus40:37 chhum chuan a kian chhohsan loh erawh chuan a kian chhohsan hma loh zawng insawn loin an awm reng thin.Chhunah chuan LALPA chhum chu biak buk chungah a zing a, chutah chuan zanah mei a lo awm thin a. Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan an kalna tur lama an kal chung zawng chuan chu chu an hmu zel thin a ni." 
Exodus40:38 Chhunah chuan LALPA chhum chu biak buk chungah a zing a, chutah chuan zanah mei a lo awm thin a. Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan an kalna tur lama an kal chung zawng chuan chu chu an hmu zel thin a ni." 
Leviticus1:1 LALPA'n Mosia a ko a, inbiakna puanin atangin a bia a," 
Leviticus1:2 Israela thlahte chu bia la, an hnenah, 'In zinga tupawhin thilhlan LALPA hnena in hlanin, ran, bawng rual zinga mi in hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus1:3 A thilhlan chu bawngrual zinga mi, halral thilhlan a nih chuan a pa, sawiselbo a hlan tur a ni: ani chu LALPA hmaa pawm a nih theihna'n inbiakna puanin kawngka bulah a hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus1:4 Tin, halral thilhlan lu chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a; tichuan a tan inremna siamnaturin pawmsak a ni ang." 
Leviticus1:5 Tin, LALPA hmaah bawngpa a talh ang a; tin, Arona fapa puithiamten thisen chu an hlan ang a, inbiakna puanin kawngka bula maicham chu thisen chuan an theh vel tur a ni." 
Leviticus1:6 Tin, halral thilhlan chu a lip anga, a chan tur a ni." 
Leviticus1:7 Tin, puithiam Arona fapate chuan maichamah chuan mei an dah ang a, mei chungah chuan thing an chhep khawm ang:" 
Leviticus1:8 tin, Arona fapa puithiamte chuan sahrang te, a lu te, a thaute chu maichama mei chunga thingah chuan an dahfel ang a:" 
Leviticus1:9 a kawchhungte leh a kete erawh chu tuiin a sil ang: puithiam chuan LALPA tana rimtui tak, meia hlan halral thilhlan atan a pum chuan maichamah a hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus1:10 Tin, a thilhlan chu halral thilhlan atana ran rual zinga mi, beram emaw, kel emaw a nih chuan, a pa, sawiselbo a hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus1:11 Tin, maicham sir hmar lampangah LALPA hmaah a talh anga; tin, Arona fapa puithiamte chuam maicham chu a thisen chuan an theh vel tur a ni." 
Leviticus1:12 Tin, a chan ang a, a lu nen a thau nen; tin, puithiamin maicham chunga mei chungah thingah chuan a dah fel ang:" 
Leviticus1:13 a kawchhungte leh a kete erawh chu tuiin a sil ang: tin, apumin puithiamin a hlan ang a, maichamah a hal tur a ni: LALPA tana rimtui tak, meia hlan halral thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus1:14 Tin, LALPA tana a thilhlan chu sava lam halral thilhlan a nih huan, a thilhlanah thuro emaw, parva no emaw a hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus1:15 Tin, puithiamin maichamah a rawn keng ang a, a lu a thuai bung ang a, maichamah a hal ang; tin, a thisen chu maicham pangah chuan an far kangtir ang a;" 
Leviticus1:16 tin, a chawkchaweng chu a hmul nen a paih ang a, maicham kiang, chhak lampanga meivap dahna hmunah chuan a paih ang: tin, a thlate chu a thuai thlawn ang a, a tak erawh chu phel loin: tin, puithiamin maichamah, mei chunga thingah chuan a hal tur a ni: chu chu LALPA chuan a hal tur a ni: chu chu LALPA tana rimtui tak, meia hlan halral thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus1:17 tin, a thlate chu a thuai thlawn ang a, a tak erawh chu phel loin: tin, puithiamin maichamah, mei chunga thingah chuan a hal tur a ni: chu chu LALPA chuan a hal tur a ni: chu chu LALPA tana rimtui tak, meia hlan halral thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus2:1 Tupawhin thilhlan, chhangphut thilhlan LALPA hnena a hlan hunin, a thilhlan chu chhangphut dip tak a ni tur a ni; hriak a leih ang a, a chungah beraw a dah bawk ang:" 
Leviticus2:2 tin, Arona fapa puithiamte hnenah a kalpui ang a: tin, anin a vei khatin chuta chhangphut dip tak chu, a hriak nen a beraw zawng zawng nen chuan a la chhuak ang a; tin, puithiam chuan maicham chungah chuan hriat rengna, LALPA tana rimtui tak, meia thilhlan atan a hal ang:" 
Leviticus2:3 tin, chhangphut thilhlan lak bangte chu Arona leh a fapate ta tur a ni ang: chu chu LALPA tana meia thilhlantea thil thianghlim tak pakhat a ni." 
Leviticus2:4 Tin, chhangphut thilhlan, a urnaa ur thilhlan i hlan chuan chhangphut dip tak, hriaka hmeh dawidim telh loh chhang emaw, hriaka chulh dawidim telh loh chhangper pan emaw a ni tur a ni." 
Leviticus2:5 Tin, i thilhlan chu thlenga ur chhangphut thilhlan a nih chuan dawidim telh loh, hriaka hmeh, chhangphut dip tak a ni tur a ni." 
Leviticus2:6 I phel ang a, hriakin i leih tur a ni: chu chu chhangphut thilhlan a ni e." 
Leviticus2:7 Tin, i thillan chu kanbela kan, chhangphut thilhlan a nih chuan changphut dip tak leh hriaka siam a ni tur a ni." 
Leviticus2:8 Tin, chung thila siam chhangphut thilhlan chu LALPA hnenah i rawn la ang a: chu chu puithiam hnena hlan a ni ang a, anin maichamah a rawn kalpui tur a ni." 
Leviticus2:9 Tin, puithiamin chhangphut thilhlan ata hriatrengna chu a la chhuak ang a, maichamah chuan a hal ang: chu chu LALPA tana rimtui tak, meia thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus2:10 Tin, chhangphut thilhlan lak bangte chu Arona leh a fapa te pual tur a ni ang: chu chu LALPA tana meia thilhlantea thil thianghlim ber a ni." 
Leviticus2:11 Chhangphut thilhlan reng reng, LALPA hnena in hlan tur chu dawidim tela siam tur a ni lo: LALPA tana meia thilhlanah chuan dawidim emaw khawizu emaw reng reng in hal tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus2:12 Siam hmasak ber thilhlan ang zawngin LALPA hnenah in hlan ang a; nimahsela rimtui atana maichamah chuan dah tur a ni lo. 
Leviticus2:13 I chhangphut thilhlan zawng zawng chu Pathian thuthlung entirna chi i al tur a ni; I thilhlan zawng zawng chu chi i al zel tur a ni: i thil hlan zawng zawngah chuan chi i hlan tel tur a ni. 
Leviticus2:14 Tin, rah hmasa ber chhangphut thilhlan LALPA hnena i hlan chuan buh thar hmasa bera mi, changphut thilhlan atan chhangper I hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus2:15 Tin, hriak i leih ang a, a chhunga beraw i dah tur a ni; chu chu chhangphut thilhlan a ni.Tin, puithiamin chhang per leh hriak then chu hriat rengna'n beraw zawng zawng nen chuan a hal tur a ni: chu chu LALPA tana meia thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus2:16 Tin, puithiamin chhang per leh hriak then chu hriat rengna'n beraw zawng zawng nen chuan a hal tur a ni: chu chu LALPA tana meia thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus3:1 Tin, a thilhlan chu remna thilhlan inthawi a niha, bawng rual zinga mi a hlan chuan, a nu emaw a pa emaw pawh ni se la, LALPA hmaah sawiselbo a hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus3:2 A thilhlan lu chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah a talh ang a: tin, Arona fapa puithiamte chuan maicham chu thisen chuan an theh vel tur a ni." 
Leviticus3:3 Tin, remna thilhlan inthawinaa mi LALPA tana meia thilhlan a hlan ang a; a kawchhung a thau leh rilbawh zawng zawng" 
Leviticus3:4 leh a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau a nema mi leh a tin tuamtu rang,a kalte chawpin a phawrh tur a ni." 
Leviticus3:5 Tin, Arona fapaten maichamah, meia thing awm chunga halral thilhlan chunga chuan an hal tur a ni: chu chu LALPA tana rimtui tak, meia thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus3:6 Tin, remna thilhlan inthawinaa LALPA tana thilhlan chu beram rual zinga mi a ni chuan a nu pawh ni se la, a pa pawh nisela, sawiselbo a hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus3:7 A thilhlana beram no a hlan chuan LALPA hmaah an hlan ang a: 
Leviticus3:8 a thil hlan lu chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, inbiakna puan in kawtah a talh ang a: tin, Arona fapaten maicham chu thisen chuan an theh vel tur a ni.." 
Leviticus3:9 Tichuan remna thilhlan inthawinaa mi, LALPA tana meia thilhlan a hlan ang. A thau te, a mei thau tak a tluanin, a kawngruh thlengin a la vek ang a; a kawchhung thau te, a rilbawh zawng zawng te," 
Leviticus3:10 a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau a nema mi leh a thin tuamtu rang, a kalte chawpin a phawrh tur a ni." 
Leviticus3:11 Tin, puithiamin chu chu maichamah a hal tur a ni: chu chu LALPA tana meia thilhlan ei tur chhiah a ni." 
Leviticus3:12 A thilhlan chu kel anih chuan LALPA hmaah a hlan ang a: 
Leviticus3:13 tin, a lu chungah a kut a nghat ang a, tin, a lu chungah a kut a nghat ang a, inbiakna puan in kawtah a talh ang a: tin, Arona fapaten maicham chu thisen chuan an theh vel tur a ni." 
Leviticus3:14 Tin, chu mia a thil hlan chu a hlan ang a, LALPA tana meia thilhlan chu; a kawchhung thau leh a rilbawh zawng zawng" 
Leviticus3:15 leh a kal pahnih leh abawhtu thau a nema mi leh a thin tuamtu rang, a kalte chawpin a phawt tur a ni." 
Leviticus3:16 Tin, chung chu puithiamin maichamah a hal tur a ni: rimtui atana meia thilhlan ei tur chhiah a ni a; a thau zawng zawng chu LALPA pual a ni.Thau emaw thisen emaw ei loh tur tih hi in thlahte zel tan pawh in awmna apiangah zawm tura thupek ding reng a ni ang,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus3:17 Thau emaw thisen emaw ei loh tur tih hi in thlahte zel tan pawh in awmna apiangah zawm tura thupek ding reng a ni ang,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus4:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a." 
Leviticus4:2 Israela thlahte chu bia la, LALPA'n thil tih loh tura thu a pekte a enga pawh hi miin hriat loh vangin lo tipalh se la, a titu chu" 
Leviticus4:3 hriak thih puithiam ni se la, mipui thiam loh chantir thei thil a tihsual chuan a thil tihsual tak sual thawina'n LALPA hnenah bawng tuai sawiselbo, sual thawinaah hlan rawh se." 
Leviticus4:4 Bawng chu inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah LALPA hmaah a rawn kai ang a, bawng lu chungah a kut a nghat ang a, LALPA hmaah bawng chu a talh tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:5 Tin, hriak thih puithiam chuan bawng thisen engemawzat chu a la ang a, inbiakna puan inah chuan a rawn keng ang a:" 
Leviticus4:6 tin, puithiam chuan thisenah chuan a kut zungtang a chiah ang a, a then chu LALPA hmaah, hmun thianghlim puanzar bulah chuan vawi sarih a theh tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:7 Tin, puithiam chuan LALPA hmaah inbiakna puan ina rimtui halna maicham kiahte chuan thisen chu tlem a tat ang; tin, bawng thisen zawng zawng chu inbiakna puan in kawngka kianga halral thilhlan maicham bulah chuan a chhung chhuak tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:8 9,10 Tin, sual thawina bawng thau zawng zawng chu a la vek ang a; remna thilhlan inthawina bawngpaa mi lak angin a kawchhung thau leh a rilbawh zawng zawng leh a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau a nema mi leh a thin tuamtu rang, a kalte chawpin a phawrh ang a; tin, puithiamin halral thilhlan maichamah a hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:9 8,10 Tin, sual thawina bawng thau zawng zawng chu a la vek ang a; remna thilhlan inthawina bawngpaa mi lak angin a kawchhung thau leh a rilbawh zawng zawng leh a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau a nema mi leh a thin tuamtu rang, a kalte chawpin a phawrh ang a; tin, puithiamin halral thilhlan maichamah a hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:10 8,9 Tin, sual thawina bawng thau zawng zawng chu a la vek ang a; remna thilhlan inthawina bawngpaa mi lak angin a kawchhung thau leh a rilbawh zawng zawng leh a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau a nema mi leh a thin tuamtu rang, a kalte chawpin a phawrh ang a; tin, puithiamin halral thilhlan maichamah a hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:11 Tin, bawng vun te, a sa zawng zawng te, a lu nen, a kete nen, a kawchhungte, a ek te," 
Leviticus4:12 a bawng pum chu daipawn lam hmun faiah vut paihnaah a kalpui ang a, thingchungah a hal ang: vut paihnaah chuan hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:13 Israela chu a hnam puma an lo sual a, hre lo a LALPA thupek eng pawh an lo bawhchhiat palh chuan," 
Leviticus4:14 chu thil tihsual chu hriat chhuah a nih veleh mipuiin sual thawina'n bawng tuai an hlan ang a, inbiakna puan in kawtah an rawn kai tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:15 Tin, mipuiho upate chuan LALPA hmaah talh tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:16 Tin, hriak thih puithiam chuan inbiakna puan inah bawng thisen engemawzat chu a rawn keng ang a:" 
Leviticus4:17 tin, puithiamin thisenah chuan a kut zungtang a chiah ang a, puanzar bulah LALPA hmaah vawisarih a theh tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:18 Tin, thisen chu inbiakna puan ina LALPA hmaa maicham kiah chuan tlem a tat ang a, thisen zawng zawng chu inbiakna puan in kawngka kianga halral thilhlan maicham bulah chuan a chhung chhuak tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:19 Tin, a thau zawng zawng chu a la vek ang a, maichamah a hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:20 Chutiang chuan bawng chu a ti ang a; sual thawina bawng a tih ang chiahin hei pawh hi a ti tur a ni: tin, puithiamin inremna a siam sak ang a, ngaihdam an ni ang." 
Leviticus4:21 Tin, bawng chu daipawn lamah a kalpui ang a, bawng hmasa a hal angin a hal tur a ni: chu chu mipuite tana sual thawina a ni." 
Leviticus4:22 Roreltuin thil a tihsual a, LALPA a Pathianin tih loh tura thu a pek zawng zawng a enga pawh a tih palh a, thiam loh a chan a," 
Leviticus4:23 a thil sual tih chu hriattir a nih chuan a thilhlanah kel, a pa, sawiselbo a rawn kai ang a:" 
Leviticus4:24 kel lu chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, LALPA hmaah hlaral thilhlan an talh thinnaah chuan a talh tur a ni: chu chu sual thawina a ni." 
Leviticus4:25 Tin, puithiamin sual thawina thisen chu a kut zungtangin tlem a pir ang a, halral thilhlan maicham kiahte chuan a tat ang a, halral thilhlan maicham bulah a thisen chu a chhung chhuak tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:26 Tin, a thau zawng zawng chu remna thilhlan inthawina thau a hal angin maichamah a hal tur a ni: tin, a sual chungchang thuah chuan puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus4:27 roreltuin thil a tihsuala LALPA a Pathianin tih loh tura thu a pek zawng zawng a enga pawh a tih palha thiam loh a chana," 
Leviticus4:28 a thil sual tih chu hriattir a nih chuan a thilhlanah kel, a pa, sawiselbo a rawn kai ang a:" 
Leviticus4:29 kel lu chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, LALPA hmaa halral thilhlan an talh thinnah chuan a talh tur a ni: chu chu sual thawina a ni." 
Leviticus4:30 Tin, puithiamin sual thawina thisen chu a kut zungtangin tlem a pir ang a, halral thilhlan maicham kiahte chuan a tat ang a, halral thilhlan maicham bulah a thisen chu a chhung chhuak tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:31 Tin, a thau zawng zawng chu remna thilhlan inthawina thau a hal angin maichamah a hal tur a ni: tin, a sual chungchang thuah chuan puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus4:32 Tin, vantlang zinga mi a tua pawhin LALPA'n tih loh tura thu a pekte a enga pawh tihsual palhin, thiam loh lo chang ta se la," 
Leviticus4:33 a thil sual tih chu hriattir a nih chuan a thilhlanah kel, a nu, sawiselbo, a thiltih sual tak sual thawina'n a rawn kai tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:34 Sual thawina lu chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, halral thilhlanna hmunah chuan sual thawina chu a talh tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:35 Tin, puithiamin thisen chu a kut zungtangin tlem a pir ang a, halral thilhlan maicham kiahte chuan a tat ang a, a thisen zawng zawng chu maicham bulah chuan a chhung chhuak tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:36 Tin, a thau zawng zawng chu remna thilhlan inthawina thau an lak angin a la vek ang a; tin, puithiam LALPA tana rimtuiah maichamah a hal tur a ni; tin, puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus4:37 Tin, sual thawina'na a thilhlana beram no a rawn ken chuan, a nu, sawiselbo a rawn keng tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:38 Sual thawina lu chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, halral thilhlan an talhnaah chuan sual thawina'n a talh tur a ni." 
Leviticus4:39 Tin, puithiamin sual thawina thisen chu a kut zungtangin tlem a pir ang a, halral thilhlan maicham kiahte chuan a tat ang a, a thisen zawng zawng chu maicham bulah chuan a chhung chhuak ang a:tin, a thau zawng zawng chu, beram no thau, remna thilhlan inthawinaa mi lak angin a la vek ang a; tin, puithiamin LALPA tana meia thilhlan angin maichamah a hal tur a ni: tin, puithiamin a thil tihsual tak chungchang thuah inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam ani ang." 
Leviticus4:40 tin, a thau zawng zawng chu, beram no thau, remna thilhlan inthawinaa mi lak angin a la vek ang a; tin, puithiamin LALPA tana meia thilhlan angin maichamah a hal tur a ni: tin, puithiamin a thil tihsual tak chungchang thuah inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam ani ang." 
Leviticus5:1 Tupawh a thil hmuh emaw a thil hriat emaw hretu a nih a, rorelna hmaa puang tura tih a nih hnu pawha a sawi duh loa thil a tihsual chuan a khawlohna mawh chu a phur ang:" 
Leviticus5:2 tin, tupawhin thil thianghlim lo reng reng, ram sa thianghlim lo ruang emaw, ran thianghlim lo ruang emaw, a vaha vak chi rannung thianghlim lo ruang emaw hre lo pawha a khawih a, a lo thianghlim loh chuan thiam loh a chang ang:" 
Leviticus5:3 tin, mihring pawh a thianghlim lohna eng ang pawh ni se la, a thianghlim lohna chu hre lo pawha a khawih chuan a hriat chhuah hun chuan thiam loh a chang ang;" 
Leviticus5:4 tin, tupawhin thil tha lo emaw thil tha emaw ti tura a kaa hre lo pawha chhia a chham zung zung chuan, eng pawh ni se la, a chhechham chhuah zung zung mai chu a hriat chhuah hunah chuan thiam loh a chang ang:" 
Leviticus5:5 tin, heti hi a ni ang a, he'ng thil pakhatah pawh hian thiam loh a chan hun chuan a sualna chu a puang ang;" 
Leviticus5:6 sual thawina'n beram rual zinga mi a nu, beram no emaw kel emaw a thil tihsual tak man atan LALPA hnena hlan turin a bawhchhiat thawina chu a rawn keng ang a; puithiamin a sualna chungchang thuah chuan inremna a siam sak ang." 
Leviticus5:7 A neihin beram no a tlin loh chuan LALPA hnena hlan turin a sual man atan chuan a bawhchhiat thawinaah thuro pahnih emaw parva no pahnih emaw a rawn keng tur a ni; pakhat chu sual thawina'n pakhat chu halral thilhlan atan 
Leviticus5:8 Puithiam henah a rawn keng ang a, a ni chuan sual thawina tur chu a hlan hmasa ang a, phel loin a lu chu a nghawngah a thuai bung ang a:" 
Leviticus5:9 sual thawina thisen chu maicham pangah chuan tlem a theh ang a; tin, thisen la awm zawng chu maicham bulah chuan an far kangtir tur a ni: chu chu sual thawina a ni." 
Leviticus5:10 Tin, a pa khata chu dan angin halral thilhlanah a hlan ang a: tin, puithiamin a thil tihsual tak chungchang thuah inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus5:11 Amaherawhchu a neihin thuro pahnih emaw parva no pahnih emaw pawh a tlin loh chuan a sual man atan thil hlanah sual thawina'n chhangphut dik tak, epha hmun sawma thena hmun khat a rawn keng ang a; hriak a leih tur a ni lo a, a chungah beraw a dah tur a ni hek lo, sual thawina a nih avangin." 
Leviticus5:12 Puithiam hnenah a rawn keng ang a, a ni chuan sual thawina tur chu a hlan hmasa ang a, phel loin a lu chu a nghawngah a thuai bung ang a:" 
Leviticus5:13 Tin, chung thil zinga a enga pawh a tihsual tak chungchang thuah chuan puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang: a la awm zawng chu chhangphut thilhlan ang bawkin puithiam chanpual tur a ni ang,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus5:14 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus5:15 Tupawhin thil a tihsuala, LALPA thil thianghlimte chunga a sual palh chuan a bawhchhiat thawina, beram rual zinga mi berampa sawiselbo, hmun thianghlim sekel ang, tangka sekel eng emaw zat hua i ngaih, bawhchhiat thawinaah LALPA tan a rawn kai tur a ni:" 
Leviticus5:16 tin, thil thianghlim chunga a lo tih dik loh takna chu a rul ang a, a hmun ngaa thena hmun khat a belh ang a, puithiam a pe tur a ni; tin, puithiam chuan bawhchhiat thawina berampa chuan inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus5:17 Tupawhin thil a tihsuala tih loh tura LALPA'n thu a pekte a enga pawh a tih chuan, hre lo mah se la thiam loh a chang reng reng ang a, a khawlohna mawh chu a phur ang." 
Leviticus5:18 Tin, beram rual zinga mi berampa sawiselbo, i ngaiha awm tawk, bawhchhiat thawinaah: puithiam hnenah a rawn kai tur a ni; tin, puithiam chuan hre loa a tihsual palh chungchang thuah chuan inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang:chu chu bawhchhiat thawina a ni: LALPA hmaa thiam loh chang a ni ngei a ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus5:19 chu chu bawhchhiat thawina a ni: LALPA hmaa thiam loh chang a ni ngei a ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus6:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus6:2 Tupawhin, thil tisualin, LALPA thu bawhchhe ta se la, sum kawltir thu emaw, hlepthu emaw, rukrukthu emawa a thenawmte tihderin a thenawmte bum ta se la," 
Leviticus6:3 a nih loh leh, thil bote chharin, tihderin dawtin chhia chham ta se la, he'ng thil zawng zawng a enga pawh hi a tihsual chuan," 
Leviticus6:4 heti hi a ni ang a, a sual ngei a, thiam loh a chan chuan a thil ruk te, buma a thil lak te, a hnena sum kawltir te, thil bo a chhar te," 
Leviticus6:5 dawta chhia a chhamna thil engpawh chu a rul leh tur a ni; a kim chiahin a rul leh vek ang a, a hmun ngaa thena hmun khat chu, a chuangin a belh ang: thiam loh a chan ni chuan a neitu chu a pe tur a ni.'" 
Leviticus6:6 A bawhchhiat thawina beram rual zinga mi i ngaiha awm tawk, berampa sawiselbo bawhchhiat thawinaah LALPA tan puithiam hnenah a rawn kai tur a ni:" 
Leviticus6:7 tin, puithiamin LALPA hmaah inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang, thiam loh channa tura thil a tih apiang chungchangahte chuan,"" tiin." 
Leviticus6:8 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus6:9 Arona leh a fapate hnenah, 'Hei hi halral thilhlan dan tur chu a ni: Halral thilhlan chu maicham chunga a halnaah chuan zankhuain a tuk thlengin a awm ang a: tin, maichama mei chu a nung reng tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:10 Tin, puithiam chuan a puan zai sin silhfen a inbel ang a, a tisa khuhna'n a puan zai sin kekawr a ha ang a; tin, maichama halral thilhlan kang vapte chu a la ang a, maicham sirah a dah tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:11 Tin, a silhfen chu a hlip ang a, silhfen dang a inbel ang a, a vapte chu daipawn lam hmun faiah a kalpui tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:12 Tin, maicham chunga mei chu tihnun reng a ni ang a, a mit tur a ni lo; tin, puithiam chuan tuk tin thing a tuah ang a, halral thilhlan chu a dah fel ang a, chutah chuan remna thilhlante thau chu a hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:13 Maichamah mei a nung reng ang a, a mit tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus6:14 Tin, hei hi chhangphut thilhlan dan tur chu a ni: Arona fapate chuan maicham bulah, LALPA hmaah an hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:15 Tin, anin a vei khatin chhangphut thilhlana mi, chhangphut dip tak leh a hriak leh chhangphut thilhlan chunga beraw zawng zawng chu a la chhuak ang a, chu chu LALPA tana rimtui tak, hriat rengna atan maichamah a hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:16 Tin, lak bangte chu Arona leh a fapaten an ei tur a ni chu chu hmun thianghlimah dawidim tel loin an ei ang a; inbiakna puan in kawtlaiah an ei tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:17 Dawidim telin ur tur a ni lo. Meia ka thilhlana an chanvo atan ka pek a ni; chu chu sual thawina leh bawhchhiat thawina anga thil thianghlim tak a ni. 
Leviticus6:18 Arona thlah mipa zawng zawngin an ei tur a ni. Chu chu LALPA tana halral thilhlan chungchang thuah in thlahte zel chena kumkhaw dan a ni ang: tupawh chu mi khawih apiangte chu tihhran an ni ang,' tiin thu pe rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus6:19 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus6:20 Hriak thiha a awm nia Arona leh a fapaten LALPA hnena an hlan tur thilhlan chu hei hi a ni; chhangphut thilhlana hlan thin tur, chhangphut dip tak epha hmun sawma thena hmun khat, zingah a chanve, tlaiah a chanve." 
Leviticus6:21 Urna thlengah hriak pawlha siam tur a ni. A inchiahchhuah hunah i rawn la lut ang a: a phel te tein chhangphut thilhlan chu LALPA tana rimtuiah i hlan tur a ni. 
Leviticus6:22 A fapate zinga mi a thlaktu, hriak thih puithiam chuan a hlan ang a: kumkhaw dan tur angin LALPA tan halral vek tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:23 Puithiam chhangphut thilhlan apiang chu halral vek tur a ni a, ei hauh loh tur a ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus6:24 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus6:25 Hei hi sual thawina dan tur chu a ni: halral thilhlan talh thinaah sual thawina pawh chu LALPA hmaah talh tur a ni: chu chu thil thianghlim tak a ni. 
Leviticus6:26 Sual thawina hlantu puithiam chuan a ei ang a; inbiakna puan in kawtlaiah, hmun thianghlimah ei tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:27 Tupawh chu mi sa khawih apiangte chu tihhran an ni ang: tin, a thisen chu eng puanah pawh theh per ni se la, a kaina apiang chu hmun thianghlimah i su tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:28 A chhumna hlum bel chu tihkeh tur a ni a: dar bela chhum a nih erawh chuan nawh faia tleuh fai tur a ni; 
Leviticus6:29 Puithiam chhungkuaa mipa tawh phawt chuan chu mi chu an ei thei ang. Chu chu thil thinghlim tak a ni.Sual thawina, a thisen, hmun thianghlima inremna siamna tura inbiakna puan ina rawn lak chu ei tur a ni lo: hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus6:30 Sual thawina, a thisen, hmun thianghlima inremna siamna tura inbiakna puan ina rawn lak chu ei tur a ni lo: hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:1 Tin, hei hi bawhchhiat thawina dan tur chu a ni: thil thianghlim tak a ni." 
Leviticus7:2 Halral thilhlan an talh thinnaah bawhchhiat thawina pawh chu an talh tur ni: tin, a thisen chuan maicham chu a theh vel tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:3 Tin, a thau zawng zawng chu a hlan tur a ni; a mei thau tak te, a kawchhung thau te," 
Leviticus7:4 a ka pahnih leh a bawhtu thau, a nema mi leh a thin tuamtu rang, a kalte chawpin a phawrh ang a;" 
Leviticus7:5 tin, puithiam chuan LALPA tana meia thilhlanah maicham chungah a hal tur a ni: chu chu bawhchhiat thawina a ni," 
Leviticus7:6 Puithiam chhungkuaa mipa tawh phawt chuan chu mi chu an ei thei ang; hmun thianghlima ei tur a ni: chu chu thil thianghlim tak a ni. 
Leviticus7:7 Bawhchhiat thawina chu sual thawina ang bawk a ni a, dan khat a ni: chu mia inremna siamtu puithiam chuan, chu chu a nei tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:8 Puithiam, mi tupawh halral thilhlan hlansaktu puithiam ngei chuan halral thilhlana a hlan vun chu a pumbil tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:9 Tin, a urnaa ur chhangphut thilhlan apiangte, kanbela kan leh thlenga ur zawng zawng te chu a hlantu puithiam pual tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:10 Chhangphut thilhlan zawng zawng chu hriaka hmeh pawh, a ro pawh a dang ang bawkin Arona fapate zawng zawngin an insem tlang tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:11 Tin, hei hi miin LALPA hnena a hlan tur, remna thilhlan inthawi dan tur chu a ni." 
Leviticus7:12 Lawmthu sawina'na a hlan chuan lawmthu sawi inthawinaah chuan hriaka hmeh dawidim telh loh chhang leh hriaka chulh dawidim telh loh chhangper pante leh chhangphut dip tak hriaka ngun taka hmeh a hlan tel tur a ni. 
Leviticus7:13 Lawmthu sawina'na a remna thilhlan inthawinaah chuan chhang dawidim telh a hlan tel tur a ni. 
Leviticus7:14 Tin, chu mi ata chu thilhlan tina mi LALPA tana then thilhlan atan pakhat theuh a hlan ang a; remna thil hlan thisena thehtu puithiam pual tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:15 Tin, lawmthu sawina'na a remna thilhlan inthawina sa chu thilhlan a hlan ni la lain ei zawh tur a ni a; a tuk thlengin engmah a khek tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus7:16 Amaherawhchu a thilhlan inthawina chu thutiam emaw, mahni duhthua thilhlan emaw a nih chuan a inthawina a hlan ni la la chuan ei tur a ni a; tin, ei bang chu atukah ei tur a ni:" 
Leviticus7:17 Amaherawhchu inthawina sa a ni thum ni thlenga la awm cheu chu hal tur a ni. 
Leviticus7:18 A remna thilhlan inthawina sa chu ni thum ni thlenga an ei chuan, pawmsak a ni lo ang a, a hlantu pawh chu hlana ngaih a ni hek lo ang; thil tenawm a ni ang a, tupawh a ei apiangin an khawlohna mawh chu an phur ang." 
Leviticus7:19 Tin, sa, thil thianghlim lo reng reng nena intawk chu ei tur a ni lo a, hal tur a ni. Tin, sa chu a thianghlim apiang chuan an ei ang a:" 
Leviticus7:20 remna thilhlan inthawina sa, LALPA chanpual, thianghlim lo chunga eitu erawh chu, chu mi chu a chipuite zing ata tuithlarin a awm tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:21 Tin, tupawhin thil tenawm, thianghlim lo reng reng, mi thianghlim lo emaw, ran thianghlim lo emaw, thil thianghlim lo reng reng a khawih a, remna thilhlan inthawina sa, LALPA chanpual a ei chuan chu mi chu a chipuite zing ata tuithlarin a awm tur a ni,' tiin Arona leh a fapate chu be rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus7:22 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus7:23 Sebawng emaw, beram emaw, kel emaw thau in ei tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus7:24 Amaha thi thau leh sa seh thau chu thil dang engah pawh hman theih a ni ang a: ei erawh chu in ei hauh tur a ni lo. 
Leviticus7:25 Tupawh, LALPA tana miin meia thilhlan an hlan sathau ei chu a chipuite zing ata tuithlarin a awm tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:26 In awmna tawh phawtah chuan thisen reng reng, sava emaw, ramsa emaw thisen in ei tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus7:27 Tupawh ni se la, thisen ei reng reng chu, chu mi chu a chipuite zing ata tuithlarin a awm tur a ni,' tiin Israela thlahte be rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus7:28 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus7:29 LALPA hnena a remna thilhlan inthawina hlan apiang chuan, LALPA tana a thilhlan chu a remna thilhlan inthawina ata a rawn hlan tur a ni" 
Leviticus7:30 LALPA tana meia thilhlan chu ama kut ngeiin a rawn keng ang a; a thau chu a ir chawpin a rawn la tur a ni, a ir chu LALPA hmaa then thilhlana then a nih theih nan." 
Leviticus7:31 Tin, puithiamin maichamah a thau chu a hal ang a: a ir erawh chu Arona leh a fapate pual tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:32 A bawp ding lam chu inremna thilhlan inthawina ata then thilhlanah puithiam in pe tur a ni. 
Leviticus7:33 Arona fapate zinga remna thilhlan thisen leh thau hlantu apiang chuan a chanvo atan a bawp ding lam a nei tur a ni. 
Leviticus7:34 A ir leh a bawp an then thin chu Israela thlahte an remna thilhlan inthawinate ata chu ka ti hrang a, Israel thlahte kum khaw tih dan tur atan puithiam Arona leh a fapate ka pe a ni,' tiin Israela thlahte hnenah sawi rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus7:35 Hei hi a ni, anmahni hriak thih nia Israela thlahten an pek tura LALPA'n thu a pek, puithiam hna thawka LALPA rawngbawl tura a hlan ni achina LALPA tana meia thilhlan ata Arona chanvo leh a fapate chanvo tur chu. Hei hi kumkhuaa an thlahte zel thlenga an tih dan tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:36 Hei hi a ni, anmahni hriak thih nia Israela thlahten an pek tura LALPA'n thu a pek, puithiam hna thawka LALPA rawngbawl tura a hlan ni achina LALPA tana meia thilhlan ata Arona chanvo leh a fapate chanvo tur chu. Hei hi kumkhuaa an thlahte zel thlenga an tih dan tur a ni." 
Leviticus7:37 Hei hi Sinai thlalera Israela thlahten thilhlan LALPA hnena hlan tura thu a pek nia Sinai tlanga LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek halral thilhlan te, chhangphut thilhlan te, sual thawina te, tihhranna te, remna thilhlan inthawina dan te chu a ni.Hei hi Sinai thlalera Israela thlahten thilhlan LALPA hnena hlan tura thu a pek nia Sinai tlanga LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek halral thilhlan te, chhangphut thilhlan te, sual thawina te, tihhranna te, remna thilhlan inthawina dan te chu a ni." 
Leviticus7:38 Hei hi Sinai thlalera Israela thlahten thilhlan LALPA hnena hlan tura thu a pek nia Sinai tlanga LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek halral thilhlan te, chhangphut thilhlan te, sual thawina te, tihhranna te, remna thilhlan inthawina dan te chu a ni." 
Leviticus8:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a,"
