Leviticus8:2 Arona chu a fapate nen hruai la, silhfen te, hriak thih mi te, sual thawina bawngpa te, berampa pahnih te, chhang dawidim telh loh bawm khat nen chuan keng bawk la;" 
Leviticus8:3 tin, mi zawng zawngte chu inbiakna puan in kawngka velah awm khawmtir rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus8:4 Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA'n thu a pek ang chuan a ti a; mi zawng zawng chu inbiakna puan in kawngka velah chuan an awm khawm a." 
Leviticus8:5 Tin, Mosia'n pungkhawmho hnenah chuan, ""Hei hi a ni LALPA'n tih tura thu a pek chu,"" a ti a." 
Leviticus8:6 Tin, Mosia'n Arona leh a fapate chu a rawn hruai a, a bual a." 
Leviticus8:7 Tichuan kawr chu a haktir a, kawnghrenna chuan a hreng a, kawrfual chu a haktir a, puithiam kawr chu a bel a, puithiam kawr hrenna thiam taka tah chuan a hreng a, chu chuan a hreng bet a." 
Leviticus8:8 Tin, awmbel chu a bel a; tin, a awmbelah chuan Urim leh Thummim a dah a." 
Leviticus8:9 Diar chu a khimtir a, tin, diar pang hma lamah chuan rangkachak phektihhran chhinchhiahna thianghlim chu a bel a, LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Leviticus8:10 Tin, Mosia chuan hriak thih mi chu a la a, biak buk leh a chhunga thil awm zawng zawngte chu a thih a, a tithianghlim hlawm a." 
Leviticus8:11 Tin, chu bawk chuan maicham chu vawi sarih a theh a, maicham leh a bungbel zawng zawng te, maihun leh a hun chhan te chu tihthianghlim turin a thih a." 
Leviticus8:12 Tin, a tihthianghlimna turin hriak thih mi chu Arona luah a leih a, a thih a." 
Leviticus8:13 Tin, Mosia'n Arona fapate chu a rawn hruai a, kawr a haktir a, kawnghrennain a hreng a, diar a khimtir a; LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Leviticus8:14 Tin, sual thawina bawngpa chu a rawn kai a, Arona leh a fapate chuan sual thawina bawngpa lu chungah chuan an kut an nghat a." 
Leviticus8:15 Tin, a talh a; Mosia chuan thisen chu a la a, chu chu inremna maicham tana siam nan a kut zungtangin maicham kiahte chuan a velin a tat a, maicham chu a thian a, maicham bula thisen chu a leih a, a tithianghlim a." 
Leviticus8:16 Tin, a rilbawh zawng zawng te, a thin tuamtu rang te, a kal pahnih te leh a thaute a la a, maichamah Mosia'n a hal a." 
Leviticus8:17 Bawngpa erawh chu a vun nen, a sa nen, a ek nen, daipawnah a hal a, LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Leviticus8:18 Tin, halral thilhlan berampa chu a han hlan a, Arona leh a fapate chuan berampa lu chungah chuan an kut an nghat a." 
Leviticus8:19 Tin, Mosia chuan a talh a: tin, maicham chu thisen chuan a theh vel a." 
Leviticus8:20 Tin, berampa chu a chan a, a lu leh sa hrangte leh a thau te chu a hal a." 
Leviticus8:21 Tin, a kawchhung leh a kete chu a sil a; berampa chu maichamah a vaiin a hal vek a: chu chu rimtui atana halral thilhlan a ni a; LALPA tana meia thilhlan a ni; LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang kha." 
Leviticus8:22 Tin, berampa dang, tihhranna berampa chu a han hlan leh a: Arona leh a fapate chuan berampa lu chungah chuan an kut an nghat a." 
Leviticus8:23 Tin, Mosia chuan a talh a, thisen chu a la a, Arona beng dinglam hmawrah te, a kut dinglam zungpuiah te, a ke dinglam zungpuiah te a hnawih a." 
Leviticus8:24 Tin, Mosia chuan Arona fapate chu a hruai a, an beng ding lam hmawrah te, an kut dinglam zungpuiah te, an ke dinglam zungpuiah te a hnawih a: tin, maicham chu thisen chuan a theh vel a." 
Leviticus8:25 Tin, a thau te, a mei thau tak te leh a rilbawh zawng zawng te, a thin tuamtu rang te, a kal pahnih leh a thau te leh a bawp ding lam a la a:" 
Leviticus8:26 LALPA hmaa chhang dawidim telh loh bawm ata chu chhang dawidim telh loh pakhat leh hriaka hmeh chhangper pakhat leh chhangper pan pakhat a la a, sa thau chungah leh a bawp ding lam chungah chuan a dah a:" 
Leviticus8:27 tin, a vai chuan Arona kutphah chungah leh a fapate kutphah chungah chuan a dah a, LALPA hmaa then thilhlanah a then a." 
Leviticus8:28 Tin, Mosia'n an kut ata chu a la a, halral thilhlan chungah maichamah a hal a; chu chu rimtui atana tihhranna a ni: LALPA tana meia thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus8:29 Tin, Mosia'n a ir chu a la a, LALPA hmaa then thilhlanah a then a: tihhranna berampaa Mosia chanvo a ni, LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang khan." 
Leviticus8:30 Tin, Mosia'n hriak thih mi ata leh maichama thisena mi a la a, chu chuan Arona leh a silhfen a theh a; a fapate leh a fapate silhfen te pawh; Arona leh a silhfen chu a tithianghlim a, a fapate leh a silhfente pawh." 
Leviticus8:31 Tin, Mosia'n Arona leh a fapate hnenah chuan, ""Inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah sa chu chhum u la, 'Arona leh a fapaten an ei tur a ni,' tia thu a pek ang khan, chutah chuan tihhranna bawma chhang nen ei rawh u." 
Leviticus8:32 Tin, sa leh chhang ei bangte chu in hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus8:33 In intihhranna ni a kim hma loh chuan inbiakna pun in kawngka chu chhuahsan loin ni sarih in awm tur a ni: ni sarih a tihrang dawn si che u a. 
Leviticus8:34 Tuna tih ang hian inremna siamsak tur che uin LALPA'n tih tur thu a pe a ni. 
Leviticus8:35 Inbiakna puan in kawngka bula chuan ni sarih, chhun leh zan in awm reng ang a, in thih lohna'n LALPA thupek chu in zawm tur a ni, chutianga thu pek chu ka ni,"" a ti a.Tichuan LALPA'n Mosia hmanga tih tura thu a pek zawngte chu Arona leh a fapate chuan an ti a." 
Leviticus8:36 Tichuan LALPA'n Mosia hmanga tih tura thu a pek zawngte chu Arona leh a fapate chuan an ti a. 
Leviticus9:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni riat ni chuan Mosia'n Arona leh a fapate leh Israel upahote chu a ko a;" 
Leviticus9:2 tin, Arona hnenah chuan, ""Sual thawina'n bawng no a pa leh halral thilhlanah berampa sawisebo ve ve kai la, LALPA hmaah hlan rawh." 
Leviticus9:3 Tin, Israela thlahte hnenah chuan, 'Sual thawina'n kelpa, tin, halral thilhlanah bawng no leh beram no kum khat mi ve ve sawiselbo thiau" 
Leviticus9:4 leh bawngpa leh berampa LALPA hmaa remna thilhlana hlanah rawn kai u la: tin, hriaka hmeh chhangphut thilhlan nen: vawiinah hian in hnenah LALPA a lo lang dawn e,' tiin hrilh rawh,"" a ti a." 
Leviticus9:5 Tin, Mosia'n thu a pek ang chuan inbiakna puan in kawtah an rawn kai a; tin, mi zawng zawng chuan an va hnaih a, LALPA hmaah chuan an va ding a." 
Leviticus9:6 Tin, Mosia chuan, ""Hei hi a ni in tih tura LALPA'n thu apek che u kha: tichuan LALPA ropuina chu in zingah a lo lang ang."" a ti a." 
Leviticus9:7 Tin, Mosia'n Arona hnenah, ""Maicham chu rawn hnaih la, I sual thawina te, I halral thilhlan te hlan la, nangma tan leh mipuite tan inremna siam rawh: tin, mipuite thilhlan chu hlan la, an tan inremna siam rawh, LALPA thupek angin,"" a ti a." 
Leviticus9:8 Tin, Arona chuan maicham chu a va hnaih a, ama puala sual thawina bawng no chu a talh a." 
Leviticus9:9 Tin, Arona fapate chuan thisen chu a hnenah an hlan a, thisenah chuan a kut zungtang a chiah a, maicham kiahte chuan a tat a, thisen chu maicham bulah a leih a:" 
Leviticus9:10 sual thawina thau te, a kal te, a thin tuamtu rang te erawh chu maicham chungah a hal a, LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang kha." 
Leviticus9:11 Tin, a sa leh a vun chu daipawnah a hal a." 
Leviticus9:12 Tin, halral thilhlan chu a talh a; Arona fapate chuan thisen chu an pe a, anin maicham chu a theh vel a." 
Leviticus9:13 Halral thilhlan sa hrang chu a mal malin a lu nen an pe a, ani chuan maichamah a lo hal a." 
Leviticus9:14 Tin, a kawchhung te, a kete a sil a, maichamah halral thilhlan chungah chuan a hal a." 
Leviticus9:15 Tin, mipuite thilhlan chu a hlan a, mipuite sual thawina kel chu a kai a, a talh a, a hmaa mi ang bawk khan sual thawinaah a hlan a." 
Leviticus9:16 Tin, halral thilhlan chu a hlan a, a dan ang zelin a hlan a ni." 
Leviticus9:17 Tin, chhangphut thilhlan chu a hlan a, chuta mi chu a vei khatin a la a, zing lam halral thilhlan tih loh pawh chu maichamah huan a hal bawk a." 
Leviticus9:18 tin, mipuite puala remna thilhlan inthawina bawngpa leh berampa chu a talh bawk a; tin, Arona fapaten a thisen chu an pe a, maicham chu a theh vel a;" 
Leviticus9:19 tin, bawng pa thau leh berampa thau te, a mei thau tak te, a rilbawh te, a kal te, a thituamtu rang te an pe bawk a;" 
Leviticus9:20 a thau chu a ir chungah te chuan an dah a, tin, a ni chuan a thau chu maichamah a lo hal a." 
Leviticus9:21 Tin, a ir leh bawp dinglam chu Aronan LALPA hmaah then thilhlanah a then a; Mosia thupek ang khan." 
Leviticus9:22 Tin, Arona chuan mipuite lamah chuan a ban a phar a, mal a sawm hlawm a; tin, sual thawina leh halral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan a hlan zo chu a lo chhuk a." 
Leviticus9:23 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu inbiakna puan inah an va lut a, tin, an lo chhuak leh a, mipuite chu mal an sawm a: tin, LALPA ropuina chu mi zawng zawng chungah chuan a lo lang a.Tin, LALPA hma atang chuan mei a lo chhuak a, halral thilhlan leh thaute chu maichamah chuan a kangral ta a: tin, chu chu mipui zawng zawngin an hmuh chuan an au dur dur a, an bawkkhup ta thuap a." 
Leviticus9:24 Tin, LALPA hma atang chuan mei a lo chhuak a, halral thilhlan leh thaute chu maichamah chuan a kangral ta a: tin, chu chu mipui zawng zawngin an hmuh chuan an au dur dur a, an bawkkhup ta thuap a." 
Leviticus10:1 Tin, Arona fapa, Nadaba leh Abihua te chuan an mei lakna chu an la ve a, chutah chuan meiling an dah a, rimtui an phul a, LALPA hmaah a thupek lohin mei hman loh chi an hlan a." 
Leviticus10:2 Chutichuan LALPA hma atangin mei a lo chhuak a, anni chu a kanghlum a, LALPA hmaah chuan an thi ta a." 
Leviticus10:3 Chutichuan Mosia'n Arona hnenah, ""Mi rawn hnaihtuahte chuan thianghlimin ka lang ang a, mipui zawng zawng hmaah huan chawimawiin ka awm ang,' tia LALPA'n a sawi kha hei hi a nih hi,"" a ti a. Tin, Arona chu a ngawi reng a." 
Leviticus10:4 Tichuan Mosia chuan Arona pami Uziela fapa Misaela leh Elzaphana te chu a ko a, an hnenah, ""Lo hnai u la, in unaute hi hmun thianghlim ata dawipawnah zawn chhuak rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Leviticus10:5 Chutichuan an lo hnai a, kawr ha chungin daipawnah an zawn chhuak a, Mosia sawi ang chuan." 
Leviticus10:6 Tin, Mosia'n Arona hnenah leh a fapa Eleazara leh Ithamara te hnenah chuan, ""In sam thlah suh u la, in puante pawtthler hek suh u, chutilochuan in thi ang a, mi zawng zawng chungah a thinur ang: in unau, Israela chhungkaw pumpuiin mei, LALPA hal chu sun zawk rawh se." 
Leviticus10:7 Tin, inbiakna puan in kawngka ata chu in chhuak tur a ni lo, chutilochuan in thi ang: LALPA hriak, thih mi chu in chungah a awm si a,"" a ti a. Tichuan Mosia thu ang chuan an ti ta a." 
Leviticus10:8 Tin, LALPA'n Arona chu a bia a," 
Leviticus10:9 Nang emaw I fapate emaw pawhin inbiakna puan in chhunga in kal laiin uaiin leh zu reng reng in suh u, chutilochuan in thi ang: in thlahte zel thlenga kumkhaw dan tur a ni ang a;" 
Leviticus10:10 chu chu a thianghlim leh a thianghlim lo leh a thiang leh a thiang lo in thlei theihna tur leh 
Leviticus10:11 LALPA'n Mosia hmanga an hnena a sawi, thupek zawng zawngte chu Israel thlahte chu in zirtir theihna'n a ni ang, tiin." 
Leviticus10:12 Tin, Mosia'n Arona hnenah leh a fapa la dam Eleazara leh Ithamarate hnenah chuan, ""LALPA tana meia thilhlana mi, chhangphut thilhlan lak bangte chu la u la, maicham bulah dawidim tel loin ei rawh u: thil thianghlim a ni si a:" 
Leviticus10:13 tin, LALPA tana meia thilhlana i pual leh i fapate pual a nih avangin hmun thianghlimah in ei tur a ni; chutianga thupek ka ni e." 
Leviticus10:14 Tin, a ir then leh a bawp ding lam then chu hmun faiah in ei tur a ni; nang leh i fapate leh i fanute ho nen: Israela thlahte remna thilhlan inthawinaa i pual leh i fapate puala ruat a ni si a." 
Leviticus10:15 Bawp then leh ir then chu LALPA hmaa then thilhlana then turin meia thilhlan thau nen an rawn keng tur a ni a: chu chu nang leh i fapate nen, kumkhuaa in pual tur a ni ang, LALPA thupek ang khan,"" a ti a." 
Leviticus10:16 Tin, Mosia chuan sual thawina kel chu ngun takin a zawng a, tin, ngai teh, an lo hal tawh reng a ni a: tichuan, Arona fapa la dam, Elazara leh Ithamara chungah chuan a thinur a," 
Leviticus10:17 Engatinge sual thawina chu hmun thianghlimah in ei loh? Thil thianghlim, mipuiho khawlohna phur tura LALPA hmaa remna siamsakna tura a pek che u a ni si a." 
Leviticus10:18 Ngaiteh u, a thisen chu hmun thianghlimah in la lut hlei nem: thu ka pek ang khan hmun thianghlimah chuan in ei ngei ngei tur a ni a sin,"" tiin." 
Leviticus10:19 Tin, Aronan Mosia hnenah, ""Ngaiteh, vawiinah hian LALPA hmaah an sual thawina leh an halral thilhlan chu an hlan a ni a; hetiang thil hi ka chungah a lo awm ta mai si a: vawiinah hian sual thawina chu lo ei ta i la, LALPA ngaiha thil tihawm a lo ni dawn maw?"" a ti a.Tin, Mosia'n chu chu a hriatin a lungawi ta a." 
Leviticus10:20 Tin, Mosia'n chu chu a hriatin a lungawi ta a." 
Leviticus11:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Leviticus11:2 Israela thlahte chu bia u la, 'Lei chunga sa zawng zawng zinga nungcha in ei turte chu he'ng hi a ni." 
Leviticus11:3 Sa zinga a tin kaka, tin kak chhuak, thialret thial chi tawh phawt chu in ei thei ang a." 
Leviticus11:4 Amaherawhchu thialret thial emaw tin kak chhuak emaw zinga mi hengte hi chu in ei tur a ni lo; sanghawngsei, thialret thial mah se la, a tin a kak loh avangin; in tan a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:5 Tin, sazupui, thialret chu a thial naa, mahse a tin a kak loh avangin; in tan a bawlh- hlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:6 Tin, zupui, thialret chu a thial naa, mahse a tin a kak loh avangin; in tan a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:7 Tin, vawk, a tin chu a kak a, a kak chhuak naa, mahse thialret a thial loh avangin; in tan a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:8 An sa in ei tur a ni lo a, an ruang pawh in khawih tur a ni lo a, in tan a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:9 Tuia cheng zawng zawngah hengte hi in ei thei ang: tuifinriat leh lui leh tuia awm pangparh leh phuhlip nei tawh phawt chu in ei thei ang. 
Leviticus11:10 Tuia cheng zawng zawngte leh tuia nungcha awm zawng zawng zinga tuifinriata mi te, luia mi te, pangparh leh phuhlip nei lo apiangte chu in tana thil tenawm a ni a," 
Leviticus11:11 in tan thil tenawm a ni ang; an sa in ei tur a ni lo a, an ruangte chu thil tenawmah in neih tur a ni." 
Leviticus11:12 Tuia mi pangparh leh phuhlip nei lo tawh phawt chu in tan thil tenawm a ni. 
Leviticus11:13 Tin, sava zinga mi chu he'ng hi thil tenawma in neih tur a ni; ei loh tur a ni a, thil tenawm an ni: mupui te, lungdup te, muarla te," 
Leviticus11:14 mute te, ngawihup chi reng reng te;" 
Leviticus11:15 choak chi reng reng te; 
Leviticus11:16 sava sang te, vabak te, tuifinriat sava te, mu chi reng reng te;" 
Leviticus11:17 hrangkir te, luidung mu te, chingpirinu te," 
Leviticus11:18 chhimbuk sialki nei te, tuivalawng te, mulukawlh te;" 
Leviticus11:19 kanghlai te, dil sava chi reng reng te, chhuangtuar leh bak te." 
Leviticus11:20 Thla nei ke palia kal chi zawng zawngte chu in tan thil tenawm a ni. 
Leviticus11:21 Amaherawhchu thla nei, ke palia kal chi pawh lei chunga perhna'na an ketang chunglama bawp nei zawng zawngte zinga mi hengte hi in ei thei ang;" 
Leviticus11:22 hengte pawh hi in ei thei ang; khaukhuap chi reng reng te, khauekthingtial chi reng reng te, perhpawng chi reng reng leh khau chi reng reng te." 
Leviticus11:23 Amaherawhchu thla nei, ke pali nei, a kala kal chi zawng zawng chu in tan thil tenawm a ni vek ang." 
Leviticus11:24 Tin, he'ng avangte hian bawlhhlawh in lo kai ang: tupawh, sa ruang khawih apiang chu tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang a;" 
Leviticus11:25 tin, tupawh he'ng ruang latu apiangte hian an puante an su tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang," 
Leviticus11:26 Ran a tin kak a, tin kak chhuak lo, thialret pawh thial lo chi zawng zawng chu in tan thil bawlhhlawh a ni a; tupawh chung khawih apiang chu an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:27 Tin, fuliafa zawng zawng zinga ke bawra kal apiangte chu in tan thil bawlhhlawh a ni a; an ruang khawih apiang chu tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:28 Tin, an ruang latu apiang chuan an puante an su tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang; in tan thil bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:29 Tin, leia a bawha bawkvak chi zinga in tana thil bawlhhlawh chu hengte hi a ni: bui te, chaichim te, tangkeu chi reng reng te," 
Leviticus11:30 chawke te, tangkawng te, laitel te, kawlchawr te, laiking te." 
Leviticus11:31 Heng hi a bawha bawkvak chi zawng zawng zinga in tana thil bawlhhlawh te chu an ni: tupawhin he'ng thi hnute hi an khawih chuan tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang. 
Leviticus11:32 Tin, an thiha engpawh an delh chu a bawlhhlawh zel ang; hmanrua hman tawh phawt chu thing bungbel emaw, puan emaw, savun emaw, saiip emaw pawh ni se la, tuiah chiah tur a ni, tin, tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang; chu mi zawhah chuan a thianghlim tawh ang." 
Leviticus11:33 Hlum bel, a enga pawh a tlakna apiang chu in tikeh zel tur a ni, a chhunga awm zawng zawng chu a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:34 Chu mi bela ei mi awm zawng zawng pawh, chu mia awm tuia chiah tawh reng reng chu thil bawlhhlawh a ni ang; tin, in mi, in theih chi zawng zawng pawh, chu mi bela mi reng reng chu thil bawlhhlawh a ni angin" 
Leviticus11:35 Tin, thil engpawh an ruang a englai pawhin a delh tawh phawt chu thil bawlhhlawh a ni zei ang; chhangurna emaw ur lumna bel emaw pawh tihkeh vek tur a ni, a bawlhhlawh tawh a, in tan thil bawlhhlawh a ni ang." 
Leviticus11:36 Amaherawhchu tuikhur emaw, tuizem, tui tling khawm emaw chu a bawlhhlawh lo ang a, an ruang khawih apiang erawh chu a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:37 Tin, chi, chin tur reng reng chu an ruang a englai pawhin lo delh ta ang se la, a bawlhhlawh lo a." 
Leviticus11:38 Amaherawhchu chi, tuia chiah hnu an ruang a englai pawhin delh se la, in tan thil bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:39 Ran in ei theih chi reng reng pawh thi se la, a ruang khawih apiang chu tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:40 A sa ei apiang chuan a puante a su tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang: tin, a ruang latu pawhin a puante a su tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:41 Tin, rannung lei chunga a bawha bawkvak chi zawng zawng chu thil tenawm an ni a, ei tur an ni lo." 
Leviticus11:42 A tlenga tleng chi leh ke palia kal chi emaw, ke tam tak nei chi emaw, lei chunga a bawha bawkvak chi reng reng chu in ei tur a ni lo, thil tenawm an ni si a." 
Leviticus11:43 A bawha bawkvak chi reng rengin irh intitenawm tur a ni lo a, in intihbawlhhlawh phahna turin, chung chuan in intibawlhhlawh tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus11:44 Kei hi LALPA in Pathian ka ni si a; chuvangin intithianghlim u la, thianghlimin awm rawh u; kei ka thianghlim si a, lei chunga cheng, a vaha vak, a eng ang chi mahin intibawlhhlawh suh u." 
Leviticus11:45 In Pathian ni tura Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuak chhotu che u LALPA chu ka ni si a,: kei ka thianghlim si a, chuvangin nangni pawh in thianghlim tur a ni." 
Leviticus11:46 Hei hi sa leh savate leh nungcha tuia cheng chi tinreng leh leia a bawha bawkvak chi tinrengte chungchang thua dan tur chu a ni:thianghlim leh thianghlim lo thleina tur leh nungcha ei theih mi leh nungcha ei theih loh mi thleina turin,' ti rawh u,"" tiin." 
Leviticus11:47 thianghlim leh thianghlim lo thleina tur leh nungcha ei theih mi leh nungcha ei theih loh mi thleina turin,' ti rawh u,"" tiin." 
Leviticus12:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus12:2 Israela thlahte hnenah, 'Hmeichhiain nau a paia fapa a hrin chuan ni sarih a bawlhhlawh ang a; hmeichhe dan pangngai hun laia a bawlhhlawh ang chuan a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus12:3 Tin, a ni riat niin naute serh hmawr vun tan tur a ni." 
Leviticus12:4 Thisen avanga inthianin ni sawmthum leh ni thum a la awm cheu tur a ni; a inthen ni a kim hma loh chuan thil thianghlim reng reng a khawih tur a ni lo a, hmun thianghlimah pawh a lut tur a ni hek lo." 
Leviticus12:5 Hmeichhia a hrin erawh chuan hmeichhe dan pangngai hun laia a bawlhhlawh angin chawlhkar hnih a bawlhhlawh ang; tin, thisen avanga inthianin ni sawmruk leh ni ruk a la awm cheu tur a ni." 
Leviticus12:6 Tin, fapa emaw fanu emaw avanga a inthenna ni a kim veleh halral thilhlanah beram no kum khat mi leh sual thawina'n parva no emaw, thuro emaw inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah puithiam hnenah a rawn keng tur a ni:" 
Leviticus12:7 Tin, anin LALPA hmaah a hlan ang a, inremna a siamsak ang a, tichuan a thisen chhuahna ata tihthianghlim a ni ang. Hei hi mipa emaw hmeichhia emaw hringtu tana dan a ni.Tin, a neihin beram no a tlin loh chuan thuro tuak khat emaw, parva no tuak khat emaw a keng tur a ni: pakhat chu halral thilhlanah, pakhat chu sual thawina'n: tin, puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang a, tichuan a thianghlim tawh ang,' tiin sawi rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus12:8 Tin, a neihin beram no a tlin loh chuan thuro tuak khat emaw, parva no tuak khat emaw a keng tur a ni: pakhat chu halral thilhlanah, pakhat chu sual thawina'n: tin, puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang a, tichuan a thianghlim tawh ang,' tiin sawi rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus13:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Leviticus13:2 Mi a tisa vun a vun emaw, a khir emaw, a bawl emaw, a vuna phar hri ni awma a lan chuan puithiam Arona hnenah emaw, a fapa, puithiamte zinga tu ber emaw hnenah hruai tur a ni." 
Leviticus13:3 Tin, puithiam chuan tisa vuna hri chu a lo en ang a; tin, a hri awmna laia hmul chu a lo vara, a hri chu a tisa vun aia thuka a lan chuan phar hri a ni a: tin, puithiam chuan amah a lo en ang a, mi bawlhhlawh a nih a puang tur a ni." 
Leviticus13:4 A tisa vuna bawlte chu a lo var a, vun aia thuka a lan loh a, a hmul chu a var loh chuan hri veitu chu puithiamin ni sarih a khung hrang ang a," 
Leviticus13:5 tin, puithiam chuan ni sarih ni chuan amah chu a en ang a: tin, ngai teh, a hri chu a ngai renga a hmuh a, a hri chu a tai darh loh chuan puithiam chuan ni sarih vek a khung hrang leh ang a:" 
Leviticus13:6 tin, puithiam chuan ni sarih ni chuan a en leh ang a: tin, ngai teh, hri chu a lo thim a, hri chu a vuna a tai darh loh chuan puithiam chuan a thianghlim tih a puang tur a ni: khir mai a ni: a puante a su ang a, a lo thianghlim ang." 
Leviticus13:7 Amaherawhchu a thianna tura puithiam a inentir hnua a khir chu a vuna a tai darh zau chuan puithiam a inentir leh tur a ni: 
Leviticus13:8 tin, puithiam chuan a lo en ang a, tin, ngai teh, a khir chu a vuna a tai darh chuan puithiam chuan a bawlhhlawh tih a puang ang: phar a ni." 
Leviticus13:9 Phar hri miin a vawn chuan puithiam hnenah hruai tur a ni; 
Leviticus13:10 tin, puithiamin a lo en ang a, tin, ngai teh, vuna a vara a lo vun chhuah a, a hmul a tihvara a vung chu a lawn chuan," 
Leviticus13:11 phar benvawn a tisaah a awm a ni a, puithiamin a bawlhhlawh tih a puang ang a, khung hran tur a ni lo a, bawlhhlawh a ni si a." 
Leviticus13:12 Tin, a phar chu vuna a tai darh zau a, a hri veitu chu a vun, a lu atanga a ke ler thlenga puithiam hriat theih chin pharin a bawm chuan," 
Leviticus13:13 puithiam chuan a en ang a; tin, ngai teh, pharin a tisa zawng zawng a bawm chhuah tawh chuan hri veitu chu a thiang tih a puang tur a ni: a var zo tawh a, a thianghlim tawh a ni." 
Leviticus13:14 Amaherawhchu a tisa a lo lawn chuan a lo bawlhhlawh ang. 
Leviticus13:15 Puithiam chuan a tisa lawng chu a lo en ang a, a bawlhhlawh tih a puang tur a ni: tisa lawng chu a bawlhhlawh a ni; phar a ni." 
Leviticus13:16 Amaherawhchu tisa lawng chu a lo danglam leh a, a lo var leh chuan puithiam hnenah a kal ang a," 
Leviticus13:17 tin, puithiamin a lo en ang; tin, ngai teh, a hri chu a lo var chuan puithiam chuan hri veitu chu a bawlhhlawh lo tih a puang tur a ni: a thianghlim tawh a ni." 
Leviticus13:18 Tin, tisa vun a lo khawihlia, a lo dam a," 
Leviticus13:19 a khawihlina hmuna a lo var pawn emaw, var sen deuha a lo bawl emaw chuan puithiam entir tur a ni." 
Leviticus13:20 Tin, puithiam chuan a lo en ang a, tin, ngai teh, vun aia thuka a lan a, a hmul chu a lo var chuan puithiamin a bawlhhlawh tih a puang tur a ni: phar hri a ni a, khawihliah chuan a lo piang chhuak a ni." 
Leviticus13:21 Amaherawhchu puithiamin a lo en a, tin, ngai teh, hmul var a awm loh a, vun aia a thuk loh a, a thim deuh chauh a nih chuan, puithiamin ni sarih a khung hrang ang a:" 
Leviticus13:22 tin, vuna a tai darh chuan puithiamin a bawlhhlawh tih a puang tur a ni: hri a ni." 
Leviticus13:23 Amaherawhchu a bawl var chu a awmna ngaia a awm a, a tai darh loh chuan khawihli ser mai a ni a; puithiamin a thianghlim tih a puang tur a ni." 
Leviticus13:24 Tin, tisa vun a kan a, a kang lawng lai chu var sen deuh emaw, a var emawa a lo bawl chhuah chuan," 
Leviticus13:25 puithiamin a lo en ang a, tin, ngai teh, a bawl lai taka hmul chu a vara vun aia thuka a lan chuan phar a ni a, kangah chuan a lo piang chhuak a ni; tichuan puithiamin a bawlhhlawh tih a puang tur a ni, phar hri a ni." 
Leviticus13:26 Amaherawhchu puithiamin a lo en a, tin, ngai teh, a lo bawla a hmul var a awm loh a, vun aia thuk loa thim deuh chauh a nih chuan puithiamin ni sarih a khung hrang ang a:" 
Leviticus13:27 tin, puithiamin ni sarih niin amah chu a en ang a, vuna a tai darh zau chuan puithiamin a bawlhhlawh tih a puang tur a ni, phar hri a ni." 
Leviticus13:28 Tin, a bawl chu a awmna ngaia a awm renga vuna a tai darh loh a, thim deuh chauh a nih chuan mei kan pawn mai a ni a, puithiamin a thianghlim tih a puang tur a ni: kang ser mai a ni." 
Leviticus13:29 Tin, hmeichhia emaw, mipa emawin a luah emaw, a khabe hmul laiah emaw hri a vei chuan" 
Leviticus13:30 puithiamin hri chu a lo en ang a: tin, ngai teh, vun aia thuka a lana, hmul eng sin tak a awm chuan puithiamin a bawlhhlawh tih a puang tur a ni: pupangliah a ni a, lu leh khabe hmul phar a ni." 
Leviticus13:31 Tin, puithiamin pupangliah hri chu a en a, tin, ngai teh, vun aia thuk loa a lan a, a hmul dum a awm loh chuan puithiamin pupangliah hri veitu chu ni sarih a khung hrang ang a:" 
Leviticus13:32 tin, ni sarih niin puithiamin hri chu a en ang a, tin, ngai teh, pupangliah chu a tai darh loh a, hmul eng a awm loh a, pupangliah chu vun aia thuka a lan loh chuan," 
Leviticus13:33 meh tur a ni a, pupangliah lai erawh chu a met tur a ni lo; tin, puithiamin pupangliaha chu ni sarih dang a khung hrang leh ang a:" 
Leviticus13:34 tin, ni sarih ni chuan puithiamin pupangliah chu a en leh ang a: tin, ngai teh, pupang- liah chu a vuna a darh loh a, vun aia thuka a lan loh chuan puithiamin a thianghlim tih a puang tur a ni; tin, a puante a su ang a, a lo thianghlim tawh ang." 
Leviticus13:35 Amaherawhchu pupangliah chu a inthenfai hnua vuna a tai darh zau chuan," 
Leviticus13:36 puithiamin amah chu a lo en ang a, tin, ngai teh, pupangliah chu vuna a tai darh chuan, puithiam tan chuan hmul eng chu zawn a ngai kher lo ang; a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus13:37 Amaherawhchu pupangliah chu a ngai renga a hmuh a, hmul dum a to chuan pupangliah chu a dam a ni a, a thianghlim a ni; puithiamin a thianghlim tih a puang tur a ni." 
Leviticus13:38 Tin, hmeichhia emaw, mipa emaw, an tisa vunah bawl, bawl var tak a awm chuan," 
Leviticus13:39 puithiamin a en ang a; tin, ngai teh, an tisa vuna bawl chu a var thim deuh chauh a nih chuan bawl mai a ni a, vuna lo piang a ni a, a thianghlim a ni." 
Leviticus13:40 Mi a sam a tlak kawlh chuan lukawlh a ni a; nimahsela a thianghlim a ni. 
Leviticus13:41 A chhip sam a tlak kawlh chuan chalkawlh a ni a; nimahsela a thianghlim a ni. 
Leviticus13:42 Amaherawhchu lukawlhah emaw, chalkawlhah emaw, hri sen deuha var a awm chuan, a lukawlh emaw, a chalkawlh emawa lo piang phar a ni." 
Leviticus13:43 Tichuan puithiamin a lo en ang a, tin, ngai teh, a lukawlh emaw, a chalkawlh emawa hri lo pawng chhuak chu a sen var hiara tisa vuna phar anga a lan chuan," 
Leviticus13:44 mi phar a ni a, a bawlhhlawh a ni; puithiamin a bawlhhlawh tih a puang ngei ngei tur a ni, a pharna chu a luah a ni." 
Leviticus13:45 phar hri vei chu a puante pawhthler a ni ang a, a sam te a thlah ang a, hmui chung lam a tuam ang a, 'Ka bawlhhlawh e, ka bawlhhlawh e,' tiin a au tur a ni." 
Leviticus13:46 Pharin a bawm chhung chu bawlhhlawh a ni ang a; a bawlhhlawh a ni a, a awm hrang tur a ni; a awmna tur chu daipawn a ni." 
Leviticus13:47 ,48 Silhfen pawh, sahmul silhfen emaw, la zai sin silhfen emaw pawh; tah emaw phiar emaw pawh; la zai sin emaw sahmul emaw pawh; savun emaw, engpawh savuna siamah emaw phar hri a awm a," 
Leviticus13:48 ,47 Silhfen pawh, sahmul silhfen emaw, la zai sin silhfen emaw pawh; tah emaw phiar emaw pawh; la zai sin emaw sahmul emaw pawh; savun emaw, engpawh savuna siamah emaw phar hri a awm a," 
Leviticus13:49 chu hri chu silhfenah emaw, savunah emaw, tahah emaw, phiarah emaw, engpawh savuna siamah emaw a bring deuh emaw, a sen deuh emawa a lo lan chhuah chuan, phar hri a ni a, puithiam entir tur a ni." 
Leviticus13:50 Tin, puithiamin hri chu a lo en ang a, hri kaina chu ni sarih a khung hrang ang a;" 
Leviticus13:51 tin, ni sarih niin hri chu a en ang a, hri chu silhfen, tahah emaw, phiarah emaw, eng atan pawha an hman savunahte emaw, a tai chuan hri chu phar nghet tak chi a ni a, a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus13:52 Silhfen chu, tah emaw, phiar emaw, sahmul emaw, la zai sin emaw, savuna siam chi reng reng emaw, phar awmna tawh phawt chu a hal tur a ni; phar nghet tak chi a ni si a, hal ngei tur a ni." 
Leviticus13:53 Tin, puithiamin a lo en a, tin, ngai teh, silhfen, tah emaw, phiar emaw, savuna siam chi reng reng pawha hri chu a tai loh chuan," 
Leviticus13:54 hri awmna chu puithiamin suk thu a pe ang a, ni sarih dang a khung hrang leh ang:" 
Leviticus13:55 tin, hri awmna sul hnu chu puithiamin a en leh ang a, tin, ngai teh, hri lan dan chu a danglam loh chuan hri chu fai lo mah se la, a thianghlim chuang lo a ni, i hal tur a ni: a nghet chi a ni; a chhung lam emaw, a pawn lam emawa kawlh pawh ni rawh se." 
Leviticus13:56 Tin, puithiamin a lo en a, tin, ngai teh, suk hnua thim deuh chauh a nih chuan silhfen ata emaw, savun ata emaw, tah ata emaw, phiar ata emaw chu a pawt thla ang a:" 
Leviticus13:57 tin, hri chu silhfen tahah emaw, phiarah emaw, savuna siamahte emaw a la lan cheu chuan, a lo chhuak leh a ni a; hri awmna chu i hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus13:58 Tin, silhfen chu, tah emaw, phiar emaw, engpawh savuna siam chi reng reng emaw i suk a, hriin a kiansan chuan suk leh tur a ni a, tichuan a lo thianghlim tawh ang.Hei hi silhfen, sahmul emaw, la zai sin emaw, tah emaw, phiar emaw, savuna siam chi reng rengte emawa phar hri awm a thianghlim leh a thianghlim loh puanna dan tura chu a ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus13:59 Hei hi silhfen, sahmul emaw, la zai sin emaw, tah emaw, phiar emaw, savuna siam chi reng rengte emawa phar hri awm a thianghlim leh a thianghlim loh puanna dan tura chu a ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus14:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus14:2 Hei hi phar inthen nia a tih dan tur chu a ni ang: puithiam hnenah hruai tur a ni a; 
Leviticus14:3 tin, puithiam chu daipawnah a kal chhuak ang a; tin, puithiam chuan a en ang a, tin, ngai teh, phar chu a pharna hri a dam chuan," 
Leviticus14:4 puithiam chuan a inthian tura chu sava nung thiang pahnih leh sidar thing leh la zai sen leh husop kensak turin thu a pe ang a: 
Leviticus14:5 tin, puithiam chuan sava pakhatchu hlum belah lui tui chungah talh turin thu a pe ang a:" 
Leviticus14:6 sava nung chu, sidar thing te, la zai sen te, husop te, sava nung nen chuan a keng ang a, lui tui chunga sava talh thisenah chuan a hnim vek ang a:" 
Leviticus14:7 tin, pharna laka inthian tura chu vawi sarih a theh ang a, a thianghlim tih a puang ang a, tin, sava nung chu ramah a chhuah ang." 
Leviticus14:8 Tin, a inthIan tura chuan a puante a su ang a, a inmet kawng vek ang a, a inbual tur a ni; tichuan a lo thianghlim ang: tin, chu mi zawhah chuan riah hmunah a kal ang a, amaherawhchu a puan in pawn lamah ni sarih a awm tur a ni." 
Leviticus14:9 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, a ni sarih ni chuan a sam zawng zawng leh a khabe hmul leh a mit ko hmulte a met kawng ang a, a hmul zawng zawng a met kawng ang; tin, a puante a su ang a, a inbual tur a ni; tichuan a lo thianghlim tawh ang." 
Leviticus14:10 Tin, ni riat ni chuan beram no a pa pahnih sawiselbo leh beram no a nu pakhat sawiselbo, kum khat mi leh chhangphut thilhlan atan chhangphut dip tak epha hmun sawma thena hmun thum hriaka hmeh leh hriak log khat a keng tur a ni." 
Leviticus14:11 Tin, a thiantu puithiam chuan inthian tura leh chung thil chu inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah LALPA hmaah a dah ang a:" 
Leviticus14:12 tin, puithiam chuan beram no pakhat chu hriak log khat nen chuan a la ang a, bawhchhiat thawina'n a hlan ang a, LALPA hmaa then thilhlan atan then tur a ni." 
Leviticus14:13 Tin, sual thawina leh halral thilhlan an talh thinna hmun, hmun thianghlimah chuan beram no pa chu a talh tur a ni: sual thawina chu puithiam pual a ni ang bawkin bawhchhiat thawina pawh chu puithiam pual a ni si a: thil thianghlim tak a ni e:" 
Leviticus14:14 tin, puithiam chuan bawhchhiat thawina thisen chu a la ang a, inthian tura beng ding lam hmawrah te, a kut ding lam zungpuiah te, a ke ding lam zungpuiah te, puithiam chuan a hnawih ang:" 
Leviticus14:15 tin, hriak log khata mi chu puithiam chuan a la ang a, ama vei lam kutphahah a chhung ang a;" 
Leviticus14:16 puithiam chuan a kut vei lama hriakah chuan a zungtang ding lam a hnim ang a, hriak chuan LALPA hmaah a kutzungtangin vawi sarih a theh ang a;" 
Leviticus14:17 tin, a kuta hriak la awm zawng chuan inthian tura beng ding lam hmawr te, a kut ding lam zungpui te, a ke ding lam zungpui tea bawhchhiat thawina thisen chungah te chuan a hnawih ang a:" 
Leviticus14:18 tin, puithiam chuan a kuta hriak la awm zawng chuan inthian tura lu a hnawih ang a; tin, puithiam chuan LALPA hmaah inremna a siamsak tur a ni." 
Leviticus14:19 Tin, puithiam chuan sual thawina chu a hlan ang a, a thianghlim lohna avanga inthian tura chu inremna a siamsak ang a; tin, chu mi zawhah chuan halral thilhlan chu a talh ang;" 
Leviticus14:20 Tin, puithiam chuan halral thilhlan leh chhangphut thilhlan chu maichamah chuan a hlan ang a, puithiam chuan inremna a siamsak ang a, tichuan a lo thianghlim tawh ang." 
Leviticus14:21 Tin, mi rethei a niha chutiang chu a tlin loh chuan beram no a pa pakhat bawhchhiat thawina, inremna siamsakna'na then tur leh chhangphut thilhlan atan chhangphut dip tak epha hmun sawma thena hmun khat, hriaka chawhpawlh, hriak log khat nen a keng ang a;" 
Leviticus14:22 tin, thuro tuak khat emaw, parva no tuak khat emaw, a neih theih zawk zawk apiang; pakhat chu sual thawina, pakhat chu halral thilhlanah a ni ang." 
Leviticus14:23 Ni riat niin a inthenna'n puithiam hnenah inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah LALPA hmaah a rawn keng tur a ni. 
Leviticus14:24 Tichuan puithiamin bawhchhiat thawina beram no leh hriak log khat chu a la ang a, tin, then thilhlanah LALPA hmaah puithiam chuan a then ang a;" 
Leviticus14:25 tin, bawhchhiat thawina beram no chu a talh ang a; puithiam chuan bawhchhiat thawina thisen chu a la ang a, inthian tura beng ding lam hmawrah te, a kut ding lam zungpuiah te, a ke ding lam zungpuiah te a hnawih ang:" 
Leviticus14:26 tin, puithiam chuan hriak chu ama kutpbah vei lamah a bun ang a:" 
Leviticus14:27 tin, puithiam chuan a kut vei lama hriak thenkhat chu a kut ding lamin LALPA hmaah vawi sarih a theh ang a;" 
Leviticus14:28 tin, puithiam chuan a kuta hriak chuan inthian tura beng ding lam hmawr te, a kut ding lam zungpui te, a ke ding lam zungpui tea bawhchhiat thawina thisen chung takahte chuan a hnawih ang:" 
Leviticus14:29 tin, puithiam kuta hriak la awm zawng te chuan LALPA hmaa inremna siamsak turin inthian tura lu chu a hnawih tur a ni." 
Leviticus14:30 Tin, thuro emaw, parva no emaw, a neih theih zawk zawk apiang a pakhat chu a hian ang a;" 
Leviticus14:31 a neih theih zawk zawk apiang, sual thawina'n pakhat, halral thilhlanah pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan nen: tin, puithiamin inthlan tura chu LALPA hmaah inremna a siamsak ang." 
Leviticus14:32 Hei hi phar hri vei, inthenna dan ang tlin lote tana dan a ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus14:33 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Leviticus14:34 Luah tura ka pek che u Kanaan ram in luh huna, in luah tur ram khawii inah pawh phar hri ka dah chuan," 
Leviticus14:35 chu mi in neitu chuan, 'He inah hian hri ni awm tak awm awmin ka hria,' tiin puithiam a rawn hrilh tur a ni:" 
Leviticus14:36 tin, puithiam chu hri en tura a luh hma chuan in chhunga thil awm zawng zawng chu bawlhhlawha a chan lohna'n in chu tihruah turin puithiam chuan thu a pe ang a; chu mi zawh chuan puithiam chu in en tur chuan a lut ang;" 
Leviticus14:37 tin, hri chu a en ang a, tin, ngai teh, hri chuan a hring lam deuh emaw, a sen lam deuh emawa bang a ei khuar tawh a, bang aia phaia a lan chuan," 
Leviticus14:38 puithiam chu in ata kawngkaah a chhuak ang a, in chu ni sarih a khar ang:" 
Leviticus14:39 tin, ni sarih niin puithiam chuan a va en leh ang a, tin, ngai teh, hri chu banga a lo kai chuan," 
Leviticus14:40 hri awm na lung chu lak chhuah a, daipawnah hmun bawlhhlawha paih turin puithiam chuan thu a pe ang a;" 
Leviticus14:41 tin, inchhung lam chu a ziah vel tir ang a, tin, lung hmun charnaan ziah khawh chu daipawnah hmun bawlhhlawhah an chhung ang a:" 
Leviticus14:42 Tin, lung dang an la ang a, chung lung hmunahte chuan an dah ang a; tin, lung charna dang an la ang a, in chu a bel ang." 
Leviticus14:43 Tin, lung a lak chhuaha in chu a ziaha a bel zawh hnua hri chu ina a lo chhuah leh chuan" 
Leviticus14:44 puithiam chu a va lut ang a, a va en leh ang; tin, ngai the, hri chu ina alo tai chuan chu ina phar chu a nghet chi a ni a, a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus14:45 In chu a thiat ang a,a lung te, a thing te, a lung charna zawng zawngte pawh; tin, daipawna hmun bawlhhlawhah a thiar chhuak ang." 
Leviticus14:46 Tupawh chu in khar chhung reng renga lut chu tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh bawk ang. 
Leviticus14:47 Tin, tupawh chu mi ina mu apiangte chuan an puante an su ang a. Tin, tupawh chu ina chaw ei apiangte chuan an puante an su tur a ni." 
Leviticus14:48 Tin, puithiam chu a luh a, a han en vel a, tin, ngai teh, in chu bel that a nih hnua hri chu a tai loh chuan, in chu a thianghlim tih puithiamin a puang ang, hri chu a kian tawh avangin." 
Leviticus14:49 Tin, in thenna tur chuan sava pahnih leh sidar thing leh la zai sen leh husop a keng ang a;" 
Leviticus14:50 tin, sava pakhat chu hlum belah lui tui chunga a talh ang a:" 
Leviticus14:51 tin, sidar thing leh husop leh la zai sen leh sava nung chu a la ang a, sava talh tak thisenah leh lui tuiah chuan a hnim ang a, tin, in chu vawi sarih a theh ang:" 
Leviticus14:52 tin, in chu, sava thisen te, lui tui te, sava nung te, sidar thing te, husop te, la zai sen te chuan a thian ang:" 
Leviticus14:53 Sava nung erawh kha chu khua atangin ramah a thlawh chhuahtir tur a ni: chutichuan in atan chuan inremna a siam ang a, tichuan a lo thianghlim tawh ang." 
Leviticus14:54 Hei hi phar hri chi tinreng leh pupangliah chungchanga dan chu a ni; 
Leviticus14:55 Puana phar awm leh ina mi te," 
Leviticus14:56 pawng te, khir te, bawl chungchangahte pawh;a thianghlim loh lai leh a thianghlim lai kawhhmuhna turin hei hi phar chungchanga dan chu a ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus14:57 a thianghlim loh lai leh a thianghlim lai kawhhmuhna turin hei hi phar chungchanga dan chu a ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus15:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Leviticus15:2 Israela thlahte chu bia u la, an hnenah, 'Mipa tupawh a tisaah thil a puh chuan a thil put avang chuan a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus15:3 A thil put chhung zawng chu a bawlhhlawh a ni: a tisaah chuan a put reng emaw, a put chu dan emaw pawh ni se la, a bawlhhlawh tho a ni." 
Leviticus15:4 Thil puta mutna khum tawh phawt hu a bawlhhlawh ang; tin, a thutna tawh phawt chu a bawlhhlawh bawk ang." 
Leviticus15:5 Tin, tupawh a khum khawih apiangte chuan an puante an su ang a, an inbual tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlaw ang." 
Leviticus15:6 Thil puta thutnaa thu apiangte chuan an puante an su ang a, an inbual tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:7 Tupawh thil puta tisa chu khawih apiangte chuan an puante an su ang a, an inbual tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:8 Tin, thil puta chuan mi bawlhhlawh lo chil a chhak chuan a puante a su ang a, a inbual tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:9 Chuanna engpawhah thil puta chu a chuan chuan a bawlhhlawh ang. 
Leviticus15:10 Tupawh a innghahna hnu thil khawih apiangte chu tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang; tin, chung thil chawisawntu apiangte chuan an puante an su ang a, an inbual tur ani a, tlai lam thlengin a bawlhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:11 Tin, tupawh thil puta chuan, a kut tleuh loa a khawih apiangte chuan an puante an su ang a, an inbual tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:12 Tin, thil puta hlumbel khawih hnu chu tihkeh tur a ni; tin, thing bungbel zawng zawn chu tleuh fai vek tur a ni." 
Leviticus15:13 Tin, thil puta chu, a thil put tihthianghlim a nih chuan a inthenna'n ni sarih a intuk ang a, a puante a su ang a; tin, lui tuiah a inbual ang a; tichuan a lo thiang- hlim tawh ang." 
Leviticus15:14 Tin, a ni riat ni chuan thuro tuak khat emaw, parva no tuak khat emaw kengin LALPA hmaah inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah a kal ang a, puithiam a pe tur a ni:" 
Leviticus15:15 Tin, puithiam chuan sual thawina'n pakhat, halral thilhlanah pakhat a hlan tur a ni; tin, puithiam chuan a thil put thuah LALPA hmaah inremna a siamsak ang." 
Leviticus15:16 Tupawh inpawlna chi amah atanga a chhuah chuan a pumin a inbual vek tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:17 Tin, silhfen te, vunte inpawlna chi awmna tawh phawt chu suk faia sil fai vek tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin a a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:18 Tin, hmeichhia a mutpui pawhin an pahnihin an inbual ve ve tur a ni a, tin, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:19 Tin, hmeichhiain thil put a neih a, a tisaa thil put chu thi a nih chuan ni sarih chhung chu a bawlhhlawh ang; tin, tupawh amah khawih apiangte chu tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:20 Tin, a bawlhhlawh chhunga a mutna tawh phawt chu a bawlhhlawh ang a, a thutna tawh phawt pawh a bawlhhlawh bawk ang." 
Leviticus15:21 Tupawh a khum khawih apiangte chuan an puante an su ang a, an inbual tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:22 Tupawh a thutna khawih apiangte chuan an puante an su ang a, an inbual tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:23 Khuma thil awm emaw, a thutnaa thil awm emaw khawih apiangte chu tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:24 Tupawhin an mutpuia a bawlhhlawhna chu an kai chuan ni sarih an bawlhhlawh ang a: an mutna khum apiangte chu a bawlhhlawh ang. 
Leviticus15:25 Tin, hmeichhia a bawlhhlawh hun pangngai ni loa ni rei fe a thi a puh emaw, a bawlhhlawh dan pangngai aia rei a thi a puh emaw chuan, a bawlhhlawhna dan pangngai chhunga a awm thin angin thi puta a bawlhhlawh chhung zawng chuan a awm bawk tur a ni; a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus15:26 A thi puh chhung zawnga a mutna khum tawh phawt chu a bawlhhlawh dan pangngai hun laia a khum ang a ni ang a; a thutna apiang chu a bawlhhlawh dan pangngai hun laia a bawlhhlawh angin a bawlhhlawh ang. 
Leviticus15:27 Tupawh chung thil khawih apiangte chu an bawlhhlawh ang a, an puante an su ang a, an inbual tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus15:28 Amaherawhchu a thi put chu tihthianghlim a nih chuan ni sarih a intuk ang a, chu mi hnuah chuan a lo thianghlim tawh ang." 
Leviticus15:29 Tin, a ni riat niin thuro tuak khat emaw, parva no tuak khat emaw a keng ang a, inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah puithiam a rawn pe tur a ni." 
Leviticus15:30 Tin, puithiamin sual thawina'n pakhat, halral thilhlanah pakhat a hian tur a ni; tichuan puithiam chuan thi puta a bawlhhlawhna thuah LALPA hmaah inremna a siamsak ang." 
Leviticus15:31 Hetiang hian Israela thlahte chuan bawlhhlawhna ata chu in tihrang tur a ni, an zinga ka biakbuk an tihbawrhban chang pawha an bawlhhlawhna avanga an thih loh nan." 
Leviticus15:32 Hei hi thil putate leh bawlhhlawh phaha inpawlna chi chhuakate tana dan chu a ni;an bawlhhlawhna avanga peih sam lo te, ahmei apa, thil putho te, hmeichhia, an bawlhhlawh laia mutpuitute tan pawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus15:33 an bawlhhlawhna avanga peih sam lo te, ahmei apa, thil putho te, hmeichhia, an bawlhhlawh laia mutpuitute tan pawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus16:1 Tin, Arona fapate pahnihin LALPA an va hnaiha an thih phah hnu chuan LALPA'n Mosia a bia a;" 
Leviticus16:2 LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""I unau Arona bia la, puanzar chhung hmun thianghlimah, bawm chunga zahngaihna thutphah hmaah chuan eng lai mahin lo lut hauh suh se, a thi dah ang e; zahngaihna thutphah hungah, chhumah ka rawn inlar dawn a ni." 
Leviticus16:3 Hetiang hian Arona chu hmun thianghlimah a kal tur a ni: sual thawina'n bawng tuai, halral thilhlanah berampa nen." 
Leviticus16:4 puan zai sin kawr thianghlim chu a ha ang a, a tisa khuhna'n puan zai sin kekawr chu a ha ang a, puan zai sin kawnghrenin a inhreng ang a, puan zai sin diar a khim tur a ni: he'ng hi silhfen thianghlim a ni a; a inbual te te ang a, a inbel tur a ni." 
Leviticus16:5 Tin, Israela thlahte mipuiho ta kelpa pahnih sual thawina'n leh halral thilhlanah berampa pakhat a keng ang a." 
Leviticus16:6 Tin, Arona chuan ama puala sual thawina bawngpa chu a hian ang a, amah leh a chhungte tan inremna a siam ang." 
Leviticus16:7 Kel pahnih chu a kai ang a, inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah LALPA hmaah a dah ang a." 
Leviticus16:8 Tin, Arona chuan kel pahnih chungchangah chuan thum a vawr ang a, pakhat chu LALPA pual a ni ang a, pakhat chu Azazela pual a ni ang a." 
Leviticus16:9 tin, Arona chuan LALPA puala tlu kel chu a la ang a, sual thawina'n a hlan ang a." 
Leviticus16:10 Azazela puala tlu kel erawh chu inremna siamna tura Azazela tan thlalera chhuah turin LALPA hmaah a nungin a dah ang. 
Leviticus16:11 Tin, Arona chuan ama puala sual thawina bawngpa chu a la ang a, amah leh a chhungte tan inremna a siam ang a, ama puala sual thawina bawngpa chu a talh ang a;" 
Leviticus16:12 tin, LALPA hmaa maicham ata mei lakna meilinga khat a la ang a, rimtui tui tak rawt dip dep thum khat nen puanzar chhung lamah a rawn luhpui ang a;" 
Leviticus16:13 rimtui khu chuan thu hriattirna chunga zahngaihna thutphah chu a bawhna turin, LALPA hmaa meiah rimtui chu a phul ang, thihna a tawh lohna'n;" 
Leviticus16:14 tin, bawngpa thisen eng emaw zat chu a la ang a, a kut zungtangin zahngaihna thutphah chhak lampang chu a theh ang a, a kutzungtangin zahngaihna thutphah bul chu thisen chuan vawi sarih a theh tur a ni." 
Leviticus16:15 Tin, mipui pual sual thawina kel chu a talh ang a, a thisen chu puanzar chhung lamah a rawn luhpui ang a, a thisen chu bawngpa thisen a tih ang khan a ti ang a, zahngaihna thutphah leh zahngaihna thutphah bul chu a theh ang:" 
Leviticus16:16 Israela thlahte bawlhhlawhnate avang leh an bawhchhiatnate, an sualna zawng zawngte avangin hmun thianghlim pualah inremna; a siam ang: chutiang bawk chuan an bawlhhlawhnate zinga awm, inbiakna puan in pualah pawh a siam bawk tur a ni." 
Leviticus16:17 Hmun thianghlima inremna siam tura a luh lai chuan, amah leh a chhungte leh Israel mipuiho puala inremna a siam zawha a lo chhuah leh hma loh chuan tumah reng reng inbiakna puan in chhungah chuan an awm tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus16:18 LALPA hmaa maicham lamah chuan a chhuak ang a, chu mi pualah inremna a siam ang a, bawngpa thisen leh kel thisen eng emaw zat chu a la ang a, maicham kiahte chuan a velin a tat ang." 
Leviticus16:19 Tin, a kutzungtangin vawi sarih a theh ang a, a thian ang a, Israela thlahte bawlhhlawh- nate lak ata chu a tithianghlim ang." 
Leviticus16:20 Tin, hmun thianghlim leh inbiakna puan in leh maicham puala inremna a siam zawh chuan kel nung chu a hlan ang a: " 
Leviticus16:21 Arona chuan kel nung lu chungah chuan a kut khinghnih a nghat ang a, a chungah chuan Israela thlahte khawlohna zawng zawng te, an bawhchhiatna zawng zawng te, an sualna zawng zawngte chenin a chham ang a, chungte chu kel lu chungah chuan a nghat ang a, mi pakhat an ruat diama khan thlaler lamah a hruai bo daih ang:" 
Leviticus16:22 tin, kel chuan an khawlohna zawng zawng chu chen loh leiah a phur ang a, kel chu thlaler- ah chuan a chhuah tur a ni." 
Leviticus16:23 Tin, Arona chu inbiakna puan inah chuan a lut ang a, hmun thianghlima luh laia puan zai sin silhfen a inbel chu a hlip ang a, chutah chuan a hnutchhiah ang a;" 
Leviticus16:24 tin, hmun thianghlimah a inbual ang a, a silhfen a inbel ang a, a lo chhuak ang a, ama puala halral thilhlan leh mipui puala halral thilhlan chu a hlan ang a, amah leh mipui tan inremna a siam ang." 
Leviticus16:25 Tin, sual thawina thau chu maichamah a hal ang." 
Leviticus16:26 Tin, Azazela pual kel chhuahtu apiang chuan an puan an su ang a, an inbual ang a, chu mi zawhah chuan an awm hmun lamah an haw leh tur a ni." 
Leviticus16:27 Sual thawina bawngpa leh sual thawina kel thisen inremna a siamna'na hmun thianghlima an luhpui chu daipawn lama kalpui tur a ni ang a; a vun te, a sa te, a ek te chu an hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus16:28 A haltu chuan a puan a su ang a, a inbual ang a, chu mi zawhah chuan awm hmun lamah a haw leh tur a ni." 
Leviticus16:29 Tin, hei hi in kumkhaw dan tur a ni ang a: thla sarihna, chu mi thla ni sawm ni chuan in rilrute in tihrehawm ang a, in rama mi reng emaw, ram dang mi in zinga kbawsa emawin hna engmah an thawk tur a ni lo:" 
Leviticus16:30 he mi ni hian nangmahni tihthianghlimna'n in tan inremna siam a ni dawn a ni; tichuan LALPA hmaah in sualna zawng zawng lak ata in thianghlim ang. 
Leviticus16:31 In tan chawlh hle hle ni a ni a, in rilrute in tihrehawm ang a; kumkhaw dan tur a ni." 
Leviticus16:32 Tin, puithiam, a pa aia puithiam ni tura hriak thih tur leh tihhran tura chuan inremna a siam ang a; puan zai sin silhfen, silhfen thianghlim chu a inbel ang a;" 
Leviticus16:33 hmun thianghlim pualah inremna a siam ang a; inbiakna puan in leh maicham pualah inremna a siam bawk ang a; tin, puithiamte leh mipuiho tan inremna a siam leh bawk ang.An sualna zawng zawngte avanga kum tin vawi khat Israela thlahte tan inremna siam hi in kumkhaw dan tur a ni,"" a ti a. Tichuan LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang chuan a ti a." 
Leviticus16:34 An sualna zawng zawngte avanga kum tin vawi khat Israela thlahte tan inremna siam hi in kumkhaw dan tur a ni,"" a ti a. Tichuan LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang chuan a ti a." 
Leviticus17:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus17:2 Arona leh a fapate leh Israela thlahte zawng zawng bia la, an hnenah, 'Hei hi LALPA thupek chu a ni." 
Leviticus17:3 Israel chhungkaw zinga mi reng reng, bawngpa emaw, beram no emaw, kel emaw riahhmun emaw, daipawn emawa talh a," 
Leviticus17:4 LALPA biak buk hmaa LALPA tana thilhlana inbiakna puan in kawngka bula rawn la lo apiang, chu mi chu thisen chhuaha ngaih a ni ang; thisen chhuah ngei a ni a, chu mi chu a chipuite zing ata tuithlarin a awm tur a ni;" 
Leviticus17:5 chu chu Israela thlahten an inthawinate, tamlaka an inthawinate chu an rawn lak a, LALPA tan ngeia inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah, puithiam hnenah an rawn laka, LALPA tana remna thilhlan inthawinaa an inthawi theihna'n a ni." 
Leviticus17:6 Tin, puithiamin inbiakna puan in kawngka bula maicham chu thisen chuan a theh ang a, a thau chu LALPA tana rimtui takah a hal tur a ni a." 
Leviticus17:7 An uire thinna kelpa hnenah chuan an inthawi tawh tur a ni lo,' tih hi. Hei hi an thlahte zei chena an kumkhaw dan tur a ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus17:8 Tin, an hnenah, 'Israel chhungkaw zinga mi reng reng emaw, ram dang mi an zinga khawsaten emaw halral thilhlan emaw, inthawina emaw hian a," 
Leviticus17:9 LALPA hnena inthawi tura inbiakna puan in kawngka bula rawn la lo an awm chuan chu mi chu a chipuite zing ata tuithlarin a awm tur a ni. 
Leviticus17:10 Tin, tupawh Israel chhungkaw zinga mi emaw, ram dang mi an zinga khawsa emaw, eng thisen pawh ei apiang chu, chu thisen eitu chungah chuan ka hmai ka thuar ang a, a chipuite zing ata tuithlarin ka awmtir ang." 
Leviticus17:11 Tisa nunna chu thisenah chuan a awm si a: in nunna atana inremna siamna tura maicham chunga ka pek che u a ni: nunna atana inremna siamna chu thisen ngei chu a ni si a. 
Leviticus17:12 Chuvang chuan Israela thlahte hnenah, tumahin thisen in ei tur a ni lo a, ram dang mi in zinga khawsate pawhin thisen an ei tur a ni hek lo, ka ti a ni." 
Leviticus17:13 Tin, Israela thlate zinga mi emaw, ram dang mi an zinga khawsain emaw ram vak a, sa emaw, sava emaw, ei theih chi a rawn hawn chuan a thisen chu a tichhuak ang a, vaivutin a vur tur a ni." 
Leviticus17:14 Tisa zawng zawng nunna thuah chuan a thisen leh a nunna chu angkhat chiah a ni; chuvangin Israela thlahte hnenah chuan, 'Eng sa thisen mah in ei tur a ni lo, tisa zawng zawng nunna chu a thisen chu a ni si a; tupawh a ei apiang chu tuithlarin a awm tur a ni." 
Leviticus17:15 Tin, amaha thi emaw, sa seh emaw ei apiang chu, chu mi rama mi reng emaw, ram dang mi emaw pawh ni se la, an puan an su ang a, an inbual tur a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang a; chu mi hnuah chuan an lo thianghlim tawh ang.An suk loha an inbual loh phei chuan an khawlohna mawh chu an phur ang, ka ti a,' ti rawh"" tiin." 
Leviticus17:16 An suk loha an inbual loh phei chuan an khawlohna mawh chu an phur ang, ka ti a,' ti rawh"" tiin." 
Leviticus18:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus18:2 Israela thlahte chu bia la, an hnenah, 'Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni a." 
Leviticus18:3 In awm tawhna Aigupta ram mite tih ang kha ti suh u la, ka hruai luhna tur che u Kanaan ram mite tih ang pawh ti suh ang che u; an dan pawh zawm bawk hek suh u." 
Leviticus18:4 Ka rorelte chu in pawm ang a, ka dante chu zawhin in zawm tur a ni: Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni." 
Leviticus18:5 Chuvangin ka dan leh ka rorelte chu in zawm tur a ni: chu chu miin a tih chuan a nun phah ang: Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni. 
Leviticus18:6 Tuma'n in chhung bulte reng reng chu an saruakna hlim turin in pan tur a ni lo: Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni. 
Leviticus18:7 I pa saruakna, i nu saruakna chu i hlim tur a ni lo: i nu a ni a, a saruakna i hlim tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus18:8 I pa nupui saruakna i hlim tur a ni lo, i pa saruakna a ni." 
Leviticus18:9 I farnu, i pa fanu emaw, i nu fanu emaw, i pianpui emaw, i pianpui loh emawte saruakna pawh i hlim tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus18:10 I fapaa fanu emaw, i fanua fanu emaw saruakna, an saruakna chu i hlim tur a ni lo. An saruakna chu nangma saruakna a ni si a." 
Leviticus18:11 I pa nupuia fanu, i pa hrin saruakna chu, i farnu a ni a, a saruakna i hlim tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus18:12 I pa farnu saruakna chu i hlim tur a ni lo; i pa chhung bul a ni. 
Leviticus18:13 I nu laizawn saruakna chu i hlim tur a ni lo, i nu chhung bul a ni si a." 
Leviticus18:14 I pa unau saruakna chu i hlim tur a ni lo a, a nupui chu i pan tur a ni lo, i nu a ni." 
Leviticus18:15 I monu saruakna chu i hlim tur a ni lo, i fapaa nupui a ni a, a saruakna i hlim tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus18:16 I unaupa nupui saruakna chu i hlim tur a ni lo, i unaupa saruakna a ni." 
Leviticus18:17 Nufa faa saruakna chu i hlim tur a ni lo: a saruakna hlim turin a fapaa fanu emaw, a fanua fanu emaw i nei tur a ni lo; i chhung bulte an ni a; suahsualna nasa tak a ni." 
Leviticus18:18 I nupuia laizawn chu a saruakna hlim turin i nupui la dam chhung chuan i nei kawp tur a ni lo. 
Leviticus18:19 Tin, hmeichhia a bawlhhlawh dan pangngaia a bawlhhlawh chhung chuan a saruakna hlim turin i pan tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus18:20 A laka intibawlhhlawh turin i vengpa nupui i mutpui tur a ni lo. 
Leviticus18:21 Moleka puala meia tihluh turin i rila rahte reng reng i pe tur a ni lo a, i Pathian hming i tichhe tur a ni hek lo: Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus18:22 Hmeichhia angin mipa i pawl tur a ni lo; thil tenawm a ni. 
Leviticus18:23 Intihbawlhhlawhna turin ran reng reng i pawl tur a ni lo a, hmeichhia reng reng inpawltir turin ran hmaah a ding tur a ni hek lo; suahsualna chungchuang a ni." 
Leviticus18:24 Heng thil, a engamahah hian intibawlhhlawh suh u; he'ng thil zawng zawngah hian in hmaa ka hnawhchhuah tak hnamte chu an lo bawlhhlawh tawh a;" 
Leviticus18:25 ram pawh chu a bawlhhlawh tawh a ni: chuvangin chuta a khawlohna chu ka hrem a, ram chuan a chhunga awmte chu a luak chhuak ta vek a." 
Leviticus18:26 Chuvangin nangni chuan ka dan te, ka rorelte in zawm tur a ni a, he'ng thil tenawm hi a engamah in ti tur a ni lo, in rama mi reng emaw, ram dang mi in zinga khawsate pawhin;" 
Leviticus18:27 (he'ng thil tenawm zawng zawng hi in hmaa he rama awmte khan an lo ti tawh a, ram pawh chu a bawlhhlawh tawh a ni:)" 
Leviticus18:28 in hmaa awm hnam a law chhuak ang bawka in tihbawlhhlawha ram chuan a luak chhuah ve lohna tur che uin. 
Leviticus18:29 Tupawh he'ng thil tenawm hi a engapawh titu apiang chu an chipuite zing ata tuithlarin an awm ang.Chuvangin he'ng thil tenawm in hmaa an chin ang hi in chin ve lohna'n leh chungah chuan in intihbawlhhlawh lohna'n ka thupek hi in zawm tur a ni: Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus18:30 Chuvangin he'ng thil tenawm in hmaa an chin ang hi in chin ve lohna'n leh chungah chuan in intihbawlhhlawh lohna'n ka thupek hi in zawm tur a ni: Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus19:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus19:2 Israela thlah, mipuiho zawng zawng chu bia la, an hnenah, 'In thianghlim tur a ni: Kei, LALPA in Pathian hi ka thianghlim si a." 
Leviticus19:3 Mi tinin in nu leh in pa in tih tur a ni a, tin, ka chawlhnite in serh tur a ni: Kei hiLALPA in Pathian chu ka ni." 
Leviticus19:4 Milem lamah thle suh u la, milem chhun Pathiante insiam hek suh u: Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni." 
Leviticus19:5 Tin, LALPA tana remna thilhlana in inthawi hunin pawm tiak ni turin in hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus19:6 In hlan ni tak leh a tuka ei tur a ni a: ni thum ni thlenga awm a awm chuan hal tur a ni. 
Leviticus19:7 Ni thum nia ei a nih vaih chuan thil tenawm a ni a, pawmsak a ni lo ang a," 
Leviticus19:8 a ei apiang chuan LALPA thil thianghlim a tihbawrhban avangin a khawlohna mawh a phur ang a, chu mi chu a chipuite zing ata tuithlarin a awm zawk ang." 
Leviticus19:9 Tin, in loa buh in seng hunin in vau femte thlengin in seng vek iur a ai lo a, a fo pawh in zawng tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus19:10 Tin, in grep huana a to in zawng tur a ni lo a, in grep huana a rah tla pawh in chhar khawm tur a ni lo a, mi rethei leh ram dang mi in zuahsak tur a ni: Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni." 
Leviticus19:11 Ruk in ru tur a ni lo a, a derin thil in ti tur a ni lo a, dawt in inhrilh tur a ni hek lo." 
Leviticus19:12 In Pathian hming tihliauin ka hming chhalin dawtin chhia in chham tur a ni lo: Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni. 
Leviticus19:13 Thenawmte i bum tur a ni lo a, i ruksak tur a ni hek lo. Inhlawhfa hlawh chu zankhua khuain a tuk thlengin i kawl tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus19:14 Bengngawng chu anchhia i lawh tur a ni lo a, mitdel hmaah tlukna i dah tur a ni hek lo a, i Pathian chu i tih tur a sin: Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus19:15 Rorelnaah chuan fel lo takin in rel tur a ni lo; mi rethei i thlei tur a ni lo a, mi thiltithei i zah chuang tur a ni lo a, fel takin i thenawm ro i relsak tur a ni." 
Leviticus19:16 I chipuite zingah mite relin i vak vel ruai tur a ni lo a, i thenawm thisen thuah a ni lo zawngin i tang tur a ni hek lo: Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus19:17 I rilruin i unau i haw tur a ni lo: I thenawm chu i zilhhau ngei tur a ni, a sualnaa i hulna'n." 
Leviticus19:18 Phuba i la tur a ni lo a, i chipui thlahte huatna i pai tur a ni hek lo, nangmah i inhmangaih angin i thenawm i hmangaih tur a ni zawk: Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus19:19 Ka thupekte chu in pawm tur a ni. I ran chu chi hrang hrang thlahtir suh: i lovah thlai chi hnih ching suh la, thil chi hrang pahnih tah pawlh puan i sin tur a ni hek lo." 
Leviticus19:20 Tupawh bawihnu, pasal hualtu nei, la tlan loh, la chhuahtir loh hmeichhia nena mu dun apiangte chu hrem an ni ang: tihhlum tur zawng an ni lo ang, ani chu la chhuah loh a nih avangin." 
Leviticus19:21 Inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah LALPA hnena a bawhchhiat thawina, bawhchhiat thawina berampa chu a rawn kai tur a ni." 
Leviticus19:22 Tin, a thil tihsual tak, a sualnaah LALPA hmaah bawhchhiat thawina berampa chuan puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang; tichuan a thil tihsual tak a sualnaah chuan ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus19:23 Tin, ram chu in va luah a, ei atan thei kung chi tinreng in phun hun chuan a rah chu thiang loah in ngai tur a ni: in tan kum thum thiang loa ngaih tur a ni a; ei hauh loh tur a ni." 
Leviticus19:24 Amaherawhchu a kum li kum chuan a rah zawng zawng chu LALPA fakna'n a puala tihhran tur a ni. 
Leviticus19:25 Tin, a kum nga kum chuan in tan a pun zel theihna'n a rah chu in ei tur a ni: Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni." 
Leviticus19:26 A thisen chawpin engmah in ei tur a ni lo a, dawi te in hmangin aien te in ching tur a ni hek lo." 
Leviticus19:27 I bekbawr atangin a velin i lu i met tur a ni lo a, i khabe hmul sir tuak i tan tur a ni hek lo." 
Leviticus19:28 Mitthi avangin in taksa in zai tur a ni lo a, in intial tur a ni hek lo: Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus19:29 Nawhchizuara siam turin i fanu tibawrhbang suh: ram chu uirena ramah a lo chang ang a, suahsualnain a lo khat dah ang e." 
Leviticus19:30 Ka chawlhnite chu in serh tur a ni a, ka hmun thianghlim chu in zah tur a ni: Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus19:31 Ramhuai aienthiam zawlte chu pan suh u la, dawithiamte pawh in bawlhhlawh phahna turin anni chu zawng chhuak suh u:" 
Leviticus19:32 Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni. 
Leviticus19:33 Lua kelsam tote hmaah chuan i ding zel thin tur a ni a, tar hmel chu i zah tur a ni a, i Pathian chu i tih tur a ni; Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus19:34 Tin, ram dang mi, in rama khawsa ve an awm chuan in tichhe tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus19:35 Ram dang mi in zinga khawsate chu in tan in rama mi reng ang an ni tur a ni a, nangmah i inhmangaih angin i hmangaih tur a ni; nangni pawh Aigupta ramah khan ram dang mi in nih kha: Kei hi LALPA in Pathian ka nih hi." 
Leviticus19:36 rorel thuah te, tehna hmawlhah te, khinah te, tehnaah te fel lo takin in ti tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus19:37 Bukna dik tak, khin dik tak, epha dik tak, bin dik tak in nei tur a ni: Kei hi LALPA in Pathian, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u kha ka ni.Tin, ka thupek zawng zawngte leh ka rorel zawng zawngte chu in pawm ang a, in zawm tur a ni; Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus19:38 Tin, ka thupek zawng zawngte leh ka rorel zawng zawngte chu in pawm ang a, in zawm tur a ni; Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus20:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus20:2 Israela thlahte hnenah, 'Tupawh, Israela thlahte zinga mi emaw, Israel rama khawsa ram dang mi emaw, an rila rah Moleka pe apiangte chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni a; he mi rama mite hian lungin an deng tur a ni." 
Leviticus20:3 Tin, kei pawhin, ka hmun thianghlim tibawlhhlawh tur leh ka hming thianghlim tibawrhbang tura a rila rah Moleka a pek avangin chu mi chungah chuan ka hmai ka thuar ang a, a chipuite zing ata ka tiboral ang." 
Leviticus20:4 Tin, he mi rama mite hian a rila rah Moleka a pek an haidera an tihhlum loh chuan, amah leh a chhungte chungah chuan ka hmai ka thuar ang a, Moleka laka uire tura min uiresan apiangte nen an chipuite zing ata ka tiboral ang." 
Leviticus20:5 Tin, an laka uire tura ramhuai aienthiam zawlte leh dawithiamte pantu chungah chuan ka hmai ka thuar ang a, a chipuite zing ata ka tiboral ang." 
Leviticus20:6 Chuvangin intithianghlim u la, thianghlim in awm rawh u: Kei LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni si a." 
Leviticus20:7 Ka thupekte chu in pawmin in zawmtur a ni; Kei hi LALPA a tithianghlimtu che u ka ni. 
Leviticus20:8 A nu emaw, a pa emaw anchhe lawh apiang chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni: a nu emaw, a pa emaw anchhe lawh a ni a, a chungah a thisen mawh chu a awm tur a ni." 
Leviticus20:9 Mi nupui uire, a thenawm nupui uire chu, a uirepa leh a uirenu chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni." 
Leviticus20:10 Tin, pate nupui mutpui chu, a pa saruakna hlim a ni a, tihhlum ve ve ngei tur an ni a, an thisen mawh chu an chungah a awm tur a ni." 
Leviticus20:11 Miin a monu a mutpui chuan tihhlum ve ve ngei tur an ni ang; suahsualna chungchuang ti an ni a, an thisen mawh chu an chungah a awm tur a ni." 
Leviticus20:12 Miin hmeichhia a mutpui anga mipa a mutpui chuan thil tenawm tak an ti ve ve a ni a, tihhlum ngei tur an ni: an thisen mawh chu an chungah a awm tur a ni." 
Leviticus20:13 Miin nufa faa nupuia a neih chuan suahsualna nasa tak a ni a, in zinga suahsualna a awm lohna'n amah leh anni pahnih pawh halhlum tur a ni." 
Leviticus20:14 Miin ran a mutpui chuan tihhlum ngei tur a ni a, ran pawh chu in tihlum tur a ni." 
Leviticus20:15 Tin, hmeichhiain ran a va hnaiha, a inpawltir chuan hmeichhia chu i tihlum tur a ni, ran pawh chu: tihhlum ngei tur an ni a; an thisen mawh chu an chungah a awm tur a ni." 
Leviticus20:16 Miin a farnu, a pa fanu emaw, a nu fanu emaw a neih a, a saruakna a hmuh a, a ni pawhin a saruakna a hmuh chuan thil zahthlak tak a ni a, an chipuite thlahho mithmuhah tihboral tur an ni; a farnu saruakna hlim a ni a, a khawlohna mawh a phur ang." 
Leviticus20:17 Tin, miin hmeichhia a fel loh laia a mutpui a, a saruakna a hlim chuan a thi chhuahna hlim a ni a, ani pawh a thi chhuahna hlim a ni a, tichuan an chipuite zing ata tihboral ve ve tur an ni." 
Leviticus20:18 Chutichuan i nu laizawn emaw, i pa farnu emaw saruakna i hlim tur a ni lo: a laichin hnai saruaka siam a ni a: an khawlohna mawh an phur ang." 
Leviticus20:19 Miin a pami nupui a mutpui chuan a pami saruakna hlim a ni a; an sual mawh an phur ang a, fanau loin an thi ang." 
Leviticus20:20 Miin a unaupa nupui a neih chuan thil bawlhhlawh a ni a: a unaupa saruakna hlim a ni a, fanau loin an awm ang." 
Leviticus20:21 Chutichuan ka thupek zawng zawng te, ka rorel zawng zawngte in pawm ang a, in zawm tur a ni: tichuan awm tura ka hruaina che u ram chuan a luak chhuak dawn lo che u nia." 
Leviticus20:22 In hmaa ka hnawhchhuah tak hnam dante chu in zawh tur a ni lo: he'ng thil zawng zawng hi an ti thin a, chuvang chuan ka ten a ni." 
Leviticus20:23 Amaherawhchu nangni hnenah chuan an ram hnutetui leh khawizu luanna ram chu in luah anga, in luah atan ka lo pe ang che u, ka lo ti tawh a ni. Kei hi LALPA in Pathian, hnam dangte laka tihrangtu che u hi ka ni." 
Leviticus20:24 Chuvangin sa thlang leh thlang lo leh sava thlang leh thlang lo in thiei hrang ang a; sa emaw, sava emaw, leia a bawha bawkvak chi reng reng emaw in tana thlang loa ka thlei hrante chuan in nunna in titenawm tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus20:25 Ka tana mi thianghlim in ni tur a ni; Kei LALPA hi ka thianghlim si a, ka ta in nihna turin hnam dangte lakah ka tihrang che u a ni.Mipa pawh hmeichhia pawh ramhuai aienthiam zawl emaw, dawithiam emaw chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni: lungin an deng tur a ni: an thisen mawh chu an chungah a awm tur a ni,' ti leh bawk rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus20:26 Mipa pawh hmeichhia pawh ramhuai aienthiam zawl emaw, dawithiam emaw chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni: lungin an deng tur a ni: an thisen mawh chu an chungah a awm tur a ni,' ti leh bawk rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus21:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Arona fapa, puithiamte chu bia la, an hnenah, 'An chipuite zinga mitthi avangin tumah an intibawlhhlawh tur a ni lo;" 
Leviticus21:2 an chhung bul, an nu te, an pa te, an fapa te, an fanu te, an unau te," 
Leviticus21:3 an farnu, an la awmpui, nula, pasal la nei lote avang chuan an intibawlhhlawh thei ang." 
Leviticus21:4 An chipuite zinga a puipa ber an nih avangin an intibawlhhlawhin an intibawrhbang tur a ni lo. 
Leviticus21:5 An lu an met kawlh tur a ni lo a, an khabe hmul sir tuak an tan tur a ni bawk lo a, an taksa an zai tur a ni hek lo." 
Leviticus21:6 An Pathian tan mi thianghlim an ni tur a ni a, an Pathian hming an tihliau tur a ni lo; LALPA tana meia thilhlante, an Pathian tana ei tur chhiah te an hlan thin a ni a: chuvangin an thianghlim tur a ni." 
Leviticus21:7 Hmeichhia, nawhchizuar emaw, hming hliau emaw, a pasal mak hnu emaw an nei tur a ni lo: an Pathian tan mi thianghlim an ni si a." 
Leviticus21:8 Chuvangin i tithianghlim tur a ni; i Pathian tana ei tur chhiah chu an hlan thin si a, i tan mi thianghlim an ni tur a ni. Kei, LALPA a tithianghlimtu che u chu ka thianghlim si a." 
Leviticus21:9 Puithiam tupawh a fanu nawhchizuara a intihbawrhban chuan a pa tibawrhbang a ni a, hal tur a ni." 
Leviticus21:10 Unaute zinga puithiam lalber, a lu hriak thih mia thih tawh, silhfel bel tura tihhran tawh chuan a sam a thlah tur a ni lo a, a puante a pawt thler tur a ni lo a," 
Leviticus21:11 mitthi ruang awmnaah chuan a lut tur a ni lo a, a a nu emaw a pa emaw avangin a intibawrhbang tur a ni hek lo;" 
Leviticus21:12 hmun thianghlim ata chu a chhuak tur a ni lo a, a Pathian hmun thianghlim a tibawrhbang tur a ni bawk hek lo. A Pathian hriak thih mia tihhranna chu a chungah a awm si a: Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus21:13 Nupuiah chuan nula la thianghlim a nei tur a ni. 
Leviticus21:14 Hmeithai emaw, mak hnu emaw, hmeichhe hminghliau emaw, nawhchizuar emaw te chu a nei tur a ni lo a, ama chipui nula thianghlim nupuiah a nei tur a ni." 
Leviticus21:15 Tin, a chipuite zingah a thlahte chu a tibawrhbang tur a ni lo. Kei hi LALPA, a tithianghlimtu chu ka ni si a,' ti rawh,""" 
Leviticus21:16 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus21:17 Arona hnenah, 'An chhuante zel thlenga i thlahte zinga chiangkuan lohna nei apiang chuan a Pathian ei tur chhiah hlan turin rawn hnaih suh se." 
Leviticus21:18 Tupawh chiangkuanlohna nei apiang chuan an rawn hnaih hauh tur a ni lo: mitdel te, kebai te, hnarper te, fuke sei lutuk apiang te," 
Leviticus21:19 ke tliak te, kut tliak te," 
Leviticus21:20 elkun te, mi tawngchham te, mit chiangkuang lo te, mi buar te, mi phuhlip te, tilmu kehte chuan;" 
Leviticus21:21 puithiam Arona thlah chiangkuan lohna nei reng reng chuan LALPA tana meia thilhlan hlan turin an rawn hnaih tur a ni lo: chiangkuan lohna nei an ni a, an Pathian ei tur chhiah hlan turin an rawn hnaih hauh tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus21:22 An Pathian ei tur chhiah, a thianghlim leh a thianghlim ber pawh chu an ei thei ve ve ang." 
Leviticus21:23 Amaherawhchu chiangkuan lohna nei an nih avangin puanzar chhungah emaw, maicham kiang hnaiah emaw zawng an lo kal thei lo ang, ka hmun thianghlimte an tibawrhbang dah ang e. Kei hi LALPA, anmahni tithianghlimtu chu ka ni si a,' ti rawh,"" tiin.Chutiang chuan Mosia chuan Arona leh a fapate leh Israela thlahte zawng zawng hnenah a sawi a." 
Leviticus21:24 Chutiang chuan Mosia chuan Arona leh a fapate leh Israela thlahte zawng zawng hnenah a sawi a. 
Leviticus22:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus22:2 Arona leh a fapate hnena sawi la, Israel thlahte thil thianghlim, ka tana an hlan lakahte chuan inthiarfihlim rawh se, ka hming an tihhliau dah ang e. Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni a." 
Leviticus22:3 An hnenah, 'In chhuante zel thlenga in thlahte zawng zawng zinga mi, tupawh bawlhhlawh chunga Israela thlahten LALPA tana an hlan thil thianghlim rawn hnaih apiang chu ka lak ata tuithlarin a awm tur a ni. Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus22:4 Arona thlah tupawh phar emaw, thil puut emaw chuana thianghlim hma loh chuan thil thianghlimte zinga mi chu a ei tur a ni lo. Tin, tupawh, mitthi tihbawlhhlawh emaw, chi hhuaka emaw khawih apiang te," 
Leviticus22:5 tupawh amah tibawlhhlawh thei, a bawha bawkvak reng reng emaw, bawlhhlawh kai thei nei mi emaw khawih apiangte;" 
Leviticus22:6 chutiang khawihtu chu tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang a, tin, a inbual loh chuan thil thianghlimte zinga mi chu a ei tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus22:7 Tin, ni a tlak chuan a thianghlimt awh ang; chu mi hnuah chuan thil thianghlimte zinga mi chu a ei thei tawh ang, a ei tur a ni avangin," 
Leviticus22:8 Intibawlhhlawh turin amaha thi emaw, asa she emaw a ei tur a ni lo. Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus22:9 Chuvangin ka thupe chu a pawm tur a ni; chuti lo zawng an tihbawrhban chuan a sual mawh an phur ang a, an thih phah ang. Kei hi LALPA, anamahni tithianghlimtu ka ni si a." 
Leviticus22:10 Ram dang miin thil thianghlim chu an ei tur a ni lo; puithiam hnena khawsa emaw, inhlawhfa emaw chuan thil thianghlim chu an ei tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus22:11 Amaherawhchu puithiamin tu emaw ama suma a lei a lei chuan, chu mi chuan a ei thei ang; tin, a ina piangte chuan a ei tur chu an ei ve ang." 
Leviticus22:12 Puithiam fanuin ram dang mi a neih chuan then thilhlan, thil thianghlimte zinga mi chu a ei tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus22:13 Amaherawchu puithiam fanu chu fa nei loin hmeithaiin emaw, makin emaw a lo awm a, a pa in lama a kir leh chuan a nulat lai ang bawk khan a pa ei tur chu a ei ve leh ang; nimahsela ram dang mi chuan an ei tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus22:14 Miin hre loa thil thianghlim chu a ei chuan a hmun ngaa thena hmun khat chu a dah belh ang a, thil thianghlim chu puithiam a pe tur a ni." 
Leviticus22:15 An thil thianghlimte ei chuan thiam lohna thlensaktu, khawlohna mawh chu inphurhtir turin Israela thlahte thil thianghlim LALPA hnena an hlante chu an tibawrhbang tur a ni lo a." 
Leviticus22:16 Kei chu LALPA, anmahni tithianghlimtu chu ka ni si a;' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus22:17 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a." 
Leviticus22:18 Arona leh a fapate leh Israela thlahte zawng zawng bia la, an hnenah, Israela chhungkaw zinga mi emaw, israelte zinga awm, ram dang mi emaw, tupawh an thilhlan, halral thilhlana LALPA hnena an hlan, an thutiamna emaw, mahni duh thua thilhlan ema hlan apiang chuan thua thilhlan ema hlan apiangte chuan" 
Leviticus22:19 chhan tlak in nih theihna turin bawng emaw, beram emaw, kel emaw, a pa sawiselbo in hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus22:20 Sawisel kai reng reng chu in hlan tur a ni lo; pawmsak tlak cheu a ni bawk si lo a. 
Leviticus22:21 Tupawh thutiam tikimchang turin emaw, mahni duh thua thilhlanah emaw remna thilhlan inthawina, a ran rual zinga mi emaw, a beram rual zinga mi emaw LALPA hnena hlan apiang chuan, pawm tlak a nih theihna'n sawiselbo a hlan tur a ni a; sawisel kaina reng reng a awm tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus22:22 A mitdel te, a ruh tliak te, a silawng te, pan nei te, a tangseh te, a phar te chu LALPA hnenah a hlan tur a ni lo a, meia thilhlanah LALPA hnenah maichamah in hlan tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus22:23 mahni duh thua thilhlanah LALPA hnenah maichamah in hlan tur a ni lo. 
Leviticus22:24 Mahni duh thua thilhlanah chuan bawngpa emaw, beram no emaw fuke sei lua emaw, tawi lua emaw pawh in hlan thei ang a; thutiamna'n erawh chu pawmsak a ni lo ang,"" tiin." 
Leviticus22:25 Ramdang mi a tanga lain chung zinga mi reng reng chu in Pathian ei tur chiahah in hlan tur a ni lo, chunga chhiatna leh sawisel kaina a awm avang chuan; pawmsak theih che u a ni lo ang,' ti rawh,""" 
Leviticus22:26 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus22:27 Bawngpa emaw, beram emaw, kel emaw, a lo pianin a pui hnenah ni sarih a awm tur a ni; ni riat ni atanga chu mi hnu lamah chuan LALPA tana meia thilhlanah pawm theih a ni ang." 
Leviticus22:28 Bawngpui emaw, berampui emaw, a ni nen ni khatah in talh tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus22:29 Tin, lawmthu sawi inthawia LALPA hnena in inthawi hunin chhan tlak in nih theihna turin in inthawi tur a ni." 
Leviticus22:30 Chu mi ni chuan ei zawh tur a ni a, a tuk thlengin engmah in khek tur a ni lo. Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni." 
Leviticus22:31 Chuvangin ka thupekte hi in pawmin in zawm tur a ni. Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni. 
Leviticus22:32 Tin, ka hming thianghlim hi in tihliau tur a ni lo a, Israela thlahte zingah chawimawin ka awm tur a ni. Kei hi nangmahni chawimawitu,in Pathian ni tura Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u ka ni. Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus22:33 in Pathian ni tura Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u ka ni. Kei hi LALPA chu ka ni,"" tiin." 
Leviticus23:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus23:2 Israela thlahte bia la, an hnenah, 'LALPA kut hunbi, inkhawmpui thianghlima in siam tur ka kut hunbi chu hengte hi a ni." 
Leviticus23:3 Ni ruk hnathawh tur a ni a, ni sarih ni erawh chu urhsun taka lak chawlhna, inkhawmpui thianghlim a ni; eng hna mah in thawk tur a ni lo: in awmna apiangah LALPA tana chawlhni a ni." 
Leviticus23:4 LALPA kut hunbi, inkhawmpui thianghlim chu hengte hi a ni." 
Leviticus23:5 Thla khatna, ni sawm leh ni lo ni tlai lam chu LALPA Kalhlen Kut a ni." 
Leviticus23:6 Tin, chu mi thle vek ni sawm leh ni nga ni chu LALPA tana chang dawidim telh loh kut a ni: ni sarih chhung chu chhang dawidim telh loh in ei tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:7 A ni khat ni chuan inkhawmpui thianghlim in nei ang a, hna reng reng in thawk tur a ni lo." 
Leviticus23:8 Ni sarih chhung chuan meia thilhlan LALPA hnenah in hlan tur a ni: a ni sarih ni chuan inkhawmpui thianghlim a ni a, hna reng reng in thawk tur ani lo,' ti rawh,"" tiin.." 
Leviticus23:9 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus23:10 Israela thlahte bia la, an hnenah, 'Ram ka pek che u in va thlen a, chuta buhte in seng hun chuan, in buh thar hmasate phal khat chu puithiam hnenah in rawn keng tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:11 Tin, pawmsak theih che u a nihna'n, anin buhphal chu LALPA hmaah a lo then ang a: tin, chawlhni tuk tuk lehah chuan puithiamin a then tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:12 Tin, buhphal in then ni chuan beram no a pa, sawiselbo kum khat mi halral thilhlanah LALPA hnenah in hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:13 Tin, chuta chhangphut thilhlan chu chhangphut dip mi epha hmun sawma thena hmun hnih hriaka hmeh LALPA tana rimtui tak, meia thilhlan a ni tur a ni: tin, chuta in tur thilhlan chu uain hin hmun lia thena hmun khat a ni tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:14 In Pathian tana thilhlan chu in hlan hma chuan, chu mi hma reng reng chuan a changin emaw, a kanin emaw, a vuiin emaw in ei tur a ni lo: hei hi in awmna apiangah in thlahte zel thlenga kumkhaw dan tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:15 Chawlhni tuk tuk leh, then thilhlan buhphal in rawn ken ni atangin in chhiar ang a, chawlhni vawi sarh a tling tur a ni;" 
Leviticus23:16 tin, chawlhni vawi sarihna tuk atang chuan ni sawmnga in chhiar ang a, LALPA hnenah chhangphut thar thil hlan in hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:17 In awmna hmun atangin epha hmun sawma thena hmun hniha siam, chhang hlawm then tur pahnih, chhangphut dip mi, dawidim nena awm, LALPA tana siam hmasak ber hla tur in rawn keng tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:18 Tin, chhang hlan rual chuan beram no pasaraih sawisel bo kum khat mi leh bawng tuai leh beram pa pahnih in hlan tur a ni: chungte chu an chhangphut thilhlan leh an in tur thilhlante nen chuan, LALPA tana halral thilhlante nen chuan, LALPA tana halral thilhlan, LALPA tana rimtui tak, meia thilhlan a ni ang." 
Leviticus23:19 Tin, sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat leh remna thilhlan inthawinaah beram no a pa pahnih kum khat mi in hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:20 Tin, puithiamin siam hmasak ber chhang chu beram no pahnih nen chuan LALPA hmaa then thilhlanah at hen ang a: puithiam pual, LALPA tana thianghlim a ni ang." 
Leviticus23:21 Tin, chumi ni vek chu in ruat ang a, in tan inkhawmpui thianghlim an ang a, hna reng reng in thawk tur a ni lo: hei hi in awmna apiangah in thlahte zel thlenga kumkhaw dan tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:22 Tin, in loa buh in seng hunin in vau femte thlengin in seng vek tur a ni lo a, a to pawh in zawng tur a ni lo: mi rethei leh ram dang mi in zuahsak tur a ni: Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Leviticus23:23 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus23:24 Israela thlahte bia la, an hnenah, 'Thla sarihna, chu mi thla ni khat ni chu in tan urhsun taka lak chawlhna, tawtawrawt tuma hriat reng,a inkhawmpui thianghlim a ni ang a." 
Leviticus23:25 Hna reng reng in thawk tur a ni lo; LALPA tana meia thilhlan in hlan tur a ni,'ti rawh"" tiin." 
Leviticus23:26 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia a bia," 
Leviticus23:27 Thla sarihna ni sawm ni erawh hi chu inrema ni a ni a: in tan inkhawmpui thianghlim a niang a, in rilrute in tihreawm ang a; tin, LALPA tana meia thilhlan in hlan tur a ni." 
Leviticus23:28 Chu mi ni chuan eng hna mah in thawk tur a ni lo; LALPA in Pathian hmaa remna siamsak tur che u a inremna ni a ni si a. 
Leviticus23:29 Tupawh ni se la, chu mi nia an rilru tihreawm lote chu an chipuite zing ata tuithlarin an awm ang." 
Leviticus23:30 Tupawh ni se la, chu ni nia hna engpawh thawk apiang, chu mite chu an chipuite zing ata ka tiboral ang."
