Numbers10:35 Tin, heti hi a ni a, bawm chu a chhuah dawn apiangin Mosia'n, ""Aw LALPA, lo thawk la, i hmelmate chu tidarh la, a hawtu che chu i hmaah tlanchhe rawh se,"" a ti thin a.Tin, a innghah apiangin ""Aw LALPA, Israel mipuiho hnenah hian lo kir leh rawh,"" a ti thin a." 
Numbers10:36 Tin, a innghah apiangin ""Aw LALPA, Israel mipuiho hnenah hian lo kir leh rawh,"" a ti thin a." 
Numbers11:1 Tin, mipuite chuan LALPA beng hriatah phunnawi hmangte angin thil tha lo tak an sawi thin a; chu chu LALPA'n a lo hriatin a thin a alh ta a; tichuan LALPA mei chu an zingah chuan a lo thawk a, an riahhmun pawn lam chu a lo kang ta dur dur mai a." 
Numbers11:2 Chutichuan mipuite chuan Mosia an au a; tin, Mosia chuan LALPA hnenah a tawngtai a, mei chu a rem ta a." 
Numbers11:3 Chu mi hmun hming chu Tabera an ti a. LALPA mei chu an zinga a lo thawh avang chuan. 
Numbers11:4 Tin, an zinga hnam dang nena inneih pawlhhote chuan tisa chakna an lo nei ta a; Israela thlahte pawh an tap leh a, ""Tunge sa ei tur min pe dawn?" 
Numbers11:5 Duh duha Aigupta rama sangha kan ei thinte chu kan hre reng a, fanghmate, hmazilte, purun hel ei mite, run balte, purun var mite pawh:" 
Numbers11:6 nimahsela tunah chuan kan thling a ro zo ta, engmah reng reng beisei tur a awm lo, mana mai lo hi chu,"" an ti a." 
Numbers11:7 Manna chu koriader mu ang, a lan danah chuan tuikeplung ang hi a ni." 
Numbers11:8 Mite chuan an chhar khawm a, rawtsawmnaah an rawt sawm a, sumahte an deng a, belah an chhum a, chhangahte an siam a: han ei chuan hriaka kan chhang ang a ni a." 
Numbers11:9 Riahhmuna zana dai a tlakin manna chu a tla tel ve a. 
Numbers11:10 Tin, mipuite chu an chhungkua kuain an puan in kawngka theuhvah an tap tih Mosia'n a lo hria a; tin, LALPA thin chu nasa takin a alh ta a. Tin, Mosia pawh a lungni lo a;" 
Numbers11:11 tichuan LALPA hnenah, ""Eng vangin nge i chhiahhlawh hi mi tihhreawm, engtizia nge i mit ka tlun loh a, he'ng mipui zawng zawng phurrit hi ka chunga i nghah?" 
Numbers11:12 Heng mipui zawng zawng hi ka hrin em an nih? An pi leh pute chhechhama pek i tiam rama hruai lut turin, 'Nau pawmtuin hnute hne lai a pawm angin i angchhungah pawm rawh,' i mi tih atan em ni ka hruai chhuah hlawm?" 
Numbers11:13 Heng mipui zawng zawng pek tur hi khawia ta nge sa ka neih ang? Kan ei atana sa mi pe rawh,"" tia tapin mi bei si a." 
Numbers11:14 Heng mipui zawng zawng hi mahni ngawt chuan ka phur zo lo, ka tan a rit lutuk a ni." 
Numbers11:15 Hetianga mi tih dawn chuan min khawngaih la, min tihlum daih law law mai la, mi tirethei tawh suh khai,"" a ti a." 
Numbers11:16 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Israelte upa, mipuite upa leh an hotu nia i hriat mi sawmsarihte kha ka hnenah khan hruai khawm la, inbiakna puan inah nangmah nena ding ho turin han hruai rawh." 
Numbers11:17 Tichuan ka lo chhuk ang a, chutah chuan ka rawn bia ang che: tin, nangmaha thlarau chu an chungah ka dah ang a; nangmah chauha phur loin mipuite phurrit chu an phurhpui ang che." 
Numbers11:18 Tin, nangin mipui hnenah, 'Naktuk atan hian intithianghlim vek u la, tichuan sa chu in ei mawlh ang: Sa ei tur tuin nge min pe dawn? Aigupta rama kan nawm nen khan, tiin LALPA benghriatah in tap a; chuvangin LALPA'n sa a pe ang che u a, in ei mawlh ang." 
Numbers11:19 Ni khat emaw, ni hnih emaw, ni nga emaw, ni sawm emaw, ni sawmhnih emaw mai pawh ni loin," 
Numbers11:20 thla khat pumhlum, ngei hlui khawp leh luak chhuak hlui kawpin in ei ang: in zinga awm LALPA chu duh lo a, 'Engati nge Aigupta ram ata kan chhuah ni, tia a hmaah in tah avangin,' ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
Numbers11:21 Tin, Mosia'n, ""Ka awmpui mipuiho kea kal theih thiau pawh 6,00,000 an ni a: 'thlakhat pumhlum ei tur sa ka pe ang,' i ti a." 
Numbers11:22 Beram rual leh ran rual pawh talhsak i la, an khawpkham dawn em ni? Tuifinriata sangha zawng zawng pawh mansak vek i la, an khawpkham dawn em ni? A ti a." 
Numbers11:23 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""LALPA kut chu a tawi ta em ni? I chungah ka thu angin a thlen leh thlan loh chu i hre mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers11:24 Tichuan Mosia chu a chhuak a, LALPA thu chu mipuite chu a hrilh a: tin, mipuihote upa sawmsarihte chu a ko khawm a, Puan In velah chuan a dintir a." 
Numbers11:25 Chutichuan LALPA chu chhumah chuan a lo chhuk a, a rawn bia a, amaha thlarau chu upa sawmsarihte chungah chuan a dah a: tin, heti hi a ni a, thlarau chu an chunga a han awm veleh chuan thu an sawi ta dual dual a; nimahsela chutiang chuan an ti an ti leh tawh lo." 
Numbers11:26 Amaherawhchu bukah chuan mi pahnih an la awm ta a, pakhata hming chu Eldada a ni a, pakhat leha hming chu Medada a ni: thlarau chu an chungah a awm a, chhiarte zinga tel chu an ni a, inbiakna Puan Inah erawh chuan an kal ve lo: bukah chuan thu an sawi bual bual a." 
Numbers11:27 Tichuan tlangval pakhat a va tlan a, Mosia a va hrilh a, ""Eldada leh Medadan bukah thu an sawi bual bual mai,"" a ti a." 
Numbers11:28 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua, a tleirawl tirh atanga Mosia rawngbawltu chuan a chhang a, ""Ka pu Mosi, khap rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
Numbers11:29 Tin, Mosia'n a hnenah, ""Keimah avanga ngaimawh em i nih? LALPA mi zawng zanwgte chuzawlnei ni vek se la LALPA'n an chungah a thlarau chu dah theuh se la tih nak alaiin,"" a ti a." 
Numbers11:30 Tichuan Mosia chu bukah chuan a lut leh a, amah leh Israel-ho upate nen." 
Numbers11:31 Tin, LALPA hnen atang chuan thli a lo tleh a, tuifinriat lam ata vahmin a rawn len a, buk lehlam pang ni khat kal, a lehlam pang ni khat kal ve ve awhin buk velchuan tawng hnih laia sangin a tlaktir a." 
Numbers11:32 Tin, mipuite chuan chu mi ni nileng leh zankhua leh a tuk nileng chuan vahmim chu an va chhar khawm a: a chhar tlem ber pawhin homer sawm a chhar a: buk velah chuan mahni tan tan an pho theuh a." 
Numbers11:33 Tin, chumi sa chu an ei lai, an la ei zawh hmain, mipue chungah LALPA thin chu a alh ta a, mipuite chu hripui nasa takin LALPA'n a hrem ta a." 
Numbers11:34 Chu mi hmun hmingah chuan Kibrot-hatava an ti a; chutah chuan tisa chakna neitute chu an phum avangin.Tin, Kibrot-hatava atang chuan mipuite chu Jazeroth-ah an kal a; Hazeroth-ah chuan an awm ta a." 
Numbers11:35 Tin, Kibrot-hatava atang chuan mipuite chu Jazeroth-ah an kal a; Hazeroth-ah chuan an awm ta a." 
Numbers12:1 Tin, Miriami leh Arona chuan Mosia'n Kus hmeichhia nupuia a neih avangin an sawichhia a: Kus hmeichhia chu a nei ngei si a." 
Numbers12:2 Anni chuan, ""Mosia hnenah chauh hian em ni LALPA'n thu a sawi bik: Keini hnenah pawh hian a sawi ve lo em ni?"" an ti a. Chu chu LALPA'n a lo hria a." 
Numbers12:3 Mosia chu lei chunga mihring zawng zanga zaidam lawrlak a ni a. 
Numbers12:4 Tin, Mosia leh Arona leh Miriami hnenah LALPA'n, ""In pathumin lo chhuak u la, inbiakna puan inah lo kal rawh u,"" a ti ta thut mai a. Tichuan an pathum chuan an va kal a." 
Numbers12:5 Tin, LALPA chu chhum dingah a lo chhuk a,Puan In kawngkaah a lo ding a, Arona leh Miriami chu a ko a; tin, an pahnih chuan an lo chhuak a." 
Numbers12:6 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka thu hi ngaithla rawh u: in zingah hian zawlnei in awm chuan amah chu kei LALPA hi inlarnain ka inhriattir ang a, mang lamah ka bia ang." 
Numbers12:7 Ka chhiahhlawh Mosia hi zawng chutiang a ni lo: ka chhungkaw thu zawng zawngah chuan a rinawm a ni. 
Numbers12:8 Ani nen zawng tawngkain thuruk awm loin tlang takin kan inbia ang a; LALPA hmel pawh a hmu ang; chuvangin ka chhiahhlawh Mosia hi engtiziaa sawichhe ngam nge in nih? a lo ti a. 
Numbers12:9 Tichuan LALPA thin chu an chungah a alh a, a kal leh ta a." 
Numbers12:10 Tin, Puan In chunga chhum chu a kiang ta a; tin, ngai teh, Miriami chu vur ang maia varin a lo phar ta a; Arona chuan Miriami chu a han en a, ngai teh, phar a lo ni ta reng mai a." 
Numbers12:11 Chutichuan Aronan Mosia hnenah, ""Aw, ka pu, ka chungah sual nghat lul suh ang che, atthlak takin kan lo ti a, kan lo sual ta a ni e." 
Numbers12:12 Mi, a nu chhul ata a lo chhuah tirh atanga thi sa deuhthaw angin awm lul suh se,"" a ti a." 
Numbers12:13 Tichuan Mosia'n, ""Aw Pathian, tidam leh teh khai,"" tiin LALPA chu a au a." 
Numbers12:14 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""A pain a hmaia chil a chhak ngawt pawhin ni sarih chu a zak dawn lo'm ni? Daipawnah ni sarih bibo se la, chu mi zawhah hruai luh leh ni rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Numbers12:15 Chutichuan Miriami chu daipawnah ni sarih a bibo a; Miriami an hruai luh leh hma chuan mipuite chu an tawl sawn lo a.Chumi zawhah chuan mipuite chu Hazeroth ata an chhuak a, Paran thlalerah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers12:16 Chumi zawhah chuan mipuite chu Hazeroth ata an chhuak a, Paran thlalerah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers13:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers13:2 Israela thlahte ka pek, Kanaan ram va enthla turin mite tir rawh khai: an hnam chhungkaw tina mi, an puipa zinga mi pakhat theuh zel i tir tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Numbers13:3 Tin, Mosia chuan Paran thlaler atang chuan LALPA thupek angin a kaltir ta hlawm a: an za chuan Israel thlahte zinga puipa thiau an ni." 
Numbers13:4 Heng hi an hming a ni; Reubena hnam zinga mi Zakura fapa Samua. 
Numbers13:5 Simeona hnam zinga mi Horia fapa Saphata. 
Numbers13:6 Juda hnam zinga Jephunea fapa Kaleba. 
Numbers13:7 Isakar hnam zinga mi Josepha fapaIgala. 
Numbers13:8 Ephraim hnam zinga mi Nuna fapa Hosea. 
Numbers13:8 Ephraim hnam zinga mi Nuna fapa Hosea. 
Numbers13:9 Benjamin hnam zinga mi Raphua fapa Paltia. 
Numbers13:10 Zebulun hnam zinga mi Sodia fapa Godiela. 
Numbers13:11 Joseph hnam (Manase hnam an tih) zinga mi Susia fapa Gadia. 
Numbers13:12 Dan hnam zinga mi Gemalia fapa Amiela. 
Numbers13:13 Aser hnam zinga mi Mikaela fapa Sethura. 
Numbers13:14 Napthali hnam zinga mi Vopsia fapa Nabia. 
Numbers13:15 Gad hnam zinga mi Makia fapa Geuela. 
Numbers13:16 Heng hi ram enthla tura Mosia a tirhate hming chu a ni. Nuna fapa Hosea chu Mosia Josua a ti a. 
Numbers13:16 Heng hi ram enthla tura Mosia a tirhate hming chu a ni. Nuna fapa Hosea chu Mosia Josua a ti a. 
Numbers13:17 Tichuan Mosia'n Kanaan ram enthla turin anniho chu a tir a, an hnenah, ""Chhim lam kawngah kal phawt u la, tlangahte lawn chho u la:" 
Numbers13:18 ram chu eng ang nge tih te, chunga cheng mipuite chu an chak nge chak lo tih te, an tlem leh an tam te," 
Numbers13:19 an awmna ram chu a tha nge tha lo tih te, an awmna khuate chu eng ang nge ni, puan in mai nge kulh neiin tih te," 
Numbers13:20 tin, ram chu a cheng hnawng nge hnawng lo, a ngaw nge ngaw lo tihte va thlithlai ula. Tin, huai takin awm u la, chu mi ram thei rahte chu rawn hawn ang che u,"" a ti a. Grep rah hmasa ra hun lai tak a ni a." 
Numbers13:21 Chutichuan an chhuak chho ta a, mram chu Zin thlaler atanga Hamath luhna Rehob thlengin an enthla vek a." 
Numbers13:22 Chhim lamah an chho phawt a, Hebron an va thleng a, chutah chuan Anaka thlah Ahiman-ho te, Sesai-ho te, Talmai ho te an awm a. (Hebron chu Aigupta rama Zoan din hma kum sariha din tawh a ni.)" 
Numbers13:23 Tin, Eskol ruam an va thleng a: chuta grep rah bawr khat, a tang chawpin an sat chhum a, tiangin mi pahnihin an zawn a: pawmgranet te leh theipuite pawh an hawn bawk a." 
Numbers13:24 Chu mi hmun chu Eskol ruam an ti a: Israela thlahten chuta ta grep bawr chu an sah thlak avangin. 
Numbers13:25 Tin, an ram va enthla chu ni sawmli an thang a, an lo haw leh ta a." 
Numbers13:26 Chutichuan Paran thlalera Kades-ah chuan Mosia leh Arona leh mipui zawng zawng hnen chu an lo thleng a, an hnenah leh mipui zawng zawng hnenah chuan thu an rawn thlen a, chu mi ram theite chu an entir a." 
Numbers13:27 Tin, a hnenah, ""I mi tirhna ramah chuan kan kal a, hnute leh khawizu luanna a lo ni ngei mai; hei hi a rama thei a ni." 
Numbers13:28 Amaherawhchu a rawn mi awmte chu mi chak pui pui an ni a. khuate pawh kulh nei, ropui tak tak a ni: tin, Ananka thlahte pawh kan hmu bawk a." 
Numbers13:29 Amalek-ho chu chhim lam ramah an awm a; Hit-ho te, Jebus-ho te, Amor-ho te chu tlangahte an awm a"" tin, Kanaan-hote chu tuifinriat kam leh Jordan lui dungah an awm,"" tiin an hrilh a." 
Numbers13:30 Tichuan Mosia hmaah Kaleban mipuichu a tingawi thuap a,""I han thawk thuai ang u khai, i han la ang u, kan ngam ngei ngei ang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers13:31 Nimahsela a kalpui chuan, ""Kan han hneh thei hlawm lo ang a, kan aiin an chak si a,"" an ti a." 
Numbers13:32 Tichuan Israela thlahte hnenah an ram han enthlak chu a chhunga chengte ei zawh hmang a ni; tin, a awmte kan hmuh chu mi awmkhauh pui pui an ni a.Tin, chutah chuan Anaka thlahte, mi liaho, awmkhauh pui pui kan hmu a; khau ang lekin kan inhmu a, anni pawhin khau ang lekin min hmu a ni,"" tiin a tha lo lamin an sawi a." 
Numbers13:33 Tin, chutah chuan Anaka thlahte, mi liaho, awmkhauh pui pui kan hmu a; khau ang lekin kan inhmu a, anni pawhin khau ang lekin min hmu a ni,"" tiin a tha lo lamin an sawi a." 
Numbers14:1 Chutichuan pungkhawmho zawng zawng chu aw chhuah meuhin an tap a; chu mi zan chuan mipuite chu an tap an tap a. 
Numbers14:2 Israela thlahte zawng zawng chu Mosia chungah leh Arona chungah an phunnawi a: pungkhawmho zawng zawng chuan an hnenah, ""Aigupta ramah khan Pathianin min tihlum ta then se la aw! A nih loh leh thlalerah hian min tihlum then mai se la aw!" 
Numbers14:3 Engati nge khandaiha thi mai tura Pathianin he ramah hian min hruai le aw! Kan nupui fanaute chu man tur mai an ni dawn si a: Aigupta rama kir leh hi kan tan a tha zawk dawn lawm ni aw? an ti a. 
Numbers14:4 Tichuan an inbe hlawm a, ""Hotu i siam ang u khai, Aigupta ramah i kir leh ang u,"" an ti a." 
Numbers14:5 Chutichuan Mosia leh Arona chu Israela thlah mipui pungkhawmho zawng zawng hmaah chuan an bawkkhup a. 
Numbers14:6 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua leh Jephunea fapa Kaleba, ram va enthlatute zinga tel vete chuan an puan an pawtthler a;" 
Numbers14:7 Israela thlah pungkhawmho zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Enthla tura kan va fan chhuah ram chu ram tha tak a ni a." 
Numbers14:8 Kan chunga LALPA a lawm chuan chu ramah chuan min hruai ang a, min pe ang; hnutetui leh khawizu luanna ram chu." 
Numbers14:9 LALPA chungah hel lo phat mai u la, chu mi rama mite chu hlau bawk hek suh u, kan chaw tur an ni mai a, an inhumhimna chu engmah lo a ni a; LALPA chu kan hnenah a awm alawm, anni chu hlau suh u,"" tiin an sawi a." 
Numbers14:10 Nimahsela pungkhawmho zawng zawng chuan lunga den an rawt a. Chutichuan LALPA ropuina chu inbiakna puan inah Israela thlahte zawng zawng hmaah a lo lang a. 
Numbers14:11 Tichuan LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Heng mipuite hian eng chen nge min ngaihnep ang a, an zinga chhinchhiahna ka tih thin chung pawhin eng chen nge mi rin loh dawn?" 
Numbers14:12 Hriin ka hrem ang a, ka timang ang a, nangmahah hian an aia ropui leh thil tithei zawk hnam ka din teh zawk ang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers14:13 Tin, Mosia'n LALPA hnenah, ""Aigupta miten an hre reu reu vang e; he'ng mipuite hi an zing ata i thiltihtheihnaa i hruai chhuah an ni si a;" 
Numbers14:14 he mi rama mite hi an hrilh ang a: he'ng mipuite zingah hian i awm tih an hre tawh a; hmaichhan meuhin an hmu tawh si chia, i chhum chu an chungah a awm thin a; tin, chhunah chhum ding, zanah meiin an hma i hruai thin si a." 
Numbers14:15 Heng mipuite hi i tihhlum phiar chuan i hmingthan hretu chuan," 
Numbers14:16 LALPA chuan he'ng mipuite hi chhechhma a tiam ramah chuan a hruai theih loh vangin thlalerah a tihlum ni,' tiin an sawi dah ang e," 
Numbers14:17 LALPA chu thinnel tak, ngilneihna ngah, khawlohnate, bawhchhiatnate ngaidam thin; thiam loa ruatte chhuah mai ngai lo; pate khawlohna avanga fate, fate fa lehte, chhuan thumna leh chhuan lina thleng pawha hrem thin a ni,' tia i lo sawi tawh ang khan i thilthiltihtheihna chu hlen teh hram khai." 
Numbers14:18 LALPA chu thinnel tak, ngilneihna ngah, khawlohnate, bawhchhiatnate ngaidam thin; thiam loa ruatte chhuah mai ngai lo; pate khawlohna avanga fate, fate fa lehte, chhuan thumna leh chhuan lina thleng pawha hrem thin a ni,' tia i lo sawi tawh ang khan i thilthiltihtheihna chu hlen teh hram khai." 
Numbers14:19 I ngilneihna a nasat ang ngei leh Aigupta ram ata tun thlenga i ngaidam ang hian mipuite khawlohna hi ngaidam teh khai,"" a ti a." 
Numbers14:20 Tin, LALPA chuan, ""I thu ang chuan ka ngaidam e;" 
Numbers14:21 amaherawhchu ka nunna leh LALPA ropuina tihkhah leilung chhalin ka sawi e," 
Numbers14:22 Aigupta ram leh thlalera ka ropuina leh ka thilmal tihte hmua, chuti chung pawha vawi sawm zet mi la fiah a, ka thu la pawm lo mi zawng zawngte hian" 
Numbers14:23 an thlahtute hnena chhechhama ka tiam ram chu an hmu tawp lo ang a; an zinga mi ngaineptu reng rengte pawhin an hmu bawk hek lo ang: 
Numbers14:24 ka chhiahhlawh Kaleba erawh hi chuan rilru dang a put a, mi zui takzet avangin, ani hi chu a va kalna ramah chuan ka hruai ang a, a thlahte chuan an luah ang." 
Numbers14:25 Khai le, Amalek-ho leh Kanaan ho chu ruamah chuan an awm a: naktukah let u la, Tuifinriat Sen kawng lam thlalerah lut rawh rawh u,"" a ti." 
Numbers14:26 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Numbers14:27 Heng mipui suaksual pungkhawm ho, ka chunga phunnawi thin hi eng chen nge ka dawh ang? Israela thlahte phunnawina, ka chunga an phunnawinate chu ka hria e." 
Numbers14:28 An hnenah, 'Ka nunna chhalin ka sawi e, ka benghriat ngeia i sawi nag takin in chungah ka ti ang a;" 
Numbers14:29 in ruangte chu he thlalerah hian a awm ang a; in zinga mi chhiar tawh zawng zawng, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam mi ka chunga phunnawiho zawng zawngte chu," 
Numbers14:30 ban phar meuh a, ka awmtir ang che u ka tih ramah chuan Jephunea fapa Kaleba leh Nuna fapa Josua chauh lo chu in lut tawp lo ang." 
Numbers14:31 Amaherawhchu, 'Man tur mai an ni ang,' in tih in fanaute hi chu ka hruai lut ang a, in duh loh ram chu an hria ang." 
Numbers14:32 Nangni erawh chu in ruang he thlalerah hian a awm ang. 
Numbers14:33 In fate chu thlalerah kum sawmli an tei an tei ang a, thlalera in ruangte a riral hma loh chuan in nawhchizawrhna chu an tuar ang." 
Numbers14:34 Ram in va enthlak ni zat, ni sawmli chhung zet in bawhchhiatna in tuar phah ang a, tichuan ka tum dan ka tihdanglam hi in hria ang." 
Numbers14:35 Kei LALPA hian mi suaksual pung khawm mi dodala pung khawmho chungah hei hi ka ti ngei ang ka lo ti tawh a: he mi thlalerah hian an boral ang a, chutah chuan an thi ang, LALPA'n a ti,' ti rawh u,"" tin," 
Numbers14:36 ,37 Tin, ram enthla tura Mosia tirh lo kir leh, ram chanchin a tha lo zawnga rawn sawi a, a chunga pungkhawmho phunnawitirtu, ram a tha lo zawnga rawn sawitute chu LALPA hmaah hriin an thi a." 
Numbers14:37 ,36 Tin, ram enthla tura Mosia tirh lo kir leh, ram chanchin a tha lo zawnga rawn sawi a, a chunga pungkhawmho phunnawitirtu, ram a tha lo zawnga rawn sawitute chu LALPA hmaah hriin an thi a." 
Numbers14:38 Ram enthla tura kalte zinga Nuna fapa Josua leh Jephunea fapa Kaleba erawh chu an thi ve lo a. 
Numbers14:39 Tin, Mosia'n chung thute chu Israela thlahte zawng zawng chu a hrilh a: tichuan mipuite chu an lungngai ta hle mai a." 
Numbers14:40 Chutichuan zing takah an tho a, tlang chhipah an han chho a, ""Ngaiteh hei kan lo kal e, LALPA'n min tiamna hmunah chuan kan kal ang e, kan lo sual ta a ni e,"" an ti a." 
Numbers14:41 Tin, Mosia'n, ""Hmuingilna a ni lo ang tih hre reng chungin engah nge Lalpa thupek in bawhchhiat tehreng?" 
Numbers14:42 In zingah LALPA a awm si lo a, hmelmate lo tihhlum mi turin chho suh u." 
Numbers14:43 In hmaah khian Amalek-ho leh Kanaan-ho an awm a ni, khandaiha tihhlum in ni mai ang: LALPA chu in hawisan tak avangin in hnenah Lalpa chu a awm lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers14:44 Nimahsela tlang chhiph chuan kal an tum tal a: amaherawhchu LALPA thuthlung bawm leh Mosia chu buk ata an chhuak ve lo.Chutichuan chu mi tlanga awm Amalek-ho leh Kanaan-ho chu lo chhuk a, an bei a, Horma thlengin an vaw thlu rum mai a." 
Numbers14:45 Chutichuan chu mi tlanga awm Amalek-ho leh Kanaan-ho chu lo chhuk a, an bei a, Horma thlengin an vaw thlu rum mai a." 
Numbers15:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers15:2 Israela thlahte bia la, an hnenah, 'In awmna tur ram ka pek che u in thlen huna" 
Numbers15:3 LALPA hnena meia thilhlan, halral thilhlan emaw, thutiam hlen tura inthawina emaw, mahni duh thua thilhlan emaw in kut hunbiah emaw, ran rual zinga mi emaw, beram rual zinga mi emawa LALPA tana rimtui siam tur emaw in hlan hunah chuan," 
Numbers15:4 LALPA hnena a thilhlan hlantu apiangin chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi epha hmun sawma thena hmun khat, hriak hin hmun lia thena hmun khata hmeh a hlan tur a ni;" 
Numbers15:5 tin, in tur thilhlanah uain hin hmun lia thena hmun khat halral thilhlan emaw, inthawina emawa, hlannaah beram no hming kimin inbuatsaih tur a ni." 
Numbers15:6 Tin, beram paah chuan chhangphut thilhlan, chhang phut dip mi epha hmun sawma thena hmun hnih, hriak hin hmun thuma thena hmun khata hmeh in buatsaih tur a ni." 
Numbers15:7 tin, in tur thilhlanah chuan LALPA tana rimtuiah uain hin hmun thuam thena hmun khat in hlan tur a ni." 
Numbers15:8 Halral thilhlanah emaw, thutiam hlen tura inthawina emaw, LALPA hnena remna thilhlanah emawa bawngpa in buatsaih hun chuan," 
Numbers15:9 bawngpa hlan rual chuan chhangphut thilhlan chhangphut dip mi epha hmun sawma thena hmun thum, hriak hin chanvea hmeh in hlan tur a ni." 
Numbers15:10 Tin, in tur thilhlanah uain hin chanve, LALPA tana rimtui meia thilhlan in hlan tur a ni." 
Numbers15:11 Chutiang chuan bawngpa te, beram pa te, beram no a pa te, kel no te an hming kimin tih tur a ni." 
Numbers15:12 An tam dan zir zelin in buatsiah ang a, an tam dan ang zel chuan in hlan tur a ni." 
Numbers15:13 Chumi rama piang zawng zawng chuan hetiang zel hian LALPA tana rimtui meia thihlan an hlan hunin an ti tur a ni. 
Numbers15:14 Tin, hnam dang mi in hnena khawsa thin emaw, tupawh in hnena khawsa zel thin turte emaw, LALPA tana rimtui meia thilhlan hlan duh apiang chuan in tih ang takin an ti ve tur a ni." 
Numbers15:15 In thlahte thleng atan mipuite leh hnam dang in hnena awmte tan pawh dan angkhat chauh a awm tur a ni; LALPA hmaah hnam dangte chu nangmahni ang chiah an ni ang. 
Numbers15:16 In tan leh in hnena hnam dang awmte tan dan hmun khat leh tih dan hmun khat chauh a awm ang,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Numbers15:17 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers15:18 Israela thlahte bia la, an hnenah, 'Heti hi ani ang a, ka hruaina tur che u ram in va thlen a," 
Numbers15:19 chu mi ram chhang in ei hun chuan LALPA hnenah then thilhlan in hlan tur a ni. 
Numbers15:20 In chhang hmeh hmasak ber zinga mi hlawm khat chu then thilhlanah in hlan tur a ni: hruiha mi then thilhlanah in then angin in then tur a ni. 
Numbers15:21 In thlahte thlengin in chhang hmeh hmasak ber chu LALPA hnena then thilhlan atan in hlan zel tur a ni. 
Numbers15:22 Tin, he'ng thupek zawng zawng LALPA'n Mosia hnena a sawi, LALPA'n thu a pek tirh atanga in thlahte thleng atana Mosia hmanga thu a pek zawng zawng che u hi in pawm loha in bawhchhiat chuan," 
Numbers15:23 Tin, he'ng thupek zawng zawng LALPA'n Mosia hnena a sawi, LALPA'n thu a pek tirh atanga in thlahte thleng atana Mosia hmanga thu a pek zawng zawng che u hi in pawm loha in bawhchhiat chuan," 
Numbers15:24 hetiang hi a ni ang a, pungkhawmhoin hre loa tihpalh a nih chuan pungkhawmho zawng zawng chuan halral thilhlan LALPA tana rimtuiah bawngtuai pakhat an hlan ang a, a dan pangngai angin chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlan nen, sual thawina'n kel pa pakhat an hlan tel bawk tur a ni." 
Numbers15:25 Tin, puithiamin Israela thlah pungkhawm zawng zawng tan remna a siam ang a, ngaihdam an ni ang, tihpalh a nih avang leh an thilhlan, LALPA tana meia thilhlan leh an tihsual aiah sual thawina an hlan tak avangin;" 
Numbers15:26 Israela thlah pungkhawm zawng zawngte chu ngaihdam an ni ang a, an zinga hnam dang awmte pawh; mipui zawng zawngin an tihpalh a nih a vangin." 
Numbers15:27 Tin, miin hre loin thil a tihsual chuan sual thawina'n kelnu pakhat kum khat mi a hlan tur a ni." 
Numbers15:28 Hre loa LALPA hmaa tisualtu tan chuan puithiamin remna a siam tur a ni; tichuan ngaihdamna a siam tur a ni; tichuan ngaihdam ani ang. 
Numbers15:29 Hre loa tisualtu tan, Israela thlah, chu rama piangte tan leh hnam dang mi an zinga awmte tan pawh dan angkhat in nei tur a ni." 
Numbers15:30 Amaherawhchu hre reng sia tilui chu chu rama piang emaw, hnam dang emaw pawh ni sela LALPA sawichhia a ni a; chu mi chu a chipuite zing ata tuithlar tur a ni." 
Numbers15:31 LALPA thu chu a hmusit a, a thupek chu abawhchhiat avangin, chu mi chu tuithlar hlauh tur ani a, a khawlohna mawh chu a phur ang,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Numbers15:32 Israela thlahte thlalera an awm lai chuan mi pakhat chawlhnia thing fawm hi an hmu a. 
Numbers15:33 A thing fawm hmutute chuan Mosia leh Arona leh mipuiho hnenah chuan an hruai a. 
Numbers15:34 Engtia tih tur nge tih la puan loh a nih avangin tan inah an khung a. 
Numbers15:35 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""chu mi chu tihhlum ngei ngei tur a ni, daipawnah mipui zawng zawng chuan lungin an deng tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Numbers15:36 Tichuan LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang chuan mipui zawng zawng chuan daipawnah an hruai a, lungin an denghlum ta a." 
Numbers15:37 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers15:38 Israela thlahte hnenah, an thlahte thlenga an puan hmawrah a fem siam tur leh, a hmawr tin, femah a dum pawl dah turin ti rawh:" 
Numbers15:39 chu mi fem chu in en thin a, LALPA thupek zawng zawng in hriat renga in zawmna'n leh nawhchizuara in awm thin anga in thinlung duhzawng leh in mit lazawng uma in awm lohna'n leh ka thupek zawng zawngte chu in hriat reng a in zawm a, in Pathian tana in thianghlim theihna'n a ni." 
Numbers15:40 chu mi fem chu in en thin a, LALPA thupek zawng zawng in hriat renga in zawmna'n leh nawhchizuara in awm thin anga in thinlung duhzawng leh in mit lazawng uma in awm lohna'n leh ka thupek zawng zawngte chu in hriat reng a in zawm a, in Pathian tana in thianghlim theihna'n a ni.In Pathian ni tura Aigupta ram ata hruaichhuaktu che u LALPA in Pathian ka ni. Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni,"" tiin." 
Numbers15:41 In Pathian ni tura Aigupta ram ata hruaichhuaktu che u LALPA in Pathian ka ni. Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni,"" tiin." 
Numbers16:1 Levia fapa Kohata, chu mi fapa Izara, chu mi fapa Kora chu Eliaba fapate, Dathana leh Abirama leh Peletha fapa Ona, Reubena thlahte nen chuan mite an hruai a:" 
Numbers16:2 Israela thlahte, mi lar deuh deuh mipui zinga hotu roreltua thlante zinga mi zahnih leh sawmnga te nen Mosia hmaah an va thawk a:" 
Numbers16:3 Mosia leh Arona phiarin an pung khawm a, an hnenah, ""In induh em mai, mipuite chu an thinghlim Theuh si a, LALPA pawh an zingah a awm si a: eng vangin nge LALPA mipui pungkhawmho chunga in indah chungnun bik?"" an ti a." 
Numbers16:4 Chu chu Mosia'n a han hriat chuan a bawkkhup a: 
Numbers16:5 tin, Kora leh a pawlte zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Naktuk zingah LALPA'n a tate leh a thianghlimte chu tilangin amah va hnaih turin a ti ang, a thlante ngei chu amah va hnaih turin a ti ang." 
Numbers16:6 Heti hian ti rawh u, naktukah mei laknate keng u la," 
Numbers16:7 chutah chuan mei dah u la, LALPA hmaah rimtui phul rawh u; tin, LALPA'n a thlan apiang chu a thianghlim ang: Levia fapate u, in induh em mai,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Numbers16:8 Tin, Mosia'n Kora hnenah, ""Nangni Levia fapate u, ngaithla rawh u," 
Numbers16:9 ,10 LALPA biak buka rawngbawla, mipuite hmaa an rawngbawla, ding tura Israelte Pathianin amah hnaih tura Israel mipuite zing ata a tihhran che u leh Levia fapa in unaute zawng zawng nena amah hnaih tura a awmtir che u hi thil te thamah in ngai a ni maw, puithiam nihna in la zawn cheu?" 
Numbers16:10 ,9 LALPA biak buka rawngbawla, mipuite hmaa an rawngbawla, ding tura Israelte Pathianin amah hnaih tura Israel mipuite zing ata a tihhran che u leh Levia fapa in unaute zawng zawng nena amah hnaih tura a awmtir che u hi thil te thamah in ngai a ni maw, puithiam nihna in la zawn cheu?" 
Numbers16:11 Chuvang chuang nang leh i pawlte zawng zawng LALPA dodalin in pung khawm a ni. Tin, Arona hian eng nge maw a tih a, a chungah hian in phunnawi?"" a ti a." 
Numbers16:12 Tin, Mosia chuan Eliaba fapa Dathana leh Abirama a kohtir a: anni chuan, ""Kan lo chho ang;" 
Numbers16:13 thlalera mi tihlum turin hnutetui leh khawizu luanna ram ata min hruai chhuak hi thil te tham em ni? Kan chungah i intilal lehnghal si. 
Numbers16:14 Hnutetui leh khawizu luanna ramah min hruai lut lo a, lo leh grep huan ro tur min pe bawk hek lo: he'ng ho mitte hi chawl i phulsak dawn em ni? An lo chho lo tawp ang,"" an ti a." 
Numbers16:15 Tichuan Mosia chu a thin a rim ta hle mai a, LALPA hnenah, ""An thilhlan chu pawm suh: an sabengtung chu pakhat mah ka la lo a tumah ka tina hek lo,"" a ti a." 
Numbers16:16 Tin, Mosia'n Kora hnenah chuan, ""Naktukah nang leh i mi pungkhawmho, nang nen, anni nen, Arona nen LALPA hmaah lo awm rawh u;" 
Numbers16:17 tin, an mei lakna keng Theuh se la, rimtui phul se la, LALPA hmaah mei lakna Theuh, mei lakna 250 chu rawn keng rawh se; nang leh Arona pawhin in mei lakna keng ve ve rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Numbers16:18 Tichuan mi tinin an mei lakna chu an keng a, mei an dah a, rimtui an phul a, Mosia leh Arona te nen inbiakna Puan In kawngkaah chuan an va ding a." 
Numbers16:19 Tin, Kora chuan mipui zawng zawng chu anmahni dodalin inbiakna Puan In kawngkaah chuan a awmkhawmtir a: tin, mipui zawng zawng chungah chuan LALPA ropuina a lo lang a." 
Numbers16:20 Chutichuan LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona chu a bi a," 
Numbers16:21 Heng mipui zing ata hi inthiarfihlim rawh u, ka rawn tiboral thut theihna'n,"" tiin." 
Numbers16:22 Tichuan anni chu an bawkkhawp a, ""Aw Pathian nunna zawng zawng hnar i ni, mi pakhat sual avangin mpui zawng zawng chungah i thinur dawn em ni?"" an ti a." 
Numbers16:23 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a, """ 
Numbers16:24 Mipuite hnenah chuan, ""Kora te, Dathana te, Abirama te buk ata hi kiansan vek rawh u,"" tiin sawi rawh,"" a ti a." 
Numbers16:25 Tichuan Mosia chu a tho a, Dathana leh Abirama te hnenah chuan an va kal a; Israel ho upate chuan an zui a." 
Numbers16:26 Tin, pungkhawmho hnenah chuan, ""Heng misualho Puan In atangte hian chuak rawh u khai; an engmah hi khawih suh u, chuti lo chuan an sualna zawng zawngah hian in tel ve dah ang e,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Numbers16:27 Chutichuan Kora te, Dathana leh Abirama chu an Puan In ata an lo chhuak a, an Puan In kawngkaah chuan an nupui te, an fapate, an fanau te te tenen an ding a." 
Numbers16:28 Tin, Mosia'n, ""Keima rilru puak chhuaka tih a ni lo a, he'ng thil ti tur hian LALPA'n min tir a ni tih hemiah hian an hria ang." 
Numbers16:29 Heng mite hi mi zawng zawng thih dan ang mai bawka an thih a, mi zawng zawngte hrem ang bawka hrem an nih chuan Pathianin mi tir lo a ni ang a." 
Numbers16:30 LALPA'n thil thar a siam a, leiin a ka a an a, anmahni leh an ta zawng zawng a lem a, Seol-ah a nunga an luh erawh chuan he'ng mite hian LALPA an lo ngainep a ni tih in hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers16:31 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung thu zawng zawng chu a sawi zawh chuan an hnuai lei chu a lo khi chat ta phuk mai a;" 
Numbers16:32 tichuan lei chuan a ka a ang a, an chhungkuain Kora mite zawng zawng, an bungrua zawng zawng nen a lem ta vek hlawm a." 
Numbers16:33 Chutichuan anmahni leh an ta zawng zawng chu Seol-ah chuan a nung chungin an pil ta vek a, lei chuan a ka a chip hnan a, pungkhawm zing ata chu an boral ta a." 
Numbers16:34 Tichuan an vela Israel mi zawng zawngte chu an au thawmah chuan an tlan darh a, ""Leiin min lem ve dah reu reu vang e,"" an ti a." 
Numbers16:35 Tin, LALPA atangin mei a lo chhuak a, rimtui hlantu mi zahnih leh zawmngate chu a rawn kanghlum ta a." 
Numbers16:36 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers16:37 Nangin mei ch tidarh la, puithiam Arona fapa Eleazara chu mei ata mei laknate chu la chhuak turin hrilh rawh, thil thianghlim ani si a:" 
Numbers16:38 anmahni nunna chunga sualho mei laknate pawh chu la la; tin, maicham khuna thlengah chher ni rawh se: LALPA hmaa hlan ani a, chuvangin a thianghlim a ni; chu chu Israela thlahte tana chhinchhiahna ani ang,"" tiin." 
Numbers16:39 Tin, puithiam Elazara chuan kangho dar mei laknate chu a la a, Israela thlahte tana hriatrengna te, Arona thlah ni lo hnam dang reng reng, LALPA hmaa rimtui hal tura an kal hnaih lohna'n te, Kora leh a pawlte anga an awm lohna'n te, Mosia hmang a hnena Lalpa'n a sawi ang chuan maicham khuhna'n an chher ta a." 
Numbers16:40 Tin, puithiam Elazara chuan kangho dar mei laknate chu a la a, Israela thlahte tana hriatrengna te, Arona thlah ni lo hnam dang reng reng, LALPA hmaa rimtui hal tura an kal hnaih lohna'n te, Kora leh a pawlte anga an awm lohna'n te, Mosia hmang a hnena Lalpa'n a sawi ang chuan maicham khuhna'n an chher ta a." 
Numbers16:41 Nimahsela a tukah chuan, ""LALPA mite in tihlum a ni,"" tiin Israel thlah mipui zawng zawng chu Mosia leh Arona chungah an phunnawi a." 
Numbers16:42 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Mosia leh Arona chunga mipui an pun khawm lai chuan inbiakna Puan In lam chu an hawi a; tin, ngai teh, chhumin a rawn khuh a, LALPA ropuina a lo lang a." 
Numbers16:43 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu inbiakna Puan In kawtah chuan an kal a." 
Numbers16:44 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a." 
Numbers16:45 Heng mipui zing ata hi inthiarfihlim rawh u, ka rawn tihboral thut theihna'n,"" tiin. Tin, chu an bawkkhup a." 
Numbers16:46 Tin, Mosia'n Arona hnenah, "" I mei lakna keng la, maicham ata mei dah la; rimtui phul la, mipui hnenah kalpui thuai la, an tan remna siam rawh: LALPA hnen ata thinurna a lo chhuak a ni; hri a leng tan mek a ni,"" a ti a." 
Numbers16:47 Tin, Arona chuan Mosia sawi ang chuan a keng a, pungho zingah chuan a tlan lut a, tin, ngai teh hri chu mipui zingah chuan a lo leng tan a; tin, rimtui chu a phul a, mipui tan chuan remna a siam a." 
Numbers16:48 Mitthi leh mi nung inkarah a ding a, hri chu a kiang ta a." 
Numbers16:49 Tichuan Kora chungchang thua thite tiam loin hri-a thi zawng zawng chu singkhat leh sangli leh zasarih an ni.Tin, Arona chu inbiakna Puan In kawngkaa Mosia hnenah chuan a let leh a, tichuan hi chu a kiang ta a." 
Numbers16:50 Tin, Arona chu inbiakna Puan In kawngkaa Mosia hnenah chuan a let leh a, tichuan hi chu a kiang ta a." 
Numbers17:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a." 
Numbers17:2 Israel thlahte bia la, an chhungkaw tin, pualah tiang pakhat theuh zel, an chhungkaw zir zela an puipate zawng zawng zat tiang sawm leh pahnih la la,; tin, an tiangah chuan an hming theuh ziak rawh." 
Numbers17:3 Tin, Levia tiangah chua Arona hming ziak ang che:" 
Numbers17:4 Tin, kan inbiakna, inbiakna Puan In thuhriattirna hmaah chuan i dah tur a ni." 
Numbers17:5 Tin, heti hi ani ang a, ka mi thlan tura tiang chu a chawr ang a: tichuan Israela tlahte phunnawina, i chunga an phunnawina hi ka tireh dawn a ni,"" tiin." 
Numbers17:6 Chutichuan Mosia chuan Israela thlahte chu a bia a, an puipate zawng zawng chuan an chhungkaw tin pualah, puipa tinin tiang pakhat zel, tiang sawm leh pahnih an pe a: Arona tiang pawh chu an tiang zingah chuan a tel ve a." 
Numbers17:7 Tichuan Mosia'n thuhriattirnaa puan inah LALPA hmaah tiangte chu a dah a. 
Numbers17:8 Tin, a tukah chuan Mosia chu thuhriattirna puan inah chuan a va kal a; tin, ngai teh, Levi chhungkaw puala Arona tiang chu a lo chawr a, a kuhmum a, a par a, vaiumkhal a lo rah a." 
Numbers17:9 Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA hma ata tiang zawng zawng chu Israel-hote hnenah a la chhuak a; an lo en a, anmahni tiang theuh chu an la a." 
Numbers17:10 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Helhmang fate an ni tih hriattir thinna'n Arona tiang chu thuhriattirna bulah dah leh rawh: tichuan ka chunga an helna hi i tihrehsak thei dawn nia, an thih lohna'n,"" a ti a." 
Numbers17:11 Chutiang chuan Mosia chuan a ti a: LALPA'n thu a pek ang chuan a ti a. 
Numbers17:12 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Mosia hnenah, ""Ngaiteh, kan boral a ni alawm, kan chhe zo ta, kan chhe zo vek alawm.LALPA biak buk rawn hnaih apiangte chu an thi zel a; kan boral vek dawn em ni ang?"" an ti a." 
Numbers17:13 LALPA biak buk rawn hnaih apiangte chu an thi zel a; kan boral vek dawn em ni ang? an ti a. 
Numbers18:1 Tin, LALPA'n Arona hnenah, ""Nang leh i fapate leh in chhungkua hian hmun thianghlim bawhchhiatnamawh chu in phur ang a: puithiamho bawhchhiatna mawh erawh chu nangmah ngei leh i fate chauhin an phur ang." 
Numbers18:2 Tin, levia chi, i pa chi, i unauten an zawm ve chia, rawng an bawl theihna'n i kiang hnaiah awmtir la; amaherawhchu nang leh i fapate chu thuhriattirna puan in bulah in awm tur a ni." 
Numbers18:3 I hna an puibawm ang chia, Puan In lam hna zawng zawng an chang ang a, amaherawhchu hmun thianghlim bungbel leh maicham chu rawn hnaih suh se, an thih lohna'n anni emaw, nang emaw pawh." 
Numbers18:4 Anni chuan an kawp ang chia, puan in lam hna zawng zawngah inbiakna puan in hna chu an chang ang a: hnam dang chuan an rawn hnaih tur che u ani lo." 
Numbers18:5 Tin, nangin hmun thianghlim hna leh maicham hna chu i chang ang, Israela thlahte chunga thinurna a awm tawh lohna'n" 
Numbers18:6 tin, ngaiteh, kei hian i unau levia hote chu Israela thlahte zing ata ka thlang chhuak a, inbiakna puan in rawngbawl tura LALPA hnena pek, i tana thilpek an ni ang." 
Numbers18:7 Tin, nang leh i fapate hian maicham leh puan zar chhung lam thuah in puithiam hna chu in thawk ang: tin, nangin rawng i bawl ang, puithiam hna hi in rawngbawl hna atan ka pe che ua ni: hnam dang rawn inrawlh ve apiang chu tihhlum an ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers18:8 Tin, LALPA'n Arona abia a, ""Ngai teh, kei hian ka tana then thilhlan, Israela fate thil- hlan zawng zawngte lamin nang leh i fapaten kumkhuaa in chanpual atan ka pe che u a." 
Numbers18:9 Meia hal bang thil thianghlimte chu i ta ani ang a: an thil hlan tinreng, an chhangphut thilhlan te, an sual thawina thilhlan te, an thiam loh thawina thihlan ka hnena an hlan turte lamin nang leh i fapate pual a ni ang." 
Numbers18:10 Thil thianghlim eiin chu mi chu chu in ei ang a, mipa zawngin an ei ang a; i pual a ni ang." 
Numbers18:11 he'ng hi ipual ani ang, chhangphut thilhlana anthilpek, Israel thlahte then thilhlan zawng zawngte lamin nang leh i fapate leh i fanute nen in kumkhaw chanpualah ka pe che u a ni: i ina mi thianghlm zawng zawngin an ei thei ang." 
Numbers18:12 Hriak tha ber te, grep tha ber te, buh tha ber te, rah hmasa ber LALPA tana an pek chu ka pe a che." 
Numbers18:13 An loa rah hmin hmasa ber LALPA tana an rawn lak chu i ta ani ang a: i ina mi thianghlim zawng zawngin an ei thei ang a. 
Numbers18:14 Israel-ho thilhlan zawng zawng chu i ta a ni ang. 
Numbers18:15 LALPA tana an pek, chhul keu hmasa ber apiang chu mihring pawh, ran pawh i ta a ni ang a: amaherawhchu fa tir chu i tlan ngei tur ani ang a, ran thianghlim lo no piang thla hmasa ber pawh chu i tlan tur a ni." 
Numbers18:16 Thla khat a nihin tlan turte chu tlanna man i ruat dan angin, hmun thanghlima hman sekel ngain i tlan tur ani (sekel chu gera sawmhnih a ni)." 
Numbers18:17 Amaherawhchu bawngpa piang thla hmasa ber te, beram piang thla hmasa ber te, kel piang thla hmasa berte chu i tlan tur a ni lo a; an thianghlim a ni: an thisen chu maichamah i theh ang a, LALPA tana rimtuiah an thaute chu meia thilhlanah i hal tur ni." 
Numbers18:18 An sa chu i ta a ni ang, then thilhlan irawm leh a bawp ding lam i ta a ni ang hian." 
Numbers18:19 Thil thianghlima then thilhlan, Israela thlahten LALPA tana an hlante chu in kumkhaw chanpual atan ka pe che u a ni; LALPA hmaa nang leh i fapate leh i fanute nea chatuan chi thuthlung ani ang."" a ti a." 
Numbers18:20 Tin, LALPA'n Arona hnenah, "" an ramah chuan rochan in nei lo ang a, an zingah chanvo in nei ve hek lo ang. Israel thlahte zinga i chanvo leh i rochan chu keimah hi ka ni." 
Numbers18:21 Tin, levia thlahte chu ngai teh, rawngbawl hnaa an rawngbawl hna, puan in rawngbawl hnaa n rawngbawl manah Israel rama sawma pakhat zawng zawng hi ka pe a ni." 
Numbers18:22 Tun achinah chuan Israela thlahte chuan inbiakna puan in chu an rawn hnaih tur ani lo; sual mawhphurin an thi dah ang e. 
Numbers18:23 Levi-ho hi erawh chuan inbiakna puan in rawngbawl hna an thawk ang a, a mawh engkim an phur ang: hei hi i thlahte chaen atana dan a ni ang a; tin, Israela thlahte zingah rochan an nei lo ang." 
Numbers18:24 Israela thlahten sawma pakhat LALPA tana then thilhlanah an hlan chu Levi-ho rochan atan ka pe a ni; chuvang chuan an hnenah, 'Israela thlahte zingah rochan an nei lo ang,' ka lo ti rawh reng a ni,"" a ti a." 
Numbers18:25 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers18:26 Chung thu loah pawh chuan Levi-ho chu bia la, an hnenah, 'In rochan atana Israela thlahte sawma pakhat ka pek che u an lak ata in dawn hun chuan, chumi sawma pakhat ata sawma pakhat chu LALPA hnenah then thilhlanah in hlan tur a ni." 
Numbers18:27 Tichuan in then thilhlan chu hruiha buh leh uain haw hmasa bera ngaih a ni ang. 
Numbers18:28 Chutiang chuan Israela thlahte laka sawma pakhat in dawn zawng zanga mi chu LALPA tana then thilhlanah in hlan ve zel bawk tur ani a, tin, chu mi LALPA then thilhlan chu puithiam Arona in pe tur a ni." 
Numbers18:29 In thil dawn zawng zawnga mi chu a tha ber, a thianghlim ber zel LALPA then thilhlanah in hlan tur a ni." 
Numbers18:30 Chuvangin an hnenah, chu mia tha ber in then hun chuan Levi-ho hruiha hawng leh uain hawng agna ngaih a ni ang." 
Numbers18:31 Khawiah pawh in ei thei ang, nangni leh in chhungte pawhin; inbiakna puan ina in rawngbawl man a ni si a.A tha ber in then chuan a sual mawh in phur lo ang a, Israela thlahte thil thianghlim chu in tibawrhbang lo ang a, in thi dawn lo nia,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Numbers18:32 A tha ber in then chuan a sual mawh in phur lo ang a, Israela thlahte thil thianghlim chu in tibawrhbang lo ang a, in thi dawn lo nia,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Numbers19:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Numbers19:2 Hei hi LALPA thupek dan chu a ni, 'Israela thlahte chu bawng la sen hmelhem lo, sawisel bo, nghawngkawl la bel hauh loh rawn kai turin hrilh rawh:" 
Numbers19:3 tin, puithiam Eleazara i pe ang a, tin, anin daipawnah a hruai chhuak ang a, a hmaah tuin emaw a tihlum tur a ni:" 
Numbers19:4 tin, puithiam Eleazara chuan a kut zungtangin a thisen chu ala ang a, inbiakna puan in hma lamah a thisen chu vawi sarih a theh ang a:" 
Numbers19:5 tin, tuin emaw bawng la chu a mithmuhah a hal ang a a vun te, a sa te, a thisen te, a ek te nen a hal ang a:" 
Numbers19:6 tin, puithiamin sidar thing leh husop leh lazai sen ala ang a, bawng la an halah chuan a paih lut tur a ni." 
Numbers19:7 Tin, puithiam chu a silhfente a su ang a, a inbual ang a, chu mi zawhah chuan riahhmunah a kal ang a, tlai lam thlengin puithiam chu a thianghlim lo ang." 
Numbers19:8 Tin, a haltu chuan a silhfente a su ang a, a inbual ang a, tlai lam thlengin a thianghlim lo ang." 
Numbers19:9 Tin, mi bawrhbang loin bawngla vap chu a la khawm ang a, daipawn hmun faiah a dah ang a, Israela thlah mipuite tana inthenna tuiah hman tur a ni: chu chu sual thawina a ni." 
Numbers19:10 Tin, bawngla vap tikhawmtu chuan a filhfente a su ang a, tlailam thlengin a thianghlim lo ang a: hei hi Israela tolahte tan leh hnam dang an hnena awmte tan kumkhaw dan tur a ni." 
Numbers19:11 Tu ruang pawh a dektu apang chu ni sarih an thianghlim lo ang. 
Numbers19:12 Chu mi chu ni thum niah a thian ang a, ni sarih niin a thianghlim ang; amaherawhchu, ni thum nia a inthen loh chuan ni sarih niah pawh a thiang lo ang." 
Numbers19:13 Tupawhin tu ruang pawh a deh a, a inthen loh chuan LALPA bak buk a tibawlhhlawh a ni; chu mi chu Israel mite zing ata tuithlar tur a ni, inthenna tui chu a chungah theh loh a nih vangin a thianghlim lo ang: a thianghlim lohna chu a chhungah a la awm a ni." 
Numbers19:14 Mi, puan ina a thih chuan hei hi a tih dan tur chu a ni: puan ina lut apiang leh puan in chhunga awm apiangte chu ni sarih an thianghlim lo ang." 
Numbers19:15 Tin, bungbel inhawng, a chhinaa chhin loh apiang chu a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Numbers19:16 Tin, tupawhin tamlakah khandaiha thah emaw, awmlaia thi ruang emaw, mihring ruh emaw, thlan emaw a deh chuan ni sarih a thianghlim lo ang." 
Numbers19:17 Tin, a thianghlim lote pualah sual thawina vap chu an la ang a, belah tui khur tui nen an chhung ang." 
Numbers19:18 Tin, mi thiangin, husop ala ang a, tuiah chuan ahnim ang a, puan in te, bungbel zawng zawng te, chuta mi awm zawng zawng te, ruh emaw, thah ruang emaw, mitthi ruang emaw, thlan emaw khawihtute chu a thah ang a:" 
Numbers19:19 tin, mithiangin ni thum ni leh ni sarih niin a tithianghlim ang a; a silhfente a su ang a, a inbual ang a, tlai lamah chuan a lo thianghlim tawh ang." 
Numbers19:20 Mi thianghlim lo inthian lo erawh chuan LALPA hmun thianghlim a tihbawlhhlawh avangin chu mi chu pungkhawmho zing ata tuithlar tur a ni: inthenna tui chuan theh loh a ni a, a thianghlim lo a ni" 
Numbers19:21 Hei hi an tan kumkhaw dan tur a ni:a theh apiang chuan an silhfente an su ang a; tin, inthenna tui khawih apiang chu tlai lam thlengin an thianghlim lo ang.Tin, mi thianghlm loin a khawih apiang chu a thianghlim lo zel ang a; tin, chu mi khawihtu apiangte chu tlai lam thlengin an thianghlim lo ang,"" tiin." 
Numbers19:22 Tin, mi thianghlm loin a khawih apiang chu a thianghlim lo zel ang a; tin, chu mi khawihtu apiangte chu tlai lam thlengin an thianghlim lo ang,"" tiin." 
Numbers20:1 Tin, Israela tlah, pungkhawmho zawng zawngte chu thla khatnaah chuan Zin thlalerah an lut a: tin, mipuite chuan Kades-ah awmhmun an khuar a; chutah chuan Miriami chu a thi a, chutah chuan an phum a." 
Numbers20:2 Tin, pungkhawmho chuan tui an nei ta lo a; Mosia leh Arona chungchang thuah an inpun khawm chiam a." 
Numbers20:3 Tin, mipui chuan,"" LALPA hmaa kan unaute an thih lai khan pathianin min lo tihlum ve ta then zawk se la aw!" 
Numbers20:4 Engati nge LALPA mipuihote hi thi tura thlalerah hian i hruai luh ni, keimahni leh kan rante nen?" 
Numbers20:5 Eng vangin nge he ram tha lo taka min hruai lut turin Aigupta ram ata min tichhuah ni Buhbal te, theipui te, grep kung te, pawmgranet te awm lohna hmun ani a, tui in tur reng reng lah a awm hek lo,"" tiin Mosia chu an bei vak a." 
Numbers20:6 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu mipui zing ata chu inbiakna puan in kawngkaah an kal a, an bawkkhup a; tin, LALPA ropuina an hnenah a lo lang a." 
Numbers20:7 Tichuan LALPA'n Mosia chu a bia a," 
Numbers20:8 Tiang la la, pungkhawmhote chu awmkhawmtir la, nang leh i unau Arona nen, an mithmuhah lungpui chu a tui tichhuak turin hrilh la; lungpui ata chu tui i lakchhuahsak ang a; tichuan pungkhawmho leh an rante chu i intir dawn nia,"" tiin." 
Numbers20:9 Chutichuan Mosia chuan LALPA hma ata tiang chu a thupek ang chuan a la a. 
Numbers20:10 Mosia leh Arona chuan pungkhawmho chu lungpui bulah chuan an awmkhawmtir a, an hnenah, ""Helhmanghote u, ngai teh u, he lungpui ata hi tui kan lak chhuahsak dawn che u em ni?"" an ti a." 
Numbers20:11 Tin, Mosia chuan a ban aphar a, lungpi chu a tiang chuan vawi hnih a han vua a; tichuan tui a lo chhuak ta dur dur mai a, pungkhawmhote leh an rante chuan an in ta a." 
Numbers20:12 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona hnenah chuan, ""Mi rin loha Israela thlahte mithmuha mi chawimawi loh avangin he'ng pungkhawmho hi ka pek ramah chuan in hruai lo vang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers20:13 Hei hi Meriba tuite chu a ni; Israela thlahte chuan LALPA chu an bei vak a, chutah chuan chawimawiin a awm tak avangin." 
Numbers20:14 Tin, Mosia'n Kades atangn Edom lal hnenah mi a ti ra, ""I unaupa Israela chuan heti hiana ti, 'Kan chunga tuarna lo thleng zawng zawng hi i hria a;" 
Numbers20:15 kan pi leh pute Aigupta rama an chhuk a, rei tak Aigupta rama kan awm te, Aigupta miten keini leh kan pi leh pute tha lo taka mi tihziate kha." 
Numbers20:16 Tichuan LALPA kan au a, kan aw chu a lo hria a, vantirhkoh a rawn tir a. Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuaki a: tin, ngai teh, i ram dep ber khua Kades-ah kan awm a:" 
Numbers20:17 kawngaih takin i ram hi kan kal tlang teh ang: lo emaw, grep huanah emaw kan kal lo ang a, tuichhunchhuah tuite kan in hek lo ang: lal lamlianah kan kal zel ang a, i ram kan pelh hma loh chuan ding lam emaw, veilamah emaw kan peng lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers20:18 Tin, Edoma chuan a hnenah ""Mi pal tlang tur ani lo, mi pal chuan abei tur chein khandaih nen ka lo thawk ang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers20:19 Chutichuan Israela thlahte chuan a hnenah, ""Lamlianah kan kal chho ang a; tin, keimahni leh kan ranin i tui kan in chuan a man chu kan pe ang che; thil dang engmah ti loin a kalin kan kal tlang mai ang e,"" an ti a." 
Numbers20:20 Tin, ani chuan, ""Kal lo ang,"" a ti a. Tichuan Edoma chu mipui tam tak nen, mi chak takte nen anmahni bei turin a lo thawk ta a." 
Numbers20:21 Edoma chuan Israel mite chu a rama kal a phal ta lo a; tichuan Israel mite chuan an kirsan leh ta a. 
Numbers20:22 Tichuan Kades atangin an chhuak a; Israel thlah, mipuiho zawng zawng chuan Hor tlang an va thleng a." 
Numbers20:23 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia leh Arona chu, Edom ram dep Hor tlangah chuan abia a," 
Numbers20:24 Arona chu a chipuite hnenah hruai a ni ang; Meriba tuiahte khan ka thu dodala in hel avang khan Israel thlahte ka pek ramah chuan a lut dawn lo a ni. 
Numbers20:25 Arona leh a fapa Eleazara chu Hor tlangah rawn hruai chho rawh: 
Numbers20:26 Arona chu a silhfente hlhsak la, a fapa Eleazara bel rawh: Arona chu achipuite hnenah hruai ani ang a chutah chuan a thi ang,"" tiin." 
Numbers20:27 Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA thupek ang chuan a ti a: mipui zawng zawng mithmuhah Hor tlangah chuan an chho a." 
Numbers20:28 Tichuan Mosia chuan Arona chu a silhfente a hlihsak a, Eleazara a bel a: tin, Arona chu tlang chhipah chuan a thi ta a; tin, Mosia leh Eleazara chu tlang ata chu an chhuk a.Tin, mipui zawng zawngte chuan Arona a thi tih an hriat chuan, Israel zawng zawngte chuan ni sawmthum an sun a." 
Numbers20:29 Tin, mipui zawng zawngte chuan Arona a thi tih an hriat chuan, Israel zawng zawngte chuan ni sawmthum an sun a." 
Numbers21:1 Tin, Kanaan mi, Arad lal Chhim lama awmin Israel mite atarim kawngah an lo kal tih sawi thawm a hria a; tichuan Israel mite chu a bei a, salahte a man nual a." 
Numbers21:2 Tin, Israel mite chuan LALPA hnenah thu an tiam a, ""Heng mite hi kan kuta min pek chuan an khuate hi kan tiboral hlauh ang e,"" an ti a." 
Numbers21:3 Tichuan LALPA'n Israel mite thu chu a pawm a, Kanaan mite chu a pe a, anmahni leh an khuate chu an tiboral hlauh a; a hmun hmingah chuan Horma an vuah a." 
Numbers21:4 Tin, Hor tlang atang chuan Tuifinriat Sen lamah Edom ram kal hualin an kal a: kawng a kual avangin mipuite rilru chu a lungni lo hle mai a." 
Numbers21:5 Mipuite chuan Pathian leh Mosia kalin, ""Thlalera thi turin engati nge Aigupta ata min hruai chhuah? Chhang awm hlei lo, tui pawh awm hlei lo; he chhang tenawm pawh hi kan nunnain a ten tawh a ni,"" an ti a." 
Numbers21:6 Chutichuan LALPA'n mipui zingah chuan rul chuk na mite a tir a, mite a chu a, Israel mite tam tak an thi a." 
Numbers21:7 Tin, mite chuan Mosia hnenah an kal a. ""LALPA leh nangmah kalhin kan lo tawng ta hi kan lo sual ta a ni e, kan zinga rulte hi tibo turin LALPA hnenah tawngtai rawh khai,"" an ti a; tichuan mite chu Mosia'n chuan a tawngtaisak a." 
Numbers21:8 tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah ""Rul chuk na mi, a lem siam la, banah khai rawh; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, rul chuk apiangin chu chu an en chuan an dam ang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers21:9 Chutichuan Mosia'n dar rul a siam a, banah a khai a; tin, heti hi a ni a, rul chuk apiangin dar rul chu an enin an dam zel a." 
Numbers21:10 Tin, Israela tlahte chu an kal ta zel a, Oboth-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers21:11 Tin, Oboth atang chuan an kal leh a, ni chhuahna lam Moab thlaler bul Ieyabarim-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers21:12 Chuta tang chuan an kal leh a, Zered ruamah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers21:13 Chuta tang chuan an kal leh a, Amor-ho ramri atanga la filawr thlalera Arnon lehlam pangah awmhmun an khuar a; Arnon chu Moab ramri, Moab leh Amor-ho inkara awm a ni a." 
Numbers21:14 Chuvangin LALPA Indonate Buah chuan Supha-a Vaheb, Arnon ruamte," 
Numbers21:15 Ar awmna lama thle Moab rama innghat Ruam awih tlan pangperte chu,"" tia sawi a ni." 
Numbers21:16 Chuta tang chuan Beer-ah an kal leh a: chu chu LALPA'n Mosia hnena, ""Mipuite chu ko khawm la, tui ka pe ang e,"" a tihna tuichhunchhuah chu a ni." 
Numbers21:17 Tin, he hla hi Israelten an sa a; Aw tuikhur, lo chik chhuak la, zaiin chawi la," 
Numbers21:18 Lalten an laih tuikhur chu. An lal tiang leh an talhtuma, Mipuite mi lianho laih chu. �Tin, thlaler atangte chuan Matanaah an kal leh a:" 
Numbers21:19 tin, Matana atangin Nahaliel-ah; Nahaliel atang chuan bamoth-ah:" 
Numbers21:20 Bamoth atang chuan Moab loa ruam leh thlaler zuk chhun en Pisga chhipah 
Numbers21:21 Tin, Israel mite chuan amor-ho lal Sihona hnenah, ""I ramah hian min kal tlangtir rawh khai; loah emaw, grep huanah emaw kan peng lo ang a; tui chhunchhuah tuite chu kan in lo ang a: i ram kan pelh hma loh chuan lal lamlianah kan kal zel ang,"" tiin mi an tir a." 
Numbers21:22 Tin, Israel mite chuan amor-ho lal Sihona hnenah, ""I ramah hian min kal tlangtir rawh khai; loah emaw, grep huanah emaw kan peng lo ang a; tui chhunchhuah tuite chu kan in lo ang a: i ram kan pelh hma loh chuan lal lamlianah kan kal zel ang,"" tiin mi an tir a." 
Numbers21:23 Nimahsela Sihona chuan Israel mite hu a rama kal tlang a phal lo va: Sihona chuan a mite zawn zawng chu a khawm vek a, Israel mite bei turin thlalerah chuan an thawk chhuak ta awk a, Jahaz an va thlen a; tin, Israel mite chu an bei a." 
Numbers21:24 Tin, Israel mite chuan khandaihin an bei a, a ram chu Arnon atanga Jakob tlengin, Amona thlahte thleng hialin an neihsak a: Amona thlahte ram chu ven tlat a ni.chu ven tlat a ni." 
Numbers21:25 Tin, Israel mite chuan chung khua zawng zawngte chu an la a: tichuan Israel mite chu Amor-ho khua zawng zawngahte chuan an awm a, Hesbon leh a khawper zawng zawngahte pawh chuan." 
Numbers21:26 Hesbon khua chu Amor-ho lal Sihona khua a ni a, ani chu chu mi hmaa Moab lal lo beia a kut ata a ram zawng zawng, Arnon thlenga laksaktu a ni." 
Numbers21:27 Chuvangin hlaa phuahtute chuan, Hesbon-ah lo kal u la, Sihona khawpui chu din leh tihngheh ni se;" 
Numbers21:28 Hesbon atangin mei a chhuak a, Sihona khawpui atangin meialh: Moab-a Ar a kang zo a, Arnon hmun sang lalhote chu" 
Numbers21:29 I chung a pik e, Moab! In boral ta, aw Kemos mi: A fapate chu tlan bo atan A fanute salah a pe, Amor-ho lal Sihona hnenah." 
Numbers21:30 Kan han kap a, Hesbon a boral, Dibon thlengin, Nopha thlengin kan titiau, Chu chuan Medaba a thleng,"" a ti." 
Numbers21:31 Chutiang chuan a ni, Amor-ho ramah Israel mite chu an awm. tin, Mosia'n jezer va thlithlai turin mi a tir a, chuta khuate chu an la a, Amor-ho awmte chu an hnawtchuak a." 
Numbers21:32 Tin, an let a, Basan kawng lamah an chho va: tin, Bazan lal Oga chu anmahni bei turin, amah leh a mite zawng zanwg, Edrei-a lo bei turin, a thawk chhuak a." 
Numbers21:33 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Amahh chu hlau suh: amah pawh, a mite zawng zawng pawh, a ram pawh i kutah ka pe tawh a ni: Hesbon-a awm Amor-ho lal Sihona chunga i tih angin i ti tur a ni,"" a ti a.Chutichuan amah pawh, a fapate pawh, zuah reng reng nei loin a mite zawng zawng nen an that a: a ram chu an luahsak ta a." 
Numbers21:34 Chutichuan amah pawh, a fapate pawh, zuah reng reng nei loin a mite zawng zawng nen an that a: a ram chu an luahsak ta a." 
Numbers22:1 Tin, Israel thlahte chu an kal zel a, Jeriko zawn Jordan rala Moab phaiahte awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers22:2 Tin, Zipori fapa Balaka chuan Israel miten Amor-ho an tih dan zawng zawng chu a hria a." 
Numbers22:3 Tin, Moab-hote chuan mite chu an hlau hle mai a, an tam si a: Israel thlahte avang chuan Moab-hote chu an mangang a." 
Numbers22:4 Tichuan Moab-hote chuan Midia-ho upate hnenah, ""Heng mipuite hian bawngin hlobet an pet zo angin kan vela mi zawng zawng an pet zo dawn e,"" an ti a. chu mi lai chuan Zipori fapa Balaka chu Moab lal a ni a." 
Numbers22:5 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ngaiteh, hnam pakhat Aigupta ram atanga lo chhuakho an lo awm a; ngai teh, leilung an dap a, min depah an awm a; khawngaih takin lo kal la, he mite hi anchhia min va lawhsak teh khai; keia tan chuan an chak lutuk a ni: kan that theiin kan ngam theiin kan ram ata hi kan hnawtchhuak thei mial mahna: mal i sawm apiangte chu malsawmin an awm a, anchhia i lawh apiangte chu anchhe dawngin an awm thin tih ka hre si a,"" tia kpo turin a thlahte awmna ram Lui kama Pethor-ah Beora fapa Balaama hnenah mi a ti ra." 
Numbers22:6 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ngaiteh, hnam pakhat Aigupta ram atanga lo chhuakho an lo awm a; ngai teh, leilung an dap a, min depah an awm a; khawngaih takin lo kal la, he mite hi anchhia min va lawhsak teh khai; keia tan chuan an chak lutuk a ni: kan that theiin kan ngam theiin kan ram ata hi kan hnawtchhuak thei mial mahna: mal i sawm apiangte chu malsawmin an awm a, anchhia i lawh apiangte chu anchhe dawngin an awm thin tih ka hre si a,"" tia kpo turin a thlahte awmna ram Lui kama Pethor-ah Beora fapa Balaama hnenah mi a ti ra." 
Numbers22:7 Tichuan Moab upate leh Midia upate chu aien man tur kengin an chhuak ta a; Balaama hnen chu an va thleng a, Balaka thuchah chu an hrilh a." 
Numbers22:8 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Zanin chu hetah riak u la, LALPA'n min hrilh ang angin in hnenah thu ka rawn thlen ang che u,"" a ti a: tichuan Moab mi liante chu Balaama hnenah chuan an riak ta a." 
Numbers22:9 Tin, Balaama hnenah Pathian a lo kal a,: I hnena mite hi tute nge ni?"" a ti a." 
Numbers22:10 Tin, Balaama chuan Pathian hnenah, 'Ngai teh, Aigupta ram atanga lo kal hnam chuan leilung an dap a; lo kal la anchhia mi va lawhsak rawh a, ka do theiin ka hnawtchhuak thei mial mahna, tiin mi a arwn tir a ni, a ti a." 
Numbers22:11 Tin, Balaama chuan Pathian hnenah, 'Ngai teh, Aigupta ram atanga lo kal hnam chuan leilung an dap a; lo kal la anchhia mi va lawhsak rawh a, ka do theiin ka hnawtchhuak thei mial mahna, tiin mi a arwn tir a ni, a ti a." 
Numbers22:12 Tin, Pathianin Balaama hnenah chuan, ""An hnenah i kal tur ani lo. Chu mite chu anchhia i lawh tur ani lo;: mal ka sawmte an ni e,"" a ti a." 
Numbers22:13 Tichuan Balaama chu zingah a tho a, Balaka mi liante hnenah chuan, ""In ramah haw leh tawh u; LALPA'n in hnena kal tura chhuah a phal lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
Numbers22:14 Chutian Moab mi liante chu an tho a, Balaka hnenah an kal a, ""Balaama chuan kan hnena lo kal a duh lo,"" an ti a." 
Numbers22:15 Tin, Balaka chuan mi lian tam lehzual, an aia ropui zawk a tir leh a." 
Numbers22:16 tin, Balaama hnen an va thleng a, a hnenah, ""Zipori fapa, Balaka chuan heti hian a ti a ni, 'Ka hnena i lo kal hi engmahin dal teh suh se;" 
Numbers22:17 mi ropui takah ka siam ang chia, ka hnena i sawi apiang chu ka ti zel ang: chuvangin lo kal hram la, he'ng mite hi anchhia min va lawhsak teh hram khai,' a ti,"" an ti a." 
Numbers22:18 Tin, Balaama chuan Balaka mite chu a chhang a, an hnenah, ""Balaka hian a in chu tangka leh rangkachaka khatin min pe dawn mah se la, eng khaw te mah LALPA ka Pathian thu bawhpelin ka ti thei lo." 
Numbers22:19 Chuvangin LALPA'n ka hnenah engtin nge a sawi leh dawn teh reng, zanin pawh hetah riak teh phawt u khai,"" a ti a." 
Numbers22:20 Tin, zanah chuan Balaama hnenah Pathian chu a lo kal a, a hnenah, ""He mite hi nangmah kova lo kal an nih chuan, tho la, an hnenah kal rawh; amaherawhchu i hnena ka sawi chauh ihi i ti tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Numbers22:21 Tichuan Balaama chu zingah atho a, a sabengtung a thuam a, Moab mi liante hnenah chuan a kal ta a." 
Numbers22:22 Tin, a kal avang chuan Pathian thin chu a lo alh ta a, tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chu a lo dang turin kawngah a lo ding a. A sabengtung chunga chuang a ni a, a chhiahhlawhte pahnih hnenah chuan anawm ve a." 
Numbers22:23 Tin, sabengtung chuan LALPA vantirhkoh, khandaih kenga kawnga ding chu a hmu a; tichuan sabengtung chu kang ata chu a peng a, ram lakah a kal a. Tin, Balaama chuan sabengtung chu kawnga lettir tumin a vua a." 
Numbers22:24 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chu grep huan pal leh pal inkar khuaah a ding a." 
Numbers22:25 Tin, sabengtung chuan LALPA vantirhkoh hu a hmu a, pal chu a va ngheng bet a; tichuan a vaw leh a," 
Numbers22:26 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chu piah leh deuhvah a kal a, hmun chep lai tak, ding lam emaw, vei lam emaw pawha penna awm lohhna lai takah a din ga." 
Numbers22:27 Tin, sabengtung chuan LALPA vantirhkoh chu a hmu a, Balaama chu a bawhpui ta a: tichuan Balaama thi chu a lo alh ta a, a tiangin sabengtung chu a vua a." 
Numbers22:28 Chutichuan LALPA'n sabengtung chu a tawngtir a, Balaama hnenah chuan ""Eng ka tih che nge, hetia vawi thum zet mi vuak tak?"" a ti a." 
Numbers22:29 Tin, Balaman sabengtung hnenah chuan, ""Min tinawmnah avangin a ni: khandaih phei chu lo keng i la, ka tihlawm tawh hial ang che chu,"" a ti a." 
Numbers22:30 Tin, sabengtung chuan Balaama hnenah, ""Tun thlenga i chuan fona i sabengtung ka ni lo'm ni? Hetiang hian ka ti ngai che em ni?"" a ti a. Ani chuan, ""Ti ngai lo ve,"" a ti a." 
Numbers22:31 Tin, LALPA'n Balaama mit hu a tihvarsak a, tichuan LALPA vantirhkoh khandaih kenga kawnga ding chu a hmu ta a, a kun a, hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a." 
Numbers22:32 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chuan a hnenah, ""Engati nge hetia vawithum tlawng i sabengtung i vuak? Ngai teh, ka hmaah hian i kal lohna tura i kal avangin lo dang tur chein ka lo chhuak a ni a:" 
Numbers22:33 tin, sabengtung chuan min hmu a, ka hmaah vawi thum a peng a nih kha; peng lo phei se la chu ani chu tihlum si loin ka tihlum hial ang che chu,"" a ti a." 
Numbers22:34 Tin, Balaama chuan LALPA vantirhkoh hnenah, ""Ka lo sual ta ni; mi dang turin kawngah i ding tih ka hre si lo va: chuvangin i lawm loh chuan ka kir leh mai ang e,"" a ti a." 
Numbers22:35 Tin, LALPA vantihkoh chuan Balaama hnenah, ""He mite hnenah hian kal la; amaherawhchu i hnena ka thu sawi tur chauh hi i sawi tur a ni, a ti a. Chutichuan Balaama chu Balaka mi liante hnenah chuan a kal ta a." 
Numbers22:36 Tin, Balakan Balaama a lo kal tih a hriat chuan Arnon lama an ramri chin Moab khawpui thlengin a va hmuak a." 
Numbers22:37 ko tur che inmi ka rawn tir ani lo'm ni? Engati nge ka hnenah i lo kal duh loh? Mi ropui takah ka siam thei lo che em ni? a ti a 
Numbers22:38 Tin, Balaama chuan Balaka hnenah, ""Ngai teh, hei ka lo kal ta a; engpawh mai sawi theihna reng reng ka nei em ni? Pathianin ka kaa thu dah chauh ka sawi dawn a ni, a ti a." 
Numbers22:39 Tichuan Balaama chu Balaka hnenah chuan a kal ta a, Kiriat-huzot n va thleng." 
Numbers22:40 Tin, Balala chu bawng leh beramin a inthawi a, Balaama leh a hnena mi lian awmte chu a pe a.Tin, heti hi a ni a tuk zingah Balaka chuan Balaama chu a hruai, Baala hmun sangahte chuan a chhopui a, chuta tang chuan mipui awmna chin zawng zawng a hmu phak a." 
Numbers22:41 Tin, heti hi a ni a tuk zingah Balaka chuan Balaama chu a hruai, Baala hmun sangahte chuan a chhopui a, chuta tang chuan mipui awmna chin zawng zawng a hmu phak a." 
Numbers23:1 Tin, Balaama chuan Balaka hnenah, ""Hetah hian maicham pasarih min siam la, bawngpa pasarih leh berampa pasarih min buatsaihsak rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:2 Balala chuan Balaama sawi ang chuan a ti a; tin, Balaka leh Balaama chuan maicham tinah chuan bawngpa pakhat leh beram pa pakhat an hlan a." 
Numbers23:3 Tin, Balaama chuan Balak hnenah, ""I halral thilhlan bulah hian lo ding reng la, kei chu ka han kal hrang ang a; LALPA chu mi be turin a lo kal mai pawh a ni thei a, tin, mi hrilh apiang chu ka hrilh ang che,"" a ti a. Tichuan tlang kawlh vel vulah a han kal a." 
Numbers23:4 Tin, Pathianin Balaama ch a lo tawk a; tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Maicham pasarih chu ka siam tawh a; tin, maicham tinah chuan bawg pa pakhat leh berampa pakhat ka hlan theuh a,"" a lo ti a." 
Numbers23:5 Tin, LALPA'n Balaama kaah chuan thu a dah a, ""Balaka hnenah chuan kir leh ta la, va sawi chhawng rawh,"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:6 Tichuan a henn lamah chuan a let leh ta a; tin, ngai teh, a halral thilhlan bulah chuan a lo ding reng a, amah leh Moab mi lian zawng zanwgte nen." 
Numbers23:7 Tin, ani chuan thu chu a sawi ta a. ""Aram ata Balakan min hruai a, Chhak lama tlanga Moab lal chuan, 'Lo kal la, Jakob-ho anchhia min lawhsak rawh, Lo kal la, Israel-ho min demsak rawh,'" 
Numbers23:8 Engtin nge Pathian anchhe lawh loh ka lawh ang? Engtin nge Pathian dem loh ka dem ang? 
Numbers23:9 Lungpui chung atangtein anni chu ka hmu si a, Tlang atangtein anni chu ka hmu a, Ngai teh, hnam hrang daih an ni, Hnam dang zinga telh loh tur an ni." 
Numbers23:10 Jakob-ho vaivut chu tu nge chhiar thei ang a, Israel-ho hmun lia thena hmun khat chu tu nge chhiar thei ang? Mi fel thih angin thi ve i la, Ka tawpna chu a tawpna ang ni se!"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:11 Tin, Balaka chuan Balaama hnenah, ""I mi tih dan hi engtizia nge ni? Ka hmelmate anchhe lawh turin ka hruai chia, hei, mal i sawm ta hlauh zawk si!"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:12 Ani chuan a chhang a, ""LALPA'n ka kaa a dah chu ka sawi ngei tur ani lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:13 Tin, Balaka chuan a hnenah, ""Hmun dangah i kal leh teh ang, chuta tang chuan i hmu thei hlawm ang a; an awmna chin zawng zawng i hmu ang a, an za erwh chuan i hmu vek kher lo ang: chuta tang chuan anchia min lawhsak ang che,"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:14 Tichuan Zophim-ho awmna Pisga chhipah a hruai chho a, maicham pasarih a siam a, maicham tinah chuan bawngpa pakhat leh berampa pakhat a hlan a." 
Numbers23:15 Tin, Balaka hnenah chuan, ""Saw laia LALPA ka va biak hlanin i halral thilhlan bulah hian lo ding reng rawh,"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:16 Tin, LALPA'n Balaama chu a lo tawk a, a kaah chuan thu a dah a, ""Balaka hnenah kir leh ta la, a hnenah va sawi chhawng rawh,"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:17 Tin, a hnenah chuan a va kal a, ngai teh, a halral thilhlan bulah chuan a lo ding reng a, Moab mi liante pawh a hnenah chuan an awm ve a. Tin, Balaka chuan ahnenah ""LALPA'n eng nge a lo sawi?"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:18 Tichuan ani chuan thu chu a sawi ta a, ""Tho la, Balak, ngaithla rawh; Zipori fapa, ka thu ngai rawh:" 
Numbers23:19 Pathian chu dawt hmang mihring maia ni lo, Lamlet hmang hringfa a ni hek lo. A sawi tawh chu a ti lo ang em ni? A lo sawi tawh chu a tipuitling lo ang em ni?" 
Numbers23:20 Ngai teh, malsawm turin thu ka hmu a, Mal a sawm tawh a, ka tidanglam thei lo." 
Numbers23:21 Jakoba-ho khawlohna reng a hmu lo a, Israel-hovah chhiatna reng ka hmu hek lo. LALPA an Pathian chuan a awmpui a, An lal aan an hmang a ni." 
Numbers23:22 Aigupta atangin Pathianin a hruai chhuak hlawm Sele tha ang mai an pu a," 
Numbers23:23 Jakob-ho chungah dawi atana a awm lo. Israel-ho chungah dawi vaihna a awm hek lo. Jakob-ho leh Israel-ho hnenah Pathian thiltih chu tihlan zel a ni. 
Numbers23:24 Ngaiteh, mipuite chu sakeibakneipui angin an tho a, Sakeibaknei angin an zuang tho a, An sa seh an ei hma chuan an mu lawng An sa seh thisen an in hma chuan,"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:25 Tin, Balaka chuan Balaama hnenah, ""Anchhia lawh hek suh la, malsawm hek suh,"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:26 Nimahsela Balama chuan a chhang a, Balaka hnenah, ""'LALPA'n a saiw zawng zawng chu ka ti ngei tur a ni,' tiin ka hrilh che a ni lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:27 Tin, Balaka chuan Balaama hnenah, ""Hawh teh, hmun dangah ka hruai teh ang che; chuta tang hchuan anchhiah min lawhsak Pathianin a remti mial dah law maw,"" a ti a." 
Numbers23:28 Tichuan Balaka chuan Balaama chu thlaler zuk chhek en Peor chhipah a hruai chho va 
Numbers23:29 tin, Balaaman Balaka hnenah chuan, ""Hetah hian maicham pasarih min siamsak la, bawngpa pasarih leh berampa pasarih min butsaihsak rawh,"" a ti a.Tin, Balaka chuan Balaama sawi ang chuan a ti a, maicham tinah chuan bawngpa pakhat leh berampa pakhat a hlan a." 
Numbers23:30 Tin, Balaka chuan Balaama sawi ang chuan a ti a, maicham tinah chuan bawngpa pakhat leh berampa pakhat a hlan a." 
Numbers24:1 Chutichuan, Israel-ho malsawmsak chu LALPA duhzawng a ni tih Balaaman a hriatin ni danga a tih ang khan dawi atna lam ti tura kal loin thlaler lam a pan ta zawk a." 
Numbers24:2 Tin, Balaama chu a vanvadak a, Israel mite chu an hnam dan zir zela awm a hmu a; tin, Pathian thlarau a chungah a lo thleng a." 
Numbers24:3 Tin, thu chu a sawi ta a, Beora fapa Balaama, Mit var a," 
Numbers24:4 Pathian thute hriaa, Engkimtitheia inlarna hmua, Tlu bawkkhupa mit lo var ta chuan," 
Numbers24:5 'Aw Jakob-ho, in puan inte chu a va tha em, Aw Israel-ho, in biak bukte chu!" 
Numbers24:6 Ruam angin a pharh duai a, Lui kama, huan ang, LALPA phun sasua ang, Lui kama, sidar thingte ang an ni." 
Numbers24:7 Ruahtui tam taka dawng ang a, tui tamna hmunah thlai chite a ching ang. A lal chu Agaga aiin a ropui ang a; A ram chu chawimawiin a awm ang." 
Numbers24:8 Aigupta ata Pathianin a hruai chhuak a, Sele tha ang mai an pu a, An hmelma, hnam dangte chu an ei zo ang a, An ruhte chu a tisawm dep ang a, An thalin an kap tlang ang." 
Numbers24:9 An kun a, sakeibaknei angin an bawk a, Sakeibakneipui ang maiin; Tunge ti tho ngam ang? Malsawmtu apiang che u chu malsawmin awm se la, Anchhe lawhtu apiang che u chu anche lawhin awm rawh se,' a ti,"" a ti a." 
Numbers24:10 Tichuan, Balaama chungah chuan Balaka thin chu a alh a; Balaka chuan Balaama hnenah ka hmelmate anchhe lawh turin ka ko chia, hei, vawi thum zet mal i sawm ta a." 
Numbers24:11 Chuvangin i awmnaah kal bo daih rawh: ropui taka chawisan che ka rilruk a ni a; nimahsela, ngai teh, LALPA'n chawisan che a dal ta a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Numbers24:12 tin, Balaama chuan Balaka hnenah, ""Balaka hian a in chu tangka leh rangkachaka khatin min pe dawn mah se la, a tha lam emaw, a chhe lam emaw, keima rilru puak chuak chuan LALPA thu piah lam chu engmah ka ti thei lo; 'LALPA'n a sawi apiang chu ka sawi ang,' tiin i mi tirhte hnenah pawh ka sawi reng a ni lo'm ni?""" 
Numbers24:13 tin, Balaama chuan Balaka hnenah, ""Balaka hian a in chu tangka leh rangkachaka khatin min pe dawn mah se la, a tha lam emaw, a chhe lam emaw, keima rilru puak chuak chuan LALPA thu piah lam chu engmah ka ti thei lo; 'LALPA'n a sawi apiang chu ka sawi ang,' tiin i mi tirhte hnenah pawh ka sawi reng a ni lo'm ni?""" 
Numbers24:14 Ngaiteh, ka mite hnenah ka kal tawh ang a, hawh teh, he'ng mite hian tun hnua i mite chunga an tih dan tur ka hrilh teh ang che,"" at i a." 
Numbers24:15 Tin, a ni chuan thu chu a sawi ta a." 
Numbers24:16 Beora fapa Balaama, Mit vara, Pathian thute hriaa, Chungnungbera hriatna hriaa, Engkimtitheia inlarna hmua, Tlu bawkkhupa mit lo var ta chuan," 
Numbers24:17 Nakin hnua a awm dan tur ka hmu a, Tun mai piah lam ka hmuhsak a: Jakoba atangin arsi a lo chhuak ang a, Israela atangin lal tiang a lo chhuak ang a, Moab ram tluanin a chhun tlang ang a, Setha thlahte a titlawm ang." 
Numbers24:18 A hmelma thin Edom leh Seir te chu a chang ang: Israelte chan a that chhung zawng. 
Numbers24:19 Jakoba atangin tu emaw a lal ang a, Khua la awm chhunte chu a tiboral ang,' a ti,"" a ti a." 
Numbers24:20 Tin, Amalek lam a hawi a, thu chu a sawi a, ""Amalek chu hnam bul ber a ni na a, A ler lam chu boralna a ni,"" a ti a." 
Numbers24:21 Tin, Ken lam a hawi a, thu chu a sawi a, I awmnana hmun chu a nghet a, I bu chu lungpuia chheh a ni." 
Numbers24:22 Mahse Ken chu a tiau vang a, Assur-hoin sala an hruai bo che thlengin,"" a ti." 
Numbers24:23 Tin, thu chu a sawi leh a, ""Pathianin hetianga a tihin tu nge nung thei ang le?" 
Numbers24:24 mahse Kittim ram atangin lawngte a lo thleng ang a, Assur an tihreawm ang a, Eber an tihreawm ang a, Ani pawh a boral ang,"" a ti a.Tichuan Balaama chu a tho a, a kahwlamaha haw ta a; Balaka pawh chu a haw ve ta a." 
Numbers24:25 Tichuan Balaama chu a tho a, a kahwlamaha haw ta a; Balaka pawh chu a haw ve ta a." 
Numbers25:1 Tichuan Israel-ho chu Sittim-ah an awm a, tin, Moab-ho fanute chu an pawl ta hlawm a:" 
Numbers25:2 an pathiante hnenah an inthawinate chu an sawm a; tichuan an ei a, an pathiante chu chibai a buk ve a." 
Numbers25:3 Tin, Israel-ho chuan Peor hmuna Baal chu an pawm ve ta a; tichuan Israelho chungah LALPA thin chu a alh ta a." 
Numbers25:4 Chutichuan LALPA'n Mosia hennah, ""mipuite hotu zawng zawng hi hruai la, LALPA thinurna tihbaiawm tak mai chu Israel-ho chung ata a kian theihna'n chhun engah LALPA hmaah awhhlumtir rawh,"" a ti a." 
Numbers25:5 Tin, Mosia'n Israel-ho roreltute hnenah chuan,""Peor hmuna Baal pawm apiangte chu tihlum vek rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Numbers25:6 Tin, ngai teh, Israela thlahte zinga mi pakhatin inbiakna puan in kawngkaa a tah lai takin Mosia mit hmuhah leh Israel-ho pungkhawmte mithmuhah Media hmeiche pakhat a chhungte hnenah a rawn hruai a." 
Numbers25:7 Tin, puithiam Arona fa Eleazara fapa Phinehasan a han hmuh chuan pungkhawmho zing ata chu a tho a, fei a chuh a;" 
Numbers25:8 tin, Israel mi chu puan in chhungah chuan a um lut a, Israel mi nen an pahnih chuan a chhun tlang, hmeichia chu a pumah. Chuti chuan Israel thlahte chung hremna chu a reh ta." 
Numbers25:9 Chumi hremnaa thite chu 24,000 an ni." 
Numbers25:10 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers25:11 puithiam Arona fa Eleazara fapa Phinehasa hian ka thin anga an zinga a thikna chuan ka thinurna chu Israela thlahte lak ata a tikiang ta a, tichuan ka thikna chuan Israela thlahte chu ka tiboral lo ang." 
Numbers25:12 Chuvangin 'Ngai teh, ka inremna thuthlung chu a chungah ka thlung ang a;" 
Numbers25:13 tin, amah leh a hnua a thlahte tan kumkhaw puithiam nihna thuthlung ani ang a; a Pathian tan a thik a, Israela thlahte tan inremna a siam avangin,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Numbers25:14 Israel mi an thah, Midia hmeichhia nena an thah tak hming chu Zimria, Simeon-ho zinga an chhungkaw puipa Salua fapa a ni a." 
Numbers25:15 Tin, Midia hmeichia an thah taka hming chu Kozbi, Zura fanu a ni: ani chu Midia ho chhungkaw zinga an hotu a ni." 
Numbers25:16 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers25:17 Mida-ho chu bei u la, tilawm rawh u:Peor hmunah an bum che u a, hrem tak Midia-ho milian fanu Kozbi an thah tak chungchang thuah in chungah thil dik lo tak an tih aeleazara hian,"" tiin." 
Numbers25:18 Peor hmunah an bum che u a, hrem tak Midia-ho milian fanu Kozbi an thah tak chungchang thuah in chungah thil dik lo tak an tih aeleazara hian,"" tiin." 
Numbers26:1 Tin, hremna a reh hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, LALPA'n Mosia leh puithiam Arona fapa Eleazara chu abi a," 
Numbers26:2 Israel thlahte pungkhawmho zawng zawng chu, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam, a chi chiin Israel rama ralkai chin zawng zawng chiar vek rawh u,"" tiin." 
Numbers26:3 Tichuan Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan Jeriko zawn, Jordan kam, Moab phaiah anniho chu an bia a," 
Numbers26:4 Mipuite chu kum sawmhnih achin chung lam chhiar rawh u,"" tiin." 
Numbers26:5 Israela fa tir Reubena: Reubena fapate: Hanok-ho chhungkaw zinga mi Hanoka: Palu-ho chhungkaw zinga mi Palua: 
Numbers26:6 Heezron-ho chhungkaw zinga mi Hezrona, Karmi-ho chhungkaw puipa Karmia." 
Numbers26:7 Hengho hi Reuben-ho chhungkua an ni:chhiar tling zawng zawng chu 43,730 an ni." 
Numbers26:8 Palua thlah; Eliaba. 
Numbers26:9 Tin, Eliaba thlahte; Nemuela, Dathana, Abirama an ni. Heng Dathana te leh Abirama te hi an ni, LALPA an beih laia Mosia leh Arona beitu Kora pawla tel pungkhawmho thlahte chu:" 
Numbers26:10 tin, chu mi pawl an thih lai chuan leiin a ka a ang a, Korate nen chuan a lem tlang a, meiin mi zahnih leh sawmnga a lem tum khan; tichuan chhinchhiahna an lo ni ta a." 
Numbers26:11 Amaherawhchu Kora fapate chu an thi lo. 
Numbers26:12 A chhungkua kuain Simeona thlahte: Nemuela thlahte Nemuel-ho. Jamina thlahte Jamin-ho: Jakina thlahte Jakin hoL 
Numbers26:13 Zera thlahte Zera-ho: Saula thlah te Saul-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:14 Hengho hi Simeona thlahte chu an ni a, 22,200 an ni." 
Numbers26:15 A chhungkua kuain Gda fapate ephoan thlahte Zephon-ho; Hagi thlahte Hagi-ho: Sunia thlahte Suni-ho: 
Numbers26:16 Oznia thlahte Ozni-ho: Eria thlahte Eri-ho: 
Numbers26:17 Aroda thlahte Arod-ho: Arelia thlahte Areli-ho. 
Numbers26:18 Hengho hi an chhiar dan anga Gada fapate thlahte chu an ni a, 40,500 an ni." 
Numbers26:19 Tin, Juda fapate, Era leh OnanaL Era leh Onana chu kanaan ramah an thi a." 
Numbers26:20 Tin, Juda thlahte chhungkaw kal dan chu hetiang hi a ni: Sela thlahte Sela-ho: Peraza thlahte Perez-ho: Zera tlahte Zera-ho an ni:" 
Numbers26:21 Tin, Perez thlahte chuL Hezron thlahte Hezron-ho: Hamula thlahte Hamul-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:22 Hengho hi an chhiar dan anga Juda fapate thlahte chu an ni a, 76,500 an ni." 
Numbers26:23 A chhungkua kuain Iskara thlahte: Tola thlahte Tola-ho: Pua thlahte Pu-ho: 
Numbers26:24 Jasuba thlahte Jasub-ho: Simrona thlahte Simron-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:25 Heng hi an chiar dan anga Isakara-te fapate thlahte n ni, 64,300 an ni." 
Numbers26:26 A chhungkua kuain Zebulana thlah te: Sereda thlahte Sered-ho: Elona thlahte Eleon-ho,. Jaleela tlahte Jaleel-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:27 Heng hi an chhiar dan anga Zebulun-ho thlahte chu an ni a, 60,500 an ni." 
Numbers26:28 A chhungkua kuain Josepha thlahte: Manasea leh Ephraima. 
Numbers26:29 Manase tlahte: Makira thlahte Makir-ho: tin, Makiran Gileada a hring a; Gileada thlahte Gilead-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:30 Heng hi Gileada thlahte an ni: Iezera thlahte Iezer-ho: Heleka thlahte Helek-ho: 
Numbers26:31 Asriela thlahte Asriel-ho: Sekema thlahte Sekem-ho: 
Numbers26:32 Semida thlahte Semida-ho: Hephera thlahte Hepher-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:33 Tin, Hephera fapa Zelophehada chuan fapate nei loin fanute a nei a: Zelophehada fanute hming chu Malai te, Novai te, Hoglai te, Milkai te, Tirzai te an ni." 
Numbers26:34 Hengte hi manasea thlahte an ni. An chiar zawngte chu 52,700 an ni." 
Numbers26:35 Heng hi a chhungkua kuain Ephraima thlahte an ni. Suthela thlahte Suthel-ho: Bekera thlahte Beker-ho: Tahana thlahte Tahan-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:36 Tin, he'ng hi Suthela thlahte an ni. Erana thlahte Eran-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:37 Heng hi an chhiar dan anga Ephraima thlahte chhungkhat an ni a, 32,500 an ni. Heng hi an chhungkaw indawt dan ang zela Josepha thlahte an ni." 
Numbers26:38 A chungkua kuain Benjamia thlahte: Bela thlahte Bela-ho: Asbela thlahte Asbel-ho: Ahirama tlahte Ahiram-ho. 
Numbers26:39 Sedhuphama thlahte Supham-ho. Huphama thlahte Hupham-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:40 Tin, Bela thlahte chu Arda leh Naamana an ni: Arda thlahte Ard-ho: Naamana thlahte Naaman-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:41 Heng hi an chhungkaw indawt dan ang zela Benjamiana thlahte an ni: tin, an chhiar zawngte chu 45,600 an ni." 
Numbers26:42 Heng hi a chhungkua kuain Dana thlahte an ni: Suhama thlahte Suham-ho an ni. Heng hi an chhungkaw indawt dan ang zela Dana thlahte an ni. 
Numbers26:43 Suham-ho thlahte zawng zawng an chhiar dan ang chuan 64,400 an ni." 
Numbers26:44 Heng hi a chhungkua kuain Asera thlahte: Imnaa thlahte Imna-ho Isvia thlahte Isvi-ho: Beria thlahte Beria-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:45 Beria thlahte: Hebera thlahte Heber-ho Malkiela thlahte Malkiel-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:46 Asera fanu hming hu Seri a ni. 
Numbers26:47 Heng hi Asera fapate tlahte an chhiar zawngte chu an ni a, 53,400 an ni." 
Numbers26:48 A chhungkua kuain Napthtalia thlah te; Jazeela thlahte Jazeel-ho: Gunia thlah-te Gunia-ho: 
Numbers26:49 Jazera thlahte Jezer ho: Silema thlahte Silem-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:50 Heng hi an chungkaw indawt dan ang zela Naphtalia thlahte an ni: an chhiar zawngte chu 45,400 an ni." 
Numbers26:51 Heng hi Israela thlah anc hhiar zawngte hu an ni a, 6,01,730 an ni." 
Numbers26:52 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers26:53 Hengho hi an tam lam ang zelin ram hi semsak tur a ni. 
Numbers26:54 A tam deuhte chu ram i pe tam ang a, a tlem deuhte chu ram i pe tlem ang a: chhiar dan ang chuan ram pek theuh tur a ni." 
Numbers26:55 Amaherawhchu thumvawrin ram chu sem tur a ni: an pute hnam hming indawt dan ang zelin ram chu an chang ang. 
Numbers26:56 Gersona thlahte Gerson-ho: Kohatha thlate Kohatha ho: Merariat hlahte Merari-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:57 Hengho hi Levi-ho A chhungkua kuain chhiarte chu an ni. Gersona thlah te Gerson-ho: Kohatha tlahte Kohath-ho: Meraria tlahte Merari-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:58 Hengho hi Levia tlahte an ni: Libna thlahte, Bebrana thlahte, Mahlia tlah te, Musia thlah te, Kora thlahte an ni. Tin, Kohatha chuan Amrama a hring a." 
Numbers26:59 Tin, Amrama nupi hming hu Jokebedi, Levia fanu. Aigupta rama Levia laka piang a ni a, tin, ani chuan Amrama lakah Arona leh Mosia leh a farnu Miriami a hring a." 
Numbers26:60 Tin, Arona chuan Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazera te, Ithamara te a hring a." 
Numbers26:61 Tin, Nadaba leh Abihua chu LALPA hmaa hman loh tur chi mei an hman lai khan an thi a."
