Numbers26:62 Tin, chhiar zawng zawng mipa thla khat achin chung lam zawng zawng chu 23,000 an ni. Israel mite zinga ram sem chang ve tur an nih loh avangin Israel mite zingah chhiar an ni lo a." 
Numbers26:63 Hengte hi a ni Jeriko zawn, Jordan kam, Moab phaia Israela thlahte chhiarna chu." 
Numbers26:64 Sinai thlaera Israel mite Mosia leh puithiam Aronan an chhiarte kha pakhat mah a awm an awm tawh lo.LALPA'n, ""Thlalerah an thi ngei ngei tur a ni,"" a lo ti tawh si a. Jephunea fapa Kaleba leh Nuna fapa Josua lo chu tumah dam an awm tawh lo." 
Numbers26:65 LALPA'n, ""Thlalerah an thi ngei ngei tur a ni,"" a lo ti tawh si a. Jephunea fapa Kaleba leh Nuna fapa Josua lo chu tumah dam an awm tawh lo." 
Numbers27:1 Tin, Josefa fapa Manasea thlah, makira chu mi fa Gileada chu mi fa Hephera fapa Zelophehada fanute chu an lo kal a: a fanute hming chu: Malai te, Novai te, Hjoglai te, Milkai te, Tirzai te a ni." 
Numbers27:2 Tin, Josefa fapa Manasea thlah, makira chu mi fa Gileada chu mi fa Hephera fapa Zelophehada fanute chu an lo kal a: a fanute hming chu: Malai te, Novai te, Hjoglai te, Milkai te, Tirzai te a ni." 
Numbers27:3 Thlalerah khan kan pa a tni a, LALPA bei tura pung khawm pawl, Kora pawlah khan a tel ve lo a nimahsela ama sual avangin a thi a, fapa anei lo a." 
Numbers27:4 Fapa a neih loh avang maiin engah nge kan pa hming chu a thlahe zing ata a bo vang? Kan pa unaute zingah chanvo min pe ve rawh u,"" an ti a." 
Numbers27:5 Tin, Mosia'n anthu chu LALPA hmaah a thlen a." 
Numbers27:6 Tin, LALPA chuan Mosia abia a," 
Numbers27:7 Zelophehada fanute chuan an tidik a ni: an pa unaute zingah chanvo i suam ngei tur nai a, an pa chanvo chu i pe tur a ni." 
Numbers27:8 Tin, Israela thlahte hnenah, 'Mi, fapa nei loa a thih chuan a ro chu a fanute in pe tur a ni." 
Numbers27:9 Tin, fanu a nieh loh chuan a ro chu a unaue in pe tur a ni." 
Numbers27:10 Tin, unaute a neih loh chuan a ro chu a pa unaue in pe tur a ni." 
Numbers27:11 Tin, a pain unaute a neih loh chuan a ro chu a laichin in pe ang a, anin a khawm angin Israel thlahte tan dan thupek ngeht a ni ang,' tiin sawi rawh,"" tiin." 
Numbers27:12 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Abarim tlangah khian han chho la, Israela thlahte ka pek tur ram han thlir rawh." 
Numbers27:13 in i han hmuh zawh chuan i unaupa Arona chu achipuite hnanah hruai ani ang bawkin nang pawh hruai i ni tawh ang. 
Numbers27:14 Zin thlalera pungkhawm ho an phunnawi laia an mithmuhah tuiah khan mi chawimawi tura ka thupek che kalha i hel avang khan,"" a ti a.. (Chung chu Zin thlalera Kades-a Meriba tuite chu a ni)." 
Numbers27:15 Tin, Mosia LALPA a bia a," 
Numbers27:16 LALPA, nunna zang zawng hnar Pathian chuan, LALPA mi pungkhawtme chu vengtu nei lo beram anga an awm lohna'n pungkhawm chunga hotu, a hma hruaia, anmahni hruai chhuaka hruai luttu tur ruat rawh se,"" tiin." 
Numbers27:17 LALPA, nunna zang zawng hnar Pathian chuan, LALPA mi pungkhawtme chu vengtu nei lo beram anga an awm lohna'n pungkhawm chunga hotu, a hma hruaia, anmahni hruai chhuaka hruai luttu tur ruat rawh se,"" tiin." 
Numbers27:18 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Nuna fapa, mi rilru nei tak Josua chu hruai la, a chungah i kut nghat la," 
Numbers27:19 puithiam Eleazara leh pungkhawmho hmaah dintir la, an mithmuhah thuneihna pe rawh." 
Numbers27:20 Tin, Israela thlah pungkhawmho zang zanwgin a thu an awih theihna'n thuneihna hlan rawh." 
Numbers27:21 Tichuan ani chu puithiam Eleazara hmaah a ding ang a, anin LALPA hmaah Urim hmangin thu a la ang a a thuin an chhuak ang a, a thuin an lut ang, amah leh Israel thlah zawng zawngte pungkhawmho zawng zawng nen, "" a ti a." 
Numbers27:22 Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA thupek ang chuan a ti a: Josua chu a hruai a. Eleazara leh pungkhawmho zawng zawng hmaah chuan a dintir a:tin, a chungah a kut a nghat a, Mosia hmanga LALPA'n a sawi ang khan thuneihna a pe ta a." 
Numbers27:23 tin, a chungah a kut a nghat a, Mosia hmanga LALPA'n a sawi ang khan thuneihna a pe ta a." 
Numbers28:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers28:2 Israela thlahte chu thu pe la, an hnenah, 'Ka chaw ka tana rimtui meia thilhlan, ka hnenah thilhlan chu a hun tak zel theuhvah in hlan tur a ni,' ti la." 
Numbers28:3 Tin, an hnenah, 'Hei hi meia thilhlan LALPA hnena in hlan tur chu a ni; beram no a pa, kum khat mi, sawisel bo, ni tin, pahnih, halral thilhlan hlan reng atan." 
Numbers28:4 Beram no pakhat chu zingh in hlan ang a, pakhat chu tlai lamah in hlan ang a," 
Numbers28:5 chhangphut thilhlan atan chhangphut dip mi epha hmun sawma thena hmun khat, hriak sawr hin hmun lia thena hmun khata chawhpawlh nen." 
Numbers28:6 LALPA tana meia thilhlan, rimtui atana Sinai tlanga ruat halral thilhlan hlan reng tura kha a ni." 
Numbers28:7 Tin, beram no pakhat hlannaa in tur thilhlan chu, hin hmun lia thena hmun khat a ni tur a ni: LALPA tana uain i bun chhuak tur a ni." 
Numbers28:8 Tin, beram no pakhat chu tlai lamah i hlan tur a ni: zing lama chhangphut thilhlan ang leh chu mia in tur thilhlan ang bawk chu LALPA tana rimtui atan meia thilhlan chu i hlan tur a ni." 
Numbers28:9 Tin, chawlhniin beram ni, a pa kum khat mi sawrselbo pahnih leh chhang phut thilhlan atan chhngphut dip mi epha hmun sawma thena hmun hnih hriaka chawhpawlh leh chu mia in tur thilhlan nen i hlan tur a ni:" 
Numbers28:10 hei hi chawlhni apianga halral thilhlan reng leh chu mia in tur thilhlan tiam loa halral thilhaln hlan tur chu a ni. 
Numbers28:11 Tin, in thla thar apiangah LALPA tan halral thilhlan in hlan tur a ni; bawngpa tir pahnih leh berampa pakhat leh beram no a pa kum khat mi sawisel bo pasarih:" 
Numbers28:12 tin, bawngpa tinah chhangphut thilhlan atan chhangphut dip mi, hriaka chawhpawlh epha hmun sawma thena hmun thum; tin, beram pakhatah chhangphut thilhlanah chhangphut dip mi hriaka chawhpawlh hmun sawma thena hmun hnih;" 
Numbers28:13 tin, beram no tinah chhang phut thilhlanah chhangphut dip mi, hriaka chawhpawlh hmun sawma thena hmun khat: hei hi halral thilhlan rimtui LALPA tan meia thilhlan a ni." 
Numbers28:14 Tin, an in tur thilhlan chu bawngpa pakhatah uain hin chanve a ni ang a, berampa pakhatah hin hmun thuma thena hmun khat, beram no pakhatah hin hmun lia thena hmun khat: hei hi kum tluana thla tin, halral thilhlan a ni." 
Numbers28:15 Tin, LALPA hnena sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat in hlan tur a ni; halral thilhlan hlan reng leh chu mia in tur thilhlan tiam loin." 
Numbers28:16 Tin, thla khatna ni sawm leh ni li ni chu LALPA kalhlen kut a ni." 
Numbers28:17 Tin, chu mi thla ni sawm leh ni nga ni chu ruai ni a ni ang: ni sarih chu chhang dawidim telh loh ei tur ani ang." 
Numbers28:18 Ni khat ni chuan inkhawmpui thianghlim a awm ang a; eng hna mah in thawk tur ani lo a; 
Numbers28:19 meia thilhlan halral thilhlan erawh chu LALPA hnenah in hlan tur a ni; bawngpa tir pahhnih leh berampa pakhat leh beram no a pa kum khat mi pasarih: in ngaiha sawiselbo ani tur ani; 
Numbers28:20 chhangphut dip mi, hriaka chawhpawlh, an chhangphut thilhlan nen: bawngpa pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun thum; berampa pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun hnih;" 
Numbers28:21 beram no pasarih chu beram no pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun khat a ni tur a ni; 
Numbers28:22 tin, in tana inremna siamna turin sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat." 
Numbers28:23 Heng hi zinga thilhlan, halral thilhlan hlan reng tiam loin in hlan tur a ni." 
Numbers28:24 Hetiang hian LALPA tana rimtui, meia thilhlan ei tur chu ni tin, ni sarih in hlan tur a ni: halral thilhlan hlan reng leh chu mia in tur thilhlan tiam lohin." 
Numbers28:25 Tin, a ni sarih ni chuan inkhawmpui thianghlim in nei ang a, eng hna mah in thawk tur ani lo." 
Numbers28:26 Tin, in chawlhkar kut, in buh thar tirh kut LALPA tana thil thar chhangphut thilhlan in hlan ni pawhin inkhawmpui thianghlim in nei ang a; eng han mah in thawk tur ani lo va:" 
Numbers28:27 LALPA tana rimtui halral thilhlan erawh chu in hlan tur a ni; bawngpa tir pahnih, berampa pakhat, beram no a pa kum khat mi pasarih;" 
Numbers28:28 an chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi hriaka chawhpawlh, bawngpa pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun thum, berampa pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun hnih," 
Numbers28:29 beram no pasarih, beram no pakhat theuhvah hmun sawma thena hmun khat:" 
Numbers28:30 in tana inremna siamna'n kelpa pakhat nen (inngaiha sawisel bo ani tur ani).Halral thilhlan hlan reng leh chu mia chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlan tiam loin in hlan tur a ni. 
Numbers28:31 Halral thilhlan hlan reng leh chu mia chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlan tiam loin in hlan tur a ni. 
Numbers29:1 Tin, thla sarihna a ni khat ni chuan inkhawmpui thianghlim in nei ang a: eng hna mah in thawk tur ani lo: in tan tawtawrawt ham ni a ni tur a ni." 
Numbers29:2 LALPA tnaa rimtuiah halral thilhlan in hlan ang a; bawngpa tir pakhat, beram pa pakhat, beram no a pa kum khat mi sawisel bo pasarih;" 
Numbers29:3 an chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi hriaka chawhpawlh, bawngpa pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun thum, berampa pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun hnih," 
Numbers29:4 beram no pasarih, pakhat theuhvah hmun sawma thena hmun khat:" 
Numbers29:5 in tana inremna siamna'n sual thawina kelpa pakhat nen: 
Numbers29:6 thla thar halral thilhlan leh chu mia chhangphut thilhlan te, halral thilhlan hlan reng leh chu mia chhangphut thilhlan te, in tur thilhlan te, an tih dan pangngai LALPA tana rimtuia meia thilhlante tiam lohin." 
Numbers29:7 Tin, he mi thla sarihna, ni sawm ni hian inkhawmpui thianghlim in nei ang a: chaw in nghei tur a ni, eng hna mah in thawk tur ani lo;" 
Numbers29:8 LALPA tana rimtuiah halral thilhlan erawh chu in hlan tur a ni; bawngpa pakhat, berampa pakhat, beram no a pa kum khat mi pasarih:" 
Numbers29:9 in ngaiha sawisel bo ani tur aniL an chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi hriaka chawhpawlh, bawngpa pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun thum, berampa pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun hnih," 
Numbers29:10 beram no pasarih, beram no pakhat theuhvah hmun sawma thena hmun khat:" 
Numbers29:11 sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat nen: inremna tura sual thawina te, halral thilhlan hlan reng te, chu mia chhangphut leh an in tur thilhlante tiam lohin." 
Numbers29:12 Tin, thla sarihna, ni sawm leh ni nga niin inkhawmpui thianghlim in nei ang a; eng hna mah in thawk lo ang a, LALPA tan ni sarih in kut tur a ni:" 
Numbers29:13 tin, LALPA tana rimtuiah meia thilhlan, halral thilhlan in hlan tur a ni: bawngpa tir sawm leh pathum, berampa pahnih beram no a pa kum khat mi sawm leh pali; sawisel bo theuh a ni tur a ni:" 
Numbers29:14 an chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi hriaka chawhpawlh, bawngpa sawm leh pathum, bawngpa pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun thum, berampa pahnih, berampa pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun hnih," 
Numbers29:15 beram no sawm leh pali, beram no pakhatah hmun sawma thena hmun khat:" 
Numbers29:16 sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat nen; halral thilhlan hlan reng, chu mia chhangphut thilhaln te, in tur thilhlan te tiam lohin." 
Numbers29:17 Tin, a ni hnih niin bawngpa tir sawm leh pahnih, berampa pahnih, beram no a pa kum khat mi sawisel bo sawm leh pali in hlan tur a ni;" 
Numbers29:18 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlan a dan ang takin an tam dan ang zelin bawngpa atan te, berampa atan te, beram no atan te:" 
Numbers29:19 sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat nen halral thilhlan hlan reng te, chu mia chhangphut thilhaln te, in tur thilhlante tiam lohin." 
Numbers29:20 Tin, a ni thum ni chuan bawngpa sawm leh pakhat, berampa pahnih, beam no a pa kum khat mi sawisel bo sawm leh pali;" 
Numbers29:21 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlan a dan ang takin an tam dan ang zelin bawngpa atan te, berampa atan te, beram no atan te:" 
Numbers29:22 sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat nen; halral thilhlan hlan reng leh chu mia chhangphut thilhlan leh chu mia in tur thilhlan tiam lohin. 
Numbers29:23 Tin, a ni li ni chuan bawngpa sawm, berampa pahnih, beram no a pa kum khat mi sawisel bo sawm leh pali:" 
Numbers29:24 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlan, a dan angt akin an tam dan ang zelin bawngpa atan te, berampa atan te, beram no atan te:" 
Numbers29:25 sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat nen; halral thilhlan hlan reng te, chu mia chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlante tiam lohin." 
Numbers29:26 Tin, a ni nga ni chuan bawngpa pakua, berampa pahnih, beram no a pa kum khat mi sawisel bo sawm leh pali:" 
Numbers29:27 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlan, a dan ang takin an tam dan ang zelin bawngpa atan te, berampa atan te, beram no atan te:" 
Numbers29:28 sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat nen; halral thilhlan hlan reng te, chu mia chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlante tiam lohin." 
Numbers29:29 Tin, a ni ruk ni chuan bawngpa pariat, berampa pahnih, beram no a pa kum khat mi sawisel bo sawm leh pali:" 
Numbers29:30 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlan, a dan ang takin an tam dan ang zelin bawngpa atan te, berampa atan te, beram no atan te:" 
Numbers29:31 sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat nen; halral thilhlan hlan reng te, chu mia chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlante tiam lohin." 
Numbers29:32 Tin, a ni sarih ni chuan bawngpa pasarih, berampa pahnih, beram no a pa kum khat mi sawisel bo sawm leh pali:" 
Numbers29:33 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlan, a dan ang takin an tam dan ang zelin bawngpa atan te, berampa atan te, beram no atan te:" 
Numbers29:34 sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat nen; halral thilhlan hlan reng te, chu mia chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlante tiam lohin." 
Numbers29:35 Tin, a ni riat ni chuan inkhawmpui ropui tak in nei ang a: eng hna mah in thawk tur ani lo:" 
Numbers29:36 LALPA tana rimtuiah meia thilhlan halral thilhlan erawh chu in hlan tur a ni: bawngpa pakhat, berampa pakhat, beram no a pa kum khat mi sawisel bo pasarih:" 
Numbers29:37 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlan, bawngpa atan te, berampa atan te, beram no atan te, a dan ang takin an tam dan ang zelin," 
Numbers29:38 sual thawina'n kelpa pakhat nen; halral thilhlan hlan reng te, chu mia chhangphut thilhlan leh in tur thilhlante tiam lohin." 
Numbers29:39 In thutiam te, duhthua thilhlan te, in halral thilhlan te, in in tur tur thilhlan te, in remna thilhlante tiam lohin he'ng hi in hunbi nei kut niin LALPA hnenah inhlan tur a ni,' ti rawh"" tiin.Tin, LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek zawng zawng chu Israela thlahte chu Mosia chuan a hrilh a." 
Numbers29:40 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek zawng zawng chu Israela thlahte chu Mosia chuan a hrilh a." 
Numbers30:1 Tin, Mosia'n Israela thlahte hnamho puipate chu a bia a,: Hei hi a ni, LALPA'n tu a pek chu." 
Numbers30:2 Miin LALPA hnena thu a tiam emaw, chhechhama mahni intiamkamna emaw a neih chuan a hlen ngei tur ni; a htu ang zawng zawng chu a ti vek tur a ni." 
Numbers30:3 Pate ina awm lai nula pawhin LALPA hnena thu a tiam emaw, chhechhama intiamkamna emaw a neih chuan," 
Numbers30:4 a pain a thutiam emaw a intiamkamna emaw chu ahriat a, a ngawihsan mai chuan a thutiam emaw, a intiamkamna emaw chu a ti ngei tur a ni." 
Numbers30:5 A pain a hriat ni ngeia a phal loh erawh chuan a thutiam emaw a intiamkamna emaw ata chu a fihlim ang a, a pain a phal loh avangin LALPA'n ani chu a ngaidam ang." 
Numbers30:6 Ngaihtuah thui mang loa thutiam emaw intiamkamna emaw nei laiin pasal a neih a," 
Numbers30:7 a pasalin a hriat nia a ngawih san mai chuan a thutiam emaw a intiamkamna emaw chu a hlen ngei tur a ni. 
Numbers30:8 Amaherawhchu a pasalin a hriat nia a phal loh chuan ngaihtuah thui loa thu a lo tiam emaw, a lo intiamkamna emaw ata chu a fihlim ang; tin, LALPA'n a ngaidam ang." 
Numbers30:9 Hmeithai te, makchhiat tawkte erawh chuan an thutiam emaw, an intiamkamna emaw chu an hlen ngei tur a ni." 
Numbers30:10 Pasalte ina awm laia thutiam emaw, intiamkamna emaw chu" 
Numbers30:11 a pasalin a hriat pawha a ngawihsan a, a hnial loh chuan a thutiamkamna chu a hlen tur a ni." 
Numbers30:12 Amaherawhchu a pasalin a hriat nia a thiat emaw, a tihbosak emaw chuan a thutiam leh a intiamkamna chu sut a ni tawh ang." 
Numbers30:13 Thutiam emaw, intiamkamna emaw reng reng a pasalin a remtihpuiin a thiatsak thei bawk a ni." 
Numbers30:14 Amaherawhchu a pasalin a hriata a ngawihsan mai chuan a thutiam ang leh a intiamkamna ang ngei chuan a ti tur a ni; a hriat ni atanga a ngawihsan avangin a nemnghehpui tihna a ni. 
Numbers30:15 A hriat veleh a thiat a, a tihbosak erawhchuan a mawh chu maman a phur tur a ni.Heng hi, mipa leh anupui kar leh pa leh a fanu nulat laia a pa ina la awm reng an kara dan tura LALPA'n Mosia thu a pekte chu a ni." 
Numbers30:16 Heng hi, mipa leh anupui kar leh pa leh a fanu nulat laia a pa ina la awm reng an kara dan tura LALPA'n Mosia thu a pekte chu a ni." 
Numbers31:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia'n a bia a," 
Numbers31:2 Midia-ho chungah Israela thlahte phuba la rawh: chu mi zawhah chuan i chipuite hnenah hruai i ni tawh ang,"" tiin." 
Numbers31:3 Tichuan Mosia chuan mipuite chu a bia a, ""Midia-ho chunga LALPA phuba lana hlen tura Midia-ho beia indo turin ain zinga mi inralthuam rawh se." 
Numbers31:4 Israeel hnam zawng zawng zinga hnam tina mi sangkhat zel indonaah in kaltir tur a ni. tiin. 
Numbers31:5 Chutichuan Israel-ho sang tam tak zing ata, hnam tin, atangin 1,000 theuh, indonaa kal turin sipai 12,000 an theh chhuak a." 
Numbers31:6 Tichuan Mosia'n chi tin, zinga mi 1,000 theuh leh puithiam Eleazara fapa Phinehasa hmun thianghlim bungbel te, thupek velna'na tawtawrawt te kengin indonaah akaltir a." 
Numbers31:7 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek angin Midia ho an do a; mipa zawng zawng an that vek a." 
Numbers31:8 An mi thahte zingah chuan Midia ho lalte pawh an tel a; Midia-ho lal panga, Evia te, Rekema te, Zura te, Hura te, Reba te chu: Beora fapa Balaama pawh khandaihin an that a." 
Numbers31:9 Tin, Israela thlahe chuan Midia-ho nunaute salah an hruai a; tin, an ram zawng zawng te, an beram rual zawng zawng te, an bungrua zawng zawngte chu rallak sum atan an la a." 
Numbers31:10 An awmna khua zawng zawng te, an riahhmun zawng zawngte an hal vek a." 
Numbers31:11 Tin, mihring leh ran, sal leh rallak sum zawng zawng an kalpui vek a." 
Numbers31:12 Tin, sal te, man te, ral lak sumte chu Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara leh Israela thlah pungkhawmho hnenah, Jeriko zawn Jordan kam Moab phaia an riahmunah chuan an rawn thlen a." 
Numbers31:13 Tin, Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara leh pungkhawmho puipa zawng zawngte chuan daiah an lo a hmuak a." 
Numbers31:14 Tin, Mosia chu sipai hotu, sang chunga hotute leh za chunga hotu te, indona atanga lo hawte chungah chuan a thinur a." 
Numbers31:15 Tichuan Mosia'n an hnenah, ""Hmeichhia chu damin in la zuah vek maw?" 
Numbers31:16 Ngai teh u, Balaama remruat chuan Peor chungchang thu-ah Israela thlahte chu LALPA chunga bawhchhiatna tithlengtue chu he'ng hi an ni, LALPA mi pungkhawmho zingah chuan hri a lo len tak kha." 
Numbers31:17 Chuvangin naupang zinga mipa zawng zawng chu that u la, hmeichhia mi pawl tawh zawng zawng that bawk rawh u." 
Numbers31:18 Hmeichhe naupang mi la pawl loh zawng zawng erawh chu in tan zuah rawh u. 
Numbers31:19 Tin, daiah ni sarih riak u la, tupawh mi that leh mitthi khawih apiangte chu ni thum ni leh ni sarih niin inthian rawh u, nangmahni leh in salte pawh." 
Numbers31:20 Tin, thuamhnaw reng reng leh savuant hil siam zawng zawng te, kel hmula thil siam zawng zawng te, thinga thil siam zawng zawng thu-ah chuan in inthian tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Numbers31:21 Tin, puithiam Eleazara chuan indonaa kal indo mite hnenah chuan, "" Hei hi LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek dan thuruat chu a ni:" 
Numbers31:22 engpawh ni se la rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dar te, thir te, rangva te, suan te," 
Numbers31:23 engpawh meia hlaa chhe thei lo apiangte chu meiah in thawlh tlang ang a, tichuan a lo thianghlim ang: engpawh ni se la, tlenfaina tuiin tihthianghlim tur a ni: tin, meia hal tuar thei lo apiang chu tuiah in thawlh tlang tur a ni." 
Numbers31:24 Tin, a ni sarih niin in puan in su ang a, tin, tin, lo thianghlim ang a, chu mi zawhah chuan riahhmunah in lo lut dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Numbers31:25 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers31:26 Nang nen, puithiam Eleazara nen, pungkhawmho chhungkaw puipate nen rallak suma an lak m ihring leh rante chu chhiar vek u la;" 
Numbers31:27 tin, rallak sum chu hmun hnihah then u la, indonaa kal indo mite tan leh punghote tan;" 
Numbers31:28 tin, indonaa kalho chan atanga chuan mihring te, bawng te, sabengtung te, beram te, thil nung zang zawng zanga zelah pakhat LALPA hnenah chhiah pek tur tihhransak rawh." 
Numbers31:29 Chung chu la u la, LALPA tana then t hilhlanah puithiam Eleazara pe rawh u." 
Numbers31:30 Tin, a chanve Israela tlahte pual chu sawmnga ata pakhat tihrang zel la, mihring atang te, bawng atang te, sabengtung atang te, beram rual atang te, ran rual atang tein; tin, chung chu LALPA biak buk enkawltu Levi-hote pe rawh,"" a ti a." 
Numbers31:31 Tichuan LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang chuan Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan an ti a. 
Numbers31:32 Sipaiten an man rallak sum tiam lohin an lak chu beram 6,75,000" 
Numbers31:33 bawng 72,000" 
Numbers31:34 sabengtung 61,000" 
Numbers31:35 mihring chu hmeichhia, mipa la pawl ngai loh 32,000 an ni a." 
Numbers31:36 Tin, a chanve, indonaa kalte chanvo chu, beram 3,37,500 ani a." 
Numbers31:37 tin, LALPA chhiah beram chu 675." 
Numbers31:38 Tin, bawng chu 36,000 ani a; chu mia LALPA chhiah chu 72 a ni a." 
Numbers31:39 Tin, sabengtung chu 3,500 ani a; chu mia LALPA chhiah chu 61 a ni." 
Numbers31:40 Tin, mihring chu 16,000 an ni a; chu mia LALPA chhiah chu mi 32 an ni." 
Numbers31:41 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia thu apek angin chhiah, LALPA then thilhlan chu Mosia'n puithiam Eleazara a pe a." 
Numbers31:42 Tin, Mosia'n ral kap mite an chanvo a pek zawh a, Israelho chanvo chu," 
Numbers31:43 beram 3,37,500" 
Numbers31:44 bawng 36,000" 
Numbers31:45 sabengtung 30,500 mihring 16,000" 
Numbers31:46 Israel hoin an chan atang chuan Mosia chuan mihring leh ran sawmnga zelah pakhat a la a. 
Numbers31:47 LALPA thupek angin LALPA biak buk enkawltu Levi-ho a pe a. 
Numbers31:48 Tin, sipaite chunga hotu te, za chunga hotu te chuan Mosia an va hnaih a." 
Numbers31:49 Mosia hnenah, ""I chhiahhlawhte hian kan kuta awm indo mite chu kan chhiar a, tumah kim lo kan awm lo a." 
Numbers31:50 Tin, kan nuna atan LALPA hmaa inremna siamna turin LALPA tana thilhlan miin an neihzawng rangkachaka siam cheimawi thuam, kebun te, banbun te, hming nemna zungbun te, bengbeh te, thi te kan rawn la e,"" an ti a." 
Numbers31:51 Tin, Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan rangkachaka siam an thuam zawng zawng chu an lo la a." 
Numbers31:52 Sang chunga hotu leh za chunga hotute rangkachak LALPA hnena then thilhlana an hlan zawng zang chu sekel 16,750 a ni." 
Numbers31:53 (Ralkap mite chu an rallak sum chu mahni tan theuha la an ni a.)Tin, Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan sang chunga hotu leh za chunga hotute rangkachak chu an la a, Israela thlahte hriatrengna atan inbiakna puan inah LALPA hmaah an rawn la a." 
Numbers31:54 Tin, Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan sang chunga hotu leh za chunga hotute rangkachak chu an la a, Israela thlahte hriatrengna atan inbiakna puan inah LALPA hmaah an rawn la a." 
Numbers32:1 Reubena leh Gada thlahte chuan ran an ngah hle ma a: tin, Jazer ram leh Gilead ram an hmuh chuan a hmun chu ran tana hmun tha tak niin an hri aa;" 
Numbers32:2 tichuan Gada thlahte leh Reubena thlahte chuan Mosia leh puithiam Eleazra leh pungkhawmho puipate chu an va bia a," 
Numbers32:3 Israel pungkhawmho hmaa LALPA'n a tihtlawm ram Atarot te, Dibon te, Jazer te, Nimra te, Hesbon te, Eleale te, Sebam te, Nebo te, Beon te chu ran tana tha tak ram a ni a, tin, i chhiahhlawhte hian ran kan nei a;" 
Numbers32:4 Israel pungkhawmho hmaa LALPA'n a tihtlawm ram Atarot te, Dibon te, Jazer te, Nimra te, Hesbon te, Eleale te, Sebam te, Nebo te, Beon te chu ran tana tha tak ram a ni a, tin, i chhiahhlawhte hian ran kan nei a;" 
Numbers32:5 rem i tihzawng a nih chuan he ram hi kan luah atan min pe la, Jordan lui min hruai kai lo mai rawh khai,"" an ti a." 
Numbers32:6 Tin, Mosia chuan Gada thlahte leh Reubena thlahte hnenah chuan, ""In unaute chu indonaah an kal ang a, nangni chu hetah hian in lo awm mai ang maw?" 
Numbers32:7 Engati nge LALPA'n a pek rama lut lo tura Israel thlahte rilru in tihzam dawn? 
Numbers32:8 Kanes-barnea atanga ram va thlithlai tura ka tirh khan hetiang bawk hian in pute chuan an ti a. 
Numbers32:9 Eskol ruam an han thlen chhoh khan ram chu an han hmu a, LALPA'n ram a pekah chuan an luh lohna turin Israel thlahte rilru an tihzamsak a." 
Numbers32:10 Tichuan chu mi ni chuan LALPA thin chu a alh a," 
Numbers32:11 Aigupta ram ata lo chhuak, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam mi reng reng chuan Abrahama, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnan chhechhama ka pek ram chu tuma'n an hmu lo vang: min zui tak tak loh avangin:" 
Numbers32:12 Keniz mi Jephunea fapa Kaleba leh Nuna fapa Josuate chauh lo chuan, anni chuan, LALPA chu an zui tak tak avangin,' tiin chhia a chham a." 
Numbers32:13 Tin, Israel-hote chungah LALPA thin chu a alh a, LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo titu chhuan zawng zawng an boral vek hma loh chuan thlalerah kum sawmli a vah a vahtir a." 
Numbers32:14 Tin, ngai teh u, Israelte chunga LALPA thinurna tihbaiawm tak belhchhain nangni chhuan sual hian in pute ai in awh ta a." 
Numbers32:15 LALPA zui loa in awm miau chuan anniho hi thlalerah a awmtir leh mai dawn ani a. Heng mi zawng zawngte hi in tiboral mai ang a sin,"" a ti a." 
Numbers32:16 Tin, an va hnaih a, a hnenah, ""Heah hian kan ran tan beram huangte leh kan fanaute tan khuate kan siam ang a," 
Numbers32:17 keini erawh chu an hmun tur kan thlen hma loh chuan Israel thlahte hmaa kal zel turin kan inralthuam diam ang e: hemi rama mite avang hian kan fanaute chu kulh nei khuaahte an awm ang a," 
Numbers32:18 Israel thlah mi tinin an hmun luah tur an luah theuh hma loh chuan kan in lamah kan haw lo ang. 
Numbers32:19 Kan luah tur chu he lam ral Jordan chhak lam a nih avangi Jordan ral lehlam leh a piah lam chu kan luahpi dawn lo nia,"" an ti a." 
Numbers32:20 Tin, Mosia'n an hnenah, ""Chutianga in tih a, indonaa LALPA hmaa kal tura in inralthuam a," 
Numbers32:21 a hma ata a hmelmate a hnawhchhuah a, LALPA hmaa ram chu hneh a nih hma loha in zinga inralthuam zawng zawngten LALPA hmaa Jordan in kai vek chuan, nakinah in haw ang a," 
Numbers32:22 LALPA chungah leh Israelte chungah in thiam lo lo dawn nia: tichuan he ram hi LALPA hmaa in luah tur a lo ni ang a. 
Numbers32:23 amaherawhchu chutianga in tih loh chuan ngai teh u, LALPA chungah in sual ani ang a, in sual chuan a hmu chhuak ngei ngei ang che u tih hre rawh u." 
Numbers32:24 In fanaute tan khuate siam u la, in beramte tan pawh huangte siam u la, in sawi ang chuan ti rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Numbers32:25 Tin, Gada thlahte leh Reubena thlahte chuan Mosia hnenah, ""I chhiahhlawhte hian kan pu thupek ang chuan kan ti ang e." 
Numbers32:26 Kan nupui fanaute, kan beram rual te, kan ran rualz awng zawngte chu Gilead ram khuaahte hian an lo awm ang a;" 
Numbers32:27 amaherawhchu i chhiahhlawh, indo tura ralthuam zang zawngte chuan kan pu sawi ang chuan LALPA hmaah kan va kal ang e,"" tiin an sawi a." 
Numbers32:28 Chutichuan Mosia chuan an chungchang thuah chuan puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te, Israela hnam chhungkaw puipate chu thu a pe a." 
Numbers32:29 Tin, Mosia chuan an hnenah, ""Gada thlahte, Reubena thlah te, indo tura inralthuam zawng zawngte hian LALPA hmaa Jordan lui an kaipui che u a, ram chu in hmin chuan Gilead ram chu an luah atan in pe tur a ni:" 
Numbers32:30 amaherawhchu inralthuama an kaipui loh che u chuan Kanaan ramah in zingah an tel ve mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Numbers32:31 Tin, Gada thlahte leh Reubena thlahte chuan, ""I chhiahhlawhte hnena LALPA'n a sawi ang chuan kan ti ang," 
Numbers32:32 inralthuama LALPA hmaah Kanaan ramah kaiin kan lut ang a, tichuan kan ram luah tur chu Jordan lui piah lamah a la ni reng ang,"" tiin an chhang a," 
Numbers32:33 Tin, Mosia chuan Gada thlahte leh Reubena thlahte leh Josefa ta Manasea thlah hnam chanve te chu Amor lal Sihona ram te, Basan lal Oga ram, chung ramte chu a khaw awm zawng zawng nen, a vel ram khuate nen lam a pe a." 
Numbers32:34 Tin, Gada thlahte chuan Dibon te, Atarot te, Aroer te;" 
Numbers32:35 Atrot-sophan te, Jezer te, Jogbeha te;" 
Numbers32:36 Betnimra te, Betharan te an din a, khawpui kulh nei te, beram huang te nen." 
Numbers32:37 Tin, Reubena thlahte chuan Hesbon te, Eleale te, Diriathaim te," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo te, Baal-meon te, (a hmingte hi tihdanglam tak a ni) Sibma te an din a; an khaw siamte chu hming dang an vuah a." 
Numbers32:39 Tin, Manasea fapa Makira thlahte chu Gilead ramah an kal a, an la a, Amor-ho chuta awmte chu an chhuhsak a." 
Numbers32:40 Tin, Mosia Gilead ram chu Manasea fapa Makira chu a pe a; chutah chuan a awm a." 
Numbers32:41 Tin, Manasea fapa Jaira chuan chunga khuate chu a va la a, Havot-jair a vuah a,Tin, Noba chuan Kenat a va la a, a khawperte nen, ama hming chawiin Boba a vuah a." 
Numbers32:42 Tin, Noba chuan Kenat a va la a, a khawperte nen, ama hming chawiin Boba a vuah a." 
Numbers33:1 Mosia leh Arona kaihhruaia Aigupta ram ata a pawl pawla an chhuah a, an kal zel dan chu hetiang hian a ni," 
Numbers33:2 LALPA thupeka an kal chhuah a, an kal zelnate chu Mosia'n a ziak a: an kal chhuaha an kalnate chu hengahte hian a ni." 
Numbers33:3 Thla khatna, thlakhatna ni sawm leh ni nga niin Ramases atangin an chhuak a; kalhlen kut tuk chuan, Aigupta mite mithmuhah," 
Numbers33:4 an fa tir zawng zawng LALPA'n a tihhlumsak an phum laiin Israela thlahte chu muk takin an chhuak a: LALPA'n an pathiante pawh a hrem a. 
Numbers33:5 Tichuan Israela thlahte chu Rameses atangin an chhuak a, Sukot-ah awmhmun an khua a." 
Numbers33:6 Tin, Sukot atangin an chhuak a, thlaler tawntirha Etham-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:7 tin, Etham atang chuan an chhuak a, Baal-zephon bula Pi-hahirot lamah an tawlh kir leh a, Migdal bulah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:8 Tin, Hahirot bul ata chu an chhuak a, tuifinriat an kal tlang a, thlalerah an lut a: tin, Etham thlalerah ni thum kal an kal a, Mara-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:9 Tin, Mara atang chuan anc hhuak a, Elim an thleng a; Elim-ah chuan tuihna sawm leh pahnih leh tum kung sawmsarih a awm a; chutah chauh awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:10 Tin, Elim atang chuan an chhuak a, Tuifinriat Sen bulah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:11 Tin, Tuifinriat Sen atang chuan an chhuak a, Sin thlalerah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:12 Sin thlaler atang chuan an chhuak a, Dopka-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:13 Tin, Dopka atang chuan an chhuak a, Alus-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:14 Alus atang chuan an chhuak a. Rephidim-ah awmhmun an khuar a, chutah chuan mipuite tui in tur a awm lo a." 
Numbers33:15 Tin, Rephidim atang chuan an chhuak a, Sinai thlalerah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:16 Tin, thlaler atang chuan an chhuak a, Kibrot-hat-tava-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:17 Tin, Kibrot-hat-tava atang chuan an chhuak a, Hazerot-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:18 Hazerot atang chuan an chhuak a, Ritma-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:19 Tin, Ritma atang chuan an chhuak a, Rimon-perez-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:20 Rimon-peraz-ah awmhmun an khuar a. Libna-ah awmhmun an khuar a. 
Numbers33:21 Libna atang chuan an chhuak a, Risa-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:22 Tin, Risa atang chuan an chhuak a, Kehelatha-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:23 Tin, Kehelatha atang chuan an chhuak a, Sepher tlangah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:24 Tin, Sepher tlang atang chuan an chhuak a, Harada-ah awmhmun an khaur a." 
Numbers33:25 Tin, Harada atang chuan an chhuak a, Malkhelot-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:26 Tin, Makhelot atang chuan an chhuak a, Tahat-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:27 Tin, Tahat atang chuan an chhuak a, Tera-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:28 Tin, Tera atang chuan an chhuak a, Mitka-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:29 Tin, Mitka atang chuan an chhuak a, Hasmona-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:30 Hasmona atag chuan an chhuak a, Moserot-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:31 Tin, Moserot atang chuan an chhuak a, Beneserot atang chuan an chhuak a, Benejaakan-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:32 Tin, Bene-jaakan atang chuan an chhuak a, Hor-hagidgad-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:33 Tin, Hor-hagidgad atang chuan an chhuak a, Jotbatha-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:34 Tin, Jotbatha atang chuan an chhuak a, Abrona-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:35 Tin, Abrona atang chuan an chhuak a, Ezion-geber-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:36 Tin, Ezion-geber atang chuan an chhuak a, Zin thlalerah awmhmun an khuar a (chu chu Kades an ti bawk)." 
Numbers33:37 Tin, Kades atang chuan an chhuak a, Edom ram dep Hor tlangah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:38 Tin, puithiam Arona chu LALPA thupekin Hor tlangah chuan a han chho a, Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah kum sawmli ku, thla ngana, ni khat niin chutah chuan a thi a." 
Numbers33:39 Tichuan Arona chu Hor tlanga a thih chuan kum 123 a ni. 
Numbers33:40 Tin, Kanaan mi, Kanaan rama Chhima awm Arad lal chuan Israela thlahte lo kal chu a lo hria a." 
Numbers33:41 Tin, Hor tlang atang chuan an chhuak a, Zalmon-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:42 Tin, Zalmon atang chuan an chhuak a, Punon-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:43 Tin, Punon atang chuan an chhuak a, Obot-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:44 Obot atang chuan an chhuak a, Moab ram dep Iye-abarim-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:45 Tin, Iyim atang chuan an chhuak a, Dibongad-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:46 Tin, Dibon0gad atang chuan an chhuak a, Almon-nibla-thaim-ah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:47 Tin, Almon-diblathamim atang chuan an chhuak a, Bebo bula Abarim tlangahte chuan awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:48 Tin, Abarim tlang atangte chuan an chhuak a, Jeriko zawn, Jordan kam Moab phaiah awmhmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:49 Jordan kam Betjesimot atanga Able-sitim thlengin Moab phaiah awmhmun an khuar a. 
Numbers33:50 Tin, Jeriko zawn, Jordan kam Moab phaiah chuan LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers33:51 Israela thlahte chu bia la, an hnenah," 
Numbers33:52 Israela thlahte chu bia la, an hnenah; Jordan lui in kan a, Kanaan ram in luh hun chuan," 
Numbers33:53 chu mi rama awm zawng zawngte chu in hnawt chhuak vek ang a, an lung milem zawng zawngte chu in tichhe vek ang a, an milem chhunte in tichhe vek ang a, an hmunsangte pawh in thiat vek tur a ni:" 
Numbers33:54 tin, ram chu in luah ang a, chutah chuan in awm ang: in luah atan ram chu ka pe tawh che u a ni." 
Numbers33:55 Tin, a chi zir ang zelin thumvawrin ram chu in luah ang a, a rual deuhte chu ram zau deuh in pe ang a, a rual lo deuhte chu ram zim deuh in pe ang: thumvawra a tlukna apiang chu an pual ani ang a; in pi leh pute chi kal dan ang zelin in luah tur a ni." 
Numbers33:56 Amaherawhchu chu mi rama awmte chu in hnawhchhuah loh chuan in awmtirte chu in mit atan chhuntu leh in pang atan te hling an g an ni ang a, in awmna ramah chuan an timangang ang che u.Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an chunga tih ka rilruk ang chu in chungah ka ti ang,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Numbers33:57 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an chunga tih ka rilruk ang chu in chungah ka ti ang,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Numbers34:1 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers34:2 Israela thlahte chu thu pe la, an hnenah 'Kanaan ram in thlen hun chuan (Kanaan ram, a ramri zir ang zela in luah tur ram chu)" 
Numbers34:3 chhim lama in luah tur chin chu Zin thlaler atanga Edom ram hrul zel a ni ang a, chhim lam ramri chu Tuifinriat Al tawp atanga chhak lampang a ni ang:" 
Numbers34:4 tin, in ramri chu Akrabim chhohna chhim lampangah a kawi ang a, Zin-ah a kal tlang ang a; tin, a lo chhuahna chu Kades-barnea chhim lamah a ni ang: tin, Hazar-adar-ah a kal ang a, Azmonah a kal zel ang:" 
Numbers34:5 tin, ramri chu Azmon atangin Aigupta lui thlengin a kawi ang a, a chhuahna chu tuifinriatah a ni ang." 
Numbers34:6 Tin, thlang lampangah chuan tuifinriat zau chu a ramri atan i chang ang a: hei hi thlang lama in ramri a ni ang." 
Numbers34:7 Tin, hei hi hmar lama in ramri a ni ang: tuifinriat zau atangin Hor tlang huamin i siam ang a;" 
Numbers34:8 Hor tlang atanga Hamat luhna thlengin i siam ang a, ramri chhuahna chu Zedad-ah a ni ang a:" 
Numbers34:9 tin, ramri chu Ziphon-ah a kal zel ang a, tin, a chhuahna chu Hazar-enan-ah a ni ang; hei hi hmar lama in ramri a ni ang." 
Numbers34:10 Tin, chhak lama in ramri chu Hazarenan atangin Sepham thlengin i siam ang a:" 
Numbers34:11 tin, ramri chu Sepham atnagin Ribla thlengin Ain chhak lampangah a chhuak ang a; tichuan, ramri chu a chhuk zel ang a, Kineret tuifinriat chhak lampang a chhun ang a;" 
Numbers34:12 tin, ramri chu Jordan-ah a chhuk ang a, tin, a chhuahna chu Tuifinriat Al-ah a ni ang: hei hi a chhehvela ramri kal dan ang hian in ram a ni ang,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Numbers34:13 Tichuan Mosia chuan Israela thlahte chu thu a pe a, ""Hei hi LALPA'n hnam kua leh a chanve te3 pek tura thu a pek thumvawra in luah tur ram chu a ni;" 
Numbers34:14 Reubena thlahte hnamin an chhungkaw zir zel leh, Gada thlahte hnamin an chhungkaw zir zel leh, manase hnam zatve pawh in an ram luah tur chu a chang ta si a:" 
Numbers34:15 hnam hnih leh hnam zatvee chuan an ram luah tur chu ni chhuahna lam Jeriko zawn Jordan ral chhak lamah an chang tawh a,"" tiin." 
Numbers34:16 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers34:17 Luah tura ram thensawmpuitute hming chu hengte hi a n: puithiam Eleazara leh Nuna fapa Josua te hi. 
Numbers34:18 Tin, ram luah tur thentu atan hnam tin, zinga puipa pakhat theuhin thlang tur a ni,"" tiin." 
Numbers34:19 Chung mite hming chu he'ng hi a niL Juda hnama mi Jephunea fapa Kaleba. 
Numbers34:20 Tin, Simeona thlahte hnama mi Amihuda fapa Semuela" 
Numbers34:21 Tin, Benjamin hnama mi Kishlona fapa Elidada." 
Numbers34:22 Dana thlahte hnam zinga puipa Joglia fapa Bukia. 
Numbers34:23 Josefa thlahte zinga mi, Manasea thlahte puipa Ephoda fapa Haniela:" 
Numbers34:24 Ephraim thlahte hnam zinga puipa Siptana fapa Kemuela. 
Numbers34:25 Tin, Zebuluna thlahte hnam zinga puipa Parnaka fapa Elizaphana," 
Numbers34:26 Isakara thlahte hnam zinga puipa Azana fapa Patiela. 
Numbers34:27 Asera thlahte hnam zinga puipa Selomia fapa Ahihuda," 
Numbers34:28 Naphtalia thlahte zinga puipa Amihuda fapa Padahela,Hengho hi Kanaan rama Israela thlah ram luah tur sem tura LALPA'n thu apekate chu an ni." 
Numbers34:29 Hengho hi Kanaan rama Israela thlah ram luah tur sem tura LALPA'n thu apekate chu an ni. 
Numbers35:1 Tin, Jeriko zawn Jordan kam, Moab phaiah chuan LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers35:2 Israela thlahte chu thu pe la, an ramahte chuan Levi-ho awmna tur khuae siamsak rawh se; tin, ran tlatna turin khaw daikiang velte Levi-ho in pe tur a ni." 
Numbers35:3 Kuate chu an awmna tur ani ang a, a velte chu an bawng leh an ran, an thil vulh zawng zawng tan a ni ang." 
Numbers35:4 Tin, daikiang Levi-ho in pek tur chu khaw kulh atanga tawng 1,000-a thui ani tur a ni." 
Numbers35:5 Tin, kulh pawn lam atangin in teh ang a, chhak lampangah tawng 2,000 chhim lampangah tawn 2,000, thlang lampangah tawng 2,000, hmar lampangah tawng 2,000, khua a lai taka awmin. Hei hi an daikiang pual ani ang." 
Numbers35:6 Tin, Lev-ho in pek tur khuate chu tualthatte tlanna'n tual tlanna khaw paruk a ni ang a; chung lo chu khaw sawmli leh khaw hnih in pe bawk tur a ni." 
Numbers35:7 Levi-ho in pek tur khua zawng zawng chu khaw sawmli leh khaw riat a ni ang: daikiang nen in pe tur a ni. 
Numbers35:8 Israela thlahte luah khua in pek dan tur chu, a tam deuh atangin in pe tam ang a, a tlem deuh atangin in pe tlem ang a, mi tinin an luah ram tam dan azirin an khua chu Levi-ho an pe tur a ni,"" tiin." 
Numbers35:9 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers35:10 Israela thlahte bia la, an hnenah, 'Jordan lui in kaia Kanaan ram in luh hun chuan" 
Numbers35:11 tualtlanna khua tur khua in inruat tur a ni, tualthat palhtu tlanna'n." 
Numbers35:12 Chung khuate chu phubalatu laka in tualtlanna ani ang;;ungkhawm hmaa rorelsak tura a din hmaa tualthattu chu a thih lohna'n. 
Numbers35:13 Tichuan, in tan tualtlanna tur in ruatte chu khaw paruk a ni ang." 
Numbers35:14 Jordan ralah khaw thum in ruat ang a, Kanaan ramah khaw thum in ruat ang a, tualtlana khuate ani ang." 
Numbers35:15 Israela thlahte leh hnam dang leh an hnena chengte tan he khaw paruk hi tualtlana a ni ang: chutah chuan tupawh mi that apiang an tlan dawn nia. 
Numbers35:16 Amaherawhchu thir hmanga mi a bei a, a thih chuan tualthat a ni a: tualthat chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni." 
Numbers35:17 Tin, thi khawpa lunga mi a chhuta a thih chuan tualthat ani a, tualthat chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni." 
Numbers35:18 Tin, thi khawpa mi thinga a vuak a, a thih chuan tualthat ani a, tualthat chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni." 
Numbers35:19 Thisen phuba latu chuan tualthattu chu a that nghal mai ang: a hmuh hun apiangin a tihlum tur a ni. 
Numbers35:20 Tin, mi ahuat vanga anam vak emaw, lo chang rua a vawm emaw a thihin emaw" 
Numbers35:21 intaina avanga chum hhlum emaw chuan, a tihlumtu chu tihhlum ngei tur a ni; tualthata ni: thisen phuba latu chuan a hmuh hun apiangin a tihlum tur a ni." 
Numbers35:22 Amaherawhchu intai vang ni lem loa nam thut emaw," 
Numbers35:23 tin, chang ni kher loa mi an awm tih pawh hre lo a, a hmelma pawh ni lo a, a pawi khawih pawh tum ni chuang loa lung emawa a den a, mi a lo thi ta a nih chuan" 
Numbers35:24 pungkhawmhoin he'ng rorelna dan ang hian a tihlumtu chu thisen phuba latu ro chu an relsak tur a ni. 
Numbers35:25 Tin, pungkhawmho chuan tualthattu chu thisen phuba latu lak ata chu a hum ang a, pungkhawmho chuan atlanna, a tualtllan khuaah chuan an awmtir leh ang a, hriak thianghlima thih puithiam lal tanglai thih hma chu chutah chuan a awm tur a ni." 
Numbers35:26 Amaherawhchu englai pawhin tualthattu chuan a tlanna, a tualtlanna kahw ramri pawn lama a kal a," 
Numbers35:27 thisen phuba latuin a tualtlanna khaw panw a hmuha thisen phuba latuin a thah chuan thisenah chuan thiam oloh a chang lo ang," 
Numbers35:28 puithiam lal a thih hma loh chu a tualtlanna khuaa awm reng tur anih avangn; puithiam a thih hnu erawh chuan tualthattu chu a awmna ramah chuan a haw leh tur a ni. 
Numbers35:29 Heng thil hi in thlahte thlenga in awmna apiang in rorel dan tur ani ang. 
Numbers35:30 Tupawhin mi a thah chuan tualthhattu chu hretute ka atanga thu chhuakin tihhlum tur a ni: amaherawhchu hretu pakhat chu mi tihhlumna tur chuan a tak lo. 
Numbers35:31 Tin, tualthattu chu in tlan tur ani lo, thihna khawpa thiam looh chang a ni a, tihhlum ngei tur ani zawk." 
Numbers35:32 tin, tualtlnna khuaa tlan chu chutih laia puithiam lal thih hma chuan a awmna khaw hluia kir leh tur tlan phal a ni lo ang." 
Numbers35:33 Chutichuan in awmna ram chu in tibawlhhlawh lo ang a: thisen chuan ram chu a tibawlhhlawh a, thisen chhuahna ram tihbawlhlawh silna'n a chhuahtu thisen ngawt lo chu hman theih a ni si lo.In awmna ram, ka awmna hi in tibawlhlawh tur ani lo, kei LALPA chu Israela thlahte zingah ka awm si a,' ti rawh"" tiin." 
Numbers35:34 In awmna ram, ka awmna hi in tibawlhlawh tur ani lo, kei LALPA chu Israela thlahte zingah ka awm si a,' ti rawh"" tiin." 
Numbers36:1 Tin, Josefa chhungte zinga mi, Manasea fa Makira fapa Gilead thlahte chhungkaw puipate zinga mite chuan an rawn hnaih a, Mosia leh hotu, Israela thlah puipate hmaah chuan thu an sawi a:" 
Numbers36:2 LALPA chuan kan pu chu Israela thlahte chu thumvawra an luah tur ram pe turin thu a pe a: tin, LALPA-in kan pu chu kan unaupa Zelophehada luah tur chu a fanue pe turin thu a pe a." 
Numbers36:3 Tin, anni chuan Israela thlahte zinga mi, hnam dang tu fate pawh nei se la, kan pi leh pute ram an luah chu laksak a, an va telnate hnam ramah belh tur ani ang a: chutiang chuan kan ram chanpual ata chu thehchhuah a lo ni ang a." 
Numbers36:4 Tin, Israela thlahte Jubili a lo th len hun chuan an ram chu an va telna turte apiang hnam ramah belh a ni ang a chutichuan kan pi leh pute hnam ram ata chu an ram lak hek a lo ni dawn a,"" an ti a." 
Numbers36:5 Tin, Mosia chuan LALPA thu angin Israela thlahte chu thu a pe a, ""Josefa fapate hnam hian an saiw dik a ni." 
Numbers36:6 Zelophehada fanute chungchang thua LALPA'n thu a pek chu heti hian a ni, 'Tha an tih apiang nei se la, amaherawhchu an pate hnampui zinga mi ngei an nei tur a ni,' tiin." 
Numbers36:7 Chutichuan Israela thlahte ram chu hnam dang dang hnanah sawn sawn a ni lo ang. Israela thlahte chuan an pi leh pute hnam ram chu an chang reng tur a ni. 
Numbers36:8 Tin, Israela thlahte zinga roluahtu tur fanu apiang chu Israela tlahten an pi leh pute ram an luah theuh zel theihna'n a pa hnampui zinga m ngei nupui a ni tur a ni." 
Numbers36:9 Chutichuan ram chu hnam dang dang hnenah sawn sawn a ni dawn lo nia. Israelathlahte chuan anmahni ram theuh chu an chang reng tur nai si a,"" tiin." 
Numbers36:10 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang chiahin Zelophehada fanute chuan an ti a." 
Numbers36:11 Zelophehada fanu Malai te, Tirzat te, Hoglai te, Malkai te, Novai te chuan an pa unauva fapate an nei a ni." 
Numbers36:12 Josefa fa Manasea fapate an nei a, an ram chu an pa hnamah chuan an awm reng a ni.Heng hi LALPA'n Mosia hmanga Jeriko zawn Jordan rala Moab phaia Israela thlahte a pek, thupekte leh rorel dante chu a ni." 
Numbers36:13 Heng hi LALPA'n Mosia hmanga Jeriko zawn Jordan rala Moab phaia Israela thlahte a pek, thupekte leh rorel dante chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Heng thu hi Jordan chhak lam thlaler, Paran leh Tophel leh Laban leh Hazeroth leh Di-zahab inkara Suph va dep Araba-a Mosia'n Israel mi zawng zawng hnena a sawi chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Horeb tlang atangin Kodesbarnea chu Seir tlang lam kawngah ni sawm leh ni khat kal a ni. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Tin, kum sawmli kum, thla sawm leh thla khatna, chu mi thla ni khat ni chuan, heti hi a ni a, LALPA'n anmahni hrilh tura thu a pek ang zawng zawng chu Israela thlahte hnenah Mosia'n a sawi a;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 Hesbon-a awm Amor-ho lal Sihona leh Edrei leh Astarot-a awm Basan leh Oga a thah hnuin 
Deuteronomy1:5 Jordan chhak lam Moab ramah he dan hi Mosia'n a puang tan ta a," 
Deuteronomy1:6 LALPA kan Pathian chuan Horeb tlangah min bia a, 'He tlangah hian in awm rei tawh tawh e:" 
Deuteronomy1:7 insuan tawh u la, kal chhuak u la, Amor ho tlang ramah leh a chhehvel zawng zawng, Araba-ahte, tlang ramah te, phai ramah te, chhim ramah te, Kanaan-hote awmna tuifinriat kamahte leh Lebanonah te, luipui, Euphrates lui thlengin kal rawh u." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ngai teh u, ram chu ka pe tawh diam a che u: in pu Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te leh an hnua an thlah leh zelte hnena chhechhama LALPA'n a pek ram chu va luah rawh u,' tiin." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Tin, chu m lai chuan in hnenah, 'Keimah ngawt chuan ka zo lo che u a;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 LALPA in Pathian chuan a tipung che u a, ngai teh u, tunah hian in tam lam chu vana arsi zat zet in lo ni ta a." 
Deuteronomy1:11 LALPA, in i leh pute Pathian chuan tun aia a let sangin tipung che u se la, a tiam che u angin malsawm che u rawh se." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Engtin nge keimah chauhin in buaina te, in phurrit te, in innghirnghona te chu ka phurh zawh ang?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 In hnam zinga mi, mi fing, hmanghre mi, chingchang hre mite in thlang chhuak ula, in chunga hotuah ka siam ang e,' tiin ka bia che u a." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Tin, nangin, 'I thil sawi chu kan tan atha hle mai,' tiin mi chhang a." 
Deuteronomy1:15 chutichuan in hnam hotute chu ka pawm a, in ham zinga mi, mi fing, chinchang hre mite in chunga hotuah ka siam a, sang chunga hotu te, za chunga hotu te, sawmnga chunga hotu te, sawm chunga hotu te, puipate pawh." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Tin, chu mi lai chuan in roreltu chu, 'In unaute kara thu chu ngaihthlaksak u la, unau leh unau karah leh ram dang mi, a awmpui nena an karah fel takin rel rawh u." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Rorelnaah thlei bik in nei tur ani lo; mi te leh mi lian ang rengin in ngaihthlaksak tur a ni; tumah in lau tur a ni lo; rorelna chu Pathian ta a ni si a: in tana thu khirh luuk chu ka hnenah in rawn thlen thin ang a, tin, chu chu ka lo ngaithla thin ang, tiin thu ka pe a." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Tin, chu mi lai chuan thil in tih dan tur zawng zawngah thu ka pe che u a." 
Deuteronomy1:19 Tin, LALPA'n thu min pek angin Horeb tlang atang chuan kan chhuak a. Amor-ho tlang ram kawnga thlaler zau tak leh rapthlak tak in hmuh kha kan kal tlang vek a, Kades- barnea khua kan va thleng a." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Tin, in hnenah,""LALPA kan Pathianin min pek Amor-ho tlang ram chu in lo thleng ta a." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Ngai teh u, LALPA in Pathianin ram chu a pe tawh diam che u a ni; chho u la, LALPA in pi leh pute Pathianin a lo sawi tawh ang khan han luah rawh u; hlau suh ula, zam hek suh u,' ka ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Tin, ka hnenah in lo kal vek a, 'A ram te va thlithlai a, kan chhohna tur lam kawng leh kan va kalna tur khaw chanchinte min rawn hrilh leh turin kan hmaah min va tir i la, in ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:23 chu chuan min tilawm hle mai a; tichuan in zing mi mi sawm leh pahnih, hnam khat a pakhat zel ka thlang a;" 
Deuteronomy1:24 tichuan an chhuak ta a, tlangah chuan an lawn chho a, Eskol ruam an han thleng a, an en thlithlai vek a." 
Deuteronomy1:25 chu rama theite chu an lo a, min rawn hawn a, chanchin min rawn thlen a, 'LALPA kan Pathianin ram min pek chu tha tak a ni,' an ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Nimahsela in chho duh l a, LALPA in Pathian thupek chu in helsan a;" 
Deuteronomy1:27 in puan inahte in phunawi a, 'LALPA chuan min hruat avangin min tiboral tura Amor-hote kuta pek turin Aigupta tam" 
Deuteronomy1:28 Khawiah chuan nge kan han chhoh vang? Kan unaute chuan, Mihring chu kan aiin a n lian a, an sang zawk bawk a; khuate chu a lian hle a, van tawngin kulh a nei; tin, Anak-ho thlahte pawh kan hmu bawk a, tiin akn thinlung an titui a, ' in ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Tin, keiin in hnenah Anmahni chu tih suh u la, hlau bawk hek suh u." 
Deuteronomy1:30 LALPA in Pathian in hmahruaitu chuan in mithmuha Aigupta rama a tihsak tak che u zawng zawng ang khan a beihpui ang che u a," 
Deuteronomy1:31 thlalerah pawh miin a fa a pua angin LALPA in Pathian chuan he mi hmun in thlan thleng hian kawng tluanin a puakzia che u in hmuh kha, ka ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Nimahsela chuti chung pawhin in puan in zarna tur zawnsak tur leh in kalkawng kawhhmuh tura zana meia, chuna chhuma in hmahruaitu LALPA in Pathian chu in ring lo a." 
Deuteronomy1:33 Nimahsela chuti chung pawhin in puan in zarna tur zawnsak tur leh in kalkawng kawhhmuh tura zana meia, chuna chhuma in hmahruaitu LALPA in Pathian chu in ring lo a." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Tin, LALPA'n in thusawi chu a lo hria a, a thinrim a," 
Deuteronomy1:35 He chhuan sual taka mi hi chuan pakhat te mahin in pi leh pute pek tura chhia ka chham ram tah tak chu an hmu lo ang a," 
Deuteronomy1:36 Jephunea fapa Kaleba chauh lo chuan; ani zawngin a hmu ang; a va rah ram chu amah leh a fate ka pe ang, ani chuan LALPA chu a pawm tlat avangin,' tiin chhia a chham a." 
Deuteronomy1:37 nangmahni avangin ka chungah pawh LALPA chu a thinur a, 'Nang pawh hi chutah chuan i lut lo ang: " 
Deuteronomy1:38 i rawngbawltu Nuna fapa Josuia hi chu a lut ang; ani hi fuih rawh, Israel -hote chu a luahtir dawn a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:39 In fanu te te, rallakin an la mai ang, in tih leh, tuna a chhia a a tha la hre lo in fate hi an lut ang a, anni chu ka pe ang a, an luah ang." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Nangni erawh chu insuan u la, Tuifinriat Sen lamah thlalerah kal rawh u,' tiin." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Tin, nangnin, 'LALPA chungah kan lo sual ta a ni, kan han chho ang a, LALPA kan Pathianin thu min pek zawng zawng angin kan han bei ang e,' tin, min chhang a. Tichuan indona thuamhnaw in inbel theuh a, tlang han chhoh chu thil namenah in ngai a." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Tin, LALPA'n ka hnenah, 'chho suh u, han bei bawk hek suh u; in zingah ka awm si lo, in hmelmate chuan an lo tihlum dah ang che u, an hnenah ti rawh,' mi ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:43 chu chu ka hrilh che u a, in pawm lo a, LALPA thupekm chu in helsan ta zawk a, tlangah chuan in han chho lui ta a." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Tin, chu tlanga awm Amor-ho chuan an lo bei che u a, khuai mi um angin an lo um che u a, Seir atangin Horma thlangin an that zel che u a." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Tin, in lo kir leh a, LALPA hmaah in tap a; nimahsela, LALPA chuan in aw chu a ngaithla duh lo a, a beng pawh a rawn chhi duh lo a.chutichuan chuta in awm chhung chu han ngaihtuahin Kades-ah chuan rei tak in awm a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:46 chutichuan chuta in awm chhung chu han ngaihtuahin Kades-ah chuan rei tak in awm a ni. 
Deuteronomy2:1 Tin, kan insuan a, LALPA'n ka hnena a sawi angin Tuifinriat Sen lamah thlalerah kan lut ta a; Seir tlang chu rei tak kan vel a." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Tin, LALPA chuan mi bia a," 
Deuteronomy2:3 He tlang hi in vel rei tawk tawh e; hmar lam panin insuan tawh rawh u. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Mipuite chu Seir tlanga awm, Esauva thlah in unaute ramah in kal tlang dawn a ni; anni chuan an lo hlau vang che u a; chuvangin fimkhur hle u la;" 
Deuteronomy2:5 bei suh ang che u; an ram chu a khawii lai mah, kephaha rah khawp lek pawh ka pe dawn hauh lo a che u; Seir tlang chu apualah Esauva ka pe tawh a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:6 An chaw te chu in eiah sumin in lei ang a; tin, an tuite chu in inah sumin in lei bawk tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:7 LALPA in Pathian chuan in thawh apiangah te mal a sawm thin che u a, he thlaler zau tak hi in kal tlang dan te chu a hre si a; he'ng kum sawmli chhung zawng hian LALPA chu inhnenah a awm a, engmah in tlakchham loh kha, tiin thu pe rawh,' tiin." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Chutichuan Elat leh Ezion-geber atangin Arba kawnga kalin Seir tlanga awm Esauva thlah kan unaute ram kan pal tlang a. Tin, kan insuan a, Moab thlaler lamah kan kal a." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Tin, LALPA'n ka hnenah, 'Moab-ho chu tibuai suh u la, ral beiin bei suh u; an ram chu in pualah ka pe dawn lo a che u, Lota thlahte pualah Ar chu ka pe tawh a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Tun hma lam chuan Anak-ho angin mi lian leh tam leh mi sang pui pui Em-ho an awm thin a; 
Deuteronomy2:11 chungho pawh chu Anak-ho ang bawka Repha-ho tih an ni a; nimahsela Moab-ho chuan Em-ho an ti thin a ni. 
Deuteronomy2:12 Tun hma lam chuan Seir tlangah hian Hor-ho pawh an awm bawk thin a; nimahsela Esauva thlahte hian an luahsak a; an that a, a hmunah chuan an awm ta a. Israel-hoin LALPA'n an puala a pek ram an tih ang kha.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Chutichuan tho u la, Zered lui chu kan rawh u khai,' a ti a. Tichuan Zered lui chu kan kan ta a." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Kades-barnea atangin kan chhuak leh a. Zered lui kan kan a, LALPA'n an hnena chhia a chham ang amipui zinga chu mi chhuana ral kap mi zawng zawng an mang vek inkar chu kum sawmthum leh kum riat a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Mipui zing ata an boral der hma loh chuan anmahni tiboral turin LALPA kutin a tai reng bawk a. 
Deuteronomy2:16 Chutianga mipui zing ata ral kap mi zawng zawng an boral a, an lo thih zawh hnu chuan heti hi a ni a," 
Deuteronomy2:17 LALPA'n min bia a," 
Deuteronomy2:18 Vawiinah hian Moab ram Ar chu i kal tlang tur a ni a; 
Deuteronomy2:19 tin, Amona thlahte ep i va thlen hnaih pawhin tibuai suh la, bei hek suh; Amon-ho ram chu i pualah ka pe dawn lo a che, Lota thlahte pualah ka pe tawh a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (chu pawh chu Repha-ho rama ngaih ani bawk; chutah chuan tun hma lamin Repha ho an awm thin a ni; nimahsela Amon-ho chuan Zazum-ho an ti thin a ni: 
Deuteronomy2:21 Anak-ho anga mi lian leh tam leh mi sang pui pui an ni a; nimahsela LALPA'n a tihboralsak a, an luah ve ta thung a, an hmuna chuan an awm ta a;" 
Deuteronomy2:22 Seir tlanga awm Esauva thlahte chu Hor-ho a tihboralsak laia a tih ang khan; tichuan an luah ve ta thung a, an hmunah chuan tun thlenghian an la awm ta a:" 
Deuteronomy2:23 tin, Gaza thlenga khaw te tea awm Av-ho chu Kaptor atanga lo chhuak Kaptor-hoin an tiboral a, an hmunah chuan an awm ta a.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Tho u la, kal chhuak u la, Arnon ruam kan rawh u; ngai teh u, Amor mi Hesbon leh Sihona leh a ram chu ka pe tawh che u a ni; luah phawt u la, ral beiin bei rawh u." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Vawiinah hian, van hnuaichhina hnam tin chungah chuan nangmah tihna leh hlauhna ka awm tantir ang a, i chanchin an lo hria ang a, an khur ang a, nangmah avangin na tak tuarin an awm ang' tiin." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Tin, Kedemot thlaler atangin Hesbon lal Sihona hnenah rem thu kengin mi ka tir a," 
Deuteronomy2:27 I ramah hian mi kal tlangtir rawh khai; lamlianah zel ka kal ang a, ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw pawh ka peng lo ang e." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Ka eiah chaw a leiin sumin mi leitir ang a, ka inah tui pawh sumin mi leitir bawk ang a; Jordan ka kana LALPA kan Pathianin min pek ram ka luh hma loh chuan Seir a awm Esauva thlahte leh Ar-a awm Moab hote mi tih ang khan mi kal tlangtir ringawt mai rawh khai,' tiin." 
Deuteronomy2:29 Ka eiah chaw a leiin sumin mi leitir ang a, ka inah tui pawh sumin mi leitir bawk ang a; Jordan ka kana LALPA kan Pathianin min pek ram ka luh hma loh chuan Seir a awm Esauva thlahte leh Ar-a awm Moab hote mi tih ang khan mi kal tlangtir ringawt mai rawh khai,' tiin." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Nimahsela Hesbon lal Sihona chuan a ramah min kal tlangtir phal lo a; LALPA in Pathian chuan in kuta a pek theihna tur che uin a rilru a tihkhauhsak a, a tiluhlul a ni, in hriat tak ang hian." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Tin, LALPA'n ka hnenah, 'Ngai teh, Sihona leh a ram chu ka pe dawn ta che a ni, a ram chu nei turin luah phawt mai rawh, mi ti a." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Tichuan Sihona leh a mite zawng zawng chu Jahaz-a min bei turin an lo thawk a. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Tin, LALPA kan Pathian chuan min pe a; tichuan amah leh a fapate leh amite zawng zawng chu kan that a." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Tin, chu mi tum chuan a khua zawng zawng chu kan la a, chung khuaa mihring zawng zawng chu, hmeichhia leh fanau te tete nen lam kan tiboral vek a, zuah reng reng kan nei lo a;" 
Deuteronomy2:35 kan lak khuaa rallaka kan lak thil leh rante chauh kan pualah kan la a ni. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Arnon ruam fema Aroer atang leh ruama khaw awm atanga Gilead thlengin kan tan sang lutuk khua a awm hauh lo mai a, LALPA kan Pathianin min pe vek a ni:Amon thlahte ram chauh in hnaih lo a ni, Jabok lui lehlam kam zawng zawng leh tlang rama khuate leh LALPA kan Pathianin min khapna apiangte nen." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Amon thlahte ram chauh in hnaih lo a ni, Jabok lui lehlam kam zawng zawng leh tlang rama khuate leh LALPA kan Pathianin min khapna apiangte nen." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Chutichuan kan insuan a, Basan kawngah kan chho va: Basan lal Oga leh a mite zawng zawng chu Edrei-a min bei turin an lo thawk a." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Tin, LALPA'n ka hnenah, 'Amah chu hlau suh, amah leh a mite zawng zawng leh a ram chu i kutah ka pe tawh diam a ni; Hesbon-a awm Amor-ho lal Sihona chunga i tih ang khan a chungah i ti dawn nia,' a ti a." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Chutichuan LALPA kan Pathian chuan Basan lal Oga pawh a mite zawng zawng nen kan kutah a pe a: tichuan pakhat te mah zuahsak lohin kan that vek a. 
Deuteronomy3:4 chu mi tum chuan a khua zawng zawng khaw sawmruk, Basan-a Oga ram, Argob ram zawng zawng chu kan la vek a; kan laksak loh khaw pakhat te mah a awm lo." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Heng khua zawng zawng hi kulh sang tak tak, kawngkhar leh kalhna nei vek a ni a, kulh nei lo khaw tam tak tiam lo pawhin." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Hesbon leh Sihona chunga kan tih ang khan kan tiboral vek a, khuaa mihring zawng zawng chu kan tiboral vek a, hmeichhia leh an fanaute tete nen lam." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Amaherawhchu ran zawng zawng leh khuaa rallaka kan lak thilte chu kan pualah kan la a. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Chumi tum chuan Jordan rala awm Amor ho lal pahnih kut ata chu Arnon ruam atanga Hermon tlang thlenga ram chu kan la a; 
Deuteronomy3:9 (chu Hermon chu Zodon-ho chuan Sirion an ti a, Amor-ho chuan Senir an ti a ni);" 
Deuteronomy3:10 phai ram khua zawng zawng leh Gilead ram zawng zawng leh Basan ram zawng zawng nen, Basan rama Oga ram khua, Saleka leh Edrei thlengin." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Basan lal Oga chauh a ni, Rephaho zinga la awm chhun chu; ngai teh, a khum chu thir a ni; Amona thlaler khua Raba-ah chuan a la awm reng a ni lo'm ni? Mihring tawnga tehin a dung lam tawng kua, a vang lam tawng li a ni.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Chu mi tum chuan chu mi ram chu kan luah a; Arnon ruam kanga Arorer atangin Gilead tlang ram zatve thlengin, chuta khaw awmte nen Reuben-ho leh Gad-ho ka pe a;" 
Deuteronomy3:13 tin, Gilead ram la awm zawng leh Oga ram Basan zawng zawng chu Manase hnam zatvete ka pe a; Argob ram zawng zawng leh Basan ram zawng zawng chu. (Hei hi Rephaim-ho ram an ti bawk thin a." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Manasea fapa Jaira chuan Argob ram zawng zawng Basan ram an tih chu Gesur-ho leh Maakat-ho ram thlengin a la a, chung chu ama hming chawiin Havot-Jaira a ti a, tun thlengin a la ti reng)." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Tin, Gilead chu Makira ka pe a." 
Deuteronomy3:16 Tin, Reuben-ho leh Gad-ho chu Gilead atanga Arnon ruam, ruam lai tak thlengin an ram chin atan ka pe a; Amona thlahho ramri, Jakob lui thlengin;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 tin, Araba leh Jordan pawh ramri atan Kineret atanga Pisga chhak lam pangper hnuaia Tuifinriat Al, Araba tuifinriat thlengin." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Tin, chu mi lai chuan, 'LALPA in Pathianin he ram hi in pualah a pe che u a ni, Israela thlah, in unaute hmaah in mi huaisen zawng zawngte chu inralthuamin han kal ve rawh se." 
Deuteronomy3:19 ,20 Amaherawhchu nangmahni anga in unaute chu LALPA'n ralmuanga a siam hma leh LALPA in Pathianin Jordan rala ram a pek chu an luah ve hma loh chuan in nupuite leh in fanaute tete leh in ramte chu (ran in ngah tih ka hria a) in khua ka pek tak che u ah hian lo awm se la; tichuan in pual theuh tura ka pek che uah hian in lo haw leh theuh dawn nia,' tiin thu ka pe a che u a." 
Deuteronomy3:20 ,19 Amaherawhchu nangmahni anga in unaute chu LALPA'n ralmuanga a siam hma leh LALPA in Pathianin Jordan rala ram a pek chu an luah ve hma loh chuan in nupuite leh in fanaute tete leh in ramte chu (ran in ngah tih ka hria a) in khua ka pek tak che u ah hian lo awm se la; tichuan in pual theuh tura ka pek che uah hian in lo haw leh theuh dawn nia,' tiin thu ka pe a che u a." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Tin, chu mi lai bawk chuan Josua chu, 'LALPA in Pathianin chung lal pahnihte chunga thil a tih zawng zawng chu i mitin a hmu vek a; chutiang tak bawk chuan in luhna tur ram zawng zawngte chungah LALPA'n a ti ang." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Anmahni chu hlau suh ang che u; a beihpuitu che u chu LALPA in Pathian a ni si a,' tiin thu a pe a." 
Deuteronomy3:23 Tin, chu mi lai vek bawk chuan, 'Aw Lalpa, PATHIAN, i chhiahhlawh hnenah hian i ropuizia leh i kut chak tak chu i lantir ta phawt chu a ni a; vanah emaw, leiah emaw hian i thiltih ang leh i thiltih ropui tak ang ti thei Pathian hi tu nge awm?" 
Deuteronomy3:24 Tin, chu mi lai vek bawk chuan, 'Aw Lalpa, PATHIAN, i chhiahhlawh hnenah hian i ropuizia leh i kut chak tak chu i lantir ta phawt chu a ni a; vanah emaw, leiah emaw hian i thiltih ang leh i thiltih ropui tak ang ti thei Pathian hi tu nge awm?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Mi kaitir la, Jordan rala ram tha tak, chu tlang mawi tak leh Lebanon chu mi hmuhtir teh khai,' tiin LALPA chu ka ngen chiam a." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Nimahsela nangmahni avangin ka chungah LALPA chu a thinur hle a, ka thu chu a pawm lo a; tichuan LALPA chuan, 'Tawk tawh rawh se, he thuah hian mi be leh tawh suh;" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Pisga tlang chhipah han chuang la, thlang lamah te, hmar lamah te, chhim lamah te, chhak lamah te, i mit han len la, han thlir rawh; Jordan hi i kan dawn lo a ni." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Amaherawhchu Josua hi thu pe la, fuih tha la, tichak rawh; he'ng mipuite hi a hruai kai dawn a, i han hmuh tur ram chu a luahtir dawn a ni,' mi ti a.Chutichuan Bethpeor ep ruamah chuan kan awm ta a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Chutichuan Bethpeor ep ruamah chuan kan awm ta a nih kha. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Khai le, Israel mite u, LALPA in pi leh pute Pathianin ram a pek che u chu nungdama in luah theihna tura in pawm tura ka zirtir thin che u dante leh rorelte chu ngaithla rawh u." 
Deuteronomy4:2 LALPA in Pathian thupek ka pek che u hi in pawm theihna turin, thu ka pek che u hi in belhchhah tur a ni lo a, in tikiam tur a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Baal-peor avanga LALPA thiltih chu in mitin a hmu a: Baal-peor betu zawng awngte chu LALPA in Pathianin in zing ata a tiboral a. 
Deuteronomy4:4 LALPA in Pathian vuantu apiangte erawh chu tun thleng hian nungdamin in la awm theuh a. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Ngai teh u, in va luah tur ramah pawh in zawm zel turin LALPA ka Pathianin thu min pek ang takin dante leh rorelte chu ka zirtir che u a." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Chutichuan, pawm u la, zawm rawh u; chu tak chu, he'ng dan zawng zawngte hi hria a, 'He hnam ropui tak hi mi fing tak leh thil hre mi tak an ni ngei mai,' titu hnamte mithmuhah chuan in finna leh thil hre mi in nihna a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Kan koh apianga LALPA kan Pathianin min hnaih anga anmahni hnaih thin Pathian nei hnam ropui tu nge awm ve? 
Deuteronomy4:8 Heti taka fel, dante leh rorelte, tuna in hmaa ka zam zawng zawng ang dan nei hi hnam ropui dang tu nge awm ve?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Engpawh ni se la, fimkhur u la, ngun takin invawng phawt mai rawh u; chutilochuan in mitin a thil hmuhte chu in theihnghilh ang a, in dam chhungin in thinlung ata a bo dah ang e; in fate leh in tute zirtir rawh u;" 
Deuteronomy4:10 tin, Horeb tlanga LALPA in Pathian hmaa in din a, LALPA'n ka hnena, ' MIpuite chu min koh khawmsak rawh, leilunga an awm chhung zawnga mi tih dan an zir theihna'n leh an fate zirtir turin ka thute ka lo hriattir ang e,' mi tih ni pawh kha i theihnghilh dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Tichuan in lo hnai a, tlang bulah chuan in lo ding a, vanlaizawl tawngin tlang chu thim te, chhum te, thim chhah mup te awmtirin a kang ta a." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Tin, LALPA chuan mei atang chuan a rawn bia che u a; a thu sawi chu in hria a, nimahsela riruang engmah in hmu lo a, aw chauh in hria a ni." 
Deuteronomy4:13 A thuthlung zawm tura thu a pek che u, thu sawm pek chu in hnenah a puang a, lungphek pahnihah a ziak a." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Tin, chu mi lai chuan luah tura in va kaina rama in zawm turin dante leh rorelte zirtir turin LALPA'n thu mi pe a." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Chuvangin fimkhur hle rawh u; milem te insiam chawpin, a pa ang emaw, a nu ang emaw, leia ran ang emaw, boruaka thlawk thin, sava thla nei ang emaw, leia a vaha vak mi ang emaw, lei hnuai tuia sangha zinga mi ang emaw te siamin in intichhe dah rual ang e; Horeb tlanga mei atanga Lalpa'n a rawn biak ni che u khan riruang engmah in hmu si lo a; a nih loh leh van lam in han hawi a, ni te, thla te, arsite vana mi zawng zawngte reng pawh in han hmuhin, LALPA in Pathianin van hnuai chhina mi zawng zawng a ruasakte chuan a hip ang che u a, in bia ang a, an rawngte in bawl mai dah rual ang e." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Chuvangin fimkhur hle rawh u; milem te insiam chawpin, a pa ang emaw, a nu ang emaw, leia ran ang emaw, boruaka thlawk thin, sava thla nei ang emaw, leia a vaha vak mi ang emaw, lei hnuai tuia sangha zinga mi ang emaw te siamin in intichhe dah rual ang e; Horeb tlanga mei atanga Lalpa'n a rawn biak ni che u khan riruang engmah in hmu si lo a; a nih loh leh van lam in han hawi a, ni te, thla te, arsite vana mi zawng zawngte reng pawh in han hmuhin, LALPA in Pathianin van hnuai chhina mi zawng zawng a ruasakte chuan a hip ang che u a, in bia ang a, an rawngte in bawl mai dah rual ang e." 
Deuteronomy4:17 Chuvangin fimkhur hle rawh u; milem te insiam chawpin, a pa ang emaw, a nu ang emaw, leia ran ang emaw, boruaka thlawk thin, sava thla nei ang emaw, leia a vaha vak mi ang emaw, lei hnuai tuia sangha zinga mi ang emaw te siamin in intichhe dah rual ang e; Horeb tlanga mei atanga Lalpa'n a rawn biak ni che u khan riruang engmah in hmu si lo a; a nih loh leh van lam in han hawi a, ni te, thla te, arsite vana mi zawng zawngte reng pawh in han hmuhin, LALPA in Pathianin van hnuai chhina mi zawng zawng a ruasakte chuan a hip ang che u a, in bia ang a, an rawngte in bawl mai dah rual ang e." 
Deuteronomy4:18 Chuvangin fimkhur hle rawh u; milem te insiam chawpin, a pa ang emaw, a nu ang emaw, leia ran ang emaw, boruaka thlawk thin, sava thla nei ang emaw, leia a vaha vak mi ang emaw, lei hnuai tuia sangha zinga mi ang emaw te siamin in intichhe dah rual ang e; Horeb tlanga mei atanga Lalpa'n a rawn biak ni che u khan riruang engmah in hmu si lo a; a nih loh leh van lam in han hawi a, ni te, thla te, arsite vana mi zawng zawngte reng pawh in han hmuhin, LALPA in Pathianin van hnuai chhina mi zawng zawng a ruasakte chuan a hip ang che u a, in bia ang a, an rawngte in bawl mai dah rual ang e." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Chuvangin fimkhur hle rawh u; milem te insiam chawpin, a pa ang emaw, a nu ang emaw, leia ran ang emaw, boruaka thlawk thin, sava thla nei ang emaw, leia a vaha vak mi ang emaw, lei hnuai tuia sangha zinga mi ang emaw te siamin in intichhe dah rual ang e; Horeb tlanga mei atanga Lalpa'n a rawn biak ni che u khan riruang engmah in hmu si lo a; a nih loh leh van lam in han hawi a, ni te, thla te, arsite vana mi zawng zawngte reng pawh in han hmuhin, LALPA in Pathianin van hnuai chhina mi zawng zawng a ruasakte chuan a hip ang che u a, in bia ang a, an rawngte in bawl mai dah rual ang e." 
Deuteronomy4:20 LALPA chuan a mite, a ro ni turin thir rawhtuina ata, Aigupta ram ata chu a hruai chhuak zawk che u a ni, tuna in nih ang hi." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Chuti chang pawh ni loin, nangmahni avangin LALPA chu ka chungah a thinur a, Jordan lui chu ka tan loh a, in luah atana ram tha tak LALPA in Pathianin a pek che uah chuan ka luh lohna'n chhia a chham bawk a:" 
Deuteronomy4:22 kei chu he rama thi tur Ka ni a, Jordan lui chu ka kai dawn lo a ni; nangni erawh chu in kai ang a, chu ram tha tak chu in luah ang." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Fimkhur hle rawh u, LALPA in Pathian thuthlung, in laka a thlun chu in theihnghilh ang a, LALPA in Pathian in eng anpui maha siam a phal loh milemte in insiam chawp dah rual ang e." 
Deuteronomy4:24 LALPA in Pathian chu kanral hmang mei, thikthuchhe tak Pathian a ni si a." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Tu leh fate in han neih a, chu rama rei fe in awm hnu a, in intihkhawloh a, eng emaw anpuitea milem siam chawp mai te in din a, a thin tiur tura LALPA in Pathian mithmuha thil tha lo in tih vaih chuan," 
Deuteronomy4:26 Jordan kana in va luah tur ram ata chu in boral thuai mai ang tih in chungchang thuah min hriatpuitu atan tunah hian lei leh van ka sawm a ni; in cheng rei lo vang a, in boral vek mai ang." 
Deuteronomy4:27 LALPA chuan hnam tin, zingah a tidarh ang che u a, LALPA'n a kalbotirna che u hnamte zingah chuan tlemte chauhin in awm ang." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Chutah chuan, pathian thing leh lunga mihring siam, hmu thei hlei lo, hre thei hlei lo, ei thei hlei lo, rim pawh hre thei hlei lote in bia ang a." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Nimahsela chutah pawh chuan LALPA in Pathian chu in zawn a, in thinlung zawng zawng leh in rilru zawng zawnga in zawn chuan in hmu leh ang." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Hrehawma in awma in chunga chung thil zawng zawng chu a lo thlen hunah a tawp a tawpah chuan LALPA in Pathian lam in lo hawi leh ang a, a thu chu in pawm tawh ang a;" 
Deuteronomy4:31 LALPA in Pathian chu zahngai thei tak Pathian a ni si a: a thlahtlam lo ang che u a, a tiboral lo ang che u a, in pi leh pute hnena chhechhama a thuthlun chu a theihnghilh hek lo ang." 
Deuteronomy4:32 In awm hma, tun hma lam te chu han chhut u la leilung Pathianin mihring a siam achin van hnuai chhinah, heti anga thil ropui hi a awm ngaiin, hriat a ni ngai emaw chu?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Mei atanga thu rawn sawi in hriata in la nun cheu sina pathian aw miin an hre ngaiin," 
Deuteronomy4:34 hnam dang zing ata fiahna te, chhinchhiahna te, thil mak te, indona te kut chak tak te, ban phar te, thil rapthlak tea LALPA in Pathianin in mithmuha Aigupta rama a tih zawng zawng anga hnam hruai chhuak ngam pathian an awm ngai emaw chu.?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 LALPA chu Pathian a ni tih in hriat theihna'n in hnena tihlan a ni a; amah lo chu a dang reng an awm lo. 
Deuteronomy4:36 A zirtir theihna'n che u van atangin a aw a rawn hriattir che u a, lei chungah hian a meipui chu a hmuhtir che u a: mei atanga a thu chu in lo hria a." 
Deuteronomy4:37 In pi leh pute a hmangaih avangin an hnua an thlahte chu a thlang che u a, amah telin, a thiltihtheihna ropui takin hnam dang in aia ropui leh thiltithei zawk a hnawhchhuahsak che u a, an ram chu luah tura luhtir che uin Aigupta ram ata chu a hruai chhuak che u a, tuna in nih ang hi." 
Deuteronomy4:38 In pi leh pute a hmangaih avangin an hnua an thlahte chu a thlang che u a, amah telin, a thiltihtheihna ropui takin hnam dang in aia ropui leh thiltithei zawk a hnawhchhuahsak che u a, an ram chu luah tura luhtir che uin Aigupta ram ata chu a hruai chhuak che u a, tuna in nih ang hi." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Chuvangin tunah hian in thinlungah vawng u la, chung lam vanah leh hnuai lam leiah hian LALPA chu Pathian a ni tih hre rawh u; a dang reng an awm lo." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Kumkhua atan LALPA in Pathianin a pek che u ramah chuan nangmahni leh inthlahte tana tha tur leh in chen rei theihna'n a dante leh a thupek te, tuna ka pek che u hi in zawm tur a ni,"" tih hi." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Chutichuan, Mosia chuan tualthattu, a thenawm khawveng, tun hma pawha a huat lem loh that palhtu tual tlanna, Jordan ral ni chhuahna lam pangah khaw pathum a ruat a; chung khua, a engah pawh a tlan chuan a him ang a:" 
Deuteronomy4:42 Chutichuan, Mosia chuan tualthattu, a thenawm khawveng, tun hma pawha a huat lem loh that palhtu tual tlanna, Jordan ral ni chhuahna lam pangah khaw pathum a ruat a; chung khua, a engah pawh a tlan chuan a him ang a:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 chung chu Reuben-ho pualah thla lera tlang zawla Bezer te, Gad-ho pualah Gilead-a Ramot te, Manase-ho pualah Basan-a Golan te ani a." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Tin, hei hi Mosia'n Israela thlahte dan apek chu a ni;" 
Deuteronomy4:45 he'ng hi, Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah laia Israela thlahte hnena Mosia'n Jordan rala, Mosia leh Israela tlahten Aigupta rama an lo chhuah laia an thah, Hesbon-a awm Amon-ho lal Sihona rama Bet-peor zawn ruama a sawi hriattirna te, dan te, rorel te chu a ni;" 
Deuteronomy4:46 he'ng hi, Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah laia Israela thlahte hnena Mosia'n Jordan rala, Mosia leh Israela tlahten Aigupta rama an lo chhuah laia an thah, Hesbon-a awm Amon-ho lal Sihona rama Bet-peor zawn ruama a sawi hriattirna te, dan te, rorel te chu a ni;" 
Deuteronomy4:47 a ram leh basan lal Oga ram, Jordan ral ni chhuahna lama Amor-ho lal pahnihte ram chu an luah a;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 Arnon ruam fema Aroer atanga Sion tlang (Hermon an ti bawk) thleng lehJordan ral chhak lampang Araba zawng zawng, Pisga pangper hnuaia Araba tuifinriat thlengin." 
Deuteronomy4:49 Jordan ral chhak lampang Araba zawng zawng, Pisga pangper hnuaia Araba tuifinriat thlengin." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Tin, Mosia'n Israel-ho zawng zawng chu a ko khawm a, an hnenah, ""Aw Israel mite u, in zira in pawm tura dan te, rorel te in benghriata vawina ka sawi hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Deuteronomy5:2 LALPA kan Pathianin Horeb-ah chuan kan hnenah thu a thlung a. 
Deuteronomy5:3 LALPA chuan he thu kan pi leh pute hnenah khan a thlung lo a, keiniho, tun thlenga mi nungdama la awm zawng zawngte hnenah ngei hian a ni, a thlun zawk ni." 
Deuteronomy5:4 LALPA chuan tlangah mei atangin inhmatawnin a bia he u a," 
Deuteronomy5:5 (chu mi lai chuan LALPA thu kawhmuh tur che uin LALPA nena in inkarah ka ding a; mei avang chuan in hlau si a, tlangah chuan in han chho lo e)." 
Deuteronomy5:6 Kei hi LALPA i Pathian, Aigupta ram ata, bawih ata hruai chhuaktu che ka ni." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Keimah lo chu pathian dang reng reng i nei tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Milem siam chawp chung lam vana mi emaw, hnuai lam leia mi emaw, lei hnuai lama tuia mi emaw, a eng anpui mah i insiam tur a ni lo;" 
Deuteronomy5:9 chung chu chibai i buk tur a ni lo a, an rawng i bawl tur a ni hek lo. Kei LALPA i Pathian hi Pathian thikthuchhia, pate khawlohna avanga fate hrem thin, mi hawtute chu chhuan thumna leh chhuan lina thlenga hrem thin leh," 
Deuteronomy5:10 mi hmangaiha ka thupekte pawmtu sang tam takte chunga khawngaihna lantir thin ka nih hi. 
Deuteronomy5:11 LALPA i Pathian hming chu i lam mai mai tur a ni lo. LALPA chuan a hming lam mai maitu chu thiam loh chantir lohin a chhuah dawn si lo a. 
Deuteronomy5:12 LALPA i Pathianin thu a pek che angin chawlhni chu thianghlim reng turin serh rawh. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Ni ruk chhungin i thawk ang a, i hna zawng zawng chu i thawk tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy5:14 a ni sarih ni erawh chu LALPA i Pathian tan chawlhni a ni e; chu mi ni chuan hna reng reng i thawk tur a ni lo, nang pawhin, i fapa pawhin, i fanu pawhin, i bawihpa pawhin, i bawihnu pawhin, i bawngpa pawhin, i sabengtung pawhin, i ran a enga pawhin, i ina ramdang mite pawhin; nangmah ang bawka i bawihpa te, i bawihnute pawh an chawlh theina'n." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Nang pawh Aigupta ramah khan bawih i ni tawh a, LALPA i Pathianin chuta ta chu kut chak tak leh ban phara a hruai chhuah che i ni tih hre reng rawh; chuvang chuan a ni, LALPA i Pathianin chawlhni serh tur thu a pek che ni." 
Deuteronomy5:16 LALPA i Pathianin thu a pek che angin i nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh; tichuan LALPA'n ram a pekah che hian i hmuingil ang a, i dam rei dawn nia." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Tual i that tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy5:18 I uire tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy5:19 I ru tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy5:20 I vengte chungah hretu derah i insiam tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy5:21 I vengte nupui i awt tur ani lo a, i vengte in emaw, a lo emaw, a bawihpa emaw, a bawihnu emaw, a bawngpa emaw, a sabengtung emaw, i vengte thil a engmah i awt tur a ni lo' tiin." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Heng thute hi tlangah mei te, chhum te, thim chhah mup atangtein LALPA'n aw ring takin in zavaia pungkhawmho hnenah a sawi a, a belhchhah leh chuang lo a. chung chu lungphek pahnihah a ziak a, mi pe a." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Tin, tlang chu a kan laia, thim atanga aw chu in han hriat chuan heti hi a ni a, min rawn hnaih a, in hnam puipa zawng zawng leh in upate chuan;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 Tin, 'ngai teh, LALPA kan Pathian chuan kan hnenah a ropuizia leh a lenzia a lantir a, mei atanga a awm chu ka hria a; Pathianin mihring a biak pawha thihna a ni chuan lohna chu vawiinah kan lo hre ta a." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Chuvangin engah nge kan thih ang? He mi mei nasa tak hian min kangral mai ang a sin; LALPA kan Pathian aw chu kan hriat leh chuan ka thi mai ang. 
Deuteronomy5:26 Mei atanga Pathian nung aw kan hriat anga hre vea dam si tisa pu zawng zawng zingah tu nge awm? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Nangin va hnaih la, LALPA kan Pathianin a sawi tur zawng zawng chu va ngaithla teh khai; tin, LALPA kan Pathianin i hnena a sawi zawng zawng chu nangin kan hnena i sawi ang a; tichuan kan lo ngaithla ang a, kan zawm dawn nia,' in ti a." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Tin, mi biak laia in thusawi chu LALPA'n a lo hria a; tichuan LALPA'n ka hnenah, 'Heng mipuiten i hnena thu an sawi chu ka lo hria a; an thusawi zawng zawng chu a tha hle mai." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Chutiang rilru chu pu thin se la aw, mi tih ang a, ka thupekte chu an zawm fo vang a, anmahni leh an fate pawh kumkhuain an hmungil hle tur!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 An hnenah, in puan inah te va haw rawh u, ti rawh." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Nang erawh chu ka kiangah ding la, luah tura ram ka peka an pawm tura i zirtir tur thupek zawng zawng te, dan te, rorel te chu ka hrilh ang che,' a ti a." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Chuvangin LALPA in Pathianin thu a pek che u anga ti turin fimkhur rawh u; ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw in peng tur a ni lo.In va luah tur ramah in awm a, in hmuingilna tur leh in chen rei theina'n LALPA in Pathianin thu a pek che u kawng in zawn tluan chhuak tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy5:33 In va luah tur ramah in awm a, in hmuingilna tur leh in chen rei theina'n LALPA in Pathianin thu a pek che u kawng in zawn tluan chhuak tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:1 ,2 Tin, luah tura in va kaina rama in zawm tur leh nangni leh in fapate leh in tupaten LALPA in Pathian chu in tih a, in damchhung zawnga a dan zawng zawng leh a thupek ka pek che u hi in zawmna tur leh in lo chen rei theihna tura LALPA in Pathianin nangmahni zirtir tura thu min pek, thu pek te, dan te, rorel te chu hengte hi ani."
