Deuteronomy6:2 ,1 Tin, luah tura in va kaina rama in zawm tur leh nangni leh in fapate leh in tupaten LALPA in Pathian chu in tih a, in damchhung zawnga a dan zawng zawng leh a thupek ka pek che u hi in zawmna tur leh in lo chen rei theihna tura LALPA in Pathianin nangmahni zirtir tura thu min pek, thu pek te, dan te, rorel te chu hengte hi ani." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Chuvangin aw, Israel mite u, in hmuingil a, LALPA in pi leh pute Pathianin a tawngtiam che u angin hnutetui leh khawizu luanna rama nasa taka in lo pun theih nan ngaithla u la, zawm turin fimkhur rawh u." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Aw Israel mite u, ngaithla teh u, LALPA kan Pathian chauh chu LALPA a ni a;" 
Deuteronomy6:5 LALPA in Pathian chu in thinlung zawng zawngin, in rilru zawng zawngin, in chakna zawng zawngin in hmangaih tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Tin, he'ng thu, vawiina ka pek che u hi in thinlungah a cham reng ang a;" 
Deuteronomy6:7 in fate thahnemngai takin in zirtir ang a, in ina in thut lai te, kawnga in kal lai te, in mut lai te, in thawh hun tein in sawi thin tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Tin, chhinchhiahna atan in banah in zem ang a, in mit leh mit inkara chalhrenna atan a awm bawk tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Tin, in in kawngka bianga te, in kawngkharah te in ziak tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:10 ,11 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA in Pathianin in pu, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnena chhechhama a pek che u ram, in din ni hauh lo, khaw ropui leh mawi tak tak te, in tihkhah ni hauh lo, thil tha tinrenga khat in te, in chhun ni hauh lo, tuikhur chhun sa te, in chin ni hauh lo, grep huan leh oliv thing te awmnaa a hruai luh che u a, in ei a, in tlai hle hun chuan," 
Deuteronomy6:11 ,10 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA in Pathianin in pu, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnena chhechhama a pek che u ram, in din ni hauh lo, khaw ropui leh mawi tak tak te, in tihkhah ni hauh lo, thil tha tinrenga khat in te, in chhun ni hauh lo, tuikhur chhun sa te, in chin ni hauh lo, grep huan leh oliv thing te awmnaa a hruai luh che u a, in ei a, in tlai hle hun chuan," 
Deuteronomy6:12 fimkhur hle ang che u, chutilochuan Aigupta ram ata, bawih ata hruai chhuaktu che u LALPA chu in theihnghilh mai dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy6:13 LALPA in Pathian chu in tih ang a, ama rawng chu in bawl ang a, a hming chhalin chhia in chham tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Pathian dang, in vela mite pathiante chu in be tur a ni lo," 
Deuteronomy6:15 in zinga awm LALPA in Pathian chu Pathian thikthuchhia a ni; LALPA in Pathian thin chu in chungah a thawk ang a, leilung ata hi a tiboral mai dah ang che u." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Masa-a in fiah ang khan LALPA in Pathian chu in fiah tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy6:17 LALPA in Pathianin a pek che u, thupek te, a thuhriattir te, a dan te hi fimkhur takin in zawm tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:18 ,19 In hmuingilna tur leh LALPA'n a sawi tawh anga in hmelma zawng zawngte hnawt chhuak tura LALPA'n in pi leh pute hnena chhia a lo chham tawh ram tha tak chu in va luah theihna'n, LALPA mithmuha dik leh tha chu in ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:19 ,18 In hmuingilna tur leh LALPA'n a sawi tawh anga in hmelma zawng zawngte hnawt chhuak tura LALPA'n in pi leh pute hnena chhia a lo chham tawh ram tha tak chu in va luah theihna'n, LALPA mithmuha dik leh tha chu in ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Tin, in faten, 'LALPA kan Pathianin thu apek che u thuhriattir te, dan te, rorel te hi engtizia nge ni le?' tia nakin lama an la rawn zawh hun che u chuan," 
Deuteronomy6:21 nangnin in fate hnenah, 'Aigupta ramah Pharoa bawih kan ni a, LALPA'n Aigupta ram ata chu kut chak takin min hruai chhuak a;" 
Deuteronomy6:22 tin, LALPA'n kan mithmuhah Aigupta ram chungah te, Pharaoa chungah te, a chhungte zawng zawng chungah te, chhinchiahna leh thil mak nasa tak leh mangantlak takte a entir a;" 
Deuteronomy6:23 keini erawh chu min pek tura kan pi leh pute hnena chhia a lo chham ram chu min pek theihna'n chuta ta chu min hruai chhuak a. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Tichuan he'ng dan zawng zawngte hi zawm tur leh kan that renga tura LALPA kan Pathian chu tih turin LALPA chuan thu min pe a, vawiin nite anga mi nungdama min zuah reng theihna'n.A thu min pek anga LALPA hmaa a thupek zawng zawng zawm tura kan fimkhur chuan kan tan damna a ni dawn a ni,' in ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:25 A thu min pek anga LALPA hmaa a thupek zawng zawng zawm tura kan fimkhur chuan kan tan damna a ni dawn a ni,' in ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:1 LALPA in Pathianin in va luah tur rama a hruai luh che u a, in hmaa hnam tam tak, Hit-ho te, Girgas-ho te, Amor-ho e, kanan-ho te, Periz-ho te, Hiv-ho te, Jebus-ho te, in aia ropi leh thil tithei zawk hnam sarih te a hnawhchhuah hun leh" 
Deuteronomy7:2 LALPA in Pathianin a pek hun che u a, in thah hunah chuan, in tiboral vek tur a ni; anmahni nen thu intlung tur a ni lo a, in khawngaih tur ani hek lo;" 
Deuteronomy7:3 nupui pasalah in nei tur ani hek lo, in fanute chu an fapate in neihtir tur a ni lo a, an fanute chu in fapate in neihtir tur a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy7:4 In fapate, mi zui lai hi pathian dangte biakna lamah an hruai kawi mai ang a; tin, LALPA thin pawh chu in chungah a thawk ang a, a tiboral thuai mai ang che u." 
Deuteronomy7:5 An chungah hetiang hian in ti zawk tur a ni; an maichamte in tichim ang a, an lungphunte in tike sawm ang a, an Aserte in kir ang a, an milem siam chawpte inhal vek tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:6 LALPA in Pathian tan hnam thianghlim in ni si a; leilunga hnam ahluana a pual bik ni tura LALPA in Pathianin a thlan che u in ni a. 
Deuteronomy7:7 Hnam dang aia in tam avangin LALPA'n in chungah a hmangaihna a fuktir a, a thlang che u a ni loa; hnam zawng zawnga hnam tlem ber in ni a sin;" 
Deuteronomy7:8 LALPA'n a hmangaih che u avang leh in pi leh pute hnena chhia a lo chham chu hlen a duh avang zawkin a sin LALPA'n Aigupta lal Pharaoa kut ata kut chak takin bawih ata a tlan chhuah che u ni. 
Deuteronomy7:9 Chuvangin LALPA in Pathian chu Pathian ani tih hre rawh u; Pathian rinawm, amah hmangaiha a thu zawmtu chunga chhuan sang thlenga thuthlung leh khawngaihna nghat renga," 
Deuteronomy7:10 amah hawtute tiboral tura anmahni chung la laa thungrul thin a ni; amah hawtute chu a rial rei lo ang a, anmahni chung la laah a thungrul ang." 
Deuteronomy7:11 chuvangin thupek te, dan te, rorel te zawm tura vawiina thu ka pek che u hi in zawm tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Tin, heti hi ani ang a, he'ng rorelte hi in ngaihthlak a, in zawm a, in tih avangin LALPA in Pathianin in pi le pute hnena chhia a lo chham thuthlung leh khawngaihna chu in chungah a nghat ang a;" 
Deuteronomy7:13 a hmangaih ang che u a, mal a sawm ang che u a, a tipung ang che u; pek tura in pi leh pute hnena chhia a chham ramah chuan in rila rah leh in lei rah pawh mal a sawm ang, in buh te, in uain te, in hriak e, in bawng no leh in beram note pawh." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Hnam dang zawng zawnga malsawmna dawng nasa ber in ni ang a; in zingah ahmei apa ching reng reng an awm lo ang, in ran zingah pawh." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Tin, LALPA'n hri zawng zawng a tihkiansak vek ang che u a, in hriat tawh hnu Aigupta ram hrite chu in chungah a lentir lo ang a, a hawtute che u zawng zawng chungah a lentir zawk ang." 
Deuteronomy7:16 LALPA in Pathianin a pek tur che u hnam zawng zawngte in tiboral vek tur a ni; in khawngaih tur ani lo a, an pathian rawng pawh in bawl tur a ni lo; in tan thang a ni dawn si a." 
Deuteronomy7:17 In rilrua, 'Heng hnamte hi kan aiin an tam si a, engtin nge kan luhchhuah theih ang?' ti in nih chuan," 
Deuteronomy7:18 anni chu hlau suh u la; LALPA in Pathianin Pharaoa leh Aigupta mi zawng zawng chunga a tiltihte kha hre rawh u," 
Deuteronomy7:19 fiahna nasa tak in mit ngeia inhmuh te, chhinchhiahna te, thil mak te, kut chak tak e, ban phar tea LALPA in Pathianin a hruai chhuahna che u kha; khatiang khan LALPA in Pathianin in mi hlauhte chungah chuan a ti zel ang." 
Deuteronomy7:20 LALPA in Pathian chuan an zingah khawinghal a tir leh nghal ang, a la dam, in laka birute chu an boral vek thlengin." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Anni chu in hlau tur ani lo; LALPA in Pathian chu in zinga a awm si a, Pathian ropui tak, tihbaiawm tak mai chu." 
Deuteronomy7:22 LALPA in Pathian chuan chung hnamte chu zawi zawiin a hnawhchauhsak hret hret ang che u a; in tiboral nghal mai tur a ni lo a, chutilochuan ram sate in pawi khawih khawpin a lo pung mai ang." 
Deuteronomy7:23 An boral hma loh chu LALPA in Pathianin a pe ang che u a, buai namen lohin a tibuai ang." 
Deuteronomy7:24 An lalte chu in kutah a pe ang a, an hming chu van hnuai ata hi in thai bo daih tur a ni; in tih boral der tlengin a chelh tur che u tumah reng reng an awm lo ang." 
Deuteronomy7:25 An pathian lem siam chawpte chu in hal tur a ni; chu mia tangkarua emaw, rangkachak emaw chu in it tur a ni lo a, in tan in la tur ani hek lo, chutilochuan in awk dah ang e; LALPA in Pathian ngaihin thil tenawm a ni si a:in in chunga thil tenawm la lutin chu thil ang chuan anchhe dawna i insiam tur a ni lo; ten namen loa tenin in haw hle tur a ni, anchhe dawng thil a ni si a." 
Deuteronomy7:26 in in chunga thil tenawm la lutin chu thil ang chuan anchhe dawna i insiam tur a ni lo; ten namen loa tenin in haw hle tur a ni, anchhe dawng thil a ni si a." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Nung dama in awm a, in lo pun zel a, pek tur che ua in pi leh pute hnena LALPA'n chhia a chham ram chu in va luah theihna'n thupek vawiina ka pek che u hi zawm turin in fimkhur tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Tin, a thupekte chu in zawm dawn nge dawn lo, in rilru hriatna'n fiah tur leh tihrehawm tur che ua thlalera kum sawmli a hruaina zawng zawng che u kawng chu hre reng rawh u." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Mihring hi chhang chauhin an nung lo a, LALPA kaa thu tin chhuakin an nung zawk a ni tih a hriattir theihna'n che u a tihrehawm che u a, in tamte a phal a, in hriat ngai loh, in pi leh pute pawhin an hriat ngai bik loh manna chuan a chawm che u a." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Heng kum sawmli chhung hian in silhfente chu in sin chul lo a, in kete pawh a vung lo a." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Tin, miin a fa a thunun thin angin LALPA in Pathian chuan a thunun thin che u a ni ti hi in rilruin hre ran rawh u." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Tin, a kawng zawh tur leh amah chu tih turin LALPA in Pathian thupekte chu in zawm tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy8:7 LALPA in Pathian chuan ruam leh tlang atanga lo chhuak lui tui te, tuikhur leh tui thuk tak awmna ram," 
Deuteronomy8:8 buh te, barli te, grep te, theipi te, pawmgranet te awmna ram, hriak nei oliv leh khawizu awmna ram," 
Deuteronomy8:9 chham loa chhang in ei thinna tur ram, engmah in tlakchhak lohna tur, a lung te chu thir, a tlangte chu dar laih chhuah theihna ram tha takah chuan a hruai lut dawn si che u a." 
Deuteronomy8:10 In ei a, in tlai hle hun chuan, ram tha tak a pek che u avang chuan LALPA in Pathian chu in fak ang." 
Deuteronomy8:11 A thupek te, a rorel te, a dan te, vawiina ka pek che u hi zawm lohin LALPA in Pathian chu in theihnghilh dah rual ang e, fimkhur rawh u;" 
Deuteronomy8:12 chutilo chuan in ei a, in tlai a, in tha takte in sak a, in luah hun leh" 
Deuteronomy8:13 in ran rual te, in beram rual te a lo pun a, in tangka te, in rangkachak te a lo pun a, in thil neih zawng zawngte a lo pun hun chuan," 
Deuteronomy8:14 in rilrute a lo chapo ang a, bawih ata Aigupta ram atanga hruai chhuaktu che u LALPA in Pathian chu in theihnghilh mai ang." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Ani chuan thlaler zau tak leh rapthlak tak, rul chuk na mite leh khawmual kaikuangte awmna, tui awm lohna, ram rovah a hruai tlang che ua; meilung lungpui atangin tui an tihchhuahsak che u a," 
Deuteronomy8:16 in pi leh pute hriat ngai loh manna chuan a chawm che u a, tun hnu lam thua in that theihna'n a tihrehawm che u a, a fiah theihna tur che uin," 
Deuteronomy8:17 Tin, Heng kan sum leh paite hi keimahni chakna leh kan kutkawih a ni,' in tirilru dah ang e, fimkhur bawk rawh u." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Tuna a ngheh anga in pi leh pute hnena chhechhama thu thlun chu a tihnghehna turin LALPA in Pathian chu hre reng rawh u, sum leh pai deh chhuah theihna petu che u chu amah chu a ni zawk a sin." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Tin, heti hi ani ang a, LALPA in Pathian chu in teihnghilh a, pathian dangte in zui a, an rawngte in bawl a, in biak vaih chuan in boral ngei ngei ang tih vawiinah hian ka hraittir a che u.In hmaa hnam dangte a tihboral angin nangni pawh in boral ang, LALPA in Pathian aw chu ngaithla duh lo in nih dawn avangin." 
Deuteronomy8:20 In hmaa hnam dangte a tihboral angin nangni pawh in boral ang, LALPA in Pathian aw chu ngaithla duh lo in nih dawn avangin." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Aw Israel mi te u, ngaithla teh u, 'Anak-ho chu tuin nge chelh ang i?' an tih thin, in aia ropui leh thiltithei zawk hnam, khawpui van tawnga kulh nei leh ropui tak, mi lian tak sang pui pui, inhriat tawh sa Anaka thlahte ram chu va luah turin tunah chuan Jordan lui chu in kan dawn ta a." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Aw Israel mi te u, ngaithla teh u, 'Anak-ho chu tuin nge chelh ang i?' an tih thin, in aia ropui leh thiltithei zawk hnam, khawpui van tawnga kulh nei leh ropui tak, mi lian tak sang pui pui, inhriat tawh sa Anaka thlahte ram chu va luah turin tunah chuan Jordan lui chu in kan dawn ta a." 
Deuteronomy9:3 chuvangin LALPA in Pathian chu kanral hmang mei anga in hmaa kal thina chu a ni tih tunah hian hre rawh u; ani chuan anni chu a tiboral ang a, a tihtlawmsak ang che u a; tichuan LALPA'n in hnena a sawi tawh ang khan, anni chu in hawntchhuak ang a, in tiboral thuai mai ang." 
Deuteronomy9:4 LALPA in Pathianin a hnawhchhuahsak hnu che u chuan, 'Kan felna avangin he ram hi in luah turin LALPA'n min hruai lut a ni,' in rilruin ti hauh suh u; he'ng hnamte hi an suala avang zawkin a ni, LALPA'n a hnawhchhuahsak dawn che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy9:5 In fel avang emaw, in rulru dik avang emawin an ram chu in luah dawn lo a, he'ng hnam sual avang leh LALPA'n in pu Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnena a chhechham thu tinghet turin LALPA in Pathianin anni chu ahnawchauhsak che u a ni zawk e." 
Deuteronomy9:6 chuvangin he ram tha tak hi in fel avanga luah turin LALPA'n a pe che u a ni lo tih hre rawh u; hnam luhlul tak in ni si a. 
Deuteronomy9:7 Thlalera LALPA thin in tihur thinziate kha hre reng u la, theihnghilh su u; Aigupta ram ata in chhuah ni atanga he mi hmun in lo thlen thleng hian LALPA chunga hel hamng in ni a." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Horeb-ah pawh khan LALPA thin in tiur a, tioral hial tur che uin LALPA a thinrim a." 
Deuteronomy9:9 lungphek, in hnena LALPA'n thu a thlunna lungphek la tura tlanga ka han chhoh lai khan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli tlangah chuan ka han awm a; chhang pawh ka ei lo a, tui pawh ka in hek lo." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Tin, LALPA chuan lungphek pahnih, Pathian kutzunga zia chu mi pe a; chu miah chuan in pun khawm nia tlang chunga mei atanga LALPA'n in hnena thu a sawi zawng zawngte kha a chuang a." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Tin, ni sawmli leh zan sawmli hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, lungphek pahnih, thuthlunna lungphek chu mi pe a." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, 'Tho la, heta ta hi chhuk thuai rawh; Aigupta ram ata i hruai chhuah, i mite chu an intihchhiat zawh tak khu; zawh tura thu ka pek kawng ata chu an peng ta pang mai a, milem chhun chawp an insiam tak mai khu,' a ti a." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Tin, LALPA chuan, 'He mite hi ka en ka enin, ngai teh, hnam luhlul tak an ni;" 
Deuteronomy9:14 anmahni tiboral tur leh van huai ata an hming thai bo turin ka tih tihin ka han ti teh ang: tin, nang hi anmahni aia hnam thiltithei leh ropui zawkah ka siam teh ang che,' tiin min be bawk a." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Chutichuan tlang ata chu ka let thla a, tlang chu a kang ta a; thuthlunna lungphek pahni chu ka kut khinghnihin ka keng a." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Tin, ka han thlir a, ngai teh u, LALPA in Pathian chungah in lo sual ta a; bawng no lem chhun chawp in insiam a, LALPA'n thu a pek che u kawng ata chu in peng ta pang mai a." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Tin, lungphek pahnih chu ka chawi a, ka kut khingkhin ata chu ka paih a, in mithmuhah ka tikeh a," 
Deuteronomy9:18 Tin, hmana ka tih ang khan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli LALPA hmaah ka bawkkhup a; a thin tiur tura LALPA mithmuha in thil tihsual tak, in sualna zawng zawng avangin chhang pawh ka ei lo a, tui pah ka in hek lo." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Nangmahni tiboral tura LALPA thinurna, a thinrimna leh lungnihlohna nasa tak chu ka hlau si a. Nimahsela chu mi tum pawh chuan LALPA'n ka thu chu mi ngaihthlaksak a." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Tin, LALPA chu Arona chu tiboral duh hial khawpin a thinur a; nimahsela Arona pawh ka tawngtaisak nghal bawk a." 
Deuteronomy9:21 In sualna avanga in siam bawng no lem chu ka la a, ka hal a, ka chhu sawm a, vaivut angin ka rawt dip derh a; tin, a dip chu tlang atanga lui lo luangah chuan ka paih a." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Tin, Tabera-ah te, Masa-ah te, Kibrot-hatava-ahte pawh LALPA chu in tithinur a." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Tin, LALPA'n, 'Ram ka pek che u chu han luah rawh u,' tia Kades-barnea atanga a tirh lai che u khan LALPA in Pathian thupek chu in helsan a, amah chu in ring lo a, a aw chu in ngaithla bawk hek lo." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Ka hriat tirh che u ata LALPA chunga hel hmang mi in ni reng a. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Chutichuan LALPA'n, 'Ka tiboral dawn,' a tih che u avang khan LALPA hmaah ka bawkkhup a, ni sawmli leh zan sawmli ka bawkhuh kha." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Tin, LALPA hnena chuan ka tawngtai a,' Aw LALPA Pathian, ropuinaa i tlan, kut chak taka Aigupta ram ata i tlan chhuah, i mite leh i rochante chu tiboral suh ang che." 
Deuteronomy9:27 I chhiahhlawh Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te chu hre reng la, he miteho hi an luhlulzia te, an suahsualzia te, an sualzia teah en suh ang che;" 
Deuteronomy9:28 Chutilochuan i mihruai chhuahna rama mite chuan, LALPA'n a ram tiamah chuan a hruai theih loh avang leh a huat avangin thlalera thah turin a hruai chhuak a ni, an ti dah ang e.I thiltihtheihna ropui tak leh i ban phara i hruai chhuah, i mite leh i rochante an ni miau si a,' ka ti a." 
Deuteronomy9:29 I thiltihtheihna ropui tak leh i ban phara i hruai chhuah, i mite leh i rochante an ni miau si a,' ka ti a." 
Deuteronomy10:1 chu mi lai chuan LALPA'n ka hnenah, 'lungphek pahnihhmana mi ang kha chher leh la, tlangah ka hnenah lo kal la, thingin bawm siam rawh." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Tin, hmana lungphek I tihkeh taktea thu chuang kha lungphekahte chuan ka ziang ang a, bawmah chuan i dah dawn nia,' a ti a." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Tichuan thingri thingin bawm ka siam a, hmana mi ang lungphek pahnih ka chher a, lungphek pahnih chu kengin tlangah chuan ka chho a." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Tin, lungphekahte chuan a hmasaa ziang ang, in pun khawm nia tlanga mei atanga LALPA'n in hnena a sawi thu sawm pek chu a ziak a, LALPA chuan mi pe a." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Tin, tlang ata chu ka let thla a, lungphek chu ka bawm siamah chuan ka dah a; LALPA'n thu mi pek angin chutah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Tin, Israela thlahte chu Beerot Benejaakan atangin Mosera-ah an kal a; chutah chuan Arona chu a thi a, tah chuan an phum a; tin, a fapa Eleazaran a aiawhin pithiam hna a thawk a." 
Deuteronomy10:7 chuta tang chuan Gudgoda-ah an kal a; tin, Gudgoda atang chuan tui tamna ram Jotbath-ah an kal a." 
Deuteronomy10:8 chu mi lai chuan tuntlenga LALPA thuthlung bawm zawn a, LALPA hmaa a rawngbawla, a hminga malsawmsaktu ni turin Levi chi chu a tihrang a." 
Deuteronomy10:9 chuvangin Levia chuan a unaute zingah chanvo pawh, rochan pawh anei lo a; LALPA pawh, rochan pawh a nei lo a; LALPA in Pathianin a hnena a sawi angin LALPA chu a rochan a ni.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 Tin, a hma ang bawk khan tlangah chuan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli ka awm a; tin, chu mi tum pawh chuan LALPA'n ka thu chu a ngaithla a, LALPA chuan a tiboral duh ta lo che u a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Tin, LALPA'n ka hnenah, 'Tho la mipuite hma hruai rawh; anmahni pek tura an pi leh pute hnena chhechhama ka tiam ram chu an luah tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy10:12 Khai le, Israel mite u, in laka LALPA in Pathianin a phut chu engmah dang a ni lo a, in thatna tura LALPA in Pathian tiha, a kawng zawng zawng chu zawh a, ama hmangaih a, in thinlung awng zawng leh in rilru zawng awnga LALPA in Pathian rawngbawl a," 
Deuteronomy10:13 LALPA thupek te, a dante zawm tura tuna thu ke pek che u pawm hi a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Ngai the u, van te, vante van leh leilung leh a chunga awm zawng zawng hi LALPA in Pathian ta vek ani a." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Nimahsela in pi leh pute hmangai chu a lawmzawng ani a, hnamdang zawng zawng aiin nangniho hi a hnam thlan in la ni ta cheu a." 
Deuteronomy10:16 chuvangin in thinlung hmawr vun tan u la, tihmawh tawh suh." 
Deuteronomy10:17 LALPA in Pathian chu, pathiante Pathian, hotute Hotu, Pathian ropui tak, chak tak tibaiawm tak, tumah duhsak bik nei lo a, thamna pawh la ngai lo a ni si a." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Pa nei lote leh hmeithaite chu fel takin ro a relsak thin a, ram dang mite chu ei tur leh silhfente pein a hmangaih thin a." 
Deuteronomy10:19 chuvangin ram dang mite chu hmangaih ve rawh u; nangni pawh Aigupta ramah khan ram dang mi in ni kha. 
Deuteronomy10:20 LALPA in Pathian chu in tih ang a, ama rawng chu in bawl ang a; tin, amah chu in vuan tlat ang a, a hming chhalin chhia in chham tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Amah chu in fak tura chu a ni, he'ng in mita inhmuh tak thil ropui takk leh rapthlak takte tihsaktu che u in Pathian a ni.In pi leh pute chu Aigupta ramah sawmsarih an chhuk a; tunah chuan tam lama vana arsi zatin LALPA in Pathianin a titam a che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:22 In pi leh pute chu Aigupta ramah sawmsarih an chhuk a; tunah chuan tam lama vana arsi zatin LALPA in Pathianin a titam a che u a ni. 
Deuteronomy11:1 Chuvangin LALPA in Pathian chu in hmangaihin a thurochhiah te, a dan te, a rorel te, a thupek te in zawm fo tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Tuna hian hre rawh khai; LALPA in Pathian thununna te, a ropuizia te, a ban chakzia te, a ban pharzia te," 
Deuteronomy11:3 a chhinchhiahna te, a thiltih, Aigupta ram chhunga Aigupta lal Pharaoa chung leh a ram chung zawng zawnga a tih te," 
Deuteronomy11:4 Aigupta sipaiho le an sakawr leh an tawlailir chunga a thiltih te; an um lai che u a, Tuifinriat Sen tuia vurtirzia te, tun thlenga LALPA'n a tihboralzia te;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 he mi hmun in thlen hma loh zawnga thlalera in chunga a thiltih dan te; 
Deuteronomy11:6 Reubena fa Eliaba fapa Dathana leh Abirama te chunga a tih dan te; leiin a ka a ana Israel mite zawng zawng zinga anmahni leh an chhungte leh an puan in te leh an ran hruai zawng zawng a lem vek dan te hre lo in thlahte hnena sawi ka ni lo a; 
Deuteronomy11:7 in mit ngeia lalapan thilropui tak a tih zawng zawng hmututt hnenah ani zawk e. 
Deuteronomy11:8 chuvangin in lo chak a, luah tura in va pan ram chu in luah theihna'n leh hnutetui lehkhawizu luanna ram, in pi leh pute leh an thlahte pek tura LALPA'n chhia a chham ramahch huan in chen reitheihna'n tuna thu ke pek che u, thupek zawng zawngte hi in zawm tur ani." 
Deuteronomy11:9 chuvangin in lo chak a, luah tura in va pan ram chu in luah theihna'n leh hnutetui lehkhawizu luanna ram, in pi leh pute leh an thlahte pek tura LALPA'n chhia a chham ramahch huan in chen reitheihna'n tuna thu ke pek che u, thupek zawng zawngte hi in zawm tur ani." 
Deuteronomy11:10 In va luah tur ram chu, in lo chhuahna Aigupta ram, thlai huana chi in tuh a, in kea tui inleih thinna ang a ni lo va:" 
Deuteronomy11:11 in va luah tur ram chu, tlang te leh ruam leh van ruahtui dawng ram ani zawk a." 
Deuteronomy11:12 LALPA in Pathian zawn chhuah ram ani a; LALPA inpathian mit chu kum thar atanga a tawp thlengin a fu reng thin. 
Deuteronomy11:13 Tin, heti hi ani ang a, LALPA in Pathian chu in hmangaih tur leh in thinlung zawng zawng leh in rilru zawng zawnga a rawngbawl tura ka thupek tuna ka pek che u hi thahnem ngai taka in zawm chuan," 
Deuteronomy11:14 in ram ruahtui chu a hun rakah, ruahtui tla hmasa leh ruahtui tla hnuhnung chu ka pe ang che u a, tichuan in buh te, in uain te, in hriak te in seng lut thei ang." 
Deuteronomy11:15 In rante tan pawh in ramah hlobet te ka awmtir bawk ang a, nangni pawhin in ei ang a, in tlai ang." 
Deuteronomy11:16 fimkhur rawh u khai; chutilochuan in thinlung chu bumin a awm ang a; in peng ang a, Pathian dan rawng te in bawl ang a, in be mai dah ang e;" 
Deuteronomy11:17 chuti anih chuan LALPA thin in chungah alothawk ang a, van chu a kahr ang a, ruah a sur lo ang a, lei chuan a rah a chhuah lo ang a, tichuan lalapa pek che u ram tha tak ata hi inboral thuai mai ang." 
Deuteronomy11:18 chuvangin he'ng ka thute hi in thinlung leh in rilruah khung u la, chhinchhiahna atan in ban in zem ang a, tin, in mit leh mit inkara chalhrenna atan a awm bawk tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:19 chung chu in fate in ziritir ang a, in ina in thut lai te, kawnga in kal lai te, in mut lai te, in thawh hun tein in sawi thin tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Tin, in kawngka biangah te, in kawngkharah te in ziak tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy11:21 tichuan in pi leh pute pek tura chhia a chham ramah chuan in dam chhung ni leh in fate dam chung ni chu lei chunga van ni ang khian a tisei ang. 
Deuteronomy11:22 LALPA in Pathian chu hmangaih tur le a kawng zawng zawng zawh tur leh amah vuan tlat tura thahnemngai taka he'ng thu ka pek che u thupek zawng zawngte hi in zawm phawt zangin," 
Deuteronomy11:23 LALPA chuan he'ng hnam zawng zawng hi ahnawhchhuahsak ang che u a, in aia ropui zawk leh thil tithei zak hnamte ram chu in luah ang." 
Deuteronomy11:24 In kephaha in rah apiang chu in ta ani ang a, thlaler atang leh Lebanon tlang atangin lui, Euphrates lui atang chuan thlang lam tuifinriat thlengin in ram ani ang." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Tumah reng rengin an chel lo ang che u; LALPA in Pathianin in hnena a sawi tawh ang khan in va rah tur ram zawng zawngah chuan nangmahni tihna leh hlauhna a awmtir ang. 
Deuteronomy11:26 Ngai teh u, vawiinah hian in hmaah malsawmna le anchhia ka dah a;" 
Deuteronomy11:27 LALPA in Pathian thupekte tuna ka pek che u hi in zawm chuan, malsawmna;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 LALPA in Pathian thupete chu in zawm loh a, in hriat ngai loh pathian dangte be tura ka thupek che u inpensan erawh chuan, anchhia." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, in va luah tur rama LALPA in Pathianin a hruai lu che u hunah chuan, malsawmna chu Gerizim tlangah in dah ang a, anchhia chu Ebal tlangah." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Ni tlakna piah, Araba a awm, Kanaan-ho ram, Gilgal zawn More sasaw sir, Jordan rala mi a ni lo'm ni?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 LALPA in Pathianin a pek che u ram va luah tur chuan Jordan chu in kan tur ani a, in luah ang a, chutah chuan in awm ang.Tin, tuna in hmaa ka dah, dan leh rorel zawng zawng chu zawm turin in fimkhur tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Tin, tuna in hmaa ka dah, dan leh rorel zawng zawng chu zawm turin in fimkhur tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:1 LALPA in pi leh pute Pathianin a pek che u ram in luah a, leilunga in awm chunga fimkhur taka in zawm tur dan te leh rorel dante chu hengte hi a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:2 In va luah tur ram hnamte tlang lian te, tlang te te, thing hring tin, hnuai tea an pathiante rawng an bawlna hmun zawng zawngte chu in tichhe vek tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy12:3 an maichamte in tichim ang a, an lungphunte in tisawm vek ang a, an Aser te in hal tur a ni; an pathian lem siam chawpte chu in kihsak ang a, chuta an hming chu in thai bo tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:4 chutiang chuan LALPA in Pathian chungah in ti tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy12:5 LALPA in Pathianin in hnam zawng zawng zinga a hming awmna tur hmun a la ruat tur chu in zawng zawk ang a, chuta chuan in kal tur a ni," 
Deuteronomy12:6 chutah chuan in halral thilhlan te, inthawina te, in sawma pakhat te, in duh thua thilhlan te, in ran rual leh in beram rual zinga piang hmasa berte in rawn la tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy12:7 tin, chutah chuan LALPA in Pathian hmaah in ei ang a, in kutkawih LALPA in Pathianin mal a sawmna che uah chuan hlim takin in awm tur ani, in chhungkuain." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Mi tinin mahni tha tihzawng ang maia tuna kan tih ang hian in ti tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy12:9 Jordan lui in kai a, LALPA in Pathianin a luahtir tur che ua in awm a, him taka in awm theihna tura in vela hmelma zawng zawngte laka a chawlhtir hunah che u erawh chuan heti hi a ni ang a," 
Deuteronomy12:10 LALPA in Pathianin a hming awmtirna tur a ruat hmuna rawn lak tura ka tih zawng zawngte chu chutah chuan in rawn la tur nai, in halral thilhlan te, in inthawina te, in sawma pakhat e, in kut then thilhlan te, LALPA hnena in tiam tha thate chu;" 
Deuteronomy12:11 tin, LALPA in Pathian hmaah chuan hlim takin in awm ang, nangmahni leh in fapate nen, in ina awm, Levi-hote nen, anni chuan in zingah chanvo leh ram nei ve si hek lo." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Hmun in hmuhna apiangah in halral thilhlante hlan ma lo turin fimkhur rawh u khai: 
Deuteronomy12:13 in hnamte zinga LALPA'n a la ruat tur hmunah chuan in halral thilhlante chu in hlan zawk ang a, chutah chuan thu ka pek zawng zawng che u chu in ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:14 Amaherawhchu LALPA in Pathianin malsawmna a dawntir che u ang zelin in nunnain a hchak ang ang chu in In theuhvah in talh ang a, a sa in ei thei ang; thianghlim lote leh thianghlimte pawhin sangai te, sakhite ang hi chu an ei thei ang." 
Deuteronomy12:15 A thisen erawh chu in ei tur ani lo; tui angin leiah in leihbaw tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy12:16 In inah chuan sawma pakhat, in bu te, in uain te, in hriak te leh in ran rual leh beram rual zinga piang hmasa ber te, in thutiama mi te, in duhthua thilhlan te, in kut then thilhlante chu in ei thei lo ang a;" 
Deuteronomy12:17 LALPA in Pathian in hmun a la ruat turah, LALPA in Pathian hmaah in ei zawk tur a ni, nangmahni leh in fapa te leh in fanu te, in bawihpa te, in bawihnu te, in khuaa awm Levi-hote nen; LALPA in Pathianhmaah in kutkawih apiangah him takin in awm tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:18 In rama in awm chhung zawng Levi-ho chu thlauthla lo turin fimkhur rawh u. 
Deuteronomy12:19 LALPA in Pathianin a tiam che u anga in ram a tihzau a, in nunnain sa ei a chak avanga, 'Sa ka ei ang,' in tih hunah chuan, in nunnain a chakzawng apiang sa chu in ei thei ang." 
Deuteronomy12:20 LALPA in Pathianin ahming awmna a la ruat tur chu in hlat luattuk chuan, thu ka pek che u ang khan LALPA'n a pek che u in ran rual leh in beram rual zinga mi in talh ang a, in nunnain a chak angzawng chu in inah in ei tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Sangai sa te, sakhi sa te in ei ang maiin in ei ang a, thianghlim lote leh thianghlimte pawhin angkhat rengin in ei ang." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Thisen eraw chu ei lo turin fimkhur rawh u; thisen chu nunna a ni si a; nunna chawpin sa chu in ei tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy12:23 In ei hauh lo tur a ni; tui angin leiah in leihbaw mai tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy12:24 In ei tur ani lo; tichuan LALPA mithmuha thil dik inti hian nangmahni leh in hnua in fate tan a la tha dawn nia. 
Deuteronomy12:25 In thil thianghlimte leh in thutiama mite chauh keng u la, LALPA'n hmun a la ruat turah chuan kal ang che u:" 
Deuteronomy12:26 tin, LALPA in Pathian maichamah in halral thilhlan chu, a sa leh a thisen in hlan ang a; tin, in inthawina thisente chu LALPA in Pathian maichamah chuan in chhung chhuak ang a, a sa chu in ei ang." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Heng thu ka pek zawng zawng che u hi ngun takin ngaichang rawh u, tichuan LALPA in Pathian mithmuha thi tha leh thil dik in ti hian in tan leh in hnua in fate tan kumkhuain a la tha dawn nia." 
Deuteronomy12:28 LALPA in Pathianin in va hneh tur hnamte a tihbosak che u a, an ram in luah a, in khawsak hunah chuan," 
Deuteronomy12:29 tiborala an awmna angah khan in aw ve lohna turin fimkhur u la, 'Heng hnamte hian engtin nge an pathian rawng an bawl? An tih angin keini pawhin I ti ve ang u,' tiin an pathiante chungchang thute zawt vel suh uu." 
Deuteronomy12:30 chutiang hchuan LALPA in Pathian chungah in ti tur ani lo; an pathian chungah chuan LALPA ngaiha thil tenawm tinreng, a huat tak maite chu an ti thin a; an fapa te, an fanute ngei pawh an pathiante tan an hla thin a ni.Tih tura thu ka pek che u apiang chu in ti tur a ni; in belhchhah tur a ni lo a, in tikiam tur a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Tih tura thu ka pek che u apiang chu in ti tur a ni; in belhchhah tur a ni lo a, in tikiam tur a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy13:1 In zingah zawlnei emaw, mang neitu emaw an lo awm a, chhinchiahna emaw, thil mak emaw an entir che u a," 
Deuteronomy13:2 chhinchhiahna emaw, thil mak emaw an entir che u a lo thlen a, in hriat ngai loh, 'Pathian dang i zui ang u khai, an rawng i bawl ang u,' in hnena an tih chuan," 
Deuteronomy13:3 chu zawlnei emaw, mang neitu emaw thute chu in pawm tur ani lo; LALPA in Pathian chuan in thinlung zawng zawng leh in nunna zawng zawngin LALPA in Pathian chu in hmangaih nge hmangaih lo tih hriatna'n a fiah che u ani e." 
Deuteronomy13:4 LALPA in Pathian chu in zui ang a, amah chu in tih ang a, a thupekte chu in zawm ang a, a thusawite chu in pawm ang a, a rawngte in bawl ang a, amah chu in vuan tlat tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Tin, chu zawlnei emaw, mang neitu emaw hchu tihhlum tur a ni. Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuak a, bawih ata tlantu che u LALPA in Pathian zawh tur chu a pek che u kawng ata chu tipeng tur che u a, LALPA in Pathian chunga helna thu a sawi avangin chutiang huan in zinga thi tha lo chu in tibo tur ani." 
Deuteronomy13:6 I unaupa emaw, i fapa emaw, i nupui pawm lai emaw, i thian bul emaw pawhin in thlahtute la biak ngai lo pathian dangte be turin an thlem thei che u a," 
Deuteronomy13:7 in bul hnaia chengte pathian emaw, ram hla taka chengte pathian emaw emaw be turin an rawn thei che u a." 
Deuteronomy13:8 mahse chutiang mi chuan an thlem thlu tur che u a ni lo, an thurawn chu ngaithla suh ang che u. In khawngaihin, in thupin in zuah tur ani hek lo." 
Deuteronomy13:9 In tihlum ngei ngei tur a ni zawk a; a tihlum turin kut i thlak hmasa ang a, chu mi hnuah mipui zawng zawngin." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Lungin in deng hlum tur a ni, Aigupta ram atanga bawih ata hruai chhuaktu che u LALPA in Pathian hnen aa tihpenna che u a zawn avangin." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Tichuan Israel mi zawng zawngin an hria ang a, an hlau vang a, in zingah chutiang suahsual reng reng chu an ching taw lo ang." 
Deuteronomy13:12 LALPA in Pathianin in awmna tura a pek che u in khaw pakhatah chuan 
Deuteronomy13:13 in zing ata mi dukdak lo thenkhat lo chhuak a, chu mi khawpuia mite chu in hriat ngai lo pathian dangte be turin an hruai bo tih thusawi in hriat chuan" 
Deuteronomy13:14 zawt vel u la, zawng chhuak u la, thahnemngai takin zawt rawh u; tin, ngai teh u, thu dik a lo ni a, chutiang thil tenawm in zingah tih ani tih hriat chian ani chuan" 
Deuteronomy13:15 khandaihin chu mi khuaa awmte chu in tihlum ngei ngei tur ani a; a chhunga awm zawng zawng te, ran rualte nen khandaihin in tiboral vek tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Tin, rallak sum zawng zawng chu khawlaiah in la kahwm ang a, tin, khua leh rallak sum zawng zawng chu LALPA in Pathian hnenah pumhal thilhlanah in hal ang a, lei pawng mai ani kumkhua ang a, din ani leh tawh lo ang." 
Deuteronomy13:17 ,18 rallak sum chu a engamah in khawih tur ani lo; LALPA chuan a thinurna nasa tak chu alamlet ang a, zahngaihna a hmuhtir ang che u a, a khawngaih ang che u a, LALPA in Pathian mithmuha thi tha it tura thupek zawng zawng tuna ka pek che u hi in zawm phawt chuan a tipung dawn che u nia, in pi pute hnena chhia a lo chham tawh ang khan.,17 rallak sum chu a engamah in khawih tur ani lo; LALPA chuan a thinurna nasa tak chu alamlet ang a, zahngaihna a hmuhtir ang che u a, a khawngaih ang che u a, LALPA in Pathian mithmuha thi tha it tura thupek zawng zawng tuna ka pek che u hi in zawm phawt chuan a tipung dawn che u nia, in pi pute hnena chhia a lo chham tawh ang khan." 
Deuteronomy13:18 ,17 rallak sum chu a engamah in khawih tur ani lo; LALPA chuan a thinurna nasa tak chu alamlet ang a, zahngaihna a hmuhtir ang che u a, a khawngaih ang che u a, LALPA in Pathian mithmuha thi tha it tura thupek zawng zawng tuna ka pek che u hi in zawm phawt chuan a tipung dawn che u nia, in pi pute hnena chhia a lo chham tawh ang khan." 
Deuteronomy14:1 LALPA in Pathian fate in ni a; mitthi avangin in inzai tur a ni lo. In mit hmul in met kawng tur a ni hek lo. 
Deuteronomy14:2 LALPA in Pathian tan hnam thianghlim in ni si a, leilunga hnam zawng zawng zinga a pual bik ni tura LALPA'n a tlan che u in ni a." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Thil tenawm reng reng in ei tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Heng sate hi a ni, in ei theih tur chu; bawngpa te, beram te, kel te," 
Deuteronomy14:5 sakhi te, sangai te, sakhipa te, sathar te, ram kel te, ram lawi te, ram beram te hi." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Tin, sa tinreng, tin, kaka tin, kak chhuak, thialret thial chi tawh phawt zinga mi chu in ei thei ang." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Amaheawhchu he'ng thialret pawh thial si, an tin, pawh kak site hi chu, in ei tur a ni lo; sanghawngsei te, zupi te, szupui te hi, thialret chu an thial na a, an tin, a kak loh avangin in tan a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Tin, vawk hi a tin, chu a kak na a, thialret a thial loh avangin in tan a bawlhhlawh a ni; a sa in ei tur ani lo a, a ruang pawh in khawi tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Tuia cheng zawng zawnga hengte hi in ei thei ang: pangparh leh phuhlip nei tawh phawt chu in ei thei ang a," 
Deuteronomy14:10 pangparh leh phuhlip nei lo apiangte chu in ei thei lo ang, in tan a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Deuteronomy14:11 Sava thianghlim zawng zawng chu in ei thei ang a," 
Deuteronomy14:12 Hengte erawh hi chu in ei tur a ni lo: mipui te, lungdup te, muarla te," 
Deuteronomy14:13 mulukawlh te, ngawihup e, mute chi reng reng te;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 choak chi reng reng e; 
Deuteronomy14:15 sava sang te, vabak te, tuifinriat sava te, mu chi reng reng te," 
Deuteronomy14:16 hrangkir te, chhimbuk te, chingpirinu te, chhimbuksialki te;" 
Deuteronomy14:17 tuivalawng te, mulukawlh te, lui dung mu te;" 
Deuteronomy14:18 kanghlai te, dil sava chi reng reng e, chhuangtuar leh bak te." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Thla nei kea kal chi zawng zawng te chu in tan thil bawlhhlawh a ni a," 
Deuteronomy14:20 Sava thianghlim zawng zawngte chu in ei thei ang. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Amaha thi chu engma in ei tur ani lo; in awmpui ram dang mite ei atan in pe thei ang a; hnam dang mite hnenah in hral thei bawk ang; nangni zawng LALPA in Pathian tana hnam thianghlim in ni si a. Kel note chu a pi hnutein in chum tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy14:22 Kum tin in loa thlai haw zawng zawng sawma pakhat in tihrang ngei ngei tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy14:23 LALPA in Pathian tih nachang in lo hriat fo theihna'n sawma pakhat, in buh te, in uain te, in hriak te leh in bawng rual leh in beram rual zinga piang hmasa berte chu LALPA in Pathian hmaah, a hming awmna tura a la ruat turah chuan in eit ur a ni." 
Deuteronomy14:24 LALPA in Pathianin mal sawmhun che u a, LALPA in Pathianin a hming awmna tur a la ruat tur hu a hlat lutuk avanga in tnan kawng a thui luattuka in ken theih loh chuan," 
Deuteronomy14:25 ah in chantir ang a, pawisa chu in keng ang a, LALPA in Pathian hmun ruatah chuan in kal tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy14:26 tin, pawisa chu in rilrua in duh ber, bawngpa emaw, beram emaw, uain emaw, zupui emaw, in rilrua in chak zawng ang apiang atan in hmang ang a; chuta chuan LALPA in Pathian hmaah in ei ang a, hlim takin in awm tur a ni, nangni leh inchhungte nen;" 
Deuteronomy14:27 Levi-ho in awmnaa awmte chu thlauthla hauh suh ang che u; in zingah chanvo pawh, rochan pawh an nei ve si lo a." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Kum thum a vei kum apiangin chu mi kuma in thil hawng zawng zawnga sawma pakhat chu in la khawm vek ang a, in awmnaah in da tur a ni;tin, in awmnaa awm Levi-ho pawh, in zinga chanvo, rochan pawh nei ve lote leh ram dang mite leh pa nei lote leh hmeithaite chuan an ei ang a, an lo kahwsa ve thei ang; tichuan LALPA in Pathianin in kutkawih zawng zawngah chuan mal a sawm dawn che u nia." 
Deuteronomy14:29 tin, in awmnaa awm Levi-ho pawh, in zinga chanvo, rochan pawh nei ve lote leh ram dang mite leh pa nei lote leh hmeithaite chuan an ei ang a, an lo kahwsa ve thei ang; tichuan LALPA in Pathianin in kutkawih zawng zawngah chuan mal a sawm dawn che u nia." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Tin, kum sarih a vei kum apiangin ngaihdamna in siam tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Ngaihdam dan chu hetiang hi a ni: leiba neitu apiangin an thenawmte an lo puktir chu an ngaidam tur a ni; a thenawm pawh, a unau pawh a thing lui tur ani lo, LALPA ngaihdamna chu puan a nih tawh avangin." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Hnamdang mi chu in thing lui thei ang a; amaherawhchu in ta engpawh in unaute lo hman chu in ngaidam tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy15:4 Heng thupek tuna ka thupek zawng zawng che u hi pawm tura lalpain pathian aw chu thahnemngai taka in zawm phawt chuan mi rethei reng reng in awm hauh lo ang a. (LALPA i Pathianin luah tura a pek che u ramah chuan LALPA'n mal a sawm ngei ngei dawn che u a ni); 
Deuteronomy15:5 LALPA in Pathianchuan a tiam che u angin mal a sawm ang che u a, hnam tam tak in puktir ang a, nangni erawh chuan in puk lo ang; hnam tam tak chungah ro in rel ang a," 
Deuteronomy15:6 in chungah erawh chuan ro an rel ve lo ang. 
Deuteronomy15:7 LALPA'n ram a pek che u in awmnaah in unaute zingah rethei an awm chuan in unau retheite lakah chuan in rilru tikhauh suh u la, kawm hek suh u," 
Deuteronomy15:8 an lakah chuan in thilphal ngei ngei tur a ni a, an tlakchhamnaa an mamawh phuhrukna khawp in puktir tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Ngihdam kum, kum sarihna chu a lo thleng dawn ta,' tiin in unau retheite chu hmumawha engmah pe duh loin in thinlungah dik lo taka ngaihtuahna awm lo turin fimkhur rawh u; chutilochuan ani chuan i chungchang thuah LALPA a au ang a, in tan sual a lo ni dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy15:10 In pe ngei ngei tur ani a; tin, in pek hunah pawh inthinlung a hnur hauh lo tur a ni; chutiang thil avang chuan a ni, LALPA in Pathianin in thiltih zanw zangh leh in kutkawih zawng zawngah mal a sawm dawn che u ni." 
Deuteronomy15:11 chu ramah chuan mi retheite awm loh lai a awm dawn si lo a; chuvangin, ' In rama in unaute chungah te, tlachham te chungah te, in mi retheite chungah te, in thilphal ngei ngei tur a ni,' tiin thu ka pe che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy15:12 In unau, Hebrai pa emaw, Hebrai nu emaw, in hnena an hralh a, kum ruk in rawng an bawl chuan, kum saih kum chuan in chauhtir tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Tin, in chhuahtir hunchuan kutbengin in chhuahtir tur ani lo;" 
Deuteronomy15:14 in bera ruala mi te, in hruia mi te, in uain swr khura mi te ui lo takin in pe tur a ni; LALPA in Pathianin mal a sawm dan che ang zelin in pe tur a ni," 
Deuteronomy15:15 Aigupta ramah khan bawih in ni tawh a, LALPA in Pathianin a tlan che u tih kha in hre reng tur a ni; chuvang chuan a ni, tunah hian he'ng thu hi ka pek che u ni." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, nangmahni leh in chhungkua an ngainat avang leh in intihthiam avanga in hnena, 'Ka chauhsan lo ang che u,' an tih tlat chuan" 
Deuteronomy15:17 thir zum in la ang a, kawngkhar chhanah an beng in vit ang a, tichuan kumkhuain in bawih an ni ang. Tin, in bawihnu pawh chutiang bawk chuan in ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy15:18 chhuahtir chu thil harah in ngai tur a ni lo. In hlawhfa thawh lehhnih thawkin kum ruk in rawng an bawlsak tawh si che u a; tin, LALPA in Pathianin in thiltih apiangah mal a sawm zel ang che u." 
Deuteronomy15:19 In ran rual te, in beram rualte zinga a pa," 
Deuteronomy15:20 LALPA in Pathian hmaah kum tinin LALPA'n hmun a la ruat turah chuan in ei tur a ni, nangni leh inchhungte nen." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Sawisel kaina nei, a ke bai emaw a mit del emaw, sawisel kaina nei tawh phawt chu LALPA in Pathian hnena inthawina'n in hmang tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Nangmahni awmhmunah in ei tur a ni; thianghlim lote leh thianghlimte pawhin he'ng sangai te, sakhi te ang hi chu in ei thei ang.A thisen erawh chu in ei hauh lo tur a ni; tui angin leiah in leihbaw mai tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy15:23 A thisen erawh chu in ei hauh lo tur a ni; tui angin leiah in leihbaw mai tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy16:1 Abib thla chu thla serhah nei u la, LALPA in Pathian tana Kalhlen Kutna'n hmang rawh u: Abib thla hian a ni, LALPA in Pathian chuan Aigupta ram ata zanah a hruai chauh che u ni." 
Deuteronomy16:2 LALPA'n a hming awmna a la ruat turah chuan LALPA in Pathian hnenah in beram rual zinga mi leh ran rual zinga miin Kalhlen Kutah in inthawi tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy16:3 chhang dawidim telh nen in ei tur a ni lo; in dam chung zawnga Aigupta ram ata in chauh ni chu in hriat reng theihna'n ni sarih chang dawidim telh loh, hreawmna chhang nen in ei tur a ni, Aigupta ram atang chuan hmanhmawh taka chhuak in nih kha." 
Deuteronomy16:4 In ram chhungah ni sarih chhung chu, dawidim reng reng a awm tur a ni lo a; tin, ni khat ni tlai lama in inthawina sa chu zankhuain a tuk zing thlengin engma a awm tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy16:5 LALPA in Pathianin a pek che u in awmna khawiah mah Kalhlen Kut inthawiin in inthawi thei lo ang a; 
Deuteronomy16:6 LALPA in Pathianin a hming awmna a la ruat turah chauh chuan ani ang; chutah chuan Aigupta ram ata in lo chhuah hun ang tlai lamah, ni tlakah Kalhlen Kut inthawin in inthawi tur ani a." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Tin, in rawh ang a, LALPA'n hmun a la ruat turah chuan in ei ang a, tin, zingah in haw leh ang a, in puan inah inkal tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Ni ruk chhung chu chhang dawidim telh loh in ei tur a ni; tin, a ni sarih ni chu LALPA in Pathian tan inkhawmpui thianghlim ani ang a, hna in thawk tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy16:9 chawlhkar sarih inchhut ang a; in u seng tan ni atangin chawlhkar sarih chu in chhut tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy16:10 LALPA in Pathianin mal a sawm che u ang zelin in deh chhuah zinga mi mahni duh thua thilhlan chu hlanin LALPA in Pathian tan chawlhkar kut in nei tur a ni; 
Deuteronomy16:11 tin, LALPA in Pathianin a hming awmna a la ruat turah chuan nangni nen, in fapa te, in fanu te, in bawihpa te, in bawihnu te, in awmnaa awm Lei-ho te, hmeithaite nen LALPA in Pathian hmaah hlim takin in awm ang a;" 
Deuteronomy16:12 Tin, Aigupta ramah khan bawih in ni tih in hre reng tur ani a; tin, he'ng dante hi fimkhur takin in zawm tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy16:13 In hrui ata leh in uain sawr khur ata in chhek khawm zawhah ni sarih chhng bawkte kut in nei tur a ni; 
Deuteronomy16:14 in kutah chuan nangni nen, in fapa te, in fanu te, in bawihpa te, in bawihnu te, in awmnaa awm Levi-ho te, ram dang mi te, pa nei lo te, hmeithaite nen hlim takin in awm tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy16:15 LALPA'n hmun a la ruat turah chuan LALPA in Pathian tan ni sarih inkut tur a ni; LALPA in Pathianinin thil haw zawng zawngah leh in kutkawih zawng zawngah te mal a sawm ang che u a, lawm tak hlirin in awm dawn nia." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Kum tin, in mipa zawng zawngte chu vawi thum LALPA hmaah hmun a la ruat turah chuan an inlan tur a ni,chhang dawidim telh loh kutah te, chawlhkar kutah te, bawkte kutah te; tin, LALPA hmaah tumah kutruakin in inlan tur a ni lo a," 
Deuteronomy16:17 LALPA in Pathianin malsawmna a dawntir che u ang zelin mi tinin an theih ang tawk an pe tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy16:18 LALPA in Pathianin a pek che u in kulh kawngka zawng zawngah inhnam ang zelin roreltute leh hotute in insiam theuh vang a, mipute ro fel takin an rel sak tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Dik lo takin ro in rel tur ani lo; tumah duhsak bik in nei tur a ni lo; thilpek in la tur ani hek lo; thilpek chuan mi fingte mit a tihdelsak a, mi felte thu a tihkhawlohsak si thin a." 
Deuteronomy16:20 LALPA in Pathianin a pek che u ram chu nungdama in luah theihna'n a fel chauha chu in zawm tur a ni.LALPA in Pathianin a huatzawng lung pawh in phun tur a ni hek lo. 
Deuteronomy16:21 LALPA in Pathianin a huatzawng lung pawh in phun tur a ni hek lo. 
Deuteronomy17:1 ,3 In zingah LALPA in Pathianin a pek che u in awmna khawiah pawh mipa emaw, hmeichai emaw pawh, thuthlung bawhchia a pathian dang rawng va bawl a, ka thupek loh, ni emaw, thla emaw, vana mi reng reng bia a, LALPA in Pathian mithmuha thi tha lo ti an awm a," 
Deuteronomy17:2 ,2 In zingah LALPA in Pathianin a pek che u in awmna khawiah pawh mipa emaw, hmeichai emaw pawh, thuthlung bawhchia a pathian dang rawng va bawl a, ka thupek loh, ni emaw, thla emaw, vana mi reng reng bia a, LALPA in Pathian mithmuha thi tha lo ti an awm a," 
Deuteronomy17:3 an hrilh chia, nangin i lo hriat a, thahnemngai taka in zawh a, tin, ngai teh, a lo dik a, thu a chian chiaha chutiang thil tenawm Israelte zinga tih a lo nih chuan," 
Deuteronomy17:4 chu thIl sual titu, mipa emaw, hmeichia emaw chu in kulh kawngkhar pawnah mipa emaw, hmeichia emaw ngei chu in hruai chhuak ang a, lungin in deng hlum tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy17:5 Hretu pahni emaw, pathum emaw ka atangin thi tura chu tihhlum tur ani a, hretu pakhat ka atang chuan tihhlum tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Tihhlumna turah chuan hretute chuan kut an thlak hmasa ang a, chu mi hnuah mipui zawng zawngin. chutaing chuan in zing ata chu thil tha lo chu in tibo tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Thisen inchhuah thu-ah te, sum leh pai thu-ah te, invuak thu-ah te, in awmnaa inkhinna thu reng reng tea in tana rel harsa lutuk a lo awm chuan, LALPA in Pathianin hmun a la ruat tura chuan in kal ang a," 
Deuteronomy17:8 chu mi huna puithiam Levi-hote leh roreltute hnenah chuan in kal ang a, in rawn ang a; tin, annin thu tihthluk dan an lo kawhhmu dawn che u nia;" 
Deuteronomy17:9 tichuan nangnin LALPA'n hmun a la ruat tur atanga thu tihthluk dan an lo kawhhmuh che u ang chuan in ti ang a, an zirtir che u ang zelin fimkhur takin in ti dawn nia." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Thu tihthluk dan an lo zitir che u leh rorel dan an lo hrilh che u ang zel chuan in ti ang a: thu tihthluk dan an lo kawhhmuh che u chu ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw in pensan tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy17:11 LALPA in Pathian hmaa rawngbawla tang thin puithiam leh roreltu thu pawm lo a, tilui apiang, chu mi chu tihhlumt tur a ni: Israel zing ata, chu thil tha lo chu in tibo tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Tichuan mi zawng zawngin an hria ang a, an hlau vang a, an tilui leh tawh lo ang." 
Deuteronomy17:13 LALPA in Pathianin ram a pek che u in va thlen a, in va luah a, in va awm a, 'Kan vela hnam zawng zawngte ang bawkin lal i nei ang u, in tih hunah chuan;" 
Deuteronomy17:14 LALPA in Pathianin a thlana ngei chu lalah in nei tur a ni a: in unau zinga mi pakhat in lalah in siam tur a ni; hnam dang mi, in unau ni lo chu nangmahni awptu atan in siam tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Amaherawhchu sakawr a ngah tur ani lo ang a, sakawr a ngah theihna'n Aigupta rama mite nen chuan inthurual tur a ni bawk hek lo: LALPA chuan, ""tun achinah chuan chu mi lama chuan in let leh tawh tur a ni lo, ' in hnenah a ti tawh tlat si a." 
Deuteronomy17:16 A rilru a vahbo lohna'n nupui pawh angah tur ani lo a, tangka leh rangkachak pawh a ngah tur ani hek lo." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, a ram lalthutthlenga a thut hun chuan puithiam Levi-hote kawl thin dan hi lehkabuah a ziak chhawntir ang a;" 
Deuteronomy17:18 a kawl ang a, a dam chhung zawng a chhiar thin tur a ni, he'ng dan leh he'ng thuruat zawng zawngte hi pawm a, zawma ti tura LALPA a Pathian tih dana zir theih a,a rilru a unaute chungah a dah lo va ding lama emaw, vei lamah emaw, thupek chu a pensan lohna tur leh Israelte zinga amah leh a thlahte a ramah hian an dam rei phahna'n a chhiar thin tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy17:19 a rilru a unaute chungah a dah lo va ding lama emaw, vei lamah emaw, thupek chu a pensan lohna tur leh Israelte zinga amah leh a thlahte a ramah hian an dam rei phahna'n a chhiar thin tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Puithiam Levi-ho, Levi hnam zawng zawng chuan Israelte zingah chanvo leh rochan an nei tur ani lo a; LALPA hnena meia thilhlan leh a puala mi an ei tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:2 An unaute zingah rochan an nei tur a ni lo: an rochan chu an hnena a sawi angin LALPA a ni si a. 
Deuteronomy18:3 Inthawina hlantu mipuite laka puithiam pual tur chu he'ng hi a ni ang - bawngpa pawh, beram pawh, a dar leh a bekbawr khing hnih leh a pumpui puithiam an pe tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:4 In buhbal te, in uain te, in hriak haw hmasa te, in beram hmul meh hmasak berte in pe bawk tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:5 LALPA in Pathianin Lalpa hminga rawngbawla awm kumkhua turin in hnam zawng zawng zing ata a thlan an ni si a, anmahni leh an fapate nen." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Tin, Levi mi tupawh a awmna Israel ram in awmna a khawii pawh chauhsan a, a rilrua chak taka LALPA'n a la ruat tur hmunah a lo kal chuan," 
Deuteronomy18:7 chuta LALPA hmaa awm thin Levi-ho, a unaute ang bawkin LALPA a Pathian hming in rawng a bawl tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:8 An puithiam man tiam loin mi dang pual ang ei tur chu an chang ve tho ang. 
Deuteronomy18:9 LALPA in pathianin a pek che u ram in va thlen hun chuan chung hnamte thil tenawmte tih ang chu in ching ve tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy18:10 A fapa emaw, a fanu emaw meia kal tlangtir te, aien ching e, thumvawr ching te emaw, mitlakdawi hmang emaw te, dawithiam te," 
Deuteronomy18:11 dawi at te ramhuai zawl rawih te, dawithiam te, mitthi biak ching mite in zinga anaw awm tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Heng thil ti mi apiangte hi LALPA ngaihin mi tenawm an ni si a: tin, he'ng thil tenawm avang hian a ni, LALPA in Pathianin a hnawhchauhsak che u ni," 
Deuteronomy18:13 LALPA in Pathian hmaah in tha famkim tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy18:14 chung in va luah tur rama hnamte chuan thumvawr leh aien chingte an pawm thin a; nangni zawng LALPA in Pathianin chutiang tih chu a pahl lo a ni. 
Deuteronomy18:15 LALPA in Pathianin, keimah ang hi in unaute zinga mi, zawlnei a siamsak ang che u: a thu chu in ngai tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy18:16 LALPA kan Pathian aw chu min hriattir tawh suh la, he mei sa tak hi min hmuhtir leh tawh suh la, kan thi dah ang e' tia Horeb tlanga pun khawm nia LALPA in Pathian in duh dan ang khan." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, An tusawi chu an sawi tha hle a." 
Deuteronomy18:18 An unaute zinga nangmahni ang zawlnei ka siamsak a; a kaah ka thute ka dah ang a, a hnena thu ka pek apiang chu an hnenah a sawi ang a." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, ka hminga ka thu a sawi pawm lo apiang chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ka hminga sawi tur ka pek loh sawi luitu zawlnei emaw, pathian dangte hminga thu sawitu zawlnei emaw, chu zawlnei chu tihhlum tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Tin, in thinlunga Engtin nge thu chu LALPA sawi a ni lo tih kan hriat ang? In tihch huan,zawlneiin LALPA hminga thu a sawi a, a thil sawi chu a lo thlen loh va a hlawhtlin loh chuan chu chu a ni, LALPA sawi loha chu; zawlnei chuan uangthuang takin an sawi mai mai a ni, amah chu in hlau tur a ni lo,' a ti a." 
Deuteronomy18:22 zawlneiin LALPA hminga thu a sawi a, a thil sawi chu a lo thlen loh va a hlawhtlin loh chuan chu chu a ni, LALPA sawi loha chu; zawlnei chuan uangthuang takin an sawi mai mai a ni, amah chu in hlau tur a ni lo,' a ti a." 
Deuteronomy19:1 LALPA in Pathianin an ram a pek che u hnam LALPA'n a tihbo a, in luah a, an khuaah te, an inah te in awm hunah chuan," 
Deuteronomy19:2 LALPA in Pathianin luah tura a pek che u in ramah chuan in tan khaw pathum in ruat tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Tualthat apiang an tlan luhna turin, LALPA'n a luahtir tur che u ram chu hmun thumah in then ang a, in ramrite in siam ang a, kawngte in buatsaih tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Tin, tualthatte chuta tlan luta him theite chu hengte hi an ni; miin a thenawm khawveng tun hma lama huatna paw nei lem loa that palh apiangte," 
Deuteronomy19:5 mi a thenawm khawveng nen thing kit tura ram kala thing kit tura a hrei han chek a, hrei fang thlawnin thenawm khawveng chu vawm hlum ta ang te hi, chu mi zinga khaw pakhatah chuan a tlan ang a, a him ang a," 
Deuteronomy19:6 thisen phuba latu chuan a thinur lin laia tualthattu chu a um a, kawng a thui avanga umphakin a va vaw hlum hlauh dah ang e: tun hma lama huatna te lo nei lem lo a ni avangin thi awm a ni si lo." 
Deuteronomy19:7 chuvangin, 'Khaw pathum in tan in ruat tur a ni,' tiin thu ka pe che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy19:8 Tin, LALPA in Pathianin in pi leh pute hnena chhia a lo chham anga in pi leh pute pek a lo tiam ram chu a pek che u a," 
Deuteronomy19:9 LALPA in Pathian chu hmangaih tur leh a kawng zawh fo tura a thupek zawng zawng, tuna thu ka pek che u hi in pawm a, in ram chu a tihzau chuan he mi khaw pathum tiam loin in tan khaw pathum dang in belhchhah leh ang." 
Deuteronomy19:10 LALPA'n luah tura a pek che u in ram chhungah chuan pawi khawih lo thisen chhuah a awm loh a, inchunga thisen a awm lohna'n." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Amaherawhchu miin athenawm khawveng a huat a, a chan a, a beih a, thikhawp hiala a vuak a, chu mi khaw zinga pakhata a tlan chuan," 
Deuteronomy19:12 an khaw upaten mi tir se la, chuta ta chu va hruai se la, tihhlum turin thisen phuba latu kutah hlan rawh se." 
Deuteronomy19:13 In khawngaih tur ani lo a, in tana tha turin Israel ram ata pawi khawih lo thisen chauhna chu in tibo tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy19:14 LALPA in Pathianin luah tura a pek che u ram, in luah tur rama a hmaa an lo phun tawh in thenawm ramri chu in sawn tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Mi a khawlohna emaw, a sualna reng reng emaw hretu pakhat chu a tawk lo ang; hretu pahnih ka emaw, hretu pathum ka emaw thuin tihngheh tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Hretu fel lo takin mi thil ti dik loa a puh chuan," 
Deuteronomy19:17 an inkhinnaa an pahnihin LALPA hmaah chu mi huna puithiamte leh roreltute hmaa chuan an ding tur a ni; 
Deuteronomy19:18 tin, roreltute chuan ngun takin an dap ang a, tin, ngai teh, thu hretu chu hretu der a nih a, a unau chu dawta puh anih chuan," 
Deuteronomy19:19 a unau chunga tih alo tum ang chuan a chungah in ti tur a ni; chutiang chuan inzinga thil tha lo chu intibo tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy19:20 A la awmhote chuan an hria ang a, an hlau vang a, tun hnuah chutiang thil tha lo reng reng chu in zingah an ti tawh dawn lo nia.In khawngaih tur a ni lo a; nun aiah nun, mit aiah mit, ha aiah ha, kut aiah kut, ke aiah ke a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy19:21 In khawngaih tur a ni lo a; nun aiah nun, mit aiah mit, ha aiah ha, kut aiah kut, ke aiah ke a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy20:1 In hmelmate do tura in chhuah a, sakawr te, tawlailir te, mipuite in aia tam inhmuhin, anmahni chu in hlau tur a ni lo. Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u LALPA in Pathian chu in hnenah a awm si a." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Tin, in indo dawn hnaih chuan puithiam chuan mipuite chu va pan se la, bia se la," 
Deuteronomy20:3 an hnenah, 'Aw Israelte u, hre rawh u khai, tunah chuan in hmelmate in do dawn ta ani a, zam suh u la, tih suh u la, khur hek suh u, anni chu hlau hek suh u;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 nangmahni chhandam tura in hmelmate beihsak tur che ua in hnena awm zel chu LALPA in Pathian a ni si a,' ti rawh se." 
Deuteronomy20:5 Tin, hotute chuan mipuite hnenah, 'In thar saa la hlan lo in awm em? A inah haw leh rawh se, indonaah a va thi hlauh vang a, mi dangin an hlan dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Tin, grep huan siam a, a ra la chawr lo in awm em? A in lamah hawleh rawh se, indonaah a thi hlauh vang a, midangin an chhawr dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Tin, nupui huala la nei lo in awm em? A in lamah haw leh rawh se, indonaah a thi hlauh vang a, midangin an nei dah ang e,' tiin sawi rawh se." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Tin, hotute chuan mipuite hnenah, 'Hlau leh zam im awm em? A in lamah haw rawh se, a unaute thinlung chu a thinlung angin a tuiral ve dah ang e,' lo ti zel rawh se." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, hotuten mipuite hnena thu an sawi zaw chuan mipuite hmahruaitu tur sipai hotute an ruat tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Bei tura khua in va hnaih hun chuan remna thu han sawi phawt u la. 
Deuteronomy20:11 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an lo rem che u a, an lo inpek chuan heti hi a ni ang a, chuta mi awm zawng zawngte chu hnathawka in rawih tur an ni ang a, in rawng an bawl ang." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Tin, an lo remduh loh che u a, an lo do dawn che u chuan in hual ang a;" 
Deuteronomy20:13 tin, LALPA in Pathianin in kuta a pek hun che u chuan chuta mipa zawng zawng chu khandaihin in tihlum vek tur a ni:" 
Deuteronomy20:14 hmeichhia le an fanaute te te te, rante leh khuaa thil awm reng rengte erawh chu chuta rallak thl zawng zawngte nen lam in pualah in la tur a ni; tin, LALPA in Pathian in a pek che u in hmelmate laka rallak thil chu in chen tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Heng hnamho khuate ni lo, in awmna atanga khaw hla zawng zawngte chu chutiang chuan in ti zel tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy20:16 LALPA in Pathianin luah tura a pek che u he'ng hnam khuate erawh hi chu LALPA in Pathianin thu a pek che u angin nung tawh phawt chu engmah in zuah tur ani lo a," 
Deuteronomy20:17 Hit mi te, Amor mi te, Kanaan mi te, Periz mi te, Hiv mi te, Jebus mi te chu in tiboral vek tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy20:18 an pathiante chunga an tih thin thil tenawm zawng zawngte chu an zirtir lohna tur che uin, chutilochuan LALPA in Pathian chungah thil in tisual dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Lak tuma in beih a, khua chu rei tak in hual pawhin chunga thingte chu hreipuiin in kit tur a ni lo va in ei atan a ni a, in kit tur a ni lo: thing chu mihring em an niha in hual ni?A rah ei loh mi thing ani tih inhriatte erawh zawng zawng in tichiain in kit ang a, dotu che u khua chu a chhiat hma loh chuan kulhin in hung hnan tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy20:20 A rah ei loh mi thing ani tih inhriatte erawh zawng zawng in tichiain in kit ang a, dotu che u khua chu a chhiat hma loh chuan kulhin in hung hnan tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy21:1 LALPA in Pathianin luah tura apek che u ramah hian tamlakah mi, tihhlumin lo awm ang se la, a tihlumtu hriat ni si lo se la," 
Deuteronomy21:2 in upate leh in roreltute an lo kal ang a, an tihlumna vel khua atang chuan an te ang a;" 
Deuteronomy21:3 tin, heti hi a ni ang a. a ruang atanga khaw hnai ber, chu mi khaw upate chuan bawng rual zinga bawng la, la chawrloh, nghawngkawl la bel loh an kai ang a;" 
Deuteronomy21:4 tin, chu khaw upate chuan bawng la chu tui luanna, lei la leh loh leh engmah la chin lohna ruamah an kai chhuk ang a, ruamah chuan bawng la ring chu an tan ang a;" 
Deuteronomy21:5 tin, Levia fapa puithiamten an rawn pan ang a, anni chu LALPA in Pathianin a rawngbawltu leh LALPA hminga malsawmtu atan a ruatte an ni si a; thubuai leh invuak thu chu an rel ang ang ani ang;" 
Deuteronomy21:6 tin, ruang hnaih ber khaw upate zawng zawng chuan ruama bawng la ring an tan chungah chuan an kut an sil ang a;" 
Deuteronomy21:7 Kan kutin he thisen hi a chhuah lo a, kan mitin a hmu bawk hek lo." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Aw LALPA, i tlanchhuah i mi Israel-hote hi ngaidam la, i mi Israel-hote zingah hian pawi khawih lo thisen chhuahna hi a awm phal suh ang che,' an ti ang a, an tang tur a ni. Tichuan thisen thu-ah chuan ngaihdam an ni ang." 
Deuteronomy21:9 chutiang chuan LALPA mithmuha thi tha tiin pawi khawih lo thisen chhuahna chu in tikiang tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy21:10 In hmelmate run tura in kal chauh a, LALPA in Pathianin in kut a pek che u a, sala in hruai a," 
Deuteronomy21:11 sal zinga hmeichhe hmel tha tak, in mi duhzawng tak in hmuh chuan," 
Deuteronomy21:12 in inah in hruai hawng ang a, an lu an met ang a, an tin an zai ang a;" 
Deuteronomy21:13 an sal kawr chu an hlip ang a, in inah an awm ang a, thla khat zet an nu leh an pa an sun ang a, chu mi hnuah chuan in pawl ang a, an pasal in ni ang a, in nupui an ni ang." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Tin, in lung a dum loh chuna an du duhnaah an kal in phal tur a ni, sum leh paiah inhralh hauh tur a ni lo a, sal bawlin in bawl tur a ni lo, in tihminghliau tawh si a." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Miin nupui pahnih nei ang se la, pakhat chu duhin pakhat chu hua se la, a duha leh a huata chuan fa hrinsak ve ve se la; tin, fapa upa ber chu a huata fa ni se la," 
Deuteronomy21:16 a ro neih chu a fapate a khawmtir huna chuan a duh taka fapa chu a fapa upa, a huata fa aia uah a siam tur a ni lo a," 
Deuteronomy21:17 a huata fa,a fa upa ber, a neih zawng zawnga chan hnih huiah a siam tur a ni; a chakna bul a ni a, fa tir nihna chu a pual a ni." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Miin fapa luhlul tak, hel hmang tak nei ang se la, a nu leh a pa thu awih loin an thununna pawm duh lo se la," 
Deuteronomy21:19 a nu leh a pa chuan an kai ang a, an khaw upate hnenah an khaw kulh kawngka bulah an hruai tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy21:20 tin, an khaw upate hnenah chuan, 'He kan fapa hi luhlul tak leh hel hmang tak a ni a, kan thu pawh a awih duh lo a; inkhawhral hmang leh ruihhmang mi a ni,' an ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Tichuan khuaa mi zawng zawngte chuan lungin an denghlum tur a ni; chutiang chuan in zing ata chu thil tha lo chu in tibo tur a ni; tin, Israel mi zawng zawngin an hria ang a, an hlau ang." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Tin, miin thihna khawp sual a tih a, tihhlum aniha, thinglera in khai chuan," 
Deuteronomy21:23 a ruang chu thingah chuan zankhuain a awm tur a ni lo a, chu mi ni la la chuan in pum tur a ni; thinga khai piang chu Pathian anchhe dawng a ni si a;LALPA in Pathianin luah tura a pek che u in ram chu in tihbawlhhlawh lohna'n." 
Deuteronomy21:24 LALPA in Pathianin luah tura a pek che u in ram chu in tihbawlhhlawh lohna'n. 
Deuteronomy22:1 In unaute bawngpa emaw, an beram emaw bo chu in hmuinin ngawihsan mai tur a ni lo a, in unaute inah in hruaihawsak leh ngei tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Tin, in unaute in kiang hnaia awm an nih loh a, a neitu chu in hriat loh emaw ani chuan, in in lamah in hruai haw ang a, in hnenah a awm reng ang a, in unauin a rawn zawn hun hunah in lo pek leh tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy22:3 An sabengtung pawh chutiang bawk chuan in ti tur ani a, chutiang bawk chuan an silhfente pawh in ti tur ani a, chutiang bawk chuan in unau thil hloh in chhar tawh phawt chu in ti tur ani a, in ngawih bopui tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy22:4 In unaute sabengtung emaw, an bawngpa emaw, kawnga tlu in hmuhin in ngawihsan mai tur a ni lo a, in tunthawhpui ngei tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Hmeichhiain mipa thuamhnaw an inbel tur ani lo a, mipain hmeiche silhfen an inbel tur ani hek lo; tupawh chutiang ti apiang chu LALPA in Pathian ngaihin mi tenawm an ni." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Kalkawnga thingah emaw, leiah emaw, sava bu a puiin a no emaw, a tui emaw awm, a awp lai in inhmuh chuan a no chu a pui chawpin in la tur ani lo a," 
Deuteronomy22:7 a pui chu chhuah ngei ngei tur ani a, a no erawh chu in la thei ang: chutichuan in tan a tha ang a, in dam rei dawn nia." 
Deuteronomy22:8 In thar in sak chuan chuta mi an tlaka inin chu thisen chhuahna in a nih lohna'n in in chung in hung tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy22:9 Tin, in grep huanah chuan thil chi hni inching tur ani lo; chutilochuanin chi tuh leh in grep huana thil hawng zawng zawng chu LALPA pual ani mai ang." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Bawngpa leh sabengtung lei in leh duntir tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Sahmul leh la tah pawlh in inbel tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy22:12 In intuamna puan chu a tlang pali-ah fem in neihtir tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Miin a nupui a neih a, a pawl a, a huat leh si a," 
Deuteronomy22:14 He hmeichhia hi ka nei a, ka han pawl a, nula thianghlim a nihna ka hmu lo a,' tia mualpho taka a siam a, a hming a tihchhiat chuan," 
Deuteronomy22:15 nula nu leh pa chuan kulh kawngkaah chu mi khaw upate hnenah nula thianghlim a nihna chu an rawn tilang tur a ni a; 
Deuteronomy22:16 tin, nula pa chuan upate hnenah, 'He mi hi ka fanu ka neihtir a, a haw leh si a," 
Deuteronomy22:17 tin, ngai teh u, I fanu hi nula thianghlim a nihna ka hmu lo e, tiin mualpho takin a siam a, mahse hengte hi ka fanu nula thianghlim a nihna chu ani alawm,' a ti ang a. Tichuan mi khaw upate hmaah chuan puan an phah ang a." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Tin, chu khaw upate chuan chu mi chu an hrem ang a;" 
Deuteronomy22:19 Israel nula thianghlim a tihhmingchhiat avangin tangka sekel za an chawitir ang a; nula pa chu an pe tur a ni, ani chu a nupui ani ang a, a dam chhungin a then thei lo ang." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Amaherawhchu chu mi thu chu a lo dik a, nula chu nula thianghlim a nihna a lo lan loh chuan" 
Deuteronomy22:21 nula chu a pa kawngakah an hruai chhuak ang a, a awmna khuaa mite chuan lungin an deng hlum ang, a pa ina nawhchizuara Israelte zinga thil sual atthlak tak a tih avangin; chutiang chuan in zing ata, chu thil tha lo chu in tibo tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Miin palsal nei a mutpui an hmuh chuan an pahnih chuan an thi tur a ni, a mutpuitu mipa leh hmeichhia chu; chutiang chuan Israel zing ata, chu thil tha lo chu in tibo tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Nula thianghlim, mi nupui hual, miin khuaah ahmuh a, a mutpui chuan" 
Deuteronomy22:24 an pahnihin khaw kulh kawngkaah in hruai chhuak ang a, lungin in denghlum tur a ni; hmeichhia chu khuaa awm si a au loh avangin; tin, mipa chu a thenawm nupui a tihhminghliau avangin; chutiang chuan in zing ata, chu thil tha lo chu in tibo tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Amaherawhchu miin ramhnuaiah nula, mi hual a hmuh a, a tihluih a, a mutpui chuan a mutpuitu mipa chauh chu tihhlum tur ani a," 
Deuteronomy22:26 a nula chu engmah in tih tur a ni lo, nula chungah chuan thihna khawp sual a awm lo; heitang hi chu, mi athenawm beia that ang a ni a;" 
Deuteronomy22:27 ramah a va tawng fu a, mi hual nula chu a au a, chhantu an awm si lo a." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Miin nula thianghlim hual loh a hmuh a, a man a,a mutpui an hmuh chuan," 
Deuteronomy22:29 a mutpuitu mipa chuan nula pa chu tangka sekel sawmnag a pe tur ani a, tin, ani chu a nupui a ni ang, a tihhminghliau tawh avangin; a dam chhungin a then thei lo ang.Tuma'n mahni pate nupui mutpuiin an pate an timualpho tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Tuma'n mahni pate nupui mutpuiin an pate an timualpho tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy23:1 Sawn chu LALPA mite pung khawm zingah an tel tur a ni lo; chhuan sawmna thlengin a thlahte chu LALPA mite pung khawm zingah an tel tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy23:2 Amon mite leh Moab mite chu LALPA mite pung khawm zingah an tel tur a ni lo. Chuan sawmna thlengin an zinga mi chu LALPA mite pung khawm zingah an tel hauh lo tur a ni; 
Deuteronomy23:3 Aigupta ram atanga in lo chhuah laia chhang leh tuia an lo hmuah loh che u avang leh anchhe lawh tur che ua Mesopotamia rama Pethor khuaa Beora fapa Balaama an rawih avang khan. 
Deuteronomy23:4 Nimahsela LALPA in Pathian chuan a hmangaih che u avangin LALPA in Pathian chuan anchhia chu in tan malsawmnaah a chantir ta zawk a. 
Deuteronomy23:5 In dam chung zawng anmahni nena inremna leh an hmuingilna engtikah mah in ngaihtuahpui tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy23:6 Edom mite chu in lungten tur a ni lo a, in unaute an ni si a; Aigupta mite chu in lungten tur ani lo, an ramah chuan in va mikhual tawh avangin." 
Deuteronomy23:7 An thlahte chu chhuan thumna atnagin LALPA mite pungkhawm zingah chuan an tel tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy23:8 In hmelmate beia in va riahna hmuna chuan thil tha lo tinreng lakah in inthiarfihlim tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy23:9 In zingah tupawh zana amaha thil chuak avanga bawlhhlawh an awm chuan, riahhmun ata a chhuak ang a, riahhmunah chuan a lut leh tur ani lo a;" 
Deuteronomy23:10 amaherawhchu khua a lo tlai lamin a inbual ang a; tin, ni tlakah riahmunah a lut leh tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Tin, riahhmun pawn lama hmun in ruat ang a, chutah chuan in kal thin tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy23:12 tin, in hmanraw zinga chuan suahdur in nei ang a; tin, heti hi ani ang a, chuchuan in va thutna tur chu in lai khuar ang a, in zunram thiar chu in vur leh tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy23:13 LALPA in Pathian chu in riahhmuna nangmahni chhanhim tur leh in hmelmate hlan tur che uin a lo tel zel si thin a; chuvangin riahhmun chu a thianghlim tur a ni; chuti lo chuan in zinga thil bawlhhlawh a hmu ang a, a kal bosan dah ang che u." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Chhiahhlawh, in hnena an pu rawn tlan chhuahsan chu in pe let leh tur a ni lo:" 
Deuteronomy23:15 in awmnaa an du ber an thlan apianga chuan in zingah an awm ve mai tur a ni; in hnehchhiah turani lo 
Deuteronomy23:16 Israel fanute zingah nawhchizuar an awm tur ani lo a, Israel fapate zingah mipa inzuar an awm tur a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Nawhchi zawrh man emaw, uicho man emaw, thutiamna'n LALPA in Pathian ina in keng tur ani lo; a eng ve ve pawh chu LALPA in Pathian ngaihin thil tenawm a ni." 
Deuteronomy23:18 A pung umin in unaute inpuktir tur a ni lo; tangka lama pung emaw, ei tur lama pung emaw, engpawh a pung uma puktir reng reng chu:" 
Deuteronomy23:19 ram dang mite chu a pung umin in puktir thei ang; nimahsela in unaute chu a pung umin in puktir tur a ni lo; chutichuan in va luah tur rama in kutkawih zawng zawngah LALPA in Pathianin mal a sawm dawn che u nia. 
Deuteronomy23:20 LALPA in Pathian hnena thu in tiam in rei rial loin pek nghal tur a ni; LALPA in Pathian chuan a phut dawn ngei si che u a, in tan sual a lo ni mai ang." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Thutiam kawnga in insum chuan in tan sual a ni lo ang. 
Deuteronomy23:22 In kaa chhuak tawh chu in ti ngei tur a ni; duh thua thilhlan in kaa in tiam, LALPA in Pathian hnena in tiam ang zelin." 
Deuteronomy23:23 In thenawm grep huana in kalin in duh tawkin in ei thei a, amaherawhchu in emah in khung tur a ni lo.In thenawm buh ding lai hmunah in kalin a vui chu in thliak thei a; amaherawhchu in thenawm buh ding laiah chuan favah in ruai tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy23:24 In thenawm buh ding lai hmunah in kalin a vui chu in thliak thei a; amaherawhchu in thenawm buh ding laiah chuan favah in ruai tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy24:1 Miin nupui a neih a, a chunga thil mawi lo eng emaw a hriat avanga a mit a tlun loh chuan heti hi a ni ang a, inmakna lehkha a ziaksak ang a, a pe ang a, a in ata a chhuahtir tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Tin, a in ata a chhuah hnu chuan mi dang a va nei thei ang." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Tin, a pasal hnuhnung zawk chuan a huat a, inmakna lehkha a ziaksak a, a pek a, a in ata a chauhtir emaw, a pasal hnuhnung zawk, nupuia neitu chu a thi emaw a nih chuan," 
Deuteronomy24:4 a pasal hmasa, amah kaltirtu khan, tihbawlhhlawh tawh a ni a, a nei leh thei lo vang; LALPA ngaihin thil tenawm a ni: LALPA'n luah tura a pek che u rama chuan sual in luhtir tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Mi, nupui nei hlim chu sipaiah a kal tur a ni lo a, eng hnathawkah mah phut tur ani lo; a in lamah kum khat chu a duh ang angin a awm ang a, a nupui nen hlim takin an awm tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Buh rawtsawmna emaw, a chung lam lung emaw tumah in hrensak tur ani lo, mi nunna hrensak a ni dawn si a." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Tupawh, Israela thlah, a unaute zinga mi ru a, sal deha dek emaw, zuar emaw hriat chhuah an nih chuan, chu rukrupa chu tihhlum tur a ni; chutiang chuan in zing ata, chu thil tha lo chu in tibo tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Phar hri chungchang thuah chuan, ngun taka dap chhuak a, puithiam, Levi hote zirtir dan ang zela ti turin fimkhur rawh u; anmahni thu ka pek angin fimkhur takin in ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Aigupta ram ata in lo chhuahna kawnga LALPA in Pathianin Miriami chunga a tih dan kha hre reng rawh u. 
Deuteronomy24:10 Engpawh in thenawm in puktirin a hreng la turin a inah in lut tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy24:11 Pawnah in ding ang a, in puktira chuan hreng chu pawnah a rawn laksak tur che a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Mi rethei ani chuan a hreng chu in mutpui tur a ni lo; 
Deuteronomy24:13 a silhfenah chuan a mut a,a fak theihna'n che u a hreng chu ni tlakah in pe kir leh ngei tur a ni, tichuan LALPA in Pathian ngaihin in tan thil fel a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy24:14 In mi rawih, mi rethei leh tlachhamte chu in unau emaw, in ram in awmnaa awm ram dang mi emaw pawh ni se la in hnehchhiah tur ani lo;" 
Deuteronomy24:15 a thawh ni chuan ahlawh chu in pe tur ani a, niin a tlak hnan tur ani lo; mi rethei ani a, chutah chuan a rilru a dah thin a ni; chutilochuan in chungchang thuah LALPA a au vang a, in tan sual a lo ni da ang e." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Fate avangin pate tihhlum tur a ni lo a, pate avangin fate tihhlum tur a ni hek lo; mi tin, mahni sual avang theuha tihhlum tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Ram dang mite leh pa nei lote ro chu dik lo takin in relsak tur a ni lo a, hmeithai puan chu hrengah in laksak tur ani hek lo;" 
Deuteronomy24:18 nangni pawh Aigupta ramah khan bawih in ni tawh a, LALPA in Pathianin chuta ta chu a tlan che u a ni tih inhre reng tur a ni; chuvang chuan a ni, he'ng thil hi ti tura thu ka pek che u ni." 
Deuteronomy24:19 In loa buh in seng a, buhphal in khawm hmaih chuan in lak leh tur a ni lo, ram dang mi te, pa nei lo te, hmeithaite ta tur a ni; tichuan LALPA in Pathian chuan in kutkawih zawng zawngah mal a sawm dawn che u nia." 
Deuteronomy24:20 In oliv thing in vuakin a zarte chu in vaw nawn tur a ni lo; ram dang mi te, pa nei lo te, hmeithaite ta tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:21 In grep huana mi in lawhin a to in zawng tur ani lo; ram dang mi te, pa nei lo te, hmeithaite ta tur a ni.Tin, Aigupta ramah khan bawih in ni tawh tih in hre reng tur a ni; chuvang chuan a ni, he'ng thil hi ti tura thu ka pek che u ni." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Tin, Aigupta ramah khan bawih in ni tawh tih in hre reng tur a ni; chuvang chuan a ni, he'ng thil hi ti tura thu ka pek che u ni." 
Deuteronomy25:1 Mi an inkhin chuan, rorelnaah an kal ang a, roreltuten an lo relsak ang a, mi fel chu thiam an chantir ang a, mi sual chu thiam loh an chantir tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy25:2 tin, heti hi a ni ang a, mi sual chu vuak awm anih chuan, roreltu chuan a muttir ang a, a hmaah a vuaktir tur a ni, a sual dan a zirin vuak zat tur chu thliah a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Vawi sawmli thleng vuak theih ani ang a, chu aia chuang liam chu ni loin; hei aia chuanga a vuak chuan in unaupa chu inmualpho lu dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Sebawngpain buha chil laiin a hmui in phuar tur a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Unauza awmho se la, fapa nei loin an zinga mi chu thi se la, a thia nupui chuan pawn lama mi, mi dang a nei tur ani lo; a pasal unau chuan a rochung ang a, nupuiah a nei ang a, pasal unau tih tur chu a chungah a ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Tin, heti hi ani ang a, a fa tir hrinsak chuan Israel zinga a hming a bo lohna'n a unau thi taa hming chu a pu tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Tin, ani chuan a unaupa nupui chu neih a duh loh chuan, a unaupa nupui chu kulh kawngkaa upate hnenah a han chho ang a, 'Ka pasala unaupain Israel zingah a unau hming awmtir zel a duh lo a, pasal unaupa tih tur chu ka chungah a ti duh lo,' a han ti tur ani." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Chutichuan an khaw upate chuan ani chu an ko ang a, an bia ang a, tin, ani chuan, 'Ka nei duh lo a ni,' tia a tan tlat chuan" 
Deuteronomy25:9 a unaupa nupui chuan upate hmaah a han pan ang a, a pheikhawk a hlihsak ang a, a hmaiah chil a chhak ang a, 'A unaupa chhungkaw din duh lotu chungah chuan heti anga tih ni zel rawh se,'a ti ang a, a chhang tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Tichuan, 'chhungkaw pheikhawk hlihsak a,' tiin Israelte zingah chuan a hming puttir tur a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy25:11 Mi insual se la, a pakhat zawka nupui chuan a sualpui lak ata a pasal chhanchhuak turin a zahmawhah pawhsak se la," 
Deuteronomy25:12 a kut chu in tansak tur a ni a, in khawngaih tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy25:13 In ipah chuan khin chi dang dang, a rit leh a zang in nei tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy25:14 In inah tehna chi dang dang, a lian leh a te in kawl tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Khin dik tak leh fel tak in nei tur a ni. Tehna dik tak leh fel tak in nei tur a ni si; tichuan LALPA'n ram a pek che uah hian in dam rei dawn nia. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Chutiang thil titu, fel lo taka titu zawng zawngte chu LALPA in Pathian ngaihin tenawm an ni." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Aigupta ram ata in lo chhuahna kawnga Amalek-ho lo tih dan che u kha hre reng rawh u; 
Deuteronomy25:18 Pathian pawh hlau loin in chauh lai leh in ngui laia kawnga a lo tawh che u a, in zinga hnufual mi chhiathaho a hnufualte zawng a lo beih dan te kha.Chuvangin heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA in Pathianin luah tura ram apek hun che u a, in vela in hmelmate zawng zawng laka LALPA in Pathianin ralmuanna a pek hun che u chuan van hnuai chhina Amalek-ho hriat rengna chu in tibo hlauh tur a ni; in theihnghilh hauh tur ani lo." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Chuvangin heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA in Pathianin luah tura ram apek hun che u a, in vela in hmelmate zawng zawng laka LALPA in Pathianin ralmuanna a pek hun che u chuan van hnuai chhina Amalek-ho hriat rengna chu in tibo hlauh tur a ni; in theihnghilh hauh tur ani lo." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA in Pathianin rochun leh luah tura ram apek che u in va luh a, in va awm hun chuan," 
Deuteronomy26:2 Tin, chu mi huna puithiam hnenah chuan in kal ang a, a hnenah, ""Min pektura kan pi leh pute hnena chhia a lo chham ramah kan lo kal ta tih vawiinah hian LALPA in Pathian hnenah kan tilang a ni,' in ti ang a."
