Deuteronomy26:3 Tin, puithiam chuan in kut ata bawm chu a la ang a, LALPA in Pathian maicham bulah a hung ang." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Tin, nangnin LALPA in Pathian hmaah cuan, ""Kan pu chu Suria mi, mi vakvai a ni a, Aigupta ramah a zuk chuk a, a zuk cheng a, tlemte an ni a; tin, chutah chuan hnam ropui tak, thiltithei tak, tam tak an lo ni ta a;" 
Deuteronomy26:5 tin, Aigupta mite chuan min tinawmnah a, min tirethei a, hna hautak tak min thawhtir a;" 
Deuteronomy26:6 tichuan LALPA kan pi leh pute pathian chu kan au a, LALPA chuan kan aw chu a lo hria a, kan retheihzia te, kan rimzia te, hnehchhiah kannihzia te chu a hria a;" 
Deuteronomy26:7 tin, LALPA chuan Aigupta ram ata chu kut chak tak te, ban phar te, thil hlauhawm tak te, chinchhiahna te, thil mak tein min hruai chhuak a," 
Deuteronomy26:8 he hmunah hian minhruai lut a, he ram, bawnghnute leh khawizu luanna ram hi min pe a." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Tin, ngai teh, aw LALPA, nangin min pek leilung rah hmasa ber theuhte kan rawn la e,' in va ti tur a ni. Tin, LALPA in Pathian hmaah chuan in hung ang a, LALPA in Pathian hmaah chibai bukin in kun ang a;" 
Deuteronomy26:10 tin, LALPA in Pathian in chhungkua te, nangni te, Levi mi te, in zinga ram dang mite thil tha a pek zawng zawng che uah chuan hlim takin in awm tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Tin, kum thum kum, sawma pakhat pek kuma in thil hawng zawng zawng sawma pakhat in pek zawh chuan, Levi mi te, ramdang mite, pa nei lo te, hmeithaiten in awmnaah chuan an ei a, an lo khawsak ve theihna turin in pe tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy26:12 tin, LALPA in Pathian hmaah, 'I thu mi pek, i thupek zawng zawng angin kan in ata thil thianghlimte chu kan dah chhuak a, Levi mi te, ram dang mi te, pa nei lo te, hmeithai te kan pe tawh a; i thupek chu a engamah kan bawhche lo a, kan theihnghilh hek lo a;" 
Deuteronomy26:13 kan lusun laiin chuta mi chu kan ei lo a, kan bawlhhlawh laiin kan thehthang hek lo a, mitthi pualah kan pe hek lo; LALPA kan Pathian aw chu kan ngaichang a, i thu min pek zawng zawng ang chuan kan ti a ni." 
Deuteronomy26:14 I awmna thianglim van atang chuan rawn en la, hnutetui leh khawizu luanna ram, kan pi leh pute pek tura chhia i lo cham tawh ang khan i mi Israelte leh i leilung min pek hi malsawm ang che,' in ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Vawiinah hian LALPA in Pathian chuan he'ng dan leh rorelte hi zawm turin thu ape che u a ni; chuvangin in thinlung zawng zawng leh, in rilru zawng zawngin in pawmin in zawm tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy26:16 vawiinah hian LALPA chu a kawngte zawh a, a dan te, a thupekte leh a rorelte zawma a awte ngaihchan tumin in Pathianah in thlang ta a;" 
Deuteronomy26:17 tin, vawiina hian a tiam che u ang khan, a thupek zawng zawngte in zawm a, ama pual bik ni tur leha lo sawi tawh anga LALPA in Pathian tan mi thianghlim in nih theihna tur leh hnam a siam zawng zawng zinga fak te, hming that te, chawimawi te hlawh turin LALPA'n a thlang che u a ni,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy26:18 a lo sawi tawh anga LALPA in Pathian tan mi thianghlim in nih theihna tur leh hnam a siam zawng zawng zinga fak te, hming that te, chawimawi te hlawh turin LALPA'n a thlang che u a ni,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Tin, Mosia leh Israel upate chuan mipuite chu, ""thupek zawng zawng vawiina ka pek che u hi pawm rawh u." 
Deuteronomy27:2 LALPA in Pathianin ram a pe che ua kal tura Jordan in kan ni chuan heti hi a ni ang a, lung lian tak tak in phun ang a, lung charna in hnaih tur a ni;" 
Deuteronomy27:3 tin, in kai hnuin a chungah chuan he dan thu zawng zawng hi in ziak tur a ni; tichuan LALPA, in pi leh pute Pathianin a lo tiam che u ang khan hnutetui leh khawizu luana ram, LALPA in Pathianin a pek che u ramah chuan in kal thei ang." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Tin, Jordan lui in kan zawh chuan heti hi a ni ang a, vawiina thu ka pek che u ang hian Ebal tlangah lungte chu in pun ang a, lung charna in hnawih tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Tin, chutah chuan LALPA in Pathian tan maicham, lung maicham in siam tur ani a, thir hmanrua in hmang tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy27:6 LALPA in Pathian maicham chu lung chher loin insiam tur ani a; chu miah chuan LALPA in Pathian tan halral thilhlante in hlan ang a; 
Deuteronomy27:7 remna thilhlantein in inthawi ang a, chutah chuan in ei ang a, LALPA in Pathian hmaah chuan hlim takin in awm tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Tin, lung chungahte chuan he dan thu zawng zawng hi fiah takin in ziak tur a ni,"" tiin thu an pe a." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Tin, Mosia leh puithiam Levi-ho te chuan Israel mi zawng zawngte chu an bia a, ""Aw Israel mite u, nguntakin ngaithla rawh u; vawiinah hian LALPA in Pathian mite in lo ni ta a." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Chuvangin LALPA in Pathian thu chu in awih tur ani a, vawiina thu ka pek che u, a thupek te leh a dan te chu in zawm tur a ni,"" tiin." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Tin, chu mi ni vek chuan Mosia'n mipuite chu thu a pe a," 
Deuteronomy27:12 Jordan lui ral in kai hnu chuan mipuite malsawm atan Gerizim tlangah hengho hi an ding tur a ni: Simeon hnam te, Levi hnam te, Juda hnam te, Isakar hnam te, Josef hnam te, Benjamin hnam te hi;" 
Deuteronomy27:13 tin, anchhia atan hengho hi Ebal tlangah an ding tur a ni; Reuben hnam te, Gad hnam te, Aser hnam te, Zebulun hnam te, Dan hnam te, Napthali hnamte hi." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Tin, Levi-hote chuan an han sawi tan ang a, Israel mi zawng zawngte hnenah chuan aw ring takin," 
Deuteronomy27:15 'Themthiamte kut chhuak LALPA tana tenawm milem din chawp emaw, chhun chawp emaw vawng ru apiang chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Tin, mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo chhawn tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:16 'A nu emaw, a pa emaw zah lo apiang chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Tin, mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:17 'A thenawm ramri sawntu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Tin, mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:18 'Kawng ata mitdel kawng loa kaltirtu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:19 'Ram dang mi te, pa nei lo te, hmeithai te ro dik lo taka relsaktu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:20 'A pa nupui mutpuitu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se, a pa timualpho a nih avangin,' an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:21 'Ran engpawh pawltu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a, Mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:22 'A farnu, a pa fanu emaw, a nu fanu emaw mutpuitu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:23 'A pizawn mutpuitu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:24 'A thenawm that rutu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:25 'Pawi khawih lo thahna'na thamna latu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni.'He dan thu pawm nghehpui lotu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:26 'He dan thu pawm nghehpui lotu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, 'Amen,' an lo ti ang a, an lo ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy28:1 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, LALPA in Pathian awka chu ngun taka in ngaihthlak a, vawiina thu ka pek che u thupek zawng zawngte fimkhur taka in zawm chuan, LALPA in Pathian chuan khawvel hnam zawng zawnga chungnung berah a siam ang che u;" 
Deuteronomy28:2 tin, LALPA in Pathian thu in pawm phawt chuan he'ng malsawmna zawng zawngte hi in chungah a lo awm ang a, a zui zel ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:3 In lam leh ram lamah te chuan malsawmin in awm ang a. 
Deuteronomy28:4 In rila rah te, in lei rah te, in ran rual pung, in bawngpui leh in beram rual pungte chu malsawmin a awm ang." 
Deuteronomy28:5 In bawm leh in chhang hmehna thleng te malsawmin a awm ang a. 
Deuteronomy28:6 In vak chhuakte chu malsawmin in awm ang a, in lo hawngte pawh malsamin in awm ang." 
Deuteronomy28:7 In hmelma nangmahni beitute chu LALPA'n a tihtlawmsak ang che u a; a bei tur che uin kawng khatah an lo lut ang a, kawng sarihah an tlanchhia a." 
Deuteronomy28:8 LALPA'n in buh in chungah te, in kutkawih zawng zawng chungahte malsawmna chu thu a pe ang a; LALPA in Pathianin ram a pek che uah chuan mal a sawm ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:9 In hnena chhia a lo chham tawh angin LALPA chuan ama tana hnam thianghlimah a tinghet ang che u, LALPA in Pathian thupekte in zawm a, a kawngte in zawh phawt chuan." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Tichuan khawvel hnam tinin LALPA ta in nih an hria ang a, an hlau vang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Tin, nangmahni pek tura in pi leh pute LALPA'n a lo tiam ramah chuan in rila rahah te, in ran rualah te, in lei rahahte LALPA'n nasa takin a tipung ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:12 LALPA chuan a hun taka in ram chawm tur ruah tui pe tur che u leh in kutkawih zawng zawng malsawm turin van, a ro bawm tha chu a hawnsak ang che u a; tichuan hnam tam tak in puktir ang a, nangni erawh chuan in puk lo ang." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Tin, LALPA'n mei ni loin luah a siam ang che u a, a hnuaihnung ni loin a chungnung zel in ni ang; LALPA in Pathian thupek awih a, tuna ka pek che u hi fimkhur taka pawm a, vawiina thu ke pek che u," 
Deuteronomy28:14 a thute hi a engamah ding lam emaw, vei lam emawa pathian dangte zui leh rawngbawl tura in pensan loh phawt chuan." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Amaherawhchu heti hi a lo la ni ang a, LALPA in Pathian awka chu ngun taka in ngaihthlak loh a, vawiina thu ka pek che u thupek zawng zawngte fimkhur taka in zawm loh chuan he'ng anchhia zawng zawngte hi in chungah a lo awm ang a, a nangching ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:16 In lam leh ram lamahte chuan anchhia in dawng ang. 
Deuteronomy28:17 In bawm leh in chhang hmehna thlengte anchhe dawngin a awm ang. 
Deuteronomy28:18 In rila rah te, in lei rah te, in bawngpui leh in beram rual pungte chu anchhe dawngin an awm ang." 
Deuteronomy28:19 In vak chhuakte chu anchhe dawngin in awm ang a, in lo hawngte pawh anchhe dawngin in awm ang." 
Deuteronomy28:20 LALPA'n in chungah, in kutkawih zawng zawngahte anchhia te, buaina te, zilhhaunate a rawn tir ang a, in tlawm ang a, in boral thuai ang; in thiltihsualte avanga mi hnuchhawn avangin." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Luah tura in luhna ram ata chu a tiboral hma loh che u chuan LALPA'n hri a vawntir tlat ang che u. 
Deuteronomy28:22 LALPA'n ngawrna te, khawsik te, vunna te, sat huam huamna te, khandaih te, rona te, tawihna tein a hrem ang che u a, in boral hma loh chuan a um zel ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:23 In chung lama in van chu dar a ni ang a, in hnuai lama lei chu thir a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy28:24 In ram ruah chu vaivut leh vaivut khuah LALPA'n a chantir ang a; in boral hma loh chu van atangin in chungah a lo tla ang. 
Deuteronomy28:25 LALPA'n in hmelmate lakah a titlawm ang che u a; anmahni bei turin kawng khatah in chhuak ang a, kawng sarihah in tlanchhia ang a; khawvel hnam tin, zingah kil tin, kil tangah in vak in vak ang." 
Deuteronomy28:26 In ruang chu chungleng sava zawng zawng leh ramsa zawng zawngte chaw a ni ang a, a hnawt botu an awm hauh lo ang." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Tihdam theih loh Aigupta khawihli te, ngawtna te, vunna te, uithak tein LALPA'n a hrem ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Atna te, mitdelna te, zamna tein LALPA'n a hrem ang che u a;" 
Deuteronomy28:29 mitdelin thimthama a dap a dap angin chhun enah pawh in dap in dap ang a, in khawsak thu-ah chuan in hmuingil lo ang; tin, hnehchhiah atan leh rallak atan ngawt in ni chamchi ang a, chhanchhuak tur che u tumah an awm lo ang." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Nupui in hual ang a, mi dangin an mutpui ang; in in sa ang a, in luah lo ang: grep huan in siam ang a, a rah chu in chhawr lo ang." 
Deuteronomy28:31 In mithmuhah in bawngpate chu thah a ni ang a, a sa chu in ei lo ang; in sabengtungte chu an lak luihsak ang che u a, an pe leh lo ang che u; in beramte chu in hmelmate pek a ni ang; chhantu che u tumah in nei lo ang." 
Deuteronomy28:32 In fanu te, in fapte hnam dangte pek an ni ang a, nilengin anmahni ngaiin in thlir reng thin ang a, in thlirna lamah in mitte a chau vang a; engmah tih theih in nei si lo ang." 
Deuteronomy28:33 In lei rahte leh in thawhrim rahte chu in hriat loh hnamin an ei zo ang a, hnehchhiah atan leh neksawr atan ngawt in ni chamchi ang;" 
Deuteronomy28:34 Chuti chuan chung thil chu in hmuin in at phah ang. 
Deuteronomy28:35 LALPA'n in khupah te, in keah te, tihdam theih loh khawihli na chi a veitir ang che u, in kephah atanga in chhip thlengin." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Nangmahni leh in lal chawpin in pi leh pute chena in hriat ngai loh hnam hnenah LALPA chuan a hruai ang che u a; chutah chuan pathian dang, thing leh lung rawng te in bawl ang." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Tichuan, LALPA'n a la hruai bona tur che u hnam zawng zawng zingah chuan mak tih leh haubur leh a chhe lama tehkhinna in lo la ni ang." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Lovah buh chi tam tak in fehchhuahpui ang a; tlemte chauh in seng ang, khauin a ei zo vek dawn a ni." 
Deuteronomy28:39 grep huan in siam ang a, in enkawl ang a, nimahsela a uain chu in in lo ang a, grep chu in lo hek lo ang, changpatin a ei zo dawn a ni." 
Deuteronomy28:40 In ram zawng zawngah oliv thing in ching ang a, nimahsela a hriak chu in thih lo vang, in oive rahte chu a hlamtla zo ang." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Fanu fapa in hring ang a, nimahsela in ta an ni lo ang, salah an la hruai dawn a ni." 
Deuteronomy28:42 In thei kung zawng zawng leh in lei rah chu khau chan a ni ang. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Ram dang mi in zinga awmte chuan an san khalh telh telh ang che u a, nangni chu in hnuai telh telh ang." 
Deuteronomy28:44 An puktir ang che u a, nangni chuan in puktir ve lo ang. Anni chu lu an ni ang a, nangni chu mei in ni ang." 
Deuteronomy28:45 he'ng anchhia zawng zawng hi in chungah alo awm ang a, a um ang che u a, a nangching ang che u, a tihboral zawht hleng che uin; a thupekte leh a dan a pek che u zawm tura LALPA in Pathian awka chu in ngaihthlak loh avangin:" 
Deuteronomy28:46 in chungah leh in thlahte chungah kumkhuaa chhinchhiahna leh mak tih atan a la awm ang. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Thil engkima in lo muk pawha LALPA in Pathian chu rilru lawm tak leh hlim taka a rawng in bawl loh avangin," 
Deuteronomy28:48 nangmahni bei LALPA'n a la rawn tirh tur in hmelmate rawng chu riltam chung e, tuihal chung te, saruak chung te, thil engkim tlachham chung tein in bawl ang a; an tihboral hma loh che u chuan in nghawngah thir nghawngkawl an bat ang." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Hla tak atangin kawlkil ata nangmahni bei tur hnam, LALPA'n mupui bir angin a rawn tir ang; an tawng in hriat loh hnam:" 
Deuteronomy28:50 upate pawh pawisa lo leh thalaite pawh duhsak chuang lo hnam kawlhsen tak chu," 
Deuteronomy28:51 Tin, in ran rual pung te, in lei rah te, in boral hma loh zawng an ei ang a, buh te, uain te, hriak te, in bawng pungte in beram rual no te an zuahsak lo ang che u, in boralna an thlensak thleng che uin." 
Deuteronomy28:52 In ram zawng zawnga in rinpui in kulh sangte a chim thlengin in kulh kawngka zawng zawngah an hual ang che u a, LALPA in Pathianin a pek che u in ram zawng zawnga in kulh kawngka zawng zawngah an hual ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:53 In hmelmaten an dan chepna che u avangin an hualna che u leh an dan chepnaah che u chuan in rila rah LALPA'n a pek che u in fanute leh in fapate sa in ei ang. 
Deuteronomy28:54 In zinga mi nun tluang, mi tlang takte pawhin an unaupa te, an nupui duh tak te, an la awmpui an fanaute takngial pawh an hmu mawh ang a;" 
Deuteronomy28:55 engmah an neih tawh loh avangin an fate sa an ei tur chu a tuate mah an pe lo ang; an hualna che u leh an dan chepna che u avangin. 
Deuteronomy28:56 In zinga hmeichhe awm no lo chhiathate an chhiathat leh an awm no avanga lei pawh rap duh lote chuan an pasal duh tak te, an fanu te, an fapa te," 
Deuteronomy28:57 In zinga hmeichhe awm no lo chhiathate an chhiathat leh an awm no avanga lei pawh rap duh lote chuan an pasal duh tak te, an fanu te, an fapa te," 
Deuteronomy28:58 LALPA IN PATHIANA tih hming ropui tak leh hlauhawm tak hi in hlauh theihna tura he lehkhabua chuang thu zawng zawng hi fimkhur taka in zawm loh chuan 
Deuteronomy28:59 LALPA'n nangmahni leh in thlahte chungah hri mak tak, hripui leng reng, natna hreawm tak leng reng chi a lentir ang." 
Deuteronomy28:60 In hlauh hle thin Aigupta ram hrite kha in chungah a lentir leh ang a, a vuan tlat ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:61 He dan lehkhabua chuang lo, natna leh hri tinreng pawh in boral hma loh chu LALPA'n in chungah a lentir ang." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Vana arsi zat ni thinte kha tlemte chauh in lo ni tawh ang, LALPA in Pathian awka chu in zawm loh avangin." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, a tithat ur che u leh a tipung tur che ua LALPA chu a lawm ang khan, a tiohboral tur che u leh a tichhe tur che uin LALPA chu a lawm ang a, in va luah tur in luhna ram ata chu sawn bo in ni ang." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Tin, LALPA chuan kawlkil atanga kawlkil lehlam thlengin chi tin, zingah a tidarh ang che u a, chutah chuan thing leh lung, in pi leh pute chena in hriat ngai loh pathian dangte rawng in bawl ang." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Chung hnam zingah chuan hahdamna reng reng in hmu lo ang a, in ke atan chawlhna reng reng a awm lo ang a; chutah chuan LALPA'n khurhna rilru te, mit chauhna te, nguina rilrute a pe zawk ang che u;" 
Deuteronomy28:66 in nunna chu hlauthawng reng rengin a awm ang a, chhun leh zan hlau reng rengin in awm ang a, in nunnain ngaihngam taka awm a nei lo ang," 
Deuteronomy28:67 zing lamah chuan, 'Tlai ni tawh se la aw!' in ti ang a, tlai lamah chuan, 'Zing ni tawh se la aw!' in ti ang; thil hlauhawm in thinlungin a hlauh tur avang leh in mita in thil hmuh tur avang chuan,In hmu leh tawh lo ang,' in h nena ka tih kawngah chuan lawngin Aigupta ramah LALPA'n a hruai leh ang che u; tin, chutah chuan in hmelmate bawihpa atan te, bawihnu atan te, in inzuar ang a, tuma'n an duh dawn lo che u a ni,"" tiin." 
Deuteronomy28:68 In hmu leh tawh lo ang,' in h nena ka tih kawngah chuan lawngin Aigupta ramah LALPA'n a hruai leh ang che u; tin, chutah chuan in hmelmate bawihpa atan te, bawihnu atan te, in inzuar ang a, tuma'n an duh dawn lo che u a ni,"" tiin." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Horeb tlanga an hnena thu a thlun tiam lo a, LALPA'n Moab rama Israela thlahte hnena mosia thu a thluntir, a thuthlung thute chu he'ng hi a ni." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Tichuan Mosia'n Israel mi zawng zawng chu a ko a, an hnenah, ""Aigupta rama Pharaoa chungah te, a mite zawng zawng chungah te, a ram zawng zawng chungah te in mithmuh ngeia LALPA'n thil a tih zawng zawngte kha in hmu a;" 
Deuteronomy29:3 fiahna nasa tak te, chhinchhiahna te, thil mak te in mit ngeia in hmuh kha:" 
Deuteronomy29:4 nimahsela LALPA'n vawiin thleng hian hriat thiamna thinlung te, hmuh theihna mit te, hriat theihna bengte a la pe lo che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Thlalerah kum sawmli ka hruai ta che u a; in silhfente chu in sin chul lo a, in pheikhawk bunte chu in bun chul lo bawk a." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Kei hi LALPA in Pathian ka ni tih in hriat theihna'n chhang in ei lo a, uain pawh, zupui pawh in in lo a." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Tin, he hmun in lo thlen hian Hesbon lal Sihona leh Basan lal Oga chu min do turin an lo thawk a, anni chu kan lo hneh a;" 
Deuteronomy29:8 tin, an ram chu kan la a, Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Manase hnam zatve te luah atan kan pe a." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Chutichuan in thiltih zawng zawnga in hmuingil zel theihna'n he thuthlung thute hi pawm u la, zawm rawh u." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Tunah hian in zain hnam puipa te," 
Deuteronomy29:11 in upa te, in hotute Israel mi zawng zawng, in fanau tete te, in nupui te, in awmpui ram dang mi, in thing kittu leh in tui chawitute chenin LALPA hmaah in ding a ni." 
Deuteronomy29:12 LALPA in Pathianin in pawm tura thuthlung a siamah hian vawiinah in lut dawn ta a; 
Deuteronomy29:13 in thlahtu Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnenah leh in hnena a lo tiam tawh anga in pathian a nih theihna'n, ama mi atan a tinghet che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy29:14 He chhechham leh thuthlung thu hi in hnenah chauh thlung ka ni lo a," 
Deuteronomy29:15 vawiina LALPA kan Pathian hmaa dingte leh tuna kan hnena awm ve lote hnenah pawh hian a ni; 
Deuteronomy29:16 (Aigupta rama kan awm dan te, hnam dangte tawn tlanga in kal tlang dan te in hria a;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 an zinga an thil tenawm te leh an milem, thing leh lung te, tangkarua leh rangkachakte in hmu bawk a.)" 
Deuteronomy29:18 Chutilochuan in zinga mipa emaw, hmeichhia emaw, chhungkua emaw, hnam emaw, chung hnam pathiante be tur chuan an thinlungin tunah hian LALPA kan Pathian chu hawisanin, in zingah thil kha leh sai chawr chhuahna bulte in lo awm dah ang e;" 
Deuteronomy29:19 tin, chuti a nih zawngin he chhechham thu hi hre reng si a, luhlul taka duh ang agna a awm pawha a tan engmah pawi lo tur anga mahni inthlamuan chawp chu," 
Deuteronomy29:20 chutiang mi chu LALPA'n a ngaidam dawn hauh lo a, LALPA thinurna leh athikna chuan chu mi chu a ur ang a, he lehkhabua anchhe chuang zawng zawng hi a chungah a awm ang a, LALPA'n van hnuai ata a hming chu a thai bo zawk ang." 
Deuteronomy29:21 He dan bua chuang anchhe thuthlung zawng zawng ang hian Israel hnam zawng zawng zing ata tihrangin thil tha lo lamah LALPA'n a teltir ang. 
Deuteronomy29:22 Tin, thangthar lo la awm tur, in hnua in fate lo la awm tur leh, ram dang mi hla tak atanga lo kal turte chuan, chu mi rama hri leh LALPA'n natna a veitir te," 
Deuteronomy29:23 a ram pum pui chu kat leh chi leh kanghlum, engmah chin lohna, engmah chawr lohna, hlobette pawh chawr lohna, Sodom leh Gomora leh Adma leh Zeboiim tihchhiat, LALPA thinur leh thinrima a tihchhiat anga chhia a nih an hmuh hun chuan" 
Deuteronomy29:24 hnam tinin, 'Engvangin nge he ram hi hetianga LALPA'n a tih? He thinur ling nasa tak hi engtizia nge ni?' an ti ang." 
Deuteronomy29:25 Chutichuan miin, 'Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuah laia a thuthlun, LALPA an pi leh pute pathian thuthlung chu an hawisan a," 
Deuteronomy29:26 pathian dang, an hriat ngai loh pathian te, anin a ruatsak ni lote rawng an bawl a, an biak vang a ni;" 
Deuteronomy29:27 chuvang chuan he lehkhabua chuang anchhia zawng zawng thlentir turin he ram chungah hian LALPA thin a thawk a ni; 
Deuteronomy29:28 tin, thinrim leh thinur leh thinrim tak maiin an ram ata a pawt chhuak vek a, ram dangah a theh lut a ni, tuna an awm dan ang hi,' an ti ang.Thil inthupte chu LALPA kan Pathian ta a ni a, thil tihlante erawh chu he dan thu zawng zawng hi kan zawm theihna'n keini leh kan thlahte ta kumkhua tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Thil inthupte chu LALPA kan Pathian ta a ni a, thil tihlante erawh chu he dan thu zawng zawng hi kan zawm theihna'n keini leh kan thlahte ta kumkhua tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Tin, LALPA'n a hnawhdarhna che u hnam dang zinga in awm laia in chungah he'ng tuna malsawmna leh anchhia in hnena ka sawi hi a lo thlenin, duh thlan tur in neih hi hre reng ang che u." 
Deuteronomy30:2 LALPA in Pathian lam in hawi leh a, tuna thu ka pek che u ang hian nangni leh in fate nen in thinlung zawng zawng leh in rilru zawng zawnga a awka in zawm hunah chuan," 
Deuteronomy30:3 LALPA in Pathianin in sal nihna, a tibo ang a, a khawngaih ang che u a, LALPA in Pathianin hnam tin zinga a tihdarhna che u ata a hruai khawm leh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy30:4 In zinga mi van tawp thlenga hnawhchhuah an awm chuan, LALPA in Pathian in chuta ta chu a hruai khawm ang che u a, chuta ta chu a hruai chhuak ang che u;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 tin, LALPA in Pathianin in pi leh puten an luah ramah khan a hruai lut leh ang che u a, in luah ang a; ani chuan a tihmuingil ang che u a, in pi leh pute khumin a tipung ang che u." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Tin, in nun theihna tura LALPA in Pathian chu in thinlung zawng zawng leh in rilru zawng zawnga in hmangaih theihna turin LALPA in Pathianin in thinlung leh in thlahte thinlung a tansak ang che u." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Tin, LALPA in Pathianin he'ng anchhia zawng zawngte hi a tiduhdahtu che u, in hmelmate leh a hawtu che u chungah a awmtir ang." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Tin, in lo hawi leh ang a, LALPA awka hi in pawm ang a, vawiina thu ka pek che u, a thupek zawng zawngte hi in zawm ang." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Tin, LALPA in Pathian chuan in kutkawih zawng zawngah te, in rila rahah te, in bawng rual pungah te, in lei rahah te nasa takin a tipung ang che u a, in pi leh pute chunga a lawm ang khan in chungah LALPA a lawm leh ang;" 
Deuteronomy30:10 he dan bua chuang a thupek te, a dan te zawm tura LALPA awka in zawm a, in thinlung zawng zawng leh in rilru zawng zawnga LALPA in Pathian lam in hawi phawt chuan." 
Deuteronomy30:11 He thupek, tuna ka pek che u hi in tan a har lutuk lo a, a hlat lo bawk che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy30:12 'Kan hriata kan zawm theihna turin tu nge vanah min kalsak ang a, min han laksak ang?' tih turin vana mi an ni lo a," 
Deuteronomy30:13 'kan hriata kan zawm theihna turin tuifinriat ralah tu nge min kalsak ang a, min rawn laksak ang?' ti turin tuifinriat rala mi ani hek lo." 
Deuteronomy30:14 In zawm theihna'n thu chuan a hnaih hle che u a, in kaah leh in thinlungah a awm a ni." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Tunah hian in hmaah nunna leh thatna, thihna leh thil tha lo ka dah a;" 
Deuteronomy30:16 LALPA in Pathian hmangaih tur te, a kawng zawh tur te, a thupek te, a dan te, a rorel te pawm tura tuna thu ka pek che u hi in zawm chuan nungdamin in awm ang a, in lo pung ang a, in va luah tur ramah chuan LALPA in Pathianin mal a sawm dawn che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Amaherawhchu in thinlungin khaw dang a hawi a, in ngaihthlak loh a, hruai bova in awm a, pathian dangte in biak a, a rawngte in bawl chuan," 
Deuteronomy30:18 in boral ngei ngei ang tih tunah hian ka hrilh che u a ni; Jordan lui kan a, luah tura in va luhna ramah chuan in dam rei lo ang." 
Deuteronomy30:19 In hmaah nunna leh thihna, malsawmna leh anchhia ka dah tih tunah hian in chungchang thua hretu atan lei leh van ka ko a ni; chutichuan nunna chu thlang rawh u, in nun theihna'n, nangni leh inthlahte nen;LALPA in Pathian hmangaih a, a awka awih a, amah vuan tlatin; amah chu in nunna, in dam reina a ni si a; tichuan in pu Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te chhechhama pek a tiam ramah chuan in awm dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy30:20 LALPA in Pathian hmangaih a, a awka awih a, amah vuan tlatin; amah chu in nunna, in dam reina a ni si a; tichuan in pu Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te chhechhama pek a tiam ramah chuan in awm dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Tin, Mosia'n Israel mi zawng zawng hnenah he'ng thu hi a va sawi a." 
Deuteronomy31:2 An hnenah, ""Tunah chuan kum za leh sawmhnih ka lo ni ta a; ka chhuakvak thei tawh lo a; tin, LALPA'n, 'He Jordan lui hi I kan lo ang,' mi ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:3 LALPA in Pathian chuan in hma a hruai ang a; he'ng hnamte hi a tihbo sak ang che u a, an ram chu in luah ang; tin, LALPA'n a lo sawi tawh angin Josua'n in hma a hruai ang." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Tin, LALPA'n Amor-ho lal te, Sihona leh Oga leh an ram chunga a tih ang khan an chungah a ti ang; anni chu a tiboral a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy31:5 LALPA'n anni chu a hlan ang che u a, thu ka pek che u thupek ang zawng zawng khan an chungah in ti tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Chhel tak leh huai takin awm u la, tih suh u la, anni chu hlau hek suh u; in hnena kala chu LALPA in Pathian a ni si a; a tithlawn lo ang che u a, kal pawh a kalsan tawp lo ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Tin, Mosia'n Josua chu a ko a, Israel mite zawng zawng mithmuhah a hnenah, ""Chak tak leh huai takin awm rawh, he'ng mite hnenah hian an pi leh pute LALPA'n chhechhama pek a lo tiam tawh ramah chuan I kal tur ani a, anniho hi I luahtir tur a ni." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Tin, i hmahruaitu chu LALPA ani ang a, I hnenah a awm zel ang a, a tithlawn lo vang chia, kal pawh a kalsan tawp lo ang che; hlau suh la, zam hek suh,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Tin, Mosia chuan chu dan chu a ziak a, LALPA thuthlung bawm zawntu Levia fapa puithiamte leh Israel upateho zawng zawng chu a pe a." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Tichuan Mosia'n, ""Kum sarih kum, ngaihdam kum apianga bawkte kutah," 
Deuteronomy31:11 hmun a la ruat tura Israel mi zawng zawng LALPA in Pathian hmaa an rawn inlan hunah he dan hi Israel mi zawng zawng hriatah in chhiar tur a ni. 
Deuteronomy31:12 Mipuiho a hmei apa, in fanau te te te, in awmpui ram dang mi te, anni chuan an ngaihthlak a, an zir a, LALPA in Pathian chu an tih a, he dan thu zawng zawng hi fimkhur taka an zawm theihna'n leh" 
Deuteronomy31:13 an fate la hre ve lote pawhin an hriat a, Jordan lui kana in va luah tur rama in awm chhung zawng zawnga LALPA in Pathian tih an zir theihna'n ko khawm rawh u,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Ngai teh, I thih hun a lo hnai ta a; Josua chu ko la, inbiakna puan inah chuan va inlan rawh u, thu ke pe dawn e,"" a ti a. Tin, Mosia leh Josua chu an kal a, inbiakna puan inah chuan an va inlan a." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Tin, LALPA chu Puan Inah chuan chhumdingin a inlar a; tin, chhumding chu Puan In kawngka lu chungah chuan a ding a." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hnenah, ""Ngai teh, i pi leh pute hnenah i muhil dawn ta a, he'ng mite hi an tho ang a, an va awmna turte zingah chu ram pathiante lakah chuan an uire ang a, mi hawisan ang a, ka thuthlung an hnena ka thlun chu an bawhchhia ang." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Chutichuan, chu mi hun chuan an chungah ka thin a thawk ang a, ka hawisan ang a, ka bikbosan ang a, an ral ang a, thil tha lo leh manganna tam tak an chungah a thleng ang a; chutichuan chu mi ni chuan, 'Kan Pathian kan zinga a awm loh avangin he'ng thil tha lo hi kan chungan a lo thleng a ni lo'm ni?' an ti ang a." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Pathian dangte lam hawia thil tha lo an la tih tur zawng zawng avang chuan an lakah chu mi hun chuan ka inthup ngei ngei dawn a ni. 
Deuteronomy31:19 Chuvangin hetiang hla hi in tan phuah la, Israela thlahte zirtir rawh; Israela thlahte chungchang thu-ah he hla hi mi hriatpuitu a nih theihna'n vawntir rawh." 
Deuteronomy31:20 An pi leh pute hnena chhechhama ka tiam, hnutetui leh khawizua luang ramah chuan ka hruai a, ei leh bara an awm a, an tlai a, an lo thau hun meuh chuan pathian dangte lam an hawi ang a, an rawngte an bawl ang a, mi hmusit ang a, ka thuthlungte an bawhchhe dawn ani." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Tin, heti hi ani ang a, thil tha lo leh manganna tam tak an chunga a lo thlen hunin he hla hi a hriatchauhtirtu a ni ang; an thlahte ka atangin theihhnghilh theih a ni dawn si lo a; tunah ka chhechham rama ka hruai hma reng pawhin an suangtuah vel dan chu ka hre sa tawh reng ani,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Chutichuan Mosia'n chu hla chu, chu mi ni la la chuan a phuah a, Israela thlahte a zirtir a." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua chu a fuih a, ""Chhel tak leh huai takin awm rawh khai; Israela thlahte chu an hnena chhechhama ka tiam ramah chuan I hruai lut dawn a ni; tin, I hnenah ka awm zel ang,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Tin, heti hi a ni a Mosia'n he dan thute hi lehkhabua a ziak zawha peih diam a nih hnuin," 
Deuteronomy31:25 thuthlung bawm zawntu Levi-hote chu Mosia'n," 
Deuteronomy31:26 He dan bu hi la u la, in chungchang thua hretu atan LALPA in Pathian thuthlung bawm sirah dah rawh u." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Hel in chinzia leh in luhlulzia te ka hria a ni; ngai teh u, tuna ka la dampui lai che u mahin LALPA chungah in hel thin a; ka thih hnu lek phei chuan engti takin nasa ang maw!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 An benghriata he'ng thu hi ka sawi a, an chungchang thua hretua lei leh van ka koh theihna'n in hnam puipa zawng zawng te, in hotute min koh khawmsak rawh u." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ka thih hnu chuan nasa takin in intichhia ang a, ka thupek che u kawng ata hi in peng ang tih ka hre reng a ni; tin, a tawpah phei chuan thil tha loin a tlakbuak ang che u; in kut thiltiha tithinur tura LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo in tih dawn avangin,"" tin thu a pe a.Tichuan Mosia'n, Israel pungkhawmho zawng zawng benghriatah chuan he hla thu hi a tawp thlengin a sawi vek a." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Tichuan Mosia'n, Israel pungkhawmho zawng zawng benghriatah chuan he hla thu hi a tawp thlengin a sawi vek a." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Beng lo chhi ru vante u, ka hril dawn e; Ka tawngkam chhuak leilungin ngai se:" 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ruahtui angin ka thu chu a sur ang, Dai angin ka thusawi chu a far ang; Hlobet no dep chunga ruah ang leh Hnim hnah chunga ruah angin" 
Deuteronomy32:3 LALPA hming chu ka puang dawn e: Ropuina kan Pathian pe r'u. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Lungpuia chu, a thiltih a fel famkim; A awm dan zawng zawng chu dan a ni: Pathian rinawm, khawlohna nei lo, Fel leh tha a ni." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Tha lo takin a chungah an ti a, a fate an ni lo, an sawisel kaina a ni, Chhuan bengtlalo leh tihmawh an ni." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Aw mi a leh fing lote u, Chutin maw, LALPA chu in thungrulh dawn? A hringtu che, I pa a ni lo'm ni? A siam chia, a din nghet che." 
Deuteronomy32:7 Hmasang nite chu hre reng la, Chhuan tam tak kumte chu ngaihtuah teh: I pa zawt la, a kawhhmuh ang che; I upate pawh, an hrilh ang che." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Chungnungberan hnamte ram a pek laia, Mihring fate a then lai khan Hnamte ramri a kham a, Israela thlahte zatin." 
Deuteronomy32:9 LALPA chanvo chu a mite an ni a; Jakob-ho chu a rochan an ni. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Thlaler ramah a chhar a, Thlaler ruak rum vung vungah; A vela awm chilhin a enkawl a, A mit naute angin a vawng:" 
Deuteronomy32:11 Mupuiin a bua no a chawk tho a, A no chunga thla a zap a, A thlate a zar a, a la a, A thlaa a chawi thin angin:" 
Deuteronomy32:12 LALPA chauhin a hruai thin a, Ram dang pathian ni loin." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Lei hmun sangah te a chuantir a. Lova thil hawng a eitir thin a; Lungpui ata khawizu a dawttir thin a, Lung chang ata hriak nen;" 
Deuteronomy32:14 Bawng hnute khal, beram hnute, Beram no thaute nen, Basan ram berampa leh kelte, Buh kal thaute nen: Grep thisen uain I in a." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Mahse Jesurun-ho an lo thau a, an inchhek a; I lo thau a, I lo chum a, I lo maih ta a; A siamtu Pathian a hawisa ta, A chhandamna Lungpui chu a ngainep." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Ram dang pathiantein a thikthu a chawk tho a, Thil tenawmin a chawk thinrim." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Pathian ni lo, ramhuaite hnenah an inthawi a, An hriat ngai loh pathiante hnenah, Pathian tharte tlai khawhnua lo awm, In pi, in pute hlauh ngai loh hnenan." 
Deuteronomy32:18 A hringtu che Lungpui I ngaisang lo, A siamtu che Pathian I theihnghilh bawk." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Chu chu LALPA'n a hmu a, a hua, A fanu leh fapate tihthinur vangin." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Ka bikbosan ang a, Engtin nge an awm dawn tehreng,' a ti: Chhuan bengtlalo an ni, Rin kai lo fanute." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Pathian ni lo thilin ka thikthu an chawk tho a; An thil lawi loin mi tithinur a; Chia sawi lohtein ka thiktir ang a, Hnam a tein ka tithinrim ang." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Ka thinur a alh a, Seol mawng kil lam a kang, Leilung, a thil hawng chawpin a kang zo, Tlang nghahchhante a kang." 
Deuteronomy32:23 An chungah chhiatna ka tiang khawm ang a, An chungah thal ka thlah ang;" 
Deuteronomy32:24 Riltamin an rawp ang a, meipui leh chhiatna namen loin a kangral ang, An chungah ramsa hate ka tir ang a, Vaivuta tleng mite tur nen." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Pawn lamah khandaihin an thi ang a, Chhung lamah thlabarin, Nula tlangval, hnute hne lai, Lua kelsam tote nen lam." 
Deuteronomy32:26 An hmelmate chuan ngaisualin, 'Kan kut chu chawisanin a awm ta, Heng zawng zawng hi LALPA tih a ni tawp lo,' hmelma thinrim chuan an ti ang tih hlauthawng lo i la chuan," 
Deuteronomy32:27 'Ka tidarh vek ang a, Mihring zinga anmahni hriat rengna ka tibo teh daih ang,' ka ti mai tur." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Finna nei lo hnam an ni a, Anmahniah hriat thiamna a awm lo." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Aw, fing se la chuan he'ng hi an hre thiam ang a, An tun hnu lam thu an ngaihtuah tur!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Engtin nge pakhatin sang a um ang a, Pahnihin sing an tlan chhiattir ang," 
Deuteronomy32:31 An lungpuiin a hralh a, LALPA'n a hlan a nih si loh chuan? An lungpui chu kan lungpui ang a ni si lo, Kan hmelmate ngei ngaih dan pawhin," 
Deuteronomy32:32 An grep hrui chu Sodom grep hrui, Gomora rama mi a ni: A grepte chu mit grep a ni, A bawrte chu a kha" 
Deuteronomy32:33 An uainte chu drakon tur leh Rulrial tur tha tak a ni. 
Deuteronomy32:34 Chu chu ka khawl khawm Ka robawma char chiah a ni lo'm ni? 
Deuteronomy32:35 Phuba lak leh thungrulh chu keima tih tur a ni, An rahbi a tleu hunin; An chhiatna ni chu a lo hnai ta, An chunga thil lo thleng turte chu a lo thleng thuai ang." 
Deuteronomy32:36 LALPA chuan a mite ro a rel dawn a, A chhiahhlawhte pawh a tihsak ang, A thiltihtheihna a bo a, Khuahkhirh leh khirh loh tumah reng awm loa a hmuh hun chuan." 
Deuteronomy32:37 'Khawiah nge an pathian, An rin lungpui," 
Deuteronomy32:38 An inthawina thau eitu, An in tur thilhlan uain intute chu? Lo thoin rawn pui che u se la, Nangmahni humtu ni rawh se." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Kei, keimah ngei ka nih hi hria u la, Pathian dang an awm lo e; Ka tihlum thin a, ka tinung bawk thin; Ka hliam thin a, ka tidam bawk thin; Ka kut ata mi chhuhsak thei reng reng an awm lo." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Van lamah ka kut ka phar a, Ka nunna chhalin ka sawi e," 
Deuteronomy32:41 Ka khandaih tle ka tahhriam a, Ka kutin rorelna a vawn chuan Ka hmelmate chungah phuba ka la ang a, Mi hawtute chu ka thungrul ang." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Ka thalte chu thisenin ka tirui ang a, Ka khandaihin tisa a lem ang; Thahte leh salte thisen nen Hmelma hotute lu atangin, ka ti,' a ti ang." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Aw, nangni hnam tin, te u, a mite nen lawm rawh u; A chhiahhlawhte thisen phuba chu a la dawn a ni; Amah dotute chungah phuba a la dawn, A ram leh a mite tan inremna famkim a siam ang.""" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Tin, mipuite benghriatah chung hla thu zawng zawng chu Mosia'n a va sawi a, amah nen Nuna fapa Hosea nen." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Tin, mipuite benghriatah chung hla thu zawng zawng chu Mosia'n a va sawi a, amah nen Nuna fapa Hosea nen." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Tin, Mosia'n chungtu zawng zawng chu Israel mi zawng zawngte nena a sawi zawh chuan," 
Deuteronomy32:46 an hnenah, ""Tuna in hnena ka thu hriattir che u ah hian in thinlung nghat u la, he'ng dan thu zawng zawngte hi fimkhur taka zawm turin in fate thu pe rawh u." 
Deuteronomy32:47 In tan thil engmah lo mai mai ani lo a, in nunna a ni si; tin, he'ng thil ti hian luah tura Jordan in va kan ramah chuan in dam rei dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Tin, chu mi ni vek chuan LALPA'n Mosia a bia a," 
Deuteronomy32:49 Moab rama Jeriko zawna Abarim tlangdunga Nebo tlangah chuan han chho la, Israela thlahte luah tura ka pek Kanaan ram chu han thlir rawh;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 tichuan i unaupa Arona Hor tlanga a thi a, a chite hnena hruai ani ta ang bawk khan i lawn chhohna tlangah chuan i thi ang a, i chite hnena hruai i ni ang;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 Zin thlalera Kades-a Meriba tuia Israela thlahte zinga ka chunga in sual avang leh Israela thlahte zinga mi chawimawi loh avang khan.Ram chu i han hmu ang a; nimahsela Israela thlahte ka pek ramah chuan i lut lo vang,"" tiin." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Ram chu i han hmu ang a; nimahsela Israela thlahte ka pek ramah chuan i lut lo vang,"" tiin." 
Deuteronomy33:1 He malsawmna hian a ni, Pathian mi Mosia'n a thih hmaa Israel thlahte mal a sawm ni." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Sinai atangin LALPA chu a lo kal a, Seir atangin an hnenah a thawk a, Paran tlang atangin a eng chhuak a, Mi thianghlim sangsawm zing atangin a lo kal; A kut dinglamah chuan an tan dan alh thei a awm a." 
Deuteronomy33:3 A ni, chi tinte chu a hmangaih a, A mi thianghlim zawng zawngte chu i kutah an awm a. I ke bulah an thu a; I thu chu an pawm theuh ang." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mosia chuan dan min pe a, Jakob-ho mipui tan roluah tur." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Jesurun-ah a lal a, Mipuiho puipate an pung khawm a, Israel chi zawng zawng a huhoin" 
Deuteronomy33:6 Reubena chu dam reng se la, thi loin, A mite erawh chu tlem thung rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Tin, hei hi Juda-ho mal a sawmna a ni; 'LALPA, Juda aw chu ngaithla la, A mite hnenah hruai lut rawh; A kutin a tan a chuh a, A hmelmate beihpuitu i ni ang,""" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Tin, Levi-ho chungthuah chuan; ""I Thumim leh i Urim chu i mi thianghlim hnenah a awm, Masa-a i fiah a, Meriba tuiahte i beih kha;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 Ka nu leh ka pa ka hre lo,' titu khan, A unaute a hre hek lo. Ama fate ngei pawh a hre hek lo; I thu chu a pawm a, I thuthlung an zawm a ni." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Jakob-ho chu i rorel-te an zirtir ang a, Israel-hote i dan; I hmaah rimtui an dah ang, I maichamah pumhal thilhlan." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Malsawm rawh, LALPA, a sum a pai, A kutkawihte lo pawm la; A beitute kawng chu vua la, A hawtute kawng nen, an chet leh tawh lohna'n,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Tin, Benjamin-ho chungthuah chuan, LALPA duh taka chu a kiangah himin a awm ang; Nilengin a awp ang a, A paw thin ang,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Tin, Josef-ho chungthuah chuan, ""A ram chu LALPA malsawmin awm rawh se, Van thil hlu daitein, Tui thuk hnuaia lama tuitein," 
Deuteronomy33:14 Ni rah chhuah thil hlu tein, Thlaten thil hlu a chhuah tein," 
Deuteronomy33:15 Hmasang tlang tea thil duhawm ber tein, Chatuan tlanga thil hlutein," 
Deuteronomy33:16 Leilung leh a chunga thil hlutein, Hnimbuka awma duhsaknain; Malsawmna chu Josef-ho lu chungah lo awm rawh se, A unaute hnen ata tihhrana chhipah chuan." 
Deuteronomy33:17 A ropuina chu a bawngpa piang hmasa ropuina ang ani a, A ki chu sele chal ki ang a ni; Chung chuan hnam tin, a si ang, kawlkil thlengin; Ephraim-ho sangsawm te an ni a, Manase-ho sangte an ni,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Tin, Zebulun-ho chungthuah chuan, ""Lawm rawh, Zebulun, i vahchhuahnaah te, Tin, Isakar, i puan inah te." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Tlangah chi tin an ko ang a, Tahchuan felna inthawinate an hlan ang; Tuifinriat mukna an tlan dawn si, Tiauva ro inphumte nen,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Gad-ho chungthuah chuan, ""Gad-ho tizautu chu fakin awm rawh se. Sakeibakneipui angin a chang a, Ban a ham thler a, a ni, chhip zawl te pawh." 
Deuteronomy33:21 A tha lai ber atan a thlang a, Roreltu chanvo chu vohin a awm si a. Puipahote hnenah a kal a, LALPA rorelna fel a zui a; Israelte hnena a rorelnate chu,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Dan-ho chungthu-ah chuan, ""Dana sakeibaknei no a ni, Basan atanga lo zuang chhuak chu,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Naphtali-ho chungthuah chuan, ""Aw, Naphtali, duhsaknaa lungawi, LALPA malsawmnaa tlai, Chhim leh thlang luah rawh,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Aser-ho chungthuah chuan, ""Asera chu fanauva malsawmin awm se la, A unaute zingah tlatlum se la; Hirakah a ke chiah rawh se." 
Deuteronomy33:25 I kalhnate chu thir leh dar ani ang, I dam chhung ni angin i chakna pawh a awm ang,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:26 Pathian ang tumah reng an awm lo, aw Jesurun, A pui tur chea vana chuang, Ropui taka vana chuang chu." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Chatuan Pathian chu i awmna a ni a, Hnuai lamah chuan chatuan ban a awm, Hmelmate chu a vai kiansak chia, 'Tiboral rawh,' a ti." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Tin, Israela chu ralmuang takin a awm a, Jakoba tuichunchhuah a pumbil; Buh leh uain ramah chuan, A ni, a vanten daifim an fartir.I nihlawh e, aw, Israel, Nang ang reng tu nge awm, LALPA chhandam mite? Nangmah puitu phaw, I ropuina khandaih a ni! I hmelmate i hnenah an intulut ang a, An hmun sangte i chil ang,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:29 I nihlawh e, aw, Israel, Nang ang reng tu nge awm, LALPA chhandam mite? Nangmah puitu phaw, I ropuina khandaih a ni! I hmelmate i hnenah an intulut ang a, An hmun sangte i chil ang,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Tin, Mosia chu Moab phai atangin jeriko zawna Nebo tlang, Pisga tlang chhipah chuan a han chho a, Tin, LALPA'n Gilead ram zawng zawng, Dan thlengin a entir a;" 
Deuteronomy34:2 Naphtali leh Ephraim ram zawng zawng, Manase leh Judai ram zawng zawng, a thlang lam tuifinriat thleng;" 
Deuteronomy34:3 Chhim ram leh tum khawpui Jeriko Phai ruam, Zoar thlangin." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Tin, LALPA'n a hnenah, ""He ram hi a ni, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnena, 'I thlahte ka la pe ang,' tia chhechhama ka lo tiam kha; a hmuh zawng ka hmuhtir phawt chia, nimahsela chutah chuan i kal lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Chutichuan LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia chu a LALPA thu angin Moab ramah chuan a thi ta a. 
Deuteronomy34:6 Tin, Beth-peor zawna Moab rama ruamah a phum a; nimahsela a thlan chu tun thlengin tumahin an hre lo." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Mosia chu a thih chuan kum za leh kum sawmhnih mi a ni; a mit a thim lo a, a tha pawh a thum chuang lo." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Mosia chu Moab phaiah ni sawmthum an tah a; chutichuan Mosia suna tah nite chu a lo tawp ta a." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua chu finna thlarauin a khat a; Mosia chuan a chungah a kut a nghah avangin; tin, Israela thlahte chuan a thu an zawm a, LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek ang chuan an ti a." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Tin, chuta chin chu Israelte zingah Mosia anga LALPA'n hmaichhan meuha a biak zawlnei reng reng an lo awm ta lo a;" 
Deuteronomy34:11 chhinchhiahnate zawng zawng leh thilmal zawng zawngte, Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng hnen leh Aigupta ram zawng zawng a entir a.Kut chak tak leh hlauhawm tak tak tea Israel mi zawng zawngte mithmuha Mosia'n a tih ang ti vete." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Kut chak tak leh hlauhawm tak tak tea Israel mi zawng zawngte mithmuha Mosia'n a tih ang ti vete. 
Joshua1:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia thih hnu chuan Mosia rawngbawltu Nuna fapa Josua hnenah LALPAIN," 
Joshua1:2 Ka chhiahhlawh Mosia chu a thi ta a; chutichuan tho la, nang leh he'ng mipuiho zawng zawngte nen hian Jordan lui hi kan u la, anmahni, Israela thlahte ka pek ramah chuan kal rawh u." 
Joshua1:3 Mosia hnena ka sawi tawh ang khan in kephaha in rah apiang chu ka pe vek ang che u. 
Joshua1:4 Thlaler atang leh he Lebanon tlang atanga lui lian pui pui Euphrates lui thlenga Hit-ho ram zawng zawng, ni tlangna lam tuifinriat zau tak thlengin in ramri a ni ang." 
Joshua1:5 I dam chhung zawng tumah reng rengin an chelh lo ang che: Mosia hnena ka awm ang khan i hnenah pawh ka awm ve dawn e: ka tithlawn lo ang chia, kal pawh ka kalsan tawp lo ang che." 
Joshua1:6 Chak tak leh huai takin awm rawh: an thlahtute chhechham pek ka lo tiam tak ram kha, hengho hi i luahtir dawn si a." 
Joshua1:7 Ka chhiahhlawh Mosia'n dan zawng zawng zawm tura thu a pek che kha zawm tlat turin chak tak leh huai takin awm phawt mai rawh: i kalna apianga i lo hmuingil zel theihna turin i ding lamah emaw, i vei lamah emaw pensan hauh suh ang che." 
Joshua1:8 He dan bu hian i ka chu chhuahsan hlek suh se; chu mi thu ziak zawng zawng chu i zawm tlat theihna'n chhun leh zan i ngaihtuah lawk tur a ni: tichuan i kawngte chu i lo titluang zel ang a, i lo hmuingil zel dawn nia." 
Joshua1:9 Thu ka pe che a ni lo'm ni? Chak tak leh huai takin awm rawh; hlau suh la, zam hek suh: LALPA i Pathian chu i kalna apiangan i hnenah a awm zel dawn alawm,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua1:10 , 11 Chutichuan Josua'n mipui hotute hnenah chuan, ""Riah hmun va fang u langin, mipuite hnenah, 'Ei turte buatsaih rawh u khai, ni thum chhungin LALPA in Pathianin ram luah tur a pek che u hi luah turin Jordan lui hi in kan dawn a ni e,' tiin thu pe ang che u,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Joshua1:11 , 10 Chutichuan Josua'n mipui hotute hnenah chuan, ""Riah hmun va fang u langin, mipuite hnenah, 'Ei turte buatsaih rawh u khai, ni thum chhungin LALPA in Pathianin ram luah tur a pek che u hi luah turin Jordan lui hi in kan dawn a ni e,' tiin thu pe ang che u,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Joshua1:12 Tin, Reuben-hote, Gad-hote leh Manase hnam zatvete hnenah chuan Josua'n," 
Joshua1:13 LALPA in Pathianin chawlhna a pe che u a, he ram hi a la pe dawn che u tia LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia'n thu a pek che u hi hre reng ang che u." 
Joshua1:14 In nupui te, in fanau te tete leh in ran rualte hi chu Jordan lui rala Mosia'n ram a lo pekah che u chuan an awm ang a; nangni mi chak huaisenho zawng erawh chu inralthuamin in lo kai hmasa ang a: in unaute in lo tanpui ang a," 
Joshua1:15 LALPA'n in unaute chu nangmahni ang bawka chawlhna apek a, LALPA in Pathian ram a pek chu anni pawhin an luah ve hma loh chuan: tichuan LALPA chhihhlawh Mosia'n Jordan lui ral, ni chhuahna lam ram in puala a lo pek tawh che u lamah chuan in let leh ang a, in la luah dawn nia,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua1:16 Tin, anni chuan, ""Tih tura i thu min pek zawng zawng chu ka ti zel ang e: tin, i mi tirhna apiangah pawh kan kal zel ang." 
Joshua1:17 Kawng engkima Mosia thu kan zawm zel thin ang khan, i thu pawh kan zawm zel ang e; LALPA i Pathian chu Mosia hnena a awm thin ang khan i hnenah hian awm ve phawt mai rawh se.Tupawh i thupek chunga hel a, thu i pek apiang zawm duh lo chu tihhlum tur an ni ang: chak tak leh huai takin awm phawt mai rawh."" tiin Josua chu an chhang a." 
Joshua1:18 Tupawh i thupek chunga hel a, thu i pek apiang zawm duh lo chu tihhlum tur an ni ang: chak tak leh huai takin awm phawt mai rawh."" tiin Josua chu an chhang a." 
Joshua2:1 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua chuan, ""A ram leh Jeriko khuate chu va en vel teh u,"" tiin mi pahnih Sitim hmun atangin a ruk tein enthlatu atan a tir a. Tin, an va kal a, nawhchizuar pakhat, a hming Rahabi inah an va lut a, chutah chuan an thleng ta a." 
Joshua2:2 Tin, miin, ""Ngai teh, zaninah hian ram en thlithlai turin Israel thlahte an lo kal e, "" tiin Jeriko khaw lal chu an hrilh a." 
Joshua2:3 Tin, Jeriko kahw lal chuan, ""I ina lo thleng mikhualte kha han hruai rawh: ram pum pui en thlithlai tura lo kal an ni e,"" tia hrilh turin Rahabi hnenah mi a tir a." 
Joshua2:4 tichuan hmeichhia chuan mi pahnihte chu a hruai a, a thukru a; tin, an hnenah, ""Ni, mite chu ka hnenah chuan an lo kal ngei mai a, nimahsela khawi atanga lo kal nge an nih zawng ka hre lo:" 
Joshua2:5 tin, heti hi a ni a, khaw thim, kulh kawngka khar hun dawn lai vel khan chu mite chu an chhuak leh ta a: khawi lamah nge an kal tak pawh ka hre lo: um thuai u la, in la um pha ang e,"" a ti a." 
Joshua2:6 Nimahsela in chungah a hruai chho a, in chungah a ziza kung tian khawm zingah a thukru a ni a." 
Joshua2:7 Tin, mite chuan Jordan lui lamah kai thlengin an um ta a; tin, a umtute chu an chhuah veleh chuan kulh kawngka chu an khar ta a." 
Joshua2:8 Tin, an mut hmain in chungah an hnenah chuan a han kal a;" 
Joshua2:9 chu mite hnenah chuan, "" He ram hi lalpain a pe tawh che u a," 
Joshua2:10 Aigupta ram ata in lo chhuah khan LALPA'n Tuifinriat Sen kha a tihkangsak che u a, Jordan lui rala Amor-ho lal pahnih Sihona leh Oga-te tihboral tak hlauh dan te." 
Joshua2:11 Chu chu kan lo hriat veleh kan hlau a, mi tinin an hlau che u a, an zam zo ta, nangmahni avang hian zam lo reng reng an awm lo: LALPA in Pathian chu chung lam vanah leh hnuai lam leiah Pathian ani si a." 
Joshua2:12 Chutichuan hei in chungah hian ka khawngaihzia che u ka lo lantir ta a ni a, nangni pawhin ka pa chhungte chungah in khawngaihna chu rawn lantir ve u la," 
Joshua2:13 ka nu leh ka pte, ka nutate, ka laizawnte leh an neih apiangte chu zuah u la, thihna lak ata kan nunna hi min chhanhimsak turin LALPA hming chhalin khawngaih takin ka hnenah chhia chham u la, chhinchhiahna tak meuh mi siamsak rawh u khai,"" a ti a." 
Joshua2:14 Tin, mite chuan a hnenah, ""Kan thiltih hi i sawi chhuah dawn loh chuan in thih ai kan thi ang; tichuan heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA'n ram hi min pek hunah kan khawngaihna chein, i chungah rinawm takin kan ti ang e,"" an ti a." 
Joshua2:15 Chuti chuan tukverhah hruizenin an thlak thla ta a: a in chu khawpui kul tlanga awm a ni si a, kulh chungah chuan a awm a ni." 
Joshua2:16 Tin, an hnenah chuan, ""Tlang lam panin kal tawh ukhai, chutilo chuan a umtute che u khan an hmu hlauh dan ang che u; tin, chutah chuan ni thum va biru ang che u; a rawn umtu che u an kir leh hma loh chuanL chu mi zawhah erawh chuan in kal leh dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Joshua2:17 Tin, mite chuan a hnenah, "" I chhe min chhamtir ngawt hi zawngin thiamloh min chantir dawn mai hauh lo a ni a." 
Joshua2:18 Ngai teh, he rama kan lo luh hian he la sen h i mi thlakna tukverhah hian lo tawn bet ang che: tin, in chhungah i hneha i pa te, i nu te, i nutate leh i pa chhungte zawng zawng chu hruai lut vek ang che." 
Joshua2:19 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, tupawh i in kawngka atanga khawlaia chhuak apiang chu ama lu chungah a thisen chu a awm ang a, keini zawng thiamloh changin kan awm lo vang: tin, tupawh in chhunga i hnena awm apiangte chu an chunga kut an thlak chuan, kan lu chungah thisen chu a awm ang." 
Joshua2:20 Amaherawhchu kan thiltih i i sawichhuah chuan chhia min chhamtirnaah hian thiamloh changin kan awm lo ang,"" an ti a. Ani chuan, ""In thu ang zel chuan ni ang hmiang,"" a ti a. Tichuan anni chu an kaltir ta a, an kal ta a: tin, tukverhah chuan la sen chu a tawn bet a." 
Joshua2:21 Tichuan an kal ta a, tlang chu an va thleng a, chutah chuan ni thum, a umtute chu an kir leh hma loh chuan an va awm a: a umtute chuan kawng tluangin an zawng a, nimahsela an hmu zo lo a." 
Joshua2:22 Chutichuan mi pahnihte chu an kir leh a, tlang ata chu an chhuk a, an kan a, Nuna fapa Josua hnen chu an va thleng a; an chunga thil thleng zawng zawng chu an hrilh a.Tin, Josua hnenah chuan, LALPA'nIN a ram pum puia chu kan kutah a lo pe tak meuh mai; chu chang ani lo a, chu mi rama cheng zawng zawngte ch kan hmaah an tui zel mai ani,"" an ti a." 
Joshua2:23 Tin, Josua hnenah chuan, LALPA'nIN a ram pum puia chu kan kutah a lo pe tak meuh mai; chu chang ani lo a, chu mi rama cheng zawng zawngte ch kan hmaah an tui zel mai ani,"" an ti a." 
Joshua3:1 Tin, Josua chu zing takah a tho a, Israel thlahte zawng zawng nen chuan Sitim hmun ata chu an insuan a, Jordan lui an va thleng a: an kai hmain chutah chuan an riak a." 
Joshua3:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni thum chinah hotute chuan riahhmun chu an va fang vel a," 
Joshua3:3  LALPA in Pathian thuthlung bawm leh puithiamho Levi chiten an zawn lai in hmuh hunah chuan in awmna hmun ata hi insuan u la, zui ang che u." 
Joshua3:4 Amaherawhchu nangmahni nena a inkar chu teha tawng sanghnih emaw a ni tur a ni: hnaih suh ang che u, tichuan in kalna tur kawng chu in hre thei dawn nia; tun hmain he mi kawng hi zawng in la zawh ngai si lo a,"" tiin mipuite chu thu a pe a." 
Joshua3:5 Tichuan Josua'n mipuite hnenah, ""Intithianghlim rawh u: naktukah LALPA'n in zingah thil mak takte a ti dawn e,"" a ti a." 
Joshua3:6 Tin, Josua'n puithiamte hnenah chuan, ""Thuthlung bawm hi zawn u la, mipuite hmaah kai ang che u,"" tiin a sawi a. Chutichuan thuthlung bawm chu an zawn a, mipuite hma chu an hruai ta a." 
Joshua3:7 Tin, LALPA'n Josua hnenah, ""Mosia hnena ka awm ang khan i hnenah pawh ka awm dawn e tih an hriat theihna'n vawiinah hian Israel-ho zawng zawng mithmuhah ka chawimawi tan dawn a che." 
Joshua3:8 Tin, thuthlung bawm zawntu puithiamhote chu, 'Jordan lui in thlen chuan tui chu dai u la, vaukam bulah ding reng rawh u,' tiin thu a pe ang che,"" a ti a." 
Joshua3:9 Tin, Josua'n Israela thlahte hnenah chuan, ""Lo kal u la, LALPA'n in Pathian thu hi rawn ngaithla teh u khai,"" a ti a." 
Joshua3:10 Tin, Josua chuan, ""Hemiah hian Pathian nung chu in zingah a awm a, in hmaah hian Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Periz-ho te, Girgas-ho te, Amor-ho te, Jebus-hote hi a hnawtchhuak ngei gnei dawn a ni tih in hria ang." 
Joshua3:11 Ngai teh u, leilung pumpui Lalpa thuthlung bawm chuan in hmaah Jordan lui a kan e." 
Joshua3:12 Chutichuan Israel hnamte zinga mi hi sawm leh pahnih hnam tin, aiah mi pakhat zel thlang chhuak ang che u." 
Joshua3:13 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa leilung pum pui Lalpa bawm zawntu puithiamte kephah chu Jordan tuia a innghah veleh chuan Jordan tui, chhak lam atanga tui lo luangte chu a chat hlauh ang a tichuan a lo inhlawm ding luah mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Joshua3:14 Tin, heti hi a ni a; mipuite chu Jordan lui kai tura an puan in ata an chhuah chuan, thuthlung bawm zawntu puithiamhote chu mipuite hmaah chuan an kal a;" 
Joshua3:15 bawm zawntu puithiam ke chuan vaukam tui a han rah veleh, (buh seng chhung zawng hi chuan Jordan lui hi a kuang zawng zawngah aliam reng thin a,)" 
Joshua3:16 chhak lam atanga tui lo luang thla la chu a ding ta a, hla feah Zarethan ram bula Adam khuaah chuan a lo inhlawm ding ta luah a: tin, Araba tuifinriat, Tuifinriat Al lama luang chhuk lai chu a chat ta hlauh va: tichuan mipuite chu Jeriko khaw zawn takah chuan an kai ta a.Tin, LALPA thuthlung bawm zawntu puithiamte chu Jordan lui laiah lei charah an ding reng mai a, tin, mipuiho zawng zawngte chuan Jordan lui an kai fai vek thlengin Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu lei charah an kal kai ta vek a." 
Joshua3:17 Tin, LALPA thuthlung bawm zawntu puithiamte chu Jordan lui laiah lei charah an ding reng mai a, tin, mipuiho zawng zawngte chuan Jordan lui an kai fai vek thlengin Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu lei charah an kal kai ta vek a." 
Joshua4:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a hnam pum pui chuan Jordan lui an kai fai vek hnuin LALPA'n Josua hnenah chuan," 
Joshua4:2 Mipuite zinga mi hi mi sawm leh pahnih, hnam tina mi pakhat zel thlang chhuak langin" 
Joshua4:3 an hnenah, 'Jordan lui lai, puithiamhote dina lai taka mi saw lung sawm leh pahnih la u la, pu phei u la, riahhmun, zanina in riahna turah dah ang che u,' tiin thu pe ang che.""" 
Joshua4:4 Chutichuan Josua chuan Israela thlahte zinga mi sawm leh pahnih, hnam tina mi a thlan chhuahte chu a ko va:" 
Joshua4:5 tin, Josua chuan an hnenah, ""LALPA in Pathian bawm hmaah khan Jordan lui laiah kai u la, Israela thlahte a hnam zat zelin, mi tinin lung pakhat theuh pu ang che u." 
Joshua4:6 tichuan he'ng hi in zingah chhinchhiahna a la ni dawn nia, nakinah in faten, 'he'ng, 'Heng lungte hi eng in tihna nge ni le?' tia an la rawn zawh hunah chuan," 
Joshua4:7 nangnin an hnenah, 'LALPA thuthlung bawm hmaah Jordan tuite a lo chah tak avang a ni; Jordan akan laiin, Jordan tuite chu a lo chat ta a ni: tichuan he'ng lungte hi Israela thlahte kumkhuaa an hriatrengna tur a nih hi,' in la ti dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Joshua4:8 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Josua'n thu a pek ang chuan an ti a, Israel thlahte a hnam zat zelin, Jordan lui laia mi lung sawm leh pahnih an la a; tin, an riahna hmunah an pu phei a, chutah chuan an dah a." 
Joshua4:9 Tin, thuthlung bawm zawntu puithiamho dinna lai tak, Jordan lui laiah chuan Josua'n lung sawm leh pahnih a phun a: chung chu tunt hlengin a la awm reng a ni." 
Joshua4:10 Mosia'n Josua thu a lo pek tak zawng zawng anga LALPA'n mipuite hnena ti tura Josua thu a pek chu an tih zawh vek hma loh chuan puithiam bawm zawntute chu Jordan lui laiah chuan an ding reng mai a: tichuan mipuite chu an intihmanhmawh a, an kai ta a." 
Joshua4:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, mipui zawng zawng chu an kai fai vek hnu chuan LALPA bawm leh puithiamte chu mipuite mithmuhah chuan an kai ve ta a." 
Joshua4:12 Tin, Reubena thlah te, Gada thlahte leh Manse hnam zatvete chu Mosia'nan hnena a lo sawi tawh ang khan Israel thlahte hmaah chuan inralthuamin an kai a:" 
Joshua4:13 Ralthuama inthuam diam mi singli lai indo turin Jeriko phaiahte chuan LALPA hmaah an kai a ni. 
Joshua4:14 Chu mi ni chuan LALPA'n Josua chu Israel-ho zawng zawng mit hmuhah a chawimawi a; Mosia an tih ang bawk khan a dam chhung zawng chuan an tih ta a. 
Joshua4:15 ,16 Tin, LALPA'n Josua hnenah chuan, ""Puithiamho, thuhriattirna bawm zawntute kha Jordan lui ata lo chhuah thu pe rawh,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua4:16 ,15 Tin, LALPA'n Josua hnenah chuan, ""Puithiamho, thuhriattirna bawm zawntute kha Jordan lui ata lo chhuah thu pe rawh,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua4:17 Chuti chuan Josua'n puithiamhote chu, ""Jordan lui ata kha lo chhuak tawh rawh u,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Joshua4:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, puithiamho, LALPA thuthlung bawm zawntute chu Jordan lui lai ata an lo chhuah a, puithiam kete chuan khawmual a rah veleh, Jordan tuite chu a luan pangngaiin a lo luang leh a, a hma ang bawk khan a kuang zawng zawngah chuan aluang liam leh ta dul dul a." 
Joshua4:19 Tin, mipuite chu thla khatna, ni sawm nin Jordan lui ata chu an chhuak a, Jeriko chhak lampang Gilgal-ah awmhmun an khuar ta a." 
Joshua4:20 Tin, chung lung sawm leh pahnih, Jordan lui ata an put chhuah chu Josua'n Gilgal-ah chuan a phun a." 
Joshua4:21 Tin, Israel thlahte hnenah chuan, ""Nakin hnua in thlahten an pate, 'Heng lungte hi eng tihna nge ni le?' tia an la zrawn zawh hunah chuan," 
Joshua4:22 Israel-hote chuan Jordan lui hi lei charah an kal kai a ni,' tiin in thlahte chu in la hriattir dawn zuk nia." 
Joshua4:23 LALPA in Pathianin hmanah Tuifinriat Sen chu kan kai hma khan, LALPA in Pathianin Jordan tuite hi in kai hma loh chuan in hmaah a tikang chat ta anih hi:leilunga hnam tinrengin LALPA kut hi a lo chak ani tih an hriat theih a, LALPA in Pathian chu kumkhuaa an tih theihna'n,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua4:24 leilunga hnam tinrengin LALPA kut hi a lo chak ani tih an hriat theih a, LALPA in Pathian chu kumkhuaa an tih theihna'n,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua5:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jordan lui piah thlang lama awm Amor-ho lal zawng zawngte leh tuifinriat kama awm Kanaan ram lal zawng zawngte chuan an kai hma loh chuan LALPA'n Jordan tuite chu Israela thlahte hmaah chuan a tikang chat tih an lo hriatin, Israela thlahte avang chuan an thinlungte chu a lo tui zo a, zam lo reng reng an awm hek lo." 
Joshua5:2 Chutih lai chuan LALPA'n Josua hnenah, ""Meilung chemte siam langin, Israela thlahte hi an serh tan a tum hnihna tansak leh rawh,"" a ti a." 
Joshua5:3 Tin, Josua'n meilung chemte chu a siam a, Israel thlahte chu vun hmawr tlangah serh a tansak a." 
Joshua5:4 Josua'n an serh a tan chan chu hei hi a ni: Aigupta ram ata chhuak ho zawng zawng, mipa ral kap mi zawng zawngte kha Aigupta ram ata an chhuah hnu khan kawng lakah thlalerah an thi zo ta a ni." 
Joshua5:5 Aigupta ram ata chhuakho zawng zawngte kha chu serhtan sa vek an ni a: amaherawhchu Aigupta ram ata an chhuaha thlalera kawng laa piang zawng zawngte kha chu serhtan an ni ve lo. 
Joshua5:6 LALPA aw an ngaihthlak duh loh avanga mipuiho zawng zawng, Aigupta ram ata lo chhuak, ral kap mite chen a, tihborala an awm vek thlengin Israel thlahte chu thlalerah kum sawmli zet an vak an vak a: LALPA'n chechhama a lo tiam tawh ang ngeiin, an thlahtute hnena a lo tiam tawh hnutetui leh khawizua luang ram chu an hmuh ve a phal ta lo a ni." 
Joshua5:7 Tichuan an thlahte anmahni aia a dinate chu Josua'n an serh a tansak a: kawnglakah khan an serh tan a nih loh avangin, serhtan loh an lo ni reng si a." 
Joshua5:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, mipuiho zawng zawng serh an tan zawh chuan an dam hma loh zawng an riahhmun, mahni awmna theuhvah chuan an awm a." 
Joshua5:9 Tin, LALPA'n Josua hnenah, ""Vawiinah hian Aigupta ho hmusitna che u hi nangmahni ata chu ka lum bo ta e,"" a ti a. Chutichuan chu mi hmun chu tunthlengin Gilgal an lo ti ta a ni." 
Joshua5:10 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Gilgal-ah awmhmun an khuar a; tin, Jeriko phaiah te chuan chu mi thla ni sawm leh ni li ni tlaiah chuan Kalhlen Kutin an kut a." 
Joshua5:11 Tin, Kalhlen Kut zawh tuk ni la la chuan chu mi rama buh chhang dawidim telh loh leh chhangper kan an ei a." 
Joshua5:12 Tin, chu mi rama buh an ei tuk atang chuan manna kha a tla ta lo a; Israela thlahte chuan manna chu an dawng leh ta ngai bawk hek lo; chu mi kum chuan Kanaan rama buh leh bal chu an ei ta zawk a ni." 
Joshua5:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Josua chu Jeriko khaw bula a awm lai chuan a dak a, a han en a, tin, ngai teh, a hma zawn lawkah chuan mi pakhat a khandaih phawi sa kengin a lo ding reng a: tin, Josua'n a han pan a, a hnenah chuan, ""Kan lama tang nge i nih, kan hmelmate lama tang?"" a ti a." 
Joshua5:14 Tin, a ni chuan, ""Ni lo e, LALPA sipaihote hotua lo kal ka ni zawk e,"" a ti a. Tichuan Josua chu leiah a bawkkhup a, chibai abuk a, a hnenah, ""Ka LALPA'n a chhiahhlawh hnenah hian eng nge sawi tur aneih le?"" a ti a.Tin, LALPA sipaihote hotu chuan Josua hnenah, ""I kephah ata i pheikhawk kha phelh rawh; i dinna hmun kha a thianghlim a ni e,"" a ti a. Tichuan Josua chuan a phelh ta a." 
Joshua5:15 Tin, LALPA sipaihote hotu chuan Josua hnenah, ""I kephah ata i pheikhawk kha phelh rawh; i dinna hmun kha a thianghlim a ni e,"" a ti a. Tichuan Josua chuan a phelh ta a." 
Joshua6:1 (Jeriko khua chu Israel-te an luh theih lohna'n an khar tlat a: tumah an chhuak lo a, tumah an lut hek lo.)" 
Joshua6:2 Tin, LALPA'n Josua hnenah, ""En teh, Jeriko leh an lal leh mi chak huaisente hi i kutah ka pe tawh e." 
Joshua6:3 Tin, ral kap mi zawng zawngte hian khawpui hi velin vawi khat chu in han vel chhuak pawht ang a. chutiang chuan ni ruk in ti tur a ni." 
Joshua6:4 Tin, puithiam pasarihin bawm hma lamah berampa ki tawtawrawt pasarih an keng ang a, tin, a ni sarih ni chuan khawpui chu vawi sarih in vel chhuak ang a, tin, puithiamten tawtawrawtte chu an ham ang." 
Joshua6:5 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, berampa ki an ham rik ruai ruai hun a, tawtawrawt ri in hriat chuan, mipui zawng zawng chu ring takin au dur dur rawh se; tichuan khawpui kulh chu a chim rup ang a, mipui chu mahni hma zawn theuhvah chuan an chho ang,"" a tia." 
Joshua6:6 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua chuan puithiamhote chu a ko a, an hnenah, ""Thuthlung bawm hi zawn u la, puithiam pasarihin LALPA bawm hma lamah chuan berampa ki tawtawrawt pasarih keng rawh se,"" a tia." 
Joshua6:7 Tin, ani chuan mipuihote hnenah chuan, ""Kal zel u la, khawpui chu vel chhuak rawh u, tin, inrlathuamho kha LALPA bawm hmalamah chuankal zel rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Joshua6:8 Tin, chutiang chu a lo ni ta a, Josua'n mipuihote hnena thu a sawi zawh chuan LALPA hmaa berampa ki tawtawrawt pasarih keng puithiam pasarihte chu an kal zel a, tawtawrawt chu an ham a: tin, LALPA thuthlung bawm chuan a zui a." 
Joshua6:9 Tin, inralthuamho chu tawtawrawt ham ham puithiamte hmaah chuan an kal a, tin, hnudaltute chuan bawm chu an chhawm a, puithiamho chuan kal pahin tawtawrawt an ham zel a." 
Joshua6:10 Tin, Josua'n mipuite chu, ""Au suh u la, in aw pawh hriat ni suh se la, au tura thu ka pek ni che u a thlen hma loh chuan in ka atangin thu reng reng chhuak hek suh se: chumi hunah chuan au vang che u,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Joshua6:11 Chutichuan LALPA bawm chu khawpui vawikhat velin a han vel chhuahtir a; tin, riahhmunah chuan an kal a, riahhmunah chuan an riak leh ta a." 
Joshua6:12 Tin, Josua chu zing takah a tho a, puithiamte chuan LALPA bawm chu an zawn a." 
Joshua6:13 Tin, LALPA bawm hmaa berampa ki tawtawrawt pasarih keng puithiam pasarihte kha an kal zel a, tawtawrawt an ham a:" 
Joshua6:14 Tin, a ni hnih ni chuan khawpui chu vawi khat an han vel chhuak elh a, riahhmunah chuan an kir leh a: chutiang chuan ni ruk an ti a." 
Joshua6:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan zing tak vartianah an tho a, an tih dan pangngaiin vawi sarih an vel chhuak a: chu mi ni chauh chuan khawpui chu vawi sarih an vel chhuak a." 
Joshua6:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a vawi sarihnaa puithiamhoten tawtawrawt an han ham chuan Josua'n mipuiho hnenah, ""Au rawh u khai: LALPA'n khawpui hi a pe tawh che u a sin." 
Joshua6:17 Khawpui hi a chhunga thil awm zawm zawng chawp hian LALPA tana hluihlawn vek tur a ni: Rahabi nawhchizuar chauh, amah leh in chhunga a hnena awm zawng zawngte erawh chu kan mi tirhte kha a lo thuhruk avangin zuah tur a ni." 
Joshua6:18 nangni chu chu thil hluihlawn lakah chuan inthiarfihlim hlauh rawh u, chutilochuan in hluihlawn hnu chuan thil hluihlawn chu in la dah ang e, Israel-ho ruahhmun hi thil hluihlawnah in siam mai ang a, manganna in thlen dah ang e." 
Joshua6:19 Tangkarua te, rangkachak te, dar leh thir bungbelte erawh chu LALPA pual a ni vek a: LALPA sum ina dah tur a ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Joshua6:20 Chutichuan mipuite chu an au a, puithiamten tawtawrawt an ham a: tin, heti hi a ni a, mipuiten tawtawrawt an ham a: tin, heti hi a ni a, mipuiten tawtawrawt ri an han hrat veleh chuan mipuiho chu an au ta dur dur a, kulh chu a chim ta rup a, tichuan mipuite chu mahni hma zawn theuhvah chuan an chho a, khawpuiah chuan an lut a, khawpui chu an la ta a." 
Joshua6:21 Tin, khawpui chhunga mi zawng zawng - a hmei apa, a pui apangin - bawngpa te, beram te, sabengtungte nen khandaihin an tihlum fai vek a." 
Joshua6:22 Tin, Josua'n mi pahnih ram va enthlatute hnenah khan, ""Nawhchizuar inah sawn va lut u la, a hnenaa chhia in lo chham tawh ang khan chu hmeichhia chu a neih zawng zawng nen va hruai chhuak rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Joshua6:23 Tin, enthlatu tlangvalte chu an va lut a, Rahabi nen, a nu nen, a nutate nen, a neih zawng zawngte nen c huan an va hruai chhuak a, a laichun unaute zawng zawng pawh an va hruai chhuak a; Israel ho riahhmun pawn lamah an awmtir ta a." 
Joshua6:24 Tin, khawpui chu a chhunga thil awm zawng zawng nen meiin an hal vek a: tangkarua te, rangkachak te, dar leh thir bungbelte chauh chu LALPA sum inah an dah a." 
Joshua6:25 Amaherawhchu Rahabi nawhchizuar leh aneih zawng zawng leh a pa chhungte chu Josua'n a zuah vek a; tichuan Israel-hote zingah chuan tun tlengin a la tel ta reng a ni; Josua'n Jeriko khua enthla tura a tirhte khaa lo thuhruk avangin. 
Joshua6:26 Tin, chu mi lai chuan Josua'n, ""He Jeriko khawpui hi rawn din apiang chu LALPA hmaah anchhe dawngin awm rawh se: a fa tir chanin a lungphum chu a phum ang a, a fa tlum ber chanin a kulh kawngkate chu a din ang,"" tiin anni chu a vau a.Chutichuan LALPA chu Josua hnenah a awm a; tin, a ram pum puiah chuan a hming a lo thang ta a." 
Joshua6:27 Chutichuan LALPA chu Josua hnenah a awm a; tin, a ram pum puiah chuan a hming a lo thang ta a." 
Joshua7:1 Amaherawhchu Israela thlahte chuan thil hluihlawnah chuan thil an lo tisual ta a: Juda hnama mi Zera fa Zabdia, chu mi fapa Karmia, chu mi fapa Akana chuan thil hluihlawn a lo la ta: tichuan Israela thlahte chungah chuan LALPA thin a lo rim ta a." 
Joshua7:2 Tin, Josua'n Jeriko khua atangin Bethel chhak lam Beth-aven dep Ai khua-ah chuan mi a tir a, an hnenah, ""Han, ""Han kal ta u la, ram han enthla teh u,"" tiin a sawi a. Tin, mite chu an han kal a, Ai khua chu a han enthla a." 
Joshua7:3 Tin, Josua hnenah an kir leh a, a hnenah, ""Mi zawng zawng chu han kal kher suh se; mi sanghnih emaw sangthum emaw vel han kal se la, Ai khua bei rawh se; mi zawng zawng han tihhah kher tur a ni lo e; tlemte chauh an ni si a,"" an ti a." 
Joshua7:4 Chutichuan mipui zinga mi, mi sangthum emaw chutah chuan an han kal a: tin, Ai-ho hmaah chuan an lo tlanchhe ta a." 
Joshua7:5 Tin, Ai-hote chuan mi sawmthum leh paruk emaw lai an lo that a: kulh kawngka bul atangin Sebarim thleng hialin an rawn um a, an liam thlaknaah chuan an that hlawm a: tin, mite thinlung chu a tui zo a, tui ang mai an lo ni ta a." 
Joshua7:6 Tin, Josua chuan a puante a pawtthler a, LALPA bawm hmaah amah leh Israel-ho upate chu an hmaia lei sin tlai thlengin an bawkkhup a; tin, an luah vaivut an phul a." 
Joshua7:7 Tin, Josua chuan, ""E khai aw, eng atan nge aw LALPA Pathian, keini mipuiho hi tihboral tura Amor-ho kuta pek atan Jordan lui hi min hruaikai tehlul nio? Jordan lui ralah khan lungawi taka awm hle hle tak zawk tur aw!" 
Joshua7:8 Aw Lalpa, hetia hmelmate uma Israel-ho an tlanchhe ta mai hi engtin nge ka tih tak ang le?" 
Joshua7:9 Kanaan-hote leh he'ng lai rama cheng zawng zawngte hian an hria ang a, min rawn hual ang a, lei ata hi kan hming an tiboral daih dawn a nih hi: i hming ropui tak hi engtin nge i tih tak ang le?"" a ti a." 
Joshua7:10 Tin, LALPA chuan Josua hnenah, ""Tho rawh, engati nge khatia i bawhkhuh reng ni?" 
Joshua7:11 Israel-ho hian thil an tisual ani e; a ni, ka thuthlung pawm tura thu ka pek kha an bawhchhia anih hi; a ni, thil hluihlawna mi pawh kha an la bawk a ni; an ru bawk a, an zep ru bawk a, an bungraw zingah ngei an thukru a ni." 
Joshua7:12 Chuvangin alawm Israela thlahten an hmelmate an ngam theih loh, hluihlawn chu in zing ata in tihboral phawt loh zawngin in hnenah hian ka awm dawn tawh lo a ni." 
Joshua7:13 Tho la, mipuiho hi tithianghlim phawt mai rawh, tin, an hnenah, 'Naktuk atan intithianghlim rawh u khai: LALPA Israelte Pathian, Aw Israelte u, in zingah hian hluihlawn thil a awm ani e: in zing ata hluihlawn thil hi in lak bo hma loh zawng in hmelmate in hneh thei lo ang." 
Joshua7:14 Chutichuan zingah a chi chia rawn inlantir tur in ni: tin, heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA'n chu mi chi a lo mana chu a hnam hnamin in rawn inlan leh tur a ni; tin, LALPA'n chu mi hnam a lo mana chu a chhung chhungin in rawn inlan leh tur a ni; tin, LALPA'n chu mi chhung a lo man chu a mal malin in rawn inlan leh tur a ni." 
Joshua7:15 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, tupawh hluihlawn thil lo la apiang chu amah leh a neih zawng zawng meiin hal vek tur a ni ang: LALPA thuthlung a bawhchhiat avang leh, Israel-hote zinga thil sual atthlak tak a tih avangin, a ti a ni,' ti ang che"" a ti a." 
Joshua7:16 Chutichuan Josua chu zing takah a tho a, Israel-hote chu a chi chiin a rawn inlantir a; tin, Juda chite chu man an ni ta a:" 
Joshua7:17 tin, Juda hnamte chu a rawn inlantir leh a; tin, Zer hnamte chu a lo man a: tin, Zer-ho chhungte chu a mal malin a rawn inlantir leh a; tin, Zabdia chu man a lo ni a:" 
Joshua7:18 tin, a chhungteho chu a mal malin a rawn inlantir leh a; tichuan Juda chia mi Zera fapa Zabdia chu mi fapa Karmia, chu mi fapa Akana chu man a lo ni ta a." 
Joshua7:19 Tin, Josua'n Akana hnenah chuan, ""Ka fapa, LALPA Israelte Pathian chu fak rawh aw; a hnenah chuan inpuang rawh khai; i thil tih zep suh khai,"" a ti a." 
Joshua7:20 Tin, Akanan Josua chu a chhang a, a hnenah, ""LALPA Israelte Pathian chungah chuan thil ka lo tisual ta ngei mai, hetiang hian ani ka lo tih tak ni:" 
Joshua7:21 Rallak zinga mi Babulon ram puan tha tak leh, tangka sekel zahnih leh, rangkachak tlang sekel sawmnga buk ka hmu a, ka awt ta em a, ka la ta mai a ni; tin, ngai teh, ka puan in chhungah leiah thuhruk a ni a, tangka chu chu mi hnuaiah chuan a awm."" a ti a." 
Joshua7:22 Chutichuan Josua'n mite a tir a, puan in chhungah chuan an va tlan a; tin, ngai teh, a puan inah chuan thuh ruk a lo ni ngei a, a hnuaiah chuan tangka chu a awm." 
Joshua7:23 tichuan puan in chhung ata chu an la a, Josua leh Israela thlahteho zawng zawng hnenah chuan an rawn la a; tin, anni chuan LALPA hmaah an dah a." 
Joshua7:24 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan Zera fapa Akana chu tangka te, puan te, rangkachak tlang te, a fapa te, a fanu te, a bawngpa te, a sabengtung te, a beram te, a puan in te leh a neih zawng zawngte nen chuan an hruai a: Akor ruamah an chhohpui a." 
Joshua7:25 Tin, Josua'n, ""Engati nge min tihmangan le? LALPA'n vawiinah hian nang pawh a timangang ve dawn che a nih hi,"" a ti a. tichuan Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan ani chu lungin an deng a; tin, anni chu meiin an hal a, lungin an deng a.Tin, a chungah chuan lung an tiang vum thur a, tun thhleng hian a la awm; tin, LALPA'n a thinrimna nasa tak chu a lamlet ta a. chutichuan chu mi hmun hmingah chuan tun thleng hian Akor ruam an la ti reng a." 
Joshua7:26 Tin, a chungah chuan lung an tiang vum thur a, tun thhleng hian a la awm; tin, LALPA'n a thinrimna nasa tak chu a lamlet ta a. chutichuan chu mi hmun hmingah chuan tun thleng hian Akor ruam an la ti reng a." 
Joshua8:1 Tin, LALPA'n Josua hnenah, ""Hlau suh la, zam hek suh: ral kap mi zawng zawng i hnenah hruai langin, tho la, Ai khuaah han kal rawh: ngai teh, Ai khaw lal leh, a mite leh a khua leh a ram chu i kutah ka pe tawh e:" 
Joshua8:2 Jeriko leh an lal chunga i tih ang khan Ai khua leh an lal chungah pawh i ti dawn nia; rallak leh rante chauh chu nangmahni pualah nei ang che u: khawpui chang ru tur a hnung lamah dah ang che,"" a ti a." 
Joshua8:3 Chutichuan Josua leh ral kap mi zawng zawngte chu Ai khaw lama han kal tur chuan an thawk ta a: tin, Josua'n mi chak huaisen singthum a thlang chhuak a, zanah a kaltir a." 
Joshua8:4 An hnenah, ""Ngai teh u, khawpui hnung lamah khawpui bei turin chang ru ang che u: khawpui atanga hla takah chuan kal suh u la, inpeih rengin awm ngawt mai rawh u," 
Joshua8:5 tin, kei leh ka hnena awmho zawng zawngte chuan khawpui chu kan rawn hnaih ang a: tin, heti hi a ni ang a, hman ang bawk amin rawn bei tura an lo chhuah veleh, an hmaah kan tlanchia ang a;" 
Joshua8:6 tichuan min um turin an chhuak ang a, khua ata thui fe kan thlem chhuah thlengin; anni chuan, 'Hman ang bawk khan kan hmaah an tlanchhe leh ta le,' an ti dawn nia; tichuan an hmaah kan tlanchhia ang a;" 
Joshua8:7 tin, chan rukna ata in lo chhuak ang a, khawpui chu in la dawn nia: LALPA in Pathianin in kutah a pe dawn e." 
Joshua8:8 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, khawpui chu in lak veleh, khawpui chu hal ang che u: LALPA thu ang zelin in ti tur a ni: ngai teh u, thu ka pek tawh che u hi,"" tiin thu ape a." 
Joshua8:9 Tin, Josua chuan a kaltir ta a: tichuan chan rukna hmunah chuan ankal a, Ai khaw thlang lamah Bethel leh Ai khaw inkarah chuan an awm a: Josua erawh chu chu mi zan chuan mipuite zingah a riak a." 
Joshua8:10 Tin, Josua chu zing takah a tho a, mipuite chu a kai khawm a, tin, amah leh Israel-ho upate chu mipuiho hmaah chuan Ai khaw lamah an han kal ta a." 
Joshua8:11 Tin, mipuiho zawng zawng, a hnena ral kap mi awmte chu an han kal a, an han hnaih a, khawpui bulah chuan an han kal a, Ai khaw hmar lampangah an han riak a: Ai khua nena an inkarah chuan ruam a awm." 
Joshua8:12 Tin, mi sangnga lai a hruai a, khawpui thlang lampang Bethel leh Ai khaw inkarah chuan a chan ruktir a." 
Joshua8:13 Chutichuan mipui, khawpui hmar lampanga sipaihote tanhmun leh khawpui thlang lampanga a changrutute tanhmun chu an han ruat fel a; tin, Josua chu chu mi zan chuan ruam lai takah a kal a." 
Joshua8:14 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ai khaw lalin chu chu a lo hmuh veleh, hmanhmawh takin zing takah a tho a, chu mi khuaa mite chu amah leh a hote zawng zawng nen, a hmun ruat Araba zawnah chuan Israel-hote chu beio turin an chhuak ta a, nimahsela khaw hnung lamah chuan amah bei turin an chang ru tih a hre lo a." 
Joshua8:15 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu dawl ta ni awm takin an awm a, thlaler lam kawngah an tlan chiam a." 
Joshua8:16 Tin, khawpuia awm zawng zawngte chu anmahni um turin an ko khawm a: tichuan Josua chu an um a, khawpuia ta chu thui fe thlem chhuahin an awm ta a." 
Joshua8:17 Tin, Ai khuaah leh Bethel khuaah chuan Israel-hote um lo chu pakhat mah an awm ta lo va: khawpui chu khar lohin an chhuahsan ta mai a, Israel hote chu an um ta a." 
Joshua8:18 Tin, LALPA'n Josua hnenah, ""I fei ken kha Ai khaw lam hawiin lek rawh; i kutah ka pe dawn a ni a,"" a ti a. Tichuan Josua chuan a fei ken chu khawpui lam hawiin a han lek ta a." 
Joshua8:19 Tin, changrututekha an awmna ata chu an lo chhuak thuai a, tin, a kut a han phar veleh an tlan a, khawpuiah chuan an lut a, an la ta a; tin, khua chu an hal ta thuai a." 
Joshua8:20 Tin, Ai-hote chuan an hnung lam chu an han thlir chuan, ngai teh, khawpui chu van lama khu chho ngut ngutin an hmu ta a, khawii lam mah maha tlan theihna reng reng an nei ta lo mai a: tichuan thlalera tlante khan a umtute chu an lo let ve ta thung a." 
Joshua8:21 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan changrututen khawpui an lak a, khawpui khu chu a chho ngut ngut an han hmuh chuan an let leh a, Ai hote chu an that ta a." 
Joshua8:22 Tin, midangte chu a bei turin khaw chhung ata an lo chhuak a; chutichuan Israel-hote chuan an karcheh ta a, then a lehlamah an awm a, a then a lehlamah: tichuan an that a, pakhat mah zuah leh chhuah reng reng pawh an nei lo a." 
Joshua8:23 Tin, Ai khaw lal chu anungin an man a, Josua hnenah an hruai a." 
Joshua8:24 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israel hote chuan Ai khuaa mi phula awm zawng awng chu thlaler rama an va umna hmuna an thah zawh a, an zaa khandaiha an thah chimih vek hnu chuan, Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu Ai khaw lamah an kir leh a, khandaihin an han bei a." 
Joshua8:25 Tin, chu mi nia thi zawng zawngte chu a hmei a pain singkhat leh sanghnih an ni. Ai khuaa mi zawng zawngte chu." 
Joshua8:26 Josua'n a fei lekna kut chu Ai-ho zawng zawng a tihboral der hma loh chuan a la thla si lo a. 
Joshua8:27 LALPA'n Josua thu a pek a, tih tur a tih ang ngei khan chu khawpuia rante leh rallakte chauh chu Israel-hote chuan anmahni pualah an nei a."
