Joshua8:28 Chutichuan Josua'n Ai khua chu a hal a, kumkhua atan leipawngah a siam a, tun thleng hian tihtiau alo ni ta." 
Joshua8:29 Tin, Ai khaw lal chu tlai thlengin thing lerah a khai a: tin, ni tlak dawnin Josua'n thu ape a, tichuan a ruang chu thingler ata an la thla a, khawpui kulh kawngka luhnaah an paih a, a chungah lung an tiang vum thur a, tun thlengin a la awm." 
Joshua8:30 ,31 Tin, Mosia dan lehkhabua ziak tawh angin, LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia'n Israela thlahte thu a lo pek tawh ang khan, Josua'n Ebal tlangah LALPA Israelte Pathian atan maicham an siam aL chutah chuan LALPA tan halral thilhlante an hlan a. remna inthawiin an inthawi a." 
Joshua8:31 ,30 Tin, Mosia dan lehkhabua ziak tawh angin, LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia'n Israela thlahte thu a lo pek tawh ang khan, Josua'n Ebal tlangah LALPA Israelte Pathian atan maicham an siam aL chutah chuan LALPA tan halral thilhlante an hlan a. remna inthawiin an inthawi a." 
Joshua8:32 Tin, chutah chuan Israela thlahte hma ngeiah Mosia'n dan a ziak kha lungahte chuan a ziak chhawng a." 
Joshua8:33 Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng, an upate leh hotute, an roreltute nen, Levi chi puithiamho, LALPA thuthlung bawm zawntute hmaah, bawm leh lampangah chuan hnam dang pawh, chumi rama piang pawh an ding za vek a; a zatve chu Gerizim tlang pangah an awm a, a zatve chu Ebal tlang pangah an awm a; lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia'n israel hote chu mal a sawmsak phawt tur a ni tih thu a pek tawh ang kha." 
Joshua8:34 Tin, chu mi zawhah chuan dan thu zawng zawng, malsawmna thu leh anchhe dawn thu chu a chhiar a, dan lehkhabua chuang zawng zawng ang kha.Mosia thupek zawng zawng chu Israel-ho pungkhawm zawng zawng leh, hmeichhiate leh naupang te te teleh, an zinga hnam dang cheng vete hriatah chuan Josua'n chhiar loh reng reng a nei lo." 
Joshua8:35 Mosia thupek zawng zawng chu Israel-ho pungkhawm zawng zawng leh, hmeichhiate leh naupang te te teleh, an zinga hnam dang cheng vete hriatah chuan Josua'n chhiar loh reng reng a nei lo." 
Joshua9:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jordan rala lalho zawng zawng - tlanga mi te, phaia mi te, tuifinriat zau tak kam tluana Lebanon thlenga awm zawng zawng - Hit-ho te, Amor-ho te, Kanaan mite, Periz-ho te Hiv-ho te, Jebus-hoten an lo hriat chuan," 
Joshua9:2 Josua leh Israel-ho chu thu khat vuaa beih rawn tumin an pungkhawm chiam a. 
Joshua9:3 Nimahsela, gibeon khuaa awmte chuan Josua'n Jeriko khua leh Ai khua a tih dan an lo hriat chuan," 
Joshua9:4 fin vervekin an che ve ta thung a, palai angin an insiam a, ip hlui tak tak an sabengtung an phurhtir a, uain peng hlui tak, a chhe thawm tawhte nen;" 
Joshua9:5 pheikhawk hlui tak tak bel tup hi an bun a, puan hlui tak an inbel a; an ei tura an rawn ken chhangte chu ro hulh, hmuar un a ni a." 
Joshua9:6 Josua hnenah Gilgal-a an riahhmunah chuan an va kal a, a hnenah leh Israel hote hnenah chuan, ""Ram hla tak atanga lo kal kan ni a: chutichuan kan hnenah hian thu thlung rawh u,"" an ti a." 
Joshua9:7 Tin, Israel-hote chun Hiv-hote hnenah chuan, ""Kan zinga cheng ve hi in lo ni reng ang e; engtin nge in hnenah thu kan thlun theih ang?"" an ti a." 
Joshua9:8 Tin, anni chuan Hosua hnenah, ""I chhiahhlawhte kan nih hi,"" an ti a. Tin, Josua chuan an hnenah, ""Tute nge maw in nih le? Khawi lam atanga lo kal nge in nih?"" a ti a." 
Joshua9:9 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""LALPA i Pathian hming avangin i chhiahhlawhte hi ram hla tak atanga lo kal kan ni e: a hmingthanzia te, Aigupta rama a thiltih zawng zawng te," 
Joshua9:10 Jordan lui rala Amor ho lalte pahnih - Hesbon ram lal Sihona te, Basan ram lal Astaroth khuaa awm Oga te chunga a thiltih zawng zawng te kha kan lo hre si a." 
Joshua9:11 Tin, kan upate leh kan rama chengho zawng zawngten kan hnenah, 'Kalkawng atan ei turte keng u la, anmahni va be rawh u, tin, an hnenah, In chhiahhlawh kan nih hi: kan hnenah thu thlung ang che u,' ti ang che u,"" tiin an sawi a." 
Joshua9:12 Heng kan ei atana kan chhangte hi in hnena lo kal tura kan lo chhiah niin kan in atanga a luma kan rawn ken a ni a; nimahsela tunah zawng en teh mah u, a ro hul tawh a, a hmuar un tawh hi:" 
Joshua9:13 tin, he'ng uain peng kan thunnate pawh hi a thar a ni a; en teh mah u, a pawh vek tawh hi: tin, he'ng kan puante leh kan pheikhawkte pawh hi kan lo kalna a thui khawp a, a hlui vek tawh hi,"" an ti a." 
Joshua9:14 Tin, mite chuan an ei tur han ken chu an lo la a, LALPA kamchang reng an ngai lo va:" 
Joshua9:15 tichuan Josua chuan anmahni nen inremna a siam a, anmahni chu zuah turin an hnenah thu a thlung ta a: tin, pungkhawmho mi liante pawh chuan an hnenah chhia an chham a." 
Joshua9:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an hnenah thu an thlun achin ni thum hnuah chuan a, khaw thenawm, anmahni zinga lo awm ve reng an ni tih an hre chhuak ta a." 
Joshua9:17 tin, Israel thlahte chu an kal zel a, a ni thum niin khawpuite chu an va thleng a. An khawpuite chu Gibeon te, Kephira te, Beeroth te, Kiriath-jearim te a ni." 
Joshua9:18 Pungkhawmho mi liante chuan LALPA, Israelte Pathian chhala an hnena chhia an lo chham tawh avangin, Israela thlahte chuan an khawih lo. Tichuan pungkhawmho zawng zawngte chu mi lianho chungah chuan an phunnawi ta a." 
Joshua9:19 Nimahsela mi lianho zawng zawngte chuan pungkhawmho zawng zawngte hnenah chuan, ""LALPA, Israelte Pathian chhalin an hnenah chhia kan lo chham awh si a: chuvangin anmahni chu kan dek thiang lo a ni." 
Joshua9:20 hetiang hian an chungah ti i la, i zuah mai ang u; chuti lo zawng an hnenah chhia kan lo chham tawh si avangin kan chungah hian thinurna a lo thleng mai ang a sin,"" an ti a." 
Joshua9:21 Tin, mi lianho vek chuan an hnenah, ""Zuahin awm rawh se,"" an ti a. Chutichuan pungkhawmho zawng zawng thing fawmtuah leh tui chawituah an lo awm ta a; mi lianhoten an hrilh ang chuan." 
Joshua9:22 Tichuan Josua'n anmahni chu a kohtir a, an hnenah, ""Engati nge, 'Ram hla tak atanga lo kal kan ni e,' tia min bum mai le? Kan zinga cheng ve in lo ni reng mai si a." 
Joshua9:23 Chuvangin anchhe dawng in lo nih tak hi, eng lai pawhin in zinga mi thenkhat hi bawih an ni reng ang a, ka Pathian in atana thing fawmtu-ah leh tui chawituah an awm fo ang,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua9:24 Josua chu an chhang a, ""LALPA, in Pathian chuan he ram hi a pe a, a chhunga chengte zawng zawng tihhlum vek turin a chhiahhlawh Mosia chu thu a pe ngei tih kan ring a; tichuan hma in rawn sawn zel dan kan hriatin min thah kan hlau a, hetiang hian kan rawn ti ta mai a ni." 
Joshua9:25 Tunah hian ngai teh, i kuta awm kan ni a: i ngaiha tha leh dika hriat ang ang chuan kan chungah hian ti zel mai ang che,"" an ti a." 
Joshua9:26 Chutichuan an chungah chutiang chuan a ti ta a, Israela thlahte lak ata chu a chhanchhuak a, anmahni chu an that ta lo a.Tin, Josua'n chu mi ni chan a ruatna apiangah pungkhawmhote leh LALPA maicham atan thing fawmtu-ah leh tuichawitu-ah a ruat a, tun thleng hian." 
Joshua9:27 Tin, Josua'n chu mi ni chan a ruatna apiangah pungkhawmhote leh LALPA maicham atan thing fawmtu-ah leh tuichawitu-ah a ruat a, tun thleng hian." 
Joshua10:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jerusalem khaw lal Adoni-zedekan Josua'n Ai khua a la a, a tichhe der a, Gibeon khuaa mite chuan Israel-hote nen inremna an siam a, an zingah an cheng ve ta tih a lo hriat chuan," 
Joshua10:2 a hlau ta hle mai a; Gibeon khua chu khaw lian tak lal khawpui ang a ni si a, Ai khua aiin a ropui zawk a, a mihring zawng zawngte pawh chu mi chak tak an ni si a." 
Joshua10:3 Chutichuan Jerusalem lal Adoni-zedeka chuan Hebron khaw lal Hohama te, Jarmuth khaw lal Pirama te, Lakis khaw lal Japhia te, Eglon khaw lal Debira teho chu," 
Joshua10:4 Lo kal u la, min rawn pui rawh u khai, Gibeon i va bei teh ang u: Josua leh Israela thlahte nen inremna an siam ta si a,"" tiin a chah khawm a." 
Joshua10:5 Chutichuan Amor-ho lalte panga Jerusalem khaw lal te, Hebron khaw lal te, Jarmuth khaw lal te, Lakis khaw lal te, Eglon khaw lal te chu an pungkhawm a, an sipaiteho zawng zawng nen an han chho a, Gibeon khaw ep an awm ta mp a, an bei ta a." 
Joshua10:6 Tin, Gibeon-hote chuan an riahhmun Gilgal-ah, Josua hnenah mi an tir a, ""I chhiahhlawhte hi ngaihthah suh ang che; rang takin kan hnenah lo chho la, min rawn chhandam la, min rawn tanpui rawh: tlang rama chengho Amor lalte min bei turin an pungkhawm chiam e,"" tiin." 
Joshua10:7 Chutichuan Josua leh a hnena ralkap mi zawng zawngte leh mi chak huaisenho zawng zawngte chu Gilgal atang chuan an han chho a. 
Joshua10:8 Tin, LALPA'n Josua hnenah, ""Anni chu hlau suh khai: i kutah ka pe vek awh e; an zinga mi tumah chelh tur reng reng che an awm dawn lo e,"" a ti a." 
Joshua10:9 Chutichuan Josua chuan a bei ta thut a; zankhua Gilgal atanga lo han kal tawh a ni a. 
Joshua10:10 Tin, LALPA'n Israel-hote hmaah chuan anmahni chuan tam tak a that a, Beth-horon chhohan lam kawngah a um a, Azeka leh Mekeda khaw thlengin a that zel a." 
Joshua10:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israel-ho hmaa an tlanchhiat a, Beth-horon atanga liam thlakna hmuna an awm lai chuan LALPA'n rvan atangin rial lian pui puiin Azeka khaw thlengin a zuk dentir chiam a, an thi a: Israela thlahten khandaiha an sahhlum ai mahin rial denhlum chu an tam zawk a ni." 
Joshua10:12 Chutichuan LALPA'n Amor-hote chu Israela thlahte a pek ni chuan Josua'n LALPA hnenah thu a sawi a; Israel-hote mithmuhah, ""Nia, Gibeon khaw chhungah ding reng rawh; Nang pawh Thlaa, Aijalon ruamah hian awm reng rawh,"" a ti a." 
Joshua10:13 Tichuan mite chuan an hmelmate chunga phuba an lak hma loh chuan ni chu a ding ta reng a, thla pawh chu a awm ta reng a. He thu hi Jasara buah ziak ani lo em ni? Tichuan ni ch van lai zawlah a awm ta reng a, ni khat pumhlum lai tlak zai reng reng a rel lo." 
Joshua10:14 LALPA'n chutianga mihring aw a ngaihthlak ni ang chuan a hmain ni reng reng a awm ngai lo a, a hnuah pawh a awm ngai hek lo: LALPA'n Israel-hote chu a dopui a ni si a." 
Joshua10:15 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu an riahhmun Gilgal-ah an kir leh ta vek a." 
Joshua10:16 Tin, chung lal pangate chu an tlan bo a, Makeda pukah an biru a." 
Joshua10:17 Tin, ""Lal pangate chu an hmu ta, Makeda pukah an biru a ni,"" tiin Josua an hrilh a." 
Joshua10:18 Tichuan Josua'n, Puk kawngkaah chuan lung luan pui pui lum u la, a vengtute pawh lo awmtir rawh u:" 
Joshua10:19 nangni erawh chu awm suh u: in hmelmate chu um ta zel u la, hnu daltute kha that ula; an khuaah reng reng luhtir suh u: LALPA in Pathianin in kutah anmahni chu a pe tawh si a,"" a ti a." 
Joshua10:20 Tin, heti hia ni a, Josua leh Israela thlahten an chimin hma loah an thah chiam zawh a, an awm chhunate chu kulhpui nei khuaah te an tlan luh hnu chuan," 
Joshua10:21 mi zawng zawng chu Josua hnen lamah Makeda-ah chuan ralmuang takin an lo haw leh ta a: tumahin Israela thlahte lamah reng reng an lei an phut lo. 
Joshua10:22 Chutichuan Josua'n,'Puk kawngka kha han hawng tawh u la, lal pangate kha puk ata ka hnenah han hruai rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Joshua10:23 Tin, chutiang chuan an ti a, chu mi lal panga, Jerusalem khaw lal te, Hebron khaw lal te, Jarmuth khaw lal te, Lakis khaw lal te, Eglon khaw lalte chu puk ata a hnenah an rawn hruai a." 
Joshua10:24 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung lalte chu Josua hnena kal ve ral kap mite zinga puipa deuh deuhte hnenah chuan, ""Lo kal hnai u la, he'ng lalho ring hi han rap teh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan an lo kal hnai a, an ring chu an rawn rap ta a." 
Joshua10:25 Tin, Josua'n an hnenah, 'Hlau suh u la, zam hek suh u; chak tak leh huai takin awm rawh u: in hmelma zawng zawng iin do te chungah LALPA'n hetiang hian a ti zel dawn a ni e,"" a ti a." 
Joshua10:26 Tin, chu mi zawhah chuan Josua'n a bei a, a tihlum a, thing panga lerah a khai a: tichuan tlai thlengin thinglerah chuan an inkhai a." 
Joshua10:27 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni tlak dawnin Josua'n thu a pe a, thingler ata an la thla a, an birukna pukah khan an paihlut a, puk kawngka chu lung lian pui puiin an chhin a, tun thleng pawh hian an la awm reng." 
Joshua10:28 Tin, Josua'n chu mi ni chuan Makeda khua chu a la a, an lal chawpin khandaihin a bei a; chu khuaa awm zawng zawngte nen chuan a tihlum fai vek a, pakhat mah zuah reng reng a nei lo: tichuan Jeriko khaw lal chunga a tih ang bawk khan Mekeda khaw lal chungah pawh a ti a." 
Joshua10:29 Tin, Josua chu Israel-ho zawng kawnge nen Makeda khua atangin Libna khua chu an bei a:" 
Joshua10:30 tichuan LALPA'n chu khua chu an lal chawpin Israel-te kutah a pe leh bawk a; tin, chu khua chu beiin a chhunga awm zawng zawngte chu khandaihin a tihlum vek a; a chhunga mi pakhat mah zuah reng reng a nei lo; tichuan Jeriko khaw lal chunga a tih ang bawk khan chu mi khaw lal chungah pawh a ti a." 
Joshua10:31 Tin, Josua chu Israel-ho zawng zawngte nen Libna khua atangin Lakis khaw lamah an kal a, tanhmun an khuar a, an bei ta a:" 
Joshua10:32 tichuan LALPA'n Lakis khua chu Israelte kutah a pe a, a ni hnih niin a la a, chu khua chu beiin a chhunga awm zawng zawngte chu khandaihin a tihlum vek a, Libna khaw chunga a tih ang bawk khan." 
Joshua10:33 Chutichuan Gezer khaw lal Horama chu Lakis khua pui turin a han kal a; tin, Josua chuan a mah leh a hote nen pakhat mah zuah hlek loin a lo that phiar a." 
Joshua10:34 Tin, Josua chu Israel-ho zawng zawngte nen Likis khua atangin Eglon khaw lamah an kal a, tanhmun an khuar a, an bei ta a:" 
Joshua10:35 tin, chu mi ni chuan an la a, tin, chumi ni vek chuan chu khua chu beiin a chhunga awm zawng zawngte chu a tihlum fai vek a, Lakis khaw chunga a tih ang bawk khan." 
Joshua10:36 Tin, Josua chu Israel-ho zawng zawngte nen Eglon khua atangin Hebron khaw lamah an kal a, an bei ta a:" 
Joshua10:37 tichuan an la a, chu khua leh an lal leh, a khawper zawng zawngte chu khandaiha beiin a tihlum vek a, Eglon khaw chunga a tih ang bawk khan pakhat mah zuah reng reng a nei lo a; a khua lama chhu chhe vekin a chhunga awm zawng zawngte chu a tihlum fai vek a." 
Joshua10:38 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu Debir khaw lamah an let leh a; an bei ta a:" 
Joshua10:39 tichuan chu khua leh, an lal leh, a khawper zawng zawngte chu a la a; tin, khandaihin an bei a, a chhunga awm zawng zawngte chu a tihlum fai vek a; pakhat mah zuah reng reng a nei lo: Hebron khaw chunga a tih ang khan Debir khua leh an lal chungah pawh a ti a; Libna khua leh an lal chunga a tih ang bawk khan." 
Joshua10:40 Chutichuan Josua'n a ram pumin, tlang ram te, Chim ram te, phai ram te, awih pangper ramte chhu chhe vekin an lal zawng zawng chu a tihlum vek a: pakhat mah zuah reng reng anei lo: LALPA, Israel-te Pathian thupek angin nung tawh phawt chu a tichimit ta vek zawk a." 
Joshua10:41 Tin, Josua chuan Kades-barnea atanga Gaza thlengin, Gosen ram zawng zawng nen Gibeon thlengin a chhu chhe vek a.Chung lalho zawng zawngte leh an ramte chu LALPA, Israelte Pathianin Israel-hote chu a dopui avangin, Josua chuan tumkhata a amn vek an ni. Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu an riahhmun Gilgal-ah an kir leh ta vek a." 
Joshua10:42 Chung lalho zawng zawngte leh an ramte chu LALPA, Israelte Pathianin Israel-hote chu a dopui avangin, Josua chuan tumkhata a amn vek an ni. Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu an riahhmun Gilgal-ah an kir leh ta vek a." 
Joshua11:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Hazor khaw lal Jabinan chu chu a lo hriat chuan, Madon khaw lal Jobaba te, Simron khaw lal te, Aksaph khaw lal te," 
Joshua11:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Hazor khaw lal Jabinan chu chu a lo hriat chuan, Madon khaw lal Jobaba te, Simron khaw lal te, Aksaph khaw lal te," 
Joshua11:2 hmar tlang ram lal te, Kineroth chim lama Araba lal te, phai ram lal te, thlang lam panga Dor khaw zosang lal te," 
Joshua11:3 chhak lam leh thlang lama awm Kanaan mi te,, tlang lama awm, Amor-ho te, Hit ho te, Periz-ho te, Jebus-ho te, Mizpa ram Hermon tlang hnuaia awm Hiv-ho hnenahte mi a ti r a." 
Joshua11:4 Tin, an sipaihote zawng zawng nen mi tam tak, an tam lam chu tuifinriat kama tiau vaivut zat zet, akawr leh tawlailir tam tak nen an thawk ta chiam a." 
Joshua11:5 Chung lalho zawng zawngte chu an intawk khawm a, Israel-hote chu beih tumin Meron tuiahte chuan an riak khawm a." 
Joshua11:6 Tin, LALPA'n Josua hnenah, ""Anni chu hlau suh: naktu hetih hun hian anniho chu tihhlum sa vekin Israelte ka rawn pe mai dawn e: an sakawr thate i chhahsak ang a, an tawilairte chu i halsak dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Joshua11:7 Chutichuan Josua leh ral kap miz awng zawngte chu Meron tuiahte chuan an va thawk ta thut a, an bawh ta a." 
Joshua11:8 Tin, LALPA'n anmahni chu Israelte kutah a pe a, an bei a, Zidon ropui thleng te, Misrephothmaim hmun thleng te, chak lampanga Mizpeh ruam thleng tein an um a: pakhat mah zuah reng reng nei loin an that vek a." 
Joshua11:9 Tin, LALPA'n a tirh angin Josua chuan an chungah a ti a: an sakawr thate a chhahsak a, an tawlailirte chu a halsak a." 
Joshua11:10 Tin, chutih lai chuan Josua chu a let leh a, Hazor khua chu a la a, an lal chu khandaihin a that a; tun hma chuan Hazor khua chu chunlgai vel ram zawng zawng zinga khawpui ber a ni." 
Joshua11:11 Tin, chu khua aawm zawng awngte chu khandaihin a that vek a, an tichimit vek a, nung tawh phawt chu pakhat mah an zuah lo: tichuan Hazor khua chu a hal ta a." 
Joshua11:12 Tin, chu lalho khawpui zawng zawngte leh an lal zawng zawngte chu Josua'n a amn vek a, khandaiha beiin a that a, a tichimit vek a; LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia'n thu apek ang khan." 
Joshua11:13 Mualpawnga khawpui lo din sa tawhte erawh kha chu, Hazor khua ngawt lo chu Israel-hote chuan pakhatmah an hal lo; chu khua erawh chu Josua'n a hal a ni." 
Joshua11:14 Tin, chung khawpuia an rallak zawng zawngte leh rante chu Israela thlahte chuan anmahni pualah an nei a; mihring eawh chu an tihboral vek hma loh zawng khandaihin an that zel a, nung tawh phawt chu zuah an nei lo." 
Joshua11:15 LALPA'n a chhiahhlawh Mosia thu a pek ang bawkin, Mosia pawhin Josua chu thu a pe ve a: chutiang chuan Josua'n a ti zel a: LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek zawng zawng chu tih loh reng reng a nei lo." 
Joshua11:16 Chutichuan Josua'n chung ram zawng zawng, tlang ram te, Chhim ram zawng awng te, Gosen ram zawng awng te, phai ram te, Araba te, Israel-ho tlang ram te, an phai ramte nen a la vek a." 
Joshua11:17 Seir tlang han sutu Halak tlang atanga Hermon tlang hnuaia Lebon ruama Baalgad thlengin; an lal zawng zawngte chu a man a, a that a, a tihlum a." 
Joshua11:18 Josua'n chung lalho zawng zawng chu rei tak a do a ni. 
Joshua11:19 Gibeon khuaa awm Hiv-hote tih chauh lo chu Israel-hote nena remna siam khua reng reng an awm lo: dona an lak vek a ni. 
Joshua11:20 LALPA'n Mosia thu a pek anga a tihchimih vek a, duhsakna nei hlek loa a tiboral theihna tura an thinlung tihkhauhsaka Israel-hote dotir thintu chu LALPA chu a ni si a." 
Joshua11:21 Tin, chung lai chuan Josua chu a kal a, tlang ram atang te, Hebron khua atang te, Debir khua atang te, Anab khua atang e, Judai tlang ram zawng zawng atang te, Israel tlang ram zawng zawng atangtein Anakim-ho chu a tichimit vek a: Josua chuan an khawpuite chawpin a tiboral vek a." 
Joshua11:22 Israela thlahte ramah chuan Anakim-ho chu pakhatmah awm an awm tawh lo: Gaza khuaah te, Gath khuaah te, Asdod khuaah te erawh chuan awm chu an la awm.LALPA'n Mosia hnena a sawi zawng zawng ang khan Josua chuan Israelteho chu an hnam inthen dan ang zelin an rochan atan a pe hlawm a. tichuan ram chu ralmuangin a awm ta a." 
Joshua11:23 LALPA'n Mosia hnena a sawi zawng zawng ang khan Josua chuan Israelteho chu an hnam inthen dan ang zelin an rochan atan a pe hlawm a. tichuan ram chu ralmuangin a awm ta a. 
Joshua12:1 Hengte hi a ni chung ram lal, Israela thlahten an tihboral a, an ram Jordan lui ral, ni chhuahna lal ram, Arnon chhak lampanga Araba zawng zawng nena an neihsak lalte chu:" 
Joshua12:2 he'ng Amor-ho lal Shihona, Hebona awm chuan Arnon ruam sira awm Aroer khua atangin ro a rel a ni a. tin, ruam lai taka khawpui te, Amona thlahte ramri Jabok lui thlengin Gilead ram zatve chungah chuana rel bawk a;" 
Joshua12:3 tin, chhak lamah chuan Araba-ah Kineroth dil thlengin a ni a; tin, chhak lamah vek Beth-jesimoth kalna kawng lamah Araba tuifinriat, Tuifinriat Al thlengin a ni a; tin, chhim lamah Pisga awih pangper hnuai thlengin a ni a a;" 
Joshua12:4 tin, Astaroth leh Edrei khuaa awm Repahim hnam la awm chhunte zingah chuan Basan lal Oga a lal a:" 
Joshua12:5 ani chuan Hermon tlangah te, Salka khuaah te leh Basan ram zawng zawngah Gesurbon lal Sihona ramri chin Gilead ram zatve thlengin ro a rel a." 
Joshua12:6 LALPA chhihhlawh Mosia leh Israela thlahte chuan chunghote chu an that a: tin, LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia chuan Reuben chi e, Gad chi te, manase hnam zatvete chu an rochanah a sem a." 
Joshua12:7 Tin, he'ng ram lalho hi a ni Josua leh Israela thlahten Jordan lui ral thlang lampanga an thlahte chu, Lebanon ruam Baal-gad atanga Seir tlang han sutu Halak tlang thlengin; tin, Josua chuan Israel hnamte an inthen dan ang zelin chu ram chu an rochan atan a pe hlawm a;" 
Joshua12:8 tlang ramah te, phai ramah te, Araba-ah te, tlang pangper amah te, thlaler ramah te, Chhim ramah te, chung chu Hit mi te, Amor mi te, Kanaan mi te, Periz m te, Hiv mi te, Jebus mi te ram kha a ni." 
Joshua12:9 Jeriko khaw lal, pakhat, Bethel khaw depa Ai khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:10 Jerusalem khaw lal, pakhat, Hebron khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:11 Jarmuth khaw lal, pakhat, Lakis khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:12 Eglon khaw lal, pakhat, Gezer khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:13 Debir khaw lal, pakhat, Geder khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:14 Horma khaw lal, pakhat, Arad khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:15 Libna khaw lal, pakhat, Adulam khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:16 Makeda khaw lal, pakhat, Bethel khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:17 Tapua khaw lal, pakhat, Hepher khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:18 Aphek khaw lal, pakhat, Lasaron khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:19 Madon khaw lal, pakhat, Hazor khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:20 Simronmeron khaw lal, pakhat, Aksaph khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:21 Taanak khaw lal, pakhat, Megido khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:22 Kedes khaw lal, pakhat, Karmel tlanga Joneam khaw lal, pakhat," 
Joshua12:23 Dor khaw zosanga Dor khaw lal, pakhat; Gilgal-a Goim hnamho lal, pakhat,Tirza khaw lal, pakhat; lal zawng zawng chu sawmthum leh pakhat an ni." 
Joshua12:24 Tirza khaw lal, pakhat; lal zawng zawng chu sawmthum leh pakhat an ni." 
Joshua13:1 Tin, Josua chu a lo upa a, a lo tar ta hle mai a; tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, "" I lo upain i lo tar ta hle a, ram lah chu lak tur a la tam mai si a." 
Joshua13:2 Heng ramte hi a ni la lak loh chu: Philistia ram zawng zawng leh Gesur-ho ram zawng zawng chu: 
Joshua13:3 Aigupta ram bula awm Sihor atanga hmar lampanga Ekron ramri thlengin (Chu chu Kanaan mite rama ngaih a ni); Philistia-ho lal panga, Gaza nitem Asdod mite, Askelon mite, Git mite leh Ekron mite chu: chim lama Avim ram pawh:" 
Joshua13:4 Kanaan mite ram zawng zawng leh Ziedon mite rama Meara, Amor-ho ramri Aphek khaw thlengin:" 
Joshua13:5 tin, Gebal mite ram leh ni chauhna lam Lebanon ram zawng zawng, Hermon tlang hnuai Baal-gad atanga Hamath khaw luhna thlengin:" 
Joshua13:6 Lebanon atanga Misrephoth-maim hmun thlengi, tlang rama cheng zawng zawng, Zidon mi zawng zawngte chu; anni chu Israela thlahte hmaah hian ka hnawtchhuak ang a: thu ka pek che ang khan Israel-hote rochanah siamsak phawt mai ang che." 
Joshua13:7 Chutichuan he ram hi hnam kuate leh Manase hnam zatvete rochanah semsak ang che,"" a ti a." 
Joshua13:8 Amah nen Reuben chite leh Gad hote chuan Jordan chhak lampangah khan an chanpual tur Mosia'n a pek chu an lo dawng tawh a, LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia ngeiin a lo pek tawh ang khan:" 
Joshua13:9 Arnon ruam sira awm Aroer khua atang leh ruam lai taka khawpui leh, Medeba phai ram zawng zawng, Dibon thlengin;" 
Joshua13:10 tin, Amor-ho lal Sihona, Hesbon khuaa lala thua khawpui zawng zawng, Amona thlahte ramri thlengin;" 
Joshua13:11 tin, Gilead ram leh Gesur-ho leh Maakat-ho ramri chin leh Hermon tlang zawng zawng leh Basan ram zawng zawng, Salka khaw thlengin;" 
Joshua13:12 Astaroth leh Edrei khuaa lala thu Basan ram lal Oga ram zawng zawng nen (chung chu Rephaim hnam la awm chhunte an ni); chungho chu Mosia'n a lo bei a, a lo hnawtchuak tawh a ni." 
Joshua13:13 Amaherawhchu Gesur-hote leh Maakat-hote chu Israela thlahte chuan an hnawtchhuak lo: Gesur-ho leh maakat-ho zawng tun thleng hian Israel-hote zingah an la cheng ta reng zawk a ni. 
Joshua13:14 Levi hnamte chauh a ni rochan tur a pek ve loh ni: a hnena a lo sawi tawh ang khan LALPA, Israelte Pathian tana meia thilhlante chu an rochan a ni zawk si a." 
Joshua13:15 Tin, Rebena thlahte hnam chu an chhungkaw zir zelin Mosia'n ram a lo pe tawh a." 
Joshua13:16 Tin, an ramri chu Arnon ruam sira awm Aroer khua atanga ruam lai taka khawpui leh Medeba phai ram zawng zawng:" 
Joshua13:17 Hesbon leh chu mi phai rama khawpui zawng zawng: Debon te, Bamothbaal te Bethbaal-meon te:" 
Joshua13:18 Jahz khua te, Kedemoth te, Mephaath te;" 
Joshua13:19 Kiriathaim te, Sibma te, ruam tlanga Zereth-sahar te;" 
Joshua13:20 Bethpeor te, Pisga awih pangper te, Beth-jesimoth te;" 
Joshua13:21 phai ram khawpui zawng zawng te, Hesbona rorel, Amor-ho lal Sihona mi lian ho, Midian-hote lala awm Evia te, Rekema te, Zura te, Hura te, Reba te an awmna ram chawpa Mosia'n a lo tiboral takte nen khan a ni." 
Joshua13:22 Beora fapa Balaama, aienthiam pawh Israela thlahten mi dang an thlahte zingah chuan khandaihin an that zel a." 
Joshua13:23 Tin, Reubena thlahte ram chin chu Jordan leh a kam zawng chu a ni. Heng ram leh khawpuite leh khuate hi a ni Reubena thlahte tana an chhungkaw zir zela rochana an ruat chu." 
Joshua13:24 Tin, Mosia'n Gad chi, Gada thlahte chu an chhungkaw zir zelin ram a pe a." 
Joshua13:25 Tin, an ramri chu Jazer khua leh Gilead ram khawpui zawng zawng leh Amona thlahte ram zatve, Raba khaw depa awm Aroer thlengin;" 
Joshua13:26 Hesbon atanga Ramathmizpe leh Betonim thlengin; Mahanaim atanga Debir ramri thlengin; 
Joshua13:27 tin, ruamah chuan Beth-haram te, Beth-nimra te, Sukoth te, Zaphon te, Hezbon leh Sihona ram dang te, Hezbon leh Sihona ram dang e, Jordan leh a kam te, Jordan ral chak lampanga Kinereth dil tawp rak thlengin a ni." 
Joshua13:28 Hengte hi a ni Gada thlahte tana an chhungkaw zir zela an rochana ruat chu, a khawpuite leh khuate chu." 
Joshua13:29 Tin, Mosia'n Manase hnam zatvete chu ram a pe a, Manasea chi zatvete tan a ni an chhungkaw zir zela a pek ni." 
Joshua13:30 Tin, an ramri chu Mahanaim atangin Basan ram zawng zawng, Basan ram lal Oga ram zawng zawng leh basan rama Jair khawpui zawng zawngte nen, chu chu khaw sawmruk a ni:" 
Joshua13:31 tin, Gelead ram te, Edrei khuate nen: chung chu Manasea fa Makira thlah, Makira thlah zatvete tan, an chhungkaw zir zela ruat a ni." 
Joshua13:32 Heng Moab phai, Jeriko zawn, Jordan ral, chhak lampang te hi a ni Mosia'n an rochan tura a lo sem chu.Levi chite erawh chu Mosia'n rochan tur a pe ve lo: an hnena a lo sawi tawh ang khan LALPA, Israelte Pathian chu an rochan a ni zawk." 
Joshua13:33 Levi chite erawh chu Mosia'n rochan tur a pe ve lo: an hnena a lo sawi tawh ang khan LALPA, Israelte Pathian chu an rochan a ni zawk." 
Joshua14:1 Hengte hi ani Israela thlahten Kanaan rama an lak, puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te, Israela thlahte hnam chhungkaw puipaten an rochan atana an lo sem takte chu,." 
Joshua14:2 hnam kuate leh hnam zatvete chanpual atana LALPA'n Mosia hmanga thu a lo pek tak ang khan," 
Joshua14:3 Mosia chuan hnam hnih leh hnam zatvete kha Jordan ralah khan an rochan tur a lo pe ta si a; Levi chite erwah chu an zingah rochan tur a pe ve lo. 
Joshua14:4 Josefa thlahte chu hnam hnih an ni, Manase leh Ephraim chu: Levi chiteho chu chu mi ramah chuan chanpual an pe lo, an awmna tur khawpuite leh a daivel ran tlatna tur hmun leh an in lo khuarna ngawt lo chu." 
Joshua14:5 LALPA'n Mosia thu apek ang khan Israela thlahte chuan an ti a, ram chu an sem a." 
Joshua14:6 Chutichuan Juda thlahte chu Gilgal khuaah Josua hnenah an va kal a: Keniz mi Jephunia fapa Kaleba chuan a hnenah, ""Kadesh-barnea hmuna Pathian mi Mosia hnena LALPA'n ka chungchang leh i chungchang thua a thusawi kha i hria a." 
Joshua14:7 LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia'n Kades-barnea hmun atanga ram va en thla tura mi tirh lai khan kum sawmli mi ka ni tawh a; tin, ka rilrua awm ang chiah chu a hnenah ka thlen leh a. a." 
Joshua14:8 Amaherawhchu ka unau ka hnena kal vete khan mipuite thinlung an tihtuisak a: kei erawh chuan LALPA ka Pathian chu ka pawm tlat a. 
Joshua14:9 Tichuan Mosia'n chu mi ni chuan, 'LALPA ka Pathian hi i pawm tlat avangin i kein a lo rah tak ram chu kumkhuain nangmah leh i thlahte rochan tur ani ngei ngei ang,' tiin chhia a chham a." 
Joshua14:10 Tichuan ngaiteh, LALPA'n Mosia hnena chung thu chu a sawi achin Israel-hote thlalera an vah chhung zawngte khan LALPA'n a sawi tawh angin kum samwli leh kum nga zet chu mi damtir a; tichuan ngaiteh, tunah hian kum sawmriat leh kum nga ka lo ni ta a," 
Joshua14:11 Chuti chung pawhin tun thleng pawh hian Mosia mi tirh lai ang mai bawk khan ka la chak reng a, hmana indo leh chhuahvahna'n thahrui ka nei ang bawk khan tunah pawh hian ka la nei reng a sin." 
Joshua14:12 Chutichuan he tlang, LALPA'n kha mi nia a lo sawi tah kha mi pe ta che; khatia Anakim-hote an awm a, an khawpuite pawh a ropuiin, kulha hung khup a ni tih khami ni khan i hriat kha; LALPA chuan mi awmpuiin, anmahni chu ka hnawtchhuak thei mahna, LALPA'n a lo sawi tawh ang khan,"" a ti a." 
Joshua14:13 Chutichuan Josua chuan mal a sawm a; tin Jephunia fapa Kaleba chu a rochan atan Hebron kua chu a pe ta a. 
Joshua14:14 Tichuan Hebron khua chu tun thleng hian Keniz mi, Jephunia fapa Kaleba rochan a lo ni ta a ni; LALPA, Israelte Pathian chu a pawm tlat avangin.Tin, Hebron khaw hming chu a hma chuan Kiriath-arba a ni; Arba chu Anakim-ho szinga mi lian ber a ni. Tichuan ram chu ralmuangin a awm ta rih a." 
Joshua14:15 Tin, Hebron khaw hming chu a hma chuan Kiriath-arba a ni; Arba chu Anakim-ho szinga mi lian ber a ni. Tichuan ram chu ralmuangin a awm ta rih a." 
Joshua15:1 Tin, Juda thlahte hnam an chhungkaw zir zela an chanpuala ruat chu Edon ramri chin chhim lampang, Zin thlaer thleng hialin, chhim tawp thleng rakin a ni." 
Joshua15:2 Tin, chhim lampanga an ramri chin chu Tuirinriat Al tawp rak, chim chawng litengsawl atangin a ni;" 
Joshua15:3 tin, Akrabim chhohna chhim lam panin a kal zel a, Zin a va thleng a, tin, Kadesbarnea chhim lamah a chho a, Hezron a va thleng a, tin, Adar-ah a chho a, Karka a kualkhung a:" 
Joshua15:4 tin, Azmon-ah a kal zel a, Aigupta luiah a chhuak a; tichuan tuifinriat chu ramri tawp chin chu a ni: chu chu chhim lampangah in ramri chin tur chu a ni ang." 
Joshua15:5 Tin, chhak lampang ramri chu tui - Tuifinriat Al, Jordan chhuah tak chu a ni. Tin, Hmar lampang ramri chu tuifinriat lingtengsawl, Jordan chauh atangin a ni a:" 
Joshua15:6 tichuan ramri ch Beth-hogla-ah a chho a. Beth-araba hmarah a kal zel a: tin, ramri chu Rebena fapa Bohana lungah a chho zel a:" 
Joshua15:7 tin, ramri chu Akor ruam atangin Debir-ah a cho zel a, tin, lui chhim lama awm Adumim-a chhohna depa Gilgal lam panin hmar lamah a kal zel a: tin, ramri chu Ensemes tuiahte chuan a kal zel a, tichuan ramri chu En-rogel-aha chhuak a ni." 
Joshua15:8 tin, ramri chu Honoma fapa ruamah Jebus-ho ram sir chhim lam (chu chu Jerusalem a ni) thlengin a chho a; tin, ramri chu Hinom thlang lampang ruam bula awm tlang chhipah a chho a, chu chu Rephaim hmar lampang ruam tawp rak a ni:" 
Joshua15:9 tin, ramri chu tlang chhip atangin Nephtoa lui tuite thlengin a kaltir a, Ephron tlanga khawpuiahte a kal zel a, tin, ramri chu Baala-ah (chu chu Kiriath-hearim ani_ an kaltir:" 
Joshua15:10 tin, ramri chu Baala atangin thlang lampang ah Seir tlang thlengin a insawh kual thla leh a, hmar lampangah Jearim (chu chu Kesalon a ni) tlang hrulah akal zela, Beth-semes-ah a chhuk a. Timna lamah a kal zel a:" 
Joshua15:11 tin, ramri chu hmar lampang Ekron hrulah a kal chuak a, tin, ramri chu Sikron-ah an kaltir a, tin, Baala tlangah a kal zel a, Jabneel-ah a chhuak a; tichuan ramri chu tuifinriatah a va tawp a ni." 
Joshua15:12 Tin, thlang lampang ramri chu tuifinriat zau tak leh a kam chin zawng chu a ni. Chung ramri chin zawng chu ani Juda thlahte tana an chhungkaw zir zela ruat chu." 
Joshua15:13 Tin, Jephunia fapa Kelaba chu LALPA'n Josua thu apek angin Juda thlahte zingah chuan chanpual a siamsak ve a, chu chu Kiriath-arba a ni a, Arba chu Anaka pa a ni (chu chu Hebron an ti bawk)." 
Joshua15:14 Tin, Kaleba chuan chu khua ata chu Anaka fapate pathum Sesaia te, Ahimana te, Talmaia te, Anaka fate chu a hnawt chhuak a." 
Joshua15:15 Tin, chu tang chuan Debir khuaa mite a han run a; a hma chuan Debir khaw hming chu Kiriath-sepher a ni." 
Joshua15:16 Tin, Kaleban, ""Tupawh Kiriath-sepher han bei a, han la thei apiang chu ka fanu Aksai nupuiah ka neihtir ang."" a ti a." 
Joshua15:17 Tin, Kaleba unau Kenaza fapa Othnielan a han la a: tichuan a fanu Akai chu nupuiah a neihtir ta a." 
Joshua15:18 Tin, a pasal hnen a va thlen chuan a pa ram dil turin a lo fuih a. tin, sabengtung ata a chuk a; Kaleba chuan a hnenah, ""Enge i duh le,"" a lo ti a." 
Joshua15:19 Ani chuan, ""Eng emaw dil che ka duh a ni: chhim lam ram ro takah mi lo awmtir ta si a, tuikhur mi pe tel bawk turin ka ngen a che,"" a ti a. Tichuan tuikhur chhakta leh thlangta chu a pe ta a." 
Joshua15:20 Chung ch ani Juda thlahte hnam an chhungkaw zir zela an rochan chu. 
Joshua15:21 Tin, chhima Edom ramri va deptu Juda thlahte hnam khawpui hmawrtawngte chu Kabzeel te, Eder te, Jagur te;" 
Joshua15:22 Kina te, Demona te, Adada te;" 
Joshua15:23 Kedes te, Jazor te, Ithnan te;" 
Joshua15:24 Zip te, Telem te, Bealof te;" 
Joshua15:25 Hazor-adata e, Kerioth-hezron (chu chu Hazor a ni) te;" 
Joshua15:26 Amam te, Sema te, Molada te," 
Joshua15:27 Hazargada te, Hesmon te, Beth-pelet te;" 
Joshua15:28 Hazar sual te, Beer-seba te, Biziothia te;" 
Joshua15:29 Baala te, Iim te, Ewzem te; Eltolad te, Kesil te, Horma te," 
Joshua15:30 Ziklag te Madmana te, Sasana te;" 
Joshua15:31 Lebaoth te, Silhim te, Ain te, Rimon te ani khawpuiz awng zawng te chu a khawperte nen khaw sawmhnih leh kaw kua a ni." 
Joshua15:32 Lebaoth te, Silhim te, Ain te, Rimon te a ni: khawpi zawng zawngte chu akhawperte nen khaw sawmhih leh khaw kua a ni." 
Joshua15:33 Tin, phai ram lamah chuan Estaol te, Zora te, Asna te;" 
Joshua15:34 Zanoa te, Enganim te, Tapua te, Enam te;" 
Joshua15:35 Jarmuth te, Adulam te, Soko te, Azeka te;" 
Joshua15:36 Saaraim te, Adithaim te, Gedera te, Gederothaim te: khawpuite chu a khawperte nen khaw sawm leh khaw li a ni." 
Joshua15:37 Zenan te, Hadasa te, Migdal-gad te;" 
Joshua15:38 Dilean te, Mizpe te; Joktheel te;" 
Joshua15:39 Lakis te, Boz-kat e, Eglon te;" 
Joshua15:40 Kabon te, Lahmam te, Kitlis te;" 
Joshua15:41 Gederot te, Beth-dagon te, Naama te, Makeda te; khawpuite chu a khawperte nen khaw sawm leh khwa ruk a ni." 
Joshua15:42 Libna te, Ether te, Asan te;" 
Joshua15:43 Iphta te, Asna te, Nezib te;" 
Joshua15:44 Keila te, Akzib te, Maresa te; khawpuite chu a khawperte nen khaw kua a ni." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron leh a chhehvel khuate leh a khawper chu 
Joshua15:46 Ekron atanga tuifinriat thleng hialin Asdod hrula awm zawng zawng a khawperte nen. 
Joshua15:47 Asdod leh a chhehvel khuate leh a khawperte chu; Gaza leh a chhehvel khuate leh a khawperte chu; Aigupta lui leh tuifinriat zau leh a kam chin thlengin. 
Joshua15:48 Tin, tlang ram lamah chuan Samir te, Jatir te, Soko te;" 
Joshua15:49 Dana te, Kiriath-sana (chu chu Debir ani_ te;" 
Joshua15:50 Anab te, Estemo te, Anim te;" 
Joshua15:51 Gosen te, Holon te, Gilo te; khawpuite chu akhawperte nen khaw sawm leh khaw khat a ni." 
Joshua15:52 Arab te, Duma te, Esan te;" 
Joshua15:53 Janim te, Beth-tapua te, Apheka te;" 
Joshua15:54 Humta te, Kiriath-arba (chu chu Benron ani_ te, Zior te; khawpuite chu a khawperte nen khaw kua a ni." 
Joshua15:55 Maon te, Karmle te, Zip te, Juta te;" 
Joshua15:56 Jezreel te, Jokdeam te, Zanoa te;" 
Joshua15:57 kain te, Gibea te, Timna te; khawpuite chu khawperte nen khaw sawm a ni." 
Joshua15:58 Halhul te, Beth-zur te, Gedor te;" 
Joshua15:59 Maarat te, Beth-anot te, Eltekon te; khawpuite chu a khawperte nen khawruk a ni." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriath-baal te (chu chu Kiriath-jearim a ni), Raba te; khawpuite chu a khawperte nen khaw hnih a ni." 
Joshua15:61 Thlaler lamah chuan Beth-araba te, Midin te, Sekaka te;" 
Joshua15:62 Nibsan te, chi Khawpui te, En-gedi te; khawpuite chu a khawper nen khaw ruk a ni.Jerusalem khua ami Jebus-ho erawh chu Juda thlahten an hnawtchhuak thei l a; chutichuan Jebus-hote chu Juda thlahte nen tun thleng hian Jerusalemah an la cheng za ta reng a ni." 
Joshua15:63 Jerusalem khua ami Jebus-ho erawh chu Juda thlahten an hnawtchhuak thei l a; chutichuan Jebus-hote chu Juda thlahte nen tun thleng hian Jerusalemah an la cheng za ta reng a ni. 
Joshua16:1 Tin, Josefa thlahte chanpual chu, Jeriko zawn Jordan atangin thlaler kiang, chhak lampanga Jeriko tuiahte chuan an chhuak a, Jeriko atang chuan tlang ramah Bethel thlengin a chho zel a;" 
Joshua16:2 tin, Bethel atangin Luz-ah a chhuak a, Ark-ho ramria Ataroth thlengin a kal zel a;" 
Joshua16:3 tin, thlang lampangah Japhlet-ho ramri thlengin a chhuk zel a: chu chu tuifinriatah a chhuak a." 
Joshua16:4 Tichuan Josefa thlahte manase leh Ephraim chite chuan chanpualah a nei ta a. 
Joshua16:5 Tin, an chhungkaw zir zela Ephraima thlahte ramri chu hetiang a ni: chhak lampanga an chanpual ramri chu Ataroth-adar a ni a, Beth-horon chhakta thlengin;" 
Joshua16:6 tin, ramri chu Mikmethath hmara thlang lampangah a chhuak a; tin, ramri chu chhak lampangah Taanath-silo thlengin a let leh a, Janoa chhak lamah a kal zel a;" 
Joshua16:7 tin, Janoa atang chuan Ataroth-ah te, Naara-ah te a chhuk zel a, Jeriko a tleng a, Jordan-aha chuak a." 
Joshua16:8 Tapua atangin ramri chu thlang lampangah Kana luite thlengin akal a; chu chu tuifinriatah a chhuak a. Chung chu a ni Ephraima thlahte hnam an chhhungkaw zir zela an chanpual chu. 
Joshua16:9 Manasea thlahte chanpual zinga Ephraima thlahte tana khawpui ruat hransakte nen, a khawpui zawng zawngte leh a khawper pawh.Tin, Gezer-a awm Kanaan hote chu a hnawtchuak lo va Kanaan mite chu Ephraim- hote zingah tun thleng hian an la awm a, hnathawka rawih atan chhiahhlawhah an awm ta zawk a ni." 
Joshua16:10 Tin, Gezer-a awm Kanaan hote chu a hnawtchuak lo va Kanaan mite chu Ephraim- hote zingah tun thleng hian an la awm a, hnathawka rawih atan chhiahhlawhah an awm ta zawk a ni." 
Joshua17:1 Tin, Manasea thlahte chanpual chu he'ng hi a ni; ani chu Josefa fa tir kha a ni a. Gileada pa, Manasea fa tir Makira erawh chu indo mi a ni avangin Gilead leh Basan ram chu anei a." 
Joshua17:2 Tin, chanpual chu Manasea thlahte dang zawng zawng tan an chhungkaw zir zelin a ni; Abiezera thlahte tan te, Heleka thlahte tan te, Asriela thlahte tan te, Sekema thlahte tan te, Hephera thlahte tan te, Semidia thlahte tan te: chungte chu an chhungkaw zir zela Josefa fapa Manasea thlah mipate chu an ni." 
Joshua17:3 Manasea fa Makira, chu mi fa Gileda, chu mi fa Hephera, chu mi fa Jelophehada erawh chuan fapa nei loin fanu hlir a nei a ni: chung a fanu hmingte chu Malai te, Novai te, Hoglai te, Milkai te, Tirzai te a ni." 
Joshua17:4 Tin, puithiam Eleazara hmaah leh Nuna fapa Josua hmaah leh mi lianhote hmaah an va kal a, ""Kan unaute zingah hian chanpual min pe ve turin LALPA'n Mosia kha thu a pe a ni,"" tiin a sawi a: chutichuan LALPA thupek angin an pa unaute zingah chuan chanpual a pe ve ta a." 
Joshua17:5 Tin, Jordan rala mi Gilead leh Basan ram tiam loin, Manasea chanpualah hmun sawm a tlu a;" 
Joshua17:6 Manasea fanute chuan a fapate zingah chanpual an neih ve avang a ni: tin, Gilead ram chu Manasea fapa dange chuan an chang a." 
Joshua17:7 Tin, Manasea ramri chu Sekem chhak lama awm Aser atanga Mikmethath thlengin a ni; tin, ramri chu ding lampangah En-tapua mite awmna thlengin a kal a." 
Joshua17:8 Tapua ram chu Manasea ta a ni a: Manasea ramri depa Tapua erawh chu Ephraima thlahte ta a ni. 
Joshua17:9 Tin, ramri chu Kana luiteah, luite chhim lampangah chuan a chhuk thla a: chung khawpite chu Manasea khawpuite zinga mi, Ephraima ta a ni: tin, Mansea ramri chu luite hmar lampangah a ni a, tin, tuifinriatah a chhuak a:" 
Joshua17:10 chhim lampang chu Ephraima ta a ni a, hmar lampang chu Manasea ta a ni a, tuifinriat chu a ramri a ni; hmar lamah chuan Aser thlengin a va ni a, chhak lamah chuan Isakar thlengin a han ni a." 
Joshua17:11 Isakar leh Aser ramah chuan Manasean Beth-sean leh a chhehvel khua te, Ibleam leh a chhehvel khua te, Dor-a awmte leh a chhehvel khua te, Endor-a awmte leh a chhehvel khua te, Taanak-a awmte leh a chhehvel khua te, Mefido-a awmte leh a chhehvel khua te, zo khawsang pathumte chu a nei a." 
Joshua17:12 Nimahsela Manasea thlahte chuan chung khawpuia awmte chu an hnawtchhuak thei lo va: Kanaan mite chu chung ramah chuan an awm lui tlat mai a. 
Joshua17:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israela thlahte chu an lo chak tak tial tial chinah chuan, Kanaan hote chu hnathawka rawih atan an awmtir a, an hnawtchhuak fai vek ta lo." 
Joshua17:14 Tin, Josefa thlahten Josua hnenah, ""Engtizia nge maw ni rochun tur chanpual hmun khat chan khat chauh min pek bik ni le, kan tam tehlul nen, LALPA lahin tun thlengin mal min sawm nasat hle mai si nen?"" tiin an sawi a." 
Joshua17:15 Tin, Josua'n an hnenah, ""In tam ahnu, Periz hote leh Rephaim-ho ram ngawte khi in awmna'n han thiat ta che u; Ephraim tlang ram hi in tan a chep luattuk si chuan,"" a ti a." 
Joshua17:16 Tin, Josefa thlahte chuan, ""tlang ram hi kan tan a tawk lo a ni: phai rama Kanaan cheng zawng zawng, Beth-sean leh a khawpuia awmte leh Jezreel ruama awmte hian thir tawlailir an nei theuh bik a,"" an ti a." 
Joshua17:17 Tin, Josua'n Josefa chhunge, Ephraima leh Manasea thlahte hnenah chuan, ""In tam hle a, chak pawh in chak bawk a: chutichuan chan khat chauh zawng in nei lo ang chu:tlang ram khi in tan ni ang hmiang; ram ngaw mah ni se la, in thiat ang a, a ram chin zawng chu in ta ani dawn nia: Kanaan-hote chuan thir tawlailirte neiin, chak hle mah se la in la hnawtchuak dawn a ni,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua17:18 tlang ram khi in tan ni ang hmiang; ram ngaw mah ni se la, in thiat ang a, a ram chin zawng chu in ta ani dawn nia: Kanaan-hote chuan thir tawlailirte neiin, chak hle mah se la in la hnawtchuak dawn a ni,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua18:1 Tin, Israela thlah mipuiho zawng awng chu Silo khuaah an inkhawm chiam a, chutah chuan inbiakna puan in an zar a: ram chu an thu hnuaiah a lo awm ta a," 
Joshua18:2 Tin, Israela thlahte zingah chuan an chanpual la sem ve loh hnam sarih an la awm a." 
Joshua18:3 Tichuan Josua'n Israela thlahte hnenah chuan, ""LALPA in thlahtute Pathianin a lo pek tawh che u ram hi eng chen nge luah loa in la muan dawn le?" 
Joshua18:4 Hnam hrang theuha mi mi pathum zel inthlang chhuak u la: anni chu ka lo tir ang a, anni chu an thawk ang a, ram chu an va fang ang a, an chanpual tawk tur ang theuh zelin an va ziak ang a; tin, ka hnenah an lo kir leh ang a." 
Joshua18:5 Tin, hmun sarihah an then phawt ang a: Juda-ho chu chhim lamah an chanpualah an awm ang a, tin, Josefa chhungte chu hmar lamah an chanpualah an awm ang." 
Joshua18:6 Tin, ram chu hmun sarihah ve then u la, chu mi ziak chu mi rawn pe ang che u: tichuan hetah hian LALPA kan Pathian hmaah thum ka lo vawrsak ang che u." 
Joshua18:7 Levi-ho hi zawngin in zingah hian chanvo an nei ve lo va: LALPA puithiam hna hi an chanpual a ni si a. tin, Gad-ho te, Reuben-ho te leh Manase hnam zatvete kha zawngin Jordan chhak lamah khan an chanpual chu LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia'n a lo pek kha an lo chang tah a,"" a ti a." 
Joshua18:8 Tichuan chu mite chu an thawkchhuak ta a, tin, ram chanchin va ziak chhuak turte chu Josua'n, ""Ram chu va fang ta u la, rawn ziak chhuak u la, ka hnenah rawn thlen leh u la, hetah Silo khuaah hian LALPA hmaan thum ka lo vawrsak ang che u,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Joshua18:9 Tin, mite chu an kal a, ram chu an va fang a, hmun sarihah an then a, lehkhabuah a khuain an ziak chhuak a, riahhmun Silo-ah chuan Josua hnenah an kal leh a." 
Joshua18:10 Tin, Josua'n Silo-ah chuan LALPA hmaan thum a lo vawrsak a: chutah chuan Josua'n Israela thlahte chu an inthen dan ang zel chuan ram chu a sem ta a." 
Joshua18:11 Tin, thumvawr chu Benjamina thlahte hnam an chhungkaw zir zelin an chungah a ltu ta a: tin, an ramri chin chu Juda thlahte leh Josefa thlahte inkar a ni." 
Joshua18:12 Tin, hmar lampanga an ramri chin chu Jordan atangin a ni: tin, ramri chu Jeriko sirah hmar lampangah a chho zel a, tin, thlang lampangan tlang ramah a chho zel a; ramri tawpna chu Beth-aven thlalerah a ni." 
Joshua18:13 Tin, ramri chu chuta tangin Luz lamah, Luz (chu chu Bethel a ni) sirah, chhim lampangah a kal zel a; tin, ramri chu Beth-horon thlangta chhim lampanga tlang hrulah Ataroth-adar-ah a chhuk a." 
Joshua18:14 Tin, ramri chu a kal zel a, Beth-horon chhim lampanga tlang bul atang chuan thlang laman chhim lampangah a kual phei a; chu chu Kiriath-jearim a ni) Juda thlahte khawpuiah a tawp a: chu chu thlang lampang ram chu a ni." 
Joshua18:15 Tin, chhim lampanga ram ch u Kiriath-jearim tawp atangin a ni, tin, ramri chu thlang lamah a chhuak a, Nephtoa lui tuiahte chuan a kal zel a:" 
Joshua18:16 tin, ramri chu Rephaim hmar lampang ruama Hinoma fapa ruam bula tlang hmawrah chuan a chhuk a; tichuan Jebus-ho sirah, chhim lampangan Honom ruamah a chhuk a, tin, En-rogel-ah a chhuk a;" 
Joshua18:17 tin, hmar lamzawngin a kal a, En-semes-ah a kal a, Adumin chhohna dep Geliloth-ah a kal a, tin, Reubena fapa Bohana lungah a chhuk a:" 
Joshua18:18 tin, Araba sir hmar lampangah a kal zel a, Araba-ah a chhuk a:" 
Joshua18:19 tin, ramri chu Beth-hogla sir, hmar lampangah a kal zel a: tin, ramri tawpna chu Jordan chhim tawp, Tuifinriat Al hmar litengsawlah a ni: chu chu chhim lam ramri a ni. Jordan chu chhak lam panga ramri chin a ni." 
Joshua18:20 Chu chu ani Benjamin thlahte an chhungkaw zir zela an chanpual ramin a hual chhung chu. 
Joshua18:21 Tichuan Benjamin thlhate an chhungkaw zir ang zela an khawpuite chu Jeriko te, Beth-hogla te, Emek-keziz te;" 
Joshua18:22 Beth-araba te, Zemaraim te, Beth-el te;" 
Joshua18:23 Avim te, Para te, Ophra te;" 
Joshua18:24 Kephar-amoni te, Ophni te, Geba te; khawpui sawm leh pahnih a khawperte nen:" 
Joshua18:25 Giben te, Rama te, Beeroth te;" 
Joshua18:26 Mizpe te, Kephira te, Moza te;" 
Joshua18:27 Rekem te, Irpeel te, Tarala te;Zela te, Eleph te, Jebus te (chu chu Jerusalem a ni), Gibeath te, Kiriath te a ni; khawpui sawm leh pali a khawperte nen. Chu chu a ni Benjamina thlhate an chhungkaw zir zela an chanpuala ruat chu." 
Joshua18:28 Zela te, Eleph te, Jebus te (chu chu Jerusalem a ni), Gibeath te, Kiriath te a ni; khawpui sawm leh pali a khawperte nen. Chu chu a ni Benjamina thlhate an chhungkaw zir zela an chanpuala ruat chu." 
Joshua19:1 Tin, thumvawr vawi hnihna chu Silmeona chungah, Simeona thlahte hnam chungah an chhungkaw zir zelin a tlu leh ta a: an chanpual chu Juda thlahte chanpual zingah a tel ve a ni." 
Joshua19:2 An chanpuala tlute chu Beer-seba (Seba emaw) te, Molada te:" 
Joshua19:3 Hazar-sual te, Bala te, Ezem te;" 
Joshua19:4 Eltolad te, Bethul te, Horma te;" 
Joshua19:5 Ziklag te, Beth-markaboth te, Hazar-susa te;" 
Joshua19:6 Beth-leboath te, Saruhen te; khawpui sawm leh pathum a khawperte nen:" 
Joshua19:7 Ain te, Rimon te, Ether te, Asan te: khjawpui pali a khawperte nen:" 
Joshua19:8 chung khawpui vela khawper zawng awng Baalath-beer Chhim Rama thlengin. 
Joshua19:9 Chung chu a ni Simeona thlhate hnam an chhungkaw zir zela an chanpual chu Juda thlahte chan zinga mi a ni: Juda thlahte chanpual chu an tan a zau lutuk si a: chuvangin Simeona thlahte chanpual chu a chan zingah a tel ve a ni. 
Joshua19:10 Tin, thumvawr vawi thumna chu Zebuluna thlahte chungan an chhungkaw zir zelin a tlu leh ta a: tin, an chanpual ramri chu Sarid thlengin a ni:" 
Joshua19:11 tin, an ramri chu thlang lampangah Marala thleng rakin a kal zel a, Debeseth an va thleng a: tin, Jokneam bula luite a va thleng a;" 
Joshua19:12 tin, Sarid atangin chhak lampang ni chhuahna lamah Kisloth-tabor ramri thlengin a kawi cho a; Deberath-ah a chhuak a, tin, Japhia-ah a chho leh a;" 
Joshua19:13 tin, chuta tang chuan chhak lampangah Gath-hepher leh Eth-kazin ah a kal zel a, Nea lam panin Romon-ah a chhuak a;" 
Joshua19:14 tin, ramric hu hmar lamah Hanathon-aha kual phei a: tin, a chhuahna chu Iphtah-el ruamah a ni;" 
Joshua19:15 tin, Katath te, Nahalal te, Simron te, Idala te, Bethlehem te; khawpui sawm leh pahnih a khawperte nen." 
Joshua19:16 Chung chu ani Zebulun thlahte an chhunkaw zir zela an chanpual a ruat chu; khawpuite leh a khawperte chu. 
Joshua19:17 Tin, thumvawr vawi lina chu Isakara chungah, Isakara thlahte chungah an chhungkaw zir zelin a tlu leh ta." 
Joshua19:18 Tin, an ramri chin chu Jezreel te, Kesuloth te, Sunem te;" 
Joshua19:19 Hapharaim te, Sion te, Anaharath te;" 
Joshua19:20 Rabith te, Kision te, Ebez te;" 
Joshua19:21 Remeth te, Enganim te, En-hada te, Beth-pazez te thlengin a ni;" 
Joshua19:22 tin, ramri chuan Tabor te, Sahazurma te, Beth-semes te a va thleng a; tichuan an ramri chhuahna chu Jordan-ah a ni: khawpi sawm leh paruk a khawperte nen." 
Joshua19:23 chung chu a ni Isakara thlahte hnem chhungkaw zir zela an chanpuala ruat chu; khawpute leh a khawperte chu. 
Joshua19:24 Tin, thumvawr vawi ngana chu Asera thlahte hnam chungah an chhungkaw zir zelin a tlu leh ta a." 
Joshua19:25 Tin, an ramri chin chu Helkath te, Hali te, Beten te, Aksaph te;" 
Joshua19:26 Alamemel te, Amad te, Misal te a ni; thlang lampangah Karmel leh Sihor-libnath a zuk thleng a;" 
Joshua19:27 tin, ni chhuahna lampangah Beth-dagon-ah a kual chho a, tin, Zebulun leh hmar lampangah Iphtah-el ruamah Bethemek leh Neiel a va thleng a; tin, vei lampangan Kabul te," 
Joshua19:28 Ebron te, Rehob te, Hamon te, Kana te, Zidon ropui thleng rakin a kal zel a;" 
Joshua19:29 tin, ramri chu Ramaah leh Tura khawpui kulh neiah a kual phei a: tin, ramri chu Hosa-ah a kual phei zel a; tichuan a chauhna chu Akzibram tuifinriatah a ni:" 
Joshua19:30 Uma te, Aphek te, Rehob te; khaw sawmhnih leh pahnih a khawperte nen." 
Joshua19:31 Chung chu a ni Asera thlahte hnam an chhungkaw zir zela an chanpual chu; chung khaw puite leh a khawperte chu. 
Joshua19:32 Tin, thumvawr vawi rukna chu Napthtalia thlahe chngah an chhungkaw zir zel bawkin Naphtalia thlahte chungah a tlu leh ta a." 
Joshua19:33 Tin, an ramri chin chu Heleph atang te, Zaananima sasua atang te, Adami-nekdeb leh Jabneel atang tea Lakum thleng a ni;" 
Joshua19:34 tin, ramri chu thlang lampangah Aznoth-tabor-ah a chhuk a; tin, chuta tangin Hukok-ah a kal a: tin, chhim lamah Zebulun a va thleng a, thlang lamah Aser a thleng a, tin, ni chhuahna lamah Judai rama Jordan a han thleng a." 
Joshua19:35 Tin, khawpui kulh neite chu Zidim te, Zer te, Hamath te, Rakath te, Kinereth te;" 
Joshua19:36 Adama te, Rama te, Hazor te;" 
Joshua19:37 Kedes te, Edrei te, En-hazor te;" 
Joshua19:38 Iron te, Migdal-el te, Horem te, Bethanath te, Beth-semes te a ni; khawpui sawm leh pakhua a khawperte nen." 
Joshua19:39 Chung chu a ni Naphtalia thlahte hnam an chhungkaw zir ang zela an chanpual chu, khawpuite leh a khawper te nen." 
Joshua19:40 Tin, thumvawr vawi sarihna chu Dana thlahte hnam chungah an chhungkaw zir zelin a tlu ta a." 
Joshua19:41 Tin, an chanpual ramri chu Zora te, Estaol e, Irseme te;" 
Joshua19:42 Saalabin te, Aijalon te, Ithla te," 
Joshua19:43 Elon te, Timna te, Ekron;" 
Joshua19:44 Elteke te, Gibethon te, Baalath te;" 
Joshua19:45 Jehud te, Bene-berak te, Goth-rimon te;" 
Joshua19:46 Me-jarkon te, Rakon, Jopa dep ramte nen a ni." 
Joshua19:47 Tin, Dana thlahte ramri chuan chung chu a va pel a ni: Dana thlahte chuan Lesem an han bei a, an la a, khandaihin an tiboral a, an nei ta a, chutah chuan an awm ta nghal a ni a, an pu Dana hming chawiin Lesem chu Dan an lo ti ta a ni." 
Joshua19:48 Chung chu ani Dana thlahte hnam an chhungkaw zir zela an chanpual chu: chung khawpuite leh a khawperte nen. 
Joshua19:49 Chutichuan an chanpual atana ramri siam ang zelin ram chu an lo sem zo ta a; tichuan Israela thlahten Nuna fapa Josua chu an zingah chanpual an siamsak ve a: 
Joshua19:50 LALPA thupek angin Ephraim tlang rama a khawpui dil Timnath-sera khua ngei chu an pe a: tin, khawpui chu a siam a, chutah chuan a awm ta a.Chungte chu a ni puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te leh Israela thlahte hnam chhungkaw puipaten Silo-a LALPA hmaah inbiakna puan in kawngkaa thumvawra an rochan atana an lo sem takte chu. Chutichuan ram then chu an zo ta a ni." 
Joshua19:51 Chungte chu a ni puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te leh Israela thlahte hnam chhungkaw puipaten Silo-a LALPA hmaah inbiakna puan in kawngkaa thumvawra an rochan atana an lo sem takte chu. Chutichuan ram then chu an zo ta a ni." 
Joshua20:1 Tin, LALPA'n Josua chu a bia a," 
Joshua20:2 Israela thlahte hnenah hian, 'Inhumhimna khuate siam rawh u khai, Mosia hmanga in hnena ka sawi tawh kha:" 
Joshua20:3 tupawh hre loa mi that palhtu chu, chutah chuan a tlan lut thei dawn nia: tichuan thisen phubalatu lakah chuan in tan inhumhimna a ni ang." 
Joshua20:4 Tin, chung khawpuite zinga a engah emaw chuan a tlan ang a, khawpui kulh kawngka luhnaah a va ding a, chu mi khaw upaho beng hriatah a chanchin chu a va thlen ang a: tin, anni chuan khaw chhungah an hnenah an hruai lut ang a, an zinga a chen ve theihna turin awmna tur chu an ruatsak ang." 
Joshua20:5 Tin, thisen phubalatuin a rawn um chuan, a thattu chu a kutah an lo pe tur a ni lo; a thenawm chu hre loin a that a ni a, tun hmain huatna a nei si lo a." 
Joshua20:6 Mipui hmaa rorelsak tura a din hma leh chung laia puithiam lala awma chu a thih hma loh chuan, chu mi khuaah chuan a awm reng tur a ni; tin, chu mi hunah chuan mi thattu chu a ma khaw chhung ngei, a tlan chhuahsan khua, ama in chhungah ngei chuan a lut leh tur ani,' tiin sawi ang che,"" tiin." 
Joshua20:7 Tichuan Naphtali tlang rama Galili-ah Kadesh khua te, Ephraim tlang rama Sekem khua te, Judai tlang rama Kiriath -arba khua (chu chu Hebron a ni)_ te chu an ruat ta a." 
Joshua20:8 Tin, chhak lamah Jordan ralah Jeriko-ah chuan Reuben hnam rama thlaler phai zawla Bezer khua te, Gad hnam rama Gilead ram Ramoth khua te, Manase hnam rama Basan rama Golan khuate an ruat a.Chung khuate chu a ni Israela thlahte zawng zawng leh an zinga hnam dang awmte tana ruat chu: tupawh mi that palhtu chu chutah chuan a tlan luh a, mipuite hmaa a din zet hma loh chuan thisen phubalatu kuta a thih lohna turin." 
Joshua20:9 Chung khuate chu a ni Israela thlahte zawng zawng leh an zinga hnam dang awmte tana ruat chu: tupawh mi that palhtu chu chutah chuan a tlan luh a, mipuite hmaa a din zet hma loh chuan thisen phubalatu kuta a thih lohna turin." 
Joshua21:1 Tichuan Levi chi chhungkaw puipate chu puithiam Eleazara hnenah leh Nuna fapa Josua hnenah leh Israela thlahte hnam chhungkaw puipate hnenah te chuan an va kal a; 
Joshua21:2 Kanaan rama Silo khuaah chuan,"" LALPA'n Mosia hmangin kan awmna tur khawpuite, kan ran tlatna tur a daivelte nen min pe turin thu a lo pe tawh a sin,"" tiin a an sawi a." 
Joshua21:3 Chutichuan Israela thlahte chuan LALPA thupek angin an chanpual ata chung khawpuite chu a daivelte nen Levi chite an pe a. 
Joshua21:4 Tin, thumvawr chu Kophath mite hnam chungah a tlu ta a: tichuan puithiam Arona thlah Levi chia mite chuan Juda hnam chanpuala mi te, simeon hnam chanpual mi te, Benjamin hnam chanpuala mi te khawpui sawm leh pathum thumvawrin an chang ve a ni." 
Joshua21:5 Tin, Kohatha thlah dangte chuan Ephraim hnam thlahte chanpuala mi te, Dan hnam chanpuala mi te, Manasea hnam zatvete chanpuala mi te, khawpui sawm thumvawrin an chang ve a ni." 
Joshua21:6 Tin, Gersona thlahte chuan Isakar hnam thlahte chanpuala mi te, Aser hnam chanpuala mi te, Naphtali hnam chanpuala mi te, basan rama Manasea hnam zatvete chanpuala mi te, khawpui sawm leh pathum thumvawrin an chang ve a." 
Joshua21:7 Meraria thlahte chuan an chhungkaw zir zelin Reuben hnam chanpuala mi te, Gad hnam chanpuala mi te, Zebulun hnam chanpuala mi te khawpui sawm leh pahnih an chang ve a." 
Joshua21:8 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan LALPA'n Mosia hmanga thu a pek ang khan Levi mite chu khawpuite leh a daivelte chu thumvawrin an pe a." 
Joshua21:9 Tin, Juda thlahte hnam chanpuala mi te, Simeona thlahte hnam chanpuala mite chu an pe a; he'ng khawpui a hming lamte hi:" 
Joshua21:10 chung chu Levi thlah, Kohat-ho hnam te, Arona thlahteho ta tur a ni: thumvawr chu an chungah a tlu hmasa ber reng a." 
Joshua21:11 Tin, Judai tlang rama Kiriath-arba khua chu a daivelte nen an pe a, chu Arba chu Anaka pa a ni a, (chu chu Hebron a ni)." 
Joshua21:12 Khawpui chhehvelte leh a khawperte erawh chu Jephunia fapa Kaleba chanpual atan an pe a. 
Joshua21:13 Tin, puithiam Arona thlahte chu Hebron, mi thattute inhumhimna khawpui chu a daivelte nen, Libna khua a daivelte nen;" 
Joshua21:14 Jatir khua a daivelte nen, Estemoa khua a daivelte nen;" 
Joshua21:15 Holon khua a daivelte nen, Debir khua a daivelte nen;" 
Joshua21:16 Ain khua a daivelte nen, Juta khua a daivelte nen; Beth-semes khua a daivelte nen, chung hnam hnihte chanpuala mi khawpui pakuate chu an pe a." 
Joshua21:17 Tin, Benjami hnam chanpuala mi chu Gibeon khua a daivelte nen, Geba khua a daivelte nen," 
Joshua21:18 Anathoth khua a daivelte nen, Almon khua a daivelte nen; khawpui pali an pe bawk a." 
Joshua21:19 Arona thlah, puithiamho khawpui zawng zawng chu khawpui sawm leh pathum a ni, a daivelte nen." 
Joshua21:20 Tin, Kohatha thlahte chhungkua, Levi-ho, Kohatha thlah dangte pawh chuan an chanpual khawpuite chu Ephraim hnam chanpuala mi a ni an neih ni." 
Joshua21:21 Tin, mi thattute inhumna khawpui Ephraim tlang rama Sekem chua daivelte nen, Gezer khua a daivelte nen," 
Joshua21:22 Kibzaim khua a daivelte nen, Beth-horon khua a daivelte nen;khawpui pali an pe a." 
Joshua21:23 Tin, Dan hnam chanpuala mi Elteke khua a daivelte nen, Gibethon khua a daivelte nen;" 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon khua a daivelte nen, Gath-rimon khua a daivelte nen, khawpui pali, Tin, Manase hnam zatvete chanpuala mi Taanak khua a daivelte nen; Gath-rimon khua a daivelte nen khawpui pahnih." 
Joshua21:25 Kohatha thlah dangte hnam khawpui zawng zawng chu khaw sawm a ni, a daivelte nen." 
Joshua21:26 Tin, Gersona thlahteho, Levi hnam te chu Manase hnam zatvete chanpuala mi, mi thattute inhumhimna khawpui, Basan rama Golan chu a daivelte nen; Be-estera khua daivelte nen; khawpui pahnih an pe a." 
Joshua21:27 Tin, Isakar hnam chanpuala mi Kision khua a daivelte nen, Daberath khua a daivelte nen;" 
Joshua21:28 Jarmuth khua a daivelte nen, En-ganim khua a daivelte nen; khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:29 Tin, Aser hnam chanpuala mi Misal khua a daivelte nen Abdon khua a daivelte nen;" 
Joshua21:30 Helkath khua a daivelte nen, Rehob khua a daivelte nen, khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:31 Tin, Naphtali hnam chanpuala mi, mi thattute inhumhimna khawpui, Ralili rama Kades chu a daivelte nen, Hamoth-dor khua a daivelte nen, khawpui pathum." 
Joshua21:32 Gerson-ho an chhukaw zir zela an chanpual khawpui zawng awng chu khawpui sawm leh pathum a ni, a daivelte nen." 
Joshua21:33 Tin, Meraria thlahteho chhungkua, Levi-ho dangte chu Zebulun hnam chanpuala mi Jorneam khua a daivelte nen, Karta khua a daivelte nen," 
Joshua21:34 Dimna khua a daivelte nen,Nahalal khua a daivelte nen, khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:35 Tin, Reuben hnam chanpuala mi Bezer khua a daivelte nen, Jahaz khua a daivelte nen," 
Joshua21:36 Kedemoth khua a daivelte nen, Mephaath khua a daivelte nen; khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:37 Tin, Gad hnam chanpuala mi, mi thattute inhumhimna khawpui, Gilead rama Ramoth a daivelte nen, Mahanaim khua a daivelte nen;" 
Joshua21:38 Hesbon khua a daivelte nen,Jazer khua a daivelte nen; a vaiin khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:39 Chung zawng zawng chu Levi ho chhungkaw dangte Meraria thlahteho an chhungkaw zir zela a ni khawpuite chu a ni; tichuan an chanpual chu khawpui sawm leh pahnih a ni. 
Joshua21:40 Israela thlahteho chanpuala mi Levi-ho khawpui zawng zawng chu khawpui sawmli leh pariat a ni, a daivelte nen." 
Joshua21:41 Chung khawpuite chuan daivel a nei theuh a ni: chung khawpui zawng zawng chu chuatiang vek a ni. 
Joshua21:42 Chutichuan LALPA'n an thlahtute chhechhama pek a lo tiam tak ram zawng zawng chu Israelte chu a pe a; tichuan ram chu an luah a, awmhmun an khuar ta a." 
Joshua21:43 Tin, LALPA'n an thlahtute hnena chhechhama a lo tiam tawh ang ngei khan hmun tinah muanna a pe a: an hmelma zawng zawngte chu tumah an hmaa tang thei reng reng an awm lo; LALPA'n an hmelma zawng zawngte chu an kutah a pe vek a.LALPA'n Israela chhungte hnena a tha lam thu a lo sawi zawng zawng kha thlawn reng reng a awm lo a, a lo thleng vek a ni." 
Joshua21:44 LALPA'n Israela chhungte hnena a tha lam thu a lo sawi zawng zawng kha thlawn reng reng a awm lo a, a lo thleng vek a ni." 
Joshua22:1 Chutichuan Josua'n Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Manase hnam zatvete chu a ko ve," 
Joshua22:2 an hnenah, ""LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia'n thu a pek apiang che u pawh in pawm zel a:" 
Joshua22:3 hei lehchen hi vawiin thlengin in unauteho chu in thlahthlam lo a, LALPA in Pathianin tih tura thu apek che u in zawm thin a." 
Joshua22:4 Tichuan LALPA in Pathianin an hnena a lo sawi tawh ang khan in unaute hi muanna a lo pek tak hi: chuvangin LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia'n Jordan rala in chanpual atana ram a lo pek tak che uah khan, in puan in lamahte chuan haw leh tawh u." 
Joshua22:5 LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia'n LALPA'n in Pathian chu hmangaih a, a kawng zawng zawng chu zawh a, a thupekte chu pawm a, amah chu vuan tlat a, in thinlung zawng zawng leh in thlarau zawng zawnga a rawng bawl tlat tura thu a lo pek che u kha, chu thupek leh dante chu fimkhur takin vawn that tum phawt mai ang che u,m"" a ti a." 
Joshua22:6 Chutichuan Josua'n anmahni chu mal a sawm a, a kaltir ta a: tichuan an puan in lamahte an haw ta a." 
Joshua22:7 Tin, manase hnam zatvete kha Mosia'n Basan ramah chanpual a pe a: a zatve dangte kha erawh chu Josua'n thlang lampang Jordan ralah an unaute zingan chanpual a pe awk a. Tin, Josua'n an in lama a hawntir dawn lai khan mal a asawm a," 
Joshua22:8 an hnenah, ""In puan in lamah te chuan hausa takin haw ta u la, ran tam tak nen, tangka te nen, rangkachak te nen, dar te nen, thirte nen, silhfen tam takte nen: in hmelmate laka in rallakte kha in unaute nen insem tlang rawh u,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua22:9 Tin, Reuben thlahte leh Gada thlahte leh manase hnam zatvete chu an kir leh a, Kanaan ram Silo khua ata chu Israela thlahte hnen atang chuan Gilead ram, LALPA'n Mosia hmanga thu a lo pek tak ang khan an chanpual renga a lo ruat tawh rama kal turin an chhuak ta a." 
Joshua22:10 Tin, Kanaan rama Jordan bial an va thlen chuan Reubena thlahte leh, Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zatvete chuan Jordan lui kamah chuan maicham lianpui langsar tak an siam ta a." 
Joshua22:11 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan, ""Ngai teh u, Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zatvete khan Kanaan ram bul tak, Jordan bial, Israela thlahte ram lampangah maicham an siam e,"" tia mi sawi an hria a." 
Joshua22:12 Tin, chu chu Israela thlahteho chuan an lo hriatin, Israela thalhate mipuiho zawng zawng chu anmahni han do tumin Silo khuaah an inkhawm ta chiam a." 
Joshua22:13 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Gilead rama Reubena thlahte leh, Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zatvete hnenah chuan puithiam Eleazara fapa Phinehasa an tir a;" 
Joshua22:14 a hnenah mi lian sawm, Israel-ho hnam zinga chhungkaw puipa ber pakhat zel nen; chungte chu Israel-ho hnam zinga an chhungkaw puipa ber zelte an ni." 
Joshua22:15 Tin, Reubena thlahte leh, Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zatvete hnenah Gilead ramah chuan an kal ta a, an hnenah," 
Joshua22:16 LALPA mipuiho zawng zawngin, 'Israelte Pathian chungah eng nge maw in tihsual le, LALPA chungah vawiinah hian hel tuma maiham siamin vawiinah hian LALPA chu in hawisan le?" 
Joshua22:17 Peor hmuna bawhchhiatna te kha kan tan te luaah ngaih theih em ni? Tun thleng pawh hian khang kan sualte kha kan la intleng fai zo lo a ni a, LALPA mipuiho zingah kahn hri kha a leng na chungin," 
Joshua22:18 vawiinah hian LALPA chu hawisan in tum chu le? Tichuan vawiina LALPA chunga in lo hel ta mai hi naktukah zawng Israel mipuiho zawng zawng chungah a thinrim ngei dawn mai. 
Joshua22:19 Amaherawhchu in ram luah hi a bawlhhlawh chuan, LALPA ram chhung, LALPA biak buk awmna hmunah lo kal ve mai u la, kan zingah cheng ve ta mai che u; amaherawhchu LALPA kan Pathian maicham tih loh maicham dang siam zawngin LALPA chungah hel suh u la, kan chungah pawh hian hel ma ta che u." 
Joshua22:20 Zera fapa Akana khan hluihlawn thil-ah khan thil a tisual a, Israel mipuiho zawng zawng chungah khan thinurna a tla a ni lawm ni kha? Kha mi kha ama bawhchhiatnaah amah ngawtin a boral bik loh kha,' an ti a sin,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua22:21 Chutichuan Reubena thlahte leh, Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zatvete chuan Israel- ho hnam puipate chu an chhang a, an hnenah," 
Joshua22:22 LALPA pathiante Pathian, LALPA, pathiante Pathian chuan a hria a: Israel-ho pawhin an hria ang; kan maicham siam hi LALPA hawisan tum a, hel tumna emaw, thilsual tumna emawa siam kan nih chuan (vawiinah pawh hian min zuah lo mai rawh)." 
Joshua22:23 Halral thilhlanna'n emaw, ei tur thilhlanna'n emaw, remna thilhlanna'n emaw a nih chuan, amah lalpa ngeiin rawn ngaihtuah ang hmiang." 
Joshua22:24 Nakin hnuah hian in thlahten kan thlahte hnenah hian, 'Nangnin LALPA, Israelte Pathian hi enga in hman phak vena nge maw awm ni?" 
Joshua22:25 nangni Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte u, LALPA'n keini leh nangni tan Jordan hi ramri china a siam a sin ni: LALPAAH hian chanpual in nei ve hlei nem,' an la rawn ti hlauh dah ang e tia a, fimkhur avanga tih chhan nei taka ti kan ni a sin: in thlahtehoin kan thlahte chu lalpa tih nachang hre loin an la siam maithei a sin: in thlahtehoin kan thlahte chu lalpa tih nachang hre loin an la siam maithei a sin." 
Joshua22:26 keini leh, nangni leh, kan hnua kan thlahteho karah hriatna a ni ang, tichuan kan halral thilhlante leh kan inthawina te leh, kan remna thilhlante hian LALPA rawng kan bawl theihna'n leh, an thlahte pawhin nakinah kan thlahte hnenah chuan, LALPAAH chanpual in nei ve lo e, an la tih lohna'n,' kan ti a ni." 
Joshua22:27 Chuvangin, 'Heti hi a ni ang a, nakin hnuahte kan hnenah emaw, kan thlahte hnenah emaw chutianga an la rawn tih huna keinin, En ta che u, kan thlahtuten LALPA maicham awm dan an siam hi, halral thilhlanna tur leh inthawina tur ani lo ve; keini leh nangni karah hriatna a ni zawk e, kan la tih atan,' kan ti a sin." 
Joshua22:28 LALPA chungah chuan helin vawiinah hian LALPA hawisan a, LALPA kan Pathian maicham, a biak buk bula maicham ngawt lo hi halral thilhlanna'n emaw, ei tur thilhlanna'n emaw, inthawina'n emaw maicham siam kan nih lohzia mai chu,"" an ti a." 
Joshua22:29 Tin, puithiam Phinehasa leh a hnena awm mipuiho mi lian, Israel-ho hnam puipate chuan Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte leh Manasea thlahte thusawi an hriat chuan a tilawm ta hle a." 
Joshua22:30 Tin, puithiam Eleazara fapa Phinehasa chuan Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte leh Manasea thlahte hnenah chuan, ""LALPA chungah thil in tihsual loh avangin, tunah zawng LALPA chu kan zingah a awm ngei ani tih kan hre ta alawm: tichuan Israela thlahte hi lalpa kut ata in chhan chhuak ta anih hi,"" a ti a." 
Joshua22:31 Chutichuan puithiam Elazara fapa Phinehasa leh mi lianho chu Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte hnen atang chua Gilead ram ata chu Kanaan ram lamah Israela thlahte hnen lamah chuan an haw leh ta a, thu chu an va thlen leh a." 
Joshua22:32 Tin, chung thu chuan Israela thlahte chu a tilawm hle a; tin, Israela thlahte chuan Pathian chu an fak ta a; tichuan Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte chu an han do a, an awmna ram han tihchhiatsak thute chu an sawi leh ta lo a.Tin, Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte chuan chu maicham chu Ed an ti a: ""LALPA chu Pathian a lo ni ngei mai tih kan karah hian hriattir anih hi,"" an ti a ni." 
Joshua22:33 Tin, Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte chuan chu maicham chu Ed an ti a: ""LALPA chu Pathian a lo ni ngei mai tih kan karah hian hriattir anih hi,"" an ti a ni." 
Joshua23:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum eng emaw zat lai a lo vei hnu a, LALPA'n Israel-hote chu an kiang vela hmelma zawng zawngte laka muanna a pek hnu chuan Josua pawh chu a lo upain, a lo tar ta hle a:" 
Joshua23:2 tichuan Josua'n Israel-ho zawng awngte, an upate leh an puipa te, an roreltute leh an hotute chu a kohtir a, an hnenah, ""Kei zawng ka lo upain, ka lo tar ta:" 
Joshua23:3 LALPA in Pathianin nangmahni avanga he'ng hnam zawng zawngte chunga a tih dan hi in hmu a; LALPA in Pathianin, amah ngeiin a ni, dosak che u ni." 
Joshua23:4 Ngai teh u, he'ng hnam a la awmate hi he'ng hnam ka tihbo takho zawng zawng ramte nen hian, Jordan atanga ni tlakna lam tuifinriat zauna tleng rakin in chite rochanah ka ruatsak a che u." 
Joshua23:5 Tin, LALPA in Pathianin inhmaah hian a hnawtchuak ang a, in hmuh phak lohvah a hnawt bo vek ang a; tichuan LALPA in Pathianin in hnena a sawi tawh ang khan a ram chu in nei dawn nia." 
Joshua23:6 chuvangin Mosia dan lehkhabua ziak zawng zawngte hi ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw in pensan hauh lohna'n huai takin pawm u la, ti rawh u;" 
Joshua23:7 he'ng hnam in zinga la awmate nen hian inchiahpiah loa an pathiante hming pawh lam lo a, an hming chhala chhia chham lo a, an rawng pawh bawl lo a, kuna chibai in buk hek lohna'n vawiin thlenga in la tih cheu thin ang hian," 
Joshua23:8 LALPA in Pathian chu vuan tlat zawk thin ang che u. 
Joshua23:9 LALPA'n in hmaah chi ropui tak leh chak takte chu a hnawhchhuah tak vek hi: nangni hmaah zawng vawiin thlengin tumah tang thei reng reng an awm loh hi. 
Joshua23:10 In zinga mi pakhatin mi sangkhat a um ang: in hnena a lo sawi tawh angin, LALPA in Pathian hian a ni, dosak thin che u ni." 
Joshua23:11 Chutichuan LALPA in Pathian chu hmangaih turin fimkhur tha hle rawh u. 
Joshua23:12 chutilochuan in hawisan hlauh a, he'ng hnam, la awmho in zinga la cheng rengte hi in kungkaih a, anmahni nena nupui pasala in inneih a, anmahni chu in pawl a, anni pawhin an pawl vaih che u zawngin," 
Joshua23:13 LALPA in Pathianin he'ng hnamte hi in mithmuhah chuan a hnawhchhuahsak dawn tawh tawp lo che u a, LALPA in Pathian ram tha tak a pek che u ata hi in boral vek hma loh chuan anmahni chu in tan thang leh fal leh, in nak atana vuakna tiang leh, in mit atana hling an lo ni zawk ang tih chiang takin hre rawh u." 
Joshua23:14 Tin, ngai teh u, tunah hian leilung zawng zawng dan angin ka kal ve dawn ta a ni: LALPA in Pathianin in chungchang a tha lam a lo sawi tawh zawng zawngte kha thlawn pakhat mah a awm lo tih chu in thinlung zawng zawng leh in rilru zawng zawngin in hria e; in chungah a lo thleng ta vek a, pakhat mahk thlawh a awm lo ve." 
Joshua23:15 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA in Pathianin thil tha in hnena a sawi zawng zawngte kha in chunga a lo thleng ta vek ang bawk hian, LALPA in Pathianin he ram tha tak a pek che u ata hi a tihboral vek hma loh che u chuan LALPA'n thil tha lote chungah a la rawn thlentir ve ang.LALPA in Pathian thuthlung, pawm tura a pek che u hi in bawhchhiat a, pathian dangte rawng in bawl a, kuna chibai in buk chuan, LALPA thinurna chu in chungah a ling ang a, ram tha tak a pek che u ata hi in boral thuai mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Joshua23:16 LALPA in Pathian thuthlung, pawm tura a pek che u hi in bawhchhiat a, pathian dangte rawng in bawl a, kuna chibai in buk chuan, LALPA thinurna chu in chungah a ling ang a, ram tha tak a pek che u ata hi in boral thuai mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Joshua24:1 Tin, Josua'n Israel hnam zawng zawngte chu Sekem-ah a ko khawm a, Israel-ho upa te, an puipa te, an roreltu te, an hotute a kohtir a; tin, Pathian hmaah an rawn inlan hlawm a." 
Joshua24:2 Tin, Josua'n mi zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""LALPA, Israelte Pathianin heti hian a ti a ni: 'In thlahtute kha hman laiin Lui piah lamah khan a awm thin a, Abrahama pa leh Nahora pa Tera meuh pawh kha: anni chuan pathian dangte rawng an bawl thin a." 
Joshua24:3 Tin, in thlahtu Abrahama kha Lui ral ata ka hruai chhuak a, Kanaan ram chhung zawng zawngah khan ka hruai a, a thlahte chu ka tipung a, Isaaka kha ka pe a." 
Joshua24:4 Tin, Isaaka chu Jakoba leh Esauva ka pe a: tin, Esauva chu a chanpual atan Seir tlang ka pe a; tin, Jakoba leh a fate kha Aigupta-ah an zuk chhuk a." 
Joshua24:5 Tin, Mosia lehArona ka tir a, Aigupta ram chu an zingah thilmak tiin ka hrem a; tin, chu mi zawhah chuan ka hruai chhuak che u a." 
Joshua24:6 Tin, inthlahtute chu Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuak a: tin, tuipui in va thleng a; tichuan Aigupta mite chuan in thlahtute chu tawlailirte leh sakawr chung chuang mite nen Tuifinriat Sen thlengin an um a." 
Joshua24:7 Tin, anni chuan LALPA an han au a, Aigupta mite nena an inkar chu a rawn tithim ta muip a, tin, tuipui a rawn tuamtir a, a chimpil ta a; tichuan Aigupta rama ka thiltih kha in mit ngeiin a hmu a; tin, thlalerah khan rei tak in awm a." 
Joshua24:8 Tin, Jordan lui rala awm Amor ho ramah chuan ka hruai che u a; tin, an lo do che u a: tichuan in kutah ka pe a, an ram chu in luah ta a; tin, anni chu ka tihboralsak ta che u a." 
Joshua24:9 Tin, Moab leh Zipora fapa Balaka kha a lo thawk a, Israel-hote a lo do a; tin, Beora fapa Balaama kha an chhiahhlawh tur che uin a kohtir a:" 
Joshua24:10 a sawm ta zawk che u a: chutichuan a kut ata chu ka chhanchhuak ta che u a ni. 
Joshua24:11 Tin, Jordan lui in kai a, Jeriko khua in han thleng a; tin, Jeriko khua amiten an lo do che u a, Amor-ho te, Periz ho te, Kanaan ho te, Hit ho te, Girgas-ho te, Hiv ho te, Jebus-ho te nen kha; tichuan anni chu in kutah ka pe ta a." 
Joshua24:12 Tin, in hmaah khawinghla ka tir a, chu chuan in hmaah anmahni chu a um a, Amor-ho lalte pahni ngei kha; in khandaihin emaw, in thalngulin emaw ani hek lo." 
Joshua24:13 Tin, in thawhchhuah hauh loh ram leh nangmahni siam hauh loh khawpuite ka pe che u a, chungah chuan in awm a; in phun loh grep huan leh oliv huana mite chu in ei a,' tiin." 
Joshua24:14 Chuvangin LALPA chu tih u la, tih takzet leh dik takin a rawng chu bawl u la: inthlahtuten Lui ral leh Aigupta rama a rawng an bawl thin pathiante kha paih vek u la; LALPA rawng bawl ang che u." 
Joshua24:15 Tin, LALPA rawngbawl hi a tha lo awm anga in hriat chuan vawiinah hian tu rawng nge in bawl dawn thlang mai rawh u; in thlahtuten Lui rala a rawng an bawl thin pathiante kha nge, in luah ram Amor-hote pathiante kha? Kei leh ka chhungte erawh hi zawngin LALPA rawng ania kan bawl dawn ni,"" a ti a." 
Joshua24:16 Tin, mipuite chuan, ""LALPA Pathian chu kalsanin pathian dangte rawng chu kan bawl loh turzia mai chu;" 
Joshua24:17 amah LALPA kan Pathian ngeiin alawm kan thlahtute nen Aigupta ram bawih ata min hruai chhuak a, kan mithmuha chhinchhiahna ropui tak takte ti a, kan kalna apiang leh, mipui zawng zawng kan tawn tlangna pawha min veng him zeltu chu." 
Joshua24:18 tichuan LALPA'n kan hma ngeiah hnam tin, chung rama awm Amor-hote ngei chu a hnawt chhuak vek a: chuvangin keini pawhin LALPA rawng a ni kan bawl dawn ni: amah chu kan Pathian a ni si a,"" an ti a, an chhang a." 
Joshua24:19 Tin, Josua'n mipuite hnenah chuan, ""LALPA rawng chu in bawl thei lo ang; ani zawng Pathian thianghlim ani si a; Pathian thikthuchhia a ni a; in bawhchhiatnate leh in sualnate chu a ngaidam lo ang." 
Joshua24:20 LALPA chu in kalsan a, hnam dang pathiante rawng in bawl zawngin, in chunga a tha chung hian in chungah thil tha loin a tuan ve ang a, a tiboral mai tur che u a nia,"" a ti a." 
Joshua24:21 Tin, mipuite chuan Josua'n hnenah, ""Ni lo e, LALPA rawng kan bawl tlat zawk dawn a ni,"" an ti a." 
Joshua24:22 Tin, Josua'n mipuite hnenah,""A rawngbawl tumin LALPA chu in thlang ta ngei mai tih thu hretute chu nangmahni ngei hi in ni ta e,"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""thu hretute chu kan ni ta alawm."" an ti a." 
Joshua24:23 Tin, amah vek chuan, ""Chuti anih chuan in zinga hnam dang pathian awmte chu dah bo daih u la, in thinlunge chu LALPA, Israelte Pathian lamah chuan thlektir rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Joshua24:24 Tin, mipuite chuan Josua hnenah,"" LALPA kan Pathian rawng chu kan bawl ang a, a thu kan zawm zel ang,"" an ti a." 
Joshua24:25 Chutichuan Josua'n chu mi ni chuan mipuite hnenah thu a thlung a, Sekem khuaah chuan dan leh rorelna a ruatsak a." 
Joshua24:26 Tichuan hosuan chung thu chu Pathian dan buah a ziak a; tin, lung lianpui a la a, LALPA hmun thianghlim bula sasaw hnuaiah a phun a." 
Joshua24:27 Tin, Josua'n mipuiho zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh u, he lung hi kan thu hretu ni rawh se,"" LALPA'n kan hnena thu a sawi zawng zawng chu a hriat tak vek hi, chuvangin in thu hretu ani dawn a ni, chutilozawng in Pathian hi in phatsan mai dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
Joshua24:28 chutichuan Josua'n mipuite chu anmahni chanpual ram theuhvah a hawntir ta a. 
Joshua24:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung thil hnuah chuan Nuna fapa Josua LALPA chhiahhlawh chu kum za leh kum sawm miin a thi a." 
Joshua24:30 Tin, Gas tlang hmar lampang, Ephraim tlang rama ama chanpual ramri chhung Timnath-sera-ah chuan an phum ta a." 
Joshua24:31 Tin, Josua dam chhung leh, upaho Josua khuma dam te, LALPA'n Israel-hote tana thil a tih zawng zawng hretute dam chhung hchuan Israel-hoten LALPA rawng an bawl thin a." 
Joshua24:32 Tin, Israela thlahten Aigupta ram ata Josefa ruh an chhawm chhoh kha Sekem khuaa hmun, Sekema pa Hamora fate laka Jakoba'n tangkaa zaa a leiah khan an phum a: tichuan chung chu Josefa thlahte pualah a lo awm ta a.Tin, Arona fapa Eleazara chu a thi a; tin, Ephraim tlang rama a puala an pek, a fapa Phinehasa tlangah chuan an phum ta a." 
Joshua24:33 Tin, Arona fapa Eleazara chu a thi a; tin, Ephraim tlang rama a puala an pek, a fapa Phinehasa tlangah chuan an phum ta a." 
Judges1:1 Tin, Josua thih hnu chuan heti hi a ni a, Israela thlahte chuan, ""Kanaan hote chu dova kan tana bei turin tu nge han kal hmasa phawt ang le?"" tiin LALPA chu an rawn a." 
Judges1:2 Tin, LALPA chuan, ""Juda han kal rawh se: ngai teh u, a kutah ram chu ka pe tawh e,"" a ti a." 
Judges1:3 Tin, Judan a unau Simeona hnenah,""Kanaan-hote bei turin ka ram chanpualah hian l o chho ve rawh; kei pawh i ram chanpualah ka lo kal ve dawn nia,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Simeona chu a hnenah a kal ve ta a." 
Judges1:4 Tin, Juda chu a han kal a; tichuan Kanaan-hote leh Periz-hote chu LALPA'n an kutah a pe ta a: tin, Bezek khuaah mi singkhat an that a." 
Judges1:5 Tin, Bezek khuaah chuan Adoni-zedeka-bezeka an han hmu a: tin, an bei a, Kanaan- hote leh Periz-hote chu an that chiam a." 
Judges1:6 Adoni-zedeka-bezeka erawh chu a tlan a; tichuan an um a, an man a, a kutzungpuite leh a kezungpuite an tansak a." 
Judges1:7 Tin, Adoni-zedeka-bezeka chuan, ""Lal sawmsarih kutzungpui leh kezungpui tan chhumte chuan ka dawhkan hnuaia buh mal an chhar thin a: ka tih ang chiahin Pathianin mi thungrul ve ta a nih hi le,"" a ti a. Tin, Jerusalem khuaah an hruai a, chutah chuan a thi ta a." 
Judges1:8 Tin, Juda thlahte chuan Jerusalem an han do a, an la a, khandaihin an bei a, khawpui chu an hal a." 
Judges1:9 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan Juda thlahte chu Kanaan-ho tlang rama awm te, Chhim lama awm te, phaia awm te chu do turin an zuk kal a." 
Judges1:10 Tin, Juda chuan, Kanaan-ho Bebron khuaa awmte chu a va bei a: (a hma chuan Hebron khaw hming chu Kiriath-arba a ni.) tichuan Sesaia te, Ahimana te, Talmaia te an that a." 
Judges1:11 Tin, chuta tangin Debir khuaa awmte chu a bei a. (A hma chuan Debir khaw hming chu Kiriath-sepher a ni.)" 
Judges1:12 Tin, Kaleban, ""Tupawh Kiriath-sepher khua chu bei a, la apiang chu ka fanu Aksai nupuiah ka neihtir ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges1:13 Tin, Kaleba nau Kenaza fapa Othnielan a la a: tichuan a fanu Aksai chu nupuiah a neihtir ta a." 
Judges1:14 Tin, a pasal hnen a va thlen chuan a pa ram dil turin a lo fuih a, tin, sabengtung ata a chhuk a; Kaleba chuan a hnenah, ""Enge i duh le?"" a lo ti a." 
Judges1:15 Ani chuan, ""Eng emaw dil che ka duh a ni, chhim lam ram ro takah mi lo awmtir ta si a, tuikhur mi pe tel bawk turin ka ngen a che,"" a ti a. Tichuan tuikhur chhakta leh thlangta chu a pe ta a."
