Judges1:16 Tin, Mosia puzawn Ken-ho thlahte chu Arad chhim lama Judai thlalerah chuan Juda thlahte nen tum khawpui ata chu an han chho a; an zingah chuan an han cheng ve a a." 
Judges1:17 Tin, Juda chu a unau Simeona nen an thawk a, Zephath kihuaa awm Kanaan-ho chu an that a, an tichimit vek a. Chu khawpui hming chu Horma an ti." 
Judges1:18 Tin, Juda chuan Gaza khua a ram chin nen, Askelon khua a ram chin nen, Ekron khua a ram chin nen a la bawk a." 
Judges1:19 Tin, LALPA chu Juda hnenah a awm a; tichuan tlang rama chengte ch a hnawt bo vek a; ruama chenghote erawh chu thir tawlailirte an neih avangin an hnawtchhuak thei lo a ni." 
Judges1:20 Tin, Mosia'n a lo sawi tawh angin Hebron khua chu Kaleba an pe a: chuta mi Anaka fapa te pathum chu a hnawt chhuak a." 
Judges1:21 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan Jebus-ho Jerusalem khuaa awmte chu an hnawt chhuak lo: Jebus-hote chu Benjamina thlahte nen tun thleng hian Jerusalem-ah an la cheng za ta reng a ni." 
Judges1:22 Tin, Josefa chhunget pawh chu Bethel khaw bei turin an thawk ve bawk a: tin, an hnenah LALPA a awm a." 
Judges1:23 Tin, Josefa chhungte chuan Bethel khuaah chuan enthlatute an tir a. (A hma chuan chu khaw hming chu Luz a ni.)" 
Judges1:24 Tin, enthlatute chuan mi pakhat khaw chhung ata lo chhuak hi an han hmu a, a hnenah, ""Khawngaih takin khawpui chhung luhna min entir teh khai, tichuan tha takn kan ti dawn che nia,"" an ti a." 
Judges1:25 Tin, khawpui chhung luhna hchu a entir a, tichuan khandaihin chu khua chu an bei a; chu mi leh a chhungte zawng zawng erawh chu an zuah a." 
Judges1:26 Tin, chu mi chu Hit-ho ramah a lut a, khua a siam a, chu mi khaw hmingah chuan Luz a vuah a: tun tlengin chu mi hming chu a la pu a a ni." 
Judges1:27 Tin, Manasea chuan Beth-sean khua leh a khawpera awm te, Tanaak khua leh a khawpera awm te, Dor khua leh a khawpera awm te, Ibleam khua leh a khawpera awm te, Megido leh a khawpera awmte chu a hnawt chhuak lo: chu ramah chuan Kanaan-hote erawh chu an awm ta reng a." 
Judges1:28 Tin, heti hi ani a, Israela thlahte chuu an lo chai tak tial tial chinah chuan Kanaan- hote chu hnathawka rawih atan an awmtir a, an hnawtchhuak fai vek ta lo." 
Judges1:29 Tin, Ephraima chuan Gezer khua Kanaan-ho awmte chu a hnawtchhuak lo; Kanaan- ho chu Gezer khuaah chuan an zingah an cheng ve ta zawk a ni." 
Judges1:30 Zebuluna chuan Kitron khuaa awmte leh Nahalal khuaa awmte chu a hnawt chhuak lo.Kanaan-ho chu an zingah an cheng ve a, hnathawka rawih atan an awm ta zawk a ni." 
Judges1:31 Asera chuan Ako khuaa awm te, Zidon khuaa awm te, Ahlab khuaa awm te, Akzib khuaa awm te, Helba khuaa awm te, Aphik khuaa awm te, Rehob khuaa awmte chu an hnawt chhuak lo:" 
Judges1:32 Asera thlahte chu chu mi rama awm Kanaan-hote zingah chuan an cheng ve ta zawk a ni: anni chuan an hnawt chhuak lo a ni. 
Judges1:33 Naphtalia chuan Beth-semes khuaa awm te, Beth-anath khuaa awmte chu a hnawt chhuak lo; chu mi rama awm Kanaan-hote zingah chuan a cheng ve ta zawk a ni: amaherawhchu Beth-semes khua aawmte leh Beth-anath khuaa awmte chu a hnathawka rawih atan an awm ta a ni." 
Judges1:34 Tin, Amor-ho chuan Dana thlahte chu tlang ramah an hnawt chho a, ruama an chhuk an phal si lo a," 
Judges1:35 Amor-ho erawh chu Heres tlangah te, Aijalon khuaah te, Saalbim khuaah te an awm ta reng a: nimahsela Josefa chhungte kut chu a chak a, an hnathawka rawih atan an lo awm ta a ni.Tin, Amor-ho ram chin chu Akrabim chhoihna leh Sel atangin a chho ta zel a ni." 
Judges1:36 Tin, Amor-ho ram chin chu Akrabim chhoihna leh Sel atangin a chho ta zel a ni." 
Judges2:1 Tin, LALPA vanrirhkoh Gilgal khua atangin Bokim khuaah a han chho a, tin, ani chuan, ""Aigupta ram ata kha ka chhuahtir che u a, in thlahtute hnena chhehchhama ka lo tiam tak ramah khan ka hruai lut che u a, 'In hnena thu ka thlun kha ka bawhchhe tawp lo ang." 
Judges2:2 tichuan he'ng rama awmhote nen hian thu thlung suh u la;an maichamte tihchimsak ang che u,' ka ti a: nimahsela ka thupek in pawm lo va: eng vangin nge hetianga in tih?" 
Judges2:3 Chuvangin, ""Anni chu ka hnawhchhuahsak tawh lo ang che u, in nakahte hling ang an ni sawk ang a, tin, an pathiante chu in tan thang an ni ang,' ka ti bawk a nih kha,"" a ti a." 
Judges2:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, LALPA vantirhkohin Israela thlahte zawng zawng hnenah chung thu chu a han sawi chuan, mipuiho chu rawl chhuah meuhin an tap ta hlawm a." 
Judges2:5 Tin, chu mi hmun hmingah chuan Bokim an vuah a: tin, chutah chuan LALPA hnenah an inthawi ta a." 
Judges2:6 Josua'n mipuite a tindarhtir hnu chuan Israela thlahte chu mi tin, mahni chanpual theuh ram chu luah turin an kal ta a." 
Judges2:7 Josua dam chhung leh upaho Josua khuma dam te, LALPA'n Israelte tana thil ropui tak a tih zawng zawng hmu thintute dam chhung chuan mipuiten LALPA rawng an bawl thin a." 
Judges2:8 Tichuan Nuna fapa Josua, LALPA chhiahhlawh chu kum za leh kum sawm miin a hi a." 
Judges2:9 Tin, Gas tlang hmar lampang Ephraim tlang rama ama chanpual ramri chhung Timnath-heres khuaah chuan an phum ta a." 
Judges2:10 Tin, chung chhuan zawng zawngte pawh chu an thlahtute hnen lamah an kal khawm zo ta a: tin, chu mite hnuah chuan LALPA leh Israelte tana a thiltihte pawh hre lo chhuan dang an la awm ta a." 
Judges2:11 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan LALPA mithmuhin thil sual an lo ti a, Baal-hote rawng an bawl ta a." 
Judges2:12 LALPA an thlahtute Pathian, Aigupta ram ata hruaichhuaktu kha an hawisan a, pathian dang, an kiang vela awmho pathiante zinga mi chu an zui a, chibai an buk ta a: tichuan LALPA chu a thinur ta a." 
Judges2:13 Tin, LALPA chu an hawisan a, Baala leh Astarothi rawng an bawl ta a." 
Judges2:14 Chutichuan LALPA thin chu Israelte chungah chuan a ur ta a, anmahni rawk thintute kutah chuan a pe ta hlawm a, an hmelma, an kiang vela awmte hnenah chuan a hrlah a, tichuan an hmelmate chu an lo chelh ta lo a." 
Judges2:15 Khawiah pawh kal se la, LALPA kut chu an chungah a chhe lamin a tla zel a, LALPA'n a lo sawi tawh ang leh, LALPA'n an hnena chhechhama a lo sawi tawh ang khan: tichuan mangan namenin an mangang ta lo a." 
Judges2:16 Tin, LALPA'n roreltute a siamsak a, chungte chuan anamhni rawktute kut ata chu an rawn chhan chhuak ta a." 
Judges2:17 Chuti chung pawhin an roreltute thu chu an pawm lo a, pathian dangte lakah chuan an uire a, chibai an lo buk ta zawk a: an thlahtuten LALPA thupekte pawma an zawh thin kawng chu an pensan ta thuai mai a." 
Judges2:18 Tin, LALPA'n roreltute a rawn siamsak chuan, LALPA chu roreltu hnenah chuan a awm a, roreltu dam chhung chuan an hmelmate kut ata chu a chhanchhuak zel a: anmahni hnehchiah leh timangangtute avangin an rum a, chuvangin LALPA chu a inchhir ta a." 
Judges2:19 Nimahsela heti hi a ni a, roreltu chu a thih veleh, an hnungtawlh leh ta a, pathian dangte rawng an bawl a, chibai buk thuah an thlahtute ai mahin an lo che chhe lehzual ta a; an thiltih thinte leh an luhlulte pawh a bang hek lo." 
Judges2:20 Tin, LALPA thin chu Israelte chungah chuan a ur ta a; tichuan, ""He hnamte hian an thlahtute thu ka pek, ka thuthlun chu an bawhchhia a, ka thu an pawm ta si lo a;" 
Judges2:21 chuvangin kei pawhin tun achinah zawng Josua thih hmaa hnawhchhuah bak hnamte hi ka hnawh chhuahsak tawh lo ang," 
Judges2:22 an thlahtute zawh ang khan LALPA dan an zawh dawn nge dawn lo tih Israel-hote fiahna'n anmahni chu ka hmang ang,"" a ti a.Chutichuan LALPA'n chung hnamte chu hnawt chhuak nghal ta loin a awmtir ta a; Josua kutah pawh a pe ta hek lo." 
Judges2:23 Chutichuan LALPA'n chung hnamte chu hnawt chhuak nghal ta loin a awmtir ta a; Josua kutah pawh a pe ta hek lo. 
Judges3:1 Heng hnamte hi a ni LALPA'n Israelte Kanaan rama ral la bei ve ngai hauh lo fiahna tura a awmtirte chu," 
Judges3:2 chung Israela thlah chhuanho, tun hmaa engmah la hre hauh lote chuan an lo hriat nan leh ral beih dan zirtir tur atan chauh awmtir ani;" 
Judges3:3 chungte chu Philistia-ho lal panga te, Kanaan mi zawng zawng te, Zindon-ho te, Lebanon tlanga awm Hiv-hote an ni, Baal-hermon tlang atanga hamath khaw luhna thlengin." 
Judges3:4 LALPA'n Mosia hmanga an thlahtute thu a lo pekte kha an pawm dawn leh dawn loh hriatna'n chungho chu Israelte fiahna tur an ni. 
Judges3:5 Tin, Israela thlahte chu Kanaan-ho te, Hit-ho te, Amor-ho te, Periz-ho te, Hiv-ho te, Jebus-hote zingah chuan an awm a;" 
Judges3:6 tin, an fanute chu nupuiah an nei a, tin, an fanute chu an fapate an neihtir thung a, an pathiante rawng an bawl a." 
Judges3:7 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan LALPA mithmuhin thil sual an lo ti ta a, LALPA an Pathian chu an theihnghilh a, Baal-ho leh Astoreti rawng an bawl ta a." 
Judges3:8 Chutichuan LALPA thin chu Israelte chungah chuan a ur ta a, Mesopotamia ram lal Kusan-risathaima hnenah a hralh ta a; tichuan Israela thlahte chu Kusan-risathaima thu hnuaah kum riat" 
Judges3:9 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan LALPA an auh veleh, LALPA'n Israela thlahte chhandamtu a rawn siamsak a, chu mi chuan a rawn chhandam ta a, chu chu Kaleba nau Kenaza fapa Othniela a ni." 
Judges3:10 Tin, LALPA thlarau chu a chungah a lo thleng a, tichuan Israelte ro a relsak ta a; ral bei turin a va thawk a, tin, LALPA'n Mesopotamia ram lal Kusan-risathaima chu a pe a: Kusan-risa" 
Judges3:11 Tin, ram chu kum sawmli ralmuangin a awm a. Tin, Kenaza fapa Othniela chu a thi ta a." 
Judges3:12 Tin, Israela thlahte chu LALPA mithmuhin thil sual an lo ti leh ta a: chutichuan LALPA mithmuha thil an lo tihsual avangin LALPA'n Moab lal Eglona chu Israelte laka chakin a siam a." 
Judges3:13 Tin, ani chu Amona thlahte leh Amalek-hote a pun khawm a; tin, Israel-hote chu a va bei a, tum khawpui chu a luah ta a." 
Judges3:14 Tichuan Israela thlahte chu Moab lal Eglona thu hnuaiah kum sawm leh kum riat an awm a. 
Judges3:15 Nimahsela Israela thlahte chuan LALPA an han auh veleh LALPA'n Gera fapa Ehuda, Benjamin mi, mi veikhawr, chhandamtu a rawn siamsak a: tin Israela thlahte chuan Moab lal Eglona pek tur" 
Judges3:16 Tin, Ehuda chuan khandaih hriam tawn, tawng chena seiin a chher a; chu chu a malpui ding lam puan hnuaiah a taivawn a." 
Judges3:17 Tin, Moab lal Eglona chu lawmman chu a han pe a: Eglona chu mi thau tak a ni a." 
Judges3:18 Tin, lawmman a han pek zawh veleh chuan, lawmman kengtute chu a kaltir leh ta a." 
Judges3:19 Ani erawh chu Gilgal khaw kianga lung chherna hmun atangin a let leh a, ""I e lalpa, thuruk hrilh tur che ka nei e,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan,""Ngawi thiap rawh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan a bula dingho zawng zawngte chuan an chhuahsan ta vek a." 
Judges3:20 Tin, Ehuda chu a hnenah a va kal a; ani chu a thlan daihna pindanah a mah chauhin a lo thu a. Tin, Ehuda chuan, ""Pathianin i hnena sawi tur thu mi chah e,"" a ti a. Tin, a thutphah ata chu a tho a." 
Judges3:21 Tin, Ehuda chuan a kut vei lamin a malpui dinglama khandaih chu a han phawrh a, a pumah a chiu ta vak mai a:" 
Judges3:22 a fawng pawh chu a lut pil hmawk a; tin, a khandaih chu a thauin a hnawh ping ta tlat a, a puma khandaih chu a phawi si lo a; a hnungah a tlang a ni." 
Judges3:23 Chutichuan Ehuda chu hulhliapah a chhuak a, pindan kawngkharte chuan a kharhung a, a kalh ta tlat a." 
Judges3:24 Tin, chutia a chhuah tak hnu chuan, a chhiahhlawhte chu an lo kal a; tin, an han hmuh chuan ngai teh, pindan kawngkate chu a lo inkalh tlat mai a; ""A thlandaihna pindanah a va inthiar fihlim rih a ni ang chu maw,"" an ti a." 
Judges3:25 Tin, zahthlak khawpin an nghak ta reng mai a: tin, ngai teh, pindan kawngkate chu a hawng ta hauh lo mai a; chutichuan chabi an la a, an han hawng a: tin ngai teh, an lalpa chu chhuatah chuan, thiin a lo lum der mai a." 
Judges3:26 Tin, Ehuda lah chu khatia an nghah reng chhung khan a lo tlan bo tawh a, lung chherna hmun kha a pel a," 
Judges3:27 Seira-ah a tlan a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu mi hmun a thlen chuan Ephraim tlang ramah chuan tawtawrawt a ham ta, tin, Israela thlahte chu tlang ram ata a hnenah an chhuk a, ani chuan an hma a hruai ta a." 
Judges3:28 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Mi zui rawh u khai: LALPA'n in hmelma Moab-hote hi a pe tawh che u a ni,"" a ti a. Tichuan an zui thla a, Moab ram dep Jordan lui kaite chu an man a, tumah an kaitir phal lo." 
Judges3:29 Chu mi tum chuan Moab-ho singkhat lai, mi awmkhauh thiau leh mi chak huaisen tha thiau an that a; pakhat mah tlan chhuak an awm lo." 
Judges3:30 Chutichuan chu mi ni chuan Moab-hote chu Israel hote lakah an lo tawm ta a. Tin, ram chu kum sawmriat chhung ralmuangin a awm a.Tin, a hnuah chuan Anatha fapa Samgara a lo lang ve a, chu mi chuan Philistia-ho mi zaruk sebawng chhunna tiangin a chhun hlum a: amah bawk chuan Israel-hote chu a chhandam a ni." 
Judges3:31 Tin, a hnuah chuan Anatha fapa Samgara a lo lang ve a, chu mi chuan Philistia-ho mi zaruk sebawng chhunna tiangin a chhun hlum a: amah bawk chuan Israel-hote chu a chhandam a ni." 
Judges4:1 Ehuda thih hnu chuan Israela thlahten LALPA mithmuhin thil sual an lo ti leh ta a. 
Judges4:2 Tichuan Hazor khaw thuttu, Kanaan ram lal Jabina hnenah chuan LALPA'n a hralh ta a: chu mi sipai hotu ber chu Sisera a ni a, Jentail-te ram Haroseth khuaa awm a ni." 
Judges4:3 tin, Israela thlahte chuan LALPA an au va: ani chuan thiir tawlailir zakua lai a nei si a; tin, kum sawmhnih chhung zet Israela thlahte chu nasa takin a hnehchhiah a ni." 
Judges4:4 Tin, chung lai chuan zawlnei Bebori, Lalpidotha nupuiin Israelte ro a rel a." 
Judges4:5 Ephraim tlang rama Rama leh Bethel khaw inkara Debor tum thing hnuaiah a awm thin a: tin, Israela thlahte chu a hnenah an ro reltir turin an kal thin." 
Judges4:6 Tin, Kedes-naphtali ram ata Abinoama fapa Baraka chu a chah a, a hnenah, ""LALPA Israelte pathianin, 'Tabor tlangah han kal langin, Naphtalia thlahte leh Zebuluna thlahte mi singkhat hruai rawh." 
Judges4:7 Tichuan Kison luiah Jabina sipai hotu Sisera chu a tawlailirte leh a hote nen ka rawn tir ang a; tin, ani chu ka pe che,' tiin thu a pe a ni lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
Judges4:8 Tin, Barakan a hnenah, ""Mi kalpui ve la, tichuan ka kal ang e: mi kalpui ve dawn loh erawh chuan ka kal lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges4:9 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka kalpui ve mawlh ang che: amaherawhchu i kalnaah chuan hming that i hlawh dawn lo a nih chu; LALPA'n Sisera chu hmeichhe hnenah a hralh dawn a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, Debori chu a tho a, Baraka hnenah Kedes khaw lamah chuan a kal ve ta a." 
Judges4:10 Tin, Baraka chuan Zebulun-ho leh Naphtali-ho chu Kedes-ah a chah khawm a; mi singkhat amah nen an han kal a: tin, Debori pawh a hnenah chuan a han kal ve a." 
Judges4:11 Tin, Ken mi Hebera chu Ken mi Mosia puzawn Hobaba thlahte zing ata a lo awm hrang a, Kedes kianga Zaananim rama sasaw thing hmun daihah a puan in a va zar a." 
Judges4:12 Tin, Abinoama fapa Baraka chu Tabor tlangah a chho tih Sisera an hrilh a." 
Judges4:13 Tichuan Sisera chuan a tawlailir zawng zawng, thir tawlailir zakua leh a hote Jentail-te ram Haroseth khua ata. Kison luiah a khawm chiam a." 
Judges4:14 Chutichuan Debori chuan Baraka hnenah, 'Khai le, vawiin hi LALPA'n Sisera chu a pek ni che a ni e: I hma hruaitu chu LALPA a ni lo'm ni?"" a ti a. Tichuan baraka chu Tabor tlang ata a chhuk a, mi singkhatin an zui thla a." 
Judges4:15 Tin, LALPA'n Sisera leh, a tawlailir zawng zawng leh, a sipaiho zawng zawngte chu khandaihin Baraka hmaah chuan a tibuai ta nuai hlawm a; tin, Sisera chu a tawlailir ata a chhuk a, a kein a tlan bo ta daih a." 
Judges4:16 Baraka erawh chuan tawlailirte leh sipaiho chu Jentail ram Haroseth thleng chuan a um ta a: tichuan Sisera sipaiho zawng zawngte chu khandaihin an that vek a: pakhat mah dam an awm lo. 
Judges4:17 Sisera erawh chu Ken mi Hebera nupui Jaeli puan inah kein a tlan lut a: hazor lal Jabina leh Ken mi Hebera chhungte chu inrem reng an ni a. 
Judges4:18 Tin, Jaeli chu Sisera hmuak turin a lo chhuak a, a hnenah, ""Ka pu, lo lut rawh, ka hnenah lo lut rawh; hlau suh,"" a ti a. Tichuan puan in chhungah chuan a hnenah a lut ta a, tin, ani chuan puanin a khuh a." 
Judges4:19 Tin, a hnenah, ""Khawngaih takin tui tlemte mi han pe teh khai, ka tui a hal em mai e,"" a ti a. Tin, bawnghnute um a han hawng a, a intir a, a khuh leh ta a." 
Judges4:20 Tin, a hnenah, ""Puan in kawngkaah khan ding la, tichuan, 'Hetah hian mi an awm em? Tia an rawn zawh che chuan, 'Awm lo,' lo ti zel ang che,"" a ti a." 
Judges4:21 Chutichuan Hebera nupui Jaeli chuan puan in khenkilhna a la a, tuboh a keng a, zawitein a pan phei a, khenkilhna chuan a bekbawrah a kheng a, a kheng tlang a, leiah a bur ta ngur mai a; a chauin a mut a tui hle mai si a; tichuan a thi ta a." 
Judges4:22 Tin, ngai teh, Barakan Sisera a rawn um chu, va hmuah tumin Jaeli chu a va chhuak a, a hnenah, ""Lo kal teh khai, i mi zawna chu ka lo entir teh ang che,"" a ti a. Tichuan a hnenah a va kal a; tin, ngai teh, Sisera chu a lo thi reng ma a, puan in khenkilhna chu abekbawrah alo bur ngur mai a." 
Judges4:23 chutichuan Pathian chu mi ni chuan Israela thlahte hmaah Kanaan ram lal Jabina chu a titlawm ta a.Tichuan Israela thlahte chua Kanaan ram lal Jabina an hmin ta deuh deuh a, Kanaan ram lal Jabina chu chhe der khawpin an lo siam ta a." 
Judges4:24 Tichuan Israela thlahte chua Kanaan ram lal Jabina an hmin ta deuh deuh a, Kanaan ram lal Jabina chu chhe der khawpin an lo siam ta a." 
Judges5:1 Chutichuan Debori leh Abinoama fapa Baraka chuan chu mi ni chuan," 
Judges5:2 Hotute chuan Israel zingah zai an zap a. Mipuite chu chak takin an lo inpek tak hi, LALPA chu fak rawh u." 
Judges5:3 Aw, nangni lalte u, lo ngaithla u la; Aw, nangni hotute u, beng lo chhi rawh u; Keimah ngeiin LALPA chawimawiin hla ka sa ang a, LALPA, Israelte Pathian fakin hla ka sa ang." 
Judges5:4 LALPA, Seir ram ata i lo kal chhuah a, Edom phul ata i lo kal chhuah khan, Lei chu a nghing dur dur a, vante pawh a lo far a, A ni, chhungte chuan ruah a surtir a." 
Judges5:5 Tlangte chu LALPA hmaah a lo khur a, Sinai tlang lam pawh saw - LALPA Israelte Pathian hmaah chuan." 
Judges5:6 Anatha fapa Samgara dam laite leh, Jaeli dam laite khan, lamliante chu a thing thup a. Zin veivakte chu kawng mai maiahte an kal thin a." 
Judges5:7 Israel rama khuate chu luah lohin a ram zo a, a ram zo a. Kei Debori ka chet a, Israel ram nu hi ka chet hma loh kha chuan." 
Judges5:8 Pathian tharte a vuan a; Tichuan kulh kawngkhar bulahte khan indona a lo awm a: Israel rama singli zet zingah Phaw leh fei kha awm reng reng a awm em ni? 
Judges5:9 Ka rilru chu Israel-hote roreltu, Mipuite hnena chak taka inpete lamah chuan a awm: LALPA chu fak rawh u." 
Judges5:10 Nangni sabengtung var chunga chuangte u, Nangni puan phah chhah taka thute u; Nangni mi mirte u, chung thute chu puang rawh u." 
Judges5:11 Thal kaptute thawm reng reng hriat phak loh, Tui chawina hmunah chuan LALPA thil fel tihte chu an sawi an sawi ang, Israel ram chunga a thil fel tihte ngei chu. Chutichuan LALPA mipuite chu kulh kawngkhar lamahte chuan an zu chhuk a." 
Judges5:12 Harh la, harh la, Debor; Harh la, harh la, hla sa rawh." 
Judges5:13 Tichuan mi lian la awm chhungte leh mipuite chu an lo chhuk a; Mi chak tak mi beihpui turin LALPA chu a lo chhuk ta. 
Judges5:14 Ameleka zungzamte chu Ephraim atangin an lo chhuk a; Benjamin, i mite zinga miten an rawn zui che, Makir atangin ram roreltute an lo chhuk. Tin, Zebulun atangin ziaktu tiang kengtute chu an lo chhuk." 
Judges5:15 Isakar mi liante chu Debori hnenah an tel a; Isakara angin, Baraka pawh: Ruam lamah chuan amah nen an tlan chhuk chiam a. Reuben-ho tui luannahte chuan An tum a ruh hle mai." 
Judges5:16 Eng atan nge beram huang karahte i thut reng, Beram rual kohna phenglawng ngaithla tur maiin? Reuben-ho tui luannaahte chuan Ngun taka i ngaihtuah chhuahna a awm a," 
Judges5:17 Gilead-ho chu Jordan ralah an awm reng a: Tin, Dan-ho chu engah nge lawngah te an awm reng? Aser-ho chu tuifinriat kamah an thu hle hle a, An litengsawlahte chuan an awm reng." 
Judges5:18 Zebulun-ho leh Napthali-ho hi Phul hmun sanga thih huam reng mi hi. 
Judges5:19 Lalten an rawn bei a, Tichuan Kanaan lalte chuan Megido tui kiang, Taanak khuaha an bei a: Sum lak reng an nei lo" 
Judges5:20 Van atangin an rawn bei a; Arsiten an hmun atangin Sisera chu an rawn bei a. 
Judges5:21 Kison luiin anni chu a hnawl vek a Hmasang lui, Kison lui chuan. Aw ka thlarau, chak takin kal zel rawh." 
Judges5:22 Tichuan sakawrte chu an per ta tlut tlut a, Sakawr chakte chu an zuan an zuan avangin." 
Judges5:23 'Meroz chu anchhia lawh r'u,' LALPA vanrihkohin a ti, Chuta awmte chu nasa takin anchhia lawh rawh u; LALPA tanpuiin, LALPA'n mi chak tak a beinaa tanpui tura an lo kal loh avangin,'" 
Judges5:24 Hmeichhia azawngah Jaeli, Ken mi Hebera nupui hi engthawl ber a ni ang, Hmeichhia puan ina chengho azawngah chuan a engthawl ber a ni ang." 
Judges5:25 Ani chuan tui a rawn dil a, hnute tui a lo pe a. Mi tha noin hnutetui khal a lo pe a." 
Judges5:26 Kilhna a keng a, A ding lamin hnathawk mi tuboh; tin, tuboh chuan Sisera chu a kheng a, a luah a kheng tlang a, A ni, a bekbawrah chuan a kheng a, a kheng bur ta ngur a." 
Judges5:27 A ke bulah a awp rawk a, a tlu a, a bawk ta der a: A ke bulah a awp rawk a, a tlu a, a tlu ta a: A awp rawkna hmunah chuan a thi ta der mai." 
Judges5:28 Sisera nu chu tukverah a han dak a, Zawngdaikalh awngah a au a, 'Engati nge a tawlailir a lo thlen har? Engati nge a tawlailir a muan? A ti." 
Judges5:29 A hmeichhe fingten an lo chhang a, A ni, amah a inchhang chawp leh a," 
Judges5:30 'An hmu zo ta lo em ni? rallak an insem ta lo em ni;e? Mi tinin nula pahnih khat emaw theuh; Sisera chan tur chu rallak puan ze hrang hrang, Rallak puan zehmawi, ze hrang hrang, Rallak nghawnga bah tur puan a khing hniha zehmawi, ze hrang hrang,' tiin.Chutiang chuan aw LALPA, I hmelmate zawng zawng chu boral vek se la: Amah hmangaihtute erawh chu chak taka kal, ni ang hi ni rawh se,"" tiin hla an sa a. Tin, ram chu kum sawmli chhung ralmuangin a awm a." 
Judges5:31 Chutiang chuan aw LALPA, I hmelmate zawng zawng chu boral vek se la: Amah hmangaihtute erawh chu chak taka kal, ni ang hi ni rawh se,"" tiin hla an sa a. Tin, ram chu kum sawmli chhung ralmuangin a awm a." 
Judges6:1 Tin, Israel thlahte chuan LALPA mithmuhin thil an lo tisual ta a: tichuan LALPA'n Midian-ho kutah kum sarih a awmtir a." 
Judges6:2 Tin, Midian-hote chuan Israel-hote chu an lo hmin ta a: tichuan Midian-hote avang chuan Israela thlahte tlangah khur te, puk te, kulh te an siam a." 
Judges6:3 Tin, heti hi ani a, Israelhoten thil an han chin tehian Midian-hote, Amalek-hote, khawchhak fateho chu an han chho a;" 
Judges6:4 an han bei a; awmhmun an han khuar a, Gaza thlengin leia thil toe chu an tihchhiatsak a, Israel ramah ei tur reng reng an zuah lo, beram te, bawng te, abengtung te lamin." 
Judges6:5 An ran rualte leh an puan inte nen an lo thawk a, khau ang maiin tam takin an lo thawk si thin a; anmahni leh an sanghawngseite chu chhiar sen pawh an ni lo: ram tichhe turin an lo kal thin a ni." 
Judges6:6 Chutichuan Israel-hote chu Midain ho avang chuan an lo rethei ta hle mai a; tin, Israela thlahte chuan LALPA chu an au ta a." 
Judges6:7 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Midan-ho avanga Israela thlahten LALPA an han auh ve leh chuan," 
Judges6:8 LALPA'n Israela thlahte hnenah chuan zawlnei a rawn tir a: ani chuan an hnenah, ""LALPA Israelte Pathianin, heti hian a ti a ni, 'Aigupta ram ata chu ka hruai chho che u a, bawihho kut ata leh, hnehchhiatu che u zawng awng kut ata chu ka chhan chhuak che u a," 
Judges6:9 Aigupta-ho kut ata leh, hnehchhiahtu che u zawng zawng kut ata chu ka chhanchhuak che u a, in hma ata anmahni chu ka hanwtchhuak a, an ram chu ka pe che u a;" 
Judges6:10 tin, keiin, Kei hi LALPA in Pathian ka nih hi, he'ng in awmna ram neitu Amor-ho pathiante hi in hlau hlek tur a ni lo e, ka ti a: nimahsela ka thusawi chu in pawm ta si lo,' a ti e,"" a ti a ni." 
Judges6:11 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh a lo kal a, Ophra khuaa Abiezrit mi Joasa sasaw thing hnuaiah a thu a: tin, a fapa Gideonan Midian-hote hmuh theih loh turin grep sawrna khurah buh a lo vua a." 
Judges6:12 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chu a hnenah a rawn inlar a, a hnenah, ""Nang mi chak huaisen, LALPA hchu I hnenah a awm e,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:13 Tin, Gideonan a hnenah, ""Aw ka pu, LALPA kan hnena a awm si chuan, eng tizia nge hetianga kan chunga thil a lo thlen si? Min thlahtute khan, 'LALPA'n Aigupta ram ata chu min hruai chho a ni lo'm ni?' tia a thiltih mak tak takte min hrilh thinte kha khawiah nge a nih zawh tak? Tunah zawng Midian-ho kutah min pe tawh alawm,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:14 Tin, LALPA chuan mah chu a en a, a hnenah, ""He i chakna hian kal la Israel-ho hi Midian-ho lak ata chhandam ang che: ka tir che a ni lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
Judges6:15 Tin, ani chuana hnenah, ""Aw LALPA, engtin nge Israel-hote hi ka han chhandam tehlul ang? Ngai teh, Manasea thlah zingah hnam rethei ber kan ni a, kei lah hi ka pa chhungte zinga te ber ka ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:16 Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, ""I hnenah ka awm zel dawn alawm, tichuan Midian-ho chu pakhat ang maiin ai hneh vek mai ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:17 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""I mittlung ka lo nih chuan, nangmah ngeiin mi bia a ni tih chhinchhiahna eng emaw mi entir ta che." 
Judges6:18 I hmaa hlan tur thil pek ka va lak a, I hnena ka lo kal leh hma loh chuan heta ta hi khawngaih takin lo kal bo hauh suh ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""I lo kal leh hma loh chuu ka lo awm reng ang e,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:19 Tin, Gideona chu alut ta a, kel no leh chhangphut epha khat dawidim telh loh a buatsaih a: a sa chu fawngah a dah a, tin, a tui chu belah a dah a, sasaw thin ghnuaiah a hnenah chuan a rawn keng a, a rawn hlan a." 
Judges6:20 Tin, Pathian vantirhkoh chuan a hnenah, ""Sa leh chhang dawidim telh loh kha la langin, he lung chungah hian dah la, a tui kha bun chhuak rawh,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:21 Chutiang chuan a han ti a. Chutichuan LALPA vantirhkoh chuan a tiang ken hmawr chuan sa leh chhang dawidim telh loh chu a han khawih a; tin, lung atang chuan mei a lo chhuak a, sa leh chhang dawidim telh loh chu a kang ral ta vek a; tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chu a hmuh theih lohvah a kal ta a." 
Judges6:22 Chutichuan Gideona chuan LALPA vantirhkoh ani tih a hre ta a; tin, Gideonan, ""E khai aw, aw Lalpa PATHIAN! LALPA vanrirhkohchu a hmai chhan ngeiah ka hmuh tak chu le,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:23 Tin, LALPA'n a hnenah ""Thlamuang takin awm la, hlau suh: I thi lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:24 chutichuan Gideonan chutah chuan LALPA tan maicham a siam a, Jehoa-salom a vuah a: tun thlengin Abiezrit mite khua Ophra-ah a la awm reng a ni." 
Judges6:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu zan vekah chuan LALPA'n a hnenah, "" I pa bawngpa, bawngpa pahnihna kum sarih mi chu la langin, I pa neih Baala maicham hi tichim la, a bula Asera hi kit rawh:" 
Judges6:26 tin, he kulh chungah hian kawngzawng nei tein LALPA i Pathian tan maicham siam langin, bawngpa pahnihna chu la la, Asera i kih tur thing hmangin halral thilhlan hlan rawh,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:27 Chutichuan Gildeona chuan a chhiahhlawhte zinga mi sawm a hruai a. LALPA'n a hnena a sawi ang chuan a ti ta a; tin, heti hi ani a, a pa vangin, chhunah a ti ngam lo a, zanah a ti a ni." 
Judges6:28 Tin, khawpuia mite chu zing taka an han thawh chuan ngai teh, Baala maicham chu tihchimin a lo awm a, a bula Asera chu kih thlukin a lo awm a, maicham siam chunga bawngpa pahnihna hlan chu a lo awm ta mai a." 
Judges6:29 Hei tu tih nge maw ni chu le? tiin an inbe hlawm a. Tin, an han inzawh a, an han indap vel hnu chuan, ""Joasa fapa Gideona tih a lo ni reng alawm maw le,"" an ti ta a." 
Judges6:30 Tichuan khawpuia mite chuan Joasa hnenah, ""I fapa chu han hruai chhuak rawh, a thi ngei tur a ni: Baala maicham a tihchim avfang leh a bula Asera a kih avangin,"" an ti a." 
Judges6:31 Tin, Joasa chuan amah rawn khingtu zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Baala chu in tan dawn a ni maw? Amah chu in hum dawn a ni maw? Tupawh amah tan apiang chu zingah la la hian tihhlum tur a ni: pathian anih chuan a maicham an tihchim avangin, intan chawp ang hmiang,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:32 Chutichuan, ""A maicham tihchim avangin Baalan amah khing rawh se,: tiin, chu mi ni chuan Jerubaala a vuah ta a." 
Judges6:33 Tichuan Midian-ho zawng zawngte leh Amelek-hote leh, khaw chhak fate chu an pung khawm chian a; lui an kan a, Jazreel ruamah an inkulh a." 
Judges6:34 Nimahsela LALPA thlarau chu Gideona chungah a lo thleng a; tin, tawtawrawt a hantum a: tichuan Abiezer-ho chuan an pn khawm ta chiam a." 
Judges6:35 Tin, Manase-ho zawng zawng zingah mite a tlantir a; chungho pawh chuan an pan khawm ta chiam a: tin, Aser-hote hnenah te, Zebulun-ho hnenah te, Naphtali-ho hnenahte pawh miet a tlantir a; anni pawh chuan an han fin ve ta a." 
Judges6:36 Tin, Gedeonan Pathian hnenah, ""I sawi anga keima kuta Israelte hi i chhandam dawn chuan," 
Judges6:37 ngaiteh, hrui zawlah beram hmuh ka dah ang a, beram hmulah chauh chuan dai alo awm a, lei zawng zawngte chu a lo ro vek chuan, i sawi angin keima kutin Israelte hi i chhandam dawn ani tih ka hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges6:38 Chutiang chu a lo ni ta ngei a: a tuk zing taka a han thawh a, beram hmul chu a han hmeh sawr chuan beram hmula mi chu dai berhbu khat zet a han sawr chhuak ta mai si a." 
Judges6:39 Tin, Gideonan Pathian hnenah, ""Ka chungah thinrim suh ang che, vawikhat tal ka han sawi leh teh ang; khawngaih takin vawi khat tal beram hmulin mi fiahtir leh teh ang che; tun tumah chuan beram hmuh chauh chu lo hul se la, lei chung zawng zawngah dai lo awm leh thng rawh se,"" a ti a.Tin, chutiang chuan beram hmuh chauh chu a lo hul a, lei chung zawng zawngah chuan dai a lo awm ta thung a." 
Judges6:40 Tin, chutiang chuan beram hmuh chauh chu a lo hul a, lei chung zawng zawngah chuan dai a lo awm ta thung a." 
Judges7:1 Chutichuan Jerubaala (chu mi chu Gideona a ni) leh a hnena mipui awm zawng zawngte chu zing takah an tho a, Harod lui bulah an inkulh a: tin, Midian-hote kulh chu an awmna hmar lampang More tlang bul ruamah a ni." 
Judges7:2 Tin, LALPA'n Gideona hnenah, ""I hnena awmte kha Midian-hote an kuta ka pekna'n zawng an tam lutuk a, chutilozawng Israel-hoten, 'Keimahni kut ngeia inchhandam kan ni alawm,' tiin mi uankhum dah ang e." 
Judges7:3 Chuvangin ngai teh, mipuihote beng hriatah, 'Tupawh hlau leh khur apiang chu kir leh se la, Gilead tlang ata hi haw leh rawh se,' tiin puang rawh,"" a ti a. Tichuan mipuite chu sing hnih leh sanghnih an kir leh a; tin, singkhat an la awm a." 
Judges7:4 Tin, LALPA'n Gideona hnenah, ""Mite kha an la tam lutuk fo mai; luiah hruai thla la, chutah chuan keimah ka thliarsak ang che: heti hi a ni ang a, 'He mi hi chu i hnenah kal ve rawh se,' ka tih apiang chu, i hnenah kal se la; tin, 'He mi hi chu i hnenah kal ve suh se,' ka tih apiang chu kal suh se,"" a ti a." 
Judges7:5 Chutichuan mipuite chu luiah chuan a hruai thla a: tin, LALPA'n Gideona hnenah, "" Ui anga a leia tui a liaha liak apiangte chu a hrangin dah zel langin; chutiang bawkin kuna thingthia tui dawt apiangte pawh,"" a ti a." 
Judges7:6 Tin, an kut phaha mi a liaha liakte chu mi zthum an ni a, mi dang zawng zawngte chu kuna thingthia tui dawt vek an ni." 
Judges7:7 Tichuan LALPA'n Gideona hnenah, ""Mi zathum, a liaha liakate kha hmangin ka chhandam dawn che u a, Midian-hote hi i kutah ka pe dawn a ni: mipui zawng zawngte chu mahni hmun theuhvah haw vek rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Judges7:8 Chutichuan mipuite chuan ei turte leh an tawtawrawtte chu an keng a: tin, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu an puan in lamah a hawtir ta vek a, mi zathumte erawh chu a awmtir a: tin, Midan-ho kulh chu an hnuai ruamah chuan a ni." 
Judges7:9 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu m zanah chuan LALPA'n a hnenah, ""Tho la, kulhah chuan zuk chhuk rawh khai; i kutah ka pe tawh e." 
Judges7:10 Amaherawhchu zu chhuk i hlauh chuan, I chhiahhlawh Pura nen hian kulhah chuan zuk kal phawt u la;" 
Judges7:11 tichuan an thusawi i hria ang a; chu mi hnuah zawng i kut chu tihchakin a awm ang a, kulhah chuan i kal ngam tawh ang,"" a ti a. Chutichuan a chhiahhlawh Pura nen chuan kulha ral vengho tawntirh ber awmnaah chuan an zuk kal a." 
Judges7:12 Tin, Midian-hote leh Amalek-hote leh khawchhak fateho zawng zawng chu ruamah chuan khau ang maiin tam tak an lo awm hmur mai a; an sanghawngseite chu chhiar sen rual loh, an tam lam chu tuifinriat kama tiauvaivur zat zet an ni a." 
Judges7:13 Tin, Gideona a zuk thlen chuan, ngai teh, mi pakhat hian a thianpa chu a mumang a lo hrilh a, a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, mumang ka lo nei a, tin, ngai teh, barli chhang hlawm hi Midian-ho kulhah hian a lo lum a, puan inah hian alo lum lut a, a rawn tichim a, a tilet ling tawp a, puan in chu a per ta thlawp mai a,"" a tia." 
Judges7:14 Tin, a thianpa chuan a chhang a, ""Chu chu Israel mi, Joasa fapa Gideona ngunhnam anih mai chu: Pathianin Midan-ho leh sipaiho zawng zawng chu akutah a pe a nih chu,"" a ti a." 
Judges7:15 Tin, chuti chu a ni a, Gideonan chu mumang leh a awmzia an inhrilhfiah chu a hriatin, Pathian a be ta a; tichuan Israel-hote kulh lamah chuan a kir leh a, 'Tho rawh u khai; LALPA'n Mididan sipaihote chu in kutah a pe tawh ani e,"" a ti a." 
Judges7:16 Tichuan mi zathumte chu pawl thumin a siam a, an vai chuan tawtawrawt leh bel ruak, a chhunga meichhe dah sa a pe theuh a." 
Judges7:17 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Min en u la, ka tih angin ti ve zel ang che u: tin, ngai teh u, kulh tawntirh ber ka thlen veleh, ka tih ang zelin ti ve ang che u." 
Judges7:18 Kei leh ka hnena awm zawng zawngte hian tawtawrawt kan han ham veleh, kulh vela awm zawng zawngte pawhin tawtawrawt in ham vek bawk ang a, 'LALPA tan leh Gideona tan,' ti theuh vang che u,"" a ti a." 
Judges7:19 Chutichuan Gideona leh a hnena awm mai zate chu zan ven laita, ralveng an inthlak hlim chhawn lai takin kulh tawntirh an zuk thleng a: tin, tawtawrawt chu an han ham a, an bel ken chu an tikeh sawm vek a." 
Judges7:20 Tin, a pawl thum chuan tawtawrawt chu an ham a, an bel chu an tikeh a, an vei lamin meichher an keng a, an ding lamin tawtawrawt ham tur an keng a; tin, ""LALPA leh Gideona ngunhnam,"" tiin an au dur dur a." 
Judges7:21 Tin, kulh velah mi tin, mahni dinhmun theuhvah chuan an ding vek a: tichuan sipaiho zawng zawng chu an tlan ta a; tin, an au chiam a, an tlanchhiattir ta a." 
Judges7:22 Tin, tawtawrawt zathum chu an ham a, tin, LALPA sipaiho zawng zawngte chu anmahni leh anmahni khandaihin a inbeihtir ta chiam a: tichuan sipaihote chu Zerera lampang Beth-sita thleng, Tabath kianga Abel-mehola ramri thlengin an tlanchhia a." 
Judges7:23 Tin, Israel-ho chu Naphtali atang te, Aser atang te, Manase zawng zawng atangte chuan an pung khawm a, Midian-ho chu an um ta a." 
Judges7:24 Tin, Gideonan Ephraim tlang ram zawng zawngah chuan, ""Midian-ho hi rawn bei rawh u, Beth-bara thlengin luite hu lo lak khalh ang che u, Jordan lui nen,"" tiin mite a tlan veltir a. Chutichuan Ephraim-ho zawng zawng chu an pung khawm a, Beth-bara thlengin luite chu Jordan lui nen an lo lak khalh vek a.Tin, Midian lal pahnih Oreba leh Zeeba an man a; tin, Oreba chu Oreb lungpuiah an that a, tin, Zeeba chu Zeeb grep sawr khurah an that a, Midan-ho chu an um ta a; tichuan Oreba leh Zeeba lu chu Jordan lui rala Gideona hnenah an rawn la a." 
Judges7:25 Tin, Midian lal pahnih Oreba leh Zeeba an man a; tin, Oreba chu Oreb lungpuiah an that a, tin, Zeeba chu Zeeb grep sawr khurah an that a, Midan-ho chu an um ta a; tichuan Oreba leh Zeeba lu chu Jordan lui rala Gideona hnenah an rawn la a." 
Judges8:1 Tin, Ephraim-hote chuan a hnenah, ""Engtiziaa hetianga min ti nge i nih a, Midian-ho i beihnaah chuan min sawm ve loh?"" an ti a. An hau nasa hle mai a." 
Judges8:2 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Nangni aiin eng nge ka tih uchuak bik le? Abiezer-ho grep lawh ai chian Ephraim-ho grep hmaih chhar hi a nasa zawk lo em ni?" 
Judges8:3 Pathianin Midian-ho lal Oreba leh Zeeba chu in kutah a rawn pe ta a ni a: tichuan nangni ai hian keiin eng nge ka lo tih uchuak theih bik ni? a ti a. Chutichuan chu mi thu a han sawi chuan a chunga an thinrim chu a reh ta a. 
Judges8:4 Tin, Gideona leh a hnena mi zathum awmte chuan Jorda lui chu an zuk thleng a, an kan a, chu chung chungin an um zel a." 
Judges8:5 Tin, Sukoth khuaa mite hnenah chuan ""Heng ka hnungzuite hi khawngaih takin chhangper pe teh u khai; an chau tawh em mai a, Midian-ho lal Zeba leh Zalmuna ka um a ni e,"" a ti a." 
Judges8:6 Tin, Sukoth khuaa mi lianhote chuan, ""Zeba leh Zalmuna chu i kuta awm tawh ang renga chutia i sipaihote chhang kan han pek mai tur chu?"" a ti a." 
Judges8:7 Tin, Gideona chuan, ""Aw le, LALPA'n Zeba leh Zalmuna chu ka kuta mi pek hunah thlaler hling leh hnimhlingneite chuan in taksa chu ka chhun thler diai duai mai ang maw le,"" a ti a." 
Judges8:8 Tin, chu ta tang chuan Penuel-ah a han kal a,an hnenah chutiang bawk chuan a sawi leh a: tin, Penuel khua amite chuan Sukoth khuaa mite chhan ang bawkin an lo che ve a." 
Judges8:9 Tin, Penuel khuaa mite hnenah chuan, ""Remna thu hawna ka lo kir leh hunah, he kulh hi ka rawn tichim ang maw le,"" tiin a sawi bawk a." 
Judges8:10 Zeba leh Zalmuna chu Karkor-ah an awm a, an sipaihote khawchhak fate sipaiho thi bang zawng zawng, singkhat leh sangnga laite nen: khandaih keng mi thiau nuaikhat leh singhnih an thi si a." 
Judges8:11 Tin, Gideona chu Noba leh Jogbeha chhak lama puan ina chenghote kawngah a han chho a, sipaihote chu a han bei a; sipaihote chu ralmuang takin an lo awm si a." 
Judges8:12 Tin, Zeba leh Zalmuna chu an tlanchhe ta a; tin, ani chuan a um a; tichuan Midian-ho lal pahnih Zeba leh Zalmuna chu a man a, sipaiho zawng zawngte chu a tibuai ta nuai nuai a." 
Judges8:13 Tin, Joasa fapa Gideona chu Heres chho atangin indona ata chu a lo kir leh ta a." 
Judges8:14 Tin, Sukoth khua atlangval pakhat hi a man a, thute a zawt a: tichuan Sukoth khuaa mi lianhote leh, upate hming chu a ziahsak vek a, sawmsarih leh pahnih a an ni a." 
Judges8:15 Tin, Sukoth khuaa mite hnenah chuan a han kal a, ""Zeba leh Zalmuna hi en teh u le, he mite alawm 'Zeba leh Zalmuna chu i kuta awm tawh ang reng a, chutia i mi chaute chhan gkan han pek mai tur chu?' tia mi tihel vei kha,"" a ti a." 
Judges8:16 Tichuan chu mi khaw upate chu a man a, thlaler hling leh hnimhlingneite chuan Sukoth mite chu a zirtir a." 
Judges8:17 Tin, Penuel khaw kulh chu a tichim a, khuaa mite pawh chu a that a." 
Judges8:18 Tichuan Zeba leh Zalmuna hnenah chuan,""Tabor tlanga in mi thahte kha mi eng ang nge an nih?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Nangmah ang bawk hi an ni; lal fa anna an nei theuh mai,"" an ti a." 
Judges8:19 Tin, ani chuna, ""Ka unau, ka nu fapate ngei an ni a sin: LALPA c hu anung ngei ang hian, anni chu lo zuah ta ni u la chu, ka that lo tur che u,"" a ti a." 
Judges8:20 Tin, a fapa upa ber Jethera hnenah chuan, ""Khai le, nangin that rawh,"" a ti a.Nimahsela tlangval chuan a khandaih a phawi lo; tlangval mai a la nih avangin a hlau a ni." 
Judges8:21 Tichuan Zeba leh Zalmuna chuan, ""Nangmah kha lo thawk la, min rawn bei ta che: patling leh patling inbeih tur alawm,"" an ti a. Tin, Gideona chu a tho a, Zeba leh Zalmuna chu a that ta a, tin, an sanghawngsei nghawnga nghawngkawlte chu a la a." 
Judges8:22 Chutichuan Israel mite chuan Gideona hnenah, ""Nangin ka chungah ro rel tawh ang che, nang leh i fapa leh, i fapaa fapate chen pawhinL nangin Midian-hote lakah hian min chhandam ta si a,"" an ti a." 
Judges8:23 Tin, Gideonan an hnenah, ""Kei zawngin in chungah hian ro ka rel lo ang a, ka fapa lahin in chungah ro a rel hek lo ang: LALPA'n in chungah ro a rel zawk ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges8:24 Tin, Gideonan an hnenah, Thil pakhat erawh chu dil che u ka duh a ni, mi tinin in rallak bengbeh chu mi pe ta theuh che u,"" a ti a. (Ismael-ho an nih avangin rangkachak bengbeh an nei a ni)." 
Judges8:25 Tin, anni chuan, ""Kan pe mawlh ang che, "" an ti a. Chutichuan puan an phah a, mi tinin an rallak bengbeh chu an theh chhuak ta theuh a." 
Judges8:26 Tin, chung rallak bengbeh a dilte chu a rih lam rangkachak sekel sangkhat leh zasarih a ni; nghawngkawl e, bengbeh te, Midan lalte puan sen duk tiam loin, an sanghawngseite khaidiat awrh pawh tel loin." 
Judges8:27 Tin, Gideona chung chuan ephod a siam a, a awmna Ophra khuaah a dah a: chu tah chuan chu mi lakah chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng chu an lo uire zo ta a: tichuan Gideona leh a chhungte tan pawh thang a lo ni a mai a." 
Judges8:28 Chutichuan Midian-ho chu Israela thlahte hmaah chuan tihtlawmin an lo awm awm ta a, tichuan an chechang thei ta lo a. Tin, Gideona dma chhung chuan ram chu kum sawmli chhung ralmuangin a awm a." 
Judges8:29 Tin, Joasa fapa Jerubaala chu a in lamah a awm ta a." 
Judges8:30 Tin, Gideona chuan ama hrin ngei fapa sawmsarih a nei a: nupui tam tak nei a ni a." 
Judges8:31 Tin, Sekem khuaa a hmeiin fapa a hrinsak bawk a, a hmingah Abimeleka a sa a." 
Judges8:32 Joasa fapa Gideona chu tar kuna damin a thi a, tichuan Abiezrit mi Ophra khuaa a pa Joasa thlanah an phum ta a." 
Judges8:33 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Gideona thih veleh chuan Israela thlahte chu an lo hnungtawlh leh ta a, Baal-e lakah an uire a, Baal-berith chu an pathianah an lo siam ta a," 
Judges8:34 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan an vela hmelmate zawng zawng lak ata chhan chuaktu LALPA an Pathian chu an hre ta lo va:Jeru-baala (Gideona chu) Israel-hote chunga theihtawpa that chhuah thintu chhungte chungah pawh chuan that an chhuah ve ta hek lo." 
Judges8:35 Jeru-baala (Gideona chu) Israel-hote chunga theihtawpa that chhuah thintu chhungte chungah pawh chuan that an chhuah ve ta hek lo. 
Judges9:1 Tin, Jerubaala fapa Abimeleka chu Sekem khuaah a nu nutate hnenah a kal a, a nu pate chhungkua zawng zawngte nen a bia a," 
Judges9:2 Sekem khuaa mi zawng zawngte beng hriatah thu sawi u la, 'Jerubaala fa zawng zawng mi sawmsarihten in chunga ro an rel ange tha zawk in tih, pakhatin in chungah ro a rel?' ti teh u khai: tin, kei pawh in thisen zawmpui ka ni tih hi hre reng bawk ang che u,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Judges9:3 Tin, a nu nutate chuan Sekem khua ami zawng zawngte beng hriatah chuan chung a thu zawng zawng chu an sawi a: tichuan Abimeleka zui duhna rilru an lo pu ta a: ""Ani chu kan unau a ni alawm,"" an ti ta si a." 
Judges9:4 Tin, Baal-berith in ata tangka sawmsarih an pe a, chu chuan Abimelekan mi ho tak tak leh, mi tawrawt pui puite a ruai a, anni chuan amah chu an zui a." 
Judges9:5 Tin, Ophra khuaa a pa inah a va kal a, Jerubaala fapa, a unau sawmsarihte chu lung pakhat chungah a that hlawm a: Jerubaala fapa naupang ber Jothama erawh chu a damah a tang a: a lo biru hlau a ni." 
Judges9:6 Tin, Sekem khuaa mi zawng zawng leh Beth-milo a mi zawng zawng chu an pung khawm a, tichuan Abimeleka chu Sekem khuaa lungphun bul sasaw kiangah chuan lalah an siam ta a." 
Judges9:7 Tin, chu chu Jothama an hrilh chuan Gerizim tlang chhipah a han ding a, aw ring takin a au a, an hnenah, ""Nangni Sekem khuaa mite u, ka thusawi hi ngaithla teh u, tichuan Pathian pawhin in thu a lo ngaithla ve dawn nia." 
Judges9:8 Vawikhat chu thing hi an lal atana hriak thih turin an va chhuak a; olive thing hnenah hian, 'Nang kan lalah awm ta che,' an ti a." 
Judges9:9 Nimahsela olive thing chuan an hnenah, 'Pathian leh mihring chawimawi phahna'na an mi hmanna ber ka hriak hi chhuahsanin thing chungah lehlam lehlaman ka peh ka pheh tehlul ang maw?' a ti a." 
Judges9:10 Tin, thingte chuan theipui kung hnenah hian, 'Hawh teh, nang kan lalah awm ang che,' an va ti a." 
Judges9:11 Nimahsela theipui kung chuan an hnenah, 'Ka thlumna leh ka rah tha tak hi chhuahsanin, thing chungah lehlam lehlaman ka phe ka phe tehlul ang maw?' a ti a." 
Judges9:12 Tin, thingte chuan grep hrui hnenah, 'Hawh teh, nang kan lalah awm ang che,' an ti a." 
Judges9:13 Tin, grep hrui chuan an hnenah, 'Pathian leh mihring tilawm thintu ka uain hi chhuahsanin thing chungah lehlam lehlaman ka phe ka phe tehlul ang maw?' a ti a." 
Judges9:14 Chutichuan thin gzawng zawng chuan hling hnenah, 'Hawh teh, nang kan lalah awm ang che,' an ti a." 
Judges9:15 Tin, hling chuan thing hnenah, 'In lal atana hriak mi thih takzet in nih chuan ka hlimah hian lo bi ta che u: in nih loh erawh chuan hlingah chuan mei lo chhuakin Lebanon tlanga sidar thingte chu kang zo vek rawh se,' a ti a." 
Judges9:16 Chutichuan Abimeleka in lal atana in lo siam ta mai hi tih takzet leh fel taka ti in nih a, Jerubaala leh a chhungte chu tha taka in tih a, a phu ang zela a chunga lo tite in nih a;" 
Judges9:17 (Ka pa hian ral a lo dosak che u a, a lo thih phah ta hial a, Midian-ho kut ata chu a lo chhanchhuak ta che u a:" 
Judges9:18 vawiinah hian ka pa chhungte chungah chuan in lo hel a, a fapate sawmsarih zet lung pakhat chungah in lo tihlum a, in unaupa a nih avangin a bawihnu fapa Abimeleka hi Sekem khaw mite lalah in lo siam ta si a;)" 
Judges9:19 vawiinah hian Jerubaala leh a chhunge chunga tih takzet leh fel taka ti in ni phawt zawngin le, Abimeleka chungah hian lawm rawh u, tin, ani pawh in chungah hian lawm rawh se:" 
Judges9:20 chutiang a nih loh erawh chuan Abimeleka atang hian mei lo alh chhuak se la, Sekem khuaa mite leh Beth-milo mite chu kang zo vek rawh se; tin, Sekem khuaa mite leh Beth-milo atangin mei lo alh chhuak se la, Abimeleka chu kang zo vek rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Judges9:21 Chutichuan Jothama chu a tlan a, a tlan bo a, Beer-ah a tlan a, a unaupa Abimeleka a hlauh avangin chutah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Judges9:22 Tin, Abimeleka chu Israel-ho chungah kum thum a lal a." 
Judges9:23 Tin, Pathianin Abimeleka leh Sekem khuaa mite karha chuan rilru sual a awmtir a, tichuan Sekem khuaa mite chuan Abimeleka chungah vervek takin an ti ta a:" 
Judges9:24 chu chu Jerubaala fapa sawmsarihte chunga rawng taka an tih avanga an chunga phuba lakna a lo thlen theihna tur leh, anmahni thattu an unaupa Abimeleka chungah leh, a unaute that tura a kut lo tichaktu Sekem-hote chunga an thisen awm theihna turin a ni." 
Judges9:25 Tin, Sekem khuaa mite chuan tlang chhipahte amah chang rutute an dah a, chu mi kawnga kal apiangte chu an lo suam thin a; chu mi thu chu Abimeleka an hrilh a." 
Judges9:26 Tin, Ebeda fapa Gaala a unauteho nen an lo thawk a. Sekem khuaah an lut a: Sekem- hote chuan an lo ringhlel lo a." 
Judges9:27 Tin, lo lamah an va kal a, an grep huana mi an lo a, an chil a, an kut a, an pathian inah an lut a, an eiin an in a, Abimeleka chu anchhia an lawh a." 
Judges9:28 Tin, Ebeda fapa Gaala chuan, ""Tunge ni Abimeleka chu? Sekema pawh hi tu nge maw anih a, keinin a rawng kan han bawl tehlul tur chu? Jerubaala fa a ni lo'm ni? Zebula hi a upa a ni lo'm ni?Sekema pa Hamora hote rawng i bawl ang u hmiang; engah nge a ni rawng chu kan bawl ang?" 
Judges9:29 Hengho hi ka thuin han awm teh se la chu aw! Abimeleka hi ka han titlawm der mai tur,"" a ti a. Tin, Abimeleka hnenah, ""I sipaite tipung la, lo thawk rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
Judges9:30 Tin, chu mi khaw roreltu Zebula chuan Ebeda fapa Gaala thusawi chu a lo hriat chuan a thin a ur ta thut a." 
Judges9:31 Tichuan fin vervekin, Abimeleka hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh, Ebeda fapa Gaala leh a unauteho Sekem-ah an lo kal a; tin, ngai teh, i chunga helpui tumin khua amite an fuihpawrh e." 
Judges9:32 Chutichuan i hote nen azan azanin lo thawk u la, phulah lo chang rawh u:" 
Judges9:33 tichuan heti hi a ni ang a, zingah ni chhuah veleh, tho la, khua chu rawn bei mai ang che: tin, ngai teh, amah leh a hote chuan an rawn beih dawn veleh che, remchang i tih dan ang angin an chungah lo ti mai ang che,"" tia hrilh turin mite a tlantir a." 
Judges9:34 Chutichuan Abimeleka leh a hote zawng zawng chu azan azan chuan an tho a, pawl lia insiamin Sekem khua chu an hual ta a." 
Judges9:35 Tin, Ebeda fapa Gaala chu a va chhuak a, khawpui luhna kawngkaah chuan a va ding a: tin, Abimeleka chu ahote nen chuan an chan rukna hmun ata chu an lo thawk ta a." 
Judges9:36 Tin, Gaalan mipuite a han hmuh chuan Zebula hnenah, ""Ngai teh, tlang chhip atangin mipuite an lo chhuk e,"" a ti a. Tin, Zebula chuan a hnenah, ""Tlang hlim saw mihring angina i hmu mai ani ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges9:37 Tin, Gaala chuan, ""En ta che maw le, ram lai taka saw mipui an lo chhuk, pawl khat phei chu Meonemim sasaw thing, kawngah an lo kal saw,"" a ti leh a." 
Judges9:38 Tichuan Zebual chuan a hnenah, ""Tunge maw Abimeleka, a rawng kan han bawl tura chu ni?' tia i sawina ka kha khawiah nge ni ta, hengho hi i mi hmusitate ngei kha an ni lo'm ni? Va chhuak la, va bei mawlh rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
Judges9:39 Tichuan Gaala chuan Sekem-hote hma chu a va hruai a. Abimeleka chu a va bei ta a. 
Judges9:40 Tin, Abimeleka chuan a lo um a, a tlanchhe ta a, khawpui luhna kawngka thlengin mi tam tak hliamin an tlu phung a," 
Judges9:41 Tin, Abimeleka chu Aruma khuaah chuan a awm ta a"" tichuan Zebula chuan Gaala leh a uanute ho chu Sekem khuaa awm thei lo turin a hnawt chhuak ta vek a." 
Judges9:42 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tukah chuan mipuite chu phulah hian an va kal chhuak a; tin, Abimeleka an va hrilh a." 
Judges9:43 Tin, mipuite chu a hruai a, pawl thumah a siam a, phulah chuan an chang a: tin, a han hawi a, tin, ngai teh, mipuite khawpui ata an lo chhuak a, tichuan anmahni chu a lo bei a, a lo that a." 
Judges9:44 Tin, Abimeleka leh a pawlhote chuan an lo bawh a, khawpui luhna kawngakaah chuan an va ding a: tin, pawl hnihte chuan phula awmho zawng zawng chu an bawh chiam a, an that ta hlawm a." 
Judges9:45 Tin, Abimeleka chuan khawpui chu chu mi ni chuan nilengin a bei a, tichuan khawpui chu a la a, a chhunga mite ch a that a: khawpui chu a chhu chhe vek a: chiin a theh ta a." 
Judges9:46 Tin, Sekem kulha awm zawng zawngte chuan chu mi thu chu an lo hria a, Elberith kulhbingah an lut ta vek a." 
Judges9:47 Tin, Sekem kulah mi zawng zawngte chu an awm khawm vek tih Abimeleka an hrilh a." 
Judges9:48 Tin, Abimeleka leh a hnena awmho zawng zawngte chu Zalmon tlangah an chho a; tin, Abimeleka chuan hreipui a keng a, thing zar a chek thla a, a pu ta a: tin, a hote hnenah chuan, ""Ka tih dan in hmu a, ka tih ang hian nangni pawhin ti ve thuai thuai rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Judges9:49 Tin, mi awng zangin thin gzar chu an chek thla ve theuh a, Abimeleka chu an zui a, kulhbing velah chuan an dah zel a, tin, kulhbingah chuan an hal khum ta a; chutichuan Sekem khulha mi zawng zawngte pawh chu an thi a, mipa leh hmeichhia sangkhat lai an ni." 
Judges9:50 Tichuan Abimeleka chu Thebez khuaah a kal a, Thebez khua chu a hal a, a la a." 
Judges9:51 Amaherawhchu chu khawpui chhungah chuan kulhpui a awm a, chutah chuan mipa leh hmeichhia zawng zawng leh khawpui chhunga mi zawng zawng chu an tlan lut a, an inkhar khum tlat a, kulh chungah chuan an awm khawm a." 
Judges9:52 Tin, Abimeleka chu kulh lamah chuan a han kal a, a han bei a, hal tumin kulh kawngka bulah a kal a." 
Judges9:53 Tin, hmeichhia tuin emaw buh rawtsawmna chung lam lung hi Abimeleka luah a zuk thlak a, a lu ruh a keh a." 
Judges9:54 Tichuan ralthuam kengtu tlangval chu a han ko thuai a, a hnenah, ""I khandaih kha phawi la, mi han that theh khai, tichuan miten, 'hmeichhe thah a ni,' mi tih loh nan,"" a ti a. Tin, a tlangval chuan a vit tlang ta zawk a, tichuan a thi ta a." 
Judges9:55 Tin, Israel-hote chuan Abimeleka chu a thi tih an hriat veleh, mi tin, mahni in lamah an haw ta theuh a." 
Judges9:56 Abimeleka a unaute sawmsarih a thah a, a pa chunga a tih dan kawnga a suahsualna kha Pathianin chutiang chuan a lo thungrul ve ta a ni:i sualna zawng zawng kha Pathianin a rawn thungrul ve tha thung a: tin, Jerubaala fapa Jothama anchhia kha an chungah chuan a lo tla ta a ni." 
Judges9:57 i sualna zawng zawng kha Pathianin a rawn thungrul ve tha thung a: tin, Jerubaala fapa Jothama anchhia kha an chungah chuan a lo tla ta a ni." 
Judges10:1 Tin, Abimeleka hnuah chuan Israel hote chan chhuak turin Isakar mi Dodoa fa Pua fapa Tola a lo chhuak a, Ephraim tlang ram Samir khuaah a awm a]" 
Judges10:2 Tin, kum sawmhnih leh kum thum Israelte ro a rel a, tin, a thi a, Samir khuaah an phum a." 
Judges10:3 Chu mi hnuah chuan Gilead mi jaira a l chhuak a, kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih Israelte ro a rel a." 
Judges10:4 Tin, chu mi chuan fapa sawmthum, sabengtung no sawmthum chunga chuang thin mi a nei a, tin, Gilead ramah khaw sawmthum an nei a, chung chu tun thleng hian Havoth-Jair an ti a." 
Judges10:5 Tin, jaira chu a thi a, Kamon khuaah an phum a." 
Judges10:6 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan LALPA mithmuhin thil sual an lo ti leh ta a, Baala-te leh Astarothi, Suria-ho pathiante, Zidon ho pathian te, Moab-ho pathian te, Amona thlah pathian te, Philistia-ho pathiante rawng an lo bawl ta a; tichuan LALPA chu an hawisan a, a rawng an bawl ta lo a." 
Judges10:7 Tichuan LALPA chu Israelte chungah chuan a thinrim ta hle mai a, Philistia-hote hnenah leh Amona thlahte hnenah a hralh ta a." 
Judges10:8 Tin, chu mi kum chuan Israela thlahte ch an timangangin, an hnehchhiah em em mai a: Jorda ral Gilead rama Amor-ho rama Israela thlah awm zawng zawngte chu kum sawm leh kum riat chhung zet an hnehchhiah a." 
Judges10:9 Tin, Amona thlahte chu Juda-ho te, Benjamin-ho te, Ephraima thlahte bei turin Jorda ral an kai a; chutichuan Israel-hote chu mangan namenin an mangang ta lo a." 
Judges10:10 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan, ""Kan Pathian chu kan lo hawisan tak ngei a, Baal-te rawng chu kan lo bawl tak avnaign i chungah thil kan lo tisual ta a ni,"" tiin LALPA an au a." 
Judges10:11 Tin, LALPA'n Israela thlahte hnenah, ""Aigupta-ho lak ata te, Amor-ho lak ata te, Amona thlahte lak ata te, Philistia-ho lak ata te ka chhan chhuak che u a ni lo vem ni?" 
Judges10:12 Zidon-hote Amalek-ho te, Maon-hote pawhin an hnehchhiah che u a; tin, mi au a, tichuan an kut ata chu ka chhan chhuak che u a." 
Judges10:13 Nimahsela nangnin mi hawisan a, pathian dangte rawng chu in bawl ta zawk a: chuvangin ka chanchhuak tawh lo ang che u." 
Judges10:14 In thlann pathiante chu au ta che u: anni chuan in mangan hunah chuan chhan chhuak che u ang hmiang,"" a ti a." 
Judges10:15 Tin, Israela thalhte chuan LALPA hnenah, ""Thil kan lo tisual ta ani: nangin tha i tih ang angin kan chungah rawn ti langin; a chhan erawh chu vawiinah hian khawngaih takin min rawn chhan chhuak hram rawh khai,"" an ti a." 
Judges10:16 Tichuan an zinga hnam dang pathiante chu an dah bo vek a, LALPA rawng chu an bawl ta a: tin, Israel-hote manganna avang chuan a rilru a lungngai ta em em a." 
Judges10:17 Tin, Amona thlahte chu an pung khawm a, Gilead ramah chuan an va inkulh a. Tin, Israela thlahte chu an inkhawm ve chiam a, Mizpe khuaah an inkulh a.Tin, mipuiho, Gilead rama mi lianhote chu an inbia a, ""Amona thlahte bei tan tur hi tu nge awm le? Gilead rama awm zawng zawngte chunga hotuah a awm ang,"" an ti a." 
Judges10:18 Tin, mipuiho, Gilead rama mi lianhote chu an inbia a, ""Amona thlahte bei tan tur hi tu nge awm le? Gilead rama awm zawng zawngte chunga hotuah a awm ang,"" an ti a." 
Judges11:1 Tin, Gilead mi Jephtha chu mi chak huaisen a ni a, nawhchizuar fapa a ni: tin, Gileada chuan Jephtha chu ahring a." 
Judges11:2 Tin, Gileada nupui chuan fapate a hrinsak a; tin, anupuia fapate chu an lo puitlin chuan Jephtah chu an hnawtchhuak a, a hnenah, ""Nang zawngin kan pa in ro i luah thei lo ang: hmeichhe dang laka fa i ni si a,"" an ti a." 
Judges11:3 Chutichuan Jephtha chu a unaute ho hnen ata chu atlan bo a, Tob ramah a awm ta a: tin, Jephtha hnenah chuan mi ho tak takte an cheng khawm a, an zui thin a." 
Judges11:4 Tin, heti hi ani a, nakin deuhvah chuan Amona thlahte chuan Israel-hote chu an do ta a." 
Judges11:5 Tin, heti hi ani a, Amona thlahte chuan Israel-hote chu an han do chuan, Gilead-ho upate chu Tob rama mi Jephtha hruai turin an kal chhuak ta a." 
Judges11:6 Jephtha hnenah chuan, ""Amona thlahte kan beih theihna turin kan hotu berah lo awm ta che,"" an ti a." 
Judges11:7 Tin, Jephthan Gilead-ho upate hnenah chuan, ""Mi hua a, ka pa in ata chu mi hnawtchhuak a ni lo'm ni? Enga ti nge in mangan veleh ka hnena in lo kal hi? a ti a." 
Judges11:8 Tin, Gilead-ho upate chuan Jephtha hnenah, ""Chuvang tak chuan a lawm tunah hian i lam kan lo hawi leh, Amona thlahte ve bei tura kan hnena i kal theihna turin; tin, Gilead rama awm zawng zawngte chungah kan hotuah i awm ang,"" an ti a." 
Judges11:9 Tin,Jephtan Gilead-ho upate hnenah chuan,""Amona thlahte bei tura mi hruai hawn leh a, tin, LALPA'n anni chu mi pek chuan in hotuah ka awm tak meuh ang maw?"" a ti a." 
Judges11:10 Tin, Gilead-ho upate chuan Jephtah hnenah, ""LALPA chu kan karah hretu ani ang; i thu ang angin kan ti ngei ngei ang,"" an ti a." 
Judges11:11 Chutichuan Jephtha chu Gilead-ho upate hnenah chuan a kal ta a, tin, mite chuan hotu atan leh a puipa ber atan an lo siam ta a: tin, Jephtha chuan Mizpe khuaah LALPA hmaan thu engkim a sawi ta a." 
Judges11:12 Tin, Jephtahn Amona thlahte lal hnenah chuan, ""Eng tiziaa hetia kan ram rawn bei tura ka hnena lo kal mai nge maw i nih le?"" tiin palai a ti r a." 
Judges11:13 Tin, Amona thlahte lal chuan, ""Israel-ho Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah lai khan ka ram an lak avang alawm, Arnon atanga Jabok leh Jorda thlengin: chuvangin chun gramte chu tlang takin mi rawn pe leh mai rawh,"" tiin Jephtha palaite chu a lo chhang a." 
Judges11:14 Tichuan Hjephthan Amona thlahte lal hnenah palai a tir leh a: 
Judges11:15 a hnenah, ""Jephthan heti hian at i e, 'Israel-hote Moab ram an laksak lo a, Amona thlahte ram pawh an laksak hek lo:" 
Judges11:16 Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuahna Tuifinriat Sen thlenga thlaler kha an kal tlang a, Kades kha an thlen khan," 
Judges11:17 Israel-hoin Edom lal hnenah, Khawngaihtakin i ram kan kal tlang ang e, tiin palai a tir a: nimahsela Edom lal chuan a lo ngaithla duh lo a. Tin, chutiang bawkin Moab lal hnenah a tir leh a: nimahsela a lo remti lo va: tichuan Israel-hote chu Kades-ah an awm ta a." 
Judges11:18 Tichuan thlaler chu an kal tlang a, Edom ram leh Moab ram chu an kal hual a, Moab ram chhak pampangah an kal a, Arnon lehlam pangah awmhmun an khuar a; Moahb ram chhungah zang an lut hauh lo a ni, Arnon chu Moab ramri chin a ni si a." 
Judges11:19 Tin, Israel-hoin Amor-ho lal Sihona, Hesbon lal hnenah palai an tir a; Israel-ho chuan a hnenah, kan hmun lama kalna'n khawngaih takin i ram kan kal tlang ang e, ant i a." 
Judges11:20 Nimahsela Sihona chuan Israel-ho chu a ram kal tlang atan chuan a ring zo lo va: Sihona chuan a mite zawng zawng chu a khawm a, Jahaz khuaah a inkulh a, Israel-ho chu a bei ta a." 
Judges11:21 Tin, LALPA, Israel-te Pathianin Sihona leh ahote zawng zawng chu Israel-hote kutah a pe a, an that ta a: chutichuan Israel-hote chuan chu mi ram Amor-hote awmna ram zang zang chu an nei ta vek a." 
Judges11:22 Tichuan Amor-ho ramri chin zawng zawng Arnon atanga Jabok thleng rakin an nei ta vek a ni. 
Judges11:23 Chutichuan LALPA, Israelte Pathianin a mi Israel-hote hmaah Amor o chu a chhuhsak a ni a, nangin i neihsak theih thu em mi?" 
Judges11:24 I pathian Kemosan i puala a lo ruatsak che chu i nei dawn a ni lo'm ni? Chutichuan LALPA kan Pathianin kan hmaa a chhuhsakte chu kan nei ang. 
Judges11:25 Moab lal Zipora fapa Balaka aiin i chak zawk em ni ani chuan Israel-hote kha a chawk buaiin, a do ngai em ni?" 
Judges11:26 Israel-ho Hesbon-ah leh a khawperah te, Aroer leh a khawperah te, Arnon ramri dep khawpui zawng zawngahte chuan kum zathum zet an awm lai khan, eng vanga la loa lo la awm reng nge i nih?" 
Judges11:27 Chuvangin i chungah hian thil engmah ka tisual lo e, nangmah zawk hian mi beih i tum avangin ka chungah hian thil i tisual ani e: LALPA Roreltu chuan tunah hian Israel thlahte leh Amona thlahte kara thu chu ngaihtuah rawh se,' a ti,"" tiin." 
Judges11:28 Nimahsela Amona thlahte lalchuan Jephtha thuchah chua lo ngaithla duh lo a. 
Judges11:29 Chutichuan LALPA thlarau chu Jephtha chungah a lo thleng a, tichuan Gilead leh Mansea ram a kal tang a, Gilead rama Mizpe a kal tlang a, tin, Gilead ram Mizpe atang chuan Amona thlahte hnenah chan a kal zel a." 
Judges11:30 Tin, Jephthan LALPA hnenah chhia a chham a, ""Amona thlahte hi ka kuta mi pek takmeuh chuan," 
Judges11:31 heti hi a ni ang a, Amona thlahteho hnen atanga ralmuanga ka hawn leh hun chuan engpawh ka kawngka atanga mi rawn hmuak hmasa ber paiang chu LALPA ta tur ani ang a, halral thilhlan atan ka hmang ngei ngei ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges11:32 Chutichuan Jephtha chu Amona thlahte beit ur hchuan a kal ta a; tin, LALPA'n a kutah a pe ta a." 
Judges11:33 Tin, Arorer atanga Mintih thlengin a bei zel a, khaw sawmhnih zet, tin, Abelkeramim thlenign a that chiam a. Chutichuan Amona thlahte chu Israela thlahte hmaah chuan an lo tlawm ta a." 
Judges11:34 Tin, Jeptha chu a awmna Mizpe khuaa a in chu a thleng ta a, tin, ngai teh, a fanu chuan khuangtete nen lamin a lo hmuak a: a fa neih chhun a ni a; amah lo chu fapa leh fanu dang reng reng anei lo." 
Judges11:35 Tin, heti hi ani a, amah a han hmuh veleh chuan, a puante a pawtthler a, ""E khai, ka fanu! Mi titlawm ta hle mai a, mi timangangtu zinga mi i ni ta: LALPA lamah ka ka ka lo ang ta si a, chu chu zuk leh thei ka ni ta lo,"" a ti a." 
Judges11:36 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Ka pa, LALPA lamah i ka zu lo ang ta chia; i kaa i thu chhuak ang ngeiin ka chungah i ti tur alawm; LALPA'n i hmelma Amona thlahte chung ngeiah chuan i phuba zuk la ta si a,"" a ti a." 
Judges11:37 Tin, a pa hnenah chuan, ""Hetiang hian ka ti ang e: thla hnih chhung chu keimahin ka han tal hrang ang a, tlangahte ka han rawl ang a, ka nulatna hi ka han sun ang e, kei leh ka thianteho nen hian,"" a ti a." 
Judges11:38 Tin, ani chuan, ""Kal ta che,"" a ti a. Tichuan thla hnih thang turin a tir a: tin, a chhuak ta a, amah leh a thianteho nen chuan, tin, tlangahte chuan a nulatna chu a han sun a." 
Judges11:39 Tin, heti hi ani a, thla hnih hnuah chuan a pa hnenanah a haw leh ta a, ani chuan chhia a lo chham tawh ang khan a chungah a ti ta a: mipa tumahinan pawl lo.Chutichuan Israel-hote zingah chuan Israela fanuten Gilead mi Jephtha fanu chu kum tin ni li sun danah an lo nei ta a," 
Judges11:40 Chutichuan Israel-hote zingah chuan Israela fanuten Gilead mi Jephtha fanu chu kum tin ni li sun danah an lo nei ta a," 
Judges12:1 Tin, Ephraim-hote chu an pungkhawm chiam a, hmar lam panin an kal a; tin, Jephtha hnenah, ""Engati nge Amona thlahte bei tura i lo kal phei a, i hnena kal tura min rawn sawm ve loh ni? I inah kan hal khung dawn che a ni,"" an ti a." 
Judges12:2 Tin, Jephthan an hnenah, ""Amona thlahteho hi ka mite nen theihtawp chhuahin kan bei ani a; ka chah lai che u khan an kut ata mi chhan chhuak si lo." 
Judges12:3 Tichuan nangnin mi chhanchhuak duh lo tih ka hriat veleh, thih dawn miah loin ka tang a, Amona thlahte bei turin ka va thawk a, tichuan LALPA'n anniho chu ka kutah mi pe ta a: chuvangin eng atan nge mi bei tura vawiinah hian in lo thawh ni?"" a ti a." 
Judges12:4 Chutichuan Jephtha chuan Gilead mi zawng zawng chu a khawm chiam a, Ephraim ho chu a bei ta a: tin, Gilead-hote chuan Ephraim-ho chu an that ta chiam a, ""Nangni Ephraim hnam tlan boho, nangni Gilead-ho, Ephraim-ho zingah leh Manase-ho zinga tel ve mai maih"" an tih thin avangin." 
Judges12:5 Tin, Gilead-hote chuan Ephraim-ho dep Jorda lui kaite chu an lo man a: tin, heti hi ani a, Ephriama-ho tlan bote chuan, ""Ka lo kai ang e,"" an tih apiangin, Gilead-hote chuan an hnenah, ""Ephraim mi i ni em?"" an lo ti zel a. Annin, ""Ni lo ve,"" a lo tih chuan," 
Judges12:6 A hnenah, ""Shiboleth' han ti teh,"" an lo ti a, tin, ani chuan, ""Siboleth"" a lo ti zawk thin a; a lam fiah ve thiam si thin lo a; tichuan an man a, Jorda lui kaiahte chuan an lo that zel a: tichuan chu mi tm chua Ephraim-ho chu singli leh sanghnih an that a." 
Judges12:7 Tin, Jephtha chuan Israel-ho chungah kum ruk ro a rel a. Tichuan Gilead mi Jephtha chu athi a, Gilead rama khaw pakhatah an phum ta a." 
Judges12:8 Tin, a hnuah chuan Beth-lehem khuaa mi Ibzanan Israel-ho chungah ro a rel a." 
Judges12:9 Chu mi chuan fapa sawmthum a nei a, fanu sawmthum ram dangah a kaltir a, tin, a fapate tan chuan ram danga mi fanu sawmthum a hruaisak bawk a. Tin, Israel-ho chungah kum sarih ro a rel a." 
Judges12:10 Tin, Ibzana ch a thi a, Beth-lehem khuaah an phum a." 
Judges12:11 Tin, a hnuah chuan Zebulun mi Elonan Israel-ho chungah ro a rel a; Israel-ho chungah kum sawm ro a rel a." 
Judges12:12 Ti Zebulun miElona chu a thi a, Zebulun rama Aijalon khuaah an phum a." 
Judges12:13 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan Pirathon mi, Hilela fapa Abdonan Israel-ho chungah ro a rel a" 
Judges12:14 Chu mi chuan fapa sawmli leh tupa sawmthum sabengtung no sawmsarih chunga chuang thin mi a nei a: ani chuan Israel-ho chungah kum riat ro a rel a.Tin, Pirathon mi, Hilela fapa Abdona chu a thi a, Ephraim ram, Amalek mite tlang ramah Pirathon khuaah an phum ta a." 
Judges12:15 Tin, Pirathon mi, Hilela fapa Abdona chu a thi a, Ephraim ram, Amalek mite tlang ramah Pirathon khuaah an phum ta a." 
Judges13:1 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan LALPA mithmuhin thil sual an lo ti leh ta a; tichuan LALPA'n Philistian-ho kutah kum sawmli a awmtir a." 
Judges13:2 tin, Zora khuaah Dan hnam mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Manoa a ni a; a nupui chu a ching a, nau reng reng a pai ngai lo a." 
Judges13:3 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh hmeichhe hnenah chuan a rawn inlar a, a hnenah chuan, ""Ngaiteh khai, i ching a, nau reng reng i la pai ngai lo va: nimahsela i rai ang a, fapa i hring ang." 
Judges13:4 Chutichuan fimkhur rawh khai, uain leh zu reng reng in suh la, ei thiang lo thil reng reng pawh ei hauh suh ang che;" 
Judges13:5 ngai teh, i rai ang a, fapa i hring dawn si a; a luah chuan bakmehna reng reng rawih a ni lo ang: naupang chu chhula a awm lai atnagin Pathian tan Nazarit mi a n dawn si a: ani chuan Israel-hote hi Philistia mie kut ata chu a chhanchhuak tan ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges13:6 Chutichuan hmeichhia chuan a pasal hnenah, ""Pathian mi mi pakhat ka hnenah a lo kal a, a hmel chu vantirhkoh hmel ang, tihbaiawm tak a ni; khawi lam mi nge anih ka zawt hlei lo a, ani chuan a hming mi hrilh bawk lo va:" 
Judges13:7 amaherawhchu ka hnenah, 'Ngai teh i rai ang a, fapa i hring ang; chutichuan uain leh zu reng reng in suh la, ei thian glo thil reng reng pawh ei hauh suh ang che: naupang chu chhula a awm lai atanga a thih thlengin Pathian tana Nazarit mi a ni dawn si a,' a ti a,"" tiin a sawi a." 
Judges13:8 Chutichuan Manoa chuan LALPA hnenah a ngen chiam a, a hnenah, ""Aw LALPA, khawngaih takin Pathian mi i rawn tirha kha ka hnenah lo kal leh se la, naupang lo piang tur ch engtin nge ka nt ihang min han zirtir rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Judges13:9 Tin, Pathianin Manoa thusawi chu alo ngaithla a; tin, hmeichhia chu phula a thut laiin a hnenah Pathian vantirhkoh chu a lo kal leh a: a pasal Manoa erawh chu a hnenah a awm ve lo a." 
Judges13:10 Tin, hmeichhia chu hmanhmawh takin a tlan ta thuai a, a pasal chu a va hrilh a, a hnenah,""Ngai teh, hman nia ka hnena lo kala kha ka hnenah a rawn inlar leh ta e,""a ti a." 
Judges13:11 Tichuan Manoa chu a tho a, anupui chu a zui a, chu mi hnen chu a va thleng a, a hnenah, ""Nangmah hi em ni hmeichhe hnena thu sawitu chu?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ni e,"" a ti a." 
Judges13:12 Tin, Manoa chuan, ""I thu ang zel chuan lo thleng rawh se: naupang awm dan tur chu engtin nge ni ang a, eng nge ni a thawh tur chu ni ang le?"" a ti a." 
Judges13:13 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chuan Manoa hnenah, ""Hmeichhe hnena ka sawi zawng zawng kha, ngaihtuah tha mai rawh se." 
Judges13:14 Grep hruia m reng reng chu ei tur ani lo a, uain leh zu reng reng a in tur ani lo, ei thian glo thil reng reng pawh a ei tur a ni lo; thu ka pek tak zawng zawng kha vawng tha rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Judges13:15 Tin, Manoan LALPA vantirhkoh hnenah chuan, ""Khawngaih takin kan chelh ang chia, kel no kan han buatsaih sak rih ang che,"" a ti a." 
Judges13:16 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chuan Manoa hnenah, ""Min chelh mah la, i chaw zawng ka ei lo ang: tin, halral thilhlan tura buatsaih i nih chuan LALPA hnenah i hlan tur a ni,"" a ti a. Manoa chuan ani chu LALPA vantirhkoh ani tih a hre si lo a." 
Judges13:17 Tin, Manoan LALPA vantirhkoh hnenah chuan, ""Tunge i hming, i thusawi ang ngeia a lo theln huna kan chawimawit heihna tur chein?"" a ti a." 
Judges13:18 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chuan a hnenah, ""Engati nge ka hming mi zawh? Sawi mi a ni hlei nem,"" a ti a." 
Judges13:19 Chutichuan Manoan kel no chu ei tur thilhlan nen a la a, lungpui chungah LALPA hnenah ahlan a: tin, vantirhkoh chuan thilmak tak a ti ta a, Manoa leh anupui chuan an thlir reng a." 
Judges13:20 Heti hi ani a, maicham atanga meialh chu van lama a chhoh lai chuan, LALPA vantirhkoh chu maichama meialhah chuan a chho ta si a: Manoa leh anupui chuan an thlir reng a; leiah an bawkkhup ta der a." 
Judges13:21 Amaherawhchu LALPA vantirhkoh chu Manoa leh a nupui hnenah chuan a rawn inlar leh ta lo. Tichuan Manoa chuan LALPA vantirhkoh a ni tih a hre ta a. 
Judges13:22 Tin, Manoa chuan a nupui hnenah, ""Pathian kan hmuh tak avang hian kan thi ngei ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges13:23 Nimahsela anupui chuan a hnenah, ""LALPA'n min tihhlum a tumte chuan halral thilhlante leh ei tur thilhlan kan hlante kha a chhang duh hlei nang, he'ng ang zawng zawngte pawh hi min entir lo ang a, he'ng ang thilte pawh hi tun tumah min hrilh hek lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges13:24 Tin, hmeichhia chuan fapa chu a hring ta a, a hmingah Samsona an sa a; tin, nausen chu a lo sei lian a, LALPA'n mal a sawmsak a.Tin, Zora leh Estaol inkara Mahane-dan hmunah chuan LALPA thlarauin a rawn khawih harh tan ta a." 
Judges13:25 Tin, Zora leh Estaol inkara Mahane-dan hmunah chuan LALPA thlarauin a rawn khawih harh tan ta a." 
Judges14:1 Tin, Samsona chu Timna khuaah chuan a zuk kal a, Timna khuaah chuan Philistia-ho fanute zinga mi hmeichhe pakhat hi a zuk hmu a." 
Judges14:2 Tin, a lo hawn chhoh leh chuan a nu leh a pa chu a hrilh a. ""Timna khuah, Philistia-ho fanute zinga mi hmeichhe pakhat ka hmu a: ka nupuiah mi neihsak rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Judges14:3 Tichuan a nu leh a pa chuan a hnenah, ""I unaute fanute zingah emaw, ka nc hite zawng zawng zingah hian emaw hmeichhia na awm hauh lo em ni le, Philistia-ho serhtan lohte zinga nupui tur i zuk zawn tak mai?"" an ti a. Tin, Samsona chuan a pa hnenah, ""MI neihsak mai rawh; ka duh em a sin maw;e,"" a ti a." 
Judges14:4 Nimahsela a nu leh a pa chuan chu chu LALPA tih ani tih an hre lo va: Philistia-ho chungah remchang a zawng a ni si a. Chutih lai chuan Philistia-hote chuan Israel- hote chungah ro an rel a. 
Judges14:5 Chutichuan Samsona chu a nu leh a pa nen Timna khuaah chuan an zuk kal a, Timna khuaa Grep hmun hi an zu thlang e: tin, ngai teh, sakeibaknei vanglai hian a lo rum a." 
Judges14:6 Tin, LALPA thlarau chu a chungah nasa takin a lo thleng a, tichuan kel n pawh sawm ang maiin apawt sawm ta mai a, engmah a keng si lo va: nimahsla a thiltih chu a nu leh a pa a hrilh lo." 
Judges14:7 Tin, a zuk kal a, hmeichia chu a kawm a; Samsona chuan a duh hle mai a." 
Judges14:8 Tin, nakin deuhvah chuan zuk neih tumin a kal leh a, sakeibaknei ruang chu en tumin a va peng a: tin, ngai teh, sakeibaknei taksaah chuan khuai hi alo awm mur mur a, a zu pawh a lo awm a." 
Judges14:9 Tin, chu chu a la a, a kal leh ta a, a kal pahin a ei zel a, tin, a nu leh a pa hnen chu a han thleng a, a pe ve a, anni pawh chuan an ei a: amaherawhchu khawzu chu sakeibaknei taksaa mi a lak ani tih engmah a hrilh lo a." 
Judges14:10 Tin, a pa chu hmeichhe hnenah chuan a zuk kal a: tin, chutah chuan Samsonan ruai a theh a; chu chu tlangvalte tih dan ani reng a." 
Judges14:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, amah an hmuh veleh, a hnena awm ve turin thiam sawmthum an hruai a." 
Judges14:12 Tin, Samsona chuan an hnenah, ""Tunah hian thu khirh ka zawt teh ang che u le: ruaitheh ni, ni sarih chhunga mi hrilhfiah theih a, in hriat chhuah theih chuan puan zai sin silh sawmthum leh inthlakna puan sawmthum ka pe ang che u;" 
Judges14:13 amaherawhchu mi hrilhfiah theih loh chuan, puan zai sin silh sawmthum leh inthlakna puan sawmthu mi pe tur a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""I thu khirh chu han sawi teh le, kan lo ngaithla ang e,"" an ti a." 
Judges14:14 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Eitu ata ei tur lo chhuak a, Chak tak ata thil thlum tak lo chhuak, tih hi,"" a ti a. Tin, a ni thum chhungin chu thu khrih chu an hrilhfiah thei ta lo a." 
Judges14:15 Tichuan heti hi a ni a, ani sarih ni chuan Samsona nupui hnenah, ""I pasal hi he thu khrih min hrilhfiah turin thlem rawh, chutilo chuan nang leh i pa chhungte hi kan hal dawn a ni: min tikawnkaw turin a ni maw min sawm? A ni lo'm ni?"" an ti a." 
Judges14:16 Tichuan Samsona nupui chu a hmaah a tap a, ""Mi lo hmangaih loin, mi hua a lo nih zawk hi le: ka chiteho lem thu khirh i zawt a, kei zawng mi hrilhfiah ve si lo a,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnenah ""Ngai teh, ka nu leh ka pa pawh ka hrilh lo a, nang ka hrilh ang che maw?"" a ti a." 
Judges14:17 Tin, an ruaitheh, ni sarih chhung zang chuan a hmaah a tap a tap mai a: tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan a ngen tlut tltu avangin a hrilh ta nge nge a: tin, ani chuan a thu khirh chu a chiteho a hrilh ve a a." 
Judges14:18 Tin, a ni sarih ni, ni tlak hmain chu mi khuaa mite chuan a hnenah, ""Khawizu aia thlum zawk eng nge ni le? Tin, sakeibaknei aia chak zawk eng nge ni le?"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Ka bawngla hian lei let suh u la chuan, Ka thukhirh hi in hre chhuah hauh lo ang le,"" a ti a." 
Judges14:19 Tin, LALPA thlarau chu a chungah nasa takin a lo thleng a, tin, Askelon khuaah a zuk kal a, mi sawmthum a that a, an thuam a hlihsak a, inthlakna puante chu thu khirh hrilhfiahtute chu a pe ta a. Tichuan a thin a rim ta em em mai a, a pa in lamah a chho ta a.Nimahsela Samsona nupui chu thian atana a hman, a thiana kha an lo pe ta mai a." 
Judges14:20 Nimahsela Samsona nupui chu thian atana a hman, a thiana kha an lo pe ta mai a." 
Judges15:1 Nimahsela heti hi ani a, a nakin deuhvah chuan, buh seng hun lai hian, Samsona chuan kel no kengin a nupui a va kan a; ""Pindan chhungah sawn ka nupui hnenah ka va lut dawn e,"" a ti a. Nimahsela apain a luh a lo phal ta lo a." 
Judges15:2 Tin, a pa chuan, ""Amah hi i haw hle emaw ka ti a; chuvangin i thian ka lo pe ta a ni: a nau hi amah aiin a hmel a tha zawk ani lawm maw ni? A aiah khawngaih takin nei zawk mai rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
Judges15:3 Tin, Samsonan an hnenah, ""Tun tum chu Philistia-te pawi khawih mah i la dem ka kai lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges15:4 Chutichuan Samsona chuan sihal zathum a va man a, meicher a la a, an mei leh mei chu a zawm a, an mei inkar theuhvah chuan meichher chu a dah theuh a." 
Judges15:5 Tin, meichherte chu a han hal veleh chuan Philistia-ho buh ding zingah chuan a tlan luhtir chiam a, buhphal leh buh la dingte chu, oliv hmunte nen lam a kang ta vek a." 
Judges15:6 Chutichuan Philistia-hote chuan, ""Tu tih nge maw ni le?' an ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Timna khuaa mi makpa Samsona tih a ni, a nupui a chhuhsak a, a thianpa kha a neihtir avangin,"" an ti a. Tin, Philistia hote chuan an pafain an han hal hlum ta a." 
Judges15:7 Tin, Samsonan an hnenah, ""Hetianga in tih chuan in chungah phuba ka la ve phawt ang a, chu mi zawhah chuan ka ti tawh lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges15:8 Tichuan a bei vak a, a that chiam a: tin, a chhuk thla a, Etam lungpui keh karah a awm ta a." 
Judges15:9 Chutichuan Philistia-ho chu an han chho a, Judai ramah chuan an han inkulh a. Lehi hmunah an inzar chiam a." 
Judges15:10 Tin, Judai rama mite chuan, ""Engtizia nge min bei tura in lo kal mai?"" an ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Samsona phuara kan chunga a tih ang bawka a chungah ti ve turin kan lo kal a ni,"" an ti a." 
Judges15:11 Chutichuan Judai rama mi, mi sangthum Etam lungpui keh karah chuan an zuk kal a, Samsona hnenah, ""Philistian-ho hi kan chunga roreltute an ni tih i hre na nge? Eng tiziaa hetianga kan chunga thil rawn ti ta mai nge i nih le?"" an ti a." 
Judges15:12 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Nangmah hi phuar a, Philistia-ho kuta pe turin kan lo chhuk a ni,"" an ti a. Tin Samsonan an hnenah, ""Nangni chuan mi tihlum lo turin ka hnenah chhia chham rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Judges15:13 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Tihlum lo e; amaherawhchu kan phuar tlat ang chia, an kutah kan pe dawn che a ni: thah zawng kan that hauh lo ang che,"" tiin an sawi a. Tichuan hruizen thar pahnihin an phuar a, lungpui ata chu an hruai chho ta a." 
Judges15:14 Lehi hmun a lo thlen chuan Philistia hoin an lo hmuak a, an lo au dur dur a; tin, LALPA thlarau chu a chungah nasa takin a lo thleng a, tichuan a ban phuarna hruizen chu ziza zai kang chat ang mai a lo ni ta a, a phuarnate chu a kut ata a tla ta tawp mai a." 
Judges15:15 Tin, sabengtung khabe ruh tharlam hi a hmu a, a han ban a, a la a, chu chuan mi sangkhat a vawhlum a." 
Judges15:16 Tin, Samsona chuan, Sabengtung khabe ruhin ka tiang pawng ther thur mai le, Sabengtung khabe ruhin mi sangkhat ka vaw hlum e,"" a ti a." 
Judges15:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, thu a sawi zawh veleh chuan a khabe ruh ken chu a paih ta a; tin, chu hmun chu Ramath-lehi an lo ti ta a." 
Judges15:18 Tin, a tui a lo hal ta em em mai a, LALPA a au a, ""Nangin i chhiahhlawh kut hi hmangin ropui takin mi lo chhan chhuak ta a: tunah hian tuihalin ka thi mai dawnin, serhtan lohho kutah hian ka tlu lut mai dawn em ni ang le?"" a ti a." 
Judges15:19 Nimahsela Pathianin Lehi hmuna khuarkhurum awm chu a han tikhichat ta phuk a, tin, tui a lo chik chhuak ta a; tin, chu chu a han in veleh a rilru a lo chak leh ta a, a lo harh ta huai a: chutichuan chu mi hmingah chuan En-hakore an ti ta, tun thlengin Lehi hmunah chan a la awm reng a.Tichuan Philistia-ho hun lai chuan Israelte chungah kum sawmhnih ro a rel a ni." 
Judges15:20 Tichuan Philistia-ho hun lai chuan Israelte chungah kum sawmhnih ro a rel a ni. 
Judges16:1 Tin, Samsona chu Gaza khuaah a kal a, chutah chuan nawhchizuar hi a va hmu a, a pawl ta a," 
Judges16:2 Tin, ""Samsona hetah a lo kal e,"" tiin, Gaza mite chu an hrilh a. Tichuan an hual ta a, khawpui kulh kawngka bulah chuan zna khuain an chang a, zankhua chuan an ngawi thiap a, ""Khua lo var teh phawt se, tichuankan that dawn nia,"" an ti a." 
Judges16:3 Tin, Samsona chu zan lai thlengin a mu a, tin, zan laiah chuan a tho a, khawpui kulh kawngkharte leh a ban pahnih chu a chelh a, a kalhnate nen lam chuan a phawi chhuak vek a, a kovah a pu a, Hebron zawn tlang chhipah a pu chho ta luah mai a." 
Judges16:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, nakin deuhvah chuan Sorek ruama mi hmeichhe pakhat a ngaizawng ta a, a hming chu Delili a ni." 
Judges16:5 Tin, Philistia-ho mi liante chu a hnenah an han chho a, a hnenah, ""Amah chu kan hneh a, phuara kan sawisak theihna'n a chakna chhan hriat tumin thlem rawh khai: tichuan kan zavai hian tangka sangkhat leh zakhat kan pe theuh ang che,"" an ti a." 
Judges16:6 Chutichuan Delili chuan Samsona hnenah, ""I chak viauna chhan hi mi hrilh teh khai, engtin nge sawisak turin phuar theih i nih ang?"" a ti a." 
Judges16:7 Tin, Samsonan a hnenah, ""Thal hrui thar, la ro hlek lo pasarihin mi phuar se la, tichuan ka chak lo ang a, mi dang ang mai bawk ka ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges16:8 Chutichuan Philistia-ho mi liante chuan thalhrui thar pasarih, la ro hlek lote chu an han pe a, chung chuan an phuar ta a." 
Judges16:9 Pindan chhung rilah changrutute a dah a. Tichuan a hnenah, ""Samson, Philistia-hoin an rawn bei dawn che, "" a ti a. Tin, thlahruite chu meiin ziza hrui tawm a kang chat ang mai hian a tichat ta mai a. Chutichuan a chakna chhan chu hriat ani lo." 
Judges16:10 Tin, Delili chuan Samsona hnenah, ""Ngai teh, mi tihder a, dawt mi hrilh a nih hi: engtia phuar theih tur nge i nih mi hrilh tawh rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
Judges16:11 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Hruizen thar, la hman hlek lohin mi han phuar mai sela, tichuan ka chak lo ang a, midang ang mai bawk ka ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges16:12 Chutichuan Delili chuan hruizen thar a la a, a phuar ta a, tin, a hnenah, ""Samson, Philistia hoin an rawnbei dawn a che,"" a ti a. Pindan chhung rilah chuan a changrutute kha an awm a. Tin, a kut phuarna chu lazai tihchah ang maiin a han tichat ta a." 
Judges16:13 Tin, Delili chuan Samsona hnenah, ""Mi i la tihderin, dawt mi la hrilh cheu a nih hi: engtia phuar theih tur nge i nih mi hrilh teh khai,"" a ti a. Tin, a hnenah, ""Ka sam phiar sarih hi puanah tah hnan la ani mai,"" a ti a." 
Judges16:14 Tin, kilhnain a kilh bet tlat a, a hnenah, ""Samson, Philistia-hoin an rawn bei dawn ac he,"" a ti a. Tichuan a mu chu a han harh a, puanbu kilh behna leh puanbu chawp chuan a tithlawh ta vek mai a."
