Judges16:15 Tin, a hnenah, ""I thinlung hi mi pe hlek siloin, eng tiziaa, ""Ka hmangaih che,"" ti thei nge maw i nih le? Hei vawi thum tlawng i mi tihderhna chu i tilang tawh ani a, i chak viauna chhan hi mi la hrilh ta lo fo mai a,"" a ti a." 
Judges16:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni tin, a ngen tlut tlut a, a thlem a tlem thin avangin thihna khawp hialin a rilru a lo mangang ta a." 
Judges16:17 Tichuan a rilru zawng zawng chu a hrilh ta vek a, ahnenah, ""Ka luah hian bakmehna reng reng rawih a la ni ngai lo a; ka nu chhula ka awm lai atanga Pathian tana Nazarit mia lo awm ka ni a: tuinah hian lo inmet ta i la, ka chakna chu a bo vek mai ang, tichuan ka chak lo ang a, mi dang ang mai bawk ka ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges16:18 Tin, a rilru zawng zawng chu a hrilh ta vek tih Delili chuan a hriat veleh Philistia-ho mi liatne chu, ""Lo chho leh phawt rawh u, a rilru zawng zawng chu mi hrilh vek tawh e,"" tiin a chah ta hlawm a. Chutichuan Philistia-ho mi liante chu a hnenah chuan an han kal a, tangka chu an keng a." 
Judges16:19 Tin, a mal chungah a muthilhtir a; tin, mi a ko a, a sam phiar sarih chu a hlep thla ta vek a; tichuan a sawisa tan ta a, tin, a chakna chu a bo ta vek mai a." 
Judges16:20 Tin, ""Samson, Philistia-hoin an rawn bei dawn a che,"" a han ti a. Tin, a mu chu a han harh a, ""Ni dang ang bawk khan ka chhuak leh mai ang a, ka tal chhuak leh mai ang chu,"" a ti a. Nimahsela LALPA'n a kalsan tawh tih reng reng a hre lo a." 
Judges16:21 Tin, Philistia-ho chuan an man a, a mit an kher chhuahsak a; tin, Gaza khuaah an chukpui a, dar kawlte an buntir ta a; lung inah buh a rawt sawm thin a." 
Judges16:22 Nimahsela a lu meh kha a lo chawr leh ta a. 
Judges16:23 Tin, Philistia-ho mi liante chu an pathian Dagona hnena inthawina ropui tak hlan tur leh inchawk hlim turin an pung khawm chiam a: ""Kan pathianin kan hmelmapa Samsona min pe tawh alawm,"" an ti a." 
Judges16:24 Tin, mipuite chuan an han hmuh chuan an pathian chu an fak a, ""Kan pathianin kan hmelmapa leh kan ram tichhetu, mi tam tak min thattupa chu kan kutah min pe ta alawm,"" an ti a." 
Judges16:25 Tin, heti hi ani a, an thinlung a hlim lai tak chuan, ""Samsona chu ennawm atan han ko teh u,"" an ti a. Tichuan Samsona chu lung in ata an va ko chhuak a; tin, a hmaah chuan ennawmah a awm ta a: ban leh abn inkarah hian an dintir a." 
Judges16:26 Tin, Samsona chuan a kaitu naupang hnenah, ""He mi in dotu ban hi mi han dehtir teh khai, ka han ngheng teh ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges16:27 Chu mi in chu mipa leh hmeichhiain an khat mup mai a; Philistia-ho mi lian zawng zawng chu chutah chuan an awm vek a; tin, Samsona ennawma thlirtute chu in chungah chuan mipa leh hmeichhia sang thum lai an awm a." 
Judges16:28 Tin, Samsona chuan LALPA a au a, ""Aw LALPA pathian, khawngaih takin mi han hre reng langin, khawngaih takin tun tumah chauh hian mi han tichak la, aw Pathian, ka mit khinghnih phuba hi Philistia-hote chungah hian ka han la thaui teh ang,"" a ti a." 
Judges16:29 Tin, Samsona chuan chu mi in dotu ber sut pahnih chu a han dek a, a kut dinglamin pakhat," 
Judges16:30 tin, Samsona chuan, ""Philistia-ho hi ka han thihchilh teh ang,"" a ti a. Tichuan a theihtawpin a kun vak a; tin, mi liante leh mipui a chhunga awm zawng zawngte chu in chuan a delh ta chiam mai a. Chutichuan a dam laia a tihhlumte ai chuan a thihchilhte chu an tam zawk a.Tichuan a unaute leh a pa chhungte zawng zawng chu an lo chhuk a, an la a, an zawn chho a, Zora leh Estaol inkara a pa Manoa phumna hmunah an phum ta a. Tichuan kum sawmhnih Israel-hote chungah ro a rel a ni." 
Judges16:31 Tichuan a unaute leh a pa chhungte zawng zawng chu an lo chhuk a, an la a, an zawn chho a, Zora leh Estaol inkara a pa Manoa phumna hmunah an phum ta a. Tichuan kum sawmhnih Israel-hote chungah ro a rel a ni." 
Judges17:1 Tin, Ephraim tlang ramah mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Mika a ni." 
Judges17:2 Tin, ani chuan a nu hnenah, 'Tangka sangkhat leh zakhat an ruksak chia, nang pawhin anchhia i lawh a, ka beng hriat ngeia i sawi kha ngai teh, kha tangka kha ka hnenah a awm a sin, keima lak a ni e,"" a ti a. Tin, a nu chuan, ""Ka fapa chu LALPA malsawmin awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Judges17:3 Tin, tangka sangkhat leh zakhat chu a nu a pe leh a, tin, a nu chuan, ""He tangka hi keima kut ngeiin ka fapa puala milem siamna'n leh milema chhun atan LALPA hnenah ka hlan e: chuvangin tunah hian ka pe leh dawn che ni,"" a ti a." 
Judges17:4 Tin, tangka chu anu a han pek chuan, a nu chuan tangka zahnih chu a la a, tangkaraw chhertu a pe a, ani chuan milemah a lo siam a, milemah a lo chhung a: chu chu Mika inah chuan a awm a." 
Judges17:5 Tin, chu Mika chuan pathiante in a nei a, ephod leh milemte a siam a, a fapa pakhat chu a puithiam atan a tihrang ta a." 
Judges17:6 Chunglai chuan Israel ramah lal an awm lo va: mi tinin mahni tha tihzawng zawngin an ti mai a. 
Judges17:7 Tin, Bethlehem-juda-a mi Juda hnam, Levi chi tlangval pakhat a awm a, chutah chuan a va awm ve lawk a." 
Judges17:8 Chumi chu Bethlehem-juda khawpui ata a chhuak a, awmna zawngin a a vak ani a: chutia a vahna lamah chuan Ephraim tlang rama Mika in chu a va thleng a." 
Judges17:9 Tin, Mika chuan a hnenah, ""Khawi atanga lo kal nge i nih le?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Bethlehem-Juda-a mi Levi chi ka ni a, awmna hmun zawngin ka vak a ni,"" a ti a." 
Judges17:10 Tin, Mika chuan a hnenah, ""Ka hnenah hian awm ta che, ka paah leh puithiamah awm langin, kum tin, tangkarua tlang sawm ka pe ang chian, silhfen silh khat leh i ei turte pawh,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Levi chi chu a lut ta a." 
Judges17:11 Tin, Levi chi chuan chu mi hnena awm chu a remti ta a; tichuan chu tlangval chu a fapa pakhatah a awm ta a." 
Judges17:12 Tin, Mika chuan Levi chi chu a tihrang ta a, tichuan tlangval chu a puithiamah a lo awm a, Mika inah chuan a awm ta a.Chutichuan Mika chuan, ""Tunah zet chuan Levi chi ka puithiam atan ka nei tawh si a, LALPA'n mi tihmuingil ngei ang tih ka hria e,"" a ti a." 
Judges17:13 Chutichuan Mika chuan, ""Tunah zet chuan Levi chi ka puithiam atan ka nei tawh si a, LALPA'n mi tihmuingil ngei ang tih ka hria e,"" a ti a." 
Judges18:1 Chung lai chuan Israel ramah lal an awm lo va: tin, chung lai chuan Dan chite chuan ram luah tur an zawng a; chutih lai pawh chuan Israel chite zingah ram luah tur an la chang ve si lo a." 
Judges18:2 Tin, Dana thlahte chuan an hnam pum pui zinga mi, pasaltha pang,a Zora leh Estaol khua atangin ram va enthla tur leh, va thlithlai turin an tir a; an hnenah chuan, ""Va kal ta u la, ram chu va thlithlai teh u,"" an ti a; Tichuan Ephraim tlang rama mIka in chu an va thleng a, chutah chuan an riak ta a." 
Judges18:3 Mika in kianga an awm lai chuan Levi chi tlangval aw chu an han hria a, chu lam chu an va pan a, a hnenah, ""Tuin nge hetah hian rhuai che? He hmunah hian eng nge maw i tih le? Engtin nge hetah hian i khawsak?"" an ti a." 
Judges18:4 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Mika hian heti hian min lo siam ta a, mi ruai a, a puithiamah hian ka awm a ni,"" a ti a." 
Judges18:5 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Kan kalna turah hian kan hmuingil dawn nge dawn lo tih kan hriat theihna'n Pathian min rawnsak teha ng che,"" an ti a." 
Judges18:6 Tin, puithiam chuan an hnenah, ""Thlamuang takin kal tawh u: in kalna tur chu LALPA'nIN a hriatpui zel a che u,"" a ti a." 
Judges18:7 Chutichuan m pangate chu an chhuak ta a, Lais khuaah an va lut a, chuta mite chu Zidon mite ang bawka ralmuang tak leh thlamuang taka an awm hle hlezia na va hmu a; chu mi ramah chuan engmaha han intichhe thei tura thu neitu lem chuang tumah an awm lo a, Zidon-hote nen lah an inhlat a, inhmanna reng reng an nei si lo." 
Judges18:8 Tin, Zora leh Estaol khuaa an unaute hnen lamah chuan an haw ta a: tin, an unaute chuan an hnenah, ""Engtin nge ni le?"" an ti a." 
Judges18:9 Tin, anni chuan, ""Tho rawh u khai, i han bei ang u: ram chu kan han hmu ta ngei ma a, ngai teh u, a tha hle a nia: in chechang na nge?"" Chu mi rama han luh a, han luah tur chuan muang suh u khai." 
Judges18:10 In han kal chuan ralmuanga awm mite a nia in han hmuh ang ni, ram lah chu a zau si a: Pathianin a pe tawh che u ania; leia thil awmah zawng engmah tlakchham tur awm hauh lohna hmun a nia,"" an ti a." 
Judges18:11 Tichuan Zora leh Estaola khua tang chuan Dan hnamte chu indona thuam inbelin mi zaruk an chhuak ta a. 
Judges18:12 Tin, an han chho a, Judai ram Kiriath-jearim khuaah awmhmun an han inkhuar a: chuvangin chu mi hmun chu tun thlengin Mahane-dan an la ti a ni: ngai teh, Kiriath-jearim thlang lama awm a ni." 
Judges18:13 chuta tang chua Ephraim tlang ram lam an pan a, Mika in chu an han thleng a." 
Judges18:14 Chutichuan Lais ram enthla tura m panga hnenah chuan, ""Heng inahte hian ephod te, milem te, milem siam chawp te, mi lem chhun chawpte a awm tih in hria em? Chutichuan engtin nge in tih dawn ngaihtuah rawh u,"" an ti a." 
Judges18:15 Tin, chuta ta chu an peng a, Levi chi tlangval awmna Mika in ngei chu an va thleng a, a chungchnag thu an zawt a." 
Judges18:16 Tin, Dana thlah, mi zaruk indona thuam inbelte chu kulh kawngka bulah an ding a." 
Judges18:17 Tin, mi panga ram enthlatute chu an han chho a, an han lut a, milem siamchawp te, ephod te, milem te, milem chhun chawpte chu an la a; tin, puithiam chu mi zaruk indona thuam inbelte zinga kulh kawngka bulah chuan a ding ve a," 
Judges18:18 Tin, chungte chu Mika ina an han luh a, milem siam chawp te, ephod te, milem puithiam chuan an hnenah, ""Engnge maw in tih chu le?"" a ti a." 
Judges18:19 Tin, anni chuan, ""Ngawi rawh, i kutin i hmui kha hup la, kan hnenah lo kal ve la, kan paah leh puithiamah lo awm rawh: i tan hian chhung khat chauh puithiama awm nge tha zawk, Israel zinga chi khat leh hnam khat puithiama awm?"" an ti a." 
Judges18:20 Tin, puithiam rilru chu a lawm ta hle mai a, tichuan ephod te, milem te, milem siam chawpte chu a la a, mipuiho zingah chuan a tel ve ta a." 
Judges18:21 Chutichuan an kal chhuak ta a, an fanau te tete, ran te, bungrua te chu an hmachhawm zel a." 
Judges18:22 Mika in atanga thui fe an han kal chhuah hnu chuan Mika thenawmte chu an inpun khawm a. Dana thlahteho chu an va umpha ta a. 
Judges18:23 Tin, Dana thlahteho chu an han au a. Tin, anni chu an lo lehhawi a. Mika hnenah chuan, ""Engni ti nge ni le, mi khati zozai i rawn kalpui mai?"" an ti a." 
Judges18:24 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka Pathian siamte leh puithiam chu in kalpui a, in kal ta daih mai a, eng nge neih ka neih tak ni? Eng ti tiha, 'Eng i ti nge ni le?' mi ti mai nge in nih chu le?' a ti a." 
Judges18:25 Tin, Dana thlahteho chuan a hnenah, ""Kan zingah hian tawng mai mai suh khai, chuti lo zawng mi thinchhe kut i tuar mai ang a, i chhungte nen hian in nun in chan mai tur ania,"" an ti a." 
Judges18:26 Tichuan Dana thlahteho chu an kal ta a: tin, Mika chuan beih ngam rual niin a hre si lo a, a in lamah a haw leh ta a." 
Judges18:27 Tin, Mika thil siam leh, a puithiam neih c hu an kalpui ta a, Lais khua, ralmuanga awm hle hlete hnen chu an han thleng a, khandaihin an han that a; tin, khua chu an hal ta a." 
Judges18:28 Zidon atanga a hlat em avangin a han chhan chhuaktu tur lah tumah an awm si lo a, tute nen mah inhmanna reng reng an nei lo bawk a; Beth-rehob bul ruama awm a ni. Tin, khua chu an din leh a, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
Judges18:29 Tin, a khaw hmingah chuan Israela fa, an thlahtu Dana chawiin, Dan an vuah a: amaherawhchu a tirah c huan chu khua chu Lais an ti thin a ni." 
Judges18:30 Tin, Dana thlahte chuan milem siam chawp chu an mahni tan an lo din ta a: tin, Mosia Gersoma fapa Jonathana leh a fapate chu, ram chu miin an lak hma loh chuan Dan chite puithiamah an awm ta a.Chuti chuan Mika siam milem siam chawp chu Silo khuaa Pathian in a awm chhung zawng chuan an din ta." 
Judges18:31 Chuti chuan Mika siam milem siam chawp chu Silo khuaa Pathian in a awm chhung zawng chuan an din ta. 
Judges19:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung lai Israel rama lal an awm loh lai chuan Levi chi, mi pakhat hi Ephraim tlang ram tawp lamah a awm a, Beth-lehem-Judai rama mi hmeiah a nei a." 
Judges19:2 Tin, a hmei chuan a uiresan a, tichuan Beth-lehem-judai rama a pa hnenah a tlansan a, chutah chuan thla li zet a awm a." 
Judges19:3 Tin, a pasal chu a tho a, a chhiahhlawh leh sabengtung pahnih hruaiin tlang taka va thlem a, lungawia hruai haw leh tumin a va um zui a: tin, ani chuan a pa inah chuan a lo hruai lut a: tin, nula pa chuan a hmuh chuan a lo lawm hle mai a." 
Judges19:4 Tin, a pu, nula pa chuan a hnena awm turin a lo chelh a; a hnenah chuan ni thum a awm a: tichuan an eiin an intlang a, chutah chuan a thleng a." 
Judges19:5 Tin, heti hi ani a, ani lo ni chuan zing takah an tho a, ani chu chhuah tumin a tho a; tin, nula pa chuan a makpa hnenah chuan, ""Chhang tlem tal eiin i thinlung chu tiharh rih la, chu mi hnuah chuan in la kal ang chu maw le,"" a ti a." 
Judges19:6 Chutichuan an thu a, an pahnih chuan an eiin an in dun a: tin, nula pa chuan chu mi hnenah chuan, ""Lungawi takin riak hram rawh khai, i thinlung chu hlim takin awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Judges19:7 Tin, chu mi chu chhuah tumin a han tho a, nimahsela a pu chuan a thlem chiam a, tichuan a riak leh ta a." 
Judges19:8 Tin, a ni nga tuk zing takah chuan chhuah tumin a tho a; tin, nula pa chuan, ""I thinlung chu tiharh rih la maw le, tlai ni nem hun thleng tal chuan awm rih rawh khai,"" a ti a; tin, an pahnih chuan chaw te an ei dun leh ta a." 
Judges19:9 Tin, chu mi chu a hmei nen, a chhiahhlawh nen chhuah tuma a han thawh chuan a pu, nula pa chuan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, hei khua pawh a tlai tawh a, zanin chu riak leh rih hram rawh khai: ngai teh, khua pawh a htim hnai mai tawh alawm, hetha hian riak leh la, i thinlung chu hlim taka a awm theihna'n; tichuan naktuk zing takah i tho ang a, i haw mai tur alawm,"" a ti a." 
Judges19:10 nimahsela chu mi chuan chu mi zan chuan riah a duh ta lo a, a tho a, a chhuak ta a, Jebus khaw zawn a va thleng a (chu ch Jerusalem khua a ni) sabengtung pahnih thuam sa a hruai a; a hmei pawh chu a tel ve a." 
Judges19:11 Jebus khaw kiang a thlen chuan khua a tlai hle tawh a; tin, chhiahhlawh chuan a pu hnenah, ""Hawh teh, he Jebus0ho khaw puiah hian i lut mai ang khai, i riak teh ang u,"" a ti a." 
Judges19:12 Tin, a pu chuan a hnenah, ""Israel thlahte ni si lo hnam dang khuaahte chuan lut lo e: Gibea khaw lam i pan zel zawk ang u,"" a ti a." 
Judges19:13 Tin, a chhiahhlawh hnenah, ""Hawh he'ng hmun khawii zawk emaw hi i pan ang: Gibea khuaah emaw, Rama khuaah emaw kan riak dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Judges19:14 Chutichuan an kal leh ta zel a; Benjamin-ho Gibea khaw kiang an thlen chuan ni a tla ta a. 
Judges19:15 Tin, Gibea khuaa riak tur chuan an lut ta a: tin, a lut a chu khawpui khaw laiah chuan a thu a: tumah thleng peih reng reng an awm lo a." 
Judges19:16 Tin, ngai teh, putar pakhat hi tlaiah chuan a feh a lo hawng a; chu mi chu Ephraim tlang rama mi ani a, Gibea khuaah chuan a va awm rih lawk a ni: chu mia mite erawh chuan Benjamina chite an ni." 
Judges19:17 Tin, a han hawi a, khawlaia mikhualpa chu a han hmu a; tin, putar chuan, ""Khawiahnge i kal dawn le? Khawi atanga lo kal nge i nih?"" a ti a." 
Judges19:18 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Beth-lehem-judai ram atanga Ephraim tlang tawp ram lama kal tum ka ni; chuta awm chu ka ni a, Beth-lehem-hudai ramah ka va kal a; tunah hian LALPA inah kal ka tum a ni; tumah mi thleng peih an awm lo a ni." 
Judges19:19 Kan sabengtun atn phei chuan buh pawl leh ran chawte zawng kan nei a; tin, kei leh, i bawihnu leh, i chhiahhlawhte hnena awm ve tlangval tante pawh hian chhang leh uain a awm bawk a: engmah tlakchham zawng kan nei hauh lo e,"" a ti a." 
Judges19:20 Tin, putar chuan, ""Thlamuang takin awm rawh khai; i mamawh zawng zawngte chu keimah ka tum vek ang e; khawlaiah zawng riak lul suh ang che,"" a ti a." 
Judges19:21 Chutichuan a inah a hruai lut a, sabengtungte chu chaw ape a: tin, an kete an sil a, an eiin an in ta a." 
Judges19:22 Chutia hlim leh lawm taka an awm lai chuan, ngai teh, chu mi khuaa mi, Beliala fapa thenkhat chuan in chu an rawn hual vel ta hlawm a, kawngkhar an rawn chhu dawt dawt a; in neitupa putar hnenah chuan, ""I ina lo thlengpa kha han hruai chhuak rawh, kan lo pawl teh ang,"" an ti a." 
Judges19:23 Tin, in neitupa chu an hnenah a va chhuak a, an hnenah chuan, ""Ni lo e, ka unaute u, chuti ema sual chu ti lul suh u khai; he mi hi ka mikhual anih hi, hetiang thil atthlak tak zawng ti lo e." 
Judges19:24 Ngai teh u, hetha hian ka fanu nula leh a hmei an awm a; anni chu ka rawn hruai chhuak ang a, anni chu tlawm u la, tha in tih ang apiangin an chungah ti ang che u: he mi chungah erawh hi chuan chutiang thil attlak chu ti suh ang che u,"" a ti a." 
Judges19:25 Nimahsela chu mite chuan a thu an pawm duh lo va: chutichuan mi chuan a hmei chu a man a, an hnenah chuan a va hruai chuak ta a; tin, anni chuan an lo pawl a, khawvar hma loh chuan zankhuain an lo sawisa hrep a: tin, khua a lo var veleh, an chhuah ta a." 
Judges19:26 Chutichuan hmeichhia chu khua alo var veleh a kal a, a hotupa thlen inpa kawngka bulah chuan a tlu thlawp a, khaw en hnu thhlengin a awm ta reng a." 
Judges19:27 Tin, a hotupa chu zingah chuan ahan tho a, kawngkate chu a han hawng a, kal tumin a va chhuak a: tin, ngai teh, a hmeinu chu kawngka bulah chuan rahkaah a lo tlu zangphar der mai a." 
Judges19:28 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Tho rawh, i kal ang,"" a han ti a; nimahsela a lo chhang ta hauh lo mai a: tichuan a sabengtung chungah a hlang a; tin, a tho a, a hmun lamah chuan a kal ta a." 
Judges19:29 Tin, in a va thlen chuan chemte a la a, a hmei chu a fukte hmun sawm leh hmun hnihah a chan sawm a, Israel ram zawng zawngah a thawn darh a.tin, heti hi ani a, a lo hmu apiang chussan, ""Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah achin hetiang thiltih reng reng hi tun thleng hian a la awm ngaiin hmuh a la ni ngai hauh l mai: ngaihtuah u la, inrawn u la, sawi teh u,"" an ti a." 
Judges19:30 tin, heti hi ani a, a lo hmu apiang chussan, ""Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah achin hetiang thiltih reng reng hi tun thleng hian a la awm ngaiin hmuh a la ni ngai hauh l mai: ngaihtuah u la, inrawn u la, sawi teh u,"" an ti a." 
Judges20:1 Chutichuan Israela thlahte zawng zawng chu an thawk ta chiam a, thu khat vuain Dan khua atanga Beer-seba khaw thlenign Gilead rama mite nen Mizpe khuaah LALPA hnenah an inkhawm ta a." 
Judges20:2 Tin, mi zawng zawng hotute, Israel chite zawng zawng lam pawh chu Pathian mite inkhawmhonaah chuan an va tel a, sipai khandaih keng mi nuai li an ni a." 
Judges20:3 (Benjamina thlahte chuan Israela thlahte chu Mizpe khuaah an han chho tih an lo hria a.) Tin, Israela thlahte chuan ""Eng tiziaa hetianga suahsualna hi lo awm nge ni min hrilh teh u?"" an ti a." 
Judges20:4 Tin, Levi chi, hmeichhia an thaha pasal chuan, ""Benjamin chite awmna Gibear khuaah ka hmei nen riah tumin kan va lut a." 
Judges20:5 Tin, Gibea mite chuan min rawn bei ta mai a, zanah in an rawn hual a; mi thah an tum a, ka hmei chu an sawisa hrep a, a lo thi ta a." 
Judges20:6 Tichuan ka hmei ruang chu ka la a, ka chan a, Israel-ho ram luah zawng zawngah ka thawn darh a: Israel ramah hian thil tenawm tak leh atthlak tak an lo ti ta si a." 
Judges20:7 Nangni Israel thlahte u, in vai hian ngai teh u, in ngaihdan leh in remtih dan chu sawi rawh u khai,"" a ti a." 
Judges20:8 Tichuan mipuiho zawng zawng chu thukhat vuain an thu tho thup a, ""Tumah mahni puan in lamah kan haw hauh lo ang a, tumah mahni inah kan lut hek lo ang." 
Judges20:9 Gibea-ho kan tih dan tur hetiang a ni; thum kan vawr ang a: 
Judges20:10 Israel-hote chunga thil dik lo tak an tih ang zela an tih a, Gibea hmuan Benjabim-ho kan han beihnaa mipuite ei tur lo hlantu at Israel hnam zawng zawng zinga mi zakhatah sawm zel, sangkhatah za zel, singkhatah sang zel kan thlang chhuak ang,"" an ti a." 
Judges20:11 Chutichuan Israel mi zawng zawng chu thukhat vaw thapin chu khawpui bei tur chuan an pung khawm ta a. 
Judges20:12 Tin, Israel hnamte chuan Benjami hnam zawng zawngte hnenah chuan, ""IN zinga hetiang suahsualhan lo awm ta mai hi eng tizia nge ni?" 
Judges20:13 Gibea khuaa mi Beliala fate chu rawn hruai rawh u, tichuan Israel rama sual hi a reh theihna'n kan lo tihlum ang e,"" tiin mi an tir a. Nimahsela Benjamin chite chuan an unau Israela thlahte thusawi an lo pawm duh lo a." 
Judges20:14 Tin, Benjami thlahte chu Israela thlahte do turin khawpui ata te an lo chhuak khawm a, Gibea khuaah an lut chiam a." 
Judges20:15 Tin, chu mi nia Benjamin thlahte khawpui ata khandaih kenga chhuakho chu, Gibea khuaa mi zasarih thlan thiau thiam loin singhnih leh sanguk an ni." 
Judges20:16 Chung zawng zawng zingah chuan veikhaw zasarih, thlan thiau an awm a; an vai chuan virvawma samzai tia pawh thelh hlek lo mi an ni." 
Judges20:17 Tin, Israel mite chu Benjamin mite tiam loin khandaih keng thiau nuai li an ni: chungho zawng zawng chu indo mi vek an ni." 
Judges20:18 Tin, Israela thlahte chu an tho a, Bethel-ah an han chho a, Pathian an han rawn a, ""Benjamina thlahte chu tu nge han bei hmasa ang le?"" an ti a. Tin, LALPA'n ""Juda-ho han kal hmasa rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Judges20:19 Tichuan Israela thlahte chu zingah an tho a, Gibea khua chu an han hual a." 
Judges20:20 an thawk a; tin, Israel mite chuan Gibea khuaah chuan bei turin tan an han siam a." 
Judges20:21 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chu Gibea khua ata an lo chhuak a, chu mi ni chuan Israel-hote zinga mi singhnih leh sanghnih an rawn that t buaih mai a." 
Judges20:22 Tin, mipuiho Israel mite chu an han infuih leh a, an beih tan nia an beihna hmunah vek chuan bei turin tan an han siam leh a." 
Judges20:23 (Tin, Israela thlahte chu an han chho a, Pathian hmaah tlai thlengin an han tap a, ""Kan nau Benjamina thlahte hi bei turin kan han thawk leh dawn em ni ang?"" tin, LALPA an zawt a. Tin, LALPA chuan, ""Han bei leh rawh u,"" a ti a.)" 
Judges20:24 Tin, a ni hnih niin Israela thlahte chuan Benjamina thlahte chu an han hnaih a." 
Judges20:25 Chuti chuan Israela thlahte zawng zawng leh, mipuiho zawng zawng chu an han chho ve, Bethel-ah an han kal a, an tap a, LALPA hmaah an thu a, chu mi ni chuan tlai thlengin chaw an nghei a; tin, LALPA hnenah halral thilhlan leh remna thilhlante an hlan a." 
Judges20:26 Tin, Israela thlahte hchuan LALPA an rawna,(chung lai chuan chutah chuan Pathian thuthlung bawm chu a awm a," 
Judges20:27 tin, chung lai chuan Arona fa Elazara fapa Phinehasa chuan a rawng a bawl thin a ni a,) "" Kan unau Benjamina thlahte chu kan han bei leh ang nge, kan bansan tawh mai ang?"" tiin. Tin, LALPA'n, ""Han chho leh rawh u, naktukah zawng in kutah ka pe tawh dawn e,"" a ti a." 
Judges20:28 Tin, Israel-hote chuan Gibea khaw velah chuan changtu an indah ru ta a." 
Judges20:29 Tin, Israela thlahte chu Benjamina thlahte bei turin a ni thum ni chuan an han thawk leh a, ni dang ang bawk khan Gibea khaw bei tur chuantan an han siam leh a." 
Judges20:30 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chu mite bei tur chuan an va chhuak a, khua chu an chhuahsan a; tichuan ni dang ang bawk khan mite chu beiin an that tan leh ta mai a, phul faia Bethel khaw chhohna leh Gibea khaw kang lamlianahte chuan Israel-hote chu sawmthum an that a." 
Judges20:31 Tin, Benjamin thlahte chuan, ""A hma ang bawk khan kan hmaah an tlawm leh ta le,"" an ti a. Israela thlahte erawh chuan, ""I tlan ang u khai, khawpui ata hi lamlian lamah i tawlh chhuahtir ang u,"" an ti a." 
Judges20:32 Tichuan Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan ant an hmun chu an chhuahsan a, Baal-tamar hmunah tan hmun an siam a: tin, Israel-ho aruka lo chang rutute khan an channa hmun Maaregeba hmun ata an lo chhuak a." 
Judges20:33 Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng zinga thlan thiau singkhatin Gibea khua chu an bei a, an iebi chu a nasa ngei mai: nimahsela anni chuan an chan a chhe dawn ta ngei mai tih zawng an hre lo." 
Judges20:34 Tin, LALPA'n Benjamin-ho chu Israel-hote hmaah chuan a tihlum chiam a: Israel thlahte chuan chu mi ni chuan Benjamin-ho chu mi singhnih leh sangnga leh za an that a: chungho zawng zawng chu khandaih keng mi vek an ni." 
Judges20:35 Chutichuan Benjamina thlahte chuan an tlawm ta tih an lo inhre ta a: Israela thlahte chuan Gibea khawbei tura a ruka changtute an dah kha an rin avangin Benjamin-ho chu an han hnungtawlhsan a ni. 
Judges20:36 Tin, a ruka changtute chuan Gibea khua chu an bawh ta thut a; tichuan a ruka changtute chu an inzar darh a, khuaa mi zawng zawng khandaihin an bei ta chiam a." 
Judges20:37 Israel-hote leh a ruka changtue khan an intiamna chu khawpui chhunga mei tihkhung ngut ngut a ni. 
Judges20:38 Tin, Israel-hote chu an han tawlh rih a, tichuan Benjamin-h chuan an han bei tan a, Israel mite chu sawmthum lai an that a, ""Kan inbeih tirh ni ang bawk khan kan hmaah an tlawm leh ta ngei mai le."" an ti a." 
Judges20:39 Nimahsela khawpui chhungah chuan meikhu a lo din tak luah veleh, Benjamin-ho chu an han lehhawi a, tin, ngai teh, khawpui chu a pumin van lamah a khu chho ta ngut ngut mai a." 
Judges20:40 Tichuan Israel-hote chu an rawn inher leh ta a, tin, Benjamin-ho chuan mak an ti hle a: an chan a chhe dawn tih an hre ta si a." 
Judges20:41 Chuvangn Israel-hote hmaah chuan thlaler lamah an tlanchhe ta a; nimahsela an um zui ngat ngat a; tin, khawpui ata lo chhuakte chuan chutah chuan an lo thlum a." 
Judges20:42 Benjamin mite chu an hual ta tlat a, an um a, ni chhuahna lam Gibea dep an chawlhna hmunah an umpha a." 
Judges20:43 Benjamin-ho chu mi singkhat leh sangriat an thi a; an vai chuan mi chak huaisen thiau an ni. 
Judges20:44 Tin, an tawlh a, thlaler lam Rimon lungpuiah an tlanchhia a: mi sangnga chu lamlianahte an rawt a; Gidom thlengin an um zui ngat ngat a, mi sanghnih an that a." 
Judges20:45 Chutichuan chu mi ni a Benjamin-ho thi zawng zawngte chu khandaih keng mi thiau singhnih leh sangnga an ni a, an vai chuan mi chak huaisen an ni." 
Judges20:46 Mi zaruk erawh chu thlaler lam Rimon lungpuiah an tlanchhia a, chu mi Rimon lungpuiah chuan thla l an awm a.Tin, Israel-hote chu Benjamin-ho chhunga mi tawhphawt chu ran te, an hmuh apiang te khandaihin an sat hlum zel a: chu lo pawh chu khua an hmuh apiangte pawh chu an hal zel a." 
Judges20:47 Tin, Israel-hote chu Benjamin-ho chhunga mi tawhphawt chu ran te, an hmuh apiang te khandaihin an sat hlum zel a: chu lo pawh chu khua an hmuh apiangte pawh chu an hal zel a." 
Judges21:1 Tin, Israel mite chuan Mizpe khuaah, ""Kan zinga mi tumahin kan fanute hi Benjamin-ho nupuiah i neihtir hauh suh ang u,"" tiin chhia an chham a." 
Judges21:2 Tin, mipuiho chu Bethelah an kal a, Pahian hmaah tlai thlengin an thu a, an awte chhuahin an tap vak vak a." 
Judges21:3 Anni chuan, ""Aw LALPA, Israelte Pathian, eng tizia nge Israelte zinga hetiang thil hi a lo awm a, vawiinah hian Israelte hi hnam khata kim ta lo nge ni le?"" an ti a." 
Judges21:4 Tin, heti hi ani a, a tukah chuan mipuiho chu zing takah an tho a, chutah chuan maicham an siam a, halral thilhlante leh remna thilhlante an hlan a." 
Judges21:5 Tin, Israel thlahte chuan, ""Israel hnam zawng zawng zinga LALPA hnena pungkhawmho zinga han tel ve lo chu tute nge ni le?"" an ti a. Mizpe khuaa LALPA hnena han kal ve lo apiangte chu, ""Tihhlum ngei tur ani ang,"" tiin chhia an lo chham tawh tlat si a." 
Judges21:6 Tin, Israela thlahte chu an unau Benjamin-ho chungchangah chuan an inchhiar ta a, ""Vawiinah hian Israel-ho zinga hnam khat chu chhawk an ni ta si a." 
Judges21:7 A awm chhunate tan chuan annupui tur engtin nge kan tih tak ang le? Kan fanute hi nupuiah neihtir hauh lo turin LALPA hming chhalin chhia kan chham ta si a,"" an ti a." 
Judges21:8 Tin, anni chuan, ""Israel-ho hnasm zinga mi tu hnam ber nge ni Mizpe khuaa LALPA hmaa han inlan ve lo hi le?"" an ti a. Tin, ngai teh, pungkhawmho awmna hmunah chuan Jabes-gilead mite chu pakhat mah an kal ve lo a." 
Judges21:9 Mipuiho an han inchhiar chuan, ngai teh, Jabes-gilead rama awmte chu pakhat mah an lo awm lah lo a." 
Judges21:10 Tin, inkhawmhote chuan mi huaisen tha thiau singkhat leh sanghnih an tir a, ""Kal ta u la, Jabes-gilead rama awmte chu hmeichhie leh an fanaute tete nen khandaihin va sat hlum vek rawh u." 
Judges21:11 In tih dan tur chu hetiang ani, mipa zawng zawng leh hmeichia, mipa mutpui tawh phawt chu tiboral vek ang che u,"" tiin thu an pe a." 
Judges21:12 Tin, Jabes-gilead rama awmte zingah chuan nula zali, mipa la pawl ngai hauh loh an hmu a; tichuan an awmna Silo khuaah chuan an hruai a, chu chu Kanaan ram a ni." 
Judges21:13 Tin, inkhawmho zawng zawngte chuan mi an tir a, Rimon lungpuia awm Benjamin-ho an va bia a, an hnenah inrem thu an puang a." 
Judges21:14 Tin, chu veleh chuan Benjamin-ho chu an kir ta a; tin, Jabes-gilead rama hmeichheho an zuahte chu an pe a: chuti chung pawhin an la indaih ta lo a." 
Judges21:15 Tin, Israel hnam zinga LALPA'n intihhranna alo siam tak avangin mipuiho chu Benjamin-ho chungchangah chuan an inchhir ta a." 
Judges21:16 Chutichuan inkhawmho upate chuan, ""A la damte nupui tur hi engtin nge kan tih ang le, Benjamin-hozinga an hmeichhiate chu tihboral an lo ni ta si a?"" an ti a." 
Judges21:17 Anni chuan, ""Israel hnam hi tihmanga a awm lohna'n Benjamin-ho la awm chhungte hi nge thlah kan neihtir theih ang le?""" 
Judges21:18 Kan fanute hi nupuiah kan neihtir thei si lo a,"" an ti a; Israela thlahte chuan, ""Tupawh Benhamin-ho nupuia neihtir apiang chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,"" tiin chhia an lo chham tawh si a." 
Judges21:19 Tin, anni chuan, ""Ngai teh u, Bethel hmar lam, Bethelh atanga Sekem kalna lamlian chhak lampanga Lebona chhim lama awm Silo khuaah kum tin, LALPA tan kut a awm thin kha,"" an ti a." 
Judges21:20 Tin, anni chuan Benjamina thlahteho hnenah chuan, ""Va kal ta u la, grep hmunah va chang ru tawh u;" 
Judges21:21 tin, lo thlir u la, tichuan ngai teh u, Silo khuaa nulaho lamnaa lam tura an lo chhuah chuan, grep hmun ata chu lo chhuak u la, Silo nulaho chu mahni nupui atan man theuh u la, Benjamin-ho ramah kal vek ang che u." 
Judges21:22 Tin, heti hi ani ang a, an pate emaw, an nutate emaw sawisel tura kan hnena an lo kal leh, an hnenah, 'Min khawngaih rawh u khai: indonaah khan an nupui tur kan lo mansak theuh ta si lo va: nangni lahin in lo pe bawk si lo va: lo pe ni ula, thiam loh in hlawh dawn si a,' kan lo ti dawn nia,"" tiin thu an pe a." 
Judges21:23 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, lamho zinga mi anmahni zat theuh nupuiah an man a, an kal bopui ta a: tin, an ram lamah chuan an hawng a, khawpui chu an chei leh a, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
Judges21:24 Tin, chu veleh chuta tang chuan Israel thlahte chu mahni chi chi leh mahni hnam hnamin an intel hrang a, chuta ta chu anmhani ram theuhvah chuan an haw leh ta a.Chung lai chuan Israelte zingah lal reng reng an awm lo va: mi tinn mahni tha tihzawng zawngin an ti mai a ni." 
Judges21:25 Chung lai chuan Israelte zingah lal reng reng an awm lo va: mi tinn mahni tha tihzawng zawngin an ti mai a ni. 
Ruth1:1 Roreltute chuan ro an rel laiin heti hi a ni a, chu mi ramah chuan tam a lo tla a." 
Ruth1:2 Tin, Bethlehem-Juda-a mi pakhat Moab rama awm turin amah leh a nupui leh a fapate pahnih nen an kal a. Chu mi hming chu Emimeleka a ni a, a nupui hming chu Naomi a ni a, a fapate pahniha hming chu Mahlona leh Kiliona, Bethlehem-Juda-a Ephrath mi an ni. Moab ramah chuan an kal a, chuta chuan an awm ta reng a." 
Ruth1:3 Tin, Elimeleka, Naomi pasal chu a thi a, ama leh a fapate pahnih chauh an ni ta a." 
Ruth1:4 Tin, Moab ram hmeichhia nupuiah an nei a, a pakhata hming chu Orpi a ni a, a pakhata hming chu Ruthi a ni: Chutah chuan kum sawm emaw lai an awm a." 
Ruth1:5 Tin, Mahlona leh Kilona chu an thi ta ve ve a; tichuan chu hmeichhia chu a fate pahnih leh a pasal chuan an thihsan ta a." 
Ruth1:6 Chuti chuan a mote nen chuan Moab ram ata chu haw leh turin an tho a, LALPA'n ei tur pein a mite chu a kan dan te Moab ram atanga a lo riat avangin." 
Ruth1:7 Tichuan a awmna ata chu a mote pahnih nen chuan an chuak a; Judai rama haw leh turin an kal ta a. 
Ruth1:8 Tin, Naomi chuan a mote pahnih hnenah chuan, ""In nu in lam ve vea haw leh turin kal rawh u khai; mitthi chung leh ka chunga in tih ang hian LALPA chuan in chungah ngilnei takin ti ve rawh se." 
Ruth1:9 LALPA chuan in pahnihin pasalte ina khawsakna in tawn theihna'n khawngaih che u rawh se,"" a ti a. Tichuan a fawp a, tin, aw chauh meuhin a tap ta chiam mai a." 
Ruth1:10 Tin, a hnenah, ""Kan kal lo ang, i chite hnena i hawnnaah chuan kan tel ve zawk ang,""an ti a." 
Ruth1:11 Tin, Naomi chuan, ""Ka fanute u, haw leh zawk rawh u; engah nge ka hnenah chuan in kal ve tehlul ang le? In pasal tur fapa ka pai leh thei dawn em ni?" 
Ruth1:12 Ka fanute u, haw leh u la kal raw u khai; pasal han nei turin ka upa lutuk tawh si a. Tin, ka bei a la sei reng e ti mah i la, zaninah mai pawh hian pasal neiin fapate pawh nei mah i la," 
Ruth1:13 an puitlin thlengin in awm dawn em ni ang? Ni kawng lo e a, ka fanute u, nangmahni avang hian ka lungngaihna a zualkai zawk a ni, LALPA kut chu ka chungah a tla ta a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Ruth1:14 Tin, an aw chhuahin an tap leh ta chiam mai a; tin, Orpi chuan a pi chu a fawp a; Ruthi erawh chuan a vuan tlat a." 
Ruth1:15 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ngai teh, i mopuinu chu a chite nen leh a Pathian hnen lamah chuan a kir leh ta a; nang pawh i mopuinu umin haw ve taw aw,"" a ti a." 
Ruth1:16 Tin, Ruthi chuan, ""Nangmah then tur leh nangmah zui loa haw leh tur chuan min thlem lo hram hram rawh: i kalna apiangah ka kal ang a; i riahna apianga ka riak ang a, i chite chu ka chite an ni ang a, i Pathian chu ka Pathian a ni ang.:" 
Ruth1:17 i thihna apiangah chuan ka thi ang a, chutah chuan min phum ve mai tur a ni: nang leh kei hi thihna chauh lo chuan thil dangina min then dawn chuan LALPA'n a tih tihin min ti mawi se la, chu aia nasa pawhin,"" a ti a." 
Ruth1:18 Chutichuan a hnena kal a tum tlat tih a lo hriat chuan a ngawihsan ta a. 
Ruth1:19 Tichuan Bethlehem thlengin an kal dun ta a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, Bethlehem an thlen chuan a khuain an phu ta mur mur mai a, hmeichhiate chuan, ""Hei, Naomi kha ni maw?"" an ti a." 
Ruth1:20 Ani chuan an hnenah, ""Naomi min ti suh u, Maraii min ti zawk rawh u. Engkimtitheia chuan lungchiatthlak takin min ti ta si a." 
Ruth1:21 Muk takin ka chhuak a, LALPA chuan kutbengin mi hruai hawng leh a ni: LALPA chuan ka chungah a lungnih lohna a tilang a, Engkimtitheia chuan min tihreawm te hre reng siin angati nge Naomi min la tih cheu ni le?"" a ti a.Chutichuan Naomi chu a lo kir a, a monu Moab mi Ruthi nen Moab ram atang chuan an lo kir a ni: barli seng tan tirh laiin Bethlehem chu an thleng a ni." 
Ruth1:22 Chutichuan Naomi chu a lo kir a, a monu Moab mi Ruthi nen Moab ram atang chuan an lo kir a ni: barli seng tan tirh laiin Bethlehem chu an thleng a ni." 
Ruth2:1 Tin, Naoami chuan a pasala laichin, Elimeleka thlah, mi neinung tak laichin a nei a; a hming chu Boaza a ni." 
Ruth2:2 Tin, Moab mi Ruthi chuan Naomi hnenah, ""Lo lamah ka kal ang a, mi lo khawngaihtu apiang buhto ka va zawng ang e aw,"" a ti a. Tin, a hnenah, ""Kal ta che, ka fanu,"" a ti a." 
Ruth2:3 Tichuan, a kal ta a, buh sengtute seng hmaih chu a va zawng ta a: tichuan Elimeleka thlah Boaza loah ngei chuan a va kal fu hlauh mai a." 
Ruth2:4 Tichuan, ngai teh, Bethlehem atangin Boaza chu a va kal a, buh sengtute hnenah chuan,""In hnenah LALPA awm rawh se,"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""LALPA'n malsawm che rawh se,"" tiin an chhang a." 
Ruth2:5 Chutichuan Boaza chuan a chhiahhlawh, buhsengtute chunga hotu hnenah chuan, ""Hei khawi lam nula nge ni le?"" a ti a." 
Ruth2:6 Tin, a buh sengtute chunga hotu a chiahhlawh chuan, ""Moab nula, Moab ram ata Naomi hnena lo kal ve a ni:" 
Ruth2:7 Chutichuan Boaza chuan Ruthi hnenah chuan, ""Ka fanu, ngai teh aw; lo dangah chuan buhto zawngin kal suh la, heta ta hi kal sawn suh, ka chhiahhlawh nulate hnenah hian awm reng rawh." 
Ruth2:8 An buh seng hi en reng la, an hnu chhui zel rawh; tlangvalte chu engmah tih loh tur chein thu ka pe tawh diam e; tin, i tui a hal apiangin tui bela tlangvalte ti chawi sa va in thin ang che,"" a ti a." 
Ruth2:9 Chutichuan a kun a, lei siin a bawkkhup a, a hnenah, ""Hnam dang ka ni si a, nangin hetianga min hriat duha min lo khawngaih hi eng tizia nge ni?"" a ti a." 
Ruth2:10 Tin, Boaza huan a chhang a, a hnenah, ""I pasal thih achina i pi chunga i thiltih dan zawng zawngte miin mi hril vek a; tin, i nu leh i pa leh i pianna ram kalsana tun hma lama i mi hriat ngai lohte hnena i lo kal dante pawh hi." 
Ruth2:11 LALPA chuan i thiltih chu rul se la, LALPA, Israelte Pathian, inhumhimna'na a thlahnuai i rawn chuha chuan i that man pe teuh che u rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Ruth2:12 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka pu, min khawngaih ang che; nangin mithlamuan a, i chhiahhlawh u late zinga mi ni mah suh i la, i chhiahhlawhnu hi tha takin mi be ta si a,"" a ti a." 
Ruth2:13 Tin, chaw ei hun chuan Boazan a hnenah, ""Lo haw teh khai, chhangte hi han ei ve la, chhang themte chu uain thurah chiah ve rawh,"" a ti a. Chutichuan buh sengtue kiangah chuan a thu a; tin, chhangper chu a pe a, a ei a, a kham hnu pawhin a la ei bang ta cheu a." 
Ruth2:14 Tin, buhto zawng tura a thawh leh chuan, Boaza chuan a tlangvalte hnenah, ""Buhphal zinga mite pawh hi char zel se la, hau suh ang che u." 
Ruth2:15 Tin, a tela mite pawh, pawh chauhsak u la, hnutchiah zel u la, chhar se la, hau suh u,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Ruth2:16 Chutichuan a zawng a; tin, a zawn sa chu a vua a, barli epha khat emaw lai a ni." 
Ruth2:17 Tin, a phur a, khuaah chuan a haw ta a: tin, a pi chuan a buto zawng chu alo hmu a; tin, ani chuan a kham hnuah a ei bang chu a phawrh a, a pe a." 
Ruth2:18 Tin, api chuan a hnenah, ""Vawiinah hian khawi lama buhto nge i zawn? A lo hre duhtu che chu malsawmin awm rawh se,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, tu hnenah nge a va thawh tih a pi chu a hrilh a. ""Vawiina ka va thawhnpa chu a ming Boaza a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ruth2:19 Tin, Naomi chuan a monu hnenah chuan, ""LALPA, mi nung leh mitthi chunga a khawngaihna bang chuang ngai loa chuan amah chu malsawm rawh se,"" a ti a. Tin, Naomi chuan a hnenah, ""chu mi chu, kan lamhnai, kan laichin bul a ni a sin,"" a ti a." 
Ruth2:20 Tin, Moab mi Ruthi chuan, ""A nih tak chu, ka hnenah pawh, 'Ka buh hi a seng zawh vek hma loh chuan ka tlangvalho hnenah hian tel reng ang che,' mi ti nghe nghe a sin,"" a ti a." 
Ruth2:21 Tin, Naomi chuan a monu Ruthi hnenah chuan, ""Ka fanu, lo danga an hmuh hauh lohna tur chein a chhiahhlawh nulaho zingah hlir chuan kal la a tha ang,"" a ti a.Chutichuan barli leh huit seng zawh thlengin Boaza chhiahhlawhnulaho zingah hlir chuan buhto zawngin a kal a; tin, a pi hnenah chuan a awm a." 
Ruth2:22 Chutichuan barli leh huit seng zawh thlengin Boaza chhiahhlawhnulaho zingah hlir chuan buhto zawngin a kal a; tin, a pi hnenah chuan a awm a." 
Ruth3:1 Tin, a pi Naomi chuan a hnenah, ""Ka fanu, i tana tha tur khawsakna ka zawnsak dawn lawm che ni?" 
Ruth3:2 Kan laichinpa Boaza, a chhiahhlawh nulate nena hna i va thawhna kha a awm a ni lo'm ni? Ngai teh, zaninah hian barli hruiah a zap fai dawn a." 
Ruth3:3 Chutichuan, inbual la, inthih la, i incheina puan sin la, hruiah chuan zuk kal rawh; amaherawhchu chawte a eia a in zawh hma loh chuan a hnenah inhriattir hauh suh ang che." 
Ruth3:4 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, a mut hunah chuan a mutna chu chhinchiah la, tin, lut la, a ke hlim la, mu rawh; tin, ani chuan i tih tur chu a lo hrilh ang che,"" a ti a." 
Ruth3:5 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""I sawi apiang chu ka ti ang e,"" a ti a," 
Ruth3:6 Tichuan hruiah chuan a zuk kal a, a piin a hrilh ang apiang chuan a ti a," 
Ruth3:7 Tin, Boaza chuan chaw a ei a, a in zawh chuan a rilru a lo hlim ta em em a, buh vum bulah chuan mu turin a kal ta a; tin, zawitein a va kal a, a ke chu a hlim a, a mu ve ta a." 
Ruth3:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, zanlai chuan chu pa chuan a hlau a, lehlam a hawi a; tin, ngai teh, a ke bulah chuan hmeichhia a lo mu reng mai a." 
Ruth3:9 Tin, ani chuan, ""Tunge i nih?"" a ti a. Ani chuan, ""I chhiahhlawhnu Ruthi ka ni; chutichuan i chiahhlawh hi i puan mi han zawn rawh, ka laichin bul i ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Ruth3:10 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka fanu, Lalpain malsawm che rawh se: tlangval rethei emaw, hausa emaw i zui loh danah hian a tir ai mahin a hnu lamah hian thatna i tilang nasa ta zawk a" 
Ruth3:11 Chutichuan ka fanu, hlau suh aw; i sawi ang zelin i chungah ka ti ang: kan khuaa mi zawng zawngte hian hmeichhe fel tak i ni tih an hre vek si a." 
Ruth3:12 Tin, laichin inhnai kan ni ngei mai a, amaherawhchu keimah aia hnai zawk a awm a." 
Ruth3:13 Zanin chu awm phawt la, naktuk zingah chuan i chungah ani chuan a laichin tih tur a tih duh chuan a tha a ni ang a; laichin pual chu ti ang hmiang: amaherawhchu laichin tih tur i chunga a tih duh loh chuan, laichin tih tur chu LALPA a nung ngei ang hian keima'n ka ti ngei ngei ang: zing thlengin mu reng mai rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ruth3:14 Tichuan zing thlengin a ke bulah chuan a mu ta a: tin, tumah la inhmuh chian theih hmain a tho va ""Hruiah chuan hmeichhia chu a lo kal tih reng reng tumahin hre suh se,"" a ti reng a." 
Ruth3:15 Tin, a hnenah, ""I puan bah kha han la la, dawh rawh,"" a ti a; tichuan a dawh a; tin, barli hu tehkhawng rukin a teh a, a chhung a, tin, khuaah a kal ta a." 
Ruth3:16 Tin, a pi hnen a han thlen chuan, ""Ka fanu, eng nge i an le?"" a lo ti a. Tin, ani chuan chu pain a chunga thil a lo tih zawng zawng chu a hrilh a." 
Ruth3:17 He barli tehkhawng ruk hi min pe a, 'I pi hnenah chuan kutbengin haw hauh suh ang che,' min ti a ni,"" a ti a.Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka fanu, eng angin nge thil a lo awm dawn i hriat hma loh chuan awm mai rawh: vawiin nia he thil hi a tih zawh hma loh chuan chu pa chu a ngawi mai dawn si lo a,"" a ti a." 
Ruth3:18 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka fanu, eng angin nge thil a lo awm dawn i hriat hma loh chuan awm mai rawh: vawiin nia he thil hi a tih zawh hma loh chuan chu pa chu a ngawi mai dawn si lo a,"" a ti a." 
Ruth4:1 Tichuan Boaza chu kulh kawngkaah chuan a han chho a, chutah chuan a thu a: tin, ngai teh, an laichin bul a chungchang thu Boazan a sawi kha alo kal a: chu mi hnenah chuan, ""E! nang kha! Lo peng la thu teh khai,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chu a lo peng a, a thu ta a." 
Ruth4:2 Tin, chu mi khuaa upaho zinga mi sawm a hruai a,a n hnenah, ""Hetah hian thu teh u khai,"" a ti a. Tichuan an thu ta a." 
Ruth4:3 Tin, an laichun bula hnenah chuan, ""Moab rama atnaga lo kir Naomi chuan kan unaupa Elimeleka ram kha a zuar a;" 
Ruth4:4 tichuan i hnena, 'Henga thute mithmuhah leh kan upateho mithmuhah hian lei rawh. I tlan duh chuan tlan la, amaherawhchu i tlan duh loh chuan ka hriat theihna'n min hrilh ang che: nang lo chu tumah a han tlantu awm dang an awm si lo a;tin, kei hi i dawtah chuan ka ni a,' tia riattir che tulin ka hria,"" a ti a. Tin ani chuan, ""Ka tlan ang e,"" a ti a." 
Ruth4:5 Tin, Boaza chuan, ""Naomi hnenah mi, chu mi ram i lei ni chuan, mitthi nupui, Moab hmeichhia Ruthi lakah mitthi hming dai loa a roluahtu tur an awm zel theih nan i lei bawk tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ruth4:6 An laichin bulpa chuan, ""Keima tan chuan ka tlan thei lo, chutilozawng keima roluah lam thu ka tikhawlo dah ang e, tlan phak ka nihna ai chu nangma'n chang mai rawh; kei zawngin ka tlan thei lo a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Ruth4:7 Hman laia Israelte zingah thil engkim an tihnghehna'na an intlan dan leh an inthleng dan chu hetiang hi a ni:- Pheikhawk hlip a, an vengte an pe a, chu chu Israelte zinga an tihngheh dan a ni." 
Ruth4:8 Chutichuan an laichin bul chuan Boaza hnenah, ""Nangma'n i tan lei zawk rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, a pheikhawk a hlip a." 
Ruth4:9 Tin, Boaza chuan pate leh mipui zawng zawng leh Kiliona leh Mahlona thil neih zawng zawng Naomi hnena mi ka lei tih hretute in ni a." 
Ruth4:10 Tin, chu chauh chu ni loin, mitthi chu a hming dai loa ro luahtu siamsak tur leh mitthi chu a unaute zingah leh a awmna hmun kulh kawngkaa a hming a bo loh nan, Moab hmeichhia Ruthi, Mahlona nupui chu ka nupui atan ka lei a; chu chu vawiinah hian nangniho hi a hretute in ni e,"" a tia." 
Ruth4:11 Tin, kulh kawngkaa mipui zawng zawng leh upate chuan, ""Hretute kan ni e. I ina hmeiche lo luta chu Rakili leh Leaii, Israel chhungkaw dintu pahnihte ang khan LALPA chuan siam rawh se: tin, Ephrath-ah chuan chhuanawm takin ti la, Bethlehemah chuan hmingthang takin lo awm ang che;" 
Ruth4:12 tin, LALPA'n he nula laka thlah a la siamsak tur che avang hian i chhungkua chu Tamarin Juda a hrinsak Pereza chhungkua ang lo ni rawh se,"" an ti a." 
Ruth4:13 Chutichuan Boaza chuan Ruthi chu a hruai a, a nupui a lo ni ta a; tin, a pawl a, LALPA chuan nau a paitir a, tin, fapa a hring a." 
Ruth4:14 Tin, hmeichhiate chuan Naomi hnenah chuan, ""Vawiin ngeia laichin hnai chham loa awmtirtu che LALPA chu fakin awm se la; Israelte zingah hian a hming lo thang rawh se." 
Ruth4:15 Tin, ani chu i nunna a lo ni ang a; i monu nangmah hmangaihtu, fapa pasarih aia i tana tha chuan amah chu a hring ta si a,"" an ti a." 
Ruth4:16 Tin, Naomi chuan nau chu a la a, a pawm a, a awm ta a." 
Ruth4:17 Tin, a vengte hmeichhia chuan a hming an saksak a, ""Naomi tan fapa a lo piang a,"" tiin a hmingah Obeda an sa a: ani chu Davida pa Jesaia pa a ni a." 
Ruth4:18 Heng hi Pereza thlahte an ni; Pereza chuan Hezrona a hring a; 
Ruth4:19 Tin, Hezrona chuan Rama a hring a; tin, Rama chuan Aminadaba a hring a;" 
Ruth4:20 tin, Salmona chuan Boaza a ring a, tin, Boaza chua Obeda a hring a;tin, Obeda chuan Jesaia a hring a; tin, Jesaia chuan Davida a hring a ni." 
Ruth4:21 tin, Obeda chuan Jesaia a hring a; tin, Jesaia chuan Davida a hring a ni." 
1Samuel1:1 Ephraim tlang ram Ramathaim-zophim kuaah chuan mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Elkana ani a; chu mi chu Jehorama fapa ani a, chu mi Elihua fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Tohua fapa ani a, chu mi chu Ephraim m Zupha fapa a ni." 
1Samuel1:2 Tin, nupui pahnih a nei a; a pakhata hming chu Hani a ni a, a pakhata hming chu chu Penini a ni a; tin, Penini chuan fate a nei a, Hani erawh chuan fa a nei ve lo a." 
1Samuel1:3 Tin, chu mi chu an khua atangin Silo khuaah Sipai hote LALPA be tur leh inthawi turin kum tin, a han kal thin a. Chutah chuan Elia fapate pahnih, Hophnia leh Phinehasa, LALPA puithiamte an awm a." 
1Samuel1:4 Tin, Elkana inthawi ni a lo thlen chuan, a nupui Penini leh a fapate leh a fanute zawng zawng chu chanvo a siam a;" 
1Samuel1:5 Hani chu hmangaih em em mah se, LALPA'n fa nei thei loa a siam avangin chan khat chauh a siamsak a." 
1Samuel1:6 Fa a neih theih loh avanga a lungngaihna tizual turin amah ertu Penini chuan a lo deuhsawh thin a. 
1Samuel1:7 Tin, chutianga kum tin, a tih avangin LALPA in a han kal apiang chuan a lungngaihna chu a lo chawhthawhsak thin a; chutichuan a tap a tap a, chaw pawh a ei lo a." 
1Samuel1:8 Tin, a pasal Elkana chuan a hnenah, ""Hani, engati nge i tah? Engati nge chaw i ei loh? Enga ti nge i thin a nat? Fapa sawm ai pawin i tan ka tha zawk lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel1:9 Chutichuan Silo khuaa chaw an eia an in zaw chuan Hani chu a tho a. Tin, Puithiam Elia chu LALPA biak in kawngka ban u la a thutnaah chuan a thu a." 
1Samuel1:10 Tin, Hani chu a rilru a mangang em m mai a, LALPA hnenah chuan a tawngtai a, lungchhe takin a tap a." 
1Samuel1:11 Tin, thu a tiam a, ""Aw Sipaihote LALPA, i bawihnu tlawmzia hi min hriatsak tak meuh a, min hriat reng a, i bawihnu hi min theihnghilh loh a, i bawihnu hi fapa i pek chuan, a dam chhung zawng LALPA ka pe ve thung ang a, a lu pawh meh reng reng a ni lo ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel1:12 Tin, heti hi a ni a, LALPA hmaa a tawngtai reng lai chuan Elia chuan a hmui phun chu a lo chhinchiah a." 
1Samuel1:13 Hani chuan a rilruina sawi a, a hmui chau a phu a, a awm chu hriat a ni lo va: chuvangin Elia chuan zua rui niin a ring a." 
1Samuel1:14 Chutichuan Elia chuan a hnenah, ""Eng chen nge rui renga i awm dawn le? I uain chu dah bo rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel1:15 Tin, Hani chuan,""Ka rui lo a sin ka pu, hmeichhe rilru lungngai tawpkhawk ka ni a; uain pawh, zupui pawh ka in hau lo a, LALPA hmaa ka rilru ka phawrh zawk a ni." 
1Samuel1:16 I bawihnu hi Beliala fanuah puh lul suh ang che: ka rilrua khat liam ka lungnih lohna leh ka lungngaihna ka sawi a nih hi,"" tiin a chhang a." 
1Samuel1:17 Tin, Elia chuan, ""Thlamuang takin kal rawh khai, Israelte Pathian chuan i thil dil chu pe che rawh se,"" tiin a chhang a." 
1Samuel1:18 Tin, ani chuan, ""I chhiahhlawhnu hian i mit lo tlung rawh se,"" a ti a. Chutichuan hmeichhia chu a kal ta a, chaw te a ei a, lungngai hmel a pu ta lo" 
1Samuel1:19 Tin, zing takah a tho a, LALPA chu an bia a, an haw a, Rama kua an in chu an thleng leh ta a: tin, Elkana chuan a nupui Hani chu a pawl a: tin, LALPA chuan ani chu a hre renga." 
1Samuel1:20 Chutichuan heti hi a ni a. Hani chuan nau a pai a, tina hun a lo thlen chuan fapa a hring a; ""LALPA ka dil a ni,"" tiin ahmingah Samuela a sa a." 
1Samuel1:21 Tichuan Elkana le a chhungte zawng zawng chu LALPA hnena an kum tin, inthawina hlan tur leh a thutiam hlen turin an kal cho a." 
1Samuel1:22 Hani erawh chu a kal chho ve lo va: a pasal hnenah chuan, ""Kei zawng naupangin hnute hnek a ban hma loh chuan ka kal chho ve lo ang e; chu mi hnuah chuan LALPA hmaa a inlan theihna'n ka hruai ang a, chutah chuan an awm reng tawh dawn nia,"" a ti a" 
1Samuel1:23 Tin, a pasal Elkana chuan a hnenah, ""Tha awm i ti apiang chuan ti rawh; a hnute hnek i bantir thlengin awm rawh; amaherawhchu LALPA chuan a thu chu tinghet ngei rawh se,"" a ti a. Chutichuan a hnute hnek ban hma loh chuan hmeichhia chu a awm ta, a fapa chu hnute a hnektir ta a." 
1Samuel1:24 Tin, hnute hnek a bantir chuan, chhangphut epha khat leh uain saidawium khat kengin sebawng pathum nena han hruai a, Silo khuaa LALPA inah chuan a kalpui a: naupang chu ala naupang hle a." 
1Samuel1:25 Tin, bawngpa chu an talh a, naupang chu Elia hnenah an hruai a." 
1Samuel1:26 Tin, ani chuan, ""Aw ka pu, i nunna chalin ka sawi e, kei chu e ka pu, he mi hmuna i kianga dinga LALPA hnena tawngtaitu hmeichhia kha ka ni ngei a." 
1Samuel1:27 He naupang dil hian ka tawngtai a ni a; tin, LALPA chuan ka dil chu min pe ta a:chuvangin kei pawhin LALPA hnenah ka hlan a ni: a dam chhung zawng LALPA tana hlan a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, chutah chuan LALPA chu a bia a." 
1Samuel1:28 chuvangin kei pawhin LALPA hnenah ka hlan a ni: a dam chhung zawng LALPA tana hlan a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, chutah chuan LALPA chu a bia a." 
1Samuel2:1 Tin, Hani chu a tawngtai a: ""LALPA chungah ka thinlunga lawm em em a, Ka ki chu LALPAah chawimawiin a awm a; Ka hmelmate chunga ka ka tihzauin a awm a. I chhandamnaah chuan ka lawm em em avangin" 
1Samuel2:2 LALPA anga thianghlim hi an awm lo; Nangma ang reng an awm si lo, Kan Pathian ang lungpui reng a awm hek lo." 
1Samuel2:3 Chuti taka chapoin thu sawi tawh suh u la: In ka atangin tawng chaltlai reng reng chhuak suh se: LALPA chu finna Pathian a ni si a,Amain thiltihte a buk fel thin." 
1Samuel2:4 Mi chak thalngulte a titliak a, Petekte tai chu chaknaa hrenin a awm a." 
1Samuel2:5 Tlaipuar thinte chu ei tur zawngin an inhlawhfa ta a,Riltam thinte chu an chawl ta: A ni, ching chuan pasariha hring ta;Fa tam tak nei nu chu a chau ta." 
1Samuel2:6 LALPA chuan a tihlum tin, a, a tinung bawk thin: Thlanah a chhuktir thin a, a hruai chuak bawk thin." 
1Samuel2:7 LALPA chuan a tirethei thin a, a tihausa bawk thin; A tilawm thin a, a chawisang bawk thin" 
1Samuel2:8 Vaivut ata rethei chu a kaitho thin a; Pachia chu ekdur ata a chawikang thin; Mi liante hnena a awmtir theih a, Ropuina lalthutthleng an chan theihna'n: Leilung nghahchan chu LALPA ta a ni a, Khawvel chu a chungah a nghat ta si a" 
1Samuel2:9 A mi thianghlimte ke chu a veng ang a, Mi sualte eraw ch thim zingah tihngawih thiapin an awm ang; LALPA beitute hu an keh sawm ang, Van atanga khawpui riin a do ang a; LALPA chuan kawlkil thelngin ro a rel ang a; A lal chu chakna a pe ang a, A hriak thiha ki chu a chawimawi ang,"" tiin." 
1Samuel2:10 Chutichuan Elkana chu Rama kuaah a inah chuan a haw ta a. Tin, naupang chuan puithiam Elia hmaan LALPA rawng chu a bawl ta a." 
1Samuel2:11 Tin, Elia fapate chu Beliala fapate an ni a; LALPA chu an hre lo va" 
1Samuel2:12 Tin, mipuitelaka puithiamte tih dan chu, mi in inthawina an rawnhlan hian, sa chhum lai takin puithiam chiahlaw hi sa thurn thirkut zum thumei mi kengin a lo kal thin a;" 
1Samuel2:13 tin, bel rawng zau emaw, bel dawt nei emaw, bel khaina nei emaw, bel dawt nei emaw, bel kaina nei emaw, bel emaw chhung chu a zuk chun a: tin, chu mi sa thurna zumin a rawn thur chhuah zawng zawng chu puithiam in a la thin a ni. Chutiang chua Israel mi chta lo kal zawng zawngte lak ata chu Silo khuaah chuan an lo tihsak thin a." 
1Samuel2:14 A ni, a thau chu an hal hmain puithiam chhiahhlawh chu a lo kal a, in thawia chhiahlawh chu a lo kal a, inthawina hnenahah chuan, ""Puithiam tana hem hmin tur sa min pe rawh: i sa chhum chu a duh lo a, a hel a duh a ni,"" a ti thin a." 
1Samuel2:15 Tin, mi chuan a hnenah, ""A thau chu hal phawt mai se la, tin, chu mi zawhah chuan i nunnain a du zat zai i la dawn nia,"" an lo tihte hian, ani chuan, ""Ni lo e, min pe nghal tur a ni; min pek loh chuan ka la lui reng reng ang,"" a ti thin a." 
1Samuel2:16 Tichuan tlangvalte sualna chu LALPA mithmuin a lo nasa ta em em mai a: mite chuan LALPA hnena inthawina hlante chu an ngaihnep phah ta si a. 
1Samuel2:17 Amaherawhchu Samuela chu naupang mah ni se la, puan zai sin puithiam kawr hain LALPA hmaah rawng a bawl a." 
1Samuel2:18 Tin, chu lo pawh chu a nuin kawr fualte a thuisak a, an kum tin, inthawina hlan tura a pasal nena an kalin kum tin, a kensak thin a." 
1Samuel2:19 Tin, Elia chuan Elkana leh anupui chu mal a sawm a, ""LALPA tana in thilhlan in hlan hi he hmeichhe thlah hian LALPA'n rul che u rawh se,"" a ti a. Tichuan an in lamah an haw ta a." 
1Samuel2:20 Tin, LALPA chuan Hani chu a kan a, nau a pai a,fapa pathun leh fanu pahniha hring a. Tin, naupang Samuela chu Lalpa hmaa chuan a lo sei lian ta a." 
1Samuel2:21 Elia chu a lo tar ta hle mai a; Israel mite zawgn zawgn chunga a fate thltih zawng leh inbiakna puan in kawngka bula rawngbawltu hmeichhiate an lo mutpui thin tute a lo hria a. 
1Samuel2:22 Tichuan an hnenah, ""Engati nge hetiang thil in tih ni le? Heng mi zawng zawng atangte hian in thiltih dan tha lote ka lo hria a ni." 
1Samuel2:23 Khai! Khai! Ka fate u, in chanchin ka lo hriat chu a tha lo lam hlir a ni; LALPA mite chu in bawhchhiattir a ni." 
1Samuel2:24 Mi pakhat mi dang chunga a sual chuan Pathianin ro a relsak ang a: amaherawhchu mi, LALPA chunga a sual chuan tuin nge ngenpui ang?"" a ti a. Chutichung pawhin an pa thu chu an awih duh chuang lo a; LALPA chuan anmahni chu a tihlum ngei dawn si a." 
1Samuel2:25 Tin, naupang Samuea chu a thang lian deuh deuh a; Pathian leh mihring duhzawngin a awm a." 
1Samuel2:26 Tin, Elia hnenah huan Pathian mi pakhat a lo kal a, a hnenah, ""LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, 'Aigupta rama Pharaoa bawiha an awm lai khan in thlahtute hnenah khan ka inlar a ni lo'm ni?" 
1Samuel2:27 Tin, Israela hnam zawng zawng zing ata ka maichama kal a, rimtui hal a, ka hmaa puithiam kawr ha turin ka puithiam atan amah chu ka ruat ani lo'm ni? Tin, i thlahtute chu Israela mite halral thilhlan zawng zawgn ka pe ani lo'm ni?" 
1Samuel2:28 Eng vangin nge ka awmnaa hlan tura ka ruat ka hnena inthawina leh ka puala thilhlan chuin rahbeha, keimah aia i fate i chawimawi zawk a, nangmahni intihthauna'na ka mi Israelte inthawina a tha tha in hman ni?"" tiin." 
1Samuel2:29 Chuvangin LALPA Israelte Pathian chuan, 'Kei chuan i chhungte leh i pa chhunge chu kumkhuain ka hmaah in awm ang chu ka ti ngei mai a,' a ti a; nimahsela tunah hian LALPA chuan, 'In awm tawp lo ang; mi chawimawi apiangte chu ka chawimawi ang a, mi hmusit apiangte chu ka ngaihnep an ni dawn si a." 
1Samuel2:30 Ngai teh, i ban te, i pa chungte bante ka tan ni chu a lo thleng dawn ta, i inah tar kuna dam reng reng an awm lo ang." 
1Samuel2:31 Israel mite Pathianin neihnunna a la pek hunah te chuan ka awmna ina tuarna i la hmu ang a: tin, i inah chuan tarkuna dam reng reng an awm lo ang." 
1Samuel2:32 Tini mi, ka maicham ata ka tibo loh tura chu i mit tikham tur leh i rilru tilungngaitu tur an ang a: i ina lopiang apiangte chu an vanglai takin an thi zel ang." 
1Samuel2:33 Tin, hei hi, i fapate pahnih Hophnia leh Phinehasa chunga thil lo thleng tur chu i tan chinchiahna a niang; ni khatah an pahnihin an thi ve ve ang." 
1Samuel2:34 Tin, puithiam rinawm tak ka tan ka din tha leh ang a, chu chuan ka thinlung leh ka rilru remzawngin a ti ang a; tin, chhungkaw nghet takah ka din ang a, kumkhuain ka hriak thiha hmaah chuan a awm ang.Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, i ina la awm zawng zawng chu tangka leh chhang dilin an kal ang a, chibai an buk ang a, chhang tlem tal ei tur ka hmuh theihna'n puithiam hna eng emaw hmu theihna'n puithiam hna eng emaw min thawhtir rawh khai, an ti ang,' a ti a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel2:35 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, i ina la awm zawng zawng chu tangka leh chhang dilin an kal ang a, chibai an buk ang a, chhang tlem tal ei tur ka hmuh theihna'n puithiam hna eng emaw hmu theihna'n puithiam hna eng emaw min thawhtir rawh khai, an ti ang,' a ti a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel3:1 Tin, naupang Samuela chuan Elia hmaa uan LALPA rawng a bawl a, chung lai chuan LALPA thu chu a hlu hle mai a; a langa inlarnate a awm lo a," 
1Samuel3:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung lai chuan Elia chu ama hmuna a mut laiin, (a mit a thim tawh deuh a. Khua a hmu tha thei tawh mang lo a,)" 
1Samuel3:3 Pathian khawnvar pawh a la mit hmain, Pathian bawm awmna Lalpa biak inah chuan Samuela chu a han mu a;" 
1Samuel3:4 LALPA chuan Samuela a ko a; ani chuan, ""Heta hi ka awm,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel3:5 TinElia hnenah chuan a va tlan a, a hnenah, ""Heta hi ka awm e, min ko a,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka ko lo va che; va mu leh tawh,"" a ti a. Tichuan a kal a, a va mu leh ta a." 
1Samuel3:6 Tin, LALPA chuan Samuela chu ako leh a. Tin, Samuela chu a tho a, Elia hnenah chuan a kal a, ""Heta hi ka awm e; min ko a,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Ka ko lo va che, ka fapa, va mu le tawh,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel3:7 Chung lai chuan Samuela chuan LALPA chu a hre lo a, LALPA thu a hnena puan a la ni bawk lo a." 
1Samuel3:8 Tin, LALPA chuan Samuela chu ako leh a. Tin, Samuela chu a tho a, Elia hnenah chuan a kal a, ""Heta hi ka awm e; min ko a,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Ka ko lo va che, ka fapa, va mu le tawh,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel3:9 Chuvangin Elia chuan Samuela hnenah, ""Kal la, va mu leh ta la, a kohleh che chuan, 'LALPA thu sawi rawh, i chhiahhlawhin a ngaithla e,' i ti a ni ang chu,"" a ti a. Tichuan Samuela chu a hmunah chuan a va mu leh ta a." 
1Samuel3:10 Tin, LALPA chu a lo kal a, a ding a, a hmaa a koh ang kha, ""Samuel, Samuel,"" tiin a ko leh a. Chutichuan Samuela chuan, ""Thu sawi rawh, i chhiahhlawhin a ngaithla e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel3:11 Tin, LALPA chuan Samuela hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Israel rama hian a hria apiangte beng a khing hnih hniha thawng zawng takin thil ka ti dawn a ni." 
1Samuel3:12 Chu mi ni chuan a chhungkaw chungchang thu ka sawi zawng zawng chu a bul atangin a tawp thlengin Elia chungah ka ti dawn a ni. 
1Samuel3:13 A faten Pathian an sawichiatna sual chu hre reng pawha a khap loh avangin a chhungkua chu kumkhua atan ka ngaihtuah dawn ani tih ka hrilh tawh si a. 
1Samuel3:14 Chuvangin Elia chhungkaw hnenah chuan Elia chhungte bawhchhiatna chu inthawinain emaw, thilhlanin emaw, engtikahmah tihkian theih ani lo ang tiin chhia ka cham tawh a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel3:15 Tin, Samuela chu zing tlengin a mu a, tin, LALPA in kawngkharte chu a hawng a. chutichuan Samuela chuan chu mi inlarna chu Elia hriattir chu a hlauthawng a." 
1Samuel3:16 Chutichuan Elia chuan Samuela chu a ko a, ""Samuel, ka fapa,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Heta hi ka awm e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel3:17 Tin, ani chuan, ""Eng thil nge LALPA chuan i hnenah a sawi le? Ka lakah engma zep suh aw; i nena a sawi zawng zawng chu ka lakah zep i neih chuan i chunga Pathianin a tih tihin ti se la, chu aia nasa pawhin,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel3:18 Tin, Samuela chuan engkim a hrilh fai ta vek a, a lakah chuan engmah zep a nei lo a. Tichuan ani chuan, ""LALPA a ni lawm, tha a tih ang zelin ti rawh se,"" a tia." 
1Samuel3:19 Tin, Samuela chu a lo thang lian deuh deuh a, a hnenah LALPA a awm zel a, a thu reng reng chu leilungah a luan raltir lo a." 
1Samuel3:20 Tichuan Dan atanga Beer-seba thleng raka Israel mite zawng zawng chuan Samuela chu LALPA zawlnei atan tihngheh a ni tih an lo hre ta a.Tin, LALPA chu Silo-ah chuan a inlar leh a: LALPA chu thuin Samuela hnenah chuan Silo-ah a inlar a ni si a." 
1Samuel3:21 Tin, LALPA chu Silo-ah chuan a inlar leh a: LALPA chu thuin Samuela hnenah chuan Silo-ah a inlar a ni si a." 
1Samuel4:1 Tin, Samuela thu chu Israel mite zawng zawng zingah a thang chhuak ta a. Tin, Israel mite chu Philistia mite do turin an kal chuak a, Ebeezer kiangah tanhmun an khuar a. Tin, Philistia mite chuan Aphek-ah tanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel4:2 Tin, Philistia mite chu Israel mite lo dang turin an lo inzar darh a: tin, an han inbei chuan Philistia mite hmaah chuan Israel mite chu an tlawm ta a, indona hmunah chuan sipai sangli emaw lai an that a." 
1Samuel4:3 Tin, mipuite an riahmuna an va kalin Israel upate chuan, ""Eng vangin nge vawinah hian Philistia mite hmaa LALPA chuan min tihtlawm ni aw? Kan hnena awma kan hmelmate kut ata min chandam turin Silo ata LALPA thuthlung bawm chu i han la ang u,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel4:4 chutichuan mipuite chuan Silo-ah chuan mi an ti r,a chuta ta chu cherubim chunga thu, sipaihote LALPA thuthlunna bawk chu an va la ta a: tin, Pathian thuthlunna bawm an laknaah chuan Elia fapate pahnih Hopnia leh Phinehasa an tel ve a." 
1Samuel4:5 Chutichuan LALPA thuthlunna bawmin an riahhmun a lo thlen chuan Israel mi zawng zawnge chu ring takin an au dur dur mai a, leite lam pawh a nghawr ri dur dur mai a." 
1Samuel4:6 Tin, Philistia miten an au thawm an hriat chuan, ""Hebrai-ho riahhmun au thawm ri ta dur dur mai chu eng tizia nge ni le?"" an ti a. Tin, an riahhmuna LALPA bawm a lo thleng a ni tih an hre ta a." 
1Samuel4:7 Tin, Philistia mie chuan an hlau ta a, ""Riahhmunah Pathian a lo kal ta a nih chu,"" an ti a. ""Kan chung a pik e! Tun hma lamah chutiang a awm ngai si lo a," 
1Samuel4:8 kan chung a pik e! Chung Pathian kut chak tak ata chu tuin nge min chhandam ang? Chung Pathian chu a ni, Aigupta mite thlalera hri chi tinrenga tihlumtu kha." 
1Samuel4:9 Aw, nangni Philistia mite u, in chiahhlawha an awm ang khan Hebrai-hote chhiahhlawha in awm lohna'n chak takin awm u la, intimipa rawh u; intimipa u la, bei zel rawh u,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel4:10 Tichuan Philistia mi chuan an bei a, Israel mite chu an tlawm a, an puan in lam theuhvah an tlan ta vek mai a: an that nasa em em mai a, Israel-ho zinga sipai singthum an thi a ni." 
1Samuel4:11 Tin, Pathian bawm chu an laksak a, tin, Elia fapa pahnih, Hopnia leh Phinehasa te chu an that bawk a." 
1Samuel4:12 Sipai zinga Benjamina thlah mi pakhat a tlan a, a puante tet phung leh a lua lei kai luamin chu mi ni la la chuan Silo a va thleng a." 
1Samuel4:13 Tin, a va thlen chuan ngai teh, Elia chuan kawng sira a thutnaah thu chungin a lo thlir reng a, Pathian bawm avang khan a rilruin a khur a khur a. Tin, mi chuan khua a han thlan chuen, chanchin chu a han sawi chuan a khuain an au ta chuah chuah mai a." 
1Samuel4:14 Tin, Elia'n an au thawm alo hriatin, ""Chu mi ri mur mur chu eng tizia nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, mi chu hmanhmawh takin a va kal a, Elia chu a va hrilh a." 
1Samuel4:15 Elia chu kum 98 mi a ni a, a mit a thim tawh a, khua a hmu thei tawh lo a." 
1Samuel4:16 Tin, mi chuan Elia hnenah chuan, ""Sipai zing atanga lo kal ka nih hi, vawiinah hian sipai zing ata lo tlan ka ni,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka fapa, eng angin nge thil a awm le?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel4:17 Tin, chanchin rawn thlentu chuan achhang a, ""Israel mite chu Philistia mite hmaah chuan an tlanchhia a, tin, mipui zingah inthahna nasa tak a awm bawk a, tini fapate pahnih Hophnia leh Phinehasa pawh an thi a, tin, Pathian bawm paw an laksak ta,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel4:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chutia Pathian bawm thu a han sawi veleh chuan kawngkhar bula thutphah ata chu a zangthalin a tlu a, a nghawng a tliak a, a thi ta a: amah hi a tar tawhin a indawl zo tawh lo a ni. Israel chunga kum sawmli ro rel tawh a ni." 
1Samuel4:19 Tin, a monu, Phinehasa nupi chuan nau a pai a, a hrin a hnai tawh hle a:Pathian bawm a lasak tih thua han riat a, a pu leh a pasal an thi tih a han hriat chuan a kaikun a, nau a hring ta a, a na chuan a rawn nang ta nghal si a." 
1Samuel4:20 Tin, a thih dawn tepa a kianga ding hmeichhiate chuan a hnenah, ""Hlau suh, fapa i hrin tak hi,"" an ti a. Nimahsela a chang hauh lo a, angaihsak ek lo." 
1Samuel4:21 Tin, ""Ropuina chuan Israel chu a chauhsan ta."" tin, naupang hmelah chuan Ikaboda a sa a. Pathian bawm chu an laksak ta a, a pu leh a pasal pawh an thi ta si a.Ropina chuan Israel-te chu a chhuahsan ta, Pathian bawm chu a laksak ta si a,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel4:22 Ropina chuan Israel-te chu a chhuahsan ta, Pathian bawm chu a laksak ta si a,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel5:1 Chutichuan Philistia mite chuan Pathian bawm chu an la a, Eben-ezer ata chu Asdod khuaah an kalpui ta a." 
1Samuel5:2 Tin, Philistia mite chuan Pathian bawm chu an la a, Dagona biak inah an la lut a, Dagona kiangah chuan an dah a." 
1Samuel5:3 Tin, Asdod khuaa mite chu atuk zing taka an han thawh chuan, ngai teh, LALPA bawm hmaah chuan Dagona chu a hmaia lei siin a lo tlu der mai a. Tin, Dagona chu an la a, a awmna hmunah chuan an dah leh a." 
1Samuel5:4 Tin, a tuk leh zing taka na han thaw chuan, ngai teh, LALPA bawm hmaah chuan Dagona a hmaia lei siin a lo tlu der mai a; tin, Dagona lu leh a kutphah bawr khing hnih chhum chu kawngka bulah chuan alo lum reng mai a: Dagona taksa chauh chu a lo awm ta mai a." 
1Samuel5:5 Chu mi avang chuan Dagona puithiam te, Dagona biak ina lo kal thin reng rengte pawhin Asdod kua Dagona kawngka bul chu tunthlengin an rap ngam lo a ni." 
1Samuel5:6 Chutichuan LALPA kut chuan Asdod khuaa mite chu a delh ta hle mai a, chhiatna a thlensak ta hlawm a, Asdod khua le a chehvelte chu ngawtin a hrem ta bawk a." 
1Samuel5:7 Tichuan Asdod khua amiten chutiang chu a nih an lo hriatin, ""Israelte Pathian bawm chu kan hnenah awm reng teh suh se, kan chung leh kan pathian Dagona chunga a kutthlak ana em mai,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel5:8 Chutichuan Philistia lal zawng zawngte chu an hnenah an ko khawm a, ""Israelte Pathian bawm chu engtin nge kan ti ang?"" an ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Israelte Pathian bawm chu Gath khuaah va kalpui rawh u,"" tiin an chhang a: tichuan Israelte Pathian bawm chu an va kalpui ta a." 
1Samuel5:9 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, chutia ankalpui lai chuan LALPA kut chuan khua chu a tibuai ta nuai nuai mai a:khuaa mihringte chu alian atein a hrem a, ngawtna hri an chungah a lentir a." 
1Samuel5:10 Tichuan Pathian bawm chu Ekron-ah an thawn let a, a va thlen chuan Ekron khuaa mite chu, ""Israelte Pathian bawm chu keimahni leh kan mite tihlum turin, kan hnenah an rawn la ta,"" tin, an au ta chiam mai a." 
1Samuel5:11 Chutichuan Philistia lal zawng zawngte chu an ko khawm a, ""Israelte Pathian bawm hi kal botir u la, keimahni leh ka mite min tihhlum lohna'n a awm hmun pangngaiah kal leh rawh se,"" an ti a. Khaw pum puiah chuan thihna khawp buai nuai nuaina a awm a; Pathian kut chuan chu khua chu a delh hle mai si a.Tin, a thi lote chu an ngawt hlawm a, tichuan chu khaw au thawm chuan van khi a han thleng a." 
1Samuel5:12 Tin, a thi lote chu an ngawt hlawm a, tichuan chu khaw au thawm chuan van khi a han thleng a." 
1Samuel6:1 Tin, LALPA bawm chu Philistia mite ramah chuan thla sarih a awm a." 
1Samuel6:2 Tin, Philistia mite chuan, ""LALPA bawm chu engtin nge kan tih ang? A awmna pangngaia kaltir lehnaziamin hrilh teh u khai,"" tiin puithiamte leh aienthiamte an ko a." 
1Samuel6:3 Tin, anni chuan, ""Israelte Pathian bawm hi in kaltir dawn pawhin a ruak chuankaltir hauh suh u, a hnenah bawhchhiat thawina hlan ngei ngei rawh u, tichuan tihdamin in awm ang a, tin, eng tiaa a kut chu a sawnsak loh che u nge ni tih in hriaang, "" an ti a." 
1Samuel6:4 Chuti chuan anni chuan, ""A hnenah kan bawhchhiatthawina hlan tur chu eng nge ni ang?"" an ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Philistia lal zatin rangkachak ngawt lem panga leh rangkachak chaichim lem panga; in zaa chunga hri leng leh in lalte chung leng chu hmun khat a ni si a." 
1Samuel6:5 Chuvangin in ngawt lemte leh in ram tichetu chaihim lemte siam u la; tin, Israelte Pathian chu chawimawi rawh u, tichuan a kut chu in chungah te, in pathian leh in ram chungahte a tizang du mahna." 
1Samuel6:6 Aigupta mite leh Pharoan rilru an tihkhauhang khan engati nge in rilru in tihkhauh ni? An zinga thil mak taka a tih khan mie chu an kaltir a, an chhuak ta ani lo'm ni?" 
1Samuel6:7 Chuvangin tunah hian tawlailir tharbuatsaiula, bawngpui pahnih, a hnute sawrlai, nghawngkawl la bel ngai hauh loh nen; chung bawngpuite chu tawlailira chuan bel ula, tin, a note chu in lamah rawn hruai hawnsak rawh u." 
1Samuel6:8 Tin, LALPA bawm chu la u la, tawlailirah chuan dah u la; tin, bawhchhiat thawi nana in hlan rangkachak thil hlu chu thingremah kungin a sirah dah u la, kaltir ula, thlah mai rawh u." 
1Samuel6:9 Tichuan amaha ramri lampang kawng zawhin Beth-semes-ah akal emaw ent eh u, a kal chuan kan chunga thil tha lo tak hi ama tih a lo ni ang a; a kal loh chuan min hrem chu ama kut a lo ni lo tih kan hriat a, kan chungah a lo awm ve hrim mai a ni ang,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel6:10 Tin, mite chuan chutiang chuan an ti a: bawngpui, a hnute sawrlai pahnih an hruai a, tawlailirah chuan an bel a, a note chuin lamah an khung a:" 
1Samuel6:11 Tin, LALPA bawm chu tawlailirah chuan an dah a, rangkachak chaichim lem leh ngawt lem dahna thingrem nen." 
1Samuel6:12 Tin, bawngpuite chuan Beth-semes lam panin kawng an zawh ta ngat ngat a; tichuan bu chung zelin kawngpui chu an zawh a, ding lamah emaw vei lama emaw an pek hlek lo a; tin, Philistia lalte chuan Beh-semes ramri thlengin an zui a." 
1Samuel6:13 Tin, Beth-semes khuaa mite chuan ruamah hian an buh an lo seng a, an hawi chho a, bawm chu an han hmu a, an lawm hle ta mai a." 
1Samuel6:14 Tin, tawlailir chu Beth-semes khuaa mi Josua loah chuan a lo lut a, lungpui lian tak awmna laiah chuan a ding ta reng a; tin, tawlailir thing chu an ek a, LALPA biakna'n bawngpuite chu halral thilhlanah an hmang ta a." 
1Samuel6:15 Tin, Levi chite chuan LALPA bawm chu rangkachak thil hlu awmna thingrem nen chuan an la thla a, lungpui chungah chuan an dah a; tin, Beth-semes khuaa mie chuan chu mi ni vek chuan halral thilhlante chu inthawinate LALPA hnenah an hlan a." 
1Samuel6:16 Tin, chu chu Philistia lal pangate chuan an en zawh hnuin, chu mi ni la la chuan Ekron khaw lamah an haw leh ta a." 
1Samuel6:17 Philistia miten rangkachak ngawt lem LALPA hnena bawchiat thawina'na an hlan chu heti zat hi a ni: Asdod khaw pualah pakat, Gaza khaw puala pakhat, Askelon khaw pualah pakhat, Gaza khaw puala pakat, Askelon khaw puala pakhat, Gat khaw puala pakhat, Ekron kaw puala pakhat:" 
1Samuel6:18 tin, rangkachak chaichim lem chu khua zawng zawng, kulh ne kua le thingtlang lam khua pawh chhiarveka lal panga te a Philistia mite khaw zat a ni a: LALPA bawm an ngahna pungpui ngei chua Beth-semes khuaa mi Josua loa chuan tun thleng hian a la awm reng a ni." 
1Samuel6:19 Tin, LALPA bawm chhung a en avangin Beth-semes khuaa mite chu a hrem a, an zinga mi 50,070 ze a hrem a ni: LALPA'n a hrem nasat em avag chuan mite chu an tap a." 
1Samuel6:20 Beth-semes khuaa mite chuan, ""He Pathian thianghlim LALPA maa hian tu nge ding thei ang a, kan nen ata hi tu hnena nge a kal chhoh tak ang le?"" an ti a.Chu chuan Kiriath-jearim khuaa mite hnena chuan, ""Philistia mite chuan LALPA bawm chu an rawn da leh ta a, lo chhuk u la, in hnen lamah la chho rawh u khai,"" tia hrilh turin mite an tir ta a." 
1Samuel6:21 Chu chuan Kiriath-jearim khuaa mite hnena chuan, ""Philistia mite chuan LALPA bawm chu an rawn da leh ta a, lo chhuk u la, in hnen lamah la chho rawh u khai,"" tia hrilh turin mite an tir ta a." 
1Samuel7:1 Tichuan Kiriath-jearim khuaa mite chu an zu kal a, LALPA bawm chu an la chho a, tlanga Abinadaba ina chuan a la lut a, a fapa Elazara chu LALPA bawm enkawltu atan an tihrang a." 
1Samuel7:2 Tin, heti hi ani a, Kiriath-jearim-a bawm a awm chung chu rei tak ani a. kum sawmhnih ze a ni: tin, Israel chungte zawng zawngin LALPA chu an lunglen leh ta a." 
1Samuel7:3 Tin, Samuela chuan Israel chungte zawng zawng hnenah chuan, in thinlung takzeta LALPA lam lo hawi in nih tak tak chuan, ram dang pathiante leh Asterothi-te chu in zing ata dah bo daih ta che u, in thinlung chu LALPA tan buatsaih u la, ama rawng chau bawl rawh u tichuan Philistia mite kut ata hi a chhanchhuak dawn che u nia,"" tiin a sawi a." 
1Samuel7:4 Tin, Israel mite chuan Baala-te leh Asterothi-te chu an dah bo ta a, LALPA rawng chauh chu an bawl ta a." 
1Samuel7:5 Tin, Samuela chuan, ""Israel mi zawng zawng chu Mizpe-ah ko khawm vek u la, LALPA hnenah ka tawngtaisak ang che u,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel7:6 Tichuan Mizpe-ah an kal khawm ta a, tin, tui an chawi a, LALPA hmaah chuan an leihbua a, chu mi ni chuan chaw an nghei a, chutah chuan, ""LALPA chunga chuan kan lo sual taa ni,"" an ti a. Tin, Samuela chuan Mizpe-ah chuan Israel mite ro a relsak a." 
1Samuel7:7 Tin, Philistia miten Israel mite Mizpe-ah chuan an awm khawm tih an riat chuan Israel mite bei turin Philistia lalhoe chu an thawk chho a, Chu chu Israel miten an lo hriat chuan Philistia mite chu an hlau a." 
1Samuel7:8 Tichuan Israel mite chuan Samuela hnenah, ""Philistia mite kut ata min chhandam tura LALPA kan Pathian min auhsak chu bang suh khai,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel7:9 Tin, Samuela chuan beram no hnute hne lai a la a, pum hal atan LALPA hnenah ahlan a: Israel mite tan Samuela chuan LALPA chu a au va: tin, LALPA chuan a chhang a." 
1Samuel7:10 tin, Samuelan halral thilhlan a hlan lai tak chuan Philistia mite chuan Israel mite bei tur chuan an rawn hnaih a; nimahsela chu mi ni chuan LALPA'n Philistia mite chunga khawpui nasa tak maiin a riktir ta dur dur mai a, a tibuai ta nuai nuai a, Israel mite hmaah chuan an tlawm ta der mai a." 
1Samuel7:11 Tin, Israel mite chu Mizpe atang chuan an chuak a, Philistia mite chu an uma, Bethkar hnuai an thlen thlengin an that zel a." 
1Samuel7:12 Chutichuan Samuela chuan lung a la a, Mizpe leh Sen inkarah chuan a phun a, ""Hei lehchenhi LALPA'n min pui a ni,"" tiin a hmingah chuan Eben-ezer a vuah a." 
1Samuel7:13 Chutihuan Philistia mite chu an tlawm ta a, Israelte ramah chuan an kal leh ta lo a; tin, LALPA kut chan Philistia mite chu Samuela dam chhung zawng chuan a tai ta reng a," 
1Samuel7:14 Tin, Philistia miten Israel mite khua an lakte chu Ekron atanga Gath thlengin Israel mite an pe kir leh a, a ram chu Israel miten Philisita mite kut ata an chhan chhuak a. Tin, Israel mite leh Amor mite chu inremin an awm a." 
1Samuel7:15 Tin, Samuela chuan a dam chungin Israel mite ro a rel a." 
1Samuel7:16 Tin, kum tinin Bethel leh Gilgal leh Mizpe hi a kan vel thin a; chung hnuahte chuan Israel mite ro a rel thin a.Tin, a in awmna a ni avangin Rama khuaa chuan a haw thin a; chutah chuan Israel mite ro a rel a, chuta chuan LALPA tan maicham a siam a." 
1Samuel7:17 Tin, a in awmna a ni avangin Rama khuaa chuan a haw thin a; chutah chuan Israel mite ro a rel a, chuta chuan LALPA tan maicham a siam a." 
1Samuel8:1 Tin, heti hi ani a, Samuela chu a lo pa ta a, a fapate chu Israel mite chunga roreltua a siam a." 
1Samuel8:2 A fa tir hming hu Joela a ni a; tin, a dawttu hming chu Abija ani a; Beer-sea-a roreltu an ni a." 
1Samuel8:2 A fa tir hming hu Joela a ni a; tin, a dawttu hming chu Abija ani a; Beer-sea-a roreltu an ni a." 
1Samuel8:3 Nimahsela a fate chuan a awmdan chu an la ve lo a, sum leh pai lam an um a, thamnate an la a, dik lo takin ro an rel a." 
1Samuel8:4 Chutichuan Israel mite upaho zawng zawng an inkhawm a, Rama khuaah Samuela hnenah an kal a;" 
1Samuel8:5 a hnennah, ""Ngai teh, i lo pa ta hle mai a, i fapate lah chuan i dawm dan chu an la ve si lo a; hnam dang zawng zawngte ang bawka kan chunga rorel turin lal min siam rawh khai,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel8:6 Nimahsela a hnehah, ""Ro min relsaktu tur lal min pe rawh,"" an tih thu chuan Samuela chu a tilawm lo hle mai a." 
1Samuel8:7 Tichuan Samuela chuan LALPA hnenah a tawngtai a. Tin, LALPA chuan Samuela hnenah, ""Mipuiten i hnena an sawi zawng zawng chu ngaithla rawh; nang duh lo che an ni lo a, an chunga lal atan keimah mi duh lo an ni zawk e." 
1Samuel8:8 Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chauh ni atanga tun thlenga an thiltih dan zawng zawng, min hawisan Pathian dang rawnte min bawlsan thin ang bawk hian i chunga an ti a nih hi." 
1Samuel8:9 Chuvangin an thu chu ngaithla rawh: amaherawhchu urhsun taka tiamkamin an chungah roreltu lal chet dan tur chu kawhhmuh chiah rawh,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel8:10 Tin, Samuela chuan LALPA thu zawng zawng chu lal diltu mipuite chu a hrilh vek a." 
1Samuel8:11 In chunga roreltu tur lal chet dan chu hetiang hi a ni ang: in fapate chu a sakawr leh a tawlailir chuan piah a ruat ang a, a tawlailir hmaah tlante an awm ang a:" 
1Samuel8:12 tina sipai sang hotuah te, sawmnga hotutahte a ruat ang a; tin, thenkhatte chu a lei lettu atan te, abu sengtu atan te, a indo thuamhnaw siamtu atan te, a tawlailir hmanraw siamtu atan te ahmang ang a." 
1Samuel8:13 Tin, in fanute chu rimtui siamtuah te, chaw chhumtuah te, chhang siamtuah a hmang ang." 
1Samuel8:14 Tin, in lo te, in grep huan te, in oliv huan te, a tha tahte a chhuahsak ang che u a, a chhiahhlawhte a pe ang." 
1Samuel8:15 Tin, tin, thlai chi leh in grep huana mi sawma pakhat a laksak ang che u a, a chhiahhlawhte leh hotute a pe ang." 
1Samuel8:16 Tin, in chiahhlawhpa te, in chhiahlawhnu te, in tlangval tha tha te, in sabengtung te a chhuhsak ang che u a, a hnathawktu atan a ruai ang." 
1Samuel8:17 In beramruala mi sawma pakat a laksak ang che u a; tin, a chhiahhlawhte in ni ang." 
1Samuel8:18 chuan in la rum chhuak ang a; nimahsela chu mi hun chuan LALPA'n a chang lo ang che u,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel8:19 Nimahsela mipuite chuan Samuela thu chu an pawm duh lo a, ""A ni lo e, lal kan nei ngei tur a ni;" 
1Samuel8:20 tichuan hnam dang zawng zawngte ang kan lo ni ang a, tin, kan lal chuan romin relsak ang a, kan hnamte hruaiin ralte min dopui ang,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel8:21 Tin, Samuela chuan mipuite thusawi zawng zawng chu a hria a, LALPA benga chuan a thun leh chhawng a.Tin, LALPA chuan Samuela hnenah, ""An thu chu pawm la, lal siamsak rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, Samuela chuan Israel mite hnenah chuan, ""Mi tin, mahni khuaah haw theuh rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel8:22 Tin, LALPA chuan Samuela hnenah, ""An thu chu pawm la, lal siamsak rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, Samuela chuan Israel mite hnenah chuan, ""Mi tin, mahni khuaah haw theuh rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel9:1 Benjamin rama Benjamina thlah mi pakhat mi chak huaisen tak i a awm a, a hming chu Kisa a ni a, chu mi chu Abiela fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Zeorora fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Bekoratha fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Aphia fapa a ni a." 
1Samuel9:2 Tin, ani chuan fapa a nei a, a hming chu Saula ani a, tlangval tlawntlai tha tak ani a, srael mite zinga chuan a aia tlawntlai tha reng reng an awm lo a; tuma a koki khum pawh an awm lo." 
1Samuel9:3 Tin, Saula pa Kisa sabengtung te a bo hlawm a. Tin, Kisa chuan a fapa Saula hnenah chuan, ""Tho la, chhiahhlawh pakhat hruai la, sabengtung va zawng teh khai,""a ti a." 
1Samuel9:4 Tichuan Ephraim tlang ramte chu a fang a, tin, Salisa ramte paw a fang a, nimahsela an hmu lo va: tichuan Saalim ram an vang leh a, chutah pawh chuan an awm lo va: tin, Benjamin mite ram a fang leh a, nimahsela an hmu ta chuang lo a." 
1Samuel9:5 Zuph ram an thlen chuan Saula chuan a hnena awm ve, a chhiahhlawh hnenah chuan, ""Hawh teh, i haw leh teh tawh tawh mai ang, chutilochuan ka pain sabengtung ngaihtuah thulhin keimahni minngaihtuah dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel9:6 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, he khuaah hian Pathian mi a awm a, mi zahawm tak a ni a, a sawi apiang chu a lo thleng ngei ngei thin a ni: hawh teh, chutah chuan i kal teh ang, kan kalna turte hi min hrilh thei mial mahna, "" a ti a."
