1Samuel9:7 Chutichuan Saula chuan a chhiahhlawh hnenah chuan, ""Nimahsela e ngai teh, kal ang i la, chu mi chu eng nge kan kensang ang? Kan bawma chhang lah a awm tawh si lo a, Pathian mi pawmman ken tur a awm hauh lo mai: eng nge kan neih saw?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel9:8 Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan Saula chu a chhang leh a, ""Ngai teh, tangka sekel hmun lia thena hmun khat chu ka la keng a: chu chu, kan kalna tur min hrilh manah Pathian mi chu ka pe ang e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel9:9 (Tun hma lam chuan Israel hote zinga miin Pathian rawn an duh hian, ""Hawh teh, hmutheitu hnenah i kal teh ang,"" an ti thin a: tun laia zawlnei an tih thina hi tun hma chuan Hmutheitu an ti thin a ni.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Chutichuan Saula chuan a chhiahhlawh hnenah, ""A that hlauh chu, i kal teh ang hmiang, "" a ti a. Chutichuan Pathian mi awmna khuaah chuan an kal ta a." 
1Samuel9:11 Khaw pan chhohnaa an han chhoh lai chuan nula tui chawi tura lo chhuakte an han hmu a, an hnenah, ""Hetah hian hmutheitu chu a awm em?"" an ti a." 
1Samuel9:12 Tin, anni chuan an chhang a, ""Aw e, in hmaah a lo kal a sin, hmanhmawh rawh u khai, vawiinah hian khuaah chuan a lo kal a ni; vawiinah hian hmun sangah mite an inthawi a ni:" 
1Samuel9:13 Khua in han luh veleh hmun sanga chaw ei tura a kal hmain in han hmu nghal mai ang; inthawina chu malsawmtu tur anih avangin a thlen hma loh chuanmipui chuan chaw an ei dawn lo a ni;chu mi hnuah chuan an mi sawmte chuan an ei thin a ni. Chuvangin kal chho thuai u la, in han hmu nghal mai ang,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel9:14 Tichuan khuaa chuan an kal cho ta a; tin, khua an han luh chuan ngai teh, Samuela hmun sanga kal tur chuan a tawk a." 
1Samuel9:15 Tin, Saula lo kal hma ni khatah chuan LALPA chuan Samuela chu a bekbawr a," 
1Samuel9:16 Naktuk hetih hun lai hian Benjamin ram atangin i hnenah mi pakhat ka rawn kaltir dawn a, ka mi Israelte chunga hotu ni turin hriak i thih ang a, ani chuan Philistia mite kut ata ka mite a chhandam ang; an au thawm chuan ka hnen a lo thlen tak avangin ka mite chu ka ngaihsak a ni."" tiin." 
1Samuel9:17 Tin, Samuelan Saula a hmuh chuan LALPA'n a hnenah, ""En teh, i hnena ka mi sawia kha; ani hian ka mite chunga thu a nei ang, a ti a." 
1Samuel9:18 Chuti chuan Saula chuan kulh kawngkaah Samuela chu a va hnaih a, ""Hmutheitu in chu khawiah nge a awm min hrilh teh khai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel9:19 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula chu a chhang a, ""Keimah hi hmutheitu chu ka ni; kahmaa hian hmun sang lam panin kal la, vawiinah hian ka hnenah chaw i ei dawn a ni; tin, naktuk zingah chuan ka kaltir ang chia, i rilrua awm zawng zawng pawh ka hrilh ang che." 
1Samuel9:20 Tin, i sabengtung, ni thum bo tawhte thu chu lungkham suh, an hmu tawh e. Israelte zinga ropuina zawng zawng chu tu tan nge ni? I tan leh i pa ina mi zawng awng tan ani lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel9:21 Tin, Saula chuan a chhang a, ""Israel hnam zinga te ber, Benjamin hnam ka ni law ni? Tin, kan chhungkua pawh Benjamin hnam chhungkua zawng zawng zinga te ber ani lo'm ni? Eng tiziaa hetianga ka hnena sawi nge i nih le?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel9:22 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula leh achhiahhlawh chu a hruai a, mikhual pindahna chuan a hruai lut a, an mi sawm, sawmthum lai zingah chuan hmun ropui berah a thuttir a." 
1Samuel9:23 Tin, Samuela chuan chaw chhumtu hnenah chuan, ""I hnena dah hran tur ka tih chanvo ka pek che kha han la rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel9:24 Chutichuan chaw chhumtu chuan a bawp leh a chunga awm chu a rawn la a, Saula hmaah chuana va hlui a. Tin, Samuela chuan, ""En teh, ka lo dah hrana chu! Kil la, ei rawh; a hun hun atan hei hi ka lo ruatsak reng che a ni, 'Mite ka sawm khawm e' ka ti tawh bawk si a,"" a ti a. Chutichuan chu mi ni chuanSaula chu Samuela te nen chawhlui an kil za ta a." 
1Samuel9:25 Tin, hmun sang ata khuaa an chhuk chuan, in chunga Saula chu mutna an siamsak a, a mu ta a." 
1Samuel9:26 Tin, zing takah a tho a; ni chhuah dawn lai velin Samuela chuan in chunga awm Saula chu a ko a, ""Tho la, ka laltir te teh tawh ang che,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Saula chu a tho a, an pahnih chuan an kal chhuak a, amah leh Samuela chu an chuak ta a.Khaw hmawr lam chu an zuk thlen chuan, Samuela chuan Saula hnenah, ""Chhiahlawh hi ka hma lamah kaltir la, (ani chu a kal ta a) nang erawh chu ding rih la, Pathian thu ka han hrilh teh rih ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel9:27 Khaw hmawr lam chu an zuk thlen chuan, Samuela chuan Saula hnenah, ""Chhiahlawh hi ka hma lamah kaltir la, (ani chu a kal ta a) nang erawh chu ding rih la, Pathian thu ka han hrilh teh rih ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel10:1 Chutichuan Samuela chuan hriakbawk chu ahan phawrh a, a lua chuan alei a, a fawp a, ""LALPA chuan a rochante chunga hotu ni turin hriak a thih che a ni lo'm ni?" 
1Samuel10:2 Vawiina mi chhuahsan hnu hian Zelza-ah Benjamin ramria Rakili tlan kiangah mi pahnih i hmu ang a: tin, anni chuan i hnenah, 'Sabengtung i zawnte chu an hmu tawh e: tinngai teh, i pa chuan sabengtung chu a ngaihtuah tawh lo a, nangmah mawlh a ngaihtuah a, ka fapa chu engtin nge ka tih tak ang, a ti a ti mai a,' an ti ang a." 
1Samuel10:3 Tin, chuta tang chuan kal zel la, Tabor sasua chu i va thleng ang a, chutah chuan mi pathum Bethel-a Pathian hnena han kal turten an lo tawk ang chia; pakhat chuan chhangper tlang thum a keng ang a, tin, pakhat chuan uain peng a keng ang." 
1Samuel10:4 Tin, chibai an buk ang chia, changpera tlang nih an pe ang chia; chu chu i lo la ang a." 
1Samuel10:5 Chu mi zawhah chuan Philistia sipaiho awmna Pathian tlang chu i va thleng ang a; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, chuta khua i va thlen chuan zawlneiho, perhkhuang te, khuangte te, phenglawng te, tingtang kengte hruaia hmun sang atanga lo chhuk i tawk ang a: tin, thu an sawi dual dual ang a:" 
1Samuel10:6 tin, LALPA thlarau nasa takin i chungah a lo thleng ang a, nang pawh thu an sawi dual dualnaah chuan i tel ve ang a, tin, mi danglam daihah i lo chang mai ang." 
1Samuel10:7 Tin, he'ng chhinchhiah hi i chunga a lo awm hunah chuan thil lo awmin a zir ang zelin i tih tur a ni: Pathian i hnenah a awm zel si a." 
1Samuel10:8 Tin, ka kal hmain Gilgal-ah lo zukkal la; tin, ngai teh, kei pawh halral thilhlante leh remna inthawinate hlan turin i hnenah ka lo chhuk ang a: i hnena ka lo kal a, i tih tur ka rawn hrilh hma che chuan ni sarih i lo awm tur ani ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel10:9 Tin, chutiang chu a lo ni ta ngei a, Samuela then tura a hnuchawn veleh chuan Pathianin thinlung danglam daih a pe ta a; tin chung chhinchiahna zawng zawngte chu chu mi ni chuan a lo thleng ta vek a." 
1Samuel10:10 Chutichuan tlang hu an han thlen chuan, ngai teh, zawlneihoin an tawk a; tin, LALPA thlarau nasa takin a lo thleng a, thu an sawi dual dualnaah chuan a tel ve ta a." 
1Samuel10:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, tun hma lama amah lo hre tawhten zawlneite thu sawi dual dualnaah a tel ve tih an hriat chuan, mite chu an inbia a, ""Kisa fapa hunga thil lo awm hi eng nge ni ta? Saula pawh chu zawlnei zingah a tel ve ta elo maw ni,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel10:12 Tin, a awmna khuaa mi pakhatin a chang a, ""An pate chu tu nge maw a nih bik le?"" a ti a. Chutichuan, ""Saula pawh chu zawlnei a ni ve ta elo maw?"" tih chu infiamna takah an hmang ta reng a." 
1Samuel10:13 Tin, an thusawi dual dualnaa a tel zawh chuan hmun sang chu a thleng ta a." 
1Samuel10:14 Tin, Saula pami chuan a hnenah leh a chhiahhlawh hnenah chuan, ""Khawiah nge in kal?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Sabengtung kan zawn a ni: tin, kan hmuh zawh tak loh avangin Samuela hnenah kan kal ta a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel10:15 Tin, Saula pami chuan, ""Samuela chuan i hnenah eng nge ni a sawi min hrilh teh khai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel10:16 Tin, Saula chuan a pami hnenah chuan, ""Sabengtungte chu an hmu tawh tih min hrilh teh meuh mai,"" a ti a. Amaherawhchu ram chungchang thu Samuelan a sawi chu a hrilh lo." 
1Samuel10:17 Chutichuan Samuela chuan mipuite chu Mizpe-ah LALPA hnenah a ko khawm a; 
1Samuel10:18 tin, Israel thlahte hnenah chuan, ""LALPA, Israelte Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni,"" Israel-ho chu Aigupta atangin ka hruai chhuak a, Aigupta mite kuta a ta leh a hnuaichiahtu che u ram zawng zawng ata ka chhan chhuak che u a:" 
1Samuel10:19 nimahsela vawiinah hian in manganna zawng zawng leh hreawmna zawng zawng ata chhan himtu che u in Pathian ngei chu in duh lo a, a nenah, A ni lo e, lal min siamsak rawh in ti a,' tiin. Chuvangin tunah hian a hnama hnam leh a chia chiin LALPA hmaah rawn inlan rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel10:20 Chutichuan Samuela chuan Israel chi zawng zawng chu a rawn inlantir a, tin, Benjamin chi chu thlan a lo ni ta a." 
1Samuel10:21 Tin, Benjami chiho chu a chhungkuain a rawn inlantir a. Matri mi chhung chu thlan a lo ni ta a; tin, Kisa fapa Daula chu thlan a lo ni ta: nimahsela amah an han zawng a, an hmu lo a." 
1Samuel10:22 Chutichuan LALPA chu an han nawn leh a, ""Mi lo kal tur an la awm em?"" an ti a. Tin, LALPA chuan a chhang a, ""Ngai teh u, bungraw zinga abiru a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel10:23 Chutichuan an tlan a, an va hruai chhuak a; tin, mipui zinga a han din chuan mi zingah chuan a sang ber mai a, tuma a koki khum pawh an awm lo." 
1Samuel10:24 Tin, Samuela chuan mi zawng zawng hnena chuan, ""LALPA mi ruat hi in hmu em? Mipui zawng zawng zingah amah ang reng reng an awm lo e,"" a ti a. Tin, mipuite chu an au a, ""Pathianin lalber humhim rawh se,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel10:25 Chutichuan Samuela chuan mipuite chu ram awm dan tur chu a hrilh a, lehkhabuah a ziak a, LALPA hmaah chuan a dah a. Tin, Samuela chuan mipuite chu mahni in lam theuhvah a hawtir ta a." 
1Samuel10:26 Tin, Saula pawh chu Gibea khuaah a in lama a haw ve ta a: tin, mi huaisenho an thinlung Pathianin a khawihte chu a hnenah an kal ve a.Nimahsela Beliala fapa tute emaw chuan, ""He mi hian engtin nge min chandam theih tehlul ang?"" an ti a. Tichuan amah chu an ngainep a, lawmman reng reng an pe duh lo a. Nimahsela ani chu a ngawi reng mai a." 
1Samuel10:27 Nimahsela Beliala fapa tute emaw chuan, ""He mi hian engtin nge min chandam theih tehlul ang?"" an ti a. Tichuan amah chu an ngainep a, lawmman reng reng an pe duh lo a. Nimahsela ani chu a ngawi reng mai a." 
1Samuel11:1 Chutichuan Amon mi Nahasa chu a lo thawk a, Jabes-Gilead beih tumin a han ep a; tin, Jabes mi zawng zawng chuan Nahasa hnenah chuan, ""Kan hnenah thu thlung la, tichuan i rawng kan bawl ang e,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel11:2 Tin, Amon mi Nahasa chuan an hnenah, ""Hetiang hian a ni in hnenah thu ka thlun ang ni: in mit dinglam zawng zawng kher chhuah vek tur ani ang a; chu chu Israel mi zawng zawng tan hmingchhiatna a ni ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel11:3 Tin, Jabes khuaa upate chuan a hnenah, ""Israel ram zawng zawngah mi kan han tir rih theihna'n ni sarih min ngaichang rih rawh; chuta min chhandam tur tumah an awm loh chuan i h nenah kan lo chhuak mai ang e,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel11:4 Chutichuan an mi tirhte chuan Saula awmna khua Gibea chu an lo thleng a, mipuite beng hriatah chuan chung thu chu an sawi a; tin, mipuite chuan an aw an chhuah a, an tap a," 
1Samuel11:5 Tin, ngai teh, lo atangin Saula chu sebawng khalhin a lo haw a; tin, Saula chuan, ""Eng an ti nge ni mipuite chu an tah?"" a ti a. Tin, Jabes khuaa mite thusawi chu an hrilh a." 
1Samuel11:6 Tin, chung thu chu a hriat veleh chuan Saula chungah Pathian thlarau a lo thleng ta chiam mai a, nasa takin a thin chu a ur ta thut a." 
1Samuel11:7 Chutichuan bawng tuak khat a talh a, a sa chu a chan sawm vek a, Israel ram zawng zawngah chuan a semtir a, ""Tupawh Saula leh Samuela rawn zui duh lo apiang an sebawng chu hetianga tih ve hi a ni ang,"" tiin. Chutichuan mipuite chuan LALPA chu an hlau ta a, thukhat vuain an lo thawk chhuak ta a." 
1Samuel11:8 Tin, Bezel hmunah chuan a chhiar a; Israel mite chu nuai thum an ni a, Juda mite chu singthum an ni a." 
1Samuel11:9 Tin, an mi rawn tirhte hnenah chuan, ""Jebes mite chu an hrilh a, tichuan an lawm ta hle mai a." 
1Samuel11:10 Chutichuan Jabes mite chuan, ""Naktukah hian in hnenah kan lo chhuak ang a, kan chungah in duh duhin ti mai ang che u,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel11:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tukah chuan Saula chuan mipuite chu pawl thumah a siam a; tin, zing ven hun lai takin an riahhmunah chuan a lut a, Amon mite chu chhun ni sat vang lai tak thlengin an that a; tin, heti hi ani a, an thah bangte chu an darh vek a, pahniha awm dun reng reng pawh an awm lo a." 
1Samuel11:12 Tin, mipuite chuan Samuela hnenah, ""Tute nge ni 'Saula'n kan chungah ro a rel tehlul ang maw' ti kha? Chung mite chu rawn hruai la kan lo tihlum ang e,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel11:13 Tin, Saula chuan, ""vawiin kher hi chuan tumah tihhlum tur ani lo e; vawiinah hian LALPA chuan Israelte zingah chhandamna a rawn thawk chhuak ta si a,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel11:14 Chutichuan mipuite hnenah chuan, ""Hawh u, Gilgal-ah i kal ang u khai, chutah chuan ram chu i din thar leh ang u,"" a tiu a.Chutichuan mipui zawng zawng chu Gilgal-ah chuan an kal ta a; Saula chu Gilgal-ah chuan LALPA hmaah lalah an siam ta a; chutah chuan LALPA hmaah remna inthawinate an hlan a; tichuan chutah chuan Saula leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chu an lawm ta em em mai a." 
1Samuel11:15 Chutichuan mipui zawng zawng chu Gilgal-ah chuan an kal ta a; Saula chu Gilgal-ah chuan LALPA hmaah lalah an siam ta a; chutah chuan LALPA hmaah remna inthawinate an hlan a; tichuan chutah chuan Saula leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chu an lawm ta em em mai a. 
1Samuel12:1 Tin, Samuela chuan Israel mite zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh u, ka hnena in thusawi zawng zawng chu ka pawm a, lal tur ka siamsak ta che u a." 
1Samuel12:2 Tunah hian ngai teh u, lal chuan a lo kaihruai ta che u a: kei chu ka lo tarin ka lute pawh a lo tuak ta a: tin, ngai teh u, ka fapate chu in hnenah an awm a; ka tleirawl atangin tun thlengin ka kaihruai che u a." 
1Samuel12:3 Heta hi ka awm a: LALPA hma leh a hriak thiha hmaah hian mi sel teh u le; tu bawng pa nge ka chhuhsak ngai? Tu sabengtung nge ka chhuhsak ngai? Tunge ka bum tawh ngai? Tunge ka tihduhdah ngai? Ka mit tidel turin tu lakah nge thamna ka lak ngai? Ka rul leh vek ang che u,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel12:4 Tin, anni chuan, ""Min bum ngai lo a, min tiduhdah ngai hek lo, tuma kut atangin lak awm loh i la ngai hek lo,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel12:5 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Ka kutah hian engmah awm lo in hmu lo tih vawiinah hian LALPA chu in lakah hretu ani a, a hriak thiha pawh chu hretu a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Amah chu hretu a ni,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel12:6 Tin, Samuela chuan mpui hnenah chuan, ""Mosia leh Arona ruattu leh Aigupta ram ata in pute hruai chhuaktu LALPA chu a ni a sin." 
1Samuel12:7 Chutichuan ding thap u la, LALPA hmaah hian LALPA'n in chungah leh in pute chunga thil a lo tihfel thin dan ka han chhutpui teh ang che u." 
1Samuel12:8 Aigupta rama Jakoba aluh hnu khan, in pute chuan LALPA an au a, tichuan LALPA chuan Mosia leh Arona a tir a, anni chuan in pute chu Aigupta ram atangin an hruai chhuak a, he hmunah hian an awmtir ta a." 
1Samuel12:9 Nimahsela LALPA an Pathian chu an theihnghilh a; tin, ani chuan Hazor sipai hotu Sisera kutah leh Philistia mite kutah leh Moab lal kutah a hralh a, tin, anni chuan an do a." 
1Samuel12:10 Tin, LALPA chu an au a, 'LALPA chu kan hawisan a, Baal-te leh Astarothi-te rawng kan bawl avangin kan lo sual ta a ni: nimahsela kan hmelmate kut ata hi min chhan chhuak tawh la, tichuan i rawng kan bawl ang e,' an ti a." 
1Samuel12:11 Tin, LALPA chuan Jerubaala te, Bendana te, Jephtha te, Samuela te a tir a, in hmelma lehlam lehlam mite kut ata a chanchhuak che u a, him takin in awm a." 
1Samuel12:12 Tin, Amona thlahte lal Nahasa chu nangmahni do turin a lo kal tih in hriat veleh ka hnenah, 'A ni lo e, lalin ro min rel rawh se,' in ti a; LALPA Pathian chu in lal ani reng si a." 
1Samuel12:13 Chutichuan in lal in thlan leh dil chu en teh u; en teh u, LALPA chuan lal a siamsak ta che u anih hi." 
1Samuel12:14 LALPA chu in tih a, a rawng in bawl a, a aw in ngaihthlak a, LALPA thupek in helsan loh a, nangmahni leh in chunga roreltu lal nen LALPA in Pathian zuitu in nih chuan a tha ang a;" 
1Samuel12:15 amaherawhchu LALPA aw chu ngaithla lo a, LALPA thupek in helsan chuan in puten LALPA kut an tuar ang bawkin nangni pawhin in tuar ang." 
1Samuel12:16 Chutichuan ding thap u la, LALPA'n in mithmuha thil ropui tak a tih tur hi lo en rawh u." 
1Samuel12:17 Vawiin hian buh an seng a ni lo'm ni? Khawpui rik tir tur leh ruah surtir turin LALPA chu ka au vang a, tichuan lal in dil thu-ah hian LALPA mithmuha thil in tihsual hi a nasatzia in hriain in hmu ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel12:18 Chutichuan Samuela chuan LALPA chu a au a, LALPA chuan chu mi ni chuan khawpui a riktir a, ruah a sirtir a; tichuan mipui chuan LALPA leh Samuela chu an hlau ta em em a." 
1Samuel12:19 Tin, mipui zawng zawng chuan Samuela hnenah chuan, ""Kan thih lohna'n LALPA i Pathian hnenah chuan i chhiahhlawhte hi min tawngtaisak rawh, he thil tha lo tak lal, kan lo dil hi, kan sual zawng zawng belhchhahtu a nih tak hi,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel12:20 Tin, Samuela chuan mipuite hnenah chuan, ""Hlau suh u, he thil tha lo tak hi tih zawng n ti ngei tak a, mahse LALPA in zui chu pensan chuang lo u la, in thinlung zawng zawngin LALPA rawng chu bawl zawk rawh u;" 
1Samuel12:21 engmaha hnemhnang lo tur leh chhanchhuak thei lo che u zuiin pensan suh u, engmahlo an ni si a." 
1Samuel12:22 A hming ropui tak avang hian LALPA chuan a mite chu a hawisan dawn si lo va: a mite atana siam che u chu LALPA lawmzawng tak ani si a. 
1Samuel12:23 Chu chang pawh ani lo a, in tana tawngtai ban a, LALPA chunga sual sual chu kei atan chuan a hnai lo tawp mai a ni; kawng tha leh kawng dik ka kawhhmuh zel zawk ang che u." 
1Samuel12:24 LALPA chu tih phawt mai u la, in thinlung zawng zawngin tih takzetin a rawng bawl ula in tan thil a tih ropuizia hi ngaihtuah rawh u khai.Amaherawhchu sual taka thil in la tih cheu chuan in boral ang, nangmahni leh in lal nen,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel12:25 Amaherawhchu sual taka thil in la tih cheu chuan in boral ang, nangmahni leh in lal nen,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel13:1 Saula chu kum sawmthum mi a nihin a lal tan a; tin, Israel-hote chungah kum hnih a lal a." 
1Samuel13:2 Tin, Saula chuan Israel-ho zinga mi sangthum a thlang a; sanghnih chu Mikmas-ah leh Bethel tlangah Saula hnenah an awm a, tin, sangkhat chu Benjamin rama Gibea-ah Jonathana hnenah an awm a: tin, a dang zawng zawng chu anmahni puan inah a hawtir vek a." 
1Samuel13:3 Tin, Jonathana chuan Geba-a Philistia ral vengtu sipaiho a bei a; chu chu Philistia mite chuan an lo hria a. Tichuan Saula chuan ""Hebrai mite khan lo hre rawh se,"" tiin an ram zawng zawngah chuan tawtawrawt a hamtir a." 
1Samuel13:4 Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan, Saula chuan Philistia ral vengtu sipaihote a bei tih leh Israel-hote pawh Philistia mite huat an phur ani tih thute an lo hre ta a. Chutichuan mipuite chu Saula hnenah Gilgal-ah an pung khawm ta chiam mai a." 
1Samuel13:5 Tin, Philistia mite chu Israel-ho bei tur chuan an inpun khawm ta chiam a; tawlailir singthum, sakawr chung chuang mi sangruk, mihring tuifinriat kama tiau zat zeta tam an ni: tin, an chho a, Beth-aven chhak lampangah Mikmas-ah chuan tanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel13:6 Tin, Israel mite chuan hnawhchepin an awm tih an inhriat chuan (mite chu an mangang ta hle mai a) mite chu pukah te, hnim hnawkah te, lungpui phenah te, kulhah te, khuarkhurumahte an biru a." 
1Samuel13:7 Hebrai mi thenkhatte chu Jorda ralah Gad leh Gilead ramahte an tlan a; Saula erawh chu Gilgal-ah a la awm reng a, mipuite chuan khur zawih zawih chungin an zui a." 
1Samuel13:8 Samuelan ni a ruat angin ni sarih a awm a; nimahsela Samuela chuan Gilgal-ah chuan a la kal ta lo a; tichuan mipuiin an tlan darhsan ta a. 
1Samuel13:9 Tin, Saula chuan, ""halral thilhlan tur leh remna thilhlan turte chu hetah ka hnenah han la rawh u,"" a ti a. Chutichuan halral thilhlan chu a hlan a." 
1Samuel13:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, halral thilhlan a hlan zo chauh a, Samuela chu a lo thleng ta a; tin, Saula chu chibai buk turin amah hmuakin a lo kal a." 
1Samuel13:11 Tin, Samuela chuan, ""Engnge ni i lo tih chu le?"" a ti a. Tin, Saula chuan, ""Mipuite chuan mi kal bosan tawh a, tin, nang lah chu ni ruat niah chuan i lo thleng ta lo a, tin, Philistia mite lah chu Mikmas0ah an pung khawm luih luih tawh tih ka hre si a." 
1Samuel13:12 Chuvang chuan 'Philistia mite chuan Gilgal-ah min rawn bei dawn tep si a, tin, LALPA khawngaihna ka la dil si lo' ka ti a. Chuvang chuan halral thilhlan chu hlan lo thei ka ni lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel13:13 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula hnenah chuan, ""I thiltih dan hi a atthlak hle mai: LALPA i Pathian thu pek, thu a pek che hi i zawm lo a ni: LALPA chuan Israelte chungah hian i lalna hi kumkhuaa tihngheh tum zawng a ni a le" 
1Samuel13:14 Nimahsela i lalna chu a kin tawh ang; LALPA thupek che i zawm loh avangin LALPA chuan ama thinlung ang pu mi a zawng a, mite chunga hotu ni turin LALPA'n a ruat tawh a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel13:15 Tin, Samuela chu a tho a, Gilgal ata chu Benjami rama Gibea khuaah chuan ahan kal ta a. Tin, Saula chuan a hnena mi awmte chu a chhiar a, zaruk lai an ni a." 
1Samuel13:16 Tin, Saula leh a fapa Jonathana leh an hnena mi awmte chu Benjamin rama Geba khuaah chuan an awm a; nimahsela Philistia mite chuan Mikmas-ah chuan tanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel13:17 Tin, lamththamhote chu Philistia mite tanhmun atangin pawl thumin an lo chhuak a: pawl khatte chu Sual rama Ophra lam pan akwng chu an zawh a:" 
1Samuel13:18 tin, pawl khat chu Beth-horon lam pan kawn an zawh a; tin, pawl khat chuan thlaler dep Zeboim ruam lam hawi ramri kawng chu an zawh a." 
1Samuel13:19 Israel-ho ram pum puiah chuan thirdeng reng reng an awm lo a; Philistia mite chuan, ""Hebrai mite hian khandaihte emaw, feite emaw an siam dah reu reu ang e,"" an ti a ni." 
1Samuel13:20 ,21 Nimahsela Israel mi zawng zawngte chu bawngtuthlawh te, leilehna thir hriam te, thirkut te, hreipui te, tiang hmawra zum te a bil chuan an leilehna hmawr zum te, an leilehna thir hriam te, an hreipui te, an bawngtuthlawhte tah hriamtir turin Philistia-hote hnenah an zuk chhuk thin a ni." 
1Samuel13:21 ,20 Nimahsela Israel mi zawng zawngte chu bawngtuthlawh te, leilehna thir hriam te, thirkut te, hreipui te, tiang hmawra zum te a bil chuan an leilehna hmawr zum te, an leilehna thir hriam te, an hreipui te, an bawngtuthlawhte tah hriamtir turin Philistia-hote hnenah an zuk chhuk thin a ni." 
1Samuel13:22 Chutichuan an indo ni chuan Saula leh Jonathana hena mi awmte chu khandai emaw, fei emaw nei reng reng an awm lo a; Saula leh a fapa Jonahthana erawh chuan an nei a.Tin, Philistia ralvengtu sipaiho chu Mikmas kawnah an kal ta a." 
1Samuel13:22 Chutichuan an indo ni chuan Saula leh Jonathana hena mi awmte chu khandai emaw, fei emaw nei reng reng an awm lo a; Saula leh a fapa Jonahthana erawh chuan an nei a.Tin, Philistia ralvengtu sipaiho chu Mikmas kawnah an kal ta a." 
1Samuel13:23 Tin, Philistia ralvengtu sipaiho chu Mikmas kawnah an kal ta a." 
1Samuel14:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni khat chu Saula fapa Jonathana chuan a ralthuam kengtu tlangval hnenah chuan, ""Hawh teh, lehlam ral Philistia mi ralvengtu sipaiho awmnaah sawn i va kal teh a ng,"" a ti a. Nimahsela a pa chu a hrilh lo a." 
1Samuel14:2 Tin, Saula chu Gibea ram hmawr lam daiha Migron-a pomgranet thei kung hnuaiah a awm a: tin, a hnena mi awmte chu zaruk emaw lai an ni a." 
1Samuel14:3 Tin, Silo khuaa LALPA puithiam Elia fapa Phinehasa fapa Ikaboda unaupa Ahituba fapa Ahija chu puithiam kawr hain a awm ve a. Tin, Jonathana chu a kal tih mipuite chuan an hre lo a." 
1Samuel14:4 Tin, Jonathana Philistia mi ralvengtu sipaiho awmnaa kal a tumna kawn leh kawn inkarah chuan a lehlam a lehlamah chuan lungpui tohlawt a awm a: a pkhata hming chu Bozez ani a, a pakhat a hming chu Sene a ni a." 
1Samuel14:5 Lung tohlawt pakhat chu Mikmas zawn hmar lampanga awm a ni a, a dang pakhat chu Geba zawn chhim lampanga awm a ni." 
1Samuel14:6 Tin, Jonathana chuan a ralthuam kengtu tlangval hnenah chuan, ""Hawh serhtan lohho sipaite awmnaah sawn i kal teh a; LALPA chuan thil min tihsak mial mahna; LALPA tan chuan a tam emaw, a tlem emaw a chhandam chu engmah theih lohna a awm ve chuang si lo a,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:7 Tin, a ralthuam kengtu chuan a hnenah, ""I rilrua awm tak chuan ti rawh; ngai teh, i rilru ang chiah chu ka rilru a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:8 Chutichuan Jonathana chuan, ""hawh teh, an hneah sawn kan va kal kai ang a, kan va inlan ang a." 
1Samuel14:9 Tin, kan hnena, ""In hnenah kan lo kal hma loh chuan lo awm rawh u,' min tih chuan kan hmunah chuan kan ding reng a, an hnenah kan chho lo ang a." 
1Samuel14:10 Kan hnen lamah hian lo chho rawh u,' an tih erawh chuan kan chho ang a: LALPA'n kan kutah min pe tawh ani tih kan tan chhinchhiahna ani ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:11 Tin, an pahnihin Philistia mi ralvengtu sipaite hmuhah chuan an va inlan a: tin, Philistia- hote chuan, ""En teh u, Hebrai mite an bihrukna khuarkhurum ata an lo chhuak ta,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel14:12 Tin, ralvengtu sipaiho awmnaa mite chuan Jonathana leh a ralthuam kengtu chu, ""Lo chho u la, thil engemaw kan lo entir ang che u,"" tiin an lo au a. Tin, Jonathana chuan a ralthuam kengtu hnenah chuan, ""Mi rawn zui chho rawh khai; LALPA chuan anni chu Israelhote kutah a pe ta a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:13 Tichuan Jonathana chu a kut leh ke thawhin a lawn chho a, a ralthuam kengtu chuan a zui a; tin, anni chuan Jonathana hmaah chuan an tlu zawih zawih a, a ralthuam ekngtu chuan a rawn that ve zel a." 
1Samuel14:14 Chutichuan Jonathana leh a ralthuam kengtuin an thah hmasak ber tum chuan tin chanve hmun emaw vel turah hian mi sawmhnih emaw lai an that a ni. 
1Samuel14:15 Tin, an riahhmuna mi te, phula mi te, mipui zawng zawngte chu an khur a; tin, ralvengtu sipaite leh lamthamhote pawh chu an khur ve a; tin, lir a nghing a; chutichuan namen loa khurhna a lo awm a." 
1Samuel14:16 Tin, Benjamin ram Gibea-a Saula ralvengtute chuan an han thlir vel a, ngai teh, mipuite chu an teh darh hum hum a, lehlam lehlamah an chavai nuai nuai mai a." 
1Samuel14:17 Chutichuan Saula chuan a hnena mipui awmte hnenah chuan, ""Tunah hian inchhiar ula, tute nge kim lo han en teh u khai,"" a ti a. Tin, an han inchhiar chuan ngei teh, Jonathana leh a ralthuam kengtu chu an lo awm ve ta lo a." 
1Samuel14:18 Tin, Saula chuan Ahija hnenah chuan, ""Pathian bawm chu han la rawh khai,"" a ti a. Chumi lai chuan Pathian bawm chu Israela thlahte hnena awm ani a." 
1Samuel14:19 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Saula'n puithiam abiak lai mekte chuan Philistia mite riahhmun lama buai mur mur chu a zual ta deuh deuh mai a; tin, Saula chuan puithiam hnenah, ""I kut la rawh,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:20 Tichuan Saula leh a hnena mipui awm zawng zawngte chu an kal khawm a, indonaah chuan an kal ta a; tin, ngai teh, anmahni leh anmahni khandaihin an inbei ta chiam a, tichuan an buai ta nuai nuai mai a." 
1Samuel14:21 Chutichuan chung lai ram vela mi riahhmuna han kal ve, tun hma lama Philistia-ho ama tang Hebrai mite pawh chu Suala leh Jonathana hnena awm Israel mite lamah chuan an lo pakai leh ta a." 
1Samuel14:22 Chutiang bawkin Ephraim tlang rama Israel mi biru zawng zawngte pawh khan khan Philistia mite an tlanbo tih an lo hria a, anni pawh chuan indonaah tel vein an um zui ve ta ngat ngat a." 
1Samuel14:23 Chutichuan LALPA'n chu mi ni chuan Israel-hote chu a chhanhim ta a; tin, Beth-aven thleng rawkin an bei a." 
1Samuel14:24 Tin, chu mi ni chuan Israel mite chu an mangang a; nimahsela Saula chuan, ""Kan hmelmate chunga phuba ka lak a, khua a lo tlailam hmaa tupawhin chaw a ei chuan anchhia dawng rawh se,"" tiin mipuite chu a vau a. Chutichuan tumahin chaw reng reng a tem pawh an tem miah lo a." 
1Samuel14:25 Tin, mipui zawng zawngte chuan ramhnuai an va thleng a, leiah chuan khawizu te a lo awm a." 
1Samuel14:26 Tin, mipuiin ramhnuai an va thlen chuan ngai teh, khawizu te a lo luang a; nimahsela tumahin an pir lo; mipuite chuan chhechham chu an hlau a ni." 
1Samuel14:27 Nimahsela Jonathana chuan a pain mipuite chu chhechhama a vau lai a hre ve lo a; chutichuan a tiang ken hmawr chu khawithlarah chuan a vit lut a, a pir a; tichuan a mit meng a lo fiah ta a." 
1Samuel14:28 Chutichuan mipui zinga mi pakhat chuan a bia a, ""I pa chuan mipuiho hi, 'Vawiina chaw ei apiang chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se,' tiin min vau tlat a, mipuite pawh an chau hle reng mai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:29 Chutichuan Jonathana chuan, ""Ka pa hian mite a timangang mai a nih hi maw; en ta che u, khawizu tlemte ka han tem mai avanga ka mit meng a lo fiah takzia hi." 
1Samuel14:30 Mipui hian an rallak thil hi an hmuh apiang vawiinah hian an duh duhin ei thei phei se la chu a va nasa lehzual dawn em! Chu mi avang chuan Philistia mite chu kan thah nasat theih loh phah a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:31 Tichuan chu mi ni chuan Mikmas atangin Aijalon thlengin Philistia mite chu an bei a; tin, mipuite an chau ta hle mai a." 
1Samuel14:32 Chutichuan mipuite chuan an rallak thil chu a bawhin an bawh a, beram te, sebawngpa te, sebawng no te an man a, leiah an tihlum a, mipuite chuan a thisen chawpin an ei ta mai a." 
1Samuel14:33 Chutichuan, ""Ngai teh, mipuite chuan thisen chawpa eiin LALPA chungah thil an tisual ta,"" tiin Saula chu an hrilh a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Vervek takin thil in ti a ni vawiinah hian lung lian tak mi rawn lumsak rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:34 Tin, Saula chuan, ""Mipui zingah chuan vakdarh vek u la, an hnenah, 'Mi tinin a sebawng leh a beram ka hnenah rawn la se la, hetah hian rawn talh se la ei rawh se; a thisen chawpa eia LALPA chungah thil tisual loin, a ti e,' va ti rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, chu mi zan chuan mi zawng zawng chuan mahni bawngpa an rawn kai theuh a, chutah chuan an talh a." 
1Samuel14:35 Tin, Saula chuan LALPA tan maicham a siam a: chu chu LALPA tana a maicham siam hmasak ber a ni." 
1Samuel14:36 Tin, Saula chuan, ""Zanah Philistia mite zuk bei i la, zing khaw en thlengin i rawk ang u khai, tumah reng reng i zuah suh ang u,"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Tha i tih ang apiangin ti rawh,"" an ti a. Puithiam erawh chuan, ""Heti laia h hian Pathian i hnaih teh rih ang u,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:37 Tin, Saula chuan Pathian a rawn a, ""Philistia mite chu ka zuk bei ang em? Israel-ho kutah i pe ang em?"" a tia. Nimahsela chu mi ni chuan a chhang lo a." 
1Samuel14:38 Tin, Saula chuan ""Nangni mipui hotu zawng zawngte chu lo hnai teh u khai: vawiinah hian a eng berah nge kan tihsual hriat chhuah tum teh u." 
1Samuel14:39 Israel-hote chhandam thintu LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, ka fapa Jonathana thiltihah pawh lo ni se la a thi ngei ngei tur a ni,"" a ti a. Nimahsela mipui zinga mi chuan tumah chhang reng reng an awm lo a." 
1Samuel14:40 Chutichuan Israel-ho zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Nangniho hi a hrangin awm khawm ula, tin, kei leh ka fapa Jonathana hi a hrangin kan awm ang e,"" a ti a. Tin, mipuite chuan Saula hnenah, ""Tha i tih ang apiangin ti rawh,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel14:41 Chutichuan Saula'n LALPA Israelte Pathian hnenah chuan, ""A dik tak chu han tilang ang che,"" a tia. Tin, thumvawr chu Jonathana leh Saula chungah chuan a tlu a; mipuite erawh chu an fihlim a." 
1Samuel14:42 Tin, Saula chuan, ""Kei leh ka fapa Jonathana chungah chuan a tlu a." 
1Samuel14:43 Chutichuan Suala chuan Jonathana hnenah chuan, ""Engnge ni i tih min hrilh rawh khai,"" a ti a. Tin, Jonathana chuan a hrilh a, ""Ka tiang ken hmawrin khawizu tlem chu ka tem ngei mai a; ngai teh, ka thi ngei tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:44 Tin, Saula chuan, ""Pathianin a tih tihin ti mai se la, chu aia nasa pawhin: i thi ngei tur a ni, Jonathan,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel14:45 Tin, mipuite chuan Saula hnenah chuan, ""Israelte zingah he chhandamna ropui tak thawktu Jonathana hi a thi ang maw? Hnai lo e: LALPA nunna chhalin kan sawi e, a samzai khat pawh hi leiah a tla hlek lo ang; vawiin hian Pathian a thawhpui anih hi,"" an ti a. Chutichuan mipui chuan Jonathana chu thi lo turin an chhanhim ta a." 
1Samuel14:46 Chutichuan Saula'n Philistia mite a um chu a kirsan ta a; tin, Philistia mite chu anmahni awmhmun lamah an kal ta a." 
1Samuel14:47 Chutichuan Saula Israel-ho chunga roreltua a han tan chuan kil tinah a hmelma, Moab-ho te, Amona thlahte, Edom-hote, Zoba lalho te, Philistia mite chu a do a; a thlekna lam apiang maiah chuan a hneh zel mai a." 
1Samuel14:48 Huai takin a bei a, Amelek mite chu a hneh a, Israel-ho chu anmahni rawktute kut ata a chhanchhuak a ni." 
1Samuel14:49 Saula fapate chu Jonathana te, Isvia te, Malkisua te an ni a tin, a fanute pahnih hming chu he'ng hi a ni; a upa zawk hming chu Merabi a ni a; a naupang zawk hming chu Mikali a ni:" 
1Samuel14:50 Tin, Saula nupui hming chu Ahinoami, Ahimaza fanu a ni. Tin, a sipaite hotu hming chu Abnera, Saula pami Nera fapa a ni." 
1Samuel14:51 Tin, Kisa chu Suala pa a ni a; tin, Abnera pa Nera chu Abiela fapa a ni a.Chutichuan Saula dam chhung zawng zawng chuan Philistia mite nen nasa tak maiin asn indo thin a: tin, Saula chuan mi chak emaw, mi huai emaw a hmuh apiang chu a la zel thin a ni." 
1Samuel14:52 Chutichuan Saula dam chhung zawng zawng chuan Philistia mite nen nasa tak maiin asn indo thin a: tin, Saula chuan mi chak emaw, mi huai emaw a hmuh apiang chu a la zel thin a ni." 
1Samuel15:1 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula hnenah, ""LALPA'n a mite chungah, Israel-hote chungah, lal atana hriak thih tur chein min tir a ni; chutichuan LALPA thu sawi aw chu ngaithla teh khai." 
1Samuel15:2 Sipaihote LALPA chuan 'Amalek miten Israel-hote chunga an thiltih, Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah laia an lo dal dante kha ka chhinchhiah reng a." 
1Samuel15:3 Amalek-hote bei turin kal la, an thil neih zawng zawng zuah reng reng nei loin tiboral vek rawh; a hmei a pa leh nausen te, hnute hne lai te, bawngpa te, beram te, sanghawngsei te, sabengtung te nen tihlum vek ang che,' a ti a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:4 Chutichuan Saula chuan mipuite a ko khawm a, Telaim khuaah a chhiar a, sipai nuaihnih leh Juda mi singkhat an ni a." 
1Samuel15:5 Tin, Saula chuan Amalek-ho khua chu a zuk thleng a, ruamah chuan a lo lam bun a." 
1Samuel15:6 Tin, Saula chuan Ken-hote hnenah chuan, ""Lo chhuak u la, Amalek-hote zing ata hi inthiar fihlim rawh u, chuti lo chuan ka tihlum tel dah ang che u: nangni zawngin Israela thlahte zawng zawng Aigupta ram atanga an lo chhuak kha in lo khawngaih si a,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Ken-hote chu Amalek mite zing ata an chhuak ta a." 
1Samuel15:7 Chutichuan Saula chuan Amalek mite chu Havila atanga Aigupta ram dep Sur thlengin a bei a. 
1Samuel15:8 Tin, Amalek mite lal Agaga chu a nungin a man a, mipui zawng zawngte chu khandaihin a sat hlum vek a." 
1Samuel15:9 Amaherawhchu Saula leh mipuite chuan Agaga chu an zuah a, beram tha tha te, bawngpa tha tha te, a thau thau te, beram no te, a tha zawng zawngte nen, chungte chu an tihlum duh loa; a tha lo leh an duh loh apiang eawh chu an tihlum vek a." 
1Samuel15:10 Chutichuan LALPA thu chu Samuela hnenah a lo thleng a," 
1Samuel15:11 Saula lala ka lo ruat ta chu ka inchhir a ni: a mi zui lai chu mi hnuchhawnin ka thupek angin a ti si lo a,"" a ti a. Tin, Samuela chu a thinur a, zankhuain LALPA chu a au a." 
1Samuel15:12 Tin, Samuela chu Saula hmuak turin zing takah a tho a; tin, ""Saula chu Karmel-ah a kal a kal a, ngai teh, chutah chuan hriat rengna lung a phun a, tin, akir leh a, a kal zel a Gilgal-ah a chhuk ta,: tiin Samuela chu an hrilh a." 
1Samuel15:13 Tin, Samuela chu Saula hnen lamah chuan a kal ta a; tin, Saula chuan a hnenah, ""LALPA'n malsawm che rawh se: LALPA thupek chang chuan ka ti ta e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:14 Tin, Samuiela chuan, ""Chung beram be ka benga lo lut leh bawngpa bu ka han hriatte chu engtizia nge ni si?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:15 Tin, Saula chuan, ""Amalek mite ta an rawn laksak a ni; LALPA i Pathian hnenah inthawina'n mipuiten beram tha tha leh bawngpa tha tha an zuah a ni; tin, a dang zawng zawng chu kan tihlum vek a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:16 Chutichuan Samuela chuan Saula hnenah, ""Ngawi rawh, nizana LALPA'n ka hnena thu a sawi ka hrilh ang che,"" a ti a. Ani chuan a hnenah, ""Sawi rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:17 Tin, Samuela chuan, ""Nangma ngaihin mi te tak ni mah la, Israel hnam hotu atana a siam i ni lo'm ni? Tin, LALPA chuan Israel-ho lal atan hriak a thih chia;" 
1Samuel15:18 Tin, LALPA chuan a ti rchhuak chian, 'Kal la, mi sualho, Amalek mite chu tihlum vek la, an boral der hma loh chuan bei zel rawh, ' a ti chia." 
1Samuel15:19 Engati nge LALPA thu chu zawm lo a, rallak thil chu a bawha i bawh a, LALPA mithmua thil tha lo i tih mai?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:20 Tin, Saula chuan Samuela hnenah, ""E, LALPA thu chu ka zawm alawm, LALPA min tirhna lamah chuan ka kal a, Amalek lal Agaga ka rawn man a, Amalek mite chu ka tihlum vek alawm." 
1Samuel15:21 Amaherwahchu chu mipuite chuan rallak thil beram leh bawngpate tihboral tur zinga a tha thate chu Gilgal khuaah LALPA i Pathian hnenah inthawina'n an rawn la a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:22 Tin, Samuela chuan, ""LALPA chuan LALPA thu zawm chu a lawm angin halral thilhlante leh inthawinate hi a lawm em ni? Ngai teh, inthawina aiin thuawih chu a tha zawk a, berampa thau aiin a thu pawm chu a tha zawk a ni." 
1Samuel15:23 Helna hi aienthiamna sualte nen a inang a, luhlulna hi milem biak leh Pathian lem biak tluk a ni. LALPA thu i duh loh avangin ani pahwin lal atan a duh ta bik lo che a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:24 Tin, Saula chuan Samuela hnenah, ""Thil ka tisual der mai a ni: LALPA thupek leh i thu chu ka lo bawhchhe reng mai a nih hi; mipuite ka hlauh a, an thu ka lo awihna lamah hian." 
1Samuel15:25 Chutichuan ka sual ngaidam la, LALPA ka biak theihna'n min hawpui leh rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:26 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula hnenah, ""Ka hawpui tawp lo ang che; LALPA thu chu i duh si lo a, tin, LALPA pawhin Israel-hote lal tan a duh ta bik lo che a ni."" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:27 Chutichuan Samuela chu kal tura ahan her chuan Saula'n a puan fem chu a han chelh a, a thler ta a." 
1Samuel15:28 Tin, Samuela chuan a hnenah, ""Vawiin atang hian LALPA'n Israel ram hi a chhuhsak ta chia, i aia tha zawk i thenzawm a pe ta a ni." 
1Samuel15:29 Tin, Israelte Thahruia chu a daw lo ang a, a lamlet hek lo ang; mihring anga lamlet leh mai mi ani si lo a,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:30 Chutichuan ani chuan, ""Ka lo sual ta a ni: nimahsela ka mite upa leh Israel-hote hmaah hian mi chawimawi turin ka ngen a che; tin, LALPA i Pathian kabiak theih nan min hawpui leh hram ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel15:31 Chutichuan Samuela chuan Saula chu a hawpui ta a, Saula chuan LALPA chu a be ta a." 
1Samuel15:32 Chutichuan Samuela chuan, ""Amalek mite lal Agaga chu ka hnenah han hruai rawh u,"" a tia. Tichuan Agaga chu a hnenah chuan khur chungin a va kal a. Tin, Agaga chuan, ""Thihna kha chu ka pumpelh tawh a ni chawk ang chu maw,"" a ti a.hnen" 
1Samuel15:33 Tin, Samuela chuan, ""I khandaihin hmeichhiate fa nei loa a siam angin i nu pawh hmeichhe zinga fa nei lo mi a ni ang,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Samuela chuan Agaga chu Gilgal khuaah LALPA hmaah chuan a sat sawm ta berh mai a." 
1Samuel15:34 Tin, Samuela chu Rama khuaah a kal a; tin, Saula chu a inah Saula awmna khua Gibea-ah a chho ta a.Chutichuan Samuela chuan a thih ni thlengin Saula chu a tlawh leh ta lo a; Samuela chu Saula avangin lungngaih chu a lungngai a ni: tin, LALPA chu, Israelte lal atana Saula a lo siam chu a inchhir a ni." 
1Samuel15:35 Chutichuan Samuela chuan a thih ni thlengin Saula chu a tlawh leh ta lo a; Samuela chu Saula avangin lungngaih chu a lungngai a ni: tin, LALPA chu, Israelte lal atana Saula a lo siam chu a inchhir a ni." 
1Samuel16:1 Chutichuan LALPA chuan Samuela hnenah, ""Israel mite lal atan ka duh tawh loh ahnu Saula avang hian eng chen nge maw i lungngaih dawn le? A kiah hriak thun khat la, kal rawh, Beth-lehem mi Jesaia hnenah ka tir dawn che a ni; a fapate zinga mi lal atan ka ruat tawh reng a ni,"" a tia." 
1Samuel16:2 Tin, Samuela chuan, ""Engtin nge ka kal theih ang? Saula'n a lo hriat chuan min tihlum mai ang a sin"" a ti a. Tin, LALPA chuan, ""Bawngla hruai la, 'LALPA hnena inthawi tura lo kal ka ni,' ti ang che." 
1Samuel16:3 Tin, inthawinaah chuan Jesaia chu ko la, tin, i tih tur chu ka hrilh ang chia; tin, a hming ka hrilh tura che chu hriak min thihsak ang che."" a tia" 
1Samuel16:4 Tichuan Samuela chuan LALPA sawi ang chuan a ti a, Beth-lehem-ah chuan a kal ta a. Tin, khuaa upate chuan khur chungin amah an lo hmuak a, ""Tha lam thua lo kal em i nih le?"" an ti a." 
1Samuel16:5 Tin, ani chuan, ""Tha lam thu-ah ni e: LALPA hnena inthawi tura lo kal ka ni; intithianghlim u la inthawinaah lo kal ve rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, Jesaia leh a fapate chu a tithianghlim a, inthawinaah chuan a ko a." 
1Samuel16:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an lo kal chuan Eliaba chu a lo en a, ""LALPA hriak thiha chu a hmaa awma hi a ni ngei mai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel16:7 Nimahsela LALPA chuan Samuela hnenah, ""A hmel lam emwa, a san lam emaw en suh; ani hi chu ka duh lo a ni; LALPA hchuan mihring en dan angin a en ve si lo a; mihring hchuan pawn lam lan dan an en thin a, LALPA erawh chuan thinlung lam a en zawk thin a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel16:8 Tin, Jesaia chuan Abinadaba a han ko a, Samuela hmaah chuan a kaltir a. Ani chua, ""Hei pawh hi LALPA thlan a la ni lo,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel16:9 Tin, Jesaia chuan Sama a va kaltir leh a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Hei pawh hi LALPA thlan a la ni lo cheu,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel16:10 Tichuan Jesaia chuan a fapate pasarih Samuela hmaah chuan a kaltir a. Tin, Samuela chuan Jesaia hnenah, ""LALPA'n hengho hi a thlang lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel16:11 Tin, Samuela chuan Jesaia hnenah, ""Hetah hian i fate an awm kim vek em?"" a ti a. Ani chuan, ""A naupang ber a la awm a, ngai teh, beram a veng a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, Samuela chuan Jesaia hnenah, ""Va kohtir rawh khai; a lo thlen hma loh chu kan kil dawn lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel16:12 Chutichuan a va kohtir a, a rawn hruai a. Ani chu sar veng vawng, mit meng mawi tak, hmeltha tak mai a ni a. Tin, LALPA chuan, ""Tho la, hriak thih rawh, hei ngei hi a ni e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel16:13 Chutichuan Samuela chuan hriak bawm ki chu ala a, a unaute zingah chuan amah chu hriak a thih a; tichuan LALPA thlarau chu chu mi ni atang chuan nasa takin Davida chungah a lo thleng ta a. Chutichuan Samuela chu a tho a, Rama khuaah a kal ta a." 
1Samuel16:14 Tin, LALPA thlarau chuan Saula chu a chhuahsan a, LALPA tirh ramhuaiin amah a tibuai a." 
1Samuel16:15 Tin, Saula chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Pathian tirh ramhuaiin a tibuai che a ni a." 
1Samuel16:16 Kan pu chuan i chhaihhlawh i hmaa awmte tingtang tum thiam tak zawn thu min pe rawh khai; tichuan Pathian tirh ramhuaiin a man hun chein a tum ang a, i tha mai ang,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel16:17 Tin, Saula chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnenah chuan, ""Tum thiam tak chu min han zawnsak u la, ka hnenah rawn hruai rawh u le,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel16:18 Chutichuan tlangval pakhat chuan a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Beth-lehem mi Jasaia fapa pakhat chu ka hmu tawh a, chu mi chu tum thiam tak, mi huai tak, indo mi, thusawi thiam tak, hmel tha tak a ni a, a hnenah LALPA pawh a awm,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel16:19 Chutichuan Saula chuan Jesaia hnenah chuan mi a tir a, ""I fapa Davida beram venga awm chu ka hnenah han kaltir rawh,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel16:20 Tin, Jesaia chuan sabengtung, chhang leh uain peng khat phur leh kel no a la a, a fapa Davida chu Saual pekah a kentir a." 
1Samuel16:21 Tin, Davida chuan Saula hnen chu a va thleng a, a hmaah chuan a va ding a; Ani chuan a lo ngaina hle mai a, a ralthuam kengtuah a tang ta a." 
1Samuel16:22 Tin, Saula chuan Jesaia hnenah, ""Davida hi ka hnenah awm rawh se, ka mit a tlung hle mai,"" tia hrilh turin mi a tir a.Tin, heti hi ani a, Pathian tirh ramhuaiin Saula a man apiangin Davida chuan tingtang a la a, a tum thin a: chutichuan Saula chu a lo harh a, a tha leh thin a, tin, ramhuai chuan a chhuahsan thin a." 
1Samuel16:23 Tin, heti hi ani a, Pathian tirh ramhuaiin Saula a man apiangin Davida chuan tingtang a la a, a tum thin a: chutichuan Saula chu a lo harh a, a tha leh thin a, tin, ramhuai chuan a chhuahsan thin a." 
1Samuel17:1 Tin, Philistia mite chuan indo turin an sipaite an khawm chiam mai a. Judai ram chhung Soko khuaah an pung khawm a, Ephes-damim hmunah Soko khua leh Azeka khaw inkarah tanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel17:2 Tin, Saula leh Israel mite chu an pung khawm a, Ela ruamah tanhmun an khuar a, Philistia mite lo dang turin an inzar darh a." 
1Samuel17:3 Tin, Philistia mite chu tlang pangah an awm a, tin, Israel mite chu a lehlam tlang pangah an awm a, an inkarah chuan ruam a awm a." 
1Samuel17:4 Tin, Philistia mite tanhmun atang chuan an mi chak, a hming Goliatha, Gath khuaa mi, tawng ruk leh khapa sang hi a lo chhuak a." 
1Samuel17:5 Dar lukhum hi a khum a, awmphaw a ha a; a awmphaw rih lam chu dar selel sangnga ani a." 
1Samuel17:6 A ngalah chuan dar ngalphaw a bun a, a hnungzangah chuan dar fei te a pai a." 
1Samuel17:7 A fei ngul chu themkawl ang hi a ni a; tin, a fei lu chu thir sekel zaruka rit a ni a: tin, a phaw kengtu chu ahmaah a kal a." 
1Samuel17:8 Tin, a ding a, Israel-ho sipaite chu a au a, an hnenah, ""Engati nge in do tura in rawn inzar darh? Kei Philistia mi, nangni Suala chhiahhlawh in ni lo'm ni? Mi inthlang u la ka hnenah lo chhuk rawh se." 
1Samuel17:9 Min beih theiha min tihhlum chuan in chhiahhlawhah kan awm ang a, amaherawhchu keiin ka ngama ka tihhlum chuan ka chhiahhlawhah in awm ang a, kan rawng in bawl ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:10 Tin, Philistia mi chuan, ""Vawiinah hian Israel-ho zipaite chu ka cho a ni, mi pakhat han thawh u la kan lo inbei ang e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:11 Tin, Saula leh Israel-ho zawng awngin chu Philistia mi thusawite chu an han hriat chuan, an zam a, an hlau ta em em mai a." 
1Samuel17:12 Tin, Davida chu Jesaia fapa ani a, ani chu Bethlehem-juda-a Ephrat mi kha ani a, fapa pariat a nei a; ani chu Saula lal lai chuan upa tak, tar tak ani tawh a." 
1Samuel17:13 Tin, Jesaia fapa upate pathum chuan indonaah Saula chu an zui a. A fapate pathum indonaa kalte hming chu a upa ber Eliaba te, a dawttu Abinadaba te, a pathumna Sama te an ni." 
1Samuel17:14 Tin, Davida chu a naupangber a ni a; tin, a upate pathum chuan Saula an zui a." 
1Samuel17:15 Davida chu Saula hnen atangin Bethlehem-ah a pa beram enkawlin a va kal a va kal thin a. 
1Samuel17:16 Tin, Philistia mi chuan, zing leh tlai apiangah hian a va hnaih thin a, ni sawmli chhung a va intar lang thin a." 
1Samuel17:17 Tin, Jesaia chuan a fapa Davida hnenah chuan, ""Vai epha khat leh he chhang hlawm sawm hi keng la, i unaute hnenah an riahhmunah va kalpui thuai rawh khai:" 
1Samuel17:18 tin, bawnghnute khal tlang sawmhi an pawla sang hotu kensak la; tin, i unaute engtin emaw an awm han zawt la, an chanchin i hriatna han hawn ang che." 
1Samuel17:19 Saula leh anni leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chu Philistia mite beiin Ela ruamah chuan an awm e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:20 Tin, Davida chu zing takah a tho a, beramte chu vengtu pakhat a kawltir a, Jesaian thu a pek ang chuan a keng a, a kal ta a; tin, indona hmuna chhuak mek sipaihote chu inbei tura an lo au dur dur lai takin ani chuan tawlailir awmna hmun chu a va thleng a." 
1Samuel17:21 Tin, Israel-ho leh Philistia mite chu inbei turin an lo inzar a, sipai leh sipai chu an lo inep a." 
1Samuel17:22 Tin, Davida chuan a bungrua chu bungraw enkawltu hnenah chuan a dah a, sipai hnen lamah chuan a va tlan a, a ute chu chibai a va buk a." 
1Samuel17:23 Tin, anmahni a biak lai chuan ngai teh, an mi chak Gath khuaa Philistia mi, a hming Goliatha chu Philistia mite sipai pawl zing ata a lo chhuak a, a thusawi ngai bawk kha a han sawi a: chu chu Davida chuan a lo hria a." 
1Samuel17:24 Tin, Israel mi zawng zawngte chuan chu mi an han hmuh chuan an tlanchhia a, an hlau em em mai a." 
1Samuel17:25 Tin, Israel mite chuan, ""Kha mihring lo chhuaka kha in hmu em? Israel mite cho turin a lo chhuak a ni ngei mai; tupawh amah tihlum apiang chu lalin nasa takin sum lamin a tihausa ang a, tin, a fanu ape ang a, tin, a pa chhungkua chu Israel-ho zingah hian zalenin a awmtir ang,"" ant i a." 
1Samuel17:26 Tin, Davida chuan a kianga dingte hnenah chuan, ""He Philistia mi hi tihluma Israel ho hmingchhiatna tirehtu chu engtia tih tur nge ni ang? He serhtan loh Philistia mi hi tu nge maw anih a, Pathian nung sipaite a han cho vei le?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:27 Tin, mipuite chuan hetiang hian an chhang a, ""A tihlumtu apiang chu kan sawi ang khan tih a ni ang,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel17:28 Tin, a u upa ber Eliaban mite hnena a thusawi lai chu a lo hria a; tichuan Eliaba chu Davida chungah chuan a thin a ur ta thut a, ""Engah nge i lo chhuk ve ni? Thlalera beram tlem awmte kha tu nge i ventir ni? I chapozia leh i rilru that lohzia ka hria a ni; indo ent ur tein i lo kal mai mai a,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:29 Tin, Davida chuan, ""Engnge maw ka tih le: a vang a awm a ni lo'm ni?"" a tia." 
1Samuel17:30 Tin, ani chuan mi dang hnen lam a hawisan a, a sawi ngai bawk a sawi a: tin, mipuite chuan a hmaa an chhan ang bawkin an chhang leh a." 
1Samuel17:31 Tin, Davida thusawi chu an hriatin Saula hnenah an sawi chhawng a; tin, ani chuan a ko a." 
1Samuel17:32 Tin, Davida chuan Saula hnenah, ""Amah avang chuan tuma rilru zam suh se; i chhiahhlawh hian chu Philistia mi chu ka va bei ang e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:33 Tin, Saula chuan Davida hnenah, ""Nang zawng chu Philistia mi bei tur chuan i kal thei em lo ang e, tleirawl chauh i la ni si a, ani zawng a tleirawl tirh ata indo mi a ni si a,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:34 Tin, Davida chuan Saula hnenah, ""I chhiahhlawh hian ka pa beram ka veng thin a; sakeibaknei emaw savawm emaw a lo kala beram rual zing ata beram no alakte hian" 
1Samuel17:35 ka um a, ka bei a, a ka ata chu ka chhanchhuak thin a sin: tin, mi bei tura a lo thawhte hian a bak hmulah ka man a, ka bei a, ka tihlum thin a ni." 
1Samuel17:36 I chhiahhlawh hian sakeibaknei leh savawmte ka tihlum ve ve tawh thin a; chu serhtan loh Philistia mi chu anmahni angin a awm ve mai ang maw le, Pathian nun gsipaite a cho vei a,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:37 Tin, Davida'n, ""Sakeibaknei kutbawr ata leh sakawm kutbwar ata mi chhanchhuaktu LALPA chuan chu Philistia mi kut ata chu mi chhanchhuak ang,"" a ti a. Tin, Saula chuan Davida hnenah, ""Kal teh le, i hnenah LALPA a wm ang chu,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:38 Tin, Saula chuan Davida chu ama thuam a bel a, dar lukum a khumtir a, awmphaw a haktir a." 
1Samuel17:39 Tin, Davida chua a thua chungah chuan a khandaih a pai a, kal ahan tum a; chutiang chuan a la tichhin ngai si lo a. Tin, Davida'n Saula hnenah, ""Ka kalpui thei dawn hauh lo mai a, hetiang hian ka la tichhin ngai lo a ni,"" a ti a. Tichuan Davida chu a inhlip ta a." 
1Samuel17:40 Tin, a tiang chu a keng a, luitea lung mum mam thelthawl panga a thlang a, a beram ven ip a ipteah chuan a pai a; tin, a virvawm chu akeng a, Philistia mi chu a va pan hnai ta a." 
1Samuel17:41 Tin, Philistia mi chu a lo kal zel a, Davida chu a rawn pan hnai a; tin, phaw kengtu chu a hmaah a kal a." 
1Samuel17:42 Tin, Philistia mi chuan a han hawi vel a, Davida chu a han hmuh chuan a hmust hle mai a; sar veng vawng, mit meng mawi tak, tleirawl mai a ni si a." 
1Samuel17:43 Chutichuan Philistia mi chuan Davida hnenah chuan, ""Ui emaw ka niha tiangte nena mi rawn pan chu le?"" a ti a. Tichuan Philistia mi chuan a pathiante chhalin Davida chu anchhia a lawh a." 
1Samuel17:44 Tin, Philistia mi chuan Davida hnenah, ""Lo kal teh, i sate kha chungleng savate leh ram sate ka lo eitir teh ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:45 Chutichuan Davida chuan Philistia mi hnenah chuan, ""Nang zawng khandaih te, fei te, feite te kengin i lo thawk a; kei zawng sipaite LALPA, Israel sipaite Pathian i chova hmingin ka lo thawk zawk a ni." 
1Samuel17:46 vawiinah hian LALPA'n nang hi ka kutah min pe dawn a ni, tin, ka that ang chia i lu ka tansak ang che; tin, Philistia sipaiho ruangte chu vawiinah hian chungleng savate leh ram sate ka eitir dawn a ni; chutichuan, lei chunga mi zawng zawng hian Israelho zingah hian Pathian a awm tih chu an hre thei ang a:" 
1Samuel17:47 tin, heta pungho zawng zawng hian LALPA chuan khandaih leh feiin a chhandam lo tih an hre thei ang a; indona chu LALPA indona ani si a, ani chuan ka kutah hian nangniho hi min pe dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:48 Tin, heti hi ani a, Philistia mi chu a lo thawh a, Davida bei tura a rawn hnaih chuan, Davida chu sipaiho lamah chua Philistia mi chu bei turin a tlan ta thuai a." 
1Samuel17:49 Tin, Davida chuan a ip chu a han zen a, lung a han phawrh a, a virvawm chuan ahan vawm a, Philistia mi chu a chaldar takah a han vawm a, a chalah chuan a lung chu a lut a, a tlu bawkkhup ta der mai a." 
1Samuel17:50 Chutichuan Davida chuan Philistia mi chu virvawm leh lungin a ngam a, Philistia mi chu a vawm a, a that ta a; Davida chuan khandaih a keng hauh lo a." 
1Samuel17:51 Tichuan Davida chu a tlan a, Philistia mi kiangah chuan a va ding a, akhandaih chu a la a, a pai ata chu a phawi a, chu chuan a that a, a lu a tan ta a. Tin, Philistia miten an mi chak chu a thi tih an hriatin an tlanchhe ta a." 
1Samuel17:52 Tin, Israel mi leh Juda mite chu an tho a, an au a, Philistia mite chu Gath thleng leh Ekron kulh kawngkhar thleng rawkin an um ta a. Tin, Philistia mite zinga hliamho chu Saaraim kawng tluanin Gath leh Ekron thlengin an tlu rum mai a ni." 
1Samuel17:53 Tin, Israel thlahte chuan Philistia mite an um chu an kirsan a, an riahhmun chu an suan ta a." 
1Samuel17:54 Tin, Davida chuan Philistia mi lu chu a la a, Jerusalem-ah a kalpui a, a ralthuam erawh chu a puan inah a dah ta a." 
1Samuel17:55 Saula'n Philistia mi bei tura Davida kal a hmuh khan sipai hotu Abnera hnenah chuan, ""Abner, he tleirawl hi tu fa nge ni? a ti a. Tin, Abnera chuan, ""I nunna chhalin ka sawi e, aw lalpa, ka hre hauh lo mai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:56 Tin, lal chuan, ""He naupang hi tu fa nge ni zawt chhuak rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:57 Tin, Davida, Philistia mi a that lo haw chu Abnera chuan a hruai a, Philistia milu keng chungin Saula hnenah chuan a kalpui a.Tin, Saula chuan a hnenah, ""Tu fapa nge i nih le tlangval?"" a tia. Tin, Davida chuan a chhang a, ""Bethlehem mi i chhiahhlawh Jesaia fapa ka ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel17:58 Tin, Saula chuan a hnenah, ""Tu fapa nge i nih le tlangval?"" a tia. Tin, Davida chuan a chhang a, ""Bethlehem mi i chhiahhlawh Jesaia fapa ka ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel18:1 Tin, Heti hi ani a, Saula hnena thu a sawi zawh chuan Jonathana nunna leh Davida nunna chu a lo inzawm ta chiah mai a, tichuan Jonathana chuan ama Nuna ahmangaih ang chiahin a hmangaih ta a." 
1Samuel18:2 Tin, Saula chuan chumi ni chuan a awmtir ta nghal a, a pa inah a hawntir phal ta lo a." 
1Samuel18:3 Chutichuan Jonathana leh Davida chuan thu an thlung a, ama nunna ang chiaha a hmangaih avangin." 
1Samuel18:4 Tin, Jonathana chuan a puan sin lai a hlip a, Davida a pe a, a thuam leh a khandaih leh a thalngul leh a taihrenna lamin a pe a." 
1Samuel18:5 Tin, Saula'n a tirhna apiangah Davida chu a kal thin a, fel takin a che thin a: tin, Saula chuan ral kap mite hotu atan a siam a, chu chu mi zawng zawng ngaihah leh Sauala chhiahhlawhte ngaihah pawh a tha em em a ni." 
1Samuel18:6 Tin, heti hi ani a, an lo hawna Davida, Philistia mi that a lo haw chuan, Israel khaw tinah hmeichhiate hla sa leh lam chungin, khuangte leh thil ri theite nen, hlim takin lal Saula hmuak turin an lo chhuak a." 
1Samuel18:7 Tin, hmeichhiate chuan lam chungin hlain an inchhawn a, ""Saula'n a sang a sang a that, Davida'n a singa sing,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel18:8 Chutichuan Saula chu a thinur ta viau mai a, chung thu chuan a tilawm lo hle mai a; ""Davida chu a singa sing thatah an ngai a, kei erawh chu a sanga sang chauh thatah min ngai a; ram tih ngawt loh chu aneih tur dang eng nge awm tawh?"" at ia." 
1Samuel18:9 Chutichuan Saula chuan chu mi ni atang chuan Davida a hmumawh ta a. 
1Samuel18:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tukah chuan Saula chungah chuan Pathian tirh ramhuai a lo thleng ta chiam mai a, in chhungah chuan thu a sawi ta bual bual ma a; tin, Davida chuan ni danga a tih ang bawkin tingtang a tum a; Saula chuan a fei a keng reng a." 
1Samuel18:11 Tin, Saula chuan fei chu a han lek a, ""Bangh sawn Davida ka khawh bet tlat teh ang,"" a ti a. Davida chuan vawi hnih a kiansan a." 
1Samuel18:12 Tin, a hnenah LALPA a wm avang leh Saula chu a kalsan avangin Saula chuan Davida chu a hlau a." 
1Samuel18:13 Chuvang chuan Saula chuan a hnen atangin a insawntir a, sang chunga a sipai hotuah a siam a; tin, mipui zingah chuan a lutin a chhuak thin a." 
1Samuel18:14 Tin, Davida chu a thiltih apiangah fel takin a che thin a; LALPA chu a hnenah a awm a." 
1Samuel18:15 Tin, Saula chuan fel takin a che thin tih a hmuhin a hlau hle mai." 
1Samuel18:16 Nimahsela Israel-ho leh Juda-ho zawng zawngte chuan Davida chu an ngaina em em a; an zinga luta chhuak thin a ni si a. 
1Samuel18:17 Tin, Saula chuan Davida hnenah, ""Ngai teh, ka fanu upa zawk Merabi hi i nupuiah ka neihtir ang che; huai takin mi tanphawt mai la, LALPA indonate chu do ang che,"" a tia. Saula chuan, ""Kei chuan a chunga kutthlak loin Philistia miten a chungah kut thlak zawk rawh se,"" a ti a ni a." 
1Samuel18:18 Tin, Davida chuan Saula hnenah, ""Tunge maw ka nih a, ka Nuna leh Israel-te zinga ka pa chhungte pawh eng nge maw an nih a, lal makpa ka han nihna tur chu?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel18:19 Nimahsela heti hi ani a, Saula fanu Merabi chu Davida neihtir a lo hun chuan Meholath mi Adriela nupui atan a pe ta mai a." 
1Samuel18:20 Tin, Saula fanu Mikali chuan Davida chu a hmangiah a; Saula chu an hrilh a; chu chuan a tilawm a." 
1Samuel18:21 Tin, Saula chuan, ""A awhna thang a lo nih theihna'n leh, Philistia miten a chungah kut an thlak theihna'n ani hi ka pe teh ang,"" a ti a. Chuvang chuan Saula chuan Davida hnenah, ""Vawiinah hian ka makpa i ni nawn leh ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel18:22 Chutichuan Saula chuan a chhiahhlawhte chu thu a pe a, ""A ruk tein Davida bia ula, 'Ngai teh, lal chu i chungah a lawm hle mai a, a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng pawhin an hmangaih che a ni; chutichuan lal makpaah awm ang che,' ti rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel18:23 Tin, Saula chhiahhlawhte chuan chung thu chu Davida beng hriatah an sawi a. Tin, Davida chuan, ""Mi rethei leh tuma ngaihsan mang loh keini ang tan hian lal makpa han nih chu thil namenah in ngai em ni?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel18:24 Tin, Saula chhiahhlawhte chuan, ""Davida chuan chutiangin a ti a ni,"" tiin an hrilh a." 
1Samuel18:25 Tin, Saula chuan, ""Davida hnenah, hetiang hian sawi ang che u, 'Lal chuan lal hmelma phuba lakna'n Philistia mite serhvun za tih loh chu man engmah a duh lo ve, a ti,' ti rawh u,"" a ti a. Saula chuan Davida chu Philistia mite kuta thihtir a rilruk tlat a." 
1Samuel18:26 Tin, a chhiahhlawhten chung thu chu Davida an han hrilh chuan lal makpa a han ni tur chu Davida chu a lawm hle mai a. Tin, ni tiam te chu a la ral lo a;" 
1Samuel18:27 Davida leh amite chu an tho a, Philistia mite zahnih an va that a; tin, Davida chuan an serhvun a rawn hawn a, tichuan lal makpa anih theihna turin lal chu kim takin an pe a. Tichuan Saula chuan a fanu Mikali chu nupuiah a neihtir ta a." 
1Samuel18:28 Tin, Saula chuan Davida hnenah chuan Pathian a awm tih a hre chiang ta a; tin, Saula fanu Mikali chuan ani chu ahmangiah a." 
1Samuel18:29 Tichuan Saula chua nDavida chu a hlau zual ta sauh mai a; Saula chu Davida hmelma ani ta kumkhua a.Chutichuan Philistia-ho miliante chu an va thawk chhuak thin a; tin, heti hi a ni a, an thawh chhuah apiangin Davida chu Saula chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte aia felin a che thin a; tichuan a hming chu an chawisang ta hle mai a." 
1Samuel18:30 Chutichuan Philistia-ho miliante chu an va thawk chhuak thin a; tin, heti hi a ni a, an thawh chhuah apiangin Davida chu Saula chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte aia felin a che thin a; tichuan a hming chu an chawisang ta hle mai a." 
1Samuel19:1 Chutichuan Suala chuan a fapa Jonathana leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng chu Davida that turin a ti a. 
1Samuel19:2 Nimahsela Saula fapa Jonathana chuan Davida chu a ngaina hle mai a. Tichuan Jonathana chuan Davida chu, ""Ka pa Saula hian thah a tum chia; chuvangin naktuk zingah chuan fimkhur la, hmun biruah biru reng rawh khai:" 
1Samuel19:3 tin, ka kal chhuak ang a, i awmna phulah ka pa kiangah ka va ding ang a, i chungchang thu-ah ka pa ka bia ang a; tin, eng emaw ka hriat chuan ka hrilh ang che,"" a tia." 
1Samuel19:4 Tin, Jonathana chuan a pa Saula hmaah chuan Davida chu a fak a, a hnenah, ""Lal chuan a chhiahhlawh chungah, Davida chungah hian thil sual ti lul suh se: i chungah engmah a tisual si lo a, a thiltihte chu i tana tha tak a ni zawk si a:" 
1Samuel19:5 thih dawn loin Philistia mi kha a bei a, tin, LALPA'n Israel-ho zawng awng chhandamna roup tak a thawh chhuahsak a: chu chu nang pawhin i hmu a, i lawm hle kha: chuvangin thisen pawi khawih lo chungah chuan engah tehlul nge thil i tihsual ang a, a vang engmah awm loin Davida chu i thah ang?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel19:6 Chutichuan Saula chuan Jonathana thusawi chu a pawm a. Saula chuan chhechamin, ""LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, ani chu tihhlum tur ani tawp lo ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel19:7 Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida chu a ko a, Jonathana chuan chung thil zawng zawng chu a hrilh a. Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida chu Saula hnenah chuan a hruai a, tun hma lam ang bawk khan a hnenah a awm leh ta a." 
1Samuel19:8 Tin, indona a lo awm leh a: tichuan Davida chu a thawk chhuak a, Philistia mite chu a va bei a, a va that chiam a, a hmaah chuan an tlanchhia a." 
1Samuel19:9 Tin, Saula chu a ina fei kenga thut laiin LALPA tirh ramhuai a chungah a lo thleng a; tin, Davida chuan tingtang a tum a." 
1Samuel19:10 Tin, Saula chuan a fei chuan Davida chu banga khawh beh tlat a tum a; nimahsela Saula kiang ata chu a put chhuak var a, fei chu bangah chuan a khawh bur ta ngur mai a; tin, Davida chu a tlan chhuak a, chu mi zan chuan a him ta a." 
1Samuel19:11 Tin, Saula chuan Davida in lamah zinga lo chang a, that turin mi a tir a: tin, Davida nupui Mikali chuan, ""Zaninah hian i nun i humhim loh zawngin naktukah an that dawn che a ni,"" tiin ahrilh a." 
1Samuel19:12 Chutichuan Mikali chuan Davida chu tukverhah a athlak thla a; tichuan a tlan bo a, a him ta a." 
1Samuel19:13 Tin, Mikali chuan milem a la a, khumah chuan a muttir a, tin, alu lamah chuan kel hmul lukham a dah a, puanin a khuh a." 
1Samuel19:14 Tin, Davida hruai tura Saula'n mi a rawn tirh chuan, ""A dam lo,"" a lo ti a." 
1Samuel19:15 Tin, Saula chuan Davida va en turin mi a tir a, ""A khum chawpin rawn zawn chho ula, ka lo that ang e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel19:16 Tin, a mi tirhte chu an va luh chuan ngai teh, khumah chuan milem chu a lu lama kel hmul lukham khamin a lo awm a." 
1Samuel19:17 Tin, Saula chuan Mikali hnenah, ""Engati nge hetianga mi bum a, ahimna tura ka hmelma i chhiahtir ni?"" a ti a. Tin, Mikali chuan Saula chu a chhang a. ""Ka kaltir loh chuan mi thah at um alawm maw le,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel19:18 Tichuan Davida chu a tlan bo a, a him ta a, Rama khuaah Samuela hnen a va thleng a, a chunga Saula thiltih zawng zawng chu a hrilh a. Tin, amah leh Samuela chu an kal a, Naioth-ah an awm a." 
1Samuel19:19 Tin, Saula chu, ""Ngai teh, Davida chu Rama khuaah Naioth-ah a awm,"" tiin an hrilh a." 
1Samuel19:20 Tichuan Davida hruai turin Saula chuan mi a ti ra: tin, zawlnei pawlho thu sawi dual dual lai leh Samuela chu an chunga hotu awm an va hmuh chuan, Saula mi tirhte chungah chuan Pthian thlarau a thleng a, anni pawh chuan thu an sawi ve ta dual dual a." 
1Samuel19:21 Tin, chu chu Saula an han hrilh chuan, mi dang a tir leh a, anni pawh chuan thu an va sawi ve leh ta dual dual mai a." 
1Samuel19:22 Chutichuan amah pawh chu Rmaa khuaah chuan a kal ve ta a tin, Seku hmuna tuichhunchhuah zau tak chu a va thleng a, ""Samuela leh Davida hi khawiah nge an awm?"" a ti a, a zawt a. Tin, tu emaw hian, ""Ngai teh, Rama khuaa Naioth-ah an awm,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel19:23 Chutichuan rama khua aNaioth-ah a kal a; tin, Pathian thlarau a chungah chuan a lo thleng ve ta a, a kal zel a, Rmaa khuaa Naioth a thlen thlengin thu a sawi bual bual zel a.Tin, ani pawhin a silhfente a hlip ve a, Samuela hmaah chuan thu a sawi ve ta bual bual a, chumi nileng leh chu mi zankhua chuan ruakin a mu a. Chuvang chuan, ""Saula pawh chu zawlnei zingah a tel ve ta elo maw ni?"" tih hi an ching hlen ta." 
1Samuel19:24 Tin, ani pawhin a silhfente a hlip ve a, Samuela hmaah chuan thu a sawi ve ta bual bual a, chumi nileng leh chu mi zankhua chuan ruakin a mu a. Chuvang chuan, ""Saula pawh chu zawlnei zingah a tel ve ta elo maw ni?"" tih hi an ching hlen ta." 
1Samuel20:1 Chutichuan Davida chu Rama khuaa Naioth ata chu a tlan a, Jonathana hnenah a kal a, ""Engnge maw ka tih le? Engnge ni ka bawhchhiat? I pa chungah hian eng nge ka tihsual a, hetia mi thah a tum hi ni le?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel20:2 Tin, ani chuan, ""That suh e a; i thi tawp lo ang; ngai teh, ka pa hchuan min hriattir loin engmah reng reng lian se te se a ti ngai lo a, engah tehlul nge he'ng thu hi ka lakah a zep ang, a zep tawp lo ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel20:3 Tin, Davida chuan, ""I pa chuan i mi khawngiah dan hi a hre chiang hle kmai si a; 'Jonathana chuan hei chu hre kher suh se, chutilozawng a lungngai dawn em mai e,' a ti a ni ang: amaherawhchu LALPA nunna leh i nunna chhalin ka sawi e, thihna nena kan inkar chu pen khat chauh a ni,"" tiin a sawi uar leh a." 
1Samuel20:4 Chutichuan Jonathanan Davida hnenah, ""I nunnain a duh apiang chu ka tihsak zel ang che,"" at ia." 
1Samuel20:5 Tin, Davida chuan Jonathana hnenah, ""Ngai teh, naktuk hi thla thar ani dawn a, lal hnena chawhlui kil ngei tur ka ni a; nimahsela a ni thum ni tlai lam thlengin phul lamah biru turin ka kal zawk ang e." 
1Samuel20:6 Tin, i pain ka awm loh hi lo hre chhuak ta a nih leh, 'Davida chuan a khua Bethlehem-a va kal lawk min dil ngawih ngawih a; an chhungkaw tana an kum tin, inthawi hun ani e,' lo ti la." 
1Samuel20:7 Tin, ' A that chu,' a tih chuan i chhiahhlawh chu a thla amuang ang a; amaherawhchu a thin a rim chuan thil tha lo tih a tum ani tih hre mai ang che." 
1Samuel20:8 Chuvangin i chhiahhlawh hi tha takin ti ang che; i chhiahhlawh chu LALPA thuthlungah i luhpui tawh si a; amaherawhchu bawhchhiatna nei ka nih chuan nangma'n min that mai rawh; eng atan nge i pa hnenah min hruai kher kher ang? a ti a. 
1Samuel20:9 Tin, Jonathana chuan, ""That suh e a; i chungah thil tha lo tih ka pan a tum tih ka hriat phawt chuan ka hrilh dawn lo che em ni?'" 
1Samuel20:10 Chutichuan Davida chuan Jonathana hnenah, ""I pain bung takin lo chhang ta hlauh ang che se la tuin nge min hrilh ang?' a ti a." 
1Samuel20:11 Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida hnenah, ""Hawh teh, phulah i va kal teh ang,"" a ti a. Tichuan phulah chuan an va kal dun ta a." 
1Samuel20:12 Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida hnenah, ""LALPA Israelte Pathian chu hretu ni rawh se; naktuk hetih hunah emaw, ni thum niah emaw ka pa ka han dawp hunah, ngai teh, Davida chungchang thu a tha lam anih chuan a hnenah mi tirin ka hrilh dawn lo che em ni?" 
1Samuel20:13 Tin, ka pain i chungah thil tha lo ti duh ta se la, ka hrilh loh che a, thlamuang taka i kal theihna'na ka thlah loh che chuan, LALPA'n Jonathana chu a tih tihin ti se la, chu aia nasa pawhin, tin, LALPA chu i hnenah awm rawh se, ka pa hnena a awm thin angin." 
1Samuel20:14 Tin, ka thih loha tura ka dam chhung chauha LALPA khawngaihna chu mi hmuhtir ni loin," 
1Samuel20:15 kumkhuain ak chhungte pawh i khawngaih bang suh ang che; LALPA'n Davida hmelma lei chung ata a tihbo vek hnu thleng pawhin bang suh ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel20:16 Chutichuan Jonathana chuan,""Davida hmelmate lakah LALPA'n a phut ang,"" tiin Davida chhungte hnenah thu a thlung a." 
1Samuel20:17 Tin, Jonathana chuan amah ahmangaihna chhalin Davida hnenah, chhia a chham leh a ama nunna hmangaih ang chiahin ahmangaih si a." 
1Samuel20:18 Chutichuan Jonathana chuan a hnenah, ""Naktuk hi thla thar ani dawn a; i thut hmun a r uah dawn avangin i awm loh a lang ngei dawn a." 
1Samuel20:19 Ni thum i awm hnu chuan chhuk thuai la, hmana thil a lo awm laia i bihrukna hmunah khan lo kal la, Ezel lung bulah chuan awm reng ang che." 
1Samuel20:20 Tin, inthemthiam ni awm takin thla pathumin a sirah ka rawn kap ang a." 
1Samuel20:21 Tin, ngai teh, 'Kal la, thlate kha va zawng hmu rawh,' tiin naupang ka tir ang a. Naupang hnena, 'En teh, thlate chu i hnung lama kha a awm e, la la, lo kal rawh,' ka tih chuan LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, i tan amuanawmin hlauh tur a awm a awm lo ani ang a." 
1Samuel20:22 Amaherawhchu naupang hnena, 'En teh, thalte chu i piah lama saw a awm e,' ka tih chuan kal bo mai ang che; LALPA chuan a kal botir che a ni ang." 
1Samuel20:23 Tin, nang leh keiin thil kan saiw tak chungchang thu-ah chuan ngai teh, nang nena kan karah chuan LALPA chu a awm kumkhua a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel20:24 Chutichuan Davida chu phulah chuan a biru a; tin, thla a lo thar chuan lal chu chaw kilin a thu a." 
1Samuel20:25 Tin, lal chu ni danga a thutna pangngai bang kianga a thutnaah chuan a thu a; tin, Jonathana chu a ding a, tin, Abnera chu Saula kiangah athu a; Davida hmun erawh chu a ruak a." 
1Samuel20:26 Nimahsela Saula chuan chu mi ni chuan engmah a sawi lo: A chungah thil eng emaw a awm ang a, a thianghlim lo emaw ani ang, a thianghlim lo a ni ngei ang,"" a ti rilru a." 
1Samuel20:27 Tin, heti hi ani a, thla thar tuk a ni hnih ni chuan Davida hmun chu a lo ruak ta cheu a; tichuan Saula chuan a fapa Jonathana hnenah chuan, ""Engati nge Jesaia fapa hi niminah leh vawiinah chawhlui kil tura a lo kal loh?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel20:28 Tin, Jonathana chuan Saula chu a chhang a, ""Davida chuan Bethlehem a kal mi dil ngawih ngawih a," 
1Samuel20:29 Min kaltir hram rawh khai, kan chhungte chuan khuaah chuan inthawina an nei dawn a, ka unau chuan awm ve turin min chah tlat a, chutichuan min khawngaih theih chuan min kaltir la, ka unaute ka va tlawh ang e,' a ti a. Chuvang chuan lal dawhkanah chuan a lo kal lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel20:30 Chutichuan Jonathana chungah Saula thin chu a lo ur ta thut a, a hnenah, ""Nang, hmeichhe kawhmawh leh luhlul fapa, Jesaia fapa chu i mualphona'n leh i nu saruakna timualpho turin i thlang tih ka hre lo em ni tehlul?" 
1Samuel20:31 Jesaia fapa hi he leiah a awm chhung zawng tihngheh i ni lo ang a, i ram pawh. Chuvangin kohtir nghal la ka hnenah han hruaitir rawh, a thi ngei tur a ni,"" a tia." 
1Samuel20:32 Tin, Jonathanan a pa Saula chu a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Engah nge maw tihhlum tur anih ang le? Engnge a tih?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel20:33 Tin, Saula chuan khawh tumin a fei chu a han lek a; chu mi avang chuan Jonathana chuan a pain Davida chu thah a lo tum ngei a ni tih a hre ta a." 
1Samuel20:34 Chutichuan Jonathana chu dawhkan ata chu thinrim takin a tho a, chu mi thla ni hnih ni chuan chaw a kil ve ta lo a; a pa chuan Davida a tihmualpho em avangin a lungngaihpui a ni." 
1Samuel20:35 Tin, heti hi ani a, zingah chuan Jonathana chu naupang te hruaiin phul lamah Davida nena an hmun ruatah chuan a kal ta a." 
1Samuel20:36 Tin, a naupang hnenah chuan, ""Tlan la, ka thla kahte hi va zawng rawh khai,"" at i a. tin, naupang chu a tlan lai chuan, apiah lamah chuan thla a kap a." 
1Samuel20:37 Tin, naupang chuan Jonathana thla kah tlakna hmun a va thlen chuan Jonathana chuan naupang chu a au a, ""Thal chu i piah lama saw ani lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel20:38 Tin, Jonathana chuan naupang chu a au a, ""Lo tlan thuai rawh, hmanhmawh rawh, muang suh,"" a han ti a. Tin, Jonathana naupang chuan thla chu a chhar khawm a, a pu hnen lamah chuan a kal ta a." 
1Samuel20:39 Nimahsela naupang chuan engmah a hre lo a. Jonathana leh Davida chauh chuan thil awmzia chu an hria a. 
1Samuel20:40 Tin, Jonathana hchuan a naupang chu ahriamhrei chu a pe a, a hnenah, ""Kal ta la, khuaah lo han hawpui teh ta,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel20:41 Tin, naupang chu a kal tak veleh chuan Davida chu a awm hmun chhim lampang ata chu a lo tho a, hmaia lei sin chibai vawi thum a buk a; tin, an infawp a, an tap dun a, Davida erawh chu a zualkai bik a.Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida hnenah, ""Thlamuang takin kal rawh aw, 'LALPA chu nang nena kan inkarah leh ka thlahte leh i thlahte karah kumkhuain awm rawh se,' tia LALPA hminga chhia kan chham dun tawh kha,"" a ti a. Tichuan a tho a, a kal ta a; tin, Jonathana chu khuaah chuan a lut ta a." 
1Samuel20:42 Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida hnenah, ""Thlamuang takin kal rawh aw, 'LALPA chu nang nena kan inkarah leh ka thlahte leh i thlahte karah kumkhuain awm rawh se,' tia LALPA hminga chhia kan chham dun tawh kha,"" a ti a. Tichuan a tho a, a kal ta a; tin, Jonathana chu khuaah chuan a lut ta a." 
1Samuel21:1 Chutichuan Davida chu Nob khuaah puithiam Ahimeleka hnenah chuan akal a: tin, Ahimeleka chuan khur chungin Davida chu a lo hmuak a, a hnenah ""Eng tizia nge i va mal ve, tumah kalpui ineih loh?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel21:2 Tin, Davida chuan puithiam Ahimeleka hnenah chuan, ""Lalin thil ti turin thu mi pe a, ka hnenah, 'Ka thil tihtir tum reng reng che leh ka thupek che hi tumahin hre suh se,' a ti tlat a; tin, tlangvalhote lo awmna tur hmune chu ka ruat a." 
1Samuel21:3 Chutichuan engte nge i kutah awm le: chhang hlawm nga min pe la, a nih loh leh i neih ang apiang pawh,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel21:4 Tin, puithiam chuan Davida chu a chhang a, ""Chhang naran chu ka nei lo a, chhang thianghlim erawh chu ka nei a; tlangvalte chu hmeichhe laka an inthiar fihlim phawt chuan,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel21:5 Tin, Davida chuan puithiam chu a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Tun ni thum chhung chu hmeichhe lakah reng reng chuan kan inthiar fihlim vek takzet a ni; ka lo chhuah dawn lai pawh khan tlangvalte buungbel chu a thianghlim a ni, khawii lo a kal naran mai tur kan ni nain; vawiin lek phei chuan an bungbel chu a va thianghlim lehzual dawn em!""" 
1Samuel21:6 Chutichuan puithiam chuan chhang thianghlim a pe ta a: chutah chuan chhang dah an lak nia chhang luma thlak tura LALPA hma ata an laka chauh lo chu chhang dang a awm si lo a. 
1Samuel21:7 Tin, chu mi ni chuan Saula chhiahhlawh zinga mi pakhat LALPA hmaa hren a awm a; a hming chu Doega ani a, Edom mi, Saula ran vengtu zinga hotu ber ani a." 
1Samuel21:8 Tin, Davida chuan Ahimeleka hnenah chuan, ""Fei emaw, khandaih emaw i kawl lo maw? Lal hnaah chuan hmanhmawh a tul avangin ka khandaih leh ka hriamhrei a enga mah ka rawn keng hman lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel21:9 Tin, puithiam chuan, "" Philistia mi Goliatha, Ela ruama i thaha khandaih chu ngai teh, puithiam kawr phenah hian puana tuamin a awm reng mai: chu mi chu i lak duh chuan la rawh, chu chauh lo chu a dang a awm lo,"" at ia. Tin, Davida chuan, ""Chu lo liam, min pe rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel21:10 Chutichuan Davida chu a tho a, chu mi ni chuan Saula hlauin a tlan bo a, Gath lal Akisa hnenah akal ta a." 
1Samuel21:11 Tin, Akisa chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnenah, ""He mi hi an ram lal Davida ani lawm ni? kha? ""Saula'n a sang a sang a that, Davida'n a singa sing,"" tia lam chungin a chungchang thu hlain an sa dur dur ani lo'm ni?kha?"" an ti a." 
1Samuel21:12 Tin, Davida chuan chung thute chu a rilruah apai ta a, Gath lal Akisa chu ahlau ta hle mai a." 
1Samuel21:13 Chutichuan ahmaah chuan a awm dan a tidanglam a, an mithmuhah chuan a a der ta chiam mai a, kawngkharte chu a ham vak vak a, a khabe hmulahte chuan a chil a tiluang duah duah ta mai a." 
1Samuel21:14 Chutichuan Akisa chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnenah chuan, ""En teh u, mi a a nih in hre reng si a, engati nge ka hnenah in rawn hruai ni?Mi a ka tlakchham vangin em ni he mi hi a atzia tilang tura ka hmaa in rawn hruai ni? He mi hi ka inah a lo lut tehlul ang maw?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel21:15 Mi a ka tlakchham vangin em ni he mi hi a atzia tilang tura ka hmaa in rawn hruai ni? He mi hi ka inah a lo lut tehlul ang maw? a ti a. 
1Samuel22:1 Chutichuan Davida chu chuta ta chu a chhuak a, Adullam pukah chuan a tlan ta a: tin, a unaute leh a pate chhungkua zawng zawngin an lo hriat chuan chutah chuan ahnenah an zuk kal a," 
1Samuel22:2 Tin, mangang apiang te, leibat nei apiang te, lungnihlohna nei apiangte a hnenah chuan an kal khawm a; tichuan an hotuah a awm ta a; tin, a hnenah chuan mi zali emaw lai an awm ta a." 
1Samuel22:3 Tin, Davida chu chuta ta chu Moab rama Mizpe-ah a kal a; Moab lal hnenah chuan, ""Pathianin thil min tihsak tur ka hriat hma loh chu ka nu leh ka pate i hnenah lo awm rawh se aw,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel22:4 Tin, Moab lal hmaah chuan a hruai a: tichuan Davida chu kulhbingah a awm chhung zang chuan a hnenah an awm a." 
1Samuel22:5 Tin, zawlnei Gada chu Davida hnenah, ""Kulhbingah chuan awm reng suh; chhuak la Judai ramah kal rawh,"" a tia. Chutichuan Davida chu a chhuak a, Hereth ngawh chuan a lut ta a." 
1Samuel22:6 Tin, Saula chuan Davida leh a hnena awmte chu an hmu ta tih a lo hria a: Saula chu Gibea-ah Rama khuaah tamarisk thing hnuaiah a fei kengin a thu a; tin, a velah chuan a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte chu an ding a." 
1Samuel22:7 Tin, Saula chuan a kiang vela ding a chhiahhlawhte hnenah chuan, ""Nangni Benjamin mite u, ngaithla rawh u; Jesaia fapa chuan lote leh grep huante a pe theuh dawn che uin a sipai sang hotuah te, a sipai za hotuahte a siam vek dawn che u em ni?" 
1Samuel22:8 In zain min phiar a, ka fapai Jesaia fapa hnena thu a thlun ka hnena tilang reng reng in awm loh a, mi lungngaihpui reng reng in awm loh a, ka fapain ka chhiahhlawh hi mi do tur leh vawiin ni te pawha mi chang tura a fuih thu ka hnena tilang in awm loh ni?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel22:9 Chutichuan Saula chhiahhlawhte kianga ding Edom mi Doega chuan a chhang a, ""Jesaia fapa chu Nob khuaah Ahituba fapa Ahimeleka hnena lo kal ka hmu a." 
1Samuel22:10 Tin, ani chuan LALPA a rawnsak a, ei tur ape a, tin, Philistia mi Goliatha khandaih a pe bawk,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel22:11 Chutichuan lal chuan Abituba fapa puithiam Ahimeleka leh a pa chhungkua, Nob khuaa puithiam awm zawng zawngte chu akohtir a." 
1Samuel22:12 Tin, Saula chuan, ""Nang, Ahituba fapa, lo ngaithla rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka pu, heta hi ka awm e,"" ati a." 
1Samuel22:13 Tin, Saula'n a hnenah, ""Chhang leh khandaihte lo pea LALPA te rawnsakin vawiin nia a tih anga mi do tur leh mi chang tura engati nge nangmah leh Jesaia fapa hian mi phair vel ni?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel22:14 Chutichuan Ahimeleka chuan lal chu a chhang a, ""Lal makpa, i mi rawn ber thin, in chhungkuaa mi zahawm Davida ang reng renga mi rinawm hi i chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte zingah tu nge awm?" 
1Samuel22:15 Vawiin hi Pathian ka biak rawnsak tan ni em ni? A ni lo. Lal chuan a chhiahhlawh emaw, ka pa chhungkuate reng reng emaw min puh lul suh se; i chhiahhlawh hian he'ng thu zawng zawng hi a engamah ka hre lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel22:16 Tin, lal chuan ""Ahimelek, i thi ngei ngei tur a ni, nang leh i pa chhungkua zawng zawngte nen,"" at i a." 
1Samuel22:17 Tin, lal chuan, a kianga ding sipaite hnenah chuan, ""Lehhawi u la, LALPA puithiamho hi that rawh u, Davida lamah an tang a, a tlan bo tih hre reng sia ka hnena an sawi loh avangin,"" a tia. Nimahsela lal chhiahhlawhte chuan LALPA puithiamte bei turin kut an lek duh lo a." 
1Samuel22:18 Tin, lal chuan Doega hnenah chuan, ""Nang lehhawi la, puithiamte chu bei rawh,"" a tia Tin, Edom mi Doega chu a lehhawi a, puithiamchu a bei a, chu mi ni chuan puan zai sin puithiam kawr ha, mi sawmriat leh panga a that a." 
1Samuel22:19 Tin, Nob, puithiam khua chu khandaihin a bei a; a hmei a pain naupang leh hnute hne laite lamin, bawng te, sabengtung te, beramte nen khandaihin a sat hlum a." 
1Samuel22:20 Tin, Ahituba fapa Ahimeleka fapate zinga pakhat, a hming Abiathara chu a tlan chhuak a, Davida hnenah a tlan a." 
1Samuel22:21 Tin, Abiathara chuan Saula'n LALPA puithiamte a thah thu chu Davida a hrilh a." 
1Samuel22:22 Tin, Davida chuan Abiathara hnenah chuan, ""Edom mi Doega chuta a awm ni ngei khan Saula a hrilh ngei ngei ang tih ka hre sa reng a ni: i pa chhungkua zawng zawngte chu keimah avanga thi an ni a.Nang chu ka hnenah awm la, hlau suh; kei mi thah tum chuan nang pawh thah an tum ang che; ka hnena i awm erawh chuan i him ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel22:23 Nang chu ka hnenah awm la, hlau suh; kei mi thah tum chuan nang pawh thah an tum ang che; ka hnena i awm erawh chuan i him ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel23:1 Tin, ""Ngai teh, Philistia mite chuan Keila khua an bei a, hruia buhte chu an laksak vek mai a,"" tiin Davida chu an hrilh a."
