1Samuel23:2 Tichuan Davida chuan LALPA chu, ""Chung Philistia mite chu ka zuk bei ang em?"" tiin a rawn a. Tin, LALPA chuan Davida hnenah, ""Philistia mite chu zuk bei la, Keila khua chu zuk hum him rawh,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel23:3 Tin, Davida mie chuan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Judai rama awm chung pawh hian kan hlau ani a, Keila khuaa zuk kala Philistia sipaite zuk beih chu a va hlauhawm lehzual awm ve!"" an ti a." 
1Samuel23:4 Chutichuan Davida chuan LALPA chu a rawn leh a. Tin, LALPA chuan a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Tho la, Keila khuaah chhuk rawh, Philistia mite chu i kutah ka pe ang e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel23:5 Chutichuan Davida leh a mite chu Keila khuaah an kal a, Philistia mite chu an zuk bei a, an rante chu an laksak a, an that chiam a. Chutiang chuan Davida'n Keila khuaa mite chu a humhim ta a." 
1Samuel23:6 Tin, heti hi ani a, Ahimeleka fapa Abiathara Keila khuaa Davida hnena a tlan lai khan puithiam kawr kenga chuk thla a ni a." 
1Samuel23:7 Tin, Keila khuaah Davida chu a kal tih Saula an hrilh a. Tin, Saula chuan, Pathianin ka kutah a pe ta anih chu; kulh kawngka leh a kalhna nei khuaah chuan lutin a inkhung ta si a,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel23:8 Tin, Saula chuan mi zawng zawng chu indo turin keila khua zuk beia Davida leh amite zuk hual turin a ko khawm a." 
1Samuel23:9 Tin Davida chuan Saula'n a chungah thil tha lo a suangtuah tih chu a lo hria a, puithiam Abithara hnenah chuan, ""Puithiam kawr kha han la the khai,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel23:10 Chutichuan Davida chuan, ""Aw LALPA Israelte pathian, i chhiahhlawh hian, Saula chuan keimah avangin khua chu tichhe turin Keila khuaah chuan lo chhum a tum tih ka hre tlat a." 
1Samuel23:11 Keila khua amite hian a kutah min pe ang em? i chhiahhlawhin ka lo hriat ang chuan Saula chu a lo chuk dawn em? Aw LALPA, Israelte Pathian, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh hi mi hrilh ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, LALPA chuan, ""A lo chhuk dawn,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel23:12 Chutichuan Davida chuan, ""Keila khuaa mite chuan kei leh ka mite hi Saula kutah min pe ang em?"" a ti a. Tin, LALPA chuan, ""An pe ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel23:13 Chutichuan Davida leh a mite, zaruk emaw lai chu an tho a, Keila khua ata chu an chuak a, kalna remchang lai apiangah chuan an kal ta a. Tin, Davida chu Keila khua ata a tlan chhuak ta tih Saula an hrilh a; tichuan thawh chhuah a thulh ta a." 
1Samuel23:14 Tin, Davida chu thlalerah, kulh biungahte a awm a, Ziph thlalera tlang ramah a awm ta reng a. Tin, Saula chuan amah chu ni tin, a zawng a, nimahsela Pathianin a kutah a pe lo a." 
1Samuel23:15 Tin, Davida chu thlalerah, kulh biungahte a awm a, Ziph thlalera tlang ramah a awm ta reng a. Tin, Saula chuan amah chu ni tin, a zawng a, nimahsela Pathianin a kutah a pe lo a." 
1Samuel23:16 Tin, Saula fapa Jonathana chu a tho a, ramhnuaiah Davida hnenah chuan a kal a, Pathianah a kut a tihchaksak a." 
1Samuel23:17 Tin, a hnenah, ""Hlau shauh suh, ka pa Saula kut chuan a zawng chhuak lo ang che, Israelte lalah i awm ang a, kei i dawttu ka ni ang; chu pawh chu ka pa Saula hian a hre reng a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel23:18 Tin, an pahnih chuan LALPA hmaah thu an thlung a; tin, Davida chu ramhnuaiah a awm reng a, Jonathana chu a in lamah a haw ta a." 
1Samuel23:19 Chutichuan Ziph mite chu Gibea-ah Saula hnenah an han chho a, ""Davida chu ka hnenah ramhnuai kulhbingah, thlaler chhim lampang Hakila tlangah a biru reng a ni lo'm ni?" 
1Samuel23:20 Chuvangin aw LALPA, i nunnain lo chhuk a duhthusam ang ngei chuan lo chhuk tawh la, tin, keini lo tih ve tur chu lal kuta amah lo hlan chu a ni ang,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel23:21 Tin, Saula chuan, ""LALPA chuan malsawm che u r awh se; nangniho chuan min khawngaih hle a ni." 
1Samuel23:22 Kal u la, va chian lehzual u la, a hnuhma va chhui u la, chutah a hmutu pawh va chain fel leh te te rawh u; fing vervek takin thil a ti thin tih miin min hrilh a ni." 
1Samuel23:23 chuvangin abihrukna hmun zawng zawngte hre diam vek u la, tin, ka hnenah lo kal leh ngei ngei u la, tin, in hnenah ka kal ve dawn nia; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, he rama a wm phawt chuan Juda mi sang tam tak zing ata chu ka zawng chhuak ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel23:24 Tin, an tho a, Saula kal hmain Ziph-ah chuan an kal ta a: nimahsela Davida leh a mite chu thlaler chhim lam Araba-ah Maon thlalerah chuan an awm a." 
1Samuel23:25 Tin, Saula leh a mite chu amah zawng turin an kal a. Tin, Davida an hrilh a: chutichuan lungpui pan chuan a chhuak a, Maon thlalerah chuan Davida chu a um ta a." 
1Samuel23:26 Tin, Saula chu tlang lehlam pangah a kal a, tin, Davida leh amite chu tlang lehlam pangah an kal a; tin Davida chu Saula hlauin hmanhmawh takin a tlan a; Saula leh amite lah chuan Davida leh amite chu man tumin an hual vel si a." 
1Samuel23:27 Nimahsela Saula hnenah chuan, ""Hmanhmawh la, lo kal rawh, Philistia mite chuan kan ram an rawn bei a ni,"" tiin zualko a lo thleng a." 
1Samuel23:28 Chutichuan Saula chuan Davida a um chu a kirsan a, Philistia mite bei tur chuan a kal ta a; chuvangin chu mi hmun chu Sela-hamalekoth an ti a.Tin, Davida chu chuta ta chu a chho a, Engedi kulhbingah te chuan a awm ta a." 
1Samuel23:29 Tin, Davida chu chuta ta chu a chho a, Engedi kulhbingah te chuan a awm ta a." 
1Samuel24:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Saula Philistia mite a va um lo haw chu, ""Ngai teh, Davida chu En-gedi thlalerah a awm e,"" tiin an hrilh a." 
1Samuel24:2 Chutichuan Saula chuan Israel mi zawng zawngte zing ata thlan thiau mi sangthum a hruai a, satharte chenna lungpui zing lamah chuan Davida leh a mite zawngin an kal ta a." 
1Samuel24:3 Tin, kawng lakah chuan beram huang puk awmna hi a va thleng a; tin, Saula chu inthiarfihlim turin a va lut a. Tin, Davida leh a mite chu puk chhungril lamahte chuan an awm a." 
1Samuel24:4 Tin, Davida mite chuan, a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, LALPA'n i hnenah, 'Ngai teh, i hmelma chu i kuta ka pe ang a, a chunagh tha i tih ang angin ti ang che,' a tih ni kha a nih tak hi,"" an ti a. ChutichuanDavida chu a tho a, a ruk tein Saula puan fem chu ave hlep a." 
1Samuel24:5 Tin, Heti hi a ni a, nakinah chuan Daula puan fem a va hleh chuan Davida rilru a chhun hle a." 
1Samuel24:6 Chutichuan amite hnenah chuan, ""LALPA hriak thih a ni tih hre reng chung si a, a chunga kut thawha LALPA hriak thih ka LALPA chunga he thil ka tih hi a awm lo tawp mai a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel24:7 Chutichuan Davida'n chung thu chuan a mite a khapbet a, Saula bei tura an thawh chu a phal ta lo a. Tin, Saual chu puk ata chu a chhuak a, a kal leh ta a." 
1Samuel24:8 Ahnu lawkah chuan Davida pawh chu a tho a, puk ata chu a chhuak a, ""LALPA, ka LALPA,"" tiin Saula chu a au zui a. Tin, Saula a han lehhawi chuan Davida chuan a hmaia lei siin chibai a buk a." 
1Samuel24:9 Tin, Davida chuan Suala hnenah, ""Ngai teh,'Davida'n i chiatna a zawng a ni,' tia miten i hnena an sawi chu engah nge i awih thin?" 
1Samuel24:10 Ngai teh, vawiinah hian LALPA'n pukah hian ka kuta a hlanzia che hi i mit ngeiin i hmu a; thenkhat chuan tihhlum tur chein min tir a; nimahsela ka zuah chia; 'Ka LALPA hriak thih a ni si a,' ka ti a." 
1Samuel24:11 Chu chauh pawh ni loin,ka pe en teh, hei ipuan fem pawh ka ken reng hi; i puan fem ka hleh theih si a, ka tihhlum loh cheuah hian ka kutah hian thil tha leh bawhchhiatna a awm lo tih le ka nunna lak tumin mi zawng mi zawng mah la, i chungah ka sual lo tih hre ngei ngei rawh khai," 
1Samuel24:12 LALPA'n nang nena kan chungthu hi rel se la, tin, LALPA chuan i lakah phuba mi laksak rawh se; mahse kei chuan i chungah kut ka thlak lo reng reng ang." 
1Samuel24:13 Hman lai thufingin, 'Mi sual atangin sual a lo chhuak thin a,' a ti a; nimahsela i chungah kut ka thlak lo ang." 
1Samuel24:14 Israel lal chu tu zawngin nge a lo chhuah? Tunge i um? Ui thisawn, uihli lek," 
1Samuel24:15 Chuvangin LALPA chu roreltu ni se la, nang nena kan chung thu hi titlu se la, mi ngaihtuahsakin mi sawipui se la i kut ata mi chhanchhuak rawh se,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel24:16 Tin, heti hi ani a, Davida'n Saula hnenah he'ng thu hi a sawi zawh chuan Saula chuan, ""I aw elo ni, ka fapa Davida?"" a ti a. Tin, Saula chu aw chhuah meuhin a tap ta a." 
1Samuel24:17 Tin, Davida hnenah chuan, ""Kei ai chuan i fel zawk em em a ni, ang zawngin ka chungah thil tha i ti a, kei erawh chuan thil tha lo ka ti a ni." 
1Samuel24:18 Tin, vawiinah hian ka chungah hianthil tha i tihzia i tialgn a ni: LALPA'n i kuta min pek pawha min tihhlum loah hian." 
1Samuel24:19 Miin a hmelma hmu ang se la, tlang takin a chhuah duh ang em? Chuvangin vawiina ka chunga i thil tihah LALPA'n thil thain rul che rawh se." 
1Samuel24:20 Ngaiteh, lal i la ni ngei dawn ani tih ka hre ta a." 
1Samuel24:21 chuvangin ka hnua ka thlahte lo awm turte hu tiboral lo tur leh ka pa chhungkaw zing ata ka hming tibo lo turin LALPA hmingin ka hnenah chia cham rawh khai,"" a ti a.chutichuan Davida chuan Saula hnenah chhia a chham ta a. Tin, Saula chu a haw ta a; Davida leh a mite erawh chu kulh bingah chuan an chho ta a." 
1Samuel24:22 chutichuan Davida chuan Saula hnenah chhia a chham ta a. Tin, Saula chu a haw ta a; Davida leh a mite erawh chu kulh bingah chuan an chho ta a." 
1Samuel25:1 Tin, Samuela chu a thi ta a; tin, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu an inko khawm a, an tah a. Rama khuaa a inah chuan an phum ta a. Tin, Davida chu a tho a, Paran thlalerah a chhuk a." 
1Samuel25:2 Moan khuaah chuan mi pakhat a awm a, a khawsakna chu Karmel tlangah a ni; mi ropui tak ani a, beram sangthum leh kel sang anei a: Karmel tlangah chuan a beram hmul a met a." 
1Samuel25:3 Chu mi hming chu Nabala a ni a; a nupuiah hming chu Abigaili a ni a: chu hmeichhia chu bengvar tak hmel tha tak ani a; a mipa erawh chu mi tawhkhirh tak leh sual tak a ni: Kaleba thla a ni. 
1Samuel25:4 Tin, Davida'n thlaler atang chuan Nabalan a beram hmul amet tih a lo hria a." 
1Samuel25:5 Tichuan Davida chuan tlangval sawm a tir a, tlangalte hnenah chuan Davidann, ""Karmel tlangah chuan han cho u la, tin, Nabala hnenah kal u la ka hmingin chibai han buk ang che u:" 
1Samuel25:6 tin, mi neinung taka hnenah chuan heti hian han sawi ang che u, ' I chungah te, i chhungkua te chungah te, i neih zawng zawng chungahte thlamuanna awm rawh se." 
1Samuel25:7 I beram hmul mettute an awm tih ka lo hria a: i beram vengtute chu ka hnenah hian an awm thin a, an pawi engmah kan khawi h lo a, Karmel tlanga an awm chhung reng rengin an engmah an chan lo a." 
1Samuel25:8 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, lamho zinga mi anmahni zat theuh nupuiah an man a, an kal bopui ta a: tin, an ram lamah chuan an hawng a, khawpui chu an chei leh a, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
1Samuel25:9 Tin, Davida tlangvalte chu an va thlen chuan Davida hmingin chung thu zawng zawng chu Nabala hnenah chuan an sawi a, an ngawihsan ta a." 
1Samuel25:10 Tin, Nabala chuan Davida chhiahlawhte chu a chhang a, ""Davida chu tu nge maw ni le? Jesaia fapa chu tu nge maw ni le? Tun lai hian chhiahhlawh tam tak pute tlan bosan hmang an tam mai a." 
1Samuel25:11 Ka chhang te, ka tui te leh ka beram hmul mettute tana ka talh chu tute nge an ni tih pawh hriat hleih lohte hi ka pe tehlul ang maw?"" a tia." 
1Samuel25:12 Chutichuan Davida tlangvalte chu an let leh a, an kir leh a; chung thu zawng zawng chu an rawn hrilh a." 
1Samuel25:13 Tin, Davida'n chan a mite hnenah chuan, ""In khandaih pai theuh rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, an khandaih an pai theuh a; Davida pawhin a khandaih a pai a, mi zali laiin Davida chu an zui chho a; tin, mizahni chu bungraw vengin an awm a." 
1Samuel25:14 Tin, tlangval pakhat chuan Nabala nupui Abigaili hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh, Davida chuan thlaler atangin kan pu chibai buk turin mi a rawn tir a, ani chuan a lo hau a." 
1Samuel25:15 Nimahsela chu mite chu kan chungah an tha hle mai a, kan pawi engmah an khawih lo a, phula kan awm laia kan awmho chhung zawng zawng khan engmah kan hloh lo vaL" 
1Samuel25:16 beram venga an hnena kan awm chhung zawng zawngin chhun leh zan kan tan kulh an ni ngawt mai a. 
1Samuel25:17 chuvangin eng nge i tih dawn ngunt akin ngaihtuah teh khai; kan pu chungah leh a chhungkua zawng zawngte chungah hian thil tha lo tih tum an awm a ni; ani lah hi a Beliala fapa khawp a, tuma biak theih loh a ni si a,"" tiin a sawi a." 
1Samuel25:18 Tin, Abigaili chuan hmanhmawh takin chan hlawm zahnih nen, uain peng hnih nen, beram panga chhum tura peih diam nen, vai buk nga nen, grep rah pho ro bawr za en, theipui hlawm zahni nen a la khawm a, sabengtung aphurhtir a." 
1Samuel25:19 Tin, a chhiahhlawh tlangvalte hnenah chuan, ""Ka hmaah lo kal ta zel u la, ngai teh u, ka rawn zui ang che u,"" a ti a. Nimahsela a pasal Nabala chu ahrilh lo." 
1Samuel25:20 Tichuan chutiang chu a ni a, a sabengtung hungah chuan a chuang a, leisekawtah a chhuk laiin, ngai teh, Davida leh a mite chuan an rawn pan a; tichuan an intawk ta a." 
1Samuel25:21 Davida chuan, ""A engmah a hloh lohna'n thlalerah he pa neih zawng zawngte hi a tlawn mai maiin ka vensak a lo nih ngei hi le; thil tha chu thil tha loin mi thungrul ta mai si a." 
1Samuel25:22 Naktuk zing khaw en thlenga a ta zawng zawng zinga mipa naupang pakhat chauh pawh ka zuah vaih chuan Pathianin Davida hmelmate chu a tih tihin ti rawh se, chu aia nasa pawhin ti rawh se,"" a ti tawh si a." 
1Samuel25:23 Tin, Abigaili chuan Davida a hmun chuan a sebengtung ata chu a chhuk thuai a, Davida hmaah chuan a hmaia lei siin chibai a buk a." 
1Samuel25:24 Tin, a ke bulah chuan abawkkhup a, ""Keima'n, ka pu, keimah ngeiin khawlohna chu ka hlawh mai ang e, tin, i chhiahhlawhnu hian i beng hiatah thu sawisela i chiahlawhnu thusawi chu khawngaih takin ngaihthlaksak ang che." 
1Samuel25:25 Ka pu, Beliala mi Nabala chu engahmah ngai suh khai; a hming ang chiah chiah hi ani a; Nabala tihtakah, a a a nih hi; kei i chhiahhlawhnu hi zawngin ka pu tlangval rawn tirhte chu ka lo hmu lo a ni." 
1Samuel25:26 chuvangin tunah hian ka pu, LALPA nunna leh i nunna chhalin ka sawi e, ka hmu lo tak meuh a ni, LALPA'n thisen chhuah lo tur leh i kuta phuba la lo turin a siam si chian, i hmelmate leh ka pu that lohna zawngtute chu Nabala ang ni mai rawh se." 
1Samuel25:27 Tin, hei ka pu tana i chiahhlawhin lawmman ka rawn ken hi ka pu rawn zuitu tlangvalte hi pek ni raw se." 
1Samuel25:28 I chhiahhlawhnu sualna hi khawngaih takin ngaidam ang che: LALPA chuan ka pu chu chhungkaw nghet tak a dinngei ngei ang a, ka pu chu LALPA indonate do ani si a; i dam chhung zawng zawgin nangmahah chuan sualna reng reng hmuh tur a awm lo ang." 
1Samuel25:29 Nangmah um tur leh i nunna tibo turin mite lo thawk mah se la, ka pu nunna chu LALPA i Pathian nena nunna tel zinga tel ani ang a; i hmelmate nunna erawh chu virvawm phana vawm ang daihin a vawm bo ang." 
1Samuel25:30 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA'n i chungchang thua a thil tha tiam ang zawng zawng ka pu chungah a tih huna Israelte lala a siam hun che chuan," 
1Samuel25:31 a vang awm loa thisen i chauh loh a, ka pu chuan phuba i lak hek loh hi i tan lungngaihna reng reng ani lo ang a, ka pu tan lungni lohna reng reng a ni hek lo ang; tin, LALPA'n ka pu chunga thil tha a tih hunah chuan i chhiahhlawhnu hi hre reng ang che,"" a tia." 
1Samuel25:32 Tin, Davida chuan Abigaili hnea chuan, ""Vawiina mi lo hmuak tura tirtu che LALPA, Israelte Pathian chu fakin awm raw se:" 
1Samuel25:33 tin, i remhriatna chu malsawmin awm se la, tin, nang thisen chhuah thiam loh channa laka mi humtu leh keima kuta phuba la loa mi siamtu chu malsawmin awm bawk ang che." 
1Samuel25:34 Nang chuan mi lo hmuak thuai suh la chuan LALPA, Israelte Pathian nunna chhalin ka sawi e, naktuk khaw en thlang chuan Nabala chu naupang pakhat chauh pawh ka zuahsak lo tawp ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel25:35 Chutichuan Davida chuan a thil rawn kensakte chu a la a: tin, a hnenah chuan, ""Thlamuang takin i in lamah haw chho ta la; tin, i thu chu ka awih a, i dul chu ka pawmsak a che aw,"" a tia." 
1Samuel25:36 Tin, Abigaili chu Nabala hnenah a han kal a, tin, ngai teh, a ina chuan lal ruai theh ang maiin ruaia lo theh a, a rih hle mai avangin Nabala chu a hlim huam mai a: chuvangin a tuk khaw en hma loh chuan engmah a hrilh lo a." 
1Samuel25:37 Tin, heti hi ani a, zing lama Nabala uain rui chu alo hrah chuan a nupui chuan hung thu chu a han hrilh a, a rilru a mit ta sulh a, lung ang maiin a lo awm ta a." 
1Samuel25:38 Tin, heti hi ani a, ni sawm hnuah chuan LALPA'n Nabala chungah kut a thlak a, a thi ta a." 
1Samuel25:39 Tin, Davida'n Nabala chu a thi tih a han hriat chuan, ""Ka hming chhiatna tura Babala thiltih lakah mi sawipui a, a chhiahhlawh chu thil tha lo ti loa mi khaptu LALPA chu fakin awm rawh se; Nabala thil tha lo tih chu LALPA'n ama chung ngeiah a tlaktir ta a ni,"" a ti a.Tin Davida chuan Abigaili chu a nupui atana va be turin mi a tir a." 
1Samuel25:40 Tin, Davida chhiahhlawhte chuan Karmel tlangah Abigaili hnen an han thlen chuan, ""Ngai teh u, in chhiahhlawhnu hi ka pu chhiahhlawhte ke sil tura chiahhlawh ka ni e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel25:41 Tichuan Abigaili chu a tho thuai a, sabengtung chungah a chuang a, a hnung zui nula pangate nen chuan Davida mi tirhte chu an zui a, a nupuiah a awm ta a." 
1Samuel25:42 Davida chuan Jezreel-a mi Ahinoami a lo nei tawh bawk a; tichuan a nupuiah an awm ta ve ve a.Saula chuan a fanu Mikali, Davida nupui kha Galim khuaa mi Laisa fapa Paltia a lo neihtir tawh a ni." 
1Samuel25:43 Saula chuan a fanu Mikali, Davida nupui kha Galim khuaa mi Laisa fapa Paltia a lo neihtir tawh a ni." 
1Samuel26:1 Tin, Ziph-ho chu Gibea-ah Saula hnenah an kal a, ""Davida chu thlaler dep Hakila tlangah chuan a biru a ni lo'm ni?"" tiin an va sawi a." 
1Samuel26:2 Chutichuan Saula chu a to a, Ziph thlalerah Davida zawng turin a zuk kal ta a." 
1Samuel26:3 Tin, Saula chuan thlaler dep, kawng lakah Hakila tlangah chuan tanhmun a khuar a. Davida erawh chu thlalerah chuan a awm reng a; tin, Saula chu amah zawngin thlalerah a lo kal tih a hria a." 
1Samuel26:4 Chuvangin Davida chuan enthlatute a tir a, Saula chu a lo kal tak tak a ni ti a hre chiang ta a." 
1Samuel26:5 Chutichuan Davida chu a tho a, Saula thanhmun khuarnaah chuan a kal a: tin, Davida chuan Saula leh a sipai hotu, Nera fapa Abnera mutna chu a hmu a: Saula chu tawlailir hual chungah chuan a mu a, a velin mite chuan awmhmun an rem a." 
1Samuel26:6 Chutichuan Davida chuan Hit mi Ahimeleka le Joaba nau Zeruia fapa Abisaia hnenah, ""Saula tanhmunah chuan tu nge ka hnenah kal ve ang,"" tiin a sawi a. Tin, Abisaia chuan, ""Keimah i hnenah chuan ka zuk kal ve ang e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel26:7 Tichuan Davida leh Abisaia hu mipuiho awmnaah zanah chuan an kal a: tin, ngai teh, Saula chu tawlailir hual chungah chuan a lo mu a, a lu lamah chuan a fei chu leiah a vit bur a: tin, Abnera leh mite chu a velah chuan an lo mu a." 
1Samuel26:8 Chutichahun Abisaia chuan Davida hnenah, ""Vawiinah hian Pathianin i hmelma chu i kutah a pe a ni hi; chuvangin fei hian vawi khatah leiah hian ka han chun bet tlat mai teh ang aw? Ka chun nawn leh tawh lo ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel26:9 Nimahsela Davida chuan Abisaia hnenah, 'Tiboral suh, LALPA hriak thih chunga kut thlaka thiam chang thei tu nge awm thei ngai?"" at i a." 
1Samuel26:10 Tin, Davida vek chuan, ""LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, LALPA chuan a chungah kut a thlak ang chu: a nih loh vek leh a thih ni a lo thleng mai ang a; anih loh vek leh indonaah a kal ang a, a boral mai ang." 
1Samuel26:11 LALPA hriak thiha chugah chuan kut ka thlak loh turzia mai chu: a lu bula fei leh tuithawl kha erawh chu la ta che aw, tichuan i kal ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel26:12 Chutichuan Davida chuan Saula lu bual fei leh tuithawl chu a la a, an kal leh ta a, tuma'n an hmu lo a, tuma'n an hriain harh an awm hek lo: LALPA'n tui taka a muthilhtir avangin a muhil vek a ni." 
1Samuel26:13 Chutichuan Davida chu ral lehlama chuan akal a, hla feah tlang chhipah a ding a; an inkar chu hla tak a ni a." 
1Samuel26:14 Tin, Davida chuan mipuite leh Nera fapa Abnera chu, ""Abner, mi han chang dawn lo'm ni?"" tiin a au a. Chutichuan Abnera chuan a chang a, ""Lal han au veitu chu tu nge maw i ni le?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel26:15 Tin, Davida chuan Abnera hnenah, ""Mi huaisen i lo'm ni? Israelte zingah hiannang ang tu nge awm? Engtizia nge lal i pu i ven loh ni? Lal i pu chu tiboral turin tu emaw a lo kal kha le." 
1Samuel26:16 I thiltih dan hi a tha lo a ni. LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, LALPA hriak thih i pu chu i ven that loh avangin thi mai tlak i ni e. lal lu bula fei leh tui thawl awm kha khawiah nge a awm tak han en teh reng,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel26:17 Tin, Saula chuan Davida aw chu a han hria a, ""Chu i awm ela ni, ka fapa Davida?"" a han ti a. Tin, Davida chuan, ""Aw lalpa, ka pu, ka aw ani e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel26:18 Tin, ""Eng vangain nge ka pu hian a chiahhlawh hi a um ni? Eng thil nge ka tih? Ka kutah thil sual eng nge awm?" 
1Samuel26:19 Chuvangin LALPA, ka pu chuan a chhiahlawh thu hi ngaithla teh se. Mi do tura i thinlung chawk thotu chu LALPA a nih chuan thilhlan chu pawm hram se la; mihring fate an ni erawh chuan LALPA hmaa anchhe dawngin awm rawh se; 'Kal la, Pathian dangte rawng bawl rawh,' tia, lalpa ro ka luah theih lohna tura vawiin hian min hnawt bo an ni a." 
1Samuel26:20 chuvangin ka thisen chu LALPA hmuh phak loa leilungah luang suh se; varung veh tura tlangahte mi an ramvak angin Israel lal chu uihli lek zawng turin a kal chhuak anih hi,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel26:21 Chutichuan Saula chuan, ""Thila ka lo tisual der mai a ni; ka fapa Davida lo haw leh rawh: i mithmuhah ka nun hi vawiinah hian a hlut em avangin engmah reng reng ka tih tawh hauh lo ang che: ngai teh, thil atthlak tak ka lo ti ta a, ka lo tisual der mai a nih hi,"" a ti ta a." 
1Samuel26:22 Tin, Davida chuan a chhang a, ""Aw LALPA, fei hi han en teh, tlangval pakhat lo kal se la han la lawk rawh se." 
1Samuel26:23 Tin, LALPA chuan mi tin, an fel leh an rinawm man a pe dawn a: vawiinah hian LALPA'n nang hi ka kutah a pe na a, LALPA hriak thih chungah ka kut ka lek duh lo a ni." 
1Samuel26:24 Tin, ngai teh, vawiina i nunna ka ngaihhlutsk che ang bawk hian LALPA chuan ka nunna min ngaihhlutsak se la, manganna zawn zawng ata hi mi chanchhuak rawh se,"" a ti a.Chutichuan Saula chuan Davida hnenah, ""Ka fapa Davida, malsawmin awm rawh khai: thil ti thei takin i awm ang a, i ngam zel ang,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Davida chu a hawng a, tin, Saula chu a hmun lamah chuan a haw leh ta a." 
1Samuel26:25 Chutichuan Saula chuan Davida hnenah, ""Ka fapa Davida, malsawmin awm rawh khai: thil ti thei takin i awm ang a, i ngam zel ang,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Davida chu a hawng a, tin, Saula chu a hmun lamah chuan a haw leh ta a." 
1Samuel27:1 Tin, Davida chuan a rilruin, ""Eng tikah emaw chuan Saula kutah hian ka la boral ngei mai dawn zawng a ni hi: Philistia mite rama tlan bo aia tha hi a awm dawn lo anih hi; tichuan Saula chuan Israel ram chung zawng zawnga mi zawn hi a bei a dawng tawh ang a, tichuan a kut ata ka chhuak ani ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel27:2 Chutichuan Davida chu a tho a, amah leh a hnena mi zaruk awmte chu Maoka fapa, Gath lal Akisa hnenah an kal ta a." 
1Samuel27:3 Tin, Davida chu amah nen a mite nen, mi tin, an chhungkuain Davida paw anupui pahnih, Jezreel mi Ahinoami leh Nabala nupui, Karmel-a mi Abigaili te nen Gth khuaah Akisa hnenah an awm ta a." 
1Samuel27:4 Tin, Davida chu Gat khuaah a tlan tih Saula an hrilh a, tichuan a zawng le ta lo a." 
1Samuel27:5 Tin, Davida chuan Akisa hnenah, "" Min khawngaih la, i rama khaw pakhatah hian awm hmun min pe ve la, chuta chuan ka awm ang e: i chiahhlaw hi enga nge lal khuaah i hnenah a awm reng?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel27:6 Chutichuan Akisa chu chumi ni chuan Ziklag khua chu a pe ta a: chuvangin Ziklag chu tun thlengin Judai ram lalte ta a ni ta reng a. 
1Samuel27:7 Tin, Philistia rama Davida a awm chhung chu kum khat pumhlum le thla li a ni." 
1Samuel27:8 Ur mi te, Gizi mi te Amalek mite an run a: chung hnamte chu Telam atanga Zur ram lampang Aigupta ram thlenga awm an ni a." 
1Samuel27:9 Tin, Davida chuan ram chu a bei a, ahmei apain zuah reng reng a nei lo a, beram te, sebawng te, sabengtung te, sanghawngsei te, an silhfen te a laksak a; tin, a haw leh a, Akisa hnenah a kal a." 
1Samuel27:10 Tin, Akisa chuan, ""Vawiinah hian khawi lam nge i run?"" a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan, ""Juda Chhim ram te, Jeramil-ho him ram te, Ken-ho Chhim ram e,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel27:11 Tin, ""Philistia rama a awm chhung reng rengin Davida chuan hetiang hian a ti fo thin a ni,' an ti dah ang e,"" tiin Davida chuan a hmei apain Gath khuaa hruai tur zuah reng reng anei ngai lo a ni.Tin, Akisa chuan Davida thu sawi chu awihin, ""Aama miIsraelte chu a inhuattir ta hle mai a; chuvangin kumkhuain ka chhiahhlawhah a awm ang,"" a tih phah ta a." 
1Samuel27:12 Tin, Akisa chuan Davida thu sawi chu awihin, ""Aama miIsraelte chu a inhuattir ta hle mai a; chuvangin kumkhuain ka chhiahhlawhah a awm ang,"" a tih phah ta a." 
1Samuel28:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung lai chuan Philistia mite chuan an sipaite chu Israel mite beia do turin an khawm chiam mai a. Tin, Akisa chuan Davida hnenah, ""Nang leh mite chu sipaiho zingah ka hnenah in kal ngei dawn ani tih hre rawh,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel28:2 Tin, Davida chuan Akisa hnenah, ""Aw le, i chhiahlawh thil tih theih dan chu i hre mai ang,"" a ti a. Tin, Akisa chuan Davida hnenah, ""A that chu! Mi vengtuah ka siam kumkhua ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel28:3 Samuela chu a ti taw a, Israel mi zawng zawn chuan an tah a, ama khua ngei Rama khuaah chuan an phum tah a. Tin, Saula chuan an ramhuai aienthiam zalwte leh dawithiamte chu a ram ata a hnawt chuak vek tawh a." 
1Samuel28:4 Tin, Philistia mite chu an pung khawm a, Sunem-ah chuan tanhmun an va khuar a: tin, Saula chuan Israel mi zawng zawng a khawm a, Gilboa-ah tanhmun an khuar ve a." 
1Samuel28:5 Tin, Saula'n Philistia sipaihote a hmu chuan a hlau a, a rilru a khur zawih zawih mai a." 
1Samuel28:6 Tin, Saula chuan LALPA a han rawn pawhin LALPA chuan mang emaw, Urim emaw, zawlnei emawin a chang lo reng reng a." 
1Samuel28:7 Chutichuan Saula chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnenah chuan, ""Ramhuai aienthiam zawl hmeichhia hnena ka kala ka rawn turin min zawnsak raw u,"" a ti a. Tin, a chhiahhlawhte huan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Endor khuaah ramhuai aienthiam zawl hmeichhia a awm a sin,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel28:8 Tin, Saula chu a inbawl danglam a, puan danglam a inbel a, amah leh midang pahnih nen an kal a, zanah hmeichhe hnen chu an va thleng a: tin, ""Ramhuai aienna chuan ai mi ensak la, i hnena a hming ka lam apiang chu mi koh chauhsak ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel28:9 Tin, hmeichhia chuan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Saula thiltih chu i hria a, a rama ramhuai aienthiam leh dawithiamte chu a tibo zo tawh a, engati nge ka thihna turin ka nunna thang i kam dawn ni le?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel28:10 Tin, Saula chuan LALPA hming chhalin, ""LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, he mi thil avang hian i chungah hremna a thleng lo ang,"" tiin a hnenah chhia a chham a." 
1Samuel28:11 Chutichuan hmeichhia chuan, ""Tunge ka han koh chauhsak ang che?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Samuela mi han koh chhuahsak rawh,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel28:12 Tin, hmeichhia chuan Samuela a han hmuh chuan a au vak a; tin, hmeichhia chuan Saula hnenah, ""Engati nge mi bum, Saula i ni reng si a?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel28:13 Tin, lal chuan a hnenah, ""Hlau suh; eng nge ni i hmuh tak le?"" a ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan Saula hnenah, ""Lei atanga Pathian lo chhuak ka hmu,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel28:14 Tin, a hnenah, ""Eng ang nge anih?"" a ti a. Ani chuan, ""Putar pui hi a lo chhuak a, kawrfual a ha,"" a ti a. Tin, Saula chuan Samuela a ni tih a hria a, a hmaia lei siin chibai a buk a." 
1Samuel28:15 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula hnenah, ""Engati nge hetianga mi koh chauh buai ni?"" a ti a. Tin, Saula chuan a chhang a, ""Ka mang a ang em em atin a ni: Philistia mite chuan min do a, Pathian lah chuan min hawisan a, zawlnei emaw, mumang emaw pawhin min chang ta lo reng reng a: chuvang chuan ka tih tur min hrilh turin ka ko ta che a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel28:16 Tin, Samuela chuan, ""Chutia LALPA'n a hawisan chia i hmelma a lo ni ta tih hre reng chung si chuan engah nge thu mi zawh?" 
1Samuel28:17 Keimah hmanga a sawi ang khan LALPA chuan i chungah a ti ta a nih chu: LALPA chuan i kut ata ram chu a chhuhsak a, i thenawm, Davida ngei chu a pe ta a ni." 
1Samuel28:18 LALPA thu i awih loh avang leh Amalek-ho chungah a thinurna nasa tak ang khan i hlen loh avangin tunah hian i chungah he thil hi a ti ta ani hi. 
1Samuel28:19 Chu lo pawh chu, LALPA chuan nangmah leh Israel-hote pawh chu Philistia mite kuta a pe ang a; tin, naktukah hian nang leh i fapate chu ka hnenah in lo awm ang: LALPA chuan Israel sipaihote pawh chu Philistia mite kuta a pe ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel28:20 Chutichuan Samuela thusawi avang chuan Saula chuan a hlau ta em em mai a, leiah a tlu ta der mai a; tha leh zung reng reng a nei lo a, nileng leh zankhua chaw ei lo ani si a." 
1Samuel28:21 Tin, hmeichhia chu Saula hnenah chuan a kal a, a lungngai em em tih a hria a, a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhnuin i sawi chu ka awih a, thih leh thih ka hnena i thusawite chu ka pawm a ni." 
1Samuel28:22 Chuvangin nang pawhin i chhiahhlawhnu thu chu awih ve thung ang che; chaw tlem tal ka han hlui ang chia, tichuan i hawn huna thahrui i neih theihna'n ei ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel28:23 Nimahsela a du lo a, ""Ka ei lo ang,"" a ti a. Nimahsela a chhiahhlawhte chuan hmeichhia nen chuan an tir lui a; an thu chu a awih ta a. Chutichuan lei ta chu a tho a, khumah chuan a thu a.Tin, hmeichhia chuan sebawng no chawm thau a inah chuan a nei a, a va talh thuai a, tin, chhangphut a la a, a hmet a, dawidim tel lo chhang a siam a; tin, Suala leh a chhiahhlawhte hmaah chuan a va hlui a; tin, an lo ei ta a. Chutichuan an tho a, chu mi zan chuan an kal ta a." 
1Samuel28:24 Tin, hmeichhia chuan sebawng no chawm thau a inah chuan a nei a, a va talh thuai a, tin, chhangphut a la a, a hmet a, dawidim tel lo chhang a siam a; tin, Suala leh a chhiahhlawhte hmaah chuan a va hlui a; tin, an lo ei ta a. Chutichuan an tho a, chu mi zan chuan an kal ta a." 
1Samuel29:1 Chutichuan Philistia mite chuan an sipai zawng zawngte ch Aphek-ah an khawm vek a; tin, Israel mite chuan Jezreel-a tuikhur kiangah tanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel29:2 Tin,Philistia-ho lalte chu za tel tel te, sang tel tel tein an kal zut zut maia. Tin, Davida leh a mite chuan Akisa nen hnu an dal a." 
1Samuel29:3 Chutichuan Philistia lalte chuan, ""Heng Hebrai-hote hian eng nge an tih?"" an ti a. Akisa chuan Philistia lalte hnenah chuan, ""He Davida, Israelte lal Saula chhiahhlawh, hei leh chen ka hnena awm tawh a, ka hnena a lo tluk luh ata tun thleng pawha a sualna ka hmuh loha chu a ni lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel29:4 Nimahsela Philistia lalte chu a chungah an thinrim a;Philistia lalte chuan a hnenah, ""Chu mi chu i hmun ruatsakah khan haw turin kirtir la, indonaah kan hnenah zuk kal ve suh se; chutilochuan indonaa kan hmelma lamah a tang mai dah ang e: Kan mite lua la ang a, a pu nen an inrem leh hlauh si ang e." 
1Samuel29:5 He Davida hi a ni lo'm ni?lam chunga 'Saula'n a sang a sang a that, Davida'n a sing a sing,' tia a chungchang thu hlaa an saka kha?"" an ti a." 
1Samuel29:6 Chutichuan Akisa chuan Davida chu a ko a, a hnenah, ""LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, mi dk tak i lo ni a, sipaihote zinga ka hnenah i kal leh i haw thinte chu ka mithmuhah chuan a tha hle mai a; ka hnena i lo kal ni ata vawiin thlengin i chungah engmah that lohna reng reng ka hmu hauh lo mai a ni: nimahsela lalhote hian an ngaina lo che a ni." 
1Samuel29:7 chuvangin Philistia lalhote i tihlungnihloh lohna'n kir leh la, lungawi takin kal ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel29:8 Tin, Davida chuan Akisa hnenah, ""A nih leh, eng thil nge maw ka lo tih le? I hnena ka awm chung zang vawiin thleng hian, ka pu, lalber hmelma chu do loa ka han kir lehna mai turin i chhiahhlawh chungah hian eng nge maw hriat i neih le?"" a ti a." 
1Samuel29:9 Tin, Akisa chuan a chhang a, Davida hnenah, ""Ka mithmuhah chuan Pathian vantirhkoh ang maiin i tha a; nimahsela Philistia lalhote hian 'Indonaah kan hnenah a han kal ve lo veng,' an ti tlat mai a." 
1Samuel29:10 Chuvvangin i hnena kal ve i pu chiahhlawhte nen hian zing takah tho u la: tin, zing takah in thawha khua a en veleh chuan kal ang che u,"" a ti a.Chutichuan Davida leh a mite hchu Philistia rama kir leh turin zinga chhuak turin zing takah an tho ta a. Tin, Philistia mite chuan Jezreel-ah an chho ta a." 
1Samuel29:11 Chutichuan Davida leh a mite hchu Philistia rama kir leh turin zinga chhuak turin zing takah an tho ta a. Tin, Philistia mite chuan Jezreel-ah an chho ta a." 
1Samuel30:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni thum nia Davida le amiten Ziklag an thlen chuan, Amalek-hoin Chim lam leh Ziklag khua chu an lo run tawh reng a, Ziklag khua chu an lo sawi sa a, an lo hal a;" 
1Samuel30:2 hmeichhiate chu chu mi khuaa awm apiangte chu a lian atein salah an man a; tumah that loin an hruai a, an hawnpui tawh a." 
1Samuel30:3 Tin, Davida leh a mite khua an va thlen chuan, ngai teh, a lo kang fai vek tawh a; tin, an nupui te, an fapa te, an fanute chu salah an lo man tawh a." 
1Samuel30:4 Chutichuan Davida leh a hnena awmte chuan an aw an chhuah a, tap hlei thei tawh lo khawpin an tap a." 
1Samuel30:5 Tin, Davida nupuite pahnih Jezreel mi Ahinoami leh Karmel-a mi Nabala nupui Abigaili te pawh salah an hruai tawh a." 
1Samuel30:6 Tin, Davida chu a mangang hle mai a; mi tin, an fapate leh an fanute avanga mi zawng zawng an thin a nat em ema ama chu lunga den thu a sawi avangin; nimahsela Davida chu a Pathian LALPAAH chuan a intichak a." 
1Samuel30:7 Tin, Davida chuan Ahimeleka fapa puithiam Abiathar a hnenah chuan, ""Puithiam kawr mi va laksak teh khai,"" a ti a. Tin, Abiathara chuan Davida chu puithiam kawr chu a va laksak a." 
1Samuel30:8 Tin, Davida chuan, ""Chungho chu um i la ka la umpha ang em le?"" tiin LALPA a zawt a. Ani chuan a chhang a, ""Um rawh, i umpha ngei nge ang a, ichhanchhuak vek ngei ngei ang,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel30:9 Chutichuan Davida chu akal ta, amah leh a hnena mi zarukte nen; tin, Besor lui chu an va thleng a,a n mi hnutchiahte chu chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
1Samuel30:10 Davida erawh chuan a um zel a, amah leh mi zalite nen chuan, mi zahni chu an chauh tawh avangin Besr lui chu an kan ve thei ta lo v, an lo awm ta a ni." 
1Samuel30:11 Tin, phulah hian Aigupta mi an va hmu a, Davida hnenah chuan an hruai a, chhang an pe a, a lo ei a: tin, tui in tur an pe a;" 
1Samuel30:12 tin, theipui hlawm tlang khat leh grep rah pho ro bawr hnh an pe a; tin, chung chu a han ei chuan a lo harh leh ta a; ni thum leh zan thum chaw ei lo leh tui in lo a ni si a." 
1Samuel30:13 Tin, Davida chuan a hnenah, ""Tu mi nge i nih? Khawi atanga lo kal nge i nih?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Aigupta ram tlangval, Amalek mi chhiahhlawh ka ni a; tin, ni thum a ni ta a, ka dam loh avangin ka puin min kalsan ta mai a ni." 
1Samuel30:14 Kereth Chhim ram leh Juda chan Chhim ramte kan run bawk a; tin, Ziklag khua pawh kan hal a,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel30:15 Tin, Davida chuan a hnenah, ""Chunghote awmnaah chuan min zuk hruai thei ang em?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Min that lo tur leh ka put kuta mi pe leh lo turin Pathian hming chalin ka hnenah chhia chham la, tichuanchungho awmnaah chuan ka zuk hruai ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel30:16 Tin, a zuk hruai chhuk chuan, ngai teh, Philistia ram le Judai rama rallak tam tak an 1ak avangin ruai an theh a, an eiin an in a, an lo awm darh nuaih mai a." 
1Samuel30:17 Tichuan Davida chuan ni tlak atanga a tuk tlai lam thlengin a bei ta a, tlangval zali sanghawngsei chunga chuanga tlanchehote chau lo chu tumah dama chhuak reng reng an awm lo a." 
1Samuel30:18 Tin, Davida chuan Amahlek miten an lak zawng zawng chu a la leh vek a; tin, Davida chuan a nupui pahnihte chu a chhan chuak a." 
1Samuel30:19 Chutichuan a lian a tein, an fapa te, an fanu te, an rallak leh an thil lak reng reng engma chan an nei lo v, Davida chuan a laksak leh vek a." 
1Samuel30:20 Tin, Davida chuan beram rual leh ran rual zawng zawngte chu a la a, ran dangte hmaa an khalh a, ""Heng hi Davida rallak anih hi,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel30:21 Tin, mi zahnih an chauh avanga Davida zui tei ta lo Besor luia an awmtirte hnen chu Davida chuan a va thleng a; tin, anni chu Davida hmuak tur leh a hnena awmte hmuak turin an kal chhuak a; tin, Davida'n mipuite kiang a va thlen chuan chibai a buk hlawm a." 
1Samuel30:22 Chutichuan Davida hnena kalhote zinga mi sualte leh Beliala mi zawng zawngte chuan an chang a, ""Kan hnena an kal ve lo avangin rallak thil kan va chhuh leh reng reng chu kan pe ve lo ang a, an hruai a, an kal theihna'n an nupuite leh an fate theuh erwh chu an hruai kan phal ang,"" an ti a." 
1Samuel30:23 Chutichuan Davida'n, ""Unaute u, LALPA, min humsaka min do tura lo thawkho kan kuta petu thil min pekte chu chutiang chuan in ti lo ang." 
1Samuel30:24 Tuin nge he thuah hian in thu pawm ang? Indonaa zuk kalte chan ang bawk chu bungraw venga lo awmte chuan an chang ve tur a ni alawm; inang vekin chan tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Samuel30:25 Tichuan chu mi ni atngin tun thleng hian Israelte tan thupekah leh dana luang turin a siam ta a. 
1Samuel30:26 Tin, Davida'n Ziklag khua a thlen chuan rallak thenkhat chu, ""Hei, LALPA hmelmate laka rallak, lawmman atan ka thawn a che u,"" tiin." 
1Samuel30:27 Bethel-a awm te, Chhim Ramoth-a awm te, Jatir-a awm te;" 
1Samuel30:28 Aroer-a awm te, Sipmoth-a awm te, Estemo-a awm te;" 
1Samuel30:29 Rakal-a awm te, Jerameel khuatea awm te, Ken khuatea awm te;" 
1Samuel30:30 Horma-a awm te, Korasan-a awm te, Atak-a awm te;Hebron-a awm te leh Davida leh a mite chettlatna thin hmun zawng zawng awm Juda upa, a thiante hnenah chuan a thawn a." 
1Samuel30:31 Hebron-a awm te leh Davida leh a mite chettlatna thin hmun zawng zawng awm Juda upa, a thiante hnenah chuan a thawn a." 
1Samuel31:1 Chutichuan Philista mie chuan Israel-hote chu an bei a; tin, Israel mite chu Philistia mite lakah chuan an tlanchhia a, Gilboa tlangah chuan thahin an awm ta zul mai a." 
1Samuel31:2 Tin, Philistia mite chuan Saula leh a fapate chu an um zui ta ngat ngat a; tin, Pilisita mite chuan Saula fapa te, Jonathana leh Abinadaba leh Malkisua chu an that a." 
1Samuel31:3 Tin, Saula chu an bei nasa ta em em mai a, thal kap mite chuan an umpha ta a; thal kap mite avang chuan a mangang ta em em mai a." 
1Samuel31:4 Chutichuan Saula chuan a ralthuam kengtu hnenah chuan, ""I khandaih phawi la, mi han chhuntlang rawh; chutilochuanheng serhtn lohhote hi an lo kal ang a, mi rawn chhun tlang ang a, mi uankhum dah nghe nghe ang e,"" a ti a. Nimahsela a ralthuam kengtu chuan a ti duh lo a; a hlau em em si a. Chuvangin Saula chuan a khandaih chu a la a, a bawh ta a." 
1Samuel31:5 Tin, a ralthuam kengtu chuan Saula a thi tih a hriat chuan ani pawh chuan a khandaih chu a bawh ve a, an thi dun ta a." 
1Samuel31:6 Chutichuan saual nen, a fapate pathum nen, a ralthuam kengtu nen, a mite zawng zawng nen, chu mi ni ngei chuan an thi za ta a ni." 
1Samuel31:7 Tin, raum ral lehlama Israel mi awmte leh Jordan rala awmten Israel mite an tlanchia tih le Suala leh a fapate an thi tih an hriat hchuan khuate chu an chhuahsan a, an tlan bo ta a; tin, Philistia mite chuan an va lua ta a." 
1Samuel31:8 Tin, heti hi ani a, a tukah chuan Philisita-hoten an ral thahte thuam hlihsak tura an va kal chuan Saula leh a fapate pahtum Gilboa tlanga an lo thi chu an va hmu a." 
1Samuel31:9 Tin, a lu chu an tan a, a ralthuam chu an hlip a, chanchin chu an milem biakna inah leh mite hnena puang turin Philistia ramah chuan an thawn vel a." 
1Samuel31:10 Tin, a ralthuam chu Astorethi inah an dah a; a ruang chu Bethsan kulh bangah an tar a." 
1Samuel31:11 Tin, Jabes-Gilead-a awmten Philistia miten Saula an tih dan chungchang thu chu an lo hriat chuan," 
1Samuel31:12 mi uaisen zawng zawngte chu an tho a, zankuain an kal a, Saula ruang le a fapate ruang Bethsan kulh bang ata chu an la a; tin, Jabes an lo thleng a, chutah chuan an hal a.Tin, an ruhte chu an la a, Jabes-a tamarisk thing hnuaiah an phum a, tin, ni sarih chaw an nghei a." 
1Samuel31:13 Tin, an ruhte chu an la a, Jabes-a tamarisk thing hnuaiah an phum a, tin, ni sarih chaw an nghei a." 
2Samuel1:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Saula thih hnua Davida Amalek-ho runa a lo haw a, Davida chu Ziklag khuaa ni hnih a awm hnu chuan;" 
2Samuel1:2 heti hi ani a, a ni thum ni chuan ngai teh, mi pakhat an tanhmun ata saula hnen atangin a puante pawtthlerin a lu-a lei kai luam hi a lo kal a; tin, Davida hnen a lo thlen chuan leia bawkkhupin chibai a buk a." 
2Samuel1:3 Tin, Davida chuan a hnenah, ""Khawi atanga lo kal nge i nih?"" a ti a; tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Israel mite tanhmun atangin ka lo tlan chuak a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel1:4 Tin, Davida chuan a hnenah, ""Eng angin nge thil a awm le? Min hrilh teh khai,"" a ti a. Ani chuan a chhang a, ""Indona ata mite chu an tlanchia a, mi tam tak chu an tlu a, an thi hlawm a; tin, Saula leh a fapa Jonathana te pawh an thi ve a sin,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel1:5 Tin, Davida chuan a hrilhtu tlangval hnenah chuan, ""Engtin nge Saula leh a fapa onathana chu an thi tih i hriat?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel1:6 Tin, a hrilhtu tlangval chuan, ""Eng emaw ti tiin Gilboa tlangah chuan ka lo awm hlauh a, tin, ngai teh, Saula chu a fei rinchhana ding ka hmu a, tin, tawlailirte leh sakaw chung chuang mite chuan an rawn hnaih ta chiam mai a." 
2Samuel1:7 Tin, a hnun glam a han hawi chuan mi han hmu a, mi han au a. Tin, keiin, 'Heta hi ka awm e,' tiin ka chhang a." 
2Samuel1:8 Tichuan ka hnenah, 'Tunge i nih?' mi ti a. Tin, keiin 'Amalek mi ka ni,' tiin ka chhang a." 
2Samuel1:9 Tin, ani chuan ka hnenah, 'Ka kiangah hian lo ding la, mi han that teh mai, ka la nung ting a, mangannain min tlakbuak ta si a,' a ti a." 
2Samuel1:10 Chutichuan a kiangah chuan ka ding a, chutia tlu tawh der hnu chu a dam zo tawh lo reng reng ang tih ka hriat avangin ka that ta mai a, a lua lallukhum leh a bana banbun chu ka la a, ka pu hnenah hetah hian ka rawn la a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel1:11 Chutihuan Davida chuan a silhfente chu a chelh a. a pawtthler ta a; chutiang bawk chuan a hnena mi awm zawng zawng chuan an ti a: 
2Samuel1:12 tichuan Saula leh a fapa Jonathana leh LALPA mite leh Israela chhungte chu an sun a, an tah a, tlai lam thlengin chaw an nghei a, khandaiha tihhlum an nih tak avangin." 
2Samuel1:13 Tin, Davida chuan a hrilhtu tlangval hnenah chuan, ""Khawi lam mi nge i nih?"" a ti a. Tin, a ni chuan, ""Ram dang mi, Amalek mi fapa ka ni,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
2Samuel1:14 Tin, Davida chuan a hnenah, LALPA hriak thih tiboral tura a chunga kut thlak chu eng tiziaa hlau lo nge i nih le?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel1:15 Chutichuan Davida chuan talngval pakhat a ko a, ""Va hnaih la, va that rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, a va sat a, a thi ta a." 
2Samuel1:16 Tin, Davida chuan a hnenah, ""I thisen chu nangma lu chung ngeiah awm rawh se; nangma ka ngeiin, 'LALPA hriak thih chu ka that a ni,' a ti a." 
2Samuel1:17 Tichuan Davida chuan Saula leh a fapa Jonathana chu he tah hle hian a tah a; 
2Samuel1:18 tin, thal kah hla chu Juda thlahte zirtir turin a tir hlawm a, ngai teh, Jasara buah ziak a ni." 
2Samuel1:19 Aw Israel, i ropuina chu i hmun sangahte an that a, Mi liante an tluk tak hi!" 
2Samuel1:20 Gath-ah chuan hril suh u la, Askelon kawtthlerahte chuan puang suh u; Chutilochuan Philistia fanute an lawm ang a, Serhtan loh fanuo hlimin an au dah rual ang e." 
2Samuel1:21 Nangni Gilboa tlangte u, In chungah dai leh ruah tla suh se, thilhlan turte chhuah hek suh; Chutah chuan mi lian phaw chu mualpho takin an paih si a, Saula phaw hriak thih loh mi phaw ang maiin." 
2Samuel1:22 Thahte thisen atang leh mi lian thau atangin Jonathana thla chu a let lo a, Saula khandaih chu a thlawnina let ngai lo." 
2Samuel1:23 Saula leh Jonathana nun dan chu a duhawmin a mawi a, An thih pawhin an inthen lo, Mupuite aiin an chak zawk a, Sakeibakneite aiin an chak zawk." 
2Samuel1:24 Nangni Israela fanute u, Saula chu tah rawh u, Puan sen mawite a ban che u a, In puanahte rangkachaka cheimawnate beltu che u chu." 
2Samuel1:25 Indo lai taka mi liante an lo tluk tak mai chu! In hmun sangahte Jonathana an that ta.Ka unaupa Jonathan, i chung thuah hian ka mangang a ni: Ka chungah i tha em em thin a, I mi hmangaihna chu a mak a, Hmeichhe hmangaihna a kum a ni. Mi liante chu an tlu a, Indona thuamhnawte pawh a boral zo ta!" 
2Samuel1:26 Ka unaupa Jonathan, i chung thuah hian ka mangang a ni: Ka chungah i tha em em thin a, I mi hmangaihna chu a mak a, Hmeichhe hmangaihna a kum a ni. Mi liante chu an tlu a, Indona thuamhnawte pawh a boral zo ta!" 
2Samuel2:1 Tin, heti hi ani a, chu mi hnua chuan Davida chuan, ""Judai rama khawiah emaw ka han kal ang em?"" tiin LALPA a rawn a. Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, ""Han kal rawh khai,"" a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan, ""Khawiah nge ka han kal ang?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Hebron-ah,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel2:2 Chutichuan Davida chu chutah chuan a han kal ta a, anupuite pahnih Jezreel mi Ahinoami leh Karmel mi Nabala nupui Abigaili te nen." 
2Samuel2:3 Tin, Davida chuan a hnena mi zawm zawng zawng chu a hruai chho a, mi tin, an chhungkuate theuh nen, Hebron khuaahte chuan an awm ta a." 
2Samuel2:4 Tin, Judai rama mite an va kal a, Juda mite chunga lal atan hriak an thih a. Chutichuan, ""Saula phumtute chu Jabes-gilead mite an ni,"" tiin Davida chu an hrilh a." 
2Samuel2:5 Tichuan Jabes-gilead mite hnenah chuan Davida chuan mi a tir a, an hnenah, ""In pu, in pu Saula chu in khawngaihzia tilangin in lo phum avangin LALPA chuan malsawm che u rawh se." 
2Samuel2:6 Tichuan LALPA chuan in chungah ngilneihna leh thutak lantir se la: he'ng thil in tih avang hian kei pawhin in ngilneih man chu ka rul ang che u. 
2Samuel2:7 Chutichuan in kutte chu lo chak se la, huai takin awm rawh u: in pu Saula chu a ti ta si a, tin, Juda chite chuan an chunga lal atan hriak min thih ta bawk a,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel2:8 Tin, Nera fapa Abnera, Saual sipaite hotu chuan, saual fapa Isbosetha chu Mahanai-ah a hruai a;" 
2Samuel2:9 Gilead chungah te, Asur chungah te, Jezreel chungah te, Ephraim chungah te, Israel zawng zawng chungah te lalah a siam ta a." 
2Samuel2:10 (Saula fapa Is-bosetha chu Israel chunga ro a rel tan lai chuankum sawmli mi ani a, kum hnih ro a rel a.) Nimahsela Juda mite chuan Davida chu an pawm zawk a." 
2Samuel2:11 Davida'n Hebron-a Juda chite chunga ro a lo relna chu kum sarih le thla ruk ani tawh a. 
2Samuel2:12 Tin, Nera fapa Abnera leh Saula fapa Is-bosetha chhiahhlawhte hchu Mahanaim ata an chuak a, Gibeo-ah an kal a." 
2Samuel2:13 Tin, Zeruia fapa Joaba leh Davida chhiahhlawhte chu an kal chhuak a, Gibeon dilah chuan an intawk a; tichuan pawl khat chu dil ral lehlamah an thu a. pawl khat chu dil ral lehlamah." 
2Samuel2:14 Tin, Abnera chuan Joaba hnenah, ""Tlangvalte chu lo thawk se la, kan hmaah han inbei teh reng ang hmiang,"" a ti a. Tin, Joaba chuan, ""Lo thawk ang hmiang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel2:15 Chutichuan an thawk a, a zat chin ruat chiahin an kai phei a, Benjamin chi, Saula fapa Is-bosetha lama tang swm leh pahnih, tin, Davida chhiahlawh sawm leh pahnih." 
2Samuel2:16 An kingpuite chu an lu theuhvah an inman a, mahni bitumate chu khandaihin an nakah an inchhun theuh a; tichuan an tlu za t vek mi a: chuvanin chu mi hmun chu Helkath-hzurim an ti ta a, chu chu Gibeon-a awm a ni." 
2Samuel2:17 Tichuan chu mi nia an ibei chu a nasa ta hle mai a; tin, Abnera leh Israel mite chu Davida chiahhlawhte lakah chuan an tlawm ta a." 
2Samuel2:18 Tin, chutah chuan Zeruia fapate pathum, Joaba te, Abisaia te, Asahela te an awm a: Asahela chu zukpui ang maia ngalchak a ni." 
2Samuel2:19 Chutichuan Asahela chuan Abnera chu a um a; Abnera a um chu ding lam leh vei lama peng hauh loin a um ngat ngat a. 
2Samuel2:20 Chutichuan Abnera chu ahan lehhawi a, ""Nang i ni maw, Asahel?"" a han ti a, Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Keimah ni e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel2:21 Tin, Abnera chuan a hnenah, ""I dung lamah emaw, i vei lamah emaw khan peng la, tlangval pakhat kha man la, a inralthuamna laksak rawh,"" a ti a. Nimahsela Asahela chuan amah a um chu a pensan duh chuang lo a." 
2Samuel2:22 Tin, Abnera chuan Asahela hnenah, ""Min pensan rawh; engah nge ka chhun thluk ang che? I unaupa Joaba hmel ka hmu ngam dawn em ni?"" a ti leh a." 
2Samuel2:23 Nimahsea a peng duh chuang lo va: chuvangin Abnera chuan a fei chhawr lamin a pumah a chhun a, fei chu a hnung lamaha tlang a, chutah chuan a tlu ta tawp a, chu mi hmunah chuan a thi ta a; tin, heti hi ani a, Asahela a tluka a thihna hmun lo thleng paiang chu chutah chuan an ding chawt zel a." 
2Samuel2:24 Mahse Joaba leh Abisaia chuan Abnera chu an um zel a; tin, Gibeon thlaler kawnga Gia dep Ama tlang an thlen dawn chuan ni a tla a." 
2Samuel2:25 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chu Abnera hnenah an pung khawm a, pawl khatah an insiam a, tlang chhipah an va ding t." 
2Samuel2:26 Chutichuan Abnera chuan Joaba a au a, ""Khandaihin a sam reng dawn em ni ang? A tawp lamah chuan a la lungngaihthlak hle danw tih i hre lo em ni? Eng chen nge mipuite chu an unaute um kir tura hrilh loin i awm dawn le?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel2:27 Tin, Joaba chuan, ""Pathian nunna chhalin ka sawi e, engmah han sawi lo la chu naktuk zing thlengin ka miten an um dawn che u a sin le,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel2:28 Chutichuan Joaba chuan a tawtawrawt chu a han ham a, mipuite chu an ding ta thup mai a, Israel mite chu an um ta lo a, an bei leh ta lo." 
2Samuel2:29 Tichuan Abnera leh a mite chu Araba kal tlangin chu mi zan chuan an kal zankhua a; tin, Jordan an kan a, Bithron an kal tlang zak a, Mahanaim an thleng a." 
2Samuel2:30 Tin, Joaba chu Anera a um a kir leh ta a; tin, mipui zawng zawngte a han khawm vek chuan Davida hote sawm leh pakua leh Asahela an lokim ta lo a." 
2Samuel2:31 Davida hote erawh chuan Benjamin mite leh Abnera mite chu zathum leh sawmruk an tihlum a.Chutichuan Asahela ruang chu an la a, Bethlehem-a a pa thlanah an phum a. Tin, Joaba leh a mite chu zankhuain an kal a, Hebron an thlenin khua a var a." 
2Samuel2:32 Chutichuan Asahela ruang chu an la a, Bethlehem-a a pa thlanah an phum a. Tin, Joaba leh a mite chu zankhuain an kal a, Hebron an thlenin khua a var a." 
2Samuel3:1 Saula chhungte leh Davida chhungte chu rei tak an indo a; Davida chu a lo chak tial tial a, Saula chhungte erawh chu an chak lo tial tial a." 
2Samuel3:2 Tin, Davida chuan Hebron khuaah chuan fapate anei a: a fa hmasa ber chu Amnona, Jezreel mi Ahinoami laka mi ani a;" 
2Samuel3:3 a dawttu chu Kileaba, Karmel mi Nabala nupi Abigaili laka mi a ni; tin, a pathumna chu Absaloma, Gesur lal Tamaia fanu Maaki fapa a ni a;" 
2Samuel3:4 tin, a palina chu Adonija, Jagithi fapa a ni a; a pangana chu Sephatia, Aitali fapa a ni a;" 
2Samuel3:5 tin, a parukna chu Ithreama, Davida nupui Ekli laka mi a ni a. Hengte hi Davida fa Hebron-a piangte chu an ni." 
2Samuel3:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Saula chhungte leh Davida chhungte an indo chhung chuan Abnera chu Saula chhungte zingah chuan a intichak deuh deu a." 
2Samuel3:7 Saula chuan hmei a nei a, a hming chu Rizpi a ni a, Aii fanu a ni. Tin, Is-bosetha chuan Abnera hnenah, ""Engati nge ka pa hmeinu hnenah i ka;?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel3:8 Chutichuan Is-bosetha thusawi chuan Abnera chu a tithinur ta hle mai a, ""Juda-ho uicho lu mai em ka nih ni? Vawiin thlengin i pa Saula chhungte leh a unaute leh a thiante chungah ngilneihna ka tilang a, Davida kutah ka hlan lo chia; nimahsela nangin he hmeichhe chunga sualah hian mi puh ta mai a." 
2Samuel3:9 , 10 Saula chhungte lak ata ram chu laksaka Israel leh Judate chungah Dan atanga Beer-seba thlenga Davida lalthutthleng tungding tura LALPA'n Davida hnena chhia a chham anga ka tih loh chuan Pathianin Abnera chu a tih tihin ti se la, chu aia nasa pawhin,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel3:10 , 9 Saula chhungte lak ata ram chu laksaka Israel leh Judate chungah Dan atanga Beer-seba thlenga Davida lalthutthleng tungding tura LALPA'n Davida hnena chhia a chham anga ka tih loh chuan Pathianin Abnera chu a tih tihin ti se la, chu aia nasa pawhin,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel3:11 Tichuan Abnera chu a hlauh avangin a chhan reng reng a chhang ngam ta lo a. 
2Samuel3:12 Tin, Abnera chuan a aiah Davida hnenah, ""He ram hi tu ta nge ni?"" tiin mi a tir a; tin, ""Ka hnenah thu thlung rawh, tichuan ngai teh, Israel mi zawng zawngte i hnen lam tang turin ka kut chu i lamah a tang ang,"" tiin a sawi bawk a." 
2Samuel3:13 Tin, ani chuan, ""Aw le; i hnenah chuan thu ka thlung ang e; amaherawhchu i lakah thil pakhat ka phut dawn a ni, chu chu hei hi a ni, mi hmu tura i lo kal hunah Saula fanu Mikali i rawn hruai phawt loh chuan ka hmel i hmu thei lo ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel3:14 Tin, Davida chuan Saula fapa Is-bosetha hnenah chuan, ""Philistia mite serh vun zakhata ka lei ka nupui Mikali chu mi rawn pe rawh,"" tiin mi a tir a." 
2Samuel3:15 Tin, Is-bosetha chuan mi a tir a, a pasal Laisa fapa Paltiela ngei hnen ata chu an hruai ta a." 
2Samuel3:16 Tin, a pasal chu ahnenah a kal a, tap chung zelin a kal a, Bahurim thlengin a zui a. Chutichuan Abneran a hnenah, ""Kal rawh, kir leh rawh,"" a ti a; tin, a kir leh ta a." 
2Samuel3:17 Chutichuan Abnera chuan Israel mite upaho chu a bia a, ""Tun hma khan Davida chu in lakah in duh thin a;" 
2Samuel3:18 tunah hian siam rawh u khai; LALPA'n Davida chungchang thua chuan, ""Ka chhiahhlawh Davida kutin ka mi Israelte chu Philistia mite kut ata leh an hmelmate zawng zawng kut ata ka chhanchhuak ang,' tiin a sawi e,"" tiin." 
2Samuel3:19 tin, Abnera chuan Benjamin mite beng hriatah a sawi bawk a; tin, Abnera chu Israel mite leh Benjamin chhung zawng zawngten tha an tih ang apiang Hebron-a Davida benghriatah sawi turin a kal bawk a." 
2Samuel3:20 Chutichuan Abnera chu Hebron-a Davida hnenah mi sawmhnih nen an kal a. Tin, Davida chuan Abnera leh a hnena mi sawmhnihte tan ruai a theh a." 
2Samuel3:21 Abnera chuan Davida hnenah, ""Ka tho ang a, i hnena thu an thlun theihna'n leh i duh thusam ang taka ro i rel theihna'n Israel mite zawng zawng ka lalpa hnena kaikhawm turin ka kal tang e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel3:22 Tin, ngai teh, Davida mite leh Joaba rammu chu an lo haw a, rallak sum tam tak an rawn hawn a; nimahsela Abnera chu Hebron-a Davida hnena chuan a lo awm tawh lo; a lo kaltir tawh si a, ani pawh thlamuang takin a kal ta a ni." 
2Samuel3:23 Joaba leh a hnena mipui zawng zawng an lo thlen chuan, ""Nera fapa Abnera chu lal hnenah a lo kal a, ani chuan a kaltir leh ta a, thlamuang takin a kal ta,"" tiin Joaba chu an hrilh a." 
2Samuel3:24 Chutichuan Joaba chu lal hnena a kal a, ""I thil lo tih hi engtizia nge ni lle? Ngai teh, Abnera chu i hnenah a lo kal a, engati nge i kal botir a, a kal tawh daih mai le?" 
2Samuel3:25 Nera fapa Abnera chu i hria a, nangmah tihder turin, i chhuak lam leh i lut lam leh i thiltih apiang hriat tumin a lo kal a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel3:26 Tin, Davida hnen ata Joaba a lo chhuah chuan Abnera um turin mi a ti ra, Sira tuichunchhuah atangin an rawn hruai kir a; nimahsela Davida chuan a hre lo." 
2Samuel3:27 Tin, Abneran Hebron a lo thlen chuan Joaba chuan kulh kawngkharah biak ruk turin a hruai hrang a, a unau Asahela thisen chuak thungrulhna'n a puma a vit hlum ta a." 
2Samuel3:28 Tin, nakina Davida'n a han hriat chan, ""Nera fapa Abnera thisen chhuah thuah hian kei leh ka ram chu LALPA mithmuhin kan thiang kumkhua ang a:" 
2Samuel3:29 Joaba lu chunga tla se la, a pa chhungte zawng zawng chungah nen; Joaba chhungte zingah chuan thi pur emaw, phar emaw, tiang rinchhana awm mi emaw, khandaiha thi emaw, tam emaw lo awm loin awm suh se,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel3:30 Chutichuan an unaupa Asahela chu Gibeon-a indonaah an thah avangin Joaba leha unau Abisaia chuan Abnera chu an that ta a. 
2Samuel3:31 in, Davida chuan Joaba le a hnena mipui zawng zawngte hnenah chuan, ""In puante chu pawtthler u la, saiip puan sin u la, Abnera chu sun rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan hlang chu a zui a." 
2Samuel3:32 TinAbnera chu Hebron-ah chuan an phum a: lal chuan a awm a chhuah a, Abnera thlanah chuan a tap ta a; mipui zawng zawng pawh an tap a." 
2Samuel3:33 Tin, lal chuan Abnera chu a tah a, ""Abnera chu mi a thihin a thi dawn em ni?" 
2Samuel3:34 I kut chu phuar ani lo a, i ke chu kawl bun ani hek lo, Mi suaksual fate hmaa mi a tlu anga i tluk tak mai le?"" a ti a. Tin, mi zawng zawng chuan an tah leh a." 
2Samuel3:35 Tichuan chhun a la nih laiin Davida chu chaw eitir turin mi zawng zawng chu an lo kal a; nimahsela Davida chuan, ""Ni tlak hmaa chaw emaw, thil dang emaw pawh a eia ka ei hlek chuan Pathianin a tih tihin mi ti rawh se: chu aia nasa pawhin"" tiin chhia a chham a." 
2Samuel3:36 Chu chu mi zawng zawngin an hriatin an lawm em em a: lal thiltih apiang chuan mipui zawng zawngte chu a tilawm zel a. 
2Samuel3:37 Chutichuan mipui zawng zawng leh Israel mi zawng zawng chuan chu mi ni chuan Nera fapa Abnera thah chu lal thu ani lo tih an lo hre ta a. 
2Samuel3:38 Tin, lal chuan a mite hnenah chuan, ""Vawiin hian Israel mi lian, mi ropui tak a thi tih in hre na nge?Lal atana hriak thih ni mah i la, vawiinah hian ka chak lo a ni; tin, he'ng mi, Zeruia fapate hi ka tan tuar an har lutuk a ni: LALPA'n thil tha lo titua chu a sualzia ang zelin thungrul rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel3:39 Lal atana hriak thih ni mah i la, vawiinah hian ka chak lo a ni; tin, he'ng mi, Zeruia fapate hi ka tan tuar an har lutuk a ni: LALPA'n thil tha lo titua chu a sualzia ang zelin thungrul rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel4:1 Tin, Saula fapa Is-osethan Hebron-ah Abnera a thi tih a lo hriat chuan a kutte a lo chak ta lo a, tin, Israel mite zawng zawng chu an zam ta a." 
2Samuel4:2 Tin, Saula fapa Is-hosetha chuan sipai pawl hotu pahnih a nei a; pakhata hming chu Baana a ni a, a danga hming chu Rekaba a ni. Benamina thlah Beetoth mi Rimona fapate an ni a: (Beetoth chu Benjamina rama ngaih ani si a:" 
2Samuel4:3 Beeroth khuaa mite chu Gitaim-ah an tlan a, tun thlengin chutah chuan an awm ta a.)" 
2Samuel4:4 Tin, Saula fapa Jonathana chuan fapa kebai a nei a. Jezreel atanga Saula leh Jonathana chanchin an lo hriat chuan kum nga mi a ni a; tihuan a enkawltu chuan a pawm a, a tlan bopui a: tin, heti hi a ni a, tlan bo tura a hmanhmawhna lamah a titla a, a ke a lo bai ta a. A hming chu Mephibosetha a ni." 
2Samuel4:5 Tin, Beeroth mi Rimona fapate Rekaba leh Baana chu an kal a, Is-bosetha ina chuan chhun ni sat vanglai taka a chun chawlh lai takin an kal a." 
2Samuel4:6 Buh la tur ni awm takin in chung lamah chuan an lut a; a pumah an vit a: tin, Rekaba leh a unaupa Baana chu an tlan bo ta a." 
2Samuel4:7 Tin, ina an va luha a mutna pindana khuma a mu chu an vit a, an that a, a lu an tan a, a lu chu an la a, Araba kal tlangin zankhuaain an kal a." 
2Samuel4:8 Tin, Is-bosetha lu chu Hebron-ah Davida hnenah an rawn la a, lal hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh, hei, nangmah thah tum, i hmelma Saula fapa Is-bosetha lu; LALPA chuan ka LALPA phuba chu vawiinah hian Saula leh a thlah lakah a laksak ta a ni,"" an ti a." 
2Samuel4:9 Tin, Davida chuan Beeroth mi Rimona fapa Rekaba leh a unaupa chu a chhang a, an hnenah, ""LALPA ka manganna zawng zawng ata mi chhandamtu nunna chhalin ka sawi e," 
2Samuel4:10 chanchintha rawn thlena inngaiin, 'Ngai teh, Saula chu a thi ta,' tiin mi pakhatin min rawn hrilh a, ani chu ka man a, Ziklag-ah ka that a; chu chu a chanchin tha rawn thlen mana ka lo pek chu a ni." 
2Samuel4:11 Mi fel, ama in chhung luma, a khum laizawl ngeia mi, mi sualin an thah thisen man chu in lakah ka phut lehzualin, leilung ata hi ka va tibo dawn tehlul che u em!"" a ti a.Chutichuan Davida chuan a tlangvalte hu thu a pe a, anni chuan an that a, an kut leh an ke an tansak a, Hebron-a dil kamah chuan an khai a. Is-bosetha lu eraw chu an la a, Hebron-a Abnera thlanah an phum ta a." 
2Samuel4:12 Chutichuan Davida chuan a tlangvalte hu thu a pe a, anni chuan an that a, an kut leh an ke an tansak a, Hebron-a dil kamah chuan an khai a. Is-bosetha lu eraw chu an la a, Hebron-a Abnera thlanah an phum ta a." 
2Samuel5:1 Chutichuan Israel chi zawng zawng chu Hebron-a Davida hnenah an lo kal a, ""Ngai teh, i thisen zawmpui kan ni a," 
2Samuel5:2 Tun hmaa Saula kan chunga a lal laia Israelte hruai chuak le hruai luttu i ni thin a: tin, LALPA chuan i hnenah, 'Ka chungah hotuah i awm ang,' a ti a"" an ti a." 
2Samuel5:3 Chutichuan Israel upa zawng zawng chu Hebron-ah lal hnenah an kal a; tin, lal Davida chuan Hebron-ah chuan LALPA hmaah an hnenah thu a thlung a: tin, Davida chu Israelte chunga lal atan hriak an thih a." 
2Samuel5:4 Davida chu a lal tirh lai chuan kum sawmthum mi a ni a, kum sawmli a lal a." 
2Samuel5:5 Hebron-ah chuan Judate chungah kum sarih leh thla ruk a lal a; tin, Jerusalem-ah Israelte leh Judate zawng zawg chungah kum sawmthum leh km thum a lal a." 
2Samuel5:6 Tin, lal leh amite chu chu mi rama chengho Jebus mi run turin Jerusalema-han kal a: chungho chuan Davida a lo luh theih loh ringin, Davida hnenah, ""Hetah hian i lo lut tawp lo ang, mitdel leh kebaiten an lo dang ang che.{ an ti a." 
2Samuel5:7 Nimahela Davida chuan Zion kulh chu a la ta mial a, chu chu Davida khua a ni." 
2Samuel5:8 Chu mi ni chuan Davida chuan a hote hnenah, ""Jebus-ho khu ka huat ang meuah thah duh hial khawpa haw ve in awm em? 'Mitdel leh keibaiho khua' bei turin lui luanna zuiin luhkhung rawh se,"" a ti a. chuvang alawm, 'Mitdel leh Keibaite llalpa inah an lut tur ani lo,' tih a nih tak ni." 
2Samuel5:9 Tin, Davida chu kulhah chuan a awm a, Davida khua a vuah ta a. Tin, Davida chuan Milo atangin a velin kulh a siam a, a chhung lamah nen," 
2Samuel5:10 Tichuan Davida chu a lo ropui ta deuh deuh a, LALPA, sipaihote Pathian chu a hnena a awm zel avangin." 
2Samuel5:11 Tin, tura lal Hiraman Davida hnenah mi a tir, sidar thingte a thawn a, themthiamte leh lung chertute a tir bawk, Davida in an saksak a." 
2Samuel5:12 Tin, Dvida chuan LALPA'n Israel mite chunga lalah amah chu a tinghet a, a mi Israelte a vangin ram chu a chawimawi ani tih a hre ta a." 
2Samuel5:13 Tin, Davida chuan Hebron chauhsan hnuah Jerusm-a mi hmei leh nupui a beih belhchah a: tichuan Davida chuan fapate leh fanute a la nei leh ta cheu a." 
2Samuel5:14 Tin, Jerusalem-a a neih hmingte chu he'ng hi an ni; Samua e, Sobaba te, Nathana te, Solomona te," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibara te, Elisua te; Nephega te, Japhia te;" 
2Samuel5:16 Elisama te, Eliada te, Elepheleta te hi." 
2Samuel5:17 Tin, Philistia miten Davida chu Israel mite lal atan hriak an thih tih an hriatin Philistia mi zawng zawng hu Davida zawng turin an chho ta a; tin, Davida chuan a lo hria a, kulhbinga a chhuk a," 
2Samuel5:18 Tin, Philistia mite chu Rephaim ruamah an inzar a." 
2Samuel5:19 Tin, Davida chuan, ""Phislista mite bei turin ka han chho ang em? Ka kutah hian anniho chu i pe dawn em?"" tiin LALPA a rawn a. Tin, LALPA chuan Davida hnenah, ""Han chho rawh; Philistia mite chu i kutah ka pe ngei dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel5:20 Tichuan Davida chu Baalperazim-ah a kal a, chuta chuan Davida'n anniho chu a bei a, ""LALPA'n ka hmelmate chu tuikhuah sah ang maiin ka hmaah min tihdarhsak ta."" a ti a. Chuvangin chu mi hmun hmingah chuan Baalperazim a vuah a." 
2Samuel5:21 Tin, chutah chuan an milemte an kalsan a, Davida leh a mite hchuan an la a." 
2Samuel5:22 Tin, Philistia mite chu an cho leh, Rephaim ruamah an inzar leh a." 
2Samuel5:23 Tin, Davida'n LALPA a han rawn chuan, ani chuan, ""Han cho suh; an nung lamah kal hual la, thingtheihmu kung zwnahte han bei rawh." 
2Samuel5:24 Tin, heti hi ani ang a, thingtheihmu lera kal thawm ang ri thup thup i hriat chuan, che rawh! Philistia sipaite bei turin i hmah LALPA a chhuak ta tihna a ni ang,"" a ti a.Chutichuan LALPA'n thu a pek angin Davida chuan a ti a; Philistia mite chu Geba atangin Gezer thlengin a bei a." 
2Samuel5:25 Chutichuan LALPA'n thu a pek angin Davida chuan a ti a; Philistia mite chu Geba atangin Gezer thlengin a bei a. 
2Samuel6:1 Tin, Davida chuan Israel mite zinga mi thlan thiau singthum a khawm leh a." 
2Samuel6:2 Tin, Davida chu a tho a, Judai rama Baale khua atangin, cherubte chunga chuang sipaihote LALPA hming an puttir Pathian bawm chu la cho turin a hnena mi awm zawng zawngte nen chuan an thawk ta a." 
2Samuel6:3 Tin, Pathian bawm chu tawlailir tharah an dah a, tlanga Abinadaba in ata an la chhuak a: Abinadaba fapa Uza le Ahioa-te chuan tawlailir thar chu an khalh a." 
2Samuel6:4 tin, tlanga Abinadaba in atan chu Pathian bawm chawpin an la chhuak a; Ahioa chu chu Pathian bawm hma lamah chuan a kal a." 
2Samuel6:5 Tin, Davida leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chuan LALPA hmaah chuan thil ri thei chi hrang hrang far thing sim leh tingtang te, perhkhuang te, khuangte te, tawtawrawt bi nei te, darbenthek te n tum a." 
2Samuel6:6 Tin, Nakona hui zawl an thlen chuan Uza chuan Pathian bawm chu a han ban a, a chelh a; sebawng chu a pai a pai avangin." 
2Samuel6:7 Tin, LALPA thin chu Uza chungah chuan a ur ta thut a, a thiltih dik loh avang chuan Pathianin chutah chuan a tihlum a, Pathian bawm kiangah chuan a thi ta a." 
2Samuel6:8 Tin, LALPA chu Uza chnga a tuan tak avangin Davida chu a thinur a, chu mi hmun chu Perez-uza a vuah a, tun thleng hian a la ni ta reng a." 
2Samuel6:9 Tin, chu mi ni chuan Davida chuan LALPA chu ahlau a; ""Engtin nge LALPA bawm chu k a hnen a lo thlen theih tak ang?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel6:10 Chutichuan Davida chuan LALPA bawm chu Davida khuaa ama hnenah chuan a suan du ta lo a; Davida chuan Git mi Obed-edoma in lamah a dah ta zawk a. 
2Samuel6:11 Tin, LALPA bawm chu Git mi Obed-edoma inah chuan thla thum a a awm a; tichuan Obed-edoma leh a chhungte zawng zawng chu LALPA'n mal a sawm a." 
2Samuel6:12 Tin, lal Davida chu, ""Pathian bawm avangin Obed-edoma chhungkua leh a in leh lo zawng zawng LALPA'n mal a sawm a ni,"" tiin an hrilh a. Tichuan Davida chuan Pathian bawm chu Obed-edoma in ata, Davida kuaah chuan lawm takin a zuk la ta a." 
2Samuel6:13 Tin, heti hi ani a, LALPA bawm zawntute chu pen ruk an kal veleh sebawngpa leh ran chawm thauin an inthawi a." 
2Samuel6:14 Tin, Davida chu a theihtawpin LALPA hmaa a lam a, Davida chuan puan zai sin puithiam kawr a ha a." 
2Samuel6:15 Chutichuan Davida leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chuan au dur dur chung leh tawtawrawt ham ruai ruai chungin LALPA bawm chu an la chho ta a. 
2Samuel6:16 Tin, heti hi ani a, LALPA bawm chu Davida khuaa a luh lai chuan Saula fanu Mikali chuan tukverh atngin a lo thlir a, LALPA hmaa Davida zuang leh lam chu a han hmu a, a hmusit rilru ta a." 
2Samuel6:17 Tichuan LALPA bawm chu an la lut a, a dahna tura Davidana zar, puan in chhunga a hmun tura chuan an dah ta a: tin, Davida chuan halral thilhlan te leh remna thilhlante LALPA hmaah chuan a hlan a." 
2Samuel6:18 TinDavidan halral thilhlan leh remna thilhlante chu a hlan zawh chuan sipaihote LALPA hmingin mipuite chu mal a sawm a. 
2Samuel6:19 Tin, mipui zawng zawng, Israel pum puite chu ahmei apain mi tin, chhang hlawm khat leh sa hrang khat leh grep rah pho ro bawr khat a sem theuh a." 
2Samuel6:20 Chutichuan mi zawng zawng mahni in lam theuhvah an haw ta a. Chutichuan Davida chua ac hhungte malsawm turin a haw leh ta a. Tin, Saula fanu Mikali chu Davida hmuak turin a lo chhuak a, vawiina Israel lal chu a va ropui ve le, mi ho tak zah nachang hre lo saruaka awm ang maiin vawiinah a chhiahhlawh nulate mithmuha saruakin a awm kha le!"" a lo ti a." 
2Samuel6:21 Tin, Davida chuan Mikali hnenah chuan, ""I pa leh a chhungte zwng zwng aiai mi thleng a, LALPA mi, Israelte chunga lala mi ruattu LALPA hmaah a sin; LALPA hmaah chuan lam awm reng ka ni alawm," 
2Samuel6:22 Heng ai mah hian ka la zahpuiawm ang, keimah pawh ka la insit cheu ang; amaherwhchu chug chhiahhlaw nula i sawite chawimawiin ka awm ang,"" a ti a.Chutichuan Saula fanu Mikali chuan a thih thlengin fa a nei lo a." 
2Samuel6:23 Chutichuan Saula fanu Mikali chuan a thih thlengin fa a nei lo a. 
2Samuel7:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal chu a inah a awm a, LALPA'n an vela a hmelmate zawng zawng laka ralmuangaa awmtir hnu chuan," 
2Samuel7:2 Lal chuan zawlnei Nathana hnena, ""Hei kei chu sidar thing inah ka awm a, nimahsela Pathian bawm chu puan in maiah a awm a,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel7:3 Tin, nathana chuan lal hnenah, ""I rilrua awm ang tak chuan ava ti rawh, LALPA i hnenah a awm alawm,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel7:4 Tin, heti a ni a, chu mi zan vek chuan Nathana hnenah," 
2Samuel7:5 Ka chhiahlawh Davida chu va hrilh rawh, 'LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, Ka awmna turin nangin in min saksak dawn em ni?" 
2Samuel7:6 Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chauh atangin tun thlengin inah ka awm lo a, puan inah leh biak bukah ka awm zel zawk thin a." 
2Samuel7:7 Tin, Israela thlahte zawng zawng zinga ka kalna zawng zawngah pawh, ka mi Israelte chawm turathu ka pek roreltute hnenah, 'Engati nge sidar thingin in min saksak loh,' tiin ka sawi ngai em ni?" 
2Samuel7:8 Chuvangin ka chhiahhlawh Davida hnenah, Sipaite LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a a ni, beram tlatna hmun ata i beram veng lai chu ka mi Israel mite chunga hotu atan ka la chia:" 
2Samuel7:9 tin, i kalna apiangah i hnenah ka awm zel a, i hmaah chuan i hmelmate ka tibo zel a; leia mi ropui takte hming ang hming ropui tak ka siam ang che." 
2Samuel7:10 Tin, ka mi Israelte tan hmun ka ruat ang a, anmahni pual hmunah an awma an insuan tawh lohnan anni chu ka phunang a; tun hma ang khan suahsualna faten an tirethei tawh lo ang a, ka mi Israelte chunga roreltute kan ruat lai ang kha a ni tawh hek lo vag;" 
2Samuel7:11 tin, i hmelma zawng zawng lak ata hi ka chawlhtir ang che. Tin, chu lo rengah pawh LALPA'n, chhungkua chu LALPA chuan a dinsak ang che tih a hrilh che a ni." 
2Samuel7:12 I ni a kina i pute hnenah i mut hunah chuan, i hnua i thlah, i rila rah tur chu ka tungding ang a, a ram chu ka tinghet ang." 
2Samuel7:13 Ani chuan ka hming atan in a sa ang a, tin, a aram lalthutthleng chu kumkhua atan ka tinghet ang." 
2Samuel7:14 A pa ka ni ang a, ani chu ka fapa ani ang a: thil a tihsual chuan,mihring tiang leh mihring fate vuaknain ka thunun ang a;" 
2Samuel7:15 nimahsela i hmaa ka sawn bo Saula hnen hngaihna chuan ani zawng a kalsan lo ang. 
2Samuel7:16 Tin, i chhungkua leh iram chu chtuana tihngheh tlat a ni ang a, i lalthutthleng chu chatuana tihngheh ani ang,' a ti,"" tiin LALPA thu a lo thleng a." 
2Samuel7:17 Chung thu zawng zawng ang zel leh chu inlarna ang chiah chuan Nathana chuan Davida hnenah a sawi a. 
2Samuel7:18 Chutichuan lal Davida chu a lut a, LALPA hmaah chuan a thu a; ""Aw LALPA Pathian, tu nge maw ka nih a, ka chhungte pawh tu nge maw an nih a, heti chen chen min hruai?" 
2Samuel7:19 Aw LALPA Pathian, chung pawh chu nanga mit hmuhah chuan thil te tham mai zawng ani; nimahse i chhiahhlawh chhungkaw lo awm dn tur thu chu kum tm tak chung atan i lo sawi tawh bawk a; Aw Lalpa PATHIAN, hengte paw hi miringte tih dan ang bawk a ni a." 
2Samuel7:20 Davida hian i hnenah eng nge a sawi leh chuan ang? I chhiahhlawh hi i hre vek si, aw Lalpa PATHIAN," 
2Samuel7:21 I chhhiahhlawh hriat turin i thu avang leh nangma thinlung ang zelin he'ng thil ropui tak hi i ti ta a. 
2Samuel7:22 Chuvang chuan aw LALPA Pathian, nang chu i ropui a ni; kan benga kan hriat danin nangmah ang reng reng an awm lo a, nangmah lo chu Pathian reng reng an awm hek lo." 
2Samuel7:23 Aigupta ram ata leh hnam tin, leh an Pathian lak ata i tana i thlan chhuah, i mite hmaa in tan thil ropui tak leh i ram tana thil hlauhawm tak ti tur leh ama hming ropui tak siam tura Pathianin ama mite atana a rawn thlan chauh, i mi Israelte ang reng reng hi khawvelah hian hnam dang tu nge awm?" 
2Samuel7:24 Chutichuan i mi Israelte chu chatuana i mite an lo nih theihna'n i tan i tinghet ta a; tin, LALPA, nang chu an Pathian i lo ni ta a." 
2Samuel7:25 Tichuan aw LALPA Pathian, i chhiahhlawh chungchang thu leh a chhungte chungchang thu i sawi chu chatuan atan tinghet la, i sawi tawh ang khan ti ang che." 
2Samuel7:26 Tin, ""Sipaihote LALPA chu Israelte Pathian a ni,' tiin i hming chu chatuana chawimawiin awm rawh se; tichuan i chhiahlawh Davida chhungte i hmaah tihnehin an awm ang." 
2Samuel7:27 Aw, Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian, i chhiahhlawh hnenah, 'chhungkua chu ka dinsak ang che,' tiin i puang tawh si a: chuvangin i chhiahhlawh chuan he tawngtaina hi i hnenah a thlen ngam a ni." 
2Samuel7:28 Aw Lalpa PATHIAN, nang chu Pathian i ni a, i thu chu thu tak a ni a, tin, he thil tha hi i chhiahhlawh hnenah i tiam tawh a:Chuvangin i chhiahlaw chhungte chu i hmaa chatuana an awm reng theihna'n malsawm ang che; Aw Lalpa PATHIAN, nang chuan i sawi tawh si a; tin, i malsawmnain i chhiahhlawh chungte chu chatuana malsawmin awm rawh se,""a ti a." 
2Samuel7:29 Chuvangin i chhiahlaw chhungte chu i hmaa chatuana an awm reng theihna'n malsawm ang che; Aw Lalpa PATHIAN, nang chuan i sawi tawh si a; tin, i malsawmnain i chhiahhlawh chungte chu chatuana malsawmin awm rawh se,""a ti a." 
2Samuel8:1 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan heti ani a, Davida chuan Pilistia mite chu a bei a, a hneh a: tichuan Davida chuan Philistia mite thu neihna bulpui chu a chhuhsak a," 
2Samuel8:2 Tin, Moab mite a bei leh a, leiah a muttir a, tehna hruiin a teh a; tlar hnihchu tihhlum turin a teh a, tlar khat chu a tluana nunga zuh turin a teh a. Tichuan Moab mite chu Davida chhiah khua an lo ni ta a, hhiahte an pe thin a." 
2Samuel8:3 Davida chuan Luia a ram la leh tura a kal pahin Zoba lal Rehoba fapa Hadadezera pawh a bei a. 
2Samuel8:4 Tichuan Davida chuan a sakawr chung chuang mi 1,700 leh sipai 20,000 a mansak a: tichuan Davida chuan tawlailir hnuk mi sakawr zawng zawng chu an tha a chhahsak a, tawlailir za hnuktu tur erawh chu a zuah a." 
2Samuel8:5 Tin, Damasaka-a Suria mite Zoba lal Hadadezera chan tura kalte chu Davida'n Suria mite zinga mi 22,000 a that a." 
2Samuel8:6 chutichuanDavida chuan Suria rama Damaska-ah chuan sipai a da a; tichuan Suria mite hu Davida chua Suria rama Damaska-ah chuan sipai a dah a; tichuan Suria mite chu Davida chhiah khua an lo ni ta a, chiahte an pe thin a. Tin, LALPA'n Davida chu a kalna apiangah a hnehtir zel a." 
2Samuel8:7 Tin, Davida chuan Hadadezera hote rangkachak phawte a laksak a, Jerusalemah a hawn a." 
2Samuel8:8 Tin, Hadadezera khua Beta atangte, Berothai atang tein Davida chuan dar tam tak a la a." 
2Samuel8:9 Tin, Hamath lal Toia chuan hadadezera sipai zawng zawng Davida'n a hneh tih a lo hria a." 
2Samuel8:10 Hadadezera chu a beia a hneh avanga chibai buk tur leh lawmpui turin Toia chuan a fapa Jorama chu Davida hnenah a tir a: Dadadezera chuan Toia hi do thin a lo ni si a. Tin, Jorama chuan tangkaraw bel te, rangkachak bel te, dr bel te a rawn keng a;" 
2Samuel8:11 chung chu ram dang a ngam zawng zawnga mi tangkarua leh rangkachak a hlante nen chuan lal Davida'n LALPA hnenah a hlan bawk a: 
2Samuel8:12 Suria-ho ta te, Moab ho ta te, Amona thlahho ta te, Philistia ho ta te, Amlek-ho ta te, Zoba lal Rehoba fapa Hadadezer laka a rallakte chu." 
2Samuel8:13 Tin, Davida chu chi Ruamah, Suria mi mi 18,000 a bei haw chu a hming a lo thang ta a." 
2Samuel8:14 Tin awng chu Davida chhiah khua an lo ni ta a. Tichuan LALPA'n Davida chu a kalna apiangah ahnehtir zel a. 
2Samuel8:15 Chutichuan Davida chuan Israel mi zawng zawn chungah ro a rel; tin, Davida chuan a mi zawn zawngte chungah chuan fel takin ro a rel a." 
2Samuel8:16 Tin, Zeruia fapa Joaba chu sipai hotu ber a ni a; tin, Ahiluda fapa Jehosaphata chu chanchin ziaktu a ni a;" 
2Samuel8:17 tin, Ahituba fapa Zadoka leh Abiathara fapa Ahimelek chu puithiam an ni a; tin, Seraia chu ziaktu ani a;tin, Jehoia da fapa Benaia chu Keret mi leh Pelet mite hotu ai a; tin, Davida fapate chu puithiam an ni." 
2Samuel8:18 tin, Jehoia da fapa Benaia chu Keret mi leh Pelet mite hotu ai a; tin, Davida fapate chu puithiam an ni." 
2Samuel9:1 Tin, Davida chuan, ""Jonathana avanga khawngaihna ka tihlan theihna turin Saula chhungte zinga mi awm an la awm em aw?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel9:2 Tin, Saula chhungte chhiahhlawh pakhat a hming Ziba a awm a, Davida hnena kal turin an ko va: tin, lal chuan a hnenah, ""Ziba i ni em?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Kei i chhiahlawhpa hi,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel9:3 Tin, lal chuan, ""Pathian khawngaihna ka tihlan theihna turin Saula chhungte zinga mi an la awm lawm ni le?"" a ti a. Tin, Ziba chuan lal hnenah, ""Jonathana chuan fapa pakhat a la nei a, a ke pawh a bai nghe nghe,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel9:4 Tin, lal chuan a hnenah, ""Khawiah nge a awm?"" a ti a. Tin, Ziba chuan lal hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Lo-debar-ah Amiela fapa Makira inah a awm"" a ti a." 
2Samuel9:5 Chutichuan lal Davida chuan mi a tir a, Lo-debar ata Amiela fapa Makira ina mi chu an va hruai a." 
2Samuel9:6 Tin, Saula fa Jonathan fap Mephibosetha chu Davida hnenah chuan a lo kal a, ahmaia lei siin chibai abuk a. Tin, Davida chuan, ""Mephiboseth,"" a ti a. Ani chuan, ""En teh, i chhiahlawhhi,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
2Samuel9:7 Tin, David chuan a hnenah, ""Hlau suh, i pa Jonathana avangin ka khawngaih ngei ngei ang chia, i Pu Saula awng ka neihtir leh ng chia, ka dawhkanah chaw i kil ve fo tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel9:8 Tin, chibai a buk a, ""Kei, ui thisawn ang mai, i chhaihhlawh hi eng nge maw a nih a, i ngaihsak ni?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel9:9 Chutichuan lal chuan Saual chhiahhlawh Ziba chu a ko a, a hnenah, ""Saula thil zawng zawngte leh a chhungte zawng zawngte thilte chu i pu fapa hi ka pe vek a ni." 
2Samuel9:10 Tin, a tan lei i lehsak ang a, nang leh i fapate leh i chhiahlawht nen; tin, i pu fapa chuan ei turte a nei teihna'n i thaw chhuahte chu i rawn la ang a; i pu fapa Mephibosetha erawh hi chuan ka dawhkanah chaw i kol fo ang,"" a ti a. Ziba chuan fapa sawm leh panga leh chhiahhlawh sawmhnih a nei a." 
2Samuel9:11 Chutichuan Ziba chuan lal hnenah, ""Ka lal, ka puin a chhiahhlawh thu a pek ang zelin i chhiahhlawh hian a ti ang,"" a ti a. Lal chuan, ""Mephibosetha zawngin ka dawhkanah lal fapa ang bawkin chaw akil ang,"" a tia." 
2Samuel9:12 Mephibosetha chuan fapa, naupang anei a, a hming chu Mika a ni. Tin anwg chu Mephibostha chhiahhlawh an ni a.Chutichuan Mephibosetha chu Jerusalem-ah a awm ta a; lal dawhkanah chaw a kil ve fo a; a ke khinghnih a bai a ni." 
2Samuel9:13 Chutichuan Mephibosetha chu Jerusalem-ah a awm ta a; lal dawhkanah chaw a kil ve fo a; a ke khinghnih a bai a ni. 
2Samuel10:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chun ghnuah chuan Amoa thlahte lal chu a thi a, a fapa Hanuna chu a ai awhin a lal a." 
2Samuel10:2 Tin, Davida chuan, ""A pa chuan mi lo khawngaih angin kei pawhin Nahasa fapa Hanuna chu ka khawngiah ve ang,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Davida chuan a pa chungchang thua thlamuan turin ama mite a tir a. Tin, Davia mite chu Amona thlahte rama n va thelng a." 
2Samuel10:3 Nimahsela Amona thlahte puipaho chuan an pu Hanuna hnenah chuan, ""Davida hian i pa a zah avangin i hnenah thlamuantu a rawn tir niin i ring em ni? Davida hian amite hi khuate rawn tiche tura thlitlai leh enthla turin i hnenah a rawn tira nai lo'm ni?"" an ti a." 
2Samuel10:4 Chutichuan, Hanuna chuan Davida mite chu a man a, an khabe hmul khingkhat a mehsak a, tin, an silhfente chu alai takah an mawng thleng pha chauin a tansak a, akaltir ta a." 
2Samuel10:5 Tin, Davida an han hrilhc uan, a hmuak turin mi a tir a; anni chu an zak hle mai si a. Tin, lal chuan, ""In khabe hmul a chawr ser hma chu Jeriko ah awm rih u la, chu mi hnua chuan in lo haw a ni ang chu,"" at ia." 
2Samuel10:6 Tin, Amona thlahten Davia huat zawng an lo ni ta tih an lo inhirat chuan Amona thlahte chuan Beth-rehob-a mi Suria-ho leh Zoba -a mi Suria-ho, sipai singhnih leh, lal Maaka a mi sangkhat nen, Topa mite singkaht leh sanghnih nen an chah a, an ruai a." 
2Samuel10:7 Tin, Davida'n chu chu a hriatin Joaba leh sipai huaisen zawng zawngte a tir a." 
2Samuel10:8 Tin, Amona thlahte chu an lo chhuak a, khaw luhna kawngkhar lama chuan tanhmun an siam a: tin, Zoba-a mi leh Reoba-a mi Suria hote leh Toba leh Maaka-hote erawh chu a hrangin phula an awm a." 
2Samuel10:9 Chutichuan an hma lam leh an hnung lamah an rawn bei dawn tih Joaban a hriatin Israel mite zinga mi atha tha thlang chhuak a, Suria mite bei turin thanhmun a lo siam a:" 
2Samuel10:10 tin, mi dang zawng zawng chu aunaupa Abisaia ktuah adah vek a, Amona thlahte bei turin tanhmun a siam bawk a." 
2Samuel10:11 Suria mite hi ka chelh dawn loh huan nangin min pi ang a; tin, nangin Amona thlahte i chelh dawn loh chuan ka rawn pi ang che." 
2Samuel10:12 Huai takin awm u la, kan mite le kan Pathian khaw chhanin i intipachang ang u; tin, LALPA chua ntha a tih ang zelin ti rawh se,"" a tia."
