2Samuel10:13 Chutichuan Joaba leh a hnea mite chuan Suria mite bei turin indona hmun lam chu an va pan hnai a; tin, a hmaah chuan an tlanchia a." 
2Samuel10:14 Tin, Amona thlahten Suria mite an tlanchhia tih an hriat chuan anni pawh chu Abisaia hmaa chuan a tlanche ve ta a, kuaah chuan an lut a. Tin, Joaba chuan Amona thlahte chu a kirsan a, Jerusalemah a haw ta a." 
2Samuel10:15 Tin, Suria miten Israelte hmaah a chan a lo chhe ta tih an lo hriat chuan an inpun khawm a." 
2Samuel10:16 Tin, Hadarezera sipai hotu Sobaka chuan hma a hruai a: Helam-ah an kal a." 
2Samuel10:17 Tin, chu chu Davida an hrilh a; tin, ani chuan Israel mi zawng zawng ako khawm a, Jordan lui an kai a, Helam-ah chuan an kal a. Tim Suria mite chuan Daivda do tur chuan tanhmun an lo siam a, an lo bei a." 
2Samuel10:18 Tin, Suria mite hchu Israelte hmaa chuan an tlanche ta a; tin, Davida chuan Suria mi tawlailir zasarih chunga hchuan leh sakawr chung chuang mi singli a that a, tin, an sipai hotu Sobaka pawh a that a, chutah chuan a thi ta a.chutichuan Hadarezera fatea awm lal zawng zawnge Israelte hmaah an chan a chhe ta tih an lo hriat chuan, Israelte nena inremna an siam a, an fateah an awm ta a. chutichuan Suria mite chuan Amona thlahte chu an pui leh ngam ta lo a." 
2Samuel10:19 chutichuan Hadarezera fatea awm lal zawng zawnge Israelte hmaah an chan a chhe ta tih an lo hriat chuan, Israelte nena inremna an siam a, an fateah an awm ta a. chutichuan Suria mite chuan Amona thlahte chu an pui leh ngam ta lo a." 
2Samuel11:1 Tin, hetih a ni a, kum a lo vei a, lalte indo tura an chauh thin lai hun chuan, Davida'n Joaba chu a tir a, amite leh Israel mi zawng zawngte nen; tin, Amona thlahte chu an tiboral a, Raba khua an hual a, Davida erawh chuJerusalem-ah a awm a." 
2Samuel11:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, tlai nemah chuan a khum ata Davida chu a tho a, lal in chungah a han kal a: tin, in chung atang chuan hmeichhe pakhat inbual lai hi a han hmu a; chu hmeichhia chu hmel tha tak a ni." 
2Samuel11:3 Tin, Davida chuan mi a tir a, chu hmeichhe chanchin chu a zawh fiahtir a. Tin, ""eliama fanu, Bath-sebi, Hit mi Uria nupui a ni lo'm ni?"" an ti a." 
2Samuel11:4 Tin, Davida chuan mi a tir a, an hruai ta a; tin, a hnen chu a va thleng a, a lo mutpui ta a, (a fel loh lai tak ani a), tin, a lamah a haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel11:5 Tichuan hmeichhia chu a lo rai ta a; tin, ""nau a pai ta,"" tiin Davida chu a hrilhtir a." 
2Samuel11:6 Tin, Davida chuan Joaba hnenah, ""Hit mi Uria hu ka hnena han kaltir rawh,"" tiin a chah a. Tin, Joaba chuan Uria chu Davida hnena a kaltir a." 
2Samuel11:7 Tin, Urian ahnen a han thlen chuan Joaba leh mite chu engne an an a, indonaahte engne an tih a zawt a." 
2Samuel11:8 Tin, davia chuan Uria hnenah, ""I in lamah haw la, i kete zuk sil rawh,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Uria chu lal in ata chu a chhuak a,tin, lal chu ei turtein a umzui a." 
2Samuel11:9 Nimahsela Uria hu a pu chhiahhlawhhote zingah lal in kawngkhar bulah chuan a mu ta mai a, a in lamah chuan a haw ta lo a." 
2Samuel11:10 Tin, Davida chu, ""Uria chu a in lamah a haw lo,"" tiin an han hrilh veleh Davida'n Uria hnenah, ""Khawilo ni hawng i ni lo'm ni? Engati nge i in lamah i hawn loh?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel11:11 Tin, Uria chuan Davida hnena, ""Pathian bawm te, Israelte leh Judate hu bukah an awm a; tin, ka pu Joaba leh ka pu mite ram lakah an inkulh a; kei ka inah ka hawngin ka eiin ka in ang a, ka nupi hnenah ka mu bik ang maw? I nunna leh i thlarau nuna chhalin ka sawi ka sawi e, chu chu ka ti lo tawp ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel11:12 Tin, Davida chuan Uria hnenah, ""Vawiinah pawh hetah awm la, naktukah pawh i kal dawn nia,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Uria chu Jerusalem-ah chuan chu mi ni leh a tukah pawh chuan a awm ta a." 
2Samuel11:13 Tin, Davida chuan a ko a, a hmaah chuan a eiin a in a; a tirui ta der mai a; tin, tlai lamah chuan a in lamah haw loin a pu chhiahhlawhte zingah mu tur chuan a chhuak ta a." 
2Samuel11:14 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tuk zingah chuan Davida chuan Joaba chu lehka a thawn a, Uria chu akentir a." 
2Samuel11:15 Tin, lehkhaah chuan, ""Uria chu ral zualna lai berah hmatawntir u la, an thaha a thih hlauhna'n thlahthlam rawh u,"" tiin a ziak a." 
2Samuel11:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Joaban khua ch a hual vel lai chuan mi huai huai awmna nia a hriatah chuan Uria chu a tantir a." 
2Samuel11:17 Tin, khuaa mite chu an chhuak a, Joaba chu an bei a, mi thenkhat, Davida mite zinga mi ngei chu an thi a; tin, Hit mi Uria pawh a thi a." 
2Samuel11:18 Chutichuan Joaa chuan mi a tir a, indo chungchang thu lam zawng zawng chu Davida a hrilh a;" 
2Samuel11:19 tin, a mi tirh chu,""Lal hnena indo chanchin zawng zawng a sawi zawh a," 
2Samuel11:20 a thin a ur thut mai mai a, 'Engati nge bei tura chutianga khaw bul lawka in kal mai:? Kulh atangin an kap mai ang che u tih in hre lo'm ni?:" 
2Samuel11:21 Jerubesetha fapa Abimeleka kha tuin nge that kha? Bu rawtsawmna lun gchungnung sawk hmeichhiain kulh atanign a chunga a zuk thlak a. Thebez-ah khan a thi a ni lo'm ni? Engati nge chutianga kulh bul lawka in kal ni? a tih chuan, 'I chhiahhlawh Hit mi Uria paw kha a thi a sin,' ti ang che,"" tiin a hrilh a." 
2Samuel11:22 Chutichuan ami tir chu akal ta a, a va thleng a, Joaban a tirh chhan zawng zawng hu Davida a hrilh a." 
2Samuel11:23 Tin, a mi tirh chuan Davida hnenah, ""Mite chuan min rawn nawr a, phulah min rawn bei a, tin, keininan khaw luhna kawng khar thleng rawkin kan nawr ta a." 
2Samuel11:24 tin, kaptute chuan kulh atangin i chhiahhlawhte chu an kap a, tichuan lal chhiahhlawh thenkhatte an thi a, tin, i chhiahhlawh Hit mi Uria pawh kha a thi a sin,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel11:25 Chutichuan Davida chuan a mi tirh hnenah chuan, ""Joaba hnena chan heti hian va sawi rawh, ""he'ng hian i rilru tilawm lo chuang suh se, khandaih chuan atuamah a thlei si lo, nasa lehzualin khua chu bei u la tiche rawh u,' tiin fuih rawh,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel11:26 Tin, Uria nupi chuan a pasal Uria a thi tih a lo hriat chuan a pasal chu a sun a.Tin, a sun hun bi a pelh hnu chuan Davida chuan a in lamah a hruaitir a, a nupuiah a nei ta a, fapa a hrinsak a. Nimahsela, Davida thiltih chuan LALPA a tilungni lo a." 
2Samuel11:27 Tin, a sun hun bi a pelh hnu chuan Davida chuan a in lamah a hruaitir a, a nupuiah a nei ta a, fapa a hrinsak a. Nimahsela, Davida thiltih chuan LALPA a tilungni lo a." 
2Samuel12:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Davida hnenah Nathana a tir a. Tin, a hnena chuan a kal a, ""Khaw pakhatah hian m pahni an awm a; pakhat chu mi hausa a ni a, pakhat chu m rethei ani a." 
2Samuel12:2 Mi hausa chuan beram rual tam tak leh ran rual tam tak anei a: 
2Samuel12:3 mi rethei erawh kha chuan beram no anu te tak te pakhat a leia, a vulh pakhat chauh lo chu engmah anei lo va: a hnena a fate nena puitling an ni a; a thleng znepui leh a no tawmpi, a angchunga awm,a fanu ang chiaha a ngaih ani a." 
2Samuel12:4 Tin, mi hausa hnenah chuan khualzin pakhat hi a va thleng a; tin, a hnena mikhual lo thleng chu a ma beram leh ran chu talh phal loin mi rethei beramno chu a chhuhsak a,a hnena lo kalpa chu a talh a,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel12:5 Tichuan Davida chu chu mi chunga chuan a thinur ta viau mai a; Nathana hnenah chuan, ""LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, chu thil titu tihhlum mai tlak a nih chu;" 
2Samuel12:6 tin, hetiang thil a tih avang leh khawngaihna a neih loh avangin a beram no chu a lehliin a rul tur a ni ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel12:7 Chutichuan Nathana chuan Davida hnenah, ""Nangmah hi i ni alawm, LALPA, Israele Pathianc huan heti hian a ti, 'Israelte lal atan hriak ka thih chia, saual kut ata ka chan chhuak chia;" 
2Samuel12:8 tin, i pu in ro chu ka luahtir chia, i pu nupuite chu i angchungah ka dah a, tin, Israela hhungte leh Juda chungte chu ka pe chia; tin, chung chu a la tlem luattur chuan thl dangte pawh ka pek belh tur che alawm." 
2Samuel12:9 Engati nge LALPA thu chu ngainep a, a mithmuha thil tha lo i tih mai: Hit mi Uria chu khandaihin i tihhlum a, a nupi chu i nupui atan ineihsak a, Amona thlahte khandaihin i that a." 
2Samuel12:10 Chuvang chuan khandaih chuan i chhungte chu a kiansan tawp lo ang; nang chuan min ngainepin Hit m Uria nupui chu i nupui atan i chhusak ta si a. 
2Samuel12:11 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni, 'Ngai teh, nangma chhungkaw zing atang ngeiin i chunga thil tha lo ka chhuahtir ang a, i mithmuh ngeiah inupuite chu ka laksak ang chia, i vengte ka pe ang a, chun enah inupuite an mutpui ang." 
2Samuel12:12 Nang chuan a rukin i ti a, kei erawh chuan Israel mite zawng zawng mithmuhah chhun enah ka ti ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel12:13 Tin, Davida chuan Nathana hnenah, ""LALPA chungah thil ka tisual ta a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, nathana chuan Davida hnenah, ""LALPA chungah thil ka tisual ta a ni, "" a ti a. Tin, Nathana chan Davida hnena ""LALPA pawhin i sual chu a dah bo ve ta e; i tho lo ang." 
2Samuel12:14 Amaherawhchu he i thilti hian Pathian sawichiatna remchang tak LALPA hmelmate tan i siam avangin naupang i laka piang chu a thi ngei ngei ang, a ti a." 
2Samuel12:15 Tichuan Nathana chuan a in lamah a hawnsan ta a. Tin, Uria nupuiin Davida a hrinsak chungah chuan LALPA'n a kut a thlak a, a damlo ta hle a." 
2Samuel12:16 Chutichuan Davida'n naupang tan chuan Pathian hnenah a ngen chiam a; tin, Davida chuan hawte a nghei a, a lut a, zankhuain leiah a mu a." 
2Samuel12:17 Tin, a chhungte zinga upate chu an tho a, lei ta chu kai tho turin a kiangah an ding a; nimahsela tho du lo a, an hneh pawh chaw a ei hek lo." 
2Samuel12:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan naupang chu a thi ta a. Tin, Davida chhiahhlawhte chuan naupang chu a thi ta tih hrilh chu an hlau a, ""Ngai teh, naupang a lam lai khan a hnena thu kan sawi a, a ngaithla duh si lo a, naupang chu a thi ta tih engtin nge kan hrilh ngam ang, eng emaw tin a inti mai ange,"" an ti a." 
2Samuel12:19 Nimahsela Davida chutia achiahhlawhte inbe ruo ahmu chuan Davida chuan naupang chu a thi ta ani tiha hre ta a; tin, Davida chuan a chiahhlawhte hnenah, ""Naupang chu athi ta elo?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Thi ta,"" an ti a." 
2Samuel12:20 Chutichuan Davida chu lei ata chu a tho a, a insil a, hriak a inthih a, a puante a inthlak a; tin, LALPA inah a kal a, Pathian chibai a buk a; tin, a in lamah a kal leh a, tin, chaw a han lam a, ahmaah chuan an hlui a, a lo ei ta a." 
2Samuel12:21 Chutichuan chiahlawhte chuan a hnenah, ""I thil tih dan hi engtizia nge ni? Naupang hu adam lai khan chaw te i nghei a, i tap a, nimahsela naupang chu a thi ta cheng a, i tho a, chaw te i ei ta zawk mai si a,"" an ti a." 
2Samuel12:22 Tin, ani chuan, ""Naupang chu a la dam lai khan chaw e ka nghheiin ka tap tak a; 'Naupang chu a dam theihna'n LALPA chuan min khawngaih mahna, tu nge hria ang i?' ka ti a ni a." 
2Samuel12:23 Nimahsela tuna chuan a thi ta si a, engah nge chaw ka nghei tawh ang? Ka ko kor leh thei dawn em ni? A hnenah keimah hi ka kal ang a, nimahsela ani zawng ka hneh a lo kir leh tawh lo ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel12:24 Tichuan Davida chuan a nupui Bathsebi chu a thlamuan a, a hnenah a lut a, a mutpui a, tin, fapa a hring a, a hminga Solomona a sa a. Tin, ani chu LALPA'n a hmangaih a." 
2Samuel12:25 Tin, zawlnei Nathana chu a chahtir a, tin, ani chuan LALPA chawiin a hmingah chuan Jedidia a sa a." 
2Samuel12:26 Chutichuan Joaba chan Amona thlahte khawpui Raba a run a, khawpui chu a la a." 
2Samuel12:27 Tin, Joaba chuan Davida hnena mi a tir a, ""raba chu ka run a, a ni, tuite khawpi chu ka la a a sin." 
2Samuel12:28 chutichuanmi la awm zawng zawngte chu khawm la, khawpi chu beih tumin ep la, la rawh: keimahinkhawpui chu ka lak zawngin ka hming a pu mai dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel12:29 Chutichuan Davida chuan mi zawng zawngte chu a khawm a, Raba-ah chuan an kal a, an va run a, an la ta a." 
2Samuel12:30 Tin, an lal lallukhum khum lai chu a laksak a, a rih lam chu rangkachak talent buk a ni a, lunghlute pawha tel a; tin, Davida an khumtir a. Tin, khawpuia mi rallak sum tam tak a la a.Tin, mipuite chu a kawi chuak a, thingzaina te, lei lehna thir zum te, thir hreipui te hmangin hna an thawtir a, lei rawh chante an siamtir a: Amona thlahte khawpi zawng zawng chu chutiang huan a ti a. Tin, Davida leh mi zawng zawng chu Jerusalem-ah an haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel12:31 Tin, mipuite chu a kawi chuak a, thingzaina te, lei lehna thir zum te, thir hreipui te hmangin hna an thawtir a, lei rawh chante an siamtir a: Amona thlahte khawpi zawng zawng chu chutiang huan a ti a. Tin, Davida leh mi zawng zawng chu Jerusalem-ah an haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel13:1 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan, heti hi a ni a, Davida fapa Absaloma chuan farnu hmel tha tak a nei a, a hming chu Tamari a ni a. Tin, Davida fapa Amnona chuan ani chu a hmangaih a." 
2Samuel13:2 Tichuan Amnona chu afarnu Tamari avang chuan a buai ta hle a, a dam lo ta a; ani lah chu nula thianghlim ani si a; achunga thil eng emaw han tih hu Amnona tan chuan khrih tak a ni." 
2Samuel13:3 Amaherawhchu Amnona chuan thian a nei a, a hming chu Jonadaba a ni a, Davida unaupa Simea fapa a ni: Jonadaba chu mi ring vervek tak a ni." 
2Samuel13:4 Tin, ahnenah, ""Aw, nang lal fapa hi eng tizia nge a ni tela i cher telh telh chu le? Min hrilh duh dawn lo'm ni?"" a ti a.Tin, Amnona chuna a hnenah, ""Ka unaupa Absalima farnu tamari hi ka hmangaih miau mai a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:5 Tin, Jonadaba huan a hnenah, ""I khumah mu reng la, dam lo der la; tin, i pain a rawn en hunah he a hneah, 'Khawngaih takin ka farnu Tamari chu aka hnenah lo kal sela, chhang ei tur mi rawn pe se la, tin, ka hmuh theihah, ka mithmuhah ngeiah ei tur min siamsak te se, a kuta mi ngei ka lo ei ang e,' lo ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:6 Chutichuan Amnona chu a mu a, a dam lo der taa: tin, lalin a va en chuan Amnona chuan lal hnenah, ""Khawngaih takin ka farnu Tamari lo kal se la, ka mithmuh ngeia hian changper pahnih emaw min siam se la, ama kuta mi ngei ka lo ei ang e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:7 Chutichuan Davida chuan Tamari hnenah, ""I nuta Amnona in lamah kal la, ei tur va siamsak rawh khai,"" tiin mi a tir a." 
2Samuel13:8 Chutichuan Tamari chu a nuta Amnona in lamah chuan a kal a; tin, ani chu a lo mu reng a. Tin, chhang diak a la a, a hmet a, amithmuhah chhangperchu a siam a, a ur a." 
2Samuel13:9 Tin, a urna chu a la a, a hmaa chuan abun a; nimahsela a ei duh lo a. Tin, Amnona chuan, ""Mi zawng zawng hian mi chhuahsan vek raw se,"" a ti a. Tichuan an chhuahsan ta vek a." 
2Samuel13:10 Tin, Amnona chuan Tamari hnenah, ""I kuta mi ngei ka ei theihna'n ei tur chu pindanah hian han la tawh rawh le,"" a ti a. Tin, Tamari chuan a chhangper siamte chu a la a, a nuta Amnona hnenah pindanah chuan a la lut a." 
2Samuel13:11 Eitir tura a kiang hnaia a va kalpui chu a lo man a, a hnenah, ""Ka farnu, lo mu ve teh, "" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:12 Tin, ani chuan a chang a, ""Ni lo e a, ka nutapa, mi tilui suh, Israelte zingah hetiang thil hi tih tur ani lo e; he thil sual atthlak tak hi ti suh khai." 
2Samuel13:13 Tin, kei hian ka mualphona chu khawiahnge ka thangpui ang? Tin, nang pawh Israelte zinga mi aa ngaih i lo ni mai ang a sin. Chuvnagin lal be zawk rawh khai, i mi nei chu a hnial lo ang e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:14 Nimahsela a thu chu a pawm lo a, amah aiin a chak zawk si a, a tilui a, a mutpui ta a." 
2Samuel13:15 Chutichuan, Amnona chuan huat namen lohin a haw leh ta si a; a huatna chu amah a hmangaih laia a hmangaihna ai maha nasain a ni a huat ni. Tichuan Amnona chuan a hnenah, ""Tho la, kal daih mai rawh,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:16 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Chuti tur chu ni lo e, hetianga dik lo taka mi tihchhuah hi ka chunga i tih tak ai mah khan a tha lo zawk a ni, a ti a. Nimahsela a pawm duh chuang lo a." 
2Samuel13:17 Chutichuan a rawngbawltu a chiahhlawh chu a ko a, ""He hmeichhia hi ka hnen ata chuatir la, kawng kalh hnan tlat rawh,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:18 Kawrfual ze hrang hranga zia a ha a; chutiang kawrfual chu lal nula thianghlimten an ha thin a. Chutichuan a chiahhlawh chuan a hruai chhuak a, kawng a kalh hnan ta tlat a." 
2Samuel13:19 Tin, tamari chuan a luah vut a phul a, a kawrfual ze hrang hranga zia a hak chu a pawtthler a, a chhipah a kut a dah a, ring taka tap chung zelin a kal ta a." 
2Samuel13:20 Tin, a nuta Absaloma chuan a hnenah, ""I nuta Amnona chu i hnenah a lo lut a ni maw? Nimahsela ngawi mai rawh, ka farnu, i nuta ani alawm, engto duh suh,"" a ti a. Chutichuan tamari chu a nuta Absaloma inah ngui takin a inkhung ta tlat mai a." 
2Samuel13:21 Nimahsela lal Davida'n chung thil zawng zawng chu a han hriat chuan a thinrim ta hle mai a. 
2Samuel13:22 Tin, Absaloma chuan Amnona hnenah a chhia a tha, a engmah a sawi duh lo a; Absaloma chuan a farnu Tamari a tihluih avangin Amnona chu a haw hle a ni." 
2Samuel13:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum hnih pumhlum a ral hnu chuan ephrai kianga Baal-hazar-ah Absaloman beram hmul a mehtir a; tin, Absaloma chuan lal fapate zawng zawng chu a sawm a." 
2Samuel13:24 Tin, Absaloma chu lal hnena a kal a, ""Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhin beram hmuh a mehtir a; lal leh a chhiahlawhte chu i chhiahlawh hnenah hian kal ve ang hmiang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:25 tin, lal chuan Absaloma hnenah, ""Ni lo e ka fapa, kan za chuan kal lo e, kan tihautak lutuk dah ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a sawm lui chiam a, nimahsela a kal duh chuang lo a. Mal erawh chu a sawm a." 
2Samuel13:26 chutichuan Absaloman, ""A nih loh leh ka unaupa Amnona tal kan hnenah kal ang hmiang,"" a ti a. Tin, lal chuan a hnenah, ""Engah nge a kal bik ang?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:27 Nimahsela Absaloma chuan Amnona leh lal fapate zawng awng tal chu a hnena kal ve turin a ngnsak tal a. 
2Samuel13:28 Tin, Absaloma chuan, a chiahlawhte chu, ""Ngai teh u, Amnona uain ina ahlim laiin a hnenah, ""Amnona chu that rawh u,' ka tih che u chuan, that u la, hlau suh u, thu ke pe tawh che u ani lo'm ni? In tihuai u la, intipasaltha ang che u, tiin thu a pe a." 
2Samuel13:29 Chutichuan Absaloma chhiahhlawhte chuan Amnona chungah Absaloma thupek ang chuan a ti a. Chutichuan lal fapate zawng zawng chu an tho a, an sabengtung chungah an chuang theu a, an tlan bo ta a." 
2Samuel13:30 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kawng laka an la awm laiin, ""Absaloman lal fapate zawng zawng chu a that ta vek mai a. pakhat maha zuah lo,"" tiin Davida hnenah chanchin an a lo thleng a." 
2Samuel13:31 Chuchuan lal chu a tho a, a silhfente a pawtthler a, leiah a mu ta a; tin, a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte chu an silhfente pawtthlerin a kiangah an ding a." 
2Samuel13:32 Tin, Davida unau Simea fapa Jonadaba chuan a chhang a, ""Ka pu chuan lal fapa tlangval zawng zawngte hu a that vek a ni tih ring suh se; Amnona chauh ani thi ni; a farnu tamari a tihlui achin kha Absaloma chuanhetianga tih hi a tum reng a ni." 
2Samuel13:33 chuvangin ka pu, LALPA chuan lal fapate zawng zawng chu an thi emaw tih ringin engto suh se, Amnona chauh a ni thi ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:34 Absaloma erawh chu a tlan bo ta a. Tin, a ral vengtu tlangval chuan a mit a len a, a han en a, tin, ngai teh, a hnun glama tlang panga kawngah chuan mi tam tak an lo kal a." 
2Samuel13:35 Tin, Jonadaba chuan lal hnenah, ""Ngai teh, lal fapate chu an lo kal e, i chhiahlawhin a sawi ang chiah khaani ngei mai,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel13:36 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a sawi zawh veleh chuan ngai teh, lal fapate chu an lo thleng a, an aw chhuah meuhin an tap a: tin, lal pawh chu a chiahlawhte nen chuan an tap ta vak vak mai a." 
2Samuel13:37 Absaloma erawh chu a tlan bo a, Gesur lal Amihura fpa Talmaia hnenah a kal a. Tin, Davida chuan ni tin, a fapa chu a sun a." 
2Samuel13:38 Chutichuan Absaloma hu a tlan bo a, Gesur ram ramah a kal a, chuta chuan kum thum a va awm a.Tin, lal Davida chuan Absaloma hnena kal a chak em em a: Amnona chungchang thuah chuan a thlamuang ta a. Ani chu a thi tawh si a." 
2Samuel13:39 Tin, lal Davida chuan Absaloma hnena kal a chak em em a: Amnona chungchang thuah chuan a thlamuang ta a. Ani chu a thi tawh si a." 
2Samuel14:1 Chutichuan Zeruia fapa Joaba chuan lal rilru chu Absaloma chungah a cheng tih a lo hria a. 
2Samuel14:2 TichuanJoaba chuan Tekoa khuaah mi a ti ra, chuta meiche fing pakhat chu a va hruaitir a, a hnenah, ""Lusun angah insiam la, lusun puan sin la, sahriak pawh inthih loin hmeichhia rei tak mitthi sun angin awm rawh:" 
2Samuel14:3 tin, lal hnenah kal la a hnenah hetiang hian thu va sawi ang che aw,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Joaba chuan thu a fah a." 
2Samuel14:4 Tin, Tekoa khuaa hmeichhia chuan lal hnena thu a sawi dawn chuan hmaiaa lei siin abawkkhup a, chibaia buk a, ""Aw lalpa, min pui rawh,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:5 Tin, lal chuan a hnenah, ""Engtizia nge ni le?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Hmeithai ka ni tak tak a, ka pasal hu a thi tawh a." 
2Samuel14:6 Tin, i bawihnu hian fapa pahni anei a, an pahni chuan loah an insual a, tumah thelhtu an awm si lo a, a pakhat chuan pakhat hu avua a, atihlum ta a." 
2Samuel14:7 Tin, ngai teh, an chhungkua zawng zawng chuan i bawihnu hi an do rawn a,'A unaupa thattu chu a unaupa a thah avanga kan thah ve theihna'n min pe raw khai, tichuanro luahtu tur pawh kan tiboral ang,' an ti a: chutiang chuan ka meiling la awma chu an timit ang a, ka pasal chu hming nei lo leh lei chunag thlah reng reng nei loin a awm mai dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:8 Tin, lal chuan hmeiche hnenah chuan, ""I inah haw ta la, i chungchang thuah chuanthu ka pe mai ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:9 Tin, Tekoa khuaa hmeichhia chuan lal hnenah chuan, ""Aw lal pa, ka pu, bawhchhiatna mawh chu ka chungah leh ka pa chhungte chungah tla mai rawh se: tin, lal leh lalthutthleng chuan mawh phur su se,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:10 Tin, lal chuan, ""Tupawh i chungah eng emaw sawi apiang chu ka hnenah rawn hruai la, a tawk leh tawh hlek lo ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:11 Tin, ani chuan, ""Thisen chhuahtute chungah phuba latuten tiboral tawh lo turin lal chuan LALPA i Pathian chu hre reng rawh se aw, chutilozawng ka fapa hi an tioral dah ang e,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, i fapaa samzai khat pawh leah hiana tla lo ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:12 Chutichuan hmeichhia chuan, ""I bawihnu hian LALPA ka pu hnenah thu kam khat chauh ha sawi leh teh se aw,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Sawi ta che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:13 Tin, hmeichhia chuan, ""A nih le eng vangin nge Pathian mite dodala hetianga tih i tum? Heng thu atang hian lal chu thiam loh chang angin a lang a ni, lal chuan ami, tlan bova chu a hruai hawn si loh avangin." 
2Samuel14:14 Kan thi ngei ngei tur a ni a, tin, tuisik leia baw hnu ruh theih tawh loh ang hi kan ni a: Pathianin nunna hi a la bo a ni lo a, tlan boa chu a laka mi hrang a nih lohna'n rem a ruat a ni zawk a ni." 
2Samuel14:15 Chutichuan lalpa ka pu hnena he thu sawi tura ka lo kal pawh hi mi ka hlauh vang a ni a: tin, i bawihnu chuan, lal hnenah ka sawi phawt ang a, lal chuan abawihnu dilna ch a hlawhtlintir mahna." 
2Samuel14:16 Lal chuan kei leh ka fapa hi Pathian roluah lo tura tihboral tumtu laka i bawihnu hi chan chuak turin a lo ngaihthlaksak ang chu ka ti a. 
2Samuel14:17 Chutichuan i bawihnu tan hian, LALPA ka pu thu chu thlamuan tak ni se la: achhia a tha lo thlei turin LALPA ka pu chu Pathian vantirhkoh ang mai ani si a: tin, LALPA Pathian chu i hnenah awm rawh se ka ti a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:18 Tin, lal chuan a chhang a, hmeichhe hnenah chuan, ""Ka zawh apiang che chu ka lakah engmah zep suh ang che aw,"" a ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan, ""LALPA ka pu chuan sawi ang hmiang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:19 Tin, lal chuan, ""Heng thuah reng reng hian Joaban telna a nei em?"" a ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan a chhang a, ""LALPA ka pu, i thlarau nunna chhlalin ka sawi e, LALPA ka puin a sawi tawh chu tumahin dinglamah emaw, vei lamah emaw an pumpelh thei lo ang a: i chhiahhlawh Joaba chuan min tir a, he'ng thu zawng zawng hi i bawihnu a fah vek a ni:" 
2Samuel14:20 thil awmdan tidanglam turinheng thil hi i chhiahlawhJoaban chuan a tih a ni: tin, ka pu chu khawvela thil awm zawng zawng hre theiin Pathian vantirhkoh ang maiin a fing a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:21 Tin, lal chuan Joaba hnenah, ""Ngai teh, ka ti ve ta e, chuvangin kal la, tlangval Absaloma chu va hruai leh rawh le,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:22 Tin, Joaba chu hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a, chibai abuk a, lal chu mal a sawm a: tin, Joaba chuan, ""Aw LALPA ka pu, LALPA chuan a chhiahhlawh dilna chu ahlawhtlintir avangin vawiinah hian i chhiahlawh hian i mit ka tlung tih ka lo hre ta,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel14:23 chutichuan Joaba chu atho a, Gesur-ah chuan a kal a, Absaloma chu Jerusalem-aha hruai ta a." 
2Samuel14:24 Tin, lal chuan, ""Ama in lamah kal se la, k ahmel chu rawn hmu suh se,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Absoloma chu ama in lamah chuan a kal a, lal hmel chu a hmu ta lo a." 
2Samuel14:25 Israel zawng zawng zinga Absoloma ang renga hmel thata fak kai tuma an awm lo va: a ke ler atangin a chip thlengin sawiselna reng reng a awm lo a. 
2Samuel14:26 A lu a meh chuan (kum vei apiangin a met thin a, asam chu a rih em thin avangin a met thin a ni) a sam chu abuk thin a, lal buk dana sekel hnih a tling thin a ni." 
2Samuel14:27 Tin, Absaloma chuan fapa pathum leh fanu pakhat a nei a, a hming chu Tamari a ni a, hmel tha tak a ni." 
2Samuel14:28 Chutichuan Absaloma chu kum hnih pumhlum Jerusalem-ah a awm a, nimahsela lal hmel reng reng chu ahmu lo a." 
2Samuel14:29 Chutichuan Absaloma chuan lal hnena tirh atan Joaba chu a chah a; nimahsela a kal duh lo a; tin, a chah nawn leh a, nimahsela a kal duh chuang lo a." 
2Samuel14:30 Chutichuan a chhiahhlawhte hnenah, ""I e u, Joaba lo chu ka lo kiang a ni a, barli anei a, va hal rawh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan Absaloma chhiahhlawhte chuan lo chu an va hal ta a." 
2Samuel14:31 Chutichuan Joaba chu a tho a, Absaloma hnena a inah a kal a, a hnenah, ""Engvangin nge Gesur atangin ka lo kal? Chutah chuan awm reng i la ka tan a tha zawk tur,' tia lal hnena tirh atan ka chah chia; chuvangin lal hmel chu min hmuhtir rawh khai: tin, bawhchhiatna nei ka lo ni chuan min tihlum mai anghmiang,"" a ti a.Chutichuan Joaba chu lal hnenah chuan a kal a, ahrilh a; tin, Absaloma chu a ko a, lal hnenah a kal a, tin, lal hmaah chuan hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a: tin, lal chuan Absaloma chu a fawp a." 
2Samuel14:32 Chutichuan Joaba chu lal hnenah chuan a kal a, ahrilh a; tin, Absaloma chu a ko a, lal hnenah a kal a, tin, lal hmaah chuan hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a: tin, lal chuan Absaloma chu a fawp a." 
2Samuel15:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung thilhnuah chuan Absaloma chuan tawlailirah chuan Absaloma chuan tawlailir leh sakawrte leh mi sawmnga ahmaa tlan turin a buatsaih a." 
2Samuel15:2 Tin, Absaloma u zing takah a tho a, kulh kawng khar kawngah chuan a lo ding thin a; tin, lal hnena thupawi rawn sawi tur apiangte chu Absaloma chuan a lo ko a, ""Khawii khua nge i nih?"" a lo ti zel thin a. Tin, ""I chhiahhlawh hi Israel hnamte zinga hnam pakhat ka ni,"" an ti zel thin a." 
2Samuel15:3 Tin, Absaloma chuan, ""I e, i thu chu a thain a dik a; nimahsela ngaihtuahtu tur lalin tumah a ruat lo,"" a lo ti thin a." 
2Samuel15:4 Tin, Absaloma vek chuan, ""Mi tin, thupawi sawi tur nei emaw, dil tur nei emaw apiang chu ka hnenah an lo kalna turin, kei hi he mi ram roreltuah mi siam se la ka va ti em ve aw! Chutichuan fel takin ka relsak thin tur,"" te a lo ti bawk thin a." 
2Samuel15:5 Hetiang pawh hian a ti a, tupawh amah chibai buk tura han hai apiangte chu a lo ban a, a chelh a, a lo fawp thin a." 
2Samuel15:6 Chutichuan Israel mi lalhnena thusawi tura lo kal apiangte chu Absaloma chuan chutiang chuan a lo ti zel thin a. Chutichuan Absaloma chuan Israel mite thinlung chu a hipsak a. 
2Samuel15:7 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum li a lo vei chuan Absaloma chuan lal hnenah, ""Hebron khuaa LALPA hnena ka thutiam hlen turin min kaltir rawh khai." 
2Samuel15:8 I chhiahlawh hian suria rama Gesur-a ka awm lai khan, ""LALPA'n Jerusalem-a min ruai leh phawt chuan LALPA rawng ka bawl ang,' tiin thu ka lo tiam tawa ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel15:9 Tin, lal huan a hnenah, ""thlamuang takin kal rawh khai,"" a ti a. Chutichuan a tho a, Hebron-ah chuan a kal ta a." 
2Samuel15:10 Nimahsela Absaloma chuan, ""Tawrawrawt ri in riat veleh, 'Absaloma chu Hebron-ah lal a ni,' ti ang che u,"" tiin Israel hnam zawng zawngte hnenah mi a tir ru ta hlau a." 
2Samuel15:11 Tin, Absaloma hnenah chuan a mi sawm, mi zahnih Jerusalem atangin an kal ve a, rilru tha tak puin an kal a, engmah an hre ve lo." 
2Samuel15:12 Tin, Absaloma chuan inthawinate chu a hlan laiin, gilon mi Ahithophela, Davida rorelpui chu, a khua Gilo ata a chah a. An thu phiar chu a nasa hle mai a; Absaloma lamah chuan mipuite chu an pung tulh tul mai si a." 
2Samuel15:13 Tin, Davida hnenah chuan, ""Israel mite rilru chu Absaloma lamah a thle hle mai,"" tiin mi a lo kal a." 
2Samuel15:14 Tin, Davida chuan Jerusalem-a a mi zawng zawngte hnenah chuan, ""Tho u la i tlan chhuak ang u, tumah Absaloma lakah hian kan chhuak thei awm si lo va: chhuak thuai rawh u khai, chutilozawng min rawn umphak thuai mai ang a, kan chungah hian thil tha lo tak a rawn thlen ang a, khandaihin khua hi a rawn bei dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel15:15 Tin, lal mite chuan lal hnenah, ""Ngai teh, i chiahhlawhte hi kan pu, kan lalin a ruat apiang ti turin kan inpeih reng e,"" an ti a." 
2Samuel15:16 Tin, lal chu a chhuak a, achhungte zawng zawngin an zui a. Tin, lal chuan in nghak turin hmeichhe sawm, hmeihote chu a dah a." 
2Samuel15:17 Tin, lal chu a chuak a,mipui zawng zawngte chuan an zui a; tin, Beth-merhak-ah an chawl rih a." 
2Samuel15:18 Tin, a mi zawng zawngte chuan an kal pel a; tin, Kerit mi zawng zawng te, Pelet mi zawng zawng te, mi zaruk Gath atanga mah rawn zuitute chuan lal chu an bel zel a." 
2Samuel15:19 Chutichuan lal chuan Git mi Itaia hnenah chuan, ""Eng tizia nge nanghi i lo kal ve? Kir leh la, lal hnenah awm rawh: nang chu mikhual ram danga mi i ni bawk si a, nangma hmun lamah kir leh rawh khai." 
2Samuel15:20 Nimin lawka lo kal i ni a, vawiinah hian kan hnena a chhuk a chhova min zui turin ka tih ve tur che i ni em ni? Ka lal theih theihnaah ka lal dawn a ni a, nang hchu kir leh la, i unaute zawng zawng hi hruai kir rawh; khawngaihna leh thutak i hnenah awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel15:21 Tin, Itaia chuan lal chu a chhang a,""LALPA nunna leh lal, ka pu nunna chhalin ka sawi e, lal, ka pu hi i awmna tawh phawtahchuan, thih leh thih ani ang a, dam leh dam ani ang a, i chhiahlawh hi a awm ve zel ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel15:22 Tin, Davida chuan Itaia hnenah chuan, ""Kal u la, kal zel rawh u le,"" a ti a. Tichuan Git mi Itaia chu amite zawng zawng leh an fanau zawng zawngte nen chuan an kal a." 
2Samuel15:23 Tin, ring takin a ram tahin an tap a, mipuite chu an kal vek a; thlaler kawng lam panin lal pawh chuan Kidron lui chu a kan a, tin, mipui zawng zawngte chuan an kan bawk a." 
2Samuel15:24 Tin, Zadoka te chu Pathian thuthlun bawm zawnin Levi-ho zawng zawngte nen a hnenah an kal ve a; Pathian bawm chu an nghat a, mipuiin khua chu an chauhsan kim vek thlengin Abiathara chu a hanchho a." 
2Samuel15:25 Tin, lal chuan Zadoka hnenah, ""Pathian bawm chu khawpui chhungah zawn haw leh rawh u: LALPA mittlunga ka awm chuan mi hruai haw leh ang a, Pathian bawm leh a awmna chu min hmuhtir leh ang a;" 
2Samuel15:26 amaheawhchu,'nangmahah lawmna reng ka nei lo,' a tih chuan ngai teh, heti mai hi ka ni a, thaa ti ang angin ka chungah hian ti mai rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel15:27 lal chuanpuithiamZadoka hnenah chuan, ""Hmu theitu i ni lo'm ni? I fapate pahnih, i fapa Ahimaaza leh Abiathara fapa Jonathana nen thlamuang takinkhawpuiah haw leh rawh u." 
2Samuel15:28 Ngai teh, kei chu chanchin min rawn hriattir hma loh chu thlalera lui kaiahte hian ka lo awm ang e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel15:29 Chutichuan Zadoka leh Abiathara chuan Pathian bawm chu Jerusalemah an kalpui leh a; tin, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
2Samuel15:30 Chutichuan Davida chu Olive tlang chohnaah chuan a lawn cho a, chhoh pah chuan a tap zel a; a lu a khum a, ke ruain a kal a: tin, a hnena mi awm zawng zawngte chuan lu an khum theuh a, tap chung zelin an chho a." 
2Samuel15:31 Tin, tuin emaw Davida chu, ""Ahithophela chu Absaloma lamah tangin phiartute zingah a tel ve,"" tiina hrilh a. Tin, Davida chuan, ""Aw LALPA, Ahithophela remruat chu atnaah chantir turin ka ngen a che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel15:32 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Davida chu Pathian biakna tlang chhip a han lawn chhua chuan, ngai teh, Ark mi Husaia chu a kawr pawhthler ha a, a lua lei kai luamin ama hmuak turin a lo kal a." 
2Samuel15:33 Tin, Davida chuan ahnenah, ""Ka hnena i kal ve chuan ka tan phur rit i ni mai ang a:" 
2Samuel15:34 amaherawhchu khawpui lamah chuan i kir a, Absaloma hnena, 'Aw lalpa, i chhiahhlawhah ka awm ang e, tun hma lama i pa chiahlawhah ka awm ang khan tunah hian i chhiahlawhah ka awm tawh thung ang e,' i va tih eraw chua Ahothophela remruat mi dalsaktu i ni zawk ang." 
2Samuel15:35 Chutah chuan i hnena puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara pawh an awm ve ani lo'm ni? Chutichuanheti hi a ni ang a, lal ina thu chhuak i hriat apiang chu puitiam Zadoka leh Abiathara i hrilh thin ang a." 
2Samuel15:36 Ngai teh, an fapate pahnih Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza leh Abiathara fapa Jonathana pawh an hnenah an awm kha; tin, i thil hriat apiangte chu mi hriatir turin anmahni chu i rawn tir thin dawn nia,"" a ti a.Chutichuan, Davida thian Husaia chu khawpuiah chuan a lut a; tin, Absaloma chu Jerusalem-ah a lut ta a." 
2Samuel15:37 Chutichuan, Davida thian Husaia chu khawpuiah chuan a lut a; tin, Absaloma chu Jerusalem-ah a lut ta a." 
2Samuel16:1 Tin, Davida chuan tlang chip a lawn chauhnaa pel hlek hnu chuan, ngai te, Mephilbosetha chiahhlaw Ziba ua a lo muak a, sabengtung pahnih a thuam a, chhang tlang zahnih leh grep pho ro bawr za leh nupui thei za leh uain peng khat a phurtir a." 
2Samuel16:2 Tin, lal chuan Ziba eah chuan, ""Heng hi engtizia nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, Ziba chuan,""Sabengtungte hi lal chhungte chuanna'n a niang a; tin, chang leh nupui theite hi tlangvalte ei atan ani ang a, tin, uain hi chu thlalera chau apiangte in atan a ni ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:3 Tin, lal chuan, ""A nih leh khawiah nge i pu fapa chu?"" a ti a. Tin, Ziba chuan lal hnenah,""Ngai teh, Jerusalem-ah a awm: 'Vawiina hian Israel-hote chuan ka pa ram min le leh dawn,' a ti nghe nghe a sin,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:4 Tin, lal chuan Ziba hnena chuan, ""Ngai teh, Mephibosetha thil neih zawng awng chu i ta vek a ni ta,"" a ti a. Tin, Ziba chuan,""Chibai ka buk tak zet che a ni; aw lalpa, ka pu, i mittlun zel ka tum ang e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:5 Tin, lal Davida'n Bahurim a thlen chuan ngai teh, Saula chhungte zinga mi Gera fapa a hming Simeia a lo chhuak a: anche lawnh chung zelin a lo chhuak a." 
2Samuel16:6 Davida chu lungin a deng a, lal Davida chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte pawh: tinmipui zawng zawng leh sipai huaisen zawng zawngte chu a ding lamah leh a vei lamah an awm a." 
2Samuel16:7 Tin, Simeian anchhe lawh chungin heti hian a ti a, ""Kal bo daih rawh, kal bo daih rawh, nang thisen chhuah hmang leh Beliala mihringpa." 
2Samuel16:8 A rorel ai i rel tak Saula chhungte thisen chu LALPA'n i chungah a rawn lettir ta a; tin, LALPA chuan a ram chu i fapa Absaloma a lo pe tawh a; tin, ngai teh, thisen chauh hmang mi i nih avangin nangmaha pawi i inkhawih chawp a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:9 Chutichuan Zeruia fapa Abisaia chuan lal hnenah, ""Engati nge he ui thisawn hian lalpa ka pu chu anchhia a lawh mai mai? A lu ka va tan teh mai ang aw?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:10 Tin, lal chuan, "" nangni Zeruia fapate u, nangni hian mi lo hriatsak tur eng nge awm? LALPA'n a hnena, 'Davida anchhia lawh rawh,' a tih si chuan lawh mai ang hmiang, 'Engati nge chutiang i tih?' Tuin nge ti tehlul ang?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:11 Tin, Davida chuan Abisaia leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh u, ka fapa, ka rila rah ngei chuan min thah a tum a ni a; he Benjamin mi hian a va tum nasa lehzual dawn em? Engmah tih su u la, anchhia chu lawh mai rawh se; LALPA tihtir ani sia." 
2Samuel16:12 LALPA chuan ka hreawmzia hi a rawn hmu ang a, LALPA chuan vawiina anchhe min lawh hi a tha laminmin rul leh mai pawh ani thei e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:13 Chutichuan Davida leh amite chu kawngah chuan an kal ta zel a: tin, Simeia chu a n ral tlang pangah chuan a kal zel a, a kal pah chuan anchhia a lawh zel a, lungtein a deng a, vaivuttein a theh a." 
2Samuel16:14 Tin, lal leh a hnena mi awm zawng zawngte chuan Aiphim an thleng a; tichuan chutah chuan a chawl hahdam a." 
2Samuel16:15 Tin, Absaloma lehmipui zawng zawng Israel mite chu Jerusalem-ah an kal a, tin, a hnenah Ahothophela pawha tel a." 
2Samuel16:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ark mi Husaia, Davida thian chuan Absaloma hnen a thlenin Husaia chuan Absaloma hnenah, ""Pathianin lalber humhim raw se, Pathianin lalber humhim rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:17 Tin, Absaloma chuan Husaia hnenah, ""Hetiang hi ani maw i thian i khawngaihna dan chu? Engati nge i thian hnena i kal loh?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:18 Tin, Husaia chuan Absaloma hnenah, ""Ka kal lo ang; LALPA leh he'ng mipuite leh Israel mi zawng zawngin an thlana thu thuin ka awm ang a, a hnenah ka awm zawk ang." 
2Samuel16:19 Tin, tu rawng nge ka bawl ang? A fapa hmaah rawng ka bawl tur ani lo'm ni? I pa hmaa rawng ka bawl ang khani i hmaah ka bawl ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:20 Chutichuan Absaloma chuan Aothophela hnenah, ""Engtin nge ka tih ang i ngaih dan sawi the khai,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:21 Tin, Ahithophela chuan Absaloma hnenah, ""I pa hmei, in nghaka a dahte hnenah va lut rawh; tin, Israel mi zawng zawngin i pain a lungten che tih an lo hria ang a; tichuan i lama tangte zawng zawng kut a chak dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel16:22 Chutichuanin chungah Absaloma tan puan in an zar a; tichuanIsrael mite zawng zawng mithmuhah a pa hmeite hnenah chuan a lut a.Chung laia rem a ruat, Ahithophela remruatte chu, Pathian thu ngaih anga ngaih a ni thin a: chutiang bawk chuan Ahothophelan Davida leh Absaloma rem a ruatpui zawng zawngte chu ngaih a ni thin." 
2Samuel16:23 Chung laia rem a ruat, Ahithophela remruatte chu, Pathian thu ngaih anga ngaih a ni thin a: chutiang bawk chuan Ahothophelan Davida leh Absaloma rem a ruatpui zawng zawngte chu ngaih a ni thin." 
2Samuel17:1 Tin, chung lo pawh chu Absaloma hnenah Ahithophela chuan, ""Mi singkhat leh sanghnih ka thlang chuak ang a, tin, zaninah ian Davida umin ka thawk ang e:" 
2Samuel17:2 a chau lai leh a chak loh lai tak ka va nangching ang a, ka va tihlau ang e: tichuan a hnena mi awm zawng zawng chu an tlan bo ang a, tichuan lal chauh chu ka va that mai ang e:" 
2Samuel17:3 tin, mipuite chu i hnenah ka rawn hruai kir vek ang: i mi zawna chu mi zawng zawng lo kir tluk a ni, chutichuanmi zawng awng inremin an awm ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel17:4 Tichuan chu mi thu chuan Absaloma leh Israel upaho zawng zawngte chu a tilawm ta hle a. 
2Samuel17:5 Chutichuan Absaloma chuan, ""Ark mi Husaia chu ko ve phawt u la, a sawi ve dan i lo ngaithla teh ang u,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel17:6 Tin, Husaian Absaloma hnen a lo thlen chuan Absaloma chuan, ""Ahithophela chuan hetiang hian a sawi a, a sawi ang hian kan ti daw em ni ang? Ti dawn lo i la nangin han sawi ve teh khai,"" tiin a lo bia a." 
2Samuel17:7 Tin, Husaia chuan Absaloma hnenah, ""Tun tuma Ahitophela remruat hi a tha lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel17:8 Tin, Husaia chuan, ""I pa leh a mite chu i ria a, sipai huai ta, mi kawlhsen tak, phula savawm, a no laksak ang mai an ni a: tin, i pa chu indo mi a ni a, mipui zingah a riak kher lo ang." 
2Samuel17:9 Ngai teh, tunah pawh khawii lai khuarkhurumah emaw, kawii hmunah emaw a biru reng a ni ang: tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an inbeih tirhah mi thenkhat an tluk nual chuan a hria apiangin, 'Absaloma zuitute chu an that chiam mai,' an ti mai ang a." 
2Samuel17:10 Tichuan mi huaisen tak, sakeibaknei rilru ang pu mi meu pawh a lo zam hle mai ang a; Israel mi zawng zawng lah chuan i pa chu sipai huai tak anih leh a hnena mi awmte chu mi huaisen tak tak an ih an hre vek si a." 
2Samuel17:11 Keia remruat ve dan chu, Israel mite zawng zawng chu Dan atangin Beer-seba thleng rawkin tuifinriata tiau zat zetin i hnenah ko khawm vek i la, tin, indonaah chuan nangmah meuh kal ve la." 
2Samuel17:12 Chutichuan khawii hmunah pawh kan tawn fuhna apiangah leia dai tla ang maiin kan bawh ang a; tin, amah leh a hnena mi awm zawng zawngte chu pakhat mah kan zuah lo ang." 
2Samuel17:13 Chu loah pawh,khuaah a luh chuan Israel mi zawng zawng, hruizen kengin chu mi khuaah chuan kan va kal ang a, lung te tak te pawh awm hauh lo khawpinluiah kan hnuk thla vek ang,"" a ti leh nghal bawk a." 
2Samuel17:14 Tichuan Absaloma leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chuan, ""Ark mi Husaia remruat chu Ahithophela remruat ai chuan a tha zawk,"" an ti ta a. LALPA chuan Absaloma chungah chuan thil tha lo a thlentir theihna'n LALPA chuan Ahithophela remruat tha tak chu letthla turin a lo ruat tawh reng a ni." 
2Samuel17:15 Chutichuan Husaia chuan puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara hnenah, ""Chutiang khatiang chuan Ahithopela chuan Absaloma leh Israel upate rem a ruatsak a; tin, keiin chutiang khatiang chuan rem ka ruat a." 
2Samuel17:16 Chuvangin, 'Zanin chu thlalera lui kaiahte riak tawh loin kan ngei ngei rawh; chutilo chuan lal leh a hnena awm zawng zawngte chu an tiboral vek dah ang e,' tiin Davida hrilhtir thuai raw u khai,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel17:17 Jonathana leh Ahimaaza chu En-rogel-ah an awm a; bawihnu pakhat hian anni chu a va hrilh thin a; tin, anni chuan lal Davida chu an va rilh leh chhawng thin a: khawpuia an lut chu tuma hmu loh tur a ni a." 
2Samuel17:18 Nimahsela naupangina lo hmu a, Absaloma a hrilh a; tichuan an pahnihin an tlan bo ta thuai a, Bahurim-a mi pakhat a tuala tuichhunchhuah nei inah an va kal a, tuichhunchhuahah chuan an lut ta a." 
2Samuel17:19 Tin, hmeichhiain tuichhunchhuah chhinnain a chhin a, a chungah chuan bu a pho a, tuma hriat theih a ni lo." 
2Samuel17:20 Tin, Absaloma chhiahhlawhte hu ina hmeiche hnena chuan an va kal a; ""Ahimaaza leh Jonathana te kha khawiah nge?"" an ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan an hnenah, ""Lui an kan tawh ang,"" a lo ti a. Tin, an va zawng a, an hmu lo a, Jerusalem-ah an kir leh ta a." 
2Samuel17:21 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an kal liam hnu chuan tuichunchhuah ata chu an lo chhuak a, lal Davida chu an va hrilh a; Davida hnenah chuan, ""Chhuak u la,lui chu kan thuai rawh u; hetiang hian Ahithophela chuan a phiar che u a ni,"" an ti a." 
2Samuel17:22 Chutichuan Davida leh a hnena mi awm zawng zawng chu an chuak a, Jrodan lui an kan a; khua a lo var chuan pakhat mah Jordan lui kan lo an awm lo." 
2Samuel17:23 Tin, Ahithophelan a remruat ang chu an zawm lo tih ahriatin a sabengtung chu a thuam a, a chuak a, a khaw lama a haw a, a chhungte khawsan dan tur a ruatsak diam a, a inawkhlum ta a; tichuan, a thi a, a pa thlanah an phum ta a." 
2Samuel17:24 Chutichuan Davida chuan Mahanaim a va thleng a. Tin, Absaloma chuan a hnena Israel mi zawng zawngte nen Jordan lui an kan a." 
2Samuel17:25 Tin, Absaloma chuan Joaba aiah Amasa chu sipaite hotuah a dah a. Amasa chu, mi pakhat a hming Ithra, Israel mi Joaba nu Zeruii laizawn Nahasi fanu Abigaili pawltu fapa a ni a." 
2Samuel17:26 Tin, Israel mite leh Absaloma chuan Gilead ramah tanhmun an va khuar a." 
2Samuel17:27 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Davida'n Mahanaim athle chuan Amona thlah Raba khuaa mi Nahasi fapa Sobia te, Lodebar khuaa mi Amiela fapa Makira te, Regelim khuaaGilead mi Barzilaia te chuan,""Mipuite chu thlalerah chuan an riltamin an chauin, an tuihal taw em em a ni,"" an tih avanga khum te, maihun te, hlum bel te, buh te, barli te, chhangphut te, vai te, be te, dailuah te, be kan ro te, khawizu te, bawnghnute khal te, beram leh bawnghnute khal ui e, Davida leh a hnena mi awmte ei turin an rawn keng a." 
2Samuel17:28 Mipuite chu thlalerah chuan an riltamin an chauin, an tuihal taw em em a ni,"" an tih avanga khum te, maihun te, hlum bel te, buh te, barli te, chhangphut te, vai te, be te, dailuah te, be kan ro te, khawizu te, bawnghnute khal te, beram leh bawnghnute khal ui e, Davida leh a hnena mi awmte ei turin an rawn keng a." 
2Samuel18:1 Tin, Davida chuan a hnena mi awmte chu a chhiar a, sipai sang chunga hotute, za chunga hotute a siam a." 
2Samuel18:2 Tin, Davida chuan mite chu a tir chhuak a, hmun thuma thena hmun khat chu Joaban a ho a, tin, hmun thuma thena hmun khat chu Joaba unaupa Zeruia fapa, Abisaian a ho a, tin, hmun thuma thena hmun khat chu Git mi Itaian aho a. Tin, lal chuan mipui hnenah, ""Keima ngei pawh in hnena ka kal ve ngei ngei ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:3 Nimahsela mipuite chuan, ""Kal ve lo e; keiniho hi chu tlan bo ta pawh ni i la, pawi an ti lo ang a; tin, a chanve lai pawh hi va thi mah i la, pawi an ti hek lo ang: nang chu keiniho sing tlukin i hlu si a; chuvangin khawpui atanga min tanpui tura inpeih renga i lo awm chu a tha zawk a ni,"" an ti a." 
2Samuel18:4 Tin, lal chuan an hnenah, ""Tha in tih ang apiang chuan ka ti ang,"" a ti a. Chutichuan lal chu kulh kawngka bulah chuan a ding a, tin, mipui zawng zawng chu za tel tel leh sang tel telin an chuak ta zut zut mai a." 
2Samuel18:5 Tin, lal chuan Joaba leh Abisaia leh Itaia chu, ""Keimah vangin, tlangval Absaloma chu dim takin va ti ang che u,"" tiin thu a pe a. Mipui zawng zawngin Absaloma chungchang thua lalin sipai hotute zawng zawng thu apek lai chu an hria a." 
2Samuel18:6 Chutichuan mipuite chu Israel mite do turin indona hmun lamah chuan an kal ta a: tin, an indona chu ephraim ram ngaw a ni a." 
2Samuel18:7 Tin, chutah chuan Davida mite hmaah chuan Israel mite chu an tlawm ta a. tin, chuta chuan chu mi ni chuan mi singhni zet an that a." 
2Samuel18:8 An indona chuan chu mi lai ram zawng zawng chu a huam vek mai si a; chu mi ni chuan khandaih ai mahin ram ngawin a lem hnem zawk a ni. 
2Samuel18:9 Tin, Absaloma chuan Davida mite chu a va tawk ta thut a. Tin, Absaloma chu a sabengtung chunga a chuang a, tin, sabengtung chu sasaw thing zar buk tak hnuaiah a lut a, a lu chu sasaw thingah chuan a tang ta a, lei si lo, van si loin a uai ta reng mai a; tin sabengtung chu a tlan ta zel a." 
2Samuel18:10 Tin, tuin emaw hian a hmu a, Joaba a hrilh a, ""Ngai teh, sasaw thingah Absaloma inkhai reng ka hmu,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:11 Tin, Joaba chuan a hrilhtu hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh, chu chu i hmu si a, engati nge i tihhluma leiah i tihthlak nghal loh? Chutiang chuan ti la chu tangka sawm leh kawnghren ka pe tur che a,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:12 Tin, mi chuan Joaba hnenah, ""Tangka sang pawh hmu dawn mah i la, lal fapa chunga ka kut ka thlak lo reng reng ang; ka beng riat ngeiah lalin nang leh Abisaia leh Itaia hnenah, 'tlangval Absaloma chu tumahin khawih hlek suh se,' tiin thu ape si che u a." 
2Samuel18:13 Rinawm loh thlak takin lo that ta ringawt mai ang i la, (lal lakah chuan engmah thup theih ani awm si lo va) nang chu i inthiarfihlim leh mai awm si a,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:14 Chutichuan Joaba chuan, ""Hetiang chuan i kianga ka awm reng thei tawp lo mai,"" a ti a, fei pathum a keng a, sasaw thing zinga dama lo la awm Absaloma thinhnun takah chuan a chhun a." 
2Samuel18:15 Tin, Joaba ralthuam kengtu talngval sawm chuan an rawn hual a, Absaloma chu an chhun a, an that ta a." 
2Samuel18:16 Tin, Joaba chuan tawtawrawt a ham a, Israel ho umtu mipuite chu an lo kir ta a: Joaba chuan mipuite chu a dang ta tlat mai a." 
2Samuel18:17 Tin, Absaloma ruang chu a la a, ngawah khuarkhuruk thuk takah chuan an paih a, a chungah chuan lung an tiang khawm thur a; tin, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu mahni puan in teuvah an tlan haw ta a." 
2Samuel18:18 Absaloma chuan a dam laiin lal ruama lung tian alo tiang tawh diam a; Ka hming daih lohna turin fapa pawh ka nei si lo a,"" a ti a. Chu mi lung tian hmingah chuan ama hming a puttir a; tun thlengin Absaloma hriatrengna tih a ni." 
2Samuel18:19 Chutichuan Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza chuan, ""Ka va tlan ang a, LALPA'n a hmelma phuba a laksak dan chanchin hi lal chu ka va hrilh ang e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:20 Tin, Joaba chuan a hnenah, ""Vawiinah zawng chanchin chu va la hrilh suh, ni dangah chanchin chu la hrilh zawk ang che, lal fapa chu a thih atak avangi, vawiinah zawng chanchin engmah va hrilh suh ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:21 Tichuan Joaba chuan Kus mi hnenah chuan, ""Kal la, i thil hmuh ve hrilh rawh le,"" a ti a. Tin, Kus mi chuan Joaba chu kunin chibai a buk a tlan ta a." 
2Samuel18:22 Chutichuan Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza chuan Joaba hnenah,""Engpawh ni se la, Kus mi kha ka va um ta'ng e,"" a ti leh a. Tin, Joaba chuan, ""Ka fapa, chanchin hrilh man i hmu dawn si lo a, engah nge i tlan ang?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:23 Nimahsela ani chuan, ""Engpawh ni se la ka tlana ng e,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Tlan mai rawh le,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Ahimaaza chu phaizawl lam kawngah a tlan a, Kus mi chu a lehpel a." 
2Samuel18:24 Tichuan Davida chu kulh kawngka chhawng inkarah chuan a lo thu a: tin, ralvengtu chu kulh kawngka pawnta zawk chung lamah chuan a chho a, a han hawi vel ruai ruai a, tin, ngai teh, mi pakhat amah chauhin a lo tlan a." 
2Samuel18:25 Tin, vralvengtu chu a au a, lal chu a hrilh a. Tin, lal chuan, ""Mi pakhat mai ani h chuan chanchin rawn sawi tur a nei a ni ang,"" a ti a. Tin, a lo kal thuai thuai a, a lo hnai ta telh telh a." 
2Samuel18:26 Tin, ralvengtu chuan mi dang lo tlan a hmu leh a: tin, ralvengtu chuan kawngkar vengtu a au a, ""Ngai teh, mi dang amah chauhin a lo tlan leh e,"" a tia. Tin, lal chuan, ""Ani pawh chuan chanchin a rawn thlen ve dawn a nih chu,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:27 Tin, ralvengtu chuan, ""A hmasa zawka tlan danc hu Zadoka fapa Ahmiaaza tlan dan ng hlein ka hria,"" at ia. Tin, lal chuan, ""Ani chu mi tha tak a ni a, chanchin tha a rawn thlen dawn ani ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:28 Tin, Ahimaaza chuan a au a, lal hnenah, ""A fel vek e,"" a ti a. Tin, a maia lei siin lal hmaah chuan chibai bukin a kun a,""Lalpa, ka pu beih tuma kut thlak tumtute dangchattu LALPA i Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:29 Tin, lal chuan, ""tlangval Absaloma chu a dam alawm maw?"" a ti a. Tin, Ahimaaza chuan a chhang a, ""Joaban lal chhiahlawh, kei i chiahlawh ngei hi min tirh chhuah laiin an buai mur mur ka hmu a, nimahsela eng nge ni tih erawh chu ka hre lo,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:30 Tin, lal chuan, ""Ka sirah hian lo ding rih rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, a sirah a lo ding a." 
2Samuel18:31 Tin, ngai teh, Kus mi chu a lo thleng a; tin, ""Kus mi chuan, ""Lalpa ka pu tan chanchin ka rawn thlen e' i chunga helho zawng zawng phuba chu vawiinah hian LALPA'n a laksak ta che a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:32 Tin, lal chuan Kus mi hnenah chuan, ""tlangval Absaloma chu a dam a lawm maw? a ti a. Tin, Kus mi chuan a chhang a, ""Lalpa ka pu hmelmate leh i chiatna zawngtute zawng zawng chu chu tlangval ang chuan awm vek rawh se,"" a ti a.Chutichuan lal chu a mangang ta hle mai a, kulh kawngka chunga pindanah chuan a chho a, a tap a: tin, a chhoh pah chuan, ""Aw, ka fapa Absalom, ka fapa, ka fapa Absalom, i aiah han thi teh zawk i la aw, aw Absalom, ka fapa, ka fapa!"" a ti a." 
2Samuel18:33 Chutichuan lal chu a mangang ta hle mai a, kulh kawngka chunga pindanah chuan a chho a, a tap a: tin, a chhoh pah chuan, ""Aw, ka fapa Absalom, ka fapa, ka fapa Absalom, i aiah han thi teh zawk i la aw, aw Absalom, ka fapa, ka fapa!"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:1 Chutichuan Joaba chu an hrilh a, ""Ngai teh, lal chuan Absaloma chu a tah a, a sun e a,"" an ti a." 
2Samuel19:2 Tichuan chu mi nia an hnehna chu mi zawng zawng tan sunna a lo ni ta zawk a: Lal chu a fapa avang chuan a lungngai em em mai,"" an tih chu chu mi ni chuan mipite chuan an lo hre ta si a." 
2Samuel19:3 Tin, mipuite chu indonaa mi an tlan bo an za avanga a ruka an kal bo angin chu mi ni chuan a rukin khawpuiah an lut a." 
2Samuel19:4 Tin, lal chuan a hmai ahup a, ""Aw ka fapa Absalom, aw Absalom, ka fapa, ka fapa!"" tiin lal chu a tap hawm hawm a." 
2Samuel19:5 Tin, Joaba chu inah lal hnenah chuan a lut a, ""I nunna te, i fapate leh i fanute nunna leh i nupuite leh i hmeite nunna chanhimtute chu vawiinah hian zak takin i siam tak hi;" 
2Samuel19:6 nangmah hawtute ch i hmangaih a,nangma hmangiahtute i huat tlat maiah hian. Hotute leh sipaite chu i tan engmah ni lo angin vawiinah hian i tilang ta a: Absaloma chu dam se la, keini zawng zawng hi vawiinah hian thi ta vek zawk ni ila, chu chu i lawmzawng tak ni awmin vawiinah ka hria a ni." 
2Samuel19:7 Chuvangin tho la, chhuak mai rawh, i mite tilungawizawng takin thu sawi rawh: i chauh loh chuan LALPA chalin chia ka cham a ni, mi pakhat mah zaninah hian i hnenah awm an awm lo ang: tin, chu chu i tan i tleirawl ata tun thlenga i chunga thil tha lo lo tleng zawng zawng ai mahin a tha lo zawk ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:8 Chutichuan lal chu a tho a, kulh kawngkaah chuan a thu a, ""Ngai teh u, lalc hu kulh kawngkaah chuan a thu e,"" tiin mipui zawng zawng chu an hrilh a: tin, mipui zawng zawng chu lal hmaah chuan an va kal ta a. Israel-ho erawh chu mahni puan in theuhvah an tlan haw ta a." 
2Samuel19:9 Lal chuan kan hmelmate kut ata min chan chhuak a, Philistia mite kut ata min chhandam ta a; tin, tuna hian he ram atang hian Absaloma chua tlan chauhsan a." 
2Samuel19:10 Tin, Absaloma kan lal atana hriak kan tiha chu indonaa a thi ta si a. engati nge ll chu kamkat maha koh kir zai in rel loh?"" tiin Israel mite zawng zawng chu an inhnial ta mur mur mai a." 
2Samuel19:11 Chutichuan lal Davida chuan puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara hnenah chuan, ""Juda upate hnenah chuan, ""Engati nge lal chu a in lamah hruai kir thuah a zawiawi berah i tan? Israel miten lal hruai kir thu an sawi chu lal hnen a thleng tawh si a." 
2Samuel19:12 Ka unaute inni a, ka thisen zawmpui in ni si a, Engati nge ni a zawiawi bera in tan chu ni ngai le? Tiin sawi rawh u." 
2Samuel19:13 Tin, Amasa hnenah, 'Ka thisen zawmpui i ni lo'm ni? Joaba aiah ka hmaa sipaite hotua ka siam loa ka siam loh che chuan, Pathianina tih tihin min ti mai se la, chu aia nasa pawhin,' a ti e, va ti rawh u,"" tiin mi a tir a." 
2Samuel19:14 Chutichuan Juda mite zawng zawng rilru chu mi pakhat rilru ang maiina tithle ta dual a; tichuan lal hnenah, ""I mite zawng zawng nen khan lo haw leh rawh u,"" ti turin mi an tir a." 
2Samuel19:15 Chutichuan lal chu a haw leh a, Jordan a va thleng a. tin, Judate chu lal lo hmuak a, lal chu Jordan-a lo hruai kai turin Gilgal-ah an kal a." 
2Samuel19:16 Tin, Bahurim khuaa mi Benjamin mi Gera fapa Simeia chu hmanhmawh takin lal Davida hmuak turin Juda-hote rualin a chuk ve a." 
2Samuel19:17 Tin, a hnenah Benjamin mi sang nen, Saula chhungte chhiahlawh Ziba, a fapa sawm leh panga leh a chiahlawh sawmhnih nen an tel ve a; tin, lal mithmuhah chuan Jordan an kan hmawk hmawk a." 
2Samuel19:18 Tin, lal chhungte hruai kaina'n leh tha a ti ang apianga a tih atan lawng an kal kaipui a. Tin, Jordan lui a han kai chuan Gera fapa Simeia chu lal hmaa chuan a bawkkhup a." 
2Samuel19:19 Tin, lal hnenah chuan, ""Ka pu chuan khawlohna neiah mi ruat lo hram se la, LALPA ka puin Jerusalem a chauhsan nia i chhiahhlawhin dik lo taka a lo tih takte chu hre reng hek suh se la, lal chuan rilruah pai su se." 
2Samuel19:20 I chhiahlawh hian thil ka tisual tih ka inhria a; chuvangin ngai teh, Josefa chhung zawng zawngte zinga ka pu LALPA chu hmuak tura vawiinah hian a lo chhuk hmasa bera ka ni nghe nghe a sin,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:21 Nimahsela Zeruia fapa Abisaia chuan a chang a, ""LALPA hriak thiha chu anchhia a lawh avangin Simeia hi tihhlum tur ani dawn lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:22 Tin, Davida chuan, ""Nangni Zeruia fapate u, nangni hian mi lo hriatsak tur eng nge awm? Vawiina hian mi dotute in ni lawmni? Vawiinah hian Israel zinga mi reng reng tihhlum tur em ni? Vawiinah hian Israel mite chungah lal ka ni hi ka hre lo em ni?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:23 Tin lal chuan Simeia hnenah chuan, ""I thi tawp lo ang,"" a ti a. Lal chuan a hnenah chhia a chham a." 
2Samuel19:24 Tin, Saula fapa Mephibosetha chu lal hmuak turin a lo chhuak a; lala kal chhuah ni atanga ralmuanga a lo haw leh ni thleng chuan a kete chu a chei lo a, a khabe hmul a chep rual lo a, a puante pawh a su hek lo." 
2Samuel19:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal hmuak tura Jerusalem-a a kal chu lalin a hnenah, ""Mephiboseth, engati nge ka hnenah i kal ve loh?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:26 Tin, ani chuan a chang a, ""Aw lalpa, ka pu, ka chiahlawhin min bum a ni: i chhiahlawh chuan, 'Lal hnena kal tura ka chuanna'n sabengtung ka thuam ang e,' ka ti a; i chiahhlawh hi a ke a bai si a." 
2Samuel19:27 Tin, lalpa ka pu hnenah chuan i chiahhlawh hi ahek a; nimahsela lalpa ka pu chu Pathian vantirhko ang a ni a: chuvangin tha i tih ang angin ti ang che." 
2Samuel19:28 Ka pa chhungte zawng zawng chu lalpa ka pu maa chuan tihhlum vek awm an ni ngei a; mahse i chhiahlawh hi i chaw kilpuite zinga i teltir a. Chuvangin lal hnena hian thil dang phut ngam awm ka la ni cheu vem ni? a ti a. 
2Samuel19:29 Tin, lal chuan a hnenah, ""I chungchang thu hi engah nge i sawi leh thin? 'Nang leh Ziba chuan ram chu insem rawh u,' ka ti e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:30 Tin, Mephibosetha chuan lal hnenah, ""E, amahin nei vek rawh se, lalpa ka pu chu ama inah ralmuangin a lo thleng ta si a,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:31 Tin, Gilea mi Barzilaia chu Rogelam atangin a lo chhuk a; lal chu Jordan-a hruai kai turin a hnena Jordan a ai ve a." 
2Samuel19:32 Barzilaia chu upa tak a ni a, kum sawmriat mi zeta ni a, Mahanaim-a lal awm chung khan ei turte a lo tum a; mi neinung taka ni a." 
2Samuel19:33 Tin, lal chuan Barzilaia hnena chua, ""Ka hnenah kai ve la, ka hnena Jerusalem-ah ka chawm ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:34 Tin, Barzilaia chuan lal hnenah, ""Eng chen la dam tur nge ka nih a, Jerusalema lal hnena ka han choh vena tur chu?" 
2Samuel19:35 Tunah hian kum sawmriat ka ni a; a chhia leha tha pawh thlei thei em ka nih? I chhiahlawh hian ka thil ei leh inte hi a tui leh tui loh pawh ka hre thei tawh em ni? Mipa leh hmeichheho hla sak ri pawh ka hre thei tawh em ni? Chuvangin i chiahhlawh hi eng atan nge lalpa ka pu tan phurrit ka ni mai ang? 
2Samuel19:36 I chhiahlawhhian lal hnenah Jordan kai ve chauh ka tum a ni; engah nge lal chuan chutianga that man min rulh ve thung kher ang? 
2Samuel19:37 Khawngaih takin, i chiahlawh hi min hawntir leh mai la, ka nu leh ka pa thlan awmna keimahni khua ngeiah ka thi ang e. Amaherawhchu en teh, i chhiahhlawh Chimhama hi; lalpa ka pu hnenah kaisela, a chunga tha i tih ang apiangin ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:38 Tin, lal chuan a chang a, ""Chimhama chu ka hnenah a kai ve ang a, tha i tih ang zelin a chungah ka ti ang: tin, thil engpawh mi dil apiang chu ka tihsak zel ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel19:39 Tinmipui zawng zawngte chu Jordan ral an kai a, tin, lal pawh chu a kai ve a: tin, lal chuan Barzilaia chu a fawp a, mal a sawm a; tin, ama hmun lamah a haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel19:40 Chutichuan lal chu Gilgal-ah a kai a, Chimhama chu a hnenah chan a kai ve a: tin, Juda mi zawng zawng chuan lal chu an hruai kai a, Israel mi paw a chanve an tel a." 
2Samuel19:41 Tin, ngai teh, Israel mi zawng zawng chu lal hnenah an lo kal a, lal hnenah chuan, ""Engati nge kan unau Juda mite hian an chan bik chia, lal le a chhungte leh Davida mi zawng zawngte paw Jrodan rala an hruai tel vek mai?"" an ti a." 
2Samuel19:42 Tin, Juda mi zawng zawngte chuan Israel mite chu an chang a, ""Lal chu kan lamhnai a nih avang a ni: engati nge he mi thuah hian in thinrim mai? Lal neih ringa awm em kan nih tehlul? Thil pek eng emaw e pawh min nei em ni?"" an ti a.Tin, Israel mite chuan Juda mite chu an chang a, ""lalah hian chan zawm kan nei a, Davida-ah chuan nangni aiin chhut theih zawk kan ni a sin; engati nge min ngaihnep mai, lal hruai kir thu hi rawt hmasatu kan ni lawm ni kha?"" an ti a.Chutichuan Juda mite thu chu Israel mite thu ai chuan a rum a zawk a." 
2Samuel19:43 Tin, Israel mite chuan Juda mite chu an chang a, ""lalah hian chan zawm kan nei a, Davida-ah chuan nangni aiin chhut theih zawk kan ni a sin; engati nge min ngaihnep mai, lal hruai kir thu hi rawt hmasatu kan ni lawm ni kha?"" an ti a.Chutichuan Juda mite thu chu Israel mite thu ai chuan a rum a zawk a." 
2Samuel20:1 Tin, chutah chuan Benjamin mi, Bikria fapa a hming Seba, Beliala mi pakhat a lo awm hlau mai mai a: tawtawrawt a ham a, ""Davida-ah hian chanvo kanei lo a, Jesaia fapaah hian roluah tur ka nei hek lo: aw Israel mite u, in puan in lam theuhvah haw rawh u,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel20:2 Chutichan Israel mi zawng zawngin Davida an zui chu an let chhohsan a, Bikria fapa Seba chu an zui ta a; Juda mite eraw chuan Jordan atangin Jerusalem thlengin an lal chu an vuan ta tlat a." 
2Samuel20:3 Chutichuan Davida chuan Jerusalem a a in chu a thleng a; tin, lal chuan hmeiche sawm a hmeite in nghak atana a dahte chu a hruai a, a khung a, an ei tur a tum a, nimahsela anhnenah a lut lo a. Tichuan an thih ni thlenga khunga awmin hmeithaiin an awm ta a." 
2Samuel20:4 Chutichuan lal chuan Amasa hnenah, ""Ni thum chhungin Juda mite min koh khawmsak la, tin, nang pawh lo awm ve ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel20:5 Chutichuan Amasa chu Juda mite ko khawm turin a kal ta a; amaherawhchu a hun ruatsak aiin a va thang rei ta a. 
2Samuel20:6 Tichuan Davida'n Aisaia hnenah chuan, ""Bikria fapa Seba hian Absaloma ai mahin kan pawi a khawih dawn alawm le: i pu mite hruai la, um rawh u khai; chutilochuan khaw kulh neiahte a lut hman ang a, kan hmu phak loah kan chauh mai dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel20:7 Tichuan Joaba-ho te, Keret mi te, Pelet mite leh an mi chak zawng zawngte chuan amah an zui chhuak ta a: Jerusalem atang chuan Bikria fapa Seba um tur chuan anchuak ta a." 
2Samuel20:8 Gideon-a lungui awmna an va thlen chuan Amasa chuan anmahni chu a lo hmuak a. Tin, Joaba chuan indona thuamhnaw a inbel a, tin, a chungah chuan khandaih a pai chawpin kawnghrenah a pai a, tin, a kal zawngin a dawk chhuak a." 
2Samuel20:9 Tin, Joaba chuan Amasa hnenah chuan, ""Unaupa, i tha rih alawm maw?"" a ti a. Tin, Joaba chuan Amasa fawh tumin a khabe hmul chu a kut ding lamin a chelh a." 
2Samuel20:10 Nimahsela Amasa chuan Joaban khandaih a ken chu a ngaihsak lo va: chutichuan apumah chuan a vit a, a rilte chu a titla nuai mai a, a vit nawn leh ta lo a; tichuan a thi ta a. Tichuan Joaba leh auaupa Abisaia chuan Bikria fapa Seba chu an um ta a." 
2Samuel20:11 Tin, a kianga Joaahote zinga tlangval pakhat chu a ding a, ""Joaba lama tang leh Davida lam lama tang apiang chuan Joaba zui zel rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel20:12 Tin, Amasa chu lamlian lai takah a thiin a lo bual nuaih mai a. Tin, chu mi chuan mi zawng zawng ding renga a hmuh chuan Amasa ruang hu lamlian ata phul lamah sawnin puanin akhuh a, akianga lo kal apiang an ding zela a hmuh avangin." 
2Samuel20:13 Tin, lamlian ata dah sawn a nih hnu chuan Bikria fapa Seba um turin mi zawng zawgin Joaba chu an zui ta a." 
2Samuel20:14 Seba chuan Abel thleng leh Bethmaaka thlengin Israel-ho ram chu a tlawh vek a, Ber mite pawh a tlawh a; tichuan mite chu an pung khawm a, amah an zui ve ta a." 
2Samuel20:15 Beth-maaka-ah chuan an rawn hual a; tin, a khaw hrulah lei an tiang pawng a, kulh hrulah chuan an ding a; tin, Joaba hnena mi awm zawng zawngte chuan tichim turin kulh chuan chhu bur bur a." 
2Samuel20:16 Chutichuan hmeiche fing pakhat khua atang chuan a lo au a, ""Khai kai; Joaba hnenah, 'Lo kal hnai rawh, i hnenah thu ka lo sawi teh ang,' a ti, han ti rawh u khai,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel20:17 Tin, a hnenah chuan a va kal hnai a; tin, hmeichhia chuan, ""Joaba i ni em?"" a ti a. ""Ni e,"" a ti a, a chhang a. Chutichuan ahnenah, ""I bawihnu thusawi hi ngaithla teh,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Ka ngaithla e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel20:18 Chutichuan, ""Hmanlai chuan, ""Abel khuaah hian an inrawn phawt ang,' an ti thin a; chutiang chuan thu an titawp thin." 
2Samuel20:19 Kei hi Israel zinga inrem duh leh rinawm pawla mi ka ni a: nang chuan Israel khua, a khaw bulpui hi tihchhiat i tum a nih hi; LALPA ro chu engah nge tihmang i tum?"" tiina sawi a." 
2Samuel20:20 Tin, Joaba chan a chang a, ""Chutang ani awzawng lo v, tihmang ew, tihchhiat emaw ka tum lo reng reng e." 
2Samuel20:21 Chutiang lam thu chu a ni lo e: Ephraim tlang rama mi Bikria fapa ahming Seba chuan lal dodalin, Dvida ngei dodalina kut a lek a; ama chu min pe mai u la, khua chu ka chauhsan mai ang e,"" a ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan Joaba hnenah, ""Ngai teh, a lu chu kulhah kan rawn paih liamsak ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel20:22 zawngte zingah chuan a kal a. Tin, Bikria fapa Seba lu chu an tan a. Joaba hnen lamah chuan an thehchhuak a. Tin, tawtawrawt a ham a, mahni puan in lam theuhvah khua ata chu an darh ta a. Tin, Joaba chu Jerusalemah lal hnenah chuan a haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel20:23 Joaba chu Israel sipai zawng zawng hotu a ni a; tin, Jeoada fapa Benaia chu Keret mi leh Pelet mite hotu a ni a:" 
2Samuel20:24 tin, Adorama chu hnathawka rawih luihte hotu a ni a; tin, Ahiluda fapa Jehosaphata chu chanchin ziaktu a ni a;" 
2Samuel20:25 tin, Seva chu lehkha ziaktu a ni a; tin, Zadoka leh Abiathara chu Puithiam an ni a:tin, Jair mi Ira pawh chu Davida puithiam a ni a." 
2Samuel20:26 tin, Jair mi Ira pawh chu Davida puithiam a ni a." 
2Samuel21:1 Tin, Davida dam laiin a kum zawngin kum thum tam a tla a; tin, Davida chuan LALPA chu a rawn a, Tin, LALPA chuan, ""Saula avang leh a chhungte, thisen chhuahte avangin a ni e, Gibeon mite a that mai si a,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel21:2 Tin, lal chuan Gibeon mite chu a ko a; (Gibeon mite chu Israela thlahte an ni lo a, Amor mi la awm chungte kha an ni zawk a; Israela thlahte chuan an lakah chhia an lo chham tawha; Saula chuan Israela thlahte leh Juda thlahte tana thahnem angaih avangin thah a tum thin mai a ni,)" 
2Samuel21:3 Davida chuan Gibeon mite hnenah chuan, ""Engnge ka tihsakang che u? LALPA ro chu mal in sawm theihna'n eng anga inremna nge ka siam ang?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel21:4 Tin, Gibeonmite chuan a hnenah, ""Saula leh a chhungte nena kan chungthuah hian tangka leh rangkachak lamthu a ni lo a; Israel zingah hian mi tihhlumtheihna kan nei hek lo,"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""In sawi ang apiang chu ka tihsak ang che u,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel21:5 Tin, lal hnenah chuan, ""Mi tiboraltu leh Israel ram chhungah reng reng awm loa tiboral tura mi phiartu chu," 
2Samuel21:6 a fapa pasarihte min pe la, LALPA mi ruat Saula awmna Gibea khuaah chuan LALPA hmaah kan khai hlumang e,"" an ti a. Tin, lal chuan, ""Pe ang hmiang,"" a tia." 
2Samuel21:7 Nimahsela lal chuan LALPA hnena Davida leh Saula fapa Jonathana kar a, anpaniha kara chhechhamna avangin Saula fapa Jonathana fapa Mephiltbosetha chu a hum a." 
2Samuel21:8 Lal chuan Aii fanu Rizpiin Saula fapa panih a hrinsak Armonia leh Mehphibopsetha erawh chu a hruai a; tin, Meholat mi Barzilaia fapa Adriela, Saula fanu Mikalin fapa panga a hrinsakte nen:" 
2Samuel21:9 Tin, Gibeon mitete kutah chuan a hlan a, tinanni chuan LALPA hmaah tlangah an khaihlum a, tichuan an pasarihchuan hmunkhatah an thi za a: buh seng hun,barli seng tantirh lai velin an tihluma." 
2Samuel21:10 Tin, Aii fanu Rizpi chuan saiip puan a la a, buh seng tirh ata van atanga ruahin a rawn nan thlenga a awmna'n lungpui chungah a inzar a; an chunga chhuna chungleng savate fuk leh zana ram sate awm pawh a phal lo a." 
2Samuel21:11 Tin, Aii fanu Saula hmeinu Rizpi thiltih chu Davida an hrilh a." 
2Samuel21:12 Tin, Davida chu akal a, Philistia miten Gilboa-a Saula an thah nia Philistia miten Bethsan muallaia an khai rutu, Jabes-Gilead mite hnen ata Saula ruh leha fapa Jonathan ruhte chu a la a;" 
2Samuel21:13 chuta Saula ruhte leh a fapa ruhte chu a la chho a; tichuan an khaiate ruh chu an la khawm a. 
2Samuel21:14 Tin, Saula ruhte leh a fapa Jonathana ruhte leh Benjamina rama Zela khuaa a pa Kisa thlanah an phum a: tin, lal thupek ang zel chuanan ti a. Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan chu mi ramchungah chuan Pathian a lungawi ta a." 
2Samuel21:15 Tin, philistia mite chuan Israel mite chu an do leh a; tin, Davida chu a mite nen an chhuk a,Philistia mite chu an zu bei a: tin, Davida chu a chau ta hle maia." 
2Samuel21:16 Tin, Isbi-benoba, mi lian fapate zinga mi, a fei rihlamdar sekel zathu, nunghnam thar pai chuan Davida chu thah a tum a." 
2Samuel21:17 Nimahsela Zeuira fapa Abisaian a chhan a, Philistia mi chu a bei a, a that ta a. Tin, Davida mite chuan, ""Israelte khawnvar i tihmih lohna'n indo turinkan hnenah i chhuak ve tawh hauh lo ang,"" tiina chungah chhia an chham a." 
2Samuel21:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu mi hnuah chuan Philistia mite nen Gob khuaah indopna a awmleh a: chutichuan Husat mi Sibekaia chuan mi lian fapate zinga mi Sapha a that a." 
2Samuel21:19 Tin, Philistia mite nen Gob khuaah an indo leha; tin, Beth-lehem mi Jaare-oregima fapa Elhanan Git mi Goliatha a that a,a fei ngul chu themkawl ang a ni." 
2Samuel21:20 Tin, Gath khuaah indona a awmleh a, chutah chuan mi sang tak mai, akut lehlam lehlam zungtang paruk, a ke lehlam lehlam zungtang paruk, a vaia sawmhnih leh pali neihi a awm a, ani pawh milian laka piang a ni." 
2Samuel21:21 Tin, Israel mite chu a va cho a, Davida unau Simeia fapa Jonathana chuan a lo that a.Tin, chung palite chu Gath khuaah milian laka piang an ni a,chung chu Davida leh a mite kutah an thi a." 
2Samuel21:22 Tin, chung palite chu Gath khuaah milian laka piang an ni a,chung chu Davida leh a mite kutah an thi a." 
2Samuel22:1 Tin, Davida chan a hmelma zawng zawng kut ata leh Saula kut ata LALPA'n a chhanchhuah ni chuan he hla thu hi LALPA hnenaha sai a:" 
2Samuel22:2 tichuan ani chuan, ""LALPA chu kalungpui leh ka kulhpui leh mi chhanhimtu a ni a, ka ta ngei a ni;" 
2Samuel22:3 Ka lungpui Pathian, amah chu ka ring ang; Ka phaw leh ka chhandamna ki, ka kulhbing sangleh ka inhumhima ahi; ka chhandamtu, nangin pawngnawrna lak ata min chhandam thin a." 
2Samuel22:4 Fak tlak LALPA chu ka ko ang a: Chutichuan mi dotute lakah chhandamin ka awm ang. 
2Samuel22:5 Thihna fawn chuan min hual vel a, Pathian ngaihsak lohna tui lian chuan mitihlau a." 
2Samuel22:6 Seol hruihrualte chuan mi phuar vel a: Thihna thangte chuan mi awk a. 
2Samuel22:7 Ka manganin LALPA ch ka ko thin a, A ni, ka Pathian chu ka au thin: Tin, ai chuan abiak in atang chuan ka aw a hria a, Tin, ka au thawm chu a bengah a lut ta a." 
2Samuel22:8 Chu veleh lei hi a nghing a, akhur ta a. A thinur avangin van innghahnate lamin a khurin a nghing ta a." 
2Samuel22:9 A hnar atang chuan meikhu a cho ta ngut ngut a, A kaa chhuak mei chuan a kang ta hluah hluah a: Chu chuanin meihawl pawh a ti-alh ta dur dur a." 
2Samuel22:10 Tin, ani chuan vante pawh a tikun a, a chhuk ta a; A ke hnuaiahte chuan thim chhah mup hi a lo awm a." 
2Samuel22:11 Cherub chungah a chuang a, a thlawk ta a: A ni, thli thlaahte chuan an hmua." 
2Samuel22:12 Tin, thim chu amah hual velnabukteah a siama, Tuite, vana chhum chhah mupte chu fawkkhawmin," 
2Samuel22:13 A hmaa enna avang chuan Meilingte chu a alh a. 
2Samuel22:14 LALPA chu vanah khian alo ri dur dur a, Chungnungbera chuan a aw a chhuah a." 
2Samuel22:15 Tin, thalte chu a kap chhuak a, anniho chu a tidarh a; Kawlte a phettir a, a tibuai ta nuai hlawm a." 
2Samuel22:16 Chuveleh LALPA zilhhauna avanga, A hnara thaw chhuakin a chhem vak avang chuan, Leilung nghahchhante chu tihlanina awm ta a." 
2Samuel22:17 Ani chuan chung lam atangin a rawnban a, mi chelh a; Tui tam tak ata mi hnuk chhuak a" 
2Samuel22:18 Mi dotu chak tak lakah chuan mi chhanhim a, Mi hawtute lakah pawh; kei atan chuan an chak lutuk si a." 
2Samuel22:19 Anni chuan ka vanduai ni chuan mi beia, Nimahsela LALPA chu ka innghahna ber a ni." 
2Samuel22:20 Ani chuan hmun thawl takahmi hruai chhuak aL Ka chunga a lawm avangin mi lo chhanhim ta a ni. 
2Samuel22:21 LALPA chuan ka felzia ang zelin ka chungah a ti a; Ka kutte a thianghlimzia ang ngeiin mi rul a ni. 
2Samuel22:22 LALPA kawngte chu ka zawh a, Ka Pathian hnen ata chu sual takin ka kal bo ngai si lo a." 
2Samuel22:23 A rorelna zawng zawng ka hmaah a awm thina: A thu ruatte lah chu ka hawisan ngai si lo a. 
2Samuel22:24 Ama lakah chuan sawisel bo ka ni bawk a, Ka khawlohna ata ka inthiarfihlimthin a." 
2Samuel22:25 Chuvangin LALPA chuan ka felzia ang zelin mi lo rul ta a; A mithmuhah ka thianghlimzia ang zelin. 
2Samuel22:26 Mi khawngaih thei tak lakah chuan khawngaih thei takin i intilang ang a, Mi tha famkimlakah chuan tha famkimin i intilang ang a;" 
2Samuel22:27 Mi thianghlim lakah chuan thianghlimin i intilang ang a; Tin, mi luhlul lakah chuan luhlulin i intilang ang." 
2Samuel22:28 Hreawm tuar mite chu i chhandam ang a: Mi chapote erawh chu i tihtlawm theihna'n an chungah i mit a fu reng a. 
2Samuel22:29 Aw LALPA, ka khawnvar i ni si a: LALPA chua ka thimna hi a tieng ang." 
2Samuel22:30 Nangma tanpuiin ral ka bawh si a: Ka Pathian tanpui bawkin kulh ka zuan khum a ni. 
2Samuel22:31 Pathian zawng a kawng chu a tha famkima: ALPA thu chu fiah a ni tawh; Amah ringtu zawng zawngte tan chuan ani chu phaw a ni. 
2Samuel22:32 LALPA lo chu tu nge Pathian awm ni: Kan Pathian lo chu tu nge lungpui awm ni? 
2Samuel22:33 Pathian chu ka kulhpui nghet tak a ni a: Mi tha famkimchu a kawngah a hruai thin. 
2Samuel22:34 Ka kete chu zukpui ke angina siam a: Ka hmun sangahte mi awmtir thin. 
2Samuel22:35 Ka kutte hi ral kap turina zirtir thin a; Chutichuan ka bante hian dar thalngul a kuai zo hial a. 
2Samuel22:36 Nangin i chhandamnaphaw chu mi pe bawk a: Inngaihtlawmnain mi siam lian ta. 
2Samuel22:37 Ka hnuaia ke ke penna chu i tizau a, Tichuan kekete hi a tleng lo." 
2Samuel22:38 Mi dotute chu ka umpha a, ka tiboral a; Tihboral dera an awm hma loh chuan ka kir hek lo." 
2Samuel22:39 An thawh leh theihlohna turinka tiboral der a, ka sat chhawk a: A ni, ka ke hnuaiah an tlu ta a." 
2Samuel22:40 Nangin inbeihna atan chuan chaknain ka taiah mi hreng si a: Mi rawn beitute chu ka hnuaiah i tudal ta a. 
2Samuel22:41 Mi hawtute chu ka tihboral theihna turin, Nangin midotute chu mi hnuchhawnin i awmtir ta bawk a." 
2Samuel22:42 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, lamho zinga mi anmahni zat theuh nupuiah an man a, an kal bopui ta a: tin, an ram lamah chuan an hawng a, khawpui chu an chei leh a, chutah chuan an awm ta a. LALPA ngei chu an han en a, nimahsela a chhang si lo." 
2Samuel22:43 Chu velehleia vaivut ang maiin ka vaw sawm dep a, Kawtlai chirhdiak ang maiin ka tipherh a, ka theh darh vek a." 
2Samuel22:44 Nangin ka mite insualna lakah pawh mi chhanhimta a; Hnam tin lu ni turin mi vawng tha a: Ka hriat ngai loh hnam chuan ka rawng an bawl tawh ang. 
2Samuel22:45 Hnam dangte chu ka hnenah an inpe ang a: Ka chanchin an hriat veleh ka thu an zawm ang. 
2Samuel22:46 Hnam dangte chu an chuai ang a, An kulhbing ata te chu khur chungin an lo chhuak ang." 
2Samuel22:47 LALPA chu a nung reng e; ka lungpui chu fakin awm se la; Mi chhandamna lungpui, Pathian chu chawimawiin awm rawh se:" 
2Samuel22:48 Phuba mi laksaktu leh Hnam tin, ka hnuaia tudaltu Pathian ngei chu," 
2Samuel22:49 Mi dotute lak ata mi la chhuaktu: A ni, nangin mi beitute chung lamah chuan mi chawi kang a: Mi nunrawngte lak ata chu mi chhanhim thin a." 
2Samuel22:50 Chuvangin aw LALPA, han tin, zingah chuan lawmthu ka hrilh ang chia, I hming fakin ka zai bawk ang.Ani chuan chhandamna ropui tak a lal ape thin a: A hriak thiha chungah, Daivda leh a thlahte chung ngeiah chuan Kumkhuain a ngilneihzia a lantir ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel22:51 Ani chuan chhandamna ropui tak a lal ape thin a: A hriak thiha chungah, Daivda leh a thlahte chung ngeiah chuan Kumkhuain a ngilneihzia a lantir ang,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel23:1 Heng hi Davida thusawi hnuhnung ber a ni. Jesaia fapa Davida, ""Sang taka chawi sana, Jakoba Pathian hriak thih a, Israelte hla mawi tak phuahtu chuan a sawi a:" 
2Samuel23:2 LALPA thlarau chuan keimah mi hmangin a sawi a: A thu chu ka leiah a awm a. A thu chu ka leiah a awm a. 
2Samuel23:3 Israelte Pathian chuan a sawi a, Israelte Lungpui chuan: 'Mi chunga fel taka rorel thin a, Pathian tih chunga rorel thina chu," 
2Samuel23:4 Ni a lo chhuah a, chhum awm hauh lo Zing eng ang hi a ni ang a. Ruah sur hnua khaw lo thiang a, Leia hlobet chawr no dep ang hia ni ang." 
2Samuel23:5 Kan chhungkua chu Pathian hnena mi ani lo'm ni? Chatuan thuthlung chu ka hnenah a thlung a, Engkim fel leh tinghet tlatin; Ka chhandamna kimleh duhthusam kim, A chawr chhuahtir lawng maw?" 
2Samuel23:6 Mi suaksualte erawh chu an zain a hnawla hnawlbo mi, hling ang an ni ang a, Kuta lak mi an ni si lo:" 
2Samuel23:7 A khawihtu tur chuan thir leh feingul rawih zawk tur a ni a; Tichuan an hmunah halral vek an ni ang,' tiin mi bia a,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel23:8 Heng hi Davida sipai huaisen hmingthangte chu a ni: Takemon miJosebasehebetha chu sipai hotute zinga hotu ber a ni a; ani chu tum khata mi zariat thattu Eznet Mi Adinoa an tih bawk kha a ni. 
2Samuel23:9 Tin, a dawttu chu Aho mi fapa Dodaia fapa Eleazara a ni a; chu mi chu Philistia mite indo tura an punkhawm a, an cho a, Israel mite an kal bo vek laia Davida hnena sipai huaisen pathumte zinga pakhat kha a ni:" 
2Samuel23:10 tin, ani chu a tho a,P hilistia mite chu a kut a khama a khandaih pawh thlah thei lo hial khawpin a that a: chu mini chuan LALPA'n nasa takin a ngamssak a; tin, mipuite chu a hnungah rallak thil la tur ngawtin an lo kir leh a." 
2Samuel23:11 Tin, chu mi dawttu chu Hara mi Agea fapa Sama a ni a. Tin, dailuah awmna chuk hmunah Philistia mite chu lak tumin an infawk khawm a; tin, mipuite chuan Philistia mite chu an tlan chhiatsan a." 
2Samuel23:12 Nimahsela ani chu chu mi hmunah chuan a ding a, a veng tlat a, Philistia mite chu a that a: tin, LALPA'n nasa takin a ngamsak a." 
2Samuel23:13 Tin, sipai huai huai sawmthum zinga pathumte chu an chhuk a, buh seng lai takin Davida hnenah Adulam pukah an kal a; tin, Philistia sipaiho chuan Rephaim kawnah tanhmun an khuar a." 
2Samuel23:14 Tin, chutih lai chuan Davida chu kulhbingah a awm a, chutih lai bawk chuan Philistia sipaiho chu Beth-lehem-ah an awm a." 
2Samuel23:15 Tin, Davida chuan tui a chak em em mai a, ""Beth-lehem-a tuichhunchhuah tui, kulh kawngkhar kianga mi kha in tura mi pe han awm teh se la aw!"" a ti a." 
2Samuel23:16 Chutichuan sipai huaisen pathumte chuan Philistia sipaiho chu an tawn tlang a, kulh kawngkhar kiang ami Beth-lehem-a tuichhunchhuah chu an va chawi a, an keng a, Davida hnenah an kalpui a: nimahsela a lo in duh lo a, LALPA tan a bun chhuak ta zawk a." 
2Samuel23:17 Aw LALPA, hei hi ka tih loh turzia mai chu; thih huama kalte thisen chu ka in dawn em ni?"" a ti a; chutichuan a in duhta lo a. Chung thilte chu sipai huaisen pathumte chuan an ti a ni." 
2Samuel23:18 Zeruia fapa Joaba unau Abisaia chu an pathum zinga hotu ber a ni a. A feiin mi zathumte chu a bei a, a that a, pathumte zingah chuan hming that a hlawh a." 
2Samuel23:19 Pathumte zingah chuan chawimawi tlak ber a ni lo'm ni? Chuvangin an hotu atan an siam a: nimahsela chungnungber pathum zinga chhiar tel a kai lo. 
2Samuel23:20 Tin, Kebzeel mi huai fapa Jehoiada fapa Benaia thil nasa tak titu chuan Moab mi Ariela fapate pahnih chu a that a: tin, a zuk chhuk a, vut tlak hun laiin khuarkhurrumah sakeibaknei a zuk that bawka:" 
2Samuel23:21 tin, Aigupta mi, mi lian tak a that a: Aigupta mi chuan fei a keng a; nimahsela ani chuan tiang kengin a zuk pan a, Aigupta mi fei ken chu a chhuhsak a, ama fei chuan a chhunhlum ta a," 
2Samuel23:22 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chuan chutiang thil chu a tih avangin sipai huaisen pathumte zingah chuan hmingthat a hlawh a. 
2Samuel23:23 Mi sawmthumte ai chuan chawimawitlak a ni a; nimahsela chungnungber pathumte zinga chhiar tel a kai lo. Tin, Davida chuan amah vengtu hotu atan a dah a." 
2Samuel23:24 Joaba unau Asahela chu sawmthum zinga pakhat chu a nia; Beth-lehem khuaa mi Dadoa fapa Elhanana te; 
2Samuel23:25 Harod mi Sama te, Harod mi Elika te;" 
2Samuel23:26 Pal mi Heleza te, Teko mi Ikesa fapa Ira te;" 
2Samuel23:27 Anathot mi Abiezera te, Husat mi Mebunaia te; Aho mi Zalmona te, Netophat mi Maharaia te;" 
2Samuel23:28 Netophat mi Bana fapa Heleba te, Benjamina thlah, Gebea khuaa mi Ribaia fapa Itaia te;" 
2Samuel23:29 Pirathon mi Benaia te, Gaas-a luitea mi Hidaia te;" 
2Samuel23:30 Arbat mi Abi-albona te, Barhum mi Azmavetha te;" 
2Samuel23:31 Saalbon mi Eliaba te, Jesena fapate zinga Jonathana te;" 
2Samuel23:32 Harar mi Sama te, Araar mi Sarara fapa Ahiama te:" 
2Samuel23:33 Maakat mi Ahasbaia fapa Elipheleta te, Gilon mi Ahitophela fapa Eliama te;" 
2Samuel23:34 Karmel mi Hezroa te, Arba mi Paaria te;" 
2Samuel23:35 Zoba khuaa mi Nathana fapa Igala te, Gad mi Bania te;"
