2Samuel23:36 Zeruia fapa Joaba ralthuam kengtu Amon mi Zeleka te, Beerot mi Naharaia te:" 
2Samuel23:37 It mi Ira te, Itmi Gareba te;Hit mi Uria te an ni: an za chuan sawmthum leh pasarih an ni." 
2Samuel23:38 Hit mi Uria te an ni: an za chuan sawmthum leh pasarih an ni. 
2Samuel24:1 Tin, LALPA thinurna chu Israelte chungah a lo thawk leh ta thut a, ""Kal la, Israel mi leh Juda mite chhiar vek rawh,"" tiin Davida chuan an pawi khawih turin a chawk tho a." 
2Samuel24:2 Tin, lal chuan a hnena awm sipai hotu Joaba hnenah chuan, ""Israel hnam zawng zawng zingah hian Dan atanga Beer-seba thlengin vak vel la, mi engzat nge an nih ka hriat theihna'n chhiar vek rawh u,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel24:3 Tin, Joaba chuan lal hnenah, ""Lalpa i Pathian chuan mipuite tipungin, engzata tampawh, a leh za pawh, lalpa ka pu hian hmu hman rawh se; nimahsela lalpa ka pu chuan chu chu engah nge maw hriat a chak le?"" a ti a." 
2Samuel24:4 Nimahsela lal thu chuan Joaba leh sipai hotute chu a hneh ta a. Tichuan Joaba leh sipai hotute chu Israel mite chhiar tur chuan lal hnen ata chu an chhuak ta a. 
2Samuel24:5 Tin, Jordan ral an va kai a, tin, Gad ruam lai tak ding lama khaw awm Aroer=ah chuan Jazer thlengin awm hmun an khuar a:" 
2Samuel24:6 tin, Gilead ram leh Tahtim hodsi ram an thleng a; tin, Dan-Jaan an thleng a, Zidon paninan kal vel a," 
2Samuel24:7 tin, tura kulh te an va thleng a, tin, Hiv-ho leh Kanaan mite khua zawng zawng an thleng a; tin, Judai chhim lam Beer-seba-ah an kal a." 
2Samuel24:8 Chutichuan ram zawng zawng an fan chhuah hnu chuan thla kua leh ni sawmhnih ralah Jerusalem-ah an lo haw a. 
2Samuel24:9 Tin, Joaba chuan mihring zat chin chu lal a pe a: tin, Israel ramah chuan khandaih keng mi, mi huaisen nuairiat an awm a; tin, Juda mi chu nuainga an awm a." 
2Samuel24:10 Tin, mihring a han chhiar zawh chuan Davida thinlung chu a na ta hle mai a. Tin, Davida chuan LALPA hnenah, ""Ka thiltihah hian nasa takin ka lo sual ta a ni. Nimahsela tunah hian aw LALPA, i chhiahhlawh khawlohna hi dah bo turin ka ngen a che; atthlak takin ka lo ti ta a ni e,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel24:11 Tin, zinga Davida a han thawh chuan Davida zawlnei, zawlnei Gada hnenah LALPA thu a lo thleng a," 
2Samuel24:12 Kal la, Davida hnenah, 'LALPA'n heti hian a ti, Thil kawng thum ka ruatsak chia, i chunga ka tih turin pakhat thlang rawh,' a ti e,"" tiin." 
2Samuel24:13 Chutichuan Gada chu Davida hnenah a kal a, a hrilh a, a hnenah, ""I ramah hian kum sarih tam i chunga lo tlak nge, i hmelma hmaa an um chhung chea thjla thum lo tlan bo rih nge, i rama ni thum hri lo len? Mi tirtu eng angin nge ka chhan dawn inngaihtuah la, min hrilh rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel24:14 Tin, Davida chuan Gada hnenah, ""Ka mang a ang hle mai a: LALPA kutah tlu lut phawt mai i la, a zahngaihna chu a nasa hle si a; mihring ktuah chuan min tluk luhtir lul suh ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel24:15 Chutichuan LALPA chuan Israel mite chungah chuan zing atangin hun ruat ang thleng chuan hri alentir a; tichuan mipui zinga mi chu Dan atangin Beer-seba thlengin mi singsarih an thi a. 
2Samuel24:16 Tin, vantirhkohin tichhe tura Jerusalemlama a kut a han lek chuan LALPA'n thil tha lo tih a tum chu alamlet a, mite tiboraltu vantirhkoh hnenah chuan, ""A tawk tawh e; i kut lek tawh suh,"" a ti a. Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chu Jebus mi Arauna hrui bulah chuan a awm a." 
2Samuel24:17 Tin, Davida'n mi tihlumtu vantirhkoh a hmuh chuan LALPA a bia a, ""Ngai teh, ka lo sual ta a, dil lo takin thil ka lo ti ta a ni: mahse, he'ng beramte hian eng thil nge an tih? I kut chuan keimah leh ka pa chhungte mi khawih zawk rawh se aw,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel24:18 Tin, chu mini chuan Gada chu Davida hnenah a kal a, a hnenah, ""Chho la, Jebus mi Arauna hruiah LALPA tan maicham han siam rawh,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel24:19 Tin, Davida chu LALPA'n thu apek anga Gadan a hrilh ang chuan a chho ta a." 
2Samuel24:20 Tin, Arauna chu a han hawi a, a lam pana lal leh ahote lo kal chu a hmu a: tichuan Arauna chu a chhuak a, a hmaia lei siinlal hmaah chuana bawkkhup a." 
2Samuel24:21 Tin, Arauna chuan, ""Eng vangin nge LALPA ka pu chu a chhiahhlawh hnenah a lo kal le?"" a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan, ""Mipuite laka hri a kian theihna tura LALPA tana maicham siamna'na i hrui lei turin,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel24:22 Tin, Arauna chuan Davida hnenah, ""LALPA ka pu chuan awm a tih la se la hlan ang hmiang: en teh, halral thil hlan atan bawngpate chu a awm a, tin, thing atan hrui hmanruate leh sebawng thuamnate chu a awm a." 
2Samuel24:23 Aw lalpa, he'ng zawng zawng hi Arauna chuan lal a pe vek e,"" a ti a. Tin, Arauna chuan lal hnenah, ""LALPA i Pathian chuan lo chhang che rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Samuel24:24 Tin, lal chuan Arauna hnenah, ""Ni lo e a, aman neiin a lei ngeiin ka leisak zawk ang che; engmah insengso loin LALPA ka Pathian hnenah halral thilhlante ka hlawn tawp lo ang,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Davida chuan hrui leh sebawngpate chu tangka sekel sawmngain a lei ta a.Tin, Davida'n chutah chuan LALPA tan maicham a siam a, halral thilhlante leh remna thillante a hlan a. Chutichuan LALPA chu an ram chungah chuan a lungawi a, Israel ram ata hri chu a kiang ta a." 
2Samuel24:25 Tin, Davida'n chutah chuan LALPA tan maicham a siam a, halral thilhlante leh remna thillante a hlan a. Chutichuan LALPA chu an ram chungah chuan a lungawi a, Israel ram ata hri chu a kiang ta a." 
1Kings1:1 Tin, Davida chu a lo upain, a lo tar ta hle a; tichuan puanin an khuh thin a, nimahsela a lum thei chuang hauh lo a." 
1Kings1:2 Chutichuan a puipaten a hnenah, ""Kan pu lal tan hian nula i zawng teh ang u: lal bulah hian awm reng se la, enkawl rawh se; tin, i angchhungah hian lo mu se la, kan pu lal hi a lo lum thei dawn nia,"" an ti a." 
1Kings1:3 Chutichuan Israel ram zawng zawngah chuan nula hmeltha an zawng a, Sunam mi Abisagi an va hmu a, lal hnenah chuan an hruai ta a." 
1Kings1:4 Chu nula chu a hmel a tha hle mai a; lal chu a enkawl a, a rawng a bawlsak thin a; nimahsela lal chuan a pawl lo." 
1Kings1:5 Tichuan Hagithi fapa Adonija chuan, ""Keimah ka la lal dawn hi maw,"" tiin a inngai ropui hle mai a: tawlailir leh sakawr chung chuang mie, mi sawmnga a hmaa tlan turte nen a buatsaih a." 
1Kings1:6 A pa lah chuan eng lai mahin, ""Engati nge hetiangin i tih,"" tiin a tilungni lo ngai si lo a; tin, amah hi hmeltha tak a ni bawk a, Absaloma chhang a ni." 
1Kings1:7 Ani chuan Zeruii fapa Joaba leh, puithiam Abiathara chu a rawn a: anni chu Adonija lamah an tang a, an tanpui thin a." 
1Kings1:8 Puithiam Zadoka te, Jehoaiada fapa Beinaia te, zawlnei Nathana te, Simeia te, Reia te leh Davida ho mi huaisente erawh chu Adonija lamah an tang ve lo a." 
1Kings1:9 Tin, Adonija chuan beram te, sebawng pa te, ran chawm thaute Zoholet lungah a talh a, chu chu En-rogel bula awm a ni; tin, lal fapa a unau zawng zawngte leh Judai rama lal puipaho zawng zawngte chu a sawm a." 
1Kings1:10 Zawlnei Nathana te, mi huaisenhote leh a unaupa solomona erawh chu a sawm ve lo." 
1Kings1:11 Chutichuan Nathanan Solomona nu Bat-sebi hnenah, ""Hagithi fapa Adonija hi kan pu Davida hriat lohin a lal ta mai tih i hre na nge?" 
1Kings1:12 Chutichuan nangma himna tur leh i fapa Solomona himna tur ka lo hrilh teh ang che. 
1Kings1:13 Lal Davida hnenah va lut ta la, a hnenah, 'Aw lalpa, ka pu, i bawihnu hnenah hian i fapa Solomona hi, ka hnua a la lal ngei ngei dawn a, amah hi ka lalthutthlengah hian a lo thu dawn e, ti khan chhia i chham ani lawm ni kha? Engati nge Adonija lala a awm tak mai?' va ti teh." 
1Kings1:14 Ngai teh, lal i va biak lai takin, kei pawhin ka rawn zui lut ve mai ang chia, i thu sawi chu ka rawn nemnghehpui dawn che nia,"" tiin a sawi a." 
1Kings1:15 Tin, Bat-sebi chu lal hnenah pindanah chuan a va lut a: lal chu a upa tawh hle mai a, Sunam mi Abisagi chuan lal rawng chu a bawl a. Tin, Bat-sebi chuan lal chu kunin chibai a buk a. Tin, lal chuan, ""Engnge i duh le?"" a lo ti a." 
1Kings1:16 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka pu LALPA i Pathian hming chhalin i bawihnu hnenah hian, 'I fapa Solomona hi ka hnuah a la lal ngei ngei dawn a, amah hi ka lalthutthlengah hian a la thu dawn e,' ti khan chhia i chham tawh a." 
1Kings1:17 Ngai teh, hei Adonija a lal ta reng mai: nang ka pu lalpa lah hian i hre ve si lo va:" 
1Kings1:18 bawngpa te, ran chawm thau te, beramte a talh teuh a, lal fapa zawng zawngte leh, puithiam Abiathara leh, sipai hotu Joaba te a sawm a: i chhiahhlawh solomona erawh chu a sawm ve lo." 
1Kings1:19 Tichuan ka pu, lalpa hnuah hian a lalthutthlengah tu nge la thu dawn tih i hrilh changin Israel-ho zawng awng mit hi nang, ka pu, lalpa, i chungah a fu thup a ni." 
1Kings1:20 Chutilozawng heti hi ani ang a, ka pu, lalpa hi a puteho hnena a muthilh ve hunah chuan, kei leh ka fapa Solomona hi thil tisualtuah min ruat mai dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings1:21 Tin, ngai teh, chutia lal abiak lai tak chuan, zawlnei Nathana chu a lo lut ve a." 
1Kings1:22 Enteh, zawlnei Nathana a lo kal e,"" tiin lal an hrilh a. Tin, lal kiang a va thlen chuan lal hmaah chuana hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a." 
1Kings1:23 Tin, Nathana chuan, ""Aw lalpa, ka pu, 'Ka hnuah Adonija hi a lal ang a, ka lalthutthlengah a thu ang,' i ti em ni?" 
1Kings1:24 vawiinah hian a chhuk a, bawngpa te, ran chawm thau te, beramte a talh teuh mai a, lal fapa zawng zawngte, sipai hotu te, puithiam Abiathara te a sawm a; tin, ngai teh, an eiin an inho a, 'Pathianin lal Adonija hi humhim rawh se,' an ti a ni." 
1Kings1:25 Amaherawhchu kei i chhiahhlawh ngei leh, puithiam Zadoka leh, Jehoiada fapa Benaia leh, i chhiahhlawh Solomona hi zawng min sawm ve lo a ni." 
1Kings1:26 Hei hi lalpa ka pu thua tih a nih si chuan, lalpa ka pu hian a hnua lalthutthlenga thu tura hi tu ber nge ni tih i chhiahhlawhte hi lo la hrilh lo a ni ang maw?"" a ti a." 
1Kings1:27 Chutichuan lal Davida chuan a chhang a, ""Bat-sebi mi han kohsak teh u,"" a ti a. Tin, lal kiangah chuan a va kal a, lal hmaah a va ding a." 
1Kings1:28 Tin, lal chuan chhia a chham a, ""Manganna zawng zawnga ka nunna humhimtu LALPA nunna chhalin," 
1Kings1:29 i hnenah LALPA Israelte Pathian hming chhala, 'I fapa Solomona hi ka hnuah chuan a la lala ngei ngei ang, ka aiah ka lalthutthlengah hian a la thu dawn e,' tia chhia ka chham ang ngei kha, vawiin ngeiah pawh hian ka la ti dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings1:30 Chutichuan Bat-sebi chu a hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a, lal chu chibai a buk a, ""Ka pu, lal Davida hi kumkhuain dam reng rawh se,"" a ti a." 
1Kings1:31 Tin, lal Davida'n, ""Puithiam Zadoka leh, zawlnei Nathana leh Jehoiada fapa Benaia mi va koh teh u,"" a ti a. Tin, a hmaah chuan a va kal a." 
1Kings1:32 Tin, lalc huan a hnenah, ""In pu puipate hruai u la, ka fapa Solomona hi keima sabengtung ngei chungah chuantir u la, Gihon hmunah zuk hruai rawh u:" 
1Kings1:33 tin, puithiam Zadoka leh zawlnei Nathanan Israelte lal atan hriak zuk thih rawh se: tin, tawtawrawt ham u la, 'Pathianin lal Solomona humhim rawh se,' ti rawh u." 
1Kings1:34 Tichuan amah chu in zui chho ang a, ka lalthutthlengah hian a lo thu dawn nia; amah hi ka aia lal tur a ni si a: tin, amah hi Israel ram leh Judai hotu atan ka ruat a ni e,"" a ti a." 
1Kings1:35 Tin, Jehoiada fapa Benaia chuan lal chu a chhang a, ""Amen: LALPA, ka pu lalpa Pathian pawhin remti ve rawh se." 
1Kings1:36 LALPA chu ka pu, lalpa hnena a awm thin angin, Solomona hnenah pawh awm ve zel sela, ka pu lal Davida lalthutthleng aiin a lal thutthleng chu tiropui zawk rawh se,"" a ti a." 
1Kings1:37 Chutichuan puithiam Zadoka te, zawlnei Nathana te, Jehoiada fapa Benaia te, Keret mite, Pelet mite chu an zuk kal a, Solomona chu Davida sabengtung chungah an chuantir a, Giho hmunah an hruai a." 
1Kings1:38 Tin, puithiam Zadoka chuan Puan In ata hriak dahna ki a la a, Solomona chu a thih ta a. Tin, tawtawrawt an ham a; tichuan mi zawng anwgin, ""Pathianin lal Solomona humhim rawh se,"" an ti a." 
1Kings1:39 Tin, mpuiho zawng awng chuan amah chu an zui chho a, mipuite chuan phenglawngte an tum a, an lawm nasa khawp a, an thawm ri chuan lei a nghawr khi a." 
1Kings1:40 Tin, Adonija leh a sawmho a hnena awm zawng zawngte chuan an ruaitheh zawh chuan an han hria a. Tin, Joaban tawtawrawt ham rik a han hriat chuan, ""Khawpui chhunga thawm ri awm ta dur dur chu engtizia nge maw ni chu le?"" a ti a." 
1Kings1:41 Chutia a tih lai tak chuan ngai teh, puithiam Abiathara fapa Jonathana a va kal a: Adonija chuan, ""Lo kal teh khai; nang zawng mi fel i ni a, chanchin tha i rawn thlen chawk ang chu maw?"" a lo ti a." 
1Kings1:42 Tin, Jonathanan a chhang a, Adonija hnenah chuan, ""Thlen lo e, kan pu, lal Davida'n Solomana lalah a siam ta a lawm maw le:" 
1Kings1:43 ama rualin puithiam Zadoka te, zawlnei Nathana te, Jehoiada fapa Benaia te, Keret mite, Pelet mite lalin a tir a, lal sabengtung chungah an chuantir ta:" 
1Kings1:44 tin, puithiam Zadoka leh zawlnei Nathanan Gihon hmunah lalatan hriak an thih ta a: chuta tang chuan hlim takin an lo chho a, chu chuan khawpui chhung a khawk rum rum a ni. Chu chu a ni in thawm hriat chu." 
1Kings1:45 Tin, Solomona chu ram lalthutthlengah chuan a thu ta bawk a." 
1Kings1:46 Tin, lal puipate chu, 'I Pathianin a hming aiin Solomona hming chu titha zawk sela, i lalthutthleng aiin a lalthutthleng chu toropui zawk rawh se,' tia kan pu lal Davida lawmpui turin an kal chiam bawk a; tin, lal chu khum siin a kun a." 
1Kings1:47 Tin, lal pawh chuan heti hian a ti, 'LALPA, Israelte Pathian, vawiin ngeia ka lalthutthlenga thu tur rawn ruattu chu fakin awm rawh se, ka mit ngeiin a hmuh tak hi,"" a ti a." 
1Kings1:48 Tin, Adonija mi sawmte zawng zawng chuan an hlau ta a, an tho a, mahni kawng kawngah an kal ta vek a." 
1Kings1:49 Tin, Adonija chuan Solomona chu a hlau ta a; a tho a, maicham ki a va vuan ta a." 
1Kings1:50 Tin, ""Ngai teh, Adonijan lal Solomona a hlau a; 'Lal Solomona hian a chhiahhlawh hi khandaiha tihlum lo turin ka hnenah chhia chham phawt rawh se,' tin, maicham ki a vuan e,"" tiin Solomona chu an hrilh a." 
1Kings1:51 Tin, Solomona chuan, ""Mi rinawm tak a nih a tihlan phawt chuan a samzai khat pawh leiah a tla lo ang: amaherawhchu suahsualna a nei tih hriatna a awm chuan a thi ang,"" a ti a.chutichuan lal Solomona chuan mi a ti ra, maicham ata chu an va hruai thla a. Tin, a va kal a, lal Solomona chu chibai a buk a: tin, Solomona chuan a hnenah, ""I inah haw tawh,"" a lo ti a." 
1Kings1:52 chutichuan lal Solomona chuan mi a ti ra, maicham ata chu an va hruai thla a. Tin, a va kal a, lal Solomona chu chibai a buk a: tin, Solomona chuan a hnenah, ""I inah haw tawh,"" a lo ti a." 
1Kings2:1 Tin, Davida thih hun chu a lo hnai ta a: a fapa Solomona chu thu a pe a," 
1Kings2:2 Leilung zawng zawng dan angin ka kal ve dawn ta a ni: tichuan chak takin awm la, patling takin awm rawh;" 
1Kings2:3 I thil tih apiang leh, i hawina lam apianga i hmuingil theihna'n Mosia Dana ziak anga, LALPA i Pathianin a kawngte zawh tur leh, a thuruat te, a thupek te, a rorelte leh a thuhriattirte pawh tura thu apekte hi zawm rawh:" 
1Kings2:4 LALPA'n ka chungchang thua, 'I thlahten an thinlung tak leh, an rilru taka ka mithmuha thutaka awm tura an awm dana an fimkhur chuan Israrelte lalthutthlenga thu tur i hmai lo ang,' tia a sawi kha a tinghe dawn nia." 
1Kings2:5 Tin, Zerui fapa Joaba mi tihzia, Isralte sipai hotu pahnih Nera fapa Abnera leh, Jethera fapa Amasate a tihzia ngei kha i hria e. Khatia a thah a, inrem laia indo thisen chhuaha a chhuah a, a taia kawnghrenah leh a pheikhawk buan indo thisen a tih kaiziate kha." 
1Kings2:6 Tichuan i rem hriat dan angin ti langin, a lua kelsam to hi thlanah thlamuang takin liamtir suh ang che." 
1Kings2:7 Gilead mi Barzilaia fate chungah erawh chhuan khawngaihna lantir langin, i dawhkana chaw kiltuah teltir ve ang che: i unau Absaloma laka ka tlanbo lai khan ka hnenah an lo kal si a." 
1Kings2:8 Tin, ngai teh Bahurim khuaa mi Benjamina thlah, Gera fapa Simeia hi i hnenah a awm a, ani chuan Mahanaim hmuna ka kal lai khan anchhe tha lo tak min lawh a: amaherawhchu Jordan-ah mi hmauk turin a lo chhuk a, chutah chuan, 'Khandaihin ka that lo ang che,' tiin lalpa hming chhalin a hnenah chhia ka lo chham tawh a." 
1Kings2:9 chutichuan thiam chang zawngin chhuah suh, mi fing i ni si; a chungah engtia i tih tur nge ni tih zawng i hre mai ang a; a lua kelsam to chu thisen nen thlanah i liamtir dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:10 Tin, Davida chu a puteho hnenah a muhil ve ta a, Davida khawpuiah an phum a." 
1Kings2:11 Israel -hote chuang Davida lal chhung chu kum sawmli a ni: Hebron khuaah kum sarih a lal a, Jerusalem khuaah kum sawmthum leh kum thum a lal a." 
1Kings2:12 Tin, Solomona chu apa Davida lalthutthlengah chuan a thu a: tichuan a ram chu nasa taka tihnghehin a lo awm ta a." 
1Kings2:13 Tin, Hagithi fapa Adonija chu Solomona nu Bat-sebi hnenah a kal a. Ani chuan, ""Tha lam thua lo kal em i nih le?"" a ti a. Anin, ""Tha lam thuah ni e,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:14 Tin, ""I hnenah eng emaw sawi tur ka nei a ni,"" a ti leh a. Ani chuan, ""Sawi ta che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:15 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ram hi ka ta ani tawh tih leh, Israel-ho zawng zawngte pawh hian keimah hi lal atan mi thlir reng a ni tih i hria a; nimahsela ram chu ka unaupa tan a lo inlet leh ta zawk a: LALPA lo ruat danah a ta ani reng a ni." 
1Kings2:16 Tunah hian thil pakhat dil tur che ka nei a, mi remtih lohsak lul suh ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Sawi ta che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:17 Tin, ani chuan, ""Khawngaih takin lal Solomona mi biaksak la, (i thu zawng a hnial awm si lo a,) Sunam mi Abisagi hi nupuiah mi neihtir rawh se,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:18 Tin, Bat-sebi chuan, ""Aw le, lal chu ka lo biaksak ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:19 Chutichuan Bat-sebi chu Adonija biaksak turin lal Solomona hnenah chuan a kal ta a. Tin, lal chu amah lawm turin a tho a, a hmaah a kun a, a lalthutthlengah chuan a thu a, tin, lal nu tan chuan lalthutthleng ahuntir a; adinglamah hchuan a thu ta a." 
1Kings2:20 Tichuan, ""Thil pakhat te takte ka dil dawn che ani min remtih lohsak lul suh ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, lal chuan a hnenah, 'Dil ta che, ka nu: ka remtih lohsak hauh lo ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:21 Tin, ani chuan, ""Sunam mi Abisagi hi i unaupa Adonija nupui atan neihtir rawh,"" at i a." 
1Kings2:22 Tin, lal Solomona chuan chuan a chhang a, a nu hnenah chuan, ""Eng tiziaa Sunam mi Abisagi hi Adonija tana dil nge maw i nih le? Ram pawh hi dilsak ta nghal law law che; ani chu ka u a ni alawm; ama tan leh puithiam Abiathara leh Zeruii fapa Joaba tan pawh chuan dil ta che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:23 Chutichuan lal Solomona chuan LALPA hming chhalin, ""Adonija thil dil hian ama chungah thihna thu sawi aniha a nih loh na chuan Pathianin a tih tihin min ti mai se la, chu aia nasa pawhin." 
1Kings2:24 Tichuan LALPA, a thutiam anga mi tinghet a, ka pa Davida lalthutthlenga mi thuttir a, chhungkua mi lo dinsaktu nunna chhalin ka sawi e, Adonija hi vawiin ni la la hian tihhlum ngei ngei tur a ni,"" tiin chhia a chham ta a." 
1Kings2:25 Chutichuan lal Solomona chuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu a tir a ani chuan a va bei a, a that ta a." 
1Kings2:26 Tin, puithiam Abiathara hnenah chuan lalin, ""Anathoth khuaah nangma in leh loah haw daih tawh; thi mai tlak zawng i ni a: nimahsela ka pa Davida hmaa lalpa PATHIAN bawm i lo zawn thin avang leh, ka pa hreawm tuarna zawng zawngahte chuan i lo tuar ve tawh thin avangin tunah zawng ka tihlum rih lo ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:27 Chutichuan Solomona chuan Abiathara chu LALPA puithiam anihna a ban ta a; LALPA'n Silo khuaa Elia chhungte chungchang thu a sawi kha a thlentir theihna turin. 
1Kings2:28 Tin, chu mi thu chu Joaban a lo hria a: Joaba chu Absalima lamah khan a tang lo na a, Adonija lama tang a ni si a. Tichuan Joaba chu LALPA Puan inah a tlan a, maicham kite chu a vuan ta a." 
1Kings2:29 Tin, ""LALPA Puan ina Joaba a tlan a, ngai teh, maicham bulah a awm,"" tiin lal Solomona chu an hrilh a. Tichuan lal Solomona chuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu, ""Han bei tawh,"" tiin a tir a." 
1Kings2:30 Tin, Benaia chu LALPA Puan inah a han kal a, a hnenah chuan, ""Lalin lo chhuak rawh se,' a ti e,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ni lo e; hetah hian ka thi mai ang e,"" a ti a. Tin, Benaia chuan, ""Joaban hetiang hian a lo ti a, hetiang hian mi lo chhang a ni,"" tiin lal hnenah thu a thlen leh a." 
1Kings2:31 Tin, lal chuan, a hnenah, ""A sawi ang chuan han ti la, han bei la, phum rawh,"" a vang awm hauh loa Joaban thisen a chhuah lak ata kha kei leh ka pa chhungte hi i tihfihlim theihna turin." 
1Kings2:32 Tichuan amah aia mi fel zawk leh tha zawk mi pahnih, Nera fapa Abnera, Israel sipai hotu leh Jethera fapa Amasa, Judate sipai hotu kha ka pa David hriat loha a beih a, khandaiha a thah avangin LALPA a thisen chu ama lu chungah ngei a rawn lettir ang." 
1Kings2:33 Chutichuan thisen chu Joaba lu chungah leh a thlahte lu chungah kumkhuain a let ang a: Davida chungah te, a thlahte chungah te, a chhungte chungah te, a lalthutthleng chungahte erawh chuan LALPA hnen atanga thlamuanna kumkhuain a awm reng ang,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:34 chutichuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu a han chho a, a han bei a, a that ta a; tin, thlalerah ama inah chuan an phum ta a." 
1Kings2:35 Tin, lalin Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu sipaihote chungah a ai a awhtir a: tin, puithiam Zadoka chu lalin Abiathara ai a awhtir a." 
1Kings2:36 Tin, lalin Simeia chu a kohtir a, a hnenah, ""Jerusalem-ah hian in sa la, chutah chuan awm la, chuta ta chu khawi dangah mah chhuak suh." 
1Kings2:37 I chhuah ni, Kidron lui i kan ni la la chuan i thi ngei ngei ang tih hre rawh khai: i thisen chu nangma lu chungah ngei a awm ang,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:38 Tin, Simeia chuan lal hnenah, ""A dik alawm: lalpa ka puin a sawi ang chuan i chhiahhlawhin a ti zel ang,"" a ti a." 
1Kings2:39 Tin, Simeia chu Jerusalem-ah chuan rei fe chu a awm a. Tin, heti hi ani a, kum thum a lo vei hnu chuan Simeia chhiahhlawhte zinga pahnih chu gath khaw lal Maaka fapa Akisa hnenah an tlan a. Tin, 'Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhte chu Gath khuaah an awm e,"" tiin Simeia chu an hrilh a." 
1Kings2:40 Tin, Simeia chu a tho a, a sabengtung a thuam a, a chhiahhlawhte zawng turin Gath khuaah Akisa hnenah chuan a kal ta a: tin, Simeia chuan gath khua ata a chhiahhlawhte chu a va hruai ta a." 
1Kings2:41 Tin, Simeia chu Jerusalem khua ata a chhuak a, gath khuaah a va kal a, a lo haw leh tih Solomona chu an hrilh a." 
1Kings2:42 Tin, lal chuan Simeia chu a kohtir a, a hnenah, ""I chhiah ni, ram danga i chhuah ni la la chuan i thi ngei ngei ang,' ti khan LALPA hming chhalin chhia ka chhamtir chein, ka hriattir che ani lo'm ni? Tin, nang pawhin ka hnenah khan, 'I thu sawi ka hriat hi a tha e,"" i tih kha." 
1Kings2:43 Eng vanga LALPA chhechham leh thu ka pek che kha hlen lo nge i nih? a ti a. 
1Kings2:44 Tin, lal vek chuan Simeia hnenah, ""I thinlung chhungril suahsualzia, ka pa Davida chunga i tihziate kha i hre vek a: chutichuan LALPA'n i suahsualna hi nangma lu chungah ngei a rawn lettir ang." 
1Kings2:45 Lal Solomona erawh chu malsawmin a awm ang a. Davida lalthutthleng chu LALPA hmaa kumkhuaa tihngheh ani ang,"" a ti a.Chutichuan lal chua Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu thu a pe a; ani chu a chuak a, a va bei a, a that ta a. Tichuan ram chu Solomona kutah tihnghehin a awm ta a." 
1Kings2:46 Chutichuan lal chua Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu thu a pe a; ani chu a chuak a, a va bei a, a that ta a. Tichuan ram chu Solomona kutah tihnghehin a awm ta a." 
1Kings3:1 Tin, Solomonan Aigupta lal Pharaoa nena inkungkaihna a siam a, Pharaoa fanu a nei a, ama in leh LALPA in a sak hma leh Jerusalem khua kulha a hung vel hma loh chuan Davida khawpuiah a awmtir a." 
1Kings3:2 Mipuihote chu hmunsangahte an inthawi mai thin a, chu mi hma chuan LALPA hming atan in sak a la awm rih loh avangin:" 
1Kings3:3 Solomona chuan LALPA chu a hmangaih a, a pa Davida thuruatte chu a zawm thin a: hmun sangahte a inthawi a, rimtuite a hal mai thin pawh a." 
1Kings3:4 Tin, lal chu inthawi turin Gibeon khuaah a kal a; chu chu hmun sang pawimawh taka chu ani si a; Solomona chuan chu mi maicham chungah chuan halral thilhlan sangkhat zet a hlan a." 
1Kings3:5 Tin, Gibeona khuaah chuan LALPA Solomona hnenah zanah a mumangah a rawn inlar a: tin, Pathianin, ""Dil teh, eng nge ka pek ang che?"" a ti a." 
1Kings3:6 Tin, Solomona chuan, ""I chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida kha i mithmuhah thutakah leh, felnaah leh, thinlung dik tak pua a awm ang zel khan nang chuan a hnenah khawngaihna nasa tak i lantir a; nangin k he khawngaihna nasa tak hi a tan i vohsak a, nangin a lalthutthlenga thu tur fapa i pe a, vawiina a lo awkm ta ngei ang hian." 
1Kings3:7 Tichuan aw LALPA ka pathian, nangin i chhiahhlawh hi ka pa Davida aiah chuan lalah i lo siam ta a: kei zawng naupang chhia mai ka ni a; thu haw lam leh kal lam pawh hi ka la hre lo a." 
1Kings3:8 I chhiahhlawh hi mite i thlanho, mi tam tak, an tam avanga chhiar sen rual loh leh, a zat hriat sen rual lohte zingah hian a awm a ni a." 
1Kings3:9 Chutichuan i mite rorelsakna turin i chhiahhlawh hi hriatna thinlung pe ang che, a chhia leh a tha ka thliar theihna'n; i mi heti zozai hi tuin nge rorelsak thei ang le?"" a ti a." 
1Kings3:10 Tin, Solomona chu thil chu a dil avangin, chu thu sawi chuan LALPA a tilawm hle mai a." 
1Kings3:11 Tin, Pathianin a hnenah, ""Nangin i tan dam reina dil lo a, hetiang hi i dil zawk avang leh, i tan hausaknate pawh dil lo a, i hmelmate thihna pawh dil lo a, i tan rorel thiamna i dil zawk avangin," 
1Kings3:12 ngai teh, i dil ang chuan ka ti ta a: ngai teh, finna leh hriatna thinlung ka pe a che; tichuan i hmaah nangmah ang reng reng tumah an awm lo a, i hnuah pawh nangmah ang reng reng chu tumah an lo awm tawh hek lo ang." 
1Kings3:13 Tin, i dil loh, hausakna leh ropuina pawh ka pe bawk ang che; tichuan i dam chhungin lal zingah chuan nangmah ang reng reng an awm lo ang." 
1Kings3:14 I pa Davida'n a zawh anga ka thuruatte leh ka thupekte pawm tura ka kawngte i zawh chuan ka dam reitir bawk ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings3:15 Tin, Solomona chu a han harh a, ngai teh, mumang a lo ni a: tin, Jerusalem-ah a kal a, LALPA thuthlunna bawm hmaah a ding a, halral thilhlan leh remna thilhlante a hlan a, a puipa zawngte tan ruai a theh a." 
1Kings3:16 Hmeichhe pahnih, nawhchizuar, lal hnenah chuan an kal a, ahmaah an han ding a." 
1Kings3:17 Tin, hmeichhe pakhat chuan, ""Aw ka pu, hmeichhia nen hian in khata cheng dun kan ni a; chu mi ina a awm ve lai chuan nau ka hring a." 
1Kings3:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ka nau hrin achin ni thum hnuah chuan he hmeichhia pawh hian a hring ve a; a awmdun kan ni a; chu ina awm keimahni pahnih ngawt lo chu, chu inah chuan tumah mikhual awm an awm lo a." 
1Kings3:19 Tin, he hmeichhe fa hi zanah a lo thi a; a delhhlum a ni." 
1Kings3:20 Tichuan zan laiah a tho a, i bawihnu hi a muthilh hlanin, ka fapa ka bula mi chu a la a, a pawm a, a fa thia chu mi pawmtir a." 
1Kings3:21 A tuk zinga ka fa hnute pe tura ka han thawh chuan, ngai teh, a thi a lo ni reng mai a: nimahsela zingah ka han en chian chuan, ngai teh, ka fapa, ka hrina kha kha a lo ni hauh lo mai a,"" a ti a." 
1Kings3:22 Tin, hmeichhe dang chuan, ""Ni lo, a dam zawka hi ka fapa ani a, a thia hi i fapa a ni,"" a ti ve a. Pakhata chuan, ""Ni lo, a htia hi i fapa a ni a, a dama hi ka fapa ani zawk,"" a la ti tlat bawk a. Chutiang chuan lal hmaah chuan an sawi ve ve a." 
1Kings3:23 Tichuan lal chuan, ""Pakhatin, 'A dam zawka hi ka fapa ni a, a thia hi ifapa ni' a ti a: tin, pakhatin, 'Ni lo a htia hi i fapa a ni a, a dama hi ka fapa ani zawk,' a ti bawk si a,"" a ti a." 
1Kings3:24 Tin, lal chuan, ""Khandaih mi han lak teh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan khandaih chu lal hmaah chuan an rawn la a." 
1Kings3:25 Tin, lal chuan, ""Naute dama kha bung hnihah chhuah u la, a chanve chu pakhat kha pe u la, a chanve chu pakhat kha pe rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Kings3:26 Tichuan naute dama nu chuan a fa chu alainat em em mai si a, lal hnenah chuan, ""Aw ka pu, naute dama hi mah pe mai rawh, a thah zawng that lul suh ang che,"" a ti a. Pakhat zawk erawh chuan, ""Ka ta ni bik hek suh, i ta ni bik hek suh; bung mai rawh,"" a ti a." 
1Kings3:27 Tichuan lal chuan a chhang a, ""Naute dama kha pe rawh u, that hlek suh u: amah ngei kha anu a nih kha,"" a ti a.Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan chu thua lal rel dan chu an lo hria a; lal chu an tih ta hle mai a: rorelna turin Pathianin finna chu amahah chuan a awm tih an hre ta si a." 
1Kings3:28 Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan chu thua lal rel dan chu an lo hria a; lal chu an tih ta hle mai a: rorelna turin Pathianin finna chu amahah chuan a awm tih an hre ta si a." 
1Kings4:1 Tin, lal Solomona chu Israel-ho zawng zawng lalah a awm ta a." 
1Kings4:2 Hengte hi a mi lianho neihte chu an ni: Zadoka fapa Azaria chu puithiam a ni a; 
1Kings4:3 Sisa fapa Elihorepha leh Ahijate chu lehkha ziaktu an ni a; Ahiluda fapa Jehosaphat chu chanchin ziaktu ani a; 
1Kings4:4 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu sipai hotu a ni a Zadoka leh Abiathara chu puithiam an ni a: 
1Kings4:5 Nathana fapa Azaria chu hotute chunga mi ani a; Nathana fapa Zabuda chu puithiam leh lal thian a ni fawm a; 
1Kings4:6 Ahisara chu in chhung lam hotu ani a; Abda fapa Adonirama chu hnathawka rawih luihte hotu a ni. 
1Kings4:7 Tin, Solomona chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng chungah chuan hotu sawm leh pahnih a nei a, chungho chuan lal tan leh a chhungkuate tan chuan ei tur an ngaihtuah thin a: mi pakhatin kum khatah thla khat zel ei tura ngaihtua tur a ni." 
1Kings4:8 Hengte hi an hmingte chu a ni: Ephraim tlang ramah Ben-hura: 
1Kings4:9 Makaz khuaah te, Saalbim khuaah te, Beth-semes khuaah te, Elon-bethhanan khuaah te Ben-dekera;" 
1Kings4:10 Aruboth ramah Ben-heseda; ani chuan Sok leh Hepher ram zawng zawng a chang tel a: 
1Kings4:11 Dor khaw zosang ram zawng zawngah Ben-abinadaba; ani chuan Solomona fanu Taphathi nupuiah a nei a: 
1Kings4:12 Taanak khua leh Meggido khuaah te, Jezreel khaw hnuai, Zarethan khaw bula awm Beth-sean bial zawng zawngah te, Beth-sean atanga Abelmehola-ah te, Jokmeam ram dep thlengin Ahiluda fapa Baana:" 
1Kings4:13 Ramoth-gilead khuaah Ben-gebera; ani chuan Mansea fapa Jaira khua, Basan rama Argob bial, khaw ropui tak tak khaw sawmruk, kulh leh a kalhna dar tlawn neite pawh a chang tel a:" 
1Kings4:14 Mahanaim khuaah Idoa fapa Ahinadaba: 
1Kings4:15 Naphtali ramah Ahimaaza; ani pawh chuan Solomona fanu Basemathi nupuiah anei a: 
1Kings4:16 Aser leh Bealoth khuaahte Husaia fapa Baana: 
1Kings4:17 Isakar ramah Parua fapa Jehosaphata: 
1Kings4:18 Benjamin raman Ela fapa Simeia: 
1Kings4:19 Amor-ho lal Sihona leh Basan lal Oga ram, Gilead ramah Uria fapa Gebera; chu ramah chuan htou pakhat a awm." 
1Kings4:20 Judate leh Israelte chu tuifinriat kama tiau vaivut zat zetin an tam a, an eiin an in a, hlim takin an awm thin a." 
1Kings4:21 Tichuan Solomona chuan Lui atangin Philistia-ho ram leh Aigupta ramri thlengin ram zawng zawng chungah chuan ro a rel a: lawmmante an rawn keng thin a, Solomona dam chhung zawng chuan a rawng an bawl thin a." 
1Kings4:22 Solomona ni khat ei tawk chu chhngphut dip tak tehkhawng sawmthum leh chhangphut tehkhawng sawmruk ani a; 
1Kings4:23 bawngpa thau tak sawm te, bawngpa tla mi sawmhnih te, beram za te nen; chung lo pawh chu sakhi te, sangai te, sakhipa te, ar chawm thaute pawh." 
1Kings4:24 Luiral piah lam ram zawng zawng -Tipsa atanga Gaza thlengin, Lui ral piah lama lalho zawng zawng chungah chuan a lal a: a chhehvela mi zawng zawngte nen chuan ralmuangin an awm hlawm a." 
1Kings4:25 Tin, Solomona dam chhung zawng chuan Judaho leh Israel-ho chu Dan atanga Beer seba khaw thlengii mi tin, mahni grep hrui bulah leh mahni theipui bulah hchuan thlamuang takin an awm theuh a." 
1Kings4:26 Tin, Solomona chuan a tawlailir hnuktu sakawr in singli leh sakawr chung chuang mi singkhat leh sanghnih a nei a." 
1Kings4:27 chung hotute chuan mahni chan thla zelah Solomona leh lal Solomona dawhkana rawn kil vetu zawng zawngte ei tur chu an ngaihtuah thin a; pek kim loh an nei ngai lo. 
1Kings4:28 Mi tinin an tih tura ruat ang zelin a awmna tur hmunah chuan sakawrte leh ran tlan chak takt tan barli leh buhpawlte an rawn dah bawk thin a. 
1Kings4:29 Tin, Pathianin Solomona chu finna leh hriatna nasa tak leh, rilru zauna tuifinriat kama tiau vaivut ang mai a pe a." 
1Kings4:30 Solomona finna chuan khawchhak fate zawng zawng fina leh Aigupta mite finna zawng zawng chu akhum vek a. 
1Kings4:31 Mi zawng zawng aiin a fing a ni: Mahola fa te, Ezra mi Ethana te, Hemana te, Kalkola te, Darda te ai pawhin: tichuan a vel hnam zawng zawngte zingah chuan a hming a thang ta a." 
1Kings4:31 Mi zawng zawng aiin a fing a ni: Mahola fa te, Ezra mi Ethana te, Hemana te, Kalkola te, Darda te ai pawhin: tichuan a vel hnam zawng zawngte zingah chuan a hming a thang ta a." 
1Kings4:32 Thufing sangthum a sawi a: tin, a hlate chu sangkhat leh panga a ni." 
1Kings4:33 Thing chanchinte pawh Lebanon tlang sidar thing atanga kulha lo chawr chhuak hussop chenin a sawi thin a: sa chanchin te, bawkvaka kal chi chanchin e, sangha chanchin te pawh a sawi thin a.Tichuan Solomona finna chanchin hre tawh phawt chu khawvel lalho zawng zawng atangin chi tina mi a finna ngaithla tur an lo kal thin a." 
1Kings4:34 Tichuan Solomona finna chanchin hre tawh phawt chu khawvel lalho zawng zawng atangin chi tina mi a finna ngaithla tur an lo kal thin a. 
1Kings5:1 Tin, tura lal Hiraman Solomona hnenah a mite a tir a; a pa aiah lal atan hriak an thih tih a lo hre ta si a: Hirama chu Davida ngaina thintu a ni fo reng a." 
1Kings5:2 Tin, Solomona chuan Hirama hnenah," 
1Kings5:3 Ka pa Davida khan LALPA'n a kephah hnuaia a dah hma loh kha chuan a vel kil tin, kil tanga indonate avang khan, LALPA a Pathian hming atan in a sa thei lo tih i hria a." 
1Kings5:4 Tunah erawh chuan LALPA ka Pathianin kil tin, kil tangah muannna min lo neihtir ta a; hmelmate an awm ta lo a, vanduaina pawh a awm ta hek lo." 
1Kings5:5 Tin, ngai teh, LALPA'n ka pa Davida hnena, 'I fapa i aia i lalthutthleng ka la luahtir tura chuan ka hming atan in chu a la sa ang,' tia a lo sawi tawh ang khan, LALPA ka Pathian hming atan in sak ka tum a." 
1Kings5:6 Chutichuan Lebanon tlanga mi sidar thigte mi kihsak turin thu pe langin, ka chhiahhlawhte pawh i chhiahhlawhte zingah an tel ve ang a; tin, i chhiahhlawhte hlawh chu i sawi ang apiang ka pe zel ang che: Zidon mite anga thing kih thiam kan zingah tumah an awm lo tih i hre si,"" tiin mi a tir a." 
1Kings5:7 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Hiraman Solomona thu a lo hriat chuan a lawm ta em em mai a, ""Heng mi tam tak chunga roel tura fapa fing tak Davida petu LALPA chu vawiinah hian fakin awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
1Kings5:8 Tin, Hiraman Solomona hnenah, ""I thu mi han chah chu ka lo hria a: sidar thing thu leh far thing thu chu i mamawh apiang ka lo ti ang e." 
1Kings5:9 Ka chhiahhlawhten Lebanon tlang atangin tuifinriat thlengin an rawn la thla ang a: tin, i hmun mi ruatsak tura tuifinriata tawlh turin ka teltir ang a, tin, chu mi hmunah chuan ka phelhtir ang a, nangin i lo la dawn nia: tin, nang pawhin ka chhungkuate ei tur tumin ka mamawh i lo phuhru ve thung ani ang chu,"" tiin mi a tir a." 
1Kings5:10 Chutichuan Hirama chuan sidar thing leh far thing chu Solomona chu amamawh apiang a pe a. 
1Kings5:11 Tin, Solomonan Hirama chu a chhungkuate ei atan buh tehkhawng sawmhnih a pe a: chu chu Solomonan kum tina Hirama a pek thin dan chu a ni." 
1Kings5:12 Tin, LALPA'n a tiam ang ngeiin Solomona chu finna a pe a; tin, Hirama leh Solomona karah chuan inremna a awm a; an pahnih chuan thu an thlung dun ta a." 
1Kings5:13 Tin, lal Solomona chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng zinga mi hnathawka rawih lui pawl a siam a; rawih lui pawl chu mi singthum an ni." 
1Kings5:14 Lebanon-ah chuan thla khata inthlak zelin singkhat a tir thin a: thla khat Lebanon-ah an han awm a, thla hnih anmahni in lamah: Adoni rama chu hnathawka rawih luihte hotu a ni." 
1Kings5:15 Tin, Solomona chuan thil phur mi singsarih leh, lung chher mi singriat tlangahte a nei a;" 
1Kings5:16 chungte chu tiam loin Solomona chuan a hna chunga hotu bik, hnathawk vengtu sangthum leh zathum anei bawk a." 
1Kings5:17 Tin, lal thupekin in lungphu chu lung chher saa rem turin lung lian pui pui, lung man tam tak takte an rawn la a.Tin, in satuho Solomona mite leh Hirama mite leh Gebal mite chuan lungte chu an chher a, in sakna tur chuan thing leh lungte chu an buatsaih a." 
1Kings5:18 Tin, in satuho Solomona mite leh Hirama mite leh Gebal mite chuan lungte chu an chher a, in sakna tur chuan thing leh lungte chu an buatsaih a." 
1Kings6:1 Tin, heti hi ani a, Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata an chhuah achin kum zali leh sawmriatna kum, Israel-hote chunga Solomona a lal kum lina, Ziv thla, thla hnihna thla chuan LALPA in sak chu a tan a." 
1Kings6:2 Tin, Solomonan LALPA tana in a sak chu a dung lam tawng sawmruk ani a, a vang lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a san lam chu tawng sawmthum a ni." 
1Kings6:3 Tin, chu mi ina hmung thianghlim hma lama hulhliap chu a in vang lam che, tawng sawmhniha sei a ni a, a hma lama mi vang lam chu tawng sawm a ni." 
1Kings6:4 Tin, in atan chuan tukverh zimte thil kawkalh awmin a siam a." 
1Kings6:5 Tin, a in bang velin, biak in bang velah pawh, biakna hmung bang velah pawh chu mi in bang si chuan in chhawng nei a sa a: tin, a vel chuan pindan a siam a:" 
1Kings6:6 a chhawng hnuaihnung ber chu a vang lam tawng nga a ni a, a laita chu a vang lam tawng ruk ani a, a pahthumna chu a vang lam tawng sarih a ni: kalkhangte chu in banga inrawlh ngai loin pawn lamah chuan a velin in bangah chuan a nghahna a siam vang a ni." 
1Kings6:7 Tin, in chu, an sak lai chuan lung laihna hmuna chher sa veka sak a ni: tichuan an sak chhung zawng chu tuhoh ri te, hreipui ri te, thir hriamhrei ri reng rengte chu mi inah chuan hriat ani lo." 
1Kings6:8 Pindan laita berte kawngka chu chu mi in ding lampangah chuan a awm a: a laitaah chuan rahka vialah an lawn chho a, tin, a laita atang chuan a pathumnaah." 
1Kings6:9 Chutichuan in chu a han sa a, a zo ta; in chu sidar khanchhuk leh a phekin a khuh a." 
1Kings6:10 Tin, in chhawng neite chu a insi vekin tawng nga theuha sangin a sa a: chungte chu in nen chuan sidar thinga zawm a ni." 
1Kings6:11 Tin, LALPA thu chu Solomona hnenah a lo thleng a," 
1Kings6:12 He in i sak lai mek chungchang thu hi - ka thuruatte i pawm a, ka rorelte i zawm a, ka thupek zawng zawngte zawm tura i pawm phawt zawngin i pa Davida hnena ka lo sawi tawh, ka thu kha i chungah hian ka tinghet ang." 
1Kings6:13 Tin, Israela thlahte zingah hian ka cheng ang a, ka mi Israel-hote hi ka thlahthlam lo ang,"" tiin." 
1Kings6:14 Tichuan Solomona chuan in chu a sa a, a zo ta a." 
1Kings6:15 In chhung lam bangah chuan sidar thingphel a hmang a; a chhuat atanga chung lam bang thlengin a chhung lamah chuan thing a bel vek a: a chhuatah chuan thingphel a phah belh a. 
1Kings6:16 Tin, in kawmchar lam tawng sawmhnih chu a chhuat atanga a bangte chenin sidar thingphel vekin a siam a: biakna hmun, hmun thianghlim ber atan pawh a chhung lamah chuan ahmang a." 
1Kings6:17 Tin, in, biakna hmun bula biak in chu a dung lam tawng sawmli a ni." 
1Kings6:18 Tin, in chhung lamah chuan a kuhmum leh a par parh lema ker mawi sidar thing a awm a: a vai chuan sidar thing vek ani a; lung reng reng a lang lo." 
1Kings6:19 Tin, LALPA thuthluna bawm dahna turin chu mi inah a chhunga biakna lamah chuan hmun a buatsaih a." 
1Kings6:20 Tin, chu mi biakna hmun chhung chua dung lam tawng sawmhnih, a vang lam tawng sawmhnih, a san lam tawng sawmhnih a ni a; chu chu rangkachak hlir hlak tiin a luan a: tin, sidar maicham chu a luan bawk a." 
1Kings6:21 Chutichuan Solomona chuan chu mi in chhung chu rangkachak hlir hlak tiin a luan a: 
1Kings6:22 tin, in chu a zaa a peih thlengin a pumin rangkachak tiin a luan zel a: b iakna hmunamaicham pum pui pawh chu rangkachak tiin a luan a." 
1Kings6:23 Tin, biakna hmunah chuan tawng sawm ve vea sang, cherub pahnih olive thingin a siam a." 
1Kings6:24 Tin, cherub thla pakhat chu tawng nga ani a, cherub thle lehlam chu tawng nga bawk a ni: thla pakhat hmawr atang a thla lehlam hmawr inkar chu tawng sawm a ni." 
1Kings6:25 Cherub pakhat pawh chu tawng sawm a ni a: Cherubte chu intiat chiah leh pian dan inang ve ve chiah a ni. 
1Kings6:26 Cherub pakhat sanzawng chu tawng sawm ani a, cherub pakhat pawh chu chu mi chen bawk chu a ni." 
1Kings6:27 Tin, cherubte chu in chhungril zawkah chuan a dah a; tin, cherubte thla chu a inzar a, pakhat thla chuan bang lehlam a va dek a, tin, cherub pakhat a thla pawh bang leh lam chu a dek bawk a; chu mi in lai takah chuan an thla leh an thla chu a insi a." 
1Kings6:28 Tin, cherub-te chu rangkachak tiin aluan a." 
1Kings6:29 Tin, in bang zawng zawngte chu a velin cherub te, tum thing leh pangpar parh lemte ker mawiin chhung lam leh pawn lamah chuan a siam a." 
1Kings6:30 Tin, a in chhuat chu chhung lam leh pawn lamah rangkachak tiin a luan a." 
1Kings6:31 Tin, biakna hmun luhna atan olivthing kawngkhar a siam a: kawngka lu chung leh kawngka biangte chu a bang hmun ngaa then a hmun khat tiat a ni." 
1Kings6:32 tin, oliv thingin kawngkhar pahnih a siam a; chu miah chuan cherubte, tum thin gleh pangpar parh lem te ker mawiin a siam a. chung chu rangkachak tiin a luan a; tin, cherubte leh tum thingte chu rangkachak a hnawih a." 
1Kings6:33 Tin, biak in luhna atan a bang hmun lia thena hmun khat tiatin oliv thing kawngka ban a siam bawk a:" 
1Kings6:34 far thing kawngkhar pahnih nen; kawngkhar pakhata phek hnih chu thlep thei a ni a, kawngkhar pakhata phek hnih pawh chu thlep thei a ni." 
1Kings6:35 chungahte chuan cherub te, tum thing leh pangpar parh lemte a ker a: cchung ker mawi chu mam takin rangkachak tiin a luan a." 
1Kings6:36 Biak in hung chhung kawtlai chhungril zawk chu lung chher chhawng thum leh, sidar thingphel thuah khatin a siam a.A kum lina, Ziv thlaah chuan LALPA in lungphum chu rem a ni a. Tin, kum leh kum khatna, bul thla, thla riatnaah chuan in chu ruahman ang chiahin, a engkim chu peih vek a ni a. Chutichuan kum sarih a sa a ni." 
1Kings6:37 A kum lina, Ziv thlaah chuan LALPA in lungphum chu rem a ni a. Tin, kum leh kum khatna, bul thla, thla riatnaah chuan in chu ruahman ang chiahin, a engkim chu peih vek a ni a. Chutichuan kum sarih a sa a ni." 
1Kings7:1 Tin, Solomona chuan ama in chu kum sawm leh kum thum a sa a, a in chu a peih vek a." 
1Kings7:2 Lebanon Ngawpui In sidar ban tlar li, ban chunga sidar thingphel chungah chuan a sa bawk a; a dung lam chu tang za ani a, a vang lam chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a san lam chu tawng sawmthum a ni." 
1Kings7:3 Tin, chu chu bana innghat pindan sawmli leh panga chung lamah chuan sidar thingphela khuh ania; tlar khatah chuan sawm leh pa nga zel." 
1Kings7:4 Tin, tlar thumin tukverh a awm a, eng leh engte chu tlar thumin a inep vek a." 
1Kings7:5 Tin, kawngkhar leh ban zawng zawngte chu thingphelin kil lia siam a ni a: eng leh engte chu tlar thumin a inep vek a." 
1Kings7:6 Tin, hulhliap chu ban neiin a siam a; a dung lam chu tawng sawmnga ani a, a vang lam chu tawng sawmnag a ni a, a vang lam chu tawng sawmthum a ni a; tin, chung hmaahte chuan hulhliap a siam a; bante leh ahmaa luhna kailawnte nen." 
1Kings7:7 Tin, a rorelna tur lalthutthleng hulhliap, rorelna hulhliap chu a siam bawk a: chu chu chhuat lehlam atanga a lehlam thlenga sidar thinga khuh a ni." 
1Kings7:8 Tin, a awmna tur in, hulhliap chhung, hungchhung kawtlai danga awm chu chutiang bawka siam a ni. Pharaoa fanu (Solomona nupuia neiha chu) chu hulhliap ang bawk chuan a in a saksak bawk a." 
1Kings7:9 chung zawng zawng chu lung man tam tak tak, lung a tawk chiah zela chher, zainaa zaia sak a ni a, chhung lam pawh, pawn lam pawh a lungphum atanga a ler thlengin, tin, chutiang bawkin pawn lamah hungchhung kawtlai zau tak thlengin." 
1Kings7:10 Tin, lungphu chu lung man tam tak tak, lung lian pui pui, lung tawng sawmte, lung tawng riattea rem a ni a." 
1Kings7:11 Chu mi chung lam chu lung man tam tak tak, lung a tawk chiah zela chher, leh sidar thing a ni a." 
1Kings7:12 Tin, a velin hungchung kawtlai zau tak chu lung chher chhawng thum leh sidar thingphel thuah khata hung a ni a; LALPA in hungchhung kawtlai chhungril zawk leh, in hulhliap ang bawk khan." 
1Kings7:13 Tin, Lal Solomonan mi a tir a, tura khua ata Hirama a ko a." 
1Kings7:14 Chu mi chu Naphtali hnam hmeithai fa a ni a, a pa chu tura khuaa mi, dar chher mi a ni a; ani chu dar chher kawngah reng reng chuan a fingin a hrethiamin a themthiam hle mai a. Lal Solomona hnenah chuan a kal a, a hna zawng zawng chu a thawhsak vek a." 
1Kings7:15 tin, tawng riata sang dar ban pahnih a siam a; a lehlam chu tawng sawm leh tawng hnih a ni ve ve a." 
1Kings7:16 Ban chhipa dah tur dar chhun bawk pahnih a siam a: bawk pakhat san lam chu tawng nga ani a, tin, bawk pakhat san lam pawh chu tawng nga a ni." 
1Kings7:17 Ban chhipa bawk atante chuan tial chik chek leh herh chin chiante hi a awm a; bawk pakhat atan chuan pasarih, tin, bawk pakhat atan pawh chuan pasarih bawk." 
1Kings7:18 Tichuan bante chu a siam a; chung ban chhipa bawkte tuamna tur chuan tial chik cher pakhat chungah a velin tlar hnih a awm a: tin, chutiang bawk chuan bawk pakhat chungah pawh a awmtir bawk a." 
1Kings7:19 Tin, hulhliap chhipa bawkah chuan lili lem hi a chuang a, tawng li." 
1Kings7:20 Tin, ban pahnih chhipa bawkahahte chuan a tlangah, tial chik chek bul lawkah chuan pawmgranet te a awm bawk a: tin, pawmgranet chu chu mi bawkahte chuan a tlangah, tial chik chek bul lawkah chuan pawmgranet te a awm bawk a: tin, pawmgranet chu chu a bawkahte chuan zahnih ve ve a tlarin a awm a." 
1Kings7:21 Tin, biak in hulhliapah chuan bante chu a dintir a: ding lam ban chu a dintir a, a hmingah Jakin a vuah a: tin, vei lam ban chu a dintir a, a hmingah Boaz a vuah a." 
1Kings7:22 Tin, a ban chhipah chuan lili lem a chuang a: tichuan ban lam hna chu peih a ni ta a." 
1Kings7:23 Tin, dar tuizem lianpui, tawng sawm tla, a san lam tawng nga a chhung a: a tlang chu tawng sawmthum bial vel a ni." 
1Kings7:24 Tin, a tlang hnuaiah chuan kuhmum leh hian a vel chhuak a, tawng sawm a ni a, zem vel chuan a awm a: chung kuhmumte chu tlar hnihin a awm a, chhung tel nghal a ni." 
1Kings7:25 chu chu bawngpa sawm leh pahnih chungah a innghat a, pathumin hmar lam an hawi a, pathumin thlang lam an hawi a, pathumin chhim lam an hawi a, pathumin chhak lam an hawi a. Tin, tuizem chu an chungah chuan a inhung a, an mei lam chuan chhung lam a hawi a," 
1Kings7:26 tichuan kutphah bawka chhah a ni a; a tlang chu lili pangpar ang, no tlang anga siam ani a: bath sanghnih dawng a ni." 
1Kings7:27 Tin, hunchhan swm darin a siam a; hunchhan pakhat sei lam chu tawng li ani a, a vang lam chu tawng li bawk a ni a, a a san lam chu tawng thum a ni." 
1Kings7:28 Tin, hunchhan siam dan chu hetiang hi a ni: chung chuan khuar a nei a, a khuarte chu a tlangte inkarah a awm a:" 
1Kings7:29 tin, a tlangte inkar khuarahte chuan sakeibaknei te, sebawngpa te, cherub te a chuang a; a tlang chungahte chuan ahunchhan a awm a: tin, sakeibakneite leh sebawngpate hnuai lamah chuan cheimawina te tete pawh a awm thliah a." 
1Kings7:30 Tin, hunchhanahte chuan dar tawlailir pali leh dar tlung a awm theuh va: a kil liahte chuan innghahna a awm theuh va: insilna bel hnuai lamah chuan a innghahna chhun a awm a, a sir theuhvah chuan cheimawina a awm theuh a." 
1Kings7:31 Tin, belval kual chhung kotlang chu tawng khat tla a ni a: a rawng kotlang chu belval anga bial a ni a, tanwg khat leh a chanve a ni: tin, a rawng tlang vel chu tial mawi ani a, a khuarte chu kil li a ni a, a bial lo." 
1Kings7:32 Tin, tawlailir palite chu a khuar hnuai lamahte chuan a awm a; tin, tawlailir tlungte chu hunchhanah chuan a awm a: tawlailir san lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni." 
1Kings7:33 Tin, chu tawlailir siam dan chu sakawr tawlailir ke siam dan ang hi a ni a: a tluing te, a belval kual te, a chhunkalhna te, a lai bawkte chu chhun vek a ni." 
1Kings7:34 Tin, hunchhan kil li theuhvah chuan innghahna pali a awm a: chu mi innghahnate chu hunchhan nen pumkhat vek a ni." 
1Kings7:35 Tin, a hunchhan chungah chuan belvalkuial, tawng chanvea sang hi a awm a: hunchhan chunga a hunna kete leh akhuarte chu pumkhat vek a ni." 
1Kings7:36 Tin, a hunna ke phekahte leh, a khuarahte chuan a zau angzia ziain cheub te, sakeibaknei te, tum thingte a hchuantir a, a vel chuan cheimawina hi a awm thliah a." 
1Kings7:37 Chutiang vek chuan hunchhan sawmte chu a siam a: a vai chuan pumkhata chhun a ni theuh a, intiat thiau, siam dan inang chiah vek a ni." 
1Kings7:38 Tin, insilna bel sawm darin a siam a: insilna bel pakhat chuan bath sawmli a dawng a: insilna bel chu tawng li theuh a ni: hunchhan sawm chungah chuan insilna bel pakhat a inhung theuh a." 
1Kings7:39 Tin, buhchhante chu in ding lampangah panga a hung a, in vei lampangah panga: tin, tuizem chu in ding lampangah chhak lamah chhim chhawngin a hung a." 
1Kings7:40 Tin, Hirama chu insilna bel te, vut lawhna te, maihunte a siam a. Chutichuan Hirama chuan LALPA in atan Solomona a siamsak zawng zawng chu a peih ta vek a:" 
1Kings7:41 ban pahnih te, ban chhipa bel anga bawk pahnih te, ban chhipa bel anga bawk pahnih tuamna tial chik chek pahnih te," 
1Kings7:42 chu mi tuamna tial chik chek pahnih atana pawmgranet zali te, ban chhipa bel anga bawk pahnih tuamna tur tial chik chek ve ve atana pawmgranet tlar hnih te kha;" 
1Kings7:43 tin, hunchhan sawm leh hunchhan chunga insilna bel sawm te," 
1Kings7:44 tuizem leh a hnuaia sebawngpa sawm leh pahnih te," 
1Kings7:45 belte leh, vut lawhnatte leh, maihunte nen: chung bungbel zawng zawng LALPA in atana Hiraman lal Solomona a siamsak chu dar nawh tleta siam vek a ni." 
1Kings7:46 Jordan phai zawlah Sukkoth leh Zarethan inkar bellei hmunah a ni, lal chuan a chhun ni." 
1Kings7:47 Tin, Solomona chuan chung bungbel zawng zawngte chu a tam em em avangin buk chhuah lohin a dah mai a: dar buk zat chu hriat chhuah rual a ni lo." 
1Kings7:48 Tin, Solomona chuan LALPA ina bungbel awm zawng zawng chu a siam a; rangkachak maicham leh chhangdah awmna dawhkan chu, rangkachakin." 
1Kings7:49 Tin, biakna hmun hma zawn khawnvar dahna dinglama panga leh vei lama panga chu rangkachak hlir hlakin; pangpar te, khawnvarte leh chaichete leh rangkachakin;" 
1Kings7:50 no te, khawnvar puan chehna te, maihun te, fian te, meilakna te chu rangkachak hlir hlakin; in chhun gril zawk, hmun thianghlim ber kawngkhara mite leh in (biak in chu) kawngkhar vuahnate chu rangkachakin.Chutichuan lal Solomonan LALPA in atana a siam zawng zawng chu a lo peih ta vek a. Tichuan Solomona chuan a pa Davida lo hlan sa tawh - tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbel te chu a la lut a, LALPA ina rote zingah a dah ta a." 
1Kings7:51 Chutichuan lal Solomonan LALPA in atana a siam zawng zawng chu a lo peih ta vek a. Tichuan Solomona chuan a pa Davida lo hlan sa tawh - tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbel te chu a la lut a, LALPA ina rote zingah a dah ta a." 
1Kings8:1 Chutichuan Solomona chuan Israel upaho te, an hnam puipa zawng zawng te, Israela thlahho chhungkaw puipate chu, Jerusalem khuaa lal Solomona hnenah chuan Davida khawpui Zion ata LALPA thuthlung bawm zawn chho turin a khawm chiam a." 
1Kings8:2 Tin, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu Ethanim thla (thla sarihnaah chuan kutnaah lal Solomona hnenah an inkhawm chiam a." 
1Kings8:3 Tin, Israel upaho zawng zawngte chu an lo kal a, puithiamte chuan bawm chu an zawn a," 
1Kings8:4 Tin, LALPA bawm leh, inbiakna puan in leh, Puan Ina bungbel thianghlim zawng zawngte chu an zawn chho a; chungte chu puithiamte leh Levi chite chuan an zawn chho a." 
1Kings8:5 Tin, lal Solomona leh Israel-ho pungkhwm zawng zawng, a hnena rawn inkhawmte chu bawm hmaah an awmho a, beram leh bawm hmaah an awmho a, beram leh bawngpa a tam avanga chiar sen rual loh leh a zat hriat sen rual lohin an inthawi a." 
1Kings8:6 Tin, chuan puithiamte chuan LALPA thuthlung bawm chu a awmna turah an la lut a, in chhunga biakna hmun, hmun thianghlim berah, cherub te thla hnuaiah chuan." 
1Kings8:7 Cherubte chuan bawm awmna chung zawnah chuan an thla an zar reng si a, cherubte chuan bawm leh zawnfunge chu an huap vek a." 
1Kings8:8 Tin, a zawnfungte chu a sei khawp a, a zawnfung hmawrte chu biakna hmun hma, hmun thianghlim atang chuan a hmuh theih a; a maherawhchu pawn lamah zawng a lang lo: tun thleng hian chutah chuan a la awm reng a ni." 
1Kings8:9 Aigupta ram ata an chhuaha LALPA'n Israela thlahte hnena thu a thlun laia Mosia'n Horeb tlanga lungphek pahnih a dah chauh lote kha chu, chu mi bawm chhungah chuan engmah dang a awm lo." 
1Kings8:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, puithiamhote chu hmun thianghlim ata an lo chhuah veleh chuan lalpa in chu chhum chuan a khat ta muip mai a, puithiamhote chu hmun thianghlim ata an lo chhuah veleh chuan lalpa in chu chhum chuan a khat ta muip mai a," 
1Kings8:11 tichuan chhum avang chuan puithiamte chu rawngbawlin an awm thei ta lo hial a: LALPA ropuinain LALPA in chu a tikhat ta vek si a. 
1Kings8:12 Chutichuan Solomonan thu a sawi ta a: LALPA'n, 'Thim chhah mupah chuan ka awm ang,' a ti reng a." 
1Kings8:13 I chenna tur in, kumkhuaa i awmna tur chu ka lo saksak ta ngei che a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
1Kings8:14 Tin, lal chu a lehhawi a, Israelho pungkhawm zawng zawngte chu mal a sawm a: tichuan Israel-ho pungkhawm zawng zawngte chu an ding thuip a." 
1Kings8:15 ,16 Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA, Israelte Pathian, ka pa Davida hnena ama ka ngeia, 'Aigupta ram ata ka mi Israel ka hruai chhuah ni atangin Israel-ho hna zinga khawii khua mah hi ka hming awmna tur in sakna'n ka la thlang ngai lo a, amaherawhchu ka mi Israelte hotu atan hian Davida hi ka thlang a ni,' tia lo sawitu, ama kut ngeia rawn puitlintu hi fakin awm rawh se." 
1Kings8:16 ,15 Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA, Israelte Pathian, ka pa Davida hnena ama ka ngeia, 'Aigupta ram ata ka mi Israel ka hruai chhuah ni atangin Israel-ho hna zinga khawii khua mah hi ka hming awmna tur in sakna'n ka la thlang ngai lo a, amaherawhchu ka mi Israelte hotu atan hian Davida hi ka thlang a ni,' tia lo sawitu, ama kut ngeia rawn puitlintu hi fakin awm rawh se." 
1Kings8:17 Ka pa Davida khan Israelte Pathian, LALPA hming atan in sak a rilruin a tum thin a." 
1Kings8:18 Nimahsela, LALPA'n ka pa Davida hnenah, 'I rilruah chuan ka hming atan in sak in sak i tum thin a, hetiang rilru i lo pu hi i ti tha e:" 
1Kings8:19 nimahsela nang zawngin in chu i sa lo ang: i fapa, i thalbea la chhuak tura chuan ka hming atan in chu a la sa zawk ang,' a lo ti tawh a." 
1Kings8:20 Tin, LALPA'n a thusawi chu a rwan tinghet ta a; LALPA lo tiam tawh ang ngeiin ka pa Davida hmun chu ka lo luah tain, Israel lalthutthlengah chuan ka lo thu ta a, Israelte Pathian, LALPA hming atan in chu ka lo sa ta ngei si a." 
1Kings8:21 Chutichuan bawm awmna tur hmun chu ka lo r uat a a, chu miah chuan Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuah laia ka pa hnena a lo thlun, LALPA thuthlung chu a awm a,"" a tia." 
1Kings8:22 Tin, Solomona chu LALPA maicham hma, Israel pungkhawmho zawng zawng hmuhah a ding a, van lam banin a kut a phar a," 
1Kings8:23 ,24 ""Aw LALPA, Israelte Pathian, i chhiahhlawh an thinlung zawng zawnga i mithmuha awm tha hnena thuthlung hlena khawngaihna tilang thin, i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnena thutiam hlentu, chung lam vanah leh hnuai lam leiah hian nangmah ang hi Pathian dang reng reng an awm lo e: a ni, nangin i kain thu i sawi a, i kutin i rawn hlawhtlintir ta a, vawiina a lo awm ta ngei ang hian," 
1Kings8:24 ,23 ""Aw LALPA, Israelte Pathian, i chhiahhlawh an thinlung zawng zawnga i mithmuha awm tha hnena thuthlung hlena khawngaihna tilang thin, i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnena thutiam hlentu, chung lam vanah leh hnuai lam leiah hian nangmah ang hi Pathian dang reng reng an awm lo e: a ni, nangin i kain thu i sawi a, i kutin i rawn hlawhtlintir ta a, vawiina a lo awm ta ngei ang hian," 
1Kings8:25 Chutichuan aw LALPA, Israelte Pathian, i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnena, 'I thlahte chu ka mithmuha i awm anga ka mithmuha awm ve tura an awm dana an fimkhur phawt chuan ka mithmuhah Israelte lalthutthleng a thu tur i hmai lo vang,' tia i lo tiam tak kha hlen ang che." 
1Kings8:26 Chutichuan aw ka pa Davida hnena thu i lo sawi tawh kha khawngaih takin thlentir ngei ang che. 
1Kings8:27 Nimahsela Pathian chu leiah hian a awm tak meuh ang emaw chu? Ngai teh, van leh vante vanah pawh i leng lo nasa lehzual awm em!" 
1Kings8:28 Nimahsela aw LALPA ka Pathian, vawiina i chhiahhlawhin a auhna che leh tawngtaina a chham hi ngaihthlaksakin, i chhiahhlawh tanwgtaina leh dilna hi rawn ngaihsak ang che:" 
1Kings8:29 he mi hmun lam hawia i chhiahhlawh hian tawngtaina a chham tur chu ngaithlaa nangin, 'Chutah chuan ka hming chu a awm ang,' i tihna hmun ngei in lamah hian chhun leh zana i mit i len reng thin theihna turin." 
1Kings8:30 Tin, i chhiahhlawh leh i mi Israelte hian he mi hmun lam hawia an tawngtai hunin an dilnate lo ngaihthlaksak thin ang che; a ni, i chenna hmun vanan lo ngaithla langin; tin, lo ngaithlain ngaidam ang che." 
1Kings8:31 I Mi tupawhin a vengte hchungah t hil tisualin, chhechhamtir hial lo tul se la, he mi ina i maicham hmaah hian rawn chham se la," 
1Kings8:32 nangin van atangin lo ngaithla langin, che la, mi sual chu ama lu chungah ngei a awm dan nghata thiam loh chantirin mi fel chu a felna ang anga hlawhtira thia chantirin i chhiahhlawhte ro relsak ang che." 
1Kings8:33 I mi Israelte hian i chungah thil an tihsual avanga hmelmate laka an lo tlawm a i lam an lo hawi leh a, i hming an fak a, he mi ina tawngtaia thil an rawn dil chua," 
1Kings8:34 nangin van atangin lo ngaihthlaksak la, i mi Israelte sualna chu ngaidam la, an pute ram i pekah hruai leh ang che." 
1Kings8:35 I chunga thil an tihsual avanga van a pin a, ruahte a lo sur loh hunah chuan, he mi hmun la hawia an tawngtai a, i hming an fak a, anmahni i tihretheih avanga an suale an sim chuan," 
1Kings8:36 nangin van atangin lo ngaithla la, i chhiahhlawhte leh i mi Israelte sualna hi ngaidam langin, an kalna tur kawng tha i kawhhmuh dawn si a, tin, i mite an rochan atana i pek i r amah hian ruah han surtir ang che." 
1Kings8:37 Kan ramah hian tam te a lo tlak a, hrite a lo len a, rona emaw, tawihna a lo awm a, an hmelmatn an kawngka velahte an rawn hual a, hri engpawh natna engpawh a lo thlen chuan," 
1Kings8:38 i mi Israel zawng zawngte zinga mahni thinlunga hri awma hria a, he mi in la hawia kut rawn phar apiangin tawngtaina leh dilna an rawn hlan reng reng chu" 
1Kings8:39 i awmna van atangin lo ngaithla la, ngaidam la, che la, nang an thinlung hretu, mi tin, an awmdan ang zelin hlawhtir ang che;)nang zawng, nangmah chauh hi mihring zawng zawngte thinlung hretu i ni si a;)" 
1Kings8:40 kan pute i pek rama an awm chhung zawng hian an tih theihna tur chein. 
1Kings8:41 I mi Israelte ni lo hnam dang mi, i hing avanga ram hla tak ata lo kalte chungchang thu pawh hi;" 
1Kings8:42 (i hming ropui tak te, i kut chak tak te, i ban i phar thute hi an la hre hlawm dawn si;) chungte chuan he mi in lam hawia an rawn tawngtai hunin," 
1Kings8:43 nangin i awmna van atangin lo ngaithla la, hnam dang mi chuan a dil ang ang che chu lo tihsak ang che; i mi Israel ang bawka khawvela hna tinin i hming an hriat a, an tih chia, he mi ka in sak hian i hming a pu ani tih an l o hriat theih nan." 
1Kings8:44 I miten an hmelmate chu i tirhna lam apiangah lo bei se la, i khawpui thlan lam hawi leh, i hming atana in ka lo sak la hawia LALPA hnena an tawngtai chuan," 
1Kings8:45 an tawngtaina leh an dilna chu nangin van atangin lo ngaithla la, an thuah che ang che." 
1Kings8:46 I chunga thil tisual a, (tumah thil tisual lo an awm si lo a,) an chunga i thinur a, hmelma kuta i pek a, hmelma ram hla takah emaw, hnai teah emaw pawh sala an hruai a," 
1Kings8:47 sala an hruaina rama an inngaihtuah chhuah a, an inchhir a, 'Thil kan lo tisual a, dik lo tak leh sual takin kan ti ta,' tia sala hruaitute rama an rawn ngen che erawh a," 
1Kings8:48 an hmelma sala hruaitute rama na thinlung tak leh an rilru taka i lam an lo hawi a, an pute i pek ram leh, i khawpui thlan lam leh i hming atana ka in sak lam hawia i hnena an tawngtai chuan," 
1Kings8:49 an tawngtaina leh an dilna chu nangin i awmna van atangin lo ngaithla la, an thuah che ang che;" 
1Kings8:50 tin, i mi i chunga thil tisual tute leh i laka an lo bawhchhiat kawnga an bawhchiatna zawng zawngte chu ngaidam la; sala hruaitute chuan anmahni an khawngaih theihna'n khawngaihna neihtir ang che:" 
1Kings8:51 I mi i rochan, Aigupta ram ata, thir rawhtuina chhung ata i hruai chhuahte an ni si a:" 
1Kings8:52 an auhna apiang che a i lo ngaihthlak tura i chhiahhlawh dina leh, i mi Isreal dilna lama i mit i len theihna'n," 
1Kings8:53 Aw LALPA PATHIAN, ka pute Aigupta ram ata i hruai chhuah laia i chhiahhlawh Mosia hmanga i sawi angin i rochan atan khawvel hnam tin, zing ata i tihrang ani si a,"" a ti a." 
1Kings8:54 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan LALPA hnena a tawngtaina leh dilna zawng zawng a chham zawh c huan, LALPA maicham lama thingthia, van lam bana a kut phara a awm chu a tho a." 
1Kings8:55 ,56, Tin, a ding a, aw ring takin, ""A thutiam zawng zawng ang zela a mi Israelte chawlhna petu LALPA chu fakin awm rawh se: a chhiahhlawh Mosia hmanga a thutiam tha zawng zawngte kha thu pakhat mah a thlawn lo a," 
1Kings8:56 ,55 Tin, a ding a, aw ring takin, ""A thutiam zawng zawng ang zela a mi Israelte chawlhna petu LALPA chu fakin awm rawh se: a chhiahhlawh Mosia hmanga a thutiam tha zawng zawngte kha thu pakhat mah a thlawn lo a," 
1Kings8:57 LALPA kan Pathian chu ka pute hnena a awm ang khan kan hnenah awm se la: min kalsanin, min thlahthlahthlam suh se:" 
1Kings8:58 tichuan a kawng zawng zawngte zawh tur leh, kan pute thu a pek tawh anga a thupekte, a thuruatte, a rorelte pawm tura kan thinlungte a lama a hawitir theihna turin." 
1Kings8:59 ,60, Tin, LALPA hi pathian a ni a, tumah dang an awm lo tih khawvela hnam tinin an lo hriat theihna tura a chhiahhlawh thuah leh, a mi Israelte thuah hian a ni zir ang zela a chet theihna turin he'ng ka thu sawi, LALPA hmaa dilna ka thlente hi chhun leh zan lalpa kan Pathian hmaah chuan cham reng rawh se." 
1Kings8:60 ,59, Tin, LALPA hi pathian a ni a, tumah dang an awm lo tih khawvela hnam tinin an lo hriat theihna tura a chhiahhlawh thuah leh, a mi Israelte thuah hian a ni zir ang zela a chet theihna turin he'ng ka thu sawi, LALPA hmaa dilna ka thlente hi chhun leh zan lalpa kan Pathian hmaah chuan cham reng rawh se." 
1Kings8:61 Chutichuan a thuruat anga awm tur leh a thupekte zawm turin LALPA kan Pathian lamah chuan in thinlungte tha famkim rawh se, vawiin ang hian,"" tiin Israel pungkhawmho zawng zawngte chu mal a sawm a." 
1Kings8:62 Tin, lal leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan LALPA hmaah inthawin an hlan za a." 
1Kings8:63 Tin, Solomonan LALPA tana a hlan remna thilhlan inthawina'n sebawngpa 22,000 leh, beram 120,000 a hlan a. Chutiang hchuan lal leh Israela thlahte zawng zawng chuan LALPA in chu an hlan a ni." 
1Kings8:64 Chu mi ni vekah chuan lalin LALPA in hma zawna hun ghchung kawtlai tak chu a tithianghlim a, chutah chuan halral thilhlan te, chhangphut thilhlan te, remna thilhlan sa thau te chu a hlan a, LALPA hmaa dar macham chu chung thilhlante dawng tura a tet luattuk avangin." 
1Kings8:65 Chutichuan chu mi tum chuan Solomona leh Israel-ho zawng zawng, mipui pungkhawmho tam tak, Hamath khaw luhna achin Aigupta ram lui thlenga mit echu LALPA kan Pathian hmaah chuan ni sarih leh ni sarih, ni sawm leh ni lo chhung zet an kut zaa.A ni riat ni chuan mipuihote chu a tintir a, tin, lal chu mal an sawm a, tichuan LALPA'n a chhiahhlawh Davida leh ami Israelte chunga a thatna chuti zozaia alantir avang chuan rilru hlim leh lawm takin an in lamah an haw ta a." 
1Kings8:66 A ni riat ni chuan mipuihote chu a tintir a, tin, lal chu mal an sawm a, tichuan LALPA'n a chhiahhlawh Davida leh ami Israelte chunga a thatna chuti zozaia alantir avang chuan rilru hlim leh lawm takin an in lamah an haw ta a." 
1Kings9:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan LALPA in leh lal in a saka Solomonan chak taka a tum zawng zawng a tihzawh vek hnuah chuan," 
1Kings9:2 Gibeon khuaa a hnena a inlar ang khan LALPA chu Solomona hnenah a rawn inlar leh a. 
1Kings9:3 Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, ""I tawngtaina leh i dilna ka hmaa i rawn thlente kha ka lo ngaithla a: he mi in i sak hi kumkhuaa ka hming awmtirna'n ka tithianghlim tawh e; ka mit leh ka thinlung chu chutah chuan a awm kumkhua tawh ang." 
1Kings9:4 Tin, nang pawh hi thu ka pek apiang che anga ti tura i pa Davida awm anga thinlung tha tak pu leh rilru dik tak pua ka mite hmuha i awm a, ka thuruatte leh ka rorelte i pawm reng zangin," 
1Kings9:5 Israelte chungah hian i ram lalthutthleng chu kumkhua atan ka tinghet ang; i pa Davida hnenah 'Israelte lalthutthlenga thu tur i hmai lo ang,' tia ka lo tiam tawh ang khan." 
1Kings9:6 Amaherawhchu nangin emaw, in thlahten emaw mi zui chu min kirsan a, ka thupekte leh ka thuruate ka hriattir che u hi in pawm loh a, pathian dangte rawng in va bawl a, in vabiak chuan," 
1Kings9:7 Israel hote hi ram ka pek ata ka tiboral ang a; tin, he mi in ka hming atana ka tihthianghlim tawh sa hi ka mithmuh phak loah ka sawn bo daih ang; tichuan Israelte hi hnam tinrengte zingah tihelna leh a chhe lam tehkhinnaah hman an la ni ang a:" 
1Kings9:8 tin, he in i sang teh mah se la, a kal pel apiangte chuan maik tiin an la faifuk ang a, 'Engati nge LALPA'n he ram leh he in hi heti taka a tih le?' an ti ang." 
1Kings9:9 Tin, miten, 'LALPA an Pathian, an pute Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu kha an kalsan a, pathian dangte an vuan a, an bia a, an rawngte an bawl tak vang a ni; chuvangin LALPA'n he'ng chhiatna zawng zawngte hi an chungah a rawn thlentir ta anih hi,' tiin an la chhang ang,"" a ti a." 
1Kings9:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan in pahnih, LALPA in leh lal in a sak chhung, kum sawmhnih a vei hnuin" 
1Kings9:11 (tura lal Hiraman Solomona chu sidar thin te, far thing te, rangkachakte a mamawh apiang a tum vek ani a,) lal Solomona chuan Hirama chu Galili rama khaw sawmhnih a pe a." 
1Kings9:12 Tin, Hirama chu tura khua atangin Solomonan khua apekte chu en turin a chhuak a; a duhzawng a ni lo hle a." 
1Kings9:13 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka unaupa, he'ng i kawh mi pekte hi khaw eng nge maw ni ngai le?"" a ti a. Tichuan tun thleng hian Kabul ram an ti ta a ni." 
1Kings9:14 Tin, Hirama chuan lal chu rangkachak talent 120 a thawn a." 
1Kings9:15 Lal Solomonan hnathawka rawih lui pawl a siam chhan chu hei vang hi a ni: LALPA in leh ama in satu atan leh, Millo te, Jerusalem kulh te, Hazor khua te, Megiddo khua te, Gezer khua te siamtu atan a ni." 
1Kings9:16 Aigupta lal Pharaoa chu a han chho a, Geer khua han la a, a hal a, chu khua a awm Kanaan hote chu a that a, a fanu Solomona nupui chu inthlahna thilpek atan alo pe tawh a ni." 
1Kings9:17 Tin, Solomonan Gezer khua te, Beth-horon thlangta zawk khua te," 
1Kings9:18 Baalath khua te, Israel rama thlaler Tamar khua te," 
1Kings9:19 Solomonan thil dah khawmna khua neih zawng zawng te, a tawlailir dahna khua te leh, a sakaw chungchuang mi dahna khua te, Jerusalem khuaah te, Lebanon-ahte leh a rorelna ram chhung zang zanga Solomonan chak taka siam a tum zawng zawngte chu a siam a ni." 
1Kings9:20 Tin, Israela thlahte ni ve lo, Amor-ho te, Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Hebus-ho la awm chhun zawng zawngte kha chu," 
1Kings9:21 an thlah, chung rama la awm Israela thlahten an tihboral zawh vek theih lohvate zingah chuan Solomonan chhiahhlawh, hnathawka rawih luih pawl a siam a, tun thleng hian." 
1Kings9:22 Israela thlahte erawh chu Solomonan chhiahhlawhah a siam ve lo va: indo mi te, a puipa te, a mi lian te, a sipai hotu te, a tawlailir leh a sakaw chungchuang mi hotute an ni zawk a ni." 
1Kings9:23 Chungte chu Solomona hna chunga hotu bik 550, hnathawk vengtute chu an ni." 
1Kings9:24 Pharaoa fanu erawh chu Davida khaw pui ata chu ama in, Solomonan a saksakah chuan a chho ta a: tichuan Millo chu a siam ta a." 
1Kings9:25 Tin, Solomona chuan LALPA tana maicham a siamah chuan kum tin, vawi thum halral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan a hlan thin a, LALPA hmaa maichamah chuan rimtuite a hal tel bawk thin a. Chutichuan in chu a peih ta a." 
1Kings9:26 Tin, lal Solomona chuan Edom rama Tuirinfiat Sen kam Eloth bula awm Eziongeber hmunah lawng rual a siam a." 
1Kings9:27 Tin, Hioraman a chhiahhlawh lawng mite tuifinriata che thang, lawnga Solomona chhiahhlawhte kalpuiah a ti ra.Chumite chu Ophir-ah an va kal a, chuta mi chu rangkachak talent 420 an rawn hawn a, lal Solomona hnenah an rawn thlen a." 
1Kings9:28 Chumite chu Ophir-ah an va kal a, chuta mi chu rangkachak talent 420 an rawn hawn a, lal Solomona hnenah an rawn thlen a." 
1Kings10:1 Tin, LALPA hming atana a thiltih chungchang thua Solomona hming thanzia Seba lalnuin a lo hriat chuan thu khirh tak taka fiah tumin a hnenah a kal a." 
1Kings10:2 Tin, Jerusalem khuaah hnungzuitu tam tak hruaiin, englo rimtuite leh rangkachak tam tak leh lunghlute phur sanghawngseite kengin a kal a: tin, Solomona hnen a thlenc huan a thinlunga a thu pai zawng zawng chu phawrh fai vekin a bia a." 
1Kings10:3 Tin, Solomona chuan thu zawh zawng chu a chhang vek a: lal hriat loh, a hrilhfiah theih loh reng reng a awm hauh lo mai." 
1Kings10:4 Tin, Seba lalnuin Solomona finzia zawng awng te, a in sak te," 
1Kings10:5 a dawhkana ei tur te, a puipateho thut dan te, a rawngbawltuho bawl dan te, an inchei dan te, ano hlantu te, LALPA ina ahlan halral thilhlante a han hmuh chuan a rilru ahlei anei ta lo a." 
1Kings10:6 Tichuan lal hnenah, ""I thiltihte leh i finziate keima rama ka lo hriat kha thuthang dik tak a lo nih ngei hi le." 
1Kings10:7 Nimahsela keimahin ka mit ngeia ka rawn hmuh hma loh chuan an sawi chu ka awih lo a, tichuan ngai teh, a zatve pawh mi lo hrilh hlei nem, an sawi ka lo hriat aiin i finzia leh i thatzia a lo nasat hi." 
1Kings10:8 I mite, he'ng i chhiahhlawh, i bula awm foa i finna thu ngaithla foate hi an nihhlawh e!" 
1Kings10:9 LALPA i Pathian, i chunga lawm em em, Israelte lathutthlenga thutirtu che hi fakin awm rawh se: LALPA'n Israelte hi kumkhuain a hmangaih a, chuvangin fel taka rorel turin lalah a siam che anih hi,"" a ti a." 
1Kings10:10 Tin, lal chu rangkachak talent za leh sawmhnih leh englo rimtui tam zet mai leh lunghlue a pe a: Seba lalnuin lal Solomona englo rimtui a pek ang zozaia tam hi a lut ta ngai lo." 
1Kings10:11 Tin, Hirama lawngrual, Ophir atanga rangkachak va phurte pawh chuan Ophir atangin almug thing tam tak leh lunghlute an rawn phur a." 
1Kings10:12 Tin, lalin almug thingte chu LALPA in leh lal in hungna'n leh hla satute tan tingtang leh perhkhuangte siamna'n lam pawh a hmang a: tun thlengin chutiang almug thing reng reng chu a lutin, hmuh pawh hmuh a ni ta ngai lo." 
1Kings10:13 Tin, lal Solomonan a duhsak avanga a pekte bakah pawh lal Solomona chuan Sdeba lalnu chu a duh zawng zawng, a dil apiang chu a pe a. Chutichuan a awmna ram lamah a hawng leh ta a, a hote nen." 
1Kings10:14 Solomona hnena kum khat chhunga rangkachak lut rih lam chu sumdawngtute laka lut leh thil zuartute," 
1Kings10:15 mi in awmpawlhho lal zawng zawngte lal ram awptute laka lutte chhiar lohin, rangkachak talen zaruk leh sawmruk leh paruk buk a ni." 
1Kings10:16 Tin, lal Solomona chuan rangkachak den phekin pawh lian zahnih a siam a: phaw pakhatah rangkachak sekel zaruk a duh a." 
1Kings10:17 Tin, rangkachak den phekin phaw zathum a siam a; phaw pakhatah rangkachak maneh thum a duh a: chung chu lal chuan Lebanon ngawpui inah a dah a." 
1Kings10:18 Tin, lal chuan saingho lalthutthleng ropui tak a siam bawk a, chu chu rangkachak tha ber tiin a luan a." 
1Kings10:19 Lal thutthleng kai chhohnaah chuan rahka paruk a awm a, chu mi lalthutthleng hnung lam chu a lo kum phei kulh a: a thutna sir tuakah chuan dona a awm ve ve a, tin, dona bulahte chuan sakeibaknei sawm leh pahnih a ding a;" 
1Kings10:20 Tin, rahka parukah chuan, a sik tuakah sakeibaknei sawm leh pahnih a ding a; chutiang chu khawi ramah mah an siam ngai lo." 
1Kings10:21 Lal Solomona no zawng zawng chu rangkachak vek ani a, tin, Lebanon ngawpui ina bungbel zawng zawngte pawh chu rangkachak hlir hlak vek a ni a: tangkarua reng reng a awm lo; Solomona dam lai chuan chu chu enghuah mah an ngai lo." 
1Kings10:22 Lal chuan tuifinriatah chuan Hriama lawng rual kawppuitu Tarsis lawng rual anei a: Tarsis lawng rual chuan kum thum dan zelah rangkachak te, tangkarua te, saingho te, zawng te, arawn te a rawn phur si thin a." 
1Kings10:23 Chutichuan lal Solomona chuan khawvela lal zawng zawngte chu hausakah leh finah a khum vek a. 
1Kings10:24 Pathianin a thinlunga finna thu a dahsak chu ngaithla turin khawvela mi zawng zawngte chuan Solomona chu an rawn pan huai huai thin a. 
1Kings10:25 Tin, mi tinin lawmman kum tin, pek bi neiin tangkaraw bungbel te, rangkachak bungbel te, puan te, ralthuam te, englo rimtui te, sakawr te, sabengtung te an rawn pe thin a." 
1Kings10:26 Tin, Solomona chuan tawlailirte leh sakawr chung chuang mite a khawm chiam a: tawlailir sangkhat leh zali leh sakawr chung chuang mi singkhat leh sanghnih a nei a, chung chu tawlailir dahna khuaah te, Jerusalem khuaa lal awmnaah te chuan a awmtir a." 
1Kings10:27 Tin, lal chuan Jerusalem khuaah chuan a tam em avangin tangkaruate chu lung ang maia ngaih khawpin a awmtir a, sidar thingte chu phaia theipui thing ang leka ngaih khawpin a an awmtir a." 
1Kings10:28 Tin, Solomona neih sakawrte chu Aigupta ram ata rawn tawlh chhuah a ni a; tin, lal sumdawngtute chuan chung chu a rual rualin an lo khar thin a, a ruala lei zela ni.Aigupta rama mi tawlailir chu tangkarua sekel zaruk zelin an tithleng thin a, tin, sakawr chu tangkarua sekel za leh sawmnga zelin: chutiang bawk chuan Hit-ho lal zawng zawngte leh Suria lalte pawh an tihthlensak thin a ni." 
1Kings10:29 Aigupta rama mi tawlailir chu tangkarua sekel zaruk zelin an tithleng thin a, tin, sakawr chu tangkarua sekel za leh sawmnga zelin: chutiang bawk chuan Hit-ho lal zawng zawngte leh Suria lalte pawh an tihthlensak thin a ni." 
1Kings11:1 Solomona chuan Pharaoa fanu chang lo pawh hnam dang hmeichha tam tak Moab te, Amon te, Edom te, Zidon te, Hit-ho hmeichhiate a hmangaih a;" 
1Kings11:2 chung hnamho chungchang thu chu LALPA'n Israela thlahte hnenah, ""Anmahni pawl suh ula, anni pawhin pawl che u suh se: an pathiante lamah in thinlung an hruai kawi ngei dawn si a,"" tiin alo sawi tawh reng a; chungho chu Solomona chuan hmangaihnain a vuan tlat a." 
1Kings11:3 Tichuan nupui zasarih, lal fanu a nei a, hmei zathum nen: tin, a nupuite chuan a thinlung an hruai kawisak ta a." 
1Kings11:4 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ta a, Solomona chu a lo upa hnu chuan, a nupuite chuan pathian dangte lamah a thinlung an hruai kawisak a: tichuan a pa Davida thinlung angin LALPA a Pathian lamah chuan a thinlung chu alo tha famkim ta lo a." 
1Kings11:5 Solomona chuan Zidon-ho pathiannu Astorethi leh Amon-ho pathian tenawm tak Milkoma chu a lo zui ve ta mai a. 
1Kings11:6 Tin, Solomona chuan LALPA mithmuhin thil sual alo ti ta a, a pa Davida angin LALPA chu a zui tlat ve ta lo a." 
1Kings11:7 Chutichuan Solomona chuan Jerusalem bula tlangah Moab-ho pathian tenawm tak Kemosa tan leh, Amona thlahte pahtian tenawm tak Moleka tan hmun sang a lo siam ta a." 
1Kings11:8 Chutiang bawkin hnam dang a nupui zawng zawng an pathiante hnena inthawia rimtuite hal thinte tan pawh a siamsak a. 
1Kings11:9 ,10 Chutichuan LALPA Israelte Pathian, a hnena vawi hnih lai inlar a, he thu pathian dangte a zui tur ani lo tih thu lo petu chu a thinlungin a hawisan tak avangin Solomona chungah chuan LALPA thin a lo uur ta a: LALPA'n thu apek chu pawm si hek lo." 
1Kings11:10 ,9 Chutichuan LALPA Israelte Pathian, a hnena vawi hnih lai inlar a, he thu pathian dangte a zui tur ani lo tih thu lo petu chu a thinlungin a hawisan tak avangin Solomona chungah chuan LALPA thin a lo uur ta a: LALPA'n thu apek chu pawm si hek lo." 
1Kings11:11 Chuvangin LALPA'n Solomona hnenah chuan, ""Hetiang hian i lo awm ta a, ka thuthlungte leh ka thuruatte pawm tura thu ka pek che hi i lo pawmta si lo a, ram hi ka chhuhsak ngei ngei ang chia, i chhiahhlawh ka pe ang." 
1Kings11:12 Amaherawhchu i pa Davida avangin i dam chhung em chuan ka ti rih lo ang a: nimahsela i fapa zawng ka chhuhsak dawn a ni. 
1Kings11:13 Ram zawng zawng erawh chu k achhuhsak vek lo ang a; nimahsela ka chhiahhlawh Davida avang leh ka thlan Jerusalem avang hian hna khat chu i fapa ka pe ang,"" a ti a." 
1Kings11:14 Tin, LALPA'n Edom mi, Hadada chu Solomona hmelmaah a rawn din chhuak ta a: amah chu Edom rama lal thlah a ni." 
1Kings11:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Davfida Edom rama a awm laia, an mi thahte phum tura sipai hotu Joaba a han kal a, Edom mi mipa fa tawh phawt chu a han thah vek hnu khan," 
1Kings11:16 (Joaba leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chu thla ruk zet, Edom rama mipa zawng zawng a tihhlum vek hma loh chuan an awm a ni a;)" 
1Kings11:17 Hadada chu a pa chhiahhlawhte zinga Edom mi thenkhatte nen Aigupta rama kal turin an tlan a; Hadada chu naupangte a la ni a. 
1Kings11:18 Midian ramata an chhuak a, Paran-ah an kal a: tin, Pran atangin mite an hruai a, Aigupta ram, Aigupta ram leh Pharaoa hnen an zuk thleng a; ani chuan in te a lo pe a, ei turte a lo ngaihtuahsak a, ramte a lo pe bawk a." 
1Kings11:19 Hadada chuan Pharaoa mit a ltung hle mai a, tichuan a nupui ngeia laizawn, lalnu Tahpenesi laizawn chu nupuiah a neihtir a." 
1Kings11:20 Tin, Tahpenesi laizawn chuan fapa Genubatha a hrinsak a, Tahpenesiin Pharaoa inah a hnute hnek banna a siamsak a: tin, Genubatha chu Pharaoa inah Pharaoa fate zingah chuan a awm ta a." 
1Kings11:21 Tin, Hadadan Aigupta ram atanga Davida chu a puteho hnenah amuhil ta tih le, sipai hotu Joaba pawh a thi tawh tih a lo hriatin, Hadada chuan Pharaoa hnenah, ""Kan rama ka haw theihna'n mi chhuahtir ta che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings11:22 Chutichuan Pharaoan a hneah, ""Ka hnena i awm hian tlakchham eng nge i neih ni le, ngai teh, chutia in ram lama haw leh i tum tak mai?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Engmah phei chu nei lo e: nimahsela mi kaltir reng reng rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
1Kings11:23 Tin, Pathianin a hmelmaah Eliada fapa Rezona, a pu Hadadezera, Zoba lal hnen ata tlan bo tawh kha a rawn din chhuak leh a:" 
1Kings11:24 Davida'n Zoba khuaa mite a thah khan ani chuan a hnenah mite a kai khawm a, sipai hotuah a lo tang ta a: tin, Damaska khuaah an kal a, chutah chuan an awm a, Damaska khuaha chuan lalah a thu ta a." 
1Kings11:25 Hadada tihhreawmna belhchhahin Solomona dam chhung zawng, Israelte hmelma a ni fo thin reng a. Israelte a haw hle mai a, Suria ram chungah ro a rel a." 
1Kings11:26 Tin, Bebata fapa Jeroboama, Zereda khuaa Phraim mi, Solomona chhiahhlawh pawh chuan, (a nu hming chu Zeruii a ni a, hmeithai ani a,_ chu mi pawh chuan lal chungah a kut a lek ve a." 
1Kings11:27 Lal chunga akut a rawn lek chhan chu hetiang hi a ni: Solomonan Milo a siam a, a pa Davida khua chu a chhe lai te a siam tha a." 
1Kings11:28 Chu Jeroboama chu mi chak huaisen a ni a: tichuan Solomonan chu tlangval chu mi taima tak nia a hriat avangin Josefa chhungte hnathawh zawng zawng chunga hotuah a siam a. 
1Kings11:29 Tin, chung lai chuan heti hi a ni a, Jeroboama Jerusalem khua ata a kal chhuak chu Silo mi zawlnei Ahijan kawng lakah a lo hmu a; Ahija chuan puan thar a sin a; an pahnih chauh chuan phulah an awmdun a." 
1Kings11:30 Tin, Ahija chuan a puan thar sin chu a la a, phel sawm leh phel hnihah apawtthler a," 
1Kings11:31 Jeroboama hnenah chuan, ""Phel sawm hi la rawh khai: LALPA, Israelte Pathianin heti hian a ti a ni: ""Ngai teh, ram hi Solomona ka chhuhsak ang a, hnam sawm chu ka pe dawn che a ni:" 
1Kings11:32 (amaherawhchu ka chhiahhlawh Davida avang leh Israel hnam zawng zawng zinga ka thlan khawpui, Jerusalem avang hian hnam khat zawng anei ang chu:)" 
1Kings11:33 anni chuan mi kalsan a, Zidon-ho pathiannu Astarothi te, Moab-ho pathian Kemosa te, Amon-ho thlahte pathian Milkomate an biak avang leh ka mithmuha thil tha ti tur leh ka thuruatte leh ka rorelte hi pawm tura a pa Davida anga ka kawngte an zawh loh avangin." 
1Kings11:34 Ram pumpui zawng ka chhuhsak lo ang: amaherawhchu ka thuupekte leh ka thuruatte pawmtu, ka thlan, ka chhiahhlawh Davida avangin a dam chhung hchuan lalah ka la awmtir ang:" 
1Kings11:35 nimahsela ram hi a fapa ka chhuhsak ang a, nangmah hi ka pe dawn che a ni, hnam sawmte chu."
