1Kings11:36 Tin, ka chhiahhlawh Davida'n ka hming awmtirna'na ka thlan khawpui Jerusalem-ah hian ka hmaa khawnvar aneih reng theihna turin hnam khat chu a fapa ka pe ang." 
1Kings11:37 Nang hi ka ruat ang chia, i duh ang angin ro i rel ang a, Israelte lalah i awm ang." 
1Kings11:38 Tin, heti hi ani ang a, thu ka pek apiang che i pawm a, ka kawngte i zawh a, ka chhiahhlawh Davida anga ka thuruatte leh ka thupekte zawm tura ka mithmuha thil tha i tih chuan i hnenah ka awm zel ang a, Davida ka din nghehsak ang khan chhungkaw nghet ka dinsak ang chia, Israelte hi ka pe ang che." 
1Kings11:39 Chuvang chuan Davida thlah chu ka tihreawm dawn ai, amaherawhchu kumkhua zawngin a ni lo ang,' a ti e,"" tiin." 
1Kings11:40 Chutichuan Solomona chuan Jeroboama chu thah a tum ta a: nimahsela Jeroboama chu a tho a, Aigupta ramah, Aigupta ram lal Sisaka hnenah a tlan a, Solomona thih hma loh chuan Aigupta ramah a awm ta a." 
1Kings11:41 Solomona chanchin dangte leh, a thiltih zawng zawng leh a finnate chu Solomona thiltih ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
1Kings11:42 Solomonan Israel-ho zawng zawng chunga Jerusalem khuaa ro a rel chhung chu kum sawmli a ni.Tichuan Solomona chu a pute hnenah chuan amuhil a, apa Davida khawpuiah chuan an phum ta a: tin, a fapa Rehoboama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings11:43 Tichuan Solomona chu a pute hnenah chuan amuhil a, apa Davida khawpuiah chuan an phum ta a: tin, a fapa Rehoboama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings12:1 Tin, Rehoboama chu Sekem khuaha akal a; Israel-ho zawng zawng chu Sekem khuaah chuan lala siam turin an kal tawh si a." 
1Kings12:2 Tin, heti hi ani a, Nebata fapa Jeroboaman chu mi thu chu a lo hriat chuan (lal Solomona hnen atanga a tlan bona Aigupta rama la awm a ni a, tichuan Jeroboaman Aiguipta rama a la awm reng hc a zuk kohtir a;)" 
1Kings12:3 Jeroboama leh Israel pungkhawmho zawn zawng chu an lo kal a, rehoboama hnenah," 
1Kings12:4 I pa khan kan nghawngkawl a tirit em thin a: chuvangin i pa min chhawr rimna leh, a nghawngkawl rit tak kan chunga a nghah hi min tihzansak la, tichuan i rawng kan bawl ang e,"" tiin an rawn sawi a." 
1Kings12:5 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Ni thum chhung chu lo va kal kiang ta rih u la, tin, ka hnenah lo kal leh ang che u,"" a ti a. Tin, mipuite chu an kal kiang ta a." 
1Kings12:6 Tin, lal Rehoboama chuan a pa Solomona dam laia a bula awm thin upahote chu, ""Heng mipuihote hi ka chhan dan tur rem eng nge mi ruatpui le?"" tiin a rawn a." 
1Kings12:7 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Tunah hian hengho chhiahhlawha i awm a, an rawng i bawl a, anmahni chu i chhan a, an hnena thu tha tak sawi i tum chuan, kumkhuain i chhiahhlawhah an awm ang,"" tiin an sawi a." 
1Kings12:8 Nimahsela upaho remtuatpui chu a pawm lo a, ama rualpui tlangvalho, a bula awm thinte chu a rawn ta zawk a." 
1Kings12:9 An hnenah chuan, ""Heng mipuiho, ka hnena, 'I pan kan chunga nghawngkawl anghah hi min tihzansak rwah,' tia sawitute hi ka chhan dan tur rem eng nge min ruatpui le?"" a ti a." 
1Kings12:10 Tin, a rualpui tlangvalhote chuan a hnenah, ""Heng mipuiho, 'I pa khan kan nghawngkawl a tirit em thin a, nang chuan min tihzaksak rawh khai,' i hnena titute hnenah chuan hetiang hian ti la, hetiang hian an hnenah sawi ang che: 'Ka pa kawng ai chuan ka zungte hi a lian zawk." 
1Kings12:11 Ka pa khan ngawhngkawl rit ak a lo bahtir che u a, kei chuan in nghawngkawl chu ka belhchhah dawn a sin: ka pan vuaknain a lo hring thin che u a, kei rawh chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hring dawn che u a ni,' tin,"" an sawi a." 
1Kings12:12 Chutichuan Jeroboama leh mipuiho zawng zawng hchu llain, ""Nithum chinah ka hnenah lo kal leh ang che u,"" tia a hrilh ang khan, a ni thum ni chuan Rehoboama hnenah an va kal a." 
1Kings12:13 Tin, lal chuan, mipuite chu chang takin a lo chhang a, upahote remruatpui kha a pawm lo a;" 
1Kings12:14 tlangvalhote remruatpui ang khan, ""Ka pan in nghawngkawl a lo tirit a, kei chuan in nghawngkawl chu ka belhchhah dawn a sin, ka pan vuaknain a lo hring thin che u a, kei erawh chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hring dawn che u a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings12:15 Chutichuan lal chuan mipuite thu sawi kha a pawm ta lo a; chu chu LALPA avang a ni, LALPA'n Silo mi Ahija hmanga, Nebada fapa Jeroboama hnea a thu lo saiw tawh kha a tihngheh theihna'n." 
1Kings12:16 Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan lalin an thu sawi a pawm lo tih an hriatin, mipuite chuan, ""Davidaah hian chanvo eng nge kan neih le? Jesaia fapaah chuan roluah tur kan nei hek lo: aw Israelte u, in puan in lamah haw rawh u: David, i chhungkua ngaihtuah mai tawh,"" tiin lal chu an chhang a. Chutichuan Israel-ho chu an puan in lamah an kal ta a." 
1Kings12:17 Israela thlah, Judai ram khua awmte erawh chu, an chungah Rehoboaman ro a rel a." 
1Kings12:18 Tichuan lal Rehoboama chuan hnathawka rawih luihte hotu Adorama a tir a; ani chu Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan lungin an deng a, a thi ta a. Tin, lal Rehoboama chu Jerusalem khuaa tlan tumin a tawlailirah a chuang ta thaui a." 
1Kings12:19 Chutichuan Israel-hote chu Davida chhungte chungah an lo hel ta a ni, tun thleng hian." 
1Kings12:20 Tin, heti hi ani a, Israel-ho zawng zawngin Jeroboama chu a lo kir leh tih an hriatin, punkhawmnaa lo kal turin an kohtir a, Israel-ho zawng zawng chunga lalah an siam ta a: Juda hnam ngawt lo chu Davida chhungte zui tumah an awm lo." 
1Kings12:21 Tin, Rehoboama chuan Herusalem khua a han thlen chuan, Israela chhungtte chu dova Solomona fapa Rehoboama rama la leh turin Juda chhungte zawng zawng leh, Benjamin hnam, mi huaisen thiau thlan chhua 180,000 zet a khawm a." 
1Kings12:22 Nimahsela Pathian mi Semaia hnenah Pathian thu a lo thleng a," 
1Kings12:23 Judai ram lal Solomona fapa Rehoboama hnenah leh Juda leh Benjamina chhungte zawng zawng hnenah leh mipui dangte hnenah chuan," 
1Kings12:24 LALPA'n heti hian a ti, Han kal suh u, Israela thlah, in unauteho chu han do hek suh u: mahni in lamah haw leh vek tawh u; hei hi keimah tih ani e, tiin,' sawi rawh,"" tiin. Chutichuan LALPA thu ang chuan an kir a, an haw leh ta vek a." 
1Kings12:25 Chutichuan Jeroboama chuan, Ephraim tlang ramah Sekem khua a siam a, chutah chuan a awm a; tin, chuta tang chuan a chhuak a, Penuel khua a siam a." 
1Kings12:26 Tin, Jeroboama chuan a rilruin, ""ram hi Davida chhungte ta a lo ni leh nghe nghe ang a:" 
1Kings12:27 he miteho hi Jerusalem khuaa LALPA ina inthawinate hlan tura an kal chuan, he miteho thinlung hi an LALPA Rehoboama, Judai ram lal lamah hian a thle leh mai ang a, tichuan kei hi mi that ang a, Judai ram lal Rehoboama lamah an pakai leh mai ang a,"" a ti a." 
1Kings12:28 Chutichuan lal chuan mi a rawn a, rangkachak bawng no lem pahnih a siam a; an hnenah chuan, ""In tan Jerusalem khuaa han kal chu a harsa lutuk em a; aw Israelte u, en teh u, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u in pathiante hi,"" a ti a." 
1Kings12:29 Tin, pakhat chu Bethel-ah a dah a, pakhat hchu Dan-ah a dh a." 
1Kings12:30 Chu thil chu sual a lo ni ta a ni: mipuite chu a pahniha be turin Dan thleng thlengin an kal si a. 
1Kings12:31 Tin, hmun sang inte a san a, Levia fate ni lo, vantlang zinga mi puithiamahte a siam a." 
1Kings12:32 Tin, Jeroboama chuan Judai rama kut an neih ang bawkin thla riatna, chu mi thla ni sawm leh ni nga ni chu kut niah a ruat ve a, maichamah chuan a han kal a; Bethel-ah chuan a bawng no lem siam hnena inthawiin chutian g chuan a ti a ni: tin, a siam hmun sang puithiamte chu Bethel-ah a dah a.Tin, amahin a du anga a ruat thla ngei, thla riatna, ni sawm leh ni nga niah chuan Bethel-a a maicham siamah a han kal a: tin, Israel thlahte tan kut a ruat a, maichama rimtui hal turin a han kal a." 
1Kings12:33 Tin, amahin a du anga a ruat thla ngei, thla riatna, ni sawm leh ni nga niah chuan Bethel-a a maicham siamah a han kal a: tin, Israel thlahte tan kut a ruat a, maichama rimtui hal turin a han kal a." 
1Kings13:1 Tin, ngai teh, Judai ram atangin Pathian mi, LALPA thuin Bethel-ah a lo kal a: tin, Jeroboama chu maicham bulah rimtui hal turin a lo ding a." 
1Kings13:2 Tin, LALPA thuin maicham chu a au khum a, ""Aw maicham, maicham, LALPA'n heti hian a ni, 'Ngai teh, Davida chhungte zingah fapa hming Josia a lo piang ang a, i chunga rimtui hal thintu, hmun sang puithiamte hi i chungah hian inthawina'n a la rawn hlan ang a, i chungah hian mihring ruhte an la rawn hal ang,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
1Kings13:3 Tin, chu mi ni vek chuan chhinchhiahna a pe a, ""Hei hi LALPA'n chhinchhiahna tur a tih chu a ni: 'Ngai teh u, maicham hi ala khi phawk ang a, a chunga meivapte hi a la bawk vek ang,' tih hi,"" tiin." 
1Kings13:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pathian miin Bethel-a maicham a han au khum thu lalin a hriat chuan, Jeroboama chuan, ""man rawh u,"" tiin maicham atang chuan a kutin a han ban a. Tin, man tuma a banna kut chu alo zeng ta a, tichuan a kut chu a la leh thei ta lo a." 
1Kings13:5 Pathian miin LALPA thua chhinchhiahna tura a sawi ang khan maicham pawh chu a khi bawk a, maichama meivapte chu a baw ta vek a." 
1Kings13:6 Tin, lal chuan a chhang a Pathian mi hnenah chuan, ""Ka kut hi alo lem leh theihna turin LALPA i Pathian khawngaihna ngen la, min tawngtaisak teh khai,"" a ti a. Tin, Pathian mi chuan LALPA hnenah a ngen a, tin, lal kut chu a lo dam leh a, a hma ang bawkin a lo awm leh ta a." 
1Kings13:7 Tichuan lal chuan Pathian mi hnenah, ""Ka in lamah ka hnenah lo kal la, va chawl hahdam rih tawh khai, tin, lawmman ka pe dawn che nia,"" a ti a." 
1Kings13:8 Tin, Pathian mi chuan lal hnenah, ""I in lo zatve pawh mi pe dawn mah la, i hnenah zawng ka lo kal chuang lo ang, he mi hmunah hian chhang ka eiin tui reng reng pawh ka in hek lo ang:" 
1Kings13:9 Chhang va eiin tui reng reng pawh va in suh la, i va kalna kawngah pawh haw leh tawh suh,' tia LALPA thua tirh ka ni a sin,"" a ti a." 
1Kings13:10 chutichuan kawng dangah akal a, Bethel-a a lo kalna kawngah chuan a haw leh ta lo a." 
1Kings13:11 Bethel khuaah chuan zawlnei putar pakhat hi a awm a; afapa pakhat chuan chu mi nia Bethel-a Pathaim mi thiltih zawng zawng chu a hrilh vek a: lal hnena, a thu sawite pawh chu an pa an hrilh bawk a." 
1Kings13:12 Tin, an pa chuan an hnenah, ""Khawi lam kawngah nge a kal tak?"" a ti a. A fapate chuan Judai ram atanga lo kal Pathian mi haw lehna kawng chu a kawhhmuh a." 
1Kings13:13 Tichuan a fapate hnenah, ""Sabengtung mi han siam teh u,"" a ti a. Chutichuan sabengtung chu an siamsak a: tichuan a chuang ta a:" 
1Kings13:14 Tin, pathian mi chu a um ta a, sasqaw thing hnuaia a thu hi a va hmu a: a hnenah, ""Nangmah hi em ni Judai ram atanga lo kal Pathian mi chu?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ni e,"" a ti a." 
1Kings13:15 Tichuan ani chuan a hnenah, ""Ka in lamah ka hnenah lo kal la, chhang va ei rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
1Kings13:16 Tin, ani chuan, ""I ruala kir leh thei ka ni lo a, i hnena lo kal thei pawh ka ni hek lo: he mi hmunah hian i hnenah chhang ka eiin tui reng reng pawh ka in hek lo ang:" 
1Kings13:17 Chhang va eiin, tui reng reng pawh va in suh la, i va kalna kawngah pawh lo kir leh tawh suh,' tia LALPA thua hrilh ka ni si,"" a ti a." 
1Kings13:18 Tin, ani chuan a henah, ""Kei pawh nangmah ang bawka zawlnei ka ni alawm: vantirhkohin LALPA thuin, 'Chhangte eia tuite in turin i inlamah hruai kir leh rawh khai,' tiin mi bia a sin,"" a ti a. Nimahsela a hnenah dawt a sawi a ni." 
1Kings13:19 Chutichuan a hnenah chuan a kir leh ve a, a inah chuan chhangte a eiin tui te a in ta a." 
1Kings13:20 Tin, heti hi a ni a, dawhkan an kil lai chuan a hruai kirtu zawlnei hnenah chuan LALPA thu chu a lo thleng a:" 
1Kings13:21 Judai ram atanga lo kal Pathian mi hnenah chuan, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti, LALPA thu sawi i awih loh a, LALPA i Pathianin thu a pek che i pawm loh avang leh," 
1Kings13:22 i lo kir leh a, chhang va eiin tui reng pawh va in suh ang che, a tihna hmun ngeiah chhang i ei a, tuite i in avangin i ruang hi i pute thlana dah ani ve lo vang,' tiin, ""tiin a sawi chhuak ta a." 
1Kings13:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chhangte a ei a, tuite a in zawh chuan, zawlnei a hruai kir leha chu sabengtung a siamsak a." 
1Kings13:24 Tin, a kal ta chu kawng lakah sakeibaknei nen an intawk a, a lo she ta a: tin, a ruang chu kawngah chuan thehthal derin a awm a, sabengtung chu a bulah chuan a ding a, sakeibaknei pawh chu ruang bulah chuan a ding ve reng a." 
1Kings13:25 Tin, ngai teh, mi an va kal a, kawnga ruang thehthal dera awm leh ruang buala sakeibaknei ding reng chu an va hmu a: zawlnei putar pui awmna khuaah chuan an va sawi a." 
1Kings13:26 Tin, kawng lak ata va hruai kir lehtu zawlnei chuan chu mi thu a lo hriat veleh chuan, ""Pathian mi, LALPA thu sawi awih duh lopa kha anih chuL chuti chuan LALPA'n a hnena a sawi, a thu ang ngeiin LALPA'n sakeibaknei hnenah a pe a, a lo ham a, a sehhlum ta a nih chu,"" a ti a." 
1Kings13:27 Tin, a fapate hnenah chuan, ""Sabengtung mi siamsak leh u,"" tiin a sawi a. Tin, an siamsak ta a." 
1Kings13:28 Tin, a kal ta a, a ruang kawnga thehthal dera lo awm leh sabengtung leh sakeibaknei ruang buala lo ding reng chu a va hmu a: sakeibaknei chuan ruang chu a lo la ei lo a, sabengtung pawh chu a lo la tipem lo a." 
1Kings13:29 Tin, zawlnei chuan chu Pathian mi ruang chu a hlawm a, sabengtun gchungah chuan a hlang a, a kirpui ta a: tichuan zawlnei putar awmna khuaah chuan sun tur leh vui turin a lut ta a." 
1Kings13:30 Tin, a ruang chu ama thlanah a zalh a; tichuan, ""A va pawi tehluul em, ka unaupa! "" tiin a tah a." 
1Kings13:31 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a vui hnu chuan a fapate hnenah, ""Ka thih hunah Pathian mi phumna thlanah hian mi rawn phum ve ang che u: a ruh bulah ka ruhte hi rawh dah ang che u." 
1Kings13:32 Pathian thua Bethel-a maicham leh, Samari ram khawpuitea hmuns ang in zawng zawng a au khumna thu kha lo thleng ngei tur a ni si a,"" tiin a sawi a." 
1Kings13:33 Chung thil hnuah pawh Jeroboama chuan a awm dan dik lo chu a la ban chuang lo a, vantlang zinga mi hmun sang puithiam atan a la siam ta cheu va: hmun sang puithiamte an awm theihna turin a duh apiang a tihrang thin a.Chu thil chu Jeroboama chhungkaw sualna anmahni tichimittu leh khawvel ata tiboral hlauhtu a lo ni ta." 
1Kings13:34 Chu thil chu Jeroboama chhungkaw sualna anmahni tichimittu leh khawvel ata tiboral hlauhtu a lo ni ta. 
1Kings14:1 Chung lai chuan Jeroboama fapa Abija a dam lo a. 
1Kings14:2 Tin, Jeroboama chuan a nupuia hnenah, ""Tho la, Jeroboama nupui ani tih an hriat lohna'n che intidanglam la, Silo-ah va kal teh khai; ngai teh, chutah chuan zawlnei Ahija, he miteho chunga lala ka la awm tur ka chungchang thu sawitu kha a awm e." 
1Kings14:3 Tin, chhangper sawm leh chhang hlawm te te leh khawizu um khat keng langin, a hnenah va kal teh: naupang awm dan tur chu a lo hrilh ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings14:4 Tin, Jeroboama nupui chuan chutiang chuan a ti a, a tho a, Silo-ah chuan a kal a, Ahija inah chuan a va kal ta a. Ahija chuan khua a hmu thei tawh lo va: a upat avangin a mit a thim tawh si a." 
1Kings14:5 Tin, LALPA'n Ahija hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Jeroboama nupui a fapa chungchanga rawn tur chein a lo kal e; a dam lo a ni a: hetiang hian lo hrilh ang che: heti hi ani ang a, a lo luh hunah chuan hmeichhe dang ni awm takin a rawn insiam dawn a ni, "" a ti a." 
1Kings14:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ajijan chutia kawngkaa a lo luh laia a ke rah ri a han hriat veleh chuan, ""Nang, Jeroboama nupui, lo lut rawh khai; eng tiziaa mi danga insiam nge i nih? Chanchin tha lo tak hrilh tur chea tirh ka ni a sin." 
1Kings14:7 Kal leh ta la, Jeroboama hnenah, 'LALPA, Israelte Pathianin heti hian a ti, Mipuite zing ata hi ka chawisang chia, ka mi Israelte chungah hian hotuah ka siam chia," 
1Kings14:8 Davida chhungte ram ka chhuhsak a, chu chu ka pe chia: nimahsela nang zawng ka chhiahhlawh Davida angin i awm ve lo a, ani zawngin ka thupekte a pawm a, ka mithmuha thil tha chauh tih tumin a thinlung zawng zawngin mi zui thin a;" 
1Kings14:9 nang erawh chuan i hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin thil i tisual nasa bik a, mi tihthinrimna'n pathian dangte leh milem chhunte i siam a, mi hnuchhawnsan ta a:" 
1Kings14:10 chuvangin, ngai teh, Jeroboama chhungkaw chungah hian thil tha lo ka rawn thlentir ang a, Jeroboama atang hian mipa fa tawh phawt chu Israel rama mi khuahkhirh leh khirh loh pawh ka tiboral ang a, miin ek a phait fai hliau ang mai hian Jeroboama chhungkua hi a mang vek hma loh chuan ka phiat bo hlauh dawn a ni." 
1Kings14:11 Jeroboama chhungkaw zinga mi, khawpuai thi apiangte chu uiin an ei ang a; tin, rama thi apiangte chu chungleng savaten an ei ang: chu chu LALPA'n a sawi tawh a ni, ti ang che.'" 
1Kings14:12 Chutichuan tho la, i in lamah haw leh mai tawh: khawpui chhung i rah veleh naupang chu a hti dawn a ni." 
1Kings14:13 Tichuan Israel-ho zawng zawngin an sun ang a, an vui ang; Jeroboama chhungkaw zingah chuan amah chauh chu thlana dah tur a ni dawn si a: Jeroboama chhungkaw zingah hian amah chauhvah hian LALPA Israelte Pathian chunga thtna eng emaw a lan avangin." 
1Kings14:14 Tin, LALPA'n tun la laa Jeroboama chhungkua rawn tiboraltu tur Israelte chunga lal a insiam ang; tunah pawh hian engtin nge ni ta ang le?" 
1Kings14:15 LALPA chuan tuia rairuang nghing nging ang maiin Israelte chu a rawn vaw nghing ang a; tichuan LALPA thin tirima an Aser-te chu a siam avangin an pute a lo pek tawh, he ram tha tak ata hi Israel-hotek chu a la pawt chhuak fai vek ang a, Lui piah lamah chuan a la tidarh vek ang." 
1Kings14:16 Tin, Israel-hote htil tihsualtira a tih Jeroboama sualnate avangin Israel-hote chu a hawisan ang,"" a ti a." 
1Kings14:17 Tin, Jeroboama nupui chu a tho a, a chhuak ta a, Tirza khua chu a va thleng a: tin, in kawngka bul a va thlen veleh chuan naupang chu a thi ta a." 
1Kings14:18 Tin, LALPA'n a chhiahhlawh zawlnei Ahija hmanga thu a lo sawi tawh ang ngei khan Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan an vui a, an sun ta a." 
1Kings14:19 Jeroboama chanchin dang-a ral bei thu te, a rorel thu te chu - ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a." 
1Kings14:20 Tichuan Jeroboama rorel chhung chu kum 22 a ni: tin, a pute hnenah a muhil a, a fapa Nadaba chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings14:21 Tin, Solomona fapa Rehoboama chu Judai ramah a lal a. A lal tantirh lai chuan Rehoboama chu kum sawmli leh kum khat mi ani a, LALPA'n a hming awmtirna'na Israel hnam zawng zawngte zinga a thlan khawpui Jerusalemah chuan kum 17 a lal a: a nu hming chu Naami, Amon mi a ni." 
1Kings14:22 Juda-ho chuan LALPA mithmuhin thil sual an ti a; an pute thiltih zawng zawng khuma an sualnate chuan a thikthu a chawhthawhsak a. 
1Kings14:23 Tlang sang tinah leh thing hring tin, hnuaiah hian lungphunte phunin hmun sangte leh Aser-te lam hi an siam bawk si a;" 
1Kings14:24 Tin, chu ramah chuan mipa inzuar te pawh an awm a: Israel thlahte hmaa LALPA'n a hnawhchhuah tak hnamte thiltih tenawm tinreng ang chu an ti ve a." 
1Kings14:25 Tin, lal Rehoboama lal kum nga kum chuan heti hi a ni a, Aigupta lal Sisakan Jerusalem khua chu a han bei a:" 
1Kings14:26 LALPA ina rote leh lal ina rote chu a la a, a vai chuan a la ta vek a: tin, Solomona rangkachak phaw siam zawng awngte chu ala tel vek a." 
1Kings14:27 Tin, lal Rehoboama chuan chung aiah chuan lal Rehoboama chuan chung aiah chuan dar phawte a siam a, lal in kawngka vengtu hotute a kawltir a." 
1Kings14:28 Tin, heti hi ani a, lal chu LALPA ina a luh apiangin vengtute chuan an keng a, tin, vengtute pindanah an dah leh zel thin a." 
1Kings14:29 Rehoboama chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuana chuang a ni lo'm ni? 
1Kings14:30 Rehoboama leh Jeroboama chu indo reng rengin an awm thin a.Tin, Rehoboama chu a pute hnenah chuan a muhil a, Davida khawpuiah a pute zingah chuan an phum ta a: a nu hming chu Naami, Amon mi a ni. Tin, a fapa Abijama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings14:31 Tin, Rehoboama chu a pute hnenah chuan a muhil a, Davida khawpuiah a pute zingah chuan an phum ta a: a nu hming chu Naami, Amon mi a ni. Tin, a fapa Abijama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings15:1 Nebata fapa lal Jeroboama kum sawm leh kum riat a lal kum chuan Juda hote chungah Abijama chu a lal tan a. 
1Kings15:2 Jerusalem khuaah kum thum a lal a: a nu hming chu Kaaki, Abisaloma fanu a ni." 
1Kings15:3 A hmaa a pain thil sual a tih zawng zawngte kha a ti ve a: a pu Davida thinlung angin a thinlung chu LALPA a Pathian lamah a tha famkim ve lo a. 
1Kings15:4 Nimahsela Davida avangin LALPA a Pathianin a hnua a fapa la tundinna tur leh Jerusalem khua din nghet turin Jerusalem khuaah chuan khawnvar a neihtir a; 
1Kings15:5 Hit mi Uria chungchang tih loah chuan Davida'n LALPA mithmuha thil tha a tih thin avang leh a dam chhung zawnga ti tura thu a pek tawh phawt chu a hnial ngai hauh loh avnaign. 
1Kings15:6 Rehoboama nen an indo reng thin a. 
1Kings15:7 Abijama chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni lo'm ni? Tin, Abijama leh Jeroboama chu an indo thin a." 
1Kings15:8 Tin, Abijama chu apute hnenah chuan a muhil a; tichuan Davida khawpuiah an phum ta a: tin, a aiawhin a fapa Asa chu a lal ta a." 
1Kings15:9 Israel lal Jeroboama kum sawmhnih a lal kum chuan Asa chu Juda-hote chungah a lal tan a. 
1Kings15:10 Tin, kum sawmli leh kum khat Jerusalem-aha lal a: a nu hming chu Maaki, Abisaloma fanu a ni." 
1Kings15:11 Tin, Asa chuan apu Davida ang bawkin LALPA mithmuha thil tha a ti thin a." 
1Kings15:12 Tin, mipa inzuarhote chu a ram ata a hnawt chhuak a, a putena milem an lo siam zawng zawngte chu a thehthang bo vek a." 
1Kings15:13 Tin, a nu Maaki pawh chu, milem tenawm tak tak Aseri a siamsak avangin, a lalnu nih a ban a; tin, Asa chuan a milem siam chu a sat thlu a, Kidron luiah a hal a." 
1Kings15:14 Hmun sangte erawh chu a thehthang bo lo va: nimahsela Asa thinlung chu a dam chhung zawng LALPA lamah a tha famkim a ni. 
1Kings15:15 Tin, a pain thil alo hlan sa tawhte leh, amah ngeiin a lo hlan tawh, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbelte chu LALPA inah a la lut a." 
1Kings15:16 Tin, Asa leh Israel leh Baasa chu an lal chhung zawng an indo reng thin a." 
1Kings15:17 Tin, Israel lal Baasa chuan Juda-ho a han bei a, Juda lal Asa hnena lut tur leh chhuak tur danna'n Rama khua a siam a." 
1Kings15:18 Chutichuan Asan LALPA in leh lal ina ro la awm, tangkarua leh rangkachak zawng zawngte chu a la a, a chhiahhlawhte a pe a; tin, lal Asa chuan Damasaka khuaa awm Suria lal Heziona fa tabrimona fapa Benhadada hnenah chuan," 
1Kings15:19 Kei leh nanga karah leh ka pa leh i pa karah thuthlung a awm a: ngai teh, lawmman atan tangkarua leh rangkachak ka han thawn a che; ti teh, Israel lal Baasa hian mi tinsanna turin a hnena i thuthlun kha that teh mai,"" tiin a thawn a." 
1Kings15:20 Tin, Benhadada chuan lal Asa thu chu a lo pawm a, tichuan Israel khuate chu bei turin sipai hotute a tir a, Ijon khua te, Dan khua te, Abel-bethmaaka khua te, Kineroth bial zawng zawng, Naphtali ram zawng zawngte nen a bei a." 
1Kings15:21 Tin, heti hi ani a, Baasan chu mi thu chu a lo hriat veleh Rama khaw siam chu a bang a, Tirza khuaah a awm ta a." 
1Kings15:22 Chutichuan lal Asa chuan Judai ram zawng zawngah thu a than vel ta a; tumah awl reng reng an awm lo: tichuan Baasan Rama khaw siamna'na lung leh thing a hmante chu an thiar a; tin, chung hmang chuan lal Asan Mizpe khua leh Banjamin rama Geba khua a siam a." 
1Kings15:23 Asa chanchin dang zawng zawng te, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a khaw siamte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni lo'm ni? Amaherawhchu a tar lamah a keah hri eng emaw alo vei ta a." 
1Kings15:24 Tin, Asa chu a pute hnenah a muhil a, a pu Davida khawpuiah a pute zingah an phum ta a; tin, a fapa Jehosaphata chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings15:25 Tin, Jeroboama fapa Nadaba chu Juda lal Asa lal kum hnihnaah chuan Israel- hote chungah a lal tan a, Israel hote chungah kum hnih a lal tan a, Israel hote chungah kum hnih a lal a." 
1Kings15:26 LALPA mithmuhin thil tha lo tak a ti thin a, a pa kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, Israel-hote thil tihsualtira a tih sualna kha a ti ve a.t" 
1Kings15:27 Tin, Isakara chhungte zinga mi Ahija fapa Baasan amah a phiar ru a, Philistia-ho chan, Gibbethon khuaah Baasa chuan a that ta a; Nadaba leh Israel-hoz awng zawngte chuan Gibbethon khua chu an hual lai a ni." 
1Kings15:28 Juda lal Asa lal kum thumnaah a ni, Baasa chuan a thah a, a aiawha a lal ni." 
1Kings15:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal anih veleh chuan a tihchimih hma loh chuan Jeroboama chhungte zawng zawng chu a that a; nung tawh phawt chu pakhat mah Jeroboama chu a zuahsak lo; LALPA'n Silo khuaa mi a chhiahhlawh Ahija hmanga a lo sawi tawh ang khan:" 
1Kings15:30 chu chu Israel hote htil tihsualtira a tih, Jeroboama sualnate avang leh LALPA, Israelte Pathian chu a tihthinrim avang a ni." 
1Kings15:31 Nadaba chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni? 
1Kings15:32 Tin, Asa leh Israel lal Baasa chu an lal chhung zawng an indo reng thin a." 
1Kings15:33 Juda lal Asa lal kum thumnaah chuan Ahija fapa Baasa chu Tirza khuaan Israel-ho zawng zawng chungah a lal tan a, kum sawmhnih leh kum li a lal a.LALPA mithmuhin thil tha lo tak a ti thin a, Jeroboama kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, Israel-hote thil tihsualtira a tih sualna kha a ti ve a." 
1Kings15:34 LALPA mithmuhin thil tha lo tak a ti thin a, Jeroboama kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, Israel-hote thil tihsualtira a tih sualna kha a ti ve a." 
1Kings16:1 Tin, Baasa chungchang thuah Hanania fapa Jehua hnenah LALPA thu a lo thleng a:" 
1Kings16:2 Vaivut ata ka chawisang chia, ka mi Israelte chunga hian hotuah 'ka siam chia; tin, nangin Jeroboama kawng zawh chu i zawh ve a, an sualnatea mi tihthinrimna'n ka mi Israelte thil i tihsualtir a;" 
1Kings16:3 ngai teh; Baasa leh a chungte hi ka tibo hlauh dawn a ni; tichuan Bebata fapa Jeroboama chhungte ang maiin i chhungte hi siam ang. 
1Kings16:4 Baasa chhungkaw zinga mi khawpuia thi apiangte chu chungleng savaten an ei ang,"" tiin." 
1Kings16:5 Baasa chanchin dangte, a thiltih te, a thiltih theihziate chu Israel lalte lal lait hu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
1Kings16:6 Tin, Baasa chu a pute hnenah chuan a muhil a, Tirza khuaah an phum ta a; tin, a fapa Ela chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings16:7 Tin, Baasa leh a chhungte chungchahng thuah chuan a kutchuaka LALPA tihthinrim nana Jeroboama chungte anna neia LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a tih avang leh amah chu a thah avangin Hanania fapa zawlnei Jehua hmanga a sawi LALPA thu chu a lo thleng a." 
1Kings16:8 Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmhnih leh kum ruknaah chuan baasa fapa Ela chu tirza khuaan Israel-ho chungah a lal tan a, kum hnih a lal a." 
1Kings16:9 Tin, a puipa Zimria, a tawlailir zatve chunga hotuin a phiar ru a: chutih lai chuan Tirza khuaah, tirza khuaa a in chhung lam hotu Arza inah a lo inin rui a:" 
1Kings16:10 Tin, Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmhnih leh kum sarih kumah chuan Zimria chu a va lut a, a bei a, a that a, a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings16:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a han lal tan a, a lalthutthlenga a han thut veleh chuan, Baasa chungte zawng zawng chu a that vek a: a laichinte leh a thiante zinga mi mipa fa tawh pawht chu pakhat mah a zuah lo." 
1Kings16:12 ,13 Chutiang chuan LALPA, Israelte Pathian chu an lawilohnaa tihthinrimna'na Israelhote thil tihsualtira an tih, Baasa sualna zawng zawng leh a fapa Ela sualnate avanga LALPA'n zawlnei Jehua hmanga Baasa chungchang thua a lo sawi tawh ang khan, Zimria chuan Baasa chungte zawng zawng chu a tiboral vek a ni." 
1Kings16:13 ,12 Chutiang chuan LALPA, Israelte Pathian chu an lawilohnaa tihthinrimna'na Israelhote thil tihsualtira an tih, Baasa sualna zawng zawng leh a fapa Ela sualnate avanga LALPA'n zawlnei Jehua hmanga Baasa chungchang thua a lo sawi tawh ang khan, Zimria chuan Baasa chungte zawng zawng chu a tiboral vek a ni." 
1Kings16:14 Ela chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna bulah a chuang ani lo'm ni? 
1Kings16:15 Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmhnih leh kum sarihnaah chuan, Zimria tirza khuaa ni sarih a lal a. Philistia-ho chan khuaah ni sarih a lal a. Philistia-ho chan Gibbethon khua chu, mite chuan an hual a ni." 
1Kings16:16 Tin, a hualtute chuan Zimrian a phiar ru a, lal a that ta tih an sawi an lo hria a; chutichuan Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan sipai hotu Omria chu, chumi ni chuan an riah hmunah Israelte chunga lalah an siam ta a." 
1Kings16:17 Tin, Omria chu Israel-ho zawng zawngte nen gibbethon khua atang chuan an han chho a, tirza khua an han hual ta a." 
1Kings16:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Zimrian khua chu an la tih a hriat chuan, lal ina kulhah a tlan lut a, lal inah chuan a inhalkhum a, a thi ta a," 
1Kings16:19 LALPA mithmua thil tha lo tak tia a sualnate avang leh Jeroboama kawng zawhc hu zawh vea Israel-hote thiltihsualtira a sualna avangin. 
1Kings16:20 Zimria chanchin dangte leh, a phiarrukna thute chu Israel lalte lal lai thuziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
1Kings16:21 Chutichuan Israel mipuite chu pawl hnihah an lo inthen ta a: mipi zatve chuan Ginatha fapa Tibnia chu lala siam tumin an zui a; tin, a zatvein Omria an zui a." 
1Kings16:22 Nimahsela Omria zuitute chuan Ginatha fapa Tibnia zuitute chu an hneh ta a: tichuan tibnia chu a thi a, Omria chu a lal ta a." 
1Kings16:23 Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmthum le kum khatnaa Omria chu Israelte chungah a lal ta a, kum sawm leh kum hnih a lal a: Tirza khuaah kum ruk a lal a." 
1Kings16:24 Tin, Semera ta Samari tlang chu tangka talent hnihin a lei a; tin, tlangah chuan khu a siam a, a khaw siam hmingah chuan chu mi tlang neitu Semera hming chawin Samari aputtir a." 
1Kings16:25 Omria chuan LALPA mithmuhin thil tha lo tak a ti thin a, a hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin thil a tisual nasa bik a," 
1Kings16:26 Nebata fapa Jeroboama dan zawng zawng ka a la a, an lawilohna avanga Israel-hote thil a tihsualtirna ang khan a sual ve si a." 
1Kings16:27 Omria thiltih chanchin dangte leh a thiltihtheihzia a tilan thute chu Israel lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni? 
1Kings16:28 Chutichuan Omria chu apute hnenah chuan amu hil a, Samari khuaah an phum ta a: tin, a fapa Ahaba chu a aiawhin a lal a." 
1Kings16:29 Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmthum le kum riatnaa Omria fapa Aaba chu Israelte chungah a lal tan a: tin, Omria fapa Ahaba chu Samari khuaan kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih Israelte chungah a lal a." 
1Kings16:30 Tin, Omria fapa Ahaba chuan a hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin LALPA mithmuin thil tha lo tak a ti thin a." 
1Kings16:31 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualna ang tih vete chu engma loa ngai ni awm takin, Zidon-ho lal ethbaala fanu Jezebeli nupuiah a nei a, Baala rawngte bawlsanin a be ve ta mai a," 
1Kings16:32 Tin, Samari khuaa Baala in a sakah chuan Baala tan maicham a siam a." 
1Kings16:33 Tin, Ahaba chuan Aseri a siam a; a hmaa Israel lalte zawng zawng aiin Ahaba chuan LALPA, Israelte Pathian tihthinrimna thil a ti nasa bik a ni.A lal lai chuan Bethel mi Heilan Jeriko khua a siam a: a fatir Abirama chanin a lungphum chua phum a; tin, a fa tlum Seguba chanin a kulh kawngkharte chu a din a, LALPA'n Nuna fapa Josua hmanga a lo sawi tawh ang khan." 
1Kings16:34 A lal lai chuan Bethel mi Heilan Jeriko khua a siam a: a fatir Abirama chanin a lungphum chua phum a; tin, a fa tlum Seguba chanin a kulh kawngkharte chu a din a, LALPA'n Nuna fapa Josua hmanga a lo sawi tawh ang khan." 
1Kings17:1 Tisbe khua, gilead rama Tisbe khuaa mi Elijan Ahaba hnena chuan, ""LALPA, a bula ka awm thinna Israelte Pathian nunna chalin ka sawi e: kum eng emaw i chung chu ka thu lo chuan dai leh ruah reng reng a tla lo ang,"" a ti a." 
1Kings17:2 Tin, LALPA thu chu a hnenah a lo thleng a," 
1Kings17:3 Heta ta hi chhuak la, khawchhak lam panin kal la, Jordan bula awm Kerith luiah han biru rawh" 
1Kings17:4 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a; chuta a chawm tur che in choakte thu ka pe tawh e,"" tiin." 
1Kings17:5 Chutichuan a kal a, LALPA thu ang chuan a ti ta a: Jordan bula awm Kerith luiah chuan a han awm ta a." 
1Kings17:6 Tin, choakten zing lamah chhang leh sa an rawn putsak thin a, tlai lamah chhang leh sa an rawn putsak leh thin a; tin, lui tui chu a tlan a." 
1Kings17:7 Tin, nakin deuhvah chuan heti hi a ni a, hung ramah chuan ruah reng reng a sur loh avangin lui chu a lo kang chat ta a." 
1Kings17:8 Tin, LALPA thu a hnenah a lo thleng a," 
1Kings17:9 Tho la, Zidon rama Zarephath khuaah kal la, chuta chuan awm rawh: ngai teh, a chawm tur chein hmeithai pakhat thu ka pe tawh e,"" tiin." 
1Kings17:10 chutichuan a tho a, Zarephath khuaah chuan a kal ta a; tin, chu mi khaw kulh kawngka chu a va thlen chuan, ngai teh, hmeithai pakhat thing fawm hi a lo awm a; tin, ani chu a han au a, ""Belin ti tlemte mi han lak teh khai, ka lo in ang e,"" a han ti a." 
1Kings17:11 Tin, la tura a kal chu a han au a, ""Chhang tlemte paw mi han ken te ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings17:12 Tin, a ni chuan, ""LALPA i Pathian nunna chhalin ka sawi e, chhang zawng ka nei lo a, belah chhangphut vei khat lek leh, umah sahriak tlemte chauh ka nei a; tin, ngai teh, ka hawna ka tan leh ka fapa atana siamna turin thingtang pahnih emaw lek ka fawm a ni a, tichuan ka ei ang a, kan ti mai ang,"" a ti a." 
1Kings17:13 Tin, Elijan a hnenah, ""Hlau suh; i sawi ang chuan va ti ta che: amaherawhchu chu mi chuan chhang te tak te mi han siam phawt la, chu chu mi rawn lak la, chu mi zawhah chuan i tan leh i fapa atan i la siam dawn nia." 
1Kings17:14 LALPA, Israelte Pathianin heti hia a ti a ni, 'LALPA'n lei chungah hian ruah a rawn surtir hma loh chuan chhangphut bel chu a ruang chuang lo ang a, sahriak um pawh a kang lo ang,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
1Kings17:15 Tichuan Elija sawi ang chuan a va t a: tin, amah le a chhungte leh Elija nen chuan ni engzat emaw lai an ei a." 
1Kings17:16 Elija hmanga a sawi LALPA thu ang khan chhangphut bel chu a ruak chuang lo a, sahriak um pawh a kang hek lo." 
1Kings17:17 Tin, chung thil hnua chuan heti hi a ni a, in neitunu, hmeiche fapa chu a lo dam lo ta a; a na chu a na hle mai a, a thaw a tawp ta a." 
1Kings17:18 Tin, ani chuan Elija hnenah, ""Aw nang Pathian mi, nang leh kei hi eng nge mawi kan ni? Kan sualna hriatchhuahtir tur leh ka fapa mi thahsak tura lo kal i ni hi le!"" a ti a." 
1Kings17:19 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""I fapa chu mi han pe teh,"" a ti a. Tichuan a pawm lai chu a laksak a, a awmna pindanah chuan a pawm cho a, ama khumah a muttir a." 
1Kings17:20 Tin, LALPA a au a, ""Aw LALPA ka Pathian, ka chenna hmeithainu chungah pawhhian a fapa tihlumsakin thil tha lo i rawn thlentir ta em ni le?"" a ti a." 
1Kings17:21 Tichuan naupang chungah chuan vawi thum a bawk a, LALPA chu a au a, ""Aw LALPA ka Pathian, khawngaih takin he naupang nunna hi amahah hian han awmtir leh ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings17:22 Tin, LALPA'n Elija thu chu a lo ngaihthlaksak a; tichuan naupang nunna chu amahah chuan a lo awm leh a, a lo harh leh ta a." 
1Kings17:23 Tin, Elija chuan naupang chu a hruai a, pindan ata chu in chhungah a chhukpui a, a nu a pe ta a: tin, Elijan, ""En teh, i fapa hi a dam leh ta e,"" a ti a.Tin, hmeichhia chuan Elija hnenah, ""Tunah zet chuan Pathian mi i ni a, i kaa LALPA thu hi thutak a ni tih ka lo hre ta,"" a ti a." 
1Kings17:24 Tin, hmeichhia chuan Elija hnenah, ""Tunah zet chuan Pathian mi i ni a, i kaa LALPA thu hi thutak a ni tih ka lo hre ta,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:1 Tin, ni rei fe hnua chuan heti hi a ni a, a kum thum kumaha chuan LALPA thu Elija hnenah a lo thleng a, ""Va kal la, Ahaba hnena va inlan rawh; tichuan lei chungah hian ruah ka rawn surtir dawn e,"" tiin." 
1Kings18:2 Tin, Elija chu Ahaba hnenah inlan tur chuan a kal ta a. Samari ramah chuan tam chu a nasa hle mai a." 
1Kings18:3 Tin, Ahaban Obadia, a in chung lam hotu chu a ko a. Obadia chu LALPA tih mi tak a ni a;" 
1Kings18:4 heti hi a ni a, Jezebelin LALPA zawlneite a rawt chiam lai khan Obadia chuan zawlnei za a hruai a, pukah sawmnga telin a thukru a,c hhang leh tuiin a chawm thin a ni)" 
1Kings18:5 Tin, Abahan Obadia hnenah, ""Tuihna zawng zawng leh luikawr zawng zawng awmna lam ram va fang teh khai; sakawr leh sabengtungte hi kan chhandam theihna turin hlobette kan hmuhsak thei mahna, chutilochuan rante hi kan chan vek da ang e,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:6 Chutichuan ram fan chauh tur an insem a: Ahaba chu amahin kawng danga a kal a, tin, Obadia chu amahin kawng dangah a kal a." 
1Kings18:7 Tin, chutia Obadia a kal lai chuan, ngai teh, Elija nen an intawk a: tin, ai chuan a la hria a, tichuan a bawkkhup a, ""Nang i ni maw, ka pu Elija?"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:8 Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Ni e, kal ta la, Nai teh, Elija sawtah sawn a awm e,' tiin a pu va hrilh rawh,""" 
1Kings18:9 Tin, ani chuan, ""Thil eng nge ka tihsual a, i chhiahhlawhhi thah tura Ahaba kuta pek i duh mai le?" 
1Kings18:10 LALPA i Pathian nunna chhalin ka sawi e, ka puin nangmah zawntir lohna hnam leh ram reng reng a nei lo a sin: 'Hetah a awm lo e,' an tih chuan an hmu loh che thu-ah ram leh hnam chu chhia a chhamtir zel mai a ni a." 
1Kings18:11 Tunah hian nangin, 'Kal ta la, ngai teh, Elija sawtah sawn a awm e, tiin i pu va hrilh rawh,' i ti mai a." 
1Kings18:12 Heti hi a ni ang a, ka kalsan veleh che hian LALPA thlarauin ka hriat lohnaah a la bo si ang chia; tichuan Ahaba ka va hrilh a, a rawn hmuh theih si loh che chuan mi that mai ang a sin: nimahsela i chhiahhlawh hian ka tleirawl tirh ata LALPA chu ka tih thin si a." 
1Kings18:13 Jezeblein LALPA zawlneite a rawt chiam laia ka thiltih, LALPA zawlneite zinga mi 150 tela puka ka thuhruka, chhang leh tuia ka chawmziate kha ka pu hi an hrilh lo che em ni?" 
1Kings18:14 Tunah hian nangin, 'Kal ta la, ngai teh, Elija chu sawta sawn a awm e, tiin i pu va hrilh rawh,' i ti mai a: mi that ngei ang le,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:15 Tin, Elija chuan, ""A bula ka awm thinna sipaihote LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, vawiinah hian ahnena ka inlan ngei ngei dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:16 Chutichuan Obadia chu Ahaba be turin a kal a, a va hrilh ta a: tin, Ahaba chu Elija hmuh tumin a kal ta a." 
1Kings18:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ahaban Elija a va hmuh chuan Ahaban a hnenah, ""Nang i ni maw, Israel-ho timangangtupa?"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:18 Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Israel-ho ka timangang lo e; nang leh i pa chungten alawm timangang zawk ni, LALPA thupekte hi hawisan a, Baala-te i pawm zawkah hian." 
1Kings18:19 Chutichuan tunah hian Israel-ho zawng awng leh Baala zawlnei zali leh sawmnga leh, Aseri zawlnei, Jezebeli dawhkana chawhlui kil ve thin zali-te kha ka hnenah Karmel tlangah hian va koh khawmtir rawh,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:20 Chutichuan Ahaban Israel thlahteho zawng zawng hnenah mi a tir a, zawlneihote chu Karmel tlanga chuan a ko khawm a." 
1Kings18:21 Tin, Elija chuan mipuiho zawng awng ch a va hnaih a, ""Tuilairapin eng chen nge in awm dawn? LALPA chu Pathian a ni chuan, amah chu zui u la; tin, Baala a ni leh, ama chu zui rawh u,"" a ti a. Mipuite chuan kam khat mahin an chhang lo a." 
1Kings18:22 Tichuan Elijan mipuite hnenah chuan, ""LALPA zawlnei la awm chu keimah chauh hi ka ni a; Baala zawlneite eaw chu mi 450 an ni a." 
1Kings18:23 Chutichuan bawngpa pahnih min han pe se la; annin bawngpa pakhat chu an puala thlang se la, chan sawm se la, thing chungah chuan dah se la, a hnuaiah mei chhem loin: tin, keiin bawng pakhat chu ka buatsaih ve ang a, thing chunga chuan ka dah ang a, mei ka chem bik lo ang e." 
1Kings18:24 Tin, nangnin in pathian hming chu lam u la, kei pawhin LALPA hming ka lam ang a: tichuan meia rawn chhangtu Pathian apiang chu Pathian ni raw se,"" a ti a. Tin, mi zawng zawng chuan an chhang a, ""A dik alawm,"" an ti a." 
1Kings18:25 Tichuan Elijan Baala zawlneite hnena chuan, ""Nangnin bawngpa pakhat hi in pualah thlang u la, buatsaih hmasa rawh u; nangni zawng in tam deu hi; tin, in pathian hming chu lam u la, amaherawhchu a hnuaiah mei chem su u,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:26 Tin, bawngpa an pual chu an la a, an buatsaih a, ""Aw Baala, min han chang rawh khai,"" tiin zing atangin chhun thlengin Baala hming chu an lam a] nimahsela aw riva reng reng chu a awm lo a, changtu reng reng lah an awm hek lo. Tin, an maicham siam velah chuan an zuang a zuang mai a." 
1Kings18:27 Tin, chhhun lai takah chuan heti hi a ni a, Elija chuan anmahni chu tielin, ""Au ring che u le: pathian ani si a; a inngaihtuah rih emaw, a bibo rih lawk emaw, a thang bo rih emaw emaw, a nih loh leh a muhil hlauh a, tihharh tur emaw ani ang e,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:28 Tin, ring takin an au a, an tih thin danin chemte leh feitein thi chuak zawih zawih khawpin an inzaiin an invit a." 
1Kings18:29 Tin, ni a lo thlengher chuan heti hi a ni a, tlai lam inthawi hun thlengin an sawi dual dual mai a; nimahsela aw riva reng reng a awm lo a, changtu tur reng reng emaw an awm bawk hek lo." 
1Kings18:30 Tichuan Elijan mipuiho zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Min rawn hnaih teh u khai, "" a ti a; tin, mipuiho zawng zawng huan an va hnaih a. Tin, LALPA maicham tihchim taw chu a siam tha a." 
1Kings18:31 Tin, ""I hming chu Israela a ni ang,"" tia LALPA thu lo dawngtu Jakoba fate hnam zat lung sawm le pahnih Elijan a la a." 
1Kings18:32 Tin, lungte chuan LALPA hmingin maichama a siam a; tin, maicham vel chu buh chi tehkhawng hnih leng zetin a lai khuar a." 
1Kings18:33 Tin, thing chu a han chep fel a, bawngpa chu a chan sawm a, thing chungah chuan a dah a. Tin, ""Bel pali tuiin tikhat u la, halral thillan leh thing hi han leih rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:34 Tin, ""Han leih rawh u,"" a ti a; an han leih leh a. Tin, ""Han leih nawn leh rawh u,"" a ti a; an han leih nawn leh a." 
1Kings18:35 Tin, tui chu maicham velah chuan a luang ta dul dul a; tin, laih khuar chu tuiin a tikhat bawk a." 
1Kings18:36 Tin, tlai lam inthawi hun lai chuan eti hi a ni a, zawlnei Elija chuan a va pan hnai a, ""Aw LALPA, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Israela te Pathian, nang hi Israel rama Pathian i ni leh, kei hi i chhiahhlawh ka nih a, he'ng zawng zawng hi nangma thua ti ka nih vawiinah hian hre hlawm rawh se." 
1Kings18:37 Mi lo ngaihthlaksak la, he'ng mipuite hian nang LALPA hi Pathian i ni a, an thinlungte i lamlettir leh ta a ni tih hi an lo hriat theihna'n aw LALPA, mi lo ngaithlaksak ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:38 Tichuan LALPA mei chu a lo tla a, halral thilhlan te, thing te, lung te, vaivute chu a kangral a, laih khuara tui chu a hip kang ta vek a." 
1Kings18:39 Tin, mipuiho zawng zawngin chu chu an han hmu chuan an bawkkhup a, ""LALPA hi a lo ni. Pathian chu, LALPA hi a lo ni, Pathian chu,"" an ti a." 
1Kings18:40 Tin, Elijan an hnenah, ""Baala zawlneite hi man u la, pakhat mah chhuah suh u,"" a ti a. Tin, an man a, Elijan Kison luiah a hruai thla a, chutah chuan a that hlawm a." 
1Kings18:41 Tichuan Elijan Ahaba hnenah, ""Han cho ta langin, eiin han in tawh rawh; ruahpui sur tur thawm a awm a nia,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:42 chutichuan Ahaba chu ei leh in turin a han cho ta a. Tin, Elija chu Karmel tlang chhip lamah a han chho a; tin, lei lama a kun a, a kapkara a hmai a rawlh a." 
1Kings18:43 Tin, a chiahhlawh hnenah, ""Han chho ta la, tuifinriat lam han thlir teh khai, a ti a. Tin, a han chho a, a han thlir a; ""Engmah a awm lo,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Kal leh rawh, vawi sarihin, "" a ti a." 
1Kings18:44 Tin, a vawisarihnaa chuan, heti hi a ni a, ""Ngai teh, tuifinriat atangin mihring kut tiak lek chhum a ho nel nel e,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, Han kal ta la, Ahaba hnenah, 'I tawlailir bautsaih la, chhuk tawh rawh, ruahin a dang dah ang che,' ti ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings18:45 Tin, rei lo teah chuan heti hi a ni a, van chu thli leh chhumin alo duk ta kuih mai a. ruahpui vanawn a lo sur ta a. Tin, Ahaba chu tawlailira chuangin Jezreel khuaah a kal ta a.Tin, LALPA kut chu Elija chunga a awm a; tichuan puan a veng a, Ahaba hmaah chuan Jezreel khaw luhna thlengin a tlan ta a." 
1Kings18:46 Tin, LALPA kut chu Elija chunga a awm a; tichuan puan a veng a, Ahaba hmaah chuan Jezreel khaw luhna thlengin a tlan ta a." 
1Kings19:1 Tin, Ahaban Elija thiltih zawng zawng, khandaiha zawlnei zawng zawng a thah thute nen Jezebeli a hrilh a." 
1Kings19:2 Tichuan Jezebeli chuan Elija hnenah, ""Kha mite zinga mi pakhat nunna ang khan naktuk hetih hun hmaa i nunn ka siam sak ve loh che huan pathianten an ti tihin mi ti mai se la, chu aia nasa pawhin,"" tin, mi a tir a." 
1Kings19:3 Tichuan a hlau a, a tho a, a tlanche ta a, Judai rama Beer-seba khua a va thleng a, chutah chuan a chhiahlawh a hnutchhiah a." 
1Kings19:4 Ani erawh chu thlalera ni khat bana a kal a, Juniper thing hnuaiah hian a thu a; tin, thih a dil ta a, ""A tawk ta e; aw LALPA, tunah hian ka nunn hi la mai teh, ka pute aiin ka tha chuang bik si lo a,"" a ti a." 
1Kings19:5 Tichuan Juniper thing hnuaiah chuan a mu a, a muhil ta a; tin, ngai te, vantirhkoh hian a rawn khawih a, a hnenah, ""Tho la, ei rawh,"" a ti a." 
1Kings19:6 Tin, a han en vel a, ngai teh, a lu bulah chuan chhangper lung saa hem hmin diam leh tuithawl hi a lo awm a. Tichuan a ei a, a in a, a mu leh ta a." 
1Kings19:7 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chu a lo kal nawn leh a, a rawn khawih a, ""Tho la, ei rawh, i kalna tur i chelh lo ang e,"" a tia." 
1Kings19:8 Tin, a tho a, a eiin a in a, tichuan chu chaw avang chuan Pathian tlang Horeb thlengin ni sawmli leh zan sawmli a kal a." 
1Kings19:9 Tin, chuta puk pakhat chu a va thleng a, chutah chuan a awm ta a; tin, ngai teh, LALPA thu a hnenah a lo thleng a, ahnenah, ""Heta hian eng nge i tih, Elija?"" a ti a." 
1Kings19:10 Ani chuan, ""LALPA sipaihote Pathian tan hian thahnem ka ngai em em thin a, Israel thlahte lah chuan i thuthlung an hawisan a, i maichamte an tichim a, i zawlneite khandaihin an sathlum si a; a la awm chu keimah chauh hi ka ni a,ka nunn mi laksak an tum a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings19:11 Tin, ani chuan, ""Va chhuak la, tlangah sawn LALPA hmaah va ding rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, ngai teh, LALPA a lo kal a, thlipui na takin tlangte chu LALPA hmaan chuan a rawn chem khi a, lungpuite ch a phel rem rum a; nimahsela thli-ah chuan LALPA ch a awm lo: tin thli tleh zawng chuan lir a lo nghing a; nimahsela lirnghinga chuan lalpa chu a awm lo." 
1Kings19:12 Tin, lirnghin zawh chuan mei a lo chuak a; nimahsela meiah chuan LALPA chu a awm lo; tin, mei zawhah chuan aw dam diai hian a lo chhuak a." 
1Kings19:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Elijan chu chu a hriat chuan a puanina hmai a khuh a, a va chuak a, puk kawngkaah a va ding a. Tin, ngai teh, awin a hnenah, ""Heta hian eng nge i tih, Elija?"" a rawn ti a." 
1Kings19:14 Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA, sipaihote Pathian tan hian thahnem ka ngai em em thin a, Israela thlahte lah i thuthlung an hawisan a, i maichamte an tichim a, i zawlneite khandaihin an sathlum si a; a la awm chu keimah chau hi ka ni a, ka nunn mi laksak an tum a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings19:15 Tin, LALPA'n a hnenah, ""Haw leh ta langin,thlaler lama Damaska khuaan kal rawh: i va thlen chuan Suria lal atan Hazaela hriak i thih ang a;" 
1Kings19:16 tin, Israel lal atan Nimsia fapa Jehua hriak i thih ang a; tin, i aiawha zawlnei ni turin Abemehola khuaa mi Saphata fapa Elisa hriak i thih bawk ang." 
1Kings19:17 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Hazaela khandaih pumpelh apiang chuan Jehuan a that ang a; tin, Jehua khandaih pumpel apiang chu Elisan a that ang." 
1Kings19:18 Nimahsela Israel ramah hian Baala hmaa la thingthi ngai lo leh, la fawp ngai lo mi sangsarih ka tan ka hum dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings19:19 Chutichuan chuta ta chu a chuak ta a. Saphata fapa Elisa chu a va hmu chhuak a, ani chuan lei a lo let a, a hmaa chuan sebawng tuak sawm leh tuak hnih a awm a, a sawm leh pahnihna chu amahin a lo khalh a; tin, Elija chuan a va pan a, a puan a va bahtir a." 
1Kings19:20 Tin, sebawngte chu a kalsan a, Elija chu a um a, ""Ka nu leh ka pa ka va fawp rih zet ang e aw, tichuan ka rawn zui ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Va haw ta che, eng nge ka tih che kha le?"" a ti a.Tin, a va zui chu a hawng a, sebawng tuak khat a khala chu a talh a, a sa chu sebawng thuamhnawte chuan a chhum a, mite a sem a, an ei ta a. Tichuan a tho a, Elija chu a um a, a rawng a bawlsak ta a." 
1Kings19:21 Tin, a va zui chu a hawng a, sebawng tuak khat a khala chu a talh a, a sa chu sebawng thuamhnawte chuan a chhum a, mite a sem a, an ei ta a. Tichuan a tho a, Elija chu a um a, a rawng a bawlsak ta a." 
1Kings20:1 Tin, Suria lal Benhadadan a sipaiho zawng zawnga khawm vek a: lal sawmthum leh pahnih an tel a, sakawr leh tawlailirte nen a han cho a, Samari khua a han hual a, a ha bei a," 
1Kings20:2 Israel lal Ahaba hnena chuan khawpui chhunga mi a tir a, a hnenah, ""Benhadadan heti hian a ti," 
1Kings20:3 I tangka leh i rangkachakte kha ka ta a ni e; i nupuite leh i fate, a tha thate chenin ka ta a ni,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:4 Tin, Israel lal chuan a lo chhang a, ""Aw lalber, ka pu, i sawi ang chuan a ni alawm; keimah leh ka neih zawng zawng chu i ta a ni e,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:5 Tin, a mi tirhte chu an kal leh a, ""Benhadadan heti hian a ti, ""I hnenah, i tangka te, i rangkachak te, i nupui te, i fate chu mi pe tur a ni, tiin mi ka rawn tir tak a;" 
1Kings20:6 nimahsela naktuk hetih hun vela hian ka mite i hnenah ka rawn tir ang a, i in leh i mite in hu an rawn dap dawn a nia; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, i mit la apiang chu an la ang a, an rawn kalpui vek ang,' tiin,"" an ti a." 
1Kings20:7 Tichuan Israel lal chuan a rama upaho zawng zawng chu a ko a, ""Lo hre teh u khai, he mi hian thil tha lo tak tih a tumzia hi; ka hnenah mi a rawn tir a, ka nupui te, ka fa te, ka tangka te, ka rangkachakte a rawn ngen a, ka lo hnial pawh a ni si lo,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:8 Tin, upaho zawng zawng leh mipuiho zawng zawng chuan a hnenah, ""Lo bengkhawn duh suh, rem pawh ti hek suh,"" an ti a." 
1Kings20:9 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, lamho zinga mi anmahni zat theuh nupuiah an man a, an kal bopui ta a: tin, an ram lamah chuan an hawng a, khawpui chu an chei leh a, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
1Kings20:10 Tin, Benhadadan a hnena mi a tir leh a, ""Ka hnung zuitute zawng zawng hian Samari khaw vaivut vei khat theuh pawh an hmuh theih dawn chuan pathianten an ti tihin mi ti se la, chu aia nasa pawhin,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:11 Tin, Israel lal chuan a chhang a, ""Mi a inralthuam lai rengin, a inralthuamna hlip thla tawh ang rengin an uang ngai lo e,' tiin va hrilh rawh u khai,"" a tia." 
1Kings20:12 Tin, heti hi a ni a, amah leh lalten bukte azuah an lo inho laiin chu mi thu chu Benhadadan a lo hria a, a mite hnenah chuan, ""Insiam rawh u khai,"" a ti a. Tichuan khaw bei tur chuan an insiam ta a." 
1Kings20:13 Tin, ngai teh, zawlnei pakhat hian Israel lal Ahaba a va hnaih a, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti: 'Heng mipui tam tak hi i hmu em? Ngai teh, vawiinah hian i kutah ka pe dawn a ni; tichuan kei hi LALPA chu ka ni ti i hria ang,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:14 Tin, Ahaban, ""Tu hmangin maw?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti, 'Ram thentea hotute tlangvalho hmang hian,' tiin,"" a ti a. Tichuan ani chuan, ""Tuinnge ral rel ang,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chang a, ""Nangmahin,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:15 Tichuan ani chuan ram thetea hotute tlangvalho chu a han khawm a, zahnih leh sawmthum leh pahnih an ni a; tin, chu mite zawhah chuan mi zawng zawng, Israelta thlahte zawng zawng chu a khawm a, sangsarih an ni a." 
1Kings20:16 Tin, chhun lai takah hian an va chhuak ta a. Benhadada leh lalho, amah tanpuitu lal sawmthum leh pahnihte erawh chu bukteah an lo in-in tui a." 
1Kings20:17 Tin, a ram thentea hotute tlangvalho chu an va chhuak hmasa a; tin, Benhadadan mi a tir a, anni chuan, ""Samari khua atanga lo chhuak an awm e,"" tiin an hrilh a." 
1Kings20:18 Tin, ani chuan, ""Inrem tuma lo kal an nih leh a nungin lo man u la; indo tuma lo kal an nih leh a nung bawkin lo man rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:19 Tichuan chungho, ram thentea hotute tlangvalho leh a rawnzuitu sipaihote chu khua ata an chhuak a." 
1Kings20:20 Tin, an va bitum theuh chu an va that a: tichuan Suria-ho chu an tlanchhe ta a. Israel-ho chuan an um a; tin, Suria lal Benhadada chu sakawr chung chuangin sakawr chung chuang mite nen an tlan chhuak ta a." 
1Kings20:21 Tin, Israel lal chu a va chhuak a, sakawr leh tawlailirte chu a va bei a, Suria-ho chu a that chiam a." 
1Kings20:22 Tin, zawlnei chuan Israel lal chu a va hnaih a, a hnenah, ""Intichak sauh sauh langin, i tih dan tur ngaihtuah rawh khai, kum a lo vei hian Suria lal chuan a rawn bei leh dawn che a nia,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:23 Tin, Suria lal hote chuan a hnenah, ""An pathian hi tlang pathian a ni a; chuvangin keimahni aiin a chak a ni hi: phaizawlah bei tawh i la, anni ai chuan kan chak zawk ngei ang e." 
1Kings20:24 Tin, hetiangin ti ang che: lalho hi an zavaiin thlak vek la, an aia rawm awptute dah langin;" 
1Kings20:25 tin, sipai sakawr leh tawlailir te, i chan tak zat chiah kha sipaiho din tha leh ang che; tichuan phaizawlah ka bei ang a, anni ai chuan kan chak zawk ngei ang e,"" an ti a. Tin, an thu chu a pawm a, chutiang chuan a ti ta a." 
1Kings20:26 Tin, a kum lehah chuan heti hia ni a, Benhadadan Suria-ho chu a khawm a, Israel-hote bei turin Aphek khuaah a han cho a." 
1Kings20:27 Tin, Israel thlahte chu an pung khawm a, ei turte an chek te te a, bei turin an thawk ta a; tin, Israela thlahte chuan kel no tlem te te rual hnih ang lek hian an va ep ve a; Suria-hote erawh chu a ram khah an khat mup mai a." 
1Kings20:28 Tin, Pathian mi chuan Israel lal chu a va hnaih a, ava bia a, a hnenah, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti: 'Suria-hoin LALPA chu tlang pathian a ni a, ruam pathian zawng ani lo a, an ti a ni; chuvangin he'ng mipui tam takte hi i kutah ka pe dawn e, tichuan kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:29 Tin, ni sarih chhung zet chu an inep reng a. Tin, heti hia ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan an inbei ta a; tin, Israela thlahte chuan Suria mite chu ni khatah sipai nuaikhat an that a." 
1Kings20:30 Mi dangte erawh chu Aphek-ah, khawpui chhungah an tlan lut a, a la awmate chu mi singhnih leh sangsarih kulh chimin a delh hlawm a. Tin, Benhadada chu a tlanchhia a, khawpui chhungah pindan chung rilan a lut a." 
1Kings20:31 Tin, a hoten a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, Israela chhungkaw zinga lalte hi mi khawngaih thei tak lal an ni ti thu kan ria a: saiin puan fengin, kan lu-ah hruia inhlingin Israel lal hnenah min va kaltir rawh khai; ani chuan a zuah duh mial mahna che,"" an ti a." 
1Kings20:32 Chutichuan saiip puan an feng a, an lu-ah hruia inhlingin Israel lal hnenah min va kaltir rawh khai; ani chuan a zuah duh mial mahna che."" a ti a. Chutichuan saiip puan an feng a, an lu-ah hruiin an hling a, Israel lal hnena chuan an va kal a, ""I chhiahlawh Benhadadan, ""Khawngaih takin mi zuah rawh se,'a ti e,"" an ti a. Ani chuan, ""A la dam ani maw? Ka unaupa a ni alawm,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:33 Chu mite chuan ngaih tha takin, a rilru thu tak a sawi a ni ang ti ringin, ""I unaupa Benhadada ni e,"" an ti var a. Tichuan ani chuan, ""Va kal u la, rawn hruai rawh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan Benhadada chu a lo chhuak a, a hnenah a kal a; tin, ani chu tawlailirah a lo chuantir a." 
1Kings20:34 Tin, Benhadada chuan a hnenah, ""Ka pain i pa laka khua a lo lak takte kha ka pe kir leh ang a: tin, ka pain Samari khuaa dawrpui hmun a siam ang khan Damaska kuaah i dawrpui hmun tur i siam ve dawn nia,"" a ti a. Tin, chutianga thu inthlung chuan ka kaltir ang che."" a ti a. Chutichuan a hnenah thu a thlung a, a kaltir ta a." 
1Kings20:35 Tin, zawlnei fapate zinga mi pakhat hian LALPA thuin a thianpa hnenah, ""Mi han vaw teh khai,"" a ti a. Tin, chu mi chuan a vaw du lo a." 
1Kings20:36 Tichuan a hnenah, ""LALPA thu i awih loh avangin, ngai the, nang hian mi liamsan veleh sakeibakneiin a lo she ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, a liamsan tak veleh chuan sakeibakneiin a lo hmu a, a she ta a." 
1Kings20:37 Tichuan mi dang a va mu leh a.Mi han vaw teh khai,"" a ti a. chu mi chuan a han vua a, a vaw sil ta a." 
1Kings20:38 Chutichuan zawlnei chu a kal a, kalkawngah lal a lo chang a, a chalhrennaa a mit khuhin a i bawl danglam a." 
1Kings20:39 Tin, lal a lo thlen chuan, lal chu a lo au a, ""I chhiahhlawh hi indona runpui hmunah ka va kal a; tin, ngai teh, mi pakhat hi a lo awi a, ka hnena mi pakhat a rawn hruai a, ""He mi hi lo veng rawh, a tlanbo hlauh zawngin a nun aiah i nun i chan ang a, a nih loh leh tangka talent khat i pe tur a ni,' a ti a." 
1Kings20:40 Tin, i chhiahhlawh hi ka buai vel chugavangin, a lo bo ta dai mai,"" a ti a. Tin, Israel lal chuan a hnenah, ""chutiang tak chu a ni, i chunga thu tlu chu; nangmahin zuk titlu taw diam chia,"" a ti a." 
1Kings20:41 Tin, ani chuan a mit ata chalhrenna chu a lim ta thuai a; tin, Israel lal chuan zawlneite zinga mi a ni tih a hre ta a." 
1Kings20:42 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti: Ka anchhe lawha chu i chhuah tak avangin a nun aiah i nun, a mite aia i mite i chan ang,' tiin,"" a ti a.Tin, Israel lal chu ngui tak leh lungni lo takin a haw a, Samari khuaah a kal ta a." 
1Kings20:43 Tin, Israel lal chu ngui tak leh lungni lo takin a haw a, Samari khuaah a kal ta a." 
1Kings21:1 Tin, chung thil hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Jezreel mi Nabothan grep huan a nei a, chu chu Jezreel-ah samari lal Ahaba in bul lawkah a awm a." 
1Kings21:2 Tin, Ahaban Nabotha chu, ""Ka in bul a nih avang hian, thlai huanah i grep huan hi mi pe rawh khai, a aia grep huan tha zawk ka pe ang che; a ni loh leh i duh zawk phei chuan a tangkain a man tawk ka pe ang che,"" tiin a bia a." 
1Kings21:3 Tin, Nabotan Ahaba hnenah, ""Ka pute ro han pek che chu ka tan a awmin a awm lo ve,"" a ti a." 
1Kings21:4 Tin, Jezreel mi Babtoahn chutiang thu a hnena a sawi avang chuan Ahaba chu ngui tak leh lungni lo takin a inah a lut ta a, ""Ka pute ro ka pe thei lo ang che,"" a ti tlat si a. Tichuan a khumah a mu a, lehlam a hawi a, chaw reng reng a ei duh ta lo a." 
1Kings21:5 Chutichuan a nupui Jezebeli chua va kal a, a hnenah, ""Eng tizia nge i rilru chuti taka a lungngaih a, chaw reng reng i ei loh le?"" a ti a." 
1Kings21:6 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Jezreel mi Nabotha ka bia a, a hnenah, 'I grep huan i mi leitir rawh, a nih loh leh i duh zawk chuan a aiah grep huan dang ka pe ang che,' ka ti a; tin, ani chuan, 'Ka grep huan zawng ka pe lo ang che,' tiin mi chhang alawm maw le,"" a ti a." 
1Kings21:7 Tin, a nupui Jezebeli chuan a hnenah, ""Israel ram lal hi i ni lo'm ni? Tho la chawi ei la, rilru hlim takin awm rawh khai Jezreel mi Nabotha grep huan chu keima'n ka pe ang che,"" a ti a." 
1Kings21:8 Chutichuan Ahaba hmingin lehkha a ziak a, a nemnain a nem a, tin, lehkha chu a awmna khuaa Nabotha thenawm upate leh mi thate hnena a thawn a." 
1Kings21:9 Tin, lehkhaa chuan, ""Chaw nghei thu lo puang u langin, mipui zingah Nabotha chu hmatawntir u la;" 
1Kings21:10 mi pahnih Beliala fate a hmaah thuttir u la, 'Pathian leh lal i sawichhia a ni,' tia a hektu atan lo siam rawh u. Tin, hruai chhuak u la, lo denghlum rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Kings21:11 Tin, a awmna khua ami, a awmna khuaa awm upate leh mi thate chuan Jezebelin an hnena a thawn lehkhaa a ziak ang chuan an lo ti a." 
1Kings21:12 Chaw nghei thu an puang a, mipui zingah Nabotha chu an hmatawntir a." 
1Kings21:13 Tin, mi pahni Beliala fapate chu a hmaa chuan a vat hu a: tin, Beliala mite chuan mipuiho hmaa chuan, ""Nabotha hian Pathianleh lal a sawichia e,"" tiin ama Nabotha chu an hek a. Tichuan khua ata a hruai chhuak a, lungin an deng a, a thi ta a." 
1Kings21:14 Tichuan Jezebeli hnenah, ""Nabotha lungin an deng a, a thi ta e,"" tiin mi an tir a." 
1Kings21:15 Tin, Jezebelin Nabotha chu lungin an deng a, a thi ta tiha hriatin heti hi a ni a, Jezebeli chuan Ahaba hnena, ""Tho la, Jezreel mi Nabotha grep huan, a leitir phal loh che kha nei tawh rawh le: Nabotha chu a dam tawh lo, a thi taw e,"" a ti a." 
1Kings21:16 Tin, Ahaban Nabotha a thi ta tih a hriatin heti hi a ni a, Jezreel mi Nabotha grep huan nei tura thawk thla turin Ahaba chu a tho ta a." 
1Kings21:17 Tin, LALPA thu chu Tisbe mi Elija hnenah a lo thleng a:" 
1Kings21:18 Tho la, Samari khuaa awm Israel lal Ahaba be turin zuk kal rawh kai: ngai teh, Nabotha grep huana a awm a, neih tumin chutah chuan a chhuk a ni e." 
1Kings21:19 A hnenah,'LALPA'n heti hiana ti, I that a, i neihsak lehngal elo? tiin,' ti langin a hnenah, 'LALPA'n heti hian a ti, Uiin Nabotha thisen an liahna hmun ngeia hian nanga thisen pawh hi an la liak ve dawn a ni, tiin,' ti ang che,"" tiin." 
1Kings21:20 Tin, Ahaban Elija hnenah, ""Mi rawn hmu ta maw, ka hmelmapa?"" a ti a. Tin ani chuan a chhang a, ""Ka hmu ta che a ni hi, LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo ti turin inzuar ta hek che." 
1Kings21:21 Ngai teh, i chungah hian thil tha lo ka rawn thlentir ang a, ka rawn tibo hlauh ang chia, Ahaba atang hian mipa fa tawh phawt chu Israel rama mi khuahkirh leh khirh loh pawh ka tiboral ang a," 
1Kings21:22 nangin mi tihthinrim avang leh Israelho thil i tihsualtir avangin Beata fapa Jeroboama chhungte leh Ahija fapa Baasa chhungte ang maiin i chungtehi ka siam ang,"" a ti a." 
1Kings21:23 Tin, Jezebeli chungchang thu pawh LALPA'n a sawi a, ""Jezreel khaw kulh bula uiin Jezebeli h a la ei ang." 
1Kings21:24 Ahaba chhungkaw zinga mi khawpuia thi apiangte hu uiin an ei ang a; rama thi apiangte chu chungleng savaten an ei ang,"" tiin." 
1Kings21:25 A nupui Jezebeli fuihpawrha LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo ti tura inzuar, Ahaba ang reng reng hi tumah an awm lo." 
1Kings21:26 LALPA'n Israela thlahte hmaa a hnawhchhuah Amor-hote thiltih tinreng ang, milemte biain thil tenawm takin a ti thin a." 
1Kings21:27 Tin, Ahaban chung thu a hriat chuan heti hi a ni a, a puan a pawtthler a, saiip puan a sin a, chaw a ngei a, saiip puanah a mu a, dim takin a che ta a." 
1Kings21:28 Tin, LALPA thu chu Tisbe mi Elija hnenah a lo thleng a,""Ahaba ka hmaa a inngaihtlawmzia hi i hmu em? Ka hmaa a inngaihtlawm avang hian ama chanah hi chuan thil tha lo ka thlentir lo ang a, a fapa chhanah erawh chuan a chhungte chungah thil tha lo ka thlentir ang,"" tiin." 
1Kings21:29 Ahaba ka hmaa a inngaihtlawmzia hi i hmu em? Ka hmaa a inngaihtlawm avang hian ama chanah hi chuan thil tha lo ka thlentir lo ang a, a fapa chhanah erawh chuan a chhungte chungah thil tha lo ka thlentir ang,"" tiin." 
1Kings22:1 Tin, kum thum chhung chu Suria ho le Israel-hote chu indo loin an awm a." 
1Kings22:2 Tin, a kum thum kum chuan heti hi a ni a, Juda lal Jehosaphata chu Israel lal hnena a zuk kal a." 
1Kings22:3 Tin, Israel chuan a puipate hnenah, ""Ramoth-gilead kua hi keimahni ta ani tih hre reng sia engtia Suria lal hi chhusak loa awm mai mai kan i nge le?"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:4 Tin, Jehosaphata hnena chuan, ""Ramoth-gilead khua mi han beipui ve duh ang emaw chu?"" a ti a. Tin, Jehosaphatan Israel lal hnena chuan, ""Kei leh nang, ka mite leh mite chu pumkhat kan ni a, ka sakawrte leh i sakawrte chu pumkhat an ni alawm,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:5 Tin, Jehosaphata chuan Israel lal hnenah, ""LALPA thu ngaichang rih zet la maw le,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:6 Chutichuan Israel lal chuan zawlneiho mi zali lai a ko khawm a, an hnenah, ""Ramoth-gilead kua bei turin ka han tawk ang nge thawk lo ang?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Han thawk rawh, Lalpa'n lal kutah a pe dawn a ni,"" an ti a." 
1Kings22:7 Nimahsela Jesaphatan, ""Hetah hian LALPA zawlnei dang tu emaw tal kan han rawn tur an awm lo em ni le?"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:8 Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosapahata hnenah, ""LALPA min rawnsak tur mi pakhat Imla fapa Mikaia zawng a la awm kha maw; nimahsela ani hi chu ka huatzawng tak a ni; ka chungchang thu hi a chhe lam ngawt lo chu a tha reng reng a sawi ngai si lo a,"" a ti a. Tin Jehosaphata chuan, ""Lal chuan chutiang chuan ti teh suh se a,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:9 Tichuan Israel lal chuan hotu pakhat a han ko a, ""Imla fapa Mikaia han hruai thuai teh,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:10 Tin, Israel lal leh Juda lal Jehosaphata chu Samari kulh kawngka luhna bula hruih zawlah an lal puana intuamin, an lalthutthleng ve veah an thu a; tin, zawlnei zawng zawngte chuan an hmaah thu an sawi a." 
1Kings22:11 Tin, Kenaana fapa Zedekian thir kite a siamsak a, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti, 'Hengte hian Suria-hote chu boral der kawpin i si ang,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:12 Chutiang bawkin zawlnei zawng zawngte chuan, Ramoth-gilead-ah chuan han cho la, han hlawhtling rawh khai. LALPA'n lal kutah hian a pe dawn a ni,"" tiin an sawi a." 
1Kings22:13 Tin, Mikaia va ko tura an tirha chuan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh khai, zawlnei hian thukhat vuain a tha lamin lal hnena thu a sawi theuh a; an sawi tak theuh ang chuan han sawi ve la, a tha lamin han sawi ve rawh aw,"" tiin a sawi a." 
1Kings22:14 Tin, Mikaia chuan, ""LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, LALPA'n ka hnena a sawi chu ka ni, ka han sawi dawn ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:15 Tin, lal hnen a han thlen chuan, lal chuan a hnenah, ""Mikai, Ramoth-gilead khua bei turin kan han thawk ang nge, thawk lo ang?"" a ti a. Tin, ani huan a chhang a. ""Han thawk la, han hlawhtling rawh khai; LALPA'n lal kutah a pe dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:16 Tin, lalin a hnenah, ""Thutak ngawt lo ka hnena LALPA hminga sawi lo turin vawi engzat nge maw chia ka chhamtir dawn che le?"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:17 Tin, ani chuan, ""Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu vengtu nei lo beram angintlangahte an darh vek ka hmu a; LALPA'n, 'Hengho hian hotu an nei ta lo a, mi tin, mahni in lamah thlamuang takin haw dial mai rawh se,' a ti a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:18 Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosaphata hnenah, ""Ka chungchang thu hi a chhe lam ngawt lo chu a tha lam reng reng zawng a sawi lo ang tih ka hrilh che ani lawm ni kha?' a ti a." 
1Kings22:19 Tin, ani chuan, ""Chuvangin LALPA thu hi ngaithla teh, LALPA chu a lalthutthlenga thu ka hmu a, vana mipuiho zawng zawng, a dinglam leh veilama dingte nen." 
1Kings22:20 Tin, LALPA'n, 'Aaba hi Ramoth-gilead khuaa han kala rala thi turin tuin nge thlem ang?"" a ti a ni. Pakhatin hetiang hian a ti a, mi dangin chutiang chuan a ti a." 
1Kings22:21 Tichuan thlarau pakhat hi a lo chuak a, LALPA hmaah a ding a, 'Keima'n ka thlem ang e,' a ti a." 
1Kings22:22 Tin, LALPA'n a hnenah, 'Engin maw?' a ti a. Tin, ani chuan 'Ka va kal ang a, a zawlnei zawng zawngte hmuiah chuan thlarau dawtheiah ka va chang ang,' a ti a. Tin, anin, 'I thlem ngei ang a, hlawh pawh i hlawhtling bawk ang; va kal ta la, chutiang chuan va ti tawh le,' a ti a." 
1Kings22:23 Chutichuan ngai teh, LALPA'n he'ng i zawlneiho zawng zawng hmuiah hian tlarau dawthei a dah a, i chungchang thu hi a tha lo lamin LALPA'n a sawi tawh a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:24 Tichuan Kenaana fapa Zedekia chuan a rawn naih a, Mikaia bianga a rawn beng a, ""LALPA thlarau chuan i hnena thu sawi turin khawi lamah nge mi kalsan?"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:25 Tin, Mikaia chuan, ""Ngai rawh, pindan chhungrila biru tura i luh niin i la hria ang,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:26 Tin, Israel lal chuan, ""Mikaia hi hruai u la, khawpui awptu Amona leh lal fapa Joasa hnena kalpui leh tawh u;" 
1Kings22:27 tin, 'Lalin heti hian ati, He mi hi lung ina khung u la, thlamuang taka ka lo haw leh hma lo chuan chaw leh tui tlemte chauh pe raw u, tiin,' ti rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:28 Tin, Mikaia chuan, ""Thlamuang taka i lo haw leh hrim chuan LALPA'n kei mi hmangin thu a sawi lo ani ang le,"" a ti a. Tin, amah vek chuan, ""Nangni, mipuite u, in vaiin lo hre rawh u,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:29 Chutichuan Israel lal leh Juda lal Jehosaphata chu Ramoth-gilead khuaah chuan an han cho a. 
1Kings22:30 Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosapahta hnenah, ""Ka inbawl danglam ang a, inbeihnaah chuan ka han kal ve ang e; nang erawh chuan i lal puan sin ang che,"" a ti a. Tichuan Israel lal chu a inbawl danglam a, inbeihnaah chuan a han kal a." 
1Kings22:31 Tin, Suria lal chuan a tawlailir chunga hotu sawmthum leh pahnihte hnenah chuan, ""Israel lal ngawt lo chu mi te pawh, mi lian pawh a tuama bei su ang che u,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
1Kings22:32 Tin, tawlailir chunga hotute chuan Jehosaphata an han hmuh chuan, heti hi a ni a, ""Israel lal a ni ngei mai le,"" an ti a; tichuan beih tumin an hual ta a; tin, Jeosaphata chu a au chuak a." 
1Kings22:33 Tin, tawlailir chunga hotute chuan Israel lal ani lo tih an hriat chuan heti hi a ni a, an um chu an let leh ta a." 
1Kings22:34 Tin, mi pakhat hian tum bik nei loin a thalngul a kuai a, Israel lal chu awmphaw leh awmphaw inkara a kap a: tichuan a tawlailir khalhtu hnenah, ""Kai her la, sipaiho zing ata hi mi chauhpui rawh khai, hliam na tak ka tawh tak hi,"" a ti a." 
1Kings22:35 Tin, chu mi ni chuan inbeihna chu a nasa ta hle mai a; lal chu a tawlailir chuan Suria-hote hmuhah an dintir a, tin, tlai lama chuan a thi ta a: tin, amah an hliamna atang chuan thisen chu tawlailir chhunga chuan a luang zawih zawih a." 
1Kings22:36 Tin, ni tlak dawn vel lai chuan, sipaihote zingah, ""Mi tin, mahni khaw lamah mi tin mahni ram lama haw vek tawh rawh se,"" tiin an au vel ta chiam a." 
1Kings22:37 Chutichuan lal chu a thi ta a, Samari khuaah an luhpui a; tichuan Samari khuaah lal chu an phum ta a." 
1Kings22:38 Tin, Samari khaw dil kama tawlailir chu an sil a; tin, LALPA thu sawi ang ngei khan uiin a thite chu an liak ta a; (chutah chuan nawhchizuarhote chu an insil thin)." 
1Kings22:39 Tichuan Ahaba chanchin dangte, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a saingo in sak te, a khaw siam zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
1Kings22:40 Chutichuan Ahaba chu a pute hnena chuan a muhil ta a; tin, a fapa Ahazia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings22:41 Tin, Israel lal Ahaba lal kum linaa Asa fapa Jehosaphata chu Judate chunga a lal tan a." 
1Kings22:42 Jehosaphata chu a lal tan la chuan kum sawmthum leh kum nga a ni a; Jerusalem khuaa kum sawm hnih leh kum nga ro a rel a. A nu hming chu Azubi, Silhia fanu a ni." 
1Kings22:43 Tin, a pa Asa kawng zaw zawng zawng chu a zawh ve a; pensan hauh loin LALPA mithmuha thil tha a ti thin a; hmun sangte erawh chu a thehthang bo lo a, hmun sangahte chuan mite chu an la inthawiin, rimtui an la hal reng thin." 
1Kings22:44 Tin, Jehosaphata chuan Israel lal nena inremna a siam a." 
1Kings22:45 Tichuan Jehosaphata chanchin dang te, a thiltihtheihzia a tilan thu te, a ral beih thute chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna bua a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
1Kings22:46 Tin, a pa Asa dam laia mipa inzuarho la awmate kha a ram ata a hnawtchuak vek a." 
1Kings22:47 Tin, Edom rama chuan lal an awm lo a, lal aiawhtuin ro a rel a." 
1Kings22:48 Jehosaphata chuan Ophir-a rangkachak phur tur Tarsis lawngte a tu a; nimahse an kal ta lo; Ezion-geber hmunah lawngte chu a chhe ta vek si a. 
1Kings22:49 Tichuan Ahaba fapa Ahazian Jehosaphata hnenah, ""Ka mite hi i mite nen lawngahte kal za ang hmiang,"" a ti a. Nimahsela Jehosaphata chuan a remti lo." 
1Kings22:50 Tin, Jeosaphata chu a pute hnena a muhil a, a pute zingah a pu Davida khawpuiah an phum ta a; tin, a fapa Jehorama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings22:51 Tin, Juda lal Jehosaphata lal kum sawm leh kum sarih kumin Ahaba fapa Ahazia chu Samari kuaah Israelte chungah a lal tan a, Israelte chunga kum hnih a lal a." 
1Kings22:52 Tin, LALPA mithmuhah thil tha lo a ti thin a, a nu leh a pa kawng zawh te, Nebata fapa Israel-hote tihsualtirtu Jeroboama kawng zawhte a zawh ve thin a.Tin, a pa ti ang apiang tiin Baala rawng a bawl a, a be thin a, LALPA, Israelte Pathian chu a tithinrim thin a." 
1Kings22:53 Tin, a pa ti ang apiang tiin Baala rawng a bawl a, a be thin a, LALPA, Israelte Pathian chu a tithinrim thin a." 
2Kings1:1 Tin, Ahaba thih hnuin Moab-ho chu Israel-te chungah an hel a." 
2Kings1:2 Tin, Ahazia chu Samari khuaa a pindan chungnung kawkalh tukverhah a tla thla a, a intina ta a; tichuan mi a tir a, an hnenah, ""Kal ta u la, he ka na hi ka tha chhuak leh thei ang emaw Ekron khaw pathian Baal-Zebuba va rawn teh ta u,"" a ti a." 
2Kings1:3 Nimahsela LALPA vantirhkohin Tisbe mi Elija hnenah, ""Tho la, Samari khaw lal mi tirhte lo be turin han kal la, tin, a hnenah, 'Israel rama hian Pathian a awm tak loh vangin em ni Ekron khaw pathian Baal-Zebuba chu rawn tura in kal ni?" 
2Kings1:4 LALPA'n heti hian a ti a ni: Khuma i kai kha i lo chuk leh tawh lo ang a, i thi ngei ngei ang, tiin,' tirawh,"" a ti a. Tin, Elija chu a kal ta a." 
2Kings1:5 Tin, a mi tirhte chu a hnenah an lo let leh a, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Eng tizia nge in lo kir leh mai?"" a ti a." 
2Kings1:6 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Mi pakhat min be turin a lo kal a, kan hnenah, 'Kal ta u la, rawn tirtu che u lal hnenah chuan kir leh ta u la, a hnenah, LALPA'n heti hian a ti: Israel ramah hian Pathian a awm tak loh vangin em ni Ekron khaw pathian Baal-Zebuba chu ran tura in tirh ni? Chutichuan khuma i kai kha i lo chuk leh tawh lo ang a, i thi ngei ngei ang, tiin ti rawh,' a ti a ni,"" an ti a." 
2Kings1:7 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Rawn be tur che ua lo kal, chung thu rawn hrilhtu che u chu mi eng ang mi nge ni?"" a ti a." 
2Kings1:8 Tin, anni chuan an chang a, ""Sahmul puana inthuam mi a ni a, a kawng savun kawnghrenin a hreng,"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Tisbe mi Elija a nih chu,"" a ti a." 
2Kings1:9 Tichuan lal chuan sipai sawmnga hotu, a hote sawmnga nen a hnenah a tir ta a. Tin, a hnenah a han cho a; tin, ngai teh, ani chu tlang chhipah hian a lo thu a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Nang, Pathian mi, lalin, Lo chhuk rawh,' a ti e,"" a ti a." 
2Kings1:10 Tin, Elija chuan a chhang a, sipai sawmnga hotu hnenah chuan, ""Pathian mi ka nih zet chuan van ata mei lo tla thle se la, nangmah leh i hote sawmnga kha rawn kangral vek che u rawh se,"" a ti a. Tichuan van ata mei a lo tla a, amah le a hote sawmnga chu an kangral ta vek a." 
2Kings1:11 Tin, a hnenah sipai sawmnga hotu dang, a hote sawmnga nen a ti r leh a. Ani chuan a han chang a, a nenah, ""Nang Pathian mi, lalin, 'Lo chhuk thuai rawh,' a ti e,"" a ti a." 
2Kings1:12 Tin, Elijan a chang a, an hnenah, ""Pathian mi ka nih zet chuan van ata mei lo tla thla se la, nangmah leh i hote sawmnga kha rawn kangral vek che u rawh se,"" a ti a. Tichuan Pathian mei chu van ata a lo tla a, ama leh a hote sawmnga chu an kangral ta vek a." 
2Kings1:13 Tin, sipai sawmnga dang hotu, a hote sawmnga nen a tir leh pek a. Tin, chu mi sipai sawmnga dang hotu chu a han chho a, Elija hmaah chuan a han thingthi a, a hnenah, ""Aw Pathian mi, ka nunna leh, he'ng i chiahlawh mi sawmngate nunna hi i mithmuhah hian lo hlu te se." 
2Kings1:14 Ngai teh, van ata mei a lo a lo tla a, sipai sawmnga hotute pahnih kha an hote sawmnga nen khan an lo kangral ta a; keia nunna erawh hi chu i mithmuhah hian lo hlu teh se,"" tiin a han ngen a." 
2Kings1:15 Tichuan LALPA vantirhkoh chuan Elija hnenah, ""A rual hian chuk raw, amah chu hlau suh,"" a ti a. Tin, a tho a, lal hnenah an chuk dun ta a." 
2Kings1:16 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti: 'Ekron khaw pathian Baal-Zebuba rawn tura mite i tirh vei hi, Israel rama hian Pathian raw tur a awm tak loh vang em ni le? Chuvangin khuma i kai kha i lo chhuk leh tawh lo ang a, i thi ngei ngei ang,,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
2Kings1:17 Chutichuan Elijan a sawi LALPA thu ang chuan a thi ta a. Tin, fapa a neih loh avangin Juda lal Jehosaphata fapa Jehorama kum hnih a lal kum chuan Jehorama chu a aiawhin a lal tan ta a.Ahazia thiltih chanchin dangte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Kings1:18 Ahazia thiltih chanchin dangte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni? 
2Kings2:1 Tin, LALPA'n Elija chu vana thawngaleivira a hruai chhoh dawn vel chuan, heti hi a ni a, Elija chu Elisa nen Gilgal atangin an chhuak ta a." 
2Kings2:2 Tin, Elijan Elisa hnenah, ""Hetah hian lo awm rawh khai; LALPA'n Bethel thlenga kal turin mi tir a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, Elisa chuan, ""LALPA nunna leh i nunna chalin ka sawi e, ka awmsan tawp lo ang che,"" a ti a. Tichuan Bethel-ah an chhuk dun ta a." 
2Kings2:3 Tin, Bethel-a awm zawlneiho fapate chu Elisa hnenah an kal a, a hnenah, ""Vawiinah hian LALPA'n i chunga hotu hi a lak bosak dawn che tih i hria em?"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Aw ka hria a sin; ngawi mai rawh u,"" a ti a." 
2Kings2:4 Tin, Elijan a hnenah, ""Elisa hetah hian lo awm rawh khai; LALPA'n Jeriko-a kal turinmi tir a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA nunna leh i nunna chalinka sawi e, ka awmsan awp lo ang che,"" a ti a. Tichuan Jeriko-ah an kal dun ta a." 
2Kings2:5 Tin, Jeriko-a awm zawlneiho fapate chuan Elisa an va hnaih a, a hnenah, ""Vawiinah hian LALPA'n i chunga hotu hi a lak bosak dawn che tih i hria em?"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Aw, ka hria a sin; ngawi mai rawh u,"" a ti a." 
2Kings2:6 Tin, Elijan a hnenah, ""Hetah hian lo awm rawh khai; LALPA'n Jordan-a kal turin mi tir a ni,"" a tia. Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA nunna leh i nunna chhalin ka sawi e, ka awmsan tawp lo ang che,"" a ti a. Tichuan an pahnih chuan an kal dun ta a." 
2Kings2:7 Tin, zawlneiho fapate zinga mi sawmnga an va kal a, anmahni eptin hla feah an va ding a; tin, anni pahnih chu Jrodan-ah an lo ding a." 
2Kings2:8 Tin, Elija chuan a puan chu a la a, a tumtel a, tui chu a han vua a, lehlam lehlamah a lo inthen ta a, tichuan an pahnih chuan lei charah an kal kai ta a." 
2Kings2:9 Tin, an kai hnu chuan heti hi a ni a, Elijan Elisa hnenah,""I hnena a lak bova ka awm hma hian eng nge ka tihsak ang che mi dil rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, Elisa chuan, ""Thlarau chan hnih chang i la,"" a ti a." 
2Kings2:10 Tin, ani chuan, ""Thil khirh tak i dil a nih hi; khirh mah se la i hnen ata lak bova ka awm lai mi hmuh chuan i chang ang a, mi hmuh loh erawh chuan i chang lo vang,"" a ti a." 
2Kings2:11 Tin, an kal dun zel a, an titi lai chuan heti hi a ni a, ngai teh, mei tawlailir leh mei sakawrte a lo lang ta phut a, an kara tlain a inthentir ta a; tin, Elija chu thawngaleiviran vanah a chho ta a." 
2Kings2:12 Tin, chu chu Elisa chuan a hmu a, ""Ka pa, ka pa, Israelte tawlailir leh sakawr chung chuang mite hentu!"" tiin a au a. Tin, Elija chu a hmu ta lo a; tichuan ama puan chu a chelh a, hmun hnihah a pawt thler a." 
2Kings2:13 Elija puan lo tla pawh chu a khai a, a let leh a, Jordan lui kamah chuan a ding a." 
2Kings2:14 Tin, Elija puan lo tla chu a la a, tui chu a han vua a, ""LALPA, Elija Pathianc hu khawiah nge?"" a ti a. Tin, tui a han vuak ve chuan lehlam lehlamah a lo inthen ta a, Elisa chuan a kal kai ta a." 
2Kings2:15 Tin, Jeriko khuaa zawlneiho fapa, amah epa awmten an han hmuh chuan, ""Elija thlarau chu Elisa chungah a fu ta ngei le,"" an ti a. Amah be turin an va kal a, a hmaah chuan lei siin chibai an buk a." 
2Kings2:16 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh hei, i chhiahhlawhte hian mi ngalchak tak tak sawmnga kan awmpui a; i pu zawng turin tir rawh khai; LALPA thlarauin a hruai chho ta ang a, khawii lai tlangah emaw, khawii lai ruamah emaw a thlak ta mai te hi a ni ang e,"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Kaltir lo ang,"" a ti a." 
2Kings2:17 Tin, a tan zahthlak khawpa an ngen hnu chuan, ""Kaltir ta che u,"" a ti ta a. Chutichuan mi sawmnga an tir a; ni thum an zawng a, nimahsela an hmu zo ta lo a." 
2Kings2:18 Tin, Jeriko khuaa a la cham lai chuan a hnenah an lo kir leh a; ani chuan an hnenah, ""In hnenah khan, 'Kal suh u,' ka ti che u a ni lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
2Kings2:19 Tin, chu mi khuaa mite chuan Elisa hnenah, ""En teh, hei, he khaw hmun hi a nuam hle mai a, kan pu pawhin i hmu ve reng a; nimahsela tui hi a tha lo a, a ram pawh hi nau chhiatna ram a ni,"" an ti a." 
2Kings2:20 Tin, ani chuan, ""Tui thawl thar mi han lak u la, chi han thun teh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan an rawn laksak a." 
2Kings2:21 Tin, tuikhurah a va kal a, chu chu a han thehlut a, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti, 'He tui hi ka titui tawh e, tun achinah chuan thihna leh nau chhiatna a awm tawh lo vang,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
2Kings2:22 Chutichuan Elisa sawi angin tun thlengin tui chu a tui ta a. 
2Kings2:23 Tin, chuta tang chuan Bethel-ah a han chho a; tin, chu mi kanwga a kal lai chuan khua ata mipa naupangho an lo chhuak a, an rawn nuihzat a, a hnenah, ""Nang lukawlhpa, han cho tawh; nang lukawlhpa, han cho tawh,"" an ti a." 
2Kings2:24 Tin, a han lehhawi a, anmahni chu a han hmu a. LALPA hmingin anchia a lawh ta a. Tin, ramhnuai ata savawmnu pahnih an lo chhuak a, an zinga naupang sawmli leh pahnih an rawn she ta a.Tin, chuta tang chuan Karmel tlangah a kal a, chuta tang chuan Samari khuaah a haw leh ta a." 
2Kings2:25 Tin, chuta tang chuan Karmel tlangah a kal a, chuta tang chuan Samari khuaah a haw leh ta a." 
2Kings3:1 Tin, Juda lal Jehosaphata kum sawm leh kum riata lal kumin Ahaba fapa Jehorama chu Israel-ho chungah Samari khuaah a lal tan a; tin, kum sawm leh kum hnih a lal a."
