2Kings3:2 Tin, LALPA mithmuhah thil tha lo tak a ti thin a: amaherawhchu a nu leh a pa ang em zawngin thil a ti lo: ani zawngin a pain Baala lung a lo phun kha a paih a ni." 
2Kings3:3 Nimahsela Israel-hote thil tihsualtir a a tih Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnaahte chuan a bet tlat a; a kalsan leh tawh lo. 
2Kings3:4 Moab lal Mesa chu beram vulh mi a ni a; ani chuan Israel lal lakah beram no nuaikhat hmul leh berampa nuaikhat hmul chhiahah a chawi thin a. 
2Kings3:5 Amaherawhchu Ahaba thih hnu chuan heti hi a ni a, Moab lal chu Israel lal chungah a hel ta a." 
2Kings3:6 Tin, chutih lai chuan lal Jehorama chu Samari khua ata a chhuak a, Israel-ho zawng zawng ch a khawm vek a," 
2Kings3:7 Tichuan a chhuak a, Juda lal Jehosaphata hnenah, ""Moab lal ka chungah a hel a, Moab-ho mi han beihpui duh ang emaw chu?"" tiin mi a tir a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Han beihpui e a: kei le nang, ka mite leh i mite chu pumkhat kan ni a, ka sakawrte leh i sakawrte chu pumkhat an ni alawm,"" a ti a." 
2Kings3:8 Tin, amah vek chuan, ""Khawi lam kawngahnge kan kal ang?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Edom thlaler lam kawngah le,"" a ti a." 
2Kings3:9 Chutichuan Israel lal chu Juda lal nen, Edom lal nen an kal ta a; ni sarih an kal kual a; tin, sipaihote leh an sa ruaite in tur tui a awm lo a." 
2Kings3:10 Tin, Israel lal chuan, ""E khai aw! LALPA'n lal pathumte hi Moab-ho kuta pek turin min hruai khawm ani ngei mai le,"" a ti a." 
2Kings3:11 Nimahsela Jehosaphata chuan, ""Hetah hian LALPA min rawnsak tur LALPA zawlnei tu emaw tal an awm lo'm ni?"" a ti a. Tin, Israel lal chhiahhlawh pakhat chuan a chang a, ""Elija kut tuia leih thintu Saphata fa pa Elisa hetah hian a awm a sin,"" a ti a." 
2Kings3:12 Tin, Jehosaphata chuan, ""A hnena chuan LALPA thu a awm mai chu,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Israel lal leh Jehosaphata leh Edom lal chu a hnenah an zuk kal ta a." 
2Kings3:13 Tin, Elisan Israel lal hnenah chuan, ""Nang leh keiin inhmanna eng nge kan neih le? I pa zawlneite hnenah leh i nu zawlneite hnenah kal daih tawh,"" a ti a. Tin, Israel lal chuan a hnenah,""Kal lo e; lal pathumte hi Moab-ho kuta pek turin LALPA'n min hruai khawm anih hi,"" a ti a." 
2Kings3:14 Tin, Elisan, ""A bula ka awm thinna Sipaihote LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, Juda lal Jehosaphata hi zah lo ni i la chuan i lam pawh ka hawi duhin, hmuh pawh ka hmu duh hlek lo tur che ania le." 
2Kings3:15 Engpawh ni se la, tingtang tum thiam mi han koh a che u, "" a ti a. Tin, tingtang tum thiamin a han tum chuan, heti hi a ni a, LALPA kut chu a chungah a lo awm ta a." 
2Kings3:16 Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti,'He miruam zawng zawng hi lai khuar thliah rawh u,' tiin." 
2Kings3:17 LALPA vekin heti hian a ti a ni; 'Thli reng reng in hre lo ang a, ruah reng reng pawh in hmu hek lo ang a, nimahsela hemi ruam hi tuiin a khat vek ang; tichuan nangni leh in ran rualte leh in sate hian in tlan ang,' tiin." 
2Kings3:18 Chuchu LALPA ngaih chuan thil te tham mai a ni a; Moab-ho hi in kutah a pe bawk dawn a ni. 
2Kings3:19 Tin, kulhpui nei khua zawng zawng leh khawpui tha zawng zawng chu in tichhia ang a, thing tha zawng zawng chu in kit ang a, tuikhur zawng zawng chu in hnawhping ang a, hmun tha lai zawng zawng chu lungin in vawm chhe vek ang,"" a ti a." 
2Kings3:20 Tin, zingah, thilhlan hun vel lai chuan heti hi a ni a, ngai teh, Edom ram lam atangin tui a lo luang chiam a, a ram chu tuiin a lo khat ta a." 
2Kings3:21 Tin, Moab-ho zawng zawng chuan anmahni bei turin lalho an lo thawk chho tin, an lo hriat chua, ralkai chin zawng zawng an inko khawm chiam a, ramriah an lo tang a." 
2Kings3:22 Tichuan zing takah an tho a, niin tui chu a zuk chhun a, tin, Moab-ho chuan an zawna tui chu thisen ang maia sen kukin an an hmu a." 
2Kings3:23 Thisen a nih saw, lalho hi anmahni leh anmahni an indo a, anmahni leh anmahni an inthat a ni ngei mai le, hawh u, Moab-hote u, rallak sum i va chuh ang u,"" an ti a." 
2Kings3:24 Tin, Israel ho riahmun an va thlen chuan, Israel ho chu an tho phut mai a, Moab-ho chu an bei a, tichuan an hmaah an tlanchhe ta chiam a; tin, Moab-ho that chung zelin an ramah an um lut a." 
2Kings3:25 Tin, khuate chu an tichhia a; an hmun tha lai zawng zawng chu mi tinin an vawm a, lungin a khat ta vek a; tin, tuikhur zawng zawng an hnawhping a, thing tha zawng zawng an kit a; Kir-hareseth khuaa mi chauh a ni, lung chu an khawih loh ni; chu pawh chu virvawma vawm miin an hual a, an bei a." 
2Kings3:26 Tin, Moab lalin an indo chu chelh dawnin a inhre ta lo a, Edom lal hnenah thleng tura tawn tlang tumin khandaih keng mi zasarih a hruai chhuak a, nimahsela an thei ta lo a." 
2Kings3:27 Tichuan a fapa upa ber, a aia la lal tura chu kulh tlangah chuan halral thilhlanah a hmang ta a.Tin, Israel-hote an thinrim ta em em mai a, an kirsan a, an ram lamah an haw leh ta a." 
2Kings3:28 Tin, Israel-hote an thinrim ta em em mai a, an kirsan a, an ram lamah an haw leh ta a." 
2Kings4:1 Zawlneite fapaho nupuite zinga hmeichhe pakhat hian Elisa hnenah, ""I chiahhlawh, ka pasal chu a thi ta a; tin, i chiahhlawh khan LALPA chu a tih thin tih i hria: ei a leibatna chu ka fate pahnih bawih atana hruai turin a lo kal a ni,"" tiin a mangan thu a sawi a." 
2Kings4:2 Tin, Elisan a hnenah, ""Engnge i neih?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""I bawinu sahriak um khat chauh lo chu inah engmah ka nei lo,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:3 Tichuan ani chuan, ""Va kal a la, i thenawmteho zawng zawng bel, bel ruak va hawh khawm tawh khai: tlemte mai zawng hawh suh." 
2Kings4:4 Tin, lut la, nang leh i fapate nen kawng inkhar khum u la, chung bel zawng zawngah chuan thun langin; a khat chu dah hrang zel ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:5 chutichuan a hnen ata chu a kal ta a, ama leh a fapate nen chuan kawng an inkhar khum a; anni chuan belte chu an rawn la a, ani chuan a lo thun zel a." 
2Kings4:6 Tin, belte chu a khah hnu chuan, heti hi a ni a, a fapaa hnenah, ""Bel mi han lak leh rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Bel a awm tawh lo,"" a ti a. Tin, sahriak chu a kang ta a." 
2Kings4:7 Tichuan Pathian mi chu a va hrilh a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Va kal la, sahriak chu va zuar ta la, i leiba chu va rul langin, a bak chuan i fapate nen va khawsa tawh u,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:8 Tin, ni khat chu Elisa chu Sunem khuaah a va zin a, chutah chuan hmeichhe neinung tak a awm a; ani chuan chaw ei turin a lo kai lut a. Chutichuan a kal apiangin chutah chuan chaw ei turin a lut thin a." 
2Kings4:9 Tin, ani chuan a pasala hnenah, ""Ngai teh hei, he mi mi rawn pal fo thintu hi Pathian mi thianghlim a ni tih ka hria e." 
2Kings4:10 Hawh teh, in chhawng te i siamsak ang khai, khum te, dawhkan te, thutphah te, khawnvar dahna te i dahsak ang; tichuan kan hnena a lo kal apiang hian alut thin dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:11 Tin, ni khat chu a va kal leh a, chu mi in chhawngah chuan a va lut a,a mu a." 
2Kings4:12 Tin, a chhiahlawh Gehazia hnenah, ""He Sunam nu hi han ko teh,"" a ti a. Tin, a va koh hnu chuan a hmaah a lo ding a." 
2Kings4:13 Tin, anichuan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh, nangin hei theihtawpin min duat a, eng nge kan tihsak ve ang che, lal emaw, sipai hotu emaw biaksak che i duh em?' tiin a hnenah hian sawi teh,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:14 Tin, ani chuan, ""Eng emaw chu kan tihsak tak ang?"" a ti a. Tin, Gehazia huan a chang a, ""Gapa chu a nei hauh lo mai ale, a apsal lah chu a tar tawh si a,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:15 Tin, ani chuan, ""Va ko teh,"" a ti a. Tin, a va koh hnu chuan kawngkaah a lo ding a." 
2Kings4:16 Tin, ani chuan, ""Tun ang hun a lo thlen leh tikah chuan fapa i pawm tawh ang,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""A, ka pu, nang Pathian mi, i bawihnu lakah hian daw ma ta che,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:17 Tin, hmeichhia chu a rai a. Elisan a hnena a sawi ang ngei khan chu mi hun a lo thlen leh chuan fapa a hring ta a." 
2Kings4:18 Tin, nausen chu a lo sei lian a, ni khat chu a pa hnenah buh latute hnenan a kal ve a." 
2Kings4:19 Tin, a pa hnenah chuan, ""Ka lu, ka lu,"" a ti a. Tin, a ni chuan a chhiahhlawh hnenah, ""A nu hnenah pawm tawh,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:20 Tin, a hruai a, a nu hnen a thlen chuan a mal chungah chuan tlai thlengin a thu a, tichuan a thi ta a." 
2Kings4:21 Tin, a chho a, Pathian mi khumah chuan a han mut a, kawng a kharkhum a, a chhuak ta a." 
2Kings4:22 Tin, a pasal chu a au a, ""Chhiahhlawh tu emaw leh sabengtung pakhat emaw mi han ngaihtuahsak teh, Pathian mi hnenah ka va tlan ang a, ka lo kir leh ang e,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:23 Tin, ani chuan, Eng atan nge vawin khera a hnena kal i tum? Thla thar pawh a la ni lo a, chawlhni pawh a la ni si lo a,"" a ti a. Tin, a ni chuan, ""A rem mai ang,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:24 Tichuan sabengtung a thuam a, a chhiahhlawh hnenah, ""Tlantir la, kal zel rawh khai; thu ka pek loh che chuan mi timuang hauh suh a ti a." 
2Kings4:25 Chutichuan a kal ta a, Pathian mi hnenah chuan Karmel tlangah a va kal a. Tin, Pathian mi chuan hla tak atanga lo hmuh chuan, heti hi a ni a, a chhiahhlawh Gehazia hnenah, ""En teh, sawta saw Sunam nu khaani;" 
2Kings4:26 amah hmuak turin va tlan la, a hnenah, ""I dam em le? I pasal a dam em? Naupang kha a dam em? 'lo va ti tawh khai,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a lo chhang a, ""Dam e,"" a lo ti a." 
2Kings4:27 Tin, tlanga Pathian mi hnen a han thlen chuan, a ke a han vuan ta tlat a. Tin, amah chu rawn nam kian tumin Gehazia chuan a va pan a; nimahsela Pathian mi chuan, ""Engmah tih suh, a rilru a mangang a nih hi; LALPA'n ka lakah ala thup rih a, mi la hrilh rih lo e,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:28 Tichuan ani chuan, ""Ka pu hi fapa ka dil che em kha? 'Mi tihder suh ang che,' ka ti lawm ni kha?"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:29 Tichuan Gehazia hnenah, ""I puan veng la, ka tiang kengin va kal tawh khai; tupawh va hmu la, chibai buk suh ang che; tin, tupawh in chibai an buk che chuan buk ve kher suh ang che; tin, ka tiang hi naupang hmaiah nghat ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:30 Tin, naupang nu chuan, ""LALPA nunna leh i nunna chhalin ka sawi e, ka thlah dawn tawp lo che a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, a tho a, a zui ta a." 
2Kings4:31 Tin, Gehazia chuan anni chu a lo hmakhalh a, tiang chu naupang hmaia chuan a han nghat a; nimahsela awka leh hriat theihna reng reng a nei lo a. Chutichuan a be turin a kir leh a,""naupang chu a meng hauh lo mai,"" tiin a hrilh a." 
2Kings4:32 Tin, Elisa chu ina a va luh chuan ngai teh, naupang chu a lo thi tawh reng a, a khuma chuan an lo la mut a." 
2Kings4:33 chutichuan a va lut a, an pahnih chuan kawng a khar hnan a, LALPA hnenah a tawngtai a." 
2Kings4:34 Tin, a han lawn a, naupang chu a bawhkhuh a, a hmui leh a hmui, a mit leh a mit, a kut leh a kut a chuktuah a; tin, a chungah chuan a kaikun a; tichuan naupang taksa chu a lo lum ta tial tial a." 
2Kings4:35 Chutichuan a zuk chhuk leh a, in chhungah chuan a han vei a; tin, a han lawn a, a chungah chuan a han kaikun leh a; tichuan naupang chu vawi sarih a han hahchhiau a, naupang chu a lo meng ta a." 
2Kings4:36 Tin, Gehazia a ko a, ""He Sunam nu hi han ko teh,"" a ti a. Chutichuan a va ko a. Tin, a hnena a va luh chuan, ""I fapa hi pawm rawh,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:37 Tichuan a va lut a, a ke bulah a bawkkhup a, a hmaia lei siin chibai a buk a; tin, a fapa chu a pawm a, a chhuak ta a." 
2Kings4:38 Tin, Elisa chu Gilgal-ah a kal leh a; chu mi rama chuan tam a tla a: tin, zawlneiho fapate a hmaah an thu khawm a; chhiahhlawh hnenah, ""Bel lian tak kha chuang langin, zawlneiho fapate hi thil chhumkawi chhumsak rawh khai,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:39 Tin, mi pakhat ram lama chawhmeh zawng turin a va kal a, ram hrui a va hmu a, chuta mi ram awmpawng chu a puan tlin tawkin a rawn fun a, a zai sawm a, bela thil chhumkawia chuan a thlak ta a; eng tih an hre hauh lo mai a." 
2Kings4:40 Chutichuan chu miteho ei atan chuan an han suak chuak a. Tin, thil chhumkawi chu an han ei chuan, heti hi a ni a, ""E khai, Pathian mi, bel chunga ian thihna a awm alawm le,"" an ti ta chul mai a. Tichuan an ei thei ta lo a." 
2Kings4:41 Tin, ani chuan, ""Chhangphut han la te u,"" a ti a. Tin, chu chu belah a han thlak a, ""He mite eiah hian han suak chhuak te u,"" a ti a. Tichan bela chuan hlauhawm engmah a awm ta lo a." 
2Kings4:42 Tin, Baal-salisa atangin mi pakhat a lo kal a, Pathian mi chu buh thar hmasa bera siam busanghar changper sawmhnih leh buh thar vui a ipin a rawn kensak a. Ani chuan, ""He miteho ei atan hian pe ta che,"" a ti a." 
2Kings4:43 Tin, a chhiahlaw chuan, ""Eng a ni; hei hi mi za zet ka hlui ang maw?"" a ti a. Ani erawh chuan, ""He miteho ei atan hian pe rawh; LALPA'n heti hian a ti, 'An ei ang a, an ei bang bawk ang,' tiin,"" a ti a.Chutichuan a han hlui a, an ei a, LALPA tih ang ngeiin an ei bang bawk a." 
2Kings4:44 Chutichuan a han hlui a, an ei a, LALPA tih ang ngeiin an ei bang bawk a." 
2Kings5:1 Suria lal sipai hotu Naamana hi LALPA'n Suria-hote chhanhimtua a hman thin avangin, a pu ngaiha ropui leh mi zahawm tak a ni a; amah chu mi chak huaisen a ni bawk a, phar a ni pawh a." 
2Kings5:2 Suria-hote chu a pawl pawlin an rammu a, Israel ram atangin hmeichhe naupang te hi salah an rawn hawn a; ani chuan Naamana nupui rawng a bawl thin a." 
2Kings5:3 Tin, ani chuan a pi hnenah, ""Ka pu hi Samari khuaa zawlnei hmaah va kal se la ka va ti em ve aw! A phar hi a lo tidam mai tur a,"" a ti a." 
2Kings5:4 Tin, Naamana chu a va lut a, ""Israel rama hmeiche naupang te khan chutiang khatiang chuan a ti e,"" tiin a pu chu a hrilh a." 
2Kings5:5 Tin, Suria lal chuan, ""Va kal tak rawh khai, Israel lal hnenah lehkha ka thawn ang e,"" a ti a. Tichuan a chhuak ta a, tangkarua talent sawm leh, rangkachak tlang sangruk leh silhfen inthlakna tur sawm a keng a." 
2Kings5:6 Tin, ""He lehkha hi i lo hmu ang a, ngai teh, ka puipa Naamana hi a phar i lo tihdam tak turin i hnenah ka rawn tir a ni e,"" tihna lehkha chu Israel lal a va pe a." 
2Kings5:7 Tin, Israel lalin chu lehkha chu a han chhiar chuan heti hi a ni a, a puan a pawt thler a,""Mite tihlum thei a, tinung leh thei thin Pathian em ka nih a, he mi hian phar tidam tura ka hnena a rawn tirh ngawt mai hi le? Ngaihtuah u la, ka chungah remchang a zawng a ni tih hre rawh u khai,"" a ti a." 
2Kings5:8 Tin, Pathian mi Elisan Israel lalin a puan a pawt thler tih a lo hriat chuan, heti hi a ni a, ""Eng vangin nge i puan i pawh thler? Ka hnenah lo kal ang hmiang, tichuan Israel ramah hian zawlnei a awm tih a hre mai ang chu,"" tiin lal hnena mi a tir a." 
2Kings5:9 Chutichuan Naamana chu a sakawrte nen, a tawlailirte nen chuan a va kal a, Elisa in kawngka bulah chuan a va ding a." 
2Kings5:10 Tin, Elisa chuan, ""Jordan luiah vawi sarih va inbual la, i tisa ngai i pu leh ang a, i lo thianghlim tawh ang,"" tiin mi a tir a." 
2Kings5:11 Nimahsela Naamana chu a thinrim ta hle mai a, a kal leh ta a, ""Ngai teh u, amah ngei chu ka hnenah a lo chhuak ang a, a lo ding ang a, LALPA a Pathian hming chu a han lam ang a, a phar lai chunga a kut thenin phar hi a han tidam dawn emaw ka ti a sin le." 
2Kings5:12 Damasaka khaw li Abana te, Pharpar te chu Israel lui zawng zawngte ai chuan a tha zawk lo em ni? Chungah chuan inbualin ka intithianghlim thei lo em ni?"" a ti a. Chutichuan a lehhawi a, thinrim zetin a kal ta a." 
2Kings5:13 Tin, a chhiahhlawhten an va hnaih a, an va bia a, ""Ka pa, zawlnei khan thil khirhkhan tak tihtir dawn ta che se la, i ti mai dawn lo'm ni? Va inbual la, va intithianghlim rawh,' i hnena a han ti kha tih zawk awm tak a ni lawm ni le?"" an ti a." 
2Kings5:14 Tichuan a zuk chhuk a, Pathian mi sawi ang chuan Jordan luiah vawi sarih a zuk inhnim a; tin, a tisa chu nausen tisa ang mai a lo ni leh a, a lo thianghlim ta a." 
2Kings5:15 Tin, amah leh a hote zawng zawng nen chuan Pathian mi awmna lamah an kir leh a, a hmaah an va ding a: tin, ani chuan, ""Ngai teh hei, Israel ramah ngawt lo chuan leilung zawng zawngah hian Pathian a lo awm lo e tih ka hre ta; chutichuan i chhiahhlawh lawmman hi la teh khai,"" a tia." 
2Kings5:16 Nimahsela ani chuan, ""A bua ka awm thinna LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, engmah hi ka la lo ang,"" a ti a. Tichuan la turin a thlem chiam a; nimahsela a duh lo tlat a." 
2Kings5:17 Tin, Naamana chuan, ""A nih loh leh, i chhiahhlawh hi sabengtung pahnih phur lei mi laktir rawh khai; tun achinah zawng i chiahhlawh hian LALPA hnena ngawt lo chuan halral thilhlan leh inthawina reng reng hi pathian dangte hnenah ka hlan dawn tawh hauh lo a nia." 
2Kings5:18 He thilah hian LALPA'n i chhiahhlawh hi ngaidam rawh se; ka pu hi ka kut rinchana chibai buk tura Rimmonaina alu a, Rimmona ina ka kun chua, Rimmona ina ka kun ve thuah chuan, LALPA'n i chiahhlawh hi ngaidam rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Kings5:19 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""Thlamuang takin kal rawh,"" a ti a. Chutichuan a hnen ata chu a chhuak leh a, eng emaw chen a kal hman a." 
2Kings5:20 Nimahsela Pathianmi Elisa chhiahhlawh Gehazia chuan, ""Khawinge, ka pu hian Suria mi Naamana hi a thil rawn kente la hlek loin a chhuah leh ta mai a; LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, ka va um ang a, eng emaw tal ka va laksak teh ang,"" a ti a." 
2Kings5:21 Chutichuan Gehazia chuan Naamana chu a um ta a. Tin, Naamanan tuin emaw a rawn um a han hmuh chuan, lo biak tumin tawlailir ata chu a chhuk a,""Tha lam thu alawm maw?"" a ti a." 
2Kings5:22 Tin, ani chuan, ""Tha lam thu ni e. Ka puin, 'Ngai teh hei, Ephraim tlang ram atangin zawlnei ho fapate zinga tlangval pahnihin mi rawn tlawh ta thut mai a, anni chu tangkarua talent khat leh silhfen inthlakna tur pahnih pe rawh khai,' tiin mi rawn tir a ni e,"" a ti a." 
2Kings5:23 Tin, Naamana chuan, ""Talent hnih hi la rawh khai,"" a ti a. Tichuan la turin a thlem chiam a, tin, tangkarua talen hnih chu silhfen inthlakna tur pahnih nen chuan ip hnihaa thun a, a chhiahhlawhte pahnih a phurhtir a, a hmaah chuan an kalpui ta a." 
2Kings5:24 Tin, tlang a va thlen chuan a laksak a, in chhungah a dah a; tin, chu mite chu a kaltir a, an kal ta a." 
2Kings5:25 Ani erawh chu a lut a, a pu hmaa chuan a va ding a." 
2Kings5:26 Tin, Elisa chuan a hnenah, ""Khawi atangin nge i lo kal le, Gehazi?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""I chhiahlawh hi khawiah mah ka kal lo e,"" a ti a." 
2Kings5:27 Tin, ani chuan a hnenah, ""A be tur chea tawlailir ata kha mi lo chhuk lai mek khan ka rilru i hnena a kal ve zel a ni lo'm ni? Tangka te, silhfen te, olive huan te, grep huan te, beram te, sebawngpa te, bawipa leh bawihnu te hi lak a hun em ni?Chutichuan Naamana phar khan a man ang chia, kumkhuain i thlahte pawh a man zel ang,"" a ti a. Tichuan a hnen ata chu vur anga vara pharin a kal chhuak ta a." 
2Kings5:28 Chutichuan Naamana phar khan a man ang chia, kumkhuain i thlahte pawh a man zel ang,"" a ti a. Tichuan a hnen ata chu vur anga vara pharin a kal chhuak ta a." 
2Kings6:1 Tin, zawlneiho fapae chuan Elisa heah, ""En teh hei, i bula kan thut khawmna hi kan tan a chep lutuk a." 
2Kings6:2 Jordan luiah kan zuk kal ang a, chuta thing chu kan zuk la theuh ang a, kan thut khawmna tur chuta chuan kan zu siam teh ang aw?"" an ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Kal ta che u,"" a ti a." 
2Kings6:3 Tin, mi pakhat chuan, "" chiahhlawhte hnenah hian kal ve ta che,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""ka kal ve ang e,"" tiin a chhang a." 
2Kings6:4 Chutichuan an hnenah a kal ve ta a. Tin, Jordan lui an thlen chuan thing chu an han kt a." 
2Kings6:5 Tin, mi pakhatin thing a han kih lai tak chuan, hrei fang chu tuiah a tla ta a: tin, ani chu, ""E khai aw, ka pu! Kan hawh a sin ni le,"" tiin a au ta a." 
2Kings6:6 Tin, Pathian mi chuan, Khawii laiah nge a tlak?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a tlakna lai aentir a. Tichuan thingtuai a han sat a, chutah chuan a han paih lut a, thir chu a lo lang ta a." 
2Kings6:7 Tin, a nichuan, ""Chhar rawh le,"" a tia. Chutichuan ahan ban a, a chhar ta a." 
2Kings6:8 Suria lalin Israelte a run a, {Chu mi, kha mi hmuna chuan i chang ang u,"" tiin a puipateho a rawn a." 
2Kings6:9 Tin, Pathian mi chuan Isael lal hnenah, ""Chutiang hmuna kal lo turin fimkhur rawh; chutah chuan Suria-ho an lo chhuk dawn a nia,""tiin mi a tir thin a." 
2Kings6:10 Tin, Israel lal chuan Pathian miin a lo hrilh tawh hmun chu mi a va enthlaktir hin a: chuta chuan awi hnih khat chang pawh ni loin, a lo inhumhim thin a." 
2Kings6:11 Tichuan chu mi thuah chuan Suria lal thinlung chu a mangang hle mai a; tin, a pupate chu a ko a, an hnenah, ""kan zinga mi atu hi nge Israel lal lama tang mi rilh duh dawn lo'm ni?"" a ti a." 
2Kings6:12 Tin, a puipate zinga mi pakhat chuan, ""Tumah kan tang lo e, aw lalber ka pu, Israel rama awm zawlnei Elisa hian i pindan chhungrila i sawite hi Israel lal a hrilh zel thin a ni zawk e,"" a ti a." 
2Kings6:13 Tin, ani chuan ""Khawiah nge a awm va zawng teh u, ka va mantir ang e,"" a ti a. Tin, ""Ngai teh, Dothan khuaah a awm e,"" tiin an hrilh a." 
2Kings6:14 Chutichuan sakawr e, tawlailir te, sipai tam takte chutah chuan a tir a, zanah an va kal a, khua chu an hual ta mup a." 
2Kings6:15 Tin, Pathian mi chhiahhlawh chu zing taka a thawh a, a va chauh chuan, ngai teh, sipaiho chuan sakaw nen, tawlailir nen khua chu an lo hual mup mai a. Ti a chhiahhlawh chuan a hnenah, ""E kahi aw, ka pu! Engtin nge kan ti tak ang le?"" a ti a." 
2Kings6:16 Tin, ani chuan, ""Hlau mata che; an lama tangai chuan kan lama tang an tam zawk alawm,"" a ti a." 
2Kings6:17 Tin, Elisa chuan a tawngtai a, ""LALPA, a hmuh theihna turin a mit han tihmensak teh ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, LALPA'n chu tlangval mit ch ahan tihmensak a; tichuan a hmu ve ta a; tin, ngai teh, Elisa velah chuan tlang chu mei tawlailir leh sakawrin a khat mup mai a." 
2Kings6:18 Tin, a lama an lo chhuk chuan Elisan LALPA hnenah a tawngtai a, ""Hengho hi an mit han tihdelsak teh ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, Elisa thu angin an mit a rawn tihdelsak ta a." 
2Kings6:19 Tin, Elisan an hnenah, ""Hei chu kawng a ni lo e, hei chu khua pawh ani hek lo; mi zui rawh u, in mi zawna hnenah chuan ka hrua ang che u,"" a ti a. Tichuan Samari khuaah a hruai ta a." 
2Kings6:20 Tin, samari khaw chhung an han thlen chuan heti hi a ni a, Elisan,""LALPA, hengho hian an hmuh theihna turin an mit han tihmensak ang che,"" a ti a. Tin, LALPA'n an mit chu ahan tihmensak a, an hmu ta a; tin, ngai teh, Samari kha chhungah chuan an lo awm reng mai a." 
2Kings6:21 In Israel lal chuan anniho chu a hmuh chuan Elisa hnenah, ""Ka pa, ka that ang em? Ka that ang em?"" a ti a." 
2Kings6:22 Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""That lo e a; i khandaih leh i thalngual i sal mante chu i that dawn em ni? Chhang leh tui han hlui langin,eiin in se la, an pu hnenah haw leh rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Kings6:23 Tichuan ei tur nasa tak a buatsaihsak a; tin, an ei a an in zawh chuan a hawntir ta vek a, an pu hnen lamah an haw leh ta a. Tichuan Suria-ho pawlte chu Israel ramah chuan an rammu leh ta lo." 
2Kings6:24 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuanheti hi a ni a, Suria lal Benhadadan a sipai zawng zawng a khawm a, Samari khua a han hual a." 
2Kings6:25 Tin, Samari khuaah chuan tam a nasa em em mai a; tin, ngai teh, an hual tlat a, sabengtung lu hi tangka sawmriatah an hralh a, tin, thuro ek hi kab hmun lia thena hmun khat tangka ngaah an hralh hial a." 
2Kings6:26 Tin, Israel lal chu kulh tlanga a kal lai hmeiche pakhat hian, ""Aw lalbe, ka pu, min pui rawh,"" tiin a lo au a." 
2Kings6:27 Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA'n a tanpi nghal loh chein keiin khawi atain nge ka han tanpui tehlul ang che? Hruih zawl atain emaw, grep sawrna khur aanin emaw em ni dawn?"" a tia." 
2Kings6:28 Tin, lal chuan a hnenah, ""Eng i ti nge ni le?"" a ti leh a. Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""He hmeichhia hian ka hnenah, 'Vawiina hian i fapa hi kan eiah thawh rawh khai, naktukah ka fapa hi kan ei ve thung dawn nia,' a ti a." 
2Kings6:29 Tichuan ka fapa chu kan chum a, kan ei a; tin, a tukah chuan keiin a hnenah,'I fapa chu kan eiah thawh ve thung rawh le,' ka ti a, a fapa chu a thukru ta bik mai a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Kings6:30 Tin, lalin chu hmeichhe thu sawi chu a hriatin heti hi a ni a, a puan a pawt thler ta a; (kulh tlanga a kal lai a ni a;) tin, mipuite chuan an han en a, ngai teh, a pang depah chuan saiip puan hi a lo sin reng a." 
2Kings6:31 Tichuan ani chuan, ""vawiinah hian Saphata fapa Elisa hian a lu a la put na chuan pathianin a tih tihin mi ti mai se la, chu aia nasa pawhin,"" a ti a." 
2Kings6:32 Tin, Elisa chu a inah a thu a, upahote pawh an thu ve a; tin, lalber chuan a hnenah mi pakhat a tir a, nimahsela a mi tirh chuan a hnen a lo thlen hmain upaho hnenah chuan, ""He tualthattupa fapa hian ka lu la turin mi a rawn tir tih in hre ve em u? Ngawi teh u, a mi tirh chu a lo thlen veleh, kawng lo khar u la, kawngkhar khan lo dang tlat ang che u; a hnunga chuan a pu pen ri a hriat nghe nghe lo'm ni?"" a ti a.Tin, chutia anmahni a la biak lai mekc haun ngai teh, a mi tir chu a lo thleng thla ta a; tin, lalber chuan, Ngai teh, he thil tha lo hi LALPA rawn tirh a nih hi; LALPA chu engah nge ka la ngaihchan cheu vang?"" a ti a." 
2Kings6:33 Tin, chutia anmahni a la biak lai mekc haun ngai teh, a mi tir chu a lo thleng thla ta a; tin, lalber chuan, Ngai teh, he thil tha lo hi LALPA rawn tirh a nih hi; LALPA chu engah nge ka la ngaihchan cheu vang?"" a ti a." 
2Kings7:1 Tin, Elisan, ""LALPA thu hi lo hre rawh u; LALPA'n heti hian a ti: 'Naktuk hetih hun velah hian Samari kulh kawngka bulah chuan chhangphut dip mi tehkhawng khat chu sekel khatah an hralh ang a, barli tehkhawng hnih chu sekel khatah,' tiin,"" a sawi a." 
2Kings7:2 Tin, sipai hotu, lalin a kut a rawn rinchhan a chuan Pathian mi chu a chang a, ""Ngai teh, LALPA'n vanah tukverh a hawn dawn che le! Chutiang chu a ni thei tehlul ang maw?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Ngawi rawh, i mit zawngin i hmu ngei ang a, a ei earw chu i ei dawn lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Kings7:3 Tin, kulh luhna kawngka bulah phar pali an awm a; anni chuan, ""Eng atan nge maw thih nghak maia kan thut reng le?" 
2Kings7:4 Khaw chhungah i lut teh mai ang u,' han ti dawn i la, khaw chhung an tam a, ka va thi mai awm si a; tin, hetah hian thu reng dawn i la, kan thi tho tho awm bawk si a. Chutichuan hawh teh u, Suria sipaihote hnen lama i tlu lut rawk mai teh ang u; min zuah leh kan nung ang a; min thah leh kan thi a ni mai ang chu,"" tiin an inbia a." 
2Kings7:5 Tichuan Suria-hote riahmuna kal tur chuan thimhmulah an thawk chhuak ta a; tin, Suria-ho riahhmun tawntirh an va thlen chuan, ngai teh, tumah an lo awm lo a." 
2Kings7:6 LALPA'n Suria sipaihote chu tawlailir thawm te, sakawr thawm te, sipai tam tak thawm te a hriattir a ni a; tichuan, ""Ngai teh u, Israel lal hian Hit lalhote, Aigupta lalhote hi min rawn bei turin a ruai anih hi,"" tiin an inbia a." 
2Kings7:7 Chutichuan an tho a, thimhmulah chuan an tlanche ta a, an puan in te, an sakawr te, an sabengtungte leh an riahhmun chu a awm ngai ngaiin an tlansan a, an tlanche ta chiam a." 
2Kings7:8 Tin, chung pharho chuan riahhmun tawntir an va thlen chuan puan in pakhatah hian an va lut a, an eiin an in a, chuta tangkarua leh, rangkachak te, silhfen te chu an la a, an va thukru a; tin, an va let leh a, puan in dangah an lut leh a, chuta mi pawh chu an la a, an va thukru leh a." 
2Kings7:9 Nakina chuan, ""Kan tidik hauh lo mai a; vawiin hi chanchin lawmawm thlenni a ni a, keini hi kan ngawi reng mai a; khawvar kan nghah chuan hrem kan tawk mai ang; chutichuan hawh u, lal chhungte i va hrilh ang u,"" tiin an inbia a." 
2Kings7:10 Chutichuan khaw kawngkhar vengtu chu an va au a; Suria-ho riahhmunah kan va kal a, tin, ngai teh, tumah an lo awm lo a, mihringthawm reng reng pawh a awm lo a, sakawrte leh saengtungte chauh a lo inthlung a, puan inte pawh chu a awm ngai ngaiin a awm reng mai,"" tiin an hrilh a." 
2Kings7:11 `Tin, kawngkhar vengtute chu a ko a; tin, anni chuan lal in chhunga mite chu an va hrilh a." 
2Kings7:12 Tin, lal chu zanah chuan a tho a, a puipate hnenah chuan, ""Suria-hote tih dan hi ka hrilh teh ang che u. Kan riltamia hi an hria a; chuvangin, 'Khawpui ata an lo chhua chuan anungin kan lo man ang a, khaw chhunga kan lut dawn zuk nia,' tiin ramah biru turin an riahhmun an chauhsan anih hi,"" a ti a." 
2Kings7:13 Tin, a puipa pakhat chuan a chhang a, ""Khawpuia sakawr awm chhunte zinga a panga hi tute emaw hruaitir rawh khai, (ngai teh, Israel mipuiho, a la dam zawng zawngate ang bawk an ni tho tho a; ngai teh, Israel mipuiho thia ngaihte ang bawk an ni tho tho alawm;) tichuan i va tir teh reng ang u,"" a ti a." 
2Kings7:14 Chutichuan tawlailir hnuktu sakawr pahnih an hruai a; tin, lal chuan, ""Va en teh ta u,"" tiin Suria sipaihote um turin a tir a." 
2Kings7:15 Tin, Jordan lui thlengin an va um a; tin, ngai teh, Suria-hoten an hmanhmawh avanga a paih silhfente leh bungruate chu kawng tluanin a awm zel zul mai a. Tin, a mi tirhte chu an lo kir leh a, lal chu an rawn hrilh a." 
2Kings7:16 Tin, mipui ch an va chhuak a, Suria-ho riahhmun chu an va suam ta chiam a. tichuan LALPA thu ang ngeiin chhang phut dp mi tehkhawng khat chu sekel khatah an hrlah a, busanghar tehkhawng hnih chu sekel khatah." 
2Kings7:17 Tin, lal chuan sipaihotu a kut a rawn rinchhana kha kulh kawngka vengtuah a ruat a; tinmipite chuan kulh kawngka bulah chuan an chil ta nuai nuai a, Pathian miin a hnena lal a lo chuk laia a lo sawi ang khan a thi ta a." 
2Kings7:18 Heti hi a ni a, Pathian miin lal hnena, ""Naktuk hetih hun velah hian Samari kulh kawngka bula buhsanghar tehkhawng hnih chu sekel khatah a hralh ang a, chhangphut dip mi tehkhawng khat chu sekel khatah,"" a tih a," 
2Kings7:19 tin, sipai hotuin Pathian mi chu a hchhan a, ""Ngai teh, LALPA'n vanah tukverh a hawn dawn chu le! Chutiang chu ani thei tehlul ang maw?"" a tih a, anin, ""Ngai rawh, i mit zawngin i mu ngei ang a, a ei eraw chu i ei dawn lo a ni,"" tia a sawi kha;Chutiang ngei chuan a chungah a lo thleng ta a ni; mipuiin kulh kawngka bula chuan an chil nuai nuai a, a thi ta a ni." 
2Kings7:20 Chutiang ngei chuan a chungah a lo thleng ta a ni; mipuiin kulh kawngka bula chuan an chil nuai nuai a, a thi ta a ni." 
2Kings8:1 Tin, Elisan a fapa a tihdamsak hmeiche hnenah chuan, ""Tho la, nang leh i chungte nen, in awm theih theihna hmunah va awm rih raw u; LALPA'n tam a talktir dawn e; he ramah hian kum sarih chhung zet a tla nghe nghe dawn ni,"" tiin a lo sawi tawh a." 
2Kings8:2 Tichuan hmeichhia chu a tho a, Pathian thu anga chuan a ti a; a chhungte nen chuan Philistia-ho ramah kum sarih an va awm ta a." 
2Kings8:3 Tin, kum sarih a lo vei hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, chu hmeichhia chu Philistia-ho ram ata a let leh ta a; tin, a in leh a lo lal dil turin a va kal a." 
2Kings8:4 Tin, lal chuan Pathian mi chhiahhlawh Gehazia chu, ""Elisan thil ropui a tih zawng anwg mi han hrilh teh khai,"" tia a lo biak lai a ni a." 
2Kings8:5 Tin, mi pakhat thi taw a tihnun leh thu lal a lo hrilh lai mek chuan heti hi a ni a, ngai teh, a fapa a tihnun lehsak hmeichhia chuan a in leh a lo lal chu a rawn dil ve a. Tin, Gehazia chuan, ""Aw lalber ka pu, hei hi a ni hmeichhia chu, tin, hei hi a ni a fapa Elisan a tihnun leh saka chu,"" a ti a." 
2Kings8:6 Tin, lalin hmeichhia chu a han zawh chuan a hrilh ta a. Chutichuan lal chuan hotu pakhat a ruatsak a, ""A ta zawng zawng, a loa thil haw zawng zawng chenin, he ram a chauhsan ata tun thlenga mi hi pe leh vek rawh,"" a tia." 
2Kings8:7 Tin, Elisa chu Damasaka khuaa a kal a; tin, Suria lal Benhadada chu a dam lo a; tichuan, ""Pathian mi hetah hian a lo kal e,"" tiin an hrilh a. Tin, lalin Hazaela hnenah, ""Lawmman keng langin, Pathian mi be turin va kal la, ka na hi ka tha chhuak le thei ang emaw lalpa mi lo rawnsak teh,"" a ti a." 
2Kings8:8 Chutichuan Hazaela chua amah be tur chuan a va kal a, lawmman atan Damaska khuaa thil tha tinreng, sanghawngsei sawmli phur a keng a, a hmaah chuan a va ding a, ""I fapa Benhadada, Suria lalin, 'Ka na hi ka tha chhuak leh ang em?' ti turin i hnenah hian mi rawn tir a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Kings8:9 Tin, Elisan a hnenah, ""Kal leh ta langin, a hnenah, ""I tha chuak le mawlh ang,a ti e,' ti ang che, amaherawhchu a la thi ngei dawn a ni tih zawng LALPA'n mi hriattir a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Kings8:10 Tichuan a tan zathlak khawpin a melh ta reng mai a; tin, Pathian mi chu a tap ta a." 
2Kings8:11 Tin, Hazaela chuan, ""Engati nge ka pu chu a tah mai?"" a ti a. Ani chuan a chhang a, ""Israela thlahte chunga i thil tha lo tih tur ka hriat avang a ni; an kulhte i la halsak ang a, an tlangvalte khandaihin i la that ang a, an fanau te tete chu i la paih sawm ang a, nau pai lai hmeichhiate chu i la pir thler dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Kings8:12 Tin, Hazaela chuan, ""Kei i chhiahhlawh uicho mai mai hian chutiang thil nasa tak chu han ti theizia em ka nih?"" a ti a. Tin, Elisan a chhang a, ""Suria-ho chunga i la lal dawn tih LALPA'n mi hriattir a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Kings8:13 Tichuan Elisa hnen ata a chhuak a, a pu hnen lama chuan a kal ta a; ani chuan, ""Elisan eng nge a lo hrilh che?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""A tha chhuak leh mawlh ang,' tiin mi hrilh,"" a ti a." 
2Kings8:14 Tin, atuka chuan heti hi a ni a, puan chhah tak a la a, tuiah a hnim a, chu chuan a hmai a upsak a, a thi ta a; tin, Hazaela chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings8:15 Tin, Israel lal Ahaba fapa Jorama kum nga a lalkum chuan (Chu mi lai chuan Jehosaphata chu Juda lala ni a,) Juda lal Jehosaphata fapa Jehorama chu a lal tan a." 
2Kings8:16 A lal tan lai chuan kum sawmthum leh kum hnih mi a ni a; Jerusalem khuaah kum riat ro a rel a. 
2Kings8:17 Ahaba chhungte angin, Israel lalte kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a; Ahaba fanu nupuiah a nei a ni; tichuan LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a." 
2Kings8:18 Amaherawhchu LALPA'n a chiahlaw Davida avangin Judai ram chu a tiche duh lo a, a thlahte chena khawnvar neihtir reng a lo tiam tawh si a." 
2Kings8:19 Ama chhanah chuan Edom-ho chu Judate lakah an hel a, an chunga lal tur an insiam chawp a." 
2Kings8:20 Tichuan Jorama chu Zair khuaah a tawlailir zawng zawngte nen a va kal a; tin, zanah a thawk chhuak a, anmahni hualtu Edom-hote leh an tawlailir chunga hotute chu a va bei ta a; tin, mite chu an puan in lamahte an tlan ta vek a." 
2Kings8:21 Chutichuan Edom-ho chu tun thlengin Judate lakah an la hel ta reng a ni. Chu mi lai vek chuan Libna khua pawh an lo hel ve a. 
2Kings8:22 Tin, Jorama chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Kings8:23 Tin, Jorama chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, a pi leh pute zingan Davida khawpuiah an phum ta a; a fapa Ahazia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings8:24 Israel lal Ahaba fapa Jorama lal kumsawm leh kum hnih kum chuan Juda lal Jehorama fapa Ahazia chu a lal tan a. 
2Kings8:25 Ahazian ro a rel tan lai chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih mi a ni a; tin, Jerusalem khuaah kum khat ro a rel a. Tin, a nu hming chu Athali, Israel lal Omria fanu a ni." 
2Kings8:26 Ahaba chhungte kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, Ahaba chunge angin, LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a; Ahaba chhungte makpa a ni si a." 
2Kings8:27 Tin, ani chu Ahaba fapa Joraman Ramoth-gilead khuaa Suria lal Hazaela a han beihnaa chuan a tel ve a; tin, Suria-ho chuan Jorama chu an lo hliam a.Tin, lal Jorama chu Suria lal Hazaela an beihnaa Suria-hoin Rama khuaa an lo hliam chu Jezreel khuaa intidam turin a kir leh ta a. Tin, Juda lal Jehorama fapa Ahazia chu Ahaba fapa Jorama a nat avang chuan kan turin Jezreel khuaah a zuk kal a." 
2Kings8:28 Tin, lal Jorama chu Suria lal Hazaela an beihnaa Suria-hoin Rama khuaa an lo hliam chu Jezreel khuaa intidam turin a kir leh ta a. Tin, Juda lal Jehorama fapa Ahazia chu Ahaba fapa Jorama a nat avang chuan kan turin Jezreel khuaah a zuk kal a." 
2Kings9:1 Tin zawlnei Elisan zawlneiho fapate zinga pakhat a ko a, a hnenah, ""I puan veng la, he hriak bawm hi keng la, Ramoth-gilead kuaah va kal rawh." 
2Kings9:2 I va thlen chuan Nimsia fa Jehosaphata fapa Jehua va zawng chhuak langin; va lut la, a unauteho zing ata ko chuak la, pindan chhungrilah luhpui rawh." 
2Kings9:3 Tichuan hriak bawm hi la la, a lu-ah leih langin, 'LALPA'n heti hian a ti: Israelte chunga lalah hriak ka thih a che, tiin,' ti rawh." 
2Kings9:4 Chutichuan talngval, zawlnei tlangval chu Ramoth-gilead-ah chuan a kal ta a." 
2Kings9:5 Tin, a va thlen chuan ngai teh, sipai hotuho an lo thu khawm a; tin, ani chuan, ""Sipai hotu, i hnenah thuchah sawi tur ka nei e,"" a ti a. Tin, Jehua chuan, ""A tu bera hnena hian nge ni?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, Nangma hnenah hian a ni, sipai hotu,"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:6 Tin, a tho a, inah chuan a lut a; tin, a lu-ah hriak chu a leih a, a hnenah, ""LALPA, Israelte Pathianin heti hiana ti: 'LALPA Israelte Pathianin heti hian a ti: 'LALPA mipuiho, Israel-ho chunga lalah hriak ka thih a he." 
2Kings9:7 Ka chhiahhlawh zawlneite thisen leh LALPA chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte thisen phuba chu Jezebeli laka ka lak theihna turin i pu Ahaba chhungte chu i tiboral vek ang a. 
2Kings9:8 Ahaba chhungte zawng zawng chu a boral vek ang a; Ahaba atang hian mipa fa tawh phawt chu Israel rama mi khuahkhirh leh khirh loh pawh ka tiboral dawn a ni. 
2Kings9:9 Tin, Ahaba chhungte chu Nebata fapa Jeroboama chungte leh Ahija fapa Baasa chhungte angin ka siam ang a." 
2Kings9:10 Tin, uiin Jezebeli chuJezreel khawkulh bulah an ei ang a, a phumtu tur reng reng an awm lo ang,' tiin,"" a ti a. Tichuan kawng a hawng a, a tlan chhuak ta a." 
2Kings9:11 Tichuan Jehua chu a pu puipate hnenah chuan a lo chhuak a; pakhat chuan a hnenah, ""Tha lam thu em ni le? Kha mi apa kha eng tiziaa i hnena lo kal nge ni le?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""In hria mi a ni a, a thu sawi pawh kha in hria alawm,"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:12 Anni chuan, ""Hre teh suh e, min han hrilh teh khai,"" an ti a. Ani chuan, ""Hetiang tak hian min ti alawm maw le; 'LALPAin heti hian a ti; Israel-ho chunga lal atan hriak ka thih a che, tiin,'"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:13 Tichuan mi tininan puan chu an hlip hmawk hmawk a, kailawn chungah an phahsak ta theuh a, ""Jehua lal a ni ta e,"" tiin tawtawrawt an ham ta a." 
2Kings9:14 Chutichuan Nimsia fa Jehosaphata fapa Jehua chuan Jorama chu a phair ta a. (Suria lal Hazaela avangin Jorama leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan Ramoth-gilead khua chu an veng a; 
2Kings9:15 lal Rorama erawh chu Suria lal Hazaela nnen an inbeinaa Suria miten an hliam kha Jezreel khuaa intidam turin a kir le kha.) Tin, Jehua chuan, ""Ka lama tang in nih chuan tumah reng reng Jezreel khuaa he'ng thu hi sawi turin khua ata hi kal chhuahtir su u,"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:16 Chutichuan Jehua chu tawlailirah a chuang a, Jezreel khuaah a kal a; Jorama chu chutah chuan a mu a ni a. Tin, Juda lal Ahazia pawh Jorama kan turin a zuk kal a." 
2Kings9:17 Tin, Jezreel kulhah ralveng a ding a, ani chuan Jehua-ho lo kal chu a han hmu a. ""Mi tam tak ka hmu e,"" a ti a. Tin, Jorama chuan ""Sakawr chung chuang mi anmahni hmuak turin va tir la, 'Tha lam thu em ni le?' va ti teh se,"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:18 Chutichuan mi pakat sakawr chunga chuan hi a hmuak turin a va kal a, ""Lalin heti hian a ti; Tha lam thu em ni le?"" tiin, "" a ti a. Tin, Jehua chuan, ""Tha lam thu chu nanga lo hriat tur eng nge awm ni? Ka hnunga hian va kal ve rawh,"" a ti a. Tin ralveng chuan, ""Kan mi tirha chuan an hnena chu a va thleng ngei a, nimahsela a lo kir leh ta hauh lo mai,"" tiin a hrilh a." 
2Kings9:19 Tichuan mi pkhat sakawr chunga chuan hi a tir leh a, chu mi pawh chuan an hnen a ava thleng a, ""laloin heti hian a ti; 'Tha lam thu em ni le?' tiin,"" a ti a. Tin, Jehuan a chhang a, ""Tha lam thu chu nanga lo hriat tur eng nge awm ni?Ka hnungah hian va kal ve rawh,"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:20 Tin, ralveng chuan, ""Ani pawhin an hnen chu a va thleng ngei a, ani pawh chu a lo kir leh ta hauh lo mai; tin, a khalh dan pawh Nimsia fapa Jehua khalh dan chiah a ni; mi a ang maiin a khalh thin a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:21 Tin, Jorama chuan, ""Buatsaih teh u,"" a ti a. Tin, a tawlailir chu an buatsaih a. Tin, Israel lal Jorama leh Juda lal Ahazia chu mahni tawlailir ve vein an va chuak a, Jehua hmuak turin an va kal a, Jezreel mi Nabotha huanah an va hmu a." 
2Kings9:22 Tin, Joraman Jehua a han hmuh chuan heti hi a ni a, ""Tha lam thu em ni le, Jehu?"" a han ti a. Tin, ani chuan a lo chhang a, ""I nu Jezebeli hian uire leh dawi a chin nasat chhung hian tha lam thu eng nge awm thei ang?"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:23 Tin, Jorama chuan a kai her a, a tlan a, Ahazia hnenah, ""Inbumna a awm anih hi, Ahazi,"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:24 Tin, Jehua chuan a thalngul chu a theihpatawpin a kuai a, Jorama dar leh dar inkarah akap a, thal chu alungah alut tlang a, a tawlailira a awp ta rawk a." 
2Kings9:25 Tichuan Jehuan a sipai hotu Bidkara hnenah, ""Pawm la, Jezreel mi Nabotha huan hmunah paih thla rawh; hmana rnang nena a pa Ahaba hnunga kan chuan dun laia LALPA'n he phur hi a chunga a nghah reng anih kha:" 
2Kings9:26 LALPA'n, 'Niminah Nabotha thisen leh a fapate thisen ka hmu ngei alawm,' a tih kha; tin, LALPA'n, 'He mi hmun ngeia hian ka thungrul dawn che a ni, a tih leh kha. Chutichuan LALPA thu angin pawm la, he mi hmunah ngei hian paih thla rawh,"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:27 Nimahsela Juda lal Ahazian chu chu a hmuh chuan huan in lamah a tlan ta a. Tin, Jehua chuan a um a, ""Ani pawh tawlailirah khan that nghal rawh u,"" a ti a; tichuan Ibleam khaw kiang, Gur chohnaah an bei a. Tin, Megiddo khuaah a tlan lut a, chuta chuan a thi ta a." 
2Kings9:28 Tin, amite chuan Jerusalem khuaah tawlailirin an kalpui a,ama thlanah, a pi le pute zingah Davida khawpuiah an phum ta a." 
2Kings9:29 Ahaba fapa Jorama kum sawm leh kum khat a lal kumin Ahazia chu Judaho chungah a lal tan a. 
2Kings9:30 Tin, Jehua chu Jezreel khuaa a va luh chuan, Jezebelina lo hria a; tichuan a mitte a lo hnawih a, a samte a lo chei a, tukverhah a dak a." 
2Kings9:31 Tin, Jehua kulh kawngkaa a lo luh lai takin, ""Tha lam thu em ni le, nang, mahni pute thattu, Zimri pa?"" a lo ti a." 
2Kings9:32 Tin, ani chu tukverh lam hawi chuan a han dak chho a, ""Tunge ka lama tang che u? Tute nge?"" a ti a. Mi tilreh pahnih emaw, pathum emaw hi a lam hawiin an lo dak chhuak a." 
2Kings9:33 Tin, ani chuan, ""Han theh thla rawh u,"" a ti a. Chutichuan an theh thla a; a thi chuan bang leh sakawrte chu a per nguai mai a; tin, ani chuan alo chil a." 
2Kings9:34 Tin, alut a, a eiin a in a; ""anchhe dawngnu kha va ngaihven ta u la, va phum rawh u, lal fanu a ni si a,"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:35 Tin, phum turin an va kal a; nimahsela a luruh te, a ke bawrte a kutphah bawrte ngawt lo chu an va hmu ta lo a." 
2Kings9:36 Chutichuan an lo kal leh a, an rawn hrilh a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Hei hi LALPA'n a chiahlawh Tisbe mi Elija hmanga, 'Jezreel kul bula uiin Jezebeli chu an la ei ang a;Jezebeli ruang chu Jezreel khaw kul bula huana ek dur ang mai a la niang a, tichuan, He chu Jezebeli a ni a, an tih lohna'n, tih thu a sawi kha anih hi,"" a ti a." 
2Kings9:37 Jezebeli ruang chu Jezreel khaw kul bula huana ek dur ang mai a la niang a, tichuan, He chu Jezebeli a ni a, an tih lohna'n, tih thu a sawi kha anih hi,"" a ti a." 
2Kings10:1 Ahaban Samari-ah chuan fapa sawmsarih anei a. Tin, Jehuan Samari-ah Jezreel khaw hotu, upate hnenah leh Ahaba fate lo enkawl tleitute hnenah chuan," 
2Kings10:2 He lehkha hi in hmuh veleh, in pu fate chu in hnenah a awm a ni a, tin, tawlailir te, sakawr te, kulhpui nei khuate pawh, ralthuamna nen in nei a;" 
2Kings10:3 chutichuan in pu fate zinga mi a tha ber leh a fel ber zawng chuak u la, a pa lalthutthlenga thuttir u la, in pu chungte do chu dopi rawh u,"" tia ziak lehkha a thawn a." 
2Kings10:4 Nimahsela anni chuan an hlau ta em em mai a, ""Ngai teh u, lal pahnih pawh khan an chelh tawh lo a ni a, keinin engtinnge kan chelh tehlul ang?"" an ti a." 
2Kings10:5 Tinlal inchhunga hotu ber te, khawpi awptu te, upaho te, naupangho lo enkawl thleitute nen chuan Jehua hnenah, ""I chhiahhlawhte kan ni e, ti tura min hrilh apiang chu kan ti zel ang; tumah lalah kan siam lo ang; nang in tha i tih ang angin ti ang che,"" tiin mi an tir a." 
2Kings10:6 Tin, an hnenah, ""Ka lama tang in nih a, ka thu in awih dawn chuan in pu fapate lu han la u la, naktukah hetih hun hma hian Jezreel khuaah ka hnenah lo kal ang che u,"" tiin lehkha a thawn leh a. Lal fapate chu sawmsarih an ni a, khawpui milianho, anmahni enkawl tleitute hnenah chuan an awm a." 
2Kings10:7 Tin, lehkha chu an han hmuh chuan heti hi a ni a, lal fapate chu an man a, a sawmsarih chuan an that a, an lu chu bawmrangah an dah a. Jezreel khuaah a hnenah an thawn ta a." 
2Kings10:8 Tin, zualko a lo thleng a, ""Lal fapate lu chu an rawn la ta a,"" tiin a hrilh a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Kulh luhna kawngka bulah hmun hnihah tiang khawm u la, naktuk thlengin awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Kings10:9 Tin, a tukah chuan heti hi a ni a, a va chhuak a,a ding a, mi zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Mi fel in ni e; ngai teh u, ka pu chu ka phair a, ka lo tihhlum ta tak a; anih leh, hengo zawng zawng hi tu thah nge ni?" 
2Kings10:10 LALPA'n Ahaba chhungte chungchang thu a sawi, LALPA thu chu leilungah hian a luang ral hlek lo ang tih hre rawh u; LALPA'n a chhiahhlawh Elija hmanga a sawi kha a rawn hlen ta ai hi,"" a ti a." 
2Kings10:11 Chutichuan Jehua chuan Jezreel khuaa Ahaba chhunge la awm zawng awng leh, a mi lian zawng zawng te leh, a thian zawng awngte leh, a puithiamte chu pakhat mah zuahsak hlek loin a that fai vek a." 
2Kings10:12 Tin, a tho a, a chhuak a, Samari-ah a kal ta a. Tin, kalkawnga berampute beram hmul mehna in a va thlenin," 
2Kings10:13 Jehua chuan Juda lal Ahazia unauteho a hmu a, ""Tute nge in nih?"""" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Ahazia unaute kan ni a, lal fateho leh lalnu fateho chibai kan zuk buk dawn a ni,"" tiin an chhang a." 
2Kings10:14 Tin, ani chuan, ""Anungin man rawh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan anungin an man a, beram hmul mehna in khur bulah chuan an that a, mi sawmli leh pahnih zet an ni a; pakhat mah a zuah lo." 
2Kings10:15 Tin, chuta ta a chhuah hnu chuan Rekaba fapa Jehonadaba, ama hmuak tura lo kal a va hmu a; tichuan chibai a buk a, a hnenah, ""I chunga rilru dik ka pu ang hian, rilru dik i pu ve emaw chu?"" a ti a. Jehonadaba chuan, ""Pu e,"" tiin a chhang a. ""A ni leh i kut mi han pe teh,"" a ti a. Tichuan a kut chu a han pe a, tin ani chuan a hnenah a tawlailir chhungah a kai lut a." 
2Kings10:16 Tin, ani chuan, ""Ka hnena lo kal ve la, LALPA tana thahnem ka ngaihzia hi han hmu ve teh reng khai,"" a ti a. Chutichuan a tawlailirah a chuantir ve ta a." 
2Kings10:17 Tin, samari a va thlen chuan Ahaba chhungte Samari-a la awm chhunate chu a tihoral zaw vek hma loh chuan a that zel a, Elija hnena a sawi LALPA thu ang ngei khan." 
2Kings10:18 Tin, Jehuan mipuiho zawng zawng chu a ko khawm a, an hnenah chuan, ""Ahaba khan Baala rawng hi a bawl hlek chauh a ni a, Jehua erawh hi chuan nasa takina nia a bawl dawn ni." 
2Kings10:19 Chutichuan baala zawlneiho zawng zawng te, a betu zawng zawngte leh a puithiam zawng zawngte ka hnenah hian han ko khawm teh u; tuma kim lo suh se; Baala hnenah hian inthawina ropuit ak hlan tur ka nei a; tupawh a kim lo a piang hchu anung hlek lo ang,"" a ti a. Nimahsela Jehua chuan Baala betute chu tihhlum tumin, fin vervekin a ti a ni." 
2Kings10:20 Tin, Jehua chuan, ""Baala hmingin kutpui siam rawh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan chu chu an than vel ta a." 
2Kings10:21 Tin, Jehuan Israel ram zawng anwga a thawn vel a; tichuan Baala betute zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, tel lo reng reng an awm lo. Tin, Baala inah chuan an lut a; tin, baala in chu kawngka atanga kawmchar thlengin an khat hmur mai a." 
2Kings10:22 Tin, inthuamna puan enkawltu hnenah, ""Baala betu zawng zawngte hi inthuamna puan han laksak rawh,"" a ti a. Tichuan inthuamna puante chu a rawn laksak a." 
2Kings10:23 Tin, Jehua chu, Rekaba fapa Jehonadaba nen Baala inah chuan an lut a; tin, Baala betute hnenah chuan, ""Hetha hian Baala betute chauh lo, LALPA mite hi an lo awm ve dah ang e, zawng u la, en vel teh u,"" a ti a." 
2Kings10:24 Tin, inthawinate le halral thilhlan hlan turin an lut ta a. Jehua chuan pawna mi sawmria a lo dintir tawh reng a, ""Heng in kuta ka pek che u hi tupawh an chauh vaih chuan, a chhuahtu chuan a nun aiah chuan ama nunna chu a chan ang,"" a ti a." 
2Kings10:25 Tin, halral thilhlana hlan zawh veleh heti hi a ni a, Jehua chan vengtu sipai leh an hotute hnenah, ""Va lut u la, va that rawh u; tuma chhuahtir suh u,"" a ti a. Tin, khandaihin an sat chiam a; tin, vengtu sipai leh an hotute chuan an paih chhuak a, tin, Baala in awmna khuaa an kal a." 
2Kings10:26 Tin Baala ina milemte chu an la chhuak a, an hal a." 
2Kings10:27 Tin, Baala lungphun chu an tichim a, Baala in chu an tichhia a, dailenna inah an hmang ta a, tun thleng hian an la hmang a ni." 
2Kings10:28 Chutiang chuan Jehuan Israel ram ata Baala chu a tiboral a ni. 
2Kings10:29 Nimahsela Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualna- Israel-hote thil tihsualtira a tihte chu Jehua chuan a ba chuan lo, chu chu Bethel khua leh Dan khuaa rangkachak bawng no lemte biak a ni." 
2Kings10:30 Tin, LALPA'n Jehua hnena, ""Ka mittlung taka thil i tih avang leh ka rilru duhthusam ang taka Ahaba chhungte chunga i tih avangin, i fapate chu chhuan lina thlengin Israelte lalthutthlengah an thu ang,"" a ti a." 
2Kings10:31 Nimahsela Jehua chuan LALPA, Israelte Pathian dan chu athinlung awng zawngin a pawm lo a; Jeroboaman Israel-hote thil tihsualtira a tihsual kha a ban chuang lo a." 
2Kings10:32 Chung lai chuan LALPA'n Israelte chu a thlauhthla tan ta a; tichuan Hazaelan Israel ram zawng zawnga chuan a hneh zel a; 
2Kings10:33 Jordan atanga khaw chhak lam, Gilead ram zawng zawng, Gad-ho te, Reuben-ho te, Manase-ho te, Arnon ruama Aroer atanga Gilead le Basan ram thleng rakin." 
2Kings10:34 Jehua chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng anwg te, a thiltih theihzia zawng anwgte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna bua chuan a chuang anilo'm ni?" 
2Kings10:35 Tichuan Jehua chu a pi leh pute hnenah chuan a muhil a, Samari khuaah an phum ta a. Tin, a fapa Jehoahaza chu a aiawhin a lal ta a.Tin, Samari rama Israelte chunga Jehua rorel chhung chu kum sawmhnih leh kum riat a ni." 
2Kings10:36 Tin, Samari rama Israelte chunga Jehua rorel chhung chu kum sawmhnih leh kum riat a ni." 
2Kings11:1 Tin, Ahazia nu Athlain a fapa a thi tih a lo hriat chuan, a tho a, lal fate zawng zawng chu a that vek a." 
2Kings11:2 Ahazia fapa Joasa erawh chu lal Jorama fanu, Ahazia farnu Jehosebi chuan lal fapa an thahte zing ata chu a hruai bo a, a enkawltu nen khum pindanah a awmtir a; Athali hmuh theih loh turin an thukru a, tihuan thah a ni ta lo a." 
2Kings11:3 Tin, ani chu amah nen chuan lalap inah kum ruk an biru a, tichuan Athali inah kumruk an biru a, tichuan Athali chuan chu ramah chuan ro a tel ta a." 
2Kings11:4 Tin, a kum sarihnaa chuan Jehoiadan Kereth mite leh vengtu sipaite zinga mi sipai za hotute chu a kohtir a, LALPA inah a hnenah a hruai luhtir a; tin, an hnenah thu a thlung a, LALPA ina chuan chhia a chamtir a, lal fapa chu a entir hlawm a." 
2Kings11:5 Tin, ani chuan, ""In tih tur chu hetiang hi a ni: In zinga chawlhni alo kal turte hi hmun thuma thea hmun khatin lal in chu in veng ang a;" 
2Kings11:6 tin, hmun thuma thena hmun khat chu Sur kulh kawngkaah in awm ang a; tin, hmun thuma thena hmun khat chu vengtute hnung lama kulh kawngkaah in awm ang; chutiang huan in chu in veng ang a, a dangtuah in awm tur a ni." 
2Kings11:7 Tin, in zinga pawl hnih, chawlhnia tin, tur zawng zawngte chuan lal kiang velah LALPA in chu in veng ang a." 
2Kings11:8 Tin, mi tinin hriamhrei kengin lal chu in hual vel ang a; tupawh hual chhunga lo lut apiang chu lo thah zel tur a ni; tichuan lal chu a lut leh a chhuak chu zui zel rawh u,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
2Kings11:9 Tin, sipai za hotute chuan puithiam Hehoiada thupek ang zawng zawng chuan an ti a; tin, mani hote theuh chawlhnia lo kal turte leh, chawlnia tin turte chu an hruai a, puithiam Jehoiada hnenah an kal a." 
2Kings11:10 Tin, puithiam chuan sipai za hotute chu LALPA ina awm, lal Davida fei leh phawte chu a pe a." 
2Kings11:11 Tin, vengtu sipaite chuan hriamhrei keng theuhin, in ding lampang atanga vei lampang thelngin, maicham leh in hrulah chuan lal chu an din hual mup a." 
2Kings11:12 Tichuan lal fapa chu a rawn hruai chuak a, lallukhum a khumtir a, hriattirn thu chu a pe a; tin, lalah an siam a, hriak an thih a; tin, an kut an beng a, ""Pathianin lalber hum him rawh se,"" an ti a." 
2Kings11:13 Tin, vengtu siapite leh mipuihote thawm chu Athalin a lo hriat chuan LALPA inah mipuite zingahc huan a va kal a;" 
2Kings11:14 tin, a han en a, ngai teh, lal chu dan angin ban hrulhah alo ding a, sipai hotute leh tawtawrawt tumtute chu lal bulah an ding a; tin, chu mi rama mi zawng awng chu an hlim em em a, tawtawrawt an ham chiam a. Tichuan Athali chuan a puante a pawt thler a, ""Phiarrukna! Phiarrukna a ni ta le!"" tiin a au a." 
2Kings11:15 Tin, puithiam Jehoiada chuan sipaite chunga hotua ruat sipai za hotute chu thu a pe a, an hnenah, ""Sipaihote karah chhuahtir rawh u; tupawh a zui apiang chu khandaiha sahhmum tur a ni,"" a ti a; puithiam chuan, ""LALPA inah zawng thah tur ani lo e,"" a lo ti tawh si a." 
2Kings11:16 Chutichuan kawng an kian a; tin, sakawr luhna kawngah lal inah a kal a; chutah chuan a ni, an thah tak ni." 
2Kings11:17 tin, Jehoiada chuan LALPA leh lal leh mipuite karah chuan LALPA mie an lo nihna tur thu a thlung ta a; lal leh mipuite karah pawh." 
2Kings11:18 Tin, chu mi rama mi zawng zawng chu Baala ina an kal a, an tichim a; amaichamte leh a lemte chu an tisawm dep a, Baala puithiam Mattana pawh maicham bula an that a. Tin, puithiam chuan LALPA in vengtu hotute a ruat a." 
2Kings11:19 Tin, sipai za hotute, Kereth mi te, vengtu sipaite leh, chu i zawng awng chu a hruai a, LALPA in ata lal chu a han hruai thla a, vengtu te kawngkaa lutin lal inah an kal a. Tichuan lalhote lalthutthlengah a thu ta a." 
2Kings11:20 Chutichuan chu mi rama mi zawng zawng chu an lawm a, tin, khawpui chu buai loin a awm ta a; tin, Athali chu khandaihin lal inah an that a.Jehoasan ro a rel tan lai chuan kum sarih mi a ni." 
2Kings11:21 Jehoasan ro a rel tan lai chuan kum sarih mi a ni. 
2Kings12:1 Jehua kum sarih a lal kum chuan Jehoasa chu a lal tan a; Jerusalem khuaah kum sawmli a lal a; a nu hming chu Zibi, Beer-seba khua ami a ni." 
2Kings12:2 Tin, puithiam Jehoiadan Jehoasa chu a zirtir chhung zawng LALPA mithmuha thil tha a ti thin a." 
2Kings12:3 Amaherawhchu hmun sangte zawng thehthang bo a ni chuang lo; hmun sangahte chuan mite chu an la inthawiin rimtui an la hal reng thin. 
2Kings12:4 Tin, Jehoasan puithiamte hnenah, ""LALPA ina lak luh thil serh tlanna sum zawng zawng, chhiar tawhte zinga kal apiangte tana tuk, an nun tlanna sum te, tupawhin LALPA ina lak luh an phal sum zawng zawngte chu," 
2Kings12:5 puithiamten an hmelhriatte hnen atangin lo la theuh se la; tichuan in chia a che lai apiang, siam rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Kings12:6 Nimahsela heti hi a ni a, lal Jehoasa chu kum sawmhnih leh kum thum a lal hnu pawhin puithiamte chuan in chhia chu an la siam lo fo a." 
2Kings12:7 Tichuan lal Jehoasa chuan puithiam Jehoiada leh puithiam dante chu a ko a, an hnenah, ""Engati nge in che laite hi in siam loh? Tunah zawng in hmelrhiatte hnen ata tangka chu la tawh suh u la, in chhe siamna'n pe chuak tawh zawk rawh u,"" a ti a." 
2Kings12:8 Tin, puithiamte chuan mite hnen ata tangka lak tawh loh leh, in hhe laite siamtu nih loh chu an remti a." 
2Kings12:9 Amaherawhchu puithiam puithiam Jehoiadan bawm a la a, a chin a rek pawp a, LALPA ina luha ding lampang, maicham bulah a hung a; chutah chuan LALPA ina tangka rawn lak luh zawng zawng chu kawngkhar vengtu puithiamte chuan an la dah zel a." 
2Kings12:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, bawmah huan tangka a tam ta hle tih an hriatin, lal lehkha ziaktu leh puithiam lalber chu an han kal a, an fun a, LALPA ina tangka awm chin hu an chiar a." 
2Kings12:11 ,12 Tin, an tangka chhiar chu hnathawkho, LALPA in satute chunga hotute an pe a, anni chuan LALPA in beitu, themthiamte leh in satute hlawhah te, lun gchhertute leh lung lai chhuaktute hlawhah te, LALPA in he laite siamna tur thing leh lung cherahte leh in siamna'n mamawh apiangahte leh in siamna'na mamawph apiangahte an hmang thin a." 
2Kings12:12 ,11 Tin, an tangka chhiar chu hnathawkho, LALPA in satute chunga hotute an pe a, anni chuan LALPA in beitu, themthiamte leh in satute hlawhah te, lun gchhertute leh lung lai chhuaktute hlawhah te, LALPA in he laite siamna tur thing leh lung cherahte leh in siamna'n mamawh apiangahte leh in siamna'na mamawph apiangahte an hmang thin a." 
2Kings12:13 Amaherawhchu LALPA in chunga an tangka rawn lak huan LALPA in atan tangkaraw note, khawnvar puan chehna te, maihunte, tawtawrawtte, rangkachak bungbel te, tangkaraw bungbelte an siam lo;" 
2Kings12:14 hnathawktute an pe thin a, LALPA in siamna chuan an hmang zawk thin a ni." 
2Kings12:15 Tin, hnathawktute pek atana tangka an vawntirate pawh kha an en zuipui lem chuang lo; anni chuan rinawm takin an ti si thin a." 
2Kings12:16 bawhchhiat thawina thilhlan tangka leh, sual thawina thilhlan tangkate chu LALPA inah chuan a la lut lut lo; puithiamte pual a ni." 
2Kings12:17 Tichuan Suria lal Jazaela chuan gath khua a han bei a, a han la a; tin, Hazaela chu Jerusalem-a kal zel a tum a." 
2Kings12:18 Tin, Juda lal Jehoasa chuan Juda lal a puteho Jehosaphata te, Jehorama te, Ahazia te lo hlan tawh thil serh zawng zawng leh, ama thil serhte leh, LALPA ina mi leh lal ina ro dah khawmnaa mi rangkachak awm zawng zawngte chu a la vek a, Suria lal Jazaela a thawn a; tichuan Jerusalem chu a hawisan leh ta a." 
2Kings12:19 Tichuan Joasa chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna bua a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Kings12:20 Tin, a mite chu an tho a, an phiar tu a, Joasa chu Silla pan chukna kawnga Millo inah an bei a, an tihlum a.Ama mi, Simeatha fapa Jozakara leh Somera fapa Jehozabada ten an that a ni; tichuan a pi leh pute zingah Davida khawpuian an phum a; tin, a fapa Amazia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings12:21 Ama mi, Simeatha fapa Jozakara leh Somera fapa Jehozabada ten an that a ni; tichuan a pi leh pute zingah Davida khawpuian an phum a; tin, a fapa Amazia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings13:1 Juda lal Ahazia fapa Joasa kum sawmhih leh kum thum a lal kum huan Jehua fapa Jeoabaza chu Israelte chungah Samari khuaan a lal tan a, kum sawm leh kum sarih a lal a." 
2Kings13:2 Tin, LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a, Israel-hote thil tihsualtira a tih Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnate ka a ching ve a, a kalsan leh ta lo." 
2Kings13:3 Tin, LALPA thin chu Israelte chungah chuan a alh a, tichuan Suria lal Hazaela kutah leh Jazaela fapa Benhadada kutah chuan a pe ta zel a." 
2Kings13:4 Tin, Jehoahaza chuan LALPA hnenah a ngen chiam a, tin, LALPA'n a thu chu a lo ngaihthlaksak a; Israelte hnehchhiaha an awm a, Suria lalin anmahni a hnehchhiahzia chu a hmu reng si a." 
2Kings13:5 Tichuan LALPA'n Israel-hote chu hhandamtu a pe a, chutichuan Suria-hote hnuaia an awm chu anc hhuak a, Israela thlahte chu tun hma ang bawk khan anmahni in lamah an awm leh ta hle hle a." 
2Kings13:6 (Amaherawhchu Israelte thil tihsualtira a tih Jeroboama chhungteho sualnate kha an kalsan lo a, an la ching ta reng zawk a; tin, Samari khuaah chuan Aseri pawh chu a la awm reng ngeh nghe a.)" 
2Kings13:7 Jehoahaza chu a mite zinga sakawr chung chuang mi sawmnga leh, tawlailir sawm leh, sipai singkhat tih loh chu neih a palsak si lo a; Suria lal chuan a tiboral vek a, vaivut chil dip ang maiin a siam a ni." 
2Kings13:8 Tichuan Jehoahaza chanchin dangte, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a thiltihtheihzia te chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna bua a chuanga ni lo'm ni?" 
2Kings13:9 Tin, Jehoahaza chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil ta a; tin, Samari khuaah an phum a; tin, a fapa Joasa chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings13:10 Juda lal Joasa kum sawmthum leh kum sarih a lal kum chuan Jeoahaza fapa Jehoasa chu Israelte chungah samari khuaan a lal tan a, kum sawm leh kum ruk a lal a." 
2Kings13:11 Tin, LALPA mithmuha a thil tha lo tak a ti thin a; Israelte thil tihsualtira a tih Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualna zawng zawngte kha a kalsan lo a, a la ching ta reng zawk a." 
2Kings13:12 Tichuan Joasa chanchin dang te,a thiltih zawng zawng te, Juda lal Amazia a bei laia a thiltihtheihziate chu Israel lalte lal lai tu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Kings13:13 Tin, Joasa chu api leh pute hnenah a muhil ta a; tin, Jeroboama chu a lalthutthlengah a thu a, tin, Joasa chu samari khuaah Israel lalte zingah an phum a." 
2Kings13:14 Tin, Elisa chu a thihpuina tur natnain a lo na tawh a; tichuan Israel lal Joasa chu a hnenah a zuk kal a, a tah a, ""Ka pa, ka pa, Israelte tawlailir leh sakawr chung chuang mite hentu,"" a ti a." 
2Kings13:15 Tin, Elisan a hnenah, ""Thalngul leh thalte han la teh,"" a ti a: tin, thalngul leh thalte a han la a." 
2Kings13:16 Tin, Israelte lal hnenah chuan, ""Thalngul kha han chelh teh,"" a ti a; tichuan a han chelh a. Tin, Elisa chuan lal kut chungah a kut a nghat a." 
2Kings13:17 Tin, ani chuan, ""Chhak lam tukverh han hawng teh,"" a ti a; tin, a han hawng a. Tin, Elisan, ""Kap rawh,"" tin, a han kap a. Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA hnehna thal, Suria-ho hnehna thal a nih kha; Aphek khuaa chuan Suria-hote chu boral der kawpin i hneh dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
2Kings13:18 Tin, 'Thalte kha han la teh,"" a ti leh a; tichuan a han la teh,"" a ti a; tichuan a han la a, Tin, Israel lal hnenah chuan, ""Lei kha han chun te,"" a ti a; tichuan vawithum a chun a, a bang ta mai a." 
2Kings13:19 Tichan Pathian mi chu a chungah a thinrim ta a, ""Vawi nga vawi ruk lai i chun tur a sin ni le; tichuan Suria-hote chu boral der khawpin i hneh tur a ni a. Amaherawhchu Sria-ho chu vawi thum chauh i hneh dawn anih tak hi,"" a ti a." 
2Kings13:20 Tin, Elisa chu a thi a, an phum ta a. Tin, kum alo veihian, Moab-ho pawlte chuan an ram chu an rawn run thin a." 
2Kings13:21 Tin, mi pakhat an phum dawn lai takin an han hmu a; tichuan chu mi chu Elisa thlanah chuan an thlak ta mai a; tin, a ruang chu Elisa ruhte ch a zuk deh veleh, a lo nung leh a, a ding ta mai a." 
2Kings13:22 Tin, Suria lal Hazaela chuan Jeoahaza chhanah chan Israelte chu a hnehchiah reng a." 
2Kings13:23 Nimahsela LALPA'n Abrahama hnenah te, Isaaka hnenah te, Jakoba hnenah te thu a thlun avangin anmahni chu a khawngaih a, a lainat a, angaihsak a, anmahni chu a tiboral duh lo a, a hnen ata a la paih thla duh lo cheu a." 
2Kings13:24 Tin, Suria lal Jazaela chu a thi a; a fapa Benhadada chu a aiawhin a lal ta a.Tin, Jehoahaza fapa Jehoasa chuan Jazael fapa Benhadadan a pa Jehoahaza a run a, khua a laksakte kha a chhuhsak leh a, Joasa chuan vawithum a hneh a, Israel ram khuate chu a la leh a." 
2Kings13:25 Tin, Jehoahaza fapa Jehoasa chuan Jazael fapa Benhadadan a pa Jehoahaza a run a, khua a laksakte kha a chhuhsak leh a, Joasa chuan vawithum a hneh a, Israel ram khuate chu a la leh a." 
2Kings14:1 Israel lal Joahaza fapa Joasa kum hnih a lal kum chan Juda lal Joasa fapa Amazia a lal tan a. 
2Kings14:2 A lal tantirh chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum kum sawmhnih leh kum kuaa lal a; anu hming chu Jehoadini, Jerusalem mi a ni." 
2Kings14:3 Tin, LALPA mithmuha thil fel tak a ti thin a." 
2Kings14:4 Amaherawhchu hmun sangte zawng thehthang bo ani chuang lo; hmun sangahte chuan mite chu an la inthawiin, rimti an la hal reng thin." 
2Kings14:5 Tin, a ram chu a han din ngheh veleh heti hi a ni a, ami te, a pa, lal thattute chu a that ve thung a;" 
2Kings14:6 amaherawchu chung tualthattu fate chu a that lo; Mosia dan bua, ""Fate avangin pate tihhlum tur a ni lo a, pate avangin fate tihhlum tur a ni hek lo, mi tin, mahni sual avangin an thi tur a ni,"" tia LALPA thupek dan ziak ang khan." 
2Kings14:7 Edom-ho chu Chi ruamah singkhat a that a, Sela khua a bei a, a la a, a hmingah chuan Joktheel a ti a, tun thlengin an la ti a ni." 
2Kings14:8 Tichuan Amazian Israel lal Jehua fapa Jeoahaza fa Jehoasa hnenah, ""Hawh teh, hmai chhanah i lo inen teh ang,"" tiin mi a tir a." 
2Kings14:9 Tin, Israel lal Jehoasa chuan Juda lal Amazia hnenah, ""Lebanon tlanga hlingin Lebanon tlanga sidar hnenah, 'I fanu kha ka fapa nupuiah neihtir te khai,' tiin a chah a; tin, Lebanon tlanga ramsa a lo kal a, hling chu a rawn chil thlu ta der mai a." 
2Kings14:10 Nang hian Edom-ho chu i hneh ngei tak a, i rilru a lo chapo ta a nih h; i chapo kha tawngpui hle hle mai rawh; nang leh Juda ram chawp chawp achhiatna, i tana tha lo tur thl eng atan gne i cho chhuah dawn ni?"" tiin mi a tir ve a." 
2Kings14:11 Nimahsela Amazia chuan a lo ngaithla duh lo a. Chutichuan Israel lal Jeoasa hua han chho a; Juda lal Amazia nen chuan Juda ram Beth-semes khuaah hmai chhanah an inen ta ngei a. 
2Kings14:12 Tin, Juda chu Israelte lakah a lo tlawm ta a; mi tin, mahni in lamah an tlan haw ta theuh a." 
2Kings14:13 Tin, Israel lal Jehoasa chuan Juda lal Ahazia fapa Jeoasa fa Amazia chu Beth-semes-ah chuan a man a, Jerusalem khuaah a kal a, Jerusalem kulh chu Ephraim kulh kawngka atanga kulh kil kawngka thlengin tawng zali zet a tichim a." 
2Kings14:14 Tin, LALPA ina mi leh lal in a ro dah khawmnaa mi, rangkachak leh tangka leh bungbel zawng zawng, a awm apiang a la a, hrenga tang turte nen, tin, Samari khaw lamah a haw leh ta a." 
2Kings14:15 Tichuan Jehoasa thiltih chanchin dang te, a thiltihtheihzia te, Juda lal Amazia a bei thut te chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna bua a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Kings14:16 Tin, Jehoasa chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, Samari khuaan Israel lalte zingah an phum a; tin, a fapa Jeroboama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings14:17 Tin, Juda lal Joasa fapa Amazia chu Israelte lal Jeoahaza fapa Jeoasa thih hnuin kum sawm leh kum nga a la dam a." 
2Kings14:18 Tichuan Amazia chanchin dangte chu Juda a ni lo'm ni? 
2Kings14:19 Tin, Jerusalem khuaah amah an phiar ru a; tihuan Lakis khuaah a tlan a; nimahsela Lakis khuaah chuan mi an umtir a, hutah chuan an that ta a," 
2Kings14:20 Tin, a ruang chu sakawrin an kalpui a, a pi leh pute zingan Davida khaw pui Jerusalem-ah an phum ta a." 
2Kings14:21 Tin, Juda mi zawng zawngten kum sawm leh kum ruk mi, Azaria an hruai a, a pa Amazia aiah lalah an siam ta a." 
2Kings14:22 Ani huan Elath khua hu a siam tha leh a, Juda ramah a telh leh a, chumi hnuah chuan lal chu api leh pute hnenah a muhil ta a." 
2Kings14:23 Juda lal Joasa fapa Amazia kum sawm leh kum nga a lal kum chuan Israel lal Joasa fapa Jeroboama chu Samari khuaan a lal ta a, ku sawli leh kum khat a lal a." 
2Kings14:24 Tin, LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a; Israelte thil tihsualtirtu Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualna zawng zawngte kha kalsan reng a nei lo a." 
2Kings14:25 LALPA, Israelte Pathianin a chhiahhlawh, Gath-hepher mi Amittaia fapa zawlnei Jona hmnaga a thu sawi ang khan, Hamath luhna atanga Araba tuifinriat thelngin Israel ramah a telh leh a." 
2Kings14:26 Israelte hreawmzia chu a nasa em em mai tih a hre si a; khuahkhirh leh khirh lohte pawh an awm si lo a, Israelte tanpuitu tur tumah an awm hek lo." 
2Kings14:27 LALPA'n Israelte hming hi van hnuaiah hian a tichimit hlauh dawn tih zawng a sawi lo reng a; Joasa fapa Jeroboama hmngin a chhandam ta zawk a ni. 
2Kings14:28 Tichuan Jeroboama chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a thiltihtheihzia te, a ral bei thu te, tun hmaa Juda ram chan ni thin Damaska leh Hamath khua Israelte tan alo laksak leh tak thute chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?Tin, Jeroboama chu api leh pu, Israel lalte hnenah chuan a muhil ve a; tichuan a fapa Zekaria chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings14:29 Tin, Jeroboama chu api leh pu, Israel lalte hnenah chuan a muhil ve a; tichuan a fapa Zekaria chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:1 Israel lal Jeroboama kum sawmhni leh kum sarih a lal kum chuan Juda lal Amazia fapa Azaria a lal tan a. 
2Kings15:2 A lal tantir chuan kum sawm leh kum ruk mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh kum hnih a lal a; a nu hming chu Jekoli, Jerusalem mi a ni." 
2Kings15:3 Tin, a pa Amazia thiltih ang apiang ti vein, LALPA mithmuha thil tha tak a ti thin a." 
2Kings15:4 Amaherawhchu hmun sangte zawng thehthang bo a ni chuang lo; hmun sangahte chuan mite chu an la inthawi in, rimtui an la hal reng thin." 
2Kings15:5 Tin, LALPA'n lal chu a rawn hrem ta a, chutichuan a thih ni thlengin a lo phar a, in hrangah a awm ta a. Tin, lal fapa Jothama chu an rama mite rorelsakin in chhung lam hotuah a awm ta a." 
2Kings15:6 Tichuan Azaria chanchin dang a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang ani lawm ni/ 
2Kings15:7 Tin, Azaria chu a pi leh pute hnenah chuan a muhil a; tin, api leh pute zingan Davida khawpuiah an phum ta a; tin, a fapa Jothama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:8 Juda lal Azaria kum sawmthum leh kum riat a lal kum chuan Jeroboama fapa Zekaria chu Israelte chngah Samari khuaan thla ruk a lal a. 
2Kings15:9 Tin, a pute tih ang bawk LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a; Israelte thil tihsualtirtu Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnate kha a kalsan lo a." 
2Kings15:10 Tin, Jabesa fapa Saluman ama a phiar ru a, mipuite hmaah a bei a, a tha a, a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:11 Tichuan Zekaria chanchin dangte chu ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni." 
2Kings15:12 Chu chu LALPA'n Jehua hnena, ""I fapate chu chhuan lina thlengin Israel-te lalthutthlengah an thu ang,"" tih thu a sawi kha a ni. Tichuan chutiang tak chu a lo ni ta ngei reng a." 
2Kings15:13 Juda lal Uzzia kum sawmthum leh kum kua a lal kum chuan Jabesa fapa Saluma chu a lal ta a; Samari khuaah thla khat chhung a lal a. 
2Kings15:14 Tin, Gadia fapa Menahema chu Tirza khua atangin a han chho a, Samari khuaa a kal a, Jabesa fapa Saluma chu Samari khuaa chuan a bei a, a that a, a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:15 Tichan Saluma chanchin dang te, aphiarrukna thute chu ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni." 
2Kings15:16 chutichuan Menaheman Tirza atang chuan Tipsa khua leh a chhunga awm zawng zawngte leh a ramte chu a bei a; an inhawn loh avangin a bei a ni; chunga nau pai lai hmeichhia zawng zawngte chu a pir thler a. 
2Kings15:17 Juda lal Azaria kum sawmthu leh kum kua alal kum chuan Gadia fapa Menahema chu Israelte chungah a lal ta a, Samari khuaa kum sawm a lal a." 
2Kings15:18 Tin, LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a; Israelte thil tihsualtirtu Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnate khaa dam chungin a kalsan lo." 
2Kings15:19 Asuria lal Pulan ram chu a rawn bei a; ram chu a neih nghehpui theihna'n Menahema chua Pula chu tangka talent sang a pe a. 
2Kings15:20 Tin, Meahema chuan Assuria lal pek atan Israel mi neinungho zawng zawng lakah chuan tangka sekel sawmnga theuh a khawn a. Chutichuan Assuria lal chu a haw leh a, chu ramah chuan a awm reng lo." 
2Kings15:21 Tichuan Menahema chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buaha c huang a ni lawm ni." 
2Kings15:22 Tin, mMenahema chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a; tin, a fapa pekahia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:23 Juda lal Azaria kum sawmnga a lal kum chuan Menahema fapa pekahia chu Israelte chungah Samari khuaan a lal tan a, kum hnih a lala a." 
2Kings15:24 Tin, LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a; Israelte thil tihsualtirtu Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnate khaa a kalsan lo." 
2Kings15:25 Tin, a sipai hotu Remalia fapa pekan ama chu a phiar ru a, Samari khua a lal ina kulhah Argoba nen, Ariea nen a that ta a; a hnenah chuan Gilead mi sawmnga an awm ve a; tichuan Pekahia chu a that a, a aiawhin alal ta a." 
2Kings15:26 Tichuan Pekahia chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni." 
2Kings15:27 Juda lal Azaria kum sawmnga leh kum hnih a lal kum chuan Remalia fapa peka chu Israelte chngah Samari khuan a lal tan a, kum sawmhni a lal a." 
2Kings15:28 Tin, LALPA mithmua thil tha lo tak a thi thin a; Israelte thil tihsualtirtu Nebata fapa Jroboama sualnate kha a kalsan lo." 
2Kings15:29 Israel lal Peka lal laiin Assuria lal Tiglath-pilesearn Ijon khua te, Abel-beth-maaka khua te, Janoa khua te, Kedes khua te, Hazor khua te, Gilead leh Galili ram te, Naphtali ram zawng zawng chu a la a; tin, Assuria raman salah a hruai a." 
2Kings15:30 Tin, Ela fapa Josean Remalia fapa peka chu a phiar ru a, a bei a, a that a, Uzzia fapa Jothama kum sawmhnih a lal kum chuan a aiawin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:31 Tichuan Peka chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni." 
2Kings15:32 Israel lal Remalia fapa peka kum hniha lal kum chuan Juda lal Uzzia fapa Jothama chu a lal tan a. 
2Kings15:33 A lal tantirh chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sawm leh kum ruk a lal a; a nu hming chu Jerusi, Zadokmaia fanu a ni." 
2Kings15:34 Tin, a pa Uzzia thiltih ang apiang ti vein LALPA mithmuha thil tha tak ati thin a." 
2Kings15:35 Amaherawhchu hmun sangte zawng thehthang bo a ni chuang lo; hmun sangahte chuan mite chu an la inthawiin, rimtui an hal reng thin. LALPA in kawngka chhakta zawk chu a siam tha a." 
2Kings15:36 Tichuan Jothama chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang ani lo'm ni?" 
2Kings15:37 Chung lai chuan Suria lal Rezina leh, Remalia fapa peka chu Juda-ho bei turin LALPA'n a tir tan ta a.Tin, Jothama chu api leh pute hnenah a muhil a, a pi leh pute zingah a pu Davida khawpuiah an pum ta a; tin, a fapa Ahaza chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:38 Tin, Jothama chu api leh pute hnenah a muhil a, a pi leh pute zingah a pu Davida khawpuiah an pum ta a; tin, a fapa Ahaza chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings16:1 Remalia fapa peka kum sawm leh kum sarih a lal kum chuan Juda lal Jothama fapa Ahaza chu a lal tan a. 
2Kings16:2 Ahaza chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih mi a ni; tin, Jerusalemah kum sawm leh kum ruk a lal a. A pu Davida angin LALPA a Pathian mithmua thil tha taka ti ve lo a." 
2Kings16:3 Israel lalte kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, a ni, LALPA'n Israela thlahte hmaa a hnawchhuah tak hnamten thil tenawm tak an tih thin angin a fapa meiah aluhtir a." 
2Kings16:4 Tin, hmun sangah te, tlangah te, thing hring tin hnuaiahte a inthawi a, rimtui a hal thin a." 
2Kings16:5 Tichuan Suria lal Rezina leh Israel lal remalia fapa peka chu Jerusalem bei turin an ha cho a; Ahaza chu an han hual a, nimahsela an henh thei lo a." 
2Kings16:6 Chung lai chuan Suria lal Rezia chuan Elath khua chu Suria ram atan a la leh a, Judate ch Elath khua ata a hnawtchhuak a; tin, Suria-ho chuan Elath khua chu an va luah a, tun thlengin an la awm a." 
2Kings16:7 Tichuan Ahazan Assuria lal Tigalath-pilesera hnenah, ""I chiahlawh leh i fapa ka ni alawm: mi bei tura lo thawk Suria lal kut ata leh Israel lal kut ata hi mi han chanchhuak te khai,"" tiin mi a ti ra." 
2Kings16:8 Tin, Ahaza chua nlalpa ina tangka leh rangkachak awmapiang, lal ina ro dah khawmnaa mi nen a la a, Assuria lal hnenah lawmmanah a thawn a." 
2Kings16:9 Tin, Assuria lal chuan a thu sawi chu a lo pawm a; tichuan Assuria lal chuan Damaska khua chu a ha bei a, a la a, a mite chu Kir raman salah a hruai a, Rezina chu a that a." 
2Kings16:10 Tin, lal Ahaza chu Assuria lal Tiglath-pilesera be turin Damaska khuaah a kal a, Damaska khua amaicham chu va hmu a; tichuan lal Ahaza chuan chu maicham leh leh an siam dan ang chiaha entawn tur puithiam Urija hnenah a thawn a." 
2Kings16:11 Tin, puithiam Urija chuan maicham a han siam a; lal Ahazan Damaska puithiam Urija chuan Damaska khua tanga lal Ahazia lo haw leh hmain a lo siam hman diam a." 
2Kings16:12 Tin, Damaska khua ata lal a lo thlenin lal chuan maicham chu a han hmu a; tin, lalchuan maicham chu a pan hnai a, a han lawn chho a." 
2Kings16:13 Tin, maichama chuan ahalral thilhlante halin a changphut tlhlante a hlan a, a in tur thilhlan a leih a, a remna thilhlante thisen chu a theh a." 
2Kings16:14 Tin, LALPA hmaa dar maicham, a maicham leh LALPA in inkara mi, in hma zawn ata chu a la sawn a, a maicham hmar lampanga chuan a dah ta a." 
2Kings16:15 Tin, lal Ahazan, ""Maicham lianpuiah hian zing lam halral thilhlan te, tlai lam changphut thilhlan te, lal hal ralna thilhlan te, a chhangphut thilhlan te, kan rama mipui zawng zawng halral thllan te, a n chhanphut thilhlan te, an in tur thilhlante nen hian halin hlan la; tin a chunga chuan halral thilhlan thisen zawng zawng leh intawina thisen zawng zawng chu theh ang che; dar maicham erawh chu ka biakna tur ani ang,"" tiin puithiam Urija chu thu a pe a;" 
2Kings16:16 Chutchihuan puithiam Urija chuan lal Ahaza thupek ang zawng zawng chuan a ti ta a. 
2Kings16:17 Tin, lal Ahaza chuan hunchan khuarte chu a tichhia a, insilna bel chu a dah zawn a; a hunna dar sebawngpa ata te tuizem chu a la thla a, lungrem chungah a hung a." 
2Kings16:18 Tin, chawlhni atana chung nei kawng inaan siam leh pawn lama lal luhna chu Assuria lal avangin LALPA inaha thlakthleng ta hlauh a." 
2Kings16:19 Tichuan Ahaza thiltih chanchin dangte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang ani lo'm ni?Tin, Ahaza chu api leh pute hnenah a muhil a, a pi leh pute zingan Davida khawpuiah an phum ta a; tin, a fapa Hezekia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings16:20 Tin, Ahaza chu api leh pute hnenah a muhil a, a pi leh pute zingan Davida khawpuiah an phum ta a; tin, a fapa Hezekia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings17:1 Juda lal Ahaza kum sawm leh kum hnih a lal kum chuan Ela fapa Hosea chu Israelte chungah Samari khuaan a lal tan a, kum kua a lal a." 
2Kings17:1 Juda lal Ahaza kum sawm leh kum hnih a lal kum chuan Ela fapa Hosea chu Israelte chungah Samari khuaan a lal tan a, kum kua a lal a." 
2Kings17:2 Tin, LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a, amaherawhchu a hmaa Israel allte ang em zawngin a ti lo." 
2Kings17:3 Assuria lal Salmaneseran a han run a; tichuan Hosea chu a chiahkhuaa a awm a a, chiahte a pe thin a." 
2Kings17:3 Assuria lal Salmaneseran a han run a; tichuan Hosea chu a chiahkhuaa a awm a a, chiahte a pe thin a." 
2Kings17:4 Tin, Assuria lal chuan Hosean a phiar ruk thu a lo hria a; Aigupta lal Soa hnenah mi a tir bawk a, kum tina a pek thin ang khan Assuria lal chu chhiah a pe ta bawk si lo a; chuvangin Assuria lal chuan tan inah puar chungin a khung ta a." 
2Kings17:4 Tin, Assuria lal chuan Hosean a phiar ruk thu a lo hria a; Aigupta lal Soa hnenah mi a tir bawk a, kum tina a pek thin ang khan Assuria lal chu chhiah a pe ta bawk si lo a; chuvangin Assuria lal chuan tan inah puar chungin a khung ta a." 
2Kings17:5 Tichuan Assuria lal chuan ram zawng zawng chu a hrui chuak vek a, Samari khuaah a han cho a, kum thum a hual a." 
2Kings17:6 Hosea kum kua a lal kum chuan Assuria lal chu Samari khua chu a la a, Israel-hote chu Assuria ramah a hruai a, Hala ramah te, Gozan rama Habor liah te, Media-ho khuaahte a awmtir a." 
2Kings17:6 Hosea kum kua a lal kum chuan Assuria lal chu Samari khua chu a la a, Israel-hote chu Assuria ramah a hruai a, Hala ramah te, Gozan rama Habor liah te, Media-ho khuaahte a awmtir a." 
2Kings17:7 chutianga an lo awmna chan chu Israela thlahte chuan Aigupta lal Pharaoa kut ata, Aigupta ram atanga hruai chhuaktu LALPA an Pathian chunga thil an tihsual a, pathian dangte an pawisak zawka," 
2Kings17:8 LALPA'n Israela thlahte hmaa a lo hnawh chhuah tak hnamte thuriat leh Israel lalte pawm thuruatte anga an awm avanga ni. 
2Kings17:9 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan LALPA an Pathianc hungah chuan thil tha lo tak a rukin an ti thin a, an khu zawng zawngah ralvengtue in sang atangin a kulh nei khaw thlengin hmun sangte an siam a." 
2Kings17:10 Tlang sang tinah leh thin ghring tin, hnuaia hian lungphunte phunin, Aseri te an siam a;" 
2Kings17:11 Chung hmun sang zawng zawngahte chuan LALPA'n an hmaa a um bo tak hnamte tih dan ang khan rimtuite an hal thin a: LALPA tihthinrimna'n thil sual tak an ti bawk thin a; 
2Kings17:12 LALPA'n an hnena, ""Hetiang hi ti suh u,"" a tih milemte rawng an bawl bawk thin." 
2Kings17:13 LALPA chuan, ""Dan zawm tur, in pi leh pute ka pek leh ka chhiahlawh zawlneite hmanga ka hriattir che u ang zel chuan, in awm dan sual hi hawisan u la, ka thupekte leh ka thu ruatte chu pawm rawh u,"" tiin Israelte leh Judate chu zawlnei tin, leh hmutheitu tin hmangin a hriattir thin a." 
2Kings17:14 chuti chung pawhin an pawm duh lo a, an pi leh pu, LALPA an Pathian ring duh lotute an intiluhlul angin an intiluhlul ve a." 
2Kings17:15 Tin, a thuruat te, an pi leh pute hnena an thuthlun te, an hnena a thu hriattirte chu an pawisa duh lo a; thil lawilo mai mai an pawm a, engmah lo mai an lo ni ta a; an chungchang thu a LALPA'n, ""Anmahni ang chuan ti suh u,"" a lo tih tawh, an kiang vela hnamte tih dan an la ve a."
