2Kings17:16 Tin, LALPA an Pathian thupek zawng zawngte chu na hawisan a, bawng no lem chhung pahnih an siam a, tin, Aseri an siama, vana awm zawng zawng khia n bia a, Baala rawng an bawl thin a." 
2Kings17:17 Tin, an fapate leh anfanute chu meiah an luhtir a, aien te leh dawite an ching a, LALPA tihthinrimna'na a mithmuha thil tha lo tak ti turin an inzuar a." 
2Kings17:18 Chuvang chuan LALPA chu Israelte chngah a thinrim ta em em a, a mithmu phak lovah a suan bo a daih a Juda hnam chauh lo chu awm an awm ta lo a." 
2Kings17:19 Judate pawh chuan LALPA an Pathian thupekte chu an zawm lo a, Israelte pawm thuruatte angin an awm zawk a." 
2Kings17:20 Tin, LALPA'n Israela thlahte reng reng chu a duh ta lo a, anmahni chu a tibo daih ma loh chuan rawktute kuta a pe ta." 
2Kings17:21 Israelte chu Davida chhungte an nihna a paishak a si a; tichuan Nebata fapa Jeroboama kha lalah an siam a; in Jeroboama chuan Israelen LALPA an zi chu a lo kuai peng a, thil sual nasa aka tihtir a." 
2Kings17:22 ,23, tin, Israela thlahte chuan Jeroboama thitihsual ang zawng zawng chu an ti ve a; chungte chu LALPA'n a zawlneite zawng zawng hmanga a lo sawi tahw anga a mithmuh phak loa a suan bo daih hma loh chuan an kalsan lo a. Chutichuan Israel- hote chu anmahni ram ata Assuria rama an hruai a a, tun thlengin an la awm a ni." 
2Kings17:23 ,22 tin, Israela thlahte chuan Jeroboama thitihsual ang zawng zawng chu an ti ve a; chungte chu LALPA'n a zawlneite zawng zawng hmanga a lo sawi tahw anga a mithmuh phak loa a suan bo daih hma loh chuan an kalsan lo a. Chutichuan Israel- hote chu anmahni ram ata Assuria rama an hruai a a, tun thlengin an la awm a ni." 
2Kings17:24 Tin, Assuria lalin Babulon khuaa mie, Kutha khua amite, Ava khuaa mi e, Hamath khuaa mi e, Sepharvaim khuaa mite a chah chhuak Samari ram khuahte chuan Israela thlahte hmun a luahtir a; tichuan Samari ram chu an lua a, a khuaahte chuan an awm ta a." 
2Kings17:25 Tichuan chuta an han awm tirh chuan heti hi a ni a, LALPA an tih lo a, chutichuan LALPA'n an zingah sakeibakneite a tir a, mi thenkhatte an seh a." 
2Kings17:26 Chutichuan Assuria lal hnenah, ""I suanho hnam te, Samariram khuaa i luahtirte hian he'ng lai ram Pathian biak dan hi an hre ve lo a; chuvang uan an zinga sakeibakneitea tir ta a; tin, ngai teh, he'ng lai ram Pathian biak dan an hriat ve loh avangin an se thin a ni,"" tiin an sawi a." 
2Kings17:27 Tichuan Assuria lal chuan, ""Khata sala in hruaite zinga mi puithiam pakhat hruai ula, lo awm ve se la, chu ram Pathian biak dan chu zirtir rawh se,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
2Kings17:28 Chutichuan Samari ram atanga an hruaite zinga puithiam pakhat chu Bethel khuaah a va awm a, LALPA an tih dan tur a zirtir a." 
2Kings17:29 Nimahsela hnam tin chuan mahni pathian thian an siam theuh a, Samari miten hmun sang an lo siam inahte chuan hnam tinin mahni awmna khua theuhvah an dah a." 
2Kings17:30 Babulon mite chuan Sukkoth-benoth an siam a, tin, Kuth-ho chuan Nergal an siam a, tin, Hamath-ho chuan Asima an siam a," 
2Kings17:31 Ava-ho chuan Nihaz leh Tartak an siam a, tin, Sepharvaim-ho chuan Sepharvaim-ho pathian Adramelek leh Anamelek hmingin an fate an hal thin a." 
2Kings17:32 Chutichuan LALPA chu an tih a, an zinga mi hmun sang inahte chuan mi an thawi thin a." 
2Kings17:33 LALPA an tih a, an ruai chauhna rama mite nam tih dan angin anmahni pathiante rawng chu an bawl thin a." 
2Kings17:34 Tun hma lama an tih dan angin tun thlengin an la ti reng a ni LALPA chu an tih lo a, LALPA'n Jakoba thla Israelte tia a vuahte hnenah," 
2Kings17:35 Pathian dangte chu tih suh u la, anmahni chu chibai buk suh u la, an rawng bawl suh u la, an hneha inthawi suh u;" 
2Kings17:36 LALPA, thiltihtheihna nasa tak leh ban phar meuha Aigupta ram ata hruai chuaktu che u amah chu in ti zawk tur a ni a, amah chu chibai in buk tur a ni a, ama nenah in intawi tur a ni;" 
2Kings17:37 tichuan thuruat te, rorel te, dan te; thupekte a lo ziaksak tak che u kha kumkhuain in pawm reng tur a nia; pathian dangte chu in tih tur a ni lo;" 
2Kings17:38 tin, inhnena thu ka thlun hi in teihnghilh tur ani lo; pathian dangte in tih tur a ni hek lo;" 
2Kings17:39 LALPA in Pathian erawh chu in tih tur a ni; tichuan in hmelma zawng zawngte kut ata chu a chan chuak ang che u,"" tia thu a thlun a, an tana LALPA thupek te, thuruat te, rorel te, dan siamte chu an zawm hek lo." 
2Kings17:40 Engti pawhin an pawm duh chuang lo a, tun hma lama an tih dan angin an la ti reng a.Chutichuan hung hnamte chuan LALPA zawng an tih a, an milem siam chawpte rawng pawh an bawl bawk a; chutiang bawkin an thlahte leh an thlahte thlah thleng pawhin tun thleng hian an pi leh pute tih angin an la ti reng a ni." 
2Kings17:41 Chutichuan hung hnamte chuan LALPA zawng an tih a, an milem siam chawpte rawng pawh an bawl bawk a; chutiang bawkin an thlahte leh an thlahte thlah thleng pawhin tun thleng hian an pi leh pute tih angin an la ti reng a ni." 
2Kings18:1 Tin, Ela fapa Israel lal Hosea kum thum a lal kum chuan heti hi a nia, Juda lal Ahaza fapa Jezekia ch a lal tan a." 
2Kings18:1 Tin, Ela fapa Israel lal Hosea kum thum a lal kum chuan heti hi a nia, Juda lal Ahaza fapa Jezekia ch a lal tan a." 
2Kings18:2 A lal tantir chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum nga a ni; tin, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh kum kua a lal a; a nu hming chu Abii, Zekaria fanu a ni." 
2Kings18:3 Tin, apu Davida thiltih apiang ti vein LALPA mithmuha thil tha tak a ti thin a." 
2Kings18:4 Hmun sangte a thehthang bo a, lungphunte a tichim a, Aseri te a kit a; tin, Mosia dar rul siamte chu a tikeh sawm vek a; chung lai hun thleng chuan Israela thlahten a hnenah rimtui an hal thin a ni; chu chu Nehustan an ti thin." 
2Kings18:5 Ani chan LALPA Israelte Pathianc hu a ring a; chutichuan a hnua Juda lal zawng zawngte zingah amah ang tumah an awm lo a, ahmaah pawh an awm hek lo." 
2Kings18:6 LALPA chu a vuan tlat a, amah a zui ch a bang du lo a, a thupek LALPA'n Mosia a pekte chu a zawm a." 
2Kings18:7 Tichuan LALPA chua hnenah a awm a; a chhuahvana apiangah a hmuingil zel a Assuria lal chungah a el a, a rawng a bawl ta lo a." 
2Kings18:8 Philistia-hote chu Gaza khaw thelngin a ram chin zawng zawngte nen, ralvengtute in sang atanga kul neih khaw thlengin a hneh vek a." 
2Kings18:9 Tin, lal Hezekia kum lia lal kum Israel lal Ela fapa Josea kum sarih a lal kum chuanheti hi a ni a, Assuria lal Salmanesera chuan Samari khua a han bei a, a han hual a." 
2Kings18:10 Tin, kum yhum a vei kumin a la ta a; Hezekia kum ruk a lak kum, Israel lal Hosea kum kua a lal kumin ani Samari khua chu an lak ni." 
2Kings18:10 Tin, kum yhum a vei kumin a la ta a; Hezekia kum ruk a lak kum, Israel lal Hosea kum kua a lal kumin ani Samari khua chu an lak ni." 
2Kings18:11 Tin, LALPA an Pathian thu chu an pawm duh loh a, a thuthlung chu an bawhchiat zawk a, LALPA'n a chiahlawh Mosia th a pek zawng zawngte ngei kha an pawm duh loha an tih duh loh avangin," 
2Kings18:12 Assuria lal chuan Israel-hote chu Assuria ramah a hruai a, hala ramah te, Gozan rama Habor luiah te, Media-ho khuaahte a awmtir ta a ni." 
2Kings18:13 Tin, lal Hezekia kum sawm leh kum li a lal kumin Assuria ram lal Senakeriba chu Judai rama khua kulhpi nei zawng zawng bei turin a han chho a, a la ta a." 
2Kings18:14 Tin, Juda lal Hezekian Lakis khuaaAssuria lal hnenah chuan, ""Thil ka lo tisual ta a ni e, mi kiansan leh mai rawh, i mi tuk apiang chu ka tuar zel ang e,"" tiin thu a tahwn a. Tin, Assuria lal chuan Juda lal Jezekia chu tangka talent zathum leh rangkachak talent sawmthum a tuk a." 
2Kings18:15 Tichuan Jezekia chuan LALPA ina tangka awm zawng zawng leh lal ina ro dah khawmnaa mi zawng zawng chu a pe a. 
2Kings18:16 Chumi tum ngei chuan Jezekia chuan LALPA biak in kawngkhara mi leh, Juda lal Jezekian bana rangkachak a luante chu a la thla vek a, Assuria lal a pe a ni." 
2Kings18:17 Tin, Assuria lal chuan Tartan te, Rabsari te leh Rabsake te sipai tam tak nen Lakis khua atangin Jerusalem khuaa lal Jezekia hnenah chuan a tir a. Tin, Jerusalem khua chu an han thleng a. Tin, an han thlen chuan puan sutu phul kalkawnga dil chakta zawk tuilakna kiangah chuan an ding a." 
2Kings18:18 Tin, lal chu an han auh chuan, in chhung lam hotuHilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkha ziaktu Sebna te, chanchin ziaktu Asapha fapa Joa te chu an hnenah an va chhuak a." 
2Kings18:19 Tin, Rabsake-a chuan an hnenah, ""Hezekia hnenah han sawi tawh u khai,;Lal ropui tak Assuria lal chuan heti hian a ti, I rin i nghahna hi ngnge ni le?" 
2Kings18:20 Indona atan chuan remruat thiam leh chakna kan eni a ni, i ti a; nimahsela chu chu tawngka mai a ni. Tunge i rina ka chunga i hel tak ni le:" 
2Kings18:21 Ngai teh, he luang sawp tiang, Aigupta hi i ring ta a ni a; chu chu miina rinchhan chuan a kutah a chhun ang; Aigupa lal Pharaoa chu amah ringtu zawng zawng chungah chuan chutiang chu a ni thin." 
2Kings18:22 Ani hloh leh, ka hnenah, LALPA kan Pathian chu a ni kan rin ni in tih chuan, ani chu Jezekian Juda-ho leh Jerusalemho hneah Jerusalem khuaa he maicham hmaah hian in be tur a ni, tiin a hmun sangte leh a maichamte a lak bosak a kha a ni lawm ni?' tiin." 
2Kings18:23 Chutichuan ka pu Assuria lal nen chuan thu intiam rawh u khai, tichuan sakawr sanghnih ka pe ang che, a chunga chuangtu turte i hmuh theih dawn phawt chuan." 
2Kings18:24 Engtin nge tawlailirte leh sakawr chung chuang mite thu-ah Aigupta chunga i rinna ngahtin, ka pu mite zinga te ber hotu pakhat pawh hi i dan kir zawh dawn tehlul ni?" 
2Kings18:25 Tin, he ram hi LALPA thu loa tichhe tura lo cho em ka nih? LALPA'n ka hnenah, ""Chu ram chu han bei la, tichher rawh,' a ti a ni,' tiin"" a ti a." 
2Kings18:26 Tin, Hilkia fapa Eliakima leh Sebna leh Joa te chuan Rabsake hnenah, ""Khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawhte hi Suria tawngin min be tawh zawk rawh; chu chu kan hre thei si a: kulh chunga mite benghriatah hian Juda tawngin min be tawh suh,"" an ti a." 
2Kings18:27 Nimahsela Rabsake-a chuan an hnenah, ""Ka pu chuan in pu hnen leh in hnen chauhvah he'ng thu hi sawi turin mi tir em ni?Kulh chunga thuho, nangni leh anni mahni ek la ei tur leh mahni zun la in turte hnenah hian mi tir bawk ani lawm ni?"" a ti a." 
2Kings18:28 Tin, Rabsake chu a din ga, Juda tawngin aw ring takin a au a, ""Lal ropui tak Assuria lal thu hi ngaithla rawh u." 
2Kings18:29 Lal chuan heti hian a ti, 'Hezekia bumin awm suh u; ani chuan a kut ata a chanhim thei dawn si lo che u a:" 
2Kings18:30 Hezekia chuan, LALPA'n min chhanhim ngei ang a; tin, he khawpui hi Assuria lal kutah pek ani lo ang, tiin LALPA chu rintir che u suh se." 
2Kings18:31 Hezekia thu chu pawm suh u: Assuria lal chuan heti hian a ti a ni, Min rem ula, ka hnenah hian lo chhuak rawh u; tin, nangmahni ram anga bu leh uain ram, chhang leh grep huan ram, olive leh khawizu ram, thi loa in nun theihna tur rama ka rawn hruai hma loh che u chuan mi tinin mahni grep hruia mi leh mi tinin mahni theipui kunga mi ei theuh u la, mi tinin mahni tuikhur tui tlan theuh rawh u." 
2Kings18:32 Hezekia'n, LALPA'n mi chhanhim ang, tia a thlem che u pawhin pawm duh suh u." 
2Kings18:33 Hnam tinte pathian zawng zawng zinga mi reng rengin an ram chu Assuria lal lakah an chhanhim tawh ngai em ni? 
2Kings18:34 Hamath leh Arpad pathiante kha khawiah nge an awm tak? Sepharvaim te, Hena te, Iva te pathiante pawh kha khawiah nge an awm tak? Samari khua kha ka lakah an chhanhim em ni?" 
2Kings18:35 Ram tin pathian zawng zawngte zinga mi chuan tute nge an ram ka lakah chhanhim a, LALPA chuan Jerusalem khua hi ka lakah a han chanhim tehlul ang?' tiin,"" a ti a." 
2Kings18:36 Anni erawh chu an ngawi reng a, kam khat mahin an chang lo: lal thupek dan chu, ""Ani chu chhang suh u,"" tih a ni si a.Chutichuan lal in chung lam hotu Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkhaziaktu Sebna te chanchin ziaktu Asapha fapa Joa te chu an silhfen pawhthlerte inbelin Jezekia hnenah chuan an kal a, Rabsakea thu sawite chu an hrilh a." 
2Kings18:37 Chutichuan lal in chung lam hotu Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkhaziaktu Sebna te chanchin ziaktu Asapha fapa Joa te chu an silhfen pawhthlerte inbelin Jezekia hnenah chuan an kal a, Rabsakea thu sawite chu an hrilh a." 
2Kings19:1 Tin, lal Hezekia chuan chu chu a hriatin heti hi a ni a, a silhfente chu a pawt thler a, saiip puana inbel a, LALPA ina chuan a lut ta a." 
2Kings19:2 Tin, in chhung lam hotu Eliakima leh, lehkhaziaktu Sebna leh, puithiam upate chu saiip puan inbelin Amoza fapa zawlnei Isaia hnena a ti ra." 
2Kings19:3 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Hezekian heti ian a ti, 'Vawiin ni hi manganna leh zilhhauna leh hmingchhiatna ni a ni: naute chu an pian a hun tawh si a, hrin gturin chakna a awm taw si lo." 
2Kings19:4 A pu Assuria lalin Pathian nung sawichhe tura a tirh Rabsake thu sawi zawng zawngte chu, LALPA i Pathian chuan a hria ang a, a thu sawi, LALPA i Pathianin a thu hriata chu a la zilhhau mahna: chu mi avang chuan a la awm chunte chu tawngtaisak rawh,' a ti e,"" an ti a." 
2Kings19:5 Chutichuan lal Hezekia mite ch Isaia hnenah an kal a. 
2Kings19:6 Tin, Isaia chuanan hnenah, ""In pu hnenah heti hian sawi ang che u, 'LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, I thu hriat, Assuria lal miten mi sawi chiatnate kha hlau suh." 
2Kings19:7 Ngai teh, a kawchhunga chuan thlarau ka awmtir ang a, thuthang a hria ang a, ama ramah a haw leh ang; tichuan ama ram ngeiah chuan khandaiha tihtlukin ka awmtir ang, a tie,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
2Kings19:8 Chutichuan Rabsake chu a kir leh a, Assuria lal chuan Libna khua a lo bei lai a va hmu a; Lakis khua ata chu a chuak tih a hre tawh reng a ni." 
2Kings19:9 Tin, ""Ngai teh, nangmah bei turin a chhuak ta,"" tia Tirhaka, Ethiopia ram lal chungchang thu mi sawi a lo hriat chuan Hezekia hnenah mite a tir a," 
2Kings19:10 Heti hian Juda lal Jezekia hnena sawi ang che u, ' I pathian i rina chuan Jerusalem khua Assuria lal kuta pek a ni lo ang, tiin bum che suh se." 
2Kings19:11 Ngai teh, Assuria lalten ram zawng zawng tiche vekaa chunga an thiltihte kha i hria a; nang hi chhanhim i ni dawn bik em ni?" 
2Kings19:12 Hnam tin, pathiante chuan ka pi leh puten an tihboralte kha an chanhim em ni? Gozan te, Haran te, Rezeph te, Eden fa Telasar khuaa awm te kha." 
2Kings19:13 Hamath lal te, Arpad lal te, Sepharvaim khawpi lal te, Hena lal te, Iva lal te, kha khawiah nge an awm tak?' tiin,"" a ti a." 
2Kings19:14 Tin, Hezekia chuan a mi tirhte kut ata lehkha hu a hmu a, a han chhiar a: tichuan Hezekia chu LALPA inah chuan a han lut a, LALPA hmaah chuan a pharha a." 
2Kings19:15 Tin, Hezekia chuan LALPA hmaah a tawngtai a, ""Aw LALPA, cherubte chunga thu, Israela Pathian, nang, nang chauh hi leilung ram zawng zawng Pathian chu i ni; lei leh van hi nangma siam a ni." 
2Kings19:16 Aw LALPA, i beng lo chhi la, ngaithla teh; aw LALPA, i mit meng la, en teh; Pathian nung sawichhe tura Sanakeriban thu a rawn sawi hi ngaithla teh." 
2Kings19:17 LALPA, Assuria lalten hnamte leh an ramte chu an tichhe thin tak a," 
2Kings19:18 an pathiante chu meiah an paih bawk thin a: chungte chu pathian an ni lo reng a, mihring kuta siam, thing leh lung an ni zawk a ni: chuvangin an tiboral a ni." 
2Kings19:19 chuvangin aw LALPA kan pathian, nang, nangmah chauh hi LALPA Pathian i ni tih leilung luah ram zawng zawng hian an hriat teihna'n a lakah hian min chhandam ngei ngeia ng che,"" tiin." 
2Kings19:20 Chu mi lai chuan Amoza fapa Isaia chuan Jezekia hnenah, ""LALPA Israela Pathianc haun heti hian a ti a ni, 'Assuria lal Senakeriba chhiatna tur lam ka hnena i tawngtai kha ka lo hria e,' tin,." 
2Kings19:21 Hei hi a chungchang thu LALPA'n a sawi chu a ni: 'Zion fanu nula chuan a hmusit chia, a nuihzatbur che; Jerusalem fanu chuan a lu a thin khum che." 
2Kings19:22 Tunge i tihhmingchhiat a, i sawi chhiat? Tu chungah nge i aw ti tihpawr a, i mit i lek san? Israelho Mi Thianghlima chungah alawm." 
2Kings19:23 I mi tirhte hmangin LALPA chu i tihmingchhia a, ka tawlailir tam tak nen Lebanon ram ril tlang sangte ka lo thleng chho ta a; Chuta Sidar thing sang takte leh far thing tha thate chu ka kit ang a: a lei tha hmun ramngaw a chenna hmun ril berah chuan ka lut ang." 
2Kings19:24 Ram dang tui ka lai chhuak a, ak tlan thin a, ka kephah hnuai hian Aigupta lui zawng zawng chu ka tikang vek ang, ti ti a." 
2Kings19:25 Keima'n hman lai ata chung chu ka tih a nihzia te, hmasang ata chung chu ka tih a nihzia te, hmasang ata chung chu ka siam anihzia te i hre lo em ni? Khaw kulh neite chu in chim khawm mai anga tichetu atan ka ruat ta che anih hi." 
2Kings19:26 Chuvang chuan a chhunga awmte chu chakna n nei lo a, an zam a, an lo mualpho tak kha; phul hlobet ang leh, hnim hring ang leh, inchunga hlobet ang leh, buh len hmaa thli em vuai ang an nih kha." 
2Kings19:27 Kei chuan i thut te, i luh leh i chhuah te, ka chunga i thinur te hi ka hria a sin." 
2Kings19:28 ka chunga i thinur avang leh, i tawng chaltlai chu ka bengah a lo luh choh tak avang hian ka hnar kvuah chu i hnarah ka vuah ang a, ka thirbarh chu i hmuiah, i lo kalna kawng ngeiah khan ka kirtir leh ang che,' tiin." 
2Kings19:29 Tin, hei hi i tan chhinchhiahna nai ang: kuminah bu hli in ring ang a; nakkumah a hli bawk: tin, a kum thumnaah chuan buhte tuh u la, at u la, grep huante siam ula, a rahte ei rawh u." 
2Kings19:30 Tichuan Juda chungte zinga la dam chhunte chuan a chhuk zawngin zung an kai ang a, a cho zawngin an rah leh ang." 
2Kings19:31 Jerusalem atangin a la awm chunte Zion tlang atangin a la damte chu an chhuak dawn a ni: LALPA thahnemngaihna chuan chung chu a ti ang. 
2Kings19:32 Chuvangin LALPA chuan Assuria lal chungchang thu chu heti hian a sawi,;He khawpui hi a lo thleng lo ang, phaw nen a kiangah a lo kal hek lo ang a, a khaw hrulah lei an tiang pawng hek lo ang." 
2Kings19:33 A lo kalna kawngah, ch miah ngei chuan a let leh ang a, he khawpui hia lo thleng lo ang." 
2Kings19:34 Keimah avang leh ka chhiahhlawh Davida avangin he khawpui hi chanhim turin ka veng dawn ni,' LALPA'n a ti,"" tiin, mi a tir a." 
2Kings19:35 Tichuan chu mi zan chuan heti hi a ni a, LALPA vantirhkoh chu a tahwk chuak a, Assuria-ho ruahhmuna chuan mi nuai khat leh singriat leh sangnga a tihlum a: tin, zing taka an han thawh chuan, ngai teh, mitthi ruang hlir a lo ni ta mai a." 
2Kings19:36 Chutichuan Assuria lal Senakeriba chu a chuak a, alet leh a, a kal leh ta zel a, Ninevi khuah chuan a awm ta a.Tin, a pathian Nisroka ina chuan amah a biak laiin heti hia ni a, Adrammeleka leh Sarezera te chuan khandaihin an tihlum a: tichuan Arara rama chuan an lan lut ta a. Tin, a fapa Esar-haddona chu a aiawhina lal ta a." 
2Kings19:37 Tin, a pathian Nisroka ina chuan amah a biak laiin heti hia ni a, Adrammeleka leh Sarezera te chuan khandaihin an tihlum a: tichuan Arara rama chuan an lan lut ta a. Tin, a fapa Esar-haddona chu a aiawhina lal ta a." 
2Kings20:1 Chung lai chuan Hezekia chu thih ngamin a na a, Tichuan Amoza fapa zawlnei Isaia chu a hnena a lo kal a, a hnenah, ""LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, ' I chungte awm dan tur sawi rawh khai, i dam chhuak zo dawn si lo a,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
2Kings20:2 Chutichuan bang lam hawiin a let a, LALPA hnenah," 
2Kings20:3 Aw LALPA, i hmaa thutak leh thinlung tha famkim pua ka awm thinzia leh, i mithmuha thil tha ka tih thinzia kha khawngaih takin hre reng ang che,"" tiin a tawngtai a. Tin, Jezekia chu a tap ta zawih zawih a." 
2Kings20:4 Tin, Isaia chuan khawpui lai tak pawh chu a thlen hmain heti hi a ni a, LALPA thu a hnena a lo thleng a," 
2Kings20:5 Kir leh la, ka mite hotu Jezekia hnenah sawi rawh, 'LALPA i pu Davida Pathian chuan heti hian a ti, I tawngtaina kha ka hria a, i mittui tla pawh ka hmu e: ngai teh, ka tidam ang chia; ni thum nia chuan LALPA inah i han kal ang." 
2Kings20:6 Tin, i dam chung kumte hi kum sawm leh kum ngain ka tisei ang a; tinnang leh he khawpui hi Assuria lal lakah ka chhanhim ang a; tin, keimah avang leh ka chiahhlawh Davida avangin he khawpui hi ka hum ang, a ti,' tiin.""" 
2Kings20:7 Tin, Isaian, ""Theipui rah khawn khat han la rawh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan an rawn la a, khawihliah huan an bel a, a lo dam leh ta a." 
2Kings20:8 Tin, Hezekian Isaia hnenah, ""LALPA'n mi tidam ang a, LALPA inah a ni thum niin ka han kal ang tih chhinchhiahna eng nge ni ang?"" a ti a." 
2Kings20:9 Tin, Isaian, ""LALPA'n a thil sawihi a ti ngei dawn tih hei hi i tan LALPA laka chhinchhiahna tur chu a ni ang: hlim chu rahka sawm thlenga a tawlh chhoh nge i duh rahka sawm thlenga a tawlh kir?"" a ti a." 
2Kings20:10 Tin, Jezekian a chhang a, 'Hlim chu rahka sawm thlenga tawlhchho chu a awl em a, chu zawng ni lo e, hlim chu rahka sawm thlengin tawlh kir zawk rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Kings20:11 Tichan zawlnei Isaia chuan LALPA a han au a; tin, Ahaza darchinhriatnaa hlim hniam tawh chu rahka sawm thlengin a tikir leh ta a." 
2Kings20:12 Chu mi lai chuan Baladana fapa Babulon lal Merodak-baladana chan lehkhate leh lawmnate Jezekia a thawn a: Jezekia chu a na tih a riat avangin. 
2Kings20:13 Tichuan Jezekia chuan anni chu a lo lawm a, a thl hlu dana in zawng anwg te, tangka te, rangkachak te, englo rimti te, hriak hlu tak te a ralthuam dahna in chung te,a ro awm zawng zawngte chu a entir a: a ina mi leh a ram chhunga mi Hezekiana entir loh reng reng a awm lo." 
2Kings20:14 Chu mi lai chuan zawlnei Isaia chu lal Hezekia hnenah a kal a, a hnenah, ""Kha mi te khan eng nge an sawi? Khawi atangin nge i hnenah an lo kal?"" a ti a. Tin, Hezekia chuan, ""Ram hla tak, Babulon atang chuan an lo kal a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Kings20:15 Tichuan ani chuan, ""I inah hian eng eng nge an hmuh?"" a ti a. Tin, Hezekia chuan, ""Ka in chunga awm zawng zawng chu an hmu vek a, ka ro zinga mi ka entir loh reng reng a awm lo,"" tiin a chhang a." 
2Kings20:16 Tin, Isaian Hezekia hnenah, ""LALPA thu hi lo ngaithla rawh khai." 
2Kings20:17 Ngai teh, i in chunga awm zawng zawng leh vawiin thlenga i pi leh puten an lo khawl khawmtete chu Babulon khuaa an kalpui nite a lo la thleng; engma reng reng hnutchiah a awm lo ang,' LALPA'n a ti." 
2Kings20:18 Tin, i rila rah, i hrin tur, i fate ngei zinga mi pawh an kal bopi ang a; Babulon lal inah chuan mi tilreh an la ni ang,' a ti,"" a ti a." 
2Kings20:19 Tichuan Hezekian Isaia hnenah, ""I sawi LALPA thu hi a tha e,"" ti a. Tin, ""Ka dam chung hian remna leh thutak a awm dawn phawt chuan,"" a ti lehnghal a." 
2Kings20:20 Tichuan Hezekia chanchin dang te, a thiltihtheihzia zawng zawng te, dil leh tuilaknaa siam a, khawpui chhunga tui a lak thu te leh Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna bua a chuang ani lo'm ni?Tin, Hezekia chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil ta a: tichuan a fapa Manasea chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings20:21 Tin, Hezekia chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil ta a: tichuan a fapa Manasea chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings21:1 Manasea chu a lal tantirhin kum sawm leh kum hnih mi a ni a; Jerusalem ah kum sawmnga leh kum nga a lal a: a nu hming chu Jephzibi a ni. 
2Kings21:2 Tin, LALPA'n Israela thlahte hmaa a hnawchhuah tak hnamten thil tenawm tak an tih thin ang, LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo takte chu a ti thin a." 
2Kings21:3 A pa Jezekian a tihchiat tawh hmun sangte chu a din leh a; Israel lal Ahaba tih angin Baala maichamte a din a, Aseri te a siam a, vana awm zawng zawng khia a bi aa, an rawng a bawl a," 
2Kings21:4 LALPA'n, ""Jerusalem-a ka hming ka awmtir ang,"" a tihna LALPA inah chuan maichamte a siam a." 
2Kings21:5 LALPA in hung chung kawtlai pahnihah chuan vana awm zawng zawng tan maicham a siam a. 
2Kings21:6 Tin, a fapa ch meia a lutir a, aiente a ching a, dawite a hmang a, ramhuai aienthiam zawlte leh dawithiamte a ruai thin a: LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo nasa tak a tithinturin a ti thin a." 
2Kings21:7 ,8 Tin, LALPA'n Davida leh a fapa Solomona hnenah, ""He in leh Jerusalem khua, Israel chi zawng zawng zinga ka thlanah hian ka hming chu kumkhuain ka awmtir ang a; thu ka pek ang zawng zawng leh ka chhiahhlawh Mosia'n dan a pek ang zawng zawng khaan pawm phawt chuan an pi leh pute ka pek tawh ram ata chu Israelte kete pawh hi ka pen chauhtir tawh bawk hek lo ang"" a lo tih tawh inahc haun Aseri lem a siam chu a dah a." 
2Kings21:8 ,7 Tin, LALPA'n Davida leh a fapa Solomona hnenah, ""He in leh Jerusalem khua, Israel chi zawng zawng zinga ka thlanah hian ka hming chu kumkhuain ka awmtir ang a; thu ka pek ang zawng zawng leh ka chhiahhlawh Mosia'n dan a pek ang zawng zawng khaan pawm phawt chuan an pi leh pute ka pek tawh ram ata chu Israelte kete pawh hi ka pen chauhtir tawh bawk hek lo ang"" a lo tih tawh inahc haun Aseri lem a siam chu a dah a." 
2Kings21:9 Nimahsela an pawm duh lo a; LALPA'n Israela thlahteho hmaa a hnawchauh tak hnamte tih ai maha nasa zawk thil tisual turin Manasea chuan mite a thlem thin a. 
2Kings21:10 Tin, LALPA'n a chiahhlawh zawlneite hmangin thu a sawi a:" 
2Kings21:11 Juda lal Manasea hian he'ng thil tenawm takte hi a ti a, a hmaa Amor-hote ai mahina tisual nasa a, Juda-ho hia milemtein til a tihsualtir avangin:" 
2Kings21:12 LALPA, Israelte Pathianin heti hian a ti: 'Ngai teh u, Jerusalem leh Juda chnga hian a hria apiangte beng khing hnih thawng khawp thil tha lo ka rawn thlentir dawn e." 
2Kings21:13 Samari tehna hrui leh Ahaba chhung darmumkhai chu Jerusalem chungah ka zam ang a: tin, miin thleng a hru a, a tilinglet ang maiin Jerusalem chu ka hru ang." 
2Kings21:14 ,15 Tin, ka rochan la awm chunte chu ka paih thla ang a, an hmelmate kutah a pe ang: tichuan an pi leh pute Aigupta rama an lo chauh ata vawiin thleng hian ka mithmuha thil tha lo tak an ti a, mi tihthinrim avang hian an hmelma zawng zawngte man tur leh rallak tur an ni ang,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
2Kings21:15 ,14 Tin, ka rochan la awm chunte chu ka paih thla ang a, an hmelmate kutah a pe ang: tichuan an pi leh pute Aigupta rama an lo chauh ata vawiin thleng hian ka mithmuha thil tha lo tak an ti a, mi tihthinrim avang hian an hmelma zawng zawngte man tur leh rallak tur an ni ang,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
2Kings21:16 LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak tia Judate thil a tihsualtira sualna thiam loin Mnasea chuan pawikhawih lo thisen nasa takin a chhuah bawk a, Jerusalem dung leh vang a khat a." 
2Kings21:17 Tichuan Mansea chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a thil tihsual te chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Kings21:18 Tin, Manasea chu a pi leh pute hnenah chuan a muhil a, Uza huana ama in bul huana an phum ta a; tichuan a fapa Amona chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings21:19 Amona chu alal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum hnih a lal a: a nu hming chu Mesulemethi, Jotba khuaa Jaruza fanu a ni a." 
2Kings21:20 Tin, a pa Manasea tih ang bawk LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti ve thin a." 
2Kings21:21 A pa kawng zawh zawng zawng chu a zawh vek a, apan milem rawng a bawlte chu a bawl a, chibai a buk ve a:" 
2Kings21:22 tichuan LALPA, a pi leh pue Pathian chu a kalsan a. LALPA kawng chu a zawh lo a." 
2Kings21:23 Tin, Amona miten amah an phiar ru a, lal chu ama ina an tihlum a." 
2Kings21:24 Nimahsela chu mi rama mite chuan lal Amona phira rutu zawng zawngte chu an tihlum ta vek a; tichuan chu mi rama mite chuan a fapa Josia chu a aiawhin lalah an siam ta a," 
2Kings21:25 Tichuan Amona thiltih dangte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?Tin, Uza huana ama thlana an phum a: tin, a fapa Josia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings21:26 Tin, Uza huana ama thlana an phum a: tin, a fapa Josia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings22:1 Josia chu a lal tantirhin kum riat mi a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum leh kum khat a lal a: a nu hming chu Jedidi, Bozkath khuaa Adaia fanu a ni." 
2Kings22:2 Tin, LALPA mithmuha thil fel tak a ti thin a, a pu Davida kawng zawh zawng zawng chu a zawh ve a, ding lamah emaw vei lamah emaw a pensan lo a." 
2Kings22:3 Tin, lal Josia a lal kum sawmleh kum riat kumin heti hi a ni a, lal chuan Mesullama fa Azalia fapa lehkhaziaktu Saphana chu a tir a," 
2Kings22:4 Puithiam lalbe Hilkia hnenah han kal la, kawngkhar vengtuten mite hnen ata an lo lak khawm LALPA ina tangka rawn dah chu chhiar se la;" 
2Kings22:5 LALPA in satu hnathawktute pe rawh se; 
2Kings22:6 thingrem siamtu te, in satu te, in chhe siamtute huan in he lai siamna thing leh lungchher an lei theihna'n,"" tiin LALPA inah a tir a." 
2Kings22:7 Amaherawhchu tangka an pekate chu an enzuipui leh lem chuang lo; rinawm taka an tih thin avangin. 
2Kings22:8 Tin, puithiam lalber Hilkia chuan lehkhaziaktu Saphana chu lal hnenah a kal a, lal hnenah thu chu a va thlen leh a, ""I mite chuan thu chu a va thlen leh a, ""I mite chuan ina tangka awm chu an pe chhuak vek ta e,"" a ti a." 
2Kings22:9 Tin, lehkha ziaktu Saphana chu lal hnenah a kal a, lal hnenah thu chu a va thlen leh a, ""I mite chuan ina tangka awm chu an pe chhuak vek a, lalpa in satu hnathawktute an pe vek ta e,"" a ti a." 
2Kings22:10 Tin, lehkhaziaktu Saphana chuan, ""Puithiam Hilian lehkhabu mi lo pe a sin,"" tiin lal chu a hrilh a. Tin, Saphana chuan, lal hmaah a chhiar a," 
2Kings22:11 Tin, lalin dan lehkhabu thute hu a han hriat chuan heti hi a ni a, a puante a pawt thler ta a." 
2Kings22:12 Tin, lal chuan puithiam Hilkia te, Saphana fapa Ahikama te, Mikaia fapa Akbora te, lehkhaziaktu Saphana te, lal mi Asaia te hnena chuan," 
2Kings22:13 Kei leh, mipui leh, Juda-ho zawng zawng hi he lehkhabu chara thu chuang thuah hian LALPA min va rawnsak teh u: kan tih tura he mi lehkhabua ziak ang zawng zawng hi kan pi leh puten an lo zawm loh avangin kan chungah hian LALPA thinura chu a alh nasat tawh em hi,"" a ti a." 
2Kings22:14 Chutichuan puithiam Hilkia te, Ahikama te, Akbora te, Saphana te, Asaia te chu silhfen enkawltu Harhasa fa Tikva fapa Salluma nupui zawlnei Huldi hnenah chuan an kal a, an va bia a. (Ani chu Jerusalem Misne-a awm ania.)" 
2Kings22:15 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""LALPA, Israelte Pathianin heti hian a ti: Ka hnena rawn tirtu che u hi hrilh rawh u." 
2Kings22:16 LALPA'n heti hian a ti e: Ngai teh, he mi hmunah leh, a chhunga chenghote chunga hian thil tha lo tak ka rawn thlentir dawn a ni, Juda lalin lehkhabua a thu chiar zawng zawng ang kha:" 
2Kings22:17 mi kalsan a, pathian dange hnenah rimtui an hal a, an kut chhuaka mi tihthinrim avangin he mi hmuna hian ka thinurna a alh nasa dawn a, a mit mai dawn lo e." 
2Kings22:18 Nimahsela LALPA rawn tura rawn tirtu che u Juda lal hnenah huan hetiang hian sawi ang che u: LALPA Israelte Pathianin heti hian a ti: I thu hriat chungchang thuah chuan - 
2Kings22:19 hemi hmun leh, a chhunga chengte hi tihtiau leh anchhedawngin an la awm ang tih thu ka sawi kha i lo hriat a, i rilrute a nem a, LALPA hmaa i ingaihtlawm a, i puante i pawh thler a, ka hmaa i tah avangin, kei pawhin i thu chu ka lo hria e, LALPA'n a ti.Chutichuan ngai teh, i pi leh pute hnenah ka hruai ang chia, i thlanah thlamuang taka hruaiin i awm ang a, he mi hmuna thil tha lo tak ka rawn thlentir tur chu i mitin a hmu hek lo ang, a ti e,' tiin,"" a ti a. Tichuan thu chu lal hnenah an va thlen leh a." 
2Kings22:20 Chutichuan ngai teh, i pi leh pute hnenah ka hruai ang chia, i thlanah thlamuang taka hruaiin i awm ang a, he mi hmuna thil tha lo tak ka rawn thlentir tur chu i mitin a hmu hek lo ang, a ti e,' tiin,"" a ti a. Tichuan thu chu lal hnenah an va thlen leh a." 
2Kings23:1 Tin, lal chuan mite a tir a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem khawpuia upa zawng zawng a hnenah an ko khawm chiam a." 
2Kings23:2 Tin, lal chu Judai rama mi zawng zawng nen, Jerusalem khuaa mi zawng zawng nen, puithiamte leh zawlneite nen, mipui zawng zawngte nen chuan a lian a tein LALPA inah chuan an han chho a; tin, LALPA ina an lehkhabu chara thuthlung bua chuang zawng zawng chu an benghriatah a chhiar a." 
2Kings23:3 Tin, lal chu ban hrulah a ding a, chu mi lehkhabua chuang thuthlung thu chu tinghet turin thinlung zawng zawng leh thlarau zawng zawnga LALPA zui tur leha thupekte, a thu hriattir te, a thuruatte pawm turin LALPA hmaah huan thu a thlung a: tin, mipui zawng zawng pawhin an thlunpui a," 
2Kings23:4 Tin, lalin puithiam lalber Hilkia te, a dawttu puithiam te, kawngkhar vengtute chu LALPA biak in chunga Baala leh, Aseri leh, vana thil awmho zawng awng tana siam bungbel zawng zawngte chu la chhuak vek turin thu a pe a: tihuan Jerusalem pawn lam, Kidron phulah a hal a, a vapte chu Bethel-ah a kalpui a." 
2Kings23:5 Tin, milem beho puithiamte, Juda lalten Judai ram khawpui hmun angahte, Jerusalem vela rimtui hal tura an lo ruatte chu a bantir a; Baala tan te, ni tan te, thla tan te, arsi tan te, vana awmho zawng awn tan tea rimtui altute pawh chu." 
2Kings23:6 Tin, LALPA ina Aseri chu Jerusalem pawn lam, Kidron luiah a la chhuak a, Kidron luiah chuan a hal a, a rap sawm dep a, a dip chu mi naran te thlanah a theh a." 
2Kings23:7 Tin, Aseri puan tahho hmeichhe awmna, LALPA ina mipa inzuarho awmna inte chu a thiatsak a." 
2Kings23:8 Tin, Juda khawpui atate chu puithiam zawng zawng a hruai chhuak a, puithiamhote rimtui halna hmun sangte chu Geba tanga Beer-seba thlengin a tibawrhbang vek a; khawpui kawngka luha vei lampanga khawpui awptu Josua kawngka luha kawngkatea hmun sangte chu a tichim a." 
2Kings23:9 Hmun sang puithiamte chu Jerusalem-a LALPA maichamah an han chho ve lo na a, an unaute zingah chhang dawidim telh loh erawh chu an ei ve thin." 
2Kings23:10 Tin, tumahin an fapa emaw, an fanu emaw Moleka puala meia an luhtir tawh lohna turin, Hinoma thlahte ruama Topeth chu a tibawrhbang a." 
2Kings23:11 Tin, LALPA in luhnaa a in ual chhunga lal in vengtu Nathanmeleka pindan bula Juda lalten ni tana sakawr an pekte chu a suan bo vek a; ni tawlailirte chu a hal a." 
2Kings23:12 Tin, Ahaza in chnawng chunga Jud alalten maicham an siamte leh Manasean LALPA in hung chhung kawtlai pahniha maicham a siamte chu lal chuan a tichim a, a tisawm berh a, anawite chu Kidron luiah a paih a." 
2Kings23:13 Tin, Jerusalem bul chiatna tlang ding lampanga Zidon ho pathian tenawm tak Astarethi tan te, Moab-o pathian tenawm tak Kemosa tan te, Amona thlahte pathian tenawm tak Milkoma tan te, Israel lal Solomonan hmun sang a siamte chu lal chuan a tibawrhbang a." 
2Kings23:14 Tin, lungphunte chu a tikeh sawm vek a, Aseri-te chu a kit thlu a chung hmuanhte chuan miring ruh a dah ta a." 
2Kings23:15 Tin, chu lo pawh chu Israelte thil tihsualtirtu Nebata fapa Jeroboaman Bethel-a maicham leh hmun sang a siam chu, chu mi maicham leh hmun sang lamin a tichim bawk a; tichuan hmun sang chu ahal a, a rap sawm dep a, Aseri chu a hal ta a." 
2Kings23:16 Tin, Josia chu a han hawi a, tlanga thlante chu a han hmu a; tichuan thlana ruhte chu a va laktir a, chung thu lo sawitu Pathian miin a lo sawi, LALPA thu ang ngeiin maichama chuan a hal a, a tibawrhbang a." 
2Kings23:17 Tichuan ani chuan, ""Saw tu lungphun nge ka han hmuh saw?"" a ti a. Tin, khuaa mite chuan, ""Pathian mi, Judai ram atanga lo kal, Bethel-a maicham chunga i tih tak hi lo sawi lawktu thlan anih saw,"" tiin an hrilh a." 
2Kings23:18 Tin, ani chuan, ""Engmah tih suh u; tumahin a ruhte chu la sawn suh se,"" a ti a. Chutichuan a ruhte chu Samari ram atanga zawlnei lo kala ruhte nen engmah an tih lo." 
2Kings23:19 Tin, Israel lalten LALPA tihthinrima an sak Samari ram khuatea hmun sang in zawng zawngte pawh chu Josia chuan a suan bo a, Bethel khuaa a tih ang chiahin a tihsak ve a." 
2Kings23:20 Tichuan chuta hmun sang puithiam awm zawng zawngte chu maicham chungah a that a, chungah chuan mihring ruhte a hal a, Jerusalem-ah a haw leh ta a." 
2Kings23:21 Tin, lalin mi zawng zawng hnenah, ""He thuthlung bua chuang ang hian LALPA, in Pathian tan Kalhlen Kut nei rawh u,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
2Kings23:22 Israelte chunga roreltuten ro an rel achin, Israel lalte lal chhung zawng zawng te, Juda lalte lal chung zawng zawng te pawhin chutiang taka Kalhlen Kut chu an la nei lo;" 
2Kings23:23 lal Josia lal kum sawm leh kum riat kuma chuan chu Kalhlen Kut chu Jerusalem khuaah LALPA tan an nei ta chauh a ni. 
2Kings23:24 Tin, LALPA ina puithiam Hilkian a char lehkhabua dan thu chuangte kha a tihngheh theihna'n ramuai aienthiam zawl te, dawithiam te pathian lem te, milem te Judai ram leh Jerusalem khuaa thil tenawm an hmuh thin zawng zawngte chu Josia chuan a tibo vek bawk a." 
2Kings23:25 Mosia dan zawng zawng anga thinlung zawng zawng le thlarau zawng zawng leh chakna zawng zawnga LALPA pawm, amah ang reng reng a hmaa lal tumah an awm lo a; a hnuah pawh amah ang chu tumah an awm leh tawh hek lo." 
2Kings23:26 Chuti chung pawhin LALPA chuan a thinrimna nasa tak Manasean a lo tihthinrimna zawng zawng avanga Juda chunga a thinrimna alh chu a la tire chuan glo. 
2Kings23:27 Tin, LALPA'n, ""Israel ka sawn bo ang hian Juda pawh hi ka hmuh pahk loah ka sawn bov e ang a, he khua ka thlan Jerusalem ngei leh, 'Chutah chuan ka hming ch a awm ang,' ka tih in hi ka thehthang bo daih ang,"" a ti a." 
2Kings23:28 Tichuan Josia hanhin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Judalalte lal lai chanchin ziakna buaa chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Kings23:29 A lal lai chuan, Aigupta lal Pharoa-nekoa chu Assuria lal bei turin Euphrates luiah a han chho va: tin, lal Josia chuan ani chu a han bei a; tin, ani chuan amah chu a hmuh veleh Megiddo khuaah a that ta a." 
2Kings23:30 Tin, a mite chuan Megiddo atang chuan a ruang chu tawlailirin an kalpui a, Jerusalem-ah an luhpui a, ama thlana an phum ta a. Tichuan chu mi rama mite chan Josia fapa Jehoahaza chu an hrua a, hriak an thih a, a pa aiah lalah an siam ta a." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahaza chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum thum a ni a; Jerusalem-ah thla thum a lal a: a nu hming chu Hamutali, Libna khuaa Jeremia fanu a ni." 
2Kings23:32 Tin, a pi leh pute tih dan ang zawng zawng LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a." 
2Kings23:33 Tin, Pharao-nekoa chuan Jerusalema rorel thei tawh lo turin Hamath rama Ribla khuaah a tantir a; tin, an ram chu tangka talent zakhat leh rangkachak talent khat a chawitir a." 
2Kings23:34 Tin, Pharoa-nekoa chuan Josia fa Eliakima ch a pa Josia aiahc huan a laltir a, a hming chu Jehoiakima tiin a thlaksak a; Jehoahaza eraw chu a hruai daih a; Aigupta ramah a kal a, chu tah chuan a thi ta a." 
2Kings23:35 Tin, Jehoiakima chuan tangka leh rangkachak chu Pharoa a pe phawt a; an ramte chu Pharoa thupek angin a tangkaa pe turin chhiah a chawitir ve thung a: Pharao-neka hnenah pek turin mi tin, chawi tura a tuk zat theuh ang zelin chu mi rama mite ta tangka leh rangkachak a chawitir a." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoiakima chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum nga a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sawm leh kum khat a lal a: a nu hming chu Zebidi, Ruma khuaa Pedaia fanu a ni.Tin, a pi leh pute tih dan ang zawng zawng LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a ni." 
2Kings23:37 Tin, a pi leh pute tih dan ang zawng zawng LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo tak a ti thin a ni." 
2Kings24:1 A lal lai chuan Babulon lal Nebukadenezzara a lo lian a, Jehoiakim achu hhiah khuaah kum thum a awm a; chu mi hnuah chuan a hawisan a, a chungah a hel ta a." 
2Kings24:2 Tin, LALPA'n Kaldai pawl te te, Suria pawl te te, Moab pawl te te, Amona thlah pawl te te a mah bei turin a tir chhuak a, a chiahhlawh zawlneite hmanga a sawi LALPA thu angin Judai ram tihchhiattir turin a tir a." 
2Kings24:3 ,4 Mansea thiltih zawng zawn, a thil tihsual leh pawikhawih lo thisen a chhuah a, Jerusalem chu pawikhawih lo thisena a tihkhah avangin a hmuh phak loa suan bo tur thu Juda chungah LALPA thuin a lo thleng ta ngei a, LALPA'n a ngaidam duh lo a ni." 
2Kings24:4 ,3 Mansea thiltih zawng zawn, a thil tihsual leh pawikhawih lo thisen a chhuah a, Jerusalem chu pawikhawih lo thisena a tihkhah avangin a hmuh phak loa suan bo tur thu Juda chungah LALPA thuin a lo thleng ta ngei a, LALPA'n a ngaidam duh lo a ni." 
2Kings24:5 Tichuan Jehoiakima chanchin dang leh a thiltih zawng zawng chu Juda lalte lal lai chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni? 
2Kings24:6 Chutichuan Jeoiakima chu a i leh pute hnenah a muhil a; tin, a fapa Jeoiakina chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings24:7 Tin, Aigupta lal chu a ram ata a lo chhuak leh ta lo va: Babulon lal chuan Aigupa ram lite atanga Euphrates lui thlenga Aigpta lal ram huam zawng zawng a la tawh si a." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoiakima chu a la tantirhin kum sawm leh kum riat a ni a; Jerusalem-ah thla thum a lal a: a nu hming chu Nehusti, Jerusalem khuaa Elnathana fanu a ni." 
2Kings24:9 Tin, a pa tih dan ang zawng zawng tiin, LALPA mithhmua thil tha lo tak a ti thin a." 
2Kings24:10 Chutih lai chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara mite hu Jerusalem-ah an han cho a, khua chu an han hual ta a." 
2Kings24:11 Tin, chutia a miten an han hual lai chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chukhuaah a han kal a;" 
2Kings24:12 tichuan Juda lal Jehoiakina chu a nu te, a mite, a mi lian te, a puipate nen chuan babulon lala hnenah an va hhuak a: tin, a lal kum riat kumin Babulon lal chuan a man a." 
2Kings24:13 Tin, LALPA sawi ang khan LALPA ina ro zawng zawng leh lal ina ro zawng zawngte chu a la chuak a, LALPA biak ina Israelte lal Solomonan rangkachak bungbel a siam zawng zawngte chu a sat sawm vek a." 
2Kings24:14 Tin, Jerusalem-a mi zawng zawng, mi lian zawng zawng te, mi chak huaisen tha zawng zawng te, singkhat zet, sal themthiam leh thirdeng zawng zawng a ruai vek a; chu mi rama mi a rethei theite tih loh chu tumah an awm tawh lo." 
2Kings24:15 Tin, Jehoiakina chu Babulon-ah a hruaia; tin, lal nu te, lal nupi te, a puipa te, chu mi rama mic hakte chu Jerusalem atangin Babulon-ah salah a hruai a." 
2Kings24:16 Tin, Babyulon lal chuan pasaltha zawng zawng sangsarih zet leh, themthiam leh thirdeng sangkhat, mi chak tha zawng indo thei mi thiau hu babuylon-ah salah a hruai vek a." 
2Kings24:17 Tin, a pa unau Mattania chu Babulon lal chuan a aiah alaltir a, a hming hu Zedekia tiin a thlaksak a." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekia chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum khat a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sawm leh kum khat a lal a; a nu hming chu Hamutali, Libna khuaa Jeremia fanu a ni." 
2Kings24:19 Tin, Jehoiakima tih dan ang zawng zawng tiin, LALPA mithmuah thil tha lo tak a ti thin a.LALPA thinurna avangin a hmu phak loa a thehthang bo thlengin Jerusalem leh Juda chungah thil a lo thleng zel a ni; Zedekia chu Babulon lal chungah chuan a hel ta a." 
2Kings24:20 LALPA thinurna avangin a hmu phak loa a thehthang bo thlengin Jerusalem leh Juda chungah thil a lo thleng zel a ni; Zedekia chu Babulon lal chungah chuan a hel ta a. 
2Kings25:1 Tin, a lal kum ruk kum, thla sawmna, ni sawm ni takin heti hi a ni a, babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chuan sipai zawng zawngte nen Jerusalem a han bei a, awmhmun an han khuar a; tin, kulhin an hual vel ta a." 
2Kings25:2 Chutichuan lal Zedekia lal kum sawm leh kum khatna thlengin khua chu an hual a. 
2Kings25:3 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, lamho zinga mi anmahni zat theuh nupuiah an man a, an kal bopui ta a: tin, an ram lamah chuan an hawng a, khawpui chu an chei leh a, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
2Kings25:4 Tin, khawpui kulh chu an tipawp a, tichuan zanah indo mi zawng zawng chu lal huan bul, kulh bang pahnih inkara kulh kawngkaah an tlan che ta vek a: (Kaldai-ho chuan khua chu an hual vel a ni a:) tin, lal chu Araba kawng lamah a kal a." 
2Kings25:5 Nimahsela Kaldai sipaihote chuan lal chu an um a. Jeriko phaiah an um phak a, a sipai zawng zawngte chuan an tlan darhsan ta vek a." 
2Kings25:6 Tichuan lal chu an man a, Babulon lal hnenah Ribla khuaah an hruai a; tin, a chungchang an rel a." 
2Kings25:7 Tin, Zedekia fapate chu a mithmuh ngeiah an that a, Zedekia mitte chu an kher chauhsak a, kawl an bun a, Babulon-ah an kalpui ta a." 
2Kings25:8 Tichuan babulon lal, lal Nebukadnezzara lal kum kuana, thla ngana,, ni sarih ni chuan Babulon lal mi vengtu pawl hotu, Nebuzaradana chu Jerusalem-ah a lut a;" 
2Kings25:9 LALPA in leh lal in chu a hal a: Jerusalem in zawng zawng, in ropui tak takte chu a hal a;" 
2Kings25:10 Tin, vengtu pawl hotu hnena awm Kaldai sipai zawng zawngte chuan Jerusalem vela kulh chu an tichim vek a." 
2Kings25:11 Tin, khawpui chhunga mi la awm, inpeho Babulon lal hnena inpe, mipui la awmte chu vengtu pawl hotu Nebuzaradana chuan salah a hruai vek a." 
2Kings25:12 Chu mi rama a rethei theite chuan grep hrui enkawltu atan leh lo nei mi atan an hnutchhiah a. 
2Kings25:13 Tin, LALPA ina dar ban te leh, LALPA ina hunchan le dar tuizem chu Kaldai-hote chuan an tike sawm vek a, a dar chu Babulon-ah an kalpui a." 
2Kings25:14 Tin, bel te, vut lawhna te, khawnvar puan chehna te, fiante leh dar bungbel zawng anwg, rawngbawlna'na an hmante chu an la a," 
2Kings25:15 tin, mei lakna te, mahun te nen; vengtu pawl hotu chuan rangkachaka siamte chu a rangkachak chu a la a, tangkaruaa siamte chu a tangka chu a la a." 
2Kings25:16 Solomonan LALPA in atan a siam ban pahnih leh dar tuizem leh a hun chhante chu; chung hmanrua zawng zawnga dar buk zat chu hriat rual ani lo. 
2Kings25:17 Ban pakhat san lam chu tawng sawm leh tawng riat a ni a, a chipah chuan darchhunbawk a awm a: chu mi chhun bawk san lam chu tawng thum a ni a; chhun zawk vel chuan tial chik chek le pomgranet a chuang a, dar vek a ni: chung ang bawk chuan ban pakhat pawh chu tial chik chek a ni." 
2Kings25:18 Tin, vengtu pawl htou chuan puithiam lal Seraia leh a dawttu puithiam Zepania leh kawngkhar vengtu pathum a man a:" 
2Kings25:19 tin, indo mite chunga hotu pakhat nen, lal hmel hmu pha thin khawpi hhunga la awm panga nen, mipite hming ziaktu sipai out lehkha ziaktu nen, khawpui chhunga la awm chu rama mi sawmruk nen khawpui chung ata a man bawk a." 
2Kings25:20 Tin, vengtu pawl hotu Nebuzaradana chuan a hruai a, Babulon lal hnenah Ribla khuaah a kalpui a." 
2Kings25:21 Tin, Babulon lal chuan Hamath ram, Ribla khuaah chuan a lo tihlum a. Chutichuan Juda chu a ram chung atanga sala hruai chauhin a lo awm ta a." 
2Kings25:22 Tin, Babulon Nebukadnezzaran Judai rama a hnutchiahte pawh chu a chungah chuan Sephana fa Ahikama fapa Gedalia chu awptuah a siam a." 
2Kings25:23 Tichuan sipai pawl hotu zawng zawng leh an hoten Babulon lalin Gedalia awptuah a siam tih an hriat chuan Mizpe khuaah Gedalia hnenah an kal a, chungte chu Nethania fapa Ismaela te, Karea fapa Johanana te, Netopha mi Tanhumetha fapa Seraia te, maaka mi fapa Jaazania te, an hote nen an ni." 
2Kings25:24 Tin, Gedalia chuan chu miteho leh, an hote hnenah chuan chhia a chham a, an hnenah, ""Kaldai-ho chhiah khuaa awm hi hlau suh u; he ramah hian awm reng mai ula, Babulon lal thu hnuaiah awm rawh u, tichuan in tan a tha dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
2Kings25:25 Nimahsela thla sarihnaah chuan heti hia ni a, lalthlah, Elisama fa, Nethania fapa Ismaela chu mi sawm hruaiin a kal a, Gedalia chuMizpe khuaa Judate leh Kaldai-ho a hnena awmte nen an bei a, an that ta vek a." 
2Kings25:26 Tichuan mi zawng zawng a lian a tein sipai hotute nen an chhuak a, Aigupta ramah an kal ta a: Kaldai-hote chu an hlau a ni." 
2Kings25:27 Tin, Juda lal Jehoiakina sala a tan kum sawmthum leh thla hnihna, ni sawmhnih leh ni sarih niin heti hi a ni a, Babulon lal Ezil-merodakan a lal tan kumin Juda lal Jehoiakina chu tan in ata a hruai chuak a," 
2Kings25:28 a hnenah tha takin thu a sawi a, Babulon-a lalho awm vete lalthutthleng chungah chuan a lalthutthleng chu a dah sang ta bik a." 
2Kings25:29 A tan in silhfente chu a thlak a, a dam chung zawng chuan a hnenah chaw a kil ve ta fo a.Tichuan a chawmna'n a hmu tawk tur lalin ni tin, a dam chhung zawng chuan chanvo a siamsak reng a." 
2Kings25:30 Tichuan a chawmna'n a hmu tawk tur lalin ni tin, a dam chhung zawng chuan chanvo a siamsak reng a."

1Chronicles1:2 Kenana, Mahahlalela, Jareda," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoka, Methusela, Lameka," 
1Chronicles1:4 Nova, Sema, hama, Japhetha te." 
1Chronicles1:5 Japhetha fapate chu Gomera te, Magoga te, Madaia te, Javana te, Tubala te, Meseka te, Tirasa te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:6 Tin, Gomera fapate chu Askenaza te, Diphatha te, Togarma te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:7 Tin, Javana fapate chu Elisa te, Tarsisa te, Kitima te, Rodanima te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:8 Hama fapate chu Kusa te, Mizraima te, Puta te, Kanaana te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:9 Tin, Kusa fapate chu Seba te, Havila te, Sabta te, Raama te, Sabteka te an ni. Tin, Raama fapate chu Seba te, Dedana te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:10 Tin, Kusan Nimroda a hring a; a ni chu leia mi chak huaisen lo awm tanna a ni." 
1Chronicles1:11 Tin, Mizraiman Ludima te, Anamima te, Lehabima te, Baphtuhima te," 
1Chronicles1:12 Pathrusima te, Kasluhima te, (chu mi lakah chuan Philistia-ho hi an lo chhuak a ni) Kaphtorima te a hring a." 
1Chronicles1:13 Tin, Kanaana chuan a fa tirah Zidona a hring a, tin, Hetha;" 
1Chronicles1:14 tin, Jebus-ho te, Amor-ho te, Girgas-ho te;" 
1Chronicles1:15 Hiv-ho te, Ark-ho te, Sin-ho te," 
1Chronicles1:16 Arvad-ho te, Zemar-ho te, Hamath-ho te." 
1Chronicles1:17 Sema fapate chu Elama te, Asura te, Arpaksada te, Luda te, Arama te, Uza te, Hula te, ethera te, Meseka te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:18 Tin, Arpaksada chuan Sela a hring a, tin, Sela chuan Ebera a hring a." 
1Chronicles1:19 Tin, Ebera lakah chuan fapa pahnih an piang a: pakhata hming chu Pelega a ni a; a dam laiin lei hi thena a awm avangin; a nau hming chu Joktana a ni a." 
1Chronicles1:20 Tin, Joktana chuan Almodada te, Selepha te, Hazarmavetha te, Jera te leh" 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadorama te, Uzala te, Dikla te leh" 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebala te, Abimaela te, Seba te leh" 
1Chronicles1:23 Ophira te, Havila te, Jobaba te a hring a. Chung zawng zawng chu Joktana thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ophira te, Havila te, Jobaba te a hring a. Chung zawng zawng chu Joktana thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles1:24 Sema te, Arpaksada te, Sela te;" 
1Chronicles1:25 Ebera te, Pelega te, Reuva te;" 
1Chronicles1:26 Seruga te, Nahora te, Tera te;" 
1Chronicles1:27 Abrama te (chu chu Abrahama a ni). 
1Chronicles1:28 Abrahama fapate chu Isaaka te, Ismaela te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:29 Henge hi an thlahte chu an ni: Ismaela fa tir chu Nebaiotha; tin, Kedara te, Adbeela te, Mibsama te," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misma te, Duma te, Masa te, Hadada te, Tema te," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetura te, Naphisa te, Kedema te, Chungte chu Ismaela thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles1:32 Joksana te, Medana te, Midiana te, Isbaka te, Sua te an ni. Tin, Joksana fapate chu Seba leh Dedana an ni." 
1Chronicles1:33 Tin, Midiana fapate chu Epha te, Ephera te, Hanoka te, Abida te, Elda te an ni. Chung zawng zawng chu Keturi thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahama'n Isaaka a hring a. Isaaka fapate chu Esauva leh Israela an ni. 
1Chronicles1:35 Esauva fapate chu Elophaza te, Reuela te, Jeusa te, Jalama te, Kora te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:36 Eliphaza fapate chu Temana te, Omara te, Zephia te, Gatama te, Kenaza te, Timna te, Amaleka te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reuela fapate chu Nahatha te, Zera te, Sama te, Miza te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:38 Tin, Seira fapate chu Lotana te, Sobala te, Zibeon te, Ana te, Disona te, Ezera te, Disana te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:39 Tin, Lotana fapate chu Horia leh Homama an ni a: tin, Lotana chuan farnu Timni a nei a." 
1Chronicles1:40 Sobala fapate chu Aliana te, Mahanatha te, Ebala te, Sephia te, Onama te an ni. Tin, Zibeona fapate chu Aia leh Ana an ni." 
1Chronicles1:41 Ana fapa chu Disona a ni. Tin, Disona fapate chu Hamrana te, Esbana te, Ithrana te, Kerana te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ezera fapate chu Bilhana te, Zaavana te, Jaakana te an ni. Disana fapate chu Uza leh Arana an ni." 
1Chronicles1:43 Israela thlahte chunga lal an la awm hmaa Edom ram lalte chu henge hi an ni: Beora fapa Bela a ni; a khawpui hming chu Dinhaba a ni. 
1Chronicles1:44 Tin, Bela chu a thi a, Bozra khuaa mi Zera fapa Jobaba a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:44 Tin, Bela chu a thi a, Bozra khuaa mi Zera fapa Jobaba a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:45 Tin, Jobaba chu a thi a, Teman-ho rama mi Husama a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:45 Tin, Jobaba chu a thi a, Teman-ho rama mi Husama a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:46 Tin, Husama chu a thi a, Bedada fapa Hadada, Moab phula Midian-ho thattu kha a aiah a lal ta a: a khawpui hming chu Avith a ni." 
1Chronicles1:47 Tin, Hadada chu a thi a, Masreka mi Samla a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:48 Tin, Samala chu at hi a, Luipui kama Rehoboth khua a mi Saula a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:49 Tin, Saula chu a thi a, Akbora fapa Baalhanana a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:50 Tin, Baal-hanana chu a thi a, Hadada a aiah a lal ta a; a khawpui hming chu Pai a ni: a nupui hming chu Mezahaba fa Matredi fanu Mehetabeli a ni." 
1Chronicles1:51 Tin, Hadada chu a thi a. Tin, Edom-ho hotute chu hotu Timana te, hotu Alia te, hotu Jethetha te;" 
1Chronicles1:52 hotu Oholibama te, hotu Ela te, hotu Pinona te;" 
1Chronicles1:53 hotu Kenaza te, hotu Temana te, hotu Mibzara te;hotu Magdiela te, hotu Irama te an ni. Chung chu Edom-ho hotute an ni." 
1Chronicles1:54 hotu Magdiela te, hotu Irama te an ni. Chung chu Edom-ho hotute an ni." 
1Chronicles2:1 Hengte hi Israela fapate chu an ni; Reubena, Simeona, Levia, Juda, Isakara, Zebuluna," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dana, Josefa, Benjamina, naphtalia, Gada, Asera." 
1Chronicles2:3 Juda fapate chu Era, Onana, Sela: chu mite pathum chu Kanaan mi Bathsuii laka piang an ni. Tin, Juda fa tir Era chu LALPA mithmuhin mi sual a ni a; tichuan a tihlum ta a." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tin, a monu Tamari chuan Pereza leh Zera a hrinsak a. Juda fapate zawng zawng chu panga an ni." 
1Chronicles2:5 Pereza fapate chu Jezrona leh Hamula an ni. 
1Chronicles2:6 Tin, Zera fapate chu Zimria te, Ethana te, Hemana te, Kalkola te, Dara te an ni: an vaiin panga an ni." 
1Chronicles2:7 Tin, Karmia fapa chu Akara, Israelte tibuaitu, thilhlan bawhchhetupa kha a ni." 
1Chronicles2:8 Tin, Ethana fapa chu Azaria a ni." 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezrona fapa te, a laka piangte chu Jerameela te, Rama te, Kelubaia te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:10 Tin, Raman Aminadaba ahring a; tin, Aminadaban Juda thlah mi lian Nasona a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:11 tin, Nasonan Salma a hring a, tin, Salman Boaza a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:12 tin, Boazan Obeda a hring a, tin, Obedan Jesaia a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:13 tin, Jesaian a fa tirah Eliaba a hring a, a apahnihna chu Abinadaba, a pathumna chu Simea," 
1Chronicles2:14 a palina chu Nethanela, a pangana chu Radaia," 
1Chronicles2:15 a parukna chu Ozema, a pasarihna chu Davida a ni:" 
1Chronicles2:16 tin, an farnute chu Zeruii leh Abigaili an ni. Tin, Zeruii fapate chu Abisaia te, Joaba te, Asahela te an ni a, pathum an ni." 
1Chronicles2:17 Tin, Abigailin Amasa a hring a: tin, Amasa pa chu Ismael mi Jethera a ni." 
1Chronicles2:18 Tin, Hezrona fapa Kaleban a nupui Azubi, Jeriotha fanu lakah chuan fate a hring a: tin, hengte hi a fapate chu an ni: Jesera, Sobaba, Ardona," 
1Chronicles2:19 Tin, Azubi chu a thi a, Kaleba chuan Ephrathi a nei a, ani chuan Hura a hrinsak a." 
1Chronicles2:20 Tin, Hura chuan Uria a hring a, Urian Bezalela a hring a." 
1Chronicles2:21 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan Hezrona chuan Gilead pa Makira fanu a pawl a; kum sawmruk a nihin chu mi chu a nei a; ani chuan Seguba a hrinsak a." 
1Chronicles2:22 Tin, Seguba chuan Jaira a hring a, ani chuan Gilead ramah khawpui sawmhnih leh pathum a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:23 Tin, Gesura leh Arama chuan jaira khawpui te, Kenath khua leh a khawperte nen, khaw sawmruk alaksak a. Chung zawng zawng chu Gileada pa Makira fapate chu an ni." 
1Chronicles2:24 Tin, Keleb-ephrath-a khua a Jezrona a thih hnu chuan Hezrona nupui Aibiji chuan Tekoa pa Asura a hrinsak a." 
1Chronicles2:25 Tin, Hezrona fa tir Jerameela fapa upa ber chu Rama ani a, tin, Buna te, Orena te, Ozema te, Ahija te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:26 Tin, Jerameela chuan nupui dang a nei a, a hming chu Atari a ni a, Onama nu a ni." 
1Chronicles2:27 Jerameela fapa upa ber Rama fapate chu maaza te, Jamina te, Ekera-te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:28 Tin, Onama fapate chu Samaia leh Jada an ni a; tin, Samaia fapa te chu nadaba leh Abisura an ni." 
1Chronicles2:29 Tin, Abisura nupuia hming chu Abihaili a ni; tin, ani chuan Abana leh Molida a hrinsak a." 
1Chronicles2:30 Tin, Nadaba fapate chu Seleda leh Apaima an ni; Seleda erawh chu fa nei loin a thi a." 
1Chronicles2:31 Tin, Apaima fapa chu Isia a ni a. Tin, Isia fapa chu Sesana a ni a. Tin, Sesana fapa chu Alaia a ni." 
1Chronicles2:32 Tin, Samaia unaupa Jada fapate chu Jethera leh Jonathana an ni: tin, Jethera chu fa nei loin a thi a." 
1Chronicles2:33 Tin, Jonathana fapate chu Peletha leh Zaza an ni. Chungte chu Jerameela thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesana chuan fanute tih loh chu fa a nei lo a. Tin, Sesana chuan Aigupta mi chhiahhlawh anei a, a hming chu Jara a ni." 
1Chronicles2:35 Tin, Sesana chuan a fanu chu a chhiahhlawh Jara chu nupuiah a neihtir a; tin, Ataia a hrinsak a." 
1Chronicles2:36 Tin, Ataia chuan nathana a hring a, tin, Nathana chuan Zabada a hring a," 
1Chronicles2:37 tin, Zabada chuan Ephlala a hring a, tin, Ephlala chuan Obeda ahring a," 
1Chronicles2:38 tin, Obeda chuan Jehua a hring a, tin, Jehua chuan Azaria ahing a." 
1Chronicles2:39 Tin, Azaria chuan Heleza a hring a, tin, Heleza chuan Eleasa a hring a," 
1Chronicles2:40 tin, Eleasa chuan Sismaia a hring a, tin, Sismaia chuan Saluma a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:41 tin, Saluma chuan Jekamia a hring a, tin, Jekamia chuan Elisama a hring a." 
1Chronicles2:42 Tin, Jerameela unaupa Keleba fa tir chu Zip-ho thlahtu Mesaka a ni:" 
1Chronicles2:43 Tin, Hebrona fapate chu Kora te, Tapua te, Rekema te, Sema te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:44 Tin, Seman Jorkeama pa Rahama a hring a; tin, Rekeman Samaia a hring a." 
1Chronicles2:45 Tin, Samaia fapa chu Maona a ni a; tin, Maona chu Beth-zura pa a ni." 
1Chronicles2:46 Tin, Kaleba hmei Ephi chuan Harana te, Moza te, Gazeza te a hring a tin, harana chuan Gazeza a hring a." 
1Chronicles2:47 Tin, Judaii fapate chu Regema te, Jethama te, Gesana te, Peleta te, Epha te, Saapha te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kaleba hmei Maakin Sebera leh Tirhana a hring a. 
1Chronicles2:49 Madmana pa Saapha leh Makbena leh Gibea pa Seva a hring bawk a; tin, Kaleba fanu chu Aksi a ni." 
1Chronicles2:50 Hengte hi Kaleba thlahte an ni: Hura fa, Kiriath-jeraim-ho thlahtu, Ephrathi fa tir Sobala," 
1Chronicles2:51 tin, Beth-lehem-ho thlahtu Salma, tin, Beth-gader-ho thlahtu Harepha te hi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Tin, Kiriath-jearim-ho thlahtu Sobala chuan Horoe-ho leh Menuhot-ho zatve a thlah a." 
1Chronicles2:53 Tin, Kiriath-jearim hnamte chu Ithra-ho te, Put-ho te, Sumat-ho te, Misra-ho te an ni; chungho atang chuan Zorat-ho te leh Estaol-ho te an lo chhuak a." 
1Chronicles2:54 Salma thlahte chu Beth-lehem-ho te, Netophat-ho te, Atrot-beth-joab-ho te, Manahat-ho zatve te, Zor-ho te an ni.Tin, Jabez-a awm lehkhaziaktu hnamte chu Tirat-ho te, Simeat-ho te, Sukat-ho te an ni. Chungte chu Rekaba thlahte zinga mi Hamatha thlah Ken-hote chu an ni." 
1Chronicles2:55 Tin, Jabez-a awm lehkhaziaktu hnamte chu Tirat-ho te, Simeat-ho te, Sukat-ho te an ni. Chungte chu Rekaba thlahte zinga mi Hamatha thlah Ken-hote chu an ni." 
1Chronicles3:1 Tichuan hengte hi Davida fapa, Hebron khuaa a hrinte chu an ni: a fa tir chu Jezreel khua Ahinoami laka mi Amnona a ni a; a dawttu chu Karmel khua Abigaili laka mi Daniela a ni a;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Tichuan hengte hi Davida fapa, Hebron khuaa a hrinte chu an ni: a fa tir chu Jezreel khua Ahinoami laka mi Amnona a ni a; a dawttu chu Karmel khua Abigaili laka mi Daniela a ni a;" 
1Chronicles3:2 a pathumna chu Gesur lal Talmaia fanu Maaki fapa Absaloma a ni a; a palina chu Hagithi fapa Adonija a ni a; 
1Chronicles3:3 a pangana chu Abitali laka mi Sepahtia a ni a; a parukna chu a nupui Egli laka mi Ithreama a ni a. 
1Chronicles3:4 Hebron khuaah chuan paruk ahring a; chutah chuan kum sarih leh thla ruk a lal a: tin, Jerusalem khuaah kum sawmthum leh kum thum a lal a." 
1Chronicles3:5 Tin, Jerusalem khuaa a hrinte chu Simea te, Sobaba te, Nathana te, Solomona te an ni a; an pali chuan Amiela fanu Bath-sui laka mi an ni." 
1Chronicles3:6 Tin, Ibhara te, Elisama te, Elipheleta te," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga te, Nephega te, Japhia te," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama te, Eliada te, Elipheleta te, pakua an ni." 
1Chronicles3:9 Chung zawng zawngte chu Davida fapate anni, hmei fate tiam loin; tin, Tamari chu an farnu a ni." 
1Chronicles3:10 Tin, Solomona fapa chu Rehoboama a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Abija a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Asa ani a, chu mi fapa chu Jehosaphata a ni a;" 
1Chronicles3:11 chu mi fapa chu Jorama a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Ahazia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Joasa ani a;" 
1Chronicles3:12 chu mi fapa chu Amazia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Azaria a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Jothama ani a;" 
1Chronicles3:13 chu mi fapa chu Ahaza a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Hezekia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Manasea a ni a;" 
1Chronicles3:14 chu mi fapa chu Amona a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Josia a ni a." 
1Chronicles3:15 Tin, Josia fapate chu a fa tir chu Johanana a ni a, a dawttu chu Jehoiakima a ni a, a pathumna chu Zedekia ani a, a palina chu Saluma a ni." 
1Chronicles3:16 Jehoiakima fapa Jekonia chu Zedekia pa a ni. 
1Chronicles3:17 Tin, sal tang Jekonia fapate chu Sealtiela te," 
1Chronicles3:18 malkirama te, Pedaia te, Senazara te, Jekamia te, Hosama te, Nedabia te an ni." 
1Chronicles3:19 Tin, Pedaia fapate chu Zerubabela leh Simeia an ni; tin, Zerubabela fapate chu Mesulama leh Hanania an ni a; tin, Selomithi chu an farnu a ni;" 
1Chronicles3:20 tin, Hasuba te, Ohela te, Berekia te, Hasadia te, Jusab-heseda te, panga an ni." 
1Chronicles3:21 Tin, Hanania fapa chu Pelatia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Jesaia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Rephaia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Arnana ani a, chu mi fapa chu Obadia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Sekania a ni." 
1Chronicles3:22 Tin, Sekania fapa chu Semaia a ni; tin, Semaia fapate chu Hatusa te, Igala te, Baria te, Nearia te, Saphata te an ni a, paruk an ni." 
1Chronicles3:23 Tin, Nearia fapate chu Elioenaia te, Hizkia te, Azrikama te an ni a, pathum an ni.Tin, Elioenaia fapate chu Hodavia te, Eliasiba te, Pelaia te, Akuba te, Johanana te, Delaia te, Anania te an ni a, pasarih an ni." 
1Chronicles3:24 Tin, Elioenaia fapate chu Hodavia te, Eliasiba te, Pelaia te, Akuba te, Johanana te, Delaia te, Anania te an ni a, pasarih an ni." 
1Chronicles4:1 Juda fapate chu Pereza te, Hezrona te, Karmia te, Hura te, Sobala te an ni." 
1Chronicles4:2 Tin, Sobala fapa Reaian Jahatha a hring a; tin, Jahathan Ahumaia leh Lahada a hring a, chung chu Zorat-ho hnamte an ni." 
1Chronicles4:3 Tin, Etama pa fapate chu Jezreela te, Isma te, Idbasa te an ni; tin, an farnu hming chu Hazelelponi a ni;" 
1Chronicles4:4 tin, Gedora pa Penuela leh Husa pa Ezera an ni. Chungte chu Bethlehema pa, Ephrathi fatir, Hura thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles4:5 Tin, Tekoa pa Asuran nupui pahnih Heli leh Nari a nei a." 
1Chronicles4:6 Tin, Nari chuan Ahuzama te, Hephera te, Temenia te, Hahastaria te a hrinsak a. Chungte chu Nari fapate an ni." 
1Chronicles4:7 Tin, Heli fapate chu Zeretha te, Izhara te, Ethnana te an ni." 
1Chronicles4:8 Tin, Hakozan Anuba te, Zobeba te, Haruma fapa Aharhel-ho thlahte a hring a." 
1Chronicles4:9 Tin, Jabeza chu a unaute aia mi zahawm a ni. A nu chuan, ""Lungngai chunga ka hrin a ni a,"" tiin a hmingah Jabeza a ti a ni." 
1Chronicles4:10 Tin, Jabeza chuan, ""Aw, mal mi sawm ngei ngei la, ka ramri hi mi zauh la, i kut chuan mi awmpuiin lungngaihna ka chungah a thlen lohna'n sual lak ata mi thiar fihlim ang che,"" tiin Israelte Pathian chu a au a. Tichuan Pathianin a thil dil chu a hlawhtlintir a." 
1Chronicles4:11 Tin, Suha unaupa Keluban Mehira a hring a, chu mi chu Estona pa a ni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Tin, Estona chuan Beth-rapha te, Pasea te, Ir-nahasa pa Tehina te a hring a. Chungte chu Reka-hote an ni." 
1Chronicles4:13 Tin, Kenaza fapate chu Othniela leh Seraia an ni a: tin, Othniela fapa chu Hathatha a ni." 
1Chronicles4:14 Tin, Meonothaian Ophra a hring a; tin, Seraian Geharasim-ho thlahtu Joaba a hring a: chu mite chu kut themthiam mi an ni." 
1Chronicles4:15 Tin, Jephunea fapa Kaleba fapate chu Irua te, Ela te, Naama te an ni a: tin, Ela fapa chu Kenaza a ni." 
1Chronicles4:16 Tin, Jehalela fapate chu Zipa te, Zipha te, Tiria te, Asarela te an ni." 
1Chronicles4:17 Tin, Ezra fapate chu Jethera te, Mereda te, Ephera te, Jalona te an ni; tin, Pharaoa fanu Bithiaii Mereda nupui fapate chu Miriama te, Samaia te, Estemoa pa Isba te an ni." 
1Chronicles4:17 Tin, Ezra fapate chu Jethera te, Mereda te, Ephera te, Jalona te an ni; tin, Pharaoa fanu Bithiaii Mereda nupui fapate chu Miriama te, Samaia te, Estemoa pa Isba te an ni." 
1Chronicles4:18 Tin, a nupui Juda hmeichhiain Gedora pa Jereda te, Sokoa pa Hebera te, Zanoa pa Jekuthiela te a hring a." 
1Chronicles4:19 Tin, Nahama farnu Hodia nupuia fapate chu Garm-ho thlahtu Keila pa leh Maakat-ho thlahtu Estemoa an ni." 
1Chronicles4:20 Tin, Simona fapate chu Amnona te, Rina te, Benhanana te, Tilona te an ni. Tin, Isia fapate chu Zohetha leh Ben-zohetha an ni." 
1Chronicles4:21 Juda fapa Sela fapate chu Leka pa Era te, Maresa pa Laada te, Asbea-ho puan zai sin siamtuhote an ni a;" 
1Chronicles4:22 tin, Jokima te, Kozeba-ho te, Joasa te, Sarapha, Moab rama rorela awma, chu mi hnua Jasubi-lehem-a awm taa te kha an ni." 
1Chronicles4:23 Chung thu ziak chu hmasanga mi a ni. Chungho chu bel vawtu, Netaim leh Gedera khuaa awm an ni a: lal hnenah a hna thawkin an awm a ni." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simeona fapate chu Nemuela te, Jamina te, Jariba te, Zera te, Saula te an ni;" 
1Chronicles4:25 Saula fapa chu Saluma a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Mibsama a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Misma a ni." 
1Chronicles4:26 Tin, Misma fapa chu Hamuela a ni a; chu mi fapa chu Zakura a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Simeia a ni." 
1Chronicles4:27 Tin, Simeia chuan fapa sawm leh paruk leh fanu paruk a nei a; a unaute erawh chuan fa an ngah ve lo a, Juda thlahte angin an thlahte pawh an pung ve lo." 
1Chronicles4:28 Beer-seba-ah te, Molada-ah te, Hazar-sual-ah te an awm a," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilha-ah te, Ezem-ah te, Tolad-ah te," 
1Chronicles4:30 Bethuel-ah te, Horma-ah te, Ziklag-ah te," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bethmarkaboth-ah te, Hazar-susim-ah te, Beth-biri-ah te, Saraim-ah te pawh. Chungte chu Davida lal thlenga an khawpuite chu a ni." 
1Chronicles4:32 Tin, an khua chu khaw nga, Etam te, Ain te, Rimon te, Token te, Asan te a ni:" 
1Chronicles4:33 tin, chu mi vela khaw te zawng zawng baal thlengin a ni. Chungte chu an chenna a ni a, an thlahtute thu ziakna an kawl bawk."

1Chronicles4:38 Chung an hming an lamte chu an chhungkaw puipate an ni a; an chhungkua chu nasa takin an lo pung ta a. 
1Chronicles4:39 Tin, Gedor luhnaah, ruam chhak lampang thlengin an ran rualte tlatna tur zawngin an kal a." 
1Chronicles4:40 Tin, ran tlatna hnim tui tak tak leh tha tak tak an hmu a, a ram chu a zauin a reh a, ralmuanawm tak a ni; a hmaa lo awmte chu Hama thalhte an ni a." 
1Chronicles4:41 Tichuan chung an hming an ziakate chu Judai ram lal Hezekia lal lai khan an lut a, an puan inte leh chutih laia Meunim-ho lo awm te chu an tiboral vek a, tun thlengin; an hmun chu an luahsak a; an ran rual tan tlatna a awm avangin." 
1Chronicles4:42 Tin, thenkhat Simeona fapateho, mi zanga lai Seir tlangah an kal a, an hotu atan Isia fapa Pelatia te, Nearia te, Rephaia te, Uziela te an hmang a.Tichuan Amalek-ho hnam tlan bo la awmte kha an hneh a, tun thlengin chutah chuan an awm ta a."

1Chronicles5:1 Israela fa tir Reubena fapate chu, (ani chu fa tir zawng a ni a; amaherawhchu a pa khum a tihbawlhlawh avangin a fa tir nihna chu Israela fapa Josefa fapate pek a ni a; tichuan thlahtute chhuina chu fa tir nihnaa chhui tur a ni ta lo." 
1Chronicles5:2 Juda chuan a unaute a khum ta si a, amahah chuan mi lian chu a lo chhuak a; fa tir nihna erawh chu Josefa chan a ni)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Israela fa tir Reubena fapate chu Hanoka te, Palua te, Hezrona te, Karmia te an ni." 
1Chronicles5:4 Joela fapa chu Semaia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Goga a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Simeia a ni a,"

1Chronicles5:5 chu mi fapa chu Mika ni a, chu mi fapa chu Reaia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Baala a ni," 
1Chronicles5:6 chu mi fapa chu Beera, Assuria lal Tilgathpileseran sala a hruai chu a ni: ani chu Reuben-ho mi lian a ni."

1Chronicles5:9 ani chuan chhak laman Euphrates lui atanga thlaler luhna thlengin a luah a ni: Gilead ramah chuan an ran a lo pun tak avangin 
1Chronicles5:10 Tin, Saula dam lai chuan Hagarho an run a, chungho chu an kutah an lo tlawm ta a: tichuan Gilead chhak lam ram tluanin an puan inte an zar a." 
1Chronicles5:11 Tin, Gada fapate chu an ep Basan raman Saleka thlengin an awm a:" 
1Chronicles5:12 hotu Joela te, a dawttu Saphama te, Janaia te, Basan-a mi Saphata te,"

1Chronicles5:13 an chhung te, an unau Mikaila te, Mesulama te, Seba te, Joraia te, Jakana te, Zia te, Ebera te nen pasarih an ni." 
1Chronicles5:14 Hengte hi Huria fapa Abihaila fapate an ni, chu mi chu Jaroa fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Gileada fapa ani a, chu mi chu Mikaila fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Jesisaia fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Jadoa fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Buza fapa a ni a;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahia chu Abdiela fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Gunia fapa a ni a, an chhung hotu a ni." 
1Chronicles5:16 Tichuan Gilead rama Basan-ah leh a khawpuiahte leh Saron daivel zawng zawng an ram chin thlengin an luah a. 
1Chronicles5:17 Chung zawng zawngte chu Judai ram lal Jothama lal lai leh Israel ram lal Jeroboama lal laia thlahtute chhuinaah ziak an ni. 
1Chronicles5:18 Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Manase hnam zatvete zinga huaisen tha thiau, phaw leh kawlhnam keng thei, thal kah thiam, indo thiamte chu 44,760 an ni." 
1Chronicles5:19 Tin, Hagar-hote, Jetur-hote, Nephis-ho te, Nodab-hote chu an do a." 
1Chronicles5:20 Tin, tanpuiin an awm a, tichuan Hagar-ho leh an hnena awm zawng zawngte chu an kutah pek an ni ta a: indo lai chuan Pathian an au a, anni chu a lo chhang a; amahah chuan rinna an nghah avangin." 
1Chronicles5:21 Tin, an rante an mansak a; an sanghawngsei singnga leh beram nuaihnih leh singnga leh sabengtung sanghnih leh mihring nuaikhat nen." 
1Chronicles5:22 Chu indo chu Pathian remtihpui a nih avangin mi tam tak an that a ni. Sal tan thlengin an awmna ram chu an luahsak ta reng a. 
1Chronicles5:23 Tin, Manasea thlah hnam zatvete chu, chu mi ramah chuan an awm a: Basan atana Baal-hermon te, Senir te, Hermon tlang thlengin an sawn zau zel a." 
1Chronicles5:24 Tin, hengte hi an chhungkaw puipate chu an ni; Hephera te, Isia te, Eliela te, Azriela te, Jeremia te, Hodavia te, Jadiela te, mi chak huaisen, mi hmingthang, an pute chhungkaw puipate chu." 
1Chronicles5:25 Tin, an pi leh pute Pathian chungah thil an tisual a, an hmaa Pathianin a lo tihboral tak, chu rama mi pathian te lakah chuan an uire ta a.Tin, Israelte Pathian chuan Assuria lal Pula rilru leh Assuria lal Tilgath-pilnesera rilru chu a chawk tho a, ani chuan Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Manase hnam zatvete chu a man a, Hala-ah te, Habor-ah te, Haraah te, Gozan luiah te a hruai a, tun thleng hian an la awm." 
1Chronicles5:26 Tin, Israelte Pathian chuan Assuria lal Pula rilru leh Assuria lal Tilgath-pilnesera rilru chu a chawk tho a, ani chuan Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Manase hnam zatvete chu a man a, Hala-ah te, Habor-ah te, Haraah te, Gozan luiah te a hruai a, tun thleng hian an la awm." 
1Chronicles6:1 Levia fapate chu Gersona te, Lohatha te, Meraria te an ni." 
1Chronicles6:2 Tin, Kohatha fapate chu Amrama te, Izhara te, Hebrona te, Uziela te an ni." 
1Chronicles6:3 Tin, Amrama thlahte chu Arona te, Mosia te, Miriami te an ni a. Tin, Arona fapate chu Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te an ni." 
1Chronicles6:4 Elazara chuan Phinehasa a hring a, Phinehasan Abisua a hring a;" 
1Chronicles6:5 tin, Abisuan Bukia a hring a, tin, Bukian Uzia a hring a;" 
1Chronicles6:6 tin, Uzian Zerahia a hring a, tin, Zerahian Meraotha a hring a;" 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiothan Amarai a hring a, tin, Amarian Ahituba a hring a;" 
1Chronicles6:8 tin, Ahituban Zadoka a hring a, tin, Zadokan Ahimaaza a hring a;" 
1Chronicles6:9 tin, Ahimaazan Azaria a hring a, tin, Azarian Johanana ah ring a," 
1Chronicles6:10 tin, Johananan Azaria a hring a, (chu mi chuan a ni, Jerusalema Solomona sak biak ina puithiam hna thawk ni:)" 
1Chronicles6:11 tin, Azarian Amaria a hring a, tin, Amarian Ahituba a hring a," 
1Chronicles6:12 tin, Ahituban Zadoka a hring a, tin, Zadokan Saluma a hring a;" 
1Chronicles6:13 tin, Saluman Hilkia a hring a, tin, Hilkian Azaria a hring a;" 
1Chronicles6:14 tin, Azarian Seraia a hring a, tin, Seraian Jehozadaka a hring a;" 
1Chronicles6:15 tin, LALPA'n Judai ram leh Jerusalem khua Nebukdanezzara kuta a pek lai khan Jehozadaka chu salah a tang ve a." 
1Chronicles6:16 Levia fapate chu Gersoma te, Kohatha te, Meraria te an ni." 
1Chronicles6:17 Tin, he'ng hi Gersoma fapate hming chu a ni: Libnia leh Simeia."

1Chronicles6:60 tin, Benjamin hmate zing ata Geba khua a daivelte nen, Anathoth khua a daivelte nen an pe a. An hnam zinga khawpui pek zawng zawng chu khaw sawm leh khaw thum a ni."

1Chronicles6:63 Meraria fapate chu an hnam kal dan ang zelin Reuben hnam chanpuala mi te, Gad hnam chanpuala mi te, Zebulun hnam chanpuala mi te, thumvawrin khaw sawm leh pahnih an pe a." 
1Chronicles6:64 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Levi-ho chite chu khawpuite leh a daivelte an pe a."

1Chronicles7:1 Isakara fapate chu Tola te, Pua te, Jasuba te, Simrona te an ni a, pali an ni." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tin, Tola fapate chu Uzia te, Rephaia te, Jeriela te, Jamaia te, Ibsama te, Samuela te an ni a, Tola thlahte chhungkaw puipa an ni: anmahni chhuana mi chak huaisen an ni a; Davida dam lai chuan singhnih leh sanghnih leh zaruk an ni." 
1Chronicles7:3 Tin, Uzia fapa chu Izrahia a ni a; tin, Izrahia fapate chu Mikaela te, Obadia te, Joela te, Isia te an ni a, panga an ni, an vaiin Puipa an ni." 
1Chronicles7:3 Tin, Uzia fapa chu Izrahia a ni a; tin, Izrahia fapate chu Mikaela te, Obadia te, Joela te, Isia te an ni a, panga an ni, an vaiin Puipa an ni." 
1Chronicles7:4 Tin, an chhungkaw chhiarnaa chhiar telte sipai 36,000 an awm bawk; nupui leh fapa tam tak nei an ni a." 
1Chronicles7:5 Tin, Isakar hnam zawng zawng chhiarnaa chhiar tel an unaute chu mi chak huaisen 87,000 an ni." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjamina fapate chu Bela te, Bekera te, Jediaela te an ni a, pathum an ni." 
1Chronicles7:7 Tin, Bela fapate chu Ezbona te, Uzia te, Uziela te, Jerimotha te, Iria te an ni a, panga an ni; chhungkaw puipa, mi chak huaisen an ni; thlahte chhiarnaa chhiarte chu 22,034 an ni." 
1Chronicles7:8 Tin, Bekera fapate chu Zemira te, Joasa te, Eliezera te, Elioenaia te, Omria te, Jeremotha te, Abija te, Anathotha te, Alemetha te an ni. Chung zawng zawng chu Bekera fapate an ni." 
1Chronicles7:9 Tin, anni chu thlahte chhiarnaa ziak dan chuan chhungkaw puipa, mi chak huaisen 20,200 an ni." 
1Chronicles7:10 Tin, Jediaela fapa chu Bilhana a ni a; tin, Bilhana fapate chu Jeusa te, Benjamina te, Ehuda te, Kenaana te, Zethana te, Tarsisa te, Ahisahara te an ni." 
1Chronicles7:11 Jediaela thlah zawng zawngte chu chhungkaw puipa mi chak huaisen, 17,200 an ni."

1Chronicles7:13 Naphtalia fapate chu Jaziela te, Gunia te, Jezera te, Saluma te an ni a, Bilhai fate an ni."

1Chronicles7:16 Tin, Makira nupui Maaki chuan fapa a hring a, a hmingah Peresa a sa a, tin, a unaupa hming chu Seresa a ni a; a fapate chu Ulama leh Rakema an ni." 
1Chronicles7:17 Tin, Ulama fapa chu Bedana a ni. Chungte chu Manasea thlah Makira fapa Gileada fapate chu an ni." 
1Chronicles7:18 Tin, a farnu Hamoleketin Isoda te, Abiezera te, mala te a hring a."
