1Chronicles28:3 Nimahsela Pathianin ka hnenah, 'Nang zawng indo mi, thisen chhuah mi i niha vangin ka hming atan i sa lo ang,' a ti a." 
1Chronicles28:4 Amaherawhchu LALPA, Israelte Pathianin ka pa chhungte zawng zawng zing ata Israelte lala kumkhuaa awm turin mi lo thlang ta a; Juda hnam chu puipa atan a lo thleng ta a; tin, Juda hnamte zingah ka pa chhung te; tin, ka pa fapate zing ata Israel zawng zawng lalah mi lo thlang chhuak ta bik a;" 
1Chronicles28:5 tin, ka fapa zawng zawngte zingah chuan (LALPA'n fapa tam tak mi pe a) Israaelte lal atan LALPA ram lalthutthlenga thu turin ka fapa Solomona hi a lo thlang ta a." 
1Chronicles28:6 Tichuan ka hnenah, 'I fapa Solomonan ka in lehka kawtlaite chu a din ang; ka fapa atan ka thlang tawh a, tichuan a pa ka ni ang." 
1Chronicles28:7 ka thupekte leh ka rorelte a pawm reng chuan - tunah in tih reng ang hian - a ram chu kumkhua atan ka tinghet ang,' a ti a." 
1Chronicles28:8 chutichuan LALPA mipui, Israel-ho zawng zawng mithmuhah leh ka Pathian hriata hian LALPA in Pathian thupek zawng zawngte hi pawm tur leh ngaihven turin ka fuih a che u; tichuan he ram tha tak hi in lua ang a, in hnua in thlahte kum khua atan in rochun chhawntir zel ang." 
1Chronicles28:9 Tin, nang ka fapa Solomon, i pa Pathian hi hria la, thinlung tha famkim leh rilru phur takin a rawng bawl ang che; LALPA chuan thinlung a en thin a, rilrua suangtuah zawng zawngte hi a hre vek a ni; amah i zawn chuan i hmu ang a, i hawisan erawh chuan kumkhuain a thlauhthla ang che." 
1Chronicles28:10 Fimkhur rawh khai; hmun thianghlim atana in sa turin LALPA'n a lo ruat tak che hi; hak takin awm la, bei rawh, a ti a." 
1Chronicles28:11 Chutichuan Davida chuan a fapa Solomona ch biak in hulhliap lem te, a in lem te, sum dah khawmna in lem te, a pindan chungnung lem te, a chhung pindam lem te, zahngaihna thutphah lem te," 
1Chronicles28:12 a rilrua a suangtua ang zawng zawng, LALPA in hungchhung kawtlai lem te, a vel pindan zawng zawng lem te, Pathian ina sum dah khawmna in lem te, thil serh dah khawmna in lem te chu a pe a;" 
1Chronicles28:13 puithiamte le Levi-hote a pawl pawla an awmna tur lem te, LALPA ina rawngbawlna lam tur zawng zawng lem te, LALPA ina rawngbawlna tur bungbel zawng zawng lem te pawh;" 
1Chronicles28:14 rawngbawlna lam atana bungbel chi tin, rangkachak bungbel tur, rangkachak hman zat tur te, rawngbawlna lam atana tangkaraw bungbel tur tangkaraw hman zat tur te," 
1Chronicles28:15 Rangkachak khawnvar dahna leh a khawnvar tur rangkachak hman zat tur te, khawnvar dahna leh a khawnvar tur zel atana hman zat tur te, khawnvar dahna hman tulna theu ang zela tangkaraw khawnvvar dahna tur zel atana hman zat turte nen;" 
1Chronicles28:16 chhang chiahna dawhkan tur, pakhat zela tana rangkachak hmanzat tur te, tangkaraw dawhkan atan tangkaraw hman zat tur te." 
1Chronicles28:17 Rangkachak hlir hlak sa thurna thir kawm te, maihun te, note nen; rangkachak berhbu tur, berhbu pakhat zel atana hman zat tur te, tangkaraw berhbu tur, berhbu pakhat zel atana hman zat tur te;" 
1Chronicles28:18 Rangkachak thianghlima siam, rimtui halna maichamtur te; cherub-te an thla zara LALPA thuthlunna bawm tuam chuanna lem ang siamna tur rangkachak te nen." 
1Chronicles28:19 Davida chuan, ""Hengte hi tih dan tur rem a ruat sa tichiang tura LALPA'n ama kut ngeia a ziak ang kha a ni,"" a ti a." 
1Chronicles28:20 Tin, Davida'n a fapa Solomona hnenah chuan, ""Chak tak leh huai takin awm la, bei rawh; hlau suh la, zam hek suh; LALPA Pathian, ka Pathian hi i hnenah a awm e; LALPA in lam hna zawng zawng hi peih vek a nih hma loh chuan a kalsanin a thlahthlam lo ang che.Tin, ngai teh, Pathian in hna tinreng thawktu pawl puithiamte leh Levi-hote na awm a, eng hna pawh kawng tinrenga hna thiam, chak tak theuha tanpuitu tur che i hnenah an awm zel ang; a hotute leh mipui zawng zawng pawhin i thupek apiang chu an zawm zel bawk ang,"" a ti a." 
1Chronicles28:21 Tin, ngai teh, Pathian in hna tinreng thawktu pawl puithiamte leh Levi-hote na awm a, eng hna pawh kawng tinrenga hna thiam, chak tak theuha tanpuitu tur che i hnenah an awm zel ang; a hotute leh mipui zawng zawng pawhin i thupek apiang chu an zawm zel bawk ang,"" a ti a." 
1Chronicles29:1 Tin, lal Davida'n mipui zawng anwg hnenah chuan, ""Pathian thlan chhuah ka fapa Solomona hi a la naupangin engmah a la hre rih lo a, a thawh tur lah chu a ropui si a; biak in chu mihring tan ani lo a, LALPA Pathian tan ani zawk si a." 
1Chronicles29:2 Tichuan ka Pathiain atan chuan rangkachak te, tangkaraw lam thil atan tangkarua te, dar lam thil atan dar te, thir lam thil atan thir te, thing lam thil atan thingte chu theihtawpin ka lo buatsaiht awh a; a zeh tur onuk lung te, lungmawi te, a bel tur lungmawi chi hrang hrang leh lunghlu chi tinreng leh sailungvar lung tam takte nen." 
1Chronicles29:3 chu chauh lo pawh chu ka Pathian in hi ka duhsak em em mai a, keima sum rangkachak leh tangkaruate pawh, in thianghlim atana ka lo buatsaih zawng zawng tiam lo hian, ka Pathian in atan ke pe a ni:" 
1Chronicles29:4 chu chu bangte luanna'n Ophir rangkachak, rangkachak talent sangthum leh tangkaraw thianghlim talen sangsarih;" 
1Chronicles29:5 hmanna kawn ghrang hranga mi thiamte hman turin rangkachak hmanna tura rangkachak te, tangkaraw hmanna tura tangkarua te a ni. Vawiin hian LALPA tana lawm taka pe phal tu nge awm le?' a ti a." 
1Chronicles29:6 Tichuan chhungkaw puipa te, Israel hnam hotu te, sang hotute leh za hotu te, lal hnathawkho hotute nen lawm takin an pe a;" 
1Chronicles29:7 tin, Pathian in sakna'n rangkachak talent sangnga leh darik sing khat, tangkarua talent singkhat leh dar talent singkhat leh sangriat, thir talent nuai khat an pe a." 
1Chronicles29:8 Tin, lunghlu neite chuan Gerson mi Jehielavawn LALPA sumah an dah a." 
1Chronicles29:9 Tichuan mipuite chu an hlim em me mai a, rilru hmun khat pua lawm taka LALPA an peka vangin; lal Davida pawh hlim namen lohin a hlim a." 
1Chronicles29:10 Chutichuan Davida'n mipi zawng zawng, hmaah chuan LALPA hnenah lawm thu a sawi a; ""Aw LALPA, kan pu Israela Pathian, chatuana fakin awm rawh." 
1Chronicles29:11 Aw LALPA, ropuina te, thiltihtheihna te, chawimawina te,hnehana te, lalna te hi i ta a ni a; lei leh vana awm zawng zawng hi i ta a ni si a; aw LALPA, ram chu i ta a ni a, mi zawng zawnga chungnung ber i ni." 
1Chronicles29:12 Hausakna leh chawimawina e hi i hnena mi a ni a, engkim chungah thu i nei a; tin, thiltihthiehna ikutah a awm a; i kutah hian mi zawng zawng tihropuina leh chaknana pek theihnaa wm." 
1Chronicles29:13 Chutichuan kan Pathian, lawmthu kan hril chia, i hming ropui hi kan fak e." 
1Chronicles29:14 Nimahsela tu nge maw ka nih,a ka mite phaw hi eng nge maw an nih a, hetiangte lawm taka kan lo hlan theih ni le? Thil zawng zawng hi i hnen atanga chhuak a ni a, i ta chu kan rawn pe leh mai che a ni si a." 
1Chronicles29:15 Kan pi leh pute ang khan keini zawng i hmaahhianmikhual, mi hnena khawsa ve mai ang kan ni a; leilunga dam chhung nite chu hlim ang chauh a ni a, beiseitur reng a awm lo." 
1Chronicles29:16 Aw LALPA kan Pathian, i hming thianghlim atana in ka saksakna tur chea he'ng thil kan lo buatsaihna zawng zawngte hi nangma kutchhuak a ni a, i ta vek a ni e." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ka Pathian, nangin thinlungte i fiah thin a, felna te i lawm thin tih ka hre bawk. Kei zawngin rilru tak takin hengthil zawng zawng hi lawm takin ka rawn hlan a, tin, heta i mite pawh lawm taka i hnena rawn hlantu ka hmuh hian ka lawm em em a ni." 
1Chronicles29:18 Aw LALPA, kan pu Abrahama te, Isaka te, Israela-te Pathian, i miten hetiang rilru an put reng theina turin an rilrute hi i tan tinghet la;" 
1Chronicles29:19 tin, ka fapa Solomona hi i thupek te, i thuhriattir te, i dan te zawm a, chung zawng zawng ti rute leh ka lo buatsaih lawk in sa tur hian rilru famkim han puttir ang che,"" Davida'n a ti a." 
1Chronicles29:20 Tin, Davida'n mipui zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""khai le, LALPA in Pathian chu fak rawh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan mipui zawng zawng chuan LALPA, an pi leh pute Pathian chu an fak a, an kun a, LALPA leh lal chu chibai an buk a." 
1Chronicles29:21 Tin, a tukah chuan LALPA hnenah inthawina'n leh LALPA hnena halral thilhlan atan bawngpa sangkhat leh berampa sangkhat leh beram no sangkhat, an in tur thilhlante nen Israel-ho zawng zawng atan inthawina tam tak an hlan a;" 
1Chronicles29:22 tichuan chu mi ni chuan LALPA hmaah hlim takin an ei a, an in hlawm a. Tin, Davida'n fapa Solomona chu lalah an siam nawn leh a, LALPA mi lian atan hriak an thih a, tin, Zadoka chu puithiam atan." 
1Chronicles29:23 Chutichuan Soilomona chu LALPA lalthutthlenga chuan a pa Davida aiah lalan a thu ta a, hmuingil takin a awm a; tin, Israel-ho zawng zawngin a thu an zawm a." 
1Chronicles29:24 Tin, hotu zawng zawng leh mi chak huaisente leh lal Davida fapa dang zawng zawngte chu lal Solomona lakah an intulut a." 
1Chronicles29:25 Tin, LALPA'n Solomona chu Israel-hoz awng zang mithmuhah nasa takin a tiropui a, Israel rama a hmaa lalte zinga tuma la chan ngai loh, lal nihna ropi tak a chantir a." 
1Chronicles29:26 Jesaia fapa Davida chu Israel-o zawng zawng chunga a lal a. 
1Chronicles29:27 Israelho chunga a lal chhung chu kum sawm li a ni; Hebraon khuaah kum sarih a lal a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum leh kum thum a lal a." 
1Chronicles29:28 Tin, upa tak, tarkuna damin, hausa tak leh chawimawi hlawhin a thi a; tin, afapa Solomona chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles29:29 Ngai teh, lal Davida chanchin chu a tir atanga a tawp thlengin Zawlnei Samuela lehkhabuah te, zawlnei Nathana lehkhabuah te, Zawlnei Gada lehkhabuah te a chuang a,a lal thu te, a thiltihtheihzia zawng zawng te, amah leh Israel-ho chung leh ram zawng zawng chunga thil lo awm dante nen." 
1Chronicles29:30 a lal thu te, a thiltihtheihzia zawng zawng te, amah leh Israel-ho chung leh ram zawng zawng chunga thil lo awm dante nen." 
2Chronicles1:1 Tin, Davida fapa Solomona chu a ram chhungah chuan tihchakin a awm a, LALPA a Pathian chu a hnenah a awm a, nasa takin a tiropui a." 
2Chronicles1:2 Tin, Solomona chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng, sipai sang hotu te, za hotu te, roreltu te, Israel ram zawng zawnga milian, chhungkaw puipa zawng zawngte chu a bia a." 
2Chronicles1:3 Chutichuan Solomona leh inkhawmho zawng zawngte chu Gibeon khuaa hmun sangahchuan an kal a; chutah chuan LALPA chiahhlawh Mosia'n thlalera a siam Pathian biakna buk kha a awm a ni. 
2Chronicles1:4 Pathian bawm erawh chu Davida'n a lo buatsaih tawhna hmunah Kiriath-jearim atangin Davida chuan a lo la chho tawh a; Jerusalem-ah a dahna tur puan in a lo zar sa taw reng a. 
2Chronicles1:5 Tin, Hura fa Uria fapa Bezalela siam dar maicham kha LALPA biakna buk bula chuan a awm bawk a; tin, Solomona lehmipuihote chuan an va pan a." 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomona chu ibiakna puan in bula dar maicham awmna LALPA hmaah chuan a han chho a, halral thilhlan sangkhat a han hlan a." 
2Chronicles1:7 Chu mi zan chuan Solomona hnenah Pathian a inlar a, a hnenah, ""Eng nge ka pek ang che mi dil rawh,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles1:8 Tin, Solomona Pathian hnenah, ""Ka pa Davida hnenah khan khawngaihna nasa tak i lantir a, a aiawhin lalah mi lo siam ta a." 
2Chronicles1:9 Tichuan aw LALPA Pathian, ka pa Davida hnena i thutiam kha tipuitling ang che; nangin vaivut zat zet mipuite lalah mi lo siam ta a." 
2Chronicles1:10 Tichuan he'ng mipuiho hmaa lut leh chhuaka ka awm theihna'n finna leh hriatna mi han pe ang che; i mi heti zozai hi tu nge rorelsak thei ang le? a ti a. 
2Chronicles1:11 Tin, Pathianin Solomona hnenah, ""Hetiang rilru i put a, sum leh pai te, hausakna te, chawimawina te, nangmah hawtu che nunna te dil lo a, damreina te pawh dil lo a, an chunga lala ka siamna che ka mite ro i relsak theihna tura finna leh hriatnate mi dil zawk avangin," 
2Chronicles1:12 finna leh hriatna chu pek i ni tawh e: tin, i hmaa lalte pawhin an la neih ngai loh, i hnu pawha an nei hauh loh tur sum leh pai te, hausakna te, chawimawina te ka pe bawk ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles1:13 Chutichuan Solomona chu hmun sang bula biak buk awmna Gibeon khuaa a zin chu Jerusalem-ah a haw a, Israel-te chungah ro a rel ta a." 
2Chronicles1:14 Tin, Solomona chuan tawlailirte leh sakawr chungchuang mite a khawm chiam a; tawlailir sangkhat leh zali leh sakawr chung chuang mi singkhat leh sanghnih a nei a, chung chu tawlailir dahna khuaah te, Jerusalem khuaa lal awmnaahte chuan a dah a." 
2Chronicles1:15 Tin, lal chuan Jerusalem khuaah chuan rangkachak leh tangkaruate chu lung ang maia ngaih khawpin a dah teuh a, sidar thingte chu phaia theipui thing ang leka ngaih khawpin a da bawk a." 
2Chronicles1:16 Tin, Solomona neih sakawr-te chu Aigupta ram ata rawn tawlh chhuah a ni a; lal sumdawngtute chuan chung chu a rual rualin an lo khar thin a, a ruala lei zel a ni.Aigupta rama mi tawlailirte chu tangkarua sekel zaruk zelin an tithleng thin a, tin, sakawrte chu tangkarua sekel za leh sawmnga zelin; chutiang bawk chuan Hit-ho lal zawng zawngte leh Suria lalte pawh an tihthlensak thin a ni." 
2Chronicles1:17 Aigupta rama mi tawlailirte chu tangkarua sekel zaruk zelin an tithleng thin a, tin, sakawrte chu tangkarua sekel za leh sawmnga zelin; chutiang bawk chuan Hit-ho lal zawng zawngte leh Suria lalte pawh an tihthlensak thin a ni." 
2Chronicles2:1 Tin, Solomonan LALPA hming atan in sak a tum a, lal in tur nen." 
2Chronicles2:2 Solomona chuan thil phur mi singsarih leh, tlanga thing kittu singriat leh anmahni vengtu sangthum leh zaruk a ruat a." 
2Chronicles2:3 Tin, Solomonan tura lal Hurama hnenah, ""Ka pa Davida thil i lo tihsak a, a awmna tur in sakna'n sidar te i lo thawh ang khan, min tihsak ve ta he." 
2Chronicles2:4 LALPA ka Pathian tan in sak ka tum ta a. Chu in chu rimtui hala LALPA biakna hmun, Israelte hnena tih tur thupek ding reng - chhangdah hlan te, chawlhni leh thla thar leh LALPA kan Pathian hminga kut ni tea zing leh tlaia halral thilhlan hlan rengna tur a ni ang. Hengte hi Israelte tana kumkhaw thuruat chu a ni e." 
2Chronicles2:5 Tin, ka in sak tum hi ropui tak tur a ni a, kan Pathian hi pathian zawng zawng aia ropui a ni si a." 
2Chronicles2:6 van zau tak pawha leng lo Pathian chu tuma'n in an saksak thei lo ang a. Kei tehlul hian rimtui hala amah biakna'n chauh lo chuan engtin nge in ka saksak theih ang le? 
2Chronicles2:7 Chutichuan Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a mi themthiamte ka pa Davida'n a lo rawih thin tuna ka hnena awmte zinga thawk ve tur hian mi pakhat, rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dar te, thir lam te khawih thei, puan senduk te, senlar te, dumpawl te siam thiam, ziak eng ang pawh thiam mi rawn tirh ang che." 
2Chronicles2:8 ,9 Lebanon-a mi sidar thing te, far thing te, algum thingte pawh mi han thawn ang che; i miten Lebanon-a thing kih an thiam hle tih ka hre si a; tichuan ngai teh, thing tam tak mi buatsaihsak turin ka mite chu i mite zingah tel ve rawh se; ka in sak tum hi in ropui tak tur a ni si a." 
2Chronicles2:9 ,8 Lebanon-a mi sidar thing te, far thing te, algum thingte pawh mi han thawn ang che; i miten Lebanon-a thing kih an thiam hle tih ka hre si a; tichuan ngai teh, thing tam tak mi buatsaihsak turin ka mite chu i mite zingah tel ve rawh se; ka in sak tum hi in ropui tak tur a ni si a." 
2Chronicles2:10 Tin, ngai teh, i mi, thing kittute chu chhangphut tehkhawng singhnih leh barli tehkhawng singhnih leh uain bath singhnih leh hriak bath singhnih ka pe ang e,"" tiin mi a tir a." 
2Chronicles2:11 Tichuan tura lal Hurama chuan, ""LALPA'n a mite a hmangaih avangin an lalah a siam che a nih hi,"" tiin Solomona chu lehkhain a chhang a." 
2Chronicles2:12 Hurama chuan, ""LALPA, Israelte Pathian, lei leh van siamtu, LALPA in leh lal in sa tura finna leh hriatna nei fapa fing tak lal Davida petu chu fakin awm rawh se." 
2Chronicles2:13 ,14 Mi themthiam, finna le hriatna nei, Dana thlaha mi hmeichhe pakhat fa, a hming Hurama ka rawn tir e, a pa chu tura khuaa mi, rangkachak lam te, tangkaraw lam te, dar lam te, thir lam te, lung lam te, thing lam te, puan senduk te, dumpawl te, puan zai sin te, senlar te deh thiam, ziak eng ang pawh thiam, thiam tinreng thiam a ni a; i mi themthiamho leh ka pu i pa Davida themthiamho zinga chuan a rawn thawk ve ang." 
2Chronicles2:14 ,13 Mi themthiam, finna le hriatna nei, Dana thlaha mi hmeichhe pakhat fa, a hming Hurama ka rawn tir e, a pa chu tura khuaa mi, rangkachak lam te, tangkaraw lam te, dar lam te, thir lam te, lung lam te, thing lam te, puan senduk te, dumpawl te, puan zai sin te, senlar te deh thiam, ziak eng ang pawh thiam, thiam tinreng thiam a ni a; i mi themthiamho leh ka pu i pa Davida themthiamho zinga chuan a rawn thawk ve ang." 
2Chronicles2:15 Chutichuan buh te, barli te, hriak te, uain thu te ka LALPA'n a sawi chu chhiahhlawhte chu rawn thawn ang hmiang," 
2Chronicles2:16 tichuan keinin Lebanon-a thing chu i duh zat zat kan lo kir ang a, tuifinriatah Jopa thlengin kan rawn tawlhsak ang chia; tin, nangin Jerusalem-ah i thiar cho dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles2:17 Tin, Solomona chuan Israel rama a pa Davida'n a lo chhiar tawh si a, hnam dang mi zawng zawng chu a chhiar a, 1,53,600 an ni a.Tin, thil phur mi 70,000 leh tlanga thingkittu 80,000 leh, mipuite thawh dan relbawlsaktu tur 3,600 a ruat a." 
2Chronicles2:18 Tin, thil phur mi 70,000 leh tlanga thingkittu 80,000 leh, mipuite thawh dan relbawlsaktu tur 3,600 a ruat a." 
2Chronicles3:1 Chutichuan Solomona chuan Jerusalem-ah, Moria tlang, a pa Davida hnena LALPA inlarna, Jebus mi Ornana hruihzawl, Davida'n hmun a lo buatsaihsaah chuan LALPA in chu a sa tan ta a." 
2Chronicles3:2 A lal kum li kum, thla hnihna, ni hnih niin a sa tan a." 
2Chronicles3:3 Pathian in sak dan tur Solomonan a han rel dan chu hetiang a ni. A dung lam chu tawng teh dan hluiin tawng sawmruk a ni a, a vang lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni." 
2Chronicles3:4 A hma lama hulhliap dung lam chu in vang lam chen bawk tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a san lam chu za leh sawmhnih a ni a; a chhung chu rangkachak hlir hlak tiin a luan a." 
2Chronicles3:5 Tin, pindan lian zawk bangah chuan far thing a bel a, chu chu rangkachak hlir hlak tiin a luan a, chutah chuan tum thing leh khaidiat lem a chuantir a." 
2Chronicles3:6 Tin, a timawi turin in chu lunghlutein a chei a; rangkachak chu Parvaim rangkachak a ni." 
2Chronicles3:7 In chu, kalkhang te, bang te, a chhuat te, a kawngkharte chu rangkachakin a chuantir a." 
2Chronicles3:8 Tin, hmun thianghlim ber a siam a; a dung lam chu in vang lam che bawk, tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a vang lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a; rangkachak hlir hlak tiin a luan a, talent zaruk a tling a." 
2Chronicles3:9 Tin, a kilhna rih lam chu rangkachak sekel sawmnga a ni. Tin, pindan chungnungte chu rangkachakin a luan a." 
2Chronicles3:10 Tin, hmun thianghlim berah chuan cherub lem panih a siam a; chung chu rangkachakin a luan a." 
2Chronicles3:11 Tin, cherub thlate chuan tawng sawmhni a awh a; cherub pakhat thla chu tawng nga a ni a, bang a va thleng a; tin, a thla lehlam pawh chu tawng nga bawk a ni a, cherub pakhat thla chu a va thleng a." 
2Chronicles3:12 Tin, cherub pakhat thla pawh chu tawng ngaa ni a,bang chu a va thleng a; a thla lehlam chu tawng nga bawk a ni a; cherub pakhat thla chu ava thleng a." 
2Chronicles3:13 Chung an thla an cherub-te chuan tawng sawmhnih awhin an thla an zar a, an ding a, in chung lam hawiin an ding a." 
2Chronicles3:14 Tin, puanzar tur a dumpawl te, a senduk te, a senlar te, la zai sin taktein a siam a, chuta chuan cherub lemte a chuantir a." 
2Chronicles3:15 Tin, a hma lama chuan tawng sawmthum leh tawng ngaa sang ban pahnih a phun a, chu mi chhip chu tawng nga ve ve a ni." 
2Chronicles3:16 Chu mi hmunah chuan khaidait a siam a, ban chipte chu a zem a; tin, pawmgranet za a siam a, khaidiatah chuan a khai a.Tin, biak in hma lama chuan bante chu a phun a, pakhat ding lamah, pakhat vei lamah; tin, ding lama mi chu Jakin a ti a, vei lama mi chu Boaz a ti a." 
2Chronicles3:17 Tin, biak in hma lama chuan bante chu a phun a, pakhat ding lamah, pakhat vei lamah; tin, ding lama mi chu Jakin a ti a, vei lama mi chu Boaz a ti a." 
2Chronicles4:1 Tin, dar maicham, a dung lam tawng sawmhnih, a vang lam tawng sawm hnih, a san la tawng sawm a siam bawk a." 
2Chronicles4:2 Dar zem bial lian pui, a tlang leh a tlang inkara tawng sawm tla, a san lam tawng nga a chung bawk a: a tlang chu tawng sawmthum bial vel a ni." 
2Chronicles4:3 A tlang hnuai chu kuhmum lemte hian a vel chuak a, tawng khatah sawm zel, dar zel vel chuan a awm a. Kuhmum lem chu tlar hnih a ni a, dar zema chun belhbawm a ni." 
2Chronicles4:4 Chu chu bawngpa sawm leh pahni chungah a innghat a, pathumin hmar lam an hawi a, pathumin thlang lam an hawi a, pathumin chhim lam an hawi a, pathumin chhak lam an hawi a; hnung lam an inchhawn theuh a," 
2Chronicles4:5 tuizem chu kutphah bawka chhah a ni a, tin, 1200 dawng a ni, a tlang chu no tlang ang, lili par anga siam a ni." 
2Chronicles4:6 Insilna tur maihun sawm a siam bawk a, ding lampangah panga a hung a, vei lampangah panga a hung a; chung hchu halral thillan silna tur a ni a; dar zem eraw chu puithiamte insilna tur a ni." 
2Chronicles4:7 Tin, a siam dan tura ruat angin rangkachak khawnvar dahna sawm chu a siam a, biak in chungah chuan ding lamah panga, vei lama panga a dah a." 
2Chronicles4:8 Dawhkan sawm a siam bawk a, biak in chungah chuan ding lamah panga, vei lama panga a dah a. Tin, rangkachak maihun za a siam a." 
2Chronicles4:9 Chung lo pawh chu kawtzawl puithiamho ta leh a pawn zawka kawtzawl zau a siam a, kawngkharpui a siam bawk a, darin a luan a." 
2Chronicles4:10 Tin, zem chu in ding lampangah chak lama chhim chhawngin a hung a." 
2Chronicles4:11 Tin, Hurama chuan bel te, vutlawhna te, maihunte a siam a. Chutichuan Pathian in atana lal Solomona a siamsak chu Hurama chuan a peih ta a;" 
2Chronicles4:12 ban pahnih te, bel anga bawk te, ban chhipa bel anga bawk pahnih te, ban chhipa bel anga bawk pahnih tuamna tial chik chek pahnih te," 
2Chronicles4:13 chu mi tuamna tial chik chek pahnih atana pawmgranet zali te, ban chhipa bel anga bawk pahnih tuamna tur tial chik chek ve ve atana pawmgranet tlar hnih te." 
2Chronicles4:14 Hunchhan te, hunchhan chunga belte pawh a siam a;" 
2Chronicles4:15 zem pakhat leh a hnuaia sebawngpa sawm leh pahnihte nen. 
2Chronicles4:16 Bel te, vutlawhna te, sathurna te leh a bungbel zawng zawngte pawh chu Hurama chuan LALPA in atan dar nawtleta lal Solomonaa siamsak a ni." 
2Chronicles4:17 Chungte hu Jordan phai zawla Sukoth le Zereda belei hmuna lal chuan a chhung a. 
2Chronicles4:18 Chutiang chuan Solomonan bungbel tam tak a siam a; dar chu buk sen rual a ni lo. 
2Chronicles4:19 Tin, Solomona chuan Pathian ina bungbel awm zawng zawng chu a siam a, rangkachak maicham te, chhang chhiahna dawhkan te;" 
2Chronicles4:20 ruat anga hmun thianghlim hmaa chhit tur khawnvar dahna te, a khawnvar chawpin, rangkachak hlir hlain a siam a;" 
2Chronicles4:21 tin, pangpar te, khawnvarte leh chaichehte chu rangkachak, rangkachak hlir hlakin a siam a;tin, khawnvar puan chehna te, maihun te, fian te, mei laknate chu rangkachak hlir hlak bawkin: tin, in chhung luhna, in chhung ril zawk hmun thianghlim ber kawngkharte leh a in, Biak in kawngkhar te chu rangkachakin a siam a." 
2Chronicles4:22 tin, khawnvar puan chehna te, maihun te, fian te, mei laknate chu rangkachak hlir hlak bawkin: tin, in chhung luhna, in chhung ril zawk hmun thianghlim ber kawngkharte leh a in, Biak in kawngkhar te chu rangkachakin a siam a." 
2Chronicles5:1 Tichuan Solomonan LALPA in atana a sak chu a peih ta vek a; tin, Solomona chuan a pa Davida'n thil alo hlan tawh zawng zawngte chu a la lut a; tangkarua te, rangkachak te, hmanrua zawng zawngte chu Pathian ina ro dahnaah a dah ta a." 
2Chronicles5:2 Chutichuan Solomona chuan Israel upaho te, an hnam puipa, Israela thlahho chhungkaw puipa zawng zawng chu, Davida khawpui Zion ata LALPA thuthlunna bawm zawn chho turin Jerusalem khuaah a khaw chiam a." 
2Chronicles5:3 Chutichuan Israel mi zawn zawngte chu thla sarihnaa kutah chuan lal hnenah an kal khawm chiam a. 
2Chronicles5:4 Tin, Israel upaho zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, Levi-hote chuan bawm chu an zawn a." 
2Chronicles5:5 Tin, LALPA bawm le, inbiakna puan in leh pua ina bungbel thianghlim zawng zawngte chu an zawn chho a; chungte chu puithiam Levi-hote chuan an zawn chho a." 
2Chronicles5:6 Tin, lal Solomona leh Israel-ho pungkhawm zawng zawng a hnena rawn inkhawmte chu bawm hmaah an awmho a, beram leh bawngpa sawi sen rual loh leh chhiar sen rual lohin an inthawi a." 
2Chronicles5:7 Tichuan puithiamte chuan LALPA thuthlunna bawm chu a awma tura an la lut a, in chhunga biakna hmun, hmun thianghlim berah, cherub-te thla hnuaiah chuan." 
2Chronicles5:8 Cherub-te chuan bawm awmna chung zawnah chuan an thla an zar reng a, cherub-te chuan bawm leh a zawnfungte chu an khuh vek a." 
2Chronicles5:9 Tin, a zawnfungte chu a sei khawp a, a zawnfung hmawrte chu biakn ahma, hmun thianghlim atang chuan a hmuh theih a; amaherawhchu pawn lamah zawng a lang lo: tun thleng hian huta chuan a la awm reng a ni." 
2Chronicles5:10 Aigupta ram ata an chhuah a, LALPA'n Israela thlahte hnana thu a thlun laia Mosia'n Horeb tlanga lungphek pahnih a dah chauh lo kha chu chu mi bawm chungah chuan engmah dang a awm lo." 
2Chronicles5:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, puithiamhote chu hmun thianghlim ata an lo chhuah veleh chuan, (puithiam awmho zawng zawngte chu an intithianghlim a, apawlin an insiam chuang lo a;" 
2Chronicles5:12 Levi-ho hla satu zawng zawngte pawh an zavaiin Asapha te, Hemana te, Jeduthuna te, an fapate leh an unaute nen, puan zai sina intuamin darbenthek te, perhkhuang te, tingtang te nen, maicham chak lampangah an ding a, an zingah chuan puithiam za leh sawmhnih tawtawrawt hamin an awm bawk a ni:)" 
2Chronicles5:13 heti hi a ni a, tawtawrawt hamtute le hla satuten LALPA fakna leh lawm thu sawi nana an tum rik chu ri khat ang maiin a hriat a; tawtawrawt leh darbenthek le thil tum rik nena an aw an han chauh a, ""Ani chu a tha si a, a ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dawn a ni,"" tiin Lalpa an han fak chuanin, Lalpa in chu chhumin a khat ta mup mup mai a,tichuan chhum avang haun puithiamte chuan rawng pawh an bawl thei ta lo hial a; LALPA ropuinain Pathian in chu a khat ta vek si a." 
2Chronicles5:14 tichuan chhum avang haun puithiamte chuan rawng pawh an bawl thei ta lo hial a; LALPA ropuinain Pathian in chu a khat ta vek si a. 
2Chronicles6:1 Chutichuan Solomonan thu a sawi a: LALPA'n, 'Thim chhah mupah chuan ka awm ang,' a ti tak a," 
2Chronicles6:2 nimahsela i chenna tur in, kumkhuaa i awmna tur chu ka lo saksak ta che a ni hi,"" tiin." 
2Chronicles6:3 Tin, lal chu a lehkhawi a, Israel-ho pungkhawm zawng zawngte chu mal a sawm a; Israel-ho pungkhawm zawng zawngte chu an ding thup a." 
2Chronicles6:4 Tin, ani chuan, ""LALPA, Israelte Pathian, ka pa Davida hnena ama ka ngeia," 
2Chronicles6:5 Aigupta ram ata ka mi Israelte ka hruai chhuah ni atangin Israel-ho hnam zinga khawii khua mah hi ka hming awmna tur in sakna'n ka la thlang ngai lo a; ka mi Israelte chunga hotu tur mi tumah ka la thlang ngai hek lo; 
2Chronicles6:6 amaherawhchu ka hming awmna turin Jerusalem hi ka lo thlang ta a, ka mi Israelte hotu atan Davida hi ka lo thlang ta a ni,' tia lo sawitu, ama kut ngeia rawn puitlintu hi fakin awm rawh se." 
2Chronicles6:7 Ka pa Davida khan Israelte Pathian, LALPA hming atan in sak a rilru thin a." 
2Chronicles6:8 Nimahsela LALPA'n ka pa Davida hnenah, 'Ka hming atan in sak i rilruk thin a, hetiang rilru i lo pu hi i titha e;" 
2Chronicles6:9 nimahsela nang zawngin in chu i sa lo ang a; i fapa, i thalbea la chhuak tura chuan ka hming atan in chu a la sa zawk ang,' a lo ti tawh a." 
2Chronicles6:10 Tin, LALPA'n a thu sawi chu a rawn hlen ta a; LALPA lo tiam tawh ang ngeiin ka pa Davida hmun chu ka lo luah a, Israel lalthutthlengah chuan ka lo thu a, Israelte Pathian, LALPA hming atan in chu ka lo sa ta a ni." 
2Chronicles6:11 Chutah chuan Israela thlahte hnana a lo thlun, LALPA thuthlunna bawm chu ka dah ta a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles6:12 Tin, LALPA maicham bulah Israel pungkhawm zawng awng hmuhah chuan a ding a, a ban a phar a," 
2Chronicles6:13 (Solomona dar dawhkan a sei lam tawng nga, a zau lam tawng nga, a san lam tawng thuma siam biak in kawtlai taka a hunah chuan a chuang a, Israel pungkhawm ho zawng awng hmaa chuan a thingthi a, van lam hawiin a ban a par a._" 
2Chronicles6:14 Aw LALPA, Israelte Pathian, lei leh vana nangmah ang reng Pathian an awm lo, an thinlung zawng zawng i kawng zawhtu i chiahhlawhte chunga chuan thuthlung hlenin i khawngaih thin a;" 
2Chronicles6:15 I chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnena i thutiam chu i hlen a; a ni, vawiin niah hian i kaa i lo sawi tawh chu i kutin i hlawhtlintir ta a." 
2Chronicles6:16 Chutichuan aw LALPA, Israelte Pathian, i chhiahlawh ka pa Davida hnena, 'I thlahte chu i awm anga awm ve tura an awm dana an fimkhur pawht chuan, ka mithmuha Israelte lalthutthlenga thu tur chu i hmai lo ang,' tia i lo tiam tak kha hlen ang che." 
2Chronicles6:17 Chutichuan LALPA, Israel Pathian, i chhiahhlawh Davida hnena i thu lo sawi chu hlawhtlintir ngei ang che." 
2Chronicles6:18 Amaherawhchu nang Pathian chu lei mihringte zinga i cheng tak meuh dawn em ni le? Ngai teh, van zau takah pawh i leng lo a ni a, he ka in sakah hian i va leng lo nasa lehzual awm em!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Nimahsela aw LALPA ka Pathian, i chhiahhlawhin a auhna che leh a tawngtaina hi ngaihthlaksakin, i chhiahhlawh tawngtaina leh dilna hi rawn ngaihsak ang che:" 
2Chronicles6:20 he mi hmun lam hawia i chhiahhlawhin a tawngtaina chu ngaithla a, 'Chutah chuan ka hming chu a awm ang,' i tihna hmun ngei, in lamah hian chhun leh zana i mit i len reng thin theihna turin." 
2Chronicles6:21 Tin, i chhiahhlawh leh i mi Israelte hian he mi hmun lam hawia an tawngtai hunin an dilnate lo ngaihthlaksak thin ang che, a ni, i chenna hmun vanan lo ngaithla la; tin, lo ngaithlain ngaidam ang che." 
2Chronicles6:22 Mi tupawhin a vengte hungah thil tisualin, chhechhamtir hial lo tul se la, he mi ina i maicham hmaah hian rawn chham se la," 
2Chronicles6:23 nangin vanan lo ngaithla la, che la, mi sual chu a suam mana thiam lo chantirin, mi fel chu a fel mana thiam chantirin i chiahhlawhte rorelsak ang che." 
2Chronicles6:24 I mi Israelte hian i chunga thil an tihsual avanga hmelmate laka an lo tlawm a, i lam an lo hawi leh a, i hming an tan a, he mi ina tawngtaia thil an rawn dil che chuan," 
2Chronicles6:25 nangin vanan lo ngaihthlaksak la, i mi Israelte sualna chu ngaidam la, anmahni leh an pi leh pute i pek ramah chuan hruai leh ang che." 
2Chronicles6:26 I chunga thil an tihsual avanga van a lo pin a, ruahte a lo sur loh a, he mi hmun lam hawia an tawngtaia i hming an tan a, anmahni i tihhreawm avanga an sualte an sim chuan," 
2Chronicles6:27 nangin vanan lo ngaithla la, an kalna tur kawng tha kawhhmuhin i chhiahhlawhte leh i mi Israelte sualna hi ngaidamin i mite an rochan atan i pek i ramah hian ruah han surtir ang che." 
2Chronicles6:28 Kan ramah hian tam te a lo tlak a, hrite a lo len a, rona emaw, tawihna emaw, khaukhuap emaw, pangang emaw a lo awm a, an hmelmaten an khuate an rawn hual a, hri engpawh, natna engpawh a lo thlen chuan," 
2Chronicles6:29 an hri vei emaw, an lungngaihna emaw hria apiangin, he in lam hawia ban phara mi mal emaw, Israel mipui hoin emaw tawngtaina leh dilna an rawn thlen chu" 
2Chronicles6:30 i awmna vanan lo ngaithla la, ngaidam la, mi tin, an awm dan ang theuh zelin hlawhtlintir ang che, an thilnung i hre theuh si a; (nangma chauh hi mihring fate thinlung hretu i ni si a;)" 
2Chronicles6:31 kan pi leh pute i pek rama an awm chung zawnga i kawng zawh theihna tura an tihna tur chein. 
2Chronicles6:32 Tin, i mi Israelte ni lo, hnam dang mi, i hming ropui tak leh i kut chak tak leh i ban phar avanga ram hla tak ata lo kal a, he mi in lam hawia an rawn tawngtai hunin" 
2Chronicles6:33 nangin i awmna vanan lo ngaithla la, hnamdangte pawh an koh dan che ang zelin an chunga ti ang che; tichuan i mi Israelte ang bawkin khawvela hnam tinin i hming an hria ang a, an tih ang chai, he in ka sak hian i hming apu tih an hre dawn nia." 
2Chronicles6:34 I miten an hmelmate chu i tirhna lam apianga an beihin i khawpui thlan leh i hming atana in ka lo sak lam hawia i hnena an tawngtai chuan," 
2Chronicles6:35 nangin an tawngtaina leh an dilna chu vanan lo ngaithla la, an thu-ah chuan pui zel ang che." 
2Chronicles6:36 I chunga an lo sual a, (tumah sual lo an awm si lo) an chunga i thinur a, hmelma kuta i pek a, ram hla takah emaw, hna deuhvah emaw sala an hruai emaw pawha," 
2Chronicles6:37 sala an ruaina rama an inngaihtuah chhuah a, an inchhir a,, 'Kan lo sual ta a, dik lo tak leh suahsualthlak takin thil kan lo ti ta a ni,' tia" 
2Chronicles6:38 an tana rama dilna an rawn thlen a, sala hruaituten an hruai an tanna rama an thinlung tak leh an rilru tak taka i lam an lo hawi a, an pi leh pute ram lam leh i khawpui thlan leh i hming atana ka in sak lam hawia i hnena an tawngtai chuan," 
2Chronicles6:39 an tawngtaina leh an dilna chu nangin i awmna vanan lo ngaithla la, an thu-ah chuan pui zel la, i chunga lo sual ta i mite chu ngaidam ang che." 
2Chronicles6:40 Aw ka Pathian, khawngaih takin i mit lo meng la, he hmuna tawngtainaah hian i beng lo chhi ang che." 
2Chronicles6:41 Aw LALPA Pathian, i awmna hmunah chuan cho rawh, nang leh i chakna bawm nen; aw LALPA Pathian, i puithiamte chu chhandamnain thuam la, i mi thianghlimte chu thatnain tihlim rawh.Aw LALPA Pathian, i hriak thiha hmel chu hawi kirtir suh la, i chhiahlawh Davida thil tha tihte chu hre reng ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles6:42 Aw LALPA Pathian, i hriak thiha hmel chu hawi kirtir suh la, i chhiahlawh Davida thil tha tihte chu hre reng ang che,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles7:1 Tin, Solomonan a han tawngtai zaw chuan van atangin mei a lo chuk a, halral thilhlan leh inthawinate chu a rawn kangral a a; tin, LALPA ropuinain in chu a lo khat ta a." 
2Chronicles7:2 LALPA ropuinain LALPA in chu a tihkhah avangin LALPA inah chuan puithiamte chu an lut thei ta lo a. 
2Chronicles7:3 Tin, Israela thlahte zawng zawng chuan van atanga mei lo chhuk leh in chunga LALPA ropuina chu an en reng a, lung rem chunga chuan hmaia lei siin an bawkkhup a, ""Ani chua tha si a, a ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dawna ni,"" tiin chibai an buk a, lawm thu an sawi a." 
2Chronicles7:4 Tichuan lal leh mipuite chuan LALPA hmaa inthawinate an hlan a. 
2Chronicles7:5 Lal Solomona chuan inthawina bawngpa singhnih leh sanghnih leh beram nuaikhat leh singhnih a hlan a. Chutiang chuan lal leh mipuite chuan Pathian in chu an hlan a. 
2Chronicles7:6 Tin, puithiamte chu an hmun theuhvah an ding a; tin, Levi-hote pawh chu LALPA hnena lawm thu sawina'na phuah, 'A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dawn a ni,' tia LALPA fakna'na Davida'n a hman thin, thil ri thei nena LALPA hla sain an ding bawk a; tin, puithiamte chuan tawtawrawt an ham a, Israel mi zawng zawng chu an ding thup a." 
2Chronicles7:7 Tin, Solomona chuan LALPA in hma zawna hungchung kawtlai tak chu a tithianghlim bawk a; chutah chuan halral thinhlan te, remna thilhlan thau te a hlan a; Solomona dar maicham siam chu halral thilhlan te, chhangphut thilhlan te, thau te hlanna'n a tet luattuk avangin." 
2Chronicles7:8 Chutichuan chu mi tum chuan Solomona leh Israel mi zawng zawng, mipi pungkhawm nasa tak chu Hamath kaw luhna atanga Aigupta ram lui thlenga mite nen ni sarih an kut a." 
2Chronicles7:9 Tin, ni riat ni chuan inkhawmna ropui tak an nei a; maicham lawmna atan ni sarih an awh a, kut ni atan ni sarih an awh a ni." 
2Chronicles7:10 Tin, thla sarihna, ni sawmhni leh ni thum ni chuan mipuite chu a tintir a, LALPA'n Davida leh Solomona leh a mi Israelte chunga a thatna a lantir avang chuan hlim tak leh lawm takin mite chu an in lamah an haw ta a." 
2Chronicles7:11 Chutiang chuan Solomona chuan LALPA in leh lal in chu a puitlin ta a; Solomona chuan a rilrua a tum ang takin LALPA in leh ama in chu tluang takin a puitlin ta a. 
2Chronicles7:12 Tin, zanah Solomona hnenah LALPA a rawn inlar a, a hnenah, ""I tawngtaina chu ka lo hria a, he hmun hi ka tana inthawina inah ka ruat tawh e." 
2Chronicles7:13 Vante ka khar a, ruahte a sur loh emaw, ka mite zinga hri ka lentir emaw a," 
2Chronicles7:14 ka hming pu ka mite chuan inngaitlawma an tawngtai a, min zawn a, an awm dan sualte an hawisan chuan, van atangin ka lo ngaithla ang a, an sualte ka ngaidam ang a, an ram chu ka tidam leh ang." 
2Chronicles7:15 He hmuna tawngtainaah hian ka mit ke len ang a, ka beng ka chhi ang." 
2Chronicles7:16 Chutah chuan ka hming kumkhuaa a awm theihna'n he in hi ka ruat a, ka tithianghlim tawh a ni: chutah chuan ka mit leh ka thinlung a awm kumkhua tawh ang." 
2Chronicles7:17 Tin, nanga chungchang thu-ah pawh, i pa Davida anga ka mithmuha i awm a, thu ka pek ang zel chea i awm a, ka thuruatte leh ka rorelte i pawm chuan," 
2Chronicles7:18 Israelte zingah roreltu i hmai lo ang,' tia i pa Davida hnena thu ka thlun ang khan i ram lalthutthleng ka tinghet ang." 
2Chronicles7:19 Amaherawhchu in hmaa ka zam, ka dante leh ka thupekte i hawisan a, pathian dangte rawng in bawl a, in biak chuan," 
2Chronicles7:20 anmahni ka pek a ram ata hi ka tiboral hlauh vang a; tin, he in ka hming atana ka tihthianghlim tawh sa hi ka mithmuh phak loa ka sawn bo daih ang a, hnam tin, zinga tihelna leh a chhe lama tehkhinnaah ka siam ang." 
2Chronicles7:21 Tin, he in sang tak hi a kianga kal apiangin mak an ti ang a, 'Engati nge he ram leh he in hi LALPA'n hetianga a tih?' an ti ang a.Tin, 'LALPA, an pi leh pute Pathian, Aigupta ram ata hruai chuaktu chu an hawisan a, pathian dangte an vuan a, an bia a, an rawngte an bawl tak avangin he chhiatna zawng zawng hi an chungah a thlentir a nih hi,' an la ti ang,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles7:22 Tin, 'LALPA, an pi leh pute Pathian, Aigupta ram ata hruai chuaktu chu an hawisan a, pathian dangte an vuan a, an bia a, an rawngte an bawl tak avangin he chhiatna zawng zawng hi an chungah a thlentir a nih hi,' an la ti ang,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles8:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan LALPA in le ama in a sak chhung kum sawmnih a lo vei chuan," 
2Chronicles8:2 Huraman Solomona khua a pekte chu Solomona chuan a din a, Israela thlahte a awmtir a." 
2Chronicles8:3 Tin, Solomona chuan Hamath-zoba a bei a, a hneh a." 
2Chronicles8:4 Tin, thlalera Tadmor a din a, Hamatha-a bungraw dahna khuate nen." 
2Chronicles8:5 Tin, Beth-horon chhakta zawk leh thlangta zawk pawh, kulh te, kawngkhar te, a kalhnate neiin a din bawk a;" 
2Chronicles8:6 tin, Baalath khua te, a bungraw dahna khua zawng zawng te, a tawlailir dana khua te, a sakawr chung chuang mite awmna khua te, Jerusalem le Lebanon leh a ram chung zawng zawngah Solomona chuan a duh ang angin a din a." 
2Chronicles8:7 ,8 Tin, Israela thlahte ni ve lo, Hit-ho te, Jebus-ho te thlah, Israela thlahten an tiboral loh, chu rama la awmte chu Solomonan chiahlawh hnathawka rawih luih pawlah a siam a, tun thleng hian." 
2Chronicles8:8 ,7 Tin, Israela thlahte ni ve lo, Hit-ho te, Jebus-ho te thlah, Israela thlahten an tiboral loh, chu rama la awmte chu Solomonan chiahlawh hnathawka rawih luih pawlah a siam a, tun thleng hian." 
2Chronicles8:9 Israela thlahte erawh chu Solomonan a hnathawktu chhiahlawh atan a siam ve lo a, indo mi te, a sipai hotu te, puipa te, a tawlailir leh a sakawr chung chuang mi hotute an ni zawk a." 
2Chronicles8:10 Chungte chu mipuite ho thintu, Solomona puipa berte an ni a, zahnih leh sawmnga an ni." 
2Chronicles8:11 Tin, Solomona chuan Pharaoa fanu chu Davida khawpui ata a puala in a saksakah huan a hruai chho a, ""Ka nupui chu Israel lal Davida inah chuan a awm tur a ni lo, LALPA bawm lo thlenna hmun thianghlim a ni,"" a ti a ni." 
2Chronicles8:12 Chutichuan Solomona chuan hulhliap hma lama a siam LALPA maichamah chuan Mosia thupek angin," 
2Chronicles8:13 ni tin, atana bituk tawk ang zelin chawlhniah te, thla thar niah te, kut bi nei, kum khatah vawi thum chang dawidim telh loh kutah te, chawlhkar kutah te, bawkte kutah te halral thilhlante a hlan a." 
2Chronicles8:14 Tin, a pa Davida lo ruat ang khan puithiam pawlte leh Levi-hote chu an chanpual theuhaha ni tina thawh tul ang zela fak tur te, puithiamte hmaa rawngbawl tur tein a ruat a;tin, kawngkhar tinah a pawl pawla vengtute a ruat bawk a; chutiang chuan Pathian mi Davida chuan a lo ruat a ni." 
2Chronicles8:15 Lalin puithiam-ho te, Levi-ho te thu a pek chu eng kawnga mah, sum thu-ah te pawh an ngaihthah ngai hauh lo." 
2Chronicles8:16 Tin, LALPA in an din tantirh atanga an peih thlengin Solomona lo buatsaih ang chiah a ni. Tichuan LALPA in chu puitlin a ni taa." 
2Chronicles8:17 Chutichuan Solomona chu Edom rama tuifinriat kama Ezon-geber-ah leh Eloth-ah a kal a.Tin, Hurama chuan a chiahhlawh tuifinriata che thang mi, lawngte nen a kaltir a; Solomona chiahhlawhte nen Ophir-ah an kal a, chuta mi chu rangkachak talent zaali leh sawmnga an rawn hawn a, lal Solomona hnenah an rawn thlen a." 
2Chronicles8:18 Tin, Hurama chuan a chiahhlawh tuifinriata che thang mi, lawngte nen a kaltir a; Solomona chiahhlawhte nen Ophir-ah an kal a, chuta mi chu rangkachak talent zaali leh sawmnga an rawn hawn a, lal Solomona hnenah an rawn thlen a." 
2Chronicles9:1 Tin, Solomona hmingthanzia Seba lalnuin a lo hriat chuan Solomona chu thu khirh tak taka fiah tumin hnung zuitu tam tak hruaiin sanghawngseitea englo rimtuite leh rangkachak tam tak leh lunghlute phurin Jerusalem-ah a han kal a; tin, Solomona hnen a han thlen chuan, a rilrua awm zawng zawng chu phawrh fai vekin a bi a." 
2Chronicles9:2 Tin, Solomona chuan a thu zawzawng awng chu a chhang vek a; Solomona chuan a chan theih loh reng reng a awm lo a." 
2Chronicles9:3 Mi inawmpawlhho leh sumdawnghote rawn lak luh tiam hauh lohin Solomona hnena kum khat chhunga rangkachak lo lut rih lam chu rangkachak talen zaruk leh sawmruk leh paruk buk a ni. 
2Chronicles9:4 Tin, Arabia lal zawng zawngte lehram awptute chuan Solomona hnenah rangkachak te, tangkarua te an rawn la thin a." 
2Chronicles9:5 Lal hnenah chuan, ""I thiltihte leh i finzia thuthang ka rama ka lo hriat chu a dik ngei a lo nih hi le." 
2Chronicles9:6 Nimahsela, keima mit ngeia ka rawn hmuh hma loh chuan an sawi mai chu ka awi thin lo a, ngai teh, i finna ropuizia zatve pawh min lo hrilh hlei nem le: i hmingthan ka lo hriat dan chu i khum daih mai a." 
2Chronicles9:7 I mite chu an va nihlawhin, he'ng i chiahhlawh i bula awm foa i finna thu ngaithla fo thinte hi an va nihlawh em!" 
2Chronicles9:8 LALPA i Pathian, i chunga lawm, a lal atana a lalthutthlenga thuttirtu che LALPA i Pathian chu fakin awm raw se; i Pathianin Israel-ho hi kumkhuaa tihngheh atan a hmangaih a, chuvangin fel taka rorel turin an lalah a siam che a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles9:9 Chutichuan lal chu rangkachak talent za leh sawmhnih le englo rimtui tam tak mai leh lunghlute a pe a, Seba lalnun lal Solomona englo rimtui a pek ang reng reng hi a awm lo." 
2Chronicles9:10 Tin, Solomona chhiahhlawhte leh Hurama chhiahhlawh te, Ophir atanga rangkachak va phurte pawh chuan algum thing leh lunghlute an rawn phur a." 
2Chronicles9:11 Tin, lal chuan alfum thing chu LALPA in leh lal in hungna'n leh hla satute tana tingtang leh perhkhuangah a siam a: chutiang chu Judai ramah tun hma lam chuan an la hmu ngai lo." 
2Chronicles9:12 Tin, Seba lalnuin thil a pek tiam loin lal Solomona chuan a duh apiang a pe bawk a. Chutichuan a ram lama a hote nen an haw leh ta a." 
2Chronicles9:13 Mi inawmpawlhho leh sumdawnghote rawn lak luhtiam hauh loin Solomona hnena kum khat chhunga rangkachak lo lut rih lam chu rangkachak talen zaruk leh sawmruk leh paruk buk a ni. 
2Chronicles9:14 Tin, Arabia lal zawng zawngte lehram awptute chuan Solomona hnenah rangkachak te, tangkarua te an rawn la thin a." 
2Chronicles9:15 Tin, lal Solomona chuan rangkachak den phekin phaw lian mi zahnih a siam a: phaw lian pakhatin rangkachak sekel zaruh a duh a." 
2Chronicles9:16 Tin, rangkachak den phekin phaw zathum a siam a; phaw pakhatin rangkachak sekel zathum a duh a; chung chu Lebanon ngawpui inah chuan a dah a." 
2Chronicles9:17 Tin, lal chuan saingho lalthutthleng ropui tak a siam bawk a, rangkachak hlir hlakin a luan a." 
2Chronicles9:18 lalthutthlengah chuan a kai chhohna rahka paruk te, lalthutthleng nena zawmk, rangkachak te, nghahchhan te, thutthleng sir tuaka ban nghahna te, a ban nghahna bula ding sakeibaknei lem pahnihte a awm a." 
2Chronicles9:19 Tin, rahka paruk sir tuak chungah chuan sakeibaknei sawm leh pahnih a ding a; chutiang chu khawii ramah mah an siam ngai lo." 
2Chronicles9:20 Lal Solomona no zawng anwg chu rangkachak vek a ni a, tin, Lebanon ngawpui ina bungbel zawng zawngte pawh rangkachak hlir hlak vek a ni a; Solomona dam lai chuan tangkarua chu engah mah an ngai lo." 
2Chronicles9:21 Lal chuan lawng rual, Hurama chhiahhlawhte Tarsis-a kal thin kawppui a nei a, kum thum dan zelah Tarsis lawng rual chuan rangkachak te, tangkarua te, saingho te, zawng te, arawn te arawn phur thin a." 
2Chronicles9:22 Chutichuan lal Solomona chuan khawvel lal zawng zawngte chu hausakah leh finah a khum vek a ni. 
2Chronicles9:23 Tichuan Pathianin a thinlunga a dah, a finna thu chu ngaithla turin khawvel lal zawng zawngte chuan Solomona chu an rawn pan huai huai thin a." 
2Chronicles9:24 Tin, kum tin pek bi neiin tangkaraw bungbel te, rangkachak bungbel te, puan te, ralthuam te, englo rimtui te, sakawr te, sabengtungte an rawn pe theuh thin a." 
2Chronicles9:25 Tin, Solomona chuan sakawr leh tawlailir dahna hmun sangli a nei a, tin, sakawr chungchuang mi singkhat leh sanghnih a nei a, chungte chu tawlailir dahna khuaah te, Jerusalema lal hnenah te a awmtir a." 
2Chronicles9:26 Tin, Lui atanga Philistia ram leh Aigupta ram thlenga lal zawng zawng chungah a lal a." 
2Chronicles9:27 Tin, lal chuan Jerusalem khuaah chuan a tam em avangin tangkaruate chu lung ang maia ngaih khawpin a awmtir a, sidar thingte chu phaia theipui thing ang leka ngaih khawpin a awmtir a." 
2Chronicles9:28 Tin, Solomona tan sakawrte Aigupta atangte leh ram tin, atangtein an rawn la thin a." 
2Chronicles9:29 Solomona chanchin dangte chu a bul atanga a tawp thlengin zawlnei Nathana ziak chanchin buah te, Silo mi Ahija hrilhlawkna buah te, Nebata fapa Jeroboama chungchang thua zawlnei Idova inlarna buahte a chuang lo em ni?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Tin, Solomona chu Jerusalem-ah Israel mi zawng zawng chungah kum sawmli a lal a.Tin, Solomona chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, a pa Davida khuaah an phum a, a aiah a fapa Rehoboama a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles9:31 Tin, Solomona chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, a pa Davida khuaah an phum a, a aiah a fapa Rehoboama a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles10:1 Tin, Rehoboama chu Sekem khuaah a kal a; Israel-ho zawng zawng chu Sekem khuaah lala siam turin an kal tawh si a." 
2Chronicles10:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Nebata fapa Jeroboaman chu mi thu chu a lo hriat chuan (lal Solomona hnen ata a tlan bona Aigupta rama la awm a ni si a) Aigupta ram ata Jeroboama chu a lo haw leh a." 
2Chronicles10:3 Mi an tir a, an zu ko a; tichuan Jeroboama leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, Rehoboama hnenah chuan," 
2Chronicles10:4 I pa khan kan nghawngkawl a tirit em thin a; chuvangin i pain min chhawr rimna leh a nghawngkawl rit tak kan chunga a nghah hi min tihzansak la, tichuan i rawng kan bawl ang,"" tiin an sawi a." 
2Chronicles10:5 Tin, ani chuan an hnenah, ""Ni thum hnuah lo kal leh zawk rawh u,"" a ti a. Tichuan mipuite chu an kal kiang ta rih a." 
2Chronicles10:6 Tin, lal Rehoboama chuan, ""Heng mipuite chhanna tur hian rem eng nge min ruatpui dawn le?"" tiin a pa Solomona dam laia a bula awm thin upahote chu a rawn a." 
2Chronicles10:7 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Heng mipuite hi i khawngaih a, i tihlawm a, an hnena thu tha tak takte i sawi chuan kumkhuain i mite an ni ang,"" tiin an sawi a." 
2Chronicles10:8 Nimahsela upaho remruatpui chu a apwm lo a, ama rualpui tlangvalho, a bula awm thinte chu a rawn ta zawk a." 
2Chronicles10:9 An hnenah chuan, ""Heng mipuiho, ka hnena, 'I pan kan chunga nghawngkawl a nghah hi min tihzansak rawh,' tia sawitute hi ka chan dan tur rem eng nge mi ruatpui le?"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles10:10 Tin, a rualpui tlangvalhote chuan a hnenah, ""Heng mipuiho, 'I pa khan kan nghawngkawl a tirit em thin a, nang chuan min tihzansak rawh khai,' i hnena titute hnenah chuan hetiang hian ti la, hetiang hian an hnenah sawi ang che, 'Ka pa kawng ai chuan ka zungte hia lian zawk a," 
2Chronicles10:11 Ka pa khan nghawngkawl rit tak a lo bahtir che u a, kei chuan in nghawngkawl chu ka belhchhah dawn a sin: ka pan vuaknain a hring thin che u a, kei erawh chuan khawmual- kaikuangin ka hring dawn che u a ni." 
2Chronicles10:12 Chutichuan Jeroboama leh mipuiho zawng zawng chu lalin, ""Ni thum chinah lo kal leh ang che u,"" tia a hrilh ang khan a ni thum ni chuan Rehoboama hnenah chuan an va kal a." 
2Chronicles10:13 Lal chuan chang takin alo chhang hlawm a, lal Rehoboama chuan upahote remruatpui kha a pawm lo a," 
2Chronicles10:14 tlangvalhote remruatpui ang khan, ""Ka pan in nghawngkawl a lo tirit a, keiin chu chu ka belhchhah zawk dawn a ni; ka pan vuaknain a lo hring thin che u a, kei erawh chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hring dawn che u a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles10:15 Chutichuan lal chuan mipuite thu sawi kha a pawm ta lo va: chu chu Pathian vang a ni, LALPA'n Silo mi Ahija hmanga, Nebata fapa Jeroboama hnena a thu lo sawi tawh kha a tihngheh theihna'n." 
2Chronicles10:16 tin, lain an thu a pawm lo tih Israel-ho zawng zawngten an hriatin mipuite chuan, ""Davida ah chuan chanvo enge kan neih le"" Lesaia fapaah chuan roluah tur kan nei hek lo: Israel mite u, in puan in lamah haw theuh rawh u: David, i chhungkua ngaihtuah mai rawh,"" tiin lal chu an chhang a. Chutichuan Israel ho zawng zawng chu an puan in lamah ah haw ta a." 
2Chronicles10:17 Israela thlah, Judai ram khuaa awmte erawh chu an chungah Rehoboama a lal a." 
2Chronicles10:18 Tichuan lal Rehoboama chuan hnathawka rawih luihte hotu Hadorama a tir a; ani chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan lungin an lo deng a, a thi ta a. Tin, lal Rehoboama chu Jerusalem khua a tlan tumin a tawlailirah a chuang ta thuai a.Chutichuan Israel-hote chu Davida chhungte chungah an lo hel ta a ni, tun thleng hian." 
2Chronicles10:19 Chutichuan Israel-hote chu Davida chhungte chungah an lo hel ta a ni, tun thleng hian." 
2Chronicles11:1 Tin, Rehoboama chuan Jerusalem a han thlen chuan, Israel-hote do a, Rehoboama ram la leh turin Juda leh Benjamina chhung te, mi huaisen thiau thlan chhuah, nuaikhat leh singriat zet a khawm a." 
2Chronicles11:2 Nimahsela Pathian mi Semaia hnenah LALPA thu a lo thleng a," 
2Chronicles11:3 Judai ram lal Solomona fapa Rehoboama hnenah leh Judai ram leh Benjamin rama Israel mi zawng zawngte hnenah," 
2Chronicles11:4 LALPA'n heti hian a ti, In han kal tur a ni lo a, in unaute chu han do hek suh u: mahni in lamah haw leh vek rawh u; hei hi keimah tih a ni e,' tiin sawi rawh,"" tiin. Chutichuan LALPA thu chu an awi a, Jeroboama do tura an kal tur chu an kir leh ta a." 
2Chronicles11:5 Tin, Rehoboama chu Jerusalem khuaah a awm a, Judai ramah invenna'n khuate a siam a," 
2Chronicles11:6 Bethlehem khua te, Etam te, Tekao te," 
2Chronicles11:7 Bethzur te, Soko te, Adulam te," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gat te, Maresa te, Zip te," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraim te, Lakis te, Azeka te," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zora te, Aijalon te, Hebron khuate; chung chu Judai leh Benjamin rama kulh nei khuate a ni." 
2Chronicles11:11 Tin, chung kulhte chu a tinghet a, hotute a dah a, ei tur te, hriak te, uain te a chek khawm a." 
2Chronicles11:12 Tin, khawtinah chuan phaw te, fei te a dah a, khaw nghet takah a siam hlawm a. Tin, Judai leh Benjamin ram chu a ta a ni." 
2Chronicles11:13 Tin, Israel ram zawng zawnga puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu an ram atang theuhin a hnenah an kal a." 
2Chronicles11:14 Levi-hote chuan an ram leh an awmnate an chauhsan a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem-ah an kal a: Jeroboama leh a fapaten LALPA tana puithiam hna thawk lo turin a bantir a," 
2Chronicles11:15 a hmun sang atan le kelpa leh bawng no lem a siam atana puithiamte a ruat tak zawk avangin. 
2Chronicles11:16 Tin, Israel hnam, LALPA Israelte Pathian lama riltu thle zawng zawngte chuan an zui a, LALPA an pi leh pute Pathian hnena inthawi turin Jerusalem-ah an kal a." 
2Chronicles11:17 Chutichuan Judai ram chu an tinghet a, kum thuum chung chu Solomona fapa Rehoboama chu an tinghet a: kum thum chhung chu Davida leh Solomona kawng chu an zawh a ni." 
2Chronicles11:18 Tin, Rehoboama chuan Davida fapa Jerimotha fanu Mahalathi nupuiah a nei a, chu chu Jesea fapa Eliaba fanu Abihaili fanu a ni:" 
2Chronicles11:19 fapate a hrinsak a; Jeusa te, Semaria te, Zahama te." 
2Chronicles11:20 Ani hnuah chuan Absaloma fanu Maakai a nei a; ani chuan Abija te, Ataia te, Ziza te, Selomitha te a rinsak a." 
2Chronicles11:21 Tin, Rehoboama chuan Absaloma fanu Maakai chu a nupuite leh a hmeite zawng zawngah chuan a hmangai bik a; (nupui sawm leh pariat leh hmei sawmruk a nei a, fapa sawmhnih leh pariat leh fanu sawmruk a nei a.)" 
2Chronicles11:22 Tin, Rehoboama chuan maakai fapa Abija chu a unaute zinga chungnung berah a dah a; lala siam a rilruk nghe nghe a ni a.Fing takin rem a ruat a, a fapate zawng zawng chu Judai ram leh Benjamin ram zawng zawnga kulh nei khuaahte a awm darhtir vek a: ei tur tam tak a pe a. Nupui tam tak a zawn sak hlawm a." 
2Chronicles11:23 Fing takin rem a ruat a, a fapate zawng zawng chu Judai ram leh Benjamin ram zawng zawnga kulh nei khuaahte a awm darhtir vek a: ei tur tam tak a pe a. Nupui tam tak a zawn sak hlawm a." 
2Chronicles12:1 Tin, Rehohoma chu a lo lal ngheh tak chinah chuan a lama tang Israel-ho zawng zawng nen, LALPA dan chu an hawisan ta a." 
2Chronicles12:2 2-3, Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal Rehoboama kum nga a lal kum chuan LALPA chunga an sual avangin Aigupta lal Sisaka chuan tawlailir 1,200 leh sakawr chung chuang mi 60,000 nen Jerusalem a han bei a: Aigupta rama mi a hnena kalte chu chhiar sen rual an ni lo; Lub-ho te, Suki-ho te, Ethiopia-ho te an ni a." 
2Chronicles12:3 2-3, Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal Rehoboama kum nga a lal kum chuan LALPA chunga an sual avangin Aigupta lal Sisaka chuan tawlailir 1,200 leh sakawr chung chuang mi 60,000 nen Jerusalem a han bei a: Aigupta rama mi a hnena kalte chu chhiar sen rual an ni lo; Lub-ho te, Suki-ho te, Ethiopia-ho te an ni a." 
2Chronicles12:4 Judai rama kulh nei khuate a la a, Jerusalem a va thleng a." 
2Chronicles12:5 Tin, zawlnei Semaia chu Rehoboama leh Juda-ho puipa Sisaka avanga Jerusalem-a pungkhawmho hnena chuan a han kal a, an hnenah, ""LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, 'Mi hawisan ta a, chuvangin kei pawhin Sisaka kutah ka dah ta che u a ni,' tiin,"" a han ti a." 
2Chronicles12:6 Chutichuan Israel-ho puipate leh lal chu an intihnuai a, ""LALPA chu a fel a ni,"" an ti a." 
2Chronicles12:7 Tin, LALPA'n an intihnuai chu a lo hriat chuan LALPA thu Semaia hnenah a lo thleng a, ""An intihnuai ta a; ka tiboral vek lo ang a, thenkhat ka chhanhim ang a, Sisaka hmangin Jerusalem chungah ka thinurna ka leih lo ang." 
2Chronicles12:8 Amaherawhchu a chhiahhlawhte an ni ang, ka rawngbawl leh ram dang mi rawngbawl dan an hriatna'n,"" tiin." 
2Chronicles12:9 Chutichuan Aigupta lal Sisaka chu Jerusalem beiin a han cho a, LALPA ina rote leh lal ina rote a la a; a la zo vek a ni; Solomona siam rangkachak phawte pawh a la a." 
2Chronicles12:10 Tin, lal Rehoboama chuan chung aia chuan dar phawte a siam a, lal in kawngkhar vengtu sipai hotute a kawltir a." 
2Chronicles12:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal chu LALPA ina a lu apiangin vengtute chuan an keng a, tin, vengtute pindanah chuan an dah leh zel thin a." 
2Chronicles12:12 Tin, a han intihhnuai tak avang chuan a tihboral hlauh lohna'n a chunga LALPA thinurna chu akiang ta a; tin, Judai ram chu a la tha reng bawk a." 
2Chronicles12:13 Chutichuan lal Rehoboama chu Jerusalem-ah chuan a intinget a, ro a rel a: Rehoboama chu a la tantirhin kum sawmli leh kum khat a ni a, LALPA'n a hming awmtirna tura Israel hnam zawng zawng zinga a thlan khua Jerusalem-ah kum sawm leh ku sarih a lal a; a nu hming chu Naamai, Amon mi a ni," 
2Chronicles12:14 LALPA zawnna'n a rilru a hman loh avangin thil tha lo a ti a. 
2Chronicles12:15 Tichuan Rehoboama chanchin chu a bul atanga a tawp thlengin zawlnei Semaia ziak chanchin bua leh zawlnei Idova ziak chanchin bua thlahte chanchin zingah ziak a ni lo'm ni? Rehoboama leh Jeroboama chu an indo reng mai a ni.Tin, Rehoboama chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, Davida khuaah an pum a: a aiah a fapa Abija a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles12:16 Tin, Rehoboama chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, Davida khuaah an pum a: a aiah a fapa Abija a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles13:1 Jeroboama kum sawm leh kum riat a lal kumin Juda-ho chunga Abija a lal tan a. 
2Chronicles13:2 Jerusalem-ah kum thum a lal a; a nu hming chu Maakai, Gibea mi Urieal fanu a ni. Tin, Abija leh Jeroboama chu chu an indo a." 
2Chronicles13:3 Tin, Abija chuan sipai indo mi, mi huaisen nuali thlan thiau nen an va bei a; tin, Jeroboama chuan mi chak huaisen thlan thiau nuairiat inzarin a lo do a." 
2Chronicles13:4 Tin, Abija chu Ephraim tlang rama Zemaraim tlangah a ding a, ""Aw, Jeroboam, Israel-ho zawng zawng nen lo ngaithla rawh u;" 
2Chronicles13:5 LALPA Israelte Pathian chuan Israel ram chu Davida leh a fate chi thuthlungin kumkhua atan a pe tih hre awm tak in ni lo'm ni? 
2Chronicles13:6 Nimahsela Nebata fapa Jeroboama, Davida fapa Solomona chhiahlawh chu a pu chungah a lo hel ta mai a." 
2Chronicles13:7 Tin, Rehoboama a la naupan a, a rilru a la nem a, a lo dodal theih loh lai khan Solomona fapa Rehoboama kalhin mi bengtlaloho, Beliala fate an pung khawm a." 
2Chronicles13:8 Tin, Davida fapa-te lakah hian LALPA ram chu do theih in inring a: tam pawh in tam hle a, Jeroboaman pathian atana a siamsak che u rangkachak bawng no lemte pawh in hnenah a awm bawk a." 
2Chronicles13:9 LALPA puithiam, Arona fapate leh Levi-hote chu hnawtchuakin, ram dang mite tih dan angin puithiam in insiam a ni lo'm ni? Tichuan bawng tuai leh beram pasariha rawn inhlan apiangte chu pathian ni lawi lo puithiam an ni thei zel mai a." 
2Chronicles13:10 Nimahsela keini zawng, LALPA chu kan Pathian a ni a, amah chu kan hawisan lo a; LALPA tana rawngbawltu mahni hna theuh thawk Arona fapa puithiamte leh Levi-hote kan nei a:" 
2Chronicles13:11 tin, ni tin, leh zan tin, LALPA tan halral thilhlan te, rimtui te an hal thin a: chhang chiah pawh dawhkan thianghliman an dah fel diam thin a; tlai lam apianga hal turin rangkachak khawnvar dahna a khawnvarte nen: keini zawngin LALPA kan Pathian thupek chu kan zawm reng a, nangni erawh chuan amah chu in hawisan a ni." 
2Chronicles13:12 Tin, ngai teh u, Pathian chu kan hma hruaiin kan hnenah a awm a, tin, a puithiamte an tawtawrawta nangmahni hnawt tura ham turin an awm bawk a. Aw, Israela thlahte u, LALPA in pi leh pute Pathian chu do lul suh u, in hmuingil tawp hlei lo ang e,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles13:13 Nimahsela Jeroboama chuan an hnung lamah a chan ruktir a: tichuan Judate hma lamah an awm a, chang rutute chu an hnung lamah an awm a." 
2Chronicles13:14 Tin, Judate chu an han lehhawi chuan ral chu an hnung lam leh an hma lamah an lo awm a, LALPA chu an au ta a, puithiamte chuan tawtawrawt an ham a." 
2Chronicles13:15 Chutichuan Judate chu an au ta dur dur a; chutia Judate an au dur dur chuan heti hi a ni a, Abija leh Juda-ho hmaah chuan LALPA'n Jeroboama leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chu a titlawm ta a." 
2Chronicles13:16 Tichuan Israel thlahte chu Juda-ho hmaah chuan an tlanchhia a, Pathianin an kutah a pe ta a." 
2Chronicles13:17 Chutichuan Abija leh ahote chuan an that ta chiam mai a: tichuan Israel mi thlan thiau nuainga an that a. 
2Chronicles13:18 Chu mi tuma Israela thlahte tlawm dan chu chutiang chu a ni, Juda thlahte chuan LALPA an pi leh pute Pathian an rin avangin an ngam ta a." 
2Chronicles13:19 Tin, Abija chuan Jeroboama chu a um a, he'ng khuate hi a laksak -Bethel leh a khawper te, Jesana a khawperte nen, Ephron a khawperte nen." 
2Chronicles13:20 Abija lal lai chhung chuan Jeroboaman din chauh lehnaa nei ta lo; LALPA'n a hrem a, a thi ta a." 
2Chronicles13:21 Abija erawh chu a lo chak ta deuh deuh a, nupui sawm leh pali a nei a, fapa sawmnih leh pahnih leh fanu sawm leh paruk a hring a.Abija chanchin dangte leh a awm dan te, a thu sawite chu zawlnei Idova hrilhfiahna buah a chuang a ni." 
2Chronicles13:22 Abija chanchin dangte leh a awm dan te, a thu sawite chu zawlnei Idova hrilhfiahna buah a chuang a ni." 
2Chronicles14:1 Chutichuan Anija chu a pute hnenah a muhil a, Davida khawpuiah an phum a, a aiah a fapa Asa a lal ta a: alal chhung chuan an ram chu kum sawm zet ralmuangin a aawm a." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa chuan LALPA a Pathian mithmuhah thil tha leh dik a ti thin a: 
2Chronicles14:3 ram dang pathian maichamte leh hmun sangte a thehthang bo a, lungphunte a tichim a, Aseri-te a kit a:" 
2Chronicles14:4 Juda-hote chu LALPA an pi leh pute Pathian zawng tur leh a dan leh a thupek zawm turin thu a pe a. 
2Chronicles14:5 Tin, Juda-te khua zawng zawnga hmun sangte leh mi lemte a thehthang bo vek bawk a; a hnuaiah ram chu ralmuangin a awm a." 
2Chronicles14:6 Tin, Judai rama chuan kulh nei khuate a siam a; ram chu ralmuangin a awm a, LALPA'n ralmuanna a pek avangin chung kum chuan tumah do a nei lo." 
2Chronicles14:7 Judate hnena chuan, ""Heng khuate hii din tha ang u khai, kulhte in hung i la, in sang te, kulh kawngkhar te, akalhna te i siam ang u; LALPA kan Pathian hi kan zawn tak avangin ram chu kan huaiah a lo awm ta a; amah chu kan zawng a, ani chuan kil tin, kil tanga ralmuanga awmna min pe ta a ni,"" a ti a. Chutichuan an din tha a, an hmuingil ta zel a." 
2Chronicles14:8 Tin, Asa chuan Juda mi, phaw leh fei keng mi sipai nuaithum anei a; tin, Benjamin mi, phaw leh thal hmang mi nuaihnih leh singriat: chung zawng anwg chu mi chak huaisen vek an ni." 
2Chronicles14:9 Tin, Ethiopia mi Zera, sipai maktaduai leh tawlailir zathum nen anmahni bei turin a lo thawk a; Maresa a lo thleng a." 
2Chronicles14:10 Tichuan Asa chu a bei turin a va thawk a, Maresa-ah Zephatha ruamah an va inzar a." 
2Chronicles14:11 Tin, Asa chuan LALPA a Pathian a au a, ""LALPA chauh lo chu mi chak tak laka chak lo tanpuitu an awm lo a; aw LALPA kan Pathian, min tanpui rawh khai; nangmah ringin i hmingin he'ng mipuiho hi kan rawn bei a ni a. Aw LALPA, kan Pathian i ni a, mihringin nang chu ngam suh se,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles14:12 Chutichuan LALPA'n Asa leh Judate hmaah chuan Ethiopia mite chu a bei a; tichuan Ethiopia mite chu an tlanchhe ta a. 
2Chronicles14:13 Tin, Asa leh a hote chuan Gerar thlengin an um a; Ethiopia mite chu thi an tam em avangin tan an khawh thei ta lo a; LALPA leh a sipaite hmaa chuan tihtlawm an ni ta a; rallak sum tam tak an la a." 
2Chronicles14:14 Gerar vela khua zawng zawngte chu an bei a, LALPA chu an hlau ta a, khua zawng zawng chu an rawk a, rallak sum a tam hle mai a.Ranpuho puan inte pawh an bei a, beram leh sanghawngsei tam tak an kawl a, Jerusalem-ah an haw leh ta a." 
2Chronicles14:15 Ranpuho puan inte pawh an bei a, beram leh sanghawngsei tam tak an kawl a, Jerusalem-ah an haw leh ta a." 
2Chronicles15:1 Tin, Odeda fapa Azaria chungah Pathian thlarau a lo thleng a;" 
2Chronicles15:2 Asa hmuak turin a kal chhuak a, a hnenah, ""Asa leh Juda mi zawng zawng leh Benhamin mite u, ka thu ngaithla teh u: a lama in tan chhung zawng LALPA chu in lamah a tang a, amah in zawn chuan in hmu ang a, amah in hawisan chuan ani pawhin a hawisan ang che u." 
2Chronicles15:3 Israel mite chu rei tak Pathian tak nei lo leh zirtirtu leh puithiam nei lo leh dan nei loin an lo awm a: 
2Chronicles15:4 amaherawhchu an mangana LALPA Israelte Pathian lam an hawi a, an zawn veleh an hmu a a ni kha." 
2Chronicles15:5 Tin, chung lai chuan a chhuaklam leh a lut lamte tan ralmuanga awmna a awm lo a, ram chunga awm zawng zawngte tan manganna nasa tak hlir a ni zawk a." 
2Chronicles15:6 Hnam leh hnam, khua leh khua an intichhe rem rum a; Pathianinhreawm tinrengin a timangang anih kha." 
2Chronicles15:7 Nimahsela nangni zawng chak takin awm u la, inthlahdah su u, in thiltih man chu in hmu dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles15:8 Tin, Asan chung thute leh zawlnei Odeda thu sawite chu a hriatin a inti huai a, Judai ram leh Benjamin ram zawng zawng ata leh Ephraim tlang rama a khawlak ata thil tenawmte chu a thehthang bo vek a; LALPA hulhliap bula LALPA maicham chu a din tha a." 
2Chronicles15:9 Tin, Judai ram leh Benjamin rama mi zawng zawng, a hnena khawsa ve Ephraim leh Manase leh Simeon rama mite nen a ko khawm vek a: LALPA a Pathian a hnenah a awm tih an hratin Israel ram atangin an rawn bel ta huai huai mai si a." 
2Chronicles15:10 Chutichuan Asa kum sawm leh kum nga a lal kum, a thla thumnaah Jerusalem-ah an pung khawm chiam a." 
2Chronicles15:11 Tin, chu mi ni chuan an rallak bawngpa zasarih leh beram sangsarihin LALPA hnenah an inthawi a." 
2Chronicles15:12 Tin, an rilru leh an thinlung zawng zawngin LALPA an pi leh pute Pathian zawng tur leh" 
2Chronicles15:13 tupawh LALPA Israelte Pathian zawng lo chu alian ate, a hmei apain tihhlum tur thu an thlung a." 
2Chronicles15:14 Tin, LALPA hnenah aw ring takin, au rawlin tawtawrawt ri nen, tawtawrawt bi nei ri nen chhia an chham a." 
2Chronicles15:15 Juda mi zawng zawng chu lungsi taka chhechham an ni avangin an lawm tlang hle a, LALPA chu tihtakzetin an zawng a, hmuh pawh an hmu ta reng a, hmun tinah ralmuangin an awm ta a." 
2Chronicles15:16 Tin, lal Asa nu Maakai pawh chu milem tenawm tak Aseri a siamsak avangin a lalnu nihna a ban a; tin, Asa chuan a milem chu a sat thlu a, a tisawm dep a, Kidron luiah a hal a," 
2Chronicles15:17 amaherawhchu Israel ram ata hmun sangte chu thehthang bo a ni lo a; nimahsela Asa rilru chu a lal chhung chuan a fel hle reng a. 
2Chronicles15:18 Tin, a pan thil a lo hlan leh ama lo hlan tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbelte chu Pathianina a la lut a.Tin, Asa lal lai kum sawmthum leh kum nga chhung chuan indo reng reng a awm lo a." 
2Chronicles15:19 Tin, Asa lal lai kum sawmthum leh kum nga chhung chuan indo reng reng a awm lo a." 
2Chronicles16:1 Asa kum sawmthum leh kum ruk a lal kumin Israel lal Baasa chuan Judate a han bei a, Juda lal Asa hnenah lut tur leh chhuak tur danna'n Rama khua a siam a." 
2Chronicles16:2 Chutichuan Asan LALPA in leh lal ina ro tangkarua leh rangkachakte chu a la chhuak a, Damaska-a Suria lal Benhadada hnenah," 
2Chronicles16:3 Ka pa le i pa kara thuthlung a awm ang bawkin kan kara thuthlung a awm a, ngai teh, tangkarua leh rangkachakte ka thawn a che; ti teh, Israel lal Baasa hian mi tinsanna turin a hnena i thuthlun kha thiat leh teh mai,"" tiin a thawn a." 
2Chronicles16:4 Tin, Benhadada chuan lal Asa thu chu a lo pawm a; tichuan Israel khuate chu bei turin sipai hotute a tir a; Ijon kua te, Dan khua te, Abelmaim khua te, Naphtali rama bungraw dahna khua zawng zawngte an bei a." 
2Chronicles16:5 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Baasan chu mi thu chu a lo hriat veleh Rama khua a siam lai chu a chawlhsan a, a thiltih tum chu a thulh ta a." 
2Chronicles16:6 Chutichuan lal Asa chuan Juda mi zawng zawng chu a hruai a, Baasan Rama khaw siamna'na lung leh thing a hmante chu an la vek a, chu chuan Geba leh Mizpa khua a siam a." 
2Chronicles16:7 Tin, chu mi lai chuan zawlnei Hanania chu Juda lal Asa hnenaha lo kal a, a hnenah, ""LALPA i Pathian ring loin Suria lal i ring a, chuvangin Suria lal sipai rualte chu i chauh ta a ni." 
2Chronicles16:8 Ethiopia-ho leh Lub-hoe chu sipa rual lian tak, tawlailir leh sakawr chung chuang mite tam tak an ni lawm ni kha? Nimahsela LALPA i rin avang khan i kutah a pe a nih kha." 
2Chronicles16:9 A lama rilru dik tak putute chunga a chakzia tilang turin khawvel zawng zawngah LALPA mit chu a leng ruai ruai thin a ni. atthlak takin thil i ti a nih hi; tun achinah chuan do i nei reng rawh ang,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles16:10 Chutichuan Asa chu zawlnei chungah chuan a thinrima, tan ina a kung ta a;a thu sawi avangin a thinrim ta hle mai a ni. Tin, Asa chuan mi thenkhate pawh a tiduhdah leh ta nghal zel a." 
2Chronicles16:11 Tin, ngai teh u, Asa chanchin chu a bul atanga a tawp thlengin Juda leh Israel lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a ni." 
2Chronicles16:12 Tin, kum sawmthum leh kum kua a lal kumin Asa chu a ke a lo na ta a; a na chu nasa tak a ni; nimahsela a natnaah chuan LALPA ruai loin damdawi thiamte a ruai zawk a." 
2Chronicles16:13 Tin, Asa chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, kum sawmli leh kum khat alal kumin a ti a.Tin, Davida khawpuia a ma puala a ker, ama thlanah an phum a, rimtui tui tak, rimtui siamtuten rimtui chi hrang hrang an siama khat khumah an zalh a, a pualah meipui nasa tak an chhep a." 
2Chronicles16:14 Tin, Davida khawpuia a ma puala a ker, ama thlanah an phum a, rimtui tui tak, rimtui siamtuten rimtui chi hrang hrang an siama khat khumah an zalh a, a pualah meipui nasa tak an chhep a." 
2Chronicles17:1 Tin, a fapa Jehosaphata a aiah a lal a, Israel mite do turin a indin nghet a." 
2Chronicles17:2 Tin, Judai rama kulh nei khua zawng zawnga sipaite a dah a: Judai ram leh a pa Asan a lo lak Ephraim rama khuaahte chuan ralvengtute a dah a." 
2Chronicles17:3 Tin, Jehosaphata hnena chuan LALPA a awm a; aala te zawng loa a pu Davida'n a zawh hmasak tawh kawng chu a zawh a," 
2Chronicles17:4 an pi leh pute Pathian chu zawnga, Israel mite tih ang ti loa a thupekte a zawm zawk avangin." 
2Chronicles17:5 Chuvangin LALPA'n a ram chu a kutah a tinghet a, tichuan Judai rama mi zawng zawngin Jehosaphata chu lawmman te an rawn pe a, a lo hausain a lo ropui ta hle mai a." 
2Chronicles17:6 Tin, a rilru chu LALPA lamah a thle a; tin, Judai ram aa hmun sangte leh Aserite a thehthang bo vek bawk a." 
2Chronicles17:7 Tin, kum thum a lal kumin ami lian Benhaila te, Obadia te, Zekaria-te Nethanela te, Mikaiate chu, Judai ram khuatea mite zirtir turin a tir chhuak bawk a:" 
2Chronicles17:8 tin, Levi mi, Semaia te, Nethania te, Zebadia te, Asahela te, Semiramotha te, Jehonathana te, Adonija te, Tobija te, Tobadonija te an tel ve a, tin, puithiam Elisama leh Jehorama an tel bawk a." 
2Chronicles17:9 Tin, LALPA dan bu an keng a, Judai ramah chuan an zirtir a, Judai ram khua zawng zawng an fang a, mite an zirtir a." 
2Chronicles17:10 Tin, Judai ram vel ram zawng zawnga mite chuan LALPA chu an hlau a, tumah Jehosaphata chu an do ngam lo a." 
2Chronicles17:11 Tin, Philistia mi thenkhatin Jehosaphata chu lawmman an rawn pe a, chhia atan tangkaruate an pe bawk a; tin, Arabia mite pawhin ran rual, berampa sangsarih le zasarih le kelpa sangsarih le zasarih an rawn kaih a." 
2Chronicles17:12 Tichuan Jehosaphat achu alo ropi ta hle mai a, Judai ramah kulhte leh thil dah khawmna khuate a siam a," 
2Chronicles17:13 Judai ram khuaahte chuan hna tam tak a nei a; Jerusalem-ah sipai mi chak huaisente a ngah bawk a. 
2Chronicles17:14 Tin, an chhungkua kua zela an awm dan chu hetiang hi a ni. Juda chhungkuaa sang hotu te chu, hotu Adana chuan mi chak huaisen nuaithum a hova;" 
2Chronicles17:15 a dawttu Jehohananan nuaihnih leh singriat a ho a; 
2Chronicles17:16 tin, a dawt lehtu Zikria fapa Amasia chu inphal taka LALPA tana inpein, mi chak huaisen nuaihnih a ho a;" 
2Chronicles17:17 tin, Benjamin chhungkuate - mi chak huaisen Eliadan thal leh phaw hmang mi nuaihnih a ho a;" 
2Chronicles17:18 a dawttu Jehozabada chuan ralkap tura inpeih diam nuaikhat leh singriat a ho a. Heng zawng zawng hi Judai rama kulh nei khuaa lalin a dahte tiam loa lal hnena awm rengte an ni. 
2Chronicles17:19 Tin, a fapa Jehosaphata a aiah a lal a, Israel mite do turin a indin nghet a." 
2Chronicles17:20 Tin, Judai rama kulh nei khua zawng zawnga sipaite a dah a: Judai ram leh a pa Asan a lo lak Ephraim rama khuaahte chuan ralvengtute a dah a." 
2Chronicles17:21 Tin, Jehosaphata hnena chuan LALPA a awm a; aala te zawng loa a pu Davida'n a zawh hmasak tawh kawng chu a zawh a," 
2Chronicles17:22 an pi leh pute Pathian chu zawnga, Israel mite tih ang ti loa a thupekte a zawm zawk avangin." 
2Chronicles17:23 Chuvangin LALPA'n a ram chu a kutah a tinghet a, tichuan Judai rama mi zawng zawngin Jehosaphata chu lawmman te an rawn pe a, a lo hausain a lo ropui ta hle mai a." 
2Chronicles17:24 Tin, a rilru chu LALPA lamah a thle a; tin, Judai ram aa hmun sangte leh Aserite a thehthang bo vek bawk a." 
2Chronicles17:25 Tin, kum thum a lal kumin ami lian Benhaila te, Obadia te, Zekaria-te Nethanela te, Mikaiate chu, Judai ram khuatea mite zirtir turin a tir chhuak bawk a:" 
2Chronicles17:26 tin, Levi mi, Semaia te, Nethania te, Zebadia te, Asahela te, Semiramotha te, Jehonathana te, Adonija te, Tobija te, Tobadonija te an tel ve a, tin, puithiam Elisama leh Jehorama an tel bawk a." 
2Chronicles17:27 Tin, LALPA dan bu an keng a, Judai ramah chuan an zirtir a, Judai ram khua zawng zawng an fang a, mite an zirtir a." 
2Chronicles17:28 Tin, Judai ram vel ram zawng zawnga mite chuan LALPA chu an hlau a, tumah Jehosaphata chu an do ngam lo a." 
2Chronicles17:29 Tin, Philistia mi thenkhatin Jehosaphata chu lawmman an rawn pe a, chhia atan tangkaruate an pe bawk a; tin, Arabia mite pawhin ran rual, berampa sangsarih le zasarih le kelpa sangsarih le zasarih an rawn kaih a." 
2Chronicles17:30 Tichuan Jehosaphat achu alo ropi ta hle mai a, Judai ramah kulhte leh thil dah khawmna khuate a siam a," 
2Chronicles17:31 Judai ram khuaahte chuan hna tam tak a nei a; Jerusalem-ah sipai mi chak huaisente a ngah bawk a. 
2Chronicles17:32 Tin, an chhungkua kua zela an awm dan chu hetiang hi a ni. Juda chhungkuaa sang hotu te chu, hotu Adana chuan mi chak huaisen nuaithum a hova;" 
2Chronicles17:33 a dawttu Jehohananan nuaihnih leh singriat a ho a; 
2Chronicles17:34 tin, a dawt lehtu Zikria fapa Amasia chu inphal taka LALPA tana inpein, mi chak huaisen nuaihnih a ho a;" 
2Chronicles17:35 tin, Benjamin chhungkuate - mi chak huaisen Eliadan thal leh phaw hmang mi nuaihnih a ho a;a dawttu Jehozabada chuan ralkap tura inpeih diam nuaikhat leh singriat a ho a. Heng zawng zawng hi Judai rama kulh nei khuaa lalin a dahte tiam loa lal hnena awm rengte an ni." 
2Chronicles17:36 a dawttu Jehozabada chuan ralkap tura inpeih diam nuaikhat leh singriat a ho a. Heng zawng zawng hi Judai rama kulh nei khuaa lalin a dahte tiam loa lal hnena awm rengte an ni. 
2Chronicles18:1 Tichuan Jehosaphata chu a lo hausain a lo ropui ta hle mai a; tin, Ahaba nena inkungkaihna a siam a." 
2Chronicles18:2 Tin, kum eng emaw zat lai hnu chuan Samari-ah Ahaba hnenah a zuk kal a. Tin, Ahaba chuan amah leh a hote chu beram leh bawngpate tam tak a lo talh a, Ramoth-gilead khuaa han chhohpuiah a sawm a." 
2Chronicles18:3 Tin, Israel lal Ahaba chuan Juda lal Jehosaphata hnenah chuan, ""Ramoth-gilead khuaah kan han chho dun dawn lawm ni,"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhang a, ""Kei leh nang, ka mite leh i mite chu pumkhat kan ni alawm, ral chu kan beiza ang chu,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:4 Tin, Jehosaphata chuan Israel lal hnenah chuan, ""LALPA thu ngaichang rih phawt la maw le,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:5 Chutichuan Israel lal chuan, zawlneiho mi zali a ko khawm a, an hnehah, ""Ramoth-gilead khua bei turin kan han thawk ang nge thawk lo ang?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Han thawk rawh khai, Pathianin lal kutah a pe dawn a ni,"" an ti a." 
2Chronicles18:6 Nimahsela Jehosaphata chuan, LALPA zawlnei tu emaw kan han rawn tur an awm lawm ni aw?"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:7 Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosapahta hnenah, ""LALPA min rawnsak tur mi pakhat chu a la awm kha maw; nimahsela ani chu zawng ka huatzawng tak a ni; ka chungchang thu hi a chhe lam ngawt lo a tha lam reng reng a sawi ngai si lo a; chu mi chu Imla fapa Mikaia a ni,"" a ti a. Tin, Jehosaphata chuan, ""Lal chuan chutiang chuan ti teh suh se a,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:8 Tichuan Israel lal chuan hotu pakhat a han ko a, ""Imla fapa Mikaia han hruai thuai teh,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:9 Tin, Israel lal leh Juda lal chu Samari kulh kawngka luhna bul hmun thawl laiah an lal puana inthuamin an lalthutthleng ve veah an thu a; tin, zawlnei zawng zawng chuan an hmaah thu an sawi a." 
2Chronicles18:10 Tin, Kenaana fapa Zedekian thir kite a siam a, ""LALPA'n heti hian a ti, 'Hengte hian Suria-hote chu boral der khawpin i si ang,' tiin, "" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:11 Tin, chutiang bawkin zawlnei dangte pawh chuan, ""Ramoth-gilead-ah chuan han cho la, han hmuingil rawh khai; LALPA'n lal kutah hian a pe dawn a ni,"" tiin an sawi a." 
2Chronicles18:12 Tin, Mikaia ko tura an tirha chuan, ""Ngai teh khai, zawlneite chuan thukhat vuain a tha lamin lal hnenah thu an sawi theuh a; chuvangin nang pawhin an sawi tak angin a tha lamin han sawi ve teh khai,"" tiin a sawi a." 
2Chronicles18:13 Tin, Miakai chuan, ""LALPA nunna chhalin ka sawi e, ka Pathianina sawi ang chiahin a ni ka sawi dawn ni,"" a lo ti a." 
2Chronicles18:14 Tin, lal hnen a han thlen chuan lalin a hnenah, ""Mikai, Ramoth-gilead khua bei turin kan han thawk ang nge thawk lo ang?"" a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Han thawk ula, han hmuingil rawh u, i kutah pek a ni dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:15 Tin, lal chuan a hnenah, ""Thu tak ngawt lo chu ka hnenah LALPA hminga sawi lo turin vawi engzat nge maw chhia ka chhamtir dawn che le?"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:16 Tin, a ni chuan, ""beram vengtu nei lo angin Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu tlangahte darh vekin ka hmu a; tin, LALPA'n, 'Hengho hian hotu an nei ta lo a, mahni in lamah thlamuang takin haw dial mai rawh se,' a ti a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:17 Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosaphata hnenah, ""Ka chungchang thu hi a chhe lam ngawt lo chu a tha lam reng reng zawng a sawi hlei lo ang e tih ka hrilh che ani lawm ni kha?"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:18 Tin, Mikaia chuan, ""Khai le, LALPA thu ngaithla teh u, LALPA chu a lal thutthlenga thua van mipuiho zawng zawng a ding lam leh a vei lama dingin ka hmu a." 
2Chronicles18:19 Tin, LALPA chuan, 'Israel lal Ahaba hi Ramoth-gilead a han chho a, han thi turin tuin nge thlem dawn?' a tih hun chuan pakhatin, 'Chu tin, khatin, a ti a, mi dangin, Chutiang khatiang chuan, ' a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:20 Tin, thlarau pakhat a lo chhuak a, LALPA hmaah a ding a, 'Keimahin ka thlem ang e,' a ti a. Tin, LALPA'n a hnenah, 'Engtin maw?"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:21 Tin, ani chuan, 'Ka va kal ang a, a zawlneite zawng zawng kaaah chuan thlarau dawtheiah ka va chhang ang,' a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, 'I va thlem ngei ang a, hlawh pawh i hlawhtling bawk ang, va kal ta la, chutiang chuan va ti rawh le,' a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:22 Chutichuan ngai teh, LALPA chuan he'ng i zawlneite kaah hian thlarau dawthei a dah a; i chungchang thu LALPA'n a tha lo lamin a sawi ta a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:23 Chu veleh chuan Kenaana fapa Zedekia chuan a va hnai a, Mikaia biangah a va beng a, ""I hnenah thu sawi turin LALPA thlarau chuan khawi lamah nge mi chhuahsan?"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:24 Tin, Mikaia chuan, ""Ngai teh, pindan chhungrila biru tura i luh niin i la hria ang,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:25 Chutichuan Israel lal chuan, ""Mikaia hi hruai u la, khaw awptu Amona leh lal fapa Joasa hnenah kalpui leh rawh u;" 
2Chronicles18:26 tin, 'Lalin heti hian a ti, He mi hi lung inah khung u la, thlamuang taka ka lo haw leh hma loh chuan hreawm chaw leh hreawm tui lo pe rawh u, a ti,' ti ang che u,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:27 tin, Mikaia chuan, ""Thlamuang taka i lo haw leh chuan kei mi hmangin LALPA'n thu a sawi lo a ni ang le,"" a ti a. Tin, amah vekin, ""Nangin mipui zawng zawng pawhin lo hre rawh u,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:28 Tin, Israel lal leh Juda lal Jehosaphata chu Ramoth-gilead khuaah chuan an han chho a." 
2Chronicles18:29 Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosaphata hnenah chuan, ""Ka inbawl danglam ang a, inbeihnaah chuan ka kal ve ang a; nang erawh chu i lal puan inbel rawh,"" a ti a. Chutichuan Israel chu a inbawl danglam a, inbeihnaah chuan an han kal a." 
2Chronicles18:30 Tin, Suria lal chuan a tawlailirte chunga hotute hnenah chuan, ""Israel lal ngawt lo chu mi te pawh mi lian pawh bei suh ang che u,"" tiin ahtu a pe a." 
2Chronicles18:31 Tin, heti hi a ni a, tawlailir chunga hotute chuan Jehosaphata an han hmuh chuan, ""Israel lal anih saw maw,"" an ti a. Tichuan bei tumin an hual ta a; nimahsela Jehosaphata chu a au a, tin, LALPA'n a pui ta a, tichuan Pathianin a tihkirsak ta a."
