2Chronicles18:32 Tin, heti hi a ni a, tawlailir chunga hotuten Israel lal a ni lo tih an hriat chuan um loin an kirsan leh ta a." 
2Chronicles18:33 Tin, mi pakhat hian tum bik nei lem loin a thlangul ahan kuai a, Israel lal chu a awmphaw inkarah akap a; tichuan tawlailir khaltu hnenah chuan, ""Khalh let la mipui zing ata hi mi chhuahpui rawh khai, hliam na tak ka tawk a ni,"" a ti a.Tin, chu mi ni chuan inbeihna chu a nasa hle mai a; tin, Israel lal chu Suria-hote lam hawiin a tawlailirah tlai lam thlengin a ding a; tin, ni tlak dawn velah a thi ta a." 
2Chronicles18:34 Tin, chu mi ni chuan inbeihna chu a nasa hle mai a; tin, Israel lal chu Suria-hote lam hawiin a tawlailirah tlai lam thlengin a ding a; tin, ni tlak dawn velah a thi ta a." 
2Chronicles19:1 Tin, Juda lal Jehosaphata chu thlamuang takin Jerusalem-a a inah a haw leh ta a." 
2Chronicles19:2 Tin, zawlnei Hanania fapa Jehua chuan alo hmuak a, lal Jehosaphata hnenah, ""Mi suaksual chu i tanpuiin LALPA hawtute chu i hmangaih dawn a ni maw? He mi avang hian LALPA thinurna i chunga a lo awm ta a ni." 
2Chronicles19:3 Amaherawhchu he ram ata Aseri i thehthang bo a, LALPA i zawn avang hian thatna kawng eng emaw zawng i la nei cheu a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles19:4 Tin, Jehosaphata chu Jerusalem-ah a awm a; tin, Beer-seba atanga Ephraim tlang ram thlengin a mite zingah a kal leh a, LALPA an pi leh pute Pathian lamah a hruai kir leh hlawm a." 
2Chronicles19:5 Tin, khaw tinah Judai ram kulh nei khua zawng zawngahte chuan roreltute a dah a." 
2Chronicles19:6 roreltute hnenah chuan, ""In thiltih chu ngun taka ngaihtuahin ti rawh u; mihring tana rorel in ni lo a, LALPA tan a ni zawk si a; rorelnaa chuan in hnenah a tel zel a ni." 
2Chronicles19:7 Chuvangin LALPA hlau u la, fimkhur takin ti rawh u; LALPA kan Pathianah chuan khawlohna leh thlei bik neihna leh tham einate a awm lo a ni,""a ti a." 
2Chronicles19:8 Tin, Jehosaphata chuan Jerusalem-ah LALPA rorel tur leh thubuaite remtu atan Levi-hote puithiam te, Israel chhungkaw puipate a dah bawk a." 
2Chronicles19:9 Tin, ""LALPA tih chungin rinawm takin, rilru dik tak puin in ti tur a ni." 
2Chronicles19:10 Khawii khuaa mi pawhin thubuai an rawn sawi a, tualthah te, dan leh thupek thu-ah te, thuruat leh rorel thu-ahte an rawn inkhin chuan, LALPA chunga thil an tihsual lohna'n fimkhur turin hrilh ang che u, nangmahni leh in unaute chungah thinurna a lo thleng dah rual ang e; chutiang chuan ti u la, thiam loh in chang dawn lo nia.Tin, ngai teh u, LALPA lam thu zawng zawngah chuan puithiam lalber Amaria chu in hotu a ni a; tin, lal lam thu zawng zawngah chuan Juda te chhungkaw chunga roreltu Ismaela fapa Zebadia a ni: Levi-hote pawh in hotute an ni ve ang. Huai takin ti u la, mi thate hnenah chuan LALPA chu awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles19:11 Tin, ngai teh u, LALPA lam thu zawng zawngah chuan puithiam lalber Amaria chu in hotu a ni a; tin, lal lam thu zawng zawngah chuan Juda te chhungkaw chunga roreltu Ismaela fapa Zebadia a ni: Levi-hote pawh in hotute an ni ve ang. Huai takin ti u la, mi thate hnenah chuan LALPA chu awm rawh se,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles20:1 Tin, chu mi hnua chuan heti hi a ni a, Moaba thlahte leh Amona thlahte chu Meun-ho thenkhatte nen Jehosaphata bei turin an lo thawk a." 
2Chronicles20:2 Chutichuan tuten emaw Jehosaphata hnenah, ""Nangmah bei turin mipui tam tak mai, tuifinriat ral Suria atangin an lo thawk chiam mai; ngai teh, Hazazon-tarmar-ah an awm tawh,"" (Chu chu Engedi an ti bawk thin) tiin an hrilh a." 
2Chronicles20:3 Tin, Jehosaphata chuan a hlau a, LALPA zawng turin a in pe a; Judai Ram zawng zawngah chaw nghei tur thu a than vel a." 
2Chronicles20:4 Tichuan Judate chu LALPA tanpuina zawng zawngin an pung khawm a; Juda khaw tin, atangin LALPA zawng turin an lo chhuak a." 
2Chronicles20:5 Tin, Jehosaphata chu LALPA inah, kawt hung chung thar bulah Juda-ho leh Jerusalem-ho pungkhawm zingah chuan a ding a;" 
2Chronicles20:6 Aw LALPA, kan pi leh pute Pathian, vana Pathian i ni lo'm ni? Hnam tin chunga roreltu i ni lo'm ni? I kutah chuan thiltihtheihna leh chakna a awm a, tuma chelhrual i ni lo a." 
2Chronicles20:7 Aw kan Pathian, he rama chengte hi i mi Israelte i hnawchhuahsak a, i thian Abrahama thlahte chatuan atan i pe a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Chronicles20:8 8-9, Tin, he ramah hian an lo awm ta a, 'Kan chungah thil tha lo, khandaiha rorelnate emaw, hri te emaw, tamte emaw a lo thlen chuan he in bulah leh i hmaah kan lo ding ang a (he inah hian i hming a awm si a) kan mangannnaah chuan kan au avang chia, nangin min ngaihthlaksakin min chhandam ang chu,' tiin i hming atan hmun thianghlim an dinsak chia." 
2Chronicles20:9 8-9, Tin, he ramah hian an lo awm ta a, 'Kan chungah thil tha lo, khandaiha rorelnate emaw, hri te emaw, tamte emaw a lo thlen chuan he in bulah leh i hmaah kan lo ding ang a (he inah hian i hming a awm si a) kan mangannnaah chuan kan au avang chia, nangin min ngaihthlaksakin min chhandam ang chu,' tiin i hming atan hmun thianghlim an dinsak chia." 
2Chronicles20:10 Tichuan ngai teh, Amona thlahte leh Moab-ho leh Seir tlang mi, Israel-ho Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah laia beih i phal lo a, an kirsana an tihboral tak lohhoten," 
2Chronicles20:11 kan luah atan i ram min pek atan hnawhchhuaha mi rawn thungrulh an tum dan hi lo hre teh. 
2Chronicles20:12 Aw kan Pathian, an chungah ro i rel dawn lo'm ni? Mi chu zozai, mi rawn bei tura lo thawkte chu lo han bei thei ziazang kan ni si lo a; a tih ngaihnareng reng kan hre bawk hek lo, i lam kan lo hawi mai zawka nie,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles20:13 Tin, Judate zawng zawng chu an fanau te te, an nupuite an fate nen LALPA hmaah an ding a." 
2Chronicles20:14 Chutichuan mipui zinga Jahaziela chungah chuan LALPA thlarau a lo thleng a, chu mi chu Zekaria fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Benaia fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Jeiela fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Asapha thlah Levi mi Matania fapa a ni a:" 
2Chronicles20:15 tin, ani chuan, ""Nangni Judai rama mi zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a awm zawng zawngte leh nang lal Jehosaphat, lo ngaithla raw u: LALPA'n in hnenah heti hian a ti, 'Hlau suh u la, chung mipui tam tak avang chuan zam hek suh u; indona chu nangni indona a ni lo a, Pathian indona a ni zawk si a." 
2Chronicles20:16 Naktukah zuk bei rawh u; ngai teh u, Ziz pan chhohnaah an lo cho a, Jeruel thlaler bul ruam tawp lamah chuan in zu hmu ang a." 
2Chronicles20:17 He indona hi in beih a ngai lo ang: inzar u la, ding ngawt mai u la, in lama tang LALPA chhandamna chu en reng mai rawh u, aw Juda mite leh Jerusalem mite u: hlau suh u la, zam hek suh u, naktukah bei turin thawk rawh u, LALPA chu in lamah a tang si a,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles20:18 Chutichuan Jehosaphata chu a hmaia lei siin a kun a; tin, Juda mite zawng zawng leh Jerusalem mi zawng zawng chu LALPA chibai bukin LALPA hmaah an kun a." 
2Chronicles20:19 Tin, Kohata thlah leh Kora thlah Levi-hote chu aw ring taka LALPA Israelte Pathian fak turin an lo ding a." 
2Chronicles20:20 Tin, a tukah chuan zing takah an tho a, Tekoa thlaerah an lut a; tin, an kal lai chuan Jehosaphata chu a ding a, ""Aw, Juda mite leh Jerusalem mite u, ka thu hi ngaithla rawh u; LALPA in Pathian chu ring u la, nghet takin in awm dawn nia; a zawlneite chu ring u la, hmuingil takin in awm dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles20:21 Tin, mipuite a fuih zawh chuan sipaite hmaa kal chunga LALPA chawimawina leh a thianghlim mawizia fak tura hla satu turte a ruat a, ""'LALPA hnenah lawm thu sawi rawh u, a ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dawn si a,' ti rawh u,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles20:22 Tin, hla an saka an han fak veleh chuan Amona thlah te, Moaba thlah te, Seir tlanga mite Juda-ho bei tura lo thawkte chang rutu turte LALPA'n a dah a; tichuan an tlawm ta a." 
2Chronicles20:23 Amona thlahte leh Moaba thlahte chuan Seir tlanga awmte chu thah chimih vek leh tihboral der tumin an bei ta mai a; tin, Seir tlanga mite an tiboral zawh chuan anmahni leh anmahni chu intihboral tumin an inbei ta chiam mai a." 
2Chronicles20:24 Tin, Judate chuan thlaler thlirna hmun sang an han thlen chuan mipui lam chu an han en a; tin, ngai teh, mitthi ruang chu leiah chuan a lum rum mai a, pakhat te mah tlan chuak an awm lo a." 
2Chronicles20:25 Tichuan Jehosaphata leh a hote chu rallak sum la turin an va kal a, an zingah chuan sum leh pai te, silhfen te, lunghlu te an va hmu ta teuh mai a, an phurh zawh loh khawpin an la a; a tam khawp a, ni thum zet rallak sum chu an chhek a." 
2Chronicles20:26 Tin, a ni li ni chuan Beraka ruamah an inkhawm a, chutah chuan LALPA chu an chawimawi a; chu mi avang chuan tun thleng hian chu mi hmun hminga chuan Beraka ruam an ti ta a ni." 
2Chronicles20:27 Chutichuan Juda mi leh Jerusalem mi zawng zawng chu an haw leh ta a, tin, Jehosaphata chuan Jerusalem-a hlim taka haw turin an hma a hruai a; LALPA'n an hmelmate chungthuah hlim taka a awmtir tak avangin." 
2Chronicles20:28 Tichuan perhkhuang te, tingtang te, tawtawrawt-te nen Jerusalem-a LALPA in chu an han thleng ta a." 
2Chronicles20:29 Tin, LALPA'n Israel-te hmelma a bei tih an han hriat chuan ram tina mite chuan Pathian chu an hlau ta a." 
2Chronicles20:30 Tichuan Jehosaphata ram chu ralmuangin a awm ta a; a Pathianin an vela mite laka ralmuanna a pek avangin. 
2Chronicles20:31 Chutichuan Jehosaphata chu Judate chunga a lal ta a; kum sawmthum leh kum nga mi a nihin a lal tan a; tin, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh kum nga a lal a; a nu hming chu Azubai, Silhia fanu a ni." 
2Chronicles20:32 LALPA mithmuha thil tha tiin a pa Asa kawng chu pensan hauh loin a a zawh a. 
2Chronicles20:33 Amaherawhchu hmun sangte chu thehthang bo a ni lo a, mipuite pawhin an pi leh pute Pathian chungah an thinlung an la nghat bawk hek lo." 
2Chronicles20:34 Tin, ngai teh u, Jehosaphata thiltih zawng zawngte chu abul atanga a tawp thlengin Hanania fapa Jehua chanchin ziaknaah a chuang a ni, chu chu Israel lalte chanchin buah a chuang a." 
2Chronicles20:35 Tin, chu mi hnuahchuan Juda lal Jehosaphata chuan Israel lal Ahazia a thurualpui a; chu mi chuan tha lo takin thil a ti thin a:" 
2Chronicles20:36 Tin, Tarsis lama kal tur lawng an siam tlang a, Ezion-geber-ah lawngte chu an siam a.Chutichuan Maresa mi Dodavahua fapa Eliezeran Jehosaphata hnenah, ""Ahazia i thurualpui avangin LALPA'n i thil tih tum hi a tihkhawlohsak ta che a ni,"" a ti a. Tichuan lawngte chu an chhe ta vek a, Tarsis-ah chuan an kal thei ta lo a." 
2Chronicles20:37 Chutichuan Maresa mi Dodavahua fapa Eliezeran Jehosaphata hnenah, ""Ahazia i thurualpui avangin LALPA'n i thil tih tum hi a tihkhawlohsak ta che a ni,"" a ti a. Tichuan lawngte chu an chhe ta vek a, Tarsis-ah chuan an kal thei ta lo a." 
2Chronicles21:1 Tin, Jehosaphata chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, a pute zinga a pu Davida khawpuiah an phum a; tin, a fapa Jehorama a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles21:2 Tin, ani chuan unau, Jehosaphata fapate a nei hlawm a, Azaria te, Jehiela te, Zekaria te, Azaria te, Mikaela te, Sephatia te an ni. Heng zawng zawng hi Israel lal Jehosaphata fapate vek an ni." 
2Chronicles21:3 Tin, an pa chuan thil ropui tak tak a pe a, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, thil hlu tak tak te, Judai rama kulh nei khuate nen: nimasela ram chu Jehorama hnenah fa u ber a nih avangin a pe a." 
2Chronicles21:4 Chutichuan Jehoraman a pa ram a han luah chuan a lo intichak ta a, a unaute zawng zawng chu Israelte zinga puipa tam takte nen khandaihin a tihlum vek a." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehorama chu kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a nihin a lal tan a; Jerusalem-ah kum riat a lal a. 
2Chronicles21:6 Ahaba chhungte tih angin Israel lalte kawng chu a zawm ve a: Ahaba fanu nupuiah a nei a ni: tichuan LALPA mithmuhah thil tha lo tak a ti thin a. 
2Chronicles21:7 Nimahsela LALPA'n Davida chhungkua chu a tiboral duh lo a, Davida hnena thuthlung avang leh amah leh a thlahte chena khawnvar neihtir reng a lo tiam tawh avangin." 
2Chronicles21:8 Ama chanah chuan Edom-ho chu Judate laka an hel a, lal an insiam chawp a." 
2Chronicles21:9 TichuanJehorama chu a sipai hotute leh a tawlailir zawng zawngte nen a va thawk chhuak a, zanah a va thawk a, anmahni leh tawlailir chunga hotute hualtu Edom-hote chu a va bei a." 
2Chronicles21:10 Chutichuan Edom-hote chu tun thlengin Judate lakah an la hel ta reng a ni; tin, LALPA, an pi leh pute Pathian chu a hawisan avangin, chu mi lai bawk chuan Libna khua pawh a lakah an hel ve a." 
2Chronicles21:11 Tin, Judai ram tlangahte hmun sang a siam a, Jerusalem mite chu a uiretir a, Judate chu a hruai bo a." 
2Chronicles21:12 Tin, zawlnei Elija atangin a hnenah lehkha a lo thleng a, ""LALPA, i pu Davida Pathian chuan heti hian a ti, ' I pa Jehosaphata kawngte i zawh lo a, Judate lal Asa kawngte pawh zawh bawk hek lo a," 
2Chronicles21:13 Israel lalte kawng i zawh zawk a, Judate leh Jerusalem-a awmte Ahaba chhungte anga i uiretir a, i unau, i pa chhungte i aia tha zawk i thah bawk avangin," 
2Chronicles21:14 ngai teh, LALPA'n i mi te, i fa te, i nupuite i rante hripuiin a hrem ang a;" 
2Chronicles21:15 tin, nangin ril natna nasa tak i nei ang a, ni tin, chu natna avanga i ril chu a tlak a tlak a, a tlak zawh vek thlengin,"" tiin." 
2Chronicles21:16 Chutichuan Ethiopia mite kiang vela mi Philistia-ho leh Arabia-ho rilru chu Jehorama bei turin LALPA'n a chawk tho va: 
2Chronicles21:17 tichuan Judate chu an han bei a, an ramah an lut a, lal ina thil zawng zawng chu an la vek a, a fapate, a nupuite pawh; chutichuan a fapa naupang ber Jehoahaza chauh lo chu a fa pawh an hnutchiahsak lo." 
2Chronicles21:18 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan LALPA'n tihdam theih loh ril natnain a hrem a." 
2Chronicles21:19 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a kum hnihna a lo vei hnuin a natna avang chuan a ril chu a tla ta a, a natna rapthlak takin a lo thi ta a. A mite chuan a pa meipui an chhehsak ang khan an chhehsak ve lo.A lal tirhin kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum riat a lal a; tuma ui hlawh loin a thi a, Davida khawpuiah an phum a, lalho thlanah erawh chuan a ni lo." 
2Chronicles21:20 A lal tirhin kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum riat a lal a; tuma ui hlawh loin a thi a, Davida khawpuiah an phum a, lalho thlanah erawh chuan a ni lo." 
2Chronicles22:1 Chutichuan Jerusalem mite chuan a fapa naupang ber Ahazia chu a aiah lalah an siam a; a fa ute zawng zawng chu sipai rual, Arabia mite nena an tan hmuna lo kalho chuan an that ta vek si a. Chutichuan Juda lal Jehorama fapa Ahazia chu a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahazia chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmli leh kum hnih a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum khat a lal a; a nu hming chu Athali, Omria fanu a ni a." 
2Chronicles22:3 Ani pawh chuan Ahaba chhungte kawng zawh chu a zaw veh a: a nu chu thil sual taka ti tura kaihhruaitu a ni a. 
2Chronicles22:4 Ahana chhungkuate tih ang bawkin LALPA mithmuhah thil tha lo a ti a: a pa thih hnuin a chhiatna tura kaihruaitu an ni. 
2Chronicles22:5 An kaihhruai ang chuan a awm bawk a, Ramoth-gilead-ah Suria lal Hazaela do turin Israel lal Aaba fapa Jehorama hnena a kal a; tichuan Suria ho chuan Jehorama chu an lo hliam a." 
2Chronicles22:6 Suria lal Hazaela a va beinaa Rama-a an lo hliam tidam turin Jezreel-ah a kal a. Tichuan Juda lal Jehorama fapa Azaria chu Ahaba fapa Jehorama a dam loh avang chuan a kan turin Jezreel-ah chuan a kal a. 
2Chronicles22:7 Tichuan Ahazia Jehorama hnena a kal a, a boralna chu Patian tih a ni a; Nimsia fapa Jehua bei turin Jehorama hnenah a kal avangin. Chu mi chu Ahaa chhungte timang tura LALPA ruat a ni si a." 
2Chronicles22:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ahaba chhungte tichhe tura a beih laiin Juda puipate leh Ahazia unau fapatehoin Ahazia rawng an bawl lai a hmu a, a that ta hlawm a." 
2Chronicles22:9 Ahazia chu an zawng a, an man a, (Samari-ah a biru a ni) Jehua hnenah an rawn hruai a, an that a; tin, ""A thinlung zawng zawnga LALPA zawng thin Jehosaphata fapa a ni si a,"" an ti a, a phumin an phum a. Tichuan Ahazia chhungte chuan an ramah thuneihna an nei ta lo a." 
2Chronicles22:10 Tin, Ahazia nu Athali chuan a fapa a thi tih a lo hriat chuan a tho a, Juda lal zawng zawng chu a that ta vek mai a." 
2Chronicles22:11 Ahazia fapa Joasa erawh chu lal fanu Jehosabeathi chuan lal fapa an thahte zing ata chu a hruai bo a, a enkawltu nen khum pindanah a thukru hlau mai a. Chutichuan lal Jehorama fanu Jehosabeathi, puithiam Jehoiada nupui (Ahazia farnu a ni a) Athali hmuh theih loh turin a thukru a, tichuan an that ta lo a.Tin, an hnena chengin Pathian inah kum ruk a rukin a awm a: tichuan Athali chu an rama chuan a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles22:12 Tin, an hnena chengin Pathian inah kum ruk a rukin a awm a: tichuan Athali chu an rama chuan a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles23:1 Tin, a kumsarih kumah chuan Jehoiada chu a intichak a, sipai za hotu, Jehorama fapa Azaria te, Jehanana fapa Ismaela te, Obeda fapa Azaria te, Adaia fapa Maaseia te, Zikria fapa Elisa phata te hnenah thu a thlung a." 
2Chronicles23:2 Tin, Judai ram an fang a; Judai ram khaw tina Levi-hote leh Israelte chhungkaw puipate an khawm a. Jerusalem an han thleng a." 
2Chronicles23:3 Tin, pungkhawmho zawng anwg chuan Pathian inah lal hnenah chuan thu an thlung a. Tin, an hnenah, ""Ngai teh u, LALPA'n Davida fapate chungchang thu a lo sawi angin lal fapa chu a lal tur a ni." 
2Chronicles23:4 In tih tur chu hetiang hi a ni: Puithiamte leh Levi-ho chawlhnia lo kal thinte chu hmun thuma thena hmun khat kawngkhar vengtute in ni ang a. 
2Chronicles23:5 Tin, hmun thuma thena hmun khat chu lal inah in awm ang a; tin, hmun thuma thena hmun khat chu kulh kawngkaah; tin, mipui zawng zawng chu LALPA in kawt hung chhungah an awm ang." 
2Chronicles23:6 Nimahsela puithiamte leh rawngbawltu Levi-hote chauh lo chu tumah LALPA inah lut suh se; anni chu an thianghlim avangin an lut ang a, mipui zawng zawng erawh chu LALPA ngaichangin an awm tur a ni." 
2Chronicles23:7 Tin, Levi-hoin an hriamhrei kengin lal chu an din hual ang a; tin, tupawh ina lo lut chu thah tur a ni a; tin, lal chu a chauh leh a luhin a hnenah awm zel rawh u,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles23:8 Chutichuan Levi-ho leh Juda zawng zawngte chuan puithiam Jehoiada thupek ang zawng zawng chuan an ti a; tin, mahni hote theuh chawlhnia lo kal turte leh chawlhnia tin turte chu an hruai a; puithiam Jehoiada chuan a tin tur pawl chu a la tintir si lo a." 
2Chronicles23:9 Tin, puithiam Jehoiada chuan sipai za hotute chu LALPA ina awm lal Davida fei leh phawte leh phaw liante chu a pe a." 
2Chronicles23:10 Tin, mite chu hriamhrei keng theuhin in ding lampang atangin vei lampang thlengin maicham leh In hualin lal a din hualtir a." 
2Chronicles23:11 Chutichuan lal fapa chu an rawn hruai chuak a, lallukhum an khumtir a, thuhriattirna chu an pe a, lalah an siam a, Jehoiada leh a fapate chuan hriak an thih a, ""Pathianin lal chu humhim rawh se,"" an ti a." 
2Chronicles23:12 Tin, Athaliin mipui lal chawimawia an zi mur mur thawm chu a hriatin LALPA inah mipui zingah chuan a va kal a;" 
2Chronicles23:13 tin, a han en a, ngai teh, kawngkaa ban bulah lal chu a ding a, a kianga sipai hotute leh tawtawrawt hamtute nen; tin, chu mi rama mi zawng zawng chu an hlim em em a, tawtawrawtte an ham dur dur a; tin, hla satute chuan an thil ri theite tumin fakna hla an saho a. Tichuan Athali chuan a puante a pawtthler a, ""Phiar rukna! phiar rukna a ni ta le!"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles23:14 Tin, puithiam Jehoiada chuan sipaite chunga hotua ruat sipai za hotute chu a hruai chuak a, an hnenah, ""Sipaihote karah chhuahtir u la, tin, tupawh a zui apiang chu khandaiha sahhlum ni rawh se,"" a ti a; puithiam chuan, ""LALPA inah zawng thah tur a ni lo e,"" a lo ti tawh si a." 
2Chronicles23:15 Chutichuan kawng an kian a, tin, sakawr luhna kawngkaah lal inah a kal a, chutah chuan an that a ni." 
2Chronicles23:16 Tin, Jehoiada chuan amah leh mipui zawng zawng leh lal karah chuan LALPA mite ni turin thu a thlung ta a." 
2Chronicles23:17 Tin, mipui zawng zawng chu Baala inah an kal a, an tichhia a, a maicham te, a lemte an tisawm dep a, Baala puithiam Matana chu maicham bula an that a." 
2Chronicles23:18 Tin, Jehoiada chuan, Mosia dan bua a ziak anga hlim tak leh hla sa chunga Davida'n LALPA ina LALPA hnena halral thilhlan hlan tura a lo ruat puithiam Levi-ho hnuaia thawk turin Davida thupek angin LALPA biak in vengtu turte pek angin LALPA biak in vengtu turte chu a ruat a." 
2Chronicles23:19 Thianghlim lo tawh phawt chu an luh lohna'n LALPA in kawng khar vengtute a ruat a. 
2Chronicles23:20 Tin, za chunga hotu te, mi tha te, mipui awptute chu mi rama mi zawng zawngte chu a hruai a, LALPA ina lal chu an han hruai thla a; kawngkhar chhakta zawkah lal in lamah an kal a, lal chu an ram lalthutthlengah chuan an thuttir ta a.Chutichuan chu rama mi zawng zawng chu hlim takin an awm a, khua chu ralmuangin a awm ta a: Athali chu khandaihin an that a." 
2Chronicles23:21 Chutichuan chu rama mi zawng zawng chu hlim takin an awm a, khua chu ralmuangin a awm ta a: Athali chu khandaihin an that a." 
2Chronicles24:1 Joasa chu a lal tantirhin kum sarih mi a ni a: Jerusalem-ah kum sawmli a lal a; a nu hming chu Zibiai, Beer-seba a mi a ni." 
2Chronicles24:2 Tin, Joasa chuan puithiam Jehoiada dam chhung chuan LALPA mithmuhin thil tha a ti a." 
2Chronicles24:3 Tin, Jehoiada chuan nupui pahnih a neihsak a, fanu leh fapate a hring a." 
2Chronicles24:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu mi zawhah chuan Joasa chuan LALPA in siam that a rilruk a," 
2Chronicles24:5 Puithiamte leh Levi-ho a ko khawm a, Juda-ho khuaahte kal u la, kum tina in Pathian In siam thatna'n Israel mi zawng zawng hnenah tangka va khawn khawm raw u khai, muangchang suh ang che u,"" a ti a. Nimahsela Levi-hote chu an hmanhmawh chuang lo a." 
2Chronicles24:6 Tin, lal chuan puithiam lal ber Jehoiada chu a ko a, a hnenah, ""Engati nge Levi-hote chu LALPA chhiahhlawh Mosia le Israel mipuite ruat hriattirna puan in atana thawh bi ruat chu Juda mi leh Jerusalem=a mite thawh turin i phut loh?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Mi sualnu Athali fapate chuan Pathian in chu an tiche zo ta si a; tin, LALPA ina thilhlan zawng zawng chu Baala te an pe zo ta bawk si a,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles24:8 Chutichuan lalin thu a pe a, bawm an siam a, LALPA in kawngka pawn lamah chuan an dah a." 
2Chronicles24:9 Tin, thlalera Pathian chiahlawh Mosia'n Israel mite tih tura thawh bi a ruat chu LALPA tana rawn thawh turinJudai ram zawng zawng leh Jerusalem=ah thu a than vel ta a." 
2Chronicles24:10 Tichuan miliante le mipuite chu an lawm a, an tangkate an rawn la a, an khawn zawh hma chuan bawmah chuan an rawn dah ta ruih ruih mai a." 
2Chronicles24:11 Tin, Levi-hoten lal puipate hnenah bawm chu an rawn lak a, tangka tam tak an awm tih an hriat chuan, lal lehkha ziaktu leh puithiam lal ruat puipa chuan bawm ata chu an bun chhuak a, an la a, a hmunah chuan an dah leh a. Chutiang chuan ni tin, an ti a, tangka chu tam tak an khawlkhawm ta a." 
2Chronicles24:12 Tin, lal Jehoiada chuan LALPA in hna thawktute kutah a pe a, LALPA in siam tha turin lung chhertute leh themthiamte an ruai a, tin, LALPA in siam tha turin thir leh dara themthiamte pawh." 
2Chronicles24:13 Tichuan thawktute chuan an bei a, an thawk tha hle mai a, Pathian in chu a ngai chiahin an siam tha a, an din nghet leh ta a." 
2Chronicles24:14 Tin, an zawh chuan tangka la awm zawng zawng chu lal leh Jehoiada hnenah an rawn la a, chu chuan LALPA ina rawngbawlna'na bungbel te, hlanna bungbel te, thirfian te, rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbel te lamin an siam a. Tichuan Jehoiada dam chhung chuan LALPA inah halral thiLhlan chu an hlan reng a." 
2Chronicles24:15 Nimahsela Jehoiada chu upa tak, tarkuna damin a thi ta a. A thih chuan kum Za leh sawmthum mi a ni." 
2Chronicles24:16 Tin, Israelte zinga Pathian chungah leh a in chungchanga thil a tih that avangin Davida khawpuiah lalte zingah an phum a." 
2Chronicles24:17 Tin, Jehoiada thih hnu chuan Juda mi liante chu an lo thawk a, lal hnenah dawvan an rawn kai a. Lal chuan an thu chu a lo pawm a." 
2Chronicles24:18 Tichuan a pi leh pute Pathian LALPA in chu an hawisan a, Aserite leh milemte rawng an bawl ta a: tin, an sualna avangin Juda te leh Jerusalem chungah thinurna a lo thleng ta a." 
2Chronicles24:19 Nimahsela LALPA hnena hruai leh turin an hnena zawlneite a tir a, an thiam lohzia te an hriattir a, nimahsela an beng an chi duh chuang lo." 
2Chronicles24:20 Tin, puithiam Jehoiada fapa Zekaria chungah Pathian thlarau a lo thleng a, ani chu mipui chung lamah a ding a, an hnenah, ""Pathianin heti hian a ti. 'Engati nge hmuingil theih loh phaha LALPA thupek chu in bawhchhiat? LALPA chu in hawisan avangin ani pawhin a hawisan che u a ni,'"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles24:21 Tin, ani chu an phiar ta a, lal thupekin LALPA biak inhung chhungah chuan lungin an deng hlum ta a." 
2Chronicles24:22 Chutiang chuan lal Joasa chuan a pa Jehoiada khawngaihna chu hre reng loin a fapa chu a that ta a ni. Tin, a thih dawn chuan, ""LALPA'n a rawn ngaihtuah ang a, phuba a la rawn laksak ang,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles24:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum a lo vei chuan Suria sipaiten an rawn bei a; Judai ram leh Jerusalem-ah an lut a, an milian zawng zawngte chu an tihboralsak a, Damaska lal hnenah an rallak sum zawng zawngte chu an thawn ta vek mai a." 
2Chronicles24:24 Suria sipaite chu tlemte chauh an lo thawk a ni a; an pi leh pute Pathian LALPA chu an hawisan avangin LALPA'n sipai tam tak maite chu an kutah a pe a ni. Chutiang chuan Joasa chungah hremna an thlensak a ni. 
2Chronicles24:25 Tin, an hawnsan hnu chuan (natna nasa tak tuarin an hawnsan a ni) ama mite ngeiin puithiam Jehoiada fapate thisen avang khan an phiar a, a khum mu lai chu an that a, a thi ta a: Davida khawpuiah chuan an phum a; nimahsela lalte thlanah an phum ve lo." 
2Chronicles24:26 Hengte hi amah phiartute chu an ni; Amon mi Simeathi fapa Zabada leh Moab mi Simrithi fapa Jehozabada.Tichuan a fapate chungchang thu te, a chunga phurrit tak lo innghah chungchang thu te chu, ngai teh, lal chanchin hrilhfiahna buah chuan ziak a ni. Tin, a aiah a fapa Amazia chu a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles24:27 Tichuan a fapate chungchang thu te, a chunga phurrit tak lo innghah chungchang thu te chu, ngai teh, lal chanchin hrilhfiahna buah chuan ziak a ni. Tin, a aiah a fapa Amazia chu a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amazia chu a lal tantir chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh kum kua a lal a; a nu hming chu Jehoada ni, Jerusalem mi a ni." 
2Chronicles25:2 LALPA mithmuhin thil tha a ti a, amaherawhchu a rilru a pe famkim lo." 
2Chronicles25:3 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, a ram chu a lo din ngheh chuan a pa thattu, a chiahlawhte a that a." 
2Chronicles25:4 Amaherawhchu an fate chu a that lo a, Mosia lehkhabu, dana chuang, ""Fate avangin pate an thi tur a ni lo a, pate avangin fate an thi tur a ni hek lo, mi tin, mahni sual avangin an thi tur a ni,"" tia LALPA'n thu a pek angin a ti a." 
2Chronicles25:5 Tin, Amazia chuan Judate chu a khawm chiam a, Juda leh Benjamin mi zawng zawng an chhungkaw zir zelin sang hotute hnuaiah te, Za hotute hnuaiah te a awm tir a; tin,kum sawmhnih achin chunglam zawng a chhiar a, fei leh phaw lek thei, ralkai chin thlan thiau mi nuaithum an awm a." 
2Chronicles25:6 Tin, Israel rama mi, mi chak huaisen nuaikhat tangka talent zain a ruai bawk a." 
2Chronicles25:7 Nimahsela a hnenah Pathian mi, mi pakhat a lo kal a, ""Aw LALPA, Israel sipaite chu i hnenah kal ve suh su, LALPA chu Israel mite (Ephraima thlahte zawng zawng huamin) hnenah chuan a awm si lo a." 
2Chronicles25:8 Kal pawh ni la, huai takin indonaah chuan che rawh: chuti lo chuan Pathianin hmelma hmaah chuan a titlawm mai ang che: Pathian chuan tanpui theihna leh tihtlawm theihna a nei si a,"" a rawn ti a." 
2Chronicles25:9 Tin, Amazian Pathian mi hnenah chuan, ""A nih leh, Israel sipaite ka pek tak talent za chu engtin nge kan tih tak ang?"" a ti a. Tin, Pathian mi chuan, ""LALPA chuan chu aia tam tak chu a pe thei che a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles25:10 Tichuan Amazia chuan Ephraim rama atanga sipai lo kalte chu haw leh turin a tihrang a; chuvang chuan Judate chungah chuan an thin a rim hle mai a, thimrim engphiarin an haw leh ta a." 
2Chronicles25:11 Tin, Amazia chuan zam loin a mite chu a hruai chuak a, Chi Ruamah an kal a, Seira thlahte singkhat an that a." 
2Chronicles25:12 Tin, singkhat dang chu Judaten a nungin an man a, lungpui chhipah an hruai a, lungpui chhip atang chuan an nam thla chiam mai a, an keh sawm ta rem rum mai a." 
2Chronicles25:13 Amaherawhchu Amazian a hnena ralkap tura kal ve lo tura a hawntir sipaite chuan Judai ram khua te, Samari atanga Beth-horon thlengin an lo bei a, mi sangthum an that a, rallak sum tam tak an la a." 
2Chronicles25:14 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Amazia chu Edom-ho thata a lo haw chuan Seira thlahteho pathiante a rawn hawn a, a pathian atan a din a, chibai a buk a, rimtuite a halsak hlawm a." 
2Chronicles25:15 Chuvang chuan Amazia chungah LALPA thin a alh ta a, a hnenah zawlnei a tir a, chu mi chuan a hnenah, ""I kut ata a mite pawh chhanchuak thei hlei lo hnam pathiante chu engah tehlul nge i zawn ni?"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles25:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a hnena thu a sawi lai mek chuan lal chuan, ""Lal roreltuah kan siam che em ni? Ngawi mai rawh; engah nge i nun i chan dawn?"" a ti a. Tichuan zawlnei chuan, ""Pathianin hetianga i tih avang leh ka remruat i ngaihsan loh avangin tihboral che i rulruk tih ka hria a ni,"" a ti a, a ngawi ta a." 
2Chronicles25:17 Chutichuan Juda lal Amazia chuan a remruat chu a pawm a, Israel lal Jehua fapa Jehoahaza fa Joasa hnenah, ""Hawh teh, hmaichhanah i lo inen teh ang,"" tiin mi a tir a." 
2Chronicles25:18 Tin, Israel lal Joasa chuan Juda lal Amazia hnenah, ""Lebanon tlang hlingin Lebanon tlanga sidar thing hnenah, ""I fanu kha ka fapa nupuiah neitir teh khai, ' tiin a chah a; tin, Lebanon tlanga ramsa a lo kal a, hling chu a rawn chil thlu ta der mai a." 
2Chronicles25:19 Nang hian, "" Ngai teh, Edom chu ka hneh,' tiin i chapo a nih hi, i inah tawm hle hle mai rawh; nang leh Juda ram chawp chawpa chhiarna, i tana pawi tur thil engah nge i chawh chhuah dawn ni?"" tiin mi a tir ve a." 
2Chronicles25:20 Nimahsela Amazia chuan a lo ngaithla duh lo a; Edom-ho pathiante a zawn avanga Judai ram chu an hmelmate kuta a pek theihna tura Pathian tih a ni a," 
2Chronicles25:21 Chutichuan Israel lal Joasa chu a han chho a; Juda lal Amazia nen chuan Judai ram Beth-semes khuaah hmaichhanah an inen ta ngei a," 
2Chronicles25:22 Tin, Judate chan chu Israelte ai chuan a lo chhe ta zawk a; mi tin, mahni in lamah an tlan haw ta theuh a." 
2Chronicles25:23 Tin, Israel lal Joasa chuan Juda lal, Ahazia fapa Jehoasa fa Amazia chu Beth-semes-ah chuan a man a, Jerusalem-ah a hruai a, Jerusalem kulh chu Ephraim kulh kawngka atanga kulh kil kawngka thlengin tawng zali zet a tichim a." 
2Chronicles25:24 Tin, LALPA ina mi leh lal ina ro dah khawmnaa mi rangkachak leh tangkarua leh bungbel zawng zawng a awm apiang a la a, hrenga tang turte nen, tin, Samari khaw lamah a haw leh ta.a" 
2Chronicles25:25 Tin, Juda lal Joasa fapa Amazia thih hnuin kum sawm lehkum nga a la dam a." 
2Chronicles25:26 Tichuan Amazia thiltih dangte chu a bul atanga a tawp thlengin, ngai teh, Juda lal leh Israel lalte lal lai thuziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Chutichuan Amazian LALPA zui a bansan veleh Jerusalem-ah chuan an phiar a, Lakis khuaah a tlan a; nimahsela Lakis khuaah chuan mi an umtir a, chutah chuan an that ta a.Tin, a ruang chu sakawrin an phur a, a pi leh pute hnenah Juda khawpuiah an phum ta a." 
2Chronicles25:28 Tin, a ruang chu sakawrin an phur a, a pi leh pute hnenah Juda khawpuiah an phum ta a." 
2Chronicles26:1 Tin, Juda mi zawng zawng chuan kum sawm leh kum ruk mi Uzia chu an hruai a, a pa Amazia aiah lalah an siam ta a." 
2Chronicles26:2 Ani chuan lal chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muthilh hnuah Elot khua chu a siam tha a. Judai ramah a telh leh a. 
2Chronicles26:3 Uzia chu a lal tantirhin kum sawm leh kum ruk mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh kum hnih a lal a, a nu hming chu Jekoiliai, Jerusalem mi a ni a." 
2Chronicles26:4 Tin, a pa Amazia thiltih ang apiang ti vein LALPA mithmuha thil tha tak a ti thin a." 
2Chronicles26:5 Pathian inlarna hrethiam Zekaria dam chhung chuan Pathian zawng turin a insiam tlat a: Pathian a zawn chhung zawng chuan Pathianin a tihmuingil zel a. 
2Chronicles26:6 Philistia-ho run turin a thawk chuak a, Gat kulh te, Jabne kulh te, Asdod kulh te a tichim a; tin, Asdod ramah leh Philistia-ho zingahte khua a siam a." 
2Chronicles26:7 Tin, Pathian Philistia hote lakah leh Gur-baal-a awm Arabia-ho leh Meun-ho lakahte a tanpui a." 
2Chronicles26:8 Tin, Amon-hote chuan Uzia lakah chhiah an chawi thin a; tichuan a lo chak tak ema vangin Aigupta ram thlengin a hming a thang ta a." 
2Chronicles26:9 Tin, Uzia chuan Jerusalem-ah Kil kawngkaah te, Ruam Kawngkaah te, kulh kawina lai kawngkaah te in sang a sa bawk a, kulhin a hung a." 
2Chronicles26:10 Tin, thlalerah pawh in sang a sa a, ran tam tak a neih avangin tui te a lai chhuak thluah mai a, phai lam leh phai zawlahte pawh; tin, lo nei mite leh uain sawr mite tlang lamah leh ram thaahte chuan a nei a, thlawhhma lam ngaina mi tak a ni." 
2Chronicles26:11 Tin, Uzia chuan sipai indo mi, lal sipai hotu Hanania hnuaia mi, lehkha ziaktu Jeiela leh hotu Maaseia ten an ruat ang zela a pawl pawla ralkap mi a nei bawk a." 
2Chronicles26:12 Mi chak huaisen thiau, an chhungkaw puipa zawng zawng chu 26,000 an ni a." 
2Chronicles26:13 Tin, an hnuaia chuan sipai zir thiam sa thiau 307500 hmelma laka lal tanpuitu ral bei mi tak tak an awm a." 
2Chronicles26:14 Tin, Uzia chuan sipai zawng zawng tan phaw te, fei te, thir lukhum te, thir kawr te, thalngul te, virvawm atan lungte a buatsaih a." 
2Chronicles26:15 Tin, Jerusalem-ah in sang leh kulh kil tina daha thal lo kahna leh lung lian fe fea lo denna tur, mi fingte hriat chhuah khawlte a siam a. A ming chu ram tin, ram tangah a thang ta a; a lo chak hle thlengin amaka maka tanpuiin a awm a." 
2Chronicles26:16 Nimahsela a lo chak tak hnu chuan a rilru a lo sang ta a, tha lo takin thil a ti a, LALPA a Pathian chungah thil a tisual ta a; maicham rimtui hal turin LALPA biak inah a lut ta maia." 
2Chronicles26:17 Tin, puithiam Azaria chuan a zui a, mi huai tak tak LALPA puithiam sawmriat an el ve a;" 
2Chronicles26:18 tin, lal Uzia chu an khap a, a hnenah, ""Uzi, LALPA tana rimtui hal hi i tih tur a ni lo a, rimtui hal tura tihhran Arona fapa puithiamte tih tur a ni zawk e; hmun thianghlim ata hi chhuak rawh; thil i tisual a nih hi, LALPA Pathian laka i ropuina tur pawh a ni bawk lo,"" an ti a." 
2Chronicles26:19 Chutichuan Uzia chu a thinur ta a; rimtui halna tur mei lakna a keng a;tin, chutia puithiamte chunga a thinur lai tak chuan LALPA inah, rimtui halna bulah puithiamte hmaah chuan a chalah a lo phar chhuak ta a." 
2Chronicles26:20 Tin, puithiam hotu Azaria leh puithiam zawng zawng chuan an han en a, ngai teh, a chalah chuan a lo phar a, chuta tang chuan an nam chuak ta thuai a: a ni, LALPA'n a hrem avangin amah pawh hmanhmawh tak bawkin a chhuak ta a." 
2Chronicles26:21 Tichuan lal Uzia chu a thih ni thlengin a lo phar ta a, a phar avangin in hrangah a awm ta a; LALPA in ata chu tihchhhuah a ni a, tichuan a fapa Jothama chu an rama mite rorelin lal ina awptuah a awm ta a." 
2Chronicles26:22 Tichuan Uzia thiltih dang zawng zawngte chu a bul atanga a tawp thlenga Amoza fapa zawlnei Isaian a ziak a.Chutichuan Uzia chu api leh a pute hnenah chuan a muhil a, lal inphumna hmuna a pi leh a pute zingah an phum a, ""Ani zawng phar a ni si a,"" an ti a: tin, a fapa Jothama chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles26:23 Chutichuan Uzia chu api leh a pute hnenah chuan a muhil a, lal inphumna hmuna a pi leh a pute zingah an phum a, ""Ani zawng phar a ni si a,"" an ti a: tin, a fapa Jothama chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jothama chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawm leh kum ruk a lal a: a nu hming chu Jerusai, Zadoka fanu a ni." 
2Chronicles27:2 Tin, a pa Uzia thiltih ang apiang ti vein LALPA mithmuha thil tha a ti thin a, LALPA biak inah erawh chuan a lut ve lo. Nimahsela mite chuan tha lo takin thil an la ti fo mai a." 
2Chronicles27:3 LALPA ina kawngkhar chhakta zawk a siam a, tin, Ophel kulh chungah chuan in tam tak a sa bawk a." 
2Chronicles27:4 Tin, Judai tlang ramah khuate a siam a, ramhnuaiah inropui tak tak te, in sangte a sa bawk a." 
2Chronicles27:5 Tin, Amona thlahte lal a do a; a hneh a. Tin, Amona thlahte chuan chu mi kum chuan tangka talent za leh buh phur sing leh barli phur singkhat an pe a. Chutiang bawk chuan Amona thlahte chuan a kum hnihna leh a kum thumnaah pawh an pe a." 
2Chronicles27:6 Chutichuan Jothama chuan LALPA a Pathian hmaa a kawng a rel fel avangin a lo chak ta a. 
2Chronicles27:7 Tichuan Jothama thiltih dang zawng zawng, a ral do zawng zawngte, a awm dan zawng zawngte chu, ngai teh, Israel leh Juda lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a." 
2Chronicles27:8 A lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a n a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawm leh kum ruk a lal a.Tin, Jothama chu a pi leh a pute hnenah a muhil a, Davida khawpuiah an phum a: tin, a fapa Ahaza chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles27:9 Tin, Jothama chu a pi leh a pute hnenah a muhil a, Davida khawpuiah an phum a: tin, a fapa Ahaza chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahaza chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih mi a ni a; tin, Jerusalem-ah kum sawm leh kum ruk a lal a: a pu Davida angin LALPA mithmuhah thil tha a ti ve lo va:" 
2Chronicles28:2 Israel lalte kawng a zawh zawk a, Baala-te tan milem chhun chawpte a siam bawk a." 
2Chronicles28:3 Hinoma fapa ruamah rimtuite a hal a. LALPA'n Israela thlahte hmaa a hnawhchhuah tak hnamten thil tenawm tak an ti thin angin a fate meiah a luhtir a. 
2Chronicles28:4 Tin, hmun sangah te, tlangah te, thing hring tin hnuaiah te a inthawi a, rimtuite a hal thin a." 
2Chronicles28:5 Chuvangin LALPA a Pathianin Suria lal kutah a pe a; an bei a, a mite tam tak salah an hruai a, Damaska-ah an kalpui a. Tin, Israel lal kutah pek a ni bawk a, ani chuan tam tak a that a," 
2Chronicles28:6 Remalia fapa Peka chuan Judai ramah nuaikhat leh singhnih ni khatah a that a, an za chuan mi huaisen theuh an ni; an pi leh pute lalpa Pathian chu an hawisan vang a ni." 
2Chronicles28:7 Tin, Ephraim mi chhung puipa Azrikama leh Elkana, lal dawttur chu a that a." 
2Chronicles28:8 Tin, Israela thlahten an unaute nuaihnih, hmeichhia te, an fapa te, an fanute salah an hruai a; rallak tam tak an laksak bawk a, rallak chu Samari-ah an thlen a." 
2Chronicles28:9 Nimahsela chutah chuan LALPA zawlnei a lo awm a, a hming chu Odeda a ni; Samaria lo kal tur sipaite chu a va hmuak a, an hnenah, ""Ngai teh u, LALPA in pi leh pute Pathian chu Judate chungah a thinur a, in kutah a pe che u a ni a, thinrima in thahna chuan van a han tawng ta a." 
2Chronicles28:10 Tin, Juda leh Jerusalem mite chu bawihnu le bawihpaa siam in tum a: nimahsela nangni ngei pawh hian LALPA in Pathian chungah in tisual ve a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Chuvangin ka thu hi pawm u la, in unau sala in mante hi hawntir leh rawh u, LALPA thinurna nasa tak mai chu in chungah a awm a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles28:12 Tichuan Ephraim-ho hotu thenkhat, Johanana fapa Azaria te, Mesilemotha fapa Berekia te, Saluma fapa Jehizkia te, Haldaia fapa Amasa te chuan indona atanga lo hawte chu an lo khalh ve bawk a," 
2Chronicles28:13 an hnenah, ""Salte chu in rawn hruai lut tur a ni lo; kan sual leh kan bawhchhiatna belhchhahin LALPA chungah bawhchhiatna min thlensak dawn a ni; kan sualna chu a nasa hle si a, Israel mite chunga thinurna nasa tak a awm a ni,"" an lo ti a." 
2Chronicles28:14 Chutichuan sipaite chuan mi liante leh mipi hmaah chuan salte leh rallak sumte chu an hnutchhiah ta a. 
2Chronicles28:15 Tin, an hming lam takhote chu an lo tho a, salte chu an hruai a, rallak thil chuanin saruaka awm zawngte chu silhfen an ban a, an tuam a, pheikhawkte an buntir a, ei tur leh in tur an pe a, hriakte an thih a, a chhia thate zawng zawng chu sabengtungah an chuantir a, Tum khua Jerikova an unaute hnenah an kaltir ta a; tin anni chu Samari-ah an haw leh ta a." 
2Chronicles28:16 Chu mi lai chuan lal Ahaza chuan Suria lalte tanpuia sawm turin mi a tir a; 
2Chronicles28:17 Edom-ho chuan Juda-ho chu an han bei a, salah te an rawn man leh avangin." 
2Chronicles28:18 Tin, Philistia-hote pawhin phai lamkhuate leh Juda Chhim te an rawn la a, Beth-semes te, Aijalon te, Gederot te, Soko te a khawperte nen, tin, Timna leh a khawper te, Gimzo pawh a khawperte nen an la a, chungah chuan an awm a." 
2Chronicles28:19 Juda lal Ahaza khan Judate dik lo takin a timualpho fo a, LALPA chungah thil sual nasa tak a tih avang khan LALPA'n Judate chu a titlawm a ni." 
2Chronicles28:20 Tin, Suria lal Tilgath-pilnesera a hnenah a kal a, tihchak ahnekin a timangang zawk a." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ahaza chuan LALPA in leh lal in leh mi lian ina mi thilte a la a, Suria lal a pe a; nimahsela a sawt chuang si lo." 
2Chronicles28:22 A mangan lai takte pawh chuan he lal Ahaza hian LALPA chungah thil a la tisual deuh deuh ta mai a. 
2Chronicles28:23 Amah beitu Damaska-ho pathian hnena te a inthawi a; Suria lalte pathian chuan anmahni a puih avangin mi puih ve theihna'n an hnenah ka inthawi dawn a ni,"" te a ti a. Nimahsela amah leh Israel mi zawng zawng chhiatna a ni si a." 
2Chronicles28:24 Tin, Ahaza chuan Pathian ina bungbelte chu a khawm vek a, Pathian ina bungbelte chu a tisawm vek a, LALPA in kawngkarte chu a khar tlat a; tin, Jerusalem kil tinah maicham a siam a." 
2Chronicles28:25 Tin, Juda khaw tam takah chuan Pathian dangte tan rimtui halna'n hmun sangte a siam a, LALPA a pi leh pute Pathian a tithinur a." 
2Chronicles28:26 A thiltih dang zawng zawng leh a awm dan zawng zawng a bul atanga a tawp thlengin, ngai teh, Judate leh Israelte lalte chanchin buah a chuang a.Tin, Ahaza chu api leh a pute hnenah a muhil a, Jerusalem khawpuiah chuan an phum a; Israel lalte thlanah chuan an da lo a ni: tin, a fapa Hezekia chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles28:27 Tin, Ahaza chu api leh a pute hnenah a muhil a, Jerusalem khawpuiah chuan an phum a; Israel lalte thlanah chuan an da lo a ni: tin, a fapa Hezekia chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekia chu kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a nihin a lal tan a; Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh kum kua a lal a: a nu hming chu Abijai, Zekaria fanu a ni a." 
2Chronicles29:2 Tin, a pu Davida thiltih apiang ti vein LALPA mithmuhah thil tha a ti thin a." 
2Chronicles29:3 Ani chuan a lal tan kum thla khatnaah LALPA in kawngkharte chu a hawng a, a chei tha a." 
2Chronicles29:4 Puithiamte leh Levi-hote a hruai lut a, chhak lampang hmun zau laiah a hruai kkawm a," 
2Chronicles29:5 an hnenah, ""Nangni Levi hote u, ka thu hi ngaithla rawh u; nangmahni intithianghlim phawt u la, tin, LALPA, in pi leh pute Pathian in hi tithianghlim ula, hmun thianghlim - ata bawlhhlawhte hi paih chhuak rawh u." 
2Chronicles29:6 Kan pi leh pute chuan thil an lo tisual ta a, LALPA kan Pathian mithmuha thil tha lo chu an lo ti a, an lo hawisan a, LALPA awmna chu an hawisan a, an lo hnuchhawn ta a." 
2Chronicles29:7 Hulhliap kawngkharte chu an khar a, khawnvarte chu an timit a, Israelte Pathian hmun thianghlimah chuan rimtuite an hal lo a, halral thilhlante an hlan lo bawk a." 
2Chronicles29:8 Chuvang chuan LALPA thinurna chu Judate leh Jerusalemte chungah a awm a, in mita in hmuh ang hian, ram tin, ram tanga tei tei tur leh mak tih atan leh nuihzatbur atan a lo siam ta a ni." 
2Chronicles29:9 Ngai teh u, kan pi le pute chu khandaiha tihtlawmin an lo awm a, kan fanu leh kan fapte, kan nupuite chu, chung avang chuan salah an lo awm a." 
2Chronicles29:10 Ngai te u, a thinurna nasa tak chu a kian theihna'n LALPA Israelte Pathian hnena thuthlun ka tum a ni." 
2Chronicles29:11 Ka naute u, ngur chuai suh u, LALPA chuan a rawngbawltu in ni a, a hmaa a rawngbawla awm tur le rimtui haltuah a thlang tawh che u a ni,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles29:12 Chutichuan Levi mi Amasaia fapa Mahata te, Kohat mi Azaria fapa Joela te; Meraria fapate zinga Abdia fapa Kisa te, Jahalelela fapa Azaria te, Gersonmi Zima fapa Hova te, Jova fapa Edena te; Zima fapa Jova te, Jova fapa Edena te;" 
2Chronicles29:12 Chutichuan Levi mi Amasaia fapa Mahata te, Kohat mi Azaria fapa Joela te; Meraria fapate zinga Abdia fapa Kisa te, Jahalelela fapa Azaria te, Gersonmi Zima fapa Hova te, Jova fapa Edena te; Zima fapa Jova te, Jova fapa Edena te;" 
2Chronicles29:13 Elizaphana fapate zinga mi Simria leh Jeuela te; Asapha fapate zinga mi Zekaria leh Matania te; 
2Chronicles29:14 Hemana fapate zinga mi Jehuela leh Simeia te; Jeduthuna fapate zinga mi Semaia le Uziela te chu an thawk chhuak a. 
2Chronicles29:15 An unaute an ko khawm a, an intithianghlim a, LAPA thua lal thupek anga LALPA in tifai turin an lut a." 
2Chronicles29:16 Tin, puithiamte chu a tifai turin LALPA in chhung ril lamah an lut a, LALPA biak ina thil bawlhlawh an hmuh zawng zawng chu LALPA in kawtah an la chuak a. Tin, Levi-hoin an la a, Kidron luiah an kalpui a." 
2Chronicles29:17 Thla khatna ni khat niin an bei tan a, chu mi thla ni riat niin LALPA hulliap an bei tleng a; tichuan ni riatah LALPA in chu an tithianghlim a; thla khatna, ni sawm leh ni ruk niin an zo vek a." 
2Chronicles29:18 Chutichuan lal Hezekia hnenah lal ina an lut a, ""LALPA in chu kan tifai zo ta vek a, halral thillan hlanna maicham te, chu mia bungbel zawng zawng te, chhang chhiahna dawhkan te, chu mia hmanrua zawng zawngte pawh." 
2Chronicles29:19 Tin, lal Ahazan a lal laia thil a tihsual a, a thehthang bo bungbel zawng zawngte pawh kan din leh vek a, kan titianghlim bawk a; tin, ngai teh, LALPA maicham hma lamah a awm e,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles29:20 Chutichuan lal Hezekia chu zing takah a tho a, khuaa mi lianhote chu a ko khawm a, LALPA inah chuan an chho a." 
2Chronicles29:21 Tin, ram leh hmun thianghlim leh Juda-hote tana sual thawina tur bawngpa pasarih leh berampa pasarih leh beram no pasarih leh kelpa pasarih an kai chho a. Tin, Arona fapa puithiamte chu LALPA maichama hlan turin thu a pe a." 
2Chronicles29:22 Chutichuan bawngpate chu an talh a; tin, puithiamte chuan thisen chu an la a, maicham chu an theh a, tin, berampate pawh chu an talh a, a thisen chuan maicham chu an theh a, tin, beram note pawh chu an talh a, a thisen chuan maicham chu an theh a." 
2Chronicles29:23 Tin, kelpate chu sual thawina'n lal leh mipuiho kiangah chuan an rawn kai hnai a, an chungah chuan an kut an nghat a;" 
2Chronicles29:24 tin, puithiamte chuan an talh a, an thisen chuan Israel mi zawng zawng tana remna siamna'n maichamah sual thawina an hlan a; Israel mi zawng zawng tan halral thilhlan leh sual thawina siam turin lal chuan thu a pe a." 
2Chronicles29:25 Tin, Davida leh lal zawlnei Gada leh zawlnei Nathana thupek angin LALPA inah chuan Levi-ho chu darbenthek te, perhkhuar te, tingtangte tum tum turin a dah a; thupek chu a zawlnei te hmanga LALPA pek a ni si a." 
2Chronicles29:26 Tin, Levi-ho chu Davida siam thil tumrik mi nen an ding a, puithiamte chu tawtawrawt nen." 
2Chronicles29:27 Tin, Hezekia chuan maichama halral thilhlan hlan tur chuan thu a pe a. Tin, halral thilhlan an han hlan tan chuan LALPA hla chu tawtawrawt leh Israel lal Davida siam thil tum rik nen an sa tawn bawk a." 
2Chronicles29:28 Tin, mipuite chuan Pathian chibai an buk a, hla satute chuan hla an sa a, tawtawrawt hamtute chuan an ham a, halral thilhlan hlan zawh hma loh chuan chutiang chuan an ti reng a." 
2Chronicles29:29 Tin, thil hlan an hlan zawh chuan lal leh a hnena awm ve zawng zawngte chuan kunin Pathian chibai an buk a." 
2Chronicles29:30 Tin, lal Hezekia leh mi liante chuan Levi-hote chu Davida leh zawlnei Asapaha phuah fakna hla sa turin thu an pe a. Tin, hlim takin fakna hla an sa a, an kun a, Pathian chibai an buk a." 
2Chronicles29:31 Chutichuan Hezekia chuan, ""LALPA tan in intithianghlim ta a, lo hnai u la, LALPA inah inthawina leh lawm thu sawina thilhlan rawn hlan rawh u khai,"" a ti a. Tin mipuite chuan inthawina te, lawm thu sawina thilhlante an rawn hlan a: a duh apiangin halral thillan an rawn hlan a." 
2Chronicles29:32 Tin, mipuiin halral thilhlan an rawn hlan zat chu bawngpa sawmsarih leh berampa za leh beram no zahnih a ni: he'ng zawng zawng hi LALPA tana halral thilhlan vek a ni." 
2Chronicles29:33 Thilhlan zawng zawng chu bawngpa zaruk, berampa sangthum a ni." 
2Chronicles29:34 Amaherawhchu puithiam an tlem lutuk a, halral thilhlan chu an lip seng lo a; chuvangin an unaute Levi-hoin an peih hma chuan puithiamte an intithianghlim thlengin an puibawm a: (Levi-hote chu puithiamhote ai mahin intihthianghlim thuah an khermei zawk mah si a)" 
2Chronicles29:35 Tin, halral thilhlante chu a tam em a, halral thilhlan tin atana remna thilhlan thau te, in tur thilhlan atan te pawh a tam em em bawk a. Chutichuan LALPA in rawngbawl dan an tifel a.Mipuite tana Pathianin a buatsaih thil avang chuan Hezekia leh mi zawng zawng hhu an lawm em em a; rin loh taka thil lo awm thut a ni lehnghal si a." 
2Chronicles29:36 Mipuite tana Pathianin a buatsaih thil avang chuan Hezekia leh mi zawng zawng hhu an lawm em em a; rin loh taka thil lo awm thut a ni lehnghal si a. 
2Chronicles30:1 Tin, Hezekia chuan Israel ram leh Judai ram zawng zawngah mi a tir a, Ephraim ram leh Manase ramahte pawh LALPA Israelte Pathian tana kalhlen kut nei tura Jerusalem-a LALPA ina lokal turin lehkha a thawn bawk a." 
2Chronicles30:2 Lal leh a miliante leh Jerusalem-a mipui zawng zawngte chuan thla hnihnaa, kalhlen kut neih an rawt a." 
2Chronicles30:3 Chumi lai chuan puithiam intithianghlimte an la tam tawk lo a, Jerusalem-a mipui an la pun khawm loh avangin an la kut thei lo a." 
2Chronicles30:4 An thil ruat chu lal leh mipuiho ngaihin a dik a. 
2Chronicles30:5 Chutichuan Israel ram zawng zawng Beer-seba atanga Dan thlengin LALPA Israelte Pathian tana kalhlen kut nei tura Jerusalem-a lo kal tura puan turin thu an tinghet ta a: a dan ang tak chuan chutianga tam chuan an la ti ngai lo a. 
2Chronicles30:6 Chutichuan lehkha tlanpuitute chu lal leh a mi lianhote lehkha kengin, Israel leh Judai ram zawng zawnga kal turin lal thupek angin an chhuak a, ""Nangni Israela thlahte u, Suria lalte kut ata chhuaka la dam chhunte lam chu a lo hawi leh theihna'n LALPA, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Israela te Pathian lam chu rawn hawi leh rawh u." 
2Chronicles30:7 Nangni zawng in pi le pute leh in unaute, LALPA an pi leh pute Pathian chunga thil tisuala an awm a, tiau tura a thlahthlam tak in hmuhte ang chuan awm ve suh u." 
2Chronicles30:8 In pi leh pute ang khan tihmawh ve tawh suh u la, LALPA hnenah intulut zawk u la, kumkhua atana a tihthianghlim, a hmun thianghlimah chuan lo lut u la, LALPA in Pathian rawng chu bawl rawh u, tichuan a thinurna nasa tak chu in lak ata a kiantir dawn nia." 
2Chronicles30:9 LALPA lam in lo hawi leh zawngin in unaute leh in fate chu sala mantute chuan an khawngaih ang a, he ramah hian an lo kal leh dawn nia: LALPA in Pathian chu ngilnei tak leh zahngai thei tak a ni si a, a lam in hawi phawt chuan a hawisan lo ang che u,"" tiin." 
2Chronicles30:10 Chutichuan lehkha tlanpuitute chu khaw tinah Ephraim leh Manase ram zawng zawngah Zebulun thlengin an kal a: nimahsela anni chuan an lo nuihzatbur a, an lo hmusit a." 
2Chronicles30:11 Amaherawhchu Aser-ho le Manase-ho leh Zebulun-ho thenkhatin an bengkhawn a, Jerusalem-ah chuan an lo kal a." 
2Chronicles30:12 Judai ramte phei chu LALPA thua lal leh milianhote thupek chu zawm turin Pathianin rilru hmun khat a puttir a. 
2Chronicles30:13 Tichuan thla hnihnaah chuan chhang dawidim telh loh kut nei turin mi tam tak Jerusalem-ah chuan an lo pung khawm chiam a, an tam ngei mai." 
2Chronicles30:14 Tin, an tho a, Jerusalem-a maichamte chu an la a, tin, rimtui halna maichamte pawh an la a, Kidron luiah an paih a." 
2Chronicles30:15 Tichuan thla hnihna ni sawm leh ni li ni chuan kalhlen kutna chu an talh a; tin, puithiamte leh Levi-ho chu an inzahpui a, an intithianghlim a, halral thilhlan chu LALPA inah an la lut a" 
2Chronicles30:16 Tin, Pathian mi Mosia dan ang takin an hmun theuhvah an ding a; tin, puithiamte chuan Levi-ho atanga an dawn thisen chu an theh a." 
2Chronicles30:17 Mipui zingah chuan intithianghlim lo an tam si a; chuvangin LALPA tana tithianghlim turin a thianghlim lo apiangte puala Levi-hote chuan kalhlen kutna an thlah a. 
2Chronicles30:18 18-19, Ephraim mite, Manase mi te, Isakar mi te, Zeulun mite tam tak achu an intithianghlim lo na a, dan lo angin kalhlen kutna chu an ei ve a. Hezekian, ""Tupawh an thinlunga Pathian LALPA, an pi leh pute Pathian zawngtu apiangte chu hmun thianghlim dan ang takin intithianghlim lo mah se la, lalpa ngilnei taka chuan ngaidam theuh rawh se,"" tiin a tawngtaisak a." 
2Chronicles30:19 18-19, Ephraim mite, Manase mi te, Isakar mi te, Zeulun mite tam tak achu an intithianghlim lo na a, dan lo angin kalhlen kutna chu an ei ve a. Hezekian, ""Tupawh an thinlunga Pathian LALPA, an pi leh pute Pathian zawngtu apiangte chu hmun thianghlim dan ang takin intithianghlim lo mah se la, lalpa ngilnei taka chuan ngaidam theuh rawh se,"" tiin a tawngtaisak a." 
2Chronicles30:20 Tin, LALPA'n Hezekia tawngtaina chu a ngaithla a, mipuite chu a tidam ta a." 
2Chronicles30:21 Tin, Israel mi Jerusalem-a awmte chuan chhang dawidim telh loh kut chu hlim takin ni sarih an hmang a; tin, Levi-ho leh puithiam ho chuan tingtang ring tak nena LALPA chawimawia hla sain ni tin, LALPA an fak a." 
2Chronicles30:22 Tin, Hezekia chuan thiam tak maia LALPA mawi taka faktu Levi-hote chu a lo thlamuan a. chutichuan LALPA an pi leh pute Pathian hnena thupha chawiin remna thilhlante hlanin ni sarih chhung chu kut ruai an theh tumtla a." 
2Chronicles30:23 Tin, mipui chuan ni sarih dang kut leh an rawt a; tichuan ni sarih dang hlim takin an kut leh a." 
2Chronicles30:24 Tin, Juda lal Jezekia chuan mipuite chu bawngpa sangkhat leh beram sangsarih talh atan a pe a; milianhote pawhin mipuite chu bawngpa sangkhat leh beram singkhat an pe bawk a; puithiam tam takte an intithianghlim a." 
2Chronicles30:25 Tichuan Juda mipui zawng zawng chu puithiamte nen Levi-hote nen, Israel ram atanga mipui lo kal zawng zawngte leh hnam dang Israel ram atanga lo kal Judai rama awmte chu an hlim em em mai a." 
2Chronicles30:26 Chutichuan hlimna ropui tak Jerusalem-ah chuan a awm a: Israel lal Davida fapa Solomona china chutiang reng reng chu Jerusalem-ah a la awm ngai lo.Chutichuan puithiam Levi-hote chu an tho a, mipuite chu mal an sawm a, an aw chu ngaihthlakin a awm a, an tawngtaina chuan a awmna thianghlim van chu a thleng ta a." 
2Chronicles30:27 Chutichuan puithiam Levi-hote chu an tho a, mipuite chu mal an sawm a, an aw chu ngaihthlakin a awm a, an tawngtaina chuan a awmna thianghlim van chu a thleng ta a." 
2Chronicles31:1 Tin, chung zawng zawng chu an tih zawh chuan chuta Israel mi awm zawng zawng chuan Judai ram zawng zawng leh Benjamin ram leh Ephraim leh Manase rama mi lungphunte an tisawm a, Aserite an kit a, hmun sangte leh maichamte an tihchim vek hma loh chuan Judairam khuaahte an kal zel a. Tin Israela thlahte zawng zawng chu an ramah mahni khaw lam theuhvah an haw leh ta a." 
2Chronicles31:2 Tin, Hezekia chuan puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu an pawl dan ang zelin mi tin, puithiamte leh Levi-hoten an tlawh theuh turin, halral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan hlantu atan te, rawngbawltu atan te, lawm thu sawitu leh LALPA awmna kawngkaa vengtu turte pawl a siam sak hlawm a." 
2Chronicles31:3 Tin, LALPA dana chuang angin zing lam leh tlai lam halral thilhlan atan te, chawlhni leh thla thar leh hunbi nei kut atan te lal chanvo atan ran a ruat bawk a." 
2Chronicles31:4 Tin, Jerusalem-a mipuite chu LALPA dana an intihchakna'n puithiamte leh Levi-hote chanpual pe turin thu a pe bawk a." 
2Chronicles31:5 Tin, thupek chu a han darh veleh chuan Israela thlahte chuan an bu te,uain te,hriak te, khawizu te, an loa thil haw hmasa berte an rawn pe chiam a; tin, an engkim sawma pakhat an rawn pe chiam bawk a." 
2Chronicles31:6 Tin, Israela thlahte leh Juda thlahte, Juda khuatea awmho chuan an bawng leh beram sawma pakhat te, LALPA an Pathian puala an voh sawma pakhat te an rawn pe a, an dah khawm teuh mai a." 
2Chronicles31:7 Thla thumnaah an dah khawm tan a, thla sarihnaa an dah khawm zo a." 
2Chronicles31:8 Tin, Jezekia leh an milianten an han hmuh chuan LALPA leh a mi Israelte chu an fak a." 
2Chronicles31:9 Chutichuan Hezekian an thil dah khawm chungchang thu chu puithiamho leh Levi-hote chu a zawt a. 
2Chronicles31:10 Tin, Zadok mi, puithiam hotu Azarian a chang a, ""Miten LALPA ina thilpek an rawn lak tir atangin kan ei zel a, kan khawpkham hle a, a la awm rui mai a; LALPA'n a mite mal a sawm zel a, he mi la awm rui hi kan ei bang a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles31:11 Chutichuan Hezekian LALPA inah chuan pindante siam turin thu a pe a; tichuan an siam ta a. 
2Chronicles31:12 Tin, thilpek te, sawma pakhat te, Pathian pualte chu rinawm takin an thiar lut a: tin, a hotu chu Levi mi Konania a ni a, a unau Simeia chu a dawttu a ni a." 
2Chronicles31:13 Tin, Konania leh a unau Simeia hnuaiah chuan lal Jezekia leh Pathian ina hotu Azaria ruatin endiktu Jehiela te, Azria te, Nahatha te, Asahela te, Jerimotha te, Jozabada te, Eliela te, Ismakia te, Mahatha te, Benaia te an awm a." 
2Chronicles31:14 Tin, Levi mi Imna fapa Korea, chhak lam kawngkhar vengtu chu Pathian hnena mahni duh thua thilpek enkawltu leh LALPA tan thilpek leh thil thianghlim semtu a ni a." 
2Chronicles31:15 Tin, ama hnuaiah, puithiam awmna khuaahte chuan Edena te, Miniamina te, Jesua te, Semaia te, Amaria te, Sekinia te, an awm leh a; chung chuan an unaute chu a pawl pawlin a lian leh a te te hnenah an chanvo tur an sem bawk a:" 
2Chronicles31:16 thlahtua ngaih mipa kum thum achin chung lam, ni tina LALPA ina thawh tur mamawh nei an pawl dan ang zela kal thinte tiam loin," 
2Chronicles31:17 Puithiamte hna inchhawk dan tur chu a chi chiin an ruat a, Levia chite erawh chu kum sawmhnih achin chunglam a pawl pawlin a ruat a." 
2Chronicles31:18 Puithiamte chu an nupui te, an fapa te, a fanu te leh an chhungkuaa mi dangte nen rinawm taka an intihthianghlim reng avangin chhinchhiah vek an ni a." 
2Chronicles31:19 Tin, Arona thlah, khaw tin, daifema awm puithiamte leh Levi-ho thlahte ziaknaa chuang apiangte chanvo pe turin mi ruat bik an awm." 
2Chronicles31:20 Tin, chutiang chuan Judai ram zawng zawngah Jezekian a ti a. LALPA a Pathian mithmuha tha leh dik leh rinawm thil a ti thin a,Pathian ina rawngbawl lam thuah te, dan lam thuah te, thupek lam thuah te, a Pathian zawn thuah te a tih piangah a rilru zawng zawngin a ti a, a hmuingil ta zel a." 
2Chronicles31:21 Pathian ina rawngbawl lam thuah te, dan lam thuah te, thupek lam thuah te, a Pathian zawn thuah te a tih piangah a rilru zawng zawngin a ti a, a hmuingil ta zel a." 
2Chronicles32:1 Chutianga rinawm taka thil an tih hnu chuan Asuria lal Senakeriba a lo thawk a, Judai ramah chuan a lo lut a, kulh nei khuate chu a rawn hual a, lak a rawn tum a." 
2Chronicles32:2 Tin, Senakeriba a lo thawk a, Jerusalem rawn bei a tum tih Jezekian a hriat chuan," 
2Chronicles32:3 khaw pawn lama tuite chu tihchah turin a mi liante leh a mi chakte chu a rawn a; tichuan an tanpui a. 
2Chronicles32:4 Chutichuan mi tam tak an pung khawm a, tui zawng zawg leh ram chunga luang tlang luite chu an dang chat a, ""Asuria lalte chu an lo luh a, tui tam tak engah nge an rawn neih tehlul ang,"" an ti a." 
2Chronicles32:5 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, lamho zinga mi anmahni zat theuh nupuiah an man a, an kal bopui ta a: tin, an ram lamah chuan an hawng a, khawpui chu an chei leh a, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
2Chronicles32:6 Tin, indonaa mipui hotute a siam a, khawpui kawngkhar hmun zau laiah a ko khawm a," 
2Chronicles32:7 Chak takin, huai takin awm u la, Asuria lal leh a hote mipui chu hlau suh u la, zam hek suh u, kan lama tang chu a lama tang aiin a chak zawk si a:" 
2Chronicles32:8 a lama tang chu tisa sipai an ni a, min pui tur leh min dosak tura kan lama tang erawh chu LALPA kan Pathian a ni si a,"" tiin thlamuanna thu a sawi a. Tin, mipui chuan Juda lal Jezekia thu sawite chu an ring a." 
2Chronicles32:9 Chu mi hnuah chuan Asuria lal Senakeriba chuan (amah leh a sipaite chu Lakis-ah an awm a) Juda lal Jezekia leh Jerusalem-a Juda mi zawng zawngte hnenah chuan," 
2Chronicles32:10 Asuria lal Senakeriba chuan heti hian a ti,'Jerusalem lak chu eng nge ni in han rih lohna?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekia chuan, LALPA kan Pathianin Asuria lal kut ata min chhanchuak ang, tiin riltam leh tuihala in thihna mai turin a thlem che u a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Hezekia bawk hi a ni lawm ni, a hmun sangte leh a maichamte tichim a, Juda mi leh Jerusalem-a mite hnena, Maicham pakhatah Pathian in bia ang a, rimtui in hal ang, tia thu petu kha?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Kei leh ka puten ram tin, hnam tin, chunga kan thiltih te kha in hre lo em ni? Eng hnam pathian mahin ka kut ata an ram chu an humsak thei lo a ni lo'm ni?" 
2Chronicles32:14 Tu hnam pathian nge ka puten an tihboral ka kut ata an mite chhanchuak thei awm a, nangni Pathian pawhin ka kut ata a han chhanchhuah theih bikna tur che u?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Chuvangin Hezekia chuan bum che u suh se la, chutiang chuan thlem che u suh sela,amah chu ring suh u; eng hnam pathian leh eng ram pathian mah an mite ka kut ata leh ka pute kut ata chhanchuak thei an awm lo a; engtin nge in Pathian chuan ka kut ata a chhanchhuah theih bik tehlul ang che u?'"" tiin Jerusalem-ah a mite a tir a." 
2Chronicles32:16 Tin, a mite chuan chu aia nasa chuan LALPA Pathian leh a chhiahlawh Hezekia chungchang thu a tha lo lamin an sawi a." 
2Chronicles32:17 Tin, Israelte LALPA Pathian chawk thinurzawng leh a sawi chhe zawngin lehkha a ziak bawk a, ""Ram tin, hnam tin, pathianten ka kut ata an mite an chhanchhuak thei lo ang bawkin Hezekia Pathian pawhin ka kut ata a mite a chhanchhuak tawp lo ang,"" tiin." 
2Chronicles32:18 Tin, khua chu an lak theihna'n a rap tur leh timangang turin Jerusalem-a kulha awmte chu Juda tawngin ring takin an au khum a." 
2Chronicles32:19 Jerusalem Pathian chu mihring kuta siam, khawvel pathian ang lek fangin an sawi a." 
2Chronicles32:20 Chutichuan lal Hezekia leh Amoza fapa zawlnei Isaia chuan chu mi avang chuan an tawngtai a, vana mi an au a." 
2Chronicles32:21 Tin, LALPA'n vantirhkoh a tir a, chu chuan Asuria lal riahhmuna mi chak huaisen zawng zawng te, hma hruaitu hotute chu a tihlum a. Tichuan zak tak hmel puin a ram lamah a haw leh ta a. Tin, a pathian ina a va kal chu ama rila rahte ngei khandaihin an lo tihlum ta a." 
2Chronicles32:22 Chutiang chuan LALPA'n Hezekia leh Jerusalem-a mite chu Asuria lal Senakeriba kut ata leh mi dang zawng zawng kut ata chu a chanhim a, an vela mite laka a veng a." 
2Chronicles32:23 Tin, mi tam takin Jerusalem-ah LALPA tan thilpek an rawn la a, thil hlu tak takte Juda lal Hezekia chu an rawn pe a chuta tang chuan hnam tin, mithmuhah chawimawiin a awm ta a." 
2Chronicles32:24 Chung lai chuan Hezekia chu thih ngamin a na a, LALPA hnena a tawngtai a; tin, a lo chhang a, chhinchiahna a pe a." 
2Chronicles32:25 Nimahsela Hezekia chuan a tana tha tura tih ang chuan a ti lo a, a rilru a lo chapo tak avangin: chuvangin a chungah leh Judate leh Jerusalem chungah thinurna a lo thleng ta a." 
2Chronicles32:26 Amaherawhchu Hezekia chuan a rilru chapona chu inchhirin a inngaitlawm leh a, amah leh Jerusalem-a mite nen; tichuan Jezekia dam chhung chuan LALPA thinurna an chungah a lo thleng ta lo a." 
2Chronicles32:27 Tin, Hezekia chuan sum leh pai a lo ngah a, a lo ropui ta hle mai a; tangkarua te, rangkachak te, lunghlu te, rimtui te, phaw te leh bungbel tha tak tak dah khawmna in a sa a:" 
2Chronicles32:28 buh te, uain te, hriak te dah khawmna in pawh a sa bawk a, tin, ran tinreng dahna leh beram huangte a siam a." 
2Chronicles32:29 Tin, khuate pawh a siam bawk a, beram rual leh bawng rual a ngah em em mai a; Pathianin neinung takin a siam a." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekia bawk hian Gihon lui tui chhakta zawk a tiping a, Davida khaw thlang lampangah a luan thlaktir bawk a. Tichuan Jezekia chu a thiltih zawng zawngah chuan a hmuingil zel a." 
2Chronicles32:31 Babulon mi lianten palaia an tirha a rama thil mak an zawh thuah chuan a rilrua awm zawng zawng a hriat theina'n Pathianin thlahthlamin a fiah a. 
2Chronicles32:32 Hezekia thiltih dang zawng zawng te, a thiltih that te chu, ngai teh, Amoza fapa zawlnei Isaia inlarna bu, Juda lal leh Israel lalte chanchin buah a chuang a.Tin, Hezekia chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, Davida fapate thlan hmun chhohnaah an phum a; Judate zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a mite chuan a thih ni chuan ropui takin an ral a. Tin, a fapa Manasea chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles32:33 Tin, Hezekia chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, Davida fapate thlan hmun chhohnaah an phum a; Judate zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a mite chuan a thih ni chuan ropui takin an ral a. Tin, a fapa Manasea chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manasea chu a lal tantirhin kum sawm leh kum hnih a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh kum nga a lal a. 
2Chronicles33:2 Tin, LALPA mithmuhah thil tha lo, Israela thlahte hmaa LALPA'n a hnawhchhuah Pathian hre lo hnamten thil tenawm tak an tih ang chu a ti ve thin a." 
2Chronicles33:3 A pa Hezekian a tihchim hnu hmun sangte a din tha a, Baala te tan maicham a din a, Aseri lemte a siam a, vana awm zawng zawng khi a bia a, an rawng te a bawl a." 
2Chronicles33:4 Tin, ""Jerusalem-ah kumkhuain ka hming a awm ang,"" LALPA'n a tihna LALPA inah chuan maichamte a siam a." 
2Chronicles33:5 LALPA in hungchhung kawtlai pahnihah chuan vana awm zawng zawng tan maichamte a siam a. 
2Chronicles33:6 Hinoma fapa ruamah meiah a fate chu a luhtir a; aiente a ching a, dawite a hmang a, ramhuai aienthiam zawlte leh dawithiamte a ruai thin a; LALPA tithinur turin a mithmuha thil tha lo a ti thin a." 
2Chronicles33:7 7-8, Tin, Pathianin Davida leh a fapa Solomona hnena, ""He in leh Jerusalem khua, Israel chi zawng zawng zinga ka thlanah hian ka hming chu kumkhuain ka awmtir ang a; thu ka pek zawng zawng leh dan zawng zawng te, thu ruat te, thiltih tur te Mosia hmanga ka pekte kha an zawm phawt chuan an pi leh pute ka pek tawh ram ata chu Israel-hote ke chu ka pen chhuahtir tawh lo ang,"" a lo tih tawhna Pathian inah chuan ama siam, milem siam chawp a dah a." 
2Chronicles33:8 7-8, Tin, Pathianin Davida leh a fapa Solomona hnena, ""He in leh Jerusalem khua, Israel chi zawng zawng zinga ka thlanah hian ka hming chu kumkhuain ka awmtir ang a; thu ka pek zawng zawng leh dan zawng zawng te, thu ruat te, thiltih tur te Mosia hmanga ka pekte kha an zawm phawt chuan an pi leh pute ka pek tawh ram ata chu Israel-hote ke chu ka pen chhuahtir tawh lo ang,"" a lo tih tawhna Pathian inah chuan ama siam, milem siam chawp a dah a." 
2Chronicles33:9 Tin, Manasea chuan Judate leh Jerusalem-a mite chu thil a tihsualtir a; tichuan LALPA'n Israelte hmaa a tihboral tak hnamte ai mahin thil an tisual zawk a." 
2Chronicles33:10 Tin, LALPA'n Manasea leh a mite hnenah thu a sawi thin a; nimahsela an ngaihsak lo a." 
2Chronicles33:11 Chuvang chuan LALPA'n Asuria sipai hotute a tir a, Manasea chu khaidiatin an hling a, kawl an buntir a, Babulonah an kalpui ta a." 
2Chronicles33:12 Tin, mangang taka a awm lai chuan LALPA a Pathian chu a zawng a, a pi leh pute Pathian hmaah chuan nasa takin a intihnuai a." 
2Chronicles33:13 A hnenah a tawngtai a, khawngaih a hlawh a, a dilna chu a ngaihthlaksak a, Jerusalem-ah a ramah chuan a hruai leh ta a. Tichuan Manasea chuan LALPA chu Pathian a nih a hre ta a." 
2Chronicles33:14 Tin, chu mi hnuah chuan Davida khaw pawn lamah Gihon thlang lampang ruama sangha kawngkhar luhna thlengin kulh a siam a, Ophel hualvelin sang takin a din a: tin, Juda khua kulh nei zawng zawngah chuan hotu huaisen tak takte a dah a." 
2Chronicles33:15 Tin, ram dang pathiante leh milem te, LALPA in ata chu a thehthang bo a, tin, LALPA in tlang leh Jerusalem-a maicham a siam zawng anwgte chu khua ata an paih vek a." 
2Chronicles33:16 Tin, LALPA maicham a siam a, remna thilhlan inthawina te, lawm thu sawina te ahlan a, Judate chu LALPA Israelte Pathian rawng bawl turin thu a pe a." 
2Chronicles33:17 Mipuite chu hmun sangahte chuan an la inthawi reng a, amerawhchu LALPA an Pathian hnenah chauh a ni ta zawk a." 
2Chronicles33:18 Manasea chanchin dang zawng zawngte, a Pathian hnena a tawngtai thu te, LALPA Israelte Pathian hminga zawlneiin a hnena thu a sawi thu te chu ngai teh, Israel lalte chanchin zingah a chuang a." 
2Chronicles33:19 A tawngtaina te leh Pathian a khawngaihna leh a intihhnuai hmaa a sualna zawng zawng leh hmun sang a siam a, Aseri leh milem siam chawp a dinna hmun zawng zawngte pawh, ngai teh, Hozaia chanchin ziakna buah a chuang vek a ni." 
2Chronicles33:20 Chutichuan Mansea chu a pi leh pute hnenah a muhil a, ama inah an phum a; tin, a fapa Amona chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amona chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum hnih a lal a. 
2Chronicles33:22 A pa Manasea tih ang bawkin LALPA mithmuhah thil tha lo a ti a; a pa Manasean a siam milem siam chawp zawng zawng a henah Amona chu a inthawi a, an rawn a bawl a." 
2Chronicles33:23 A pa Manasea intihhnuai ang khan LALPA hmaah a intihnuai ve lo a. Amona hi chu a sual zual sauh sauh mai a ni. 
2Chronicles33:24 Tin, a chhiahlawhten an phiar a, ama inah an tihlum a.Nimahsela Amona phiartu zawng zawngte chu mipuiin an that ve vek a; tin, mipuite chuan a fapa Josia chu a aiah lalah an siam ta a." 
2Chronicles33:25 Nimahsela Amona phiartu zawng zawngte chu mipuiin an that ve vek a; tin, mipuite chuan a fapa Josia chu a aiah lalah an siam ta a." 
2Chronicles34:1 Josia chu a lal tantirhin kum riat mi a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum leh kum khat a lal a. 
2Chronicles34:2 Tin, LALPA mithmuhah thil tha a ti thin a, a pu Davida kawngte a zawh a, ding lamah emaw vei lamah emaw a pensan lo a." 
2Chronicles34:3 Kum riat a lal kum, naupang tak a la nih lai atang rengin a pu Davida Pathian a zawng tan a; tin, kum sawm leh kum hnih a lal kumin Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a hmun sang te, Aseri te, mi lem siam chawp te, milem chhun chawpte a thian fai a." 
2Chronicles34:4 Baala maichamte chu a mithmuhah an tichim a; tin, chung aia sanga ni lemte chu a kit a; tin, Aseri te, milem siam chawp te, milem chhun chawpte chu a tisawm dep a, an hnena inthawitute thlan chungah a theh darh vek a." 
2Chronicles34:5 Puithiamte ruh chu an maichamahte a hal a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem chu a thianfai a." 
2Chronicles34:6 Tin, chutiang bawk chuan Manase te, Ephraim te, Simeon te, Naphtali khua te lamin a ti vek a." 
2Chronicles34:7 Tin, maichamte a tichim a, Aseri te, milem siam chawpte chu a tisawm dep a, Israel ram zawng zawnga ni lemte chu a kit vek a, Jerusalem-ah a haw leh a." 
2Chronicles34:8 Tin, a lal kum sawm leh kum riat kum, a ram leh inte a then fai kum chuan Azalia fapa Saphana te, khaw awptu Maaseia te; Joaaza fapa, lehkha ziaktu Joa te chu LALPA a Pathian in siam tha turin a tir a." 
2Chronicles34:9 Ahaba ka hmaa a inngaihtlawmzia hi i hmu em? Ka hmaa a inngaihtlawm avang hian ama chhanah hi chuan thil tha lo ka thlentir lo ang a, a fapa chhanah erawh chuan a chhungte chungah thil tha lo ka thlentir ang,"" tiin." 
2Chronicles34:10 Tin, LALPA in satu hnathawktute an pe a; tin, LALPA in hnathawktute chuan in siam thatute leh cheitute an pe a;" 
2Chronicles34:11 Juda lalten an lo tihchhiat tak in siam thatna'n lung chher te, a zawmna te leh a khanchhukte atana thing leina'n themthiamte leh in satute chu an pe a." 
2Chronicles34:12 Tin, mite chuan hna chu rinawm takin an thawk a; an hotu, hnathawh relbawltute chu, Mereria fapate zinga Levi mi Jahatha leh Obadia te, Kohat mi fapate zinga mi Zekaria leh Mesulama te an ni a; tin, Levi mi mi dang, thil tum thiam zawng zawngte nen." 
2Chronicles34:13 A phurha phur mite hotu pawh an ni a, hna tinreng thawktute thawh tur relbawltu an ni: lehkhaziaktute, hotu te, kawngkhar vengtute chu Levi mite zinga mi an ni." 
2Chronicles34:14 Tin, Jehosaphata hnena chuan, ""Ramoth-gilead khua mi han beipui ve duh ang emaw chu?"" a ti a. Tin, Jehosaphatan Israel lal hnena chuan, ""Kei leh nang, ka mite leh mite chu pumkhat kan ni a, ka sakawrte leh i sakawrte chu pumkhat an ni alawm,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles34:15 Tin, Hilkia chuan lehkha ziaktu Saphana nenah chuan, ""LALPA ina dan bu kan hmu chhuak ta,"" a ti a. Tin, Hilkia chuan lehkhabu chu Saphana a pe a." 
2Chronicles34:16 Chutichuan Israel lal chuan zawlneiho mi zali lai a ko khawm a, an hnenah, ""Ramoth-gilead khua bei turin ka han thawk ang nge thawk lo ang?"" a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, ""Han thawk rawh, Lalpa'n lal kutah a pe dawn a ni,"" an ti a." 
2Chronicles34:17 LALPA ina tangka awm chu an bun chuak a, hotute leh hnathawktute chu an pe a,"" tiin thu a thlen a." 
2Chronicles34:18 Tin, lehkha ziaktu Saphana chuan, ""Puithiam Hilkia chuan lehkhabu mi pe,"" tiin lal chu a hrilh bawk a. Tin, Saphana chuan lal hmaah a chhiar a." 
2Chronicles34:19 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lalin dan thute chu a han hriat chuan a puan a pawtthler a." 
2Chronicles34:20 20-21, Tin, lal chuan, ""Kal u la, dan thu in hmuh chhuah chungchang thuah hian keimah leh Israel leh Judai rama mite tan LALPA min va rawnsak teh u; kan pi leh puten he dan bua chuang ang hian LALPA thu chu an lo zawm loh avang hian kan chungah LALPA thinurna chu a lo awm nasa ta a ni si a,"" tiin, Hilkia te, Saphana fapa Ahikama te; Mika fapa Adona te, lehkha ziaktu Saphana te, lal chhiahlawh Asaia te chu thu a pe a." 
2Chronicles34:21 20-21, Tin, lal chuan, ""Kal u la, dan thu in hmuh chhuah chungchang thuah hian keimah leh Israel leh Judai rama mite tan LALPA min va rawnsak teh u; kan pi leh puten he dan bua chuang ang hian LALPA thu chu an lo zawm loh avang hian kan chungah LALPA thinurna chu a lo awm nasa ta a ni si a,"" tiin, Hilkia te, Saphana fapa Ahikama te; Mika fapa Adona te, lehkha ziaktu Saphana te, lal chhiahlawh Asaia te chu thu a pe a." 
2Chronicles34:22 Tichuan lalin thu a pekate leh Hilkia chu silhfen enkawltu Hasra fa Tokhatha fapa Saluma nupui zawlnei Huldai hnenah chuan an va kal a, chu mi thuah chuan an va bia a. (Ani chu Jerusalem Misne-a awm a ni.)" 
2Chronicles34:23 Tin, a ni chuan an hnenah, ""LALPA Israelte Pathian chuan heti hian a ti; 'Ka hnena rawn tirtu che u chu hrilh u la," 
2Chronicles34:24 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, Ngai teh u, he hmun leh a chhunga awmte chunga hian thil tha lo ka thlentir ang a, Juda lal hmaa an chhiar chhuah tak lehkhabua chuang anchhia zawng zawngte pawh;" 
2Chronicles34:25 an kut thiltiha min tihthinurna'na min hawisana pathian dangte tana rimtui an hal avangin he hmun chungah hian ka thinurna leih a ni a, tihdaih a ni lo ang, tiin." 
2Chronicles34:26 26-27, Amaherawhchu, LALPA rawn tura rawn tirtu che u Juda lal hnena chuan hetiang hian sawi ang che u, LALPA Israelte Pathian chuan heti hian a ti, Chung thu i hriatte chuan i thinlung a tihnem avanga Pathian hmaa i intihhniam a, he hmun chungchang thu leh a chhunga awmte chungchang thu i hriat a, ka hmaa i intihnuai a, i pian i pawh thler a, ka hmaa i tah avangin kei pawhin i thu chu ka lo ngaithla a." 
2Chronicles34:27 26-27, Amaherawhchu, LALPA rawn tura rawn tirtu che u Juda lal hnena chuan hetiang hian sawi ang che u, LALPA Israelte Pathian chuan heti hian a ti, Chung thu i hriatte chuan i thinlung a tihnem avanga Pathian hmaa i intihhniam a, he hmun chungchang thu leh a chhunga awmte chungchang thu i hriat a, ka hmaa i intihnuai a, i pian i pawh thler a, ka hmaa i tah avangin kei pawhin i thu chu ka lo ngaithla a." 
2Chronicles34:28 Ngai teh, i pi leh i pute hnenah ka kaltir ang chia, i thlanah thlamuang takin i kal ang a, he hmun leh a chhunga awmte chunga ka rawn thlentir tur thil tha lo zawng zawngte chu i mitin a hmu lo ang,' tiin, ti rawh u,"" a ti a. Tin, lal hnenah thu chu an thlen ta a." 
2Chronicles34:29 Tichuan lal chuan mi a tir a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a upa zawng zawng chu a ko khawm a." 
2Chronicles34:30 Tin, lal leh Juda mi zawng zawng Jerusalem-a mi zawng zawng te, puithiam leh Levi-ho te, mipuiho zawng zawng a lian a tein LALPA inah an cho a; LALPA ina an hmuh chhuah thuthlung bu-a thu zawng zawng chu an benghriatah a chhiar a." 
2Chronicles34:31 Tin, lal chu a hmunah a ding a, chu mi lehkhabua chuang thuthlung thu chu tinghet turin a thinlung zawng zawng leh thlarau zawng zawnga LALPA zui tur leh a thupek te, a thuhriattir te, a thuruatte pawm turin LALPA hmaah chuan thu an thlung a." 
2Chronicles34:32 Tin, Jerusalem leh Benjamin mi zawng zawngte chu chutianga awm turin a ti a. Tin, Jerusalem-a mite chuan Pathian, an pi leh pute Pathian thuthlung ang chuan an ti a.Josia chuan, Israel ramin a huam zawng zawng ata thil tenawm zawng zawng chu a thehthang bo a, Israel rama awm zawng zawngte chu lalpa an Pathian rawng a bawltir a. Tin a dam chhung chuan LALPA, an pi leh pute Pathian an zui chu an pensan lo." 
2Chronicles34:33 Josia chuan, Israel ramin a huam zawng zawng ata thil tenawm zawng zawng chu a thehthang bo a, Israel rama awm zawng zawngte chu lalpa an Pathian rawng a bawltir a. Tin a dam chhung chuan LALPA, an pi leh pute Pathian an zui chu an pensan lo." 
2Chronicles35:1 Tin, Josia chuan Jerusalem-ah LALPA tan kalhlen kut a nei a; kalhlen kutna tur chu thla khatna, ni sawm leh ni li niin an talh a." 
2Chronicles35:2 Tin, puithiamte chu an hnathawh a ruatsak a, LALPA ina rawngbawl hna thawk turin a fuih a." 
2Chronicles35:3 Tin, Israel mite zirtirtu, Pathian tana tihhran Levi-hote hnenah chuan, ""Israel lal Davida fapa Solomona in sakah chuan bawm thianghlim chu dah rawh u; in kokia zawn a ngai tawh lo ang; LALPA in Pathian leh a mi Israelte rawng bawl tawh rawh u khai." 
2Chronicles35:4 Tin, Israel lal Davida ziak ang leh a fapa Solomona ziak angin in chhungkaw puipa zir zelin a pawl pawlin inbuatsaih rawh u." 
2Chronicles35:5 Tin, in unauteho chhungkaw puipa zir zelin Levi-hote puala chanvo neiin hmun thianghlimah chuan awm rawh u." 
2Chronicles35:6 Kalhlen Kutna tur talh u la, intithianghlim u la, Mosia hmanga LALPA sawi anga ti turin in unaute tan buatsaih rawh u,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles35:7 Tin, Josian chuta mi awm zawng zawngte chu kalhlen kuta hlan turin ran rual zinga mi beram no leh kel no singthum leh bawngpa sangthum a pe a: chungte chu lal sum zinga mi a ni." 
2Chronicles35:8 Tin, a mi liante chuan mipui te, puithiam te, Levi-hote chu mahni duh thua hlan atan an pe a. Pathian in hotu, Hilkia te, Zekaria te, Jehiela te chuan Kalhlen kuta hlan turin ran no sanghnih leh zaruk leh bawngpa zathum puithiamte an pe a." 
2Chronicles35:9 Tin, Konania te, a unau Semaia leh Nethanela te, Levi-hote hotu Hasabia te, Zeiela te, Jozabada te pawhin kalhlen kuta hlan atan Levi-hote chu ran no sangnga leh bawngpa zanga an pe a." 
2Chronicles35:10 Tichuan rawngbawlna chu an buatsaih a, lal thupek angin puithiamte chu an hmunah an ding a, Levi-hote chu an pawl dan ang zelin." 
2Chronicles35:11 Tin, kalhlen kutna tur chu an talh a, puithiamte chuan thisen chu an theh a, Levi-hote chuan an lip a." 
2Chronicles35:12 Tin, Mosia lehkhabua chuang anga an chhungkaw then dan zir zela LALPA hnena hlan atana pek turin halral thilhlante chu an la sawn a. bawngpate pawh chu chutiang bawk chuan an ti a." 
2Chronicles35:13 Tin, kalhlen kutna tur a dan angin an hem hmin a; tin, thilhlan thianghlim sa chu, bel te, bel khaina nei te, bel rawng zautein an chhum kawi a, mi zawng zawngte hnenah an kalpui a." 
2Chronicles35:14 Tin, chu mi zawhah chuan anmahni leh puithiamte tan an buatsaih a; Arona fa puithiamte chu halral thilhlan leh sa thau hlanin zan thlengin an buai si a; chuvangin Levi-hote chuan anmahni leh Arona fa puithiamte tan an buatsaih a ni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Tin, Davida leh Asapha leh Hemana leh lal zawlnei Jeduthuna te thupek angin hla satu Asapha fapate chu an hmunah an ding a, tin, kawngkhar vengtute chu kawngkhar tinah an awm a; an unau Levi-hoten an buatsaihsak avangin an hna kalsan a ngai lo a." 
2Chronicles35:16 Chutichuan lal Josia thupek anga kalhlen kut nei tur leh LALPA maichama halral thilhlan hlan turin chu mi ni vek chuan LALPA rawngbawlna thil zawng zawng chu an buatsaih a. 
2Chronicles35:17 Tin, Israela thlah chuta awmte chuan chu mi ni chuan Kalhlen Kut an nei a, chhang dawidim telh loh kut pawh ni sarih an nei bawk a:"
