2Chronicles35:18 zawlnei Samuela dam lai ata Israel rama kalhlen kut chutiang reng reng chu an nei ngai loa; Israel lal tumahin Josia leh puithiamte leh Levi-hote leh Juda zawng zawng leh Israelten an neih anga nei an awm hek lo. 
2Chronicles35:19 Kum sawm leh kum riat Josia a lal kumin chu Kalhlen Kut chu an nei a ni. 
2Chronicles35:20 Chung zawng zawng hnua Josian biak in a buatsaih zawh chuan, Aigupta lal Nekova chu Karkemis bei turin Euphrates luiah a han chho a; tin, Josia chuan a han bei a." 
2Chronicles35:21 Nimahsela ani chuan, ""Nang Juda lal, kei leh nang eng nge kan intihna tur awm? Nang bei turin ka lo kal lo a, ka do laite bei tur zawkin a sin ni ka lo kal, Pathianin hmanhmawh turin thu min pe a, ka lama tang Pathian chu dosal suh khai, a ti boral dah ang che,"" tiin palai a tir a." 
2Chronicles35:22 Nimahsela Josia chuan a kirsan duh lo a, a do theihna'n a inbawl danglam a, Pathian ka atanga Nekova thu sawi chu a pawm lo a, Megido ruama lo bei turin a kal a." 
2Chronicles35:23 Tin, thal kap mite chuan Josia chu an han kap a; tin, lal chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnena, ""Min kal bopui rawh u, hliam nasa tak ka tawk ta,"" a ti a." 
2Chronicles35:24 Chutichuan a chhiahhlawhte chuan tawlailir ata chu an la chhuak a, a tawlailir dangah chuan an dah a, Jerusalemah an kalpui a, a thi a, a pi leh pute thlanah an phum ta a. Juda mi zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a miten Josia chu an sun a." 
2Chronicles35:25 Tin, Jeremia chuan Josia chu a tah a: tin, hla satu hmeichhia leh mipate chuan tun thlengin Josia an tah hla chu an la chham a. Israel ramah chuan danah an neih a, ngai teh, tah hlaah chuan a chuang ta a." 
2Chronicles35:26 Josia thiltih dang zawng zawng, LALPA danah a chuang ang a, a thiltih tha te,a hmasa ber leh a hnuhnung berte pawh, ngai teh, Israel lal leh Juda lalte chanchin buah a chuang a." 
2Chronicles35:27 a hmasa ber leh a hnuhnung berte pawh, ngai teh, Israel lal leh Juda lalte chanchin buah a chuang a." 
2Chronicles36:1 Tichuan chu mi rama mite chuan Josia fapa Jehoahaza chu an hruai a, Jerusalem-ah a pa aiah lalah an siam ta a." 
2Chronicles36:2 Joahaza chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum thum a ni a, Jerusalem-ah thla thum a lal a." 
2Chronicles36:3 Aigupta lalin Jerusalem-a a lalna a bansak a, an ram chu tangkaraw talent za leh rangkachak talent khat a chawitir a." 
2Chronicles36:4 Tin, Aigupta lal chuan a unaupa Eliakima chu Juda leh Jerusalem-a lalaha siam a,a hming chu Jehoiakima tiin a thlaksak a. Tin, Nekova chuan a unaupa Joaza chu Aigupta ramah a hruai a." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoiakima chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum nga a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawm leh kum khat a lal a: LALPA a Pathian mithmuhah thil tha lo a ti thin a." 
2Chronicles36:6 Babulon lal Nebukadnezara chu amah bei turin a lo thawk a, Babulon-a hruai turin kawl a buntir a." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadnezara chuan LALPA in bungbelte pawh Babulon-ah a la a, Babulon-a a pathian biak inah a dah a." 
2Chronicles36:8 Jehoiakima chanchin dang te, a thil tenawm tih te leh a awm dante chu, ngai teh, Israel lal leh Juda lalte chanchin buah a chuang a; tin, a fapa Jehoiakina chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiakina chu a lal tantirhin kum riat a ni a, Jerusalem-ah thla thum leh ni sawm a lal a, LALPA mithmuha thil tha lo a ti thin a." 
2Chronicles36:10 Tin, kum a lo vei chuan lal Nebukadnezara chuan mi a tir a, LALPA ina bungbel tha tak takte nen Babulon-ah a hruaitir a, a unaupa Zedekia chu Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a lalah a siam a." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekia chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum khat a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum lawm leh kum khat a lal a:" 
2Chronicles36:12 LALPA a Pathian mithmuhah thil tha lo a ti thin a; LALPA ka atanga thu sawitu zawlnei Jeremia lakah chuan a intihnuai duh lo a. 
2Chronicles36:13 Pathian hminga chhechhamtirtu lal Nebukadnezara chungah a hel bawk a, luhlul a chhuah a, LALPA Israelte Patian lam hawi lo turin a rilru a tikhauh a," 
2Chronicles36:14 Puithiam hotu zawng zawngte leh miang bawk thil tenawm tak takte an ti a; Jerusalem-a a tihthianghlim LALPA inte pawh chu an tibawlhhlawh a. 
2Chronicles36:15 Tin, LALPA, an pi leh pute Pathian chuan an hnenah theihpatawpa thahnemngaiin mi a tir a, a mite leh a awmna hmun chu alainat avangin;" 
2Chronicles36:16 nimahsela Pathian mi tirhte chu an hmusit a, a thute chu an ngainep a,a mite chunga LALPA thinurna chu a lo thawh a, tihlungawi lehna reng awm lo khawp hialin a zawlneite chu an tinawmnah a." 
2Chronicles36:17 Chuvangin Kaldai lal an chungah a thawhtir a, ani chuan an tlangvalte chu an hmun thianghlimah khandaihin a that a. Nula leh tlangval pawh, tar pawh, tarchia pawh lainatna reng reng a nei lo a; a kutah a pe vek a." 
2Chronicles36:18 Tin, Pathian ina bungbel zawng zawng, a lian pawh, a te pawh, LALPA ina sum dah khawm zawng zawng te, lal sum dah khawm leh a mi liante sum dahkhawmte lamin Babulon-ah a la vek a." 
2Chronicles36:19 Tin, Pathian inte a hal a, chuta bungbel tha mi zawng zawngte chu an tiche vek a." 
2Chronicles36:20 Khandaiha thah bang zawng zawngte chu Babulon-ah a hruai a, amah leh a fapate chhiahhlawhah Persia-ho lo len tlengin an awm ta a." 
2Chronicles36:21 LALPA'n zawlnei Jeremia hmanga thu a lo sawi chawlhni serh thei loa an awm chhung kum sawmsarih, chawlhni an serh leh theih thlengin, ram chu tihtiauin a awm ang, a tih kha a lo thleng ta a ni.Chutichuan Persia lal Kura lal tirh kumin Jeremia kaa LALPA thu chu a thlen kim theihna'n a ram zawng zawnga than chhuak vek tur leh a ziaka ziak tur pawhin LALPA'n Persia lal Kura thinlung chu a chawk tho a," 
2Chronicles36:22 Chutichuan Persia lal Kura lal tirh kumin Jeremia kaa LALPA thu chu a thlen kim theihna'n a ram zawng zawnga than chhuak vek tur leh a ziaka ziak tur pawhin LALPA'n Persia lal Kura thinlung chu a chawk tho a," 
Ezra1:1 Persia lal Kura lal tirh kumin zawlnei Jeremia hmanga a lo sawi tawh chu LALPA'n a thlen kimtir ta. He thupek pe tur leh a ram zawng zawnga chhiar vek tura thawn chhuak turin LALPA chuan Kura thinlung chu a chawk tho a. 
Ezra1:2 Persia lal Kura chuan heti hian a ti, Khawvel ram zawng zawng chu LALPA, van Pathian chuan min pe ta a; tin, Judai rama Jerusalem-ah chuan a in saksak turin thu min pe a ni." 
Ezra1:3 In zinga ama mite tawh phawt hnenah chuan a Pathian chu awm rawh se; tichuan Judai rama Jerusalem-ah chuan han chho se la, LALPA, Israel-hote Pathian in, Jerusalem-a awm chu han sa rawh se; amah chu Pathian a ni." 
Ezra1:4 Tin, tupawh khawii hmunah pawh, an awmnaa la chambang apiangte chu, an awmna hmuna mite chuan Jerusalem-a awm Pathian in atan anmahni duh thua an thawh tiam lohin, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungrua te, ran tein lo tanpui rawh se,"" tiin." 
Ezra1:5 Chutichuan Juda leh Benjamin chia chhungkaw puipa deuh deuhte, puithiam te, Levi-ho te, Jerusalem-a LALPA in han sa tura Pathianin an thinlung a chawh thawh zawng zawngte chu an thawk ta a." 
Ezra1:6 Tin, anmahni duhthua thawh thiam loin an vela mi zawng anwgte chuan tangkaruaa siam bungbel te, rangkachak te, bungrua te, ran te, thil hlu tak takte an pein, an tanpui a." 
Ezra1:7 Lal Kura pawhin Nebukadnezaran LALPA ina bungbel Jerusalem atanga a lak chhuah a,a pathiante ina a dahte chu a la chhuak leh a;" 
Ezra1:8 chung ngei chu Persia lal Kura chuan a vawngtu Mithredatha a lak chhuahtir a, a chhiar a, Juda puipa Sesbazara a hlan a." 
Ezra1:9 Tin, he'ng hi a zat chin chu a ni: rangkachak maihun sawmthum, tangkaraw maihun sang, chemte sawmhnih leh pakua;" 
Ezra1:10 rangkachak no sawmthum, tangkaraw no chi dang zali leh sawm, bungbel dang sang te nen.Rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbel zawng zawng chu sangnga leh zali a ni. Salte chu Babulon ata Jerusalem-a an hruai chhoh lai khan Sesbazaran he'ng zawng zawng hi a keng chho a." 
Ezra1:11 Rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbel zawng zawng chu sangnga leh zali a ni. Salte chu Babulon ata Jerusalem-a an hruai chhoh lai khan Sesbazaran he'ng zawng zawng hi a keng chho a. 
Ezra2:1 Judai rama mi sala hruai, Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran Babulon-a a hruai Jerusalem leh Judai rama kir leh, mi tin, mahni khaw lam theuha hawte chu he'ng hi an ni." 
Ezra2:2 Hengho hi Zerubabela te, Jesua te, Nehemia te, Seraia te, Reelaia te, Mordekaia te, Bilsana te, Mispara te, Bigvaia te, Rehuma te, Baana-te ruala kir an ni. Israel mite patling tam lam chu:" 
Ezra2:3 Parosa thlahte chu 2,172." 
Ezra2:4 Sephatia thlahte chu 372. 
Ezra2:5 Ara thlahte chu 775. 
Ezra2:6 Pakhat moaba thlah zinga Jesua leh Joaba thlahte chu 2,812." 
Ezra2:7 Elama thlahte chu 1,254." 
Ezra2:8 Zatua thlahte chu 945. 
Ezra2:9 Zakaia thlahte chu 760. 
Ezra2:10 Bania thlahte chu 642 
Ezra2:11 Bebaia thlahte chu 623. 
Ezra2:12 Azgada thlahte chu 1,222." 
Ezra2:13 Adonikama thlahte chu 666. 
Ezra2:14 Bigvaia thlahte chu 2,056." 
Ezra2:15 Adina thlahte chu 454. 
Ezra2:16 Atera, Hezekia an tih bawk thlahte chu 98." 
Ezra2:17 Bezaia thlahte chu 323. 
Ezra2:18 Jora thlahte chu 112. 
Ezra2:19 Hasuma thlahte chu 223. 
Ezra2:20 Gibara thlahte chu 95. 
Ezra2:21 An thlahtute atanga he'ng khuaa lo cheng tawh thinte pawh hetiang hian an kir leh a: Bethlehem mite chu 123," 
Ezra2:22 Netophah mite 56. 
Ezra2:23 Anathoth mite 128. 
Ezra2:24 Azmavetha mite chu 42. 
Ezra2:25 Kiriath-arima te, Kephira te, Beerotha mite chu 743." 
Ezra2:26 Rama leh Geba mite chu 621. 
Ezra2:27 Mikma mite 122 
Ezra2:28 Bethel leh Ai mite 223 
Ezra2:29 Neboa mite chu 52 
Ezra2:30 Magbisa mite chu 156 
Ezra2:31 Elam danga mite chu 1,254." 
Ezra2:32 Harima mite chu 320. 
Ezra2:33 Loda te, Hadida te, Onoa mite chu 725." 
Ezra2:34 Jerikova mite chu 345. 
Ezra2:35 Sena mite chu 3,630 an ni a." 
Ezra2:36 Puithiamte: Jesua chhungte zinga Jedaia thlahte chu 973. 
Ezra2:37 Imera thlahte chu 1,052." 
Ezra2:38 Pasura thlahte chu 1,247." 
Ezra2:39 Harima thlahte chu 1,017 an ni." 
Ezra2:40 Levi chite: Hodavia thlah Jesua leh Kadmiela thlahte chu 74 an ni. 
Ezra2:41 Hla satute: Asapha thlahte chu 128 an ni. 
Ezra2:42 kawngkhar vengtu thlahte: Saluma thlahte, Atera thlahte, Talmon thlah te, Akuba thlah te, Hatita thlah te, Sobaia thlahte chu, an vaia finkhawmin 139 an ni." 
Ezra2:43 Nethin-ho: Ziha thlah te, Hasupha thlah te, Tabaotha thlahte;" 
Ezra2:44 Kerosa thlahte, Siaha thlahte, Padona thlahte;" 
Ezra2:45 Lebana thlahte, Hagabaha thlahte, Akuba thlah te;" 
Ezra2:46 Hagaba thlahte, Salmaia thlah te, Hanana thlah te;" 
Ezra2:47 Gidela thlah te, Gahara thlah te, Reaia thlah te;" 
Ezra2:48 Rezina thlah te, Nekoda thlah te, Gazama thlah te;" 
Ezra2:49 Uza thlah te, Pasea thlah te, Besaia thlah te;" 
Ezra2:50 Asnaa thlah te, Meunima thlah te, Nephisima thlah te;" 
Ezra2:51 Bakbuka thlah te, Hakupha thlah te, Harhura thlah te;" 
Ezra2:52 Bazlutha thlah te, Mehida thlah te, Harsa thlah te:" 
Ezra2:53 Barkosa thlah te, Sisera thlah te, Tema thlah te;" 
Ezra2:54 Nezia thlah te, Hatipha thlah te." 
Ezra2:55 Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlahte: Sotaia thlahte, Hassopheretha thlah te, Peruda thlah te;" 
Ezra2:56 Jaala thlah te, Darkona thlah te, Gidela thlah te;" 
Ezra2:57 Sephatia thlah te, Hatila thlah te, Pokereth-hazebaima thlah te, Amia thlahte:" 
Ezra2:58 Nethin mi zawng zawng leh Solomona chhiahhlawhho thlahte chu 392 an ni. 
Ezra2:59 Tin, mi 652 Delaia thlah te, Tobia thlah te, Nekoda thlah te, Telmel atang te, Telharsa atang te, Kerub atang te, Adan atang te, Imer atang tea lo chuak chho an awm a," 
Ezra2:60 nimahsela Israel mi an nih leh nih loh an chhui thei lo a. 
Ezra2:61 Tin, puithiam chite zinga Habaia thlah te, Hakoza thlah te, Gilead mi Barzilaia fanu zinga mi nupuia neia an hming pu nghal Barzilaia thlahte chuan," 
Ezra2:62 thlahtu chhuina hming ziaknaah an hming an hmu zo lo a, chuvangin puithiama pawm an ni ta lo a." 
Ezra2:63 Ram awptu chuan urim leh thumim hmangtu tur puithiam a awm hma loh chuan chaw thianghlim an ei a khap a. 
Ezra2:64 Mipui pungkhawm zawng zawng chu 42,360 an ni a," 
Ezra2:65 an chhiahhlawh mipa leh hmeichhia 7,337 tiam lohin: tin, hla satu mipa leh hmeichhia 200 an nei bawk a." 
Ezra2:66 An sakawr chu 736 a ni a; an sabengtung chu 245 a ni a; 
Ezra2:67 an sanghawngsei chu 435 a ni a, an sabengtung te chi chu 6720 a ni." 
Ezra2:68 Jerusalem-a LALPA in an thlen chuan chhungkaw puipa thenkhatte chuan Pathian in chu a hmun ngaia din lehna thurin thil hlan an pe a: 
Ezra2:69 an pek theih tawkin in sakna thawhlawmah chuan rangkachak darik 61,000, tangka maneh 5,000, puithiam silfen za an pe a.Chutichuan puithiam te, Levi chi te, vantlang thenkhat te, hla satute, kawngkhar vengtute leh Nethin-hote chu, an khuaahte an awm ta a, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu anmahni khuaah." 
Ezra2:70 Chutichuan puithiam te, Levi chi te, vantlang thenkhat te, hla satute, kawngkhar vengtute leh Nethin-hote chu, an khuaahte an awm ta a, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu anmahni khuaah." 
Ezra3:1 Tin, thla sarihna a lo thlena Israel mite chu khuaahte an awm lai chuan mite chu thukhat vuain Jerusalem khuaah an inkhawm a." 
Ezra3:2 Chutichuan Jozadaka fapa Jesua leh aunau puithiamte leh Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh aunaute chu an tho a, Pathian mi Mosia dana chuang angin halral thilhlanna'n Israelte Pathian maicham an siam a." 
Ezra3:3 Tin, maicham chu a hmun ngaiah chuan an din a; chung rama awmte chu an hlau hle na a, maichamah chuan LALPA tan halral thilhlante an hlan a, zing lam leh tlai lamah halral thilhlan chu an hlan thin a ni." 
Ezra3:4 An ziak ang khan bawkte kut chuan an kut a, ni tina tih tur chin ruat, a bi tawk thliah ang zelin ni tina halral thilhlan chu an hlan a;" 
Ezra3:5 chu mi hnuah chuan an ni tin, halral thihlan te, thla thar thilhaln te, LALPA tana kut ni an ruata an serh apianga thilhlan te; tin, mahni duh thua thilhlan, LALPA hnena lawm taka hlan thinte chu an hlan a." 
Ezra3:6 Thla sarihna, ni khat atangin halral thilhlante LALPA hnena an hlan tan a: nimahsela LALPA biak in lungphum chu an la phum lo a." 
Ezra3:7 Lung chhertu le themthiamte pawh tangka an pe a; tin, Persia lal Kuran a phal dan ang zelin, sidar thing Lebanon atanga tuifinriat, Jopa thlenga rawn la turin Zidon mite leh tura mite chu ei turte leh in turte leh hriak te an pe a." 
Ezra3:8 Tin, Jerusalem-a Pathian in an thlenna kum hnihna, thla hnihnaah chuan Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela te, Jozadaka fapa Jesua te, an unau puithiam leh Levi chi dangte leh sala chuak Jerusalem-a chho zawng zawng nen chuan an bei tan a; Levi chite chu kum sawmhnih mi atanga a chung lam mite chu lalpa in saka hotu atan an ruat a." 
Ezra3:9 ChutichuanJesua chu a fapate leh a unaute nen, Kadmiela, a fapate nen, Juda fapate nen chuan Pathian in satute chu an ho tlang ta a: Henadada fapa te, an fapate leh an unau Levi chite nen." 
Ezra3:10 Tin, a satuten LALPA in lungphum an han rem chuan puithiamte chu an thuam inbel a, tawtawrawt kengin Levia chi Asapha fapate chu Israel lal Davida tih dan ruat anga LALPA fak turin an dintir a." 
Ezra3:11 Ani chu a tha si a, a ngilneihna chu Israel mite chungah a awm kumkhua dawn a ni,"" tiin LALPA fak leh a hnena lawm thu sawiin hlain an inchhawn a. LALPA in lungphum an phum tak avanga LALPA an faknaah chuan mipui zawng zawng chu an au dur dur mai a." 
Ezra3:12 Puithiam leh Levi chi leh chhungkaw puipa tam tak, a in hmasa hmutu putarhote erawh chu an mithmuhah he mi in lungphum an phum chuan an tap vak vak mai a; tin, mi tam tak chu an lawm avangin an au vak vak bawk a:chutichuan mite chuan lawm avanga au thawm leh mipui tap thawm chu an thlei thei chuang lo va: mipui chu ring takin an au vak vak mai a, an thawm chu hla tak atangin an hria a ni." 
Ezra3:13 chutichuan mite chuan lawm avanga au thawm leh mipui tap thawm chu an thlei thei chuang lo va: mipui chu ring takin an au vak vak mai a, an thawm chu hla tak atangin an hria a ni." 
Ezra4:1 Juda mi leh Benjamina mite hmelma te chuan sal chhuakhoin LALPA, Israelte Pathian biak in an saksak tih an lo hriat chuan," 
Ezra4:2 Zerubabela leh an chhungkaw puipate hnen lamah an va kal a, an hnenah, ""Kan sakpui ve ang che u; keini pawhin in zawn ang hian in Pathian chu kan zawng ve a; heta min hruai chhotu Assuria lal Essar-haddona a lal lai atang khan a hnena kan inthawi thin a sin,"" an ti a." 
Ezra4:3 Nimahsela Zerubabela leh Jesua leh Israelte chhungkaw puipa dangte chuan an hnenah, ""kan Pathian in saksaknaa hian in tel vena kawng reng reng a awm lo e; Persia lal Kura thu min pek angin keimahniho ngawtin LALPA, Israelte Pathian kan saksak dawn a ni,"" an ti a." 
Ezra4:4 Chutichuan chu mi rama mite chuan Juda mite kut chu an tihchauhsak a, an in sa chu chu an tibuai a." 
Ezra4:5 Persia lal Kura lal chhung zawng, Persia lal Daria lal thleng hialin an thiltih tumte engmahlova siam turin sawipuitute an ruai a." 
Ezra4:6 Chutichuan Ahasuera lal lai, a lal tantirh laiin Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a awmte hekna lehkha an phuah a." 
Ezra4:7 Tin, Artazerzia lal lai chuan Bislama te, Mithredatha te, Tabeela te leh an thian dangte nen chuan Pesia lal Artazerzia chu lehkha an thawn a; an lehkha ziak chu Aramik tawngin Aramik hawrawpa ziak a ni." 
Ezra4:8 Hotu Rehuma leh lehkha ziaktu Simsaia chuan Jerusalem-a mite hekin Persia lal Artazerzia hetiang lehkha hi an thawn a: 
Ezra4:9 Lehkha thawntute chu: Hotu Rehuma leh lehkhaziaktu Simsaia leha thiante - roreltute leh, ram awptu te, Persia mi te, Elam rama awm thin Erek mi te, Babulon mi te leh Susan mi te;" 
Ezra4:10 Mi ropui Asurpanipalan sala a hruai Somorasia khuaah leh Euphrates lui thlang lama a awmtir takte an ni. 
Ezra4:11 Lal Artezerzia chu hetiangin lehkha an thawn a: Lalber Artezerzia chi i chiahhlawh Euphrates lui khawthlang lam ram miten chibai kan buk e. 
Ezra4:12 I hnen atanga Juda mi lo chote chu kan hnenah Jerusalem-ah an lo kal a; khaw hel hmang leh sual chu an din tha a, a kulh chu an peih tawh a, a lungphum chu an siam tha tawh tih lal chuan lo hre rawh se." 
Ezra4:13 He mi khua hi an din a, a kulhte an siam zawh chuan, chiah te, thil neih man te leh leiman te an chawi duh lo ang a, a tawpah chuan lalte tan chhiatna a lo ni mai ang tih lalin lo hre rawh se." 
Ezra4:14 Lal ina chi liak kan nih avangin lal mawi lohna hmuh hi kan tan a fel lo hle si a; 
Ezra4:15 chuvangin i pi leh pute thil chhinchhiah ziakna buah i zawn a, chu mi ziakna buah chuan i hmuh a, he mi khua hi hel hmang khua a nih leh lalte leh an ramte tana thil hlauhawm tak a nih a, an hel kumkhua a, chu mi avangin he khua hi a lo chia a ni tih i hriatna'n lehkha kan thawn a, lal kan hriattir a ni." 
Ezra4:16 He mi khua hi an din a, a kulhte an peih vek chuan lui ral lama reng reng chuan chan i neih loh phah ang tih lal kan hriattir a ni,"" an ti a." 
Ezra4:17 Chutichuan Lalber chuan chhanna a thawn a, ""Hotu Rehuma te, lehkha ziaktu Simsaia te leh an thian dang Samaria ram leh Euphrates lui thlang lama awmte chibai ka buk a che u." 
Ezra4:18 Kan hnena in lehkha rawn thawn kha ka hmaah fiah takin an chhiar a. 
Ezra4:19 Tin, thu ka pe a, an zawng a, he khua hi hman atangin lal chunga an hel thin a, chutah chuan helna leh buaina a awm thin tih chu kan hmu chhuak a ni." 
Ezra4:20 Jerusalem-ah khan lal thiltithei tak tak lui ral lehlam ram thlinga rorolte pawh an lo awm tawh a; chhiah te, thil neih man te, leiman te an la thin a." 
Ezra4:21 Khang mite kha chawlhtir u la, thu ka pek hma loh chuan khua chu din su se." 
Ezra4:22 Muang hauh suh u: engah tehlul nge lalte tana chhiatna thil pawi tak a lo zualkai ang? a ti a. 
Ezra4:23 Chutichuan lal Artazerzia lehkha chu Rehuma leh lehkhaziaktu Simsaia leh an thiante hmaa an chhiar zawh chuan hmanhmawh takin Jerusalem-a Judate hnenah an kal a, thuneihnain an ban luihtir a.Chutichuan Jerusalem-a Pathian in an bei chu an chawlhsan ta a; Persia lal Daria lal kum hnihna thlengin chawlhsan a ni ta a." 
Ezra4:24 Chutichuan Jerusalem-a Pathian in an bei chu an chawlhsan ta a; Persia lal Daria lal kum hnihna thlengin chawlhsan a ni ta a. 
Ezra5:1 Chutih lai chuan zawlnei pahni Jagaia leh Idova fapa Zekaria-te chuan Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a Juda awmte hnena Israelte Pathian hmingin thu an sawi a. 
Ezra5:2 Chutichuan Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jozadaka fapa Jesua chuan Jerusalem-a Pathian in chu an han bei tan leh ta a; tin, an hnena chuan anmahni tanpuiin Pathian zawlneite chu an awm a." 
Ezra5:3 Chu veleh chuan lui ral ram awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh an thiante chu an hnenah chuan an kal a, an hnena chuan heti hian an sawi a, ""He in sa tur leh he kulh tizo tur hian tu nge thu pe che u?"" an ti a." 
Ezra5:4 Tin, hetiang hian an hnenah, ""He mi in sa tute hming hi tute nge ni?"" kan ti a." 
Ezra5:5 Nimahsela an Pathianmit chu Juda upate chungah chuan a fu a, Daria hnenah an thu chu thlen a, chhanna a lo thlen hma loh chuan ram awptute chuan an bantir chuang lo." 
Ezra5:6 Lui ral lehlam awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh a thian, lui rala awm Apharsak-hoten lal Daria hnena lehkha an thawn a," 
Ezra5:7 hetiang hian an ziak a: - Lal Daria hnena thlamuanna kim awm rawh se: 
Ezra5:8 Hei hi lalin lo hre rawh se. Judai ramah Pathian ropui tak in, lung lian tak taka sak leh bang thinga rem, taima tak leh tluang taka an lo bei tawhnaah chuan kan kal a." 
Ezra5:9 Chutichuan, 'He in sa tur leh he kulh tizo tur hian tuin nge thu pe che u?' tiin an upate kan zawt a." 
Ezra5:10 An hotu hmingte chu kan ziak a, kan hriat fiahtir theihna'n che an hmingte pawh chu kan zawt a." 
Ezra5:11 Tin, anni chuan heti hain min chhang a, 'Lei leh van Pathian chaihhlawhte kan ni a, kum kha leh chena sak, Israel lal ropui tak pakhat lo sak zawh tawh in chu kan sa tha leh a ni." 
Ezra5:12 Amaherawhchu kan pi leh puten van Pathian chu thinrim khawpin an tilungawi loh avangin Kaldai mi babulon lal Nebukadnezara kutah a pe a, ani chuan he in hi a tichhia a, mite chu Babulon lamah a hruai a." 
Ezra5:13 Nimahsela Babulon lal Kura lal tirh kumin, lal Kura chuan he mi Pathian in hi sak that leh thu a pe a." 
Ezra5:14 Tin, Pathian ina rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam bungbel - Jerusalem-a Pathian ina mi Nebukadnezaran a lak chauh, Babulon-a biak ina a lak lute chu lal Kura chuan babulon biak in ata a la chuak a, mi pakhat a hming Sesbazara, ram awptu atana a siama chu a pe a;" 
Ezra5:15 tin, a hnenah, Heng bungbel hi la la, kal la, Jerusalem-a biak inah dah la, tin, biak in chu a hmun ngaiah sak ni rawh se, a ti a." 
Ezra5:16 Chutichuan Sesbazara ngei chu a kal a, Jerusalem-a biak in lungphum chu a phuma: chuta chin chu tun thleng hian sak a ni ta reng a; nimahsela la peih loh ala ni reng a,' tiin.Chutichuan lal tha tihzawng a ni chuan, chutiang chu a ni ngei emaw, Babulin-a lal sum ina mi chu han zawng se la, tin, lal chuan he mi chungchang thuah hian a du dan min hanhrilh rawh se,"" tiin." 
Ezra5:17 Chutichuan lal tha tihzawng a ni chuan, chutiang chu a ni ngei emaw, Babulin-a lal sum ina mi chu han zawng se la, tin, lal chuan he mi chungchang thuah hian a du dan min hanhrilh rawh se,"" tiin." 
Ezra6:1 Chutichuan lal Daria chuan thu ape a, Babulon-a an ro dah khawmna, lehkhabu dahna in chu an zawng ta a." 
Ezra6:2 Tichuan Medai rama Akametha khuaa lal inah lehkhabu zial an hmu a, chutah chuan vawn that atan hetianga ziak hi a awm a:" 
Ezra6:3 Jerusalema Pathian in chungchangah Lal Kura chuan a lal tantirh kumin hetiang hian thu a pe a: An inthawina thilhlanna in chu sak that leh ni se; a lungphum pawh nghet taka rem ni rawh se. 
Ezra6:4 A san lam tawng sawmruk, a zau lam tawng sawmruk, lung lian pui pui tlar thuma rem hnuah thingphek tlar khat siam tur ani a, a sakna hi lal sum atanga pek tur a ni." 
Ezra6:5 Tin, Pathian ina rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbel Nebukadnezaran Jerusalem biak in ata a lak chhuah a Babulon-a a lakte pawh pek kir ni se la, Jerusalema-a biak ina a hmun ngai te veka la kirin, Pathian inah dah tur a ni,"" tiin." 
Ezra6:6 Chuvangin lui ral ram awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh lui rala awm an thian Apharsak-hote u, intifihlim rawh u khai:" 
Ezra6:7 he Pathian biak in an sa leh hi engmah tih suh u; Judate awptu leh Juda upate chuan he Pathian in hi a hmun ngaiah sa rawh se. 
Ezra6:8 Chu mi sak lehna tanpui tur chuan thu ka pe a che u. Hna a bahlah lohna'n a sakna tur pawh Euphrates lui khawthlang bial chhiah, lal sum tur atanga pek thuai tur a ni." 
Ezra6:9 Tin, van Pathian tan halral thilhlan tur an mamawh apiang, bawngpa tuai te, berampa te, beram no te, buh chi te, uain te, hriak te, Jerusalem-a puithiamte thu ang zelin ni tinin pek ngei ngei tur a ni:" 
Ezra6:10 chutichuan van Pathian chu rimtuia inthawinate an hlan thei ang a, lal leh a fapate chu an dam reina'n an tawngtaisak thei bawk ang." 
Ezra6:11 Tupawh he thu tidanglam apiang, chu mi avang chuan a khanchhuak phawisak a, amah chu chutah chuan khaikana, a in chu ek dura siam tur a ni ang tih thu ka pe bawk a ni;" 
Ezra6:12 tin, chuta a hming awmtirtu Pathian chuan Jerusalem-a Pathian in tihchhiat tuma he thu tidanglam tura kut lek apiang, lal zawng zawng leh hnam zawng zawngte chu tiboral vek rawh se. Kei, Darian thu ka pe a ni; zawm nghal chiah tur a ni,""" 
Ezra6:13 Chutichuan lui ral ram awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh a thiante chuan lal Daria lehkhathawn avangin chutiang chuan an ti ta nghal a. 
Ezra6:14 Tin, zawlnei Hagaia leh Idova fapa Zekaria thu sawi avangin Juda upate chuan tlaung takin an sa a. Israelte Pathian thupek ang leh Persia lal Kura leh Daria leh Artazerzia te thupek ang chuan an sa a, an zo ta a." 
Ezra6:15 Tin, in chu lal Daria kum ruk a lal kum, Adar thla, ni thum niin an zo a." 
Ezra6:16 Tin, Israela thlah, puithiam te, Levi chite leh sal chhuakho dangte chuan chu mi Pathian in hlanna chu lawm takin an hmang a." 
Ezra6:17 Tin, chu mi Pathian in hlannaah chuan bawngpa za, berampa zahnih, beram no zali an hlan a; tin, Israel zawng zawng tan sual thawina'n Israel hnam zatin kelpa sawm leh pahnih." 
Ezra6:18 Mosia lehkhabua chuang angin Jerusalem-a Pathian rawngbawl tur chuan puithiamte leh Levi chite chu an pawl theuhvah an awmtir a. 
Ezra6:19 Tin, sal chhuakhote chuan thla khatna, ni sawm leh ni li ni chu kalhlen kut ni atan an hmang a." 
Ezra6:20 Puithiamte leh Levi chite chu an inthianho a, an za chuan an lo thianghlim ta a: chutichuan kalhlen kutna tur chu sal chhuak ho zawng zawng tan leh an unau puithiamte leh anmahni tan an talh a." 
Ezra6:21 Tin, Israela thlah, sal ata lo chhuak lehte leh LALPA, Israelte Pathian zawng tura chu rama Pathian thu awih lo bawlhhlawhna ata inthiarfihlima, anniho zawm zawng zawng tate chuan an ei a,chhang dawidim telh loh kut chu lawm takin ni sarih an hmang a: LALPA chuan anni chu a tihlim a, Pathian, Israelte Pathian in saknaa an kutte tihchaksak turin Assuria lal rilru chu an lamah a thlektir a ni." 
Ezra6:22 chhang dawidim telh loh kut chu lawm takin ni sarih an hmang a: LALPA chuan anni chu a tihlim a, Pathian, Israelte Pathian in saknaa an kutte tihchaksak turin Assuria lal rilru chu an lamah a thlektir a ni." 
Ezra7:1 Tin, chung thil hnuah chuan Persia lal Artezerzia lal laiin Ezra chu Babulon atangin a chho a; chu mi chu Seraia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Azaria fa a ni a, chu mi chu Hilkia fa a ni a," 
Ezra7:2 chu mi chu Saluma fa a ni a, chu mi chu Zadoka fa a ni a, chu mi chu Ahituba fa a ni a," 
Ezra7:3 chu mi chu Amaria fa a ni a, chu mi chu Azaria fa a ni a, chu mi chu Meraiotha fa a ni a," 
Ezra7:4 chu mi chu Zerahia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Uzia fa a ni a, chu i chu Bukia fa a ni a," 
Ezra7:5 chu mi chu Abisua fa a ni a, chu mi chu Eleazara fa ani a, chu mi chu puithiam lal Arona fa ani a:" 
Ezra7:6 Ezra chu lehkhaziaktu, LALPA, Israelte Pathian pek Mosia dan thiam tak a ni a. LALPA Pathianin a duhsakna avangin lal chuan a dil zawng zawng chu a pe zel a." 
Ezra7:7 Tin, lal Artazerzia kum sarih a lal kum chuan Israela thlah thenkhatte, puithiam thenkhate, Levi chi thenkhat te, hla satu thenkhat te, kawngkhar vengtu thenkhat te, Nethin-ho thenkhat te chu Jerusalem-ah an chho a." 
Ezra7:8 Tin, lal chu kum sarih a lal kum, thla nganaah ani chu Jerusalem-ah a kal a." 
Ezra7:9 Thla khatna, ni khat niin Babulon atangin a chhuak a, a. Pathianin amah chu veng zelin thla ngana, ni khat niin Jerusalem a thleng a ni." 
Ezra7:10 Ezra chuan LALPA dan chu hriaa zamw tur leh Israel-hote chu thuruatte leh rorelte zir tir turin a thinlung a siam tlat a. 
Ezra7:11 Tin, hei hi lal Artazerzian puithiam Ezra, lehkhaizaktu, LALPA thupek thu leh Israel mite tana a thuruatte zirtu hnena a lehkha thawn thu chu a ni." 
Ezra7:12 Lalte lal Artazerzian, puithiam Ezra, van Pathian dan ziaktu chibai ka buk e." 
Ezra7:13 Ka ram chhunga Israel mi zawng zawng leh an puithiamte leh Levi chite Jerusalem-a mahni duh thua kal chakna nei apiangte chu, i hnena kal turin thu ka pe a." 
Ezra7:14 I kawl, Pathian dan ang zela Judai ram leh Jerusalem chanchin ngaichiang tur leh." 
Ezra7:15 Jerusalem-a awm Israelte Pathian mahni duh thua lal leh a roreltuten an pek tangka leh rangkachak keng tura lal leh a roreltu pasarihin an tirh che i ni a," 
Ezra7:16 Babulon ram zawng zawnga i hmuh zat apiang tangka leh rangkachak, mahni duh thua mipuite leh puithiamten an pek, Jerusalem-a an Pathian in atana lawm taka an pekte nen;" 
Ezra7:17 chutichuan he'ng tangka hian bawngpa te, berampa te, beram no te, ei tur leh in tur thilhlan tur nen i lei nghal ang a, tin, Jerusalem-a in Pathian ina maichamah chuan i hlan dawn nia." 
Ezra7:18 Tin, tangka leh rangkachak hman bangte chu in Pathian remtihzawng awmin nang leh i unauten tha in tih ang angin ti ang che u." 
Ezra7:19 Tin, i pathian in rawngbawlna'na bungbel an pek che chu Jerusalem-a Pathian hnenah chuan hlan ang che." 
Ezra7:20 Tin, i Pathian in atana mamawh danga hman tulna a awm phawt chuan lal sum ina mi hmang ang che." 
Ezra7:21 Kei, lal Artazerzia ngeiin lui rala sum enkawltu zawng zawngte chu, 'Puithiam Ezra, van Pathian dan ziaktuin a dil apiang che u chu," 
Ezra7:22 tangka chu talent za, buh chu buk za, uain chu bath za, hriak chu bath za, chi chu engzat tih pawh awm chuang loin pe nghal ang che u, tiin thu ka pe." 
Ezra7:23 Van Pathianin thu a pek apiang chu, chutiang chiahin van Pathian in atan tih ni rawh se; thinurna chu lal leh a fate ram chungah hian engah tehlul nge a awm ang ni?" 
Ezra7:24 Tin, puithiam te, Levi chite, hla satute, kawngkhar vengtute, Nethin-hote, he Pathian ina rawngbawlte hi chhiah te, thil neih man te, leiman te chu chawitir loh tur a nih kan hriattir bawk a che." 
Ezra7:25 Tin, nang Ezra, i kawl pathianin finna a pek che angin lui rala awmho zawng zawngte ro an relsak theihna'n hotute leh roreltute, i Pathian dan hre mite ruat la, hre lote chu zirtir ang che u." 
Ezra7:26 Tin, tupawh i Pathian dan leh lal dan zawm lo apiang chu thi khawpin emaw, ram ata hnawhchhuahin emaw, an bungrua laksakin emaw, tan ina tantirin emaw an chungah rorelna awm nghal tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezra7:27 ,28 Jerusalem-a LALPA in timawi tura lal chu hetiang rilru puttirtu leh lal leh a roreltu hma leh lal mi lian lar tak takho hmaa ka chunga khawngaihna zamtirtu LALPA, kan pi leh pute Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se. Tin, LALPA ka Pathianin mi khawngaih a, mi tichak a, tichuan ka hnena han kal ve turin Israel zinga mi hotu deuh deuhte ka thlang khawm ta a.,27 Jerusalem-a LALPA in timawi tura lal chu hetiang rilru puttirtu leh lal leh a roreltu hma leh lal mi lian lar tak takho hmaa ka chunga khawngaihna zamtirtu LALPA, kan pi leh pute Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se. Tin, LALPA ka Pathianin mi khawngaih a, mi tichak a, tichuan ka hnena han kal ve turin Israel zinga mi hotu deuh deuhte ka thlang khawm ta a." 
Ezra7:28 ,27 Jerusalem-a LALPA in timawi tura lal chu hetiang rilru puttirtu leh lal leh a roreltu hma leh lal mi lian lar tak takho hmaa ka chunga khawngaihna zamtirtu LALPA, kan pi leh pute Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se. Tin, LALPA ka Pathianin mi khawngaih a, mi tichak a, tichuan ka hnena han kal ve turin Israel zinga mi hotu deuh deuhte ka thlang khawm ta a." 
Ezra8:1 Hengte hi lal Arazerzia lal lai Babulon ram ata ka hnena kal chhoho, chhungkaw puipa leh an thlahte hmingte chu an ni." 
Ezra8:2 Phinehasa thlahte zingah Gersoma; Ithamara thlahte zingah Daniela; Davida thlahte zingah Hatusa; 
Ezra8:2 Phinehasa thlahte zingah Gersoma; Ithamara thlahte zingah Daniela; Davida thlahte zingah Hatusa; 
Ezra8:3 Sekania thlahte: Parosa thlahte zingah Zekaria; mipa za leh sawmnga nen. 
Ezra8:4 Pahathmoaba thlahte zingah Zerahua fa, Eliehoenaia; mipa zahnih nen." 
Ezra8:5 Sekania thlahte zingah jahaziela fa, mipa zathum nen." 
Ezra8:6 Adina thlahte zingah Jonathana fa Ebeda, mipa sawmnga nen." 
Ezra8:7 Elama thlahte zingah Athalia fa Jesaia, mipa sawmsarih nen." 
Ezra8:8 Sephatia thlahte zingah Mikaela fa Zebadia, mipa sawmriat nen." 
Ezra8:9 Joaba thlahte zingah Jehiela fa Obadia, mipa zahnih leh sawm leh pariat nen." 
Ezra8:10 Selomitha thlahte zingah Josiphia fa, mipa za leh sawmruk nen." 
Ezra8:11 Tin, Bebaia thlahte zingah Bebaia fa Zekaria, mipa sawmhnih leh pariat nen." 
Ezra8:12 Tin, Azgada thlahte zingah Hakatana fa Johanana, mipa za leh sawm nen." 
Ezra8:13 Adonikama thlahte zingah (A hnuhnug ber an ni a) an hming chu he'ng hi a ni; Elipheleta te, Jeuela te, Semaia te, mipa sawmruk nen." 
Ezra8:14 Bigvaia thlahte zinga Uthaia leh Zabuda, mipa sawmsarih nen." 
Ezra8:15 Ahava luiah chuan ka awm khawmtir a; chutah chuan ni thum kan awm a: tin, mipuite leh puithiamte chu ka han en vel a, Levia thlahte reng reng ka hmu ve ta lo a." 
Ezra8:16 Chutichuan puipa deuh deuh, Eliezera te, Ariela e, Semaia te, Elnathana te, Jariba te, Elnathana te, Nathana te, Zekaria te, Mesulama te ka chah a: zirtirtu Joiariba leh Elnathana te pawh." 
Ezra8:17 Tin, Kasiphia hmuna hotu Idova hnenah ka tir a: kan Pathian ina rawngbawltu tur rawn hruai turin Kasiphia hmuna Idova leh a unaute Nethinho hnena an han sawi tur ka hrilh a." 
Ezra8:18 Tin, Pathian min khawngaihna avangin Issekela; Mahlia thlahte zingah; Israela fapa, chu mi fapa Levia; Serebia, a fate leh a unau sawm leh pariat te nen;" 
Ezra8:19 Hasabia, Meraria thlahte zingah Jesaia, a unaute leh an fate sawmhnih nen." 
Ezra8:20 Nethin-ho, Davida leh an mi lianten Levi chite rawngbawl tura an pekte zinga mi Nethin-ho zahnih leh sawmhnih te nen min hruaisak a: an zaa hming ziak theuh a ni." 
Ezra8:21 Chutichuan kan Pathian hmaa kan intitlawm a, a hnena keini leh kan fate leh kan bungrua zawng zawngte nena tluang taka kal theihna dil turin Ahava luiah chuan chaw nghei thu ka puang a." 
Ezra8:22 Kan Pathian duhsakna chu amah zawngtute zawng zawng chungah an thatna turin a awm zel a; a thiltihtheihna leh a thinurna erawh chu amah hawisante chungah a awm zel thin,"" tia lal hnena kan lo sawi tawh avangin kalkawnga kan hmelmate laka min tanpui tura sipai leh sakawr chung chuang mite lal dil chu zahthlak ka ti si a." 
Ezra8:23 Chutichuan chaw kan nghei a, chu mi chu kan Pathian kan dil chiam a; kan dilna chu min ngaihthlaksak a." 
Ezra8:24 Chutichuan puithiam tupa deuh deuhte zinga mi sawm leh pahnih, Serebia leh Hasabia leh an unaute zinga mi sawm ka tihrang a," 
Ezra8:25 tin, lal leh a roreltute leh a mi liante leh chuta awm Israelte zawng zawngin kan Pathian in atan an thilhlan, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbel te chu ka buk a, ka hlan a;" 
Ezra8:26 ka buka an kuta ka hlan chu tangkaraw talent zaruk leh sawmnga; tangkaraw bungbel talent za; rangkachak talent za; 
Ezra8:27 rangkachak berhbu sawmhnih, darik sangkhat theuh; dar tle mi mawi tak, rangkachak ang maia hlu bungbel pahnih a ni a." 
Ezra8:28 Tin, an hnenah, ""LALPA tana tihthianghlim in ni a, bungbelte pawh tihthianghlim a ni; tangkarua leh rangkachakte hi LALPA, in pi leh pute Pathian tana mahni duh thua hlan vek a ni." 
Ezra8:29 Puithiam tupa deuh deuhte leh Levi chite leh Isreal mite chhungkaw puipa hmaa Jerusalem-a LALPA ina pindana in buk hma loh chuan veng u la, kawl rawh u,"" ka ti a." 
Ezra8:30 Chutichuan puithiamte leh Levi chite chuan Jerusalem-a kan pathian ina ken turin tangkarua leh rangkachak leh bungbel bukte chu an la ta a. 
Ezra8:31 Chutichuan Jerusalem-a kal turin thla khatna, ni sawm leh ni hnih niin Ahava lui atang chuan kan chhuak ta a; tin, kan pathian min khawngaih a, hmelma lak ata leh kawng laka chang rutute lak ata chu min humhim zel a." 
Ezra8:32 Tin, Jerusalem chu kan han thleng a, chutah chuan ni thum kan hahchawl a." 
Ezra8:33 Tin, a ni li ni chuan, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbelte chu kan Pathian inah bukin puithiam Uria fapa Meremotha kutah kan hlan a; tin, a hnenah chuan Phinehasa fapa Elazara a awm a; tin, an hnenah chuan Levi chi Jesua fapa, Jozabada leh Binuia fapa Noadia te an awm a;" 
Ezra8:34 chhiar vek leh buk vek ani a; abuk zat chu, chu mi lai la la chuan an ziak vek a." 
Ezra8:35 Sal chhuakhote chuan Israelte Pathian hnenah halral thilhlan an hlan a, Israel zawng zawng pualah bawngpa sawm leh pahnih, berampa sawmkua leh paruk, beram no sawmsarih leh pasarih; sual thawina'n kelpa sawm leh pahnih: he'ng zawng zawng hi LALPA hnena halral thilhlan vek a ni.Tin, lal thuruatte chu lal upate leh lui ral ram awptute chu an hrilh a; tin, anni chuan mipuie chu tanpuiin Pathian in sak chu an chhunzawmpui ta a." 
Ezra8:36 Tin, lal thuruatte chu lal upate leh lui ral ram awptute chu an hrilh a; tin, anni chuan mipuie chu tanpuiin Pathian in sak chu an chhunzawmpui ta a." 
Ezra9:1 Tin, chung thiltih zawh chuan miliante chuan, ""Israel mite leh puithiamte leh Levi chite chu he ram mite lakah hian inthiarfihlim chuang loin, Kanaan-ho te, Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Jebus-ho te, Amon-ho te, Moab-ho te, Aigupta ho te, Amor-hote thiltih tenawm tak an tih ang zel an ti ve a." 
Ezra9:2 An fanute chu anmahni leh an fapaten an nei ta mai a; chutichuan chi thianghlim chu he ram mite nen hian an chawhpawlh a: a ni, mi liante leh roreltute chu he mi bawhchhiat thuah hian a tupa berte an ni,"" tiin mi rawn hrilh a." 
Ezra9:3 Tin, chu thil chu ka hriat chuan ka kawr leh ka puan ka pawt thler a, ka sam leh ka khabe hmul ka pawt thla a, a ngaihna hre loin ka thu ta ngawih ngawih mai a." 
Ezra9:4 Chutichuan sal chhuakho bawhchhiatna avanga Israelte Pathian thua khur apiangte chu ka hnenah an lo kal khawm a; tlai lam inthawi hun thlengin a ngaihna hre loin ka thu ta ngawih ngawih a. 
Ezra9:5 Tin, tlai lam inthawi hun chuan ka lungngaihna ata ka kawr leh ka puan thler chung chuan ka tho a; tin, ka thingthi a, LALPA ka pathian lamah ka thingthi a, LALPA ka pathian lamah ka ban ka phar a;" 
Ezra9:6 tin, ""Aw ka Pathian, i lam lo hawi hi ka zak a, ka hmai te a sen tawn tawn a ni, ka Pathian; kan bawhchhiatnate chu min chimpil khawpin a pung a, kan thiam lohna chuan van a tawng a." 
Ezra9:7 Kan pi leh pute chenin tun thleng hian kan thiam lo let der a ni; kan bawhchhiatna avangin kan lalte, kan puithiamte nen ram dang lal man te, khandaiha thah te, sala tan te, rawk te, mualphonate kan tawk a, vawiina kan awm ang hian." 
Ezra9:8 Tin, tunah hian kan pathian chuan kan mitte a tihvara, sala kan awm min tihhraha, a hmun thianghlimah chuan min awm nghehtlattirna turin a la awm chhunte chu min chhuahtirin, LALPA kan Pathian khawngaihna kan dawng rih mai a ni a." 
Ezra9:9 Chhiah khua zawng kan ni ngei mai a; nimahsela kan pathian chuan chhiah khua kan nih chhung pawhin min thlahthlam chuang lo a, min tiharh tur leh kan Pathian in din tur leh a chhe hnu chei leh tur leh Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a kulh nei turin Persia lalte mithmuhah chuan kan chungah khawngaihna a zam zautir ta zawk a." 
Ezra9:10 Aw kan pathian, tunah hian eng nge kan sawi tak ang? I thupekte chu kan hawisan ta si a." 
Ezra9:11 i chhiahhlawh zawlneite hmanga, In va kalna tur, in ram luah tur chu a rama mi awmte bawlhhlawhna avangin a bhawlhhlawh a, kil tin, kil tang an tenawmnain a titenawm vek a ni." 
Ezra9:12 Chuvangin in fanute chu an fapate neihtir suh u la, an fanute chu in fapate neihtir hek suh u la, an thawvenna leh an hmuingilna reng reng zawnsak hek suh ula, in lo chak a, chu mi rama thil tha chu in ei a, kumkhuaa in fate in in rochun theihna'n, tia thu i pekte chu." 
Ezra9:13 Tin, kan thiltih sual avang leh kan thiam lohna nasa tak avanga kan chunga hetiang thil a lo awm a, nang kan pathian in kan bawhchhiatnain a phu aia nepa min hrem hnua la awm cheute min la nei tih hre reng chung siin," 
Ezra9:14 i thupekte chu kan bawhchhe lehin he'ng thil tenawm titute nen hian kan la inneih pawlh cheuhdawn em ni? A bak reng awm lo leh pumpelh reng pawh awm loa min tiboral khawpin kan chungah i thinur hial dawn lo'm ni?Aw LALPA, Israelte Pathian, nang chu i fel a; a la awm chhuakte kan ni a, vawiinah keini ang hi, ngai teh, thiam loin i hmaah kan awm a, he mi avang hian tumah i hmaa ding thei reng reng kan awm lo a ni,"" ka ti a." 
Ezra9:15 Aw LALPA, Israelte Pathian, nang chu i fel a; a la awm chhuakte kan ni a, vawiinah keini ang hi, ngai teh, thiam loin i hmaah kan awm a, he mi avang hian tumah i hmaa ding thei reng reng kan awm lo a ni,"" ka ti a." 
Ezra10:1 Tin, Pathian in lam hawia bawkkhupa tap chunga Ezran a tawngtai a, thupha a chawi lai chuan a hnenah chuan Israel mi, mi tam tak, ahmei apain naupangte nen an lo kal khawm chiam a: mipuite chu nasa takin an tap ta a." 
Ezra10:2 Tin, Elama thlah zinga mi Jehiela fapa Sekania chuan Ezra hnenah, ""Kan Pathian chungah chuan thil chu kan tisual ta ngei mai a, tin, he mi rama hnam dang hmeichhiate chu nupuiah kan nei a: nimahsela Israel mite tan he mi chungchang thuah hian beiseina a la awm cheu a ni." 
Ezra10:3 Chutichuan hawh u, ka pu leh kan Pathian thupeka khur apiangte remruat ang zelin, chung mipuite zawng zawng leh an laka piang apiangte chu then turin, kan Pathian hnenah thu i thlung teh ang u; tin, chu chu dan ang zela tih ni rawh se." 
Ezra10:4 Tho rawh khai; he mi hi i puala lum a ni a, keini pawh i lama tang kan ni a, huai takin awm la, ti mai rawh,"" tiin a tihpui a." 
Ezra10:5 Chutichuan Ezra chu a tho a, puithiam tupa deuh deuhte leh Levi chite leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chu, chu thu anga ti tur chuan chhia a chhamtir a. Chutichuan chhia chu an chham ta a." 
Ezra10:6 Chutichuan Ezra chu Pathian in lam a hawi chu a tho a, Eliasiba fapa Jehohanana pindanah a lut a; tin, chutah chuan zankhuain sal chhuakte thil tihsual avangin lungngaiin engmah a eiin a in lo a." 
Ezra10:7 7-8, Tin, Judai ram zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a sal chhuakho zawng zawng hnenah chuan Jerusalem-a inkhawm vek a, tupawh an mi liante leh an upate thupek anga ni thum chhunga lo kal lo apiangte chu a bungrua zawng zawng hrensak vek a, amah pawh chu sal chhuaho zing ata hnawhchhuah tur a ni ang tih thu an puang a." 
Ezra10:8 7-8, Tin, Judai ram zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a sal chhuakho zawng zawng hnenah chuan Jerusalem-a inkhawm vek a, tupawh an mi liante leh an upate thupek anga ni thum chhunga lo kal lo apiangte chu a bungrua zawng zawng hrensak vek a, amah pawh chu sal chhuaho zing ata hnawhchhuah tur a ni ang tih thu an puang a." 
Ezra10:9 Chutichuan Juda mi leh Benjamin mite chu, chu mi ni thum chhung chuan Jerusalema-ah an inkhawm vek a; chu chu thla kuana, ni sawmhnih ni a ni a; Pathian in kawt zau laiah chuan mipui zawng zawng chu an thu a, chung thu avang leh ruahpui nasa tak a sur avang chuan an khur an khur mai a." 
Ezra10:10 Tin, puithiam Ezra chu a ding a, an hnenah, ""Thil in lo tisual ta a, Israel mite thiam lohna belhchhahin hnam dang hmeichhiate nupuiah in nei a." 
Ezra10:11 Chuvangin LALPA, in pi leh pute Pathian hnenah chuan thupha chawi u la, a lawmzawng ti tawh rawh u khai: tin, he rama hnam dang leh an hmeichhiate lak ata hi inthiarfihlim rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Ezra10:12 chutichuan mipui zawng zawngte chu an chhang a, ring takin, Kan chungchang thu chu i sawi ang tak chuan kan ti ngei tur a ni." 
Ezra10:13 Amaherawhchu mi kan tam si a, ruah sur hun lai a lo ni bawk si a, pawnah hian kan ding reng thei lo a, tin, ni hnih khat thila han tih mai mi ani bawk hek lo: he mi thuah hian kan lo bawhchhe nasa hle si a." 
Ezra10:14 Mipui zawng zawng aiah kan mi liante ruat ni se la, kan chunga Pathian thinurna nasa tak hi a kian a, he mi thu hi kan tihfel hma loh chuan, kan khua a hnam dang hmeichhe neitute zawng zawng chu khaw tina an upate leh roreltute nen an lo kal hun bi ruatah lo kal zel rawh se,"" an ti a." 
Ezra10:15 Asahela fapa Jonathana leh Tikva fapa Jahzeia te chauhin he mi thu hi an kalha tin Levi chi mesulama leh Sabethaian an tanpui a. 
Ezra10:16 Tin, salchhuakho chuan chutiang chuan an ti ta a. Tin, puithiam Ezra chuan chhungkaw puipate zinga mi an hming hmerh vekin a ruat a; tin, thla sawmna, ni khat niin chu mi thu chu ngaihtuahin an inkhawm a." 
Ezra10:17 Tin, thla khatna, ni khat niin hnam dang hmeichhe neitute chu an tifel ta a." 
Ezra10:18 Tin, puithiam fate zinga hnam dang hmeichhia nupuia lo nei an hriatte chu: - Jesua leh a unaute zingah Jozadaka fapa leh a unau Maaseia te, Eliezera te, Jariba te, Gedalia te." 
Ezra10:19 Anni chuan an nupuite then turin thu an thlung a; tin, an thiam loh avangin an thiam lohna chu beram rual zinga mi berampa pakhatin an thawi a." 
Ezra10:20 Tin, Imera thlahte zinga Hanania leh Zebadia." 
Ezra10:21 Tin, Harima thlahte zingah Maaseia te, Elija te, Semaia te, Jehiela te, Uzia te." 
Ezra10:22 Pasura thlahte zingah Elioenaia te, maaseia te, ismaela te, Nethanela te, Jozabada te, Elasate an ni a." 
Ezra10:23 Tin, Levi chite zinga Jozabada te, Simeia te, Kelaia te, (Kelita an ti bawk thin) Pethahia te, Juda te, Eliezera te an ni a." 
Ezra10:24 Tin, hla satute zingah Eliasiba a ni a, kawngkhar vengtute zingah Saluma te, Telema te, Uria te an ni a." 
Ezra10:25 Tin, Israel-hote zingah Parosa thlaha mi Ramia te, Izia te, Malkija te, Mijamina te, Eleazara te, Malkija te, Benaia te." 
Ezra10:26 Tin, Elama thlaha mi Matania te, Zekaria te, Jehiela te, Abdia te, Jeremotha te, Elija te," 
Ezra10:27 Tin, Zatua thlaha mi Elioenaia te, Eliasiba te, Matania te, Jeremotha te, Zabada te, Aziza te." 
Ezra10:28 Tin, Bebaia thlaha mi Jehohanana te, Hanania te, Zabaia te, Athlaia te." 
Ezra10:29 Tin, Bania thlaha mi Mesulama te, maluka te, Adaia te, Jasuba te, Sela te, Jeremotha te." 
Ezra10:30 Tin, Pahathmoaba thlaha mi Adna te, Kelala te, Benaia te, Maaseia te, matania te, Bezalela te, Binuia te, Manasea te." 
Ezra10:31 Tin, Hariam thlaha mi Eliezera te, Isija te, malkija te, Semaia te, Simeona te;" 
Ezra10:32 Benjamian te, Maluka te, Semaria te." 
Ezra10:33 Hasuma thlaha mi Matenaia te, Matata te, Zabada te, Elipheleta te, Jeremaia te, manasea te, Simeia te." 
Ezra10:34 Bania thlaha mi Maadaia te, Amrama te, Uela te;" 
Ezra10:35 Benaia te, Bedeia te, Keluhia te;" 
Ezra10:36 Vania te, Maremotha te, Eliasiba te;" 
Ezra10:37 matania te, Matenaia te, Jaasua te," 
Ezra10:38 Bania te, Binuia te, Simeia te," 
Ezra10:39 Selemia te, Nathana te, Adaia te;" 
Ezra10:40 maknadebaia te, Sasaia te, Saraia te;" 
Ezra10:41 Azarela te, Selemia te, Semaria te;" 
Ezra10:42 Saluma te, Amaria te, Josepha te." 
Ezra10:43 Neboa thlaha mi Jeiela te, Matithia te, Zabada te, Zebian te, Idova te, Joela te, Benaia te an ni.Heng zawng zawng hian hnam dang nupuiah an nei a tin, thenkhat chuan chung an nupuite lakah chuan fate an nei a." 
Ezra10:43 Neboa thlaha mi Jeiela te, Matithia te, Zabada te, Zebian te, Idova te, Joela te, Benaia te an ni.Heng zawng zawng hian hnam dang nupuiah an nei a tin, thenkhat chuan chung an nupuite lakah chuan fate an nei a." 
Ezra10:44 Heng zawng zawng hian hnam dang nupuiah an nei a tin, thenkhat chuan chung an nupuite lakah chuan fate an nei a." 
Nehemiah1:1 Hakalia fapa Hehemia thute chu. Heti hi a ni a, kum sawmhnihna, Kisleu thla a lal khawpui Susan-a ka awm laiin," 
Nehemiah1:2 ka unau pakhat Hanania leh Judai ram ata mi thenkhatte an lo kal a; tin, Juda-ho sala tang chhuak la damte chanchin leh Jerusalem chanchin ka zawt a." 
Nehemiah1:3 Tin, ka hnenah, ""Sala tang chhuak, chu mi rama dama la awmte chu chanchhe tak leh sawichhiatin an awm a: tin, Jerusalem kulh chu a chim rem rum tawh a, a kawngkharte pawh a kang a sin,"" an ti a." 
Nehemiah1:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chung thu chu ka hriat chuan ka thu chawt a, ka tap a, ni eng emaw zat chu lungngaiin ka awm a; tin, chaw ka nghei a, van Pathian hmaah ka tawngtai a," 
Nehemiah1:5 Aw LALPA, van Pathian, Pathian ropui leh hlauhawm, nangmah hmangaiha i thupek pawmtute chunga thuthlung hlena khawngaihna tilangtu;" 
Nehemiah1:6 Israela thlahte sualna, i chunga kan sualna thupha ka chawi chhung hian i beng lo chhiin i mit lo meng la, i chhiahhlawh tangtaina, i hnena a chhun azana i chhiahhlawh Israela thlahte ka ngtensakna hi lo ngaithla teh ang che; kei leh ka pa chhungte chu kan lo sual ta si a." 
Nehemiah1:7 I chungah tha lo takin thil kan lo ti ta a, i chhiahhlawh Mosia hnena i pek, thupekte, dan te, rorelte chu kan lo zawm ta lo a." 
Nehemiah1:8 I chhiahhlawh Mosia hnena, 'In bawhchhiat chuan hnam tin, zingah ka titaitam ang che u a;" 
Nehemiah1:9 amaherawhchu ka lam in lo hawi leh a, ka thupekte in pawma in zawm chuan in zinga mi van tawp thleng pawha hnawhchhuah awm mah se la, chung ata pawh chu ka kai khawm leh ang a, ka hming ka awmtirna tura ka ruat hmunah chuan ka hruai leh ang,' tia thu i pek kha khawngaih takin hre reng ang che." 
Nehemiah1:10 Tin, hengho hi i chhiahhlawhte leh i mite, i thiltihtheihna nasa tak leh i kut chak taka i tlan chhuahte an ni a.Aw LALPA, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh tangtaina leh i hming tih lawmzawnga neih, i chhiahhlawhte tawngtainaah hian i beng lo chhi ang che; tin, vawiinah hian i chhiahhlawh hi min hlawhtlintir la, he mi mithmuhah hian khawngaih takin zahngaihna dawntir ang che,"" ka ti a, kei chu lal no hlantu ka ni si a." 
Nehemiah1:11 Aw LALPA, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh tangtaina leh i hming tih lawmzawnga neih, i chhiahhlawhte tawngtainaah hian i beng lo chhi ang che; tin, vawiinah hian i chhiahhlawh hi min hlawhtlintir la, he mi mithmuhah hian khawngaih takin zahngaihna dawntir ang che,"" ka ti a, kei chu lal no hlantu ka ni si a." 
Nehemiah2:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal Artazerzia kum sawmhnih a lal kum, Nisan thlaah uain an rawn hlui hnuin uain chu ka la a, lal chu ka pe a.Tun hma lam chuan a hmaah lungngai hmel ka pu ngai lo a." 
Nehemiah2:2 Tin, lal chuan ka hnenah, ""I dam lo pawh a ni si lo a, eng tizia nge lungngai hmel i put chu le? Thil dang a ni lo ang, i rilru lam a lungngai a nih hi maw,"" mi ti a. Chutichuan ka hlau ta em em mai a." 
Nehemiah2:3 Tin, kei chuan lal hnenah, ""Lal chu kumkhuain dam reng rawh se: mi thlahtute thlan awmna khua chu a ramin a kawngkharte chu a kang vek si a, lungngai hmel pu lo thei em ka nih ang?"" ka ti a." 
Nehemiah2:4 Chutichuan lal chuan ka hnenah, ""Eng nge ini i dil?"" a ti a. Chutichuan van Pathian hnenah ka tawngtai ta a." 
Nehemiah2:5 Tin, lal hnenah chuan, ""Lal remtihzawng a nih a, i chhiahhlawh hian i mit ka lo thlun thin chuan, Judai ramah mi thlahtute thlan awmna khuaah mi kaltir la, khua chu ka va din leh ang e,"" ka ti a." 
Nehemiah2:6 Tin, lal chuan ka hnenah, (lalnu pawh a kiangah chuan a thu a) ""Eng chen nge i thang ang a, eng tikah nge i lo haw leh ang?"" a ti a. Chutichuan lal chuan lawm takin mi kaltir ta a; tin, keiin hunbi ka tiam a." 
Nehemiah2:7 Chu chauh chu ni loin lal hnenah chuan, ""Lal remtihzawng a nih chuan, lui rala roreltute hmuh atan Judai ram ka thlen thlenga mi kaltir zel phalna turin lehkhate mi pe la;" 
Nehemiah2:8 tin, lal ngaw hak vengtu Asapha hmuh turin in venna kulhbing kawngkhar rel atan te, khawpui kulh atan te, ka va luah tur in atan te thing mi pek theihhna turin lehkha mi pe bawk rawh,"" ka ti a. Tin, ka Pathianin mi duhsak avangin lal hnena ka dil ang zelin mi pe a." 
Nehemiah2:9 Chutichuan lui rala roreltute hnen chu ka han thleng a, lal lehkhate chu ka han pe a. Tin, lal chuan ka hnenah sipai hotute leh sipai sakawr chung chuang mite a kaltir ve a ni." 
Nehemiah2:10 Tin, Horon mi Sanbalata leh Amon mi, chhiahhlawh Tobia ten an lo hriat chuan, Israraela thlahte thawvenna ngaihtuah turin mi an lo kal zu nia tiin an lo lungni lo hle mai a." 
Nehemiah2:11 Chutichuan Jerusalem ka han thleng a, ni thum ka han awm phawt a." 
Nehemiah2:12 Tin, zanah chuan ka tho a, kei leh mi dang tlem te te nen; Jerusalem tana ka tih tur ka Pathianin ka rilrua a dah chu tumah ka hrilh lo a, ka chuanna sa ngawt lo chu sa dang kan keng lo a." 
Nehemiah2:13 Tin, zanah chuan ruam kawngkaah ka chhuak a, dragon tuichhunchhuah lam leh bawlhhlawh kawngka lamah ka kal a, Jerusalem kulh chim leh a kawngkhar kangte chu ka en vel a." 
Nehemiah2:14 Tin, tuichhunchhuah kawngka leh lal dil thlengin ka kal zel a: nimahsela ka chuanna sa kal tlang theihna reng reng a awm lo a." 
Nehemiah2:15 Chutichuan zanah lui ka zawh chho a, kulh chu ka en a; tin, ka let leh a, ruam kawngkaah chuan ka lut a, chutiang chuan ka haw leh ta a." 
Nehemiah2:16 roreltute chuan khawiah nge ka kal a, eng nge ka tih pawh an hre lo: tin, Judate, puithiam te, mi thate, roreltute leh mi dang hnathawktu tur reng reng pawh ka lahrilh rih lo bawk a." 
Nehemiah2:17 Chutichuan an hnenah, ""kan chan a chhiatzia hi in hmu a, Jerusalem a ram tih te, a kawngkhar te a kang tihte pawh in hria a: hawh u, sawichhiat kan nih tawh loh nan Jerusalem kulh chu i din leh ang u,"" ka ti a." 
Nehemiah2:18 Tin, ka Pathian mi duhsak thute ka hrilh a, ka hnena lal thu sawite pawh. Tin, anni chuan, ""I tho ang u khai; i din teh tak ang u,"" an ti a. Chutichuan chu hna tha thawk tur chuan an kut an tichak a." 
Nehemiah2:19 Amaherawhchu Horon mi Sanbalata leh Amon mi, chhiahhlawh Tobia leh Arab mi Geseman an hriat chuan, mi nuihzatbur a, min hmusit a, ""In thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni? Lal chungah in hel elo ni?"" te min ti a.Chutichuan an ni chu ka chhang a, an hnenah, ""Van Pathian chuan mi tihmuingil ang a; chutichuan keini a chhiahhlawhte chu kan tho ang a, kan din ang a: nangni erawh chuan Jerusalem-ah hian chanvo emaw, thuneihna emaw, hnuhma emaw in nei lo reng reng,"" ka ti a." 
Nehemiah2:20 Chutichuan an ni chu ka chhang a, an hnenah, ""Van Pathian chuan mi tihmuingil ang a; chutichuan keini a chhiahhlawhte chu kan tho ang a, kan din ang a: nangni erawh chuan Jerusalem-ah hian chanvo emaw, thuneihna emaw, hnuhma emaw in nei lo reng reng,"" ka ti a." 
Nehemiah3:1 Chutichuan puithiam lal Eliasiba chu a unau puithiamte nen chuan an tho a, beram Kawngka chu an siam a; an tithianghlim a, a kawngkharte an siam a; Hamea in sang thlengin an tithianghlim a, Hananela in sang thleng chuan." 
Nehemiah3:2 Tin, a dawt chu Jeriko miten an siam a. Tin, anmahni dawt chu Imria fapa Zakuran a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:3 Tin, sangha Kanwgka chu Hasena fapaten an siam a; a relte an dah a, a kawngkharte an rel a; a kalhnate leh a bahnate an rem a." 
Nehemiah3:4 Tin, anni dawt chu Hakoza fa Uria fapa Meremothan a siam tha a. Tin, anni dawt chu Mesezabela fa Berekia fapa Mesulaman a siam tha a. Tin, anni dawt chu Bana fapa Zadokan a siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:5 Tin, anni dawt Teko-hoin an siam tha a; nimahsela an mi liante chuan an hotu hnaah chuan an ring an rawlh ve duh lo." 
Nehemiah3:6 Tin, Kawngka Hlui chu Pasea fapa Joiada leh Besodeia fapa Mesulaman an siam tha a, a relte an dah a, a kawngkharte an rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate an rem a." 
Nehemiah3:7 Tin, anni dawt chu Gibeon mi Melatia leh Meronot mi, Jadonan, lui ral ram awptu thu hnuaia awm Gibeon mi leh Mizpa mite nen an siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:8 A dawt chu rangkachak chhertu zinga mi Harhaia fapa Uzielan a siam tha a. Tin, a dawt lehah chuan rimtui siamtu zinga mi Hananian a siam tha a, Kulh Chhah thlengin Jerusalem chu an siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:9 Tin, anni dawt chu Jerusalem bial chanve hotu Hura fapa Rephaian a siam tha a" 
Nehemiah3:10 Tin, anni dawt chu Harumapha fapa Jedaian a in zawn a siam tha a. Tin, a dawt chu Hasabneia fapa Hatusan a siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:11 Harima fapa Malkija leh Pahat-moaba fapa Hasuba-te chuan hmun dang leh Meipui Chhehna In sang an siam tha a. 
Nehemiah3:12 Tin, a dawt chu Jerusalem bial chanve hotu Halohesa fapa Saluman a fanute nen an siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:13 Ruam Kawngka chu Hanuna leh Znoa-hoten an siam tha a; an siam a, a kawngkharte an rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate an rem a, tin, Bawlhhlawh Kawngka thlengin kulh tawng sangkhat an siam bawk a." 
Nehemiah3:14 Bawlhhlawh Kawngka erawh chu Bet-hakerem bial hotu Rakeba fapa Malkijan a siam tha a; a siam a, kawngkharte a rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate a rem a." 
Nehemiah3:15 Tin, Mizpa bial hotu Kolhozea fapa Salunan Tuikhur Kawngka chu a siam tha a; a siam a, a khuh a, a kawngkharte a rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate a rem a; tin, lal huan kianga Sela dil hunga chu Davida khua atanga chhuk thla kailawn thlengin a siam tha bawk a." 
Nehemiah3:16 Tin, a dawt chu Azbuka, Betzur bial chanve hotu fapa Nehemia chuan Davida thlan zawn leh dil khuaah leh mi huaisente in thlengin a siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:17 A dawt chu Levi-hoin an siam tha a, Bania fapa, Rehuma-te hoin. A dawt chu keila bial chanve hotu Hasabia chuan ama bial hmingin a siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:18 A dawt chu an unauten an siam tha a, keila bial chanve hotu Henada fapa Bavaia-te hoin," 
Nehemiah3:19 Tin, a dawt chu Mizpa hotu Josua fapa Ezra chuan hmun dang, kulh kawi tannaa ralthuam dahna pan chhohan zawn a siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:19 Tin, a dawt chu Mizpa hotu Josua fapa Ezra chuan hmun dang, kulh kawi tannaa ralthuam dahna pan chhohan zawn a siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:20 A dawt chu Zebaia fapa Baruka chuan thahnem ngai takin hmun dang, kulh kawi tanna atanga puithiam lal Eliasiba in kawngkhar thlengin a siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:21 A dawt chu Hokoza fa, Uria fapa Meremothan hmun dang, Eliasiba in kawngkhar atanga Eliasiba in tawp thlengin a siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:22 Tin, a dawt chu a chheh vela puithiamhoin an siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:23 Anni dawt chu Benhamina leh Hasuban an inzanw chu an siam tha a. An dawt chu Anania fa Maseia fapa Azarian a in kiang a siam tha a. 
Nehemiah3:24 A dawt chu Henadada fapa Binuian hmun dang, Azaria in atanga kulh kawi tanna, a kil thlengin a siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:25 Uzaia fapa Palala chuan kulh kawi tanna zawn leh tan in kianga lal in chungnung zawk atanga lawr in sang zawn a siam tha a. A dawt chu Parosa fapa Pedaian a siam tha a. 
Nehemiah3:26 (Nethinho chu chhak lampanga Tui kawngkhar zawn thleng leh in sang lawr thlengi Ophel-ah an awm a.) 
Nehemiah3:27 A dawt chu Teko-hoin hmun dang, in sang lianpui lawr zawn leh Ophel kulh thlengin an siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:28 Sakawr Kawngka chung lam chu puithiamhoten mahni in zawn theuh an siam tha a. 
Nehemiah3:29 Anni dawt chu Imera fapa Zadokan a in zawn a siam tha a. Tin, a dawt chu chhak lam kawngkhar vengtu Sekania fapa Semaian a siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:30 A dawt chu Selemia fapa Hanania leh Zalapha fapa parukna Hanuna te chuan hmun dang an siam tha a. A dawt chu Berekia fapa Mesulaman a awmna zawn a siam tha a. 
Nehemiah3:31 A dawt chu rangkachak chhertu zinga mi Malkija chuan Hamipkad kawngkhar zawn Nethin-ho in leh sumdawngho in thleng leh a kil pan chhohna thlengin a siam tha a.Tin, a kil pan chhohna leh a beram Kawngka inkar chu rangkachak chhertuleh sumdawnghoten an siam tha a." 
Nehemiah3:32 Tin, a kil pan chhohna leh a beram Kawngka inkar chu rangkachak chhertuleh sumdawnghoten an siam tha a." 
Nehemiah4:1 Nimahsela heti hi a ni a, Sanbalatan kulh kan siam tih a han hriat chuan, a thinur a, nasa takin a thin a tirim a, Judate a cheksawlh ta a." 
Nehemiah4:2 Tichuan, a unaute leh Samari sipaite hmaah chuan thu a sawi a, Heng Juda mi chhiathahote hian eng nge maw an tih le? Khawpui sak that an tum em ni vei le? An inthawi tehlul ang maw? Ni khat thil thu-ah an puitlin tehlul ang maw? Bawlhhlawh awm khawm mai mai ata lung kang chhe tawh si an din thar leh ang maw?"" a ti a." 
Nehemiah4:3 Tin, a kianga Amon mi Tobia chuan, ""Han din teh reng se; sihal pawh han lawn sela an lung kulh chu a tichim mai ang chu,"" a ti a." 
Nehemiah4:4 Aw kan Pathian ngai teh, hmusitin kan awm hi: an mi sawichhiatna chu anmahni lu chungah lentir la, anni pawh khawii ramah emaw mualpho takin tantir reng ang che;" 
Nehemiah4:5 an bawhchhiatna chu khuh suh la, an sualnate chu i hma ata thaiboin awmtir suh ang che; kulh siamtute hmaah an tihthinur che hi." 
Nehemiah4:6 Chutichuan kulh chu kan siam a; a san lam chanvein kulh zawng zawng chu kan zawm chhuak vek a; mipuite chuan thawh chakna rilru an pu hle mai a ni. 
Nehemiah4:7 Amaherawhchu heti hi a ni a, Sanbalata te, Tobia te, Arab mi te, Amon mite leh Asdod miten Jerusalem kulh chu siam that a ni zel tih leh a chhe laite kan thawm tan tih an hriat chuan, an thinur ta hle mai a;" 
Nehemiah4:8 tichuan Jerusalem chu rawn beia buaina rawn siam an phiar tlang ta a. 
Nehemiah4:9 Nimahsela anmahni avangin kan Pathian hnenah kan tawngtai a, chhun leh zan an laka vengtu kan dah reng a." 
Nehemiah4:10 Tin, Juda chuan, ""Thawktute tha a chau zo tawh a, bawlhhlawh lah a nasa si a; kulh chu kan siam thei dawn ta lo a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Nehemiah4:11 Tin, kan hmelmate lah chuan, ""An zinga kan han kal a, kan han thah a, hna chu kan han tihtawpsak hma chuan an hre lo ang a, min hmu hek lo ang,""an lo ti bawk si a." 
Nehemiah4:12 Nimahsela,Juda mi an kianga chengte chuan kan hnenna lo kalin kan hmelmate min phiarna chu min hrilh fo bawk a." 
Nehemiah4:13 Chuvang chuan kulh phen, a hniam lai ber, hmun thawthawl takahte mipuite chu a chung chhungin an khan daih te, an fei te, an thla ngulte kengin tanhmun ka khuartir a." 
Nehemiah4:14 Tin, ka han en vel a, ka tho a, mi thate leh roreltute leh mipi dangte hnenah chuan, ""Anmahniho chu hlau hauh suh u la, LALPA ropui tak leh hlauhawm tak mai chu hre rengin in unaute, in fapa te, in fanu te, in nupui te, in inte hum turin bei rawh u,"" ka ti a." 
Nehemiah4:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kan hmelmaten kan lo hria tih leh an thiltih tum chu Pathianin engmah loah a siam tih an hratin kulh lamah mahni hnathawhna theuhvah kan kal leh ta vek a." 
Nehemiah4:16 Tin he ti hi a ni a,chuta chin chu ka tlangvalho zatvete chuan hna an thawk a,tin a zatvete chuan feite, phawte, thal ngulte,awmphawte chu an kawl a; tin roreltu chuan Juda chhungte, kulh siamtu zawng zawngte chu an tan tlat a." 
Nehemiah4:17 Kulh siamna tur hmanraw phurtute pawhin an kut khing khatin hna an thawk a, khing khatin hriamhrei an keng a;" 
Nehemiah4:18 a siamtute chuan an khandaih an pai theuh a, chutiang chung chuan an siam a ni. Tin, tawtawrawt hamtu chu ka kiangah a awm a." 
Nehemiah4:19 Tin, mi thate leh roreltute leh mipuite hmaah chuan, ""Hna chu a nasain a zau em mai a, kulhah hian kan darhsarhin kan inhlat hle mai si a;" 
Nehemiah4:20 tawtawrawt ri in hriatna lam apiangah chuan chuta chuan kan hnenah lo tlan khawm ula; kan Pathianin min dosak ang,"" ka ti a." 
Nehemiah4:21 Chutiang chuan hna chu kan thawk a; tin, a zatve chuan khawfing chah atangin arsi lan thlengin feite chu an kawl reng a." 
Nehemiah4:22 Chutiang bawkin chu mi lai vek chuan mipuite hnenah, ""Zana min venga chhunlawna hnahawk atan tupawh an chhiahhlawhte nen Jerusalem chhungah riak vek rawh se,"" ka ti a ni.Chutichuan kei pawh, ka unaute pawh, ka tlangvalte pawh, vengtu mi zui thinte pawh, tumah reng rengin kan silhfen kan hlip lo a, hriamhrei inbel chung theuhin tui lamah chuan kan kal ta thin a." 
Nehemiah4:23 Chutichuan kei pawh, ka unaute pawh, ka tlangvalte pawh, vengtu mi zui thinte pawh, tumah reng rengin kan silhfen kan hlip lo a, hriamhrei inbel chung theuhin tui lamah chuan kan kal ta thin a." 
Nehemiah5:1 Chutichuan mipuite leh an nupuite chu an unau Judate chunga phunnawiin an au ta mur mur mai a. 
Nehemiah5:2 Keiniho hi kan fapate leh kan fanute nen kan thahnem hle a, ei tur lamah hian kan hautak hle si a,"" an ti a." 
Nehemiah5:3 Thenkhatin, ""Kan tam si a, ei tur kan nei lo. Kan lote kan dahkham si a,"" an ti a." 
Nehemiah5:4 Lal hnena chhiah chawi atan sum kan puk a, chu mi atan chuan kan lote leh kan grep huante kan dahkham a." 
Nehemiah5:5 Kan tisa chu kan unaute tisa ang bawk a ni a. Kan fate pawh an fate ang bawk an ni si a: nimahsela hei, kan fanute leh kan fapate hi chhiahhlawh atana bawihah kan luhtir takngial dawn hi; kan fanu thenkhatte phei chu bawiah an lut tawh nghe nghe a: chhan ngaihna hre hek lo i, miin kan lote leh kan grep huante lah chu an nei ta si a,"" tite an awm nual bawk a." 
Nehemiah5:6 Chung thute leh an au thawm chu ka hriatin ka thinur hle mai a. 
Nehemiah5:7 Chutichuan ka rilruin ka ngaihtuah a, mi thate leh roreltute chu ka khak a, an hnenah, ""Mi tinin in unaute a pung umin sum in puktir reng mai a,"" ka ti a. Tin, an chungchang ngaihtuah turin mi ka khawm chiam a." 
Nehemiah5:8 Tin, an hnenah, ""Hnam dangte hnena hralh kan unau Juda-hote chu kan theih ang angin kan tlan a: nangnin in unaute chu zawrh in tum a ni maw? Keini hnenah kher hian hralh an ni dawn em ni?"" ka ti a. Chutichuan an ngawi reng mai a, chhanna engmah an hre lo a." 
Nehemiah5:9 In thiltih hi a tha tawp lo mai a ni: kan hmelma, hnam dangte mi sawichhiatna avangte hian kan Pathian tih a in awm a tul a ni lo'm ni?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Kei leh ka unaute leh ka tlangvalte pawhin chutianga a pung um chuan kan sum leh buh kan puktir ve bawk a sin. A pung uma puktir hi i ban teh daih ang u khai. 
Nehemiah5:11 Vawiinah ngei hian an lo te, an grep huan te, an oliv huan te, an inte leh an sum leh an buh leh an uain leh hriak hmun zaa hmun khat in lak thin pawh chu pe leh vek rawh u khai,"" ka ti bawk a." 
Nehemiah5:12 Chutichuan anni chuan, ""kan pe leh vek ang, an lakah engmah kan phut lo ang; it ih ang tak chuan kan ti ang,"" an ti a. Chutichuan puithiamte ka ko a, an hmaah chuan mi thutiam ang taka ti ngei tur chuan chhia ka chhamtir a." 
Nehemiah5:13 Ka puan ven chu ka thing a, ""He mi thutiam anga ti lo apiang hi Pathianin an in atang leh a hnathawh atangin hetiang hian thing thla rawh se; hetiang thinthlakin awm se la, tiruahin awm rawh se,"" ka ti a. Tin, pungkhawmho zawng zawng chuan, ""Amen,"" an ti a, lalpa an fak a. Tin mipuite chuan chu mi thutiam ang chuan an ti ta a." 
Nehemiah5:14 Chu lo pawh chu Judai rama an mahni awptu atana ruat ka nih achin, lal Artazerzia kum sawmhnih a lal kum atanga kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a lal kum thleng, kum sawm leh pahnih chhung chuan kei leh ka unaute hian ram awptu buh chhiah kan la lo a." 
Nehemiah5:15 Nimahsela tun hmaa ram awptu, mite lakah an lo hautak hle mai a, tangka sekel sawmli tiam loin an chhangte leh uainte an laksak thin a; chu mi ahnu hmanah an chhiahhlawhte chu mite chungah an intilal hle mai a: nimahsela kei zawngin Pathian tihna avangin chutiang chuan ka ti ve lo." 
Nehemiah5:16 A ni, he mi kulh hnathawk hian ka awm reng a, ram reng reng lei pawh ka lei lo va: ka tlangvalho zawng zawng pawh hna chu thawkin chutah chuan an awm khawm reng bawk a ni." 
Nehemiah5:17 Chu chang pawh ni loin kan vela hnam dangte zing atanga lo kal tiam loin Juda-te leh roreltute zinga ka dawhkan kil mi za leh sawmnga an awm reng a ni. 
Nehemiah5:18 Tin, ni khat atana an buatsaih chu sebawngpa pakhat leh beram paruk a tha thiau a ni a; tin, arte pawh ka tan an buatsaih a, ni sawm dan zelah uain chi hrang hrang tam zet nen: chutiang chuan buatsaih mah se la, he mite tuar hi a rip em avangin ram awptu pual chhang chu ka phut lo reng reng a ni.Aw ka Pathian, he mite tana ka thiltih zawng zawng hi ka thatna turin hre reng ang che." 
Nehemiah5:19 Aw ka Pathian, he mite tana ka thiltih zawng zawng hi ka thatna turin hre reng ang che." 
Nehemiah6:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Sanbalata leh Tobia leh Arab mi Gesema leh kan hmelma dang reng rengten kulhte ka siam a, a pawp lai reng reng a awm ta lo tih an han hriat chuan (amaherawhchu chu mi lai chuan kawngkaah kawngkhare ka la rel lo a.)" 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanbalata leh Gesema chuan, ""Lo kal la, Ono phaia khaw pakhatah i intawk khawm teh ang u,"" tiin thu min rawn thawn a, Nimahsela ka chunga thil tha lo tih an tum a lo ni reng a." 
Nehemiah6:3 Tin, keiin an hnenah, ""Hna ropui tak ka thawk a, ka lo chhuk thei lo: engah nge in hnena ka rawn chhuksan hlanin hna chu a chawlh ang,"" tiin mi ka tir a." 
Nehemiah6:4 Tin, chutiang hlir chuan vawi li thu min rawn thawn a; chutiang hlir chuan ka chhang bawk a." 
Nehemiah6:5 Chutichuan Sanbalata chuan chutiang bawkin a vawi nganaah chuan a chhiahhlawh lehkha char loh kengin ka hnenah a rawn tir a; 
Nehemiah6:6 chumiah chuan, ""Nang leh Juda-ho chuan hel in rilruk a, chuvang chuan kulh chu i siam ani tih thu hnam dangte zingah athang a, Gasmuan a sawi bawk a; tin, an sawi danhmangah chuan nang hi an lal nih i tum a." 
Nehemiah6:7 Tin, ""Judai ramah chuan lal a awm,' tia i chanchin Jerusalem-a puang vel turin zawlnei pawh i ruat tawh hial bawk a; he'ng thu hi lal hnenah an sawi thuai ngei ang a. Chuvangin lo kal la, i lo inrawn ang hmaing,"" tih a chuang a." 
Nehemiah6:8 Chutichuan a hnenah, ""I sawi ang reng reng hian engmah tih a awm lo, i phuahchawp mai a ni,"" tiin a hnenah mi ka tir a." 
Nehemiah6:9 An hnathawh chu an puitlin theih lohna'n an kutte chu tihchak lohin a awm ang,"" tia mi sawi thaih duh vek an ni a. Chutichuan aw Pathian, ka kutte hi min tihchaksak teh ang che." 
Nehemiah6:10 Chu mi zawhah chuan Mehetabela fa Delaia fapa Semaia, chhuak vak thei loa inah chuan ka kal a; tin, ani chuan, ""Pathian inah, biak in chhung ngeiah inhmu ang khai, biak in kawngte i khar tlat ang: nangmah that turin an lo kal dawn a ni; zanah rawn thah che an tum a ni,"" a lo ti a." 
Nehemiah6:11 Tin, kei chuan, ""Keini ang hi han tlanchhe tur em kan nih? Mahni nun humhim tur pawhin biak inah tu nge lut duh ang? Ka lut tawp lo ang,"" ka ti a." 
Nehemiah6:12 Tin, ka han hre chhuak a, Pathian tirh a lo ni hauh lo mai a, keimah mi dodalin chung thu chu a lo sawi a ni zawk a, Tobia leh Sanbalatan an rawih a lo ni reng a." 
Nehemiah6:13 Ka hlau a, chutianga ka tih a, thil ka tihsual a, mi tihhmingchhiatna tur an neih theih a min sawichhiatna'n a ni, an rawih ni." 
Nehemiah6:14 Aw ka Pathian, Tobia leh Sanbalata hi an thiltih ang zel hian hre reng ang che, zawlneinu Goadii leh zawlnei dang mi tihhlauh tum zawng zawngte nen hian." 
Nehemiah6:15 Chutichuan kulh chu ni samwnga leh ni hnihah, Elul thla, ni sawmhnih leh ni nga niin peih a ni ta a." 
Nehemiah6:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kan hmelma zawng zawngten chu chu an lo hriat chuan kan vela hnam dangte chuan an hlau ta a, chan chhe ta hlein an inhria a, hna chu kan Pathian thawh a ni tih an hre ta si a." 
Nehemiah6:17 Chu lo rengah pawh, chung lai chuan Juda mi thate chuan Tobia chu lehkha tam tak an thawn thin a, tin, Tobia lehkha pawh an hmu bawk thin a." 
Nehemiah6:18 Ani chu Ara fapa Sekania makpa a nih avangin Judai rama mi tam tak chhehchhama amah thurualpui an awm a; tin, a fapa Jehohanana chuan Berekia fapa Mesulama fanu chu nupuiah anei a ni a.Ka hriatah a thiltih thatte an sawi thin a, ka thu sawite a hnenah an thlen bawk thin. Tichuan Tobia chuan min tihthaih turin lehkhate a rawn thawn thin a ni." 
Nehemiah6:19 Ka hriatah a thiltih thatte an sawi thin a, ka thu sawite a hnenah an thlen bawk thin. Tichuan Tobia chuan min tihthaih turin lehkhate a rawn thawn thin a ni." 
Nehemiah7:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kulhte kan siam a kawngkharte ka rel a, kawngkhar vengtute, hla satute, Levi-hote ruat an nih zawh chuan," 
Nehemiah7:2 ka unau Hanania leh kulhbing hotu Hanania chu Jerusalem ka awptir a: mi rinawm tak, mi ahluana Pathian tih mi a ni si a." 
Nehemiah7:3 Jerusalem kulh kawngkharte hi ni a tlangsan fe hma chu hawng suh u, tlaiah, vengtute an tin, hmain, khar se la, kalh vek rawh se. Tin, Jerusalema awmte zinga mi, vengtute ruat u la, an mawna tur ruatah awm se la, athen erawh chuan mahni in bul vel an veng theuh tur a ni." 
Nehemiah7:4 Khua chu a zauin a lian hle a; nimahsela a mi awmte an tlem hle mai a, inte pawh la sak loh a ni si a." 
Nehemiah7:5 Tin, ka Pathianin ka rilruah, mi thate, rorletute, mipuite ko khawm vek a, an thlahtute ang zela chhiar turin mi hriattir a. Tin, atir taka kal chhote thlahtute hming ziakna bu chu ka hmu chhuak a, chutah chuan hetianga ziak ka hmu a:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Sala hruai, Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran a hruaite zinga, sala tang chhuak a, Jerusalem leh Judai rama mahni khua theuha haw leh a, chu mi rama awm tate chu hengte hi an ni:" 
Nehemiah7:7 Zerubabela te, Jesua te, Nehemia te, Azaria te, Ramia te, Nahamania te, Mordekaia te, Bilsana te, Misperetha te, Bigvaia te, Nehuma te, Bana te rual hian an kal a ni. Israel-ho zinga a mi vangtlang tam lam chu:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Parosa thlahte 2,172;" 
Nehemiah7:9 Sephatia thlahte 372; 
Nehemiah7:10 Ara thlahte 652," 
Nehemiah7:11 Jesua leh Joaba thlahte zinga Pahat-Moaba thlahte 2,818;" 
Nehemiah7:12 Elama thlahte 1,254;" 
Nehemiah7:13 Zatua thlahte 845; 
Nehemiah7:14 Zakaia thlahte 760; 
Nehemiah7:15 Binuia thlahte 648; 
Nehemiah7:16 Bebaia thlahte 628; 
Nehemiah7:17 Azgada thlahte 2,322." 
Nehemiah7:18 Adonikama thlahte 667; 
Nehemiah7:19 Bigvaia thlahte 2,067;" 
Nehemiah7:20 Adina thlahte 655; 
Nehemiah7:21 Hezekia thlaha mi Atera thlahte 98; 
Nehemiah7:22 Hasuma thlahte 328; 
Nehemiah7:23 Bezaia thlahte 324; 
Nehemiah7:24 Haripha thlahte 112; 
Nehemiah7:25 Gibeona thlahte 95; 
Nehemiah7:26 Bethlethem leh Netopha khua ami 188; 
Nehemiah7:27 Anathot khuaa mi 128; 
Nehemiah7:28 Bet-azmavet khuaa mi 42; 
Nehemiah7:29 Kiriat-jearim te, Kephira te leh Berot khuaa mite 743;" 
Nehemiah7:30 Rama leh Geba khuaa mi 621; 
Nehemiah7:31 Mikmas khua ami 122; 
Nehemiah7:32 Beth-el leh Ai khuaa mi 123; 
Nehemiah7:33 Nebo danga mi 52; 
Nehemiah7:34 Elam danga thlahte 1,254;" 
Nehemiah7:35 Harima thlahte 320; 
Nehemiah7:36 Jerikova thlahte 345; 
Nehemiah7:37 Loda te leh Hadida te leh Onova thlahte 721; 
Nehemiah7:38 Sena thlahte 3,930." 
Nehemiah7:39 Puithiamte: - Jesua chhungte zinga mi Jedaia thlahte 973; 
Nehemiah7:40 Imera thlahte 1,502;" 
Nehemiah7:41 Pasura thlahte 1,247;" 
Nehemiah7:42 Hariam thlahte 1,017." 
Nehemiah7:43 Levi-hote: - Hodeva thlaha mi Jesua leh Kadmiela thlahte 74. 
Nehemiah7:44 Hla satute: - Asapha thlahte 148. 
Nehemiah7:45 kawngkhar vengtute: - Saluma thlahte, Atera thlahte, Talmona thlahte, Akuba thlahte, Hatita thlahte, Sobaia thlahte 138." 
Nehemiah7:46 Nethin-ho: - Ziha thlahte, Hasupha thlahte, Tabaotha thlahte;" 
Nehemiah7:47 Kerosa thlahte, Sia thlah te, Padona thlah te;" 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana thlah te, Hagaba thlah te, Salmaia thlah te;" 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanana thlah te, Gidela thlah te, Gahara thlahte;" 
Nehemiah7:50 Reaia thlah te, Rezina thlah te, Nekoda thlahte;" 
Nehemiah7:51 Gazama thlah te, Uza thlah te, Pasea thlah te;" 
Nehemiah7:52 Besaia thlah te, Meunima thlah te, Nephusesima thlahte;" 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakbuka thlahte, Hakupha thlahte, Harhura thlahte;" 
Nehemiah7:54 bazlitha thlahte, Mehida thlahte, Harsa thlahte;" 
Nehemiah7:55 barkosa thlahte, Sisera thlah te, Tema thlah te," 
Nehemiah7:56 Nezia thlah te, Hatipha thlahte." 
Nehemiah7:57 Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlah: Sotaia thlahte, Sopheretha thlahte, Perida thlah te;" 
Nehemiah7:58 Jala thlahte, Darkona thlah te, Gidela thlah te;" 
Nehemiah7:59 Sephatia thlah te, Hatila thlahte, Pokeret-Hazebaima thlah te, Amona thlah te." 
Nehemiah7:60 Nethin mi zawng zawng leh Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlah chu 392 an ni. 
Nehemiah7:61 Tin, Telmela te, Telharsa te, Kerub te, Adon te, Imer atangtea lo chhote chu hengho hi an ni a; nimahsela an pi leh pute chhungte leh an thlah zelte Israel mi an nih leh nih loh an chhui thei lo a;" 
Nehemiah7:62 Delaia thlah te, Tobia thlah te, Nekoba thlahte 642" 
Nehemiah7:63 Tin, puithiamte zinga mi; Hobaia thlahte, Hakoza thlah te, Gilead mi barzilaia fanu zinga mi nupuia nei a, an hming pu ta nghal Barzilaia thlahte chu:" 
Nehemiah7:64 chungho chuan an thlahtute ang zela chhiarte zingah chuan anhming ziakna an zawng a, nimahsela an hmu lo a; chuvangin bawlhhlawha ngaihin an awm a, an puithiam nihna chu an ban a." 
Nehemiah7:65 Tin, ram awptu chuan anni chu Urim leh Thumim inbela puithiam a inbela puithiam a din hma loh chuan thil serhte chu an ei tur ani lo tih a hrilh a." 
Nehemiah7:66 Mipui pung kahwm zawng zawng chu 42,360 an ni a," 
Nehemiah7:67 an chhiahhlawh hmeichhia leh mipa 7,337 tiam loin: tin, hla satu hmeichhia leh mipa 245 an ni a." 
Nehemiah7:68 An sakawr chu 736 a ni a; an sabengtung lian chi chu 245 ani a; 
Nehemiah7:69 an sanghawngsei chu 435 ani a, an sabengtung chu 6,720 a ni." 
Nehemiah7:70 Tin, chhungkaw puipa thenkhatten chu mi hna atan chuan thil an thawh a. Ram awptu chuan thawhlawmah rangkachak darik sangkhat, maihun sawmnga, puithiam silhfen zanga leh sawmthum a thawh a." 
Nehemiah7:71 Tin, chhungkaw puipa thenkhahtten in sakna thawhlawmah rangkachak darik singhnih leh tangkarua buk sanghnih leh zahnih an thawh a." 
Nehemiah7:72 Tin, midang zawng zawng pek chu rangkachak darik singhnih leh tangkarua buk sanghnih leh puithiam silhfen sawmruk leh pasarih a ni.Tichuan puithiamte, Levi-hote, kawngkhar vengtute, hla satute leh mi thenkhatte leh Nethin-ho leh Israel mi zawngte chu mahni khua khuaah an awm ta a. Chutichuan thla sarihna a lo thlen chuan Israela thlahte chu an khuaahte chuan an awm a." 
Nehemiah7:73 Tichuan puithiamte, Levi-hote, kawngkhar vengtute, hla satute leh mi thenkhatte leh Nethin-ho leh Israel mi zawngte chu mahni khua khuaah an awm ta a. Chutichuan thla sarihna a lo thlen chuan Israela thlahte chu an khuaahte chuan an awm a." 
Nehemiah8:1 Tin, mi zawng zawng chu thu khat vuain Tui kawngkhar hma zawn hmun zau laiah chuan an kal khawm a; tin, lehkha ziaktu Ezra chu LALPA-in Israel-hote zawm tura thu a pek, Mosia dan bu chu rawn keng turin an hrilh a." 
Nehemiah8:1 Tin, mi zawng zawng chu thu khat vuain Tui kawngkhar hma zawn hmun zau laiah chuan an kal khawm a; tin, lehkha ziaktu Ezra chu LALPA-in Israel-hote zawm tura thu a pek, Mosia dan bu chu rawn keng turin an hrilh a." 
Nehemiah8:2 Chutichuan thla sarihna ni khat niin puithiam Ezra chuan pungkhawmho, nutling patling leh a hre thiam thei chin zawng zawng hmaah chuan dan chu a rawn keng a." 
Nehemiah8:2 Chutichuan thla sarihna ni khat niin puithiam Ezra chuan pungkhawmho, nutling patling leh a hre thiam thei chin zawng zawng hmaah chuan dan chu a rawn keng a." 
Nehemiah8:3 Tin, chuta mi chu Tui kawngkhar hma zawn hmun zai laiah chuan nutling patling leh a hre thiam thei chinte hmaah chuan zing tak atangin chhun thlengin a chhiar a, tin, mi zawng zawng chuan dan bu thu-ah chuan an beng an chhi thup mai a." 
Nehemiah8:4 Tin, chutiang atana an siam reng thing dawhkhan sanah chuan lehkha ziaktu Ezra chu a ding a; tin, a sir ding lamah chuan Matithia te, Sema te, Anania te, Uria te, Hilkia te, Maseia te an ding a; tin, a vie lamah chuan Pedaia te, Misaela te, Malkija te, Hasuma te, Hasbadana te, Zakaria te, Mesulama te." 
Nehemiah8:4 Tin, chutiang atana an siam reng thing dawhkhan sanah chuan lehkha ziaktu Ezra chu a ding a; tin, a sir ding lamah chuan Matithia te, Sema te, Anania te, Uria te, Hilkia te, Maseia te an ding a; tin, a vie lamah chuan Pedaia te, Misaela te, Malkija te, Hasuma te, Hasbadana te, Zakaria te, Mesulama te." 
Nehemiah8:5 Tin, Ezra chuan mi zawng zawng mithmuhah chuan lehkhabu zial chu a han phelh a; (mi zawng zawng aia sanga ding ani a) tin, a han phelh chuan mi zawng zawng chu an ding ta vek a;" 
Nehemiah8:5 Tin, Ezra chuan mi zawng zawng mithmuhah chuan lehkhabu zial chu a han phelh a; (mi zawng zawng aia sanga ding ani a) tin, a han phelh chuan mi zawng zawng chu an ding ta vek a;" 
Nehemiah8:6 tichuan Ezra chuan LALPA, Pathian ropui tak chu a fak a. Tin, mipui zang zang chuan an ban pharin, ""Amen, Amen,"" tiin an lo chhawn a; tin, an kun a, an hmaia lei siin LALPA chu chibai an buk a." 
Nehemiah8:6 tichuan Ezra chuan LALPA, Pathian ropui tak chu a fak a. Tin, mipui zang zang chuan an ban pharin, ""Amen, Amen,"" tiin an lo chhawn a; tin, an kun a, an hmaia lei siin LALPA chu chibai an buk a." 
Nehemiah8:7 Tin, Jesua te, Bania te, Serebia te, Jamina te, Akuba te, Sabethaia te, Hodija te, Maseia te, Kelita te, Azaria te, Jozabada te, Hanana te, Pelaia te, Levi-hote chuan mipuite chu dan an hrilhfiah a; mipuite chu an dinhmunah chuan an awm reng a." 
Nehemiah8:8 Tin, lehkhabu, Pathian dan bua mi chu fiah takin an chhiar a; a awmzia an hrilhfiah a, tichuan an chhiar chu an hriat chiantir zel a." 
Nehemiah8:9 Tin, ram awptu Nehemia leh puithiam leh lehkhaziaktu ni fawm Ezra leh mipuite zirtirtu Levi-hote chuan mipui zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Vawiin ni hi LALPA in Pathian tana ni thianghlim ani a; lungchhe suh u la, tap hek suh u,"" an ti a. Dan thu chu an hriatin mipui zawng zawng chu an tap an tap mai si a."
