Nehemiah8:9 Tin, ram awptu Nehemia leh puithiam leh lehkhaziaktu ni fawm Ezra leh mipuite zirtirtu Levi-hote chuan mipui zawng zawng hnenah chuan, ""Vawiin ni hi LALPA in Pathian tana ni thianghlim ani a; lungchhe suh u la, tap hek suh u,"" an ti a. Dan thu chu an hriatin mipui zawng zawng chu an tap an tap mai si a." 
Nehemiah8:10 Chutichuan ani chuan an hnenah, ""Kal u la, thil thau eiin thil thlum in u la, engmah buatsaih nei lote tan chanpual thawn ang che u, vawiin ni hi kan LALPA tana ni thianghlim a nih hi, lungngaiin awm suh u; LALPA chunga lawmna chu in chakna a ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Nehemiah8:11 Chutichuan Levi-hote chuan, ""Ngawi hle hle rawh u, vawiin hi ni thianghlim ani si a; lungngaih pawh lungngai duh suh u,"" tiin mipui zawng zawng chu an tingawi ta thuap mai a." 
Nehemiah8:12 Tichuan thu a hrilhfiah chu an hriat thiam avangin mipui zawng zawng chu ei tur te, in tur te, midang chanpual thawn tur te, hlim taka awm tur tein an tin ta vek a." 
Nehemiah8:13 Tin, a ni hnih ni chuan mipui zawng zawng zinga chhungkaw puipa te, puithiam te, Levi-hote chu dan thu zir tur bawk chuan lehkha ziaktu Ezra hnenah an kal khawma." 
Nehemiah8:13 Tin, a ni hnih ni chuan mipui zawng zawng zinga chhungkaw puipa te, puithiam te, Levi-hote chu dan thu zir tur bawk chuan lehkha ziaktu Ezra hnenah an kal khawma." 
Nehemiah8:14 Tin, LALPA'n Mosia hmanga zawm tura thu a pek danah chuan thla sarihna kut laia Israela thlahte chhawlbuka an awm tur thu ziak an hmu a," 
Nehemiah8:15 Tlangah kal u la, Oliv zar te, oliv suak zar te, lenhmui zar te, tum kau te, thing lian tak tak zar te chhawl buk sanna'n va la rawh u,"" tiin an khua zawng zawngah leh Jerusalem khuaa an tlangthantir tur leh puan vel tur a nih thute an chhiar a." 
Nehemiah8:16 Chutichuan mipuite chu an va kal a, an va la a, mi zawng zawngin an in chungah te, an kawtah te, Pathian in kawtah te, Tui kawngkhar hmun zau laiah te, Erphraim kawngkhar hmun zau laiah te chhawlbuk an insiam theuh a." 
Nehemiah8:17 Tin, sal chhuak pungkhawmho zawng zawngte chuan chhawlbuk an siam a. Chhawlbukahte chuan an awm a: Nuna fapa Jesua hun atanga chu mi ni thleng chuan Israela thlahte chuan chutiang tak chuan an ti ngai lo a. Tichuan lawmna nasa tak a lo awm ta a.Ni tin, a tantirh ni atanga a tawp thlengin Pathian dan bua mi a chhiar bawk a. Tin, ni riat ni chu kut tiak ni a ni a, thupek angin inkhawmna urhsun takin an titawp thin." 
Nehemiah8:18 Ni tin, a tantirh ni atanga a tawp thlengin Pathian dan bua mi a chhiar bawk a. Tin, ni riat ni chu kut tiak ni a ni a, thupek angin inkhawmna urhsun takin an titawp thin." 
Nehemiah9:1 Chutichuan chu mi thla ni sawmhnih leh ni li ni chuan Israela thlahte chu chaw nghei a, saiip puan sin a, lei kai luamin an kal khawm a." 
Nehemiah9:2 Tin, Israel hnam chu hnam dangte lakah an intihrang a, an ding a, an sualnate leh an pi leh pu bawhchhiatnate thupha an chawi a." 
Nehemiah9:3 Tin, mahni hmun hmunah an ding a, chu mi ni hmun lia thena hmun khat chhung chuan LALPA an Pathian dan bu an chhiar a; tin, hmun lea thena hmun khat dang chhung chuan thupha an chawi a, LALPA an Pathian an bia a." 
Nehemiah9:4 Chutichuan Levi-ho dawhkan sangah chuan jesua te, Bania te, Kadmiela te, Sebania te, Bunia te, Serebia te, Bania te, Kenania te chu an ding a, ring takin LALPA an Pathian an au a," 
Nehemiah9:5 Chutichuan Levi mi, Jesua leh Kadmiela te, Bania te, Hasabneia te, Serebia te, Hodia te, Sebania te, leh Pethahia te chuan, ""Ding u la, LALPA in Pathian chu chatuan ata chatuant hlengin fak rawh u; tin, chawimawina leh fakna zawng zawngina a phak loh, i hming ropui chu fakin awm rawh se,"" an ti a." 
Nehemiah9:6 Israel mipuite chu hetiangin an tawngtai a, ""LALPA, Nangmah chauh hi LALPA i ni a, vante van leh a chhunga awm zawng zawngte nen, leilung leh a chhunga awm zawng zawngte nen tuifinriat leh a chhunga awm zawng zawngte nen i siam a, a azain i vawng tha thin a: tin vana awmhote chuan chibai an buk thin che a." 
Nehemiah9:7 Abrahama chu thlanga, Kaldai ram Ur khua ata hruai chhuak a, a hminga Abrahama saksaktu, LALPA Pathian i ni a;" 
Nehemiah9:8 tin, a thinlung chu i hmaah rinawmin i hria a, Kanan-hote, Hit-ho te, Amor-ho te, Periz-hote, Jebus-ho te, Girgas-hote ram chu pe turin a thlahte lam pe turin thu i thlung a; tin, i thu i hlen bawk a; fel tak i ni si a." 
Nehemiah9:9 Aigupta rama kan pi leh pute hreawmzia chu i hmu reng a, Tuifinriat Sen kama an au thawmte chu i hria a;" 
Nehemiah9:10 Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte leh a rama mi zawng zawngte chungah chhinchhiahnate leh thil makte i lantir a; chapo takin an chungah thil an ti tih i hre si a, tichuan tun thleng hian hming i insiam ta a." 
Nehemiah9:11 Tin, an hmaah tuifinriat chu i tithen a, tichuan lei charah tuifinriat chu an kal tlang a; tin, anmahni umtute chu tui thuk takah, tui thuk taka lung paih luh ang maiin i paih lut a." 
Nehemiah9:12 Tin, chhunah chhumdingin i hruai thin a, zanah pawh an kalna tur kawnga anmahni en turin meialh dingin i hruai thin a." 
Nehemiah9:13 Sinai tlangah chuan i lo chhuk bawk a, van atangin an hnenah thu i sawi a, rorelna dik tak te, dan dik tak te, thuriat leh thupek tha takte i pe a," 
Nehemiah9:14 tin, i chawlhni thianghlim chu anmahni i hriattir a, i chhaihhlawh Mosia hmangin thupek te, thu ruat te, dante i pe a;" 
Nehemiah9:15 tin, an riltam tihrenna'n van atangin chhang i pe a, an tuihal tihrehna'n lungpui ata tui i tihchhuahsak a, pek i tum ram chu luah turin i pe a." 
Nehemiah9:16 Nimahsela anni leh kan pi leh pute chuan chapo takin thil an ti a, an intiluhlul a, i thupekte chu an pawm lo a." 
Nehemiah9:17 an awih duh lo a, an zinga i thil mak tihte pawh chu an hre duh tawh hek lo; an intiluhlul a, an helin an bawih nihna lamah let leh turin hotu an ruat ta zawk a: nimahsela nang chu ngaidam tura inpeih reng Pathian, mi khawngaih thei, lainatna a khat, thin nel, ngilneihna ngah i ni a, anmahni i thlahthlam chuang lo a." 
Nehemiah9:18 A ni, bawng no lem an insiam a, 'Hei hi a ni, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che i Pathian chu,' an tiha, thinurthlak tak thil an tih laite pawh khan," 
Nehemiah9:19 i ngilneihna nasa tak chuan thlalerah khan i thlahthlam chuan lo va: kawnga anmahni hruai tura an chunga chhumding chuan chhunah a kalsan lo a, anmahni en tur leh ankalna tur kawng kawhhmuh tura meialh ding pawh chuan zanah a kalsan hek lo." 
Nehemiah9:20 Anmahni zirtir turin i thlarau tha tak chu i pe bawk a, i manna chuan i chawm a, an tuihal tihrehna'n tui i pe a." 
Nehemiah9:21 A ni, thlalerah khan kum sawmli i chawm a, engmah an tlachham lo a; an silhfente a hlui lo a, an kete chu a vung lo a." 
Nehemiah9:22 Tin, ram leh hnamte i pe a, chung chu an chanpual i sem theuh va: chutichuan Sihon-a ram, Hesbon lal ram leh Basan lal Oga ram chu an luah a." 
Nehemiah9:23 An thlahte chu vana arsi zatin i tipung bawk a, an luah tura an pi leh pute hnena i lo sawi tawh ramah chuan i hruai lut ta a." 
Nehemiah9:24 Chutichuan an thlahte chuan ram chu an luah ta a, tin, nangin chu mi rama awm Kanan mite chu an hmaah i titlawm a, an duh duha tih atan an lalte leh chu mi rama mite nen an kutah i pe a." 
Nehemiah9:25 Kulh nei khawpiute ram tha tak takte an la a, thil tha tinrenga khat inte an luah a, tuikhur hiah sa te, grep huan te, oliv huan te, thei kung tam takte an nei a: tichuan an ei a, an puar a, an lo thau a, i thatna nasa takah chuan nuam an chen a." 
Nehemiah9:26 Nimahsela an tihmawh a, i chungah an hel a, i dan chu an hnuchhawn daih a, i lam hawi lehtir tuma zilhtu i zawlneite chu an that a, thinurthlak tak tak thil an ti a." 
Nehemiah9:27 Chuvang chuan anmahni tihreawmtu an hmelmate kutah chuan i pe a: an mangan laia an auh che khan van atangin i lo ngaithla a; tin, i ngilneihna nasa tak chuan an hmelmate laka chhanchhuaktu tur chhandamtute i pe a." 
Nehemiah9:28 Nimahsela ralmuanga an han awm hnu chuan, i mithmuhah thil tha lo an ti leh mai a: chuvangin an hmelmate kutah i hluihlawn a, tichuan an chungah thu an nei a; mahse an lamleta an auh che khan, van atangin i lo ngaithla a, vawi tam tak i ngilneihna chuan i chhanchhuak a;" 
Nehemiah9:29 tin, i dana i hruai luh leh theihna'n i zilh thin a; nimahsela chapo takin thil an ti a, i thupekte an pawm lo a, i rorelna kalhin thil an tisual a; (miin an zawma an nunpui tur chu;_ tin, tukkhum chan an chhawn a, an intiluhlul a, an ngaithla duh lo a." 
Nehemiah9:30 Nimahsela kum tam tak anmahni i dawh a, i thlarauva i zawlneite hmangin i zilh thin a; nimahsela an beng an chhu ngawng a; chuvangin chung rama mite kutah chuan i pe ta a." 
Nehemiah9:31 Nimahsela i ngilneihna nasa tak chuan an tawp hlenna hlauh chu i thlensak lo a, i thlahthlam hek lo; Pathian, mi khawngaih thei tak, lainatnaa khat i ni si a." 
Nehemiah9:32 chuvangin kan Pathian, Pathian ropui, engkim ti thei leh hlauhawm, thuthlung hlena khawngaihna tilangtu chuan kan chung leh kan lal te, kan mi lian te, kan puithiam te, kan zawlnei te, kan pi leh pute leh i mite zawng zawng chunga Asuria lalte lal lai atanga tun thlenga hreawmna lo thleng zozaite hi thil te thamah ngai suh ang che." 
Nehemiah9:33 Engpawh ni se la, kan chunga thil lo thleng zawng zawngah hian nang chu i fel a; nang chuan dik takin thil i ti a, keini erawh chuan thalo takin kan ti a ni;" 
Nehemiah9:34 kan lal te, kan mi lian te, kan puithiam te, kan pi leh pute pawhin i dan chu an zawm lo a, i thupek leh i thu hriattir, anmahni i zilhnate chu an pawm hek lo." 
Nehemiah9:35 An chunga i that thin tehlul nen, an ramah, ram zau tak leh ram tha tak i pekah chuan i rawng an bawlsak si lo chia, an thil tihsual an ban chuan hek lo." 
Nehemiah9:36 Ngai teh, tunah hi chuan bawih kan ni ta a, a chhunga thil rah leh thil tha kan pi leh pute ei atan i pek ramah hian bawih kan ni." 
Nehemiah9:37 Kan sual avanga kan chunga lal atana i ruatte lah chuan an neihnun phah a: kan taksa chungah leh kan ran chungah te lam pawh an duh duhin thu an nei a, kan mangang em em mai a ni.Chung zawng zawng avang chuan thu nghet tak kan thlung a, kan ziak a; kan mi lian te, kan Levi-hote leh kan puithiamten min nemnghehpui a." 
Nehemiah9:38 Chung zawng zawng avang chuan thu nghet tak kan thlung a, kan ziak a; kan mi lian te, kan Levi-hote leh kan puithiamten min nemnghehpui a." 
Nehemiah10:1 Tichuan min nemnghehpuitute chu he'ng hi an ni: Hakalia fapa, ram awptu Nehemia leh Zedekia te;" 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraia te, Azaria te, Jeremia te;" 
Nehemiah10:3 Pasura te, Amaria te, Malkija te;" 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatusa te, Sebania te, Maluka te;" 
Nehemiah10:5 Harima te, Meremota te, Obadia e;" 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniela te, Ginethona te, Baruka te;" 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniela te, Ginethona te, Baruka te;" 
Nehemiah10:7 Mesulama te, Abija te, Mijamina te;" 
Nehemiah10:8 Mazia te, Bilgaia te, Semaia te: hengho hi puithiam an ni." 
Nehemiah10:9 Tin, Levi-hote: Azania fapa Jesua e, Henadada fate zinga mi Binuia te, Kadmiela e;" 
Nehemiah10:10 tin, an unau Sebania te, Hodija te, Kelita te, Pelaia te, Hanana te;" 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika te, Rehoba te, Hasabia te;" 
Nehemiah10:12 Zakura te, Serebia te, Sebania te;" 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodia te, Bania te, Beniua te;" 
Nehemiah10:14 Mipui hotute: Parosa te, Pahat-Moaba te, Elama te, Zatua te, Bania te;" 
Nehemiah10:15 Bunia te, Azgada te, Bebaia te;" 
Nehemiah10:16 Adonija te; Bigvaia te, Adina te;" 
Nehemiah10:17 Atera te, Hezekia te, Azura te;" 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodia te, Hasuma te, Bezaia te;" 
Nehemiah10:19 Haripha te, Anathota te, Nobaia te;" 
Nehemiah10:20 Magpiasa te, Mesulama te, Hezira te;" 
Nehemiah10:21 Mesezabela te, Zadoka te, Jadua te;" 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatia te, Hanana te, Anaia te;" 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea te, Hanania te, Hasuba te;" 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea te, Hanania te, Hasuba te;" 
Nehemiah10:24 Halohesa te Pilha te, Sobeka te;" 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehuma te, Hasabna te, Maseia te;" 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahia te, Hanana te, Anana te;" 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluka te, Harima te, Bana te." 
Nehemiah10:28 Tin, mi dang, puithiamte, Levi-ho te, kawngkhar vengtute, hla satute, Nethin-hote leh Pathian dan zawm tuma chung rama mite laka inthiarfihlim zawng zawng te, an nupui te, an fapate, an fanute, chinchang hre thei tawh chinte chuan" 
Nehemiah10:29 an unaute, an mi liante chu an vuan tlat a, Pathian chhiahhlawh Mosia pek Pathian dan zawm tura, LALPA, kan LALPA thupek zawng zawngte leh a rorelnate leh a thuratte chu zawm leh vawnga," 
Nehemiah10:30 chu rama mite chu kan fanute neihtir lo a, kan fapate tan an fanute nei hek lo a," 
Nehemiah10:31 chu rama miten chawlhnia thil zawrh tur bungrua emaw, ei tur reng reng zawrh tur emwa an rawn laka chawlhni emaw, awmni kham ni emawa leisak loa; kum sarihnaa ram dah tuia leiba zawng zawng thing lo turin anchhe dawn huamin chhia an chham a." 
Nehemiah10:32 Tin, kan Pathian in lama rawngbawlna atan sekel hmun thuma thena hmun khat kum tina pek turin dan kan insiam bawk a." 
Nehemiah10:33 chhang dah atan te, chhangphut thilhlan fo tur atan te, halral thilhlan fo tur atan te, chawlhni atan te, thla thar atan te, hunbi nei kut atan te, thil thianghlim atan te, Israel mite tana inremna siamna tura sual thawina atan leh kan Pathian in lama tih tur zawng zawng tihna'n te," 
Nehemiah10:34 Kan pi leh pute chhungkua ang zela kum tina hunbi ruata dan bua ziak anga LALPA kan Pathian maichama hal tur thing hlan kan Pathian ina chhektu tur hriatna'n puithiamho nen, Levi-ho nen, mipuite nen thum kan vawr a:" 
Nehemiah10:35 tin, kum tina kan loa thlai thar hmasa ber leh thing chi tinreng rah hmasa ber LALPA ina dah lut tur te," 
Nehemiah10:36 dana ziak anga kan fapa leh kan ran piang hmasa berte, kan bawng rual leh beram rual zinga piang hmasa berte pawh kan Pathian ina rawngbawltu puithiame hnena kan Pathian ina hruait tur te," 
Nehemiah10:37 kan Pathian in pindana puithiamte hnena kan chhang hmeh hmasa ber te, kan then thilhlan te, thing chi tinreng rah te, uain leh hriak keng tur e; kan loa mi sawma pakhat Levi-hote pek tur tein dan kan insiam bawk a, anni Levi-hote chuan kan khaw zinga thlawhhma nei khua apiangah sawma pakhat an la thin a ni a." 
Nehemiah10:38 Tin, levi-hoten sawma pakhat an lak laiin Arona thlah puithiam chu Levi hote hnenah an awm tur a ni a; Levi hote chuan sawma pakhat an lak ata sawma pakhat chu kan Pathian inah, ro dahkhawmna pindanah chuan an rawn dah tur a ni.Israela thlahte leh Levia thlahte chuan buh leh uain leh hriak then thilhlan chu hmun thianghlim bungbel leh rawngbawltu puithiam te, kawngkhar vengtu te, hla satute awmna pindanah chuan an dah tur a ni a: chutiang chuan a ni, kan Pathian in chu thlahthlam lo tura dan kan insiam ni." 
Nehemiah10:39 Israela thlahte leh Levia thlahte chuan buh leh uain leh hriak then thilhlan chu hmun thianghlim bungbel leh rawngbawltu puithiam te, kawngkhar vengtu te, hla satute awmna pindanah chuan an dah tur a ni a: chutiang chuan a ni, kan Pathian in chu thlahthlam lo tura dan kan insiam ni." 
Nehemiah11:1 Mipui hotute chu Jerusalem-ah an awm a; sawm zinga pakhat zel khawpui thianghlim Jerusalem-a awmtir tur leh sawm zinga pakua, khaw danga awm turte hriatna'n a bak mipuite pawh chuan thum an vawr a." 
Nehemiah11:2 Lungni taka Jerusalem-a awm tura inpe zawng zawngte chuan mipuite fak an hlawh a. 
Nehemiah11:3 Hengte hi chu mi ram hotu Jerusalem-a awmte chu an ni: amaherawhchu Judai ram khuaahte chuan, an khuaa mahni chan tur theuhvah an awm a; chungte chu Israel-ho te, puithiamho te, Levi-ho te, Nethin-ho leh Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlah an ni." 
Nehemiah11:4 Jerusalem-ah chuan Juda thlaha mi leh Benjamina thlaha mite an awm. Juda thlahte zinga mi: Pereza thlahte zinga mi, Mahalalela fapa Sephatia, chu mi fapa Amaria, chu mi fapa Sekaria, chu mi fapa Athaia, chu mi fapa Uzia leh" 
Nehemiah11:5 Silo mi fapa Zekaria, chu mi fapa Joiariba, chu mi fapa Adaia, chu mi fapa Hazaia, chu mi fapa Kolhozea, chu mi fapa Baruka, chu mi fapa Maseia." 
Nehemiah11:6 Pereza thlah, Jerusalem-a awm zawng zawngte chu mi huaisen 468 an ni." 
Nehemiah11:7 Tin, Benjamin thlahte zinga mi chu hengte hi an ni: Jesaia fapa Ithiela, chu mi fapa Maseia, chu mi fapa Kolaia, chu mi fapa Pedaia, chu mi fapa Joeda, chu mi fapa Mesulama, chu mi fapa Salua." 
Nehemiah11:8 A dawt lehah chuan Gebaia te, Salaia te, an zain Benjamina thlah Jerusalem-a awmte chu mi 928 an ni." 
Nehemiah11:9 Tin, Zikria fapa Joela chu an hotu a ni; Hasenua fapa, Juda chu khaw hotu ber dawttu a ni." 
Nehemiah11:9 Tin, Zikria fapa Joela chu an hotu a ni; Hasenua fapa, Juda chu khaw hotu ber dawttu a ni." 
Nehemiah11:10 Puithiamte zinga mi; Joiariba fapa Jedaia te, Jakina te," 
Nehemiah11:11 Pathian in hotu Ahituba fapa Meraiotha, chu mi fapa Zadoka, chu mi fapa Mesulama, chu mi fapa Hilkia, chu mi fapa Seraia te;" 
Nehemiah11:12 an unau, ina rawngbawltute zawng zawng nen 822 an ni a: tin, Malkija fapa Pasura, chu mi fapa Zekaria, chu mi fapa Amzia, chu mi fapa Pelalia, chu mi fapa Jerohama, chu mi fapa Adaia leh" 
Nehemiah11:13 a unaute, an chhungkaw puipate nen 242 an ni a: tin, Imera fapa Mesilemotha, chu mi fapa Azarela, chu mi fapa Amasaia leh" 
Nehemiah11:14 an unau mi chak huaisente nen 128 an ni; an hotu chu Hegedolima fapa Zabdiela a ni a. 
Nehemiah11:15 Tin, Levi-hote zinga mi; Bunia fapa Hasabia, Hasuba, chu mi fapa Semaia te;" 
Nehemiah11:16 Levi-ho puipate zinga mi, Pathianin pawn lam hna enkawltu Sabethaia leh Jozabada te;" 
Nehemiah11:17 Asapah fapa Zabdia, chu mi fapa Mika, chu mi fapa, tawngtaia lawm thu sawi tantu ber, Matania e; a unaute zinga a dawttu Bakbukia te; Jeduthuna fapa Galala, chu mi fapa Samua, chu mi fapa Abda e," 
Nehemiah11:18 Khawpui thianghlima Levi-ho awm zawng zawng chu 284 an ni. 
Nehemiah11:19 Chung lote pawh chu kawngkhar vengtu Akuba te, Talmona te leh an unaute kulh kawngka vengtute, 172 an ni a." 
Nehemiah11:20 A bak Israelte leh puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu Judai ram khaw tinah mahni ram theuhvah an awm a. 
Nehemiah11:21 Nethin-ho erawh chu Ophel-ah an awm a: Ziha leh Gispa chu Nethin-ho hotu an ni a. 
Nehemiah11:22 Jerusalem khuaa Levi-hote hotu chu Asapha fa, hla satute zinga mi Mika, chu mi fapa Matania, chu mi fapa Hasabia, chu mi fapa Bania, chu mi fapa Uzia a nia, Pathian in lam hna ngaihtuahtu a ni." 
Nehemiah11:23 An chungchang thuah lal thupek a awm a, hla satute chu ni tina an tla tawk ruat tur thu a awm bawk si a." 
Nehemiah11:24 Juda fapa Zera thlaha mi Mesezabela fapa Pethahia chu mipuite chungchang thu-ah engkima lal aiawh a ni a. 
Nehemiah11:25 Tin, an khua leh an ram thuah chuan, Juda thlah thenkhatte chu Kiriat-arba leh a khawperah te, Dibon leh khawperah te, Zekabzela leh a khawperah e;" 
Nehemiah11:26 Jesua-ah leh Molada-ah leh Betpelet-ah te; 
Nehemiah11:27 tin, Hazarsual-ah te, Beer-seba leh a khawperah te," 
Nehemiah11:28 Ziklag-ah te, Mekona leh a khawperah te," 
Nehemiah11:29 Enrimon-ah te, Adulam-ah leh an khawperah te, Lakis leh a ramah te, Azeka leh a khawperah te an awm a. Chutichuan Beer-seba atangin Hinom ruam thlengin awm hmun an khuar a." 
Nehemiah11:30 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chu Geba piah lam Mikmas-ah te, Aija leh Bethel leh a khawperah te;" 
Nehemiah11:31 Anathot-ah te, Nob-ah te, Anania-ah te:" 
Nehemiah11:32 Hazor-ah te, Rama-ah te, Gitaim-ah te;" 
Nehemiah11:33 Hadid-ah te, Zeboim-ah te, Nebalat-ah te;" 
Nehemiah11:34 Lod-ah leh themthiamte ruam rama awm thin Levi-ho pawl thenkhatte chu Benjamin ramah an tel ta a. 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod-ah leh themthiamte ruam Ono-ah te an awm a.Tin, Judai rama awm thin Levi ho pawl thenkhatte chu Benjamin ramah an tel a." 
Nehemiah11:36 Tin, Judai rama awm thin Levi ho pawl thenkhatte chu Benjamin ramah an tel a." 
Nehemiah12:1 Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jesua hnena kal chho puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu hengte hi an ni; Seraia te, Jeremia te, Ezra te," 
Nehemiah12:1 Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jesua hnena kal chho puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu hengte hi an ni; Seraia te, Jeremia te, Ezra te," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria te, Maluka te, Hatusa te," 
Nehemiah12:3 Sekania te; Rehuma te, Meremotha e;" 
Nehemiah12:4 Idova te, Ginethoia te, Abija te;" 
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamina te, Madia te, Bilga te;" 
Nehemiah12:6 Semaia te, Joiariba te, Jedaia te;" 
Nehemiah12:7 Salua te, Amoka te, Hilkia te, Jedaia te. Hengho hi Jesua dam laia puithiam zing leh an unaute zinga an hotute an ni." 
Nehemiah12:8 Chung lo pawh Levi-hote: Jesua te, Binuia te, Kadmiela te, Serebia te, Juda te, lawm thu sawinaa hotu Matania te, amah leh a unaute chu." 
Nehemiah12:9 Bakbukia leh Unova leh an unaute pawh chu a pawl pawlin an inchhawn thin a. 
Nehemiah12:10 Tin, Jesua chuan Joiakima a hring a, Joiakima chuan Eliasiba a hring a, Eliasiba chuan Joiada a hring a," 
Nehemiah12:11 Joiada chuan Jonathana a hring a. Jonathana chuan Jadua a hring a. 
Nehemiah12:12 Tin, hengho hi Joiakima dam lai chuan puithiam, an chhungkaw puipate an ni: Seraia thlaha mi Meraia te, Jeremia thlaha mi Hanania te," 
Nehemiah12:13 Ezra thlaha mi Mesulama te, Amaria thlaha mi Jehohanana te;" 
Nehemiah12:13 Ezra thlaha mi Mesulama te, Amaria thlaha mi Jehohanana te;" 
Nehemiah12:14 Malukia thlah mi Jonathana te, Sebania thlaha mi Josepha te;" 
Nehemiah12:15 Harima thlaha mi Adna te, Meraiotha thlaha mi Helkaia te;" 
Nehemiah12:16 Idova thlaha mi Zekaria te, Ginethona thlaha mi Mesulama te," 
Nehemiah12:17 Abija thlaha mi Zikria te; Miniamina thlaha mi te, Moadia thlaha mi Piltaia te;" 
Nehemiah12:18 Bilga thlaha mi Samua te; Semaia thlaha mi Jehonathana te; 
Nehemiah12:19 tin, Joiariba thlaha mi Matenaia te, Jedaia thlaha mi Uzia te;" 
Nehemiah12:20 Salaia thlaha mi Kalaia te, Amoka thlaha mi Ebera e;" 
Nehemiah12:21 Hilkia thlaha mi Hasabia te, Jedaia thlaha mi Nethanela te." 
Nehemiah12:22 Levia chite chungchangah chuan, Eliasiba te, Joiada te, Johanana te, Jadua te dam laiin chhungkaw puipate chhinchhiah fel a ni a; chutiang bawkin puithiamte pawh Persia lal Daria lal thlengin chhinchhiah an ni a." 
Nehemiah12:23 Eliasiba fapa Johanana dam lai thleng pawhin Levia fa, chhungkaw puipate chu chanchin ziakna buah chuan an chuang a ni." 
Nehemiah12:24 Tin, Levi-ho puipate: Hasabia te, Serebia te, Kadmiela fapa Jesua te leh an unau, Pathian mi Davida thupek anga a pawl pawla inchhawna fak leh lawm thu sawitu turte nen." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matania te, Bakbukia te, Obadia te, Mesulama te, Talmona te, Akuba te chu kawngkhar kianga bungraw dahkhawmna in leh kawngka vengtute an ni." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hengho hi Jesua, Jozadaka fapaa fapa Joiakima dam laia mi leh ram awptu Nehemia leh Ezra puithiam leh lehkha ziaktu dam laia mi an ni a." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hengho hi Jesua, Jozadaka fapaa fapa Joiakima dam laia mi leh ram awptu Nehemia leh Ezra puithiam leh lehkha ziaktu dam laia mi an ni a." 
Nehemiah12:27 Jerusalem kulh an hlannaah chuan darbenthek te, perhkhuang te, tingtangte nena hla sa leh lawm thu sawia lawm taka a hlannaa tel tura Jerusalem-a rawn hruai turin Levi-hote chu an hmun zawng zawng ata an zawng chhuak a." 
Nehemiah12:28 Jerusalem chhehvel ata leh Netophat-ho khuate atangin hla satuho fate an kal khawm a; 
Nehemiah12:29 Bet-gilgal atang leh Geba leh Azmavet ram ata te pawh hla satute chuan Jerusalem velah chuan khua an lo siam ta hlawm si a. 
Nehemiah12:30 Tin, puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu an intithianghlim a, tin, mipui te, kulh te, a kawngkharte an tithianghlim a." 
Nehemiah12:31 Chutichuan Juda-ho mi liante chu kulh chungah chuan ka hruai chho a, lawm thu sawia inzui duah duah a kal tur pawl lian tak pawl hnih ka ruat a; pawl khat chu Bawlhhlawh Kawngka lamah, kulh chung ding lampangah an kal a;" 
Nehemiah12:32 tin, anni chu Hosaia leh Juda-ho mi lian zatve te," 
Nehemiah12:33 Azaria te, Ezra te, Mesulama te," 
Nehemiah12:33 Azaria te, Ezra te, Mesulama te," 
Nehemiah12:34 Juda te, Benjamina te, Semaia te, Jeremia te," 
Nehemiah12:35 tawtawrawt keng puithiam fapa thenkhatte, Asapha fapa Zakura, chu mi fapa Mikaia, chu mi fapa Matania, chu mi fapa Semaia chu mi fapa Jonathana, chu mi fapa Zekariate;" 
Nehemiah12:36 a unau Semaia te, Azarela te, Milalaia te, Gilalaia te, Maia te, Nethanela te, Juda te, Pathian mi Davida tum thin thilte keng Hananiate chuan an zui a; tin, lehkha ziaktu Ezran an hma a hruai a:" 
Nehemiah12:36 a unau Semaia te, Azarela te, Milalaia te, Gilalaia te, Maia te, Nethanela te, Juda te, Pathian mi Davida tum thin thilte keng Hananiate chuan an zui a; tin, lehkha ziaktu Ezran an hma a hruai a:" 
Nehemiah12:37 tin, Tuikhur Kawngka an thlenin, kulh chhoh tanna an hmazawn Davida khaw kailawna chhoin Davida in chhakah an kal a, chhak lampanga Tui kawngka thleng rakin." 
Nehemiah12:38 Tin, lawmthu sawitu pawl dangte chu anmahni tawk turin an kal a, tin, keiin mipui zatvete nen Meipui chhehna In sang chhakah, kulh chungah kulh chhah thlengin kan zui a;" 
Nehemiah12:39 Ephraim Kawngka chungah te, Kawngka hlui chungah te, sangha Kawngka chungah te, Hananela in sang leh Hamea in sang chungah te, beram Kawngka thleng rakin: tin, Tan In Kawngkaah chuan an ding a." 
Nehemiah12:40 Chutichuan lawm thu sawituho pawl hnihte chu Pathian inah an ding a, kei leh roreltu zatvete nen." 
Nehemiah12:41 Tin, tawtawrawt keng puithiamho Eliakima te, Maseia te, Miniamina te, Milkaia te, Elioenaia te, Zekaria te, Hanania te;" 
Nehemiah12:42 tin, Maseiate, Semaia Elazara te, Jehohanana te, Malkija te, Elama te, Ezera te pawh. Tin, hlasatute chuan an hotu Jezrahia hoin ring takin an sa a." 
Nehemiah12:43 Chu mi ni chuan inthawina nasa tak mai an hlan a, an hlim hle mai a; Pathianin hlim namen lohin a tihlim a ni; tin, hmeichhiate leh naupangte chen pawhin an hlim hle mai a: chuti chuan Jerusalem hlimna chu hla tak atang pawhin an hria a." 
Nehemiah12:44 Tin, chu mi ni chuan thawhlawm te, then thilhlan te, thlai thar hmasa ber te, sawma pakhatte dahkhawmna pindantea hotu, danin a ruat ang, puithiam leh Leviaho chanvo khaw tin, lo zir ang zela la khawmtu turte an ruat a; Judate chu rawngbawltu puithiamte leh Levi-ho avang chuan an lawm hle mai a ni." 
Nehemiah12:45 Davida leh a fapa Solomona thupek angin, hla satute leh kawngkhar vengtute pawhin an Pathian rawngbawl dan tur leh intihthianghlimna dan chu an zawm a." 
Nehemiah12:46 Hman laia Davida leh Asapha dam lai chuan hla sa pawl hotu an awm thin a, Pathian fakna leh lawmna hlate an sa thin a ni.Zerubabela dam lai leh Nehemia dam lai chuan Israel zawng zawngin hla satute leh kawngkhar vengtute chu ni tina an tla tawk tur chanvo an siam thin a: tin, Levi-ho chanvo a tih hran sak bawk a; tin, an ni Levi hote chuan Arona fapate chanvo an tihhransak thin a." 
Nehemiah12:47 Zerubabela dam lai leh Nehemia dam lai chuan Israel zawng zawngin hla satute leh kawngkhar vengtute chu ni tina an tla tawk tur chanvo an siam thin a: tin, Levi-ho chanvo a tih hran sak bawk a; tin, an ni Levi hote chuan Arona fapate chanvo an tihhransak thin a." 
Nehemiah13:1 Chu mi ni chuan mipui beng hriatah Mosia lehkhabu an han chhiar a; tin, chu miah chuan Amon mie leh Moab mite chu Pathian mite inkhawmnaah chuan engikah mah an tel ve hauh lo tur a ni tih a chuang a;" 
Nehemiah13:2 Israela thlahte chhang leh tuia hmuak lo a, anmahni anchhe lawhtu Balama an rawih avangin khan: nimahsela kan Pathianin anchhia chu malsawmnaah a chantir ta zawk a." 
Nehemiah13:3 Tin, heti hi a ni a, dan chu an han ngaihthlak zawh chuan Israel mite zinga ta a chawhpawlhtu hnam dang mie an tihrang ta a." 
Nehemiah13:4 Chu mi hma chuan kan Pathian in pindantea hotu atana ruat, puithiam Eliasiba, Tobia lamhnai chuan" 
Nehemiah13:5 tun hma lama Levi hote, hlasatute, kawngkhar vengtute chanvo, chhangphut thil hlante, rimtuite, bungbel te, buh sawma pakhat te, uain leh hriak leh puithiamte tana then thilhlante an dah thinnna pindan zau tak Tobia a buatsaihsak a." 
Nehemiah13:6 Nimahsela chung thil zawng zawng awm laite chuan Jerusalem khuaah ka awm lo a; Babulon lal Artazerzia kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a lal kumin lal hnenah ka lal a, ni eng emaw zat hnuah phalna ka dil leh a:" 
Nehemiah13:7 tin, Jerusalem khuaah ka va kal a, Pathian in hung chhung kawtlaitea pindan buatsaihsaka Tobia tana Eliasiban thil tha lo a tih chu kan han hre ta a." 
Nehemiah13:8 Mi tilungni lo em em mai a: chuvangin Tobia in chhung bungrua zawng zawng, chu mi pindan ata chu ka theh chhuak vek a." 
Nehemiah13:9 Tin, thu ka pe a, pindante chu an thian fai a: tichuan Pathian in bungbelte chu chhangphut thilhaln te leh rimtuite nen ka la lut leh a." 
Nehemiah13:10 Tin, Levi-hote leh hla satute chu an chan ai pek an nih loh avangin mahni lo lam theuhvah an tlan darh vek a ni tih ka hre leh ta bawk a." 
Nehemiah13:11 Tichuan, roreltute ka khak a, ""Engati nge Pathian in chu thlahthlam anih reng mai le?"" ka ti a. Tin, anni chu ka ko khawm vek a, an hmun theuhvah ka awmtir leh a." 
Nehemiah13:12 Chutichuan Juda mi zawng zawngte chuan buh sawma pakhat te, uain te, hriak te, thawhlawm dah khawmnaahte chuan an rawn la a." 
Nehemiah13:13 Tin, puithiam Selemia leh lehkha ziaktu Zadoka leh Levi-ho zinga mi Pedaia te chu thawhlawm dahkhawmnate hotu atan ka siam a: anmahni puibawmtuah chuan Matania fa Zakura fapa Hanana a awm a; rinawma ngaih an ni a, an hnathawh chu an unaute hnena thil sem vel a ni." 
Nehemiah13:14 Aw ka Pathian, he mi thuah hian min hre reng la, ka Pathian in leh a rawngbawlna atana ka thiltih thatte chu thai bo lul suh ang che." 
Nehemiah13:15 Chung lai chuan Judai ramah chawlhnia uain sawr khurtea rap sawr te, buhphal rawn phur te, uain te, grep te, theipuite leh phurrit tinreng phurhtir tura sabengtung siam laite ka hmu a; chung chu chawlhniah Jerusalem-an an rawn phur lut a; ei tur zawrh nite chuan a dik lohzia ka hriattir a." 
Nehemiah13:16 Tura rama mi chuta cheng vete pawhin sanghate leh bungraw tinrengte an rawn la a, chawlhniin Juda mite hnenah leh Jerusalem-ah an zuar a." 
Nehemiah13:17 chutichuan Juda mi liante chu ka khak a, an hnenah, ""Chawlhni tibawrhbanga in thil tha lo tih hi eng tizia nge ni?" 
Nehemiah13:18 In pi leh pute pawh khan hetiang hi an ti a ni lo'm ni? tin, kan Pathian chuan he'ng thil tha lo zawng zawngte hi kan chungah leh he khaw chungah hian a rawn thlentir ta a ni lo'm ni? Chuti chung pawhin chawlhni tibawrhbangin Israel mite chunga thinurna in la thlen belhtir cheu mai ka ti,"" ka ti a." 
Nehemiah13:19 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chawlhni dawna Jerusalem kulh kawngkhar a thim deuh veleh kawngkharte khar turin thu ka pe a, tin, chawlhni a ral hma loh chuan hawn loh turin thu ka pe bawk a: chawlhnia thil phurh reng reng an lak luh lohna'n ka tlangval thenkhatte kawngkhar ka ventir a." 
Nehemiah13:20 Chutichuan sumdawng mite leh bungraw tinreng zuar mite chu vawi khat emaw, vawi hnih emaw chu Jerusalem pawn lamah an riak a." 
Nehemiah13:21 Chutichuan a dik lohzia ka hriattir a, an hneah, ""Engati nge kulh bulah in riah? Hetianga in tih leh chuan in chungah ka kut ka thlak ang,"" ka ti a. Chuta chin chu chawlhni chuan an lo kal leh ta lo a." 
Nehemiah13:22 Tin, Levi-hote chu inthian faia chawlhni tihthianghlimna tura kulh kawngkhar rawn veng turin thu ka pe a. Aw ka Pathian, he mi thuah pawh hian min hre reng la, i khawngaihna nasa tak avangin min zuah ang che." 
Nehemiah13:23 Chung lai chuan Juda mi, Asdod hmeichhia te, Amon hmeichhia te, Moab hmeichhiate nupuia neite chu ka hmu a:" 
Nehemiah13:24 an fate chu Asdod tawngin an tawng zawk mah a, chungho tawng dan ang ang chauh lo chuan Juda tawngin an tawng thei lo a." 
Nehemiah13:25 Tin, anni chu ka khak hlawm a, anchhia ka lawh a, thenkhatte chu ka vua a, an samte ka pawh thlaksak a, an fanute chu chungho fapa te neihtir lo tur leh chungho fanute chu an fapate tan emaw, anmahni tan emaw nei lo turin Pathian chhalin chhia ka chhamtir a." 
Nehemiah13:26 Israel lal Solomona pawh kha hetiang thilahte hian a sual ani lo'm ni? Chuti chung pawhin hnam tam tak zingah chuan amah ang lal an awm lo a, a Pathian mi duh tak a ni a, Pathianin Israel ram zawng zawng chunga lalah a siam bawk a; nimahsela ani meuh pawh chu ram dang hmeichhiain a tisual ta mai ani a." 
Nehemiah13:27 Chutichuan ram dang hmeichhiate neia kan Pathian chunga thil tha lo tak mai hi ti turin in thu kan zawm dawn em ni? ka ti a. 
Nehemiah13:28 Tin, puithiam lal Eliasiba fa, Joiada fapa pakhat chu Horan mi Sanbalata makpa a ni a, chuvangin ka hnen atangin ka tlanbotir ta a." 
Nehemiah13:29 Aw ka Pathian, puithiamna hna leh puithiamna hna thuthlung leh Levi-ho thuthlung an tihbawlhhlawh avangin hre reng hlawm ang che.Chutiang chuan ram dang mite lakah ka tithianghlim a, puithiam te, Levi-hote tan an hnathawhna theuha an rawngbawl dan tur ka ruatsak a;" 
Nehemiah13:30 Chutiang chuan ram dang mite lakah ka tithianghlim a, puithiam te, Levi-hote tan an hnathawhna theuha an rawngbawl dan tur ka ruatsak a;" 
Esther1:1 Lal Ahasuera a lal laiin (chu Ahasuera chu India atanga Ethiopia thlenga ram then za leh sawmhnih leh pasarih chunga lal a ni a) heti hi a ni a," 
Esther1:2 Lal Ahasuera a ram lalthutthleng lal khua Susan-a a thut lai," 
Esther1:3 a lal kum thum kum khan a mi liante zawng zawng leh a mite tan ruai a theh a; Persia leh Medai rama thu neitute, an ram then mi thate leh mi liante chu an awm vek a;" 
Esther1:4 a ram ropui tak rote leh a lal ropui nasatzia, rei tak ni za leh ni sawmriat zet a entir a." 
Esther1:5 Tin, chung zawhah chuan mi lian leh mi te lal khua, Susan-a lo tel zawng zawng tan lal in huan hung chhung kawtlaiah lal chuan ni sarih zet ruai a theh a;" 
Esther1:6 puan, a varte, a hringte, a dumpawl te, lazai sin sendukin tangkaraw khangah leh sailungvar banahte an thlung a; rangkachak leh tangkaraw thutphahte chu sailungvar, a sen te, a var te, a eng te, a dum tea rem chungah an hung a." 
Esther1:7 Rangkachak noin uain chu an sem a, (no chu chi hrang hrang inang lo thluah a ni,) lal chuan a ngah khawp a, uain chu a awm leng lung mai a ni." 
Esther1:8 Tin, uain chu dan angin an in a; tumah tihluih an ni lo a, mi tinin an duh anga an tih theuhna turin lal chuan a ina hotu zawng zawngte chu a hrilh a." 
Esther1:9 Tin, lalnu Vasti pawhin Ahasuera lal inah chuan hmeichheho tan ruai a theh a." 
Esther1:10 10-11, A ni sarih ni chuan lal rilru chu uain chuan a tihpuamsak ta a, pindan vengtu pasarih, lal Ahasuera hmaa rawngbawl thin Mehumana te, Biztha te, Harbona te, Bigtha te, Abagtha te, Zethara te, Karkasa te chu lalnu Vasti a lallukhum khum chunga mipuite leh mi liante a hmel thatzia inentir tura lal hmaa va hruai turin thu a pe a; a hmel a tha hle si a." 
Esther1:11 10-11, A ni sarih ni chuan lal rilru chu uain chuan a tihpuamsak ta a, pindan vengtu pasarih, lal Ahasuera hmaa rawngbawl thin Mehumana te, Biztha te, Harbona te, Bigtha te, Abagtha te, Zethara te, Karkasa te chu lalnu Vasti a lallukhum khum chunga mipuite leh mi liante a hmel thatzia inentir tura lal hmaa va hruai turin thu a pe a; a hmel a tha hle si a." 
Esther1:12 Nimahsela lalnu Vasti chuan pindan vengtuten kal tura lal thupek an hrilh chu a hnial a; chuvangin lal chu a thinrim ta hle mai a, a thinrim a alh ta a." 
Esther1:13 Chutichuan lal chuan thil hre mi, mi fingte hnenah chuan, (dan leh rorel dan hria zawng zawngte chu chutiang chuan lalin a rawn thin reng a ni;" 
Esther1:14 amah dawltute chu Karsena te, Sethara te, Admatha te, Tarsisa te, Meresa te, Medai ram mi lian pasarih, lal hmel hmu fotu, an rama amah hnaih ber thinte an ni;)" 
Esther1:15 Pindan vengtuten an hriattir si, lal Ahasueran a tih anga a tih loh avangin lalnu Vasti chungah chuan dan anga ti turin engtin nge kan tih ang?"" a ti a." 
Esther1:16 Memukana chuan lal leh mi liante hmaah chuan, ""lalnu Vasti chuan lal chungah chauh a tisual a ni lo a, mi lian zawng zawng leh lal Ahasuera ram then zawng zawnga hnam tin, chungah pawh a tisual a ni." 
Esther1:17 He, lalnu thiltih hi hmeichhia zawng zawngin an han hre darh ang a, lal Ahasuera chuan lalnu Vasti a hmaa rawn hruai turin thu a pe a, nimahsela a kal lo tih thu a han than chuan an pasalte an hmusit phah mai ang." 
Esther1:18 Tin, vawiinah ngei pawh hian Persia leh Medai mi liannuho, lalnu thiltih hriate hian lal mi liante chungah an ti ve mai ang a. Chutichuan inhmusitna leh thinurna nasa tak a chhuak ang." 
Esther1:19 Lal tha tihzawng a nih chuan, lal thupek than chhuak se la, lalnu Vasti chu lal Ahasuera hmaah lo kal tawh hauh suh se, tih thu hi tihdanglam tawh hauh lo turin Persia leh Medai ram dan zingah ziak ni se la; tin, lalin amah aia tha zawk a lalnu nihna luahtir se la." 
Esther1:20 Tin, lal thupek chu a ram zawng zawngah (zau teh mah se la) than chhuah a nih hunah chuan, an nupuiten ami lian ami tein an pasalte an pawisa ang,"" a ti a." 
Esther1:21 Chu thu chuan lal leh mi liante chu a tilawm hle a; tichuan lal chuan Memukana thu ang chuan a ti a;Lal ram zawng zawngah, ram tinah anmahni lehkha theuhin, hnam tin, anmahni tawng theuhin, mipain mahni in chhung theuhvah thu an nei tur a ni tih thu a thawn ta a ni." 
Esther1:22 Lal ram zawng zawngah, ram tinah anmahni lehkha theuhin, hnam tin, anmahni tawng theuhin, mipain mahni in chhung theuhvah thu an nei tur a ni tih thu a thawn ta a ni." 
Esther2:1 Chung thil hnua lal Ahasuera thinrim chu a la daih hnu chuan Vasti leh a thiltih leh a chungchanga thupek chu a hre chhuak a. 
Esther2:2 Chutichuan lal chhiahhlawh, a rawngbawltute chuan a hnenah, ""Lal tan nula hmel tha zawn ni se la;" 
Esther2:3 lal pindan enkawltu Hegaia, hmeichhe enkawltu hnuaiah, Susana lal hmeichhe dah khawmna inah nula hmel tha zawng zawng ko khawm turin lalin a ram chhunga ram then zawng zawngah hotu ruat se la; tin, an intihthianghlimna turte pek ni theuh sela;" 
Esther2:4 lal tilawmtu ber nula chu Vasti aiah lalnu ni se la, "" an ti a. Tichuan chu chuan lal chu a tilawm a, chutiang chuan a ti ta a." 
Esther2:5 Lal khawpui Susan-ah chuan Juda mi, mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Mordekaia a ni a, Benjamin mi Kisa fa Simeia fapa Jaira fapa a ni;" 
Esther2:6 Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran Juda lal Jekonia sala a hruai laia Jerusalem atanga hruai a ni. 
Esther2:7 A pami fanu, Hadasi, Estheri an tih chu a enkawl seilian a; pa a nei lo a, nu a nei bawk si lo a, nula chu a nalhin a hmel a tha hle mai a; anu leh a pa an thih hnu khan Mordekaia chuan a fanu a tan a awmpui ta a ni." 
Esther2:8 Chutichuan lal thupek leh lal thurat chu an lo hriat a, nula tam tak, lal khawpui Susan-a Hegaia vennaah an kal khawm chiam lai chuan, heti hi a ni a, Estheri chu lal inah hmeichhe vengtu Hegaia vennaah chuan an hruai lut a." 
Esther2:9 Tin, nula chuan a tilawm a, a duhsakna a chang a, lal in ata a chanvo leh a intihthianghlimna tur chu a pe thuai mai a, nula pasarih pek awm deuh deuhte nen; amah leh a nulatpuite chu hmeichhe awmna hmun tha berah a hruai ta a." 
Esther2:10 Estheri chuan eng chi nge a nih leh tute nge a laichinte a hriattir hauh lo a; Mordekaia chuan hriattir lo turin thu a pe tlat a ni. 
Esther2:11 Estheri chuan eng nge a tih thin a, engtin nge a awm tih hre turin Mordekaia chu ni tin, hmeichhe awmna, kawt hung chhungah chuan a kal thin a." 
Esther2:12 Tin, thla sawm leh thla hnih hmeichhe tana dan anga an chungchanga thiltih hnua lal Ahasuera hnena nulaho an kal hun a lo thlen chuan (chutiangah chuan an intihthianghlim hun a kim tawh thin a, hetiang hian an ti thin a ni, thla ruk chhung mura hriakin an zut a, thla ruk dang leh chhung rimtui leh hriak dangin an zut leh a)," 
Esther2:13 hetiang hian an kal thin a, lal ina luhpui turin hmeichhe awmna ata an duh apiang an pe thin a ni." 
Esther2:14 Tlai lamah an kal a, atukah, hmei vengtu, lal pindan vengtu Saasgaza ven hmeichhe awmna pahnihnaah an let leh thin a; lalin a duh a, an hming lama a kohte chauh lo chu lal hnenah an kal leh tawh thin lo." 
Esther2:15 Chutichuan Mordekaia pami Abihaila fanu, a fanu atana a awmpui Estheri chu lal hnena a kal hun a thlen chuan, hmeichhe vengtu, lal pindan vengtu Hegaia ruat chauh lo chu engmah a duh lo a. Estheri chu a hmu apiangte duhzawng mi nih a kai a." 
Esther2:16 Chutichuan Estheri chu lal Ahasuera lal inah thla sawmna, Tebet thlaah kum sarih a lal kumah an hruai lut a." 
Esther2:17 Lal chuan hmeichhe dang zawng zawng aiin a hmangaih a, nula dang zawng zawng aiin khawngaihna leh duhsakna a hlawh a; tichuan lallukhum a khumtir a, Vasti aiah lalnuah a siam ta a." 
Esther2:18 Chutichuan Estheri hmingin lal chuan a mi liante leh a mite tan ruai ropui tak a theh a; a rama mite tan awm ni a khamsak a, lal tih awm rengin phal takin thilte a sem a." 
Esther2:19 Tin, nulaho an inkhawm leh lai chuan Mordekaia chu lal kawt hung kawngkaah a thu a." 
Esther2:20 Mordekaia thupek avangin Estheri chuan tute nge a laichinte leh eng chi nge a nih a la hriattir lo fo a; Estheri chuan Modekaia thu chu a awmpui laia a zawm thin ang khan a la zawm reng a ni. 
Esther2:21 Tin, lal kawt hung kawngkaa Mordekaia a thut lai chuan lal pindan vengtu zinga mi pahnih Bigthana leh Teresa, kawngka veng thintute chu an lo thinur a, lal Ahasuera chungah kutthlakna remchang an zawng a." 
Esther2:22 Chu thil chu Mordekaian a lo hria a, lal nu Estheri chu a hrilh a, tin, Estheri chuan Mordekaia hmingin lal a hrilh a.Tin, chu mi thu chu an dap vel a, chutiang chu a lo ni ngei tih an hriat chhuah chuan an awhhlumtir ve ve a; chu chu la kawl, lal chanchin ziakna buah an ziak a." 
Esther2:23 Tin, chu mi thu chu an dap vel a, chutiang chu a lo ni ngei tih an hriat chhuah chuan an awhhlumtir ve ve a; chu chu la kawl, lal chanchin ziakna buah an ziak a." 
Esther3:1 Chung thil hnuah chuan lal Ahasuera chuan Agag mi Hamedatha fapa Hamana chu akaisantir a, a chawisang a, a mi liante zawng zawng aiin a thut chungnungtir a." 
Esther3:2 Tin, lal kawt hung kawngkaa awm, a mite zawng zawng chuan Hamana chu an zah a, chibai an lo buk thin a; chutianga tih turin lalin thu a pe a ni. Nimahsela Mordekaia chuan ahmaa kunin chibai a buk duh lo a." 
Esther3:3 Tin, lal mite, lal kawt hung kawngkaa awm zawng zawngte chuan Mordekaia hnenah,""Engati nge lal thupek i bawhchhiat?"" an ti a." 
Esther3:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni tin, a hnena an sawia a pawm chuan loh hnu chuan Mordekaia thu chu a ngaimawh nge ngaimawh lo tih hriatna'n Hamana chu an hrilh a, Juda mi a ni tih a lo hrilh tawh hlawh si a." 
Esther3:5 Tin, Hamanan Mordekaia a hmaa kuna chibai a buk loh a han hriat chuan Hamana chu thinrimin a khat ta teuh mai a." 
Esther3:6 Nimahsela Mordekaia chung chauha kut han thlak chu engmah thamah a ngai lo a, Mordekaia chi chu an hrilh tawh bawk si a; chuvangin Ahasuera ram chhung zawng zawnga Juda-ho Mordekaia chipuite chu tihhlum vek a tum ta a." 
Esther3:7 Lal Ahasuera kum sawm leh kum hnih a lal kum, thla khatna, Nisan thlaah Hamana hmaah ni tin, thla tin, thla sawm leh pahnihna Adar thla thlengin Aienna thum an vawr reng a." 
Esther3:8 Tin, Hamanan lal Ahasuera hnenah, ""I ram then chhung tinah hnam eng emaw, hnam dang nen inang lo, intihrang an awm darh nuai a; an dante chu hnam dangte dan nen a inang lo riau mai a; lal dan pawh an zawm hek lo; chuvangin chutiang awmtir phal chu lal tan a manhla lo hle mai a." 
Esther3:9 Lalin rem a tih chuan tihlum vek tur ani tih ziak tlat ni se la; lal sum ina dah turin lal sum enkawltute kutah tangkaraw talent sangsawm ka pe ang e,"" a ti a." 
Esther3:10 Tin, lal chuan a zungbun a phawi a, Judate hmelma Agag mi, Hamedatha fapa Hamana chu a pe a." 
Esther3:11 Lal chuan Hamana hnenah, ""Tangka leh chung mite pawh chu tha i tih ang anga tih tura pek i ni,"" a ti a." 
Esther3:12 Chutichuan thla khatna ni sawm leh ni thum niin lal lehkhaziaktute chu an ko a, Hamana thupek ang chuan lal upa te, ram then tin, awptute, hnam tin, puipate an thawn a, ram then tinah anmahni lehkhain, hnam tin, anmahni tawng theuhin; lal Ahasuera hminga thawn a ni a, lal zungbuna nem a ni." 
Esther3:13 Tin, lal ram then tinah, Juda mi zawng zawngte chu, thalai leh tar te, naupang te te te, hmeichhia te, ni khatah, thla sawm leh thla hnihna, Adar thla ni sawm leh ni thum ni takin tihboral vek a, thah vek a, tihchimit vek a, an sum chu rallaka laksak turin lehkha an thawn darh a." 
Esther3:14 Chu mi ni atana lo inpeih diam turin chu mi thupek chu ram then tina peka hnam tin hnena puan turin chu mi lehkha chu an thawh a.Lal thupekin an kal hmanhmawhtir a, thupek chu lal khawpui Susan-ah an puang a: lal leh Hamana chuan zu an in der der mai a; nimahsela Susan khua chu a mangang hle a." 
Esther3:15 Lal thupekin an kal hmanhmawhtir a, thupek chu lal khawpui Susan-ah an puang a: lal leh Hamana chuan zu an in der der mai a; nimahsela Susan khua chu a mangang hle a." 
Esther4:1 Mordekaian chung an thiltih zawng zawng chu a hriatin, Mordekaia chuan a puan a pawt thler a, saiip puan leh vaivut a inbel a, khawlaiah a kal a, ring tak leh lungchhe takin a tap a," 
Esther4:2 lal kawt hung kawngka bul thlengin a kal a; tumah saiip puan sina lal kawt hung chhung luh chu phal a ni si lo a. 
Esther4:3 Lal thupek chu a thlenna ram tawh phawt maiah chuan Judate chu an tap ngawih ngawih a, chaw an nghei a, an chiau vawng vawng a, mi tam tak chu saiipah leh vaivut zingahte an mu a." 
Esther4:4 Tin, Estheri chu, a nulate leh apindan vengtute chuan an va hrilh a, tichuan lalnu chu a lungngai ta em em mai a, Mordekaia chu a saiip puan hlip a, a sin turin a puan a thawn a; nimahsela a lo duh lo a." 
Esther4:5 Chutichuan Estheri chuan lal pindan vengtu pakhat, amah vengtu atana ruat Hathaka chu a ko a, chung chu eng nge ni a, eng tizia nge ni tih hriatna'n Mordekaia hnenah a kaltir a." 
Esther4:6 Chutichuan, Hathaka chu lal kawt hung kawngka zawna mual zau laiah, Mordekaia hnenah chuan a va kal a." 
Esther4:7 Tin, Mordekaia chuan a chunga thil lo thleng zawng zawng leh Judate tihhlumna tura lal sum zinga dah tura Hamanan tangka pek a tiam zat chiahte a lo hrilh a." 
Esther4:8 Tin, Estheri entir tur leh a awmzia hrilhfiah turte leh lal hnena dilsak turin an tir a, anmahni tihboralna tura Susan-a an puan thupek ziak chhawn a pe bawk a." 
Esther4:9 Tin, Hathaka chuan Mordekaia thuchahte chu Estheri a va hrilh a." 
Esther4:10 ,11 Tichuan Hathaka chu Estheri chuan a lo bia a, ""Lal chhiahhlawhte lal ram then tina mite chuan, tu pawh hmeichhia pawh mipa pawh tihhluma a awm lohna'na lalin rangkachak tiang a lama a lehnate chauh lo chu lal hnena a in chhung rila lut chu tihhlum zel tur ani tih dan awm chu an hre theuh a; hei, ni sawmthum chhung chu lal hnena lut turin koh ka la ni lo a,"" tiin Mordekaia hnena sawi turin thu a chah a." 
Esther4:11 ,10 Tichuan Hathaka chu Estheri chuan a lo bia a, ""Lal chhiahhlawhte lal ram then tina mite chuan, tu pawh hmeichhia pawh mipa pawh tihhluma a awm lohna'na lalin rangkachak tiang a lama a lehnate chauh lo chu lal hnena a in chhung rila lut chu tihhlum zel tur ani tih dan awm chu an hre theuh a; hei, ni sawmthum chhung chu lal hnena lut turin koh ka la ni lo a,"" tiin Mordekaia hnena sawi turin thu a chah a." 
Esther4:12 Tin, Estheri thuchah chu Mordekaia an hrilh a." 
Esther4:13 Tin, Mordekaia chuan Estheri a va chhantir leh a, ""Juda mi zawng awngten an pumpelh loh tur chu lal inna chuan i pumpelh dawn bik emaw tih inring suh." 
Esther4:14 Tun hun anga i ngawih mai mai chuan hmun danga Judate tan himna leh chhuahna a lo awm pawhin nang leh i pa chhungte chu kan boral ang; lal nihna i lo chan hi hetih hun atan ngei hian a ni dawn lo'm ni? va ti turin a tir a. 
Esther4:15 Chutichuan Estheri chuan Mordekaia va chhang leh tur chuan a tir a," 
Esther4:16 Susan-a awm Juda mi zawng zawng ko khawm vek la, keimah avangin chaw nghei u la, ni thum leh zan thum engmah ei lo leh in loin awm rawh u; kei leh ka nulahote pawhin kan nghei ve ang a; tin, dan lo angin lal hnenah ka lut ang a; tin, ka boral leh ka boral a ni mai ang,"" tiin.Chutichuan Mordekaia chu a kal a, Estherin thu a pek zawng zawng ang chuan a ti a." 
Esther4:17 Chutichuan Mordekaia chu a kal a, Estherin thu a pek zawng zawng ang chuan a ti a." 
Esther5:1 Tin, ni thum ni chuan heti hi a ni a, Estheri chuan a lal silhfen a inbel a, lal rorelna in zawn taka lal in hung chhungah chuan a va ding a, lal chu lal thutthlengah a in luhna hawiin a thu a." 
Esther5:2 Tin, lalnu Estheri chu lal kawt hung chhunga a ding lalin a han hmuh chuan a chungah a lawm a; lal chuan a rangkachak lal tiang ken chu Estheri lamah chuan a han lek a. Chutichuan Estheri chuan a va hnaih a, lal tiang hmawr chu a han khawih a." 
Esther5:3 Tin, lal chuan a hnenah, ""Lalnu Esther, eng nge i duh le? Eng nge dil i duh? Ka ram zatve hial pawh ka pe ang che,"" a ti a." 
Esther5:4 Tin, Estheri chuan, ""Lalin tha a tihzawng a nih chuan, vawiin atana ruai ka buatsaih ei turin lal leh Hamana lo kal teh se,"" a ti a." 
Esther5:5 Tin, lal chuan, ""Estheri sawi ang chuan Hamana chu han ko thuai rawh u,"" a ti a. Chutichuan lal leh Hamana chuan Estheri ruai buatsaih chu ei turin an kal a." 
Esther5:6 Tin, an uain ruaiah chuan lalin Estheri hnenah, ""Eng nge i dil dawn? Pek i ni ang, eng nge ni i duh? Ka ram zatve hial pawh pek i ni ang, "" a ti a." 
Esther5:7 Tin, Estheri chuan, ""Ka thil dil leh ka thil ngen chu," 
Esther5:8 lal mittlung ka nih a, ka thil dil chu lalin pek rem a tihzawng a nih a, ka thil ngen chu tih rem a tih zawng a nih chuan, lal leh Hamana chuan ka ruai buatsaih chu ei turin lo kal se la, lal tih ang chuan naktukah hian ka ti mai ang,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Esther5:9 Chutihchuan Hamana chu chu mi ni chuan hlim tak leh lawm takin a chhuak ta a; nimahsela Hamana chuan lal kawt hung kawngkaa Mordekaia chu a hmaa lo ding leh che chang lo a han hmuh chuan, Mordekaia chungah chuan a thinur ta em em mai a;" 
Esther5:10 amaherawhchu Hamana chu a insum hram hram a, a haw ta a; a thiante leh a nupui Zeresi chu a kohtir a." 
Esther5:11 Tichuan, Hamana chuan a sum leh pai ropuizia te, fa a ngahzia te, lalin a kaisantirna thil zawng zawng te, lal puipate leh a mite dang aia a tihchungnunna te an hnenah a sawi a." 
Esther5:12 Chuti chauh pawh ni loin, ""lalnu Estheri chuan le, a ruaithehah chuan keimah chauh lo chu tumah lal hnenah a teltir lo a; naktukah hian lal nen min sawm a ni." 
Esther5:13 Nimahsela Juda mi Mordekaia lal kawt hung kawngkaa thu ka hmuh chhung chuan he'ng zawng zawng hi ka tan engmah hnemhnanna a awm lo,"" a ti bawk a.Chutichuan a nupui Zeresi leh a thiante zawng zawng chuan a hnenah, ""Tawng sawmngaa sangin awhhlumna siamtir la, tin, Mordekaia chu awhhlumtir turin zingah lal hrilh la; ruaithehnaah chuan lal hnenah hlim takin kal mai rawh,"" an ti a. Chu chuan Hamana chu a tilawm a, awhhlumna chu a siamtir a." 
Esther5:14 Chutichuan a nupui Zeresi leh a thiante zawng zawng chuan a hnenah, ""Tawng sawmngaa sangin awhhlumna siamtir la, tin, Mordekaia chu awhhlumtir turin zingah lal hrilh la; ruaithehnaah chuan lal hnenah hlim takin kal mai rawh,"" an ti a. Chu chuan Hamana chu a tilawm a, awhhlumna chu a siamtir a." 
Esther6:1 Chu mi zan chuan lal chu a muhil thei lo a; lal chanchin ziakna bu rawn la turin thu a pe a, a hmaah chuan an chhiar a." 
Esther6:2 Bigthana leh Teresa, lal pindan vengtu, kawngkhar vengtu pahnihten lal Ahasuera chunga kutthlak an tum thu Mordekaian a lo hriattir thu ziak chu an han hmu chhuak a." 
Esther6:3 Tin, lal chuan, ""Chu mi thu avang chuan Mordekaia hian eng ang chawimawina leh ropuina nge a hmuh phah le?"" a ti a. Lal chhiahhlawh, a rawngbawl thinte chuan, ""Engmah tihsak a hlawh lo,"" an ti a." 
Esther6:4 Tin, lal chuan, ""Tunge ni kawt hung chhunga awm saw?"" a ti a. Chumi lai chuan Hamana chu a awhhlumna siama Mordekaia awhhlumtir tur thu lal hnena sawi turin lal kawt hung pawn zawk chhungah chuan a lo kal a ni a." 
Esther6:5 Tin, lal chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnenah, ""Ngai teh lal kawt hung chhunga awm chu Hamana a ni,"" an ti a. Tin, lal chuan, ""Lo lut rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Esther6:6 Chutichuan Hamana chu a lut a. Tin, lal chuan ahnenah, ""Lalin mi chawimawi a duha chu eng tihsak nge tha ang le?"" a ti a. Tichuan Hamana chuan, ""Lalin keimah aia a chawimawi duhzawng tu nge awm ang?"" a tirilru a." 
Esther6:7 Tichuan Hamana chuan lal hnenah, ""Lalin a chawimawi duh chu," 
Esther6:8 lain a inbel thin lal puan te, lal chuan thinna sakawrte, lallukhum, lalin a khum thin te rawn laksak ni se la;" 
Esther6:9 tin, lalin a chawimawi duha chu thuamna'n lal puan leh sakawr chu lal upa min ber kutah pek ni se la, chuantir se la, kawtthler fanpui se la, a hmaah chuan, 'Lalin a chawimawi duha chu hetiang hian tih a ni ang,' tiin puang zel se la,"" a ti a." 
Esther6:10 Chutichuan lal chuan Hamana hnenah, ""I sawi ang chuan lal puan leh sakawr chu va la thuai thuai la, lal kawt hung kawngkaa thu thin, Juda mi Mordekaia chungah chutiang tak chuan ti rawh; i sawi tak zawng zawng kha hmaih awm hauh suh se,"" a ti a." 
Esther6:11 Chutichuan Hamana chuan lal puan leh sakawr chu a va la a, Mordekaia chu a thuam a, kawtthlerah a chuan veltir a, ahmaah chuan, ""Lalin a chawimawi duha chu hetiang hian tih a ni ang, "" tiin a puang a." 
Esther6:12 Tin, Mordekaia chu lal kawt hung kawngkaah chuan a lo kal leh a. Hamana erawh chu ngui takin inlukhuhin a in lamah a haw ta var mai a." 
Esther6:13 Tin, Hamana chuan a nupui Zeresi leh a thian zawng zawngte hnenah chuan a chunga thil lo awm dan zawng zawngte chu ahrilh a. Tichuan a mi fingte leh anupui Zeresi chuan ahnenah, ""Tawh sual i tawhna Mordekaia chu Juda mi a nih chuan i chelh lo tawp ang a, a hmaah chuan i che sual ngei ang,"" an ti a.Chutia a hnena an sawi lai mek chuan lal pindan vengtute chu an va kal a, Estheri buatsaih ruai thehnaa kal tur chuan Hamana chu hmanhmawh takin an hruai ta a." 
Esther6:14 Chutia a hnena an sawi lai mek chuan lal pindan vengtute chu an va kal a, Estheri buatsaih ruai thehnaa kal tur chuan Hamana chu hmanhmawh takin an hruai ta a." 
Esther7:1 Chutichuan lal leh Hamana chuan lalnu Estheri ruai chu an kilpui a. 
Esther7:2 Tin, a ni hnih nia uaiin an in lai chuan lal chuan Estheri hnenah, ""Lalnu Esther, eng nge i duh le: Pek i ni ang. Eng nge ni i dil dawn? Ram zatve hial pawh pek i ni ang,"" a ti leh a." 
Esther7:3 Chutichuan lalnu Estheri chuan, ""Aw lalpa, i mittlung ka nih a, lal remtihzawng a nih chuan, ka duh chu ka nuna min zuahsak a ni a, ka dil chu ka chipuite nunna zuah a ni;" 
Esther7:4 kei leh ka chipuite chu tihborala thah vek tura tih kan ni a; ahmei apain bawihah hralh tura tih ni lek i la chu engmah ka sawi lo tur; mahse tihmang tur kan ni a, lal tan a hek hle ang, hmelmapa chuan a rul seng lo ang,"" a ti a, a chhang a." 
Esther7:5 Chutichuan, lal Ahasuera chu a tawng ta a, lalnu Estheri hnenah chuan, ""A rilru pawha chutiang han tingam chu tu nge a nih a, khawiah nge a awm?"" a ti a." 
Esther7:6 Tin, Estheri chuan, ""Taitu leh hmelma a ni, he mi sualpa Hamana hi a ni,"" a ti a. Chutichuan lalnu leh LALPA hmaah Hamana chu a khur ta a." 
Esther7:7 Tin, lal chu a zu ruaithehna ata chu thinurin a tho a, lal huanah a lut a; tin, Hamana chu lalnu Estheri hnena a nuna zuahsak dilin a ding a; lal chuan a chungah thil tha lo tih tum awm taka a hriat avangin." 
Esther7:8 Chutichuan lal chu lal huan ata chu uain ruaithehna hmunah chuan a kal leh a; Hamana chu Estheri thutna, thutthlengah chuan a tlu der mai a. Chutichuan lal chuan, ""He inah ka mit hmuh ngeiah lalnu chu a tilui elo maw?"" a ti a. Chutia lal a tawng veleh chuan Hamana hmai chu an khuh ta a." 
Esther7:9 Chutichuan lal pindan vengtu zinga pakhat lal hmaa lo awm Harbona chuan, ""Ngai teh, lal tana thu tha sawitu Mordekaia awhhlumna'na tawng sawmngaa sang, Hamana siam sa diam awhhlumna Hamana inah a awm,"" a ti a. Tin, lal chuan, ""Chu miah chuan awhhlumtir rawh u,"" a ti a.Chutichuan Mordekaia awhhlumna tura a buatsaihah chuan Hamana chu an awhhlumtir ta a. Tichuan lal thinurna chu a lo dai ta a." 
Esther7:10 Chutichuan Mordekaia awhhlumna tura a buatsaihah chuan Hamana chu an awhhlumtir ta a. Tichuan lal thinurna chu a lo dai ta a. 
Esther8:1 Chu mi ni chuan Judate hmelma Hamana in chu lal Ahasuera chuan lalnu Estheri a pe a. Tin, Mordekaia chu lal hmaah a lo kal a; Estheri chuan a eng nge a nih a lo hrilh tawh a." 
Esther8:2 Tin, lal chuan Hamana a laksak, a zungbun chu a phawi a, Mordekaia a pe a. Tin, Estheri chuan Mordekaia chu Hamana in chhung hotuah a siam a." 
Esther8:3 Tin, Estheri chuan lal hmaah chuan thu a sawi leh a, a ke bulah abawk a, mittui tla chungin Agag mi aman thil tha lo tih tum Judate chunga a remruat chu tihbo a dil a." 
Esther8:4 Tin, lal chuan rangkachak tiang chu Estheri lamah chuan a han lek phei a. Chutichuan Estheri chu a tho a, lal hmaah chuan a ding a," 
Esther8:5 Lal tha tihzawng a nih a, a mittlung ka nih a, lal ngaiha a dik a, a lawmzawng ka nih chuan Agag mi Hamedatha fapa Hamana remruat lehkha, lal ram then zawng zawnga mi Judate tihboral vek tur tih a ziak chu tih leh loh turin ziak ni se la;" 
Esther8:6 engtin nge ka chipuite chunga thil tha lo, lo thleng han hmuh chu ka tuar zawh ang? Engtin nge ka laichinte boral han hmuh chu ka tuar zawh ang?"" a ti a." 
Esther8:7 Chutichuan lal Ahasuera chuan lalnu Estheri leh Juda mi Mordekaia hnenah chuan, ""Ngai teh u, Judate chunga a kut a thlak avangin Hamana in chu Estheri ka pe e, amah pawh chu an awhhlumtir ta a." 
Esther8:8 Tin, Judate hnenah i duh ang takin lal hminga thawn tur lehkha ziak bawk la, lal zungbuna nemin char rawh; lal hminga ziak leh lal zungbuna nem leh char chu tuma'n an tidanglam thei lo a ni,"" a ti a." 
Esther8:9 Chutichuan lal lehkha ziaktute chu chu mi lai la la, thla thumna, Sivan thla ni sawmhnih leh ni thum niin an ko a, Mordekaia thupek ang chuan Judate hnenah te, hotute hnenah te, India atanga Ethiopia thlenga ram then hrang za leh sawmhnih leh pasariha ram awptute leh puipate hnena thawn turin lehkha an ziak a, ram then tinah chuan anmahni lehkha theuhin, hnam tin anmahni tawng theuhin, Judate hnenah pawh an lehkha leh an tawngin an thawn a." 
Esther8:10 Lal Ahasuera hmingin a ziak a, lal zungbunin an nem a, lehkha chu sakawr an phurhtir a, ama vulh thiau, lal tana chhawr thin sabengtung chak mi chunga chuangin an tlanpui a." 
Esther8:11 Tin, chu mi lehkhaah chuan lal chuan Judahote khaw tina awmte chu inpunkhawma lo inveng him turin a ti a. Khawi rama mi pawh anmahni bei tura lo thawk tawh phawt chu, lo beileta an fanaute leh an hmeichhiate pawh rawk turin a phalsak a." 
Esther8:12 Lal Ahasuera ram then zawng zawng chhungah; chu thupek chu thla sawm leh thla hnihna, Adar thla ni sawm leh ni thum ni, Juda zawng zawng thah vek tura ruat niah chuan hman tur a ni." 
Esther8:13 Tin, chu mi lehkhaa thupek chu, chu mi nia an hmelmate chunga phuba an lak theihna tura Judate chu inpeih diama an lo awm theihna'n ram then zawng zawngaa thawn chhuah a, mi zawng zawng hnena puan tur, tih a ni." 
Esther8:14 Chutichuan hmanhmawh takin lal thupekin lal tana chhawr thin sabengtung chak mi chunga chuang lehkha tlanpuitute chu an chhuak a; tin, thupek chu lal khawpui Susan-a puan chhuah a ni." 
Esther8:15 Tin, Mordekaia chu lal puan, a dumpawl leh a var inbelin, rangkachak lallukhum ropui tak leh puan zai sin kawrfual senduk inbelin lal in ata chu a chhuak a; Susan khua chu an au dur dur a, an lawm em em a." 
Esther8:16 Juda-ho chuan eng te, lawmna te, hlimna te, chawimawina te an nei a.Lal thupek leh lal thu tihtluk thlenna ram then leh khua apiangah chuan lawmna leh hlimna an nei a, ruaite an theh a, awm nite an kham a. Tin, chung rama mite zinga tam tak chu Juda-ah an insiam a; Judate chu an lo hlau ta a." 
Esther8:17 Lal thupek leh lal thu tihtluk thlenna ram then leh khua apiangah chuan lawmna leh hlimna an nei a, ruaite an theh a, awm nite an kham a. Tin, chung rama mite zinga tam tak chu Juda-ah an insiam a; Judate chu an lo hlau ta a." 
Esther9:1 Chutichuan, thla sawm leh thla hnihna, Adar thla, ni sawm leh ni thum ni, Juda-ho hmelmaten an chunga rorel an beisei ni, lal thupek anga an tih ni tur chu a lo hnai ta a; nimahsela a leh alingin Judaten anmahni hawtute chunga ro an relna a lo ni ta zawk a;" 
Esther9:2 lal Ahasuera ram then zawng zawnga Judahote chu an chhiatna zawngtu chunga kut thlak turin an khuaahte chuan an pungkhawm a; tuma'n an chelh ta lo a, anmahni chu mi zawng zawngin an hlau ta a." 
Esther9:3 Chu mi ram thena mi tha zawng zawng te, hotu te, ram awptu te, lal hnathawkutte chuan Judate chu an tanpui ta a, Mordekaia an hlauh avangin." 
Esther9:4 Mordekaia chu lal ina mi ropui tak a ni a, a hming chu an ram then zawng zawngah a thang ta bawk a; Mordekaia chu a ropui ta deuh deuh a ni." 
Esther9:5 Tin, Judate chuan an hmelmate chu khandaihin an sam a, an that a, an tiboral a, anmahni hawtute chungah an duh ang angin an ti a." 
Esther9:6 Lal in Susan-ah chuan Judaten mi zanga an that a, an tiboral a." 
Esther9:7 7-10, Tin, Hamedatha fapa, Judate hmelma Hamana fapate sawm, Parsandatha te, Dalphona te, Aspatha te, Poratha te, Adalia te, Aridatha te, Pernasta te, Arisaia te, Aridaia te, Vaizatha te an tihlum a; rallak sum erawh chu an khawih lo." 
Esther9:8 7-10 Tin, Hamedatha fapa, Judate hmelma Hamana fapate sawm, Parsandatha te, Dalphona te, Aspatha te, Poratha te, Adalia te, Aridatha te, Pernasta te, Arisaia te, Aridaia te, Vaizatha te an tihlum a; rallak sum erawh chu an khawih lo." 
Esther9:9 7-10 Tin, Hamedatha fapa, Judate hmelma Hamana fapate sawm, Parsandatha te, Dalphona te, Aspatha te, Poratha te, Adalia te, Aridatha te, Pernasta te, Arisaia te, Aridaia te, Vaizatha te an tihlum a; rallak sum erawh chu an khawih lo." 
Esther9:10 7-10, Tin, Hamedatha fapa, Judate hmelma Hamana fapate sawm, Parsandatha te, Dalphona te, Aspatha te, Poratha te, Adalia te, Aridatha te, Pernasta te, Arisaia te, Aridaia te, Vaizatha te an tihlum a; rallak sum erawh chu an khawih lo." 
Esther9:11 Chu mi ni chuan lal khawpui Susan-a an thah zat chu lal hmaah an rawn thlen a. 
Esther9:12 Tin, lal chuan lalnu Estheri hnenah, ""Judate chuan lal khawpui Susan-ah hian mi zanga leh Hamana fapate sawm an that a, an tiboral ta, lal ram then dangah chuan engtin tak ang maw! Eng nge i dil dawn le? Pek i ni ang; eng nge i la duh leh dawn? tih ani ngei ang,"" a ti a." 
Esther9:13 Tin, Estheri chuan, ""Lalin rem a tih chuan, Susan-a Judate hian vawiina thupek ang bawk hian naktukah pawh ti se la. Hamana fapa sawmte chu awhhlumnaah khai kan ni rawh se,"" a ti a." 
Esther9:14 Tin, lal chuan chutianga ti tur chuan thu a pe a; Susanah thupek chu an puang a. Hamana fapa sawmte chu an khai kang a." 
Esther9:15 Tin, Susan-a Judate chu Adar thla, ni sawm leh ni li ni pawhin an pung khawm a, Susan-ah mi zathum an that a; nimahsela rallak sum chu an khawih lo." 
Esther9:16 Tin, Juda dang lal ram then tina awmte pawh an pung khawm a, inchhanhim turin tan an khawh a, an hmelmate lakah ralmuangin an awm a, anmahni hawtute zinga mi singsarih leh sangnga an that a; nimahsela rallak sum chu an khawih lo." 
Esther9:17 Adar thla ni sawm leh ni thu niin chu chu an ti a, tin, ni sawm leh ni li ni chuan an chawl a, ruaitheh ni leh hlimna niah an siam a." 
Esther9:18 Susan-a Judate erawh chu chu mi ni, ni sawm leh ni thum leh ni sawm leh ni li ni chuan an pung khawm a; ni sawm leh ni nga ni chuan an chawl a, ruaitheh ni leh hlimna niah an siam a." 
Esther9:19 Chuvang chuan a ni, kulh nei lo khuatea Judate chuan Adar thla ni sawm leh ni li chu hlimna leh ruaithehna ni leh ni ropui leh ei tur inpek tawnna niah an siam ni." 
Esther9:20 Tin, Mordekaia chuan chung thil chu a ziak a, lal Ahasuera ram thente chhunga Judate zawng zawng, lamhnai leh lamhlaa mite lehkha a thawn a," 
Esther9:21 21-22, Adar thla, ni sawm leh ni li ni leh ni sawm leh ni nga ni chu kum tin, awm nia hman turin thu a pe a; chu mi ni chuan Judate chu an hmelmate laka ralmuanga an awm tak avang leh chu mi thlaa lungngaihna chu an tan lawmna a chan tak a, tahna ni chu lawmawm taka a lo chan tak avangin; tin ruaitheh ni leh hlimna ni leh chanvo inthawn ni leh mi retheite thilpek ni atana siam turin thu a pe bawk a." 
Esther9:22 21-22, Adar thla, ni sawm leh ni li ni leh ni sawm leh ni nga ni chu kum tin, awm nia hman turin thu a pe a; chu mi ni chuan Judate chu an hmelmate laka ralmuanga an awm tak avang leh chu mi thlaa lungngaihna chu an tan lawmna a chan tak a, tahna ni chu lawmawm taka a lo chan tak avangin; tin ruaitheh ni leh hlimna ni leh chanvo inthawn ni leh mi retheite thilpek ni atana siam turin thu a pe bawk a." 
Esther9:23 Tichuan an lo tih tan tawh sa ang leh Mordekaian an hnena a thawn angin Judate chuan tih an tum ta a; 
Esther9:24 Agag mi Hamedatha fapa Hamana, Judate hmelma chuan Judate chu tiboral turin a phiar a, Aienna a lo siam tawh diam si a, chu chu anmahni timang tur leh tiboral tura aienna a ni:" 
Esther9:25 nimahsela lal hmaa chu thu chu a lo thlen chuan suahsualthlak taka Judate a phiarna chu ama lu chungah a let ang a, amah leh a fapate chu khaikan tur ani tih lehkhain thu a pe a ni." 
Esther9:26 Tin, chu aienna avang chuan chung nite chu Aien nite an ti a. Chutichuan chung lehkha thu zawng zawng avang te, chung thil lo thleng an hmuh avang te, an chunga thil lo thleng avangte chuan." 
Esther9:27 Judate chuan anmahni chhanah leh an thlahte leh anmahni rawn bel apiangte chhanah thlasik anga khel loin chung nite chu lehkha thawna chuang ang leh a hun ruat ang tak chuan kum tin, awm nia hmang turin an ti a;" 
Esther9:28 tin, chung nite chuan chhuan zawng zawng a chhungkaw tinah, ram then tinah, khaw tinah, an hre rengin awm niah an hmang tur a ni; tin, chung Aien nite chu Judate zingah ngaihthah mai tur ani lo a, chu mi hriat rengna pawh an thlahteah tawp mai tur ani lo an ti a." 
Esther9:29 Chutichuan Abihaila fanu, lalnu Estheri leh Juda mi Mordekaia chuan Aien chungchanga lehkha thawn pahnihna chu tinghet turin thu nei takin an ziak a." 
Esther9:30 Tin, Ahasuera ram then za leh sawmhnih leh pasariha Juda-ho zawng zawng hnenah chuan tha takin lehkha an thawn a." 
Esther9:31 Juda mi Mordekaia leh Lalnu Estheri thupek ang leh anmahni ngei pawhin anmahni leh an thlahte tana chaw nghei leh tah ni tura an lo ruat angin he'ng Aien nite hi an hun ruatah an serh tur a ni,"" tiin.Aien kut hman dan chu Estheri thupekin lehkhaah ziak a ni." 
Esther9:32 Aien kut hman dan chu Estheri thupekin lehkhaah ziak a ni. 
Esther10:1 Chutichuan, lal Ahasuera chuan a ram leh tuifinriat thliarkarte chu chhiah a chawitir a." 
Esther10:2 A thiltihthiehna leh a chaknaa a thiltih zawng zawng leh Mordekaia ropuina chungchang, lalin a tihchungnun dan thu kimchang takin Medai leh Persia lalte lal lai chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a ni lo'm ni?Juda mi, Mordekaia chu lal Ahasuera dawttu ani a, Judate zingah chuan mi ropui tak, a unaute tam tak lung tiawi a, a chipuite thatna zawng a, a hnampuite zawng zawng hnena thlamuanna thu sawi thin a ni a." 
Esther10:3 Juda mi, Mordekaia chu lal Ahasuera dawttu ani a, Judate zingah chuan mi ropui tak, a unaute tam tak lung tiawi a, a chipuite thatna zawng a, a hnampuite zawng zawng hnena thlamuanna thu sawi thin a ni a." 
Job1:1 Uz ramah chuan mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Joba a ni; chu mi chu mi famkim, mi ngil tak, Pathian tih mi, thil tha lo laka insum thei mi a ni a." 
Job1:2 Tin, fapa pasarih leh fanu pathum a nei a." 
Job1:3 A neihnunzia chu, beram sangsarih, sanghawngsei sangthum, bawngpa tuak zanga, sabengtungpui zanga leh chhiahhlawh tam tak a nei a ni: tichuan he mi hi khaw chhak fate zingah chuan mi ropui ber a ni a." 
Job1:4 Tin, a fapate chuan an inah an hun zelah ruai intheh chhawkin an kal khawm thin a, an farnu pathumte chu an hnena ei leh in turin an sawm thin a." 
Job1:5 Tin, chutia an ruai thehte an zawh hnuah chuan Joba chuan anmahni a ko a, a thian hlawm a; zing takah a tho a, an zaa hming kimin halral inthawi a hlan a: Joba chuan, ""Ka fapate hian thil an lo tisualin Pathian an lo sawi chhia a ni mahna,"" a ti a ni. Joba chuan hetiang hian a ti fo thin a ni." 
Job1:6 Tin, Pathian fapate LALPA hmaa an inlan ni a lo awm a, Setana pawh an zingah a lo tel ve a." 
Job1:7 Tichuan LALPA chuan Setana hnenah chuan, ""Khawi lam atanga lo kal nge i nih?"" a ti a. Tin, Setana chuan LALPA chu a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Leia ka vahvelna atang leh ka chhohna atangin, "" a ti a." 
Job1:8 Tin, LALPA chuan Setana hnenah, ""Ka chhiahhlawh Joba hi i ngaihtuah ngai em? Lei chungah hian amah anga famkim, mi ngil, Pathian tih mi, thil tha lo laka insum thei mi tumah an awm lo a sin,"" a ti a." 
Job1:9 Tichuan, Setana chuan LALPA chu a chhang a, a hnenah, ""Joba chuan vang awm loin a tih em ni?" 
Job1:10 Amah chu a in nen, a neih zawng zawng nen, kil tinah i hung vel a ni lo'm ni? A kut hnathawh mal i sawm a, he ramah hian a lo neinung sawt em em atin a ni." 
Job1:11 Tunah hian i kut thawh la, a neih zawng zawng hi han khawihsak teh, i hmaichhan ngeiah a sawichhe mai ang che,"" a ti a." 
Job1:12 Tin, LALPA chuan Setana hnenah chuan, ""Ngai rawh, a neih zawng zawng chu i kutah a awm e, amah tak erawh chu khawih suh ang che,"" a ti a. Tichuan, Setana chu LALPA hma ata a chhuak ta a." 
Job1:13 Ni khat chu a fanu a fapaten an u ber inah chaw an ei a, uain an in laiin," 
Job1:14 Joba hnenah chuan zualko a lo tlan a, ""bawngpate chuan lei an hrut laia sabengtungte an kianga an tlat lain," 
Job1:15 Seba miten an rawn bei a, an la a, chhiahhlawhte chu khandaihin an that a, keimah chauh hi hrilh tur chein ka lo chhuak a ni,"" a rawn ti a." 
Job1:16 A la sawi lai mek chuan mi dang a lo tlan leh a, van atangin Pathian mei a lo tla a, beramte leh chhiahhlawhte chu a kang a, a tiral vek mai a, keimah chauh hi hrilh tur chein ka lo chhuak a ni,"" a ti a." 
Job1:17 A la sawi lai mek chuan mi dang a lo tlan leh a, ""Kaldai-ho pawl thumah an insiam a, sanghawngseite chu an rawn bei a, an la vek a; a ni, chhiahhlawhte pawh chu an that a, keimah chauh hi hrilh tur chein ka lo chhuak a ni,"" a ti a." 
Job1:18 A la sawi lai mek chuan mi dang a lo la tlan leh a, ""I fanu te, i fapaten an u ber ina chaw an ei a, uain an in laiin," 
Job1:19 Ngai teh, thlaler atangin thlipui a lo thawk a, in chu kil liah a rawn nam a, nula-tlangvalhote chu a delh a, an thi ta vek mai, keimah chauh hi hrilh tur chein ka chhuak a ni,"" a ti a." 
Job1:20 Tichuan, Joba chu a tho a, a puan a pawt thler a, a lu a ziat kawlh a, leiah a tlu a, Pathian a bia a." 
Job1:21 Ka nu pum ata saruakin ka lo chhuak a, saruak vekin ka kir leh dawn a nih hi; LALPA'n a pe a, LALPA'n a la leh ta a; LALPA hming chu fakin awm rawh se,"" a ti a.Heng zawng zawngah hian Joba chu a sual lo a, Pathian chu a mawhchhiat hek lo." 
Job1:22 Heng zawng zawngah hian Joba chu a sual lo a, Pathian chu a mawhchhiat hek lo." 
Job2:1 Pathian fapate LALPA hmaa an inlan ni a lo awm leh a, Setana pawh LALPA hmaa inlan turin an zingah a lo kal ve a." 
Job2:2 Tin, LALPA chuan Setana hnenah, ""Khawi lam atanga lo kal nge i nih?"" a ti a. Tin, Setana chuan LALPA chu a chhang a, ""Leia ka vahvelna atang leh ka chhuk ka chhohna atangin,"" a ti a." 
Job2:3 Tin, LALPA chuan Setana hnenah chuan, ""Ka chhiahhlawh Joba hi i ngaihtuah ngai em? Amah anga mi famkim, mi ngil Pathian tih mi, thil tha lo laka insum thei mi hi leiah tumah an awm lo a sin, vang awm loa mi tihchhiattir chung pawhin a ngai reng a la ni,"" a ti a." 
Job2:4 Tin, Setanan LALPA chu a chhang a, ""Vun aiah vun tih a ni a, a ni, miin a neih zawng zawng a nunna atan a pe phal ang chu!" 
Job2:5 Tunah i kut thawh la, a ruh leh a tisa ngei khawihsak teh, i hmaichhan ngeiah a sawichhe mai ang che,"" a ti a." 
Job2:6 Tin, LALPA chuan Setana hnenah, ""Ngai rawh, i kutah a awm e, a nunna erawh chu zuah ang che,"" a ti a." 
Job2:7 Chutichuan, Setana chu LALPA hma ata a chhuak a, Joba chu a kephah hnuai atangin a lu thlengin panchhia a veitir a." 
Job2:8 A inhiahna'n lampei a la a, vut zingah a thu a." 
Job2:9 Tichuan, a nupui chuan a hnenah, ""I ngai rengin em ni i awm dawn? Pathian chu sawichhia la, thi la a ni mai,"" a ti a." 
Job2:10 Mahse, ani chuan ahnenah, ""Nang hi hmeichhe a tawngin i tawng a nih hi. Eng nge, Pathian hnen ata thil tha kan hmu a, thil tha lo pawh kan hmu lo ang em ni?"" a ti a. Heng zawng zawngah hian Joba chuan thu sual a sawi lo." 
Job2:11 Tin, Joba thian pathumte chuan he'ng thil tha lo a chunga lo thleng zawng zawng hi an hriat chuan mahni hmun theuh atangin an lo kal a; Elifaza temani mi leh Bildada Shuhi mi leh Zofara Naamathi mite chu: amah tuarpui tur leh thlamuan tura a hnena lo kal hun an ruat tlang a." 
Job2:12 Hla deuh atanga an han en chuan an hre lo a, an rawl an chhuah a, an tap a; an puante an pawt thler a, an lu chungah vaivut an vanvawrh a.Chutichuan, ni sarih leh zan sarih leiah an thutpui a, tumahin a hennah thu kam khat mah an sawi lo; a natna chu na emin an hria a ni." 
Job2:13 Chutichuan, ni sarih leh zan sarih leiah an thutpui a, tumahin a hennah thu kam khat mah an sawi lo; a natna chu na emin an hria a ni." 
Job3:1 Hetih hnu hian Joba chuan a ka a ang a, a pianna ni chu anchhia a lawh ta a." 
Job3:2 Tichuan Joba chuan, heti hian a sawi a:" 
Job3:3 Ka pianna ni chu boral rawh se, Mipa fa a pai ta e, tihna zan nen chuan." 
Job3:4 Chu ni chu thim lo ni se, Chung lam atangin Pathianin ngaihsak lo se; Eng pawh chu a chungah eng suh se;" 
Job3:5 Thim leh thihna hlim chuan an ta atan chuhse, Chhumin bawh reng mai se la; Chhun tithimtu zawng zawng khan tihlau rawh se." 
Job3:6 Chu zan chu zawng thimin chelh reng mai se la, Chu kuma nite zingah chuan him ve lo se la; Thla chhiarna zingah pawh lo tel suh se." 
Job3:7 Chu zan chu zan khawhar lo ni se, tah chuan hlim thawm leng suh se." 
Job3:8 Ni anchhelawh thiamte chuan anchhia lawh rawh se, Leviathan chawh thawh thiamte chuan." 
Job3:9 A vartian arsi chu thim se la, Eng lo nghak se, hmu si lo se la. Zing khawfingchat pawh hmu hek suhse:" 
Job3:10 Ka nu chhul kawngka a lo khar loh avang leh Ka mithmuha buaina a thup hek loh avangin. 
Job3:11 Engati nge chhula ka lo thih loh? Engati nge pum ata ka chhuaha ka thaw a lo tawp loh? 
Job3:12 Engah nge mal chunga mi lo chawi? Engah nge ka hnek tur hnutein mi lo hmuah? 
Job3:13 Chutin ka mu ang a, ka reh riai tawh tur; Ka muhil ang a, ka chawl tawh tur:" 
Job3:14 Lei lalte leh remruatpuitute, Hmun ram lo indinsaktute nen chuan;" 
Job3:15 A nih loh leh, hotute rangkachak sum neia, Tangkaa an in tikhatute nen chuan:" 
Job3:16 A nih loh leh, a hun loa piang thup bo ang ka ni tawh tur, Nausen eng hmu ngai lote ang mai hian." 
Job3:17 Tah chuan mi suaksualten chawhbuai an bang a, Tah chuan mi chaute pawh an chawl a." 
Job3:18 Tah chuan mi tangte an chawl hahdam hlawm a, Vengtu aw pawh an hre lo." 
Job3:19 Tah chuan mi lian mi te an awm za a. Chhiahhlawh pawh a pu lakah a fihlim. 
Job3:20 Engah nge hreawm tuar hnenah eng pek a niha, Engah nge rilrua mangang hnenah nunna pek a nih?" 
Job3:21 Thih chak em ema, hmu si lo, Ro phum zawn aia nasaa zawngtu," 
Job3:22 Thlan an hmuha lawma, nasa taka hlim em em tur hnenah chuan?" 
Job3:23 Mi a kawng thup bosaka hnenah engati nge eng pek a nih? Pathianin huang a hung hnan hnenah chuan? 
Job3:24 Ka ei dawn pawhin ka thaw a pik a, Ka rum chu tui angin a luang chhuak a." 
Job3:25 Ka tihzawng tak ka chungah a lo thleng a, ka hlauhzawng tak ka hnenah a lo thleng.Ka hahdam lo a, ka awm hle hle thei lo a, ka chawl thei hek lo; buaina a lo thleng zawk a ni." 
Job3:26 Ka hahdam lo a, ka awm hle hle thei lo a, ka chawl thei hek lo; buaina a lo thleng zawk a ni." 
Job4:1 Tichuan, Elifaza Temani mi chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job4:2 I hnenah thu kam khat sawi i la, i hua ang em? Mahse, tawng loin tu nge insum thei ang le?" 
Job4:3 Ngai teh, mi tam tak i lo zirtir a, Kut chak lote i tichak tawh a." 
Job4:4 I thuin tlute a tungding a, Khup zawite chu i tichak a." 
Job4:5 Tunah i chungah a lo thleng ve ta a, i chau a, A han khawih chia, i buai ta a ni." 
Job4:6 I Pathian tih hi i rinchhan ber, I kawng ngilna hi i beisei chhan a ni lo em ni?" 
Job4:7 Han ngaihtuah vang vang teh, pawi khawih lo tu nge boral? Khawnge mi ngil tihboin an awm ngai?" 
Job4:8 Keia hmuh dan chuan khawlohna lei leta, Buaina tuh chuan a ngai vek an seng leh thin." 
Job4:9 Pathian thawah an boral thin a, A thinrimna chhemin an ral thin." 
Job4:10 Sakeibaknei rum te, sakeibaknei kawlh awrawl te, Sakeibaknei vanglai ngho te a tliak e." 
Job4:11 Sakeibaknei upa chu ei chhamin a boral a, Sakeibakneipui no hruaite chu an darh e." 
Job4:12 Aruk tein ka hnenah thu a lo thleng a, Ka beng hian a phunru ser ser chu a hria." 
Job4:13 Mi mut reh lai taka Zan inlarna chu ka ngaihtuah laiin," 
Job4:14 Hlauhna ka chungah a lo thleng a, khurhna nen, Ka ruh zawng zawng a tinghing a." 
Job4:15 Tichuan, ka hmai hmaah thlarau a kal a, Ka hmulthi a ding sung sung." 
Job4:16 A ding a, mahse, a hmel lan dan ka thlei thei lo; Riruang zawng ka hmaah a awm ngei mai; A reh thiap a, tin, aw ka hria a." 
Job4:17 Pathian hmaah mihring thi thei a fel tawk em ni? A siamtu hmaah mihring a thianghlim tawk em ni? 
Job4:18 Ngai rawh, a chhiahhlawhte pawh a ring zo lo a, A vantirhkohte pawh a a ti a ni:" 
Job4:19 Hlum ina chengte chu a va ring lo zual dawn em, Vaivuta siam mai a ni a, Phengphehlep anga awngrawp mai te chu!" 
Job4:20 Zing leh tlai karah an boral a, Tukhaw ngaihsak lohin an ral zel thin a ni.An chhunga puan in thlunna hrui pawh chah a nihin An thi mai a ni lawm ni, finna nei loin?" 
Job4:21 An chhunga puan in thlunna hrui pawh chah a nihin An thi mai a ni lawm ni, finna nei loin?" 
Job5:1 Han ko teh, chhang tur che an awm teh reng emaw? Mi thianghlim tu lam ber nge i hawi dawn?" 
Job5:2 Vuina hian mi a a tihlum thei a, Itsiknain mi mawl a that thei. Itsiknain mi mawl a that thei." 
Job5:3 Mi a tak zung kai ka hmu a, Mahse, a chenna chu anchhia ka lawh nghal a." 
Job5:4 A fate chu an him awzawng lo, Kulh kawngka bulah chuan chil thlukin an awm a, Chhan chhuaktu tur lah an awm hek lo." 
Job5:5 A buh thar tur riltamten an ei zo a, Hling kar ata pawh an la a, A neih zawng zawng chu tuihalten an hap zo a." 
Job5:6 Tuarna hi vaivut ata lo chhuak a ni lo a, Buaina pawh hi lei atanga lo to chhuak a ni hek lo;" 
Job5:7 Buai turin mihring a lo piang ani zawk, Meisi chung lamah a chho angin." 
Job5:8 Kei zawngin Pathian lam ka zawng ang a, Pathian hnenah ka chungthu ka kawltir ang." 
Job5:9 Thil ropui tak zawn chhuah rual loh te, Thil mak tak mai chhiar sen lohte titu chu:" 
Job5:10 Ani chuan lei chungah ruah a rawn surtir a, Lo chungah tui a rawn luantir a:" 
Job5:11 Mi tlawmte chu a chawisang a, Lusunte chu himnaah a dah chho a," 
Job5:12 Mi fingte remruat a phet chhia a, An kutin a tum a puitlin lo." 
Job5:13 Mi fingte chu anmahni fin verveknain a awk a, Mi vervek remruat chu theh thlak der a ni." 
Job5:14 Chhun engah thim an tawk a, Chhun laiah zan angin an dap thin." 
Job5:15 An kaa khandaih lak ata retheite a chhan chhuak a, Mi chak kut ata tlachhamte pawh." 
Job5:16 Chutichuan, retheite chuan beisei an nei a, Khawlohnain a ka a chip a." 
Job5:17 Ngai rawh, Pathianin mi a thunun chu a eng a thawl e, Chuvangin, Engkimtitheia thununa chu ngainep suh." 
Job5:18 Ani chuan a tina a, a tuam leh a, A tihliam a, kutin a tidam leh a ni." 
Job5:19 Buaina parukah a chhan chhuak ang chia, A ni, pasarihah, thil tha lo reng rengin a khawih lo ang che." 
Job5:20 Tam tlakin thihna ata a tlan ang chia, Indonaah chuan khandaih thiltihtheihna lak ata." 
Job5:21 Tawngkam tha lo lakah thup i ni ang a, Chhiatna a lo thlen pawhin i hlau lo ang." 
Job5:22 Chhiatna leh tam chu i nuihsan ang a, leia sakawlhte i hlau hek lo ang." 
Job5:23 Rama lungte chu i thurualpui dawn si a, Rama sakawlhte chuan an rem ang che." 
Job5:24 Tin, i puan in chu a ralmuang tih i hria ang a, I huang chu i tlawh ang a, kim lo engmah a awm lo ang." 
Job5:25 I thlahte chu tam tak an ni ang a, I rila rahte chu leia hlobet zat an ni tih i hria ang." 
Job5:26 Kum tling takin i thlan i thleng ang a, A hun tea buhphal tel khawm tak ang mai hian.En teh, kan chhui chhuah tak hi, heti ngei hi a ni, Ngaithla la, i tana tha turin hre rawh." 
Job5:27 En teh, kan chhui chhuah tak hi, heti ngei hi a ni, Ngaithla la, i tana tha turin hre rawh." 
Job6:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a," 
Job6:2 Aw, ka manganna hi buk ni teh se la, Ka vanduaina hi buknaah dah ni teh se la!" 
Job6:3 Tuipui tiau aiin a rit dawn si: Chuvang chuan ka thu a bung a ni. 
Job6:4 Engkimtitheia thal ka chungah a awm si a, A tur chu ka thlarauin a in zo a; Pathian tihbaiawmna chuan mi ep a." 
Job6:5 Ram sabengtungin hlobet a peh laiin a hram em ni? Bawngpa pawh a buhpawl chungah a bu em ni? 
Job6:6 Tuina nei lo chu chi tel loin a ei theih em ni? Artui pawnvar pawh hian hanna a nei em ni? 
Job6:7 Ka nunna hian khawih pawh a duh lo e, Ka tan ei tur tenawm tak ang a ni." 
Job6:8 Aw, ka dil chu hmu thei teh i la! Pathianin ka thil chak chu mi te pe teh se!" 
Job6:9 Pathianin mi rawtsawm mai duh teh se! A kut lekin mi tan chhum mai teh se la!
