Job6:10 Chuti pawhin thlamuanna ka la nei cheu, A ni, ka lawm cheu vang, natna thlah loh chung pawhin, Mi thianghlima thu chu ka phat loh avangin." 
Job6:11 Ka chakna hi eng nge nia, ka han nghah rengna tur chu? Ka tawpna eng nge nia, ka han dawh rengna tur chu?" 
Job6:12 Ka chakna hi lung chakna em ni? ka tisa pawh hi dar em ni? 
Job6:13 Tha han so tur reng ka nei lo a, Keimahah sawm khawm tur reng a awm lo." 
Job6:14 Chau tep tawh chungah chuan a thian a ngilnei tur a ni a. Engtimtithei tihna hawisantu chungah pawh. 
Job6:15 Ka unaute chu kawrte rum anga bumhmang an ni a, Kawrte tui relhtu ang mai hi;" 
Job6:16 Tui khal avanga lo duma, Vur inthup thinna chu:" 
Job6:17 A lum hun chuan an kang thin a, A lo sat chuan an hmun ata an bo thin." 
Job6:18 Sumdawng rualte chuan an kawng an rawn pensan a, Ram rovah an lut a, an boral a." 
Job6:19 Tema sumdawng rualte chuan an en a. Seba khualzinte chuan an beisei a; 
Job6:20 An beisei tak a, an hlawhchham a, An va kal a, an hrilhhai a." 
Job6:21 Ka chungah chutiang chauh chu in ni, Ka chhiat tawh in hmu a, in hlau a." 
Job6:22 'Mi pe teh u' emaw, 'In sum in pai mi hlan teh u' emaw" 
Job6:23 Hmelma kut ata mi chhan chhuak teh u' emaw Hnehchhiahtute kut ata mi tlan teh u' emaw ka ti em ni? 
Job6:24 Mi zirtir u la, ka ngawi ang e; Ka bona lai mi hriattir rawh u." 
Job6:25 Thu dik chu a chak em em! mahse, in thu hian eng nge a thawh?" 
Job6:26 Tawng mai mai hi zilh in tum em ni? Mi mangang tawng hi thli ang mai a ni. 
Job6:27 A ni, pa nei lo chungah thum in vawr duh a, Sumdawnna'n in thian in hmang a." 
Job6:28 Tunah mi en teh mah u, In hmai hmaah ka daw hauh lo ang." 
Job6:29 Lamlet u la, mi dem mai teh suh u, Lamlet u la, ka thu rel fel a la ni hlei nem.Ka leiah dik lohna a awm em ni? Thil tha lo chu a thlei thei lo em ni?" 
Job6:30 Ka leiah dik lohna a awm em ni? Thil tha lo chu a thlei thei lo em ni? 
Job7:1 Leiah hian mihringin tawn tur a nei reng a ni lo'm ni? A nite chu inhlawhfa ni ang a ni lo'm ni? 
Job7:2 Chhiahhlawh daihlim chak em emtu ang. Leh inhlawhfa a hlawh thlir rengtu ang hian. 
Job7:3 Engmah lo maiin thla tam ka lo hmang ral a, Zan ninawm takte ka tan ruat a ni." 
Job7:4 Ka mutin 'Engtik takah tho ang i maw' ka ti a; Mahse, zan a rei em em; Khawfingchah thlengin ka let ka let a." 
Job7:5 Ka tisa chu lung leh bawlhhlawhin a khat a, Ka vun chu a lo phui a, a keh thar leh a." 
Job7:6 Ka nite hi puantahtu khawhthei aiin a liam rang a, Beiseina tel loin an ral a." 
Job7:7 Ka nunna hi thli mai a ni tih hre reng la, Ka mitin thil tha a hmuh tawh dawn loh hi." 
Job7:8 Mi hmutu mit chuan mi hmu ngai tawh lawng, I mit ka chungah a fu ang a, mahse, ka awm tawh lo ang." 
Job7:9 Chhum a kiang a, a boral angin Seola chhuk tawh an chhuak leh ngai lo." 
Job7:10 A inah chuan a kir ngai tawh lo ang a, A hmunin amah a hre leh tawh hek lo ang." 
Job7:11 Chuvang chuan ka kam ka sum lo ang; Thinlung lunghnurin ka sawi dawn e; Rilru na ngawih ngawihin ka phunnawi dawn e. 
Job7:12 Tuipui nge maw ka niha, tuipui rulpui nge maw ka niha, Nangin mi enthlatu i dah ni?" 
Job7:13 Ka khumin mi tinuam ang a, Ka phunnawi chhan hi ka muthmunin a tinep ang, ka ti a;" 
Job7:14 Nang lah chuan mumangah mi tihthaih a, inlarnate hmangin mi tihlau a," 
Job7:15 Ka nun hian rehhlum a thlang hial ta zawk a, He ka taksaa chen reng ai hian." 
Job7:16 Ka ning hluah hluah, ka nung rei lo ang; Ka awm awmin ka awm ang e, ka nite hi engmah lo an nih hi." 
Job7:17 Mihring hi eng nge maw a niha, i ngaihsana, A chunga i rilru i nghah tlata," 
Job7:18 Tuk tin, amah i tlawh thina, eng lai pawha i fiah thin ni?" 
Job7:19 Eng chen nge khaw dang hawisan loin i awm anga, Ka chil ka lem chhungte pawh mi hlamchhiah loa i awm dawn?" 
Job7:20 Ka sual anih pawhin i chungah eng nge ka tih ni, Aw mihringte vengtu? Engah nge i chhinchhiah atan mi daha, Mahni tana phurrit ka nih tak hial hi le?Engah nge ka bawhchiat i ngaihdam loh a, Ka khawlohna i lak bo loh le? Tunah vaivutah ka mu dawn ta si a, Mi zawng chiam ang, mahse, ka awm lo ang." 
Job7:21 Engah nge ka bawhchiat i ngaihdam loh a, Ka khawlohna i lak bo loh le? Tunah vaivutah ka mu dawn ta si a, Mi zawng chiam ang, mahse, ka awm lo ang." 
Job8:1 Tichuan Bildada Suhi mi chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job8:2 Eng chen nge he'ng thil hi sawi dawn a, I kamchhuak chu thlipui ang a nih reng dawn?" 
Job8:3 Pathianin rorelna a kailek ngai em ni? Engkimtitheian a dik chu a kailek ngai em ni? 
Job8:4 I fate a chungah an sual a nih chuan An bawhchhiatna kutah a mantir a: 
Job8:5 Pathian i zawn ngat ngata, Engkimtitheia hnena i dil ngat ngat chuan," 
Job8:6 Thianghlim leh ngil i nih chuan I tan bengvar a thawh ngei ang a, Dinhmun dik a pe ang che." 
Job8:7 I bul lamah te mah la, I tawp lamah i lian ang." 
Job8:8 Hman lai hun kha zawt chhuak teh aw, An pi pute hmuh chhuah kha ngaihtuah teh," 
Job8:9 Nimina mi lek kan ni, eng kan hre si lo. Leia kan awm chhung hi hlimthla chauh a nih hi:" 
Job8:10 Chung chuan an zirtirin an hrilh chein An hriatna thate chu an sawi chhuak dawn lo'm ni? 
Job8:11 Dum loah pumphir a to thei em ni? Tui loah phairuang a tha thei em ni? 
Job8:12 A la duah lai reng pawhin sahthluk lohin. Thlai dangte aiin a uai hma thin. 
Job8:13 Pathian theihnghilhtu kawng chu chutiang a ni, Pathian ngaihsak lo mi beiseina chu a bo ang." 
Job8:14 A innghahna chu a chim darh ang a, A rinchhan chu maimaw ril mai a ni." 
Job8:15 A in a ngheng a, mahse, a dawl lo, A vuan tlat a, mahse, a tuar lo ang." 
Job8:16 Ni chhuah hma chuan a hring a, A chawrte chuan a huan a hliap a," 
Job8:17 Sih tui sirah a zung a thlak a, Lung hmun a hmu a," 
Job8:18 A hmun ata tihbo a nihin, Ka hmu ngai lo che, tiin a phat ang." 
Job8:19 Ngai teh, hei hi a kawnga hlimna chu a ni mai, Lei atang chuan a dangte an lo to chhuak ang." 
Job8:20 Ngai teh, pathianin mi tha a paih bo lo ang a, Thil sual titu a tungding hek lo ang." 
Job8:21 I ka nuihnain a tikhat ang a, I hmui pawh hlim au thawmin.A hawtu che chu zahnaa tuam an ni ang a, Mi suaksual puan in pawh a awm tawh lawng." 
Job8:22 A hawtu che chu zahnaa tuam an ni ang a, Mi suaksual puan in pawh a awm tawh lawng." 
Job9:1 Tichuan, Joban a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job9:2 Chuti a nih zawng dik takin ka hria, Mahse, engtin nge Pathian hmaah mi a fel theih ang?" 
Job9:3 Amah hnial kalh duh ang se, Vawi sangah vawi khat pawh a chhang thei lo ang." 
Job9:4 Thinlunga fing, chaknaa engkimtithei, A laka inchhungawng tu nge hmuingil?" 
Job9:5 Tlangte a sawn a, an hre lo a, A thinrima a tihdanglam lai khan." 
Job9:6 Lei a hmunah a sawi nghing a, A bante chu a nghing dur dur a." 
Job9:7 Ni thu a pe a, a chhuak lo a, Arsite pawh chu a kharkhip a." 
Job9:8 Mahni chauha van tipharhtu leh Tuipui fawn chunga kal chu. 
Job9:9 Zangkhua te, Chhohreivung te, Siruk te siamtu, Chhim lam pindante siamtu chu." 
Job9:10 Thil ropui chhui chhuah rual loh te, A ni, thil mak tak chhiar sen rual loh titu chu." 
Job9:11 Ngai teh, ka bulah a kal a, ka hmu si lo; A tlang ta zel a, ka hre si lo." 
Job9:12 Ngai teh, a la mai a, tu nge khap thei? Eng nge i tih, tu nge ti ang le?" 
Job9:13 Pathianin a thinrimna a sum lo ang a, Rahab puitute a hnuaiah an kun a." 
Job9:14 Kei tehlulin engtin nge ani chu ka chhan ang a, Amah hnialna'n thu eng nge in thlan chhuah ang?" 
Job9:15 Dik mah i la, ani zawng ka chhang lo ang, Ka khinna chu ka dil zawk ang." 
Job9:16 Ko i la, ani chuan mi chhang se la, Ka thu a dawnsawn ka ring chuang lo.," 
Job9:17 Thlipuiin mi tichia a, vang awm loin ka hliamte mi belhchhah a," 
Job9:18 Thawk ka lak pawh mi phalsak lo a, Hrehawmin mi tikhat a." 
Job9:19 Chakna thu-ah chuan, en teh, Chaka chu, rorelna lam thu-ah ani chu tu nge khawm ang?" 
Job9:20 Dik mah i la, ka ka hian thiam loh mi chantir ang. Demawm lo mah i la, mi chantir ang." 
Job9:21 Demawm lo ka ni, ka inngai sang lo; Ka nun hi ka hmusit a ni." 
Job9:22 A thuhmun vek mai, chuvang alawm Tha famkim pawh, suaksual pawh a tichhia, ka tih ni." 
Job9:23 Chhiatnain thihna a thlen thut chuan, Mi nun tlang tuarna chu a nuihzat ang." 
Job9:24 Lei hi mi suaksual kutah pek a ni a, A roreltute hmai a khuh a," 
Job9:25 Amah a nih loh chuan tu dang nge ni ang? ka hunte hi zualko tlan aiin a chak a, An thlawk bo a, thil tha reng an hmu lo." 
Job9:26 An kal liam a, lawng chak tak angin, Mupui tum nei bir angin.," 
Job9:27 Ka vuina hi ka theihnghilh ang a. Ka lungngai hmel hi ka dah bo ang a, Ka intihlim ang, ka tihin," 
Job9:28 Ka lungngaihna zawng zawng hi ka hlau a, Nangin mi tlangah mi ngai lo ang tih ka hria." 
Job9:29 Thiam loh chang tur ka ni a, Eng nge sawt lo tura ka tan teh chiam ang?" 
Job9:30 Vurin inbual mah i la; Ka kutte chingalin sil mah i la; 
Job9:31 Khuarkhurumah mi hnim tho ang a, Ka silhfente ngei pawhin mi ten ang." 
Job9:32 Rorelna hmaa ding duna ka chhan turin, Ani chu kei anga mihring a ni si lo." 
Job9:33 Kan chunga kut nghat ve ve tur, Kan kara thu titlutu reng an awm lo." 
Job9:34 Ka lak ata a tiang la bo se la, A tihbaihawmnain mi tihlau suh se.Tichuan, amah hlau loin ka tawng ang, Mahni chuan chutiang ka ni si lo." 
Job9:35 Tichuan, amah hlau loin ka tawng ang, Mahni chuan chutiang ka ni si lo." 
Job10:1 Ka thlain a ning e, ka nun hi,Ka nawmmakin ka phunnawi dawn e:Rilru na em em chungin ka tawng dawn hi." 
Job10:2 Pathian hnenah heti hian ka ti dawn:Mi thiam lo suh, i mi demna mi entir zawk rawh." 
Job10:3 Mi hnehchhiaha, i kut hnathawk hmusita,Mi suaksual remruat tih-en hi tha i ti em ni?" 
Job10:4 Tisa mitte chu i nei vein Mihring hmuh angin i hmu em ni? 
Job10:5 I nite chu mirhing nite ang em ni?I kumte pawh mihring kumte ang em nia," 
Job10:6 Ka khawlohnate i chhui teh chiama,Ka sualna pawh i zawn teh chiam ni?" 
Job10:7 Mi suaksual ka ni lo tih i hria.I kut ata chhan chhuak tur lah chu an awm lo. 
Job10:8 I kutin mi din a, mi siam a, kim biaiin,Mahse, nangin mi tiboral a." 
Job10:9 Nangin hlum angin mi siam tih hre reng teh aw;Vaivutah mi chantir leh dawn em ni? 
Job10:10 Nangin hnute tui angin mi leih chhuakin Hnute khal angin mi hlawm ani lo'm ni? 
Job10:11 Vun leh tisain mi tuam a,Ruh leh thatein mi phiar khawm a," 
Job10:12 Nangin nunna leh duhsakna mi pe a,I mi enkawlna chuan ka thlarau a zuah a." 
Job10:13 Mahse, he'ng hi i thinlungan i lo thup a,Nangmahah hei hi a awm tih ka hria." 
Job10:14 Lo sual i la, nangin mi chhinchhiah ang a,Ka khawlohna ata mi tichhuak lo ang." 
Job10:15 Mi suaksual lo ni ta i la, ka chung a pik ang; Mi fel ni i la, ka inluling lo ang; Mualpho letder chungin leh ka hrehawm enin." 
Job10:16 Lo indah sang i la nangin sakeibaknei pelin mi pel a,Ka chungah mak takin i inentir leh a." 
Job10:17 Ka chungah i thu i tharthawh a.Ka chungah i thinur i tipung a.A hlawp hlawpin mi bei a. 
Job10:18 Eng vanga chhul ata mi la chhuak nge i nih?Tuma hmuh hmain lo thi tawh i la," 
Job10:19 Awm lo ang mai ka lo ni ang a,chhul ata thlana lak ka lo ni mai tur," 
Job10:20 Ka nite hi rei lo te a ni lo'm ni?Chawl se, mi ngawihsan se, thaw han la hlek teh i la." 
Job10:21 Kir tawh lohna tur hmuna ka kal hma hian Thimna leh thihna daihlim ramah chuan,Thim chhah mup ram, thim tak mai chu,Thihna daihlim, kawngzawng awm lo, Eng pawh thim a nihna hmunah chuan." 
Job10:22 Thim chhah mup ram, thim tak mai chu,Thihna daihlim, kawngzawng awm lo, Eng pawh thim a nihna hmunah chuan." 
Job11:1 Tichuan, Zofara Naamathi mi chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job11:2 Thu heti zozai hi chhan loh theih theih em ni ang? Mi tawng tamin tham an chang em ni? 
Job11:3 I uan thu hian mi a tingawi ang em ni? Tham lo taka i tawng hian tuma'n an tizak lo ang che maw? 
Job11:4 Ka rin dan hi a dik a,I mithmuhah ka thiang a ni,' i ti si a." 
Job11:5 Mahse, aw, Pathian chu han tawng teh se,I chungah a ka han ang teh se;" 
Job11:6 A finna thuruk a hriattir tur chia,Finna thuah tam tak a ni si a,Chuvangin, hre ta che, i khawlohna aia nepinPathianin i chungah a tih hi." 
Job11:7 Pathian chu i zawng chhuak zo vem ni?Engkimtitheia chu i hmu kim thei em ni? 
Job11:8 Van aia sang a ni a, nangin eng nge i tih theih?Seol aia thuk a ni, nangin eng nge i hriat theih?" 
Job11:9 A tehna lei aiin a sei zawk a,Tuifinriat aiin a zau zawk." 
Job11:10 A kal tlang a, a khara,A koh khawm chuan tu nge dal thei ang?" 
Job11:11 Mi lawilo chu a hre si a,Khawlohna pawh a hmu, zawng lo mah se la," 
Job11:12 Ram sabengtung no mihringa a pian hunah Mi lawilo chuan hriatna a nei chauh ang. 
Job11:13 Nang chuan i thinlung i dah dik a,A lama kut i phar chuan;" 
Job11:14 I kuta khawlohna a awm chuan dah bo daih la,I puan inah fel lohna cheng suh sela;" 
Job11:15 Tichuan, hmelhem lovn i dak chhuak ngei ang:A ni, i nghet ang a, i hlau lo ang;" 
Job11:16 I hrehawm i theihnghilh ang a,Tui luang bo tawh angin i hre reng ang:" 
Job11:17 I nun chhun chang aiin a eng ang.Thim pawh awm se, zing ang a ni ang." 
Job11:18 Tin, muanawm takin i awm ang, beisei a awm vangin;A ni, i en vel ang a, muang takin i chawl ang." 
Job11:19 I mu ang a, tumah an tihlau lawng che,A ni, tam takin an be tlawn ang che.Mahse, mi suaksual mit chu a thlawn ang a,Tlan chhuahna kawng reng an nei lo ang.An nghahfak ber pawh thih mai a ni." 
Job11:20 Mahse, mi suaksual mit chu a thlawn ang a,Tlan chhuahna kawng reng an nei lo ang.An nghahfak ber pawh thih mai a ni." 
Job12:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job12:2 A ni ngei mai, mi fing zawng in lo nih hi,In rualin finna a thi ang." 
Job12:3 Mahse, nangni angin hriatna ka nei ve bawk,In lakah ka neu bik lo e,A ni, tu nge thil hetiang hi hre lo awm?" 
Job12:4 Thiante nuihzabur ka ni. Kei, Pathian koa a chhana ngei hi." 
Job12:5 Mi fel, mi famkim si, nuihzabur ka ni.Mi nuamsa rilruah chuan vanduai hmusitna a awm;Rahbi tleute a chang reng a ni." 
Job12:6 Suamhmang puan in a hmuingil a,Pathian tithinurtute an him a,An kuta an pathian rawn kengtute chu." 
Job12:7 Rante pawh zawt teh khai, an zirtir ang che,Chunglen savate pawh zawt la, an hrilh ang che;" 
Job12:8 Lei pawh bia la, a zirtir ang che,Luipui sanghate chuan i hnenah an puang ang." 
Job12:9 Heng thil zawng zawngah hian tu nge hre lo awm,LALPA kut chuan hei hi a ti a ni, tih hi?" 
Job12:10 A kutah thil nung tin nunna leh Mihring chi zawng zawng thlarau a awm. 
Job12:11 Bengin thu a chian lo em ni.Kain ei tur a tem ang hian? 
Job12:12 Upa hnenah finna a awm a,Khuareiah hriat thiamna," 
Job12:13 A hnenah finna leh chakna a awm a,Rem hriatna leh hriat thiamna a nei a.," 
Job12:14 Ngai rawh, a thiat a, sak leh rual a ni lo,Mi a khar hnan a, hawn rual a ni lo." 
Job12:15 Ngai rawh, tuite chu a chelh a, an lo kang a,A rawn tir chhuak leh a, leilung an tuam." 
Job12:16 A hnenah chakna leh finna a awm a,Bum leh bumtu a ta an ni." 
Job12:17 Remruattute ruakin a hruai bo a,Roreltute a tia a." 
Job12:18 Lalte phuarna chu a phelh a, An kawng chu kawnghrenin a hreng a." 
Job12:19 Puithiamte ruakin a hruai bo a,Mi chakte a titlu a," 
Job12:20 Mi rinte thusawi a sawn a,Upate hriatna a la bo." 
Job12:21 Miliante chungah hmusitna a leihbua a,Mi chakte taihren a phelhsak a." 
Job12:22 Thim ata thil thukte a dap chhuak a,Thihna hlim chu engah a la chhuak." 
Job12:23 Hnamte chu a tipung a, a tiral a,Hnamte chu a tilian a, a hruai bo a," 
Job12:24 Lei mipui hotute thinlung a la bo a,Thlaler kawng awm lohnaah a vahvaihtir a.Eng awm loin thimah an dap a,Zu rui angin a paitir a." 
Job12:25 Eng awm loin thimah an dap a,Zu rui angin a paitir a." 
Job13:1 En che u, he'ng zawng zawng hi ka mitin a hmu a,Ka bengin a hria a, a hre thiam a ni." 
Job13:2 In hriat chu ka hre ve bawk e,In lakah ka neu bik lo e," 
Job13:3 Mahse, engkimtitheia hnenah chuan sawi ngei ka duh a,Pathian nena ngaihtuah dun ka chak a ni." 
Job13:4 Nangni, dawt phuahchawptu in ni a,In zain daktawr hlu lo in ni e." 
Job13:5 Ngawi hmiah mai teh u la aw!Fin in hlawh zawk tur. 
Job13:6 Ka ngaihtuah dan ngaithla u la,ka dilna kam chhuak bengkhawn rawh u." 
Job13:7 Pathian tan khawlo takin in tawng ang maw?A tan dawtin in tawng ang maw? 
Job13:8 Amah tanin hleih in neih ang maw?Pathian tan in pawng tan dawn em ni? 
Job13:9 Zawng chhuak che u se la, a tha dawm em ni? Miin mihring a bum angin amah in bum dawn em ni?" 
Job13:10 A ruka hleih in neih chuan A zilhhau ngei ang che u. 
Job13:11 A ropuina chuan a tihlau lo ang che u maw? A tihbaiawmna in chungah a tla lo vang maw? 
Job13:12 In upa thute chu thufing vaivut mai ani a,In invennate chu invenna hlum mai a ni." 
Job13:13 Ka tawng theihna'n lo ngawi teh u,Ka chungah engpawh lo thleng ang hmiang." 
Job13:14 Ka tisa hi ka hain ka pet ang a,Ka nun hi ka kutah ka dah em ni?" 
Job13:15 Mi tihlum hila mah se la, amah chu ka nghak cheu vang:Mahse, a hmaah ka kawng chu ka tan ang." 
Job13:16 Hei hi ka chhandamna ani a,A hmaah Pathian hre lo mi an lo kal dawn loh hi." 
Job13:17 Ka sawi hi ngun takin ngai u la,Ka puan chhuah hi in bengah lut rawh se." 
Job13:18 Ngai teh u, ka thu ka rem fel tawh a,Thiam ka chang ang tih ka hria." 
Job13:19 Tunge mi hnialtu tur awm?Tichuan, ka ngawi ang a, thlarau ka thlah mai ang." 
Job13:20 Ka chungah thil pahnih hi ti lo phawt la,Tichuan, i hmel lakah ka inthup lo vang:" 
Job13:21 Ka hnen ata i kut la kir daih la,I tihbaiawmna hian mi tihlau suh se." 
Job13:22 Tichuan, mi ko la, ka chhang ang che,A nih loh leh, kei tawng i la, kmi chhang thung ang che." 
Job13:23 Ka khawlohna leh sualnate engtia tam nge ni? Ka bawhchiatna leh ka sualna mi hriattir rawh. 
Job13:24 Engah nge i hmel i thup a,I hmelmaa mi ngaih le?" 
Job13:25 Hnahthel leng chu i chaih buai dawn em ni? Buhpawl ro chu i um dawn em ni? 
Job13:26 Ka chungah na takin i ziak a, Ka tileirawl lai khawlohnate mi phurhtir a." 
Job13:27 Ka keah kawl mi buntir a, Ka kawng zawng zawng i chhinchhiah a, Ka kephah hualin ramri i kham a,Thil mawih tawih ral mai ang leh, Silhfen, thim ei ang lek ka ni chung hian." 
Job13:28 Thil mawih tawih ral mai ang leh, Silhfen, thim ei ang lek ka ni chung hian." 
Job14:1 Hmeichhe hrin tawh mihring phwt chu Rei lo te dam, buainaa khat a ni." 
Job14:2 Pangpar angin a lo chhuak a, a vuai leh a,Hlimthla angin a thlawk bo a, a awm hlen lo." 
Job14:3 Chutiang mi chungah chuan i mit i mengin,rorelnaah i hnenah mi hruai em ni le?" 
Job14:4 Tunge thianghlim lo ata Thianghlim la chhuak thei le? Tumahin. 
Job14:5 A nite chu ruat sa anih a, a thla zat lah chu i hnena a awm a,A pelh theih loh tura ramri chu i ruat ahnuin," 
Job14:6 Hawi bosan langin, a chawlh theihna'n,Hlawhfa anga ni a tlingtlak thlengin." 
Job14:7 Thing chu rawt pawh nise, a chawr leh ang,A chawrno a tawp lo ang tih beiseina a awm." 
Job14:8 Leia a zung lo tar mah se,A bul chu lei chinah thi mah se;" 
Job14:9 Tui rimah a chawr thiam tiam ang a, Thil phun angin a lo buk chhuak ang." 
Job14:10 Mahse, mihring chu a thi a, a riral a. A ni, mihring chuan a thlarau a thlah a, khawnge a awm tak?" 
Job14:11 Tuipui ata tui a kal bo a, Luipui a kang a, a ro char a;" 
Job14:12 Chutiangin mi an mu a, an tho leh lo: Van awm loh hma loh chuan an thangharh lo vang, An muhil kaihthawh an ni hek lo ang," 
Job14:13 Seolah chuan mi thukru teh la, I thinur reh hma chu mi thukru teh la, Hun bik mi ruatsakin mi hre rehng teh la aw!" 
Job14:14 Mi a thih chuan a nung leh ang em ni?ka hun ruat chhung hi chuan ka nghak ang, Ka chhuahna a thlen thlengin." 
Job14:15 Mi ko ang a, keiin ka chhang ang che; I kut hnathawh i ngaina an i." 
Job14:16 Mahse, nangin ka pente i chhia a, Ka sual i enthla lo em ni?" 
Job14:17 Ipah ka bawhchhiatna chilh ani a, ka khawlohna i thui khawm a." 
Job14:18 Tlang chim meuh pawh chu a riral a, Lungpui pawh a hmun ata sawn ani a;" 
Job14:19 Tui chuan lungte a hrut hek a, Tui lian chuan lei vaivut a len bo a; Chutiangin mihring beisei chu i ti bo a." 
Job14:20 Ani chu i hneh kumkhua a,a ral ta a. A hmel i tidanglam a, i tir bo a." 
Job14:21 A fapaten an rawn chawimawi a, a hre lo a; Tihtlawmin an awm a, a hre hek lo.A taksa na chu a hre chauh va A thlarauin amah a sun a." 
Job14:22 A taksa na chu a hre chauh va A thlarauin amah a sun a. 
Job15:1 Tichuan, Elifaza Temani mi chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job15:2 Mi fingin hriatna lothlawn hmangin a chhangin,Khaw chhak thliin a pum a tipuar ang em ni?" 
Job15:3 Tawng tlaktlai lo hmangin emaw Thusawi thatna nei lo hmangin emaw a sawi dawn em ni? 
Job15:4 A ni, tihna chu i tibo a, Pathian hmaa inhlannai tineu va ni." 
Job15:5 I khawlohna chuan i ka a thunun a, Fin vervek tawng i thlang a nih hi," 
Job15:6 Kei ni loin, nangma tawngkam ngeiin a thiam lo che a, A ni, i hmui ngeiin a hek che a ni." 
Job15:7 Piang hmasa ber i ni em ni? A nih loh leh, tlangte awm hmain i piang tawh em ni." 
Job15:8 Pathian thuruk chu i hria em ni? Nangma tan chauh finna i khur khung em ni? 
Job15:9 Kan hriat loh eng nge i hriat bik? Kan hriat loh eng nge i hriat theim bik? 
Job15:10 kan hnenah hian lua kelsam to tawhte leh upa takte, I pa aia upa daihte an awm a ni." 
Job15:11 I tan Pathian tawng thlamuanna hi a neu lutuk em ni? Nem taka a tihna thu che hi? 
Job15:12 Engah nge i thinlungin a hruai bo che? Eng tizia nge i men tal tawp tawp ni? 
Job15:13 Pathian chungah thaw i sang a, I kaa chutiang thu a chhuah kha." 
Job15:14 Thianghlim tur chuan mihring hi eng nge a nih? Fel tur chuan hmeichhe hrin hi eng nge a nih? 
Job15:15 Ngai teh, a mi thianghlimte chungah rina a nghat lo a, A ni, a mithmuhah chuan van pawh a fai lo." 
Job15:16 Mi tenawm leh bawlhhlawh sa, Khawlohna, tui ina in chu a va ni lo lehzual dawn em!" 
Job15:17 Mi ngaithla la, ka entir ang che, Ka hmuh chu ka puang dawn e:" 
Job15:18 Mi fingten an hril thina chu, An pi puten an thup loh," 
Job15:19 Anmahni chauh ram an lo pek, Mi dang tumah tel lohna chu?" 
Job15:20 Mi suaksual chuan a dam chhung zawng na a tuar a, Hnehchhiahtu tana kum tuk zatte pawh chu." 
Job15:21 Hlauhawm thawmte chu a bengin a hria a, A hmuingil laiin rawktuin a rawn bei a." 
Job15:22 Thim ata chhuah a inring lo a, A hmabak chu khandaih a ni." 
Job15:23 Ei tur zawngin a vakvai a, Khawnge? tiin, Thimna ni chu a kutah ngasa tih a hria:" 
Job15:24 Hreawmna leh thawpikna chuan a tihlau a; Lal inpeihsain indona a hneh angin amah an hneh a; 
Job15:25 Pathian chunga a kut a lek leh Engkimtitheia chunga chapo taka a chet avangin; 
Job15:26 Luhlul takin ama chungah a tlan a, A phaw lai pjnawg chhah pui nen chuan;" 
Job15:27 A thauin a hmai atuam a, A kawngah thau a chheng a;" 
Job15:28 Khawpui tiau hnuahte a cheng a, Tuma luah loh inahte chuan." 
Job15:29 A hausa lo ang a, a sum leh pai chu a awm hlen hek lo ang a, An neihte chu lei lamah an kur hek lo ang." 
Job15:30 Thim ata a chhuak lo ang a, Meialhin a zarte a hliau lo ang a, A kaa a thawah a kal bo ang." 
Job15:31 Mahni inhumin engmah loah innghat suh se, A hmuh tur chu engmah lo ani dawn si a." 
Job15:32 A hun hmain a tlingtla ang a, A zar chu a hring lo ang." 
Job15:33 Grep hrui angin a rah hel a sawi til ang a, Olive thing angin a par a thing thla ang." 
Job15:34 Pathian ngaihsak lo pawlte chu an cha der ang a, Thamna puan inte chu meiin a kang ral ang.Pawi khawih an ngaihtuah a, Khawlohna an rawn chhuah a, An pumin bumna a buatsaih a ni." 
Job15:35 Pawi khawih an ngaihtuah a, Khawlohna an rawn chhuah a, An pumin bumna a buatsaih a ni." 
Job16:1 Tin, Joba chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job16:2 Chutiang thil chu tam tak ka hria a ni, In zain thlamuantu tuar hreawm in ni e." 
Job16:3 Thu ruakin tawp anei ang em? A nih leh, engin nge chawk tho chia i han chhan ni?" 
Job16:4 Kei pawh in tawng angin ka tawng thei a ni; 
Job16:5 Ka ni ang hi ni u la chuan In chungah thu ka zamw khawm chiam thei ang a, Lu ka thin khum thei ang che u." 
Job16:6 Mahse, ka ka chuan ka tichak ang che u a, Ka hmuia thlamuanna thuin a tinuam ang che u." 
Job16:7 Sawi mah i la, ka lungngaihna a dai lo a, Ngawi mah i la, eng nge ka naw chuan na?" 
Job16:8 Mahse, Aman mi tichau a, Ka pawlpuite zawng zawng chu i titiau a." 
Job16:9 Nangin mi chelh bet a, chu chu ka chunga hretu a ni a, Ka cherna hian mi hek a. Chu chu ka hmai chhana hriattirtu a ni" 
Job16:10 A thinurin mi tai thler a, mi tiduhdah a, Ka chungah a ha a thial a, Ka khingpuiin ka chungah a mit a len a." 
Job16:11 Ka chungah an ka an ang a, Dichim takin biangah mi beng a, Ka chungah an inhawr khawm a." 
Job16:12 Pathian ngaihsak lo kutah mi hlan a, Mi suaksualte kutah chuan mi theh lut a." 
Job16:13 Nuamsa takin ka awm a, aman mi phel darh a, A ni, ka ringah mi la a, mi pawt sawm a: A tin tur atan mi tar bawk a." 
Job16:14 A thal kaptute chuan mi hual vel a, Ka kalte chu a then darh a, a dim lo, Lei chungah ka mit a leih bua a." 
Job16:15 Chhiatna chunga chhiatnain mi tichhia a, Mi hrang angin ka chungah a lo thawk a." 
Job16:16 Ka vun chungah saiip puan ka bel a Ka ki chu vaivutah ka tal a. 
Job16:17 Tah vangin ka hmel a sen a, Ka mit vunah thihna hlim a awm;" 
Job16:18 Ka kutah pawngnekna a awm lo a, Ka tawngtaina a thianghlim chung pawhin." 
Job16:19 Aw leilung, ka thisen chu khuh bo suh la, Ka tah hian chawlh hmun nei suh se." 
Job16:20 Tunah pawh, ngai tawh, ka thu hretu vanah a awm ani e, Mi hriatpuitu chu van sangah a awm." 
Job16:21 Ka thiante chuan mi nuihsan a, Mahse, Pathian hnenah ka mittui a sur a." 
Job16:22 Pathian hnenah miin mihring hi tan teh se la aw! Mihring fapain a thenawm a tan ang hian.Kum rei lote a lo ral hunah, Ka kir leh lohna tur kawng chu ka zawh dawn si a." 
Job16:23 Kum rei lote a lo ral hunah, Ka kir leh lohna tur kawng chu ka zawh dawn si a." 
Job17:1 Ka thlarau a rawih ta, ka nite a ral ta, Ka chapual chu thlan a ni ta." 
Job17:2 Nuihsantute ka hnenah an awm zawng a nih hi, An thu thin tiurah huan ka mit a fu a." 
Job17:3 I hnenah ka tan thutiam siam teh, Tunge ka tan zakhamna ni ang?" 
Job17:4 Hriat thiamna lakah an thinlung i thup a; Chuvangin, anni zawng i chawisang lo ang." 
Job17:5 Hlawkna atana a thian thlauthlatua chu, A fate mit pawh a chuai ang." 
Job17:6 Mite zinga kamram mai atan mi siam a, Tenawm langsar tak ka lo ni ta." 
Job17:7 Lungngaih vangin ka mit pawh a thim a, Ka bung zawng zawng hi hlimthla ang a lo ni ta." 
Job17:8 Mi ngil takte chuan hei hi mak an ti ang. Mi pawikhawih lo chu pathian nei lote chungah a thinur ang. 
Job17:9 Mi fel chuan a kawng ngai a chelh tlat a, Kut fai nei chu a chak deuh deuh ang." 
Job17:10 In zain lo kir u la, lo kal teh u, In zingah mi fing ka hmu chuang lo ang." 
Job17:11 Ka nite a liam ta, ka thil tumte a thlawn zo ta, Ka thinlung ngaihtuah thinte ngei chu." 
Job17:12 Zan chu chhunah a chantir a; Eng chuan thim a hnaih e, an ti a." 
Job17:13 Seol chu ka in anga ka en a, Thim hnuaiah ka khum ka dawh a," 
Job17:14 Chhiatna hnenah, ""Ka pa i ni"" ka tih a, Changpat hnenah, ""Ka nu leh ka farnu in ni"" ka tih chuan," 
Job17:15 Ka beisei chu khawiah nge? Ka beisei chu tu nge hmu ang?Seol kawngkaah a chhuk ang a, Vaivutah kan chhuk dun ang." 
Job17:16 Seol kawngkaah a chhuk ang a, Vaivutah kan chhuk dun ang." 
Job18:1 Tichuan, Bildada, Suhi mi chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job18:2 Eng chen nge thu remchang in dap dawn? Ngaithua u la, chu mi hnuah kan sawi ang." 
Job18:3 Eng tizia nge ran anga ngaih kan nih a, I mithmuha tenawm kan nih?" 
Job18:4 Nang mahni thinurnaa intai thlertu, Nangmah avangin lei kalsan a ni dawn em ni? Lungpui pawh a hmun ata sawn a ni dawn em ni?" 
Job18:5 A ni, mi suaksual eng chu timih a ni ang a, A meisei pawh a de lo ang." 
Job18:6 A puan ina eng chu a thim ang a, A kianga khawnvar chu tihmih a ni ang. A ke pen chakna chu a chep ang a," 
Job18:7 Ama remruat ngeiin a paih thla ang. 
Job18:8 Ama ke ngeiin lenah a paih lut a, Hum chungah a kal a." 
Job18:9 A kerekah thangin a hling ang a, Ani chu thlangin a man ang." 
Job18:10 A tan leiah valh phum ani a, Kawngah a tan thang kam a ni." 
Job18:11 Kil tinah hlauhawmin a tihlau vang a, A hnungah chuan a um zel ang." 
Job18:12 A chakna atamchhawl ang a, A kiangah chhiatna a inpeih reng." 
Job18:13 A taksa bhung hrangte a ei zo ang a, Thihna fa tirin a bung hrangte a ei zo ang." 
Job18:14 A rinpui pian in ata chu kar phawh a ni ang a, Hlauhawmho lal hnenah hruai ani ang." 
Job18:15 A mi ni ngai lo a puan inah an cheng ang a. A chennaah kat theh darh a ni ang. 
Job18:16 Chhungrilah a zung a mawih ang a, Chung lamah a zar a vuai bawk ang." 
Job18:17 Lei ata a hriat rengna a boral ang a, Kawtthlerah hming a nei tahw lo ang." 
Job18:18 Eng ata thimah len luh a ni ang a, Khawvel ata um chhuah a ni ang." 
Job18:19 Ami tezingah tu leh fa a nei lo ang a, A chenanah chambang tur a nei hek lawng." 
Job18:20 Thlang lama miten ani hi mak an ti ang a, Chhak lama mite an thlabar ang.Mi fel lo chenna zawng chutiang hchu a ni ngei a, Chu chu Pathian hre lotu hmun a ni e." 
Job18:21 Mi fel lo chenna zawng chutiang hchu a ni ngei a, Chu chu Pathian hre lotu hmun a ni e." 
Job19:1 Tin, Joba chan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job19:2 Eng chen nge mi tihhreawm ang a, Thutea mi vuak vual dawn?" 
Job19:3 Vawi sawm lai mi dem chhe ta a. Tha lo taka ka chunga tih hi in zak hek lo. 
Job19:4 Dik lo pawh ni ta i la, Ka dik lohna chu keimahah ka pai ang." 
Job19:5 Ka chunga intilian in nih a, Ka chhiatna hi mi hnialfunga hmang i nih chuan," 
Job19:6 Hre ta che u, Pathianin mi paih thla a, A lenin mi tuam a nih hi." 
Job19:7 Ngai teh u, Pawngnekna, tiin ka au chhuak a, Mahse, chhan ka ni lo a, tanpui dilin ka au a, mahse, rel dikna a awm lo." 
Job19:8 Ka kawng dai atheu hnan a, ka pel thei lo, Ka kawngte chu thimin a khuh a ni." 
Job19:9 Ka ropuina mi hlihsak a, Ka lua lallukhum chu a la a." 
Job19:10 Kawng tinah mi tichhia a, ka ral a ni ta: Ka beiseina thing angin a pawt phawng a." 
Job19:11 A thinurna ka chungah a mut kai a, A hmelma angah mi chhiar a." 
Job19:12 A sipai rual an kal khawm a, Ka lamah kawng an thlak a, Ka puan in velah buk an khuar a." 
Job19:13 Ka unaute ka lakah a tihla a, Ka hmel hriatte ka lakah an mi hrang zo a." 
Job19:14 Ka laichinten mi chu-kha ta lo a, Ka thian bulten mi theihnghilh zo a," 
Job19:15 Ka in chengte leh ka in awm nulaten Mikhualah mi chhiar a, An mithmuhah hmel hriat loh ka ni ta." 
Job19:16 Ka chhiahhlawh ka ko a, mi chhang lo a. Kam thlumin ka ngen tur a lo ni ta." 
Job19:17 Ka nupui tan ka rim a chhia a, Ka chhul khat kualpui tan ka tenawm a." 
Job19:18 Naupangte lamin mi hmusit a, Ka han tho hi mi eu a." 
Job19:19 Ka thian tha zawng zawngten mi ten a, Ka hmangaih thinte chu ka lakah an ner ta." 
Job19:20 Ka vun leh ka tisa hi ka ruhah a bet a, Ka ha vun chu ka la chang a." 
Job19:21 Aw, nangni ka thiante u, Mi khawngaih rawh u, mi khawngaih rawh u," 
Job19:22 Pathian kutin mi khawih a nih hi. Engah nge Pathian ang ziazanga mi tihduhdah a, Ka tisa tuarna hi tawk in la tih loh ni?" 
Job19:23 Aw, ka thute chu ziak ni teh se la! Lehkhabuahte chuang teh se la aw!" 
Job19:24 Ziakna thir leh suanin, Lungpuiah kumkhua atan ziak ni teh se la aw!" 
Job19:25 Ka tlantu chu a nung tih ka hre si a, Nakinah chuan leiah hian a lo la ding ang." 
Job19:26 Ka vun hi tihchhiata a awm hnuin, Ka tisain Pathian ka la hmu ang." 
Job19:27 Keima tan ngei ka la hmu ang a, Ka mitin a la thlir ang a, mi dang ni loin, Ka chhungah ka rilru a chau ta." 
Job19:28 Engtin nge amah chu kan tihduhdah ang, Thil bulte amahah hmu siin, in tih chuan,Khandaih chu hlau rawh u, Thinurna chuan khandaih hremna a thlen si a, Rorelna a awm tih in hriat theihna'n." 
Job19:29 Khandaih chu hlau rawh u, Thinurna chuan khandaih hremna a thlen si a, Rorelna a awm tih in hriat theihna'n." 
Job20:1 Tin, Zofara, Naamathi mi chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job20:2 Hei vang hian ka ngaihtuahnate chuan chhanna mi siam a, Ka chhungah hmanhmawhna a awm avang hian." 
Job20:3 Zilhna mi tizaktu chu ka hre ta a, Ka hriatthiamna rilru chuan mi chhang a ni." 
Job20:4 Hmasang ata leia mihring awm achin, Hei hi i hre lo em ni?" 
Job20:5 Mi suaksual hlimna chu a tawi a, Pathian hre lo mi lawmna chu Mit khap kar chauh a ni, tih hi?" 
Job20:6 A ropuina chuan vante thleng chhoin, A lu chuan chhumte tawng mah se," 
Job20:7 Ama zun ek angin a boral vang vang ang: Amah hmu tawhte chuan, Khawiah nge a awm tak? an ti ang." 
Job20:8 Mumang ang maiin a thlawk bo ang a, Hmuh a ni lo ang: A ni, zan inlarna anga um bo ani ang." 
Job20:9 Amah hmu thin mit khan a hmu tawh ngai lo ang a, A hmun pawhin a hmungai thaw hek lo ang." 
Job20:10 A faten mi hretheite khawngaihna an dil ang a, A kutin a sum leh pai chu a theh kir ang." 
Job20:11 A ruhte chu a tleirawl sualnain a khat a, Mahse vaivutah amutpui ang." 
Job20:12 Suahsualna hi a kaah thlum mah se, A lei hnuaiah thukru mah se," 
Job20:13 Zuat hliauin thlah phal lo mah se, A kam chhungah hmuam reng zawk mah se la," 
Job20:14 A pum chhungah alo danglam a, A chhungah rul tur kha tak ani ta a." 
Job20:15 Hausaknate ch a lem a, a law chhuak leh a, pathianin a pum ata a paihchhuak a," 
Job20:16 Rul tur chu a fawp ang a, Rulrial tur chuan amah a that ang." 
Job20:17 Luipuite chu a thlir lo ang a, Khawizu leh bawnghnute khala luang luite chu," 
Job20:18 A thawh chhuah chu a theh kir ang a, Hrawk tlaina'n a hmang lo ang;" 
Job20:19 A lak khawmte hchu a chen lo ang. Reitheite chu ahnehchhiahin a hawi san a," 
Job20:20 In, a sak loh chu, a chhuhsak a. A duhamna chu a kawchhungah a awm hle hle thei lo a, A lawmna thilte chu engmah ahum lo ang." 
Job20:21 A ei zawh loh engmah a awm lo a, Chuvangin, a sum leh pai chuan a tuar lo ang." 
Job20:22 A hausak vanglai tak chu a chep hun ani ang a, Tlachhamte chuan a chungah kut an len huai huai ang." 
Job20:23 A pum tipuar turin a thinur hlauhawm tak chu A chungah A tir ang a, A ei atan a chungah A surtir ang," 
Job20:24 Thir hriamhrei chu a tlan bosang ang a, Dar thlangul chuan amah a kap tlang ang." 
Job20:25 A han pawt phawi a, a taksa ata a lo chhuak a, A ni, a hmawr tle tak chu amit ata a lo chhuak a, Thil rapthlak a chungah ahtleng a ni." 
Job20:26 A ro atan thim chhah mup khawl khawl a ni a, Chhem loh mei chuan a kang ral ang a, A puan in ata hnutchhiah apiang a tiral ang." 
Job20:27 Vante chuan a khawlohna an puang ang a, Leiin amah a do ang." 
Job20:28 A ina thil pungte chu an bo ang a, A thinur niah chuan a bungruate an luang ral ang.Hei hi Pathian laka mi suaksual chanpual a ni a, Roluah tur Pathianin a tan a ruat a chu a ni." 
Job20:29 Hei hi Pathian laka mi suaksual chanpual a ni a, Roluah tur Pathianin a tan a ruat a chu a ni." 
Job21:1 Tin, Joba chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job21:2 Ka thusawi hi ngun takin ngaithla teh u, Hei hi in thlamuanna thu chu ni rawh se." 
Job21:3 Mi ngaichang u la, ka han sawi phawt ang a, Ka sawi zawhah la nuihsan ang che u." 
Job21:4 Keia phunnawina hi mihring chungah em ni? Dawhthei rual ka ni em ni? 
Job21:5 Mi en u la, mak ti u la, kutin ka hup rawh u." 
Job21:6 Ka han ngaihtuahin ka mang a ang a, Hlauhnain ka thauvah mi a man thin." 
Job21:7 Eng tizia nge mi suaksualte chu an nun a, An lo upat a, a ni, an lo hmuingil theih ni?" 
Job21:8 An chi thlahte chu an henah an mithmuhah a tinghet a, An rila rahte chu an hmai hmaah." 
Job21:9 An in lote chu hlauhawm lakah a him a, Pathian tiang chu an chungah a tla hek lo." 
Job21:10 An bawngpain chi a thlah a, a pelh ngai lo a, An bawngpuiin no a nei a, a chhiat ngai lo a," 
Job21:11 Ran rual angin an fanaute na chhuahtir a, An fate chu an tualchai a." 
Job21:12 An perhkhuang leh tingtang remin an zai a, An phenglawng thawmah an hlim za a." 
Job21:13 An nite chu neinung takin an khawhral a, Seolah chuan thlamuang takin an liam a," 
Job21:14 Tin, Pathian hnenah, ""Min kalsan rawh, I kawngte hriat hi kan chak lo e," 
Job21:15 Engkimtitheia chu eng nge a nih, a rawng kan bawlna tur chu, A hnenah kan tawngtaiin hlawkna eng nge kan hmuh ang?"" an ti a." 
Job21:16 A! an sum leh pai an kuta awm lo ni lo, Mi sualsualte remruatna chu ka lakah a hla a ni." 
Job21:17 Mi suaksual meichher chu vawi engzat meuh nge a mih a, Vanduaina a chunga a thlen a, A thinurnain Pathianin lungngaihna a pek hlawm?" 
Job21:18 Vawi engzat nge buhpawl thliin a chhem ang an nih a, Favai thlipui len bo ang an nih?" 
Job21:19 Pathianin khawlohna an fate tan a dah, in ti a, Anmahni chungah thlentir ang hmiang, an hriat theihna'n." 
Job21:20 Anmahni mit ngeiin an chhiatna chu hmu se, Engkimtitheia thinurna chu in an hmiang." 
Job21:21 A bo hnuah a in chu a tan eng nge a nih, A thla zat tihtawp a nih hun chuan?" 
Job21:22 Pathian tu nge hriatna zirtir ang? Mi chungnungte pawh rorelsaktu chu? 
Job21:23 A vanglai takin mi a thi a, Muang tak leh nuam taka awmin." 
Job21:24 A taksa chu thauin a khat a, A ruh thling pawh a hnawng a ni." 
Job21:25 Tin, mi dang lungngai takin a thi a, Thatna reng reng tem ngai loin." 
Job21:26 Vaivutah ang khatin an mu a, Changpatin a bawm khat hlawm a." 
Job21:27 Ngai teh, in ngaihtuahte zawng ka hria alawm, Dik lo taka ka chunga in phiarte chu." 
Job21:28 Khawnge hotu in chu a awm? Mi suaksual chenkualna puan in chu khawnge? in ti a. 
Job21:29 Zin vel mite in zawt ngai lo em ni? An sawite chu in pawm lo em ni? 
Job21:30 Mi sual chu vanduai niah zuahin a awm a, Thinur niah hruai chhuah an ni, tih hi." 
Job21:31 Tunge a hmai hmaah a kawng chu piang ang a, Tunge a thiltih chu thungrul ang?" 
Job21:32 Thlanah kalpui a ni a, A thlan chu ven a ni a." 
Job21:33 Lei tlang pawhin a delh na lo. Mi zawng zawngin a hnu an chhui a, A hmaa chhiar sen loh lo awm tawhte ang khan.Tichuan, engtin nge thu engmah lo tak meuha mi thlamuan dawn? In chhannaah hian dawt mai lo chu engmah a awm lo." 
Job21:34 Tichuan, engtin nge thu engmah lo tak meuha mi thlamuan dawn? In chhannaah hian dawt mai lo chu engmah a awm lo." 
Job22:1 Tom E;ofaza Temani mi chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job22:2 Mihrign hian Pathian tan tangkaina a nei em ni? Miin a fin chu a tangkaipui ngei tak e," 
Job22:3 Mi fel i nih chuan Engkimtitheia tan a hlu em ni? I kawnge i tihfamkim chu a tan a hlawk em ni? 
Job22:4 Amah i tihna'n em ni a zilh che a, rorelnaa a luhpui che?" 
Job22:5 I suahsualna a nasa a ni lo maw? I khawlohnain tawp reng a nei hek lo. 
Job22:6 Engmah loan i unau hnen ata dah kham i phut a, Saruakte chu an silhfen i hlihsak a." 
Job22:7 Chaute hnenah tui in tur i pe lo a, Riltamte tan chaw i ui a." 
Job22:8 Tharum thawhin mi ram i la lui a, I duhsak zawngte i pe a." 
Job22:9 Hmeithaite chu ruakin i tir bo a, Pa nei lote ban chu i titliak a." 
Job22:10 Chuvang chuan i velin thang a awm a, Hlauhna chuan a tibuai ta thut che a ni." 
Job22:11 I hmuh theih loh thimna leh Tui tam tak chuan a khuh che. 
Job22:12 Van sangah Pathian a awm lo em ni? Arsi sang berte en la, an sanzia mai chu." 
Job22:13 Pathianin eng nge a hriat? Thim chhah danah a rel thei em ni? 
Job22:14 A hmuh lohna'n chhum chhah takin a khuh a, Van kual chhungah chuan a kal vel a, i ti a," 
Job22:15 Kawng hlui chu i zawh dawn em ni? Mi suaksualten an zawh thina kha? 
Job22:16 Anni chu an hun hmaa lak boin an awm a, An innghahna chu lui len boin a awm a;" 
Job22:17 Pathian hnea Min kiansan rawh, Engkimtitheia chuan eng nge min tih theih? Titute chu," 
Job22:18 Chuti chungin an inte thil thain a tikhat - Mi suaksualte remruat chu ka lakah a hla a ni. 
Job22:19 Mi felte chuan an h mu a, an lawm a, Mi pawikhawih lote chuan anmahni an nuihsan a,m" 
Job22:20 Kan chunga lo dingte tihboin an awm a, A bang meiin a kang ral a, tiin." 
Job22:21 Nangmah ngeiin amah tlawn la, remna siam rawh, Richuan, i tan thil tha alo chhuak ang." 
Job22:22 A kaa chhuak dan chu dawng ngei teh aw, I thinlungah a thu dah tha ang che." 
Job22:23 Engkimtitheia hnena i kir chuan tundin i ni ang a, I puan in ata fel lohna i dah bo daih phawt chuanin," 
Job22:24 I rote chu vaivutah dah la, Ophir rangkachakte chu luite lung zingah dah rawh." 
Job22:25 Engkimtitheia chu i ro a ni ang a, Tangkarua hlu takte chu i ta ani ang." 
Job22:26 Tin, Engkimtitheiaah chuan i lawm tawh ang a, Pathian lam chu i hawi tawh ang." 
Job22:27 A hnenah i tawngai ang a, a ngai thla ang che; Tin, i thutiamte chu i hlena ng." 
Job22:28 Thil i ruat ang a, i tan a ding nghet ang a; Tin, i kawngte chu engin a chhun fo ang." 
Job22:29 An paih thlak che pawhin, Din chhuahna a awm, i ti ang a, Mi inngaitlawm chu a chhandam ang.Pawikhawih lo ni lo pawh a chan chhuak ang a, A ni i kut thianghlimna azarah chhanchhuahin a awm ang." 
Job22:30 Pawikhawih lo ni lo pawh a chan chhuak ang a, A ni i kut thianghlimna azarah chhanchhuahin a awm ang." 
Job23:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job23:2 Vawiin pawh ka vuina hi a nasa e, Ka rum chung pawhin a kut chu a rit a ni." 
Job23:3 Aw, amah ka hmuhtheihna tur lam chu hria i la, A thut hmunah chuan ka kal tur a!" 
Job23:4 Ka thu chu ahmaah ka thlena ng a, Ka ka tanfungin a khat ang." 
Job23:5 A mi chhanna tur thute ka hre duh a, ka hnena a sawi tur chu hriat thiam ka duh." 
Job23:6 A thiltihtheihna ropui chuan mi khing dawn em ni? Hnai lo e, mi bengkhawn zawk ang." 
Job23:7 Tichuan, mi fel chuan a hnenah a ngen ang a, Mi ngaihtuahtu hnen ata chu ka chhuak vang vang ang." 
Job23:8 Ngai teh, hma lam ka han pan a, amah a awm si lo, Hnung lam ka pan a, amah ka hmu thei chuang lo." 
Job23:9 Vei lama a thawh lai pawhin ka hmu thei chuang lo a, Ding lamah a nih leh, a biru a, ka hmu thei lo." 
Job23:10 Ka kawng zawh chu a hria a, Mi fiah hunah rangkachak angin ka chhuak dawn si." 
Job23:11 Ka ke hian hniakhnung tak a dai zel a, A kawng ka zawh a, ka peng lo e." 
Job23:12 A kamchhuak thupek chu ka pensan lo a, A kaa thute chu ka dan aiin ka roh zawk a." 
Job23:13 Mi nghet a ni a, tu nge khawih ber thei ang? A duhzawng chu a ti mai a ni." 
Job23:14 Ka chana ruat chu a ti a, A rilruah chutiang chu a awm teuh a ni." 
Job23:15 Chuvang chuan ahmaah ka buai a, Ka ngaihtuahnain amah ka hlau." 
Job23:16 Pathianin ka thinlung chu a tichau a, Engkimtitheia chuan mi tibuai a.Thimna chuan mi hual vel a, Thim chhah pui chuan ka hmai a khuh a." 
Job23:17 Thimna chuan mi hual vel a, Thim chhah pui chuan ka hmai a khuh a." 
Job24:1 Engkimtitheian engah nge hun a ruat loh. 
Job24:2 Amah hretuten engah nge a nite an hmuh loh? Ri sawn chinge an awm a, Ran rual an man lui a, an vulh a." 
Job24:3 Pa nei lote sabengtung an um bosak a, Hmeithai bawngpa, dahkham atan an laksak a," 
Job24:4 Tlachhamte kawng an botir a, Leia retheite an biru a." 
Job24:5 Ngai teh, thlalera ram sabengtungte angin Taima taka ei tur zawngin an hna an va thawk a, An fate tan thlalerin chaw a tum a," 
Job24:6 An chaw tur ram ata an at a, Mi sual grep huan hmaihthelh an vai," 
Job24:7 Silhfen loin zankhuain an mu a, Khaw vatah inkhuhna an nei lo." 
Job24:8 Tlanga ruahpuiin a nan huh a, Phen tur nei loin lungpui an b el a." 
Job24:9 Pa nei lo hnute hne lai pawhthlaksak chingte an awm a, Retheite hnen aa dahkhamah an la a." 
Job24:10 Silhfen loin saruakin an vakvai a, Rilram chungin buhphalte an pu a;" 
Job24:11 Hriak an siam a, chung mite hung chhungah chuan, Uain sawrna an chil a, tuihal chungin." 
Job24:12 Khawpui bip takah mite an rum a, Mi hliam rilru chu a au chhuak a; Pathian lahin thil dik lo chu a bengkhawn hek lo." 
Job24:13 Eng lakah lo helte an awm a, A kawngte lah an hre lo a, A kawng takah pawh an awm lo." 
Job24:14 Vartianah tualthtattu chu a tho a, Rethei leh tlachhamte a that a, Zanah chuan rukru ang mai a ni." 
Job24:15 Uirepa mitin thimhmul a thlir a, tuma'n mi hmu lo ang, tiin. Hmai khuhnain ahmel a tuam a." 
Job24:16 Thimah inte an lai pawp a, Chhunah an inkhar khung a, Eng reng an hre lo." 
Job24:17 An za atan zing chu thihna daihlim ang a ni a, Thihna dailhlim tihbaiawm chu an nel a." 
Job24:18 Tui chungah chuan chak taka len an ni a, Leiah hian an chanvo chu anchhedawng a ni, Grep huap kawng lam a hawi lo e." 
Job24:19 Khaw ro leh lumin vurtui a tiral a, Seolin thil tisualte." 
Job24:20 Chhulin a theihnghilh a, changpatin tui takin a ei a, Hriat reng a ni tawh lo vang a, Suahsualna chu thing angin a tliang a." 
Job24:21 Ching, fa hring lo chu a ei a, Hmeithai thil tha a tihsak lo." 
Job24:22 Pathian chuan a chaknain thiltitheite nun chu a tisei a, Dam an beisei loh hnu pawhin an tho chhuak a." 
Job24:23 Hlimna a siamsak a, tah chuan an chawl a, An kawngah chuan a mit a fu reng a." 
Job24:24 Chawisan an ni a, rei loean an ral a; Mi dang angin an vuai a, an chuai a, Buh vui angah chhumin an awm ta a.Tunah chuti ni suh se la, tu nge daw mi ti thei ang a, Ka tawng kha engmah loah sawi thei ang." 
Job24:25 Tunah chuti ni suh se la, tu nge daw mi ti thei ang a, Ka tawng kha engmah loah sawi thei ang." 
Job25:1 Tichuan, Bildada Suhi mi chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job25:2 A hnenah chuan rorelna leh hlauhawmna a awm a, A hmun sangahte chuan remna a siam a." 
Job25:3 A sipai ruale chu chhiar rual em ni? Tu chungah nge a eng a chhuah loh? 
Job25:4 Engtin nge Pathian hmaah mi a fel theih ang le? Engtin nge hmeichhe hrin a thianghlim theih ang? 
Job25:5 Ngai teh, thla meuh pawh khian enna a nei nem, Arsite pawh a mithmuhah chuan a thianghlim lo.Mihring lek phei chu e, thil lung mai a ni! Mihring fapa chu changpat mai a ni." 
Job25:6 Mihring lek phei chu e, thil lung mai a ni! Mihring fapa chu changpat mai a ni." 
Job26:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhang a, heti hia a ti a:" 
Job26:2 Chakna nei lo mi chu i va han pui ve le! Thahrui nei lo ban chu i va han chhan ve le! 
Job26:3 Finna nei lo chu i han zilh fing a, Hriatna tha tak i sawi hnem teh e!" 
Job26:4 Tu hnenah nge thu i chhah chhuak a, Tu thlarau nge i hne ata lo chhuak ni!" 
Job26:5 Thi tawhte an khur a, Tuite leh a chhunga chengte hnuaiah chuan" 
Job26:6 A hmaah chuan Seol chu saruak ani a, Abadon chuan khuhna anei lo." 
Job26:7 Hmun ruakah chuan hmar a tipharh a, Lei chu engmah loah a khai kang a." 
Job26:8 A chhum chah tak chuan tuite a fun khawm a, An hnuaia chhum chu a keh lo a." 
Job26:9 A lalthutthleng hma chu a khuh a, A chunah chhum a zintir a." 
Job26:10 Tui ramri a siam a, Thim leh eng thlen chinte nen." 
Job26:11 Van dona bante chu a nghing dur dur a, A zilhhauna chu mak an ti a." 
Job26:12 A thiltihtheihnain tuipui a tingwai a A hriatthiamnain Rahab chu a tan chhum a. 
Job26:13 A thawin van chu a tithiang a, A kutin rulpui tlan chak chu a thil tlang a.Ngai teh, he'ng hi a kawng pawn lam lek a ni, A chanchin kan hriat hi a va beithem em! A thiltihtheihna ri thawm chu tu nge hre zo thei ang?" 
Job26:14 Ngai teh, he'ng hi a kawng pawn lam lek a ni, A chanchin kan hriat hi a va beithem em! A thiltihtheihna ri thawm chu tu nge hre zo thei ang?" 
Job27:1 Tin, Joba chuan a thusawi a chhunzawm a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job27:2 Ka thiamna thu la botu, ka thlarau tilungngaitu Pathian, Engkimtitheia chu nung na pui!" 
Job27:3 (Keimahah hian ka thaw a la kim a, Ka hnarah Pathian thaw a la cham);" 
Job27:4 Ka hmuiin fel lohna thu a phuh chuak tawp lo ang, Ka leiin bumna thu a sawi hek lo ang," 
Job27:5 Thiam ka chantir dawn teuh lo mei che u, Ka thih thlengin ka dikna ka dah bo lo ang." 
Job27:6 Ka felna chu ka chelh tlat ang a, ka thlah lo ang: Ka nun chhung hian ka thinlungin mi dem lo e," 
Job27:7 Ka hmelma chu mi suaksual ni se la, Mi beitu chu mi fel lo ni teh se." 
Job27:8 Pathian ngaihsak lo tan beiseina eng nge awm, Pathianin a sah chhuma a thlarau a lak si chuan?" 
Job27:9 Buainain a nan laiin Pathianin a au thawm a ngaithla ang em? 
Job27:10 Engkimtitheiaah chuan a lawm ang em? Pathian chu eng lai pawhin a ko ang em? 
Job27:11 Pathian kut chungchang ka zirtir ang che u, Engkimtitheia hnena awm chu ka zep lo ang." 
Job27:12 Ngai ru, nangni ngeiin in vaiin in hmu a, Eng tiziaa khawlo cheu nge in nih?" 
Job27:13 Pathian hnena mi suaksual chanvo chu hei hi a ni, Hnehchhiahtute rochan, Engkimtitheia hnena an dawn chu." 
Job27:14 A fate an pun chuan khandaih tuar tur fang an ni; A rila rahten chaw kham khawp pawh an nei lo ang. 
Job27:15 A hnua dam chhunte chu hriin a phum ang a, An nupuite pawhin an sun lo ang." 
Job27:16 Tangkaruate vaivut angin a khawl a, Hlum ang maiin a silhfente a tiang khawm na a;" 
Job27:17 Tiang khawm mah se, mi fel chuan a sinsak ang a, Pawikhawih lote chuan tangkarua chu an insem ang." 
Job27:18 Maimawm angin a in chu a sa a, Vengtuin chhawl buk a siam ang lekin." 
Job27:19 Hausain a mu a, mahse, a tho tawh lawng; A mit a han meng a, a awm tawh lo." 
Job27:20 Tui lian angin hlauhawmin a nang a, Zanah thlipuiin a la a." 
Job27:21 Khaw chhak thliin a len bo a, a bo ta a, A hmun ata a nuai bo ta." 
Job27:22 Zahngai loin a nuai ang a, A thiltihtheihna hmaah chuan a kat rawk rawk ang.A kut a benkhum ang a, A chekkhum ang a, a hmun ata a um chhuak ang." 
Job27:23 A kut a benkhum ang a, A chekkhum ang a, a hmun ata a um chhuak ang." 
Job28:1 Tangkaraw laih chhuahna khur a awm a, Rangkachak tihthianghlimna hmun pawh a awm." 
Job28:2 Lei ata thir lak chhuah a ni a, Lung ata dar rawh tui a ni." 
Job28:3 Miten thim an titawp a, Hmun hla berte pawh an zawng chhuak a, Thim chhah tak leh thihna daihlima lungte pawh chu." 
Job28:4 Mite chen lohnaah khur an lai a, A chunga kal velten an theihnghilh a, Mi hlatnaah an inkhat a, an inthen an inthen a." 
Job28:5 Lei hi chaw lo chhuahna a ni a, A chhung chu mei kan anga chawh leh a ni a." 
Job28:6 Chuta lungte chu saphir hmun a ni a, Rangkachak nawite a awm a." 
Job28:7 Chu kawng chu sa hel ei vaten an hre lo a, Mu mit pawhin a hmu bawk hek lo." 
Job28:8 Ramsa ngeng ngalhte pawhin an rap ngai lo a, Tah chuan sakeibaknei kawlh a kal ngai hek lo." 
Job28:9 Mi chuan lung chang takah a kut a thlak a, Tlang lian pui pui, a bul nen lam a hnai let a." 
Job28:10 Lungpuite a verh tlang seng sung a, Thil hlu tinreng a mitin a hmu." 
Job28:11 Put hauh loin luite a khuap chat a, Thil inthupte engah a la chhuak a." 
Job28:12 Mahse, khawnge finna hmuhna tur chu? Hriatna awmna hmun chu khawiah nge?" 
Job28:13 Mihringin aman chin a hre lo a, Mi nung ramah hmuh a ni hek lo." 
Job28:14 Thukna chuan, ""Keimahah a awm lo,"" a ti a, Tuipui chuan, ""Ka hnenah a awm lo,"" a ti bawk a." 
Job28:15 Rangkachaka lei theih a i lo a, A man atan tangkarua buk chhuah mi a ni hek lo." 
Job28:16 Ophir rangkachakin a tluk thei lo a, Oniks lunghlu emaw, saphir emaw pawhin a ltuk thei hek lo." 
Job28:17 Rangkachak leh lung fimin a ltuk lo a, Rangkachak thianghlim cheimawiin thleng theih a ni lo." 
Job28:18 Koral te, Krustal te, sawi rual a awm lo, A ni, finna man chu lunghlu aiin a chungnung." 
Job28:19 Ethiopia topaz pawhin a khan lo a, Rangkachak thianghlim nen khaikhin rual a ni lo." 
Job28:20 A nih, finna chu khawi ata nge? Hriata awmna hmun chu khawiah nge?" 
Job28:21 Thinlung zawng zawng mit lakah thup a ni a, Chungleng savate lakah khar tlat a ni." 
Job28:22 Boralna leh Thihna chuan, ""A tlawm zawng kan bengin kan hria,"" an ti a." 
Job28:23 Pathianin a kawng chu a hria a, A awmna hmun pawh a hria." 
Job28:24 Lei tawp thlengin a thlir a, Van hnuai pum pui hi a hmu." 
Job28:25 Thli chakna a pek lai khan, A ni, tuite pawh tehnaa a teh chhuah lai khan," 
Job28:26 Ruahtui tan dan a siam lai khan, Khawpi ri, kawlphe tan kawng a siam lai khan," 
Job28:27 A ni chuan a hmu a, a puang a, A tinghet a, a ni, a zawng chhuak a.Tin, mihring hnenah, ""Ngai rawh, LALPA tih hi, hei ngei hi finna a ni, thil tha lo kalsan hi hriat thiamna a ni,"" a ti a." 
Job28:28 Tin, mihring hnenah, ""Ngai rawh, LALPA tih hi, hei ngei hi finna a ni, thil tha lo kalsan hi hriat thiamna a ni,"" a ti a." 
Job29:1 Tin, Joba chuan a thusawi cha chhunzawm a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job29:2 Aw, tun hma thla ral taahte khan awm ni i la, Pathianin mi ven lai niahte khan," 
Job29:3 A khawnvar ka lu chungah a eng thin a, Thimah pawh a eng ringin ka kal tlang a," 
Job29:4 Ka vanglai nite ka hman laia, Pathian pawlna ka puan ina a awm lai khan," 
Job29:5 Engkimtitheia ka hnena a awm thin laia, Ka fate ka vela an awm lai khan," 
Job29:6 Ka kalnate hnute khala chulh a nih laia, Lungpuiin ka tan hriak a luang chhuahtir dul dul lai khan!" 
Job29:7 Khawpui kawngka pana ka kal a, Kawttlera thutna ka buatsaih laite khan`," 
Job29:8 tlangvalten mi hmu a, an biru a, Upate an tho a, an ding a;" 
Job29:9 Hotute chu an tawng lai an chawl a, An kutin an ka an hup a;" 
Job29:10 Mi liante aw a reh a, An dang chungah an lei a bet a." 
Job29:11 Benga hriaten nihlawh mi ti a, Mita hmuten mi hriatpui a;" 
Job29:12 Mi rethei tap ka chhan chhuah thin avangin, Pa nei lo, puitu nei lote pawh." 
Job29:13 Boral dawn tepte malsawmna ka chungah athleng a, Hmeithai thinlung pawh hlimin ka zaitir a." 
Job29:14 Felna chu ka inbel a, mi tuam vel a, Ka tihdik thinzia hi kawrfual leh lukhum ang a ni." 
Job29:15 Mitdel tan mit ka ni a, Kebai tan ke ka ni a." 
Job29:16 Tlachham tan pa ka ni a, Ka hmel hriat lohte pawh an thu ka buapui a." 
Job29:17 Mi fel lo ngho chu ka titliak a, A haa a thil seh chu ka pawt chhuak a." 
Job29:18 Tichuan, ka bu zawlah ka thi ang a, Ka nite tiauvut angin ka tipung ang a," 
Job29:19 Tui lamahte ka zung a zam darh ang a, Zankhuain ka zarah dai a cham reng ang a," 
Job29:20 Ka ropuina hi keimahah a thar reng ang a, Ka kutah ka thalngul pawh a thar reng,"" ka ti rilru a." 
Job29:21 Ka lamah mi'n beng an dawh a, an ngaithla a, Ka thu nghakin an ngawi thap thin." 
Job29:22 Ka sawi zawhah an tawng ve tawh ngai lo; Ka thusawi chu an chungah a tla. 
Job29:23 Ruahtui angin mi nghak reng thin, Ruah hnuhnung chak angin an ka an lo ang a." 
Job29:24 An inrinhlelh laiin ka nuihpui a, Ka hmel hlim chu an tihnual lo.An kawng ka thlang a, hotuah ka thu a, Sipai rual zingah lalber angin ka awm a, Lusunte thlamuantu angin." 
Job29:25 An kawng ka thlang a, hotuah ka thu a, Sipai rual zingah lalber angin ka awm a, Lusunte thlamuantu angin." 
Job30:1 Tunah zawng ka aia nauten mi nuihzat a, An pate kan ran rual vengtu ui zinga Telah pawh ka duh lohte khan." 
Job30:2 A ni, chung thathum mite chu. An kut thahrui ka hnemhnanpui em ni?" 
Job30:3 Tlachham leh riltamin an cher a, Ram ro leh kawlh chu an khel a." 
Job30:4 Hnimbuk hnah nemte an thliak a, Juniper zunge an chaw a ni." 
Job30:5 Mihring zing ata hnawh boin an awm a, Rukru angin an au zui a." 
Job30:6 Ruam kumkarahte an cheng a, Lei khuarkhurum leh lungpuipukahte." 
Job30:7 Hnimbuk zingahte an chiau a,m Taiten hnuaiahte chuan an tawm khawm a." 
Job30:8 Mi ate fa an ni a, a ni, tlaktlai lo ber fate; Ram ata vuak chhuah an ni." 
Job30:9 Tunah zawng an hla ka lo ni ta, A ni, an kamram mai ka ni ta." 
Job30:10 Mi ten a, an inthiar fihlim a, Ka hmaa chil chhak pawh an tim lo." 
Job30:11 A hruihrual chu a phelh a, mi nghaisak tak avangin, Ka hmaah insumkarna an thlah thak a." 
Job30:12 Ka ding lamah mi ruraho an lo thawk a, Ka ke an nek per a. An tihchhiatna kawng chu ka chungah an din a." 
Job30:13 Ka kawng an tichhia a, Ka vanduaina an tizual a, Tuma'n an dal lo." 
Job30:14 A pawp zau laiah an lo kal a, A chim zingah mi hual a." 
Job30:15 Tihbaiawm ka chungah athleng a, Ka roupna thli angin an um bo a, Ka mithatna chhum angin a riral ta." 
Job30:16 Keimah ata ka thlarau leih chhuah a ni; Chhiatna nite chuan mi man ta e. 
Job30:17 Zanah chuan ka ruhte a kher ngut ngut a, Ka na mi fep sup sup hi a chawl lo." 
Job30:18 Ka na hian ka silhfente a tikhawlo ve, Ka kawrnghawng angin mi rek a." 
Job30:19 Chirhdiakah chuan mi paih lut a, Vaivut leh vut ang mai ka ni ta e." 
Job30:20 Nang ka au che a, mi chhang lo a, Ka ding a, nangin mi hawi lo." 
Job30:21 Ka lakah i nun a lo rawng ta a, I kut chakin mi tiduhdah a." 
Job30:22 Nangin thliah mi chawi kang a, a chungah mi chuantir a; Nangin thlipuiah mi tiral ta." 
Job30:23 Nangin thihna mi thlen ang tih ka hria a sin, Mi nung zawng zawng tana ruat inah chuan." 
Job30:24 Chim chhe vum chungah miin a kut aphar ngeiin A vanduainaah chuan tanpui dilin a au dawn lo'm ni? 
Job30:25 Buaina tawkte tan ka tap thin lo'm ni? Chhamdalte tan ka lungngai thin lo'm ni? 
Job30:26 thil tha ka zawng a, thil chhia a lo thleng a, Eng ka nghak a, thim alo thleng a." 
Job30:27 Ka thin aphu hlawp hlawp a, a reh thei lo a, Tuarna nite chu ka chungaha thleng a." 
Job30:28 Ni em vang ni loin ka dum a, Pungkhawmho zinga dingin tanpui ka dil a." 
Job30:29 Kawluite tan unaupa ka ni a, Ostrich-te tan thian ka ni a." 
Job30:30 Ka vun chu a lo dum a, a khawk a, Ka ruhte chu a lum vut vut a.Chuvang chuan ka perhkhuang ri chu sunnaah a chang a, Ka phenglawng chu taptu awah." 
Job30:31 Chuvang chuan ka perhkhuang ri chu sunnaah a chang a, Ka phenglawng chu taptu awah." 
Job31:1 Ka mit atan thuthlung ka siam a, Engah nge nula ka melh ang?" 
Job31:2 Chunga Pathian laka chanvo leh Chungnung ber Engkimtitheia laka rochan tur chu eng nge ni? 
Job31:3 Mi fel lo tana vanduaina leh Khawlohna titute tana chhiatna a ni lo em ni? 
Job31:4 Ka kawngte chu a hmuin Ka ke pen zawng zawng a chhiar lo em ni? 
Job31:5 Dawt lama kal ka nih a, Bumna lama ka ke pen rang thin ka nih chuan." 
Job31:6 (Bukna dik taka tehin awm i la, Ka dikna hi Pathianin a hriatna'n)" 
Job31:7 Tin, kawng loa peng ka lo nih a, Ka mithmuh ang maia thinlung pu ka lo nih a, Ka kutah hian kaidum reng a bei phawt chuan," 
Job31:8 Ka tuh chu mi dangin ei mai ang hmiang; Ka chin zawng pawh kar chhuah ni rawh se. 
Job31:9 Ka thinlung hian hmeichhia a it a, Ka thenawm kawngkaah chang te ka nih chuan," 
Job31:10 Ka nupui chuan mi dang sum deng se la, Mi dangte chuan tlawm rawh se." 
Job31:11 Chu chu sual huatthlala tak, Khawlohna, roreltuten an hrem ngei tur chu a ni si a." 
Job31:12 Ral der khawpa kangtu mei a ni bawk a, Ka sum neih zawng zawng pawh a khawrh fai vek dawn a ni." 
Job31:13 Ka chhiahhlawhnu emaw, ka chhiahhlawhpa emaw, Ka chunga an vuivaina thu thlen ka ngaihsak loh luih chuan," 
Job31:14 Pathian a lo thawh hunah eng nge a rawn zawh chian hunah engtin nge ka chhan ang? A rawn zawh chia hunah engtin nge ka chhan ang? 
Job31:15 Pum chhunga kei mi siamtu khan a ni pawh a siam lo em ni? Pum chhunga mi dintu chu thuhmun a ni lo'm ni? 
Job31:16 Tlachhamte duhzawng ka sum bosak a, Hmeithaite bei ka tihdawn a," 
Job31:17 Ka chaw keimah maia ka ei a, Fahrahin a ei ve loh chuan,m" 
Job31:18 (A naupan lai atangin pa angin ka chawm lian a, A nu pum atangin ka kaihhruai a ni tawh si)" 
Job31:19 Tupawh silhfen loa boral emaw, Rethei intuamhlawmna nei lo emaw hmu ka nih a," 
Job31:20 A kawngin mal mi sawm lo a nih chuan, Ka beram hmual tuam lum a nih loh huan," 
Job31:21 Kawngkaah chuan tanpuitu ka hmuh avanga Fahrah chunga kut lek ka nih chuan," 
Job31:22 Ka kovi hi ka dar saipheng nen phawk hlawk se la, Ka ban hi khingkhangruh atangin thlawn hlauh rawh se" 
Job31:23 Pathian lak ata vanduaina chu ka tihzawng tak a ni si a. A ropuina avangi eng ti rual ka ni lo. 
Job31:24 Rangkachak chu ka nghahfaka ka hman a, Rangkachak tha mi chu ka rinchhana ka ngaih a," 
Job31:25 Ka hausakna a nasat avang leh Ka kutin a thawh chhuah nasat avanga lawm ka lo nih a," 
Job31:26 Ni khi a en lai leh Thla kal ruau ruau lam ka hawi a," 
Job31:27 Ka thinlung hi a ruk tea hip bo a nih a, Ka kut pawhin ka ka a hup chuan," 
Job31:28 Chu pawh chu roreltute hrem ngei tur khawlohna a ni a, Chugna Pathian hnena daw ka nih dawn avangin." 
Job31:29 Mi hawtu chhiatna chunga lawm ka nih emaw a, thil tha loin a tlakbuak laia lawm hlut ka nih emaw chuan," 
Job31:30 (A ni, a nunna anchhe lawh khawpa Sual ti turin ka ka phal lo)" 
Job31:31 Ka puan ina mite chuan, A buhbala inhnangfak lo tu nge awm? An tih loh chuan," 
Job31:32 (Mikhualte kawtthlerah an riak lo a, Mi zin vakte tan ka kawng ka hawng thin)" 
Job31:33 Mite tih dang anga ka bawhchhiatna zep a, Mahni awm chhunga khawlohna thukruin" 
Job31:34 Mipui tam takte hlauh avang leh chhungkuate hmusit hlauh vanga Ngawi reng leh leng chhuak ngam lo ka nih chuan - 
Job31:35 Aw, mi bengkhawntu nei teh u la aw! (En teh u, hei ka chhinchhiahna ka dah e, Engkimtitheian mi chhang teh se) Ka khingpuipan mi hekna a ziak chu nei teh i la aw!" 
Job31:36 Ka koviah ka pu ang a, Lallukhum angin ka inbel tur a!" 
Job31:37 Ka pheikhai zat pawh ka hriilh ang a, Mi lain ni ve angin amah ka pan tur." 
Job31:38 Ka ram chu mi duh loa au chhuak a nih a, A lei rutkhuarte an tap hlawm a nih chuan," 
Job31:39 Man pe loa a rha chhuahte ei ka lo nih a, A neitute nun hlohtir emaw ka lo nih chuan,Buh aiah hling to zawk se la, Tai aiah hlo har to rawh se, Joba thu chu a tawp ta." 
Job31:40 Buh aiah hling to zawk se la, Tai aiah hlo har to rawh se, Joba thu chu a tawp ta." 
Job32:1 Tin, he'ng mi pathumte hian Joba chu an chhang zel ta lo a, fel a intih em avangin." 
Job32:2 Tichuan Barakela fapa Elihua, Buz mi, ram thlahho zinga mi chu a thinrim ta em em mai a; Pathian ai maha amah thiam a inchantir avangin Joba chungah chuan a thin arim a ni." 
Job32:3 Joba thian pathumte chungah pawh chuan a thinrim bawk a, Joba chu thiam lo an ti chunga chhan ngaihna an hriat loh avangiin." 
Job32:4 Anni chu a aia upa an nih avangin Elihua chu Joba hnenah thu sawi ve loin a inkhek reng a. 
Job32:5 Tin, Elihua chuan he'ng mi pathumte kaah hian chhanna reng a awm ta lo tih a hriatin a thinur ta hle mai a." 
Job32:6 Tichuan, Barakela fapa Elihua, Buz mi chuan a chhang a, heti hian a ti a: Ka naupang a, nangni in upa a, Chuvang chuan ka tim a, ka ngaihdan pawh ka hrilh ngam lo che u a," 
Job32:7 Khuareiin hril se la, Kum tamin finna zirtir teh se, ka ti a:" 
Job32:8 Mahse, mi thil hriat thiamtirtu chu Mihringa thlarau awm, Engkimtitheia thaw chu a ni." 
Job32:9 Kum tam hi an fing chuang lo a, Upaten thudik an hrethiam chuang lo," 
Job32:10 Chuvang chuan mi ngaithla u la, Ka ngaih dan ka han sawi teh ang, ka ti a ni." 
Job32:11 Ngai teh u, in thu ka nghak reng a, Sawi tur in dap thleng khan, In tan danah beng ka lo chhi reng a." 
Job32:12 A ni, ngun takin ka dawngsawng che u a, Ngai rawh u, Joba hnial hneh thei emaw, A thu letthla thei emaw in zingah tumah in awm lo." 
Job32:13 Fimkhur rawh u; 'Fing tak kan tawk a lo ni a, Mihring ni loin, Pathian chauhin a hneh thei ang,' In ti rawk ang e." 
Job32:14 A thuin kei mi la vawm ve lo a, In tih dan ang maiin ka chhang dawn hek lo." 
Job32:15 An inkhap thlu der a, an dan reng hi. Kam khat mah sawi tur an nei ta lo." 
Job32:16 Dang renga dinga an chhan tawh loh avang hian Kei pawhin ka nghak ve reng dawn em ni? 
Job32:17 Keima pualin ka chang ang a, Ka ngaih dan ka han sawi teh ang." 
Job32:18 Thu lah ka ngah hle si a, Chhung lam rilruin mi tur nasa a ni." 
Job32:19 Ngai rawh u, ka thinlung hi uain hu chhuahna nei lo ang a ni a, Uain peng thar angin a puak dawn tep a ni." 
Job32:20 Thuin ka inhri thla dawn e, Ka ka ka ang ang a, ka chang ang." 
Job32:21 Tumah ka zahpah lo mai ang a, Tumah ka fek der hek lo ang.Fak der ka thiam si lo a, Chutilochu, mi Siamtuin mi la bo thuai mai ang." 
Job32:22 Fak der ka thiam si lo a, Chutilochu, mi Siamtuin mi la bo thuai mai ang." 
Job33:1 Engpawh ni se, Joba, ka tawng hi ngaithla la, Ka thu zawng zawngah hian beng lo chhi teh." 
Job33:2 Ngai teh, hei ka ka ka ang ta a, ka leiin thu a sawi hi." 
Job33:3 Ka thute chuan ka thinlung ngilzia a tilang a, Ka hmui chuan a thil hriat chu dik takin a sawi dawn e." 
Job33:4 Pathian thlarau chuan mi siam a, Engkimtitheia thaw chuan nunna mi pe." 
Job33:5 I theih chuan mi chhang la, Tan khawh la, ka hmaah hian I thute chu siam rem rawh le," 
Job33:6 Ngai teh, Pathian lam thuah chuan Nangmah ang bawk ka ni a, Hluma siam ve bawk ka ni." 
Job33:7 Ngai teh, kei hi mi hlau suh la, Ka nawr lutuk lo ang che." 
Job33:8 Ka beng hriatah i sawi tawh tak a, I thu ri chu ka lo hre tawh a." 
Job33:9 Ka thiang a ni, bawhchhiatna nei loin; Ka fihlim a ni, khawlohna nei loin;" 
Job33:10 I e, ka chungah remchang a dap chhuak a, A hmelmaah mi chhiar a ni;" 
Job33:11 Ka keah kawl mi bun a, Ka kalna zawng zawng a chhui chhuak a ni,' i ti a." 
Job33:12 Ngai teh, ka chhang ang che, Hetah hian i fel zo zan lo e; Pathian chu mihring aiin a ropui zawk a ni." 
Job33:13 Thu khat mah a chan loh avangin Engah nge amah i beih le? 
Job33:14 Pathianin kawng khatin thu a sawi thin a, A ni, kawng hnih pawhin, pawisak loh pawh ni se." 
Job33:15 Mumangah, zan inlarnaah chuan Mite tui taka an muthilh a, Khum laizawla an mut chiah chiah laiin," 
Job33:16 Mite beng chu a tihawng a, An thu dawn chu a tinghet a," 
Job33:17 Mihring chu a thiltih thulhtir a, A chapona chu a thupsak theihna'n;" 
Job33:18 Ani chu thlana liam loin a vawng a, A nun pawh khandaih laka boral loin." 
Job33:19 A khum laizawlah natnaa thununin a awm a, A ruh zawng zawng na sup supin;" 
Job33:20 Tichuan, chaw te ka hua a, Sa tuihmel takte pawha duh lo a." 
Job33:21 A tisa a lo cher deuh deuh a, hmuh tham a ni lo a, Ruh hlir ruh hlir a ni a." 
Job33:22 A ni chuan thihna kotlang a hnaih a, A nun chuan tiboraltute a hnaih tawh a ni." 
Job33:23 Mi hnena a tana tha hriattir turin A tan vantirhkoh, palai pakhat, sang zinga mi awm se la," 
Job33:24 Tin, chu mi chuan amah duhsak takin, Thlana liam loin chhanhimang che, Tlanna ka hmu ta e;" 
Job33:25 A taksa hi tleirawl thar leh se la, A vanglai chakna nite chu lo kir leh tawh se,' ti se la;" 
Job33:26 Chu mi chu pathian hnenah a tawngtai a, Ani chuan a lo pawm a. A hmel chu hlim takin a hmu ang a, Anin a hnenah felna chu a pe leh ang." 
Job33:27 Mite hmaah hla sain: Ka sual a, thil dik chu ka tikhawlo a, Mahse, mi thungrul lo e:" 
Job33:28 Thlana liam lo turin mi chhanhim a, Ka nunin khaw eng a lo hmu ang, a ti a." 
Job33:29 29-30, Ngai rawh, mihringin nunna eng a hmuh theihna'na Thlan ata hrui kir turin Pathianin he'ng thil zawng zawngte hi Mihring hnenah vawi hnih vawi thum a ti a ni." 
Job33:30 29-30, Ngai rawh, mihringin nunna eng a hmuh theihna'na Thlan ata hrui kir turin Pathianin he'ng thil zawng zawngte hi Mihring hnenah vawi hnih vawi thum a ti a ni." 
Job33:31 E, Joba, ngun takin mi ngaithla teh, Lo ngawi la, ka han sawi ang e." 
Job33:32 Sawi tur i neih chuan mi chhang la, Sawi rawh thiam chantir che ka duh a ni;Chuti a nih loh chuan, mi ngaithla rawh, Lo ngawi la, finna ka zirtir ang che." 
Job33:33 Chuti a nih loh chuan, mi ngaithla rawh, Lo ngawi la, finna ka zirtir ang che." 
Job34:1 Tin, Elihua chuan a sawi zel a: Nangni mi fingte u, ka thute ngaithla rawh u la, Nangni mi thiamte u, in beng dawh rawh u." 
Job34:2 Kain ei mi a hria angin Bengin thu a thliar a ni. 
Job34:3 Kan tana dik chu thlang i la, A tha chu keimahniin i chian ang u." 
Job34:4 Joba, 'Fel zawng ka fel a ni, Pathianin ka thiamna mi hnawlsakin," 
Job34:5 Ka thiam reng chung hi dawtheiah mi chhiar mai pawh a: Bawhchhiatna ka nei lo chungin Ka hliam chu tihdam rual a ni lo,' a ti si." 
Job34:6 Joba ang hi tu nge awm, Tui anga deuna ina," 
Job34:7 Khawlohna titute pawla, Mi suaksualte nena leng thin chu?" 
Job34:8 Pathian chunga lawm hi Mihringin engah mah a sawtpui lo e,' a ti vei nen." 
Job34:9 Chuvangin, nangni, mi rilru neite u, Mi ngaithla rawh u, Pathian chuan thil suaksual tiin Engkimtitheia chuan thil dik lo chu a ti teuh lo ang." 
Job34:10 Mite an thiltih ang zelin a thungrul ang a, Mi tin, an awm dan ang zelin an chungah a thlentir dawn si a." 
Job34:11 A ni, Pathian chuan suaksual takin a ti lul lo ang a Engkimtitheia chuan a rel khawlo hek lo ang." 
Job34:12 Tunge lei hi amah awptir a, Khawvel pum pui hi a hnena kawltir ni?" 
Job34:13 Ama thlarau chu ahnea a lak kir a, Ama thaw chu a hnena a lak khawm leh chuan," 
Job34:14 Mi nung zawng zawng an boral rual ang a, Mihring chu vaivutah a chang leh mai ang." 
Job34:15 Hriat thiamna i neih chuan hei hi ngaithla la, Ka tawng ri hi bengkhawn rawh." 
Job34:16 Thudik hawtu chuan ro a rel ang em ni? Mi fel leh thiltitheia chu thiam loh i chantir ang em ni? 
Job34:17 Ani chu lalber hnena, ""Tlaktlailopa,"" Mi lian hnena, ""Suaksualpa,"" titu," 
Job34:18 Hotute pawh duhsak bik lo leh Mi rethei aia mi hausak ngaihsak chuang lo ani a, An zain a kutchhuak an ni si a." 
Job34:19 Mit khap kar loah an thi a, Zanlaiah mite an khur a, an ral a, Mi chakte pawh kut loa lak boin an awm." 
Job34:20 Mihring awm dan chungah mit a len a, A pheikhai zawng zawnga a hmu vek si a." 
Job34:21 Khawlohna titue an bihruk theihna tur Thim a awm lo a, thihna daihlim a awm hek lo." 
Job34:22 Pathianhmaa rorelnaa kal turin Mihring tan hun bi a ruat si lo. 
Job34:23 Mi chakte chu a titiau va- an thu rel loin, An hmunah midangte a dah thin." 
Job34:24 Chutiang chuan an thilte chu hriain Zanah anmahni a tichhia a, a nuai bo a." 
Job34:25 Mite mithmuhah anni chu Mi sual hremin a hrem a," 
Job34:26 Ama laka an pen bo avang leh A dante an pawisak loh avangin; 
Job34:27 A beng thleng khawp khawpion retheite an rumtir a, Ani chuan hnehchhiahte au thawm chu a lo hria a." 
Job34:28 Ani chu lo ngawi se la tu nge thiam loh chantir thei ang? A hmel a thup laiin tuin nge hmu thei ang? Hnam tan emaw, mi mal tan emaw thuhmun a ni." 
Job34:29 Pathian hre lo mi chuan ro a rel lohna tur leh Mipui an awkai lohna'n. 
Job34:30 Miin Pathian hnenah chuan, Pawi ka khawih lo na a, hremna ka tuar si," 
Job34:31 Ka hmuh loh chu mi zirtir la, Khawlohna ka tih pawhin, Ka ti tawh lo ang,' a ti ngei em ni?" 
Job34:32 Pathian thungrulhna chu i duh ang kher em ni dawn a, I lo hnial ni? Kei ni loin nangin i thlang tur a ni, Chuvangin, hriat chu sawi rawh khai" 
Job34:33 Mi rilru neite leh mi fingte Mi ngaithla apiang pawhin," 
Job34:34 Joba hi chinchang hre loin a tawng mai mai a ni e,m A thu-ah hian finna a awm lo e, mi tihpui ang." 
Job34:35 Joba hi mi sual tawnga a tawng avang hian Fiah fai vekin awm se ka ti a ni.A sual belhchhahin a hel a, Kan zingah a kut a beng a, Pathian chungah a thu a tui tam mai a nih hi." 
Job34:36 A sual belhchhahin a hel a, Kan zingah a kut a beng a, Pathian chungah a thu a tui tam mai a nih hi." 
Job35:1 Tin, Elihua chuan a sawi zel a:" 
Job35:2 Hei hi dikah i ngai em, Pathian hmaah ka fel a ni,' i tih hi?" 
Job35:3 Thil tisual lo i la ka tan that chuanna eng nge awm a, Ka tan hlawkna eng nge awm chuan,' i tihte hi?" 
Job35:4 Ka han chhang teh ang che, Nang leh i pawlpuite nen." 
Job35:5 Van lam dak la, en teh, Chhumte khi en la, nang aia a san zawk khi." 
Job35:6 Thil i tihsual pawhin, a tan eng nge pawi? I bawhchhiatna a pun pawhin, a tan eng nge pawi ang?" 
Job35:7 I fel pawhin a tan eng nge i hnemhnan? I kut ata eng nge a dawn? 
Job35:8 I suahsualna chuan nang ang mihring chauh a khawih a, I felna chuan mihring fa chauh a khawih thei a ni." 
Job35:9 Hnehchhiahna a tam avangin an rum a, Mi chakte ban avangin chhan ngaiin an au a," 
Job35:10 Mahse, tuma'n, 'Min siamtu Pathian chu khawiah nge, Zana hla min saktirtu," 
Job35:11 Hnuailengte aia min zirtir hnem zawktu, Chunglente aia finga min siamtu chu?' an ti lo." 
Job35:12 Tah chuan an rum a, tuma'n an chhang lo, Mi sualte chapona avangin." 
Job35:13 Pathianin dilna lawilo chu a ngaithla lo ang a, Engkimtitheian a ngaihsak hek lo ang." 
Job35:14 Nang lek phei chu e! 'Amah ka hmu lo e, Thu rel tur chu a hmaah a awm reng a, Amah ka nghak reng e,' i han tih hi:" 
Job35:15 Tunah hian, thinrima a rawn hrem mai loh avang leh Uanthuanna a rawn pawisak mai loh avangin,Joba hian a ka a ang mai mai a, Chinchang hre loin a htu a tui tam mai a nih hi." 
Job35:16 Joba hian a ka a ang mai mai a, Chinchang hre loin a htu a tui tam mai a nih hi." 
Job36:1 Elihua chuan a sawi zel a: 
Job36:2 Ngawi rih la, ka kawhhmuh ang che; Pathian hmingin sawit ur ka la nei cheu a nia." 
Job36:3 Ka hriatna ka han fawm khawm vak teh ang, Mi siamtu chu felna ka bel dawn a ni." 
Job36:4 Ka thu a daw hauh lo e, Hriatna famkim nei chu i kiangah a awm hi." 
Job36:5 Ngai rawh, Pathian chu chak tak a ni a, Tumah a hmusit mai lo;" 
Job36:6 Rilru chaknaah chuan a ropui a ni. Mi suaksual chu a zuah lo a, Hnehchhiate erawh chu dik takin a relsak thin." 
Job36:7 Mi felte chu a ensan lo a, lalthutthlenga lalte kiangah Kumkhuain a thuttir a, chawimawiin an awm zawk thin." 
Job36:8 Kawl bun an lo nih a, Hnehchhiahna hruia phuar an lo nih chuan," 
Job36:9 An thiltih leh an bawhchhiatnate a entir a, An lo chapo tawhziate nen." 
Job36:10 Zirtirna lamah an beng a tivar a, Khawlohna lakah an lamletna'n thu a pe a." 
Job36:11 An pawisaka a rawng an bawl chuan, An nite chu hmuingil takin an hmang ral ang a, An kumte chu nuam takin." 
Job36:12 An pawisak loh erawh chuan khandaihin an boral ang a, Hriatna loin an thi a ng" 
Job36:13 Thinlunga Pathian zah lo mite chuan thinur an khawl a, Ama phuar an nih pawhin tanpui dilin an au lo." 
Job36:14 Mi bawlhhlawhte zingah chuan An vanglaiin an thi a. 
Job36:15 Ani chuan hreawm tuartu chu A hreawmna hmangin a ti chhuak a Hnechhiahna hmangin a beng a tivar a. 
Job36:16 A ni, manganna ata chu hmun zau tak, Nekchep lohnaah chuan a hruai chhuak ang chia, I chawhlui chu thauin a khat ang." 
Job36:17 Mahse, nang chu mi suaksualte sawiselnain i khat a, Sawiselna leh rorel dikna chuan a man che a ni." 
Job36:18 Thinur avangin hmusitna rilru i pu dah ang e, Tlanna man nasatzia hian hruai bo che suh se." 
Job36:19 Manganga i awm lohna'n i awka emaw, I thahrui chakna emaw a tawk em ni?" 
Job36:20 Zan chu chak suh, mite an hmun ata an boralna hun a ni e." 
Job36:21 Fimkhur la, khawlohna lam hawi suh, Hei hi hreawm tuar aia i thlan a ni si." 
Job36:22 Ngai rawh, Pathian chuan a theihnain zo takin a ti a ni; Tunge amah ang zirtirtu awm?" 
Job36:23 Tunge a tih dan tur ruatsak? Tunge, 'I ti dik lo, ti thei?" 
Job36:24 A hnathawh tiropui turin hre reng rawh, Miten zaia an chawi thina chu." 
Job36:25 Mi tinin chu chu an en a, Miten hla tak atangin an thlir a." 
Job36:26 Ngai rawh, Pathian chu a ropui e, kan lo hre lo pawh a: A kum zatte chu zawn chhuah rual a ni lo." 
Job36:27 Tui mal far te te chu a hip chho a, Tui hua intifimin ruahah a chang a," 
Job36:28 Vanin a surtir a, Mihring chungah a tla buan buan thin." 
Job36:29 A ni, chhum tai darh dante hi mirhingin a hre thei em ni? A buk zar ri dur durte hi?" 
Job36:30 Ngai teh, a velah a eng a theh darh a, Tuifinriat mawngte a khuh a." 
Job36:31 Heng hian mite thu a relsak a, Ei tur tam takin a pe a." 
Job36:32 Kawlphein akutte chua khuh a, A tum tak fuh turin a tir thin a.Khawpui ri chuan a chungchang a puang a, Ran rualte pawhin thlipui lo thawkah chuan an puang a." 
Job36:33 Khawpui ri chuan a chungchang a puang a, Ran rualte pawhin thlipui lo thawkah chuan an puang a." 
Job37:1 Hei vang hian ka thinlung a khur a, A phu hlawp hlawp a sin." 
Job37:2 Ngaithla ngun u la, a awrawlte leh A kaa lo chhuak rite chu." 
Job37:3 Van pum pui hnuaiah a tir chhuak a, A kawlphe chu lei tawp thleng thlegin." 
Job37:4 A hnuah chuan a awrawl a chhuah a, A ropuina aw chu a tiri dur dur a: A aw an hriat pawhin a chawlhtir chuang lo." 
Job37:5 Pathian chuan mak takin a awm a tiri dur dur a, Thil ropui tak, kan hriat phak loh a ti a ni." 
Job37:6 Vur hnenah chuan, 'Leiah tla rawh,' a ti a, Chutiang bawk chuan ruah leh ruahpuite hnenah pawh." 
Job37:7 Mi tinreng kut chu a tikhawng zo a, A mi siam zawng awngten an hriatna'n." 
Job37:8 Tichuan, ramsaten bik bona an pan a, An bu zawlah an awm reng a." 
Job37:9 Chhim lam pindan ata thli chhia a lo thawk a, hmar lam ata khaw vawt." 
Job37:10 Pathian thaw vangin tuikhal a lo awm a, Tui zau tak pawh a khal zo a," 
Job37:11 A ni, chhum chhah puite chu hnawngin a tikhat a, Chhumah chuan kawlphe a tidarh a." 
Job37:12 Ama hruaiin an vir zawr zawr a, Khawvel chen theihna zawng chungah hian, A thupek apiang an tih theihna'n." 
Job37:13 Zilhna'n emaw, a ram thatna'n emaw, Zahngaih vang emaw a rawn awm tir a ni." 
Job37:14 Joba, hei hi ngaichang teh, Beng sikin Pathian thiltih makte chu ngaihtuah teh." 
Job37:15 Chung chu Pathianin thu a pek dan leh A chhuma kawl a phettir dante i hria em ni? 
Job37:16 Chhum a kan theih dan te, Hriatna famkim neitu thiltih makte hi i hria em ni?" 
Job37:17 Chhim thli avanga lei a reh thiap a, I silhfen a lo lumzia te hi?" 
Job37:18 Ani chu van i kaih pharhpui thei em ni? Darthlalang chhun khal ang maia khauh chu? 
Job37:19 A hnena ka sawi tur chu min hriattir rawh le. Thimna avangin kan sawi thiam loh hi. 
Job37:20 Ka sawi dawn tih amah hrilh tur em ni? Mahni intihboral miin a chak ngai em ni? 
Job37:21 Tunah, thli a lo thawh a, a chhem kianin Van zawla eng ropui chu miin an en ngam lo." 
Job37:22 hmar atangin rangkachak eng a lo zam a, Pathian chu ropui ralthlak takin a inthuam a." 
Job37:23 Engkimtitheia chu kan hmu chhuak thei lo a, Thiltihtheihna leh diknaah a ropui a, Felna a ngah a, a hnehchhiah lo ang.Chuvangin, miten amah an tih a, Intifingte chu tumah a pawisa chuang lo e." 
Job37:24 Chuvangin, miten amah an tih a, Intifingte chu tumah a pawisa chuang lo e." 
Job38:1 Tin, LALPA chuan thawngaleivir atangin Joba chu a chhang a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job38:2 Hriatna tel lo thua Thurawn tithimtu hi tu nge ni? 
Job38:3 Mipa takin i puan veng la, Thu ka zawt ang chia, mi hrilh ang che." 
Job38:4 Leilung nghahchhan ka phum lai khan khawiah nge i awm? I hriat thiam chuan sawi rawh. 
Job38:5 A len lam bite tu nge thliah, i hre meuh maw? A nih leh, a chung awl tehna tu nge zam?" 
Job38:6 A nghahchhan chu khawiah nge a din ngheh a, Tunge a kil lung phum ni," 
Job38:7 Varparh arsite an zai khawm a, Pathian fate zawng zawng an au lai khan?" 
Job38:8 Tuipui chu chhula a lo chhuah lai khan Tuin nge kawng lo khar hnan? 
Job38:9 A silhfen atan chhum ka siam a, A tuam puanah thim chhah tak;" 
Job38:10 A chim chin turte ka siam a, A danna leh kharna tur te;" 
Job38:11 Heti thleng chauh hian lo kal la, pel hauh suh, Tah hian i fawn vel tawp rawh se,' ka ti a ni." 
Job38:12 Lei khuna tikiang a, Mi suaksualte thing chhuak turin," 
Job38:13 I pian achinah, zing hnenah, thu i pein, Khawfingchat hi ahmun tur i hriat tir ngai em?" 
Job38:14 Lei hi nemnaa hlum nem angin a tilang dang a, Silhfen ze hrang ang nukin a lang ta a." 
Job38:15 Mi suaksualte eng chu chhuhsak ani a, An ban lek san chu tihtliah a ni." 
Job38:16 Tuipui hnarahte i lut tawh ngai em? A thukzia te i fang chhuak tawh em ni? 
Job38:17 Thihna kawngkate chu i hnenah tihlan a ni tawh em? Thihna daihlim kawngka chu i hmu tawh em ni? 
Job38:18 Lei zauziate hi i hre phak em ni? I hriat vek chuan sawi rawh. 
Job38:19 An ramri i hruai theih a, An in lam kawng chin i hriat theihna tur chuan," 
Job38:20 Eng chena kawng chu khawiah nge? Thim pawh chu khawiah nge a hmun? I hria ang chu, chungah chuan i piang tawh a, I nite pawh a tam tawh alawm!" 
Job38:21 Vur dah khawlna hmunah i lut tawhin, Rial dah khawlna hmunah pawh i lut tawh em ni?" 
Job38:22 Buai hun atan te leh Indo leh inbeih ni atan ka khek chu a ni. 
Job38:23 Eng kawngin nge eng hi a tai darh a, Chhak lam thli pawh hi lei chungah a intheh darh?" 
Job38:24 Tuin nge ruahpui tana luan kawr leh Tek tana kawng siam? 
Job38:25 Tuma awm lohna leh mihring chen lohna Thlalera ruah surtir turte," 
Job38:26 Ram ro leh pilril tihnawng tur te Hlobet hring totir tur tein? 
Job38:27 Ruahin pa a nei em ni? Daifimte hi tu hrin nge? 
Job38:28 Tu chhul atangin nge tuikhal hi a lo chhuah? Vana vur lo tla thin hi tu hrin nge? 
Job38:29 Tuite pawh lung ang maiin a sak a, Tuipui thuk chungte a khal a." 
Job38:30 Siruk khi i phuar khawm theiin Chhohreivung tlar khi i phelh darh thei em ni? 
Job38:31 Arsite khi a hun biah i hruai chhuak thei em ni? Zangkhua hote khi i hruai thei em ni? 
Job38:32 Van thil ruatte chu i hriain Leiah hian thu i neihtir thei em? 
Job38:33 A nan tur chein chhum ata Ruahpi vanawn i au thla thei em ni? 
Job38:34 Kawlphete chu i hnena lo kal a, Heta hi ka awm,' ti turin i tir chhuak thei em ni?" 
Job38:35 Tunge chhum dumahte khian finna dah a, Tunge arsi thlawkte hriat thiamna pe?" 
Job38:36 Tunge finnaa chhumte hi chiar thei a, Van tuithawl tu nge leih baw thei?" 
Job38:37 Vaivutte a inhlawm khawm a, Lei tlangte a inbelhbawm hi." 
Job38:38 Sakeibaknei tan ei tur i zawnsakin Sakeibaknei vanglaite chak daih i pe thei em ni," 
Job38:39 An pukahte an bawk a, Seh tur an chan lai hian?Choak hi, a note ei tur tlachham a, Pathian hnena an hram lai leh An vahvaih laiin, tuin nge chaw pe?" 
Job38:40 Choak hi, a note ei tur tlachham a, Pathian hnena an hram lai leh An vahvaih laiin, tuin nge chaw pe?" 
Job39:1 Lung bang sathar no neih hun i hria em ni? Sazuk no neih hun i chhinchhiah thei em ni? 
Job39:2 An pai chhung thla zat i chhiarin, An hrin hunte i hria em ni?" 
Job39:3 An bawk a, no an hring a, An vei zo mai a ni." 
Job39:4 An note chu an pian a tlang a, Ram palailengah an thang lian a, An kal darh a, an puite hnenah an kir tawh lo." 
Job39:5 Ram sabengtung tuin nge zawl chhuah? Ram sabengtung chak thlunna tu phelh nge? 
Job39:6 An awmna'n thlaler ka ruatsak a, An chenna'n ram tau;" 
Job39:7 Khawpui hulum chu a hmusit a, Khaltu au ri a hre ngai lo" 
Job39:8 A tlatna tlangpui dung a ni a, Thil hring apiang a zawng chhuak thin." 
Job39:9 I tan selepa chu chhawr theih em ni ang? I ran inah a riak duh ang em?
