Job39:10 Lei lehnaah hrui i bahtir thei ang em? I hnungah lei ruam a rawn chawk rual ang em ni? 
Job39:11 A chak em avang maiin i ring thei dawn em ni? I hna chu i kawltir dawn em ni? 
Job39:12 I buhte i hruih zawla rawn dah khawm turin I ring mai thei em ni? 
Job39:13 Ostrich thla uangthuang takin a inkhawng vel a; mahse, a thla ki leh a hmulte chu an ngilnei em ni?" 
Job39:14 Leiah a tui a hnutchhiah a, Vaivutah a khuh lum a," 
Job39:15 Miin a rap keh thei a, Ramsaten an chil keh thei tih a hre leh tawh lo." 
Job39:16 Ama no ni lo ang hrimin a note lakah a inchhu ngawng a, A thiltih chu a thlawn dawn emaw, a pawisa chuang lo." 
Job39:17 Pathianin finna a haihchhamtir a, Hriatthiamna a pek hek loh avangin." 
Job39:18 Tlan bo tuma a han insingsak meuh chuan Sakawr leh a chungchuangte chu a tham lo mai. 
Job39:19 Sakawr chaknate hi i pek em ni? A nghawngah thahrui i ban em ni? 
Job39:20 Khau anga kat turin i siam em ni? A hnar tum dur dur hlauhawmzia te hi! 
Job39:21 Phai ruamah a ke a phiat tlut tlut a, A tha a so a, indo hriamhrei hmachhawn turin a chhuak a;" 
Job39:22 Hlauh reng a hre lo a, a zam ngai lo a, Khandaih lakah a tim ngai hek lo." 
Job39:23 A chungah thla bawm a ri rawk rawk a, Fei leh thal a tle zawr zawr mai a." 
Job39:24 Hlauhawm tak leh thinur takin a khawh puat puat a, tawtawrawt thawmah a ding hle hle thei lo." 
Job39:25 tawtawrawt a rik phawt chuan, ""Chei, Chei,' a ti a. Inbeihna chu hla takah a rim a hria a, Hotute rawl leh inbeihna hawhaw nen." 
Job39:26 I finna avangin mu chu a thlawk chhoin Chhim lamah thla a zar em ni? 
Job39:27 Muvanlai thlawk chho leh sang taka bu a chhep hi i thupek em ni? 
Job39:28 Kham kovahte an cheng a, Lung tohlawt hmun him takah a riak thin." 
Job39:29 chuta tang chuan ei tur a bihthla a, A mit chuan hla tak a hmu.A note pawhin thisen an dawt a, Saruang awmnaah chuan a awm zel a ni." 
Job39:30 A note pawhin thisen an dawt a, Saruang awmnaah chuan a awm zel a ni." 
Job40:1 Tin, LALPA chuan Joba hnenah a sawi zel a:" 
Job40:2 Sawiseltu chuan Engkimtithei chu a hnial ang maw? Pathian hnialtu chuan chhang ang hmiang! Tiin. 
Job40:3 Tichuan, Joban LALPA chu a chhang a:" 
Job40:4 Ngai teh, kei mi pawimawh tham lo te hian Engtin nge ka chan ang che? Ka ka ka hup mai a ni." 
Job40:5 Vawi khat ka sawi tawh a, ka chhang tawh lo ang che; A ni, vawihnih; ka chhunzawm tawh lo ang,' a ti a." 
Job40:6 Tin, LALPA chuan Joba chu thawngaleivir atangin heti hian a chhang a:" 
Job40:7 Mipa takin i puan veng la, Thu ka zawt ang chia, mi hrilh ang che." 
Job40:8 Ka thurelte mi sutsak dawn em ni? Thiam i chan theihna'n, Thiam loh mi chantir dawn em ni?" 
Job40:9 Pathian ban ang i nei em ni? Amah angin khawpui ri aw i chhuah thei em ni? 
Job40:10 Lalna leh zahawmna han inbel la, Chawimawina leh ropuinain inthuam rawh khai." 
Job40:11 I thinrimna khat liam chu leih chhuak la, Mi chapo apiang chu en bikin titlawm teh khai." 
Job40:12 Mi chapo apiang chu en bikin tihniam la, Mi suaksualte chu an dinhmunah rep bet rawh le." 
Job40:13 Vaivutah phumhlawm la, Hmun biruah an hmelte phuar khawm teh le." 
Job40:14 Tichuan, i kut dinglam ngeiin a chhanhim thei che tih Kei ngei hian ka hria ang chu." 
Job40:15 En teh, nangmah ang bawka Behemoth ka siam hi, Bawng anga hnim ring mi a ni." 
Job40:16 Ngai teh mah, a chakna chu a kawngah a awm a, A thahrui chu a udl thuara awm a ni." 
Job40:17 Sidar angin a mei a tikhauh a, A malpui thate chu a phiar tlat mai." 
Job40:18 A ruhte chu ngen kawrawng ang a ni a, A fuke chu thir tlawn ang a ni." 
Job40:19 Pathian siam u ber a ni a, A siamtu chuan a tan khandaih a siamsak a." 
Job40:20 Tlangte chuan chaw an chhuahsak thin a, Chu chu ramsa zawng anwg tualchaina a ni." 
Job40:21 Lotus buk hnuaiahte a bawk a, Pumphir hnuai leh dumahte pawh," 
Job40:22 Lotus buk chuan a zar hlim a, Luia tuipuisuthlah chuan a hual vel a." 
Job40:23 Ngai rawh, tui a lo len buan buan pawhin a hlau ngai lo: A ka thleng pawhin Jordan lian mah se, a zuam zel..A inralrin laiin miin an man thei em ni? A hnarah an thil thei ang em ni." 
Job40:24 A inralrin laiin miin an man thei em ni? A hnarah an thil thei ang em ni. 
Job41:1 Nghakuaiin liviathan i hnuk chhuak thei em ni? Hruihrualin a lei i phuar bet thei em ni? 
Job41:2 Phairuang hruiin a hnarah i thil thei em ni? Nghakuaiin a khabe i thil tlang thei em ni? 
Job41:3 I hnenah dilna tam tak a siam ang em ni? I hnenah thu nemin a sawi ang maw? 
Job41:4 Kumkhuaa rawngbawltua i hman turin I hnenah thuthlung a siam ang em ni? 
Job41:5 Sava ang lekin i khal thei dawn em ni? I hmeichhiate kaih atan i hling thei ang maw? 
Job41:6 sangha mantuhoten indawrna'n an hmang ang em ni? Sumdawng mite zingah an sem darh ang em ni? 
Job41:7 A vun khatin thir hling te, A luah nghafeite i riah thei em ni?" 
Job41:8 A chungah kut han thlah teh, In inbeih edan tur chu ngaihtuah rawh, I ti leh tawh ngai lo ang!" 
Job41:9 Ngai rawh, mihring beiseina chu a thlawna ni: A hmuh mai pawhin a beidawng nghal a ni." 
Job41:10 Amah chawk tho turin tumah an rorum ngam lo: Chuti anih chuan tu nge ka hmaah ding thei ang? 
Job41:11 Tunge ka rulh leh tura thil mi pe hmasa awm? Van hnuaia thil engkim hi ka ta a ni. 
Job41:12 A fuke thu-ah ka ngawi reng lo ang a, A thahrui chakzia leh a taksa inphur tawkziaahte pawh." 
Job41:13 Tunge a vun pawnlang chu hlip thei ang? A khabe thuah hnih chhungah tu nge lo lut ang? 
Job41:14 Tuin nge a hmel kawngkapui chu hawng thei ang? A ha kual vel chu tihbaiawm taka ni. 
Job41:15 A vun char chu a chhuan ber a ni a, Char ang maia phui tlat a ni." 
Job41:16 A insik phui chiah avangin. A karah boruak pawh a lut thei lo. 
Job41:17 An inzawm theuh a, an inphan tlat avangin. Kaih theh theih a ni lo." 
Job41:18 A thaw chhuak chu a var sung sung a, A mitte chu khawfingchat ang ru mai a ni." 
Job41:19 A ka atangin meialh a chhuak a, Meisite a tek ur ur a." 
Job41:20 A hnaran meikhu a lo chhuak a, Sa so bel nghawr leh phairuang mut ang vut vutin." 
Job41:21 A thawte chuan meihawl a tivam a, A kaan meialha chhuak a." 
Job41:22 A nghawngah chakna a awm a, A hmaah tihbaiawmna a tualchai reng a." 
Job41:23 A tang chhung vun pawh khing rut, Taksa nena inbelhbawm tlat, khawih chet rual loha ni." 
Job41:24 A thinlung chu lung anga sak ani a, A ni, rawtsawmna lung hnuai zawk ang mai a ni." 
Job41:25 Amah alo thawh chhuah meuh chuan Pasalthate pawhin an hlau a, An thlaphangin mahni pawh an inhre tawh thin lo." 
Job41:26 Miin khandaihin bei mah se la, a hneh lo ang; Fei emaw, thal emaw, feitam emaw pawhin." 
Job41:27 Thirte chu buhpawl ang lekah a ngai a, Ngen chu thing mawih angah." 
Job41:28 Thalin a titlanchhe lo a, A lakah chuan virvawmte chu pawl bul ang lek a ni." 
Job41:29 Talhtumte chu pawl bul anga ngaih a ni a, Feitam vungte chu a nuihsan mai a ni." 
Job41:30 A hnuai lampangte pawh lampei hriam tak ang a ni a; Diakahte chuan buhchil khawl ang maiin a bawk a. 
Job41:31 Tui thuk tak chu bel angin a tiso buah buah a, Tuipui chu hlo bur ang lekah a siam a." 
Job41:32 A kalna hnu chu a eng ruak a, Miin tuipui chu var buahin an hmu thin." 
Job41:33 Lei chungah hian amah ang reng an awm lo e, Hlauh nei hauh loa siam chu.Thil sang apiang a en thin a, Inlulungte zinga a ber a ni." 
Job41:34 Thil sang apiang a en thin a, Inlulungte zinga a ber a ni." 
Job42:1 Tin, Joba chuan LALPA chu a chhang a:" 
Job42:2 Engkim i ti thei tih ka hria e, I tum dal rual engmah a awm lo." 
Job42:3 Tu a ni nge, hriatna loa thurawn thup botu hi?' Chuvang alawm ka hriat thiam lohte, Ka tana mak lutuk, ka hriat loh thilte ka sawi ni." 
Job42:4 Ngaithla rawh le, ka han sawi ang e; Thu ka zawt ang chia, mi hrilh ang che.'" 
Job42:5 Benga hriatna mai zawngin ka hre tawh chia, Mahse, tunah zawng ka hmu ta che;" 
Job42:6 Chuvang tak chuan ka inten a, Vut leh vaivuta thuin ka sim ta e, tiin." 
Job42:7 Tin, LALPA'n Joba hnenah he'ng thute a saiw hnuin LALPA chuan Elifaza Temani mi hnenah chuan, ""I chungah leh i thian pahnihte chungah khan ka thinurna a nasa a ni: ka chhiahhlawh Joba angin ka chungchang thu dik takin in sawi si lo." 
Job42:8 Chutichuan, tunah bawngpa pasarih leh berampa pasarih kengin ka chhiahhlawh Joba hnenah va kal u la, in tan halral inthawi va hlan rawh u; tin, ka chhiahhlawh Joba chuan a tawngtaisak ang che u a, chu chu ka lo pawm ang a, in atzia ang zel chuan ka ti lo ang che u; ka chhiahhlawh Joba angin ka chungchang thu dik takin in sawi si lo a,"" a ti a." 
Job42:9 Chutichuan, Temani mi Elifaza leh Shuhi mi Bildada leh Naamathi mi Zofara-te chu an va kal a, LALPA'n thu a pek ang zel chuan an ti a; tin, LALPA hchua Joba dilna chu a pawm ta a." 
Job42:10 Tin, Joba chuan a thiante pathum tana a tawngtai chuan LALPA'n Jona chan chu a titha leh ta a; LALPA chuan Joba chu ahmaa a neih let hnih a pe leh ta a." 
Job42:11 Tichuan, a unau leh a farnu zawng zawngte leh tun hmaa a hmelhriat zawng zawngte chu ahnenah an lo kal a, a inah chuan chawhluite an kil a; LALPA'n a chunga thil tha lo a thlentir zawng zawng thu-ah chuan an tuarpui a, an thlamuan a; mi tinin hnenah chuan tangkaraw tlangteleh rangkachak zungbunte an pe theuh a." 
Job42:12 Chutichuan, LALPA chuan Joba hun hnuhnung chu a tir aia nasa takin mal a sawm a: beram singkhat leh sangli, sanghawngsei sangruk, sebawng tuak sangkhat leh sabengtungpui sangkhat a nei a." 
Job42:13 Fapa pasarih leh fanu pathum anei bawk a. 
Job42:14 Tin, a hmasa bera hmingah chuan Jemima a sa a; pahnihna hmingah chuan Kezia; pathumna chu Keren-Hapuka." 
Job42:15 Tin, ram zawng zawngah pawh Joba fanute anga hmeichhe hmel tha an awm lo: an pa chuan anni chu an nutate zingah rochan tur a pe ve hlawm a." 
Job42:16 Tin, hetih hun hian Joba chu kum za leh kum sawmli a dam a, a fapate, a fapaa fapate, chhuan li thlengin a hmu a.Chutichuan, Joba chu tar tak, khup bihin a thi ta a." 
Job42:17 Chutichuan, Joba chu tar tak, khup bihin a thi ta a." 
Psalms1:1 Mi suaksualte remruat anga awm ngai lo a, Mi sualte kawng pawha ding ngai lo a, Hmusittute thutphah pawha thu ngai lo mi chu a eng a thawl e." 
Psalms1:2 A lawmna chu LALPA danah a ni zawk a; A dan thu chu achhun azanin a ngaihtuah thin. 
Psalms1:3 Ani chu tuiluang kianga thingphun A huntea rah thin. A rah pawh uai ngai lo ang hi a ni a; A thiltih apiang chu a hmuingil zel ang. 
Psalms1:4 Mi suaksualte erawh chu chutiang an ni lo a; Buhsi thliin a lenbo ang hi an ni zawk. 
Psalms1:5 Chuvangin mi suaksualte chu rorelna hmaah chuan an ding thei lo ang a, Mi suaksualte pawh mi felte inkhawmnaah chuan an ding thei hek lo ang.LALPA chuan mi felte kawng chu a hre si thin: Mi suaksualte kawng erawh chu a boral ang." 
Psalms1:6 LALPA chuan mi felte kawng chu a hre si thin: Mi suaksualte kawng erawh chu a boral ang. 
Psalms2:1 Hnam tin chu engati nge an thinur a, Mi tinin engati nge thil sawt lo an ngaihtuah?" 
Psalms2:2 Leia lalte an hel a, Hotute pawhin LALPA leh a hriak thiha chu An phiar hlawm a," 
Psalms2:3 An phuarnate hi tichatin An hruihrualte hi kan hnen ata i paih daih ang u,"" tiin." 
Psalms2:4 Vana thua chu a nui ang a: Lalpa chuan anniho chu a nuihzabur ang. 
Psalms2:5 Chumi hunah chuan thinurin an hnenah thu a sawi ang a, Thinrim takin anmahni a timangang tawh ang:" 
Psalms2:6 Keimah ngeiin ka tlang thianghlim Zionah chuan, Ka lal siam chu ka thuttir ta a ni,"" a ti a." 
Psalms2:7 Thuruat chu ka hril dawn: LALPA'n ka hnenah, ""Nang zawng ka fapa i ni e; Vawiin hian ka hring che a ni." 
Psalms2:8 Mi dil rawh, tichuan i rochan atan hnam tin ka pe ang chia, Kawlkil tawp thlengin i ro atan ka pe bawk ang che." 
Psalms2:9 Anni chu thir tiangin i tikeh ang a; Belvawtu bel an paih keh sawm ang hian i paih keh sawm ang,"" a ti a." 
Psalms2:10 Chutichuan, aw lalte u, fing tawh u la, Leia roreltute u, thununi awm tawh rawh u." 
Psalms2:11 Tih chungin LALPA rawng bawl u la, Khur chungin lawm rawh u.Fapa chu fawp rawh u, chutilochuan a thinur ang a, kawng lakah in boral dah ang em, A thin chu a thawk thuai dawn si a. Amaha an rinna nghat zawng zawngte chu an eng a thawl e." 
Psalms2:12 Fapa chu fawp rawh u, chutilochuan a thinur ang a, kawng lakah in boral dah ang em, A thin chu a thawk thuai dawn si a. Amaha an rinna nghat zawng zawngte chu an eng a thawl e." 
Psalms3:1 LALPA, mi dotute hi an va pung ta em! Mi beitute hi tam tak an ni." 
Psalms3:2 Ka chungchang thu an sawi a, ""Pathianin a pui lo ang"" an ti a. (Selah)" 
Psalms3:3 Nimahsela, aw LALPA, nang chu ka velin ka phaw i ni a; Ka ropuina leh ka lu dawm kangtu i ni e." 
Psalms3:4 Ka awin LALPA chu ka au a, A tlang thianghlim atangin mi chhang thin a. (Selah)" 
Psalms3:5 Kei zawng ka mu chu ka lo muhil ta a; Ka han harh leh a; LALPA chuan mi lo chelh reng thin a ni. 
Psalms3:6 Mi doa, mi hual veltu, Mi singkhat pawh hi ka hlau lo ang." 
Psalms3:7 Aw LALPA, tho la; aw ka Pathian, mi chhandam rawh; Mi dotute zawng zawng chu an biang ruhah i vaw si a; Mi suaksualte ha chu i tibal a.Chhandamna hi LALPA ta ni: I malsawmna chu i mite chungah awm rawh se. (Selah)" 
Psalms3:8 Chhandamna hi LALPA ta ni: I malsawmna chu i mite chungah awm rawh se. (Selah) 
Psalms4:1 Aw ka felna Pathian, ka koh hun che chuan mi chhang ang che;Ka manganin nangin mi tithawveng thin a: Mi khawngaih la, ka tawngtaina hi mi ngaihthlaksak ang che." 
Psalms4:2 Aw mihring fate u, ka ropuina hi eng chen nge mualphonaa in chantir dawn?: Eng chen nge thil engmah lo hi in ngainat ang a, dawt thu in zawn dawn? (Selah)" 
Psalms4:3 LALPA chuan Pathian ngaihsak mi chu ama tan a dah hrang tih hi hre zawk rawh u: LALPA chuan, ka koh apiangin a lo ngaithla ang." 
Psalms4:4 Hlau u la, thil tisual suh u: In khumlaizawlah chuan in thinlungah inngaithuah ula, ngawi thiap rawh u (Selah)" 
Psalms4:5 Felna inthawinate chu hlan u la LALPA chu ring rawh u. 
Psalms4:6 thatna reng reng tuin nge mi hmuhtir ta ang le? titute chu tam tak an awm. LALPA, nang ngeiin i hmel eng khan min han en ang che." 
Psalms4:7 An buh leh an uain lo hlawk changa an lawmna aia, Lawmna nasa zawk ka thinlungah hian i awmtir a.Thlamuang takin ka mu ang a, ka muhil bawk ang: LALPA, nangmah ngei hi a ni, mahni chauh pawha him taka mi awmtir thin hi ni." 
Psalms4:8 Thlamuang takin ka mu ang a, ka muhil bawk ang: LALPA, nangmah ngei hi a ni, mahni chauh pawha him taka mi awmtir thin hi ni." 
Psalms5:1 Aw LALPA, ka thu-ah hian beng lo chhi la, Ka ngaihtuahna hi ngaihtuah ang che." 
Psalms5:2 Ka Lal leh ka Pathian, ka au thawm hi ngaithla ang che; I hnena tawngtai ka ni si a." 
Psalms5:3 Aw LALPA, zingah chuan ka aw hi i lo hre thin ang a; Zingah chuan ka tawngtaina hi i hmaan ka rel fel diam ang a, ka lo ngaihven thin ang." 
Psalms5:4 Suahsualnaa lawm thin Pathian i ni si lo va: Mi sual chu i hnenah an thleng lo ang. 
Psalms5:5 Mi uangthuangte chu i mithmuhah an ding thei lo ang a: Thil tisualtute zawng zawng chu i haw thin. 
Psalms5:6 Dawt thu sawi hmangte chu i tiboral ang a: LALPA'n thisen chhuah hmang leh bum hmang mi chu a ten riau thin. 
Psalms5:7 Kei erawh chu, i ngilneihna nasa tak avangin, i inah ka lo lut ang a: Tih chung chein i biak in thianghlim lam hawiin chibai ka buk thin ang che." 
Psalms5:8 Aw LALPA, ka hmelmate avangin hian i felna avang chuan mi hruai la; I kawng chu ka hmaah hian titluang ang che." 
Psalms5:9 An kaah chuan rinawmna reng reng a awm lo a; An kawchhung chu suahsualna hlir a ni: An hrawk chu thlan inhawng a ni a; An leiin mi an fak der thin. 
Psalms5:10 Aw Pathian, anniho hi thiam loh chantir ang che; Anmahni remruat ngeite chu tluk phahna'n hmang rawh se. An bawhchhiatna tam tak avang chuan nam chhuak ang che; I chungah an hel si a." 
Psalms5:11 Nangmaha an rinna nghat zawng zawngte erawh chu nangmahah chuan lawm se la, I hum thin avangin hlimin au kumkhua hlawm rawh se: I hming ngainate pawh nangmahah chuan lawm takin awm rawh se.Mi fel chu mal i sawm dawn si a; Aw LALPA, ani chu phaw ang hian duhsaknain i hual vel ang." 
Psalms5:12 Mi fel chu mal i sawm dawn si a; Aw LALPA, ani chu phaw ang hian duhsaknain i hual vel ang." 
Psalms6:1 Aw LALPA, thinurin mi zilhhau suh la, Thinrimin mi thunun hek suh ang che." 
Psalms6:2 Aw LALPA, mi khawngaih ang che; ka chau zo ta si a: Aw LALPA, mi tidam ang che; ka ruhte hi a na vek si a," 
Psalms6:3 Ka nunna pawh a mangang em em bawk a ni: Aw LALPA, nangin eng chen nge mi thlahthlam dawn le aw?" 
Psalms6:4 Aw LALPA, lo kir leh la, ka nunna chhanhim la: I ngilneihna avangin mi chhandam ang che." 
Psalms6:5 Thih hnu chuan nangmah hriat rengna a awm si lo va: Seol-ah tuin nge lawm thu hrilh dawn che? 
Psalms6:6 Ka rumna lamah ka chau ta; Zan tin, ka mutna chu mittuiin ahuh a; Ka khum chu ka mittuiin ka tihuh thin." 
Psalms6:7 Hmuh pawh ka hmu thei ta lo: Hmelma avangin ka tap a, ka mit pawh a thim zo ta." 
Psalms6:8 Nangni thil tisualtu zawng zawngte u, mi kalsan vek rawh u; Seol-ah tuin nge lawm thu hrilh dawn che?" 
Psalms6:9 LALPA'n khawngaih ka dilna chu a ngaithla tawh a; LALPA'n ka tawngtaina chu a lawm ang.Mi dotute zawng zawng chu an mualphoin an mangang em em ang a; An kir leh ang a, vawilehkhatah an la mualpho thut ang." 
Psalms6:10 Mi dotute zawng zawng chu an mualphoin an mangang em em ang a; An kir leh ang a, vawilehkhatah an la mualpho thut ang." 
Psalms7:1 Aw LALPA ka Pathian, nangmahah ka rina ka nghat a: Mi umtute zawng zawng lakah hian mi chhandamin mi chhanhim ang che:" 
Psalms7:2 Chutichuan, chhanhimtu awm loin, sakeibaknei angin, Ka nunna hi pawt sawmin, a sawisa dah ang e." 
Psalms7:3 Aw LALPA ka Pathian, hetiang ti ka lo nih a, Ka kuta sualna lo awm a nih a," 
Psalms7:4 Ka thian chu sualnaa thungrul ka lo nih chuan, (A ni, enga khawlai loa mi dotu hi ka chhanhim zawk a ni;)" 
Psalms7:5 Dotu hian ka nunna hi umin, umphak mai rawh se; A ni, kan nun hi leiah chil thluin, Ka ropuina hi vaivut zingah dah mai rawh se. (Selah)" 
Psalms7:6 Aw LALPA, thinurin tho la, Mi dotute thinrimna doin thawk la: Ka tan intiharh rawh; dikna i phut si a." 
Psalms7:7 Tichuan mi tin inkhawmho chuan hual vel che rawh se. Tin, nang chu an chungah chung lamah chuan kir leh ang che." 
Psalms7:8 LALPA'n mi tin, ro a rel thin: Aw LALPA, keimaha ka felna leh ka rilru thatna awm ang zel hian ro mi rel ang che:" 
Psalms7:9 Aw, mi suaksualte suahsualna chu lo tawp tawh se la, mi felte erawh chu tinghet ang che: Pathian fel tak chuan thinlungte leh rilrute a fiah thin si a." 
Psalms7:10 Ka phaw chu Pathian hnenah a awm, Amah chu thinlung dik tak pu chhandamtu a ni." 
Psalms7:11 Pathian chu roreltu fel tak a ni, A ni, ni tin, mi sualte chunga lungnihlohna nei Pathian a ni." 
Psalms7:12 Mi a hawikir loh zawngin ani chuan a khandaih a tat hriam ang; A thal ngul chu a kuai a, a peih ta." 
Psalms7:13 Thihna hriamhreite chu amah thahna'n a siam ta diam bawk a; A thalte chu alh theiin a siam a. 
Psalms7:14 En teh, sualna a vei a; A ni, thil tihsualna a pai a, dawt thu a hring ta a." 
Psalms7:15 Khuarkhurum a siam a, thuk takin a lai a, Ama hum siamah chuan a tla ta a." 
Psalms7:16 A thil tihsualna chu ama lu chung ngeiah a lo kir leh ang a, Rawng taka a thiltih chu ama chhip ngeiah a tla ang.LALPA chu, a felna avang hian, a hnenah lawm thu ka sawi ang a: LALPA Chungnungbera hming fakin ka zai bawk ang." 
Psalms7:17 LALPA chu, a felna avang hian, a hnenah lawm thu ka sawi ang a: LALPA Chungnungbera hming fakin ka zai bawk ang." 
Psalms8:1 Aw LALPA, kan Lalpa, Lei chung zawng zawngah hian, i hming chu a va tha em! I ropuina chu van chungahte khian i dah a." 
Psalms8:2 Hmelma leh phuba latu tihdaihna turin, Nangmah dotute avangin Nausente leh hnute hne laite kaa chhuak chuanin chakna i tinghet a." 
Psalms8:3 I van, i kut chhuak te, Thla leh arsi i ruathote khi, ka ngaihtuah chang chuan," 
Psalms8:4 Mihring hi eng nge maw a nih a, i hriat reng thin ni? Mihring fapa pawh hi eng nge maw a nih a, i kan thin ni?' ka ti thin." 
Psalms8:5 Ani chu Pathian aia hnuai deuh chahin i siam a, Ropina leh chawimawina i khum tir si a." 
Psalms8:6 I kut chhuak chungahte hian thu i neihtir a; A ke hnuaiahte engkim i dah a: 
Psalms8:7 Beram leh bawng zawng zawngte nen, A ni, ram sate nen pawh;" 
Psalms8:8 Chungleng sava leh tuifinriat sanghate, Tuifinfiata kawnga kal apiangte nen.Aw LALPA, kan Lalpa, Lei chung zawng zawngah hian i hming a va tha em." 
Psalms8:9 Aw LALPA, kan Lalpa, Lei chung zawng zawngah hian i hming a va tha em." 
Psalms9:1 LALPA hnenah chuan ka thinlung zawng zawngin lawm thu ka sawi ang a; I thilmak tih zawng zawng chu ka hriattir ang. 
Psalms9:2 Nangmahah chuan ka lawmin ka hlim ang a: Aw, nang Chungnungber, i hming fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms9:3 Mi dotute chu an tlanchhiat veleh, I hmaah chuan an petek a, an boral a ni." 
Psalms9:4 Ka tana awm rengah leh ka thu-ah hian nangin mi tan si a; Fel taka rorelin lalthutphahah chuan i thu a. 
Psalms9:5 Hnam tin i zilhhau a, mi suaksualte i tiboral a, An hming hchu kumkhaw tlaitluan atan i thai bo ta a." 
Psalms9:6 Dotute chu an mang zo a, kumkhua atan engmah nei loin an awm ta; I khaw tihtiau tawhte chu, Anmahni hriat rengna lamin a boral ta bawk a." 
Psalms9:7 LALPA erawh chu kumkhua atan lalah a thu a: A lalthuphah chu rorelna turin a buatsaih ta. 
Psalms9:8 Ani chuan khawvel hi fel takin ro a relsak ang a, Thlei bik nei loin mi tin, ro chu a rel ang." 
Psalms9:9 Chutichuan LALPA chu hnehchhiahna tuarte tan chuan kulhbing sang a lo ni ang a, Mangan hunahte chuan kulhbingsang a lo ni ang." 
Psalms9:10 Tichuan i hming hretute chuan an ring ang che; Nang zawngin, LALPA, nangmah zawngtute chu i kalsan ngai si lo." 
Psalms9:11 LALPA, Ziona awm chu, fakin zai u la; Mite zingah chuan a thiltihte chu hril rawh u." 
Psalms9:12 Thisen chhuah chhuahchhal thintu chuan anni chu a hre reng si thin a: Miretheite au thawm a theihnghilh ngai lo. 
Psalms9:13 Aw LALPA, mi khawngaih la; Thihna kawngkhar ata mi kai chhuak thintu, Mi hawtute avanga ka manganna hi en teh;" 
Psalms9:14 Nangmah fakna zawng zawng chu ka hriattir theihna turin; Zion fanu kawngkaahte chuan, I mi chhandamnaah hian ka hlim ang." 
Psalms9:15 Hnam tin chu an khuarkhurum siamah chuan an pil a: An len phah rukah chuan anmahni ke ngei a awk ta a. LALPA chu a inhraittir a, ro a rel ta a:" 
Psalms9:16 Mi suaksual chu ama kut chhuak ngeiah chuan a awk thin a. (Higgaion Selah) Mi suaksualte chu Seol-ah an kir leh ang. Hnam tin Pathian theihnghilh hmang zawng zawngte chu. 
Psalms9:17 Pachhiate chu theihnghilhin an awm fo lo ang a, Retheite beiseina chu kumkhua chuan a bo hek lo ang." 
Psalms9:18 Aw LALPA, tho teh; mihring maiin ngam che suh se. Hnam tin chu i mithmuhah hian rorelsakin awm rawh se.Aw LALPA, anni chu tihlau la; Hnam tinin mihring mai an ni tih inhre rawh se. (Selah)" 
Psalms9:19 Aw LALPA, anni chu tihlau la; Hnam tinin mihring mai an ni tih inhre rawh se. (Selah)" 
Psalms10:1 Aw LALPA, engati nge hla taka i din thin le: Engati nge mangan laitea i inthup thin le?" 
Psalms10:2 Mi suaksualte chapona avangin mi tetheite chu nekin an awm thin; An thil sual ngaihtuah chhuahahte chuan anmahni ngei awk rawh se. 
Psalms10:3 Mi suaksual chuan a thinlung duhzawng a chhuang a, Mi duham chuan LALPA chu a paih thla a, a hmusit thin." 
Psalms10:4 Mi suaksual chuan chapo hmel puin, ""A phut lo ang,"" a ti thin. A ngaihtuahna zawng zawng chu, ""Pathian reng a awm lo,"" tih hlir a ni." 
Psalms10:5 A awm dante chu eng lai pawhin a nghet reng a; I rorelnate chu chung lam hla takah, ahmuh phak loah, a awm daih a: Amah dotue zawng zawng lah chu anuihsan mai thin." 
Psalms10:6 A rilruah chuan, ""Ka nghing lo ang: Chhuan zawng zawng thlengin mangangin ka awm lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Psalms10:7 A ka chu anchhe lawhnana te, tihderna te, tihduhdahnatein a khar a: A lei hnuaiah chuan thil tihsualna leh khawlohna aw a." 
Psalms10:8 Khaw tina chan rukna hmunahe a thu thin a: Hmun fianrialahte chuan pawikhawih lo mite a that thin: A mitin engmah ti thei lo mi chu a chang ru reng thin a ni. 
Psalms10:9 Sakeibakneiin apuka a chang ru angin ani chuan fianrialah a chang ru reng thin a: Mi rethei man turin a chang thin a: Mi rethei chu aman ngei a, tichuan a lenin ahnuk bo thin." 
Psalms10:10 A bawk per a, a kun a, Engmah ti thei lo mite chu ami chakteho tihtlukin an awm thin." 
Psalms10:11 A rilruah chuan, ""Pathianin a theihnghilh a ni: A hmai chu a thup a; engtikah mah a hmu lo ang,"" a ti thin a." 
Psalms10:12 Aw LALPA, tho la;aw Pathian, i kut han lek teh: Mi retheite chu theihnghilh suh ang che." 
Psalms10:13 Eng vangin nge mi suaksual chua Pathian a hmusit a, A rilruin, ""I phut lo ang"" a tih thin ni?" 
Psalms10:14 Hmuh chu i hmu tawh reng a; i kuta thungrul turin thil tihsual leh tihvuina i en reng si a: Engmah ti thei lo mi chu i hnenah a inkawltir thin a: Pa nei lo tanpuitu i nih thin kha. 
Psalms10:15 Mi suaksual ban chu titliak la; Mi sual chu, a suahsualna zawng chhuak ang che, i hmuh loh thuai hma loh chuan." 
Psalms10:16 LALPA chu kumkhaw tlaitluan atana Lalber a ni a: Hnam tin chu ama ram ata an boral ta. 
Psalms10:17 17-18, LALPA, leia mi chu hlauhawm taka a awm leh tawh lohna turin, Pa nei lo leh hnehchhiahna tuarte rorelsakna'n, Thuhnuairawlhte duhzawng chu i ngaithla tawha: An thinlung chu i buatsaih ang a, i beng chu i ngaihthlaktir ang.17-18, LALPA, leia mi chu hlauhawm taka a awm leh tawh lohna turin, Pa nei lo leh hnehchhiahna tuarte rorelsakna'n, Thuhnuairawlhte duhzawng chu i ngaithla tawha: An thinlung chu i buatsaih ang a, i beng chu i ngaihthlaktir ang." 
Psalms10:18 17-18, LALPA, leia mi chu hlauhawm taka a awm leh tawh lohna turin, Pa nei lo leh hnehchhiahna tuarte rorelsakna'n, Thuhnuairawlhte duhzawng chu i ngaithla tawha: An thinlung chu i buatsaih ang a, i beng chu i ngaihthlaktir ang." 
Psalms11:1 LALPA-ah chuan ka rinna ka nghat thin. Engtizia nge ka nuna hnenah hian, ""In tlangah chuan, sava angin, thlawk bo rawh u." 
Psalms11:2 En teh u, thinlung dik tak pu thim hnuaia an kah theihna turin, Mi suaksualte chuan thal ngul an kuai a, An thal chu a hruiah an vuah diam saw." 
Psalms11:3 Lungphumte chu tihchhiata a awm chuan, Mi felin eng nge a tih theih ang?"" in tih ni?" 
Psalms11:4 LALPA chu a biak in thianghlimah a awm a, LALPA chu, a lalthutphah zawng vanah a awm; Mihring fate hi amitin a en a, an thiltihte a hmu." 
Psalms11:5 LALPA chuan mi fel chu a fiah thin a: Mi suaksual leh nunrawnna ngaina erawh chu a nunnain a haw thin. 
Psalms11:6 Misuaksualte chungah chuan thangte a surtir ang a; Mei leh kat leh thli lum tak hi an no chan tur ani ang.LALPA chu a fel si a; felni hi angaina thin a: Mi dik takte chuan a hmel an la hmu ang. 
Psalms11:7 LALPA chu a fel si a; felni hi angaina thin a: Mi dik takte chuan a hmel an la hmu ang. 
Psalms12:1 LALPA, mi tanpui rawh; Pathian ngaihsak mi an awm tawh si lo a; Mihring fate zing ata hi m rinawm chu an bo ta si a." 
Psalms12:2 Mi tinin an vengte hnenah thu engmah lo mai mai an sawi thin a: Mi fak derna hmui leh bumna thinlung puin thu an sawi thin. 
Psalms12:3 LALPA chuan fak derna hmui zawng zawng chu a hlep ang a, Thu chapo tak sawine lei nen chuan:" 
Psalms12:4 Anni chuan, ""Kan lei hian kan hneh ang a; Kan hmuite hi keimahni ta ngei alawm, tu nge kan chungah lal awm ni?"" an ti thin." 
Psalms12:5 LALPA chuan, ""Retheite an hnehchhiah avang leh, pachhiate rum avangin. Ka tho nghal mai ang a; An nuihsanna chu him takin ka awmtir teh ang,"" a ti a." 
Psalms12:6 LALPA thute hi thu thianghlim tak a ni; Tangka, lei chunga rawhtuina meia fiah a, Vawi sarih tihthianghlim tawh hnu ang hi a ni." 
Psalms12:7 Aw LALPA, nangin anni chu i vawng tha ang a, Heng thangtharte lakah hian kumkhuain i humhim ang.Mihring fate zingah hian sualna chu chawimawia a awmin, Mi suaksualte chu an vak vel ruai thin."

Psalms13:1 Aw LALPA, eng chen nge mi theihnghilh kumkhua dawn le? Eng chen nge ka lakah hian i hmai i thup dawn le?" 
Psalms13:2 Nilengin ka thinlunga lungngaihna neiin, Eng chen nge ka rilruah rem ka ruat ka ruat dawn? Eng chen nge ka hmelma chu ka chungah chawimawia a awm dawn?" 
Psalms13:3 Aw LALPA ka Pathian, ngaithuah la, mi chhang teh khai: Ka mit mi tihvarsak ang che, chutilochuan thihna muthilhin ka muhil dah ang e;" 
Psalms13:4 Ka hmelma chuan, ""Amah ka ngam ta,"" a ti dah ang e; Ka nghinin mi dotute an lawm dah ang e." 
Psalms13:5 Nimahsela kei zawngin i ngilneihna hi ka ring a ni: I mi chhandamnaah hian ka thinlung a lawm ang:Ka chunga tha taka a tih tak avangin LALPA chawimawiin hla ka sa ang. 
Psalms13:6 Ka chunga tha taka a tih tak avangin LALPA chawimawiin hla ka sa ang. 
Psalms14:1 Mi a chuan, a rilruin, ""Pathian reng a awm lo,"" a ti a. An chhe zo a, thil tenawm tak an ti a; Tumah thl tha ti reng an awm lo." 
Psalms14:2 Hre thiama, Pathian zawng reng reng An awm emaw,"" tiin, LALPA chuan van atangin mihring fate hi a zuk en a." 
Psalms14:3 A ni lo lamah an peng ta vek a; bawlhhlawh takin an lo awm ta hlawm a; Tumah thil tha ti reng an awm lo, pakhat te mah an awm lo." 
Psalms14:4 Thil tisualtute zawng zawng chuan hriatna reng reng an ei lo em ni? Chhang an ei angin ka mite an ei zo vek thin a, LALPA lah an ko ngai hek lo." 
Psalms14:5 Pathian chu mi fel thlahte zingah a awm thin avangin, An hlau em em ang." 
Psalms14:6 Mi rethei remruat chu in mualphosak thin, LALPA chu a inhumhimna a nih avangin.Israel-ho chhandamna chu Zion atangin lo chhuak teh se la aw! LALPA chuan amite sala an awm chu ahruai kir leh hunah, Chu mi hunah chuan Jakob-ho an hlim tawh ang a, Israel-ho an lawm tawh ang." 
Psalms14:7 Israel-ho chhandamna chu Zion atangin lo chhuak teh se la aw! LALPA chuan amite sala an awm chu ahruai kir leh hunah, Chu mi hunah chuan Jakob-ho an hlim tawh ang a, Israel-ho an lawm tawh ang." 
Psalms15:1 LALPA, i puan inah chuan tu nge lo miikhual ang? I tlang thianghlimah chuan tu nge lo awm ang?" 
Psalms15:2 Dik taka awm a, fel taka tia, A rilrua thutak sawi mi chu;" 
Psalms15:3 A leia mi rel a ngai lo a, A thian chung pawha thil sual ti ngai lo a, A vengte hming pawh sawichhe ngai lo mi chu." 
Psalms15:4 Mi sual tak chu ahmusitin a awm thin a; LALPA thihtute erawh chu a chawimawi thin a; Mahni tana pawi tur pawh chhechhama tiam tawh chu tidanglam ngai lo a,A pung um tura a tangka puktir ngai lo a, A thiam zawk thiam loh chantirna tura thamna pawh la ngai lo mi chu. Chung thil titu chu engtikah mah a nghing lo ang." 
Psalms15:5 A pung um tura a tangka puktir ngai lo a, A thiam zawk thiam loh chantirna tura thamna pawh la ngai lo mi chu. Chung thil titu chu engtikah mah a nghing lo ang." 
Psalms16:1 Aw Pathian, mi humhim rawh: nangmahah chuan ka rinna ka nghat si thin a." 
Psalms16:2 LALPA hnenah chuan, ""Nang chu ka LALPA ini a: Nangmah lo chu thatna reng reng ka nei lo e." 
Psalms16:3 Leia mi thianghlim awmte zawng, Anni chu mi tha, ka lawmna zawng anwg awmna chu an ni,"" ka ti a ni." 
Psalms16:4 LALPA-a pathian dang thlangtute chu, an lungngaihnate a la pung ang: An thisen hlan in mite chu ka hlan ve lo ang a, Ka hmuiin an hmingte ka lam hek lo ang." 
Psalms16:5 LALPA chu ka ro chan tur leh ka no chan tur chu a ni: Nangin ka chanpual chu mi tihnghehsak thin a. 
Psalms16:6 Tehna hruite chu hmun nuam takahte ka pualah a tla ta hlauh a ni; A ni, ro tha tak ka luah ta a ni." 
Psalms16:7 LALPA, rem mi ruatsaktu chu, ka fak ang a: A ni, zanahte hian ka rilruin mi thunun thin." 
Psalms16:8 LALPA chu ka hmaah ka awmtir fo a; Ka ding lama a awm avangin ka nghing lo ang. 
Psalms16:9 Chu vangin ka thinlung hi a lawm a, ka ropuina hi a hlim a: Ka tisa pawh him takin a awm ang." 
Psalms16:10 Ka thlarau Seol hnenah i hnutchhiah dawn si lo va: I mi thianghlim hi tawihna hmuh i phal dawn hek lo.Nangin nunna kawng chu mi hriattir ang a: I hmaah chuan hlima khah liamna a awm a; I kut dinglamah chuan kumkhaw lawmna tur a awm a. 
Psalms16:11 Nangin nunna kawng chu mi hriattir ang a: I hmaah chuan hlima khah liamna a awm a; I kut dinglamah chuan kumkhaw lawmna tur a awm a. 
Psalms17:1 Aw LALPA, ka felna thu hi hria la, ka au thawm hi ngaithla la; Dawt sawi ngai lo hmui atnaga chhuak ka tanwgtainaah beng lo chhi ang che." 
Psalms17:2 Ka chungthu tlukna chu i hma atanga chhuak ni se la I mitin thlei bik neih lona en rawh se. 
Psalms17:3 Ka thinlung hi i fiah a; zanah mi tlawh a; Mi fiah tawh a, engmah i hmu si lo a; Ka kain a sawi sual lo ang ka ti tlat a ni." 
Psalms17:4 Mihring thiltihah zawng, i hmuia thu chhuak avangin Mi nunrawng kawna kal lo turin ka invawng tha a ni." 
Psalms17:5 Ka ke pente hian i kawng chu a zawh tlat a, Ka kete hi a tlu ngai lo a." 
Psalms17:6 Aw Pathian, ka ko thin chia, nangin mi chhang dawn si a: Ka lamah hian i beng rawn dawh la, ka thu sawi hi ngaithla ang che." 
Psalms17:7 Aw, nangmaha rina nghat apiang anmahni beitute laka i kut ding lama chhandam thintu, I ngilneihzia mak tak chu lantir ang che." 
Psalms17:8 8-9, Mi suaksual mi tichhetu, Mi do tlata mi hual veltut lakah chuan Mit naute angin vawng tha la, I thla hnuaiahte mi thukru ang che." 
Psalms17:9 8-9, Mi suaksual mi tichhetu, Mi do tlata mi hual veltut lakah chuan Mit naute angin vawng tha la, I thla hnuaiahte mi thukru ang che." 
Psalms17:10 Mahni an inchawm thau a, An kain chapo takin an tawng thin." 
Psalms17:11 Tunah hi zawng kan ke penna apiangah mi hual vel tawh a, Leia min titlu turin an mitte chu kan chungah an fuktir tlat a." 
Psalms17:12 Anni chu sakeibaknei sa seh chak tak ang leh, Sakeibaknei vanglai hmun fianrialtea bawk reng ang mai chu an ni." 
Psalms17:13 Aw LALPA, tho la, Amah chu hmachhawn la, kuntir tlat rawh: Ka nunna hi mi sualsualte lakah i khandaihin chhanhim la," 
Psalms17:14 Aw LALPA, i kutin mihringte lakah, Khawvel mihringte lakah hian, chhanhim ang che; Anni chanvo zawng tun damchhunga an neih hi a ni a, An pum chu i roin i tikhahsak thin a; Fate lungawi tawk zetin an nei a, An sum hman bang chu a fasente an thihsan thin.Kei erawh zawngin felna neiin i hmel ka hmu ang a: Nangmah anna nei a ka men hunah chuan ka lungawi tawk zet ang. Nangmah anna nei a ka men hunah chuan ka lungawi tawk zet ang." 
Psalms17:15 Kei erawh zawngin felna neiin i hmel ka hmu ang a: Nangmah anna nei a ka men hunah chuan ka lungawi tawk zet ang. Nangmah anna nei a ka men hunah chuan ka lungawi tawk zet ang. 
Psalms18:1 Aw LALPA, ka chakna, ka hmangaih a che." 
Psalms18:2 LALPA chu ka lungpui leh, ka kulhpui leh, mi chhanhimtu a ni; Ka Pathian, ka lungpui nghet tak a ni a, amahah chuan rinna ka nghat ang; Ka phaw leh, ka chhandamna ki leh ka kulhbing sang a ni." 
Psalms18:3 Fak tlak LALPA chu ka ko ang a, chutichuan mi dotute lakah chhandamin ka awm ang." 
Psalms18:4 Thihna hruihrualte chuan mi zem a, Pathian ngaihsak lona tuiliante chuan mi tihlau a." 
Psalms18:5 Seol hruihrualte chuan mi phaur vel a: Thihna thangte chuan mi awk a. 
Psalms18:6 Ka manganin LALPA chu ka ko thin a, Ka Pathian ka au thin. Ani chuan a biak in atang chuan ka aw a hria a. A hmaa ka au thawm chu abengah a lut t a." 
Psalms18:7 Chu veleh lei hi a nghing a, a khur ta a, A thinur avangin tlangte pawh chu A nghahchante lamin a khurin a nghing ta a." 
Psalms18:8 A hnar atang chuan meikhu a chho tqa ngut ngut a, A kaa chhuak mei chuan a kang ta hluah hluah a, Chu chuanin meihawl pawh a tialh ta dur dur a." 
Psalms18:9 Ani chuan vante pawh a tikun a, a chhuk ta a; A ke hnuaiahte chuan thim chhah mup hi a lo awm a." 
Psalms18:10 Cherub chungah a chuang a, a thlaawk taa. A ni, thli thlaahte chuan a thlawk ta thuak a:" 
Psalms18:11 Thim hi a bihrukna hmunah, amah hual velna bukteah, asiam a; Tuia thimna, vana chhum chhan mupte chu." 
Psalms18:12 A hmaa enna avang chuan a chhum chhah mupte chu a kiang a, Rialte leh meilingte a tla ta dur dur a." 
Psalms18:13 LALPA chu vanahte khian a ri dur dur bawk a, Chungnungbera chuan a aw a chhuah a; Rialte leh meilingte a tla ta dur dur a." 
Psalms18:14 Tin, a thlate chu akap chhuak a, annihho chu tidarh a; A ni, kawlte a phettir zawih zawih reng a, a tibuai ta nuai hlawm a." 
Psalms18:15 Chu veleh, aw LALPA, i zilhhau avanga, I hnara thaw chhuakin a chhem vak avang chuan, Tui luiannate chu a lo lang a, Leilung nghahchhante chu tihlanin a awm ta." 
Psalms18:16 A ni chuan chung lam atangin a rawn bana, mi chelh a; Tui tam tak ata mi hnuk chhuak a." 
Psalms18:17 Mi dotu chak tak lakah chuan mi chhanhim a, Mi hawtute lakah pawh; kei atan chuan an chak lutuk si a." 
Psalms18:18 Anni chuan ka vanduai ni chuan mi bei a, Nimahsela LALPA chu ka rinpui ber a ni." 
Psalms18:19 Ani chuan hmun thawl takah mi hruai chhuak a; Ka chunga a lawm avangin mi lo chhanhim ta a ni. 
Psalms18:20 LALPA chuan ka felzia ang ngeiin ka chungah a ti a; Ka kutte a thianghlimzia ang ngeiin mi rul a ni. 
Psalms18:21 LALPA kawngte chu ka zawh a, Ka Pathian hnen ata sual takin kal bo ngai si lo a." 
Psalms18:22 A rorelna zawng zawng ka hmaah a awm thin a. A thuruatte chu ka hmaih ngai si lo a. 
Psalms18:23 Ama lakah chuan sawiselbo ka ni bawk a, Ka khawlohna ata ka inthiarfihlim thin a." 
Psalms18:24 Chuvangin LALPA chuan ka felzia ang zelin mi lo rul ta a, Ka kutte a mithmuha a thianghlimzia ang zelin." 
Psalms18:25 Mi khawngaih thei tak lakah chuan khawngaih thei takin i intilang ang a; Mi tha famkim lakah chuan tha famkimin i intilang ang a; 
Psalms18:26 Mi thianghlim lakah chuan thianghlimin i intilang ang a; Tin, mi luhlul lakah chuan luhlulin i intilang ang." 
Psalms18:27 Hreawm tuar mite chu i chhandam dawn si a; Mit chapote erawh chu i tilawm ang. 
Psalms18:28 Nangin ka khawnvar hi mi halsak dawn si a; LALPA ka Pathianc huan ka thimna hi a tieng ang. 
Psalms18:29 Nangma tanpuiin ral ka bawh si a; Ka Pathian tanpui bawkin kulh bang ka zuan khum a ni. 
Psalms18:30 Pathian zawng, a kawng chu a tha famkim a; LALPA thu chu fiah a ni tawh; Amaha rinna ngaht zawng zawngte tan chuan ani chu phaw a ni." 
Psalms18:31 LALPA lo chu tu nge Pathian awm ni? Ka Pathian lo chu tu nge lungpui awm ni? 
Psalms18:32 Chaknaa ka taia mi hrengtu leh, Ka kawng titha famkimtu Pathian chu." 
Psalms18:33 Ani chuan ka ke hi zukpui ke angin a siam a, Ka hmun sang takahte mi awmtir thin a." 
Psalms18:34 Ka kutte hi ral kap turin a zirtir trhin a, Chutichuan ka bante hian dar thla ngul a kuai zo hial a." 
Psalms18:35 Nangin i chhandamna phaw chu mi pe bawk a: I kut ding lamin mi kai a, I inngaitlawmnain mi siam lian ta," 
Psalms18:36 Ka hnuaia ka ke penna chu i tizau a, Tichuan ka kete hi a tleng lo." 
Psalms18:37 Mi dotute ka um ang a, ka um phak mai ang: Tihborala an awm hma lo chuan ka hawi kri tawh hek lo ang." 
Psalms18:38 An thawh leh theih lohna turin ka sat chhawk ang a: Ka ke hnuaiah hian an tlu hlawm ang. 
Psalms18:39 Nangin inbeihna atan chuan chaknain ka taiah mi hreng si a: Mi rawn beitute chu ka hnuaiah i tudawl ta a. 
Psalms18:40 Mi hawtute chu ka tihboral theihna turin, Nangin mi dotute chu mi hnuchhawnin i awmtir ta bawk a." 
Psalms18:41 Anni chu ka au a, nimahsela chhandamtu tur tumah an awm lo va: LALPA ngei chu an au a, nimahsela a chhang si lo." 
Psalms18:42 Chu veleh vaivut thli len mi ang mai hian ka vaw sawm dep a:aw LALPA, i zilhhau avanga, Kawtlai chirhdiak ang mai hian ka paih chhuak ta a." 
Psalms18:43 Nangin mite insualna lakahte chuan mi chhanhim a; Hnam tin lu-ah mi siam a: Ka hriat ngai loh mite chuan ka rawng an bawl tawh ang. 
Psalms18:44 Ka chanchin an hriat veleh ka thu an zawm ang a: Mikhualte chu ka hnenah an intulut ang. 
Psalms18:45 Mikhualte chu an zam ang a, An kulhbing atate chu khru chungin an lo chhuak ang." 
Psalms18:46 LALPA chu a nung reng e; ka lungpui chu fakin awm se la; Mi chhandamtu Pathian chu chawimawiin awm rawh se: 
Psalms18:47 Phuba mi laksaktu leh, Mi tin, ka hnuaia tudawltu Pathian ngei chu." 
Psalms18:48 Ani chuan mi dotute lakah mi chhanchhuak a: A ni, nangin mi beiotute chung lamah chuan mi chawi kang a: Mi nunrawng lak ata chu mi chhanhim thin a." 
Psalms18:49 Chuvangin, aw LALPA, hnam tin zingah chuan lawm thu ka hrilh ang chia, I hming akin ka zai bawk ang.Ani chuan chhandamna ropui tak a lal siam hnenah a pe thin a; A hriak thiha chungah, Davida leh a thlahte chun gngeiah chuan, Kumkhuain a ngilneihzia a lantir ang." 
Psalms18:50 Ani chuan chhandamna ropui tak a lal siam hnenah a pe thin a; A hriak thiha chungah, Davida leh a thlahte chun gngeiah chuan, Kumkhuain a ngilneihzia a lantir ang." 
Psalms19:1 Vante khian Pathian ropuizia chu a hriattir a; Boruak zau tak khian akut chhuak chu alantir thin a. 
Psalms19:2 Chhun hian chhun hnena thu a sawi chhawng zel a, Zan hian zan hnenah hriatna a lan chhawntir zel a," 
Psalms19:3 Thu sawi reng reng leh tawng reng reng a awm lo a; An aw chu benga hriat theih a ni lo. 
Psalms19:4 An tehna hrui chu leilung luah zawng zawngah zam chhuahin a awm a; An thu chu kawlkil thelngin a thang chhuak ta a. Chungahte chuan ni tan khian puan in a zar a," 
Psalms19:5 Chu ni chu mo neitu tur a pindan ata chhuak ang chu a ni a, Mi chak tak angin a tlanna kawng a tlan tur chu a hlim thin." 
Psalms19:6 A chhuahna chu kawl kil tawp atangin a ni a, A tlan kualna chu a tawp lehlam thlengin a ni a, A lum hre loa thuhruk reng reng a awm lo." 
Psalms19:7 LALPA dan chu a tha famkim a, nunna suam tha thin: LALPA thuhriattir chu a rinawm a, mi mawl a tifing thin;" 
Psalms19:8 LALPA thunnunna thu chu a dik a, thinlung a tilian thin: LALPA thupek chu a thianghlim a, mitte a tivar thin." 
Psalms19:9 LALPA tihna chu a fai a, kumkhua atan a awm thin: LALPA rorelnate chu a tak a, a fel vel vek a ni." 
Psalms19:10 Chung chu rangkachak aia duhawm zawk a ni a, a ni, rangkachak thianghlim tam tak ai pawhin: Khawizu leh khawithlar aiin a thlum zawk bawk a ni" 
Psalms19:11 Chu lo pawh chu chung chuan i chhiahhlawh hi zilhin ka awm thin a: Chung amw chu lawmman nasa tka neihna a ni thin. 
Psalms19:12 Tuin nge mahni tihsualte hre thei ang? Sual inthupte lakah hian mi tifihlim ang che. 
Psalms19:13 Thil tisual lui lo turin i chhiahhlawh hi mi chelh tlat la; Ka chungah thu neihtir suh ang che: chutichuan tha famkimin ka awm ang a, Bawhchhiatna nasa tak lakah saiwselboin ka awm ang.Aw LALPA, ka lungpui leh mi tlantu, Ka kaa thu chhuakte leh ka thinlunga ngaihtuahnate hi i mithmuhah lawmtlak takin awm rawh se." 
Psalms19:14 Aw LALPA, ka lungpui leh mi tlantu, Ka kaa thu chhuakte leh ka thinlunga ngaihtuahnate hi i mithmuhah lawmtlak takin awm rawh se."

Psalms20:4 I thinlung duhzawng chu pe phal che se la, I remruat zawng zawng hchu hlawhtlintir che rawh se."

Psalms20:6 LALPA'n a hriak thiha hi a chhandam tih tunah ka hre ta; A kut ding lam chandamna thain A van thianghlim atang khian amah a la chhang a.

Psalms21:1 Aw LALPA, lal chu i chaknaah hian ahlim ang a, I chhandamnaah hian a va hlim nasa dawn em!" 
Psalms21:2 A thinlung duhzawng chu i pe a, A hmuia a thil dil chu i phal lo lo e. (Selah)" 
Psalms21:3 Thatnaa malsawmnate in i hmuak si a: Rangkachak thinghlim lallukhum i khumtir a. 
Psalms21:4 Ani chuan nunna a dil chia, i lo pe a; Kumkhaw tlaitluana dam rengna chu." 
Psalms21:5 I tanpui avangin a ropui em em a: Chawimawina leh ropuina a chungah i nghat thin a. 
Psalms21:6 Kumkhua atan malsawmna nasa tak dawngin i siam si a: I hmaa hlimnain i tilawm thin. 
Psalms21:7 Lal chuan LALPA chu a ring si a, Chungnungbera ngilneihna avnaign a nghing lo ang." 
Psalms21:8 I kutin nangmah dotute zawng zawng chu a zawng chhuak vek ang a: I kut dinglamin nangmah hawtute a zawng chhuak ang. 
Psalms21:9 I thinur hunah chuan anni chu rawhtuina mei alh hluah hluah angin i siam ang. LALPA chuan ani chu thinurin a lem zo ang a, Mei chuan a kang ral mai ang." 
Psalms21:10 An rahte chu lei ata i tiboral ang a, An thlahte chu mihring fate zing ata i tiboral bawk ang." 
Psalms21:11 I chungah khan thil sual tih an tum si a; Thil sual an ngaihtuah chhuak a, an hlen thei si lo." 
Psalms21:12 Nangin anni chu i hnunghchawntir dawn si a, I thla hruite chu an hmai tinin i kuai peih diam ang.Aw LALPA, i chaknaah chuan chawimawiin lo awm ang che: Chutichuan i thiltihtheihna fakin hla kan sa ang." 
Psalms21:13 Aw LALPA, i chaknaah chuan chawimawiin lo awm ang che: Chutichuan i thiltihtheihna fakin hla kan sa ang." 
Psalms22:1 Ka Pathian, ka Pathian, engah nge mi kalsan? Engah nge mi tanpi turin i hlat em a, ka rumna thute atanga i hlat le?" 
Psalms22:2 Aw ka Pathian, chhunah ka au a, nimahsela i chhang si lo a; Zanah ka au bawk a, ka ngawi chuang lo." 
Psalms22:3 Nimahsela, aw nang Israel-ho faknaa cheng htin, Nang zang i thianghlim a ni." 
Psalms22:4 Min thlahtute chuan an lo ring chai: An ring a, tichuan nangin i lo chhanhim thin." 
Psalms22:5 An au chia, tichuan chhanhimin an lo awm thin a: An ring chia, tichuan mualphoin an awm ngai lo." 
Psalms22:6 Kei erawh chu mihring reng reng ka ni lo a, changpat mai ka ni a; Mihringte sawichhiat leh mite hmusit ka ni." 
Psalms22:7 Mi hmu apiangin mi nuihsan a: An hmui an kum a, an lu an thing a," 
Psalms22:8 LALPA chungah innghat ta che, ani chuan maah hi chhanhim ang hmiang: A chunga a lawm avangin chhanhi ang hmiang,"" an ti a." 
Psalms22:9 Nang erawh chu chhul ata mi la chhuaktu chu i ni a: Ka nu hnute chunga ka awm lai khan nangin mi rintir a. 
Psalms22:10 Chhul atang rengin nangma chunga nghah ka ni a: Nang chu ka nu pum chung atang rengin Pathian i ni. 
Psalms22:11 Mi hlat lul suh ang che: manganna tur a hnai si a; Tanpuitu tur reng reng an awm si lo. 
Psalms22:12 Bawngpa tam takin mi hual vel a. Bansan rama bawngpa chak takate chuan mi hual vek khup a. 
Psalms22:13 Sakeibaknei koham hahum hamng angin An kain mi an khum a. 
Psalms22:14 Tui anga leihbuakin ka awm a. Ka ruh zawng zawng pawh pelhsawlhin a awm a: Ka thinlung hi khawihnun ang a ni a; Ka ril zingahte hian a tui zo ta a. 
Psalms22:15 Ka tha hi lampei angin a ro zo a; Ka lei pawh hi ka dangah a bet ta tlat a; Nangin thihna vaivutah hian mi hruai lut ta ani hi. 
Psalms22:16 Ui chuan mi hual vel si a: Thil tha lo titu awm khawmte chuan mi hual tlat a; Ka kut leh ka kete hi a tipawp a. 
Psalms22:17 Ka ruh zang zang hi ka chhiar thei a; Anni lah chuan mi enin mi melh reng a: 
Psalms22:18 Ka silhfente an insem a, Ka kawr atan thum an vawr a," 
Psalms22:19 Nang erawh chuan, aw LALPA, mi hlat lul suh la: Aw, mi tichaktu, mi tanpui turin hmanhmawh ang che." 
Psalms22:20 Ka nunna hi khandaih lakah chuan chhanhim la; Ka neih chhun tak hi ui thiltihtheihna lakah chuan chhanhim ang che. 
Psalms22:21 Sakeibaknei kaa mi chu mi chhandam ang che; A ni, selepa kia mi chu nangin mi chhang ta," 
Psalms22:22 Ka unaute hnenah i hming ka hril ang a: Inkhawmho zingahte chuan ka fak ang che. 
Psalms22:23 LALPA tihtute u, amah chu fak rawh u; Jakoba thlah zawng zawngte u, amah chu chawimawi rawh u; Israela thlah zawng zawngte u,m amah chu hlau rawh u." 
Psalms22:24 Ani chuan hreawm tuartu hreawmzia chu ahmusit si lo a, a ten hek lo; A hmai chu alakah a thup hek lo; Amah a auhin a NGAITHLA ZAWK A." 
Psalms22:25 Inkhawmna ropui taka ka fak thinna che hi nangma hnena mi a ni: Amah tihtute hmaah chuan ka thutiam ka hlen ang. 
Psalms22:26 Thuhnuairawlthe chuan an ei ang a, an tlai ang: Amah zawngteute chuan LALPA chu an fak ang: In thinlung chu kumkhuain nungin awm rawh se." 
Psalms22:27 Kawlkila mi zawng zawng pawhin an hre leh ang, LALPA lam an hawi tawh ang a: Hnam tina chi tin, i hmaah an kun ang." 
Psalms22:28 Ram chu LALPA ta a ni a: Hnam tin chunga roreltu a ni si a. 
Psalms22:29 Leia mi neinung zawng zawngte chuan an eiin chibai an buk ang a: Vaivuta chhuk tur zawng zawngte chu ahmaah an la kun ang, Mahni nunna tinung reng thi lo chu." 
Psalms22:30 Thangtharten a rawng an bawl ang a; Thangthar lo awm zelte hnenah chuan LALPA chanchin chu an hril ang.LALPA'n a mite a chhanhim,' tiin La piang turte an hrilh ang." 
Psalms22:31 LALPA'n a mite a chhanhim,' tiin La piang turte an hrilh ang." 
Psalms23:1 LALPA chu mi vengtu a ni a; ka tlachham lo ang. 
Psalms23:2 Ani chuan hlobet hring dup hmunahte mi bawhtir thin a: Chawlhna tui kamahte mi hruai thin. 
Psalms23:3 Ka nunna hi mi siam that thin a, Ama hming avangin felna kawngahte mi hruai thin." 
Psalms23:4 A ni, thihna hlim kawr ruam zawh mah i la, thil tha lo reng reng ka hlau lo ang; nang ka hnenah i awm si a; I talhtum leh i tiangin mi thlamuan thin a ni." 
Psalms23:5 Mi dotute mit hmuhah ka hmaah hian dawhkan i buatsaih thin a: Ka lu hi hriak i thih tawh a, ka novah hian a liam reng a.Matheiloin thatna leh ngilneihnain ka dam chhung zawng hian mi zui zel ang a: Tichuan LALPA inah kumkhuain ka awm reng ang." 
Psalms23:6 Matheiloin thatna leh ngilneihnain ka dam chhung zawng hian mi zui zel ang a: Tichuan LALPA inah kumkhuain ka awm reng ang. 
Psalms24:1 Leilung leh a chhunga thil awm zawng zawng hi LALPA ta ani a; Khawvel leh a chhunga chengte nen hian. 
Psalms24:2 Tuifinriat chungahte amahin a din a ni si a, Luipui chungahte pawh atinghet bawk a." 
Psalms24:3 LALPA tlangah tu nge chho ang a, A hmun thianghlimah tu nge ding ang?" 
Psalms24:4 Kut fai leh thinlung thianghlim nei a, A rilru engmah lo mai mai lama dah ngai lo a, Bum tuma chhechham ngai lo mi chu." 
Psalms24:5 Ani chuan LALPA hnen ata malsawmna a dawng ang a, A chhandamtu Pathian hnen ata felna a dawng bawk ang." 
Psalms24:6 Pathian zawngtute chu chutiang mi chu an ni, Aw Jakoba Pathian, i hmel zawngtute chu,(Selah)" 
Psalms24:7 Aw kulh kawngkate u, in lu chungte kha chawi sang u la; Nangni kawngkhar hlunte u, inkhai sang rawh u: Tichuan ropuina Lal hi a lo lut dawn nia. Ropuina lal chu tu nge ni? LALPA chak tak leh thiltithei tak, LALPA, indonaa thiltithei tak chu a ni." 
Psalms24:8 Aw kulh kawngkate u, in lu chungte kha chawi sang u la, A ni, kawngkhar hlunte u, chawisang rawh u: Tichuan ropuina Lal hi a lo lut dawn nia.Chu ropuina Lal chu tu nge ni? Sipaihote LALPA chu, Amah ngei hi ropuina Lal chu a ni. (Selah)" 
Psalms24:9 Chu ropuina Lal chu tu nge ni? Sipaihote LALPA chu, Amah ngei hi ropuina Lal chu a ni. (Selah)" 
Psalms25:1 Aw LALPA, ka rilru hi i hnenah ka dah tlat thin." 
Psalms25:2 Aw ka Pathian, nang ka ring chia, Mualphoin mi awmtir suh la; Mi dotute mi ngam chu phal suh ang che." 
Psalms25:3 a ni, nangmah nghaktu reng reng chu tumah mualphoin an awm lo ang: A vang awm loa vervek taka titute erawh chu mualphoin an awm ang." 
Psalms25:4 Aw LALPA, i kawngte chu mi hriattir la; I kalkawng chanchinte mi zirtir ang che." 
Psalms25:5 I thutakah chuan mi hruai la, mi zirtir ang che. Nang hchu mi chhandamtu Pathian i ni si a; Nilenga ka nghah reng che hi." 
Psalms25:6 Aw LALPA, i lainatnate leh i ngilneihziate chu hre reng ang che; Hmasanga lo awm kumkhua tawha ni si a." 
Psalms25:7 Ka tleirawl lai sualnate leh ka bawhchhiatnate chu hre reng suh ang che; Aw LALPA, i thatna avangin, I ngilneihan avangin mi hre reng ang che." 
Psalms25:8 LALPA chu a thain a dik a ni: Chuvangin mi sualte chu kawng a entir ang. 
Psalms25:9 Thuhnuairawlhte chu rorelna felah a hruai ang a: Thuhnuairawlhte chu ama kawng chanchin a zirtir bawk ang. 
Psalms25:10 A thuthlun leh athuhriattirte zamwtute tan chuan LALPA kalkawng zawng zawngte chu ngilneihna leh thutak vek a ni. 
Psalms25:11 Aw LALPA, i hming avangin Ka khawlohna ngaidam ang che, nasa tak ani si a." 
Psalms25:12 LALPA tih mi chu tu nge ni? Chu mi chu a kawng thlant ru chu a la entir ang. 
Psalms25:13 A nunna chu nuamsak takin a awm ang a; A thlahte chuan ram chu an la luah ang.' 
Psalms25:14 LALPA thuruk chu amah tihtute hnenah a awm a, A thuthlun chu anmahni a hriattir ang." 
Psalms25:15 Ka mitin LALPA lam a en fo thin; Ani chuan ka kete hi len ata a la chhuak dawn si a. 
Psalms25:16 Ka lamah hian lo hawi la, mi khawngaih ang che; Khawhar leh hreawm takin ka awm si a." 
Psalms25:17 Ka thinlung buainate hi a lo nasa ta a; Aw, ka manganna atate hi mi hruai chhuak ang che." 
Psalms25:18 Ka hreawmzia leh ka manganzia hi ngaihtuah la, Ka sual zawng zawng ngaidam ang che." 
Psalms25:19 Mi dotute chu ngaihtuah teh, tam tak an ni a; Nasa takin mi haw si a." 
Psalms25:20 Aw, ka nunna vawng tha la, mi chhanhim ang che. Mualphoin mi awmtir suh ang che, nangmahah chuan ka rinna ka nghat si a." 
Psalms25:21 Ka rilru thatna leh ka diknain mi chhanhim rawh se, Ka nghak reng si chia.Aw Pathian, Israel-ho hi An manganna zawng zawng ata chhan chhuak ang che." 
Psalms25:22 Aw Pathian, Israel-ho hi An manganna zawng zawng ata chhan chhuak ang che." 
Psalms26:1 Aw LALPA, ro mi relsak ang che, rilru tha tak puin ka awm si a." 
Psalms26:2 Aw LALPA, mi en fiahin, mi fiah la; Ringhlel loin LALPA chu ka ring bawk a. Ka rilru leh ka thinlung hi tithianghlim ang che. I ngilneihzia chu ka hmaah a awm si a, I thutakah ka awm fo bawk a." 
Psalms26:3 Mi engmah lo mai maite hnenah ka thu ngai lo a; Vervekte hnenah pawh ka lut hek l ang. 
Psalms26:4 Thil tha lo titute inkhawmho chu ka hua a, Mi sualsuakte hnenah ka thu lo ang." 
Psalms26:5 Ka kutte hi sawiselbonain ka sil ang a, Chutiangin, aw LALPA, i maicham chu ka kal hual ang;" 
Psalms26:6 Lawm thu sawina ka tihrik theih a, I thilmak tih zawng zawng thute chu ka hrilh theihna'n." 
Psalms26:7 LALPA, i awmna in chu ka ngaina a, I ropuina awmna pawh." 
Psalms26:8 Ka nuna hi mi sualte zingah la tel suh la, Ka nun pawh hi thisen chhuah hmangte szingah la tel hek suh ang che:" 
Psalms26:9 An kutah chuan ngaihtuahna sual a awm a, An kut ding lam chu thamnain a khat a." 
Psalms26:10 Nimahsela kei zawng rilru tha puin ka awm ang: Mi tlan la, mi khawngai ang che.Ka ke hi hmun zawl takah a ding a; Inkhawmnaahte chuan LALPA chu ka fak ang." 
Psalms26:11 Ka ke hi hmun zawl takah a ding a; Inkhawmnaahte chuan LALPA chu ka fak ang. 
Psalms27:1 LALPA chu ka eng leh mi chhandamtu a ni; tu nge ka tih ang? LALPA chu ka nuna kulhbing a ni; tu nge ka hlauh vang? 
Psalms27:2 thil tha lo tiho, mi dotute leh ka hmelmate chuan, ka sa ei tuma mi bei lai khan, An inchhuih a, an tlu ta hlawm a." 
Psalms27:3 Sipai pawlhoin mi bei tumin mi ep reng mah se la, Ka thinlung hian a hlau lo ang: Ka chungah indona lo chhuak mah se la, Chuti pawhin ka ring tlat ang." 
Psalms27:4 LALPA hnenah thil pakhat ka dil a, chu mawlh chu ka zawng ang; LALPA mawizia hmu tur leh, a biak ina thu zawt turin Ka dam chhung zanga LALPA ina ka awm reng theihna tur chu." 
Psalms27:5 Mangan ni chuan a bukteah mi dah ru dawn si a, A humhimna puan inah chuan mi thukru ang a: Lungpui chungah mi hlang kai ang." 
Psalms27:6 Tunah hchuan mi do ta, mi hual veltute chung lamah ka lu hi chawikanin a awm ang; Tichuan a puan inah chuan hlimna inthawinate ka hlan ang a; Ka zai ang, a ni, LALPA fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms27:7 Aw LALPA, ka awa ka auh che chuan ngaithla ang che: Mi khawngaih la, mi chhang bawk ang che." 
Psalms27:8 Ka hmel zawng rawh u,"" tia i sawi lai khan; ka thinlung chuan i hnenah, ""LALPA, i hmel ka zawng ang,"" a ti a." 
Psalms27:9 Ka lakah hian i hmai thup suh la; I chhiahhlawh hi thinurin tibo suh ang che: Nang chu mi tanpuitu i ni thin a; Aw mi chhandamtu Pathian, mi paih thla suh la, mi kalsan lul suh ang che." 
Psalms27:10 Ka nu leh ka pa chuan mi kalsan ta si a, Nimahsela LALPA chuan mi la pawm ang." 
Psalms27:11 Aw LALPA, i kawng chu mi entir la; Ka hmelmate avang hian Kalkawng phei takah mi hruai ang che." 
Psalms27:12 Mi dotute duh duha tihah mi pe lul suh ang che: Hretu derten mi bei a, nunchhiat thu chhak chhuak thintute chuan." 
Psalms27:13 Mi nung ramah hian LALPA thatna hmuh inring suh i la chuan ka chauh tawh tur a ni.LALPA chu nghak reng rawh; Chak takin awm la, i thinlung chu intihuai rawh se; A ni, LALPA chu nghak reng rawh." 
Psalms27:14 LALPA chu nghak reng rawh; Chak takin awm la, i thinlung chu intihuai rawh se; A ni, LALPA chu nghak reng rawh." 
Psalms28:1 Aw LALPA, ka koh dawn che hi; Ka lungpui, ka lakah i beng chhu ngawng suh ang che: Chutilo zawng, nangin mi ngawihsan chuan, Khuakhurruma chhukte ang maiin ka lo awm dah ang e." 
Psalms28:2 Ka auh chea ka kutte hi i biakna hmun thianghlim lama ka phar chuan, Khawngaiha ka dilna awte hi ngaithla ang che." 
Psalms28:3 Mi suaksualte zingah leh thil tisualtute zingah chuan Mi hnuk bo tel suh ang che: Chunghote chuan an vengte hnenah remna thu an sawi thin a, Nimahsela an thinlungahte chuan thil tihsualna a awm reng si a." 
Psalms28:4 An thiltih ang zel leh, an thiltihte a sualzia ang zelin rul la; An kuta na thawh ang zelin rul la; An sual man hmuhtir ang che." 
Psalms28:5 LALPA hnathawhte leh A kuta a thiltih chu an ngaihsak loh avangin Ani chuan anniho chu siam tha loin a tichhia ang. 
Psalms28:6 Khawngaih ka dilna awte hi a ngaihthlak avangin LALPA chu fakin awm rawh se. 
Psalms28:7 LALPA chu ka chakna leh ka phaw a ni a Ka thinlung hian mah chu a ring a, tichuan puihin ka awm a; Chuvangin ka thinlung hi nasa takin a hlim a; Ka hlain amah ka fak a." 
Psalms28:8 LALPA chu an chakna ani a, A hriak thiha tan chuan chhandamna kulhbing a ni.I mite chhandam la, i rochan chu malsawm ang che: Anniho chu chawm la, kumkhuain pawm ang che." 
Psalms28:9 I mite chhandam la, i rochan chu malsawm ang che: Anniho chu chawm la, kumkhuain pawm ang che." 
Psalms29:1 Aw mi thiltithei tak fate u, LALPA hnenah pe u la; LALPA hnenah chuan ropuina leh chakna pe rawh u." 
Psalms29:2 LALPA hnenah a hming ropuina chu pe u la; Thianghlim mawina inbelin LALPA chu chibai buk rawh u. 
Psalms29:3 LALPA aw chu tui chungahte chuan a ri a: Ropuina Pathian chu a lo ri dur dur a, Lalpa ngei chu tui tam tak chungahte a lo ri a." 
Psalms29:4 LALPA aw chu thiltithei tak a ni a; LALPA aw chu ropui ta a ni. 
Psalms29:5 LALPA aw chuan sidar thingte chu a titliak ang a; A ni, LALPA chuan Lebanon tlanga sidar thingte chu a titliak seng sung thin." 
Psalms29:6 Bawng no tualchai angin a chettir thin a; Lebanon leh Sirion tlange chu sele no ang maiin. 
Psalms29:7 LALPA aw chuan meialhte a phel thin. 
Psalms29:8 LALPA aw chuan thlaler a nghawr nghing a; LALPA chuan Kadesh thlaler chu a tinghing thin.
