Psalms30:1 Aw LALPA, ka chawimawi ang che; nangin mi kai chhuak a, Mi dotuet chu mi diriamtir loh avangin." 
Psalms30:2 Aw LALPA ka Pathian, Ka au chia, nangin mi tidam ta a." 
Psalms30:3 Aw LALPA nangin ka nunna hi Seol ata chu i hruai chhuak a; Khuarkhuruma ka chhuk lohna turin nangin mi hum nung zel a. 
Psalms30:4 Aw, a mi thianghlimte u, LALPA fakin zai u la, A hming thianghlim chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms30:5 A thinur chu mit khapkar chauh ani si a; A duhsaknaah chuan nunna a awm thin. Tahna hi riak turin tlai lamah a lo lut thei a, Zingah erawh chuan hlimna a lo thleng thin." 
Psalms30:6 Kei zawngin ka nun khawnawm lai chuan, ""Engtikah mah ka nghing lo ang,"" ka ti a." 
Psalms30:7 LALPA, nangin i duhskna avangin ka tlang chu i lo din nghehtir tawh a: Nimahsela i hmai i thup a, ka lo mangan tak kha." 
Psalms30:8 Aw LALPA, nang ka au chia; LALPA hnen ngeiah chuan khawngaihna ka dil kha;" 
Psalms30:9 Thi i la, leilawtah chhuk i la, i tan hlawkna eng nge awm? Vaivutin a fak dawn che em ni?" 
Psalms30:10 Aw LALPA, ngaithla la, mi khawngaih ang che: LALPA, nang mi tanpuitu ni ang che." 
Psalms30:11 Ka mitthi ngaihna chu ka tan lamnaah i chantir a; Ka saiip puan chu mi hlihsak a, hlimnain ka taiah mi hreng ta a:Ka ropuina hi, ngawi reng lo a, nangmah faka a zaina turin. Aw LALPA ka Pathian, kumkhuain lawm thu ka hrilh fo ang che." 
Psalms30:12 Ka ropuina hi, ngawi reng lo a, nangmah faka a zaina turin. Aw LALPA ka Pathian, kumkhuain lawm thu ka hrilh fo ang che." 
Psalms31:1 Aw LALPA, nangmahah chuan ka rinna ka nghat thin a; Engtikah mah mualphovn mi awmtir suh la; I felna avangin mi chhanhim ang che." 
Psalms31:2 Ka lamah hian i beng rawn dawh la; Ka lamah hian i beng rawn dawh la; mi chhanhim thuai la: Ka tan lungpui nghet tak, mi chhandamna tura humhimna in, lo ni ang che." 
Psalms31:3 Nang chu ka lungpui leh ka kulhpui i ni si a; Chuvang chuan i hming avangin mi hruaiin mi kai ang che. 
Psalms31:4 Ka awhna'n a ruka len an phah lakah hian mi hnuk chhuak ang che; Nang chu ka kulhbing i ni si a. 
Psalms31:5 I kutah ka thlarau ka kawltir e: Aw LALPA, thutak Pathian, nangin mi tlan ta." 
Psalms31:6 Thil engmah lawilo mai maite ngaihsakho chu ka hua a; Kei erawh zawngin LALPA ka ring a ni. 
Psalms31:7 I ngilneihna avang hian ka hlimin ka lawm ang: Ka manganna hi i hmu si thin a; Ka nunna hi a hrehawm laite pawhin i hre thin. 
Psalms31:8 Tin, mi dotu kutah nangin mi khung lo a; Ka ke hi hmun thawl takah i nghat ta zawk a." 
Psalms31:9 Aw LALPA, mi khawngaih ang che, mangangin ka awm si a: Ka mit hi lungngaihna avangin a rawp telh telh a, a ni, ka nunna leh ka taksa lamin." 
Psalms31:10 Ka dam chhung hi lungngaiin a ral ta si a, ka kumte hi rumin a ral ta bawk a ni: Ka khawlohna avangin ka tha a thum a, ka ruhte pawh a rawp zo ta a." 
Psalms31:11 Mi dotute avangin ka hming hi alo chhe ta a, A ni, ka vengte lakah nasa takin a chhe ta a ni, ka hmelhraitte tan pawh hlauhawm tak ka ni ta a: Kawtlaia mi hmuate lah khan mi tlansan ta si a." 
Psalms31:12 Mitthi an theihnghilh ang takin theihnghilhin ka awm a: Bel keh ang mai ka ni ta. 
Psalms31:13 Mi tam tak mi hekna ka hre si a, Ka vela hlauhawm vawm chu; Mi phair ho lai khan. Ka nun mi laksak an tum a." 
Psalms31:14 Nimahsela, aw LALPA, ka ring chia: ""Ka Pathian i ni,"" ka ti a." 
Psalms31:15 Ka hunte chu i kutah a awm a: Mi dotute kut ata leh, mi tiduhdahtute lakah hian mi chhanhim ang che." 
Psalms31:16 I hmelin i chhiahhlawh hi han chhun eng la: I ngilneihna avangin mi chhandam ang che. 
Psalms31:17 Aw LALPA, mualphoin mi awmtir suh ang che; ka ko si chia: Mi suaksualte chu mualphoin awm se la, Seol-ah ngawi rengin awm rawh se." 
Psalms31:18 Hmui dawtheite chu tawng thei loin Chungte chuan chapo leh hmusi chungin Tawng chaltlai takin mi fel an sawi chhe thin. 
Psalms31:19 Aw, i thatna, nangmah tihtut tana i khawl khawm chu, a va ropi em! Mihring fate mithmuha nangmaha rinna nghatte tana i tihsak chu." 
Psalms31:20 Anni chu mihring phiarna lakah chuan i humhimna mithmuhah i thukru ang a: Lei hnialhratna lakah chuan bukteah i dah ru ang. 
Psalms31:21 LALPA chu fakin awm rawh se: A ngilneihzia mak tak chu khawpui nghet takah mi hmuhtir si a. 
Psalms31:22 Kei lah chuan, ka hamhaihin, ""I mithmuh ata paih boin ka awm ta,"" ka lo ti ta mai a: Nimahsela ka auh che khan khawngaih ka dilna awte kha i lo hre si a." 
Psalms31:23 Aw, a mi thianghlim zawng zawngte u, LALPA chu hmangaih rawh u: LALPA chuan mi rinawm chu a humhim a, Chapo taka titu chu nasa takin a rul thin.LALPA beisei zawng zawngte u, Chak takin awm u la, in thunlung chu intihuai rawh se." 
Psalms31:24 LALPA beisei zawng zawngte u, Chak takin awm u la, in thunlung chu intihuai rawh se." 
Psalms32:1 A bawhchhiatna ngaihdama awm a, a sualna hliahkhuha awm chu, a eng a thawl e." 
Psalms32:2 Mi, LALPA'n khawlohna neia a ruat loh a, A thlarauva tihderna reng reng awm loa chu, a eng a thawl e." 
Psalms32:3 Ka ngawih reng lai khan, nilenga ka rum thina lamah ka ruhte hi a chang zo vek a ni." 
Psalms32:4 Achhun azanin i kutin mi delh si a: Ka taksa hnawnna pawh, thal rumin thil a tidanglam angin, alo danglam tak hial kha. (Selah)" 
Psalms32:5 Ka sualna chu i hnenah ka puang a, Ka khawlohna chu ka zep ta lo va: ""Ka bawhchhiatna chu LALPA hnenah thupha ka chawi tawh ang,"" ka ti a; Tichuan ka sual khawlohna chu i lo ngaihdam tak kha. (Selah)" 
Psalms32:6 Chuvang chuan, Pathian ngaihsak mi tinin zawn hmuh awla i awm laiin i hnenah tawngtai theuh rawh se: Tui liante chu a lo liam hun chuan anni chu a chim pha thuai dawn lo nia." 
Psalms32:7 Nang chu ka bihrukna hmun i ni a; nang chuan manganna lakah mi humhim ang a; Chhanhimna hlatein mi hual veltir ang. (Selah) 
Psalms32:8 Fing taka awmtir chein i kalna tur kawng chu ka entir ang chia: Ka mita en reng chung chein rem ka ruatsak zel ang che. 
Psalms32:9 Ngaihtuahna nei hlei lo sakawr emaw, sabengtung emaw angin awm suh u: Chung chuan thununna'n lakam thir barh an ngai a," 
Psalms32:10 Chutilochuan i kai thei lo ang. Mi suaksual tan chuan lungngaihna tam tak a awm ang a: LALPA ringtu erah chu ngilneihnain a hual vel zawk ang.Mi felte u, LALPA-ah chuan hlimin lawm u la: Thinlung dik tak pu zawng zawngte u, hlimin au rawh u." 
Psalms32:11 Mi felte u, LALPA-ah chuan hlimin lawm u la: Thinlung dik tak pu zawng zawngte u, hlimin au rawh u." 
Psalms33:1 Aw, mi felte u, LALPA-ah chuan hlimin zai rawh u; Mi dk tan chuan Pathian fak hi a awm reng a ni." 
Psalms33:2 Tingtangin LALPA hnenah chuan lawm thu sawi u la: Perhkhuang hrui sawm nei mi nen amah fakin zai rawh u. 
Psalms33:3 Amah chawimawiin hla thar sa u la; Thawm nasa tak nen thiam takin tum rawh u. 
Psalms33:4 LALPA thu chu a dik a; A thiltih zawng zawng chu rinawm taka tih a ni si thin a. 
Psalms33:5 Felna leh rorelna fel hi a ngaina thin a: Leilung hi LALPA ngilneihnai a khat a. 
Psalms33:6 LALPA thuin vante chu siam ani a; Chunga awmho zawng zawngte pawh chu a kaa thaw chuan siam an ni bawk a. 
Psalms33:7 Ani chuan tuifinriat tuite chu englo dahkhawm thur angin a tikhawm a: Tui thuk takte chu dah khawmna inahte a dah tha thin. 
Psalms33:8 Leilung luah zawng zawng chuan LALPA chu tih se la: Khawvela awm zawng zawng chu amah hlauin awm rawh se. 
Psalms33:9 Ani chuan a sawi a, a lo awm ta a; Thu a pe a, a lo awm nghet ta si a." 
Psalms33:10 LALPA'n hnam tin remruat chu engmah loah a chantir a: Mi tin, ngaihtuahte chu engmah sawtna nei loin a siam thin." 
Psalms33:11 LALPA remruat erawh chu kumkhuain a awm nghet ang a. A thinlunga a ngaihtuahte ch chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a awm nghet ang. 
Psalms33:12 LALPA Pathian a nei hnam chu an eng a thawl e; Ama rochana a thlan mite chu. 
Psalms33:13 LALPA chuan van atang khian a thlir a; Mihring fate zawng zawng hi a hmu thin a; 
Psalms33:14 Leia awm zawng zawng hi A awmna hmun atang khian a rawn thlir thin; 
Psalms33:15 An zaa thinlung siam thina, An thiltih zawng zawng ngaihtuah thintu chuan." 
Psalms33:16 Lal reng reng hi sipaiho tam vang ngawta chhandama awm an awm ngai lo: Mi chak hi chak em em vang ngawtin chhanhim an ni ngai lo. 
Psalms33:17 Sakawr hi inchhandamna'n engmah ani lo va: A chak em em avang maiin tumah a chhanhim hek lo ang. 
Psalms33:18 Ngai teh, LALPA mit chu amah tihtute chungah chuan a fu reng thin a, A ngilneihna beiseitute chungah chuan;" 
Psalms33:19 An nunna thihna laka chhanhim tur leh Tam tlaka anmahni tungnung turin. 
Psalms33:20 Ka nunna hian LALPA a nghak reng a: Ani chu mi tanpuitu leh ka phaw a ni. 
Psalms33:21 Amahah chuan kan thinlung hi a hlim dan a ni, A hming thianghlim kan rin avangin.Aw LALPA, i ngilneihna chu kan chungah awm rawh se, Kan beisei ang zel chein." 
Psalms33:22 Aw LALPA, i ngilneihna chu kan chungah awm rawh se, Kan beisei ang zel chein." 
Psalms34:1 Englai pawhin LALPA chu ka fak ang a: Amah fakna chu ka kaah a chhuak fo ang. 
Psalms34:2 Ka nunna hian LALPA chu a chhuang ang a: Thuhnuairawlhte chuan chu chu an hria ang a,a n lawm ang." 
Psalms34:3 Aw, LALPA chu mi fakpui u la, A hming chu i chawimawi tlang ang u." 
Psalms34:4 LALPA chu ka zawng a, tin, ani chuan mi chhang a, Ka hlauhzawng zawng lakah chuan mi chhanhim ta a." 
Psalms34:5 Amah an en a, tin, an lo eng ta a: An hmelte chu engtikah mah a zak lo ang." 
Psalms34:6 He mi srethei hi a au a, tin, LALPA chuan a hria a, A manganna zawng zawngah chuan a chhan chhuak ta a." 
Psalms34:7 Amah tihtute chu, an velah LALPA vantirhkoh chuan a awm chilh a, A chhanhim thin." 
Psalms34:8 Aw, LALPA thatzia chu tem chhin teh reng u: Amaha rina nghat mi chu a eng a thawl e." 
Psalms34:9 Aw, a mi thianghlimte u, LALPA chu tih rawh u: Amah tihtute tan chuan tlakchhamna reng reng a awm si lo." 
Psalms34:10 Sakeibaknei vanglaite chu an tlachhamin an ril a tam thin a: LALPA zawngtue erawh chuan thil tha reng reng an tlachham lo ang. 
Psalms34:11 Hawh u, naupangte u, ka thu ngaithla rawh u: LALPA tih dan ka lo zirtir ang che u." 
Psalms34:12 Thatna a hmuh theihna'na, nunna duh a Damrei ngaina mi chu tu nge ni?" 
Psalms34:13 I lei chu sual lakah veng tha la, I hmui chu tihderna thu sawi lo turin veng tha rawh." 
Psalms34:14 Sual kalsan la, thil tha ti rawh; Remna zawng la, a umin um rawh." 
Psalms34:15 LALPA mit chuan mi felte lam a en thin a, A beng chuan an au hre turin a ngaithla reng thin." 
Psalms34:16 LALPA hmel chuan thil tisualtute chu a do thin, Anmahni hriat rengna chu lei ata tiboral turin." 
Psalms34:17 Mi felte chu an au a, tin, LALPA chuan a lo hria a, An manganna zawng zawngah chuan a chhan chhuak ta a." 
Psalms34:18 LALPA chuan thinlung lungchhiate chu a hnaih thin a, Rilrua inchhir apiangte chu a chhandam thin." 
Psalms34:19 Mi fel hreawmnate chu a tam a, Nimahsela LALPA'n chung zawng zawngah chuan a chhan chhuak thin a." 
Psalms34:20 A ruh zawng zawng a vawng tha a, Pakhat mah tihtliah a ni lo." 
Psalms34:21 Thil tha loin mi suaksualte chu a tihlum ang a: Mi fel hawtute chuan thiam loh an chang a.LALPA chuan a chhiahhlawhte nunna chu a tlan thin a. Amaha rinna nghatte chu pakhat mah thiam loh chang an awm lo ang. 
Psalms34:22 LALPA chuan a chhiahhlawhte nunna chu a tlan thin a. Amaha rinna nghatte chu pakhat mah thiam loh chang an awm lo ang. 
Psalms35:1 Aw LALPA, mi beitute chu nangin bei la: Mi dotute chu nangin do ang che." 
Psalms35:2 Phawte leh phaw lian chelh la, Mi tanpui turin ding ang che:" 
Psalms35:3 Fei pawh phawi la, mi umtute kawng lo dang la: Ka nunna hnenah hian, ""I chhandamtu ka ni e,"" ti ang che." 
Psalms35:4 Ka nunna tihbo tuma zawngtute chu, tihmualphova tihzahin awm se la: Mi tihchhiatna tur suangtuahtute chu, tlanchhiattirin hrilhhai takin awm rawh se. LALPA vantirhkohina khalh zel siin, Buh si thli len angin awm rawh se." 
Psalms35:5 LALPA vantirhkohina um zel siin, An kawng hchu thim tak leh nal tak ni rawh se." 
Psalms35:6 A vang awm loin min awhna'n an len chu khuarkhurumah an phah ru a, A vang awm loin an nunna tlakna'n khuarkhurum an lai si a." 
Psalms35:7 A inrin loh hlanin chhiatna achungah thleng se la; A len phah rukah khan amah ngei awk bawk se la; Chu miah chuan tla chhe rawh se. 
Psalms35:8 Tichuan ka nunna hi lalpaah chuan a hlim ang a: A chhandamnaah chuan a lawm ang. 
Psalms35:9 Ka ruh zawng zawng hian, ""LALPA mi rethei, a khin zawh rual loh laka chhanhimtu, A ni, rethei leh pachhia, a ram thintu laka chhanhimtu, Nang ang reng reng tu nge awm?"" a ti ang." 
Psalms35:10 Hretu fel lo takte anlo tho a; Ka thil hriat hauh loh thu-ahte mi chhal a. 
Psalms35:11 Ka nunnain thil chan khawpin thil tha thil sualin mi rul a. 
Psalms35:12 Kei erawh chuan ka dam lohin saiip ka sin a: Chaw ka nghei a, kun tlawk tlawkinka tawngtai a." 
Psalms35:13 Unau tan emaw thian tan emaw ni awm takin: Lusun ang maia kunin ka vei ka vei a, Mahni nu sun ang maiin." 
Psalms35:14 Nimahsela kei ka bai chuan anni chu an lawm zawk a, an inkhawm hial a: Mi sual mai maite chu mi bei turin an inkhawm a, chu chu ka lo hre si lo a; Bang duh loin mi sawisa nek a:" 
Psalms35:15 Ruaithehnatea nuihza fiamthu sawitute mai mai angin An ha mi thial khum a. 
Psalms35:16 LALPA, nangin eng chen nge i en dawn le? Ka nunna hi tihchiat an tumna lakahte chuan chhan chhuak la, Ka neih chhun tak hi sakeibaknei lakahte chuan chhan chhuak ang che." 
Psalms35:17 Inkhawmna ropui takah chuan lawm thu ka hrilh ang chia: Mi tam tak zingah ka fak ang che. 
Psalms35:18 Ka hmelmate chuan dik o takah mi diriam suh se: Enga khawlawi loa mi hawtute chu an mitin inbe hek suh se. 
Psalms35:19 Remna thu reng an sawi si lo va: He rama awm hle hlete bumna thute an suangtuah zawk a ni. 
Psalms35:20 A ni, an kain mi an khum huau a; ""Chei! Chei! Kan mitin kan hmu ta,"" an ti a." 
Psalms35:21 Aw, LALPA, nangin i hmu e, ngawihsan suh ang che: Aw, Lalpa, mi hlat lul suh ang che." 
Psalms35:22 Ka Pathian leh ka Lalpa, ka rorel turin, A ni, ka thua mi tan turin, intiharh la, meng ang che." 
Psalms35:23 Aw LALPA ka Pathian, i felna avangin ro mi rel la; Anni chuan mi diriam suh se." 
Psalms35:24 An rilru chuan, ""Chei! Chutiang chu alawm kan duh ni,"" ti suh se: ""Ani chu kan lem zo ta,"" ti hek suh se." 
Psalms35:25 Ka chhiatna chunga lawmtte chu mualpho tak leh hrilhhai takin awm hlawm se la; Ka chunga intiliante chu mualphona leh zahna sintirin awm rawh se. 
Psalms35:26 Ka felna chunga lawmte chu hlima auin lawm takin awm se la: A ni, ""A chhiahhlawh vanneihna chunga lawm thin LALPA chu Chawimawiin awm rawh se.Tichuan, ka lei hian felna thu a sawi ang a, I fakna thu pawh nilengin a sawi bawk ang." 
Psalms35:27 Tichuan, ka lei hian felna thu a sawi ang a, I fakna thu pawh nilengin a sawi bawk ang." 
Psalms36:1 Mi suaksual bawhchhiatna chan ka thinlung chhungah hian thu a sawi a, ""A mithmuhah Pathian hlauhna reng a awm lo,"" tiin." 
Psalms36:2 Ka khawlohna an hmu chhuak lo ang, an haw hlei lo ang e,"" tiin. Mahni mithmuhah mahni vek a infak chawp si thin a." 
Psalms36:3 A kaa thu chhuakte chu sualna leh bumna thu hlir a ni thin a: Finvar leh thil tha tih a bang ta a. 
Psalms36:4 A khumlaizawlah chuan thil sual a suangtuah thin a; Kawng tha loah chuan akal lui a; Sualna chu a ten lo. 
Psalms36:5 Aw, LALPA, i ngailneihna chu vanahte kihian a awm a; I rinawmna chuan van dumte khi a tawng a ni." 
Psalms36:6 I felna chu Pathian tlangte ang ani a; I rorelte chu tui thuk zau tak ang a ni: Aw LALPA, mihring leh sa i humhim thin." 
Psalms36:7 Aw Pathian, i ngilneihna chu a va hlu em! Mihring fate chuan i thla hnuai an chuh thin." 
Psalms36:8 Anni chu i in chhung htil thain an tlai em em ang a; I lawmna luia mi chu i intir bawk ang. 
Psalms36:9 Nunna tuikhur ch i hnenah a awm si a: I engah chuan eng kan la hmu ang. 
Psalms36:10 Aw, nangmah hretute chungah chuan i ngilneihna chu lantir zel la; Thnlung dik tak pute chungah pawh i felna chu lantir zel ang che." 
Psalms36:11 Chapo ke chu mi bei turin ka lamah pen suh se la. Mi suaksual kut pawhin mi hnawt bo suh se.Sawtah sawn thil tisualtute chu an tlu reng a: Nam thluk an ni a, an tho thei tawh lo ang." 
Psalms36:12 Sawtah sawn thil tisualtute chu an tlu reng a: Nam thluk an ni a, an tho thei tawh lo ang." 
Psalms37:1 thil tha lo titute avangin intilungngai duh suh la. Fel lo taka tite chu awt hek suh. 
Psalms37:2 Hlobet angin ah thlukin an awm thuai ang a, Hnim hring angin an la vuai dawn si a." 
Psalms37:3 Lalpa chu ring la, thil tha ti rawh; He ramah hian awm la, rinawmna um zel rawh." 
Psalms37:4 LALPA chungah chuan lawm bawk rawh; Tichuan i thinung duhzawngte chu a pe ang che. 
Psalms37:5 I awm dan tur chu LALPA chungah nghat la; Amah chu ring la, aman a ti vek ang." 
Psalms37:6 I felzia chu eng angin a chhuahtir ang a, I thiam chanzia pawh chhun lai ang maiin." 
Psalms37:7 LALPA-ah chuan chawl la, amah chu nghak fan fan rawh; A awm dana vanneihna dawngtu avangin intilungngai duh suh, Ngaihtuahna sualte puitlintu avang chuan." 
Psalms37:8 Thinur hi bansan la, thnrim hi sim rawh. Intilungngai duh suh - thil tihsualah a lo tlak mai thin a ni." 
Psalms37:9 thil tha lo titute chu tihboralin an awm dawn si a: LALPA nghaktute erawh chuan ram hi an luah ang. 
Psalms37:10 Rei lote achinah mi suaksual chu a awm tawh dawn si lo: A ni, a awmna hmun chu en en mah la, a awm tawh lo ang." 
Psalms37:11 Thuhnuairawlhte erawh chuan ram hi an luah ang a: Remna chenin an hmuingil ang. 
Psalms37:12 Mi suaksual chuan mi fel aphiar a, A ha a thial khum thin." 
Psalms37:13 Lalpa chuan ani chu anuihsan ang: A ni alo thleng dawn tih a hriat avangin. 
Psalms37:14 Rethei leh pachhiate tithlu tur leh Awm dan dikte tihlum turin. Mi suaksualte chuan khandaih an phawi a, an thal ngul an kuai bawk a." 
Psalms37:15 An khandaih chuan anmahni thinlung chu a chhun ang a, An thla ngulte chu tihtliahin a awm bawk ang." 
Psalms37:16 Mi fel thil tlemte neih chu Mi suaksual tam tak thil neih rei rui te ai chuan a tha zawk a ni. 
Psalms37:17 Mi suaksual bante chu tihtliahin a awm dawn si a: Mi fel erawh chu LALPA'n a chelh reng thin. 
Psalms37:18 LALPA chuan mi tha famkim nite chu a hria a: An rochun tur chu kumkhuaa awm reng tur a ni. 
Psalms37:19 Hun tha loah an mualpho lo ang a; Tam kumahte pawh an puar ang. 
Psalms37:20 Mi suaksualte erawh chu an boral ang a, LALPA dotue pawh phul hnim duah ang an ni ang: Tihboralin an awm ang a, meikhuah an zam ral ang." 
Psalms37:21 Mi suaksual chuan a puk a, ape leh thin lo va: Mi fel erawh chuan mi a khawngaih a, a pe zawk thin." 
Psalms37:22 A malsawmna dawngtute chuan ram hi an luah dan a, A anchhelawh dawngtue ch utihgboralin an awm dawn a ni." 
Psalms37:23 LALPA chuan an kalna turah a hruai thin a, A duhzawng titute ch a veng thin." 
Psalms37:24 Tlu mah se la, an tlu hlen lo ang: LALPA'n a kutin a chelh reng si a." 
Psalms37:25 Naupang ka lo ni tawh a, tunah tar ka lo ni ta a, Nimahsela mi fel chu kalsana a awm ka hmu ngai lo a, A thlahte chaw khawn pawh ka hmu ngai hek lo." 
Psalms37:26 Nilengin mi a khawngaih a, a puktir thin a; A thlahte pawh an eng a thawl thin." 
Psalms37:27 Sual kalsan la, thil tha ti rawh; Tichuan kumkhuain cheng reng ang che." 
Psalms37:28 LALPA chuan rorelna fel a ngaina si a, A mi thianghlimte chu a kalsan ngai lo; Kumkhua atan vawn thatin an awm a: Mi suaksual thlahte erawh chu tihboralin an awm ang." 
Psalms37:29 Mi felte chuan ram hi an luah ang a, A chhungah hian kumkhuain an awm ang." 
Psalms37:30 Mi fel ka chuan finna thu a sawi thin a, A lei chuan rorel felna thu a sawi bawk thin." 
Psalms37:31 A Pathian dan chu a thinlungah a awm a; A pensan ngai lo. 
Psalms37:32 Mi suaksual chuan mi fel chu a en thla a, Tihhlum a tum thin." 
Psalms37:33 LALPA'n ani chua kutah a kalsan lo ang a, A ro an rel hunah chuan thiam loh chantir a phal hek lo ang." 
Psalms37:34 LALPA chu nghak la, a kawng chu zawh rawh. Tichuan ram hi luah turin a chawimawi ang che:" 
Psalms37:35 Mi suaksualte tihborala an awm lai chu i la hmu ang. Mi suaksual chu nasa taka thu neia, A tona hmuna thing chawr duah hluah anga a tawi bum lai ka hmu a." 
Psalms37:36 Nimahsela kawngah mi ava kal a, tin, ngai teh, ani chu a lo awm ta lo mai a: A ni, ka zawng a, nimahsela hmuh theih ani lo." 
Psalms37:37 Mi sawiselbo chhinchhiah la, mi dik tak chu en rawh, Chutiang mi tawpna tur chu thlamuanna a ni dawn si a." 
Psalms37:38 Bawhchhetute erawh chu a ruala tihchhiatin an awm hlawm ang a, Mi suaksualte tawpna chu boralna a ni ang." 
Psalms37:39 Amaherawhchu mi felte chhandamna chu LALPA lak ata a ni a: Ani chu mangan laia an kulhbing a nithin a.LALPA'n anni chu a tnapuiin a chhanhim thin a, Amahah chuan an tlukluh avangin Mi suaksualte lakah chuan a chhanhimin a chhandam thin." 
Psalms37:40 LALPA'n anni chu a tnapuiin a chhanhim thin a, Amahah chuan an tlukluh avangin Mi suaksualte lakah chuan a chhanhimin a chhandam thin." 
Psalms38:1 Aw LALPA, thinurin mi zilhhau suh la: Thinrimin mi thunun hek suh ang che." 
Psalms38:2 I thalte chu ka pangah a bur tlat a, I kutin mi nem tlawk tawlk si a." 
Psalms38:3 I lungnih lohna avnaign ka tisaah hian dam lai reng a awm lo a; Ka sualna avangin ka ruhahte hian hrisel lai reng reng a awm hek lo. 
Psalms38:4 Ka khawlohnate chuan ka lu hi a chim pil a, Phur rit tak ang, ka zawh rual loh hi a ni." 
Psalms38:5 Ka atna avangin Ka pemte h a uihin a khawlo zo ta a. 
Psalms38:6 Ka na a, ka kun tlawk tawlk a; Nilengin lungngaiin ka van ruai thin a." 
Psalms38:7 Ka kawng hi a sa hluah hluah vek a; ka tisaah pawh hian dam lai reng a awm lo. 
Psalms38:8 Ka chau a, ka sil urh a; Ka thinlung nawm lohna avangin ka rum vak vak a." 
Psalms38:9 LALPA, ka duhzawng zawng zawng hi i hmaah a awm vek a; Ka rum pawh hi i lakah thuruk a ni lo." 
Psalms38:10 Ka thin hi a phu hlawp hlawp a, thahrui ka nei ta lo va: Ka mit varna lah chuan mi awm lohsan ta bawk a." 
Psalms38:11 Mi hmangaihtute leh ka thiante chu ka thil vei lakah hian an inthiarfihlim thin a; Ka laichinte pawh hla takah an ding thin. 
Psalms38:12 Ka nunna tihbo tuma zawngtute chuan min awhna'n thangte an kam thin a; Ka chhiatna tur zawngtue pawh chuan thu tha lo takte an sawi a, Nilengin bumna thute an ngaihtuah thin." 
Psalms38:13 Nimahsela kei chu mi bengngawng angin hre loin ka awm a; Tawng thei lo mi ka ang ngai lo angin ka awm. 
Psalms38:14 A ni, mi tawng hre thei lo, A kaa zilhhauna reng chhuak ngai lo angin ka awm." 
Psalms38:15 Aw LALPA, nangmah ka beisei si chia: Aw LALPA ka Pathian, nangin mi chhang ang." 
Psalms38:16 Chutilochuan mi diriam ang a, Ka ke a tleu veleh ka chungah an intilian dah ang e,"" ka ti a ni." 
Psalms38:17 Ka bai dawn dawn si a, Ka lungngaihna pawh ka hmaah a awm fo a ni." 
Psalms38:18 Ka khawlohna chu ka puang ang a; Ka sualna avanga lungngaiin ka awm dawn a ni. 
Psalms38:19 Nimahsela mi dotute chu an thothang a thain, an chak a: Dik lo taka mi hawtute chu an pung ta luai a." 
Psalms38:20 thil tha thil Saula rul thintute hi thil tha ka um avangin mi dotute an ni a. 
Psalms38:21 Aw LALPA, mi kalsan lul suh la: Aw ka Pathian, mi hlat lul suh ang che.Aw LALPA mi chhandamtu, Mi tanpui turin hmanhmawh ang che." 
Psalms38:22 Aw LALPA mi chhandamtu, Mi tanpui turin hmanhmawh ang che." 
Psalms39:1 Ka lei hian thil ka tihsual lohna turin Ka awm dante hi ka veng tha ang a: Mi suaksualte ka hmaa an awm chhung zawng Ka ka hi hmui phuarnain ka phuar ang,"" ka ti a." 
Psalms39:2 Chutichuan ngawi rengin tawng loin ka awm a, A tha lamah pawh ka ngawi reng a; Nimahsela ka lungngaihna chu chawhthawhin a awm zawk mah a." 
Psalms39:3 Ka kawchhungah hian ka thinlung a sa huam huam a; Ka ngaihtuah ka ngaihtuah chuan mei chu a alh chhuak a; Tin, ka lei hian thu ka sawi ta a:" 
Psalms39:4 LALPA, ka tawpna tur leh, ka dam chin tur chu Engtin nge ni tih, mi hriattir la; Ka derdepzia hi mi hriattir ang che." 
Psalms39:5 Ngai teh, ka dam chhung hi kutphah bawk lekin i siam a; Ka kum hi i mithmuhah chuan engmah tham ani lo a; Mi tin, hi an that lai ber pawhin an pumin engmah lo mai an ni." 
Psalms39:6 Mi tin, hi hlim angin an leng tak meuh va: (Selah) An buai thlawn tak meuh thin a ni.Ro a khawl khawm thin a, a khawmtu tur a hre si lo." 
Psalms39:7 Tin, LALPA, tunah eng nge ka nghah le? Nangmahah a ni, ka beiseina a awm ni." 
Psalms39:8 Ka bawhchhiatna zawng zawng lakah mi chhanchhuak la: Mi a sawichhiatin mi awmtir suh ang che. 
Psalms39:9 Nangma tih a nih avangin Ka tawng lo a, ka ka ka ang hek lo" 
Psalms39:10 I mi vuakna hi ka hnen ata mi lak sawnsak la: I kutthlaka tihboral ka nih hi. 
Psalms39:11 Mi a bawhchhiatna avanga zilhhaunatea i thunun hian, A duhawmna hi sulrul angin i tichhe thin a; Mi tin, hi engmah lo mai an ni (Selah)" 
Psalms39:12 Aw LALPA, ka tawngtaina hi ngaithla la, ka auhnaah hian beng chhi la; Ka mittui tla hi ngawihsan suh ang che. I mikhual ka ni a, Mi thlahtute zawng zawng ang khan pem mai ka ni si a.Aw, heta tak ka chhuah a, ka awm loh hlen daih hma hian, Ka harh lehna turin mi zuah ang che." 
Psalms39:13 Aw, heta tak ka chhuah a, ka awm loh hlen daih hma hian, Ka harh lehna turin mi zuah ang che." 
Psalms40:1 LALPA chu ka nghak fan fan a; Tichuan annin mi rawn thek a, ka au chu a ngaithla ta." 
Psalms40:2 Boralna khuarkhurum ata, chirhdup ban tak ata chu mi khai chhuak ta abawk a; Tin, ka ke chu lungpui chungah a nghat a, ka ke pente chu a tinghet a." 
Psalms40:3 Hla thar ka kaah a dah ta bawk a, kan Pathian fakna chu: Mi tam takin chung chu an hmu ang a, an hlau ang a, LALPA chu an ring tawh ang." 
Psalms40:4 LALPA chu a rinchhana nei a, Chapote leh dawt lama penge ngaihsak lo mi chu, a eng a thawl e." 
Psalms40:5 Aw LALPA ka Pathian, nangin thilmak i tihte leh, Keimahni lam i ngaihtuahnate hi a tam em em mai a, Chung chu i hmaa tihlan sen rual a ni lo a; Hriattirin hri dawn i la, Chhiar sen rual a ni lo ang." 
Psalms40:6 Inthawina leh thilhlan chungah hain lawmna reng i nei lo a; Ka bengte hi mi tihawngsak ta a: halral thilhlan leh sual tana thilhlan chu i phut lo. 
Psalms40:7 Chu veleh chuan, keiin, 'Ngai teh, ka lo kal e; Lehkhabu zialah chuan ka thu ziak a ni a:" 
Psalms40:8 Aw ka Pathian, i duhzawng tih hi ka lawmzawng tak a ni; A ni, i dan thu chu ka thinlungah a awm reng e,"" ka ti a." 
Psalms40:9 Inkhawmna ropui takah chuan felna chanchin tha ka tlangaupui a; Aw LALPA, ngai teh, Ka ka hi ka ui lo ang tih i hria e." 
Psalms40:10 I felna chu ka thinlung chhungah ka zep lo a; I rinawmna leh i chhandamna thu chu ka tlangaupui zawk a: I ngilenihna leh i takina chu inkhawmna ropui taka mite lakah chuan ka thup lo e. 
Psalms40:11 Aw LALPA, i lainatnate chu ka lakah ui suh la: I ngilneihna leh i takina chuan mi humhim fo rawh se." 
Psalms40:12 Thil tha lo chhiar sen loh chuan mi hual vel si a, Ka khawlohnate chuan mi umphak a, chutichuan ka dak thei ta lo a; Chung chu ka samzaite ai hian a tam zawk a, ka thinlung hi a chau ta." 
Psalms40:13 Aw LALPA, khawngaih takin mi chhanhim la: Aw LALPA, mi tanpui turin hmanhmawh ang che." 
Psalms40:14 Ka nunna tihbo tuma zawngtute chu Mualpho tak leh zak takin awm hlawm se la; Ka chhiatna chunga lawmte chu Hawi kirtirin tihzahin awm rawh se. 
Psalms40:15 Chei! Chei! mi tutute chu An mualpho avangin mangang takin awm rawh se. 
Psalms40:16 A zawngtu che zawng zawng chu nangmahah chuan hlim tak leh lawm takin awm se la: I chhandamna ngainatute chuan, ""LALPA chu chawimawiin awm rawh se,"" ti fo rawh se.Kei zawng rethei leh pachhe tak ka ni a, Nimahsela LALPA'n mi ngaihtuah thin a: Nang chu mi tanpuitu leh mi chhanhimtu i ni a; Aw ka Pathian, rei rial lul suh ang che," 
Psalms40:17 Kei zawng rethei leh pachhe tak ka ni a, Nimahsela LALPA'n mi ngaihtuah thin a: Nang chu mi tanpuitu leh mi chhanhimtu i ni a; Aw ka Pathian, rei rial lul suh ang che," 
Psalms41:1 Retheite ngaihtuah mi chu a eng a thawl e, Mangan ni chuan LALPA'n a ni chu a chhanhim ang." 
Psalms41:2 LALPA'n ani chu humhimin a tinung ang a, leiah hian malsawmin a awm ang: Amah dotue duh duha tihah pe suh ang che." 
Psalms41:3 LALPA'n a chauhna mut hmunah chuan a tichak ang a: Nangin a dam loh laiin a mutna i siamsak vek thin. 
Psalms41:4 Keiin, ""Aw LALPA, mi khawngaih la, Ka nunna hi tidam ang che, i chungah thil ka tisual si a, ka ti a." 
Psalms41:5 Mi dotute chuan, ""engtikah nge a thih ang a, a hming a bo ang?"" tiin, Mi sawichhe thin a." 
Psalms41:6 Tin, an zinga tuin emaw mi rawn kan lahin, thu engmah lo mai mai a sawi thin a; A thinlung chuan sualna a la khawm thin a: A kal chhuah veleh mi a hrilh thin." 
Psalms41:7 Mi hawtute zawng zawng chuan mi hekna thu sesein an la a: Mi tihchhiatna tur an suangtuah thin. 
Psalms41:8 Natna tha lo takin a tlakbuak ta a: Tuna a mu hi a tho leh tawh lo ang,"" an ti a." 
Psalms41:9 A ni, ka thian kawmngeih, ka rin tak, ka chhang eipui ngei chuan A ke artui ka chungah a lek ta." 
Psalms41:10 Nimahsela, aw LALPA, nangin mi khawngaih la, Anmahni ka thungrulh t heihna turin mi kaitho leh ang che." 
Psalms41:11 He mi-ah hian ka chungah i lawm tih ka hria, Mi dotu chuan mi ngam thin loh avang hian." 
Psalms41:12 Kei zawng rilru tha tak ka putnaah hian nangin mi chelh reng a, A hmaah chuan kumkhua atan mi dah a.LALPA, Israela Pathian chu, Chatuan ata chatuan thlengin fakin awm rawh se." 
Psalms41:13 LALPA, Israela Pathian chu, Chatuan ata chatuan thlengin fakin awm rawh se." 
Psalms42:1 Sakhi, luite tui chaka a thaw huam huang ang hian, Aw Pathian, ka nunna hi nangmah chakin a thaw huam huam a ni." 
Psalms42:2 Ka nunna hi pathian chakin, Pathian nung chakin, a tuihal a ni: Engtikah nge Pathian hma ka thlen ang a, ka inlan ang aw?" 
Psalms42:3 Ka mittui hi a chhun azanin ka chaw a ni. Khawiah nge i Pathian le? mi lo ti chamchi a. 
Psalms42:4 Heng thil hi ka hre reng a, ka nunna hi ka chhungah ka leihbua a, Mipui zinga ka kal a, hlimna leh fakna ri nena, mi tam tak kut, Pathian biak in pana an hma ka hruai thinziate kha." 
Psalms42:5 Aw ka nunna, engah nge i kun reng? Engah nge ka chhungah hian i buai ni? Pathian beisei rawh: a hmela damna avangin Amah chu ka la fak dawn si a." 
Psalms42:6 Aw ka Pathian, ka nunna ka chhungah hian a kun reng a: Chuvangin Jordan leh Hermon ram atang te, Mizar tlang atangte hian ka hre reng che a ni," 
Psalms42:7 I tui luang ri dur durahte hian tui thuk leh tui thuk chu an inau va: I tuifawn leh i tui inchhawk zawng zawngte chuan mi vur pil ta a. 
Psalms42:8 Nimahsela LALPA'n a ngilneihna chu chhunah thu a pe ang a, A hla chuan zanah mi awmpui ang, Ka nuna Pathian hnena tawngtaina chuan." 
Psalms42:9 Pathian ka lungpui hnenah chuann, ""Engah nge mi theihnghilh le? Engah nge dotu hnehchhiahna avanga lungngaia ka van ruai thin le?"" ka ti ang." 
Psalms42:10 Ka ruha khandaih awm ang maiin mi dotute chuan mi sawichhe thin a; Khawiah nge i Pathian le? mi lo ti chamchi a.Aw ka nunna, engah nge i kun reng? Engah nge ka chhungah hian i buai ni? Pathian beisei rawh: amah chu ka la fak dawn si a, Ka hmel tidamtu leh ka Pathian chu." 
Psalms42:11 Aw ka nunna, engah nge i kun reng? Engah nge ka chhungah hian i buai ni? Pathian beisei rawh: amah chu ka la fak dawn si a, Ka hmel tidamtu leh ka Pathian chu." 
Psalms43:1 Aw Pathian, ro mi rel la, Pathian ngaihsak lo hnam chungah hian ka thu mi sawipui ang che: Aw, mi bumhmang mi dik lo lakah hian mi chhanhim ang che." 
Psalms43:2 Nang hchu ka chakna Pathian i ni si a; engah nge mi thlauhthlak le? Engah nge dotu hnehchhiahna avanga lungngaia ka van ruai thin le? 
Psalms43:3 Aw, i eng leh i thutak chu tir chhuak la, anni chuan mi hruai se la: I tlang thianghlim leh I awmnate chu mi thlen rawh se." 
Psalms43:4 Chutichuan Pathian maicham kiangah ka kal ang, Pathian ka hlimna em em kiangahc huan: Aw Pathian, ka Pathian, tingtangin ka fak bawk ang che.Aw ka nunna, engah nge i kun reng? Engah nge ka chhungah hian i buai ni? Pathian beisei rawh: amah chu ka la fak dawn si a, Ka hmel tidamtu leh ka Pathian chu." 
Psalms43:5 Aw ka nunna, engah nge i kun reng? Engah nge ka chhungah hian i buai ni? Pathian beisei rawh: amah chu ka la fak dawn si a, Ka hmel tidamtu leh ka Pathian chu." 
Psalms44:1 Aw Pathian, hmasanga an dam laia i thiltihte khat Min thlahtuten min hrilh a, kan bengin ka hria." 
Psalms44:2 Nangin i kut ngeiin hnam tin chu i hnawt chhuak a, anni chu i phun ta thung a; Mi tin, chu i tirethei a, anni chu i zar zautir tat hung a." 
Psalms44:3 Ram hi luah tura anmahni khandaiha an lak a ni lo a, Anmahni bana inchhandam an ni hek lo: An chunga i lawm avangin I kut dinglam leh, i ban leh, i hmel angin a ni zawk." 
Psalms44:4 Aw Pathian, nang chu ka Lal i ni: Jakoba chhanhimna'n tu pe ang che." 
Psalms44:5 Nangmah avangin min dotute chu kan si thlu ang a; I hming avangin min beitute chu kan chil nek ang. 
Psalms44:6 Ka thal ngul hi ka ring dawn si lo a, Ka khandaih hian mi chhandam hek lo ang." 
Psalms44:7 Min dotute lakah chuan nangin min chhandam ta zawk a, Min hawtute chu i timualpho ta bawk a," 
Psalms44:8 Nilengin Pathian kan chhuang a, I hming chu kumkhuain kan fak bawk ang. (Selah)" 
Psalms44:9 Tunah erawh chuan nangin min thlauhthla a, min tizak a; Kan sipaiho hnenah lah i chhuak ve ta ngai lo a." 
Psalms44:10 Dotute lakah chuan mi tlanchhittir thin a: Min hawtute chuan sum chu an duh duh an la thin. 
Psalms44:11 Beram talh tur angin min dah a, Hnam tin zingah min tidarh bawk a." 
Psalms44:12 I mite hi engmah loah i hralh a, An man chu i hausakpui chuang si lo." 
Psalms44:13 Nangin kan vela mite sawichhiatin min awmtir a, Kan dep vela mite hmusit leh nuihsanin min awmtir bawk a." 
Psalms44:14 Nangin hnam tin zingah a chhe lam tehkhinnaah min awmtir a, Mi tin, zinga mite lu thinsanin min awmtir bawk a." 
Psalms44:15 Ka zahna hi nilengin ka hmaah a awm thin a, Ka mualphona hian mi khuh zo ta," 
Psalms44:16 Sawihnawmtu leh sawichhetu aw avang leh, Hmelma leh phubalatu avangin" 
Psalms44:17 Chung zawng zawng chu kan chungah a thleng a; nimahsela kan theihnghilh ngai lo chia, I thuthlungah hian aderin kan ti ngei hek lo." 
Psalms44:18 Kan thinung hi a hawi kir lo a, Kan ke pente hian i kawng chu a pensan ngai hek lo;" 
Psalms44:19 Nangin sihalte awmnaah min sawisak nek a, Thihna daihlima min khuna tur hian." 
Psalms44:20 Kan Pathian hming kan theihnghilh emaw, Ram dang Pathian lama kan kutte kan phar emaw chuan," 
Psalms44:21 Pathianin chu chu a zawng chhuak lo ang em ni? Thinlunga thurukte hi a hre reng si a. 
Psalms44:22 A ni, nangmah avangin nilengin thahin ka awm thin; Beram talh turte anga ngaih kan ni." 
Psalms44:23 Aw LALPA, harh ta che, engah nge i muthilh ni? Meng la, kumkhua chuan min thlauhthla suh ang che." 
Psalms44:24 Eng vangin nge i hmai i thup a, Kan hreawmzia leh hnechhiah kan tuarzia hi i theihnghilh thin ni?" 
Psalms44:25 Kan nuna hi vaivut siin a kun a; Kan pum lah leiah abet tlat si a.Min tanpui turin tho la, I ngilneihna avangin min tlan ang che." 
Psalms44:26 Min tanpui turin tho la, I ngilneihna avangin min tlan ang che." 
Psalms45:1 Ka thinlung hi thil thain a liam zawih zawih a; Lalber chungchang thu a ka thil phuah chu ka sawi dawn e: Ka lei hi lehkha ziak thiam tak kawlawm a ni. 
Psalms45:2 Mihring fate ai hian i hmel a tha zawk a; Khawngaihna hi i hmuiah leih a ni: Chuvangin Pathianin kumkhua atan mal a sawm che a ni. 
Psalms45:3 Aw, mi chak, i khandaih i kawngah vawng rawh, I ropuina leh i mawina nen." 
Psalms45:4 Thutak leh thuhnuairawlhna leh felna avangin I mawina inbelin hmuingil takin skawr chunga chuangin kal zel ang che. Tichuan i kut ding lamin thil rapthlak takte a zirtir dawn che nia. 
Psalms45:5 I thal chu a zum a: Lalber dotute thinlungah chuan a bur reng a: Mi tin, chu i hnuaiah an tlu thin a." 
Psalms45:6 Aw Pathian, i lalthuphah chu chatuanin a awm tur a ni: Thlei bik neih lohna laltiang chu i ram laltiang chu a ni." 
Psalms45:7 Felna chu i ngaina a, suahsualna chu i huat kha; Chuvangin, Pathian, i Pathian chuan, i thiante aia nasain Hlimna hriak a thih tak che hi." 
Psalms45:8 I silhfen zawng zawng chu murra rim te, aloe rim e, thakthing rimte a nam rum rum a; Sainghova siam lal intea tingtang chi hrang hrang ir lo chhuakte chuan a tihlim che anih hi." 
Psalms45:9 I hmeichhe thate zingah chuan lalho fanute an tel ve a; I ding lamah chuan Ophir rangkachaka incheiin lalnu chu a ding a. 
Psalms45:10 Aw, ka fanu, ngaithla la, ngaithuah la, beng chhi rawh; I mite leh i pa ina mite chu theihnghilh rawh;" 
Psalms45:11 Chutichuan lalberin i hmel tha tak hi a duh dawn nia: Ani chu i Lalpa a ni si a; tichuan amah chu chibai buk thin ang che. 
Psalms45:12 Tura fanu chu thilpek kengin chutah chuan a awm ang a; Mi zinga hausate ngei chuan i khawngaihna an ngen ang. 
Psalms45:13 Lal in chhunga lal fanu chu a ropui vel vek a: A silhfen chu rangkachaka zeh mawi a ni. 
Psalms45:14 Puan thui mawi sinin lalber hnenah an hruai ang a: Amah zuitu, a thian nulahote chu, I hnenah an hruai ang." 
Psalms45:15 Lawm tak leh hlim takin an hruai ang a: Lalber inah chuan an lut ang. 
Psalms45:16 I pate aiah i fate an awm ang a, Anni chu lei chung zawng zawngah hian mi lianah i siam ang.I hming hi chhuan zawng anwgah hian hriat reng turin ka siam ang: Chuvangin mi tinin kumkhaw tlaitluanin lawm thu an hrilh ang che." 
Psalms45:17 I hming hi chhuan zawng anwgah hian hriat reng turin ka siam ang: Chuvangin mi tinin kumkhaw tlaitluanin lawm thu an hrilh ang che. 
Psalms46:1 Pathian chu kan inhumhimhna leh kan chakna, Mangan laia tanpui vartu hnai reng a ni." 
Psalms46:2 Chuvangin leilung hi lo danglamin, Tlangte hi tuifinriat chhung daihah insamw mah se la kan hlau lo ang;" 
Psalms46:3 A tuite chu ri hum humin phul bulh bulh mah se la, A fawn nasat avangin tlangte hi nghing dur dur mah se la, kan hlau chuang hek lo ang. (Selah)" 
Psalms46:4 Lui pakhat a awm a, chu mi pengte chuan Pathian khawpui chu a tilawm thin. Chungnungbera awmna hmun thianghlim chu." 
Psalms46:5 Pathian chu a lai takah a awm a; a nghing lo ang a: Pathianin khawfing chah hunah chuan a tanpui ang. 
Psalms46:6 Hnam tin an ri hum hum a, ramte chu a nghing a: A ni chuan a aw a chhuah a, leilung hi a lo tui zo ta a," 
Psalms46:7 Sipaihote LALPA chu kan hnenah a awm a; Jakoba Pathian chu kan kulhbingsang a ni. (Selah) 
Psalms46:8 Hawh u, LALPA thiltihte hi en rawh u, Leilunga thil a tihchhiatziate hi." 
Psalms46:9 Ani chuan indonate chu kawlkil thlengin a tireh thin a; Thal ngul chu a titliak a, fei chu a sat bung thin a; Tawlailirte chu meiah a rawh ral thin." 
Psalms46:10 Ngawi u la, Pathian ka ni tih hi hre rawh u: hnam tin zingah chawimawiin ka awm ang a, leiah hian chawimawiin ka awm ang.Sipaihote LALPA chu kan hnenah a awm a; Jakoba Pathian chu kan kulhbingsang a ni. (Selah)" 
Psalms46:11 Sipaihote LALPA chu kan hnenah a awm a; Jakoba Pathian chu kan kulhbingsang a ni. (Selah) 
Psalms47:1 Aw, mi tinrengte u, in kut beng u la; Hlimna awin Pathian hnenah au rawh u." 
Psalms47:2 LALPA Chungnungbera chu a hlauhawm si a; Lei chung zawng zawnga Lal ropui ak a ni. 
Psalms47:3 Ani chuan mi tin, chu kan hnuaiah a tudawl ang a, Hnam tin chu kan ke hnuaiah a tudawl bawk ang." 
Psalms47:4 Ani chuan kan roluah tur chu min thlansak ang, A hmangaih Jakoba chhuan ber ram chu. (Selah)" 
Psalms47:5 Pathian chu au thawm nen a chho a, LALPA chu tawtawrawt ri nen a chho ta e." 
Psalms47:6 Pathian fakin zai u la, fakin zai rawh u.: Kan lalber fakin zai u la, fakin zai rawh u." 
Psalms47:7 Pathian chu khawvel zawng zawng Lal a ni si a: Hre thiama fakin zai rawh u. 
Psalms47:8 Pathian chu hnam tin chungah lalah a thu a: Pathian chu a lalthutphah thianghlimah chuan a thu a.Abrahama Pathian mite ni turin Mi ti zinga mi liante chu an awm khawm a: Leilung phawte chu Pathian ta ani si a; Ani chu nasa taka chawimawiin a awm. 
Psalms47:9 Abrahama Pathian mite ni turin Mi ti zinga mi liante chu an awm khawm a: Leilung phawte chu Pathian ta ani si a; Ani chu nasa taka chawimawiin a awm. 
Psalms48:1 LALPA chu a ropui a, nasa taka fak tur a ni, Kan Pathian khawpuiah, a lang thianghlimah chuan." 
Psalms48:2 A sanziaa mawi tak, khawvel zawng zawng hlimna chu, Zion tlang chu a ni, hmar lampanga, Lal ropui tak khawpi chu." 
Psalms48:3 A lal inahte chuan Pathianin kulhbing sang a nih a inhriattir a. 
Psalms48:4 Ngai teh, lalte chu an inpun khawm a, An lo kal a." 
Psalms48:5 An hmu a, tichuan mak an ti a; An mangang a, an kal bo ta thuai a." 
Psalms48:6 Chutah chuan khurhnain a man a, Hmeichhe nau vei natna angin a man bawk a." 
Psalms48:7 Khawchhak thliin Tarsis lawng liante chu i tichhe thin a. 
Psalms48:8 Sipaihote LALPA khawpuiah, kan Pathian khawpuiah chuan, Benga kan hriat ang ngeiin kan hmu ta: Pathianin chu khawpui chu kumkhua atan a tinghet ang. (Selah)" 
Psalms48:9 Aw Pathian, i biak in chhungrilah chuan I ngilneihzia hi kan ngaihtuah tawh." 
Psalms48:10 Aw Pathian, i hming ang ngeiin I fakna chu kawlkil thlengin a awm a: I kut dinglam chu felnain a khat a ni." 
Psalms48:11 I rorelnate avangin Zion tlang chu lawm takin awm se la, Juda fanute chu hlim takin awm rawh se." 
Psalms48:12 Zion chu velin, kal hual u la: A ralven in sangte pawh chhiar rawh u." 
Psalms48:13 A kulhte chu chhinchhiah ngun u la. A kal inte chu ngaihtuah rawh u; Thangthar lo awm lehte hnena in hrilh theihna'n.He Pathian hi kumkhaw tlaitluana kan Pathian a ni dawn si a: Thih thleng pawha min hruaitu a ni ang. 
Psalms48:14 He Pathian hi kumkhaw tlaitluana kan Pathian a ni dawn si a: Thih thleng pawha min hruaitu a ni ang. 
Psalms49:1 Mi tinrengte u, hei hi ngaithla u la; Khawvela awm zawng zawngte u, beng lo chhi rawh u:" 
Psalms49:2 Mi te leh mi lian, Mi hausa leh mi rethei pawhin." 
Psalms49:3 Ka ka hian finna thu a sawi ang a; Ka thinlung ngaihtuah chu hriat thiamna thu a ni ang. 
Psalms49:4 Tehkhin thu-ah ka beng ka chhi ang a: Ka thu ril sawi chu tingtangin ka hrilhfiah ang. 
Psalms49:5 Ni tha loahte, ka ke artui bula khawlohna khawlohna chuan mi hual vel pawhin, Engah nge ka hlauh vang?" 
Psalms49:6 Mahni sum ringa, Mahni hausakna nasa tak chhuangtute chuan;" 
Psalms49:7 Tuma'n an unau pawh an tlan thei tawp lo ang a, Pathian hnenah tlanna an peksak thei hek lo ang:" 
Psalms49:8 (An nun tlanna tur chuan thil nasa tak sen tur a ni a, Kumkhua pawha atina tin, loh mai tur a ni:)" 
Psalms49:9 A dam reng fo a, Tawihna a hmuh lohna tur chuan." 
Psalms49:10 Mi finge pawh an thi a, Mi a leh mi mawlte pawh an boral ve ve a, An sum mi dangte an hnutchhiah thinte chu a hre si a." 
Psalms49:11 An rilru ngaihtuah dan chu, An inte chu kumkhuaa awm tur ang leh, An awmnate chu chhuan zawng zawng thlenga awm tur angin a ni; An ramte chu anmahni hming vek an puttir thin." 
Psalms49:12 Nimahsela mihring hi chawimawiin an awm reng lo va: Sa boral thinte ang mai hi an ni e. 
Psalms49:13 Chung an awm dan chu an atna a ni: Nimahsela, an hnu-ah chuan miten an thu sawite chu tha an ti thin." 
Psalms49:14 Talh tur beram Seola thlun khawm ang an ni, (Selah) Thihna chu an vengtu a ni ang a: Khua a varin mi felten an chungah ro an rel ang a; An taksa a ral ang a, Seol chu an chenna in tur a ni." 
Psalms49:15 Ka nunna erawh chu Pathianin Seol kut ata a tlan chuak ang; Ani chuan mi lawm dawn si a. (Selah) 
Psalms49:16 Mi tihhausaka a lo awm a, A chhungkaw ropuina chu a lo nasat tulh tulh pawhin, hlau suh ang che;" 
Psalms49:17 A thih hunah chuan engmah a chhawm dawn lo a; A ropuina chuan a zui thla dawn si lo. 
Psalms49:18 A dam laiin intiengthawl mah se la, (A hlawhtlin avangin mi'n fak thin mah se,)" 
Psalms49:19 A thlahtute chhuan hnenah a kal ang; Engtikah mah eng hmu rawh lo turte hnenah chuan.Mihring, chawimawia awma, hrait thiamna nei si lo chu, Sa boral thinte ang mai hi an ni." 
Psalms49:20 Mihring, chawimawia awma, hrait thiamna nei si lo chu, Sa boral thinte ang mai hi an ni." 
Psalms50:1 Pathian, Pathian ngei, LALPA chuan thu a sawi a, Leilung hi ni chhuahna atanga a tlakna thlengin a ko ta." 
Psalms50:2 Mawi famkimna, Zion atang chuan, Pathian chu a eng chhuak ta a." 
Psalms50:3 Kan Pathian chu a lo kal ang a, a ngawi reng lo ang: A hma lamah chuan mei a kang hluah hluah ang a, A velah chuan thlipui nasa tak a thleh bawk ang." 
Psalms50:4 A mite ro a rel theihna turin Chung lam vante leh lei hi a ko ang," 
Psalms50:5 Ka mi thianghlimte ka hnenah rawn hruai khawm rawh u, Sa talha kan hnena thu thlungtue chu,"" tiin." 
Psalms50:6 Tichuan, vante khian a felna chu a tlangaupui ang, Amah Pathian ngei chu roreltu a ni si a. (Selah)" 
Psalms50:7 Aw ka mite u, ngaithla rawh u, thu ka sawi dawn e; Aw Israel, ngaithla rawh, ka hriat fiahtir dawn a che: Kei hi Pathian, i Pathian ngei chu ka nih hi." 
Psalms50:8 I inthawinate avangin ka zilhhau lo ang che; I halral thilhlante chu ka hmaah a awm chawt si a. 
Psalms50:9 I in ata chu bawngpa reng reng ka la chhuak lo ang a, I ran huang atate kelpate pawh ka la chhuak hek lo ang." 
Psalms50:10 Ramhnuaia sa tinrenge hi ka ta a ni si a, Tlang sangkhat lai chunga ran awmte pawh chu." 
Psalms50:11 Tlanga sava zawng zawng ka hre vek a: Ram sate pawh hi ka ta a ni. 
Psalms50:12 Riltam mah i la ka hrilh lo ang che: Leilung leh a chhunga thil awm zawng zawng hi kqa ta a ni si a. 
Psalms50:13 bawngpa sa ka eiin Kel thisen ka in dawn em ni? 
Psalms50:14 Pathian hnenah lawm thu sawi inthawina chu hlan zawk la; I thutiam pawh Chungnungera lakah hlen rawh: 
Psalms50:15 Tin, mangan niah chuan mi ko la; Ka chhanhim ang che, tichuan nangin mi chawimawi dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Psalms50:16 Mi suaksual hnenah erawh chuan, Pathianin, ""Ka thuruat hi eng tiziaa hriattira, ka thuthlung hi eng tiziaa i kaa lam ngun nge i nih?" 
Psalms50:17 Thunun i hua a, Ka thute hi hnung lamah i paih zel si a." 
Psalms50:18 Rukru i hmuhin rem i tihpui a, Uirepate lah i kawppui bawk thin." 
Psalms50:19 I ka hi sual i pe a, I lei hian humna a siam bawk thin." 
Psalms50:20 Thu chungin i unau i sawisel a; Mahni nute fapa ngei chu i hek thin. 
Psalms50:21 Chung thil chu i ti a, nimahsela ka ngawi reng a; Chutichuan nangmah ang diakah mi ruat thin: Nimahsela ka zilhhau ang chia, i mithmuhah indawt zelin ka tilang ang." 
Psalms50:22 Nangni Pathian theihngilhtute u, hei hi ngaihtuah rawh u khai! Chutilochuan ka pawt sawm dah ang che u, nangmahni chhanhimtu reng an awm dawn si lo.Tu pawh lawm thu sawi inthawina hlan apiang chuan mi chawimawi thin a; Tin, a awm dan vawng uptu hnenah chuan Pathian chhandamna ka entir ang,"" a ti a." 
Psalms50:23 Tu pawh lawm thu sawi inthawina hlan apiang chuan mi chawimawi thin a; Tin, a awm dan vawng uptu hnenah chuan Pathian chhandamna ka entir ang,"" a ti a." 
Psalms51:1 Aw Pathian i ngilneih em avangin mi khawngaih la: I lainatna nasat avangin ka bawhchhiatnate hi thai bo ang che. 
Psalms51:2 Ka khawlohnate hi mi silfaisak var la, Ka sual hi mi thlenfaisang ang che." 
Psalms51:3 Ka bawhchhiatnate hi ka hre ta si a: Ka sual hi ka hmaah a awm fo thin a ni. 
Psalms51:4 I chungah, i chung chauhvah thil ka tisual a, I mithmuha thil sual ka lo ti ta a: Thu i sawiin thiam i chan theih a, Ro i relin sawiselbo i nih theihna'n." 
Psalms51:5 Ngai teh, khawlohnaa dinin ka awm a; Ka nun sualin mi pai a," 
Psalms51:6 Ngai teh, chhungril lamahte hian takina i duh thin a: Tichuan lang lo lamah hian finna mi hriattir ang." 
Psalms51:7 Husop-in mi tifai la, tichuan ka fai ang: Mi silfai la, tichuan vur aiin ka var ang." 
Psalms51:8 Hlimna leh lawmna chu bengin mi hriattir ang che; I ruh tihtliahte hi a hlim theihna'n. 
Psalms51:9 Ka sualnate lakah hian i hmai thup la, Ka khawlohna zawng zawng thai bo ang che." 
Psalms51:10 Aw Pathian, keimahah hian thinlung thianghlim tak siam la; Ka kawchhungah hian thlarau dik tak siam thar leh ang che." 
Psalms51:11 I hnen ata hi mi paih bo suh la; I thlarau thianghlim hi mi laksak suh ang che. 
Psalms51:12 I mi chhandam hlimna chu mi pe leh la: Thlarau tihnuamin mi chelh reng ang che. 
Psalms51:13 Chutichuan bawhchhetute chu i kawng chanchinte ka zirtir ang a; Tichuan, mi sualte chu i lamah an hawi leh ang." 
Psalms51:14 Aw Pathian, nang mi chhandamtu Pathian, thisen chhuahnate lakah mi chhanhim ang che.Tichuan ka lei hian i felna thu hi hlim takin hlaah a sa ang." 
Psalms51:15 Aw LALPA, nangin ka hmui hi hawng ang che; Tichuan ka ka hian i fakna chu a hriattir dawn nia." 
Psalms51:16 Inthawina chungah lawmna i nei si lo a; chuti ni suh se la chuan ka pe ang: halral thilhlan chungah lungawina reng i nei lo e. 
Psalms51:17 Pathian duhzawng inthawinate chu thlarau lungchhia hi a ni. Aw Pathian, thinlung lungchhia leh inchhir ngawih ngawih hi i hmusit lo ang." 
Psalms51:18 I duhzawng takin Zion chungah thil tha ti la; Jerusalem kulh chu rem ang che.Chutichuan felna inthawinate chungah lawmna i nei tawh ang a, halral thilhlan leh halral pumhlan chungah chuan: Chutichuan i maicham chungah chuan bawngpate an hlan tawh ang." 
Psalms51:19 Chutichuan felna inthawinate chungah lawmna i nei tawh ang a, halral thilhlan leh halral pumhlan chungah chuan: Chutichuan i maicham chungah chuan bawngpate an hlan tawh ang." 
Psalms52:1 Aw, mi chak, engati nge thil tihsual i chhuan ni? Pathian ngilneihna chu a awm fo thin ni." 
Psalms52:2 I leiin thil sual tak tih a suangtuah thin; Bakmeh chem hriam tak bumhmang ang hian. 
Psalms52:3 Tha aiin sual i ngaina zawk a; Felna thusawi aiin dawt thu sawi i ngaina zawk bawk a. (Selah) 
Psalms52:4 Aw, nang lei mi bumhmang, Thu mi lem zo thei zawng zawng chu i ngaina thin." 
Psalms52:5 Pathianin kumkhua atan a tiche ve ang che, A man ang chia, i awmna atangin a hnuk chhuak ang chia, Mi nung ram ata hi a pawt chhuak daih ang che. (Selah) Mi felte pawhin an hmuin an hlau vang a, An nuihsan ang," 
Psalms52:6 En teh u, he mi hi a ni, Pathian a kulhbinga siam duh lo a, A hausakna nasa tak ring zawka, A sualnaa intichak vei chu ni,"" tiin." 
Psalms52:7 Kei erawh zawng Pathian ina oliv thing chawr duah hluah ang ka ni: Pathian ngilneihna chu kumkhaw tlaitluanin ka ring ang.Chu chu i tih avangin, kumkhuain lawm thu ka hrilh fo ang che: I mi thianghlimte mithmuhah chuan i hming chu ka nghak reng ang, a tha si a." 
Psalms52:8 Chu chu i tih avangin, kumkhuain lawm thu ka hrilh fo ang che: I mi thianghlimte mithmuhah chuan i hming chu ka nghak reng ang, a tha si a." 
Psalms53:1 Mi a chuan a rilruin, ""Pathian reng a awm lo,"" a ti thin a. An chhe zo a, thil sual tenawm tak an ti a; Tumah thil tha ti reng an awm lo." 
Psalms53:2 Hre thiama Pathian zawng reng reng an awm emaw tih hre turin Pathianin van atnagin mihring fate hi a zuk en a. 
Psalms53:3 An kir leh ta theuh a; bawlhhlawh takin an lo awm ta vek a; Tumah thil tha ti reng an awm lo, pakhat mah an awm lo." 
Psalms53:4 Thil tisualtute chuan hriat reng reng an nei lo em ni? Chhang an ei angin ka mite an ei zo vek thin a, Pathian lah an lam ngai hek lo." 
Psalms53:5 Hlauhna reng reng awm lohnaah chuan hlau em emin an awm a: Pathianin bei tuma eptu che ruhte chu a tidarh ta si a; Pathianin anni chu aa paihthlak avangin i timualpho ta a.Israel-ho chhandamna chu Zion atangin lo chhuak teh se la aw! Pathian chuan amite sala an awm chu a hruai kir leh hunah, Chu mi hunah chuan Jakpb-ho an hlim ang a, Israel-ho an lawm ang." 
Psalms53:6 Israel-ho chhandamna chu Zion atangin lo chhuak teh se la aw! Pathian chuan amite sala an awm chu a hruai kir leh hunah, Chu mi hunah chuan Jakpb-ho an hlim ang a, Israel-ho an lawm ang." 
Psalms54:1 Aw Pathian, i hmingin mi chhandam la, I chaknain ro mi rel ang che." 
Psalms54:2 Aw Pathian, ka tawngtaina hi ngaithla la; Ka kaa thu chhuakahte hian beng lo chhi ang che." 
Psalms54:3 Mikhualte chuan mi bei ta si a, Mi nunrawngten ka nunna hi tihbo tumin an zawng bawk a: Pathian chu an hmaah an dah lo. (Selah)" 
Psalms54:4 Ngai teh, Pathian chu mi tanpuitu a ni a: LALPA chu ka nunna chelhtute zinga mi a ni." 
Psalms54:5 Ani chuan sualna chu ka hmelmate chungah a thungrul ang: Nangin anni chu i thutakina avang chuan tiboral ang che. 
Psalms54:6 Mahni duh thua thilhlanin i hnenah ka inthawi ang a; Aw LALPA, i hming ch ka fang ang, a tha si a.Ka manganna zawng zawngah chuan mi chhanchhuak ta si a; Mi dotute chunga ka thu duhthusam thleng chu ka mitin a hmu ta a ni." 
Psalms54:7 Ka manganna zawng zawngah chuan mi chhanchhuak ta si a; Mi dotute chunga ka thu duhthusam thleng chu ka mitin a hmu ta a ni. 
Psalms55:1 Aw Pathian, ka tawngtainaah hian beng lo chhi la; Khawngaih ka dilnaah hian inthup suh ang che." 
Psalms55:2 Mi ngaithla la, mi chhang ang che. Ka mangan thu avangin ka van ruai a, ka rum thin;" 
Psalms55:3 Dotu thawm avangte, Mi suaksual hnehchhiahna avangtein. Anni chuan sualnain mi lum khumin, Thinurin mi tiduhdah si a." 
Psalms55:4 Ka kawchhungah hian ka thinlung a na em em a: Thih rapthlaknate chuan mi delh a. 
Psalms55:5 Tihna leh khurhnain mi bawh a, Hlauhnain mi khuh zo ta." 
Psalms55:6 Tichuan, ""Aw, thuro anga thla neih ka va duh em! Chutichuan ka thawlk daih ang a, thlamuang takin ka awm ang a." 
Psalms55:7 Ngai teh, hla takah ka leng ang a, Thlalerah ka awm ang a. (Selah)" 
Psalms55:8 Thli na tak leh thlipui hi Bikna hmunah ka kalsan thuai tur,"" ka ti a." 
Psalms55:9 Aw Lalpa, an lei chu tichhiain tithler ang che: Khawpuiah chuan inpawngnekna leh innghirnghona ka hmu si a." 
Psalms55:10 Achhun azanin khawpui chu kulh tlangah an vel an vel a: A chhungah chuan sualna leh hrehawmna a awm bawk a. 
Psalms55:11 Suahsualna a chhungah a awm a: Bumna leh tihderna chuan a kawtlai chu a chhuahsan ngai lo. 
Psalms55:12 Mi sawichhetu chu hmelma ani si lo a; Ni se la chu, ka tuar thei zawk tur: Ka chunga intiliana chu mi hawtu a ni hek lo; Ni se la chu ka bihruksan tur:" 
Psalms55:13 Nimahsela nang, ka mi anpui, Ka thian, ka thian kawm ngeih i ni miau si a." 
Psalms55:14 Kam thlum taka kan inbiakrawn thin a, Mipui zinga Pathian biak ina kan len thin kha." 
Psalms55:15 Thihna an chungah lo thleng thut se la, Khuarkhurumah chuan a nung chungin chhuk rawh se: Suahsualnate chu an awmnaah leh an kawchhungahte a awm si a." 
Psalms55:16 Kei zawngin Pathian ka ko ang a; Tichuan LALPA'n mi chhandam ang. 
Psalms55:17 Tlaiah te, zingah te, chhunah te ka mangan thu ka sawin ka rum ang a: Tichuan, anin ka aw a ngaithla ang." 
Psalms55:18 Ka chunga mi beina lakah chuan ka nunna hi thlamuang takin a chhanhim ta a: Mi beitute chu an tam si a. 
Psalms55:19 Pathian, hmasang chena awm renga chuan, A ngaithla ang a, anmahni a chhang ang, (Selah) Danglamna nei ngai lo, Pathian tih ngai si lote chu." 
Psalms55:20 Amah nena inremte chungah chuan a kut a lek a: A thuthlung chu a tibawrhbang ta a. 
Psalms55:21 A ka chu hnutetui khal angin a tlawr a, A thinlung erawh chu indona a ni si a: A thute ch hriak aiin a nal a, Nimahsela khandaih pawhi sate a ni si a." 
Psalms55:22 I rit phurh chu LALPA chungah nghat la, tichuan anin a tichak ang che; Mi fel chu engtikah mah tiihnghin a phal lo ang.Nimahsela, aw Pathian, nangin anni chu boralna khuarkhurumah chuan i chhuktir ang: Thisen chhuah hmang mite chu an damchhung chanve pawh an dam zo lo ang. Kei erawh chuan nang ka ring ang che." 
Psalms55:23 Nimahsela, aw Pathian, nangin anni chu boralna khuarkhurumah chuan i chhuktir ang: Thisen chhuah hmang mite chu an damchhung chanve pawh an dam zo lo ang. Kei erawh chuan nang ka ring ang che." 
Psalms56:1 Aw Pathian, mi khawngaih ang che; mihringin mi lem zawh an tum si a: Nilengin mi beiin mi hnehchhiah thin." 
Psalms56:2 Ka hmelmaten nilengin mi lem zawh an tum a: Chapo taka mi beiotute hi an tam si a: 
Psalms56:3 Ka hlauh chang apiangin, Nangmah ka ring ang che." 
Psalms56:4 Pathian ka ring a, a thu ka fak ang a: Pathian ka ring a, ka hlau lo ang: Tisa chuan eng nge mi tih theih ang?" 
Psalms56:5 Nilengin ka thute an la kawi thin a; An ngaihtuahna zawng zawng chu ka that lohna tur lam hlir a ni. 
Psalms56:6 An inkhawm a, an biru a, Ka hniakte an chhinchhiah thin a, Ka nunna tihbo tuma an nghak thin ang hian." 
Psalms56:7 An sual hremna an pumpelh dawn em ni? Aw Pathian, thinurin mi tin, chu ti tlawm ang che." 
Psalms56:8 Nangin ka vahvaihnate hi i chhinchhiah thin a: Ka mittuite hi i savun pengah chuan thun ang che; I lehkhabuah a chuang hlawm lo'm ni? 
Psalms56:9 Ka koh hun che ngei chuan mi dotute chu an tlanchhia ang: Hei hi ka hria Pathianin mi tan hi. 
Psalms56:10 Pathianah chuan a thu ka fak ang a: LALPA-ah chuan a thu ka fak ang. 
Psalms56:11 Pathian ka ring,a ka hlau lo ang; Mihringin eng nge mi tiht heih ang?" 
Psalms56:12 Aw Pathian, i hneha thutiamte ka nei a: Lawm thu sawi Inthawinatein ka rul ang che.Ka nunna hi thihna lakah i chhanhim si a: Ka kete hi tlu lo turin i chhanhim a ni lo'm ni? Mi nung engah hian Pathian hmaa ka len theihna'n." 
Psalms56:13 Ka nunna hi thihna lakah i chhanhim si a: Ka kete hi tlu lo turin i chhanhim a ni lo'm ni? Mi nung engah hian Pathian hmaa ka len theihna'n. 
Psalms57:1 Aw Pathian, mi khawngaih rawh, mi khawngaih rawh; Ka nunna hi nangmahah chuan a tlu lut si a: A ni, i thla hnuai chu ka chuh ang, Vanduainate hi a kian hma loh chuan." 
Psalms57:2 Pathian Chungnungbera chu ka au vang; Pathian engkim mi tihsaktu chu. 
Psalms57:3 Mi lem zawh tumtu chuan mi sawichhiat hunah Ani chuan van atangin a rawn tir ang a, mi chhandam ang; (Selah) Pathianin a ngilneihna leh a thutak chu arawn tir chhuak ang." 
Psalms57:4 Ka nunna hi sakeibaknei zingah a awm a; Mihring kang zingah ka awm a, An hate chu fei leh thal ang ani a, An lei lah khandaih rhiam tak ang." 
Psalms57:5 Aw Pathian, nang hchu van khum daih khian chawimawiin lo awm ang che; I ropuina chu leilung zawng zawng chungah hian lo awm rawh se." 
Psalms57:6 Ka ke awhna'n len an phah a; Ka nunna hi a kun ngawih ngawih a: Ka hmaah khuarkhurum an lai a; Anmahni ngei a lai takah an tla ta a.(Selah) 
Psalms57:7 Ka thinlung hi a nghet a ni, aw Pathian, ka thinlung hi a nghet a ni: Hla ka sa ang, a ni, fakna hla ka sa ang." 
Psalms57:8 Ka ropuina, harh rawh; perhkhuang leh tingtangte u, harh rawh u: Kei chu zing takah ka harh ang." 
Psalms57:9 Aw LALPA, mi tin, zingahte lawm thu ka hrilh ang che: Hnam tin zingah nangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms57:10 I ngilneihna hchu van tawng khawpin a nasa si a, I thutak chu van dum tawng khawpin a nasa bawk a.Aw Pathian, nang chu van khum daih khian chawimawiin lo awm ang che: I ropuina chu leilung zawng zawng chungah hian lo awm rawh se." 
Psalms57:11 Aw Pathian, nang chu van khum daih khian chawimawiin lo awm ang che: I ropuina chu leilung zawng zawng chungah hian lo awm rawh se." 
Psalms58:1 Felna thu chu ngawi rengin maw i sawi tak tak? Aw mihring fate u, dik takin maw ro in rel?" 
Psalms58:2 A ni, in thinlungah chuan thil sual tak in ti thin a; Leia in kuta thi rawng taka tih chu in buk thin a." 
Psalms58:3 Mi suaksualte chu an nu pum chhung atang renga Pathian laka thenin an awm a: An pian veleh dawt thu sawiin an vak bo thin. 
Psalms58:4 An tur chu rul tur ang a ni a: Rulrial bengngawng, a beng hup thin ang chu an ni;" 
Psalms58:5 Chu chuan rul dawi at thiamte aw chu a ngaithla thin lo, Eng anga thiam pawhin dawi mah se la." 
Psalms58:6 Aw Pathian, an kaah chuan an hate chu tibal la: Aw LALPA, Sakeibaknei vanglaite ha lian pui puite chu kher chhuak chhuak ang che." 
Psalms58:7 Anni chu tui chak taka luang angin tuiral se la: A thaltea a tinin, sah chhum angin awm zel rawh se." 
Psalms58:8 Kawngkawrawi, tuia ral mai thin ang hi ni se la: A hun loa hmeichhe nau hrin, ni hmel reng reng hmu lo ang hi ni rawh se." 
Psalms58:9 In belte chuan hling thing lum a hriat hma pawhin Ani chuan thawngaleivirin a la bo ang, A hring leh a kang lai pawh." 
Psalms58:10 Mi fel chuan phuba lakna chu a hmuhin a lawm ang a: Mi suaksual thisenah chuan a ke chu a sil ang.Chutichuan miten, ""Mi fel tan chuan lawmman a lo awm tak tak a: Leiah hian roreltu Pathian a lo awm tak tak a nih hi,"" an ti ang." 
Psalms58:11 Chutichuan miten, ""Mi fel tan chuan lawmman a lo awm tak tak a: Leiah hian roreltu Pathian a lo awm tak tak a nih hi,"" an ti ang." 
Psalms59:1 Aw ka Pathian, mi dotute lakah mi chhanhim la: Mi beitute lak ata hmun sangah mi hlang ang che." 
Psalms59:2 Thil tisualtute lakah mi chhanhim la, Thisen chhuah hmangte lakah mi chhandam ang che." 
Psalms59:3 Aw LALPA, ka bawhchhiatna avang ni loin, ka sual avang ni hek loin, Ngai teh, ka nuna hi an chang reng si a, Mi chakte chu mi bei turin an pung khawm a ni." 
Psalms59:4 Ka sual loh pawhin an tlan a, an inbuatsaih a: Mi tanpui turin intiharh la, en rawh." 
Psalms59:5 Aw LALPA, sipaihote Pathian, Israelho Pathian, Nangmah ngei chu hnam tinreng talwh turin tho lo: Mi vervek sual takte reng reng chu khawngaih suh ang che. (Selah)" 
Psalms59:6 Tlai lamah an lo kal leh a, ui angin an chiau chul a, Khawpui chu an vel an vel a." 
Psalms59:7 Ngai teh, an kain an irhc hhuak a; An hmuiah chuan khandaihte a awm a: ""Tunge hria awm ni?"" an ti mai a." 
Psalms59:8 Niamhsela aw LALPA, nangin anni chu i nuihsan zawk ang a; Hnam tinreng chu i nuihzabur ang." 
Psalms59:9 Aw mi tichaktu, ka nghak reng ang che, Pathian chu ka kulhbingsang ani si a." 
Psalms59:10 Ka chunga ngilnei Pathian chuan mi hmuak ang a: Pathianin ka hmelmate chngah ka thu duhsam chu mi hmuhtir ang. 
Psalms59:11 Anni chu that suh ang che, chutilochuan ka miten an theihnghilh dah ang e: Aw LALPA, kan phaw ber, I thiltihtheihnain tidarh la, titlawm ang che." 
Psalms59:12 An ka sualna avang leh an hmuioa thu chhuak avangin An chapona ngeiah chuan rawk rawh se, An thu sawi thin anchhe lawhna leh dawt thu avang pawhin." 
Psalms59:13 Anniho chu thinrimin tiboral la, an awm tawh lohna turin tiboral la: Pathianin Jakob-ho zingah ro a rel tih hre hlawm rawh se, Kawlkil thlengin. (Selah)" 
Psalms59:14 Tin, tlai lamah lo kal leh se la, uii angin chiau chul se la, Khawpui chu vel vel rawh se." 
Psalms59:15 Anni chu ei tur zawngin an vak an vak ang a, An tlai loh chuan an awm zankhua ang."

Psalms69:3 Ka auna lamah ka chau a; ka dang a ro zo va: Ka Pathian ka nghahnaah hian ka mit a vai zo ta a. 
Psalms69:4 Enga khawlawi loa mi hawtute chu ka samzai aiin an tam a: Dik lo taka mi dova mi tihboral tumte chu mi chak tak an ni: Ka lak si loh pawh mi rulhtir a. 
Psalms69:5 Aw Pathian, nang chuan ka atzia hi i hria a; Ka thiam lohnate pawh hi i lakah thup ani lo."
