Psalms69:7 Nangmah avanga sawi chiat ka tuar avangin, Zahnain ka hmai a khuh zo ta." 
Psalms69:8 Ka unaute lakah mikhual ka lo ni ta a, Ka nu fanaute lakah hriat ngai loh mi ka lo ni ta." 
Psalms69:9 I ina ka thahnemngaihnain mi ei zo a; Nangmah sawichhetute sawi chhiatnate chu ka chungah atla ta. 
Psalms69:10 Ka tah a, chaw nghei chunga ka nunna ka thunun leh, Chu chu mi sawichhiatna a lo ni a." 
Psalms69:11 Ka silhfena saiip ka hman leh, An tan chhe lama tehkhinna ka lo ni zel a." 
Psalms69:12 Kulh kawngkaa thute chuan ka chungchang thu an sawi a; Zu ruih hmangte hla ka nih hi. 
Psalms69:13 Nimahsela, aw LALPA, kei zawngin hun lawmawmah i hnenah a ni, ka tawngtai ni: Aw Pathian, i ngilneihna nasa tak avangin I chhandamna thutakin mi chhang ang che." 
Psalms69:14 Chirhdup ata hi mi chhanhim la, mi piltir lul suhang che4L Mi hawtute lakah leh tui thuk tak ata hi chhanhimin mi awmtir ang che." 
Psalms69:15 Tui lianin mi chim pil suh se la, Tui thuk takin mi lem hek suh se; Khuarkhurum pawhin a ka mi chip hnan suh se." 
Psalms69:16 Aw LALPA, mi chhang ang che; i ngilneihna chu a tha si a: I lainatna nasatzia ang zelin ka lam hi lo hawi ang che." 
Psalms69:17 I chhiahhlawh lakah hian i hmai pawh thup suh ang che; Ka mangang si a; mi chhang thuai ang che. 
Psalms69:18 Ka nuna hi rawn hnaih in, tlan la: Mi dotute avang hian mi chhanhim ang che." 
Psalms69:19 Nangin mi mi sawichhiatna te, ka mualphona te, ka zahnate hi i hria e: Mi dotute chu i hmaah an awm vek a ni." 
Psalms69:20 Mi mi sawi chhiatna hian ka lung a tichhia a; nasa takin ka lungngai bawk a: Tichuan mi khawngaihtu tur ka zawng, nimahsela tumah an awm si lo a; Mi thlamuantu turte ka zawng bawk a, nimahsela tumah ka hmu si lo." 
Psalms69:21 Ka chaw atan englo kha mi pe leh nghal a; Ka tuihal lahin uain thur inah mi pe a. 
Psalms69:22 An hmaa an dawhkan chu thang lo ni se la; Thlamuang taka an awm laiin fal lo ni rawh se. 
Psalms69:23 An mitte chu, an hmuh theih lohna'n, tihthimin awm rawh se; An kawngte chu tikhur fo ang che." 
Psalms69:24 I lungnih loh em emna chu an chungah leihbua la, I thinur thinrimna chuan anni chu man rawh se." 
Psalms69:25 An awmna chu lo ram se la; An puan inahte chuan tumah awm suh se. 
Psalms69:26 I vuaka chu an tiduhdah a, I hliamate lungngaihzia chu an saiw si thin a." 
Psalms69:27 An khawlohna chu khawlohnain belhchhah la: Anni chu i felnaah chuan lut suh se. 
Psalms69:28 Anni chu nunna bu ata thai boin awm se la, Mi felte zingah chuan ziak ni ve suh se." 
Psalms69:29 Nimahsela kei chu rethei tak leh lungngai tak ka ni a: Aw Pathian, i chhandamna chan hmun sangah mi dah rawh se." 
Psalms69:30 Pathian hming chu hlain ka fak ang a, Lawm thu sawiin amah chu ka chawimawi ang." 
Psalms69:31 Chutiang chuan bawngchal emaw ki leh tin, nei bawngpa emaw ai chuan, LALPA a tilawm zawk ang." 
Psalms69:32 Thuhnuairawlhte chuan chu chu an hmu a, an lawm a: Nangni Pathian zawngte u, in thinlung chu nungin awm rawh se." 
Psalms69:33 LALPA'n pachhiate chu ngaithlain, A mi tangte chu a hmusit si lo a." 
Psalms69:34 Lei leh van chuan amah chu fak rawh se, Tuifinriatte leh an chhunga thil che thei tawh phawtte nen." 
Psalms69:35 Pathianin Zion chu chhan chhuakin, Juda khuate ch a din dawn si a; Tichuan chutah chuan an awm ang a, an nei nghal ang.A chhiahhlawhho thlahte pawh chuan an rochung ang a; A hming ngainatute chu a chhungah an awm ang." 
Psalms69:36 A chhiahhlawhho thlahte pawh chuan an rochung ang a; A hming ngainatute chu a chhungah an awm ang. 
Psalms70:1 Aw Pathian mi chhanhim turin hmanhmawh la; Aw LALPA, mi tanpui turin hmanhmawh ang che." 
Psalms70:2 Ka nuna tihbo tuma zawngtute chu, Mualpho tak leh zak takin awm se la; ka chhiatna chunga lawmte chu Tlanchhiattirin tihzahin awm rawh e." 
Psalms70:3 Chei! Chei! Titute chu An mualpho avangin tlanchhiattirin awm rawh se. 
Psalms70:4 A zawngtu che zawng zawng chu nangmahah chuan hlim tak leh lawm takin awm se la; I chhandamna ngainatute chuan Pathian chu chawimawiin awm rawh se,"" ti fo rawh se.Nimahsela kei chu rethei leh pachhe tak ka ni a: Nang chu mi tanpuitu leh mi chhanhimtu i ni a; Aw LALPA, rei rial lul suh ang che." 
Psalms70:5 Nimahsela kei chu rethei leh pachhe tak ka ni a: Nang chu mi tanpuitu leh mi chhanhimtu i ni a; Aw LALPA, rei rial lul suh ang che." 
Psalms71:1 Aw LALPA, nangmahah chuan ka rinna ka ngaht thin a: Engtikah mah mualphoin mi awmtir suh ang che." 
Psalms71:2 I felna avanga mi chhanhimin, mi chhan chhuak la: Ka lamah hian i beng rawn dawhin, mi chhandam ang che." 
Psalms71:3 Ka tan awmna lungpui, ka kal theih fona tur, lo ni ang che: Nangin mi chhandam turin thu i pe a; Ka lungpui leh ka kulhpui i ni si a." 
Psalms71:4 Aw ka Pathian, mi suaksual kut ata mi chhan chhuak ang che, Mi fel lo leh nunchhe tak kut ata chu." 
Psalms71:5 Aw Lalpa PATHIAN, nang chu ka beiseia chu i ni si a: Ka naupan tet ata ka rina chu i ni." 
Psalms71:6 Ka nu pum atang rengin nangma kaihin ka awm thin a: Ka nu ril ata mi la chhuaktu i ni a; Nangmah a ni, ka fak fo dawn che ni." 
Psalms71:7 Mi tam tak ngaihin thilmak ang ka ni a; Nimahsela nang chu ka inhumhimna nghet tak i ni. 
Psalms71:8 Ka ka hi i faknain a khat ang a, Nilengin i chawimawinain a khat bawk ang." 
Psalms71:9 Ka tar hunin mi paihthla suh la; Ka tha thum hunin mi kalsan suh ang che. 
Psalms71:10 Mi dotute chuan ka chungchang thu an sawi si a; Ka nuna changtue an inrawn bawk a," 
Psalms71:11 Pathianin a kalsan ta: Um u la, man rawh u; chhanhimtu tur reng an awm si lo,"" tiin." 
Psalms71:12 Aw Pathian, mi hlat lul suh la: Aw ka Pathian, mi tanpui turin hmanhmawh ang che." 
Psalms71:13 Ka nunna dotue chu mualpho leh boralin awm se la; Ka chhiatna tur zawngtute chu sawichhiatna leh zahnaa khuhin awm rawh se. 
Psalms71:14 Nimahsela kei zawngin ka beisei fo ang a, Ka la fak zual deuh deuh ang che." 
Psalms71:15 Ka ka hian i felna thu a hril ang a, Nilengin i chhandamna thu a hril bawk ang; A tam chin ka hre si lo." 
Psalms71:16 Lalpa PATHIAN thiltih ropui takte nen ka lo kal a: I felna, nangma felna thu chauh ka saiw ang." 
Psalms71:17 Aw Pathian, ka naupan tet ata chu nangin mi zirtir a; Tun thlengin i thilmak tiht chu ka hriattir thin." 
Psalms71:18 A ni, aw Pathian, ka tara ka lu tuah hnu pawhin mi kalsan lul suh ang che; I chakna hi thangthar leht hnenah leh, I thiltihtheihna hi lo la awm tur apiangte hnena ka hriattir hma loh zawng." 
Psalms71:19 Aw Pathian, i felna pawh a sang em em a ni; Aw Pathian, nang thil ropi takte titu, Nangmah ang hi tu nge awm?" 
Psalms71:20 Nang, manganna tam tak leh nasa tak min hmuhtirtu chuan Mi tinung leh ang a, Leu thuk tak ata min hruai chhuak leh ang." 
Psalms71:21 Nangin ka ropuina mi tihpunsak la, Lo hawi lehin mi thlamuan ang che," 
Psalms71:22 Perhkhuangin ka fak bawk ang che, Aw ka Pathian, i thutak ngei chu ka fak ang. Aw nang Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim, Tingtang nen nangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms71:23 Nangmah faka ka zai hunin ka hmui hi a hlim em em ang a; Ka nunna i tlan pawh hi a hlim em em ang.Ka lei pawh hian nilengin i felna thu a sawi ang: Ka chhiatna tur chu an mualphoin an zak ta si a. 
Psalms71:24 Ka lei pawh hian nilengin i felna thu a sawi ang: Ka chhiatna tur chu an mualphoin an zak ta si a. 
Psalms72:1 Aw Pathian, i rorelnate chu lal pe la, I felna chu lal fapa pe ang che." 
Psalms72:2 I mite chu felnain ro a relsak ang a, I mi retheite chu rorelna felin ro a relsak ang." 
Psalms72:3 Tlang lian leh tlang tete hian felnain Mite hnenah thlamuanna an rawn thlen ang. 
Psalms72:4 Ani chuan mi zinga retheite chu ro a relsak ang a, Pachhe fate chu a chhandam ang a, Hnehchiahtu erawh chu a tisawm ang." 
Psalms72:5 Ni khi a awm chhung chuan an hlau vang che, Thla awm chhung zawng pawhin, chhuan awm chhung chuan an hlau vang che," 
Psalms72:6 Ani chu hlobet rawt chunga ruah angin a tla ang a: Lei chawmtu ruahtui ang maiin. 
Psalms72:7 A dam lai chuan mi felte chu an duah hluah hluah ang a, Thlamuanna nasa tak chu a duah hluah hluah bawk ang, thla awm loh hma loh chuan." 
Psalms72:8 Ani chuan tuifinriat atanga tuifinriat dang thleng pawhin thu a nei bawk ang, Luipui atanga kawlkil thleng pawhin." 
Psalms72:9 Thlalera awmte chu a hmaah an kun ang a; Amah dotute pawh chuan vaivut an liak ang. 
Psalms72:10 Tarsis ram leh thliarkara lalten lawmman an rawn keng ang a: Sheba leh Seba ram lalten thilpekte an rawn hlan ang. 
Psalms72:11 A ni, lal zawng zawng chu a hmaah an bawkkhup ang a: Hnam tinrengin a rawn an bawl ang." 
Psalms72:12 Pachhiain a auhin ani chuan a chhanhim ang a, Mi rethei, tanpuitu nei lo pawh chu, a chhanhim ang a." 
Psalms72:13 Mi rethei leh pachhiate chu a khawngaih ang a, Pachhiate nunna chu a chhandam ang." 
Psalms72:14 An nunna chu hnehchhiahna leh nunrawnna lak ata a tlan ang a, An thisen chuani ngaih chuan hlu tak ani dawn si a." 
Psalms72:15 Tin, an nung ang a: Sheba ram rangkachak chu amah pek ani ang a; Miten ani chu an tawngtaisak fo ang a; Nilengin mal an sawmsak ang." 
Psalms72:16 Leiah, tlang chungahte hian, buh tam tak a awm ang a; A vui chu Lebanon angin a nghing suau suau ang a, Khuaa mite chu lei hlobet angin an duah hluah hluah ang." 
Psalms72:17 A hming chu kumkhuain a dai lo ang a: A hming chu ni a awm chhung chuan dai loin a awm zel ang a: Mite ch amahah chan malsawmin an awm ang a; Hnam tinrengin amah chu nihlawh an ti ang. 
Psalms72:18 LALPA Pathian, Israel-hoi pathian chu fakin awm rawh se, Amah chauh hian thilmak a ti thin a:" 
Psalms72:19 A hming ropui tak hi kumkhuain fakin awm bawk se la; Lei pum pui pawh hi a ropuinaa tihkhahin awm rawh se. Amen, Amen.Jesaia fapa Davida tawngtainate chu a tawp ta." 
Psalms72:20 Jesaia fapa Davida tawngtainate chu a tawp ta. 
Psalms73:1 Pathian chu Israel-ho chungah a lo tha ngei mai, Thinlunga thianghlime chungah chuan." 
Psalms73:2 Nimahsela kei zawngin ka rap pelh thelh thelh a; Ka ke pente hi a tlei lek lek a ni. 
Psalms73:3 Mi suaksuate vanneihzia ka hmuhin, Mi uangthuangte chu ka awt si a." 
Psalms73:4 An thih lai chuan tuarna reng an nei lo a; An chakna chu a nghet zawk mah si a. 
Psalms73:5 Mi dang anga hreawmin an awm lo a; Mi dang anga sawisakin an awm hek lo. 
Psalms73:6 Chuvangin chapona chuan khaidiat angin an nghawng a vel a; Nunrawnna chuan silhfen angin a tuam a. 
Psalms73:7 Thau avangin an mit a pawng a: Thinlunga thu duhsam aia nasa an nei a. 
Psalms73:8 An nuihsan a, sual takin hnehchhiahna thu an sawi a: Chapo takin an tawng thin a." 
Psalms73:9 An ka chu vanahte khian an dah a, An lei chuan leilung hi a fang tlang thin a." 
Psalms73:10 Chuvangin amite chu chutah chuan an kri leh a, Tui nova khat chu anmahni in fai kelhin a awm a." 
Psalms73:11 Pathianin engtin nge a hriat ang? Chungnungberan a hre chhuak ang em ni? an ti a. 
Psalms73:12 En teh, hengho hi mi suaksualte an nih hi; Nuamsa aka awm foin an hausa deuh deuh thin." 
Psalms73:13 Athlawn maiin a ni, ka thinlung hi ka tihfai a, Ka kutte sawiselbonaa ka sil ni." 
Psalms73:14 Nilengin sawisakin ka awm a, Tuk tin, zilhhauin ka awm si a." 
Psalms73:15 Chutiangin ka sawi ang,"" lo ti ta i la; Ngai teh, i fateho chhuan chungah vervek taka ti ka lo ni ang." 
Psalms73:16 Chu chu ka hriat theihna turizia ka ngaihtuahin, Ka tan ahar lutuk a ni;" 
Psalms73:17 Pathian hmun thianghlimah ka luh a, An tawpna tur chu ka ngaihtuah hma chuan." 
Psalms73:18 Anni chu hmun nal takahte i dah ngei a: Chhiatnaahte i paihthla thin a. 
Psalms73:19 Engtizia nge mitkhapkar chauha an tiau tak ni aw! Thil rapthlak taktea tihboral daihin an awm ta a nih hi. 
Psalms73:20 Miin men hnua mumang an ngeinep angin, Aw LALPA i harh hunin anmahni lem pawh chu i ngainep ang." 
Psalms73:21 Ka thinlung hi a lungngai a, Ka rilruah pawh chhun angin ka awm si a:" 
Psalms73:22 Mi mawl leh engmah hre lo ka ni a, I lakah chuan sa ang mai ka nih hial thin kha." 
Psalms73:23 Nimahsela i hnenah ka awm fo a: Ka kut ding lam hi i lo chelh thin a. 
Psalms73:24 Nangin i remruatnain mi hruai ang a, Chu mi hnuah chuan ropuinaah khian mi lawm ang." 
Psalms73:25 Vanah khian nang lo chu tu nge ka neih? Leiah pawh hian nang lo chu ka duh tumah an awm lo. 
Psalms73:26 Ka tisa leh ka thinlung hi a chau ta a: Nimahsela Pathian chu kumkhuaa ka thinlung chakna tur leh ka chanvo tur a ni. 
Psalms73:27 Ngai teh, nangmah hlata awmte chu an boral dawn si a: A uiresantu apiang che chu i tiboral ta a.Kei atan erawh zawng Pathian hnaih hi a tha a ni: Lalpa PATHIAN chu ka inhumhinaah ka hmang a, A hnathawh zawng zawng thu chu ka hrilh theihna'n." 
Psalms73:28 Kei atan erawh zawng Pathian hnaih hi a tha a ni: Lalpa PATHIAN chu ka inhumhinaah ka hmang a, A hnathawh zawng zawng thu chu ka hrilh theihna'n." 
Psalms74:1 Aw Pathian, engati nge kumkhua atan min thlauhthlak le? Engati nge i ran tlatna hmuna beramte chungah hian i thinur a khuk le?" 
Psalms74:2 I mite inkhawmho, hmasanga i lei, Hnam i ro atan i tlan kha, hre reng ang che; I awm thinna Zion tlang nen." 
Psalms74:3 Chhe let der tawh chu han fang teh, Dotuten hmun thianghlimah chuan thil sual tinreng an tih tak hi." 
Psalms74:4 Nangmah dotute i mite inkhawmho zingah an haw haw dur dur a; An chhinchhiahnate chu chhinchhiahna turin an tar ta a. 
Psalms74:5 Mi, ngawbing thing Hreipuia tinte angin an lang a." 
Psalms74:6 Tunah chuan a thil ker mawi zawng zawngte chu Hreite leh tubohtein an tichhe hlawm a. 
Psalms74:7 I hmun thianghlim chu an hal a; I hming awmna chu leia chim khawp hialin an bawrh ta a. 
Psalms74:8 An rilruah chuan, ""I tichhe vek hlawm ang u,"" an ti a: He rama Pathian inkhawmna in zawng zawng hi an hal chhe zo ta a." 
Psalms74:9 Kan chhinchhiahnate chu kan hmu ta lo a; Zawlnei reng reng an awm ta lo a; A rei tur chin hria reng reng kan zingah an awm hek lo. 
Psalms74:10 Aw Pathian, dotu chuan eng chen nge a sawichhiat dawn che? Hmelma chuan i hming hi kumkhuain a sawichhe dawn em ni?" 
Psalms74:11 Engati nge i kut, i kut ding lam kha, i lak tak le? Phawrh chhuak leh la, anniho chu tiboral rawh." 
Psalms74:12 Nimahsela, Pathian chu hmasang chena ka Lal a ni, Lei lai taka chhandamna siam thintu chu." 
Psalms74:13 Nang chuan i chaknain tuifinriat kha i tithen a: Nang chuan tuia drakonho lute chu i tikeh a. 
Psalms74:14 Nang chuan liviathan lute chu i tikeh sawm a, Ani chu thlalera mi awmte hnenah chuan chaw atan i pe a." 
Psalms74:15 Nang chuantuihna leh tui lian chu i sah huk a: Nang chuan lui lian tak takte i tikang a. 
Psalms74:16 Chhun hi i ta ani a, zan pawh i ta a ni: Nangin entu leh ni khi i buatsaih a." 
Psalms74:17 Nangin leilung ramrite zawng zawng chu i kham vek a: Nangin nipui leh thlasik hi i siam a. 
Psalms74:18 Aw LALPA, hei hi hre reng ang che, dotu chuan a sawichhiat chia, Hnam a tak chuan i hming a sawichhiat kha." 
Psalms74:19 Aw, i thuro nunna hi ram sakawlh hnenah chuan pe lul suh la: I mi retheite nunna kumkhua chuan theihnghilh suh ang che." 
Psalms74:20 Thuthlung kha rawn pawisa ang che. Thuthlung kha rawn pawisa ang che. Lei hmun thim laite chu nunrawnna awmnain a khat si a. 
Psalms74:21 Aw, hnechhiahna tuarte chu mualphoin kir suh se la: Rethei leh pachhiate chuan i hming fak rawh se." 
Psalms74:22 Aw Pathian, tho la, nangma thu chu insawi chawp la. Mi a chuan nilengin a sawichhiatzia che chu hre reng ang che.Nangmah dotute thawm chu theihnghilh suh ang che: A beituho che sa mur mur chu a chho fo thin a ni." 
Psalms74:23 Nangmah dotute thawm chu theihnghilh suh ang che: A beituho che sa mur mur chu a chho fo thin a ni. 
Psalms75:1 Aw Pathian, lawm thu kan hrilh a che; Lawm thu kan hrilha che, i hming a hnai si a: Miten i thilmak tih thute chu an hril thin." 
Psalms75:2 A hun ka ruatah chuan Dik takin ro ka rel ang. 
Psalms75:3 Lei leh a chunga awm zawng zawngte chu an tuiral zo ta: Keiin a bante chu ka phun a ni. (Selah) 
Psalms75:4 Mi uangthuangte hnenah chuan, ""Uangthuang takin awm suh u,"" ka ti a: Mi suaksualte hnenah, ""In ki tisang suh u,"" ka ti bawk a." 
Psalms75:5 In ki chu chung lamah tisang suh u la; Ring khawng chungin tawng suh u. 
Psalms75:6 Tihsanna chu chhak lam ata a ni hek lo, thlang lam ata a ni hek lo, Chhim lam ata lah a ni hek lo." 
Psalms75:7 Pathian chu roreltu a ni zawk: Anic haun pakhat a tilawm a, pakhat a tisang thin." 
Psalms75:8 LALPA kutah chuan no a awm si a, a uain chu a phul a: Thil dang nena chawhpawlhin akhat a, chuta mi chu a bun chhuak a: Matheiloin a nawite lam chu leia mi suaksual zawng zawngte chuan an in fai kelh ang." 
Psalms75:9 Nimahsela kei chuan kumkhuain ka hriattir ang a, Jakoba Pathian fakin ka zai ang.Mi suaksualte ki zawng zawng pawh ka tansak ang a; Mi felte ki erawh chu tihsanin a awm ang." 
Psalms75:10 Mi suaksualte ki zawng zawng pawh ka tansak ang a; Mi felte ki erawh chu tihsanin a awm ang. 
Psalms76:1 Juda-ho zingah chuan Pathian chu hratin a awm a: Israel-ho zingah chuan ahming a ropui a ni. 
Psalms76:2 Salem-ah chuan abawkte chu a awm a, Tin, ama awmna chu Zion-ah aawm a." 
Psalms76:3 Chutah chuan thalte ch a tichhia a: Phaw te, khandaih te, indonate nen. (Selah)" 
Psalms76:4 Nang chu i ropuiin i va nasa em, rallak sum dah khawmna tlangah chuan." 
Psalms76:5 Pasalthate chu rawkin an awm a, An muhil chu an muhil hlen ta a; Mi chakte pawh tumahin an kut an lek thei ta lo." 
Psalms76:6 Aw Jakoba Pathian, i zilhhauva avangin Tawlailir leh sakawr pawh muthilhtir derin an awm ve ve a." 
Psalms76:7 Nang, nangmah ngei chu, tih tur i ni a: I thinur tawh phawt chuan, tu nge i mithmuhah ding thei ang le?" 
Psalms76:8 I rorel thu chu van atangin i hriattir a; Lei hian ahlau a, a ngawi ta a," 
Psalms76:9 Leia mi thuhnuairawlh zawng zawngte chhandam tura, Pathian chu rorel tura a thawh lai khan. (Selah)" 
Psalms76:10 Mihring thinur chuan a tiropui zual che a, I thinurin a hmaihte chuan i inhreng ang." 
Psalms76:11 Thu tiam u la, LALPA in Pathian lakah hlen rawh u: A vela mi zawng zawng chuan tih tura chu lawmmante rawn sinsak rawh se.Ani chuan roreltute huaina chu a sat bung ang a: Ani chu leia lalte tan chuan a hlauhawm a ni." 
Psalms76:12 Ani chuan roreltute huaina chu a sat bung ang a: Ani chu leia lalte tan chuan a hlauhawm a ni. 
Psalms77:1 Ka awin Pathian chu ka au vang a; Ka awin Pathian ngei chu ka au vang a, ani chuan ka lamah beng a lo chhi ang." 
Psalms77:2 Ka mangan ni chuan Lalpa ka zawng a: Ka kut hi zanah pawh la thla loin ka phar reng a; Ka nuna hian thlamuan a duh lo. 
Psalms77:3 Pathian ka hre reng a, ka buai thin: Ka ngaihtuah a, ka thlarau hi a chau thin. (Selah)" 
Psalms77:4 Ka mitte hi i chelh meng reng thin a: tawng thei lo khawpin ka mangang thin. 
Psalms77:5 Hmasang nite ka ngaihtuah a, Hman lai kumte chu." 
Psalms77:6 Zanah ka ngaihtuah neuh neuh a, Ka dawn vel a, ka inzawt thin a; Ka thlarau pawhin thahnemngai takin a zawng a." 
Psalms77:7 Lalpa chuan kumkhuain a thlauhthla dawn em ni aw? Engtikah mah a lawm dawn tawh lo em ni aw? 
Psalms77:8 A ngilneihna chu a bo hlen kumkhua dawn em ni aw? A thutiam chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a bo dawn em ni aw? 
Psalms77:9 Pathian chuan khawngaih a theih nghilh em ni aw? Thinurin a lainatnate chu a khar ta em ni aw? (Selah) 
Psalms77:10 Tin, ""Chu chu ka chak lohna avang a ni; Nimahsela Chungnungbera kut dinglam kumte kha ka hre reng ang e." 
Psalms77:11 LALPA thiltih thute kha ka sawi ang a; Hmasanga i thilmak tihte kha ka hre reng ang e. 
Psalms77:12 I hnathawh zawng zawng kha ka ka ngaihtuah bawk ang a, I thiltihte pawh kha ka chhut ang e,"" ka ti a." 
Psalms77:13 Aw Pathian, i kawng chu hmun thianghlimah a awm a: Kan Pathian ang hi pathian ropui tu nge awm?" 
Psalms77:14 Nang chu thilmak ti thintu Pathian chu i ni a: Mi tin, zingahte chuan i chakzia i hriattir thin." 
Psalms77:15 I banin i mite chhan chhuak a, Jakobha leh Josefa fate chu. (Selah)" 
Psalms77:16 Aw Pathian, tuite chuan an hmu hia; Tuite chuan an hmu chia, an hlau a; Tui thuk takte chu an khur bawk a." 
Psalms77:17 Chhumte khian tui an leihbua a; Vante khian aw an chhuah a: I thalte pawh a phe zawk zawk a," 
Psalms77:18 I khawpui ri thawm chu thawnga leivirah a awm a; Kawlphete chuan khawvel hi a en zawk zawk a: Lei hi khurin a nghing dur dur a. 
Psalms77:19 I kawng chu tuifinriatah a awm a, I kalkawngte chu tui zau takah a awm a, I hniakte pawh hmuh theih ani lo.Mosia leh Arona kutin I mite chu beram rual angin i hruai thin a." 
Psalms77:20 Mosia leh Arona kutin I mite chu beram rual angin i hruai thin a. 
Psalms78:1 Aw ka mite u, ka dan thu-ah hian beng lo chhi ua: Ka kaa thu-ahte hian in beng rawn dawh rawh u." 
Psalms78:2 Tehkhin thuin ka ka ka ang ang a; Hmasanga thu ril sawite kha ka sawi chhuak ang: 
Psalms78:3 Chung chu ka bengin kan hria a, kan rilruin kan hre bawk a, Min thlahtute pawhin min hrilh kha." 
Psalms78:4 Chung chu an fate lakah kan zep lo ang a, Thangthar lo la awm tur hnenah LALPA fakna thu leh, A chakzia leh a thilmak tak tihziate chu kan hril zawk ang." 
Psalms78:5 Jakob-ho zingah dan a ruat a, Chung chu thlahtute hnenah thupekin a pe a Anni chuan chung thu chu an fate hnenah an hriattir turin:" 
Psalms78:6 Thangthar lo la awm tur, naupang lo la piang turte chuan, an hriat theihna'n; Chungte chu an thawh a, an fate an la hrilh chhawn zelna turin:" 
Psalms78:7 An beiseina chu Pathianah an nghah theih a, Pathian thiltihte chu an theihnghilh loh a, A thupekte chu an zawm zawkna'n:" 
Psalms78:8 Leh, an thlahtute anga, Chhuan luhlul leh helhmang; Chhuan thinlung siam dik lo, Pathian laka rilru rinawm lo pua an awm lohna'n." 
Psalms78:9 Ephraima thlahte chu ralthuama inthuam a, thal ngul kengin, Inbei niah chuan an tlanchhia a." 
Psalms78:10 Pathian thuthlung chu an zawm lo a. A danah awm an duh lo bawk a," 
Psalms78:11 A thiltihte chu an theihnghilh a, A thilmak tih a hmuhtirte nen khan." 
Psalms78:12 An thlahtute mithmuhah thilmak takte a ti thin, Aigupta ramah, Zoanphulahchuan." 
Psalms78:13 Tuifinriat chu a tithen phawka, anni chu a kaltir a; Tuite chu englo dah khawm thur angin a dintir luah a." 
Psalms78:14 Chhunah chuan chhumin a hruai a. Zankhuain mei engin a hruai bawk thin a. 
Psalms78:15 Thlalerah chuan lungpuite a tiphel a, Tui thuk tak ata ang mai hnianghnara in tur a pe a." 
Psalms78:16 Lungpui atang chuan luite a tichhuak a, Tuite chu luipuite angin a luan thlaktir a." 
Psalms78:17 Chuti chung pawhin a chungah thil an lo tisual ta cheu a, Ram rovah chuan Chungnungbera chungah an hel a." 
Psalms78:18 An chakna tihrenna'na ei tur dilin, An thinlungin Pathian an fiah a." 
Psalms78:19 A ni, Pathian an sawi hnawm a; ""Thlalerah hian Pathianin dawhkan a buatsaih thei emaw chu?" 
Psalms78:20 Ngai teh, lungpui chu a vua a, tuite kha a lo khawh chhuakin, Luite chu a kuang a liam dul dul ta tak a; Chaw pawh a pe thei nghal emaw chu? A mite tan hian sa a buatsaih ang emaw chu?"" an ti a." 
Psalms78:21 Chutichuan LALPA chuan a lo hria a, a thin a rim ta a: Jakob-ho chunga mei a lo alh chhuak a, Israel-ho chungah thinurna a lo chho ta a;" 
Psalms78:22 Pathian an rin loh a, A chhandamna pawh an rin loh avangin." 
Psalms78:23 Nimahsela chung lam van dumte khi thu a pe a, Van kawngkharte khi a hawnsak a;" 
Psalms78:24 An ei atan manna kha an chungah a zuk surtir a, Van buh chu a pe a ni." 
Psalms78:25 Mihringten mi chake chhang chu an ei a: Puarna khawpin chaw a rawn pe a. 
Psalms78:26 Khaw chhak thli chu vanah a tlehtir a: A thiltihtheihnain chhim thli chu a hruai a. 
Psalms78:27 Sa chu vaivut zat laiin an chungah sa surtir a, Sava thla nei chu tuifinriat tiau vaivut zat laiin:" 
Psalms78:28 An riahhmun laiah a tlaktir a, An awmna buk kiiang velahte chuan." 
Psalms78:29 Chutichuan an ei a, an puar hle a; An chaka chu a pe ta a ni." 
Psalms78:30 An chak a la reh lo a. An chaw chu an kaah a la awm a," 
Psalms78:31 Chu mi lai tak chuan Pathian thinurna chu an chungah a chho a, An mi nalh nalhte thenkhat a that a, Israel tlangvalte chu an vawthlu hlawm a." 
Psalms78:32 Chuti chung pawhin a chungah thil an lo tisual ta cheu a, A thilmak tihte chu an ring chang lo." 
Psalms78:33 Chuvangin an dam chhung nite chu engmah lo ang maiin a tihralsak a, An dam chhung kumte chu hlauhnain a tihralsak bawk a." 
Psalms78:34 Anmahni a thah apiangin amah chu an zawng thin a. An kir leh a, zing takah Pathian an zawng thin a." 
Psalms78:35 Pathian chu an lungpui a ni tih leh Pathian Chungnungbera chu an tlantu a ni tih an hre chhuak thin. 
Psalms78:36 Nimahsela amah chu an kain an fak der a, An leiin an hnenah dawt thu an sawi thin." 
Psalms78:37 An thinlung chu a lakah a dik si lo a, An thuthlungah chuan a rinawm hek lo." 
Psalms78:38 Nimahsela, ani chu lainatnaa a khah avangin an khawlohna chu ngaidam a, anni chu a tiboral lo: A ni vawi tam tak a thinurna chu a la kir a, A thinrimna chu azain a chawk tho duh thin lo." 
Psalms78:39 Tisa chauh an ni tih a hre reng a; Thli, let leh lo tura tleh liam thin ang hi." 
Psalms78:40 Thlalerah khana chungah an va hei zingin, Ram rovah khan amah chu an va tilungngai zing em!" 
Psalms78:41 An hawi kir lehin Pathian an fiah a, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim chu an ti vui thin." 
Psalms78:42 A kut chu an hre reng lo a, Dotu laka a chhanhim ni chu an hre reng thin hek lo." 
Psalms78:43 Khatia Aigupta rama a chinchhiahnate a dah a, Zoan phulah a thilmakte a dah bawk a;" 
Psalms78:44 An luipuite chu thisenah a chantir a, An luite chu thisenah a chantir bawk kha, tichuan an in thei ta lo a." 
Psalms78:45 An zingah tho tam tak a tir a, chung chuan anmahni a ei zo a; Chungute a tir bawk a, chung chuan anmahni a tiboral ta a." 
Psalms78:46 An thil tote pawh chu pangang a pe a, An thawh rim tah chu khaukhuap a pe bawk a." 
Psalms78:47 An grep hruite chu rialin a tithi a, An theipui kungte pawh chu vurin a tithi bawk a." 
Psalms78:48 An rante pawh chu rial a pe a, An ran rualte chu tek sa tak a pe bawk a." 
Psalms78:49 A thinur nasa tak chu an chungah a tlak a, Thinrimna te, lungnih loh em emna te, manganna te hi, thil tha lo tak thlentu tirhkoh pawl chu." 
Psalms78:50 A thinurna atan chuan kawng a siamsak a, A nunna chu thihna lakah a hmum lo a, An nun chu hri a pe ta zawk a;" 
Psalms78:51 Aigupta rama fa tir awm zawng zawng a tihlum a, Hama puan intea an chakna rah hmasa berte chu:" 
Psalms78:52 Nimahsela ama mite chu beram angin a hruai chhuak a, Ran rual angin thlalerah khan a hruai a." 
Psalms78:53 Him takin a hruai a, chutichuan engmah an hlau lo va: Nimahsela tuifinriat chuan an hmelmate chu a khuh zo ta a." 
Psalms78:54 Tin, a hmun thianghlim ramri chu a hruai thleng a, He tlang, a kut ding lama a leia hi." 
Psalms78:55 Hnam tin chu an hmaah a hnawt chhuak a, Anni chu hruia tehin rochan atan a sem a, An puan inahte chuan Israel hnamte chu a awmtir ta a." 
Psalms78:56 Nimahsela, Pathian Chungnungbera chuu an fiah a, a chungah an hel a, A thuhriattirte chu an zawm si lo a;" 
Psalms78:57 Hawi kirin, an thlahtute angin vervek takin an ti ta zawk a: Thal ngul rinawm lo angin an kal kawi a." 
Psalms78:58 An hmun sangtein amah chu an tithinur si a, An milem siamtein an thiktir bawk a." 
Psalms78:59 Pathian chu chu a lo hriatin a thin a rim a, Israel-ho chu a ten ta em em a:" 
Psalms78:60 Chutichu a Silo biak buk, Mihring zinga a puan in dah chu, a kalsan a;" 
Psalms78:61 A chakna chu salah a mantir a, A ropuina chu dotu kutah a mantir ta bawk a." 
Psalms78:62 A mite chu khandaih hnenah a pe a; A rochan chungah chuan a thin a rim ta a. 
Psalms78:63 Meiin an tlangvalte chu a kangral a, An nulate chuan inneihna hla reng reng an nei ta lo." 
Psalms78:64 An puithiamte chu khandaiha tihtlukin an awm a; An hmeithaite chu tah reng reng an tap lo. 
Psalms78:65 Chutih lai chuan LALPA chu, mi an muhil an harh angin, a harh ta a, Mi chak uain vanga au ang hian." 
Psalms78:66 Amah dotute chu a vaw kir a, Kumkhaw hming chhiatna a hlawhtir ta a." 
Psalms78:67 Chu lo pawh chu Josefa puan in chu a duh lo a, Ephraim hnam chu a thlang lo bawk a;" 
Psalms78:68 Juda hnam chu a thlang ta zawk a, A hmangaih Zion tlang chu." 
Psalms78:69 A in thianghlim chu van sangte ang khian a sa a, Kumkhua atana a tihngheh leilung ang hian." 
Psalms78:70 A chhiahhlawh Davida chu a thlang a, beram huang atate chu ala chhuak a:" 
Psalms78:71 berampui no hruaite zuite atangin a hruai chhuak a, A mite Jakob-ho leh a rochan Israel-ho chawm turin.Chutichuan ani chuan a thinlung thatna ang zelin anniho chu a chawm a; A kut thiamnain a hruaitaa." 
Psalms78:72 Chutichuan ani chuan a thinlung thatna ang zelin anniho chu a chawm a; A kut thiamnain a hruaitaa. 
Psalms79:1 Aw Pathian, hnam tin i rochanah hian an lut a: I biak in thianghlim hi an tibawlhhlawh a; Jerusalem hi lung chim khawmah an siam ta thluah a." 
Psalms79:2 I chhiahhlahte ruang chu chungleng savate chawah an pe a, I mi thianghlimte sa chu ram sate an pe a." 
Psalms79:3 An thisen chu Jerusalem velah hian tui angin an leihbua a; Anmahni phumtu tur lah tumah an awm si lo. 
Psalms79:4 Kan vela mite sawichhiatin kan lo awm a, Kan dep vela mite hmusit leh nuihsanin kan lo awm ta a." 
Psalms79:5 Aw LALPA, i thinur kumkhua dawn em ni? I thikna chu mei angin a alh dawn em ni?" 
Psalms79:6 Nangmah hre lo hnam tin chungah hian i thinur chu leihbua ang che, I hming lam lo ram chungahte pawh." 
Psalms79:7 Jakob-ho chu an ei zo a, An awmna chu an tiram ta si a." 
Psalms79:8 Min thlahtute khawlohnate kha kan lakah chuan hre reng suh ang che: I lainatnate chuan min hmuak thuai rawh se: Nasa taka tihhniamin kan awm ta si a. 
Psalms79:9 Aw min chhandamtu Pathian, i hming ropuina'n min tanpui la: I hming avngin min chhanhim la, kan sualte hi thleng fai ang che." 
Psalms79:10 Engti nge hnam tinin, ""Khawiah nge an Pathian kha le?"" an tih ni? I chhiahhlawhte thisen chhuak phuba lakna chu Kan mithmuhah hnam tin zingah hian hriat ni rawh se." 
Psalms79:11 Mi tang rum chu i hmaah thleng rawh se; I thiltihtheihna nasat avangin thi tura ruatte chu humhim la; 
Psalms79:12 Aw LALPA, nangmah an sawichhiatna che kha, Kan vela mite an angchhungah a leh sarihin rul leh ang che.Chutichuan, keini i mite, i ran tlatna hmuna beramte hian, Kumkhuain lawm thu kan hrilh ang chia: Chhuan zawng zawng thlengin nangmah fakna chu kan hriattir zel ang." 
Psalms79:13 Chutichuan, keini i mite, i ran tlatna hmuna beramte hian, Kumkhuain lawm thu kan hrilh ang chia: Chhuan zawng zawng thlengin nangmah fakna chu kan hriattir zel ang." 
Psalms80:1 Aw Israel-ho Vengtu, beram pawl anga Josef-ho hruaitu, beng lo chhi ang che; Nang cherubte chunga thua chu, lo eng chhuak ang che." 
Psalms80:2 Ephraim-ho leh Benjamin-ho leh Manase-ho mithmuhah chuan i chakna kha chawk tho lo, Mi chhandam turin lo kal ang che." 
Psalms80:3 Aw Pathian, min hawi kirtir leh la; I hmel kha tieng ang che, tichuan chhandamin kan awm dawn nia." 
Psalms80:4 Aw LALPA, sipaihote Pathian, Eng chen nge i mite tawngtaina chungah hian i thinur dawn le?" 
Psalms80:5 Anni chu mittui chhangin i chawm a, Mittui hi in turintehna lian takin i pe thin." 
Psalms80:6 Nangin kan vela mite tan inhnialnaah min siam thin a, Min dotute chu an nui tlang thin." 
Psalms80:7 Aw sipaihote Pathian, min hawi kirtir leh a; I hmel kha tieng ang che, tichuan chhandamin kan awm dawn nia." 
Psalms80:8 Aigupta ram ata grep hrui i rawn la a: Hnam tin chu i hnawt chhuak a, i phun ta a." 
Psalms80:9 A hma i tifai zel a, Thuk takin zung a kai a, ram chu a awh ta vek a." 
Psalms80:10 Tlangte chu a hlim tuamin a awm hlawm a, A pengte chu Pathian sidar thingte ang mai a ni." 
Psalms80:11 A tangte chu tuifinriat thlengin a zam chhuahtir a, A chawrnote chu Luipui thlengin." 
Psalms80:12 Engati nge a palte chu i tihchhiat ni? 
Psalms80:13 Ramhnuaia sanghal chuan a tichhia a,Ram sate pawhin an tlan thin." 
Psalms80:14 Aw sipaihote Pathian, khawngaih takin hawi kir leh ang che: Van atang khan rawn en chhuk la, he grep hui hi en la, rawn kan ang che," 
Psalms80:15 A kung i kut ding lamin a phun leh, A peng i tana i tihkhauh nen hian." 
Psalms80:16 Meiah a kang ta, kihin a awm ta: I hmela zilhhauhna avangin an boral thin." 
Psalms80:17 I kut kha i ding lama ki chungah awm rawh se, Mihring fapa i tana i tihchaka chungah hian." 
Psalms80:18 Chutichuan kan kirsan lo ang che: Min tiharh la, tichuan i hming kan lam dawn nia.Aw LALPA, sipaihote Pathian, min hawi kirtir leh la; I hmel kha tieng ang che, tichuan chhandamin kan awm dawn nia." 
Psalms80:19 Aw LALPA, sipaihote Pathian, min hawi kirtir leh la; I hmel kha tieng ang che, tichuan chhandamin kan awm dawn nia." 
Psalms81:1 Pathian min tichaktu chawimawiin hlim takin zai u la: Jakob-ho Pathian chawimawiin hlim takin au rawh u. 
Psalms81:2 Fakna hla sa u la, khuangte te, tingtang ngaihnawm tak te, perhkhuangte nen rawn keng rawh u." 
Psalms81:3 Thla tharah chuan tawtawrawt ham u la, Thla hlei ngaa kan kut niah nen." 
Psalms81:4 Israel-ho tana thuruat a ni si a, Jakob-ho Pathian dan a ni." 
Psalms81:5 Chu chu Josef-ho zinga thuhriattirna'n a ruat a ni., Aigupta ram chunga a kal chhuah lai kha: Ka tawng hriat loh benga ka hriatna kha." 
Psalms81:6 An koki chu thil rit atangin ka la sawn a: An kutte chu kho la thlahtir a 
Psalms81:7 Manganin mi ko a, ka chhanhim che u a: Khawpui ri bihrukna hmunah khan ka chhang che u a; Meriba tuiahte khan ka fiah che u kha. (Selah)" 
Psalms81:8 Aw, ka mite u, ngaithla u la, ka hriattir ang che u: Aw Israel-hote u, ka thu ngaithla duh teh u la aw!" 
Psalms81:9 Ram dang pathian reng reng chu in zingah an awm tur ani lo a; Mi dang pathian reng reng chu in biak tur ani hek lo. 
Psalms81:10 Kei, LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhotu che u kha: In ka ang zau u la, ka tikhat dawn nia." 
Psalms81:11 Nimahsela ka mite chuan ka awm an ngaithla si lo a; Israel-ho chuan min duh loh kha. 
Psalms81:12 An thinlung sak vangin ka thlahthlam a, An duh ang anga awm turin." 
Psalms81:13 Aw, ka mite hian ka thu ngaithlain, Israel-ho hi ka kawngahte hian kal se la chu aw!" 
Psalms81:14 An hmelmate chu ka tilawm thuaiin, Anmahni dotute chungah chuan ka kut ka lek tur." 
Psalms81:15 LALPA hawtute chu a hmaah khurin an kun ang a, Kumkhuain hrem an tuar ang.Nangni chu buhchangrumin ka chawm ang che u a, Lungpuia khawzuin ka titlai ang che u." 
Psalms81:16 Nangni chu buhchangrumin ka chawm ang che u a, Lungpuia khawzuin ka titlai ang che u." 
Psalms82:1 Pathian chu Pathian inkhawmna siamah chuan a ding a; Pathianhote zingah ro a rel a. 
Psalms82:2 Eng chen nge dik lo taka ro in rel a, Mi suaksualte ch in duhsak bik dawn? (Selah)" 
Psalms82:3 Retheite leh pa nei lote ro chu rel u la: Hreawm tuarte leh pachhiate chungah chuan tidik rawh u. 
Psalms82:4 Retheite leh pachhiate chu chhan u la: Mi suaksual kut ata chhanhim rawh u. 
Psalms82:5 An hre lo a, hriat thiamna an nei hek lo; Thimah chuan an vei an vei a: Leulung nghahchhan zawng zawng chu a nghing ta a." 
Psalms82:6 Pathiante in ni a, In zain Chungnungbera fate in ni,"" ka tih kha." 
Psalms82:7 Nimahsela mihringte ang maiin in la thi ang a, Mi lian paikhat ang khan in la tlu ang.Aw Pathian, tho la, lei ro hi rel ang che: Hnam tinreng hi i rochung dawn si a." 
Psalms82:8 Aw Pathian, tho la, lei ro hi rel ang che: Hnam tinreng hi i rochung dawn si a." 
Psalms83:1 Aw Pathian, tawng loin awm suh ang che: Aw Pathian, ngawi reng suh la, awm hle hle lul suh ang che." 
Psalms83:2 Ngai teh, nangmah dotute chu an sa mur mur a: Nangmah hawtute chu an dak hraw hraw a." 
Psalms83:3 I mite hi vervek takin an phiar a, I mi thuhrukte chungah hian a chhe lamin an inrawn hlawm a." 
Psalms83:4 Hawh u, an hnam hloh khawpin i tiboral ang u! Israel-ho hming reng reng hi hriat renga a awm tawh lohna turin,"" an ti a." 
Psalms83:5 Thu khat vuain an inrawn a; I chungah a chhe lama ti turin thu an intiam hlawm a. 
Psalms83:6 Edom-ho leh Ismael-ho puan in te, Moab-ho leh Hagar-ho te;" 
Psalms83:7 Gebal-ho leh Amon-ho leh Amalek-ho te; Philistia-ho tura khuaa awmte nen: 
Psalms83:8 Asuri-ho pawh an lamah an ta ve; Lota thlahte chu an tanpui a. (Selah) 
Psalms83:9 Anniho chu Midian-ho chunga i tih ang te, Kison luia Sisera chunga i tih ang te, Jabina chunga i tih angte khan ti ve ang che:" 
Psalms83:10 Chu mite chu Endor khuaah an boral a; Lei atan ekdur ang mai an lo nih tak kha. 
Psalms83:11 An mi liante chu Oreba leh Zeeba ang khan siam la, A ni, an lal zawng zawngte chu Zebaha leh Zalmuna ang khan siam ang che." 
Psalms83:12 Chu mite chuan, ""Pathian awmnate chu luahsak ang u,"" an tih kha." 
Psalms83:13 Aw ka Pathian, anniho chu vaivut vir chung chung ang hian siam ang che; Buh sisawp thli chhem len ur ur ang mai hian." 
Psalms83:14 Ram kangtu mei ang leh, Tlang kangtu meialh ang hian;" 
Psalms83:15 Anni chu i thlipuiin um la, I thli na takin tihlau ang che." 
Psalms83:16 Aw LALPA, i hming an zawn theihna'n An hmel chu zahnain tikhat ang che." 
Psalms83:17 Kumkhuain mualpho leh mangang takin awm se la; A ni, tihzaha awmin boral rawh se:Nangmah chauh hi JEHOVA hming pu, Leilung zawng zawng chunga Chungnungber i nih an hriat theihna'n." 
Psalms83:18 Nangmah chauh hi JEHOVA hming pu, Leilung zawng zawng chunga Chungnungber i nih an hriat theihna'n." 
Psalms84:1 Aw sipaihote LALPA, I awmnate chu a va duhawm em!" 
Psalms84:2 Ka nunna hian LALPA biak in hung chhung kawtlaite chu a ngai em em a, a ni; a chauh phah hial a;Ka thinlung leh ka tisa hi Pathian nung hnenah chuan a au chhuak a." 
Psalms84:3 Aw sipaihote LALPA, ka lal leh ka Pathian I maicham bulahte chuan Chawngzawngin bu a chhep a, Vamur pawhin bu anei, ano dahna turin." 
Psalms84:4 I inah awmte chu an eng a thawl e: Nang chu an fak fo ang che. (Selah) 
Psalms84:5 Nangmahah chakna nei mi chu a eng a thawl e; A thinlung Zion panna lamliante awma chu. 
Psalms84:6 Tahna ruam chu an zawhin tuihna awmnate an siam thin a, A ni, ruahtui tla hmasa chuan malsawmnain a khuh thin." 
Psalms84:7 Chakna atangin chak lehzualnaah an kal thin a, Zion-ah Pathian hmaah chuan an inlan theuh thin." 
Psalms84:8 Aw LALPA, sipaihote Pathian, ka tawngtaina hi mi ngaihthlaksak la: Aw Jakob-ho Pathian, beng lo chhi ang che. (Selah)" 
Psalms84:9 Aw Pathian kan phaw ber, en teh, I hriak thiha hmel hi en teh." 
Psalms84:10 I biak in hung chhung kawtlaia ni khat awm hi, ni sangkhat aiin a tha zawk si a. Suahsualna puan intea awm ai chuan, Kan Pathian ina kawngkhar vengtu nih pawh ka duh zawk a ni." 
Psalms84:11 LALPA Pathian chu ni leh phaw a ni si a: LALPA chuan khawngaihna leh ropuina a pe ang a: Dik taka awmte lakah chuan thil tha reng reng a ui lo ang.Aw sipaihote LALPA, Nangmah ring mi ch a eng a thawl e." 
Psalms84:12 Aw sipaihote LALPA, Nangmah ring mi ch a eng a thawl e." 
Psalms85:1 LALPA, iram chungah hian i lawm a: Jakob-ho sala an awm chu i hruai kir leh ta a." 
Psalms85:2 I mite khawlohnanate i ngaidam a, An sualna zawng zawng i khuh zo ta a." 
Psalms85:3 I thinrimna zawng zawng chu i la bo a; I thinurna nasa tak chu i hawisan ta a. 
Psalms85:4 Aw min chhandamtu Pathian, min hawi kirtir la, Kan chunga i thinurna chu tibang ang che," 
Psalms85:5 Kan chungah i thinurn kumkhua dawn em ni le? I thinur chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin i lantir zel dawn em ni? 
Psalms85:6 Nangmahah chuan i mite an hlim theihna'n Min tiharh leh dawn lo'm ni? 
Psalms85:7 Aw LALPA, i ngilneihna chu min hmuhtir la, I chhandamna chu min pe bawk ang che." 
Psalms85:8 Pathian LALPA thu sawi tur chu ka ngaithla ang: A mite leh a mi thianghlimte hnenah thlamuanna thu a sawi dawn si a: Nimahsela anni chu atna lamah hawi leh tawh su h se. 
Psalms85:9 A chhandamna chu amah tihtute hnaihah chan a awm ngei ngei thin a ni; Kan ramah hian ropuina a awm theihna'n. 
Psalms85:10 Ngilneihna leh thutak an intawk a; Felna leh remna an infawp a. 
Psalms85:11 Thutak chu lei atangin a chawr chhuak a; Felna chuan van atangin a rawn en chhuk ta a. 
Psalms85:12 A ni, LALPA chuan thil tha a pe ang a; Kan ram hian a thil to chu a pe bawk ang.Felna chuan a hma a hruai ang a, A hniakte chu kawngah a siam ang." 
Psalms85:13 Felna chuan a hma a hruai ang a, A hniakte chu kawngah a siam ang." 
Psalms86:1 Aw LALPA, ka lamah hian i beng rawn dawh la, mi chhang ang che; Rethei leh pachhe tak ka nih hi." 
Psalms86:2 Ka nunna hi vawng tha ang che; Pathian ngaihsak mi ka ni si a: Aw, nang ka Pathian, nangmah ringtu, i chhiahhlawh hi chhandam ang che." 
Psalms86:3 Aw LALPA, mi khawngaih ang che; Nilengin ka au si thin chia." 
Psalms86:4 I chhiahhlawh nunna hi tihlim ang che; Aw LALPA, ka rilru hi i hnenah ka dah tlat si thin a." 
Psalms86:5 LALPA, nang chu i tha a, ngaihdam i peih a, A kotu apiang che chungah ngilneihna i ngah si thin a." 
Psalms86:6 Aw LALPA, ka tawngtainaah hian beng lo chhi la; Khawngaih ka dilna aw hi ngaithla ang che." 
Psalms86:7 Ka mangan ni chuan ka ko ang che; Nangin mi chhang dawn si a. 
Psalms86:8 Aw LALPA, pathiante zingah nang ang reng reng an awm lo a, I thiltihte ang hi thiltih reng reng a awm hek lo." 
Psalms86:9 Aw Lalpa, i siam hnam tinrengte chu an lo kal ang a, i hmaah an lo kun ang a; I hming chu an rawn chawimawi ang." 
Psalms86:10 Nang chu i ropui si a, thilmakte i ti bawk thin a: Nangmah chauh hi Pathian i ni." 
Psalms86:11 Aw LALPA, i kawng chu mi entir ang che; i thutakah ka awm ang: I hming tih turin thinlung sakhat mi puttir ang che." 
Psalms86:12 Aw Lalpa, ka Pathian, ka thinlung zawng zawngin ka fak ang chia; I hming hi kumkhuain ka chawimawi ang." 
Psalms86:13 Ka chunga i ngilneihna chu a nasain; Ka nunna hi khuarkhurum hnuaihnung ber ata i chhanhim si a. 
Psalms86:14 Aw Pathian, mi chapote chuan mi bei a, Mi nunrawng awm khawmte chuan ka nunna hi tihbo tumin an zawng a, nang chu an hmaah an dah thin lo che." 
Psalms86:15 Nimahsela, aw LALPA, nang chu Pathian, lainatnaa khat, mi khawngaih thei, Thinnel, ngilneihna leh thutak ngah i ni." 
Psalms86:16 Aw, ka lam lo hawi la, mi khawngaih ang che; I chhiahhlawh i chakna pe la. I bawihnu fa hi chhandam ang che.Mi duhsakna tilang ang che; Mi hawtute chuan chu chu an hmuh a, an mualphona turin, LALPA, nangin mi tanpui a, mi thlamuan avangin." 
Psalms86:17 Mi duhsakna tilang ang che; Mi hawtute chuan chu chu an hmuh a, an mualphona turin, LALPA, nangin mi tanpui a, mi thlamuan avangin." 
Psalms87:1 A lungphum chu tlang thianghlimahte chuana awm. 
Psalms87:2 LALPA chuan Zion kulh kawngkharte chu Jakob-ho awmna zawng zawng aiin a ngaina zakw a ni. 
Psalms87:3 Aw Pathian khawpui, I chungchang thu ropui takin an sawi thin a ni. (Selah)" 
Psalms87:4 Mi hretute zingah an tel ve tih, Rahab leh Babulon chungchang thu ka sawi ang: Philistia leh tura hi, Ethiopia nen hian, en teh u; He mi hi chuta piang chu a ni." 
Psalms87:5 A ni, ""He mi leh saw mi saw amaha piang an ni a; Chungnungbera ngei chuan amah chu a tinghet ang,"" tih Zion chungchang thu chu an sawi ang." 
Psalms87:6 LALPA'n, mi tin, hming a ziak hunah chuan, He mi hi chuta piang chu a ni,"" tiin a chhiar ang. (Selah)Hla satuten, a lamate nen chuan, ""Ka tuihna zawng zawng chu nangmahah a ni, a awm ni,"" an ti ang." 
Psalms87:7 Hla satuten, a lamate nen chuan, ""Ka tuihna zawng zawng chu nangmahah a ni, a awm ni,"" an ti ang." 
Psalms88:1 Aw LALPA, mi chhandamtu Pathian, Achhun azanin i hmaah ka au thin a;" 
Psalms88:2 Ka tawngtaina hi hmaah lut se la; Ka au thawmah hian i beng rawn dawh ang che: 
Psalms88:3 Ka nunna hi mangannatein a khat a, Ka nun hi Seol chu a rawn hnaih ta si a." 
Psalms88:4 Khuarkhuruma chhkte zinga chhiar tel ka ni a; Chakna reng reng nei lo mi ang ka ni: 
Psalms88:5 Ral thahho thlana mute anga Mitthi zinga paih thlak ka ni; Chungte chu i hriat tawh loh, I kut ata tihboral an ni." 
Psalms88:6 Khuarkhurum hnuaihnung berah mi muttir ta a, Hmun thm tak, thuk takahte chuan." 
Psalms88:7 I thinrimna chuan mi delh tlat a. Nangin i tuifawn zawng zawngin mi tihreawm ta a. (Selah) 
Psalms88:8 Ka hmelhriatte chu mi hlatah i awmtir a; An tana tenawm takah mi siam ta a: Kharkhipin ka awm a, ka chhuak thei lo a ni." 
Psalms88:9 Hrehawmna avangin ka mit a chhe telh telh a: Aw LALPA, ni tin, ka ko chia, I lamah ka kutte ka phar a." 
Psalms88:10 Mitthite tan chuan thilmak i ti dawn em ni? Thi tawhte chuan thoin an fak dawn che em ni? (Selah) 
Psalms88:11 I ngilneihzia chu thlanah hriattirin, I rinawmzia chu Boralna hmunah hriattirin a awm dawn em ni?" 
Psalms88:12 I thilmak tihte chu thimah hriatin a awm dawn em ni? I felna chu theihnghilhna ramah hriatin a awm bawk dawn em ni? 
Psalms88:13 Aw LALPA, kei erawh chuan ka au chia, Ka tawngtaina chuan zingah a hmuak ang che." 
Psalms88:14 LALPA, engati nge ka nuna hi i thlauhthlak le? Engati nge ka lakah i hmai i thup ni?" 
Psalms88:15 Ka naupan tet ata hrehawm tuar leh thi lek lekin ka awm thin a; I thil rapthlak takte ka tuarin ka thauvah mi man thin. 
Psalms88:16 I thinrim nasa tak chuan mi vur pil a; I thil rapthlak takte chuan mi tiboral ta a. 
Psalms88:17 Chung chuang nilengin tui angin mi vel a; Mi hual vel hlawm a.Mi hmangaihtu leh ka thian chu mi hlatah i awmtir ta a, Ka hmelhriatte ch thimah i awmtir ta bawk a." 
Psalms88:18 Mi hmangaihtu leh ka thian chu mi hlatah i awmtir ta a, Ka hmelhriatte ch thimah i awmtir ta bawk a." 
Psalms89:1 LALPA ngilneihna thute chu kumkhuain hlaah ka sa ang a: Ka kain i rinawmzia chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin ka hriattir ang," 
Psalms89:2 Ngilneihna chu kumkhua atan rem chhohin a awm ang a; I rinawmna chu vanahte ngei khian i tinghet ang,"" ka ti ta a ni." 
Psalms89:3 Ka mi thlan hnenah chuan thu ka thlung a, Ka chhiahhlawh Davida hnenah chhia ka chham ta a;" 
Psalms89:4 I thlahte chu kumkhua atan ka tinghet ang a, I lalthutphah pawh chhuan zawng zawng thlengin ka rem chho ang,"" tiin (Selah)" 
Psalms89:5 Aw LALPA, vante khian i thilmak tih hi an fak ang a; Mi thianghlimte inkhawmnaah khian i rinawmna hi an fak bawk ang." 
Psalms89:6 Van dumahte khian LALPA nena tehkhin theih tu nge awm ni? Mi thiltithei tak fate zingah khian LALPA ang," 
Psalms89:7 Mi thianghlimte inrawn khawmnaah Pathian hlauhawm tak, A kiang vela mi zawng zawng aiai tih ber tur chu, tu nge awm ni?" 
Psalms89:8 Aw LALPA sipaihote Pathian, Aw JAA, nang anga mi chak tu nge awm? I rinawmna chu i velah a awm si a." 
Psalms89:9 Nang chuan tuifinriat chapona chungah ro i rel thin a: A tuifawn invawrh laite chu i tireh thin. 
Psalms89:10 Nang chuan Rahab chu ral thah angin i tikeh sawm a; Nangmah dotute chu i ban tha chakin i tidarh ta a. 
Psalms89:11 Vante khi nangma ta ani a, lei pawh hi nangma ta a ni: Khawvel leh a chhunga thil awm zawng zawng hi nangma din a ni." 
Psalms89:12 Chhim leh hmar chu nangma siam ani a: Tabor leh Hermon chu i hming avangin hlimin an zai thin. 
Psalms89:13 Nang chuan ban thiltithei tak i nei a: I kut chu a chak a, i kut dinglam chu chawimawiin a awm a." 
Psalms89:14 Felna leh rorelna fel chu i lalthutphah nghahchahn ani a: Ngilneihna leh thutak chu i hmaah an kal thin. 
Psalms89:15 Thawm hlimawm hre thin hnam chu an eng a thawl e: Aw LALPA, anni chu i hmel engah an awm thin." 
Psalms89:16 I hming avangin nilengin an hlim thin a: I felna avangin chawimawiin an awm thin 
Psalms89:17 Nang chu an chakna ropuina i ni si a I duhsakna avangin kan ki hi chawimawiin an awm thin 
Psalms89:18 Kan phaw hi LALPA ta ani si a; Kan lal hi Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim ta a ni. 
Psalms89:19 Chu mi lai chuan i mi thianghlimte hnenah inlarnaah thu i sawi a, Mi pakhat chak tak chungah chuan tanpuina ka nghat a; Mi pakhat, mie zinga thlan chhuah chu ka chawimawi ta a." 
Psalms89:20 Ka chhiahhlawh Davida chu ka chhar a; Ka hriak thianghlim chuan amah chu ka thih ta a: 
Psalms89:21 Ka kut hi a hnenah tihnghehin a awm ang a; Ka ban hian ani chu a tichak ang. 
Psalms89:22 hmelma chuan a ngam lo ang a; Mi sual chuan a tlawm hek lo ang," 
Psalms89:23 Amah dotute chu ahmaah ka vaw thlu ang a, Amah hawtute chu ka sawisa ang." 
Psalms89:24 Ani hnenah erawh chuan ka rinawmna leh ka ngilneihna chu a awm ang a; Ka hming avangin a ki chu chawimawiin a awm bawk ang. 
Psalms89:25 A kut chu tuifinriatah chuan ka nghahtir ang a, A kut ding lam chu luipuiahte chuan." 
Psalms89:26 Ani chuan, 'Nang chu ka pa, Ka Pathian, ka inchhandamna lungpui i ni,' tiin, mi au vang," 
Psalms89:27 Tin, keiin ani chu fatirah ka siam ang a, Leia lalte zingah chngnungberah ka siam ang," 
Psalms89:28 Ka ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a tan ka vawn thatsak ang a, Ka thuthlun chu a hnenah a awm nghet ang." 
Psalms89:29 A chi thlahte chu kumkhuain ka awmtir ang a, A lalthutphah ch van awm chhung ni chenin ka awmtir bawk ang." 
Psalms89:30 A fate chuan ka dan hi an hawisan a, Ka rorelnate anga an awm loh a," 
Psalms89:31 Ka thuruat an bawhchiat a, Ka thupekte an vawn that loh chuan," 
Psalms89:32 An bawhchhiatnate chu tiangin ka rawn kan ang a, An khawlohnate chu vuakin ka rawn kan ang." 
Psalms89:33 Nimahsela, ka ngilneihna chu a hnen ata ka laksak vek lo ang a, Ka rinawmna chu data chan ka phal hek lo ang." 
Psalms89:34 Ka thuthlung chu ka bawhchhe lo ang a, Ka hmuia thu chhuak chu ka tidanglam hek lo ang." 
Psalms89:35 Vawi khat ka thianghlimna chhalin chhia ka chham a; Davida hnenah dawt ka saiw lo ang; 
Psalms89:36 A chi thlahte chu kumkhuain an awm ang a, A lalthutphah chu ka hmaah ni angin a awm bawk ang." 
Psalms89:37 Thla angin kumkhua aan tihnghehin a awm ang a, Van duma hretu rinawm ang khian,"" i ti a. (Selah)" 
Psalms89:38 Nimahsela nang chuan i thlauthlain i duh lo a, I hriak thiha chungah chuan i thin a rim ta a." 
Psalms89:39 I chhiahhlawh thuthlun chu i ten a: A lallukhum chu leia paih thla hialin i titlawm ta a. 
Psalms89:40 A dai zawng zawng chu i titlu a; A kulhbingte chu i tichhe ta a. 
Psalms89:41 Kawngka kal apiangin a thil an laksak thin a: A vela mite sawi chhiatin a lo awm ta a. 
Psalms89:42 Amah dotue kut ding lam chu i chawimawi a; A hmelma zawng zawngte chu i tihlim ta a. 
Psalms89:43 A ni, a khandaih hma chu i beng per a, Ani chu inbeihnaah chuan i din nghehtir ta lo a." 
Psalms89:44 A enna chu i tihrehsak a, A lalthuphah chu leiah i paih thla ta a." 
Psalms89:45 A tlangval lai nite chu i tihtawisak a; Ani chu mualphonain i khuh ta si a. (Selah) 
Psalms89:46 Aw LALPA, i biru kumkhua dawn em ni? Eng chen nge i thinrim chu mei anga a alh dawn le?" 
Psalms89:47 Aw, ka hun hi a tawi turzia hre reng la: Mihring fate zawng zawng hi i va siam engmahlo em!" 
Psalms89:48 Eng mi nge thih ni hmel hmu loa nung a, Seol kut atanga a nunna chhanhim tur chu? (Selah)" 
Psalms89:49 Lalpa, i hman lai khawngaihna i rinawmnaa Davida hnena chhechhama i tiamte kha, Khawiahnge a awm tak?" 
Psalms89:50 Lalpa, i chhiahhlawhte an sawi chhiatna hre reng ang che; Hnam chak takte zawng zawng sawichhiatna ka angchhunga ka tuar thinzia hi;"

Psalms90:1 Lalpa, nang chu chhuan zawng zawng chenah Kan awmna i ni thin." 
Psalms90:2 Tlangte pian hmaa, Leilung leh khawvel i din hma pawh khan, Chatuan ata chatuan thleng pawhin nang chu Pathian i ni." 
Psalms90:3 Nang chuan mihring hi boralnaah i kirtir thin a; Mihring fate u, kir leh rawh u,m"" i ti thin." 
Psalms90:4 Nang ngaih chuan kum sangkhat hi Nimin ral ta ang lek kha ani si a, Zan ven khat chhung ang lek bawk a ni." 
Psalms90:5 Anni chu tui lian angin i len bo thin a; thang khat mu ang chauh an ni; Zingah chuan hlobet chawr chuak ang an ni. 
Psalms90:6 Zingah chuan a lo duahin a chawr chhuak a; Tlai lamah chuan ah thlukin a awm a, a vuai thin." 
Psalms90:7 I thinurnaa tihboralin kan awm a, I thinrimnaa tihmanganin kan awm bawk si a." 
Psalms90:8 Kan khawlohnate chu i hmaah i dah a, Kan sual zep rukte chu i hmel engah i dah ta a." 
Psalms90:9 Kan dam chhung ni zawng zawng hi i thinrimnaah a ral thin a: Kan dam chhung kumte hi thawnthu angin kan titawp thin. 
Psalms90:10 Kan dam chhung kumte chu kum sawmsarih ani a, Chakna avangin kum sawmriat pawh a ni thei a; Nimahsela a reina chu thawhrimna leh lungngaihna mai a ni; A ral thuai a, keini pawh kan thlawk bo thin a nih hi." 
Psalms90:11 Tuing nge i thinurna thiltihtheihzia hria a, Nangmah tih turzia ang i thinrimna chu hria le?" 
Psalms90:12 Kan dam chhung nite chhiar dan tur min zirtir ang che, Finna thinlung kan neih phah hialna turin." 
Psalms90:13 Aw LALPA, lo kir leh ang hche; eng chen nge i thinur dawn? I chhiahhlawhte chung thu-ah chuan i rilru lamlet ang che." 
Psalms90:14 Aw, zingah chuan i ngilneihnain mi titlai ang che; Kan dam chhung zawng zawng hian kan hlima kan lawm theihna turin." 
Psalms90:15 Nangin min tihhreawm ni leh, thil tha lo kan tawh kum chhung hun angte khan min tilawm ang che." 
Psalms90:16 I hnathawh chu i chhiahhlawhte hnenah lang se la, I ropuina chu an fate hnenah lang rawh se.Tin, LALPA kan Pathian mawina chu kan chungah awm rawh se: Kan kut hnathawh hi kan chungah tinghet bawk ang che; A ni, kan kut hnathawh hi tinghet ang che." 
Psalms90:17 Tin, LALPA kan Pathian mawina chu kan chungah awm rawh se: Kan kut hnathawh hi kan chungah tinghet bawk ang che; A ni, kan kut hnathawh hi tinghet ang che." 
Psalms91:1 Chungnungbera bihrukna hmuna awma chu Engkimtitheia hlimah chuan a awm reng ang. 
Psalms91:2 LALPA chung thu-ah chuan, ""Ani chu ka inhumhimna leh ka kulhpui; Ka Pathian, ka rina chu a ni,"" ka ti ang." 
Psalms91:3 Ani chuan thang kamtu thang lakah leh Hri tha lo tak lakah chuan a chhanhim dawn che a ni. 
Psalms91:4 A thlain a khuh ang chia, A thla hnuaiah chuan i tlu lut ang; A thutak chu phawte leh phaw lian a ni." 
Psalms91:5 Zana thil rapthlak chu i hlau lo ang a, Chhuna thla lo leng thin chu i hlau hek lo ang:" 
Psalms91:6 Thim hnuai ahri leng thin chu i hlau lo ang a, Chhun laia thil tichhe thin chhiatna chu i hlau hek lo ang." 
Psalms91:7 I sirah sang an tlu ang a, I ding lamah sing an tlu bawk a; Nimahsela nang chu a hnaih lo ang che." 
Psalms91:8 I mitin i en ang a, Mi suaksualte rulhna chu a hmuhin i hmu chauh ang." 
Psalms91:9 Aw LALPA, nang hchu ka inhumhimna i ni si! Chungnungbera chu i awmna'n i hmang a;" 
Psalms91:10 thil tha lo reng rengin a tawk lo ang chian, Hri reng reng pawhin i puan in a rawn hnaih hek lo ang." 
Psalms91:11 I kawng tinrenga humhim tur chein, I chung thu-ah zawng vantirhkohte chu thu a pe dawn si a." 
Psalms91:12 An kutin an dawm ang chia, Chutilochuan i kein lung i chhuih dah ang e." 
Psalms91:13 Sakeibaknei leh rulrial chu i rap ang a: Sakeibaknei vanglai leh rulpui chu i chil nek ang. 
Psalms91:14 Ka chungah a hmangaihna a nghah tlat avangin ka chhanhim ang a: Ka hming a hriat avangin hmun sangah ka hlang a.

Psalms91:16 Dam reinain ka tilungawi ang a, Ka chhandamna chu ka hmuhtir bawk ang." 
Psalms92:1 LALPA hnena lawm thu sawi leh, Aw Chungnungber, i hming faka zi hi thil tha tak ani a:" 
Psalms92:2 ,3 Thil tum theih hrui sawm nei mi te, perhkhuang te, tingtang lung tichhe thei tea Zinga i ngilneihna tihlan leh, Zan tin, i rinawmna tihlan hi thil tha tak a ni." 
Psalms92:3 ,2 Thil tum theih hrui sawm nei mi te, perhkhuang te, tingtang lung tichhe thei tea Zinga i ngilneihna tihlan leh, Zan tin, i rinawmna tihlan hi thil tha tak a ni." 
Psalms92:4 LALPA, nang chuan i hnathawhin mi tilawm si a: I kut thiltihte avangin hlimin ka zai ang." 
Psalms92:5 Aw LALPA, i thiltihte chu a va ropui em! I ngaihtuahnate chu a thuk em em a ni." 
Psalms92:6 Mi mawl chuan hei hi a hre lo a; Mi ain a hre thiam hek lo: 
Psalms92:7 Mi suaksualte hlobet anga an lo chawr a, Thil tisualtute zawng zawng an lo duah hluah hluah hian, Kumkhua atana tihboralin an awm dawn a lo ni thin, tih hi:" 
Psalms92:8 Aw LALPA, nang erawh chu kumkhua atan sang taka rawm reng i ni." 
Psalms92:9 Aw LALPA, ngai teh, nangmah dotute hi, Ngai teh, nangmah dotute hi an boral dawn a ni; Thil tisualtute zawng zawng hi tihdarhin an awm vek ang." 
Psalms92:10 Nimahsela ka ki hi selepa ki angin i chawimawi a: Hriak thara thih ka ni ta. 
Psalms92:11 Ka mitin ka hmelmate chunga ka thu duhsam thleng chu ahmu ta a, Ka bengin thil tha lo titu mi rawn beitute chunga ka thu duhsam thleng thawm chu a hre ta." 
Psalms92:12 Mi fel chu tum angin a duah hluah hluah ang a: Lebanon tlanga sidar thing angin a thang uak uak ang. 
Psalms92:13 LALPA ina phunte chu Kan Pathian biak in hung chung kawtlaiah chuan an duah hluah hluh ang. 
Psalms92:14 Tar hnuah pawh an la rah fo ang a; Tui pai teuhin an hring hluah hluah ang:LALPA chu mi dik tak ani tih lantirna turin; Ani chu ka lungpui ani a, amahah chuan fel lohna reng reng a awm lo." 
Psalms92:15 LALPA chu mi dik tak ani tih lantirna turin; Ani chu ka lungpui ani a, amahah chuan fel lohna reng reng a awm lo." 
Psalms93:1 LALPA chu lalah a thu a, a ropuinain a inthuam a; LALPA chu a inthuam a, chaknain ataiah a inhreng ta a: Khawvel pawh hi, a nghin theih lohna turin, tihnghehin a awm a." 
Psalms93:2 I lalthutphah chu hmasanga lo tihngheh tawha ni a: Nang chu chatuana awm tawh i ni. 
Psalms93:3 Aw LALPA, luipuite chuan an chhuah a, Luipuite chuan an aw an chhuah a, Luipuite chuan an ri nasa tak chu an chhuah a." 
Psalms93:4 Tui tam tak awte aiin, Tuifinriat fawn chak takte ai pawhin, Chung lama LALPA chu a chak a ni.I thuhriattirte chu a rinawm em em a: Aw LALPA, kumkhuain Thianghlimna hi i in nen a inmawi a ni." 
Psalms93:5 I thuhriattirte chu a rinawm em em a: Aw LALPA, kumkhuain Thianghlimna hi i in nen a inmawi a ni." 
Psalms94:1 Aw LALPA, nang phuba lakna thu neitu Pathian, Nang phuba lakna thu neitu Pathian, eng chhuak ang che." 
Psalms94:2 Nang leia roreltu, thawk la: Chapote chu an sual man rul ang che." 
Psalms94:3 LALPA, mi suaksualte chuan eng chen nge, Mi suaksualte chuan eng chen nge an ngam dawn le?" 
Psalms94:4 Anni chu an tawng mai mai a, chaltlai takin thu an sawi a: Thil tisualtute zawng zawng chu an infak chawp thin." 
Psalms94:5 Aw LALPA, i mite chu an tikeh sawm a, I rochan chu an tihreawm thin" 
Psalms94:6 Hmeithai leh mikhual chu an tihlum a, Pa nei lo chu an that thin." 
Psalms94:7 LALPA'n a hmu lo ang a, Jakob-ho Pathianin a ngaihtuah hek lo ang,"" an ti thin a ni." 
Psalms94:8 Mi zinga mi mawlte u, ngaihtuah rawh u: Mi ate u, engtikah nge in fin awn aw?" 
Psalms94:9 Beng vuahtu chuan a hre lo ang em ni? Mit siamtu chuan a hmu lo ang em ni? 
Psalms94:10 Hnam tin thununtu'n a zilhhau lo ang em ni, Mihring finna zirtirtu chuan?" 
Psalms94:11 LALPA chuan mihring ngaihtuahte chu Engmah lo mai mai ani tih a hria. 
Psalms94:12 ,13 LALPA i thununa i dan i zirtirte chua n nihlawh e, Mi sualte tlakna'n hum laih zawh hma chu. Mangan niah i hahchawlhtir dawn sia." 
Psalms94:13 ,12 LALPA i thununa i dan i zirtirte chua n nihlawh e, Mi sualte tlakna'n hum laih zawh hma chu. Mangan niah i hahchawlhtir dawn sia." 
Psalms94:14 LALPA chuan amite apaih thlu dawn si lo a. A rochan chu akalsan hek lo ang. 
Psalms94:15 rorelna chu felna lamah a kir leh ang a: Thinlung dik tak pu zawng anwg chuan chu chu an zui ang. 
Psalms94:16 Tunge thil tha lo titute mi beisak turin tho ang? Tunge thil tisualtute mi beisak turin ding ang? 
Psalms94:17 LALPA chu mi tanpuitu ni suh se la chuan, Ka nunna hi rang takin hmun rehah a awm tawh tur a ni." 
Psalms94:18 Ka ke a tleu ve,"" ka tih kha, Aw LALPA, i ngilneihna chuan mi kai a." 
Psalms94:19 Ka rilrua ngaihtuah tam tak ka neih lai chuan I thlamuannate chuan ka nunna hi a tihlum thin. 
Psalms94:20 Suahsualna lalthutphah, dana thil tihsualna siam thina chuan Pawlna che a nei dawn em ni?" 
Psalms94:21 Mi fel nunna bei tumin an pung khawm hlawm thin a, Thisen sawiselbo chu thiam loh an chantir bawk thin." 
Psalms94:22 Nimahsela LALPA chu ka kulhbing sang a lo ni a; Ka Pathian chu ka inhumhimna lungpui a lo ni.Ani chuan anmahni sualna ngei chu an chungah atlaktir a, Anmahni that lohna ngeiah chuan a tiboral ang a; LALPA kan Pathian chuan a tiboral ang." 
Psalms94:23 Ani chuan anmahni sualna ngei chu an chungah atlaktir a, Anmahni that lohna ngeiah chuan a tiboral ang a; LALPA kan Pathian chuan a tiboral ang." 
Psalms95:1 Aw lo kal rawh u, LALPA chawimawiin hlim takin i zai ang u: Kan inchhandamna lungpui chawimawiin hlim takin i au ang u." 
Psalms95:2 Lawm thu sawiin a hmaah i kal ang u khai, Fakna hla saa amah chawimawiin hlim takin aw i chhuah ang." 
Psalms95:3 LALPA chu Pathian ropui tak a ni si a, Pathian zawng zawng chungah Lal ropi tak a ni." 
Psalms95:4 Ama kutah chuan lei hmun thuk takte chu a awm a; Tlang chhip sang takte chu a ta a ni b awk a. 
Psalms95:5 Tuifinriat hi a ta a ni, ama siam a ni si a; Khawmual pawh hi a kut chhuak a ni." 
Psalms95:6 Aw lo kal u la, chibai bukin i kun ang u khai; LALPA min Siamtu hmaah i thingthi ang u:" 
Psalms95:7 Ani chu kan Pathian ani a, Keini hi a ran tlatna hmuna m leh, a kuta beramhote kan ni si a. Vawiin hian a aw chu lo hre teh u la aw!" 
Psalms95:8 Meriba-a an tih ang khan in thinlung tikahuh suh u, Thlalera Masa ni ang khan:" 
Psalms95:9 Chu mi lai chuan in thlahtute chuan mi thlem a, Mi fiah a, ka thiltih chu an hmu a." 
Psalms95:10 kum sawmli chhung zet chu mi chhuanho chungah chuan ka lungni lo a, ""An thnlunga ngaihsual hmang mi an ni a, Ka kawngte pawh an hre lo,"" ka ti a:Chuvangin, ""Ka chawlhnaah chuan an lut lo ang,"" tiin, Thinurin chhia ka chham ta a." 
Psalms95:11 Chuvangin, ""Ka chawlhnaah chuan an lut lo ang,"" tiin, Thinurin chhia ka chham ta a." 
Psalms96:1 Aw LALPA chawimawiin hla thar sa u la: Leilung luah zawng zawngte u, LALPA chawimawiin zai rawh u." 
Psalms96:2 LALPA chawimawia hla sain, ahming fak u la; Ni tin, a chhandamna thu chu hriattir rawh u." 
Psalms96:3 Hnam tin zingah a ropuizia hril u la, Mi tinrengte zingah a thilmak tihte chu hril rawh u." 
Psalms96:4 LALPA chu a ropui a, nasa taka fak tur ani si a: Pathian zawng zawng aia tih tur a ni." 
Psalms96:5 Mipuiho pathiante chu milemte an ni si a. LALPA erawh chuan vante khi a siam a ni. 
Psalms96:6 Chawimawina leh ropuina a hmaah an awm a: Chakna leh mawina chu a hmun thianghlimah an awm. 
Psalms96:7 Mi tina chi tinreng te u, LALPA chu pe u la, LALPA chu ropuina leh chakna pe rawh u." 
Psalms96:8 LALPA chu a hming ropuina chu pe u la: Thilhlan tur kengin a biak in hung chhung kawtlaiahte chuan lo kal rawh u. 
Psalms96:9 Aw, thianghlim mawina inbelin LALPA chu chibai buk u la: Leilung luah zawng zawngte u, a hmaah khur rawh u." 
Psalms96:10 Hnam tin zingah chuan, ""LALPA chu lalah a thu,"" ti rawh u: Khawvel pawh hi a nghin theih lohna turin, tihnghehin a awm a: Ani chuan thlei bik nei loin mi tin, ro chu a rel ang." 
Psalms96:11 Vante khi lawm takin awm se la, lei pawh hi hlim takin awm rawh se; Tuifinriat leh a chhunga thil awm zawng anwg hi ri hum hum rawh se;" 
Psalms96:12 Lo leh a chhunga awm zawng anwg hi lawm takin awm rawh se: Chutih hunah chuan ramhnuaia thing zawng zawng hi hlimin an zai ang,LALPA hmaah chan: ani chu alo kal edawn a ni; Lei rorel turin a lo kal dawn si a: Khawvel hi fel takin ro a relsak ang a, Mi tinte chu a thutakin ro a relsak bawk ang." 
Psalms96:13 LALPA hmaah chan: ani chu alo kal edawn a ni; Lei rorel turin a lo kal dawn si a: Khawvel hi fel takin ro a relsak ang a, Mi tinte chu a thutakin ro a relsak bawk ang." 
Psalms97:1 LALPA chu lalah a thu a; lei hi hlim takin awm se la; Thliarkar tam tak takte chu lawm takin awm rawh se. 
Psalms97:2 Chhumte leh thim chhah mup chu a velah a awm a: Felna leh rorelna fel chu a lalthutthleng nghahchhan a ni. 
Psalms97:3 A hma lamah chuan mei akal a, A vela mah dotute chu a kangral thin." 
Psalms97:4 A kawlphete chuan khawvel hi a en zawk zawk a: lei hian a hmu a, a khur a," 
Psalms97:5 Tlangte chu khawihnun ang hian LALPA hmaah a tuiral ta a, Khawvel zawng zawng LALPA hmaah chuan." 
Psalms97:6 Vante khian a felna chu atlangaupui thin a, Mi tinreng chuan a ropuizia an hmu ta a." 
Psalms97:7 Milem siam chawpte rawngbawltu zawng anwg chu mualphoin awm rawh se, Milemho chhuangtue chu: Nangni pathian zawng zawngte u, amah chibai buk rawh u." 
Psalms97:8 Zion tlang chuan a hria a, lawm takin a awm a, Juda fanute chu hlim takin an awm bawk a;" 
Psalms97:9 Aw, LALPA i rorelnate avangin. LALPA nang hchu leilung zawng anwg chungah hian chungnung ber i ni si a: Nang chu pathian zawng zawng chung daihah chawimawiin i awm a" 
Psalms97:10 Aw LALPA hmangaihtute u, sual haw rawh u. Ani chuan ami thianghlimte nunna chu a vang tha thin a; Anni chu mi suaksualte kut ata a chhanhim thin." 
Psalms97:11 Mi felte tan khua alo eng a, Thinlung dikte tan lawmna alo thleng.Mi felte u, LALPA-ah lawm takin awm u la; A hming thianghlim chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms97:12 Mi felte u, LALPA-ah lawm takin awm u la; A hming thianghlim chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms98:1 Aw, LALPA chawimawiin hla thar sa rawh u; Thil mak takte a ti ta si a: A kut ding lam leh a ban thianghlim chuan amah atan chhandamna a siamsak ta a." 
Psalms98:2 LALPA chuan a chhandamna chu ahriattir a: A felna chu hnam tin mithmuhah chuan fiah takin alantir ta a. 
Psalms98:3 Israel chhungte chunga a ngilneihzia leh a rinawmzia chu a hre reng a: Kawlkila mi zawng zawng pawhin kan Pathian chhandamna chu an hmu ta a. 
Psalms98:4 Leilung luah zawng zawngte u, LALPA chawimawiin hlim takin au u la: Au chhuak u la hlimin zai rawh u, a ni, fakna hla sa rawh u." 
Psalms98:5 tingtang nen LALPA fakin zai rawh u; tingtang leh fakna hla thawm nen. 
Psalms98:6 Tawtawrawtte leh tawtawrawt bi nei ri nen, Lalber, LALPA hmaah chuan, hlim takin au rawh u." 
Psalms98:7 Tuifinriat leh a chhunga thil awm zawng zawng hi ri hum hum rawh se; Khawvel leh a chhunga chengte nen hian;

Psalms99:1 LALPA chu lalah a thu a; mi tin, chu khur rawh se: Ani chu cherubte chungah athu a; lei hi nghing rawh se." 
Psalms99:2 LALPA chu Zion khaw chhungah chuan ropui tak ani a; Mi tinrengte chungah chuan chungnung daih a ni. 
Psalms99:3 Anni chuan i hming ropui tak hlauhawm tak chu fak rawh se; Amah chu a thianghlim a ni. 
Psalms99:4 Lalber chakna chuan rorelna a ngaina a; Nang chuan thlei bik neih lohna i tinghet thin a, Nang chuan Jakob-ho zingah ro i rel a, fel takin i ti thin." 
Psalms99:5 LALPA kan Pathian chu chawimawi u la, A ke nghahchhan bulah chuan chibai buk rawh u: Amah chu a thianghlim a ni." 
Psalms99:6 A puithiamte zingah chuan Mosia leh Arona, A hming lamtute zingah chuan Samuela; Anni chuan LALPA chu an ko a, ani chuan a chhang ta a:" 
Psalms99:7 Chhumdingah chuan an hnenah thu a sawi a: A thuhriattirte leh thuruat a pek chu an zawm a. 
Psalms99:8 Aw LALPA kan Pathian, nang chuan anni chu i chhang a: Nang chu anmahni ngaidamtu Pathian i ni, An thiltih chungahte phuba la thin mah la.LALPA kan Pathian chu chawimawi u la, A tlang thianghlimah chuan chibai buk rawh u; LALPA kan Pathian chu a thianghlim si a."

Psalms100:1 Ram zawng zawngte u, LALPA chawimawiin hlim takin au rawh u." 
Psalms100:2 Lawm chungin LALPA rawng bawl u la: Hla sa chungin a hmaah lo kal rawh u. 
Psalms100:3 LALPA chu Pathian ani tih hre rawh u: Min siamtu chu amah chu ani a, ama ta kan ni. A mit leh a ran tlatna hmuna beramhote chu kan ni." 
Psalms100:4 Lawm thu sawi chungin a kawng kharah chuan lut u la, Fak chungin a biak in hung chhng kawtlaiah chuan lut rawh u: A hnenah lawm thu saiw u la, a hming chu fak rawh u.LALPA chu a tha si a; angilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm ang a; A rinawmna chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a awm ang." 
Psalms100:5 LALPA chu a tha si a; angilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm ang a; A rinawmna chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a awm ang. 
Psalms101:1 Ngilneihna leh rorelna thu chu hla-ah ka sa ang a: Aw LALPA, nangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms101:2 Kawng tha famkimah chuan fing takin ka awm ang a: Aw engtikah nge ka hnenah i lo kal ang? Ka in chhungah thinlung tha famkim puin ka awm ang. 
Psalms101:3 thil tha lo reng reng ka mithmuhah chuan ka dah lo ang: Kal pengte thiltih chu ka hua a ni; Keimahah a bet lo ang. 
Psalms101:4 Thinlung luhlul chuan mi kalsan ang a: Thil sual reng reng ka mithmuhah chuan ka dah lo ang: 
Psalms101:5 Tupawh a vengte a ruka rel apiang chu, chu mi chu ka tiboral anga; Mit sang leh thinlung chapo pu mi chukangaithei lo ang." 
Psalms101:6 He rama mirinawmte chunga hian ka mit a fu ang, ka hnena an awm theihna'n. Kawng tha famkim zawhtu chu, chu mihuan ka a rawng a bawl ang." 
Psalms101:7 Bumhmang mi chu ka in chhungah a awm lo ang a: Dawt heh mi chu ka mithmuhah tihnghehin a awm lo ang.Tuk tin, he rama mi suaksualte zawng zawng hi ka tiboral ang; LALPA khawpui ata hi thil tisualtute zawng zawng tiboral turin." 
Psalms101:8 Tuk tin, he rama mi suaksualte zawng zawng hi ka tiboral ang; LALPA khawpui ata hi thil tisualtute zawng zawng tiboral turin." 
Psalms102:1 Aw LALPA, ka tawngtaina hi ngaithla la, Ka au thawm hi i hnen thleng rawh se." 
Psalms102:2 Ka mangan niah ka lakah hian i hmai thup suh la: Ka lamah hian i beng rawn dawh la; Ka koh hun che chuan mi chhang thuai ang che. 
Psalms102:3 Ka dam chhung nite hi meikhu angin a zam ral a, Ka ruhte hi thingthu angin a sa a." 
Psalms102:4 Ka thinlung hi hlobet anga em hlumin a awm a, a vuai zo ta; Chaw ei pawh ka theihnghilh si a." 
Psalms102:5 Ka rum thawm avangin Ka ruhte hi ka tisaah a bet tlat a ni. 
Psalms102:6 Thlaler tuivalawng ang ka nia; Khaw ram chhimbuk ang mai ka lo ni ta. 
Psalms102:7 Ka meng reng a, Chawngzawng, in chunga amah chauh va awm ang ka lo ni ta." 
Psalms102:8 Mi dotute chuan nilengin mi sawichhe thin a; Ka chunga kawlhte chuan keimah anga awm turin anchhia na lawh thin. 
Psalms102:9 Vut hi chaw nagin ka ei a, Ka in tur chu mittui nen ka pawlh ta si a," 
Psalms102:10 I lungnih loh em em leh i thinur avangin: Nangin mi la kang a, mi paih bo ta si a." 
Psalms102:11 Ka dam chhung nite hi tlai hlim ral lam tung tawh ang a ni a; Hlobet angin ka vuai ta a. 
Psalms102:12 Aw LALPA, ang erawh chu kumkhuain i awm ang a; Nangmah hriat rengna pawh chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a awm bawk ang." 
Psalms102:13 I tho ang a, Zion tlang chu i khawngaih ang: Ani chu khawngaih a hun tawh si a, a ni, hun ruat chu a tlang ta." 
Psalms102:14 I chhiahhlawhte chuan a lungte chu an ngainain, A vaivut pawh an khawngaih si a." 
Psalms102:15 Chutichuan hnam tinin LALPA hming chu an tih ang a, Leia lal zawng zawng chuan i ropuina chuan tih bawk ang." 
Psalms102:16 LALPA chuan Zion khua chu a din leh ta si a, A ropuinaa intuamin alang ta a;" 
Psalms102:17 Pachhiate tawngtaina ch angaihsak a, An tawngtaina chu ahmusit lo." 
Psalms102:18 Chu chu thangthar lo la awm tur tan chuan ziak ani ang a: Hnam siama lo la awm tur chuan LALPA chu an fak ang. 
Psalms102:19 Ani chuan ahmun thianghlim sang tak atangin a zuk en a; LALPA chuan van atang khian lei hi a hmu a; 
Psalms102:20 Mi tang rum chu ngaithla tur leh, Thi tura ruatte chu phelh turin;" 
Psalms102:21 ,22 LALPA rawngbawl tura Mi tin, leh ram tin, an inkhawm huna, Miten LALPA hming chu Zion khuaa na hrilh theih a, A fakna thu chu Jerusalem khuaa an hrilh theih nan." 
Psalms102:22 ,21 LALPA rawngbawl tura Mi tin, leh ram tin, an inkhawm huna, Miten LALPA hming chu Zion khuaa na hrilh theih a, A fakna thu chu Jerusalem khuaa an hrilh theih nan." 
Psalms102:23 Ani chuan kawng lakah hian ka tha a tithum a; Ka dam chhng hi a titawi a. 
Psalms102:24 Aw ka Pathian, ka vanglai niahte hian mi la bo suh ang che,"" ka ti a: Nanga kumte chu chhuan awm chhung zawng zawngin a awm ang." 
Psalms102:25 Leilung nghahchhan chu hmasanga i phum tawh ani a; Vante pawh i kut chhuak a ni. 
Psalms102:26 Chungte chu a la boral ang a, nang erawh chu i awm reng ang: A ni, chung zawng zawngte chu silhfen angin a la hlui ang a; Puan angin i thlak ang a, a lo danglam tawh ang:" 
Psalms102:27 Nang erawh chu i pangngai fo a, I kumte chuan ral ni reng a nei lo ang.I chhiahhlawhte fate chu an awm reng ang a, An thlahte chu i hmaah tihnghehin an awm ang." 
Psalms102:28 I chhiahhlawhte fate chu an awm reng ang a, An thlahte chu i hmaah tihnghehin an awm ang." 
Psalms103:1 Aw ka nuna, LALPA chu fak la; Ka kawchhunga awm zawng zawngte u, a hming thianghlim chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms103:2 Aw ka nunna, LALPA chu fak la, A thiltih that zawng zawng chu theihnghilh suh u." 
Psalms103:3 Ani chuan i khawlohna zawng zawng a ngaidam thin a; I natna zawng zawng a tidam thin a; 
Psalms103:4 Boralna lak ata i nun chu a tlan thin a; Ngilneihna leh lainatnate a khumtir thn chia; 
Psalms103:5 I ka chu thil thain a titlai thin a; Chutichuan i tleirawlna chu mupui anga siam tharin a awm leh thin. 
Psalms103:6 LALPA chuan, hnehchhiahna tuar zawng zawngte tan, Thil felte tihsakin, rote a relsak thin." 
Psalms103:7 A kawngte chu Mosia a hriattir a, A thiltihte chu Israela thlahte a hriattir bawk a." 
Psalms103:8 LALPA chu lainatnaa khat, mi khawngaih thei tak, Thinnel tak, ngilneihna ngah tak a ni." 
Psalms103:9 Ani chuan a hau lo fo ang a; A thinur chu a pai kumkhua hek lo ang. 
Psalms103:10 Kan sualnate angin kan chungah a ti lo a, Kan khawlohnate angin min thungrul hek lo." 
Psalms103:11 Van khi lei chung sang taka awm angin, Amah tihtute chunga a ngilneihna chu a nasa a ni." 
Psalms103:12 Chhak leh thlang a inhlat ang hian, Kan bawhchhiatnate ch kan hnen ata a dah sanw ta diah a." 
Psalms103:13 Pain a fate a khawngaih ang hian, LALPA chuan mah tihtue chu a khawngaih thin." 
Psalms103:14 Kan taksa siam dan hi a hriat a, Vaivut mai kan ni tih a hriat reng avangin." 
Psalms103:15 Mihring zawng, a dam chhung nite chu hlobet ang a ni a; Phul pangpar ang hian a vul thin a." 
Psalms103:16 Thliin a chhem a, a bo thin a ni; A awmna chuan a hre leh tawh lo ang." 
Psalms103:17 LALPA ngilneihna erawh chu amah tihtute chungah chuan chatuan ata chatuan thlengin a awm ang a, A felna pawh an tuchhuan thlengin a awm ang;" 
Psalms103:18 A thuthlun zawm apiangte leh, A thuhrilhte awih tuma hre reng apiangte chungah chuan." 
Psalms103:19 LALPA chuan alalthutphah chu vanahte khian a tinghet a; A ram chuan engkim chungah ro a rel a. 
Psalms103:20 A vantirhkohte u, A thu ngaithlaa, a thu zawm thin," 
Psalms103:21 LALPA chu fak rawh u: A sipaihote u, a duhzawng ti thin, a rawngbawltute u, LALPA chu fak rawh u.A rorelna hmun zawng zawnga a thiltih zawng zawngte u, LALPA chu fak rawh u: Aw ka nunna, LALPA chu fak rawh." 
Psalms103:22 A rorelna hmun zawng zawnga a thiltih zawng zawngte u, LALPA chu fak rawh u: Aw ka nunna, LALPA chu fak rawh." 
Psalms104:1 Aw ka nunna, LALPA chu fak rawh. Aw LALPA ka Pathian, nang chu i ropui em em a;" 
Psalms104:2 Chawimawina leh ropuinain i inthuam a. Nang chuan eng chu puan angin i inbel a; Vante khi puan in chung angin i kai pharh a: 
Psalms104:3 Ani chuan a pindan chungnung kalkhangte chu tuiahte khian a khang a: Chhumte khi a tawlailirah a siam a; Thli thla chungahte chuan a leng a: 
Psalms104:4 A vantirhkohte chu thliahte a chantir a; A rawngbawltute chu mei alh dur durah a chantir thin: 
Psalms104:5 Leilung nghahchhante chu a phum a, Kumkhuaa a nghin lohna'n." 
Psalms104:6 Nang chuan leilung hi tui thuk tak chu puan angin i sintir a; Tuite chu tlang chungahte chuan a awm po a. 
Psalms104:7 I zilhhauna avang chuan a tlan bo a; I khawpui ri thawm avang chuan a kal bo ta thuai a; 
Psalms104:8 Tlangahte a chho a, kawrahte a chhuk a, A tan hmun i buatsaih lamah chuan." 
Psalms104:9 A pelh loh turin ri i kham a; Lei chim pil tura alet leh tawh lohna turin. 
Psalms104:10 A ni chuan kawrahte chuan tuihnate a tir chhuak a; Tlang karahte chuan a luang a: 
Psalms104:11 Chungte chuan ram sa tinrengte in tur a pe thin a; Ram sabengtungte chuan an tuihal an tireh thin. 
Psalms104:12 A kamahte chuan chungleng savante awmna an nei thin a. Thing buk zingahte chuan an hram thin. 
Psalms104:13 Ani chuan a pindan chungnung atangte khian tlangte chu tuiin a chawm thin a: Lei hi i thiltih rahtein a tlai thin 
Psalms104:14 Hlobet chu rante tan a totir thin a, Thlai chu mihring hmanah a totir bawk thin; Lei atangin ei tur a chhuahtir theihna'n:" 
Psalms104:15 Mihring thinlung tihlawmna uain nen, A hmai tihmawmna tur hriak nen, Mihring thinlung tihchakna chhang nen." 
Psalms104:16 LALPA thingte chu a tlai thin; Lebanon tlanga sidar thing a phunnate chu. 
Psalms104:17 Chutah chuan savaten bu an chhep thin: Vacha erawh chu far thingte chu a in a ni. 
Psalms104:18 Tlang sangte chu sathar tan ani a; Luipuite chu sazupui tan inhumhimna a ni. 
Psalms104:19 Ani chuan thla khi hunbi hriatna'n a ruat a: Ni khian a tlak hun chu a hre thin. 
Psalms104:20 Nang chuan thim i siam a, zan a lo ni thin a; Chu mi hunah chuan ramhnuaia sa tinrengte chu an tla chuak thin." 
Psalms104:21 Sakeibaknei vanglaite chuan an sa seh tur chu hahum zuiin, Pathian hnen ata an ei tur an zawng thin." 
Psalms104:22 Ni a chhuak a, an kal bo a, An awmna puk theuhvahte chuan an mu thin a." 
Psalms104:23 Mihring chu hna thawkin a chhuak a, Tlai lam thlengin a thawk rim thin." 
Psalms104:24 Aw LALPA, i thiltihte chu a va tam em! Finnain i siam vek a ni: Leilung hi i hausaknain a khat a nih hi." 
Psalms104:25 Sawta saw tuifinriat a awm, nasa tak, zau tak mai chu, Saw mi-ah sawn thil bawkvaka kal chhiar sen loh a awm a, Sa te leh sa liante chu." 
Psalms104:26 Sawta saw lawngpuite a kal saw; Sawtah sawn Liviathan a awm, a chhunga inkhel tura i siamna chu." 
Psalms104:27 Chung zawng zawng chuan an nghak theuh che a ni, A hun taka an chaw i pek theih thinna turin." 
Psalms104:28 Anmahni i pek an chhar thin a; I kut i phar a, thatnain an tlai thin." 
Psalms104:29 I hmai i thup a, an mangang thin a; An thaw chu i laksak a, an thi a," 
Psalms104:30 An vaivutah chuan an kir leh thin. I thlarau chu i tir chhuak a, siamin an awm thin a; Lei chung pawh hi i siam thar leh thin." 
Psalms104:31 LALPA ropuina chu kumkhuain awm se la; LALPA ch a thiltihahte chuan hlim rawh se: 
Psalms104:32 Ani chuan lei hi a en a, a khur thin a; Tlangte chu a khawih a, a khu chhuak thin." 
Psalms104:33 Ka dam chhung zawngin LALPA chawimawiin hla ka sa ang a: Ka nun chhung zawngin ka Pathian fakin ka zai ang. 
Psalms104:34 Ka ngaihtuahna hi a tan thlum ak ni rawh se; Kei chu LALPA-ah chuan ka hlim ang.Mi sualte chu lei atang hian tihboralin awm se la, Mi suaksualte chu awm tawh suh se. Aw ka nuna, LALPA chu fak rawh. LALPA chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms104:35 Mi sualte chu lei atang hian tihboralin awm se la, Mi suaksualte chu awm tawh suh se. Aw ka nuna, LALPA chu fak rawh. LALPA chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms105:1 Aw LALPA hnenah lawm thi hril u la, a hming lam rawh u; Mi tin, zingah chuan a thiltihte chu hriattir rawh u." 
Psalms105:2 Amah chawimawiin hla sa u la, amah fakin zai rawh u; A thilmak tih zawng zawng thu chu titi rawh u." 
Psalms105:3 A hming thianghlim chu chuang rawh u. LALPA zawngtute thinlung chi hlim rawh se. 
Psalms105:4 LALPA leh a chakna chu zawng u la; A hmel chu zawng fo rawh u. 
Psalms105:5 ,6 Aw, a chhiahhlawh Abrahama thlahte u, Jakoba thlah, a thlante u, A thilmak tihte hre reng rawh u; A thilmakte leh a kaa a rorel chuakte chu." 
Psalms105:6 ,5 Aw, a chhiahhlawh Abrahama thlahte u, Jakoba thlah, a thlante u, A thilmak tihte hre reng rawh u; A thilmakte leh a kaa a rorel chuakte chu." 
Psalms105:7 Ani chu LALPA kan Pathian chu a ni a: A rorelte chu lei chung zawng zawngah hian a awm. 
Psalms105:8 A thuthlun chu kumkhuain a hre thin a, Chhuan sangkhat thlenga a thu lo pek chu;" 
Psalms105:9 Abrahama hnena a thuthlun leh, Isaaka hnena a chhechham chu;" 
Psalms105:10 Chu vek chu thuriat atan Jakoba hnenah a tinghet a, Israela hnena kumkhaw thungthlung atan:"
