Psalms105:14 Tuma hnehchhiah a phal lo va: A ni, anmahni avangin lalte pawh a zilhhau a;" 
Psalms105:15 Ka hriak thihate chu tawk suh u la, Ka zawlneite pawi reng reng pawh khawih suh u,"" tiin." 
Psalms105:16 Chu mi rama tla turin tam a ko a; Ei tur reng reng a awm lohtir ta a. 
Psalms105:17 An hmaah mi a tir a; Josefa chu chhiahhlawh atan hralhin a awm a: 
Psalms105:18 A kete chu kawlin a tina a; Thir khaidiat bunin a awm ta a: 
Psalms105:19 A thu a thlen h ma loh chuan; LALPA thuin amah chu a fiah thin a. 
Psalms105:20 Lalber chuan mi a tir a, a phelh a, A chauh ta a, mi tin, roreltu ngei chuan." 
Psalms105:21 A chhungte chunga hotuah leh, A sum zawng zawng chunga roreltuah a siam a:" 
Psalms105:22 A mi liante chu a duh duha phur tur leh, A upaho tifing turin." 
Psalms105:23 Israela pawh chu Aiguipta ramah a kal a; Jakoba chu Hama ramah chuan a awm ta rih a. 
Psalms105:24 A mite chu nasa takin a tipung a, Anmahni dotute aiin a tichak ta zawk a." 
Psalms105:25 A mite haw turin an thinlung a lamlettir a, A chhiahhlawhte chunga vervek taka ti turin." 
Psalms105:26 A chhiahhlawh Mosia chu a tir a, A mi thlan Arona nen." 
Psalms105:27 Anni chuan a chhinchhiahnate chu an zingah an entir a, Hama ramah chuan thilmakte an entir a." 
Psalms105:28 Ani chuan thim a tir a, a tithim ta a; Tichuan a thute chu an hnial ta lo a." 
Psalms105:29 An tuite chu thisenah a chantir a, An sanghate chu a tihlum ta a." 
Psalms105:30 An ram chu chunguin a khat ta a, An lalte pindanah lam pawh." 
Psalms105:31 Ani chuan thu a sawi a, tichuan tho tam tak a lo kal a, Hrik pawh an ram chhung zawng zawngah a lo kal bawk a." 
Psalms105:32 An hnenah ruah aiah rial a pe a, An ramah chuan mei alh zawk zawk a pe ta bawk a." 
Psalms105:33 An grep hruite leh an theipui kungte a tithi a; An rama thingte chu a titliak ta bawk a. 
Psalms105:34 Ani chuan thu a sawi a, tichuan khaukhuapte an lo kal a, Pangangte nen, chhiar sen rual loh mai hian." 
Psalms105:35 Chunge chuan an rama thlai tinrenget chu an ei zoa, An lei rahte pawh an ei zo ta bawk a." 
Psalms105:36 An rama fa tir awm zawng zawng a tihlum a, An chakna zawng zawng rah hmasa berte chu." 
Psalms105:37 Tichuan, tangka leh rangkachak nen a hruai chhuak ta a: Anma hnamte zingah chuan mi chak lo pakhat mah an awm lo." 
Psalms105:38 An chhuah lai chuan Aigupta-ho chu an lawm a: Anni chu an lo hlauh tak avangin. 
Psalms105:39 Ani chuan hliahtu atan chhum a zamtir a, Zana en turin mei a pe bawk a." 
Psalms105:40 An dil a, tichuan vahmim a rawn hruai a, Van chawin anmahni a titlai ta a." 
Psalms105:41 Lungpui chu a hawng a, tichuan tui a lo chhuak dur dur a, Hmun rovahte chuan lui ang mai hian a luang ta a." 
Psalms105:42 A thu thianghlim kha a hre reng si a, A chhiahhlawh Abrahama nen khan."

Psalms106:2 Tunge LALPA thiltih ropui takte chu sawi thei a, A fakna zawng zawng hriattir vek thei le?" 
Psalms106:3 rorelna vawng thate chu an eng a thawl e, Englai pawha fel taka titu nen."

Psalms106:5 I mi thlante nihlawhna ka hmuh theih a, I rochanho nena ka chhuan theihna'n." 
Psalms106:6 Min thlahtute nen khan thil kan tisual a, Thil sual kan ti a, sual takin kan ti ta a."

Psalms106:8 Chuti chung pawhin ama hming avangin anni chu a chhandam ta a, A thiltihtheihna ropui tak chu a hriattir theihna turin."

Psalms106:10 Anmahni hawtu kut ata chu a chhandam a, Hmelma kut ata chu a tlan ta a." 
Psalms106:11 Tuite chuan anmahni dotute chu a khuh zo a, Pakhat mah dama chhuak an awm ta lo a." 
Psalms106:12 Chu mi lai chuan a thute chu an ring a; A fakna hla an sa a. 
Psalms106:13 Nimahsela a thiltihte ch an theihnghilh ta thuai a; A remruat chu an nghak peih lo va: 
Psalms106:14 Thlalerah chuan thil an chak em em a, Ram rovah chuan Pathian an fiah ta zawk a." 
Psalms106:15 An thil dil chu a pe a; Nimahsela an nunnaah chan cherna aluhtir ta a. 
Psalms106:16 An riahhmunah chuan Mosia chu an itsik a, LALPA mi thianghlim Arona nen." 
Psalms106:17 Lei chu a ang a, Dathana chu a lem a, Abirama pawlte chu a khuh zo ta a." 
Psalms106:18 An pawl zingah chuan mei tihalhin a lo awm a; Meialh chuan mi suaksualte chu a kang ral ta. 
Psalms106:19 Horeb tlangah chuan bawng no lem an sima a, A lem chhun chu an be ta a." 
Psalms106:20 Chutiang chuan an ropuina chu Bawngpa hlobet ei mi ang lekah an chantir ta a.

Psalms106:24 A ni, ram duhawm tak chu an ngainep a, A thu chu an ring duh lo a;"

Psalms106:33 A thlarau chunga an hel a, A hmuia tha lo taka a sawi avangin." 
Psalms106:34 LALPA'n an hnena tihboral thu a pek angin Mipuihote ch an tiboral lo a. 
Psalms106:35 Hnam tin chu an pawlh a, An thiltihte chu an zir zawk a." 
Psalms106:36 An milem rawngte an bawl a; Chung chu an tant hang a lo ni ta a.

Psalms106:39 Chutiang chuan an hnathawhtea tihbawrhbanin an awm a, An thiltihahte chuan an lo uire ta a." 
Psalms106:40 Chuvangin LALPA thin chu a mite chungah a thawk a, A rochan chu a ten ta a." 
Psalms106:41 Tichuan anni chu hnam tin kutah a pe a; Anmahni hawtute chuan an chungah ro an rel ta a. 
Psalms106:42 Anmahni dotuten an hnehchhiah a, An kut hnuaiah chuan tihtlawmin an awm ta a." 
Psalms106:43 Vawi tam tak anni chu a chhanhim a; Nimahsela a remruatnaah chuan an hel thin a, An khawlohnaah chuan tihhniamin an awm ta a." 
Psalms106:44 Chuti chung pawhin ani chuan, an au thawm a hriat chuan, An mangang chu a ngaihsak a:" 
Psalms106:45 A thuthlun chu anmahni a hriatsak reng a, A ngilneihna nasat avangin a rilru a lamlet ta a."

Psalms107:20 A thu chu a tir chhuak a, anni chu a tidam thin a, An boralna tur atate chu a chhandam thin."

Psalms107:29 Thlipui chu a tibang thuap a, Chutichuan a tuifawnte a reh thup thin." 
Psalms107:30 Tin, a reh tak avangin an lawm thin a; Ani chuan an ngaih tak thli upah chuan a hruai thleng thin."

Psalms107:35 Thlaler chu dilah a chantir thin a, Ram ro chu tuihnaahte a chantir bawk thin."

Psalms107:39 Tin, hnehchhiahna te, hrehawmna te lungngaihna te avangin, An hmuih ta telh telh a, an kun ta tlawk tlawk thung a."

Psalms107:41 Nimahsela retheite chu hrehawmna atangin hmun sangah a hlang thin a, Ran rual angin chhungte a siamsak thin."

Psalms108:1 Aw Pathian, ka thinlung hi a nghet a ni; Hla ka sa ang, a ni, fakna hla ka sa ang, ka ropuina ngeiin." 
Psalms108:2 Perhkhuang leh tingtangte u, harh rawh u: Kei chu zing takah ka harh ang." 
Psalms108:3 Aw LALPA, mi tin, zingahte lawm thu ka hrilh ang che: Hnam tin zingah nangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms108:4 I ngilneihna chu van khum khawpin a nasa si a, I thutak chuan van dumte khi a tawng hial bawk a." 
Psalms108:5 Aw Pathian, nang chu van khum daih khian chawimawiin lo awm ang che: I ropuina chu leilung zawng zawng chungah hian chawimawiin awm bawk rawh se." 
Psalms108:6 I duh takte hi chhanhima an awm theihna'n, I kut ding lamin chhandam la, min chhang ang che."

Psalms108:8 Gilead ram chu ka ta a ni a; Manase ram ka ta ani a; Ephraim ram pawh chu ka lu humhimna a ni a; Juda ram chu ka laltiang a ni. 
Psalms108:9 Moab ram chu ka insilna bel a ni a; Edom rmaah chuan ka pheikhawk ka paih ang a: Philistia ram chu ka au khum ang.

Psalms119:16 I thuruat chungahte chuan ka lawm ang a: I thu chu ka theihnghlh lo ang. 
Psalms119:17 Ka nun theihna turin i chhiahhlawh chungah hian tha takin ti ang che; Chutichuan i thu ka zawm ang. 
Psalms119:18 I dan thu atanga thilmak ka hmuh theihna'n, Ka mitte hi mi tihvarsak ang che." 
Psalms119:19 Leiah hian mikhual ka ni a: I thupekte chu ka lakah zep suh ang che. 
Psalms119:20 Ka nunna hi keh sawmin a awm a, Englai pawha i rorelnate a ngaih avangin." 
Psalms119:21 Mi chapo, anchhe dawngte chu, i zilhhau a, I thupekte vah bosan thinte chu." 
Psalms119:22 Sawi chhiatna leh hmusitna hi ka hnen ata la bo ang che; I thuhriattirte chu ka zawm si a. 
Psalms119:23 Mi liante pah an thu a, mi sawisel a: Nimahsela i chhiahhlawh hian i thu ruatte chu a ngaihtuah zawk si a." 
Psalms119:24 I thuhriattirte chu ka lawmna a ni a, Rem mi ruatsaktute pawh a ni." 
Psalms119:25 Ka nunna hi vaivutah a bet tlat a: I thu ang zelin mi tiharh ang che. 
Psalms119:26 Ka awm dante chu ka hriattir chian, nangin mi chhang a: I thuruatte chu mi zirtir ang che." 
Psalms119:27 I thununna kawng chu mi hriat thiamtir ang che: Chutichuan i thilmak tih thute chu ka ngaihtuah ang. 
Psalms119:28 Ka nunna hi lungngaih avangin ka tuiral thin. I thu ang zelin mi tichak ang che. 
Psalms119:29 Awm dan dik lo hi ka hnen ata la sawn la: I dan khawngaih takin mi pe ang che. 
Psalms119:30 Awm dan rinawm ka thlang a: I rorelnate ka hmaah ka awmtir a. 
Psalms119:31 I thuhriattirahte hian ka bet tlat a: Aw LALPA, mi timualpho suh ang che." 
Psalms119:32 I thupek kawngah chuan ka tlan ang. Ka thinlung hi i tihzau hunah chuan. 
Psalms119:33 Aw LALPA, i thuruat kawng chu mi entir ang che; Tichuan a tawp thlengin ka zawh dawn nia." 
Psalms119:34 Hriat thiamna mi pe ang hche, tichuan i dan chu ka vawng tha dawn nia; A ni, ka thinlung zawng zawng hian ka zawm ang." 
Psalms119:35 I thupek kawngah mi kaltir ang che; Chu mi-ah chuan ka lawm si a. 
Psalms119:36 I thuhriattir lamah chuan ka thinlung hi thlektir ang che, Duhamna lamah ni loin." 
Psalms119:37 Thil engmah lo mai mai en lo turin ka mit mi laktir la, I kawngahte chuan mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:38 I thu chu i chhiahhlawh hnenah hian tinghet ang che, Chu chu nangmah tihtu tan a ni." 
Psalms119:39 Mi sawichhiatna ka hlauh hi la bo ang che, I rorelte chu a tha si a." 
Psalms119:40 Ngai teh, i thununa thute chu hriat ka chak thin a: I felna avangin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:41 Aw LALPA, i ngilneihnate chu ka hnenah lo kal rawh se, I chhandamna ngei chu, i thu ang zelin." 
Psalms119:42 Chutichuan, mi sawi chhetu chhanna tur ka nei ang; I thu ka ring si a." 
Psalms119:43 Tin, thutak thu chu ka ka ata hi la chhuak vek suh ang che; I rorelnate chu ka beisei si thin a." 
Psalms119:44 Chutichuan i dan chu ka zawm fo ang, Kumkhaw tlaitluanin." 
Psalms119:45 Tin, dip dal loin ka leng ang; I thununna thute chu ka zawng si a." 
Psalms119:46 I thuhriattir thute chu lalho hmaah ka sawi ang a, Ka zak lo ang." 
Psalms119:47 Tin, i thupek, ka ngaihnat chungahte chuan, Ka lawm ang." 
Psalms119:48 I thupek, ka ngaihnat lamahte chuan ka kutte ka phar ang a; I thuruatte chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms119:49 I chhiahhlawh hnena thutiam chu hre reng ang che, Nangin mi beiseitir avangin." 
Psalms119:50 Chu chu ka hrehawmnaah pawh ka thlamuanna a ni: I thu chuan mi tiharh ta si a. 
Psalms119:51 Chapote chuan nasa takin mi nuihzabur a: Nimahsela i dan chu ka kalkawisan lo. 
Psalms119:52 Aw LALPA, hmasanga i rorelte chu ka hre reng a, Ka inthlamuan thin." 
Psalms119:53 Lungnih lohna nasa tak hian mi tlakbuak ta a, Mi suaksual i dan kalsantute avangin." 
Psalms119:54 Ka khualzinna inah hian I thuruatte chu ka hla a ni thin. 
Psalms119:55 Aw LALPA, zanah chuan i hming ka hre reng thin a, I dan pawh ka zawm thin." 
Psalms119:56 Chung chu ka nei a, I thununa thute chu ka vawn that avangin." 
Psalms119:57 LALPA chu ka chanvo a ni: I thu ka zamw ang tih ka sawi tawh kha. 
Psalms119:58 Ka thinlung zawng zawngin i khawngaihna ka ngen a: I thu ang zelin mi khawngaih ang che. 
Psalms119:59 Ka awm dante ka ngaihtuah a, I thuhriattir lamah chuan ka ke ka pen ta a." 
Psalms119:60 I thupekte zawm turin Ka hmanhmawh a, rei ka rial lo." 
Psalms119:61 Mi suaksualho hruaihrualte chuan mi zem hlawm reng a; Nimahsela i dan chu ka theihnghilh lo. 
Psalms119:62 Zan laiah lawm thu hrilh tur chein ka hto ang, I rorel felte avangin." 
Psalms119:63 Nangmah tihtu zawng zawng leh, I thununna thute zawmtute thian ka ni." 
Psalms119:64 Aw LALPA, leilung hi i ngilneihnain a khat a ni: I thuruatte chu mi zirtir ang che." 
Psalms119:65 Aw LALPA, i thu ang zelin I chhiahhlawh hi i titha thin." 
Psalms119:66 Ngaihtuah thiamna leh hriatna mi zirtir ang che; I thupekte chu ka ring si a. 
Psalms119:67 Tihhreawma ka awm hma khan ka vak bo thin a; Tunah erawh chuan i thu ka zawm ta. 
Psalms119:68 Nang chu i tha a, thil tha i ti bawk a; I thuruatte chu mi zirtir ang che." 
Psalms119:69 Chapote chuan ka chungah dawt an phuahchawp a: Ka thinlung zawng zawng hian i thununna thute chu ka vawng tha ang. 
Psalms119:70 An thinlung chu rilbawh thau angin a thau a; Kei erawh chu i dan chungah ka lawm thin. 
Psalms119:71 I thuruatte chu ka zir theihna'na Tihhreawma ka lo awm kha ka tan a tha a ni. 
Psalms119:72 Rangkachak leh tangka sang tam tak ai chuan I kaa dan chhuak chu ka tan a tha zawk e. 
Psalms119:73 I kutin mi siamin, mi din a ni: I thupekte chu ka zir theihna'n hriatthiamna mi pe ang che." 
Psalms119:74 Nangmah tihtute chuan mi hmu ang a, an lawm ang; I thu chu ka beisei thin avangin." 
Psalms119:75 Aw LALPA, i rorelte chu a fel tih leh, Nang chuan rinawm takin a ni, mi tihhreawm ni tih ka hria." 
Psalms119:76 I chhiahhlawh hnena i thutiam ang zelin Khawngaih takin i ngilneihna chu ka thlamuanna tur ni rawh se. 
Psalms119:77 Ka nun theihna turin i lainatnate ka hnenah lo kal rawh se: I dan chu ka lawmna a ni si a. 
Psalms119:78 Chapote chu mualphoin awm rawh se; dik lo takin mi titlawm ta si a: Nimahsela i thununna thute chu ka ngaihtuah ang. 
Psalms119:79 Nangmah tihtute chu ka lamah hawi rawh se, Tichuan i thuhriattirte chu an hre dawn nia." 
Psalms119:80 Ka mualpho lohna turin Ka thinlung hi i thuruatahte chuan tha famkimin awm rawh se. 
Psalms119:81 Ka nunna hi i chhandamna ngaiin a chau ta a: Nimahsela i thu ka beisei thin. 
Psalms119:82 I thu thlirna'n ka mit a vai zo ta a, ""Nangin engtikah nge mi thlamuan ang?"" ka ti, ka ti thin a." 
Psalms119:83 Meikhu ur savun peng ang chu ka lo ni ta si a; Nimahsela i thuruatte chu ka theihnghilh lo e. 
Psalms119:84 I chhiahhlawh kum chin tur hi engzat nge ni dawn? Mi tiduhdahtute chungah hian engtikah nge ro i rel dawn? 
Psalms119:85 Mi chapo, i dan anga awm lote chuan, Ka tlakna'n khuarkhurumte an lai a" 
Psalms119:86 I thupek zawng zawng hu a rinawm a ni: Anni chuan dik lo takah mi tihduhdah thin hi; mi tanpui ang che. 
Psalms119:87 Anni chuan leiah hian mi tiboral thelh thelh a; Nimahsela i thununna thute chu ka hawisan si lo a. 
Psalms119:88 I ngilneihna ang zelin mi tiharh ang che; Chutichuan i kaa thuhriattir chu ka zawm dawn nia. 
Psalms119:89 Aw LALPA, kumkhua atan I thu chu vanah nghet takin a awm a." 
Psalms119:90 I rinawmna chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a awm ang: Leilung hi i tinghet a, a awm reng a ni." 
Psalms119:91 Chungte chu vawiin hian i rorelte angin an awm reng a; Thil zawng zawng chu i chhiahhlawhte an ni si a. 
Psalms119:92 I dan chu ka lawmna ni suh se la chuan, ka hrehawmnaah khan ka boral tawh tur a ni." 
Psalms119:93 I thununna thue chu engtikah mah ka theihnghilh lo ang; Nangin chung chun mi tiharh ta si a. 
Psalms119:94 I ta ka nih hi, mi chhandam ang che; I thununna thute chu ka zawng si a." 
Psalms119:95 Mi suaksualte chuan mi tihboral tumin mi nghak thin a; Nimahsela i thuhriattirte chu ka ngaihtuah ang. 
Psalms119:96 That famkimna zawng zawng tawp chu ka hmu ta a, I thupek erawh chu a zau khawp mai a ni." 
Psalms119:97 Aw, i dan hi ka va ngaina em! Nilenga ka ngaihtuah thin a ni." 
Psalms119:98 I thupekte chuan mi dotute aia fing zawkin mi siam a; Kumkhuaa ka hnena a awm fo thin aangin. 
Psalms119:99 Min zirtirtu zawng zawng aiin finna ka nei zawk a ni; I thuhriattirte hi ka ngaihtuah a nih thin avangin. 
Psalms119:100 Tarte ai chuan ka hre thiam zawk a ni, I thununna thute hi ka vawn that avangin." 
Psalms119:101 I thu ka zawm theihna turin Kawng sualah reng reng chuan ka kete hi pen ka phal lo. 
Psalms119:102 I rorelna lakahte chuan ka peng lo; Nangin mi zirtir avangin. 
Psalms119:103 I thute hi ka tan a va thlum em! A ni, ka ka atan a va thlum em! A ni, ka ka atan chuan khawizu aiin a thlum zawk." 
Psalms119:104 I thununna thute avangin hriat thiamna ka nei thin: Chuvangin awm dan dik lo tinreng hi ka hua a ni. 
Psalms119:105 I thu hi ka ke atante hian khawnvar a ni a, Ka kawng atan eng a ni." 
Psalms119:106 I rorelna fel takte chu zamw turin Chhia ka chham a, ka tinghet bawk a." 
Psalms119:107 Nasa taka tihhreawmin ka awm a: Aw LALPA, i thu ang zelin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:108 Aw LALPA, khawngaih takin ka kaa duh thua thilpekte hi la la, I rorelnate chu mi zirtir ang che." 
Psalms119:109 Ka nunna hi ka kutah a awm fo thin a; Nimahsela, i dan chu ka theihnghilh ngai lo." 
Psalms119:110 Mi suaksualte chuan ka awhna'n thang an kam a; Nimahsela i thununa thute chu ka vah bosan lo e. 
Psalms119:111 I thuhriattirte chu kumkhuaa rochunah ka la a; Ka thinlung tihlimtu a ni si a. 
Psalms119:112 Kumkhuain, a tawp thlengin, I thuruatte anga ti turin ka thinlung ka thlektir a." 
Psalms119:113 Rilru mumal nei lo mite chu ka hua a; I dan erawh chu ka ngaina a ni. 
Psalms119:114 Nang chu ka bihrukna hmun leh ka phaw i ni a: I thu ka beisei a ni. 
Psalms119:115 Nangni thil tha lo titute u, mi kalsan rawh u; Ka Pathian thilpekte ka vawn that theihna'n." 
Psalms119:116 Ka nun theihna turin i thu ang zelin mi chelh reng la, Ka beisei chungah hian zakin mi awmtir suh ang che." 
Psalms119:117 Mi kai ang che, tichuan ka him ang a, I thuruatte chu ka pawisa fo dawn nia." 
Psalms119:118 I thuruatte vah bosantu zawng zawng chu i hmusit a; An bumna hchu dawt a ni si a. 
Psalms119:119 Leia mi suaksualte zawng zawng chu englo ekchhia angin i tibo thin a: Chuvangin i thuhriattirte chu ka ngaina a ni. 
Psalms119:120 Ka tisa hi nangmah tihin a khur a; I rorelnate chu ka hlau bawk a. 
Psalms119:121 Ro ka rel a, fel takin ka ti thin a ni: Mi hnehchhiahtute lakah mi thlahthlam suh ang che." 
Psalms119:122 I chhiahhlawh chungchang thu-ah, a thatna turin a bul tum la: Chapoten mi hnehchhiah suh se." 
Psalms119:123 I chhandamna thlirna'n ka mit a vai zo ta a, I thu fel tak thlirna'n nen." 
Psalms119:124 I ngilneihna avangin i chhiahhlawh chungah hian ti la, I thuruatte chu mi zirtir ang che." 
Psalms119:125 I chhiahhlawh ka ni a, hriat thiamna mi pe ang che; I thuhriattirte chu ka hriat theihna'n." 
Psalms119:126 LALPA, thawh a hun ta; I dan hi engmah loah an siam ta si." 
Psalms119:127 Chuvangin i thupekte chu rangkachak aiin ka ngaina a ni, A ni, rangkachak thianghlim ai pawhin." 
Psalms119:128 Chuvangin kawng tinreng thua i thununna thu zawng zawngte chu dikin ka hria a; Awm dan dik lo tinreng hi ka hua a ni. 
Psalms119:129 I thuhriattirte chu a mak a ni: Chuvangin ka nunna hian a vawng tha thin. 
Psalms119:130 I thu hrilhfiah hian mite a tieng a; Mi mawlte chu a hriat thiamtir thin. 
Psalms119:131 Ka ka ka ang zau a, ka thaw hlawp hlawp a; I thupekte chu ka chak avangin." 
Psalms119:132 Ka lam lo hawi la, mi khawngaih ang che, I hming ngainatutte i khawngaih ang khan." 
Psalms119:133 Ka ke pente hi i thu-ah tinghet la; Sualna reng reng ka chungah thu neihtir suh ang che. 
Psalms119:134 Mihring hnehchhiahna lakah chuan mi chhanhim ang che: Chutichuan i thununna thute chu ka zawm dawn nia. 
Psalms119:135 I hmelin i chhiahhlawh chhun eng la; I thuruatte chu mi zirtir ang che. 
Psalms119:136 Ka mittui hi lui tui angin a luang thla a, I dan an zawm loh avangin." 
Psalms119:137 Aw LALPA, nang chu i fel a, I rorelte pawh a dik a ni." 
Psalms119:138 I thuhriattirte chu fel tak leh Rinawm em emin thu i pe a. 
Psalms119:139 Ka thehnemngaihna hian mi tiboral ta, Mi dotuten i thu an theihnghilh tak avangin." 
Psalms119:140 I thu hi a thianghlim em em a ni; Chuvangin i chhiahhlawh hian a ngaina a ni. 
Psalms119:141 Mi te leh mi hmusit ka ni a: Nimahsela i thununna thute chu ka theihnghilh ngai lo e. 
Psalms119:142 I felna chu kumkhaw felna tur ani a, I dan pawh thutak a ni." 
Psalms119:143 Manganna leh thlaphanna chuan mi tlakbuak ta a: Nimahsela i thupekte hi ka lawmna a ni. 
Psalms119:144 I thuhriattirte chu kumkhua atan a fel a ni: Hriat thiamna mi pe ang che, tichuan ka nung reng ang." 
Psalms119:145 Ka thinlung zawng zawngin ka ko chia; aw LALPA, mi chhang ang che: I thuruatte chu ka vawng tha dawn nia." 
Psalms119:146 Ka ko thin chia; mi chhandam ang che. Tichuan i thuhriattirte chu ka zawm dawn nia. 
Psalms119:147 Khawfing chat chu ka khalh a, ka au thin a: I thute chu ka beisei thin." 
Psalms119:148 I thu ka ngaihtuah theihna turin Ka mitin zan vente chu ka men khalh thin. 
Psalms119:149 I ngilneihna ang zelin ka aw hi ngaithla la: Aw LALPA, i rorelnate ang zelin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:150 Ngaihtuahna sual umho chuan an an rawh hnaih a; Anni chu i dan hlata awm an ni. 
Psalms119:151 Aw LALPA, nang chu i hnai a; I thupek zawng zawng chu thutak a ni." 
Psalms119:152 Hmasangin, i thuhriattirte atangin, Chung chu kumkhua atan i tinghet tih ka lo hre tawh." 
Psalms119:153 Ka hrehawmzia hi ngaihtuah la, mi chhanhim ang che; I dan chu ka theihnghilh ngai si lo a." 
Psalms119:154 Ka thu mi sawipuiin, mi tlann la; I thu ang zelin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:155 Chhandamna chu mi suaksualte laka hla a ni; I thuruatte chu an zanw loh avangin. 
Psalms119:156 Aw LALPA, i lainatnate chu a nasa a ni: I rorelnate ang zelin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:157 Mi tiduhdahtute leh mi dotute chu tam tak an ni. Nimahsela i thuhriattirte chu ka kal kawisan lo. 
Psalms119:158 Vervek taka titute chu ka en a, ka lungni lo a; I thu an zawm loh avangin." 
Psalms119:159 I thununna thute ka ngainatzia hi ngaihtuah la; Aw LALPA, i ngilneihna avangin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:160 I thu infinkhawm chu thutak a ni a; I thu infinkhawm chu thutak a ni a, I rorelna fel tinreng pawh hi kum khuain a awm reng ang." 
Psalms119:161 Mi lianten enga khawlawi loin mi tiduhdah a; Nimahsela ka thinlung chuan i thute a ni, a hlauh ni." 
Psalms119:162 I thu-ah hian ka hlim a ni. Thil ropui tak rallaka hmutu angin. 
Psalms119:163 Dawt hi ka huain ka ten a; I dan erawh chu ka ngaina a ni. 
Psalms119:164 Ni khatah vawi sarih ka fak thin che a ni. I rorel felte avangin. 
Psalms119:165 I dan ngainatute chuan thlamuanna nasa tak an nei a, Tlukna reng reng an nei lo." 
Psalms119:166 Aw LALPA, i chhandamna ke beisei reng a, I thupekte angin ka ti thin." 
Psalms119:167 Ka nunna hian i thuhriattirte chu a zawm thin a; Ka ngaina em em a ni. 
Psalms119:168 I thununna thute leh i thuhriatirte chu ka zamw thin a; Ka awm dan zawng zawng hi i hmaa awm ani si a. 
Psalms119:169 Aw LALPA, ka au thawm hi i hmaah lo hnai rawh se: I thu ang zelin hriat thiamna mi pe ang che." 
Psalms119:170 Khawngaih ka dilna hi i hmaah thleng rawh se: I thu ang zelin mi chhanhim ang che. 
Psalms119:171 Ka hmui hian fakna thu sawi rawh se; Nangin i thuruatte chu mi zirtir thin avangin. 
Psalms119:172 Ka lei hi i thu fakin zai rawh se; I thupek zawng zawng chu felna a ni avangin. 
Psalms119:173 I kut chu mi tanpui turin inpeihsain awm rawh se: I thununa thute chu ka thlang si a. 
Psalms119:174 Aw LALPA, i chhandamna chu ka chak thin a; I dan chu ka lawmna a ni." 
Psalms119:175 Ka nuna hi nung rawh se, tichuan a fak dawn che nia. I rorelnate pawhin mi tanpui rawh se.Beram bo angin ka vak bo a; i chhiahhlawh hi zawng ang che; I thupekte chu ka theihnghilh ngai si lo a." 
Psalms119:176 Beram bo angin ka vak bo a; i chhiahhlawh hi zawng ang che; I thupekte chu ka theihnghilh ngai si lo a. 
Psalms120:1 Ka mangannaah chuan LALPA chu ka au a, Tichuan, anin mi chhang a." 
Psalms120:2 Aw LALPA, hmui dawtheite lakah leh, lei mi bumhmang lakah chuan, Ka nunna hi chhanhim ang che." 
Psalms120:3 Nang lei bumhmang, I hnenah eng nge an pek ang chia, eng nge an belhchhah ang che?" 
Psalms120:4 Mi chak thal zum takte, Juniper thing lingte nen." 
Psalms120:5 Mesek-ho ramah ka awm leh, Kedar-ho pian in zingah ka awm hi, ka chung a va pik em!" 
Psalms120:6 Ka nuna hian remna hawtu hnenah Rei tak awmna a nei tawh.Kei chuan inrem ka duh a: Nimahsela thu ka sawi veleh indo an duh thin. 
Psalms120:7 Kei chuan inrem ka duh a: Nimahsela thu ka sawi veleh indo an duh thin. 
Psalms121:1 Tlang lamahte khian ka mit ka len chho ang: Khawi lama mi nge mi tanpuina tur lo thleng ang? 
Psalms121:2 Mi tanpuina tur chu LALPA Lei leh van siamtu hnena mi a lo thleng ang. 
Psalms121:3 Ani chuan i ke chu tihsawn a phal lo ang a: Nangmah vengtu chu a muttlu lo ang. 
Psalms121:4 Ngai teh, Israel-ho vengtu chu A muthluin, a muhil hek lo ang." 
Psalms121:5 LALPA chu nangmah vengtu ani a: LALPA chu i ding lama hliahtu che a ni. 
Psalms121:6 Chhunah niin a em lo ang chia, Zanah thlain a em hek lo ang che." 
Psalms121:7 LALPA chuan sual tinreng lakah a veng ang chia; I nuna chu a veng ang.LALPA chuan i chhuak leh i lut chu a veng ang che, Tun atanga, kumkhuain." 
Psalms121:8 LALPA chuan i chhuak leh i lut chu a veng ang che, Tun atanga, kumkhuain." 
Psalms122:1 LALPA inah i kal ang u,"" Ka hnena an tih lai khan ka lawm a," 
Psalms122:2 Aw Jerusalem, i kulh kawngkhar chhungah Kan kete chu a din tak hi;" 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalem, khawpui din thar Rinawm taka rem chu:" 
Psalms122:4 LALPA hming fak turin Chutah chuan hnamte chu an chho thin, LALPA hnamte chu, Israel-ho hnena thuhriattirna atan." 
Psalms122:5 Chutah chuan rorelna'n lalthutphahte hun a ni si a Davida chhungte lalthutphahte chu," 
Psalms122:6 Jerusalem thlamuanna tur dilsak rawh u: Nang ngainatute chu an thawveng ang. 
Psalms122:7 I kulh chhungahte chuan thlamuanna awm se la, I lal inahte chuan thawvenna awm rawh se." 
Psalms122:8 Ka unaute leh ka thiante avangin I chhungah thlamuanna awm rawh se,"" ka ti ang.LALPA kan Pathian in avang chuan I thatna tur ka zawng ang." 
Psalms122:9 LALPA kan Pathian in avang chuan I thatna tur ka zawng ang. 
Psalms123:1 Aw, nang vana thu thin, I lamah ka mit ka len chhoh thin hi." 
Psalms123:2 Ngai teh, chhiahhlawhte mitin an pu kut lam a en thin ang leh, Chhiahhlawhnu mitin a pi kut lam a en thin angin, Keini mit pawhin LALPA kan Pathian lam a en reng a ni, Min khawngaih hma loh chuan." 
Psalms123:3 Aw LALPA, min khawngaih rawh, min khawngaih rawh: Hmusitnain ka khah nasat hi,Mi nuamsate deuna leh Chapote hmusitnain Kan nunna hi a khat nasa hle." 
Psalms123:4 Mi nuamsate deuna leh Chapote hmusitnain Kan nunna hi a khat nasa hle. 
Psalms124:1 Kan lama tang chu LALPA ni suh se la chuan,"" Israel-hoin ti rawh se;" 
Psalms124:2 Miten mi bei lai khan Kan lama tang chu LALPA ni suh se la chuan: 
Psalms124:3 Kha mi lai ngei khan anni chuan kan nung chungin min lem tawh ang, Kan chunga an thin a thawh lai khan:" 
Psalms124:4 Kha mi lai ngei khan tuite chuan min chim pil tawh ang a, Lui chuan kan nuna hi a vur pil tawh ang: Kha mi lai ngei khan tui chapote chuan kan nuna hi a vur pil tawh ang." 
Psalms124:5 Sa seh anga seh tura an haa min pe lotu LALPA chu, fakin awm rawh se."

Psalms125:4 Aw LALPA, tha taka awmte chungah chuan tha takin ti ang che, An thinlunga dik taka awmte chungah pawh.An kawng kawitea pengho erawh hi zawng LALPA chuan thil tisualtute nen a hruai chhuak ang. Israel-ho chungah chuan thlamuanna awm rawh se."

Psalms127:2 Zing takah in tho a, tlai takah in chawl a, Thawhrimna chaw in ei thin hi, in tan a thlawn mai a ni: Hetiang hian a mi duh tak chu a muthilhtir thin a ni." 
Psalms127:3 Ngai teh, fanaute hi LALPA laka kan rochan an ni a: Rila rah hi a lawmman mi pek a ni."

Psalms132:4 Ka hahchawl lo ang a, Mutmu ka tuah hek lo ang;"

Psalms132:7 A awmnaah chuan kal i la, A ke nghahchhan bulah chibai i buk ang u." 
Psalms132:8 Aw LALPA, tho la, i chawlh hmun turah chuan lut ang che; Nang nen, i chakna bawm nen." 
Psalms132:9 I puithiamte chu felnain inthuam se la; I mi thianghlimte ch hlimin au rawh se.

Psalms132:11 LALPA chuan Davida hnenah thutakin chhia a chham ta a; Chu chu a hawisan lo vang: I taksa raha mi i lalthutphahah chuan ka thuttir ang.

Psalms132:15 A ei tur chu mal ka sawm rei rui ang a: A mi retheite chu chhangin ka titlai ang.

Psalms135:9 Aw Aigupta ram, ani chuan chhinchhiahnate leh thilmakte i chhungah a rawn tir a, Pharaoa chungah leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng chungahte chuan." 
Psalms135:10 Ani chuan hnam tam tak a tihlum a, Lal ropui tak takte a that a;"

Psalms135:15 Hnam tin, milemte chu tangka leh rangkachak an ni a, Mihring kut chhuak an ni." 
Psalms135:16 Kate an nei a, an tawng thei si lo a; Mitte an nei a, an hmu thei si lo a;" 
Psalms135:17 Bengte an nei a, an hre thei si lo a; An kaah chuan thaw reng reng a awm hek lo."

Psalms136:5 Finnaa van siamtu hnenah chuan: A ngilneihna pawh kumkhuain a awm dawn si a.

Psalms139:1 Aw LALPA, nangin ngun takin mi en chhuak a, mi hre ta." 
Psalms139:2 Nangin ka thut leh ka din hi i hre thin a, Ka ngaihtuahna hi hla tak atang pawhin i hre thiam thin." 
Psalms139:3 Ka kal leh ka mu hi mi en ngun thin a, Ka awm dan zawng zawng hi i hre vek a." 
Psalms139:4 Ngai teh, aw LALPA, nangin i hriat fai vek loh chu, Ka leiah hian thu reng reng a awm lo." 
Psalms139:5 Nangin ka hnung lam leh ka hma lamah min hual a, Ka chungah i kut i nghat bawk a." 
Psalms139:6 Chuti kauva hriatna chu ka tan a mak lutuk a; A sang em a, ka phak lo a ni." 
Psalms139:7 I thlarau hnen ata hi khawiah nge ka kal ang? I hma ata hi khawiah nge ka tlan bo ang? 
Psalms139:8 Vanah han lawn i la, chutah chuan i awm si a: Seol-ah mutna siam i la, ngai teh, chutah chuan i awm bawk si a." 
Psalms139:9 Zing thla zarin, Tuifinriat tawp daihah va awm i la;" 
Psalms139:10 Chutah pawh chuan i kutin mi hruai ang a, I kut ding lamin mi chelh dawn si a." 
Psalms139:11 Thimin min khuh bo tlat se, Ka vel eng hi zan thim ni se"" ti mah i la;" 
Psalms139:12 Thim pawhin i lakah chuan engmah a hliah lo a, Zan hi chhun angin a eng zawk a ni: I tan chuan thim leh eng hi thuhmun reng a ni." 
Psalms139:13 Nangmah ngeiin ka rilru i nei a: Ka nu pum chhungah mi khuh a. 
Psalms139:14 I hnenah lawm thu ka hrilh ang che; hlauhawm tak leh mak taka siam ka ni si a: I thiltihte hi mak tak a ni a; Chu chu ka nunna hian a hre chiang hle a ni. 
Psalms139:15 A ruka siama ka awm a, Lei hmun hnuaihnung bera mawi taka siama ka awm lai khan Ka ruhrel chu i lakah thupin a awm lo." 
Psalms139:16 Ka riruang la famkim lo chu i mitin a hmu a, I lehkhabuah chuan ka pengte zawng zawng hi ziak vek a ni a, A ni tela siamin a awm zel a, A pakhat mah la awm hmain," 
Psalms139:17 Aw Pathian, i ngaihtuahnate chu k tan a va hlu em! A infin khawm chu a va nasa em!" 
Psalms139:18 Chhiar dawn i la, a tam lam chu tiau vaivut aiin a tam zawk ang: Ka han men chuan, i hnenah ka la awm cheu thin a ni." 
Psalms139:19 Aw Pathian, mi suaksualte chu i that ngei ang: Chutichuan, nangni thisen chhuah chak mite u, mi kalsan rawh u." 
Psalms139:20 Anni chuan sual takin an sawichhe si chia, Nangmah dotute chuan i hming chu an sawi nawmnah thin." 
Psalms139:21 Aw LALPA, nangmah hawtute chu ka haw lo em ni? Nangmah beitute chungah chuan kalungni lo em ni?" 
Psalms139:22 Anni chu huat tak tein ka hua a: Mi dotu-ahte ka ruat hlawm a. 
Psalms139:23 Aw Pathian, ngun takin min en chhuak la, ka thinlung hi hria ang che: Mi fiah la, ka ngaihtuahnate hi hria ang che:Tin, keimahah hian suahsualna kawng reng reng a awm nge awm lo en la, Chatuan kawngah chuan mi hruai ang che." 
Psalms139:24 Tin, keimahah hian suahsualna kawng reng reng a awm nge awm lo en la, Chatuan kawngah chuan mi hruai ang che." 
Psalms140:1 Aw LALPA, misual lakah chuan mi chhanhim la; Mi nunrawng lakah chuan mi humhim ang che:" 
Psalms140:2 Anni chuan a n thinlungah thil tihsualte an ngaihtuah thin a; Do turin an inkhawm fo thin. 
Psalms140:3 An lei chu rul angin an tihriam a; An heh chhungah chuan rulrial tur a awm a. (Selah) 
Psalms140:4 Aw LALPA, mi suaksual kut lakah chuan mi vawng tha la; Mi nunrawng lakah chuan mi humhim ang che: Anni chuan ka ke pente hi nam kawi an tum a." 
Psalms140:5 Mi chapote chuan ka awhna'n thang an kam ru a, hruihrualte nen; Kawng sirah chuan len an phah a; Ka awhna'n thangte an kam a. (Selah)" 
Psalms140:6 LALPA hnenah chuan, ""nang chu ka Pathian i ni a: Aw LALPA, khawngaih ka dilna awte hi lo bengkhawn ang che." 
Psalms140:7 Aw PATHIAN, Lalpa, min chhandamna tichaktu, Nang chuan inbei niah chuan ka lu mi khuhsak a." 
Psalms140:8 Aw LALPA, mi suaksual duhzawngte chu phal suh la; An ngaihtuahna sual chu puitlintir suh ang che; chutilochuan an inchawimawi dah ang e,"" ka ti a. (Selah)" 
Psalms140:9 Mi hual veltute lu chu, Anmahni hmuia an thu sual sawi chuan khuh rawh se." 
Psalms140:10 Meilingte an chungah tla se la: Meia paihin awm se la; 
Psalms140:11 An thawh leh tawh lohna turin khuarkhurum thuk takahte paihin awm rawh se. Thu tha lo sawitu chu leiah hian tihnghehin a awm lo ang a: Mi nunrawng tichhe turin thil tha loin a pel ang. 
Psalms140:12 LALPA chuan hrehawm tuarte chu an thu-ah a tan ang tih ka hria, Pachhiate chu an tana awm rengah nen.Matheiloin mi felte chuan i hming an fak ang a: Mi dikte chu i hmaah an awm ang." 
Psalms140:13 Matheiloin mi felte chuan i hming an fak ang a: Mi dikte chu i hmaah an awm ang. 
Psalms141:1 LALPA, ka koh che hi, ka hnenah lo kal thuai la: Ka koh chein ka aw-ah hian beng lo chhi ang che." 
Psalms141:2 Ka tawngtaina hi englo rimtui tak angin i hmaah tihchhuahin awm se la; Ka kut phar hi tlai lam inthawina angin awm rawh se. 
Psalms141:3 Aw LALPA, ka ka bulah hian vengtu thuttir la; Ka hmui kawngkhar hi veng ang che." 
Psalms141:4 Suahsualna thilte Thil tisual mite tihpui tur chuan, Ka thinlung hi thi tha lo reng reng lamah chuan thlektir suh la: An ei tur tak takte chu mi eitir suh ang che." 
Psalms141:5 Mi fel chuan mi vaw rawh se, khawngaihna a ni ang; Mi zilhhau rawh se, lua hriak thih ang a ni a; Ka luin duh lo suh se: An suahsualn pawhin ka tawngtai zel dawn si a." 
Psalms141:6 An roreltute chu lungpui sirah paih thlakin an awm a; Anni chuan ka thute chu an ngaithla tawh ang; a thlum si a. 
Psalms141:7 Mi'n lei a leh a, a tihsawm ang hian, Ka ruhte hi thlan kovah tihdarhin a awm a." 
Psalms141:8 Aw PATHIAN, Lalpa, ka mitin i lam a en si thin a: Nangmahah chuan ka rinna ka nghat thin; ka nunna hi saruakin hnutchhiah suh ang che." 
Psalms141:9 Ka awhna'na thang an kam lekah chuan mi humhim ang che, Thil tisualtute thang lakahte nen.Keiin ka kal pelh lai takin, Mi suaksualte chu anmahni lenahte chuan tlu lut rawh se." 
Psalms141:10 Keiin ka kal pelh lai takin, Mi suaksualte chu anmahni lenahte chuan tlu lut rawh se." 
Psalms142:1 Ka awin LALPA chu ka au a; Ka awin LALPA hnenah khawngaihna ka dil thin. 
Psalms142:2 A hmaah ka mangan thu ka sawi a; A hmaah ka buaina ka hriattir thin. 
Psalms142:3 Ka thlarau chu chhungah a chauh lai kha, nangmah ngeiin ka kawng chu i hria a. Ka kalna kawngah hian ka awhna'n thang an kam ru a." 
Psalms142:4 Ka ding lam hi thlek la, en teh; tumah mi hria reng reng an awm tak loh hi: Ka inhumhimna a awm ta lo a; tumah reng rengin ka nunna hi an ngaihsak ta lo." 
Psalms142:5 Aw LALPA, ka au chia; ""Nang chu ka inhumhimna, Mi nung rama ka chanvo i ni,"" ka ti a." 
Psalms142:6 Ka au thawm hi ngaithla ang che; nasa taka tihhniamin ka awm ta si a: Mi tiduhdahtute lakah hian mi chanhim ang che; ka aiin an chak zawk si a.I hming ka fak theihna'n, ka nuna hi tan in atangin hruai chhuak ang che: Mi felte chuan mi hual vel ang; Nangin tha taka mi tih dawn avangin." 
Psalms142:7 I hming ka fak theihna'n, ka nuna hi tan in atangin hruai chhuak ang che: Mi felte chuan mi hual vel ang; Nangin tha taka mi tih dawn avangin." 
Psalms143:1 Aw LALPA, ka tawngtaina hi ngaithla la; khawngaih ka dilnaah hian beng lo chhi la: I rinawmna avang leh i felna avangin mi chang ang che." 
Psalms143:2 I chhiahhlawh chungah hian rorel suh ang che; I mithmuhah chuan mi nung reng reng thiam chang an awm dawn si lo. 
Psalms143:3 Dotu chuan ka nunna a tiduhdah si a; Ka nun hi leiah a vaw thlu a: Thi tawh daihte angin, hmin thim takahte mi awmtir a." 
Psalms143:4 Chuvangin ka thlarau hi ka kawchhungah a chau a; Ka thinlung hi ka kawchhungah a mangang ta a. 
Psalms143:5 Hmasang nite chu ka hre reng thin a; I thiltih zawng zawngte chu ka ngaihtuah thin a: I kut hnathawhte chu ka chhut thin. 
Psalms143:6 Ka kutte hi i lamah ka phar thin a: Ka nunna hi, ram chau tak angin, nangmahah a tuihal thin." 
Psalms143:7 Aw LALPA, mi chhang thuai ang che; ka thlarau a chauh dawn hi: Ka lakah hian i hmai thup suh ang che; Chutilochuan khuarkhuruma chhukte ang maiin ka lo awm dah ang e." 
Psalms143:8 Zingah chuan i ngilneihna thu mi hriattir ang che; Nang ka ring si thin chia: Ka kalna tur kawng chu mi hriattir ang che; Ka rilru hi i hnenah ka dah tlat si thin a. 
Psalms143:9 Aw LALPA, mi dotute lakah chuan mi chhanhim ang che: I mi thuhruk turin i hnenah ka lo tlan a ni." 
Psalms143:10 I duhzawng tih mi zirtir ang che; ka Pathian i ni si a: I thlarau chu a tha a ni; ram dik takah chuan mi hruai ang che. 
Psalms143:11 Aw LALPA, i hming avangin mi tiharh la: I felna avangin ka nuna hi manganna ata hruai chhuak ang che.I ngilneihna avangin mi dotute chu tiboral la, Ka nuna timangangtu zawng zawng chu tiboral ang che; I chhiahhlawh ka ni si a." 
Psalms143:12 I ngilneihna avangin mi dotute chu tiboral la, Ka nuna timangangtu zawng zawng chu tiboral ang che; I chhiahhlawh ka ni si a." 
Psalms144:1 LALPA ka lungpui chu fakin awm rawh se, Ani chuan ka kutte hi ral kah a zirtir thin a, Ka kut zungtangte hi bei turin a zirtir bawk thin:" 
Psalms144:2 Ka ngilneihna leh ka kulhpui, Ka kulhbing sang leh mi chhanhimtu, Ka pawh leh ka rinna nghahna, Ka hnuaia ka mite tudawl thintu chu a ni." 
Psalms144:3 LALPA, mihring hi eng nge maw a nih a, i hriat thin ni? Mihring fapa pawh hi eng nge maw a nih a, i ngaihtuah thin ni?" 
Psalms144:4 Mihring hi engmah lo mai ang a ni a: A dam chhung nite chu hlim ral thin ang hi a ni. 
Psalms144:5 Aw LALPA, i vante tikunin lo chhuk la: Tlangte chu khawih ang che, tichuan a khu chhuak ang." 
Psalms144:6 Kawl phettir la, anniho chu tidam ang che; I thalte chu kap chhuak la, tibuai nuai ang che." 
Psalms144:7 Chung lam atangin i kut rawn ban la; Mi chhan chhuak la, tui lian atate hi mi chhanhim ang che, Mikhualte kut ata hi;" 
Psalms144:8 An ka chuan dawt a sawi a, Chhechham chung pawhin dawt an sawi." 
Psalms144:9 Aw Pathian, nangmah chawimawiin hla thar ka sa ang a: Perhkhuang hrui samw nei mi nen enangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms144:10 Amah chu a ni, lalho hnena chhandamna pe a, Khandaih mi tikhawlo thei laka a chhiahhlawh Davida chhanchhuaktu chu ni." 
Psalms144:11 Mi chhanchhuak la, mikhualte kut ata mi chhanhim ang che. An ka chuan thu engmah lo mai mai an sawi thin a, An kut ding lam chu kut ding lam dik lo a ni." 
Psalms144:12 Thlai thang duang ang mai, Kan fapate thang duang se la; Kan fanute pawh lal in kil Lung chher mawi ang lo ni se;" 
Psalms144:13 Kan buhzemte lo khatin Thil tinreng awm reiruiin, Kan beramte pawhin no sang tam tak, Sing tam tak kan phulahte hring se la," 
Psalms144:14 Kan bawngpaten phur thur thur se la, Kan ran rualte rawktu leh hruaibotu awm loin Kan kawtthlerahte mangang au thawm awm lo se la.A ni, LALPA Pathiana nei mite chu lawm takin an awm thin." 
Psalms144:15 A ni, LALPA Pathiana nei mite chu lawm takin an awm thin." 
Psalms145:1 Aw Lalber, ka Pathian, ka chawimawi ang chia: I hming hi kumkhaw tlaitluanin ka fak ang." 
Psalms145:2 Ni tin, ka fak ang chia; I hming hi kumkhaw tlaitluanin ka fak ang." 
Psalms145:3 LALPA chu a ropui a, nasa taka fak tur a ni; A ropuizia chu chhui chhuah rual ani lo." 
Psalms145:4 Chhuan khatin chhuan dang hnenah i thiltihte chu an fak chhawng zel ang a. I thiltih ropi takte chu an hriattir ang. 
Psalms145:5 Nangmah chawimawina ropui tak leh, I thimak tihte chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms145:6 Miten i thiltih rapthlak takte chakzia chu an sawi ang a; Kei pawhin i ropuizia ka hriattir bawk ang. 
Psalms145:7 I thatna ropui tak an hriat reng chu an sawi ang a, I felna thu hi hlim takin hlaah an sa ang." 
Psalms145:8 LALPA chu mi khawngaih thei, lainatnaa khat; Thinnel, ngilneihna nasa tak nei a ni." 
Psalms145:9 LALPA chu engkim chungah pawh a tha a ni; A lainatnate chu a thil siam zawng zawng chungah a awm a. 
Psalms145:10 Aw LALPA, i thilsiam zawng zawng chuan i hnenah lawm thu an hril ang a; Mi thianghlimte pawhin an fak ang che." 
Psalms145:11 I ram ropuizia thu saiwin, I thiltihtheihna thu chu titiah an la hmang ang;" 
Psalms145:12 Mihring fate hnanah a thiltih ropui takte leh, A ram mawina ropuizia hriattir turin." 
Psalms145:13 I ram chu chatuan ram tur a ni a, I thu neihna chu chhuan awm chhung zawng zawgin a awm reng ang." 
Psalms145:14 LALPA chuan tlute zawng zawng ch a chelh reng thin a, Kun ngawih ngawiha awm zawng zawngte chu a kaitho thin." 
Psalms145:15 I thil siam zawng zawng mitte chuan an nghak thin che a ni; Nangin a hun takah an chaw i pe thin. 
Psalms145:16 I kut i phar a, Thil nung zawng zawng chakna chu i tihrehsak thin." 
Psalms145:17 LALPA chu a awm dan zawng zawngah a felin, A thiltih zawng zawngah mi khawngaih thei tak a ni thin." 
Psalms145:18 LALPA chuan akotu zawng zawngte chu a hnaih thin a. Tih tak zeta amah kotu zawng zawngte chu. 
Psalms145:19 Amah tihtute duh chu a hlawhtlintir ang a; An au thawm a hria ang a, anni chu a chhandam ang." 
Psalms145:20 LALPA chuan amah hmangaihtute zawng zawng chu a vawng tha thin a; Mi suaksual erawh chu a tiboral vek ang;Ka ka hian LALPA fakna thu a sawi ang; Tin, tisa zawng zawng hian a hming thianghlim chu kumkhaw tlaitluanin fak rawh se." 
Psalms145:21 Ka ka hian LALPA fakna thu a sawi ang; Tin, tisa zawng zawng hian a hming thianghlim chu kumkhaw tlaitluanin fak rawh se." 
Psalms146:1 LALPA chu fak rawh u. Aw ka nunna, LALPA chu fak rawh." 
Psalms146:2 Ka dam chhung zawngin LALPA chu ka fak ang a: Ka nun chhung zawngin ka Pathian fakin ka zai ang. 
Psalms146:3 Mi liante chu ring suh u la, Mihring fapa, tanpuina reng reng awm lohna chu, ring hek suh u." 
Psalms146:4 A thawin a chauhsan a, ani chu a leilungah a kir leh a; Chu mi ni ngei chuan a ngaihtuahnate chu a bo nghal a ni." 
Psalms146:5 Jakoba Pathian tanpuitua nei chu, lawm takin a awm thin, LALPA Pathiana beiseina neitu chu:" 
Psalms146:6 Ani chu lei te, van te, Tuifinriatte leh an chhunga awm zawng zawng siamtu a ni; Ani chuan thutak kumkhua atan a vawng tha thin a;" 
Psalms146:7 Ani chuan hnehchhiahna tuarte tan ro a rel thin a; Ani chuan riltamte hnenah chaw a pe thin: LALPA chuan mi tangte a chhuah thin a; 
Psalms146:8 LALPA chuan mitdelte mit a tizvar thin a; LALPA chuan kun ngawih ngawihte chu a kai tho thin a; LALPA chuan mi felte chu a hmangaih thin a; 
Psalms146:9 LALPA chuan mikhualte chu a vawng tha thin a; Pa nei lo leh hmeithai chu a chelh reng thin a; Mi suaksualte kawng erawh chu a tiletling thin. 
Psalms146:10 LALPA chu kumkhuain lalah a thu ang, Aw Zion, i Pathian chu chuan zawng zawng thlengin lalah a thu ang.LALPA chu fak rawh u."

Psalms147:1 LALPA chu fak rawh u; Kan Pathian faka zai hi a tha si a; 
Psalms147:2 Chu chu a nuamin, fak hi a awm reng a ni. LALPA chuan Jerusalem chu a din leh a; Israel hnawh chhuahhote chu a hruai khawm leh a." 
Psalms147:3 Lungchhiate chu a tidam a, An hliamnate chu a tuam thin a." 
Psalms147:4 Arsi tam chin a chhiar a; An hming a vuah theuh hlawm thin a. 
Psalms147:5 Kan Lalpa chu a ropui a, thiltihtheih lamah pawh chak tak ani a; A finna chuan tawpintai a nei lo." 
Psalms147:6 LALPA chuan thuhnuairawlhte chu a chelh reng a: Mi suaksualte chu leiah a titlawm thin. 
Psalms147:7 Lawm thu sawia LALPA chawimawiin hla sa u la; tingtang nen kan Pathian fakin zai rawh u. 
Psalms147:8 Ani chuan van khi chhum a zam hliahtir a, Leilung atan ruah a buatsaih a, Tlangahte chuan hlobet a totir thin a." 
Psalms147:9 Ani chuan sa hnenah a ei tur a pe thin, Choak no hram hramte hnenah nen." 
Psalms147:10 Ani chu sakawr chakna chungah chuan a lawm lo va: Mihring ke chungahte pawh lawmna reng reng a nei thin lo. 
Psalms147:11 LALPA chuan amah tihtute chungah chuan lawmna a nei thin, A ngilneihna beiseitute chungah chuan." 
Psalms147:12 Aw Jerusalem, LALPA chu fak rawh; Aw Zion, i Pathian chu fak rawh." 
Psalms147:13 Ani chuan i kulh kawngkharte kalhna thing tlawnte a tikhauh a; I chhunga i fanau awmte chu mal a sawm si a. 
Psalms147:14 I ramri chhungah chuan remna a siam a; Buh tha ber chiin a tikhat thin che a ni. 
Psalms147:15 A thupek chu leiah hian a tir chhuak a; A thu chu chak takin a tlan thin. 
Psalms147:16 Vur sur chu beram hmul angin a pe a; Vur tla chu vut angin a theh darh thin. 
Psalms147:17 A tui khal chu chhang them nawi angin a paih chhuak thin a: Ama vawhna hmaah chuan tu nge ding thei ang? 
Psalms147:18 A thu chu a tir chhuak a, chung chu a titui a: A thli a tlehtir a, chutichuan tuite chu a lo luang thin." 
Psalms147:19 A thu chu Jakob-ho hnenah a lantir a, A thuruatte leh a rorelte pawh chu Israel-ho hnenah a lantir thin.Ani chuan eng hnam chungah mah chutiang chuan a ti ngai lo: A rorel lah chu an hre hek lo. LALPA chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms147:20 Ani chuan eng hnam chungah mah chutiang chuan a ti ngai lo: A rorel lah chu an hre hek lo. LALPA chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms148:1 LALPA chu fak rawh u. Van atangte khian LALPA fak u la: Chung lamahte khian amah chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms148:2 A vantirhkoh zawng zawngte u, amah chu fak u la: A sipaiho zawng zawngte u, amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms148:3 Ni leh thlate u, amah chu fak u la: Arsi engho zawng zawngte u, amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms148:4 Van sangte u, amah chu fak u la, Van chunga tui awmte u, amah chu fak ve rawh u." 
Psalms148:5 Chungho chuan LALPA hming chu fak rawh se: Ani chuan thu a pe a, siamin an lo awm ta si a." 
Psalms148:6 Ani chuan chungho chu kumkhaw tlaitluan atan a tinghet a: Thu, boral lo tur chu, a ruat a." 
Psalms148:7 Lei atang hian, Nangni drakonte leh tui thuk zawng zawngte u:" 
Psalms148:8 Mei leh rial te, vur sur leh chhumte u; A thu zawm thin thlipuite u:" 
Psalms148:9 Tlang lian leh tlang te zawng zawngte u; Thing rah duhte leh sidar thing zawng zawngte u: 
Psalms148:10 Ram sate leh ran zawng zawngte u; Rannungte leh chungleng savate u: 
Psalms148:11 Leia lalte leh mi tinrengte u; Mi liante leh leia roreltu zawng zawngte u: 
Psalms148:12 Nula leh tlangvalte, Putar leh naupangte u, LALPA chu fak rawh u:" 
Psalms148:13 Chungho chuan LALPA hming chu fak rawh se; A hming chauh chu chawisanin a awm si a: A ropuina chuan lei leh van a khum daih a.A mite ki chu a chawimawi bawk a, A mi thianghlim zawng zawng fakna chu; Israel fa, a kianga mite fakna chu, LALPA chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms148:14 A mite ki chu a chawimawi bawk a, A mi thianghlim zawng zawng fakna chu; Israel fa, a kianga mite fakna chu, LALPA chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms149:1 LALPA chu fak rawh u. LALPA chawimawiin hla thar sa u la, Mi thianghlimte inkhawmnaah chuan a fakna hla sa rawh u." 
Psalms149:2 Israel-ho chu an siamtu chungah chuan lawm se la: Zion fate chu an Lalber chungah chuan hlim rawh se. 
Psalms149:3 An hming chu lamin fak se la Khuangte leh tingtang nen amah fakin zai rawh se. 
Psalms149:4 LALPA chu a mite chungah a lawm si thin a: Thuhnuairawlhte chu chhandamnai a timawi ang. 
Psalms149:5 Mi thianghlimte chu ropuinaha lawm takin awm se la; An khumlaizawlahte hlimin zai rawh se. 
Psalms149:6 Pathian chawimawia fakna chu an kaah awm se la, Khandaih hriam tawn an kutah awm bawk rawh se;" 
Psalms149:7 Hnam tin, chunga phuba laa, Mi tin, chunga hremna thlentir tur leh," 
Psalms149:8 An lalte chu khaidiata phuar a, An mi thate chu thir kawlte buntir tur leh,rorel ziak saa an chunga rel turin: Chu chawimawina ch a mi thianghlim zawng zawng chuan an nei hlawm a. LALPA chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms149:9 rorel ziak saa an chunga rel turin: Chu chawimawina ch a mi thianghlim zawng zawng chuan an nei hlawm a. LALPA chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms150:1 LALPA chu fak rawh u. Pathian chu a hmun thianghlimah chuan fak u la: 
Psalms150:2 A thiltihtheihna boruak zau takah khian amah chu fak rawh u. A thiltih ropui takte avangin amah chu fak u la: 
Psalms150:3 A ropui nasat em avangin amah chu fak rawh u. Tawtawrawt riin amah chu fak u la: 
Psalms150:4 Perhkhuang leh tingtangin amah chu fak rawh u. Khuangte leh lamin amah chu fak ula: Tingtang chi hrang hrang leh phenglawngin amah chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms150:5 Darbenthek ri thum miin amah chu fak u la: Darbenthek ri fiak miin amah chu fak rawh u.Engkim, thaw thei tawh phawt chuan LALPA chu fak rawh se. LALPA chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms150:6 Engkim, thaw thei tawh phawt chuan LALPA chu fak rawh se. LALPA chu fak rawh u." 
Proverbs1:1 Israel lal Davida fapa Solomona thufing; 
Proverbs1:2 Finna leh zirtirna, hriat theihna tur te, hriatthiamna thu ngaihruat dan thiamna te;" 
Proverbs1:3 Felna te, rorel te, hleih nei loa hmang hre taka zirtirna pawm dan thiamna te;" 
Proverbs1:4 Mi mawlte remhriatna neihtir tur te, tlangvalte hriatna leh ngaihruat thiamna neihtirna tur leh" 
Proverbs1:5 Mi fingten an hriat a, an thiamna te a lo pun a, thil ngai thiam miin rorelna fingte a man a man thiamna tur te," 
Proverbs1:6 Thufing leh a hrilhfiana te, mi fing thu leh an thuril sawite hriatthiamnate chu." 
Proverbs1:7 LALPA tih hi finna bul a ni a; nimahsela mi ate chuan finna leh zirtirna an hmusit thin. 
Proverbs1:8 Ka fapa, i pa zirtirna che chu ngaithla la, i nu zirtirna che chu hawisan suh." 
Proverbs1:9 I lu tan parthi mawi tak a ni ang a, i nghawng tan thi ang a ni dawn si a." 
Proverbs1:10 Ka fapa, mi sualin an thlem che chuan zawm suh." 
Proverbs1:11 Hawh te, thisen chhuah turin i chang ang khai, a vang engmah awm loin pawi khawih lote chu i chang ru teh ang;" 
Proverbs1:12 Seol angin a nung chungin i lem teh ang, an puma khuarkhuruma tla angin." 
Proverbs1:13 Thil hlu tak takte kan nei ang a, rallak sumin kan in kan tikhat dawn nia." 
Proverbs1:14 Kan zingah lo tel ve la, tangka ip kan intawm dawn nia,"" te an tihin," 
Proverbs1:15 Ka fapa, an zingah chuan tel ve suh la, an kawng ata inthiarfihlim rawh." 
Proverbs1:16 An kete chu thil sual lamah an tlan a, thisen chauh turin an hmanhmawh ruai thin." 
Proverbs1:17 Len chu a lo thlawn maia zar a ni, eng sava mithmuhah pawh." 
Proverbs1:18 Chungte chuan anmahni thisen an chang a, an nunna chang ru an ni." 
Proverbs1:19 Chutiang chu a ni, hlawknaa duham apiangte kawng chu; a neitute nun a laksak thin." 
Proverbs1:20 Kawtthlerah finna chu ring takin a au a, kawtthler thuamahte chuan a aw a chhuah a;" 
Proverbs1:21 Mipui inkhawmna lai berah a au a, khawpuiah khaw luhna kawngkhar bulah chuan a au chhuak a." 
Proverbs1:22 Nangni mi mawlte u, eng chen nge mawlna in ngainat dawn? Eng chen nge hmusittute hmuhsitnaah in hlim ang a, mi ate'n finna in huat dawn?" 
Proverbs1:23 Ka zilhna che u lamah hian lo hawi rawh u: ngai teh u, in chungah ka thlarau ka leih ang a, ka thu ka hriattir ang che u." 
Proverbs1:24 Ka ko che u a, in duh lo a, ka kut ka phar a, tuma'n in ngaisang lo a;" 
Proverbs1:25 Ka remruat zawng zawng chu engmah loah in ngai zawk a, ka zilhna reng reng in pawm duh lo a." 
Proverbs1:26 Chuvangin kei pawh in vanduai ni chuan ka nui ang a, in hlauh hun a lo thlen chuan ka nuihsan ang che u," 
Proverbs1:27 In hlauhna thlipui anga a lo thlen a, in vanduaina thawngaleivir anga a lo thlen a, hrehawmna leh manganna in chunga a lo thlen hunin." 
Proverbs1:28 Chutichuan min ko ang a, nimahsela ka chhang lo ang: zing takah min zawng ang a, nimahsela min hmu lo ang;" 
Proverbs1:29 hriatna chu an huat a, LALPA tihna chu an thlan loh avangin:" 
Proverbs1:30 Ka remruat pakhat te mah an duh lo a, ka zilhna zawng zawngte chu an ngainep a." 
Proverbs1:31 Chuvangin anmahni kawng rah chu an ei ang a, anmahni suangtuahnain an tlai ang." 
Proverbs1:32 Mi mawlte hnungtawlhna chuan anmahni a that ang a, mi ate hlawhtlinnain anmahni a tiboral ang.Ka thu pawm apiangte erawh chu him takin an awm ang a, thil tha lo hlau loin an awm hle hle ang." 
Proverbs1:33 Ka thu pawm apiangte erawh chu him takin an awm ang a, thil tha lo hlau loin an awm hle hle ang." 
Proverbs2:1 Ka fapa, ka thute i dawn a, ka thupekte i khawl khawm a," 
Proverbs2:2 Finna lama i beng i chhit a, i thinlung hriatna lam atan i pek chuan;" 
Proverbs2:3 A ni, hriatna i auh a, hriatthiam theihna pawh i auh chuan," 
Proverbs2:4 Tangkarua anga i zawn a, ro phum ruk anga i zawn chuan," 
Proverbs2:5 LALPA tih nachang i lo hria ang a, Pathian hriatna chu i chhar chhuak ang." 
Proverbs2:6 LALPA chuan finna a pe thin a, a kaa tang chuan finna leh hriatthiamna a lo chhuak thin a ni:" 
Proverbs2:7 Mi tluangte tan finna dik a chhek khawm thin a, rinawm taka awm thinte tan phaw a ni;" 
Proverbs2:8 Rorelna kawngte a ven a, a mi thianghlimte kawng a vawn that theihna'n." 
Proverbs2:9 Tichuan felna leh rorelna chu i lo hre thiam ang a, hleih neih lohna nen, a ni, kawng tha tinreng pawh." 
Proverbs2:10 I thinlungah finna chu a lut ang a, i nunna atan hriatna chu tui tak a n ang;" 
Proverbs2:11 Remhriatnain a veng ang chia, hriatthiamnain a enkawl ang che;" 
Proverbs2:12 Sual kawng ata chhan chuak tur che leh thil awihawm lo sawi mite laka chhanchhuak tur chein; 
Proverbs2:13 Chu'ngte chuan kawng thima kal turin kawng dik chu an kalsan a; 
Proverbs2:14 Thil tha lo tih chu an lawmzawng a ni a, thil sual bengtla lo mai maiahte an lawm thin;" 
Proverbs2:15 An kawngte chu a kawi a, an rintlak loh." 
Proverbs2:16 Hmeichhe sual lakah chuan a chhan ang che, kam thluma thlemtu che lakah;" 
Proverbs2:17 A tleirawl lai thian kalsan a, a Pathian thuthlung theihnghilhtu lak ata chu." 
Proverbs2:18 A in chuan thihna lam a hawi a, a kawngte chuan mitthi lam." 
Proverbs2:19 A hnena kal reng reng chu an kir leh tawh ngia lo a, nunna kawng an pawh ngai hek lo;" 
Proverbs2:20 Mi tha kawng i zawh a, mi fel kawng chu i zawh zel theihna'n." 
Proverbs2:21 Mi tluangte chu leilungah hian an cheng ang a, tha famkimte chu chutah chuan an awm reng a;Mi suaksualte erawh chu leilung ata tihboral an ni ang a, vervek taka titute chu tihboral phiar an ni ang." 
Proverbs2:22 Mi suaksualte erawh chu leilung ata tihboral an ni ang a, vervek taka titute chu tihboral phiar an ni ang." 
Proverbs3:1 Ka fapa, ka dan chu theihnghilh suh la, i thinlungin ka thupekte chu zawm reng zawk rawh se;" 
Proverbs3:2 Dam ni leh kum te, thlamuannate a pek belhchhahsak dawn che nia." 
Proverbs3:3 Khawngaihna leh thu tak chuan hnuchhawn che suh se, i nghawngah zem tlat la, i thinlung phekah ziak rawh." 
Proverbs3:4 Tichuan pathian leh mihring mithmuhah duhsakna leh hming thatna i hlawh dawn nia. 
Proverbs3:5 I thinlung zawng zawngin LALPA ring la, nangma hriatnaah innghat suh;" 
Proverbs3:6 I kawng zawng zawngah amah hre reng la, i kawngte chu a kawhhmuh zel ang che." 
Proverbs3:7 Mahni ngaihin intifing suh la; LALPA chu tih la, sual kalsan rawh." 
Proverbs3:8 I lai tan hriselna a ni ang a, i ruh tan thling a ni ang." 
Proverbs3:9 I sumin LALPA chawimawi la. I thil lo pung hmasa ber zawng zawngte nen; 
Proverbs3:10 Tichuan i buh in chu a lo khat liam ang a, i sawrkhur uain tharin a luang liam ang." 
Proverbs3:11 Ka fapa, LALPA thununna che ngainep suh la, a zilhhauna che ning hek suh." 
Proverbs3:12 LALPA chuan a hmangaihte chu a zilhhau thin a ni, pain fa a lawm apiangte a zilhhau thin ang hian." 
Proverbs3:13 Finna hmu chhuaktu chu a nihlawh a, hriatthiamna hmu chhuaktu pawh." 
Proverbs3:14 Tangkaraw peipun aiin a peipun chu a tha zawk si a, a hlep pawh rangkachak tha mi aiin." 
Proverbs3:15 Lunghlu sen mi aiin a hlu a; thil i duhthusam theih ang zawng zawngin a hen lo. 
Proverbs3:16 A kut ding lamah dam reina a awm a, a kut vei lamah sum leh ropuina." 
Proverbs3:17 A kawngte chu nunkhaw nawmna kawng a ni a, a kawng zawng zawng chu thlamuanna a ni." 
Proverbs3:18 A vuan apiangte tan nuna thing a ni a, a kawl reng apiangte chu an hamtha e." 
Proverbs3:19 LALPA chuan finnain leilung a din a, hriatnain vante a tinghet a;" 
Proverbs3:20 A thiamnain tuifinriatte a sah a, chhumte chuan dai a fartir a." 
Proverbs3:21 Ka fapa, i mit ata kiantir suh la, finna leh ngaihruat thiamna dik tak chu vawng tlat rawh;" 
Proverbs3:22 I nunna tan nunna a ni ang a, i nghawng tan khawngaihna." 
Proverbs3:23 Tichuan i kawngah him takin i kal ang a, i ke chu a petek lo ang." 
Proverbs3:24 I mut hunin i hlau lo ang a, a ni, i mu ang a, tui takin i muhil ang." 
Proverbs3:25 Hlauhna lo awm thutte chu hlau suh la, mi suaksualte chunga tiauna a lo thlenin hlau hek suh." 
Proverbs3:26 LALPA chu i himna a ni si a, i ke chu awk lo turin a veng dawn a ni." 
Proverbs3:27 A phute tan thatna ui suh, i kuta tih theihna a awm phawt si chuan." 
Proverbs3:28 I thenawm hnenah, ""Kal leh ta rih la, lo kal leh rawh, naktukah ka pe ang che,"" ti suh, i kawl reng si chuan." 
Proverbs3:29 I thenawm chungah thil tha lo suangtuah suh, ngaihngam takin i kiangah a awm tih hre siin." 
Proverbs3:30 A vang awm loin mi sual mai suh; i pawi engmah a khawih loh chuan. 
Proverbs3:31 Mi nunrawng awt suh la, a kawng a engamah thlang suh." 
Proverbs3:32 Mi kawhmawh chu LALPA ngaihin tenawm a ni si a; mi tha famkim erawh chu a thian an ni. 
Proverbs3:33 LALPA anchhia chu mi suaksual inah a awm a, mi felte chenna erawh chu mal a sawm thin." 
Proverbs3:34 Mi hmusittute chu a hmusit thin a, inngaitlawmte erawh chu khawngaihna a pe thin.Mi fing chuan ropuina an rochung ang a, mi ate kaisanna erawh chu mualphona a ni ang." 
Proverbs3:35 Mi fing chuan ropuina an rochung ang a, mi ate kaisanna erawh chu mualphona a ni ang." 
Proverbs4:1 Ka fapate u, pa zirtirna chu ngaithla u la, hriatthiamna chu hre turin ngaithla rawh u;" 
Proverbs4:2 Zirtirna tha tak ka fah si che u a; ka zirtirna hi hawisan suh u. 
Proverbs4:3 Ka pa fapa ka ni a, ka nu fa, fapa mal duata duat ka ni a." 
Proverbs4:4 Min zirtir a, ka hnenah, ""I thinlung chuan ka thute hi vawng reng se la; Ka thupekte hi zawm la, nung rawh,"" a ti a." 
Proverbs4:5 Finna nei la, hriat thiamna nei rawh; theihnghilh suh la, ka kaa thu chhuakte hi chhiat lam pansan suh." 
Proverbs4:6 Hawisan suh la, a humhim ang che; hmangaih la, a veng ang che." 
Proverbs4:7 Finna hi thupui ber a ni a; chuvangin fina hi nei rawh; a ni, i thil neih zawng zawng chan pawhin finna hi nei rawh." 
Proverbs4:8 Chawimawi la, anin a chawi sang ang che; i lawm chuan zahawmah a siam ang che." 
Proverbs4:9 Khawngaihna lukhum i lu a khumtir ang a, mawina lallukhum a pe ang che." 
Proverbs4:10 Aw ka fapa, ka thu ngaithla la, pawm rawh; tichuan i dam chhung kum a lo tam ang." 
Proverbs4:11 Finna kawngin ka zirtir chia, thatna kawngah ka hruai chia." 
Proverbs4:12 I kal laiin i pheichheh a zang ang a; i tlan pawhin i petek lo ang. 
Proverbs4:13 Zirtirna chu vuan tlat la, chhuah suh; vawng tlat rawh, i nunna a ni si a." 
Proverbs4:14 Mi suaksual kawngah chuan lut suh la, mi sual kawngah chuan kal suh." 
Proverbs4:15 Pumpelh la, a kiangah kal suh; hawisan la, kal zel rawh." 
Proverbs4:16 Pawi an khawih phawt loh chuan an mu ngai lo a, tute emaw tal chhiatna an thlensak loh chan an mut a chhuak thei lo." 
Proverbs4:17 Suahsualna chhang an ei a, nunrawnna uain an in thin." 
Proverbs4:18 Mi felte kawng erawh chu chhun en la tak pawha eng zual deuh deuh, eng fim tak ang a ni." 
Proverbs4:19 Mi suaksualte kawng chu a thim a, eng nge an chhuih an hre lo." 
Proverbs4:20 Ka fapa, ka thu ngaithla la, ka thu sawiah i beng dawh rawh." 
Proverbs4:21 I mithmuh ata chhuahtir suh; i thinlung lai takah pai rawh. 
Proverbs4:22 A hmutute tan nunna ani a, an tisa zawng zawng tan hriselna a ni si a." 
Proverbs4:23 Thil dang bera aiin i thinlung veng tha rawh, nunna lo chhuahna a ni si a." 
Proverbs4:24 Tawng chaltlai bansan la, mi bum ching suh." 
Proverbs4:25 I mitin hma lam en la, ngil takin hma lam thlir rawh." 
Proverbs4:26 I ke tan kawng tirualrem la, i kawng zawng zawng tihngheh ni rawh se.Ding lam emaw, vei lamah emaw peng suh; sual ata i ke sawn rawh." 
Proverbs4:27 Ding lam emaw, vei lamah emaw peng suh; sual ata i ke sawn rawh." 
Proverbs5:1 Ka fapa, ka finna ngaithla la, ka hriatnaah i beng dawh rawh," 
Proverbs5:2 Ngaihruat thiamna i vawn a, i leiin hriatna a vawn theihna'n." 
Proverbs5:3 Hmeichhe sual hmui ata khawizu a far a, a hmui chu hriak aiin a nal si;" 
Proverbs5:4 A tawpna erawh chu sai angin a kha a, khandaih hriam tawn angin a hriam." 
Proverbs5:5 A ke chu thihnaah a chhuk a, a ke penin Seol lam a pan." 
Proverbs5:6 Chutichuan nunna kawng rualrem a hmu lo a, a kawngte chu a nghet lo a, a hre si lo." 
Proverbs5:7 Chuvangin ka fapate u, ka thu ngaithla u la, ka kaa thu hi hawisan teh suh u khai." 
Proverbs5:8 I kawng chu a hnen ata sawn daih la, a kawngka va hnaih suh." 
Proverbs5:9 Chutilochuan i ropuina chu mi dang a pe ang a, i kumte chu mi nun chhia i pe dah ang a," 
Proverbs5:10 Ram dang mite chu i thahruiin i titlai ang a, i thawhrimna chu hmel hriat loh inah a awm dah ang e." 
Proverbs5:11 Tin, i tisa leh i taksa a ral hunin i hun tawp lamah chuan i tap ang a," 
Proverbs5:12 Engtiziaa zirtirna chu ka lo huat a, ka thinlungin zilhhauna chu lo ngainep nge maw ni aw?" 
Proverbs5:13 Mi zritrtu thu lah ka lo awi ta hek lo a, mi zirtirtute chungah ka beng ka lo dawh ta bawk hek lo;" 
Proverbs5:14 'Mipuite leh pungkhawmho zingah chuan ka lo thih teuh hle chu le!' i la ti ang. 
Proverbs5:15 Nangma tuibel ata tui in la, nangma tuichhunchhuaha tui thar lam chu." 
Proverbs5:16 I tuihalnate chu ram tina luang darhin kawtthlerahte lui tui a luang dawn em ni? 
Proverbs5:17 I tan chauh ni se la, ram dang mite tawmpui lohin." 
Proverbs5:18 I tuichhunchhuah chu malsawmin awm se la, i tleirawl lai nupuiah chuan hlim rawh." 
Proverbs5:19 Zukpui duhawm tak leh zukchal nalh tak angin englai pawhin a tang chhung chuan tilungawi fo che se la, a hmangaihnaah chuan lawm fo rawh." 
Proverbs5:20 Enga tan nge nang, ka fapa chuan hmeichhe sual i lawm ang a, a tang i pawm ang?" 
Proverbs5:21 Mihring kawngte chu LALPA mithmuhah a awm a, a kawng zawng zawng a tihrualremsak thin." 
Proverbs5:22 Ama khawlohna ngeiin mi suaksual chu a man ang a, a sualna hruizena thlunin a awm ang.Zirtirna tlakchham vangin a thi ang a, a at em vangin a bo ang." 
Proverbs5:23 Zirtirna tlakchham vangin a thi ang a, a at em vangin a bo ang." 
Proverbs6:1 Ka fapa, i thenawm tana mawhphurtua i lo tan a, ram dang mi vuakna'na i kut i hman chuan," 
Proverbs6:2 I tawngka chhuakah i awk a, i tawngka chhuakin a man che a ni:" 
Proverbs6:3 Ka fapa, i thenawm kutah i awm tih inhriain hei hi ti la, intichhuak rawh; kal la, intihuai la, i thenawm chu luh ngut ngut rawh." 
Proverbs6:4 I mit chu muthilhtir suh la, i mit chu muthluktir hek suh." 
Proverbs6:5 Sa peltu laka sakhi a tlan chhuak ang leh sava vehtu laka sava a thlawk chhuak angin intichhuak rawh. 
Proverbs6:6 Nang, thatchhepa, fanghmir tih dante chhut la, fing rawh;" 
Proverbs6:7 Anni chuan lal te, hotute, roreltute nei loin" 
Proverbs6:8 Nipuiah chaw an chhek khawm a, a seng hunin an ei turte an seng khawm thin." 
Proverbs6:9 Aw, thatchhepa, eng chen nge i mut dawn? Eng tikah nge i muhil chu i thawh dawn?" 
Proverbs6:10 I duh chuan mu hlek la, chhing hlek rawh, kut kuangkuahin chawl hlek teh," 
Proverbs6:11 I mut hlanin i rethei hman ang a, tlakchhamnain sipai angin a rawn nang thut ang che," 
Proverbs6:12 Mi tlaktlai lo, mi khawlo chu, tawng chaltlai nen a vak vel a;" 
Proverbs6:13 A mit a siai a, a kein thu a sawi a, a kut zungtangin a zaizir thin." 
Proverbs6:14 A thinlungah luhlulna a awm a, thil sual a suangtuah reng a, inrem lohna a tuh thin." 
Proverbs6:15 Chuvangin a chhiatna a lo thleng thut ang a, vawilehkhatah tihchhiatin a awm ang a, tihthat leh theih tawh lohin." 
Proverbs6:16 Thil paruk LALPA'n a huat thin a awm a, a ni, pasarih a tenzawng tak a awm;" 
Proverbs6:17 Mit chapo te, lei daw thei te, pawi khawih lo thisen chhuahna kut te," 
Proverbs6:18 Thil tha lo suangtuah thin thunlung te, pawi khawih tura ngalchak te;" 
Proverbs6:19 Hretu der dawt sawi thin te, unau kara inrem lohna tuhtute hi." 
Proverbs6:20 Ka fapa, i pa thupek chu zawm la, i nu zirtirna chu hawisan suh." 
Proverbs6:21 I thinlungah thlung reng la, i nghawngah awrh rawh." 
Proverbs6:22 I vah velin a hruai ang chia, i mut hunin a veng ang chia, i thawh hunin a bia ang che." 
Proverbs6:23 Thupek chu khawnvar a ni a, dan chu eng a ni si a; tin, zirtirna zilhhauhna chu nunna kawng a ni;" 
Proverbs6:24 Hmeichhe khawlo lakah leh hmeichhe sual kam thlum lakah veng tur chein 
Proverbs6:25 I thinlungin a mawina it suh la, a mitmeng noin hip che suh se," 
Proverbs6:26 Nawhchizuarnu vangin pa chhang themah a chang a, uirenu chuan nunna hlu tak a zawng thin." 
Proverbs6:27 Mi a puan kang loin mei a pawm thei em ni? 
Proverbs6:28 Mi a ke kang loin meiling a rap thei em ni? 
Proverbs6:29 Chutichuan mi a thenawm nupui hnena kal a, tupawh amah va khawih chu hrem lohin a chhuak lo ang." 
Proverbs6:30 Miin a riltam tihrehna'na ruk a ruk chuan an hmusit thin lo a; 
Proverbs6:31 Nimahsela an hmuh chhuah chuan a lehsarihin a rul ang; a ina a sum zawng zawng a pe ang. 
Proverbs6:32 Mi nu uiretu chuan hriatna a nei lo a ni, ama nunna tiche tur thil a ti a ni," 
Proverbs6:33 Hliam a tuarin a hminghliau ang a, a hming a chhe hlen bawk ang." 
Proverbs6:34 Thikthuchhiatna chu mipa thinrimna a ni a, phuba lak ni chuan a zuah lo ang.Tlanna chu engahmah a ngai lo ang a; thilpek tam tak pe mah la, a lung a awi chuang lo ang." 
Proverbs6:35 Tlanna chu engahmah a ngai lo ang a; thilpek tam tak pe mah la, a lung a awi chuang lo ang." 
Proverbs7:1 Ka fapa, ka thu pawm la, ka thupekte khawl khawm rawh." 
Proverbs7:2 Ka thupekte zawm la, nungdamin awm rawh; ka dan chu mit naute angin vawng rawh." 
Proverbs7:3 I zungtangah bun la, i thinlung phekah ziak rawh." 
Proverbs7:4 Finna hnenah chuan, ""Ka farnu i ni,"" ti la, hriatna chu i laichinnu vuah rawh." 
Proverbs7:5 Hmeichhe sual laka veng a, hmeichhe khawlo thlemna laka veng tur chein." 
Proverbs7:6 Ka ina tukverh zawngdaikalh awng atang chuan ka han thlir a," 
Proverbs7:7 Mi mawl tlangval zingah chuan tlangval hriatna nei lo ka hmu a," 
Proverbs7:8 A awmna lam hnaih kawtthlerah chuan a kal tan a, a in lam a pan ta a," 
Proverbs7:9 Tlai lam thimhmulah zan thim, thim tak hnuaiah." 
Proverbs7:10 Ngai teh, nawhchizuar inthuam leh fin vervek rilru pu hmeichhiain a tawk a." 
Proverbs7:11 A awm hle hle thei lo a, a tum a ruh a, a ke chuan a ina awm a duh lo a;" 
Proverbs7:12 Kawtthlerah te, peng thuam laiah te a awm a, kil tin, kil tangah a chang thin." 
Proverbs7:13 Chutichuan a man a, a fawp a, tlangnel tak hmel puin a hnenah," 
Proverbs7:14 'Remna thilhlana inthawinate ka hlan tur a ni a, vawiinah ka thutiam ka hlen ta a." 
Proverbs7:15 Chuvangin nangmah tawh tum chein ka lo kal a ni, ngun taka zawn tum chein, tin, ka hmu ta chia." 
Proverbs7:16 Ka khumah awngphah mawi tak ka phah a, Aigupta ram lazaia tial." 
Proverbs7:17 Ka khum chu beraw te, aloe te, thakthingtein ka tirimtui a." 
Proverbs7:18 Hawh teh, zankhuain hmangaihna duhtawkin i chen ang khai, hmangaihnain inhnem ang." 
Proverbs7:19 In neitupa lah a awm si lo, hla takah a zin a;" 
Proverbs7:20 Tangka ip a keng a, thla hlei nga hunah a lo haw dawn a ni,' a ti a." 
Proverbs7:21 A tawngkam thiamin a thlem thlu a, a infak mawinain a hruai bo ta a." 
Proverbs7:22 A zui ta nghal mai a, bawng, a talhna hmuna a kal ang leh, mi a tihfin tura kawl bun tura a kal ang leh," 
Proverbs7:23 Savain a thihna tur a ni tih hre loa thalin a thin a dawh tlang thlenga thang lam a pan angin. 
Proverbs7:24 Chuvangin ka fapate u, ka thu hi ngaithla u la, ka kaa thu chhuakte hi pawm rawh u." 
Proverbs7:25 I thinlungin a kawngte chu awn suh se la, a kawngahte chuan kal bo suh." 
Proverbs7:26 Mi tam tak a hliam a, a ni, a thahte chu tam tak mai an ni.A in chu Seol kawng a ni a, thihna pindan a zuk chhun a." 
Proverbs7:27 A in chu Seol kawng a ni a, thihna pindan a zuk chhun a." 
Proverbs8:1 Finna chu a auin, hriatna chuan a aw a chhuah lo em ni?" 
Proverbs8:2 Kawng sir ko sang chungah te, kawng thuamahte a ding thin a;" 
Proverbs8:3 Khaw tawntirh kawngkaah, khaw luhna kawngka bulahte ring takin a au a." 
Proverbs8:4 Aw nangni mihringte u, ka auh che u hi, ka aw chu mihring fate tan a ni." 
Proverbs8:5 Aw, nangni mi mawlte u, remhriatna hi lo hre thiam teh u; nangni mi ate u, finna thinlung nei mi lo ni rawh u." 
Proverbs8:6 Ngaithla rawh u, thil tha tak mai ka sawi dawn a ni, ka thil sawite chu thil dik hlir a ni ang." 
Proverbs8:7 Ka ka chuan thutak a sawi chhuak ang a, suahsualna chu ka hmui tan thil tenawm a ni." 
Proverbs8:8 Ka kaa thu zawng zawngte chu a fel vel vek a ni, thu kawi leh bengtla lo reng reng a awm lo." 
Proverbs8:9 Hrethiamte tan a fiah vek a, finna hmutute tan a dik vek a ni." 
Proverbs8:10 Ka zirtirnate dawng rawh u, tangkate ni loin, tin, finna chu rangkachak duhawm mai ai pawhin." 
Proverbs8:11 Finna chu lunghlu sen mi aiin a tha zawk si a. duhthusam theih thil zawng zawng pawh a hen zo a awm lo. 
Proverbs8:12 Kei, finna chuan ka chennaa remhriatna ka siam a, finna leh ngaihruat thiamna ka hre chhuak thin." 
Proverbs8:13 LALPA tih chu sual huat hi a ni; chapona te, uanthuanna te, thil tha lo chinna te, tawng chaltlai te hi ka haw takzet a ni." 
Proverbs8:14 Remruat leh hriatna dik hi ka ta a ni a; hriatthiamna ka ni a, chak tak ka ni." 
Proverbs8:15 Kei mi hmnagin lalin ro a rel a, hotuten rorelna felin thu an titlu thin a." 
Proverbs8:16 Kei mi hmangin hotuten ro an rel a, mi lian te, leilunga roreltute zawng zawng pawhin." 
Proverbs8:17 Mi hmangaihtu chu ka hmangaih a, thahnemngai taka mi zawngtute chuan mi hmu ang." 
Proverbs8:18 Sum leh ropuinate ka hnenah a awm a, a ni, sum leh felna tlo tak mai chu." 
Proverbs8:19 Ka rah chhuah chu rangkachak aiin a tha zakw a, a ni, rangkachak tha mi ai pawhin; ka lak luh chu tangkaraw tha mi aiin." 
Proverbs8:20 Felna kawng ka zawh a, rorelna kawng takah;" 
Proverbs8:21 Mi hmangaihtute chu sum ka rochuntir theihna'n leh an ro bawmte ka tihkhah theihna'n. 
Proverbs8:22 LALPA chuan a thil siam bul berah min din a, hmasanga a thil siam bul berah." 
Proverbs8:23 Chatuan ata, a tir tea din ka ni, leilung awm hma rengin." 
Proverbs8:24 Tuifinriat la awm hma daihin ka piang tawh a, tuikhur tui tam tak la awm hma daihin." 
Proverbs8:25 Tlang liante an din hma leh tlang tete awm hmain ka piang tawh a," 
Proverbs8:26 Leilung a la din hma leh ramte a din hma, khawvela vaivut pawh a la awm tan hma daihin." 
Proverbs8:27 Vante a tihngheh laiin ka awm tawh a, tuifinriat chunga kal hualna a siam laiin," 
Proverbs8:28 Chung lam van a tihngheh laiin, tuifinriat a lo nghe laiin;" 
Proverbs8:29 Tuite chuan a thu pek an bawhchhiat lohna tura tuifinriat rite a siamsak a, leilung nghahchhan a ruat lai khan;" 
Proverbs8:30 Chutih lai chuan mi themthiam angin ni tin a kiangah ka awm a, a lawmna ka ni a. A bulah ka hlim em em bawk thin." 
Proverbs8:31 Chen theihna a leilungah hlim taka awmin ka lawmna chu mihring fate chungah a ni. 
Proverbs8:32 Khai le, ka fapate u, ka thu ngaithla rawh u, ka kawng zawhtute chu mi nihlawh an si a." 
Proverbs8:33 Zirtirna chu ngaithla u la, fing u la, duh lo suh u." 
Proverbs8:34 Ka kawngka bulah nghak a, ka kawt hung kawngkaa nghak renga ka thu ngaithlatu chu a eng a thawl e." 
Proverbs8:35 Mi hmu apiang chuan nunna a hmu a ni si a, LALPA duhsakna a dawng ang a.Amaherawhchu, ka chunga sual apiang chuan ama nunna a tikhawlo a ni." 
Proverbs8:36 Amaherawhchu, ka chunga sual apiang chuan ama nunna a tikhawlo a ni." 
Proverbs9:1 Finna chuan a in a sa a, a ban pasarih a phun a;" 
Proverbs9:2 A rante a talh a; a uainte a chawhpawlh a; a dawhkanah pawh ei tur a hlui a. 
Proverbs9:3 A nulate a tir chhuak a, khuaa hmun sangahte a au a," 
Proverbs9:4 'Mi mawl apiangte chu he lamah hian lo kal rawh se,' tiin. Tin, hriatna nei lote chu," 
Proverbs9:5 'Lo kal u la, ka chhang ei u la, ka uain chawhpawlh chu in rawh u." 
Proverbs9:6 Aw nangni mi mawlte u, atna kawng chu chhuahsan u la, nung rawh u; Tin, hriatna kawngah chuan kal rawh u,' a ti a." 
Proverbs9:7 Hmusit ching zilhtu chuan tihtauh khumna a tawk thin a, mi suaksual zilhtu chuan kut tuarna a insiam thin." 
Proverbs9:8 Hmuhsit ching mi chu zilh suh, a haw dah ang che, mi fing zilh la, a hmangaih ang che." 
Proverbs9:9 Mi fing zilh la, a fing lehzual sauh dawn nia; mi fel zirtir la, thiamnaah a lo pung dawn nia." 
Proverbs9:10 LALPA tih hi finna bul a ni a, mi thianghlima hriatna hi hriatthiamna a ni." 
Proverbs9:11 Keimahin i nite chu tihpun a ni ang a, i dam chhung kumte chu a pung ang." 
Proverbs9:12 I lo fin chuan, i tana fing i lo ni ang. Hmusittu i nih chuan nangmah chauhin i tuar ang." 
Proverbs9:13 Hmeichhe a chu a awm hle hle thei lo a, a mawl a, engmah a hre lo." 
Proverbs9:14 A kawngkaah a thu thin a, khua hmun sangtea thutphahah chuan," 
Proverbs9:15 Kawnga lo kal apiangte chu," 
Proverbs9:16 'Mi mawl apiangte chu he lamah lo kal rawh u,' tia ko turin; tin, hriatna nei lote hnenah chuan," 
Proverbs9:17 'Ruk tui chu a thlum a, a ruka chhang ei chu a tui a ni,' a ti a.Nimahsela chutah chuan mitthi an awm tih leh a mi sawmte chu Seol rila awm an nih a hre lo." 
Proverbs9:18 Nimahsela chutah chuan mitthi an awm tih leh a mi sawmte chu Seol rila awm an nih a hre lo. 
Proverbs10:1 Solomona thufing - Fapa fingin pa lawm a siam a, fapa a erawh chu nu rihna ni." 
Proverbs10:2 Suahsualna ro chuan hlawkna a nei lo a, felna erawh chuan thihna ata a chhan chhuak." 
Proverbs10:3 LALPA chuan mi fel nunna chu riltam a phal lo ang a, mi suaksualte duhthusam erawh chu a paih bosak thin a." 
Proverbs10:4 Kut dawngdah chuan retheihna a thlen thin a, mi taima kut erawh chu a hausakna a thlen thin." 
Proverbs10:5 Buh seng laia inchhek khawl chu fapa fing a ni a, a seng hun laia muhil erawh chu fapa, mualphona thlen thintu a ni." 
Proverbs10:6 Mi fel lu-ah chuan malsawmnate a awm a, mi suaksual ka erawh chu nunrawnnain a tuam." 
Proverbs10:7 Mi fel hriat rengna chu malsawmna ani a, mi suaksual hming erawh chu a tawih ral ang." 
Proverbs10:8 Mi fing chuan thinlungin thupekte a dawng thin a, mi a kamtam erawh chu a tlu ang." 
Proverbs10:9 Ngil taka kal chu, muanawm takin a kal thin a, a kawng tikhawlotu erawh chu hriat chhuahin a awm ang." 
Proverbs10:10 Mit siaitu chuan lungngaihna a thlen a, mi a kamtam chu a tlu ang." 
Proverbs10:11 Mi fel ka chu nunna tuikhur a ni a, mi suaksual ka erawh chu nunrawnnain a tuam." 
Proverbs10:12 Huatnain inhauhna a chawk chhuak a, hmangaihna erawh chuan bawhchhiatna zawng zawng a khuh thin." 
Proverbs10:13 Ngaihruat dik thiam mi kaah chuan finna hmuh a ni a; amaherawhchu hriatthiamna nei lo mi hnungzang tan tiang a awm. 
Proverbs10:14 Mi fingte chuan hriatna an khawl khawm a; mi a ka erawh chu boral hnaih rengna a ni. 
Proverbs10:15 Mi hausa sum chu a khawpui nghet a ni a; mi rethei boralna chu an pachhiatna a ni. 
Proverbs10:16 Mi fel thawhrimna chuan nuna a thlen a, mi suaksual hlawkna chuan sualna." 
Proverbs10:17 Thununna pawm chu nuna kawngah a awm a, zilhhauna hawisantu erawh chuan a tisual thin." 
Proverbs10:18 Huatna zepte chu hmui dawthei nei mi a ni a, mi relna thu chhakchhuak mi chu mi a a ni." 
Proverbs10:19 Thu tam takah chuan a bawhchhiatna a awm thin a, a ka sum thei mi erawh chuan fing takin a ti thin." 
Proverbs10:20 Mi fel lei chu tangkaraw tha mi ang a ni a, mi suaksual thinlung erawh chu engmah hu a ni lo." 
Proverbs10:21 Mi fel ka chuan mi tam tak a chawm a, mi a erawh chu hriatthiamna tlachhamin a thi." 
Proverbs10:22 LALPA malsawmna chuan a tihausa thin a, lungngaihna a belhchhah thin lo." 
Proverbs10:23 Mi a tan chuan thil sual tih hi nuamsip bawlna ang a ni a, chutiang bawk chuan hriatthiamna nei mi tan chuan finna chu a ni." 
Proverbs10:24 Mi suaksual chu, a hlauh ang ngeiin a chungah a lo thleng ang: mi fel duhthusam chu pek a ni ang." 
Proverbs10:25 Thawngaleivir a lo virin mi suaksual chu a boral a, mi fel rawh chu chatuan lungphum a ni." 
Proverbs10:26 Ha tan uain thur leh mit tan meikhu angin mi thatchhia chu a tirtu tan a ni ang. 
Proverbs10:27 LALPA tihna chuan dam chhung ni a tisei a, nimahsela mi suaksual kumte chu tihtawi a ni ang." 
Proverbs10:28 Mi fel nghahfak chu lawmna a ni ang a, mi suaksual hmachhuan erawh chu a boral ang." 
Proverbs10:29 Mi dak tak tan LALPA kawng chu kulhbing a ni ang a, thil tha lo titu tan erawh chuan boralna a ni ang." 
Proverbs10:30 Mi felte chu tihsawnin an awm lo ang a, mi suaksualte erawh chu leilungah an awm lo ang." 
Proverbs10:31 Mi fel ka chuan fina a chhak chhuak a, tawng chaltlai lei erawh chu tanchhum a ni ang.Mi fel ka chuan pawm tlak chu a hria a, mi suaksual ka erawh chu chaltlai takin a tawngchhuak thin." 
Proverbs10:32 Mi fel ka chuan pawm tlak chu a hria a, mi suaksual ka erawh chu chaltlai takin a tawngchhuak thin." 
Proverbs11:1 Bukna dik lo hi LALPA mithmuhin thil tenawm ani a, khin dik chiah erawh chu a lawmzawng a ni." 
Proverbs11:2 Chapona a lo awmin mualphoin a lo awm a, inngaitlawmte hnenah chuan finna a awm." 
Proverbs11:3 Mi fel rilru thatna chuan anmahni a hruai ang a, mi vervekte luhlulna erawh chuan anmahni a tiboral ang." 
Proverbs11:4 Thinur ni chuan sum leh paiin tangkaina a nei lo ang. Felna erawh chuan thihna ata a chhanchhuak ang. 
Proverbs11:5 Mi tha famkim felna chuan a kawng a kawhhmuh ang a; mi suaksual erawh chu ama suahsualnain a titlu ang. 
Proverbs11:6 Mi dik tak felna chuan anmahni a chhan chhuak ang a, vervek taka titute erawh chu anmahni pawikhawihna ngeia manin an awm ang." 
Proverbs11:7 Mi suaksual chu a thihin a hmachhuan chu a boral ang a, thil tha lo titute nghahfak chu a boral ang." 
Proverbs11:8 Mi fel chu manganna ata chhuakin a awm a, mi suaksualin a hmun chu a luah thung a." 
Proverbs11:9 Pathian ngaihsak lo mi chuan a kain a thenawmte a tiboral a, mi fel erawh chu hriatna vangin chhanchhuahin a awm ang." 
Proverbs11:10 Mi felte chunga thil a tluan laiin khua a hlim a, mi suaksualte an thihin au dur durna a awm a." 
Proverbs11:11 Mi felte malsawmnain khua chawimawiin a awm a, mi suaksualte ka erawh chuan a tichhia." 
Proverbs11:12 A thenawm hmusittu chua fina a nei lo a, hriatna nei mi erawh chu a ngawi thin." 
Proverbs11:13 Mi kamtam tei ruai mi chuan thurukte a tilang a, mi rilru rinawm nei mi chuan thil a thup thin." 
Proverbs11:14 Inhruaina fing awm lohnaah chuan mite an tlu thin a, remruat thiam tamnaah himna a awm." 
Proverbs11:15 Tupawh ram dang mi tana mawhphurtua insiam chuan lungngaihna a insiam ang a. Mawhphurtua insiam hawtu erawh chuan ngaihngam taka awmna a nei. 
Proverbs11:16 Hmeichhe tha chuan zahawmna a chang ang a, pawng lak ching miin sum a chang ang." 
Proverbs11:17 Zahngaithei mi chuan ama nunna atan tha a ti thin a, mi nunrawng erawh chuan ama tisa buaina a thlen thin." 
Proverbs11:18 Mi suaksual chuan bumna hlawh a dawng thin a, felna tuhtu erawh chuan a tak tak hlawh a dawng thin." 
Proverbs11:19 Felna nghet taka ding mi chuan nunna a chang ang a, thil sual umtu chuan ama thihna." 
Proverbs11:20 Mi rilru kawhmawhte chu Lalpa tana tenawm an ni a, an kawnga mi fel famkimte erawh chu a lawmzawng an ni." 
Proverbs11:21 Inthurual mah se la, mi suaksualte chu hrem lohin an chhuak lo ang a, mi fel thlahte erawh chu chhan chhuahin an awm ang." 
Proverbs11:22 Hmeichhe hmeltha ngaihruat thiamna nei lo chu vawk hnara rangkachak khang vuah ang a ni. 
Proverbs11:23 Mi fel duhthusam chu thil tha chauh a ni a, mi suaksual hmachhuan erawh chu thinurna a ni." 
Proverbs11:24 Sem darh chu pun lehzualna a ni a, mamawh tawka liam kawmpui chu tlakranna a ni." 
Proverbs11:25 Mi thilphal nunna chu tihthauin a awm a, tui leih thintu chuan mahni pawh a inleih a ni." 
Proverbs11:26 Buh kawmpuitu chu miin anchhia an lawh ang a, a zuartu lu chungah erawh chuan malsawmna a awm ang." 
Proverbs11:27 Thahnemngai taka thatna zawngtu chuan duhsakna a zawng a ni a, pawikhawih tur zawngtu erawh chu, ama chungah a thleng ang." 
Proverbs11:28 A sum ring mi chu a vuai ang a, mi fel erawh chu hnim angin a duah ang." 
Proverbs11:29 Mahni chhungkua tibuaitu chuan thli a rochung ang a, mi a chu mi thinlung fing chhiahhlawhah a awm ang." 
Proverbs11:30 Mi fel rah chu nunna thing a ni a, mi fing chuan mi rilru a hneh thin.Ngai teh, mi fel mah leiah hian thungrulh an nih chuan, mi suaksual leh thil tisualtu chu eng ang taka nasa lehzual ni ang maw!" 
Proverbs11:31 Ngai teh, mi fel mah leiah hian thungrulh an nih chuan, mi suaksual leh thil tisualtu chu eng ang taka nasa lehzual ni ang maw!" 
Proverbs12:1 Thunnuna ngaina mi chuan hriatna a ngaina thin a, zilhhauna haw mi erawh chu ramsa ang mai a ni." 
Proverbs12:2 Mi tha chuan LALPA duhsakna a hlawh ang a, suahsualna rilru pu mi erawh chu thiam loh a chantir ang." 
Proverbs12:3 Mihring chu suahsualnain tihngheh ani lo ang a, amaherawhchu mi fel dinhmun chu a nghing lo ang." 
Proverbs12:4 Hmeichhe khawsak tha chu a pasal tan lallukhum a ni a, zahpuiawm tak thil ti erawh chu a ruh timawihtu a ni." 
Proverbs12:5 Mi fel ngaihtuahnate chu a fel a, mi suaksualte remruat erawh chu bumna a ni."
