Proverbs12:6 Mi suaksual tawngkam chu thisen chhuah tura channa a ni a, mi dik tak ka erawh chuan anmahni a chhan chhuak ang." 
Proverbs12:7 Mi suaksualte chu paih thlakin an awm a, an bo thin a, mi fel chhung erawh chu an awm reng ang," 
Proverbs12:8 Mi a fin dan ang zela fakin a awm ang a, mi luhlul erawh chu hmuhsit a ni ang." 
Proverbs12:9 Mahni inngaihlua chhang pawh nei si lo ai chuan, tuma ngaihsan loh chhiahhlawh nei chu a tha zawk." 
Proverbs12:10 Mi fel chuan a ran nuna a engto a, nimahsela mi suaksual zahngaihna nem ber pawh hi a rawng a ni." 
Proverbs12:11 A lei lettu chuan chhang a ngah ang a, mi lelo tih dan zawmtu chu finna nei lo mi a ni." 
Proverbs12:12 Mi suaksualte chuan mi tha lote len an duh a, mi felte bul erawh chuan rah an chhuah thin." 
Proverbs12:13 Mi sual chu ama hmuia chhuak ngeiin a awk thin a, mi felte erawh chuan buaina an pumpelh." 
Proverbs12:14 Miin a tawngkam chhuak rah chu a seng ang a, ama kut thiltih ngei chu a hnena hlan a ni ang." 
Proverbs12:15 Mi a kawng chu ama mitah chuan a dik a, mi fing erawh chuan rorel an ngaichang thin." 
Proverbs12:16 Mi a buaina chu a lang nghal a, mi fing erawh chuan mualphona a thup thin." 
Proverbs12:17 Thu dik sawi chuan felna a entir a, hretu dik lo erawh chuan bumna." 
Proverbs12:18 Khandaih chhun anga na taka mi chhun thu sawi an awm a, mi fing lei erawh chu damna a ni." 
Proverbs12:19 Thu tak hmui chu kumkhuain tihngheh a ni ang a, lei dawthei erawh chu rei lo tea tan chauh a ni." 
Proverbs12:20 Thil tha lo suangtuahtue thinlungah chuan buymna a wm a, remna roreltute pawh chuan lawmna an nei." 
Proverbs12:21 Mi felte chungah chuan pawi khawihna a thleng lo ang a, mi suaksualte erawh chu thl tha loin an khat ang." 
Proverbs12:22 Hmui dawthei hi LALPA tenzawng tak ani a, dik taka titute erawh chu a lawmzawng an ni." 
Proverbs12:23 Mi fing chuan fina a thup a. Mi a thinlung erawh chuan atna a puang. 
Proverbs12:24 Mi taima kut chuan rorelna a keng ang a, mi thatchhia erawh chu hna rim tak thawk tura tih a ni ang." 
Proverbs12:25 Lungkham neih hian mi a tihrehawm a, thu tha erawh chuan mi a tilawm thin." 
Proverbs12:26 Mi fel chu a thenawm tan hruaitu a ni a. Mi suaksualte kawng erawh chuan bona a thlensak thin. 
Proverbs12:27 Mi thatchhia chuan ramvaka a kah rawh tur a nei lo. Mihring sum hlu chu taihmak a ni.Felna kawngah chuan nunna a awm a, chu mi kawngah chuan thihna a awm lo." 
Proverbs12:28 Felna kawngah chuan nunna a awm a, chu mi kawngah chuan thihna a awm lo." 
Proverbs13:1 Fapa fing chuan a pa thununna a pawisa thin a, hmusit ching mi erawh chuan zilhhauna a ngaithla duh thin lo." 
Proverbs13:2 Mi tha chuan a kaa thu chhuak rah a dawng a, bum hmangte duhzawng erawh chu tharum thawh a ni." 
Proverbs13:3 A ka veng tha chuan a nunna a veng tha a ni a, a ka zau tkaa ang erawh chuan boralna a chang ang." 
Proverbs13:4 Mi thatchhe rilru chuan thil a duh thin a, nimahsela engmah a nei chuang lo a, mi taima rilru erawh chu tihtlai a ni ang." 
Proverbs13:5 Mi fel chuan dawt a hua a, mi suaksual erawh chu a renawm a, mualphona a thlen thin." 
Proverbs13:6 Felna chuan dik taka awmte chu a veng thin a, suahsualna erawh chuan mi sual a theh tlu thin." 
Proverbs13:7 Hausaa ingnai engmah nei lo an awm a, retheia inngai hausa hle si an awm." 
Proverbs13:8 Mi hausa chuan intlanna a nei a, mi rethei erawh chuan a nei ve lo." 
Proverbs13:9 Mi fel eng chu a eng tha hle a, mi suaksual khawnvar erawh chu tihmih a ni ang." 
Proverbs13:10 Chapona chuan inhauna mai a tichhuak a, thununna tha mi hnenah erawh chuan finna a awm." 
Proverbs13:11 Engmah lo mai maia sum deh chhuah chu tihriral a ni ang a; thawhrimna khawl erawh chu a pung ang. 
Proverbs13:12 Beiseina tihkhawtlai hian thinlung a tina a, duhthusam lo thleng erawh chu nunna thing a ni." 
Proverbs13:13 Thu chu ngai nep apiang chuan boralna an inthleng ang a, thupek tih apiang erawh chu lawmna pek a ni ang." 
Proverbs13:14 Mi fingte zirtirna chu nuna tuikhur a ni, thihna thang hawisanna turin." 
Proverbs13:15 Hriatna tha chuan duhsakna a dawntir a, mi vervek kawng eawh chu a bumboh." 
Proverbs13:16 Remhria zawng zawngin finnain an thawk a, mi a erawh chuan atna a zar darh thin." 
Proverbs13:17 Zualko suaksual chu thil sualah a tlu lut thin a, palai rinawm chu damna a ni." 
Proverbs13:18 Thununna duh lotu chungah chuan pachhiatna leh mualphona a thleng ang a, zilhhauna ngaisangtu erawh chu chawimawi a ni ang." 
Proverbs13:19 Duhthusam puitlina a lo awm chu rilru atan a thlum a, mi ate tan chuan sual kalsan hi thil tenawm a ni." 
Proverbs13:20 Mi fing pawl la, i lo fing ang a, mi a pawl erawh chu hrehawm tura phahna a ni." 
Proverbs13:21 Thil sualin mi sual chu a zui zel thin a, mi fel erawh chu thil thaa thungrulh a ni ang." 
Proverbs13:22 Mi tha chuan a tute thlenga rochun tur a hnutchhiah thin a, mi sual sum chu mi fel tan khawlkhawm a ni." 
Proverbs13:23 Mi rethei leilehah chuan hchaw tam tak a awm a; nimahsela rorel dik lo awmna chu tihchhiatin a awm thin. 
Proverbs13:24 Tiang hmang duh lo chuan a fa a hua a ni, a hmangaihtu erawh chuan a thunun chawt thin.Mi fel chuan a rilru tihtlaina'n a ei thin a, mi suaksual pum erawh chuan a tlachham ang." 
Proverbs13:25 Mi fel chuan a rilru tihtlaina'n a ei thin a, mi suaksual pum erawh chuan a tlachham ang." 
Proverbs14:1 Hmeichhe fing zawng zawngin in an sa a, a a erawh chuan anmahni kut ngeiin an thiat thin." 
Proverbs14:2 Dik taka awm mi chuan LALPA a tih a, mi tihmawh erawh chuan a hmusit a ni." 
Proverbs14:3 Mi a kaah chuan chapona tiang a awm a, mi fingte ka erawh chuan anmahni a hum thin." 
Proverbs14:4 Bawngpa awm lohnaah chuan bawng chaw dahna a fai thin a; amaherawhchu pun hle-na chu bawngpa thahruiah a awm. 
Proverbs14:5 Hretu dik chu a daw lo ang a, hretu dik lo erawh chuan dawt a phuh chhuak thin." 
Proverbs14:6 Hmusit ching mi chuan finna a zawng a, a hmu thin lo a; hriatthiamna neitu tan erawh chuan fina hi awlsam tak a ni." 
Proverbs14:7 Mi a hnen ata chu kal chhuak rawh, amahah chuan hriatna ka i hmu lo ang." 
Proverbs14:8 Remhre finna chu mahni awm dan hriat hi a ni a, mi ate atna erawh chu bumna a ni." 
Proverbs14:9 Mi ate chuan thiam loh channa hi an ngai lelo a, mi dik zingah erawh chuan duhsakna tha a awm," 
Proverbs14:10 Mahni lungngaihna mahni chau hriat ani a, a lawmna pawh mi dangin an hriatpui lo." 
Proverbs14:11 Mi suaksual in chu tihchhiat a ni ang a, mi dik puan in erawh chu a vul ang." 
Proverbs14:12 Mi ngaiha kawng dik ni awm taka lang, a tawp chu thihna kawng ni si a awm." 
Proverbs14:13 Nuihnaah pawh rilru lungngaihna a awm a, hlim tawpna chu rihna a ni." 
Proverbs14:14 Thinlunga hnungtawlh mi chu ama duh danin a khat ang a; mi tha chu amah leh amah a intilungawi ang. 
Proverbs14:15 Mi mawl chuan thu tin a ring a, mi remhria erawh chuan a kalna a en tha thin." 
Proverbs14:16 Mi fing chuan a hlauthawng a, sual a kalsan thin a; mi a erawh chu a intihuai a, mahni a inring thin." 
Proverbs14:17 Thinram mi chuan atthlak takin thil a ti ang a; tin, thil sual suangtuah hmang mi chu huat a ni." 
Proverbs14:18 Mi mawl chuan atna an rochung a, mi remhria erawh chuan hriatna khumtirin a awm." 
Proverbs14:19 Sual chu mi tha hmaah a kun a, mi suaksual chu mi fel kawngka bulah." 
Proverbs14:20 Mi rethei chu a thenawmte ngei pawhin an hua a, mi hausa erawh chuan thian tam tak an nei." 
Proverbs14:21 Tupawh thenawmte hmusit chuan thil a tisual a ni; mi rethei lainattu erawh chu a eng a thawl e. 
Proverbs14:22 Thil tha lo suangtuahtute chuan an tisual a ni lo'm ni? Thil tha suangtuah mi-ah erawh chuan zahngaihna leh thutak a awm ang. 
Proverbs14:23 Thawhrimna zawng zawngah hian hlawkna a awm a, kaa sawi mai mai erawh chuan tlakranna mai a thlen a ni." 
Proverbs14:24 Mi fing lallukhum chu a sum ani a, mi ate atna chu atna ngawt a ni." 
Proverbs14:25 Hretu dik chuan mite a chhanchhuak a, dawt chhak chhuak mi chuan bumna a tichhuak thin." 
Proverbs14:26 LALPA tihnaah chuan rina chak tak a awm a, a fate chuan inhumhimna hmun an nei ang." 
Proverbs14:27 LALPA tihna chu nunna tuikhur a ni. Thihna thang hawisanna turin. 
Proverbs14:28 Mipui tamnaah chuan lal ropuina a awm a, mi tlemnaah erawh chuan lal fapa boralna a awm." 
Proverbs14:29 Thinur har mi chu finna nasa tak nei mi a ni a, mi ti thawt thawt erawh chuan atna a chawimawi." 
Proverbs14:30 Rilru dam chu tisa nuna a ni a, itsikna erawh chu ruh mawihna a ni." 
Proverbs14:31 Mi rethei hnehchiahtu chu a siamtu hnehchhiah a ni a, tlachhamte khawngaihtu chuan a chawimawi a ni." 
Proverbs14:32 Mi suaksual chu a thiltih sualah chuan theh luh a ni a, mi fel erawh chuan a thihnaah nghahfak a nei." 
Proverbs14:33 Ngaihthiamna nei mi thinlungah chuan finna a cheng thin a. Mi a chhung lama awm erawh chu a lang sa reng. 
Proverbs14:34 Felnain hnam a chawimawi a, sualna erawh chu hnam tin, tan hmingchhiatna a ni.Lal duhsakna chu fing taka titu chhiahhlawh chungah a awm a, a thinurna erawh chu mualphona thlentu chungah a awm ang." 
Proverbs14:35 Lal duhsakna chu fing taka titu chhiahhlawh chungah a awm a, a thinurna erawh chu mualphona thlentu chungah a awm ang." 
Proverbs15:1 Chhanna nemin thinur a tikiang thin a, tawng huatthlala erawh chuan thinur a chawk tho thin." 
Proverbs15:2 Mi fing lei chuan fina thu dik a chhakchhuak thin a, mi a ka erawh chuan thu atthlak a chhakchhuak thin." 
Proverbs15:3 LALPA mit chu hmun tinah a awm a, thil tha lo leh tha a enthla reng thin." 
Proverbs15:4 Lei dik tak chu nunna thing a ni a, luhlulna awmna erawh chu thinlung lungchhiatna a ni." 
Proverbs15:5 Mi a chuan a pa thununa a ngainep thin a, zilhhauna ngaisang chuan hmang hre takin a ti thin." 
Proverbs15:6 Mi fel inah chuan sum tam tak a awm a, mi suaksual hlawkna erawh chu buaina a ni." 
Proverbs15:7 Mi fing hmui chuan hriatna a tidarh a, mi a thinlung erawh chuan chutiang chu a ti lo." 
Proverbs15:8 Mi suaksual inthawina chu LALPA tana tenawm a ni; mi tha tawngtaina erawh chu a lawmzawng a ni. 
Proverbs15:9 Mi suaksual kawng chu LALPA tnaa tenawm ani a, felna kawng zawhtu erawh chu a hmangaih thin." 
Proverbs15:10 Kawng pensantu thununa chu a na, zilhhau hawtu chu a boral ang." 
Proverbs15:11 Seol leh Abadon LALPA a hmu tlang a, mihring thinlung chu a va hmu chiang dawn em!" 
Proverbs15:12 Hmusit ching mi chuan zilhhauva awm a ngaina lo a, mi fing hnenah chuan a kal duh lo ang." 
Proverbs15:13 Thinlung hlimin hmel hlim a siam a, thinlung lungngaihna erawh chuan rilru a tilungchhe thin." 
Proverbs15:14 Hriathiamna thinlung neitu chuan hriatna a zawng a, mi a ka erawh chu dawtin a inhrai thin." 
Proverbs15:15 Hrehawm tuartu tan ni zawng zawng mai hi a tha lo vek a, thinlung hlim mite rawh chuan ruai a theh reng mai a ni." 
Proverbs15:16 LALPA hlauhna nen tlemte neih chu tam tak neiha buaina neih ai chuan a tha zawk. 
Proverbs15:17 Hmangaihna awmnaa an hnah chawa rin chu huatna awmnaa bawngpa chawm thau ei aiin a tha zawk. 
Proverbs15:18 Mi thinchhia chuan inhauna a chawk tho a,,mi thluak nem erawh chuan inhauna a tireh." 
Proverbs15:19 Mi thatchhe kawng chu hlingpal ang a ni a, mi tluang kawng chu lamliana siam a ni." 
Proverbs15:20 Fapa fing chuan pa hlim a siam a, mi a erawh chuan a nu a ngainep thin." 
Proverbs15:21 Finna nei lote chuan atna hi an hlimna a ni a, mi thil hre thiam mi erawh chuan a kawng a tingil thin." 
Proverbs15:22 Remruat lawk loa thil tih a hlawhtling duh lo. Remhria an tam chuan a hlawhtling thin; 
Proverbs15:23 A hun taka chhanna dik hirat hi a va lawmawm em! 
Proverbs15:24 Mi fing tan chuan nunna kawng hi a chung lamah a kal a, nnuai lama Seol chu a kalsan theihna'n." 
Proverbs15:25 LALPA'n mi chapo in chu a kar phawng ang a, hmeithai hmun erawh chu a tinghet ang." 
Proverbs15:26 Remruatna tha lo chu LALPA tana thil tenawm ani a, mi thianghlim thu erawh chu benglut a ni." 
Proverbs15:27 Mi duham chuan ama chhungkua a tibuai thin a, tham hawtu erawh chu a hmuingil ang." 
Proverbs15:28 Mi fel thinlung chau ngun takin a chahng a, mi suaksual ka erawh chuan thil tha lo a chhak chhuak thin." 
Proverbs15:29 LALPA chu mi suaksual lakah chuan a hla a, mi fel tawngtai erawh chu a ngaithla thin." 
Proverbs15:30 Hlim hmelin mi a tilawm a, chanchin lawmawmin mi a tiharh." 
Proverbs15:31 Nunna zilhhauna pawm thin chu mi fing zingah a tel ang. 
Proverbs15:32 Thununna duh lo chuan a thlarau a ngainep a ni, zilhhauna pawm erawh chuan hriat thiamna a chang ang.LALPA tihna chu fina zirtirtu ani a; inngaihtlawmna chu chawimawia awmna a ni." 
Proverbs15:33 LALPA tihna chu fina zirtirtu ani a; inngaihtlawmna chu chawimawia awmna a ni. 
Proverbs16:1 Rilru lo ruahman lawkna chu mihring chan a ni a, lei chhanna erawh chu LALPA atangin a ni." 
Proverbs16:2 Mi ama ngaihin a kawng zawng zawng a thianghlim a; nimahsela LALPA'n rilrute a buk thin. 
Proverbs16:3 I hnate chu LALPA kawltir rawh. Tichuan, i thil ruahmante chu tihnghehin a awm ang." 
Proverbs16:4 LALPA'n thil zawng zawng hi chhan nei theuhin a siam a, a ni tak e, mi suaksualte pawh hi ni tha loa tan." 
Proverbs16:5 Thinlunga chapo apiangte chu LALPA tana tenawm an ni; inthurual mah se, hrem lohin chhuah an ni lo ang." 
Proverbs16:6 Zahngaihna leh thutakin khawlohna chu tlenfai a ni a, LALPA tihnain miin sual a kalsan thin." 
Proverbs16:7 Mi, a awm danin LALPA a tihlawm chuan, a hmelma nen lam inremin a awmtir thin." 
Proverbs16:8 Fel lo taka deh chhuah tam tak ai chuan fel taka deh chhuah tlemte a tha zawk. 
Proverbs16:9 Mihring rilruin a kawng a ruahman a, a ke pen erawh chu LALPA'n a hruai thin." 
Proverbs16:10 Lal kaah chuan Pathian thu tihtluk a awm a; a ka chuan a rel sual lo ang. 
Proverbs16:11 Bukna leh tehna dik hi LALPA ta a ni a, ip rihzawngte chu a ngaihtuah thin." 
Proverbs16:12 Suahsualna thilti hi lalte tan tenawm ani a, Lalthutthleng chu felnaa tihngheh a ni si a." 
Proverbs16:13 Ka fel chu lal lawmna a nai a, thu dik sawi chu an ngaina thin." 
Proverbs16:14 Lal thinurna chu thihna zualko ang ani a, mi fing erawh chuan a nek dai ang." 
Proverbs16:15 Lal hmel engah chuan nuna a awm a, a duhsakna chu ruahtui tla hnuhnung chhum ang a ni." 
Proverbs16:16 Rangkachak ai chuan finna neih hi a va tha nasa zawk em! A ni, tangka ai chuan hriatthiamna chu thlan zawk tur a ni." 
Proverbs16:17 Mi tluangte lamlian chu sual kalsan a ni; A kawng veng tha chuan a nunna a humhim a ni. 
Proverbs16:18 Chapona chu boralna hmaah a kal a, rilru intivei chu tlukna hmaah." 
Proverbs16:19 Mi chapote nen rallak thil insem ai chuan mi retheite nena mi rilru thuhnuairawlh mi nih a tha zawk. 
Proverbs16:20 Thu chik taka dawn mi chuan thil tha a dawng ang a, LALPA ring apiang chu an nihlawh a." 
Proverbs16:21 Rilrua fing chu mi remhria tih an ni ang a, tawngkam thlumna chuan thiamna a tipung." 
Proverbs16:22 Hriatthiamna hi a neitu tan chuan nunna tuikhur a ni a, mi ate tan erawh chuan thununna chu an atna a ni." 
Proverbs16:23 Mi fing thinlung chuan a ka a zirtir thin a, a hmuiah thiamna a belhchhah thin." 
Proverbs16:24 Thu pai nuam chu khawithlar ang a ni a, nunna atna a thlum a, ruh tan hriselna a ni." 
Proverbs16:25 Mi ngaiha kawng dik ni awm taka lang, a tawp chu thihna kawng ni si a awm." 
Proverbs16:26 Hnathawk mi chu ei tur avangin a rim a, a riltam rehna'n a thawk rim thin." 
Proverbs16:27 Mi tlaktlai lo chuan pawi khawih tur a ngaihtuah chhuak a, a kaah mei sa tak a awm." 
Proverbs16:28 Tawng chaltlai mi chuan inhauna a theh darh a. Sesea thu sawi hmangin thian bulte a tithen thin. 
Proverbs16:29 Mi nunrawngin thenawmte a hruai sual thin a, kawng tha loah a hruai thin." 
Proverbs16:30 A mit maimitchhing chuan thil tha lo suangtuahna'n a ti a ni a, a heh pettu chuan thil tha lo a thlen thin." 
Proverbs16:31 Lu tuak chu ropuina lallukhum a ni a, felna kawngah hmuh a ni ang." 
Proverbs16:32 Mi thinnel chu mi chak aiin a tha zawk a. A rilru thunun hneh chu kaw latu aiinMal chungah thum an vawr a, thil lo chhuak erawh chu LALPA tih a ni." 
Proverbs16:33 Mal chungah thum an vawr a, thil lo chhuak erawh chu LALPA tih a ni." 
Proverbs17:1 Insual bur bura ruaithehna in ai chuan inrem taka chaw thing bar khat eina a tha zawk. 
Proverbs17:2 Chhiahhlawh fing taka che chuan fapa, mualphona thlentu chungah chuan ro a rel ang a, unau ro zingah chanvo a nei ang." 
Proverbs17:3 Tihthianghlimna bel chu tangkaraw tan ani a rawhtuina chu rangkachak tan a ni a, thinlung erawh chu LALPA'n a fiah thin." 
Proverbs17:4 Thil tha lo titu chuan mi suaksual kamchang a bengkhawn thin a, mi dawthei chuan pawikhawih hmang lei lamah beng a chhi thin." 
Proverbs17:5 Mi rethei hmusittu chuan a Siamtu a ngai nep a ni a, mi vanduaina diriamtu chu hrem lohin a awm lo ang." 
Proverbs17:6 Tu leh fate hi upate lallukhum an ni a, fanaute ropuina chu an pate hi an ni." 
Proverbs17:7 Thu sawi ropui leh mi a a inmawi lo a, hmui dawthei leh lal fa a inmawi lo lehzual." 
Proverbs17:8 A dawngtu mitah chuan thilpek chu lunghlu ang a ni a, a hawina lam apiangah a hlawhtling thin." 
Proverbs17:9 Bawhchhiatna thuptu chuan inhmangaihna a zawng a, thil sawi sawi hmang chuan thian bulte a tithen thin." 
Proverbs17:10 Mi a chunga vawi za vuak aiin mi fingah chuan vawi khat zilhhauna pawh a lut thuk zawk. 
Proverbs17:11 Mi tha lo chuan helna ngawt a zawng thin a, chuvangin a chungah zualko nunchhia tirh a ni ang." 
Proverbs17:12 Mi a at lai tawh ai chuan savawm, a no laksak daih tawh a duhawm zawk." 
Proverbs17:13 Thatna suala thungrultu chu thil tha loin a in a chhuahsan lo ang. 
Proverbs17:14 Inhnial hi tuikhuah hnam tir ang a ni a, chuvangin insualna a awm tan hmain inhnial bang rawh." 
Proverbs17:15 Mi suaksual thiamtu leh mi fel thiam lotu chu LALPA tan angkhat rengin an tenawm ve ve. 
Proverbs17:16 Hriatthiamna nei si lo mi a kutah chuan engah nge finna leina tur man a awm ni? 
Proverbs17:17 Thian chuan englai pawhin a hmangaih reng a, mangan nia tana unaua piang a ni." 
Proverbs17:18 Hriatna nei lo mi chuan a kut a beng a, a thenawmte hmaah mawhphurtuah a insiam thin." 
Proverbs17:19 Insual ngaina mi chuan bawhchhiatna a ngaina thin a, a in hung kawngkhar tisang chuan boralna a zawng thin." 
Proverbs17:20 Rilru luhlul nei mi chuan thil tha hmu thin lo a, tin, lei bengtla lo neitu chu pawi khawihnaah a lut thin." 
Proverbs17:21 Mi a hringtu chuan ama lungngaihna a thlen thin a, mi a pa chuan lawmna a nei lo." 
Proverbs17:22 Thinlung hlim hi damdawi tha tak a ni a, thinlung lungchhia erawh chuan a ruh a tiro thin." 
Proverbs17:23 Mi suaksual chuan rorelna kawngte tikawi turin mi kut ata thiamna a la thin. 
Proverbs17:24 Finna chu hriat thiamna neitu hmaah a awm thin a, mi a mit erawh chu kawlkilah a awm thin." 
Proverbs17:25 Fapa a chu a pa tilungngaitu a ni a, a hringtunu tan a kha a ni." 
Proverbs17:26 Mi fel hrem chu a tha lo a, mi tha, an thatna vanga vuak a tha bawk hek lo." 
Proverbs17:27 A thu sawia insum thin chuan fina a nei a, rilru dam mi chuan hriatthiamna a nei a,Mi a pawh hi a ngawih reng chuan mi finga chhiar a ni a, a hmui a chip chuan mi remhriaa ngaih a ni." 
Proverbs17:28 Mi a pawh hi a ngawih reng chuan mi finga chhiar a ni a, a hmui a chip chuan mi remhriaa ngaih a ni." 
Proverbs18:1 Mi inkulh hrang mi chuan mahni duhzawng a zawng thin a. Finna dik zawng zawng a tai thin. 
Proverbs18:2 Mi a chuan hriatnaah lawmna a nei lo, ama rilruin a tihlan chauh lo chu." 
Proverbs18:3 Suahsualna a lo awmin hmustina pawh a lo awm thin, mualphona a lo awmin zilhhauna." 
Proverbs18:4 Mi a kaah thu chu tui thuk tak ang, finna lui, lui luang ang a ni a." 
Proverbs18:5 Mi suaksual duhsak chu a tha lo a, rorelnaa mi fel hnawl chu a tha bawk hek lo." 
Proverbs18:6 Mi a hmui chuan inhauna a thlen a, a ka chuan vuakna a ko." 
Proverbs18:7 Mi a ka chu a boralna a ni a, a hmui chu a nunna thang a ni." 
Proverbs18:8 Sesea thu sawi hmang mi thu chu chaw tui tak ang a ni a, pum chhungril berah a lut thin." 
Proverbs18:9 A hnathawha mi dawngdah pawh tiboraltua unaupa a ni. 
Proverbs18:10 LALPA hming chu kulpui a ni a, mi fel chu a tlan lut thin a, a him thin." 
Proverbs18:11 Mi hausa chuan a sum chu a kulhpui a ni a, a suangtuah danah chuan kulh sang tak a ni." 
Proverbs18:12 Mihring rilru chapona chu boralna hmaah a kal a, inngaihtlawmna chu chawimawina hmaah." 
Proverbs18:13 Ngaihthlaka hmaa chhan chu a tan atthlak nihna leh mualphona a ni. 
Proverbs18:14 Mi rilru nei chuan a chak lohna chu a tuar zo ang a, mahse rilru hliam chu tu nge tuar thei ang?" 
Proverbs18:15 Remhre thinlung chuan hriatna a dawng thin a, mi fing beng chuan hriatna a zawng thin." 
Proverbs18:16 Mi a thilpekin kawng a tihkuaksak a, mi ropuite hmaah a hruai lut thin." 
Proverbs18:17 A thiamna thu sawi hmasatu chu felin a lang thin a, mahse a thenawmte an lo kal a, an rawn tilang thin." 
Proverbs18:18 Thumvawrin inhauna a tibang a, mi chakte a tithen thin." 
Proverbs18:19 I unau pui la, kulhpui angin a hum ang che; in inhau erawh chuan, a inkhar hnan ang che." 
Proverbs18:20 Miina pumpui chu a ka rahin a tikhat ang a, a kaa thil hawngin a titlai ang." 
Proverbs18:21 Lei thiltihtheihnaah chuan thihna leh nunna a awm a, a ngainatute chuan chu mia rah chu an ei ang." 
Proverbs18:22 Nupui hmu chuan thil tha a hmu a ni, LALPA duhsakna a chang thin." 
Proverbs18:23 Mi rethei chuan a thlemin an thlem a, mi hausa erawh chu rura takin an tawng thin.Thian tam tak siam chuan mahni intihchhiatna a siam a ni a, amaherawhchu unau aia nghet zawk thian an awm thin." 
Proverbs18:24 Thian tam tak siam chuan mahni intihchhiatna a siam a ni a, amaherawhchu unau aia nghet zawk thian an awm thin." 
Proverbs19:1 Mi, a hmuia tihmawh, a bawk si ai chuan mi rethei, rilru tha tak pua awm chu a tha zawk." 
Proverbs19:2 Hriatna loa duhna ngawt pawh a tha lo a, ke chhep rang ringawt chu a kal sual thin. Mi a atnain a kawng a tihchhiatsak thin a," 
Proverbs19:3 Mi a atnain a kawng a tihchhiatsak thin a, a rilru LALPA chungah a vui thin." 
Proverbs19:4 Sumin thian tam tak a neih belhtir a, mi rethei erawh chu thianten an thlauhthla ang." 
Proverbs19:5 Hretu der chu hrem lohin a awm lo ang a, dawt sawi chu a chhuak lo ang." 
Proverbs19:6 Mi tam takin mi thilphal duhsakna an ngen ang a; thil pe thintu lakah chuan mi tin mai hi thian an ni. 
Proverbs19:7 Mi rethei unaute zawng zawng chuan an vai huat thin a, thian maite chu a lakah an va hla lehzual dawn em! Thuin a um a; nimahsela an kal daih tawh." 
Proverbs19:8 Fina dawngtu chuan ama nunna a hmangaih thin a, hriatna vawngtu chuan thil tha a hmu ang." 
Proverbs19:9 Hretu der chu hrem lohin a awm lo ang a, dawt sawi chu a boral ang." 
Proverbs19:10 Nunkhaw nawm chu mi a nen a inhmeh lo a, chhiahhlawhin lal fate chunga rorel chu a inhmeh lo lehzual." 
Proverbs19:11 A ngaihruat thiamnain mi a thin a tihnelsak thin a, bawhchhiatna haider chu a ropuina a ni." 
Proverbs19:12 Lal thinrim chu sakeibaknei rum ang a ni a, a duhsakna erawh chu hlobet chunga dai ang a ni." 
Proverbs19:13 Fapa a chu a pa vanduaina a ni a, nupui an thinna chu englai pawha far reng ang a ni." 
Proverbs19:14 In leh sum leh pai chu pate laka roluah a ni a, nupui remhria erawh chu LALPA laka mi a ni." 
Proverbs19:15 Dawngdahnain tui taka mutnaah a tilut a, mi thatchhia chuan rilram a tuar ang." 
Proverbs19:16 Thupek vawng tha chuan a nunna a vawng tah a ni a, a awm dana fimkhur lo erawh chu a thi ang." 
Proverbs19:17 Mi rethei khawngaih chan LALPA a puktir a ni a, a thiltih that chu a rul ang." 
Proverbs19:18 Beiseiawm a la nih laiin i fapa chuthunun la, boral mai turah ngai suh." 
Proverbs19:19 Thinur tinasa mi chuan hrem a tuar ang, i chhanchhuah pawhin, chhanchhuah leh thin a ngai ang." 
Proverbs19:20 A tawp a tawpa i lo fin theihna'n zilhna pawm la, thunnunna pawisa rawh." 
Proverbs19:21 Mihring thinlungah suangtuahna tam tak a awm a; LALPA remruat erawh chu a pangngai reng ang. 
Proverbs19:22 Mi a duhthusam chu a ngilneih dan tehna a ni a, mi dawthei ai chuan mi rethei a duhawm zawk." 
Proverbs19:23 LALPA tihna chuan nunna a thlen a, a nei piang chu lungawi takin an awm ang a, thil tha lo tlakbuakin a awm lo ang." 
Proverbs19:24 Mi thatchhia chuan a kut thlengah a hnim a, a ka han thlen leh takngial pawh a peih lo." 
Proverbs19:25 Hmusit ching mi chu vua la, tichuan mi mawlin remhriat a zir ang a; ngaihthiamna nei chu zilh la, a hre thiam ang." 
Proverbs19:26 Pate tirethei a, nute hnawt chhuak chu fapa, mualphona thlen a, hmingchhiatna thlentu a ni." 
Proverbs19:27 Ka fapa, thil tidik lo tura finna zirtirna thu ngaihthlak chu bang rawh." 
Proverbs19:28 Thuhretu tlaktlai lo chuan rorelna ahmusit a ni a, mi suaksual ka chuan khawlohna a lem.Rorelna chu hmusit chingtute tana buatsaih a ni a, vuakna tiang chu mi a hnungzang tan." 
Proverbs19:29 Rorelna chu hmusit chingtute tana buatsaih a ni a, vuakna tiang chu mi a hnungzang tan." 
Proverbs20:1 Uain hi nuihzatbura mi siamtu a ni a, zupui hi insual bung bungna a ni; chu mi buma awmte chu an fing lo a ni." 
Proverbs20:2 Lal vauna chu sakeibaknei rum ang a ni a, tupawh a thin tiur chu mahni nunna chunga thil tisual an ni thin." 
Proverbs20:3 Intihbuaina ata lo inthiarfihlim hi thil duhawm a ni a, mi a apiangte chu an insual thin." 
Proverbs20:4 Mi dawngdah chuan thlasik avangin lei a let peih lo a; chuvang chuan buh seng laiin kut a dawh ang a, engmah a nei lo ang." 
Proverbs20:5 Remruatna chu mihring thinlungah tui thuk tak ang a ni a; nimahsela hriatthiamna nei chuan a phawrh chhuak ang. 
Proverbs20:6 Rinawm tak niin an insawi theih a, rinawm tak tak tu nge hmu thei ang?" 
Proverbs20:7 Mi fel, ama remruat thiama awm mi fate chu an nihlawh e." 
Proverbs20:8 Rorelnaa lal thu chuan a mitin thil tha lo zawng zawng a tibo thin. 
Proverbs20:9 'Ka thinlung ka tithianghlim a, ka sual lakah ka thianghlim,' tu nge ti thei?" 
Proverbs20:10 Bukna dang dang te, tehna dang dangte hi LALPA mithmuhah angkhat rengin thil tenawm a ni ve ve." 
Proverbs20:11 Naupang takngial pawh a thiltihin a intilang thin, a thiltih chu a thianghlim leh a dik emawin." 
Proverbs20:12 Hriatna beng leh hmuna mit hi LALPA siam ve ve a ni. 
Proverbs20:13 Mut thlahlel suh, i lo pachhe dah ang e; i mit meng la, tichuan chhang kham khawp i nei dawn nia." 
Proverbs20:14 'Engmah a nih loh hi, engmah a nih loh hi,' thil leitu chuan a ti thin a, a kal hnu chuan a chhuang leh viau si thin." 
Proverbs20:15 Rangkachak te a awm a, lunghlu sente pawh a tam a; hriatna hmui erawh chu lungmawi hlu tak a ni." 
Proverbs20:16 Hnam dang tana mawhphurtua inpe silhfen chu la la, tin, hnam dang tana inpe chu hrengah hmang rawh." 
Proverbs20:17 Bumna chhagn chu miin tui a ti a, mahse a hnuah a ka chu lungtein a khat ang." 
Proverbs20:18 Mi rawnin i thil tum chu buk la. Fel taka relin hmelma bei rawh. 
Proverbs20:19 Mi kamtam tei vel ruai chuan thurukte a tilang thin a; chuvangin a ka zau taka ang chu pawl suh. 
Proverbs20:20 A nu emaw, a pa emaw anchhe lawhtu chu, thimtham lai berah a khawnvar tihmihsak a ni ang." 
Proverbs20:21 Sum hi atirah deh chhuah thuai theih mah se la, a tawpah malsawm a ni kher lo ang." 
Proverbs20:22 'Sual chu ka thungrul teh mai ang,' ti suh la, LALPA ngaichang rih la, ani chuan a chhanhim ang che." 
Proverbs20:23 Bukna dang dang hi LALPA mithmuhah thil tenawm a ni a, khin dik lo hi a tha lo a ni." 
Proverbs20:24 Mihring kawngte chu LALPA ruat a ni a, engtin nge mihringin a kawng an hriat theih ang?" 
Proverbs20:25 Pathian tan thil pe turin intiam thut suh, i inchhir leh dah ang e." 
Proverbs20:26 Lal fing chuan mi suaksualte a zap kiang a, an chungah sisep a ruai thin." 
Proverbs20:27 Mihring rilru chu LALPA khawnvar a ni a, pumpui chhungril lam zawng zawng pawh a en chhuak thin." 
Proverbs20:28 Zahngaihna leh thutakin lal a vawng tha a, a thutthleng chu zahngaihnaa tundinin a awm." 
Proverbs20:29 Tlangvalte ropuina chu an chakna a ni, putarte mawina chu an lu tuak a ni,Pem khawpa vuakna chuan thil tha lo a tleng fai a, vuakna chuan pumpui chhungril lamte pawh a fan." 
Proverbs20:30 Pem khawpa vuakna chuan thil tha lo a tleng fai a, vuakna chuan pumpui chhungril lamte pawh a fan." 
Proverbs21:1 Lal thinlung chu LALPA kutah a awm a, tui luanna kawng angin, a duh duhnaah a tikawi thin." 
Proverbs21:2 Mi tin an awm dan hi mahni mitah chuan dik tih a ni a; nimahsela LALPA'n thinlung a buk thin. 
Proverbs21:3 Inthawina aiin dik tak leh fel taka rorel chu LALPA tan a pawmawm zawk. 
Proverbs21:4 Mi indah chung leh rilru chapo, mi suaksual khawnvar hi sual a ni." 
Proverbs21:5 Mi taima ngaihtuahna chuan neihnunna lam chauh a pan a. Mi thatchhia erawh chuan tlakchhamna lam chauh a pan a ni. 
Proverbs21:6 Lei dawthei hmanga sum deh chhuah chu chhum thli chhem len chhem len a ni; a zawngtu chu thihna zawng a ni. 
Proverbs21:7 Mi suaksualte nunrawnna chuan anmahni a hnawl bo ang. Rorelna fel an duh loh vangin. 
Proverbs21:8 Thiam lohna phurtu kawng chu a kawi em em mai a, mi thianghlim erawh chu a thiltih a ngil a ni." 
Proverbs21:9 Hmeichhe inhau hmang tak nena in zau taka awm ai chuan in chung chhip kila awm a tha zawk. 
Proverbs21:10 Mi suaksual rilru chuan thi tha lo a duh a, a thenawmten a mitah duhsakna an hmu lo." 
Proverbs21:11 Hmusit ching mite hrema an awmin mi mawlte chuan an fin phah a; tin, mi fing chu zirtira a awmin hriatna a dawng thin." 
Proverbs21:12 Mi fel chuan mi suaksual chhungkuate a ngaihtuah thin a, mi suaksualte an chhiatna tura thehthang bo an nihzia te." 
Proverbs21:13 Mi rethei au thawma beng chhu ngawng chu, ani pawh a au vang a, nimahsela ngaihthlaksak a ni bik lo ang." 
Proverbs21:14 A ruka thilpekin thinur a tireh a, an chhunga thilpekin thinrim nasa tak." 
Proverbs21:15 Rorel fel hi mi fel lawmna a ni a, khawlohna titu tan erawh chuan boralna a ni." 
Proverbs21:16 Hriatna kawng ata kal bo chu mitthi awm khawm zingah a chawl ang. 
Proverbs21:17 Nawmsakna thlahlel chu mi rethei a ni ang a, uain leh hriak ngaina mi chu an hausa lo ang." 
Proverbs21:18 Mi suaksual chu mi fel tlanna an ni ang a, mi bumhmang chu mi dik tak tlanna." 
Proverbs21:19 Hmeichhe an hmang leh phunchiar nena awm ai chuan thlaler rama awm a tha zawk. 
Proverbs21:20 Mi fing awmnaah chuan ro leh hriak hlu tak a awm a, mi a erawh chuan an dawlh mai thin." 
Proverbs21:21 Felna leh zahngaihna zuitute chuan nunna te, felna te, chawimawinate an hmu ang." 
Proverbs21:22 Mi fing chu mi chak khawpuiah a lo awm a, chu mia na rinpui ber chakna chu a lak thlaksak thin." 
Proverbs21:23 Tupawh a ka leh a lei veng tha chuan manganna lakah a nuna a veng tha a ni. 
Proverbs21:24 Mi chapo leh mi intivei chu a hming Hmusittua a ni; inngaih ropui chaponain thil a ti thin. 
Proverbs21:25 Mi dawngdah duhthusam chuan amah a tihlum thin, a kutin hnathawh a duh loh avangin." 
Proverbs21:26 Nilenga duham taka awh nei an awm a; mi fel erawh chuan a pe a, engmah a sum lo." 
Proverbs21:27 Mi suaksual inthawina chu thil tenawm ani a, rilru sual nena a rawn lak chu a va tenawm lehzual dawn em!" 
Proverbs21:28 Hretu der chu a boral ang a; nimahsela hretu dik chuan tuma dodal lohin thu a sawi ang. 
Proverbs21:29 Mi suaksualin a hmel a tiruh a, mi fel erawh chuan a kawng a rel fel thin." 
Proverbs21:30 LALPA kalhzawng finna te, hriatna te, remruatnate a awm lo.Sakawr chu indo ni atan buatsaih a ni a, hnehna erawh chu LALPA ta a ni." 
Proverbs21:31 Sakawr chu indo ni atan buatsaih a ni a, hnehna erawh chu LALPA ta a ni." 
Proverbs22:1 Sum tak tak aiin hming tha hi thlan zawk tur a ni a, tangka leh rangkachak aiin duhsakna a ngainatawm." 
Proverbs22:2 Mi hausa leh mi rethei an awm za a, an vaia siamtu chu LALPA a ni." 
Proverbs22:3 Mi hmanghria chuan thil tha lo chu a hmuhin a biru thin a; mi mawl erawh chuan a tawn mai thin a, a tuar phah thin." 
Proverbs22:4 Inngaihtlawmna leh LALPA tih man chu sum te, chawimawina te, nunna te a ni." 
Proverbs22:5 Mi bengtla lo kawngah chuan hling te, thangte a awm a, a nunna vawng tha chuan a hlat daih ang." 
Proverbs22:6 Naupang chu a kalna awm kawngah chuan zirtir u la, a upat hun pawhin a thlah lo ang." 
Proverbs22:7 Mi hausain mi rehtei ro an relsak a; tin, puktu chu a puktirtu chhiahhlawh a ni." 
Proverbs22:8 Khawlohna tuhtu chuan vanduaina a at ang a, a thinurna talhtum chu a hlawhchham ang." 
Proverbs22:9 Mi thilphal chu malsawmin a awm ang, a chhang mi rethei a pek thin avangin." 
Proverbs22:10 Hmusit chin gmi chu paih chhuak u la, inhnialna chu a kiang ang, a ni, insualna te, inrunluinate a reh ang." 
Proverbs22:11 Thinlung thianghlimna ngaina chuan a tawngkam chhuak mawi avangin lal chu a thian a ni ang. 
Proverbs22:12 LALPA mit chuan hriatna nei mi chu a vawng tha thin a, mi vervek thu erawh chu a paihthlaksak thin." 
Proverbs22:13 Mi thatchhia chuan, ""Pawnah sakeibaknei a awm a, kawtthlerah ka tualthi ang,"" a ti." 
Proverbs22:14 Hmeichhe sual ka chu khuarkhurum thuk tak a ni, LALPA huatzawngte chu chutah chuan an tla ang." 
Proverbs22:15 Naupang thinlungah chuan atna a bet tlat a, mahse thununna tiangin hla takah a hnawt kiang ang." 
Proverbs22:16 A hlawkna tura mi rethei hnehchhiah leh. Mi hausa tlawntu chuan tlakranna mai a thlen ang. 
Proverbs22:17 I beng chhi la, mi fing thu ngaithla rawh; tin, i thinlung chu ka finna dawnna'n hmang rawh." 
Proverbs22:18 I thinlung chhunga i vawn a, i kaa i tihngheh bawk chuan thil duhawm tak a ni." 
Proverbs22:19 I rinna chu LALPA chungah a awm theihna'n vawiinah hian i hnen ngeiah ka hriattir che a ni. 
Proverbs22:20 I thutak nghehzia hriattir tur che leh a rawn petu che hnena thutak chu i letpui theihna'n 
Proverbs22:21 Remruat dan leh hriatna tha tak ka ziahsak che a ni lo'm ni? 
Proverbs22:22 Mi rethei chu rawk suh, a rethei si a, kulh kawngkaah mi lungngaite hnehchhiah hek suh:" 
Proverbs22:23 LALPA'n an thu a sawipui dawn si a, anmahni rawktute nuna chu a rawk dawn a ni." 
Proverbs22:24 Thinrim hmang mi chu thian suh la, mi thinchhia chu kawp suh;" 
Proverbs22:25 A tih dan i zir ang a, i nunna tan thang i tawng dah ang e." 
Proverbs22:26 Intiamkamte zingah tel suh la, leibaa tana intiamkamtu zingah pawh." 
Proverbs22:27 Engmah pek tur i neih si loh chuan engah nge i khum chu a laksak ang che? 
Proverbs22:28 In pi leh puten hma khawsanga ramri an lo kham chu sawn suh u.Mi a hnathawha taima chu i hmu thin ngai em? Lal hmaahte a awm ang a, mi naran hmaah chuan a awm lo ang." 
Proverbs22:29 Mi a hnathawha taima chu i hmu thin ngai em? Lal hmaahte a awm ang a, mi naran hmaah chuan a awm lo ang." 
Proverbs23:1 Roreltute nena chaw eia in thut dunin i hmaa mi chun takin en rawh. 
Proverbs23:2 I ril a tam hle chuan insum deuh ang che. 
Proverbs23:3 Bumna chaw mai a nih hre rengin a tuina ngawt it suh. 
Proverbs23:4 Intihausa turin intihah suh la, nangma fina fin bang rawh." 
Proverbs23:5 Thil awm lo chungah i mit i nghat dawn em ni? Sum chuan thla a insiam ngei ngei a, mupui van lama thlawk thin ang hian." 
Proverbs23:6 Mi fir chhang chu ei suh la, a thil tuihnaite it hek suh." 
Proverbs23:7 A suangtuah ang chiah zelin a ni, a awm ni, ""Ei rawh, in rawh,"" a ti ang chia; mahse a rilru chuan ngaimawhna che a nei lo." 
Proverbs23:8 I chaw bar chu i luak chhuak ang a, i thu thlum tak chu i chan ang." 
Proverbs23:9 Mi a benghriatah chuan thu sawi suh, i thu fingte chu a ngainep dawn si a." 
Proverbs23:10 Hmakhawsanga ramri lo kham chu sawn suh la, pa nei lote loah inrawlh suh." 
Proverbs23:11 Anmahni tlantu chu a chak a, i chungah an thu a sawipui dawn si a." 
Proverbs23:12 Zirtirna lamah i rilru nghat la, i beng chu hriatna thu lamah." 
Proverbs23:13 Naupang thunun tim suh, tiangin vaw mah la, a thi dawn si lo a." 
Proverbs23:14 Tiangin i vua ang a, tichuan Seol ata a nunna i chhanchhuak ang." 
Proverbs23:15 Ka fapa, i rilru a fin chuan ka thinlung a lawm tak tak ang." 
Proverbs23:16 A ni, i kain thil dik a sawiin ka rilru a hlim ang." 
Proverbs23:17 I thinlungin mi sual awt suh se; nilengin LALPA tihin awm zawk rawh. 
Proverbs23:18 Lawmman a awm ngei dawn si a, i beisei chu tihboin a awm lo ang." 
Proverbs23:19 Ka fapa, ngaithla la, fing la, kawngah chuan i thinlung hruai rawh." 
Proverbs23:20 Uain heh mite zingah leh sa heh mite zingah tel suh; 
Proverbs23:21 Zu rui mite leh sa heh mite chu an lo rethei dawn si a. Nguinain puan chhia a sintir ang. 
Proverbs23:22 I pa, a hringtu che thu pawm la, i nu chu a lo tarin hmusit suh." 
Proverbs23:23 Thu dik chu lei la, hralh leh tawh suh; a ni, finna te, zirtirna te, hriatthiamnate nen." 
Proverbs23:24 Mi fel pa chu nasa takin a hlim ang a. Fa fing hringtu chuan a chungah lawmna a nei ang. 
Proverbs23:25 I nu leh pa chu hlim takin awm se la, a hringtu che chu hlim takin awm rawh se." 
Proverbs23:26 Ka fapa, i thinlung min pe la, ka awm danahte hian i mit tlung rawh se." 
Proverbs23:27 Nawhchizuar chu khuarkhurum thuk tak a ni a, hmeichhe sual chu khuarkhurum zim a ni;" 
Proverbs23:28 A ni, rukru angin mi an chang a, mihring zingah vervekna an tipung thin." 
Proverbs23:29 Tute nge chungpik thin a, tute nge lungngai thin a, tute nge inhau thin? Tute nge thubuai nei thin a, tute nge a vang awm loa hliam tuar thin a, tute nge mit sen rem rum thin le?" 
Proverbs23:30 Zu hmuna awm reng thinte, zu chawhpawlh in thinte an ni." 
Proverbs23:31 Uain a sen kak laiin en suh, noa a zia a lan lai te, a luan thlak zaih zaih lai tein;" 
Proverbs23:32 A tawpah chuan rul angin a chu a, rul tur tha mi angin mi a chu thin." 
Proverbs23:33 I mitin thil mak takte a hmu ang a, i thinlungin thu chaltlai takte a chhahchhuak ang a." 
Proverbs23:34 A ni, mi tuifinriat lai taka mu ang emaw, lawng puanzarna chhipa mu ang emaw i ni ang.'Min vua a, a na si lo, min vel a, ka hre lo, engtikah nge ka lo harh ang aw? Kan in leh bawk thin ang,' i ti ang." 
Proverbs23:35 'Min vua a, a na si lo, min vel a, ka hre lo, engtikah nge ka lo harh ang aw? Kan in leh bawk thin ang,' i ti ang." 
Proverbs24:1 Mi sualte awt suh la, an zinga tel chak hek suh." 
Proverbs24:2 An thinlungin hnehchhiahna an zir a, an hmuiin pawikhawih lam thu mawlh an sawi thin a ni." 
Proverbs24:3 Finna in chu sak ani a, hriatthiamnain tihngheh a ni." 
Proverbs24:4 Tin, hriatna avangi pindan chu sum hlu tak leh duhawm taka tihkhahin a awm." 
Proverbs24:5 Chakna aiin finna a tha a, awmkhauh aiin hriatthiamna." 
Proverbs24:6 Bei hmain ngun taka ral rel a tha, rem i hriat poh leh i chak zawk ang." 
Proverbs24:7 Mi a tan finna chu a sang lutuk a, kulh kawngkaah a ka a ang lo." 
Proverbs24:8 Thil tha lo ti tura remruat thin chu mite'n pawikhawih hmang an ti ang. 
Proverbs24:9 Mi a ngaihtuahna chu sual a ni a, tin, mi hmusit ching mi chu mihring tan tenawm an ni." 
Proverbs24:10 Mangan nia i chauh mai chuan i chakna a bei tham a ni. 
Proverbs24:11 Thi tura hruaite chu chhan chhuak la. Thah mai turte chu chhan chhuak thuai rawh. 
Proverbs24:12 Ngai teh hei chu ka hre lo i tih mai chuan, Thinlung buktu chuan a ngaihtuah dawn lo'm ni? I nunna vawngtu chuan a hre dawn lo'm ni? Mi tin, an thiltih ang zelin a rul dawn lo'm ni?" 
Proverbs24:13 Ka fapa, khawizu in rawh, a tha si a, khawithlar i kaa tui tak chu." 
Proverbs24:14 Tichuan i nunna atan finna chu chutiang a ni tih i hria ang a; Tin, i hmuh chuan lawmman a awm ang a, i beisei chu tihbo a ni lo ang." 
Proverbs24:15 Aw, mi suaksualpa, mi felte awmna chu chang suh." 
Proverbs24:16 Mi fel chu vawi sarih tlu mah se la, a tho leh zel thin; a awmna chu tihchhiatsak suh." 
Proverbs24:17 I hmelma a tlukin lawm suh la, tihtlawma a awm in i rilru lawm suh se;" 
Proverbs24:18 Chutilochuan LALPA'n a hmu ang a, a lawm lo ang a, a laka a thinrim a lamlet dah ang e." 
Proverbs24:19 Thil tha lo titute avangin intilungngai duh suh la, mi suaksual awt hek suh." 
Proverbs24:20 Mi sual tan chuan lawmman a awm dawn si lo a, mi suaksual khawnvar chu tihmih a ni dawn si a." 
Proverbs24:21 Ka fapa, LALPA leh lal chu tih la, rilru danglam pu mite chu pawl suh;" 
Proverbs24:22 An chhiatna a lo thleng thut ang a, an boral kumte chu tu nge hria?" 
Proverbs24:23 He'ngte pawh hi mi fing thu sawi a ni, rorelnaa mi zahzawng neih hi a tha lo a ni." 
Proverbs24:24 Mi suaksual hnenah, I fel e, titu chu mi tinin anchhia an lawh an ang a, hnam tinin an hua ang a;" 
Proverbs24:25 A zilhhautute erawh chu an hlim ang a, an chungah malsawmna tha tak a lo thleng ang." 
Proverbs24:26 Dik taka chhangtu chu thian tha a ni. 
Proverbs24:27 Pawn lam thil buatsaih la, lo lamah inpeih diam la, chu mi zawhah i in sa rawh." 
Proverbs24:28 A vang awm loin i thenawmte chungchang thu-ah hretu ni suh la, i kain bum bawk suh." 
Proverbs24:29 Ka chunga a tih angin a chungah ka ti ang a, a thawh dan ang zelin ka pe ang, ti suh." 
Proverbs24:30 Mi thatchhe loah ka kal a, hriatna nei lo mi grep huanah nen." 
Proverbs24:31 Ngai teh, hlingin a hnim phui chuk mai a, a chhung zawng zawng chu taitenin a phui chuk mai a, a hungna lungpalte chu a chim vek a." 
Proverbs24:32 Tichuan ka en reng a, ngun takin ka ngaihtuah ta a, a mi zirtir chu ka hmu a, ka pawm ta a." 
Proverbs24:33 I duh chuan mu hlek la, chhing hlek rawh, kut kuangkuaihin chawl hlek teh.I mut hlanin i rethei hman ang a, tlakchhamnain sipai angin a nang thut ang che." 
Proverbs24:34 I mut hlanin i rethei hman ang a, tlakchhamnain sipai angin a nang thut ang che." 
Proverbs25:1 He'ng pawh hi Solomona thufing, Juda lal Hezekia mite'n an ziak chhawn chu a ni." 
Proverbs25:2 Thil thup hi Pathia ropuina a ni a, lal ropuina erawh chu thil zawnchhuah a ni." 
Proverbs25:3 Van hi a sang em a, lei hi a thuk em a, lalte rilru pawh hi chhuichhuah rual a ni lo." 
Proverbs25:4 Tangkaraw ekchhia paih la, a chhertuin thil mawi a chher thei ang." 
Proverbs25:5 Lal hmaa mi suaksual chu sawn bo u la, a lalthutthleng chu felnaa tihngheh a ni ang." 
Proverbs25:6 Lal hmaah chawimawina chuh suh la, mi ropuite hmunah ding suh." 
Proverbs25:7 I hmuh tawh thin mi lian hmaa tihhnuai i nih ai chuan thutphah tha deuhah lo thu rawh khai, i hnena an tih chu a tha zawk si a." 
Proverbs25:8 Inbei turin hmanhmawh takin kal suh, a tawpa i thenawmte'n an tihmualpho hun chein, a tihngaihna i hre lo mai dah ang e." 
Proverbs25:9 I thubuai chu i thenawmpa nen sawi dun u la, mi dang thuruk chu puang suh." 
Proverbs25:10 A hretu chuan a hau ang chia, i hmingchhiatna a reh lo dah ang e." 
Proverbs25:11 A awm tak thu sawi hi tangkaraw bawma rangkachak thei ang a ni. 
Proverbs25:12 Thu awih bengah chuan zilhtu fing chu, rangkachak bengbeh leh rangkachak tha mi thi ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:13 A tirtute tana palai rinawm tak chu buh seng laia vur vawt ang a ni. A pute nunna a tihharh thin vangin. 
Proverbs25:14 A pek loh pui pea insawi a, uangthuang chu ruahtui pai lo chhum leh thli ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:15 Dawhtheihnain roreltu thlem thlukin a awm a, thu nem chuan ruhte a titliak thin." 
Proverbs25:16 Khawizu i hmu thin em? A tawk lekin in rawh, chutilochuan i la lua ang a, i luak leh dah ang e." 
Proverbs25:17 I thenawm in tlawh cheh lutuk suh, a ning ang chia, a haw dah ang che." 
Proverbs25:18 Mahni thenawm chungchanga dawt sawi ching chu tuboh te, khandaih te, thal hriam takte a ni." 
Proverbs25:19 Mangan laia mi rinawm lo rin chu ha bal leh ke ruh pelh ang a ni. 
Proverbs25:20 Mi lungngai hnena hla satu chu khaw vawh nia silhfen hlih ang leh pema chingal leih ang a ni. 
Proverbs25:21 I hmelma a ril a tam chuan ei tur pe rawh, a tui a hal chuan in tur pe rawh," 
Proverbs25:22 I tizak em em ang a, tin, LALPA'n a rul ang che." 
Proverbs25:23 Hmar thliin ruah a rawn thlen a, chutiang bawkin mi rel hmang leiin thinur hmel." 
Proverbs25:24 Hmeichha an hmang tak nena in zau taka awm ai chuan in chung chhip kila awm a tha zawk. 
Proverbs25:25 Ram hla taka chanchin chu mi tuihal tak tana tui vawt ang a ni. 
Proverbs25:26 Mi fel, mi suaksual kawng kiantu chu tuikhur hnuchhawn hnu leh tuihna tihkhawloh ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:27 Khawizu in tam hi a tha lo a, chutiang bawkin miin mahni ropuina an zawng hi ropuina a ni lo e.Mahni rilru thunun zo lo mi chu khawpui chim kulh nei lo ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:28 Mahni rilru thunun zo lo mi chu khawpui chim kulh nei lo ang a ni. 
Proverbs26:1 Nipuia vur tla leh buh seng laia ruah sur a inhmeh lo angin mi a chawimawi hi a inhmeh lo a ni. 
Proverbs26:2 Chawngzawng thlawk thlawk leh vamur leng lai angin vang awm loa anchhe lawh chu engmah lo a ni. 
Proverbs26:3 Vuakna hrui chu sakawr tan a ni a, thirbarh chu sabengtung tan a ni a, tiang chu mi a hnungzang tan a ni." 
Proverbs26:4 Mi a chu a at dan angin chhang suh, amah ang i lo ni hlauh dah ang e." 
Proverbs26:5 Mi a chu a at dan a zirin chhang rawh, chutilochuan mi fingah a inngai mai dah ang e." 
Proverbs26:6 Mi a thuchahtu chu ama kea tan a ni a, ama chhiatna a in a ni." 
Proverbs26:7 Kebai kete chu a then a then a, chutiang chuan tehkhin thu chu mi ate kaah chuan a ni thin." 
Proverbs26:8 Mi a chawimawi chu lung intiangkhawm chunga lunghlu ip ang a ni. 
Proverbs26:9 Mi ate kaa tehkhin thu chu, zu rui mi kut hling chhun ang a ni." 
Proverbs26:10 Mi a leh mi veivak ruai thin chu thal kah thiam mi hliam thintu ang hi a ni. 
Proverbs26:11 Mi a a atzia tilang nawn leh thin chu ui a luak hnu ei leh thin ang hi a ni. 
Proverbs26:12 Mahni ngaiha fing inti i hmu thin em? Chu mi ai chuan mi aah beiseiawm a awm tam zawk. 
Proverbs26:13 Mi thatchhia chuan, Kawngah sakeibaknei a awm, kawtthlerah sakeibaknei a awm, a ti thin." 
Proverbs26:14 Kawpzaa kawngkhar a her vel angin mi thatchhia chu a khumah a her vel thin. 
Proverbs26:15 Mi thatchhia chuan a kut thlengah a hnim a; a kaa thlen leh pawh a peih thin lo. 
Proverbs26:16 Mi pasarih thil chhut thiam ai pawhin mi thatchhia chu ama ngaihin a fing zawk. 
Proverbs26:17 A inrawlh vena tur pawh awm hauh si loaa kal paha mi sual mai chu ui kal lai a benga lo mantu ang a ni. 
Proverbs26:18 thenawmte bum a, Ka fiamthu a ni lo'm ni? titu chu" 
Proverbs26:19 Mi a, meichher te, thla te, thihna tea mi tihthaihtu ang a ni." 
Proverbs26:20 Thing a ral vangin mei chu a thi a, sesea thu sawitu awm lohnaah chuan inhauna a reh thin." 
Proverbs26:21 Meiling chu meihawl tivamtu leh thing chu mei tialhtu a ni angin an hmang mi chu insualna tialhtu a ni. 
Proverbs26:22 Sesea thu sawi hmangte thu chu chaw tui tak ang a ni a, pumpui chhungrilah a lut thin." 
Proverbs26:23 Thu sawi tlawr hmui leh thinlung sual chu hlumbel tangkaraw tuieka luan ang a ni. 
Proverbs26:24 Mi huat hmang a kain a thup a, a thinlungah erawh chuan bumna a vawng thin." 
Proverbs26:25 Tha taka thu a sawi pawhin ring suh, a thinlungah thil tenawm pasarih a pai si a." 
Proverbs26:26 A huatna chu bumnain thup mah se la, a suahsualna chu tlang hriatah tihlan a ni ang."

Proverbs26:28 Lei dawthei chuan ama hliamte chu a haw thin a, fak derna ka chuan thil a tichhe thin." 
Proverbs27:1 A tuk lama thil lo awm tur chhuang suh, chumi ni chuan eng nge a rawn chhuahpui dawn i hre si lo." 
Proverbs27:2 Nangma kaa infak loin mi dangin fak zawk che se la; nangma hmui ni lo, hmelhriat loh mi hmuiin." 
Proverbs27:3 Lung hi a rit hle a, tiau vaivut pawh hi a khin hle a; nimahsela mi ain mi an tihbuaina chu, chu mi pahnih ai pawh chuan a rit zawk." 
Proverbs27:4 Thinurna chu a rawng a, thinrimna chu a so a; mahse itsikna chu tu nge tuar zo awm?" 
Proverbs27:5 Hmangaihna inthup ai chuan a langa zilhhauna a tha zawk. 
Proverbs27:6 Thian min hliamna chu a tak a, hmelma min fawhna erawh chu a der a ni." 
Proverbs27:7 Mi puar tan chuan khawithlar pawh a tenawm a, mi riltam tan erawh chuan thil kha zawng zawng pawh a tui a ni." 
Proverbs27:8 Mi a hmun vah bosan chu, sava a bu a thlawh bosan ang a ni." 
Proverbs27:9 Hriak leh rimtuiin rilru a tihlim thin angin, thinlung taka tanga lo chuak thian remhriatpuina chuan a tihlim thin a ni." 
Proverbs27:10 Nangmah ngeia thian leh i pa thian chu thlauhthla suh; i vanduai niin i unaupa inah kal suh; lam hla taka unau aiin lamhnaia thenawmte chu an tha zawk. 
Proverbs27:11 Ka fapa, fing la, ka thinlung tilawm rawh; mi sawi chhetute ka chhan theihna'n." 
Proverbs27:12 Mi fing chuan thil tha lo a hmu a, a biru thin a, mi mawl erawh chuan a tawn thin a, a tuar phah thin." 
Proverbs27:13 Hnam dang tan mawhphur tura inpe silhfen chu la la, ram dang hmeichhe tana mawhphurtua inpe chu hrengah hmang rawh." 
Proverbs27:14 Zing taka tho a, ring taka a thian malsawmtu chu, a tan anchhiaa ngaih a ni ang." 
Proverbs27:15 Khawcheng leh hmeichhe an hmang chu angkhat an ni; 
Proverbs27:16 Chutiang nu chu in khap bet thei dawn em ni? Thli huh beh leh hriak hum beh tum ang a ni. 
Proverbs27:17 Thirin thir a tihriam a, chutiang bawkin miin a thian hmel a tihriam." 
Proverbs27:18 Tupawh theipui kung nei chuan a rah a ei ang a, tupawh a pu rawng bawl chu chawimawi a ni ang." 
Proverbs27:19 Tuia hmel ngai ngai a lang angin mihring thinlung chu mihringah a lang. 
Proverbs27:20 Seol leh Abadan-in tawk tih lem a nei lo angin mihring mitin tawk tih reng a nei lo. 
Proverbs27:21 Tihthianghlimna bel chu tangkaraw tan a ni a, rawhtuina mei chu rangkachak tan a ni a, mihring chu a thil fak zawngah fiah a ni." 
Proverbs27:22 Mi a chu buh nen sumah sukin deng mah u la, a atna chuan a thlah lo ang." 
Proverbs27:23 I beram rualte awm dan chu hriat tumin taihmak chhuah la, i ran rualte chu veng tha rawh." 
Proverbs27:24 Sum leh paite chu chatuana tan a ni lo a; lallukhum chuan chhuan zawng zawng a daih em ni? 
Proverbs27:25 Hlobet chu an at a, hlobet no dep a lo lang a; tlanga hlobet an la khawm a."

Proverbs28:1 Mi suaksualte chu tuma um lohin an tlanchhia a, mi felte erawh chu sakeibaknei angin an huai." 
Proverbs28:2 Ramin a bawhchhiat chuan puipate an inthlak zut thin, mi thil ngaihdan thiam leh hriatna neitute vang erawh chuan ram chuan a din rei phah ang." 
Proverbs28:3 Mi rethei hnehchiahtu mi renchham chu ei tur engmah hnutchhiah nei loa thli len bo vek ruah ang a ni. 
Proverbs28:4 Dan hawisantute chuan mi suaksual an fak thin a, dan zawmtute erawh chuan an kalh thin." 
Proverbs28:5 Mi tha lo chuan rorel an hre thiam thin lo a; LALPA zawngtute erawh chuan engkim an hrethiam thin. 
Proverbs28:6 Mi hausa awm dan dik loa awm ai chuan mi rethei awm dan dik taka awm chu a tha zawk. 
Proverbs28:7 Tupawh dan zamwtu chu fapa fing a ni a, mi virte thian erawh chuan a pa mualphona a thlensak thin." 
Proverbs28:8 A pung uma a sum tipungtu chuan mi rethei lainattu tan a khawlsak a ni. 
Proverbs28:9 Dan ngaithla duh loa hnuchhawntu chu a tawngtaina pawh tenawm a ni. 
Proverbs28:10 Mi tha, kawng tha loa kal botirtu chu ama hum laihah ngei a tla ang a, mi tha famkimte erawh chuan thil tha an rochung ang." 
Proverbs28:11 Mi hausa chu ama ngaihin a fing a; nimahsela mi rethei thil ngaihdan thiamte chuan an lai lang ang. 
Proverbs28:12 Mi fel hlawhtlinnaah chuan ropuina nasa tak a awm a; mi sual an dinchan erawh chuan mite an biru thin. 
Proverbs28:13 Bawhchhiatna zeptute chu an hmuingil lo ang a, zep loa inpuanga hawisantute chuan zahngaihna an hmu ang." 
Proverbs28:14 LALPA tih reng mi chu a nihlawh e, thinlung tikhauhtu erawh chu vanduainaah a tlu lut ang." 
Proverbs28:15 Mi rethei chunga roreltu suaksual chu sakeibaknei rum ang leh savawm pawng vak ruai ruai ang a ni. 
Proverbs28:16 Thil ngaihdan thiam lo hotu chu mi hnechhiahtu a ni thin a, awhna hawtu erawh chuan a dam chhung a tisei ang." 
Proverbs28:17 Mi thisen phurtu chu khuarkhurumah a tlan lut ang a, tumahin hum suh se." 
Proverbs28:18 Tupawh dik taka awm chu chhanchhuahin a awm ang a, dik lo taka awm erawh chu a tlu thuai ang." 
Proverbs28:19 A lei lettu chuan chhang a ngah ang a, mi lelo zuitu erawh chu a pachhe hle ang." 
Proverbs28:20 Mi rinawm chuan malsawmna a ngah ang a, hausak thuai tum erawh chu hrem lohin a chhuak lo ang." 
Proverbs28:21 Mi thlei bik neih hi a tha lo a, miin chhang them vangin an bawhchhe tur a ni hek lo." 
Proverbs28:22 Mi fir chuan sum a um a, a chungah tlakchhamna a lo thleng dawn tih a hre hek lo." 
Proverbs28:23 Leia mi fak dertu ai chuan mi zilhtu chuan a hnua fak a hlawh tam zawk ang. 
Proverbs28:24 A nu emaw, a pa emaw rawk a, ""Bawhchhiatna a ni lo e,"" titu chu Tiboraltu thian a ni." 
Proverbs28:25 Mi rilru duham chuan inbeina a chawk chhuak a, LALPA-a rinna nghattu erawh chu tihthauin a awm ang." 
Proverbs28:26 Mahni rilru ring maitu chu mi a a ni a, fing taka chetla mi erawh chu chhanchhuah a ni ang." 
Proverbs28:27 Mi rethei thil petu chu a tlachham lo ang a, maimitchhinsantu erawh chuan anchhia nasa tak a dawng ang.Mi suaksual an dinchanin mite an biru a, an boralin mi fel an pung thin." 
Proverbs28:28 Mi suaksual an dinchanin mite an biru a, an boralin mi fel an pung thin." 
Proverbs29:1 Zilhhau fo pawha a ring tikhawng tlat chu vawilehkhatah tihtliahin a awm ang a, tihdamna a awm lo ang." 
Proverbs29:2 Mi fel an lo pun hian mite an lawm thin a, mi sualin rorelna an chanin mite an rum thin." 
Proverbs29:3 Finna ngainatu chuan a pa lawmna a thlen a, nawhchizuar pawltu chuan a sum a tiral thin." 
Proverbs29:4 Dik taka lalin ro a rel chuan ram a phuisui a, thamna a lak chuan ram a chhe thin." 
Proverbs29:5 A thenawm fak dertu chuan a ke tan len a zam a ni. 
Proverbs29:6 Mi tha lote bawhchhiatnaah chuan thang a awm a, mi fel erawh chu a zai a, a hlim." 
Proverbs29:7 Mi fel chuan mi rethei thu a hriatsak a, mi suaksual erawh chuan hriatna turin ngaihthiamna a nei lo." 
Proverbs29:8 Hmusittu chuan khawpui a tialh a, mi fing erawh chuan thinurna a tikiang thin." 
Proverbs29:9 Mi fingin mi a a hnial chuan, a thinur emaw, a nui emaw pawh ni se la, inremna a awm lo reng reng ang." 
Proverbs29:10 Thisen chhuah chak mite chuan mi tha famkim an hua a, mi dik takte erawh chuan a nunna humhim an tum thin." 
Proverbs29:11 Mi a chuan a thinur thu zawng zawng a sawi chhuak a, mi fing erawh chuan an thup a, an ngawihpui thin." 
Proverbs29:12 Roreltuin dawt thu a ngaihsan chuan a chhiahhlawhte zawng zawng an sual thin," 
Proverbs29:13 Mi rethei leh hnechhiahtu an awm dun a, LALPA'n an mit a tihvarsak ve ve a." 
Proverbs29:14 Mi retheite rinawm taka rorelsaktu lal chu a lalthutthleng chu kumkhuaa tihngheh a ni ang. 
Proverbs29:15 Tiang leh zilhhaunain a tifing a, naupang thlahthlam chuan a nu zahna a thlen thin." 
Proverbs29:16 Mi sual an lo punin bawhchiatna pawh a lo pung thin a, mi fel erawh chuan an tlukna chu a la hmu ang." 
Proverbs29:17 I fapa chu thunun fel la, chawlhna a pe ang chia, a ni, i rilru lawmna a thlensak ang che." 
Proverbs29:18 Inlarna a awm loh chuan mipuite an tladah thin a, dan zawmtu erawh chu a nihlawh thin." 
Proverbs29:19 Chhiahhlawh chu thu maia thunun mi a ni lo, hre mah se la engahmah a ngai lo ang." 
Proverbs29:20 Thu sawi thuai thuai mi i hmu thin em? Chu mi ai chuan mi aah beiseiawm a awm tam zawk. 
Proverbs29:21 A naupan tet atanga chhiahhlawh duat chu a tawpah in ro pawh a chuh ang. 
Proverbs29:22 Mi thinurin insualna a chawk chhuak a, mi thinramin bawhchhiatna a ngah thin." 
Proverbs29:23 Mi a chaponain a tilawm ang a, mi rilru inngaitlawm chuan chawimawi a hlawh ang." 
Proverbs29:24 Rukru kawppuitu chuan ama nunna a hua a ni; chhechham ri a hria a, engmah a sawi si lo." 
Proverbs29:25 Mi dang ngaih dan pawisak luat a hlauhawm a, LALPA-a innghah erawh chu a him." 
Proverbs29:26 Mi tam takin roreltute duhsak hlawhna an zawng a, mahse mihring chunga rorelna chu LALPA hnen atanga lo chhuak a ni.Mi fel lo chu mi fel ngaihin tenawm a ni a, tin, dik taka awm mi chu mi suaksual tan tenawm a ni." 
Proverbs29:27 Mi fel lo chu mi fel ngaihin tenawm a ni a, tin, dik taka awm mi chu mi suaksual tan tenawm a ni." 
Proverbs30:1 Jakeha fapa Agura thute: thufing chu. Miin Ethiela hnenah, Ethiela leh Ukala hnenah heti hian a ti." 
Proverbs30:2 Mi ahluanah ka mawl ber a, mihringin hriatthiamna an neih hi ka nei lo a:" 
Proverbs30:3 Finna ka zir lo a, mi thianghlima hriatna ka nei hek lo." 
Proverbs30:4 Tu nge ni vana chho tawh a, lo chhuk leha chu? Tu nge ni a kuta thli hum khawmtu chu? Tu nge ni a puana tui funtu chu? Tu nge ni kawlkil zawng zawngte tinghet? Tu nge ni a hming, tu nge ni a fapa hming pawh i hria em?" 
Proverbs30:5 LALPA thu zawng zawng chu fiah a ni tawh, amah ringtu zawng zawngte tan ani chu phaw a ni." 
Proverbs30:6 A thute chu belhchhah suh, chutilochuan a lai lang ang chia, dawthei i lo ni dah ang e." 
Proverbs30:7 Thil pahnih ka dil chia, ka thih hmain rem ti lul ang che." 
Proverbs30:8 Thil lawi lo leh dawtte chu mi tihsawnsak daih ang che. Pachhiatna emaw, neihnunna emaw mi pe hek suh. Ka tana mamawh chawin min chawm rawh." 
Proverbs30:9 Chutilochuan ka tlaipuar ang a, ka phat ang chia, LALPA chu tu nge ni? Ka ti dah ang e; a nih loh vek leh ka lo rethei ang a, ruk ka ru ang a, Ka Pathian hming ka tihliau dah ang e." 
Proverbs30:10 Chhiahhlawh chu a pu hnenah rel suh, anchia a lawh ang chia, thiam loh i hlawh dah ang e." 
Proverbs30:11 An pate anchhia lawh a, an nute malsawm lo chhuan an awm a." 
Proverbs30:12 Mahni ngaiha thianghlim inti chhuan an awm a; nimahsela an bawlhhlawhna tlen fai an ni si lo. 
Proverbs30:13 Tha inti em emte an awm a, tha an va inti teh reng em!" 
Proverbs30:14 An ha chu khandaih ang, an ha hnuai lam chemte ang chhuan an awm a, leilung ata mi rethei leh mihring zing ata mi renchhamte ei zo turin." 
Proverbs30:15 Mi pe rawh, mi pe rawh, tia au fanu pahnih nei satliah a awm a. Thil pathum, kham lem nei lo a awm a; e! Thil pali, a ni; a tawk e, ti ngai lote." 
Proverbs30:16 Thlan leh chhul ching, tui khawpkham lo leilung leh a tawk e, ti ngai lo mei." 
Proverbs30:17 A pa hmusittu leh a nu thu awi ngaineptu mit chu phai choakin an kher chhuak ang a, mupui note'n an ei ang." 
Proverbs30:18 Thil pathum ka tana mak lutuk a awm a. E! Thil pali a ni ka hriat loh chu. 
Proverbs30:19 Boruaka mupui kawng; lung chunga rul kawng; tuifinriata lawng kawng; mipain nula a panna kawngte. 
Proverbs30:20 Chutiang chu a ni, hmeichhe uire hmang kawng chu! A ei a, a hmui a hru fai a, thil sual engmah ka ti lo, a ti thin." 
Proverbs30:21 Thil pathum vangin leilung a khur thin; thil pali a ni, tuar theih lohte." 
Proverbs30:22 Chhiahhlawh chu lal a lo nih a, mi a chu buh leh saa a lo tlai a." 
Proverbs30:23 Hmeichhe huatthlala takin pasal a lo neih a, chhiahhhlawh nulain a pi ro a luahin." 
Proverbs30:24 Thil te tam te pali lei chungah hian a awm a; mahse an fing hle reuh mai. 
Proverbs30:25 Fanghmir hi chak lo tak an ni a; nimahsela thalah an chaw tur an khawlkhawm thin. 
Proverbs30:26 Sazupui hi chhiatha tak an ni a; nimahsela lungpuiahte an awmna an siam thin. 
Proverbs30:27 Khaute hian lal an nei lo a; nimahsela a rualin an kal thin. 
Proverbs30:28 Daidepte hi an kein an inham tang thin a; nimahsela lal inah an awm thin. 
Proverbs30:29 Thil pathum an awm dana ropui tak an awm a. E! Pali a ni, an awm dana ropui tak chu." 
Proverbs30:30 Sakeibaknei chu ram sa zingah a chak ber a, engmahin a tilet zo lo a." 
Proverbs30:31 Ui sa thiam; kelpa pawh; Lal, tumah amah bei ngam awm lo chu." 
Proverbs30:32 Nangmah inchawisang tura thil atthlak tak i lo tih tawh emaw, thil tha lo i lo ngaihtuah tawh emaw anih chuan, i ka hup rawh.Hnute tui chawhin hnute khal a rawn tichhuak ang leh hnar sawra thi a lo chhuak angin tihthinur luinain inhauna a hring thin." 
Proverbs30:33 Hnute tui chawhin hnute khal a rawn tichhuak ang leh hnar sawra thi a lo chhuak angin tihthinur luinain inhauna a hring thin. 
Proverbs31:1 Lal Lamuela thu te, thufing, a nu zirtirte chu." 
Proverbs31:2 Ka fapa, aw ka rila rah, aw ka chhechham fapa, lo ngaithla teh." 
Proverbs31:3 I chakna chu hmeichhia pe suh la, lal tichhe thin hnenah; i nunnate pawh." 
Proverbs31:4 Aw Lemuel, lalin uain in tur a ni lo a, roreltute'n, khawiah nge rakzu an ti tur a ni hek lo." 
Proverbs31:5 An in chuan, dan an theihnghilh ang a, mi retheite chungah ro an rel dik lo dah ang e." 
Proverbs31:6 Boral dawn tepte chu rakzu pe u la, mi lungngai chu uain pe rawh u." 
Proverbs31:7 In se la, a pachhiatna chu theihngilh se la, a hreawmzia hre reng lo rawh se." 
Proverbs31:8 Tawng thei lote tan i ka ang la, hnuchhawnho zawng zawngte chungchang thu-ah te." 
Proverbs31:9 I ka ang la, fel takin ro rel la, mi rethei leh renchhamte chungah ro rel rawh." 
Proverbs31:10 Hmeichhe khawsak tha tu nge hmu thei ang? A man chu lunghlu sen mi aiin a sang zawk daih si a. 
Proverbs31:11 A pasal thinlung chuan a ring a, chhawrna a hmai lo ang." 
Proverbs31:12 A dam chhungin chhe lam ni loin tha lam hlirin thil a tihsak thin. 
Proverbs31:13 Beram hmul leh la a zawng a, a kutin lungawi takin a thawk thin." 
Proverbs31:14 Sumdawng lawng ang a ni a, ram hla tak ata eitur a la thin." 
Proverbs31:15 Khaw var hmain a tho a, a chhungte ei tur a pe thin; a chhiahhlawh nulate hnenah an tih tur te." 
Proverbs31:16 Huan tur a ngaihtuah a, a lei a, a kutkawih chhuah ngeiin grep huan a siam thin." 
Proverbs31:17 Chaknain a kawng a hreng a, a bante a tichak thin." 
Proverbs31:18 A sumdawnna a hlawk tih a hria a, zanah pawh a khawnvar a mit ngai lo." 
Proverbs31:19 A kutin hmui kut a chelh a, a kutin hmuithla a vuan a." 
Proverbs31:20 A kut mi rethei lamah a phar a, a ni, renchhamte thlengin a ban phak a." 
Proverbs31:21 A chhungte vur a hlauhsak lo a, a chhungte zawng zawng chu puan sen lar sinin an awm si a." 
Proverbs31:22 Chhuatphah puan mawi a insiam a, a silhfen chu lazai sin mi leh puan senduk a ni." 
Proverbs31:23 Kulh kawngkaa an ram upate nen an thut hoin a pasal chu a hriat a ni. 
Proverbs31:24 Lazai sin silhfen a siam a, a zuar thin a, sumdawngte hnenah kawnghrente a thawn thin." 
Proverbs31:25 A silhfen chu chakna leh ropuina ani a, hun lo la thleng tura tan pawh a nui a." 
Proverbs31:26 Finnain a ka a ang a, a kaah chuan ngilneihna thu a awm." 
Proverbs31:27 An chhung khawsak dan a en tha a, dawngdahna chhang a ei lo." 
Proverbs31:28 A fate chu an tho a, Engthawli an ti a, a pasal pawhin a fak a." 
Proverbs31:29 Hmeichhe tam tak khawsak tha an awm a. Mahse nang chuan i khum vek a ni, tiin." 
Proverbs31:30 Duhsakna hi bumna a ni a, hmelthatna chu engmah a ni lo. LALPA tihtu hmeichhia erawh chu fak a ni ang.A kutkawih chhuah chu pe la, a thiltihin kulh kawngkaah chuan fak rawh se." 
Proverbs31:31 A kutkawih chhuah chu pe la, a thiltihin kulh kawngkaah chuan fak rawh se." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Jerusalem la, Davida fapa, Thuhriltu thute chu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Thuhriltu chuan, Engmah lo mai mai, thil zawng zawng hi engmah lo mai a lo ni, a ti a." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Mihringin a hnathawh, ni hnuaia a thawhah chuan hlawmna eng nge a hmuh?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Chhuan khat an liam a, chhuan dang an lo chhuak a, lei hi erawh chu a awm reng mai." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ni pawh chu a lo chhuak a, tin, a tla leh a, a chhuahna tur lam panin a hmanhmawh thin." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Thli chu chhim zawngin a tleh a, hmar hawiin a lo let leh a; a tleh vel a tleh vel a; tin, a bial ngaiah a kir leh thin a." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Lui zawng zawngte chu tuipuiah an luang lut a, mahse tuipui chu a khat chuang lo; luite chu an luanna thin lamah chuan an luang reng a." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Thil zawng zawng hi ninawm mai mai a ni; sawiin a siak lo e: Mit chu a thil hmuhah a tlai lo a, beng pawh a thil hriat a kham hek lo. Thil lo awm tawh chu lo awm tur renga kha a ni a." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Thil tih takate chu tih tur reng kha a ni: Ni hnuaiah hian thil thar reng reng a awm lo e. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Miin, en rawh, hei hi a thar a ni, a tih theih reng reng a awm em ni?" 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Tun hma thil tuma'n an hre reng lo a. Nakinah pawh tun lai thil hi an hre reng lo ang. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Kei, thuhriltu hi Jerusalema Israel-te lal ka ni tawh." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Tin, van hnuaia thiltih tak zawng zawng chungchang chu finna hmangin fiah leh hmuchhuak turin ka rilru ka lo hmang ta a: Pathianin mihring fate hnena buaipui tura a lo pek hi hna hrehawm tak a ni." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ni hnuaia thiltih tak zawng zawngte chu ka hmu ta a, tin, ngai rawh, thil zawng zawng hi engmah lo leh thil lothlawn mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 A kawi tawh kha chu tihngilh theih a ni lo a, a awm lo chu chhiar rual a ni lo." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ka hmaa Jerusalema awmte zawng anwg aia nasain finna ka nei alawm maw! Ka rilru pawhin fina leh hriatna a nei nasa reng a ni, ka inti a." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Tin, ka rilru hi finna hre tur leh atna leh fin lohna hre tur pawhin ka hmang a: hei pawh hi thil lothlawn mai a lo ni tih ka lo hre ta.Finna a nasat poh leh buaina a tam a, hriatna a pun poh leh manganna a pung." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Finna a nasat poh leh buaina a tam a, hriatna a pun poh leh manganna a pung." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ka rilruin, Khawi nge! Nuamsipbawl ka'n ching teh ang, a nuam teh reng emaw ka ti a, mahse hei pawh hi eng a lo ni lo." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Nuih hi a atthlakzia ka chhar chhuak a, hlimhlawp lah eng ruai a ni lo." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Van hnuai mihring fate dam chhung tawite hman ral dan the ber a ni law maw tin, finna zawngin uain-a intihhlima nuam tawl ka tum ta a." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Hna nasa tak ka thawk a; inte ka insak a, grep huante ka insiam a." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Huante leh ngaw nuamte ka insiam a, tah chuan theikung zawng zawngte ka phun a." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ngawa thing thang laite chawmna'n dilte ka siam a. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Chhiahhlawhpate leh chhiahhlawhnute ka lei a, ka ina piang chhiahhlawhte ka nei bawk a; bawng rualte leh beram rualte pawh ka nei teuh a, ka hmaa Jerusalema lo awmte zawng zawng aia nasain." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Tangkarua leh rangkachakte leh lalte ro leh ram bial ro tha bikte ka la khawm a; hmeichhe zai mi leh mipa zai mite ka siam a, mipa fate lawmzawng hmei tam tak nen." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Chutichuan, ka lo ropui a, ka hmaa Jerusalema awmte zawng anwg chu ka khum a: ka finna pawh a ngai reng a ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Tin, ka mit itzawng apiang chu ka hlah lo a, ka thinlung pawh eng lawmnaah mah ka sum lo; ka thawhrimna zawng anwg avangin ka thinlung a lawm si a; chu chu ka thawhrimna zawng zawnga ka lawmman a ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Tichuan, ka kut chhuak zawng zawngte leh ka thawhrimnaa ka thiltih zawng zawngte ka han en hian, ngai teh, thil zawng zawng hi engmah lo leh thil lothlawn mai a lo ni a, ni hnuaiah hian hlawkna reng reng alo awm lo e!" 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Tichuan, fin emaw, at emaw, tlawktlaw emaw eng nge lem chuang tih ka ngaihtuah a; lal pawhin a hmaa lalte tih tawh bak eng nge a tih theih chuan?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Thim aiin eng a tha angin at ai chuan fin a tha; 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Mi fing chuan a kalna a hria a, mi a chuan a hre lo a, mahse khawrel thuhmun an zaa chungah a thleng tho tih ka hmu." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ti ka rilruah chuan, Mi a chungah thleng ang bawk chu ka chungah pawh a thleng dawn a, eng atan nge ka fin bik le? ka inti a. Tichuan ka rilruah chuan, hei pawh hi engmah lo mai a lo ni, ka ti a." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Mi fing pawh, mi a pawh, kumkhuaa hriatrengna chu a awm si lo; ni lo la thleng turahte chuan an vaia theihnghilh daih an ni dawn si a. Mi a ang bawka mi fing pawh a thih turzia mai chu!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Tichuan, nun hi ka hua a ni; ni hnuaia thiltih reng reng hi mi tilungngaitu vek a nih vangin: thil zawng zawng hi engmah lo leh thil lothlawn mai a lo ni si a." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Tichuan, ni hnuaia ka thawhrimna zawng zawnga ka thiltihte chu ka haw ta: ka hnua lo awm tur atan chuan ka hnutchhiah tur a ni mai si a; mi fing a nih leh mi a a nih pawh tu nge hria ang?" 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Mahse, ka thawhrimna zawng zawnga ka thiltihte chungah leh ni hnuaia finna hmanga ka thawhrim rah zawng zawng neitu a ni mai dawn si a. Hei pawh hi engmah lo mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Chutichuan, ka han hawi vel a, ni hnuaia ka thawhrimna zawng zawnga ka thawh takte chungchang chuan ka thinlung bei ka tidawng ta." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Mi, finna leh hriatna leh thiamnate nena thawkrimtu chuan, thawk ve hauh lo mi hnenah chuan rochun atan a hnutchhiah mai tur a ni. Hei pawh hi engmah lo leh thil tha lo tak a ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Miin a thawh hahna zawng zawngah leh rilru rim taka ni hnuaia a thawhnaah chuan eng nge a hmuh? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 A dam lai ni zawng zawngte chu tuarna hlir a ni a, a hnathawhte lah vuivaina mai a ni si a; zanah pawh a rilru a hahdam chuang hek lo. Hei pawh hi thil engmah lo mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Mihring tan chuan ei leh inte leh a thawrimnaa a rilru tihnawm aliama tha a lo awm lo. Hei pawh hi Pathian kuta mi a ni tih ka lo hre ta. 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Amah loin tu nge ei leh bar leh intinuam thei awm ang?Amah tilungnitu hnenah chuan finna te, hriatna te, lawmnate a pe si a: mi sualte erawh chu, Pathian tilungnitu hnena pek chhawn tur, lak khawm leh chhak khawm hna a pe zawk a ni. Hei pawh hi engmah lo leh thil lothlawn mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Amah tilungnitu hnenah chuan finna te, hriatna te, lawmnate a pe si a: mi sualte erawh chu, Pathian tilungnitu hnena pek chhawn tur, lak khawm leh chhak khawm hna a pe zawk a ni. Hei pawh hi engmah lo leh thil lothlawn mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Engkim tan hian hun ruat a awm a, van hnuaia thiltih zawng zawng tan hun remchang a awm:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Pian hun a awm a, thih hun a awm: phun hun a awm a, thil phun phawi hun a awm;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Tihhlum hun a awm a, tihdam hun a awm; thiah hun a awm a, siam leh hun a awm;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Tah hun a awm a, nuih hun a awm; sun hun a awm a, lam hun a awm." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Lung paih darh hun a awm a, lung lak khawm hun a awm; pawm hun a awm a, pawm loh hun a awm;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Zawn hun a awm a, tihbo hun a awm; vawn that hun a awm a, paih bo hun a awm;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Tihthler hun a awm a, thui hun a awm; ngawih hun a awm a, tawng hun a awm;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Hmangaih hun a awm a, huat hun a awm; indo hun a awm a, muan hun a awm a ni." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Hnathawktuin a thawhrimna ata eng hlawkna nge a hmuh? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Pathianin mihring fate hnena buaipui tura hna a lo pek chu ka hmu ta. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Engkim hi an hun theuhvah chuan mawi takin a siam a; mihring rilruah chuan chatuan a dah bawk a;mahse, chuti pawhin anni chuan Pathianin a tir ata a tawp thlenga thil a tih chu an hmu chhuak thei chuang lo." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Hlim taka awm a, an nun chhunga thil tha an tih aliama an tana tha zawk engmah ka hre lo." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Tichuan, mi tin, ei leh in leh an thawhrimna zawng zawnga hlim taka an awm chu Pathian thilpek a ni." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Pathianin a tih apiang chu a awm hlen ang tih ka hria: engmah belh theih a ni lo ang a, lak then theih pawh a ni hek lo ang; mihringin amah an tih theihna'n Pathianin chutiang chuan a ti a ni." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Thil awm mekte hi lo awm tawh sa kha a ni a: thil lo awm turte chu lo awm tawh sa bawk kha a ni; Pathian chuan a bo tawhte kha a rawn la kir leh zel a ni. 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Tin, chu lo pawh chu, ni hnuaiah rorelna hmuna suahsualna awm leh dikna hmuna suahsualna awm chu ka hmu bawk a." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ka rilruah chuan, Pathianin mi fel leh mi suaksualte ro pawha rel ang; thil tinreng tan leh hna tinreng tan hun a awm si a, ka ti a." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Mihring fate chung thu-ah chuan, ramsa mai an ni tih an inhriat theihna'n Pathianin anmahni a fiah a ni, ka ti rilru a." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Mihring fate chunga khawvel leh ramsate chunga khawrel chu thuhmun a ni si a, khawrel thuhmun an chungah a tla a ni; pakhat a thih ang bawkin a dang pawh kha a thi a; an zain thawk dan thuhmun an ni a, mihring chu ramsa aiin a chungnung lem lo; thil zawng zawng hi engmah lo mai a lo ni si." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 An zain hmun khatah an kal vek a; an zain vaivuta mi an ni vek a, an zain vaivutah an chang leh vek a ni." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Mihring fate thlarau chu chung lamah a chho emaw, ramsa thlarau chu hnuai lamah leiah a chhuk emaw tih tu nge hria?Chuvang chuan mihring chu a thiltihah a lawm aliama tha engmah a awm lo, tih ka hmu a ni chu chu chanvo a ni mai a: a hnua thil lo awmte hmu turin tuin nge rawn hruai kir leh hlei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Chuvang chuan mihring chu a thiltihah a lawm aliama tha engmah a awm lo, tih ka hmu a ni chu chu chanvo a ni mai a: a hnua thil lo awmte hmu turin tuin nge rawn hruai kir leh hlei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Tin, ka han thlir leh a, ni hnuaia inhnehchhiahna zawng zawngte chu ka hmu a; tin, en teh, hnechhiaha awmte mittuite chu, thlamuantu an nei lo ve; anmahni hnehchhiahtute chuan thltihtheihna an nei a, anni zawngin thlamuantu reng an nei lo." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Chuvangin mi nung la damte aiin mitthi thi tawhte chu awhawm ka ti zawk. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Tin, anmahni ve ve ai pawhin lo la piang lo, ni hnuaia thiltih tha lo la hmu lo nih chu a tha zawk." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Tin, thawhrimna zawng zawng leh themthiamna tinrengte hi thenawm elrelna vanga lo awm a ni tih ka hre ta. Hei pawh hi engmah lo leh thil lo thlawn mai a ni." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Mi a chuan a kut a kuangkuah a, a intam hlum thin tih a ni a." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 A dik thei e, hahdama veikhat neih pawh hi buai philia thawka veihnih neih ai chuan a tha." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Tin, ka han thlir leh a, ni hnuaiah chuan engmah lo a ni ka hmuh ni." 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mi pakhat, mi mal tak a awm a, fapa emaw unaupa emaw pawh a nei hek lo; mahse, tawpintai awm loin a thawkrim a, a hausaknate pawh a mit tlaina khawp a ni hek lo; mahni nawmsakna chan khawpa tu tana thawkrim ka ni nge pawh a inti ngai hek lo. Hei pawh hi engmah lo mai a lo ni a, thil hrehawm tak a ni bawk." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Pahnih chu pakhat ai chuan an tha zawk, an thawh chhuah that vangin." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 An tluk pawhin pakhat chuan a thian chu a khaiding dawn si a; mahni chauha awm kha erawh chu a chung a pik e, a tluk chuan khaidingtu tur a nei si lo." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Chu lo pawh, pahnih chu an mut dun chuan an inngheng lum thei a, pakhat erawh chu mah maiin engtin nge a lum theih ang?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Tin, amah maia awm kha chu miin hneh theih mah se la, pahnih chuan an lo dodal zo dawn ani hrui thum hrual chu a chat lawk lawk ngai lo e." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Lal putar a tawh, thurawn dawngsawng duh lo ai chuan tleirawl rethei leh fing chu a tha zawk." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Tan in ata chu lal turin a lo chhuak ani si a; a ni, ama ram meuhah pawh retheia piang ni mah se la." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ni hnuaia leng mi nung zawng zawngte chu lal aiawh tur tleirawl lampangah vek ka hmu a,Lalin chhiar sen loh chungah ro a rel thei e, mahse a hnuah chuan tumah a chungah an lawm lo. Hei pawh hi engmah lo leh thil lothlawn a lo ni ngei mai!" 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Lalin chhiar sen loh chungah ro a rel thei e, mahse a hnuah chuan tumah a chungah an lawm lo. Hei pawh hi engmah lo leh thil lothlawn a lo ni ngei mai!" 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Pathian ina i kal laiin i ke veng tha rawh; mi ate inthawina ai chuan ngaithla tura rawn hnaih hi a tha zawk si a: thil tha lo an tih an hre si lo. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 I ka chu hmanhmawh suh se; Pathian hmaa thu engpawh chhak chhuak turin i thinlung pawh hmanhmawh suh se; Pathian chu vana awm a ni a, nang chu leia awm i ni si a: chuvang chuan i thu pawh tlem rawh se." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Buaina tam tak chu mangphan a ni nge nge si a, thu tuitam vak lah chu mi a aw chhuak a ni mai." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pathian hnena thu i tiam chuan ngaihthah suh: mi a chu a lawm si lo. I tiam chu hlen ngei rawh. 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Thu tiama hlen si loh ai chuan tiam loh law law hi i tan a tha zawk. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 I ka chuan tihsualtir che suh se; vantirhkoh hmaah pawh, Tiam sual palh a nih kha, ti hek suh. Enga tan nge i awka chhuakah Pathian a thinur ang a, i kut chhuak thilte a tih boral ang le?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Mumang a tam poh leh thu lawilo a tam a ni si a, Pathian chu tih zawk rawh." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ram bialah rethei hnehchhiahna te, pawngnekin rorelna leh diknate a tibo a ni tih i hmuh pawhin mak ti suh; hotu sang chu a sang lehzualin a mit sir ru reng si a, anni aia sang lehzualte pawh an awm zel a ni." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Tin, lei hlawkna chu mi zawng anwg tan a ni a, lal pawh thlawhhma ring mi bawk a ni." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Tangka sum ngainatu chuan tangka sumah duhtawk a hmu lo ang a, hausak ngainatu chuan duhtawk a help hek lo ang: hei pawh hi engmah lo mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Sum leh pai a lo pun chuan eitute pawh an pung a, a neitu tan a mita hmuh mai loh chu eng eng a sawtna?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Thawkrimtu chu a ei tlem emaw, a ei tam emaw, a mut a tui thin a, mi hausa chuan a ngahna chu a muthilh loh phah zawk ang." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Ni hnuaia thil pawi tak ka hmuh chu, mahni tana sum khawl a." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 A sum khawl chu peipun tum a, a chhe ta hlauh si, a fa hnutchhiah tur pawh a nei ta lo hi a ni." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 A nu pum ata a lo chhuaha saruaka a lo kal ang bawk khan a kal leh ang a, a thawhrim rah engmah a chhawm lo ang." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Hei pawh hi thil tha lo tak mai a ni, a lo kal lam ang chiah bawka a kal leh tur hi: boruak tan maia a thawhrim hi eng nge a hlawkna?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 A dam chhung ni zawng zawngin thim hnuaiah a ei a, a lungni lo em em a, natna tuar leh thinur takin a awm bawk a." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ngai rawh, thil tha leh mawi nia ka hmuh chu, miin a ei a, a in a, a thawhrimna Pathianin a pek, a dam chhung ni zawng zawnga ni hnuaia a thawh thinna thil thate chu nuam ti taka a hman chu a ni: chu chu a chanvo ani mai." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Mi tu hnenah pawh Pathianin hausakna leh sum leh pai a peka, chu mi chu chen turin theihna te, a chanvo pawm theihna te, a thawhrimna nuam tih theihnate a pek hi, he'ng hi Pathian thilpek a ni.A dam chhung nite chu a hre mang dawn si lo a, a thinlung lawmnaah chuan Pathianin a chhan vangin." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 A dam chhung nite chu a hre mang dawn si lo a, a thinlung lawmnaah chuan Pathianin a chhan vangin." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Thil tha lo ni hnuaia ka hmuh chu, mihring tana rit tak a ni:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Mi, Pathianin hausakna te, sum leh pai te, zahawmnate a pek chu a rilruin a chak zawng zawng chu engmah chham loin a awm a; mahse, Pathianin chu mi chu chen turin theihna a pe lo a, mi dangin a chen ta zawk a: hei hi engmah lo mai a lo ni a, hrehawmna kulmut tak a ni." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Miin fa za pawh hring se la, kum tak tak damin, a dam kum nite chu tam hle mah se, a dam lai thil tha chen lo a, phum pawh a hlawh si loh chuan, ani ai chuan a hun loa pian pawh tha ka ti zawk." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ani chu chhuak thlawn mai a ni a, thimah a lut a, a hming chu thimin a chhilh bo ta a:" 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Chu loah pawh ni a hmu lo a, a hre hek lo; a dang ai khan a nihlawh zawk a ni." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 A ni, kum sang let hnih pawh dam se la, thil tha a hmuh si loh chuan thuhmun an ni mai lo'm ni?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Mihring thawhrimna zawng anwg chu a hrawk atan a ni mai a; mahse, a chak a daih chuang lo." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Mi fing chuan mi a aiin sawtna eng nge a hmuh chuanbik? A nih loh leh, mi rethei, mi nungdamte hmaa len thia chuan eng nge a hmuh?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Chakna chavai mai mai ai chuan mita hmuh sa ngei chu a tha zawk: hei pawh hi engmah lo leh thil lo thlawn mai a lo ni. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Thil lo awm apiang hi hming vuah tawh a ni a, mihring nihna pawh hi hriat sa a ni; amah aia ropui zawk chu a dodal thei lo." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Thu a tam poh leh engmah lo a tam mai a ni a, mihring tan eng nge a thatna?Mi, a nun lothlawn ni rei lo te, hlimthla ral leh mai tur anga a nun chhung hian a tana the ber tur chu tu nge hria ang? Ni hnuaiah hian mi, a hnua thil lo awm tur chu tu nge hrilh thei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Mi, a nun lothlawn ni rei lo te, hlimthla ral leh mai tur anga a nun chhung hian a tana the ber tur chu tu nge hria ang? Ni hnuaiah hian mi, a hnua thil lo awm tur chu tu nge hrilh thei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 A tha zawk e hming tha, hriak to aiin, pian ni aiin thih ni." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Lusun ina kal a tha e, ruaitheh ina kal ai chuan; chu chu mi zawng zawng tawpna a ni si; nungdamin thinlungah an vei chu." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 A tha zawk e lungngaih, nuihza aiin; hmela lungngaih lo lang zarah thinlung a lo tha si." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mi fingte thinlung a cham reng - lusun inah, mi ate thinlung erawh hlimhlawp ina'n." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Mi fing zilhna ngaihthlak at ha, mi ate hla ngaihthlak ai chuan." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Bel chhuan hnuaia hling alh ri ang mi a ui ri chu a ni si: hei pawh hi engmah lo mai a lo ni. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Hnehchhiahna hian mi fing a ti-a thamna hian rilru a tichhia. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Thil tawpna chu a tha zawk thin, a tanna aiin, rilrua chhel hi a tha zawk, rilrua chapo aiin." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 I rilruah thinur hmanhmawh suh, mi ate tang laiah a cham thin, thinurna hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Nang chuan zawt suh, hman lai nite that zawksia, tun lai aiin; hemi i zawh hi, fin vang a ni si lo." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Finna a tha, roluah tlukin, ni hmutute tan lah hlawkna a ni." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Finna hi himna a ni bawk; tangka sum himna a ni bawk; hriatna tangkaizia erawh chu, a neitu nun chu finnain a tiharh thin."
