Ecclesiastes7:13 Pathian hnathawh hi ngaithuah teh, a tihkawih tawh chu tu nge tingil thei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Tha niah chuan lawm langin chhiat niah chuan ngaihtuah rawh: Pathian chuan pakhata pawh chu a dang ang bawka a siam a ni si a, mihring chuan a hnu lam tur a hriat chhuah lohna'n." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ka nun engmah loah hian engkim ka lo hmu ta a: mi fel a fel chunga borala awma, mi suaksual thil tha lo ti chunga dam rei phian si angte hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Kherkhiap lutuk suh la, intifing lutuk hek suh: engah nge mahni i intihchhiat ang?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Suaksual lutuk suh la, a hek suh: i hun lo takah engah nge i thih ang?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Hei hi i chelh tlat a tha a, chu pawh chu thlah hlek suh: Pathian tihtu chuan a chhuahsan vek si thin a." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Khawpuia roreltu sawm aiin finna chuan mi fing chu a tichak zawk. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Thil tha titu, thil sual ti hauh lo khawpa mi fel chu lei chungah hian an awm lo takzet a ni." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Mi thusawi nazawng chu bengkhawn suh, i chhiahhlawh anchhe lawh che i hre dah ang e:" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Nang ngei pawhin mi dange anchhia i lawh thin tih i thinlung ngeiin a hre fo si a. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Heng zawng zawng hi finnain ka chian tawh a ni: Ka la fing ang chu,"" ka ti thin a; mahse, a teuh lo mai." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Thil awmzia tak chu, hla tak, thuk tak, thuk em em a lo ni a, tuin nge hmu chhuak thei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Finna leh thil awmzia hre tur te, hmu chhuak tur te, zawng turtein ka rilruin ka hawi vel a, suahsualna hi atna, atna hi bawrawna a lo ni tih ka hria." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Tin, thihna aia kha zawk thil ka lo hriat chu, hmeichhia a thinlung, thang leh len ang nia, a kuta a vawn lah kawl bun ang mai ni chu a ni; tupawh Pathian tilawmtu chu alakah a him ang a, mi sual erawh chu aman ngei ang." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Thuhrilhtu chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh, thudik hre tura ka han ngaihtuah khawm ka hriat chhuah chu hei hi a ni, chu chu ka rilruin a zawn fo thin, ka hmuh theih loh chu a ni a." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Mipa sangkhat zingah chuan pakhat ka hmu thei a, hmeichhe zingah phei chuan ka hmu lo.Ngai teh, hei hi ka hriat chhuah tak chu a ni: Pathianin tluang taka nung turin mihringte a siam a, anni erawh chuan an tikhirhkhan zo vek a ni tih hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Ngai teh, hei hi ka hriat chhuah tak chu a ni: Pathianin tluang taka nung turin mihringte a siam a, anni erawh chuan an tikhirhkhan zo vek a ni tih hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Mi fing ang hi tu nge awm? Thil hrilhfiahna pawh tu nge hria? Finna chuan a hmel a tieng a, a hmel pum chhuak pawh a dang ta." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Pathian hmaa i thutiam avang chuan lal thupek pawisa turin ka ti a che. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 A hma ata chhuah hmanhmawh suh la, thil tha lo tilui suh: A duh duha ti thin a ni si a." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Lal thu chu thu tawp anih avangi tu nge a hnenah, ""Eng nge i tih ni?"" ti thei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Thupek pawm apiang chuan engmah a tuar lo ang a, mi fing rilru chuan ningkhawng a hria a ni." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Thil tinreng hian ningkhawng a nei si thin a, mihring buaina chu a tan nasa hle mah se." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Thil lo awm tur chu a hre si lo a, a lo awm dan tur chu tu nge hrilh thei ang le?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Mi thlarau chelh theihna leh thih ni chunga thuneihna nei tumah an awm lo; indo chhungin chawlh a awm lo a, suahsualnain a neitute a chhan chhuak hek lo ang." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ni hnuaia thiltih zawng zawng kim takin ka ngaihtuah a, hei zawng hi ka chhinchhiah a ni; mi, mi dang chungah pawi khawpin a intilal thin a." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Tin, mi suaksualte an phum ka hmu thin a, an liam ta a, thil tidikte pawh hmun thianghlim ata chu an kal bo a, khawpuiah chuan hriat an ni ta lo a. Hei pawh hi engmah lo mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Thiltih sual chungah hremna hlen nghal mai a nih thin loh avangin, mihring fate thinlung chu thil sual ti turin a lo ngampa tawh thin a ni." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Mi sual chuan vawi za pawh thil sual tiin dam rei bawk mah se la, Pathian tihtute'n, amah ngei an tih vangin a tha tho ang tih ka hria:" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Mahse, mi suaksual tan kha chuan a tha lo ang a, a ni tihseite pawh kha hlimthla ang lek a ni si a, Pathian tihna a neih loh vangin." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Lei chungah hian engmah lo a lo awm a lo awm a, mi felte chuan mi suaksualte tawn awm tak an tawng a; mi suaksualte lahin mi felte tawn awm tak an tawng lawi si a. Hei pawh hi engmah lo mai a lo ni ka ti a ni." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Tichuan, ni hnuaiah hian ei leh in leh nuam taka awm aliama til tha engmah mihringin a neih loh avangin nawmna hi tha ka ti mai e: chu chu ni hnuaia a dam chhung ni Pathianin a pek zawng zawnga a thawhrimnaahte chuan a tel zel dawn si a." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Finna hre tur leh lei chunga thiltih tak zawng zawng hre tura chhun leh zan mu lo chhing loa ka rilru ka han hman chuan.Pathian thiltih zawng zawng, ni hnuaia tih takte chu miin a hmu chhuak thei lo tih ka hmu ta a. Miin zawng eng ang mah se la, a hmu chhuak lo ang; mi fingin hriat inring teh mah se, a hmu chhuak thei bawk hek lo ang." 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Pathian thiltih zawng zawng, ni hnuaia tih takte chu miin a hmu chhuak thei lo tih ka hmu ta a. Miin zawng eng ang mah se la, a hmu chhuak lo ang; mi fingin hriat inring teh mah se, a hmu chhuak thei bawk hek lo ang." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Heng zawng zawng dap chuak tur hian ka vei em em thin a; mi fel leh mi fing leh an thiltihte chu Pathian kuta awm a lo ni a: hmangaihna a ni nge huatna tih mihringin an hre lo, an hmabak a ni vek si." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Mi zawng zawng chungah thil thuhmun a thleng a ni: khawrel thuhmun chu mi fel leh mi suaksual te, mi tha te, mi thianghlim leh thianghlim lo te, inthawi mi leh thawi lo mite chungah pawh, mi tha ang bawkin mi sual pawh chhehchham hmang ang bawkin chham duh lo mi pawh." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Hei hi a ni, ni hnuaia thiltih zawng zawnga thil tha lo chu, mi zawng zawng chunga khawrel thuhmun thleng hi; mihring fate thinlung lah chu Saula khat a ni a, an thinlung lah chu Saula khat a ni a, an dam chhungin an thinlungah atna a awm a, chutih hunah chuan mitthi hnenah an kal a." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Mi nungdamte zinga la telte tan chuan beiseina a la awm a: sakeibaknei thi ai chuan ui nung takngial pawh a tha zawk si. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Mi nungdamte chuan an la thi dawn tih an hre si a, mitthi erawh chuan engmah an hre lo a, lawmman an nei tawh ngai lo a, hriat reng pawh an hlawh tawh hek lo." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 An hmangaihna te, an huatna te, an itsikna te a boral daih tawh a ni, ni hnuaia thiltihahte hian chanvo reng an nei tawh ngai hek lo." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Kal la, lawm takin i chaw ei la, thinlung hlimin i uain in rawh; Pathianin i thiltihte chu a pawm tawh si a." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 I silhfente chu var reng se la, i lu pawh hram ngai suh se." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Ni hnauia a pek che i hun engmah lo chhung zawng chuan i nupui, i hmangaih hneha chuan nu nuam takin awm rawh; chu chu dam chhunga i chanvo leh ni hnuaia i thawhrimnaa i chanvo chu a ni si a." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 I kutin tih tur a hmuh apiang chu theihtawpin ti rawh; thlan i kalna turah chuan thil tih tur emaw, remruat turte emaw, hriatna emaw, finna emaw a awm si lo a." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ka han thlir leh a, ni hnuaia intlansiaknaah mi chak chu a hlawhtling chuang lo a, indonaah mi huai a hlawhtling chuang hek lo; mi fingin ei tur a hmu bik lo a, mi themthiamin duhsak an hlawh chuang hek lo, mi zawng zawng chungah hun leh khawrel ang angin a thleng mai zakw tih ka hmu a." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Mihringin ama hun pawh a hre si lo a; sangha, len hlauhawma man leh sava, thanga awk ang maiin, mihring fate pawh an chunga lo thleng phutin hun tha loah an awk thin a ni." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ni hnuaiah chuan hetiang fina hi ka hmu bawk a, ka tan ropui hlein a lang." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Khawpui te tak te a chhunga mi tlemte awmna chu a awm a; lal ropui takin a rawn bei a, a hual a, hual dai nasa tak a theu hnan a." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Tin, chu khuaah chuan mi rethei fing tak a awm a, a finnnai khawpui chu a chhanchhuak ta a; mahse, tumahin chu mi rethei chu an hre reng lo." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Mi rethei finna chu hmusita awmin, a thu pawh ngaihthlak ni lo mah se la, kei chuan, chakna aiin fina a tha zawk, ka ti tho a ni." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mi fingte thusawi zawi te pawh, mi ate zinga roreltu au vak aiin a hriat that theih zawk.Finna chu indona hriamhrei aiin a tha zakw a; mahse, mi sual pakhatin thil tha tam tak a tichhe thin." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Finna chu indona hriamhrei aiin a tha zakw a; mahse, mi sual pakhatin thil tha tam tak a tichhe thin." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Tho thiin a tichhia, rimtui siamtu hriak rim; chutiangin finna leh zahawmna pawh atna tlemtein a chilh bo." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mi fing thinlung a hawi, a ding lamah, mi a thinlung erawh a vei lama'n." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 A ni tak e, mi a chu tual a len laiin a hriatnain a tlin lo a, mi tin, hnenah, a a a ni, a ti zel thin." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Roreltu thin thawk mah se la, nangma chungah, i hmun kalsan suh ang che; lungnih lohnate a tireh, zawldawhnain." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Ni hnuaia ka hmuh thin thil tha lo a awm, roreltua lo chhuak thiltih dik lo ang:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Mi a hmun sangahte dah a, mi hausa hmun hniama an thute hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Chhiahhlawh ka hmu, sakawr chungah, hotu a kal kein, chhiahhlawh angin." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Hum laitu chu a hum laihah a tla ang; hungna tawn tlangtu a chu ang, rulin." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Lung lai chhuaktu a inhliam ang; thing ektu tan hlauhthawn a awm. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Thir a bil a, miin a tah hrima loh chuan tha rum a ngai lehzual ang; mahse a sawt ber mai finna, hlawhtlinna'n." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 A chuk mai chuan rulin, dawi at hmain, dawi at thiam sawtna a awm hlei nem." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mi fing kamchhuak thu zawng a hlu. Mi a hmui erawh chuan mahni a indawlh zo ang. 
Ecclesiastes10:13 A kamchhuak thu bul chu atna a ni sa a, a kamchhuak tawpna chu atna pawikhawih chi a ni." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Thu a tuitam thin, mi a chuan, miin a hre lo, thil lo awm tur chu, tu nge hrilh thei, mi hnu lama thil lo awm tur?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Thawhrimnain a intichau thin, mi a chu, khawpui kalkawng pawh a hre lo." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 I chung a pik e, nang ram, lal naupang leh hotute zinga ruaitheh thin neitu!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 I nihlawh e, nang ram, lal chu lal chi fapa leh hotute ruihna'n ni lo, chakna tura hun dik taka ei thin neitu!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Zawmthawt avangin a sawp, in chung. Kut dawngdah vangin a far," 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Ruai siam a ni, hlimhlawpa tan, uain chu nun tihnawmna'n, tangkain engkim a si thlu.Lalber chu lawh suh la, anchhia, i rilru pawhin; anchhia lawh suh, mi hausa chu, i khum laizawl hmunah; chungleng savate'n i awm chu an pu darh ang a, thla neite'n chung chu an hril mai ang." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Lalber chu lawh suh la, anchhia, i rilru pawhin; anchhia lawh suh, mi hausa chu, i khum laizawl hmunah; chungleng savate'n i awm chu an pu darh ang a, thla neite'n chung chu an hril mai ang." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 I chhang paih la tui chungah chuan, i hmu leh dawn si, nei rei hnuah." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Chan tur pe la, mi pasarih, pariat hnenah, i hre si lo, lei chungah hian thil tha lo, lo tla tur chu." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Tui a pai chuan chhumin, a intiruak thin, lei chungah; thing a tluk chuan chhim hawi emaw, hmar hawi emaw, a awm ngei ang thing chu, a tluk hmunah." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Thli pawisatu'n chi a tuh lo'ng, chhum enthlatu'n a seng hek lo ang." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Thli kalkawng chu i hre lo a, hmeichhe pum chhunga nau ruh than dan pawh i hre hek lo, chutiang bawkin Pathian engkm titu thiltih chu i hre lo." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Zingah i chi tuh la, tlaiah i kut sum suh; i hre si lo, a thang tha tur khawi nge, hei hi nge, kha kha nge, an tha ve ve dawn." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 A nuam ngei mai tak e, eng chu, mi tan pawh ni hmuh a tha e," 
Ecclesiastes11:8 A ni, mi kum tam tak a dam chuanin he'ng zawngah hian lawm rawh se; amaherawh, hre reng se la thimna nite, an tam hle mai danw si a; thil lo thleng zawng zawng hi engmah lo mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Thalaite u, in that lai chen u la, i la naupang viau lai hian hlim rawh u, amaherawhchu Pathianin in chungah ro a rel dawn tih hre reng ang che u.Engmah engto nei suh u la, in pang tinatu awm hek suh se, in that lai hun a rei dawn lo." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Engmah engto nei suh u la, in pang tinatu awm hek suh se, in that lai hun a rei dawn lo." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Tin, i vanglai hian i siamtu hre reng rawh - Ni tha lote a lo thlen hma leh lawmna reng reng ka nei lo e, i tihna tur kumte a lo hnaih hma hian." 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Ni te, eng te, thla te, arsite a thim hma leh ruah hnua chhum a lo kir leh hma hian." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 In vengtu chu a lo khurh a, mi chakte chu an kaikun a, an tlem vanga rawtsawmtu nute an ban a, tukverha dak nute chu an thim a." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Kawtthlera kawngte a inkhar ni chuan, rawtsawmna ri a lo chuai a, sava thawmah mi a thawh a, zai nu zawng zawngte an lo zuai lai hian;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 A ni, a sang chu an hlau a, kangah hlauhawm a awm a, vaiumkhal thing a par a, khau chu hnawksak a ni a, chakna a bo a, mi chu a chatuan in lamah a hawngin, lusunte chu kawtthlerah an vak vel si a." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Tangkaraw zai chu a chah a, rangkachak berhbu chu a keh a, hlumbel chu tuikhurah a keh a, tawlailir chu tuikhuah bulah a tliah hma hian" 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Vaivut chu a awm angin leiah a chang leh a, thlarau chu a petu Pathian hnenah a kir leh a ni." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Thuhriltu chuan, engmah ni lo mai mai, thil zawng zawng hi engmah ni lo mai a lo ni, a ti a." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Tin, a fing chauh pawh ni loin, Thuhriltu chuan mite hriatna a zirtir a; a ni, thufing tawi tam tak a ngaihtuah a, a zawng chhuak a, a rem fel a." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Thuhriltu chuan thu pawm tlak hmu turin a zawng a, tlang taka ziak, thutak thute chu." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mi fing thu chu beramputen an khalhna'na an hman tiang zum ang a ni a, thufing lawrkhawm chu thir Kilhna khen bur tlat anga nghet a ni." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Chu chauh pawh ni loin, hengah hian, ka fapa, zilhin awm ta che. Lehkhabu tam tak siam hi tawpintai a awm lo e, nasa taka zir pawh hi tisa chauhna mai a ni." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Heng thu zawng zawng khaikhawmna hi i ngaithla teh ang: Pathian tih la, a thupekte vawng rawh; hei hi mihring zawng zawng tih tur chu a ni mai.Pathian chuan thiltih zawng zawng chungah ro a la rel dawn si a, thil inthup engkim, a chhia emaw, a tha emawte pawh, tih hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Pathian chuan thiltih zawng zawng chungah ro a la rel dawn si a, thil inthup engkim, a chhia emaw, a tha emawte pawh, tih hi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Hla thlan khawmte, Solomona phuah chu." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Min fawp rawh se, a hmuia fawhnate chuan, uain hnehin a tha si, i hmangaihna." 
SongOfSongs1:3 I hriak hnawih mi chuan a nei, rim tha tak mai; rimtui bun chauh ang a ni e, i hming zawng; chuvang chuan an hmangaih che, nulate'n." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Min zai langin, i hniakhnung kan um ang che; min hruia lut ta, lal chuan a pindan chhungah nangma tawnah kan hlimin kan lawm ang a, ka hmu zel ang, i hmangaihna uain hnehin. An ngaina takzet che a ni e." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ka hang na a, ka nalh a nia. Aw Jerusalem fanute u, Kedar puan inte leh Solomona puanzarte angin." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ka han deuh vangin mi iai suh u, ni sain min em vang pawh hian; ka nu fapate ka chungah thinurin grep huan vengah mi siam ta a, mahni huan erawh ka veng si lo." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Min hrilh rawh, aw nang ka hmangaih chuan, i ran rual khawiah nge i chawm a, chhun laia i chawlhtirna thin chu: Engah nge kei ka vah ka vah ang, i thiante ran rual sirah chuan?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 I hriat loh chuan, aw nang hmeichhia a laia mawi ber, ran rual hniakhnungah chuan kal ta la, i keltete chawm la, berampute puan in sirah chuan." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ka khaikhin thin che, aw ka hmangaih, Pharaoa tawlailir sakawr la nen chuan." 
SongOfSongs1:10 A nalh mang e, i biang, bahsam phiar mawi nen, i nghawnga lunghlu hruite nen chuan." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Rangkachak thirhrui ka siam ang che, tangkaraw belmawi neiin." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Thutna hmuna lalber awm laiin ka nard rimtui chu a leng chhuak e. 
SongOfSongs1:13 Ka duhtak chu ka tan murra tel a ni, ka tanglaia cham ang hi." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Ka duhtak chu ka tan henna par bawr ang, Engedi grep huana mi chu." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Ngai teh, i mawi e, ka hmangaih, ngai teh, i mawi e; i mit thuro ang mai a ni e." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Ngai teh, i mawi e, ka duhtak, a ni, lungtiawi, kan khum pawh a hring reng e.Kan in khanchhukte chu sidar thing, kan inchhunte far thing lo ni e." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Kan in khanchhukte chu sidar thing, kan inchhunte far thing lo ni e." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ka lo ni e, Saron par leh phaizawla lili." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Hling zinga lili ang hi ka hmangaih chu a ni, lanute zingah." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ngaw hnuai thing zingaapple thing ang ka duhtak chu a ni, tlangvalte zingah. A hlimah chuan ka thu, nuam takin, a rah chu ka tan a thlum ngei e." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Ruai theh inah chuan kei mi hruai a, ka chungah a puanzar chu hmangaihna." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Grep thei chhanga mi tungnungin mi tiharh teh u, apple theiin, hmangaihnaah ka uai zo ta e." 
SongOfSongs2:6 A kut veilam chu ka lukhama'n, a kut dinglamin mi pawm teh se!" 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ka ngen tlat che u, aw Jerusalem fanute, saza leh ram zukpui chhalin, hmangaihna chu chawk thoa tiharh lo turin; amahin a duh hma chuan." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ka duhtak aw chu, ngai rawh, a lo kal e, tlangah zuang tumin mualah a tualchai e." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Ka duhtak chuan a ang, saza emaw zuktuai; ngai rawh, a ding reng ka bang phenah, a rawn bih kha tukverhahte chuan, zawngdaikalh awngah a inlan e." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Ka duhtak chuan heti hian mi ti a. Tho la, ka hmangaih, ka enchim loh, lo kal ta che," 
SongOfSongs2:11 En teh, thlasik a ral a, ruahtui a kangin a kiang ta si;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 Leia'n pangparte an lo lang a, sirva zai vawr hun a lo thleng a, thuva awrawl hriat a ni ta, kan ramah hian;" 
SongOfSongs2:13 Theipui kungin rah a chhuah a. Grep hruite an lo par vul, an rimtuinate leng chhuakin. Tho la, ka hmangaih, ka enchim loh, lo kal ta che," 
SongOfSongs2:14 Aw ka thuva, lungpui keh kara mi, kham chhawrdawha awm, i hmel min hmuhtir la, i aw min hriattir ta che; i aw a mawi a, i hmel lah a nalh si." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Min mansak u la, sihalte, sihal note te, grep huan tichhetute chu, kan grep huante a par vul mek si, tiin." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Ka duhtak chu ka ta a ni, kei pawh a ta ka ni e, a ran rual tlattir thin kha, lili par zingah.Ni a nema hlim a her bo hma loh chuan, ka duhtak, Bether tlang saza, zuk tuai ang chang rawh." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Ni a nema hlim a her bo hma loh chuan, ka duhtak, Bether tlang saza, zuk tuai ang chang rawh." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Zanah laikhum chungah ka dawn thin, ka hmangaih chu, ka zawng ruai e, ka tawng si lo e." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ka tho ang a, khawpui daikawn ka vel ang, kawtthlerah leh mual laiahte chuan; ka zawng zel dawn e, ka hmangaih chu. Ka zawng ruai e, ka tawng si lo e." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Khawpui venga kal hualtuten min hmu a; ka hmangaih chu in hmu emaw? Ka ti a. 
SongOfSongs3:4 Anmahni ka pelh hnu lawkah chuan, ka hmu ta e, ka hmangaih chu; ka vuan ta a, ka kaltir leh tawh rua lo, ka nu inah, mi paitu pindan chhungah, amah ka hruai luh hma loh zawng." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ka ngen tlat che u, aw Jerusalem fanute, saza leh ram zukpui chhalin, hmangaihna chu chawk thoa tiharh lo turin; amahin a duh hma chuan." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Eng nge ni hei, meikhu ding ang thlaler ata lo kal hi, murra leh beraw rimtui nam rum rum sumdawngtu paudar tinreng rim chenin?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Ngai rawh, Solomona zawnna tawlai chu, ralhrat sawmrukin an din hual e, Israel ralhrat zinga mite chuan." 
SongOfSongs3:8 An zain khandaih an vawng, do thiam an ni: Mi tinin khandaih an pai, an khel chungah, zantianga hlauhawm vang hian." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Lal Solomona'n zawn bawm a tan a insiam, Lebanon tlang thing hmanrua ngeiin;" 
SongOfSongs3:10 A bante a siam a, tangkaruain, a nghenchhan chu rangkachakin, a thutthleng chu puan sendukin; a chhung lam chu an rem, duhawm takin, Jerusalem fanute chuan.Kal chhuak u la, aw Zion fanute, Lal Solomona chu en r'u; a khumtir kha, a nu'n lallukhum, a nupui neih ni, a thinlung lawmna niah chuan." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Kal chhuak u la, aw Zion fanute, Lal Solomona chu en r'u; a khumtir kha, a nu'n lallukhum, a nupui neih ni, a thinlung lawmna niah chuan." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ngai teh, i mawi e, ka hmangaih, ngai teh, i mawi e; thuro an iang e, i mitte'n, i hmai khuhna phenah chuan. I sam chu kel rual, Gilead tlang panga bawk ang a ni." 
SongOfSongs4:2 I hate chu berampui rual hmul meh hlim, bual zawh hlim ang chu a ni: An zaa kawppui nei theuhin, nei lo reng an awm lo, an zingah." 
SongOfSongs4:3 I hmuite'n an iang e, sapsen zai, i awka pawh a duhawm ngei e: I biangte'n theibuhfai phel an iang e, i hmai khuhna phenah chuan." 
SongOfSongs4:4 I nghawngin a iang e, Davida kulh bing sang, ralthuam dahna'na siam chu; phaw sangkhat an bang e, tah chuan, ralhratte phaw theuh ngei chu." 
SongOfSongs4:5 I hnute pahnih hian a ang, no pahnih, sazain phir a neih, lili par zinga tlate chu." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Ni a nem a, hlim a her bo hma loh chuan ka kal nang e, murra tlang leh beraw mual lamah chuanin." 
SongOfSongs4:7 I mawi zo ngei e, ka hmangaih chu, nangmahah demawm a awm lo e." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Lebanona tangin lo kal ang che, ka thiannu, ka hnenah, Lebanona tangin ka hnenah: Amana chhipah chuan rawn chuan la; Senir leh Hermon chhipa tang chuan, sakeibaknei puka tang chuanin keitete tlanga tang pawhin." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Ka thinlung i hneh zo ta, ka laina, ka thiannu, ka thinlung i hneh zo ta, i mit sir zai vawi khatin, i nghawng thlun pakhat nen chuan." 
SongOfSongs4:10 A mawi mang e, i hmangaihna, ka laina, ka thiannu! Uain hnehin i hmangaihna a that zawkzia mai tak chu! Rimtui zawng zawng hnehin a tui zawk i hriak rim zawng." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Aw ka thiannu, i hmuiah a far e, khuaipui zu: I tawngkamah khawizu, hnute tui: I silhfen rim Lebanon rim ang." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Huan humhalh tlat a ni, ka laina, ka thiannu chu, tuihna humhalh tlat, tuikhur hauh tlat." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Theibuhfai hmun ang a ni, i duhzawmzia, rah tha ber ber chhuak thin te." 
SongOfSongs4:14 Henna leh nard nen, nard leh safron nen, fu rimtui leh thakthing, beraw thing chi tinrengte nen, murra leh aloe, rimtui ropui zawng nen pawh." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Nang chu huan tuikhur, tui nung chhunchhuah chu i ni, luite lo luang Lebanon tlanga'n.Harh la, aw hmar thli, lo kal rawh, nang chhim thli, ka huan hi rawn chhem u la, a rimtui leng chhuak rawh se; ka duhtak chu a huanah lo lut se la, a rah tha ber ber chu ei rawh se." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Harh la, aw hmar thli, lo kal rawh, nang chhim thli, ka huan hi rawn chhem u la, a rimtui leng chhuak rawh se; ka duhtak chu a huanah lo lut se la, a rah tha ber ber chu ei rawh se." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ka huanah chuan ka lo lut a, ka laina, ka thiannu. Ka murra ka rimtuite nen ka lawrkhawm a, ka khawizu chu a thlar chawpin ka ei a, ka uain ka in a, hnutetui nen. Ei rawh u, aw thiante u, in rawh u; a ni, in teuh mai rawh u, ka duhtakte u." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ka muhil reng, ka thinlung erawh chu a harh, chu, ka duhtakin a rawn kik chu! Min hawn rawh, ka laina, ka hmangaih, ka thuro, ka sawiselbo, ka lu a huh zo si a, daiin, ka sam chhawl leng, zan dai farte chuan, tiin." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ka kawr ka hlip ta, engah nge ka hak ang? Ka ke ka sil ta, engah nge ka tihbawlhhlawh ang?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Ka duhtak chuan a rawn zen, kawngkhar awngah, amah ka ngai em e - lung rilah." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ka duhtak kawng hawn turin ka tho, tin, ka kut chu a far a, murrain, murra a luang ka zungtangahte, kawng kalh humna chungah chuan." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ka duhtak tan chuan ka hawng ta, mahse, ka duhtak lam ang let e, a tawng ka thlain a tuar zo lo. Ka zawng ruai e, ka tawng si lo e, ka au chiam a, mi chhang si lo a." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Khawpui venga kal hualtuten min hmu a, min vua a, min hliam ta a, kulh vengtu'n an hlip e, ka silhpuan." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ka ngen tlat che u, aw Jerusalem fanute, ka duhtak chu in hmuh chuanin hmangaihnaah ka uai zo tih rawn hrilh r'u." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Mi aiin i duhtak chu eng nge a nih bik le? Aw hmeichhia a laia mawi ber, mi aiin i duhtak chu eng nge a nih bik, chuti ema min ngen le?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Ka duhtak chu a tha sen siar a, sangsawm zingah a chungnung ber e." 
SongOfSongs5:11 A luin a iang e, rangkachak thianghlim, a sam kir chu dum zen e, lianak iangin." 
SongOfSongs5:12 A mitte chu lui te kam thuro ang, hnutetuia inbuala fel taka thu chu." 
SongOfSongs5:13 A biangte chu hlo rimtui hmun, rimtui chhuah thin ang a ni, a hmuite chu lili par ang, murra tuiin a far e." 
SongOfSongs5:14 A kutzungte rangkachak tlawn, topaz lung phum thiau ang, a sakruak chu saingho, safir-a chei ang a ni." 
SongOfSongs5:15 A ke chawn chu lung var tlawn, rangkachak nghahchhana hun ang, a lan danin Lebanon tlangpui iang e, sidar thing tha chungchuang ang.A kam a thlum ber mai, a ni, a duhawm famkim; hei hi ka duhtak chu a ni, hei hi ka thian a ni; aw Jerusalem fanute u." 
SongOfSongs5:16 A kam a thlum ber mai, a ni, a duhawm famkim; hei hi ka duhtak chu a ni, hei hi ka thian a ni; aw Jerusalem fanute u." 
SongOfSongs6:1 I duhtak chu khawiah nge a kal tak: aw hmeichhia a laia mawi ber, khawi lamah nge i duhtak lam ang a let, keini'n kan zawnpui theihna'n che?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Ka duhtak chu a chhuk ta, a huan hlo rimtui hmunah chuan, huanah a ran rual tlattir leh a lili par lawr turin." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ka duhtak ta chu ka ni a, ka duh tak chu ka ta a ni: a ran rual tlattir thin kha, lili par zingah." 
SongOfSongs6:4 I mawi mang e, aw ka duhtak, Tirza iangin, i duhawm e, Jerusalem khawpui ang; puanzar khai pheisen rual ang, ka zuam lo che." 
SongOfSongs6:5 I mit la tawh la, ka lakan hian, min hmin tawh em mai si hi. I bahsamin a iang kel chal hmul, i sam chu kel rual, Gilead tlang panga bawk ang a ni." 
SongOfSongs6:6 I hate chu berampui rual bual zawh hlim ang chu a ni; an zaa kawppui nei theuhin, nei lo reng an awm lo, an zingah." 
SongOfSongs6:7 I biangte'n theibuhfai phel an iang e, i hmai khuhna phenah chuan." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Lalnu sawmruk leh hmei sawmriat an awm a, nula chhiar sen lohte nen." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Ka thuro zawng pakhat a ni, ka sawiselbovi chu, a nu fanu neih chhun te, a hringtu en phal loh chu. Hmeichhiate'n amah an hmu a, nihlawh an ti; A ni, lalnu leh hmeite pawhin an fak thin." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Tu a ni nge zing eng mawi ang lo lang kha, chhawrthlapui ianga mawi leh turni ianga chianga, puanzar khai pheisen rual ang, ka zuam loh chu?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Thei pil sak hmunah ka zuk kal a, ruama thil chawrno en tur leh grep a kuhmum emaw, theibuhfai a par emaw en turin." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ammi-nadib tawlailirahte ka hriat loh hlanin mi lo dah, ka chakna chuan." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Kir rawh, kir rawh, aw nang Sulam mi, kir rawh, kir rawh, ka thlir theihna'n che.Engah nge Sulam mi i thlir le, Mahanaim lama lam ang emin?" 
SongOfSongs6:14 Engah nge Sulam mi i thlir le, Mahanaim lama lam ang emin?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Pheikhawk bun chunga i pen mawizia; aw mi ropui fanu! I mal mumin lunghlu iang e, thawktu themthiam tak kut chhuak hnu chu." 
SongOfSongs7:2 I laibu lah berhbu hun, uain pawlhsa kiamna ngai lo ang hian. I pum chuan a iang e, buh vum, lili par hmuna chhun chu." 
SongOfSongs7:3 I hnute pahnih hian a ang, no pahnih, sazain phir a neih kha." 
SongOfSongs7:4 I nghawngin a iang a ni, saingho kulhbing sang; I mitte'n Hesbon-a dilte, Bath-rabbim luhna kianga mi ang e; i hnarin a iang a ni, Lebanon kulhbing, Damaska lam zuk hawi chu." 
SongOfSongs7:5 I thlungluin a iang, Karmel tlang, i lubahsam pawh a dum ziar e, a thlai mawi lalin a tuar zo lo." 
SongOfSongs7:6 I mawizia leh lung i tihawizia, aw hmangaih, lawmnate zingah!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 I tlawntlai hian, tum thing a iang e, i hnutete'n a rah bawr a ang." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Tum thingah chuan ka lawn chho ang a, a kau ka vuan ang, ka lo ti a: I hnutein grep bawr ang se, i thaw rimin apple ang bawk se." 
SongOfSongs7:9 I kam uain tha mi ang mai chu, ka duhtak tan luang thla del del se, muhilte hmuiah luang lut rawh se." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ka duhtak ta chu ka ni a, keima lamah a thinlai a cham reng e." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Hawh teh, ka duhtak, ramah chhuak i la, thingtlang khuaahte i riak teh ang." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Zingah grep huanah kal i la, i en dun ang grep, kuhmumin a vul emaw, theibuhfai pawh a par emaw, tah chuan ka pe ang che, ka hmangaihna.Zawlaidi hloin rimtui a chhuah a, kan kawngka bulah thei tha tinreng a awm rui e, a hlui leh thar. I tan ka khekkhal aw ka duhtak." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Zawlaidi hloin rimtui a chhuah a, kan kawngka bulah thei tha tinreng a awm rui e, a hlui leh thar. I tan ka khekkhal aw ka duhtak." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Aw ka nuta, ka nu hnute hne ve ni teh la chuan, pawna ka hmuh che pawhin ka fawp ang chia, tuma'n mi dem lo ang." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ka hruai ang chia, ka nu inah ka hruai lut ang chia. Ani'n mi lo zirtir tur; in tur rimtui ka intir ang chia, ka theibuhfai tui ngei chu." 
SongOfSongs8:3 A kut veilam chu ka lukhama'n, a kut dinglamin mi pawm teh se!" 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ka ngen tlat che u, aw Jerusalem fanute, hmangaihna chu chawk thoa tiharh lo turin, amahin a duh hma chuan." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Tu nge ni hei, thlaler ata lo chho a, a duhtaka rinchhani hi? Apple thing hnuaiah ka tiharh chia: i nu'n a veinaah che khan, tah chuan a hringtu che chuan a vei che kha." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Min dah ta che, i tangah valthi angin, i banah banbun iangin; thihna chu Seol angin a nunrawng. A alh chhuak chu meialh chhuak a lo ni a, meialh nasa tak mai chu." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Tui tam takin a tidai thei lo, hmangaihna zawng, tui lianin a chim pil thei hek lo; miin a in ro zawng zawng hmangaih aiah a pek zawh chuanin hmusitin a awm ngei dawn e." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Farnu te tak te chu ka nei a, a la um khel lo, a hnute pawh, eng nge ka tih ang, kan farnu tan, ama tan biahthu an hlan ni chuan?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Amah chu kulh bang lo ni se, tangkaraw kulhbing kan siamsak ang: amah chu kawngka lo ni se la, sidar thing phelin kan tuam leh ang." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ka ni alawm, kulh bang, ka hnutein a ang, kulhbing sangte, a mithmuhah chuan muanna neitu ka lo ni." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomona'n a nei grep huan, Baal-hamon-ah, huanpute hnenah chuan a kawltir; mi tinin an rawn lak tur, thei man cheng sangkhat." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Ka grep huan, ka ta liau liau, keima tan ngei a ni; aw Solomon, nang chuan sang i nei a, huanpute chuan zahnih." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Nang, huanahte cheng thinnu, thiante chuan i aw an ngaithla a; min ngaihthlaktir ve ta che.Hmanhmawh ta che, ka duhtak, rimtui tlanga saza, zuktuai ang chang rawh." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Hmanhmawh ta che, ka duhtak, rimtui tlanga saza, zuktuai ang chang rawh." 
Isaiah1:1 Amozaa fapa Isaian Juda-ho lal Uzia te, Jothama te, Ahazaa te, Hezekia te lal laia, Juda-ho leh Jerusalem chungchang thua inlarna a hmuh chu." 
Isaiah1:2 Aw vante u, ngaithla u la, aw leilung, beng chhi rawh, LALPA chuan thu a sawi e: ""Fanaute ka chawmin ka tiseilian a, ka chungah an hel ta si a." 
Isaiah1:3 Bawngpain a neitu a hria a, sabengtung pawhin a pu chaw pekna a hre bawk a: Israelho erawh chuan an hre si lo a, ka mite chuan an ngaihtuah lo e,"" tiin." 
Isaiah1:4 A! hnam sual, khawlohnaa khat, thi th alo tih ching, hnam nikhua lo an ni. LALPA chu an kalsan a, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim chu hmusit a, intihrangin an hnung tawlh ta." 
Isaiah1:5 Engati nge in hel zual deuh deuh a, vuaka in la awm cheu ni le? Lu chu a pumin a na a, thinlung pawh chu a pumin a chau ta." 
Isaiah1:6 Kephah hnuai atanga lu thleng zakin dam lai reng reng a awm lo; pem te, vuak duk chur te, pan hnai late hlir a ni: chung chu an hmet ping lo a, an tuam hek lo a, sahriak an hnawih hek lo." 
Isaiah1:7 In ram chu a tiau zo a; in khuate chu meiin a kang zo va: in ram chu ram dang miten in mithmuhah an ei zo a, ram dang mite tihchhiat angin a chhe zo ta." 
Isaiah1:8 Zion fanu chu grep huana venbuk ang leh, fanghma huana thlam ang leh, khawpui hual vel anga hnutchhiahin a awm ta." 
Isaiah1:9 Sipaihote LALPA chuan tihboral bang tlemte min lo zuahsak suh se la chuan, Sodom ang khan kan awm daih tawh ang a, Gomorra ang mai khan kan awm tawh ang." 
Isaiah1:10 Sodom roreltute u, LALPA thu hi hre rawh u; Gomorra mite u, kan Pathian dan thu-ah hian beng chhi rawh u." 
Isaiah1:11 LALPA chuan, ""In inthawina zozai hi ka tan eng nge a tangkaina awm? Berampa halrala hlante leh ran chawm thaute thau chu ka hne ta; bawngpate leh bram note leh kalpate thisenah pawh ka lawm lo e." 
Isaiah1:12 Ka hmaa inlan tura in lo kal hian, ka biak in hung chhung kawtlai rah hi tuin nge phut che u ni?" 
Isaiah1:13 Thilpek mai maite chu rawn keng tawh suh u; englo rimtui chu ka tan thil tenawm tak a ni; thla thar te, chawlhni te, khawmpuia insawm khawm te mai mai chu ka ngaithei tawp lo mai." 
Isaiah1:14 In thla tharte leh in hun bi nei kutte chu ka rilru chuan a hua a ni: ka tan thil hnawksak tak a ni; tuar ka ning tawh e. 
Isaiah1:15 Tichuan in kut in phar hunah pawh in lakah ka mit ka hup tawh ang a: a ni, vawi tam tak in tanwgtai hunah pawh ka ngaithla tawh lo ang: in kutte chu thisenin a khat si a." 
Isaiah1:16 Insil u la, intifai rawh u; ka mithmuh phak loah in thiltihte hi a sualna chu dah bo rawh u; sual tih hi bang tawh u la:" 
Isaiah1:17 thil tha tih zir tawh rawh u; rorelna fel zawng u la, hnehchhiana tuarte chu tanpui u la, pa nei lote chu rorelsak u la, hmeithaite chu sawipui rawh u,"" a tih ni." 
Isaiah1:18 LALPA chuan, ""Hawh teh u, i ngaihtuah tlang teh ang u! In sualte chu sen lar angin awm tawh mah se la, vur angin a var ang; sen duk angin sen tawh mah se la, beram hmul angin a awm ang." 
Isaiah1:19 Tihnuam tak leh thu awih taka in awm chuan, in rama thil thate hi in ei ang:" 
Isaiah1:20 nimahsela in duh loa in hel chuan, khandaihin a ei zo ang che u: LALPA ka chuan chu chu a sawi tawh a ni,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah1:21 Engtizia nge khawpui rinawm tak chu nawhchizuarah a lo chan tak le aw! Rorel felnaa khatnu a nih thin vei nen! Amahah chuan felna a wm thin a, tunah erawh chuan tualthattute an awm tak zawk hi." 
Isaiah1:22 I tangka chu a ekchhiaah a lo chang ta a, i uain chu tui nen pawlh a lo ni ta." 
Isaiah1:23 I mi liante chu mi helhmang, rukrute thian an ni a; mi tinin tham an duh a, lawmman an um thin: pa nei lo te ro an relsak thin lo a, hmeithaite thute lah an hnenah a thleng ngai hek lo." 
Isaiah1:24 Chuvangin, Lalpa, Sipaihote LALPA, Israel-ho Mi Chaka chuan heti hian a sawi a: ""A! mi dotute hi ka tifikiang mai ang a, ka hmelmate chungah phuba ka la ang:" 
Isaiah1:25 tin, i chungah ka kut ka thlak leh ang a, i ekchhia chu fai takin ka tibo ang a, i suan zawng zawng chu ka la bo vek ang:" 
Isaiah1:26 tin, i chunga roreltute chu a tira an awm ang khan ka awmtir leh ang a, i chhunga remruattute chu a hmasa bera an awm ang khan ka awmtir leh bawk ang: chu mi hnuah chuan, 'Felna khawpui, khawpui rinawm tak,' an la ti ang che." 
Isaiah1:27 Zion chu rorelna fela chhan chauh a ni tawh ang a, a chhunga mi hawikir lehte pawh felnaa chhan chhuah an ni ang." 
Isaiah1:28 Nimahsela, bawhchhetute leh mi sualte tihchhiatna chu a awm rual ang a, LALPA kalsantute pawh tihboralin an awm ang." 
Isaiah1:29 In sasaw duh takte chu in zahpui tawhin, in huan thlante avang chuan zak takin in awm dawn a ni." 
Isaiah1:30 Sasua a hnah uai tawh leh huan tui hmu lo ang mai hi in ni dan si a.Tin, mi chak tak chu ziza tawm ang a ni tawh ang a, a hnathawh chu meisi ang a ni ang; tichuan an kang dun ang a, tuma'n an timit lo ang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah1:31 Tin, mi chak tak chu ziza tawm ang a ni tawh ang a, a hnathawh chu meisi ang a ni ang; tichuan an kang dun ang a, tuma'n an timit lo ang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah2:1 Amozaa fapa Isaian Juda-ho leh Jerusalem chungchang thu a hmuh chu. 
Isaiah2:2 Ni hnuhnungahte chuan heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA in amwna tlang chu tlang lian chungahte chuan tihnghehin a awm ang a, tlang te te chungah chuan chawisanin a awm bawk ang; chutah chuan hnam tinrengte chu an kal nguah nguah ang." 
Isaiah2:3 Tin, chi tam takte chu an kal ang a, ""Lo haw u la, LALPA tlangah, Jakoba Pathian inah chuan i chho ang u; tichuan ani'n a kawng chanchinte chu min zirtir ang a, a kalkawngahte chuan kan kal ang,"" an ti ang: Zion atang chuan dan thu chu a lo chhuak dawn si a, lalpa thu chu Jerusalem atnagin a lo chhuak dawn a ni." 
Isaiah2:4 Tin, ani chuan hnam tin karah ro a rel ang a, chi tam tak pawh a zilhhau vang: tin, a khandaihte chu leilehna hmawr zumahte an chher ang a, an feite chu theikung ahchhumna chem kawmahte an chher ang: hnam dangin hnam dang chungah khandaih an lek tawh lo ang a, indo dan pawh an zir tawh hek lo ang." 
Isaiah2:5 Aw Jakoba chhungte u, lo haw u la, LALPA engah i leng ang u." 
Isaiah2:6 Khawchhak lam tih dan te, Philistia dawite an ching a, ram dang mite tihdante an zawm tak avangin i mi Jakoba chhungte chu i kalsan ta a." 
Isaiah2:7 An ram chu tangka leh rangkachakin a khat a, an sumte chu chhiar sen rual a ni hek lo; an ram chu sakawrin a khat a, an tawlailirte chu chhiar sen rual a ni hek lo." 
Isaiah2:8 An ram chu milemin a khat a: anmahni kuta thawh chhuah, anmahni zungtangtea siam chu, an be thin." 
Isaiah2:9 Mi tete chu tihhniamin an awm a, mi liante chu tihlawmin an awm bawk a: chuvangin anni chu ngaidam suh ang che." 
Isaiah2:10 LALPA hlauhawmna lak atang leh a mawina ropuina lak atang chuan lungpuiah chuan lut u la, vaivutah biru rawh u." 
Isaiah2:11 Mihring induhnate chu tihlawmin a awm ang a, mite chapona chu tihhniamin a awm ang, chu mi niah chuan LALPA chauh chu chawisanin a awm ang." 
Isaiah2:12 Sipaihote LALPA ni chu inngaisang leh chapo zawng zawng chungah leh chawisana awm zawng zawng chungah chuan a la awm dawn si a; tichuan tihtlawmin an awm ang: 
Isaiah2:13 Lebanon tlanga sidar thing sang tak leh chawisana awmte zawng zawng chungah te," 
Isaiah2:14 tlang lian sang tak chungah te, tlang te chawisana awm zawng zawng chungah te," 
Isaiah2:15 in sang, sang tak zawng zawng chungah te, kulh tlangpui bang nei zawng zawng chungah te," 
Isaiah2:16 Tarsish lawng lian zawng zawng chungah te, thil lem duhawm zawng zawng chungah te pawh a la awm ang." 
Isaiah2:17 Mihring induhnate chu tihhniamin a awm ang a, mite chapona chu tihlawmin a awm ang: chu mi niah chuan LALPA chauh chu chawisanin a awm ang." 
Isaiah2:18 Tin, milemte chu an boral daih ang." 
Isaiah2:19 Tin, lei hi nasa tak taka tinghing tura a thawh hunah, LALPA hlauhawmna lak atang leh mawina ropuina lak atang chuan mite chu lungpui pukahte leh lei kuaahte chuan an lut ang." 
Isaiah2:20 Chu mi niah chuan miten an tangkaraw milemte leh an rangkachak milem te, biak tura an siamsakte chu, buikelek hnenahte leh bak hnenahte chuan an paih ang a;" 
Isaiah2:21 lei hi nasa tak taka tinghing tura a thawh hunah, LALPA hlauhawmna lak atang leh a mawina ropuina lak atang chuan, lungpui pukahte leh kham lungpui khu-ahte chuan an lut ang.An hnar chauha thaw awm mihring rin hi bansan tawh rawh uL eng kawngah nge rin tlak an nih tehlul ni?" 
Isaiah2:22 An hnar chauha thaw awm mihring rin hi bansan tawh rawh uL eng kawngah nge rin tlak an nih tehlul ni? 
Isaiah3:1 Ngai teh u, Lalpa, sipaihote LALPA chuan, Jerusalem hnen ata leh Juda-ho hnen ata chu an rinpui leh an rin ber, an rinpui chaw zawng zawng leh an rin ber tui zawng zawng chu, an laksak mek anih hi;" 
Isaiah3:2 mi chak leh indo thiamte nen; roreltu leh, zawlnei leh, aienthiam leh, upate nen;" 
Isaiah3:3 sawmnga hotu leh, mi zahawm leh, remruattu leh, themthiam leh, aikaihthiamte nen." 
Isaiah3:4 Tichuan, an mi laintea awm turin naupangte ka pe ang a, nausenten an chungah ro an rel ang." 
Isaiah3:5 Tichuan, mite chu hnehchhiahin an awm ang, tin, mahni thenawmte nen inhnehchhiahin an awm ang: naupang chu upa chungah chapo takin an awm ang a, mi chhe te pawh mi zahawm chungah chapo takin an awm bawk ang." 
Isaiah3:6 Miin a unau a pa inah chelhin, ""Nang chuan silhfen i nei a, kan roreltuah awm la, he chhiatna hi i kutah awm rawh se,"" a tih hunah;" 
Isaiah3:7 chu mi hunah chuan ani chuan a aw a chhuah ang a, ""Kei zawng siathatuah ka awm dawn lo e; ka inah ei tur a awm si lo a, silhfen a awm hek lo: mite roreltuah min siak lo ang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah3:8 A ropuina an hmusit avangin an tawng leh thiltihte chu LALPA do zawng a ni a, Jerusalem chu a chhe zo a, Juda-ho chu an tlu zo ta a ni." 
Isaiah3:9 An hmel lan danin anmahni a hek chawp a; an sualna chu Sodom ang maiin an lantir a, an zep lo. An nunna chung chu a pik e! thil tha loin an inthungrul chawp si a." 
Isaiah3:10 Mi fel thu-ah chuan, ""An la tha dawn,"" ti rawh u: an thiltih rahte chu an ei dawn si a." 
Isaiah3:11 Mi sual chung chu a pik e! An la chhe dawn a ni: an kuta thiltih thungrulhna chu an hnenah pek a la ni dawn si a. 
Isaiah3:12 Ka mite zawng anmahni hnehchhiahtute hi naupangte an ni ta a, hmeichhiaten an chungah ro an rel ta. Aw ka mite u, in hruaitute chuan an hruai sual che u a, in kalna kawngte chu an tichhe thin." 
Isaiah3:13 LALPA chu sawipui turin a lo ding chhuak a, mite ro rel turin a lo ding ta a." 
Isaiah3:14 LALPA chuan a mite upaho chungah leh an mi lianho chungah ro a rel ang: Lalpa, Sipaihote LALPA chuan, ""Nangmahniho hi in ni, grep huan ei zotute chu; mi retheite laka sum lak chu in inahte a ni a awm ni:" 
Isaiah3:15 engtizia nge ka mite chu in nem sawr a, retheite hmai chu in rawt samw ni?"" a ti a." 
Isaiah3:16 Chu lo pawh chu LALPA chuan, ""Zion fanute chu chapo aka an awm a, dak awr awr leh mi melh hraw hrawa an kal a, an kal chu ti awh awhin an kal a, an kete an pen rik chhawng chhawng avangin," 
Isaiah3:17 LALPA chuan Zion fanute chhipah chuan pan khir a awmtir ang a, Lalpa chuan an zahmawhte pawh a tilang ang,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah3:18 Chumi niah chuan Lalpa'n an incheimawinate chu a laksak ang, kebun te, len lukhum te, nghawngkawl te chu;" 
Isaiah3:19 bengbeh uai diah diah te, banbun te, inkhuhna puante chu;" 
Isaiah3:20 lu cherna te, ke bun khaidiat te, kawnghren te, rimtui bawm te, invenna te chu;" 
Isaiah3:21 hming nemna zungbun te, hnar vuahte chu;" 
Isaiah3:22 kut ni thuamhnaw te, kawrfual te, puan sin te, ipte te chu;" 
Isaiah3:23 darthlalang te, puan zai sin te, diar te, intuam mawina puante chu." 
Isaiah3:24 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, mawisawla rimtui tak aiah thil tawih a awm ang; tin, kawnghren aiah hruizen a awm ang; tin, sam hniar siau aiah lu kawlhna a awm ang; tin, puan mawi tak aiah saiip puan ven a awm ang: hmel that aiah thir linga deh chhiatna a awm ang." 
Isaiah3:25 I mite chu khandaiha tihtlukin an awm ang a, i mi chak takte chu indonaah an tlu ang.A kulh kawngkharte chu an awm inchumin an tap ang a; ani chu a ruak ang a, leiah a thu ang." 
Isaiah3:26 A kulh kawngkharte chu an awm inchumin an tap ang a; ani chu a ruak ang a, leiah a thu ang." 
Isaiah4:1 Tin, chu mi niah chuan hmeichhe pasarihin mipa pakhat an chelh ang a, ""Keimahni chaw kan ei ang a, keimahni silhfente kan inbel ang e: i hming chauh min puttir rawh; ka hming chhia hi min chhilhsak rawh,"" tiin, an sawi ang." 
Isaiah4:2 Chu mi niah chuan LALPA peng chu mawi tak leh ropui takin a awm ang a, Israel-ho la damte tan chuan leia rahte chu tha tak leh mawi takin a awm ang." 
Isaiah4:3 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA'n, rorelna thlarau leh kanna thlarau a, Zion fanute bawlhlawhna chu a silfai hnu leh," 
Isaiah4:4 Jerusalem thisen chu a chhung ata a tlenfai hnu chuan, Zion-a la awm leh Jerusalem-a la awmte chu thianghlim an ti ang, Jerusalem-a la damte zinga hming ziak zawng zawng te chu." 
Isaiah4:5 Tin, LALPA'n Zion tlanga awmna zawng zawng chungah leh a inkhawmpuite chungah chuan chhunah chhum leh keikhu, zanah meialh eng a siamsak ang: ropuina zawng zawng chungah chuan englo zar a awm dawn si a.Chhunah ni sa hliahtu atan leh thlipui leh ruahpui lakah inhumhimna leh bihrukna hmun atan bawkte a ni ang." 
Isaiah4:6 Chhunah ni sa hliahtu atan leh thlipui leh ruahpui lakah inhumhimna leh bihrukna hmun atan bawkte a ni ang. 
Isaiah5:1 Ka tuh taka thu, a grep huan chungchang thu chu, ka duh taka tan lain ka sa teh ang. Ka duh taka chuan tlang lei tha tak maiah grep huan a nei a:" 
Isaiah5:2 a velin lei a lai khuar a, a lungte chu a chhar fai a, grep hrui tha ber mi a phun a, a laiah chuan in sang a sa a, chutah chuan grep sawrna khur pawh a lai a: tin, grep raha rah turin a beisei a, nimahsela grep suak maiin a lo rah ta zawk a." 
Isaiah5:3 Tunah hian, aw Jerusalem-a awmte leh Juda mite u, khawngaih takin kei leh ka grep huan kara thu hi min ngaihtuahsak teh u khai." 
Isaiah5:4 Ka grep huanah hian ka tih tawh ang lo liam kha chuan a chungah eng nge tih leh chuan tur lo la awm ta ni le? Eng vangin nge, grep raha rah tura ka besei nen khan, grep suaka a lo rah mai kha ni le?" 
Isaiah5:5 Tunah hian gai teh u, ka grep huan chunga ka tih tur chu ka hrilh ang che u: a hling pal chu ka la bo ang a, ei zawhin a awm ang: a lung pal chu ka tichim ang a, rah behin a awm ang:" 
Isaiah5:6 tin, ka tiram vek ang a; sah noin a awm lo ang a, laih phutin a awm hek lo vang; buar leh hnimhlingneite a to zakw ang: chhumte pawh a chunga ruah reng reng surtir lo turin thu ka pe bawk ang." 
Isaiah5:7 Sipaihote LALPA grep huan chu Israel chhungte hi a ni a, Juda mite hi a kung duhawm tak chu an ni si a; rorelna fel a beisei a, nimahsela, ngai teh, hnehchhiahna a lo awm ta zawk a; felna a beisei a, nimahsela, ngai teh, au thawm alo awm ta zawk a ni." 
Isaiah5:8 Ram lailiah anmahni chauh an awm theihna tura mi tel vena hmun rang rang awm lo khawp hiala in leh in inzamwtir zel leh, lo leh lo inzawmtir zel thintute chung chu a pik e!" 
Isaiah5:9 Sipaihote LALPA chuan ka bengah heti hian a ti, ""Tihtakzetin in tam tak, lian tak tak, mawi pui puite chu, urtu awm loin a la ram ang." 
Isaiah5:10 Grep huan tin, sawm hmunah bath khat chauh a la haw dawn a, buh chi homer khat tuhin ephah khat chauh a la haw dawn si a,"" tiin." 
Isaiah5:11 Zu um tura zing tak taka tho a, uainin a tihruih bung hma loha zan rei tak tak thlenga awm thinte chu an chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah5:12 tingtang leh perhkhuang te, khuangte leh phenglawngte, uain ne an ruaithehnaahte chuan a awm thin a, nimahsela LALPA hnathawh chu an ngaisang thin lo a, a kut thiltih chu an ngaihtuah ngai hek lo." 
Isaiah5:13 Chuvangin ka mite chu, hriatna an neih loh avangin, sala hruaiin an awm ta a: an mi zahawmte chu an ril a tam a, an mipuite chu tuihalin an dangro zo ta a." 
Isaiah5:14 Chuvangin Seol chuan a duhna chu a lo tizau a, a ka chu teh rual loh khawpin a ang ta a: tichuan an ropuina te, an mipui te, an ropui hbung bungna te, an zinga lawm taka awmte nen chuan an lut thla ta duah duah a." 
Isaiah5:15 Mi tete chu tihkunin an awm, a, mi liante chu tihtlawmin an awm a, chapo mitte chu tihhniamin a awm ta a;" 
Isaiah5:16 sipaihote LALPA erawh chu rorelnaa chawisanin a awm ta zawk a, Pathian, Mi Thianghlim chu, felnaa tihthianghlimin a awm ta a." 
Isaiah5:17 Tin, beram note chu an tlatna hmuna an tla angin an tla dial dial ang a, mi thau pui pui hmun rama thilte chu vakvaihoten an ei ang." 
Isaiah5:18 Bumna hruihruala khawlohna hnuk a, tawlailir hruizena sualna hnuk chu an chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah5:19 Kan hmuhna turin ti thuai se la, a thiltih tur chu ti rang thuai rawh se: kan hriat theihna turin Israelho Mi Thianghlim remruat chu lo hnaiin lo thleng rawh se,"" ti thintute chu." 
Isaiah5:20 Thil tha lo chu thil tha tia, thi tha chu thil tha lo ti thina, eng chu thima ngaia, thim chu enga ngai thina, thil thlum chu thil khaa ngaia, thil kha chu thil thluma ngai thintute chu an chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah5:21 Mahni ngaiha fingte leh mahni mithmuha bengvarte chu an chung a pik e! 
Isaiah5:22 Uain in kawnga mi chak ta, zu chawhpawlh kanwga thahrui nei apiangte chu an chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah5:23 tham ei avanga mi sual thiam chantir thina, mi fel felna laksak thintute chu." 
Isaiah5:24 Chuvangin meialhin buh pal a liak ral duak duak thin ang leh, hnim ro chu meialha a tlu zawih zawih thin angin an zung chu tawihna angin a awm ang a, an par chu vaivut angin a chho chuai chuai ang: sipaihote LALPA dan chu an duh loh a, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim thu chu an ngaihnep avangin." 
Isaiah5:25 Chuvangin LALPA thin chu a mite chungah a thawk a, a kut chu an chungah a lek a, a vua a, tichuan tlangte chu a khur dur dur a, an ruangte chu kawtthler laiahte chuan balhhlawh ang maiin a awm rem rum a. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo a, a kut chu a la l ek ta cheu a." 
Isaiah5:26 hnam tin hla taka mite tan chhinchhiahna a tar chhuak ang a, kawlkil ata ko turin a faifuk ang: tichuan, ngai teh, anniho chu rang takin an lo kal t huai ang:" 
Isaiah5:27 an zingah tumah an hah lo ang a, an inchhuih hek lo ang; tumah an muthlu lo vang a, an muhil hek lo ang; an kawnghren chu phelh dulin a awm hek lo ang a, an pheikhawk c hilhna chu a cht hek lo ang:" 
Isaiah5:28 an thalte chu zum tak a ni a, an thal ngul zawng zawngte chu khawih sain a awm thup a; an sakawr tinte chu meilung ang maia ngaih a ni ang a, an tawlalilir kete chu thawngaleivir ang maia ngaih a ni bawk ang:" 
Isaiah5:29 an thawm ri hum hum chu sakeibaknei hahum ang mai a ni ang a, sakeibaknei vanglaite hahum ang maiin an ri hum hum ang; a ni, an ri hum hum ang a, an saseh tur chu a she ang a, him takin an kal bopui ang a, chhanchhuaktu tur tumah an awm lo ang.Chu mi nbiah chuan tuifinriat ri hum hum angin an chungah an ri hum hum ang: tichuan miin ram chu an han thlir chuan, ngai teh, thim leh manganna hlir a ni a, eng lah chu, chu mia chhumahte chuan tihthimin a awm a." 
Isaiah5:30 Chu mi nbiah chuan tuifinriat ri hum hum angin an chungah an ri hum hum ang: tichuan miin ram chu an han thlir chuan, ngai teh, thim leh manganna hlir a ni a, eng lah chu, chu mia chhumahte chuan tihthimin a awm a." 
Isaiah6:1 Lal Uzia a thih ikum khan LALPA chu lalthuphah sang ak chawisana t hu ka hmu a, a silhfen hmawr fual chuan biak in chu a tikhat a vek a." 
Isaiah6:2 A kiangah chuan serafte an ding a: thla paruk an nei theuh a, an thla pahnihin an hmai an khuh a, pahnihin an kephahte an khuh a, pahnihin an thlawk a." 
Isaiah6:3 Tin, ""Sipaihote LALPA chu a thianghlim e, a thianghlim e, a thianghlim e, lei pum pui chu a ropuinain a khat,"" tiin, an inau tawn an inau tawn thin a." 
Isaiah6:4 Tichuan a autu au thawmah chuan a kawngka bul lungphum lamin a nghing ta dur dur a, in chu meikhuin a khat ta a." 
Isaiah6:5 Chu veleh, kei chuan, ""Hmui bawlhhlawh pu mi ka nih a, hmui bawlhhlawh pu mite zinga awm ka nih avangin ka chung a va pik em! Ka boral ta a nih a hmu ta si a,"" ka ti a." 
Isaiah6:6 Chutichuan seraf pakhat, maicham ata chaicheha a cheh, mieling kengin ka hnenah a thlawk a," 
Isaiah6:7 ka ka a han dep a, ""Ngai rawh, hei hian i hmui a tawk a; tichuan i khawlohna lak bo a ni ta a, i sual pawh tlenfai a ni ta,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah6:8 Tin, ""Tunge ka tirh ang a, tu nge ka tan lal ang?"" tiin, LALPA aw chu ka hria a," 
Isaiah6:9 Tichuan keiin, ""Kei heta hi ka awm, mi tir ta che,"" ka ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ""Kal la, he chite hi hrilh rawh. 'Bengin a hriat zawng hria u la, a ngaihna erawh chu hre suh u; a hmuh chu hmu u la, hriat erawh chu hre suh u,"" tiin." 
Isaiah6:10 He chite thinlung hi tithau la, an bengte tingawng la, an mitte maimitchhintir rawh; chutilochuan an mitin an hmu ang a, an bengin an hria ang a, an thinlungin an hre bawk ang a, an hawikir leh ang a, tihdamin an awm dah ang e,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah6:11 Tin, kei chuan, ""LALPA, eng chen nge ni ang?"" ka ti a. Tin, ani chuan, a chhang a, ""Khawpuite mihring awm, awm loa a ram a, inte urtu awm loa rma chu a tiau vek a," 
Isaiah6:12 LALPA'n mite chu hla taka a sawn a, ram chhungah hmun kalsan hnu tam tak a awm hma loh chuan.Tin, a chhungah chuan samw zingah pakhat pawh la awm se la ei zawhin an awm lehnghal ang: nimahsela thil leh sasual kih hnua a bul a la awm reng thin angin chi thianghlim chu abul a awm reng chu a ni,"" tiin." 
Isaiah6:13 Tin, a chhungah chuan samw zingah pakhat pawh la awm se la ei zawhin an awm lehnghal ang: nimahsela thil leh sasual kih hnua a bul a la awm reng thin angin chi thianghlim chu abul a awm reng chu a ni,"" tiin." 
Isaiah7:1 Tin, Uzia fa Jothama fapa Ahaza lal lai chuan heti hi a ni a, Suria lal Rezina leh Israel lal Remalia fapa peka chu Jerusalem run turin an chho a; nimahselah, an hneh thei lo." 
Isaiah7:2 Tin, Davida chhungte chu, ""Suria chu Ephraim nen an tang dun ta,"" tiin, an hrilh a. Tichuan a thinlung leh a khua leh tuite thinlung chu, ramhnuai thingte thliin a tinghing susu susu ang hian, tihnghinin a lo awm ta a." 
Isaiah7:3 Chutichuan LALPA chuan Isaia hnenah, ""Nang leh i fapa Searjasuba chu, dil chakta zawk tuilakna tawpah, puansutu phul lamlianah chuan, Ahazaa hmuak turin kal chhuak tawh u la;" 
Isaiah7:4 a hnenah, 'Fimkhur la, awm hle hle rawh; meichher bung khu mai mai pahnih, Suria lal Rezina leh Remalia fapaa thinurna nasa tak chu, hlau suh la, i thinglung chu zam suh se." 
Isaiah7:5 Juda chu han beiin han tibuai i la, chutah chuan kan tan luhna tur siamin, a lai takah Tabeela fapa chu lalah i thuttir ang u, tiin." 
Isaiah7:6 Suria leh Ephraim leh Remalia fapa chuan an phiar che avangin. 
Isaiah7:7 Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a. An thu phiar chu a puitling lo ang a, a hlawhtling hek lo ang." 
Isaiah7:8 Suria lu chu Damaska a ni a, Damaska lu chu Rezina lek a ni si a: kum sawmruk leh kum nga ral hmain Ephraim chu chi tih tlak loah aawm turin tihchhiat vekin a awm ang:" 
Isaiah7:9 tin, Ephraim lu chu Samari a ni a, Samri lu chu Remalia fapa lek a ni si a. In rin duh loh chuan, tihnghehin in awm thuai lo ang, tiin,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah7:10 Tin, LALPA chuan Ahazaa a be leh a," 
Isaiah7:11 LALPA i Pathian hnenah chhinchhiahna dil rawh; Seol thuk tak ata emaw van sang tak ata emaw,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah7:12 Ahazaa erawh chuan, ""Kal dil lo ang, LALPA pawh ka fiah hek lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah7:13 Tin, ani chuan, ""Aw Davida chhungte u, tunah ngaithla teh u; mihring tihhah hi thil te tak teah in ruat a ni maw, ka Pathian lam pawh tihhah in duh zel ni?" 
Isaiah7:14 chuvangin LALPA ngei chuan chhinchhiahna a pe ang che u; ngai teh u, nula thianghlim pakhat a rai ang a, fapa a hring ang a, a hmingah Immanuela a sa ang." 
Isaiah7:15 Ani chuan thil tha lo lam duh loh nachang a hriat hunah leh, thil tha lam duh nachang a hriat hunah chuan bawnghnute khal leh khawizu a ei thin ang." 
Isaiah7:16 Naupang chu t hil tha lo lam duh loh nachang leh thil tha lam duh nachang a hriat hma pawhin lal pahnih i huatate ram chu a tiau dawn a ni,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah7:17 Ephraim chuan Juda a then ni ata la thleng ngai lo nite chu LALPA chuan i chungah leh, i khua leh tuite chungah leh, i pa chhungte chungah chuan a thlentir ang, Assuria lal ngei chu." 
Isaiah7:18 Chu mi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA chu Aigupta lui tawp rettea tho awm leh, Assuria rama ikhuai awm chu, ko turin a faifuk ang." 
Isaiah7:19 Tichuan an lo kal ang a, an zain kawr chhe rek rukah te, lungpui pukah te, hnimhlingnei zawng zawngah te, ran tlatna hmun zawng zawngahte an fu ang." 
Isaiah7:20 Chu mi niah chuan Lalpa'n bakmehchem hawh, Luipui piah rama Assuria lal awm chu hmangin, lu leh ke hmul chu a ziat fai ang a; khabe hmul pawh a ziat bo vek ang." 
Isaiah7:21 Tichuan chu mi niah chan heti hi a ni ang a, mi pakhatin bawngla pakhat leh beram pahnih chauh a vul ang;" 
Isaiah7:22 nimahsela heti hi a ni ang a, hnutetui tam tak an la pek dawn avangin hnutetui khal a ei thin ang: ram chhunga la awm apiangin hnutetui khal leh khawizu an ei theuh dawn si a." 
Isaiah7:23 Tin, chu mi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, hmun tin, grep hrui sang, tangka sang man awmna apiangte chu, buar leh hnimhlingnei hmun mai a ni tawh ang." 
Isaiah7:24 Ram zawng zawng chu buar leh hnimhlingnei hlir a lo nih tak avangin chutah chuan thal leh thal ngul kengin an kal ang.Tin, tlang, bawngtuthlawha laih tawh zawng zawngah chuan, buar leh hnimhlingnei hlauh avangin i lo kal lo ang a, bawngchalte tlattirna leh beram chil mai atan a ni zawk tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah7:25 Tin, tlang, bawngtuthlawha laih tawh zawng zawngah chuan, buar leh hnimhlingnei hlauh avangin i lo kal lo ang a, bawngchalte tlattirna leh beram chil mai atan a ni zawk tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah8:1 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, ""Lehkha ziakna phek hlai tak la a, mihring kawlawmin a chungah;Maher-salal-has-baza atan,' tiin, ziak rawh;" 
Isaiah8:2 tichuan hretu rinawm, puithiam Uria leh Jaberekia fapa Zekaria chu hriatpuitu atan ka siam ang,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah8:3 Tin, zawlneinu hennah chuan ka kal a, tichuan ani chuan nau a pai a, fapa a hring ta a. Chutichuan LALPA'n ka hnenah,""A hmingah Maher-salal-has-baza sa rawh." 
Isaiah8:4 Naupang chuan, 'Ka nu,''Ka pa, tih nachang a hriat hma pawhin Damaska hausaknate a hriat hma pawhin Damaska hausaknate leh Samari laka ral lak sumte chu Assuria lal hmaah an kal bopui dawn si a,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah8:5 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah a sawi leh a," 
Isaiah8:6 Heng chite hian Silova tui dam taka luang del delte chu an duh loh avang leh, Rezina leh Remalia fapa chunga an lawm avangin," 
Isaiah8:7 ngai teh, LALPA chuan luipui tui, khauh takte leh tam takte (Assuria lal leh a ropuina zawng zawng chu), an chungah a luantir ang: tichuan a kuang zawng zawng chu a lo liam dul dulin, a kam zawng zawngah pawh a liam dul dul ang: " 
Isaiah8:8 tin, Juda-ho ram thlengin a tuam lut dul dul ang a; a liamin a luang tlang dul dul ang a; nghawng pawh a chim phak hial ang; tin, a thla zar chuan, aw Immanuel, i ram vang lam zawng zawng hi a awh vek ang." 
Isaiah8:9 Chi tinte u, buai ta nuai nuai che u, kehsawmin in awm dawn nia; ram hla taka mi zawng zawngte u, beng chhi rawh u: inralthuam rawh u, kehsawmin in awm dawn nia; in ralthuam rawh u, kehsawmin in awm dawn nia." 
Isaiah8:10 Inrawn khawm rawh u, engmah a ni hlei lo ang e; thu sawi rawh u, a puitling thei lo ang e: Pathian kan hnenah a awm si a,"" tiin." 
Isaiah8:11 LALPA chuan kut chak takin heti hian ka hnenah a saiw a, he chita kawngah hian ka kal ve lohna turin mi thunun a nih hi:" 
Isaiah8:12 He chite hian 'Phiar an nei e,' an tih thin nazawng chu 'Phiar an nei e,' ti ve suh u; an tih pawh chu tih ve loin, hlau ve hek suh u." 
Isaiah8:13 Sipaihote LALPA, amah ngei chu in tithianghlim tur a ni; amah chu in tiha ni sela, amah chu in hlauha ni rawh se." 
Isaiah8:14 Tin, ani chu hmun thianghlim ani ang a; Israela chhung hnihte tan erawh chuan tlukna lung leh dalna lungpui a ni zawk ang a, Jerusalem-a awmte tan thang leh fal ani bawk ang." 
Isaiah8:15 Tichuan mi tam takin chu chu an chhuihin an tlu ang a, tihkehin an awm ang a, an awk ang a, manin an awm ang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah8:16 Hriattirna thu zial hi phuar la, dan thu hi ka zirtirte zingah nemin chhinchhiarh raw." 
Isaiah8:17 Tin, kei chuan Jakona chhungte laka a hmai thuptu LALPA chu ka nghak ang a, amah chu ka thlir reng ang." 
Isaiah8:18 ngai teh, kei leh LALPA mi pek naupangte hi, Israel-ho zingah hhian sipaihote LALPA Zion tlanga awm laka chhinchhiahna atante leh thilmak atante kan ni a." 
Isaiah8:19 Tin, miin, ""Ramhuai aienthiam zawl leh dawithiam hram chuap chuap leh phun nuah nuahte chu rawn rawh u,"" an tih hunah che u chuan heti hian chhang rawh u, ""Miten an Pathian chu anr awn zawk tur a ni lo'm ni? Mi nungte tan chuan mitthi an rawn tur em ni?" 
Isaiah8:20 Dan Thu leh Hriattirna Thu chu rawn tur a ni,"" tiin. Chu mi thu ang zela an sawi loh chuan an tan khua reng reng reng a var thuai dawn lo a ni." 
Isaiah8:21 Mangang tak leh riltam chungin ram chu an fang ang a; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an ril a tam hun chuan an thin chu a ur em em ang a, an lal leh an Pathian chu anchhia an lawh bawrh bawrh ang a, an vanvadak vak vak ang:tin, lei lam an en ang a, ngai teh, manganna leh thimna, thlaphan nguina chu a ni ang: tichuan thim chhah mupah hnawh boin an awm ang." 
Isaiah8:22 tin, lei lam an en ang a, ngai teh, manganna leh thimna, thlaphan nguina chu a ni ang: tichuan thim chhah mupah hnawh boin an awm ang." 
Isaiah9:1 Nimahsela thlaphanga awm tawhi tan chuan nguina reng reng a awm tawh lo ang. Hman lai chuan Zebulun ram Nephtali ram chu hmustawmin a awmtir a, nimahsela hun hnuhnungah chuan ropui takin a awmtir ta, dil kamah, Jordan ralah, hnam tin Galili chu." 
Isaiah9:2 Mi thim hnuaia kalte chuan eng nasa tak an hmu ta: thihna hlim rama awmte chungah ngei chuan eng chu a lo eng ta. 
Isaiah9:3 Hnam chu i titam ta a, an hlimna pawh i tipung ta a: buh seng laia hlim angin i hmaah an hlim ta a, miin rallak sum an sema an hlim ang maiin." 
Isaiah9:4 A ritphurhna nghawngkawl leh a kovia zawn fung, a hnechiahtu talhtum chu, Midian-ho hneh ni ang khan i tihtliaksak ta si a." 
Isaiah9:5 Indona hmuna mi ralthuama an inthuamna zawng zawngte leh an silhfen thisen kai hniang hnuangte chu hala tuah ral a la ni ang. 
Isaiah9:6 Kan tan naupang a lo piang a, fapa pekin kan awm ta a: rorelna chu a kokiah a chuang ang a: a hmingah chuan, Maka, Remruattua, Pathian Chaka, Chatuan Pa, Remna Lal an ti dawn si a." 
Isaiah9:7 A ram a zu zel ang a, a ramah remnain tawpintai a nei lo ang; Davida lalthutthlengah a thu ang a, dik tak leh fal takin rorelin a rawn tinghet ang, tun atanga kumkhuain, thahnemngaihna chuan chung chu a ti ang." 
Isaiah9:8 Lalpa chuan Jakob-ho ramah thu a thawn a, Israel-ho chungah a tla ta a." 
Isaiah9:9 Tichuan mi zawng zawng, Ephraim-ho leh Samaria awm, chapo tak leh rilrua uangthuang taka," 
Isaiah9:10 Lei rawh chante chu chim mah se la lung chang chherin kan rem mai ang: theipui thingte chu sah chhumin awm mah se la, sidar thingten kan thlak mai ang,"" titute chuan an la hria ang." 
Isaiah9:11 Chuvangin LALPA chuan Rezina dotute chu amah do turin a chawisang ang a; 
Isaiah9:12 a hmelma, a hma lama Suria-hote, a hnung lama Philistia-hote chu, a chawk tho vang; tichuan ka angin Israel-ho chu an ei zo ang. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo a, a kut chu a la lek ta cheu a." 
Isaiah9:13 Nimahsela mite chuan anmahni vawtu lam chu an hawi chuang si lo a, sipaihote LALPA chu an zawng chuang hek lo." 
Isaiah9:14 Chuvangin LALPA chuan Israel-ho alian atein, tum kau leh phungladin ang maiin ni khat thilah a chhawk vek ang." 
Isaiah9:15 Upa leh mi zahawmte chu, a lu chu an ni a; dawt zirtir thin zawlneite chu, a mei chu an ni." 
Isaiah9:16 Heng mite hruaitute hian an hruai sual thin a ni; an hruaiate chu tihboralin an awm tihn. 
Isaiah9:17 Chuvangin Lalpa chu an tlangvalhote chungah a lawm lo ang a, an fahrahte leh hmeithaite chu a khawngaih hek lo ang: an zain Pathian zha lo mi leh thil tha lo titute an ni theuh a, ka zawng zawng chuan thu lawilo a sawi theuh si a. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo a, a kut chu a la lek ta cheu a." 
Isaiah9:18 Suahsualna chu mei angin a alh hluah hluah si thin a, buar leh hnimhlingneite chu a kang ral thin: a ni, ramhnuai thing bit zingahte chuan a kang hluah hluah a, a khu chho ngut ngut thin." 
Isaiah9:19 Sipaihote Lalpa thinur avangin ram chu a kang chhia a, mite pawh chu meia tuah tur thing ang an ni a; tumah mahni unau pawh an zuah lo." 
Isaiah9:20 Tichuan miiin an ding lama mi an chuh ang a, nimahsela a ril a la tam cheu vang; an vei lama mi an ei ang a, nimahsela an tlai chuang lo ang: mi tinin mahni ban ti an ei theuh ang.Manase-hoin Ephraim-ho an ei ang a, Ephraim-hoin Manase-ho an ei ang: tin, an pahnih chuan Juda-ho an do dun ang. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo a, a kut chu a la lek ta cheu a." 
Isaiah9:21 Manase-hoin Ephraim-ho an ei ang a, Ephraim-hoin Manase-ho an ei ang: tin, an pahnih chuan Juda-ho an do dun ang. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo a, a kut chu a la lek ta cheu a." 
Isaiah10:1 Dan chimawm tak siam a, thupek khirh tak ngaihtuah chhuaktute u, in chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah10:2 Hetiang hian mi khawngaihthlakte dik takin in relsak duh lo a, retheite that vena tur in dang tlat a, hmeithaite in ei a, fahrahte in rawk a." 
Isaiah10:3 Tichuan, an kan niah che u leh hla tak atanga tiauna lo thleng turah chuan eng nge in tih tak ang le? tanpui dilin tu hnenah nge in tlan tak ang le? In ropuina chu khawiah nge in hnutchhiah tak ang le?" 
Isaiah10:4 Salho hnuaiahte an kun ang a, thahho hnuaiahte an tlu ang, chu chauh chu an chan a ni tawh ang. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo a, a kut chu a la lek ta cheu a." 
Isaiah10:5 Hawh Assuria mi, ka thinurna talhtum, ka lungnih lohna kengtu tiang!" 
Isaiah10:6 Rallak la tur leh, thil laksak la tur leh, kawtthler chirhdiak anga rap turin ani chu Pathian zah lo hnam do turin ka tir ang a, ka thinurna mite beit urin thu ka pe ang." 
Isaiah10:7 Nimahsela ani chuan chutiang chu a tum ani lo a, chutiang chu arilru pawhin a ngaihtuah hek lo; hnam tam namena tam lo tihchhiat leh tihboral a ni a rilruk zawk ni." 
Isaiah10:8 Ka mi lian zawng zawngte hi lal vek an ni lo'm ni? 
Isaiah10:9 Kalno khua chu Karchemis khua ang mai ani tawh lo'm ni? Hamath khua chu Arpad khua ang mai ani tawh lo'm ni? Samari khua chu Damaska khu ang mai a ni tawh lo'm ni? 
Isaiah10:10 ka kut hian milemho ram, Jerusalem khua leh Samari khuaa mi aia milem siam chawp tha zawk neitu pawh, a zang chhuak ta si a," 
Isaiah10:11 Samari khua leh a milemte chunga ka tih ang khan Jerusalem khua leh a milemte chungah pawh hian ka ti ve lo ang ang em ni? a ti si a. 
Isaiah10:12 Chumi avang chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa chuan Zion tlang leh Jerusalem khaw chunga a hnathawh tur zawng zawng a thawh zawh hunah chuan, Assuria lal rilru uangthuang rah leh a mit chapo ropina chu ka la hrem ang." 
Isaiah10:13 Ani chuan, ""Ka kut chaknain ka ti a ni, ka finna nen hian; ka bengvar si a: chi tin, ramrite lah chu ka sawn a, an rote lah chu chhushak a, lalthutphaha thute lah chu mi huai tak tih angin ka hnuk thla ta a:" 
Isaiah10:14 ka kut hian chi tin, hausaknate lah chu sava bu angin a zawng chhuak a; miin sava tui a pui rauhsan hnute an la angin leulung luah zawng zawng hi ka la vek a a ni: thla zap emaw, ka ang emaw, hram emaw reng reng pawh an awm lo,"" a ti vei si a." 
Isaiah10:15 Hreipui hian thl chehna'na a hmangtu chu a uankhum dawn em ni? Thingzaina hian a hruttu chu a hnuaichhiah danw em ni? Talhtumin alektute chu a lek vel zawk ang emaw, tiangin thing ni si lo a lek zawk ang emaw mai hi a ni." 
Isaiah10:16 Chuvangin Lalpa, sipaihote LALPA chuan, a mi thaute zingah chuan cherna a tir ang a; a ropuina hnuaiah chuan mei alh lai mek ang hian mei chhemin a awm ang." 
Isaiah10:17 Tin, Israel-ho entu chu mei atan a ni ang a, an Mi Thianghlim chu mei alh atan ani bawk ang: chu chuan ni khat thilah a hnimhlingneite leh a buarte chu a tikangin a tiboral ang," 
Isaiah10:18 A ram ngaw leh a lei tha hmun ropuina pawh chu, thlarau leh taksa lamin, a tioboral ang: tichuan, chhinchhiahna kengtu a chauh hun lai ang a ni ang." 
Isaiah10:19 A ram ngawa thing la awm chhunte chu naupang ziak tham leka tlem a ni tawh ang. 
Isaiah10:20 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Israel-ho la awm chhunte leh Jakoba chhungte zinga a la damte chuan anmahni thattu chu an ring leh tawh lo ang a; LALPA Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim chu, tihtakzetin an ring tawh zakw ang." 
Isaiah10:21 A la awm chhun, Jakob-ho la awm chhunte chu, Pathian chak tak hnenah chuan an la kir leh ang." 
Isaiah10:22 I mi Israel-ho chu tuifinriat tiau vaivut zatin awm mah se la, a la awm chhunte chauh chu an kir leh dawn si a:" 
Isaiah10:23 rorelna dik tak chuan a tihchhiat vek tur an ni. 
Isaiah10:24 Lalpa, Sipaihote LALPA chuan, tawpna, tawpna thleng ngei tura ruat tlat chu, lei chung zawng lailiah chuan a la siam dawn si a." 
Isaiah10:25 Chuvangin Lalpa, sipaihote LALPA chuan, heti hian a ti, ""Aw ka mi, Zion-a awmte u, Aigupta rama an tih ang khan talhtuma vua che uin a tiang chu in chungah lek mah se la Assuria m chu hlau suh u." 
Isaiah10:26 rei lo te achinah chuan lungnih lohna chu hrikthlakin a awm tawh ang a, ka thinurna pawh anmahni tihborlnain hrikthlakin a awm tawh ang." 
Isaiah10:27 Oreb lungpuia Midian-ho an thah lai ang khan sipaihote LALPA chuan amah bei turin vuakna chu a chawk tho ang a: a tiang chu tuifinriat chung lamah a awm ang a, Aigupta rama a lek ang khan a lek ang." 
Isaiah10:28 Chumi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, aritphurh chu i koki ata lak boin a awm ang a, a nghawngkawl chu i nghawng ata lak boin a awm bawk ang: hriak thih avang chuan nghawngkawl chu tihchiatin a awm tawh ang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah10:29 Aiath khua a thleng ta, Migron khua a kal tlang ta; Mimkas khuaah a bungrua a dah ta;" 
Isaiah10:30 kawnah an liam ta; Geba khuaah an riak ta: Ramah khawho chu an khur an khur ta; Saula Gibeah khawho chu an tlan bo ta. 
Isaiah10:31 Aw Galim khaw fanu! I awin ring takin au rawh; aw Laisah khua! Ngaithla rawh; aw Anathoth, i va khawngaihthlak em!" 
Isaiah10:32 Madmenah khawho tlan boin an awm ta; gebim khuaa awmte chu tlan bo tumin an inhawrkhawm luai luai e. 
Isaiah10:33 vawiin ngei hian Nob khuaah a cham dawn: Zion fanu tlang, Jerusalem mual pawng chu, a kut a thin khum e." 
Isaiah10:34 Ngai teh, Lalpa, sipaihote LALPA chuan, thil rapthlak takin a zarte chu sat thla ang a: sang tak takte chu kihin a awm ang a, a lawr bikte pawh chu rawt hniamin a awm ang.Thirin ramhnuai thing bik takte chu a kit ang a, Lebanin sidar thingte chu mi ropi kihin a tlu dur dur ang." 
Isaiah10:35 Thirin ramhnuai thing bik takte chu a kit ang a, Lebanin sidar thingte chu mi ropi kihin a tlu dur dur ang." 
Isaiah11:1 Jesaia bul atangin chawrno a lo chhuak ang a, a zung atangtea puak chhuak chu a rah ang:" 
Isaiah11:2 tin, LALPA thlarau-finna leh hriat theihna thlarau, remruatna leh chakna thlarau, hriantna leh LALPA tihna thlarau chu - a chungah a fu ang:" 
Isaiah11:3 tichuan a lawmna chu LALPA tihnaah a ni ang: a mita a hmuh angin ro a rel lo vang a, a benga a hriat angin a zilhau hek lo ang:" 
Isaiah11:4 retheite chu fel takin ro a reslak zawk ang a, leia mi thuhnuairawlhte atan chuan thlei bik nei loin a zilhhausak bawk ang: a ka talhtumin lei hi a vua ang a, ahmuia thawin mi suaksualte chu a that ang." 
Isaiah11:5 Tin, felna hi a taihren a ni ang a, rinawmna hi a kawnghren a ni ang." 
Isaiah11:6 Tin, chinghnia chu beram no nen an awm dun tawh ang a, keite chu kel no nen an bawk dun tawh ang; bawng no leh sakeibaknei vanglai leh ran chawmthaute chu an awmho tawh ang a; naupang tein a hruai duah duah ang." 
Isaiah11:7 Tin, sebawng leh savawm an tla ang a; an nott chu an bawk za dial dial tawh ang: tin, sakeibaknei chuan bawngpa angin buhpawl a ei tawh ang." 
Isaiah11:8 Tin, nau hnute hne lai chu rulrial kaw kotlangah a tualchai ang a, nau hnute hnek bang tawh chuan rulmuk tawmkuk kotlangah a kut a nghat ang." 
Isaiah11:9 ka tlang thianghlimah reng reng chuan intihnat a awm tawh lo ang a, intihchhiat a awm tawh hek lo ang: tuite hian tuifinriat a khuh reng angin, leilung hi LALPA hriatnain a khat zo vek dawn a ni." 
Isaiah11:10 Tin, chu mi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Jesaia zung, mi tin chhinchhiahna atan ding chu, amah ngei chu hnam tinn an rawn ang a; a chawlhna hmun chu a ropui ang." 
Isaiah11:11 Tichuan Ephraim-ho itsikna ch a bo tawh ang a, Juda-ho tibuaitute chu tihboralin an awm tawh ang: Ephraim-hoin Juda-ho a itsik tawh lo ang a, Juda-ho pawhin Ephraim-ho chu an tibuai tawh l ang." 
Isaiah11:12 Tichuan anniho chu thlang lamah Philistia-ho kikiah chuan zuk thlawkin an zuk fu ang a; khawchhak fate chu an rawk za ang: Edom leh Mab-ho chungah chuan an kut an thlak ang a: Amona thlahte chuan an thu an awih tawh ang. 
Isaiah11:13 Tin, LALPA chuan Ephraim ho itsikna chu a bo tawh ang a, Juda-ho tibuaitute chu tihboralin an awm tawh ang: Ephraim-hoin Juda ho an itsik tawh lo ang a, Juda -ho pawhin Ephraim-ho chu an tibuai tawh lo ang." 
Isaiah11:14 Tichuan anniho chu thlang lamah Philistia-ho kokiah chuan zuk thlawkin an zuk fu ang a; khawchhak fate chu an rawk za ang: Edom leh Mab-ho chungah chuan an kut an thlak ang a: Amona thlahte chuan an thu an awih tawh ang. 
Isaiah11:15 Tin, LALPA chuan Aigupta tuifinriat tengsawl chu a tichhe vek ang a; Luipui pawh chu a thli lum huam huam chuan a kut a thin khum ang a, luite pasariha siam khawpin a vua ang a, mite chu kephah pawh huh loin a kal kaitir ang.Tichuan, Aigupta ram ata an chhoh nia Israel-ho tana lamlian a lo awm ang kha, a miteho thi bang la awm chhunte tan chuan Assuria ram atangin lamlian a lo awm ang." 
Isaiah11:16 Tichuan, Aigupta ram ata an chhoh nia Israel-ho tana lamlian a lo awm ang kha, a miteho thi bang la awm chhunte tan chuan Assuria ram atangin lamlian a lo awm ang." 
Isaiah12:1 Chu mi niah chuan heti hian i la sawi ang, ""Aw LALPA, lawm thu ka hrilh ang che; ka chungah lo thinur ta mah la, i thinur chu a reh ta a, nangin mi thlamuan ta a nih hi." 
Isaiah12:2 Ngai teh, Pathian chu mi chhandamtu a ni a; ka ring ang a, hlauin ka awm lo vang: LALPA JEHOVA chu ka chakna leh ka hla a ni si a; mi chhandamtu a lo ni ta bawk a,"" tiin." 
Isaiah12:3 Chuvangin chhandamna tuikhur atate chu hlim takin tui in la chawi ang. 
Isaiah12:4 Tin, chu mi niah chuan heti hian in la sawi ang, ""LALPA hnenah chuan lawmthu hril u la, a hming lam u la, a thiltihte chu mi tin zingah hriattir u la, a hming chu chawiawiin a awm tih sawi rawh u." 
Isaiah12:5 LALPA chawimawiin hla sa rawh u; ani chuan thil tha berte chu a lo ti tawh si a; chu chu leilung luah zawng zawngah hian hriatin awm rawh se.Zion-a awmte u, ring takin au u la, au tuar tuar rawh u, Israel-ho Mi thianghlim in zinga rawm chu a ropui si a,"" tiin." 
Isaiah12:6 Zion-a awmte u, ring takin au u la, au tuar tuar rawh u, Israel-ho Mi thianghlim in zinga rawm chu a ropui si a,"" tiin." 
Isaiah13:1 Babulon khaw phur rik Amozaa fdapa Isaian a hmuh chu. 
Isaiah13:2 Mi liahnbo kawngkaahte chuan an luh theihna turin tlang kawlh vulah chuan chhinchhiahna tar chhuak u la, ring takin anni chu au u la, kutin zaizir rawh u." 
Isaiah13:3 Keimah ngeiin ka mi ruatho chu thu ka pe ta, a ni, ka mi chak tak, ka mi induh taka hlimte chu, ka thinur hrithlatu atan ka ko ta." 
Isaiah13:4 Chu! Tlanga mipui au thawm, mipui tam tak thawm ang mai chu! Chu! hnam tin rama mi awm khawmho sa mur mur thawm chu! Sipaihote LALPA chuan ral bei turin Sipaiho a pun hlawm anih chu." 
Isaiah13:5 Anniho, LALPA leh a lungnih lohna hriamhreite chu, ram hla tak ata, kawl kil tawp ret atangin ram zawng zawng hi tichhe turin an lo kal a ni." 
Isaiah13:6 Chiau vak vak rawh u; LALPA ni chu a hnai tawh si a; Engkimtitheia atanga tihchhiatna a lo thleng angin a lo thleng dawn e. 
Isaiah13:7 Chuvangin kut zawng zawng a chak lo ang a; mirhing thinlung tinreng pawh a tuiral ang: 
Isaiah13:8 tin, an hlau vang a; natna leh lungnih lohnate chuan a man hlawm ang a; hmeichhe nau vei ang maiin an na ang: mak intitawnin an awm hlawm ang; an hmelte chu meiahlh hmel ang mai a ni ang." 
Isaiah13:9 Ngai teh, ram titiau tur leh chuta mi sualte chu a chhung ata tiboral turin LALPA ni chu nasa takin thinrimna leh thinurna nasa tak nen, a lo thleng dawn e." 
Isaiah13:10 van arsite leh a chhohreivungte chu an eng an chhuah lo ang a; ni chu a chhuah laia tihthimin a awm ang a, thla pawhin a eng chu a entir dawn tawh lo a ni." 
Isaiah13:11 Tin, khawvel hi an sualna avangin ka hrem ang a, mi suaksualte chu an khawlohna avangin ka hrem bawk ang; tin, mi chapo tawng chaltlai chu ka tireh ang a, mi hlauhawm chapona chu ka tihniam bawk ang." 
Isaiah13:12 Mi hi rangkachak thianghlim ai pawha vang zawkin ka siam ang a, mihring ngei hi Ophir rangkachak thianghlim ai pawha vang zakwin ka siam ang." 
Isaiah13:13 Chutichuan, van khi ka tikhur ang a, sipaihote LALPA thinrim avangin, a thinurna nasa tak niah chuan, lei pawh hi a awmna hmun sawn dawrh khawpa tihnghinin a awm ang." 
Isaiah13:14 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, sakhi um nek ang leh beram tuma khalh khawm loh angin mi tinin mahni chipuite lam theuh an hawi ang a, mi tin mahni ram lamah theuh an tlan bo ang." 
Isaiah13:15 Tupawh an hmh apiang chhunt langin an awm ang a, tupawh an man apiang khandaiha tihtlukin an awm ang." 
Isaiah13:16 An nausente pawh an mithmuhah sawm dep khawpa lei vuakna'na hmanin an awm ang a; an inte chu rawkin a awm ang a, an nupuite chu pawnsual tawkin an awm bawk ang." 
Isaiah13:17 Ngai teh, Media-ho anmahni bei turin ka chawk tho ang a, chungho chuan tangka an ngaihsak lo ang a, rangkachak ah pawh an lawm lo ang." 
Isaiah13:18 An thla ngulte chuan tlangvalte chu a tisawm ang a; mi rila rah khawngaihna reng reng an nei lo ang a; an mit chuan naupangte a zuah lo ang. 
Isaiah13:19 Tin, Babulon, ram tin, ropuina, Kaldai-ho chhuan thil mawi tak chu, Pathianin Sodom leh Gomorra a tihboral lai ang khan a la awm ang." 
Isaiah13:20 Engtikahmah chutah chuan mi an awm tawh lo ang a, chhuan awm chhung zawng zawng chuan a chhungah awm an awm hek lo ang: Arab miten chutah chuan an puan in chu an zar hek lo ang a; beram vengtuten chutah chuan an beram rualte chu an bawhtir hek lo ang." 
Isaiah13:21 Thlalera ram sate chutah chuan an bawk ang a; an inte chu thil nung ngui taktein a khat ang a; sava ngahwngseite chutah chuan an cheng ang a, satharte chutah chan an tualchai tawh zawk ang.Tin, chinghniate chu an kulh bingah chuan an hram ang a, sihalte pawh an lal in nuam takahte chuan an hram bawk ang: tin, a hrem hun tur chu a thleng dawn tawh a, a nite pawh tihseiin a awm lo ang." 
Isaiah13:22 Tin, chinghniate chu an kulh bingah chuan an hram ang a, sihalte pawh an lal in nuam takahte chuan an hram bawk ang: tin, a hrem hun tur chu a thleng dawn tawh a, a nite pawh tihseiin a awm lo ang." 
Isaiah14:1 LALPA chuan Jakob-ho a khawngaih ang a, a khawngaih ang a, Israel-ho chu thlangin anmahni ram ngeiah a la awmtir dawn si a: tin, ram dang mite chuan anmahni an zaw ang a, Jakoba chhungte chu an vuan ang a, Jakoba chhungte chu an vuan tlat ang." 
Isaiah14:2 Tin, mi tin chuan anmahni an hruai ang a, an hmun tur chu an thlen ang: tichuan Israela chhuungte chuan LALPA ramah chuan ani chu bawipaahte leh bawihnuahte an la nei ang a; anmahni sala neite chu salah an la man ang a; anmahni tiduhdahtute chungah chuan ro an la rel ang." 
Isaiah14:3 Tin, i lungngaihna ata te, i buaina ata te, hnathawh hautak ze an thawhtirna che atate LALPA'n a chawlhtir che niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a," 
Isaiah14:4 he tihelna thu h Babulon lal au khumin i la saiw ang, ""Eng tizia nge hnehchhiahtu chu a va reh ta em! Eng tizia nge rangkachak khawpui ch a va reh ta em!" 
Isaiah14:5 LALPA chuan mi suaksual tiang a titliak ta, roreltute lal tiang chu;" 
Isaiah14:6 mi dang chunga rawngra taka inlek a, an tlawm tawhte tiduhdah bang ngai lote," 
Isaiah14:7 Leilung pum pui hi a chawl a, a reh rawih rawih a: hla an sa chhuak phut a." 
Isaiah14:8 A ni, i chung thu avangin farte chu an hlim a, Lebanon tlanga didar thingte nen, ""Tihtlawma i awm achin chu kit thlutu tur reng reng kan hnenah an lo chho ngai ta lo,' tiin." 
Isaiah14:9 Hnuai lam ata Seol chu i lo thleng hmuak tur chein, nangmah avangin a buai mur mur a ni: mitthi, leia puipa zawng zawngte chu, nangmah avangin achawk tho a; hnam tin lal zawng zawng chu an lalthutphah ata a kai thi ta." 
Isaiah14:10 Chung zawng zawng chuan nangmah biain, i hnenah heti chuan nangmah biain, i hnenah heti hian an sawi ang, 'Nang pawh keimahni angin i chak lo e ta elo? Keimahni awm angin i awm ta elo?" 
Isaiah14:11 I ropui bung bungna chu Seol-a hruai thlak a ni ta, i perhkhuang ri bur burte nen: changpat chu i hnuaiah an phah a, englo lungte chuan an khuh ta che a nih hi,' tiin." 
Isaiah14:12 Aw 'varparh,' 'zing lam fapa,' engtizia nge van ata i tlak tak chu le! Hnam tin titlawmtu, engtizia nge lai sah thlaka i awm tak chu le!" 
Isaiah14:13 I rulruah chuan, 'Vanah ka chho ang a, Pathian arsite chung lamah khian ka lalthuphah ka chawi sang ang; tin, inkhawmna tlang, hmar tawp reta awmah chuan, ka thu ang a:" 
Isaiah14:14 chhum aia sang zawkahte khain ka chho ang a; Chungnungbera ang maiin ka awm ang, i tih thin vei nen khan." 
Isaiah14:15 Nimahsela Seol-ah, klhuarkhurum tawp retahte chuan, hruai thlakin i awm dawn si." 
Isaiah14:16 A hmu che apiangin an en ngun ang chia, 'He mi hi maw lei tikhura, ram tin tinghing a," 
Isaiah14:17 khawvel thlaler anga siama, a khaw awmte tiboral a, a salte an in lama kal tura chhuah ngai loa chu?' tiin, i chanchin an la chhut ang." 
Isaiah14:18 hnam tin lal zawng zawng, an zainm mahni in theuhvah ropui takin an muhil a."
