Isaiah14:19 nang erawh chu a zung puak chhuak tenawm tak leh, ral thah, khandaiha chhun tlang, khuarkhuruma lungte zinga chhukho silhfen angin i thlan in atanga hla takah paih chhuahin i awm tak zawk hi; ruang rah beh ang maiin." 
Isaiah14:20 I ram i tihchhiat a, i khua leh i tuite i thah avangin an zingah phumin i awm ve lo ang; thil tha lo titute thlahte hming chu kumkhuain an lam lo ang." 
Isaiah14:21 An thawh a, leilung an neih a, lei chung hi khuaa na tihkhah lohna'n, an pute sualna avangin a fate thah zai rel rawh u,"" tiin." 
Isaiah14:22 Tin, anmahni bei turin ka tho ang, sipaihote LALPA'n a ti, Babulon atanga hming leh, a la awm chhunte leh, fapa leh fapaa fapa chu ka tiboral ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Isaiah14:23 Sakuh tan rovah ka siam bawk ang a, dilahte pawh ka siam ang: tihboralna hmunphiahin ka phiat bawk ang, sipaihote LALPA'n a ti." 
Isaiah14:24 Sipaihote LALPA chuan hetianga sawiin chhia a chham ta, ""Matheilova ka ngaihtuah ang tak hian a lo thleng ang a; ka ruat ang tak hian a awm bawk ang:" 
Isaiah14:25 ka ramah chuan Assuria mi chu ka tichhia ang a, ka tlangahte chuan ka chil nek ang, tih ang hian: chu mi hunah chuan a nghawngkawl bahtir chu anmahni atang chuan a bo tawh ang a, an rit phurhtir chu anmahni koki atang chuan a bo tawh bawk ang." 
Isaiah14:26 Chu chu a ni, lei chung zawng zawnga thu ruat chu ni, chu bawk chu a ni, hnam tinreng chunga kut phar chu ni." 
Isaiah14:27 Sipaihote LALPA chuan aruat tawh si a, tuin nge suhsak ang? A kut chu pharin a awm tawh a, tuin nge lak kirtir ang?"" tiin." 
Isaiah14:28 Lal Ahazaa thih kumah khan ka phur rit hi a lo awm ta. 
Isaiah14:29 Aw Philistia ram pum pui, nangmah vuakna tiang at hlaih tak avangin lawm suh: rul zung atang chuan rulmuk a chhuak dawn si a, a rah chu rul alh thlawk thei a la ni ang." 
Isaiah14:30 Mi rethei fa tirte chu an tla dial dial tawh ang a, mi pachhiate chu him takin an bawk tawh ang: tin, nanga zung erawh chu tamin ka tithi ang a, i ta la awm chhunte chu thahin an awm ang." 
Isaiah14:31 Aw kawngkhar, chiau vak vak rawh; aw khawpui, au rawh; aw Philistia, i pumin, i tuiral zo ta; hmar lam atangin meikhu a lo chhuak si a, an hun ruatahte chuan hnufual reng an awm ngai lo a ni.Philistia hnam palaite chu engtin nge kan chhan ang le? ""LALPA'n Zion chu a din a, a mite zinga retheite chu amahah din a, a mite zinga retheite ch amahah an tlu lut ang,"" tiin a ni ang chu." 
Isaiah14:32 Philistia hnam palaite chu engtin nge kan chhan ang le? LALPA'n Zion chu a din a, a mite zinga retheite chu amahah din a, a mite zinga retheite ch amahah an tlu lut ang,"" tiin a ni ang chu." 
Isaiah15:1 Moab ram phur tir chu, Zan khatah Moab rama Ar khua chu tihchhiatin a awm a, engmah loa siamin a awm ta si a; zan khatah Moab ram Kir khua chu tihchhiatin a awm a, engmah loa siamin a awm ta si a." 
Isaiah15:2 Bajith-ah leh Dobon-ah, hmun sangahte chuan, tap turin a chho ta a: Moab-ho chuan Nebo leh Medeba chu an tah khum vak vak a, an lu zawng zawng a kawlh vek a, khabe hmul tinreng pawh mehin a awm ta vek a." 
Isaiah15:3 An kawtthlerahte chuan saiip puan an veng a: an in chungahte leh an mual zau laiahte chuan mi tin chu nasa taka tapin an chiau vak vak a. 
Isaiah15:4 Tin, Hesbon-ho pawh an au a. Elealeh-ho nen; an aw chu Jahaz in Moab-ho ralthuama inthuamte chu ring takin an au a; an nuna chu an kaw chhungah chuan a khur a." 
Isaiah15:5 Moab-ho avangin ka thinlung chu a au a; an m thate chu Zoar khuaah leh Eglath-selisi-jah-ah an tlan a: Luhith chhovah chuan tap chungin an kal chho a ni; Horonaim kawngah chuan chhiatna auin an au chhuak a ni. 
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim tuite chu tihchhiatin a awm dawn si a: hlobet chu a vuai zo a, hlobet chawrno chu a rawp a, thil hring reng reng ch a awm ta si lo." 
Isaiah15:7 Chuvangin an sum la neih chhunte leh an dah thatte chu tuipuisuthlah Lui ralah chuan an kal bopui ang. 
Isaiah15:8 Au thawm chu Moab ramri velahte chuan a thang si a; a chiau vak vak thawm chu Eglaim khaw lamah a thang a, a chiau vak vak thawm chu Beer-elim khaw lamah a thang a ni.Dimon tuite chu thisenin a bual zo vek si a: Dimon chungah chuan thil nasalehzual ka thlentir dawn si a, Moab-ho zinga tlan chhuakte chungah leh, chu ram ala awm chhunte chungah chuan sakeibaknei ka thlentir ang." 
Isaiah15:9 Dimon tuite chu thisenin a bual zo vek si a: Dimon chungah chuan thil nasalehzual ka thlentir dawn si a, Moab-ho zinga tlan chhuakte chungah leh, chu ram ala awm chhunte chungah chuan sakeibaknei ka thlentir ang." 
Isaiah16:1 Ram roreltu tan beram note chu Sela khua thlaler lama awm atang chuan Zion fanu tlangah chuan thawn rawh u. 
Isaiah16:2 Tichuan, Moab fanute chu sava, a bu ata rau darha thlawk thlawkte angin Arnon lui kaiah an awm dawn nia." 
Isaiah16:3 rem min ruatsak la, ro min relsak rawh; i hlim chu chhun laiah zan angin siam la: hnawh chhuahte chu bihruktir rawh; tlan bo chu mantir suh." 
Isaiah16:4 Moab zinga mi hnawh chhuaha awmte chu i hnenah awm rawh se; an tan tichetu hmel lakah chuan bihrukna hmun ni rawh: hleprutu chu engmah loa siamin a awm ta si a,tihchhiatna a reh ta a, hnehchiahtute chu ram atang hian tihboralin an awm ta." 
Isaiah16:5 Tichuan lalthutphah khawngaihnaa tihnghehin a awm ang a, chumi chungah, Davida puan inah chuan, mi pakhat, rorelin, rorelna fel zawngin, thil fel rang taka ti nghalin, tihtakzetin a thu ang." 
Isaiah16:6 Moab-ho chapona thu, an chapo em em ani tih kan lo hria a; an tawng chaltlaizia leh, an chapoizia leh, an thinurzia thu chu; an uannate chu engmah a ni lo." 
Isaiah16:7 Chuvangin Moab-ho chu Moab ho chungah an chiau vak vak ang: Kir-ha-reseth grep rep hlawm chu lungchhe vankaiin in la tah chhan ang. 
Isaiah16:8 Hesbon lote chu a chau zo ta si a, Sibmah grep hrui nen: hnam tin lalte chuan a kung tha mite chu an titliang pheng phung a; Jazer khaw thleng thlengin a zam hlawm a, thlalerah a za lut a; a pengte chu a zma darh sung a, tuipui chu a zam kai ta a." 
Isaiah16:9 Chuvangin Sibmah grep hrui chu Jazer tahin ka tah ang a: aw Hesbon leh Elealeh, ka mittuin ka leih ang che: i nipui rahte chungah leh i buh seng chungah chuan inbei au thawm chu a tla ta si a." 
Isaiah16:10 Lawmna chu laksakin a awm ta, lo tha tak atangte chuan hlimna chu laksakin a awm ta bawk a; grep huanahte chuan hla sak reng reng a awm tawh lo ang a, thawm hlimawn reng reng a awm tawh hek lo ang; grep sawrna khurahte chuan rap sawrtu reng rengin uain an rap chhuak tawh lo ang; grep seng au chu ka tireh ta." 
Isaiah16:11 chuvangin ka rilte hi Moab khawngaih avangin tingtang angin a ri a, ka kawchhung chu Kir-heres khawngaih avangin tingtang angin a ribawk a." 
Isaiah16:12 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Moab chu a inlan hunah, hmun sangah intihaha, tanwgtai tura a hmun thianghlim a alo kal hunah chuan a hlawhtling lo ang." 
Isaiah16:13 Chung chu Moab chungchang thu LALPA'n tun hma lama a sawi kha a ni.Tunah erawh chuan LALPA'n, ""Inhlawhfa kum chhiar kum thum chhungin Moab ropuina chu, a mipui tam takte chawpin, hmuhsitawma awmtirin a awm ang a; a la awm chhunte chu tlemte tak meuh sawi tham loh an ni ang,"" tiin, a sawi ta." 
Isaiah16:14 Tunah erawh chuan LALPA'n, ""Inhlawhfa kum chhiar kum thum chhungin Moab ropuina chu, a mipui tam takte chawpin, hmuhsitawma awmtirin a awm ang a; a la awm chhunte chu tlemte tak meuh sawi tham loh an ni ang,"" tiin, a sawi ta." 
Isaiah17:1 Damaska khaw phur tir chu. Ngai teh, Damaska chu khawpui ni tawh lo turin lak bo a ni ta, tichuan in chim khawm mai a ni tawh ang." 
Isaiah17:2 Aroer khuate chu tlansanin a awm ta; beram rualte awmna tur a ni mai ang, chung chu an bawk ang aa, tuma'n an tihlau lo ang." 
Isaiah17:3 Ephraim lakah kulhpui chu a bo ang a, Damaska lakah ram chu a bo ang, Suria rama la awm chhunte pawh an bo ang, Israela thlahte ropuina ang lekin an awm ang, sipaihote LALPA'n a ti a." 
Isaiah17:4 Nimahsela, oliv thing vuak hnua ziding sang ber chhipah rah pahnih thum emaw, thing rah tak zar sei berah te pali panga ema a awm thin ang hian chutah chuan hmaih chhar tur a la awm ang, LALPA, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim chu a thlir tawh ang." 
Isaiah17:5 Tichuan buh sengtupan buh a laka, a vuite chu kuta a help ang mai hi a ang a; a ni, Rephaim ruamah miin buh vui hmaihte chu an char ang mai hi a ni ang." 
Isaiah17:6 Nimahsela, oliv thing vuak hnua a ziding sang ber chhipah rah pahnih pathum emaw, thing rah tak zar sei berah te pali panga emaw a awm thin ang hian chutah chuan hmaih chhar tur a la awm ang, LALPA, Israel-ho Pathian chuan a ti a." 
Isaiah17:7 Chu mi niah chuan miin an siamtu lam an en tawh ang a, an mitte chu Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim chuan a thlir tawh ang." 
Isaiah17:8 maicham, anmahni kut chhuak lamte chu, an en tawh lo ang a, anmahni kuta siam, Aserte emaw, ni lemte emaw an zah tawh hek lo ang." 
Isaiah17:9 Chu mi niah chuan an khaw nghet takte chu ngawbing leh tlang chipa hmun tlansan hnu, Israela thlahte hmaa an tlansan hnu ang kha, a ni ang: tichuan hmun tihtiau ani tah ang." 
Isaiah17:10 Pathian i chhandamtu i theihnghilh a, i chakna lungpui chu i hre reng si lo; chuvangin kung mawi tak takte i phun thin a, a chhungah chuan tang danglamte i vut bur fur thin a:" 
Isaiah17:11 i phun niin i ping vel thin a, zingah chuan i thil chi chu i tipar thin: nimahsela rah lawh chu lungngaihna leh natna nasa tak niah chuan a bo thin." 
Isaiah17:12 A, mipui tam tak ri dur dur, tuifinriatte ri dur dur anga ri dur durte leh, hna tin, ri hum hum, tui nasa takte ri hum hu anga ri hum humte chu aw!" 
Isaiah17:13 hnam tin chu tui tam tak ri hum hum angin an ri hum hum ang: nimahwsela ani chuan a zilhhau vang a, tichuan hla takah an tlan bo ang a, tlanga buhsi thli len ang leh vaivut thlipui len vir mup mup anga umin an awm ang.Tlai lamah chuan, ngai teh, thil rapthlek tak a awm a; tin, khawvar hmain an awm ta lo. Chu chu rallaka min laksaktute chan ani a, mi ruksaktute pual a ni bawk a." 
Isaiah17:14 Tlai lamah chuan, ngai teh, thil rapthlek tak a awm a; tin, khawvar hmain an awm ta lo. Chu chu rallaka min laksaktute chan ani a, mi ruksaktute pual a ni bawk a." 
Isaiah18:1 A, thla zap ri hum hum ram, Ethiopia rama luite rala awm," 
Isaiah18:2 tuipuia, tui chunga luang lawngahte palaiho tirtu chu! Zualko chak takte u, hnam sang thler thlawrh mam tak hnenah, an chhuah tan achin tun thleng mi hlauhawm takte hnenah chuan, kal rawh u; chu hnam chuan ram an sem thin a, an rapthlu bawk thin, an ram chu luite chuan a sem darh a ni." 
Isaiah18:3 Khawvela awm zawng zawng leh leilung luahte u; tlangahte chhinchhiahna an tar chhuah hunah en rawh u: tawtawrawt an ham hunah ngaithla rawh u. 
Isaiah18:4 LALPA'n ka hnenah heti hian a saiw a ni, ""Ka awm hle hle ang a, ka awmnaah hian ka thlir reng ang; ni sat laia khaw lum thiang vel vul ang leh buh seng khaw lum laia daifim chhum ang hian, tiin." 
Isaiah18:5 Grep lawh hun hmaa, a par a rem a, a par chu grep puama a lo cha hunah chuan, a peng te te chu theikung ahchhumna chemtein a ait chhum dawn si a, a peng zam darhte chu a lo boin a sat chhum bawk ang." 
Isaiah18:6 Chung chu tlanga sava kohamte tan leh, leia sate tan chuan hnutchhiahin an awm hlawm ang: tichuan sava kohamte chuan anni chu nipui chhungin an ei ang a, leia sa zawng zawng chuan thlasik chhungin an ei ang.Chu mi hunah chuan, sipaihote LALPA hming awmna hmun, Zion tlangah chuan, sipaihote LALPA hnena pek atan mi sang thlerh thlawrh mam takte hnen ata, an chhuah tan achin tun thlenga mi hlauhawm takte hnen ata chu, lawmman an rawn sin ang; chu hnam chuan ram an sem thin a, an rapthlu bawk thin, an ram chu luite chuan a sem darh a ni." 
Isaiah18:7 Chu mi hunah chuan, sipaihote LALPA hming awmna hmun, Zion tlangah chuan, sipaihote LALPA hnena pek atan mi sang thlerh thlawrh mam takte hnen ata, an chhuah tan achin tun thlenga mi hlauhawm takte hnen ata chu, lawmman an rawn sin ang; chu hnam chuan ram an sem thin a, an rapthlu bawk thin, an ram chu luite chuan a sem darh a ni." 
Isaiah19:1 Aigupta ram phur rit chu.Ngai teh, LALPA chu chhum chak tak chunga chuangin Aigupta ram a lo thleng ta e: Aigupta ram milemte chu a hmaah chuan an khur zawih zawih ang a, Aigupta-ho thinlung chu an kawchhungah a tuiral mai ang." 
Isaiah19:2 Tin, Aigupta mite chu Aigupta mite vek bei turin ka chawk tho ang: tichuan, mi tinin mahni unau beiin, mi tinin mahni thenawm beiin, an inkap ang; khua leh khua an inbei ang a, ram leh ram an inbei ang." 
Isaiah19:3 Tichuan, Aigupta-ho thlarau chu an kawchhungah chuan engmah loa siamin a awm ang a; an remruat chu ka tichhia ang: tichuan, milemte leh, aikaihthiamte leh, ramhuai aienthiam zalwte leh, dawithiamte chu an rawn ang." 
Isaiah19:4 Tin, Aigupta mite chu hotu nunchhe tak kutah chuan ka hlan ang a; tichuan lal kawlh takin an chungah ro a rel tawh ang. Lalpa, sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Isaiah19:5 Tin, tuipui tuite chu a kang ang a, lui chu a luang boin a lo kangchat tawh ang." 
Isaiah19:6 Luite ch a rimchia ang a; Aigupta ram tuiluangte chu a kam telh telh ang a, a kangchat mai ang: phairuangte leh tui hnimte chu a vuai zo ang." 
Isaiah19:7 Nile lui kianga, Nile lui kam ngeia, ran tlatna phulte leh, Nile lui kianga thil chin zawng zawngte chu a lo ro ang a, len boin a awm ang a, a awm tawh lo ang." 
Isaiah19:8 sangha mantute pawh chu an tap ang a, Nile luia nghakawi khai thinte zawng zawngte chu an awm an inchum chau tawh ang." 
Isaiah19:9 Chu lo pawh chu ziza zai sin dke mite leh puan ngo tah mite chu an mualpho ang. 
Isaiah19:10 Tin, a lung bante chu tihsawmin a awm ang a, inhlawhfa thin zawng zawngte chu an rilrui an lungngai ang." 
Isaiah19:11 Zoan khuaa mi liante chu an a ngawt mai: Pharaoa remruattu fing berte remruat chu sa remruat ang mai a lo ni ta; Pharaoa hnenah, ""Mi fing fapa, hmasang lalho fapa ka ni,"" engtiziaa ti thin nge in nih?" 
Isaiah19:12 Khawiah nge i mi fingte chu le? Anni chuan hrilh nghal che rawh se; Aigupta ram chung thil thleng tur sipaihote LALPA ruatte chu, hre rawh se." 
Isaiah19:13 Zoan khua ami liante chu mi a an lo ni ta a, Noph khuaa mi liante chu bumin an awm ta; Aigupta hnamho kila lungte chuan Aigupta-ho chu an vah botir ta." 
Isaiah19:14 LALPA chuan Aigupta-ho zingah luhlulna thlarau a awmtir ta: tichuan zu rui mi chu a luakah a pai thlawk thlawk ang hian Aigupta-ho chu an hnathawh tinrengah a kal kawitir ta. 
Isaiah19:15 Aigupta-ho tan luin emaw, meiin emaw, tum kauin emaw, phungladinin emaw thawhsak theih a awm tawh hek lo ang." 
Isaiah19:16 Chu mi niah chuan Aigupta-ho chu hmeichheho ang an ni ang a: sipaihote LALPA kut thin chu an chunga a thin avangin an khurin an hlau ang. 
Isaiah19:17 Juda rama awmho chu Aigupta-ho tan chuan rapthlak tak an lo ni tawh ang a, an hming an lamna apiangte chuan an hlau vang, an chunga thleng tur sipaihote LALPA thu ruat avang chuan." 
Isaiah19:18 Chu mi niah chuan Kanaan-ho tawnga tawng leh,sipaihote LALPA hnenah chhechhama thu tiam thinte chu, Aigupta ram chhungah khaw panga a awm ang a; pakhat chu Boralna Khua an ti ang." 
Isaiah19:19 Chu mi niah chuan Aigupta ram laiah chuan LALPA tan maicham a awm ang a, a ramriah chuan LALPA tan lungphun a awm ang." 
Isaiah19:20 Chu chu Aigupta ram a sipaihote LALPA tan chuan chhinchhiahna leh hriatna a ni ang: hnehchhiahtute avangin LALPA an la au dawn si a, tichuan anin chhandamtu leh humhimtu a tir ang a, ani chuan anniho chu a chhan chhuak ang." 
Isaiah19:21 Tichuan LALPA chu Aigupta mite chuan chu mi niah chuan LALPA chu an hre tawh ang;a ni, inthawina leh thil pekin chibai an buk ang a, LALPA hnenah chuan thu an tiam ang a, an hlen bawk ang." 
Isaiah19:22 Tin, LALPA chuan Aigupta-ho chu a vua ang; a vua ang a, a tidam bawk ang; tichuan LALPA hnenah an kir leh ang a, ani chu anmahni ngen thlukin a awm ang a, anmahni a tidam ang." 
Isaiah19:23 Chumi niah chuan Aigupta ram atangin Assuria ram thlengin lamlian a awm ang a; tichuan Assuria mite chu Aigupta ramah an kal ang a, Aigupta mite chu Assuria ramah an kal bawk ang; Aigupta mite chuan Assuria mite nen Pathian chibai an buk tlang tawh ang." 
Isaiah19:24 Chumi niah chuan Israel-ho chu Aigupta-ho leh Assuria-ho pathumtu an n ni ang a, lei lailiah hian malsawmna an ni ang:sipaihote LALPA chuan, ""Ka mi Aigupta-hpte leh ka kut chhuak Assuria-hote leh ka rochan Israel-hote chu malsawmin awm rawh se,"" tiin, mal a sawm si a." 
Isaiah19:25 sipaihote LALPA chuan, ""Ka mi Aigupta-hpte leh ka kut chhuak Assuria-hote leh ka rochan Israel-hote chu malsawmin awm rawh se,"" tiin, mal a sawm si a." 
Isaiah20:1 Assuria lal Sargona tithin Tartana Asdod khuaa a lo kal a, Asdod khua a bei a, a lak kum khan;" 
Isaiah20:2 chumi lai chuan LALPA'n Amozaa fapa Isaia ka chuan, ""Kal la, i kawnga saiip puan kha phel la, i kea i pheikhawk kha dah rawh,"" tin, a sawi a. Tichuan chutiang chuan a ti a, saruak leh pheikhawk bun loin a kal a kal ta a." 
Isaiah20:3 Tin, LALPA chuan, ""Ka chhiahhlawh Isaia hi Aigupta-ho chungah leh Thiopia-ho chungah chhinchhiahna leh thilmak atan kum thum chhunga saruak leh pheikhawk bun loa a kal ang hian," 
Isaiah20:4 Assuria lal chuan Aigupta-ho mante leh Ethiopia-ho salte chu, apui apangin, saruak leh pheikhawk bun lo leh mawng langin Aigupta-ho mualphona turin a hruai bo ang." 
Isaiah20:5 Tichuan an beisei ber Ethiopia-ho leh an ropuina ber Aigupta-ho avang chuan mangang tak leh mualpho takin an awm tawh ang.Tichuan, chu mi niah chuan he tuifinriat kama mi hian, 'Ngai teh, kan beisei ber, Assuria lal laka min chhanhim tura min puitu atana kan tlanna chu, heti a ni ta si a: keini hi engtin nge ka tlan chauh ang?' an la ti ang,"" a ti." 
Isaiah20:6 Tichuan, chu mi niah chuan he tuifinriat kama mi hian, 'Ngai teh, kan beisei ber, Assuria lal laka min chhanhim tura min puitu atana kan tlanna chu, heti a ni ta si a: keini hi engtin nge ka tlan chauh ang?' an la ti ang,"" a ti." 
Isaiah21:1 Tuipui thlaler phur rit chu. Chhim rama thawngaleivir a kal tlang angin thlaler atangin, ram hlauhawm tak atang chuan, a lo kal e." 
Isaiah21:2 inlarna khirhkhan tak ka hnenah hriattir a ni tawh; vervek taka titu chuan vervek takin a ti a, rawktu chuan a rawk a. Aw Elam-ho, kal chho rawh u; aw Media-ho hual rawh u; an rumna zawng zawng chu ka tireh vek tawh e." 
Isaiah21:3 Chuvangin ka kawngte hi natna nasa takin a khat a, hmeichhe nau vei natna anga natnain mi man ta: benga hre thei anga natnain mi man ta: benga hre thei lo khawpin na ka tuar a, khaw hmu thei lo khawpin ka mangang a." 
Isaiah21:4 ka thinlung hi a thaw hlawp hlawp a, thil rapthlak takin mi tihlau va: tlai nem ka nghahhlelh thin kha ka tan khurhnaah a chang ta." 
Isaiah21:5 Dawhkan chu an buatsaih a, ralvengtu chu an ventir a, an ei a, an in a: mi lainate u, tho u la, phaw kha hriak hnawih rawh u." 
Isaiah21:6 Lalpa chuan ka hnenah heti hian a sawi a ni, ""kal la, ralvengtu ventir rawh; ani chuan a thil hmuh chu sawi rawh se:" 
Isaiah21:7 tin, sipai pawl te, sakawr chung chuan, a kawp zela kal te, sabengtung pawl te, sanghawngsei pawlte a hmuh hunah chuan ngun takin a ngaithla kiau vang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah21:8 Tin, ani chu sakeibaknei angina au a; ""Aw LALPA, chhunah chuan ralven buk chungah hian ka ding fo a, zankhua khuain ka vennaah hian mi awmtir fo a:" 
Isaiah21:9 ngai teh, hetah hian mihring paw, sakawr chung chuang, a kawp zela kal an lo kal e,"" tiin. Tin, amah vek chuan, ""Babulon khua chu a tlawm ta, a tlawm ta; an pathianho milem siam chawpte zawng zawng chu leiah tihkeh sawmin a awm ta,"" tiin, a chhang a." 
Isaiah21:10 Aw ka buh vuaksa, ka hruiha buh: sipaihote LALPA, Israel-ho Pathian laka ka hriat chu ka hrih che u a nih hi." 
Isaiah21:11 Dumah phur tir chu. Miin Seir tlang atangin mi au a, ""Ramvengtu, zan hi engti nge ni tawh? Ralvengtu zan hi engti nge ni tawh?"" tiin." 
Isaiah21:12 Ralvengtu chuan, ""Zing a lo ni dawn ta e, zan pawh; in zawh duh chuan zawt rawh u: hawi leh u la, lo kal rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah21:13 Arabia ram chunga phur rit chu. Aw Dedan-ho khualzin pawl tinte u, Arabia rama ramhnuaiah in riak ang." 
Isaiah21:14 Tuihal hnenah chuan tui an rawn la a, tema rama awmte chuan an chawin tlan bote chu an hmuak a." 
Isaiah21:15 Khandaihte lakah, khandaih phawi sa lakah leh, thal ngun khawih sa lakah leh indona nasa tak lak ata tlan bo an ni si a." 
Isaiah21:16 LALPA chuan heti hian ka hnenah a sawi si a, ""Inhlawhfa kum chhiar kum khat chhungin Kedar-ho ropuina zawng zawng chu a bo zo ang a,thal kap mi, Kedara thlahte zinga mi chak tak la awm chhun chu, tlem te an ni ang: LALPA, Israel-ho Pathian chuan, chu chu a sawi tawh si a,"" tiin." 
Isaiah21:17 thal kap mi, Kedara thlahte zinga mi chak tak la awm chhun chu, tlem te an ni ang: LALPA, Israel-ho Pathian chuan, chu chu a sawi tawh si a,"" tiin." 
Isaiah22:1 Inlarna ruam phur rit chu. Eng in ti nge ni le, in chungahte in lawn vek ni?" 
Isaiah22:2 Aw au thawma khat, khawpui sa mur mur, khaw hlim tak, i chhunga an thahte chu khandaiha thah chhunga an thahte chu khandaiah thah an ni lo a, inkahnaa thi an ni hek lo." 
Isaiah22:3 I roreltu zawng zawng chu an tlan bo za a, thal kap mite phuarin an awm a: i ta an hmuh zawng zawng chu phuar khawmin an awm a, hla tak atanga lo tlan bote chu. Chuvangin kei chuan, ""Min en loin lehlam en rawh u, ka tap vak vak dawn e; ka miteho fanu rallaka an lak thu-ah chuan mi hnem duh harsa suh u"" ka ti a." 
Isaiah22:4 inlarna ruamah hian buaina te, manganna te, rah behna te, Lalpa sipai-hote LALPA hnen ata a lo thleng a. Kulh bang tihchim a ni a, tlangahte mangangin an au a." 
Isaiah22:5 Tichuan, Elam-ho chuan thal bawm an keng a, mihring huanna talailirte leh sakawr chung chuang mite nen: Kir-ho chuan phaw tuamna chu an phelh a." 
Isaiah22:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, i ruam tha berte chu tawlailirtein a khat a a, sakawr chung chuang mite chu kulh kawngkhar bulah an tlim hmui a." 
Isaiah22:7 Tin, Juda-ho khuhna chu a la bo a; tichuan chu mi niah chuan ngawpu ina ralthuamna chu in en ta a." 
Isaiah22:8 Davida khaw kulhpui chhe laite in en bawk a, a tam tih in hria a: tin, dil thlangta zawk tuite chu in luan khawmtir a." 
Isaiah22:9 Tin Jerusalem inte in chhiar a, kulhpui bang siam thatna'n inte chu in thiat a." 
Isaiah22:10 Dil hlui tui awmna turin kulhpui pahnih karah chuan ti tlinkhawmna in siam a; nimahsela chung titu lam chu in en si lo a, hmasanga lo siamtu chu in ngaihsak hek lo." 
Isaiah22:11 Chumi niah chuan Lalpa, sipaihote LALPA chuan, tap tur leh awm inchum tur leh lu tikawlh tur leh saiip puan veng turin a ko va:" 
Isaiah22:12 nimahsela, ngai the, hlimna leh lawmna te, bawng talhna leh beram talhna te, sa eina leh uain inna te a am ta zawk a, ""I eiin i in ang u, naktukah chuan kan thi dawn si a,"" an ti a." 
Isaiah22:13 Tichuan sipaihote LALPA chu ka bengah a inhriattir a, ""Mathei loin he sualna hi in thih hma loh zawng in lakah tlenfai ani tawh lo ang, Lalpa, sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti,"" tiin." 
Isaiah22:14 Lalpa, sipaihote LALPA chuan, heti hian a ti, ""Kal la, he sum enkawltu tehchai hnenah hian, Sebnaa, lal in chunga hotua awm hnen ngeiah chuan, kal rah." 
Isaiah22:15 Tin, a hnenah heti hian sawi rawh, 'Hetah hian eng nge i tih? Hetah hian tute nge i neih a, thlan hetah i ker kuak tehchai ni? Ama tan sang taka thlan a ker kuak a, ama tan lungpuia awmna a siam tehchai hi!" 
Isaiah22:16 Ngai teh, LALPA chuan mi chakin a paih angin a paihin apaih vak ang che; a ni, a funin a fun tlat ang che." 
Isaiah22:17 Ani chuan matheiloin bawl hlum angin a tivir ang chia, ram zau takah a vawrh lut ang che; chutah chuan i thi ang a, chutah bawk chuan, nang, mahni lal in chhung timualphotupa, i ropuina tawlailirte chu a awm ang." 
Isaiah22:18 I hnathawhna ata a hnawt chhuak ang chia, ani chuan i hotu nihna ata chu a hnuk thla ang che." 
Isaiah22:19 Tin, chu mi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, ka chhiahhlawh Eliakima,Hilkia fapa chu, ka ko ang a:" 
Isaiah22:20 ani chu i kawrfual hi ka haktir ang a, i kawnghren hian ka tichak ang a, i rorelna hi a kutah ka kawltir ang: tichan ani chu Jerusalema awmte tan leh Juda chhungte tan pi a ni ang." 
Isaiah22:21 Tin, Davida chhungte chabi chu a kokiah ka dah ang a; ani chuan a hawng ang a, tuma'n an khar lo ang; a khar ang a, tuma'n an hawng lo ang." 
Isaiah22:22 Tin, ani chu, klhna hi hmun nghet taka an kilh tlat ngin, ka tinghet tlat ang a; tichuan ani chu a pa chhungte tan lalthutphah ropi tak atan a ni ang." 
Isaiah22:23 Tin, amahah chuan a pa chhungte ropuina zawng zawng chu an la bang vek ang, a fate leh a thlahte bungbelte tinreng, berhbu bungbel atanga tui dahna bungbel zawng zawng thlengin.Chu mi niah chuan, kilhna, hmun nghet taka kilh tlata awm chuan a la dawl lo vang: sah thlaka awmin, a tla tawh ang a, a chunga thil rit awm chu tihboralin a awm tawh ang; LALPA'n chu chu a sawi tawh si, sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti,"" tiin." 
Isaiah22:24 Chu mi niah chuan, kilhna, hmun nghet taka kilh tlata awm chuan a la dawl lo vang: sah thlaka awmin, a tla tawh ang a, a chunga thil rit awm chu tihboralin a awm tawh ang; LALPA'n chu chu a sawi tawh si, sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti,"" tiin." 
Isaiah23:1 Tura khaw phur rit chu. Tarsis lawng liante u, chiau vak vak rawh u; in reng reng awm lo khawpa tura chu tihchhiata a awm tak hi; chu chu Kupra ram atangin in lo hira a." 
Isaiah23:2 Tuipui kama chengte u, ngawi rawh u, Sidon khaw sumdawngte u," 
Isaiah23:3 tuipui chunga kalin Aigupta ram Nile lui buh in chaw a, ram tinah in hralh a, in help chu in sum hnar ber a ni." 
Isaiah23:4 Aw Zidon, zak rawhL tuifinriat, tuifinriat kulhpui chuan, thu a sawi ta si a, ""Nau ka vei ngai lo a, ka hring ngai hek lo a, nula pawh ka tiseilian ngai hek lo,"" tiin." 
Isaiah23:5 Thuthang chu Aigupta ram a thlen hun chuan tura thuthang chu nasa takin an vei ang. 
Isaiah23:6 Tarsis-ah va kai u la; thliarkara awmte u, chiau vak vak rawh u." 
Isaiah23:7 Hei hi maw in khaw hlim tak, a hlunzia murakeka mi tawh, a kein hla taka awm tura a hruai thina chu?" 
Isaiah23:8 Lallukhum khumtirtu khua tura chungah hian tuin nge hei hi thleng turin ruat? Chuta sumdawngtute chu mi liante an ni a, chuta sumdawng mite chu leia mi zahawmte an ni si a." 
Isaiah23:9 Sipaihote LALPA chuan chapote ropuina tih tlawm leh khawvel mi zahawmte tihmualpho a tum tlat a ni. 
Isaiah23:10 Aw Tarsis fanu, Nile lui angin i ramah chuan luang liam rawh; i kawnghrenna reng reng a tawm tawh loh hi." 
Isaiah23:11 Tuifinriat chungah a kut a phar a, ramte chu a tinghing a: LALPA chuan Kanaan ram chungchang thu-ah thu a pe a, a kulhbingte tichhe turin." 
Isaiah23:12 Tin, anni chuan, ""Aw Zidon fanu nula, mi hnehchhiah, i hlim leh tawh lo ang: tho la, Kitim ramah kai rawh; chutah pawh chuan chawlhna reng reng i hmu chuang lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah23:13 En teh, Kaldai-ho ram hi; he'ng mite hi an awm tawh lo: Assuria mi chuan thlalera ram sate tan a ruat tawh a ni: an in sangte chu an sa a, chuta lal inte chu an tiboral a, inchhiaah a siam ta." 
Isaiah23:14 Tarsis lawng liante u, chiau vak vak rawh u: in kulhbing chu tihchhiatin a awm tak hi." 
Isaiah23:15 Tin, chu mi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, tura khua chu, lal pakhat kum chhiara, kum sawmsarih chhung chu theihnghilhin a awm ang: kum sawmsarih ral hnuah chuan nawhchizuar hlaa an sawi angin tura khaw chungah chuan a la thlang ang." 
Isaiah23:16 nang nawhchizuar, mite theihnghilh tawh hnu, tingang la la, tual fang rawh; tingrang kai la, hla tam tak sa rawh, hriata i awm leh theihna turin." 
Isaiah23:17 Tin, kum sawmsarih a ral hnu chuan LALPA chuan tura khua chu a tlawh ang a, a sumdawnna a chhunzawm leh ang; khawvel ram tinah a inzuar leh ang.Tin, a sum deh chhuah leh a hlawh chu LALPA hmaa awmte tan a ni dawn si a, hnianghnara an eiah leh, silhfen ropui tak an neih theihna'n." 
Isaiah23:18 Tin, a sum deh chhuah leh a hlawh chu LALPA hmaa awmte tan a ni dawn si a, hnianghnara an eiah leh, silhfen ropui tak an neih theihna'n." 
Isaiah24:1 Ngai teh, LALPA chuan lei hi a tiruakin, a tiram dawn a, a khaikhup ang a, a awmate chu a tidarh dawn." 
Isaiah24:2 Tin, vantlang chunga tih angin, puithiam chungah pawh tih a ni ang; bawihpa chunga a awm angin, a pu chungah pawh a aw ang; bawihnu chunga awm angin, a pi chungah pawh a awm ang; leitu chunga a awm angin, hralhtu chungah pawh a awm ang; puktirtu chunga a awm angin, puktu chungah pawh a awm ang; a pung uma puktirtu chunga a awm angin, a hnena a pung petu chungah pawh a awm ang." 
Isaiah24:3 Lei hi tihruah fai kelh leh tihchhiat fai kelhin a awm ang; chu thu chu LALPA'n a sawi tawh si a. 
Isaiah24:4 lei hi a tapin a chuai e, khawvel hi a chauin a chuai e, leia mi chungnungte hnuaiah chuan a chau ve." 
Isaiah24:5 Lei hi a awmnate hnuaiah chuan a bawlhhlawh zo ta; dante chu an bawhchhiat a, thuruat chu an tihdanglam a, kumkhaw thuthlung chu an bawhchhiat avangin." 
Isaiah24:6 chuvangin anchhe lawhnain lei hi a ei zo a, a awmate chu thiam loh chantirin an awm ta: chuvangin leia awmte chu an kang hlum a, mi tlem te chauh an la awm." 
Isaiah24:7 Uain thar chu a tap e, grep hrui chu a chau ve, thinlunga hlim zawng zawngte chu an rum e." 
Isaiah24:8 Khuangtete hlimna chu a reh e, lawm taka awmte thawm chu a tawp e, tingtang hlim ri chu a reh e." 
Isaiah24:9 Hla sa chungin uain an in lo ang; zu chu a intute tan kha tak a ni ang. 
Isaiah24:10 Buaina khawpui chu tihchimin a awm ta: tumah reng reng an luh lohna'n in tin, kharin a awm ta." 
Isaiah24:11 Uain avangin kawtthlerahte chuan tap thawm a awm a; hlimna zawng zawng tihthimin a awm a, he ram hlimna hi a bo ta." 
Isaiah24:12 Khawpuiah chuan tiauna hnutchhiahin a awm a, a kulh kawngkhar chu vuak chhiatin a awm ta." 
Isaiah24:13 Lei lailia mi tin zingah hetiang hian a la awm dawn si a, oliv thing vuak hnua rah a la awm thin ang leh, grep lawh hnua grep hmaih lawh tur a la awm thin ang mai hian." 
Isaiah24:14 chungte chuan an aw an chhuah ang a, an au vang; LALPA ropuina avangin tuifinriat atangin ring takin an au ve." 
Isaiah24:15 Chumi avang chuan LALPA chu khaw chhak lamah chawimawi rawh u, LALPA, Israel ho Pathian hing ngei chu, tuifinriatkam ruamahte chuan chawimawi rawh u." 
Isaiah24:16 Kawlkil tawpa hla sakte kan hria, ""Mi flte hnenah ropuina awm rawh se"" tih hla hi. Nimahsela, kei chuan, ""Ka cher tawlh tawlh a, ka cher tawlh talwh a, ka chung a pik e! vervek taka titute chuan vervek takin an ti a;a ni, vervek taka titute chuan vervek tak takin an ti,"" ka ti a." 
Isaiah24:17 Aw leia awm, hlauhawmna te, khuarkhurum te, thangte chu i chungah a awm e." 
Isaiah24:18 Tichuan heti hi a ni ang a, hlauhawm thawm atanga tlana chu, khuarkhurumah a tla ang a; khuarkhurum chhung ata chhuak chhova chu, thangah a awk ang: chung lama tukverhte chu hawnin a awm si a, leilung nghahchhante chu a nghing bawk a ni." 
Isaiah24:19 Lei hi a keh chhe vek a, lei hi tihralin a awm zo a, lei hi nasa takin a nghing a." 
Isaiah24:20 Lei hi zu rui mi angin a pai hlawk hlawk ang a, bawkte sawi angin a sawi luai luai ang; a bawhchhiatna chu a chungah rit takin a awm ang a, tichuan a tlu ang a, a tho leh tawh lo ang." 
Isaiah24:21 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA chuan chung lama mi chungnunghopawl lian tak chu a hrem ang, leia lei lalte nen." 
Isaiah24:22 Tin, mi tangho khuarkhuruma hruai khawma an awm angin chungho chu hruai khawmin an awm ang a, tan inah khungin an awm ang a, ni rei tak hnuah chuan hremin an awm ang.Chumi hunah chuan thla khi zak takin a awm ang a, ni khi mualpho takin a awm ang; sipaihoi-te LALPA chu Zion tlang leh, Jerusalem khuaah leh, a upaho hmaah chuan, ropui takin lalah a awm dawn si a." 
Isaiah24:23 Chumi hunah chuan thla khi zak takin a awm ang a, ni khi mualpho takin a awm ang; sipaihoi-te LALPA chu Zion tlang leh, Jerusalem khuaah leh, a upaho hmaah chuan, ropui takin lalah a awm dawn si a." 
Isaiah25:1 Aw LALPA, nang chu ka Pathian i ni a; ka chawimawi ang chia, i hming ka fak ang; thil mak tak, hmasanga remruatte chu, rinawm tak thutakin i ti si a." 
Isaiah25:2 Khawpui pawh lei pawngah i chantir a; khua kulhpui nei pawh khaw chhiaah i chantir a; ramdang mite lal in pawh khua loah i chantir si a. Engtikah mah sakin a awm leh tawh lo ang. 
Isaiah25:3 Chuvangin mi chak takte chuan an chawimawi ang chia, hnam hlauhawm takte khawpui huan an hlau vang che." 
Isaiah25:4 Mi hlauhawmte thaw chu thlipuiin bang a nam sawk sawk anga a lo awm laite hian, nang chu mi rethei tan kulhbing, pachhe mangan lai atan kulhbing, thlipui laka inhumhimna, ni sa hliahna i ni si thin a." 
Isaiah25:5 Hmun rova khaw lum chu i tireh thin ang hian, ram dang mite thawm chu i tireh ang; khaw lum chu chhum hliaha tihrha a awm thin ang hian, mi hlauhawmho hla sa chu tihrehin a awm ang." 
Isaiah25:6 Tin, he tlangah hian sipaihote LALPA chuan mi tinreng tan thil thautein ruai a theh ang, uainte a fe nena inchiah reng, thil thau takte thlinga khat, uainte a fe nena inchiah reng tha taka thlir fai chu." 
Isaiah25:7 Tin, mi tinreng an vawm khuhna pawn lam leh, hnam tinreng an khuhna chu he tlangah hian a tichhia ang." 
Isaiah25:8 Thihna chu a lem hlen ta; Lalpa PATHIAN chuan mi zawng zawng hmai ata chu mittuite a hru fai ang a; a mite hmingchhiatna chu leilung luah zawng zawng ata a la bo ang: LALPA'n chu chu a sawi tawh si a. 
Isaiah25:9 Tin, chu mi niah chuan, ""Ngai teh u, hei hi kan Pathian a nih hi; ani hi kan nghak reng a, tichuan min chhandam ang: hei hi LALPA chu a nih hi; ani hi kan nghak reng a, a chhandamnaah chuan kan lawmin kan hlim ang,"" an ti ang." 
Isaiah25:10 He tlangah hian LALPA kut chu a innghat ang a, Moab chu, buhpawl hi ekdur thlia rah beha a awm thin ang hian, ama hmunah rah behin a awm dawn si a." 
Isaiah25:11 Tichuan tuihleuhtun tui hleuh tura a vai ang hian, chu mi zingah chuan a kutte a vai ang: tin, a chapona chu akut vervekna chawpin LALPA'n a dah hniam ang.Tin, i kulh bangte in sang kulhpui chu a tichimin, a dah hniamin, leiah, vaivut thleng khawp rawkin a titlu ta." 
Isaiah25:12 Tin, i kulh bangte in sang kulhpui chu a tichimin, a dah hniamin, leiah, vaivut thleng khawp rawkin a titlu ta." 
Isaiah26:1 Chumi niah chuan Juda-ho ramah he hla hi an sa ang: Khawpui nghet tak ken nei a; ani chuan chhandamna chu kulh bangte leh kulhpuite tan a ruat ang. 
Isaiah26:2 Hnam fel thutak zawmtu chu a luh theihna turin kulh kawngkharte chu hawng rawh u. 
Isaiah26:3 I chunga rilru nghattu chu, nangmah a rin che avangin, thlamuang tak maia awm turin i veng ang." 
Isaiah26:4 LALPA chu kumkhuain ring rawh u: LALPA JEHOVA-ah chuan kumkhaw lungpui a awm si a. 
Isaiah26:5 Ani chuan sang taka awmte chu a titlawm ta si a, khawpui sang ak chu chu chu dah hniam a, lei thleng rawkin a dah hniam a vaivut thleng zawkin a titlu a." 
Isaiah26:6 Ke chuan a rap bet ang; retheite ke leh pachhiate pen ngei chuan. 
Isaiah26:7 Mi fel kawng chu dikna a ni a: nang thinlung dik tak pu chuan mi fel kawng chu i tirual thin. 
Isaiah26:8 A ni aw LALPA, i rorelna kawngah chuan kan nghak reng chia; kan nunna duhzawng chu i hming lam leh nangmah hriat rengna lam hi a ni." 
Isaiah26:9 Ka nunnain zanah ka duh chia; a ni, ka kawchhunga ka thlarau awm hian zing takah ka zawng ang che; i rorelnate chu leia a lo awm apiangin khawvela awmte chuan felna chu an zir thin si a." 
Isaiah26:10 Mi suaksual chu duhsakin awm mah se la, felna a zir chuang hlei lawng e: dikna ramah chuan dik lo takin a ti ang a, LALPA ropuina a hmu chuang lo ang." 
Isaiah26:11 LALPA, i ban i phar a, an hmu si lo; mite tan i thahnemngaihna chu hmu se, an zak ang; a ni, nangmah dotute chu meiin a kang rla ang." 
Isaiah26:12 LALPA, nangin remna min ruatsak ang: nangin kan hna zawng zawng pawh min thawhsak si a." 
Isaiah26:13 Aw LALPA kan Pathian, nangmah chang ni loin lal dangte pawhin kan chungah thu an nei tawh thin a, nimahsela nangma tanpui ngeiin i hming hi kan lam tawh ang." 
Isaiah26:14 Anni chu an thi ta a, an nung tawh lo ang; an ral thi ta a, an nung tawh lo vang; an ral ta a, an tho tah lo ang; chuvangin nangin anni chu i hremin i tichhia a, an hriat rengna zawng zawng pawh i tiboral ta." 
Isaiah26:15 He hnam hi i tipung ta a, aw LALPA, he hnam hi i tupung ta; nang chu chawimawiin i awm ta: he ram hi a ramri zawng zawng i tizau ta." 
Isaiah26:16 LALPA, an mangan laiin an zawng ruai thin chia, i hremna chu an chunga a tlak laiin an tawngtai mawlh mawlh a." 
Isaiah26:17 Hmeichhe nau pai, hrin hun hnai tawh chu, a na thin a, nau vei naa a chiau vawng vawng thin ang hian; aw LALPA, keini pawh i hmaah kan awm thin kha." 
Isaiah26:18 Nau kan pai a, kan na a, thli ang lek kan hrin kha: leiah hian chhan chhuahna lam reng kan tikaw lo a; khawvela awmho lah an tlu hek lo." 
Isaiah26:19 I mitthite chu an nung leh ang a; ka mi ruangte chu an tho leh ang. Vaivuta awmte u, harh u la, hlim takin zai rawh u:I daifim chu thlaite daifim ang a ni a, lei hian mitthite chu a paih chhuak dawn si a,"" tih hi." 
Isaiah26:20 Hawh u, ka mite u, in pindan chhungahte lut u la, in kawngte chu inkhar khum rawh u: lungnih lohna hi a kian hma loh chu mitkhapkar lek biru rawh u.Ngai teh u, LALPA chu, an sualna avanga leia awmte hrem turin a awmna ata a lo chhuak dawn a ni: lei pawh hian a thisente chu a tilang ang a, mi an thahte chu a khuh tawh lo ang." 
Isaiah26:21 Ngai teh u, LALPA chu, an sualna avanga leia awmte hrem turin a awmna ata a lo chhuak dawn a ni: lei pawh hian a thisente chu a tilang ang a, mi an thahte chu a khuh tawh lo ang." 
Isaiah27:1 Chumi niah chuan LALPA chuan, a khandaih hriam tha tak, lian pui, rinawm tak chuan, liviathan rulpui chak tak leh liviathan rulpui chhawkawlh nghut chu a hrem ang a, tuipuia drakon awm chu a that bawk ang." 
Isaiah27:2 Chu mi niah chuan, grep huan mawi tak chawimawiin hla sa rawh u." 
Isaiah27:3 Kei LALPA hi a vengtu ka ni; mitkhapkar tinin tui ka leih ang a, tuma'n an khawih lohna'n achhun azanin ka veng ang." 
Isaiah27:4 ka thin a rim tawh lo va: buar leh hnimhlingneite lo awm mah se ka thlo veng a, hmun khatah ka hal ral ang." 
Isaiah27:5 Kei min rem duh chuan ka angchhungah lo tlu lut se, mi rem rawh se." 
Isaiah27:6 Hun lo la thleng turah chuan Jakob-ho chuan zung an kai ang a; Israel-ho chu an kuhmumin an par ang: tichuan lei chung hi rahin a tikhat ang. 
Isaiah27:7 Amah vawtute a vuak ang takin amah chu a vaw ve em ni? A nih loh leh, ama thahte thahna ang takin amah chu thahin a awm em ni?" 
Isaiah27:8 Amah chu i kal botir laiin a tawk lekin amah chu i hnial a; khawchhak thli tleh niah chuan a thaw na tak chuan amah chu a len sawn ta. 
Isaiah27:9 chuvangin hei hian Jakob-ho khawlohna chu tlenfai a ni ang a, hei hi an sual kal bopuina rah hlir a ni; Aserte leh ni lemte chu tho tawh lo tur khawpin maicham lung zawng zawng chu tlak lung den phel ram rum ang maia an siam hi." 
Isaiah27:10 Khua kulpui nei chu a khawhar a, awmna mi hnuchhawn leh kalsan hnu a ni ta si a, thlaler ang maiin: chutah chuan bawng no a tla ang a, chutah bawk chuan a bawk ang a, a tangte chu a ei ang." 
Isaiah27:11 A zarte chu a vuai hun chuan thliahin a awm ang; hmeichheho an lo kal ang a, an hla mai ang: hriat theihna reng reng nei lo mite an ni si a; chuvangin an siamtu chuan anni chu a khawngaih lo ang a, anmahni dintu chuan anni chu a duh reng reng a duhsak lo ang." 
Isaiah27:12 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, LALPA chuan, lui kuang khata luang dul dul atangin, Aigupta luite thlengin, a rah a vaw thla ang a, tichuan, aw Israela thlahte u, a mal mala chhiarin in am ang.Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, tawtawrawt lian pui an ham ang a; tichuan Assuria rama boral lek lekhote leh, Aigupta rama hnawh chhuahho awmte chu an lo kal ang a; Jerusalem khuaa tlang thianghlimah chuan LALPA chu chibai an buk ang." 
Isaiah27:13 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, tawtawrawt lian pui an ham ang a; tichuan Assuria rama boral lek lekhote leh, Aigupta rama hnawh chhuahho awmte chu an lo kal ang a; Jerusalem khuaa tlang thianghlimah chuan LALPA chu chibai an buk ang." 
Isaiah28:1 Ephraim-ho zu ruihmangte chapona lallukhum chung leh, an mawina ropui pangpar chuai mek, uain chiahhneha awmho ruam tha takin a khum chung chu a pik e!" 
Isaiah28:2 Ngai teh, LALPA chuan mi chak thiltithei tak a nei a; ani chuan, rial nasa tak tla dur dur, thlipui thil tichhe rem rum ang leh, tuilian nasa tak liam zur zur ang maiin, leiah a paih chawrh ang." 
Isaiah28:3 Ephraim-ho zu ruihmangte chapona lallukhum chu rah behin a awm ang: 
Isaiah28:4 an mawina ropui pangpar chuai mek, ruam tha takin a khum chu, nipui hmaa theipui hmin hmasa ber, a entuin a hmuh a, a kuta a awm veleha a ei zawh mai htin ang chu a ni ang." 
Isaiah28:5 Chumi niah chuan sipaihote LALPA chu, a mi la awm chhungte tan ropuina lallukhum leh mawina lukum te," 
Isaiah28:6 rorel tura thua tan rorelna thlarau te, kulh kawngkhar bula rawn beiho dangkirtute tan chaknate a ni ang." 
Isaiah28:7 Nimahsela chungte pawh chu uain avangin an thle an thle a, zu avangin an pai an pai a; puithiamte leh zawlneite chu zu avangin an thle an thle a, uain lem zawhin an awm a, zu avangin an pai an pai a; inlarna thu-ah an thle an thle thin a, rorelna thu-ah an pai an pai thin." 
Isaiah28:8 Hmun fai reng reng awm lo khawpin dawhkan zawng zawng chu lauk leh thil bawlhhlawhin a khat a ni. 
Isaiah28:9 Hriatna lam chu tu hi nge a zirtir dawn tehchai: Thuchah chu tu hi nge a hriattir dawn tehchai: Hnute hnek bang hlimte leh hnute hnektir tawh lohte hi em ni? 
Isaiah28:10 Thununna thu chunga thununna thu chherchuan a, thununna thu chunga thununna chherchhuan a; dan chunga dan chherchhuan a, dan chunga dan chherchhuan a; hetah tlem te, sawtah tlem te tih hlir a ni si a." 
Isaiah28:11 A ni, nimahsela hmui danglam pu mi hmangin, tawng hrangin, he'ng mite hnenah hian thu a sawi tawh zawk ang:" 
Isaiah28:12 Hei hi a ni, chawlhna chu ni, hahte chu chawlhtir rawh u! hei hi a ni, intihharhna chu ni,"" a tihate chu: nimahsela an ngaithla duh si lo." 
Isaiah28:13 Chuvangin, an kal a, zangthala an tluk a, an keh sawm a, thanga an awh a, mana an awm theihna turin, LALPA thu chu anniho tan chuan, thununna thu chunga thununna thu chherchhuan a, thununa thu chunga thununna thu chherchhuan a; dan chunga dan chherchhuan a, dan chunga dan chherchhuan a; hetah tlem te, sawtah tlem te tih hlir a ni mai ang." 
Isaiah28:14 Chumi avang chuan, mi hmusit hmang mite u, he mite, Jerusalem khuaa awmho, rorelsaktute u, LALPA thu hi hre rawh u:" 
Isaiah28:15 Thihna lakah thu kan thlung ta, Seol nen thu kan intiam ta; vuakna tui lian liam chu a luan tlang hunah pawh keini thleng chuan a luang lo ang; dawt thute kan inhumhimna'n kan hmang a, dawt hnuaiah kan biru ta si a,"" in tih avangin," 
Isaiah28:16 chuvang chuan Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a sawi: Ngai teh, lung, lung riah hnu, a kila lung hlu tak phum nghet tak chu, Zion-ah chuan lungphum atan ka rem hi: a ringtu chu a hmanhmawh lo ang." 
Isaiah28:17 rorelna fel chu a tihngilna hruiah ka hmang ang a, felna chu darmumkhaiah ka hmang ang: rial chu inhumhimna dawt thute chu a chhu bo vek ang a,t uite chuan bihrukna chu a chim pil ang." 
Isaiah28:18 Tin, thihna laka in thu thlun chu phelhin a awm ang a, Seol nena in thu intiam pawh chu a ding chuak lo ang; vuakna tui lian liam chu a luan tlang hunah, chu i hunah chuan a rah behin in awm ang." 
Isaiah28:19 A luan tlang apiangin a la zel ang che u; atuk atuk tin, achhun achhunzanin, a luang tlang dawn si a: thuchah awmze hriat chu thil rapthlak hlir a ni ang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah28:20 Khum chu thluanna'n a tawi lutuk si a, puanthuah chu inkhuhna'n a te lutuk bawk si." 
Isaiah28:21 A hna, a hna danglam chu, a thawh theihna'n leh, a thiltih, a thiltih danglam chu, a hlen theiana'n, LALPA chu, Perazim tlanga a tho ang khan, a tho dawn si a, Gibeon ruama a thinur ang khan a thinur dawn a ni." 
Isaiah28:22 Chutichuan mi hmusit hmangtute ni tawh suh u, chutilochuan in kawlbunte chu rinawm takin an siam dah ang e: tawpna, tawpna thleng ngei tura ruat tlat chu, lei pum pui chunga a thlen tur thu Lalpa, sipaihote LALPA hnen atang chuan ka hre si a." 
Isaiah28:23 Beng chhi u la, ka aw hi hre rawh u; ngaithla u la, ka thu sawi hi hre rawh u." 
Isaiah28:24 Leilettu chuan chi thehna'n lei a let reng ngai em ni? A lei tlangte chua tikehin a tisawm reng ngai em ni? 
Isaiah28:25 A chung chu a chawh rual zawhin mohuri-te chu a theh darh lo em ni? Zira te pawh a theh lo em ni? Buh te pawh a tlarin, barlite pawh a hmun ruatah, vai buhtunte pawh a vau hrulah a tuh thin lo em ni?" 
Isaiah28:26 A Pathian chuan ani chu fel takin a thununin a zirtir thin si a. 
Isaiah28:27 Mohuri chu buh chilna khawl hriamin an chil ngai si lo a, zira chungah chuan tawlailir ke chu an lirhtir ngai hek lo; mohuri chu tiangin an vua a, zira chu talhtumin an vaw zawk thin a ni." 
Isaiah28:28 Chhang siamna buh chu rawtsawmin a awm thin a, kumkhuain a vaw reng dawn si lo: a tawlailir ke leh a sakawrte chuan tidarh mah se la, a rawt sawmtir ngai lo.Chung pawh chu sipaihote LALPA, inrawnna kawnga mi mak tak leh, finna kawnga mi tha tak lakah chuan a chhuak a ni." 
Isaiah28:29 Chung pawh chu sipaihote LALPA, inrawnna kawnga mi mak tak leh, finna kawnga mi tha tak lakah chuan a chhuak a ni." 
Isaiah29:1 E Ariel, Ariel, Davida awm hmun khuarna khua! Kumah kum belh rawh u; kutte chu lo thleng leh rawh se:" 
Isaiah29:2 chumi hunah chuan Ariel hi ka timangang ang a, tichuan sunna leh tahna a awm ang:tin, a ni chu ka tan Ariel ang a ni ang." 
Isaiah29:3 Tin, nangmah bei tumin i velah ka ep ang chia, kulh siamin ka hual vel bawk ang chia, bei tur chein hual velna kulhbingte ka siam ang." 
Isaiah29:4 Tichuan tihtlukin i awm ang a, lei hnuai atangin thu i sawi ang a, i tawng chu vaivut zingah zawitein a ri chhuak ang; i aw chu ramhuai aienthiam zawl aw ang lekin lei hnuai atangin a chhuak ang a, i tawng chu vaivut zing atangin a lo chhuak se se ang." 
Isaiah29:5 Nimahsela nangmah dotu mipuite chu vaivut dip tak angin an awm ang a, mi hlauhawmho mipuite chu buhsi boral thinte ang hian an awm bawk ang: a ni, chu chu mitkhapkar loah a lo awm thut ang." 
Isaiah29:6 Khawpui ri te, lirnghing te, ri nasa tak te, thawngaleivir te, thlipui te, thil kanralhmang meialh tein anni chu sipaihote LALPA hremin an awm ang." 
Isaiah29:7 Tichuan Ariel dotu hnam zawng zawng mipuiho, amah leh a kulhbing beiotute zawng zawng leh amah timangangtu zawng zawngte chu, mumang ang lek an i ang, zana inlarna ang lek hi." 
Isaiah29:8 Mi riltamin mumang a neihin chaw a lo ei thin a, nimahsela a han harh a, a kua chu a lo la ruak ang hi a ni ang: a nih loh leh, mi tuihalin mumang a neihin tui a lo in thin a, nimahsela a han harh a, a lo la chavuin tui a la chak ang hi a ni ang: Zion tlang beitu, hnam zawng zawng mipuiho chu, chutiang chu an ni ang." 
Isaiah29:9 Ding reng u la, mak ti rawh u, nuam leng u la, mitdelin awm rawh u: an rui a, nimahsela uain avang a ni lo; an pai an pai a, nimahzela zu avang a ni lo." 
Isaiah29:10 LALPA chuan mut duhna thlarau chu in chungah a leih bua a, in mit, zawlneite chu, a maimitchhintir a; in lu, hmu theitute chu, a khuh ta si a." 
Isaiah29:11 Tichuan inlarna reng reng in tan lehkhabu char tlata thu ang a ni ta, chu chu miten lehkha thiam mi hnenah ""Khawngaih takin hei hi chhiar rawh,"" tiin an pe thin a: tin, ani chuan, ""Ka chhiar thei lo, char tlat a nih hi,"" a ti thin a:" 
Isaiah29:12 tin, lehkhabu chu lehkha thiam lo mi hnenah, ""Khawngaih takin hei hi chhiar rawh,"" tiin a pe thin a: tin, ani chuan, ""Lehkha ka thiam lo,"" a ti thin." 
Isaiah29:13 Tin, Lalpa chuan, ""He mite hian mi rawn hnaih a, an ka leh an hmuiin mi chawimawi thin tak a, nimahsela an thinlung chu ka hlatah an sawn a, an mi tihna chu mihring thupek an inzirtir mai chu a ni:" 
Isaiah29:14 chuvangin, ngai teh, he mite zingah hian thilmak tak mai chu: tichuan an mi fingte finna chu a boral tawh ang a, an mi bengvarte hriatna chu thupin a awm tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah29:15 An remruat chu LALPA laka thup tura thuk taka zawngtute chu an chung a pik e! an thiltihte chu thim hnuaiah a awm a, ""Tuin nge min hmu ang? Tuin nge hriat pawh min hria ang?"" an ti a." 
Isaiah29:16 Thilte hi in tiletling zo vek thin e a! Bel vawtu chu bellei ang leka ngaihin a awm dawn em ni, thil siam chuan a siamtu chu, ""Ani mi siam ka ni hlei nem,"" a tih ni? A nih loh leh, thil din chuan a dintu chu ""Hriatna reng a nei lo,"" a tih ni?" 
Isaiah29:17 Rei lo te chinah a ni lo'm ni? Lebanon chu lei tha tak hmuna chantirin a awm dawn a, lei tha tak hmun chu ram ngawa ngaihin a awm dawn?" 
Isaiah29:18 Chumi niah chuan bengngawngte chuan lehkhabu thute chu an bengin an hre tawh ang a, mitdel mitte chuan thim hnuai leh thim zing atangin a hmu tawh ang." 
Isaiah29:19 Thuhnuairawlhte pawh chuan LALPAah chuan an hlimna chu an tipung tawh ang a, mihring zinga retheite chu Israel-ho Mi Thianghlimah chuan an lawm tawh ang." 
Isaiah29:20 Mi hlauhawm chu engmah loa siamin a awm tawh a, hmusittu chu a reh tawh a, khawlohna nghakheltute zawng zawng chu tihboralin an awm tawh si a:" 
Isaiah29:21 chungte chuan mi chu thupawi thu-ah thiltisualtuah an sia thin a, kulh kawngkaa ziltu awhna'n thang an kam thin a, mi fel chu thil engmah lo maiin an pumpelhtir thin." 
Isaiah29:22 Chuvangin LALPA, Abrahama tlantu chuan Jakoba chhungte chungchang thuah heti hian a ti: ""Jakob-ho chu tunah chuan an mualpho tawh lo ang a, an hmai chu a dang tawh hek lo ang." 
Isaiah29:23 An fa, ka kut chhuakte chu, an zingah an hmuhin, ka hming chu an tithianghlim tawh zawk ang; a ni, Jakob-ho Mi Thianghlim chu an tithianghlim ang a, Israel-ho Pathian chu an tih tawh ang.Thlarauva vakbote pawh chuan an lo hre thiam tawh ang a, mi phunnawite chuan thu zirtir chu an zir tawh ang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah29:24 Thlarauva vakbote pawh chuan an lo hre thiam tawh ang a, mi phunnawite chuan thu zirtir chu an zir tawh ang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah30:1 LALPA chuan, ""Fa helhmangho chu an chung a pik e! chungho chuan mi an rawn a, kei erawh chu mi rawn si lo a, an sual chunga sual an belhchhahna turin khuhnain an khuh a, ka thlarau thuin erawh chuan an khuh si lo a." 
Isaiah30:2 Pharaoa chaknaa intichak tur leh, Aigupta hlim ring turin, ka ka zawt si loin Aigupta rama chhuk tumin an kal a." 
Isaiah30:3 Chuvangin Pharaoa chakna chu in mualphona a ni tah ang a, Aigupta hlim in lo ring hi in zahna a ni tawh ang." 
Isaiah30:4 A mi liante chu Zoan khuaah an awm a, a palaite chuan Janes khua an thleng ta si a." 
Isaiah30:5 An tan hnemhnanna reng nei lo mi, tanpui ni lo a, hnemhnanna nei mi ni hek lo a, zah leh hmingchhiatna ni zawkte chu, an zain an la zahpui ang,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah30:6 Chhim rama sate phur rit chu. Manganna leh thlaphanna ram, sakeibakneinu leh sakeibakneipa, rulmuk leh rul alh thlawk thei chhuahna chu, an sum chu sabengtung no chungah te, an rote chu sanghawng sei zang pawngahte phurhtirin, an tana hnemhnanna nei lo mite hnenah pek turin, an kal tlang dual dual a." 
Isaiah30:7 Aigupta chuan sawt lo tak leh tangkai lo takin a tanpui thin si a: chuvangin a ni, ani chu, ""Rahab thu hle hle-i,"" ka vuah ni." 
Isaiah30:8 Tunah kal la, chung chu an hmaa lehkha ziakna phekah ziak la, lehkhabuah pawh ziak rawh, tun hnua kumkhaw tlaitluan atan a nih theihna'n." 
Isaiah30:9 Chungho chu mi helhmang te, fa dam theite, fa LALPA dan ngaithla duh lo te, an ni si a:" 
Isaiah30:10 hmutheitute hnena, ""Hmutheitute hnena, ""Hmu suh u,"" zawlneite hnena, ""Thil dikte min hrilh lawk suh u, thilnuam lam kan hnenah sawi rawh u, bumna thu hrilh lawk rawh u:" 
Isaiah30:11 kawng loah kal rawh u, kawng sirah peng rawh u, Israel-ho Mi Thainghlim chu kan hma ata hi tibo rawh u,"" ti thintute chu." 
Isaiah30:12 Chumi avang chuan Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim chuan heti hian a sawi a, ""He thu hi in hmusit avang leh hnechhiahna leh luhlulna in rin a, a chunga in innghah avangin," 
Isaiah30:13 he khawlohna hi nangni tan chuan lung bang sang tak chhe lai, chim lek lek, pawng pur, vwailehkhatah mitkhapkar loa chhe rup tur ang hi a ni ang." 
Isaiah30:14 Tichuan belvawtu bel an tikeh sawm ang hian, zuah awm hlek loa keh sawmin a them zingah lampei thuka mei lakna tur emaw, tuikhura tui thlana tur emaw pawh awm lo khawpin, a tikeh sawm ang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah30:15 Lalpa PATHIAN, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim chuan, heti hian a sawi tawh si a, ""Kir leha chawla awmin, chhandamin in awm ang a, muang taka awmnaah leh ring taka awmnaah hian in chakna a awm ang,"" tiin: nimahsela in duh si lo." 
Isaiah30:16 Ni lo, sakawr chung chuangin ka tlan dur dur ang,"" in ti zawk si a, chuvangin in tlan dur dur ngei ang: ""Thil cha tak chungah kan chuang ang,"" tin, ti a; chuvangin a umtu tur che u chu chak tak an ni ang." 
Isaiah30:17 Mi pakhat hrawkin mi sangkhat an tlan dur dur ang a: mi panga hrawkin in tlan dur dur ang: a tawpah chuan tlang chhipa pholeng tar ang leh, mual chunga chhinchhiahna awm anga hnutchhiahin in la awm mai ang." 
Isaiah30:18 Chuvangin LALPA chuan a khawngaih theihna tur che uin a nghak ang a, chuvangin a lainat theihna tur che uin chawimawiin a awm ang: LALPA chu rorel felna Pathian a ni si a; amah nghaktute zawng zawng chu an eng a thawl e." 
Isaiah30:19 Mite chu Jerusalem-a Ziona-ah chuan an awm dawn si a: in tap leh tawh lo ang; in au thawmah chuan ani chuan a khawngaih ngei ngei ang che u a; a hriat veleh a chhang ang che u. 
Isaiah30:20 LALPA chuan manganna chaw leh hrehawmna tui pe che u mah se la, in zirtirtute chu biruin an awm tawh lo ang a, in mitin in zirtirtute chu a hmu zawk tawh ang:" 
Isaiah30:21 tin, ding lama in pen veleh emaw, vie lama in pen veleh emaw, in bengin in hnung lama thu, ""Hei hi kawng a nih hi, tah hian kal rawh u,"" tiin a hre zel ang." 
Isaiah30:22 Tin, in tangka milem siam tangka tia cheina leh, in rangkachak milem chhun rangkachak tuia luanna chu in tibawrhbang ang a: thil bawlhhlawh angin in paih tawh ang a, a hnenah chuan, ""Kal bo daih rawh,"" ion ti ang." 
Isaiah30:23 Tichuan ani chuan i buh chi leia in tuh tur tan chuan ruah tui chu a pe ang a; leia thil tote pawh chu chawh a pe ang, chu chu tha tak, hlawk tak a ni ang: chumi niah chuan in rante chu ran tlatna hmun zau takahte chuan an tla ang," 
Isaiah30:24 bawngpa leh sabengtung no lei letutte chuan chaw leh sabengtung no lei lettute chuan chaw al, suahdur leh sisepa tihfai sa, an ei bawk ang." 
Isaiah30:25 Tin, inthahna nasa tak nia, ralven in sangte chu a chi ni chuan, tlang sang tinah leh mual pawng sang tinah chuan luipuite leh luite tui luangte a lo awm ang." 
Isaiah30:26 Chu lo pawh chu LALPA chuan a mite sil chu a tua a, an sahna pem chu a tihdam niah chuan, thla eng chu ni eng tlukin a awm tawh ang a, ni eng chu a lehsarihin, ni sarih chhung eng tlukin, a awm tawh ang." 
Isaiah30:27 Ngai teh, LALPA hming chu, a thinurnaa alh hluah hluain meikhu chhah mup chho ngut ngut zingah chuan, hla tak atangin a lo kal e: a hmuite chu lungnih lohnain a khat a, a lei chu thil kanralhmang mei ang a ni a:" 
Isaiah30:28 a thaw chu, boralna thlangraa hnam tin thlei turin, lui nghawng thleng zeta a kuang liam dul dul ang a ni. Tin, mi tin kaah chuan hruai sualtirna hmuh dinna hrui a awm ang," 
Isaiah30:29 Tin, zana kut thianghlima an kut laia hla an sa angin hla in sa ang a; LALPA tlanga Israel-ho Lungpui hnen thlang tura phenglawng nen an kal laia thinlung hlimna an nei angin thinlung hlimna pawh in nei ang." 
Isaiah30:30 Tin, LALPA chuan a aw ropui tak chu a hriattir tawh ang a, a thinurna nasa tak leh thil kanralhmang meialhin, thlipui leh ruahpui leh rialin, a kut thlak dan chu a entir tawh ang." 
Isaiah30:31 LALPA aw avang chuan Assuria mi, talhtuma mi vaw thintu chu, tihkeh sawmin a awm dawn tawh si a." 
Isaiah30:32 Ani chu tiang ruat saa LALPA'n a vuak apiangin khuang tete leh tingtangte nen a vua ang a: a tiang leka inbeinaahte chuan anmahni a bei ang.Tophet khuar zau tak leh thuk tak thing chheh khah lal halna tur an buatsaih daih tawh a, a tikang turin LALPA chuan kat lui anga luang mei a thaw chhuak ang." 
Isaiah30:33 Tophet khuar zau tak leh thuk tak thing chheh khah lal halna tur an buatsaih daih tawh a, a tikang turin LALPA chuan kat lui anga luang mei a thaw chhuak ang." 
Isaiah31:1 Aigupta rama tanpuina zawng tura zuk kal a, sakawrte chunga rinna nghat a, a tam avanga tawlailirte leh an chak em avanga sakawr chung chuang mite ring a, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim lam en si lo a, LALPA pawh rawn si lote chu an chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah31:2 Rawn lo mah se la ani pawh fing tak a sin, thil tha lo a rawnt hlentir ang a, a thute chu a lamlet lo ang: thil tha lo titute chhungte bei turin a thao zawk ang a, thil tisualtute tanpuina do turin a tho bawk ang." 
Isaiah31:3 Aigupta mite zawng Pathian an ni lo a, mihring mai an ni a; an sakawrte chu thlarau a ni lo a, tisa mai a ni a: tichuan LALPA'n a kut a phar hunah chuan a tanpuitu chu a pai thlawk thlawk ang a, atanpuia pawh chu a tlu ang a, an za chuan an boral tlang hlawm ang." 
Isaiah31:4 LALPA chuan heti hian ka hnenah a sawi si a, ""Sakeibaknei leh sakeibaknei vanglaiin a sa hauh lai chuan beram vengtu tam tak a bei turin koh chhuahin awm mah se la, an aw chu ahlau dawn lo a, an bengchhen avangin a tiam chuang dawn hek lo ang hian, sipaihote lalpa chu Zion tlangah leh a mual pawngah bei turin a lo chhuk dawn a ni." 
Isaiah31:5 Savate an bu chunga an thlawk an thlawk ang hian sipahote LALPA chua Jerusalem khua chu a veng ang; a vengin a chhan chuak ang a, akal hleni a humhim ang." 
Isaiah31:6 Aw Israela thlahte u, nasa taka in helsan taka lam chu hawi leh tawh rawh u." 
Isaiah31:7 Chumi niah chuan mi tinin mahni tangka milemte, mahni rangkachak milemte, sualna atana nangmahni kuta in insiam chawpte chu an la paih bo dawn si a." 
Isaiah31:8 Chu mi hunah chuan Assuria mi chu, mihring khandaiha tihthluk ni loin, khandaih tihthlukin a awm ang a; khandaih, mihringte ta ni loin, amah chu a ei zo ang: tin, khandaih lak aa a tlan bo ang a, a tlangvalte chu chhiahchawitu an lo ni tawh ang.Tin, a lungpui chu thil rapthlak avangin a boral ang a, a mi liante chu chhinchhiahna avangin an mangang tawh ang,"" tiin, LALPA, a mei Zion-a awma leh, a rawh tuina mei Jerusalema awma chuan a ti a." 
Isaiah31:9 Tin, a lungpui chu thil rapthlak avangin a boral ang a, a mi liante chu chhinchhiahna avangin an mangang tawh ang,"" tiin, LALPA, a mei Zion-a awma leh, a rawh tuina mei Jerusalema awma chuan a ti a." 
Isaiah32:1 Ngai teh, fel taka rorel tur lal a lo awm ang a, dik taka tithin hotute an lo chhuak bawk ang." 
Isaiah32:2 Thlipui laka bikna hmun ang leh thlihrang laka inhumhimna ang a ni ang; thlalera lui luang ang leh ramrova lungpui lian tak hlim ang mai chu. 
Isaiah32:3 An mit chuan chiang takin a hmu ang a, an beng pawhin fiah takin a hre tawh ang." 
Isaiah32:4 Rilrua hmanhmawh chuan hriat thiam a zir ang a, dangawkte pawh nal takin an tawng thei ang." 
Isaiah32:5 Mi sual chu tuma zah a kai lo ang a, mi duham chuan ngaihsan a hlawh hek lo ang." 
Isaiah32:6 Mi sual chuan thu a a chhak chhuak a, suahsualna dang tur a suangtuah a, a thiltih leh a kam chhuakte chu LALPA elsen zawng hlir a ni; riltamte ei tur a laksak a, tuihalte in tur a tihbuaksak thin." 
Isaiah32:7 Mi duham chu khawlo tak a ni; retheite chu dawt tichhe turin thil sual a phiar chhuak a, pachhiate pawh an diknaah pawh a dang tlat thin." 
Isaiah32:8 Mi tha erawh chuan dik takin thil a ti a, thu dik a tan tlat thin." 
Isaiah32:9 Hmeichhe nuam tawlte u, tho u la ka thu hi ngaithla teh u; fanu ngaihsamte u, ka thu sawiah hian beng chhi rawh u." 
Isaiah32:10 Hmeichhe ngaihdamte u, kum khat leh ni eng zat emaw chinah chuan in mangang tah ang: grep lawh tur lah a awm dawn si lo a, lawh khawm turah chuan engmah a haw dawn hek lo." 
Isaiah32:11 Hmeichhe awm mai maite u, khur rawh u; mi ngaihsamte u, mangang takin awm rawh u; inhliup u la, saruakah insiam u la, in kawngahte chuan saiip puan veng rawh u." 
Isaiah32:12 Lo duhawmte avang leh grep hrui rah duh mi avang chuan an awm an chum an chum ang. 
Isaiah32:13 Ka mite ramah hian hnimhlingneite leh buarte chu a tla ang: a ni, khawpui hlimawm taka hlimna in zawng zawng chungahte chuan," 
Isaiah32:14 Lal in chu kalsanin a awm dawn si a; mi tamna khawpui chu chhuahsanin a awm ang a; a mual pawng leh a ralven buk chu kumkhaw pukah te, ram sabengtung lawmna te, ran rual tlatna hmunte a ni ang;" 
Isaiah32:15 chunglam atangin a thlarau a rawn pe leh ang a, thlaler chu lei tha tak hmunah a chang ang a, lei tha tak hmun chu ram ngawa ngaiha a awm hun chuan." 
Isaiah32:16 rorel felna chu thlalerah chuan a cheng ang a, felna chu lei tha tak hmunah chuan a awm ang." 
Isaiah32:17 Tin, felna hnathawh chu remna a ni ang a, felnaa thil chhuak chu kumkhuaa muang taka awmna leh ring tlata awmna a ni ang." 
Isaiah32:18 Tichuan ka mite chu ralmuanga awmnaah leh a nghet takahte leh chawlhna hmun muanawm takahte chuan an awm tawh ang. 
Isaiah32:19 Nimahsela ram ngaw chu tithlu turin rial a tla dur dur ang a; khawpui chu tihtlawm derin a awm ang.Tui luanna zawng zawng kama chi theh thin a, bawngpa leh sabengtung thlah thintute u, in eng a thawl e." 
Isaiah32:20 Tui luanna zawng zawng kama chi theh thin a, bawngpa leh sabengtung thlah thintute u, in eng a thawl e." 
Isaiah33:1 Nang rawk tawk ngai si lo a, rawktu, vervek taka tih tawk ngai si lov a, vervek taka titu, i chung a pik e! Mi rawk i ban hunah, rawk i la tawk ve ang;a vervek taka i tih zawh hunah, i chungah vervek takin an ti ang." 
Isaiah33:2 Aw LALPA, min khawngaih ang che; kan nghah reng che hi: tuk tin kan ban lo ni la, mangan hunah chuan min chhandamtu lo ni bawk ang che. Sa mur mur thawmah chuan mi tin an tlan bo ta a; nang i thawh meuh chuan hnam tin tihdarhin an awm ta." 
Isaiah33:3 In sum rallaka lak tur pangangin thil a thiar khawm sup sup ang hian thiar khawmin a awm ang a khaukhuapte an zuang sup sup ang hian anniho chu sum chungah an zuang sup sup ang. 
Isaiah33:4 LALPA chu chawisanin a awm ta; chung lamah khian a awm si a: ani chuan Zion chu rorel felna leh felnain a tikhat ta. 
Isaiah33:5 I dam chhung chuan awm nghehna a awm ang a, chhandamna te, finna te, hriatnate a awm reuh vang: LALPA tihna chu a ro a ni." 
Isaiah33:6 Ngai teh, an pasalthate chu pawn lamah an au a; remna palaite chu an tap zawih zawih a." 
Isaiah33:7 lamliante chu a thing thiap thuap a, mi zin veivak chu an awm ta lo va: ani chuan thuthlung chu a bawhchhia a, khuate chu a hmusit a, mihring a ngaihsak tak lo." 
Isaiah33:8 Ram chu a rapin a chau a: Lebanon chu a zakin a vuai a: Saron chu thlaler ang a ni ta; Baan leh Karmel chuan an hnahte an thing thla a. 
Isaiah33:9 LALPA chuan, ""Tunah chuan ka tho ang a, tunah chuan chawisanin ka awm tawh ang." 
Isaiah33:10 Hnim ro in pai ang a, buh pawl in hring ang: in thaw chu nangmahni kang ral tur mei a ni." 
Isaiah33:11 Mi tinrengte chu chinai lung rawh ang, hnim hlingnei sam hnu meia an paih ang chu an ni ang,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah33:12 Hla taka awmte u, ka thiltih hi bengin lo hre rawh u, hnaitea awmte u, ka thiltihtheihzia hi hre rawh u." 
Isaiah33:13 Zion-a mi sual awmte chuan an hlau a; Pathian zah lo mite chu khurhnain a man ta. Kanralhmang mei, kumkhuaa alh chu, kan zingah tu nge tuar thei awm ang?"" an ti a." 
Isaiah33:14 Fel taka awma dik taka sawi thintu; hnehchhiahnate hlawkpuina reng reng lungtena, tham la duh loa kut thinsana, thisen chhuah thu ngaithla duh loa beng hup a, sualna reng reng en duh loa maimitchhing thina chu;" 
Isaiah33:15 chu mi chu chunglamah a awm ang aL a kulhbing sang chu lungpui kulhbingte chu a ni ang a; a chaw chu a hnenah pek a ni ang a, atuite chu a awm ngei ngei ang." 
Isaiah33:16 I mite chuan lal chu a mawinaah chuan an la hmu ang a, ram parh zau tak an la thlir ang." 
Isaiah33:17 A chhiartu kha khawiah nge a awm tak? Chhiah chawi buktu kha khawiah nge a awm tak? Ralven in sangte chhiartu kha, khawiah nge a awm tak?"" tiin, i thinlungin thil rapthlak tak kha i ngaihtuah ang." 
Isaiah33:18 Mi kawlh ta, rawng ril tak i hriat theih loha tawng mite, tawng hrang i hriat thiam loha tawngte chu i hmu tawh lo ang." 
Isaiah33:19 Kan kutna khawpui Zion chu en teh: i mitte chuan Jerusalem chu awmna muanawm tak, puan in engtik maha sawn lo tur, a kaih marna khen engtik maha phawi lo tur, a kaihna hrui reng reng chat lo tur ang chu, a hmu ang." 
Isaiah33:20 chutah chuan LALPA, lui zau tak tak leh lui tete awm thliah thluahna hmun chu, ropui takin kan hnenah a awm zawk ang: chung tui chungah chuan indona lawng lianpui kar fung nei mi reng reng a kal lo ang a, lawng lian rpui tak pawhin a kal pel hek lo ang." 
Isaiah33:21 LALPA chu kan roreltu a ni a, LALPA chu dan min petu a ni a, LALPA chu kan lal a ni; ani chuan min chhandam ang." 
Isaiah33:22 I hruite chu tihdulin a awm a; an puan zar ngul bul chu an tinghet thei lo a, puan zar chu an zar thei lo: chu mi lai tak chuan rallak i tum tam tak chu semin a awm a; kebaite pawhin rallak sum an la ta a.chu mi khuaa awm chuan, ""Ka dam lo e,"" a ti lo ang a, a chhunga mi awmte chu sual ngaihdamin an awm ang." 
Isaiah33:23 chu mi khuaa awm chuan, ""Ka dam lo e,"" a ti lo ang a, a chhunga mi awmte chu sual ngaihdamin an awm ang." 
Isaiah34:1 Hnam tinte u, benga hre turin lo hnai rawh u; mi tinte u, ngaithla rawh u: lei leh a chhunga awm zawng zawngte chuan bengin hre rawh se; khawvel lah a chhung ata chhuak zawng zawngte nen." 
Isaiah34:2 LALPA chuan hnam tinreng chungah chuan lungnih lohna a neiin, an sipaiho zawng zawng chungah chuan thinrimna a nei si a: anni chu a tiboral vek a, thahah a pe ta a." 
Isaiah34:3 An zinga thahate chu paih chhuahin an awm ang a, an ruang rimchhia chu a chho vut vut ang a, tlangte chu an thisena tihtuiin a awm ang." 
Isaiah34:4 Vana awmho zawng zawngte khi tihralin an awm ang a, van khi lehkhabu zial mi an zial angin zialin a awm ang a: a awmho zawng zawngte khi, grep hrui ata a hnah a vuai a tla thin ang leh, theipui kung ata a hna vuai a tla thin ang hian, an vuai zoin an tla vek ang." 
Isaiah34:5 Ka khandaih chuan vanah tlai takin a in ta si a; ngai teh, chu chu, rorel turin, Edom-ho chungah leh ka anchhelawh mite chungah chuan a chhuk ang." 
Isaiah34:6 LALPA khandaih chu thisenin a tlai a, thaunaa tihthauin a awm ta, brem note leh kelte thisenin, berampa kal thautein: LALPA chuan Bozrah khuaah chuan inthawina a nei a, Edom ramah chuan thahna nasa tak a nei bawk si a." 
Isaiah34:7 Selepate pawh chu an ruala sah thlukin an awm ang a, bawngpate, bawngchalte nen; an ram chuan thisen a tui ang a, an vaivut chu thaunaa tihthauin a am ang." 
Isaiah34:8 LALPA phuba lak ni a ni tah si a, Zion avanga inbeihna thua thungrulhna kum chu." 
Isaiah34:9 A lui tuite chu lawng hnaia chartirin a awm ang a, a vaivut chu kata chantirin a awm bawk ang a, a ram chu lawng hnai kang hluah hluahah a chang ang." 
Isaiah34:10 Achhun azanin tihmihin a awm lo ang a; ameikhu chu kumkhuain a chho ngut ngut ang a; chhuan zamw chhung zawng zawng chuan chiain a awm reng ang a; kumkhua pawhin tuma'n an pal lo ang. 
Isaiah34:11 Tuivalawng leh sakuhin chumi ram chu an nei zawk ang a; chingpirinu leh choak chutah chuan an awm ang a: LALPA'n a tichhe vek ang a, hmun ruakah chuan a sahal a khai ang." 
Isaiah34:12 An mi thate chu ram awp turin an ko ang a, nimahsela chutah chuan koh tur tumah an awm lo ang a; an mi lian zawng zawng chu engmah lo an ni ang." 
Isaiah34:13 An lal inahte chuan hnihlingneite a to ang a, an kulhpui chhungahte chuan taiten leh buarte a to ang: sihalte awmnaah leh sava nghawngseite tan tuallai a ni ang." 
Isaiah34:14 Tin, thlalera ram sate chu chinghniate nen an intawk ang a, sathar chuan a thian a ko ang a; a ni, zan thil hlauhawm pui chuan chutah chuan awm hmun a khuar ang a, ama tan chawlh hmun tur a hmu ang." 
Isaiah34:15 Chutah chuan rulthal chuan bu a chhep ang a, a tui ang a, a keu ang a, a awp khawm ang: a ni, chutah chuan mute chu kawppui nei theuhin an awm khawm ang." 
Isaiah34:16 LALPA lehkhabuah zawng u la, chhiar rawh u: chung zingah chuan pakhat mah kim lo a awm lo ang a, pakhat mah kawppui nei lo a awm lo ang: ka ka ngeiin thu a pe a, ka thlarau ngeiin chung chu a hruai khawm ta hlawm si a.Ani chuan an tan thum a vawrsak a, a kutin hruia tehin ram chu a semsak hlawm a; kumkhuain an nei ang a, chhuan awm chhung zawng zawngin chutah chuan an awm ang." 
Isaiah34:17 Ani chuan an tan thum a vawrsak a, a kutin hruia tehin ram chu a semsak hlawm a; kumkhuain an nei ang a, chhuan awm chhung zawng zawngin chutah chuan an awm ang." 
Isaiah35:1 Thlaler leh ram pilril chu a lawm ang a; ram ro chu a hlimin phul pangpar angin a par ang. 
Isaiah35:2 A par vul chuk ang a, lawm tak leh hla sain a hlim ang; Lebanon ropuina chu a hnenah pek a ni ang, Karmel leh Saron mawina nen: LALPA ropuina an hmu ang, kan Pathian mawina nen." 
Isaiah35:3 Kut chak lote chu tichak u la, khup zawite chu tinghet rawh u." 
Isaiah35:4 Thinlung dawihte hnenah chuan, ""chak takin awm u la, hlau suh u: ngai teh u, in Pathian chu phuba lakna nen a lo kal ang, Pathian thungrulhna nen chuan; a lo kal ang a, a chhandam ang che u,"" ti rawh u." 
Isaiah35:5 Chumi hnuah chuan mitdelte mit chu tihmenin a awm ang a, bengngawngte beng chu tihvarin a awm ang." 
Isaiah35:6 Chumi hunah chuan ke baite chu sakhi angin an zuang ang a, tawngtheilote lei chu hlim takin a zai ang: thlalerah chuan tuite a lo chik chhuak luah luah dawn si a, ram rovah chuan luite tui a lo chik chhuak luah luah bawk ang." 
Isaiah35:7 Tichuan tiau dip sa tak hmun chu dilah a chang ang a, lei tuihal tak chu tuihnaahte a chang ang: sihalte chenna an mutnaah chuan, hlobet, phairuang leh phungladin nen a awm ang." 
Isaiah35:8 Tin, chutah chuan lamlian a awm ang, kawng nen, chu chu ""Thianghlimna Kawng"" an ti ang a; mi bawlhhlawh chu chutah chuan an kal lo ang; amaherwahchu chu mite an a ni zawk ang: mi zin veivakte, a ni, mi ate pawh, chutah chuan an bo lo ang." 
Isaiah35:9 Sakeibaknei reng reng chutah chuan a awm lo ang a, sa koham reng reng chutah chuan a chho hek lo ang, chutah chuan hmuh tur pawh a awm lo ang; tlante erawh chu chutah chuan an kal zawk ang:tin, LALPA tlante chu an kir leh ang a, hla sa chungin Zion chu an thleng ang a; chatuana lawmna an lu chungah a awm tawh ang: hlimna leh lawmna an hmu ang a, lungngaihna leh rumna chu a bo tawh ang." 
Isaiah35:10 tin, LALPA tlante chu an kir leh ang a, hla sa chungin Zion chu an thleng ang a; chatuana lawmna an lu chungah a awm tawh ang: hlimna leh lawmna an hmu ang a, lungngaihna leh rumna chu a bo tawh ang." 
Isaiah36:1 Tin, Hezekia lal kum sawm leh kum lina kumah chuan heti hi a ni a, Assuria ram lal Senakeriba chu Juda rama khua kulhpui nei zawng zawng bei turin a han chho a, a la ta a." 
Isaiah36:2 Tin, Assuria lal chuan Rabsakeba chu sipaiho tam tak hruaiin Lakis khua atangin Jerusalem khuaa lal Hezekia hnenah chuan a ti ra. Tin, dil chhakta zawk tuilakna kianga puan sutu phul lamlianah chuan a din ga." 
Isaiah36:3 Chutichuan lal chhungte chunga hotua awm Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkha ziaktu Sebnaa te, chanchin ziaktu Asaphaa fapa Joa-te chu a hnenah an lo chhuak a." 
Isaiah36:4 Tin, Rabsakehan an hnenah, ""Hezekia hnenah heti hian sawi rawh u, 'Lal ropui tak Assuria lal chuan heti hian a ti, I rinna i nghahna hi eng nge ni le?" 
Isaiah36:5 Indona atan chuan i remruat leh i chakna hi thu mai mai a ni, ka ti: tu nge i rin a, ka chunga i hel tak ni le?" 
Isaiah36:6 Ngai teh, he luang sawp tiang, Aigupta-ho hi, i ring a nih hi; chumi chu miin a rinchhan chuan akutah a chhun lut nhgawt ang; Aigupta lal Pharaoa chu amah ringtu zawng zawng chungah chuan chutiang chu a ni thin." 
Isaiah36:7 A nih loh leh, ka hnenah, LALPA kan Pathian chu a ni kan rin ni, i tih chuan, ani chu Hezekian Juda-ho hnenah leh Jerusalem-ho hnenah, He maicham hmaah chauh hian in be tur a ni, tiin, a hmun sangte leh a maichamte a lak bosak kha a ni lo'm ni?" 
Isaiah36:8 Chutichuan, khawngaih takin, ka pu Assuria lal hnenah chuan thu tiam rawh, tichuan keiin sakawr sanghnih ka pe ang che, nangin a chunga chuangtu turte i hmuh theih dawn phawt chuan." 
Isaiah36:9 Engtin nge, tawlailirte leh sakwar chung chuang mite la thu-ah Aiugupta-ho chunga i rinna nghatin, ka pu chhiahhlawh te berte zinga hotu pakhat pawh hi i dan zawh dawn le?" 
Isaiah36:10 Tin, he ram hi tichhe tura bei turin LALPA tel loa lo chho em ka nih? LALPA'n ka hnenah, Chu ram chu bei turin chho la, tichhe rawh, mi ti a ni,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah36:11 Tin, Eliakima leh Sebnaa leh Joate chuan, Rabsakeha hnenah, ""Khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawhte hi Suria tawngin min be awh rawh; chu chu kan hre thei si a: kulh bang chunga mite beng hriatah Juda tawngin min be tawh suh,"" an ti a." 
Isaiah36:12 Nimahsela Rabsakeha chuan, ""Ka pu chuan i pu hnen chauhvah leh i hnen chauhvah he'ng thu hi sawi turin mi tir em ni? Kulh bang chhunga thuho, nangmahni nena mahni ek la ei tur leh mahni zun la in turte hnenah hian mi tir zawk ani lawm ni?"" a ti a." 
Isaiah36:13 Ti Rabsakeha chu a ding a, Juda tawngin aw ring takin a au a, ""Lal ropui tak Assuria lal thute hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Isaiah36:14 Lal chuan heti hian a ti, 'Hezekia bumin awm duh suh u; ani chuan a chhanhim thei dawn si lo cheh u:" 
Isaiah36:15 Hezekian, LALPA chuan matheiloin min chhanhim ang; he khawpui hi Assuria lal kutah pekin a awm lo ang, tiin sawi mah se la, LALPA chu Hezekia sawi angin ringduh chuang hek suh u." 
Isaiah36:16 ,17 Hezekia thu ngaithla suh u: Assuria lal chuan heti hian a sawi si a, Min rem ula, ka hnenah hian lo chhuak rawh u; tin, ka lo kal a, nangmahni ram anga bu leh uain awmna ram, chhang leh grep huante awmna rama ka kalpui hma loh che u chuan, mi tinin mahni grep huia mi leh mi tinin mahni theipui kunga mi ei theuh ula, i tinin mahni tuikhur tui in theuh rawh u." 
Isaiah36:17 ,16 Hezekia thu ngaithla suh u: Assuria lal chuan heti hian a sawi si a, Min rem ula, ka hnenah hian lo chhuak rawh u; tin, ka lo kal a, nangmahni ram anga bu leh uain awmna ram, chhang leh grep huante awmna rama ka kalpui hma loh che u chuan, mi tinin mahni grep huia mi leh mi tinin mahni theipui kunga mi ei theuh ula, i tinin mahni tuikhur tui in theuh rawh u." 
Isaiah36:18 LALPA'n min chhanhim ang, tia Hezekian a thlem tak dah che uin fimkhur rawh u. Hnam tin pathian zinga mi reng rengin an ram chu Assuria lal lakah an chhanhim ta em ni?" 
Isaiah36:19 Hamath leh Arpad-ho pathiante kha khawiah nge an awm tak? Sepharvaim-ho pathiante kha khawiahnge an awm tak? Samari khua kha ka lakah an chhanhim ta em ni? 
Isaiah36:20 Chung ram pathian zawng zawng zinga mi chuan tute nge an ram ka lakah chhanhim ni? LALPA chuan Jerusalem khua hi ka lakah a chhanhim tehchai ang maw?' tiin,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah36:21 Anni erawh chu an ngawi reng a, thu pakhat mahin an chhang lo: lal thupek chu, ""Ani chu chhang suh u,"" tih a ni si a.Chutichuan lal chhungte chunga hotua awm Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkha ziaktu Sebnaa te, chanchin ziaktu Asaphaa fapa Joa-te chu silhfen pawhthler inbelin Hezekia hnenah chuan an lo thleng a, Rabsakeha thu sawite chu an hrilh ta a." 
Isaiah36:22 Chutichuan lal chhungte chunga hotua awm Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkha ziaktu Sebnaa te, chanchin ziaktu Asaphaa fapa Joa-te chu silhfen pawhthler inbelin Hezekia hnenah chuan an lo thleng a, Rabsakeha thu sawite chu an hrilh ta a." 
Isaiah37:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal Hezekia chuan chu chu a hriat veleh a silhfente chu a pawt thler a, saiip puan a inbel a, LALPA inah chuan a lut ta a," 
Isaiah37:2 Tin, a chhungte chunga hotua awm Eliakima leh, lehkha ziaktu Sebnaa leh, puithiamho upate chu saiip puan inbelin Amozaa fapa zawlnei Isaia hnenah a tir a." 
Isaiah37:3 Tin, anni chuan a hnenah, ""Hezekian heti hian a ti, 'Vawiin ni hi manganna leh hmusitna ni a ni: naute chu an pian a hun tawh si a, anmahni hring turin chakna a awm tawh si lo." 
Isaiah37:4 Rabsakeha, a pu Assirua lalin Pathian nung sawichhe tura a tirha thu sawite chu, LALPA i Pathian chuan a bengin a la hria a ni thei e, tichuan a thu sawi, LALPA i Pathianin a benga a hriatahte chuan, a la zilhhau ang: chu mi avang chuan a la awm chhunte tan chuan i tawngtaina chu hlan chho rawh,' a ti e,"" an ti a." 
Isaiah37:5 chutichuan lal Jezekia chhiahhlawhte chu Isaia hnenah an lo kal a. 
Isaiah37:6 Tin, Isaian an hnenah, ""In pu hnenah heti hian in sawi tur a ni, 'LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, I thu hriat, Assuria lal chhiahhlawhten mi sawichhiatnate kha, hlau suh." 
Isaiah37:7 Ngai teh, a kawchhungah chuan thlarau engema ka awmtir ang a, tichuan thuthang a hria ang a, ama ramah a haw leh ang; tichuan ama ram ngeiah chuan khandaiha tihtlukin ka awmtir ang, a ti e,' tiin,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah37:8 Chutichuan Rabsakeha chu a kir leh a, Assuria lal chuan Libnah khua a bei lai chu a va hmu a; Lakis khua ata chu a kal chhuak tawh tih a hre tawh reng si a." 
Isaiah37:9 Tin, Assuria lal Senakeriba chuan Tirhaka, Ethiopia ram lal chungchang thu, ""Nangmah bei turin a chhuak ta,"" tiin mi sawi a hria. Tichuan chu chu a hriat veleh Jezekia hnenah palaite a tir a," 
Isaiah37:10 Heti hian Juda-ho lal Jezekia hnenah in sawi tur a ni, 'I rin Pathian chuan, Jerusalem khua Assuria lal kutah pek a ni lo ang, tiin bum che suh se." 
Isaiah37:11 Ngai teh, Asuria lalten ram zawng zawng tichhe vekin an chunga an thiltihte kha i bengin i hria e: tichuan nang tehlul hi chhanhimin i awm dawn bik em ni?" 
Isaiah37:12 hnam tin pathiante chuan, Gozan-ho te, Haran-ho te, Razep-ho te, Eden fa Telasar khuaa awm te, min thlahtuten an tihboralte kha, an chhanhim em ni?" 
Isaiah37:13 Hamath lal te, Arpad lal te, Sepharvaim khawpui lal te, Hena lal te, Ivah lal te kha khawiah nge an awm tak?' tiin,"" a ti a." 
Isaiah37:14 Tin, Hezekia chuan palaite kut ata lehkha chu a hmu a, a han chhiar a: tichuan Jezekia chu LALPA inah chuan a han lut a, LALPA hmaah chuan a phah ta a." 
Isaiah37:15 Tin, Jezekia chuan LALPA hnenah a tawngtai a," 
Isaiah37:16 Aw sipaihote LALPA, Israel-ho Pathian, chrub chunga thua, nang hi, nang chauh hi, leilung luah ram zawng zawng Pathian chu i ni; nang chuan lei leh van hi i siam a ni." 
Isaiah37:17 Aw LALPA, i beng rawn dawh la, ngaithla teh; aw LALPA, i mit meng la, en teh: Pathian nung sawichhe tura mite tirtu Senakeriba thu zawng zawng hi ngaithla teh." 
Isaiah37:18 LALPA, Assuria lalten ram zawng zawng leh an lei chu an tichhe ngei tak a," 
Isaiah37:19 an pathiante chu meiah an paih bawk a: chungte chu pathian an ni lo reng a ni, mihing kuta siam, thing leh lung an ni zawk; chuvangin an tiboral a ni." 
Isaiah37:20 Chuvangin aw LALPA kan Pathian, nang hi, nang chauh hi, LALPA i ni tih leilung luah ram zawng zawng hian an hriat theihna'n a lakah min chhandam ang che,"" tiin." 
Isaiah37:21 Chumi lai chuan Amozaa fapa Isaia chuan Jezekia hnenah mi a tir a, heti hian a ti a, ""LALPA Israel-ho Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni, 'Assuria lal Senakeriba chhiatna tur lama ka hnenah i tawngtai avangin," 
Isaiah37:22 hei hi a chungchang thu LALPA'n a sawi chu a ni: Zion fanu nula chuan a hmusit chia, a nuihsan che, Jerusalem fanu chuan a lu a thin khum che." 
Isaiah37:23 Tunge i tihhmingchhiata i sawichhiat ni? Tu chungah nge i aw i tihpawra i mit i tihsan? Israel ho Mi Thianghlim chung ngeiah. 
Isaiah37:24 I chhiahhlawhte hmangin LALPA chu i tihmingchhia a, Ka tawlailir tam ak nen tlang hmun zo, Lebanon ram rilahte hian ka lo thelng chho ta a; a sidar thing sang takte leh a far thing tha mite hi ka kit ang a: a hmun zo hla ber, a lei tha hmun ram ngawh chuan ka lut ang." 
Isaiah37:25 Tuichhunchhuah ka lai a, tui ka in thin a, ka kephah hnuai hian Aigupta lui zawng zawng chu ka tikang vek ang, i ti a." 
Isaiah37:26 keima'n hman lai ata chung chu ka tih a ni a, hmasang ata chung chu ka siam a ni tih i hre lo em ni? Kulhpui nei khuate tichim turin ka ti che a ni." 
Isaiah37:27 Chuvangin a chhunga awmte chu an chak mang lo a, an hlau a, an lo mualpho tak kha; phul hlobet ang leh, hnim hring ang leh, in chunga hlobet ang leh, lo buh that hma ang lek an nih kha." 
Isaiah37:28 Kei erawh chuan i thut te, i chhuah te, i luh te, ka chunga i thinurziate hi ka hria a sin." 
Isaiah37:29 ka chunga i thinur avang leh, i tawng chaltlaizia chu ka bengah a lo luh chhoh tak avang hian ka hnar vuah chu i hnarha ka vuah ang a, ka thirbarh chu i hmuiah ka vuah bawk ang a, i lo kalna kawng ngeiah khan ka kirtir leh ang che, tih hi,' tiin." 
Isaiah37:30 Tin, hei hi i tan chhinchhiahna tur chu a ni ang: kuminah hian buh hli in ring ang a; nakkumah pawh chu mi hlibawk chu in ring ang; tin, a kum thumnaah chuan buh tuh u la, at u la, grep huante siam u la, a rah ei rawh u." 
Isaiah37:31 Tin, Juda chhungte zinga la dam chhunte chu a chhukzawnga zung kaia, a chho zawnga rahin a awm leh ang." 
Isaiah37:32 Jerusalem atangin a la awm chhunte chu an chhuak ang a, Zion tlang atangin a la dam turte chu an chhuak bawk ang: sipaihote LALPA thahnemngaihna chuan chung chu a ti ang."
