Isaiah59:5 Rulmuk tuite an awp keu a, maimawm ril puan an tah thin: an tui eitute chu an thi thin a, tihkeha awmah chuan rul a lo chhuak thin." 
Isaiah59:6 An maimawm ril puan chu silhfenahte a chang lo ang a, an thiltihte chu an inbel hek lo ang: an thiltihte chu khawlohna thiltihte a ni a, thil rawng taka tihna chu an kutah a awm bawk a." 
Isaiah59:7 An kete chu thil tha lo lamah a tlan thin a, thisen sawiselbo chhuah turin an hmanhmawh thin: an ngaihtuahte chu khawlohna ngaihtuahnate a ni thin a; tiauna leh chhiatna chu an kawngahte a awm thin." 
Isaiah59:8 Thlamuanna kawng an hre lo a; an kalhnaahte chuan dikna reng reng a am ngai lo: an tan kawng kawite an siam a; chuta kal apiang chuan thlamuanna an hre ngai lo. 
Isaiah59:9 Chuvangin rorelna chu keimahni atanga hla takah a awm thin a, felna chuan min um phak ngai hek lo: eng kan nghak thin a, nimahsela, ngai teh, thim a lo ni thin; enna kan nghak thin a, nimahsela thim mupah bawk kan kal thin." 
Isaiah59:10 Mitdel angin bang kan dap dun dun thin a, a ni, mit nei lote angin kan dap dun dun thin: thimhlim ang maiin chhunah kan inchhuih thin a; mi chakte zingah chuan mitthi ang mai kan ni." 
Isaiah59:11 Savawmte angin kan zain kan huk dur dur thin a, thurote angin nasa takin kan rum nghuat nghuat thin: rorelna kan nghak thin a, nimahsela a awm hauh si lo a; chhandamna kan nghak thin a, nimahsela keimahni atangin hla takah a awm thin." 
Isaiah59:12 Kan bawhchhiatnate hi i hmaah a pung ta si a, kan sualnate hian min hek thin a ni: kan bawhchhiatnate hi kan hnenah a awm reng si a, kan khawlohnate zawng kan hria a ni:" 
Isaiah59:13 kan bawhchiat te, LALPA kan phatsan te, kan Pathian zui zel loa kan hawisan te, hnehchhiah thu leh hel thu kan sawi te, dawt thu kan pai a, thinlung ata kan sawi chhuah thinte hi." 
Isaiah59:14 Tichuan rorelna chuan hnung lam min hawisan a, felna chuan hla takah min dinsan ta: thutak chu kawtthlerah a tlu reng si a, dikna chu a lut thei lo a ni." 
Isaiah59:15 A ni, thutak a awm ta lo a; thil tha lo bansantu chu rallakah a insiam thin: tichuan LALPA'n chu chu a hmu a, rorelna reng reng awm ta lo chuan a tilungni ta lo a." 
Isaiah59:16 Tin, mi reng reng an awm lo tih a hria a, dilsaktu reng reng an awm lo chu mak a ti a: chuangin ama ban ngei chuan chhandamna a insiam a; ama felna ngei chuan a inchelh ding ta a." 
Isaiah59:17 Tin, felna chu awmphawah a ha a, chhandamna lukhum akhum a; tin, inthuamnaah chuan phuba lakna silhfente chu a inbel a, kawrfualah chuan thahnemngaihna a ha a." 
Isaiah59:18 An thiltihte angin, an thiltihte ang ngeiin ani chuan a thungrul ani chuan a thungrula ng, amah dotute chu thinrimnain, a hmelmate chu thungrulhnain a thungrul ang; thliarkarte chu thungrulhnain a thungrul ang." 
Isaiah59:19 Chutichuan LALPA hming chu tlang lam atangin LALPA hming chu tlang lam atangin an tih ang a, a ropuina ni chhuahna atangin an tih bawk ang; ani chu tui lian thut, LALPA thawa chhem luan vut vut angin a lo kal dawn si a." 
Isaiah59:20 Tin, Zion-ah chuan tlantu a lo kal ang a, Jakob-ho zinga bawhchhiatna hawisantute hnenah pawh a lo kal ang, LALPA'n a ti:Kei zawng hei hi a ni, an hnena ka thuthlun chu ni LAPAN a ti: ka thlarau i chunga awm leh, ka thu i kaa ka dahte chuan, tun achinah chatuan thleng pawhin i ka chu an chhuahsan lo ang a, i thlahte ka chu an chhuahsan hek lo ang a, i thlahte thlah leh chhawng ka pawh tun atanga kumkhuain an chhuahsan hek lo ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Isaiah59:21 Kei zawng hei hi a ni, an hnena ka thuthlun chu ni LAPAN a ti: ka thlarau i chunga awm leh, ka thu i kaa ka dahte chuan, tun achinah chatuan thleng pawhin i ka chu an chhuahsan lo ang a, i thlahte ka chu an chhuahsan hek lo ang a, i thlahte thlah leh chhawng ka pawh tun atanga kumkhuain an chhuahsan hek lo ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Isaiah60:1 Tho la, eng rawh; i eng chu a lo thleng a, LALPA ni ropuina chu i chunga lo chhuah tak hi." 
Isaiah60:2 Ngai teh, thimin leilung hi a khuh dawn si a, thim chhah mupin mite a khuh bawk dawn a ni: nimahsela LALPA chu i chungah a lo chhuak ang a, a ropuina chu i chungah a la lang ang." 
Isaiah60:3 Tichuan hnam tin i eng lamah an lo kal ang a, lalte pawh i lo chhuah enna lamah an lo kal bawk ang." 
Isaiah60:4 Dak la, i mit len vel la, en rawh: an zain an inkhawm a, i hnenah an lo kal a nih hi: i fapate chu hla tak atangin an lo kal ang a, i fanute chu an rawn pawm ang." 
Isaiah60:5 Chumi hunah chuan i hmu ang a, i eng tawh ang a, i thinlung chu a khur a, tihzauin a awm ang; tuifinriata sumdawnna tam tak mai chuan i hnen lam a pan dawn avang leh, hnam tin sum chuan i hnen a lo thlen dawn avangin." 
Isaiah60:6 Sanghawngsei tam tak mai chuan an tuam dul dul ang che, Midian leh Epha rama Sanghawngsei tuaite chuan; chung zawng zawng chu Seba ram atangin an lo kal ang: rangkachak leh beraw an rawn phur ang a, LALPA fakna thu an hriattir ang." 
Isaiah60:7 Kedar-ho ran rual zawng i hnenah an lo kal khawm ang a, Nebai-otha-ho berampate chuan i rawng an bawl ang: ka maichamah chuan lawmin an chho ang a, ka ropuinain chu ka chawimawi ang." 
Isaiah60:8 Chhum anga thlawkte leh, thuro anmahni tukverh pana thlawk noh noh anga thlawkte saw tute nge ni?" 
Isaiah60:9 Ani chuan a chawimawi che avangin LALPA i Pathian hming atan leh Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim atan chuan i fapate an tangka leh rangkachak nen hla tak atanga hruai turin matheiloin thliarkarte chuan mi nghak ang a, Tarsis lawng liante chuan hmasak ber an chuh ang." 
Isaiah60:10 Tin, ram dang mite chuan i kulh bangte chu an rem chho leh ang a, an lalte pawhin i rawng an bawl tawh ang; ka thinrim chuan ka vua chian, nimahsela ka duhsaknain ka khawngaih si che a nih hi." 
Isaiah60:11 I kawngkharte pawh hawnin a awm areng ang a; a chhun azanin an khar lo ang; miten hnam tin sum chu i hnenah an rawn laka, an lalte pawh an rawn hruai ve theihna'n." 
Isaiah60:12 I rawng bawl duh lo hnam leh ram chu a boral dawn si a; a ni, chung hnamte chu tihchhiat hlauhin an awm ang." 
Isaiah60:13 Ka hmun thianghlim cheimawi turin Lebanon ropuina chu i hnenah a lo kal ang, far te, phan te, tuifar te chu an lo kal tlang ang; tichuan ka ke rahna hmun chu ka tiropui ang." 
Isaiah60:14 Tin, nangmah tiretheituteho fapate chu kunin i hnenah an lo kal ang a; nangmah hmusittute zawng zawng chu chibai bukin i kehphah hnuaiah an kun ang; nang chu ""LALPA khawpui,"" ""Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim Zion,"" an ti ang che." 
Isaiah60:15 Tuma tlawh ngai loh khawpa kalsan leh huata i awm aiah kumkhaw chhuan ber, chhuan tam tak lawmnaah ka siam ang che." 
Isaiah60:16 Tin, hnam tin hnutetui i fawp ang a, lalho hnute pawh i hne ang: kei LALPA hi nangmah chhandamtu leh nangmah tlantu, Jakob-ho Mi Chaka chu ka ni tih i la hre bawk ang." 
Isaiah60:17 Dar aiah rangkachak ka rawn la ang a, thir aiah pawh tangkarua ka rawn la ang, thing aiah pawh dar, lung aiah pawh thir: thlamuanna chu i hotuah ka ruat bawk ang a, felna chu nangmah phuttuah ka ruat ang." 
Isaiah60:18 Rang taka thiltih thawm chu i ramah hriat a ni tawh lo ang a, tiauna leh chhiatna thawm pawh chu i ramah hriat a ni tawh lo ang a, tiauna leh chhiatna thawm pawh i ramri chhungah rhiat a ni tawh lo ang; i kulh chu ""Chhandamna,"" i ti zawk ang a, i kawngkharte pawh ""Fakna,"" i ti bawk ang." 
Isaiah60:19 Ni khi chhunah nangmah entu a ni tawh lo ang;a thla pawh khian enna turin a tieng hek lo ang che: LALPA erawh chu i tan kumkhaw entuah a awm ang a, i Pathian chu i ropuina atan a awm bawk ang." 
Isaiah60:20 I ni chu a tla tawh lo ang a, i thla pawh chu a rla thaw hek lo ang: LALPA chu i kumkhaw entu a ni dawn tawh si a, i lusun nite chu a tawp dawn tawh a ni." 
Isaiah60:21 I mite pawh an zain mi fel an i ang a, i ram hi an luah kumkhua ang; chawimawi ka awm theihna turin anni chu a zung puak chhuak ka phun, ka kut chhuak chu, an ni ang.In zinga hnam te ber pawh hnam ropui tak an ni ang a, hnam tlemte pawh hnam chak tak an ni ang: kei LALPA hian a hun hunah chuan ka thlentir thuai ang." 
Isaiah60:22 In zinga hnam te ber pawh hnam ropui tak an ni ang a, hnam tlemte pawh hnam chak tak an ni ang: kei LALPA hian a hun hunah chuan ka thlentir thuai ang." 
Isaiah61:1 Thuhnuairawlhte hnenah chanchin tha hril tura LALPA'n hriak mi thih avangin Lalpa PATHIAN thlarau chu ka chungah a awm; ani chuan thinlung lungchhiate tuam tur te, salte hnena chhuahna thu leh mi tangte hnena tan in hawnna thu sawi tur te," 
Isaiah61:2 LALPA lungawi kum thu leh kan Pathian phuba lak ni thu sawi tur te, lungngai zawng zawng thlamuan tur te," 
Isaiah61:3 vut aiah pangpar thihrui te, lungnaih aiah hlimna hriak te, nguina thlarau aiah fakna silhfente an hnenah pekah Zion-a lungngaia awmte tan ruat tur tein mi tir a ni: ani chu chawimawia a awmna turin, felna thing, LALPA phunte, tih an nih theihna'n." 
Isaiah61:4 Tin, hmun hlui chhe tawhte chu an rem leh ang a, tun hmaa khaw lo tiau tawhte chu an din tha leh ang a, khawpui chhe tawh, chhuan tam tak tiaunate chu an siam tha leh ang." 
Isaiah61:5 Tin, ram dang mite chuan in ran rualte chu dingin an tlattir ang a, hriat ngai loh mite chu in leilettu-ahte leh in grep hrui enkawltuahte an awm ang." 
Isaiah61:6 nangni erawh chu, ""LALPA puithiamte, "" tia vuaih in awm ang a: miten, ""Kan Pathian rawngbawltute,"" an ti ang che u: hnam tin sum in ei ang a, an ropuina chu in inchhuan phah ang." 
Isaiah61:7 In mualpho aiah a leh hnih in hmu ang a; in zah aiah in chanvovah hlimin in zai ang: chuvangin in ramah chuan a leh hnih in luah ang a: kumkhaw hlimna in hnenah a awm ang. 
Isaiah61:8 Kei LALPA hian rorelan fel ka ngaina si thin a, khawlo taka ram hi ka haw thin a ni; tichuan anmahni ka rulhna chu tihtak meuhin an hnenah ka pe ang a, an hnenah kumkhaw thu ka thlung bawk ang." 
Isaiah61:9 Tichuan an thlahte chu hnam tin zingah hriat an ni ang a, an fate chu mi tin zingah hriat an ni bawk ang: anmahni hmu apiangin LALPA malsawm chi an ni tih an hria ang." 
Isaiah61:10 LALPA-ah chuan nasa takin ka hlim ang a, ka nunna hi ka Pathianah chuan lawm takin a awm ang; mo neitu tur chu pangpar thihruia a inchei thin ang leh, mo tur chu a incheinatea a inchei thin ang hian, ani chuan chhandamna silhfente mi bel a, felna kawrfualin mi tuam ta si a.Leilung hian a thil chawr chu a chhuahtir ang leh, huan hian a chhunga thil chinte chu a chawrtir ang hian, Lalpa Pathian chuan felna leh rfakna hnam tinreng hmaah chuan a chawrtir dawn si a." 
Isaiah61:11 Leilung hian a thil chawr chu a chhuahtir ang leh, huan hian a chhunga thil chinte chu a chawrtir ang hian, Lalpa Pathian chuan felna leh rfakna hnam tinreng hmaah chuan a chawrtir dawn si a." 
Isaiah62:1 A felna chu enna anga a chhuah a, amah chhandamna chu khawnvar alh anga a chhuah hma loh chuan, Zion avangin ka ngawi reng lo ang a, Jerusalem avangin ka awm hle hle lo ang." 
Isaiah62:2 Tichuan hnam tinin i felna chu an hmu ang a, lal zawng zawngin i ropuina chu an hmu bawk ang: tin, hming thar, LALPA kain a vuah tur chuan an ko ang che." 
Isaiah62:3 LALPA kuta mawina lallukhum leh i Pathian kuta ropuina lukhum i ni bawk ang. 
Isaiah62:4 Mak,"" an ti leh tawh lo ang che; i ram pawh chu ""Tihtiau,"" an ti leh tawh hek lo ang: ""Duhlai,"" an ti tawh zawk ang chia, i ram pawhin pasal a nei dawn a ni." 
Isaiah62:5 tlangvalin nula nupuia an nei thin ang hian ifapaten nupuiah an nei ang che: mo neitu chu mo chungah a lawm angin, i Pathian chu i chungah a lawm ang." 
Isaiah62:6 ,7 Aw Jerusalem, i kulh chungah ralvengtute ka ventir a; a chhun azanin engtikah mah an ngawi lo ang: Jerusalem hi a tihngheha,m leiah hian fakawma a siam hma loh chuan, nangni LALPA hriatpuitua awmte u, awm hle hle hlek suh u la, amah pawh chu awm hle hletir hlek suh u." 
Isaiah62:7 ,6 Aw Jerusalem, i kulh chungah ralvengtute ka ventir a; a chhun azanin engtikah mah an ngawi lo ang: Jerusalem hi a tihngheha,m leiah hian fakawma a siam hma loh chuan, nangni LALPA hriatpuitua awmte u, awm hle hle hlek suh u la, amah pawh chu awm hle hletir hlek suh u." 
Isaiah62:8 ,9 LALPA'n, ""I buh chu nangmah dotute chawah ka pe leh tawh hauh lo ang a: ram dang miten i thawh chhuah uain chu an in tawh lo ang: a sengtute chuan an ei tawh zawk ang a, LALPA chu an fak ang; a lotute chuan ka hmun thianghlim hung chhung kawtlaiah chuan an in tawh ang,"" tiin a kut ding lam leh a ban chak tak chhalin chhia a chham ta." 
Isaiah62:9 ,8 LALPA'n, ""I buh chu nangmah dotute chawah ka pe leh tawh hauh lo ang a: ram dang miten i thawh chhuah uain chu an in tawh lo ang: a sengtute chuan an ei tawh zawk ang a, LALPA chu an fak ang; a lotute chuan ka hmun thianghlim hung chhung kawtlaiah chuan an in tawh ang,"" tiin a kut ding lam leh a ban chak tak chhalin chhia a chham ta." 
Isaiah62:10 Chhuak u la, kulh kawngkaahte chhuak rawh u; mite tan kawng buatsaih u la; chhung pawng u la, lamlian chu chhung pawng rawh u; lungte chu chhar fai u la; mite tan chhinchhiahna tar chhuak rawh u." 
Isaiah62:11 Ngai teh u, LALPA'n kawlkil thlengin heti hian a hriattir a ni, ""Zion fanu hnenah heti hian sawi rawh u, 'En teh, nangmah chhandamna a lo thlen dawn hi; en teh, a lawmman chu a hnenah a awm hi, a rulhna chu ahmaah a awm bawk a.Tichuan anni chu, Mi thianghlimho, LALPA tlante an ti ang a: nang chu, Zawn chhuah, Kalsan loh khawpui, an ti ang che,' tiin, "" a ti a." 
Isaiah62:12 Tichuan anni chu, Mi thianghlimho, LALPA tlante an ti ang a: nang chu, Zawn chhuah, Kalsan loh khawpui, an ti ang che,' tiin, "" a ti a." 
Isaiah63:1 Edom ram atanga lo kal, Bozrah khua atanga silhfen thihsen sin saw tu nge ni? A puan sina ropui tak, nasa taka chaka lo kal saw? Keimah, fel taka thu sawia, chhandam kawnga mi chak taka kha ka ni." 
Isaiah63:2 Eng vangin nge i puan sin kha a sen a, i silhfente pawh kha grep sawrna khura rap sawrtu silhfen anga a awm ni?" 
Isaiah63:3 Keimah chauhin grep sawrna khurah ka rap sawr a; mi tin zinga mi pakhat mah ka hnenah an awm ve lo va: a ni, anni chu ka thinurin ka rap a, ka thinrimin ka chil a; tichuan an nunna thisen chu ka silhfenahte hian thehin a awm a, ka puan zawng zawng hi ka tibawlhhlawh ta a." 
Isaiah63:4 Phuba lak ni chu ka thinlungah a awm si a, ka mi tlante kum chu a lo thleng ta bawk a ni." 
Isaiah63:5 Tichuan ka han en a, tanpuitu tur reng reng an awm lo a; chelh dingtu reng reng an awm lo chu mak ka ti a: chuvangin keima ban ngei hian chhandamna mi thlen a; ka thinrimna chuan mi chelh ding ta a." 
Isaiah63:6 Tichan mi tin chu ka rap bet a, ka thinrimin ka tirui a, an nunna thisen chu leiah ka baw ta." 
Isaiah63:7 LALPA thil engkima min vur avangin LALPA ngilneihzia thute leh LALPA fakna thute ka sawi ang a; a khawngaihnate leh a ngilneihna a nasat avangin Israela chhungte laka a thatna nasa taka an chunga a vur thu pawh kha ka sawi bawk ang. 
Isaiah63:8 Ani chuan, ""Ka mite, fa adera ti lo turte, an ni ngei mai,"" a ti si a: chutichuan anmahni chhandamtuah a lo awm ta a." 
Isaiah63:9 An manganna zawng zawngah chuan ani chu amangang ve thin a, vantirhkoih, a hmaa awm mi chuan, anni chu a chhanhim bawk thin a: a hmangaihna leh a khawngiahnain a tlan ta hlawm a; hmasang ni zawng zawngah chuan anmahni a puain anmahni a pawm thin." 
Isaiah63:10 Nimahsela an hel a, a thlarau thianghlim chu an tilungngai ta a: chuvangin anmahni dotua awm tura tihlamletin a awm a, amah ngei chuan anni chu a bei ta a." 
Isaiah63:11 Chumi lai chuan amite chuan Mosia hmasang nite chu an hre reng a, heti hian an ti, ""Tuifinriat atanga a beram rual vengtue nena anmahni hruai chhotu kha khawiah nge? A thlarau thianghlim an zinga dahtu kha khawiah nge?" 
Isaiah63:12 A ban ropui tak Mosia ding lama kaltirtu kha khawiah nge? Kumkhaw hming insiam nana an hmaa tui tithentu kha khawiah nge? 
Isaiah63:13 An inchhuih lohna tura tui thuk taka, thlalera sakawr hruai anga anmahniho hruaia kaitu kha khawiah nge?" 
Isaiah63:14 Ruama ran chhukte angin LALPA thlarau chuan anniho chu a chawlhtir a: chutiang chuan, hming ropui tak i insiamna'n i mite chu i hruai kha,"" tiin." 
Isaiah63:15 Van atang khan rawn thlir thla la, i thianghlimna leh i ropuina awmna atang khan rawn en teh: i thahnemngaihna leh i thiltih ropui takte khakhawiah nge? i thinlunga i ngaihna leh i lainatnate kha kalak ah tihrehin a awm ta." 
Isaiah63:16 Abrahama'n min hre loin, Israela pawhin min ngaihsak lo mah se la, nang chu kan pa i ni si a; nang chu, aw LALPA,kanpa i ni a; i hming chu chatuan ata keimahni min tlantu a ni." 
Isaiah63:17 Aw LALPA, nangin eng vangin nge i kawng atangtea min vah botir thina, nangmah tih lo tura kan thinlung min tihkhauhsak thin le? i chhiahhlawh, i roluah hnamte avang hian, lokir leh rawh." 
Isaiah63:18 I mi thianghlimte chuan rei lo te chauh an nei a; min dotute chuan i hmun thianghlim chu an rap che ta a.An chunga ro i rel ngai lohte ang a,i hming pu ngai lote ang chu kan lo ni ta." 
Isaiah63:19 An chunga ro i rel ngai lohte ang a,i hming pu ngai lote ang chu kan lo ni ta." 
Isaiah64:1 ,2 Aw, hnam tin i hmaa an khurhna turin nangmah dotute hnenah i hming hriattir nan, meiin thingnawi a tialh a,mei chuan tuite a ti so ang hian tlangte chu i hmaa an luan thlak dul dulna'n, van kha tithlerin lo chhuk teh hram la aw!" 
Isaiah64:2 ,1 Aw, hnam tin i hmaa an khurhna turin nangmah dotute hnenah i hming hriattir nan, meiin thingnawi a tialh a,mei chuan tuite a ti so ang hian tlangte chu i hmaa an luan thlak dul dulna'n, van kha tithlerin lo chhuk teh hram la aw!" 
Isaiah64:3 Kan beisei loh thil rapthlak i tih lai khan i lo chhuk a, tlangte chu i hmaah an luan thlak dul dul kha." 
Isaiah64:4 Hmasang ata tawh miten, nangmah chauh lo chu, anmahni nghaktu atan thawksak thintu Pathian an hre ngai si lo a, bengin an hrengai hek lo a, mitin an hmu ngai hek lo." 
Isaiah64:5 Nang chuan, hlim taka awma fel taka titu, i kawngte nangmah hre reng thintute chu, i hmuak thin a: ngai teh, nang i thinur a, keinin thil kan tisual a: chungah te chuan rei tak kan lo awm tawh a, tichuan chhandamin kan la awm thei ang em?" 
Isaiah64:6 Mi bawlhhlawh angin kan lo awm ta vek si a, kan felna zawng zawngte pawh silhfen bawlhhlawh ang a ni a: kan zain hnah angin kan vuai thin a; kan khawlohnate hian thli angin min leh bo thin." 
Isaiah64:7 Tichuan i hming lama, nangmah chelh tura mahni intiharh tumah reng reng an awm lo: kan lakah hian i hmai i thup ta si a, kan lakah hian i hmai i thup ta si a, kan khawlohna te hmangin min toboral ta ni." 
Isaiah64:8 Tunah erawh chuan, aw LALPA nang chu kan pa i ni a; keini hi bellei kan ni a, nang min vawtu i ni; tichuan kan za hian i kut chhuak kan ni." 
Isaiah64:9 Aw LALPA, thinur nasa lutuk suh la,khawlohnate pawh kumkhua chuan hre reng heksuh ang che: ngai teh, khawngaih takin min en la, kan za hian i mite kan nih hi." 
Isaiah64:10 I khawpui thianghlimte chu thlalerah a lo chan a, Zion chu thlalerah a lo chan a, Jerusalem chu hmun tihtiauvah a lo chan tak hi." 
Isaiah64:11 Kan in thianghlim leh kan in mawi tak, kan puten an lo fak thinna che chu,meia hal a ni a; kan thil duhawmte zawng anwg lah chu tihchhiatin a awm ta vek si a.Aw LALPA, chung thilahte chuan i insum thei dawn em ni? I ngawi rengin min tirethei nasa reng dawn em ni?" 
Isaiah64:12 Aw LALPA, chung thilahte chuan i insum thei dawn em ni? I ngawi rengin min tirethei nasa reng dawn em ni?" 
Isaiah65:1 Mi lam ngai lote zawnin ka awm a, mi zawng ngai lote hmuhin ka awm a: ka hming pu lo hnam hnenah chuan, ""Mi en rawh u, mi en rawh u,"" ka ti a." 
Isaiah65:2 Mi helhmangte tan nilengin ka bante ka phar thin, chungho chu anmahni ngaihtuahteang zela kawng tha loa kal thinte," 
Isaiah65:3 huanahte inthawia, leirawh chan chungahte englo rimtui hala, ka hmaichhan ngeia mi tithinur thinte," 
Isaiah65:4 thlan zingahte thu a, hmun fianrialtea riak thinte, vawk sa eia, an beltea thil tenawm tuihang awm thinte," 
Isaiah65:5 Nangmah chauhin ding rawh, mi rawn hnaih suh, nang ai chuan ka thianghlim zawk hi,"" ti thinte chu an ni: chungho chu ka hnara mei khu awm, nilenga mei nung reng thin chu a ni." 
Isaiah65:6 ,7 Ngai teh u, ka hmaah ziakin a awm: ka ngawi reng lo ang a, ka thungrul zawk ang, a ni, an angchhungah nangmahni khawlohna leh in pute khawlohnate chu ka thungrul ve ve ang, LALPA'n a ti, chungho chuan tlang lian chungahte englo rimtui halin tlangte chungahte kan hming an sawiche thin: chuvangin an hming an sawichhe thin: chuvangi an hnathawh chu a hmasa berin an angchhungah ka tehsang a." 
Isaiah65:7 ,6 Ngai teh u, ka hmaah ziakin a awm: ka ngawi reng lo ang a, ka thungrul zawk ang, a ni, an angchhungah nangmahni khawlohna leh in pute khawlohnate chu ka thungrul ve ve ang, LALPA'n a ti, chungho chuan tlang lian chungahte englo rimtui halin tlangte chungahte kan hming an sawiche thin: chuvangin an hming an sawichhe thin: chuvangi an hnathawh chu a hmasa berin an angchhungah ka tehsang a." 
Isaiah65:8 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, ""Grep bawrah uain thar an hmu a, miin, 'Tichhe suh, khatah khan malsawmna a awm si,' an ti ang khan, ka chhaihhlawh avangin ka ti ve ang, an zaa ka tihchhiat vek lohna'n." 
Isaiah65:9 Tin, Jakoba atangin chi pakhat ka tichhuak ang a, Juda atangin ka tlangte luahtu tur ka tichhuak ang: tichuan ka mi thlante chuan chu chu an luah ang ang a, ka chhiahhlawhte chu chutah chuan an awm ang." 
Isaiah65:10 Tin, ka mi, mi zawngtute tan chuan, Saron chu beram rualho huang a ni ang a, Akor ruam chu bawng rualho bawhna hmun tur a ni ang." 
Isaiah65:11 Nimahsela nangni LALPA kalsana, ka tlang thianghlim theihnghilh a, vanneihna Siamtua tan dawhkan buatsaih a, Chantawka Khawrelsaktui tak uain chawhpawlh sa chhung khat thinte uain chawhpawlh sa chhung khat thinte uain chawlhpawlh sa chhung khat thinte u;" 
Isaiah65:12 ka koh lai che u khan mi in chhan duh loh a, thu ka sawi lai khan benga in hriat duh loh a, ka mithmuha thil sual chu in tih zawka, ka thil lawm loh zawng chu in thlan avangin khandaihin in chantawka khua chu ka relsak ang che u a, in zain thahnaah chuan in kun vek ang." 
Isaiah65:13 Chuvangin Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti, ""Ngai teh u, ka chhiahhlawhte chuan an ei ang a, nangni erawh chu rilramin in awm ang: ngai teh u, ka chhiahhlawhte chuan an in ang a, nangni erawh chu tuihalin in awm ang: ngai teh u, ka chhiahhlawhte chu an hlim ang a, nangni erawh chu in zak ang:" 
Isaiah65:14 ngai teh u, ka chhiahhlawhte chu thinlunga an lawm avangin hlim takin an zai ang a, nangni erawh chu thinlunga in lungngaih avangin in tap ang a, thlarauva in vui avangin in chiau vak vak ang." 
Isaiah65:15 Tin, in hming chu chhechhamna'n ka mi thlante hnenah in hnutchhiah ang a, Lalpa PATHIAN chuan a tihlum ang che u; tin, a chiahhlawhte chu hming dangin a ko tawh a:" 
Isaiah65:16 chutichuan leiah hian mahni mal insawm chawptu chu thutak Pathianah chuan mal a insawm ang a; Pathian chhalin chhia a chham ang; tun hma mangannate chu theihnghilha a awm ak avang leh ka mit laka thupha a awm tak avangin. 
Isaiah65:17 Ngai teh u, van tharte leh lei thar ka siam anih hi; tun hma thilte chu hriat rengin a awm tawh lo ang a, rilruah pawh a lut tawh hek lo ang." 
Isaiah65:18 Nimahsela ka thil siamah chuan kumkhuain lawmin hlim rawh u: ngai teh u, Jerusalem chu hlimnaah ka siam a, amite chu lawmnaah ka siam anih hi." 
Isaiah65:19 Jerusalem chungah chuan ka hlim ang a, ka mite chungah pawh ka lawm ang: a chhungah chuan tap thawm chu hriat a ni tawh lo ang a, chiau thawm pawh hriat a ni tawh hek lo ang." 
Isaiah65:20 chuta tanga chhuak chu nausen ni rei lo te dam an awm lo ang a, putar a dam chhung nite tlingtla lo an awm hek lo ang: naupang chu kum za mi niin a thi dawn si a, mi sual kum za chauh dam chu anchhe dawng an ni sawn a ni." 
Isaiah65:21 Tin, inte an sa ang a, chungah chuan an awm reng bawk ang; grep huante an siam ang a, a rah an ei bawk ang." 
Isaiah65:22 Midang awmna turin in an sa tawh lo ang a, mi dang eiah grep huan an siam tawh lo ang: thing dam chung nite ang hian ka mite dam chhung nite chu a awm dawn si a, ka mi thlante chu rei tak an thawh chhuah chungah chuan an lawm dawn a ni." 
Isaiah65:23 A thlawnin an thawk rim lo ang a, vanduaina mai turin fa an hring hek lo ang; LALPA malsawm mi thlahte an ni si a, an fate chu an hnenah an awm reng ang." 
Isaiah65:24 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, annin mi koh hma pawhin ka chhang ang a; thu an la sawi lai mek pawhin ka bengin ka hria ang.Chinghnia leh beram no chu an tla dun tawh ang a, sakeibaknei chuan bawngpa angin buhpawl a ei tawh ang: vaivut chu rul chaw a ni ang. Ka tlang thianghlim reng rengah chuan an tina tawh lo ang a, an tichhe tawh hek lo ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Isaiah65:25 Chinghnia leh beram no chu an tla dun tawh ang a, sakeibaknei chuan bawngpa angin buhpawl a ei tawh ang: vaivut chu rul chaw a ni ang. Ka tlang thianghlim reng rengah chuan an tina tawh lo ang a, an tichhe tawh hek lo ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Isaiah66:1 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, ""Van ka thutphah a ni a, lei ka ke nghahchhan a ni: in eng ang nge mi saksak ang: Khawii hmun nge ka chawlhna tur chu?" 
Isaiah66:2 Heng thil engkim hi ka kutin ka siam ani si a, chutichuan he'ng thil engkim hi a lo awm ta a ni, LALPA'n a ti: amaherawhchu mi, rethei taka awm, rilrua inchhir ngawih ngawih, ka thua khur thina lam hi ka en zawk ang." 
Isaiah66:3 Bawngpa talhtu chu mihring thattu ang a ni a; beram nova inthawitu chu ui nghawng titliaktu ang a ni a; thilpek hlantu chu vawk thisen hlantu ang a ni a, beraw haltu chu milem malsawmtu ang a ni: a ni, anmahni kawng chu a thlang ta a, an thil tenawmahte chuan an rilru a lawm thi;" 
Isaiah66:4 ka koh lai khan tuma'n mi chhan lo a, thu ka sawi lai kha, benga an hriat loh a, ka mit hmuha thil sual chu an tih zawk a, ka thil lawm loh zawng chu an thlan avangin kei pawhin anmahni bumna turte chu ka thlansak ang a, an hlauhzawngte chu an chungah ka thlentir ang,"" tiin." 
Isaiah66:5 A thua khur thitne u, LALPA thu hi hre rawh u: ""In unau, nangmahni hawtu leh ka hming avanga nangmahni hnawt chhuaktute chuan, 'In lawmna kan hmuh theihna'n LALPA chu tihropuiin aawm rawh se,' an ti a; nimahsela an zak tawh zawk ang." 
Isaiah66:6 Chu! Khawpuia sa mur mur thawm chu! Biak ina thawm a nih chu! A hmelmate thungrultu, LALPA thawm anih chu!" 
Isaiah66:7 Ani chuan vei hman loin nau a nei a; na hre hman loinmipa naupang ahring a. 
Isaiah66:8 Chutiang chu tuin nge hre thei ngai? Chutiangte chu tuin nge hmu ngai? Ni khatah ram a piang thut dawn em ni? Vfawilhekhatah hnam hrinin a awm thut dawn em ni? Zion chuan nau a vei veleh a fate chu a hring ta pang si a. 
Isaiah66:9 Pian hun thlentir siin ka hrintir dawn lo em ni? LALPA'n a ti: kei hrintir thintu hian fa ka neihtir phal dan lo em ni? i Pathianin a ti. 
Isaiah66:10 Jerusalem hmangaihtu zawng zawngte u, Jerusalem chu hlimup u la, lawmpui rawh u: amah suntu zawng zawngte u, lawm avangin hlimpui rawh u:" 
Isaiah66:11 in hneka, thlamuanna hnuteahte chuan in tlai theihna'n leh, in hnek daka, a ropuina tam takah chuan in lawm theihna'n,"" tih hi." 
Isaiah66:12 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti si, ""Ngai teh u, remna chu luipui ang maiin a hnen thlengin ka luantir ang a, hnam tin ropuina chu luite a kuang liam dul dul ang maiin, a hnen thlengin ka luantir bawk ang, tichuan chu chu in hne ang; a hmathlak ang che u a, a mal chungah chuan a tumtir ang che u." 
Isaiah66:13 Mi, a nuin a thlamuan angin ka thlamuan ang che u; tichuan Jerusalem-ah chuan thlamuanin in awm dawn nia." 
Isaiah66:14 Tin, chu chu in hmu ang a, in thinlung chu ahlim ang a, in ruhte pawh hlobet hring dup angin a duah hluah hluah ang: tichuan LALPA kut chu a chhiahhlawhte lamah a awm tih an hria ang a, a hmelmate chungah alungni lo ang." 
Isaiah66:15 Ngai teh u, a thinur chu thinrimnaa hrithla tur leh, a zilhhauna chu meialhtea hritla turin, LALPA chu mei nen a lo kal dawn si a, a tawlailirte chu thawngaleivir ang mai a ni ang." 
Isaiah66:16 Meiin a ni, LALPA'n a ngaihtuah dawn ni, a khandaihin a ni, mi zawng zawng a ngaihtuah dawn ni: tichuan LALPA tihhlumte chu tam tak an ni ang." 
Isaiah66:17 Huanahte inthawi tuma inzui dum dum tura intithianghlim leh inthianfai thinte, vawk sa leh thil tenawm leh chaichim sa eite chu an boral tlang ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Isaiah66:18 Am thiltihte leh an ngaihtuahte chu ka hre si a: hnam tinreng leh tawng tinreng ka hruai khawm hun a lo thleng dawn; tichuan an lo kal ang a, ka ropuina an hmu ang." 
Isaiah66:19 Tin, an zingah chuan chhinchhiahna ka awmtu ang a, tichuan an zinga hremna pumpelh apiangte chu hnam tin hnenah - Tarsis te, Pul te, thal ngul kuaiho Lud hnenah te, Tubal leh Javan-ho hnenah te, thliarkar hla ta, ka hmingthan la hre ngai lo a, ka ropuina la hmu ngai loho hnenahte chuan - ka tir ang; tichuan hnam tin zingah ka ropuina thu an sawi ang." 
Isaiah66:20 Tichuan Israela thlahten an thilhlan chu bungbel thianghlim taka LALPA ina an rawn la lut thin ang hian, LALPA hnena thilhlan atan hnam tinreng zing ata in naute zawng zawng chu saker chungah te, tawlailirah te, zawnnaah te, sabengtung chungah te, sanghawngsei chungah te, Jerusalem ka tlang thianghlimah chuan an rawn hruai ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Isaiah66:21 Tin, chung zinga mi pawh chu puithiam atante leh Levia mi atante ka la ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Isaiah66:22 Van tharte leh lei thar ka la siam tur chu ka hmaah a awm reng dawn angin, in thlahte leh in hming chu a awm reng bawk dawn a ni, LALPA'n a ti." 
Isaiah66:23 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, thla thar atanga thla thar dang thlengin, chawlhni atanga chawlhni dang thlengin mi zawng zawng ka hmaah chibai mi buk turin an lo kal zut zut ang, LALPA'n a ti.Tin, an kal chhuak thin ang a, ka laka bawhchhetute ruang chu an en ang: an lungte chu an thiin, an mei chu tihmihin a awm dawn si lo; mi zawng zawng tan thil tenawm tak an ni ang." 
Isaiah66:24 Tin, an kal chhuak thin ang a, ka laka bawhchhetute ruang chu an en ang: an lungte chu an thiin, an mei chu tihmihin a awm dawn si lo; mi zawng zawng tan thil tenawm tak an ni ang." 
Jeremiah1:1 Benjamina rama Anathoth khuaa puithiamte zinga mi Hilkia fapa Jeremia thute; 
Jeremiah1:2 Juda lal, Amona fapa Josia hun lai, a lal kum sawm leh pathumnaah chuan a hnenah LALPA thu a lo thleng a." 
Jeremiah1:3 Juda lal, Josia fapa Jehoiakima lal lai pawhin a lo thleng a; Juda lal Josia fapa Zedekia kum sawm leh kum khatna tawp, Jerusalem sala hruai thla ngana thleng khan." 
Jeremiah1:4 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a;" 
Jeremiah1:5 Pum chhunga ka siam hma chein ka hria che a, Chhul ata i chauh hma pawhin ka serh hrang che a, Hnamte hnena zawlneiah ka ruat tawh a che,"" tiin." 
Jeremiah1:6 Tin, kei chuan, ""E, Lalpa PATHIAN, ngai teh, thu ka sawi thiam lo, ka naupang si,"" ka ti a." 
Jeremiah1:7 LALPA erawh chuan ka hnenah heti hian a ti a: Ka naupang, ti suh, Ka tirhna che apiang hnenah i kal ang a, Thu ka pek che apiang i sawi tur a ni." 
Jeremiah1:8 Anmahni avangin hlau suh la,Chhan chhuak tur chein i hnenah ka awm e, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah1:9 Tichuan, LALPA chuan a han ban a, a ka a khawih a, tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, ""Ngai rawh, i kaah ka thute ka dah ta," 
Jeremiah1:10 En teh, hnamte leh lal ram chhungah te,Pawt chhuak tur te, thiat tur te, tichhe tur te, Paih thla tur te, siam tha tur leh din turin Hemi niah hian ka dah che ni,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah1:11 Chu lo pawh LALPA thu ka hnenah a lo thleng a, ""Jeremia, eng nge i hmuh?"" a ti a, Tin, kei chuan,""Vai umkhal thing tang ka hmu,"" ka ti a." 
Jeremiah1:12 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, ""I hmu fuh hle mai: ka thu hlen turin ka inralring reng a ni,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah1:13 Tin, LALPA thu chu a vawi hnihnaah ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a, ""Eng nge i hmuh?"" tiin. Tin, kei chuan, ""Bel so bawrh bawrh, a rawng hmar lam hawisan ka hmu,"" ka ti a." 
Jeremiah1:14 Tichuan, LALPA chuan ka hnenah heti hian a ti a: Rama cheng zawng zawngte chungah hmar lam ata thil tha lo a lo chhuak ang." 
Jeremiah1:15 Ngai teh, hmar lam lal ram hnam zawng zawng ka ko dawn si a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni; an lo kal ang a, Jerusalem kawngka luhnaah te, a vel kulh bang zawng zawng bulah te leh Juda khawpui zawng zawngahte an lalthutthleng an hung theuh ang." 
Jeremiah1:16 Mi kalsan a, pathian dangte hnenah rimtui an hal a, anmahni kut chhuak ngei an bia a; he'ng an suahsualna zawng zawng chungchanga ka thu relte chu ka puang ang." 
Jeremiah1:17 Chuvangin puan veng la, tho la, thu ka pek zawng zawng che chu an hnenah va sawi rawh; an hmaah ka tizam ang che." 
Jeremiah1:18 Ngai rawh, he mi niah hian ram pum pui te, Juda lal te, a hotu te, a puithiamte leh chumi rama mi lakah chuan khawpui kulh nei leh thir ban leh ngen bangah ka siam che hi.An bei ang chia, mahse an hneh lo ang che: chhan chhuak tur chein i hnenah ka awm si a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah1:19 An bei ang chia, mahse an hneh lo ang che: chhan chhuak tur chein i hnenah ka awm si a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah2:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a, heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah2:2 Kal la, Jerusalem beng hriatah au rawh, LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: I tleirawl laia i ngilneihzia te, Inhual laia mi hmangaihziate kha ka hre reng e; Tuk loh ram, thlalera mi zuizia kha." 
Jeremiah2:3 Israel chu LALPA tana serh hran, a rah pung hmasa a ni, Amah ei raltu apiangin thiam loh an chang ang a, An chungah chhiatna a lo thleng ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah2:4 Aw Jakoba chhungte leh Israel chhung zawng zawngte u, LALPA thu hi ngaithla rawh u;" 
Jeremiah2:5 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: In thlahtuten keimahah fel lohna eng nge an hmuh, Ka laka hla takah an leng bo a, Engmah lo mai an um a, an lo uanthuan tak ni?" 
Jeremiah2:6 LALPA, Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuak a, Thlaler, ram ro, khuarkhurum hmun, thihna hlim leh ram ro hmun, Tuma kal tlang ngai lohna, Tuma awm lohna hmuna Min hruai tlangtu kha khawiah nge an ti hek lo." 
Jeremiah2:7 Ram tha takah, a rah leh thatna ei turin, Ka hruai lut che u a, Mahse in han luh chuan Ka ram in tibawlhhlawh a, Ka rochan chu thil tenawmah in siam." 
Jeremiah2:8 Puithiamte pawhin, LALPA chu khawiah nge? An ti lo a, Dan hmangtuten mi hre hek lo, Roreltute ka lakah an hel a, Zawlneiten Baal hmingin thu an sawi a, Thil sawt lo turte an um a." 
Jeremiah2:9 Tichuan ka khing ang che u a, In fate fa lehte pawh ka la khing fo ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah2:10 Kitim thliarkarah va kal u la, en rawh u, Kedarah mi tir u la, ngun takin ngaihtuah rawh u, Hetiang thil a awm ngai erawm hriatna'n." 
Jeremiah2:11 Hnam dangte chuan an pathian an thlak ngai em ni, Pathian tak ni hlei lo pawh? Ka mite erawh chuan an ropuina chu, Thil sawt lo takin an thlak ta zawk a." 
Jeremiah2:12 Aw vante u, mak ti u la, Rap che u se la, tiau vek rawh u, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah2:13 Ka miten thil pahnih an tisual si, Kei, nunna tuikhur hi mi kalsan a, Tuikhuah an ker a, Tuikhuah khi, tui tling thei lo tur chu." 
Jeremiah2:14 Israel chu chhiahhlawh em ni? Vanlunga piang em ni? Engati nge hnehchhiaha a awm tak ni? 
Jeremiah2:15 Sakeibaknei vanglaite chuan rum khumin, A chungah aw an chhuah a, A ram chu an titiau zo ta, A khawpuite pawh luahtu nei loin a kang fai ta" 
Jeremiah2:16 Noph mi leh Tahpanes mite pawhin, I chhip an tikawlh zo ta." 
Jeremiah2:17 LALPA i Pathian chuan kawnga a hruai lai che a, I tlan bosan avangin, Chu chu i chunga i thlentir a ni lo'm ni?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Nile tuite in tura Aigupta kawng i zawh hi, Eng nge i tan hlawk dawn ni? Luipui tui in tura Assuria kawng i zawh pawh hi," 
Jeremiah2:19 I suahsualna chuan a tuartir ang chia, I hnung tawlh thinna chuan a zilhhau vang che; Mi tihna nei loa LALPA i pathian i kalsan hi, Thil sual tak leh kha tak a ni tih hi, Lo hre chhuak la, hmu fiah tawh rawh, tih hi Lalpa, Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah2:20 Hman ata tawh i nghawngkawl titliakin, I hruite pawh i tichat tawh si a, I rawng ka bawl tawh lo ang, i ti a, Tlang sang tinahte, thingbuk hnuai apiangah te, Kunin i hur thil i ti a." 
Jeremiah2:21 Chi dik tak hmangin grep tha tak ka phun che a, Eng tiziaa inleta, ka tan grep suaka lo chang ta nge i nih?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Chingalin insilin sabawn tam tak hmang mah la, I khawlohna chu ka mithmuhah a lang tho a ni, Tih i Lalpa PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah2:23 Ka intibawlhhlawh hlei nem, Baal-te pawh ka um hek lo, Engtin nge i tih theih le? Kawr ruama i awm dante en la, I thiltih takte chu hre rawh; Sanghawngseila hur lai ang riai i nih kha." 
Jeremiah2:24 Ram sabengtung thlalera awm thin, A hur laia hnar len ruai ang;A chakna chu tuin nge dal zo ang? A zawngtu chu intihah duh suh se, A hunah chuan an hmu mai ang." 
Jeremiah2:25 I keah pheikhawk bun loin awm suh la, I dang pawh ro suh se; Nang erawh chuan, Beisei a bo zo ta, Awze mite ka ngai a, anmahni ka um ang, i tia." 
Jeremiah2:26 Rukru an phawka a zak angin, Israel chhungte an zak ta. Anmahni te, an lal te, an hotu te, An puithiam te, an zawlneite pawh." 
Jeremiah2:27 Thing bul hnenah, Ka pa i ni, tia, Lung bul hnena, Mi hringtu i ni titute chu: Hmachhawn loin an tukkhum chhah mi chhawn ta zawk a, An mangan hunah erawh chuan, Tho la, min chhandam ta che, an ti ang, I pathian, i siamte kha khawiah nge an awm tak ni?" 
Jeremiah2:28 Anni chu tho zawk se la, i mangan laiin an chhandam thei mahna che; Aw Juda, i pathiante chu i khawpuite zat lai an ni alawm." 
Jeremiah2:29 Engah nge ka chungah in vui fo le? In zain ka chungah thil in tisual si, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah2:30 In fate ka vua a, a sawt lo, An that phah chuang hek lo: Sakeibaknei koham ang maiin, Nangmahni khandaih chuan in zawlneite a ei ral a." 
Jeremiah2:31 Aw thangtharte u, LALPA thu hi hre rawh u, Israel tan thlaler ram ang ka ni em ni? Thim chhah mup ram ka ni em ni? Ka mite chuan engah nge, ""Kan chhuak fel ta, I hnenah kan let leh lo ang,"" an tih hi?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Nula chuan a incheimawinate a theihnghilh theiin, Mo thar chuan a inthuamna a theihnghilh thei em ni? Ka mite erawh chuan ni chhiarsen loh chhungin Mi lo theihnghilh ta." 
Jeremiah2:33 Ngaizawngtu hmuh theihna turin i awm dan i va uluk ve! Hmeichhe sual hnenahte pawh i awm dan i zirtir tak hi. 
Jeremiah2:34 I puanfenahte pawh mi rethei pawikhawih lote Nunna thisen a lang a: Mi in an rawk lai kut man pawh ni si lo. Chu achhapah nangmah chuan," 
Jeremiah2:35 Thiam ka chang e, ka lakah thinurna a dai e,"" I la ti leh ta lai a, Ngai rawh, ""Ka sual lo e,"" i tih avangin, I chung thu ka rel ang." 
Jeremiah2:36 I awm dan thlak zung zungin, Engah nge i vahvel thin? Assuria i zahpui ang bawk khan, Aigupta pawh i la zahpui ang.I kutte khumin an hnen ata i la chhuak leh ang, LALPA'n i rinnate chu a paithla si a, Anmahniah chuan i hmuingil lo ang." 
Jeremiah2:37 I kutte khumin an hnen ata i la chhuak leh ang, LALPA'n i rinnate chu a paithla si a, Anmahniah chuan i hmuingil lo ang." 
Jeremiah3:1 Miin nupui ma se la, Amah kalsanin pasal dang pawm se, Ani chuan a lo pawm leh ang em? A ram chuan a bawlhhlawh phah hial dawn lo'm ni?"" tih a awm a. Nang erawh chu tlangval tam tak hnenah i hur bo a, Chuti chung chuan ka hnenah i lo kir leh ang maw? Tih i LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah3:2 Tlang kawlh vul lamah i mitte len chho la en rawh, An mutpui lohna hmun che khawiah nge? Thlalera Arabia mi ang maiin Anmahni nghakin kawng sirahte i thu reng thin, I hurnate leh i suahsualnatein Ram chu i tibawlhhlawh zo ta." 
Jeremiah3:3 Chumi avang chuan ruah chu surtir a ni lo a, ruah hnuhnung pawh a sur hek lo; mi hur chal putin i pu a, i zak duh hauh si lo a." 
Jeremiah3:4 Ka pa, ka tleirawl laia mi hruaitu i ni,"" tiin mi au hlim hlawl a ni lo em ni?" 
Jeremiah3:5 A thin a ur kumkhua dawn em ni? A tawp thlengin em ni a ur dawn? Ngai rawh, chutiang chuan i tawng ngei a, Mahse a sual thei ang berin thil i ti a." 
Jeremiah3:6 Chu lo pawh chu Josia lal laiin LALPA'n ka hnenah heti hian a ti a: Hnung tawlh hmang Israel thiltih kha i hmu em? Tlang sang tinahte chho a, thing buk tin, hnuaiahte a hurna thil a tihte kha?" 
Jeremiah3:7 Tin, kei chuan he'ng thil zawng zawng a tih hnuah hian ka hnenah a la kir leh em ang chu, ka ti a; mahse a lo kir chuang lo a; tin, a laizawnnu, bu hmang Juda chuan a hmu ve ta a." 
Jeremiah3:8 Tin, ani chuan hnung tawlh hmang Israel chu a uire avang ngeia ka ak a, makna lehkha ka pek a huh pawhin a laizawnnu, bumhmang Juda chuan a hlau chuang lo a, chutih ahnekin a va kal a, hurna thil a va ti ve a." 
Jeremiah3:9 Tin, a hur nawmnah mai mai avangin ram chu a tibawlhhlawh zo ta a; thing bul, lung bul hnenah a uire ta a." 
Jeremiah3:10 Chuti chung pawhin a laizawnnu, bumhmang Juda chu thinlung taka lo kir loin a der maiin a lo kir a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah3:11 Tin, LALPA'n ka hnenah heti hian a ti a: Hnung tawlh thin Israel chuan a laizawnnu, bumhmang Juda ai chuan fel zawkin a intilang a." 
Jeremiah3:12 Kal la, he'ng thu hi hmar lamah va puang rawh; Hnung tawlh hmang Israel, lo kir rah, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni; Thinrim hmel puin ka en lo ang che u a, Zahngai thei tak ka ni si a, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, Ka thinur kumkhua lo ang." 
Jeremiah3:13 LALPA i Pathian chunga i helna te, Thing buk hnuaia awze mite hnena i inphalraina te, Ka tawngka chhuak i awih lohna tea I khawlohnaah chuan thupha chawi rawh, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah3:14 Aw hnung tawlh hmang fate u, lo kir rawh u, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Kilkawitu che u ka ni si a, In zinga ta khawpuia mi pakhat, Chhungkuaa mi pahnih ka la ang che u a, Zionah ka hruai ang che u." 
Jeremiah3:15 Ka lungdumzawng tak berampute ka pe ang che u a, annin hriatna leh hriat thiamnatein an chawm ang che u." 
Jeremiah3:16 Tin, in lo tam a, rama in lo pun hunah, chung niahte chuan annin, ""LALPA thuthlung bawm"" an ti tawh ngai lo ang; an rilruah a lut lo ang a, hriat pawh an hre reng hek lo ang; an thlahlel tawh lo ang a, an siam leh tawh hek lo ang." 
Jeremiah3:17 Chumi hnuah chuan Jerusalem chu LALPA lalthutthleng an vuah ang a, chutah chuan hnam zawng zawngte chu LALPA hmingin Jerusalemah an lo kal khawm ang: an thinlung sula khauhna ang chuan an kal tawh lo ang." 
Jeremiah3:18 Chung niahte chuan Juda chhungte chu Israel chhungte nen an awmho ang a, hmar lam ram atangin, in thlahtute hnena roluah tura ka pek ramah chuan, an lo chhuakho ang." 
Jeremiah3:19 Kei erawh chuan, Hnam tam takte zinga roluah tur tha ber, Ram nuam tak mai pe chein, Fanaute zinga dah che ka duhzia mai chu! Ka pa, tia mi lam a, Mi zuina ata i peng bo lo ang tih ka lo ring a." 
Jeremiah3:20 Nupui bum hmangin a pasal a uiresan angin, Aw Israel chhunget u, mi bum ta a nih hi, Tih hi LALPA thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah3:21 Tlang kawlh vul chungah thawm a awm e, Israel fate tap leh thil ngen thawm chu, LALPA Pathian an theihnghilh a, An awm dan an tikhawloh zawh tak avangin." 
Jeremiah3:22 Aw hnung tawlh thinnate chu ka tidam ang e: En teh, i hnenah kan lo kal a nih hi, Nang chu LALPA kan Pathian i ni si a." 
Jeremiah3:23 Tlangte hi a sawt lo a, Tlang chunga thaw ri hum humte hi. Israel chhandamna chu LALPA kan Pathian ngeiah hian a ni, a awm." 
Jeremiah3:24 Mahse chu thil tenawm tak chuan kan tleirawl lai ata kan thlahtuten tha an senna chu a ei ral ta; an beram rual te, an ran rual te, an fanu te, an fapate cheninZakin i mu ang u khai, kan mualphonain min khuh rawh se; LALPA kan Pathian chungah thil kan tisual a, keini leh kan thlahtuten kan tleirawl lai ata vawiin ni thlengin LALPA kan Pathian tawngka kan awih loh avangin." 
Jeremiah3:25 Zakin i mu ang u khai, kan mualphonain min khuh rawh se; LALPA kan Pathian chungah thil kan tisual a, keini leh kan thlahtuten kan tleirawl lai ata vawiin ni thlengin LALPA kan Pathian tawngka kan awih loh avangin." 
Jeremiah4:1 Aw Israel, i lamlet chuan, ka hnenah ngei i lo let tur a ni,"" Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. ""I tenawmnate ka mithmuh loha i dah bo a," 
Jeremiah4:2 Tihtakzeta, thurel dik tak hmanga, fel taka, LALPA a nuna a nun chhung chu, tia chhia i chham chuan, Hnamte chu amahah chuan engthawl an inti ang a, Amah chu an chhuan gtawh ang,""" 
Jeremiah4:3 Juda mite leh Jerusale hnenah LALPA i Pathian chuan heti hian a ti e: In lei khek chu let u la, Hling zingahte chi theh suh u." 
Jeremiah4:4 Nangni Judai rama mi leh Jerusalema chengte u, LALPA tan in serh tan u la, in thinlung serh tan rawh u, Chutilochu in thil sual tihte avangin, Ka thinurna chu mei angin a chhuak ang a, Tuma thelh theih lohin a kang dah ang e." 
Jeremiah4:5 Judai ramah hril u la, Jerusalemah puang rawh u, Ram pumah chuan tawtawrawt ham ula, Ring takin au rawh u. ""Rawn inkhawm u la, kulh nei khawpuiahte i lut ang u,m"" ti r'u." 
Jeremiah4:6 Zion lamah puanzar khai u la, Hlimna zawngin tlan u la, muang suh u, Hmar ata thil tha lo ka rawn thlen dawn, Chhiatna nasa tak mai chu." 
Jeremiah4:7 Ngaw hnuai pik ata sakeibaknei a chhuak e, Hnamte tichhetu tur chu; A hmun ata a chhuak ta, a lo kal mek e, I ram titiau tur leh, I khawpuite chengtu nei lo khawpa tiram turin." 
Jeremiah4:8 Chumi avang chuan saiip puan feng u la, Tap u la, chiau vawng vawng rawh u; Kan laka LALPA thinurna nasa tak mai chu A la kiang si lo a." 
Jeremiah4:9 Chumi niah chuan heti hi a lo ni ang,"" Tih hi LALPA thu chuak a ni: ""Lal thinlung a zam zo ang a, Hotute thinlung pawh; Puithiamte chu an hrilhai ang a, zawlneite chuan mak an ti em em ang.""" 
Jeremiah4:10 Tin, kei chuan, ""A, Lalpa PATHIAN, He mite leh Jerusalem hi nasa takin i bum a nih hi, Muanna in nei ang,' i ti a, Khandaihin nunna a chhun tak zawk si hi,"" ka ti a." 
Jeremiah4:11 Chutih lai chuan he mite leh Jerusalem hnenah, ""Thlaler tlang kawlh vul ata thli lum tak, Ka fanu, ka mite zap fai tur ni lo, thliar fai tur ni hek lo," 
Jeremiah4:12 thli na lutuk, ka thuin a lo thleng dawn a ni: tunah pawh an chung thu reltu hi keimah ka ni,"" tih a ni ang." 
Jeremiah4:13 Ngai teh, a lo chho ang, chhum pui angin, A tawlailir thawngaleivir ang maite chu; A sakawrte chu mupui aiin an chak zawk, Kan chung a va pik em! Kan ral thum a nih hi." 
Jeremiah4:14 Aw Jerusalem, suahsualna ata i thinlung tlengfai la, Chhandama i awm theihna turin; Eng chen nge i ngaihtuahna sual chu i pai dan?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Dan ram ata aw a lo chhuak a, Ephraim tlang atangin thil tha lo a puang e." 
Jeremiah4:16 Hnamte chu hrilh u la, Jerusalemah puang rawh u, Ngai teh, ram hla tak ata beitute an lo thleng. Judai khawpuite chungah an aw an chhuah e." 
Jeremiah4:17 Thlawhhma vengtute ang maiin a velin an hual a, Ka chunga a hel avangin, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah4:18 I awm dan leh i thiltihte chuan, Heng hi i chungah a thlen a nih hi, Hei hi i chhiatna tur chu a ni, A na em em a, i thinlung a chhun a ni." 
Jeremiah4:19 Ka thin a na, ka thin a na, Ka thinlung ngeiah a na, Ka chhungah ka thinlung a buai zo ta, Ka awm hle hle thei lo, Aw ka nunna, tawtawrawt ri, Indona haw haw i hriat avangin," 
Jeremiah4:20 Chhiatna chungah chhiatna a thleng ta, Ram pum pui chu rawkin a awm ta, Ka puan inte chu an tichhe phut a, Ka puanzarte pawh mit khap kar loah." 
Jeremiah4:21 Eng chen nge indona puanzar ka hmuh ang a, Tawtawrawt ri ka hriat ang?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Ka mite chu an a em a, mi hre si lo a, Naupang a tak, hriatna nei lo ang mai an ni, Thil sual tih an thiam a, Thil tha tih dan erawh chu an thiam lo." 
Jeremiah4:23 Leilung chu ka han en a, ngai teh, Tiau leh ruakin a awm: Vante pawhin eng an nei lo." 
Jeremiah4:24 Tlangte ka en a, ngai teh, a nghing a, Mual zawng zawng pawh an phe hlawk hlawk a." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ka han en a, ngai teh, mihring an awm lo a, Chungleng sava zawng zawng pawh an thlawk bo zo ta." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ka han en a, ngai teh, mihring an awm lo a, Thlawhhma thate chu thlaler a chang ta. Khawpui zawng zawng pawh a chim zo ta. LALPA leh a thnurna nasa tak hmaah chuan." 
Jeremiah4:27 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ram pum pui a tiau ang a, mahse ka titawp hlen lo ang." 
Jeremiah4:28 Chumi avang chuan lei chuan a sun ang a, Chung lam vante pawh a thim ang: Thu ka sawi tawh a, ka tu tawh a, Ka inchhir lo a, ka lam let dawn hek lo.""" 
Jeremiah4:29 Sakawr chunga chuang leh thal ngul hmangtute thawmah, Khawpui pum pui chu an tlanchhia a, Ngawah an lut a, lungpui hmunahte an lawn a, Khaw tin, mai an rauhsan a, Luahtu pakhat mah awm loin." 
Jeremiah4:30 Tin, nang, rawka i awm hun chuan engtin nge i tih ang? Puan sen lara intuamin, Incheina rangkachaka incheiin, I mitte hnawih dur mah la, I intimawi thlawn mai mai a ni, I tlangvalte chuan an hmusit tho chia, I nun lak an tum a ni.Fa tir hringtu na tuar lai, Zion fanu thaw huam huam ri chu, A kutte phar a, ""Ka chung a va pik em! Tualthattute hmaah ka nun a chau zo ta,"" ti chu." 
Jeremiah4:31 Fa tir hringtu na tuar lai, Zion fanu thaw huam huam ri chu, A kutte phar a, ""Ka chung a va pik em! Tualthattute hmaah ka nun a chau zo ta,"" ti chu." 
Jeremiah5:1 Jerusalem khawlaiahte tlan vel u la, En u la, chhinchhiah u la a mual zawlte zawng ula, Mi pakhat tal fel taka tia, thutak zawng reng in hmuh theih chuan, Jerusalem chu ka ngaidam ang. LALPA a nuna a nun chung chu, ti mah se la, Dawtin chhia an chham mai a ni." 
Jeremiah5:2 Aw LALPA, thutak chu i huh duh zawng a ni lo'm ni? Anni chu i vua a, mahse an lungngai chuang lo, Anni chu i tiral a, i thununa chu an pawm duh chuang lo, Lungpui aia changin an chal an ti chang ta, An lamlet duh miau lo." 
Jeremiah5:3 Tin, kei chuan, Heng hi mi chhia an ni a, an a bawk a, LALPA dan, an Pathian thurel chu an hre lo." 
Jeremiah5:4 Mi liante hnenah ka va kal ta ang a, Ka va bia ang a, Anni chua nlalpa dan leh an Pathian thurelte chu an hriat kha, ka ti a. Mahse he'ng mite hian thu khat vuain, Nghawngkawl an titliak a, phuarna hruite chu an tichat ta a." 
Jeremiah5:5 Chuvangin ngaw hnuaia sakeibakneiin anmahni a seha ng a, Thlaler chinghniain anmahni a ei ral ang a, Keite chuan an khawpuite a chang a, Chuta lo chhuak apiang chu a pawt sawm ang; An bawhchhiatnate a tam a, An hnungtawlhnate a nasat avangin." 
Jeremiah5:6 Engtin nge ka ngaihdam theih ang che? I fate chuan mi kalsan a, Pathian ni hlei lote chhalin chhia an chham a, Tlai deuha ka hrai hnuah an uire a, Nawhchizua inahte an vir huai huai a." 
Jeremiah5:7 Zing lama sakawr hrai puar ang mai an ni a, Mi tin, mahni thenawmpa nupui itin an hram a." 
Jeremiah5:8 Heng thilte avang hian ka hrem lo ang maw? Tih hi LALPA thu chuak a ni: Hetiang hnam chungah hian, Phuba ka inlaksak lo ang em ni?" 
Jeremiah5:9 A palahte chuan lawn lut u la, tichhe rawh u, Amaherawhchu tichhe zo vek suh u, A zarte chu la bo u la, LALPA ta a ni si lo a." 
Jeremiah5:10 Israel chhungte leh Juda chhungte chuan, Ka chungah vervek takin an ti si a, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah5:11 LALPA chu dawhtheia ngaiin Engmah a tithei hlei lawng e, Chhiatna kan chungah a lo thleng lo ang, Tam emaw khandaih emaw kan tuar lo ang." 
Jeremiah5:12 zawlneite pawh puarpawleng mai an ni ang a, Anmahniah thu chu a awm si lo; An chungah chutiang tih a ni ang,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah5:13 Chuvangin LALPA, Sipaihote Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Chutiang thu chu in sawi avangin, ngai rawh, I kaa ka thute chu meiah ka chantir ang a, Heng mipuite hi thingah, tin, a kang zo ang." 
Jeremiah5:14 Ngai rawh u, aw Israel chhungte u, Hla tak ata hnam, i hnenah ka rawn hruai ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Hnam chak tak mai, hnam hmasang ata tawh, An tawng i hriat loh, an thusawi i hriat theih loh hnamte chu." 
Jeremiah5:15 An thal bawm chu thlan inhawng a ni a, An zain mi chak tak an ni vek a." 
Jeremiah5:16 I buh seng sa leh i ei tur an ei zo vek ang; I fanute i fapate ei tur ngei chu: I ran rualte, i beram rualte an ei ang a, I grep hruite, i theipui kunge an ei ang a, I kulh nei khawpui, i rinpui ber thinte ngei kha. Khandaihin an tichhe vek ang." 
Jeremiah5:17 Mahse chung niahte pawh chuan ka tichimit hlen lo ang che u, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah5:18 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, ""Engah nge LALPA kan Pathianin he'ng thi zawng zawng hi an chungah a tih ni?"" i miten an tih hunah chuan, ""Mi kalsan a, in ramah Pathian dangte rawng an bawl angin, in ram loah, awze mite rawng in bawl ang,"" an hnenah i ti tur a ni." 
Jeremiah5:19 Jakoba chhungte zingah hei hi sawi chhuak u la, Judai ramah puang rawh u." 
Jeremiah5:20 Aw hriat thiamna nei lo, mi ate u, Mit neia hmu si lote u, beng neia hre si lote u, Hei hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Jeremiah5:21 Mi tih lo maw? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, Ka hmaah hian in khur lo ang maw? Kei hi, tuipui kuam chin atana tiaupho, Kumkhuaa a liam lohna tura daidanna, Tuipui fawn invawrh vel mah se a liam chuan theih loh a, Ri hum hum mah se apelh theih loh tur siamtu chu ka nih hi." 
Jeremiah5:22 Mahse he mite hian thinlung luhlul leh helhmang an pu a, An hel a, an tlan bo ta a." 
Jeremiah5:23 AN thinlung pawhin, ""LALPA kan Pathian a hun taka Ruah hmasa leh ruah hnuhnung surtirtu, Buh seng hun bi min ruatsaktu chu i tih ang u,"" an ti hek lo." 
Jeremiah5:24 Heng thilte hi in khawlohnate chuan a tibo a, In sualnate chuan thi tha a chantir che u a ni." 
Jeremiah5:25 Ka mite zingah mi suaksual an awm si a, Sava vehtuin a chan angin an chang reng a, Thang an kam a, mite an awk a." 
Jeremiah5:26 bawm savaa khat ang maiin, An inte chu bumnain a khat a, Chuvangin an lo lian a, an hausak phah ta a." 
Jeremiah5:27 An lo thau a, an lo hnum a, A ni, an suahsualna thiltihte chuan chin tawk a nei lo, Pa nei lote hmuingilna turin an lamah an tang lo a." 
Jeremiah5:28 Heng thil avangte hian ka hrem lo ang em ni? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: Hetiang hnam chungah hian ka nunna chuan Phuba a la dan lo em ni? 
Jeremiah5:29 Chu ramah chuan thil mak tak leh rapthlak tak a lo awm ta;zawlneite chuan dawt thu an hril a, Puithiamte chuan an thu thuin ro an rel a, Ka mite chuan chutiang tih chu an du a ni. A tawpah chuan engtin nge in tih tak ang le?" 
Jeremiah5:30 zawlneite chuan dawt thu an hril a, Puithiamte chuan an thu thuin ro an rel a, Ka mite chuan chutiang tih chu an du a ni. A tawpah chuan engtin nge in tih tak ang le?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Benjamin fate u, Jerusalem chung ata In himna turin tlan bo u la; Tekoa-ah tawtawrawt ham u la Beth-hakkeremah hriattirna chhuah rawh u. hmar lam aa chhiatna a lo thawk e, Tihchhiatna nasa tak mai chu." 
Jeremiah6:2 Zion fanu hmel tha tak leh no tak chu Ka tibo ang. 
Jeremiah6:3 Berampute, an beram rualte nen a hnen an lo thleng ang a, A velah an puan inte an kaih ang a, Mahni hmun theuhvah an tla ang." 
Jeremiah6:4 Amah do turin inpuahchah rawh u, Tho u la, chhun laiah i bei ang u, Kan tan a va pawi em! Ni lo her ta a, Tlai lam hlim a lo sang ta." 
Jeremiah6:5 Tho u la, zanah i bei mai teh ang u khai! A in tha thate i tichhia ang u." 
Jeremiah6:6 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: A thingte kit u la, Jerusalem beihna'n mual pawng siam rawh u, Khawpui hrem tur chu hei hi a ni, A chhungah chuan hnehchhiahna hlir a ni." 
Jeremiah6:7 Tuichhunchhuahin tui a tichhuak ang maiin A suahsualna chu a tichhuak thin, A chhungah chuan pawngnekna leh inrawkna a awm tih hriat a ni a, Ka hmaah chuan natna leh inhliamnate a awm reng." 
Jeremiah6:8 Ka rilruin a hransan daih hma che hian Aw, Jerusalem, fimkhur hle rawh, Chutilochuan luahtu nei lo rama siam chein, Ka titiau dah ang che." 
Jeremiah6:9 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Israel awm chhunte chu grep angin lo fai vek u la, Grep lotu angin a zarte chu vai nawn rawh u." 
Jeremiah6:10 An ngaihthlak theihna'n tu nge ka biak ang a, Tunge ka hriattir ang? Ngai teh, beng lam serhtan loh an ni a, an ngaithla thei lo; Ngai teh, LALPA thu chu an tan thil hmuhsitawm a ni a, Lawmna reng an nei ta lo." 
Jeremiah6:11 Chuvang chuan LALPA thinurnain ka khat a, Insum hi ka ning ta; Khawlaia naupang chungah hrithla la, tlangval awmkhawmte chungah pawh, A nupui rualin pasal pawh lak a ni ang a, Upate leh tar chhiate pawh." 
Jeremiah6:12 An inte chu mi dang hnenah pek a ni ang a, An thlawhhmate leh an nupuite nen; chumi rama chengte chungah chuan ka kut ka lek dawn si a, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah6:13 A te ber atangin a lian ber thleng pawhin Mi tin, duhamnain an khat si a; zawlneite leh puithiamte meuh pawh, Mi tin, hlemhle takin an che a ni." 
Jeremiah6:14 Ka mite hliamte chu, ngaihsam takin, ""A tha alawm, a tha alawm,"" tiin an thawi a, A tha hauh si lo a." 
Jeremiah6:15 Thil tenawm an tih pawhin an zak em ni? Hnai lo e, an zak tawp lo a, an hmai pawh a sen hek lo: Chuvangin tlute zingah chuan an tlu ve ang: Anni ka hrem hunah chuan paihthlakin an awm ang. LALPA'n a ti." 
Jeremiah6:16 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Kalkawngahte ding u la, en rawh u, Kawng tha awmna kawng hlunte chu zawt rawh u, Tah chuan kal u la, I thlarau tan chawlohna in hmu ang; Anni erawh chuan, ""tah chuan kan kal lo ang,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah6:17 Tin, in tan ralvengtute ka ruat a, ""Tawtawrawt ri chu ngaithla rawh u,"" tiin: Anni erawh chuan, ""Kan ngaithla lo ang,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah6:18 Chuvangin, aw, hnamte u, ngaithla u la, Aw, pungkhawmhote u, an chunga lo thleng tur chu hre rawh u." 
Jeremiah6:19 Aw, leilung, ngaithla rawh, Ngai teh, he mite chungah hian chhiatna ka rawn thlen dawn: An ngaihtuahna rahte ngei chu; Ka thute an ngaihthlak loh avangin; Ka dante lah chu an paih thla der a." 
Jeremiah6:20 Eng atan nge Seba ata beraw te, Ram hla tak ata fute ka hnen a lo thlen thin le? In halral inthawinate lawm tlak a ni lo a, In inthawinate chuan mi tilawm hek lo." 
Jeremiah6:21 Chuvangin LALPA'n heti hian a ti, Heng mite hnenah hian tluknate ka dah ang a, Tah chuan pate chu an fapate nen an tlu za ang a, Thenawm leh a thian pawh an boral ang." 
Jeremiah6:22 Tin, LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, hmar lam ram ata mite an lo kal e, Lei hmun tap ata hnam ropui tak mai an lo thawk chhuak e." 
Jeremiah6:23 Thal ngul leh fei an keng a, Nunrawng tak, zahngaihna reng reng nei lo an ni, An thawm chu tuipui ri hum hum ang a ni a; Sakawr chungahte an chuang a, Mi tin, raltu mi anga inthuamin, Aw, Zion fanu, an rawn bei dawn a che." 
Jeremiah6:24 An thangva kan hria a, kan kutte a zawi zo ta, Na chuan min man ta, Hmeichhe nau vei na ang mai chu." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ramah kal chhuak suh u la, Kalkawngah pawh kal hek suh u, Tah chuan hmelma khandaih a awm si a, Kil tinah ral a ti e." 
Jeremiah6:26 Aw, ka mi, ka fanu, saiip puan feng la, Vut zingah tal rawh; Fapa mal sun angin sun la, tap vak vak teh, Tichhetu kan chungah a lo thleng thut dawn si." 
Jeremiah6:27 Ka mite zingah chhintu-ah leh fiantu-ah ka siam chia, An awm dan i hriat a, i fiah theihna'n." 
Jeremiah6:28 An zain helhmang, luhlul tak, Sawichhiat hmanga vak vel, Dar leh thir ang an ni a, Chhe takin an che a." 
Jeremiah6:29 Pumin a chhem huau huau a, Meiah chuan suan chu a tuiral a, Tihthianghlim tumna chu a thlawn mai a ni, Mi sualte paih bo an ni si lo.Mite chuan tangkaraw ek chhia an vuah ang, LALPA'n anmahni a hnawl avangin." 
Jeremiah6:30 Mite chuan tangkaraw ek chhia an vuah ang, LALPA'n anmahni a hnawl avangin." 
Jeremiah7:1 LALPA hnen ata Jeremia hnena thu lo thleng chu: 
Jeremiah7:2 LALPA in kawngkaah chuan ding la, chutah chuan he thu hi puang la, heti hian ti rawh: 'Nangni Juda mi zawng zawng, LALPA be tura he'ng kawngkaa lutte chuan LALPA thu hi ngaithla rawh u.'" 
Jeremiah7:3 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: In awm dan leh in thiltihte chu siam tha ula, he hmunah hian ka chentir ang che u." 
Jeremiah7:4 Hei hi LALPA in, LALPA in, LALPA in a nih hi,' tih dawt thute hi ring suh u." 
Jeremiah7:5 In awm dan leh in thiltihte chu in siam that tak meuh a, m leh a thenawm kara thu dik taka in relsak a." 
Jeremiah7:6 hnam dang mite, pa nei lo te, hmeithaite in hnehchhiah loh a, he hmunah hian mi fel thisen in chhuah loh a, in that lohna tura pathian dangte in um hek loh chuan," 
Jeremiah7:7 he ram hmasang ata in thlahtute hnena ka pekah hian kumkhuain ka chentir ang che u. 
Jeremiah7:8 Ngai rawh u, dat thu, sawtna awm hlei lo chu in ring zawk a." 
Jeremiah7:9 Rukruin, tualthatin, uirein, dawta chhia chhamin Baal hnenah rimtui halin, pathian dang, in rhait ngai lohte umin," 
Jeremiah7:10 tin, he in, keima hming ngei vuahah hian ka hmaah lo dingin, he'ng thil tenawm zawng zawngte hi ti zel chungin, ""Chhan chhuah ka ni ta,"" in ti dawn em ni? Ngai teh u, kei, keimah ngei hian ka hmu alawm, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah7:11 He in, ka hming ngei hi vuah hi, in mithmuhah suamhmangte puk ang em ni? Ngai teh u,kei, keimah ngei hian ka hmu alawm, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah7:12 Atira ka hming ka chentirna, ka hmun Silo-ah chuan kal teh u, ka mi Israel suahsualna avanga ka thiltih chu va en rawh u." 
Jeremiah7:13 Tunah hian he'ng thil zawng zawngte in tih a, zing tak taka thova in hnena thu ka sawi lo sawite hi in ngaihthlak loh a, ka lam che ua, in chhan loh avang hian." 
Jeremiah7:14 Silo chunga ka tih ang khan he in, ka hming vuah, angmahni leh in thlahtute hnena ka hmun pek, in rin thin chungah hian ka ti dawn a ni." 
Jeremiah7:15 In unau zawng zawng, Ephraim chi pum pui meuh pawh ka paih chhuak ang khan ka mithmuh ata ka paih chhuak ang che u, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah7:16 Chuvangin, he'ng mite tan hian tawngtai suh la, au chhuakin tawngtai suh la, ka hnenah dilsak hek suh: ka ngaithla dawn si lo che a." 
Jeremiah7:17 Juda khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem kawtlaiahte an thiltih chu i hmu lo em ni? 
Jeremiah7:18 Naupangten thing an fawm a, an paten mei an chhem a, hmeichhiaten van lalnu hnena hlan tur chhang an hmet a, pathian dangte tan in tur thilhlan an hung chhuak a, mi tihthinrimna mai turin." 
Jeremiah7:19 Keimah em ni mi tihthinrim? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: anmahni zahna turin anmahni a ni zawk lo'm ni? 
Jeremiah7:20 Chuvangin Lalpa, Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, he hmun chungah te, mi leh sa chungah te, rama thing leh lei rah rah chungah te ka thinrimna leh thinurna chu ka hrithla ang; a kang ang a, a mit lo ang." 
Jeremiah7:21 Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: In inthawinaahte chuan halral inthawinate belh u la, sa ei rawh u." 
Jeremiah7:22 halral thilhlante emaw inthawinate emaw chungchangah chuan in thlahtute hnenah thu ka sawi lo a, Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chauh lai pawh khan thu ka pe hek lo:" 
Jeremiah7:23 Ka aw ngaithla u la, in Pathian ka ni ang a, nangni pawh ka mite in ni ang; in that theihna turin in awm dan tur ka hrilh zawng anwg che u zawm rawh u,"" tiin thu ka pe zawk a ni." 
Jeremiah7:24 Mahse an ngaithla lo a, beng an dawh hek lo: an thinlung sual chhuchhetin anmahni thu thuin an awm ta zawk a, hma lam pan aiin an hnungtawlh ta zawk a ni." 
Jeremiah7:25 In thlahtute Aigupta ram ata an chhuah si atanga vawiin ni thleng hian ka rawngbawltu, zawlnei zawng zawngte zing tak taka thoin in hnenah ka tir ni tin thin a." 
Jeremiah7:26 Mahse mi ngaithla chuang lo a, beng an dawh hek lo: an rilru an tikhau a, an thlahtute ai chuan an sual ta awk a." 
Jeremiah7:27 Tin, he'ng thu zawng zawngte hi an hnenah i sawi tur a ni: mahse an ngaithla lo vang che; anmahni ko ang a, an chhang lo ang che." 
Jeremiah7:28 An hnenah, ""He hnam hi LALPA an Pathian aw ngaithla lo a, thununna dawng lo hnam an nih hi,"" i ti ang a: thudik a boral a, an ka ata paih bo a ni ta." 
Jeremiah7:29 I sam tan la, paih bo la, hmun sang kawlhahte tap chhuak rawh; LALPA'n a thinurna dawngtu chhuanhote chu paihthlain a hnuchhawn chu paihthlain a hnuchhawn ta si a." 
Jeremiah7:30 Juda fae chuan ka mithmuhah thil sual an ti si a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: ka hming vuah inah chuan tibawlhhlawh turin an thil tenawmte chu an tdah ta." 
Jeremiah7:31 An fanute, an fapate hal turin Ben-Hinom ruamah chuan Tophet bawlhmunte an siam a; chung chu ka thupek a ni lo a, ka rilruah pawh a lut ngai hek lo." 
Jeremiah7:32 chuvangin ngai teh u, nite chu a lo thleng danw, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: chu ruam chu,""Tophet"" vuah a ni tawh lo ang a, ""Ben Hinom ruam,"" vauh a ni hek lo ang; ""Insamna ruam"" vuah a ni tawh zawk ang: Tophet-ah chuan an phum ang a, phumna turhmun dang a awm tawh loh avangin." 
Jeremiah7:33 Mite ruang chu chungleng savate leh ramsate chaw a ni ang: tuma'n an hnawt bo lo ang.Tin, Juda khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem khawlaiahte chuan hlim thawmte leh lawm rite, moneitu awte, mo awte pawh ka tireh ang: a ram chu a tiau dawn si a." 
Jeremiah7:34 Tin, Juda khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem khawlaiahte chuan hlim thawmte leh lawm rite, moneitu awte, mo awte pawh ka tireh ang: a ram chu a tiau dawn si a." 
Jeremiah8:1 Chumi hunah chuan, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: Juda lalho ruh te, a hotute ruh te, puithiamho ruh te zawlneiho ruh te, Jerusalema chengho ruhte an thlan ata an la chhuak ang;" 
Jeremiah8:2 ni te, thla te, vana awm zawng zawng, an hmangaih a, rawng an bawl a, an u a, an zawn a, chibai an bukate hmaah chuan an pho chhuak ang: lak khawm an ni tawh lo vang a, phum an ni hek lo ang; lei chunga ekdur mai tur an ni ang." 
Jeremiah8:3 He mi chhungkaw sual tak la awm chhun zawg zawng, ka hnawh darhna hmuna la chambangte chuan nun aiin thih an thlang zawk ang, tih hi sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah8:4 Chu lo pawh chu an hnenah heti hian i sawi tur a ni: LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Mi an tlukin an tho leh lo ang em ni? Mi a pen boin a lo kir leh lo ang em ni? 
Jeremiah8:5 Engatinge he Jerusalem mite hi, Kumkhuaa hnungtawlh tura an tawlh thluk tak le? Bumna an vuan tlat, kir leh an duh lo." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ka beng chhiin ka ngaithla a, Tuma'n thudik an sawi lo, Tuma'n, eng nge ka tih tak? Tiin an suahsualna an sim hek lo; Mi tinin mahni kawng an hawi ta theuh a, Indo hmuna sakawr lim buan buan ang maiin." 
Jeremiah8:7 A ni, vana vacha chuan a hunbite a hria a, Thuro te, Vamur te, kanghlaite chu a hun takah an lo thleng thin a. Ka mite erawh chuan LALPA thu ruat an hre lo." 
Jeremiah8:8 Engtin nge, Mi fing kan ni, LALPA dan kan hnenah a awm, in tih ni? Ngai teh u, lehkha ziak tute kawlawm dawthei chuan, Dawtah an chantir zawk a ni." 
Jeremiah8:9 Mi fingte chu an zakin an zam ang a, Manin an awm ang; Ngai teh u LALPA thu chu an paih thla a, Anmahniah eng finna nge awm le?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Chuvangin an nuuite chu mi dangte hnenah ka pe ang a, An lote paw a la neitu turte hnenah; Mi tin, a te ber atanga a ropui ber thlengin Awh hmang an ni a. Zawlnei atanga puithiam thleng pawhin Mi tinin bum an hmang si." 
Jeremiah8:11 Ka fanu, ka mite hliam chu ngaih sam takin, ""A tha a lawm, a tha alawm"" tiin an thawi a, A tha hauh si lo a." 
Jeremiah8:12 Thil tenawm an tih hi an zak em le? Hnai lo e, an zak hauh lo a, an hmel pawh a sen hek lo. Chuvangin tlute zingah an tlu ve ang a, Anmahni hrem hunah chuan paihthlakin an awm ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah8:13 Anmahni ka tiboral vek ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: Grep hruite a rah lo vang a, Theipui kungte a rah hek lo ang; A hnah pawh a vuai ang a, Anmahni chim botu turte ka ruat tawh a ni." 
Jeremiah8:14 Engatinge kan la thut reng le? Pung khawm u la, khawpui kulh neiahte lut u la, Chut ah chuan i boral dial ang u; LALPA chunga kan sual tak avangin; LALPA kan pathian chuan tur tui min intirin, Boralnaah min dah a ni." 
Jeremiah8:15 Muanna kan zawng a, thatna engmah a lo thleng lo, Tihdamna hun tur pawh, ngai teh thlaphanna mai." 
Jeremiah8:16 An sakawr hnar tum ri chu Dan atangin hriat a ni a, An sakawr chak hram thawmah chuan ram pumpui chu a khur a, An lo thleng a, a chhunga awm zawng zawng, An ei zo vek ta, khawpui leh a chhunga chengte nen." 
Jeremiah8:17 Ngai teh u, in zingah rulpui ka tir ang a, Rul tur nei, khawi ngam rual lohte chu: Chung chuan a chu ang che u, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah8:18 Aw lungngaihnaah hian inthlamuan thei tak i la aw! Chhungrilah chuan ka thinlung a chau zo ta. 
Jeremiah8:19 Ngai teh u, ram hla tak ata, Ka fanu ka mite tap thawm chu, Zionah chuan LALPA a awm lawm ni; A chhngah a LAL a awm na nge? A milim siam chawpte leh hnam milemtein, Engahnge mi tihthinur ni?" 
Jeremiah8:20 Buh seng hun a liam ta, Nipui a tawp ta, chhandamin kan la awm lo." 
Jeremiah8:21 Ka mite ka fanu natnaah chuan ka a ve si, Ka sun a, thlaphannain mi vuan ta.Gilead-ah thinghnai damdawi a awm lawm ni le? Chutah chuan tidamtu a awm na nge? Engati nge ka mite, ka fanu a hrisel theih loh?" 
Jeremiah8:22 Gilead-ah thinghnai damdawi a awm lawm ni le? Chutah chuan tidamtu a awm na nge? Engati nge ka mite, ka fanu a hrisel theih loh?" 
Jeremiah9:1 Ka lu hi tui ni se, ka mit hi mittui hnar ni teh se aw! Ka mi, ka fanu thlahte tan chhun zanin ka tap tur;" 
Jeremiah9:2 Thlalerah khualbuk nei thei i la aw! Ka mita kalsanin, awm bosan teh i la; Uire hmang mi an ni vek si a, Bumhmang awm khawm mai an ni." 
Jeremiah9:3 An lei chu thal ngul angin dawtah an hmang a, Ramah an thang lian, thutakah thang loin, Sual lamah an thang zel a,kei mi hre lo in,Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah9:4 Mahni thenawm lakah fimkhur theuh u la, In unaute reng ring suh u; Unaute chu bumhmang an ni si; =henawmte pawh rel hmang an ni." 
Jeremiah9:5 Mahni thenawm theuh an bum ang, Thudik lah an sawi lo ang; An lei dawtsawi an zirtir a, Khawlohna thawkin an hah thin." 
Jeremiah9:6 Bumhmang zingah i cheng a, An bumna avangin kei mi hre duh lo, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah9:7 Chuvangin sipaihote LALPA'n heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, anni chu ka titui ang a, ka fiah ang: Ka mi, ka fanu avang chuan eng dang nge ka tih tak ang le?" 
Jeremiah9:8 An lei chu thihna thal a ni a, bum thu a sawi thin, Miin kain a thenawm hnenah rem thu sawi mah se, A thinlungah amah chu a chang khiau thin." 
Jeremiah9:9 Heng thil tihte avang hian ka hrem lo ang em ni? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: Hanm hetiang lakah hian phuba ka la lo ang maw? 
Jeremiah9:10 Tlangte tan ka tap ang a, ka chiau vawng vawng ang, Thlaler hlobet hmunte ka sun ang a, Tuma kal tawhlohna tura a kan zawh tak avangin, Ran thawm miten an hre tawh lo ang a, Chungleng savate leh ramsate pawh an tlanchhia a, an kal bo tawh." 
Jeremiah9:11 Tin, Jerusalem chu thil chhe awm khawm maiah ka siam dawn, Sihalte chenna hmun a ni ang; Juda khawpuite chu chengtu awm loin ka titiau ang." 
Jeremiah9:12 Hei hi hre thiam turin mi fing chu tu nge ni? Puang tura LALPA thu sawi lo dawngtu chu tu nge ni? Eng vangin nge ram chu a chhiat zawh a, tuma kal lohna tura thlaler anga a kan tak ni?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Tin, LALPA chuan, Ka dan, an h maa ka dah, an kalsan a, ka tawngka chhuak an awih lo a, an zawm hek lo a," 
Jeremiah9:14 an thinlung khauh zawm a, an thlahtuten an zirtir Baalate chu an um tak zawk avangin;" 
Jeremiah9:15 Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, anni, he'ng mite ngei hi saiin ka hrai ang a, tui kha ka intir bawk ang." 
Jeremiah9:16 Hnam, anmahni leh an thlahtute pawhin an hriat ngai lohte zingah ka tidarh ang: ka tihboral vek hma chu khandaih ka umtir ang." 
Jeremiah9:17 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngaihtuah u la, hmeichhia tap mite lo kal turin ko rawh u, Hmeichhe themthiamte chu lo kal turin ko bawk rawh u." 
Jeremiah9:18 Lo hmanhmawh se la, min rawn tah khum teh se. Ka mittui a luan a, kan mitahte tui a puh theihna'n." 
Jeremiah9:19 Zion ata tap thawm hriat a ni si a, Kan chhiat nasatzia tak chu: Kan hrilhhai em em a, Kan ram kan kalsan avang leh, Kan chennate an paihthlak avangin." 
Jeremiah9:20 Aw nangni hmeichhiate u, LALPA thu chu ngaithla u la, A kam chhuak thu in bengah lut se la, In fanute tah zirtir u la, Mi tinin a thenawmnu hnenah sunna hla." 
Jeremiah9:21 Kan tukverhahte thihna lawn lutin Kan lal inahte a lut tawh si a; Pawn atangin naupang tibo tur leh, Khawlai ata tlangval tibo turin." 
Jeremiah9:22 LALPA thu chhuak chuan heti hian a ti:Mi ruangte chu tamlakah ekdur angin an tlu ang a, Buh sengtu buh hmaih ang maiin; Tuma'n an khawm tawh lo ang,"" ti rawh." 
Jeremiah9:23 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Mi fing chuan a finna chhuang suh se la, mi chak chuan a chakna chhuang hek suh se la, mi hausa chuan a sum leh pai chhuang hek suh se." 
Jeremiah9:24 A chhuang apiang erawh chuan hei hi chhuang rawh se, kei LALPA hi, ngilneihna te, reldikna te, f elna leia hmang thintu chu ka ni tih mi hriat a, a hriat thiamna chu; he'ng thilte hi ka lawmzawng a ni si, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah9:25 Ngai teh u, nite chu a lo thleng e, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, serhtan ni si, tan loh ang maite chu ka hrem ang;Aigupta te, Juda te, Edom te, Amon fate leh Moab-te leh thlalera cheng, baksam ziat kawnghote; hnam zawng zawng chu serhtanhote an ni si a, Israel chhungte zawng awng pawh thinlunga serhtan loh an ni." 
Jeremiah9:26 Aigupta te, Juda te, Edom te, Amon fate leh Moab-te leh thlalera cheng, baksam ziat kawnghote; hnam zawng zawng chu serhtanhote an ni si a, Israel chhungte zawng awng pawh thinlunga serhtan loh an ni." 
Jeremiah10:1 Aw, Israel chhungte u, in hnena LALPA thu sawi hi ngaithla rawh u,m" 
Jeremiah10:2 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Hnamte awm dan zir suh la, Vana chhinchhiahnate vangin zam hek suh u;" 
Jeremiah10:3 Mite dante chu engmah lo mai a ni si a, Ramhnuaiah thing an kit a, Hreipuia mi themthiam kutin an chei a," 
Jeremiah10:4 Tangkarua leh rangkachakin an chei a, A chet lohna'n thirkilhna leh tubohin an kilh a." 
Jeremiah10:5 Leipuia sava hlauh tur mili mai an ni a. An tawng thei lo. Mahniin an kal theih loh avangin, Put sawn an ngai thin; Anni chu hlau suh u, Thil chhia an tithei lo a, thil tha an tithei hek lo." 
Jeremiah10:6 Aw LALPA, nang ang tumah an awm lo e, I ropui a, i hming chaknain a thang lian e." 
Jeremiah10:7 Aw hnamte lal, tuin nge tih lo ang che? Chu chu i phu reng si a. Hnamte mi fing zawng zawng zingah te, An ram reng reng zingah pawh, Nang ang reng an awm lo e." 
Jeremiah10:8 Anni zawng mi mawl leh mi a an ni a, Milim zirtirna chu thing mai a ni." 
Jeremiah10:9 Taris ata tangkaraw chher an rawn la a, Upaz ata rangkachak pawh, Mi themthiam kut chhuak vek an ni e." 
Jeremiah10:10 LALPA erawh chu Pathian tak a ni, Pathian nung chatuan Lal a ni e, A thinurin lei a nghing a, Hnamten a thinrimna an tuar lo." 
Jeremiah10:11 An hnenah hetiang hian in ti tur a ni: Pathiante, lei leh van siamtu ni hlei lote chu lei ata an boral ang a, van hnuai atangin an bo vek ang." 
Jeremiah10:12 A thiltihtheihnain lei a siam a, A finnain khawvel a din a, A remhriatnain van a tiparh a." 
Jeremiah10:13 A aw a chhuah chuan, vanah tui a ri hum hum a. Kawlkil ata chhum a chhohtir a, Ruah surna'n kawl a phettir a, A robawm ata thli a tlehtir a." 
Jeremiah10:14 Mi tin an mawl a, hriatna an nei lo. Rangkachak chhertu pawhin a lem chher chu a zahpui a. A milim chhun chu dawt mai a ni si, Anmahniah thaw pawh a awm lo." 
Jeremiah10:15 Engmah lo mai an ni, bumna hna mai, An hremna hunah an bo mai ang." 
Jeremiah10:16 Jakoba chanvo zawng hetiang a ni lo. Thil zawng zawng bul a ni si; Israel hi a roluah hnam a ni a, A hming chu Sipaihote LALPA a ni." 
Jeremiah10:17 Aw nang, huala awm mek chuan, I puanthuah lei ata la khawm rawh." 
Jeremiah10:18 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, tunah rama chengte ka thing chhuak ang, An hriat thamin ka tihreawm ang." 
Jeremiah10:19 Ka na avangin ka chung a pik e, Ka hliam a na a ni, Mahse, ""Hei zet hi hrehawmna chu a ni, Ka tuar mai tur a ni,"" ka ti." 
Jeremiah10:20 Ka puan in a chhe ta, ka chat vek a, Ka hnen ata ka fate an chhuak a, an awm ta lo, Ka puan in zar tur an awm tawh lo, Ka puanzar tungding turte." 
Jeremiah10:21 Beram vengtute chu an mawl a, Lalpa rawn nachang an hre lo; Chuvang chuan an hmuingil lo, An beram rualte an darh zo." 
Jeremiah10:22 Ngai rawh u, thawm chu a lo thleng, hmar lam ata buaina ropui tak mai, Juda khawpuite titiauin, Sihal chenna hmuna chantir turin." 
Jeremiah10:23 Aw LALPA, mihring awm dan chu, mahni thu mai a ni lo tih ka hre ta: Tungchhova kal mihringah hian, A pheikhai hruai tur a awm lo." 
Jeremiah10:24 Aw LALPA, mi thunun la, a tawk chauhin, Thinur loin, chutilochu mi tibo dah ang e.Awze mi, nang hre ngai lote chungah leh, I hming lam ngai lote chungah I thinurna hrithla ang che;Jakoba an ei zo a, A ni, an ei zo a, an ei ral a, A chenna ram an titiau a." 
Jeremiah10:25 Awze mi, nang hre ngai lote chungah leh, I hming lam ngai lote chungah I thinurna hrithla ang che;Jakoba an ei zo a, A ni, an ei zo a, an ei ral a, A chenna ram an titiau a." 
Jeremiah11:1 Jeremia hnena LALPA thu lo thleng chu: 
Jeremiah11:2 He thuthlung thute hi ngaithla u la, Juda mite leh Jerusalema chengte hnenah sawi rawh u:" 
Jeremiah11:3 Tin, nang chuan an hnenah, ""LALPA Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: He thuthlung thute ngaithla lotu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se:" 
Jeremiah11:4 chu chu in thlahtute, Aigupta ram, thir rawhtuina ata ka hruai chhuah nia, ka tawngka chhuak awih u la, thu ka pek zawng zawngte chu ti rawh u, tia ka thupek chu a ni: tichuan ka mite in ni ang a,, kei chu in Pathian ka ni ang:" 
Jeremiah11:5 in thlahtute hnena khawzu leh hnute tuia luang ram chhechhama pek ka tiam kha ka hlen theihna'n vawiinah a awm ang hian, ti rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, kei chuan, ""Amen, Aw LALPA"" tiin ka chhang a." 
Jeremiah11:6 I LALPA chuan ka hnenah, ""Juda khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem khawlaiahte he'ng thu zawng zawng hi puang la,;He thuthlung thute hi ngaithla u la, zawm rawh u." 
Jeremiah11:7 In thlahtute Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah ni ata tun thlengin ka tawngka chhuak awih rawh u,"" tiin ka hriattir thin a." 
Jeremiah11:8 Mahse an awih lo a, beng an dawh hek lo, mi tin, mahni thinlung sual ang zelin an awm ta zawk a. Chuvangin he'ng thuthlung thu, ti tura thu ka pek, an tih loh zawng hi an chungah ka rawn thlen ta a ni,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah11:9 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, ""Juda mite leh Jerusalema chengte zingah phiarrukna a awm." 
Jeremiah11:10 An thlahtu, ka thu ngaithla duh lotute khawlohna lamah chuan an let leh a: pathian dangte rawng bawl turin an kal a: Israel chhungte leh Juda chhungte chuan an thlahtute hnena ka thuthlung siam chu an bawhchhe ta." 
Jeremiah11:11 Chuvangin LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, an chungah thil tha lo, an pumpelh tawp loh tur chu ka rawn thlen ang; mi au vang a,mahse ka chhang lo ang." 
Jeremiah11:12 Tin, Juda khawpuite leh Jerusalema chengte chuan pathian, an hnena rimtui an halna thinte chu an au vang a, mahse an buai hunah chuan chung chuan an chhanhim tawp lo ang." 
Jeremiah11:13 Aw Juda, i pathiante chu i khawpui zat an ni si: thil zahthlak tak, Baala hnena rimtui halna tur maicham meuh pawh Jerusalem kawtthler zat ngawtin in lo din ta a." 
Jeremiah11:14 Chuvangin hengte hi tawngtaisak suh la, an tan dilna emaw aw emaw chhuah hek suh; an buai huna mi auh chu ka ngaithla dawn si lo a." 
Jeremiah11:15 Thil tenawm tak ti chungin, Ka duh tak chuan ka inah pual eng nge a neih? Thu intiamte leh sa serh chuan In chhiatna tur a pumpelhtir thei ang che u em ni? In chhuang thei em ni?" 
Jeremiah11:16 LALPA chuan i hmingah, Oliv thing hring, rah tha mawi pui, a ti chia, Ri huau huauin a chungah mei a chhem a, A zarte pawh a tliak zo ta." 
Jeremiah11:17 Sipaihote LALPA, nangmah phuntu che chuan, Israel chhungte leh Juda chhungte sualna, Baala hnena rimtui hhlana, mi tihthinrimna thil, anmahni tana an thawh chhuah chunga thil tha lo tur thu chu i chungah a puang chhuak ta." 
Jeremiah11:18 LALPA chuan mi hriattir a, ka hre ta: Tichuan nang ngeiin an thiltihte mi kawhhmuh ta." 
Jeremiah11:19 Kei erawh chu beram no nunnem tak, Talh tura hruai ang mai ka ni; Thing chu a rah chawpin, i tichhia ang u khai, Mi nung ram ata ani chu i tibo daih ang u, A hming reng reng hriat a nih lohna'n, Tia ka chunga an thil phiar chu ka lo hre daih lo." 
Jeremiah11:20 Mahse, aw Sipaihote LALPA, dik taka rel thintu, Chhungril lam leh thinlung fiah thintu,An chunga i phuba lak chu mi hmuhtir ang che, Ka chungchang thu hi i hnenah ka kawltir si a." 
Jeremiah11:21 Chuvang chuan Sipaihote LALPA chuan Anathoth mi, i nuna zawngtu, ""Kan kuta i thih lohna'n LALPA hmingin thu sawi suh,"" titute chungchangah chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah11:22 Ngai rawh u, anmahni ka hrem ang a, tlangvalte chu khandaihin an thi ang a, an fanute, an fapate chu tamin an thi ang a;thi bang reng an awm lo ang: Anathoth mite chungah chuan thil tha lo ka thlen dawn si a, an hremna kum tur ngei chu." 
Jeremiah11:23 thi bang reng an awm lo ang: Anathoth mite chungah chuan thil tha lo ka thlen dawn si a, an hremna kum tur ngei chu." 
Jeremiah12:1 Aw LALPA, i hnenah ka phunnawi pawhin, Nang zawng i dik thin; Mahse ka vuina thu chu ka sawi tho dawn. Engati nge mi suaksualte kawng chu a hmuingil thin ni? Engati nge bumhmang tawh phawtte chu nuamsa taka an awm thin le?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Anni chu i phun a, a ni, zung an kai ta a, An thang a, a ni, rah an chhuah ta: An hmuiah chuan i hnai a, An chhungrilah zawng i hla si."
