Jeremiah12:3 Aw LALPA, kei erawh chu mi hria a, Mi hmu a, i lamah ka thinlung i fiah thin, Anni chu beram talh tur ang maiin hnuk chhuak la, An talhna ni tur chu ruat ang che." 
Jeremiah12:4 Ram chuan eng chen nge a sun ang a, Ram pum pui thlaite chu an vuai ang? A chengate suahsualna avangin Ramsate chu an ral zo a, savate pawh; ""Kan hun hnuhnung chu an hmu lo ang,"" an tih avangin." 
Jeremiah12:5 Kea kal mite chu i tlansiakpuia, an tihchauh tawh che chuan, Engtin nge sakawrte i tlansiakpui theih ang? Muanna ramah him takin awm mah la, Jordan ram ngawah chuan engtin nge i tih ang?" 
Jeremiah12:6 I unaute, i pa chhungkua ngeite chuan, Anni ngei chuan an bum tawh si chia; Anni chuan um chein ring takin an au chia, Thu tha tak sawi mahse awih reng reng suh." 
Jeremiah12:7 Ka in-lo kalsanin ka roluah tur ka paih bo ta; Ka nunnain a ngaih taki chu, A hmelma hnenah ka pe ta." 
Jeremiah12:8 Ka roluah tur chu ramhnuai sakeibaknei ang a lo ni ta, Ka lakah a rawl a chhuah a, Chuvangin ka hua a ni." 
Jeremiah12:9 Ka roluah tur chu ka tan sahel ei sava tial a ni em ni? Ramsa zawng va khawm ula, Ei turin rawn hruai rawh u." 
Jeremiah12:10 Berampu tam takte chuan ka grep huan an tichhia a, Ka chan chu an rap bet a, Ka chanvo nuam tak mai chu Thlaler ram tiau an chantir ta." 
Jeremiah12:11 Ram tiauah an siam ta a, A tiau a, ka hnenah a vui a ni, A ram pum pui a tiau a, Mahse tuma'n an ngaihsak lo." 
Jeremiah12:12 Thlalera tlang kawlh zawng zawngah te, Tichhetute an lo thleng ta a; Ram tawp lehlam atanga lehlam thlengin LALPA khandaih chuan a ei zo ta si a, Muanna nei reng an awm ta lo." 
Jeremiah12:13 Buh chi an tuh a, hling an seng a, An intihah hrep a, hlawkna awm si loin, LALPA thinur nasa tak avangin In rah chhuahte chu in zahpui ang." 
Jeremiah12:14 Ka mi Israelte hnena roluah tura ka pek khawih chhetu, ka thenawm sualte zawng zawng chungchangah chuan LALPA chuan hetiangin a ti: ""Ngai rawh u, an ram ata ka pawt chhuak ang a, an zing ata Juda chhungte ka phawi chhuak ang." 
Jeremiah12:15 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, ka pawh chhuah hnuah anmahni ka khawngaih leh ang a, mi tin, roluah tur leh mi tin, ama ram ngeiah chuan ka rawn hruai ang." 
Jeremiah12:16 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Baala hnena ka mite chhechham an zirtir ang bawk a, ka hming a, 'LALPA a nuna a nun chhung chu' tia chhechham an zir a, ka mite awm dan ngun taka an zir chuan ka mite zingah ka din ang.Mahse an ngaihthlak loh chuan chu mi hnam chu a pawhin ka pawt chhuak ang a, ka tichhe zo ang,"" tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah12:17 Mahse an ngaihthlak loh chuan chu mi hnam chu a pawhin ka pawt chhuak ang a, ka tichhe zo ang,"" tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah13:1 LALPA chuan ka hnenah heti hian a ti a: Hrenpuan zai sin lei la, tihuh loin hreng rawh." 
Jeremiah13:2 Tichuan LALPA thu ang zelin hren chu ka lei a, ka hreng ta a." 
Jeremiah13:3 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo th leng leh a," 
Jeremiah13:4 Hrenpuan i lei, i hren kha la la, tho la, Euphrates lui pan la, chuta lung keh karah chuan thukru rawh, tiin." 
Jeremiah13:5 Tichuan LALPA thu mi pek angin ka kal a,Euphrates lui bulah chuan ka thukru ta a." 
Jeremiah13:6 tin, ni tam tak hnuah chuan LALPA'n ka hnenah, Tho la, Euphrates lui pan la, hrenpuan ka thukruktir che kha la chhuak rawh, a ti a." 
Jeremiah13:7 Tichuan Euphrates lui lamah chuan ka kal ta a, ka han hai a, hrenpuan chu ka thukrukna ata ka han phawrh chhuak a. Ngai teh, hrenpuan chu a lo mawih vek a; eng atan mah a tlaktlai ta lo." 
Jeremiah13:8 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a:" 
Jeremiah13:9 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Hetiang bawk hian Juda chapopui leh Jerusalem chhuantawlawl chu ka tichhe dawn a ni. 
Jeremiah13:10 He hnam sual, ka thute ngaithla duh lo a, anmahni rilru ngawltawt zai zuia pathian dangte rawng bawl leh be tura um zawktute hi he hrenpuan, eng atan maha tlaktlai lo ang hi an ni ang." 
Jeremiah13:11 Hrenpuan chu mi kawnga a bet reng ang hian Israeal chhungkaw pum pui leh Juda chhungkaw pum pui hi ka mite leh ka hmingthanna leh ka mawina leh ka ropuina an lo nih theihna'n ka hnena bet reng tura ka siam an ni si a; mahse an bengkhawn lo. 
Jeremiah13:12 Tin, het hu hi an hnenah i sawi tur a ni: LALPA Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Peng tinreng mai uainin a khat ang, tiin. Tin, annin i hnenah, Peng tinreng mai uainin a khat ang tih chu kan hre lo em ni? An ti ang a." 
Jeremiah13:13 Ti nangin an hnenah, LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, he rama cheng zawng zawng, Davida thutthlenga thu lalte, puithiamte, zawlneite leh Jerusalema cheng zawng zawngte zuy ruihnain ka tikhat ang." 
Jeremiah13:14 Anmahni chu ka insuttir ang a, pate an fate nen, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: anmahni ka tihboral lohna khawp zawngin anni chu ka khawngaihin ka zuahin ka lainat lo ang." 
Jeremiah13:15 Ngaithla u la, beng dawh rawh u; Chapo suh u, LALPA chuan thu a thlah tawh a ni." 
Jeremiah13:16 LALPA in Pathian chu chawimawi u la, Thimna a thlentir hmaa thimhlim tlang chungahte in ke a phet hma hian, Eng in beisei lai takin thimah a chantir a, Thim chhah takah a siam dawn a ni." 
Jeremiah13:17 Mahse in ngaihthlak loh chuan In chapona avangin fianrialah ka tap ka tap ang; Ka mittui pawh nasa takin a luang reng a, LALPA beram rual chu sala kaih an nih avangin." 
Jeremiah13:18 Lal leh a nu hnenah te chuan, Thu hniam rawh u, in lukhuumte a tla ta si, In lallukhum ropui ngei chu, ti rawh." 
Jeremiah13:19 Chhim khawpuite chu a ping zo ve, tuma hawn rual lohin; Juda zawng zawng salah an tang, A pum puiin an tang zo ve." 
Jeremiah13:20 In mit len u la en rawh u, hmar lam ata lo thawkte saw Beram rual i nei kha khawnge, I beram rual duhawm tak kha?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Nangma'n thiana i siamte kha i chunga an dah hun chuan Engtin nge i tih ang? Hmeichhe nau vei ang mai hian Na i ti hle dawn lo'm ni? 
Jeremiah13:22 Eng vangin nge he'ng hi ka chungah a lo thlen? I ti rilru a nih chuan, i khawlohna avang a sin ni? I fenfual hlim a niha i saruak a lan ni." 
Jeremiah13:23 Ethiopia mi hangin a vun a tidanglamin keitein a zia a thup thei em ni? Chuti a nih chuan nangni thil sual tih ching thinte pawhin Thil tha in tithei ang chu! 
Jeremiah13:24 Thlaler thliin buh si a len ang maiin Anmahni ka tidarh ang. 
Jeremiah13:25 Hei hi i chanvo, i puala ka ruatsak che chu a ni, Mi theihnghilh a, dawt i rinchhan avangin, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah13:26 Tichuan keimah ngeiin i fenfual chu I hmai khuh hialin ka hlimsak ang chia, I zahmawh a lang ang.Tamlaka tlangah te i uirenate, i hur au thawmte, i inphalrai nasatzia te, Chung i thiltih tenawmte chu ka hmu ta. Aw Jerusalem, i chung a pik e! Tihthianghlim i nih hma chu eng chen nge ni dawn?" 
Jeremiah13:27 Tamlaka tlangah te i uirenate, i hur au thawmte, i inphalrai nasatzia te, Chung i thiltih tenawmte chu ka hmu ta. Aw Jerusalem, i chung a pik e! Tihthianghlim i nih hma chu eng chen nge ni dawn?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Khawkheng chungchang Jeremia hnena LALPA thu lo thleng chu: Juda chuan a sun a, a kulh kawngkate a ngui; Leiah an puan dur khumin an kun e, Jerusalem tap thawm a chho." 
Jeremiah14:2 A mi thaten an chhiahhlawhte mi an chawitir a, Tuikhuah an pan a, tui an hmu lo. An tuibel ruakin an kir a; An zam a,a n hrilhai a, an lu an khuh." 
Jeremiah14:3 Lei lah a khi, ram puma ruah tui awm loh vangin. Leilettute chu an zam a, an lu an khuh a." 
Jeremiah14:4 A ni, zukpui pawhin phulah no a hring a, A tlansan e, hnim hring a awm loh vangin." 
Jeremiah14:5 Ram sabengtungte chu mual pawng charah an ding a, Lei thlak hlawiin an thaw hlawp hlawp a: Peh tur awm loh vangin an mit a thim rum rum." 
Jeremiah14:6 Kan khawlohna chuan min hek mah se, I hming vangin aw LALPA rawn thawk ang che; Kan tluknate a tam si a, I chungah ngei thil ka tisual a." 
Jeremiah14:7 Aw nang Israelho nghahfak, mangan laia chhandamtu, Engati nge he ramah hian mikhual ang maia Zan khat riaka zin ang leka i awm le?" 
Jeremiah14:8 Enga ti nge mi chi-ahg ang mai leh Pasaltha, chhandam thei si lo ang maia i awm le? Mahse nang chu, aw LALPA, kan zingah i la awm a, I hming kan pu a, min kalsan suh ang che." 
Jeremiah14:9 LALPA chuan he mite chungchangah hian heti hian a ti: Vah bo hi an duh thin a, an ke pen an sumkar lo; Tichuan LALPA'n anni chu a pawm lo a, An khawlohna chu a hre reng tawh ang a, An sualte chu a hrem ang." 
Jeremiah14:10 LALPA chuan ka hnenah, He mite thatna tur hi dilsak suh." 
Jeremiah14:11 Chaw nghei mah se la an au chu ka ngaithla lo ang a, halral leh buhbal thilhlan hlan mah se la ka pawm lo ang; khandaih te, tam te, hripui tein anmahni ka tiboral zawk ang, a ti a." 
Jeremiah14:12 Ti kei chuan, E, Lalpa PATHIAN, ngai teh, an hnenah zawlneiten, Khandaih in tawk lo ang a, tam in ruat hek lo ang, he hmunah hian muan chiahna ka pe zawk dawn che u a ni, an ti thin a sin, ka ti a." 
Jeremiah14:13 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, zawlneite chuan ka hmingin dawt an hril thin a nih chu; anni chu ka tir lo a, thu ka chah lo a, ka be bawk hek lo. An thil hmuh hleih lohte, thumvawr tlaktlai lo te leh an rilru dawha-nate an hrilh che u a ni, a ti a." 
Jeremiah14:14 chuvang chuan LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ka tirh hleih loha ka hming chhala, He ramah hian tam leh khandaih a thleng lo ang, tia hriltu chung zawlneite chu khandaih leh tamin an boral ang." 
Jeremiah14:15 Tin, an thuhril lo dawnsawngtu hnam pawh hi tam leh khandaih avangin Jerusalem khawtthlerah chuan paih chauh an ni ang a, anmahni leh an nupui te, an fanute an fapate nen, phumtu reng an nei lo ang. An suahsualna chu an chungah ka leih dawn si a." 
Jeremiah14:16 Tin, an hnenah he thu hi i sawi tur a ni; Achhun azanin ka mittui luang rawh se, Hul reng reng suh se, Ka mi, ka fanu nula thianghlim chuan hliampui a tuar e, Kutthlak na tak chu." 
Jeremiah14:17 Daia ka chhuah leh, eheu, khandaiha thahte! Khawpuia ka luh leh, eheu, tampui mitthi! Ram tinah zawlneite, puithiamte an vakvai hlawm a, A ngaihna reng reng an hre lo, tiin." 
Jeremiah14:18 Juda chu i paih thla der em ni? Zion chu i lungten ta elo? Ka tan tihdamna awm lo lekin eng tizia nge min tuartir le? Muanna kan zawng a, thatna engmah a lo thleng lo; Tihdamna hun tur pawh, ngai teh, thlaphanna mai." 
Jeremiah14:19 Aw LALPA, ka suahsualzia kan pha lo e, Kan pute khawlohna nen, i chungah kan tisual ta si a.I hming avangin min hmusit suh la, I lalthutthleng ropui tihminghliau suh la, Ka hnena i thuthlung hre rengin bawh bo suh ang che. Hnam dang pathiante zingah ruah surtir thei an awm em? A nih leh, vanin ruahpui a thlen th ei em ni? Aw LALPA kan Pathian, chu mi chu nang i ni lo'm ni? Heng htil zawng zawng hi i tih a ni si a, Kan nghahfak ber nang i ni e." 
Jeremiah14:20 I hming avangin min hmusit suh la, I lalthutthleng ropui tihminghliau suh la, Ka hnena i thuthlung hre rengin bawh bo suh ang che. Hnam dang pathiante zingah ruah surtir thei an awm em? A nih leh, vanin ruahpui a thlen th ei em ni? Aw LALPA kan Pathian, chu mi chu nang i ni lo'm ni? Heng htil zawng zawng hi i tih a ni si a, Kan nghahfak ber nang i ni e." 
Jeremiah15:1 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah heti hian a ti a: Mosia leh Samuela chu ka hmaah lo ding mah se, ka thinlungin he mite lam hi a hawi chuang lo ang. Ka hmuh phak lohvah hnawt chhuak la, kal bo rawh se!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Tin, khawiah nge kan kal ang? Tia an zawh che chuan an hnenah heti hian i ti tur a ni:Heti hian LALPA chuan a ti:Thihna pual chu thihnaah; khandaih pual chu khandaihah; Tampui pual chu tampuiah, sal tanna pual chu sal tannaah." 
Jeremiah15:3 Thil chi li ka ruatsak ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni:tihlum turin khandaih, pet sawm turin ui, ei zo leh tiral turin chungleng sava leh ramsa kawlhte." 
Jeremiah15:4 Juda lal Hezekia fapa Manasean Jerusalema a thiltih avangin lei lal ram zawng zawngte zinga vawrh lan vawrh lanah ka siam ang. 
Jeremiah15:5 Tuin nge khawngaih ang che, aw Jerusalem? Tuin nge lungngaihpui ang che? I awm dan zawt turin tu nge lo peng ang le?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Nangin mi paih thla a, i hnungtawlh zel a ni, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Chutichuan dimdawi che hi ka ning a, I chungah ka kut ka lek a, ka tiboral che a ni." 
Jeremiah15:7 Ram puma kulh kawngkaahte chuan tawm thennain anmahni ka thian a. Fa lu hlohin ka siam a, ka tiboral a. An awm dan an lamlet loh avangin." 
Jeremiah15:8 Tuipui tiau aia tamin an hmeithaite ka tipung a, Chhun laiah ralkai tawhte chungah tichhetu ka thlen a, Manganna leh thil rapthlak ka tlaktir phut a." 
Jeremiah15:9 Lu sarih hringtu chu a chau a, a zal der a; Chhun a nih laiin a ni a liam ta a,A mualphoin a hming a chhia a. Tin, a la awmte chu an hmelmate kutah Khandaiha thah turin ka pe ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah15:10 Ka nu, ram pum puia nghirnghotu leh hnial kalhtua mi lo hring hi ka chung a va pik em! Ka puktir lo a, ka puksak hek lo; mahse an zain anchhia mi lawh tho si." 
Jeremiah15:11 LALPA chuan, Tihtak meuhvah chuan thil tha atan ka tinghet ang che; tihtak meuhvah chuan chhiatna ni leh hrehawm niah hmelma chu i hnenah kut ka dawhtir ang, a ti a." 
Jeremiah15:12 Miin thir, hmar lama thir leh ngen chu a titliak thei dawn em ni?" 
Jeremiah15:13 I sualna zawng zawng avang hian i sum leh pai leh i ro thilte chu man loin rallak atan ka pe ang, i ram tluanin." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ram i hriat ngai loah chuan i hmelmate rawng ka bawltir ang che. Ka thinrim avangin mei i chunga mut tur chu a alh chhuak ta si a, a ti a." 
Jeremiah15:15 Nangin i hria e, aw LALPA; Mi hre reng la, mi kan ang che, Mi tidhudahtute chungah phuba mi laksak ang che. I dimdawina hi keiin boral phah lo i la, Nangmah avanga hmingchhiat hlawh ka ni tih hria ang che." 
Jeremiah15:16 I thute chu tihlan a ni a, ka ei a,I thute chu ka tan lawmna leh ka thilnlung hlimnaa ni; Aw LALPA, Sipaihote Pathian, i hming kan pu ta si a." 
Jeremiah15:17 Nuamsip bawltuteho zingah ka tel lo a, ka hlimpui hek lo; Nangma kut vangin a falin ka thu a, Lungnih lohnain mi tikhat si a." 
Jeremiah15:18 Engati nge ka na a reh theih loh a,Ka hlia a dam theih loh, tihdam duh lo ang mai hian? Ka lakah kawrte bumhmang tui kang thin ang hi a ni dawn em ni?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Chutichuan LALPA chuan heti hian a ti:I lamlet chuan ngai ka awhtir ang chia, Ka hmaah i ding leh ang. Thil tlaktlai lo ata thil hlu hlir i sawi chhuah chuan, Keima kam chang i ni ang. Anni chuan i lam lo hawi se la, Nang erawh chuan an lam i hawi tur a ni lo." 
Jeremiah15:20 He mite lakah hi chuan ngen kulh bangah ka siam ang chia, An bei ang chia, mahse an hneh lo ang che, Chhandam tur leh chhan chhuak tur chein. I hnenah ka awm si a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni.Mi suaksualte kut ata ka chhan chhuak ang chia, Mi nunrawngte humbeh ata ka tichhuak ang che." 
Jeremiah15:21 Mi suaksualte kut ata ka chhan chhuak ang chia, Mi nunrawngte humbeh ata ka tichhuak ang che." 
Jeremiah16:1 LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a: 
Jeremiah16:2 Nupui i nei tur a ni lo a, he hmunah hian fanu fapate pawh i nei tur a ni hek lo, tiin." 
Jeremiah16:3 fanu fapa he hmuna piangte leh he rama nu leh pa anmahni hringtute chungchangah chuan LALPA'n heti hain a ti a ni: 
Jeremiah16:4 Hripuiin an thi ang a, tuma phum loh leh tuma sun lohin an awm ang; lei chung ekdur ang mai an ni ang; Khandaih te, tam tein an boral ang am an ruangte chu chungleng savate leh ramsate chaw a ni ang." 
Jeremiah16:5 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Khawhar inah lut suh la, sun turin kal suh la, anmahni tah suh; he mite lak ata hi ka thlamuanna ka hlip tawh si a, ngilneihna leh lainatnate nen, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah16:6 He ramah hian mi lian leh mi tete an thi ang a; phu an ni lo ang a, tuma'n an sun lo ang a, an inzaiin an inziah kawn phah lo ang." 
Jeremiah16:7 Lusunte chu an mitthi ngai thlamuan turin tuma'n ei tur an hlui lo ang a, an nu emaw an pa emaw avang pawhin hnemna no in tur tuma'n an hun lo ang." 
Jeremiah16:8 Tin, ei leh ina an zinga thu turin ruaithehna inah i lut tur a ni lo." 
Jeremiah16:9 Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hain a ti si a: Ngai teh u, in mithmuhah, in dam chhung hian mo aw te, moneitu aw te, hlim tawhm te, lawm rite he hmunah hian ka tireh ang." 
Jeremiah16:10 Heng thu zawng zawng hi he mite hnena i hrilh hunah annin, Eng vangin nge LALPA'n kan chungah heti taka thil tha lo a rawn sawi chhuah ni? Eng nge kan khawlohna? LALPA kan Pathian chunga kan thil tihsual chu eng nge ni? Kan tih chuan," 
Jeremiah16:11 heti hian i ti dawn nia: I puten mi kalsan vang a ni, pathian dangte an um a, an rawng an bawl a, an bia a, mi kalsan a, ka dan an zawm lo a;" 
Jeremiah16:12 tin, nangnin in pute aia hleihluakin in ti a, ngai rawh u, mi tinin mahni rilru ngawltawt sual in zui a, kei mi ngaithla lo a;" 
Jeremiah16:13 chuvangin ka ram ata hi nangni leh in pute pawhin in hriat ngai loh ramah chuan ka hnawt chhuak ang che u, tah chuan a chhun azanin pathian dangte rawng in bawl ang, ka khawngaih dawn si lo che u a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah16:14 Tichuan, ngai teh u, nite a lo thleng dawn e, LALPA thu chhua chuan a ti; ""Israel fate Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu a nuna a nun chhung chu,"" ti tawh loin," 
Jeremiah16:15 hmar lam ram leh a um darhna ram zawng zawng ata Israel fate hruai chhuaktu LALPA a nuna a nun chhung chu an ti tawh zawk ang. An pute hnen ka pek, anmahni ram ngeiah chuan ka hruai kir leh dawn si a." 
Jeremiah16:16 Sangha bei mi tam tak ka chah ang a, anmahni an man ang a; chu mi hnuah chuan ram mi tam tak ka chah chhuak ang a, an pel chhuak ang a, lungpui keh kara mite pawh." 
Jeremiah16:17 An awm dan zawng zawngahte chuan ka mit a fu reng si a; ka lakah thupin an awm lo a, an khawlohnate pawh ka mit lakah thuhruk a ni hek lo." 
Jeremiah16:18 Tichuan an thil tenawm ruangtein ka ram an tihbawlhhlawh leh an tenawmnaa ka rochun ram an tihkhah avangin an khawlohna leh an sualna chu a let hnihin ka thungrul ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah16:19 Aw LALPA, ka chakna leh ka kulhpui, Mangan nia ka inhumhimna, Kawlkil atangin hnamte a lo kal ang a, Kan pute chuan dawt, thil tlaktlai lo, Hlawkna nei hlei lo chauh lo chu engmah an rochung lo e." 
Jeremiah16:20 Miin pathiante a insiamsak thei em ni? Chung chu pathian an ni hlei nem,' an ti ang.Chuvangin, ngai teh u, tun tum hian anni chu ka hriattir teh phawt ang; ka kut leh ka thiltihtheihna ka hriattir ang a, ka hming hi LALPA a ni tih an hria ang." 
Jeremiah16:21 Chuvangin, ngai teh u, tun tum hian anni chu ka hriattir teh phawt ang; ka kut leh ka thiltihtheihna ka hriattir ang a, ka hming hi LALPA a ni tih an hria ang." 
Jeremiah17:1 Juda sualna chu thir kawlawm leh lunghlu hria hmawr zumin ziak a ni; an thinlung phekah kerin a awm a, an maicham kiahte pawh;" 
Jeremiah17:2 thing hring bul leh mual pawngahte chuan an faten an maichamte leh an Aser-te chu an hre reng si a. Aw nang ka tlang, rama mi, ram dung tluana i sualna avang hian i sum leh i ro zawng zawngte, i bawlhhmunte nen rallakah ka pe ang." 
Jeremiah17:3 I chanpual ka pek che kha i chan ang a, i ram hriat ngai loah chuan i hmelmate rawng ka bawltir ang che, ka thinurna mei, kum khuaa kang tur chu in chhem alh ta si a," 
Jeremiah17:4 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Mihring rinchhana, mihring ban chakna ring a, LALPA hawisanna thinlung neitu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se." 
Jeremiah17:5 Thlalera hnimbuk to ire ang an ni a, thil tha chhuak tur reng a hmu lo ang. Thlaler ram ro, chi leilung, tuma luah lohvah chuan a cheng zawk ang." 
Jeremiah17:6 LALPA ringtu, a rinchhan LALPA ni erawh chu a eng a thawl e." 
Jeremiah17:7 Tui kianga thingphun, lui kama zungkai, Khaw lum lo thleng pawh hlau lo, A hnahte hring reng si, Khawkhen kum pawisa lo. Rah chhuah thulh chuang si lo ang hi a ni ang." 
Jeremiah17:8 Thinlung hi thil zawng zawng aiin Bumhmang ber, chhe lailet der ani a; Tuin nge hre thiam thei ang?" 
Jeremiah17:9 Kei LALPA hi mi tin, an awm dan ang zel leh An thiltih rah ang zela pe tura Rilru en chhuaktu, thinlung fiahtu ka ni." 
Jeremiah17:10 Mi, kut tling loa lo hausa chu varung, mahni tui ni lo awp keu ang a ni a, A la dam laiin amah an hransan ang a, A tawpah chuan mi a a lo ni mai ang." 
Jeremiah17:11 Kan hmun thianghlim awmna chu Lalthuphah ropui tak, a tir ata chawisana awm chu a ni." 
Jeremiah17:12 Aw LALPA, Israel nghahfak, Nangmah kalsantu zawng zawng chu an mualpho ang;Kei mi hawisantute chu lei vaivuta ziak ang lek an ni ang, LALPA, nuna tuikhur chu, an kal san ta si a." 
Jeremiah17:13 Aw LALPA, mi tidam la, tichuan ka dam ang a, Mi chhanhi la, tichuan ka him ang, Ka fak fo thin chu i ni si a." 
Jeremiah17:14 Ngai teh, ka hnenah, 'LALPA thu chu khawiah nge? Lo thleng ang hiang,' an ti thin a." 
Jeremiah17:15 Thil tha lo thlen turin ka nawr lo chia, Chhiatna ni lah ka duh hek lo tih i hria; Ka kaa thu chhuak chu i hmai hmaa awm a ni," 
Jeremiah17:16 Ka tan tihbaiawm ni suh ang che,Mangan nia ka inhumhimna i ni." 
Jeremiah17:17 Mi tiduhdahtute chu mualpho se la, Kei erawh chu mualpho lo i la; Anni chu zam sela, kei erawh chu zam lo i la; Mangan ni an chungah thlen la, nasa takin tiboral ang che." 
Jeremiah17:18 LALPA chuan ka hnenah heti hian a ti: Kulh kawngka lun ber, Juda lalte luh leh chhuahna leh Jerusalem kulh kawngka zawng zawngahte chuan va ding la;" 
Jeremiah17:19 tin, an hnenah, Nangni Juda lalte, Juda zawng zawngte, Jerusalema cheng zawng zawng he'ng kawngkaa lut thinte u, LALPA thu hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Jeremiah17:20 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti e: In nun hi fimkhurpui hle teh u, Chawlhniin phur nei suh u la, Jersualem kulh kawngkaah luhpui hek suh u." 
Jeremiah17:21 Tin, chawlhniin in in ata phur in din chhuak tur a ni lo a, hna reng in thawk tur a ni hek lo;in pute hnena ka thupek angin chawlhni chu in serh thianghlim zawk tur a ni." 
Jeremiah17:22 Anni zawngin an ngaithla lo a, beng an dawh lo a; thunun chu an hriata an dawn lohna'n an intiluhlul ta zawk a ni." 
Jeremiah17:23 Tin, LALPA thu chhuak chuan heti hian a ti: Piawsa taka mi ngaihthlaka, chawlhnia he khawpui kawngkaa thil in phurh luh loh a, hna reng thawk lo va chawlhni in serh thianghlim zawk chuan," 
Jeremiah17:24 he khawpui kulh kawngkaah hian lalte leh hotute, Davida thutthlenga thu turte chu tawlailirte leh sakawrahte chuangin an lo lut ang a, anmahni leh an mi liante, Juda mite leh Jerusalem a chengte nen; tichuan he khawpuiah hian mi an cheng hlen tawh ang." 
Jeremiah17:25 Juda khawpui leh Jerusalem chhehvel atang te, Benjamin ram atang te, Sefela ram atang te, tlang ram atang leh Chhim ram atang tein an lo kal ang a, halral thilhlan leh inthawinate, buhbal thilhlan leh rimtui te, lawmna inthawinate LALPA inah chuan an rawn la ang.Mahse chawlhni serh thianghlim tur leh chawlhnia phur neih loh leh Jerusalem kulh kawngkaa luhpui loh tur thu-ah mi ngaihthlak loh chuan a kulh kawngkaahte chuan mei ka chhuah ang a,Jerusalem lal inte chu a kang zo ang a,a mit lo ang." 
Jeremiah17:26 Mahse chawlhni serh thianghlim tur leh chawlhnia phur neih loh leh Jerusalem kulh kawngkaa luhpui loh tur thu-ah mi ngaihthlak loh chuan a kulh kawngkaahte chuan mei ka chhuah ang a,Jerusalem lal inte chu a kang zo ang a,a mit lo ang." 
Jeremiah18:1 LALPA lak ata Jeremia hnena thu lo thleng chuan," 
Jeremiah18:2 Tho la, belvawtu inah chuan zuk kal la, chutah chuan ka thute ka hriattir ang che, a ti a." 
Jeremiah18:3 Tichuan belvawtu inah chuan ka zuk kal ta a, a bel siamna khawlah chuan a lo thawk a." 
Jeremiah18:4 Hluma bel a siam lai chu a lo that loh chuan belvawtu chuan tha a tih angin bel dangah a din leh mai thin a. 
Jeremiah18:5 Tichan LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a: 
Jeremiah18:6 Aw Israel chhungte u, he belvawtu tih ang hian ka tithei lo che u em ni? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Ngai teh u, belvawtu kuta hlum ang mai hian ka kutah in awm a ni, aw Israel chhungte u." 
Jeremiah18:7 Engtikah pawh hnam emaw ram emaw chungchang thu-ah, Ka pawtchhuak ang a, ka thiat ang a, ka tichhia ang, tiin lo sawi pawh ni i la." 
Jeremiah18:8 chu hna chuan a chung thu ka sai avanga a thil tha lo a hawisan chuan a chunga thil tha lo tih ka tum chu ka lamlet ang. 
Jeremiah18:9 Tin, engtikah pawh hnam emaw ram emaw chungchang thu-ah, Ka siam ang a, ka din ang, tiin lo sawi pawh ni i la," 
Jeremiah18:10 ka tawngka chhuak ngaithla loa ka mithmuha thil tha lo a tih chuan a tana thil tha tih ka tum chu ka lamlet bawk ang. 
Jeremiah18:11 chuvangin Juda mite leh Jerusalema chengte hnenah chuan, LALPA'n heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, in chungah thi tha lo ka suangtuah a, ka phiar mek che u a ni, mi tinin an awm dan tha lo hawisan se la, in awm dan leh in thiltihte siam tha rawh u, va ti phawt rawh." 
Jeremiah18:12 Nimahsela anni zawning, A awm lo e! Mahni remruat ang angin kan awm ang a, mi tin, mahni rilru ngawltawt sual ang zelin kan che ang, an ti thin a ni." 
Jeremiah18:13 Chuvangin LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Hnam dangte zawt teh mah u, hetiang reng tu nge hre ngai? Nula Israel chuan thil tihbaiawm tak a tih tak hi." 
Jeremiah18:14 Lebanon vur chuan a tlang chhip a kiansan ngai em ni? Kawlvalenchham tui dai a luang kang ngai em ni? 
Jeremiah18:15 Ka mite erawh chuan mi theihnghilh a, Engmah lo mai hnenah rimtui an hal a; Chung chuan an hmasang kawngah a petektir, Kawngpui ni lo tumkawng lam an zawh a," 
Jeremiah18:16 An titiau zo ta e a ram chu, Kumkhuaa chek khum turin. Veivak apiangin mak tiin an lu an thing." 
Jeremiah18:17 Khawchhak thlipi angin hmelma hmaah ka theh darh ang, An vanduai niah chuan ka hmel ni lo, Ka tukkhum ka entir ang." 
Jeremiah18:18 Tin, anni chuan, Hawh u, Jeremia hi i phiar ang u, puithiam lak ata dan a reh dawn si lo a, mi fing lak ata thurawn a reh hek lo ang a, zawlnei lak ata thu a reh bawk hek lo ang. Hawh u, i sawichhe bawrh bawrh ang u khai, a thu reng reng i ngaihsak miah lo ang u, an ti a." 
Jeremiah18:19 Mi ngaihsak la, aw LALPA, Mi dodaltute thu hi bengvar ang che." 
Jeremiah18:20 Sual hi thil tha rulhna em ni ngai? Anni zawngin ka nunna atan hum an hiat si. An laka i thinurna tikiang tur leh An tana thil tha sawi tura I hmaa ka din thin kha hre reng ang che. 
Jeremiah18:21 Tichuan an fate chu tampui-mitthi tawhtir la, Khandaih chakna tawntir rawh; An nupuite fa lu hlauhin hmeithai rawh se. An mipate hripuiin thi se la, An tlangvalte pawh indonaah khandaihin." 
Jeremiah18:22 Runtute an hnen i thlentir phutin An in ata tap thawm thang rawh se. Mi man turin hum an hiat si a, Ka ke awhna'n thang an kam si a.Mahse nangin aw LALPA, Mi that tura an mi phairna zawng zawng i hria e. An khawlohna ngaidam suh la, I mit hmuhan an sualna thai bo hek suh. I hmaah chuan tlu hlawm se la, I thinur niah chuan ti nek ang che." 
Jeremiah18:23 Mahse nangin aw LALPA, Mi that tura an mi phairna zawng zawng i hria e. An khawlohna ngaidam suh la, I mit hmuhan an sualna thai bo hek suh. I hmaah chuan tlu hlawm se la, I thinur niah chuan ti nek ang che." 
Jeremiah19:1 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Kal la, belvawtu hlum bel va lei rawh; tin, mipuiho upate leh puithiam zinga upate hruai la;" 
Jeremiah19:2 Harsith kawngkhar luhna bula Benhinom ruamah chuan kal la, chutah chuan i hnena thu ka hrilh tur che hi puang ang che." 
Jeremiah19:3 Heti hian ti ang che: Juda lalte leh Jerusalema chengte u, LALPA thu hi hre rawh u. Israelte Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, he hmunah hian a hria apiang beng tikhawrh hial khawpa thil tha lo ka rawn thlen dawn." 
Jeremiah19:4 Mite chuan mi kalsan a, he hmun hi an tibawlhhlawh a, anmahni leh an pate leh Juda lalte pawhin an la hriat ngai hleih loh, pathian dangte hnenah rimtui an hal avang leh he hmun hi ami thiam thisena tihkhah avang leh" 
Jeremiah19:5 Baala hnena halral thilhlan atana na fate an hlalna tur Baala hmun sangte an din avangin; chu chu ka thupek ani lo a, ka sawi hek lo a, ka rilruah pawh a awm ngai lo." 
Jeremiah19:6 Chuvangin, ngai teh, nite chu a lo thleng danw, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti; chung niahte chuan he hmun hi Topheth vuah a ni tawh lo ang a, Benhinm ruam vuah a ni hek lo ang: Insamna ruam vuah a ni tawh zawk ang." 
Jeremiah19:7 Tin, he mi hmunah hian Juda leh Jerusalem thil tumte chu ka tilohtlawn ang a; tin, anni chu khandaihin anhmelmate hmaah leh an nunna lak tumtute kutah ka tiltu ang; an ruangte chu chungleng savate leh leia ramsate chaw atan ka pe ang." 
Jeremiah19:8 Tin, he khawpui hi mak tihah leh chek khuman ka siam ang a, a kal apiangin a chhiat tawhte avang chuan mak an tia ng a, an chek khum bawk ang." 
Jeremiah19:9 An fanute leh an fapate sa ka eitir ang a; tin, an hmelmate leh an nunna lak tumtuten an huala an tihmangan hunah chuan tupawhin an thenawmte sa an ei ang." 
Jeremiah19:10 Tin, i kalpuite mithmuhah bel chu i tikeh ang a," 
Jeremiah19:11 an hnenah heti hian a ti ang che, Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: hetiang bawk hian he mite leh he khua hi ka tikeh ang; belvawtu bel miin a tihkeh a, siam that leh rual a ni lo ang hian; tin, Topheth-ah an phum ang, phumna tur hmun dang a awm loh avngin." 
Jeremiah19:12 Chuti tak chuti tak chuan he hmun hi ka ti ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni; tin, chutiang bawkin he khua hi Topheth anga siam hialin. A chhunga chengte chungah pawh ka ti ang:" 
Jeremiah19:13 Jerusalem inte leh Juda lal ho inte-in tin, mai a chunga van lam thilte hnena rimtui hal tawhna zawng zawng leh pathian dangte hnena in tur thil hlan leih chhuah tawhna zawng zawngte chu Topheth hmun ang maia tihbawlhlawh a ni ang." 
Jeremiah19:14 Tin, Jeremia chu, LALPA'n thu sawi tura a tirhna hmun Topheth atang chuan a lo kal a; tin, LALPA in hung chhungah chuan a dinga, mipui zawng zawng hnenah chuan heti hian a ti a:Israelte Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, thil tha lo ka sawi zawng zawng kha he khawpui leh a khawdang zawng zawngah hian ka rawn thlen dawn a ni: ka thu ngaithla lo tura an thinlung an tih khauh avangin." 
Jeremiah19:15 Israelte Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, thil tha lo ka sawi zawng zawng kha he khawpui leh a khawdang zawng zawngah hian ka rawn thlen dawn a ni: ka thu ngaithla lo tura an thinlung an tih khauh avangin." 
Jeremiah20:1 Tin, Imera fapa, LALPA ina hotupa ber, puithiam Pasura chuan Jeremian chung thute chu a sawi tih a lo hria a." 
Jeremiah20:2 Tichuan Pasura chuan zawlnei Jeremia chu a vua a, LALPA ina Benjamina kawngkhar chhaktaa kawlah chuan a tantir a." 
Jeremiah20:3 A tukah chuan Pasuran Jeremia chu a phelhin, Jeremia chuan a hnenah, ""LALPA chuan i hmingah Pasura a vuah lo e, Magor-Misabiba a vuah zawk a che." 
Jeremiah20:4 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti si a: Ngai rawh, nangma tan leh i thiante zawng zawng tan tih khaiah ka siam ang che: anni chu an hmelmate khandaihin an tlu ang a, nang lah chuan i mitin i en ngawt ang. Juda ho zawng zawng chu Babulon lal kutah ka pe vek ang a: ani chu Babulonah salah a hruai ang a, khandaihin a that ang." 
Jeremiah20:5 Chu a chhapah, khawpui hausakna zawng zawng te leh Juda lalte ro zawng zawng chu an hmelmate kutah ka pe ang a, anni chuan an rawk ang a, an man ang a, Babulonah an hruai ang." 
Jeremiah20:6 Tin, nang Pasur, i in chhunga awm zawng zawngte nen salah in tang ang a; Babulonah chuan i kal ve ang a, chutah chuan i thi ang a, chutah chuan phumin i awm ang a, nang leh i thian dawt thi i lo hrilh thinte zawng zawng nen hian,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah20:7 Aw LALPA, nangin mi lo bum a, bumin ka awmta a nih hi, Nang chu kei ain i chak a, mi hneh a; Nilengin nuihzabur ka ni ta, mi tu pawhin mi nuihzat hi." 
Jeremiah20:8 Thu ka sawi apiangin, ka au chhuak a, 'Inpawngnekna leh inramna,' tiin ka au a; LALPA thu chu ka tan chuan, nilenga dem leh hmuhsit hlawhna chauh a ni." 
Jeremiah20:9 Ani chu ka lam lo ang a, A hmingin tu ka sawi tawh hek lo ang,"" ti mah i la, Ka ruh chhunga mei kang inkhung ta ang mai hian Ka thinlung chhungah chuan a awm si thin, Ka pai hle hle zo lo a, ka chelh ngang lo a ni." 
Jeremiah20:10 Mi tam takte phunru ka hria, Kil tinah hlauhawm a awm, ""Hek u la, i hek tlang ang u,"" tiin. Ka thenrual ka tluk chang rengtute chuan ""Bumin a awm ang a, kan hneh ang, A chungah kan phuba kan la ang,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah20:11 Mahse LALPA chu mi huaisen hlauhawm tak angin ka hnenah a awm a, Mi tiduhdahtute chu an tlu ang a, mi hneh lo ang. Mualpho takin an awm ang a, an hlawhtlin dawn loh avangin, An kumkhaw hmingchhiatna chu theihnghlilhin a awm lo ang." 
Jeremiah20:12 Aw, Sipaihote LALPA, mi felte fiahtu, Thinlung leh rilru hmutlang thintu, An chunga i phuba lak chu mi hmuhtir teh, Ka chungchang thu hi ka kawltir ta si che a." 
Jeremiah20:13 LALPA hnenah chuan hla sa u la, LALPA chu fak rawh u; Thilsual titute kut ata tanpui ngaite nunna chu a hum si a." 
Jeremiah20:14 Ka pian chhuah ni chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se. Ka nuin mi hrin ni chu malsawmin awm suh se. 
Jeremiah20:15 Ka pa hnena, ""Fapa i nei ta e"" Tih thu rawn thlena, Rawn tilawmtu chu An chhe dawngin awm rawh se." 
Jeremiah20:16 Chu mi chu, LALPA'n khawngaih hlek loa A tihram khuate angin awm rawh se. Zing lamah chuan an thawm hria se la, Chhun a lo nih chuan ralkhel thawm;" 
Jeremiah20:17 Chhul chhunga mi tihhlum loh avang khan; Chu ti nise, ka nu chu ka thlan ni mai tur a, A chhul chuan mi pai kum khua mai tur.Engah khe nge chhul ata ka lo chhuah le, Thawkrim leh lungngaia awm tura Mualpho reng renga ka dam chhung nite hmang tur hian?" 
Jeremiah20:18 Engah khe nge chhul ata ka lo chhuah le, Thawkrim leh lungngaia awm tura Mualpho reng renga ka dam chhung nite hmang tur hian?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Lal Zedekian Malkiza fapa Pasura leh Maaseia fapa puithiam Zephania te chu Jeremia hnenah a tir a," 
Jeremiah21:2 Babulon lal, Nebukadnezzara chuan min do ta si a, LALPA chuan a thiltih ropui tak a tih thin ang khan min pui duh mialin, a kirtir leh mai law maw tih LALPA min lo zawhsak teh se, tia sawi turin, chuta Jeremia hnena LALPA thu lo thleng chu hei hi a ni." 
Jeremiah21:3 Tin, Jeremia chuan an hnenah, ""Zedakia hnenah chuan hetiangin va sawi rawh u:" 
Jeremiah21:4 Israelte Pathian, LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh, Babulon lal leh Kaldai mi, kulh pawna hualtu che i dona ralthuam hriamhrei chu ka tikir dawn a ni; tin, he khawpui chhungah hian anni chu ka hruai khawm ang." 
Jeremiah21:5 Keimah ngei pawhin thinrim leh lungni lo tak leh thinur takin ban pharin ban tha chak hmangin ka do ang che. 
Jeremiah21:6 Hemi khuaa cheng mihringte leh rante hi ka tihlum ang a, hripuiin an thi ang." 
Jeremiah21:7 Chumi hnuah chuan, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti, lal zedekia leh a thuihruaite leh midang he khuaa hri leh khandaih leh tama thi lo te chu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah leh an hmelmate kutah leh anmahni thah tumtute kutah chuan ka pe ang. Khandaih hriamin a that ang a, a khawngaih hauh lo ang a, a zuah hek o ang a, a lainat bawk hek lo ang." 
Jeremiah21:8 Tin, he'ng mipuite hnenah hian heti hian va sawi rawh; LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, thihna kawng leh nunna kawng ka dahsak che u hi." 
Jeremiah21:9 He khawpui chhunga awm chu khandaihin emaw, tamin emaw, hriin emaw an thi ang;Kaldai a hualtu che u hnena chhuaka inpete erawh chu an nung ang, an nunna chu indona lawmman atan a ni ang." 
Jeremiah21:10 He khawpui thatna tur ni lo, a chhiatna tur ka tum tlat tawh a ni; Babulon lal kutah pek a ni ang a, ani chuan meiin a hal ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah21:11 Juda lal chhungte chungchang thuah chuan; LALPA thu hi ngaithla rawh u," 
Jeremiah21:12 Aw Davida chhungte u! LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Zingah chuan ro dik takin rel ula, Tiduhdahtu kut ata, rawk tuara chu chhan chhuak u la, Chutilochu ka thinurna mei angin a chhuak ang a, Tuma thelh rual lohin a kang ang e, In thilsual tih avang hian." 
Jeremiah21:13 Ngai teh u, ruam zawla chengte u, Nangni ruam zawl lungpuia chenga, Tute nge kan awmnaah lo lut ang? Titute u, Ka khing dawn che u a ni, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti.In thiltih rah ang zelin ka hrem ang che u a, A ram ngawah chuan mei ka chhuak ang a, A vel zawng zawng chu a kang ral ang, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah21:14 In thiltih rah ang zelin ka hrem ang che u a, A ram ngawah chuan mei ka chhuak ang a, A vel zawng zawng chu a kang ral ang, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah22:1 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Juda lal inah zu kal la, he thu hi zu sawi rawh." 
Jeremiah22:2 Aw Juda lal, Davida thutphah chunga thu, nang leh i thuihhruaite leh i mi he'ng kawngkhara lutte nen hian, LALPA thu hi ngaithla rawh u, ti la:" 
Jeremiah22:3 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Dik tak leh fal takin rorel u la; tiduhdahtu kut ata rawk tuara chu chhan chhuak u la: tin, mikhual te, pa nei lote leh hmeithai chungahte dik lohna emaw pawngnekna emaw ching suh u; he hmunah hian mi thiam thisen pawh chhuah hek suh u." 
Jeremiah22:4 He thu hi zaw ngei ni u la chuan, Davida thutphah chungah lalte chu tawlailirte leh sakawrte chunga chuangin, anmahni leh an thuihruaite leh an mite chu he in kawngkharahte hian an lut ngei ang." 
Jeremiah22:5 Amaherawhchu he'ng thute hi in ngaihthlak loh chuan he in hi a ram ang tiin, mahni inchhalin chhia ka chham a ni, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah22:6 LALPA chuan Juda lal chhungkaw chungchang thu hetiangin a sawi a: Nang chu ka tan Gilead ang, Lebanon tlang chhip ang i ni; Mahsela thlaler ka chantir ang chia, uahtu awm lo khawpui ang mai hian." 
Jeremiah22:7 Nangmah tiboral turte, hriamhrei nei theuhin, Ka buatsaih ang a; I sidar thing thlante an kir ang a, Meiah an tuah ang." 
Jeremiah22:8 Tin, hnam dang tam takten he khawpui hi an pal tlang ang a, mi tinin mahni thenamwte hnenah LALPA chuan he khawpui ropui tak hi eng vanga heti taka ti ta nge maw ni chu le? An ti ang." 
Jeremiah22:9 An Pathian, LALPA thuthlung chu an hawisan a, pathian dangte an biak a, an rawng an bawl avang a ni, tiin an chhang ang." 
Jeremiah22:10 Thi ta chutah suh u la, sun hek suh u; Kal bo taa erawh chu nasa takin tah rawh u, A lo kir leh dawn tawh si lo a, A pianna ram hi a hmuh leh dawn tawh loh avangin." 
Jeremiah22:11 Juda lal Salluma, Josia fapa, a pa Josia aia roreltu, he hmun ata kal chhuak ta chungchang thu chu LALPA'n heti hian a sawi: Hetah hian a lo kir leh tawh lo ang." 
Jeremiah22:12 Sala an hruaina hmunah, chutah ngei chuan a thi ang a, he ram hi a hmu leh tawh lo ang." 
Jeremiah22:13 Fel lohnaa in sa a, Dik lohnaa a pindan chungnungte siamtu, Athlawna mahni thenawmte tha chhawr a, Hlawh pe duh lotu chung chu a pik e;" 
Jeremiah22:14 In ropui tak ka insak ang a, Pindan chungnung zau takte neiin, Tukverhte ka hawng ang a, Sidar thingin ka thuah chhuak ang a, Rawng sen ka hnawih ang titu chung chu," 
Jeremiah22:15 Sidar thinga rual i khum avangin, Lalah i inngai maw? I pa khan a eiin a in a, Dik takin ro a rel a ni lo em ni? Chu chu a tan a tha a ni." 
Jeremiah22:16 Mi rethei leh tlachhamte chu a relsak a, Chu chu a tha a ni. Hei hi mi hriat dan tur chu a ni lo em ni? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah22:17 Nimahsela i duhamna atan te, Mi thiam thisen chhuahna'n te, Hnehchhiahna'n leh pawngnekna'n chauh I mit leh i rilru a ni." 
Jeremiah22:18 Chuvang chuan Judate lal Jehoiakima, Josia fapa chung thu chu LALPA chuan heti hian a sawi a: Aw ka unaupa, tiin emaw, Aw ka farnu, tiin emaw An tah lo ang a, Aw LALPA, tiin emaw, Aw ropui ber, tiin emaw An sun hek lo ang." 
Jeremiah22:19 Jerusalem kulh pawn lama theh chhuaha, paihin, Sabengtung phuma phumin a awm ang." 
Jeremiah22:20 Lebanon-ah chho la, au rawh. Basan-ah i aw chhuah la, Abarim atangin au rawh. I hmangaihtu zawng anwg an boral ta si a." 
Jeremiah22:21 I hlawhtlinin i hnenah thu ka sawi a, nang lah chuan ka ngaithla lo ang, i ti a, Ka aw-ka i ngaihthlak loh hi I tleirawl atangin hei hi i awm dan a ni." 
Jeremiah22:22 Thliin i berampute zawng zawng a chawm ang a, I hmangaihtute salah an tang a, Nang pawh i sualna zawng zawng avangin, Mualpho tak leh mangang takin i la awm ngei ang." 
Jeremiah22:23 Aw Lebanon tlanga cheng, Sidar thing zinga bu khuartu, Natna i chunga a lo thlena i han khawngaihthlak turzia mai chu! Hmeichhe nau vei na ang mai hian." 
Jeremiah22:24 A nuna ka nun chhung chu, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni; Juda lal Konia, Jehoiakima fapa chu ka kut ding lama nemna zungbun ni mah la. Chuta ta chu ka phawi ngei ang che." 
Jeremiah22:25 Tin, thah tura zawngtu che kutah, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah leh Kaldaiho kutah ngei chuan ka pe ang che." 
Jeremiah22:26 I pianna ni lo ram dangah nang leh i nu a hringtu che hi ka paih chhuak ang che u a, chutah chuan in thi ang." 
Jeremiah22:27 An rilrua kir leh an chak em emna ramah chuan an kir leh tawh hek lo ang. 
Jeremiah22:28 He Konia hi bel keh sawm, hmusitawm a ni lo'm ni? Bel a chhunga duhzawng awm lohan chu a ni lo'm ni? Engah nge amah leh a thlahte chu theh chhuah a Ram an hriat ngai loah chuan paih chhuaha an awm?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Aw, leilung, leilung, leilung, LALPA thu hi ngaithla rawh,LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, He mi hi fa nei lo, A dam chhunga hlawhtling lo tur mi a ni, A thlahte tumah hlawhtlinga, Davida thutphah chunga thu tur leh Davida thutphah chunga thu tur leh Judai rama rorel leh tur an awm dawn si lo, Tiin ziak rawh u." 
Jeremiah22:30 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, He mi hi fa nei lo, A dam chhunga hlawhtling lo tur mi a ni, A thlahte tumah hlawhtlinga, Davida thutphah chunga thu tur leh Davida thutphah chunga thu tur leh Judai rama rorel leh tur an awm dawn si lo, Tiin ziak rawh u." 
Jeremiah23:1 Ka ran tlatna hmuan beram tiborala tidarhtuho berampute chu an chung a pik e, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:2 Chuvangin LALPA Israelte Pathian chuan ka mite vengtu berampuho chungchang thu-ah chuan heti hian a ti: Ka ran rualte chu in tidarh a, in um bo a, in kan lo a. Ngai rawh u, in thiltihsual avang hian ka rawn kan dawn che u a ni. Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:3 Tin, ka ran rual la awm chhunte chu ka um darhna ram zawng zawng ata ka hruai khawm leh ang a, an huang chhungah ka khalh khawm ang a, rah duh tak an ni ang a, an pung ang." 
Jeremiah23:4 Anmahni ngaihsak tur an tan berampu ka dah ang a, an hlau tawh lo ang a,an mangang tawh hek lo ang a, atu-amah bo an awm tawh bawk hek lo ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:5 Ngai teh u, Davida tan zar fel ka chhuahsak hun tur chu a lo thleng dawn, tih hi LALPA thu chuak a ni; a ni chu lalah a thu ang a, fing takin a ti ang a, ram pumah dikna leh felna a hlen ang." 
Jeremiah23:6 A hun chhungin Juda chu chhandam a ni ang a, Israel chu hi takin a awm ang. Tin, hei hi a hming an la vuah tur chu a ni,'LALPA chu kan felna a ni' tih hi." 
Jeremiah23:7 Tichuan, ngai teh u, a hun a thleng dawn, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti. 'Israel mite Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu LALPA chu a nuna a nun chhung chu' ti tawh loin," 
Jeremiah23:8 hmar lam aram leh a um darhna ram zawng zawng ata Israel chhungte thlahho hruai chhuak a, hruai kir lehtu LALPA chu a nuna a nun chhung chu' an ti tawh zawk ang. Tin, anmahni ram ngeiah an cheng ang." 
Jeremiah23:9 Zawlneite chungchang thu chu," 
Jeremiah23:10 Lung rilah ka lung a va chhe em," 
Jeremiah23:11 ka ruh zawng zawngte chu a khur a, Zu rui ang mai ka ni, Zuin a fan hneh mi ang mai hian, LALPA vang leh a thu thianghlim avangin." 
Jeremiah23:12 Ram chu uirehoin a khat a, anchhia avangin ram chuan a sun a, Thlaler hnim hring hmunte chu a ro zo ta, An kawng chu a sual a, An chakna chu a dik lo." 
Jeremiah23:13 Zawlneite leh puithiamte chuan Pathian an pawisa lo a, ka in chhung ngeiah pawh an sualna ka hmu, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah23:14 Chuvangin an tan an kalna kawng chu, Zan thim kawng nal ang hi a ni ang a, Tah chuan umin an awm ang a, an tawlhthlu ang. An chungah thil tha lo ka rawn thlen dawn si a, Anmahni hremna hun chu, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah23:15 Samari zawlneite chungah tenawm ka hmu, Baala chhalin thu an sawi a, Israela an hruai bo a." 
Jeremiah23:16 Jerusalem zawlneiho chungah pawh Thil rapthlak tak ka hmu, An uire a, dawtin an khawsa a, Tumahin an sual sim an tum loh phah a; Ka tan chuan Sodom khuaa mite ang an lo ni vek a, A khaw chhunga mite zawng zawng pawh Gomora khuaa mite ang mai." 
Jeremiah23:17 Chuvangin zawlneiho chungchang thu-ah chuan Sipaihote LALPA chua heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, saiin ka chawm ang a, Thil kha ka intir ang a; Jerusalem zawlnei hnen atang chuan Ram pumah Pathian pawisak lohna a chhuak si a." 
Jeremiah23:18 Sipaihote LALPA chua heti hian a ti: zawlnei in hnena thu sawitute thu chu ngaithla suh u; engmah lo an ziritr che u a. LALPA ka ata ni lo anmahni rilru suangtuahte an sawi thin. 
Jeremiah23:19 LALPA thu husittute hnenah chuan, 'I tan a tha ang,' an ti chamchi a; tin, mahni duhzawng ti lui tlattute hnenah chuan, 'thil tha lo engmah i chungah a lo thleng lo ang' an ti a." 
Jeremiah23:20 LALPA remruatnaah tu nge tel ngai a, A thu dawnga hre tur tu nge awm? A nih leh a thu chu tu nge ngaihvena ngaithla awm?" 
Jeremiah23:21 Ngai teh u, LALPA thlipui chu, Thinurna chu a chhuak ta, A ni, thawngaleivir thlipui chu; Mi sualte lu chu a nuai ang." 
Jeremiah23:22 LALPA thinrimna chu akir mai lo ang, A rilrua a tum tlat tawhte chu A hlen a, a tih zawh zet hma chuan; Ni hnuhnungahte chuan in la hre fiah ang." 
Jeremiah23:23 zawlneite chu ka tirh lohin an tlan a, An hnena thu ka saiw loh pawhin thu an sawi a." 
Jeremiah23:24 Ka remruatnaah chuan awm ve ni se la,Ka thu hi ka mite hnenah an puang tur a, n thiltih dik loh ata an hawi kirtir tur." 
Jeremiah23:25 Hla taka awm Pathian ni loin, Hnaitea awm Pathian em ni ka nih? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:26 Hmun biruah ka hmuh theih loh tura boru thei an awm dawn em ni? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Lei leh vanah hian ka khat a ni lo'm ni? Tih hi llapa thu chhuak a ni. 
Jeremiah23:27 Mumangah ka mang e, mumangah ka mang e, tia ka hminga dawt sawitu zawlneiho thu sawi chu ka hria a ni." 
Jeremiah23:28 zawlnei dawt sawi thin, mahni thinlung inbum chawpa thu saiw thinte thinlungah chuan hei hi eng chen nge a awm dawn?" 
Jeremiah23:29 Anni chuan an vengte hnenah an muamng hrilhin ka mite ka hming theihnghilhtir an tum a, an paten Baala avanga ka hming an theihnghilh ta ang khan," 
Jeremiah23:30 zawlnei mumang nei chuan a mang chu sawi rawh se, ka thu neitu chuan ka thu chu dik takin sawi rawh se. Buhpawl leh buh fang chuan eng nge inanna an neih? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:31 Ka thu chu mei ang, tuboh lung chhutsawmna ang a ni lo em ni? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:32 chuvangin, ngai rawh u, zawlneiho ka thu inruksak tawn thinte chu ka do a ni, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:33 Ngai teh u, zawlnei mahni dang tinal a, ""LALPA'n a ti"" ti thinte chu ka do a ni, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:34 Ngai teh u, mumang dawt mai mai sawi a, hril a, an dawt thute leh an uanthuanna thu lawi lote avanga ka mite hruai botu zawlneite chu ka do a ni, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti; ka tir si lo a, thu ka pe hek lo a, he mipuite hi an tihnemhnang hek lo ang; tih hi lalpa thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:35 Heng mipuite zinga mi tuin emaw, zawlnei tuin emaw, puithiam tuin emaw, LALPA phurrit chu eng nge ni?' tia an zawh che chuan heti hian i chhang dawn nia, 'Nangmahni hi phurrit chu in ni, ka paih bo dawn che u; tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:36 zawlnei emaw, puithiam emaw, mi tuin emaw;LALPA phurrit' ti an awm chuan, chu mi leh a chhungte chu ka hrem ang." 
Jeremiah23:37 Tichuan mi tupawhin a unaupa hnenah, 'LALPA chuan engtin nge a chhan, LALPA chuan eng nge a sawi?' tiin in inzawt ang." 
Jeremiah23:38 LALPA phurrit chu i n lam tawh lo ang a, mi tupawh ama thu sawi chu a tan phurrit a ni dawn si a. Pathian nung, Sipaihote LALPA, kan Pathian thu chu in kailek zo ta si a." 
Jeremiah23:39 zawlnei hnenah chuan, 'LALPA chuan engtin nge a chhan che? LALPA chuan eng nge a sawi?' ti ang che." 
Jeremiah23:40 Tin, 'LALPA phurrit chu' in tih vaih chuan. LALPA chuan heti hian ti, 'LALPA phurrit chu in ti tur a ni lo; tia ka tirh che a, 'LALPA phurrit chu tia thu in sawi avangin;" 
Jeremiah23:41 tichuan, ngai rawh u, ka pawt dawk ngei ang che u, ka kiang hnai ata ka paih bo ang che u, nangni leh he khawpui in hnenah leh in pate hnena ka lo pek tawh nen hian.Tin, kumkhaw dem chhiatna leh mualpho rengna theihnghilh rual loh chu in chungah ka rawn thlen ang." 
Jeremiah23:42 Tin, kumkhaw dem chhiatna leh mualpho rengna theihnghilh rual loh chu in chungah ka rawn thlen ang." 
Jeremiah24:1 Tin, LALPA chuan mi entir a, ngai teh, theipui bawm hnih LALPA biak in hmaah a lo inhung a, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran Judate lal, Jekonia, Jehoakima fapa leh Juda hotute, mi themthiamte leh thirdengte nen Jerusalem atanga Babulon sala a hruai hnu khan." 
Jeremiah24:2 bawm khatah chuan theipui tha tak, theipui hmin hmasa ang mai, a awm a: bawm dangah erawh chuan theipui chhe tak, ei tlak loh khawpa chhia a awm a." 
Jeremiah24:3 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, Eng nge i hmuh, Jeremia? A ti a. Kei chuan, Theipui, theipui tha, tha tak mai; leh a chhia, ei tlak loh khawpa chhia, ka ti a." 
Jeremiah24:4 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah24:5 LALPA Israelte Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Juda sal tangte, Kaldaiho rama an thatna tura ka tirh chhuahte chu, he'ng theipui tha ang hian ka en dawn a ni." 
Jeremiah24:6 An thatna'n an chungah ka mit ka fuktir ang a, he ramah hian ka hruai kir leh ang: anmahni ka din ang a, ka thiat lo ang; ka phun ang a, ka pawt lo ang." 
Jeremiah24:7 Tin, LALPA ka ni tih mi hriatna'n thinlung ka pe ang: ka mite an ni ang a, an Pathian ka ni ang: an thinlung zawng zawng nen ka hnenah an lo kir dawn si a." 
Jeremiah24:8 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Theipui chhia, ei tlak loh khawpa chhia ang hian Judate lal Zedekia leh a hotute leh Jerusalema chambang, he rama la awmte leh Aigupta rama chengte chu, ka hawisan ngei ngei ang:" 
Jeremiah24:9 Hrehawm taka lei chung ram zawng zawng zinga vawrh lan vawrh lan turin, ka hnawhbona zawng zawnga sawichhiat leh tehkhin leh hauh leh anchhe lawh ni turin ka hluihlawn ang.Anmahni leh an pate hnena ka pek ram ata hi lem zawh an nih thelngin an zingah khandaih te, tam te, hri te ka tir ang." 
Jeremiah24:10 Anmahni leh an pate hnena ka pek ram ata hi lem zawh an nih thelngin an zingah khandaih te, tam te, hri te ka tir ang." 
Jeremiah25:1 Judate lal, Jehoiakima, Josia fapa kum linaa Juda mite zawng zawng chungchanga Jeremia hnena thu lo thleng chu: chumi hun chu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kum khatna a ni a," 
Jeremiah25:2 chu thu chu zawlnei Jeremian Juda mi zawng zawng leh Jerusalema awm zawng zawngte hnena a sawi chu a ni. 
Jeremiah25:3 kum sawmhnih leh kum thum chhung ngawt, Judate lal Josia, Amona fapa kum sawm leh kum thumna atanga tun thlengin LALPA thu chu a lo thleng thin a, zing tak taka thoin in hnenah ka sawi ka sawi a, mahse in ngaithla lo a." 
Jeremiah25:4 Tin, LALPA'n in hnenah a rawngbawltu zawlneite zawng zawng a ti ra, zing tak taka thoin a tir a, mahse in ngaithla lo a, hre turin in beng in dawh hek lo;" 
Jeremiah25:5 chung zawlneite chuan, mi tin, mahni sual kawng ata lo kir u la, LALPA'n a hnenah leh in pate hnena hman lai atanga kumkhua atana a pek che a ramah hian cheng rawh u:" 
Jeremiah25:6 Pathian dangte hnena an rawng bawl tur leh chibai buk tur leh in kut hnathawha ka thin tiur turin kal suh u; tichuan ka tina lo ang che u, an ti thin a." 
Jeremiah25:7 Mahse in tana tha lo tura in kut hnathawktu mi tithinur turin mi ngaithla lo, LALPA'n a ti." 
Jeremiah25:8 Chuvangin Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ka thu in ngaithlak loh avangin," 
Jeremiah25:9 ngai teh u, hmar lam hnam zawng zawng chu ka chah ang, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti. Ka rawngbawltu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara pawh ka chah ang a, anni chu he ram leh a chhunga awmte leh he'ng vela hnam awm zawng anwgte bei turin ka rawn hruai ang a; ka tiboral der ang a, mi tihah leh chek khumah leh tiau reng atan ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah25:10 Tin, an hnen ata hlimna thawm leh lawmna thawm te, moneitu aw leh mo aw te, buh rawt thawm ri leh khawnvar engte ka la bo ang." 
Jeremiah25:11 He ram pum pui hi a chhia ang a, a ram ang; tin, he'ng hnamte hian Babulon lal rawng kum sawmsarih an bawl ang." 
Jeremiah25:12 Ti kum sawmsarih a ral hunah Babulon lal leh chu hnam chu, Kaldaiho ram chu, an sualna avangin ka hrem ang a; kumkhuain ka titua ang. LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah25:13 Chu ram chungah chuan ka thu an chunga ka sawi zawng zawng, Jeremia hnam zawng zawng chunga a sawi, he lehkhabua ziak zawng zawng hi ka thlentir ang." 
Jeremiah25:14 Hnam hrang hrangte leh lal ropui tak takte chuan an zinga an mi duh an thing dawn si a; an thiltih ang zel leh an kut hnathawh ang zelin ka thungrul dawn a ni. 
Jeremiah25:15 LALPA Israelte Pathai chuan ka hnenah heti hian a ti: Ka kuta he thinurna uain no hi la la, ka tirhna tur che hnam zawng chu intir rawh." 
Jeremiah25:16 An in ang a, an pai thlawk thlawk ang a, an a ang a, an hnena ka tirh tur khandaih avang chuan, tiin." 
Jeremiah25:17 Tin, LALPA kuta no chu ka la a, LALPA'n mi tirhna hnam zawng chu ka intir a:" 
Jeremiah25:18 chung chu hengte hi an ni: Jerusalem leh Judai khawpui te, chuta lalte leh hotute chu, tiauna te, mak tihah te, chek khumah te, anchhiaahte chang turin, tuna an awm dan ang hian:" 
Jeremiah25:19 Aigupta lal Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawh te, a hotute leh ami zawng zawng te;" 
Jeremiah25:20 hnam dang pawlhtu zawng zawng te; Uz rama lal zawng te; Philistia rama lal zawng zawng, Askelon leh Gaza leh Ekron leh Asdoda la awm chhun lalte chu;" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom leh Moab leh Amon thlah te; 
Jeremiah25:22 Tura lal zawng zawngte leh Zidon lal zawng zawng leh tuipui kam lalte; 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan leh Tema leh Buz leh an bak sam met zawng zawngte; 
Jeremiah25:24 Arabia lal zawng zawng te; thlalera cheng hna inchawhpawlhho lal zawng zawngte; 
Jeremiah25:25 Zimri lal zawng zawng te; Elam lal zawng zawng te; Media lal zawng zawng te; 
Jeremiah25:26 hmar lam lal zawng zawng te, a hla leh a hnai ami a indawt zelin; lei chunga awm khawvel lal ram zawng zawngte chu; tin, an in hnuah chuan Sesak lalin a in ang." 
Jeremiah25:27 Tin, an hnenah Sipaihote LALPA, Israelte Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: In u la, rui u la, lua u la, tlu u la, tho leh suh u, khandaih in zinga ka tirh tur avang chuan, ti ang che." 
Jeremiah25:28 Tin, i kuta no chu in tura an lak duh loh chuan an hnenah heti hian ti ang che: Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: In in ngei ang;" 
Jeremiah25:29 hei, ka hming vuah khawpuiah thil tha lo ka ti tan a, nangni hrem loh tawpin in awm ang maw? Hrem lohin in awm lo ang: leilunga cheng zang zangte chungah khandaih ka lek dan si a, tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah25:30 Chuvangin an chungah he'ng hi sawi la, an hnenah heti hian ti rawh: LALPA chu hmun sang atangin a rum ang, A chenna thianghlim atangin a rawl a chhuah ang, A huang chungah nasa takin a rum ang, Grep sawrtute angin a au vang, Leilung luah zawng zawngte chungah chuan." 
Jeremiah25:31 Leilung tawp thlengin thawm a thang khawk ang a, LALPA chuan hnamte a khing a, tisa zawng zawng chungah ro a rel dawn, Mi suaksual chu khandaih hnenah a pe ang, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah25:32 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh, thil tha lo chuan hnam tin, a rawn hrut dawn e, Thlipui na tak mai lei hmun tawp atangin a lo thawk dawn." 
Jeremiah25:33 Chumi nia LALPA thahte chuan lei tawp atangin lei tawp thlengin an dap ang a; sun loh leh khawm loh leh phum loin an awm ang a;lei chunga ekdur mai an ni ang. 
Jeremiah25:34 Berampute u, chiau vak vak u la, tap rawh u, Nangni beram rual zinga puipate u, tal tawp tawp rawh u, Thaha in awm ni leh in darhsarh nite a lo thleng takzet a nih hi. Bel duhawm angin in tlu ang." 
Jeremiah25:35 Berampute chuan tlan bona kawng an nei lo ang a, beram rual zinga puipate pawhin pumpelhna kawng an nei lo ang." 
Jeremiah25:36 Berampute tap thawm chu, beram rual zinga puipate chiau ri nen, LALPA'n an tlat hmun a tihram mek avangin." 
Jeremiah25:37 Huang muan awmte chu tihreh thiapin an awm ta e, LALPA thinrimna nasa tak avangin.A tawmna a chhuahsan ta, sakeibaknei ang maiin. An ram chu a chhe zo ta si a, Hnehchiahna rawng tak avang Leh a thinrimna nasa tak avangin." 
Jeremiah25:38 A tawmna a chhuahsan ta, sakeibaknei ang maiin. An ram chu a chhe zo ta si a, Hnehchiahna rawng tak avang Leh a thinrimna nasa tak avangin." 
Jeremiah26:1 Juda lal Josia fapa Jehoiakima lal tantirhin he thu hi LALPA hnen ata a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah26:2 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: LALPA in hung chhungah ding la, Juda khawpui zawng zawng Pathian be tura LALPA ina lo kalte hnenah chuan an hnena sawi tur thu ka pek zawng zawng chu pakhat mah zep loin sawi vk rawh." 
Jeremiah26:3 Mi tinin an awm dan sual kalsanin an ngaithla mial mahna, an thil tih sual avanga an chunga thil tha lo tih ka tum chu ka lamlet theihna'n." 
Jeremiah26:4 Tin, nangin an hnenah, ""LALPA chuan heti a ti: mi ngaihthlak lo a, ka dan in hmaa ka dah in zawm lo a, zing taka thova tirin in hnena ka tirh ka rawngbawltu zawlnei thu in bengkhawn loh chuan (in lo bengkhawn tawh si lo va)," 
Jeremiah26:5 he in hi Siloh angin ka siam ang a, lei chunga hnam zawng zawngte anchhia dawng turin ka siam ang,"" ti ang che." 
Jeremiah26:6 Tin, puithiam te, zawlneite leh mipui zawng zawngte chuan LALPA ina Jeremian he'ng thu a sawi hi an ngaithla a." 
Jeremiah26:7 Tin, heti hi a ni a, mipui zawng zawngte hnen sawi tura LALPA'n thu a pek zawng zawng chu a sawi zawhin, puithiam te, zawlneite leh mipui zawng zawng chuan amah an man ta a. ""I thi mawlh ang." 
Jeremiah26:8 Engah nge LALPA hming chhala, 'He in hi Siloh ang a ni ang a, he khawpui hi luahtu awm loin a tiau vang,' tia i sawi ni?"" an ti a. Tichuan LALPA inah chuan mipui zawng zawng chuan Jeremia chu an bawr ta huai huai a." 
Jeremiah26:9 Tin, Juda hotute chuan he'ng thu hi an hriatin, lal in atangin LALPA in luhna Kawngka tharah an thu a." 
Jeremiah26:10 Ti puithiamte leh zawlneite chuan hotute leh mipui zawng zawngte hnenah chuan, ""He mi hi thi tlak a ni, khawpui chhiat tur thu, in benga in hriat angin a sawi lawk si a,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah26:11 Ti hotue leh mipui zawng zawngte hnenah chuan Jeremia chuan, ""I thu ngaihthlak tak zawng zawng ang khan he in leh he khawpui chhiat tur thu sawi turin LALPA-in mi tir a ni." 
Jeremiah26:12 Chuvangin tunah hian a awm dan leh in chet dan siam tha u la, LALPA in Pathian thu chu awih rawh u; tichuan LALPA chuan in chunga thil tha lo thleng tur a puan tawh chu a lamlet thei ang." 
Jeremiah26:13 Kei rawh chu hei, in kuta ka awm hi. Dik leh tha in tih ang angin mi ti rawh u." 
Jeremiah26:14 Mi tihhlum chuan, nangmahni leh he khawpui leh khua leh tuite chungah mi thiam thisen in thlen ngei dawn a ni tih hre mai rawh u; dik takin in benga he'ng thu zawng zawng hi sawi turin LALPA'n in hnenah mi tir zuk nia,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah26:15 Tichuan hotute leh mipuite chuan, puithiamte leh zawlneite hnenah chuan, ""He mi hi thi tur a ni lo e, LALPA kan Pathian hminga kan hnena thu sawi a nih hi,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah26:16 Tin, chumi rama upa tue emaw an lo ding a, mipui awm khawmte hnenah chuan," 
Jeremiah26:17 Mika, Monaseth mi chuan Juda lal Jezekia lal lai khan thu a sawi a, tin, Juda mi zawng zawngte hnenah chuan,'Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a sawi:Zion chu lo anga leh a ni ang a, Jerusalem chu thil chhe awmkhawm a ni ang, A in tlang chu ram ngaw hmun sang ang a ni ang,' a ti a." 
Jeremiah26:18 Juda lal Hezekia leh Judate zawng zawng khan amah an tihlum em ni? LALPA hlauin LALPA duhsakna chu an ngen a, LALPA chuan an chunga thil tha lo thleng tur a puan chu a lamlet ta a ni lo em ni? Keini zawngin kan chungah thi tha lo kan thlen dan a ni hi." 
Jeremiah26:19 Tin, mi dang, LALPA hminga thu sawi Keriath-jearima mi Semeia fapa Uria kha a awm bawk a, Jeremia thu sawi zawng zawng ang bawkin he ram leh khawpui chhiat tur thu a sawi a." 
Jeremiah26:20 Lal Jehoiakima leh a mi ropuite zawng zawng leh hotute zawng zawngin an hriatin lal chuan tihhlum a tum a; mahse Urian a hriatin a hlau a, a tlan bo a, Aigupta ramah a kal ta a." 
Jeremiah26:21 Tin, lal Jehoiakima chuan Aiupta ramah mi a tir a, Akbora fapa Elnathana leh mi dangte nen;" 
Jeremiah26:22 tin, Aigupta ram atangin Uria an hruai chhuak a, lal Jehoiakima hnenah an rawn hruai a, chu chuan khandaihin a tha a, a ruang chu vantlang thlanah an paih lut a,"" an ti a.Mahse Saphana fapa Ahitkama chuan mipui hnena tihhlum tura an pek lohna'n Jeremia chu atan a." 
Jeremiah26:23 Mahse Saphana fapa Ahitkama chuan mipui hnena tihhlum tura an pek lohna'n Jeremia chu atan a. 
Jeremiah27:1 Juda lal Josia fapa Zedekia lal tantirhin, LALPA hnen ata he thu hi a lo thleng a." 
Jeremiah27:2 LALPA chuan ka hnenah heti hian a ti: Nghawngkawlte leh a hruite siam la, i nghawgah bat rawh." 
Jeremiah27:3 Tin, Edom lal te, Moab lal te, Amon mite lal te, tura lal te, Zidon lal te hnenah Juda lal Zedekia hnena mi tirh, Jerusalema lo kalte kutah thawn rawh." 
Jeremiah27:4 Heng thu hi an pute hnenah sawitir rawh: Heti hian Israel pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti: hetiang hian in pute hnenah in sawi tur a ni:" 
Jeremiah27:5 ka thil tih theihna ropui tak leh ka ban pharin lei te, mihringte leh lei chunga sa te ka siam vek a, pek awm ka tihte hnenah chuan ka pe a." 
Jeremiah27:6 Tunah pawh ka rawngbawltu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah he ram zawng zawng hi ka pe tawh a ni, ramsate pawh ama rawngbawl turin ka pe bawk a ni." 
Jeremiah27:7 Ama tiau hun a thlen hma chuan hnam zawng zawngin amah leh afapate leh afapaa fate rawng an bawl ang, chumi hnuah erawh chuan hnam tam takte leh lal ropui takte chuan amah chu bawiah an siam ang." 
Jeremiah27:8 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara nghawngkawl bat duh lo leh a rawngbawl duh lo hnam leh lalna ram chu khandaih leh tam leh hripuiin, ama kuta ka tihboral vek hma zawng anmahni ka hrem zel ang." 
Jeremiah27:9 Nangni erawh chuan in zawlneite, in aienthiam te, in mumang te, in chhamphual thiam te, in dawithiam te, in hnena ""Babulon lal rawng in bawl lo ang"" tia sawitute chu ngaithla suh u." 
Jeremiah27:10 In ram atanga hla taka hruai bova in awm theihna'n, in hnenah dawt thu an sawi lawk a ni: ka hnawh chhuah che ua in boral phahna turin." 
Jeremiah27:11 Amaherawh chu Babulon lal nghawngkawl bat a, a rawngbawl duh hnam chu an ram ngaiah ka awmtir ang a, lei an let ang a, chutah chuan an cheng reng ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah27:12 Tin, Juda lal Zedekia hnenah he'ng thu zawng zawng ang zel hian ka sawi a: Babulon lal nghawngkawl bat u la, amah leh a mite rawngbawl u la, in nung dawn nia." 
Jeremiah27:13 Babulon lal rawngbawl duh lo hnam chungchang LALPA'n a sawi tawh ang khan engah nge khandaihte, tamte, hripuitea nang leh i mite chu in thih ang le?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Tin, zawlnei in hnena ""Babulon lal rawngbawl suh u"" ti tute thu chu ngaithla suh u: in hnenah dawt thu an sawi mai a ni si a." 
Jeremiah27:15 Ka tirh an ni si lo a, Ka hming chhalin dawt thu an sawi zawk thin, nangni leh in hnena thu sawitu zawlneite chu ka hnawhchhuah a, in boral theihna'n, LALPA chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah27:16 Puithiamte leh he'ng mipuite zawng zawng hnenah pawh hian ka sawi bawk a: LALPA chuan heti hian a sawi a ni: Zawlnei in hnena thu sawitu, ""Ngai rawh u, Babulon atangin LALPA in hlum belte chu rawn thlen a ni thuai dawn e' titute thu chu ngaithla suh u; in hnenah dawt an sawi a ni si a." 
Jeremiah27:17 Anmahni ngaithla hauh suh u; Babulon lal rawngbawl u la, in nung dawn nia; engah nge he khawpui hi atiau vang le?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Mahse zawlnei an niha, LALPA thu an hnena awm a nih meuh chuan LALPA in leh Juda lal in leh Jerusalem bungbel hnutchhiaha la awmte chu Babulonah thlen a nih loh nan Sipaihote LALPA hnenah ngen ang hmiang." 
Jeremiah27:19 Sipaihote LALPA chuan, ban sangte, dar tuizem te, a nghahchhante leh he khawpuia bungbel hnutchhiaha awm chhunte," 
Jeremiah27:20 Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran Juda lal, Jehoiakima fapa, Jekonia leh Juda leh Jerusalema mi tha zawng zawng Jerusalem atanga Babulon sala a hruai tuma a lal bang chungchang thu heti hian a sawi a," 
Jeremiah27:21 a ni, Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan LALPA in leh Juda lal in leh Jerusalema bungbel hnutchhiaha la awm chungchang thu a sawi a ni:Babulonah lak bo an ni ang a, anmahni ka rawn kan hma loh chuan chutah chuan an awm reng ang; tin, ka la leh ang a, he hmunah hian ka dah kir leh ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah27:22 Babulonah lak bo an ni ang a, anmahni ka rawn kan hma loh chuan chutah chuan an awm reng ang; tin, ka la leh ang a, he hmunah hian ka dah kir leh ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah28:1 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, chumi kum vek, Juda lal Zedekia lal tantirh lam, a kum ina, thla nganaah chuan zawlnei Hanania, Azura fapa, Gibeon mi chuan puithiamte leh mipui zawng zawng hnenah, LALPA inah chuan, mi bia a, ka hnenah," 
Jeremiah28:2 Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Babulon lal nghawngkawl chu ka titliak ta." 
Jeremiah28:3 Kum hnih pumhlum chhungin LALPA in bungbel Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran hemi hmun ata a laka, Babulon thlenga a kalpui zawng zawng kha, he hmun ngeiah hian ka rawn thlen leh vek ang." 
Jeremiah28:4 He hmunah hian Juda lal Jehoiakima fapa, Jekonioa leh Babulona kal Juda sal zawng zawng chu ka hruai kir leh ang; Babulon lal nghawngkawl ka titliak dawn si a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni,' tiin." 
Jeremiah28:5 Tin, zawlnei Jeremia chuan puithiamte leh LALPA ina ding mipui zawng zawng hmaah chuan zawlnei Hanania hnenah," 
Jeremiah28:6 zawlnei Jeremia ngei chuan, ""Amen, LALPA chuan chutiangin ti tak rawh se; LALPA ina bungbelte leh sal tannaa mi zawng zawng babulon ata hemi hmuna rawn thlen tura i sawi chu LALPA chuan ti ngei rawh se." 
Jeremiah28:7 Amaherawhchu mipui zawng zawng leh nangma benga ka thu sawi hi ngaithla rawh khai. 
Jeremiah28:8 Keimah leh nangma hmaah hmasang zawlneite chuan ram tam takte chungah leh lalna ram ropui takte chungah indona te, thil tha lo te, leh hripui thute an sawi thin a." 
Jeremiah28:9 zawlnei, muanna thu sawitu thu sawi chu a lo thlen hunah, chu zawlnei chu LALPA chuan a tir ngei a ni tih a hriat mai ang chu,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah28:10 Tin, zawlnei Hanania chuan nghawngkawl, zawlnei Jeremian a bah chu a la a, a titliak a." 
Jeremiah28:11 Tin, mipui zawng zawng hmaah Hanania chuan, ""Heti hian LALPA chuan a ti: Hetiang ngei hian Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara nghawngkawl chu kum hnih pumhlum chhung ngeiin hnamte zawng zawng nghawng ata ka titliak ang,"" a ti a. Tin, zawlnei Jeremia chuan a kalsan ta a." 
Jeremiah28:12 Tin, zawlnei Hanania chuan zawlnei Jeremia nghawng ata nghawngkawl a tihtliah hnuah chuan Jeremia hnenah LALPA thu a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah28:13 Kal la Heti hian LALPA chuan a ti. Thing nghawngkawl chu i titliak a, a aiah thir nghawngkawl i siamsak zawk a nih hi." 
Jeremiah28:14 Heti hian Israel Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti si a: Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara rawng an bawl theihna'n he'ng hnam zawng zawng hi thir nghawngkawl bahtir a ni: ama rawng an bawl ang: ramhnuaia ramsate pawh amah ka pe bawk a ni, tiin." 
Jeremiah28:15 Tin, zawlnei Jeremia chuan zawlnei Hanania hnenah, ""Ngai rawh, Hana ni, LALPA'n a tir awzawng lo che: Heng mite hi dawt i rintir mai a nih zawk hi." 
Jeremiah28:16 chuvangin heti hian LALPA chuan a ti: Ngai teh, lei chung ata hi ka tibo daih ang che: LALPA chunga helna thu i sawi avangin kumin ngeiah hian i thi ang,"" a ti a.Tichuan chumi ku vek, thla sarihnaah chuan zawlnei Hanania chu a thi ta a." 
Jeremiah28:17 Tichuan chumi ku vek, thla sarihnaah chuan zawlnei Hanania chu a thi ta a." 
Jeremiah29:1 Tin, zawlnei Jeremian Jerusalem atanga sal tang upate, puithiamte, zawlneite, mi dangte, Nebukadnezzara Jerusalem atanga Babulona a hruai tak, la dam chhunte hnena a lehkha thawn thu chu he'ng hi a ni:" 
Jeremiah29:2 (lal Jekonia te, lalnu te, mi tilreh te, Juda leh Jerusalem hotu te, mi themthiam te, thirdengten Jerusale an chhuahsan hnu kha;)" 
Jeremiah29:3 Saphana fapa, Elasa leh Hilkia fapa, Gemaria te kutah a thawn a ni: (chungte chu Juda lal Zedekian Babulon ramah Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara hnena a tirhte chu an ni:)" 
Jeremiah29:4 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan sal tang anwg zang, Jerusalem atanga Babulon sala ka hruai tir takteho hnenah heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Inte sa u la, chutah chuan cheng u la, huante siam u la, a rahte ei u la," 
Jeremiah29:6 nupuite nei u la, fanute fapate hring u la: in fapate tan nupui neihsak u la, in fanute pasal neihtir u la, fanu fapa an hrin theihna'n: chutah chuan lo pung u la, kiua lam pan suh u:" 
Jeremiah29:7 Sala ka tantirna che u khawpui thatna tur zawng u la, LALPA hnenah dilsak rawh u:Lama thatnaah chuan nangni pawhin thatna in hmu dawn si a." 
Jeremiah29:8 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: In zingah zawlneite leh aienthiamte chuan bum che u suh se la, an mumang an man pawh chu ngaithla hek suh u." 
Jeremiah29:9 Ka hming chhalin dawt thu in hnenah an sawi a ni e: keima tirh an ni lo a, tih hi LALPA thu chuak a ni." 
Jeremiah29:10 LALPA chuan heti hain a ti si a, Babulon tan kum sawmsarih chu a kin veleh ka rawn kan ang che u a, in hnena ka thutiam tha tak chu ka hlen ang a, he hmunah hian ka kirtir leh ang che u." 
Jeremiah29:11 Nangni lama ka rilru putzia chu ka inhre si a, in hun hnuhnung tawpah chuan beiseina pe tur che uin thil tha lo ni loin thatna ka ngaihtuah a sin." 
Jeremiah29:12 Tin, mi lam ang a, ka hnenah in rawn tawngtai ang a, ka ngaithla ang che u." 
Jeremiah29:13 Tin, mi zawng ang a, in thinlung zawng zawnga mi zanw hunah chuan mi hmu ang." 
Jeremiah29:14 Tin, nangmahni hmuhin ka awm ang a, LALPA thu chuak chuan a ti, in awm dan ka let ang a, hna zawng zawng zinga ka tihdarhna che u hmun ata kha ka hruai khawm leh ang che u, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni; sala ka mantirna che u hmun ngeiah khan ka rawn thlen leh ang che u." 
Jeremiah29:15 LALPA chuan Babulon ramah pawh hian zawlnei min dinsak a, in ti si a." 
Jeremiah29:16 LALPA chuan Davida thutphaha lal chungchang thu leh he khawpuia cheng mpui zawng zawng, sala hruai tel loh, in unaute chungchang thu-ah chuan heti hian a ti si a:" 
Jeremiah29:17 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, an chungah chuan khandaih te, tam te, hripuite ka rawn thlen ang a, theipui hut, a chhiat em em avanga ei tlak tawp loh ang mai in ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah29:18 Tin, khandaih te, tam te, hripui tein ka umzui ang a, lei chunga lalana ram zawng zawngte zingah thil rapthlak takah ka siam ang a, anmahni ka tihdarhna hnam zawng zawngte zingah chuan anchhe dawngah, mak tih huai huaiah, chek khum talwk tawlka sawi chhiat ni turin ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah29:19 Zing takah thoin ka rawngbawltu, zawlneite hmang ka thu in hnena ka rawn thlen chu an pawisak loh avangin, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti: in ngaithla duh si lo, tih hi LALPA thu chuak a ni." 
Jeremiah29:20 chuvangin nangni Jerusalem atanga Babulona ka tirh, sal tang zawng zawngte u, LALPA thu chu ngaithla rawh u." 
Jeremiah29:21 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan Kolaia fapa, Ahaba leh Maaseia fapa, Zedekia ka hming chhala in hnena dawt thu sawitute chungchang thu-ah chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah ka mantir dawn e; in mithmuh ngeiah a that ang a;" 
Jeremiah29:22 Anahni thu-ah chuan Babulon rama Juda sal tang zawng zawng chuan Babulon lalin meia a rawh Zedekia leh Ahaba ang mai khan LALPA'n i chungah ti rawh se,"" tih hi anchhe lawh fungah an chin phah ang." 
Jeremiah29:23 Israel ramah chuan thi atthlak tak an tih a, an thenawm nupuite an uire a, ka hming chhalin ka thupek loin dawt thu an sawi avangin; kei a hretu leh a hraitpuitu ka ni e, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah29:24 Tin, Nehelam mi, Semaia chungchang thu-ah chuan nangin heti hian i sawi tur a ni," 
Jeremiah29:25 Israel Pathian Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a sawi a, Jerusalem mipui zawng zawng hnenah te, Maaseia fapa, zawlnei Zephania leh zawlnei zawng zawng hnenahte nangma hming ngeiin lehkha i thawn a," 
Jeremiah29:26 LALPA chuan puithiam Jehoiada aiah puithiamah a siam che a, LALPA in vengtu in ni a, mi a zawlnei inti apiang-te chu kawl te, thir kawlte i buntir tur a ni a." 
Jeremiah29:27 Tichuan engah nge Anathoth khua ami Jeremia, i hnena zawlnei inti chu in zilh loh?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Babulon ramah kan hnenah, 'Sal tanna tur chu a rei dawn a, inte sa u la, chutah chuan cheng u la, a rahte ei rawh u' tih thu min tawn a ni, tiin." 
Jeremiah29:29 Tin, puithiam Zephania chuan chu mi lehkha chu zawlnei Jeremia hriatah a chhiar a." 
Jeremiah29:30 Tin, Jeremia hnenah LALPA thu a lo thleng a." 
Jeremiah29:31 Sal tangho zawng zawng hnenah chuan Nehelam mi Semaia chungchang thu-ah chuan LALPA'n heti hian a ti: ka tirh hauh lohin Semaian in hnenah thu a sawi a, dat thu a rintir che a;chuvangin LALPA'n heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, Nehela mi Semaia leh athlahte chu ka hrem ang a, he'ng mite zingah mi pakhat mah a nei lo ang a, ka mite tanta thil ha ka tih tur chu a hmu hek lo ang: LALPA chungah helna thu a sawi avangin, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, tiin thawn rawh,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah29:32 chuvangin LALPA'n heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, Nehela mi Semaia leh athlahte chu ka hrem ang a, he'ng mite zingah mi pakhat mah a nei lo ang a, ka mite tanta thil ha ka tih tur chu a hmu hek lo ang: LALPA chungah helna thu a sawi avangin, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, tiin thawn rawh,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah30:1 Jeremia hnena LALPA thu lo thleng chu," 
Jeremiah30:2 LALPA Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: I hnena ka thu sawi tak zawng zawng kha lehkhabuah ziak rawh. 
Jeremiah30:3 Ngai rawh, ka mi Israel leh Judate ka hruai kir nite chu a lo thleng mek e; ram, an thlahtute hnena ka pekah chuan ka hruai kir ang a, an luah tawh ang, tih hi LALPA thu chuak a ni, tiin LALPA'n a ti." 
Jeremiah30:4 Tin, Juda leh Israel chungchang thua LALPA thu sawite chu hengte hi a ni." 
Jeremiah30:5 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Thlaphang thawm ka hria, hlauva au thawm, Muanna ni loin." 
Jeremiah30:6 Zawt vel u la, en vel teh u, mipain nau an vei ngai em? Engati nge hmeichhe nau vei ang renga, Mipate hian an tai an dawm theuha An hmelte a lo dan zawh tak?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Ehei! Chumi ni chu a ropui mang e, A ang reng chu a awm lo. Jakoba manganna ni a ni ngei mai, Mahse chhan chhuahin a awm tho ang." 
Jeremiah30:8 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, a nghawngkawl bah chu ka titliak ang a, a hrui chu a tichat ang: awze mite chuan amah chu rawngbawltuah an hmang ngai tawh lo ang:" 
Jeremiah30:9 LALPA an Pathian leh an lal atana ka tundin tur Davida rawng an bawl zawk ang. 
Jeremiah30:10 Chuvangin, aw ka rawngbawltu Jakon, Hlau hauh suh, aw, Israel, za hek suh, Tih hi Lalpa thu chhuak a ni. Ngai rawh, hla tak ata ka chhan chhuak ang chia, An sal tanna ata i thlahte ngei chu, Tin, Jakoba chu a kir leh ang a, Tuma'n an tihlau tawh ngai lo ang." 
Jeremiah30:11 Chhan tur chein i hnenah ka awm reng si a, Ka tihdarhna che hnam zawng zawng chu, Ka titawp ang a, nang erawh chu titawp loin: A tawk lekin ka hrem ang chia, Hrem loh chuan i chhuak tawp lo ang, Tih hi Lalpa thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah30:12 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti si a, I hliam chu tihdam rual a ni lo a, I pan chu a nasa a ni." 
Jeremiah30:13 Tanpui tur che an awm lo a, I damna tur chu damdawi a awm hek lo." 
Jeremiah30:14 A ngainatu che chuan an theihnghilh tawh chia, An ngaihsak tawh lo che: Hmelma hliamin ka hliam ta chia, Dim lo tawpin ka hrem chia, I khawlohna a nasa a, I thiltih sualte a pun avangin." 
Jeremiah30:15 Engah nge i hliam vanga i tah? I na chu tihdam rual a ni lo e, I khawlohna a nasa a, I thiltih sualte a pun avangin. Heng thil hi ti chuangh ka ti a nih hi." 
Jeremiah30:16 Amehrawhchu a eiraltu che zawng zawng chu, Eiralin an awm ang a, I hmelma zawng zawng chu mi tin mai, Sala hruaiin an awm ang, A rawktu che chu rawkin an awm ang a, A rallaktu zawng zawng che chu rallak atan ka pe ang." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ka tihrisel leh ang chia, I hliam zawng zawng chu ka tidam ang; LALPA thu chuak chuan a ti; Hnawhchhuah' an vuah chia, Tuma ngaihsak loh Zion a nih hi, an tih che avangin." 
Jeremiah30:18 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, Ngai rawh, Jakoba puan in, sala tangte chu, ka hruai kir ang, A chenna hmunte ka khawngaih ang, A khawpui chu a awmna mual ngaiah chuan sak a ni ang a, A lal in chu a awm dan pangngaiin a ding leh ang." 
Jeremiah30:19 Lawm thu sawina leh hlim thawmte chu, Chung atang chuan a lo chhuak ang. A mi chu ka tipung ang a, an tlem tham lo ang; Anni chu ka tiropui ang a, an tenau lo ang." 
Jeremiah30:20 An fate pawh tun hma angin an awm ang a, Ka hmaah an pung khawmin an nghet ang a; Anmahni hnehchhiahtute tawh phawt chu ka hrem zel ang." 
Jeremiah30:21 An hotu chu anmahni mi ngei a ni ang a, An roreltu chu anmahni zinga lo chhuak ngei a ni ang; Amah chu mi rawn hnaih turin ka ti ang a, Ani chuan mi rawn hnaih ang; mahni thuin tu nge mi rawn hnaih ngam hlei ang? Tih hi Lalpa thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah30:22 Tin, ka mite in ni ang a, Kei in Pathian ka ni ang." 
Jeremiah30:23 Ngai rawh u, LALPA thlipui, a thinurna thlipui na tak mai chu a chhuak ta! Mi suaksualte lu chu a nuak nek ang.A thinlung tumnate a hlena a tihzawh hma loh chuan, LALPA thinurna hlauhawm tak mai chu a lamlet lo ang:Ni hnuhnungahte chuan in la hre thiam ang." 
Jeremiah30:24 A thinlung tumnate a hlena a tihzawh hma loh chuan, LALPA thinurna hlauhawm tak mai chu a lamlet lo ang:Ni hnuhnungahte chuan in la hre thiam ang." 
Jeremiah31:1 Chumi hunah chuan kei hi Israel chhungkua zawng zawngte Pathian ka ni ang a, anni pawh ka mite an ni ang,"" tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:2 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Khandaiha thah bangte chuan, Thlaler ramah khawngaih an hlawh: Ka chawlh hahdamtir lai khan." 
Jeremiah31:3 Hmanah ka hnena LALPA lo lang chuan, heti hian a ti: A ni, hmangaih tawp loin ka hmangaih chia, Chuvangin lainatnain ka hruai haw che." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ka din thar ang che, aw! Nula thianghlim Israel, Din ngheh i lo ni ang a, Khuangte nen i inchei leh ang a, Hlim lai lamna hmunahte chuan i tel ang." 
Jeremiah31:5 Grep huante Samari tlang dung tluanin i siam ang a, Chuta chengten an ching ang a, A rahte chu an chen ang." 
Jeremiah31:6 Ephrai tlang ramahte chuan, Vengtute au ni a thleng dawn e, ""Tho ru, Zionah i kal ang u, LALPA kan Pathian hnenah chuan,"" tiin." 
Jeremiah31:7 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti e, Jakoba tan hlimin zai u la, Hnam ropui ber tan au chhuak rawh u; Puang u la, chawimawi u la, LALPA, Israel la awm chhun, i mite hi, Chhamdam ang che' ti rawh u." 
Jeremiah31:8 Ngai rawh u, hmar ram ata ka rawn hruai ang, Kawlkil tawp ata ka khawm chhuak ang, Mitdel te, kebai te, hmeichhe nau pai te, vei mek te nen, Mipui tam tak an lo thleng khawm ang." 
Jeremiah31:9 Mittui nen an lo kal ang a, thlamuang takin ka hruai haw ang, Tui luang lamahte ka lentir ang a, An petek lohna tur kawng tluangahte chuan: Israel tan pa ka ni si a. Ephraim chu ka fa tir a ni." 
Jeremiah31:10 Aw hnamte u, LALPA thu chu ngaithla u la, Tui kam ram hla takahte puang u la, Israel tidarhtu chuan a la hruai khawm leh ang a, Berampuin a beramte a vil angin a vil ang, tiin." 
Jeremiah31:11 Jakoba chu LALPA'n a tlan chhuak a, A aia chak lakah a chhan chhuak si a." 
Jeremiah31:12 Zion chhipah zaiin an lo kal ang a, LALPA thatnaah chuan an lawm ang a, Buh te, uain te, hriak te, Beram leh ranrual note chungahte an lawm ang; An nunna chu huan tui chawm ang a ni ang a, Kumkhuain an lungngai tawh hauh lo ang." 
Jeremiah31:13 Tin, nula thianghlimte chu lamin an hlim ang a, Tlangvalte pawh a tar azur maiin an hlim ang. An lusunna lawmah ka chantirin ka thlamuang ang a, An lungngaihna ata ka tilawm ang." 
Jeremiah31:14 Puithiamte nunna chu thauin ka titlai ang a, Ka thatnain ka mite pawh an tlai ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:15 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, Rama khuaah thawm an hria Mitthi ngaia tap tlawk tlawk, Rakilin a fate a tah a, A fate an awm tawh loh vangin Thlamuan theih a ni lo." 
Jeremiah31:16 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Tap lo turin i aw chu sum la, I mittui hul rawh se, I thiltihin lawmman a nei dawn e, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Ral ram atangin an lo let ang." 
Jeremiah31:17 I hun tawp lam chu nghahfakawm tak a ni ang. Mahni ram ngeiah i fate chu an lo kir leh ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:18 Ephraima intah chu ka hre lul mai. Nangin mi hrem a, bawngpa tuai Sawi ka ni a, Mi lettir la, ka let ang e, LALPA ka Pathian i ni miau si a," 
Jeremiah31:19 Mi lettir hnu chuan ka inchhir teh a, Mi thunun hnuah ka mal ka beng a, Ka zak a, a ni, ka tleirawl lai hming chhiat tuarin Ka kimki a ni,"" a ti a."
