Jeremiah31:20 Ephraim chu ka fapa duh tak, Ka nau ngainat tak a nih vang em ni, Amah ka thunun apianga ka thinlungah a chen tlat thin hi? Tichuan ka thinlungin a lainat thin a, A chungah zah ka ngai ngei dawn a ni, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:21 Kawng chhinchhiahnate insiam la, I tan kawng kawhhmuhnate phun rawh, I vah chhuahna lam kawng, Kawngpui lam ngei chu chhinchhiah tlat rawh: Aw nula thianghlim Israel, lo kir leh rawh, Heng i khawpui lamahte ngei hian," 
Jeremiah31:22 Aw, nang fanu lepchhiah, Eng chen nge i vah rawlai dawn le? LALPA chuan leiah hian thil thar a siam tak hi, hmeichhiain mipa a hum ta zawk." 
Jeremiah31:23 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: An sal tana ata ka hruai kir hunah chuan Judai ram leh a khawpuiahte chuan hetiang tawngkam hi an hmang leh ang, Aw, felna chenna hmun, Aw tlang thianghlim, LALPA chuan malsawm che rawh se, tih hi." 
Jeremiah31:24 Chutah Judaho leh an khawpuia mi zawng angte chu an cheng za ang a, lo nei mite leh ranvulhtute nen." 
Jeremiah31:25 Mi chaute chu ka titlai ta a, mi lungngai apiangte pawh ka tiharh tawh si a." 
Jeremiah31:26 Tichuan ka han harh a, ka han hawi vel a, mang tha tak chu a lo ni e." 
Jeremiah31:27 Ngai teh, nite chu a lo thleng dawn e, Israel chhungte leh Juda chhungteah chuan mihring chi leh ran chi ka tuh ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:28 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, anmahni pawt chhuak a, tisawm leh paih thlaa, tiboral a, tihreawm tura ka chang ang khan anenthla thung ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:29 Chung niahte chuan, 'Paten grep thur an ei a, an fate ha a tim e' an ti tawh ngai lo ang." 
Jeremiah31:30 Mi tinin mahni khawlohna an thihpui zawk ang a, grep thur ei tawh phawt ha ngei chu a tim ang." 
Jeremiah31:31 Ngai teh, nite chu a lo thleng dawn, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: chung niahte chuan Israel chhungte leh Juda chhungte hnenah chuan thuthlung thar ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah31:32 An thlahtute Aigupta ram atanga hruai chhuak tura an kut ka chelh nia ka thuthlun ang kha ni loin an tan hotu ka ni chungin chu ka thuthlung chu an bawhchia a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:33 chung ni hnua Israel chhungte hnena thu ka thlun tur erawh chu hei hi a ni, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: an chhungrilahte ka thupek ka dah ang a, an thinlungah ka ziak bawk ang a, kei hi an Pathian ka ni ang a, anni chu ka mite an ni ang; tumahin 'LALPA hre rawh; tiin mahni thenawm leh mahni unau an zirtir edawn tawh lo a; a te ber atangin a lian ber thlengin an zain mi hre theuh dawn si a, tih hi lalpa thu chhuak a ni: an bawhchhiatna chu ka ngaidam ang a, an sualna pawh ka hre reng dawn tawh si lo', tiin." 
Jeremiah31:34 Heti hain LALPA, chhun tieng tura ni petu, thla leh arsite tana dante ruatsak a, zan tieng tura petu, tui fawnte ri hum hum tura tuipui chawkthotu chuan a ti a ni: a hming chu Sipaihote LALPA a ni." 
Jeremiah31:35 Heng dan ruatte hi ka hma ata a bo chauhin Israel thlahte chu ka hma ata hnam nih an bang hlen ve ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:36 LALPA chuan hetihian a ti: chung lam van khi teh theih a nih a, lei nghahchhante hi zawn chhuah theih a nih chauhin Israel thlahte chu an thiltih takte avangin ka paih bo ve ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:37 Ngai rawh, nite chu a lo thleng mek e, Hananel kulhbing sang atangin kulh kil kawngka thlengin LALPA tan khawpui chu din a ni a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni.A tehna hrui chu Gareb tlang thlengin ngil takin a kal riah ang a, Goa lamah a kawi ang. Mitthi ruang leh vut paihna ruam pum pui leh tamlak zawng zawng, Kidron luikawr thlengin, chhak lampanga sakawr kawngka kil thleng chu LALPA tan serh tur a ni; chu chu engtikah mah tihdarh leh thiat chhiat a ni tawh lo ang." 
Jeremiah31:38 A tehna hrui chu Gareb tlang thlengin ngil takin a kal riah ang a, Goa lamah a kawi ang. Mitthi ruang leh vut paihna ruam pum pui leh tamlak zawng zawng, Kidron luikawr thlengin, chhak lampanga sakawr kawngka kil thleng chu LALPA tan serh tur a ni; chu chu engtikah mah tihdarh leh thiat chhiat a ni tawh lo ang." 
Jeremiah32:1 Juda lal Zedekia kum sawmna, chu chu Nebukadnezzara kum sawm leh kum riatnaa Jeremia hnena LALPA thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah32:2 chumi lai chuan Babulon lal sipai rual chuan Jerusalem an hual a; tin, zawlnei Jeremia chu Juda lal in vengtu hung chungah a tang a ni." 
Jeremiah32:3 Juda lal Zedekia chuan, ""Engah nge,;LALPA chuan heti hian a ti; Ngai rawh, hemi khawpui hi Babulon lal kutah ka pe ang a, a la ang:" 
Jeremiah32:4 Juda lal Zedekia pawh Kaldai mite kut ata a chhuak lo ang a, Babulon lal kuta mantirin a awm ngeizawk ang a, inhmachhawnin an inbia ang a, a mit ngeiin a hmel a hmu ang;" 
Jeremiah32:5 tin, Zedekia chu Babulon ramah a hruai ang a, amah ka tlawh hma loh chuan chutah chuan a awm reng ang; Kaldaite chu do mah u la in chhuak a ni,' tia i sawi ni?"" tiin a tantir a ni." 
Jeremiah32:6 Tin, Jeremia chuan, ""LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Ngai rawh, i pami Salluma fapa Hanamela chu Anathoth khuaa ka lo chu i tan lei rawh: ro khawm thei i nih avangin mi leisak tur a ni e' tiin i hnenah a lo kal ang"": tiin." 
Jeremiah32:8 Tichuan ka pami fapa Hanamela chu LALPA thu ang zelin vengtu hung chhungah chuan ka hnenah a lo kal a, ka hnenah, 'Benjamin rama Anathoth khuaa ka lo chu mi leisak ta che, rokhawm thei i nih avangin i tlan tur a ni, i tan lei mai rawh,'a ti a. Tichuan hei hi lalpa thu kha a ni tih ka hre ta a." 
Jeremiah32:9 Tin, ka pami fapa Hanamela Anathoth khuaa mi lo chu ka lei ta a, tangka chu ka han buksak a, tangkarua sekel sawm leh pasarih zet a ni." 
Jeremiah32:10 Tin, lehkha ka ziak a, ka char a, hretute ka ko a, tangka chu buknaah ka khai a." 
Jeremiah32:11 Tin, inleina lehkha inlei dan leh a awmzia ziakna chu char leh char lohte chu ka la a." 
Jeremiah32:12 Tin, ka pami fapa Hanamela mit hmuhah leh hretu leinaa hming chuang vete mithmuhah leh vengtu hung chhunga Juda thu zawng zawng hmaah chuan Maaseia fapa Neria fapa Baruka chu thu ke pe a." 
Jeremiah32:13 Tin, Baruka chu an hmaah thu ka pe a," 
Jeremiah32:14 Israela Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Heng ehkha, leina lehkha, char leh char lohte hi la la, hlum belah dah la, a awm rei theihna'n." 
Jeremiah32:15 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti si a: 'He ramah hian inte, lo te, grep huante miten an la lei leh ang,'"" tiin." 
Jeremiah32:16 Tin, Neria fapa Baruka hnena leina lehkha ka hlan hnuah chuan LALPA hnenah ka tawngtai a," 
Jeremiah32:17 Aw LALPA pathian, ngai rawh, i thiltihtheihna nasa leh i kut pharin lei leh van i siam ta a; i tan thiltih harsa lutuk a awm reng reng lo va:" 
Jeremiah32:18 sang tam takte hnena khawngaihna vur thintu leh pate khawlohna an hnua an fate chung thungrultu: Pathian ropui leh thiltithei: a hming Sipaihote LALPA: 
Jeremiah32:19 remruat thiam tak, thiltithei tak, mihring fate awm dan zawng zawng hmu chaingtu: mi tin, an awm dan leh an thiltih ang zela rultu:" 
Jeremiah32:20 Aigupta rama chhinchhiahna leh thilmak titu, vawiin thlenga Israelah leh mi dang zinga ti zeltu, vawiin ang renga mahni hming tilangtu," 
Jeremiah32:21 I mi Israelte Aigupta ram ata chhinchhiahna te, thilmak te, kut chak leh ban phar leh thil rapthlak nasa taka hruai chhuaktu," 
Jeremiah32:22 he khawizu leh hnutetui luang ram an thlahtute henna chhehchhama pek tiama petu. 
Jeremiah32:23 An lo lut a, an luah vek a, mahse i awka an awih lo e, i dan an zawm hek lo: tih tura i pek reng reng an ti lo a, chuvangin he'ng thil tha lo zawng zawng hi an chungah i thlentir a nih hi." 
Jeremiah32:24 En teh, khawpui lakna tur lei chhun pawnte a lo awm tak hi: khandaih te, tam te, hripui te avangin khawpui pawh chu a beitu Kaldaite kutah pek a ni ta: i sawi tawh chu a lo theng ta: en teh, i hmuh tak hi." 
Jeremiah32:25 Aw LALPA PATHIAN, nangin ka hnenah, ""Lo chu tangkain lei la, thu hretute ko rawh: khawpui erawh zawng Kaldaite kutah pek a ni ta, i ti,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah32:26 Tin, LALPA thu Jeremia hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah32:27 Ngai rawh, kei LALPA hi tisa nei zawng zawngte Pathian ka ni a, ka tan harsa lutuk a awm em ni?"" tiin." 
Jeremiah32:28 Chuvangin LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh, he khawpui hi Kaldaite kutah leh Babulon lal Nebuanezara kutah ka pe ang a, a la ang:" 
Jeremiah32:29 Tin, hemi khawpui beitu Kaldaite hi an lo kal ang a, he khawpui hi an hal ang a, a kang ang, mi tithinur tura Baala hnena rimtui hlanna, pathian dangte hnena in tur hlan leih chhuahna in chung nei in zawng zawngte nen." 
Jeremiah32:30 Israel fate leh Juda fate chuan an tleirawl tet ata ka mithmuhah thil tha lo hlir an ti si a: Israel fate chuan an kut hnathawhte chuan mi tithinur mai ani tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. 
Jeremiah32:31 He khawpui hi an sak tirh ata tun thlengin mi tithinurtu leh mi tithinrimtu a ni reng si a: ka hma ata ka tihbo daihan turin: 
Jeremiah32:32 Israel fate leh Juda fate mi tithinur tura an thil tha lo tih takte zawng zawng avangin, anmahni, an lalte, an hotute, an puithiamte, an zawlneite, Juda mite Jerusale luahtu zawng anwgte nen." 
Jeremiah32:33 Ka lam hawi loin an tukkhum chhah mi chhawn a, ngun tak taka beiin zirtir tawh mah i la, zirtirna chu dawngsawng turin an bengkahwn si lo." 
Jeremiah32:34 Ka hming chuanna in chu tibawrhbang turin an thil tenawmte an dah zawk a. 
Jeremiah32:35 Tin, Ben Hinom ruama mi baala biakna hmun sangte chu an din a, an fanute, an fapate Moleka hnena meia an paihna turin. Judaho thil sual tihtir tura he tenawmna an tih hi ka thupek a ni hauh lo va ka rilruah pawh a lut ngai hek lo." 
Jeremiah32:36 Tin, ka mite an ni ang a, kei an Pathian ka ni ang." 
Jeremiah32:37 Kumkhuaa mi tih hlen theihna'n thinlung hmun khat leh awm dan hmun khat ka siamsak ang: anmahni leh an hnua an fate thatna turin. 
Jeremiah32:38 Tin, an hnenah kumkhaw thuthlung ka siam ang a, anmahni hawisan loin, an thatna ka ti fo ang; mi hransan lohna'n an thinlungahte chuan mi tihna ka dah ang." 
Jeremiah32:39 A ni, an thatna tih chu ka lawmzawng a ni ang a, ka thinlung zawng zawngin he ramah hian ka phun nghet ngei ang." 
Jeremiah32:40 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: 'He mite chunga thil tha lo nasa tak ka thlen ang ngei khan anmahni hnena thil tha ka tiam zawng zawngte chu ka thlen ngei ang. 
Jeremiah32:41 Ram tiau, Kaldai te, kuta pek tawh, mi leh sa awm tawh lo; in tih ramah hian lote an inlei leh dawn a ni.Benjamina ramahte, Jerusalem khawpui vel hmunahte, Judai ram khawpuiahte, tlang ram khawpuiaah te, phai ram khawpuiahte leh chhim lam khawpuiahte chuan miten tangkain lo an lei ang a, leina lehkha an ziak ang a, an char ang a, hretute an ko ang: an awm dan ka lamlet dawn si a,' tih hi lalpa thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah32:42 Benjamina ramahte, Jerusalem khawpui vel hmunahte, Judai ram khawpuiahte, tlang ram khawpuiaah te, phai ram khawpuiahte leh chhim lam khawpuiahte chuan miten tangkain lo an lei ang a, leina lehkha an ziak ang a, an char ang a, hretute an ko ang: an awm dan ka lamlet dawn si a,' tih hi lalpa thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah33:1 Tin, Jeremia hnenah, vengtu hung chhunga a la awm laiin, LALPA thu chu vawi hnihnaah a lo thleng leh a," 
Jeremiah33:2 Thiltitu LALPA, nghet tura siamtu LALPA (LALPA chu a hming a ni) chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Mi au la, ka chhang ang che, thil ropui leh inthup i hriat ngai loh chu ka entir ang che." 
Jeremiah33:4 Israel Pathian LALPA chuan he khawpui inte leh Juda lal inte, khandaih leh lei chhun pawnte laka venna siam tura an thiat chhiat chungchang thu-ah chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah33:5 Kaldaiho beio turin an lo kal a, ka thinur leh thinrimnaa ka thah ruangte chuan an tikhat zawk dawn, an sualna zawng zawng avangin he khawpui lakah hian ka hmel ka lo thup tawh si a." 
Jeremiah33:6 Ngai rawh, damna leh hriselna ka rawn thlen ang a, ka tidam ang: muanna leh himna nghet tak ka hmuhtir ang." 
Jeremiah33:7 Tin, Juda awm dan leh Israel awm dan ka lamlet ang a, atira ka din ang khan ka din leh ang." 
Jeremiah33:8 Tin, an kahwlohna, ka chunga an thiltih sualna lak ata ka tleng fai a, an khawlohna, ka chunga an thiltih sualna leh ka chunga an bawhchhiatnate zawng zawng chu ka ngaidam ang." 
Jeremiah33:9 Tin, he khawpui hi leia hnam zawng zawng, an tana ka tihthat zawng zawng hmutute hmaah chuna ka tan hlimna te, chawimawina te, ropuina te ani ang a: thatna leh muanna an chungah ka thlen zawng zawng vangin hlauin an khur ang." 
Jeremiah33:10 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: He hmun, 'Juda khahwpui meuh pawha mi leh sa awm tawh loa tiau, Jerusalem kawtthlera mi leh sa leh chengtu awm loa ram tawh' an tihah hian," 
Jeremiah33:11 hlimna aw te, moneitu aw te, mo aw te, 'Sipaihote LALPA hnenah chuan lawm thu hril rawh u, LALPA chu a tha si a: a ngilneihna kumkhuain a awm dawn si,' titute aw leh LALPA ina lawmna inthawina rawn kengtute aw chu an la hre leh ang. Atira a awm dan angin ram chu ka awmtir ang, tih hi LALPA thu chuak a ni." 
Jeremiah33:12 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: He hmun, mi leh sa awm lo khawpa tiau tawh leh a khawpui zawng zawngah hian, berampu an beram rual bawhtirtute chenna hmun a la awm leh ang." 
Jeremiah33:13 Tlang ram khawpuiah te, phai ram khawpuiah te, chhim lam khawpuiah te, Benjamina ramah te, Jerusalem vel hmunahte, Juda khawpuiah te, an chhiartu kut hnuaiah chuan beramte an kal zung zung ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah33:14 Ngai rawh, nite a lo thleng mek e, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, Israel chhungte chungchangah leh Juda chhungte chungchang thu tha tak ka lo sawi tawh chu ka hlen ang." 
Jeremiah33:15 Chung niahte leh chumi hunah chuan felna Chawrno Juda hnenah ka chhuahtir ang, chu ramah chuan dik tak leh fel takin ro a rel ang." 
Jeremiah33:16 Chung niahte chuan Juda chu chhanhimtu a awm ang a, Jerusalem chu him takin a awm ang: tin, a hming put tur chu hei hi a ni ang, ""LALPA chu kan felna"" tih hi." 
Jeremiah33:17 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Davida chuan Israel chhungte lalthutthlenga thu tur mi a hmai ngai lo ang: 
Jeremiah33:18 Puithiam, Levia chite pawhin ka hmaa halral inthawi hlan tur leh buhbal thil hlan tur leh inthawi zel turin mi an hmai hek lo ang." 
Jeremiah33:19 Tin, LALPA thu chu Jeremia hnenah a lo thleng a:" 
Jeremiah33:20 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ka chhun ruat leh ka zan ruat thu hi in phelh theih a, chhun leh zan hi an hun taka awm lo tura in tih theih chuan," 
Jeremiah33:21 ka rawngbawltu Davida hnena ka thuthlung pawh a lalthutthlenga thu tur fapa a neih lohna'n tihchhiat a ni ve chauh vang: Leiva chite, puithiam te, ka rawngbawltute hnena mi pawh." 
Jeremiah33:22 Vana awmho chhiarsen loh leh tuipuia tiau chhiarsen loh ang maiin ka rawngbawltu Davida thlah leh Levia ka rawngbawltu David thlah leh Levia chi rawng mi bawlsaktute ka tipung ang. 
Jeremiah33:23 LALPA thu chu Jeremia hnenah a lo thleng a: 
Jeremiah33:24 chhungkaw hnih LALPA'n a thlante chu a paih bo ta' tia he miten an sawi chu i ngaihtuah ngai lo em ni? An mithmuha hnam tih tham an nih lohna'n hetiangin ka mite chu an hmusit a ni. 
Jeremiah33:25 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ka chhun leh zan thu ruat chu a din hlen loh a, lei leh van awm dante hi ka ruat lo a nih chuan," 
Jeremiah33:26 Jakoba thlahte leh ka rawngbawltu Davida thlahte chu ka paih bo ang,Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba thlahte chungah roreltuah a thlah ka la bo ang: an awm dante ka lamletsakin an chungah khawngaihna ka nei dawn si a." 
Jeremiah33:27 Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba thlahte chungah roreltuah a thlah ka la bo ang: an awm dante ka lamletsakin an chungah khawngaihna ka nei dawn si a." 
Jeremiah34:1 Babulo lal Nebukadnezzara te, a sipai rual zawng zawngte, ama thu hnuaia lei lalna ram zawng zawngte leh mipui zawng zawngten a Jerusalem leh a khawpui zawng zawngte an beih laia LALPA hnen ata Jeremia hnena thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah34:2 Israel Pathian, LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Juda lal Zedekia va bia la, heti hian hrilh rawh: LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh, he khawpui hi Babulon lal kutah ka pe ang a, meiin a hal ang:" 
Jeremiah34:3 a kut ata i chhuak tawp lo ang: man i ni ang a, a kutah a pe ang che, i mit ngeiin Babulon lal chu i hmu ang a, tawngka ngeiin in in bia ang a, Babulon ramah i kal tur a ni." 
Jeremiah34:4 Amaherawhchu, Aw Juda lal, Zedekia, LALPA thu hi ngaithla zel teh: i chungchang thu-ah chuan LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: khandaihin i thi lo ang a," 
Jeremiah34:5 muang takin a nia i thih ang: i hmaa lal hmasa, i thlahtute rimtui an halsak ang khan, nang pawh an halsak ang che: an sun ang chia, 'Ehei, ka pu,' tiin. Thu ka thlah tawh hi, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni"" tiin." 
Jeremiah34:6 Tin, zawlnei Jeremia chuan he'ng thu zawng zawng hi Jerusalem Juda lal Zedekia hnenah a sawi a;" 
Jeremiah34:7 Babulon lal Sipai rualte chuan Jerusalem leh Juda khawpui la awm zawng zawng, Lakis leh Azeka an beih lai chuan: Juda khawpui zinga kulh neite chu hengte chauh hi an ni tawh si a." 
Jeremiah34:8 ,9 LAL Zedekian Jerusalema awm mipui zawng zawngte hnenah, ""Mi tinin an chhiahhlawhnu te, an chhiahhlawhpa te, Hebrainu emaw, Hebraipa emaw an nih chuan, an chhuah tur a ni: a unaupa Hebrai mi rawngbawlsakin tumah an awm tur a ni lo,"" tia zalenna thu a puanna thu thlung a siam hnua lalpa hnen ata Jeremia hnena thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah34:9 ,8 LAL Zedekian Jerusalema awm mipui zawng zawngte hnenah, ""Mi tinin an chhiahhlawhnu te, an chhiahhlawhpa te, Hebrainu emaw, Hebraipa emaw an nih chuan, an chhuah tur a ni: a unaupa Hebrai mi rawngbawlsakin tumah an awm tur a ni lo,"" tia zalenna thu a puanna thu thlung a siam hnua lalpa hnen ata Jeremia hnena thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah34:10 mi tinin rawngbawl tunu emaw, rawngbawl tu pa emaw a chhuah tur a ni a, anmahni rawngbawlsakin tumah an awm tur a ni lo, tih thu thlung pawmtu hotu zawng zawng leh mipui zawng zawngte chuan thu thlung chu an awih a, an chhuahtir ta ngei a;" 
Jeremiah34:11 amaherawhchu chumi hnuah chuan an lamlet a, an rawngbawltunu leh an rawngbawltupa an chhuahtir tawhte chu an hnukkir a, an thu hnuaiah an rawngbawl tu-ah an dah leh a." 
Jeremiah34:12 Chuvangin Jeremia hnenah LALPA thu chu a lo thleng leh a; 
Jeremiah34:13 LALPA Israel pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Aigupta ram, bawih tanna ram ata ka hruai chhuah ni khan in thlatute hnenah thuthlung ka siam a," 
Jeremiah34:14 Mi tinin a unaupa, Hebrai mi, a hnena hralh tawh, kum ruk a rawng lo bawl tawh chu a kum sarihna tawpah chuan a chhuah tur a ni' tiin: tin, in thlahtute erawh chuan mi ngai thla lo a, an beng and awh hek lo." 
Jeremiah34:15 Tunah nangnin, in lo lamleta, mi tinin a thenawmpa hnena zalenna thu puangin ka mithmuhah thil dik chu in lo ti ta a: Ka hming vuah inah chuan ka hmaah thu thlung in lo siam ta a:" 
Jeremiah34:16 mahse in lamlet leh a, ka hming in tibawrbangin in duh ang taka in chhuah tawh hnu, in chhiahhlawhnu lah in chhiahhhlawhpa chu in hruaikir leh a, in thu hnuaiah rawngbawltu-ah te chhiahhlawhnuahte in dah leh a." 
Jeremiah34:17 Chuvangin LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Mitinin mahni unau leh mahni thenawm hnena zalenna thu puang turin ka thu in ngaithla loa; ngai rawh u, keiin in hnenah zelenna thu ka puang e, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni; khandaihte hripuite, tamtein a ni ang, leia lal ramte zawng zawng z�ngah vawrh lan vawrh lan turin ka siam ang che u." 
Jeremiah34:18 Tin, ka thu thlung bawhchhiate, ka hmaa bawng no zai phel kara kal tlang meuha thu tiama hlen lotu;" 
Jeremiah34:19 Juda hotute leh Jerusalem hotute, mi tilrehte, puithiamte, mipui zawng zawng, bawng no zai phel kara kalte chu;" 
Jeremiah34:20 an hmelmate leh an nunna zawngtute kutah ka pe ang a: tin, a ruangte chu chungleng savate leh leia ramsate chaw atan mai a ni ang." 
Jeremiah34:21 Tin, Juda lal Zedekia leh a hote chu an hmelmate leh an nunna zawngtute leh babulon lal sipai rual, nangmahni kalsan tawhte kutah ka pe ang.Ngai rawh u, hemi khawpuia lo kir leh turin thu ka pe ang a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, tichuan an bei ang a, an la ang a, meiin an hal ang: tin, luahtu awm loin Juda khawpuite chu ka titiau vek ang,"" tiin." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ngai rawh u, hemi khawpuia lo kir leh turin thu ka pe ang a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, tichuan an bei ang a, an la ang a, meiin an hal ang: tin, luahtu awm loin Juda khawpuite chu ka titiau vek ang,"" tiin." 
Jeremiah35:1 Juda lal Josia fapa Jehoiakima lal laia LALPA hnen ta Jeremia hnena thu lo thleng chuan; 
Jeremiah35:2 Rebeka chhungte hnenah kalin va bia la, LALPA ina pindan pakhatah hruai lut la, uain in tur pe rawh,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah35:3 Tin, Habazinia fapa, Jeremia fapa, Jaazania leh a unaute, a fapa zawng zawngte, Rekaba chhungte zawng zawng nen ka hruai a;" 
Jeremiah35:4 tin, Pathian mi Igdalia fapa Hanana fate pindan, LALPA inah chuan ka hruai lut a; chu pindan chu hotute pindan bul kawngka vengtu Salluma fapa Maaseia pindan chunga awm a ni:" 
Jeremiah35:5 tin, Rekaba thlahte paho hmaah chuan berhbute, note uaina khat ka hung a, an hnenah, ""Uain hi in rawh u"" ka ti a." 
Jeremiah35:6 Anni erawh chuan, ""Uain chu ka in tawp lo ang; kan thlatu Rabaka fapa Jonadaba chuan 'Nangmahni leh in thlahte pawhin kumkhuain uain in in tur a ni lo;" 
Jeremiah35:7 inte in sain thlai chi in tuhin, grep huante in siamin in nei tur a ni hek lo: in dam chhungniahte chuan puaninahte in cheng zawk tur a ni, in awmna ramah chuan in dam rei theihna'n' tiin thu min pe a ni." 
Jeremiah35:8 Tichuan kan thlahtu Rekaba fapa Jonadaban awkaa thu min chah zawng zawng, kan dam chhunga kei mahni leh kan nupuite, kan fapate leh kan fanutein uain in loh tur te," 
Jeremiah35:9 kan chenna in sak lo tur te, grep huan emaw lo emaw thlai chi emaw neih loh tur chenin kan zawm a ni:" 
Jeremiah35:10 puaninahte chuan kan cheng zawk a, kan thlahtu Jonadaba thupek zawng zawng chu awihin kan zawm vek a ni." 
Jeremiah35:11 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran ram a rawn beih lai khan keini chuan, 'Hawh u, Kaldai sipai rualte leh Suria sipai rualte hlau avangin Jerusalemah i kal ang u,' kan ti a, tichuan Jerusalemah hian kan lo cheng ta mai a ni,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah35:12 Tin, LALPA thu chu Jeremia hnenah a lo thleng leh a:" 
Jeremiah35:13 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Juda rama mite leh Jerusalema mi chengte hnenah va sawi la, ka thute ngaithla turin zirtirna chu an dawngsawng lo ang maw? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah35:14 Rebeka fapa Jonadaba thu, a fapa hnena a pek, uain in loh tur chu an zawm a, vawiin thlengin engmah an in lo a, an thlahtu thupek chu an zawm em em a ni: kei erawh chuan zing tak ata thoin in hnenah thu sawi a, mi ngai thla lo a." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ka rawngbawltu zawlneite chu zing tak taka thoin in hnenah ka tir a, mi tin, in awmdan sual atangin lo kir vek u la, inthiltihte chu siam tha u la, pathhian dangte chu an rawngbawl turin zui suh u la; tin, nangni leh in thlahtute hnena ram ka pekah chuan in cheng ang tiin; mahse in beng in dawh lo a, mi ngaithla hek lo." 
Jeremiah35:16 Rekaba fapa Jonadaba thlate chuan an thlahtu thupek an zawm a, he mite erawh hi chuan mi ngai thla si lo a;" 
Jeremiah35:17 Chuvangin LALPA Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, Juda leh Jerusalema cheng zawng zawngte chungah chuan thil tha lo an chunga lo thleng tur ka sawi chhuah tawhte kha ka rawn thlen ang: an hnena thu ka sawi a, an ngaithla si lo a, anmahni ka auh leh mi chhang hek lo"" tiin.Tin, Jeremia chuan Rekaba thlahte hnenah, ""Siapihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: In thlahtu Jonadaba thupek in zawm a, a thuchhuak zawng zawng in zawm a, a thupek zawng zawng ang zela in tih avangin Rekaba fapa Jonadaba chuan kumkhuain ka hmaa ding tur mi a hmai lo ang,"" tiin Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah35:18 Tin, Jeremia chuan Rekaba thlahte hnenah, ""Siapihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: In thlahtu Jonadaba thupek in zawm a, a thuchhuak zawng zawng in zawm a, a thupek zawng zawng ang zela in tih avangin Rekaba fapa Jonadaba chuan kumkhuain ka hmaa ding tur mi a hmai lo ang,"" tiin Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah36:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Juda lal Josia fapa Jehoiakima la kum linaah he thu hi LALPA hnen ata Jeremia hnenah a lo thleng a:" 
Jeremiah36:2 Lahkhabu zial la la, chutah chuan i hnena ka thu sawi zawng zawng, Israel chung thu te, Juda chung thu te, hnam zawng chung thu te, i hnena thu ka sawi ni ata Josia hun lai ata vawiin ni thlenga thu chu ziak rawh." 
Jeremiah36:3 Juda chhungte chuan an chunga thil tha lo tih ka tum zawng zawng chu, an ngaihthlakin mitinin an awmdan sual an lamlet thei mahna, an khawlohna leh an sualna ka ngaihdam theihna'n,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah36:4 Tin, Jeremia chuan Neria fapa Baruka a ko a, tin, Baruka chuan LALPA thu zawng zawng, a hnena a lo sawi tawh chu Jeremia tawngka ata lehkhabu zialah chuan a ziak a." 
Jeremiah36:5 Tin, Jeremia chuan Baruka hnenah, ""Khuahkhirh ka ni a, LALPA inah chuan ka kal thei lo a," 
Jeremiah36:6 chuvangin nang kal la, LALPA thu ka tawngka ata lehkhabu ziala i zial kha chaw nghei niah, LALPA ina mipuite beng hriatah va chhiar chhuak rawh; an khawpui ata lo chhuak Judate zawng zawng beng hriatah pawh i chhiar chhuak bawk tur a ni." 
Jeremiah36:7 Mi tinin an awmdan sual an lamletin, LALPA hmaah khawngaih an dilna chu an thlen thei mahnaite chunga thinrimna leh thinurna LALPA-in a puan tawh chu a nasa em em si a,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Jeremiah36:8 Tichuan Neria fapa Baruka chuan zawlnei Jeremia thupek zawng zawng ang zel chuan LALPA inah LALPA thu lehkhabua mi chu a chhiar ta a. 
Jeremiah36:9 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Juda lal Josia fapa Jehoiakima la kum ngana, thla kua naah chuan Jerusalema mi zawng zawngte chuan chaw nghei thu an puang ta a." 
Jeremiah36:10 Tin, Baruka chuan LALPA Kawngka Thar luhnaah, hung chhung chungnung zawka ziaktu Saphana fapa Gemaria pindan, LALPA ina miah chuan Jeremia thu lehkhabua mi chu,mi zawng zawng beng hriatah a chhiara a." 
Jeremiah36:11 Tin, Saphania fapa Gemaria fapa Mikaia chuan lehkhabua mi LALPA thu zawng zawng chu a lo hriat chuan," 
Jeremiah36:12 lal inah a chhuk a, ziaktu pindanah chuan a lut a, tinngai teh, tah chuan hotu zawng zawng chu an lo thu a, ziaktu Elisama te, Semaia fapa Delaia te, Akbora fapa Elnathana te, Saphana fapa Gemaria te, Hanania fapa Zedekia te leh hotu zawng zawngte chu." 
Jeremiah36:13 Tin, Mikaia chuan mite beng hriata Barukan lehkhabua mi a chhiar thu a lo hriat zawng zawngte chu a hrilh a." 
Jeremiah36:14 Tin, hotu zawng zawngte chuan Kusia fapa, Selemia fapa Nethania fapa Jehudia chu Baruka hnenah an tir a, a hnenah, ""Mite beng hriata i lo chhiar lehkhabu chu kengin lo kal rawh,"" ti turin. Tichuan Neria fapa Baruka chu lehkhabu zial kengin an hnenah a lo kal a." 
Jeremiah36:15 Tin, a hnenah, ""thu la, kan beng hriat ngeiah chhiar rawh le,"" an ti a, tichuan Baruka chuan an beng hriatah a chhiar ta a." 
Jeremiah36:16 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, chung thute chu an hriat chuan hlauin an in en hlawm a, Baruka hnenah chuan, ""Heng thu zawng zawng hi lal kan hrilh ngei ngei ang,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah36:17 Tin, Baruka chu, "" Heng thu zawng zawng hi a ka ata eng tiziaa ziak nge i nih, min hrilh teh khai?"" tiin an zawt a." 
Jeremiah36:18 Tin, Baruka chuan, ""Heng thu zawng zawngte hi a tawngkain mi hrilh a, lehkhatuiin lehkhabuah chuan ka ziak mai a ni,"" tiin a chhang a." 
Jeremiah36:19 Tin, hotute chuan Baruka hnenah, ""Kal la, Jeremia nen chuan biru rawh u; tuma'n in awmna hre suh se,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah36:20 Tin, hungchhngah lal hnenah an lut a; lehkhabu zial erawh chu ziaktu Elisama pindanah an dah ta a, a thu zawng zawngte chu tawngkain lal an hrilh a." 
Jeremiah36:21 Tichuan lal chuan lehkhabu zial la turin Jehudia a tir a, ziaktu Elisama pindan atang chuan a la a. Tin, Jehudia chuan lal leh lal bula ding hotu zawng zawngte beng hriatah a chhiar a." 
Jeremiah36:22 Thla kuana a ni a, lal chu a thlasik inah chuan a thu a, a hmaah chuan meihawl thuka vam a awm a." 
Jeremiah36:23 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, Jehudia chuan thlep thum emaw, thlep li emaw a chhiar chuan lal chuan a chemtein a zai bung a, thuk meiah chuan a zial bu pum kangral vek turin a theh lut zel a." 
Jeremiah36:24 Tin, lal leh a rawngbawltu, he'ng thu zawng zawng ngaithlatu tumahin an hlau lo a, an silhfen an thler hek lo." 
Jeremiah36:25 Chu chang ni loin Elnathana leh Delaia leh Gemaria te chuan lehkhabu zial chu hal lo turin lal hnenah an ngen a: mahse a ngai thla duh lo. 
Jeremiah36:26 Tin, lal chuan lal fapa Jerahmeela leh Azriela fapa Seraia leh Abdeela fapa Selamia te chu ziaktu Baruka leh zawlnei Jeremia te man turin thu a pe a: mahse LALPA chuan anni chu a thukru a." 
Jeremiah36:27 Tin, lehkhabu zial leh Jeremia ka ata Barukan a ziak zawg zawng thute lalin a halral hnuah chuan LALPA thu chu Jeremia hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah36:28 Lehkhabu zial dang la la, lehkhabu zial hmasaa thu zawng zawng, Juda lal Jehoiakiman a halral takte chu ziak leh vek rawh." 
Jeremiah36:29 Tin, Juda lal Jehoiakima chungchang chuan heti hian ti ang che: LALPA chuan heti hian a ti:' Babulon lal a lo kal ngei ang a, he ram hi a tichhiain, heta ta mi leh sa a tiboral vek ang, tia ziakna chu, engah nge chutiang thu i ziak, tiin lehkhabu ziak chu i lo halral ta a:" 
Jeremiah36:30 chuvangin Juda la Jehoiakima chungthu-ah chuan LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Davida thutphahah chuan mi thu tur a nei lo ang: a ruang pawh chu chhun nisa ah leh zan vur hnuaiah paih chhuah a ni ang. 
Jeremiah36:31 Tin, an khawlohna avangin amah leh a thlahte leh a rawngbawltute ka hrema ang: tin, anmahni leh Jerusalema chengte leh Juda mite chungah chuan an chunga ka puan tawh, an ngaihthlak loh thil tha lo zawng zawngte chu ka rawn thlen ang,"" tiin.Tichuan Jeremia chuan lehkhabu dang a la a, ziaktu Baruka, Neria fapa chu a pe a, ani chuan chutah chuan Jeremia ka ata lehkhabu ziak tawh zawng zawng, Jehoiakima meia a hal ral tak thute chu a ziak a: chumi bakah a anpui thu tam tak a belh bawk a." 
Jeremiah36:32 Tichuan Jeremia chuan lehkhabu dang a la a, ziaktu Baruka, Neria fapa chu a pe a, ani chuan chutah chuan Jeremia ka ata lehkhabu ziak tawh zawng zawng, Jehoiakima meia a hal ral tak thute chu a ziak a: chumi bakah a anpui thu tam tak a belh bawk a." 
Jeremiah37:1 Tin, Josia fapa Jedekia, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran judai ram lala a siam chu Jehoiakima fapa Konia aiah a lo lal ta a." 
Jeremiah37:2 Mahse amah leh a rawngbawltute leh a rama mite chuan LALPA thu zawlnei Jeremia kaa sawi chu an ngaithla lo a. 
Jeremiah37:3 Tin, lal Jedekia chuan Selemaia fapa Jehukala leh maaseia fapa puithiam Zephania chu zawlnei Jeremia hnenah, ""LALPA kan Pathian hnenah mi tawngtaisak rawh,"" ti turin a tir a." 
Jeremiah37:4 Tin, Jeremia chu mipuite zingah a duh duhin a la leng thei a: taninah an la dah si lo a." 
Jeremiah37:5 Tin, Pharaoa sipai rualte Aigupta atngin an lo chhuak tawh a: tin, Kaldaiho Jerusalem hualtute chuan an chan chin an hriatin Jerusalem chu an kirsan ta a." 
Jeremiah37:6 Tichuan LALPA thu chu zawlnei Jeremia hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah37:7 LALPA Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Juda lal, mi rawn tura tirtu hnenah chuan, Ngai rawh, Pharaoa sipai rual, nangmahni tanpui tura lo kalte chu anmahni ram Aiguptaah chuan an kir leh ang." 
Jeremiah37:8 Kaldaite erawh chu an lo kal ang a, he khawpui hi an bei ang a, an la ang a, meiin an hal ang." 
Jeremiah37:9 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Kaldaite chu min kalsan ngei ang tiin mahni in bum suh u; an kal dawn si lo. 
Jeremiah37:10 Nangmahni beitu Kaldai sipai rual zawng zawng hi sawisa nek mah u la, an zinga mi hliam awm chhunte chauh pawhin mahni puan in atanga lo thoin he khawpui hi meiin an hal tho ang, tiin sawi tur a ni,"" tiin." 
Jeremiah37:11 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, Pharaoa sipai rualte hlauva Kaldai sipai rualte chuan Jerusalem an kalsan lai chuan," 
Jeremiah37:12 Jeremia chuan mite zinga a chanvo la turin Benjamin rama lut turin Jerusalem a chhuahsan a. 
Jeremiah37:13 Tin, Benjamin kawngka a thlen chuan vengtu hotu Hanania fapa Selamia fapa a hming Irija a lo awm a: chu chuan Kaldaite hnenah i in pe a ni, tiin zawlnei Jeremia chu a lo man a." 
Jeremiah37:14 Tin, Jeremia chuan, ""Dawt a ni; Kaldaite hnenah ka in pe lo e,"" a ti a: mahse a ngai thla lo a, tichuan Irija chuan Jeremia chu a lo man a, hotute hnenah a hruai a." 
Jeremiah37:15 Tin, hotute chu Jeremia chungah an thinur em em a, an vua a, Ziaktu Jonathana inah an tantir a; chu chu tanin atan an hman a ni si a." 
Jeremiah37:16 Tin, Jeremia chu lei hnuai ripa a luh a, ni tam tak a awm hnuin" 
Jeremiah37:17 lal zedekia chuan a ko chhuak a: tin, lal chuan a inah a ruk tein a zawt a, a hnenah, ""lalpa hnen ata thu eng emaw tal a awm em?"" a ti a. A hnenah, ""Babulon lal kutah mantirin i awm ang,"" a ti bawk a." 
Jeremiah37:18 Tin, Jeremian lal Zedekia hnenah chuan, "" Nangmah emaw i rawngbawltu emaw he'ng mite chungah eng thil nge ka tihsuala mi mantir ni?" 
Jeremiah37:19 I hnena, 'Babulon lal chu nangmah leh he ram do turin a lo kal lo ang,' tia thusawitu i zawlneite chu khawiah nge an awm tak?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Aw ka ka pu, lalber ngaithla rawh, ka ngen a che; ziaktu Jonathana inah chuan mi kirtir lul suh, chutah chuan ka thi dah ang e,"" a ti a.Tin, lal Jedekia chuan thu a pe a, tin, Jeremia chu vengtu hung chhungah chuan a tantir a, chhang siamtute kawtthler ata nitin chhang hlawm khat, khawpuia chhang a awm chhung chu a pe a, chutiang chuan Jeremia chu vengtu hung chhungah chuan a awm reng a." 
Jeremiah37:21 Tin, lal Jedekia chuan thu a pe a, tin, Jeremia chu vengtu hung chhungah chuan a tantir a, chhang siamtute kawtthler ata nitin chhang hlawm khat, khawpuia chhang a awm chhung chu a pe a, chutiang chuan Jeremia chu vengtu hung chhungah chuan a awm reng a." 
Jeremiah38:1 Tin, Matana fapa Sephatia leh Pasura fapa Gedalia leh Selemia fapa Jukala leh Malakia fapa Pasura te chuan, mipui zawng hnena Jeremian," 
Jeremiah38:2 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: hemi khawpuia awm rengte chu khandaihte, tam te, hripui tein an thi ang a; Kaldaite hnena inpete erawh chu an nung ang a, a nunna chu a inchhanhim ang a. a nung ang." 
Jeremiah38:3 LALPA chuan heti hian ati: he khawpui hi Babulon lal sipai rualte kutah pek a ni ngei ang a, a la ang,"" tia a sawi chu an ngaithla a." 
Jeremiah38:4 Tin, hotute chuan lal hnenah, ""Hemi hi tihhlum ni rawh se, kan ngena che; ani chuan an hena hetiang thute sawiin he khawpuia raltu mi la awmte leh mipui zawng zawngte tha a tithum zo si a: he mi hian he mipuite thatna a zawng lo a, an chhiatna a zawng zawk a ni,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah38:5 Tin, lal Zedekia chuan, "" Ngai rawh u, ani chu in kuta awm a lawm: lal hi in duh lohzawng ti thei a ni hlei nem,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:6 Tin, Jeremia chu an hruai a, vengtu hung chhunga awm lal fapa Malkia lei hnuai ripah chuan an paih lut a: Jeremia chu hruiin an thlak thla a, chumi lei hnuai ripah chuan chirhdiak chauh lo chu tui a awm lo va: Jeremia chu chirhdiakah chuan a tla a." 
Jeremiah38:7 Tin, Ethiopia mi, mi tilreh lal ina awm thin Ebedmeleka chuan Jeremia chu lei hnuai ripah an dah tih a lo hria a; chutih lai chuan lal chu Benjamin kawngkaah a thu a;" 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedmeleka chu lal in ata a chhuak a, lal hnenah chuan," 
Jeremiah38:9 Ka pu, lalber, he'ng miten zawlnei Jeremia lei hnuaia ripa an lo paih thlak hi nasa tak an ti a ni; riltam avangin a awmna hmunah chguan a thi mai dawn a lawm; khawpuiah chuan chhang a awm tawh si lo,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:10 Tin, lal chuan Ethiopia mi mi Ebedmeleka chu thu a pe a, 'Heta tangin mi sawmthum hruai la, lei hnuai rip ata chu a thih hmain zawlnei Jeremia chu la chhuak rawh u, "" tiin." 
Jeremiah38:11 Tichuan Ebedmeleka chuan mite chu a hruai a, lal tangka in hnuaiah chuan an lut a, kawr hlui paihte leh silhfen chhiate an la chhuak a, lei hnuai ripah chuan Jeremia hnenah hruiin an thlak a." 
Jeremiah38:12 Tin, Ethiopia mi Ebedmeeka chuan Jeremia hnenah, ""Heng kawr hluite leh silhfen chhiate hi i zakhnuaiah hrui hian hren hnan rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, Jeremia chuan chutiang chuan a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:13 Tin, Jeremia chu lei hnuai rip ata chu hruiin an khai chhuak ta a: tin, Jeremia chu vengtu hung chhungah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Jeremiah38:14 Tin, lal Zedekia chuan Jeremia chu a ko a, LALPA ina luhna pathumnaah chuan a hnenah a hruai lut a: tin, lal chuan Jeremia hnenah, ""Thil ka zawt ang chia; ka lakah engmah thup suh ang che,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:15 Tin, Jeremia chuan Zedekia hnenah, ""Ka hrilh che chuan mi tihlu ngei dawn law ni? Thu ka rawn che chuan mi ngaithla dawn si lo,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:16 Tin, lal Zedekia chuan Jeremia hnenah, ""LALPA he ka nuna siamtu hi a nuna a nun chhung zawng ka tihlum tawp lo ang chia, i nunna zawngtute kutah chuan ka pe hek lo ang che,"" tiin a ruktein chhia a chham a." 
Jeremiah38:17 Tichuan Jeremia chuan Zedekia hnenah, ""Lalpa, sipaihote Pathian, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Babulon lal hotute hnena i inpek chuan i nunna chu i vawng him ang a, hemi khawpui pawh hi a kang lo ang, nang leh i chhungte pawh in nung ang." 
Jeremiah38:18 Babulon lal hotute hnena i inpek loh erawh chuan he khawpui hi Kaldai kutah pek a ni ang a, an hal ang a, an kut ata i chhuak tawp lo ang,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:19 Tin, lal Zedekian Jeremia hnenah, ""Kaldai mite hnena inpe tawh Judate mi mantirin mi nuihzabur mai ang tih ka hlau a ni,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:20 Jeremia erawh chuan, ""An mantir lo ang che; i hnena ka sawi LALPA aw hi awih mai rawh. Tichuan i tan a tha ang a, i nung bawk ang." 
Jeremiah38:21 Inpek i duh loh erawh chuan hei hi LALPA thu mi kawhhmuh chu a ni: 
Jeremiah38:22 Ngai rawh, Juda lal ina hmeichhe la awm zawng zawngte chu Babulon lal hotute hnenah hruaiin an awm ang a, chung hmeichhiate chuan, I thian tha thaten an bum chia, an hneh ta che, i ke chu chirhdiaka a tan veleh an hawisan che, an ti ang." 
Jeremiah38:23 I nupui te, i fanaute chu Kaldai mite hnenah an hruai vek ang a, an kut ata i chhuak lo ang a, Babulon lal kutah manin i awm zawk ang a, nangmah avangin he khawpui hi a kang ang,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:24 Tin, Zedemia chuan Jeremia hnenah, ""Heng thute hi tuma'n hre suh se, tichuan i thi lo ang." 
Jeremiah38:25 Nimahsela hotuten kan biak che hi an hriat a, i hnena an lo kal a, i hnena, 'Lal hnena i sawi chu min hrilh rawh; kan lakah engmah zep suh la, kan tihlum lo ang che; nangma hnena lal thu sawite pawh,' an tih chuan," 
Jeremiah38:26 nang chuan an hnenah, 'Jonathana ina mi kirtir lo a, chuta va thi lo turin lal hnenah dilna ka theh lut mai a ni,' i ti dawn nia,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:27 Tin, hotu zawng zawngte chuan Jeremia hnena an lo kalin, an zawt ta ngei a, lalin thu a pek zawng zawng ang zelin anni chu a hrilh a. Tichuan an biak chu an bang ta a; a thu ch hriat phak a ni si lo a.Tichuan Jeremia chu Jerusalem lak ni thlengin vengtu hung chhungah a awm ta reng a." 
Jeremiah38:28 Tichuan Jeremia chu Jerusalem lak ni thlengin vengtu hung chhungah a awm ta reng a. 
Jeremiah39:1 Tin, Juda lal Zedekia lal kum kuana thla sawmnaah chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara leh a sipai zawng zawng chuan Jerusalem an bei a, an hual a." 
Jeremiah39:2 Zedekia lal kum sawm leh pakhatna thla lina, chu mi thla ni kuanaah chuan khawpui kolh chu an su tlang a." 
Jeremiah39:3 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jerusalem an lak chuan Babulon hlal hotute zawng zawng chu an lo lut a, kawngka laitaah chuan an thu a, Nergal-sarezera te, Samgarnebo te, Sarsekima te, Rab-saria te, Nergalsarezera te, Rabmaga te leh Babulon lal hotu dang zawng zawng nen." 
Jeremiah39:4 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, Juda lal Zedekia leh raltu mi zawng zawng chuan anni chu an hmuhin an thlanchhia a, khawpui ata zanah lal huan kawng lamah kulh bang pahnih kar kawngkaah an tlan chhuak a, ani chu Arab-ah kawng lamah a chhuak a;" 
Jeremiah39:5 mahse Kaldaiho sipai rual chuan ani chu an um a, Jeriko phai zawlah Zedekia chu an um phak ta a; tin, an man hnu chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara hnenah, Hamath rama Riblah khuaah chuan an hruai a, tin, amah chuan a chung thu chu a rel a." 
Jeremiah39:6 Tin, Babulon lal chuan Riblah khuaah chuan ama mithmuh ngeiah chuan Zedekia fapate chu a that a, Babulon lal chuan Juda mi tha zawng zawng a that bawk a." 
Jeremiah39:7 Chu lo pawh chu Zedekia mit a kher chhuahsak a, kawl a buntir a, Babulon-ah a hruai a a." 
Jeremiah39:8 Tin, Kaldai-hote chuan lal in leh mi dang in zawng zawng an hal a, Jerusalem kulh bangte pawh an tichhia a." 
Jeremiah39:9 Tin, vengtu hotu Nebuzaradana chuan khawpui mipui la awm leh a hnena mahnia inpete leh mipui la awm chhunte chu babulonah salah a hruai a;" 
Jeremiah39:10 mahse vengtu hotu Nebuzaradana chuan Juda ram mi rethei engmah nei lote chu a hnutchhiah a, grep huan leh lote a pe nghal a." 
Jeremiah39:11 Tin, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chuan Jeremia chungchang thu-ah chuan vengtu hotu Nebuzaradana hnenah," 
Jeremiah39:12 Ani hi hruai la, tha takin ti la, tina reng reng suh, i hnena a saiw ang zelin ti zawk rawh,"" tiin thu a pe a." 
Jeremiah39:13 Tin, vengtu hotu Nebuzaradana chuan Nebusazbana te, Rabsaria te, Nergal-sarezara te, Rabmaga te leh Babulon lal sipai hotu deuh deuhte a chah vek a," 
Jeremiah39:14 anni chuan Jeremia chu vengtu hung chhung ata an ko chhuak a, Saphana fapa Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnenah a ina hawn turin an kawltir ta, tichuan mite zingah chuan a khawsa ta a." 
Jeremiah39:15 Tin, LALPA thu chu, vengtu hung chhunga khar khipa a awm lai chuan Jeremia hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah39:16 Ethiopia mi Ebedmeleka hnenah, Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh, a thatna tur ni loin he khawpui chhiatna tur zawkin ka thute ka rawn thlen ang a, chumi ni ngei chuan i hmaah hlen a ni ang." 
Jeremiah39:17 Chumi niah chuan nang erawh chu ka chhan chhuak ang che, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, i mi hlauhte kutah pek i ni lo ang.Ka chhanhi ngei dawn si chia, khandaihin i tlu lo ang a, i nun chu i chhanhim ang, kei mi rin avangin, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, tiin va sawi rawh,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ka chhanhi ngei dawn si chia, khandaihin i tlu lo ang a, i nun chu i chhanhim ang, kei mi rin avangin, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, tiin va sawi rawh,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah40:1 Judai leh Jerusalem sal zawng zawng, Babulon sala an hruaite zinga Jeremia khaidiat vuan chunga a hruai laia vengtu hotu Nebuzaradanan, Ramah atanga a chhuahtir hnua LALPA hnen ata Jeremia hnena thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah40:2 tin, vengtu hotu chuan Jeremia chu a hruai a, a hnenah, ""LALPA i Pathian chuan he hmuna thil tha lo thleng tur hi a lo puang tawh a." 
Jeremiah40:3 Tin, LALPA chuan a rawn thlentir ta ngei a, a sawi ang zelin a ti ta a; LALPA chungah thil in tisual a, a tawngka in awih loh avangin he thil hi in chungah a lo thleng a nih hi." 
Jeremiah40:4 Tunah chuan, ngai rawh, vawiin ni hian i kuta khaidiat bun chu ka phelsak a che. Babulona ka hnena lo kal i duh leh lo kal la, i duh loh leh lo kal lo mai rawh; en teh, ram zawng zawng i hmaa a awm hi, kal rem i tih leh tha i tihna apiangah kal ang che,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah40:5 A la kir hmain ani chuan, ""Juda khawpuite chunga awptua Babulon lalin a siam Saphana fapa, Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnenah kir la, mite zingah a hnenah awm rawh, anih loh leh kal rem i tihna apiangah kal mai rawh,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah40:6 Tichuan vengtu hotu chuan ei tur leh thilpek a pe a, a kaltir ta a. Tin, Jeremia chu Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnenah Mizpah khuaah a kal a, a hnenah a rama mi la awm chhunte zingah chuan a awm ve ta a." 
Jeremiah40:7 Tin, sipai pawl hotu zawng zawng ram laka awmte chuan, anmahni leh an hoten Babulon lalin, Ahikama fapa Gedalia chu chumi rama mi rethei berte, Babulon sala hruai loh zawng zawng chu a kawltir tih an lo hriat chuan," 
Jeremiah40:8 Mizpah khuaah, Gedalia hnenah an lo kal a, - Nethania fapa Ismaela te, Karena fa, Johanana leh Jonathana te, Tanhumetha fapa Seraia te, Netophath khuaa mi Ephaia fate leh Maakath khuaa mi fapa Jezania te leh an hote chu." 
Jeremiah40:9 Tin, Saphana apa, Ahikama fapa Gedalia chuan anmahni leh an hote hnenah, ""Kaldaite rawng bawl chu hlau su hu: ramah hian awm hle hle u la, Babulon lal rawng bawl u la, in tan a tha mai ang." 
Jeremiah40:10 Kei zawng Mizpah khuaah hian ka awm ang a, Kaldai mi ka hnena lo kal turte hmaah chuan nangmahni aiawhin ka ding ang: nangni erawh chuan uain te, nipui thei te, hriak te la khawm u la, in belahte dah u la, khawpui in lak takahte chuan cheng rawh u"" tiin chhia a chham a." 
Jeremiah40:11 Chutiang bawkin Juda mi zawng zawng, Moab rama cheng te, Amon mite zinga chengte leh Edom rama hengte leh ram danga awmte chuan Babulon lalin Juda mi thenkhat a hnutchhiah a, an chungah Saphana fapa, Ahikama fapa, Gedalia a dah an hriatin," 
Jeremiah40:12 Juda mi zawng zawng an hnawhdarhna ram zawng zawng atangin an lo kir a, Judai rama Mizpah khuaah Gedalia hnenah an lo thleng a, uain leh nipui thei an la khawm ta teuh mai a." 
Jeremiah40:13 Chu lo pawh chu Karea fapa Johanana leh sipai pawlte hotu, ram laka awm zawng zawng chu Mizpah khuaah Gedalia hnenah an lo kal a," 
Jeremiah40:14 a hnenah, ""Amon mite lal Baalisa chuan i nunna la turin Nethania fapa, Ismaela a tir tih i hria em""? An ti a. Ahikama fapa Gedalia erawh chuan a awih lo a." 
Jeremiah40:15 Tin, Karea fapa Johanana chuan Mizpah khuaah Gedalia hnenah, ""Mi kaltir teh khai, Nethania fapa Ismaela chu ka va that mai ang e, tuma'n an hre lo ang: Juda mi i hnena awm khawm zawng zawng an darh vek a, Juda mi zawm chhunte boralna ti turin engah nge i nunna a lak ang""? tiin a ruktein a sawi a.Ahikama fapa Gedalia erawh chuan Karea fapa Johanana hnenah chuan, ""He thil hi i ti tur a ni lo; Ismaela i sawi dan hi a dik lo e,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah40:16 Ahikama fapa Gedalia erawh chuan Karea fapa Johanana hnenah chuan, ""He thil hi i ti tur a ni lo; Ismaela i sawi dan hi a dik lo e,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah41:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, thla sarihnaah chuan Elisama fapa Nethania fapa Ismaela, lal chia mi, lal khawnbawlte zinga pakhat chu, mi sawm hruaiin Mizpah khuaha Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnenah an lo kal a; tin, Mizpah khuaah chuan chaw an eiho a." 
Jeremiah41:2 Tin, Nethania fapa Ismaela chu a mi hruai sawmte nen chuan an tho a, Saphana fapa Ahikama fapa, Babulon lalin ram awptua a siam Gedalia chu khandaihin an that ta a." 
Jeremiah41:3 Tin, a hnena Juda mi awm zawng zawng, Mizpah khua Gedalia hnena awmte leh Kaldai raltu mi zawm vete chu Ismaela chuan a that bawk a." 
Jeremiah41:4 Tin, Gedalia a thah hnu ni hnihnaah chuan heti hi a lo n a, tumah an hriat hmain," 
Jeremiah41:5 Sekem atang te, Silo atang te, Samaria atangtein i sawmriat, an khabe hmul meta, an silhfente thlera, mahni inzaiin, chhang hlante leh rimtuite kengin LALPA inah hlan turin an lo kal a." 
Jeremiah41:6 Tin, Nethania fapa, Ismaela chu Mizpah khua atangin anmahni hmuak turin a chhuak a, kawng tluanin a tap zel a: tin, heti hi a ni a, anmahni a han hmuh chuan an hnenah, ""Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnenah lo kal rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah41:7 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, khawpui chhung an han thlen chuan Nethania apa Ismaela leh a mi hruaite chuan anni chu an that a, khuarkhurumah an paih ta a." 
Jeremiah41:8 An zinga mi sawm erawh chuan, ""Min that suh, ramah chuan buh te, buhban te, hriak te, khawizute ka thukru tehuh si a,"" an ti a. Tichuan anmahni chu a zuah a, an unaute zingah chuan a that tel ta lo a." 
Jeremiah41:9 Tin, khuarkhurum, Ismaelan Gedalia ruala a mi thahte ruang a paihna chu lal Assan Israel lal Baasa a hlauh avanga a siam a ni. Nethania fapa Ismaela chuan chu chu ruangtein a tikhat a." 
Jeremiah41:10 Tin, Ismaela chuan Mizpah khuaa mi nung awm chhun, lal fanute, Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnena vengtu hotu Nebuzaradanan a kawltir, Mizpah khuaa la mi nung awm chhun, lal fanute, Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnena vengtu hotu Nebuzaradanan a kawltir, Mizpah khuaa la awm zawng zawng nen salah a hruai ta vek a; Nethania fapa Ismaela chuan chungte chu sala hruaiin Amon mite ram panin a chhuak a." 
Jeremiah41:11 Amaherawhchu Karea fapa Johanana leh a hnena awm sipai pawl hotu zawng zawng chuan Nethania fapa Ismaela thil thalo thalo tih zawng zawng chu an lo hriatin," 
Jeremiah41:12 mi zawng awng an hruai chhuak a, Nerthania fapa Ismaela bei turin an kal a, tui tam tak awmna hmun Gibeon-ah chuan an va hmu." 
Jeremiah41:13 Tin, heti hi a, Ismaela hnena mi zawng zawng chuan Karea fapa Johanana leh a hnena sipai pawl hotu zawng zawng chu an han hmuhin an lo lawm ta em em mai a." 
Jeremiah41:14 Tichuan Ismaelan Mizpah khua atanga sala a hruai zawng zawng chu an hawi a, an kal ta dua a," 
Jeremiah41:15 Jethania fapa Ismaela erawh chu mi pariat nen Johanan lakah an tlan chuak hram a, Amon mite hnenah an kal ta a." 
Jeremiah41:16 Tin, karea fapa Johanana leh a hnena sipai pawl hotu zawng zawng chuan, Nethania fapa Ismaela laka Johanan a chan chhuah tawh mi la awm chhun zawng zawng, indo mite, hmeichhia te, naupang te, mi tilreh te, Gibeon atanga a hruai lehte chu an hruai ta vek a." 
Jeremiah41:17 Tin, an chhuak a, Kaldaiho avanga Agupta ramah tlan luh tumin Bethlehem khaw bula Geruth Chimham-ah chuan an chawl a.Nethania fapa Ismaela chuan, Ahikama fapa Gedalia, Babulon lalin chu ram awptua a sia chu a thah avangin anni chu an hlau ta em em si a." 
Jeremiah41:18 Nethania fapa Ismaela chuan, Ahikama fapa Gedalia, Babulon lalin chu ram awptua a sia chu a thah avangin anni chu an hlau ta em em si a." 
Jeremiah42:1 Tin, sipai pawl hotute leh Karea fapa Johanana leh Hosaia fapa Jezania leh mipui zawng zawng, a te ber atanga a lian ber thlengin an lo hnai a," 
Jeremiah42:2 zawlnei Jeremia hnenah; I hmaah kan dilna pawm ni se la, hemi la awm chhun zawng zawng tan ngei hian i Pathian hnenah min tawngtaisak turin kan ngen a che; in hmuh ang ngei hian mi tam takte; zing ata tlem te chauh hnutchhiahin kan awm ta si a," 
Jeremiah42:3 LALPA i Pathianin kan kalna tur kawng leh kan tih tur thil min kawhhmuh theihna turin,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah42:4 Tin, zawlnei Jeremia chuan an hnenah, ""In thu chu ka hria e, ngai rawh u, in thu ang zelin LALPA in Pathian hnenah chuan ka dil ang e: tin, heti hi a niang a, LALPA'n a chhanna che u apiang ka hrilh zel ang che u: in lakah engmah ka zep lo vang,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah42:5 Tin, anni chuan Jeremia hnenah, ""LALPA i Pathianin kan hnena a tirhna che thu zawng zawng ang zela kan tih loh chuan kan lakah LALPA chu thu hretu dik leh rinawm ni rawh se." 
Jeremiah42:6 A chhia emaw a tha emaw kan tirhna che LALPA kan Pathian tawngka chhuak chu kan awih ngei ngei ang; LALPA kan Pathian tawngka chhuak kan awih chuan kan tan that theihna tur a ni,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah42:7 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, ni sawm hnuah LALPA thu chu Jeremia hnenah a lo thleng a." 
Jeremiah42:8 Tichuan Karea fapa Johanana leh a hnena sipai pawl hotu awm zawng zawng leh sipai zawng zawng, te ber atanga lian ber thlengin a ko a," 
Jeremiah42:9 an hnenah, ""LALPA in Pathian, a hmaa in dilna thlen tura in mi tirhna khan heti hian a ti e;" 
Jeremiah42:10 He ramah hian in awm reng chuan ka tungding ang che u a, ka thiat lo ang che u, ka phun ang che u a, ka pawt phawi lo ang che u, in chunga thil tha lo ka thlente chu ka sim tawh si a." 
Jeremiah42:11 Babulon lal in hlauh thina chu hlau tawh suh u, amah chu hlau suh u,"" tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni; a kut ata chhandam tur leh chhan chhuak tur che uin in hnenah ka awm si a." 
Jeremiah42:12 Tin, in chungah zah a ngaih theihna'n zahngaihna ka phal ang che u a, in ram ngeiah ka kirtir ang che u." 
Jeremiah42:13 Amaherawhchu, 'He ramah hian kan awm lo ang,' tia LALPA in Pathian aw chu in awih lo a," 
Jeremiah42:14 Hnai lo, Aigupta ramah kan kal zawk ang a, tah chuan indona reng reng kan tawk lo ang a, tawtawrawt ri pawh kan hre lo ang a, chaw tlakchham a awm hek lo vang, tah chuan kan cheng zawk ang,' in tih chuan," 
Jeremiah42:15 Aw Juda awm chhunte u, LALPA thu chu hre rawh u khai; Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Aigupta rama lut tur leh chuta cheng turin in hawi lui a nih chuan," 
Jeremiah42:16 heti hi a lo ni ang a, khandaih, in hlauh ngeia khan Aigupta ramah chuan a nang ang che u a, tam, in hlauh thina pawh khan Aigupta ramah chuan a umzui zel ang che u, tah chuan in thi ang." 
Jeremiah42:17 Aigupta rama cheng tura hawi luite zawng zawng chu chutiang chuan an awm ang a, khandaih te, tam te, hri tein an thi ang, thil tha lo an chunga ka thlen tur lakah chuan tumah an chhuakin an him lo ang." 
Jeremiah42:18 Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Jerusalema chengte chunga ka thinurna ka leih ang bawkin Aigupta ram in luh hunah chuan in chungah ka thinrimna ka leih bawk ang: anchhe dawng leh mak tih huai huai, mi kamchhe tleuhna, sawichhiat in ni ang a, he hmun hi in hmu leh tawh reng reng lo ang." 
Jeremiah42:19 Aw Juda awm chhunte u, LALPA chuan in chungchang a sawi tawh hi, Aigupta ramah chuan lut suh u, vawiinah hian ka hriat chiantir che u tih hre mawlh rawh u." 
Jeremiah42:20 In nunna chan phah turin in inbum a ni mai; LALPA in Pathian hnenah chuan, ""LALPA kan Pathian hnenah chuan min tawngtaisak la, LALPA kan Pathianin a tih apiang chu min hrilh la, kan ti zel ang e,"" tiin mi tir kha a ni a." 
Jeremiah42:21 vawiin niah hian in hnenah ka puang ta a nih hi; mahse in hnena a mi tirhna engah mah LALPA in Pathian awka chu in awih si lo a,Chuvangin tunah zawng hre rawh u, chen in chakna hmun ngeiah chuan khandaih te, tam te, hri tein in thi ngei dawn a ni, tiin,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah42:22 Chuvangin tunah zawng hre rawh u, chen in chakna hmun ngeiah chuan khandaih te, tam te, hri tein in thi ngei dawn a ni, tiin,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah43:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jeremian mipuite zawng zawng hnena LALPA an Pathian thu zawng zawng, LALPA Pathianin sawi tura an hnena a tirhna thu, he'ng thu zawng zawngte ngei hi a sawi tawpah chuan," 
Jeremiah43:2 Hosaia fapa Azaria leh Karea fapa Johanana leh mi intivei zawng zawng chuan Jeremia chu an bia a, a hnenah, ""Dawt i sawi a ni: LALPA kan Pathianin, 'Aigupta rama cheng turin in kal tur a ni lo,' tia sawi turin a tir hlei nem che:" 
Jeremiah43:3 Kaldaite kutah mantira kan awm a min thah theihna tur leh Babulon sala min hruai theihna turin Neria fapa Baruka chuan min bei turin a tir che a nih zawk hi,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah43:4 Chutichuan Karea fapa Johanana leh sipai pawl hotu zawng leh mipui zawng zawng chuan Judai rama cheng turin LALPA tawngka chu an awih ta lo a. 
Jeremiah43:5 Tichuan Karea fapa Johanana leh sipai pawl hotu zawng zawng chuan Juda awm chhun zawng zawng, Judai rama cheng tura hnawhc darha an awmna hnamte zinga ata lo kir," 
Jeremiah43:6 hmeichhia te, mipa te, naupang te, lal fanute leh mi tin, vengtu hotu Nebuzaradanan Saphana fapa, Ahikama fapa Gedalia leh a hnena an hnutchhiahte chu zawlnei Jeremia leh Neria fapa Baruka te pawh, an hruai ta vek zawk a." 
Jeremiah43:7 Tichuan Aigupta ram chu an thleng ta a, LALPA tawngka chu an awih si lo a; tin, Tahpanes khua ngei chu an thleng a." 
Jeremiah43:8 Tin, Tahpanes-ah chuan Jeremia hnenah LALPA thu a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah43:9 Lung lian pui pui la la, Tahpanesa Pharaoa in luhna bula leirawhchan siamnaa hlum chawh diaknaah chuan Judate mithmuh ngeiin phum rawh." 
Jeremiah43:10 Tin, an hnenah chuan, 'Sipahote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, ka rawngbawltu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chu ka chah chhuak ang a, ani chuan a lalthutthleng a hung ang; ani chuan an chungah chuan a lal puan in a zar ang." 
Jeremiah43:11 Tin, a lo kal ang a, Aigupta ram chu a rawn ngahsai ang, thihna pual chu khandaihah." 
Jeremiah43:12 Aigupta mite pathian inahte chuan mei a chhuah ang a, a kang ang a, salah a hruai ang; berampu, puan a inbel angin Aigupta ram chuy a inbel ang; chuta tangin ralmuangin a chhuak ang a,Aigupta rama Beth-Semes lung ban sang pui puite chu a tichim ang a, Aigupta pathian inte chu meiin a hal ang, a ti,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah43:13 Aigupta rama Beth-Semes lung ban sang pui puite chu a tichim ang a, Aigupta pathian inte chu meiin a hal ang, a ti,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah44:1 Aigupta rama Juda awm zawng zawng, Migdol khua te, Tahpanes khua te, Noph khua te leh Pathros rama chengte chungchanga Jeremia hnena thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah44:2 Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Jerusalem leh Juda khawpuite zawng zawng chunga thil tha lo ka rawn thlen zawng zawng chu in hmu tawh a; tin, ngai teh u, tunah hian a lo ram ta mai a ni a, tumah an cheng ta lo;" 
Jeremiah44:3 anni pawhin, nangni pawhin, in thlahtute pawhin pathian dangte an la hriat ngai hleih loh rawng bawl tur leh an hnena rimtui halin, mi tithinur tura, an suahsualna an tih tak avangin." 
Jeremiah44:4 Chuti pawhin in hnenah chuan ka rawngbawltu zawlneite zawng zawng zing tak taka thoin ka tir a, an hnenah, ""Aw, he thil tenawm, ka huatzawng tak hi chu ti rawh suh u,"" tiin." 
Jeremiah44:5 mahse an ngaithla chuang lo a, an suahsualna hawisana pathian dangte hnenah rimtui hal loh tur thu chu an bengkhawn hek lo." 
Jeremiah44:6 Chuvangin ka thinurna leh ka thinrimna chu Juda khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem kawtthlerahte ka leihin a alh ta a, vawiin nia a awm ang hian a ram a, a tiau ta a nih hi." 
Jeremiah44:7 chuvangin tunah zawng LALPA Sipaihote Pathian, Israel Pathian chuan, In zing ata ahmei apa, nausente leh hnute hne laite Juda zing ata tumah zuah loa rawt bo vek turin engati nge he thil tha lo tak hi in nuna chung ngeia in tih ni?" 
Jeremiah44:8 In va chenna Aigupta ram pathiante hnenah rimtui halin khawvel hnam zawng zinga anchhe dawng leh sawichhiat in nih theihna tur leh rawt bo in nih theihna turin in kut kawih ngeiin mi tithinur a ni. 
Jeremiah44:9 In thlahtute suahsualna te, Juda lalho suahsualna te, an mipuite suahsualna te, nangmahni ngei suahsualnate leh in nupuite suahsualna, Judai ram leh Jerusalem kawtthlera an tih takte chu in theihnghilh ta em ni?" 
Jeremiah44:10 vawiin ni thleng pawh hian an la inchhir chuang lo a, in thlahtute leh nangmahni hmaa ka tarlan ka dan leh ka dan siamte chu in zawh lo a, in tih hek lo." 
Jeremiah44:11 Chuvangin Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u,in chhiatna turin Juda zawng zawng rawt bo vek turin ka hmachhawn ang che u." 
Jeremiah44:12 Tin, Juda awm chhun, Aigupta rama chen tuma hawi luite chu ka man ang a, an chimit vek ang; Aiguta ramah chuan an tlu ang a, khandaih leh tamtea tihboralin an awm ang; te ber atanga lian ber thlengin khandaih leh tamin an thi ang, anchhe dawng leh mak tih huai huai leh mi kamchhe tleuhna leh sawichhiat an ni ang." 
Jeremiah44:13 Jerusalem ka hrem ang bawkin Aigupta rama chengte chu khandaih te, tamte leh hripui tein ka hrem dawn si a." 
Jeremiah44:14 Chutichuan Aigupta rama cheng tura kal Juda awm chhunte chu Judai ram, an awm nana kir leh an chak em emna ramah chuan kir turin pakhat mah nungdamin an chhuak lo ang, a ruka tlan chhuakte chauh lo chu tumah an kir lo ang." 
Jeremiah44:15 Tichuan mi zawng zawng, an nupuiten pathian dangte hnena rimtui an hal tih hriate leh hmeichhia chuta dingte mipui tam tak, Aigupta rama cheng mipui zawng zawng chuan, Pathros-ah chuan Jeremia chu an chhang a, heti hain an ti a:" 
Jeremiah44:16 LALPA hminga kan hnena i thu sawite kha zawng kan ngaihthlaksak lo ang che. 
Jeremiah44:17 Keini leh min thlahtute, kan lalte leh kan hotuten Juda khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem kawtthlerahte an lo tih tawh thin ang khan van lalnu hnena rimtui halte leh a hnena in tur thilhlan bun chhuah te, kan tawngka chhuak apiang ang zel khan kan ti ngei ngei ang; chutih lai chuan ka hmuingil a, ei leh bar tur a tam a, chhiatna reng kan hmu hlei nem." 
Jeremiah44:18 Van lalnu hnena thil hal leh a hnena in tur thilhlan bun chhuahte kan ban chinah hian engkim kan tlachham ta zawk a, khandaih leh tam tea tihboralin kan awm ta a ni." 
Jeremiah44:19 Tin, hmeichhiate chuan, ""Van lalnu hnena rimtui kan hal lai leh a hnenea in tur thilhlan kan bun chhuah laite khan kan pasalte remtih lohin em ni a biakna'n chhang kan siam a, a hnenah in tur thilhlante kan bun chhuah kha?"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah44:20 Tichuan Jeremia chuan mipui zawng zawng, ahmei apain amah chhangtu zawng zawng hnen ngeiah chuan," 
Jeremiah44:21 Juda khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem kawtthlerah te, nangni leh in thlahtute, in lalte leh in hotute, leh rama mipuite reng rengin rimtui an hal te chu LALPA'n a hre rengin a rilruah a khung lo em ni?" 
Jeremiah44:22 In thil sual tih avang leh in thil tenawm tihte avangin LALPA'n a tuar peih ta lo a nih kha; chumi avang chuan, in ram chu tuna a aw ang hian ram tiau, mak tih huai huai, anchhe dawng, chengtu awm lo, a lo nih tak hi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Rimtui in hal a, LALPA chungah in sual a, LALPA tawngka chhuakte chu in awih lo a, a dan emaw a dan siamte emaw a thu hriattirte emaw in zawm hek loh avangin he thil tha lo hi tuna a awm ang hian in chungah a lo thleng a nih hi,"" a ti." 
Jeremiah44:24 Chu lo pawh Jeremia chuan mipui zawng leh hmeichhia zawng zawng hnenah, ""Aigupta rama Juda zawng zawngte u, LALPA thu hi hre rawh u; Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah44:25 nangni leh in nupuite chuan, 'Van lalnu hnenah rimtui hal leh in tur thil hlan bun chhuahte chu ka lo tiam tawh ang zelin ka ti ngei ang,' tiin in kain in sawi tawh a, in kutin in puitlkin tawh bawk a. (In thutiamte chu tinghet u la, in thu tumte chu hlen law law rawh u." 
Jeremiah44:26 Chuvangin nangni Juda, Aigupta rama cheng zawng zawngte u, LALPA thu hi ngaithla rawh u: Ngai rawh u: Ngai rawh u, LALPA Pathian a nuna a nun chhung chu tiin Aigupta ram pum puia cheng, Juda mi tu kaah mah ka hming a ri tawh ngai lo ang tiin ka hming ropui chhalin chhia ka chham ani tih hi lalpa thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah44:27 Ngai rawh u, an thatna tur ni loin an chhiatna turin anmahni ka chang reng a ni: tichuan Juda mi, Aigupta rama awm zawng zawng chu khandaih te, tamtea tihralin an awm ang, an boral vek hma loh chuan." 
Jeremiah44:28 Tin, khandaih tihral bang tlem te chu Aigupta ram ata chhuakin Judai ramah an lut ang; tin, Juda mi awm chhun zawng zawng, Aigupta rama cheng tura kal tate chuan tu thu nge ding zawk dawn, ka thu nge an thu an hria ang." 
Jeremiah44:29 Tin, hei in tan chhinchhiahna a ni ang: ka thu hi in chungah thil tha lo lam atan a ding ngei dawn tih in hriat theihna'n he hmunah hian ka hrem dawn che u a ni tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni.LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, Pharaoa Hophra, Aigupta lal chu a hmelma, a nuna zawngtute kutah ka mantir ang, Juda lal Zedekia, a hmelma, a nunna zawngtu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kuta ka pek ang bawk khan,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah44:30 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, Pharaoa Hophra, Aigupta lal chu a hmelma, a nuna zawngtute kutah ka mantir ang, Juda lal Zedekia, a hmelma, a nunna zawngtu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kuta ka pek ang bawk khan,"" a ti a." 
Jeremiah45:1 Juda lal Jehoiakima, Josia fapa kum linaah Jeremia ka ata he'ng thute lehkhabua a ziak laia Neria fapa Baruka lehkhabua a ziak laia Neria fapa Baruka hnena zawlnei Jeremia thu sawi chu:" 
Jeremiah45:2 LALPA Israel Pathian chuan, Aw Baruk, i hnenah heti hian a ti: Nangin, Ka chung a va pik ta em! LALPA chuan ka tuarnaah lungngaihna mi belhchhah ta si a: ka rum hi ka chauhpui a, hahdamna reng ka hmu zo lo, i ti a." 
Jeremiah45:3 A hnenah chuan heti hian i sawi tur a ni: LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh, ka sak tawh chu ka thiat leh ang a, ka phun tawh chu ka pawt chhuak leh ang, ram pum pui mai chu:tin, mahni tan thil ropui i zawng em ni? Zawng lo mai rawh: tisa zawng zawng chungah thil tha lo ka rawn thlen dawn si a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: mahse i nun zawng i kalna apiangah ka zuahsak hram ang che, tiin." 
Jeremiah45:4 tin, mahni tan thil ropui i zawng em ni? Zawng lo mai rawh: tisa zawng zawng chungah thil tha lo ka rawn thlen dawn si a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: mahse i nun zawng i kalna apiangah ka zuahsak hram ang che, tiin." 
Jeremiah46:1 Hnamte chungchanga zawlnei Jeremia hnena LALPA thu lo thleng chu: 
Jeremiah46:2 Aigupta thu: Euphrates lui kama Karkhemis khuaa awm, Juda lal Jehoiakima, Josia fapa kum linaa Nebukadnezzara a nghaisak Aigupta lal Pharaoa-Nekoa sipai rual chungchang thu:" 
Jeremiah46:3 Phaw bial te, phaw sawl te peih u la, ral tawn rawh u," 
Jeremiah46:4 Sakawr thuam u la, sakawr chuang mite u, chuang rawh u, Dar lukhum khumin ding nghet u la, Fei tat hriamin thir kawr ha rawh u." 
Jeremiah46:5 Eng tizia nge! An zam ta, tukkhum an chhawn, An ral tu mite chu an tlawm a, bak lengin an tlanchhia, Hnung lam hawi lo lekin, Kil tinah ral a ti, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah46:6 Mi zuanzanmg an tlan bo thei lo, Ral tu mi an chhuak chuang hek lo, Saw hmar Euphrates lui kamah sawn an pai a, an tlu zo ta." 
Jeremiah46:7 Nile lui anga lo lian hi tu nge ni? Luipui tui fawn vel ang mai hi? 
Jeremiah46:8 Aigupta chu Nile lui angin a lian a, Luipui tui fawn vel ang maiin, Ka lian ang a, lei chung ka dap ang, Khawpuite leh a luahtute ka tichhia ang, a ti a." 
Jeremiah46:9 Aw sakawrte u, tawn zel u la, Aw tawlailirte u, che vak rawh u! Ral tu mite chuan hma tawn se, Ethiopia mi leh Put mi, phaw chawitute, Lub mi thal ngul hmang thiamte nen." 
Jeremiah46:10 Chumi ni chu a ni, Lalpa, Sipaihote LALPA ni chu, Phuba lak ni, a hmelmate chunga phuba a lak theihna chu: Khandaih chuan a ei zo ang a, a hne hlui ang, An thisen chu tlai takin a in ang; Sipaihote LALPA chuan hmar ramah Euphrates lui kamah mi tam tak a talh tui mai a ni." 
Jeremiah46:11 Aw, Aigupta fanu thianghlim, Gilead-ah chho la, thing hnai hnawih mi han la rawh, Damdawi tam tak i hmang thlawn ta, I tan damna reng a awm lo e." 
Jeremiah46:12 Hnamte chuan i mualphona chu an hria a, I tap chu lei pum a khat e, Ral tu mi leh ral tu mi an insu a, Leiah an tlu dun reng mai, tiin." 
Jeremiah46:13 Nebukadnezzara, Babulon lal a lo kal a, Aigupta ram a rawn nghaisak turzia thu LALPA'n zawlnei Jeremia hnena a sawi chu:" 
Jeremiah46:14 Aigupta ramah chuan hril u la, Migdol-ah puang rawh u; Noph-ah leh Tahpanes-ah chuan puang u la; Ding nghetin in ralring rawh u; I vela mi khandaihin a ei zo tawh si a, tiin sawi rawh u." 
Jeremiah46:15 Engatinge i mi chakte hnawlbo an nih? An ding zo lo, LALPA'n a paih thlak avangin." 
Jeremiah46:16 Mi tamtakte chu a petektir a, Ani an insu tlu rem rum a, ""Hnehchhiahna khandaih tlansanin Hawh u i kir ag u, kan pianna ramah Kan mite hnenah chuan,"" an ti a." 
Jeremiah46:17  'Aigupta lal Pharaoa hi thawm chang lian mai,' A hun tak chu a pumpelh a,"" tiin tah chuan an au a." 
Jeremiah46:18 A nuna ka nun chhung hi chuan, Tih hi Lalber, a hming Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni e, Tlangte zinga Tqabor tlang angin Tuipui bula karmel tlang angin a lo kal ngei ang." 
Jeremiah46:19 Aw nang, fanu, Aigupta rama cheng, Saltang turin in siam mai rawh: Noph khua chu a tiau dawn si a, Cheng tur awm loin a kang ral ang." 
Jeremiah46:20 Aigupta chu bawgla nalh tak a ni, Mahse hmar ata ei chhetu tur lo thawkin a lo kal e." 
Jeremiah46:21 An zinga sipai rawih laite chu bawng tuai chawm thau ang mai an ni. Tukhum an chhawn a, an tlanchhia ding loin, An chungah an chhiatna ni a thleng ta a ni, an hremna hun tur chu." 
Jeremiah46:22 Rulpui tleng ang maiin thawm a nei a, A hmelmate chu a rualin an lo kal a, Thing kittute angin hrei nen an rawn bei a." 
Jeremiah46:23 A ram ngawpui fan chhuah zawh loh chu An rawn thiat ang, Khau puang aiin an tam zawk si a, Chhiarsen rual an ni lo." 
Jeremiah46:24 Aigupta fanu chu a mualpho ang, Hmarlam a mi kutah mantirin a awm ang." 
Jeremiah46:25 Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, No khuaa Amona leh Pharaoa; tin, Aigupta leh a pathiante, a lalte, Pharaoa ngei leh amah ringtute chu ka hrem ang." 
Jeremiah46:26 An nunna zawngtute kutah leh Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara leh a rawngbawltute kutah chuan ka mantir ang: chumi hunah chuan luahin a awm ang, hmasang nite ang bawkin, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah46:27 Aw Jakob, ka rawngbawltu, hlau suh la, Aw Israel, zam hek suh, Ngai rawh, hla tak ata ka chhan chhuak dawn si chia, I thlahte pawh an saltanna ram ata chu,Tin, Jakoba chu a lo kir ang a, Muang takin a awm hle hle ang a, Tuma'n an tihlau tawh lo ang.Aw Jakob, ka rawngbawltu, hlau suh, Ka awmpui che hi, tih hi LALPA thu chuak a ni: Ka hnawh darhna che hnam zawng zawng chu ka titawp ang a, Nang erawh chu ka titawp hlen lo ang che: Dik takin ka hrem ang chia, Hrem loh chuan ka chhuah lo vang che." 
Jeremiah46:28 Aw Jakob, ka rawngbawltu, hlau suh, Ka awmpui che hi, tih hi LALPA thu chuak a ni: Ka hnawh darhna che hnam zawng zawng chu ka titawp ang a, Nang erawh chu ka titawp hlen lo ang che: Dik takin ka hrem ang chia, Hrem loh chuan ka chhuah lo vang che." 
Jeremiah47:1 Pharaoan Gaza a suasam hmaa Philistia mite chungchanga zawlnei Jeremia hnena LALPA thu lo thleng chu: 
Jeremiah47:2 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, hmar atangin tui a lo lian e, A kuang khatin a luang liam ang; Ram chu a chim ang a, a chhunga awm zawng zawng nen, Khawpui leh a chhunga chengte pawh chu; Mite an tap ang a, rama mi zawng zawng an chiau vawng vanwg ang." 
Jeremiah47:3 A sakawr chak phei khawng ri-ah, A indo tawlailir ri dur durah, A tawlailir nghawr thawmah te, Pate an zam a, an fate hawi lo lekin." 
Jeremiah47:4 Philistia mi zawng zawng rawkna ni. tura leh Sidon ata tanpuitu awm chhunte sah chhumna ni avangin, LALPA chuan tuipui kam Kaphtora la awm chhun, Philistia mite chu a tichhe dawn si a." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza mite lu a kawng ta, Askelon chu a chimit ta a, A ram phaia la cheng chhunte chu; Eng chen nge i in zai dawn?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Aw LALPA khandaih, i awm hle hle hma eng chen nge? I paiah in khungin chawl la, awm hle hle rawh.LALPA'n tih tur a pek si che chuan, Eng tin, nge i awm hle hle theih ang? Askelon leh tuipui kam chunga che tur in, A ruat miau si che chuan." 
Jeremiah47:7 LALPA'n tih tur a pek si che chuan, Eng tin, nge i awm hle hle theih ang? Askelon leh tuipui kam chunga che tur in, A ruat miau si che chuan." 
Jeremiah48:1 Moab chungchang thu: Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Nebo chung a pik e! tihtiauin a awm ta! Kiriathaim chu tihmualphoin a awm ta, lak sawn a ni a. Misgab chu tihmualpho leh tihchhiatin a awm ta." 
Jeremiah48:2 Moab hmingthanna a bo ta. Hesbonah a chhiatna tur relin Hawh u, hnam a nihna ata i tibo ang u,"" an ti a. Aw Mademen khua, nang pawh tihreh der i ni ang a, Khandaihin a um dawn a che." 
Jeremiah48:3 Horonaim atanga au thawm, Rawkral leh tihchhiatna nasa tak mai chu." 
Jeremiah48:4 Moab a boral e, A fanaute tap thawm hriatin a leng e." 
Jeremiah48:5 Luhith chhovah tapin an chho a, Horonaim chhukah boralna au thawm manganthlak an hria." 
Jeremiah48:6 Tlan bo u la, in nun humhim rawh u, Thlaler ram sabengtung angin awm rawh u." 
Jeremiah48:7 I kutkawih leh i sum leh pai i rin vangin Nang pawh manin i awm dawn a ni; Khemos chu sala hruai a ni ang a, A puithiamte leh a hotute nen." 
Jeremiah48:8 Khaw tinah tichhetu a lo thleng ang, Khaw pakhat mahin a pumpelh lo ang; Phai ram pawh chu a boral ang, Phaizawl pawh tihchhiat a ni ang, LALPA'n a sawi tawh ang ngei khan." 
Jeremiah48:9 A thlawh bo theihna'n Moab chu thla pe u la, A khuate chu a ram ang a, chengtu awm loin." 
Jeremiah48:10 Thlahdah taka LALPA hna thawktu chu anchhe dawngin awm se la, Thisen chhuah tura a khandaih hmang duh lotu chu anchhe dawngin awm rawh se." 
Jeremiah48:11 A tleirawl ata Moab chu a nuamsa a, Nga ngul khawpui a tling reng a, Bel danga ruah tuah pawh a tawk lo a, Sala hruaiin a awm ngai hek lo, A tui ngaia tui rengin, a rim pawh a dang chuang lo e." 
Jeremiah48:12 Chuvang chuan ngai rawh u, ""Ni chu a lo thleng e, a bun chhuaktu tur chu ka rawn tir ang a, tin, annin an bun chhuak ang,"" tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: a belte chu a tiruak ang a, a burte chu a tisawm ang a, Israel chhungten an rinpui ber Bethel an zahpui8 angin Moab chuan Khemos a zahpui tawh ang." 
Jeremiah48:13 Pasaltha leh ral tu mi husaisen kan ni e, Eng tiziaa ti in ni nge?" 
Jeremiah48:14 Moab chu tihramin a awm a, A khawpui chu mei khu-an a chang zo ta, A val rual tha zawng an tlu hlum zo,Tih hi Lalber, a hming Sipahaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni e." 
Jeremiah48:15 Moab chhiatna chu a lo thleng mek a,A tuarna tur a tuah tep a ni." 
Jeremiah48:16 Nangni a vela mi zawngten amah sunin A hming hria zawng anwg pawhin Tiang khauh leh tiang ropui a tliah tak le, ti rawh u." 
Jeremiah48:17 Aw nang fanu, Dibona cheng, i ropuina chhuksan la, Tuihalin thu rawh: Moab rawktu chuan a bei chia, I kulhte chu a tichhe ta si a." 
Jeremiah48:18 Aw Aroer-a chengnu, kawng bulah ding la,m en thlithlai rawh,Tlanchhepa leh relhrunu zawt la, Eng nge ni ta le?"" tiin." 
Jeremiah48:19 Moab tihmualpho a ni ta, a lo sawprawp ta si, Chiau vak vakin tap rawh u, Moab tihram a ni ta, Tih Arnonah puang rawh u." 
Jeremiah48:20 Ram zawl chungah rorelna a lo thleng ta, Holon-ah te, Jahzah-ah te, Mephaath-ah te," 
Jeremiah48:21 leh Dibon-ah te, Nebo-ah te, Beth-diblathaim-ah te," 
Jeremiah48:22 leh Kiriathaim-ah te, Beth-gamul-ah te, Beth-Meon-ah te," 
Jeremiah48:23 leh Kerioth-ah te, Bozrah-ah te, Moab rama khua zawng zawng, a hle leh a hnaiah te pawh." 
Jeremiah48:24 Moab ki chu rawt chhum a ni a, a ban chu tihtliah a ni ta, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:25 Amah chu tirui rawh u, LALPA chungah a intilian si a; tin, Moab chu ama luakah a tal ang a, nuihzaburin a awm bawk ang." 
Jeremiah48:26 Israel chu i tan nuihzabur a ni tawh lawm ni kha? Rukhmang zingahte a tel em ni? Ama chungchang i sawi apiangin i lu i thing si a. 
Jeremiah48:27 Moab-a chengte u, Khawpui tlansan u la, kham karah cheng rawh u, Thuro, puk panga bu khuar thin angin rawm r'u." 
Jeremiah48:28 Moab chapona chu kan lo hre ta, a chapo nangei mai, A indahsanzia te, a chapozia te, a chaltlaizia te leh A thinlung induhzia te chu." 
Jeremiah48:29 A thinurna chu engmah a ni lo tih ka hria; A unanthuannate chuan engmah a thawk kaw lo, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:30 Tichuan Moab chungah ka chiau vak vak ang a, A ni, Moab pum pui chu ka tahsak ang, Kirheres mite sun an ni ang." 
Jeremiah48:31 Jazer tah aia nasain ka tah ang che, I nipui thei leh grep rahte tichhetuin a bawm e," 
Jeremiah48:32 Hlimna leh lawmna a bo zo ve, Thei hmun leh Moab ram ata: uain sawr khura ka uain ka tikin ta a, Tuma'n hlima auin an chil tawh lo ang, Au thawm chu hlim thawm a ni tawh lo ang," 
Jeremiah48:33 Hesbon leh Elealeh-ah an au a, Jahaz thleng thlengin aw an chhuah a, Zaor atanga Horonaim thleng, Elath-selis thleng pawhin. Nimrim tuikhurte a thing thup ang." 
Jeremiah48:34 Chulovah pawh Moab bawlhmun thil hlantu leh a pathiante tana rimtui haltu chu ka tibo ang, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah48:35 Tichuan phenglawng angin ka thinlung Moab tan a ri a, Kirheres mite tan thil tum rik angin ka thinlung a ri a; chuvangin hnianghnara thil a dawn tawhte kha a riral zo ta a." 
Jeremiah48:36 Lu tinreng ziah kawn a ni a, khabe hmun tinreng meh a ni; kut zawngt zawng zai a ni a, kawngahte saiip puan a awm hlawm a." 
Jeremiah48:37 Moab in chung zawng zawngah te, kawtthlerah te, hmun tinah tahna a awm a; Moab chu bel tangkai tawh lo angin a ka tikeh zo ta a ni, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:38 A va chhe tawh em! An chiau nasatzia chu! Moab chu mualphoin a lehhawi tak chu! Tichuan Moab chu a vela mite zawng zawng tan uihzabur leh rapthlak a lo ni ta. 
Jeremiah48:39 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, mu angin a thlawk dawn, Moab chungah a thla a zar ang." 
Jeremiah48:40 Kerioth chu lak a ni a, a kulhte chu an thawng thut a, Chumi niah Moab pasalthate thinlung chu Hmeichhe nau vei thinlung ang mai a ni ang." 
Jeremiah48:41 Moab a boral ang, hnam a tling tawh lo ang; LALPA a chungtlak zawk avangin." 
Jeremiah48:42 Hlauhna, khuarkhurum leh thang te, Aw Moab luahtu, i chungah a thleng e, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:43 Hlauhna tlansantu chu khuarkhurum-ah a tla ang, Khuarkhuruma chhuak chu thangah a awk ang, A hremna kum ka rawn thlen dawn si, A chungah, Moab chung ngeiah chuan, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:44 Hesbon hlimah tlanchheho chau derin an ding ang, Hesbon atangin mei a chhuak a, Sihon zing atangin meialh, Moab bek sam a kang zo a, Sa mur murho chhip samte nen." 
Jeremiah48:45 I chung a pik e, aw Moab! Khemos mite an ral ta; I fapate sala hruain, i fanute salah an tang ta.Mahse ni hnuhnungahte chuan Moab awm dan chu ka lamlet ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Heti chen hi Moab chung thu a ni e." 
Jeremiah48:46 Mahse ni hnuhnungahte chuan Moab awm dan chu ka lamlet ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Heti chen hi Moab chung thu a ni e." 
Jeremiah49:1 Amon fate thu, LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Israelan fate a nei lo em ni? Rokhawmtu a nei na nge? Engati nge Gad chu Milkoman a luah tak a, A mite a khawpuiahte an chen tak?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Chuvangin, ngai rawh u, nite a lo thleng e, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Indo thawm ri ka hriattir ang, Amon fate, Rabbah khuaah, Thil ram awm khawm mai a lo ni ang a, A fanute chu meiin a kang a, Tichuan Israel chuan amah neitu chu a nei thung ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Jeremiah49:3 Aw Hesbon, chiau vak vak la, Ai chu an rawk zo tawh si; Rabbah fate u, tap rawh u, Tap u la, hungna chhungahte tlan vel rawh u. Milkoma chu sala hruaiin a awm dawn si, A puithiam leh a mi liante nen." 
Jeremiah49:4 Engah nge i ruam thaate i chhuan, aw rinawmlonu! A neih tha thate ringa, 'Tunge mi bei ang,' ti thintu?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ngai rawh, hlauhna i chungah ka rawn thlen dawn, I vela mi zawng zawng la ata, Tih hi Lalpa, Sipai hote PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni. Mi tin, hnawh chhuah in ni vek ang, Tuma'n tlanchheho chu an khawm lo ang." 
Jeremiah49:6 Chumi hnuah erawh chuan Amon fate awm dan ka lamlettir ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:7 Remhre remhriatna a bo zo ta em ni? An finna a bo zo em ni? 
Jeremiah49:8 Aw Dedana chengte u, tlanchhia u la, lehhawi u la, Pil bo daih rawh u; Esauva chhiatna a chungah ka rawn thlen dawn e, Amah ka hrem hunah chuan." 
Jeremiah49:9 Grep lotute chu i hnenah an lo kalin, hmaih an nei dawn lo'm ni? Zana rukrute chuan an duh tawk ngah hma chu An rawk zel dawn lo em ni?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Esauva chu ka tisaruak ta a, A khuh ruk thinte chu ka hawng ta, A biru thei tawh lo ang. A thlahte tihchhiat an ni a, A unaute, a thenawmte nen, A ral thum ta." 
Jeremiah49:11 I nau, pa nei lohote chu ngaihsak suh,Keiin ka hum ang, I hmeithaiten mi ring rawh se." 
Jeremiah49:12 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: No in lo turte pawhin an in tlat chuan, nang hrem loh tawpin i chhuak dawn em ni? Hrem lohin i chhuak lo ang, i in mawlh ang." 
Jeremiah49:13 LALPA chuan mahni inchhalin chhia ka chham ta si a, Bozra chu mak tih huai huai, sawi chhiat, tihram, anchhe dawng a ni ang a, akhua zawng zawng pawh a ram hlen ang." 
Jeremiah49:14 LALPA hnen ata thupuan ka lo hre ta, Hnamte hnenah tirhkoh tirh a ni. Inpun khawm u la, amah bei u la, Indo puahchah rawh u." 
Jeremiah49:15 Ngai rawh, hnamte zingah ka tite ta si chia, Mihringe hmuhsitin." 
Jeremiah49:16 I intihrapthlakna kha i thinlung chapo bumna che a ni, Aw nang kham lung kara, tlang chhipa cheng thin, Mu angin, sang takah i bu chhep mah la, Chumi atnag chuan ka la thla tho ang che,Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:17 Tin, Edom chu mak tih huai huai a lo ni ang a, mi veivak apiangin mak an ti ang a, a chhiat nasat vang chuan an chek khum ang." 
Jeremiah49:18 Sodom leh Gomora leh a vela khawpuit4e tihchhiata a awm ang bawkin, tumah an cheng tawh lo ang a, mihring fa tumah chutah chuan an awm ngai tawh lo ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Jeremiah49:19 Ngai rawh u, Jordan ram ngaw atanga sakeibaknei, ran thlahna hmunah a lo chho vang a; a lak atnaign anmahni ka tlan botir nghal ang a, a chunga thu nei turin ka duh apiang ka ruat ang. Keimah ang hi tu nge awm ni? Tuin nge hunbi min thliahsak ang? Berampu tu nge ka hmaa ding tur chu?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Chuvang chuan Edom chunga LALPA thurawn leh Teman mite chunga a thil ruat, tih a tum takte chu ngaithla rawh u: ran rual notete ngei chu hnuh boin an awm ang a; an chenna chu a titiau ang." 
Jeremiah49:21 An tluk chhiatna thawmah chuan lei hi a khur a; an tap thawm chu Tuipui Senah pawh hriat a ni ang. 
Jeremiah49:22 Ngai rawh u, mupui angin a lo thlawk chho ang a, Bozrah chungah chuan a thla a zar ang; chumi ni chuan Edom mi huaisente thinlung pawh chu hmeichhe nau vei thinlung ang mai a ni ang."
