Jeremiah49:23 Damaska thu: Hamath chu a zak ta, Arpad nen, Thu tha lo an hre ta si a, an riral ta; Tuipui fawn awm hle hle thei lo angin an buai a. Damaksa a rawih zo ta, Taln chhiat a tum a, khurhin a nang ta. Lungngaihna leh nain a vuan ta, hmeichhe nau vei ang maiin." 
Jeremiah49:24 Khawpui himgthang leh hlimawm chu a va thing ta em! 
Jeremiah49:25 Tichuan chumi niah chuan a tlangval rualte chu kawtlaiah an tlu ang a, A raltu mi zawng zawng an boral ang, Tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:26 Tin, Damaska kulh bangah mei ka chhuah ang a, Benhadada lal inte chu a kang zo ang." 
Jeremiah49:27 Kedar leh Hazor ramte Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran a suasam thu: LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Tho u la, Kedar bei u la, khaw chhak fate chu sawisa rawh u." 
Jeremiah49:28 An puan inte, an ran rualte an laksak ang, An puanzar te, an bungbel zawng zawng te, An sanghawngseite chu an kal bopui ang, Kil tinah hlauhawm a awm, Tiin miten an au khum ang." 
Jeremiah49:29 Tlan chhia u la, vak bo daih rawhu u, Pil bo daih rawh u, aw Hazora chengte u, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chuan A phair che u, i chungah tih tum a nei ta e." 
Jeremiah49:30 Tho u la, thlamuang taka awm, Mahnia khawsa, kulh kawngkhar pawh nei lo, Kalhna thir tlawn pawh nei lo hnam chu bei rawh u, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:31 An sanghawngseite chu ralin an la ang a, An sebawng rual nawlpui chu an kawi ang Baksam ziar kawng hote chu kil tinah ka tidarh ang, An chhiatna tur chu kil tin, atangin ka rawn thlen ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:32 Tin, Hazor chu sihal chen hmun a ni ang a, A ram kumkhua ang; Tah chuan tumah an cheng tawh lo ang a, Mihring fate reng reng an khawsa tawh lo ang." 
Jeremiah49:33 uda lal Zedekia lal tantirha Elam chungchanga LALPA thu, zawlnei Jeremia hnena lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah49:34 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, Elam thal ngul, an chakna bul ber chu, Ka titliak ang;" 
Jeremiah49:35 Kawlkil li ata thli paliate ka rawn thlen ang, Elam chungah chuan; Ka tidarh ang, kawlkil tinah chuan, Elam hnawhchhuah mite thlen lohna hnam reng an awm lo ang." 
Jeremiah49:36 An hmelma, an nun zawngtute hmaah chuan, Elamho chu ka tizam lo ang, An chungah chhiatna ka rawn thlen ang, Ka thinur nasa tak mai chu, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Anmahni khandaih ka umtir ang, ka tihral vek hma loh chu" 
Jeremiah49:37 An lalte leh an hotute tiralin Elamah chuan ka lalthutthleng ka hung ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni.Mahse ni hnuhnungahte chuan heti hi a ni ang, Elam awm dan ka lamlettir ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak ani e." 
Jeremiah49:38 Mahse ni hnuhnungahte chuan heti hi a ni ang, Elam awm dan ka lamlettir ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak ani e." 
Jeremiah50:1 Babulon chungchang, Kaldai mite ram chungchanga, zawlnei Jeremia kaa LALPA thu sawi chu:" 
Jeremiah50:2 Hnam tin, zingah chuan hril u la, puang rawh u, Puanzar khai u la, puang u la, thup suh u, Babulon lak a ni ta, Bel chu a mualpho ta, Merodak chu a zam zo ta, a limte ch a mualpho a, A milim chu a chhe zo ta." 
Jeremiah50:3 hmar atangin ani chu hnam pakhatin a rawn bei a, chu chuan a ram chu a ti tiau ang a, tah chuan tumah an cheng tawh lo ang; an tlan chhia a, an bo zo ta, mi leh sate pawh." 
Jeremiah50:4 Chung iahte leh chumi hunah chuan Israel fate chu an lo kal ang a, anmahni leh Juda fate nen; fap chungin an lo kal ang a, LALPA an Pathian chu an zawng ang; tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:5 Zion lam hawiin an penna tur an zawt ang a, ""Hawh u, chatuan thuthlung theihnghilh tawh loh turah chuan LALPA chu rawn vuan rawh u khai,"" an ti ang." 
Jeremiah50:6 Ka mite chu beram bo an ni a; an vengtue chuan an hruai bo a, tlangahte chuan an kal botir a, tlangahte, mualdungahte an kal a, an huang an theihnghilh zo ta." 
Jeremiah50:7 A hmu apiangin an zi zel ta a, an hmelmate chuan, Kan thiam loh a ni lo, LALPA dikna khurpui, an thlahtute nghahfak LALPA meuh chungah thil an tihsual avang a ni, an ti a." 
Jeremiah50:8 Babulon chhung ata tlan chhuak u la, Kaldaite ram ata kal chhuak u la, kel rual zinga kelchalte angin awm rawh u." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ngai reh u, Babulon rawn bei turin hmar ram ata hnam rual ropui tak pung khawm chu ka chawk tho ang a, amah do turin an insingsa ang: chuta tangin lak an ni ang: an thlate chu ral tuk thiam tak hlawhchham ngai lo ang an ni ang." 
Jeremiah50:10 Tin, Kaldai chu rawk a ni ang a, a rawktute chu an tlai em em ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:11 Lawm mah u la, hlim mah u la, Aw ka rochan rawktute u. Hnim no zinga bawngla tla ngelh ngelh ang leh Sakawrpa hram ngher ngher ang ni mah u la," 
Jeremiah50:12 In nu chu a la zak em em ang a, A hringtu che u chu a la mualpho ang. Ngai rawh u, hnamte zinga hnuaihnung ber, Thlaler ram, ram ro, rma ruak a ni ang." 
Jeremiah50:13 LALPA thinurna avangin luahin a awm lo ang, A tiau vek zawk ang; Babulona kal apiang chu a rap ang a, A chiatna zawng zawng vang chuan an chek ang." 
Jeremiah50:14 Thal ngul kengtu zawng zawngte u, Babulon hual velin intlar u la, Kap u la, thlate chu ren suh u, LALPA chungah an sual ta si a." 
Jeremiah50:15 A velin hawhaw u la Amahin a inpe ta, A kulhte chu a tlu ta a, A bangte chu a chim ta, LALPA phuba lakna a ni si a; A chungah phuba la u la, A tih ang zelin a chungah ti rawh u." 
Jeremiah50:16 Babulon ata chi thehtu rawt bo u la, Buh seng laia favah chawitu nen, Hnehchhiahna khandaih hlauin Mahni mite lam an pan theuh vang a, Mahni ram theuhvah an tlan ang." 
Jeremiah50:17 Israel chu beram darhsah a ni a; sakeibakneiten an um bo a; Assuria lal chuan amah a ei zet a, a tawpah Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chuan a ruhte a thial sawm ta a." 
Jeremiah50:18 Chuvangin Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, Assuria lal ka hrem ang bawkin Babulon lal leh a ram chu ka hrem ang." 
Jeremiah50:19 Tin, Israel chu a tlatnaah ka hruai leh ang a, Karmel leh Basanah chuan a tla ang a, Ephraim tlangah leh Gilead-ah chuan amah chu a tlai ang." 
Jeremiah50:20 Chung niahte leh chutih hunah chuan Israel khawlohnate chu an zawng ang a, hmuh tur a awm lo ang; Juda thiltih sualte pawh hmuh tur a awm hek lo ang; awm chhun atan ka zuahte chu ka ngaidam dawn si a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:21 Merathamim ram bei rawh u, A ram leh Pekod luahtute ngei chu: That u la, an kuangbang chenin rawt bo vek u la, Thu ka pek che ang zelin ti ang che u, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:22 Khawvel pum pui tuboh chu a phelin A va keh sawm nasa em! Hnamte zingah Babulon chu a va ram nasa ta em! 
Jeremiah50:23 Aw Babulon, i tan thang ka kam e, Hre loin i awk ta a nih hi; Hmuh chhuah leh manin i awm ta, LALPA i bei avangin." 
Jeremiah50:24 LALPA chuan a ralthuam bawm a hawng ta, A thinurna hriamhreite chu a la chhuak ta, LALPA, Sipaihote LALPA chuan Kaldaite ramah tih tur a nei." 
Jeremiah50:25 Ramri tawpkhawk atangin rawn bei u la, A thil dah khawmna inte chu hawng vek u la, Theh khawm u la, tichhe vek rawh u, A engmah reng zuah loin." 
Jeremiah50:26 A bawngpa tuaite chu tihlum vek u la, Talhin awm vek rawh se. An chung ava pik em! An ni a lo thleng ta si, Anmahni hremna ni ngei chu." 
Jeremiah50:27 LALPA kan Pathian phuba lak, a biak in phuba lakna ngei chu Zioan hril tura Babulon atanga tlan chhuak leh tlan bote thawm chu!" 
Jeremiah50:28 Babulon bei turin thal kah thiam, thlan ngul hmangtu zawng anwg chu ko khawm rawh u; a velin buk khuar u la, tumah chhuak suh se. A thiltih ang zelin thungrul rawh u, a tih tak ang zawng anwg chu a chungah ti rawh a: LALPA, Israel Mi thianghlima chu a cho ngam si a." 
Jeremiah50:29 Chuvangin a tlangvalte chu a khawlaiahte an tlu ang a, ral tu mi zawng zawng chu chumi niah chuan an boral ang tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ngai rawh, nang mi chapo, ka do che a ni, LALPA Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti. I ni a lo thleng ta, i hremna tur ni chu." 
Jeremiah50:31 Tin, mi chapo chu apetekin a tlu ang a, Tuma'n an kai tho lo ang, Tin, a khawpuiahte chuan mei ka chhuah ang a, A vela awm zawng zawngte chu a kang fai vek ang." 
Jeremiah50:32 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Israel fate leh Juda fate chu hnehchhiahin an awm za ta a; sala hruaitute zawng zawng chuan an vuan tlat a, an chhuah duh hauh lo." 
Jeremiah50:33 An tlantu erawh chu a chak a ni; a hming chu Sipaihote LALPA a ni. Ani chu an lamah a tang ang a, Babulona chengte chu tibuaiin, khawvelah muanna a thlen theihna'n." 
Jeremiah50:34 Kaldai mite chungah khandaih a leng e, Babulona chengte, a hotute leh a mi fingte chungah pawh, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:35 Mi dawhtheite chungah khandaih, Mi a an lo chang ang! A ral tu mi chungah khandaih, An zam lo ang." 
Jeremiah50:36 An sakawrte leh tawlailirte chungah khandaih, A chunga mi inpawlhsawp zawng zawng chungah pawh, hmeichhia ang mai an lo ni ang: A ro thil chungah khandaih, Rawkin an awm mai ang." 
Jeremiah50:37 A tuite kangin a ro zo a, Milimte ram a ni si a, Milimte chu an atchilh a." 
Jeremiah50:38 Chuvangin thlaler ram sakawlh te, chinghnia te nen chutah chuan an cheng ang a, vanghawngseite pawh chutah chuan an cheng ang; luahin a awm ngai tawh lo ang; chhuan zawng zawng thleng pawhin luahin a awm lo ang." 
Jeremiah50:39 Pathian in Sodom leh Gomora leh a khaw thenawmte a tihchiat ang hrim kha; tah chuan tumah an cheng tawh lo ang a, mihring fa tumahin an tlawh tawh lo ang, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah50:40 Ngai rawh u, hmar lam ram ata mite an lo kal e. Lei hmun tawp ata hna ropui tak leh lal tam tak an lo thawk e." 
Jeremiah50:41 Thal ngul leh fei an keng a, Nunrawng tak, zahngaihna reng reng nei lo an ni. An thawm chu tuipui ri hum hum ang a ni a, Sakawr chungahte an chuang a, Mi tin, ral tu mi anga intuamin, Aw, Babulon fanu, an rawn bei dawn che." 
Jeremiah50:42 An thawm hriain Babulon lal kut a sawi ta, Hmeichhe nau vei lai natna ang, Natna nasa takin a vuan ta." 
Jeremiah50:43 Ngai rawh u, Jordan ram ngaw atanga saikeibaknei, ran thlahna hmuna a lo chho angin a lo chho ang a; a lak attangin anmahni ka tlan botir nghal ang a; a chunga thu nei turin ka duh apiang ka ruat ang. Keimah ang hi tu nge awm ni? Tuin nge hubi mi thliahsak ang? berampu tu nge ka hmaa ding tur?" 
Jeremiah50:44 Chuvangin Babulon chungah LALPA thu rawn, Kaldai mite chunga a thil ruat chu ngaithla rawh u. Ran rual note ngei chu hnuh boin an awm ang a, ran thlahna hmuna mite a rap ang.Babulon lak thawmah lei a nghing a, a tap thawm chu hnamte zingah hriat a ni ang." 
Jeremiah50:45 Babulon lak thawmah lei a nghing a, a tap thawm chu hnamte zingah hriat a ni ang." 
Jeremiah51:1 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh, Babulon chungah leh Kaldai mite chungah, Tichhetu thlipui ka tir dawn e;" 
Jeremiah51:2 Sisep zaptute ka tir dawn, Babulon chungah, Amah zapin a ram an zap fai ang, Chhiatna niah chuan hualin an bei dawn si." 
Jeremiah51:3 Thal ngul hmangtuin thalk ngul kuai loin, Thir kawr hain din pawh ding suh se, A tlangval rual pakhat pawh zuah loin, A sipai zawng zawng nuai bo rawh u." 
Jeremiah51:4 Kaldai ramah thahin an tlu ang a, A khawlaiahte chuan chhun tlang an ni ang." 
Jeremiah51:5 Israel leh Juda chu an Pathian Sipaihote LALPA chuan A hnuchhawn si lo a, An ram chu Israel Mi Thianghlim chungah Sualin a khat na a." 
Jeremiah51:6 Tlan bo u la, Babulon khaw chhung ata, Mi tinin mahni nun chhanhim rawh se; A khawlohna boral phah suh u, LALPA phuba lak hun chu a ni si a. Ani chuan a thungrul ngei dawn a ni." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babulon chu LALPA kuta rangkachak no, Lei pum tihruihna chu a ni a, Hnamten a uain chu an in a, Chuvangin hnamte lung a mawl zo ta." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babulon chu a tlu thut a, a boral ta. Amah chu tah vak vak rawh u, Tihdam theih awm anih chuan Thinghnai damdawi hnawih mi laksak rawh u." 
Jeremiah51:9 Babulon chu tihdam ka tum a, A dam chuang si lo, Amah kalsanin mahni ram theuhvah i kal ang u, A thiam lohnain van a tawng a, Van dum thlenga chawi kan a ni." 
Jeremiah51:10 LALPA chuan ka dikna a puang ta; Hawh u, Zionah i puang ang u, LALPA kan Pathian thiltih chu." 
Jeremiah51:11 Thalte chu hriam u la, phawte chelh rawh u, Media lalte rilru chu LALPA'n a chawk tho ta, A thil tum chu Babulon tihchhiat thu a ni si. Chu chu LALPA phuba lakna a ni si a, A biak in phuba ngei chu." 
Jeremiah51:12 Babulon kulh bulah indo puanzar tar rawh u, Venna tichakin, ralvengtu dah rawh u, Lambunnate siam u la, Babulon mite chungchang thua LALPA'n a sawi kha, a relin a tizo ta si." 
Jeremiah51:13 Aw, nang tui tam hmuna cheng mi, Sum leh pai ngah em emtu, I tawpna chu a thleng ta, I nunna hrui a chat ta e." 
Jeremiah51:14 Sipaihote LALPA chuan mahni inchhalin chhia a chham ta. Khau ang maiin mihringin ka tikhat ngei ngei ang che. Nasa takin an hawhaw khum ang che. 
Jeremiah51:15 A thiltihtheihnain lei a siam a, A finnain khawvel a din a, A remhriatnain van a tiparh a." 
Jeremiah51:16 A aw a chhuah chuan, Vana tui a ri hum hum a. Kawlkil ata chhum a chhohtir a, Ruyah surna'n kawl a phettir a, A robawm ata thlir a tlehtir a." 
Jeremiah51:17 Mi tin, an mawl, hriatna loin, Rangkachak chhertute an milem chherin a tizak a, A milim chhun chu dawt mai a ni si, Anmahniah thaw pawh a awm lo." 
Jeremiah51:18 Engmah lo mai an ni, bumna hna mai, Hrem an nih hunah." 
Jeremiah51:19 Jakoba chanvo zawng hetiang a ni lo, Thil zawng zawng bul a ni si; Israel hi a roluah hnam a ni a, A hming chu Sipaihote LALPA a ni." 
Jeremiah51:20 Nang chu ka raldo hreipui leh hriamhrei i ni thin a, Nangmah hmangin hnamte chu ka tisawm a, Nangmah hmangin lalna ramte chu ka tibo a." 
Jeremiah51:21 Nangmah hmangin sakawr leh a chung chuang ka tisawm a, Nangmah hmangin tawlailir leh a chunga chuang ka tisawm a;" 
Jeremiah51:22 Nangmah hmangin hmeichhia leh pa ka tisawm a, Nangmah hmangin putar leh tleirawl ka tisawm a, nangmah hmangin nula leh tlangval ka tisawm a;" 
Jeremiah51:23 Nangmah hmangin berampu leh beram rual ka tisawm a, Nangmah hmangin lo neitu leh bawngpa tuak ka tisawm a, Nangmah hmangin ram awptute leh puitute ka tisawm thin a nih kha." 
Jeremiah51:24 Nangma mithmuh ngeiah Zion chunga an thil thalo tih zawng zawng chu Babulon leh Kaldai mite chungah ka thungrul ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:25 Ngai rawh, lei pum pui tichhetu, Aw, tichetu tlang lian, ka do che a i, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: I chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, Kham sang ata ka lum thla ang che, Tlang kang rem tawhah ka siam ang che." 
Jeremiah51:26 I hnen ata kil lung tur leh lungphum tur Lak chhuah a ni tawh lo ang; Kumkhuain i tiau zawk ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni:" 
Jeremiah51:27 Chumi ramah indo puanzar tar u la, Hnamte zingah tawtawrawt ham rawh u, Amah do tur hnamte buatsaih u la, Ararat te, Minni te, Askenaz ram te, Amah bei turin ko khawm raw h u;Amah bei turin sipai ruat u la Khautuai ang maiin sakawrte pun khawm rawh u." 
Jeremiah51:28 Amah do tur hnamte buatsaih r'u, Media lal te awptu te, leh a puitu te, A thuneihna ram zawng zawng nen." 
Jeremiah51:29 Chu ram chu na tuarin a khur a, Babulon ram, chengtu awm loa ti tiau turin, Babulon chunga LALPA thil tum chu a ding reng a ni." 
Jeremiah51:30 Babulon ral tu ite chu an ralbang ta, An kulhpuiah an tawm reng e, An pachanna a dai a, hmeichhia ang mai an lo ni ta, An chenna hmunte a kang zo a, A daidanna thir tlawn a tliak." 
Jeremiah51:31 Zualko tlan chuan mi dang pawh a tawk a, Mi tirh chuan mi dang a tawk bawk a, Babulon lal hnenah a khawpui chu Kil tinan an man ta tih hrilh turin." 
Jeremiah51:32 Lui kainate chu an man a, Phairuangte an hal fai a,Indo mite pawh an zam zo ta." 
Jeremiah51:33 Sipaihote LALPA, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Babulon fanu chu hruihzawl rah bel lai ang a ni a, Rei lo teah buh chil hun a chungah a lo thleng ang." 
Jeremiah51:34 Mi ei zo ta, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran, Mi thial sawm a, bel ruak maiah mi siam ta, Rulpui angin mi dawlh ta, Ka sa tui tuiin a pum a tikhat a, Mi paih chhuak leh ta a." 
Jeremiah51:35 Kei leh ka tisa chunga pawngnek thiltih hi, Babulon chungah awm rawh se, Ziona chengten an ti ang; Ka thisen chu Kaldai mite chungah awm rawh se," 
Jeremiah51:36 Chuvangin LALPA'n heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh, i lamah ka tang ang a, I phuba ka laksak ang che, A tuipui ka tikang ang a, A tuikhur pawh ka tirochar ang." 
Jeremiah51:37 Tin, Babulon chu chhe vawm khawm mai, Sihal chenna hmun, mak tih huai huai leh chek khum, Chengtu awm lo hmun a lo ni ang." 
Jeremiah51:38 Sakeibaknei vanglai angin an huk dum dum ang a, Sakeibaknei no angin an hram tuar tuar ang." 
Jeremiah51:39 An ruih lungpuam hunin ruai ka thehsak ang a, Ka tirui ang, nikhaw hre lo derin. Thang harh lo tawp tura an mut hlen theihna'n, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni:" 
Jeremiah51:40 Ka hruai thla ang, beram no talh tur angin, berampate, kelpate ang maiin." 
Jeremiah51:41 Sesak chu lak a nih tak chu! Lei pum pui chawimawi thin chu manin a awm tak hi, Hnamte zinga Babulon a tiau tak chu! Babulon chu tuipuiin a chim ta, A fawn nasa tak chuan a khuh zo a," 
Jeremiah51:42 A khawpuite chu a tiau zo a, Ram ro, thlaler, mihring reng chen lohna Mihring fa tuma tlawh loh ram a lo chang ta." 
Jeremiah51:43 Babulona Bel chu ka hrem ang, A lem tawh hnu chu ka ata a ka phawrh chhuak ang, Hnamte chu a hnenah an inhawr khawm tawh lo ang, A ni, Babulon kulhpui chu a chim ang." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ka mite u, a chhung ata lo chhuak u la, LALPA thinur hlauhawm tak ata, Mi tin, mahni inchhanhim rawh u." 
Jeremiah51:45 In thinlung chau suh se la, Chu rama thuthang chu hlau hek suh u; Kum khatah thuthang a lo thleng ang a, Kum dangah thuthang a lo thleng leh dawn si a, lal leh lal inbeiin ramah pawngnekna a awm ang." 
Jeremiah51:46 Chuvangin, ngai rawh u, nite a lo thleng e, Babulon milem chher chawpte chunga Ro ka rel a, a ram pum pui a zahna tur ni chu; Tin, a chhungah a mi thahte chu an tlu ang." 
Jeremiah51:47 Chutichuan lei leh van leh a chhunga awm zawng zawngten, hmar ata runtute a hnenah an thleng ang. Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:48 Babulon chuan Israel mi thahte a tluktir angin Babulon-ah chuan ram tina mi thahte an tlu ang. 
Jeremiah51:49 Nangni khandaih pumpelhtute u, kal u la, ding mai mai suh u, Hla tak atangin LALPA hre reng u la, In rilruah Jerusalem lut rawh se." 
Jeremiah51:50 Sawichhiatna thu kan hriat avangin kan zak a, kan hmuihmai a lo buai zo ta, LALPA ina hmun thianghlimahte chuan Awze mite an lo lut ta si a." 
Jeremiah51:51 Chuvangin ngai rawh u, nite a lo thleng e, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, An milem chher chawpte chunga Ro ka relna tur leh A ram pum pui chunga mi hliamte rumna ni tur chu." 
Jeremiah51:52 Babulon chu van tawngin sang mah se, A kulh sangte chu tinghet mah se, A chungah ka hnen ata tichhetu chu an lo thleng tho ang, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babulon atanga tap thawm leh Kaldai ram atanga chhiatna nasa tak thawm chu! 
Jeremiah51:54 LALPA'n Babulon chu a run a, An thawm nasa tak mai chu a tihrehsak a. An che vel thawm chu tui tam tak ri hum hum ang a ni, An hawhaw dur dur a." 
Jeremiah51:55 A chungah runtu a lo thleng, Babulon ngei chungah, A mi chakte manin an awm a, An thla ngulte a tliak sawm ta, LALPA chu thungrultu Pathian a ni si a, A thungrul ngei ngei ang." 
Jeremiah51:56 Tin, a hotute leh a mi fingte, A awptute leh a puitute Leh mi chakte chu ka tirui ang; An mu hlen ang a, an thang harh l vang, Tih hi Lalber, a hming Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak chu a ni." 
Jeremiah51:57 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Babulon lal kulh bang chhah takte chu a chim vek ang a, A kawngka sang takte chu a kang vek ang; A mite chuan athlawnin an thawk a, Hnamte chuan mei atan mai an intihah a lo ni." 
Jeremiah51:58 Juda lal Zedekia lal kum linaa Babulona a kal laia a hnena kal ve, Seraia Neria fapa, Maaseia fapa hnena zawlnei Jeremia thupek chu. Seraia chu lal in chhung hotu ber a ni a." 
Jeremiah51:59 Tin, Jeremia chuan Babulon chunga chhiatna lo thleng tur zawng zawng, Babulon chungchanga he'ng thu ziak zawng zawng hi lehkhabuah a ziak a." 
Jeremiah51:60 Tin, Jeremia chuan Seraia hnenah, ""Babulon i thlen hunah chuan he'ng thu zawng zawng hi chhiar ngei la," 
Jeremiah51:61 Aw LALPA, he hnam chungchangah hian tumah, mi leh sa pawh, chen lohna tura rawt boa, awmin, kumkhuaa tiau zawk turin thu i sawi tawh a,' ti ang che." 
Jeremiah51:62 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, he lehkhabu i chhiar zawhin lung nen tawnbelhbawmin Euphrates luiah paih lut la,""Babulon chu hetiang mai hian a pil ang a, a chunga chhiatna ka rawn thlen tur avangin a tho leh tah lo ang; an chau em em ang,' tiin i sawi tur a ni,"" a ti a. Heti zawng hi Jeremia thu chu a ni." 
Jeremiah51:63 Babulon chu hetiang mai hian a pil ang a, a chunga chhiatna ka rawn thlen tur avangin a tho leh tah lo ang; an chau em em ang,' tiin i sawi tur a ni,"" a ti a. Heti zawng hi Jeremia thu chu a ni." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekia chu a lal tantirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum khat mi a ni a; Jerusalemah kum sawm leh kum khat mi a ni a; Jerusalemah kum sawm leh kum khat a lal a; a nu hming chu Hamutali a ni a, Libna khua Jeremia fanu a ni." 
Jeremiah52:2 Tin, Jehoiakima tih ang zelin LALPA mithmuha thil sual chu a ti a." 
Jeremiah52:3 LALPA a thinur em em avangin Jerusalem leh Judai ramah chuan a hma ata a paih chhuahna khawpuin thil a lo thleng ta a; tichuan Zedekia chu Babulon lal chungah a hel ta a. 
Jeremiah52:4 Tin, ro a rel kum kuanaah chuan heti hi a lo ni a, thla sawmna, chumi thla ni sawm niah chuan babulon lal Nebukadnezzara leh a sipai rual zawng zawng chu Jerusalem do turin an lo kal a, buk an khuar hnan ta a; a velin kulhte an siam ta a." 
Jeremiah52:5 Chutichuan lal Zedekia kum sawm leh kum khatna thlengin khawpui chu hualin a awm ta a. 
Jeremiah52:6 Thla lina, chumi thla ni kuanaah chuan khawpuia tam chu a nasa ta hle mai a, ram mipuite tan ei tur reng reng a awm ta lo a." 
Jeremiah52:7 Chutichuan khawpui kulh bang an tipawp a, indo mi zawng zawng chu an tlan bo a, lal huana bang pahnih inkara kawngkaa chhuakin, zanah khawpui ata an tlan chhuak a; (Kaldai mite chu khawpui velin an awm a ni a.) Araba kawngah chuan an kal ta a." 
Jeremiah52:8 Mahse Kaldai sipaite chuan lal chu an um a, Jeriko phaiah Zedekia chu an um phak ta a, a sipai rual zawng zawng chu a hnen ata an darh vek a." 
Jeremiah52:9 Tichuan Zedekia chu an an a, Babulon lal hnenah Hamath rama Riblah khuaah chuan an kalpui ta a; tin, anin a chung thu a rel a." 
Jeremiah52:10 Tin, Babulon lal chuan Zedekia fapate chu amithmuh ngeiah a that a; Riblah-ah chuan Juda hotu zawng zawng pawh a that bawk a." 
Jeremiah52:11 Tin, Zedekia mit a kher chhuahsak a, Babulon lal chuan kawl a buntir a, Babulon-ah a kalpui ta a; athih ni thlengin tan inah a dah a." 
Jeremiah52:12 Tin, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kum sawm leh kum kuana, thla ngana, chumi thla ni sawmnaah chuan lal vengtu pawl hotu, Babulon lal hmaa ding thin, Nebuzaradana chuan Jerusalem a lo lut a." 
Jeremiah52:13 Tin, LALPA in leh lal in a hal a, Jerusalema in zawng zawng nen, in ropui tinrengte chu meiin a hal a." 
Jeremiah52:14 Tin, Kaldai sipai rual zawng zawng, lal vengtu pawl hotu hnena awmte chuan Jerusalem kulhte chu a velin an tichim ta vek a." 
Jeremiah52:15 Tichuan vengtu pawl hotu Nebuzaradana chuan mipui zinga rethei pawl berte khawpuia hnutchhiah te, Babulon lal hnena inpe tawhte leh mi themthiam la awm chhun zawn gzawng nen salah a hruai ta vek a." 
Jeremiah52:16 Mahse vengtu pawl hotu Nebuzaradana chuan rama mi rethei ber thenkhatte chu grep huan enkawltu leh vengtu atan a hnutchhiah a. 
Jeremiah52:17 Tin, LALPA ina dar bante leh LALPA ina dar tuizem leh a nghahchhante chu, Kaldai mite chuan an tikeh sawm a, dar zawng zawng chu Babulonah an la ta a." 
Jeremiah52:18 Belte pawh, vutlawh te, khawnvar tihmihna te, maihun te, thirfian te, dar bungbel zawng zawng an hman thinte chu an la vek a." 
Jeremiah52:19 Note pawh, meivap dahna te, maihun te, bel te, khawnvar dahna te, thirfiante leh berhbu te; rangkachaka siam kha chu rangkachakin, tangkarua a siam kha chu tangkaruain vengtu pawl hotu chuan a la vek a ni." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ban pahnih, dara siam bawngpa sawm leh pahnih, tuizem nghahchhan, lal Solomona LALPA in atana a siam chu, he'ng bungbel zawng zawng dar hi teh rual a ni lo." 
Jeremiah52:21 Tin, bante kha chu ban pakhat san lam chu, tawng sawm leh tawng riat a ni a, tawng sawm leh tawng hnihin a vel zo chauh a ni; a chhah lam chu zungza beng a ni a, a kawrawng a." 
Jeremiah52:22 Tin, a chungah chuan dar lu bawk a awm a, a lu bawk san lam chu tawng nga a ni a, alu bawk vel mai chuan dar hlira cheimawi leh pawmgranet a ni a; ban pahnih pawh chuan hetiang bawk hian pawmgranet a nei a." 
Jeremiah52:23 Tin, a pangah chuan pawmgranet sawmkua leh paruk a awm a, a vela a cheimawina pawmgranet zawng zawng chu zakhat a ni." 
Jeremiah52:24 Tin, vengtu pawl hotu hotu chuan puithiam lal Seraia leh puithiam pahnihna, Zephania leh kawngkhar vengtu pathumte chu a man a;" 
Jeremiah52:25 tin, indo mite chunga hotua ruat leh mi pasarih, lal hmel hmu thin, khawpuia awmte leh sipai hotu ziaktu, rama mite hming vawngtu leh ram mipui zinga mi sawmruk, khawpuia lo awmte chu khawpui ata a hruai chhuak a." 
Jeremiah52:26 Tin, Nebuzaradana, vengtu pawl hotu chuan anmahni a hruai a, Babulon lal hnenah chuan Riblah-ah a rawn thlen a." 
Jeremiah52:27 Tin, Babulon lal chuan Hamath rama Riblah-ah chuan anmahni a nghaisa a, a tihlum ta hlawm a. Chutichuan Juda hnam chu an ram ata sala hruai boin an awm ta a." 
Jeremiah52:28 Heng hi Nebukadnezzara mipi sala a hruaite ch an ni: Kum sarihnaah chuan Juda sangthum leh sawmhnih leh pathum; 
Jeremiah52:29 Nebukadnezzara kum sawm eh kum riatnaah chuan Jerusalem atangin mi zariat leh sawmthum leh pahnih salah a hruai a; 
Jeremiah52:30 Nebukadnezzara kum kum sawmhnih leh kum thumnaah chuan Nebuzaradana, vengtu pawl hotu chuan mi zasarih leh sawmli leh panga salah a hruai a: an zavai chuan sangli leh zaruk an ni." 
Jeremiah52:31 Tin, Juda lal Jehoikina kum sawmthum leh kum sarihna, a thla sawm leh thla hnihna, chumi thla ni sawmhnih leh ni nga ni tak chuan heti hi a lo ni a, Babulon lal Evil-Merodaka chuan a rorel kum khatnaah chuan, Juda lal, Jehoiakina chu a lu a chawikansak a, tan in ata chu a hruai chhuak a;" 
Jeremiah52:32 a hnenah chuan tha takin a tawng a, Babulona a hnena awm lalho thutthleng aia sangin lalthutthleng ch a hunsak a." 
Jeremiah52:33 Tin, a tan in silhfente chu a thlaktir a, a dam chhung ni zawng zawng chuan a hmaah a eiin a bar thin ta a.Tin, a chawmna'n chuan a dam chhung ni zawng zawng, a thih ni thlengin, a ni tin, chanvo chu Babulon lalin a pe fo thin a." 
Jeremiah52:34 Tin, a chawmna'n chuan a dam chhung ni zawng zawng, a thih ni thlengin, a ni tin, chanvo chu Babulon lalin a pe fo thin a." 
Lamentations1:1 Mipuia khat thin khawpui kha khawhara a thut tak chu. 
Lamentations1:2 Hnamte zinga ropui thin kha, hmeithai ang a lo ni ta a!" 
Lamentations1:3 Juda chu saltan khur a lut ta a, hreawm leh sal chhawr tuarin; a cheng ta e, anpai z�ngah, chawlhna reng a tawng lo e; a um tu zawngten an nangch�ng, a chep lai takin." 
Lamentations1:4 Zion khawpui kawngte chu a ngui ruai, kutpui urhsun kal awm loh vangin; a kulh kawngka zawng zawng a ram zo, a puithiamte an rum a. A nulaten an tuar a, ani lahin na a ti em em." 
Lamentations1:5 A hnehchhiahtute chu hotuah an chang zo ve, a hmelmate an hlawhtling, LALPA'n a tuart�r tak hi, bawhchhiat tam avangin; hnehchhiattu hmaah a hraichawite sal tan khur an lut ta e." 
Lamentations1:6 Tin, Zion fanu chu a mawina zawngin a bosan ta e, A hotute zukchal tlat hmun nei lo ang an chang zo ta; umtu hmaa'n an tlan e, tha leh zungzam reng nei loin." 
Lamentations1:7 A hreawm mangan n�ah Jerusalem chuan a hre reng a, A hmasang thil hlu zawng zawngte; hnehchhiahtu kuta a mite an tluk laiin ani chu tumah rengin an pui lo, hnehchhiahtute'n an en a, a chim chu an diriam a." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalem a sual ta em, chuvang chuan thil thianghlim lo a lo chang ta; a zahtu zawngte'n an hmusit, a sa ruak an hmuh vangin; a ni, lungngaiin a ni a rum a, lehlam a hawi." 
Lamentations1:9 A puan hmawrah bawlhhlawh a kai; a hun tawp tur a ngaihtuah lo; chuvang chuan mak takin a tlawm, thlamuantu reng a nei lo e. En teh, aw LALPA, mi hreawmna hi, hmelma a intiropui si." 
Lamentations1:10 Hnehchhiattu chuan a kut a lek a, a thil hlu zawng zawng chungah chuan; a hmun thianghlimah chuan anpaiho an lut a hmu e, inkhawmna hmuna luh i khapteho kha." 
Lamentations1:11 A mite zawng zawng an rum e. ei tur zawngin; An thil hlu zawng zawng an pe zo, nun tihharhna chawa tan. Aw LALPA, ngai la, en teh, hmusitawm ka nih tak hi." 
Lamentations1:12 In tan engmah lo mai em ni, kawnga veivak zawng zawngte u? Ngai u la, en teh mah u, ka chunga thleng ka lungngaihna ang lungngaihna a awm em ni? A thinrim nasat n�a LALPA'n min tihhreawmna hi."

Ezekiel1:13 Thilnung zingah chuan, eng eng emaw, meichher alh deuh ang mai hi a awm a, englai pawhin a che a, Mei chu a alh eng pup a, kawlphe angin a eng chhuak zuai zuai a." 
Ezekiel1:14 Thilnungte chu kawlphe angin an vir tawn zawk zawk a. 
Ezekiel1:15 Thilnung palite chu ka en reng lai chuan, tawlailir ke pali, thilnung zawn theuha awm, leia in nghat, ka hmu bawk a." 
Ezekiel1:16 Tawlailir ke palite chu in ang vek a ni a, lunghlu angin an eng theuh a, tawlailir ke pakhat chhunga tawlailir ke dang awm ang a ni." 
Ezekiel1:17 In her loin khawilam hawi pawhin an che sawn thei a ni. 
Ezekiel1:18 Tawlailir ke bial tlangte chu kual kung mai,rapthlak tak a ni a, mitin a khat a" 
Ezekiel1:19 Thilnungte chu an kalsawn apiangin tawlailirte pawh chuan an zui ve zel a.. 
Ezekiel1:20 Thilnungte chu thlarau duhna lam lamah an kal a, tawlailir pawhin thilnungte tih ang chiahin an ti ve a, thilnungte thlarau chu tawlailirte keahte a awm si a." 
Ezekiel1:21 Tichuan thilnungte chu an kalin emaw, an din in emaw, boruaka chawikan an nih in emaw tawlailirte pawh chutiang bawk chuan an awm thin, thilnungte thlarau chu tawlailir keah chuan a awm si a." 
Ezekiel1:22 Tin, thilnungte lu chung chu thil eng emaw, krustal lung tle mia siam ang hian a khuh kulh mai a." 
Ezekiel1:23 Chu thil awm kulh hnuaiah chuan thilnungte chu an ding a; an dawta mite lamah chuan an thla pahnih an zara, an thla pahnih dangin an taksa an khuh a." 
Ezekiel1:24 An thlawh laia an thla zap ri chu ka hria a, tuifinriat fawn ri ang leh sipai rual thawm ang a mipui ri mur mur thawm leh Engkimtithei Pathian aw ang a ni, An thlawh loh chuan an thla te an khup a." 
Ezekiel1:25 An thlawh loh lai pawhin an lu chung zawn chunglam thil awm atang khan thil ri hum hum a awm tho a. 
Ezekiel1:26 Tin, an lu chunga van dum chungah khan lalthutthleng ang tak, sapphir lung ang maia lang hi a awm a: Tin, lal thutthleng ang tak chungah chuan mi hring ang taka lang hi a awm a." 
Ezekiel1:27 Tin a kawnga chin chunglam chu thihna puak sur ang maiin ka hmu a, a kawng ni awm a chin hnuailam chu mei ang mai hi niin ka hmu a, a eng vel pup mai a.Ruahsur nia chhum chunga chhimbal landan ang mai hi a vela eng landan chu a ni a, Hei hi LALPA ropuina landan ang chu a ni. Tin, ka hmuhin bawkkhupin ka tlu a, thusawitu aw chu ka hria a." 
Ezekiel1:28 Ruahsur nia chhum chunga chhimbal landan ang mai hi a vela eng landan chu a ni a, Hei hi LALPA ropuina landan ang chu a ni. Tin, ka hmuhin bawkkhupin ka tlu a, thusawitu aw chu ka hria a." 
Ezekiel2:1 Tin, ka hnenah, ""Mihring fapa, i kein ding rawh, i hnenah thu ka sawi dawn e,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel2:2 Tin, ka hnena a thusawi lai chuan thlarau chu keimahah a lo lut a, ka ke in mi dintir a; tin, mi betu chu ka ngaithla ta a." 
Ezekiel2:3 Tin, ka hnenah, ""Mi hring fapa, Israel fate hnenah, helhmang hnam, ka chunga hel thin te hnenah chuan ka tir a che: anmahni leh an thlahtute pawhin hemi ni thleng pawh hian ka chungah an bawhchhe thin a ni." 
Ezekiel2:4 Chhuan luhlul leh tihmawhte an ni a, an hnenah ka tirh che hi; tin, an hnenah chuan, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti,"" i ti tur a ni." 
Ezekiel2:5 Tin, an nin an ngaithla emaw, an ngaithla lo emaw (hel hmang an ni si a), an zingah zawlnei a awm tih an hre reng tur a ni." 
Ezekiel2:6 Tin, nang mihring fapa, anmahni hlau suh la, an thu ah pawh zam hek suh, i hnenah chuan len hling leh hnim hlingnei te awmin, khawmualkaikuang zinga cheng ni mah la: helhmang mi nimahsela, an thu chu hlau suh la, an landan ah zam hek suh." 
Ezekiel2:7 Tin, an ngaithla emaw, ngaithla lo emaw, an hnenah ka thu i sawi tur a ni: helhmang tak an ni si a." 
Ezekiel2:8 Amaherawh chu nang mihring fapa, i hnena ka sawi hi ngaithla rawh; mi helhmangte angin helhmang ni ve suh: i ka ang la, ka pek che chu ei rawh,"" a ti a" 
Ezekiel2:9 Tin, ka han en a ngaiteh, kutah chuan lehkhabu zial a awm a;ka hmaah a han pharh a, a chhung lam leh a pawn lama ziak a ni a; tahnate, lusunna te, chungpikna te ziakin a awm a." 
Ezekiel2:10 ka hmaah a han pharh a, a chhung lam leh a pawn lama ziak a ni a; tahnate, lusunna te, chungpikna te ziakin a awm a." 
Ezekiel3:1 Tin, ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa, i hmuh kha ei rawh; lehkhabu zial hi ei la. Israel chhungte hnenah chuan thu va sawi rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel3:2 Chutichuan ka ka ka ang a, lehkhabuizial chu mi eitir ta a." 
Ezekiel3:3 Tin, ani chuan ke hnenah,""Mihring fapa, i pumah pai la, he lehkhabu zial ka pek che hian i kawchhung ti khat rawh,"" a ti a. Tichuan ka ei ta a, a thlum zia chu ka kaah chuan khawizu ang mai a ni a." 
Ezekiel3:4 Tin, ani chuan ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa, Kalla Israel chhungte hnenah chuan thute hi hmangin va sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel3:5 Tawng hrang leh tawng harsa te hnenah tirh i ni si lo a; Israel chhungte hnenah tirh i ni zawk si a. 
Ezekiel3:6 Hnam ropui tak an tawng i hriat loh, tawng harsa pui pui hmang tute zingah pawh tir che i la chuan i thu an ngai thla ang." 
Ezekiel3:7 Mahse Israel chhungte chuan an ngai thla lo ang che, kei mi ngaithla dawn si lo a, Israel chhungte zawng luhlul tak leh tihmawh takte an ni si a." 
Ezekiel3:8 Tunah hian luhlul tak leh dehkhirh takin anmahni ang maiin ka siam ang che," 
Ezekiel3:9 lung chang tak, meilung aia changa dehkhirhin ka siam a che, hlau suh la, an mit melhah zam hek suh, helhmang mi ni mah se la,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel3:10 Chu lo chu ka hnenah, 'Mihring fapa, i hnena ka thu sawi tur zawng zawng chu i bengin ngai thla la, i thinlungah khung rawh." 
Ezekiel3:11 Tin, kalla, i chipui saltangte hnen va thlen la; an ngaithla emaw, 'Hetiang hi LALPA thu chhuak chu a ni e,' tiin sawi la hrilh rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel3:12 Tichuan thlarauin mi chawi kang ta a, ka hnung lamah chuan thawm ri sung sung hi ka hria a, ""A hmun atang hian LALPA ropuina chu malsawmin awm rawh se,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel3:13 Tin, thilnungte thla in tawk ri te, an bula tawlailir ri te, thawm ri sung sungte chu ka hria a." 
Ezekiel3:14 Chutichuan thlarauin mi chawi kang a, mi la bo ta a: thinrim tak leh hreh tak chungin ka kal ta a, LALPA kut chu ka chungah a chak si a." 
Ezekiel3:15 Tichuan Telabiba sal tangho, Kebar luia chengte hnen chu ka thleng a, an thutnaah chuan ka thu a; mak ti takin tah chuan ni sarih ka thu ta a." 
Ezekiel3:16 Mihring fapa, Israel chhungte vengtuah ka ruat che a ni; tichuan ka kaa thu i hria ang a, keima aiah ka vaukhang tur a ni." 
Ezekiel3:17 Mi suaksual hnena ka thu,'I thi ngei tur a ni,' ka tiha, chu mi suaksual chu a nunna hum tura a sualna kawng kalsan turin vauna i neih loh a, vaukhanna thu i hrilh bawk si loh a, chu mi suaksual chu a khawlohnaah a thih chuan a thisen mawh chu i lakah ka phut ngei ang." 
Ezekiel3:18 Amaherawhchu, chu mi suaksual chu i vau a, a sualna a kalsan loh a, a sualna kawng a hawisan bawk loh chuan a khawlohnaah a thi ang a, nang erawh chuan i nun i chhanhim a ni zawk ang." 
Ezekiel3:19 Tin, mifel chuan a felna a hawisana khawlohna a tiha, a hmaa tlukna ka lo dah chuanin, a thi ang: vaukhanna i neih loh avangin sualah a thi ang a; a thil fel tih tawhte chu hriatreng a ni lo ang; a thisen mawh erawh chu i lakah ka phut ang." 
Ezekiel3:20 Nimahsela mi fel chu sual lo tura i vaukhanna a sual loh chuan vauna a pawisak avangin a nung ang; nang pawhin i nun i hum him ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel3:21 Tin, tah chuan LALPA kut chu ka chungah a awm a, ka hnenah,""Tho la phaizawlah kal la, tah chuan ka bia ang che,"" a ti a Tichuan ka tho a, phaizawlah chuan ka kal ta a.." 
Ezekiel3:22 Tin, ngai teh, tah chuan LALPA ropuina chu, ropuina, Kebar luia ka hmuh ang mai khan a lo ding a, kei chu bawk khupin ka tlu ta a." 
Ezekiel3:23 Tichuan thlarau chu keimahah a lo lut a, ka kein mi din tir a, mi bia a,""Kal la, i inah in khar khung rawh." 
Ezekiel3:24 Nang zawng e mihring fapa, hruizenin an hling ang chia, an phuar ang che, an zingah i leng chhuak tawh lo ang." 
Ezekiel3:25 I lei chu i dangah ka behtir ang a, i tawng tawh lo ang a, anmahni zilhtu i ni tawh lo ang, helhmang chhung an ni si aMahsela i hnena thu ka sawi hunah chuan i ka ka antir ang chia, an hnenah chuan Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni:'A ngaithlain ngaithla se la, a ngaithla loin ngaithla lo mai rawh se, helhmang chhung an ni si a, a ti e,"" tiin i sawi tur a ni,""" 
Ezekiel3:26 Mahsela i hnena thu ka sawi hunah chuan i ka ka antir ang chia, an hnenah chuan Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni:'A ngaithlain ngaithla se la, a ngaithla loin ngaithla lo mai rawh se, helhmang chhung an ni si a, a ti e,"" tiin i sawi tur a ni,""" 
Ezekiel4:1 Nang mihring fapa, leirawhchan phek la la, i hmaah dah la, chumiah chuan khawpui lem ziak rawh." 
Ezekiel4:2 A vela hualin kulh siam hnan la, mual pawng siam hnan rawh, sipai riah bukte siam hnan la, kulh sut chhiatnate a velin siam hnan rawh." 
Ezekiel4:3 Tin, nangin thir phek la la, nangmah leh khawpui inkarah chuan thirbang atan chhawng rawh; chu lam chu hmachhawn la, hualin a awm ang a, nangma'n i hual tur a ni, Hei hi Israel chhungte tan entir lawkna a ni ang." 
Ezekiel4:4 Tin, nang chu veilam delhin mu la, i chungah Israel chhungte khawlohna nghat rawh. An khawlohna tuarin ni 390 chhung mu rawh." 
Ezekiel4:5 Kum khat hrem an tuar aiah ni khat zel an tuar dawn a ni. 
Ezekiel4:6 Chumi zawhah in let la, i dinglam delhin mu leh rawh, Juda chhungte khawlohna chu ni sawmli i tuar leh tur a ni, hrem an tuar tur kumkhat zelah ni khat." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ban hlim tel tawlin Jerusalem hual lam kha hawi la, A chung thu sawi chhuak rawh." 
Ezekiel4:8 Tin, ngaiteh hruizenin ka hling che a, i hual ni i tling tlak hma loh chuan khawilamah mah i hawi her tur a ni lo e." 
Ezekiel4:9 Buh te, barli te, be te, dailuah te buhtun te, vai buh tun te la la, bel pakhatah dah la, chhangah siam rawh; i pangkhing delha i mut chhung zawng, ni zathum leh sawmkaw chhung chu, chu chu i ei tur a ni." 
Ezekiel4:10 I chaw ei tur chu teh vek tur a ni a, nikhatah sekel sawmhnih a ni tur a ni: hunbi nei takin i ei tur a ni." 
Ezekiel4:11 Tin, tui te pawh teh vekin i in tur a ni a, hin khat hmun ruka thena hmunkhat a ni tur a ni, hun bi nei takin i in tur a ni." 
Ezekiel4:12 Tin, an mit hmuh ngeiah mihring ek roin i ur ang a, barli chhang eiin i ei tur a ni,''a ti a." 
Ezekiel4:13 Tin, LALPA chuan, ""Hetiang chaw bawlhhlawh hi Israel fate chuan ka hnawh bona tur hnamte zingah chuan an ei ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel4:14 Tah chuan kei chuan, ""A! LALPA PATHIAN, ngawi teh, ka nun chu tihbawlhlawh a ni ngai lo a, ka tleirawl tirh ata tun thleng pawhin, amaha thi emaw, ramsa sah emaw chu ka la ei ngai si lo a, sa tenawm ka kaah a lut ngai bawk hek lo,"" ka ti a." 
Ezekiel4:15 Tah chuan a ni chuan ka hnenah,""Hei le, Mihring ek aiah bawngek ka pe chia, i eitur chu he'ng hian i siam tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel4:16 Chu lo pawh chu ka hnenah, a ni chuan,""Mi hring fapa, ngai teh, Jerusalemah chuan, chaw, nunna bul chu ka tichhia ang a, an chaw chu teh vekin fimkhur takin an ei ang; Tui pawh teh vekin lunghnur takin an in ang;Chaw te, tui te an tlakchham a, an inlungtena, an khawlohna an riral zawhna'n." 
Ezekiel4:17 Chaw te, tui te an tlakchham a, an inlungtena, an khawlohna an riral zawhna'n." 
Ezekiel5:1 Tin, nang mihring fapa, khandaih hriam tak la la i lu leh i khabe hmul mehna'n lu mettu bakmeh chemah hmang rawh; tin, bukna la la, sam chu then ang che." 
Ezekiel5:2 Hmun thuma thena hmun khat chu huala a awm chhung nite a kim hunah chuan khawpui laia meiah i rawh tur a ni a, hmun thuma thena hmun khat leh chu i la ang a, a velah khandaihin i satsawm tur a ni; tin, hmun thuma thena hmun khat leh chu thli len turin i theh darh tur a ni a keiin khandaihin ka um zui ang." 
Ezekiel5:3 Tin, tlemte chu i la ang a, i kawrfual hmawrah i bawk tur a ni." 
Ezekiel5:4 Tin, he'ng a mi hi i la ang a, meiah chuan i theh lut tur a ni a, a kang ang; chumi atang chuan Israel chhungte zawng zawngah mei a lo chhuak ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel5:5 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni:Hei hi Jerusalem khua a ni: hnamte zingah chuan ka dah a, a velah ramte a awm a." 
Ezekiel5:6 Tin, hnamte aia nasa zawka suahsualna tiin ka thurel chungah a hel a, a vela ramte aia nasain ka dan siam chungah pawh a hel a ni, Ka thurelte chu an paih thla si a, ka dan siam te ang pawhin an awm hek lo" 
Ezekiel5:7 Chuvangin LALPA Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: i vela hnamte aia buai hmang zawkin in awm a, ka dan siam angin in awm loh a, hnamte tana ka thuruatte in tih hek loh avangin," 
Ezekiel5:8 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, kei meuh pawh hian ka dodal che u a ni, hnamte mithmuh ngeiin in zingah rorelna ka hlen dawn e;" 
Ezekiel5:9 tin, in tenawmna zawng zawngte avangin thil ka la tih ngai loh, tih pawh ka tih ngai tawh loh tur chu i chungah ka ti dawn e." 
Ezekiel5:10 Chutichuan paten i chhungah an fate an ei ang a, fate pawhin an pate an ei ang; nangma mi la awmchhun zawng zawng chu ka tidarhsarh vek ang." 
Ezekiel5:11 Chutichuan hei hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni: I bawlhlawhnate leh i tenawmnatein ka biakin i ti bawlhlawh avangin, a nuna ka nun chhung chu, ka suat ang che u a, ka mitin a hmaih hlek lo ang che u a, ka khawngaih hlek lo ang che u." 
Ezekiel5:12 Hmun thuma thena hmun khat chu hriin emaw, tamin emaw in zingah an thi ang; hmun thuma thena hmun khat chu i velah khandaihin an thi ang; hmun thuma thena hmunkhat leh chu ka ti darhsarh vek ang a, khandaihin ka um zui ang." 
Ezekiel5:13 Hetiang hian ka thinurna ka hlen ang a, an chungah ka thinrimna ka hrithla ang a, ka ngaih a tha tawh ang: tin, kei LALPA hian an chunga ka thinurna ka hrikthlak hunah chuan dichim takin ka sawi tawh tih an hre chhuak ang." 
Ezekiel5:14 Chu loah chuan, i vela hnamte zingah leh veivak zawng zawngte mithmuhah chuan khaw ram leh hmuhsitawmah ka siam ang che." 
Ezekiel5:15 Chutichuan, thinur tak leh thinrim em em a, nasa taka zilh a, i chunga thu relte ka hlen hunah i vela hnamte mit hmuhah chuan cheksawlhna leh tihelna leh vaukhanna leh thil rapthlak i ni ang." 
Ezekiel5:16 Kei LALPA hian ka sawi tawh hi. An chungah tamna thal fang tha lo tak, boralna tur nangmahni boralna tur chu ka rawn tlaktir ang; in chungah tamna ka tizual ang a, in chaw, nunna bul chu ka tichhia ang,Tin, in chungah tamna leh ramsa kawlhte ka rawntir ang a, fanau chanin a siam ang che; tin hripui leh thisen chhuahna in zingah a leng ang; tin in chungah khandaih ka rawn lek ang, kei hian ka sawi tawh hi,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel5:17 Tin, in chungah tamna leh ramsa kawlhte ka rawntir ang a, fanau chanin a siam ang che; tin hripui leh thisen chhuahna in zingah a leng ang; tin in chungah khandaih ka rawn lek ang, kei hian ka sawi tawh hi,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel6:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel6:2 Mihring fapa, Israel tlang lamte chu hawi la, an hnenah thu sawi la," 
Ezekiel6:3 Israel tlangte u, LALPA PATHIAN thu hi ngaithla rawh u: LALPA PATHIAN chuan tlangte leh mualte hnenah leh ruamte leh kawrte hnenah chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ngai rawh u keimah ngei hian in chungah khandaih ka rawn lek ang a, in bawlhmunte chu ka tichhe vek dawn a ni." 
Ezekiel6:4 In maichamte chu a ram ang a, in ni pathian lemte chu a kehsawm ang: tin, in mi thah ruangte chu in milimte bulah ka paih ang." 
Ezekiel6:5 Tin, Israel fate ruang chu an milim bulahte chuan ka dah ang a, in ruhte chu in maicham velah chuan ka thehdarh ang." 
Ezekiel6:6 In chenna hmun zawng zawngahte chuan khawpuite chu a chhia ang a, bawl hmunte chu an ram ang, In maichamte tihchhiat leh tihram a nih theihna'n leh in milimte keh sawma, a bo theihna'n leh in ni-pathian lemte chu rawt thluka an awm theiha, in hnathawhte chu a boral theihna'n." 
Ezekiel6:7 Tin, mi thahte chu in zingah an tlu ang a, tichuan LALPA ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel6:8 Amaherawhchu ram tina in darhsarh hunah chuan hnamte zinga khandaih pumpelhte an la awm dawn avangin a then chu ka la zuah cheu ang. 
Ezekiel6:9 Tin, in zing ata chhuakte chuan sala an hruaina hnamte zingah chuan mi hre reng ang a, an uirena thinlung ka lak bo tawh leh an mit, an milim lama uirete chu ka tihchhiatsakziate an hria ang: tin, an tenawmnatea thil sual, anmahni hmuh ngeia an lo tih tak thu-ahte chuan an inten tawh ang." 
Ezekiel6:10 Tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang a, he'ng thil tha lo hi an hnenah ka ti dawn a athlawn maiin ka sawi lo tih an hria ang, tiin,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel6:11 Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a:I kut bengin i ke per la, Ehei! Israel chhungte tenawmna sual avanga maw! Khandaihin, tamin, hripuiin an tlu dawn si a." 
Ezekiel6:12 Hla taka awm chu hripuiin an thi ang a a hnaia awm chu khandaihin an tlu ang a, a bang huala awmte chu tamin an thi tho ang; hetiang hian ka thinrimna nasa tak chu an chungah ka hri thla dawn a ni." 
Ezekiel6:13 Tin, tlang sangah te, tlang chhip zawng zawngahte leh thing hring apiang hnuaiah leh sasaw buk tin hnuaia an milimte hnena rimtui an hlanna hmuna an maicham vela an milimte bula an mithi ruangte a awm hunah chuan kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang.Tin, an chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, thlaler atanga Diblah lama an chenna hmun zawng zawngah ram chu ka tiramin ka tichhia ang: Tichuan kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel6:14 Tin, an chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, thlaler atanga Diblah lama an chenna hmun zawng zawngah ram chu ka tiramin ka tichhia ang: Tichuan kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel7:1 LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel7:2 Nang mihring fapa, LALPA PATHIAN chuan Israel ram hnenah chuan heti hian a ti a ni:'Tawpna, tawpna chu ram killiah a lo thleng e." 
Ezekiel7:3 Tun hi i tan tawpna a ni, i chungah ka thinurna ka rawn thlen ang a, i awmdan ang zelin ro ka rel ang chia, i tenawmna zawng zawng chu i chungah ka rawn thlen ang." 
Ezekiel7:4 Tin, ka mitin a hmaih lo ang chia, ka khawngaih hek lo ang che: i awmdante chu i chungah ka rawn thlen zawk ang a, i tenawmnate chu i chungah a awm ang, tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih in hria ang,' tiin." 
Ezekiel7:5 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a: Thil tha lo, thil tha lo takzet, ngai teh, a lo thleng e." 
Ezekiel7:6 Tawpna a lo thleng e, i chungah a lo tho ta, ngai rawh, a lo thleng e." 
Ezekiel7:7 Aw ram luahtu i chhiatna tur i chungah a lo thleng e, hun chu a lo thleng a, ni chu a hnai ta; buaina ni, lawma tlang chunga auna ni ni lo." 
Ezekiel7:8 Tunah hian ka thinrimna chu i chungah ka rawn leih thuai dawn e, i chungah ka thinurna chu ka hrithla ang; i awmdan ang zelin ro ka rel ang che; i tenawmnate zawng zawng chu ka rawn thlen ang." 
Ezekiel7:9 Tin, ka mitin a hmaih lo ang a, ka khawngaih hek lo ang: i awmdan ang zelin i chungah ka rawn thlen ang a, i tenawmna te pawh chu in zingah a awm ang: tichuan kei LALPA hi hrem thei ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel7:10 Ngai rawh, ni chu, ngai rawh, a lo thleng e, i chhiatna tur chu a chhuak ta, tiang chu a par ta, chapona chu a kuhmum ta." 
Ezekiel7:11 Pawngnekna chu suahsualna tiangah a chang ta a ni; tu-amah an awm tawh lo ang a,an thawm emaw an hausakna emaw pawh: tumahin an ui hek lo ang." 
Ezekiel7:12 Hun chu a lo thleng ta a, ni chu a lo hnai mek e: leitu chu hlim suh se la, hralhtu chu lungngai hek suh se: thinurna chu an zavaia chungah a thleng si a." 
Ezekiel7:13 Hralhtu chuan, la dam mah se la, a thil hralh chu a hmu leh tawh dawn si lo a; inlarna chu an zavaia chung thu tur a ni si a, tumah an kir lo ang, tumah an nun khawlohnaah hian an nung khawchhuak hek lo ang." 
Ezekiel7:14 Tawtawrawt chu an ham a, engkim a inpeih tawh a; mahse indonaah chuan tumah an kal lo; ka thinurna chu an zavaia chungah a awm si a." 
Ezekiel7:15 Pawnah khandaih, a chhungah hripui leh tam: rama awm chu khandaihin a thi ang a, khawpui a awm chu tam leh hripuiin a ei zo ang." 
Ezekiel7:16 Amaherawh chu a tlan chhuakte chu, an chhuak na ang a, tlangahte chuan chul ram thuro ang maiin an awm ang; an vaiin khawhar takin, mahni khawlohna theuhvah." 
Ezekiel7:17 Kut zawng zawngte chu a zawi ang a, khup zawng zawngte chu tui angin a nem ang." 
Ezekiel7:18 Saiip puan an feng ang a, rapnain an mahni a tuam ang a, hmel zawng zawngah zahna a lang ang a, an lu zawng zawng a kawng fai vek ang." 
Ezekiel7:19 An tangkarua leh an rangkachakte chuan LALPA thinurna niah chuan a chhanchhuak thei lo ang a, an nun a titlai lo ang a, an pum a ti puar hek lo ang, an khawlohna tlukna a nih tawh thin avang in." 
Ezekiel7:20 An cheina mawina chuh an chapopui a, an tenawmna milemah leh an bawlhhlawhna thilah an chantir chauh zawk a ni; chumi avang chuan an tan thil tenawmah ka lo siam ta a ni." 
Ezekiel7:21 Tin, rallak atan hnamdang kutah ka pe ang a, leia mi suaksualte hnenah rallak atan ka pe ang a, annin an lo tibawlhlawh ang." 
Ezekiel7:22 Anmahni chu ka hawisan ang a, ka hmun serh chu an tibawlhlawh ang: Tin, rukhmangte an lo lut ang a, an tibawlhlawh ang." 
Ezekiel7:23 Khaidiat chu saim rawh u, ram chu thisen chhuah hmang rorelnain a khat a, khawpui chu pawngneknain a khat si a." 
Ezekiel7:24 Chuvangin hnamdang sual ber te ka rawn hruai lut ang a, an inte an neih sak ang; an chakna, an uanpui chu ka titawp ang a,an hmun serhte chu tihbawlhlawhin a awm ang." 
Ezekiel7:25 Manganna a lo thleng ang a, muanna an zawng a a awm miah si lo." 
Ezekiel7:26 Chhiatna chungah chhiat leh zualna, thu thang chungah thuthang a lo awm ang a, zawlnei lakah inlarna an zawng ang a, mahse dante chu puithiam lakah a bo ang a, upate lakah thurawn a awm hek lo ang.Lal chu a lungngai ang a, hotu chu beidawnna silhfenin a inthuam ang a, vantlang kutte pawh a khur ang a, an hnenah chuan an awmdan athuin ka ti ang a, an thiltih ang zelin ro ka rel sak ang; tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih an hre tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel7:27 Lal chu a lungngai ang a, hotu chu beidawnna silhfenin a inthuam ang a, vantlang kutte pawh a khur ang a, an hnenah chuan an awmdan athuin ka ti ang a, an thiltih ang zelin ro ka rel sak ang; tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih an hre tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel8:1 Tin, kum rukna, thla rukna, chumi thla ni nga niah chuan heti hi a ni a, ka ina ka thuta, Juda upate ka hmaa an thut lai chuan LALPA PATHIAN kut chu ka hnungah a lo awm a." 
Ezekiel8:2 Tichuan, ka han en a, ngai teh, mi mei anga lang hi a lo awm a; a kawnga chin thlanglam niawma lang chu mei a ni a, a kawnga chin chunglam thihna zia ang, eng tak a ni," 
Ezekiel8:3 Tin, kut ang hi a rawn zen chhuak a, ka chal samah mi man ta a, thlarau chuan lei leh van karah mi chawi kang ta daih mai a, Pathian inlarnain Jerusalemah mi hruai a, Jerusalem hmarlam hung chhungnung kawngka kharna bulah chuan mi thlen ta a; tah chuan thikna lim thut hmun a awm a, chu chuan a thiktir thin a." 
Ezekiel8:4 Tin, ngai rawh, phaizawla ka hmuh ang zel khan chutah chuan Israel pathian ropuina chu a awm." 
Ezekiel8:5 Tichuan a ni chuan ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa,hmarlam hawiin i mit han len teh le,"" a ti a, Chitichuan hmarlam hawia ka mit ka han len chuan, ngai teh, hmarlam kawngka hmarlam luhnaah chuan he thikna lim hi a lo awm a." 
Ezekiel8:6 Tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa an thiltih kha i hmu em? Israel chhungten thil tenawm nasa tak,heta an tih ngei,ka in thianghlim ata hla tak a ka kal bona'n an tih kha? Mahse thildang tenawm zawmah i la hmu leh ang,""a ti a." 
Ezekiel8:7 Tin, hung chhung luhnaah chuan mi hruai a; tin, ka han en a, bangah hian awng zuk lo awm a." 
Ezekiel8:8 Tichuan, ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa bang kha han kher teh,' a ti a, Tin, ka han ker tak chuan kawngkhar a lo awm reng mai a." 
Ezekiel8:9 Tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah,""Lut la, heta sual tenawm tak an tih hi en teh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel8:10 Tichuan ka lut a, ka hmu a, ngai rawh thilnung chitin reng lemte, ramsa tenawm lemte, Israel chhungte milim zawng zawngte chu bangah chuan a velin a lo chuang a." 
Ezekiel8:11 Tin, an hmaah chuan Israel chhung upate zinga mi sawmsarihte chu an ding a, an laiah chuan Saphana fapa Jaazania a ding a, mitin chuan berhbu an keng theuh a; tin, rimtui khu rim chu a chho ta mup mup a." 
Ezekiel8:12 Tichuan, ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa, Israel chhung upate thim hnuai a thiltih chu i hmu em? Mitinin milim pindana an tih chu?'LALPA chuan mi hmu lo a, LALPA chuan ram chu a kalsan tawh a lawm,' an ti si a." 
Ezekiel8:13 An thiltih tenawm nasa leh zual dang pawh i la hmu leh ang,"" ka hnenah chuan a ti bawk a." 
Ezekiel8:14 Tichuan LALPA in hmar lampang luhna kawngkharah mi hruai a; tin, ngai teh, tah chuan hmeichhiate Tamuz ngaia tapin an thu a." 
Ezekiel8:15 Tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah,""Aw mihring fapa, hei hi i hmu em? Hei aia tenawm nasa hi i la hmu ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel8:16 Tin, LALPA in hung chhungnung zawkah chuan mi hruai lut a, ngai teh, LALPA in thianghlim kawng kharah chuan hulhliap leh maicham inkarah hian mi sawmhnih leh panga LALPA in thianghlim lam hnuchhawna, an hmaite khawchhak lam hawiin an lo awm a, khawchhak lama ni chu zuk lo bia a." 
Ezekiel8:17 Tichuan, a ni chuan ka hnenah,"" Hei hi i hmu em?, aw mihring fapa, an thil tenawm tih, heta an tiha hi Juda chhungte tan thil tenau em ni? Ram chu pawngneknain an tikhat a, mi tithinur leh ta nghal si a, an hnar chu chhawlin an hup a.Chuvangin kei pawhin thinur takin ka ti dawn a ni: ka mitin a hmaih lo ang a, ka khawngaih hek lo ang; aw ring takin ka bengah lo au mah se la ka ngai thla lo vang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel8:18 Chuvangin kei pawhin thinur takin ka ti dawn a ni: ka mitin a hmaih lo ang a, ka khawngaih hek lo ang; aw ring takin ka bengah lo au mah se la ka ngai thla lo vang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel9:1 Tichuan ka beng hriatah chuan,""Khawpui en kawltute chu mitin tihboralna hriamhrei kengin lo hnai rawh se,"" tiin ringtakin a au a." 
Ezekiel9:2 Tin, ngai rawh hmarlam kawngka chungnung kalna atang chuan mi paruk an lo kal a, mitinin tihhlumna hriamhrei chu an keng theuh a; tin, an laia mi pakhat puan zai sin sin chuan lehkhatui bur a pai a. Tin, an lut ta a, dar maicham bulah chuan an ding ta a." 
Ezekiel9:3 Tin, Israelte Pathian ropuina chu a awmna cherub atang chuan chu in kawngka bulah chuan a chho a; tin, puanzai sin sin, lehkhatui bur paitu kha a au a." 
Ezekiel9:4 Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah,""Khawpui chu fang la, Jerusalemte chu fang chhuak rawh: a chhunga thil tenawm tih tawhte avanga thawpika tap thinte chu an chalah chhinchhiah ang che,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel9:5 Tin, midangte hnenah chuan ka hriat ngei in,""A hnungah sawn khawpui chu fang chhuak u la, kut thla rawh u, in mitin hmuh hmaih suh se la, khawngaih hek suh u." 
Ezekiel9:6 Putar te, tlangval te, nula te, naupangte leh nute that fai vek rawh u, chhinchhiahna neite erawh chu rawn hnaih suh u; ka hmun thianghlimah tan rawh u,"" a ti a, Tichuan biakin kawta upahovah chuan an tan ta a." 
Ezekiel9:7 Tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah,""In chu tibawrhbang u la, a hung chhungte chu miruangin tikhat u la: chhuak rawh u a ti a, Tin, an chhuak ta a, khawpuiah chuan an che ta a." 
Ezekiel9:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, khawpui an chet lai chuan kei chu hnutchhiahin ka lo awm a, ka tlu bawkkhup a,""Aw LALPA PATHIAN, Jerusalem chunga i thinur leihbuakah hian Israel la awm chhunte pawh i ti boral vek dawn em ni?"" tiin ka au a." 
Ezekiel9:9 Tichuan a ni chuan ka hnenah,""Israel leh Juda chhungte khawlohna chu a nasa em a ni. Ram chu thisenin a khat a, khawpui chu hlem hle rorelnain a khat a: 'LALPA'n ram chu a kalsan tawh a, LALPA'n engmah a hmu hlei nem!' an ti si a." 
Ezekiel9:10 Keipawh hian ka hmu hmaih lo ang a, ka khawngaih hek lo ang; an sual mawh chu a burin ka khumtir ang,"" a ti a.Tin, ngai teh, puan zai sin sina lehkhatui bur pai khan thu chu a thlen a, ""I thu mi pek angin ka tizo ta,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel9:11 Tin, ngai teh, puan zai sin sina lehkhatui bur pai khan thu chu a thlen a, ""I thu mi pek angin ka tizo ta,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel10:1 Tichuan ka han en a, ngai teh, cherub-ho lu chunga van dum awmah khian sapphir lung ni awm tak, lal thutthleng ang taka lang hi a lo lang a." 
Ezekiel10:2 Tin, a ni chuan puan zai sin sin hnenah khan,: Cherub hnuaia tawlailir virte karah sawn va lut la, cherub ho inkara meivam saw i kut khinghnih khat in va lawk la, khawpui chungah thehdarh rawh,"" a ti a. Tin, ka mit hmuh lai ngeiin a kal ta a." 
Ezekiel10:3 Tin, mi a luh lai khan, cherub-ho chu in pui dinglam pangah an ding a; tin, hung chhungnung chu chhumin a khat ta a." 
Ezekiel10:4 Tin, LALPA ropuina chu cherub-ho atang chuan a chho a, biakin kawngka chungah chuan a han ding ta a, in chu chhumin a khat a, hung chhung chu LALPA ropuina eng chuan a khat ta a." 
Ezekiel10:5 Tin, cherub-ho thlazap ri te chu hung chhung pawnta zawkah te pawh chuan Pathian engkimtitheian mi a biak laia a aw ang maiin a hriat a." 
Ezekiel10:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, puan zai sin sin hnena,""cherub-ho inkara tawlailir vir inkar ata mei va la rawh,"" tia thu a pek in, a ni chu a va lut a, tawlailir ke bulah chuan a ding ta a." 
Ezekiel10:7 Tin, cherub chuan, cherub-ho inkar atang chuan, cherub-ho inkara mei awm chu a han ban a, a la a, puan zai sin sin kutah chuan a pe a, ani chuan a lo la a, a chhuak ta a." 
Ezekiel10:8 Tin, cherub-ho chu an thla hnuaiah mihring kut ang mai hi a lo lang a." 
Ezekiel10:9 Tin, ka han en a, ngai teh, cherub-ho sirah chuan tawlailir ke pali, cherub pakhat kiangah, tawlailir ke pakhat, cherub dang kiangah tawlailir dang ka hmu a; tin, tawlailir ke landan chu Tarsis lung zia ang hi a ni a." 
Ezekiel10:10 Tin, an lanziaah chuan an paliin ang khat an ni a tawlailir ke pakhat chhunga tawlailir ke dang awm ang mai hi a ni a." 
Ezekiel10:11 An kal chuan sir liah an kal thei a, An kal pawhin an her ngai lo; amaherawhchu a hmasa hawi lam apiang an zui a ni, an kalin an her chuang lo." 
Ezekiel10:12 Tin, an taksa pum chu an hnungte, an kutte, an thlate leh tawlailir kete pawh kha a velin mitin a khat a, an palia tawlailir kete pawh kha." 
Ezekiel10:13 A tawlailir kete kha chu ka beng hriat ngeiah, ""tawlailir ke vir' tih a ni." 
Ezekiel10:14 Tin, mittinin hmel pali theuh an nei a, hmel pakhat chu cherub hmel a ni a, pahnihna chu mihring hmel a ni a, pathumna chu sakeibaknei hmel, palina chu mupui hmel a ni a." 
Ezekiel10:15 Tin, cherub-ho chu an chho ta a;hei hi Kebar lui kama thilnung ka hmuh chu a ni." 
Ezekiel10:16 Tin, cherub-ho an kal chuan tawlailir kete chu an kiangah a kal ve a; tin, cherub-ho khan lei ata chho tur a an thlate an zar chuan tawlailir kete chuan a hransan ngai lo a." 
Ezekiel10:17 An din chuan hengte hi an ding ve a, An chhoh chuan hengte hi an chho ve thin a, thilnung thlarau chu anmahniah a awm si a." 
Ezekiel10:18 Tin, LALPA ropuina chu in pui kawngka chung atang chuan a chhuak a, cherub-ho chungah chuan a ding ta a." 
Ezekiel10:19 Tin, cherub-ho chuanan thla an zar a, an chhuahin ka mithmuh ngeiah lei ata an chho a; tawlailir kete chu an kiangah a awm zel a: tin, LALPA in luhna chhaklam kawngkhar bulah chuan an ding ta a; Israel Pathian ropuina chu an chungah a awm a." 
Ezekiel10:20 Hei hi Kebar luia Israel Pathian hnuaia ka thilnung hmuh chu a ni; cherub-ho an ni tih ka hria. 
Ezekiel10:21 Mittinin hmel hrang pali leh thla pali an nei theuh a, an thla hnuaiah chuan mihring kut ang mai hi a awm a.Tin, an hmel lam thu-ah chuan Kebar luia ka hmuh hmelte ang bawk kha, an landan leh anmahni ngeite pawh an ni a; tin, an hmazawng zelin an kal theuh a." 
Ezekiel10:22 Tin, an hmel lam thu-ah chuan Kebar luia ka hmuh hmelte ang bawk kha, an landan leh anmahni ngeite pawh an ni a; tin, an hmazawng zelin an kal theuh a." 
Ezekiel11:1 Tin, thlarauin mi chawikanga, LALPA in chhaklam luhna, khawchhak chhawngah chuan mi thlen a: tin, ngai teh, luhna kawngkhar bulah chuan mi sawmhnih leh panga an lo awm a; an zingah chuan Azura fapa Jaazania leh Benaia fapa Paltia, mipui hotute chu, ka hmu a." 
Ezekiel11:2 Tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah, ""Mihring fapa, he'ng hi khawlohna phiar chhuak tute an ni a, he khawpuiah hian sual rawtchhuaktute an ni;" 
Ezekiel11:3 In sak hun a la ni lo e; he khawpui hi saso bel a ni a, keini hi a sa chu kan ni,' titute chu." 
Ezekiel11:4 Chuvangin thu sawi la, Aw mihring fapa, an chungah thu sawi rawh,"" a ti a" 
Ezekiel11:5 Tin, LALPA thlarau chu kan chungah a lo thleng a, ani chuan ka hnenah,""Sawi rawh, LALPA chuan heti hian a ti e:'Hetiangin in ti thin a, Aw Israel chhungte u, in rilrua thil lo thlengte chu ka hre fai vek si a." 
Ezekiel11:6 He khawpuiah hian in thlahte chu in tipung tulh tulh a, a kawtthlerte chu in mi thahin in ti khat ta a." 
Ezekiel11:7 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: I mi thah, a laia in dahte chu a sa chu a ni a; he khawpui hi a saso bel chu a ni, mahse a lai ata sawn chhuahin in awm ang." 
Ezekiel11:8 Khandaih chu in hlau a, in chungah khandaih ka rawn thlen ang, LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni:" 
Ezekiel11:9 A lai ata ka tichhuak ang che u a, hnamdangte kutah ka mantir ang che u a, in chung thu an rel ang." 
Ezekiel11:10 Khandaihin in thi ang a, Israel ramri lamah chuan in chungthu ka rel ang; Tichuan kei hi LALPA chu ka ni tih in hre tawh ang." 
Ezekiel11:11 He khawpui hi in saso bel a ni lo ang a, nangni lah a chhunga sa in ni hek lo vang; Israel ramri lamah chuan in chungthu ka rel ang a," 
Ezekiel11:12 LALPA chu ka ni tih in hre tawh ang; ka dan siam chu in zawh lo a, ka thu chhuak pawh in zawm hek lo; in vela hnamte tihdan chu in zawm ta zawk a,'a ti e,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel11:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, thu ka han sawi chuan Benaia fapa Palatia chu a lo thi ta mai a. Tichuan ka tlu bawkkhup a, aw ring takin ka au a,""A, LALPA PATHIAN! Israel awm chhunte chimihna i siam dawn em ni?"" ka ti a." 
Ezekiel11:14 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel11:15 Mihring fapa, i unaute, i chi i kuangte ngei leh Israel chhungte zawng zawng an zain, Jerusalem luahtuten'LALPA lak ata kal daih rawh u, he ram hi kan ta tura pek a ni tawh e,' an tihate kha an ni a." 
Ezekiel11:16 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Hla takah hnamte zingah ka sawn bo a, ram tam takah ka tidarh na a, rei lote chhungin an lo thlen na ramah chuan an tan hmun thianghlim ka ni ang, a ti a." 
Ezekiel11:17 Chuvangin LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Hnamdangte lak ata chu ka hruai khawm leh ang che u a, Israel ram chu ka pe ang che u." 
Ezekiel11:18 Tin, chutah chuan an lo kal ang a, thil bawlhhlawh zawng zawng leh thil tenawm zawng zawngte chuta ta chu an la bo ang." 
Ezekiel11:19 Tin, thinlung hmunkhat ka siamsak ang che u a, rilru thar ka pe ang che u. Tin, an tisa ata thinlung sak chu ka la bo ang a, thinlung nem an hnenah ka pe ang;" 
Ezekiel11:20 ka dan siamte an zawma, ka thuruatte an vawna, an tih theihna'n. Tichuan ka mite an ni ang a, kei pawh an pathian ka ni ang." 
Ezekiel11:21 An bawlhhlawhna leh an tenawmna rilmu thinlunga la zawmte erawh chu an sual mawh chu a burin ka khumtir ang,"" LALPA'n a ti." 
Ezekiel11:22 Tichuan cherub-ho chuan an thlate an zar a, an kiangah chuan tawlailir kete a awm a; tin, Israelte Pathian ropuina chu an chungah a awm a." 
Ezekiel11:23 Tin, LALPA ropuina chu khawpui lai atangin a chho a, khawpui chhak lampanga tlang sangah chuan a han ding ta a." 
Ezekiel11:24 Tin, thlarau chuan mi chawikang ta a, inlarnaah chuan Pathian thlarauin Kaldai ram a sal tangte hnenah chuan mi thlen a. Chutichuan ka inlarna hmuh chuan mi chhohsan ta a.Tichuan sal tangteho hnenah chuan LALPA thil mi entir zawng zawng chu ka sawi ta a." 
Ezekiel11:25 Tichuan sal tangteho hnenah chuan LALPA thil mi entir zawng zawng chu ka sawi ta a. 
Ezekiel12:1 LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel12:2 Mihring fapa, helhmang chhung, hmuhna tur mit neia hmu si lo, hriatna tur beng neia hre si lo zingah i awm a ni, helhmang chhung an ni reng si a." 
Ezekiel12:3 Chuvangin nang mihring fapa, sal tannaa kal tur angin i bungruate tel fel la, chhun engah an mit hmuh ngeiah kal chhuak rawh; an hmuh ngeiah i hmun ata hmun dangah i kal chhuak tur a ni: helhmang chhung an ni na a, an inngaihtuah phah mahna." 
Ezekiel12:4 Tin, i bungrua chu chhun engah an mithmuh ngeiah sal tang kal tur bungraw lakin i la chhuak ang a, nangmah ngei pawh an mit hmuhah ram danga thawn bo tur kalin i kal tur a ni." 
Ezekiel12:5 An mithmuh ngeiah kulh bang chu tipawp la, tah chuan la chhuak rawh." 
Ezekiel12:6 An mithmuh ngeiah i kovah i pu ang a, thimah i kal chhuak tur a ni; lei i hmuh lohna'n i hmai i khuh tur a ni; Israel chhungte tan entir lawknaah ka siam che a ni si a,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel12:7 Tin, thu mi pek ang chuan ka ti ta a; ka bungrua chu sal tang tur bungrua angin chhun engah ka la chhuak a, ka kutin bang chu tlaiah ka tipawp a, thimah ka la chhuak a, an mithmuh ngeiah ka pu a." 
Ezekiel12:8 Tin, zingah chuan LALPA thu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel12:9 Mihring fapa, Israel chhung, helhmang chhungte chuan i hnenah, 'Engnge i tih le?' an ti che a ni lo em ni?" 
Ezekiel12:10 An hnenah chuan LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti: he thu puan hi Jerusalem hotute leh Israel chhungkaw pumpui, an awmna mite chung thu tur a ni." 
Ezekiel12:11 In tan entir lawkna ka nih hi, ka tih ang tak hian an chungah tih a ni ang; thawn boin, saltang turin an kal ang, ti rawh." 
Ezekiel12:12 Tin, an zinga hotu awm chuan thim hnuaiah a koin a pu ang a, a kal chhuak ang: an lak chhuahna'n bang chu an titlang ang a, a mitin ram chu a hmuh tawh loh avangin a hmai a khuh tur a ni." 
Ezekiel12:13 Amah chu ka lenin ka khuh ang a, ka thanga awk a ni ang: Kaldai rama Babulon-ah chuan ka rawn hruai ang a, tah chuan a thi dawn na a, hmuh chu a hmu lo ang." 
Ezekiel12:14 Amah pui tura a kianga awm thinte leh a vengtute zawng zawng ram tinah ka tidarh ang a, khandaih phawiin ka um ang." 
Ezekiel12:15 Tin, hnamte zinga ka hnawh darh a, ram tina ka tihdarh hunah chuan LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel12:16 Amaherawhchu khandaih te, tam te, hripui te lakah chuan mi tlem te ka zuah ang; chungte chuan an lo kalna rama hnamte hnenah chuan an tenawmna zawng zawng chu an puanna'n; tin, kei LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel12:17 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel12:18 Mihring fapa, i chaw chu khur hlawk hlawk chungin ei la, i tui chu manganga khur chungin in rawh;" 
Ezekiel12:19 tin, rama mite hnenah chuan, LALPA PATHIAN chuan Jerusalema chengte" 
Ezekiel12:20 Tin, mi chenna khawpuite chu a tiau vang a, a ram chu tihramin a awm ang a, tichuan LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang"" tiin sawi rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel12:21 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel12:22 Mihring fapa, Israel rama he thufing tawi in neih hi eng tih na nge ni?'Ni khua a lo reiin inlarna apiang a thlawn leh mai thin' in tih hi." 
Ezekiel12:23 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: he thufing tawi hi ka ti bang a, Israel ramah thufing tawiah an hmang tawh ngai lo ang; ni chu a hnai tawh a, inlarna tin, thlen dik ni tur chu, tiin an hnenah sawi zawk rawh." 
Ezekiel12:24 Israel chhungte zingah inlarna lo-thlawn reng reng leh thumvawr tha lama sawisak derna reng reng a awm tawh lo ang. 
Ezekiel12:25 LALPA chu ka ni si a, ka sawi ang a, ka thusawi chu hlen nghal a ni ang a, khek a ni lo ang. Aw helhmang chhungte u, in dam lai ngei hian thu ka sawi dawn a, ka tihlen dawn si a, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel12:26 LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel12:27 Mihring fapa, ngai rawh, Israel chhungtea mi chuan,'Inlarnaa hmuhte chu nakina mi tur an ni a, a sawi lawkte pawh hla taka mi tur an ni,' an ti a ni.Chuvangin an hnenah chuan, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni:'Ka thu engmah hi khek a ni lo ang a, ka thusawi apiang chu hlenin a awm zel zawk ang,' tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni tiin hrilh rawh,"" a ti a" 
Ezekiel12:28 Chuvangin an hnenah chuan, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni:'Ka thu engmah hi khek a ni lo ang a, ka thusawi apiang chu hlenin a awm zel zawk ang,' tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni tiin hrilh rawh,"" a ti a" 
Ezekiel13:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel13:2 Mihring fapa, Israel zawlnei, mahni thinlung mai ata sawi hmangte chungah chuan thu sawi la, LALPA thu chu ngai rawh u," 
Ezekiel13:3 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Zawlnei a, mahni ngaihdan zuia, engmah hmu si lote chu an chung a pik e!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Aw Israel, i zawlneite chu khawram sihal ang chauh an ni ta." 
Ezekiel13:5 LALPA nia indonaa ding zo turin a ralti lai in tawn ngam lo a, Israel chhungte humhalhnaah in tangkai hek lo." 
Ezekiel13:6 LALPA thuchhuak a ni ti tu chuan engmah lo mai leh sawi lawkna lem mai an chang a, LALPA tirh an ni lo reng reng a ni; an thu chu ni ngei tur angin mite an rintir a." 
Ezekiel13:7 Inlarna lo-thlawn mai in hmuhin thusawi lawk diklo in sawi a ni lo'm ni? LALPA thu chhuak a ni, in la ti leh nghal si a,kei chuan ka sawi tawp si lo a." 
Ezekiel13:8 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: engmah lo mai in sawi a dawtmai in hmuh avangin, ngai rawh u, ka dodal che u a ni tih hi LALPA thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel13:9 Tin, ka kut hian engmah lo hmutute leh dawt sawi lawktute a dodal ang a, ka mite inrawn khawmnaah an tel lo ang a, Israel chhungte hming ziakin an awm hek lo vang; tichuan LALPA PATHIAN chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel13:10 Muanna awm si lo a,'A muanawm e' tia ka mite an hruai bo avang leh mi bang siama hawlrivap an hnawih mai avangin," 
Ezekiel13:11 hawlrivap hnawihtute hnenah chuan'A tla leh mai ang, ruahpui a lo sur ang a, nangni rial lianpui te u, in lo tla ang a, thli nasa takin a tichhia ang,' ti rawh." 
Ezekiel13:12 Tin, ngai rawh u, bang chu a chim hnu chuan,'In hawlrivap hnawih chu khawiah nge?' an ti dawn lo che u em ni?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ka thinurin thlipui nasa takin ka tichhe vek ang, ka thinurin ruahpui a lo sur ang a, ka thinurin rial nasa tak tiral turin a lo tla ang." 
Ezekiel13:14 Tichuan hawlrivap in hnawih var bang kha ka tichim ang a, lei thlengin a sawp ang a, chutichuan a lungphumte pawh a lang hial ang: tin, a chim ang a, bang chimah chuan ithboralin in awm ang; tichuan LALPA ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel13:15 Hetiang hian bang chungah leh hawlrivap hnawihtute chungah ka thinur ka hrithla ang; tin,'Bang chu a awm tawh lo a, a bel tute pawh an awm tawh hek lo,' ka la ti ang che u." 
Ezekiel13:16 Chu chu Israel zawl nei Jerusalem chung thu sawia, muanna awm si loa muanna hmuhsaktute ngei kha, an awm ta lo, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel13:17 Tin, nang mihring fapa, i mite fanute, an thinlung maia sawitute chu hmachhawn la, anmahni kalhin thu sawi rawh," 
Ezekiel13:18 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: hmeichhia, mite bana thil buntir leh mi nunnate man behna'na milian mite lu khuhna thuitute chu an chung a pik e! Mahni nunna turin ka mite nunna in man ang maw?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Barli tlemte leh chhang tlem hmu tura thi lo tur ti thi tur leh nung lo tur tinung tur in in dawt sawi ka miten an awih avangin ka mite zingah ka hming in tibawrhbang a ni. 
Ezekiel13:20 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hhian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, mi nunna, sava anga man tura in thil buntirte chu ka hua a ni; in bante chu ka pawt chhum vek ang a, in mi man turate nunna chu ka chhuah vek ang; sava anga in man turate nuna ngei chu." 
Ezekiel13:21 In lu khuhnate pawh chu ka pawtthler ang a, ka mite chu in kut ata ka chhuah ang a, in man theih turin in kutah an awm tawh lo ang; tichuan LALPA chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel13:22 Keia tih lungngaih ni lo a, mifelte thinlung dawtin in tihnat avang leh mi suaksual chu nungdama a awmna tura a sualna kawng ata lamlet lohna turin mi suaksual kutte chu i ti chak a,Chuvangin engmah lo mai, thu sawi lawk dik lo emaw chu in hmu tawh reng reng lo vang; tin, ka mite chu in kut ata ka chhan chhuak ang a, LALPA chu ka ni tih in hria ang, a ti,' tiin sawi rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel13:23 Chuvangin engmah lo mai, thu sawi lawk dik lo emaw chu in hmu tawh reng reng lo vang; tin, ka mite chu in kut ata ka chhan chhuak ang a, LALPA chu ka ni tih in hria ang, a ti,' tiin sawi rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel14:1 Tichuan Israel upa thenkhatte chu ka hnenah an lo kal a, ka hmaah an thu a." 
Ezekiel14:2 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng ta a," 
Ezekiel14:3 Mihring fapa he'ng mite hian an milemte chu an thinlungah an la lut a, an hmaah an khawlohna tlukna chu an dah a ni; kei mi rawn tur an ni teh reng em ni?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Chuvangin anmahni bia la, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni:'Israel chhungkuaa mitin an thinlunga an milim la lut a, an hmaa an khawlohna tlukna dah a, zawlnei hnena lo kal apiang kei LALPA hian an milim tamzia ang zelin ka chhang ang;" 
Ezekiel14:5 Israel chhungte chu an milim avanga min lo hransan tak avangin an thinlung takah ka man theihna'n 
Ezekiel14:6 Chuvangin Israel chhungte hnenah chuan, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: a Lo kir u la, in milimte lakah chuan lo kir u la, in tenawmna zawng zawng chu hawisan rawh u." 
Ezekiel14:7 Israel chhung zinga mi tu pawh emaw, mikhual Israel rama cheng ve emaw, ka laka intihranga, an thinlunga milim la luta, an hmaa khawlohna dah chunga, an chungchanga mi rawn tura zawlnei hnena kal chu kei LALPA ngei hian ka chhang mai ang." 
Ezekiel14:8 Chumi chu ka hma chhawn ang a, mi mak tih atan kumkhaw tlaitluana hrilhfak turin ka mite zing ata ka ti bo daih ang; tichuan kei hi LALPA chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel14:9 Tin, zawlnei chuan buma awmin thu sawi se la, kei LALPA hian zawlnei chu ka bum a ni a, a chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, ka mi Israelte zing ata ka tiboaral ang." 
Ezekiel14:10 Tin, an khawlohna chu an phur ang: zawlnei khawlohna chu amah rawntute khawlohna ang mai a ni ang;" 
Ezekiel14:11 Israel chhungte chu ka laka an bo tawh loh a, an bawhchhiatna te zawng zawnga an intihbawlhhlawh tawh lohna'n, ka mite an nih tawh zawka an pathian ka nih theih nan, LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni,' tiin sawi rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel14:12 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel14:13 Mihring fapa, ram miten bawhchhiatna thil tia, ka chunga thil tisuala, keiin ka kut ka lek a, an chaw, nunna bul chu ka tihchhiata, an chunga tam ka tlentira, mi leh sa te ka rawn tih bo chuan," 
Ezekiel14:14 he'ng mi pathum, Nova, Daniela leh Joba te meuh pawh hi lo awm ta ang se la, an falnain anmahni nunna chauh an chhanhim tur a ni, tih hi LALPA Pathian thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel14:14 he'ng mi pathum, Nova, Daniela leh Joba te meuh pawh hi lo awm ta ang se la, an falnain anmahni nunna chauh an chhanhim tur a ni, tih hi LALPA Pathian thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel14:14 he'ng mi pathum, Nova, Daniela leh Joba te meuh pawh hi lo awm ta ang se la, an falnain anmahni nunna chauh an chhanhim tur a ni, tih hi LALPA Pathian thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel14:15 Ramsa kawlhte an ram ka fan chhuahtira, ram chu an tihchhiat a, a lo tiau a, ramsa avanga tumah kal tlang tur an awm loh chuan," 
Ezekiel14:16 he'ng mi pathumte hi awm mah se la, a nuna ka nun chhung chu, tih hi LALPA Pathian thu chhuak a ni, an fanute, an fapate an chhanhim chuang lo ang; anmahni chauh chu chhanhimin an awm ang a, ram chu a tiau tho ang." 
Ezekiel14:17 A nih leh, chu ramah chuan khandaih ka rawn leka,'Khandaih, che rawh,' ka tih chuan mi leh sa chu ka rawt bo a ni ang a," 
Ezekiel14:18 he'ng mi pathumte hi awm mah se la, a nuna ka nun chhung chu, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni a, an fanute, an fapate an chhanhim chuang lo ang a, anmahni nunna chauh chhanhimin a awm ang." 
Ezekiel14:19 A nih leh, chu ramah chuan, hripui ka rawn lentir a, mi leh sa tibo tura, thisen chhuaha ka thinurna chu ram chunga ka rawn leih chuan," 
Ezekiel14:20 Nova, Daniela leh Joba te meuh pawh hi lo awm mah se la, a nuna ka nun chhung chu, tih hi LALPA pathian thu chhuak a ni, an fanu emaw, an fapa emaw an chhanhim lo ang a, an felnain anmahni nunna ngei an chhanhim chauh ang." 
Ezekiel14:20 Nova, Daniela leh Joba te meuh pawh hi lo awm mah se la, a nuna ka nun chhung chu, tih hi LALPA pathian thu chhuak a ni, an fanu emaw, an fapa emaw an chhanhim lo ang a, an felnain anmahni nunna ngei an chhanhim chauh ang." 
Ezekiel14:20 Nova, Daniela leh Joba te meuh pawh hi lo awm mah se la, a nuna ka nun chhung chu, tih hi LALPA pathian thu chhuak a ni, an fanu emaw, an fapa emaw an chhanhim lo ang a, an felnain anmahni nunna ngei an chhanhim chauh ang." 
Ezekiel14:21 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti si a: Jerusalem chunga ka rorelna na tak pali, khandaih te, tam te, ramsa kawlhte, hripui te, mi leh sa rawt bo vek tura ka rawn thlen kim hunah chuan eng tia nasa tak ni ang maw?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Amaherawhchu, ngai teh, chutah chuan awm chhun hruai chhuah tur te chu hnutchhiahin an awm ang a, fanute leh fapate pawh: ngai teh u, in hnenah an lo chhuak ang a, an awmdan leh an thil tih in hmu ang a, tin, Jerusalem chunga thil tha lo ka rawn thlen thuah chuan thlamuanin in awm ang a, a chunga ka rawh thlen tak zawng zawng thuah pawh.An awm dan leh an thiltihte i hmuh hunah chuan an thlamuan ang che u; a chunga ka thiltih tak zawng zawng chu tih chhan nei loin ka ti lo tih in hria ang' tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel14:23 An awm dan leh an thiltihte i hmuh hunah chuan an thlamuan ang che u; a chunga ka thiltih tak zawng zawng chu tih chhan nei loin ka ti lo tih in hria ang' tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel15:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel15:2 Mihring fapa ngaw hnuaia thing zinga grep hrui chu Thingdang aiin eng nge a nih le? 
Ezekiel15:3 A thing thil siamna'na hman a ni em? Bungbel tarna'n pawh tu in nge hmang ngai le? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ngai rawh meiah paih luh a ni thin a, fawhkaia'n Meiin a kang ral a, a hmawr tuakah, A kang zo mai thin, a laiah chuan, A nei reng em ni? tangkaina?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Ngai teh, atangkai lo, a him lai mahin A va tangkai dawn lo e, a kan hnuin" 
Ezekiel15:6 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti'n a ti: Ramhnuai thing zinga grep hruite, Fawhkai atan meiah ka tuah mai ang chuan, Jerusalem luahtute chu ka siam ang." 
Ezekiel15:7 Anmahni chu ka hmachhawn ang a, Chhuak teh mah se la, mei ata chu, A kang zo tho ang e, meiah chuan. LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang, Anmahni ka hmachhawn hunah chuan.Ka titiau ngei dawn e, an ram chu, Khawlohna an tih tak avangin, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni e,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ka titiau ngei dawn e, an ram chu, Khawlohna an tih tak avangin, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni e,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel16:1 LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel16:2 Mihring fapa, Jerusalem chu a tenawmnate hriatchhuahtir la, a hnenah," 
Ezekiel16:3 LALPA PATHIAN chuan Jerusalem hnenah chun heti hian a ti a ni: I chhuahna ram leh i pianna ram chu Kanan mite ram a ni a, i pa chu Amor mi a ni a, i nu chu Hit mi a ni." 
Ezekiel16:4 Tin, i pianna thuah chuan i pian ni in i lai hruiah a ni lo a, tifai tur chein tuia bual i ni hek lo." 
Ezekiel16:5 Lainat tur che a i chunga he'ng hi ti turin tu mit mahin a khawngaih lo che a: tamlakah paih chhuah i ni ta zawk a, i pian ni ata kha lungten i ni si a." 
Ezekiel16:6 Tin, i kianga ka lo kalin thisena talin ka hmu chia, a ni ka ti che a ni; thisenah awm mah la nung rawh." 
Ezekiel16:7 Ram thil kuhmum angin ka ti thang lian chia, tin, i thang lian a, khua i mawi ta a; i hnute a lo um a, i sam a lo tha a; ruak leh saruak mai i la ni tho a," 
Ezekiel16:8 Tin, i kianga ka lo kala ka en chein, ngaih la tham i lo ni ta a, ka puan ka zawn chia, ka saruak chu ka khuh tawh a che: a ni, i hnenah chhia ka chham a, thuthlungah ka luh pui ta chia, ka ta i ni ta e, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:9 Tichuan tuiin ka bual tawh chia, a ni, i thisen chu ka silfai sak var chia, hriak ka hnawih ta che a ni." 
Ezekiel16:10 Puan cheiin ka thuam chia, savun tha mi pheikhawk ka buntir chia, puan zai sinin ka tuam chia, maimaw puan ka khumtir che a ni."
