Ezekiel16:11 Cheimawinain ka chei chia, i kutah banbun te, i nghawngah rangkachak khaidiat te," 
Ezekiel16:12 i hnarah hnar vuah te, i bengah bengbehte, i lu-ah lallukhum mawi tak tein ka chei chia." 
Ezekiel16:13 Tichuan rangkachak leh tangkarua cheimawi i ni ta a, i silhfen chu puan zai sin tak leh maimaw puan leh puan thui mawi a ni a; i ei chu chhangphut dip leh khawizu leh hriak a ni, i mawi em mai, lalnu pawh i tling ta." 
Ezekiel16:14 I mawina hnamte zingah a thang chhuak a, ka ropuinaa thuamin i famkim ta, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:15 Mahse mawina chu i ring lutuk a, i hmingthanna chu i hur phah a, mi veivak na zawng hnenah i hurna chu i tlangphal a, a tuapawh." 
Ezekiel16:16 I silhfente hlipin bawlhmunte i cheimawi a, tah chuan i phalrai a, hetiang hian a awm leh tawh ngai lo ang." 
Ezekiel16:17 Ka rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbel mawi tak tak ka pek che kha i la a, mipa lem siamna'n i hmang a, i hurpui ta." 
Ezekiel16:18 I silhfen thuimawite chu i la a, anmahni i tuam a, ka hriak te leh ka rimtuite chu an hmaah i hung a." 
Ezekiel16:19 Ka chhang pek che pawh kha chhangphut tha leh hriak leh khawizu ka chawmna Thin te che kha rimtui atan an hmaah i hlui a; heti hi a lo ni ta a, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:20 Chu loah pawh i fanu, i fapa, mi hrinsakte chu an hnenah in thawina'na hmanral atan i pe a: i hurna hi thil namen a ni em ni?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Ka fate i that a, meipuia paih lutin an hnena i hlan te hi?" 
Ezekiel16:22 I tenawmna leh i hurna zawng zawngah chuan i naupan laia saruaka i awm leh i thisen i tal mai mai lai te kha i hre ta lo a. 
Ezekiel16:23 Tin, he'ng i suahsualna zawng zawng hnuah pawh, heti hi a lo ni a, (i chung a pik e! a pik e! LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni)" 
Ezekiel16:24 hmun langsarte i in siam a, kawtthler tinah hmun sangte chu i tan i sa a." 
Ezekiel16:25 Kawtthler lu apiangah hmun langsarte chu i sa a, i mawina chu i tenawmnaah i siam a, veivak apiang hnenah i hlim lang a, i hurna chu a zual thin a ni." 
Ezekiel16:26 Aigupta mi, i thenawm, mi rawva tak mai nen chuan in ngaihna sual i ti ta bawk a; mi tithinur turin i hurna chu a ti zual ta a ni." 
Ezekiel16:27 Chuvangin ngai rawh, i chungah ka kut ka lek a, i chaw pangngai chu ka tikiam a, nangmah hawtu Philistia fanu, i hur dan zahpui em em thin tu hnenah chuan duh duha a tihah ka pe tawh che a." 
Ezekiel16:28 Assuria mite hnenah pawh i hur bo a, tawk tih lem nei hek lo che; a ni, an hnenah i in phalrai a, i la kham chuang hek lo." 
Ezekiel16:29 Kanan ramah, Kaldai mite hnena i hurna i latizual ta cheu a, i la kham chuang lo fo." 
Ezekiel16:30 I thinlung chu a khawlo ta mang e-i chetziaah hmeichhe luhlul sual tak mai thil i ti a, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:31 Kawtthler lu apianga channa buk i siamah te, kawtthler tina hmun langsar i siamah te hian hlawh i um loh avangin nawhchizuar mai pawh i ni lo e." 
Ezekiel16:32 Nupui uire, pasal te aia mi hrante duh zawktu nu!" 
Ezekiel16:33 Nawhchizuar hnenah chuan thil an pe thin a, nang erawh chuan i pe zawk thin-a duhtu che ter hnenah, ram tin, ata an lo kal a, an mutpui theihna'n che i tlawn zawk thin a ni." 
Ezekiel16:34 Tin, i hur thua tuma'n an pan lo che hi mi nangmahin a man i pe zawk a, tumahin man an pek loh che hi mi hur dang laka i lamdanna chu a ni; nangmahin a man i pe zawk a, tumahin man an pek loh che hi i danglamna chu a ni." 
Ezekiel16:35 Chuvangin aw mi hur nu, LALPA thu chu ngai rawh:" 
Ezekiel16:36 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: I tenawmna leih chhuah a niha, i ngaihte nen in inpawlna lama i saruakna thilhlan anih avang leh an hnena i pek i fate thisen avangin," 
Ezekiel16:37 Ngai rawh, nangmah ngaitu i nuamtawlpuite zawng zawng leh i lo ngaih tak zawng zawngte leh i huatzawng zawngte chu ka ko khawm ang a, ni, i velah ka hruai khawm ang a, i saruakna zawng zawng an hmuh theihna'n an hnenah i saruakna chu ka ti lang ang." 
Ezekiel16:38 Tin, hmeichhia pasal thena, mahni fa thisen chhuah chungthu an rel angin i chung thu chu ka rel ang che; thinurna leh thikna chu i chungah ka rawn thlen ang." 
Ezekiel16:39 An kutah ka pe ang chia, i hmun langsarte chu an titlu ang a, i hmun sangte chu an tisawp ang; i silhfente an hlip ang a, i lunghlute an chhuhsak ang chia, saruak leh ruakin an hluihlawn ang che." 
Ezekiel16:40 I chungah tlang an pun ang a, lungin an deng ang chia, khandaihin an chiu tlang ang che." 
Ezekiel16:41 I in te chu meiin an hal ang a, hmeichhe tam tak mithmuhah i chungah rorelna an hlen ang; i hur hi ka tireh ang a, hlawh pawh i phal tawh lo ang." 
Ezekiel16:42 Tichuan ka thinurna i chungah ka hrithla zo ang a, ka thikna che chu a reh tawh ang a, ka ngawi hle hle ang a, ka thinur tawh ngai lo ang." 
Ezekiel16:43 I tleirawl lai nite chu i hriat reng loh a, he'ng thilah te hian mi tihvui tak zawk avangin ngai rawh, i chetzia ang ang, i chungah ka thlen ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni: tin, i tenawmna zawng zawng belhchhahin he hurna hi i ti tawh lo ang." 
Ezekiel16:44 Ngai rawh, thufing tawi hmang apiangin he thufing tawi hi an hmang ang,' A fanuin a nu a chhun' tih hi." 
Ezekiel16:45 I nu, mahni pasal leh fate lungtentu fanu kha i ni a, inlaizawnna lamah chuan, mahni pasal leh fate lungtentu laizawn i ni: i nu lah Hit mi a ni a, i pa lah Amor mi a ni." 
Ezekiel16:46 Tin, i laizawn, i u chu samaria, i veilama cheng thin kha amah leh a fanute nen an ni; i laizawn, i nau lah chu, i dinglama cheng thin kha Sadom leh a fanute an ni." 
Ezekiel16:47 Mahse anmahni awmdan chu i zawh lo a, an tenawmna ang i ti lo na a, i awmdan zawng zawnga i khawloh zawk zia ngaihtuahin chung chu engmah tham a ni lo." 
Ezekiel16:48 A nuna ka nun chhung chu, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni, nang leh i faten an tih ang hi i laizawn Sadom leh a fanute pawhin an ti hauh lo." 
Ezekiel16:49 I laizawn Sadom khawlohna chu he'ng hi a ni: Chapona te, eipuar lutuk te, amah leh a fanute nuam tawlna mai mai te a ni a, mi retheite leh tlachhamte chu a pui chuang hek lo." 
Ezekiel16:50 Tin, mi chapo tak an ni a, ka hmaa thil tenawm ti tawh an ni; tichuan tha la tih angin ka ti bo hlawm tawh a ni." 
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria lah chuan i sual chanve pawh a ti hek lo; anmahni aiin i tenawmnate i tih nasat zawk avangin i laizawnte chu i tilang ta zawk a ni. 
Ezekiel16:52 I laizawn te dik zawk a i lantir avangin nang ngeiin i mualphona chu i phur tur a ni; anmahni aiin thil tenawm nasa zawkte i ti a, i sualna te avangin anni chu nang aiin an fel zawk a ni; a ni, i laizawn te fel zawka i lantirnaah hian nangchuan kimkiin mualphona i chang tur a ni." 
Ezekiel16:53 Tin, an awm dan, Sadom leh a fanu awmdan te, samaria leh a fanu awmdan te, anmahni rualin nangma awmdan ngei pawh ka let ang;" 
Ezekiel16:54 an tan thlamuanna i lo nih thinnaa i thiltih tak zawng zawng avanga i zah theih nan. 
Ezekiel16:55 Tin, i laizawn, Sadom leh a fanute, Samaria leh a fanute chu an awmdan hmasa angin an awm leh ang; nang leh i fanute pawh in awmdan hmasa angin in awm leh ang." 
Ezekiel16:56 I suahsualna hmuh chhuah a nih hmaa i intihropui niahte khan i laizawn Sadom chu i kamchhe tleuhna a ni thin lo em ni? 
Ezekiel16:57 Tunah zawng Suria fanu leh a vela mi zawng zawng, Philistia fanute i vela tinawmnahtu che khan an sawi an sawi chhiat tak vak che hi." 
Ezekiel16:58 I hurna leh i tenawmna i pu zel a ni, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:59 Tichuan LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti: Thuthlung bawhchhiain thutiam i pawisak lohzia ang zelin i chungah ka ti ve dawn a ni. 
Ezekiel16:60 Nimahsela i naupan laia i hnena ka thuthlung chu ka hre reng ang a, i hnenah kum khaw thuthlung ka siam ang." 
Ezekiel16:61 Tichuan i laizawnte, i u leh i naute i pawm hunah chuan i awmdan te i lo hre chhuak ang a, i in zahpui ang: anni chu i fanu atan ka pe chia, i thuthlung avang erawh chuan ni loin." 
Ezekiel16:62 I hnena ka thuthlung ka tinghet ang a, LALPA ka ni tih in hre tawh ang.I thiltih zawng zawngte ka ngaihdam vek hunah che chuan i hriat renga i zah avanga kimkia i ka i an ngai tawh lohna'n,"" tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:63 I thiltih zawng zawngte ka ngaihdam vek hunah che chuan i hriat renga i zah avanga kimkia i ka i an ngai tawh lohna'n,"" tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel17:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel17:2 Mihring fapa, Israel chhungte hnenah chuan thu kherkhiap siam chhuak la, tehkhin thuin sawi rawh," 
Ezekiel17:3 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni, ti rawh:'Mupui lian tak, thla hlai pui, thla ki sei tak, tial buai, hmul bit tak Lebanon tlangah a thlawk a, sidar thing zik a la a," 
Ezekiel17:4 a tang zik no ber chu a thliak a, mi veivahna ramah a thlawhpui a, sumdawnna khawpuiah chuan a phun ta a." 
Ezekiel17:5 Chumi ram thlai chi chu a la bawk a, lei thaah chuan a kui tiak a, tui tam tak kamah chuan a phun ta a, tuipuisuthlah angin a phun a." 
Ezekiel17:6 Tin, a thang a, grep hrui tawi tak a lo ni ta a; a zarte chu a lo zam let a, a zungte chu a hnuaiah a awm a; tichuan grep kung a lo ni a, pengte a rawn chhuah a, a tang chu a lo chawr ta a." 
Ezekiel17:7 Mupui lian tak dang a awm bawk a,thla hlai pui leh hmul bit tak a nei ve a,tin, ngai rawh, he grep kung hi ama lamah khan a zung a zam a; a phunna hmun atang khan ama lamah pengte a chawr chhuak ta a, amah chu tuiin a chawm theihna'n." 
Ezekiel17:8 Pengte a chhuah a, grep tha tak a nih theihna'n tui tam tak kama lei thaa phun a ni." 
Ezekiel17:9 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: A puitling hlen dawn em? A vuai mai theihna'n a rah te sat thlain, a zung chawpin a pawt chhuak dawn lo'm ni? A hnah chawr thar zawng zawng pawhin a vuai phah ang; a zung chawpa pawt chhuak turin thiltihtheihna nasa tak emaw, mipui tam tak emaw a ngai chuang dawn em ni?" 
Ezekiel17:10 A ni, ngai rawh, phun mah ni se la, a puitling hlen dawn em ni? khawchhak thliin a rawn nuai hunah chuan a vuai zo mai dawn lo'm ni? A tona hmun ngeiah chuan a vuai mai ang, ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel17:11 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel17:12 Helhmang chhungte hnenah chuan sawi rawh, he thil awmzia hi an hre lo em ni? Hrilh rawh, ngai rawh u, Babulon lal chu Jerusalemah a lo kal a, an lal leh hotute chu a man a, ama hnenah Babulon-ah a hruai a," 
Ezekiel17:13 an lal thlah pakhat a man a, thuthlung a siampui a, thu a tiam luihtir a, rama miliante chu a hruai bo vek a;" 
Ezekiel17:14 a lalna ram a tlawma, amaha a din chhuah tawh lohna'n, a thuthlung vuan chung chauha a din theihna turin." 
Ezekiel17:15 Mahse sakawrte leh mi tam tak rawn tir tura dil turin Aigupta ramah palai tirin a chungah a hel ta a. A hlawhtling ang em? Thuthlung chu bawhchhe siin a chhuak tho ang em? 
Ezekiel17:16 A nuna ka nun chhung chu, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni; Lalber, lala siamtu chenna ngeiah chuan a chhechham te hmusit leha, a thuthlungte bawhchhiaa, ama hnen ngeiah Babulon-ah chuan a thi ang." 
Ezekiel17:17 Indonaa mi tam tak tihhlum tura mual pawngte leh kulhte an siam hunah pawh Pharaoa sipai rual leh pawl ropui tak pawh engmah an tihsak thei lo ang. 
Ezekiel17:18 Thuthlung bawhchhiain chhechham chu an hmusit ta si a; thu a in tiam hnuah he'ng thil zawng zawng hi a ti leh ta si a le, a chhuak awzawng lo ang." 
Ezekiel17:19 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ka chhechham a hmusit a, ka thuthlung a bawhchhia a, a nuna ka nun chhung chu, ama chungah ka tuan ngei ngei ang." 
Ezekiel17:20 Lenin ka khuh ang a, ka thangah chuan ka awk ang a. Babulonah ka rawn hruai ang a, tahchuan a bawh chhiatna te avang chuan amah ka bei ang." 
Ezekiel17:21 Tin, a pawl zawng zawnga tlanchhe ho zawng zawng chu khandaihin an thi ang a, a la bangte chu kawlkil tinah an darh ang: Tin, kei LALPA hian ka sawi tawh tih in hre chhuak ang." 
Ezekiel17:22 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Sidar sang tak zik chu kei hian ka la ng a, ka phun ang; A ziding bera zik no chu ka thliak ang a, Tlangsang langsar takah ka phun ang," 
Ezekiel17:23 Israel sanna tlangah chuan ka phun ang a, Zarte a rawn chhuah ang a, a lo rah ang a, sidar ropui tak a ni ang: A hnuaiah chuan chungleng sava chi tinreng an cheng ang a, A zar hlimah te chuan an awm ang.Tin, ram thing zawng zawngte chuan kei LALPA hian thing sangte ka tihniam a, thing hniamte chu ka tisang a, Thing hringte ka ti ro a, Thing ro te ka ti duah a ni, tih an hria ang: Kei LALPA hian ka sawi tawh a, ka ti tawh bawk a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel17:24 Tin, ram thing zawng zawngte chuan kei LALPA hian thing sangte ka tihniam a, thing hniamte chu ka tisang a, Thing hringte ka ti ro a, Thing ro te ka ti duah a ni, tih an hria ang: Kei LALPA hian ka sawi tawh a, ka ti tawh bawk a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel18:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel18:2 Israel ram chungchangah he thufing tawi an hnam hi eng tihna nge,'Pate chuan grep thur an ei a, an fate ha a tim e,' tih hi?" 
Ezekiel18:3 A nuna ka nun chhung chu, Israel-ah he thufing tawi hi hman leh tih in nei tawh lo ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel18:4 Ngai rawh u, nunna zawng zawng ka ta vek a ni, pa nunna ka ta a ni ang bawkin fapa nunna pawh ka ta a ni: thil tisual tu apiang an thi ang." 
Ezekiel18:5 Mahse mi chu a fela, thiang leh dik chauh a tiha," 
Ezekiel18:6 bawl hmunahte ei lo a, Israel chhungte milim lam hawi hek lo a, hmeichhe fel lo lai hnaih hek lo a," 
Ezekiel18:7 tuma chunga thilsual ti lo a, lei batu thil dahkham pe kir zawk a, tuma rawk lo a, riltam hnena eitur pea, saruak puan silhtira," 
Ezekiel18:8 a pung um tura puktir lo a, a pung pawh la hek lo a, thilsual ti tura a kut suma,mi leh mi inkara rorelna dik taka titlua," 
Ezekiel18:9 ka dan siamte zawh a, dik taka tia, ka rorelnate a vawn chuan mi fel a ni a, a nung ngei ang tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel18:10 Mahse fapa rukhmang a hrina, thisen chhuahtu a niha, hetiang reng reng hi a tiha," 
Ezekiel18:11 a tih tur zawk chu a tih loh a, bawlhmunahte ei zawka, a thenawm nupui a tihbawrbana," 
Ezekiel18:12 rethei leh tlachhamte a tihduhdaha, a rawk a, dahkham a pek kir lo a, milimte lam a hawia, thil tenawm a tiha," 
Ezekiel18:13 a pung um a peka, a pung a lak bawk chuan, a nung ang em? A nung tawp lo ang; he'ng thil tenawm zawng zawng hi a ti miau si a, a thi ngei ngei ang, ama thisen mawh chu a phur tur a ni." 
Ezekiel18:14 Tin, ngai rawh, fapa lo hring ve se la, a pa thil sual tih tawh zawng zawng kha a hmuha, a hlauh a, chutianga a tihve loh a," 
Ezekiel18:15 Bawlhmuna a ei loh a, Israel chhungte milim lam hawi lo a, a thenawm nupui a tihbawrhban loh a," 
Ezekiel18:16 tuma chunga thil a tih sual loh a, dahkham engmah la lo a, tumah rawk lo a, riltamte eitur pe zawka, saruakte puan a silhtira," 
Ezekiel18:17 rethei laka a kut a suma, a no leh a pung la lo a, ka thupekte hmanga ka dan siamte zawhtu a nih chuan, a pa khawlohna avangin a thi lo ang a, a nung ngei zawk tur a ni." 
Ezekiel18:18 A pa erawh zawng rawng taka mi a hnehchhiaha, a unaupa rawkrala beia, a mite zinga thil tha lo chu a tih avangin, ngai rawh a khawlohna avangin, a thi tur a ni." 
Ezekiel18:19 Mahse,'Engah nge fapa chuan a pa khawlohna a tuar loh vang?' in ti thin, fapa chuan dan chu zawma thi l fel a tiha, ka dan saimte zawng zawng chu a vawna, a tih bawk chuan a nung ngei tur alawm." 
Ezekiel18:20 Thil tisualtu chu a thi tur a ni: fapa chuan a pa khawlohna chu a tuar lo ang, pa pawhin fapa khawlohna chu a tuar hek lo ang: mi fel felna chu amahin a tel ang a, mi sual sualna chu amahin a phur ang." 
Ezekiel18:21 Amaherawhchu mi sual chuan a thil sual tih zawng zawngte a hawisana, ka dan siamte a vawn a, dan chu zawma thil fel a tih chuan a nung ngei ang, a thi lo ang." 
Ezekiel18:22 Bawhchhiatna a lo tih tawh reng reng kha chu hriatsak reng a ni tawh lo ang; a lo tih tawh a felnaah chuan a nung ang. 
Ezekiel18:23 Misual thihnaah hian lawmna reng ka nei em ni? A kawngte chu a hawisana, a nunna zawk lo chu? Tih chi LALPA PATHIAN tu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel18:24 Amaherawh chu mi fel chuan a felna kawng hawisana, khawlohnate a tiha misualte tih ang zela thil tenawmte a tihin a nung dawn em ni? A thil fel tih engmah kha hriatreng a ni tawh lo ang a, a bawhchhiatna a bawhchhiatah khan leh a sualna a tihnaah khan, chumi ngeiah chuan a thi ang." 
Ezekiel18:25 Mahse,'LALPA tih dan hi a in ang fo lo e,' in ti thin a. Israel chhungte u, ngai rawh u khai: ka tih dan a in ang fo lo em ni: In tih dan chu a in ang lo fo zawk a ni lo'm ni?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Mifel chuan a felnate a hawisana, khawlohnate a tih chuan tah chuan a thi ang a, khawlohna a tihah chuan a thi ang." 
Ezekiel18:27 Chu lo pawh chu, misualin a sualna a lo tih tawhte chu a hawisana, dan chu a zawma, thil fel a tih chuan a nunna a chhanhim ang." 
Ezekiel18:28 A in ngaihtuaha, a bawhchhiatna a lo tih tawh zawng zawng chu a hawisan avangin a nung ngei ang, a thi lo ang." 
Ezekiel18:29 Mahse Israel chhungte chuan,'LALPA tih dan chu a inang fo lo a,' an ti a. Aw Israel chhungte u, ka tih dante hi a in ang fo zawk lo'm ni? Nangni tih dante erawh chu a in ang lo fo zawk a ni lo'm ni?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Chuvangin aw Israel chhungte u, mi tin, nangmahni tih dan ang zelin ro ka rel ang che u, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni. Lamlet u la. In bawhchhiatna zawng zawngte chu hawisan rawh u; tichuan khawlohna chu in tluk chhiatna a ni dawn lo nia" 
Ezekiel18:31 In bawhchhiatna zawng zawng, in lo bawhchhiat tawhte chu paih bo vek u la, thinlung thar leh rilru thar insiam rawh u: Engah nge in thih ang le, aw Israel chhungte u?Mithihnaah chuan lawmna ka nei hauh silo a, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni: chuvangin in lamlet u la, nung rawh u." 
Ezekiel18:32 Mithihnaah chuan lawmna ka nei hauh silo a, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni: chuvangin in lamlet u la, nung rawh u." 
Ezekiel19:1 Chu loah pawh chuan Israel hotute chungchangah sunna hla phuah la," 
Ezekiel19:2 I nu eng nge a nih le? Sakeibakneipui a ni; A no a chawm, a bawk, sakeibaknei vanglaite zingah," 
Ezekiel19:3 A chawm tlei e, a no pakhat sakeibaknei vanglaiah, A lo thiam e, sa seh, mihring a hmang-chhun rawlah." 
Ezekiel19:4 Hnamten hriain, an dang thla e- khur thukah; Thir kawl an bun, Aigupta ram an thlen e" 
Ezekiel19:5 A chuni-nun a nghak thlawn, bei lo dawng e; A siam leh e, a hrai chawi dang, sakeibaknei vanglaia'n." 
Ezekiel19:6 A leng vel e, sakeibakneite zingah, sakeibaknei vanglai tha a lo ni e; A lo thiam e, sa seh, mihring a hmang chhun rawlah." 
Ezekiel19:7 A hrawng vel a, lal inte, khawpui a ti tiau ve; A rawl lian vangin a tiau zo, mi leh ram." 
Ezekiel19:8 Hnamtin khuavel lo pungin an bei chiam a, Len hrui an zar, an dang thla e khur thukah." 
Ezekiel19:9 Thir kawl bunin bawmah an khung, Babulon lal an hlan e. An thlen ta kulhpui chhungah, A thawm daihna'n-Israel tlang lianah." 
Ezekiel19:10 I chuni-nun grep huana tui chawm grep a iang e, Siktui thiang chawm, rah tha chhuak a zar luai e," 
Ezekiel19:11 A lal tiangah a tang zar khauh lo chhuakin, Zardang zawng laiah a sang ber a, A bukpui khumin a chung lur e." 
Ezekiel19:12 Mahse an thliak, thinlai rimin, An paih chhim hlei tualah, Chhaktiang thliin a nuai, a til, a rahte, A zar khauh pawh a tliak thla, a uai zo ta, Senmeiin a kang ral ta e." 
Ezekiel19:13 A kungpui zawng an phun ta, thlaler ram tui loah,A zar ata senmei lo chhuakin a man e, A rahte zawng pawh a ei zo ta: Tichuan, zar lem a awm tawh lo-lal tiang turah pawh. Hei hi sunna hla a ni e, sunna'na hman tur a ni." 
Ezekiel19:14 A zar ata senmei lo chhuakin a man e, A rahte zawng pawh a ei zo ta: Tichuan, zar lem a awm tawh lo-lal tiang turah pawh. Hei hi sunna hla a ni e, sunna'na hman tur a ni." 
Ezekiel20:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sarihna, thla ngana, chumi thla ni sawm niah chuan Israel upa tute emaw LALPA rawn turin an lo kal a, ka hmaah an thu a." 
Ezekiel20:2 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel20:3 Mihring fapa, Israel upate chu bia la, an hnenah, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Mi rawn tura lo kal em in nih? A nuna ka nun chhung chu, nangni rawnin ka awm lo ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" ti rawh." 
Ezekiel20:4 I chachhuah dawn lo'm ni? Mihring fapa, chachhuah ta che, an pate tenawmnate chu hriattir rawh;" 
Ezekiel20:5 tin, an hnenah, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Israelho ka thlan nia Jakoba chhung ka thlante hnenah kut phar meuha Aigupta rama an hnena ka in hriattira, an hnena ka kut ka phara, Kei hi LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni e, tia," 
Ezekiel20:6 chung nia Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuak a, atana ka ram hual, hnute tui leh khawizua luang ram, ram zawng zawnga mawi bera hruai lut tura ka kut ka phar niah chuan," 
Ezekiel20:7 an hnenah, Mi tinin in mita hmuh thil tenawm chu paih bo u la, Aigupta rama milimte chuan intibawlhhlawh suh u, kei hi LALPA in pathian chu ka ni e, tiin ka sawi a." 
Ezekiel20:8 Mahse ka chungah an hel a, mi ngaihsak reng reng lo a, mitinin an mita hmuh thil tenawmte pawh chu an paih bo lo a, Aigupta milimte chu an hawisan hek lo: Tah chuan an chunga ka thinurna hrithla turin Aigupta ram chhungah ngei chuan ka thinurna ka leih nang emaw, ka ti a." 
Ezekiel20:9 Mahse keima hming humhalhna'n ka bei ta zawk a, an awmna hnamte mit hmuhah Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuakin an hnenah ka in hriattir a, chung hnamte mithmuhah chuan ka hming sawi chhiata a awm lohna'n." 
Ezekiel20:10 Chutichuan Aigupta ram chhuahsan turin ka ti ta a, thlalerah ka rawn hruai lut ta a." 
Ezekiel20:11 Tin, ka dan siamte chu anmahni ka pe a, ka thurelte chu ka entir a, chu chu miin an zawm chuan an nunna tur a ni." 
Ezekiel20:12 Chu lo chu kei leh anmahni inkara chhinchhiahna'n ka chawlhnite chu anmahni ka pe a, Kei hi LALPA anmahni serh hrangtu ka ni tih an hriat theihna'n." 
Ezekiel20:13 Mahse Israel chhungte chu thlalerah khan ka chungah an hel a, ka dan siamte chu zawh lo a, ka thurelte, miin a tiha an nunna tur chu an paih thla a, ka chawlnite pawh nasa takin an bawhchhia a; tichuan thlalerah chuan anmahni tiboral turin ka thinrimna chu an chungah ka leih nang emaw, ka ti a." 
Ezekiel20:14 Ka hruai chhuah lai hre tu hnam ngei mithmuhah tihchhiata a awm lohna'n ka hming humhalhin ka bei ta zawk a ni. 
Ezekiel20:15 Chu loah chuan thlalerah khan ka ram pek, hnute tui leh khawizua luang ram, ram zawng zawnga mawi berah chuan ka hruai lut lo ang,kut phar meuhin ka ti a;" 
Ezekiel20:16 Ka thurelte an paih thla a, ka dan siamte an zawh lo a, ka chawlhnite an bawhchhiat avangin: an thinlung chuan an milimte a awn tlat si a." 
Ezekiel20:17 Mahse tiboral lo turin ka mitin a hmuh hmaih ta a, thlalerah pawh khan ka tiboral vek ta lo mai a ni." 
Ezekiel20:18 Tin, thlalerah chuan an fate hnenah, In pate dan siam chu zawm lo u la, an thurelte intibawrhbang hek suh u;" 
Ezekiel20:19 Kei hi LALPA in pathian chu ka ni a, ka dan siamte zawh u la, ka thurelte vawng ula, zawm rawh u." 
Ezekiel20:20 Ka chawlhnite serh u la, kei leh nangni inkara chhinchhiahna a ni ang a, LALPA in Pathian chu ka ni tih in hriat theihna a ni dawn nia, ka ti a." 
Ezekiel20:21 Mahse an fate chu ka chungah an hel a, ka dan siamte chu an zawh lo a, ka thurelte, miin a tiha a nun tur chu, zawm turin an vawng hek lo; ka chawlhnite chu an bawhchhe ta a; thlalerah khan ka thinurna hrithla turin an chungah ka thinrimna ka leih nang emaw, ka ti a." 
Ezekiel20:22 Mahse ka kut ka sum a, ka hruai chhuah lai hretute hnam ngei mithmuha tihchhiata a awm lohna'n ka hming humhalhin ka bei ta zawk a ni." 
Ezekiel20:23 Chu lo pawh chu, hnamte zingah anmahni ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka titaitam ang, thlalerah khan kut phar meuhin ka lo ti a." 
Ezekiel20:24 Ka thu relte an zawm lo a, ka dan siamte an paihthla a, ka chawlhnite an bawhchhia a, an pate milim lam an hawi zawk avangin." 
Ezekiel20:25 Chu lo pawh, dan siam tha lo chu ka pe a, an nun lohna tura thurelte nen;" 
Ezekiel20:26 an thil dawn, chhul keutu zawng zawng meia an paihnaah chuan anmahni ka tibawlhhlawh a, ka tikhawhar a, a tawpah LALPA chu ka ni tih an hriatna turin." 
Ezekiel20:27 Chuvangin, mihring fapa, an hnenah thu sawi la an hnenah,'LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: In pate chuan hengah hian mi la sawi chhe cheu a ni; ka chunga bawhchhiatna thil an tihah te hian." 
Ezekiel20:28 Kut phar meuha anmahni ka tiam ramah hian ka rawn hruai luhin, tlangsang leh thingbuk lian an hmuh apiangah an inthawinate an hlan a, an thil hlan thinurthlak tak maite chu an pe a, An rimtuite an siam a, an in tur thil hlante chu an bun chhuak si a,' ti rawh." 
Ezekiel20:29 Tichuan keiin an hnenah,' Bawlhmun inkalna fote hi eng in tihna nge ni?'ka ti a; chutichuan an hming atan vawiin ni thleng hian,'Bamah' tih a ni ta a ni e." 
Ezekiel20:30 Tichuan Israel chhungte hnenah chuan sawi la, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: In pate ang zelin mahni in intibawlhhlawhin an tenawmna kawngahte chuan in hur bo a ni maw?" 
Ezekiel20:31 In thil dawn in hlanin, in fate meiah in paih a, vawiin ni thleng hian in milim zawng zawng chuan in intibawlhhlawh a ni lo'm ni? Nangni rawn tur em ka nih, aw Israel chhungte u? A nuna ka nun chhung chu nangni rawn in ka awm lo ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel20:32 Kan vela hnamdang awze mite anga thingbul lungbul be tur kan ni, inrilruin in ti na a, in ni tawp lo ang." 
Ezekiel20:33 A nuna ka nun chhung chu, kut thahrui chak takin, ban phar chung leh thinrim chhuahin in chungah ka kal ngei ngei ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel20:34 Hnamte zing ata ka hruai chhuak ang che u a, tihdarha in awmna ram ata chu kut chak tak leh ban phar leh thinrim chhuahin ka hruai khawm ang che u." 
Ezekiel20:35 Awze mite thlaler ramah chuan ka hruai lut ang che u a, inhmachhawnin kan in bei ang." 
Ezekiel20:36 Aigupta ram thlalera in pate ka bei ang takin nangni pawh ka bei ang che u, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel20:37 Tin, tiang hnuaiah ka luh tir ang che u a, thuthlung khauhkhirhna hnuaiah ka hruai lut ang che u;" 
Ezekiel20:38 tin, in zing ata mi helte leh ka chunga bawhchhetute chu ka thianfai ang a, an awmna ram atangin ka hruai chhuak ang a, mahse Israel ramah chuan an lut tawp lo vang: tichuan LALPA chu ak ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel20:39 Nangni pawhin, aw Israel chhungte u, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ak thu in ngaihthlah dawn loh chuan tun hnuah pawh in milim rawng chu bawl theuh mai ta che u; mahse ka hming thianghlim chu in thilpekte leh in milimtein in tibawlhhlawh tawh lo ang." 
Ezekiel20:40 Ka tlang thianghlim, Israel sanna tlangah chun, tah chuan Israel chhungte zawng zawng chuan an zavaiin, chu ramah chuan ka rawng an bawl ang; tah chuan anmahni ka lawm tawh ang a, tah chuan in thilhlante in thilpek tha thate, in thil serh zawng zawngte ka duh tawh ang." 
Ezekiel20:41 Hnamte zing ata ka lak chhuah hun che u leh ram tina in darhna ata ka hruaikhawm hunah che u chuan, rimtui atan ka pawm tawh ang che u a, hnamte mithmuhah chuan nangmahniah hian ka thianghlimzia alng tawh ang, LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni." 
Ezekiel20:42 Tin, Israel ram, kut phar meuha in pate pek ka tiam ramah chuan ka hruai luh hunah che u chuan LALPA ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel20:43 Tin, tah chuan in awmdante leh in thiltih, in tihbawlhhlawhna zawng zawngte chu in hre tawh ang a, tichuan in thil tha lo tih zawng zawngte avang khan nangmahni mithmuhngaiah in ten tawh ang." 
Ezekiel20:44 Tin, in awmdan tha lo te ang ni lo a, in thiltih khawlote ang ni hek lo a, ka hming humhalh tura ka tihpuitlin chr u hunah chuan, aw Isrel chhungte u, LALPA chu ka ni tih in hre tawh ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel20:45 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel20:46 Mihring fapa chhimlam hmachhawn la, chhimlam hawiin thu thlah la, chhimlam ngawpui lamah thu sawi la," 
Ezekiel20:47 Chhimlam ngawpui hnenah chuan,'LALPA thu hi ngai rawh, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ngai rawh nangmahah mei ka chhem ang a, nangmaha thing hring zawng zawng chu a kang zo ang a, thing ro apiang pawh: mei alh hluah hluah chu a rem lo ang a, chhim atanga hmar thlengin, eptu zawng zawngte chu a ut ang." 
Ezekiel20:48 Tin, mi zawng zawngin kei LALPA hi mei chhuahtu ka ni tih an hmu ang a, an mit lo ang, a ti e,' ti rawh,"" a ti a.Tichuan, kei chuan, A! LALPA PATHIAN,'Tehkhin thu sawitu mai alawm,' mi ti ang a sin, ka ti a." 
Ezekiel20:49 Tichuan, kei chuan, A! LALPA PATHIAN,'Tehkhin thu sawitu mai alawm,' mi ti ang a sin, ka ti a." 
Ezekiel21:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel21:2 Mihring fapa, Jerusalem hmachhawn la, a hmun serhte lam hawiin i thu thlah la, Israel ram chungah thu sawi ang che;" 
Ezekiel21:3 Israel ram hnenah chuan, heti hian LALPA chuan a ti a ni: ngai teh ka do che a ni, ka khandaih chu a pai ata ka phawi ang a, in zinga mi fel leh fello ang khatin ka rawt ang." 
Ezekiel21:4 Tichuan in zinga mi fel leh fello ka rawt dawn avang chuan ka khandaih chu a pai ata a chhuak ang a, chhim lam ata hmar lam thlengin mi hring zawng zawng a rawt ang." 
Ezekiel21:5 Tin, mi zawng zawngin, kei LALPA hian ka khandaih a pai ata ka phawi a ni tih an hria ang a, a inkhung leh tawh ngai lo ang." 
Ezekiel21:6 Chuvangin nang mihring fapa, rum vawng vawng la, lungchhe takin an mithmuhah rum rawh." 
Ezekiel21:7 Tin, engatinge i rum? An tih che chuan, Thu eng emaw avangin a lo thleng dawn si a, tin, thinlung tinrenga tuiral ang a, kut zawng zawng a zawi ang a, rilru tinreng a chau vang a, khup zawng zawng chu, lo tui angin a zawi ang a; ngai rawh, a thleng e, a hlen ang, tih hi lalpa PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni; ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel21:8 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel21:9 Mihring fapa, thu sawi la hetiangin LALPA chuan a ti a ni:'Khandaih, khandaih, tah hriam a ni ta. Tihtlet a ni ta." 
Ezekiel21:10 Mi sahna'n tah hriam a ni ta, Tihtlet a ni kawlphe angin: Kan la hlim cheu dawn em ni? Ka fapa tiangin a chhing zo ve, thing tin,." 
Ezekiel21:11 Tihtlet a ni vai vel atan, A ni khandaih tah hriam tihtlet a ni, Thattu kuta chuang turin." 
Ezekiel21:12 Mihring fapa, au la, u la, ka mite chung a ni si; Israel mi lian zawng zawngte chung ngei chu: pek a ni e, ka mite nen, chem sen hnuaiah; chuvangin au la, i mal bengin." 
Ezekiel21:13 Fiahna a awm si a, engtin nge ni ang - Mi dang chhingtu tiang chu awm suh se la? Tih LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni e." 
Ezekiel21:14 Chuvangin nang, mihring fapa, kut beng hialin thu sawi rawh; Thih theihna chemsen len zual la, let thumin, A hual vel e, mi ropui, thahna chem sen chuan." 
Ezekiel21:15 Thinlung tuiral, an tlukna a punna'n e, Chemsen tle tak kawngka tinah ka riah e, A! kawlphe iangin a tle, thihna chemsen." 
Ezekiel21:16 Invilikin che vak ang che, ding lamah, Invilikin vei lamah pawh vai zel la, I hma zawn apiangah pawh." 
Ezekiel21:17 Kei pawhin kut ka lo beng ang a, Ka hlen ngei ang, ka thinurna, Kei LALPA'n hei hi ka sawi tawh e, a ti,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel21:18 Tin, LALPA thu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel21:19 Mihring fapa, Babulon lal khandaih lo thlen theihna turin kawng pahnih lo siam rawh; chung kawng hnihte chu ram pakhat atangin a lo chhuak tur a ni: kawng kawhhmuhna siam la, khawpui luhna kawtchhuahah chuan siam rawh." 
Ezekiel21:20 Kawng chu Amon mite khua Raba-a khandaih lo thlenna turin ruat la, Judai ram laia Jerusalem kulhah pawh." 
Ezekiel21:21 Aien turin Babulon lal chu kawng pengah chuan a ding a, kawng hnih in finna takah chuan; thal te chu a thing rawk rawk a, teraphim a rawn a, sathin chu a en a." 
Ezekiel21:22 A aiennaah chuan a kut dinglamah Jerusalem a lo chuang ta a, kulh sut chhiatnate ral bei hawhawa au te, mual pawng chhunte, kulh siamte nen," 
Ezekiel21:23 Aien thlawn mai ang a ni a, mahse mana an awmna tura an khawlohna hriat chhuahna tur chhuahna tur chauh a ni." 
Ezekiel21:24 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: inkhawlohna hriatrengna tura in siam tak avangin in bawhchhiatnate a lang a, tichuan in thiltih zawng zawngah in sualnate a lang reng a, hraitchauh in lo nih tak avangin kuta man in la ni ang." 
Ezekiel21:25 Tin, nang Israel hotu, mi sual thi tura hliam pa, i sualna hremna tawpkhawk ni a lo thleng e;" 
Ezekiel21:26 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti: Hotu lukhum chu paihsak u la, lallukhum chu paihsak rawh u, heihi a ngaiin a awm lo ang: mi tlawmte chawisang u la, mi liante chu titlawm rawh u." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ka linglet ang, ka linglet ang; ka linglet ang; hei pawh hi a ngaiin a awm lo vang, a neitu tak tur a lo kal hma zawng amah chu ka pe ang." 
Ezekiel21:28 Tin, nang mihring fapa, thu hril la, heti hian ti rawh: LALPA PATHIAN chuan Amon fate chungchangah leh an sawichhiatna thu-ah heti hian a ti: khandaih, khandaih phawi a ni ta, mi thahna'n leh tihralna'n kawlphe anga tihtlet a ni ta." 
Ezekiel21:29 inlarna der an hmuhsak chia, dawtin ai an ensak chia, khandaih chu misual thi tura hliam, an sualna ni tawpkhawk lo thleng turte nghawngah i rawlh dawn, an tih ah che hian an daw a ni." 
Ezekiel21:30 A paiah khung rawh, i pian i murna ram ngeiah i thu ka rel ang." 
Ezekiel21:31 I chungah ka thinurna ka leih ang a, ka thinrimna mei i chungah ka chhem ang, mi nun chhe tak, tihboral thiam tak kutah ka mah tir ang che.Meia tuah tur i ni ang a, ram laiah chuan i thisen a bua ang a, hriat reng i ni tawh lo ang, kei LALPA hian ka sawi tawh si a, a ti, ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel21:32 Meia tuah tur i ni ang a, ram laiah chuan i thisen a bua ang a, hriat reng i ni tawh lo ang, kei LALPA hian ka sawi tawh si a, a ti, ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel22:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a,," 
Ezekiel22:2 Tin, nang mihring fapa, thisen chhuah hmang khawpui chu i khing dawn em? I khing dawn em? A tenawmna zawng zawng chu hriattir rawh khai!" 
Ezekiel22:3 Tin, an hnenah chuan, 'LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: khawpui a hun lo thlenna tura ama chhunga thisen chhuahtu leh mahni intibawlhhlawh tura milim siamtu chu!" 
Ezekiel22:4 I thisen chhuahnaah khan thiamloh i phur a, i milim siamah khan i in tibawlhhlawh a ni; i hunte i tihnai a, i kumte a thleng tep a; chuvangin hnamte hnenah chuan sawichhiatah leh ram zawng zawng cheksawlh atan ka siam che a ni." 
Ezekiel22:5 I bula mi leh i hlata mite chuan an cheksawlh ang che, nang, hmingchhiat phur leh buainaa khat mi!" 
Ezekiel22:6 Ngai rawh, Israel hotute mi tinin an thiltihtheihna ang zela tihsen chauh mai turin nangmahah an awm a ni." 
Ezekiel22:7 Nangmahah chuan miin nu leh pate an hmusit a, nangmahah chuan mikhualte an hnehchhiah a, nangmah chuan fahrahte leh hmeithaite an hnehsawh a." 
Ezekiel22:8 Ka til serhte i hmusit a, ka chawlhnite i bawhchhia a." 
Ezekiel22:9 Nangmahah chuan thisen chhuah tura mi hek hmangte an awm a, nangmahah chuan bawlhmuna eite an awm a, nangmahah chuan hurna an ching a." 
Ezekiel22:10 Nangmahah chuan an pate saruakna hlimsak an awm a, nangmahah chuan hmeichhe fello lai mutpui an awm a." 
Ezekiel22:11 Tin, miin a thenawm nupui chungah thil tenawm a ti a, mi dangin hur takin a mo a tibawlhhlawh a, mi dangin nangmahah chuan a farnu, a pa fanu ngei a tlawm a." 
Ezekiel22:12 Nangmahah chuan thisen chhuah turin thamna an la a, a no leh a pung i la a; i thenawm chu hnehchiahin duham takin i hlepruksak thin a; kei ngei pawh hi mi theihnghilh a, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel22:13 Chuvangin, ngai rawh, i lo hleprukna thu-ah te, nangmaha thisen chhuak thu-ah te kut ka ben khum ang che." 
Ezekiel22:14 Nangmah ka beih niah che chuan i thinlungin a tuar zoin i kut a chak thei dawn em ni? Kei LALPA ngei hian ka sawi tawh a, ka ti bawk ang." 
Ezekiel22:15 Tin, hnam zingah chuan ka tidarh ang chia, ram tinah ka titaitam ang che; nangmah atangin i bawlhhlawhnate ka tiral vek ang." 
Ezekiel22:16 Hnamte mithmuhah chuan mahni intibawlhhlawh i ni ang, tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih i lo hria ang, a ti,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel22:17 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel22:18 Mihring fapa, Israel chhungte chu ka tan ek chhia mai an lo ni ta a; an zain rawhtuina mei laiah chuan dar te, rangva te, thir te, suan te an ni a, tangkaraw ek chhia mai an ni ta." 
Ezekiel22:19 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ek chhia mai in lo nih tak avangin, ngai rawh u, Jerusalem laiah ka khawm che u a ni." 
Ezekiel22:20 Tangkarua te, dar te, thir te, suan te, rangva te rawhtuina meia an dah khawmna, titui tura a chunga mei an chhem angin ka thinurna leh ka thinrimnaah chuan ka khawm ang che u a, ka titui ang che u." 
Ezekiel22:21 A ni, ka khawm ang che u a, in chungah chuan ka thinurna mei ka chhem ang a, a laiah chuan in lo tui zo ang." 
Ezekiel22:22 Rawhtuina mei laiah tangkarua a tui angin nangni pawh, chumi laiah chuan in tui zo ang a, kei LALPA hian in chungah ka thinurna ka leih a ni tih in hre tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel22:23 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel22:24 Mihring fapa, a hnenah chuan sawi la,'Ram tlenfai loh i ni e, thinurna nia ruahtui chang lo." 
Ezekiel22:25 Sakeibakneiin rumin a sa seh a zawng ang maiin nangmahah chuan zawlnei phiarnate a awm a ni: mi nunna te an ei zo a, rote leh thil hlute an laksak a, a laiah chuan hmeithai tamtak an siam a." 
Ezekiel22:26 A puithiamte pawhin nasa takin ka dan an bawhchhia a, ka thil serhte an tibawlhhlawh a ni, thil serhte leh thil narante reng reng an thlei lo a, mite lah, thil thianghlim leh thianghlim lo an thlei tir chuang hek lo; ka chawlhnite chu an haider a, an zingah chuan tihhmingchhiatin ka awm a." 
Ezekiel22:27 A laia hotute chu chinghne koham eitur zawng ang mai an ni a, thisen chhuaha mi nunnate tiboralin hlemhle taka an hlep theihna'n." 
Ezekiel22:28 Tin, a zawlneite chuan hawlrivapin bang an bel a, inlarna dawha mai mai an hmu a, dawtin ai an ensak a, LALPA'n engmah a sawi lo chung pawhin, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti, an ti thin a." 
Ezekiel22:29 Rama mipuite chuan hnehchhiah an hmang a, rawk an ching a, a ni, mirethei leh tlachhamte chu an hnehsawh a, diklo takin mikhualte an hnehchhiah thin." 
Ezekiel22:30 Ram chu ka tihchhiat lohna'n an zing ata dai theu tur leh ram chhana ka hmaa tang tur mi ka zawng a, ka hmu si lo a.Chuvangin an chungah ka thinrimna chu ka leihbaw ta a, ka thinurnain meiin ka halral ta hlawm a ni; an awmdan ngei chu an chungah ka rawn thlen a ni, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel22:31 Chuvangin an chungah ka thinrimna chu ka leihbaw ta a, ka thinurnain meiin ka halral ta hlawm a ni; an awmdan ngei chu an chungah ka rawn thlen a ni, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel23:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel23:2 Mihring fapa, hmeichhe pahnih, nu pakhat fa an awm a," 
Ezekiel23:3 Aigupta ramah an hur bo a, an tleirawl teta hur an ni a, chutah chuan an hnute an dek a, an tleirawl hnute chu an hmehsak hrep a." 
Ezekiel23:4 Pakhat a upa zawk hming chu Oholahi a ni a, a laizawn chu Oholihabi a ni a; ka ta an lo ni ta a, fapa te, fanu te an hring a. tin, an hmingah chuan Oholahi chu Samaria a ni a, Oholihabi chu Jerusalem a ni" 
Ezekiel23:5 Tin, Oholahi chu ka ta a nih hnuin a hur bo leh ta a, a ngaihzawng, a thenawm, Assuria chu a hak hiam a;" 
Ezekiel23:6 awptute, roreltute, tlangval itawm tak hlir, sakawr chung chuang mi, puan senduka in thuamte chu." 
Ezekiel23:7 Heng Assuria tlangval thate zawng zawng lakah hian an inphalrai a, tin, a hak hiamate milim zawng zawng chuan a intibawlhhlawh leh nghal a." 
Ezekiel23:8 A tleirawl tet ata a hnute an dehsak fo thin leh an mutpui thin avangin Aigupta atang khan a hur a bang chuang hek lo, anni pawhin an hurna a chungah an tlingtla a," 
Ezekiel23:9 A ngaihzawngte, Assuria, a hak hiamte kut ngeiah ka mantir a ni." 
Ezekiel23:10 Hengte hian a saruakna chu an hlim lansak a, a fanu leh a fapate an laksak a, a ni pawh chu khandaihi an that a, hmeichhiate zingah insawithaihna ber a lo ni ta, a chunga rel ang chu an hlen ta." 
Ezekiel23:11 Tin, a laizawn Oholihabi chuan heihi a hmu a, mahse a u ai mahin a ngaihzawng haknaah chun a zual zawkin, a hurna pawh chu a u hurna aiin a zual leh sauh bawk a." 
Ezekiel23:12 Assuria mi, a thenawm ram awptu leh roreltu tlangval itawm tak hlir, sakawr chung chuang mi, mawi taka in cheite chu a hak hiam a." 
Ezekiel23:13 Tihbawlhhlawhin a awm tih ka hmu a, an pahnih kawng thuhmun an zawh mai a ni." 
Ezekiel23:14 Tin, a hurnate chu a tizualkai a, mipa lem banga chuang, Kaldai mite thla, senlar taka chei," 
Ezekiel23:15 a kawnga kawnghren hreng, diar mawi tak khim, an vaia lal hmel putak, Kaldai ram, an pianna rama Babulon mite ang takte chu a hmuh avangin." 
Ezekiel23:16 Tin, anmahni a hmuh veleh a hak hiam a, an hnenah kaldai thlengin mi a tir a." 
Ezekiel23:17 Tin, Babulon mite chu a hnenah, in ngaihna khumah an lo kal a, an hurnain a tibawlhhlawh a, an intitenawm zo ta a, anmahni chu a ngei em em a." 
Ezekiel23:18 Chutichuan a hurna a tilang a, a saruak a hlim lang a, a laizawnnuin mi ngei ang maiin ani pawh chuan mi ngei ta a." 
Ezekiel23:19 Mahse a tleirawl laia Aigupta rama a hur lai a hriat reng avangin a hur zual ta deuh deuh a. 
Ezekiel23:20 Tin, a uiretu, a tisa sabengtung tisa ang mai, a thil chhuak, sakawrte thil chhuak ang mai chu a hak em em a." 
Ezekiel23:21 Hetiangin a tleirawl lai hurna, Aigupta miin a tleirawl lai hnute a dehsak hrep lai che kha i hre chhuak leh ta a ni." 
Ezekiel23:22 Chuvangin, aw Oholibah, hetiangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, a ngai tu che, i rilruin a ngei hle tawh te kha ka pun ang a, kiltin ata ka hruai khawm ang." 
Ezekiel23:23 Babulon mite leh Kaldai mi zawng zawngte, Pekod te, Soa te, Koa te leh an hnena Assuria mi zawng zawng nen; tlangval itawm tak takte awptute, roreltute, an zain miliante leh hmingthangte, an zain sakawr chung chuangin an lo kal ang." 
Ezekiel23:24 Tin, hriamhreite, indona tawlailirte, tawlailirte leh mipui pungkhawmin an rawn bei ang che; phaw lian leh phaw te, darlukhumte nen i velin an hual ang che; tin, an hnenah rorelna ka kawltir ang a, an thurel ang zelin i chungah an hlen ang." 
Ezekiel23:25 Tin, in chungah ka thikthu ka thlen ang a, thinrim takin an bei ang che; i hnarte leh i bengte an help ang a, a la damte chu khandaihin an thi ang a, i fanu leh i fapa te an laksak ang chia, a la damte chu meiin a kang hlum ang." 
Ezekiel23:26 I silhfente an hlihsak bawk ang chia, i incheina mawi tak tak te chu an la bo ang." 
Ezekiel23:27 I hurna leh Aigupta ram atanga i nawhchi zawrhna chu an tihban sak ang chia, chutichuan an lamah i mit i len tawh lo ang a, Aigupta ram chu i hre reng ngai tawh lo ang." 
Ezekiel23:28 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti si a: ngai rawh. i huat tak, i rilrua i mi ngei zawng takte kut ngeiah chuan ka mantir ang che." 
Ezekiel23:29 Huat tak tein an hua ang chia, i thawhrim rah zawng zawng an laksak ang chia, saruakin a lawng maiin an hnutchhiah ang che; i nawhchizawrh saruakna, i hurna leh i nawhchizawrhna ngei chu tihlanin a awm ang." 
Ezekiel23:30 Heng thilte hi i chungah a lo thleng ang, hnamdangte umin i hur bo a, an milim tea i in tihbawlhhlawh avanngin." 
Ezekiel23:31 I laizawnni kawng i zawh ve a, chuvangin a no chu i kutah ka pe ang che." 
Ezekiel23:32 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: I laizawnnu no tung lianpui mai chu i in ang a, Nuihsan leh cheksawlhin i awm ang: a dawng hnem nasa a ni!" 
Ezekiel23:33 Ruihna leh lungngaihnain i khat ang a, mak tihna leh chhiatna no, I laizawnnu samari no nen chuan i in fai kelh ang a;" 
Ezekiel23:34 I in ang a, a no pawh chu i fawp fai vek ang, I hnute i ham thler ang; Keiin ka sawi tawh si a, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel23:35 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Mi theihnghilha mi hnuchhawn avangin i hurna leh i nawhchizawrhna mawh chu i phur mai tur a ni. 
Ezekiel23:36 Chu lo pawh chu LALPA'n ka hnenah a sawi leh a,""Mihring fapa, Oholahi leh Oholihabi chu i khing dawn em? An tenawmnate chu an hnenah puang ang che." 
Ezekiel23:37 An uire ta si a, thisen chu an kutah a kai a, an milim hnenah chuan an uire ta a ni; An fapate ka tana an hrin chu an hnena kangral turin meiah an paih a." 
Ezekiel23:38 Chulovah pawh chuan, ka hnenah heihi an ti a ni; anni vekin ka hmun thianghlim chu an tibawlhhlawh a, ka chawlhnite pawh an bawhchhia a ni." 
Ezekiel23:39 An milimte tana an fate an thah hnuah, anni vek chuan ka hmun thianghlim tibawlhhlawh turin an lut si thin a; tin, ngai rawh hetiang hian ka in chhung ngeiah an ti thin a ni." 
Ezekiel23:40 Tin, chu lo pawh chu, hla taka mi lo kal turin in chah a, mi in tir a, ngai rawh an lo kal a, anmahni elin i in bual fai a, i mit i hnawih a, cheimawina dangte i in bel a," 
Ezekiel23:41 khum ropui takah i lo thu a, a hmaah dawhkan i buatsaih a, ka rimtui leh ka hriakte tah chuan i hlui thin a ni." 
Ezekiel23:42 Tin, tahchuan mipui nuamtawl thawm hriat a ni a, mi naran chang lo pawh thlaler atangin zurite an rawn hruai a, an pahnihin banbunte an bun a, lukhum mawite an khum a." 
Ezekiel23:43 Tin, kei chuan, Uire tar hnu hi an pawl duh dawnin anin a peih dawn em ni aw? Ka ti a." 
Ezekiel23:44 Tin, nawhchizuar hnena ka kalin a hnenah an lut ta tho a; tichuan hmeichhe hur Oholahi hnenah chuan an lut ta a ni." 
Ezekiel23:45 Mahse mifelte chuan uirenute leh thisen chhuah ching hmeichhiate ro an relsak angin an relsak ang, uirenute an niha, an kutahte thisen a kai avangin." 
Ezekiel23:46 LALPA PATHIAN chuan hetiangin a ti si a: In chungah mipui ka pun ang a, ka rawktir ang a, ka sawisak tir hrep ang." 
Ezekiel23:47 Tin, puipungho chuan lungin an deng ang a, an khandaihin an sat hlum ang a, an fanute an fapate an that ang a, an inte an halsak ang." 
Ezekiel23:48 Hetiang hian hurna chu ram ata ka tibo ang a, hmeichhia zawng zawngin in hurna hi chin tawp loh tur a ni tih in hriatna'n.Tin, in chungah in hurna chu an thungrul ang a, in milim sualnate chu in tuar ang, tin, kei hi LALPA PATHIAN ka ni tih in hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel23:49 Tin, in chungah in hurna chu an thungrul ang a, in milim sualnate chu in tuar ang, tin, kei hi LALPA PATHIAN ka ni tih in hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel24:1 Kum kuana, thla sawmna, chumi thla, ni sawm niah chuan LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel24:2 Mihring fapa, ni hming, vawiin ni hming ngei hi ziak rawh; hemi ni ngei hian Babulon lal chuan Jeruslem a rawn bei tan a." 
Ezekiel24:3 Tin, helhmang chhung hnenah chuan teh khin thu sawi la, an hnenah, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Saso bel chhuang la, chhuang reng la, a chhungah tui chhung la," 
Ezekiel24:4 sahrangte thlak la, a sa tha zawng zawngte, a bawp te, a dar te, a ruhkawlte chu tha deuh deuhtein tikhat rawh." 
Ezekiel24:5 Ran rualte zinga a tha tha la la, a hnuaiah thingfak rawlh teuh la, so bawrh bawrh se; a ni, a ruhkawlte chu mun ni rawh se." 
Ezekiel24:6 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: thisen chhuah hmang khawpui, saso bel a chhung kang khir, a khir la reh ngai lo chu a chung apik e! Thlang chuang loin, a sahrang khat khatin thur rawh u." 
Ezekiel24:7 A thisen chhuah chu ama chungah a awm si a, vai vuta vur theihna'na leia leih buak tak a ruangin lungpui ro chungah a leih ta zawk a." 
Ezekiel24:8 Phuba la tura thinurna a lo thawh theihna'n vur lo in a thisen chhuah chu lungpui ro chungah ka leih a ni. 
Ezekiel24:9 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni; Thisen chhuah hmang khawpui chu a chung a pik e! keimah ngeiin ka chhep hluah ang. 
Ezekiel24:10 Thing chhep teuh u la, mei tuah sa u la, sate chu chhum hmin kawi u la, satui chu nga takin, a ruhte pawh kangral rawh se." 
Ezekiel24:11 Tichuan bel chu a ruakin meivam chungah chhuan ni reng se la, a lo sa ang a, a dar chu a lo ling ang a, a bawlhhlawhna chu a lo tuiral ang a, a kang khir chu a kanral theihna'n." 
Ezekiel24:12 Ning khawpa bei pawhin a kang khir chu a fai chuang lo a, mei pawhin a kang fai hek lo." 
Ezekiel24:13 I bawlhhlawhna chu hurna a ni a, ka thian chia, i fai chuan loh avangin i chungah ka thinurna ka hrikthlak vek hma loh chuan engtikahmah i bawlhhlawhna ata chu tlenfai i ni tawh lo ang." 
Ezekiel24:14 Kei LALPA hian ka sawi tawh a ni, a lo thleng ngei ang, keiin ka ti dawn si a, ka hnung tawlh lo ang a, ka lamlet hek lo ang; i awmdante leh i thiltihang zelin ro ka relsak ang che, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel24:15 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel24:16 Mihring fapa, ngai teh, thawklehkhatah i mit tlaina ber chu ka laksak ang chia, i sun tur a ni lo a, i tap tur a ni hek lo, i mittui pawh a tla tur a ni lo." 
Ezekiel24:17 Aruk tein rum la, mitthi sunna reng reng chu nei suh ang che, i diar khim la i pheikhawk bun la, i hmui hup suh la, mite chaw pawh ei suh ang che,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel24:18 Chitichuan zinglamah chuan mipuite hnenah thu ka sawi a, tlai lamah chuan ka nupui a thi ta mai a; tin, zinglamah chuan thu mi pek ang chuan ka ti a." 
Ezekiel24:19 Tin, mite chuan ka hnenah,""Hetiang i thiltihte hi ka tan eng nge a nih min hrilh dawn lo'm ni?"" an ti a." 
Ezekiel24:20 Tichuan, kei chuan an hnenah,"" LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel24:21 Israel chhngte hnenah chuan sawi la, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni:'Ngai rawh u, ka hmun thianghlim, in chakna chhuan ber, in mit tlaina ber, in ngainat zawng tak chu ka tibawlhhlawh dawn a ni; tin, in fanute, in fapate, hnunglama in kalsante chu khandaihin an tlu ang." 
Ezekiel24:22 Ka tih ang chiah hian in ti ve dawn a ni; in hmui in hup lo ang a, mite chaw in ei hek lo ang." 
Ezekiel24:23 In diarte pawh in khim ang a, in pheikhawk in bun ang: in sun lo ang a, in tap hek lo ang, in khawlohnate chuan in thamral ang a, in intah tawn ang." 
Ezekiel24:24 Hetiangin Ezikiela hi in tan entirna a ni ang a, a tihzia ang zelin in ti tur a ni: hei hi a lo thlen hunah chuan LALPA PATHIAN chu ka ni tih in hria ang,' a tia ni,"" ka ti a." 
Ezekiel24:25 Tin, nang mihring fapa, an hnen ata an chakna te, an lungkham berte, an fanu leh an fapate ka lak basak niah chuan," 
Ezekiel24:26 Chumi ni ngeiah chuan a tlan chhuak chu i hnenah a lo kal ang a, a rawn hriattir dawn lo che em ni?Chu mi niah chuan tlan chhuak hnenah chuan i ka i ang a, a hnenah thu i sawi ang a, i ngawi bo mai lo ang a; tichuan an tan entirna i ni ang a; tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel24:27 Chu mi niah chuan tlan chhuak hnenah chuan i ka i ang a, a hnenah thu i sawi ang a, i ngawi bo mai lo ang a; tichuan an tan entirna i ni ang a; tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel25:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel25:2 Mihring fapa, Amon fate chu hmachhawn la, an chungchang thu sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel25:3 Tin, Amon fate hnenah chuan,'LALPA PATHIAN thu hi ngaithla rawh u, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni, ka hmun thianghlim chu tihbawlhhlawha a awm a, Israel ram tihtiauva a awma, Juda chhungte chu sala hruaia an awm lai khan, I hi! I lo tih avangin," 
Ezekiel25:4 ngai rawh, khawchhak lam mite hnenah an neih atan ka pe dawn che a ni; nangmahah chuan buk an sual ang a, bu an khuar ang; i thei rahte an ei ang a, i hnute tuite an in ang." 
Ezekiel25:5 Raba khua chu sanghawngsei inah ka siam ang a, Amon fate hmun chu ranrual bawh hmunah kasiam ang; tichuan LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel25:6 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti si a: Israel ram chungah i kut i bena, i ke i pera, rilru zawng zawnga a chhiatna chunga i lawm avangin," 
Ezekiel25:7 ngai rawh, i chungah ka kut ka lek a, hnamte hnenah rallak atan ka mantir dawn che a ni; mite lak ata ka rawt ang chia, chung ram ata chu ka tiboral daih ang che, ka tichhia ang chia, tichuan LALPA chu ka ni tih i hria ang,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel25:8 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Moab leh Seir chuan,'Ngai rawh, Juda chhungte chu hnamdang ang mai an ni e,' an tih avangin," 
Ezekiel25:9 Moab ramri venna khawpuite chu rallak ka beihtir a, khawpui ropui ber Beth-Jesinoth te, Baalmeon Kiriathaim te pawh," 
Ezekiel25:10 Khawchhak lam fate neih atan Amon fate nen ka pe ang a, Amon fata chu hnamte zingah hriat reng an nih tawh lohna'n." 
Ezekiel25:11 Moab ram chungah tu rel chu ka hlen ang a, tichuan LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang, tiin." 
Ezekiel25:12 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a:'Edom chuan Juda chhungte chungah phuba lain nasa takin thil a lo tisual a ni,ama thu maia an chunga phuba a lak avangin." 
Ezekiel25:13 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti e: Edom chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, a lak ata mi leh sate ka rawt bo vek ang; Teman atangin ka ti tiau ang a, Dedan thlengin khandaihin an thi ang." 
Ezekiel25:14 Tin, ka mi Israelte kutin ka phuba lakna chu ka thlen ang a, Edom chungahchuan ka thinurna ang zel leh ka thinrimna ang zelin an ti ang a, ka phuba lakna chu an lo hria ang,' tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel25:15 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Philistia miten phuba laa, kumkhaw in hmelmaknain, mi tiboral duhna rilru chhia pua phuba an lak avangin," 
Ezekiel25:16 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni, Ngai rawh, Philistia mite chungah chuan ka kut ka lek ang a, Kareth khaw mite chu ka rawt vek ang a, tui kama mi la awm chhunte chu ka tiboral vek ang.Tin, thinur taka zilhhauin an chungah phuba ka la ang a, chutia an chunga ka phuba lakna ka thlen hunah chuan LALPA chu ka ni tih an hre tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel25:17 Tin, thinur taka zilhhauin an chungah phuba ka la ang a, chutia an chunga ka phuba lakna ka thlen hunah chuan LALPA chu ka ni tih an hre tawh ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel26:1 Tin, kum sawm leh kum khatna thla ni hmasa berah chuan heti hi a ni a, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel26:2 Mihring fapa, tura chuan Jerusalem chung thuah,'I hi; Hnamte kawngkhar chu a chhe ta, ka lamah a in hawng a, a lo tlakran tak vek avangin kei ka changtlung tawh ang,' a tih avangin,'" 
Ezekiel26:3 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, aw tura, ka do che a ni; tuifinriatin a fawn a vawrh chhoh ang maiin i chunga lo kal turin hnam tam tak te ka rawn tir ang." 
Ezekiel26:4 Tin, tura kulhte chu an tichhia ang a, kulh bingsangte chu an tichim ang; an lak ata lei zawng zawng ka ziat fai leng ang a, lungpui ro maiah ka siam ang." 
Ezekiel26:5 Tuipui laia len pho rona hmun a ni mai ang, keima'n ka sawi tawh si a, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni: tichuan hnamte tan rallak a ni mai ang." 
Ezekiel26:6 Tin, a fanu rama awmte chu khandaiha tihhlum an ni ang a, tichuan LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel26:7 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti si a: Ngai rawh, tura chungah chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara, lalte lal chu hmarlam atangin, sakawrte nen, sakawr chung chuang mite, a pawl leh mipui tamtak mai ka rawn hruai dawn a ni." 
Ezekiel26:8 I fanute an that ang, ramah, khandaihin, Kulh a siam ang, nangmah danna'n, Nangmah dona'n a siam ang, mual pawngte, I chungah ka phawsial a sir ang." 
Ezekiel26:9 Kulh sut chhiatna a siam, i kulh thiatna'n, I kulh bangsang a tichim ang, hreipuiin." 
Ezekiel26:10 A sakawr tam avangin a khuh ang che, vaivutin, Khawpui chhiata mite an luh thin angin. I kawngka an luh ve hunah chuan, I kulhpui a nghing ang- Sakawr chung chuangte thawm leh indo tawlailir thawmah." 
Ezekiel26:11 Kawrsathang kein a chil chhia ang, i kawtthler zawng, I mite a that zo ang, khandaihin, I chakna bung sang suar a chim ang." 
Ezekiel26:12 I ro thil rallakin an la ang, I bungrua zawng zawng an rawk zo ang, I kulh bangsuar ang a tichim ang, I runin nuam a tichhe zo ang, I thing, lung, hlum te an paih ang, tuipui laiah." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ka tibang zo ang,, i zai thawmte, I tingtang ri pawh a dai hlen ang." 
Ezekiel26:14 Lungpui ro maiah ka siam ang che. Len pho ronaah i lo chang ang, Din i ni leh tawh lo ang, Keimah LALPA hian ka sawi tawh si, Tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni e." 
Ezekiel26:15 LALPA PATHIAN chuan tura khaw hnenah heti hian a sawi a,""I chhungah chuan in thahnate a awm huna, mi hliamte an rum hunah chuan i tlu thawmah chuan tuipui kam ramte a nghing dawn lo em ni?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Tuipui chunga hotute zawng zawng chu an thutthleng ata an chhuk ang a, an puan ropui te, an dah ang a, an cheimawite an hlip tawh ang; khurhnain an inthuam zawk ang a, mak an ti ang che." 
Ezekiel26:17 Tin, nangmam sunna hla an phuah ang a, i hnenah-'Khawpui hmingthang, tuipui chunga chak, Tui thiam mite hlir chenna thin chu, Amah leh a chhunga chengte zawng zawng, Mi veivakten an tih thin che nen, I chhiatna chu a va nasa em!" 
Ezekiel26:18 I tlukna niah an nghing, thliarkarte, Tuipui thliarkar an zam ang, i bo niah,' an ti ang,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel26:19 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti si a,""Khawpui ram, tuma luah loh khawpui anga ka siam hunah che chuan, tui thuk takah ka tipil ang chia, tui nasa takin a chim ang che;" 
Ezekiel26:20 hmasang mi, khur thuka kal tawh te hnenah ka tir thla ang chia,lei hnuai lamah, hmana tiau tawh khur thuka kal tawhte hnenah ka chentir ang chia,tumahin an luah lohna'n che leh mi nungte zinga ropuina i hmuh tawh hauh lohna'n.Ka tiboral daih ang chia, i awm tawh lo ang; miten zawng che mah se la an hmu tawp lo ang che,"" tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ka tiboral daih ang chia, i awm tawh lo ang; miten zawng che mah se la an hmu tawp lo ang che,"" tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel27:1 LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel27:2 Nang mihring fapa, tura khaw sunna hla phuah la," 
Ezekiel27:3 tura khaw hnenah chuan- Aw nang, tuipui kama cheng thin, Tuipui ka ram tamtakte hnena sumdawngtu, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Aw nang tura, 'Ka mawi famkim' i ti maw!" 
Ezekiel27:4 I ramin tuipui lai chu a chhun e, I siamtuten an timawi chung chung chuang ngei che;" 
Ezekiel27:5 I thing hmanrua Senir farin an siam e, I lawng ngulah, an la, Lebanon thingril." 
Ezekiel27:6 Basan sasua i vai chaah an siam e, Saingho chhungphum i lawng chhuatah Tufar thing, Tuipui ram kittim ata chu." 
Ezekiel27:7 I lawng puanzar Aigupta nemte puan tial, Nangmah chhinchhiahna'n a lo chuang e, I tan hliap zar dumpawl, senduk, Elisah tui kam ram ata chu." 
Ezekiel27:8 I lawng kartu Zidon, Arvad mi an ni, I lawng khalhtute zawng chu, Aw tura, I mifingte an ni e." 
Ezekiel27:9 Gebal upa leh mi themthiam, I lawng tuahremtu an lo ni e, Tuipui lawng zawng leh a miten, Nangmah dawrin an pan che." 
Ezekiel27:10 I ral tu mi, i sipai rual, Persia, Lud, Put an ni, An sialphaw leh an dar lukhum an bang a, Nangmah chawimawitu an lo ni e." 
Ezekiel27:11 Sipai rual Arvad mi nen an chuang, i kulhpui chungah, I kulhbing Gammad-ho ral vengin, An sialphaw an bag e, i kulhpui velin, Nangmah cheimawitu an lo ni e." 
Ezekiel27:12 I ngah vangin, sum leh pai ro thil tinreng, Tarsis chu dawr tu che a lo ni a, I bungrua leiin a hlan che, Tangkarua, thir, rangva leh suante pawh." 
Ezekiel27:13 Javan, Tubal, Mesek, nang dawrtu che hian, Sal leh dar bungbelin an dawr che, i bungraw neihna'n." 
Ezekiel27:14 Beth-togarmah chuan sakawr, indo sakawr leh sabengtung hlanin I bungrua an lei thin." 
Ezekiel27:15 Dedan mite i dawrtute an ni a, Tui kam hmun tin i sumdawn hmun a lo ni, Saingho leh eboni an hlan che-dawvankaina'n." 
Ezekiel27:16 Bungrua i ngah avangin, Edom chu i dawrtu a lo ni a, Emerald lung, puan senduk, puan cheimawi, Puanzaisin, thival, rubi lungtein an dawr che." 
Ezekiel27:17 Juda leh Israelte pawh a dawrtuche an ni a, Minnith buh leh Pannag, khawizu,Hriak leh thinghnaiin an dawr che." 
Ezekiel27:18 I ngah vangin, sum leh pai ro thil tinreng, Damaska i dawrtu a lo ni a, Helbon uain leh beram hmul varin an dawr che." 
Ezekiel27:19 Uzal uain chu rawn lain an lei, i bungruate, Thir tle tak, thkathing leh fute i sumdawnna." 
Ezekiel27:20 Sakawr chung phah puantein Dedan chuan a dawr che a. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabia leh kedar lalte nangmah dawrtute an ni vek, Beram note, Berampate, kelpatein an dawr che." 
Ezekiel27:22 Seba leh Raamah sumdawngtute chu a dawrtu che an lo ni; rimtui tha berte, lunghlu chitin leh rangkachaktein, an dawr che." 
Ezekiel27:23 Haran, Kanneh leh Eden, Seba, Assuria leh kilmad sumdawngtute chu A dawrtuche an ni a." 
Ezekiel27:24 Chungte chu an ni dawrtu che, Silhfen tha mi, puan dumpawl leh puan cheimawi, Chhuatphah zemawi nen, Hruihrual nghet taka cherin, Heng hian an dawr che." 
Ezekiel27:25 Tarsis lawngte chu i bungraw phur dual dualtute an ni, I lo mukin tuipui chungah i lo ropui ta." 
Ezekiel27:26 I lawng khalhtun tuipui fawnah a khalh lut chia, Khawchhak thliin a nuai ral che, tuipui laiah." 
Ezekiel27:27 I sum leh pai, I dum leh pai, i bungruate, i sumdawn thil, I lawng mite, lawng khalhtu, tuahremtute, I hlanveltu leh raltu mite, nangmaha awm, I chhunga awm zawng zawngte nen, In pil bo ang, tuipui laiah, i chhiat niin." 
Ezekiel27:28 I lawng khalhtute au thawmah, I vela mite an khur e." 
Ezekiel27:29 Lawng kar ngul vuantute zawng zawng, lawng mite leh, Tuipuia khalhtute zawng zawng chhukin, An ding vau kamah." 
Ezekiel27:30 I chung thu-ah an aw hriat thamin an chhuah ang, Lungchhe takin an tap ang a, An lu-ah vaivutte phulin, an tal ang vut zingah." 
Ezekiel27:31 Nangmah vanga inziat kawngin, an feng ang, saiip puan, Lungchhe vankaia tapin an sun ang che, nasa takin." 
Ezekiel27:32 Nangmah sunin an chham ang, an tah hla, Tunge tura ang awm le- Tuipui laia dairial chang ta hi?" 
Ezekiel27:33 I bungruate tuipuia chhuakin, Mi tamtak a hrai tlai thin, Lei lalte zawng i tihausa, I sum leh pai tam, i bungruain." 
Ezekiel27:34 Tuipui thukah i chhiatni khan, I sumdawnna thil, i mi zawng zawng, Rial ang an ral ta, nangmah nenin." 
Ezekiel27:35 Tuikam mi zawg zawngin rapthlak an ti che, An lalte lah hlauin an thlabar, A sak-hmel pawh a dang zo ve.Mite zinga sumdawngtuten an chek khum che, Mi tan tihkhaiah i lo chang ta, 'I lang leh tawh ngai lo ang le!,' tiin an tah khum che." 
Ezekiel27:36 Mite zinga sumdawngtuten an chek khum che, Mi tan tihkhaiah i lo chang ta, 'I lang leh tawh ngai lo ang le!,' tiin an tah khum che." 
Ezekiel28:1 LALPA PATHIAN thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel28:2 Mihring fapa, tura hotu hnenah chuan sawi la,'LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti: I rilru a chapo a, pathian ka ni a, tuipui laia pathian thuthmunah ka thu, i ti a, mahse mihring mai i ni a, pathian i ni lo a, patian rilru ang pu-ah in ngai mah la:" 
Ezekiel28:3 Daniela aiin i fing zawk a, i lakak thuruk reng reng a awm thei lo a," 
Ezekiel28:3 Daniela aiin i fing zawk a, i lakak thuruk reng reng a awm thei lo a," 
Ezekiel28:4 i fin leh i remhriatnain i lo intihausa a, i ro bawmah tangka leh rangkachak i khung a," 
Ezekiel28:5 i finna nasa tak leh i sumdawnnain sum i tipunga, i hausak em avangin i rilru a lo chapo ta a;" 
Ezekiel28:6 chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti: Pathian rilru ang pua i in ngaih avangin," 
Ezekiel28:7 ngai rawh, awze mi, hnam tihbaiawm tak i hnenah ka rawntir dawn a ni; i finna rah mawi chungah an khandaih an vilik ang a, i ropuina an tikhawlo ang." 
Ezekiel28:8 Khur thukah an tir lut ang chia, tuipui laia an thahte thihin i thi ang." 
Ezekiel28:9 A thattu che hmaah chuan,'Pathian ka ni,' i la ti cheu dawn em ni? A hliamtu che kutah, chuan pathian i ni lo a, mihring mai i ni zawk." 
Ezekiel28:10 Awze mite kutah, serhtan loh thihin i thi ang; ka tawng tawh si a,"" tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel28:11 Chu lo pawh chu LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel28:12 Mihring fapa, tura lal sunna hla phuah la, a hnenah, Heti hian LALPA PATHIAN-in tha famkim tak, finnaa khat, mawina tinreng!" 
Ezekiel28:13 Pathian huan Edenah i cheng; Lunghlu tinreng i in bel a, Sardion, topaz lung leh diamond. Berul, Onuks, jaspi, sapphir, smarakdin, karbankul, A phum nghehna a ziak mawina rangkachaka siamte Nangmah siam nia buatsaih tawhte chu." 
Ezekiel28:14 Nang chu vengtu cherub hriak thih i ni; Pathian tlang thianghlimah ka awmtir chia, Meivam iang lung zingah i leng." 
Ezekiel28:15 I tha famkim siama i awm ni ata, Nangmaha khawlohna a awm hma reng zawng." 
Ezekiel28:16 I sumdawnna a pung tual tual, A tikhat che pawngnekin, Sualah i lo tlu e, Pathian tlang hnawmhnea'n ka hnawl che, Vengtu cherubin a hnawt chhuak che, Meivam iang lung zing ata." 
Ezekiel28:17 I mawina vanga lo chapoin, I ropuinain i finna tikhawloin, Leiah ka paih chia, Lalte hmaah mualah ka pho che-ennawmah." 
Ezekiel28:18 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, lamho zinga mi anmahni zat theuh nupuiah an man a, an kal bopui ta a: tin, an ram lamah chuan an hawng a, khawpui chu an chei leh a, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
Ezekiel28:19 Mite zinga a hria apiang che mak tiha'n, tihkhaiah i lo chang ta, I awm ngai reng reng tawh lo ang le,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel28:20 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hneah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel28:21 Mihring fapa, Sidon hmachhawn la, a chungthu sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel28:22 Heti hian LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti: Ka dodal che a ni, aw sidon, Ka tilang ang, ka ropuina, nangmahah LALPA ka nihzia an hria ang a, Amahah ro ka rel hunah chuan, Ka entir ngei ang, ka thianghlimna." 
Ezekiel28:23 A kawtthlerah thisen leh hripui ka thlen ang, A chhungah mi hliam an tlu ang a,Hmun kil tin, ata, chemsenin, Tin, LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel28:24 Tichuan Israel chhungte tan chhuntu tur hnim hlingnei a awm lo ang a, a velaan mahni hmusittute zingah tinatu tur hling a awm tawh lo ang; tin, kei hi LALPA PATHIAN ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel28:25 Heti hian LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni: Israel chhungte chu an darhna ram mite zing ata ka hruai khawm leh hunah hnamte mithmuhah anmahniah ka thianghlimna ka entir hunah chuan Jakoba hnena ka pek, an ram ngeiah chuan an cheng tawh ang.Tichuan him takin an awm tawh ang; a ni, in te an sa ang a, grep huante an siam ang a, him takin an awm ang, an vela hmusittu zawng zawngte chungah ro ka rel hunah chuan kei hi LALPA an Pathian ka ni tih an hria ang,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel28:26 Tichuan him takin an awm tawh ang; a ni, in te an sa ang a, grep huante an siam ang a, him takin an awm ang, an vela hmusittu zawng zawngte chungah ro ka rel hunah chuan kei hi LALPA an Pathian ka ni tih an hria ang,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel29:1 Kum sawmna, thla sawmna, chumi thla, ni sawm leh ni hnihnaah chuan LALPA thu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel29:2 Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Pharaoa hmachhawn la, a chungah leh Aigupta mi zawng zawng chungah thu sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel29:3 Sawi la,'LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, Aigupta lal Pharaoa, luipuite laia awlepui ropui tak, ka lupui hi ka ta a ni, keimah ngei atan ka siam a ni,' titu, ka do che a ni." 
Ezekiel29:4 I khabeahte nghakuaiin ka man ang chia, luipuia sanghate chu i phuhlipah ka tibet ang a, luipui lai ata i phuhlipah sangha zawng zawngte nen chuan ka pawt chhuak ang che." 
Ezekiel29:5 Tin, thlalerah ka paih ang chia, nang leh i luipuia sangha zawng zawngte pawh; tamlakah i tla ang a, i ruang hlawm a ni lo ang a, phum i ni hek lo ang; ram sakawlhte leh chungleng savate hnenah chaw atan ka pe ang che." 
Ezekiel29:6 Israel chhungte tan luang tiang mai an lo nin tak avangin Aigupta rama cheng zawng zawngte chuan kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang. 
Ezekiel29:7 Kutin an vawn chein i lo tliak a, an kokiah i chhun thler a, an rinchhan chia, i tliak a, an kawngte chu a sai dawt dawt a." 
Ezekiel29:8 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh, i chungah khandaih ka rawn thlen ang a, i lak ata mi leh sa ka rawt bo vek ang." 
Ezekiel29:9 Tin, Aigupta ram, ram tiau leh khawram a ni mai ang a, kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang; luipui hi ka ta a ni a, ka siam a ni, a tih avangin." 
Ezekiel29:10 Chuvangin ka do chia, i luipui pawh; Suene kulh atangin Ethiopia ramrti thlengin Aigupta ram chu ram tiau leh khawramah ka siam ang." 
Ezekiel29:11 Mihring kein a chil ngai lo ang a, sate pawh an kal ngai hek lo ang; kum sawmli chhung pawhin luahin a awm hek lo ang." 
Ezekiel29:12 Tin, Aigupta ram chu, ram tiaute zinga pakhatah ka siam ang a, a khawpuite chu khawpui ramte zingah kum sawmli a tiau ang: Aigupta mite chu hnamte zingah ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka tidarh ang." 
Ezekiel29:13 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti si a: kum sawmli hnuah chuan an darhna mite lakah chuan Aigupta mite chu ka khawm leh ang: 
Ezekiel29:14 Aigupta mite awmdan la let ang a, an pianna ram, Pathros ramah ka tir ang; tin, tah chuan tlawm takin an lal ang." 
Ezekiel29:15 Lalna ram tlawm ber a ni ang, hnamte zingah a intilal tawh hek lo ang; hnamdang chunga thu a neih tawh lohna'n anmahni ka ti te dawn a ni." 
Ezekiel29:16 An lam hawi apiangin ankhawlohna an hriatchhuah thin avangin Israelte rinpui an ni tawh lo ang; tin, LALPA PATHIAN chu ka ni tih an hria ang, a ti,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel29:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sawmhnih leh kum sarihna, thla khatna, chumi thla ni khat niah LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel29:18 Mihring fapa, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chuan tura chungah hna ropui tak thawk turin a sipai rual chu a ti a, mitin chhipte chuan a kawlh phah a, mi kokiin a pilh phah bawk a; mahse amah leh a sipai rualte pawhin an hnathawhah chuan tura lakah hlawkna engmah an hmu chuang lo." 
Ezekiel29:19 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, Aigupta ram chu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara hnenah ka pe dawn a, a thil ngah rei ruite chu a la bo anga, a rawk ang a, a rallaksak ang; chu chu a sipai rualte hlawh chu a ni mai ang." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ka rawng an bawl avangin Aigupta ram hi an hlawhah ka pe a ni, LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni.Chumi niah chuan Israel chhungte tan ki ka chawr chhuahtir ang a, an zingah chuan i ka ka antir ang; tichuan LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel29:21 Chumi niah chuan Israel chhungte tan ki ka chawr chhuahtir ang a, an zingah chuan i ka ka antir ang; tichuan LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel30:1 LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel30:2 Mihring fapa thu sawi la, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni:"" Chiau vak vak rawh u, Ehei, chu ni tak chu!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Ni a hnai e, LALPA ni chu a hnai e, Chhum zin ni, awze mite chhiatna tur." 
Ezekiel30:4 A lo thleng dawn, chemsen, Aigupta chungah, Thinlai natna Ethiopia chungah; Aigupta-ah mi thah an tlukin, A ngah rei ruite laksakin, a nghahchhan suar ang chim e." 
Ezekiel30:5 Ethiopia, Put leh Lud, hnam tin, leng za chu, Kub leh ram fa tel vete zawng zawng, An tlu ang, chemsenin." 
Ezekiel30:6 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Aigupta tungding tute pawh kha an tlu ang, A chakna chhuan thin pawh chu a tlawm ang; Migdol atangin Suene thlengin khandaihin an tlu vek ang, LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ram tihtiau tawhte zinga pakhat a ni ang a, a khawpuite pawh chu khawpui ram tawhte zinga mi an ni mai ang." 
Ezekiel30:8 Aigupta ramah mei ka chhuah a, a puitute zawng zawng ka tihchhiat hunah chuan LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel30:9 Chumi niah chuan Ethiopia mi inring lohote tizam turin ka hnen ata mi tirh lawngin an kal ang a; tin, Aigupta ni ang bawkin thinlung manganna tak an chungah a thleng ve ang; ngai rawh, a lo thleng mek e!" 
Ezekiel30:10 `LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutin Aigupta thil ngah rei ruite chu ka tibo ang. 
Ezekiel30:11 Ram tichhe turin amah leh a hote, hnamte zinga tihbaiawm takte chu hruai thlen an ni ang, Aigupta chungah chuan khandaih an lek ang a, ram chu mi ruangin an tikhat ang." 
Ezekiel30:12 Tin, luipuite chu ka tikang a, ram chu mi sualte hnenah ka hralh ang; a ram leh a chhunga awm zawng zawng chu awze mite kutin ka titiau vang: kei LALPA hian ka sawi tawh a ni." 
Ezekiel30:13 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Milimte chu ka tichhia ang a, Noph khua ata milimte ka tibo ang, Aigupta-ah hotu reng reng an awm tawh lo ang: tin, Aigupta ramah chuan hlauhna ka awmtir ang." 
Ezekiel30:14 Pathros chu ka titiau vang a, Zoan-ah chuan, mei ka chhuah ang a, No khua chuan ka hlen ang." 
Ezekiel30:15 Tin, Aigupta kulh sin khaw chungah ka thinrim ka hrithla ang a, No khuaa mipuite chu ka rawt bo ang." 
Ezekiel30:16 Tin, Aigupta-ah chuan mei ka chhuah ang a, Sin khua chu mangang takin a awm ang a, No khua pawh a chim vek ang: Noph khua chuan chhunah hmelma a nei fo ang." 
Ezekiel30:17 Aven leh Pibeseth khaw tlangvalte chu khandaihin an tlu ang a, Chung khuate chu sala hruaiin an awm." 
Ezekiel30:18 Aigupta nghawngkawl ka tihtliaha, a chakna a chapo pui thin ka tihtawp hunah chuan Tehaphnehes khuaah chuan ni a thim ang; amah zawng chhumin a hliah ang a, a fanute chu sala hruaiin an awm ang." 
Ezekiel30:19 Hetiang hian Aigupta ramah thu ka hlen ang: tichuan kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel30:20 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sawm leh kum khatna, chumi thla ni sarih niah chuan LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel30:21 `Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Pharaoa ban chu ka titliak a; tin, ngai rawh, khandaih keng tura a chak lehna'n damdawi hnawih leh tuam a hlawh lo." 
Ezekiel30:22 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, Aigupta lal Pharaoa chu ka do a ni; a ban a tha lam leh a tliak tawh hnulam pawh chu ka ti tliak ang a; tin, a kut ata khandaih chu ka ti tla ang." 
Ezekiel30:23 Tin, Aigupta mite chu hnamte zingah ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka tiphirsi vek ang." 
Ezekiel30:24 Tin, Babulon lal bante chu ka tichak ang a, a kutah khandaih ka kentir ang a; Pharaoa bante erawh chu ka titliak ang a, a hmaah chuan thihpui khawp hliam rumin a rum ang." 
Ezekiel30:25 Tin, Babulon lal bante chu ka tichak ang a, Pharaoa bante erawh chu ka uai thla ang; tin, Babulon lal kutah ka khandaih ka kentir a, Aigupta lal chunga a lek hunah chuan kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang.Tin, Aigupta mite chu hnamte zingah ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka tiphirsi vek ang a; tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang"" tiin." 
Ezekiel30:26 Tin, Aigupta mite chu hnamte zingah ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka tiphirsi vek ang a; tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang"" tiin." 
Ezekiel31:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sawm leh kum khatna, thla thumna, chumi thla ni khat niah chuan LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel31:2 Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Pharaoa leh a khua leh a mite hnenah sawi la: Ropuinaah tu nge i an le?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Ngai rawh, Lebanon zarmawi leh Buk, hlim chhah, sang mawi, A zik chhum kara leng i iang e." 
Ezekiel31:4 Siktui thiang chawm, lipui siama thang tual tual, A phunna luiten an luan vel a, Ram thing tin, chawmna'n a luantir e." 
Ezekiel31:5 Chutin ram thing zawng hnehin a sang zual e, A zar a thang a, a tang a sei, Tui tamtak chawm, hnianghnarin." 
Ezekiel31:6 Bu an khuar e, a zarah, chungleng sava ten, A zar hnuaiah sa tinrengin nau an nei;A hlim hnuaiah hnam ropui zawng an cheng e." 
Ezekiel31:7 Chutin a mawi, a ropuina, a zar sei zelin, A zung tan tui zawng a hnianghnar e." 
Ezekiel31:8 Pathian huana sidar thingten an chhing lo e, a zar, far thingin a iang zo lo, a tang pawh thingsiain a iang hek lo, A mawinaah Pathian thing a chhing zo ve." 
Ezekiel31:9 A tang titamin ka siam mawi a, Pathian huana Eden thing zawngten an itsik e,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel31:10 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni; A lo san em ema, chhumte zinga a zik a lena, a thinlungin a sanzia chu a chapopui avangin," 
Ezekiel31:11 hnamte zinga mi chak tak kutah ka mantir ang: a suahsual zia ang zelin a hrem ang a, ka hnawtchhuak ang." 
Ezekiel31:12 Tin, awze mi hnamte zinga tihbaiawm takte chuan an kit ang a, an hluihlawn ang: tlangahte, ruamahte a tangte a tla rem rum ang a, chu ram tui luankawr zawng zawngahte a zarte chu a tliak rem rum ang: khawvela mi zawng zawngte chu an hlim ata an chhuak ang a, amah chu an kalsan ang." 
Ezekiel31:13 A chhiatnaah chuan chungleng sava zawng zawngte an cheng ang a, a tang chungahte chuan ramsate an awm ang." 
Ezekiel31:14 Heng hi tuia chawm thing zawng zawng an intihsan loh a, an zik chhum kara leng lo a, tuia chawm thing reng rengin an sanzia an chhuan hek lohna tur a ni: lei hmun hnuaihnung bera khuarkhuruma chhuk ta, mihring fate zingah kal turin, thihnaa mantir an ni vek tawh si a." 
Ezekiel31:15 Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Seola a chhuk ni-ah chuan tui thuk tak chu amah ka suntir a, a luite ka chawlhtir a tui tamtakte chu a luang lo a; Lebanon amah ka suntir bawk aram thing zawng zawngte amah avangin an chau zo ta." 
Ezekiel31:16 Hnamte pawh a tlu thawmah chuan ka tikhur a, khuarkhuruma chhuk tawhte hnena seola ka paihthlak ni chuan; Eden thing zawng zawngte, Lebanon thing tha thate, tuia chawm zawng zawngte chu lei hnuaihnung berah chuan thlamuanin an awm ta." 
Ezekiel31:17 Khandaiha thahte hnenah chuan Seolah an chhuk ta bawk a; ani hnamte zinga a hlim hnuaia cheng thin, a kut ke te ngei pawh chu.Eden thingte zingah ropuina leh lennaah tu nge nang ang awm? Mahse Eden thingte nen chuan lei hmun hnuaihnung berah paihthlak i ni ang; khandaiha thah, serhtan lohte zingah i mu tur a ni, Hei hi Pharaoa leh a khua leh tuite chu an ni, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel31:18 Eden thingte zingah ropuina leh lennaah tu nge nang ang awm? Mahse Eden thingte nen chuan lei hmun hnuaihnung berah paihthlak i ni ang; khandaiha thah, serhtan lohte zingah i mu tur a ni, Hei hi Pharaoa leh a khua leh tuite chu an ni, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel32:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sawm leh kum hnihna, thla sawm leh thla hnihna, chum thla ni khat niah chuan LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel32:2 Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Pharaoa sunna hla phuah la, a hnenah: Hnamte sakeibaknei vanglai anpui chu! Tuipui awlepui i iang zawk e; I hnara tuite tiphuanin, i kein i chawk nu, I luite i tibawlhhlawh zo ta." 
Ezekiel32:3 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ka lenin nang an man ang chia, mi tam tak nen, Ka lenin nang an man ang che." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ka hluihlawn ang chia, khawmualah, Ka paih ang che, tamlakah; chungleng zawng zawng ka ko khawm ang, i chungah, ka ti tlai ang, lei pumpui ramsa, nangmahin." 
Ezekiel32:5 Tlang tinah i sa ka hlui ang a, I ruangin ruamte a tikhat ang." 
Ezekiel32:6 I chenna ram tlang thlengin, ka bual ang, i thisenin, kawr tin a khat bawk ang, nangmahin." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ka tihchimih hunah che chuan, Van ka khuhin arsi ka ti thim ang, ni ka hliah bo vang, chhumin, Thlain a eng a chhuah lo ang." 
Ezekiel32:8 Van eng zawng ka tithim ang, i chungah, i ramah thim ka lentir ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" ti rawh." 
Ezekiel32:9 I hriat loh rama hnamte zinga i chhiatna ka thlen hunah chuan mi tamtakte thinlung ka ti chi-ai ang. 
Ezekiel32:10 A ni mi tamtak nangmahah mak tiin ka siam ang a, an hmaa ka khandaih ka vilik hunah chuan nangmah avangin an lalte pawhin rapthlak an tiin an hlau em em ang; i tluk niah chuan mi tinin an nun chan hlauin an khur an khur ang." 
Ezekiel32:11 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti si a: Babulon lal khandaih i chungah a lo thleng dawn. 
Ezekiel32:12 I mite ka tluktir ang, ralhrat mite khandaih, Hnamte zinga tihbaiawm berte an ni, An tichhia ang, Aigupta mi ropuina, A mipui zawngte an boral ang." 
Ezekiel32:13 Tui tam tak kam ramsa zawng a tiboral ang, Mi kete chuan a pal nu tawh lo ang a, Ramsa kete pawhin a pal nu tawh hek lo ang." 
Ezekiel32:14 Chutin tui ka tifim ang a, Ka luantir ang, luite chu, hriak angin, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel32:15 Aigupta ram ka tihtiau chhiata, A nghahna zawng zawngah saruakin, A chhunga chengte ka rawtbo hunah chuan, kei LALPA ka ni tih an hre ngei ang." 
Ezekiel32:16 Hei hi an tah hla tur chu a ni; hnamtin fanuten hei hian tapin Aigupta leh a mi zawng zawngte an sun ang,"" tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel32:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sawm leh kum hnihna, chumi thla ni sawm leh panga niah chuan LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel32:18 Mihring fapa, Aigupta mipuite chu tah vak vak la, amah leh hnam hmingthang tak fanute chu khuarkhuruma chhuk tawhte hnenah lei hnuaihnung lamah chuan paih thla rawh." 
Ezekiel32:19 Mawinaah tu nge i khum le? Chhuk la, serhtan lohte zingah chuan zal rawh." 
Ezekiel32:20 Khandaiha thah tawhte zingah chuan an tlu ang a, khandaih hnenah pek an ni tawh a, amah leh a mi zawng zawngte chu hnuk bo rawh u." 
Ezekiel32:21 Seola awm ralhrat mi chak tak takte chuan amah leh a tanpuitute an bia ang; an chhuk a, an mu reng a, khandaiha thah, serhtan lohte chu." 
Ezekiel32:22 Chutah chuan Assur leh a hote zawng zawng an awm a; an thlante chu ama velah a awm a: an zain thah, khandaiha tlu vek an ni."
