Ezekiel32:23 An thlante chu khuarkhurum thuk berah a awm a, a thlan velah chuan a hote an awm a: an zain thah, khandaiha tlu vek, mi nung ram tiraltitute chu an ni." 
Ezekiel32:24 Chutah chuan Elam leh a thlan velah a hote an awm a; an zain thah, khandaia tlu, lei hnuaihnunga serhtan loha chhuk mi nung ram tiraltitute, an mualphona khuarkhuruma chhukpuitute an ni a." 
Ezekiel32:25 Mi thahte zingah chuan amah leh a hote mutna an siamsak a, a thlante chu ama velah a awm a; an zain serhtan loh, khandaiha thah an ni a; an hlauhawmna chu mi nung ram raltitna a ni thin a, khuarkhuruma chhuk tate nen chuan an mualphona an phur a, mi thahte zingah chuan an awmtir a." 
Ezekiel32:26 Chutah chuan Mesek leh Tubal, an hote nen an awm a; an thlante chu amah velah a awm a; an zain serhtan loh, khandaiha thah an ni a; an hlauhawmnain minung ram a tiralti thin si a." 
Ezekiel32:27 Serhtan loh, mi chak tlute, indo hriamhrei nena Seol chhuk tate, an khandaih lukhama, an ruhte chunga an phawte awm hnenah chuan an mu lo ang: anni zawng minung rama mi chak tiraltitute an ni si a." 
Ezekiel32:28 Nang chu serhtan lohte zingah bung rem rumin i awm ang a, khandaiha thi te hnenah i mu ang." 
Ezekiel32:29 Chutah chuan Edom, a lalte leh a hotute zawng zawng an awm a; an chak teh na a, khandaiha thahte zingah an zalh a ni; serhtan loh, khuarkhuruma chhuk tawhte hnenah an mu a." 
Ezekiel32:30 Chutah chuan hmarlam hotute, an vaiin, sidon mi zawng zawng, thahte zinga chhuk tawhte nen chuan an mualpho tlang ta a ni." 
Ezekiel32:31 Pharaoa chuan a lo hmu ang a, a mite zawng zawng chu a thlamuan phah ang, Pharaoa leh a sipai rual zawng zawng, khandaiha thahte ngei pawh chu, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni.Mi nung ramah chuan raltitna a lentir a, serhtan loh, khandaiha thahte zingah a mu ang, Pharaoa leh a mi zawng zawngte ngei chu, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" a ti a" 
Ezekiel32:32 Mi nung ramah chuan raltitna a lentir a, serhtan loh, khandaiha thahte zingah a mu ang, Pharaoa leh a mi zawng zawngte ngei chu, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" a ti a" 
Ezekiel33:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel33:2 Mihring fapa, i hnam fate hnenah,'Ram chunga khandaih chu ka rawn thlen chuan ram mite chuan an zing ata mi pakhat an thlan chhuaha, enthlatua an dah chuan," 
Ezekiel33:3 anin ram chunga khandaih lo thleng a hmuh chuan tawtawrawt a ham ang a, mipuite chu a in ralrintir ang;" 
Ezekiel33:4 tichuan tupawh tawtawrawt ri hriaa pawisa lotu chu, khandaih lo thlengin boral phah ta mah se la, a thisen mawh chu amah ngeiin a phur tur a ni." 
Ezekiel33:5 Tawtawrawt ri a hriata a pawisak loh avangin a thisen mawh chu a phur mai tur a ni. A lo pawisak erawh chuan a nun a hum him dawn a ni. 
Ezekiel33:6 Amaherawhchu enthlatu chuan khandaih lo thleng chu a hmuha, a tawtawrawt a ham loh a, mipuite chu an inralrin loh a, khandaih chu a lo thlena, an zinga mi tu emawin a boral phah chuan a khawlohnain a boral a ni ang a, a thisen phuba chu enthlatu lakah ka la ang,' ti rawh." 
Ezekiel33:7 Chutiang chuan nang, mihring fapa, Israel chhungte tan enthlatuah ka siam che a ni; chuvangin ka kaa thu chhuak hi ngaithla la, ka hnen ata inralrinna tur thu chu an hnenah hrilh rawh." 
Ezekiel33:8 Mi suaksual hnenah chuan,'Aw mi suaksual pa, i thi ngei tur a ni' ka tihin, mi suaksual chu a awmdan kalsan tura i hrilh loh chuan mi suaksual chu a khawlohnaah a thi ang a, a thisen phuba erawh chu i lakah ka la ang." 
Ezekiel33:9 Amaherawhchu mi sual chu a awmdan kalsan si loh chuan, a khawlohnaah a thi ang a, nang erawh chuan i nun i humhim a ni ang." 
Ezekiel33:10 Tin, mihring fapa, nangin Israel chhungte hnenah thu sawi la,'Hetiang hian in ti a, kan bawhchhiatnate leh kan sualnate chuan kan riral a ni, engtin nge kan nun theih reng ang?' in ti a." 
Ezekiel33:11 An hnenah chuan,'A nuna kan nun chhung chu, mi suaksual thihnaah hian lawmna reng ka nei lo a, mi sualsualin a awmdan a kalsan a, a nun hi ka lawmzawng a ni zawk. I awmdan tha lo atang chuan kir r'u, Aw, Israel chhungte u, engah nge in thih ang le? Tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,' tiin sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel33:12 Tin, nang mihring fapa, i hnam fate hnenah chuan sawi la, Mi fel felna chuan a bawhchhiatna niah chuan amah chu a chhanhim lo ang a" 
Ezekiel33:13 Mi fel hnenah chuan,'Inung ngei ang,' tih ka sawiin, a felna ringa thil a tihsual chuan a thilfel tih pakhat mah hriatreng a ni lo ang; a thil lo tihsaulnaah chuan a thi zawk ang." 
Ezekiel33:14 Tin, misual hnenah,'I thi ngei ang,' ka tih leh thungin, a sualnate a hawisana a thiang leh a dik a lo tih a," 
Ezekiel33:15 Misual chuan mi dahkhamte a pekkir a, a thil rukte a pek leha, nuna dante a zawh a, khawlohna engmah a tih loh chuan a nung ngei ang a, a thi lo ang." 
Ezekiel33:16 Sualna a lo tih tak engmah kha hriatreng a ni tawh lo ang a, a thiang leh a dik chu a lo ti tawh a, a nung ngei ang." 
Ezekiel33:17 Mahse i hnam fate chuan,' LALPA thil tih dan hi a rual lo e,' an tihin anmahni tih dan a fel lo zawk a ni si a." 
Ezekiel33:18 Mi fel chuan a felna a hawisan a, thil sual a lo tih chuan chumi avang chuan a thi mai ang." 
Ezekiel33:19 Tin, mi sualin a sualna a hawisana, a thiang leh a dik chu a tih chuan chumi azarah chuan a nung ang." 
Ezekiel33:20 Mahse'LALPA tih dan hi a rual lo e,' in ti a, aw, Israel chhungte u, mi tin, chu mahni tih dan ang zelin ka relsak ang che u,' a ti a." 
Ezekiel33:21 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kan saltan kum sawm leh kum hnihna, thla sawmna, chumi ni thla ni nga niah chuan Jerusalem ata tlanchhuak mi pakhat ka hnenah a lo kal a,""Khawpui chu hneh a ni ta,"" a rawn ti a." 
Ezekiel33:22 Tin, chumi tlanchhuak chu a lo kal hma tlai lamah chuan LALPA chuan ka chungah a kut a nghat a, zing lama ka hnena a lo kal chuan ka ka mi lo antir hman a, tichuan ka ka chu ka ang a, tawng thei loin ka awm ta lo." 
Ezekiel33:23 Tin LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel33:24 Mihring fapa, Isarael rama hmun ram tawh hnua awmte chuan,'Abrahama chu pakhat a ni a, ram chu a luah a, keini erawh chu tamtak kan ni a; ram chu rochun tura pek a ni tawh ang chu,' tiin a sawi a." 
Ezekiel33:25 Chuvangin an hnenah chuan LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti: Sa thisen in ei a, in milimte lamah in mitte in len chho a, thisen in chhuah a, nangnin ram chu in chang ang maw?" 
Ezekiel33:26 In khandaih in ring a, thil tenawm in ti a, mi tinin thenawmpa nupui in ti khawlo a, nangnin ram chu in chang ang maw?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Hetiang hian an hnenah i sawi tur a ni, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: A nuna ka nun chhung chu, hmun ram tawh hnua awmte chu khandaihin an tlu ngei ang a, tamlaka awmte chu sakawlh hnenahte ei zawh atan ka pe ang a, kulh nghet leh puka awmte chu hripuiin an thi ang." 
Ezekiel33:28 Tin, ram pawh chu ka ti tiauin, rapthlak takah ka siam ang a, a thltihtheihna, a chapopui chu a kin tawh ang; Israel tlangte chu a tiau vang a, tumah an veivaktawh lo ang." 
Ezekiel33:29 Thil tenawm an tih avanga ram chu ka tih tiau a, rapthlak taka ka siam hunah chuan kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel33:30 Tin, nang, Mihring fapa, bang bulah kawngkaahte i hnam fate chuan an sawi huai huai ang chia, mi tinin an unaute hnenah,'Hawh teh u khai! LALPA hnen ata thuchhuak i ngaithla ang u,' an in ti ang." 
Ezekiel33:31 Tin, a hlawp hlawpin i hnenah an lo kal ang a, ka mite ang maiin i hmaah an thu ang a, i thu an ngaithla ang a, mahse an zawm chuang lo ang: an kain hmangaihna nasa tak an tilang ang a, an thinlung erawh chuan hlepna lam a pan ang." 
Ezekiel33:32 Tin, ngaiteh nang chu an tan chuan hmangaihna hla, mawi taka sak leh tum ang i ni ang: i thu te chu an ngaithla a, mahse an zawm chuang lo ang.Hei hi a lo thlen hunah (ngai rawh, a lo thleng mek e), an zingah zawlnei a awm tih an hre dawn nia,' a ti e, ti rawh"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel33:33 Hei hi a lo thlen hunah (ngai rawh, a lo thleng mek e), an zingah zawlnei a awm tih an hre dawn nia,' a ti e, ti rawh"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel34:1 Tin LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel34:2 Mihring fapa, Isrel ho berampute hnen ngei ah chuan, heti hian LALPA PATHIAN in a ti a ni:'Israel ho berampu, mahni in chawm mai te chu an chung a pik e! berampute chuan beram chu an chawm lo ang em ni?" 
Ezekiel34:3 A thaute chu in ei a, a hmulin in in thuam a, a thau thaute chu in talh a, Beramte chu in chawm si lo." 
Ezekiel34:4 Natna veite in ti chakin, dam lote in ti damlo a, ke tliakte chu in tuam lo a, hnawh bote in rawn hruai hek lo; khauh tak leh natakin in inthuam ta zawk a." 
Ezekiel34:5 Berampute an awm loh avngin tihdarhin an lo awm ta a, an lo darh a, ramsa kawlhte chaw mai an lo ni ta a." 
Ezekiel34:6 Ka Beramte chu tlangtin leh mualtinah an vak bo a; a ni, ka Beramte chu lei chung zawng zawngah an lo darh ta; ngaihsaktu leh zawngtu reng an awm lo,' tiin sawi rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel34:7 Chuvangin berampute u, LALPA thu hi ngai thla rawh u," 
Ezekiel34:8 A nuna ka nun chhung chu,"" tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni, berampute an awm loh a, beramputen ka beramte an zawn loh a, beramte an chawm loh a, anmahni an in chawm zawk avangin ka beramte chu ramsakawlhte chaw mai an lo ni a, ka beramte chu saseh mai an lo ni ta ngei a;" 
Ezekiel34:9 Chuvangin nangni berampute u, LALPA thu hi hre rawh u." 
Ezekiel34:10 Heti hian LALPA PATHIAN chuan ati a ni:'Ngai rawh u, berampute chu ka do a ni; an kut ata ka beramte ka chhuh ang a, ka beramte an enkawlna ka titawp ang a, berampute pawh anmahni an inchawm tawh hek lo ang; an angchhung ata ka beramte ka la chhuak ang a, an tan eitur a nih tawh lohna'n,' tiin." 
Ezekiel34:11 Heti hian LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti si a: Ngai rawh u, kei, keimah ngei hian ka beramte ka zawng ang a, ka zawng chhuak ang." 
Ezekiel34:12 berampuin a beram darhte zinga a beram rualte a zawn lai angin ka beramte ka zawng chhuak ang; khawdur ni leh thim hnuaia am darhna zawng zawng ata ka zawng chhuak ang. 
Ezekiel34:13 Tin, mite zing ata ka la chhuak ang a, ram tin, ata ka khawm ang a, an ram ngeiah ka hruai lut ang; Israel tlangahte, tuikawr ruamahte, mi chenna hmun zawng zawngahte ka tlattir ang." 
Ezekiel34:14 Hlobet tha tak hmunahte ka tlattir ang a, an huang chu Israel tlangsangahte a awm ang, huang tha tah chhungah an bawk ang a, Israel tlanmg chunga hlobet dawng hmunahte an tla ang." 
Ezekiel34:15 Keimah ngeiin ka beramte chu ka chawm ang a, ka bawhtir hle hle ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel34:16 A bo chu ka zawng ang a, hnawhbote chu ka hruaikir ang a, an ketliakte chu ka tuam ang a, ka tichak ang: a thau leh a chakte chu ka tibo ang a; dik takin ka chawm ang." 
Ezekiel34:17 Tin, nangni thu-ah zawng, aw ka beram rualte u, heti hian LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u ka beramte kar thu ka relsak ang a, berampate, kelpate pawh." 
Ezekiel34:18 Ran tlatna hmun tha tak chunga tlat chu in tan thil tenawu anga langin, in tlatna neih chhun chu in chil chhe mai zawk a ni maw? Tin, tuifim takte in inzawhin in pal nu mai mai a ni maw?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Ka beramte erawh chuan in rah hnu an ei a, in pal nut hnu an in a ni." 
Ezekiel34:20 Chuvangin heti hian LALPA PATHIAN chuan an hnenah a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, kei, keimah ngei hian ran cherte leh ran thaute kar thu ka relsak ang." 
Ezekiel34:21 A chak lote chu in dar leh inpangtein in nek a, in kitein in pir a, in tidarh a;" 
Ezekiel34:22 chuvangin ka beramte chu ka chhanhim ang a, saseh mai an ni tawh lo ang a, beramte kar thu ka relsak ang." 
Ezekiel34:23 Tin, chan chungah berampu pakhat ka dah ang a, ka rwngbawltu Davida ngei chu; a ni chuan anni chu a chawm ang; ani chu an vengtu a ni ang a, anni chu a chawm ang." 
Ezekiel34:24 Tin, kei LALPA hi an pathian ka ni ang a, ka rawngbawltu Davida chu an chunga hotu a ni ang; kei LALPA ngei hian ka sawi tawh a ni." 
Ezekiel34:25 Tin, anmahni nena remna thuthlung ka siam ang a, sakawlhte chu ram ata ka ti bo vang: tin, thlalerahte pawh him takin an cheng ang a, ngaw hnuaiahte an muhil chiah chiah ang." 
Ezekiel34:26 Anmahni leh ka tlangvel hmunte chu mal ka sawm ang a, a huntein ruah ka surtir ang a, malsawm ruahte a sur ang." 
Ezekiel34:27 Tin, rama thing chuan rah a chhuah ang a, leiin a hlawkna a chhuah ang a, an ramah chuan him takin an awm ang; an nghawngkawlte ka tihtliaha, bawiha siamtute kut ata ka chhanchhuah hunah chuan kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel34:28 Hnamdangte sahmim tipuar mai an ni tawh lo ang a, ramsa kawlhte ei ral mai an ni tawh hek lo ang; him takin an awm tawh zawk ang a, tuma'n an tihlau ngai tawh lo ang." 
Ezekiel34:29 Thil phun hmingthang tak ka siamsak ang a, chu ramah chuan tamin a tiral tawh lo vang a, hnamdangte hmuhsitna an tuar tawh hek lo ang." 
Ezekiel34:30 Tin, kei LALPA an PATHIAN hi an hnenah ka awm tih an hriain, anni Israel chhungte pawh ka mite an ni tih an hria ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni.Tin, nangni ka beramte chu mi hring in ni a, tin, kei hi in Pathian ka ni, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" tiin" 
Ezekiel34:31 Tin, nangni ka beramte chu mi hring in ni a, tin, kei hi in Pathian ka ni, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" tiin" 
Ezekiel35:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel35:2 Mihring fapa, Seir tlang hmachhawn la, a chungah thu sawi la," 
Ezekiel35:3 a hnenah, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, aw seir tlang, ka do che a ni; i chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, ka ti tiauin rapthlak takah ka siam ang che." 
Ezekiel35:4 I khawpuite chu ka tiram ang a, i tiau vang; tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih i hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:5 An bawhchhiatna hremna hnuhnung bera an chhiat nia Israel chhungte chu khandaih thiltihtheihna i hlana, i tai reng avangin," 
Ezekiel35:6 A nuna ka nun chhung chu, thisen atan ka buatsaih ang chia, thisenin a um ang che: thisen i huat loh avangin thisen chuan a um ang che, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel35:7 Hetiang hian Seir tlang chu rapthlak taka siamin ka ti tiau vang; a chunga mi veivak thinte chu ka titawp vek ang. 
Ezekiel35:8 A tlangte chu ama mi thahtein ka tikhat ang: i tlangahte, i kawr leh i tuikawr ruamahte khandaiha thahte chu an tlu rem rum ang." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ka ti tiau hlen daih ang chia, i khawpuite chu luahin a awm lo ang: tin, kei hi LALPA ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:10 LALPA chu a awm rng na a, he'ng hnam pahnihte leh ram pahnihte hi ka ta a ni a, ka nei mai ang,' i tih avangin," 
Ezekiel35:11 a nuna ka nun chhung chu, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni, i thinrimna ang zel leh i huatna avanga itsikna i tihlan zia ang zelin ka che dawn a ni: i chung thu ka rel hunah chuan an zingah ka in tilang ang." 
Ezekiel35:12 Tih tiauin an awm ta a, ka hnenah pekin an awm ta,' tia Israel tlangte i sawichhiatna zawng zawng chu kei LALPA hian ka hre vek tih i la hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:13 Ka chungah i kain i intilianin ka chungah thu i tuitam a, ka hre vek mai." 
Ezekiel35:14 Heti hian LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni: lei pumpui lawmnan ka ti tiau vang che.Israel rochun tiau avanga i lawm ang bawkin i chungah ka ti ang: aw Seir tlang leh Edom zawng zawng, a pumin a tiau vang: tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:15 Israel rochun tiau avanga i lawm ang bawkin i chungah ka ti ang: aw Seir tlang leh Edom zawng zawng, a pumin a tiau vang: tin, LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel36:1 Tin, nang mihring fapa, Israel tlangte hnenah thu sawi la, Nangni Israel tlangte u, LALPA thu hi ngaithla rawh u," 
Ezekiel36:2 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: I chungah i hmelmate chuan,'Chei! Hmasang bawlhmun zawng zawngte chu kan ta a ni ta,' antih avangin," 
Ezekiel36:3 thu sawi la LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: hnam la awm chhunte ta tura kil tina an ei chia, an tih tiau che avang leh mi kamtamte titi leh sawichhiata an awmtir che u avangin," 
Ezekiel36:4 nangni Israel tlangte u, LALPA PATHIAN thu hi ngaithla rawh u, LALPA PATHIAN chuan tlangte, mualte, tuikawrte, ruamte leh hmun lo ram tawh te, khawpui tiau tawh, a vela hnam la awm chhunte sahmim tipur mai leh nuihzaburte hnenah heti hian a ti a ni:" 
Ezekiel36:5 Chuvangin lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: hnam la awm chhun leh Edom zawng zawng, rilru lawm taka ka ram neih lo inruat chawpa, mi hmusit taka rallaka siam tumtute chungah chuan thinur em emin thu ka sawi ngei a ni." 
Ezekiel36:6 Chuvangin Israel ram chungchang thu-ah chuan thu sawi la, tlangte mualte, tuikawrte leh ruamte hnenah chuan LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, hnamdangte cheksawlhna in tuar avangin thinur tak leh thinrim takin tu ka sawi a ni." 
Ezekiel36:7 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: I veala hnamte chuan anmahni mualphona an phur ngei ang tiin ka kut ka lek e. 
Ezekiel36:8 Nangni erawh chuan, Aw Israel tlangte u, zar in chhuah ang a, ka mi Israelte tan rah in chhuah ang; an lo kal mai dawn si a." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ngai rawh u, in lama tang ka ni si a, in lam ka hawi ang a, rih durin in awm ang a, chi tuhin in awm bawk ang." 
Ezekiel36:10 In chungah mihring ka tipung ang a, Israel chhungte zawng zawng, an vai pawhin; hmun ramte chu siam thatin a awm ang a, khawpuite chu luahin a awm ang." 
Ezekiel36:11 In chungah mi leh sa ka tipung ang a, an pungin an hmuingil ang: in awmdan hmasa ang khan luahin ka awmtir ang che u a, atira in awm dan ai maha thain ka siam ang che u: tichuan kei hi LALPA ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel36:12 A ni, in chungah mi ka lentir ang a, ka mi Israelte ngei chu; an luah ang chia, i rochan an ni ang a, tun achinah an fate i chantir ngai tawh lo ang." 
Ezekiel36:13 Heti hian LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni: Nang mihringte ei raltu, i mite chan thintu i ni an tih thin che avangin" 
Ezekiel36:14 mihringte i eiral tawh lo ang a, i mite pawh i chan ngai tawh hek lo ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni;" 
Ezekiel36:15 Awze mite hmusitna ka tuartir twah lo ang chia, mite sawichhiat i tuar ngai tawh hek lo ang a, i mite i chan ngai tawh hek lo ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni, ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel36:16 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel36:17 Mihring fapa, Israel chhungte chu anmahni rama an chen lai khan an awmdan leh an thiltihtein an tibawlhhlawh a; ka hmaa an awmdan chu hmeichhe fel loh laia a thianghlim lohna ang mai a ni a." 
Ezekiel36:18 Chuvangin ram chungah thisen an chhuah a, an milimtea an tihbawlhlawh avangin an chungah ka thinrimna chu ka hrithla a." 
Ezekiel36:19 Hnamte zingah ka tidarh a, ram tinah an darhsarh ta a: an awmdan leh an thiltih ang zelin an chungah thu ka relsak a." 
Ezekiel36:20 An va kalna hnamte hnen an thlenin ka hming thianghlim an tibawrhbang a, miten, ""Hengte hi LALPA mite an ni a, ram ata an lo chhuak a nih hi,' an lo tih thinah hian." 
Ezekiel36:21 Mahse Israel chhungten an va kalna hnamte zinga an tihbawrhban, ka hming thianghlim chu ka lainat a ni." 
Ezekiel36:22 Chuvangin Israel chhungte hnenah, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Aw Israel chhungte u, nangmahni ka lainat avang ni loin, i va kalna hnamte zinga in tihbawrhban, ka hming thianghlim ka lainat avang zawkin hei hi ka ti a ni." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ka hming ropui tak, hnamte zinga bawrhbang, an zinga nangmahni ngeia tihbawrhban chu ka tithianghli dawn a ni; tichuan an mithmuha nangmahnia tihthianghlima ka awm hunah chuan LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel36:24 Hnamte zing ata ka hruaichhuak ang che u a, ram zawng zawng ata ka khwm ang che u a, in ram ngeiah ka hruai lut dawn si che u a." 
Ezekiel36:25 Tin, in chungah tuifim ka theh ang a, in lo thianghlim ang a, in bawlhhlawhna zawng zawng leh in milimte lak ata ka tlengfai ang che u." 
Ezekiel36:26 Thinlung thar ka pe ang che u a, in chungah thlarau thar ka dah ang: in tisa ata thinlung, lung anga sak chu ka la bo ang a, thinlung, tisa anga nem ka pe zawk ang che u." 
Ezekiel36:27 Tin, in chungah ka thlarau ka dah ang a, ka dan siamah ka lentir ang che u a, ka thupekte chu in vawng ang a, in zawm ang." 
Ezekiel36:28 In pute hnena ram ka pekah chuan in cheng ang; tin, nangni chu ka mite in ni ang a, kei in pathian ka ni ang" 
Ezekiel36:29 In bawlhhlawhna zawng zawng ata ka chhanchhuak ang che u a, tin, buh thu ka pe ang a, ka tipung ang a, in chungah tam a tla tawh lo ang." 
Ezekiel36:30 Thing rahte ka tipung ang a, thlawhhma ka tihlawk ang a, tam avanga hnamte zinga mualphona in tuar twah lo ang." 
Ezekiel36:31 Tichuan in dan sualte, in thiltih tha lote chu in lo hre tawh thin ang a, in tenawmna leh in khawlohna avang chuan nangmahni mithmuh ngeiah in ten tawh ang." 
Ezekiel36:32 Nangmahni avanga hei hi ti ka ni lo tih lo hre mai rawh u, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni. Aw, Israel chhungte u, in awmdan avang chuan zak u la, kimki rawh u." 
Ezekiel36:33 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: in khawlohna zawng zawng ata ka tlenfai che u niah chuan, khawpuite chu ka luahtir leh ang a, hmun tiau tawhte chu ka siam leh ang." 
Ezekiel36:34 Tin, ram lo tiau tawhte chu an let ang, tunhmain mi veivakte mithmuha tiau tawh hnu ni mah se la." 
Ezekiel36:35 Tin, 'he ram tiau tawh hnu hi Eden huan ang mai a lo ni leh ta,' an la ti ang; tin, khawpui chhiaa, lo tiau tawhte chu luah leh kulhin a awm leh ta." 
Ezekiel36:36 Tin, in vela hnam la awmte kei LALPA hian hmun chhiate chu ka siam leh ang a, ram lo tiau tawh chu ka tiduah leh ta tih an hria ang: kei LALPA hi ka tawng tawh a, ka ti ngei ang." 
Ezekiel36:37 Tin, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: chu loah pawh hei hi Israel chhungte chu ka la diltir ang' ran rual ang maia an mite tipung turin.Inthawina tur ran rual, kut ni vangthlaa Jerusalem ran rualte ang maiin; chutiangin khawpui ram tawh hnu chu mipui tam takin a la khat ang; tichuan kei hi LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel36:38 Inthawina tur ran rual, kut ni vangthlaa Jerusalem ran rualte ang maiin; chutiangin khawpui ram tawh hnu chu mipui tam takin a la khat ang; tichuan kei hi LALPA chu ka ni tih an hria ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel37:1 Tin, LALPA kut chu ka chungah a awm a, LALPA thlarau chuan mi hruai chhuak a, ruam lai takah mi dah a: chu ruam chu ruh hlirin a khat a;" 
Ezekiel37:2 tin, an zingah chuan mi hruai vel ta a; tin, ruamah chuan a lo awm rem rum mai a! tin, ngai teh, a ro vek a ni." 
Ezekiel37:3 Tin, ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa, he'ng ruhte hi a nung thei ang em?"" a ti a. Tin, kei chuan,""Aw, LALPA PATHIAN, nangin i hre zawk ang,"" ka ti a." 
Ezekiel37:4 Tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah,""Heng ruhte chungah hian thu sawi la, an hnenah, 'Aw nangni ruh rote u, LALPA thu hi ngai rwh u." 
Ezekiel37:5 Heng ruhte hnenah LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, nangmahniah thaw ka luhtir ang a, in nung ang." 
Ezekiel37:6 Tin, nangmahniah thahrui ka dah ang a, tisain ka tuam ang che u a, vunin ka khuh ang che u; tin, in chhungah thaw ka awmtir ang a, in nung ang; tin, kei hi LALPA ka ni tih in hria ang,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel37:7 Tichuan thu mi pek ang chuan ka sawi ta a; tin, ka han sawi chuan thawm a lo awm a, ngai teh a ri ta rum rum a, ruhte chu mahni zawmpui theuhvah a inchuktuah khawm ta a." 
Ezekiel37:8 Tin, ka han en chuan, ngai teh anmahniah thahrui a lo awm a, tisain a tuam a, vunin a khuh ta a; thaw erawh chu anmahniah a la awm lo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Tichuan ani chu ka hnenah,""Thli hnenah thu sawi la, mihring fapa, sawi ngei la thli hnenah chuan,'LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Aw Thaw, kawlkil li atangin lo kal la, he'ng mithahte chungah hian thaw rawh, an nun theihna'n,' ti rawh,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel37:10 Chutichuan thu mi pek ang chuan ka sawi a, thaw chu anmahniah a lo lut a, an nung ta a, mahi ke theuhin an ding a, sipai rual ropui tak an lo ni ta a." 
Ezekiel37:11 Tichuan ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa, he'ng ruhte hi Israel chhungkaw pumpui an ni a: ngai teh, anni chuan,'kan ruhte a ro zoin, kan beisei a bo zo ta, rawt boin kan awm ta,' an lo ti thin a." 
Ezekiel37:12 Chuvangin hu sawi la, an hnenah, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, in thlante ka hawng ang a, aw, ka mite u, in thlan ata ka chhuah tir ang che u; tin, Israel ramah chuan ka hruai lut ang che u." 
Ezekiel37:13 Tin, in thlante ka hawna in thlan ata ka chhuahtir che u hunah chuan, aw, ka mite u, LALPA chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel37:14 Tin, nangmahniah ka thlarau ka dah ang a, in nung ang a, in ram ngeiah ka dah ang che u; tin, kei, LALPA hian ka sawi tawh a, ka ti ngei bawk a ni tih in hria ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel37:15 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel37:16 Nang, mihring fapa,' tih ziak rawh: tiang pakhat la la, a chungah chuan,'Juda leh a pawlpui Israel fate,' tih ziak rawh: tiang dang pawh la la, a chungah chuan,'Josepha, Ephraim tiang leh a pawlpui Israel chhungte zawng zawng,' tih ziak rawh." 
Ezekiel37:17 Tin, tiangte chu zawm la, i kutah pakhat a nih theihna'n." 
Ezekiel37:18 Heng hi engtihna nge ni, min kawhhmuh dawn lo'm ni?' i hnam faten an tih che chuan," 
Ezekiel37:19 an hnenah,'LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, Josepha tiang, Ephraim leh a pawlpui Israel chite kut a mi chu ka la ang a, chung chu Juda tiang nen ka zawm ang a, pakhatah ka siam ang a, ka kutah pakhat a lo ni ang,' i ti dawn nia." 
Ezekiel37:20 Tiang a chunga i ziaknate ngei kha an mit hmuh ngeiah i kutah a awm ang. 
Ezekiel37:21 Tin, an hnenah,'LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ngai rawh u hnam, an va kalna te zing ata ka hruai ang a, kil tin, ata ka khawm ang a, an ramah chuan ka hruai lut ang." 
Ezekiel37:22 Tin, chu ram, Israel tlangahte chuan hnam pakhatah ka siam ang a. lal pakhat chu an zaa lal a ni ang: tin, hnam pahnih an ni tawh lo ang a, lal na ram hnihah then a ni ngai tawh hek lo ang." 
Ezekiel37:23 An milimte, An thil tenawmte, Anbawhchhiatnatein an intibawlhhlawh ngai tawh hek lo ang: an tluka an sual thinna zawng zawng ata ka chhan chhuak ang a, ka tlengfai ang: tichuan ka mite an ni ang a, tin, kei an Pathian ka ni ang." 
Ezekiel37:24 Ka rawngbawltu Davida chu an chunga lal a ni ang a, an zaa chungah berampu pakhat a awm ang: ka thupekte an awih ang a, an zaa chungah berampu pakhat a awm ang: ka thupekte an awih ang a, ka dan siamte an zawm ang a, an hmang ang." 
Ezekiel37:25 Ka rawngbawltu Jakoba hnena ka ram pek, in pute lo chenna thinah chuan an cheng ang a, anmahni leh an fate, an fate fate pawh: ka rawngbawltu Davida chu kumkhuain an hotu a ni ang." 
Ezekiel37:26 Chu lo pawh chu anmahni hnenah remna thuthlung ka siam ang a, an tan kumkhaw thu thlung a ni ang a, an hnenah ka pe ang a, anni chu ka tipung ang a, an zingah chuan kumkhuain ka biakbuk ka dintir ang." 
Ezekiel37:27 Ka bawkte pawh an hnenah a awm ang a, an Pathian ka ni ang a, anni chu ka mite an ni ang.Tin, an zingah kumkhua atan ka biak buk a din hunah chuan kei hi LALPA, Israel tithianghlimtu chu ka ni tih an hria ang,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel37:28 Tin, an zingah kumkhua atan ka biak buk a din hunah chuan kei hi LALPA, Israel tithianghlimtu chu ka ni tih an hria ang,' ti rawh,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel38:1 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel38:2 Mihring fapa, Magog rama mi, Ros leh Mesek leh Tubal hotu ber Goga hmachhawn la, a chungah thu sawi la," 
Ezekiel38:3 LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, aw Goga, Ros, Mesek leh Tubal hotu ber, ka do che a ni;" 
Ezekiel38:4 ka lehhawitir ang chia, i khabeah nghakuaiin ka kuai ang chia, ka khai chhuak ang che; i sipai rual zawng zawngte, sakawr leh a chung chuang mite, ralthuam famkima inthuam zawng zawngte, pawl ropui tak, phaw lian leh phaw te hmang a khandaih keng theuh te nen chuan." 
Ezekiel38:5 Persia, Kus, Put te nen, an vaia phaw leh thir lukhum neite chu;" 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomer leh a sipai rual zawng zawngte; Togarma chhungte, hmar tawpa mi leh a sipai rual zawng zawngte; i hnen a mi tam tak te nen pawh." 
Ezekiel38:7 Inralring la, a ni, lo in peih rawh, nang leh i hnena awm khawm, i pawlpui zawng zawngte nen; tin, an vengtu lo ni ang che." 
Ezekiel38:8 ni tam tak hnuah chuan koh khawm i ni ang a, kum hnuhnungah te chuan khandaih laka chhanchhuah, hnam tamtakte laka ata lak khawmte awmna ram, Israel tlang tiau reng thinte chu i rawn bei ang; hnamte zing ata hruai chhuaha, tuna an vaia thlamuang taka an awmna ram chu." 
Ezekiel38:9 Tin, i chho ang a, thlipui ang maiin a lo thleng ang a, chhumin ram a tuam mup 'mup ang mai hi i ni ang, nang leh i hnena sipai rual zawng zawng leh i hnena mi tam takte chu." 
Ezekiel38:10 Tin, heti hian LALPA PATHIAN chuan a ti a ni: Chumi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, i rilruah thil a lo lut ang a, thil tha lo i suang tuah ang;" 
Ezekiel38:11 tichuan,""kulh neilo khuate ram chu ka run ang a, mi him taka awm hle hle, an zaa kulh loa cheng, kulh kawngkhar leh a kalhna thir nei lohote chu ka bei ang,"" i ti rilru ang." 
Ezekiel38:12 Rallak sum leh bungruate la tur leh hmuna tiau hnu luah leh tute leh hnamte zing ata hruai khawm tawh, ranrual le bungruate nghaha, lei lailuma chengte chungah i kut lek i tum ang." 
Ezekiel38:13 Seba leh Dedan leh Tarsis sumdawngtute leh an sakeibaknei vanglai zawng zawngte chuan i hnenah,""Rallak la turin i lo kal em ni? Mi rawk turin i pawlte chu i rawn khawm a ni maw? Tangkarua te, rangkachak te, ran rual leh bungruate, nasa tak chhuhsaka la bo tur i ni maw?"" an ti ang che, tiin." 
Ezekiel38:14 'Chuvangin, mihring fapa, thu sawi la, Goga hnenah chuan, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Chumi ni, ka mi Israelte him taka an awm hun tur chu i hre lo maw?" 
Ezekiel38:15 hmarlam ram tawp ret, i hmun atang chuan i lo kal ang, nang leh i hnena mi tam tak sakawr chung chuang theuh, pawl ropui tak, sipai rual nasa tak mai chu." 
Ezekiel38:16 Chhumin ram a tuam mup mup ang mai hian ka mi Israelte chungah i lo kal ang; heti hi a ni ang a, ni hnuhnungahte chuan ka ram do turin ka hruai ang chia, hnamte chuan mi hria ang, Aw, Goga, an mithmuha nangmaha tihthianghlima ka awm hunah chuan." 
Ezekiel38:17 Tin, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Hmasanga ka rawngbawltu Israel zawlnei, chung laia kum tamtak chhunga thu lo sawi thintuten anmahni bei tura ka rawn hruai tur che thu an sawi thina kha i ni em?ti rawh,' a ti a." 
Ezekiel38:18 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Israel ram bei tura Goga a lo kal tunah chuan ka thinrimna chu ka hnar khu chhuak hluah hluah ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ka thin a rima, ka thin a ur lai takin,'Chumi niah chuan Israel ramah Lir nasa takin a nghing ngei ang;" 
Ezekiel38:20 Chutichuan tuipui sanghate, chungleng savate, ramsate, lei chunga vak rannung zawng zawng, lei chunga mihring zawng zawngte ka hmaah an khur ang a, tlangte tihhniamin an awm ang a, khamte a chim ang a, kulh bangtin leiah a tlu ang,' tiin ka sawi a nih hi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ka tlang zawng zawngahte amah beina turin khandaih ka lam ang, mitin khandaih chuan a unaupa a do ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel38:22 Tin, thisen chhuah leh hripuiin amah ka bei ang; amah leh a sipai rualte leh a hnena mi tamtakte chungah chuan ruahpui vanawn leh rial nasa tak leh mei leh katte ka surir ang.Tin, ka ropuizia leh ka thianghlimzia ka tilang ang a, tin, hnam tam takte mithmuhah ka intilang ang, tin, kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel38:23 Tin, ka ropuizia leh ka thianghlimzia ka tilang ang a, tin, hnam tam takte mithmuhah ka intilang ang, tin, kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel39:1 Tin, nang mihring fapa, Goga chungah thu sawi la, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: 'Ngai rawh, Aw Goga, Ros, Mesek leh Tubal hotu ber, ka do che a ni:" 
Ezekiel39:2 Ka lehhawitir ang chia, ka hruaizel ang chia, hmartawp ret ata ka hruaichhuak ang chia, Israel tlangahte chuan ka thlen ang che:" 
Ezekiel39:3 i kut veilam ata i thalngul chu ka titliak ang a, i kut ding lam ata i thalte chu ka tithla ang." 
Ezekiel39:4 Israel tlangahte chuan i tlu ang a, nang leh i sipai rual zawng zawng leh i hnena mipui awmte nen: sava, sahel ei chi tinrengte hnen leh ramsa kawlhte hnenah ei zawh atan ka pe ang che." 
Ezekiel39:5 Tamlakah i tlu ang; keiin ka sawi tawh si a, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,' ti rawh." 
Ezekiel39:6 Magog leh tuikam rama him taka cheng thinte chungah chuan mei ka chhuah ang; tin, kei hi LALPA ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel39:7 Tin, ka mi Israelte zingah chuan ka hming thianghlim tihbawrhban leh chu ka phal tawh hek lo ang: tichuan hnamte chuan kei hi, LALPA, Israel Mi thianghlima chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel39:8 Ngai rawh u, a lo thleng e! Hlenin a awm ngei ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni; hemi ni hi a ni, ka lo sawi tawh kha." 
Ezekiel39:9 Tin, Israel khawpuia chengte chu an chhuak ang, hriamhreite chu an tuah ang a, a kang ral ang; phaw lian leh phaw tete, thal leh a ngulte, fei leh tiang zumte chu kum sarih chhung an tuah ang." 
Ezekiel39:10 Tichuan ram thing an phur lo ang a, ngaw thingte an kit hek lo ang, hriamhreite 'chu thingtuah atan an hmang dawn si a, rallaktute chu an rallak ve ang a, a rawktute chu an rawk ve thung ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel39:11 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a lo ni ang a, Goga tan Israel ramah phumna hmun ka ruat ang a, tuipui chhak, Abarim ruam ngei chu; chu chuan khualzinte chu a dang ang, Goga leh a hote chu an phum dawn si a; tin, chu ruam chu Hamon-gog ruam an vuah ang." 
Ezekiel39:12 Tin, Israel chhungte chuan an ram thianfaiin thlasarih chhung an phum ang." 
Ezekiel39:13 A ni, an rama mi zawng zawngin an phum ang; chawimawia ka awm niah chuan ka hmingthanna a ni ang, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel39:14 Tin, an ram thenfaina'n, ruang pmum lohte zawng chhuaka phum turin hnaa nei tur mi an ruat hran ang, thlasarih tawp hnuah an zawng tana ang." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ram fang tute chuan an fanin, mihring ruhte an hmuh chuan chhinchhiahna an siam ang a, Hamon-gog ruama phumtuten an phum hma chu." 
Ezekiel39:16 Tin, Hamon-ah chu khawpui hming a ni ang. Chutiang chuan ram an thian fai ang." 
Ezekiel39:17 Tin, nang, mihring fapa, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: sava chitinrengte leh sa tinrengte hnenah tu sawi la,'Pung khawm u la, lo kal rawh u, sa in eia thisen in in theihna'n Israel tlanga in thawina ropui tak, in tana ka siam velah chuan rawn in khawm rawh u." 
Ezekiel39:18 Miropui sate in ei ang a, leia hotute thisen in in ang a, berampate, beramnote, kelte, Basan rama bawngpa chawm thau zawng zawngte thisente nen." 
Ezekiel39:19 In tana inthawina ruai ka theh thau chu puar teuhin in ei ang a, a thisen chu rui khawpin in in ang." 
Ezekiel39:20 Tichuan sakawrte, tawlailir hnuk mite, mi ropuite leh ral tu mi zawngtein ka chawhluiah in tlai ang,' tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel39:21 Tichuan hnamte zingah chuan ka ropuina ka dah ang a, hnam zawng zawngte chuan a thurel tihtluk tawhte leh an chunga ka kutthlakziate chu an hmu ang." 
Ezekiel39:22 Chumi ni a chinah chuan Israel chhungten kei hi LALPA PATHIAN ka ni tih an hre tawh ang. 
Ezekiel39:23 Tin, hnamte chuan Israel chhungte chu an khawlohna avangin an tang a ni tih an hria ang, ka laka an riawm loh em avangin anmahni lakah ka hmel ka thup a, tichuan an hmelmate kutah ka pe a, khandaihin an tlu ta vek a." 
Ezekiel39:24 An thianghlim lohna ang zel leh an bawhchhiatna ang zelin an chungah ka ti ve a, an lakah ka hmel ka thup a ni." 
Ezekiel39:25 Chuvangin LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Tunah chuan Jakob ho awmdan ka let ang a, Israel chhungjaw pumpui chungah zah ka ngai ang, ka hming thianghlim chu ka humhalh tlat ang." 
Ezekiel39:26 Tunah tihlautu awm lo a, an rama him taka an chen hunah pawh an bawhchhiatna zawng zawng, ka chunga an bawhchhiatte leh an mualphona chu an phur ang." 
Ezekiel39:27 Mite zing ata ka hruai chhuah leha, an hmelmate ram ata dak khawma, anmahnia hnam tamtakte mithmuha tihthianghlima ka awm hunah chuan," 
Ezekiel39:28 hnamte zinga sala ka tantir leh, an ram ngeia ka hruaikhawm leh ziaah hian kei hi LALPA an pathin ka ni tih an hria ang; chutah chuan an zinga pakhat mah ka hnutchhiah lo ang;an lakah ka hmel ka thup hek lo ang: Israel chhungte chungah ka thlarau ka leih tawh si a, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel39:29 an lakah ka hmel ka thup hek lo ang: Israel chhungte chungah ka thlarau ka leih tawh si a, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" tiin." 
Ezekiel40:1 Kan saltan kum sawmhnih leh pangana chumi kum bul thla ni sawmna, khawpui chhiat hnu kum sawm leh palina, chumi ni ngeiah chuan LALPA kut chu ka chungah a lo awm a, chutah chuan mi hruai a." 
Ezekiel40:2 Pathian inlarnaah chuan Israel ramah mi hruai a, tlangsang takah mi dah a, chumi chhim lamah chuan khawpui din tawh ang mai a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:3 Chutah chuan mi hruai a, ngai teh, mi pakhat a lo awm a, a hmel landan chu dar ang mai a ni a, la zai leh tehna tiang a keng a, kawngkaah chuan a ding a." 
Ezekiel40:4 Tin, mi chuan ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa, i mit khan en la, i beng chhi la, ka entir tur che lamah i rilru nghat tlat rawh; chu ka thil entir tur che atan chuan hetah hian rawn hruai i ni si a: i hmuh zawng zawngte chu Isael chhungte 'hnenah chuan puang ang che,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel40:5 tin, ngai teh, in velah chuan kulh bang a lo awm a, tin, mi chuan tehna tiang, tawng ruka sei a keng a, a tawng khat chu tawng khat leh kutphah beng theuh a ni; tin, kulh bang chhah lam chu a teh a, tiang tluk khat a ni a, a san lam pawh tiang tluk khat a ni bawk." 
Ezekiel40:6 Tichuan, chhak lam chhawng kawngka inah a lo kal a, a rahkaah chuan a chho a; tin, kawngka in luhna pindan chu a teh a, tiang tluk khata zau a ni." 
Ezekiel40:7 Tin, venna pindante chu a dunglam tiang tluk khat, a vanglam tiang tluk khat theuh a ni; venna pindan inkar chu tawng nga theuh a ni a; tin, in pui lam kawngka in sumhmun lama kawngka in luhna pindan chu tiang tluk khat a ni a." 
Ezekiel40:8 A bangpengte chu tawnghnih theuh a ni a, kawngka sumhmun chu inpui lamah a ni." 
Ezekiel40:9 Tin, chhaklam kawngka ina venna pindante chu lehlam lehlamah pathum ve ve a ni a, an pathum chuan intiat vek a ni; tin, bang pengte pawh kha a lehlam lehlama mi chu a intiat a ni." 
Ezekiel40:10 Tin, kawngka inluhna vanglam chu a teh a, tawngsawm a ni a; kawngka in kal tlangna vanglam chu tawng sawm leh pathum a ni." 
Ezekiel40:11 Tin, venna pindan hmaah chuan daidanna leh lam lehlamah tawngkhata chhah ve ve a awm a; tichuan venna pindante chu lehlam lehlamah tawngruk ve ve a ni." 
Ezekiel40:12 Tin, kawngka in chu a teh a, venna pindan pakhat chung atanga a lehlam chung thleng chuan tawng sawmhnih leh pangaa zau a ni, kawngkhar leh kawngkhar inzawm theuhin." 
Ezekiel40:13 Tin, sumhmun pawh chu a teh a, tawngsawmhnih a ni a; kawngka in sumhmun pawn chu hungchhung chu a lo ni a." 
Ezekiel40:14 Tin, kawngka in pawn ta ber atanga kawngka in sumhmun chhungril ber thleng chuan tawng sawmnga a ni." 
Ezekiel40:15 Tin, kawngka in chhunglamah chuan a velin pindanahte chuan tukverh hawntheih loh a awm a, a inkara banahte pawh; a sumhmunahte pawh, a chhung lamah pawh a velin tukverh a awm a, a banahte chuan tum thinglem a awm theuh bawk a." 
Ezekiel40:16 Tin, hung chhung pawnta zawkah chuan mi hruai a; tin, ngai teh, pindante a awm a, hungchhung chu a velin lungrem a ni a; tin, lungremah chuan pindan sawmthum a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:17 Tin, lungrem chu kanwgka in atanga rem a ni a, kawngka in chen bawk tura rem a ni a, chu chu lungrem hnuaihnung zawk a ni." 
Ezekiel40:18 Tin, kanwgka in hnuai zawk zawn atang chuan hung chhung nung zawk pawnlam thleng chuan a teh a, a zauzia chu tawng zakhat a ni, a chhak lam leh a hmar lam pawh." 
Ezekiel40:19 Tin, hung chhung pawnta zawk kawngka in hmar lam panga mi chu a dung leh a vang pawh a teh a." 
Ezekiel40:20 Tin, venna pindan chu lehlam lehlamah pathum ve ve a awm a, a bangpengte leh a kawngka in sumhmunte pawh a hmasa ang vek a ni; a dung chu tawng sawm nga a ni a, a vang chu tawng sawmhnih leh panga." 
Ezekiel40:21 A tukverhte, a sumhmuntea tum thing lemte chu chhak lam kawngka in a mi vek a ni; rahka pasarih a awm chho a, a sumhmun chu a chhunglamah a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:22 Hung chhungnung zawk luhna tur kawngka in chu kawngka in dang zawnah khan a awm zel a, hmar lamah leh chhak lamah pawh; tin, kawngka in leh kawngka in inkar chu a teh a, tawng za a ni." 
Ezekiel40:23 Tin, chhim lamah mi hruai leh a, tin, ngai teh, chhim lam kawngka in chu a lo awm a; tin, a teh dan pangngaiin a bangpengte leh a sumhmun chu a teh a." 
Ezekiel40:24 Chutah chuan a dnagte ang bawkin a velin tukverhte a awm a, a sumhmunah pawh; 'a dung chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vanglam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni" 
Ezekiel40:25 Tin, rahka pasarih a awm chho a, sum hmun chu a chhung lamah a awm a; tin, lehlam lehlama bangpengahte chuan tum thing lem a awm zel a." 
Ezekiel40:26 Tin, chhim lamah chuan hung chhungnung luhna tur kawngka in a awm a, chhimlam kawngka inte inkar chu a teh a, tawng za a ni." 
Ezekiel40:27 Tin, chhimlam kawngka inah chuan hung chhungnung zawkah chuan mi hruai lut a, tehna pangngaiin chhimlam kawgka in chu a teh a;" 
Ezekiel40:28 venna pindante, a bangpengte. Sumhnunte chu tehna ngai vekin; chutah chuan tukverhte a awm a, a sumhnunah pawh a velin: a dung lam tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vang lam tawng sawmhnih leh panga." 
Ezekiel40:29 Tin, a velah chuan sumhmunte a awm a, a dunglam tawng sawmhnih leh panga, a vanglam tawng nga a ni." 
Ezekiel40:30 A sumhnunte chuan hungchhung pawnta zawk lam a hawi a; a bangpengahte chuan tum thing lem a awm a: a chhohna chuan rahka pariat a nei a. 
Ezekiel40:31 Tin, chhak lamah chuan hung chhungnung zawkah mi hruai a, a tehna pangngaiin kawngka chu a teh a;" 
Ezekiel40:32 a venna pindante, a bangpengte, a sumhnunte tehna ngai vekin: chutah chuan tukverhte a awm a, sumhnunah pawh a velin: a dunglam chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vanglam chu tawng sawmhnih leh panga." 
Ezekiel40:33 A sumhmunte chuan hung chhung pawnta zawk a hawi a, a bangpengahte chuan lehlam lehlamah tum thing lem a awm a; a chhohna chuan rahka pariat a nei a." 
Ezekiel40:34 Tin, hmarlam kawgka inah chuan mi hruai leh a: a tehna pangngaiin a teh a;" 
Ezekiel40:35 a venna pindante, a bangpengte, a sumhnunte; chutah chuan a velin tukverhte a awm a: a dunglam tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vanglam tawng sawmhnih leh panga." 
Ezekiel40:36 A bangpengte chu hung chhung pawnta zawk lamah a awm a; a chhohna chuan rahka pariat a nei a. 
Ezekiel40:37 Kawngka in sumhmun atanga luh theihin pindan a awm a, chutah chuan halral in thawina tur an sil thin a." 
Ezekiel40:38 Kawngka in sumhnun lehlam lehlamah chuan dawhkan pahnih ve ve a awm a; halral inthawina te, sual vanga inthawina te, thiamloh vanga thilhlante talhna turin." 
Ezekiel40:39 Hmarlam kawngka in luh chhohna pawnlam sir khatah chuan dawhkan pahnih a awm a; tin, kawngka in sumhnun lehlamah pawh chuan dawhkan pahnih a awm bawk a." 
Ezekiel40:40 Tichuan kawngka in sir lehlam pangah chuan dawhkan pali a awm a, a lehlam pangah dawhkan pali a awm bawk a; inthawina talhna thin chu dawhkan pariat a ni a." 
Ezekiel40:41 Tin, halral inthawina atan dawhkan pali, lungchhera siam, a dunglam tawngkhat leh a chanve, a vang lam tawng khat leh a chanve, a sanlam tawngkhat a awm a: chutah chuan halral unthawina leh thilhlan talhna tur hriamhreite an dah thin a." 
Ezekiel40:42 Tin, a chhunglamah chuan a velin thil kawm, kutphah benga sei an vuah a, dawhkan chungah te chuan thilhlante sa a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:43 Tin, hung chhungnung zawkah chuan mi hruai lut a; tin, ngai teh, hung chhungnung zawkah chuan pindan pahnih a la awm a, pakhat chu hmarlam kawngka in bulah hmar lam hawiin a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:44 Tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah,""He pindan chhimlam hawi hi, a in vawngtu puithiamte awmna a ni a;" 
Ezekiel40:45 pindan hmarlam hawi chu maicham vawngtu puithiamte awmna a ni; hengte hi Zadoka fate, Levia fate zinga a rawngbawl tura LALPA rawn hnaih thintute chu an ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel40:46 Tin, hung chhung chu a teh a, a dunglam tawng zakhat, a vanglam tawng zakhat, inbial vel a ni; tin, maicham chu kawtlai takah chuan a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:47 Tin, a inpui sumhmunah chuan mi hruai ta a sumhnun bang pengte chu a teh theuh a, a lehlam lehlamah tawng ngaa chhah ve ve a awm a, a luhna chu tawng sawm leh tawng lia zau a ni, a sir tuaka kawngka bangpengte chu tawng thum ve ve a ni.A sumhnmun chu a dunglam tawng sawmhnih, a vanglam tawng sawm leh tawng hnih a ni a, luh chhohnaah chuan rahka sawm a awm a, bangpeng bulah a lehlam lehlamah chuan ban lian a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:48 A sumhnmun chu a dunglam tawng sawmhnih, a vanglam tawng sawm leh tawng hnih a ni a, luh chhohnaah chuan rahka sawm a awm a, bangpeng bulah a lehlam lehlamah chuan ban lian a awm a." 
Ezekiel41:1 Tin, biak inah chuan mihruai lut a, a bangpengte chua teh a, a sir tuakah tawng ruka chhah ve ve awm a, chu chu biak buk vanglam chen a ni." 
Ezekiel41:2 Tin, a luhna chu tawng sawma zau a ni a; a sir tuakah bangpengte chu tawng nga ve ve a ni a, tin, a chhung chu a dung tawng sawmli, a vang tawng sawmhnih a ni a." 
Ezekiel41:3 Tin, pindan chhungnungah chuan a lut a, a lihna bangpengte chu tawng hniha chhah ve ve a ni a, a luhna tawng ruka zau a ni a, a luhna bangpengte chu tawng sarih ve ve a ni a." 
Ezekiel41:4 Tin, pindan chhungnung chu a teh a, a chhungpui bakah a dung lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a vang lam pawh tawng sawmhnih a ni. Tin, ka hnenah,""Hei hi hmun serh ber chu a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel41:5 Tin, a in pui bang chu a teh a, tawng ruka chhah a ni a; tin, a sir tinah chuan pindan tawng lia zau theuh a awm a." 
Ezekiel41:6 A vela sir pindante tana bang an siam chu rinchhanin, a in pui chu rinchhan loin, in pui bang ngheng loin chu lam chu a ngheng zawk a." 
Ezekiel41:7 Tin, a sir pindante chu a lo sang deuh deuhin a zau deh deh zel a ni. Tichuan pindan hnuai ber atanga a chung ber thlenga kal turin a laita chu kal tlang tur a ni." 
Ezekiel41:8 Tin, in pui velah chuan lungrem pawng awminka hmu a, sirpindan lungphum chu tehna tiang, tawng ruk zeta sei chena sang a ni" 
Ezekiel41:9 Sir pindan pawn bang chu tawng ngaa chhah a ni a; sir pindan pawn bang bakah chuan tawng nga a la awl a. 
Ezekiel41:10 Inpui lungrem pawng leh hung chhung pindante inkar chu a velin tawng sawmhniha zau a ni a. 
Ezekiel41:11 Sir pindan kawng kharte chu hmun awl lama hawn a ni a, pakhat chu hmaelam hawi a ni a, pakhat chu chhimlam hawi a ni: a vela hmun awl chu tawng ngaa zau a ni." 
Ezekiel41:12 Tin, thlang lama in pui kawmchar hmun awl piah a in chu tawng sawmsariha zau a ni; chu in bang chu a velin tawng ngaa chhah vek a ni a, a dung chu tawng awmkua a ni." 
Ezekiel41:13 Tin, in pui chu a tehin tawng zaa sei a ni; in pui kawmchar hmun awl leh chumi in bang chhah lam chhiar telin tawng za a ni bawk;" 
Ezekiel41:14 a in pui kawt hmun awl chu tawng zaa zau a ni. 
Ezekiel41:15 Tin, in pui kawmchar hmun awl piah a in dung lam chu a teh a, a sir tawna bangpengte huamin tawng za a ni." 
Ezekiel41:16 Ti a chhungpui te, hmun serh ber te, pawnlam sumhnunte chu thingphelin an thuah a, a pathum chuan a velin hawn theih loh tukverh leh chhuarvel a nei a, a in pui chu luhna kawngka thlengin a chhuat atanga tukverh thlenga a puma thingphela thuah a ni a, (tukverh pawh chu thuah a ni bawk)." 
Ezekiel41:17 Kawngka lu chungte, pindan serh ber te leh pawnlam nen, bang zawng zawng chu a chhung lam leh a pawnlam teh vekin." 
Ezekiel41:18 Chung chu cherub lemte leh tum thing lemte a chei a ni a, cherub leh cherub inkarah tum thing a awm zel a; tin, cherub chu hmai pahnih nei theuh a ni." 
Ezekiel41:19 Mihring hmel ang chuan lehlama tum thing lam chu a hawi bawk a, he'ng hi in ve mai chuan an ziak a ni." 
Ezekiel41:20 A chhuat atngin kawngka chung thlengin cherub leh tum thinga chei vek a ni; in pui bang chu chuti vek chu a ni. 
Ezekiel41:21 Chhungpui kawngka biangte chu inbial a ni, hmun thiang hlim ber hmaah chuan thinga siam maicham ang reng a awm a," 
Ezekiel41:22 tawng thuma sang, tawng hniha sei, tawng hniha zau, a kilte a mawngte leh a pangte chu thinga siam vek a ni, tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah,'Hei hi LALPA hmaa dawhkan chu a nih hi,' a ti a." 
Ezekiel41:23 A chhungpui leh Hmun thianghlim ber chuan kawngkhar pahnih ve ve a nei a. 
Ezekiel41:24 Kawngkhar chuan phel hnih a nei ve ve a, a phel khat chu thlep thei theuh a ni; kawngkhar pakhatah phel hnih, a dangah phel hnih bawk." 
Ezekiel41:25 Banga an ziak ang bawk khan chhungpui kawngkharahte chuan cherub leh tum thing lem an ziah theuh bawk a; sumhmun pawnah chuan thingphel chhah tak tak an zar a.Tin, sumhmun bang tuakahte leh thingphel zarahte chuan tukverh hawn theih loh leh tum thing lem chu a awm bawk a, a in pui sir pindan leh thing phel zar chu chutiang bawk chu a ni." 
Ezekiel41:26 Tin, sumhmun bang tuakahte leh thingphel zarahte chuan tukverh hawn theih loh leh tum thing lem chu a awm bawk a, a in pui sir pindan leh thing phel zar chu chutiang bawk chu a ni." 
Ezekiel42:1 Tin, hungchhungnung zawk hmar lampangah chuan mi hruai chhuak a; hmun awl zawn hmar lam kulh ban eptu pindanah chuan mi hruai lut a." 
Ezekiel42:2 Tin, hmar lampanga pindante chu tawng zaa sei, tawng sawmngaa zau a ni a." 
Ezekiel42:3 Hung chhungnung zawk hmun awl tawng sawmhnih lam hawi leh hung pawnta zawk lungrem lam epin chhawrvel chhawng thum a awm ve ve a. 
Ezekiel42:4 Pindante inkarah chuan tawng sawma zau, tawng zaa sei kal tlangna a awm a, a kawngkharte chuan hmar lam a hawi a." 
Ezekiel42:5 Pindan chungnung te chu a zim zawk a, in chhawng hnuai zawk leh a laitate ai chuan a chhawrvelte chuan a la hek zawk si a." 
Ezekiel42:6 Chhawng thumin sak a ni a, hung chhung bante ang chuan ban a nei si lo a; tichuan a laita ai chuan a chungnung ber chu a chep a, a laita pawh chu a hnuaihnung ber ai chuan a chep bawk a." 
Ezekiel42:7 Tin, pindan sir pawnlam ah chuan hung chhung pawnta zawk lam epah bang tawng sawmngaa sei a awm a." 
Ezekiel42:8 hung chhung pawnta zawk a pindante tawng sawmngaa sei a ni si a: tin, in pui hrula mi chu tawng zaa sei a ni." 
Ezekiel42:9 Tin, chung pindante hnuaian chhak lampangah hung chhung pawnta zawk atanga luhna a awm a, pawnlam bang intannaah chuan." 
Ezekiel42:10 Chhim lamah pawh chuan hmun awl zawna kulhbang epah chuan pindante a awm leh a," 
Ezekiel42:11 a hmaa kalna pawh chu hmarlam pindante kalna ang bawk a ni: a dung leh a vang te pawh, a chhuahna te, a remvel dan te, a kawngkhar ten chhim lam a hawi tih chauh lo chu thuhmun vek a ni." 
Ezekiel42:12 Chung pindante luhnan chuan kal tlangna tawp chhak lam bang bulah chuan kawngkhar a awm a. 
Ezekiel42:13 Tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah,""chhimlam leh hmar lam pindan, hmun awl rawn chhawngtute hi pindan serh an ni a, LALPA rawn naih tu puithiamhoten thil serh berte an ei a, thil serh berte an dah khawm a, eitur hlannate, sual vanga inthawina te, thiamloh vanga inthawin te an hlanna tur a ni: a hmun chu hmun serh a ni si a." 
Ezekiel42:14 Chuta puithiamte an luh phawt chuan, hmun serh atangin hung chhung pawnta zawkah chuan an chhuak tur a ni lo; chutah chuan an ranwgbawlna silhfente chu an dah zawk ang a, silhfen serh an ni si a: silhfen dang in bel chauhin vantlang zingah an che thei ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel42:15 In pui chhungnung zawk a teh zawh chuan chhaklam hawi kawngkaah chuan mi hruai chhuak a, a velin a teh ta a." 
Ezekiel42:16 Tehna tiang chuan chhak lam pang chu a teh a, tawng zanga a ni a; a tehna tiang a tehin." 
Ezekiel42:17 Hmar lam pang a rawn teh leh thung a, tawng zanga a ni a, a tehna tianga tehin." 
Ezekiel42:18 Chhimlam pang a teh leh a, tehna tiang a tehin tawng zanga bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel42:19 Tin, thlang lam a rawn teh leh a, a tehna tianga tehin tawng zanga bawk a iA sir li chuan a teh ta a: a dung lam tawng zanga, a vanglam tawng zanga a ni a; a velin kulhbang nei a ni a, chu chu hmunserh leh serh loh daidanna tura siam a ni." 
Ezekiel42:20 A sir li chuan a teh ta a: a dung lam tawng zanga, a vanglam tawng zanga a ni a; a velin kulhbang nei a ni a, chu chu hmunserh leh serh loh daidanna tura siam a ni." 
Ezekiel43:1 Tichuan kawngkaah mi hruai a, chhak lam kawngkaah chuan." 
Ezekiel43:2 Tin, ngai teh, Israel pathian ropuina chu chhak lam atangin a lo thleng a: a thawm chu tui tamtak ri ang a ni a, lei chu a ropuina in a en vek a." 
Ezekiel43:3 Inlarna ka hmuh a landan chu khawpui tichhe tura a lo kal leh Kebar luikama ka hmuh ang bawk a ni a; tin, bawk khupin ka tlu tla a." 
Ezekiel43:4 Tin, khawchhak lam hawi kawngkaah chuan a in pui chhungah LALPA ropuina a lo lut a;" 
Ezekiel43:5 tin, thlarau chuan mi chawikang a, hung chhungnung zawkah chuan mi hruai lut a; tin, ngai teh, LALPA ropuina chuan a in chu a tikhat vek a." 
Ezekiel43:6 Tin, mi pakhat ka kianga a din laiin mi tuin emaw mi bia in ka hria a," 
Ezekiel43:7 ka hnenah,'Mihring fapa, hei hi ka lal thutthleng awmna hmun, ka kephah nghahna, Israel fate zinga kumkhuaa ka chenna tur hmun a nih hi: ka hming thianghlim chu Israel chhungten anmahniin emaw, an lalten emaw, an hurna leh an lal te ruang phumna'n hmangin an tibawrbang tawh lo ang;" 
Ezekiel43:8 an kawngka chu ka kawngka bul tak a siamin, an kawngka biang chu ka kawngka biang hrula dahin anmahni leh keima inkarah bang chauh awmtirin an thiltih tenawmte chuan ka hming thianghlim chu a tibawrhbang ta a; chuvangin ka thinurnain anmahni chu ka tiboral ta a ni." 
Ezekiel43:9 Tun atang hian hurnate, an lal ruangte chu ka lak atanga hla takah dah bo se la; tin, an zingah kumkhuain ka cheng ang." 
Ezekiel43:10 Tin, nang mihring fapa, a inpui lem chu Israel chhungte hnenah entir rawh, an thiltihsual chu an zahpui theihna'n, a ruahman dan pawh lo teh rawh se." 
Ezekiel43:11 Tin, an thil tih zawng zawngte an zahpui chuan a inpui awmdante, a chhuahna te, a luhna te, a riruang te, a hmandan te, a vawn dan te entir la, anmithmuh ngeiah ziak rawh; a dan pumpui leh a hmandan zawng zawng an vawna, an zawm theihna'n." 
Ezekiel43:12 Hei hi a inpui atana dan tur chu a ni: tlang chhip chung zawl vel zawng zawng chu hmun serh theihtawp tur a ni, ngai teh, hei hi in pui atana dan chu a ni e." 
Ezekiel43:13 Tin, tawnga tehin hei hi maicham len lam chu a ni, (tawng khat tih chu tawng khat keh kutphah beng a ni), a nghahchhan chu tawng khata sang, tawngkhata hlai, a tlang chu a vela khap khata pawng zel a ni a." 
Ezekiel43:14 Tin, maicham sanlam chu hetiang hi a ni: leia a nghah chhan atanga a chhawrdawh hnuai hnung zawk chu tawng hnih a ni a, a zau lam tawng khat; a chhawrdawh te zawk atanga a chhawrdawh lian zawk chu tawng li a ni a, tawng khata zau a ni." 
Ezekiel43:15 A maicham chung zawl chu tawng lia sang a ni leh a, maicham chung zawl atang chuan ki pali a ding a." 
Ezekiel43:16 maicham chung zawl chu a dung leh a vang tawng sawm leh pahnih ve ve a ni a; a in bial a ni. 
Ezekiel43:17 A chhawrdawh chu a dung leh avang tawng sawm leh pali ve ve a ni a, a inbial a: a tlang chu tawg chanve a ni; a nghhahchhan chu a velin tawngkhat a ni; a kailawn chuan khawchhak a hawi tur a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel43:18 Tin, ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa, LALPA PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: An siam zawh huna maicham hmandan tru chu hetiang hi a ni: halral inthawina tur te, thisen thehna tur te a ni." 
Ezekiel43:19 Levia chi puithiam Zadoka thlaha mi, rawng mi bawl tur a mi rawn hnaih thin tu hnenah chuan sual vanga in thawina atan bawngpa tuai i pe tur a ni, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thi chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel43:20 A thisen chu i la ang a, maicham ki pali te leh a chhawrdawh ki li te a tlang velin i luan ang a; chutiang chuan maicham chu i thlengin i thian dawn ni a." 
Ezekiel43:21 Sual vanga inthawina bawngpa tuai chu i la ang a, hmun thianghlim pawn lama, chumi atana in ruatah chuan hal tur a ni." 
Ezekiel43:22 Tin, a nihnihnaah chuan kelchal, hmelhem lo, sual vanga inthawina atan a hlan tur a ni; tichuan maicham chu bawngpa tuai a an then ang bawk khan then tur a ni." 
Ezekiel43:23 maicham then chu in tih zawh hunah bawngpa tuai hmel hem lo leh beram chal, hmelhem lo, a rual zinga mi i hlan dawn ni a." 
Ezekiel43:24 LALPA hmaah i hlan ang a, puithiam chu chi i phul ang a, LALPA hnenah halral atan a hlan ang." 
Ezekiel43:25 Nisarih chhung chu nitin sualvanga inthawina atan kelchal i hmang tur a ni; bawngpa tuai leh beram chal, a rual zinga mi, hmelhem lo an hmang bawk tur a ni." 
Ezekiel43:26 maicham then leh tlenfaina chuan ni sarih a awh ang a, tichuan maicham chu serh a ni tawh ang.Tin, chung nite an tlingtlak zawh chuan, ni riat ni atangin puithiamten in halral inthawinate leh remna inthawinate an maichamah an hlan ang a, tin, ka lo pawm ang che u, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel43:27 Tin, chung nite an tlingtlak zawh chuan, ni riat ni atangin puithiamten in halral inthawinate leh remna inthawinate an maichamah an hlan ang a, tin, ka lo pawm ang che u, tih hi LALPA PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel44:1 Tin, hmun thianghlim kawngka pawnta zawk, khawchhak lam hawi lamah chuan mi hruai let a, khar a lo ni a." 
Ezekiel44:2 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah,""He kawngka hi a in khar reng ang a, a in hawng lo vang a, tumah an lut hek lo ang! LALPA, Israel Pathian chu a lo luh tawh avangin; a inkhar reng dawn a ni." 
Ezekiel44:3 Lal erawh zawng LALPA hmaa chawei turin chutah chuan a thu chauh vang; sumhmun kawngkaah a lut ang a, chumiah vek chuan a chhuak leh ang,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel44:4 Tin, hmar lam hawi kawngkaah chuan in pui kawtah mi hruai a; tin, ka han en a, ngai teh, LALPA in chu ropuinain a khat vek mai a; tin, bawkkhupin ka tlu ta a." 
Ezekiel44:5 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah,"" Mihring fapa, LALPA in hmandan leh i dan zawng zawng i hnena ka sawi chungchangah chuan i beng chhi la, i mit len la, i rilruah chhinchhiah tha te rawh khai! A in pui luhdan te, a hmunthianghlim ata chhuah dante chu i rilruah chhinchhiah ngun ang che." 
Ezekiel44:6 ,7 Tin, helhmang, Israel chhungte ngei hnenah chuan heti hian i sawi tur a ni: LALPA Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Aw, nangni Israel chhungte u, in tenawmna zawng zawng belhchhah tura awze mi, thinlung leh tisa serhtan loh, ka chhang te, thau te, thisen te in hlan laia ka hmun thianghlim, ka in ngei tibawrhbang tura in hruai luh a, ka thinlung in bawhchhiatah khan in tenawmna zawng zawngte chu lo tawp tawh rawh se." 
Ezekiel44:7 ,6 Tin, helhmang, Israel chhungte ngei hnenah chuan heti hian i sawi tur a ni: LALPA Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Aw, nangni Israel chhungte u, in tenawmna zawng zawng belhchhah tura awze mi, thinlung leh tisa serhtan loh, ka chhang te, thau te, thisen te in hlan laia ka hmun thianghlim, ka in ngei tibawrhbang tura in hruai luh a, ka thinlung in bawhchhiatah khan in tenawmna zawng zawngte chu lo tawp tawh rawh se." 
Ezekiel44:8 Tin, ka thil serhte nangnin in vawng lo a, he'ng awze mite hi ka hmun thianghlimah in aia vawngtuah in ruat ta zawk a." 
Ezekiel44:9 LALPA pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Awze mi tumah, thinlung leh tisa serhtan loh, Israel fate zinga awze mi reng reng chu ka hmun thianghlimah an lut tur a ni lo." 
Ezekiel44:10 Levia chi, Israel te milim uma an vah bo laia ka laka hla taka kal tawh te erawh chuan an khawlohna an phur ang a," 
Ezekiel44:11 ka hmun thianghlimah chuan rawngbawltuah an tang ang, in pui kawng kharte an veng ang a, in pui chhungah chuan rawng an bawl ang: halra in thawinate an talh ang a, mipui rawngbawlsak turin an hmaah an ding ang." 
Ezekiel44:12 An milim te hmaah an rawng an bawlsak a, Israelte chhungte tan khawlohna tlukna an nih thin avangin an chungah ka kut ka lek a, an khawlohna chu an phur ngei ang, tih hi LALPA pathian thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel44:13 Tichuan ka hnenah puithiam hnathawk turin mi rawn hnaih ngai lo ang a, ka thil serhte, thil serh berte an rawn hnaih ngai hek lo ang; an mualphona leh an thil tenawm tih takte chu an phur zawk ang." 
Ezekiel44:14 A inpui enkawltuahte ka siam ang a, rawngbawlna zawng zawng leh tih tur awm apiangte ti tur in" 
Ezekiel44:15 Puithiam Levia chi, Zadoka fa, ka laka Israel fate an vah bo laia ka hmun thianghlim vawngtute erawh chuan ka rawngbawl turin mi rawn hnaih chauh vang; thau leh thisen hlan turin ka hmaah an ding ang, tih hi LALPA pathian thu chhuak a ni:" 
Ezekiel44:16 Ka hmun thianghlimah chuan an lut ang a, rawng mi bawlsak turin ka dawhkan an rawn hnaih ang a, mi enkawl tuah an tang ang." 
Ezekiel44:17 Tin, hung chhungnung zawk kawngka ahte an luhin kawrfual zai sinin an in thuam ang a, hung chhungnung zawk leh in chhung lama rawng an bawl chhungin sahmul puan an in bel tur a ni lo." 
Ezekiel44:18 Dar zai sin an khim ang a, puan zai sin kekawr an ha ang a, thlan tisa thei reng reng chu an in bel tur a ni lo." 
Ezekiel44:19 Tin, hung chhung pawnta zawk, van tlang hnena an lo chhuah chuan an rawngbawlna silhfente chu an hlip ang a, pindan serhah chuan an dah ang a, silhfen dang an in bel ang; mipuite chu an silhfenin mi serh-ah an siam ve lohna'n." 
Ezekiel44:20 An lu te an ziat kawlh tur a ni lo a, ansam an zuah sei tur a ni hek lo, an met chau tur a ni." 
Ezekiel44:21 Puithiam chuan hung chhungnung zawk an luh chuan Uain an in tur a ni hek lo. 
Ezekiel44:22 Hmeithai emaw, mak hnu emaw nupuiah a nei tur a ni hek lo; Israel chhungte chi, nula thianghlim emaw puithiam thihsan hmeithai emaw an nei zawk tur a ni." 
Ezekiel44:23 Ka mite chu thil serh leh serh loh danglam zia an zirtir tur a ni, thil thiang leh thiang lo an thliar hran tir tur a ni." 
Ezekiel44:24 Thubuaite pawh an rel tur a ni a, ka rel dan ang zelin an rel ang: ka kut ni vang thla zawng zawngah chuan ka dante leh ka dan siamte an zawm tur a ni a; ka chawlhnite pawh an serh tur a ni." 
Ezekiel44:25 Mahni intibawrbang turin mi ruang an hnaih tur a ni lo; amaherawh chu nu emaw, pa emaw, fanu emaw, fapa emaw, unaupa emaw, fanu pasal neilo emaw tan chuan an intibawrhbang thei ang." 
Ezekiel44:26 Tin, a in thenfai hnuah a tan ni sarih chhiarsak leh tur a ni." 
Ezekiel44:27 Hung chhungnung zawka hmun thianghlima a luh niah chuan sual vanga in thawina ama tan a hlan tur a ni, tih hi LALPA pathian thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel44:28 Rochan engmah a nei lo ang; a rochan chu keimah ka ni ang, Israelah chan engmah in pe tur a ni lo, an chan chu keimah ka nih hi." 
Ezekiel44:29 Ei tur hlante, sual vanga thil hlante, thiam loh vanga thil hlante an ei ang a, Israel zinga thil serh apiang chu an ta tur a ni." 
Ezekiel44:30 Rah hmasa te zinga a tha ber apiang te, in thil hlan tinrenga a tha ber, in thil hlan zawng zawng a mi chu puithiamte ta tur a ni, an ina malsawmna a cham hlen theihna tur in chhangphut hmehhlawm tha ber chu puithiam hnenah in pe tur a ni.Puithiam chuan sa tlaw reng reng, sava emaw ramsa emaw kut tuar emaw amaha thi emaw an ei tur a ni lo." 
Ezekiel44:31 Puithiam chuan sa tlaw reng reng, sava emaw ramsa emaw kut tuar emaw amaha thi emaw an ei tur a ni lo." 
Ezekiel45:1 Chulovah chuan rochan tura ram in sem hunah chuan ram bung serh, LALPA hnenah ram zuat in hlan tur a ni; a dunglam chu tawng singhnih leh sangnga, a vanglam chu tawng singhnih, a pumin ram serh a ni tur a ni." 
Ezekiel45:2 Hemiah hian hmun serh atan a dung leh avang tawng zanga ve ve, in bial a ni ang a, tin, a velin tawng zangaa zau hmun awl a awm tur a ni." 
Ezekiel45:3 Tin, hemi tehsa atang hian a dung tawng singhnih leh sangnga leh avang tawng singkhat i teh chhuak ang a, chumiah chuan hmun thianghlim serh ber chu a awm tur a ni." 
Ezekiel45:4 Ram bung serh chu, puithiam, hmun thianghlima rawngbawltu, a rawngbawl tura LALPA hnaih thintu te tan a ni ang a, an in hmun atan leh hmun thianghlim atan a ram serh a ni tur a ni." 
Ezekiel45:5 Hmun dang a dung tawng singhnih leh sangnga, a vang tawng singkhat, Levia chi in puia rawngbawltute pualah, an chenna khawpui atan a awm tur a ni." 
Ezekiel45:6 Ram bungser hlan tawh hrulah chuan khawpui chan avang tawng zanga leh tawng singhnih leh sangnga in ruat tur a ni a, Israel chhungkaw pumpui tan a ni ang." 
Ezekiel45:7 Tin, lal chan tur ram serh hlan tawh leh khawpui sir tuak ve ve, ram serh hlan tawh hmalam leh khawpui chan hmalamah, thlang lama mi thlanglam hawiin, chhak lam ami chhaklam hawiin a awm tur a ni: a dung chu thlang lam ramri atanga chak lam ramri thlengin, ram bung dang chen bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel45:8 Chu chu Israel rama ama chanpual a ni tur a ni: tin, ka lal te chuan ka mite an hnehchhiah tawh lo ang a, Israel chhungte chu an hnam hranzia ang zelin ram an pe zawk ang." 
Ezekiel45:9 Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti: Aw Israel lalte u, tawk rawh se, pawngnekna leh inramna chu ban daih u la, fel taka rel leh dik taka tih ching tawh u la, ka mita hnawhchhuah thin chu ban tawh u, tih hi Lalpa PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel45:10 Bukna leh buk lung dik tak hman theuh tur a ni, Ephah pawh Bath pawh a dik tur a ni." 
Ezekiel45:11 Ephah leh Bath hi a in tluk chhiah tur a ni. Homer atanga teh tur; Hetiangin: Epah sawmin Bath sawm a tluk a, chu chu Homer khat a ni." 
Ezekiel45:12 In buk lung chu hetiang tur hi a ni: Gera sawmhnih leh Sekel khat a in tluk ang a, Sekel sawmruk chu Mina khat a ni ang." 
Ezekiel45:13 Tin, hei hi thil hlan in hlan tur a ni ang; buh Homer khat zelah epha hmun ruka thena hmun khat leh barli homer khat zelah epha hmun ruka thena hmun khat in pe tur a ni:" 
Ezekiel45:14 tin, hriak hlan dan tur chu kor khat zelah bath hmun sawma thena hmun khat; kor chu bath sawm a ni, homer tluk bawk a ni, homer khat chu bath sawm a ni si a:" 
Ezekiel45:15 Israel ran tlatna hmun tha ata beram rual zinga mi zahnih zelah a no pakhat, eitur hlan atan te, halral inthawina atan te, remna thil hlan atan te anmahni thenfaina siamna turin an hlan tur a ni, tih hi LALPA PATHHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel45:16 Rama mi zawng zawngte chuan Israel lal hnenah he thilhlan hi an pe ang. 
Ezekiel45:17 Tin, kutah te, thla tharah te, chawlhniah te, Israel kut ni vangthla zawng zawngah halral inthawina te, ei tur hlan te, in tur hlan te lal chuan a ngaihtuah ang a, sual vanga in thawina te, ei tur hlan te, halral in thawinate, remna thil hlante Israel chhungte in thenfaina'n anin a tumsak tur a ni." 
Ezekiel45:18 Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian ati a ni: Thla KHATNA chumi thla nikhat niah chuan bawngpa tuai hmelhem lo i hmang ang a, hmun thianghlim chu i thianfai tur a ni." 
Ezekiel45:19 Tin, puithiam chuan sual vanga in thawina thisen chu a la ang a, in pui kawngka biangah te leh maicham chhawrdawh kil liah te leh hung chhungnung zawk kawngka in bangpengah a tat ang." 
Ezekiel45:20 Tin, chumi thla ni sari niah chuan tihpalh emaw hriatloh na avang emawa thil tisualtute tan pawh chutiang bawk chuan i ti ang a, chutiang chuan in pui thenna i siam tur a ni." 
Ezekiel45:21 Thla khatna, chumi thla ni sawm leh ni li niah chuan kalhlen kut in serh ang; tin, ni sarih chung chu chhang dawidim telh loh in ei ang." 
Ezekiel45:22 Chumi niah chuan lalin amah leh a rama mi zawng zawng tan sual vanga inthawina'n bawngpa tuai a tum ang. 
Ezekiel45:23 Tin, kut ni nisarih chhung zawng chuan bawngpa tuai hmelhem lo pasarih leh berampa pasarih zel LALPA tan halral inthawina turin a tum ang, sual vanga inthawina turin nitin kelpa pakhat nen." 
Ezekiel45:24 Tin, chhang hlan atan bawngpa pakhat zelah epha khat zelah hriak hin khat a tum tur a ni.Thla sarihna, chimi thla ni sawm leh ni nga nia kutah chuan ni sarih chhung chu chutiang bawk chuan a ti ang a, sual vanga inthawina te, halral inthawina te, chhang hlante leh hriak te tum vekin,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel45:25 Thla sarihna, chimi thla ni sawm leh ni nga nia kutah chuan ni sarih chhung chu chutiang bawk chuan a ti ang a, sual vanga inthawina te, halral inthawina te, chhang hlante leh hriak te tum vekin,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel46:1 Heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni: Hung chungnung zawk zawk kawngka chhak lam hawi chu hnathawh ni, ni ruk chhung chu a inkhar ang a, chawlni ah leh thlathar ni ah erawh chuan a inhawng tur a ni." 
Ezekiel46:2 Tin, Lal chu kawngka in sumhmunah a lut ang a, kawngka in bang peng bulah a ding ang a, puithiamte chuan a halral inthawina leh remna thilhlan te chu an buatsaih ang a, luhna kawngka in pindanah chuan Pathian a bia ang a; tichuan a chhuak ang a, kawng erawh chu a tlailam thlengin khar loh tur a ni." 
Ezekiel46:3 Tin, vantlang erawh chuan chawlni leh thlatharahte chuan chu kawngka in luhna bulah te chuan LALPA hmaah Pathian chibai an buk ang." 
Ezekiel46:4 Tin, chawlhnia lalin LALPA hnenah halral inthawina a hlan tur chu beramno hmelhem lo paruk leh berampa hmelhem lo pakhat a ni ang a;" 
Ezekiel46:5 tin,berampa pakhat zelah chhang hlan epha khat, beram noteah chuan a pek theih ang ang, leh epha khatah hriak hin khat zel a ni ang." 
Ezekiel46:6 Tin, thla thar niah chuan bawngpa tuai hmelhemlo pakhat beramno paruk leh berampa pakhat a ni ang a, hmelhemlo an ni vek tur a ni;" 
Ezekiel46:7 tin,chhanghlan a buatsaih anga, bawngpa tuaiah epha khat, berampaah epha khat, beram noteah a theih ang ang, leh epha khat zelah hriak hin khat a ni tur a ni." 
Ezekiel46:8 Tin, lal chu a luh lamin kawngka in sumhmunah a lut ang a,chutah vek chuan a chhuak leh tur a ni." 
Ezekiel46:9 Vantlang erawh chu kutni vangthlaa LALPA hmaa an lo kal chuan Pathian chibai buk tura hmarlam kawngka ina lo lut chu chhimlam kawngka inah an chhuak ang a, chhimlam kawngka ina lo lut chu hmarlam kawngka inah an chhuak thung ang;an luhna kawngka inah chuan an kir tur a ni lo a, a hmalamah an kal zel zawk tur a ni." 
Ezekiel46:10 Tin, an luh chuan lal chu an zingah a lut ve ang a, an chhuah chuan a chhuak ve tur a ni." 
Ezekiel46:11 Tin, kutni te leh kutpuiahte chuan chhang hlan chu bawngpa tuai pakhat ah epha khat, berampa pakhatah epha khat, beram noteah a pek theih ang ang, epha khatah hriak hin khat zel a ni tur a ni." 
Ezekiel46:12 Tin, lalin duhthua thil hlan a hlan dawn chuan halral inthawina emaw remna thilhlan emaw LALPA hnena duhthua thilhlan anga a hlan dawn chuan khaw chhak lam hawi kawng chu a hawnsak anga, chawlhnia tih ang bawkin halral inthawinate leh remna thil hlante chu a buatsaih ang; tichuan a chhuak anga, a chhuah hnuah kawng chu a khar ang." 
Ezekiel46:13 Tin, ni tinin LALPA hnena halral inthawinan beram no kum khat mi hmelhem lo i hmang ang a, tuk tinin i hmang tur a ni." 
Ezekiel46:14 Tin, tuk tinin chhanghlan i buatsaih ang a, epha hmun ruka thena hmun khat leh hriak hin khat hmun thuma thena hmun khat chhangphut diptak tihhnawnna'n; chu chu kumkhuaa LALPA hnena chhanghlan dan tur a ni." 
Ezekiel46:15 Hetiang hian halral thil hlan fo turin beram note, chhang hlan te, hriak te, tuk tinin an buatsaih tur a ni,""tiin." 
Ezekiel46:16 Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti chian a ti a ni: Lalin a fapate, tu hnenah pawh rochan engpawh a pek chuan a fapate ta a ni ang a, an ro luah a ni mai." 
Ezekiel46:17 Mahse a rochana mi chu a rawngbawltu tu emaw hnena a pek chuan bawih chhuahna kum thlengin a nei ang a, chutah chuan lal hnenah a pe kir tur a ni; ama ro pangai erawh chu a fapate ta tur a ni ang." 
Ezekiel46:18 Chu loah pawh lalin mite rochan a chhuhsak tur a ni lo a, an in leh lo ata a hnawt chhuak tur a ni hek lo; ama ta ngeia mi chu a fapate hnenah rochan a pe tur a ni; mahni in leh lo ata mite an vah darh lohna'n,""a ti a." 
Ezekiel46:19 Tin, kawngka in sira puithiamte tana pindan serh hmarlam hawiah chuan mi hruai lut a; tin, ngaiteh, a kawmchar khawthlang lampangah chuan hmun a lo awm a." 
Ezekiel46:20 tin, ani chuan ka hnenah, "" Hei hi puithaimten thiamloh vanga thil hlan leh sual vanga thil hlan an chhumna hmun, chhanghlan an urna hmun a nih hi; hung chhung pawnta zawkah an keng chhuaka mite chu miserha an siam lohna'n,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel46:21 Tin, hung pawnta zawkah chuan mi hruai chhuak a,hung chhung kil hrulah chuan mi kaltir a, tin, ngaiteh, a hungchhung kil theuhah chuan hung a awm leh a." 
Ezekiel46:22 Hung chhung kil liah chuan hung, bang nei, a dung tawng sawmli, a vang tawng sawmthum a lo awm bawka; chung a kil lia mi palite chu a intiat vek a ni.Chung hmun li chhung lamah chuan a velin lung an rem tlara, chumi tlar hnungah chuan a velin chhumna tur thuk a awma. Tin, ka hnenah,""hengte hi chhumna in, in pui rawngbawltuten mite inthawina sa an chhumna turte chu a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel46:23 Chung hmun li chhung lamah chuan a velin lung an rem tlara, chumi tlar hnungah chuan a velin chhumna tur thuk a awma. Tin, ka hnenah,""hengte hi chhumna in, in pui rawngbawltuten mite inthawina sa an chhumna turte chu a nih hi,"" a ti a." 
Ezekiel47:1 Tichuan in pui kawngkharah chuan mi hruai let a, tin, ngai teh, in pui kawngka bul hnuai atang chuan, chhak lam hawiin tui a lo luang chhuak a; in pui chu chhak lam hawi a ni si a; tin, tui chu maicham chhim lam in pui sir dinglam hnuai atangin a lo luang thla a." 
Ezekiel47:2 Tin, hmarlam hawi kawngka inah chuan mi hruai chhuak a, pawnah chuan chhak lam hawi kawngka in pawnta zawk thlengin mi hruai a; tin, ngai teh, dinglam pagah chuan tui a lo luang chhuak a." 
Ezekiel47:3 Tin, chumi chuan tehna hrui kengin chhak lam hawia kalin tawng sangkhat a teh a; tin, tui chu mi dai kaitir a, kheimit thleng a ni a." 
Ezekiel47:4 Tin, tawng sangkhat a teh leh a, tui chu mi dai kaitir leh a, tui chu khup thleng a ni a, tin, tawng sangkhat a teh leh a, mi dai kaitir leh a, tui chu kawng thleng a ni a." 
Ezekiel47:5 Tin, tawng sangkhat a teh leh a, tin, ka dai kai rual loh, luipui a lo ni ta a, tui chu a lo sang zel a, a dai a dai kai rual loh, ahleuha hleuh tham luipui a lo ni ta si a." 
Ezekiel47:6 Tin, ka hnenah,""Mihring fapa, hei hi i hmu em?"" a ti a, Tin, luikam hrut turin mi hruai kir ta a." 
Ezekiel47:7 Tin, ka han kir chuan, ngai teh, vaukam tluan chuan, vaukam tawnin thing tam tak a lo awm a." 
Ezekiel47:8 Tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah,"" He tui khawchhak ram lama luang hi Araba ramah a luang lut a tur a ni; tui pui ah a luang lut ang a, tuipui tui al chu tui thianghlimah a chantir ang." 
Ezekiel47:9 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, luite chu an luanna apiangah rannung tinrengin an dam phah ang a, sanghate an awm huai huai ang: tuipui tui a thianghlimna tur leh a luanna apiangah rannungten an nun phahna tur in he'ng lui hi a lo luang a ni si a." 
Ezekiel47:10 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, a kamah chuan sangha mantute an ding ang: Engedi atanga Eneglaim thlengin len denna hmun a ni ang; a sangha chu an chi ang zelin, tuipui lian sangha ang maiin an tam em em ang." 
Ezekiel47:11 Chirhdup leh dumte erawh chu an thianghlim ve lo ang a, chi khu atan hnutchhiah a ni ang." 
Ezekiel47:12 A luikamah chuan a kam tuakin thei kung tinreng a to ang a, chungte chu a hnah a vuai ngai loin a rah lo ngai hek lo ang, hmun thianghlim atanga lui lo luang chhuak chawm a nih avangin thla kipin a rah ang: a rah chu ei atan a ni ang a, a hnah chu tihdamna'n a ni ang." 
Ezekiel47:13 Lalpa PATHIAN chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Hei hi Israel hnam sawm leh hnam hih zinga ram in then dan tur chu a ni e: Josefan chan hnih a chang ang. 
Ezekiel47:14 In ang rengin in chang tur a ni; inthlahtute hnena pek tur a chhia ka chham tawh kha: he ram hi in ram chan ah a tlu dawn a ni. 
Ezekiel47:15 Hei hi a ram pum ri tur a ni: hmar lamah chuan tuipui lian atangin Hethlon kal tlangin Hamath lihna ruamah Zedad a thleng a; 
Ezekiel47:16 Berothah te, Damaska leh Hamath in ri na laia awm Sibraim te, Hauran ramri bula awm Hazerhatikon thlengin." 
Ezekiel47:17 Chutichuan ramri chu tuipui lian atangin Damaska ramri bula Hazar-enon thlengin a ni ang a, hmar lamah chuan Hamatht ramri in a ri ang, hei hi hmar lam ramri chu a ni." 
Ezekiel47:18 Tin, chhak lamah chuan Hauran leh Damaska inkarah Gilead leh Israel ram inkara Jordan lui dung a zawh ang; hmar lam ramri atangin khawchhak tuipuiah Tamar a thleng ang. Hei hi chhak lam ramri a ni tur a ni." 
Ezekiel47:19 Chhim lamah chuan Tamar atangin Meriboth-kades tuite thlengin Aigupta lui zawhin tuipui lian a thleng ang. Hei hi chhim lam ramri tur a ni. 
Ezekiel47:20 Thlang lam ah chuan Tuipui lian in a ri ang a, chhim lam ram ri atangin Hamath luhna ruam zawn thlengin. Hei hi thlang lam ramri a ni tur a ni" 
Ezekiel47:21 Chutichuan he ram hi Israel hnam athuin in zingah in sem ang. 
Ezekiel47:22 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, in ram chan tur leh in zinga hnamdang cheng, nupui fanau nei tawhte ram chan tur chu in sem tur a ni, Anni chu Israel faa piang reng ang an ni tur a ni a, Israel hnamte zingah nangmahni angin chan an nei tur a ni.Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, tu hnam zingah pawh hnamdang chu lo khawsa se la, chutah chuan a ram chan tur in ruatsak tur a ni,"" tih hi Lalpa PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel47:23 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, tu hnam zingah pawh hnamdang chu lo khawsa se la, chutah chuan a ram chan tur in ruatsak tur a ni,"" tih hi Lalpa PATHIAN thu chhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel48:1 Heng hi an hnam hmingte chu an ni: Hmarlam ramri tuipui lian atanga Hethlon kal tlangin Hmath luhna ruamah Damaska ramria Hamath kiang hmar lampang Haza-enon thlengin, chhak leh thlang zawngin chan khat chu Danho chan a ni a." 
Ezekiel48:2 Danho chan nen a inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin chan khat chu Aserho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:3 Aserho chan nen a inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin chan khat chu Naphtaliho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:4 Naphtaliho chan nen a inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin chan khat chu Manaseho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:5 Manaseho chan nen a inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin chan khat chu Ephraim ho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:6 Ephraim ho chan nen a inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin chan khat chu Reubenho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:7 Reubenho chan nena inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin chan khat chu Judaho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:8 Judaho chan nen a inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin, ram zuat in hlan tur chu a vang tawng singhnih leh sangnga a ni ang a, a dung chu chhak leh thlang zawngin chan dang ang bawk a ni a, a laia hmun serh awmin." 
Ezekiel48:9 Ramzuat LALPA hnena inhlan tur chu a dung tawng singhnih leh sangnga, a vang tawng singhnih a ni tur a ni." 
Ezekiel48:10 Tin, hemiah hian puithiamte tan ram serh zuat tur a ni ang a, hmarlam zawngin a dung tawng singhnih leh sangnga leh thlang lam zawngin a vang tawng singkhat, chhim lam zawngin a dung tawng singhnih leh sangnga a ni tur a ni, a laia LALPA hmun serh awmin." 
Ezekiel48:11 Puithiam serh tawh, Zadoka fa ka thu vawngtute tan a ni ang. Chungte chu Israel fate an vahbo laia Levia chite an vakbo veta mai anga vakbo ve lo te kha an ni a." 
Ezekiel48:12 Tin, ramzuat pumpui ata an tana zuat bik, hmunserh ber a ni ang a, Levia chi chan nen a inriin." 
Ezekiel48:13 Puithiam chan zul zelah chuan Levia chi ten chan an nei ang a, a dung tawng singhnih leh sangnga, a vang tawng singkhat a ni ang." 
Ezekiel48:14 Tin, an hralh tur a ni lo a, an thleng tur a ni hek lo: a ram tha tha pawh midang hnenah pek tur a ni lo: LALPA tana serh a ni si a." 
Ezekiel48:15 Tin, a vang tawng singhnih leh sangnga baka tawng sangnga chu vantlang chan, khawpui dinna tur, chenna in tur te leh daifemte atan a ni ang: khawpui chu a lai takah a awm ang." 
Ezekiel48:16 Tin, a teh vel dan chu hetiangin a ni ang: a hmar lampang tawng sangli leh zanga, a chhim lampang tawng sangli leh zanga; a chhak lampang tawng sangli leh zanga, a thlang lam pang tawng sangli leh zanga." 
Ezekiel48:17 Tin, a khawpui chuan daifem a nei ang a, hmar lampang chuan tawng zahnih leh sawmnga, chhim lampang tawng zahnih leh sawmnga, chhak lampang tawng zahnih leh sawm nga, thlang lampang tawg zahnih leh sawmnga." 
Ezekiel48:18 Tin, a dunglam la chuang ramzuat serh tawh hrula mi chu chhak lamah tawng singkhat a ni ang: ramzuat serh tawh hrul zel a ni tur a ni: tin, chuta thil chhuakte chu khawpuia hnathawktute ei tur a ni ang." 
Ezekiel48:19 Tin, khawpuia hnathawktu Israel nam zawng zawnga mite chuan a lei an let ang." 
Ezekiel48:20 Ram zuat pumpui chu a dung tawng singhnih leh sangnga, a vang tawng singhnih leh sangnga a ni ang, ram zuat serh tawh, killi bial, khawpui nen in hlan tur a ni." 
Ezekiel48:21 Tin, a bak ram zuat serh tawh leh khawpui chan sir tuak ve ve chu lal chan a ni ang a, chhak lam zawngin ram zuat tawng singhnih leh sangnga bak leh thlang lam zawngin tawng singhnih leh sangnga bak, ram bung dangte hrul chu lal chan a ni ang: tichuan ram zuat serh tawh leh inpui hmun serh chu a lai takah a awm ang." 
Ezekiel48:22 Tin, Levia chi chan leh khawpui chan chu lal chante inkarah a awm ang a, lal chan chu Juda chan leh Benjamin chan nen a inri ang." 
Ezekiel48:23 Tin, hnam la awmte chungchang thu-ah chuan, chhak leh thlang zawngin chan khat Benjamin ho chan a ni a." 
Ezekiel48:24 Tin, Benjaminho chan nen a inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin chan khat Simeonho chan a ni."
