Ezekiel48:25 Simeon-ho nen a inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin Iskar-ho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:26 Iskarho chan nen a inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin chan chan khat Zebulunho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:27 Zebulunho chan nen a inriin chhak leh thlang zawngin chan khat Gadho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:28 Gad-ho chan chhim lampang ramri chu Tamar atangin Meribath-kades tuite thlengin Aigupta lui zawhin tuipui lian a thleng ang. 
Ezekiel48:29 Hei hi Israel hnamte rochan tura ram insem dan tur leh an ram bung hrang hrangte chu an ni tih LALPA pathian thu chhuak a ni. 
Ezekiel48:30 Tin, hengte hi khawpui ata chhuahna te chu an ni; hmar lampang tawng sangli leh zangaah chuan kawngka pathum" 
Ezekiel48:31 khawpui kawngka te chu Israel hnam hming ang zela vuah tur a ni a; hmarlam kawngka pathumte chu, Reuben kawngka pakhat, Juda kawngka pakhat, Levia kawngka pakhat an ni ang a:" 
Ezekiel48:32 tin, chhak lampang tawng sangli leh zangaah chuan kawngka pathum: Josefa kawngka pakhat, Benjamin kawngka pakhat, dan kawngka pakhat an ni anga:" 
Ezekiel48:33 Tin, chhim lampang tawng sangli leh zangaah chuan kawngka pathum: simon kawngka pakhat, Iskar kawngka pakhat, Zebulon kawngka pakhat an ni ang a:" 
Ezekiel48:34 thlang lam pang tawng sangli leh zangaah chuan kawngka pathum: Gad kawngka pakhat, Aser kawngka pakhat, Naphtali kawngka pakhat, an ni ang.A velin tawng singkhat leh sangriat a ni ang a, chumi ni atang chuan khawpui hming chu LALPA awmna hmun tih a ni tur a ni." 
Ezekiel48:35 A velin tawng singkhat leh sangriat a ni ang a, chumi ni atang chuan khawpui hming chu LALPA awmna hmun tih a ni tur a ni." 
Daniel1:1 Juda lal Jehoiakima rorel kum thumnaah chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnekzara Jerusalemah a lo kal a, a huala a." 
Daniel1:2 Tin, Lalpa chuan Juda lal Jehoiakima chu a kutah a pe a, Pathianin bungbel thenkhatte nen; tin, ani chuan Sinar rama a pathian inah a kal pui ta a; tin, bungbelte chu a pathian sum inah a rawn thlen a." 
Daniel1:3 ,4 Tin, lal chuan Israel fate zinga mi, lal thlahte leh mi tha fate, tleirawl demna awm lo, hmeltha tak, finna tinrenga remhria, hriatna lam a bengvar, thilbul chhut thiam, lal ina chetla thiam rawn hruailut tur leh Kaldai tawng leh thil thiam zirtir turin, a mitilreh hotu Aspenaza chu a hrilh a." 
Daniel1:4 ,3 Tin, lal chuan Israel fate zinga mi, lal thlahte leh mi tha fate, tleirawl demna awm lo, hmeltha tak, finna tinrenga remhria, hriatna lam a bengvar, thilbul chhut thiam, lal ina chetla thiam rawn hruailut tur leh Kaldai tawng leh thil thiam zirtir turin, a mitilreh hotu Aspenaza chu a hrilh a." 
Daniel1:5 Tin, lal chuan lal chaw tuihmel ata leh a uaiin in thin ata chu a nitin chan tur a ruatsak a, chutianga kum thum chawm a, chumi tawpa lal hmaa an din theihna'n." 
Daniel1:6 Tin, he'ng zingah hian Juda fatea mi, Daniela te, Hanania te, Misaela te, Azaria te an tel a." 
Daniel1:7 Tin, tilreh te hotu chuan an hming a sa hlawm a: Daniela chu Beltesazzara a vuah a, Hanania chu Sadraka, Misaela chu Mesaka, Azaria chu Abednagoa." 
Daniel1:8 Mahse Daniela chuan a rilruin lal chaw leh a uain in thin te chuan intihbawlhhlawh loh a tum tlat a; chutichuan a intihbawlhhlawh lohna'n tilrehte hotu chu a dil a. 
Daniel1:9 Tichuan, Pathian in Daniela chu tilrehte hotu laka duhsakna keh khawngaihna chu a dawntir a." 
Daniel1:10 Tin, tilreh hotute chuan Daniela hnenah, In eitur leh in tur ruattu ka lalpa, lalber chu ka hlau a ni; in hmel hi tleirawl, in rualpuite aia chhe zawkin an rawn hmu ang a sin! Chuti a nih chuan lalber lakah ka lu hi hlauhpui awmin in siam dawn a ni a lawm,''a ti a." 
Daniel1:11 Tin, tilreh te hotu in Daniela te, Hanania te, Misaela te,Azaria te enkawl tua a siam hnenah chuan Danielan," 
Daniel1:12 Ka ngen a che, i chhiahhlawhte hi ni sawm min fiah rawh, eitur thlai leh in tur tuisik min pe mai rawhse." 
Daniel1:13 Tin i hmaa kan lan dante leh lal chaw tuihmel ei tleirawlte landan chu tehkhin nisela, tin, i hmuh dan angin i chhiahhlawhte chungah hian ti ang che,'' a it a." 
Daniel1:14 Tichuan, he thu hi a remtihsak a, anni chu ni sawm a fiah ta a." 
Daniel1:15 Tin, ni sawm tawpah chuan lal chaw tuihmel eitu tleirawlte zawng zawng ai chuan an hmel a lang mawi zawkin an lo thau zawk mah a." 
Daniel1:16 Tichuan, enkawltu chuan an eitur leh an uain intur chu a la bo a, thlai a pe ta zawk a." 
Daniel1:17 Tichuan, he'ng tleirawl palite hi chu thiamna leh finna zawng zawngah hriatna leh bengvarna Pathianin a pe a, Daniela chuan inlarna leh mumang zawng zawng a hrethiam ta a." 
Daniel1:18 Tin, lalin anmahni rawnhruai luhna tura a ni ruat tawpah chuan tilrehte hotu chuan an ni ho chu Neukadnezzara hmaah chuan a rawn hruailut a." 
Daniel1:19 Tin, lal chuan a lo be hlawm a, anniho zingah chuan Daniela te, Hanania te, Misaela te, Azaria te ang reng reng an awm lo a, chuvangin lal hmaah chuan an ding ta a." 
Daniel1:20 Tin, finna leh hriatthiamna thu tinreng lalin a han zawh chuan a ram pumpuia dawivaih thiam leh aikaihthiam zawng zawng te ai chuan alet sawmin an tha zawk tih a hre ta a.Tin, Daniela chuan lal Kura kumkhatna thlengin a thawk ta zel a." 
Daniel1:21 Tin, Daniela chuan lal Kura kumkhatna thlengin a thawk ta zel a." 
Daniel2:1 Tin, Nebukadnezzara rorel kumhnih naan chuan Nebukadnezzara chuan mumang a nei a; a rilru a lo buai zo ta a, a muhil thei ta lo a." 
Daniel2:2 Tichuan, lal chuan a mumang chu amah hrilh turin dawivaihthiamte, aikaihthiamte, dawithiamte, Kakdai mite koh thu a pe a. Tichuan, an lo kal a, lal hmaah chuan an ding a." 
Daniel2:3 Tin, lal chuan an hnenah, Mumang ka nei a, chu mumang chu hre turin ka rilru a buaizo ta a,"" a ti a." 
Daniel2:4 Kaldai mite chuan, suria tawngin, lal hnenah chuan, Aw lalber, kumkhua in dam ang che: i mumang chu i chhiahhlawhte hi hrilh la, tin, a hrilhfiahna chua ka entir dawn che nia,"" an ti a." 
Daniel2:5 Lal chuan kaldai mite chu a chhang a, an hnenah Ka hnen atangin thu chu a chhuak tawh a lawm, mumang leh a hrilhfiahna chu ka hnenah in tih lan loh na chuan sah sawm in ni ang, in inte pawh hnawmhnawka siam a ni mai ang." 
Daniel2:6 Mumang leh a hrilhfiahna intihlan erawh chuan ka hnen ata thilpek leh chawimawina ropui tak in hmu ang: chuvangin mumang leh a hrilhfiahna chu mi entir rawh u,"" a ti a." 
Daniel2:7 Anni chuan an chhang leh a, Lal chuan chu mumang chu a chhiahhlawhte hi min hrilh se la, tin,a hrilhfiahna chu ka entir a nge,"" an ti a." 
Daniel2:8 Lal chuan a chhang a, Hun in tisei lui mai mai dawn ani tih chiang takin ka hria;" 
Daniel2:9 ka hnen atangin thu chu a chhuak tawh tih in hria e, ka hnena mumang chu in tih lan loh na chuan in tan dankhat chauh a awm: dawtsawi kual a, ka hmaa sawitur dawt thu leh thu tlaktlai lo in buatsaih a nih hi: chutichuan mumang chu min hrilh rawh u, tin, a hrilhfiahna pawh chu min entir thei tih ka hria ang,''a ti a." 
Daniel2:10 Kaldai mite chuan lal chu an chhang a, Lal thil phut hi entir thei tur mipakhatmah lei chungah an awm lo e: lal te, hotu te, roreltu te tumah rengin hatiang thil hi dawivaihthiam emaw, aikaihthiam emaw, kaldai mi emaw an la zawt ngai si lo." 
Daniel2:11 Tin, lal thil phut hi thil khirh tak a ni a, tisaa khawsa lo pathiante tih chauh lo chu entir thei tur tumah an awm lo e,'' an ti a." 
Daniel2:12 Chuvang chuan lal chu a thinrim em em a, a kawlh ta hle mai a, Babulon mifing zawng zawng chu tihboral vektur thu a pe ta a." 
Daniel2:13 Chutichuan thupek chu a chhuak ta a, mi finghote chu tihhlum tur an ni ta a; tin, Daniela leh a thian te pawh tihhlum turin an zawng a." 
Daniel2:14 Tin, Daniela chuan Babulon mifingte tihhlum tura kal chhuak, Arioka, lal vengtu pawl hotu chu remhre tak lah fing takin a chhang a;" 
Daniel2:15 lal vengtu pawl hotu Arioka hnenah chuan, Eng tizia nge lal thupek chu chuti ema a hmanhmawh le?'' tiin a chhanga. Tin, Arioka chuan Daniela chua a hrilh ta a." 
Daniel2:16 Tin, Daniela chu a lut a, lal chu a hrilhfiahna a entir theihna'n hun kian turin a ngen a." 
Daniel2:17 Tichuan, Daniela chu a in ah ahawnga, chu thil chu a thian Hanania te, Misaela te, Azaria te ahrilh a:" 
Daniel2:18 Babulon mifing dangte zinga Daniela leh athiante chu an boral ve lohna'na he thu inthup chungchangah hian van pathian lkawngaihna an dilna turin. 
Daniel2:19 Tin, chu thi inthup chu zan inlarnaah Daniela hnenaah a lang ta a. Tin, Daniela chuan van pathian chu a fak a." 
Daniel2:20 Daniela chuan, Pathian hming chu kumkhaw tlaitluanin fakin awm rawh se: Finna leh thiltihtheihna a ta a ni si a:" 
Daniel2:21 Hunte leh hunbite a ti danglam a: Lalte a sawn bo a, lalte a tungding a: Mifing hnenah a finna a pe a, Hrethiamtu hnenah hriatna a pe a:" 
Daniel2:22 Thil thuk leh thil inthupte a tilang a: Thima awm pawh a hria a, a hnenah chuan eng a cheng a." 
Daniel2:23 Aw ka thlahtute pathian, finna leh theihna min petu, i lak ata ak thil dil tuna min hriattir tu chu. Lawmthu ka hrilhin ka fak a che: Lal thil chu min hriattir tawh si a,'' tiin a sawi a." 
Daniel2:24 Chutichuan Daniela chu Babulon mifingte tiboral tura lalina ruat Arioka hnenah chuan a va kal a, a hnenah chuan, Babulon mifingte chu tiboral suh: Lal hmaah chuan mi hruai la, lal hnenah chuan a hrilhfiahna ka entir a ng e,'' a va ti a." 
Daniel2:25 Tin, Arioka chuan Daniela chu hmanhmawh takin la hmaah a hruai ta a, a hnenah, Juda sal fate zingah lal hnena a hrilhfiahna hriattirtu tur mi pakhat ka hmu ta,'' a ti a." 
Daniel2:26 Lal chuan Daniela, a hming Beltesazzara hnenah chuan, Mumang ka neih leh a hrilhfiahna chu ka hnenah mi hriattir thei em ni?''a lo ti a." 
Daniel2:27 Daniela chuan lal chu a chhang a, a hnenah Thil inthup, lal in hriat a duh chu, mi fingte, aikaihthiam te, dawivaihthiamte, aisanthiamte chuan lal hnenah an entir thei lo a;" 
Daniel2:28 mahse thil inthupte puangtu Pathian chu vanah a awm a, lal Nebukadnezzara hi tun hnua thil lo la awmtur te chu a hriattir a nih hi. I mumang leh i khum laizawla i lu-a inlarna te chu he'ng hi a ni:" 
Daniel2:29 Aw lalber, nang chuan i khum laizawlah chuan tun hnua thil lo awm turte i ngaihtuah a, thil inthupte puang thintu chuan tun hnua thil lo la awm turte chu a hriattir che a ni a." 
Daniel2:30 Tin, kei hian midang te aia finna ka neih bik avanga he thil inthup i ka hnena puan a ni lo a, lal hnenah a hrilhfiahna hriattir turin a ni zawk e, i thinlunga i ngaihtuahte chu i hriat theihna'n" 
Daniel2:31 Aw lalber, i han dak chhuak a, ngaiteh, milim ropuitak a awm a. Chu milim hrawlpui, tle em em mai chu, i hmaah a ding a; a landan pawh tihbaiawm tak a ni." 
Daniel2:32 Chu milim chu a lu rangkachak thianghlim tak a ni a, a awm leh a bante chu tangkarua, a pum leh a malpui te dar," 
Daniel2:33 a kete thir, a kephah chu a then thir, a then bellei a ni a." 
Daniel2:34 Nang chuan lung, kut loa laihchhuah i thlir reng laiin milim chu a kephah thir leh belleiah chuan a han delh a, a tikeh sawm ta vek a." 
Daniel2:35 Tichuan, thir te, bellei te, dar te, tangkarua te, rangkachak te chu a rualin an keh sawm ta vek a, nipui lai hrui zawla buhsi ang mai an lo ni ta a: tin thliin anmahni a len bo va: tin, milim delhtu lung chu tlang lian takah a lo chang a, lei pum hi a khat ta a." 
Daniel2:36 Hei hi mumang chu a ni a; tin, a hrilhfiahna chu lal hmaah hian kan han sawi leh ang e." 
Daniel2:37 Aw lalber, nang hi lalte lal, van Pathian in ram te, thiltihtheihna te, chakna te, ropuina te a pek a chu i ni a;" 
Daniel2:38 chuvangin khawiah pawh mihring fate awmna apiangah ramsa te, chungleng sava te, i kutah a pe a, an zaa chungah rorel turin a siam chia: rangkachak lu chu nang hi i ni." 
Daniel2:39 Tin, i hnuah hian ramdang, nang aia tenau zawk a lo ding ang; tin, dar ram thumna, lei chung zawng zawnga rorel tur chu a awm leh ang." 
Daniel2:40 Tin, ram lina chu thir anga khauh a ni ang: thir chuan a tikeh sawmin thil zawng zawng a hneh thin ang hian: tin, thirin thil zawng zawng a tikeh ang bawkin a ni chuan a tikeh sawmin a rawtdip ang." 
Daniel2:41 Tin, a kephah leh a zungtang te chu, athen belvawtu hlum, athen thir nia i hmuh ang ngei khan." 
Daniel2:42 Tin, a kezungtang a then thir, a then hlum a nih ang bawk khan ram chu athen ah chuan achak ang a, athenah chuan a chhe awl ang." 
Daniel2:43 Tin, thir leh hlumnem inpawlh i hmuh ang ngei khan anni chu mihring chiin an inpawlh ang a; mahse thir leh hlum a inpawlh tak tak thei lo ang bawk in an inzawm reng thei lo ang." 
Daniel2:44 Tin, chung lalte niah chuan van Pathianin ram a rawn din ang a, chu chu a chhe ngai tawh lo ang a, a lalna pawh midangte tan hnutchhiah a ni hek lo ang; he'ng ram zawng zawng te hi a tikeh sawmin a tiral zawk ang a, kumkhuain a ding reng ang;" 
Daniel2:45 tlang ata lung, kut loa laih chhuahin thir te, dar te hlum te, tangkarua te, rangkachak te a tikeh sawm i hmuh ang ngei khan. Pathian ropui tak chuan lal hnenah hian tun hnua thil lo awm tur chu a puang a ni e: tin, mumang chu a tak ngei a, a hrilhfiahna pawh a dik ngei a ni,'' a ti a." 
Daniel2:46 Tichuan, lal Nebukadnezzara chu a bawkkhupa, Daniela chu chibai a buk a, a hnenah chuan thilhlan leh rimtuite rawn hlan turin thu a pe a." 
Daniel2:47 Lal chuan Daniela chu a chhang a, a hnenah, He thil inthup i puan theihziah hian in pathian chu pathian te pathian, lalte Lal, thilinthup puangtu a lo ni ngei mai e,'' a ti a." 
Daniel2:48 Tichuan lal chuan Daniela chu a siamlian a, thil pek ropui tam tak a pe a, Babulon ram pumpui a rorel tur leh Babulon mifingte zawng zawng chnga hotu ber ni ber ni turin a siam a.Tin, Daniela dil angin la chuan Sadraka te,Mesaka te, Abednagoa te chu Babulon bial chungchanga hotuah a dah a, Daniela erawh chu lalber rorelnaah chuan a awm ta a." 
Daniel2:49 Tin, Daniela dil angin la chuan Sadraka te,Mesaka te, Abednagoa te chu Babulon bial chungchanga hotuah a dah a, Daniela erawh chu lalber rorelnaah chuan a awm ta a." 
Daniel3:1 Lal Nebuadnezzara chuan rangkachak milim, a sanlam tawng sawmruk, a hlai lam tawngruk a siam a, Babulon biala Dura phaizawlah a dintir a." 
Daniel3:2 Tin, lal Nebukadnezzara chuan thuneitute, aiawhtute, awptute, roreltute,sum enkawltute, remruattute, dan hre mite leh ram bial rorel tu zawng zawng chu lal Nebukadnezzara milim din hlannaa lo tel tur chuan a chah khawm a." 
Daniel3:3 Tin, thuneitute, aiawhtute, awptute, roreltute, sum enkawltute, remruattute, dan hre mite leh ram bial rorel tu zawng zawng te chu lal Nebuadnezzara milim din serh naah chuan an rawn inkhawm a, lal Nebukadnezzara milim din hmaah chuan an ding hlawm a." 
Daniel3:4 Tin,ring takin tlangau a lo au a, Aw, mitin te u,hnam tinte u, tawng tin te u," 
Daniel3:5 tawtawrawt te, phenglawng te, tingtang te, sakbut te, tingtang pui te, baja te leh ri thei chi zawng zawng in hriat hunah lal Nebukadnezzara rangkachak milim din chu bawkkhupa chibai buk turin thupek in ni e:" 
Daniel3:6 tin, tupawh bawkkhupa chibai buk lo chu, chumi lai la la chuan rawhtuina meipuia paih luh tur an ni ang,"" tiin" 
Daniel3:7 Chuvang chuan chumi laia mipui zawng zawngin tawtawrawt te, phenglawng te, tingtang te sakbut te, tingtang pui te leh ri thei chi zawng zawng an han hriat chuan mitinte, hnamtin te, tawng tinte zawng zawng chuan lal Nebukadnezzara rangkachak milim din chu bawkkhupin chibai an buk ta a." 
Daniel3:8 Tin, chumi lai chuan Kaldai mi thenkhatte an lo hnai a, Juda mite chu an rawn hek a." 
Daniel3:9 Lal Nebukadnezzara hnenah chuan, Aw lalber, kumkhuain dam ang che." 
Daniel3:10 Nangin, aw lalber, mi tupawh tawtawrawt te, phenglawng te tingtang te,sakbut te tingtang pui te, baja te leh ri thei chi zawng zawng hria apiang chuan bawkkhupin rangkachak milim chibai an buk tur a ni;" 
Daniel3:11 tin, tupawh bawkkhupa chibai buk lo apiang rawhtuina meipuia paih luh an ni ang, tiin thupek i siam a." 
Daniel3:12 Juda mithenkhat Babulon ram bial chungchanga hotua i siam Sadraka te, mesaka te, Abednagoa te kha an awm a, he'ng mite hian, aw lalber, an pawisa lo che a ni: i pathian te rawng an bawl lo a, rangkachak milim i din chu chibai an buk hek lo,'' tiin an sawi a." 
Daniel3:13 Tichuan, Nebukadnezzara chuan thinur leh thintawt takin Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednagoa te chu rawn hruai tur thu a pe a." 
Daniel3:14 Tin, he'ng mite hi lal hmaah chuan an rawn hruai a." 
Daniel3:15 Nebukadnezzara chuan a chhal a, an hnenah, Aw Sadrak, Mesak, Abednago, ka pathian rawng bawl lo a, ka rangkachak milim din chibai b�k loh hi in tum reng em ni?" 
Daniel3:16 Tunah hian tawtawrawt te, phenglawng te, tingtang te, sakbut te tingtang pui te, baja te leh rithei chi zawng zawng in hriat huna bawkkhupa ka milim siam chibai buk tur in nih tawh chuan a tha e: chibai in buk loh erawh chuan chu mi lai la la chuan rawhtuina meipuia paih luh in ni ang: ka kut ata chhanchhuak tur che u pathian chu tu a ni nge?'' a ti a." 
Daniel3:17 Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednagoa te chuan lal chu an chhang a, a hnenah, Aw Nebukadnezzar, he thu ah hian kan chhan che pawh a ngai lo e." 
Daniel3:18 Kan Pathian, a rawng kan bawl thina chuan rawhtuina meipui ata min chhanchhuak thei si a, i kut ata pawh, aw lalber, min chhanchhuak mai ang." 
Daniel3:19 Chuti lo pawh ni se la, aw lalber, i pathian rawng chu kan bawl dawn lo a, i rangkachak milim din pawh chu chibai kan buk hek lo ang, tih hi hria ang che,'' an ti a." 
Daniel3:20 Tichuan, Nebukadnezzara chu a thin a tawt ta em em a, Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednagoa te lakah chuan a hmel landan a dang zo ta a; rawhtuina mei chu a sat dan pangai let sariha tisa turin thu a pe a." 
Daniel3:21 Tin, a sipai rual zinga mi chak thenkhat te chu Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednagoa te phuar tur leh rawhtuina meipuia theh lut turin thu a pe a." 
Daniel3:22 Tichuan, he'ng mite hi an kawrfualte, an kawrhnuaite, an diar te leh an silhfen dang te chawpa phuarin rawhtuina meipuia theh luh an ni ta a." 
Daniel3:23 Tichuan, lal thupek a chu hmanhmawh em avang leh rawhtuina mei chu a sat khawp a vangin Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednagoa te chawikang tu te chu meialh chuan a tihlum ta hlawm a." 
Daniel3:24 Tin, he'ng mipathum Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednagoa te hi phuar chungin rawhtuina meipui laiah chuan an tlu reng a." 
Daniel3:25 Tichuan, lal Nebukadnezzara chuan mak a ti a, hmanhmawh takin a tho a, a remruatpuitute hnenah chuan, Mi pathum te kha phuarin meiah kan thehlut a ni lawm ni kha?'' tiin a sawi a. Lal chu an chhang a, a hnenah, Aw lalber theh lut e,'' an ti a." 
Daniel3:26 Ani chuan, Ngai teh u, mi pali phelha mei laia vei vei a, na hauh loin ka hmu a, a palina landan phei chu pathiante fapa ang a ni,'' a ti a." 
Daniel3:27 Tichuan, Nebukadnezzara chu rawhtuina meipui kawngkaah chan a lo kal hnai a, Sadrak, Mesak, Abednago, nangni chungnungbera Pathian bawihte u, lo chhuak u la, hetah lo kal rawh u,'' tiin a han bia a. Tichuan, Sadraka te, Mesaka te Abednagoa te chu mei zing ata chu an lo chhuak ta a." 
Daniel3:28 Tin, thneitute, aiawhtute, awptute leh lal remruatpuitute rawn in khawm chuan, he'ng mite taksa chungah hian meiin thiltihtheihna a nei lo a, an sam pawh a kang kir hek lo, an kawrfualte a danglam hek lo a, meirim reng reng pawh an nam hek lo, tih an hmu a." 
Daniel3:29 Lal Nebukadnezzara chuan thu a sawi a, Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednagoa te pathian chu fakin awm rawh se; ani chuan a vantirhkoh a rawn tir a, a chhiahhlawh a mah ringtute chu a chhanchhuak a, chung mite chuan an pathian chauh lo chu pathian dang reng rawng an bawl loha chibai an buk lohna'n lal thupek tidanglamin an taksa an hlan ngam a." 
Daniel3:30 Chuvangin mitin, hnamtin, tawngtin, Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednagoa te pathian chunga thu tha lo sawi apiang chu sah sawm an ni ang a, an in te chu hnawmhnawka siam a ni mai ang tih thupek ka siam e: hetiang taka chhanchhuak thei pathian dang reng reng an awm si lo,'' a ti a.Tichuan, lal chuan Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednagoa te chu Babulon bialah chuan a tilian ta a." 
Daniel3:31 Tichuan, lal chuan Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednagoa te chu Babulon bialah chuan a tilian ta a." 
Daniel4:1 Lal Nebukadnezzara chuan, mi tinte, hnam tinte, tawng tinte zawng zawng, lei pum puia chengte hnenah chuan, in chungah remna tihpunin awm rawh se." 
Daniel4:2 Chungnungber pathianin ka hnena thil entirnate, thilmakte a tih tak hi tihlan tha ka ti e." 
Daniel4:3 A thil entirnate chu a ropuiin, a thiltihmakte chu a va nasa em! A ram chu ramhlun a ni a, a rorelna chu chhuanawm chhung zawng zawng a ni ang." 
Daniel4:4 Kei, Nebukadnezzara ka inah nuamsa tak leh ka in ropuiah neinung takin ka awm a." 
Daniel4:5 Mumang ka hlauhzawng tak ka nei a; ka khum laizawla ka suangtuahna leh ka lu-a inlarna chuan mi tibuai a. 
Daniel4:6 Chuvang chuan Babulon mifing zawng zawngte chu ka mumang hrilhfiahna mi hriattir theihna'n ka hmaa rawn hruai turin thu ka pe a. 
Daniel4:7 Tichuan, dawivaihthiamte, aikaihthiamte, kaldai mite, aisanthiamte chu an lo kal a; tin, ka mumang chu ka hrilh a, mahse a hrilhfiahna reng chu min hriattir lo a." 
Daniel4:8 Mahse a tawp berah chuan Daniela, ka pathian hming ang pu, a hming Beltesazzara, amah pathian thianghlimte thlarau awm chu ka hmaah a lo kal a: tin, ka mumang chu ka hrilh a," 
Daniel4:9 Aw Beltesazzara, dawivaihthiamte hotu, nangmahah chuan pathian thianghlimte thlarau a awm tih leh thuruk reng rengin a tibuai lo che tih ka hriat avangin, ka manga ka hmuh inlarna leh a hrilhfiahna chu min hrilh teh khai." 
Daniel4:10 Ka khum laizawla ka lu-a inlarnate chu hetiang hi a ni: Ka han dak chhuak a, ngai teh, lei lai takah thing a lo awm a, a sanzia chu nasa chu a nasa khawp mai a." 
Daniel4:11 Thing chu a thang a, a tantha a, a sanlam chuan van a tawng a, kawlkil atangin a lang thei vek a." 
Daniel4:12 Ahnah te chu a mawiin a rahte a tam a, amahah chuannung zawng zawng tan eitur a awm a: ramsate chuan a hlim an bel a, chungleng savate chu a zarahte an cheng a, tissa pu zawng zawng chu ama chawm an ni." 
Daniel4:13 Ka khum laizawla ka lu-a inlarnaah chuan ka han en a, ngaiteh, van atangin vengtu, mi thianghlim chu a lo chhuk a," 
Daniel4:14 ring takin, 'Thing chu kit la, a zarte chu hlawi la, a hnahte thing thla la, a rahte tidarh rawh: a hnuai ata ramsate chu kal bo se la, a zar ata chungleng savate pawh thlawk bo rawh se." 
Daniel4:15 Amaherawhchu, ram hlobet to zingah, leia a bulbawr chu, th�r leh dara tawnin, zuah la; tin, van daiin huh se la, a chan tur chu ramsa te nena hlobet z�nga awm ni rawh se:" 
Daniel4:16 a rilru chu mihring rilru atanga tihdanglam nise, a hnenah ramsa rilru pek ni rawh se: a chungah hun sarih ral rawh se." 
Daniel4:17 Thu tlu hi vengtute thuipeka tih a ni a, thil phut hi mithianghlimte thua tih a ni a, chungnungbera chuan mihringte lalna ram chungah thu a nei a, a duhsak apiang a pe a, mi hnuaihnung berte pawh a luahtir thin a ni tih minungin an hriatna'n a ni;' tiin a au a." 
Daniel4:18 He mumang hi kei, lal Nabukadnezzaran ka nei a, tin, nang aw Beltesazzar, a hrilfiahna chu puang rawh. Ka rama mi fingte zawng zawng chuan a hrilhfiahna chu mi hriattir thei si lo a; nang erawh chuan i thei e, nangmahah chuan pathian thianghlimte thlarau chu a awm si a,'' tiin." 
Daniel4:19 Tichuan, Daniela, ahming Beltesazzara chu a han chi-ai hle rih a, a ngaihtuahte chuan a tibuai a. Lal chuan a hnenah, Beltesazzar, mumang emaw, a hrilhfiahna emaw pawhin tibuai che suh se,''tiin a sawi a. Beltesazzara chuan a hnenah, Ka lalpa, mumang chu a hawtu che tan ni se la, a hrilhfiahna pawh chu i hmelma te t6n ni rawh se." 
Daniel4:20 Thing i hmuh, lo thang a, lo tanthaa, van lo tawnga, kawlkil atanga lang thei vek leh" 
Daniel4:21 a hnahte mawia, a rahte tama, nung zawng zawng tana ei tur awm leh a hnuaia ramsate chenga, a zarte chunglenf savate chenna lo ni chu," 
Daniel4:22 aw lalber, nangmah i ni a; i thanga, i chak a, i rorelna te chu kawlkil thleng a ni si a." 
Daniel4:23 Tin, van atanga vengtu mithianghlim lo chhuka, Thing chu kit la, tiboral rawh; amaherawhchu ram hlobet to zingah, leia bulbawr chu thir leh dara tawnin zuah la; tin, van daiin huh se la, a chan tur chu ramsate nena awm ni rawh se, a chunga hun sarih a ral thlengin, rawn ti lalin a hmu a;" 
Daniel4:24 tin, a hrilhfiahna chu heihi a ni, aw lalber, Chungnungbera thupek, lalber ka lalpa chunga lo thleng chu a ni e:" 
Daniel4:25 mihring zing ata hnawhchhuah i ni ang a, i chenna chu ramsate zingah a ni ang a, sebawng ang a hlobet eitir i ni ang a, van daiin i huh ang a, i chungah hun sarih a ral ang; Chungnungbera chuan mihringte lalna ram chungah thu a nei a, a duhsak apiang a pe thin a ni tih i hriat hma loh chuan." 
Daniel4:26 Tin, a bulbawr zuah tura thu an lo pek ang khan, vanin thu a nei tih i hriat hnuah chuan i ram chu i ta a ni tlat ang." 
Daniel4:27 Chuvang chuan, aw lalber, ka thu rawn che hi pawmtlak ah ngai la, i sualna chu felnain thlak la, i suahsualnate chu mirethei chunga zahngaihnain thlak rawh, i nunkhawnawmna hi a sei thei deuh mahna,"" tiin a chhang a." 
Daniel4:28 Heng zawng zawng hi lal Nebukadnezzara chung ah a lo thleng a ni. 
Daniel4:29 Thla sawm leh thla hnih tawpah chuan Babulon lal in chungah lal chu a vei a vei a. 
Daniel4:30 Lal chuan, He Babulon ropui hi keima chakna ngeia lal chenna hmun atan leh ka ropuina maawina tura ka siam chu a ni lo em ni? tiin a sawi a." 
Daniel4:31 Chu thu chu lal kaa a chhuah lai mekin, van atangin aw a lo chhuka, Aw lal Nebukadnezzar, i hnenah thu a lo thleng e: lalna ram chuan a thansan ta che a ni." 
Daniel4:32 Mihring zing ata hnawhchhuah i ni ang a, i chenna chu ramsa te zingah a ni ang: sebawng anga hlobet eitir i ni ang a, i chungah hun sarih a ral ang; chungnungbera chuan mihringte lalna ram chungah thu a nei a, a duhsak apiang hnenah a pe thin a ni, tih i hriat hma loh chuan,'' tiin." 
Daniel4:33 Chumi lai la la chuan thil chuNebukadnezzara chungah a lo th1leng ta nghal a;mihring zing ata hnawhchhuah in a awm ta a, sebawng angin hlobet a ei a, a taksa chu van daia huh in a awm a, a samte mupui hmul anga athan leh a tinte sava tin ang mai a nih thlengin." 
Daniel4:34 Tin, chung ni tawpah chuan kei, Nebukadnezzara chuan van lamah ka mit ka len chho a, ka hriatna chu ka hnenah a lo kirleh ta a, chungnungbera chu mal ka sawm a, nung renga chu ka fak a, ka zah a, a rorelna chu chatuan rorelna a ni a, a ram chu chatuan awmchhung zawng zawng a ni si a:" 
Daniel4:35 tin, leilung luahtu zawng zawngte hi engmah lo va ngaih an ni a: van sipai rualte zingah leh leilung luahtute zingah chuan a thu thuin a ti a, tumahin a kut chu an chawlhtir thei lo a, a hnenah, Nangin enge i tih?'' pawh an ti thei hek lo." 
Daniel4:36 Chutih lai vek chuan ka hriatna chu ka hnenah a lo kir leh ta a; tin, ka ram ropuina turin ka ropuina leh mawina chu ka hnenah a lo kir leh a; tin, ka remruatpuitute leh ka miropuite chuan mi rawn pan leh a, ka ram ah chuan tihnghehin ka aawm a, ropuina nasa tak mai ka hnenah belhchhah a ni ta a.Tichuan, kei Nebukadnezzara hian van lal chu ka fak a, ka chawisang a, ka zah a;a thiltih zawng zawng chu a dikin a kawng te chu a fel si a: chapova lengte chu a tihniam thei a ni." 
Daniel4:37 Tichuan, kei Nebukadnezzara hian van lal chu ka fak a, ka chawisang a, ka zah a;a thiltih zawng zawng chu a dikin a kawng te chu a fel si a: chapova lengte chu a tihniam thei a ni." 
Daniel5:1 Lal Belsazzara chuan a miropui sangkhatte ruai ropui tak a thehsak a, sang hmaah chuan uain a in a." 
Daniel5:2 Belsazzara chuan uain a in deuh chinah chuan rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbel, a pa Nebukadnezzaran Jerusalem biak in ata a lak chhuah chu, rawn la turin thu a pe a; lal leh a mi ropuite leh a nupui te leh a hmeiten uain an inna atan." 
Daniel5:3 Tichuan, rangkachak bungbel, Jerusalema Pathian biakin ata lak chhuah te chu an rawn la a; tin, lal leh a mi ropuite, a nupuite, a hmeite chuan inna'n an hmang ta a." 
Daniel5:4 Uain chu an in a, rangkachakte, tangkarua te, dar te, thing te, lungte a siam pathiante chu an chawimawi dur dur a." 
Daniel5:5 Chumi lai tak chuan mihring kut zungtang hi a lo chhuak a, lal in bang kulh, khawnvar dahna ep lamah chuan a rawn ziak ta a; tin, lal chuan a ziaktu kuttum bung chu a hmu a." 
Daniel5:6 Tichuan lal chu a hmel a dang a, a rilru te chu a buai zo a, a kawngruh chuktuahte a zawi zo a, a khup te a in khawng hlawk hlawk ta mai a." 
Daniel5:7 Lal chu, Aikaihthiamte, Kaldai mite, aisanthiamte rawn hruai tur,'' tiin a au vak a. tin, lal chuan Babulon mifingte hnenah chuan, Tupawh he ziak hi chhiara a hrilhfiahna mi entir chu puan senduk sintir a ni ang a, a nghawngah rangkachak khaidiat awrhtir a ni bawk ang a, rama roreltu pathumte zinga pakhat a ni ang,'' tiin a sawi a" 
Daniel5:8 Tichuan lal mifingte zawng zawng chuan lo lut a; mahse ziak chu an chhiar thei lo a, a hrilhfiahna lah lal an hriattir thei hek lo." 
Daniel5:9 Tin, lal Belsazzara chua mangang em em mai a, a hmel a dang a, a mi ropuite chu an mangang bawk a." 
Daniel5:10 Tin, lal leh a mi ropuite authawm a vang chuan lalnu chu ruaithehna in ah chuan a lo lut a: tin, lalnu chuan, Aw lalber, kumkhuain dam ang che; i rilru chu buai suh se la, i hmel pawh dang hek suh se:" 
Daniel5:11 i ramah hian mipakhat, amaha pathian thianghlimte thlarau awm chu a awm a; i pa hun laiahte pawh enna te, hriatthiamna te, finna te, pathian finna ang mai amahah chuan a awm tih hriat a ni tawh a; aw lalber, i pa lal Nebukadnezzara, i pa ngei chuan dawivaihthiamte, aikaihthiamte, Kaldai mite, aisanthiamte, hotuah a siam a;" 
Daniel5:12 amahah chuan rilru tha fawr bik te, hriatna te, hraitthiamna te, mumang hrilfiahna te, thuhar hrilhfiahna te, dawisutthiamna te chu Daniela, lalin Beltesazzara a vuahah chuan a awm tih hriat a ni tawh thin a. Tunah Daniela a chu koh ni se la, a hrilhfiahna chu a entir mai ang,'' tiin a sawi a." 
Daniel5:13 Tichuan, Daniela chu lal hmaah an rawn hruai lut a. Lal chuan Daniela hnenah, ""Daniela, Juda saltang fate zinga mi, ka pa lalberin Judai ram ata a rawn hruaia chu i ni em?" 
Daniel5:14 Nangmahah chuan pathiante thlarau a awm a, enna te, hriat thiamna te, finna tha fawr bik te nangmahah chuan a awm tih hriat a ni, tiin i thu ka lo hria a." 
Daniel5:15 Tin, tunah hian he ziak hi chhiar tur leh a hrilhfiahna min hriattir turin mi fingte, aikaihthiamte ka hmaah an rawn hruai lut tawh a; mahse chu thil hrilhfiahna chu min entir thei lo." 
Daniel5:16 Nang erawh chuan i hrilhfiah thei a, dawi i sut thiam a ni tih ka lo hria che a; tunah i theih chuan ziak hi chhiar la, a hrilhfiahna mi hriattir la, puan senduk sintir i ni ang a, i nghawng velin rangkachak khaidiat awrhtir i ni ang a, rama roreltu pathumte zinga pakhat i ni ang,'' tiin a sawi a." 
Daniel5:17 Tin, Daniela chuan a chhang a, lal hmaah chuan, ""I thupek chu nangma tan ni sela, i lawmman chu midang pe ang che; mahse ziak hi lal ka chhiarsak ang a, a hrilhfiahna chu ka hriattir ang e." 
Daniel5:18 Aw lalber pathian chungnungber a chuan i pa Nebukadnezzara chu ram te, lenna te, ropuina te, lalna te a pe a;" 
Daniel5:19 lenna a hnena a pek a vang chuan mitin te, hnam tinte, tawng tinte chuan an hlau a, a hmaah chuan an khur thin a; a duh a piang a that a, a duh a piang a nun a; a duh apiang a chawisang a, a duh apiang a titlawm thin a." 
Daniel5:20 Mahse a thinlung a lo dak sang a, a rilru a lo sak a, chapo takin a che ta a; a lal thutthleng ata tihtlawm a ni a, a ropuina chu an laksak ta a;" 
Daniel5:21 tin, mihring fate zing ata hnaawhchhuahin a awm a, a rilru chu ramsa ang a siam a ni a, a chenna chu ram sabengtungte zingah a ni ta a; sebawng angin hlobetin an chawm a, a taksa chu van daia huh in a awm a: Pathian chungnungber a chuan mihringte lal na ram chungah thu a nei a, a duhsak apiang a luahtir thin a ni tih a hriat hma loh chuan." 
Daniel5:22 Tin, nang a fapa, aw Belsazzar, he'ng zawng zawng hi i hre na a, i rilru i tihniam lo a," 
Daniel5:23 van lalpa chungah chuan i inchawisang ta zawk a; a ina bungbel te chu i hmaah an rawn la a, nang leh i mi ropuite, i nupui te leh i hmeite nen uain inna'n in hmang a; tin, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, dar te, thir te, thing te, lungtea siam pathian, hmu thei lo, ngaithla thei lo, hre thei lo te chu i chawimawi a; tin, Pathian i nunna leh i kawng zawng zawng a kuta kawltu chu i zah lo a;" 
Daniel5:24 tichuan, a hnen atangin kut tumbung chu tirh a ni ta a, he ziak hi a lo in ziak ta a nih hi." 
Daniel5:25 Tin, hei hi thu ziaka chu a ni e: MENE, MENE, TEKEL, UPHARSIN." 
Daniel5:26 Tin, hei hi a hrilhfiahna chu a ni: MENE: Pathianin i ram chu a chhut zo ta a, a tawp a thlen ta." 
Daniel5:27 TEKEL: bukin i awm a i tling ta lo. 
Daniel5:28 PERES: i ram chu thenin a awm a, Media leh Persia hnenah pek a ni ta,'' a ti a." 
Daniel5:29 Tichuan, Belsazzara chuan thu a pe a, Daniela chu puan senduk an sintir a, a nghawng velin rangkachak khaidiat an awrhtir a, a ramah chuan roreltu pathumte zinga pa khat a ni tur a ni, tiina puang ta a." 
Daniel5:30 Chumi zanah chuan Kaldai lal Belsazzara chu thah a ni a.Tin, Daria, Media mi chuan ram chu an chang ta a, amah chu kum sawmruk leh kumhnih vela upa a ni." 
Daniel5:31 Tin, Daria, Media mi chuan ram chu an chang ta a, amah chu kum sawmruk leh kumhnih vela upa a ni." 
Daniel6:1 Daria chuan ram awp tura thuneitu za leh sawmhnih, ram pumpuia dah darh chu tha a ti a;" 
Daniel6:2 tin, an chungah chuan hotu pathum a ruat leh a, an zinga pakhat chu Daniela a ni a; he thuneitute hian an hnena chanchin an thlen chhawn zela, Darian chhiatna reng a neih lohna'n." 
Daniel6:3 Tin, he Daniela hi rilru tha fawr bik pu a nih avangin hotu dangte leh thuneitute aiin a lang bik hle a; lal pawhin ram pumpui chunga dah a rilruk a." 
Daniel6:4 Tichuan hotu te leh thuneitute chuan ram chung thuah chuan Daniela chungah remchang an zawng ta a; mahse remchang reng an hmu thei lo a, dik lohna an hmu thei hek lo; a rinawm em em si avangin, amahah chuan tihsual emaw, dik lohna emaw hmuh tur a awm si lo a." 
Daniel6:5 Tichuan, he'ng mite hian, A pathian dan thuah a chunga remchang kan hmuh nghal loh chuan he Daniela chungah hian remchang kan hmu dawn lo e,'' an ti a." 
Daniel6:6 Tichuan, hotute leh thuneitute chu lal hnenah chuan an inhawr khawm a, hetiang hian an sawi a: Lal Daria, kumkhuain dam ang che." 
Daniel6:7 Ram hotute, aiawhtute leh thuneitute, remruattu leh awptute zawng zawng chu ni sawmthum chhunga, aw lalber, nangma hnenah chauh lo chuan, pathian emaw mihring emaw hnena dilna nei apiang chu sakeibaknei puka paih tur, tiin lal hian dan siamin khap tlat se la, tih an remti tlanga." 
Daniel6:8 Tunah hian, aw lalber, khapna chu tinghet la, Media leh Persia dan danglam ngailo ang zelin thu ziak hi danglam leh tawh hlek lo turin hming ziak hnan ang che,'' tiin" 
Daniel6:9 Chutichuan, lal Daria chuan thu ziak leh khapnaah chuan hming a ziak ta a." 
Daniel6:10 Tin, Daniela chuan thu ziak chu hming ziak hnan a ni tih a hriat veleh a inah a lut a (a pindana tukverhte chu Jerusalem lam hawi a hawn a ni a), a hmaa a tih dan ang bawkin nikhatah vawithum a thingthi a, a tawngtai a, a pathian hnenah lawmthu a hrilh a." 
Daniel6:11 Tichuan, he'ng mite hi an inkhawm a, Danielan a pathian hnenah dilna leh ngenna a hlan thin tih a hmu chhuak ta a." 
Daniel6:12 Tin, lal chu an rawn hnaih a, a hmaah chuan lal khapna thu kha an sawi a. Ni sawmthum chhunga, aw lalber, nangma hnenah chauh lo chuan pathian emaw, mihring emaw hnena dilna nei apiang chu sakeibaknei pukah paih an ni ang, tia khapna ah khan hming i ziak lawm ni kha?'' an ti a. Lal chuan Chu thil chu a nghet e, Media leh Persia dan danglam ngai lo ang zelin,''tiin a chhang a, Daniela, Juda saltang fate zinga mi khan, aw lalber, a pawisa lo chia, khapna hming i ziak hnan pawh kha a pawisa hek lo: ni khatah vawithum dilna a nei zawk a ni,''an ti a" 
Daniel6:13 Tin, lal chuan hengthu hi a hriatchuan pawi a ti em em a, Daniela chu chhanchhuah a rilruk tlat a, chhan chhuak turin nitlak thlengin a bei a." 
Daniel6:14 Tin, he'ng mite hi lal hnenah chuan, an rawn in hawrkhawm leh a, lal hnenah chuan, Aw lalber, Media leh Persia dan in khapna emaw, dan emaw lalberin a tihngheh tawh chu a danglam ngailo tih hria ang che,'' an ti a." 
Daniel6:15 Tichuan lal chuan thu a pe ta a. Daniela chu an rawn hruai a, sakeibaknei pukah chuan an rawn paih ta a. Lal chuan Daniela hnenah, I Pathian, a rawng i bawl fo thin khan a chhanhim ang che,'' tiin a sawi a." 
Daniel6:16 Tin lung an rawn la a, puk kawngka chu an rawn khar a; tin, lal chuan Daniela chung thu hi a danglam tawh hlek lohna'n ama zungbun ngei leh a miropuite zungbuna nemin a chhinchhiah a." 
Daniel6:17 Tin, lal chu a in ah chuan a kal a, chaw ngheiin a zankhua a: a hmaah chuan thil ritheite an rawn la hek lo a, mutmu pawh a tuah thei hek lo." 
Daniel6:18 Tichuan, a tuk zing takah chuan lal chu a tho a, hmanhmawh takin sakeibaknei puk lamah chuan a kal ta a." 
Daniel6:19 Tin, Daniela awmna puk a rawn hnaih chuan tah aw in a au va: lalber chuan Daniela hnenah, Aw Daniel, Pathian nung chhiahhlawh, i Pathian a rawng i bawl fo thina chuan sakeibaknei lak ata a chhanchhuak thei che em? a ti a.Daniela chuan lal hnenah, Aw lalber, kumkhuain damang che;" 
Daniel6:20 ka pathian chuan a vantirhkoh a rawn tir a, sakeibaknei ka te a tichip a, engmah mi tina lo e, a ti a." 
Daniel6:21 Tichuan, lal chu a lawm ta em em a, Daniela chu puk ata lak chhuak tur thu a pe ta a. Chutichuan, Daniela chu puk ata an la chhuak a, na lai reng reng amahah a awm lo a, a pathian a rin tlat avangin." 
Daniel6:22 Tin, lal chuan thu a pe a, Daniela hektute chu an rawn hruai a. Sakeibaknei pukah chuan an paih lut ta a, anni ho leh an fate leh an nupuite nen; sakeibaknei chuan anni chu an ching nawk nawk a, an ruhte chu an titliak sawm vek a, puk mawng pawh an thleng hman hek lo." 
Daniel6:23 Tichuan, lal Daria chuan mi tinte, hnam tinte, tawng tinte zawng zawng, lei pum puia chengte hnenah chuan lehkha a ziak a, tIn chungah remna tih punin awm rawh se." 
Daniel6:24 Ka ram awp zawng zawngah hian miten Daniela Pathian chu hlauin khur rawh se, tiin thu pek ka siam e. Ani chu Pathian nung a ni a, a nghet kumkhua a, a ram chu tihchhiat rual a ni lo ang a, awp pawh a tawp thleng zakin a awp dawn si a." 
Daniel6:25 Ani chuan a chhhanhim a, a chhanchhuak a, lei leh van ah hian chhinchhiahna te leh thilmakte a ti a; ani hi sakeibaknei thiltihtheihna lak ata Daniela chhan chhuak tu chu a ni, tiin.Chutichuan he Daniela hi Daria rorel lai leh Persia mi Kura rorel lai chuan a hmuingil ta hle a." 
Daniel6:26 Chutichuan he Daniela hi Daria rorel lai leh Persia mi Kura rorel lai chuan a hmuingil ta hle a. 
Daniel7:1 Babulon lal Belsazzara kumkhat naah chuan Dnielan mumang a neiin a khum laizawla a lua inlarnate chu a hmu a: tichuan a mumang chu a ziak a, a tlangpui in a sawi a." 
Daniel7:2 Daniela chuan a sawi a: Zanah inlarnaah chuan hmuh ka nei a, ngaiteh kawlkil lia thli hi tupui ropui tak chungah a lo tleh a." 
Daniel7:3 Tin, tuipuiah chuan sa ropui tak tak pali, in ang lo tak tak hi an lo chhuak a." 
Daniel7:4 A pakhat na chu sakeibaknei ang a ni a, mupui thla a nei a: a thla te chu thlawn a nih a, lei ata chawikan a nih a, mihring anga ke pahniha ding tura siam a niha, mihring thinlung pek a nih ka en reng a." 
Daniel7:5 Tin, ngaiteh, sa dang, a pahnihna chu savawm ang a ni a, a khing leh lamin a ding a, a kaah chuan nakruh pathum a awm a, a seh kawh a, a hnenah chuan, Tho la, tisa ei teuh rawh, tiin an hrilha." 
Daniel7:6 Chumi hnuah chuan ka en a, ngai teh, a dang, keite ang, a hnunga sava thla pali nei a lo awm a, chu sa chuan lu pali pawh a nei a, tin, a hnenah chuan rorelna pek a ni a." 
Daniel7:7 Chumi hnuah chuan, zan inlarnaahte chuan, ngai teh, sa palina tihbaiawm leh hlauhawm tak, chak tak mai ka hmu a; thir ha ropui tak a nei a; a ei buan buan a,a pawt sawm a, a bang nawite chu a ke in a rapbet a: a hmaa sa dangte lakah kha chuan danglam tak a ni; ki sawm a nei a." 
Daniel7:8 Kite chu ka ngaihtuah a, tin, ngai teh, an zing atang chuan ki dang pakhat te tak te a lo chawr chhuak a; a hmaah chuan ki hmasa pathum te chu a bul retah an thlawn ta a: tin, ngai teh, he ki ah hian mitte, mihring mit ang mai hi a awm a, tin, ka pawh a awm a, thil nasa takte a sawi a." 
Daniel7:9 Lalthutthlengte an han hun chhuaha, mi pakhat, Hmakhawsanga a thut thlengin ka en reng a; a silhfente chu vur anga var a ni a, a sam chu sahmul thianghlim tak ang a ni: a lalthutthleng chu meialh a ni a, chu mi tawlailir chu mei kang ang a ni a." 
Daniel7:10 A hma atang chuan mei lui a lo chhuakin a luanga: a sanga sangin rawng an bawlsak a, a hmaah chuan sing hmun sing an ding a: rorelna a lo awm ta a, lehkhabute chu keu a ni a." 
Daniel7:11 Chumi lai chuan ki in nasa tak a sawi thawm avang chuan, ka han en a, sa chu tihhluma, a taksa tihchhiata, meia hal tura pek a nih thlengin ka en reng a." 
Daniel7:12 Tin, sa dang te thu kha chu, an rorelna laksakin an awm a, an nunna erawh chu hunbi khat leh hun khat chhung atan zuah a ni." 
Daniel7:13 Zan inlarnaahte chuan, ngaiteh, van chhumte nena lo kal, mi pakhat, mihring fapa ang hi ka hmu a, Hmakhawsanga hnenah chuan a lo kal a, a hmaah chuan ani chu an rawn hruai hnai a." 
Daniel7:14 Tin, rorelna te, ropuina te, ramte a hnena pek a ni a, mi tinte, hnam tinte leh tawng tinte zawng zawng chuan a rawng an bawlna'n: a rorelna chu rorelna hlun, ral ngailo tur a ni a, a ram chu tihchhiat rual a ni lo ang." 
Daniel7:15 Kei Daniela hi, ka taksa chhungah hian ka rilru a lungngai a, ka lu-a inlarnate chuan mi tibuai a ni." 
Daniel7:16 A lo dingte z�nga pakhat chu ka han hnaih a, he'ng zawng zawng chungchanga thutak chu ka zawt a. Chitichuan min hrilh a, a thil hrilhfiahnate pawh chu mi hriattir ta a." 
Daniel7:17 Heng sa ropui tak tak palite hi, lal pali lei ata lo chhuak turte chu an ni a." 
Daniel7:18 Mahse chungnungbera mi thianghlimte chuan ram chu an chang ang a, kumkhuain kumkhaw tlaitluanin." 
Daniel7:19 Tichuan sa palina, a dangte laka danglam bik tak, tihbaiawm tak, a hate thir nia, a tinte dar nia, ei buan buana, paawt sawma, a bang nawi a ke hnuaia rap bettu chungchangah chuan thutak hriat ka chak ta a;" 
Daniel7:20 a lu-a ki sawm leh ki dang lo chhuaka, a hmaa pathum tlu ta chungchang te; kha ki, mitte neia, a lan dan pawh a thiante aia ropui bik tak te nen khan." 
Daniel7:21 Tin, ka en reng a, chu ki ngei chuan mi thianghlimte chu a do a, a hneh a;" 
Daniel7:22 Hmakhawsanga a lo kala, rorelna chu Chungnungbera mi thianghlimte hnenah pek a niha, mi thianghlimte chuan ram an chan hun lo thlen hma loh chuan a hneh a." 
Daniel7:23 Hetiang hian a ti a: sa palina chu lei chung ram palina, ramdang zawng zawng laka danglam bik, lei pumpui ei buan buana, chila, pawtsawm tur chu a ni ang." 
Daniel7:24 Tin, ki sawmte thu chu, hemi ram ata hi lal sawm an lo chhuak dawn a ni: tin, an hnuah chuan pakhat a lo chhuak anga, a hmaa mi te lakah chuan a danglam ang a, lal pathumte chu a ti tlu ang." 
Daniel7:25 Tin, chungnungbera kalhin thu a sawi ang a, chungnungbera mi thianghlimte a ti chau vang: hunte leh dan chu tih danglam a tum ang a, hun khat leh hunte leh hun chanve chhung chu a kuta pek an ni ang." 
Daniel7:26 Mahse rorelna a lo awm ang a, a thuneihna chu tihrala tihchhiat hlen turin an la bo ang." 
Daniel7:27 Tin, ram leh rorelna leh van pumpui hnuaia ramte ropuina chu Chungnungbera mi thianghlimte hnenah chuan pek a ni ang: a ram chu ram hlun a ni a, awp ram zawng zawng in a rawng an bawl ang a, amah an awih ang.Hei hi thil tawpna chu a ni. Kei Daniela hi ka ngaihtuahna te chuan mi tibuai a, ka hmel a dang a; mahse ka rilruin thu chu ka vawng reng a." 
Daniel7:28 Hei hi thil tawpna chu a ni. Kei Daniela hi ka ngaihtuahna te chuan mi tibuai a, ka hmel a dang a; mahse ka rilruin thu chu ka vawng reng a." 
Daniel8:1 Lal Belsazzara rorel kum thumnaah chuan ka hnenah, kei Daniela hnen ngeiah hian inlarna a lo lang a, atira ka hnena lo lang hnuah khan." 
Daniel8:2 Tin, inlarnaah chuan hmuh ka nei a; hetiang hi a ni a, ka hmuh lai chuan Elam biala Susan lal inah ka lo awm a; tin, inlarnaah chuan hmuh ka nei a, Ulai lukamah ka lo awm a." 
Daniel8:3 Tichuan, ka mit ka han len chho a, ka han en a ngai teh, lui bulah chuan berampa, ki pahnih nei hi a ding a: tin, ki pahnihte chu an sang dun hle a; mahse pakhat chu a dang ai chuan a sang zawk a, a sang zawk a chu a lo chawr hnuhnung a." 
Daniel8:4 Berampa chuan thlanglam leh hmarlam leh chhimlam phinin ka hmu a; a hmaah chuan sa reng reng ding thei an awm lo a, a kut ata chhanchhuak thei an awm hek lo; a duh ang angin a che a, amah a intilian a." 
Daniel8:5 Tin, ka ngaihtuah mek laiin, ngaiteh, khaw lam atangin lei pumpui chungah hian kelpa a lo thawk a, lei pawh a khawih lo: tin, kel chuan a mit inkarah hian ki langsar tak hi a nei a." 
Daniel8:6 Tin, berampa ki pahnih nei, lei bula ding ka hmuh kha a rawn pan a, a chak theihtawpin a zuan a." 
Daniel8:7 Tin berampa chu a fin rawkin ka hmu a, a chungah a thinur em em a, berampa chu a tauh a, a ki pahnih chu a tihtliahsak a, amah khing turin berampaah chuan chakna reng reng a awm ta lo: leiah a theh thlu a, a rap bet a, berampa chu a kut ata chhan chhuak thei reng reng an awm lo." 
Daniel8:8 Tin, kelpa chu a intilian ta vak mai a; a lo chak lai tak chuan a ki ropui chu a tliak ta a; tin, a aiah chuan ki langsar tak pali, kawlkil li hawiin an lo chhuak a." 
Daniel8:9 Tin, an zinga pakhat ah chuan ki te tak te a lo peng chhuak a, chhim lamah te, chhak lamah te, ram ropui lamah te nasa takin a lo thang lian a, chung awmho thenkhat te leh arsi thenkhat te chu leiah a paih thla a, a rapbetta hlawm a." 
Daniel8:10 A ni, chung awmho lal thleng hialin a intilian a, halral thil hlan awm fo chu a lak bo sak a, a hmun thianghlim awmna chu tihchhiatin a awm a." 
Daniel8:11 Tin, chung awmho chu halral thil hlan awm fo chawp chuan, bawhchhiatna avangin, a hnenah pek a ni a; tin, thutak chu leiah a paih thla a, chutiangin a ti a, a hlawhtling hle." 
Daniel8:12 Tin, mi thianghlim tawng ka hria a; tin, mi thianghlim dangin tu emaw lo tawng a hnenah khan, Halral thilhlan awm fo te, titiautu bawhchhiatna te, hmunthianghlim leh awmho chu rahbeh tura pek an nih te chungchanga inlarna chu engtia rei nge ni dawn? a ti a." 
Daniel8:13 Tin, a hnenah Zing leh tlai sanghnih leh zathum thlengin; tah chuan hmun thianghlim chu thenfai a ni ang, a ti a." 
Daniel8:14 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kei Daniela ngei hian inlarna chu ka hmuhin a awmzia hriat ka tum a; tin, ngai teh, ka hmaah chuan mihring anga lang hi a lo ding a." 
Daniel8:15 Tin, Ulai kam tuak inkarah chuan mihring aw, Gabriel, inlarna chu he mi hi hriat thiamtir rawh, tia han ko hi ka hria a." 
Daniel8:16 Chutichuan, ka dinna chu a rawn hnaih a; tin, a lo kal chuan ka hlau em a, bawkkhupin ka tlu a: mahse a ni chuan ka hnenah, Aw mihring fapa, hre thiam ang che, inlarna chu tawpna hun a mi tur a ni si a, a ti a." 
Daniel8:17 Tin, mi biak lai chuan bawkkhupin ka lo muhil der a: mahse min han khawih a, min dintir a." 
Daniel8:18 Ani chuan, Ngai rawh, thinurna hunhnuhnung lama thil lo awm tur chu ka ti hria ang che: tawpna hun ruata mi a ni si a." 
Daniel8:19 Berampa, ki pahnih nei i hmuh kha Media leh Persia lal an ni a." 
Daniel8:20 Tin, kelpa hmul chhur mai chu Grik lal a ni: tin, a mit inkara ki ropui chu lal hmasaber a ni." 
Daniel8:21 Tin, kha ki, tliaka a hmuna pali lo chhuak kha chu, chu hnam atang chuan ram li a lo ding chhuak dawn, tihna a ni, a thiltihtheihna nen erawh chuan ni loin." 
Daniel8:22 Tin, an lalna hun hnuhnung lama bawhchhetuten an vawrtawp an thlen hunah chuan, lal hmel hlauhawm tak, thu khirhkhan thim mi a lo chhuak ang." 
Daniel8:23 Tin, a thuneihna a chak em em ang a, ama thlitihtheihna ngei avang erawh chu ni loin; mak takin a tichhia ang a, a hlawhtling ang a, chutiangin a ti ang; tin, michak te leh mithianghlim te chu a tichhia ang a." 
Daniel8:24 Tin, a thiltih dan avangin vervekna a kutah a tihhlawhtling ang; a thinlungah amah a intilian ang a, ngaihtha taka an awm laiin tam tak a tichhia ang: Lal te lal a khing ang a mahse kut loa tih tliahin a awm ang." 
Daniel8:25 Tin, zing lam leh tlai lam inlarna, sawi tawh a kha, a dik a ni: mahse inlarna chu ngawihpui rawh, ni tam tak hnua mi tur a ni si a, a ti a.Tin, kei Daniela chu ka chau a; tin, ka tho a, lal chu mak ka ti em em mai a, mahse tuma'n an hre thiam lo." 
Daniel8:26 Tin, kei Daniela chu ka chau a; tin, ka tho a, lal chu mak ka ti em em mai a, mahse tuma'n an hre thiam lo." 
Daniel9:1 Ahasuera fapa, Daria, Media chia mi, Kaldai ram chunga lala siam kum khatna," 
Daniel9:2 a rorel kum khatnaah chuan, kei Daniela hian lehkhabuahte chuan, zawlnei Jeremia hnena LALPA thu lo thleng, Jerusalem chhiatna hlen a tiam hun chhung kum zat chu ka lo hre thiam ta a, kum sawmsarih chu." 
Daniel9:3 Tin, chaw ngheiin, saiip puan te, vaivut te nen tawngtaina leh dilna zawngin LALPA pathian lam chu ka hawi a." 
Daniel9:4 Tin, LALPA ka pathian hnenah chuan ka tawngtai a, ka in puang a, Aw lalpa, Pathian ropui tak leh tihawm tak, amah hmangaiha, a thupekte zawm thintu hnena thuthlung leh zahngaihna nei thintu." 
Daniel9:5 I thupek leh rorelnate laka kal pengin kan sual ta a, dik lo tak leh suaksual takin kan ti ta a, kan hel ta:" 
Daniel9:6 i chhiahhlawh kan lalte, hotute leh pate leh ram mipui zawng zawngte hnena i" 
Daniel9:7 Aw lalpa, felna chu i chan a ni a, keini chan erawh chu zahna mai a ni, tun lai ang hian; Judaia mite, jerusalema cheng te, Israel ho zawng zawng lam hnaia mi leh lam hlaa mi, an bawhchhiatnate avanga ram tina i hnawh darhte lah chuti bawk." 
Daniel9:8 Aw lalpa, i chunga kan lo sual tak avangin keini chan zawng zahna mai a ni, kan lal te, kan hotute, kan pate chan pawh." 
Daniel9:9 Zahngaihna leh ngaihdamna chu Lalpa kan pathian chuan a nei, a chungah hel ta mah i la;" 
Daniel9:10 a chhiahhlawh zawlneite hmanga kan hmaa a dah, a dante zawmin LALPA kan pathian aw chu ka awih hek lo." 
Daniel9:11 A ni, Israel ho zawng zawngin i aw awihlo tura kal pengin i dan an bawhchhe ta a ni. Chuvang chuan anchhia chu ka chungah leihin a awm ta a, Pathian chhiahhlawh Mosia dana ziak chhecham thu nen; a chungah kan sual ta si a." 
Daniel9:12 Tin, a thu kan chunga a sawi leh kan roreltu. ro min reltute chunga a sawi kha kan chunga thil tha lo nasa tak thlentirin a tikim ta a: Jerusalem chunga tih tak ang chu van hnuai pum puiah pawh tihin a awm ngai lo." 
Daniel9:13 Mosia dana ziak angin he'ng thil tha lo zawng zawngte hi kan chungah a lo thleng a ni: mahse kan khawlohnate chu kan hawisana i thudik hriat thiamna te kan neih nan LALPA kan pathian lungawina chu kan zawng si lo. 
Daniel9:14 Chuvangin, LALPA chuan thil tha lo chu a en reng a, kan chungah a rawn thlentir ta a ni: LALPA kan pathian chu a thil tih atih zawng zawngah hian a fel si a, a aw kan awih ta lo a ni." 
Daniel9:15 Tin, tunah hian, aw Lalpa kan Pahtian, Aigupta ram ata kut chaka mite hruai chhuaktu leh hmingthanna tun thlenga hmingthatna insiamtu, kan sual ta a, suaksual takin kan ti ta e." 
Daniel9:16 Aw lalpa, ka ngen a che, i felna zawng zawng avangin i thinurna leh i thinrimna chu i khawpui Jerusalem, i tlang thianghlim atang chuan kir se la; kan sual te avang leh kan pate khawlohna avangin Jerusalem leh i mite hi kan vel a mi zawng zawngte zingah sawichhiat a lo ni ta." 
Daniel9:17 Chuvangin aw kan Pathian, tunah hian i chhiahhlawh tawngtaina leh dilnate hi ngaithla la, Lalpa avangin i hmun thianghlim ram tawh chungah chuan i hmel tieng ang che." 
Daniel9:18 Aw ka Pathian, i beng dawh la, ngaithla teh; i mit meng la, kan tiau dante leh khawpui i hming vuaha awm hi en teh: kan dilnate chu kan felnate avangin i hmaah kan hlan a ni si lo a, i zahngaihna ropui tak avangin a ni zawk e." 
Daniel9:19 Aw lalpa, ngaithla teh; aw lalpa, ngaidam rawh; aw Lalpa ngaithla la, thak ang che; Aw ka Pathian, nangmah avang ngeiin i khawpui leh i mite u hming vuaha an awm avangin, tiin." 
Daniel9:20 Tin, keima sual leh ka mi Israelte sual thupha chawia,tawngtaia, thu sawia, LALPA ka pathian hmaa ka Pathian tlang thianghlim atana ka dilna ka hlan lai mekin," 
Daniel9:21 a ni, tawngtaia ka tawng lai ngei chuan, mi Gabriela, atira inlarnaa ka hmuh khan, tlai lam thilhlan hun lai angah hian chak taka thlawkin mi rawn pan a." 
Daniel9:22 Tin hriatthiamna mi neihtir a, mi bia a, ka hnenah, Aw Daniel, hriat thiamna fing tak neihtir tur chein ka lo chhuak a nih hi." 
Daniel9:23 I dil tirhah khan thupek a chhuak tawh a, hrilh tur chein ka lo kal a ni; duhawm tak i ni si a; chuvang chuan thil chu ngaihtuah la, inlarna chu hre thiam rawh." 
Daniel9:24 Bawhchhiatna tikin tur te, sualna titawp tur te khawlohna thianfai tur te, hmun thiannghlim ber chu hriak thih tur tein i mite leh i khawpui thianghlim tan hapta sawmsarih ruat a ni e." 
Daniel9:25 Chuvangin, Jerusalem tung ding leh sa tha tura thupek a chhuah atanga hriakthiha, lal a lo awm thlengin hapta sarih a ni ang, tih hre fiah thiam ang che: tin, hapta sawmruk leh pahnih hnuah chuan hriakthiha chu tihbo a ni ang a,a tawpna thleng pawhin indona a awm ang, chhiatnate chu a inruat sa a ni.Tin, hapta khat atan mi tamtak hnenah thuthlung nghet tak a siam ang a; tin, hapta chanveah chuan inthawinate leh thilhlante a tibang ang; tin, titiautu chu tenawmna thla chunga chuangin a lo kal ang a; tin tawpna, lo thleng ngei tura ruatsa thleng chuan thinurna chu titiautu chungah chuan leih buak a ni ang, a ti a." 
Daniel9:26 Tin, hapta khat atan mi tamtak hnenah thuthlung nghet tak a siam ang a; tin, hapta chanveah chuan inthawinate leh thilhlante a tibang ang; tin, titiautu chu tenawmna thla chunga chuangin a lo kal ang a; tin tawpna, lo thleng ngei tura ruatsa thleng chuan thinurna chu titiautu chungah chuan leih buak a ni ang, a ti a." 
Daniel10:1 Persia lal Kura kum thumnaah chuan, Daniela, a hming Beltesazzara an vuah hnenah chuan thil a lo lang a; chu thil chu a dik a ni a, chu chu indona ropui tak a ni: tichuan thil chu a hrethiama,inlarna hriat theihna a nei a ni." 
Daniel10:2 Chung nite chuan, kei Daniela chu hapta thum pumhlum lusun angin ka awm a." 
Daniel10:3 Chaw tuihnai reng reng ka ei lo a, sa emaw uain emaw pawh ka kaah a lut hek lo,hapta thum pumhlum a kim hma chu hriak pawh ka in thih hek lo." 
Daniel10:4 Tin, thla khatna, ni sawmhnih leh ni li nia lui ropui tak Hidekel kama ka awm lai chuan," 
Daniel10:5 ka mit ka han len chho a; ngai teh, mi, puan zai sina inthuam, a kawnga Ufaz rangkachak thianghlima inhreng hi a lo awm a:" 
Daniel10:6 a taksa pawh berul lung ang a ni a, a hmel chu kawlphe lan dan ang, a mitte chu mei khawnvar ang, a bante leh a kephahte chu dar tle mi ang, a tawng thawm chu mipui thawm ang a ni." 
Daniel10:7 chu in larna chu kei Daniela chauh hian ka hmu a; ka hnena awmte chuan inlarna chu an hmu ve lo a, mahse nasa takin an lo khur a, an biru bo ta a." 
Daniel10:8 Chutichuan keimah chauh ka awm ta a, inlarna ropui tak chu ka hmu a, thahrui reng ka nei ta lo va: ka hmel mawina pawh a chuai zo a, thahrui reng ka nei ta lo." 
Daniel10:9 Mahse tawng ri chu ka hria a: a tawng ri ka han hriat chuan bawk khupin, hmai lei siin ka mu hil ta der a." 
Daniel10:10 Tin, ngai teh, kut hian mi han khawih a, chu chuan mi bawhvah tir a." 
Daniel10:11 Tin, ka hnenah, Aw Daniel, nang mi duhawm tak, i hnena ka thusawi hi hre thiamla, ding ngil rawh; tunah hian i hnena rawn tirh ka ni si a, a ti a: tin, he thu hi ka hnena a sawi zawh chuan khur chungin ka ding a." 
Daniel10:12 Tin, a ni chuan ka hnenah,Hlau suh Daniel, i Pathian hmaa inngaitlawm tur leh hrethiam tura i thinlung i pek tirh ni atang khan i thute chu ngaihthlak a ni a, i thute avang chuan ka lo kal a ni." 
Daniel10:13 Mahse Persia ram hotu chuan ni sawmhnih leh nikhat mi dodal a; amaherawhchu, ngai teh, Mikaela, hotu lian chu min pui turin a lo kal a; tichuan Persia lal hnenah chuan ka han awm ta a." 
Daniel10:14 Nakin lama i mite chunga thil lo thleng turte hriat thiam tir tur chein tunah hian ka lo kal a ni: inlarna chu ni tamtak hnuah a la ni dawn si a, a ti a." 
Daniel10:15 Tin, he'ng thute ang zela ka hnena a sawi hun chuan, kei chu ka kaikun a, ka tawng thei lo a." 
Daniel10:16 Tin, ngai teh, mi pakhat, mihring fapate ang taka lang hian ka hmui a rawn khawih a; tichuan ka ka ka ang ta a, ka hmaa lo dinga hnenah chuan, Aw ka lalpa, inlarna avang chuan ka lungngaihnate chuan mi delh a, thahrui reng ka nei lo a." 
Daniel10:17 He ka lalpa chhiahhlawh hian he ka lalpa hi engtin nge a biak theih ang? kei lah chuan thahrui reng ka nei si lo, thawk pawh ka la thei hek lo, ka ti a." 
Daniel10:18 Tichuan, mihring ang taka lang chuan mi han khawih leh a, min ti chak ta a." 
Daniel10:19 Tin, ka hnenah, Aw mi duhawm tak, hlau suh; thlamuang takin awm rawh: chak la, a ni chak rawh, a ti a. Tin, ka hnena thu a sawi lai chuan ka lo chak ta a, ka LALPA'n thu sawi rawh se, nangin mi tichak tawh si a, ka ti a." 
Daniel10:20 Tichuan, ani chuan, I hnena ka lo kal chhan hi i hria em? Tunah chuan Persia ram hotu bei turin ka kir dawn a ni: tin, ka thawh chhuah hunah chuan, ngai teh, Grik ram hotu a lo kal ang.Mahse thudik ziaknaa ziak chu ka hrilh ang che: hengah hian, in hotu Mikaela chauh lo chu, tumah mi tan tur an awm lo e." 
Daniel10:21 Mahse thudik ziaknaa ziak chu ka hrilh ang che: hengah hian, in hotu Mikaela chauh lo chu, tumah mi tan tur an awm lo e." 
Daniel11:1 Tin, kei chu, Media mi Daria kum khatnaah khan amah tinghet tur leh tichak turin ka ding a." 
Daniel11:2 Tin, tunah hian thudik chu ka entir ang che. Ngai teh, Persia ramah chuan lal pathum an lo chhuak ang a, a pali na chu a dang zawng ai khan a hausa zawk hle ang: a hausakna avanga a intihchak hunah chuan Grik ram do turin mi zawng zawng a chawk tho ang." 
Daniel11:3 Tin, lal chak tak, thuneihna ropui taka rorel tur chu a lo chhuak ang a, a thu thuin a ti ang." 
Daniel11:4 Tin, a lo chhuah hun chuan a ram chu phel darh ani ang a, kawlkil liah semin a awm ang, a thlahte hnenah ni loin, a thuneihnaa a rel thin ang zel ni hek loin;a ram chu he mite ni lo, midang tan chhuhsak in a awm zawk dawn a ni." 
Daniel11:5 Tichuan, chhimlam lal chu chak a ang a; a hotute zinga pakhat erawh chu amah aiin a chak zawk ang a, thuneihna anei ang a, a thuneihna chu thuneihna ropui tak a ni ang." 
Daniel11:6 Tin, kumte tawpah chuan an inzawm ang a; chhimlam lal fanu chu hmarlam lal hnenah inremna siam turin a lo kal ang: mahse chakna chu a nei rei lo ang a; ani pawh kha a ning hek lo ang a, a chakna pawh lal fanu chu pek boin a awm zawk ang a, a rawn hruaitute leh a hringtu, chutih laia amah tichak tu nen." 
Daniel11:7 Mahse a zung atanga chawr no ata chu mipakhat ama hmunah a ding ang a, chu chu sipai rual nen a lo kal ang a, hmarlam lal kulhah chuan a lut ang a, anmahni a bei anga, a hneh ang:" 
Daniel11:8 tin, an pathiante, an lim chhunte nen, an tangkarua leh rangkachak bungbel tha tak takte nen, Aigupta ramah a kalpui vek ang a; tin, kum engemawti chu hmar lam lal lakah a chawl rih ang." 
Daniel11:9 Tin, chhim lam lal ramah chuan hmar lam lal chu a lo lut ang a, mahse ama ramah a kir leh ang." 
Daniel11:10 Tin, a fapa ten an do ang a, sipai rual nasa tak an ko khawm ang a, an lo kal ang a, an chim hneh ang a, an pal tlang ang: tin, an lo kir lah ang a, an do vang a, a kulh ngei pawh." 
Daniel11:11 Tin, chhim lam lal chu a thinur em em ang a, a lo chhuakin amah abei ang- hmar lam lal ngei chu: tin, mipui tamtak nen a chhuak ang a, mi tamtak a kutah pek a ni ang." 
Daniel11:12 Tin, mi tamtak chu hruaibo an ni ang a, a thinlung a sang ang a, sing lai te chu a titlu ang a, mahse a ding hlen lo ang." 
Daniel11:13 Tin, hmar lam lal chu a lo thawk leh ang a, mipui a hmaa mi aia tam zawk nen a chhuak ang a, tin, hun tawp, kum tawp ngeiah chuan sipai rual nasa tak leh thuam nasa tak nen a rawn pan ang." 
Daniel11:14 Tin, chung hunah te chuan mi tam tak, chhim lam lal do turin an ding ang: i chite z�nga pawngnek mite pawh inlarna chu tithleng turin an inlek ang a, mahse an tlu ang." 
Daniel11:15 Chutichuan, hmar lam lal chu a lo kal ang a, mual pawng a siam ang a, khawpui kulh nghet nei chu a la ang: tin, chhim lam chakna chuan a dal zo lo ang, a mi thlante pawhin; dal zo tur chakna reng a awm lo ang." 
Daniel11:16 Tichuan, a rawn dotu chuan a duh ang angin a ti ang a, a hmaah tumah an ding lo vang: tin, a ni chu ram ropuiah chuan a ding ang a, a kutah chhiatna a awm ang." 
Daniel11:17 Tin, a ram pumpui chakna nen lo kal a tum ang a, inremna asiam ang a, chutiangin a ti ang: tin, a tihkhawloh turin a hnenah hmeichhe fanu a pe ang a, mahse a hlawhtling lo ang a, a hlawkpui hek lo ang." 
Daniel11:18 Hemi hnuah hi chuan thliarkar lam a hawi ang a, tam tak ala ang: mahse hotu pakhat chuan sawichhiatna a chhak chhhuah chu a tibang ang a; a ni, a sawichhiatna chu ama chung vekah a lettir ang." 
Daniel11:19 Tichuan, ama ram ngei kulhte lam chu a hawi leh ang a, mahse a petek in a tlu ang a, hmuh zawh a ni tawh lo ang." 
Daniel11:20 Tichuan, ama hmunah chuan mi pakhat, ram ropui naa chhiahkhawntu kal tlang tirtu tur chu a lo ding chhuak ang: mahse nirei lo teah thinurna vang ni loin, tihboralin a awm ang." 
Daniel11:21 Tin, a hmunah chuan mi hmusitawm, ram chawimawina pek loh chu a lo ding chhuak ang: mahse ram muan laiin a lo kal ang a, tawngkam thiamin ram chu a chang ang." 
Daniel11:22 Tin, a hmaa mi chu tui lian chaknaa hrut boin an awm ang a, keh sawm in an awm ang: a ni thuthlung hotu chenin." 
Daniel11:23 tin, a hnena thuthlung siam hnuah chuan hlemhle takin a che ang: a lo ding chhuak ang a, mipui tlem tete nen pawh a lo chak dawn a ni." 
Daniel11:24 Muan hun laiin ram bial tha ber berah a lo thawk ang a, a pate leh a pa pate tih ngailoh chu a ti ang: mite zingah chuan rallak leh rallak thilte, sumte a vawrh darh ang: a ni, kulh nghet chungah te chuan a phiarrukte chu a phiar rih ang." 
Daniel11:25 Tin, a thiltihtheina leh a huaina chu, sipai rual nasa tak nen, chhim lam lal chungah a thawk tho ang a; tin, chhim lam lal chuan sipai rual nasa tak leh chak tak nen a lo do ang a, mahse a ding zo lo ang, a chungah chuan phiarruk eng eng emaw an lo phiar dawn si a." 
Daniel11:26 A ni, a chaw tuihmel eitute ngei chuan amah an tiboral ang a, asipai rual te chu hnawl boin an awm ang a, tam tak chu thahin an awm ang." 
Daniel11:27 Tin, he'ng lalte hi zawng an thinlunga pawi khawih hmang an ni ve ve ang a, dawhkan hmun khatah dawt an sawi ang: mahse a hlawhtling lo ang, a tawp chu hun ruat ah chuan a ni dawn si a." 
Daniel11:28 Tichuan, sum tam tak nen ama ramah a kir leh ang a, a thinlung chu thuthlung thianghlim doin a awm ang: chutiangin a ti ang a, ama ram ngeiah a kir leh ang." 
Daniel11:29 Hun ruatah chuan a lo let ang a, chhim lam ah a kal ang a, mahse a hnuhnung zawkah hi chuan a hmasa ang a ni lo ang." 
Daniel11:30 Kittim lawngte chuan amah an rawn do dawn a ni; chitichuan a lungni lo ang a, akir ang a, thuthlung thianghlim chungah chuan a thinur ang a, chutiangin a ti ang; a ni, a kir leh ang a, thuthlung thianghlim hawisantute chu a lawm ang." 
Daniel11:31 Tin, sipai te chuan an beihsak ang a, hmun thianghlimte an tibawlhhlawh ang a, kulh ngei pawh chu; tin, halral thilhlan awm fo chu an tibo ang a, tiauna tenawmna chu an dintir zawk ang." 
Daniel11:32 Tin, thuthlung chunga suak sual taka titute chu tawngkam thiamin a tikhawlo ang; mahse mi an pathian hretute kha chu an nghet ang a, thil nasa tak an ti ang." 
Daniel11:33 Tin, mi zinga a fingate chuan mi tamtak an zrtir ang a, mahse khandaihte, meialha te, sal tanna te leh rawkral te in mi tamtak an tlu ang." 
Daniel11:34 Tin, an tluk pawhin puihna tlem te tea dawmin an awm ang a, mahse mi tam takin fak derin anmahni an fin ang." 
Daniel11:35 Tin, a finga te zinga thenkhatte chuan, anmahni tifai tur leh tithianghlim tur leh tivar turin an tluk phah ang, tawpna hun thleng pawhin: hun ruatah a la nih fo avangin." 
Daniel11:36 Tin, lal chuan a duh ang angin a ti ang a; amah a in chawisang anga, pathian tinreng chungah a in tilian ang a, pathiante pathian kalhin thil mak tak takte a sawi ang: tin, thinurna hrik thlak zawh a nih hma chu a hlawhtling ang, ruat sa chu tih ngei tur a ni si a." 
Daniel11:37 A thlah tute pathiante chu a pawisa lo ang a, hmeichhiate ngainat pathian leh pathian dang reng reng pawh a pawisa hek lo ang: mi zawng zawng chungah a in tilian dawn si a." 
Daniel11:38 Mahse chu mi ai ah chuan kulhte pathian chu a chawimawi ang a, pathian, a pate pawhin an hriat ngailoh kha rangkachak nen, tangkarua nen, lunghlute leh thil duhawmte nen a chawimawi ang." 
Daniel11:39 Tin, pathian dang tak tanpuinain kulh nghet tak tak te chu a bei ang a, tupawh a pawm apiang chu a tiropui ang: tam tak chungah ro a reltir ang a, ram chu man neiin a sem ang." 
Daniel11:40 Tin, tawpna hunah chuan chhim lam lalin amah a rawn nawr ang a; tin, hmar lam lal chuan tawlailir nen, sakawr chung chuang mi leh lawng tam tak te nen thawngaleivir ang maiin amah a lo bei ang; ramte chu a lut ang a, a chim hneh ang a, paltlang ang." 
Daniel11:41 Ram ropui pawh chu a lut ang a, tam tak chu tihtluk a ni ang: mahse a kut ata he'ng hi chu chhan chhuah an ni ang-Edom leh Moab Amon mi tha thate." 
Daniel11:42 Ramte chungah pawh a kut a lek ang a, Aigupta ram pawhin a pumpelh lo ang." 
Daniel11:43 Tichuan, rangkachak leh tangkaraw dahkhawmte chungah leh Aigupta ram thil hlute zawng zawng chungah thu a nei ang: tin, Libua mite leh Ethiopia mite chu a kaiza veng an ni ang." 
Daniel11:44 Mahse, chhak lam leh hmar lam atanga thu thangin amah a tibuai ang: tichuan mi tamtak tiboral tur leh timang turin thinur takin a chhuak ang.Tin, tuipui leh tlang thianghlim ropui tak inkarah chuan a lal puanin chu a hung ang a, mahse a tawpna thleng a ni ang a, tumahin an pui lo ang." 
Daniel11:45 Tin, tuipui leh tlang thianghlim ropui tak inkarah chuan a lal puanin chu a hung ang a, mahse a tawpna thleng a ni ang a, tumahin an pui lo ang." 
Daniel12:1 Tin, chumi hunah chuan i mipui fate tan thintu, hotu ropui tak Mikaela chu a ding ang a; tin, buaina hun, hnam awmtirh ata chumi hun thleng pawha la awm ngai lo chu, a lo awm ang: tin, chu mi hunah chuan i mite chu chhanchhuah in an awm ang a, mi tin lehkhabua hming chuang apiang te chu." 
Daniel12:2 Tin, an zinga tam tak lei vaivuta mihil tawhte chu an lo thangharh anga, thenkhat chu chatuan nunaah,thenkhat zahna leh chatuan hmuhsitawmnaah." 
Daniel12:3 Tin, a fingate chu van eng angin an eng ang a, mi tam tak felnaa hawi kirtirtute chu arsi angin kumkhaw tlaitluanin an eng ang." 
Daniel12:4 Mahse nang aw Daniel, thu chu thup la, lehkhabu chu char tlat rawh, tawpna hun thlengin: mi tam tak an tlan vel ang a, hriatnate a pung dawn a ni, a ti a." 
Daniel12:5 Tin, kei Daniela chuan ka han en a, ngai teh, midang pahnih an lo ding a, pakhat chu lui kam ko lehlamah." 
Daniel12:6 Tin, tuin emaw, mi, puan zaisina inthuam, luipui chunga awm hnenah chuan, Heng thilmak tawpna hi eng chen nge ni ang? a ti a." 
Daniel12:7 Tin, mi, puanzaisina inthuam, luipui tui chunga awm chuan a kut dinglam leh akut vei lam van lama phar chhuakin, Hun khat leh hunte leh hun chanve chhung a ni ang; mi thianghlimte thiltihtheihna chu an tikeh sawm zawh hunah he'ng thil zawng zawng hi a kin ang,' tia nung kumkhuaa chhalin chhia a chham ka hria a." 
Daniel12:8 Hriat chu ka hria a, angaihna erawh chu ka hre lo; tichuan kei chuan, Aw ka lalpa, he'ng thil tawpna chu eng nge ni ang? ka ti a." 
Daniel12:9 Tin, a ni chuan, Daniel, kal mai rawh, thu chu thup leh char tlat a ni ta e, tawpna hun thlengin." 
Daniel12:10 Mi tam tak chu an intithianghlimin a intivar ang a, an lo tha ang; mahse mi suaksualte chuan sual takin an ti ang a, mi suaksual tumahin angaihna an hre lo vang; mifingte erawh chuan angaihna an hria ang." 
Daniel12:11 Tin, halral thilhlan awmfo te lakbo anih atiuauna tenawm dintir a nih hun atang chuan, ni sangkhat leh zahnih leh sawmkua ani ang." 
Daniel12:12 Nghak hram hrama, ni sangkhat leh zathum leh sawmthum leh panga thleng zo chu a eng a thawl e.Mahse nang chu tawpna thleng chuan kal rawh: nite tawpnaah chuan i chawl ang a, i chan tawkah chuan i awm ang, a ti a." 
Daniel12:13 Mahse nang chu tawpna thleng chuan kal rawh: nite tawpnaah chuan i chawl ang a, i chan tawkah chuan i awm ang, a ti a." 
Hosea1:1 Judaho lal Uzzia te, Jothama te, Ahaza te, Hezekia te lal lai leh Israel-ho lal Jeroboama, Joasa fapa lal laia Beeria fapa Hosea hnena LALPA thu lo thleng chu." 
Hosea1:2 LALPA'n Hosea hminga Israelte hnena thu a sawi tan lai khan hetiangin Hosea hnenah a sawi: Kal la, nupuiah nawhchizuar nei la; nawhchizuar lakah fa hring rawh; hetiang hian ka mite chuan min kalsan a, min uiresan ta a ni,"" tiin." 
Hosea1:3 Tichuan a kal a Diblaima fanu Gomeri chu a nei ta a; tin, nau a pai a, fapa a hrinsak ta a." 
Hosea1:4 Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, A hmingah Jezreela sa rawh; rei rial loin Jezreel phuba chu Jehua chhungte chungah ka la ang a, Israela chhungte ram chu ka ti kin ang." 
Hosea1:5 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Jezreel ruamah Israel ho thal ngul chu ka ti tliak ang, a ti a." 
Hosea1:6 Tin, nau a pai leh a, fanu a hring a. Tin, LALPA chuan a hnenah, a hmingah Lo-ruhamai sa rawh: Israela chhungte chu ka lainat ngai dawn tawh lo, ka ngaidam thuai dawn ta si lo a." 
Hosea1:7 Juda chhungte erawh chu ka lainat ang a, thal ngul emaw, khandaih emaw, indona emaw, sakawr emaw, sakawr chung chuang mi emawa anmahni chhandam loin, LALPA an pathian chuan ka chhandam ang, a ti a." 
Hosea1:8 Tin, Lo-ruhamai chu hnute hnek a bantir, tin, nau a pai leh a, fapa ahring a." 
Hosea1:9 Tin, LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a: Ahmingah Lo-ammia sa rawh: nangni hi ka mite in ni si lo a, tin, kei in pathian ka ni dawn lo." 
Hosea1:10 Amaherawhchu Israel fate chu tuifinriat tiau vaivut, teh rual loh leh chhiar rual loh zat an ni ang a; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an hnena, Ka mite in ni lo, tihna hmunah chuan, Pathian nung fate in ni e, tih a ni ang.Tin, Juda fate leh Israel fate chu an pungkhawm ang a, an lu tur an ruat ang a, chu ram atang chuan an kal chho ang: Jezreel ni chu a ropui dawn si a." 
Hosea1:11 Tin, Juda fate leh Israel fate chu an pungkhawm ang a, an lu tur an ruat ang a, chu ram atang chuan an kal chho ang: Jezreel ni chu a ropui dawn si a." 
Hosea2:1 In unaupate hnenah chuan, Ammia, ti u la, in far nute hnenah chuan, Ruhamai, ti rawh u." 
Hosea2:2 In nu hi bei rawh u, bei rawh u; Ani hi ka nupui a ni si lo a, kei pawh a pasal ka ni lo: A hmel ata nawhchizawrh chin hi paih thla se la, Atanglai ata a uire chin hi paih thla rawh se;" 
Hosea2:3 Chutilochuan ka tisaruak ang a, A pian nia a awm angin ka awmtir ang a, Thlaler angin ka siam ang a, Ramro angin ka awmtir ang a, Tuihalin ka tihlum ang." 
Hosea2:4 A fate pawh ka lainat lo ang, Nawhchizuar fate an ni si a." 
Hosea2:5 An nu chuan nawhchi a zuar thin a, Anmahni paitu chu zahpui awm takin a awm: Ka chaw te, ka tui te, ka sahmul te, ka la te, hriak te leh ka in tur te mi petu, ka ngaihzawngte ka um ang, a ti a ni." 
Hosea2:6 Chuvangin ngai teh, i kawng chu hlingin ka ping ang a, A mah dalin dai ka theu vang a, A kawngte a hmu lo ang." 
Hosea2:7 Tin, a ngaihzawngte chu a um ang a, A um phak lo ang; Anmahni a zawng anga, a hmu lo ang; Tichuan ka pasal hmasa hnenah ka kir teh ang, Tun ai hian hman kha ka tan a tha zawk si, a ti ang." 
Hosea2:8 Buh te, uain te, hriak te hi,Tangka ka tihpun sak te hi, Rangkachak Baal tana an hman te nen, Keima pek a ni tih a hre si lo." 
Hosea2:9 Chuvangin, ka buh chu a seng hunah,Ka uain pawh a sawr hunah ka la kir leh ang, Ka sa hmul leh ka la, a saruak khuhna tur chu ka lak sak ang." 
Hosea2:10 Chutichuan a ngaihzawngte mit hmuhah A saruak zahmawh ka ti lang ang, Ka kut ata tuma'n an chhanchhuak lo ang." 
Hosea2:11 A hlimna zawng zawng, a kut te, a thla thar te, A chawlhni te leh a puipun hun zawng zawng te ka tireh bawk ang." 
Hosea2:12 A grep leh a theipui kung, Heng hi a ngaihzawng mi pek ka hlawh chu a ni, A tih thina te chu ka tiram ang: Ramhnuaiah ka siam ang a, ramsa ten an ei ang." 
Hosea2:13 Rimtui a halsak thin Baal nite chu a chungah ka thungrul ang, Chunglai chuan a bengbehte leh a incheimawinate a inbel a, A ngaihzawngte a pan a, kei mi theih nghilh a ni, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Hosea2:14 Chuvangin, ngai teh, ka thlem ang a, thlalerah ka hruai ang a, ngaihawm takin amah ka bia ang." 
Hosea2:15 Tin, chuta chinah chuan, a grep huan te chu a hnenah ka pe ang, Akor ruam pawh beiseina kawngka atan: Chutah chuan a tleirawl lai nite leh Aigupta ram atanga a lo chhuah ni ang khan a chhang ang." 
Hosea2:16 LALPA thu chhuak chuan heti hian a ti: Chumi ni-ah chuan ramsa te, chungleng sava te, Leia rannungte nena thuthlung an tan ka siam ang a: Thal ngul te, khandaih te, indona te hi Lei ata ka tiboral ang a, him takin ka awmhotir ang." 
Hosea2:17 Kumkhuain ka tan ka hual tlat ang che; Felna te, rorelna te, khawngaihna te, lainatna tein Ka tan ka hual ang che." 
Hosea2:18 Rinawmnain ka tan ka hual ang che. Tichuan LALPA chu in hre tawh ang. 
Hosea2:19 Chumi ni-ah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Ka bia ang a,tin,annin lei an bia ang a;" 
Hosea2:20 Tin, lei chuan buh te, uain te, hriak te an bia ang;" 
Hosea2:21 Tin, annin Jezreel an bia ang.Tin, ani chu ka tan leiah ka ching ang a; Lainatdawnglovi chu ka lainat ang a, Kaminilova chu, Ka mi i ni, ka ti ang a, Tin, anin, Ka pathian i ni, a ti ang." 
Hosea2:22 Tin, ani chu ka tan leiah ka ching ang a; Lainatdawnglovi chu ka lainat ang a, Kaminilova chu, Ka mi i ni, ka ti ang a, Tin, anin, Ka pathian i ni, a ti ang." 
Hosea3:1 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, kal leh ta la, hmeichhia, midang duhlai, uirenu chu va hmangaih rawh, Israela thlahte chu pathian dang hnenlam hawiin grep chhang ngaina mah se, LALPA'n a hmangaih reng ang bawk hian, a ti a." 
Hosea3:2 Chutichuan tangka sawm leh panga leh barli homer khat leh homer chanvein amah chu ka lei a: 
Hosea3:3 Tin, a hnenah, Ni tam tak chhung chu ka tan i awm tur a ni; nawhchi i zuar tur a ni lo a, tuma nupui i ni tur a ni lo: chutiang bawk chuan keipawh i lakah ka awm ang, ka ti a." 
Hosea3:4 Israela thlahte chu ni tam tak lalber leh milian leh lungphun serh leh puithiam kawr emaw, milim te emaw nei loin an awm dawn si a:chumi hunah chuan Israela thlahte chu an lamlet ang a, LALPA an pathian leh an lalber Davida chu an zawng ang a; ni hnuhnungahte chuan LALPA leh a thatna chu khur chungin an pan ang." 
Hosea3:5 chumi hunah chuan Israela thlahte chu an lamlet ang a, LALPA an pathian leh an lalber Davida chu an zawng ang a; ni hnuhnungahte chuan LALPA leh a thatna chu khur chungin an pan ang." 
Hosea4:1 Israela thlahte u, LALPA thu chu ngai thla teh u; He ramah hian thutak leh khawngaihna leh Pathian hriatna awm loh avangin, Lalpa chuan ram luahtute beihna tur a nei." 
Hosea4:2 Chhechham te, in bum te, in thah te, rukruk te, Uire chin te a punlun a, thisen a in phaman reng a ni." 
Hosea4:3 Chuvangin ram chuan a sun ang a, A chhunga cheng tinreng an chau vang, Ramsate, chungleng savate nen; A ni, tufinriata sanghate chenin lak bo an ni ang." 
Hosea4:4 Amaherawhchu tumah inbei suh se la, Tumah inzilhhau hek suh se; I mite chu puithiam beitute ang an ni si a." 
Hosea4:5 Chhunah i tlu ang a, nangmah nen zawlnei pawh zanah a tlu ang a, I nu pawh ka tiboral ang." 
Hosea4:6 Ka mite chu hriatna tlakchham avangin tihboral an ni a, Hriatna i hnar avangin kei pawhin ka puithiam i nihna ata ka hnar tawh ang che. I pathian dan i theihnghilh vei a, Kei pawh hian i fate ka theihnghilh ve ang." 
Hosea4:7 An pun poh leh ka chungah an sual tulh tulh vei a, An ropuina chu mualphonaah ka chantir ang." 
Hosea4:8 Ka mite sualna azarah an intihausa a, An khawlohnaah chuan an thinlung an nghat a," 
Hosea4:9 A mipui a puithiamin ang khata hrem an ni ang a, An kawngte avang chuan anmahni ka hrem ang a, An thiltihte ka thungrul ang." 
Hosea4:10 An ei tak na'ng a, an tlai si lo ang, Nawhchizawrh an ching na'nga, an pung lo vang, LALPA pawisakna an neih loh avangin." 
Hosea4:11 Nawhchizawrh te, uain te, uain thar te chuan. Thinlung a la bo thin" 
Hosea4:12 Ka mite chuan an thing an rawn a, An tiang chuan an hril thin; Nawchizawrhna rilru chuan a hruai bo a, An pathian lak ata an hnar bo ta si a." 
Hosea4:13 Tlang chhipahte chuan an inthawi a, Mualah te chuan rimtui an hal a, Sasua leh beraw leh hlai hnuaiahte chuan- A hlim a nawm avangin; Chuvangin in fanute chuan nawhchizawrh an ching a. In fa-mote chuan uire an ching a ni." 
Hosea4:14 In fanuten nawhchi an zawrh a, In fa mote an uirein ka hrem lo ang: Anmahni ngei pawh nawhchizuarte nen an kal hrang a, Maicham-nawhchizuarte nen an in thawi ho si a; Hrethiamlo mipuite chu an tlu chhia ang." 
Hosea4:15 Israel, nang chuan nawhchizawrh ching ta mah la, Juda zawngin ching ve lul suh se, Gilgal-ah lo kal suh u la, Beth-even-ah chho hek suh u la, LALPA anun chhung chu, tiin chhia chham hek suh u." 
Hosea4:16 Bawngla luhlul ang maiin Israel ho an luhlul a; Tunah chuan LALPA'n beram no angin phulah ka chawm thei ang em? 
Hosea4:17 Ephraim chuan milem a zawmpui ta a, A awm awmin awm rawh se." 
Hosea4:18 An zu in chu an tiak a, an inphalrai ta thin; A roreltute chuan thil zahpuiawm tih an ngaina em em a ni.Thliin a lak hunah an inthawinate avangin an la zak ang." 
Hosea4:19 Thliin a lak hunah an inthawinate avangin an la zak ang. 
Hosea5:1 Aw nangni puithiamte u, hei hi hria u la, Nangni Israel chhungte u, ngaithla u la, Aw lalber chhungte u, beng chhi rawh u, Rorelna chu in tan a ni si a; Mizpah-a thang leh Tabor tlanga len zar in nih avangin." 
Hosea5:2 Mi hel te chuan tihhlum an uar em em a, Kei erawh chu an vaia zilhhautu ka ni." 
Hosea5:3 Ephraim ka hria a, Israel chu ka lakah thup a ni lo: Tunah hian aw Ephraim, nawhchizawrh i chin avangin. Israel chu tihbawrhban a ni." 
Hosea5:4 An pathian lama hawikir turin An thliltih thinte chu an bansan lo a, Nawhchizawrh rilru an zingah a awm si a, LALPA chu an hre lo a ni." 
Hosea5:5 Israel chhuantawlawl chuan a hmai chhanah a hriattir a, Chutichuan Israel leh Ephraim chu an khawlohnaah an tlu ang a, Juda pawh an hnenah a tlu ve ang." 
Hosea5:6 An beram rualte leh an sebawng rualte nen. LALPA zawng turin an kal ang a, Nimahsela ani chu an hmu lo ang, An lak atangin a inla fihlim tawh a ni." 
Hosea5:7 LALPA chungah vervek takin an ti a ni; Hnam dang fate an hring si a: Thlathar chuan an lote nen lama boralna a thlen ang. 
Hosea5:8 Gibea khuah tawtawrawt tum u la, Rama khuaah tawtawrawt ham rawh u; Beth-even-ah au tuar tuar rawh u, Aw Benjamin, i hnung lam kha, tiin." 
Hosea5:9 Ephraim chu hremna niah chuan tihtiau a ni ang: Thil lo ni ngei tur chu Israel chite zingah ka hraittir tawh a ni. 
Hosea5:10 Juda milian te chu ramri sawntute ang an ni a: An chungah ka thinurna chu tui angin ka leihbua ang. 
Hosea5:11 Ephraim chuan rah beh a ching a, Dikna a palzut a, engmah lo a um ruai a." 
Hosea5:12 Chuvang in Ephraim tan chuan sulrul ang ka ni a, Juda chhungkaw tan chuan mawihna ang ka ni." 
Hosea5:13 Ephraim chuan a natna a hmu a, Juda chuan a hliam a hmu a. Tah chuan Ephraim chu Assuria hnenah a kal a, Lalber Jareba hnenah chuan mi a tir a: Nimahsela ani chuan a tidam thei lo che u a, In hliam chu a tihdamsak thei hek lo che u." 
Hosea5:14 Ephraim tan chuan sakeibaknei ang, Juda tan chuan sakeibaknei vanglai ang ka ni dawn si a; Keimah, keimah ngeiin ka hai thler ang a, Ka kal ang a, ka kal bopui ang a, Chhan chhuaktu tumah an awm lo ang.An thiam lohna an inhriat a, ka hmel an zawn hma chu. Ka kal ang a, ka hmunah ka kir ang: An tuarnaah chuan mi zawng hma dawn a ni." 
Hosea5:15 An thiam lohna an inhriat a, ka hmel an zawn hma chu. Ka kal ang a, ka hmunah ka kir ang: An tuarnaah chuan mi zawng hma dawn a ni." 
Hosea6:1 Hawh u, LALPA hnenah i kir ang u: Min lo pawt sawm tawh na a, min tidam leh dawn si a, Min lo vaw tawh na a, min tuam leh dawn si a." 
Hosea6:2 Ni hnih chinah min tinung ang a; Nithum niah min kaitho ang a, a hmaah kan awm ang." 
Hosea6:3 LALPA hriatna chu i um zel ang u khai, i hria ang u; Zing anga khel loin a thawk chhuak ngei thin a ni: Kan hnenah ruah angin, ruah hnuhnung, lei tihuhtu ang maiin a lo thleng ang." 
Hosea6:4 Aw Ephraim, engtin nge ka tih ang che? Aw Juda engtin nge ka tih ang che? Min hmangaihna chu zing tiauchhum leh dai ral ta thuai thin ang hi a ni si a." 
Hosea6:5 Chuvangin zawlneite hmangin anmahni ka rawt a; Ka kaa thutein anmahni ka tihlum a ni: I chunga rorelnate chu eng kal chhuak zuai zuai ang a ni. 
Hosea6:6 Inthawina duh loin khawngaihna ka duh si a; halral thilhlan aite chuan Pathian hriatna ka duh zawk a ni. 
Hosea6:7 Nimahsela Adama angin thuthlung chu an bawhchhia a, Chutah chuan vervek takin ka chungah an ti a ni." 
Hosea6:8 Gilead chu khawlohna ti tute khawpui a ni a, Thisen a kai pheng phung a ni."
