Micah6:15 Omria thuruatte chu vawn reng a ni si a, Ahaba chhungkaw thil tih zawng zawngte nen; an remruatahte chuan in kal a ni: tichuan hmun tiauvah ka siam tawh dawn che a ni a, a chhunga ch4ngte hi nuihzabur atan; tin, ka mite hmingchhiatna chu i phur ang." 
Micah7:1 Ka chung a va pik em! nipui thei an seng khawm hun laia awm ang leh grep lawh hun laia grep hmaih lawh tur ang ka ni si a: rah bawr eitur a awm lo; ka nunnain theipui hmin hmasa a chak a ni. 
Micah7:2 Pathian ngaihsak mi chu lei ata a boral a, mihring zingah mi dik tak reng an awm lo: thisen chhuah turin an chang vek a; mitinin mahni unau chu lenin an veh a ni." 
Micah7:3 Til thalo tihna'n an kut chu a themthiam a, hotuten phut an nei a, roreltuten thamna an ngiat a, mi lianten an duhsam sual an hrilh a, an thu rual tlang a." 
Micah7:4 An zinga mi tha ber chu buar ang a ni a: mi dik ber pawh chu hnim hling nei aiin a chhe zawk: i vengtute ni, fana i awm ni ngei chu a lo thleng e; chu chu a manganna ni a ni ang." 
Micah7:5 Thian ring suh u la, hruaitu ah chuan rinna nghat suh u: i angchhunga awm i lak atang chuan i ka kawngkharte chu veng tha rawh." 
Micah7:6 Fapain pa hming a tichhia a, fanu chuan a nu a do a, moin a pi a do si a; mihring hmelmate chu ama chhungte ngei an ni." 
Micah7:7 Kei erawh chuan LALPA lam ka en ang a; ka chhandamna pathian chu ka nghak ang: ka Pathian chuan mi ngaithla dawn a ni. 
Micah7:8 Aw ka hmelma, mi diriam mai suh: ka tluk hun chuan ka tho leh ang: thima ka thut pawhin LALPA chu ka tan eng a ni ang." 
Micah7:9 LALPA chungah thil ka tihsual tak avangin, a lungnih loh em emna chu ka phur ang, ka chung thu mi sawipuia, ka tan rorelna chu a hlen hma loh chuan: engah mi hruai chhuak ang a, tin, a felna chu ka hmu ang." 
Micah7:10 Tichuan ka hmelma ka hnena, Khawiah nge LALPA i Pathian, titu chuan chu chu a hmu ang a, mualphonain ani chu a khuh ang, ka mitte hian amah chu a en ang a; tunah chuan kawtthler chirdiak anga rah beh a ni tawh ang." 
Micah7:11 I kulh bangte siamna ni tur chu! chumi niah chuan thuruat chu hlatak thlenga tihzau a ni ang. 
Micah7:12 Chumi niah chuan Assuria ram leh Aigupta khawpui atangte chuan i hnenah an lo kal ang. 
Micah7:13 Chuti chung pawh chuan ram chu, a chhunga chengte avang leh an thiltih rah avang chuan tih tiau a ni ang" 
Micah7:14 Karmel tlang kara ramhnuaia khawhar taka awm i rochan beram rual, i mite chu i talhtum hmangin chawm la: hmasang ang khan Basan leh Gilead-ah chawm in awm hlawm rawh se." 
Micah7:15 Aigupta ram atanga i kal chhuah lai ang khan a hnenah thil mak takte ka entir ang. 
Micah7:16 Hnam tinin chu chu an hmu ang a, an thiltihtheihna zawng zawng chu an zahpui ang: an hmui an hup ang a, an beng te a ngawng ang." 
Micah7:17 Rul angin vaivut te an liak ang a; leia bawkvaka kalte angin an awmna kua atang chuan khur chungin an lo kal ang a: LALPA kan pathian hnenah chuan tih chungin an lo kal ang a, nangmah avangin an hlau ang." 
Micah7:18 Nang anga khawlohna ngaidamtu leh a rochan la awm chhun bawhchhiatna leh pel tu pathian tu nge awm? A thinrimna chu kumkhuain a vawng reng lo, khawngaihnain a lawm em em thin avangin." 
Micah7:19 A hawi kir leh ang a, kan chungah khawngaihna a nei ang; kan khawlohnate chu a ke hnuaiah a rapbet ang: nangin an sualna zawng zawngte chu tuifinriat mawng thuk takahte chuan i paih lut ang.Hmasanga kan pute hnena chhia i chham tawh, Jakoba hnena thutak leh Abrahama hnena khawngaihna chu i hlen ang." 
Micah7:20 Hmasanga kan pute hnena chhia i chham tawh, Jakoba hnena thutak leh Abrahama hnena khawngaihna chu i hlen ang." 
Nahum1:1 Ninevi khaw phur rit chu. Elkos mi Nahuma inlarna hmuh bu chu. 
Nahum1:2 LALPA chu thikthuchhia Pathian leh phuba lak hmang a ni; Lalpa chuan phuba a la a, thinurnain a khat a ni; Lalpa chuan a dotute chungah a la a, a hmelmate tan chuan thinurna a khawl khawm a ni." 
Nahum1:3 LALPA chu a thin a nel a, nasa taka thiltithei a ni a, misual chu thiam a chantir reng reng lo ang: LALPA chuan thawngaleivirah leh thlipuiah a kawng a nei a, chhumte chu a kea vaivut a ni." 
Nahum1:4 Tuifinriat chu a zilhhau a, a tikang chat a, li zawng zawngte pawh a tikang zo a, Lebanon tlang pangpar chu a chuai a." 
Nahum1:5 Tlang liante chu amah avangin a nghing a, tlang te te chu an tui ral a; a hmaah chuan lei hi a khur a, a ni, khawvel leh a chhunga awm zawng zawngte nen chuan." 
Nahum1:6 A lungnih lohna hmaah chuan tu nge ding thei ang a, a thinrimna nasa takah chuan tu nge awm thei ang: A thinrimna chu mei anga leihbuak a ni a, lungpuite chu a tikeh sawm vek a ni." 
Nahum1:7 LALPA chu a tha a, mangan nia kulh nghet a ni; amaha an rinna nghat tute chu a hria. A mah dotute erawh chu tui lian nasa tak hmangin a tiboral vek ang a, a hmelmate chu khawthimah a um lut ang." 
Nahum1:8 LALPA kalhin eng nge in suangtuah? Tawp derna a thlentir dawn a ni, phuba lak nawn a ngai lo ang." 
Nahum1:9 An uain in chuan chiah huh hnep mah se la hling bawm ang leh buhpawl ro ang maia tihboral vek an ni ang. 
Nahum1:10 Nangmaha chhuak mi pakhat LALPA kalha thilsual ngaihtuahtu, suahsualna thu rawntu a awm," 
Nahum1:11 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: An chak theih tawpin chak mah se la, tam pawh tam tak ni mah se la, chuti chung pawhin sam thlukin an awm ang a, an boral ang. Lo tihrehawm tawh che mah i la ka tihreawm leh tawh lo ang che." 
Nahum1:12 Tunah chuan i hnen ata a nghawngkawl chu ka titliak ang, nangmah phuarna hruite chu ka tichat vek ang." 
Nahum1:13 LALPA chuan i chungchang thu-ah thu a pe a, i hming pu tur thlah i nei lo ang. I pathian ho in ata milem siamchawp leh milem chhunte chu ka tiboral ang a; i thlan ka siam ang; i sual si a.Tlangah te chan chin tha thlena, remna thu tlangaupuitu ke chu en teh! Aw Juda, i kutte chu serh la, i thutiamte chu hlen rawh: mi suaksual chuan a palzut leh dawn tawh si lo che; tihboral der a ni ta e." 
Nahum1:14 Tlangah te chan chin tha thlena, remna thu tlangaupuitu ke chu en teh! Aw Juda, i kutte chu serh la, i thutiamte chu hlen rawh: mi suaksual chuan a palzut leh dawn tawh si lo che; tihboral der a ni ta e." 
Nahum2:1 Tikeh sawmtu chu i hmai hmaah a lo chhuak e: kulhbing chu enkawl la, kawng chu veng rawh; i kawng tikhauh la, i thiltihtheihna chu chak takin siam tha rawh." 
Nahum2:2 Israelho ropuina ngin Jakobho ropuina chu LALPA chuan a tungding leh si a: tiruaktute chuan anmahni an tiruak zo tawh a, an grep pengte an tichhe tawh si a." 
Nahum2:3 A mi chakte phaw chu thisen a ni a, mi huaisente chu a senlarin an inthuam a: a inbuatsaihna niah chuan tawlailirte chu kahpathir tlein a tle zawr zawr a, fei te chu rapthlak takin a phe zawk zawk a ni." 
Nahum2:4 Tawlailirte chu kawtthlerah an tlan bur bur a, lamlian zauvahte chuan an insu sawk sawk a: meichher angin an lang a, kawl phe angin an tlan thuak thuak a ni." 
Nahum2:5 A miliante chu a ko chhuak a: an kal rual chu a petek a; kulhbang lam pan chuan an hmanhmawh a, thil phen tur an siam a." 
Nahum2:6 Lui kawngkharte chu hawn a ni a, lalin chu tihralin a awm a." 
Nahum2:7 Tin, Huzzabi chu an hlip a, an kal bo pui a, a bawihnute chuan an awm chumin thuro hram ang maiin an tah a." 
Nahum2:8 Hmasang ata Ninevi chu dil ang a ni a, a sah ta hum hum a; Ding rawh u. ding rawh u, tiin an au a; mahse tumah an hawikir lo." 
Nahum2:9 Tangkaraw sumte chu laksak u la, rangkachak sumte chu laksk rawh u: thil chhek khawm leh bungraw tha zawng zawng ropuizia chuan tawp in tai a nei si lo." 
Nahum2:10 Tihruahin a awm a, a ruak der a, a ram a ni: thinlung chu a tituiral a, khupte chu a inkhawng a, kawng zawng zawng a na ngawih ngawih a, an zavaia hmel a dang zo vek a ni." 
Nahum2:11 Tuma tihtit loha an awmna, sakeibakneipa te, sakeibakneipui te sakeibaknei no te an kal velna sakeibaknei bu zawl leh sakeibaknei noten an eina hmun chu khawiah nge?" 
Nahum2:12 Sakeibakneipa chuan a note khamkhawp a pawtsawm a, sakeibakneipuite tan a seh hlum a, a pukte chu sa sehin a tikhat a, a buzawlte chu saruang pawh samin.Sipaihote LALPA chuan, Ngai teh, ka do che a ni, a tawlailirte chu ka hal khu hluah hluah ang a, i sakeibaknei note chu khandaihin a tiboral ang: tin, leia i sa seh hi ka tikin ang a, i palaite aw chu hriat a ni tawh lo ang, a ti a." 
Nahum2:13 Sipaihote LALPA chuan, Ngai teh, ka do che a ni, a tawlailirte chu ka hal khu hluah hluah ang a, i sakeibaknei note chu khandaihin a tiboral ang: tin, leia i sa seh hi ka tikin ang a, i palaite aw chu hriat a ni tawh lo ang, a ti a." 
Nahum3:1 Thisen chhuah hmang khawpui chu a chung a pik e! Dawt leh inrawknain a khat vek a; an sa seh chu a chat lak lo. 
Nahum3:2 Vuakin vai rik te, tawlailir ke in nghawr ri te, sakawr zuang te, tawlailir tlan hlawk hlawk te nen;" 
Nahum3:3 Sakawr chung chuang mi sakawra chuangte, khandaih tle zawk zawkte, fei tle zawr zawrte nen; mi thah awm rem rumte, ruang awm rei ruite nen: ruangin kin tih reng a nei lo; an ruangte chu an chhuih a:" 
Nahum3:4 Chung chu, nawhchizuar hmeltha, dawithiamnu, uirena avanga hnam hralh a, a dawi chinna avanga chhungkaw hralhtu uirena nasa tak avanga lo awm a ni." 
Nahum3:5 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh, ka do che a ni; i hmai lamah i puan ka hlim ang a; i saruakna hnamte hnenah leh i mualphona lal ramte hnenah ka entir ang." 
Nahum3:6 Bawlhhlawh tenawm takin ka theh ang che a, zahthlak takin ka siam ang che a, ennawm atan ka dah ang che." 
Nahum3:7 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, a hmu apiang che i lakah an tlan bo ang a, Ninevi khua chu a lo ram ta a ni: tu nge sun ang? Khawi ata nge i tan thlamuantute ka zawn tak ang? an ti ang." 
Nahum3:8 Nile lui luan hual No-amon, a kulh atan tuipui hmang a, a in hung nana tuidil hmang aiin i chak zawk em ni?" 
Nahum3:9 Ethiopia leh Aigupta chu a chakna ani a, chu chu tawp chin nei lo a ni; Put leh Lubim chu nangmah tanpuitute an ni." 
Nahum3:10 Chuti chung pawh chuan lak boin a awm a, a salah a tang a: kawtthler tin tawpah a naupang te te chu an paih sawmsak a: a mitha te tan thum an vawr a, a milian zawng zawngte chu khaidiatin phuar an ni." 
Nahum3:11 Nangpawh i rui bawk ang a, thuhrukin i awm ang; hmelma avangin kulh nghet i zawng bawk ang." 
Nahum3:12 I kulh zawng zawngte chu theipui kung, rah hmin hmasa pu ang an ni ang a: an nghin phawtchuan eitu kaah an tla lut thin." 
Nahum3:13 Ngai teh,i chhunga i mipuite chu hmeichhia an ni a; i hmelma te tan i ram kawng-ka chu a in hawng huai a: i in kalhna thir tlawnte chu meiin a kang ral a ni." 
Nahum3:14 Hual vela i awm chhung atan tui chawi la, i kulhte tinghet rawh; hlumawmnaah chuan kalla, lungcharna chu chil la, leirawhchanna thuk chu tinghet rawh." 
Nahum3:15 Chutah chuan meiin a kangral ang che a, khandaihin a sathlum ang che a, thingnget angin a tiboral ang che: thingnget angin intitam la, khaukhuap angin intitam rawh." 
Nahum3:16 I sumdawngtute chu van arsi aia tamin i tipung a: thingngetin a thla azar a, a thlawk bo ang hian an bo zo ta." 
Nahum3:17 I mi lallukhum khumte chu khaukhuap ang an ni a, i sipaihotute chu khaw vawh nia pala khau rual fu khawm ang an ni, amaherawhchu ni a lo chhuak a, an thlawk bo a, an awmna hmun reng hriat a ni lo." 
Nahum3:18 Aw Assuria lal, i beram vengtute chu an muthlu e: i miliante chu an chawl a: i mipuite chu tlangahte an darh zo a, hruai khawmtu tumah an awm lo.I na damna tur a awm lo a; i hliam chu a nasa hle a ni: i thawm hria apiangin kut an ben khum che; i suahsualnain a chim fo loh tu nge awm?" 
Nahum3:19 I na damna tur a awm lo a; i hliam chu a nasa hle a ni: i thawm hria apiangin kut an ben khum che; i suahsualnain a chim fo loh tu nge awm? 
Habakkuk1:1 Zawlnei Habakukan phurrit a hmuh chu. 
Habakkuk1:2 Aw LALPA, eng chen nge ka au vang a, Min ngaihthlak loh vang? Inpawngnekna thu I hnenah ka au chhuahpui a, Nangin i chhanhim si lo a." 
Habakkuk1:3 Engatinge khawlohna te min entir a, thiltih dik lo tak te hi I en reng? Inrawkna leh Inpawngnekna te Ka hmaah an awm reng si a: Inhauhna leh innghirnghona te a lo chhuah a ni." 
Habakkuk1:4 Chuvangin dan thu chuan kori a tu hlei thei lo a, Rorelna thu a chhuak ngai hek lo: Mi fel te chu mi suaksualte chuan an hual vel a, Chuvangin rorelna chu dik lo takin a chhuak thin a ni." 
Habakkuk1:5 Hnamte chu en u la, thlir reng u la, nasa takin mak ti rawh u; In dam chhung hian thil kawngkhat ka tih hi, Chu thil tih chu min hrilh che u mah se la In awih tawp lo ang." 
Habakkuk1:6 Ngai rawh u, Kaldai mi, hnam kawlhsen tak leh Thu dawn tawi tak, chenna hmun, an ta lo pawh neih tum a lei van paltlang thintute chu ka chawk tho a nia." 
Habakkuk1:7 An hlauhawmin anrapthlak em em a ni, an rorelna leh an ropuina chu an mahni atanga chhuak bawk a ni." 
Habakkuk1:8 An sakawrte pawh keite aiin an tuan tha zawk a, Tlailam chinghniate ai pawhin an hlauhawm zawk a ni; An sakawr chungchuang hote chu hla tak ata lo kal an ni; Mupui sapan ang maiin an ding vung vung a." 
Habakkuk1:9 Pawngnek tumin an lo kal hlawm a, chak takin hma lam an hawi tlat a ni; tiau vaivut ang maia tam salte an man hlawm thin," 
Habakkuk1:10 A ni, lalte pawh an cheksawlh a, Miliante chu an nuihzabur a; Kulh nghet zawng zawngte pawh an tham lo, Lei an chhung pawng a, an la mai thin si a." 
Habakkuk1:11 Thli ang maiin an rawn nuai a, An kal tlang pur pur a, A maherawhchu, an chakna chu pathian an neih avangin Thiamloh an chang a ni." 
Habakkuk1:12 Aw LALPA ka Pathian, ka mi Thianghlim, Chatuan mi i ni lo em ni? I thi ngai lo. Aw LALPA, nangin an ni chu rorelna'n i thlang ta a, Aw lungpui, nangin anni chu thununna'n i din chhuak a ni." 
Habakkuk1:13 Nang, thilsual hmu thei lokhawpa mit thianghlima In hnehchhiahna en thei lo chuan Engatinge mi vervek taka titute chu i en theih a, mi suaksualten an aia mifel an ei zawh laia i ngawih renga," 
Habakkuk1:14 Mihring hi tuifinriata sanghate leh rannung An chunga roreltu nei bik lote anga i siam ni? 
Habakkuk1:15 Nghakuaiin a khai chhuak vek a, a lenin a man hlawm a, a lenkhang chuan a fun khawm a: Chuvangin a hlimin a lawm a ni." 
Habakkuk1:16 Chutih avang chuan a len hnenah inthawina a hlan a, a lenkhang hnenah rimtui a hal a, Anmahni avanga a chanvo a lo lena eitur a neih tamtak avangin.Chuvangin alen chu tiruak leh thinin, Hnamte thah a hnial lo fo dawn em ni?" 
Habakkuk1:17 Chuvangin alen chu tiruak leh thinin, Hnamte thah a hnial lo fo dawn em ni?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Tin, ka vennaah ka ding ang a, kulh chhungah ka chuang ang a, ka vui thuah khan ka hnenah eng nge a sawi dawna, keiin eng tin nge ka chhan dawn tih hmu turin ka thlir ang." 
Habakkuk2:2 Tin, LALPA chuan heti hian mi chhang a: Inlarna chu ziak la, a chhiartu in tlan paha a chhiar theih khawpa chiangin lung phek chungah ziak rawh." 
Habakkuk2:3 Inlarna hi hun ruat chhung atan mai a ni nghe nghe si a, a kin ni chu a hnai tial tial a, a thlawn lo ang. Rei deuh mahse, nghak rawh; a lo thlen ngei dawn avangin a tlai chuang lo ang." 
Habakkuk2:4 En teh, a chapo mang e, a rilru a va ngil lo em! Mifel erawh chu a rinna in a nung ang." 
Habakkuk2:5 A ni, chu loah pawh, uain heh chu bumhmang, michapo, in lam ngawrh lo mi a ni a; A chakna chu seol angin a hawng zau a, thihna ang a ni a, tih tlai theih a ni lo; A hnenah hnamtin a hruai khawm a, mi zawng zawng a chhek khawm a ni." 
Habakkuk2:6 Heng zawng zawngte hian a chungah tihelna thu, deuna thufing tawi - a ta si loa in tipunga, dahkham thila intimuktu chu, a chung a pik e! Eng chen nge a chin ang aw? Tiin an sawi lo ang em ni?" 
Habakkuk2:7 Nangmah eitutur che an dingchhuak phutin a tihhreawmtu tur che an harh ang a, An tan rallak mai i la ni dawn lo'm ni?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Hnam tamtak i rawk tawh avangin Hnam dang zawng zawngte pawhin an rawk vethung ang che; Mite thisen avang leh ram chungah te, Khawpui leh a chhunga cheng zawng zawngte hnena I pawngtihna avang khan." 
Habakkuk2:9 Misual kut ata him theihna tura bu sang taka chhep turin, a in atana hlawkna bawlhhlawh chingtu chu a chung a pik e!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Mi tam takte tiboralin i in atan mualphona i phhiar a lo ni a, i nunna chungah thil i tisual a ni." 
Habakkuk2:11 Lung chu bang ata a au vang a, thing hmanrua atangin khanchhukin a chhawn ang." 
Habakkuk2:12 Thisena khawpui din a, khawlohnaa khawpui siamtu chu a chung a pik e!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Ngai teh u, miten mei kan mai atana an thawk a hnamte engmahlo atana an inti-hah hi Sipai hote LALPA a ni lo em ni?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Tuifinriat chu tuiin a khat vek angin LALPA ropuizia hriatnain lei hi a khat vek dawn si a," 
Habakkuk2:15 A thenawm hnena zu intur petu chu, a chung a pik e, nang, an saruak i hmuh theih nana i tur chawhpawlha tirui tu chu!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Ropuina aiah zahnain a intitlai a, Nang pawhin in la, saruakin awm ve mai rawh; LALPA kut dinglam no chu i hnenah a lo let ang a, I ropuina chungah bawlhhlawh zahpuiawm tak a awm ang." 
Habakkuk2:17 Lebanon tlang i suasamna chuan a chhilh ang chia, Sate boralna chuan a tihlau vang che; Mihring thisen avang leh ramte, khawpuite leh A chhunga chengte i suasam tawh avangin." 
Habakkuk2:18 Milim chher chawp hi eng nge a sawta, A siamtuin a siam ni? Milim chhun chawp, dawt zirtirtu mai, A siamtuin a ma kut chhuak a rin leh chawp si, Milim tawng thei hlei lo han siam hi eng nge a sawtna?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Thing hnenah, Harh rawh, tia Lung tawng thei lo hnenah, Tho rawh titu chu A chung a pik e! Hei hian a zirtir dawn em ni? En teh rangkachak leh tangkaruaa luan a ni a, A chhungah thaw reng a awm tawp lo a ni.LALPA erawhchu a in thianghlimah a awm a ni: Leia mi zawng zawngte chu ngawi thiap rawh se." 
Habakkuk2:20 LALPA erawhchu a in thianghlimah a awm a ni: Leia mi zawng zawngte chu ngawi thiap rawh se. 
Habakkuk3:1 Sigionoth thluk dana zawlnei Habakuka tawngtaina. 
Habakkuk3:2 Aw LALPA, i chanchin an hril ka lo hria a, ka hlau a; Aw LALPA, he'ng kum chhung hian i hna tharthawh leh la, he'ng kum chhung hian tilar ang che: Thinurnaah chuan zahngaihna telh thin ang che." 
Habakkuk3:3 Teman ram atangin Pathian a lo kal a, Mi Thiannghlima chu Paran tlang atangin. (Selah) A ropuinain vante khi a tuam a, A faknain lei a khata." 
Habakkuk3:4 A tletzia chu eng ang mai a ni a; A kut atangin eng zam a lo chhuak a, Chutah chuan a thiltihtheihna inthupin a awm." 
Habakkuk3:5 Hripui chu a hmatawnah atanga, a hnungah chuan tek a tla rum rum a." 
Habakkuk3:6 A dinga, lei chu a tinghing dur dur a, a hawi vela hnamte chu a tithlabar a; Tlang hlunte chu a tidarh a, kumkhaw mualte pawh an kimki a; a kawngte chu chatuan ata a ni." 
Habakkuk3:7 Kusan puan inte chu hreawm tuarin ka hmu a, Midian ram puanzarte chu an khur a." 
Habakkuk3:8 LALPA chu luite chungah chuan a lungni lo ta a ni maw? Luite chungah chuan i thinrimin, tuipui chungah i thinur a ni maw, i sakawr, i chhandamna tawlailir chungah i chuan tak?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Peih diam a ni e, i thal ngul, Hnamte tan chhechham a nghet e. (selah) I vaw phel ta, lei chu luiin." 
Habakkuk3:10 Tlang lianten an hmu chia, an hlau, tuifawnte pawh mual an liam ta: Tui thuk takin awrawl a chhuah, Sang tak ah a ban a phar ta." 
Habakkuk3:11 Turni chhawrthlapui an ding reng mahni hmunah, i thal leng chhuak engah te leh, i fei tle zawr zawr engah chuan." 
Habakkuk3:12 Thinurin ram i chil chhuak a, thinrimin hnamte i pal ta." 
Habakkuk3:13 I mite chhandamna'n i chhuak, I hriak thiha chhandamnan chuan; Misualin a chhung hlip zoin Nghahchhan lang rawtin i suasam (selah)" 
Habakkuk3:14 Aruktea rethei eirala lawm tute, =hawngaleivir ang lo thawk e, mi tidarh nan; An tiang ngeiin i chhun ta a, a in do thiamte lu-ah chuan." 
Habakkuk3:15 I sakawrin tuipui i zawh, Tuifawn nasa tak mai chu." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ka hriatin ka khur, ti ralin, A aaw ah ka kha a in khawng; Ka ruh a muatin, ka khur a, mahni hmunah: Mahse sipai rualpui ang buaina ni Mipui chunga a lo thlen hunin Ka nghing lo ang." 
Habakkuk3:17 Theipui thing par vul dawn loin, grep hrui rah dawn hek suh seng, Olive thing pawh rah loin, Loin eitur chhuah dawn lo seng, Huang ata ran rual tiboin, Ran inah ran awm lo mah seng." 
Habakkuk3:18 Kalawm zel ang, LALPA-ah chuan, ka chhandamna pathianah chuan ka lawm cheu dawn.LALPA, Jehoa, ka chakna, ka ke a siam, sakhi ke ang, Ka hmun sangah mi lentir ang. Hla hruaitu tan; ka tingtanga sak mi." 
Habakkuk3:19 LALPA, Jehoa, ka chakna, ka ke a siam, sakhi ke ang, Ka hmun sangah mi lentir ang. Hla hruaitu tan; ka tingtanga sak mi." 
Zephaniah1:1 Judate lal Amona fapa Josia lal laia LALPA thu Zephania, Kusia fapa, Gedalia fapa, Amaria fapa, Hezekia fapa hnena lo thleng chu." 
Zephaniah1:2 Lei chung ata thil zawng zawng ka tiral vek ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zephaniah1:3 Mihring leh sate ka ti ral ang a; Chungleng savate leh tuipui sanghate ka tiral ang a; Misualte chu ka titlu ang a; Lei chung ata mihring ka ti bo daih ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni" 
Zephaniah1:4 Juda te leh Jerusalem luahtu zawng zawng chungah Ka kut kalek anga; he hmun atang hian Baal la awm chhunte, Kemarim hming chu puithiamho chawpin," 
Zephaniah1:5 In chung chhipa van lam thilho hnena kun thinte, LALPA hnena chhehhama Malkama chhala chham bawka kun thinte," 
Zephaniah1:6 LALPA hawisan tute leh LALPA zawng loa Amah rawn lo tute chu ka tibo daih ang. 
Zephaniah1:7 LALPA pathian hmaah chuan ngawi reng rawh: LALPA ni chu a hnaih tak avangin: LALPA chuan inthawina a buatsaih tawh a,A mi sawmte pawh atithianghlim tawh si a." 
Zephaniah1:8 Tin, LALPA inthawina niah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Hotute leh lal fapate leh hnamdang silhfena Inthuamte zawng zawng chu ka hrem ang." 
Zephaniah1:9 Tin, chumi niah chuan kawngka zuan kahlen zawng zawng, An hotute inpawngnekna leh bumna tikhattute chu ka hrem ang." 
Zephaniah1:10 Chumi niah chuan, sangha kawngka atanga au thawm te, Misneh atanga chiau vak vak te, tlang atanga ri hum hum te, a awm ang, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zephaniah1:11 Maktes mite u, Kanaan mi zawng an boral avangin chiau vak vak rawh u! Tangkaraw phur tute zawng zawng an boral vek tawh a ni." 
Zephaniah1:12 Tin, chumi hunah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Khawnvar chhiin Jerusalem ka zawng chhuak ang a; Uain mawng nawi ang awm mai mai a, an rilru a, LALPA chuan a chhia atha tih a nei ngai nem, titute chu ka hrem ang." 
Zephaniah1:13 Tin, an sumte chu rallakah a lo chang ang a, An in te chu a ram ang: a ni, inte an sa ang a, mahse an luah lo ang; Grep huante an siam ang a, mahse a uain chu an in lo ang." 
Zephaniah1:14 LALPA ni ropui tak chu a hnai e, a hnai in a thleng thuai dawn a ni, LALPA ni thawm chu rapthlak tak a ni; Chutah chuan michak chu a chiau vak vak ang." 
Zephaniah1:15 Chumi ni chu thinurna ni a ni a, mangan leh hreawm ni chhiatna leh tiauna ni, thimna leh khawdur ni, chhum leh thim chhah mup ni a nia," 
Zephaniah1:16 Kulha hung khawpuite chungah leh khaw kil kulh sangte chungah chuan tawtawrawt leh ralbei thawm rikna ni a ni a. 
Zephaniah1:17 Tin, mihringte chungah hreawmna ka rawn thlen ang a, mitdel ang maiin an kal ang a, LALPA chungah an sual avangin; an thisen chu vaivut angin ka leih bua ang a, an tisate pawh ekdur ang maiin.LALPA thinurna niah chuan an rangkachak emaw, an tangkarua emaw pawhin anmahni a chhanchhuak thei lo ang a; Ram pumpui hi a thikna meiah chuan a kang bo vek ang. Rama chengte zawng zawng a tibo dawn a, a ni, tihbona rapthlak tak a siam dawn si a." 
Zephaniah1:18 LALPA thinurna niah chuan an rangkachak emaw, an tangkarua emaw pawhin anmahni a chhanchhuak thei lo ang a; Ram pumpui hi a thikna meiah chuan a kang bo vek ang. Rama chengte zawng zawng a tibo dawn a, a ni, tihbona rapthlak tak a siam dawn si a." 
Zephaniah2:1 ,2 Aw hnam zahna chang hre lo te u, thuruat a lo chhuah hma leh ni chu favai ang mai a a ral hma leh LALPA thinrimna hlauhawm tak chu in chunga a lo thlen hma leh LALPA thinrimna ni chu in chunga a lo thlen hma hian tlan khawm rawh u, a ni, tlan khawm huai huai rawh u." 
Zephaniah2:2 ,1 Aw hnam zahna chang hre lo te u, thuruat a lo chhuah hma leh ni chu favai ang mai a a ral hma leh LALPA thinrimna hlauhawm tak chu in chunga a lo thlen hma leh LALPA thinrimna ni chu in chunga a lo thlen hma hian tlan khawm rawh u, a ni, tlan khawm huai huai rawh u." 
Zephaniah2:3 Nangni leia mi thuhnuairawlh zawng zawng, a thu awih tute u, LALPA chu zawng rawh u; Felna zawng u la, thuhnuairawlh tum rawh u: LALPA thinrimna niah chuan thuhrukin in awm thei mahna." 
Zephaniah2:4 Gaza khua chu kalsanin a awm ang a, Askelon khua chu tihtiauin a awm dawn si a: Chhun laiah Asdod khua an hnawt chhuak ang a, Ekron khua chu pawh chhuah in a awm ang." 
Zephaniah2:5 Tuipui kama cheng kereth hnamte chu an chung a pik e! Aw kanaan, Philistia mite ram, LALPA thu chu i chungah a lo thleng a ni; Luahtu awm lo khawpin ka tiboral ang che." 
Zephaniah2:6 Tin, tuipui kam te chu hnim hring hmun a ni ang a, berampute buk khuarna leh beramte huang a ni ang." 
Zephaniah2:7 Tichuan, tuipui kam chu Juda chhungtea la awm chhunte tan a ni ang a; chungah chuan an beram rualte chu an tla ang a, Tlai lamah chuan Askelon khaw inahte an riak ang; LALPA an pathian chuan a rawn tlawh ang a, An saltanna chu a lehlinsak ang." 
Zephaniah2:8 Moab deuna leh Amon fate au khumna, ka mite an deuna leh An ramria an tihropuia chu ka hre tawh a." 
Zephaniah2:9 Chutichuan, a nuna ka nun chhung chu, Moab chu sadom ang a ni ang a, Amon fate chu Gomora ang an ni ngei ngei ang, Kangthai hmun leh chi khur leh kumkhaw luah loha ni ang: Ka mi la bangte chuan an mahni an rallak ang a, Ka hnam la awm chhunte chuan an luah ang, tih hi Sipaihote LALPA, Israelte Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Zephaniah2:10 Chu chu an chapona aiah an nei dawn a ni, Sipaihote LALPA mite chungah an intihlen a, an cheksawlh avangin." 
Zephaniah2:11 An tan LALPA chu tihbaiawm tak a ni ang a, lei pathiante chu a tam vek dawn si a; Tin, miten amah chibai an buk ang, mi tinin mahni hmun theuhvah, hnamte awmna zawng zawngah chuan." 
Zephaniah2:12 Nangni Ethiopia mite pawh ka khandaiha thahin in awm ang. 
Zephaniah2:13 Tin, hmar lam ram chungah a kut a lek ang a, Assuria ram a tiboral ang a, Ninevi khua a titiau vang a,thlaler angin a tiro ang." 
Zephaniah2:14 Tin, a chhungah chuan sa rual chitin, ramsate zawng zawng an mu ang: Tuivalawng leh sakuhte pawh a ban chhip bawkahte an cheng ang a: Tukverhahte zai an vawr ang; kawngka bulahte chuan chhiatna a awm ang: Sidar thinga siamte pawh phoruang a chang ta si a.Hei hi khawpui hlim thei tak, mahni inring tak, a thinlunga, keimah, ka chuang ka liam hi tumah an awm lo, intirilru chu a ni: Sate mut hmun mai atan, a va ram nasa ta em! A kal pel apiangin an chek khum ang a, an kut an thin khum ang." 
Zephaniah2:15 Hei hi khawpui hlim thei tak, mahni inring tak, a thinlunga, keimah, ka chuang ka liam hi tumah an awm lo, intirilru chu a ni: Sate mut hmun mai atan, a va ram nasa ta em! A kal pel apiangin an chek khum ang a, an kut an thin khum ang." 
Zephaniah3:1 Hel hmang leh bawlhhlawh, hnehchhiah hmang khawpui chu a chung a pik e!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Aw chu a awih lo a; zilhna a pawm lo a; LALPA chu a ring lo a; a Pathian lam a hnaih duh lo. 
Zephaniah3:3 A chhunga a hotute chu sakeibaknei rum lai an ni a; A roreltute chu tlai lam chinghnia an ni a; A tuk thlenga thial tur engmah an zuah lo. 
Zephaniah3:4 A zawlneite chu pawlawh leh bumhmangte an ni a: A puithiamten hmunthianghlim chu an tibawlhhlawh a, Dan chu a bawhchhe nasa a ni." 
Zephaniah3:5 A chhunga LALPA chu a fel a ni; khawlohna a ti lo ang; Tuktin a rorelna chu a tilang a, a pelh ngai lo a; Mahse mifello chuan zahna chang reng a hre lo." 
Zephaniah3:6 Hnamte chu ka tibo daih a, an kulhte a ram a; A kawtthlerte chu tuma kal tlang lohna'n ka tiram a: An khawpuite chu an chhe ta; Chutichuan tumah an awm ta lo a, luahtu reng an awm tawh lo." 
Zephaniah3:7 Nangin mi hlau phawtla, zilhna hi lo pawm la; Tichuan ama chunngchanga ka ruat zawng zawngte ang khan A awmna chu tihbo daih a ni lo ang, ka ti a; Mahse zingah an tho a, an thiltih zawng zawng an tikhawlo vek a." 
Zephaniah3:8 Chuvangin rallak la tura ka thawh ni thlengin mi nghak rawh u, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: Ka thil tum chu, an chunga ka thinurna, ka thinurna hlauhawm tak mai chu leih tura Lalna ramte inkhawmtira hnamte koh khawm hi a ni a; Lei zawng zawng hi ka thikna meiah a la kang fai dawn si a." 
Zephaniah3:9 Chutih hunah chuan mipuite chu hmui thianghlim ka puttir leh ang, LALPA hming chu an zaa an lama thukhatvuaa a rawng an bawl tlan theih nan," 
Zephaniah3:10 Ethiopia lui piah lam atangin ka hnena diltute, ka mi darhte fanu chuan ka thilhlan an rawn la ang." 
Zephaniah3:11 Chumi niah chuan ka chunga i bawhchhiatna thiltih avangte chuan i zak tawh lo vang, chumi hunah chuan i chhung ata i mi, chapona hlimpuitute chu ka la bo ang a, Ka tlang thianghlimah hian chapo hmangin i awm tawh lo ang." 
Zephaniah3:12 I chhung ata mirethei te leh Tihduhdah tuarte chu ka zuah ang a, LALPA hming chu an ring ang." 
Zephaniah3:13 Israel mi la awm chhunte chuan khawlohna an ti lo ang a, dawt an sawi hek lo vang; An kaah pawh bumna tawng a awm hek lo ang a: An eiin an mu ang a, tumahin an tihlau tawh lo ang." 
Zephaniah3:14 Aw Zion fanu, zai rawh; aw Israel, au vak vak rawh; Aw Jerusalem fanu, i thinlung zawng zawngin lawm la hlim rawh." 
Zephaniah3:15 LALPA'n i chngchang relnate chu a la bo ta a, i hmelma a paih chhuak ta: Israel lalber, LALPA pawh chu i chungah a awm e: Thil thalo i hlau ngai tawh lo ang." 
Zephaniah3:16 Chumi niah chuan Jerusalem hnenah, hlau suh, aw Zion, ih kut pawh zawi suh se, an ti ang." 
Zephaniah3:17 LALPA i Pathian chu i chungah a awm e, Chhandamtu tur mi chak tak chu: Lawmin i chungah a hlim ang a, a hmangaihna a tithar ang a, Hla sain i chungah a lawm ang." 
Zephaniah3:18 Nangmaha mi, inkhawmpuia tel pha loa lungngaite chu ka hruaikhawm ang a, nangmah avanga sawichhiatna phurrit phur tute chu." 
Zephaniah3:19 Ngai rawh, chumi hunah chuan nghaisatu zawng zawng che kha kangaihtuah ang; Tin, kebai chu ka chhandam ang a, Hnawh bova awm chu ka hruai khawm ang; Tin, lei chung zawng zawnga an lo mualphona chu Fakna leh hmingthannaah ka chantir ang.Chumi hunah chuan ka hruai khawm ang che u: In hmuh ngeia in saltanna ka lam let hunah chuan Lei chung mi zawng zawngte zingah Hmingthanna leh fakna ka siamsak dawn si che u a, LALPA'n a ti." 
Zephaniah3:20 Chumi hunah chuan ka hruai khawm ang che u: In hmuh ngeia in saltanna ka lam let hunah chuan Lei chung mi zawng zawngte zingah Hmingthanna leh fakna ka siamsak dawn si che u a, LALPA'n a ti." 
Haggai1:1 Lal Daria lal kum hnihna, a thlarukna, chumi thla ni hmasa berah chuan, zawlnei Hagaia kuta LALPA thu chu, Sealtiela fapa Judai ram awptu Jerubabela hnenah leh Jehozadaka fapa Puithiam lalber Josua hnenah a lo theng a, heti hian a ti:" 
Haggai1:2 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti, he'ng mite hian, LALPA in sak hun tur chu a lo la thleng lo e, an ti e, tiin." 
Haggai1:3 Tin, zawlnei Hagaia kutah LALPA thu a lo thleng a;" 
Haggai1:4 He in hi a ram reng laia nangni, in chungthuah neitea in chen hi a hun em ni? Tiin." 
Haggai1:5 Tunah zawng sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti:i kawngte chu chhut ngun rawh u. 
Haggai1:6 Tam tak in ching a, tlemte in seng si; in ei a in tlai si lo; in in a in kham silo; in sin a, in lum chuang si lo; inhlawhfa chuan ip pawpa thlak atan mai a hlawh a ni." 
Haggai1:7 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: In kawngte chhut ngun rawh u. 
Haggai1:8 Tlangah kal chho u la, thing han la u la, in chu sa rawh u; chu chu ka lawm ang a, chawimawiin ka awm ang, LALPA'n a ti." 
Haggai1:9 Hmuh teuh in beisei a, ngaiteh u, tlemte a lo ni; inah in rawn thlen a, ka lo chhem bo a. Eng vang nge ni? Tih hi sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Nangni inlam pan theuha in tlan haw thuai thina ka in chu a ram der avang a ni." 
Haggai1:10 Chuvang chuan vanin daifim tla tur a hrensak che u a, lei chuan a rah a hrensak bawk che u a ni." 
Haggai1:11 Lei chungah te, tlang chungah te, buh chungahte, uain chungah te, hriak chungah te, lei atanga thil lo chhuak chungah te, mihring chungah te, ran chungah te, kuta thawhchhhuah zawng zawng chungah te khua ka tikheng a ni e." 
Haggai1:12 Tichuan Seatiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jehozadaka fapa puithiam lalber Josua leh mi la awmchhun zawng zawngte chuan LALPA an pathian aw leh LALPA an pathianin a tirh anga zawlnei Hagaia thu chu an bengkhawn ta a; mite chuan LALPA chu a hmai hmaah chuan an tih ta a. 
Haggai1:13 Tichuan, mite hnena LALPAthuchah hmang chuan LALPA tirhkoh Hagaia chuan a sawi a, in hnenah ka awm a ni, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni, tiin." 
Haggai1:14 Zerubabela rilru leh Jehozadaka fapa, puithiam Lalber Josua rilru leh mi la awm chhun zawng zawngte rilru chu a chawk tho ta a; tichuan an lo kal a, sipaihote LALPA an pathian inah chuan hna an thawk ta a;Lal Daria lal kum hnihna, a thla rukna, chumi thla ni sawmhnih leh ni linaah chuan." 
Haggai1:15 Lal Daria lal kum hnihna, a thla rukna, chumi thla ni sawmhnih leh ni linaah chuan." 
Haggai2:1 Thla sarihna, chumi thla ni sawmhnih leh ni khatnaah zawlnei Hagaia kutah LALPA thu a lo thleng a:" 
Haggai2:2 Seatiela fapa, Judai ram awptu Zerubabela hnenah leh mi la awm chhunte hnenah chuan heti hian sawi ta che, a ti a." 
Haggai2:3 He in hi a hmaa a ropui lai hmu in zingah tu nge la awm? Tunah hian eng ang in nge in hmuh le? In mit hmuh ah eng tham mah a ni lo lo'm ni? 
Haggai2:4 Aw Jerubabel, tunah chuan huai takin awm rawh, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni; Aw puithiam lalber Josua, Jehozadaka fapa, nangpawh chak takin awm rawh; tin, nangni he rama mi zawng zawngte u, chak takin awm bawk rawh u, tih hi LALPA thu a chhuak a ni; thawk rawh u, in hnenah ka awm si a, tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni:" 
Haggai2:5 Aigupta ram atanga in lo chhuah laia thu ka thlun pui che u ang khan in zingah ka thlarau a la cheng reng a ni, hlau suh u." 
Haggai2:6 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti si a, vawikhat chu reilo teah van te leh leite leh tuifinriat te leh khawmualte ka ti nghing ang." 
Haggai2:7 Hnam tinreng ka ti nghing ang a, hnam tinreng thil duhzawngte chu a lo thleng ang a, he in hi ropuinain ka ti khat ang, sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Haggai2:8 Tangkarua hi ka ta a ni a, rangkachak hi ka ta a ni, tih hi sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Haggai2:9 He in ropuina hnuhnung zawk hi a hmasa ai khan a nasa zawk ang, sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti: tin, hehmunah hian remna ka thlen ang, tih hi sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Haggai2:10 Daria lal kumhnihna, thla kuana, ni sawmhnih leh ni linaah chuan zawlnei Hagaia kutah LALPA thu hetiang hian a lo thleng a." 
Haggai2:11 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: puithiamte chu dan heti hian zawt teh," 
Haggai2:12 Tuin emaw a kawrfual hmawrah sa thianghlim fun se la, a kawrfual hmawr chuan chhang emaw thil chhum kawi emaw, uain emaw, hriak emaw, ei tur reng reng emaw lo khawih ta se la, a thianghlim ang em? Tiin. Puithiamte chuan, Thianghlim lo vang, tiin an chhang a." 
Haggai2:13 Tin, Hagaia chuan, mitthi ruang khawih avanga mi bawrhbangin he'ng thil a enga pawh hi lo khawih ta se la, a bawrhbang ang em? A ti a, Puithiamte chuan, bawrhbang ang tiin an chhang a." 
Haggai2:14 Tin, Hagaia chuan heti hian a chhang taa: he mite hi chutiang tak chu an ni a, he hnam hi chutiang tak chuan ka hmaah an awm, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni;' an kutchhuak tinreng pawh chutiang bawk chu a ni a, chuta an thil hlan pawh chu a thianghlim lo a ni." 
Haggai2:15 Tun atangin nakin hnu thlengin LALPA biak inah lungin chherchhuan hma, tun hma lam kha ngaihtuah ang che u:" 
Haggai2:16 khang hun lai zawng zawng khan buh tehkhawng sawmhnih tling awm tak chhun khawmnaa mi a lo kalin sawmhnih chauh a lo tling thin. 
Haggai2:17 In thawh chhuah zawng zawngah rona te, ngetna te leh rial tein ka hrem che u a; nimahsela ka lam in hawi chuang lo, tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Haggai2:18 He thla kuana, ni sawmhnih leh ni lina, vawin ni atang hian nakin hnu thlengin, tun hmalam kha ngaihtuah ang che u, LALPA biakin lungphum ni atang khan ngaihtuah rawh u." 
Haggai2:19 A chi chu buh inah a la awm em ni? Grep hrui te, theipui kung te, pawmgranet te leh olive thing te chu a la rah lo; vawiin ni atang hian mal ka sawm ang che u." 
Haggai2:20 Tin, LALPA thu chu, chumi thla, ni sawmhnih leh nilinaah chuan Hagaia hnenah a lo thleng nawn leh a;" 
Haggai2:21 Hetiang hian Judai ram awptu Zerubabela hnenah chuan sawi rawh: kei chuan lei leh van ka ti nghing thin: ram lalthutphahte chu ka paihthla ang a, hnamte ram chakna chu ka tichhia ang;" 
Haggai2:22 tawlailirte leh a chunga chuangte chu ka ti tlu ang a, sakawrte leh a chunga chuangte chu mitin mahni unau te khandaihin an tlu ang.Chumi niah chuan, aw Zerubabel ka chhiahhlawh, Seatiela fapa, ka chelh ang che,sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti; hming nemna zungbun angah ka siam bawk anag che, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti; nang ka thlang tawh si che a ni, Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti,"" tiin." 
Haggai2:23 Chumi niah chuan, aw Zerubabel ka chhiahhlawh, Seatiela fapa, ka chelh ang che,sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti; hming nemna zungbun angah ka siam bawk anag che, LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti; nang ka thlang tawh si che a ni, Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak chuan a ti,"" tiin." 
Zechariah1:1 Daria lal kum hnihna, thla riatnaah chuan Idova fa Barakia fapa zawlnei Zakaria hnenah chuan LALPA thu a lo thleng a:" 
Zechariah1:2 LALPA chu in pate chungah khan a lungni lo em em a ni. 
Zechariah1:3 Chuvangin heti hian an hnenah va sawi rawh: Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti e, Kan lam lo hawi u la, kei pawh in lam ka lo hawi ang, Tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zechariah1:4 Zawlnei hmasaten, Sipaihote LALPA chuan, In awm dan sual chu rawn hawisan rawh u, a ti e, Tia in pate an hrilh pawha ngaithla lo a, Bengkhawn lote ang khan awm suh u, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zechariah1:5 In pate chu khawiah nge? Zawlneite pawh chu an nung kumkhua ta em ni? 
Zechariah1:6 Ka thu leh ka thu ruatte, ka chiahhlawh zawlneite hnena Ka pek khan, in pate chu a nang ta mai pawh a ni lo'm ni? Tichuan, an lamlet a, Sipaihote LALPA chuan Kan chungchanga tih a tum thin angin Kan awm dan ang zel leh kan thiltih ang zelin Kan lakah a ti ta a ni, an tih kha, tiin." 
Zechariah1:7 Daria kum hnihna, thla sawm leh thla khatna, chu chu Sebat thla a ni a, ni sawmhnih leh ni linaa chuan Idova fa Barakia fapa, zawlnei Zakaria hnenah chuan LALPA thu a lo thleng a;" 
Zechariah1:8 zanah chuan sakawr sen chunga mipakhat chuang ka hmua, ruama lenhmui thing zingah hian a ding a; tin, a hnungah chuan sakawr, a sen te, a buang te, a varte an awm a." 
Zechariah1:9 Tah chuan kei chuan, Aw ka lalpa, he'ng hi eng nge ni? Ka ti a." 
Zechariah1:10 Tin, mi lenhmui thing zinga dingkhan a chhang a, Heng hi LALPA'n lei zawng zawng fang chuak tura a tirhte chu an nih hi, a ti a." 
Zechariah1:11 Tin, anni chuan, LALPA vantirhkoh lenhmui thing zinga ding chuan a chhang a, Lei zawng zawng chu kan fang chuak tawh a, ngai rawh, lei chu a awm hle hle a, a awm mai mai a ni, an ti a." 
Zechariah1:12 Chutah LALPA vantirhkoh chuan a chhang a, Aw sipaihote LALPA, Jerusalem leh Juda khawpui chunga he kum sawmsarih i thinurnate hi eng chen nge i khawngaih loh vang le? a ti a." 
Zechariah1:13 Tin, LALPA chuan, vantirhkoh, thu tha tak thu thlamuanawm taka mi betu chu a chhang ta a." 
Zechariah1:14 Chutichuan vantirhkoh mi betu chuan ka hnenah, Heti hian va au rawh, a ti a: Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Jerusalem leh Zion hi vei tak meuh in ka vei a." 
Zechariah1:15 Tin, hnam nuam leng mai maite lakah chuan ka lungni lo em em a ni; Ka lungni lo deuh chauh a ni na a, Anmahni tana thil tha lo chu an tizual ta a ni." 
Zechariah1:16 Chuvangin LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Zahngaihna nen Jerusalem lam ka hawi leh mek a. Tah chuan ka in chu sak ani ang, Tih Jerusalem chungah chuan tehna zamin a la awm ang, tiin." 
Zechariah1:17 Heti hian Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti e, Ka khawpuite chu hmuingilna avangin an vul leh ang a, LALPA chuan Zion chu a thlamuan leh ang a,Jerusalem chu a thlang leh ang,Tiin va au leh rawh, a ti a." 
Zechariah1:18 Tin, ka mit ka han len chho a, ka'n en a, ki pali ka hmu a." 
Zechariah1:19 Vantirhkoh mi betu hnenah chuan, Heng hi eng nge ni? Ka ti a. Tin, ani chuan, he'ng hi Juda te, Israel te, Jerusalem te tidarhtu ki an nih hi,tiin mi chhang a." 
Zechariah1:20 Tin, LALPA chuan thirdeng pali mi entir a.Tichuan kei chuan, Heng hi eng rawn ti tur nge an nih? Ka ti a. Ani chuan, sawng saw tumah dak chhuak ngam reng awm tawh lo khawpa Judate tidarhtu ki chu an ni a; mahse he'ng hi, anmahni tizam tur leh Juda ram tidarh tura an laka an ki rawn hmangtu hnamte ki chu paih thla tura lo kal an nih hi, tiin a sawi a." 
Zechariah1:21 Tichuan kei chuan, Heng hi eng rawn ti tur nge an nih? Ka ti a. Ani chuan, sawng saw tumah dak chhuak ngam reng awm tawh lo khawpa Judate tidarhtu ki chu an ni a; mahse he'ng hi, anmahni tizam tur leh Juda ram tidarh tura an laka an ki rawn hmangtu hnamte ki chu paih thla tura lo kal an nih hi, tiin a sawi a." 
Zechariah2:1 Tin, ka mit ka han len cho a, ka'n en a, mi pakhat, a kuta tehna keng hi ka hmu a." 
Zechariah2:2 Tichuan, kei chuan, Khawiah nge i kal dawn? Ka ti a. Ani chuan ka hnenah, Jerusalem hi a veng eng tia nge anih a, a dung eng chen nge a nih hre tura teh turin, a ti a." 
Zechariah2:3 Tin, ngai teh, vantirhkoh mi betu kha a kal chhuak ta a; tin, vantirhkoh dang amah tawk turin a lo chhuak bawk a," 
Zechariah2:4 a hnenah, tlan la he tlangval hnenah hian, Jerusalem hi ami tam vang leh ran rual tam vangin Khaw hungna nei lo anga luahin a awm dawn a ni." 
Zechariah2:5 Kei hi a velah mei kulh ka ni ang a, A laia ropui chu ka ni dawn bawk si a, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zechariah2:6 Hawh teh u, hawh teh u, hmar ram ata tlan chhuak rawh u, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Van thli pali ang maiin ka tidarh tawh si che u a, Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zechariah2:7 Hawh teh, Zion, Babulon fanu zinga la cheng, relh bo rawh." 
Zechariah2:8 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti si a; Ropuinna tur angzia zelin a tikhawlotu che u hnam hnenah chuan min tir a ni: Nangni khawihtu chuan a mit naute a khawih a ni mai. 
Zechariah2:9 Ngai rawh u, ka kut ka thin khum dawn si a, Anmahni rawngbawltute rallak an ni mai ang: Tichuan, Sipaihote LALPA chuan mi tir ani tih in la hre dawn a ni." 
Zechariah2:10 Zion fanu, hlimin zai rawh; ngai rawh, ka lo kal e, I hnenah ka cheng dawn si a, tih hi LALPA thu chuak a ni." 
Zechariah2:11 Chumi niah chuan hnam tam takin LALPA chu an rawn zawm ang a, a mite an ni ang: Tin, i hnenah chuan ka cheng ang a, Tichuan, Sipaihote LALPA chuan i hnenah mi tir a ni, tih i hre tawh ang." 
Zechariah2:12 Tin, LALPA chuan ram thianghlima a chanvo atan Juda chu a rochung ang a, Jerusalem chu a la thlang ang.Mi zawng zawngte u, LALPA hmaah chuan ngawi thiap rawh u: Ani chu a hmun thianghlim ata a lo tho tawh si a, Tiin va sawi rawh, a ti a." 
Zechariah2:13 Mi zawng zawngte u, LALPA hmaah chuan ngawi thiap rawh u: Ani chu a hmun thianghlim ata a lo tho tawh si a, Tiin va sawi rawh, a ti a." 
Zechariah3:1 Tin, puithiam lalber Josua, LALPA vantirhkoh hmaa ding leh a dodaltu tur Setana ama ding lampanga ding chu mi entir a." 
Zechariah3:2 Tin, LALPA chuan Setana hnenah, Aw Setan, LALPA chuan hau che rawh se: A ni, LALPA Jerusalem thlangtu chuan hau che rawh se: He mi hi thingthu mei ata phih chhuah chu ani lo em ni? A ti a." 
Zechariah3:3 Tichuan Josua chu silhfen bawlhhlawh taka inthuamin vantirhkoh hmaah chuan alo ding a. 
Zechariah3:4 Tin, a hmaa dingte chu a han bia a, A silhfen bawlhlawh chu hlihsak rawh u, tiin. Tin, ama hnenah chuan, Ngai teh, i khawlohnate chu ka tibosak ta chia: tichuan silhfen hlu takin ka thuam ang che, a ti a." 
Zechariah3:5 Tin, kei chuan Lukhum mawi tak khumtir rawh se, ka han ti a. Tichuan lukhum mawi fe chu an khumtir ta a, silhfenin an thuam a, tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chu a kiangah a ding a." 
Zechariah3:6 Tin, LALPA vantirhkoh chuan Josua hnenah," 
Zechariah3:7 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ka kawngte i zawh zel a, ka thu tukte i tih chuan, Ka in chhung ro i rel ang a, Ka rorel hmunte chu i vawng bawk ang a, Heng dinghote zingah hian tel ve theihna tur ka pe ang che." 
Zechariah3:8 Tunah ngai teh, aw Josu, puithiam lalber, Nang leh i thiante i hmaa thute nen ngai rawh u, Thil tha thleng entir lawkna an i si a: Ngai teh u, ka chhiahhlawh Chawr no chu ka rawn chhuah dawn si a. Ngai teh mah u, Josua hmaa ka lung dah chu; Lung pakhatah chuan mit pasarih a awm a ni;" 
Zechariah3:9 Ngai teh u, a chungah chuan thil ziakte ka ziak ang a, Churam khawlohnate chu ni khat thilah ka la bo vek mai ang, Tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni.Chumi niah chuan mi tinin grep hrui hnuaiah te leh Theipui hnuaiahte mahni thenawmte in sawm theuh tawh ang, Tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chuak a ni, tiin a tiam ta a," 
Zechariah3:10 Chumi niah chuan mi tinin grep hrui hnuaiah te leh Theipui hnuaiahte mahni thenawmte in sawm theuh tawh ang, Tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chuak a ni, tiin a tiam ta a," 
Zechariah4:1 Tin, vantirhkoh mi betu kha a lo kal leh a, mi muhil lai tihharh ang mai hian mi rawn tiharh a." 
Zechariah4:2 ka hnenah chuan, Eng nge i hmuh le? a ti a. Tin, kei chuan, Rangkachak khawnvar dahna, a chhipa berhbu te leh chumia khawnvar pasarihte nen, tin, a chhipa khawnvar dawt pasarihte nei theuhte leh" 
Zechariah4:3 Olive thing pahnih berhbu ding lama pakhat, vei lama pakhat awm ka hmu,ka ti a." 
Zechariah4:4 Tin, vantirhkoh mi betu hnenah chuan, Heng hi eng nge ni, ka pu? Tiin ka han ti leh ve a." 
Zechariah4:5 Tin, vantirhkoh mi betu chuan mi chhang a, ka hnenah, Heng hi eng nge an nih, i hre lo maw? a ti a. Kei chuan, Hre lo, ka pu, ka ti a." 
Zechariah4:6 Chutah ani chuan ka hnenah, Heng hi Jerubabela hnena LALPA thu chu a ni a: Chakna ni loin, thiltihtheihna ni hek loin, Ka thlarau zawkin le, tiin Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti e." 
Zechariah4:7 Tunge i nih? aw tlang lianpui, Jerubabela hmaah chuan phaizawlah i chang maiang; Ani chuan a lung pawimawh ber chu A tana malsawmna nen, hlimna au aw nen a rawn thlen ang, Tiin mi chhang ta a." 
Zechariah4:8 Chu lo pawh chu LALPA thu ka hnenah a lo tleng leh a: 
Zechariah4:9 Jerubabela kut chuan he in lungphumte hi aphum ta a. Ama kut bawkin a puitlin ang a, Tichuan, Sipaihote LALPA chuan in hnenah mi tir ani tih in hre tawh ang." 
Zechariah4:10 Thil tenau hun te hi tuin nge hmusit ni? Hlim takin an awm ang a, Jerubabela kuta dar mum khai chu an hmu dawn si a; Heng pasarihte ngei hi LALPA mit chu an ni bawk a, Lei pum pui chungah hian an vak vel thin, tiin." 
Zechariah4:11 Tin, kei chuan ka chhang a, a hnenah, Heng olive thing pahnih, khawnvar dahna ding lam leh vei lama mi hi eng nge ni? ka ti a." 
Zechariah4:12 Tin, ka han chhang nawn leh a, a hnenah, rangkachak dawt pahnih kianga he'ng olive zar pahnih rangkachak hriak lo chhuahnate hi eng nge ni? ka ti a." 
Zechariah4:13 Tin, ani chuan mi chhang a, Heng hi eng nge ni dawn tih i hre lo maw? Min ti a. Tin, kei chuan Hre lo e, ka pu, ka ti a.Tin, anin, Heng fapa pahnih, hriak ngah takte hi, lei pum pui LALPA kianga dingte chu an nih hi, a ti a." 
Zechariah4:14 Tin, anin, Heng fapa pahnih, hriak ngah takte hi, lei pum pui LALPA kianga dingte chu an nih hi, a ti a." 
Zechariah5:1 Tah chuan ka mit ka han len chho leh a, ka han en a, lehkhabu zial thlawk duai duai hi ka hmu a." 
Zechariah5:2 Tin, ani chuan ka hnenah, Eng nge i hmuh le? A ti a. Kei chuan ka chhang a, Lehkhabu zial thlawk duai duai ka hmu; a dung chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a vang chu tawng sawm a ni, ka ti a." 
Zechariah5:3 Tin, ani chuan ka hnenah, Hei hi ram pum pui chunga anchhe kal chhuak chu anih hi; a pang khing khat thu ang zelin rukru apiang pawh thenfai an ni bawk ang." 
Zechariah5:4 ka kal chauhtir ang a, rukru inah leh ka hming chhala dik lo taka chhechhamtu inah te chuan a lut ang a, an in chhungah chuan a awm reng ang a, a thingphel te, a lungte chawpin a tiral vek ang tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni, a ti a." 
Zechariah5:5 Tin, vantirhkoh mi betu chu a kal chhuak a, ka hnenah, Tunah i mit han len cho la, kal chhuak ta kha eng nge ni? En teh, mi ti a." 
Zechariah5:6 Tin, kei chuan, Eng nge ni? Ka han ti a. Ani chuan, ""Hei hi ani bawm kal chhuak ta kha,"" a ti a. Amah vekin, ""Hei hi ram pum puia an khawlohna chu ani"" a ti a." 
Zechariah5:7 Suan talent khata rit a chhin chu a hawng a, bawm chhungah hmeiche pakhat a thu a." 
Zechariah5:8 Tin, ani chuan, Hei hi Suaksuali chu a ni, a ti a; Ephah chhungah chuan a nem lut a; tin, suan rit ak chuan a chhin ta a." 
Zechariah5:9 Tah chuan ka mit chu ka han len chho a, ka han en a, hmeichhe pahnih lo kal chhuak ka hmu a, an thlaah chuan thli a awm a; thla chu vacha thla ang hi an nei a ni. Tin, Ephah chu lei leh van karah an chawikang ta a." 
Zechariah5:10 Tin, kei chuan vantirhkoh mi betu hnenah chuan, Ephah chu hengte hian khawi lamah nge an kalpui dawn? Ka ti a.Ani chuan ka hnenah, sinar rama a tana in sakna tur lamah chuan; tin, in chu peih anih hun chuan chutah chuan ama hmun ngeiah an dah ang, a ti a." 
Zechariah5:11 Ani chuan ka hnenah, sinar rama a tana in sakna tur lamah chuan; tin, in chu peih anih hun chuan chutah chuan ama hmun ngeiah an dah ang, a ti a." 
Zechariah6:1 Tin, kei chuan ka mit ka han len chho leh a, ka han en a, tlang pahnih kara sakawr tawlailir pali lo chhuak hi ka hmu a, tlangte chu dar hlawm an ni a." 
Zechariah6:2 Tawlailir pakhatnaa mi chu sakawr sen an ni a, tawlailir pahnihnaa mi chu sakawr dum an ni a," 
Zechariah6:3 tawlailir pathumnaa mi chu sakawr var an ni a, talailir palinaa mi chu sakawr hmarsai, chak tak si hi an ni a." 
Zechariah6:4 Tah chuan ka chhang a, vantirhkoh mi betu hnenah chuan Heng hi eng nge ni, ka pu? Ka ti a." 
Zechariah6:5 Tin, vantirhkoh chuan ka hnenah, ""Heng hi van thli pali, leilung zawng zawng LALPA hmaa ding thin, kal chhuakte chu an nih hi.""" 
Zechariah6:6 Sakawr dum awmna tawlailir chu hmar lamah a kal chhuak a, a var awmna chuan a dawt a, tin, a hmarsai awmna chu chhim ram lamah a kal chhuak a." 
Zechariah6:7 Tin, a sente chu an han ding chhuak a, kal chhuah a, leilung awm dan endik an nghaklel hle a. Chutah vantirhkoh chuan, ""kal ta u la; lei lung awm dan va endik rawh u"" a ti a. Chutichuan vantirhkoh sawi ang chuan an ti a. Chutichuan lei chung zawng zawngah an vak vel ta a ni, tiin mi chhang a." 
Zechariah6:8 Tichuan ka hnenah, Ngai rawh, hmar lama kalte khan hmar ramah chuan ka rilru an tihahdam a ni, tiin mi au a." 
Zechariah6:9 Tin, LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Zechariah6:10 Sal tang Heldaia te, Tobija te, Jedaia te laka thil chu la la, chumi ni vekah chuan lo kal la, Babulon atang an rawn pan Zepania fapa Josia inah chuan lut rawh." 
Zechariah6:11 A ni, an lak ata tangkarua leh rangkachak te la la, lallukhumte siam la, Jehozadaka fapa Josua, puithaim lal luah chuan khumtir rawh;" 
Zechariah6:12 tin, a hnenah chuan, heti hian Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti a ni:" 
Zechariah6:13 Ngai rawh, mi a hming chawr no chu," 
Zechariah6:14 Ama hmun ata a lo to chhuak ang a," 
Zechariah6:15 LALPA biak in ngei chu a rawn sa dawn a ni; 
Zechariah6:16 Ropuina chu a khum ang a. 
Zechariah6:17 A lalthutthlenga thuin ro a rel ang: 
Zechariah6:18 A lalthutthlengah chuan puithiam ani ang a," 
Zechariah6:19 remna ro chu an pahniha karah a awm ang. 
Zechariah6:20 Tin, lallukhumte chu Helema te, Tobija te, Jedaia te, Zephania fapa Hena te tan LALPA inah hriat rengna tur ani ang.Tin, hla taka awmte kha an kal ang a, LALPA in chu an rawn sa ve ang a, Sipaihote LALPA chuan in hnenah mi tir a ni tih in la hre dawn a ni. Tin, LALPA in Pathian aw chu ngun taka in bengkhawn thin chuan he'ng thil hi a lo la thleng ngei ang, a ti, tiin sawi rawh, a ti a." 
Zechariah6:21 Tin, hla taka awmte kha an kal ang a, LALPA in chu an rawn sa ve ang a, Sipaihote LALPA chuan in hnenah mi tir a ni tih in la hre dawn a ni. Tin, LALPA in Pathian aw chu ngun taka in bengkhawn thin chuan he'ng thil hi a lo la thleng ngei ang, a ti, tiin sawi rawh, a ti a." 
Zechariah7:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lal Daria kum lina, thla kuana, Chislev ni li ni takah chuan Zakaria hnenah LALPA thu chu a lo thleng a." 
Zechariah7:2 Tin, Bethel mite chuan Sarezera leh regemeleka leh an mite an rawn tir a, LALPA khawngaihna chu an ngen a," 
Zechariah7:3 Sipaihote LALPA ina puithiamte hnenah leh zawlneite hnenah chuan an sawi a: Tun hma kum tam fea ka lo tih tawh thin angin mahni intihrangin thla nganaah chuan ka tap thin em ni ang? tiin. 
Zechariah7:4 Tah chuan Sipaihote LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Zechariah7:5 rama mi zawng awngte leh puithiamte hnenah chuan, Heng kum sawmsarih chhung meuh pawha thla ngana leh thla sarihnaa chaw in nghei a, in lungngaih thinte khan, ka hming a, keima hming meuha chaw nghei em in nih?" 
Zechariah7:6 Tin, in ei a, in in pawhin nangmahni tan in ei a, in in mai a ni lo'm ni?" 
Zechariah7:7 Jerusalem leh a vela khawpuite miin an luah khaha an hmuingil em em lai leh chhim lam leh ram phaite pawh miin an luah khah laia zawlnei hmasate hmanga LALPA thusawite kha in lo hre tawh tur a ni lo'm ni? tiin sawi rawh, a ti a." 
Zechariah7:8 Tin, LALPA thu chu Zakaria hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Zechariah7:9 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a sawi a ni: rorelna dik takin titlu u la, Mi tinin an unaute chungah zahngaihna leh Khawngaihna chhuah rawh se:" 
Zechariah7:10 Hmeithai te emaw, fahrah te, mikhual te, Mi retheite emaw hnehchhiah hek suh u. Tumah rengin in thinlungah In unaute tana tha lo tur chu suangtuah suh u, tiin." 
Zechariah7:11 Mahse an ngaithla duh lo a, An tukkhum chhah an chhawn a, An hriat lohna'n an beng an chhu chhet a." 
Zechariah7:12 A ni, Sipaihote LALPA chuan Zawlnei hmasate kuta a thu thawn leh Dan thute chu An ngaihthlak lohna'n An thinlungte chu lung chang tak angin an tisak ta a; Chuvangin Sipaihote LALPA lak ata Thinurna nasa tak alo thleng ta a ni." 
Zechariah7:13 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, anmahni a auh an ngaithla duh lo a, Chutiang bawkin an auin ka ngaithla bik lo ang, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti a.An mi hriat ngai loh zingah Thawngaleivirin anmahni ka tidarh zawk dawn a ni.Chutiangin an hnuah chuan tihtiau a ni tawh ang a, Tuma an veivak tawh lo vang, Ram nuam tak chu an titiau dawn ta si a." 
Zechariah7:14 An mi hriat ngai loh zingah Thawngaleivirin anmahni ka tidarh zawk dawn a ni.Chutiangin an hnuah chuan tihtiau a ni tawh ang a, Tuma an veivak tawh lo vang, Ram nuam tak chu an titiau dawn ta si a." 
Zechariah8:1 Tin, Sipaihote LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng leh a," 
Zechariah8:2 heti hian Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti a ni: Zion chu vei tak meuhin ka vei a ni, A chunga thinur khawpin a nia ka thik ni, tiin." 
Zechariah8:3 LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a; Zion lam ka hawi leh ta a, Jerusalem chu Thudik khawpui tih a ni tawh ang; Tin, Sipaihote LALPA tlang chu tlang thianghlim tih a ni bawk ang." 
Zechariah8:4 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni, Jerusalem kawtthlerahte chuan pitar-te leh putar te, An kum tam avanga tiang hawl boh boh tawhte pawh chu an la cheng ang." 
Zechariah8:5 Tin, kawtthlera infiamin khawpui kawtthlerte chu Hmeiche naupang leh mipa naupangin An la khat nuai nuai ang." 
Zechariah8:6 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Chung niahte chuan he'ng mi la awm chhunte Mithmuhah hian mak a nih chuan, Keia mithmuhah a mak ve kher dawn em ni? Tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zechariah8:7 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, ka mite chu chhak lam ram ata te, Thlang lam ram ata te ka chhan chhuak ang a," 
Zechariah8:8 Tin, ka rawn hruai ang a, Jerusalem leh felnaah ka mite an ni ang a, Kei pawh an Pathian ka ni ang." 
Zechariah8:9 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Temple ngei chu sak a nih theih nana Sipaihote LALPA in lungphum phum nia Zawlneite kaa thu chuak nangni tuna ngaithlatu hian In kutte tikhauh rawh u. 
Zechariah8:10 Tun hmate khan mihring tan inhlawhna a awm lo a, Ran rawihna tur pawh a awm hek lo; hmelma avangin a lut a chhuak tan Muanna engmah a awm hek lo: Mi zawng awng an thenawmte nen ka indotir a ni si a." 
Zechariah8:11 Tunah erawh chuan hemi la awm chhunte hnenah hian Tun hma ang hu ka ni tawh lo vang, Tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zechariah8:12 Remna chi a awm dawn tawh si a, Grep hruite chuan rah a chhuah ang a, Lein hlawkna a chhuah bawk ang a, Vanin daifim a tlaktir ang; Hemi la awm chhunte hi chung chu ka rochuntir dawn a ni." 
Zechariah8:13 Tin, heti a ni ang a, Hnam dangte zinga anchhe dawng in nih thin avangin, Aw Juda chhungte leh Israel chhungte u, Ka chhan chhuak ang che u a, Malsawmin in la awm ang: hlau suh u la, In kut erawh chu khauh rawh se." 
Zechariah8:14 Hetiang hian Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti si a: In thlahtuten mi tihtinur laia In chunga thil tha lo tih ka ngaihtuah khan Ka lamlet lo a; 
Zechariah8:15 Tunah hi chuan Jerusalem leh Juda chhungte tan Thil tha ka ngaihtuah leh thung dawn a ni, Hlau suh u, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Zechariah8:16 Heng hi in thil tih tur chu a ni ang: Mi tinin mahni thenawm hnenah thudik tak sawi theuh u la, In kawngka bulah thudik leh remna ro rel rawh u." 
Zechariah8:17 Tumah rengin in thinlungah in thenawmte tana Tha lo tur chu suangtuah suh u la, Dawta chhechham chu pawm suh u. Heng zawng awng hi ka thil huatte chu an ni. Tih hi Sipaihote LALPA thu chuak ani si a." 
Zechariah8:18 Tin, Sipaihote LALPA thu chu ka hnenah a lo thleng a," 
Zechariah8:19 Heti hian Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti a ni: Thla lina chaw nghei leh thla ngana chaw nghei leh thla sarihna chaw nghei leh thla sawmna chaw ngheite chu Juda chhungte tan chuan hlimna leh lawmna, ruai hlimawm takah a chang ang a; chuvangin thudik leh remna chu ngaina rawh u, a ti a." 
Zechariah8:20 Hetiangin Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti a ni: Heti hi a la ni ang a, Mipuite leh khawpui tam taka mite chu an lo kal ang:" 
Zechariah8:21 Tin, khawpui pakhat luahtute chu hmun dangah an kal ang a, Hawh u, LALPA duhsakna ngen turin i kal thuai ang u khai, Sipaihote LALPA chu i zawng ang u, an ti ang a, Kei pawh ka kal ve ang." 
Zechariah8:22 A ni, LALPA zawng tur leh LALPA duhsakna chu ngen turin Mipui tam tak leh hnam chak takte Jerusalemah an lo kal ang, a ti a.Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Chung niahte chuan heti hi a la ni ang a, Mi sawm, hnam ze tinreng atanga lo chhuakte chuan Juda mi pakhat fenfualah an vuanin an chelh ang a, I hnenah Pathian a awm tih kan hriat avangin I hnenah kan kal ve dawn e, an ti ang, a ti a." 
Zechariah8:23 Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Chung niahte chuan heti hi a la ni ang a, Mi sawm, hnam ze tinreng atanga lo chhuakte chuan Juda mi pakhat fenfualah an vuanin an chelh ang a, I hnenah Pathian a awm tih kan hriat avangin I hnenah kan kal ve dawn e, an ti ang, a ti a." 
Zechariah9:1 Hadrak ram laka LALPA thu phurrit leh Damaska chunga in nghat tur chu: LALPA mit chu mite chungah leh Israel hnam zawng zawng chungah a fu si a. 
Zechariah9:2 Chumi ritu Hamah khaw chungah pawh; Tuira leh sidon pawh, an fin em avangin." 
Zechariah9:3 Tin, tura chuan kulhpui a in siama, Tangkaruate chu vaivut ang maiin a chhek a, rangkachak tha mi chu kawtthlera chhirhdiak ang maiin A chhek a ni." 
Zechariah9:4 Ngai rawh, LALPA chuan a ti tla ran ang a, Tuipuia a chakna a tichhia ang a, meia hal faiin a awm ang." 
Zechariah9:5 Askelon chuan a hmu ang a, a hlau vang; Gaza pawhin a hmu ang a, na a ti em em ang; Tin, Ekron chu a beiseina avang chuan a zak ang a, Lalber chu Gaza ata a boral ang a, Askelon chu luah in a awm lo ang." 
Zechariah9:6 Tin, Asdod-ah chuan falakho an cheng ang a, Philistia mite chapona chu kati boral ang." 
Zechariah9:7 Tin, an ka ata an thisen ka la bo ang a, An ha kar atangin an tenawmna ka la bo ang. Tin, anni pawh kan pathian tana awm chhun an ni ang a, Judai ramah chuan hotute pawh an la ni ang a, Ekron mite chu Jebus mite ang an la ni ang." 
Zechariah9:8 Tin, ka in chu sipai rual lakah ka veng ang a, Tumah an kal tlangin an let vel lo ang a. Hnehchhiahtu tumah an kal tlang tawh ngai lo ang: Ka mitin ka hmu tawh si a." 
Zechariah9:9 Aw Zion fanu, nasa takin hlim la; Aw Jerusalem fanu, au chhuak rawh; Ngai rawh, i lal i hnenah a lo kal e; Mi fel a ni a, hnehtu a ni; Inngaitlawm takin sabengtung chungah a chuang a, Sabengtung no chung ngeiah." 
Zechariah9:10 Tin, Ephraim lak ata tawlailir leh Jerusalem lak ata sakawr chu ka ti boral ang a, In dona thal ngul chu ka tan ang. Hnamte hnenah chuan remna thu a sawi ang a, A rorelna chu tuipui ata tuipui thlengin, Luipui atang chuan kawlkil thlengin a ni ang." 
Zechariah9:11 Nangma thu-ah pawh, i thuthlung thisen avangin Khuarkhurum tui awm lohna ata i mi tangte chu Ka rawn tir chhuak ang" 
Zechariah9:12 Beiseina nei mitangte u, kulhpui ah chuan kir u la, vawiin ngeiah hian a leh hnihin Ka pe dawn che u tih ka puang a ni." 
Zechariah9:13 Juda chu ka thal ngul atan ka kuai a, thal ngulah chuan Ephraim ka vuah ta a ni, Aw Zion, Grik fate lakah i fate chu ka chawk tho ang a, Mi chak tak khandaih angah ka siam ang che." 
Zechariah9:14 Tin, LALPA chu an chungah a lang ang a, a thal chu kawlphe angin a chhuak ang. Tin, LALPA pathian chuan tawtawrawt a ham ang a, Chhimlam thawngaleivir nen a kal ang." 
Zechariah9:15 Sipaihote LALPA chuan anmahni a hum ang a. An ni chuan an hmelmate chu an ei zo vang a, Virvawm lungte pawh chu an rapbet tawh ang. An in ang a, uain rui ang maiin an bengchheng ang. Berhbu khat ang maiin an khat ang a, Maicham kil ang maiin." 
Zechariah9:16 Tin, LALPA An pathian chuan an ran rualte angin chung niah chuan anmahni a chhanhim ang; Lallukhuma lungte angin he ram chungah hian a chawisang dawn si a.A thatna te chu a nasain, a mawina te chu a va nasa em! Buhbalte chuan tlangvalte a tihlawhtling ang a, uain thar chuan nulate a tihlawhtling dawn si a." 
Zechariah9:17 A thatna te chu a nasain, a mawina te chu a va nasa em! Buhbalte chuan tlangvalte a tihlawhtling ang a, uain thar chuan nulate a tihlawhtling dawn si a." 
Zechariah10:1 Ruah hnuhnung hunah hian LALPA chu ruah dil rawh u, LALPA, kawl tiphetu ngei chu; Tin, a nin loa hlebet tinrengte tan ruahpui vanawn a surtir ang" 
Zechariah10:2 Milem pathian chuan engmah lo mai a sawi a. Aisanthiamte thil hmuh chu dawt a ni si a; Mumang diklote an sawi a,Mi an thlamuan thlawn a; Chuvangin beram rual angin mahni kawng kawng an hawi a. berampu a awm loh avangin hreawm an tuar a," 
Zechariah10:3 Berampu chungah chuan ka thin a rim em em a, kel pate chu ka hrem ang: Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ranrual, Juda chhungte chu a rawn kan a, Indona sakawr tha tak angin a siam dawn si a." 
Zechariah10:4 A lak ata kil lung te, kilhna thir te, indona thal ngulte, Rorel tute an lo chhuakho dawn a ni." 
Zechariah10:5 Tin, michak tak ang an lo ni ang a, Indona kawtthler chirhdiakah chuan an hmelmate an rapbet ang, LALPA chu an hnena a awm avangin an bei nasa mai ang: Sakawr chungchuangte chu an mualpho dawn a ni." 
Zechariah10:6 Tin, Juda chhungte chu ka ti chak ang a. Josefa chhungte chu ka chhanhim ang a, Ka hruai leh ang, anni chu ka lainat si a; Tin, ka paihthlak loh ang mai an la ni ang a, Kei LALPA an pathian chu ka ni si a, An mahni ka ngaithla tawh ang." 
Zechariah10:7 Tin, Ephraim mite chu mi chak tak ang an ni ang a, Uain tihlawm angin an thinlung a lawm ang: A ni, an fate chuan an hmu ang a, an hlim ang a, LALPA ah chuan an thinlung a lawm ang." 
Zechariah10:8 Ka faifuk ang a, an mahni ka ko khawm ang; Anni chu ka tlan tawh si a: An lo pun tawh ang ngeiin an pung zel ang." 
Zechariah10:9 Ram dang dangah ka phun darh a, Ram hla takah pawh min hre reng ang; Tin, an fate nen an awm ang a, an lo kir leh ang." 
Zechariah10:10 Aigupta ram ata pawh ka hruai leh ang a, Assuria ram atangin ka khawm chhuak ang; Tin, Gilead ram leh Lebanon-ah chuan ka rawn hruai lut ang a, Tin, an tan hmun a awm seng lo hial ang." 
Zechariah10:11 Tin, tihduhdahna tuipui chu a kal tlang ang a, Tuifawnte chu a vua ang a, Nile luipui thukte chu a kang ang. Assuria chapona chu tihtlawm a ni ang a, Aigupta ram lal tiang chu a bo daih ang.Tin, LALPA ah chuan anmahni ka tichak ang a, ama hmingin an chhukin an chho vang, Tih chu LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zechariah10:12 Tin, LALPA ah chuan anmahni ka tichak ang a, ama hmingin an chhukin an chho vang, Tih chu LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zechariah11:1 I kawngte hawng rawh, aw Lebanon, I sidarte meiin a kan fai theih nan." 
Zechariah11:2 Aw far thing, chiau vak vak rawh, Sidar chu a tluk tawh avangin; A tha thate chu tihchhiat a ni tawh si a.Bansan sasuate u, chiau vak vak rawh u, ngaw dur puite pawh a rem zo tawh si a." 
Zechariah11:3 Berampute chiau thawm te tak chu! An ropuinate a chhe zo ta si. 
Zechariah11:4 LALPA kan pathian chuan heti hian a sawi a ni: Ran rual thah tur ang mite chu enkawl rawh," 
Zechariah11:5 A neitute chuan an that thin a, Thiam loah an in ruat hek lo: Anmahni hralhtute chuan, LALPA chu fakin awm rawh se, Kan lo hausa ta si a, an ti a: Anmahni vengtu ngei pawhin an khawngaih hek lo." 
Zechariah11:6 Ram luahtute chu ka khawngaih dawn tawh si lo a, Tih chu LALPA thu chhuak a ni. Tin, ngai rawh u, mi tin mai chu A thenawmpa kutah leh a lalber kutah ka pe ang: Ram chu an suasam ang a, An kut ata ka chhanchhuak lo ang." 
Zechariah11:7 Chutichuan ran rual thah tur ang mi te chu ka enkawl a, ran rual zinga a rethei ngei chu. Tin, tiang pahnih ka la a, pakhat chu 'Duhsak' ka vuah a, a dang chu 'Pumkhatna', ka vuah a; tin, ran rual chu ka chawm a.""" 
Zechariah11:8 Tin, thla khat chhungin berampu pathum te chu ka ti boral a, ka nunna hian anmahni ka ning tawh em si a; anni nunna pawhin min haw bawk a." 
Zechariah11:9 Tin, keiin, ka chawm lo ang che u, a thi thi chu thi mai se la, tihboral tur chu tihboral ni rawh se; tin, a bang zawngte chu an tisa inei hlawm rawh se, ka ti a." 
Zechariah11:10 Ka thu thlung, mipuite hnena ka thlun chu ka phelh theihna turin ka tiang duhsak chu ka la a, ka tan bung hmawk a." 
Zechariah11:11 Tin, chumi niah chuan phelhin a awm ta a, ran rual zinga a rethei, mi pawisatute chuan LALPA thu a ni tih an hre ta a." 
Zechariah11:12 Tin, an hnenah chuan, =ha in tih chuan, ka hlawh chu min pe u la, in tih loh chuan, min pe suh u, ka ti a; chutichuan ka hlawh atan cheng sawmthum an buk chhuak ta a." 
Zechariah11:13 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, ka man atana tha awm tawm tawk an chhiar chu bel vawtu pe mai rawh,a ti a. Tin, cheng sawmthum chu ka la a. LALPA inah chuan, bel vawtu hnenah chuan ka pe ta mai a ni." 
Zechariah11:14 Chutichuan, Juda leh Israelte inkara inunauna chu ka tihchah theihna'n ka tiang dang pumkhatna ngei chu ka la a, ka tan chhum ta a." 
Zechariah11:15 Tin, LALPA chuan ka hnenah, 'berampu tlaktlai lo hriamhrei chu va la leh cheu vang che." 
Zechariah11:16 Ngai rawh, ramah chuan berampu ka din chhuahtir ang a, chu chuan tihbo turte chu a kan lo ang a, tihdarh tawhte chu a zawng hek lo ang; Hliam tuar tawhte chu a tidam leh tawh lo ang a, a hrisel te pawh chu a chawm hek lo ang a, A thausa te chu a ei zawkin An tinkawmte nen lam a thlawnvek zawk ang.Berampu tlaktlai lo,ran rual kalsan tu chung chu a pik e!Khandaih chu a banah leh a mit dinglamah a tla ang a, A mit dinglam chu a thim tlat ang, a ti a." 
Zechariah11:17 Berampu tlaktlai lo,ran rual kalsan tu chung chu a pik e!Khandaih chu a banah leh a mit dinglamah a tla ang a, A mit dinglam chu a thim tlat ang, a ti a." 
Zechariah12:1 Israel chung thua LALPA thu phurrit chu. LALPA van tipharhtu, leilung nghahchhan phumtu, Mihring chhunga thlarau siamtu thu chu heti hi a ni:" 
Zechariah12:2 Ngai rawh u, Jerusalem chu a vela mipui zawng zawngte tan Ruihna novah ka siam ang a, Jerusalem hualnaah chuan juda tan pawh a ni ve ang." 
Zechariah12:3 Chumi niah chuan heti hi a lo ni ang a, Jerusalem chu mipui zawng zawng tan Lung rit takah ka siam ang: Chumi inphurhtirtu zawng zawngte chu na takin an hliam ang: Tin, leia hnam zawng zawngte chu amah bel turin an pung khawm ang." 
Zechariah12:4 Chumi niah chuan sakawr tin mai chu ka thawng ang a, a chunga chuangte chu atnain ka hrem ang, tih chu LALPA thu chhuak a ni: Tin, Juda chhungte chungah chuan ka mit ka meng ang a, mipuite sakawrte chu mitdelnain ka hrem ang." 
Zechariah12:5 Tin, Juda hotute chuan, Jerusalem luahtute chu Sipaihote LALPA an pathian ah chuan Ka chakna an ni, an ti rilru ang." 
Zechariah12:6 Chumi niah chuan Juda hotute chu Thing zinga meivam angin ka siam ang a, buhphal zinga meichher angin ka siam ang: Tin, a vela mipuite chu a kang fai ang-dinglam leh vei lamah; Tin, Jerusalem chu ama hmun ngei, Jerusalem-ah chuan a ding leh ang." 
Zechariah12:7 Davida chhungte ropuina leh Jerusalem luahtute ropuina chu Juda khuma tihlena a awm lohna'n LALPA chuan Juda puaninte chu a chhanchhuak hmasa ber bawk ang. 
Zechariah12:8 Chumi niah chuan LALPA chuan Jerusalem luahtute chu a hum ang a; Chumi niah chuan an zinga mi chhiathate pawh chu Davida ang chu an lo ni ang; Tin, Davida chhungte chu Pathian ang an lo ni ang a, An hmaa LALPA vantirhkoh ang chu an lo ni ang." 
Zechariah12:9 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a lo ni ang a, Jerusalem beitu hnamte chu tihboralna ka zawng ang." 
Zechariah12:10 Tin, Davida chhungte chungah leh Jerusalem luahtute chungah chuan khawngaihna leh dilna thlarau ka leih ang a, Tin, an chhuna chu min rawn en ang; Tin, miin a fapa neih chhun a sun angin a sun ang a, Miin a fatir chunga a tuar ang in an tuar ang." 
Zechariah12:11 Chumi niah chuan Jerusalem-ah sunna nasa tak a awm ang a, Megido ruama Hadadrimmon hmuna sunna ang mai kha." 
Zechariah12:12 Tin, ram chuan a sun ang; chhung kua kuain a hrangin; Davida thlah chhungkua pawh a hrangin, an nupuite ahrangin," 
Zechariah12:13 Levia thlah chhungkua ahrangin, an nupuite ahrangin; Simeia chhungte a hrangin, an nupuite ahrangin;Chhungkaw dang zawng zawng pawh, Chhungkaw tinreng ahrangin, an nupuite a hrang theuhin." 
Zechariah12:14 Chhungkaw dang zawng zawng pawh, Chhungkaw tinreng ahrangin, an nupuite a hrang theuhin." 
Zechariah13:1 Chumi niah chuan sual leh bawlhhlawhna tlenfaina'n Davida chhungte leh Jerusalem luahtute hnenah tuikhur hawnin a awm ang. 
Zechariah13:2 Tin, chumi niah chuan Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak chu heti hi a ni ang: Ram ata milem hmingte chu ka tibo ang a, Hriatrengin an awm tawh lo ang: Tin, ram ata zawlnei te leh thlarau bawlhhlawh chu Ka chhuah bo tir ang." 
Zechariah13:3 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, tu pawhin thu a la hril cheu chuan A nu leh a pa amah hringtute khan, a hnenah, I nung lo ang, LALPA hmingin dawt i sawi si a, an ti ang: Tin, a nu leh a pa amah hringtute khan, thu a sawi laiin Amah chu an chhun tlang ang." 
Zechariah13:4 Chumi n�ah chuan heti hi a lo ni ang a, zawlneiin thu a hrilin A inlarna hmuh apiang chu a zahpui tawh ang: mi bumna'n kawrfual hmulte an ha hek lo ang a," 
Zechariah13:5 Zawlnei ka ni lo a, hlo thlo mi ka ni e Ka tleirawl tirh ata bawiha siam ka ni si a, a ti zawk ang." 
Zechariah13:6 Tin, mi tuin emaw a hnenah I ban inkara hliamte hi eng nge ni? A ti ang a, Tin, anin, hengte hi chu, ka thiante ina ka hliam a nih hi, Tiin a chhang ang." 
Zechariah13:7 Aw khandaih, ka berampu leh ka kawppuipa chungah chuan harh rawh, tih chu Sipaihote LALPA thu chhuak a ni; Berampu chu vua la, beram rual an darh ang, a note chungah chuan ka kut ka lek ang." 
Zechariah13:8 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, ram zawng zawngah hmun hnih zel tih chhiat a ni ang a, a thi ang: Hmun thumna erawh chu hnutchhiah a ni ang:Tin, hmun thumna chu meiin ka fiah ang, tangkaraw thianghlim angin anmahni ka tithianghlim ang a, rangkachak fiaha awm angin anmahni ka fiah ang: Ka hming an lam ang a, an mahni ka ngaithla ang: Tin, anni chu ka mite an ni, ka ti ang a, annin, LALPA chu ka pathian a ni an ti ang, Tih chu LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zechariah13:9 Tin, hmun thumna chu meiin ka fiah ang, tangkaraw thianghlim angin anmahni ka tithianghlim ang a, rangkachak fiaha awm angin anmahni ka fiah ang: Ka hming an lam ang a, an mahni ka ngaithla ang: Tin, anni chu ka mite an ni, ka ti ang a, annin, LALPA chu ka pathian a ni an ti ang, Tih chu LALPA thu chhuak a ni." 
Zechariah14:1 Ngai teh, LALPA ni a lo thleng dawn e, Chutah chuan in rallakte in zing ngeiah semdarh a ni ang." 
Zechariah14:2 Jerusalem do turin hnam zawng zawng ka khawm dawn si a. Khawpui chu lak a ni ang a, inte pawh chu rawk a ni ang a, hmeichhiate chu ngaihsak an ni ang, khawpui zatve chu sala hruai chhuahin an awm ang a, mipui la awm chhunte chu khawpui ata tihbo an ni lo ang." 
Zechariah14:3 Chitih hunah chuan LALPA chu a chhuak ang a, Indona nia a beih thin angin chung hnamte chu a do ang." 
Zechariah14:4 Tin, chumi niah chuan Olive tlang chhak lama Jerusalem rawn chhawngah chuan, ke a nghat ang a, Tin, Olive tlang chu chhak leh thlang zawngin A laiah a phel ang a, ruam nasa tak a awm ang: Tin, tlang tiave chu hmar lamah a insawn ang a, A tiave chu chhim lamah." 
Zechariah14:5 Tin, ka tlang kar ruamahte chuan in tlanbo ang a, tlang kar ruam chuan Azel hmun a thleng dawn si a: A ni in tlan bo ang, Juda lal Uzia lal laia Lirngh�nga in tlanbo ang khan, tin, LALPA ka Pathian chu a lo kal ang a, a mi thianghlim zawng zawngte pawh i hnenah an lo kal ang." 
Zechariah14:6 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a lo ni ang a, a eng lutuk lo ang a, a thim lutuk lo ang;" 
Zechariah14:7 Mahse chumi ni chu LALPA chauhin a hria. Chhun ni lo zan ni lo; tlai lamah erawh chuan eng a lo awm ang. 
Zechariah14:8 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a lo ni ang a, Jerusalem atangin tuinung a lo chhuak ang a; A zatve chhaklam tuipuiah, a zatve thlanglam tuipuiah: Nipuiah leh thlasik-ah pawh chuti chu a ni ang." 
Zechariah14:9 Tin, lei chung zawng zawngah LALPA chu lalber a lo ni ang: Chumi niah chuan LALPA chu pakhat a ni ang a.A hming pawh pakhat a ni ang a." 
Zechariah14:10 Ram zawng zawng chu Geba atanga Jerusalem chhim Rimon thlengin Arab-ah ang a lo ni ang. Tin, Jerusalem chu chawisanin a awm ang a, Benjamin kawngka an tih atanga kawngka pakhatna thlengin a kil kawngka thleng chuan, Tin, Hanalela in sang atanga lalber uain sawr khur thlengin a hmun chuan a awh ang." 
Zechariah14:11 Tin, tah chuan mite an cheng ang a, anchhia reng reng a awm tawh lo ang; Jerusalem chu him takin a awm zawk dawn a ni." 
Zechariah14:12 Tin, Jerusalem dotu mipui zawng zawng chunga LALPA'n hripui a lentir tur chu hei hi a ni: An kea an ding reng chungin an tisa chu a ral ang a, An mit khur chhunga an mitte pawh chu a ral ang a, an ka chhunga an lei pawh a ral ang a," 
Zechariah14:13 Tin, chumi niah chuan heti hi a lo ni ang a, LALPA hnen ata buaina ropui tak an zingah a awm ang a, Mi tinin a thenawm kut a chelh ang a, A thenawm kut chungah a kut a lekbawk ang." 
Zechariah14:14 Tin, Juda pawhin Jerusalem chu a bei ang; A vela hnamte zawng zawng sum leh pai, Rangkachak te, tangkaruate, silhfente chu tam tak mai lakkhawm a ni ang." 
Zechariah14:15 Tin, chutiang bawkin sakawr hri te, sabengtung hri te, sanghawngsei hri te, sabengtung te chi hri te a lo awm ang a, Tin, chung buka ran awm zawng zawng te vei chu Hripui ang bawk kha a ni ang." 
Zechariah14:16 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, hnam zawng zawng Jerusalem rawn dotu hnutchhiaha la awm te chu Kum tin, bawkte kut hmang tur leh Lalber, Sipaihote LALPA chibai buk turin an chho thin ang." 
Zechariah14:17 Tin, lei chunga chhungkua zawng zawng, Lalber, Sipaihote LALPA chibai buk tura chho lo apiangte chungah chuan ruah a sur lo ang." 
Zechariah14:18 Tin, Aigupta ram chhungkua kal chho loa Lo kal ta lo te chungah chuan a sur bik hek lo ang a, Bawkte kut hmang tura kal chho lo hnamte LALPA'n a hremna chi hripui chu a thleng ang." 
Zechariah14:19 Hei hi Aigupta ram hremna leh Bawkte kut hmang tura kal chho lo hnamte hremna chu a lo ni ang. 
Zechariah14:20 Chumi niah chuan sakawr thi-ah te pawh LALPA TANA THIANGHLIM tih a chuang ang a, Tin, LALPA ina bungbel na zawngte chu Maicham hmaa maihun ang hial an lo ni ang.Ni e, Jerusalem leh Juda bungbel zawng zawngte chu Sipaihote LALPA tana thianghlim an lo ni tawh ang: Tin, inthawi zawng zawngte chuan an rawn la ang a, Chhumna'n an hmang ang: Chumi niah chuan Sipaihote LALPA inah chuan Kanaan mi reng reng an awm tawh lo ang." 
Zechariah14:21 Ni e, Jerusalem leh Juda bungbel zawng zawngte chu Sipaihote LALPA tana thianghlim an lo ni tawh ang: Tin, inthawi zawng zawngte chuan an rawn la ang a, Chhumna'n an hmang ang: Chumi niah chuan Sipaihote LALPA inah chuan Kanaan mi reng reng an awm tawh lo ang." 
Malachi1:1 Israel-ho hnena LALPA thu chhuak Malakia kut ziak chu. 
Malachi1:2 LALPA chuan, ka hmangaih che u a ni, a ti a. Nangni erawh chuan, engah khan nge min hmangaih ni? in ti a. Esauva chu Jakoba unaupa a ni lo em ni? Tih hi LALPA thu chhuak a ni: Jakoba chu ka hmangaih a;" 
Malachi1:3 Esauva erawh chu ka hua a, a tlangte chu hmun tiauvah ka siam a, a rochan chu thlaler sihalte ka pe a." 
Malachi1:4 Edom ho chuan, tihchhiatin ka awm na a, Kan lo kir leh ang a, hmun ramte chu kan din leh ang, ti mah se la, Sipaihote LALPA chuan heti hian a ti: Anni'n an din leh na'nga, kei in ka thiat leh ang: Tin, mite chuan anni chu Suhsualna ram leh kumkhuaa LALPA thinrim em emnateho, an ti ang." 
Malachi1:5 In mit ngeiin in hmu ang a, Israel ramri pelin LALPA chu chawimawiin awm rawh se, nangni ngeiin in la ti ang." 
Malachi1:6 Fapa chuan a pa a chawimawi thin a, Bawih chuan a pu: Kei hi pa ka nih chuan min chawimawina chu khawiah nge? Kei hi in pu ka nih chuan min tihna chu khawiah nge? Aw puithiam, ka hming hmusittute u, sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti che u a ni. Nangni erawh chuan, engah khan nge i hming kan hmuhsit ni? in ti a." 
Malachi1:7 Ka maichamah chuan chhang bawlhhlawh in hlan a lawm. Nangnin, engah khan nge kan tihbawlhhlawh che? in ti a LALPA dawhkan hi hmuhsitawm a ni, in tih thin ah hian a ni." 
Malachi1:8 Inthawina'n a mitdel in hlanin sualna a awm hek lo maw? A kebai leh a silawng in hlanin sualna a awm hek lo maw? In ram awptu pawh pe teh u; a lawm dawn che u em ni? A nih leh, a lo ngaisang ang che u maw? Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi1:9 Tunah hian min khawngaih theihna'n pathian tihlungawina zawng rawh u khai - Hetiang hi in kutkawih ngei a ni si a- A lo ngaisang dawn che u em ni? Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti. 
Malachi1:10 Athlawn maia ka maichamah chuan mei in tihalh lohna'n In zingah mi, kawngkhar khar tur awm teh se la aw! In chungah lawmna reng ka nei lo a, In kut ata thilhlan chu ka pawm hek lo ang; Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi1:11 Ni chhuahna atanga a tlakna thleng pawhin Jentailte zingah ka hming chu a ropui si a, hmun tinah ka hming atan rimtui hlan a ni, thilhlan thianghlim nen: Jentail te zingah ka hming a ropui si a, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi1:12 Nangni erawh chu, LALPA dawhkan chu a bawlhhlawh a ni, a rah a chaw ngei chu a hmuhsitawm, in tih-ah khan a ni A tibawrhbangtu in nih ni." 
Malachi1:13 Tin, ngai teh u, a va ninawm em! In ti bawk a, In hnar in tum khum a, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti; hneh chhuha in thil lakte, a kebai te, a silawng te in rawn la a; chutiangin thilhlan chu in rawn la a: Chung chu in kut ata ka pawm dawn em ni? LALPA chuan a ti.A ran ruala a pa awm reng a, thu pawh tiam a LaLPA hnena a hmelhem hlana bumtu chu an chhe dawng a ni: Kei chu lal ropui tak ka ni si a, ka hming pawh Jentailte zingah A tihawm a ni, sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi1:14 A ran ruala a pa awm reng a, thu pawh tiam a LaLPA hnena a hmelhem hlana bumtu chu an chhe dawng a ni: Kei chu lal ropui tak ka ni si a, ka hming pawh Jentailte zingah A tihawm a ni, sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi2:1 Khai le, puithiamte u, he thupek hi nangmahni tan a ni e." 
Malachi2:2 Ka hming tiropui tura in ngaihthlak loh a, thinlunga in vawn loh chuan In chungah an chhia ka rawn thlentir ang, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti, In malsawmna dawnte chu anchhia ka lawh ang: A ni, in zingah thinlunga vawng in awm loh avangin anchhia ka lawh tawh reng a ni." 
Malachi2:3 Ngai teh u, nangmahni vangin in chite chu ka zilhhau a, In hmaiahte chuan ek ka tat pherh ang. In kutna ek ngei chu; Chu mi nen chuan lak bo in ni ang." 
Malachi2:4 Levia hnena ka thuthlung hi a din zel theihna'n he thupek hi in hnenah ka rawn chhuah a ni, tih in hria ang, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi2:5 Ka thuthlung chu a hnenah a awm a; nunna leh thlamuanna ka pe a, tih pawh mi tih a ni, ka hming chu hlauh namenin a hlau lo a." 
Malachi2:6 Thutak dan chu a kaah a awm a, thu sual a hmuiah a awm lo: Thlamuang tak leh ngil takin ka hmaah a leng thin a, mi tamtak an khawlohna ata a lamlettir a ni." 
Malachi2:7 Puithiam hmuite chuan hriatna a vawng tur a ni si a, a ka atangin dan chu an zawng thin tur a ni; A ni chu sipaihote LALPA tirhkoh a ni si a."
