Malachi2:8 Nangni erawh zawng kawng ata chu in lo peng ta a; Danah chuan mi tam tak in petektir a; Levia thuthlung chu in tichhia a ni, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi2:9 Chuvangin kei pawhin, ka kawngte tumah zawh in awm loh a, dan thua mi thleibik in neih zawk ang zel hian, Mi zawng zawng hmaah hmuhsitawm leh tlawmin ka siam che u a ni." 
Malachi2:10 Kan vaiin pa hmun kan ni lo em ni? Pathian pakhat siam pawh kan ni lo em ni? Engatinge kan pate thuthlung tihbawrbanga, unau leh unau kan in bum thin?" 
Malachi2:11 Juda chuan bum a hmang a,Israel ram leh Jerusalem khuaah Thil tenawm tih a ni a; LALPA'n a hmangaih thin hmun thianghim chu Juda chuan a tibawrhbang ta si a, Ram dang pathian fanu a nei ta a ni." 
Malachi2:12 Hetiang ti chu, a tua-pawh, Jakoba puan in ata LALPA'n a tifihlim vek ang, Sipaihote LALPA hnena thil hlan tu chenin." 
Malachi2:13 Tin, hei pawh hi in ti leh pek a; mittui leh tahna leh rumnain LALPA maicham chu in chhilh hneh khawp a, Thilhlan a ngaihsak reng reng tawh lo a, In kuta mi chu lawmawmah a ngai hek lo." 
Malachi2:14 Nangni chuan, Eng vang nge ni le? In la han ti a. Nang leh i nupui tawntirh inkara thu hretu chu LALPA a ni a, i kawppui leh i thuthlung nupui a ni na chungin A chungah bumna thil i tih thin avang a ni." 
Malachi2:15 Nunna chi neiin, pumkhatah a siam lo em ni? Engah nge pumkhata a siam? Chi thlah, Pathian ngaihsak a zawng a ni. Tichuan in nunna chu veng tha u la, tuma'n mahni nupui tawntirh chu bum suh se." 
Malachi2:16 In mak hi ka haw si a, LALPA Israel-ho Pathian chuan a ti; Mahni silhfen hnehchhiahnaa khuhtu nen, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti. Tichuan, in nunna chu veng tha u la, in bum suh u.In thutein LALPA chu in tihah ta. Nangni erawh chuan, Engah khan nge kan tihhah? In ti a. Thilsual ti tu apiang LALPA mit hmuhah mi tha an ni a, An chungah pawh ani chu a lawm thin, in tih-ah te, Rorel felna Pathian chu khawiah nge? In tih-ah te hian a ni." 
Malachi2:17 In thutein LALPA chu in tihah ta. Nangni erawh chuan, Engah khan nge kan tihhah? In ti a. Thilsual ti tu apiang LALPA mit hmuhah mi tha an ni a, An chungah pawh ani chu a lawm thin, in tih-ah te, Rorel felna Pathian chu khawiah nge? In tih-ah te hian a ni." 
Malachi3:1 Ngai teh, u, ka tirhkoh ka rawn tir a, Ka hmaah kawng a buatsaih ang: Tin, in zawn LALPA chu a biakinah a lo kal phut ang; Ngai teh u, thuthlung tirhkoh in lawm em em chu a lo kal e, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi3:2 Amaherawh chu a lo kal ni chu tu nge tuar zo ang: A lo lan hunah chuan tu nge ding thei ang? Ani chu rawhtuina mei ang leh puan sutute sabawn ang a ni si a: 
Malachi3:3 Tangkaraw rawhtuina leh tithianghlimtu angin a thu ang a, Levia fate a tithianghlim ang a, Rangkachak leh tangkarua angin an mahni a tifai ang a; LALPA tan chuan felnaa thilhlantute an ni ang." 
Malachi3:4 Chutichuan hmasang nite leh hmasang kumte angin Judai ram leh Jerusalem thilhlan chu LALPA tan duhawm tak a ni leh ang. 
Malachi3:5 Rorel turin ka rawn hnaih dawn a che u; Dawithiamte, uirete, dawta chhechhamtute chungah leh Hmeithai leh fahrah leh inhlawhfa hlawh tikhawlova hnehchhiahtute leh hnamdang lo sathlatute leh mi tih lotute chungah chuan Thu hretu tuantha tak ka ni ang, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi3:6 Kei LALPA hi ka danglam si lo, chuvangin nangni, aw Jakoba fate u, tihboral in ni lo e." 
Malachi3:7 In pute hun ata tawh ka thuruatte in kal pensan a, zawm pawh in zawm ngai lo. Ka hnenah lo kir u la, Tichuan in hnenah ka lo kir ang, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti. Nangni erawh chuan, Engahte hian nge kan kir ang? In ti a." 
Malachi3:8 Mihringin pathian ata chu a ruksak tur em ni? Mahse nangni chuan min ruksak thin. Nangni erawh chuan, Engahte hian nge kan ruksak che? In ti a, Sawma pakhat leh thilhlanahte hian." 
Malachi3:9 Anchhia lawh in ni ta; nangni he hnam pumpui hian Kei hi min ruksak si thin a. 
Malachi3:10 Ka inah eitur a awm theihna'n sawma pakhat zawng zawng chu thawhlawm inah rawn la rawh u,Van tukverhte chu hawnsak che uin Malsawmna dawn sen loh khawp hial ka vur dawn che u nge dawn lo, mi han fiah teh reng u, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi3:11 Eiraltu chu ka khapsak ang che u a, tichuan, in lei rahte chu a tihchhiatsak tawh lo ang che u a, Huana in grep rah chu a hlam tla ral tawh hek lo ang, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi3:12 Tin, hnam zawng zawngin engthawl an ti ang che u a, ram duhawm tak in la nih dawn avangin, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi3:13 Ka chunga in thute chu a paukhauh hle, LALPA chuan a ti. Nangni erawh chuan, engah khan nge i chungah chutiang thu kan sawi? In ti a." 
Malachi3:14 Pathian rawngbawl hi a thlawn a ni: A thuchah kan zawm leh Sipaihote LALPA hmaa intilunghnur taka kan leng thin hi sawtna eng nge awm? 
Malachi3:15 Tin, mi chapote chu an eng a thawl e, kan ti a; Thil suaksual titute chu an dingchang bawk a, Pathian an fiah a, chhanhim an ni bawk thin in ti a ni:" 
Malachi3:16 Tichuan, LALPA tihtute chu an in be tlang a: LALPA chuan a lo ngaithla a, a lo hria a, LALPA tihtute leh a hming ngaihsak tute tan Hriatrengna lehkhabu chu a hmaah ziak a ni ta a." 
Malachi3:17 Rochuam ka siam niah chuan ka ta an ni ang, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti; tin, miin a fapa, a rawngbawlsaktu chu a zuat angin an ni chu ka zuat ang.Tichuan, in lamlet ang a, mifel leh mi suaksual, Pathian rawngbawltu leh bawl lo tu chu in thliar thei tawh ang." 
Malachi3:18 Tichuan, in lamlet ang a, mifel leh mi suaksual, Pathian rawngbawltu leh bawl lo tu chu in thliar thei tawh ang." 
Malachi4:1 Ngai teh u, ni chu a lo thleng e, Rawhtuina mei angin a kang a ni; Mi chapo zawng zawngte leh sual titu zawng zawngte chu Buhpawl an ni ang: chu ni lo thleng chuan anmahni a kang ang; Zung leh zar chenin a zuah lo ang, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi4:2 Nangni ka hming tihtute tan erawh chuan Felna ni, thlaa tihdamna nen, a lo chhuak ang a, In kal chhuak ang a, bawng note hren lai Thaukhawh angin in tual chai ang." 
Malachi4:3 Mi suaksualte chu in rapbet ang a; Ni ka ruatah chuan in kephah hnuaia meivap an ni dawn si a, Sipaihote LALPA chuan a ti." 
Malachi4:4 Ka chhiahhlawh Mosia dan, Horeb tlanga a hnena ka thupek, Israel mi zawng zawng tana thuruatte leh rorelnate kha hre reng rawh u." 
Malachi4:5 Ngai teh u, LALPA ni ropui leh rapthlak tak a lo thlen hmain Zawlnei Elija chu ka rawn tirh ang che u.Ani chuan pa leh fate inkarah Inrem lehna a thlentir ang; Chuti lo chuan ka lo kal ang a, anchhiain lei hi ka nghaisa dah ang e." 
Malachi4:6 Ani chuan pa leh fate inkarah Inrem lehna a thlentir ang; Chuti lo chuan ka lo kal ang a, anchhiain lei hi ka nghaisa dah ang e." 
Matthew1:5 Salmona'n Rahabi lakah Boaza a hring; Boaza'n Ruthi lakah Obida a hring a; Obida'n Jesaia a hring a; 
Matthew24:15 Chutichuan, Titiautu Tenawm, zawlnei Daniela sawia kha, hmun thianghlima dinga in hmuh hunah chuan, (a chhiar apiangin a awmzia hre rawh se)." 
Luke3:25 chu mi chu Mattathia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Amoia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Nahuma fa a ni a, chu mi chu Eslia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Nggaia fa a ni a," 
Acts2:16 Heng hi zawlnei Joelan a sawi kha a ni zawk: 
Romans9:25 Hosea lehkhabuah chuan, ""Ka mite ni ngai lo chu, 'Ka mite,' ka ti ang; Tin, hmangaih ngai lohvi chu, 'Hmangaihi,' ka ti ang." 
James5:11 Ngai teh u, tuartute chu engthawl kan ti a; Joba chhelzia chu in hria a, Lalpa'n a tawpa a tihzia pawh kha in hmu bawk a, Lalpa chu khawngaihnain a khahzia leh zah a ngaih theihzia pawh kha."
